Genesis1:1 Mu kwinhama Katonda yatonda eigulu n'ensi. 
Genesis1:2 Ensi yali ndhereere era nga ntabuletabule enzikiiza yali egemye ku nhandha, era ng'omwoyo gwa Katonda gumaamiire amaadhi." 
Genesis1:3 Agho Katonda yaakoba ati: “Ghabeegho obutangaavu,” Era obutangaavu bwabaagho." 
Genesis1:4 Katonda yaabona nga kikalamu okubaagho obutangaavu. Agho yaayawula obutangaavu ku nzikiiza. 
Genesis1:5 Obutangaavu yaabweta Omusana, ate enzikiiza yaagyeta Obwire. Bwaziba era bwakya olwo lwaba nga n'olunaku olusooka." 
Genesis1:6 Agho Katonda yaakoba ati: “Ghabeegho ekyawulamu amaadhi, kyawulengamu amaadhi ghabiri.” Era kyaba kityo." 
Genesis1:7 Katonda yaataagho ekyawulamu amaadhi agali ghaigulu n'ago agali ghansi. 
Genesis1:8 Ekyawulamu ekyo Katonda yaakyeta Eigulu. Bwaziba era bwakya olwo lwaba nga n'olunaku olwokubiri. 
Genesis1:9 Agho Katonda yaakoba ati: “Amaadhi agali ghansi gh'eigulu geesololeze ghalala, olwo obukalu buboneke.” Era kyaba kityo." 
Genesis1:10 Obukalu obwo Katonda yaabweta Ensi, ate amaadhi agaali geesoloiza yageeta Enhandha. Katonda yaakibona nga kikalamu." 
Genesis1:11 Agho Katonda yaakoba ati: “Ensi eidheku ebimera ebya buli nsambo: ebyo ebitaaku ensigo, n'emiti egitaaku ebibala omuli ensigo dhaagyo.” Era kyaba kityo." 
Genesis1:12 Ensi yaidhaku ebimera ebya buli nsambo ebyo ebitaaku ensigo, n'emiti egitaaku ebibala omuli ensigo dhaagyo. Katonda yaakibona nga kikalamu." 
Genesis1:13 Bwaziba era bwakya olwo lwaba nga n'olunaku olwokusatu. 
Genesis1:14 Agho Katonda yaakoba ati: “Ghabeegho ebyaka ku igulu, okwawulagho omusana n'obwire bibenga obumanhiso obw'ebiseera, obw'enaku, n'obw'emyaka," 
Genesis1:15 era byakirenga ku igulu okumuliikirira ensi.” Era kyaba kityo. 
Genesis1:16 Katonda yaakola ebyaka ebikologho bibiri ekyaka einho nga kya kufuganga musana, ate ekyaka akatono nga kya kufuganga bwire. Era yaakola n'emuunienie." 
Genesis1:17 Ebyaka ebyo yaabita ku igulu bimuliikirirenga ensi," 
Genesis1:18 bifugenga omusana n'obwire, era byawulengagho obutangaavu ku nzikiiza. Katonda yaakibona nga kikalamu." 
Genesis1:19 Bwaziba era bwakya, olwo lwaba nga n'olunaku olwokuna." 
Genesis1:20 Agho Katonda yaakoba ati: “Amaadhi gabeemu ebitonde ebiramu ebya buli nsambo, era mu ibbanga mubeemu enhonhi nga dhiguluka.”" 
Genesis1:21 Agho Katonda yaatonda agasota ag'omu nhandha, n'ebiramu ebindi ebiba mu maadhi ebya buli nsambo era n'enhonhi edha buli nsambo. Katonda yaakibona nga kikalamu." 
Genesis1:22 Yaabigha enkabi ati: “Muzaale, mwale, mwidhuze enhandha, era n'enhonhi dhaale ku nsi.”" 
Genesis1:23 Bwaziba era bwakya olwo lwaba nga n'olunaku olwokutaanu. 
Genesis1:24 Agho Katonda yaakoba ati: “Ensi eidheku ebiramu ebya buli nsambo: ensolo enfuge, n'edh'omu nsiko, n'ebyeghaluliza ku itaka.” Era kyaba kityo." 
Genesis1:25 Katonda yaatonda ensolo edh'omu nsiko, n'ensolo enfuge edha buli nsambo. Era yaatonda ebyeghaluliza ku itaka byonabyona. Katonda yaakibona nga kikalamu." 
Genesis1:26 Agho Katonda yaakoba ati: “Tukole abantu mu mboneka yaife nga bafaanana ng'oti niife, bafugenga ebyenhandha, n'enhonhi, n'ensolo enfuge n'edh'omu nsiko, era na kiisi kyeghaluliza ku itaka.”" 
Genesis1:27 Agho Katonda yaatonda abantu mu mboneka ye yeene, yaatonda omusaadha n'omukazi." 
Genesis1:28 Era yaabagha enkabi, yaabakoba ati: “Muzaale, mwale, mwidhuze ensi, mugifuge. Mufugenga ebyenhandha n'enhonhi, na kiisi kiramu ekitambula ku nsi.”" 
Genesis1:29 Katonda yaakoba ati: “Bona eno, mbaghaire kiisi kisimbe ekitaaku ensigo ekiri ku nsi, na kiisi muti ogutaaku ebibala omuli ensigo. Eyo n'enaabanga emere yaimwe." 
Genesis1:30 Era kiisi nsolo ey'omu nsiko, na kiisi nhonhi, na kiisi kyeghaluliza ku nsi ekiri n'obulamu, byonabyona mbighaire eisubi n'amakaba ag'ebisimbe nga n'emere yaabyo.” Era kyaba kityo." 
Genesis1:31 Katonda yaabona bye yakola, byamusangaaza inho. Bwaziba era bwakya olwo lwaba nga n'olunaku olwomukaaga." 
Genesis2:1 Olwo ni, eigulu n'ensi, ni byonabyona ebirimu, byamalirizibwa okukolebwa." 
Genesis2:2 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu Katonda yaamaliriza omulimo, gwe yali ng'ali kukola. Yaawuumula ku lunaku olwo olwomusanvu, ng'amaze emirimo gye gyonagyona, gye yali ng'ali kukola." 
Genesis2:3 Yaagha olunaku olwo olwomusanvu enkabi era yaalutukuza. Kuba olwo lwe yawuumuliraku emirimo gye gyonagyona egy'okutonda. 
Genesis2:4 Kale ni eyo n'ensambo eigulu n'ensi ye byatondebwamu. Ku lunaku Musengwa Katonda lwe yakoleraku ensi n'eigulu," 
Genesis2:5 ku nsi tikwaliku kimera kyonakyona waire ekirala, era nga ghazira na isubi eryali limezeeku. Kuba Musengwa Katonda yali akaali kugwisa maadhi ku nsi, era nga ghazira muntu alima ku nsi." 
Genesis2:6 Aye oluudhiruudhi lwavanga mu itaka lwaboza ensi yoonayoona. 
Genesis2:7 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaawumba omuntu mu itaka, yaamufuuwa mu nhindo omuuka ogw'obulamu olwo omuntu yaatoolera okuba omulamu." 
Genesis2:8 Musengwa Katonda yaataagho enimiro mu Edeni ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba yaata omwo omuntu ye yali amaze okuwumba. 
Genesis2:9 Musengwa Katonda yaameza mu nsi kiisi muti ogusanhusa okubona era omulungi okulyaku ebibala. Ghagati mu nimiro nga ghaligho omuti ogw'obulamu era ogw'okumanha obulungi n'obubi. 
Genesis2:10 Omwiga gwakuuluulanga nga gubita mu Edeni era gwafukiriranga enimiro eyo. Nga bwe gumala gweyawulamu gwafuuka emiiga ena. 
Genesis2:11 Eriina ery'omwiga ogusooka nga ni Pishoni guno nga gukuuluula okwezungulula ekiketezo kyonakyona ekya Havila ekirimu zaabu. 
Genesis2:12 Zaabu ow'omu nsi eyo mukenenule, era eyo eriyo n'obuwoowo bwa bedeliyamu n'amabaale ga onikisi." 
Genesis2:13 Eriina ery'omwiga ogwokubiri nga ni Gihoni; guno nga gukuuluula okwezungulula ekiketezo kyonakyona ekya Kushi. 
Genesis2:14 Eriina ery'omwiga ogwokusatu nga ni Tiguri; guno nga gukuuluulira ku luuyi lw'e buvandhuba bw'e Assiria. N'omwiga ogwokuna ni Eufurate. 
Genesis2:15 Musengwa Katonda yaatoola omuntu, yaamuta mu nimiro ey'e Edeni, agirimenga era agirabirirenga." 
Genesis2:16 Yaamukoba ati: “Oli wa idembe okulya ekibala kyonakyona ekya kiisi muti oguli mu nimiro. 
Genesis2:17 Aye otalyanga ku kibala kya ku muti ogw'okumanha obulungi n'obubi, kuba olunaku lwene lw'olikirya, olifa.”" 
Genesis2:18 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Ti kirungi omuntu okubanga yenka. Ndidha kumukolerayo omubeezi amugwanira.” 
Genesis2:19 Agho yaawumba mu itaka ensolo dhoonadhoona era n'enhonhi dhoonadhoona yaabireeta eri omuntu abone bw'anaabyetanga. Era omuntu kye yayetanga buli kiramu ekyatondebwa, n'eryafuuka eriina lyakyo." 
Genesis2:20 Kale, omuntu yaatuuma ensolo dhoonadhoona n'enhonhi dhoonadhoona amaina, aye ku ebyo byonabyona nga ghazira kyali kigwaine kuba mubeezi wa muntu." 
Genesis2:21 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera omuntu endoolo enhingi einho era bweyali ng'atendwike, yaamutoolamu olubavu lulala yaizaagho emamba mu kifo kyalwo." 
Genesis2:22 Yalukolamu omukazi, era yaamuleeta eri omuntu." 
Genesis2:23 Omuntu yaakoba ati: “Otyo! Ono buti n'eigumba eriviire mu magumba gange, omubiri oguviire mu mubiri gwange; aidha kwetebwanga mukazi, kuba atooleibwa mu musaadha.”" 
Genesis2:24 N'olw'ensonga eyo, kyova omusaadha alekanga ise n'inhina, ni yeeyimba ghalala ni mukazi we, ababiri ni baafuuka omuntu omulala." 
Genesis2:25 Omusaadha n'omukazi bombi baali madu, aye nga tibagemwa nsoni." 
Genesis3:1 Omusota gwali gwa lugezigezi okusinga ensolo edh'omu nsiko edhindi dhoonadhoona Musengwa Katonda dhe yakola. Agho gwabuuza omukazi guti: “Obwo bwenebwene Katonda yakoba ati mutalyanga kibala kya ku muti gwa mu nimiro waire omulala guti?” 
Genesis3:2 Omukazi yairamu ati: “Tuli ba idembe okulya ebibala eby'oku miti gyonagyona 
Genesis3:3 okutoolaku ebyo eby'oku muti oguli ghagati mu nimiro. Katonda yatukoba obutalyanga kibala kya ku muti ogwo, oba waire okugugemaku; ati lwe tulikiryaku lwe tulifa.”" 
Genesis3:4 Aye omusota gwakoba guti: “Busa naire! Timwidha kufa. 
Genesis3:5 Katonda yakoba atyo kuba aidhi nga bwemulirya ku muti ogwo, amaiso gaimwe galizibuka, mwaba ng'oti ni mwene, mwamanha obulungi n'obubi.”" 
Genesis3:6 Omukazi yaabona ng'omuti gusanhusa amaiso era nga mulungi okulyaku, era yaagwegomba olw'amagezi ge gwali guja okubaleetera. Agho yaanoga ku bibala byagwo yaalya, era yaagha ni ku musaadha we, yeena yaalya." 
Genesis3:7 Olwo amaiso gaibwe bombi gaazibuka, baategeera nga bali madu. Kale baatunga amakaba ag'omuti omutiini, baagakolamu ebivaalo beeghemba." 
Genesis3:8 Agho baawulira Musengwa Katonda ng'ali kutambula mu nimiro eigulo nga kuwoze era beegisa mu miti egy'omu nimiro nga tibenda ababone. 
Genesis3:9 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaayeta omusaadha yaamubuuza ati: “Oli gha?” 
Genesis3:10 Yaamwiramu ati: “Nkuwuliire ng'oli mu nimiro, naatya, kuba mbaire madu kye nviire ni neegisa.”" 
Genesis3:11 Katonda yaamubuuza ati: “Naani akukobeire ati oli madu? Oliire ku kibala eky'oku muti gwe nakukoba obutalyangaku?” 
Genesis3:12 Omusaadha yairamu ati: “Omukazi ye wampa okubanga ninze n'ampaire ekibala ekyo zeena naalyaku.” 
Genesis3:13 Musengwa Katonda yaabuuza omukazi ati: “Kiki kino ky'okoze?” Omukazi yairamu ati: “Omusota n'ogunkemenkereiza naalya.” 
Genesis3:14 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba omusota ati: “Olw'okuba okoze ekyo, okolimiirwa okusinga ensolo dhoonadhoona enfuge n'edh'omu nsiko. Okuva n'olwaleero oidha kutambulanga nga weekululira ku nda yo, era olyenga enkungu enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwo." 
Genesis3:15 Ndidha kutaagho enzigu ghagati wo n'omukazi, ni ghagati gh'eizaire lyo n'eizaire ery'omukazi. Eizaire ery'omukazi eryo liidha kukubanga omutwe ligutentene, era weena oidha kulimoodhanga ebigere.”" 
Genesis3:16 Yaakoba omukazi ati: “Ndidha kwongeranga obulumi bungi mu biseera byo ng'oli nda; mu bulumi mw'onaazaaliranga abaana. Ate nga oidha kwendanga inho okuba aghali balo, era aidhanga kukufuga.”" 
Genesis3:17 Yaakoba omusaadha ati: “Olw'okuba wawulirisa mukazi wo bye yakukoba, waalya ku kibala eky'omuti gwe nabalobera okulyaku, eitaka likolimiirwa. Mu kufaabiikana mw'onaatoolanga eky'okulya, enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwo." 
Genesis3:18 Eitaka eryo liidha kumerangaku amawa n'ebindi ebikufumita; era oidha kulyanga ebimera eby'omu nsiko. 
Genesis3:19 Oidha kufaabiikananga era ogezimulenga, memale ofunenga eky'okulya, okutuusa lw'oliirayo mu itaka mwe wakolebwa. Mu itaka mwe wava, era mu itaka mw'oliira.”" 
Genesis3:20 Omusaadha yaatuuma mukazi we eriina Eva, kuba n'eyali inhina w'abalamu boonaboona." 
Genesis3:21 Musengwa Katonda yaakolera Adamu ni mukazi we ebivaalo eby'amawu, yaabavaaza." 
Genesis3:22 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Bona, omuntu afuuse ng'oti niife, okumanhanga obulungi n'obubi. Tutamuganha kunoga kibala ku muti ogw'obulamu, na kukirya, n'aghangaala byanda na byanda.”" 
Genesis3:23 Kale Musengwa Katonda yaamutoola mu nimiro ey'e Edeni, alimenga eitaka mwe yakolebwa," 
Genesis3:24 yaamubingira kuliya. Ku luuyi olw'enimiro olw'e buvandhuba yataayo ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi, era n'empiima eyaka, era ng'ekyukira ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona okukuumanga engira eja ku muti ogw'obulamu." 
Genesis4:1 Adamu yaaba ni mukazi we Eva, yaatoola enda. Yaazaala omwana era yaakoba ati: “Nfunie omwana nga Musengwa Katonda n'ambeera.” Kale yaamutuuma eriina Kaini." 
Genesis4:2 Kabiri yaazaala omwana owundi, yaamutuuma eriina Abeli. Abeli ono yaaba mwayi wa ntaama aye Kaini yaaba mulimi." 
Genesis4:3 Ekiseera nga kibiseegho Kaini yaaleeta ku makungula ge, yaagaghaayo eri Musengwa Katonda." 
Genesis4:4 Abeli yeena yaaleeta ku ntaama dhe edhaazaalibwa mu nzaalo edhisooka, yaadhiita, yaghaayo amasavu gaadho. Musengwa Katonda yaasiima Abeli n'ekigheebwayo kye." 
Genesis4:5 Aye yaaloba kusiima Kaini n'ekigheebwayo kye. Agho Kaini yaatuubatuuba olw'obusungu obungi. 
Genesis4:6 Musengwa Katonda yaamubuuza ati: “Kiki ekikutuubyatuubya n'obusungu obungi butyo? 
Genesis4:7 Bw'oba ng'okoze ekituufu tosiimibwa? Aye nga bw'okoze obubi, ekibi kikuteegereire ku lwigi nga kyenda okukufuga. Aye oteekwa okukighangula.”" 
Genesis4:8 Kaini yaakoba muganda we Abeli ati: “Tuje tubbaalebbaaleku.” Era bwebaali nga bali eyo, Kaini yeefuulira muganda we yaamwita." 
Genesis4:9 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaabuuza Kaini ati: “Muganda wo Abeli ali gha?” Kaini yairamu ati: “Tiidhi ninze omukuumi wa muganda wange?” 
Genesis4:10 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Kiki kino ky'okoze? Omusaayi gwa muganda wo guli kundirira okuva ghansi olw'okwenda okwesasuuza. 
Genesis4:11 Buti okolimiirwa era ghazira ky'okaafuna kuva mu itaka eryasaimya omunwa, ni linhwa omusaayi gwa muganda wo y'oise." 
Genesis4:12 Bw'onaalimanga eitaka tiriidha kukughanga makungula naire; ku nsi oidha kutambulatambulanga eyo otyo ng'ozira gh'osula.” 
Genesis4:13 Kaini yaakoba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Ekibonerezo ekyo kikakali inho, tighanga kukigumira." 
Genesis4:14 Olwaleero ominze ku itaka lino era ni mu maiso go. Ndidhanga kutambulatambula eyo ntyo nga nzira ghe nsula, era kiisi anandhagaananga, ng'andhita bwite.”" 
Genesis4:15 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Busa naire. Omuntu yeenayeena bw'akwita, olyesasuuzibwamu obulamu bwa bantu musanvu.” Musengwa Katonda yaata ku Kaini akamanhiso, kiisi amwagaana alobenga kumwita." 
Genesis4:16 Kaini yaava mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, yaaja yaabanga mu nsi eyetebwa “Ntambula ntyo,” eri ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba bwa Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 Kaini yaba ni mukazi we, yaatoola enda, yaazaala omwana omulenzi baamutuuma eriina Enoka. Kaini yaazimba ekibuga era yaakituuma eriina lya mutabane we oyo Enoka." 
Genesis4:18 Enoka yaazaala Iradi, Iradi yaazaala Mehuyaeli, Mehuyaeli yaazaala Methusaeli, Methusaeli yazaala Lameka." 
Genesis4:19 Lameka yali n'abakazi babiri owundi nga ni Ada ate owundi nga ni Zila. 
Genesis4:20 Ada yaazaala Yabali oyo n'eyali dhaadha w'abo abaayi abasula mu weema. 
Genesis4:21 Muganda we nga ni Yubali, dhaadha w'abo boonaboona abakubi ab'entongooli n'abafuuyi ab'endere." 
Genesis4:22 Zila yaazaala Tubali Kaini eyali omugheesi ow'ebintu eby'ekikomo n'eby'ekyuma. Mwanhina yali ng'ayetebwa Naama. 
Genesis4:23 Lameka yaakoba bakazi be ati: “Ada ni Zila bakazi bange mumpulirise, ndhise omusaadha omwisuka kuba ankubye era yanfumita." 
Genesis4:24 Bwe kiba nti okwita Kaini kwesasuuzibwamu obulamu bwa bantu musanvu, agho ni, okwita Lameka kuli na kwesasuuzibwamu bulamu bwa bantu nsanvu na musanvu.”" 
Genesis4:25 Adamu yaaba ni mukazi we kabiri, yaazaala omwana mulenzi. Yaamutuuma eriina Sethi, kuba yakoba ati: “Katonda ampaire omwana omulenzi aire mu kifo kya Abeli, Kaini ye yaita.”" 
Genesis4:26 Sethi yeena yaazaala omwana mulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Enoshi. Mu biseera ebyo abantu mwe baasookera okusabanga Musengwa Katonda mu liina lye." 
Genesis5:1 Kino n'ekitabo eky'abaidhukulu ba Adamu nga bwebairaganwaku: Katonda bweyatonda omuntu, yamukola mu mboneka ye yeene." 
Genesis5:2 Yatonda omusaadha n'omukazi, yaabagha enkabi era yaabatuuma eriina “Muntu.”" 
Genesis5:3 Adamu bweyagheza emyaka ekikumi n'asatu (130) egy'obukulu, yaazaala omwana omulenzi ng'amufaanana mu mboneka ni mu kikula; yaamutuuma eriina Sethi." 
Genesis5:4 Adamu oyo yaaghangaala emyaka egindi lunaana (800) ng'amaze okuzaala Sethi. Era yaazaala n'abaana abandi; 
Genesis5:5 yaafa ng'agheza emyaka lwenda n'asatu (930) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis5:6 Sethi bweyagheza emyaka ekikumi n'etaanu (105) egy'obukulu yaazaala omwana omulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Enoshi." 
Genesis5:7 Sethi oyo yaaghangaala emyaka egindi lunaana na musanvu (807) ng'amaze okuzaala Enoshi. Era yaazaala n'abaana abandi; 
Genesis5:8 yaafa ng'agheza emyaka lwenda na ikumi n'ebiri (912) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis5:9 Enoshi bweyagheza emyaka ekyenda (90) egy'obukulu yaazaala omwana omulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Kenani." 
Genesis5:10 Enoshi oyo yaaghangaala emyaka egindi lunaana na ikumi n'etaanu (815) ng'amaze okuzaala Kenani. Era yaazaala n'abaana abandi; 
Genesis5:11 yaafa ng'agheza emyaka lwenda n'etaanu (905) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis5:12 Kenani bweyagheza emyaka ensanvu (70) egy'obukulu yaazaala omwana omulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Mahalaleli." 
Genesis5:13 Kenani oyo yaaghangaala emyaka egindi lunaana n'ana (840) ng'amaze okuzaala Mahalaleli. Era yaazaala n'abaana abandi; 
Genesis5:14 yaafa ng'agheza emyaka lwenda na ikumi (910) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis5:15 Mahalaleli bweyagheza emyaka enkaaga n'etaanu (65) egy'obukulu yaazaala omwana omulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Yaredi." 
Genesis5:16 Mahalaleli oyo yaaghangaala emyaka egindi lunaana n'asatu (830) ng'amaze okuzaala Yaredi. Era yaazaala n'abaana abandi; 
Genesis5:17 yaafa ng'agheza emyaka lunaana na kyenda n'etaanu (895) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis5:18 Yaredi bweyagheza emyaka ekikumi n'enkaaga n'ebiri (162) egy'obukulu yaazaala omwana omulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Enoka." 
Genesis5:19 Yaredi oyo yaaghangaala emyaka egindi lunaana (800) ng'amaze okuzaala Enoka. Era yaazaala n'abaana abandi; 
Genesis5:20 yaafa ng'agheza emyaka lwenda na nkaaga n'ebiri (962) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis5:21 Enoka bweyagheza emyaka enkaaga n'etaanu (65) egy'obukulu yaazaala omwana omulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Methusela." 
Genesis5:22 Okuva olwo Enoka yaaba ng'atambulira mu Katonda, yaaghangaala emyaka egindi bikumi bisatu (300). Era yaazaala n'abaana abandi." 
Genesis5:23 Woonawoona yaaba ng'aghangaaliire emyaka bikumi bisatu na nkaaga n'etaanu (365). 
Genesis5:24 Enoka oyo yaamala obulamu bwe ng'atambulira mu Katonda era yaamala yaabulagho bubule, kuba Katonda yamutwala." 
Genesis5:25 Methusela bweyagheza emyaka ekikumi n'ekinaana n'omusanvu (187) egy'obukulu yaazaala omwana omulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Lameka." 
Genesis5:26 Methusela oyo yaaghangaala emyaka egindi lusanvu na kinaana n'ebiri (782). Era yaazaala n'abaana abandi; 
Genesis5:27 yaafa ng'agheza emyaka lwenda na nkaaga na mwenda (969) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis5:28 Lameka bweyagheza emyaka ekikumi n'ekinaana n'ebiri (182) egy'obukulu yaazaala omwana omulenzi. 
Genesis5:29 Yaamutuuma eriina Noa. Yaakoba ati: “Ono n'alitwizaamu amaani mu kugezimula n'okufaabiikana kwaife, ng'akozesa eitaka lyene eryo Musengwa Katonda lye yakolima.”" 
Genesis5:30 Lameka oyo yaaghangaala emyaka egindi ebikumi bitaanu na kyenda n'etaanu (595) ng'amaze okuzaala Noa. Era yaazaala n'abaana abandi; 
Genesis5:31 yaafa ng'agheza emyaka lusanvu na nsavu na musanvu (777) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis5:32 Noa bweyagheza emyaka ebikumi ebitaanu (500) egy'obukulu yazaala abaana abalenzi basatu: Shemu, Hamu ni Yafethi." 
Genesis6:1 Agho abantu bwe baaja nga beeyongera okwala ku nsi, baazaala abaana abaghala." 
Genesis6:2 Abaana ab'omu igulu bwe baalinga bati ku baana abaghala abo ab'abantu, baabona nga balungi. Kale baababayiza nga bwebaayendanga." 
Genesis6:3 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Omwoyo gwange tigwidha kusigalanga mu muntu byanda na byanda, kuba omuntu mubiri bubiri ogufa enaku edh'obulamu bwe tidhija kuswikanga myaka kikumi n'abiri (120).”" 
Genesis6:4 Mu biseera ebyo ni mu biseera ebyairirira, abaana ab'omu igulu baazaalanga abaana mu baana abaghala ab'abantu abaana abo n'abaafuuka abantu ab'amaani, abawaigufu era abakanu, abaayetebwanga Nefilimu, abaamanhikana einho mu biseera ebyabita." 
Genesis6:5 Musengwa Katonda yaabona ng'omuntu ku nsi afuuse mubi inho era ng'ebidhuubo bye bibi ekiseera kyonakyona. 
Genesis6:6 Agho yeidhusa ekyamutonza omuntu ku nsi, era enaku yaamuluma ku mwoyo." 
Genesis6:7 Yaakoba ati: “Ndidha kusaaniagho omuntu ye natonda ave ku nsi, era nsaaniegho n'ensolo, n'ebyeghaluliza ku itaka, n'enhonhi, kuba neidhwisa ekyabintonza.”" 
Genesis6:8 Aye ate Musengwa Katonda yaasiima Noa. 
Genesis6:9 Bino n'ebifa ku Noa. Yali muntu akola ebituufu, ng'aziraku kibi mu bantu ab'omu biseera bye" 
Genesis6:10 era ng'atambulira mu Katonda. Yazaala abaana abalenzi basatu, Shemu, Hamu ni Yafethi." 
Genesis6:11 Aye, abantu abandi boonaboona baali babi mu maiso ga Katonda, era ng'ebikolwa eby'obukambwe bibunie ensi yoonayoona." 
Genesis6:12 Katonda yaalingirira ensi, yaabona ng'eidhwire obubi, kuba obulamu obw'abantu boonaboona bwali bwidhwire kukola bibi byereere." 
Genesis6:13 Katonda yaakoba Noa ati: “Nsazeegho okuzikiriza abantu boonaboona, kuba baleeteire ensi okwidhula ebikolwa byaibwe eby'obukambwe." 
Genesis6:14 Weekolere eryato mu muti omulungi olisalemu ebisenge era olimaaleku obulimbo munda ni ku ngulu. 
Genesis6:15 Oti bw'obe olikole: Obuleeyi bwalyo bube mita kikumi n'asatu na isatu (133), obugazi bube mita amakumi abiri na ibiri (22), ate obugungumavu bube mita ikumi na isatu (13)." 
Genesis6:16 Eryato eryo lizimbeku akasolya, ng'oleseegho eibanga lya mukono mulala okuva ku mbaawo edh'omu mbali ghe dhikoma. Lizimbe nga lirimu ekisenge ekya ghansi, ekya ghagati, n'ekya ghaigulu. Era oliteeku olwigi mu mbali;" 
Genesis6:17 kuba bona, ndidha kuleeta omwidhuzo gw'amaadhi ku nsi guzikirize kiisi kiri na bulamu ekiri ghansi gh'eigulu. Buli kintu ku nsi kiidha kufa." 
Genesis6:18 Aye ndidha kukola endagaano yange n'iwe era oidha kwingira mu lyato eryo, iwe ni batabane bo, ni mukazi wo, ni baka batabane bo." 
Genesis6:19 Era oidha kutwala mu lyato omwo bibiribibiri, ekisaadha n'ekikazi, ku buli kika kya kintu kiramu ekiri n'omubiri, obikuume nga biramu n'iwe." 
Genesis6:20 Buli kika kya nhonhi, na buli kika kya nsolo, era na buli kika ky'ebyo ebyeghaluliza ku itaka byonabyona obikuume nga biramu." 
Genesis6:21 Era twala ku buli kika kya mere eriibwa ogite mu kyagi, eyo n'eidha okuba emere yo nabyo.”" 
Genesis6:22 Noa yaakola ebyo byonabyona Katonda bye yamulagira. 
Genesis7:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Noa ati: “Ingira mu lyato n'ab'omu ndhu yo boonaboona, kuba mboine nga niiwe omuntu omutuufu wenka mu bantu ab'oluse luno boonaboona." 
Genesis7:2 Ku buli kika kya nsolo enongoofu, twalaku emiyimbo musanvu, ensaadha n'enkazi yaayo era ni ku buli kika eky'ensolo edhitali nongoofu otwaleku omuyimbo mulala, ensaadha n'enkazi yaayo" 
Genesis7:3 era ni ku buli kika eky'enhonhi kwona otwaleku emiyimbo musanvu, ensaadha n'enkazi yaayo. Memale olwo buli kika eky'ensolo n'eky'enhonhi kisobole okukuumibwa nga kiramu mu nsi." 
Genesis7:4 Kuba mu nnaku musanvu okuva ni buti, ndidha kugwisa amaadhi ku nsi okumala enaku amakumi ana, omusana n'obwire, olwo nsaaniegho ku nsi buli kintu kiramu kye nakola.”" 
Genesis7:5 Noa yaakola ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yamulagira. 
Genesis7:6 Noa yali agheza emyaka lukaaga (600) egy'obukulu, omwidhuzo ghe gwaidhira ku nsi." 
Genesis7:7 Agho yaingira mu lyato ni batabane be, ni mukazi we, ni baka batabane be, bawone omwidhuzo." 
Genesis7:8 Ku buli nsolo enongoofu, ni ku edho edhitali nongoofu, ni ku buli nhonhi, era ni ku buli ekyeghaluliza ku itaka ku nsi," 
Genesis7:9 bibiribibiri, ekisaadha n'ekikazi, byaingira ni Noa mu lyato nga Katonda bweyalagira." 
Genesis7:10 Era enaku omusanvu nga dhibiseegho omwidhuzo gw'amaadhi gwayuyika ku nsi. 
Genesis7:11 Mu mwaka ogwolukaaga (600) ogw'obulamu bwa Noa, mu mwezi ogwokubiri, ku lunaku olweikumi n'omusanvu olw'omwezi ogwo, enhindo dhoonadhoona edh'amaadhi ghansi mu itaka dhaasembuka, n'ebituli eby'oku igulu byaiguka." 
Genesis7:12 Amaadhi gaagwa ku nsi omusana n'obwire okumala enaku makumi ana. 
Genesis7:13 Ku lunaku olwo lwene Noa ni batabane be, Shemu, Hamu ni Yafethi, baingira mu lyato ghalala ni mukazi we, era ni baka batabane be abo." 
Genesis7:14 Era baingira na buli kika kya nsolo dha mu nsiko, n'edho enfuge, era na buli kika ky'ebyo ebyeghaluliza ku itaka, era na buli kika kya nhonhi, era n'ebyo byonabyona ebiri n'amaghagha." 
Genesis7:15 Ekisaadha n'ekikazi okuva ku buli kika eky'ekintu ekiri n'obulamu, kyaingira mu lyato ni Noa," 
Genesis7:16 nga Katonda bweyalagira. Agho Musengwa Katonda yaigaliza Noa munda. 
Genesis7:17 Omwidhuzo gweyongera ku nsi okumala enaku makumi ana era amaadhi gaabanda buli ghantu, gaabbeeda eryato lyaghanikibwa ghaigulu gh'ensi." 
Genesis7:18 Amaadhi geeyongera okubanda ku nsi eryato lyaseeyeeya ku ngulu ku maadhi. 
Genesis7:19 Era amaadhi geeyongera okusituka gaaba maleeyi inho, gaamira ensozi endeeyiriri ghansi gh'eigulu." 
Genesis7:20 Geeyongera okumira ensozi edho, dhaaba ghansi mu maadhi ago, mu buleeyi bwa mikono ikumi n'etaanu." 
Genesis7:21 Kiisi kintu kiramu ekyali ku nsi kyafa, enhonhi, ensolo enfuge n'edh'omu nsiko, n'ebitonde byonabyona ebitambulira mu biyindi, era n'abantu boonaboona." 
Genesis7:22 Kiisi kintu ekyali nga kigheera ku bukalu obw'ensi, kyafa." 
Genesis7:23 Musengwa Katonda yazikiriza ebintu ebiramu byonabyona ku nsi abantu, ensolo, ebyo ebyeghaluliza ku itaka, n'enhonhi. Noa n'abo abaali naye mu lyato, ni bonka abaawonagho." 
Genesis7:24 Amaadhi gaasigala nga gakaamize ensi okumala enaku kikumi n'ataanu (150). 
Genesis8:1 Katonda yaidhukira Noa, era n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko, n'edho enfuge dhe yali nadho mu lyato. Katonda yaasindika empewo yaafuuwa ku nsi, amaadhi gaakendeera." 
Genesis8:2 Enhindo edh'amaadhi ghansi mu itaka dhaasembwa, n'ebituli eby'amaadhi ku igulu byaigalwa. Amaadhi gaalekera okugwa okuva ku igulu" 
Genesis8:3 amaadhi gaatoolera mpolampola okuva ku nsi. Oluvainhuma olw'enaku ekikumi n'ataanu (150), amaadhi gaakendeera," 
Genesis8:4 era ku lunaku olweikumi n'omusanvu mu mwezi ogwomusanvu, eryato lyatyama ku nsozi edh'e Ararati." 
Genesis8:5 Amaadhi geeyongera okukendeera, era ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogweikumi, emitwe egy'ensozi gyaboneka." 
Genesis8:6 Nga ghabiseegho enaku makumi ana, Noa yaigula eidinisa ku lyato lye yakola," 
Genesis8:7 yaasindika eikoova ku luya. Eikoova lino lyaja nga ligulukira ghano ni ghale, lyaloba kwira, okutuusa amaadhi lwe gaakamuka ni gakala ku nsi." 
Genesis8:8 Agho yaasindika eighemba okubona oba nga amaadhi gakendeire ku nsi. 
Genesis8:9 Aye olw'okuba ng'amaadhi gaali gaidhwire woonawoona ku itaka, eighemba tiryafuna gha kugwa. Agho lyairayo ku lyato, Noa yaafulumya omukono yaaligema, yaalingiza munda." 
Genesis8:10 Yaateega enaku musanvu dhaabitagho, kabiri yasindika eighemba ku luya." 
Genesis8:11 Eighemba eryo lyaira y'ali eigulo nga liri n'eikaba eibisi ery'oku muti omwoliva. Agho Noa yaamanha ng'amaadhi gaali gakendeire. 
Genesis8:12 Kabiri yaateega enaku musanvu edhindi dhaabitagho, era yaasindika kabiri eighemba ku luya aye ku mukuzi guno tiryaira y'ali kabiri." 
Genesis8:13 Mu mwaka ogwolukaaga n'omulala (601) ogw'obulamu bwa Noa, mu mwezi ogusooka, ku lunaku olusooka omwezi ogwo, amaadhi gaakamuka ku nsi. Noa yaaghembula ghaigulu ku lyato, yaalinga ku luya, yaabona nga ku itaka kukalu." 
Genesis8:14 Mu mwezi ogwokubiri, ku lunaku olwabiri n'omusanvu olw'omwezi ogwo, ensi yaakala bukalamu." 
Genesis8:15 Agho Katonda yaakoba Noa ati: 
Genesis8:16 “Fuluma mu lyato iwe ni mukazi wo, ni batabane bo, era ni bakazi baibwe." 
Genesis8:17 Ja na buli kintu ekiramu ekiri n'omubiri ekiri n'iwe: enhonhi, ensolo n'ebyeghaluliza ku itaka, bisobole okuzaalagana, byale, era bibune ensi.”" 
Genesis8:18 Kale Noa yaafuluma mu lyato ni mukazi we, ni batabane be, era ni baka batabane be." 
Genesis8:19 Ensolo, n'ebyo ebyeghaluliza ku itaka, n'enhonhi, na buli kintu ekitambula ku nsi, byonabyona byafuluma mu lyato mu bika byabyo." 
Genesis8:20 Agho Noa yaazimbira Musengwa Katonda alutaari, era yatoola ku buli nsolo nongoofu, ni ku buli nhonhi nongoofu, yaaghaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ebiromba ku alutaari." 
Genesis8:21 Musengwa Katonda yaawunhiza akawoowo, yaasangaala, yaakoba mule ati: “Tikairayo kukolima nsi kabiri olw'omuntu by'akola, kuba omwoyo gwe gwidhwire bubi bwereere okuva mu buto bwe. Tikairayo kabiri kuzikiriza bintu biramu byonabyona nga bwe nkoze." 
Genesis8:22 Ensi ng'ekaaligho: okusiga n'okukungula, obwinhogovu n'olwota, ebiseera eby'endoboozi n'eby'ekiinhogogo, omusana n'obwire, ebyo byonabyona tibija kuwaagho.”" 
Genesis9:1 Katonda yaagha Noa n'abaana be enkabi, yaabakoba ati: “Muzaale, mwale, mwidhuze ensi." 
Genesis9:2 Buli nsolo, buli nhonhi, buli kyeghaluliza ku itaka era na buli kyanhandha ebyo byonabyona biidha kubatyanga. Byonabyona biteereibwa mu buyinza bwaimwe." 
Genesis9:3 Kiisi kiramu ekitambula kinaabanga kya kulya kyaimwe byonabyona mbibaghaire, nga bwe nabagha n'ebimera." 
Genesis9:4 Aye kye mutateekwa kulya, n'emamba ng'erimu omusaayi; kuba omusaayi n'obulamu." 
Genesis9:5 Ole bw'anaazikirizanga obulamu obw'omuntu, aidha kuvunaanibwanga era abonerezebwe. N'ensolo dhoona dhiidha kubonerezebwanga olw'okuzikiriza obulamu obw'omuntu." 
Genesis9:6 Omuntu yakolebwa mu mboneka ya Katonda: Kale ole bw'anaitanga omuntu, yeena aidhanga kwitibwa." 
Genesis9:7 “Imwe muzaale era mwale, mwidhuze ensi era mugifuge.”" 
Genesis9:8 Agho Katonda yaakoba Noa ni batabane be ati: 
Genesis9:9 “Bona, ndi kukola endagaano yange n'imwe, era n'eizaire lyaimwe erinairangagho" 
Genesis9:10 era na buli kiramu ekiri n'imwe, enhonhi, ensolo enfuge n'edh'omu nsiko, byonabyona ebyafuluma mu lyato." 
Genesis9:11 Ndi kukola endagaano yange n'imwe nti: ebiramu tibikairayo kuzikirizibwa mwidhuzo gwa maadhi kabiri, era omwidhuzo tigukairayo kubaagho kuzikiriza nsi kabiri.”" 
Genesis9:12 Katonda yaakoba ati: “Kano n'akamanhiso akooleka endagaano ey'ebyanda n'ebyanda, ye ndi kukola n'imwe, era ni buli kitonde ekiramu ekiri n'imwe:" 
Genesis9:13 ndi kuta akalaso kange mu bire, kabe akamanhiso akooleka endagaano ye nkoze n'ensi." 
Genesis9:14 Kale bwe nnaaleetanga ebire ku nsi, akalaso ako ni kaboneka mu bire," 
Genesis9:15 ndidha kwidhukiranga endagaano yange ye nkoze n'imwe, era ye nkoze na buli kitonde ekiramu. Era amaadhi tigakairamu kufuuka mwidhuzo kabiri okuzikiriza ebiramu byonabyona." 
Genesis9:16 Bwe kanaabonekanga mu bire, ndidhanga kukalingaku ndidhukire endagaano etawaagho ye nkoze na buli kitonde ekiramu kyonakyona ekiri mu nsi." 
Genesis9:17 Ako n'akamanhiso akooleka endagaano ye nkoze n'ebiramu byonabyona ebiri ku nsi.” 
Genesis9:18 Batabane ba Noa abaafuluma mu lyato ni bano: Shemu, Hamu ni Yafethi. Hamu oyo n'eyazaala Kanaani." 
Genesis9:19 Abo bonsatuli Noa n'eyabazaala era mu abo n'omwava abantu abaidhula ensi yoonayoona. 
Genesis9:20 Noa n'eyasookereza okuba omulimi era yaasimba eisamba ery'emizabbibu. 
Genesis9:21 Bwe yanhwa ku mwenge ogw'emizabbibu, yaatamiira, yaatoolamu engoye yaasigala madu mu weema ye." 
Genesis9:22 Hamu, lata wa Kanaani, yaabona nga ise ali madu, yaafuluma, yaakobera baganda be bale ababiri." 
Genesis9:23 Agho Shemu ni Yafethi baatoola ekivaalo, baakigemera einhuma ku mabega gaibwe. Baatambula ekyeinhumainhuma, baingira mu weema, baaghemba iseibwe eyali amadu, nga tibamulinzeeku ku mubona." 
Genesis9:24 Noa omwenge bwe gwamuwa ku mutwe, n'ategeera omwana we asembayo obuto ky'amukoze," 
Genesis9:25 yaakoba ati: “Kanaani akolimirwe aidha kubanga mwiru wa baganda be.” 
Genesis9:26 Era yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe, Katonda wa Shemu; Kanaani aidha kubanga mwiru wa Shemu." 
Genesis9:27 Katonda agaziye ekiketezo kya Yafethi, babenga ghalala ni Shemu; Kanaani abenga mwiru we.”" 
Genesis9:28 Omwidhuzo nga guwoire, Noa yaaghangaala emyaka egindi ebikumi bisatu n'ataanu (350)," 
Genesis9:29 era yaafa ng'agheza emyaka lwenda n'ataanu egy'obukulu (950). 
Genesis10:1 Bano n'abaidhukulu ba batabane ba Noa: Shemu, Hamu ni Yafethi. Bonsatuli baazaala abaana ng'omwidhuzo gumaze okubaagho." 
Genesis10:2 Abaana ba Yafethi ni bano: Gomeri, Magogi, Madai, Yavani, Tubali, Mesheki ni Tirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Abaana ba Gomeri ni bano: Ashekenazi, Rifathi ni Togaruma." 
Genesis10:4 Abaana ba Yavani ni bano: Elisha, Tarushishi, Kittimu ni Dodanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Mu abo n'omwasimuka abantu abali kumpi n'enhandha era ni ku bizinga. Abantu abo, n'abaidhukulu ba Yafethi, nga bali mu bika byaibwe, mu biketezo byaibwe, era nga buli kikunsu kyogera olulimi olwakyo." 
Genesis10:6 Abaana ba Hamu ni bano: Kushi, Misiraimu, Puti ni Kanaani." 
Genesis10:7 Abaana ba Kushi ni bano: Seba, Havila, Sabita, Raama ni Sabiteka. Ate aba Raama ni bano: Sheba ni Dedani." 
Genesis10:8 Kushi yazaala Nimurodi, eyasooka okuba omusaadha ow'amaani agataloodheka ku nsi." 
Genesis10:9 Yali muyiizi wa maani ku lw'obuyinza bwa Musengwa Katonda, era okwo n'okwava endhogera eti: “Ng'oti ni Nimurodi omuyiizi ow'amaani ku lw'obuyinza bwa Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Genesis10:10 Mu kusooka obwakyabazinga bwe bwalimu ebibuga bino: Babeli, Ereki ni Akkadi nga byonsatuli biri mu kiketezo eky'e Shinari." 
Genesis10:11 Yava mu kiketezo ekyo yaaja mu Assiria, yaazimba Nineve, Rehobati-Iri, Kala," 
Genesis10:12 ni Reseni, ekiri ghagati gha Nineve ni Kala ekyo n'ekibuga ekikologho." 
Genesis10:13 Misiraimu yazaala Ludi, Anami, Lehabi, Nafutu," 
Genesis10:14 Pahurusi, Kasulu (omwasimuka Abafilisiti) ni Kafutori." 
Genesis10:15 Kanaani yazaala Sidoni, omwana we omuberi, ni Hethi," 
Genesis10:16 era n'Abayebusi, Abamori, Abagirigashi," 
Genesis10:17 Abahivi, Abariki, Abasini," 
Genesis10:18 Abaruvadi, Abazemari n'Abahamathi. Olumaliira, ebika eby'Abakanaani byasansaanira mu nsi edhindi." 
Genesis10:19 Ekiketezo eky'Abakanaani nga kiva mu Sidoni, kyaja nga kyolekeire e Gerari kyatuuka e Gaza era kyaja nga kyolekeire e Sodoma, Gomorra, Adama ni Zeboiimu, kyatuukira irala e Lasha." 
Genesis10:20 Abantu abo, n'abaidhukulu ba Hamu, nga bali mu bika byaibwe, mu biketezo byaibwe, era nga buli kikunsu kyogera olulimi olwakyo." 
Genesis10:21 Era ni Shemu mukulu wa Yafethi, era dhaadha w'abaana aba Eberi boonaboona, yeena yazaala abaana" 
Genesis10:22 bano: Elamu, Assihuri, Aripakishadi, Ludi ni Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Abaana aba Aramu, ni bano: Uzi, Huli, Getheri ni Mashi." 
Genesis10:24 Aripakishadi yazaala Shela ate Shela yaazaala Eberi. 
Genesis10:25 Eberi yaazaala abaana babiri: owundi nga ni Pelegi, kuba mu biseera bye yabeeragho abantu beeyawulayawulamu; ate muganda we nga ni Yokutani." 
Genesis10:26 Yokutani yazaala Alumodadi, ni Shelefu, ni Hazarimavethi, ni Yera," 
Genesis10:27 ni Hadoramu, ni Uzali, ni Dikila," 
Genesis10:28 ni Obali, ni Abimaeli, ni Sheba," 
Genesis10:29 ni Ofiri, ni Havila era ni Yobabu. Abo boonaboona n'abaali abaana ba Yokutani." 
Genesis10:30 Ekiketezo mwe baali baba, nga kiva e Mesha kyayolekera e Sefari, kyatuuka ku kiketezo eky'ensozi ekiri mu buvandhuba." 
Genesis10:31 Abantu abo, n'abaidhukulu ba Shemu, nga bali mu bika byaibwe, mu biketezo byaibwe, era nga buli kikunsu kyogera olulimi olwakyo." 
Genesis10:32 Ebyo n'ebika eby'abaana ba Noa, ng'okuzaalibwa kwaibwe bwe kwali, era ng'amaghanga gaibwe bwe gaali. Era mu maghanga ago n'omwasimuka abantu abaasansaanira mu nsi edhindi, ng'omwidhuzo gumaze okubaagho." 
Genesis11:1 Mu mainhama ensi yoonayoona yali n'olulimi lulala, n'endhogera ndala." 
Genesis11:2 Aye abantu bwe baaja nga batambulatambula eyo batyo mu buvandhuba, baayagaana aghataamuufu baasenga agho." 
Genesis11:3 Baakoba bati: “Ka tuwumbe amatoofaali, tugookye bukalamu, gabbalanguke.” Kale baaba n'amatoofaali mu kifo ky'amabaale, era n'eitosi mu kifo kya seminti." 
Genesis11:4 Agho baakoba bati: “Ka twezimbire ekibuga, twezimbire n'omunaala ogutuuka ku igulu tumanhikane, memale tulobe kusansaanizibwa mu nsi.”" 
Genesis11:5 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaika ghansi okubona ekibuga n'omunaala abantu abo bye baali bazimbye," 
Genesis11:6 era yaakoba ati: “Abantu bano boonaboona bali muntu mulala, era boogera olulimi lulala! Kino kitoolereiza butoolereze ku ebyo bye baidha okukola ye bwidha baidha kukolanga kyonakyona kye benda!" 
Genesis11:7 Ka twike ghansi tutabuletabule olulimi lwaibwe, buli mulala alobe kutegeera wundi ky'akoba.”" 
Genesis11:8 Kale Musengwa Katonda yaabasansaaniza eyo mu nsi yoonayoona, era baalekera okuzimba ekibuga." 
Genesis11:9 Ekibuga kyatuumibwa eriina Babeli, kuba eyo Musengwa Katonda ye yatabuliratabulira olulimi olw'ensi yoonayoona. Era eyo ye yatoolera abantu, n'abasansaaniza mu nsi yoonayoona." 
Genesis11:10 Bano ni baidhukulu ba Shemu: Nga ghabiseegho emyaka ebiri bukyanga omwidhuzo gubaagho, Shemu yali agheza emyaka kikumi (100) egy'obukulu. Agho yaazaala Aripakishadi." 
Genesis11:11 Shemu ng'amaze okuzaala Aripakishadi, yaaghangaala emyaka egindi bikumi bitaanu (500), era yaazaala n'abaana abandi." 
Genesis11:12 Aripakishadi bweyagheza emyaka amakumi asatu n'etaanu (35) egy'obukulu, yaazaala Shela." 
Genesis11:13 Aripakishadi oyo ng'amaze okuzaala Shela yaaghangaala emyaka egindi bikumi bina n'esatu, era yaazaala n'abaana abandi." 
Genesis11:14 Shela bweyagheza emyaka amakumi asatu (30) egy'obukulu, yaazaala Eberi." 
Genesis11:15 Shela oyo ng'amaze okuzaala Eberi, yaaghangaala emyaka egindi bikumi bina n'esatu, era yaazaala n'abaana abandi." 
Genesis11:16 Eberi bweyagheza emyaka amakumi asatu n'ena (34) egy'obukulu, yazaala Pelegi." 
Genesis11:17 Eberi oyo ng'amaze okuzaala Pelegi, yaaghangaala emyaka egindi bikumi bina n'asatu (430), era yaazaala n'abaana abandi." 
Genesis11:18 Pelegi bweyagheza emyaka amakumi asatu (30) egy'obukulu, yaazaala Reu." 
Genesis11:19 Pelegi oyo ng'amaze okuzaala Reu yaaghangaala emyaka egindi bikumi bibiri na mwenda (209), era yaazaala n'abaana abandi." 
Genesis11:20 Reu bweyagheza emyaka amakumi asatu n'ebiri (32) egy'obukulu, yaazaala Serugi." 
Genesis11:21 Reu oyo ng'amaze okuzaala Serugi yaaghangaala emyaka egindi bikumi bibiri na musanvu (207), era yaazaala n'abaana abandi." 
Genesis11:22 Serugi bweyagheza emyaka amakumi asatu (30) egy'obukulu, yaazaala Nahori." 
Genesis11:23 Serugi oyo ng'amaze okuzaala Nahori yaaghangaala emyaka egindi bikumi bibiri (200), era yaazaala n'abaana abandi." 
Genesis11:24 Nahori bweyagheza emyaka abiri n'omwenda egy'obukulu (29), yaazaala Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Nahori oyo ng'amaze okuzaala Tera yaaghangaala emyaka egindi kikumi na ikumi na mwenda (119), era yaazaala n'abaana abandi." 
Genesis11:26 Tera bweyagheza emyaka ensanvu (70) egy'obukulu yazaala Aburamu, Nahori ni Harani." 
Genesis11:27 Bano ni baidhukulu ba Tera: Tera yazaala Aburamu, Nahori ni Harani ate Harani yaazaala Loti." 
Genesis11:28 Harani yasooka ise okufa, ng'afiira mu nsi ye yazaalibwamu eyetebwa Uri ey'Abakaladea." 
Genesis11:29 Aburamu yaabayiza omukazi eyayetebwanga Sarai; Nahori yaabayiza omukazi eyayetebwanga Milika, mughala wa Harani. Harani oyo era n'eyazaala ni Isika." 
Genesis11:30 Sarai yaaba mugumba ng'aziraku mwana. 
Genesis11:31 Tera yatwala mutabane Aburamu, ni mwidhukulu we Loti, eyali mutabane wa Harani, era yaatwala ni mukaamwana Sarai, eyali muka Aburamu. Yaaja nabo, baava mu Uri ekiri mu nsi ey'Abakaladea, nga baja mu kiketezo eky'e Kanaani. Aye bwe baatuuka mu Harani, baasenga eyo." 
Genesis11:32 Tera yaafiira eyo ng'agheza emyaka bikumi bibiri n'etaanu (205) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis12:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Aburamu ati: “Va mu nsi yo, oleke ab'ekika kyo n'ab'endhu ya lata wo, oje mu nsi ye naakulaga." 
Genesis12:2 Ndidha kukugha abaidhukulu kamaala, bafuuke eighanga ery'amaani. Ndidha kukugha enkabi, era ndeetere eriina lyo okumanhikana olwo lighange okugheesanga abandi enkabi." 
Genesis12:3 “Abo abakusabira enkabi, nnaabaghanga enkabi, aye abo abakukolimira zeena ndidhanga kubakolimira. Era mu iwe amaghanga goonagoona mwe galigheerwa enkabi.”" 
Genesis12:4 Kale Aburamu yaaja nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamukoba ni Loti yaaja naye. Aburamu ghe yaviira e Harani yali agheza emyaka nsanvu n'etaanu (75) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis12:5 Yatwala mukazi we Sarai, ni Loti omwana wa muganda we, n'ebintu byaibwe byonabyona bye baali nga bagheziiza, era n'abantu be baali bafuniire e Harani. Kale baatoolera olugendo oluja mu nsi ey'e Kanaani. Bwe baatuuka mu Kanaani," 
Genesis12:6 Aburamu yaaja ng'atambula mu nsi eyo, yaatuuka ku muti gwa More mu kifo ekitukuvu e Shekemu. Mu biseera ebyo Abakanaani nga n'abali mu nsi eyo." 
Genesis12:7 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaabonekera Aburamu, yaamukoba ati: “Baidhukulu bo ndibagha ensi eno.” Kale Aburamu yaazimbira agho Musengwa Katonda eyamubonekera, alutaari." 
Genesis12:8 Olwava agho, yaaja mu kiketezo eky'ensozi e buvandhuba w'e Betheli yaazimba eyo weema ye nga Betheli kimuli e bugwandhuba, ate Ayi kyamuba e buvandhuba. Yaazimbira agho Musengwa Katonda alutaari, era yaamusinza." 
Genesis12:9 Agho Aburamu yeeyongera okutambula ng'ayolekeire ekiketezo eky'e Kanaani ekikalukalu ekiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. 
Genesis12:10 Agho endhala yaagwa mu Kanaani, Aburamu yaaja mu Misiri yaasenga eyo okumala entangama, kuba endhala yali egwire ya maani." 
Genesis12:11 Bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okwingira mu Misiri, yaakoba mukazi we Sarai ati: “Bona, ndidhi ng'oli mukazi aboneka obulungi einho." 
Genesis12:12 Era Abamisiri bwe banaakubona baidha kukoba bati ono ni mukazi we olwo nze bandhite, aye iwe bakuleke obeegho." 
Genesis12:13 Kale iwe oidha kubakoba oti oli mwanhinaze, memale olwo mbisibwe bukalamu era mpone okwitibwa ku lulwo.”" 
Genesis12:14 Aburamu bweyaingira mu Misiri, Abamisiri baabona nga bwenebwene omukazi yali mulungi inho." 
Genesis12:15 Era abakungu aba kyabazinga bwe baamubona, baaghayiraku kyabazinga ku bulungi bwe. Olwo Sarai yaatwalibwa mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
Genesis12:16 Era ku lulwe, kyabazinga yaabisa Aburamu bukalamu yaamugha entaama, n'ente, n'endogoyi enume n'enkazi, n'abairu abasaadha n'abakazi, era n'engamiya." 
Genesis12:17 Aye olw'okuba kyabazinga yatwala Sarai, Musengwa Katonda yaamusindikira endwaire embi einho ghalala n'abantu ab'omu kisaagaati kye." 
Genesis12:18 Agho kyabazinga yaayeta Aburamu, yaamubuuza ati: “Kiki kino ky'onkoze? Lwaki tiwankobeire oti ono mukazi wo?" 
Genesis12:19 Lwaki wankobye oti ono mwanhoko, n'ondeka okumutwala nga mukazi wange? Kale ni, mukazi wo wuuyo, mutwale era ogolole.”" 
Genesis12:20 Agho kyabazinga yaalagira abasaadha be baafulumya Aburamu mu nsi eyo, ghalala ni mukazi we era n'ebintu byonabyona bye yali nabyo." 
Genesis13:1 Kale Aburamu yaava mu Misiri yaira mu kiketezo ky'e Kanaani ekikalukalu ekiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, ni mukazi we, n'ebintu byonabyona bye yali nabyo, era ni Loti ng'ali naye." 
Genesis13:2 Aburamu yali mukombe inho, ng'ali n'ebyayo, ni feeza, ni zaabu." 
Genesis13:3 Agho yeeyongera okutambula okuva mu kiketezo ky'e Kanaani ekyo ekikalukalu ekiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, yatuuka e Betheli mu kifo ye yali asoose okuzimba weema ye, ghagati gha Betheli ni Ayi." 
Genesis13:4 Ekyo n'ekifo Aburamu kye yali amaze okuzimbamu alutaari mu kusooka. Agho yaasinza Musengwa Katonda. 
Genesis13:5 Loti yeena yali n'ekighaso eky'entaama n'embuzi, n'olugo olw'ente, era n'abantu ab'omu ndhu ye," 
Genesis13:6 aye ng'eitaka tiribamala bombi kuba ghalala, olw'okuba ebintu byaibwe byali kamaala inho." 
Genesis13:7 Kale ghaabangagho okusoola ghagati gh'abaayi ab'ente dha Aburamu n'abo abaayayanga edha Loti. Mu biseera ebyo Abakanaani n'Abaperizzi nga n'abali mu nsi eyo. 
Genesis13:8 Agho Aburamu yaakoba Loti ati: “Nze n'iwe tuli baaluganda. Ka tulobe kusoola, oba waire abaayi abange okusoola n'ababo." 
Genesis13:9 Ensi yoonayoona oli kugibona eri bwa agho. Kale leka twawukane. Iwe bw'olondagho okuja ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda, nze ndidha kuja ku lw'omusaadha ate bw'olondagho okuja ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha, nze ndidha kuja ku lw'omugooda.”" 
Genesis13:10 Loti yeezunguluza amaiso, yaabona ng'ekiiko eky'e Yorudani kyonakyona okutuukira irala e Zoari, kirimu amaadhi mangi nga kiri ng'oti n'Enimiro ya Musengwa Katonda, oba ng'oti n'ensi ey'e Misiri. Bino byaligho nga Musengwa Katonda akaali kuzikiriza Sodoma ni Gomorra." 
Genesis13:11 Kale Loti yaalondagho okutwala ekiiko eky'e Yorudani kyonakyona, era yaaja e buvandhuba baayawukana batyo." 
Genesis13:12 Aburamu yaasigala mu Kanaani, aye Loti yaasenga mu bibuga eby'omu kiiko, era yaazimba weema ye kumpi ni Sodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Abantu ba Sodoma baali babi, era nga boonooni inho ye Musengwa Katonda." 
Genesis13:14 Loti bweyamala okuja, Musengwa Katonda yakoba Aburamu ati: “Yemerera agho gh'oli, weezunguluze amaiso bukalamu ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona." 
Genesis13:15 Ensi eyo yoonayoona y'oli kubona ndidha kugikugha iwe ni baidhukulu bo, ebe yaimwe ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Genesis13:16 Ndidha kufuula baidhukulu bo okuba abangi ng'oti nkungu mu nsi kibe nti ole bw'alisobola okubala enkungu mu nsi, olwo ni baidhukulu bo boona baliba basobola okubalwa." 
Genesis13:17 Mpegaano ja ng'otambula, obone obuleeyi n'obunene obw'ensi, kuba ndidha kugikugha.”" 
Genesis13:18 Kale Aburamu yaazimbulagho weema ye, yaaja yaasenga kumpi n'emiti gya Mamure mu Heburoni era eyo yaazimbirayo Musengwa Katonda alutaari." 
Genesis14:1 Bakyabazinga bano: Amurafeli ow'e Shinari, Arioki ow'Ellasari, Kedorilaomeri ow'Elamu, ni Tidali ow'e Goiimu" 
Genesis14:2 baatanula olutalo ku bakyabazinga abandi bano: Bera ow'e Sodoma, Birisha ow'e Gomorra, Shinabi ow'e Adama, Shemeberi ow'e Zeboiimu, ni kyabazinga ow'e Bela ekyo nga ni Zoari." 
Genesis14:3 Bakyabazinga bano abataanu abasembyeyo, baayimba ghalala amagye gaibwe mu Kiiko eky'e Siddimu eyo nga n'Enhandha Eyomuunhu." 
Genesis14:4 Kedorilaomeri yali abafugiire emyaka ikumi n'ebiri, aye mu mwaka ogweikumi n'esatu baamudheemera." 
Genesis14:5 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'ena Kedorilaomeri ni bakyabazinga abaali ku luuyi lwe, baidha n'amagye gaibwe baaghangulira Abarefa mu Ashiterothi Karanaimu, n'Abazuzi mu Hamu, n'Ababemi mu Shave Kiriathaimu," 
Genesis14:6 n'Abahori mu kiketezo kyaibwe Seiri eky'ensozi baababingirira okubatuusa mu Eluparani ku mbali kw'eirungu. 
Genesis14:7 Agho baakyuka bairayo, baatuuka Enimishipate, ekyo nga ni Kadeshi, baaghangula ensi yoonayoona ey'Abamaleki, era n'ey'Abamori abaabanga mu Hazazoni Tamari." 
Genesis14:8 Bakyabazinga bano: ow'e Sodoma, n'ow'e Gomorra, n'ow'e Adama, n'ow'e Zeboiimu, era n'ow'e Bela ekyo nga ni Zoari, baaja n'amagye gaibwe okulwana olutalo mu Kiiko eky'e Siddimu." 
Genesis14:9 Baalwanisa Kedorilaomeri kyabazinga ow'Elamu, ni Tidali kyabazinga ow'e Goiimu, ni Amurafeli kyabazinga ow'e Shinari, era ni Arioki kyabazinga wa Ellasari batyo bakyabazinga abana baalwanisa abataanu." 
Genesis14:10 Mu Kiiko eky'e Siddimu mwali mwidhwire ebiina by'eitosi. Kale kyabazinga ow'e Sodoma n'ow'e Gomorra bwe baalumuka olutalo, baagwa mu biina ebyo, aye bakyabazinga bale abandi abasatu baawona, baalumukira mu nsozi." 
Genesis14:11 Abazigu baibwe baanhaga ebintu byonabyona eby'omu Sodoma ni mu Gomorra, n'emere yaibwe yoonayoona." 
Genesis14:12 Era ni Loti omwana wa muganda wa Aburamu, eyali ng'aba mu Sodoma yeena baamutwala nga munhage, baatwala n'ebintu bye, olwamala beejiira." 
Genesis14:13 Aye omuntu eyawonagho yaidha yaakobera byonabyona Aburamu, Omuheburayi eyali ng'aba kumpi n'emiti gya Mamure Omuamori. Mamure ono ni baganda be, Esikoli ni Aneri, baali ba mukago n'Aburamu." 
Genesis14:14 Aburamu bweyawulira nga batwaire owoluganda lwe nga munhage, yaaja n'abasaadha be abalwani, abaazaalirwa mu ndhu ye, ebikumi bisatu na ikumi na munaana, baabingirira bakyabazinga bale abana okutuuka e Dani." 
Genesis14:15 Yaayawula amagye ge mu bikunsu, baalumba abazigu obwire era baabaghangula. Era baababingirira okubatuusa e Hoba, ekiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba, bw'oba ng'oli e Damasiko." 
Genesis14:16 Kale, yaiza ebintu byonabyona ebyali binhagiibwa. Era yaiza n'owoluganda lwe Loti, ghalala n'ebintu bye, era n'abakazi, n'abantu abandi abanhage." 
Genesis14:17 Aburamu bweyaira ng'amaze okughangula Kedorilaomeri ni bakyabazinga be yali yeeyimbye nabo, kyabazinga wa Sodoma yaaja mu Kiiko eky'e Shave era ekyetebwa Ekiiko ekya Kyabazinga okumweisuusaayo." 
Genesis14:18 Era ni Melekizedeki, eyali kyabazinga ow'e Salemu era kabona wa Katonda Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, yaaleetera Aburamu eby'okulya n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
Genesis14:19 Yaamusabira enkabi ati: “Katonda oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene aghenga Aburamu enkabi, oyo Katonda eyakola eigulu n'ensi!" 
Genesis14:20 Katonda oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene asaakibwenga, oyo akuleeteire okughangula abazigu bo!” Agho Aburamu yaagha Melekizedeki ekintu kirala ku buli ikumi, ku bintu byonabyona ebyali binhagiibwa." 
Genesis14:21 Kyabazinga ow'e Sodoma yaakoba Aburamu ati: “Abantu bampe, aye ebintu obitwale.”" 
Genesis14:22 Aye Aburamu yairamu kyabazinga oyo ati: “Ndayira mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, eyakola eigulu n'ensi," 
Genesis14:23 nti tija kusigaza kawuuzi, oba akakosi ak'engaito, oba waire ekintu kyonakyona ekikyo olwo olobe kukoba oti, ‘Ninze eyakombaghaza Aburamu.’" 
Genesis14:24 Tija kutwala kintu naire, okutoolaku ebyo abaisuka bange bye baaliire, era n'omugabo ogw'abasaadha abaaja ninze. Aye leka bakagwa bange, Aneri, ni Eshikoli, era ni Mamure, batwale omugabo gwaibwe.”" 
Genesis15:1 Ebyo nga bimaze okubaagho, Aburamu yaawulira Musengwa Katonda mu kirooto, ng'amukoba ati: “Aburamu, otatya. Nze ndidha kubanga ngabo yo nkuwonie ebizibu, era ndidha kukugha empeera nnene.”" 
Genesis15:2 Aye Aburamu yairamu ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, kiki ky'onampa ni kingasa nga nkaasigaire nga nziraku mwana era ng'omusika w'endhu yange ni Eliezeri ow'e Damasiko?" 
Genesis15:3 Bona, tompaire izaire era omwiru eyazaalirwa mu ndhu yange, n'aja okuba omusika wange.”" 
Genesis15:4 Agho yaawulira nga Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Omwiru oyo Eliezeri ti n'aidha okuba omusika wo, aye omwana wo mwenemwene n'alikusikira.”" 
Genesis15:5 Yaamufulumya kuliya, yaakoba ati: “Lingirira ku igulu, obale emuunienie edhiriku, oba nga osobola okudhibala.” Agho yaamukoba ati: “N'abaidhukulu bo batyo bwe baliba obungi.”" 
Genesis15:6 Aburamu yaikiriza Musengwa Katonda kye yamukoba, era kino kyaleetera Musengwa Katonda okumutwala nga muntu mutuufu." 
Genesis15:7 Yaamukoba ati: “Ninze Musengwa eyakutoola mu Uri ensi ey'Abakaladea, naakuleeta okukugha ensi eno.”" 
Genesis15:8 Aye Aburamu yaamubuuza ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nnaamanhira ku ki ng'ensi eno eidha kuba yange?”" 
Genesis15:9 Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Ndeetera ente ey'emyaka esatu, n'embuzi ey'emyaka esatu, n'entaama enume yoona nga ya myaka esatu, era n'enjiibwa, n'eighemba eito.”" 
Genesis15:10 Aburamu yaaleeta ensolo edho ye Katonda, yaadhibaagamu ghabiri, yaata ebitundu ebyo ku ndhuyi ibiri ng'abirinzagainia. Aye enhonhi tiyadhibaagamu ghabiri." 
Genesis15:11 Ensega dhaidha okugwa ku mamba eyo, aye Aburamu yaadhibinga." 
Genesis15:12 Endhuba bweyali ng'eri kugwa, enzikiiza eri bedimudimu yaagema, endoolo enhingi einho era n'entiisa byamugema." 
Genesis15:13 Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Baidhukulu bo balija mu nsi etali yaibwe, baaba eyo nga bairu, era baanhigirizibwa inho okumala emyaka bikumi bina." 
Genesis15:14 Aye ndibonereza eighanga eryo eriribafuula abairu, era baliva mu ighanga eryo nga bafunie n'ebintu kamaala." 
Genesis15:15 Aye iwe olija eri badhaadha bo ng'oli miraala oliziikibwa ng'oghangaaliire irala bukalamu. 
Genesis15:16 Mu nsi eyo balibaayo ghaabitagho ense ina memale baira ghano, kuba tija kubingagho Bamori okutuusa nga beeyongeire okuba ababi einho okugwanira okubonerezebwa.”" 
Genesis15:17 Endhuba bweyamala okugwa enzikiiza ng'egemye, mangu ago agho ghaabonekagho olugyo oluliku amanda nga gali kunioka omwosi, era ghaabonekagho n'engada edhiri kwaka; bino byombi byabita ghagati gh'ebitundu bire eby'ensolo." 
Genesis15:18 Ku lunaku olwo, Musengwa Katonda yaakola endagaano ni Aburamu. Yaakoba ati: “Baidhukulu bo mbaghaire ensi eno yoonayoona okuva ku nsalosalo ya Misiri okutuuka ku mwiga omukologho Eufurate." 
Genesis15:19 Omwo nga mw'otwaliire n'ensi dhino: ey'Abakeni, ey'Abakenizzi, ey'Abakademoni," 
Genesis15:20 ey'Abahitti, ey'Abaperizzi, ey'Abarefa," 
Genesis15:21 ey'Abamori, ey'Abakanaani, ey'Abagirigashi, n'ey'Abayebusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 Sarai muka Aburamu, yali tazaire mwana naire. Aye yali n'omwiru omukazi Omumisiri, ng'ayetebwa Hagari." 
Genesis16:2 Kale yaakoba Aburamu ati: “Bona, Musengwa Katonda anhimye okuzaala. Ja obe n'omwiru wange omukazi, oba katyo ananzaaliragho abaana.” Aburamu yaaganha Sarai kye yamukoba." 
Genesis16:3 Kale Sarai yaatoola Hagari, omwiru we Omumisiri, yaamugha Aburamu abe mukazi we. Kino kyaligho nga Aburamu yaakamala emyaka ikumi mu Kanaani." 
Genesis16:4 Agho Aburamu yaaba ni Hagari, yaatoola enda. Era Hagari bweyakizuula ng'atoire enda, yaatoolera okwekuluntaza n'okunhooma Sarai." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai yaakoba Aburamu ati: “Ebibi ebiri kunkolwaku bikwirirengaku! Nze nakugha omwiru wange obe naye, aye olwakizuula ng'atoire enda, yaatoolera okwekuluntaza n'okuunhooma. Musengwa Katonda atusalire omusango nze n'iwe!”" 
Genesis16:6 Aye Aburamu yaakoba Sarai ati: “Bona, omwiru wo omukazi ali mu buyinza bwo, mukole nga bw'oyenda.” Agho Sarai yaabisa bubi inho Hagari, era Hagari yaamulumukaku." 
Genesis16:7 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaayagaana Hagari mu irungu, ng'ali ku nsulo eri ku ngira eja e Shuri." 
Genesis16:8 Malaika yaamubuuza ati: “Hagari, omwiru wa Sarai, ova gha era oja gha?” Yairamu ati: “Ndi kulumuka ku musengwa wange Sarai.”" 
Genesis16:9 Malaika wa Musengwa yaamukoba ati: “Irayo ye musengwa wo era omugonderenga.” 
Genesis16:10 Era yaamukoba ati: “Ndidha kukugha abaidhukulu kamaala inho nga tibabalika.” 
Genesis16:11 Kabiri yaamukoba ati: “Buti oli nda, oidha kuzaala omwana mulenzi, omutuume eriina Ishimaeli, kuba Musengwa Katonda awuliire okudaazibwadaazibwa kwo." 
Genesis16:12 Omwana oyo aidha kuba ng'oti n'endogoyi ey'omu nsiko ng'alwanisa buli muntu, era nga buli muntu amulwanisa. Era aidha kweyawula ku b'oluganda lwe, abenga yenka.”" 
Genesis16:13 Hagari yaayeta Musengwa Katonda eyali ayogeire naye ati ni “Katonda abona.” Yeebuuza mule ati: “Obwo bwenebwene mboine Katonda era naasigala nga nkaali mulamu?” 
Genesis16:14 Eyo n'ensonga lwaki ensulo eyo eyetebwa Beeri Lahairoi ensulo eyo eri ghagati gha Kadeshi ni Beredi. 
Genesis16:15 Hagari yaazaalira Aburamu omwana omulenzi Aburamu yaamutuuma eriina Ishimaeli. 
Genesis16:16 Hagari ghe yazaalira Ishimaeli, Aburamu yali ng'agheza emyaka kinaana na mukaaga egy'obukulu." 
Genesis17:1 Aburamu bweyali ng'agheza emyaka kyenda na mwenda (99) egy'obukulu, Musengwa Katonda yamubonekera, yamukoba ati: “Ninze Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona. Mpuliranga era okolenga ebituufu buliidho." 
Genesis17:2 Ndidha kukola endagaano yange n'iwe, era nkughe abaidhukulu kamaala.”" 
Genesis17:3 Aburamu yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Katonda yaamukoba ati: 
Genesis17:4 “Bona, eno n'endagaano yange n'iwe: oidha kufuuka dhaadha ow'amaghanga kamaala." 
Genesis17:5 Tokairayo kwetebwa Aburamu, aye oidha kwetebwanga Aburahamu, kuba nkufiire dhaadha ow'amaghanga kamaala." 
Genesis17:6 Ndidha kukugha abaidhukulu kamaala inho, baveemu amaghanga mangi era ni bakyabazinga baliva mu iwe." 
Genesis17:7 Era ndidha kutaagho endagaano yange n'iwe, era ni baidhukulu bo ab'omu nse dhoonadhoona edhiriiragho, ebenga ndagaano etawaagho. Ndidha kubanga Katonda wo, era Katonda wa baidhukulu bo." 
Genesis17:8 Ndidha kukugha iwe ni baidhukulu bo ensi eno buti y'olimu ng'omusenze. Ensi yoonayoona Kanaani eidha kubanga ya baidhukulu bo ebyanda n'ebyanda era nze ndidha kubanga Katonda waibwe.” 
Genesis17:9 Katonda yaakoba Aburahamu ati: “Agho ni, iwe oteekwa okukuuma endagaano yange, iwe mwene era ni baidhukulu bo ab'omu nse edhiriiragho." 
Genesis17:10 Eno n'endagaano iwe y'oteekwa okukuuma ni baidhukulu bo abalikwiririra: buli musaadha mu imwe anaakeketebwanga. 
Genesis17:11 Anaakeketebwanga oluwutu olw'omubiri gwe ako n'akanaabanga akamanhiso ak'endagaano yange n'imwe. 
Genesis17:12 Kiisi mwana mulenzi azaalibwa mu imwe mu nse dhoonadhoona, bw'anaaghezanga enaku omunaana munaamukeketanga, ni bw'anaabanga omwiru eyazaalirwa mu ndhu dhaimwe oba omwiru ye mwagula obugule ku bantu ab'endha." 
Genesis17:13 Oyo anaazaalirwanga mu ndhu dhaimwe era n'oyo ye munaagulanga obugule, boonaboona bateekwa okukeketebwa. Ako kabe akamanhiso ak'oku mubiri akooleka ng'endagaano yange n'imwe bw'etaliwaagho." 
Genesis17:14 Omusaadha yeenayeena atali mukekete, ataakeketebwa luwutu lwa mubiri gwe, aidha kwawulwanga ku bantu be, kuba anaabanga amenhie endagaano yange.”" 
Genesis17:15 Era Katonda yaakoba Aburahamu ati: “Ate mukazi wo Sarai, tokaamweta Sarai, aye oidha kumwetanga Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ndidha kumugha enkabi akuzaalire omwana omulenzi. Ndidha kumugha enkabi abe inhina ow'amaghanga era bakyabazinga baidha kusimukanga mu oyo.” 
Genesis17:17 Aburahamu yaakutama, n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Era yaaseka yeebuuza mule ati: “Bwenebwene omusaadha ow'emyaka ekikumi aghanga okuzaala omwana? Era ni Sara ow'emyaka ekyenda anaaghanga okuzaala?”" 
Genesis17:18 Agho yaakoba Katonda ati: “Wo, ngoli oghaire Ishimaeli enkabi.”" 
Genesis17:19 Aye Katonda yairamu ati: “Busa. Mukazi wo Sara aidha kukuzaalira omwana mulenzi, iwe omutuume eriina Isaaka. Ndidha kukola naye endagaano yange etakoma, era ni baidhukulu be abalimwiririra." 
Genesis17:20 Era Ishimaeli yeena ndidha kumugha by'osabye: ndidha kumugha enkabi azaale abaana kamaala, era afune n'abaidhukulu kamaala. Aidha kuzaala abalangira ikumi na babiri, era ndidha kumufuulamu eighanga ery'amaani." 
Genesis17:21 Aye endagaano yange ndidha kugitaagho ni Isaaka, oyo Sara y'aidha okukuzaalira mu biseera bino, mu mwaka ogwidha.”" 
Genesis17:22 Olwamala okwogera ni Aburahamu, Katonda yaavaagho, yaaja ghaigulu." 
Genesis17:23 Ku lunaku lwene olwo Aburahamu yaatuukiriza ekiragiro kya Katonda, yaatwala omwana we Ishimaeli yaamukeketa oluwutu olw'oku mubiri gwe. Era yaakola atyo ni ku basaadha boonaboona ab'omu ndhu ye omwo nga n'omuli n'abairu abaazaalirwa mu ndhu ye, era n'abairu abo be yagula obugule." 
Genesis17:24 Aburahamu ghe baamukeketera yali ng'agheza emyaka kyenda na mwenda egy'obukulu 
Genesis17:25 ate omwana we Ishimaeli yali ng'agheza emyaka ikumi n'esatu. 
Genesis17:26 Bombi baakeketebwa ku lunaku lwene olwo," 
Genesis17:27 ghalala n'abasaadha boonaboona ab'omu ndhu ya Aburahamu omwo nga n'omuli n'abairu abaazaalirwa mu ndhu ye, era n'abairu abo be yagula obugule ku bantu ab'endha." 
Genesis18:1 Musengwa yabonekera Aburahamu kumpi n'emiti gya Mamure, nga Aburahamu atyaime ku mulyango gwa weema ye, mu biseera eby'omu kasana ghagati." 
Genesis18:2 Bwe yalinga ati, yaabona abasaadha basatu nga beemereire agho. Era olwababona ati, yaayangughaku okuja okubasangaaza. Agho yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka," 
Genesis18:3 yaakoba ati: “Musengwa wange, bw'obona nga ngwaniire iwe okuba ghe ndi, otambitaku bubite nze omugheereza wo." 
Genesis18:4 Ka mbaleetere ku tuudhi munaabeku ku bigere, era muwoleereku agho mu kimpombye eky'omuti." 
Genesis18:5 Ndidha kuleeta ni ku kamere, mulyeku mufune amaani memale mweyongereyo, kuba mukyaliire omugheereza waimwe.” Bale bairamu bati: “Kola nga bw'okobye.”" 
Genesis18:6 Aburahamu yaayangugha, yaingira mu weema eri Sara, yaamukoba ati: “Tegeka ebigero bisatu eby'engaano enungi, ogikande era ogifumbemu emigaati.”" 
Genesis18:7 Kabiri Aburahamu yaalumuka, yaaja mu lugo yaatoolayo ente ento ey'emamba egonda era ensavu, yaagigha omugheereza we, era omugheereza oyo yaayanguyaaku okugifumba." 
Genesis18:8 Agho yaaleeta amata ga bbongo, n'amata agatali ga bbongo, era n'emamba eyali efumbiibwa, yaabibateera agho mu maiso byonabyona ghansi mu muti mwene yaasigala ng'ayemereire, nga bale bali kulya." 
Genesis18:9 Baamubuuza bati: “Mukazi wo Sara ali gha?” Yaabairamu ati: “Ali munda mu weema.” 
Genesis18:10 Musengwa yaakoba ati: “Omwaka ogwidha tiriroba kukukyalira kabiri, era mu biseera bino mukazi wo Sara aliba ng'azaire omwana mulenzi.” Sara yali inhuma wa Aburahamu, ku lwigi lwa weema, ng'ali kuwulira." 
Genesis18:11 Aburahamu ni Sara baali nga bakuze inho, nga babitiriire obukaire Sara yali yakoma n'okulwala." 
Genesis18:12 Sara yaaseka mule ng'akoba ati: “Buti nga mmaze okukairigha nti, era nga ni baze yeena mukaire atyo, mbo bwenebwene nnairayo okunhumirwa.”" 
Genesis18:13 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaabuuza Aburahamu ati: “Lwaki Sara asese era ni yeebuuza oba nga bwenebwene asobola okuzaala omwana nga mukaire atyo? 
Genesis18:14 Ghaligho ekintu ekikalangufu einho Musengwa Katonda ky'atasobola? Nga bwe nkukobye, omwaka ogwidha mu biseera bino, ndikukyalira kabiri era mukazi wo Sara aliba ng'azaire omwana mulenzi.”" 
Genesis18:15 Olw'okuba Sara yatya, agho yeegaana ng'akoba ati: “Nze tiseseeku.” Aye Musengwa yaamukoba ati: “Busa! Bwenebwene osese.”" 
Genesis18:16 Agho abasaadha baavaagho baaja mu kifo gh'olengerera Sodoma. Aburahamu yaabagherekeraku okubasiibula. 
Genesis18:17 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba mule ati: “Tiidha kugisa Aburahamu ekyo kye ndi kuja okukola 
Genesis18:18 kuba oyo n'aja okusimukamu eighanga eikologho ery'amaani, era mu oyo amaghanga goonagoona ag'omu nsi mwe galigheerwa enkabi." 
Genesis18:19 Namulonda asobole okulagira abaana be n'abaidhukulu be abaliiragho, bangonderenga nga bakola ebyo ebyoleka obutuufu era eby'amazima. Memale olwo mmukolere ebyo byonabyona bye nasuubiza.”" 
Genesis18:20 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Mpulira ebintu ebibi kamaala nga byogerwa ku Sodoma ni Gomorra, era okwonoona kwaibwe kubitiriire!" 
Genesis18:21 Ndidha kwikayo eyo mbone oba nga ebibi ebiboogerwaku bwene babikola oba busa, memale olwo mmanhe ekituufu.”" 
Genesis18:22 Agho abasaadha baava eyo, baaja e Sodoma. Aye Aburahamu yaasigala ng'akaayemereire aghali Musengwa Katonda." 
Genesis18:23 Aburahamu yaaseeta ye Musengwa Katonda, yaamubuuza ati: “Bwenebwene oidha kuzikiriza abantu abatuufu ghalala n'aboonooni?" 
Genesis18:24 Aye bwe kiba nga mu kibuga omwo mulimu abantu abatuufu amakumi ataanu, era onaakizikiriza? Tookireke olw'okuwonia abantu abo abatuufu amakumi ataanu abalimu?" 
Genesis18:25 Ekyo tikikoleka! Okwitira abantu abatuufu ghalala n'aboonooni olwo abatuufu ni baba nga baagayaga n'aboonooni! Ekyo tikikoleka! Omulamuzi ow'ensi yoonayoona ali n'okusala omusango mu butuufu.” 
Genesis18:26 Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Bwe nnaayagaana abantu abatuufu amakumi ataanu mu kibuga Sodoma, tiidha kukizikiriza olw'abo.”" 
Genesis18:27 Aburahamu yaayogera kabiri ati: “Wo Musengwa, nsonigha okukana ni ndhogera n'iwe ntyo, ate nga nze ndi nkungu bukungu era eivu obuvu." 
Genesis18:28 Aye bwe kiba nga ku bantu abatuufu amakumi ataanu kubulaku abataanu? Bwenebwene onaazikiriza ekibuga ekyo olw'abantu abataanu abo ababuzeeku?” Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Tiidha kukizikiriza bwe nnaayagaanayo abatuufu amakumi ana n'abataanu.” 
Genesis18:29 Kabiri Aburahamu yaakoba ati: “Aye bwe kiba ng'eriyo makumi ana.” Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Tiidha kukizikiriza olw'abatuufu amakumi ana abo.” 
Genesis18:30 Aburahamu yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda otansungughalira, ndidha kwogera kabiri: Aye bwe kiba nga eriyo makumi asatu?” Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Tiidha kukizikiriza bwe nnaayagaanayo amakumi asatu.”" 
Genesis18:31 Aburahamu yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa, nsonigha okukana ni ndhogera n'iwe ntyo. Aye bwe kiba ng'eriyo amakumi abiri?” Musengwa yairamu ati: “Tiidha kukizikiriza olw'abatuufu amakumi abiri.”" 
Genesis18:32 Aburahamu yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa, otansungughalira, ndidha kwogera mukuzi guno gwonka. Aye bwe kiba ng'eriyo ikumi bonka?” Musengwa yairamu ati: “Tiidha kukizikiriza olw'abatuufu eikumi abo.”" 
Genesis18:33 Musengwa Katonda bweyamala okwogera ni Aburahamu, yaaja. Ni Aburahamu yeena yaira ewuwe." 
Genesis19:1 Bamalaika ababiri bwe baatuuka e Sodoma eigulo eryo, Loti yali ng'atyaime ku mulyango gwa Sodoma. Olwababona ati, yaasituka okuja okubasangaaza. Yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka," 
Genesis19:2 yaakoba ati: “Basengwa bange, mbeeghembye mwidheku ewange nze ndi mugheereza waimwe. Munaabeku ku bigere era musule ghano. Munaawuuna ku nkyo mweyongerayo.” Aye bairamu bati: “Busa, ife twidha kusula ghano mu ngira.”" 
Genesis19:3 Loti yaayongera okubakoba, okutuusa lwe baaja naye ni baingira mu ndhu ye. Yaabategekera embaga, yaafumba omugaati ogutazimbulukusiibwa, baalya." 
Genesis19:4 Aye nga bakaali kutenduka, abasaadha ab'omu kibuga ekyo Sodoma baazingiza endhu eyo; abasaadha boonaboona abato n'abakulu nga baweekereireyo." 
Genesis19:5 Baayeta Loti, baamubuuza bati: “Abasaadha abaidhie okusula ewuwo obwire buno bali gha? Batufulumikize tube nabo.”" 
Genesis19:6 Loti yaafuluma ku luya ye bali, yaigalagho olwigi einhuma we." 
Genesis19:7 Yaabakoba ati: “Bakagwa, mbeeghembye mutakola kibi kyaga agho!" 
Genesis19:8 Bona, ndi ni baghala bange babiri abakaali kumanha musaadha. Leka mbabaleetere kuliya, memale mubakole byonabyona bye mwenda. Aye abasaadha abo mutabakola kintu kyonakyona, kuba baidhie mu ndhu yange nga bageni bange.”" 
Genesis19:9 Aye baakoba bati: “Vaayo!” Era bati: “Ono omusaadha eyaidha kuno okusenga obusenge, mpegaano n'ayenda okutusaliragho eky'okukola! Kale twidha kukubisa bubi inho okusinga ni bale.” Agho baasindiikiriza Loti ekyeinhumainhuma, era baaseeta okumenha olwigi." 
Genesis19:10 Aye abasaadha bale ababiri baaghaaniriza emikono, baagema Loti, bamusikula baamwingiza mu ndhu mwe baali, baigalagho olwigi." 
Genesis19:11 Era baatuluwaza abasaadha, abato n'abakulu abaali ku luya ku lwigi, baaloba kulubona." 
Genesis19:12 Abasaadha baabuuza Loti bati: “Oligho n'abantu bo abandi ghano? Ka tukobe nga bakoirume bo, batabane bo, baghala bo, oba omuntu wo owundi yeenayeena ali mu kibuga? Bafulumye mu kibuga" 
Genesis19:13 kuba tuli kumpi okukizikiriza. Musengwa Katonda awuliire ebintu ebibi kamaala nga byogerwa ku kibuga kino, era atutumye okukizikiriza.”" 
Genesis19:14 Agho Loti yaafuluma, yaakoba abasaadha abaali ab'okubayiza baghala be ati: “Musitukiremu, muve mu kifo kino, kuba Musengwa Katonda ali kumpi okuzikiriza ekibuga.” Aye bale baadhuuba bati ali kudhondha budhondhe." 
Genesis19:15 Bwe bwakya enkyo, bamalaika baayanguyiriza Loti nga bamukoba bati: “Situkiramu, otwale mukazi wo ni baghala bo bombi, mufulume muve mu kibuga mulobe kuzikirizibwa mu kibonerezo kyakyo.”" 
Genesis19:16 Aye Loti yaalwa. Kale abasaadha kye baava bamugema ku mukono ni mukazi we era ni baghala be bombi, ni babafulumya era ni babata kuliya kw'ekibuga; kuba Musengwa Katonda yamugemerwa ekivunika." 
Genesis19:17 Bwe baamala okubafulumya, owundi ku bamalaika yaakoba Loti ati: “Lumuka olobe kufa! Tolinga inhuma, era otayemereraku mu kiiko naire. Lumukira mu nsozi olobe kuzikirizibwa.”" 
Genesis19:18 Loti yairamu ati: “Busa, nkweghembye Musengwa." 
Genesis19:19 Iwe onsaasiire era wandholeka ekisa ekitaloodheka ng'owonia obulamu bwange. Aye ensozi dhiri ghala inho tisobola kudhituukaku ng'akabi kakaali kuntuukaku, ni nfa." 
Genesis19:20 Bona, ekibuga kire ere kiri kumpi era kitono. Leka numukire omwo; aye ti kitono, ndidha kuwonera omwo.”" 
Genesis19:21 Yairamu ati: “Kale nkwikiriiza era tiidha kuzikiriza kibuga ekyo ky'oyogeireku. 
Genesis19:22 Ja mangu, olumukire eyo! Ezira kye ndidha kukola ng'okaali kutuukayo.” Kyova ekibuga ekyo kyatuumibwa Zoari, kuba Loti yakyeta ati: kitono." 
Genesis19:23 Loti ghe yatuukira e Zoari endhuba yali ng'eviireyo. 
Genesis19:24 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaagwisa obuganga bwa salufa, ng'oti maadhi, ku Sodoma ni Gomorra, nga buva mu igulu." 
Genesis19:25 Era yaabizikiriza ghalala n'ekiiko kyonakyona, n'abantu abaalimu, era n'ebisimbe ebyalimu." 
Genesis19:26 Aye muka Loti yaalinga einhuma, yaakaliragho yaafuuka empango ey'omuunhu eyeesimbye." 
Genesis19:27 Enkyo lyaku Aburahamu yaayangughaku okuja mu kifo ghe yayemerera ni Musengwa Katonda. 
Genesis19:28 Yaalinga e Sodoma n'e Gomorra, era ni mu biketezo eby'ekiiko yaabona omwosi nga gunioka ogugemye okuva mu biketezo ebyo, nga guli ng'oti n'omwosi ogw'oluyiira." 
Genesis19:29 Kale ni kyaba nti Katonda bweyali ng'azikiriza ebibuga eby'omu kiiko tiyeerabira Aburahamu, kyeyava n'awonia Loti akabi okumutuukaku, yaamuleka yaavaamu." 
Genesis19:30 Loti ni baghala be bombi baava mu Zoari baaniina mu nsozi, baasulanga eyo mu mpuku, kuba Loti yatya okuba mu Zoari." 
Genesis19:31 Omughala omukulu yaakoba muke we ati: “Iseife akairiighe, ate ghazira musaadha mu nsi aidha kutubayiza kutuzaalamu baana." 
Genesis19:32 Kale, ka tutamiize iseife omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, tughange okuba naye, memale olwo tuzaale naye abaana.”" 
Genesis19:33 Obwire obwo baamutamiiza, era omughala omukulu yaaba naye. Aye Loti yaaloba kukimanha, kuba yali ng'atamiire inho." 
Genesis19:34 Olunaku olwairaku, omughala omukulu yaakoba muke we ati: “Nze nabaire naye obwire. Ka tumutamiize kabiri obwire buno, weena obe naye memale olwo tuzaale naye abaana.”" 
Genesis19:35 Kale obwire obwo baatamiiza iseibwe, era omughala omuto yaaba naye. Era ni ku mukuzi guno Loti yaaloba kukimanha, kuba yali ng'atamiire inho." 
Genesis19:36 Mu nsambo eyo baghala ba Loti bombi baatoola enda nga bamaze okuba n'iseibwe. 
Genesis19:37 Omukulu yaazaala omwana mulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Moabu. Oyo ni dhaadha ow'Abamoabu okutuusa ni mpegaano." 
Genesis19:38 Omuto yeena yaazaala omwana mulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Benammi. Oyo ni dhaadha ow'Abammoni okutuusa ni mpegaano." 
Genesis20:1 Aburahamu yaava e Mamure, yaaja ng'ayolekeire ekiketezo kya Buyudaaya ekikalukalu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, yaasenga ghagati gha Kadeshi ni Shuri yaamala entangama ng'ali mu Gerari." 
Genesis20:2 Yaakoberanga abantu nga mukazi we Sara bw'ali mwanhina. Kale Abimeleki kyabazinga wa Gerari, yaayesa Sara baamumutwalira." 
Genesis20:3 Aye Katonda yaabonekera Abimeleki mu kirooto obwire, yaamukoba ati: “Bona, oidha kufa olw'okutwala omukazi oyo, kuba muka musaadha.”" 
Genesis20:4 Aye Abimeleki yali ng'akaali kuseeta eri Sara kale yaakoba ati: “Musengwa, onaita n'abantu abaziraku musango?" 
Genesis20:5 Aburahamu mwene ti n'eyankobye ati oyo mwanhina? Era ni Sara mwene yeena tiyankobye ati Aburahamu mwanhina? Ekyo nakikoze mu mwoyo mulungi era nziraku musango.” 
Genesis20:6 Katonda yaamwiramu mu kirooto ati: “Ndidhi ng'ekyo wakikoze mu mwoyo mulungi, era nga ninze nkulobeire okukola ekibi ye ndi, kale kye naviire ni ndoba okukuganha okumugemaku." 
Genesis20:7 Mpegaano ni, izaayo muka beene; kuba omusaadha oyo mulanzi, era aidha kukusabira obe mulamu. Aye bw'otaizeeyo mukazi, manha ng'oteekwa kufa, iwe n'abantu bo boonaboona.”" 
Genesis20:8 Abimeleki yaazuuka mu nkyo yaayeta abagheereza be, yaabakobera ebintu ebyo byonabyona, era baatya inho." 
Genesis20:9 Agho yaayeta Aburahamu yaamubuuza ati: “Kiki kino ky'otukoze? Nakukola kibi ki memale ondeetere nze n'obwakyabazinga bwange ekibi ekyaga agho? Kye wakoze ti n'ekigwaine okukolwa. 
Genesis20:10 Kiki ekyakutuusiisa ku kukola kino?” 
Genesis20:11 Aburahamu yairamu ati: “Kuba nabaire ndowooza nti eno ezira atya Katonda, kale nga basobola okundhita olwa mukazi wange." 
Genesis20:12 Aye era oyo mwanhinaze, mwana wa lata, aye ti wa maama era yafuuka mukazi wange." 
Genesis20:13 Kale Katonda bweyantambuzatambuza eyo atyo okuva mu ndhu ya lata, naakoba Sara nti, ‘Oti bw'oidha okwolekanga nga bw'oli omwesigwa ye ndi: mu buli kifo mwe tunaatuukanga obakobanga oti nze ndi mwanhoko.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Agho Abimeleki yairiza Aburahamu mukazi we Sara, era yaamugha entaama, n'ente, n'abairu abasaadha n'abakazi." 
Genesis20:15 Era yaakoba Aburahamu ati: “Bona ensi yange yiiyo; londa gh'onaaba oyenze okuba woonawoona.” 
Genesis20:16 Ate yaakoba Sara ati: “Bona, mpaire mwanhoko ebitundu bya feeza lukumi (1,000) ng'ekirabo, okwoleka boonaboona b'oli nabo ng'oziraku musango; abantu boonaboona baidha kumanha bati ozira kibi kye wakola.”" 
Genesis20:17 Aburahamu yaasaba Katonda, era Katonda yaawonia Abimeleki, ni mukazi we, n'abairu be abakazi, boonaboona baaba nga baghanga okuzaala." 
Genesis20:18 Kuba Musengwa Katonda yali ng'asibye abakazi boonaboona ab'omu ndhu y'Abimeleki okuzaala, olwa Sara muka Aburahamu." 
Genesis21:1 Musengwa Katonda yagemerwa Sara ekivunika era yaamukolera nga bweyamusuubiza. 
Genesis21:2 Kale Sara yaatoola enda era yaazaalira Aburahamu omwana mulenzi mu myaka egyo egy'obukaire, mu biseera byene Katonda bye yamusuubiza." 
Genesis21:3 Aburahamu yaatuuma omwana we oyo Sara ye yamuzaalira, eriina Isaaka." 
Genesis21:4 Era yaamukeketa ng'agheziiza enaku omunaana, nga Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Genesis21:5 Isaaka yazaalibwa ng'Aburahamu agheziiza emyaka kikumi egy'obukulu. 
Genesis21:6 Sara yaakoba ati: “Katonda andeeteire okuseka. Kiisi anaakiwulirangaku aidha kusekeranga ghalala ninze.” 
Genesis21:7 Era yaakoba ati: “Naani eyandikobye Aburahamu ati Sara alyonsa ku baana? Aye mmuzaaliire omwana mu bukaire bwe.” 
Genesis21:8 Omwana yaakula, era ku lunaku lwe yava ku mabeere, Aburahamu yaafumba embaga nnene." 
Genesis21:9 Lwali lulala Sara yaabona Ishimaeli, omwana Hagari Omumisiri ye yazaalira Aburahamu, ng'ali kuzaanha ni Isaaka mutabane we." 
Genesis21:10 Agho yaakoba Aburahamu ati: “Binga omukazi omwiru ono n'omwana we. Kuba omwana ow'omwiru ono tagwaine kugabana ku bintu mwana wange Isaaka by'aja kusikira.” 
Genesis21:11 Kino kyanakughaza inho Aburahamu, kuba Ishimaeli yeena yali mutabane." 
Genesis21:12 Aye Katonda yaakoba Aburahamu ati: “Loba kunakughala olw'omwisuka oyo n'olw'omwiru oyo. Kola ekyo kyonakyona Sara ky'akukoba, kuba mu Isaaka eizaire lyo mwe lineeyongereranga okwala." 
Genesis21:13 Era n'omwana ow'omukazi omwiru yeena ndimugha abaidhukulu kamaala baafuuka ighanga, kuba yeena mwana wo.”" 
Genesis21:14 Bwe bwakya enkyo, Aburahamu yaazuuka mu nkyo, yaamusibirira eby'okulya, yaamuteera n'amaadhi mu nsawo ey'oluwu, yaabigha Hagari. Era yaamuta n'omwana ku mugongo, memale yaamusiibula. Hagari yaaja ng'atambulatambula eyo atyo mu irungu ery'e Beerisheba." 
Genesis21:15 Ensawo ey'oluwu bweyawaamu amaadhi, yaalekulira agho omwana ghansi mu kisaka." 
Genesis21:16 Yaaja yaatyama ghalaku, mu buleeyi bwa mita nga kikumi. Yaakoba mule ati: “Leka ndobe kubona mwana oyo ng'afa.” Bwe yali ng'atyaime eyo, omwana yaalira." 
Genesis21:17 Aye Katonda yaawulira omwana ng'ali kulira, era malaika wa Katonda, ng'ali mu igulu, yaakoba Hagari ati: “Hagari, obaire otya? Otatya, kuba Katonda awuliire omwana ng'ali kulira eyo y'ali." 
Genesis21:18 Situka, oje obbeedegho omwana era omukuume bukalamu, kuba baidhukulu be ndibafuula eighanga ery'amaani.”" 
Genesis21:19 Agho Katonda yaazibula amaiso ga Hagari, yaabona ensulo. Kale yaaja yaidhuza ensawo ey'oluwu amaadhi era yaanhwesa n'omwana." 
Genesis21:20 Katonda yaaba ku mwisuka oyo, yaaja ng'akula, era ng'aba mu irungu, era yaafuuka muyiizi atawunhikamu." 
Genesis21:21 Yaabanga mu irungu ery'e Parani, era inhina yaamufunira omukazi Omumisiri." 
Genesis21:22 Agho mu biseera ebyo, Abimeleki ng'ali ghalala ni Fikoli omuduumizi w'eigye lye, baidha ye Aburahamu. Abimeleki yaakoba Aburahamu ati: “Katonda aba n'iwe mu byonabyona by'okola." 
Genesis21:23 Kale layira mu maiso ga Katonda oyo nga toidha kunguyaguyanga nze, waire abaana bange oba abaidhukulu bange. Era nga bwembairenga mwesigwa y'oli, weena obenga mwesigwa ye ndi, era n'eri ensi eno y'olimu.”" 
Genesis21:24 Aburahamu yaakoba ati: “Ndayiire.” 
Genesis21:25 Aburahamu yeemuluguunhiza Abimeleki olw'ensulo ye abairu ba Abimeleki ye baali nga banhaze obunhage. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleki yaakoba ati: “Tiidhi muntu yakola kintu ekyo. Iwe tiwankoberaku ku kintu ekyo, era guno n'omukuzi gwange ogusooka okukiwulira.”" 
Genesis21:27 Aburahamu yaatoola entaama n'ente, yaadhigha Abimeleki; bombi baakola endagaano." 
Genesis21:28 Aburahamu yaayawula ku kisibo entaama enduusi musanvu, yaadhita gha dhonka." 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleki yaamubuuza ati: “Lwaki oyawire entaama enduusi dhino omusanvu ku dhiinaadho?” 
Genesis21:30 Aburahamu yairamu ati: “Twala entaama enduusi dhino omusanvu, ako kabe akamanhiso akooleka kati iwe ondhulira nga ninze eyasima ensulo eyo.”" 
Genesis21:31 Kyova ekifo ekyo kyayetebwa Beerisheba, kuba eyo bombi ye baalayirira." 
Genesis21:32 Bwe baamala okukola endagaano e Beerisheba, Abimeleki yaagolola ni Fikoli omuduumizi ow'amagye ge, bairayo mu nsi ey'Abafilisiti." 
Genesis21:33 Aburahamu yaasimba omuti omutamarisiki mu Beerisheba, era yaasinziza eyo Musengwa Katonda, Katonda oyo atawaagho." 
Genesis21:34 Aburahamu yaaba mu nsi ey'Abafilisiti okumala entangama endeeyiku. 
Genesis22:1 Ebyo nga biwoire, Katonda yaaleba Aburahamu yaamweta ati: “Aburahamu!” Aburahamu yaavugira ati: “Ndi ghano.”" 
Genesis22:2 Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Twala Isaaka omwana wo omulala ati bedengedenge era y'ogonza, oje mu nsi ey'e Moria. Eyo y'oidha okumugheerayo ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ku lusozi lwe ndikulaga.”" 
Genesis22:3 Bwe bwakya enkyo, Aburahamu yaawuuna yaayasaaga enku edh'okwokya ekigheebwayo, yaatwika endogoyi ye. Yaatwalaku babiri ku bagheereza be, n'omwana we Isaaka, yaatoolera okuja mu kifo Katonda kye yali amukobye." 
Genesis22:4 Ku lunaku olwokusatu bweyalinga ati, yaalengera ekifo ekyo." 
Genesis22:5 Yaakoba abagheereza be ati: “Musigale ghano n'endogoyi, nze n'omwisuka tweyongereyo ere tusinze, memale twire ye muli.”" 
Genesis22:6 Aburahamu yaatoola enku edh'okwokya ekigheebwayo, yaadhitwika omwana we Isaaka, mwene yaagema omuliro n'akambe, baaja bombi." 
Genesis22:7 Isaaka yaayeta ise Aburahamu ati: “Bbaaba!” Aburahamu yaavugira ati: “Ndi ghano, mwana wange.” Isaaka yaamubuuza ati: “Ndi kubona omuliro n'enku biibino, aye entaama ento ey'okwokebwa ng'ekigheebwayo eri gha?”" 
Genesis22:8 Aburahamu yaamwiramu ati: “Mwana wange, Katonda mwene n'aidha okutugha entaama ento ey'okwokebwa ng'ekigheebwayo.” Agho baaja bombi nga beeyongerayo." 
Genesis22:9 Bwe baatuuka mu kifo Katonda kye yali amaze okumukoberaku, Aburahamu yaazimba agho alutaari, yaayaliiraku enku. Agho yaasiba omwana we Isaaka yaamuta ku nku ku alutaari." 
Genesis22:10 Bwe yamala, yaagema akambe aite omwana we." 
Genesis22:11 Aye malaika wa Musengwa Katonda ng'ali mu igulu yaamweta ati: “Aburahamu, Aburahamu!” Aburahamu yaavugira ati: “Ndi ghano!”" 
Genesis22:12 Yaamukoba ati: “Otaita mwisuka oyo oba okumukolaku akabi koonakoona. Mpegaano ntegeire ng'otya Katonda, kuba toonhimye mwana wo omulala bedengedenge.”" 
Genesis22:13 Aburahamu yaja okulinga ati einhuma we, ng'abona entaama enume ng'amayiga gaayo galaaliire mu kisaka. Yaaja, yaagitoolayo, yaagighaayo ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, mu kifo ky'omwana we." 
Genesis22:14 Aburahamu yaatuuma ekifo ekyo eriina “Musengwa Katonda atugha.” Era ni leero abantu bakoba bati ku lusozi lwa “Musengwa atugha.” 
Genesis22:15 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda ng'ali mu igulu yaayeta Aburahamu omukuzi ogwokubiri," 
Genesis22:16 yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati ndayiire mu liina lyange nti, kuba okoze otyo n'oloba kuunhima mwana wo omulala ati bedengedenge," 
Genesis22:17 bwenebwene ndikugha enkabi, era ndikwaliza abaidhukulu baaba kamaala inho ng'oti n'emuunienie edh'oku igulu, era ng'oti n'omusenho oguli ku mbali okw'enhandha. Era baghangulenga ebibuga by'abazigu baibwe." 
Genesis22:18 Mu baidhukulu bo, amaghanga goonagoona ag'oku nsi mwe galigheerwa enkabi, kuba ogondeire ekiragiro kyange.”" 
Genesis22:19 Agho Aburahamu yairayo eri abagheereza be, baasituka bairayo boonaboona ghalala e Beerisheba, era Aburahamu yaabanga eyo." 
Genesis22:20 Nga ghabiseegho ekiseera, Aburahamu baamukobera bati ni Milika yeena yali yazaalira muganda we Nahori abaana bano:" 
Genesis22:21 Uzi omwana omuberi, ni Buza muganda we; ni Kemueli lata wa Aramu," 
Genesis22:22 ni Kesedi, ni Hazo, ni Pilidashi, ni Yidilafi, era ni Bethueli." 
Genesis22:23 Bethueli oyo n'eyazaala Rebekka. Abo n'abaana omunaana, Milika be yazaalira Nahori muganda wa Aburahamu." 
Genesis22:24 Era Nahori yali n'omukazi we ow'embali ng'ayetebwa Reuma. Yeena yaazaala abaana bano: Teba, ni Gahamu, ni Tuhashi, era ni Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Sara yaghangaala emyaka kikumi n'abiri na musanvu (127)," 
Genesis23:2 yaafiira mu Kiriatharaba, ng'ekyo n'e Heburoni, mu nsi ey'e Kanaani. Aburahamu yaakola emikolo egy'okulira mukazi we." 
Genesis23:3 Agho Aburahamu yaasituka yaava aghali omufu we, yaaja y'Abahitti, yaakoba ati:" 
Genesis23:4 “Nze ndi wa ndha mu imwe era omusenze. Munganhe nfune ekifo mu nsi yaimwe, eky'okuziikamu mukazi wange afiire.”" 
Genesis23:5 Abahitti baamwiramu bati: 
Genesis23:6 “Musengwa, wulira kye tuli kukoba Iwe oli mukungu mukologho mu ife. Ziika omufu wo mu magombe g'oneerobozaamu ku ago goonagoona ge tuli nago. Ghazira waire omulala ku ife, anaakwima amagombe ge, oba okukulobera okuziikamu omufu wo.”" 
Genesis23:7 Agho Aburahamu yaakubira Abahitti amakiryaivu beene nsi," 
Genesis23:8 yaabakoba ati: “Oba nga munganhie okuziika omufu wange, mumpulirise muneegayiriregho Efuroni mutabane wa Zohara," 
Genesis23:9 ampe empuku ye eri e Makipela, ku nkomerero y'enimiro; agingulize ghano ku mughendo gwayo omwidhuvu nga mwena mubona, ebe ekifo kyange eky'okuziikangamu abafu.”" 
Genesis23:10 Efuroni mwene yali ng'atyaime ghalala n'Abahitti abandi, mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango gw'ekibuga agho yairamu nga n'abaligho boonaboona bawulira ati:"
