Genesis23:11 “Busa musengwa, wulira kye nkoba. Enimiro yoonayoona n'empuku egirimu, mbikughaire. Mbikugheereire ghano ng'abantu bange boona babona, oziikemu omufu wo.”" 
Genesis23:12 Aye Aburahamu yaakubira Abahitti amakiryaivu. 
Genesis23:13 Yaakoba Efuroni nga beene nsi abo bawulira ati: “Nkweghembye, wulira kye nkoba. Enimiro yoonayoona ndidha kugigula bugule. Nganha ngisasulire, memale nziikemu omufu wange.”" 
Genesis23:14 Efuroni yairamu Aburahamu ati: 
Genesis23:15 “Musengwa wulira kye nkoba. Eitaka erigula ebitundu bya feeza ebikumi ebina byonka (400), ni ki ghagati ghange n'iwe? Ziikamu omufu wo.”" 
Genesis23:16 Aburahamu yaaganha Efuroni kye yakoba. Agho yaapimira Efuroni oyo feeza ye yakoba, ng'Abahitti bawulira ebitundu ebikumi ebina, ng'akozesa ekipimo eky'abasuubuzi." 
Genesis23:17 Kale etyo enimiro ya Efuroni ey'e Makipela, ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba olw'e Mamure, bweyafuuka eya Aburahamu yoonayoona okutuukira irala y'ekoma. Enimiro eyo yalimu empuku era n'emiti." 
Genesis23:18 Abahitti boonaboona abaali mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango gw'ekibuga, baakakasa ng'enimiro eyo ya Aburahamu." 
Genesis23:19 Ebyo olwawa, Aburahamu yaaziika mukazi we Sara mu mpuku ey'omu nimiro ey'e Makipela, ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba olw'e Mamure, ng'ekyo ni Heburoni, mu nsi ey'e Kanaani." 
Genesis23:20 Kale enimiro n'empuku yaamu ebyali eby'Abahitti, byafuukira irala ekifo kya Aburahamu eky'okuziikangamu abafu be." 
Genesis24:1 Mpegaano, Aburahamu yali ng'akairiighe obukalamu bwene, era Musengwa Katonda ng'amughaire enkabi mu byonabyona." 
Genesis24:2 Agho Aburahamu yaakoba omugheereza we asinga bukulu mu ndhu ye, era eyalabiriranga ebintu bye byonabyona, ati: “Leeta omukono gwo okakase by'oja okulayira." 
Genesis24:3 Nhenda olayire mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda ow'eigulu n'ensi, oti tolifunira mwana wange mukazi ava mu bantu ba ghano mu Kanaani, be mbaamu." 
Genesis24:4 Aye oteekwa okuja mu nsi ye nazaalibwamu era mu boluganda lwange, waafunirayo eyo omwana wange Isaaka omukazi.”" 
Genesis24:5 Omugheereza yaabuuza ati: “Aye omukazi bw'ataliganha kuva waibwe, kwidha mu nsi eno? Olwo mutabane wo ye ndiizaayo mu nsi ye wavaamu?”" 
Genesis24:6 Aburahamu yaamwiramu ati: “Otagezanga kwizaayo mwana wange eyo. 
Genesis24:7 Musengwa Katonda ow'eigulu yantoola mu ndhu ya lata, ni mu nsi ye nazaalibwamu, era yaayogera ninze, yandayirira ati aligha baidhukulu bange ensi eno. Oyo alituma malaika we yaakukulemberamu, osobole okufunira omwana wange omukazi okuva eyo." 
Genesis24:8 Aye omukazi bw'ataliganha kwidha n'iwe, tolibaaku musango olw'ekirayiro kino ky'ondayiriire. Aye otagezanga kwizaayo mwana wange eyo.”" 
Genesis24:9 Kale omugheereza yaamugha omukono gwe okukakasa bye yali aja okulayira, yaalayirira ebyo Aburahamu bye yamukoba." 
Genesis24:10 Omugheereza yaatwala engamiya ikumi ku dha musengwa we, era yaatwala ebirabo ebirungi ebya buli nsambo okuva ye musengwa we, yaaja e Mesopotamia, mu kibuga kya Nahori." 
Genesis24:11 Bwe yatuukayo, yaafukamiza engamiya ku luya lw'ekibuga aghali ensulo; ebiseera byali bya igulo abakazi ghe bafulumira okuja amaadhi." 
Genesis24:12 Yaasaba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe Katonda wa musengwa wange Aburahamu, nkweghembye mpa enkabi olwaleero, era oyoleke musengwa wange Aburahamu nga bw'omugonza obutalekera." 
Genesis24:13 Bona, nhemereire ghano ku nsulo ng'abaghala ab'omu kibuga bali kwidha okunona amaadhi." 
Genesis24:14 Kale omughala ye nnaakoba nti, ‘Nkweghembye isa ensugha yo, ompe ku maadhi nhweku,’ memale n'ankoba ati, ‘Nhwa, era n'engamiya dho dhoona ndidha kudhisenera dhinhwe,’ nga n'oyo y'olondeire omugheereza wo Isaaka. Ku ekyo kwe nnaamanhira nti oyoleike musengwa wange nga bw'omugonza obutalekera.”" 
Genesis24:15 Bwe yali ng'akaayogera Rebekka yaatuuka ng'abbeedie ensugha ku ibega. Rebekka ono yali mughala wa Bethueli mutabane wa Milika eyali muka Nahori. Nahori ono yali muganda wa Aburahamu. 
Genesis24:16 Rebekka ono yali mughala muto aboneka obulungi einho, era nga mwegha. Yaikirira ku nsulo, yaidhuza ensugha ye, yaavaayo." 
Genesis24:17 Agho omugheereza yaayangughaku okwagaanana naye, yaakoba ati: “Nkweghembye, mpa ku maadhi agali mu nsugha yo nhweku.”" 
Genesis24:18 Rebekka yaakoba ati: “Isebo, nhwa.” Era mangu ago yaatoola ensugha ku ibega, yaagigemerera, yaamugha okunhwa." 
Genesis24:19 Bwe yamala okumugha n'anhwa, yaamukoba ati: “Ka nsenere n'engamiya dho dhoona, okutuusa lwe dhinaamala okunhwa.”" 
Genesis24:20 Agho yaayangughaku, yaayugha amaadhi agaali mu nsugha ye mu kintu ensolo mwe dhinhwera. Yaalumuka okwirayo ku nsulo, yaasenera engamiya edh'omusaadha dhoonadhoona amaadhi." 
Genesis24:21 Omusaadha yaamwekalirisa kisiriikiriza, abone oba nga Musengwa Katonda aghaire olugendo lwe enkabi." 
Genesis24:22 Engamiya bwe dhaamala okunhwa, omusaadha yaatoolayo empeta eya zaabu ey'omughendo einho, n'obukomo bubiri obwa zaabu obw'omughendo omungi obw'okuvaala ku mikono." 
Genesis24:23 Yaakoba ati: “Nkweghembye nkobera, oli mughala w'ani? Mu ndhu ya lata wo mulimu ekifo mw'asobola okutusuza?”" 
Genesis24:24 Omughala yairamu ati: “Ndi mughala wa Bethueli mutabane wa Nahori ni mukazi we Milika.” 
Genesis24:25 Era yaayongeraku ati: “Tuli n'eisubi n'eby'okulya ebimala ensolo dho, era tuli n'ekifo eky'okusulamu.”" 
Genesis24:26 Agho omusaadha yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaasinza Musengwa Katonda." 
Genesis24:27 Yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa musengwa wange Aburahamu, asaakibwe; kuba ayoleike nga bw'atalekera kugonza musengwa wange, era nga bw'ali omwesigwa y'ali. Ate zeena Musengwa Katonda andholeike engira, naatuuka mu maka g'aboluganda ba musengwa wange.”" 
Genesis24:28 Omughala yaalumuka, yaaja okukobera ab'omu ndhu ya inhina byonabyona ebyaligho." 
Genesis24:29 Rebekka yali ni mwanhina, ng'eriina lye ni Labani. Labani oyo yaafuluma, yaalumuka okuja ku nsulo aghaali omusaadha." 
Genesis24:30 Aye Labani yamala kubona ku mpeta na ku bukomo ku mikono gya mwanhina, era na kuwulira mwanhina oyo ng'aghaya ebyo omusaadha bye yamukoba, memale yaaja eri omusaadha era yaamwagaana ng'ayemereire kumpi n'engamiya dhe gha nsulo." 
Genesis24:31 Labani yaakoba ati: “Idha tuje eka, iwe Musengwa Katonda y'aghaire enkabi. Ku lwaki oyemerera eno ku luya? Nkutegekeire endhu n'ekifo eky'engamiya.”" 
Genesis24:32 Agho omusaadha yaaja, yaingira mu ndhu. Labani yaasibulula emigonero ku ngamiya, yaaleeta eisubi n'eby'okulya eby'engamiya, era yaaleeta n'amaadhi, omusaadha n'abaali naye, ge bananaaba ku bigere." 
Genesis24:33 Omusaadha bwe baamuleetera emere, yaaloba okulya ng'akoba ati: “Tiidha kulya nga nkaali kwogera bye bantuma.” Labani yaakoba ati: “Yogera.”" 
Genesis24:34 Omusaadha yaakoba ati: “Nze ndi mugheereza wa Aburahamu.” 
Genesis24:35 Musengwa Katonda yagha musengwa wange Aburahamu enkabi edhitaloodheka, yaamufuula mukombe inho. Yamugha ebyayo kamaala: ente, embuzi n'entaama. Era yaamugha feeza ni zaabu, n'abairu abasaadha n'abakazi, n'engamiya era n'endogoyi." 
Genesis24:36 Era Sara muka musengwa wange, yazaalira musengwa wange oyo omwana mulenzi, mu myaka gye egy'obukaire. Ebintu byonabyona Musengwa wange bye yali nabyo yaabigha omwana oyo." 
Genesis24:37 Era musengwa yandayiza, yaakoba ati, “‘Tofuniranga mwana wange mukazi ava mu bantu ba ghano mu Kanaani, be mbaamu." 
Genesis24:38 Aye ojanga mu ndhu ya lata wange era mu boluganda lwange, waafunira eyo omwana wange omukazi.’" 
Genesis24:39 Nze naamukoba nti, ‘Aye omukazi bw'ataliganha kwidha ninze’”" 
Genesis24:40 Yandhiramu ati, “Musengwa Katonda oyo ye ngondera buliidho, alikutuma ghalala ni malaika we, yaagha olugendo lwo enkabi waafunira omwana wange omukazi okuva mu boluganda lwange era mu ndhu ya lata wange." 
Genesis24:41 Bw'okola otyo tolibaaku musango olw'ekirayiro kino ky'ondayiriire, kuba oliba ng'ojiire y'aboluganda lwange. Aye bwe batalikugha mukazi, olwo tolibaaku musango lwa kirayiro kino ky'ondayiriire.”" 
Genesis24:42 “Bwe ntuuse ku nsulo olwaleero, naakoba nti: Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe Katonda wa musengwa wange Aburahamu, nkweghembye mpa enkabi mu lugendo luno." 
Genesis24:43 Bona, mpegaano nhemereire ghano ku nsulo. Kale, omughala anaafuluma okusena amaadhi, nze ni mmukoba nti, Nkweghembye mpa ku maadhi mu nsugha yo nhweku," 
Genesis24:44 yeena n'aikiriza nankoba ati, ‘Gaago nhwa, era n'engamiya dho dhoona ka ndhisenere dhinhwe,’ nkusaba abe nga n'oyo iwe Musengwa Katonda y'olondeire omwana wa musengwa wange.”" 
Genesis24:45 Bwe mbaire nga nkaasaba mu mwoyo gwange, Rebekka yaidha ng'ali n'ensugha ku ibega, yaikirira ku nsulo, yaasena amaadhi. Naamukoba nti “‘Nkweghembye mpa ku maadhi nhweku.’" 
Genesis24:46 Yaayangugha, yaatoola ensugha ku ibega, yaakoba ati, ‘Nhwa, era n'engamiya dho dhoona ndidha kudhisenera dhinhwe.’ Kale naanhwa, era n'engamiya dhoona yaadhigha dhaanhwa." 
Genesis24:47 Naamubuuza nti, ‘Oli mughala w'ani?’ Yairamu ati, ‘Ndi mughala wa Bethueli mutabane wa Nahori ni mukazi we Milika.’ Kale naamuta empeta ku nhindo, n'obukomo ku mikono." 
Genesis24:48 Agho naakuba amakiryaivu, naasinza Musengwa Katonda. Naasaaka Musengwa Katonda oyo, Katonda wa musengwa wange Aburahamu, eyandholeka engira entuufu, ni nfunira omwana we omukazi ku baana ab'owoluganda lwe." 
Genesis24:49 Kale mpegaano munkobere oba nga munaayoleka obwesigwa eri musengwa wange. Oba nga timuukole mutyo era munkobere, memale nsalegho eky'okukola.”" 
Genesis24:50 Agho Labani ni Bethueli bairamu bati: “Ekyo kiviire wa Musengwa Katonda. Ife titughanga kubaaku ni kye tusalagho. 
Genesis24:51 Rebekka wuuyo ja naye, abe mukaamwana owa musengwa wo Aburahamu, nga Musengwa Katonda mwene bw'akobye.”" 
Genesis24:52 Omugheereza wa Aburahamu bweyawulira bye bakobye yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaasinza Musengwa Katonda." 
Genesis24:53 Agho yaatoolayo ebintu ebyakolebwa mu feeza ni mu zaabu, yaatoolayo n'ebivaalo, yaabigha Rebekka. Era yaagha mwanhina Rebekka ni mukaire we ebirabo eby'omughendo einho." 
Genesis24:54 Agho omugheereza wa Aburahamu oyo n'abasaadha be yali nabo, baalya, baanhwa era baasula eyo. Bwe baazuuka enkyo, omugheereza oyo yaakoba ati: “Munsiibule ndhireyo ye musengwa wange.”" 
Genesis24:55 Mwanhina Rebekka n'inhina baakoba bati: “Leka omughala abe ng'akaaliku n'ife enaku ntonotono edhighera ng'eikumi, memale aje.”" 
Genesis24:56 Aye omugheereza yaakoba ati: “Mulobe kundwisa, kuba Musengwa Katonda aghaire olugendo lwange enkabi. Munsiibule ndhireyo ye musengwa wange.”" 
Genesis24:57 Baakoba bati: “Ka twete omughala tuwulire mwene ky'akoba.” 
Genesis24:58 Agho baayeta Rebekka, baamubuuza bati: “Onaaja n'omusaadha ono?” Yairamu ati: “Yii, nnaaja naye.”" 
Genesis24:59 Kale baasiibula mwanhinaibwe Rebekka n'omulezi we, baaja n'omugheereza wa Aburahamu n'abasaadha be." 
Genesis24:60 Era baasabira Rebekka enkabi, nga bakoba bati: “Mwanhinaife, banga muzaire wa bantu nkumi na nkumi. Era baidhukulu bo baghangulenga ebibuga by'abazigu baibwe.”" 
Genesis24:61 Agho Rebekka n'abaghala be abaamugheerezanga baasituka, baatyama ku ngamiya, baaja n'omugheereza wa Aburahamu. Mu nsambo eyo, omugheereza wa Aburahamu oyo yaatwala Rebekka, yaaja." 
Genesis24:62 Isaaka yali aviire e Beeri Lahairoi, ng'aba mu kiketezo ky'e Kanaani ekikalukalu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Genesis24:63 Eiguloigulo yaaja okutambulatambulaku mu nimiro. Olwalinga ati yaabona engamiya nga dhiri kwidha. 
Genesis24:64 Rebekka bweyalinga ati naabona Isaaka, y'ava ku ngamiya." 
Genesis24:65 Yaabuuza omugheereza wa Aburahamu ati: “Omusaadha oyo ali kutambula mu nimiro ng'aidha ye tuli, naani?” Omugheereza yairamu ati: “Ni musengwa wange.” Agho Rebekka yaatoola ekitambaala kye, yeeghemba mu maiso." 
Genesis24:66 Omugheereza yaakobera Isaaka byonabyona bye yakola. 
Genesis24:67 Agho Isaaka yaatwala Rebekka mu weema eyali eya Sara inhina, yaamufuula mukazi we era yaamugonza. Ekyo kyaleetera Isaaka okuguma mu nnaku ey'okufiirwa inhina." 
Genesis25:1 Aburahamu yabayiza omukazi owundi, eriina lye nga ni Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Yaamuzaalira Zimurani, ni Yokoshani, ni Medani, ni Midiani, ni Ishibaki era ni Shua." 
Genesis25:3 Yokoshani yazaala Sheba ni Dedani. Abaana ba Dedani ni bano: Ashurimi, ni Letushimi, ni Leunimi." 
Genesis25:4 Abaana ba Midiani ni bano: Efa, ni Eferi, ni Hanoka, ni Abida, ni Elida. Abo boonaboona baidhukulu ba Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Aburahamu yalekera Isaaka ebintu byonabyona bye yali nabyo. 
Genesis25:6 Aye Aburahamu oyo bweyali ng'akaali mulamu, yagha abaana be ab'abakazi ab'embali ebirabo. Yabasindika mu nsi ey'e buvandhuba, bave aghali omwana we oyo Isaaka." 
Genesis25:7 Aburahamu yaghangaala emyaka kikumi na nsanvu n'etaanu (175)," 
Genesis25:8 era yaafa nga musaadha mukaire ow'emyaka emiidhuvu; yaatwalibwa eri badhaadha be. 
Genesis25:9 Batabane be, Isaaka ni Ishimaeli, baamuziika mu mpuku ya Makipela e buvandhuba bwa Mamure, mu nimiro eyali ey'Efuroni, omwana wa Zohara Omuhitti." 
Genesis25:10 Eyo n'enimiro Aburahamu ye yagula ku Bahitti era omwo mwe yaaziikibwa ni mukazi we Sara. 
Genesis25:11 Aburahamu bweyamala okufa, Katonda yaagha Isaaka enkabi. Isaaka yaabanga kumpi ni Beerilahairoi." 
Genesis25:12 Bano ni baidhukulu ba Ishimaeli omwana wa Aburahamu eyamuzaalirwa Hagari Omumisiri eyali omwiru wa Sara. 
Genesis25:13 Gano n'amaina gaibwe nga bwe bairaganwaku mu kuzaalibwa kwaibwe: Omwana omuberi, ni Nebaiothi, memale kwairaku Kedari, ni Adubeeli, ni Mibusamu," 
Genesis25:14 ni Mishima, ni Duma, ni Massa," 
Genesis25:15 ni Hadadi, ni Tema, ni Yeturi, ni Nafishi, era ni Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Abo n'abaana ba Ishimaeli, nga badhaadha ba bika ikumi na bibiri. Era ebyalo byaibwe, n'ebifo mwe baasimba weema dhaibwe byatuumibwa amaina gaibwe." 
Genesis25:17 Ishimaeli yaghangaala emyaka kikumi n'asatu na musanvu (137), yaafa era yatwalibwa eri badhaadha be." 
Genesis25:18 Baidhukulu ba Ishimaeli baabanga mu kiketezo ekiri ghagati gha Havila ni Shuri, e buvandhuba bwa Misiri, ng'oja mu Assiria. Baabanga eyo nga beeswireku akata ku baidhukulu ba Aburahamu abandi." 
Genesis25:19 Bano n'abaana ba Isaaka omwana wa Aburahamu: 
Genesis25:20 Isaaka bweyagheza emyaka amakumi ana (40) egy'obukulu, yaabayiza mughala wa Bethueli Omuarami ow'e Paddanarama, ayetebwa Rebekka, mwanhina Labani." 
Genesis25:21 Isaaka yaasabira mukazi we, eyali omugumba. Musengwa Katonda yairamu okusaba kwe, Rebekka yaatoola enda." 
Genesis25:22 Enda eyo yali ya balongo, era bwe baali nga bakaali kuzaalibwa, baakontaganira mule mu nda ye. Rebekka yaakoba ati: “Oba nga kiti bwekiri, kingasa ki okusigala nga ndi mulamu?” Agho yaaja okwebuuzaaku ku Musengwa Katonda." 
Genesis25:23 Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Amaghanga abiri gali mu nda yo; olizaala ebika bibiri ebyawukaine. Ekindi kinaasinzanga kiinaakyo amaani; omukulu n'anaagheerezanga omuto.” 
Genesis25:24 Agho enaku edh'okuzaala dhaatuuka nga bwenebwene ali n'abaana balongo mu nda. 
Genesis25:25 Omuberi yaafuluma ng'omubiri gwe gwa kasaayisaayi era nga gwidhwire buviiri ng'oti luwu; kale baamutuuma eriina Esau. 
Genesis25:26 Owokubiri yaafuluma, ng'omukono gwe gugemereire ekibbonge kya Esau kale baamutuuma eriina Yakobo. Rebekka yaja okuzaala nga Isaaka agheziiza emyaka nkaaga (60) egy'obukulu." 
Genesis25:27 Abaisuka abo bombi baakula. Esau yaafuuka omuyiizi omukugu, era omusaadha anhumirwa obulamu obw'omu nsiko. Aye Yakobo yaaba musaadha musirise, era eyasigalanga ghaka." 
Genesis25:28 Isaaka yasinga kwenda Esau, kuba yalyanga ku nsolo Esau dhe yayiiganga. Aye Rebekka yaasinga kwenda Yakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Lwali lulala Yakobo yaafumba ebidhandhaali, Esau yaira eka ng'ava mu nsiko, endhala ng'eri kumuluma inho." 
Genesis25:30 Yaakoba Yakobo ati: “Endhala eyenda kundhita! Mpa ndye ku bidhandhaali byo ebimyuse bityo.” Kyebaava bamweta Edomu. 
Genesis25:31 Yakobo yairamu ati: “Mpaamu obukulu bwo obw'okuba omwana omuberi memale mbikughe.” 
Genesis25:32 Esau yaakoba ati: “Mbona ndi kumpi kufa obukulu bulingasa ki?” 
Genesis25:33 Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Layira memale.” Esau yaalayira, yaagha Yakobo obukulu bwe." 
Genesis25:34 Agho Yakobo yaagha Esau emere n'ebidhandhaali. Esau yaalya era yaanhwa, era yaasituka, yaaja. Atyo Esau bweyanhoomoola obukulu bwe." 
Genesis26:1 Agho endhala eyindi yaagwa mu nsi, okuleka ere eyagwa mu biseera bya Aburahamu. Isaaka yaaja eri Abimeleki, kyabazinga w'Abafilisiti mu Gerari." 
Genesis26:2 Musengwa Katonda yaabonekera Isaaka, yaakoba ati: “Otaikirira mu Misiri; sigala mu nsi eno, obe ghe nnaakukoba." 
Genesis26:3 Senga mu nsi eno, ndidha kubanga n'iwe era nkughenga enkabi. Ndidha kukugha iwe ni baidhukulu bo, ebiketezo eby'ensi bino byonabyona, era ntuukirize ekirayiro kye nalayirira lata wo Aburahamu." 
Genesis26:4 Ndidha kukugha abaidhukulu kamaala inho ng'oti n'emuunienie edh'oku igulu, era mbaghe ebiketezo eby'ensi bino byonabyona. Era mu baidhukulu bo, amaghanga goonagoona ku nsi mwe galigheerwa enkabi;" 
Genesis26:5 kuba Aburahamu yawulira bye namusikiriranga, era yaagondera amateeka gange goonagoona n'ebiragiro byange.”" 
Genesis26:6 Kale Isaaka yaaba mu Gerari. 
Genesis26:7 Abasaadha baayo bwe baamubuuza ku mukazi we, yaakoba ati mwanhina. Kuba yatya okukoba ati mukazi we, abasaadha baayo balobe kumwita olwa Rebekka, eyali ng'aboneka obulungi einho." 
Genesis26:8 Isaaka bweyali ng'amazeeyo entangama, Abimeleki, kyabazinga w'Abafilisiti, yaalengera okuva mu dinisa ye, yaabona Isaaka ng'ali kuzaanha ni mukazi we Rebekka." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleki yaayeta Isaaka, yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ono mukazi wo, kale lwaki wakoba oti mwanhoko?” Isaaka yaamwiramu ati: “Nze nadhuuba nti baidha kundhita bwe nkoba nti oyo mukazi wange.”" 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleki yaakoba ati: “Kiki kino ky'otukoze? Owundi ku basaadha bange yandisoboire okuba ni mukazi wo, era olwo wandibaire otuleeseeku omusango.”" 
Genesis26:11 Kale Abimeleki yaasikirira abantu boonaboona ati: “Kiisi agema ku musaadha ono, oba ku mukazi we, wa kwitibwa.”" 
Genesis26:12 Agho Isaaka yaasiga ensigo mu nsi eyo, yaakungulamu emikuzi kikumi ku bye yasiga mu mwaka ogwo gwene, kuba Musengwa Katonda yamugha enkabi." 
Genesis26:13 Era yaafuna ebintu kamaala, nga byeyongera bweyongere, yaafuuka mukombe." 
Genesis26:14 Yali n'engo edh'ente, n'entaama, n'embuzi, era n'abagheereza kamaala. Kino kyaleetera Abafilisiti okumugemerwa ensaalwa." 
Genesis26:15 Abafilisiti bano baali nga basembye ensulo dhoonadhoona baadhiidhuzaamu eitaka. Ensulo dhino dhaali nga dhisimiibwa abagheereza ba lata we Aburahamu, nga Aburahamu akaali mulamu." 
Genesis26:16 Agho Abimeleki yaakoba Isaaka ati: “Va mu nsi yaife oje, kuba ofuuse wa maani inho okutusinga.”" 
Genesis26:17 Kale Isaaka yaavaayo, yaasimba weema dhe mu kiiko eky'e Gerari, yaaba eyo." 
Genesis26:18 Era yaayerula buyaaka ensulo edhaali dhisimiibwa nga Aburahamu ise akaali mulamu, Abafilisiti dhe baasemba nga Aburahamu amaze okufa. Isaaka yadheeta amaina geene ago ise ge yadhituuma." 
Genesis26:19 Aye abagheereza ba Isaaka bwe baasima ensulo mu kiiko, ni baazuula amaadhi amalungi," 
Genesis26:20 abaayi ab'e Gerari baakaayana n'abaayi ba Isaaka, nga bakoba bati: “Amaadhi gano gaife.” Isaaka yaatuuma ensulo eyo eriina Eseki, kuba baakaayana naye." 
Genesis26:21 Abagheereza ba Isaaka baasima ensulo eyindi, era yoona baagikaayanira. Kale yaagituuma eriina Sitina." 
Genesis26:22 Eyo yaavaayo, yaasima ensulo eyindi, baaloba kugikaayanira; yaagituuma eriina Rehobothi. Yaakoba ati: “Mpegaano Musengwa Katonda atughaire aghagazi, twidha kwala mu nsi.”" 
Genesis26:23 Olwava eyo, yaaniinaniina e Beerisheba." 
Genesis26:24 Musengwa Katonda yaamubonekera obwire obwo, yaakoba ati, “Ninze Katonda wa lata wo Aburahamu. Otatya, kuba ndi n'iwe. Ndikugha enkabi, era naakugha abaidhukulu kamaala, olw'omugheereza wange Aburahamu.”" 
Genesis26:25 Kale, Isaaka yaazimba eyo alutaari, yaasinza Musengwa Katonda. Yaazimbayo weema ye, era abagheereza be baasimayo ensulo." 
Genesis26:26 Agho Abimeleki yaava mu Gerari ng'ali ghalala ni Ahuzzathi amugha amagezi, ni Fikoli omuduumizi w'amagye ge, baaja eri Isaaka." 
Genesis26:27 Isaaka yaababuuza ati: “Kiki ekibaleese ye ndi, ate nga mwankyagha era mwaminga mu nsi yaimwe?”" 
Genesis26:28 Bairamu bati: “Tuboine nga bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda ali n'iwe, kye tuva ni tukoba tuti ghabeegho ekirayiro ghagati wo n'ife, era tukole endagaano n'iwe," 
Genesis26:29 tuti iwe tootukolengaku kabi, nga ife twena bwe tutaakukolaku kabi. Twakukolera bikalamu byereere, era twakuleka waaja miraala. Mpegaano Musengwa Katonda niiwe y'aghaire enkabi.”" 
Genesis26:30 Agho Isaaka yaabafumbira embaga, baalya era baanhwa." 
Genesis26:31 Enkyo bwe baazuuka, baakola ekirayiro ku buli luuyi. Isaaka yaabasiibula, baayawukana naye nga bali miraala." 
Genesis26:32 Ku lunaku lwene olwo, abagheereza ba Isaaka baidha, baamukoberaku ku nsulo ye baali nga basimye, baakoba bati: “Tuzwire amaadhi.”" 
Genesis26:33 Ensulo eyo yaagyeta Shiba. Okwo n'okwava ekibuga okutuumibwa eriina Beerisheba, n'okutuusa mpegaano." 
Genesis26:34 Esau bweyagheza emyaka amakumi ana (40) egy'obukulu, yaabayiza Yuditha mughala wa Beeri Omuhitti. Era yaabayiza ni Basemathi mughala wa Eloni, nga yeena Muhitti." 
Genesis26:35 Abakazi bano bombi baaleetera Isaaka ni Rebekka okuba mu bulamu obuzibu. 
Genesis27:1 Agho Isaaka bweyali ng'akairiighe, era ng'amaiso ge gaidhieku ekifu, nga takaaghanga kubona, yaayeta Esau mutabane we omukulu. Yaamukoba ati: “Mwana wange!” Yaavugira ati: “Ndi ghano.”" 
Genesis27:2 Isaaka yaamukoba ati: “Bona, nkairiighe, tiidhi lunaku lwe ndifiiraku." 
Genesis27:3 Kale, mpegaano gema akalaso ko n'obusaale bwo, oje mu nsiko ondhiigire ensolo," 
Genesis27:4 onfumbire emamba ey'akawoowo ye nhenda, ogindeetere ndye, memale nkusabire enkabi nga nkaali kufa.”" 
Genesis27:5 Rebekka yaawulira nga Isaaka ali kwogera ni mutabane Esau. Kale Esau bweyaja mu nsiko okuyiiga ensolo agireete," 
Genesis27:6 Rebekka yaakoba omwana we Yakobo ati: “Mpuliire lata wo ng'akoba muganda wo Esau ati," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Ndhiigira ensolo, onfumbire emamba ey'akawoowo ngirye, memale nkusabire enkabi mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda nga nkaali kufa.’" 
Genesis27:8 Mpegaano ni, mwana wange, mpulirisa era okole kye nja okukukoba." 
Genesis27:9 Ja mu kisibo ky'embuzi ondeetereyo embuzi ento enungi ibiri, ndhirongoose, nfumbire lata wo emamba ey'akawoowo y'ayenda." 
Genesis27:10 Iwe oidha kugimutwalira alye, memale akusabire enkabi ng'akaali kufa.”" 
Genesis27:11 Aye Yakobo yaakoba Rebekka inhina ati: “Oidhi nga muganda wange Esau aliku obuviiri ku mubiri gwe, aye nze nziraku." 
Genesis27:12 Tomanha bbaaba bw'angemaku n'azuula nga ndi kumulimba, olwo ni neereetaku okukolimirwa mu kifo ky'okusabirwa enkabi.”" 
Genesis27:13 Inhina yaamwiramu ati: “Mwana wange, ekikolimo ekyo kiiriranga ku nze. Aye kola nga bwendi kukukoba, oje ondeetere embuzi.”" 
Genesis27:14 Kale Yakobo yaaja yaadhinona, yaadhireetera inhina. Inhina yaafumba emamba ey'akawoowo lata we y'ayenda." 
Genesis27:15 Rebekka yaatoolayo ebivaalo bya Esau omwana we omukulu, ebisinga okuba ebirungi bye yali atereike mu ndhu, yaabivaaza omwana we omuto Yakobo." 
Genesis27:16 Yaata amawu g'embuzi dhire ento ku mikono gya Yakobo, ni mu nkoto aghataali buviiri." 
Genesis27:17 Agho yaagemya omwana we Yakobo emamba ey'akawoowo n'omugaati, bye yali afumbye." 
Genesis27:18 Yakobo yaaja eri ise, yaakoba ati: “Bbaaba!” Yaavugira ati: “Ndi ghano. Niiwe ani mwana wange?”" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobo yaakoba ise ati: “Ninze Esau omwana wo omuberi. Nkoze nga bwe wankobye. Mpegaano ni situka otyame, olye ku mamba ye ndhiize, olwo onsabire enkabi.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isaaka yaakoba mutabane ati: “Ogizwire otya amangu otyo, mwana wange?” Yakobo yaamwiramu ati: “Musengwa Katonda wo n'anhambye.”" 
Genesis27:21 Isaaka yaakoba Yakobo ati: “Kale seeta ghano, mwana wange, nkugemeku mbone oba nga bwene niiwe omwana wange Esau.”" 
Genesis27:22 Yakobo yaaseeta eri Isaaka ise, Isaaka yaamugemaku, yaakoba ati: “Amamiro ga Yakobo, aye emikono gya Esau!”" 
Genesis27:23 Yaaloba kumutegeera, kuba emikono gye gyaliku obuviiri ng'oti n'egya muganda we Esau; kale yaaganha okumusabira enkabi." 
Genesis27:24 Aye era yaamubuuza kabiri ati: “Bwenebwene niiwe omwana wange Esau?” Yairamu ati: “Ninze.” 
Genesis27:25 Isaaka yaakoba ati: “Ndeetera ebyo by'oyiize, mwana wange, ndye olwo nkusabire enkabi.” Yakobo yaabimuleetera, yaalya. Era yaamuleetera n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, yaanhwa." 
Genesis27:26 Agho lata we yaamukoba ati: “Seeta ongwe mu kifuba, mwana wange.”" 
Genesis27:27 Yaaseeta, yaamugwa mu kifuba. Isaaka yaawunhiza akawoowo k'ebivaalo bye, yaamusabira enkabi, ng'akoba ati: “Akawoowo ak'omwana wange kali ng'oti n'akawoowo ak'enimiro Musengwa Katonda gy'aghaire enkabi!" 
Genesis27:28 Katonda akughenga ku musulo oguva mu igulu, era agimusenga enimiro dho. Akughenga engaano kamaala, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu mungi!" 
Genesis27:29 Abantu aba buli nsambo bakugheerezenga, n'amaghanga kamaala gakukubirenga amakiryaivu! Ofugenga baganda bo, era abaana ba inhoko bakukubirenga amakiryaivu! Kiisi akukolimira akolimirwenga, era kiisi akusabira enkabi, yeena agheebwenga enkabi!”" 
Genesis27:30 Isaaka bweyali nga yaakamala okusabira Yakobo enkabi, era nga Yakobo akaali na kuva ghali lata we, muganda we Esau yaingira ng'ava okuyiiga." 
Genesis27:31 Era yeena yaafumba emamba ey'akawoowo, yaagitwalira ise, yaamukoba ati: “Bbaaba, situka otyame, olye ku mamba nze omwana wo ye ndhiize, olwo onsabire enkabi.”" 
Genesis27:32 Lata we Isaaka yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe ani?” Yairamu ati: “Ninze Esau omwana wo omuberi.” 
Genesis27:33 Isaaka yaadhugumira inho, yaabuuza ati: “Ate ole abaire nga naani, eyayiize ensolo, n'andeetera emamba ni ndya, ng'okaali kwidha, era ni mmusabira enkabi? Era bwenebwene aligheebwa enkabi.”" 
Genesis27:34 Esau bweyawulira ise by'akobye, yaawowoola inho olw'okunakughala. Yaakoba ise ati: “Bbaaba, nkweghembye zeena onsabire enkabi.”" 
Genesis27:35 Aye Isaaka yaakoba ati: “Muganda wo aidhie yanguya, yaatwala enkabi dho.”" 
Genesis27:36 Esau yaakoba ati: “Ti kyeyava n'atuumibwa eriina Yakobo? Bwenebwene lyamutuukaaniraku bukalamu, kuba guno omukuzi gwakubiri ng'atwala ekifo kyange. Yantoolaku obukulu bwange obw'okuba omwana omuberi, ni mpegaano bona atoireku enkabi dhange.” Agho yaakoba ati: “Nze tonterekeireyooku ku nkabi?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaaka yairamu ati: “Mmufiire musengwa wo, era mmughaire baganda be boonaboona babenga bagheereza be, era naamugha engaano n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Kale kiki kye naakukolera iwe, mwana wange.”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau yeeghemba ise ati: “Bbaaba, enkabi oli na ndala eti yonka? Wo bbaaba nkweghembye zeena nsabira enkabi!” Agho yaatoolera okuwowoola." 
Genesis27:39 Agho lata we Isaaka yaamwiramu ati: “Enimiro dho tidhiibengamu bugimu, era toofunenga musulo guva mu igulu." 
Genesis27:40 Oidha kufunanga eky'okulya ng'okozesa mpiima yo, era oidha kubanga mugheereza wa muganda wo. Aye bw'olimulwanisa n'omughangula, oliwona okufugibwa kwe.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esau yaakyagha Yakobo olw'enkabi ise dhe yamusabira. Esau yaakoba mule ati: “Enaku edh'okulira nga bbaaba afiire, dhiri kumpi kutuuka. Bwe dhirituuka, ndiita muganda wange Yakobo.”" 
Genesis27:42 Aye Rebekka bweyawulira ebyo Esau omwana we omukulu bye yali ali kutegeka okukola, yaayesa Yakobo omwana we omuto, yaamukoba ati: “Bona, muganda wo ali kutegeka okukwita yeemale ekiruyi." 
Genesis27:43 Kale mpegaano mwana wange, kola nga bwendi kukukoba. Situkiramu olumukire ye mwanhinaze Labani mu kibuga Harani," 
Genesis27:44 obe n'oyo okumala entangama, okutuusa obusungu bwa muganda wo lwe buliikaikana," 
Genesis27:45 ni yeerabira kye wamukola. Olwo ndituma, naakutoolayo eyo. Tyenda kubafiirwa mwembi ku lunaku lulala.”" 
Genesis27:46 Rebekka yaakoba Isaaka ati: “Obulamu bwange bwesiniirwa abakazi ba Esau Abahitti. Yakobo yeena bw'aba ow'okubayiza omukazi Omuhitti, nze mmala gafa.”" 
Genesis28:1 Agho Isaaka yaayeta Yakobo, yaamwendeza enkabi, yaamusikirira ati: “Tobayizanga mukazi Mukanaani." 
Genesis28:2 Situkiramu oje e Paddanarama mu maka ga dhaadha wo Bethueli azaala inhoko, ofune eyo omukazi ow'okubayiza ku baghala ba Labani mwanhina inhoko." 
Genesis28:3 Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona akughe enkabi, ozaale abaana kamaala, osimukemu amaghanga kamaala." 
Genesis28:4 Era akughe enkabi iwe ni baidhukulu bo nga dhe yagha Aburahamu, mutwale ensi eno y'obairemu ng'omusenze ebe yaimwe, ensi Katonda ye yagha Aburahamu oyo.”" 
Genesis28:5 Kale, Isaaka yaasindika Yakobo e Paddanarama ewa Labani. Labani oyo n'eyali mutabane wa Bethueli Omuarami era mwanhina Rebekka, inhina wa Esau ni Yakobo." 
Genesis28:6 Agho Esau yaakitegeera ati Isaaka yasabira Yakobo enkabi, era yaamusindika e Paddanarama afune eyo omukazi ow'okubayiza. Era yaakitegeera ati bweyamusabira enkabi, yamusikirira obutabayizanga mukazi Mukanaani," 
Genesis28:7 era yaakitegeera nga Yakobo bweyagondera ise n'inhina, naaja e Paddanarama." 
Genesis28:8 Esau bweyakitegeera nga ise tasiima bakazi Bakanaani," 
Genesis28:9 yaaja ewa Ishimaeli, mutabane wa Aburahamu, yaabayiza mughala we Mahalathi, mwanhina Nebaiothi, yaamwongera ku bakazi be abandi." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobo yaava mu Beerisheba, yaaja ng'ayolekeire Harani." 
Genesis28:11 Yaatuuka mu kifo aghantu yaasula agho, kuba endhuba yali egwire. Yaalambaala agho nga yeeziziike y'omutwe erindi ku mabaale ag'omu kifo ekyo." 
Genesis28:12 Yaaloota amadaala agasimbiibwa ku itaka, nga gatuuka ku igulu yaja okubona nga bamalaika ba Katonda bali kuganiina bwe baika!" 
Genesis28:13 Era okuja okubona, nga Musengwa Katonda ayemereire ghaigulu ghaago. Yaakoba ati: “Ninze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa dhaadha wo Aburahamu, era Katonda wa Isaaka. Ensi eno gy'olambaireku ndigikugha iwe ni baidhukulu bo." 
Genesis28:14 Baidhukulu bo baliba bangi ng'oti nkungu ey'oku nsi. Balibuna mu nsonda dhoonadhoona edh'ensi. Era mu iwe, ni mu baidhukulu bo, amaghanga goonagoona mwe galigheerwa enkabi." 
Genesis28:15 Bona, ndi n'iwe, ndidha kukukuumanga yoonayoona y'onaajanga, era ndidha kukwiza mu nsi eno; tirikulekulira agho, okutuusa nga mmaze okutuukiriza ebyo bye nkukobye.”" 
Genesis28:16 Yakobo yaazuuka mu ndoolo, yaakoba mule ati: “Bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda ali mu kifo kino! Aye nze mbaire tiidhi!”" 
Genesis28:17 Yaatya era yaakoba mule ati: “Ekifo kino nga kitiisa! Kiteekwa okuba nga n'endhu ya Katonda, era nga n'omulyango ogw'eigulu!”" 
Genesis28:18 Yakobo yaasituka ku nkyo, yaatoola eibaale lye yeezizika y'omutwe, yaalisimbagho yaalifukaku omuzigo libe ekiidhukizo." 
Genesis28:19 Yaatuuma ekifo ekyo eriina Betheli. Aye ng'ekibuga ky'eyo mu kusooka kyali kyetebwa Luzi. 
Genesis28:20 Agho Yakobo yaagha obweyamo eri Musengwa Katonda ati: “Bw'onaabanga ghalala ninze, ng'onkuuma mu lugendo lwange luno, era ng'ompa eby'okulya n'eby'okuvaala," 
Genesis28:21 era bw'olindhiza obukalamu mu ndhu ya lata, olwo onaabanga Katonda wange." 
Genesis28:22 Eibaale lino lye nsimbye okuba ekiidhukizo, liriba ndhu yo, iwe Katonda, era ndikugha ekintu kirala ku buli bintu ikumi ku byonabyona by'olimpa.”" 
Genesis29:1 Agho Yakobo yeeyongera okutambula, yaatuuka mu nsi y'abantu ab'e buvandhuba." 
Genesis29:2 Yaja okulinga ati, yaabona ensulo mu nsiko n'ebighaso eby'entaama bisatu, nga dhirambaire agho aghali ensulo; kuba mu nsulo omwo mwe baanhwesanga entaama. Ku nsulo eyo nga basandikiraku eibaale eikologho." 
Genesis29:3 Ebighaso eby'entaama byonabyona buli lwe byesolozanga, ng'olwo abaayi bagalangula eibaale eryo okuva ku munwa gw'ensulo, nga banhwesa entaama; kabiri nga baliizaagho okusandikira ensulo." 
Genesis29:4 Yakobo yaabuuza abaayi ab'ebighaso eby'entaama bire ebisatu, ati: “Bakagwa, muviira gha?” Bairamu bati: “Tuviira Harani.”" 
Genesis29:5 Yaababuuza ati: “Mwidhi Labani mwidhukulu wa Nahori?” Bairamu bati: “Tumwidhi.” 
Genesis29:6 Yaabuuza ati: “Aliyo mukalamu?” Bairamu bati: “Aliyo mukalamu era bona, mughala we Rakeli wuuyo ali kwidha n'entaama.”" 
Genesis29:7 Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Bona, bukaali musana, ekiseera eky'okwingiza ebyayo mu bisibo kikaali kutuuka. Kale munhwese entaama, mudhiizeeyo mudhaaye.”" 
Genesis29:8 Baakoba bati: “Titughanga kukola tutyo, okutoolaku ng'ebighaso by'entaama byonabyona byesoloiza, twagalangula eibaale okusandukula ku nsulo, memale twanhwesa entaama.”" 
Genesis29:9 Yakobo yali akaayogera nabo, Rakeli yaatuuka n'entaama dha ise, kuba n'eyadhaayanga." 
Genesis29:10 Yakobo bweyabona Rakeli mughala wa Labani ng'ali n'entaama dha Labani ise, yaaja yaagalangula eibaale okusandukula ensulo, yaanhwesa entaama edho. Labani oyo yali mwanhina wa inhina wa Yakobo." 
Genesis29:11 Agho yaagwa Rakeli mu kifuba, yaasangaala inho, era yaakuba n'omuzira." 
Genesis29:12 Yakobo yaakobera Rakeli ati: “Nze ndi waluganda ni lata wo, ndi mwana wa songa wo Rebekka.” Rakeli yaalumuka okukobera ise." 
Genesis29:13 Labani bweyawulira ati Yakobo omwana wa mwanhina aidhie, yaalumuka, yaaja okumusangaaza. Yaamugwa mu kifuba era yaamwevumba, yamwingiza mu ndhu ye. Yakobo yaakobera Labani ebimufaaku byonabyona." 
Genesis29:14 Labani yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene oli musaayi gwange era wa mu nda.” Yakobo yaamala naye omwezi mulamba. 
Genesis29:15 Agho Labani yaakoba Yakobo ati: “Toidha kunkoleranga mirimo ku bwereere, waire oli waluganda lwange. Nkobera empeera ye wandyenze?”" 
Genesis29:16 Mpegaano, Labani yali ni baghala be babiri; eriina ery'omukulu nga ni Leeya, ate ery'omuto nga ni Rakeli." 
Genesis29:17 Leeya tiyali mulungi inho, aye enkula ya Rakeli yali ng'esanhusa okubona." 
Genesis29:18 Yakobo yali ayenda inho Rakeli, kale yaakoba ati: “Ndidha kukukolera okumala emyaka musanvu ompe Rakeli mughala wo omuto.”" 
Genesis29:19 Labani yaakoba ati: “Okumugha iwe kisinga okumugha omusaadha owundi yeenayeena. Kale ba ghano ninze.” 
Genesis29:20 Yakobo yaakolera emyaka musanvu afune Rakeli, era gyamubonekera ng'oti nnaku bunaku entono dhiti, olw'okumwenda okungi kwe yali nakwo." 
Genesis29:21 Agho Yakobo yaakoba Labani ati: “Mpa mughala wo mmubayize, kuba mmazeeyo ekiseera kyange.”" 
Genesis29:22 Kale Labani yaayeta abantu boonaboona ab'omu kiketezo ekyo, yaakola embaga." 
Genesis29:23 Aye obwire obwo yatoola mughala we Leeya yaamutwalira Yakobo, yaaba naye mu buliri." 
Genesis29:24 Labani yaatoola omwiru we omukazi ayetebwa Zilipa yaamugha mughala we Leeya, okumugheereza." 
Genesis29:25 Bwe bwakya enkyo, Yakobo yaja okubona ati, nga ye baamugha ni Leeya. Agho yaaja yaakoba Labani ati: “Kiki kino ky'onkoze? Tyakukolera lwa kwenda kufuna Rakeli? Kale lwaki wanguyiiya?”" 
Genesis29:26 Labani yairamu ati: “Tikikolebwa mu nsi yaife, okughaayo omuto n'asooka omukulu okubayira." 
Genesis29:27 Sooka omaleku enaku omusanvu edh'embaga y'oyo, memale tulikugha owundi, ng'onkoleire kabiri okumala emyaka egindi musanvu.”" 
Genesis29:28 Yakobo yaaganha, era enaku omusanvu bwe dhaawaaku, Labani yaamugha mughala we Rakeli okuba mukazi we." 
Genesis29:29 Labani yaatoola omwiru we omukazi ayetebwa Biliha yaamugha mughala we Rakeli, okumugheereza." 
Genesis29:30 Yakobo yaaba ni Rakeli yeena era yaamwenda inho okusinga Leeya. Agho Yakobo yaakolera Labani okumala emyaka egindi musanvu. 
Genesis29:31 Musengwa Katonda bweyabona nga Yakobo ayenda inho Rakeli okusinga Leeya, yaagha Leeya okuzaala, aye Rakeli yaasigala nga mugumba." 
Genesis29:32 Leeya yaatoola enda, yazaala omwana mulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Reubeni, kuba yakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda aboine okudaazibwadaazibwa kwange, mpegaano baze aidha kuunhenda.”" 
Genesis29:33 Kabiri yaatoola enda, yaazaala omwana mulenzi, yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda yawulira nga tyendebwa kyaviire era n'ampa omwana ono.” Kale yaamutuuma eriina Simeoni." 
Genesis29:34 Era yaatoola enda, yaazaala omwana mulenzi, yaakoba ati: “Ku mukuzi guno baze aidha kugumira ku nze, kuba mmuzaaliire abaana abalenzi basatu.” Kyeyava n'amutuuma eriina Levi." 
Genesis29:35 Era yaatoola enda kabiri yaazaala omwana mulenzi. Yaakoba ati: “Ku mukuzi guno ndidha kusaaka Musengwa Katonda.” Kyeyava n'amutuuma eriina Yuda. Agho yaakoma okuzaala. 
Genesis30:1 Rakeli bweyabona nga tazaalira Yakobo baana, yaagemerwa muganda we ensaalwa, yaakoba Yakobo ati: “Mpa abaana, oba ti n'ekyo ntuuse okufa.”" 
Genesis30:2 Yakobo yaasungughalira Rakeli, yaakoba ati: “Ninze Katonda eyakwima okuzaala.”" 
Genesis30:3 Rakeli yaakoba ati: “Omwiru wange omukazi Biliha wuuyo, ba naye asobole okunzaalira abaana olwo zeena mbe muzaire nga mbita mu oyo.”" 
Genesis30:4 Kale yaamugha omwiru we Biliha, abe mukazi we. Yakobo yaaba ni Biliha mu buliri." 
Genesis30:5 Biliha oyo yaatoola enda, yazaalira Yakobo omwana mulenzi." 
Genesis30:6 Rakeli yaakoba ati: “Katonda asaze mu butuufu. Era awuliire okusaba kwange, yampa omwana mulenzi.” Kyeyava n'amutuuma eriina Dani." 
Genesis30:7 Biliha kabiri yaatoola enda, yaazaalira Yakobo omwana omulenzi owokubiri." 
Genesis30:8 Rakeli yaakoba ati: “Ntuulaine inho ni muganda wange naamukuba ekigwo eky'amaani.” Kyeyava n'amweta eriina Nafutali. 
Genesis30:9 Leeya bweyabona ng'akomye okuzaala, yaatoola omwiru we Zilipa, yaamugha Yakobo abe mukazi we." 
Genesis30:10 Zilipa oyo yaazaalira Yakobo omwana mulenzi. 
Genesis30:11 Leeya yaakoba ati: “Mbaire n'enkabi!” Kyeyava n'amutuuma eriina Gadi. 
Genesis30:12 Zilipa yaazaalira Yakobo omwana omulenzi owokubiri. 
Genesis30:13 Leeya yaakoba ati: “Ndi musangaavu, kuba abakazi baidha kundhetanga musangaavu.” Kyeyava n'amweta eriina Asheri." 
Genesis30:14 Mu biseera eby'amakungula g'engaano, Reubeni yaja mu nimiro yaazuulayo ebimera ebyetebwa mandurake, yaabireetera Leeya inhina. Agho Rakeli yaakoba Leeya ati: “Nkweghembye, mpa ku mandurake w'omwana wo.”" 
Genesis30:15 Leeya yairamu ati: “Wamala okuntoolaku baze. Ekyo tikikumala? Mpegaano oyenda na kuntoolaku mandurake w'omwana wange.” Rakeli yaamukoba ati: “Bw'ompa mandurake w'omwana wo, Yakobo anaaba n'iwe obwire buno.”" 
Genesis30:16 Yakobo bweyaira ng'ava mu nimiro eigulo eryo, Leeya yaafuluma yaaja y'ali yaakoba ati: “Oli n'okuba ninze obwire buno, kuba mpaireyo mandurake w'omwana wange okukugula.” Kale yaaba naye obwire obwo." 
Genesis30:17 Katonda yaawulira okusaba kwa Leeya. Leeya yaatoola enda, yaazaalira Yakobo omwana mulenzi owokutaanu." 
Genesis30:18 Leeya yaakoba ati: “Katonda ampaire empeera yange, kuba nagha baze omwiru wange omukazi.” Kyeyava n'amutuuma eriina Issakari." 
Genesis30:19 Leeya yaatoola enda kabiri, yazaalira Yakobo omwana omulenzi owomukaaga." 
Genesis30:20 Leeya yaakoba ati: “Katonda ampaire ekirabo ekirungi. Mpegaano baze aidha kuntaamu ekitiisa, kuba mmuzaaliire abaana abalenzi mukaaga.” Kyeyava n'amweta eriina Zebuluni." 
Genesis30:21 Olumaliira yaazaala omwana omughala, yaamutuuma eriina Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Agho Katonda yaidhukira Rakeli, yaawulira okusaba kwe, yaamugha okuzaala." 
Genesis30:23 Rakeli yaatoola enda, yaazaala omwana mulenzi. Yaakoba ati: “Katonda antoireku okuvumwa.”" 
Genesis30:24 Yaamutuuma eriina Yosefu ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda agwananga yaanhongera omwana omulenzi owundi.” 
Genesis30:25 Rakeli ng'amaze okuzaala Yosefu, Yakobo yaakoba Labani ati: “Nsiibula ndhireyo eka mu nsi ey'ewaife." 
Genesis30:26 Mpa abakazi bange n'abaana bange, be nakolereranga okufuna, bwenalinga nga nkugheereza. Ondeke nje kuba oidhi nga bwe nakugheereza obukalamu.”" 
Genesis30:27 Labani yaamukoba ati: “Nganha nkukobere nti naja naalagulwa, bankobera bati Musengwa Katonda yampa enkabi olwa iwe." 
Genesis30:28 Kale nsalira empeera y'oyenda, ndidha kugikugha.”" 
Genesis30:29 Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Iwe mwene oidhi bwe mbairenga nga nkugheereza, era n'ebyayo byo nga bwe bibairenga nga byeyongera nga nze mbirabirira." 
Genesis30:30 Kuba wali na bitono nga nkaali kwidha, aye mpegaano byeyongeire inho, era Musengwa Katonda yakugha enkabi ku lwange. Aye olwo mpegaano nze ndifuna li zeena eby'amaka agange.”" 
Genesis30:31 Labani yaabuuza ati: “Kiki kye mbe nkughe?” Yakobo yairamu ati: “Ozira ky'oidha kumpa. Aye ndidha kwongera okulabirira ebyayo byo, bw'onaaganha kino kye nja okukoba:" 
Genesis30:32 Ka mbite mu byayo byo byonabyona olwaleero, nje nga ntoolamu buli ntaama na buli mbuzi ya bitanga n'ey'obudholodhondho, na buli ntaama nto endhirugavu. Edho n'edhinaaba empeera yange." 
Genesis30:33 Olumaliira olimanha nga mbaire wa mazima. Bw'oliidha okwekebeedha empeera yange, n'oyagaanamu embuzi etali ya bitanga oba ya budholodhondho, n'entaama etali ndhirugavu, eyo eribalibwa nga ndhibe.”" 
Genesis30:34 Labani yaakoba ati: “Kale ndhikiriiza tukole nga bw'okobye.” 
Genesis30:35 Aye ku lunaku olwo, Labani yatoolamu embuzi enume edh'emyalaala n'edha bitanga, n'embuzi enkazi dhoonadhoona edhaali edh'ebitanga n'obudholodhondho, na kiisi eriku kimyamya kyeru, era n'entaama dhoonadhoona endhirugavu, yaadhigemya batabane be okudhirabirira." 
Genesis30:36 Yaaja nadho ghalala nabo, obuleeyi bwa lugendo lwa nnaku isatu okuva ku Yakobo. Yakobo yaalabirira ebyayo bya Labani ebyasigalagho." 
Genesis30:37 Yakobo yaatoola ensaga embisi edh'emiti gino: omupopulari, omwalumondi era n'omupulane. Yaadhisisibulaku ebiwutu ebindi, dhaabaamu emyalaala emyeru." 
Genesis30:38 Ensaga edho dh'asisibwire, yaadhisimba emberi w'ensolo aghali ebintu ensolo mwe dhinhwera, kuba ensolo dhaaghakanga nga dhiidhye okunhwa." 
Genesis30:39 Kale ensolo bwe dhaaghakanga nga dhiringiriire ensaga edho, nga dhizaala obwana obulimu emyalaala n'obulimu ebitanga, n'obulimu obudholodhondho." 
Genesis30:40 Yakobo yaayawula entaama ku mbuzi, yaadhiringiriza ensolo edh'emyalaala n'endhirugavu dhoonadhoona edh'omu lugo lwa Labani. Mu nsambo eyo yazaalagania ebyayo bye, era yaaloba kubiyimba na bya Labani." 
Genesis30:41 Ensolo edh'amaani bwe dhaabanga nga dhiri kughaka, nga Yakobo ata ensaga mu bintu ensolo mwe dhinhwera emberi ghaadho, dhisobole okughakira aghali ensaga edho." 
Genesis30:42 Aye ensolo enafu bwe dhaabanga nga n'edhiri kughaka, nga tataayo nsaga. Kale ensolo enafu edhaazaalibwanga dhaabanga dha Labani, ate edh'amaani dhaabanga dha Yakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Mu nsambo eyo Yakobo yaafuuka mukombe inho, yaaba n'ebyayo kamaala, n'abairu abakazi n'abasaadha, n'engamiya era n'endogoyi." 
Genesis31:1 Agho Yakobo yaawulira batabane ba Labani nga bakoba bati: “Yakobo atwaire ebyayo byonabyona ebyali ebya iseife. Era mu ebyo mw'afuniire obukombe obwo bwonabwona.” 
Genesis31:2 Era Yakobo yaabona nga Labani takaamusangaalira nga bweyakolanga eira. 
Genesis31:3 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yakobo ati: “Irayo mu nsi ya badhaadha bo, era y'aboluganda lwo. Ndidha kubanga n'iwe.”" 
Genesis31:4 Kale, Yakobo yaayesa Rakeli ni Leeya baje bamwagaane mu kyayiro aghaali ebyayo bye." 
Genesis31:5 Yabakoba ati: “Mboine nga iseimwe takansagaalira nga bweyakolanga eira. Aye Katonda wa lata wange abairenga ninze buliidho. 
Genesis31:6 Mwidhi bukalamu nga nkoleire iseimwe n'amaani gange goonagoona. 
Genesis31:7 Aye iseimwe yanguyaguya, yaakyusakyusa empeera yange emikuzi ikumi, aye Katonda yaaloba kumuganha kunkolaku kabi." 
Genesis31:8 Iseimwe oyo bweyakobanga ati, ‘Ensolo edh'obudholodhondho n'edhinaaba empeera yo,’ ng'olwo ensolo dhoonadhoona dhizaala dha budholodhondho. Ate bweyakobanga ati, ‘Edh'emyalaala n'edhinaaba empeera yo,’ ng'olwo dhoonadhoona dhizaala dha myalaala." 
Genesis31:9 Mu nsambo ng'oti n'eyo, Katonda yaatoola ku iseimwe ebyayo, yaabimpa." 
Genesis31:10 “Mu biseera ensolo mwe dhighakira, okuja okulinga nti nga mbona mu kirooto embuzi enume edhaali dhiri kuniina ku nkazi; dhaali edh'emyalaala, edh'obudholodhondho n'edha bitanga." 
Genesis31:11 Malaika wa Katonda yandheta ati, ‘Yakobo!’ Naavugira nti, ‘Ndi ghano!’" 
Genesis31:12 Yankoba ati, ‘Bona, embuzi dhoonadhoona enume edhiri kuniina ku nkazi, dha myalaala, n'edh'obudholodhondho, era n'edha bitanga; kuba mboine byonabyona Labani by'ali kukukola." 
Genesis31:13 Ninze Katonda eyakubonekera e Betheli, ye wafukira omuzigo ku ibaale ni liba ekiidhukizo. Era ninze Katonda oyo ye wagha obweyamo ku olwo. Mpegaano situka oireyo mu nsi ye wazaalibwamu.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Rakeli ni Leeya baamwiramu bati: “Memale ife tukaali n'omugabo oba obusika mu ndhu ya iseife? 
Genesis31:15 Mpegaano atutwala ng'abagwira. Yamala okututunda, era mpegaano aliire n'ebintu ebyatugula, yaabimalagho." 
Genesis31:16 Obukombe bwonabwona Katonda bw'atoire ku iseife, mpegaano bwaife n'abaana baife. Kale, iwe mpegaano kola kyonakyona Katonda ky'akukobye.”" 
Genesis31:17 Agho Yakobo yaasitula olugendo, yaatyamya abaana be ni bakazi be ku ngamiya." 
Genesis31:18 Yaatwala ebyayo bye byonabyona, era n'ebintu byonabyona bye yali afunie mu Paddanarama, yaaja mu nsi ey'e Kanaani ye lata we Isaaka." 
Genesis31:19 Labani yali ng'ajiire okusala ku ntaama obuviiri, Rakeli yaiba emisambwa gya ise egy'omu maka." 
Genesis31:20 Yakobo yeiba bweibe ku Labani Omuaramea; tiyamukoberaku ng'aja kumulumukaku. 
Genesis31:21 Yalumuka n'ebibye byonabyona, yaasomoka omwiga Eufurate, yaayolekera ensi ey'ensozi, Gileadi." 
Genesis31:22 Nga ghabiseegho enaku isatu, baakobera Labani bati Yakobo yalumuka." 
Genesis31:23 Labani yaaja n'ab'ekika kye, yaabingirira Yakobo, olugendo lwa nnaku musanvu, yaamutuukaku mu nsi ey'ensozi, Gileadi." 
Genesis31:24 Aye Katonda yaidhira Labani Omuaramea obwire mu kirooto, yaamukoba ati: “Weegendereze olobe kubaaku kintu kyonakyona ky'okoba Yakobo, kya kumutiisatiisa.”" 
Genesis31:25 Labani bweyatuuka ku Yakobo, Yakobo yali ng'asimbye weema ye mu nsi ey'ensozi. Labani yeena yaasimba eyo weema ye n'ab'ekika kye." 
Genesis31:26 Labani yaakoba Yakobo ati: “Lwaki waneibaku n'otwala baghala bange ng'oti n'abanhage mu lutalo? 
Genesis31:27 Lwaki waanumukaku mu ngiso, ni weiba nga tonkobeire. Nandibaire nkusiibwire nga tuli kusagamba era nga tuli kwembera ku bugoma ni ku ndingidi." 
Genesis31:28 Tiwanganha na kwevumba ku baidhukulu bange ni baghala bange nga mbasiibula. Ekyo wakola kya busiru. 
Genesis31:29 Mbaire nsobola okukukolaku akabi. Aye Katonda wa lata wo yankobye obwire ati, ‘Weegendereze, olobe kubaaku kintu kyonakyona ky'okoba Yakobo, kya kumutiisatiisa.’" 
Genesis31:30 Ndidhi nti wayendanga inho okuja, kuba ng'olumirwa inho endhu ya lata wo. Aye lwaki waiba emisambwa gyange egy'omu maka?”" 
Genesis31:31 Yakobo yairamu Labani ati: “Nakulumukaku kuba natya nga ndhuuba nti wandintoireku baghala bo bya ntaka. 
Genesis31:32 Aye omuntu yeenayeena y'onaayagaana n'emisambwa gyo, aidha kwitibwa. Mpegaano ni, nga n'aboluganda lwaife bali kubona, yawulamu buli kikyo kye ndi nakyo okitwale.” Yakobo yali taidhi nga Rakeli yaiba emisambwa gya Labani." 
Genesis31:33 Kale Labani yaingira, yaayagaaza mu weema ya Yakobo, ni mu weema ya Leeya, ni mu weema ey'abairu abakazi bombi, aye yaaloba kuzuula misambwa gye. Yaava mu weema ya Leeya, yaingira mu ya Rakeli." 
Genesis31:34 Rakeli yali atoire emisambwa egy'omu maka egyo, yaagita mu nsawo ey'oku kintu ekityamibwaku ku ngamiya, yaagityamaku. Labani yaayagaaza mu weema mwonamwona, aye yaaloba kugizuula." 
Genesis31:35 Rakeli yaakoba ise ati: “Isebo, otansungughalira olw'obutasobola kwemerera mu maiso go, kuba ndi mulwaire.” Labani yaayagaaza aye yaaloba kuzuula misambwa gye egy'omu maka." 
Genesis31:36 Yakobo yasungughala, yaanenia Labani. Yaamukoba ati: “Nkoze kibi ki, era ndhiziiza musango ki, memale omingirire otyo?" 
Genesis31:37 Waire ng'oyagaaziiza mu bintu byange byonabyona, kiki ku by'omu ndhu yo ky'ozwiremu? Kite ghano mu maiso g'aboluganda lwange n'iwe, beene batusaliregho omutuufu ku twembi." 
Genesis31:38 Mu myaka egyo amakumi abiri gye mbaire n'iwe, entaama dho n'embuzi dho enkazi tidhisondholangaku, era enume edhiba mu byayo byo, ghazira waire ndala ye ndyangaku." 
Genesis31:39 Entaama eyaitibwanga ensolo tyagikuleeteranga, aye nze neefiirizanga naakwirizaagho enamu ku dhange. Era eyo eyaibibwanga waire omusana oba obwire, wandagiranga okugikwirizaagho." 
Genesis31:40 Kale omusana gwampwerangaku, ate obwire empewo yanfuuwanga, era endoolo dhambulanga mu maiso." 
Genesis31:41 Mu myaka egyo amakumi abiri gye mbaire mu maka go, nakukolera emyaka ikumi n'ena okufuna baghala bo bombi. Era naakukolera mu byayo byo emyaka mukaaga, aye iwe waakyusakyusa empeera yange emikuzi ikumi." 
Genesis31:42 Nguli Katonda wa lata wange, Katonda wa Aburahamu era Katonda wa Isaaka tiyali ku luuyi lwange, wandibaire mpegaano ng'ominze nga nzira kantu. Aye Katonda yabona nga bwe nadaazibwadaazibwanga era nga bwe nakolanga einho, kye yaviire n'akunenia obwire buno obwabise.”" 
Genesis31:43 Labani yairamu Yakobo ati: “Bano baghala bange, n'abaana baibwe bange, era n'ebyayo bino byange, era n'ebyo byonabyona by'oli kubona ghano byange. Aye olwaleero nsobola kukolera ki baghala bange bano, oba abaana be baazaala?" 
Genesis31:44 Kale ni mpegaano, ka tukole endagaano nze n'iwe, ebenga obukakafu ghagati wo ninze.”" 
Genesis31:45 Agho Yakobo yaatoola eibaale, yalisimbagho libe ekiidhukizo." 
Genesis31:46 Era yaakoba aboluganda lwe ati: “Musoloze amabaale.” Baasoloza amabaale baagatuuma entuumo, baaliira agho kumpi n'entuumo eyo ekiiwulo." 
Genesis31:47 Labani yaagituuma eriina Yegari Sahadutha, aye Yakobo yaagituuma Galeedi." 
Genesis31:48 Labani yaakoba ati: “Entuumo eno, n'obukakafu ghagati wo ninze olwaleero.” Kyeyava n'etuumibwa eriina Galeedi," 
Genesis31:49 era n'etuumibwa Mizipa, kuba Labani yakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda alamulenga ghagati wo ninze bwe tuliba nga titukaabonagana." 
Genesis31:50 Bw'onaadaazadaazanga baghala bange oba n'obayiza abakazi abandi, waire tighaliba muntu wundi ali n'ife, idhukira nga Katonda n'omudhulizi ghagati wo ninze.”" 
Genesis31:51 Labani yaakoba Yakobo ati: “Bona entuumo eno ey'amabaale, era n'eibaale lino erisimbiibwagho ghagati wo ninze." 
Genesis31:52 Entuumo eno era n'eibaale lino, binaabanga ekikakasa nti: nze tirituuma ntuumo eno kwidha kukulumba, era weena nga tolituuma ntuumo eno n'eibaale lino, kwidha kuunumba." 
Genesis31:53 Katonda wa Aburahamu era Katonda wa Nahori, atusalirenga omusango nze n'iwe.” Yakobo yaalayira mu liina lya Katonda wa Isaaka ise, ati aidha kukuumanga endagaano eyo." 
Genesis31:54 Yakobo yaagheera eyo omusengo ku lusozi olwo, yaayeta aboluganda lwe okulya emere. Baalya era baasula eyo ku lusozi." 
Genesis31:55 Bwe bwakya ku nkyo, Labani yaazuuka, yaagwa baidhukulu be ni baghala be mu kifuba, yabasabira enkabi. Yaasitula okwirayo ewuwe." 
Genesis32:1 Yakobo yeeyongerayo mu lugendo lwe, bamalaika ba Katonda baayagaanana naye." 
Genesis32:2 Yakobo bweyababona, yaakoba ati: “Lino igye lya Katonda!” Yaatuuma ekifo ekyo eriina Mahanaimu." 
Genesis32:3 Agho Yakobo yaatuma abakwenda bamukulemberemu, baje ye muganda we Esau mu kiketezo eky'e Seiri, mu nsi ey'Edomu." 
Genesis32:4 Yaabalagira ati: “Mukobe musengwa wange Esau, muti Yakobo omugheereza wo akoba ati, ‘Nasenga ewa Labani era ye mbairenga naye okutuusa ni mpegaano." 
Genesis32:5 Era ndi n'ente, n'endogoyi, n'ebighaso by'entaama n'embuzi, era n'abairu abasaadha n'abakazi. Nkutumiire okukukobera, musengwa wange, ongemerwe ekivunika.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Abakwenda bwe baira eri Yakobo, baakoba bati: “Twaja ye muganda wo Esau, era ali mu ngira ali kwidha okukwagaana. Ali kwidha n'abasaadha ebikumi bina.”" 
Genesis32:7 Yakobo yaatya inho era yeeraliikirira. Yaayawulamu ebikunsu bibiri mu bantu be yali nabo, era yaayawula ni mu byayo bye yali nabyo: entaama, n'embuzi, n'ente, n'engamiya." 
Genesis32:8 Yaakoba mule ati: “Esau bw'anaatuukira ku kikunsu ekisooka n'akikuba, ekikunsu ekinaasigalagho kinaawona.”" 
Genesis32:9 Agho Yakobo yaasaba ati: “Wo Katonda wa dhaadha wange Aburahamu, era Katonda wa lata wange Isaaka, wulira okusaba kwange! Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe eyankoba oti, ‘Irayo mu nsi ey'ewaimwe ni y'aboluganda lwo, ndidha kukugha buli kintu okukujiiranga obukalamu.’ ”" 
Genesis32:10 Nze tigwaniire kivunika kyo na bwesigwa bwo, bye wandholeka nze omugheereza wo. Nasomoka omwiga guno Yorudani, nga ndi na mwigo gwonka. Aye mpegaano ndhize, nga ndi n'ebikunsu bibiri." 
Genesis32:11 Nkweghembye mponia muganda wange Esau, kuba mmutya; asobola okwidha yaatwita twenatwena, era yaatwalizaamu n'abakazi n'abaana." 
Genesis32:12 Ate nga wakoba oti, “Ndikugha buli kintu okukujiiranga obukalamu, era naakwaliza abaidhukulu kamaala ng'oti n'omusenho ogw'oku nhandha, ogutaghanga kubalika olw'obungi.”" 
Genesis32:13 Yakobo yaasula agho obwire obwo, yaatoola ku bye yali nabyo okugha muganda we Esau ekirabo:" 
Genesis32:14 nga n'omuli embuzi enkazi ebikumi bibiri, n'enume amakumi abiri entaama enkazi ebikumi bibiri, n'enume amakumi abiri." 
Genesis32:15 Era nga n'omuli engamiya edhikamwa amakumi asatu n'enhana dhaadho; ente enkazi amakumi ana n'enume ikumi; endogoyi enkazi amakumi abiri n'enume ikumi. 
Genesis32:16 Ensolo dhino yaadhaawulayawulamu ebikunsu, yaadhigemya abairu be, nga buli mulala atwalaku ekikunsu kirala. Yaabakoba ati: “Munkulemberemu nga buli kikunsu kyeswire ku kiinaakyo akata.”" 
Genesis32:17 Yakobo yaalagira eyakulemberamu ati: “Muganda wange Esau bw'anaakwagaana n'akubuuza ati, ‘Iwe oli muntu w'ani? Oli kuja gha? Era ensolo edho dh'okulembeizaamu dh'ani.’" 
Genesis32:18 Oiramu oti, ‘Dha mugheereza wo Yakobo; nga kino n'ekirabo ky'agheereiza musengwa wange Esau. Era ni mwene ali kutuvaaku einhuma.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Era yaalagira n'owokubiri, n'owokusatu, n'abandi boonaboona abaatwala ebikunsu by'ensolo, yaabakoba ati: “Mutyo bwe munaakoba Esau nga mumwagaine." 
Genesis32:20 Munaamukoba muti ‘Bwenebwene omugheereza wo Yakobo ali kutuvaaku einhuma!’ Kuba Yakobo yakoba mule ati, ‘Ndidha kumuwooyawooya n'ebirabo ebinkulembeiremu, olwo bwe nnaamwagaana, katyo anaatusangaalira.’ ”" 
Genesis32:21 Kale yaamukulembezaamu ekirabo, aye mwene yaasula agho obwire obwo." 
Genesis32:22 Yakobo yaazuuka obwire bwene obwo, yaatwala abakazi bombi, n'abairu be abakazi bombi, n'abaana be eikumi n'omulala, yaasomoka omwiga Yabboki." 
Genesis32:23 Yaabatwala, yaabasomosa omwiga era yaasomosa ni byonabyona bye yali nabyo." 
Genesis32:24 Aye mwene yaasigala eyo yenka. Ghaidhagho omusaadha, yaatuulana naye ekigwo, okutuusa obwire okukya." 
Genesis32:25 Omusaadha bweyabona nga taidha kumughangula, yaakuba Yakobo ku kisambi, kyawogoka ng'ali kutuulana naye." 
Genesis32:26 Yaakoba Yakobo ati: “Ndeka nje, kuba obwire buli kukya.” Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Tiidha kukuleka okutoolaku ng'ompaire enkabi.”" 
Genesis32:27 Omusaadha yaamubuuza ati: “Eriina lyo niiwe ani?” Yairamu ati: “Ninze Yakobo.” 
Genesis32:28 Omusaadha yaakoba ati: “Tokaayetebwanga Yakobo, aye onaayetebwanga Isiraeli, kuba otuulaine ni Katonda era n'abantu, waaghangula.”" 
Genesis32:29 Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Nkweghembye, nkobera eriina lyo.” Aye ole yairamu ati: “Lwaki oyenda okumanha eriina lyange?” Agho yaagha Yakobo enkabi agho mu kifo ekyo." 
Genesis32:30 Yakobo yaatuuma ekifo ekyo eriina Penieli, ng'akoba ati: “Mbonagaine ni Katonda maiso ku maiso, aye naasigala nga nkaali mulamu.”" 
Genesis32:31 Endhuba yaja okuvaayo okumwakaku, ng'ali kuva e Penieli, ng'aghenhera olw'ekisambi kye." 
Genesis32:32 N'okutuusa mpegaano Abaisiraeli kye bava ni batalya muziisa gwa ku buyungiro bwa kisambi, kuba ku muziisa ogw'oku kisambi kya Yakobo, omusaadha kwe yakuba." 
Genesis33:1 Agho Yakobo yaalengera Esau ng'ali kwidha n'abasaadha ebikumi bina. Yakobo yaagabaniamu abaana be mu bainhaibwe bano: Leeya, Rakeli, n'abakazi be bale ababiri ab'embali abaali abairu." 
Genesis33:2 Yaata abakazi abairu abo n'abaana baibwe emberi, okwo yaizaaku Leeya n'abaana be, memale yaasembyayo Rakeli ni Yosefu einhuma." 
Genesis33:3 Mwene yaabakulemberamu, yaaja ng'akuba amakiryaivu emikuzi musanvu okutuusa lwe yatuuka ku muganda we." 
Genesis33:4 Aye Esau yaalumuka okuja okumwagaana, yaamugwa mu kifuba era yaamwevumba, bombi baalira amaziga." 
Genesis33:5 Esau bweyalinga ati, yaabona abakazi n'abaana, yaabuuza ati: “Bano ni baani abali n'iwe?” Yakobo yairamu ati: “Abo n'abaana, Katonda olw'ekivunika kye, be yagha omugheereza wo.”" 
Genesis33:6 Agho abairu abakazi baaseeta gh'ali, nga bali ghalala n'abaana baibwe, baakuba amakiryaivu." 
Genesis33:7 Okwo kwairaku Leeya n'abaana be, baaseeta gh'ali era baakuba amakiryaivu. Olwo Yosefu ni Rakeli baasembayo boona baaseeta gh'ali era baakuba amakiryaivu." 
Genesis33:8 Esau yaabuuza ati: “Ekikunsu ekyo kyonakyona kye ndhagaine, kitegeeza ki?” Yakobo yairamu ati: “Kyenda iwe musengwa wange ongemerwe ekivunika.”" 
Genesis33:9 Aye Esau yaakoba ati: “Muganda wange, bye ndi nabyo biimmala. Ebyo by'oli nabyo, bikuume nga bibyo.”" 
Genesis33:10 Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Busa, nkweghembye bw'oba ng'ongemeirwa ekivunika ganha otwale ekirabo ekiva mu ngalo dhange. Kuba okubona amaiso go, kuli ng'oti n'okubona amaiso ga Katonda, olw'ensambo y'onsangaaliiremu n'ekivunika ekyaga agho." 
Genesis33:11 Nkweghembye, ganha otwale ekirabo kino kye nkuleeteire, kuba Katonda yangemerwa ekivunika yampa byonabyona bye neetaaga.” Yakobo yaayongera okumweghemba okutuusa Esau lwe yaganha." 
Genesis33:12 Agho Esau yaakoba ati: “Kola tuje, nze ndidha kubakulemberamu.”" 
Genesis33:13 Aye Yakobo yairamu ati: “Musengwa wange, oidhi ng'abaana bakaali bato, bakaali kufuna maani. Era n'entaama n'embuzi n'ente dhe ndi nadho, dhiyonsa. Bwenaadhitambuza einho, waire lunaku lulala lwonka, dhiidha kufa dhoonadhoona." 
Genesis33:14 Nkweghembye Musengwa wange iwe nkulemberaamu, nze ndidha kwidha mpolampola nga bwe nnaaghanga okutambula n'ensolo dhe nkulembeizaamu era n'abaana, okutuusa lwe nnaakutuukaku mu Seiri.”" 
Genesis33:15 Kale Esau yaakoba ati: “Kale ni ka nkulekere ku bantu be ndi nabo.” Aye Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Musengwa wange ekyo tikyetaagisa, kasita oba ng'ongemeirwa ekivunika.”" 
Genesis33:16 Kale, Esau yairayo ku lunaku olwo e Seiri." 
Genesis33:17 Aye Yakobo yaaja e Sukkothi, yeezimbira eyo endhu, era yaazimbira eyo n'ensolo dhe ebiyumba. Ekifo ekyo kyekyava kyetebwa eriina Sukkothi." 
Genesis33:18 Agho Yakobo yaava e Paddanarama, yaatuuka bukalamu mu kibuga eky'e Shekemu, ekiri mu nsi y'e Kanaani, yaasimba weema dhe kumpi n'ekibuga." 
Genesis33:19 Yaaghaayo ebitundu bya feeza kikumi, okugula eitaka kwe yali amaze okuzimba weema dhe, ng'aligula ku baidhukulu ba Hamori lata wa Shekemu." 
Genesis33:20 Yaazimbagho alutaari, yaagituuma eriina Eli Elohe Isiraeli." 
Genesis34:1 Agho Dina, omwana omughala Leeya ye yazaalira Yakobo, yaaja okukyalira abakazi Abakanaani." 
Genesis34:2 Shekemu, mutabane wa Hamori Omuhivi omufuzi mu nsi eyo bweyamubona, yaamugema era yaamukaka yaaba naye mu buliri." 
Genesis34:3 Omwoyo gwe gwatwalirizibwa inho Dina oyo mughala wa Yakobo, yaamwenda inho era yaayogera naye n'ekisa." 
Genesis34:4 Shekemu yaakoba Hamori ise ati: “Nfunira omughala oyo mmubayize.” 
Genesis34:5 Yakobo yaawulira nga Shekemu yasobya ku mughala we Dina, aye olw'okuba batabane baali bakaali mu kyayiro n'ensolo dhe, yaasirika okutuusa lwe baira." 
Genesis34:6 Hamori, lata wa Shekemu, yaaja eri Yakobo okwogera naye." 
Genesis34:7 Batabane ba Yakobo baira nga bava mu kyayiro. Bwe baakiwulira baanakughala era baasungughala inho, kuba Shekemu kye yali akoze eky'okukaka mughala wa Yakobo, nga kya muzizo mu Baisiraeli." 
Genesis34:8 Hamori yaayogera nabo ati: “Mutabane wange Shekemu ayenda mughala waimwe. Mbeeghembye mumumughe amubayize. 
Genesis34:9 Era ka tukole endagaano, ife tubayizenga baghala baimwe, mwena mubayizenga abaife." 
Genesis34:10 Munaabanga ghalala n'ife mu nsi yaife, munaajanga yoonayoona ye mwenda. Munaasuubuliranga muno, era mwefunira ebintu.”" 
Genesis34:11 Shekemu yaakoba lata wa Dina ni baanhina ati: “Muunhambe mu kino, kyonakyona kye munansalira ndidha kukibagha." 
Genesis34:12 Omwandu n'ebirabo bye munansalira ni bwe binaayaga gha obungi, ndidha kubibagha, kasita mumpa omughala okumubayiza.”" 
Genesis34:13 Aye batabane ba Yakobo bairamu Shekemu ni ise Hamori nga baguya, kuba Shekemu yali asobiiza ku mwanhinaibwe Dina." 
Genesis34:14 Baakoba bati: “Titusobola kukola ekyo: okugha mwanhinaife omusaadha atali mukekete, kuba ekyo kiba nga kitunhoomoola inho." 
Genesis34:15 Twidha kubaganha lwa kino kyonka: muli n'okuganha okuba nga ife nga kiisi musaadha mu imwe akeketebwa. 
Genesis34:16 Olwo ni tunaabaganha imwe okubayizanga baghala baife, n'ife okubayizanga abaimwe. Twidha kubanga ghalala n'imwe, tufuuke eighanga irala." 
Genesis34:17 Aye bwe mutaaganhe kyaife ni mukeketebwa, twidha kutwala mughala waife twejiire.”" 
Genesis34:18 Hamori ni mutabane Shekemu ekyo baakibona nga kikalamu. 
Genesis34:19 Era omwisuka yaayangugha okukola ekyo, kuba yali ng'ayenda inho mughala wa Yakobo. Omwisuka oyo yali wa kitiibwa okusinga abandi boonaboona ab'endhu ya ise." 
Genesis34:20 Hamori ni mutabane Shekemu baaja mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango gw'ekibuga kyaibwe, baayogera n'abantu ab'omu kibuga ekyo bati:" 
Genesis34:21 “Abasaadha bano balungi ye tuli. Tubaleke babenga mu nsi eno ghalala n'ife era basuubulirengamu, kuba ensi ngazi ekimala. Ife tubayizenga baghala baibwe, boona tubaghenga baghala baife bababayize." 
Genesis34:22 Aye abasaadha bano okuganha okubanga aghalala n'ife, n'okufuuka eighanga eirala n'ife, batwendaku ekintu kirala kyonka: kiisi musaadha mu ife akeketebwenga, nga beene bwe bakeketebwa." 
Genesis34:23 Ente dhaibwe n'ebintu byaibwe era n'ensolo dhaibwe dhoonadhoona dhiriba dhaife. Kale twisanie nabo, babenga ghalala n'ife.”" 
Genesis34:24 Abasaadha boonaboona abaaligho mu lwekobaano olwo, baaganha Hamori ni mutabane we Shekemu bye baakoba, kiisi musaadha yaakeketebwa." 
Genesis34:25 Agho ku lunaku olwokusatu, abasaadha bwe baali nga bali mu bulumi obw'ebibwa eby'okukeketebwa, batabane ba Yakobo babiri, Simeoni ni Levi baanhina Dina, baagema empiima dhaibwe baazinduukiriza ekibuga baita abasaadha boonaboona." 
Genesis34:26 Baitiramu Hamori era ni mutabane Shekemu baatoola Dina mu ndhu ya Shekemu, baavaayo." 
Genesis34:27 Batabane ba Yakobo abandi bwe baayagaana ng'abasaadha baitiibwa, baanhaga eby'omu kibuga nga beesasuuza olwa mwanhinaibwe ye baasobyaku." 
Genesis34:28 Baanhaga entaama, n'embuzi, n'endogoyi, n'ebintu byonabyona ebyali mu kibuga n'ebyali mu nimiro." 
Genesis34:29 Era baatwala eby'obukombe byonabyona, baanhaga abaana boonaboona abato, n'abakazi boonaboona, ni byonabyona ebyali mu mayumba." 
Genesis34:30 Yakobo yaakoba Simeoni ni Levi ati: “Mundeeteire obuzibu. Mpegaano Abakanaani n'Abaperizzi n'abandi boonaboona ab'omu nsi eno baja kunkyagha. Ndi n'abantu batono. Kale bale boonaboona bwe balyesoloza ni baanumba, balinsaaniagho n'amaka gange goonagoona.”" 
Genesis34:31 Aye baamubuuza bati: “Obwo yakola bulungi okubisa mwanhinaife nga malaaya?” 
Genesis35:1 Katonda yaakoba Yakobo ati: “Ja e Betheli, obe eyo, onzimbireyo alutaari nze Katonda eyakubonekera bwe wali ng'oli kulumuka muganda wo Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Agho Yakobo yaakoba ab'omu ndhu ye, n'abo boonaboona abaali naye ati: “Musuule ere emisambwa egy'abamaghanga agandi gye muli nagyo mwetukuze, mukyuse ebivaalo, muvaale ebitukula." 
Genesis35:3 Mukole tuje e Betheli, eyo ye nja okuzimbira Katonda alutaari, kuba yawuliranga okusaba kwange yantoola mu buzibu, era yaabanga ghalala ninze kiisi ghe najanga.”" 
Genesis35:4 Kale, baagha Yakobo emisambwa egy'abamaghanga agandi gyonagyona gye baali nagyo, n'empeta edhaali mu matu gaibwe. Yakobo yaabiziika ghansi gh'omuti omukologho kumpi ni Shekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Yakobo n'abaana be bwe baatoolera okutambula, entiisa enene yaagema ab'omu bibuga ebibeezungulwire, baaloba kubalumba." 
Genesis35:6 Agho Yakobo aghalala n'abantu be boonaboona abaali naye, baatuuka e Luzi, era ekyetebwa Betheli, ekiri mu nsi y'e Kanaani." 
Genesis35:7 Yaazimba agho alutaari, ekifo ekyo yaakituuma eriina Eli Betheli, kuba agho Katonda ghe yamweyolekera, ng'ali kulumuka muganda we." 
Genesis35:8 Debora omulezi wa Rebekka yaafa, baamuziika ghansi gh'omuti omukologho, kumpi n'e Betheli. Omuti ogwo baagutuuma eriina: “Omuti ogw'okulira amaziga.”" 
Genesis35:9 Yakobo bweyava mu Paddanarama, Katonda yaamubonekera kabiri, yaamugha enkabi." 
Genesis35:10 Yaamukoba ati: “Eriina lyo niiwe Yakobo aye, okuva ni mpegaano tokaayetebwa Yakobo. Oidha kwetebwanga Isiraeli.”" 
Genesis35:11 Era yaamukoba ati: “Ninze Katonda Aghanga ebintu byonabyona. Zaala abaana kamaala, mweyongere obungi amaghanga kamaala galisimuka mu iwe, era oliba dhaadha wa bakyabazinga." 
Genesis35:12 Era ensi ye nagha Aburahamu ni Isaaka, ndigikugha iwe, naagigha ni baidhukulu bo abaliiragho.”" 
Genesis35:13 Agho Katonda yaava aghali Yakobo, yaaja ghaigulu." 
Genesis35:14 Yakobo yaasimba eibaale libe ekiidhukizo mu kifo Katonda mwe yayogerera naye, yaalifukaku ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, era n'omuzigo okulitukuza." 
Genesis35:15 Yakobo yaatuuma ekifo ekyo eriina Betheli. 
Genesis35:16 Agho Yakobo n'ab'omu maka ge baava mu Betheli, baatambula. Bwe baali nga babuzaayo katono okutuuka mu Efuratha, ebiseera bya Rakeli eby'okuzaala byatuuka era yaalumwa inho." 
Genesis35:17 Bwe yali ng'ali kulumwa inho, omuzaalisa yaamukoba ati: “Otatya kuba ozaire omwana omulenzi owundi.”" 
Genesis35:18 Bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okufa, kuba yali ali kufa, yaatuuma omwana eriina Benoni, ekitegeeza, “Omwana ye nzaaliire mu bulumi.” Aye ise w'omwana yaamutuuma eriina Benjamini, ekitegeeza, “Omwana aliba ow'enkabi.”" 
Genesis35:19 Agho Rakeli yaafa, baamuziika ku mbali okw'engira eja mu Efuratha, ekyo era nga ni Bethelehemu." 
Genesis35:20 Yakobo yaasimba eibaale ku magombe ge libe ekiidhukizo. Eibaale eryo n'eryoleka amagombe ga Rakeli okutuusa ni ye buli eno. 
Genesis35:21 Isiraeli yeeyongerayo mu lugendo lwe, yaasimba weema ye kumpi n'ekituuti ekirengererwaku ekya Ederi." 
Genesis35:22 Agho Isiraeli bweyali ng'akaali mu nsi eyo, Reubeni yaaja, yaaba ni Biliha omukazi wa ise ow'embali. Isiraeli yaakimanha. Batabane ba Yakobo baali ikumi na babiri." 
Genesis35:23 Batabane ba Leeya ni bano: Reubeni omwana wa Yakobo omuberi, ni Simeoni, ni Levi, ni Yuda, ni Issakari, ni Zebuluni." 
Genesis35:24 Batabane ba Rakeli ni bano: Yosefu, ni Benjamini." 
Genesis35:25 Batabane ba Biliha omwiru omukazi owa Rakeli, ni bano: Dani ni Nafutali." 
Genesis35:26 Batabane ba Zilipa omwiru omukazi owa Leeya, ni bano: Gadi ni Asheri. Abo ni batabane ba Yakobo, abaamuzaalirwa mu Paddanarama." 
Genesis35:27 Agho Yakobo yaja eri ise Isaaka e Mamure, oba Kiriatharaba, ekyo era nga ni Heburoni, Aburahamu ni Isaaka mwe baabanga." 
Genesis35:28 Isaaka yaghangaala emyaka kikumi na kinaana (180)," 
Genesis35:29 yaafa ng'akairiighe inho, yaatwalibwa eri badhaadha be. Batabane be, Esau ni Yakobo, baamuziika." 
Genesis36:1 Bano ni baidhukulu ba Esau, era ayetebwa Edomu." 
Genesis36:2 Esau yabayiza abakazi Abakanaani bano: Ada mughala wa Eloni Omuhitti, ni Oholibama mughala wa Ana mutabane wa Zibeoni Omuhivi," 
Genesis36:3 ni Basemathi mughala wa Ishimaeli, era mwanhina Nebaiothi." 
Genesis36:4 Ada yaazaala Elifazi; Basemathi yaazaala Reweli; 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama yaazaala Yeushi ni Yalamu ni Kora. Abo ni batabane ba Esau be yazaala mu nsi y'e Kanaani. 
Genesis36:6 Agho Esau yaatwala bakazi be, ni batabane, ni baghala be, era n'abantu boonaboona ab'omu ndhu ye, n'ensolo dhe dhoonadhoona, n'ebintu bye byonabyona bye yafunira mu nsi y'e Kanaani, yaaja mu nsi eyindi, ave aghali muganda we Yakobo." 
Genesis36:7 Kuba baali n'ebintu kamaala inho, nga tibasobola kuba ghalala. Ensi ye baabangamu yali nga tekaabamala olw'ebyayo ebingi bye baali nabyo." 
Genesis36:8 Kale, Esau, era ayetebwa Edomu, yaabanga mu Seiri ensi ey'ensozi." 
Genesis36:9 Bano ni baidhukulu ba Esau, dhaadha w'Abedomu mu nsi Seiri ey'ensozi." 
Genesis36:10 Gano n'amaina ga batabane ba Esau: Elifazi ye yazaala mu mukazi we Ada, ni Reweli ye yazaala mu Basemathi era nga yeena yali mukazi we." 
Genesis36:11 Batabane ba Elifazi ni bano: Temani, Omari, Zefo, Gatamu ni Kenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Elifazi ono yali n'omukazi ow'embali nga ni Timuna, eyamuzaalira Amaleki. Abo n'abantu abaasimuka mu Ada muka Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Bano ni batabane ba Reweli: Nahathi, Zera, Shamma ni Mizza. Abo n'abantu abaasimuka mu Basemathi muka Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Abaana Oholibama mughala wa Ana, mutabane wa Zibeoni be yazaalira Esau ni bano: Yeushi, ni Yalamu, ni Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Bano n'abakulu b'ebika ebyasimuka mu Esau. Elifazi, mutabane wa Esau omuberi, n'eyali dhaadha wa bano: Temani, Omari, Zefo, Kenazi," 
Genesis36:16 Kora, Gatamu, ni Amaleki. Abo n'abakulu b'ebika ebyasimuka mu Elifazi mu nsi Edomu, era baidhukulu ba Ada muka Esau." 
Genesis36:17 Reweli mutabane wa Esau n'eyali dhaadha wa bano: Nahathi, Zera, Shamma ni Mizza. Abo n'abakulu b'ebika ebyasimuka mu Reweli mu nsi Edomu, era baidhukulu ba Basemathi muka Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Abaana ba Oholibama mughala wa Ana era muka Esau ni bano: Yeushi, Yalamu ni Kora. Abo n'abakulu b'ebika ebyasimuka mu Oholibama oyo." 
Genesis36:19 Abo ni baidhukulu ba Esau, ayetebwa Edomu, era abakulu b'ebika ebimusimukamu." 
Genesis36:20 Abaana ba Seiri Omuhori, abatyamye b'omu nsi Edomu ni bano: Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Ana," 
Genesis36:21 Dishoni, Ezeri ni Dishani. Era abo n'abakulu b'ebika by'Abahori." 
Genesis36:22 Abaana ba Lotani ni bano: Hori ni Hemani. Lotani oyo yali ni mwanhina nga ni Timuna. 
Genesis36:23 Abaana ba Shobali ni bano: Aluvani, Manahathi, Ebali, Shefo ni Onamu." 
Genesis36:24 Abaana ba Zibeoni ni bano: Aya ni Ana. Ana oyo n'eyazuula ensulo ey'amaadhi amasu mu irungu, bweyali ng'ali kwaya endogoyi dha ise." 
Genesis36:25 Abaana ba Ana ni bano: Dishoni, ni Oholibama mwanhina." 
Genesis36:26 Abana ba Dishoni ni bano: Hamudani, Eshibani, Ithurani, ni Kerari." 
Genesis36:27 Abaana ba Ezeri ni bano: Bilihani, Zaavani, ni Akani." 
Genesis36:28 Abaana ba Dishani ni bano: Uzi ni Arani. 
Genesis36:29 Abakulu b'ebika ebisimuka mu Bahori ni bano: Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Ana," 
Genesis36:30 Dishoni, Ezeri, ni Dishani. Abo n'abakulu b'ebika by'Abahori nga bwe byali mu nsi Seiri." 
Genesis36:31 Bano ni bakyabazinga abaafuga mu nsi Edomu, nga tighabangaghooku kyabazinga waire omulala ati afuga Baisiraeli." 
Genesis36:32 Bela mutabane wa Beori yafuga mu Edomu, ekibuga kye nga kyetebwa Dinahaba." 
Genesis36:33 Bela oyo yaafa, Yobabu mutabane wa Zera ow'e Bozira yaalya obwakyabazinga mu kifo kye." 
Genesis36:34 Yobabu bweyafa, Hushamu ow'omu nsi y'Abatemani yaalya obwakyabazinga mu kifo kye." 
Genesis36:35 Hushamu yaafa, Hadadi mutabane wa Bedadi eyaghangula Abamidia mu nsi Moabu, yaalya obwakyabazinga mu kifo kye; ekibuga kye nga kyetebwa Avithi." 
Genesis36:36 Hadadi yaafa, Samula ow'e Masureka yaalya obwakyabazinga mu kifo kye." 
Genesis36:37 Samula yaafa, Shaulo ow'e Rehobothi ekiri okumpi n'omwiga Eufurate, yaalya obwakyabazinga mu kifo kye." 
Genesis36:38 Shaulo yaafa, Baalihanani mutabane wa Akabori yalya obwakyabazinga mu kifo kye." 
Genesis36:39 Baalihanani mutabane wa Akabori yaafa, Hadari yaalya obwakyabazinga mu kifo kye; ekibuga kye nga kyetebwa Pau. Eriina lya mukazi we nga ni Mehetabela, mughala wa Matiredi era mwidhukulu wa Mezahabu." 
Genesis36:40 Abakulu b'ebika ebisimuka mu Esau, ng'ojiira ku ndhu dhaibwe ni ku biketezo byaibwe era ni ku maina gaibwe, ni bano: Timuna, Aluva, Yethethi," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
Genesis36:42 Kenazi, Temani, Mibizari," 
Genesis36:43 Magadieli, ni Iramu. Abo n'abakulu b'ebika ebyasimuka mu Edomu, oyo nga ni Esau, dhaadha wa Abaedomu, nga bwe baali mu biketezo byaibwe, mu nsi ye baafuna." 
Genesis37:1 Yakobo yabanga mu nsi Kanaani, ise mwe yasenga." 
Genesis37:2 Bino n'ebifa ku maka ga Yakobo: Yosefu bweyali nga mwisuka wa myaka ikumi na musanvu, yaayayanga entaama ni baganda be, abaana ba Biliha ni Zilipa abaali baka lata we ab'embali. Yosefu yaaseeghanga eri ise ebibi bye baakolanga." 
Genesis37:3 Isiraeli yayendanga inho Yosefu okusinga abaana be abandi boonaboona; kuba oyo ni ye yazaala mu bukaire. Yaamutungira ekivaalo eky'endhawulo nga kya mikono mireeyi. 
Genesis37:4 Aye baganda ba Yosefu bwe baabona nga iseibwe amwenda okusinga beene bw'abenda, baamukyagha nga tibenda na kwogera naye bya bulungi." 
Genesis37:5 Agho Yosefu yaaloota ekirooto. Bwe yakikobera baganda be, beeyongera bweyongere okumukyagha." 
Genesis37:6 Yabakoba ati: “Muwulire ekirooto kino kye naloose: 
Genesis37:7 Twabaire tuli kusiba ebinhwa by'engaano mu nimiro, okuja okubona ng'ekinhwa ekyange kisituka nga kyesimba. Agho ebinhwa ebyaimwe byaidha byezungulula ekyange era byakikubira amakiryaivu.”" 
Genesis37:8 Baganda be baamubuuza bati: “Olowooza oti iwe olifuuka kyabazinga waife, era waatufuga?” Kale beeyongera okumukyayira irala olw'ebirooto bye, n'olw'ebibono bye." 
Genesis37:9 Yosefu era yaaloota ekirooto ekindi, yaakikobera baganda be ati: “Naloose ekirooto ekindi, ng'endhuba, n'omwezi, n'emuunienie ikumi na ndala biri ku nkubira amakiryaivu.”" 
Genesis37:10 Bwe yamala okukikobera baganda be, yaakoberaku ni ise. Aye ise yaamunenia ati: “Kirooto ki kino kye waloose? Mbo bwenebwene nze n'inhoko ni baganda bo tuliidha twakukubira amakiryaivu?”" 
Genesis37:11 Baganda ba Yosefu baamugemerwa ensaalwa, aye ise yaasigala nga yeefumintiriza ku ebyo Yosefu bye yayogera." 
Genesis37:12 Agho baganda ba Yosefu bwe baali bajiire e Shekemu okwaya ebyayo bya iseibwe," 
Genesis37:13 Isiraeli yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Baganda bo bali Shekemu, ye bali kwayira ebyayo. Kola nkutume ye bali.” Yosefu yairamu ati: “Ndi ghano ntuma.”" 
Genesis37:14 Ise yaamukoba ati: “Ja mpegaano obone oba nga baganda bo bali bukalamu, era oba nga n'ebyayo biri bukalamu memale oire onkobere.” Kale yaamutuma okuva mu kiiko eky'e Heburoni. Yosefu yaaja yaatuuka e Shekemu." 
Genesis37:15 Ghaabaagho omusaadha eyamwagaana ng'ali kutambulira eyo atyo mu byayiro, yaamubuuza ati: “Oli kwagala ki?”" 
Genesis37:16 Yosefu yairamu ati: “Ndi kwagala baganda bange. Nkweghembye nkoberaaku ye bali kwayira ebyayo.” 
Genesis37:17 Omusaadha yaamukoba ati: “Baamaze ira okuja, kuba nabawuliire nga bakoba bati bali kuja e Dothani.” Agho Yosefu yaanonereza baganda be, yaabaagaana e Dothani." 
Genesis37:18 Baamulengera ng'akaali ghalaku, era bweyali ng'akaali kubatuukaku beeteesa okumwita." 
Genesis37:19 Owundi yaakoba baine ati: “Bona omuloosi ow'ebirooto wuuyo ali kwidha. 
Genesis37:20 Mukole tumwite tumusuule mu kindi ku biina ebiri ghano. Tulikoba tuti ensolo ey'omu nsiko n'eyamulya memale tubone ebirooto bye bwe biriba.” 
Genesis37:21 Aye Reubeni bweyawulira ekyo, yaafuba okuwonia Yosefu, yaakoba ati: “Tulobe kumwita.”" 
Genesis37:22 Era yaakoba ati: “Mutayugha musaayi. Mumusuule bwa mu kiina kino ekiri mu irungu, aye timumukolaku kabi.” Yayogera atyo ng'ayenda amuwonie, amubatooleku amwirize ise." 
Genesis37:23 Kale Yosefu bweyatuuka ku baganda be, baamutoolamu ekivaalo kye eky'endhawulo eky'emikono emireeyi, kye yali avaire." 
Genesis37:24 Baamutwala, baamusuula mu kiina ekikalu nga muzira maadhi." 
Genesis37:25 Agho baatyama baalya. Baaja okulinga bati, nga balengera ekikunsu ky'Abaishimaeli abasuubuzi abava mu Gileadi, nga bali n'engamiya edheetwise obusando obw'akawoowo era n'obuwoowo obundi obwetebwa balamu ni mirra, nga babitwala e Misiri." 
Genesis37:26 Agho Yuda yaakoba baganda be ati: “Tuganhulwamu ki ife okwita muganda waife ni tubuzaabuza okwitibwa kwe? 
Genesis37:27 Ka tumuguze Abaishimaeli abasuubuzi, ife tulobe kumukolaku kabi, kuba oyo muganda waife era musaayi gwaife.” Baganda be baaganha kye yakoba." 
Genesis37:28 Kale abasuubuzi bwe baali babitagho, baamughaluzaayo, baamutoola mu kiina, baamuguza abasuubuzi abo ebitundu amakumi abiri ebya feeza. Abasuubuzi abo baatwala Yosefu mu Misiri." 
Genesis37:29 Reubeni bweyairayo ku kiina n'ayagaana nga Yosefu aziramu, yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'okunakughala." 
Genesis37:30 Yairayo eri baganda be, yaakoba ati: “Omwisuka azirayo. Kale nnaaja gha nze?”" 
Genesis37:31 Agho baita embuzi, bainhika ekivaalo kya Yosefu mu musaayi gwayo." 
Genesis37:32 Baatwala ekivaalo ekyo eky'emikono emireeyi eri iseibwe, baakoba bati: “Twayagaine ekivaalo kino. Mpegaano bona oba nga n'ekyo eky'omwana wo, oba nga ti nikyo.”" 
Genesis37:33 Yakobo yaakitegeera era yaakoba ati: “Kino n'ekivaalo ky'omwana wange. Ensolo ey'omu nsiko yamulya. Bwenebwene omwana wange Yosefu ensolo yamukankanula!” 
Genesis37:34 Yakobo yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'okunakughala, yeesiba ekikaakaati, yaamala enaku kamaala ng'alira omwana we." 
Genesis37:35 Batabane ni baghala be boonaboona baidha okumugumya, aye yaaloba kubawulirisa. Yaakoba ati: “Ndiika e magombe eri omwana wange nga nkaalira.” Yeeyongera okulira amaziga olw'omwana we." 
Genesis37:36 Mu kiseera ekyo, abasuubuzi baali bamaze okutunda Yosefu mu Misiri, nga bamuguziiza Potifari omukungu wa kyabazinga w'e Misiri, era omukulu w'abaisirukale abaakuumanga ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
Genesis38:1 Agho mu biseera ebyo, Yuda yaava ku baganda be, yaasenga ew'omusaadha Omuadullamu, ayetebwa Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Eyo Yuda yaabonayo omughala eyazaalibwa omusaadha Omukanaani. Eriina ly'Omukanaani oyo nga ni Shua. Yuda yaabayiza omughala oyo Omukanaani era yaaba naye mu buliri," 
Genesis38:3 omughala yaatoola enda, yaazaala omwana mulenzi, Yuda yaamutuuma eriina Eri." 
Genesis38:4 Yatoola enda kabiri, yaazaala omwana mulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Era kabiri yaazaala omwana mulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Shela. Yuda yali ali mu kifo ekyetebwa Kezibu ekiseera omulenzi ghe baamuzaalira." 
Genesis38:6 Nga ghabiseegho entangama, Yuda yaafunira Eri, omwana we omuberi, omukazi nga ayetebwa Tamari." 
Genesis38:7 Aye Eri, omwana omuberi owa Yuda, yali wa mpisa mbi mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda; kale Musengwa Katonda yaamwita." 
Genesis38:8 Agho Yuda yaakoba Onani ati: “Ja ye namwandu wa muganda wo obe naye; otuukirize obuvunaanizibwa bwo iwe nga muganda w'omufu, ozaalire muganda wo abaana.”" 
Genesis38:9 Aye Onani yaamanha ng'abaana abo tibaja kuba babe. Kale buli lwe yabanga ni namwandu wa muganda we, ng'amaadhi agafuka ghansi, alobe kuzaalira muganda we baana." 
Genesis38:10 Kye yakola kyaloba kusangaaza Musengwa Katonda. Kale Musengwa Katonda oyo yaamwita yeena. 
Genesis38:11 Yuda yaakoba Tamari mukaamwana ati: “Irayo mu ndhu ya lata wo, osigale ng'oli namwandu okutuusa mutabane wange Shela lw'alimala okukula.” Yayogera atyo, kuba yatya ati n'oyo yeena aidha kufa ng'oti ni baganda be bwe baafa. Agho Tamari yairayo, yaaba mu ndhu ya ise." 
Genesis38:12 Ekiseera bwekyabitagho, muka Yuda eyali mughala wa Shua yaafa. Ebiseera oby'okulira omufu bwe byawaaku, Yuda ni mukagwa we Hira Omuadullamu, baaja e Timuna eyali abasaadha be, abaali balikusala ku ntaama obuviiri." 
Genesis38:13 Abantu baakoberaku Tamari bati: “Nhazaala wo ali kuja e Timuna okusala ku ntaama obuviiri.” 
Genesis38:14 Agho Tamari yeetoolamu ebivaalo eby'obwanamwandu, yeesiba ekitambaala ku mutwe, yeeghemba ni mu maiso. Yaatyama ku mulyango gw'ekibuga Enaimu, ekiri ku ngira eja e Timuna. Yakola atyo lwa kuba yabona nga Shela amaze okukula, aye nga tibali kumumugha amubayize." 
Genesis38:15 Yuda bweyamubona yaamudhuubiriza okuba malaaya, kuba yali yeeghembye mu maiso." 
Genesis38:16 Yaaja y'ali ku mbali kw'engira, yaakoba ati: “Idha mbe n'iwe,” nga taidhi ati ni mukaamwana we. Tamari yaamubuuza ati: “Onampa ki olw'okuba ninze?”" 
Genesis38:17 Yuda yairamu ati: “Ndidha kukugheereza embuzi ento, okuva mu kisibo kyange. Ole yaakoba ati onampa omusingo okutuusa lw'onaagigheereza.”" 
Genesis38:18 Yuda yaamubuuza ati: “Musingo ki gwembe nkughe?” Ole yairamu ati: “Akamanhiso ko, n'olusibiro lwaku, n'omwigo gwo ogw'omu ngalo.” Yaabimugha, yaaba naye mu buliri era Tamari yaatoola enda." 
Genesis38:19 Agho Tamari yairayo eka, yeesibula ekitambaala ku mutwe, yeeghembula mu maiso, era yaavaala ebivaalo eby'obwanamwandu." 
Genesis38:20 Yuda yaatuma mukagwa we Omuadullamu okutwalira omukazi embuzi ento, n'okutoolayo omusingo, aye mukagwa we yaaloba kubona mukazi." 
Genesis38:21 Yaabuuza abasaadha ab'Enaimu ati: “Omukazi malaaya eyali ghano ku ngira ali gha?” Bairamu bati: “Ghano tighabangaghooku mukazi malaaya.” 
Genesis38:22 Kale yairayo eri Yuda, yaakoba ati: “Timuboine, era n'abasaadha ab'omu kiketezo ekyo bakobye bati, ‘Ghano tighabangaghooku mukazi malaaya.’ ”" 
Genesis38:23 Yuda yaakoba ati: “Leka ebintu abisigaze, tulobe kusekererwa. Kasita nze nagheereza embuzi ento, aye iwe waaloba kumwagaanagho.”" 
Genesis38:24 Bwe ghaabitagho emyezi ng'esatu, baakobera Yuda bati: “Tamari mukaamwana wo yakola obwamalaaya, era mpegaano ali nda.” Yuda yaakoba ati: “Mumufulumye mumwokye afe.”"
