Genesis38:25 Bwe baali nga bamufulumya, yaagheereza ye nhazaala we obukwenda obukoba buti: “Omusaadha mwene bintu bino n'eyampa enda. Nkweghembye byekalirise bukalamu ozuule mwene byo, biri: akamanhiso n'olusibiro lwaku, era n'omwigo ogw'omu ngalo.”" 
Genesis38:26 Yuda yaabitegeera, yaakoba ati: “Omughala mutuufu, kuba nze tinamugha mutabane wange Shela kumubayiza.” Yuda yaaloba kwirayo kuba naye mukuzi gundi." 
Genesis38:27 Agho enaku dhe edh'okuzaala dhaatuuka, kyazuuka ng'ali na balongo mu nda." 
Genesis38:28 Bwe yali ng'ali kulumwa, omulongo owundi yaafulumya omukono gwe. Omuzaalisa yaagugema, yaagusibaku akawuuzi akamyufu ng'akoba ati: “Ono n'asoose okufuluma.”" 
Genesis38:29 Aye yaizaayo omukono gwe, muganda we yaafuluma. Omuzaalisa yaakoba ati: “Otyo bw'owagwiza.” Kyeyava n'atuumibwa eriina Perezi." 
Genesis38:30 Agho muganda we yeena yaafuluma ng'ali n'akawuuzi akamyufu ku mukono, baamutuuma eriina Zera." 
Genesis39:1 Abaishimaeli baali nga bamaze okutwala Yosefu mu Misiri, era nga bamuguziiza Potifari omukungu wa kyabazinga w'e Misiri, era omukulu w'abaisirukale abaakuumanga ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
Genesis39:2 Musengwa Katonda yaabanga ni Yosefu, era Yosefu oyo yaabanga wa nkabi mu byonabyona bye yakolanga; yaabanga mu ndhu ya musengwa we Omumisiri." 
Genesis39:3 Omumisiri oyo yaabona nga Musengwa Katonda ali ni Yosefu, era ng'amugha enkabi mu buli ky'akola." 
Genesis39:4 Potifari yaasiima Yosefu, yaamufuula mugheereza we, era yaamugha okulabiriranga endhu ye, n'okukuumanga ebibye byonabyona." 
Genesis39:5 Okuva ku olwo, Musengwa Katonda yaagha enkabi amaka g'Omumisiri oyo n'ebibye byonabyona, bye yali nabyo mu ndhu ye ni mu nimiro. Musengwa yakola kino ku lwa Yosefu." 
Genesis39:6 Kale Potifari yaalekera Yosefu ebibye byonabyona okubirabiriranga, nga takeeraliikirira kintu kyonakyona okutoolaku emere ye yalyanga. Ekikula kya Yosefu kyali nga kisanhusa okubona." 
Genesis39:7 Bweghaabitagho entangama, muka musengwa we yaamulinga ekimodi, yaakoba ati: “Ba ninze mu buliri.”" 
Genesis39:8 Aye Yosefu yaaloba, yaakoba muka musengwa we ati: “Bona, musengwa wange takeeraliikirira kintu kyonakyona mu ndhu, kuba nze ndigho, era yandekera ebibye byonabyona okubirabirira." 
Genesis39:9 Ndi n'obuyinza mu maka muno obwagayaga n'obubwe, era ghazira ky'atangemya okutoolaku iwe; kuba oli mukazi we. Kale nsobola ntya okukola ekibi ekyaga agho ni nsobya eri Katonda?”" 
Genesis39:10 Era waire ng'omukazi oyo yadeebanga Yosefu buli kaakyeire, aye Yosefu yaloba okuba naye, waire okuba gh'ali." 
Genesis39:11 Aye lwali lulala Yosefu yaingira mu ndhu okukola emirimo gye, era nga ghazira bagheereza ba mu ndhu eyo bandi." 
Genesis39:12 Omukazi yaagema Yosefu ekivaalo, ng'amukoba ati: “Ba ninze.” Aye Yosefu yaalekulira ekivaalo kye mu ngalo dh'omukazi, yaalumuka yaafuluma ku luya." 
Genesis39:13 Omukazi bweyabona nga Yosefu amulekuliire ekivaalo kye mu ngalo era nga alumwike, yaafuluma ku luya," 
Genesis39:14 yaayeta abagheereza ab'omu ndhu ye, yaabakoba ati: “Mubone, baze yaleeta muno Omuheburayi okutudhooga. Aingiire ye mbaire, ng'ayenda okunkaka okuba naye, aye nze naakuba inho enduulu." 
Genesis39:15 Bw'awuliire nga nkubye enduulu, yandekera ekivaalo kye, yaalumuka yaafuluma ku luya.”" 
Genesis39:16 Omukazi yaakuuma ekivaalo kya Yosefu, okutuusa musengwa wa Yosefu lwe yaira eka." 
Genesis39:17 Era bweyaira yaamukobera kyene ekyo ati: “Omugheereza Omuheburayi ye watuleetera, yaingira ye nali okundhooga." 
Genesis39:18 Aye bwe nakuba enduulu, yandekera ekivaalo kye, yaalumuka, yaafuluma ku luya.”" 
Genesis39:19 Agho musengwa wa Yosefu bweyawulira mukazi we ng'amukobera nga Yosefu bweyali amubisiisa, yaasungughala," 
Genesis39:20 yaagema Yosefu, yaamuta mu ikomera abasibe aba kyabazinga mwe bakuumirwa; Yosefu yaaba omwo mu ikomera." 
Genesis39:21 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaabanga ni Yosefu oyo, yaamwoleka nga bw'amugonza obutalekera, yaaleetera omukuumi w'eikomera okumugemerwanga ekivunika." 
Genesis39:22 Era omukuumi w'eikomera oyo yaagemya Yosefu abasibe boonaboona okubalabiriranga, era yaamugha obuvunaanizibwa ku kiisi kikolebwa mu ikomera." 
Genesis39:23 Omukuumi w'eikomera tiyeeraliikiriranga kintu kyonakyona ekyagemesebwa Yosefu, kuba Musengwa Katonda yali ghalala ni Yosefu, ng'agha enkabi kiisi kye yakolanga." 
Genesis40:1 Bwe ghaabitagho entangama ng'ebyo biwoire, omusenero wa kyabazinga era n'omufumbi, baasungughaza musengwa waibwe kyabazinga ow'e Misiri." 
Genesis40:2 Kyabazinga yaasungughalira inho abakungu abo bombi: omukulu w'abasenero, n'omukulu w'abafumbi." 
Genesis40:3 Yaabasibira mu ikomera, mu ndhu y'omukulu w'abaisirukale abakuumi b'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, mu kifo kyene ekyo Yosefu mwe yasibirwa." 
Genesis40:4 Omukulu w'abaisirukale abakuuma ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, yaalonda Yosefu okubagheerezanga, era baatwala entangama nga basibe." 
Genesis40:5 Lwali lulala obwire, omusenero yaaloota ekirooto, n'omufumbi yeena yaaloota, aye nga buli kirooto kiri n'amakulu maawufu." 
Genesis40:6 Yosefu bweyaja ye bali enkyo, yaababona nga beeraliikiriire." 
Genesis40:7 Yaabuuza abakungu ba kyabazinga abo abaasibirwa aghalala naye mu ndhu ya musengwa we, ati: “Kiki ekiri kubeeraliikiriza kityo olwaleero?”" 
Genesis40:8 Baamwiramu bati: “Buli mulala ku ife yaloose ekirooto, aye ghazira aghanga kuvuunula makulu ga birooto ebyo.” Yosefu yaakoba ati: “Katonda ti n'asobozesa abantu okuvuunula ebirooto? Kale munkobere ebirooto ebyo.”" 
Genesis40:9 Agho omusenero omukulu yaakobera Yosefu ekirooto kye ati: “Mu kirooto kyange ghaabairegho omuzabbibu mu maiso gange," 
Genesis40:10 nga kuliku ensaga isatu. Olwamaze okuleeta amakaba guti, ng'omuzabbibu ogwo gumulisa ebimuli, gwayama obufaaganda bw'emizabbibu era bwayenga." 
Genesis40:11 Nabaire nga ngemereire ekikopo kya kyabazinga mu ngalo. Kale naatoola emizabbibu, naagikamulira mu kikopo kya kyabazinga, naakimugemya.”" 
Genesis40:12 Yosefu yaamukoba ati: “Gano n'amakulu gaakyo: ensaga eisatu dhitegeeza enaku isatu. 
Genesis40:13 Mu nnaku isatu kyabazinga aidha kukusibula ove mu ikomera, akusonighe era akwirize obukulu bwo, osobole okumugemyanga ekikopo, nga bwe wakolanga eira bwe wali ng'okaali omusenero we." 
Genesis40:14 Aye nkweghembye ondidhukiranga nga bikujiiriire bukalamu, wangemerwa ekivunika, wandhogererayo eri kyabazinga, wantoola mu ikomera muno." 
Genesis40:15 Kuba bwenebwene bampuuya buwuuye okuva mu nsi y'Abaheburayi, era ni ghano tikolangaghooku kintu kyonakyona ekyandinsibiisa mu ikomera.”" 
Genesis40:16 Omufumbi omukulu bweyabona nga amakulu g'ekirooto ekyo malungi, yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Zeena naloose nga neetwise ku mutwe ebiibo bisatu ebirimu emigaati nga mbiyiriike." 
Genesis40:17 Mu kiibo eky'oku ngulu mwabairemu emigaati egya buli nsambo nga gya kyabazinga, aye nga enhonhi dhiri kugiriira mu kiibo ku mutwe gwange.”" 
Genesis40:18 Yosefu yairamu ati: “Gano n'amakulu gaakyo: ebiibo ebisatu bitegeeza enaku isatu. 
Genesis40:19 Mu nnaku isatu kyabazinga aidha kukutoola mu ikomera, alagire bakutemeku omutwe, era bakughanike olengeedhere ku muti, enhonhi dhirye omulambo gwo.”" 
Genesis40:20 Ku lunaku olwokusatu, olwali olw'okukulizaaku amazaalibwa ga kyabazinga, kyabazinga yaagabula abakungu be boonaboona embaga. Yaafulumya mu ikomera omusenero omukulu n'omufumbi omukulu, bombi yaabaleeta mu maiso g'abakungu be." 
Genesis40:21 Yaiza omusenero omukulu mu busenero bwe, era omusenero oyo yaagemya kyabazinga ekikopo mu ngalo." 
Genesis40:22 Aye kyabazinga yaaghanika omufumbi omukulu yaalengeedhera ku muti, yaafa, nga Yosefu bweyavuunula ebirooto." 
Genesis40:23 Aye omusenero omukulu yaaloba kwogererayo Yosefu eri kyabazinga, yaamwerabirira irala." 
Genesis41:1 Emyaka ebiri emirambirira bwe gyabitagho, kyabazinga yaaloota ekirooto kino: Yali ng'ayemereire ku mbali kw'omwiga Kiyira," 
Genesis41:2 yaja okubona ati, ng'ente musanvu enungi era enherengefu dhiva mu mwiga ogwo, dhaalya eisubi." 
Genesis41:3 Kabiri yaja okubona, ng'ente edhindi musanvu embi era engoogombe, nga dhoona dhiva mu mwiga ogwo. Dhaayemerera ku mbali kw'omwiga, nga dhiri kumpi n'ente dhire edhindi." 
Genesis41:4 Ente dhino embi era engoogombe dhaalya ente dhire enungi era enherengefu, dhaadhimalagho. Agho kyabazinga yaazuuka." 
Genesis41:5 Kabiri yaatenduka, era yairamu okuloota omukuzi ogwokubiri: Yaabona ebifaaganda eby'engaano musanvu ebigimu era ebingi, nga biri kukulira ku kikolo kirala." 
Genesis41:6 Olwamala okubona ebyo, obufaaganda obw'engaano musanvu bwavaayo nga butono era nga bubabwirwa empewo eva mu irungu." 
Genesis41:7 Agho obufaaganda obutono buno bwamira ebifaaganda bire ebigimu era ebirungi. Kyabazinga yaazuuka, era yaategeera ng'abaire ali kuloota." 
Genesis41:8 Enkyo yeeraliikirira, kale yaayetesa abalaguzi boonaboona n'abakugu mu kuvuunula ebirooto boonaboona ab'omu Misiri, yaabakobera ebirooto bye. Aye ghaabulagho omuntu waire omulala ati, eyali asobola okumuvuunulira amakulu gaabyo." 
Genesis41:9 Agho omusenero omukulu yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Olwaleero ndidhukiire nga nasobya. 
Genesis41:10 Ow'ekitiisa kyabazinga, bwewasungughalira abagheereza bo, nze n'omufumbi omukulu, n'otusibira mu ndhu y'omukulu w'abaisirukale abakuumi b'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga," 
Genesis41:11 twaloota ebirooto mu bwire bulala, ng'ekirooto kya buli muntu kiri n'amakulu maawufu." 
Genesis41:12 Ghaaligho omwisuka Omuheburayi eyali aghalala n'ife, nga mugheereza wa mukulu ow'abaisirukale abakuumi b'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Twamukobera ebirooto byaife, era yaatuvuunulira amakulu gaabyo, ng'ekirooto ekya buli muntu bwe kyali." 
Genesis41:13 Era byaba bityo nga bweyabituvuunulira: Nze wandhiza ku bukulu bwange, aye omufumbi omukulu waalagira baamulengeedhia ku muti, yaafa.”" 
Genesis41:14 Kyabazinga yaayetesa Yosefu, baamutoola mangu mu ikomera. Yosefu bwe baamala okumumwa era n'akyusa ebivaalo n'avaala ebindi, yaaja eri kyabazinga." 
Genesis41:15 Kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Naloose ekirooto, aye ghazira aghanga kuvuunula makulu gaakyo. Mpuliire nga bakwogeraku bati oghanga okuvuunula ebirooto.”" 
Genesis41:16 Yosefu yaira mu kyabazinga ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ti ninze, aye Katonda n'anaakugha okuvuunula okulungi.”" 
Genesis41:17 Agho kyabazinga yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Mu kirooto kyange, nabaire nga nhemereire ku mbali kw'omwiga Kiyira," 
Genesis41:18 najiire okubona nti, ng'ente musanvu enungi era enherengefu dhiva mu mwiga ogwo, dhaalya eisubi." 
Genesis41:19 Agho ente edhindi musanvu embi era engoogombe, dhaavaayo. Nali tibonangaku nte ngoogombe ng'oti n'edho, mu nsi yoonayoona ey'e Misiri." 
Genesis41:20 Ente edho embi era ensowofu, dhaalya dhire enherengefu edhaasoose." 
Genesis41:21 Aye bwe dhaamaze okudhirya, ole nga taghanga kumanha ati dhidhiriire, kuba dhaasigaire nga ngoogombe nga bwe dhaabaire mu kusooka. Agho naazuuka." 
Genesis41:22 “Era naaloota ebifaaganda by'engaano musanvu ebigimu era ebirungi, nga biri kukulira ku kikolo kirala." 
Genesis41:23 N'obufaaganda obw'engaano musanvu bwavaayo nga butono, buniavu era nga bubabwirwa empewo eva mu irungu." 
Genesis41:24 Agho obufaaganda obutono buno bwamira ebifaaganda bire ebirungi. Ebirooto ebyo nabikobeire abalaguzi, aye ghaabulagho omuntu waire omulala ati aghanga okunvuunulira amakulu gaabyo.”" 
Genesis41:25 Yosefu yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Ow'ekitiisa Kyabazinga, ebirooto byo biri n'amakulu nga n'amalala. Katonda akwoleike by'aja okukola." 
Genesis41:26 Ente omusanvu enungi, dhitegeeza emyaka musanvu. N'ebifaaganda omusanvu eby'engaano ebirungi byona bitegeeza emyaka musanvu. Ebirooto byombi biri n'amakulu malala ago." 
Genesis41:27 Era n'ente omusanvu embi era ensowofu, edhairirira dhire edhaasooka, era n'obufaaganda omusanvu obw'engaano obuziramu mpeke, obubabwirwa empewo eva mu irungu, ebyo bitegeeza myaka musanvu egy'endhala." 
Genesis41:28 Ow'ekitiisa kyabazinga, ekyo kye nkukobeire nti Katonda akwoleike by'aja okukola." 
Genesis41:29 Ghalibaagho emyaka musanvu egy'omwero mu nsi yoonayoona ey'e Misiri. 
Genesis41:30 Egyo nga gibiseegho, ghalibaagho emyaka musanvu egy'endhala. Era ebiseera eby'omwero biryerabirwa mu nsi y'e Misiri, endhala yaazikiriza ensi." 
Genesis41:31 Endhala eyo eriba ya maani inho, ghaaloba na kusigalagho kamanhiso kooleka nga ghaalighooku ebiseera eby'omwero." 
Genesis41:32 Ekirooto okuba eky'emikuzi ebiri kitegeeza kiti: Katonda asazeegho okukola ekintu ekyo, era nga aidha kukituukiriza mangu." 
Genesis41:33 Kale ni ow'ekitiisa kyabazinga, wandironze omusaadha aidhi okutegeka era ow'amagezi, waamugha okulabirira ensi eno Misiri." 
Genesis41:34 Era oteegho abakungu mu ighanga, batoole ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bitaanu eby'emere yoonayoona, abantu ye balirima mu nsi eno Misiri, mu myaka omusanvu egy'omwero." 
Genesis41:35 Era obalagire basoloze emere mu myaka egyo emirungi egiidha, batereke engaano mu bibuga, era bagikuume." 
Genesis41:36 Emere eyo n'eriba ey'okwekuumisa mu ighanga, mu myaka omusanvu egy'endhala eribaagho mu nsi eno Misiri, olwo abantu balobe kufa ndhala.”" 
Genesis41:37 Kyabazinga n'abakungu be boonaboona, baasiima entegeka eyo." 
Genesis41:38 Kyabazinga yaakoba abakungu be ati: “Tusobola okuzuulayo omusaadha ali ng'oti n'ono, omusaadha aidhwire omwoyo gwa Katonda.”" 
Genesis41:39 Kyabazinga yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Nga Katonda bw'akwoleike ebyo byonabyona, ezira wundi aidhi okutegeka era ow'amagezi ng'oti niiwe." 
Genesis41:40 Oidha kulabiriranga ensi yange, era abantu bange boonaboona baidha kukuwulirangaku. Nze zenka, ninze nnaakuwulangaku okuba n'obuyinza.”" 
Genesis41:41 Agho kyabazinga yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Bona, mpegaano nkutairegho ofugenga ensi eno Misiri yoonayoona.”" 
Genesis41:42 Kyabazinga yaatoola ku lwala empeta ye eriku akamanhiso ak'obwakyabazinga, yaagivaaza Yosefu ku lwala. Yaamuvaaza ekivaalo ekighegheevu, era yaamuvaaza mu nkoto omukuufu ogwa zaabu." 
Genesis41:43 Yaamugha ekigaali kye eky'omu lutalo ekyokubiri yaatambuliramu, era baaja nga balangirira emberi we bati: “Mukube amakiryaivu.” Atyo kyabazinga yaagha Yosefu okufuganga ensi yoonayoona ey'e Misiri." 
Genesis41:44 Kyabazinga yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Ninze kyabazinga, era mu nsi eno Misiri ghazira muntu waire omulala ati aligolola mukono gwe, oba okusitula ekigere kye nga tomwikiriiza.”" 
Genesis41:45 Kyabazinga yaatuuma Yosefu eriina Zafenathi Panea, era yaamugha Asenathi mughala wa Potifera kabona ow'e Oni abe mukazi we. Kale obufuzi bwa Yosefu bwabuna ensi ey'e Misiri yoonayoona." 
Genesis41:46 Yosefu yali agheza emyaka amakumi asatu (30) ghe yatoolerera okugheereza kyabazinga w'e Misiri. Agho yaava mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, yaatambula mu nsi yoonayoona ey'e Misiri." 
Genesis41:47 Mu myaka omusanvu egy'omwero, ensi yaabaza emere kamaala." 
Genesis41:48 Yosefu yaagisolozanga yoonayoona, yaagiterekanga mu bibuga. Yaaterekanga mu buli kibuga emere eyalimwanga mu nimiro edhikyezungulwire." 
Genesis41:49 Yosefu yaatereka engaano kamaala inho ng'oti n'omusenho ogw'enhandha era yaalekera agho n'okugipima, kuba yali tekaapimika." 
Genesis41:50 Emyaka egy'endhala nga gikaali kutuuka, Yosefu yaazaala abaana babiri abalenzi mu Asenathi mughala wa Potifera kabona ow'e Oni." 
Genesis41:51 Yosefu yaatuuma omwana omuberi eriina Manasse, kuba yakoba ati: “Katonda aneerabiiza okudaazibwadaazibwa kwange kwonakwona era n'ab'endhu ya lata wange boonaboona.”" 
Genesis41:52 Yaatuuma owokubiri eriina Efuraimu, kuba yakoba ati: “Katonda ampaire abaana mu nsi mwe ndaagiiredaagiire.”" 
Genesis41:53 Emyaka omusanvu egy'omwero ogwabaagho mu nsi ey'e Misiri, gyawaaku." 
Genesis41:54 Era emyaka omusanvu egy'endhala gyatoolera nga Yosefu bweyakoba. Endhala yaagwa mu nsi dhoonadhoona, aye mu nsi ey'e Misiri ng'emere eriyo." 
Genesis41:55 Abantu ab'omu Misiri bwe baatoolera okulumwa endhala, baalirira kyabazinga abaghe emere. Kyabazinga yaabakoba boonaboona ati: “Muje eri Yosefu, ky'anaabakoba kye mube mukole.”" 
Genesis41:56 Endhala yeeyongera okuluma einho, era yaabuna woonawoona mu nsi ey'e Misiri. Yosefu yaigulagho amaterekero goonagoona, yaaguza Abamisiri engaano." 
Genesis41:57 Abantu baavanga mu nsi edhindi dhoonadhoona, baaja mu Misiri eri Yosefu okugula engaano, kuba endhala yali ya maani inho woonawoona." 
Genesis42:1 Agho Yakobo bweyamanha nga mu Misiri eriyo engaano, yaakoba batabane ati: “Lwaki mwira obwa agho okulingaganaku?" 
Genesis42:2 Mpuliire nga mu Misiri eriyo engaano. Mujeeyo, mutugulireyo ku ngaano enaatubeesaagho, tulobe kufa ndhala.”" 
Genesis42:3 Kale baganda ba Yosefu ikumi, baaja e Misiri okugulayo engaano." 
Genesis42:4 Aye Yakobo yaaloba kutuma Benjamini, muganda wa Yosefu, ghalala ni baganda be. Kuba yatya ati akabi kasobola okumutuukaku." 
Genesis42:5 Agho batabane ba Isiraeli baidha ghalala n'abantu abandi okugula engaano, kuba endhala yali egwire mu nsi ey'e Kanaani." 
Genesis42:6 Yosefu n'eyali omufuzi w'ensi Misiri, era n'eyaguzanga engaano abantu boonaboona abaavanga woonawoona mu nsi. Kale baganda be baidha, baakuba amakiryaivu mu maiso ge, nga n'obweni butuuse ku itaka." 
Genesis42:7 Yosefu bweyabona baganda be yaabategeera, aye yaababisa ng'oti tabaidhi. Yaababuuza ng'ali kubadhuuka ati: “Muva gha?” Bairamu bati: “Tuva mu nsi ey'e Kanaani, twidhie kugula mere.”" 
Genesis42:8 Waire nga Yosefu yategeera baganda be, aye beene tibaamutegeera." 
Genesis42:9 Agho yaidhukira ebirooto bye yaloota kubo, yaabakoba ati: “Muli bakeesi. Mwidhie okubona obunafu bw'ensi yaife, memale mwidhe mutulumbe.”" 
Genesis42:10 Bairamu bati: “Busa, musengwa waife. Ife abagheereza bo twidhie kugula mere." 
Genesis42:11 Twenatwena tuli baana ba musaadha mulala. Ife abagheereza bo tuli bantu beesimbu, tituli bakeesi.”" 
Genesis42:12 Yosefu yaabakoba ati: “Busa, mwidhie okubona obunafu bw'ensi yaife, memale mwidhe mutulumbe.”" 
Genesis42:13 Baakoba bati: “Ife abagheereza bo, twali aboluganda ikumi na babiri, nga tuli baana ba musaadha mulala mu nsi ey'e Kanaani. Muganda waife mulala takaaligho, ate ole asembayo obuto, asigaireyo ghalala n'iseife.”" 
Genesis42:14 Aye Yosefu yaabakoba ati: “Kye mbakobye n'ekyo, muli bakeesi." 
Genesis42:15 Leka mbalebe nti: ndayiire mu liina lya kyabazinga, timuja kuva ghano, okutoolaku nga muganda waimwe asembayo obuto aidhie ghano." 
Genesis42:16 Mutume owundi ku imwe aje aleete muganda waimwe. Imwe abandi mwidha kusibwa mu ikomera, okutuusa lwe tunaakakasa tuti bye mukoba bya mazima. Bwe kitaba kityo, ndayiire mu liina lya kyabazinga nti bwenebwene muli bakeesi.”" 
Genesis42:17 Agho yaabasibira boonaboona ghalala mu ikomera, okumala enaku isatu." 
Genesis42:18 Ku lunaku olw'okusatu Yosefu yaabakoba ati: “Nze ndi muntu atya Katonda. Kale mukole kye nja okukoba, memale mughange okuwonia obulamu bwaimwe:" 
Genesis42:19 Oba nga muli bantu beesimbu, owundi ku imwe asigale ghano mu ikomera mwe mubaire musibiirwa. Aye imwe abandi muje, mutwalire ab'omu maka gaimwe engaano abali kufa endhala." 
Genesis42:20 Memale olwo mundeetere muganda waimwe asembayo obuto. Ekyo n'ekirikakasa nga bye mukobye bya mazima, era olwo ndobe kubaita.” Baaganha okukola batyo." 
Genesis42:21 Agho baakoba ati: “Bwenebwene omusango gwatusinga olwa muganda waife, kuba twabona obulumi bwe yalimu ng'ali kutweghemba tumusaasire aye twaloba kuwulirisa, kye tuviire tudaazibwadaazibwa tuti!”" 
Genesis42:22 Reubeni yaabakoba ati: “Nze tinabakoba nti omwana mutamukolaku kabi, aye imwe ni muloba kuwulira? Mpegaano kye tuva tuli kubonerezebwa olw'okufa kwe.”" 
Genesis42:23 Tibaamanha nga Yosefu yategeera bye baayogera, kuba baayogeranga naye nga ghaligho abavuunulira." 
Genesis42:24 Agho Yosefu yaava ghe bali, yaaja, yaalira amaziga. Bwe yawoleera, yairayo ye bali, yaayogera nabo. Era yaalondamu Simeoni, yaamusiba nga babona." 
Genesis42:25 Yosefu yaalagira okwidhuza ensawo dha baganda be engaano, n'okwiriza kiisi mulala empiiya dhe mu nsawo ye, era n'okubagha eby'okuliira mu lugendo. Ekyo kyakolebwa." 
Genesis42:26 Agho beetwika engaano yaibwe ku ndogoyi dhaibwe, baaja." 
Genesis42:27 Bwe baatuuka agh'okusula, owundi yaasibula ensawo ye okugha endogoyi ye eby'okulya, yaabona empiiya dhe nga dhiri ku munwa gw'ensawo ye." 
Genesis42:28 Yaakoba baganda be ati: “Empiiya dhange badhindhiriiza, dhiidhino mu nsawo yange.” Bwe baabona kino emyoyo gyabatyemuka, batengera, baakoba bati: “Kiki kino Katonda ky'atukoze?”" 
Genesis42:29 Bwe baatuuka eri Yakobo iseibwe, mu nsi ey'e Kanaani, baamukobera byonabyona ebyabatuukaku. Baakoba bati:" 
Genesis42:30 “Omusaadha omufuzi mu Misiri yatudhuukadhuuka, yaatulumiriza ati tuli bakeesi mu nsi ye." 
Genesis42:31 Aye twamukoba tuti ‘Ife tuli bantu beesimbu, tituli bakeesi." 
Genesis42:32 Twali aboluganda ikumi na babiri, abaana aba iseife omulala. Muganda waife mulala takaaligho. Ate ole asembayo obuto, asigaireyo ghalala n'iseife mu Kanaani.’" 
Genesis42:33 Omusaadha oyo omufuzi wa Misiri, yaatukoba ati ‘Ku kino kwe tunaakakalisa nga muli bantu ba mazima: owundi ku imwe mumuleke ghano ninze, abandi muje mutwalire ab'omu maka gaimwe engaano abali kufa endhala." 
Genesis42:34 Mundeetere muganda waimwe asembayo obuto, olwo nditegeera nga timuli bakeesi, aye nga muli bantu beesimbu. Ndibairiza muganda waimwe, era mulisuubuliranga mu nsi eno.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Agho bwe baali bali kutoola ebintu mu nsawo dhaibwe, buli muntu yaayagaana mu nsawo ye akavangata ak'empiiya dhe. Era beene, n'iseibwe bwe baabona empiiya edho, baatya." 
Genesis42:36 Iseibwe Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Muumazeeku abaana bange: Yosefu takaaligho, ni Simeoni takaaligho. Era mpegaano mwenda kuntoolaku ni Benjamini. Ebyo byonabyona birumya mulala nze!”" 
Genesis42:37 Reubeni yaakoba ise ati: “Iwe ngemya Benjamini, ndidha kumwiza y'oli. Aye bwe ntamwizanga y'oli, oitanga batabane bange bombi.”" 
Genesis42:38 Aye Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Omwana wange taidha kuja n'imwe, kuba muganda we yafa, era mpegaano ni yenka asigairegho. Akabi bwe kalimutuukaku mu lugendo lwe muja okutambula, olwo muliba mundeeteire obughafu obulindhita nze omukaire.”" 
Genesis43:1 Endhala yeeyongera inho okuluma abantu mu nsi ey'e Kanaani. 
Genesis43:2 Agho bwe baamalagho engaano yoonayoona ye baatoola mu Misiri, iseibwe yaakoba ati: “Mwireyo mutugulire ku kamere.”" 
Genesis43:3 Aye Yuda yaamukoba ati: “Omusaadha ole yatulabuliragho irala ati ‘Timwidhanga mu maiso gange, okutoolaku nga muganda waimwe ali ghalala n'imwe.’" 
Genesis43:4 Kale bw'onaaganha muganda waife okuja n'ife, tunaaja twakugulira emere." 
Genesis43:5 Aye bw'otaamuganhe titwidha kuja, kuba omusaadha yatukoba ati ‘Timwidhanga mu maiso gange, okutoolaku nga muganda waimwe ali ghalala n'imwe.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Isiraeli yaabuuza ati: “Lwaki mwandeetera obuzibu obwaga agho, ni mukobera omusaadha muti muliyo ni muganda waimwe owundi?” Bairamu bati:" 
Genesis43:7 “Omusaadha yatubuuliriza inho ebituufaaku n'ebifa ku boluganda lwaife, ng'akoba ati, ‘Iseimwe akaali mulamu? Muliyo ni muganda waimwe owundi?’ Twamwiramu ebyo bye yatubuuliriza. Twandimanhie tutya ng'anaatukoba ati, ‘Muleete muganda waimwe?’ ”" 
Genesis43:8 Yuda yaakoba Isiraeli ati: “Omwisuka mugemye nze, otuleke tuje, memale tube balamu, tulobe kufa ndhala ife n'iwe n'abaana baife abato." 
Genesis43:9 Nze neeyamye okumukuuma, olimubuuza nze. Bwe ntalimwiza y'oli, ni mmuta mu maiso go nti, omusango gubanga ku nze enaku dhoonadhoona." 
Genesis43:10 Ngoli titwalwa, mpegaano twandibaire nga twakairayo emikuzi ebiri.”" 
Genesis43:11 Agho Isiraeli iseibwe yaabakoba ati: “Oba nga kityo bwekiri, mukole muti: mutwale mu nsawo dhaimwe ebirabo bye munaagha omusaadha oyo. Mumutwalire ku bintu eby'omu nsi eno ebisinga kuba birungi: ku busando obw'akawoowo, ni ku mudheenene gw'endhuki, ni ku buwoowo obwetebwa balamu ni mirra, ni ku maido ag'omu itaka n'ag'oku miti." 
Genesis43:12 Era mutwale empiiya dha mikuzi ebiri, mwizeeyo edho edhaizibwa mu minwa gy'ensawo dhaimwe. Baghanga okuba nga baadhiiza mu butali bugenderevu." 
Genesis43:13 Era mutwale ni muganda waimwe, mukole mwireyo eri omusaadha oyo." 
Genesis43:14 Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona abagemerwe ekivunika nga muli mu maiso g'omusaadha oyo, omusaadha oyo asobole okubairiza muganda waimwe owundi, ni Benjamini. Nze oba ndi wa kufiirwa baana bange, ndibafiirwa.”" 
Genesis43:15 Agho aboluganda baatwala ebirabo n'empiiya dha mikuzi ebiri, baasitula okuja e Misiri, nga bali ghalala ni Benjamini. Bwe baatuuka beeyandhula mu maiso ga Yosefu." 
Genesis43:16 Yosefu bweyabona nga Benjamini ali ghalala nabo, yaakoba omugheereza we ati: “Twala abasaadha bano mu ndhu yange, oite ensolo, kuba baja kuliira ghalala ninze eky'omusana.”" 
Genesis43:17 Omugheereza yaakola nga Yosefu bweyamulagira, yaatwala aboluganda mu ndhu ya Yosefu." 
Genesis43:18 Aboluganda baatya olw'okuba baatwalibwa mu ndhu ya Yosefu. Baakoba bati: “Batuleese muno olw'empiiya edhaizibwa mu nsawo dhaife ku mukuzi ogwasooka, olwo aghange okutuvunaana, era atuzinduukirize atunhageku endogoyi dhaife, era atufuule abairu be.”" 
Genesis43:19 Kale baaseeta eri omugheereza wa Yosefu, baayogera naye nga bali ku mulyango ogwingira mu ndhu." 
Genesis43:20 Baakoba bati: “Isebo, twaidhaku ghano okugula emere omukuzi ogwasooka." 
Genesis43:21 Bwe twatuuka agh'okusula nga tuli kwirayo eka, twasibula ensawo dhaife, twayagaana empiiya edha buli muntu nga dhiri mu munwa gw'ensawo ye dhoonadhoona nga bwe dhaali. Kale tudhiiziiza." 
Genesis43:22 Era tuleese n'empiiya edhindi okugula emere. Titwidhi yaiza mpiiya mu nsawo dhaife.” 
Genesis43:23 Omugheereza yaakoba ati: “Mulobe kweraliikirira era mulobe kutya. Katonda waimwe era Katonda wa iseimwe, ateekwa okuba nga n'eyabateera empiiya edho mu nsawo dhaimwe. Nze nafuna empiiya dhe mwasasula.” Agho yaabaleetera Simeoni." 
Genesis43:24 Omugheereza yaatwala aboluganda abo mu ndhu ya Yosefu, yaabagha amaadhi baanaabaku ku bigere, era yaagha endogoyi dhaibwe eby'okulya." 
Genesis43:25 Baategeka ebirabo eby'okugha Yosefu ng'aidhie ye bali ku saawa omukaaga edh'omusana, kuba baali babakobye bati baidha kulya naye eky'omusana." 
Genesis43:26 Yosefu bweyaira eka, baganda be baamuleetera mu ndhu ebirabo bye baali nabyo, era baamukubira amakiryaivu." 
Genesis43:27 Yaababuuza oba nga bali bukalamu. Era yaakoba ati: “Iseimwe omukaire ye mwankoberaku akaaliyo mulamu? Era aliyo bwera?” 
Genesis43:28 Bairamu bati: “Omugheereza wo iseife akaaliyo mulamu, era aliyo bukalamu.” Baamukubira amakiryaivu nga n'obweni butuuse ku itaka." 
Genesis43:29 Agho Yosefu bweyalinga ati yaabona muganda we Benjamini, omwana wa inhina, yaakoba ati: “Ono ni muganda waimwe asembayo obuto ye mwankoberaku.” Yaakoba Benjamini ati: “Katonda akugemerwe ekivunika, mwana wange!”" 
Genesis43:30 Yosefu yaavaagho mangu, kuba omwoyo gwe gwamulumira muganda we. Kale yanoonia gh'anaalirira amaziga. Agho yaingira mu kisenge kye yaalirira omwo." 
Genesis43:31 Bwe yamala okunaaba mu maiso, yaafuluma, yeegumya yaakoba ati: “Mwiwule emere.”" 
Genesis43:32 Yosefu baamwiwulira wawe yenka, ni baganda be baabaiwulira waibwe, era n'Abamisiri abaalya ku kiiwulo ekyo, boona baabaiwulira waibwe, kuba kyali kya muzizo eri Abamisiri okuliira aghalala n'Abaheburayi." 
Genesis43:33 Agho baatyamya aboluganda nga babalingiriiza Yosefu, era nga bwebairanganwaku okuva ku mukulu okutuuka ku asembayo obuto. Aboluganda bwe baabona ensambo ye babatyamiizaamu, baalingaganaku nga bwe beewuunhia." 
Genesis43:34 Yosefu yaabagheereza ebimegero okuva ku mere eyali mu maiso ge. Aye ekimegero kye yagha Benjamini kyasingaku ebya bale abandi obunene emikuzi etaanu. Kale baanhwa era baasagambira ghalala ni Yosefu. 
Genesis44:1 Agho Yosefu yaalagira omugheereza we ati: “Ta mu nsawo dh'abasaadha abo emere yoonayoona ye baghanga okwetwika, era ote empiiya dha buli muntu ku munwa gw'ensawo ye." 
Genesis44:2 Ta n'ekikopo kyange ekya feeza ku munwa gw'ensawo ey'oyo asembayo obuto, era oteemu n'empiiya dhe dh'aguziiza engaano.” Omugheereza yaakola nga Yosefu bw'amukobye." 
Genesis44:3 Bwe bwakya enkyo, aboluganda baasiibulwa nga bali n'endogoyi dhaibwe." 
Genesis44:4 Bwe baali baakatambulaku katono okuva mu kibuga, Yosefu yaakoba omugheereza we ati: “Situka obingirire abasaadha abo. Bw'onaabatuukaku, obakobe oti, ‘Lwaki ebirungi bye tubakoleire mubisaswiremu ebibi? Lwaki mwibye ekikopo kya musengwa wange ekya feeza?" 
Genesis44:5 Ekikopo ekyo musengwa wange ni ky'anhweramu era ni ky'akozesa ng'alagula. Kye mukoze kibi inho!’ ” 
Genesis44:6 Omugheereza bweyabatuukaku yaabakoba ebibono ebyo. 
Genesis44:7 Bairamu bati: “Isebo, kiki ekikwogeza ebibono ebiri ng'oti n'ebyo? Ife abagheereza bo titusobola kukola kintu kiri ng'oti n'ekyo." 
Genesis44:8 Oidhi bukalamu oti empiiya dhe twayagaana ku minwa gy'ensawo dhaife twadhikwiriza nga tuva mu nsi ey'e Kanaani. Kale twandiibye tutya feeza oba zaabu mu ndhu ya musengwa wo? 
Genesis44:9 Isebo, oyo yeenayeena, ku ife abagheereza bo, anaayagaanibwa nga n'ali nakyo, anaitibwa. Era n'ife abasigairegho tunaaba bairu bo.”" 
Genesis44:10 Yaakoba ati: “Kale kibe kityo nga bwe mukobye. Aye oyo anaayagaanibwa nakyo, n'anaaba omwiru wange imwe abandi timuubeeku musango.”" 
Genesis44:11 Agho baatwikula mangu ensawo dhaibwe, baadhiisa ghansi, buli muntu yaasibula ensawo ye." 
Genesis44:12 Omugheereza wa Yosefu yaaja ng'ayaza n'obwegendereza, ng'asookera ku asinga obukulu, yaamalira ku asembayo obuto. Yaayagaana ekikopo mu nsawo ya Benjamini." 
Genesis44:13 Agho aboluganda baakanulamu ebivaalo byaibwe olw'okunakughala, buli muntu yaatwika ebintu ku ndogoyi ye, bairayo mu kibuga." 
Genesis44:14 Yuda ni baganda be bwe baatuuka mu ndhu ya Yosefu, baayagaana ng'akaalimu, baakuba amakiryaivu mu maiso ge." 
Genesis44:15 Yosefu yaababuuza ati: “Kiki kino kye mukoze? Timwidhi muti omuntu ali mu kifo ng'oti n'ekyange aghanga okuzuula ebyama by'abantu ng'alagula?” 
Genesis44:16 Yuda yaakoba ati: “Tunaakukoba ki musengwa? Tunaayogera ki? Oba tunaawoza tutya? Katonda ayoleike nga gutusinze. Mpegaano tuli bairu bo, musengwa, ife era n'oyo ayagaaniibwa n'ekikopo.”" 
Genesis44:17 Aye Yosefu yaakoba ati: “Busa! Tisobola kukola kintu kiri ng'oti n'ekyo. Oyo yenka ayagaaniibwa n'ekikopo, n'anaaba omwiru wange. Aye imwe abandi mwireyo bwera eri iseimwe.”" 
Genesis44:18 Agho Yuda yaaja aghali Yosefu, yaakoba ati: “Musengwa wange, nkweghembye nganha, nze omwiru wo ndhogereku n'iwe. Otansungughalira, kuba oli ng'oti ni kyabazinga mwene." 
Genesis44:19 Musengwa wange, watubuuza ife abairu bo oti, ‘Muliyooku n'iseimwe oba muganda waimwe.’" 
Genesis44:20 Twakwiramu tuti, ‘Tuliyo n'iseife era nga mukaire, ni muganda waife omuto, eyazaalibwa nga iseife akairiighe. Muganda w'omwana oyo yafa, era oyo ni yenka asigairegho ku baana ba inhina, era ise amwenda inho.’" 
Genesis44:21 Agho, iwe waatukoba ife abairu bo oti, ‘Mumundeetere mmuboneku.’" 
Genesis44:22 Ife twakukoba, iwe musengwa wange, tuti, ‘Omwisuka tasobola kuva ghali ise, kuba bw'amuvaaku, ise aja kufa.’" 
Genesis44:23 Iwe waatukoba, ife abairu bo, oti, ‘Muganda waimwe asembayo obuto bw'ataliidha ghalala n'imwe, timwirangayo kwidha mu maiso gange kabiri.’”" 
Genesis44:24 “Bwe twairayo eri omugheereza wo iseife, twamukobera bye watukoba." 
Genesis44:25 Agho iseife oyo yaakoba ati: ‘Mwireyo mutugulireyo ku kamere.’” 
Genesis44:26 Ife twamwiramu tuti: “Titughanga kuja, kuba tibaja kutuganha kuja mu maiso ga musaadha ole, okutoolaku nga muganda waife oyo asembayo obuto ali ghalala n'ife. Aye muganda waife asembayo obuto bw'anaaja n'ife, agho tunaaja.”" 
Genesis44:27 Iseife oyo, omugheereza wo, yaatukoba ati: “Mwidhi nga mukazi wange Rakeli yanzaalira abaana abalenzi babiri bonka." 
Genesis44:28 Owundi yanvaaku, naakoba nti: oyo bwenebwene ensolo ey'omu nsiko yamukankanula. Kuba era tiirangayo kumubonaku okuva lwe yanvaaku." 
Genesis44:29 Bwe munantoolaku n'ono, memale akabi ni kamutuukaku, muliba mundeeteire obughafu obulindhita nze omukaire ati.”" 
Genesis44:30 “Kale, olw'okuba obulamu bwa iseife buli ghalala inho n'obw'omwisuka oyo, bwe ndiirayo eri iseife nga omwisuka tali ninze," 
Genesis44:31 olulituuka tuti, iseife n'abona ng'omwisuka tali n'ife, aja kufa bufe. Olwo ife abagheereza bo tuliba nga tuleeteire iseife omukaire atyo obughafu obulimwita." 
Genesis44:32 Ate era nze omugheereza wo neeyama eri lata wange, okukuuma omwisuka oyo, nga nkoba nti, ‘Bwe ntalimwiza y'oli, omusango gubanga ku nze enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwange.’" 
Genesis44:33 Kale ni musengwa wange, nkweghembye, nganha nze nsigale ghano nga ndi mwiru wo, mu kifo ky'omwisuka aye oleke omwisuka aireyo ni baganda be." 
Genesis44:34 Kuba ndituuka ntya eri lata wange, nga omwisuka tali ninze? Tisobola kuguma kubona akabi akalituuka ku lata wange.”" 
Genesis45:1 Agho Yosefu yaalemwa okwefuga mu maiso g'abagheereza be, yaalagira boonaboona bafulume bave gh'ali. Ghaaloba kusigalagho waire omulala ati, nga Yosefu yeeyoleka eri baganda be." 
Genesis45:2 Yaawowoola inho, n'Abamisiri baawulira, era n'ab'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga baakimanhaku." 
Genesis45:3 Yosefu yaakoba baganda be ati: “Ninze Yosefu! Lata wange akaali mulamu?” Aye baganda be baatya inho okubona nga beemereire mu maiso ge, era baaloba kusobola kumwiramu." 
Genesis45:4 Kale Yosefu yaakoba baganda be ati: “Mbeeghembye museete ghe ndi.” Bale baaseeta. Yabakoba ati: “Ninze Yosefu muganda waimwe, ye mwatunda e Misiri." 
Genesis45:5 Aye mutanakughala, waire okwesungughalira olw'okuba mwantunda eno, kuba Katonda n'eyansindika okubakulemberamu olw'okuwonia obulamu bw'abantu." 
Genesis45:6 “Endhala yaakamala mu nsi emyaka ebiri, ate ng'ekaasigaireyo emyaka egindi etaanu, abantu gye bataja kulimiramu, waire okukunguliramu." 
Genesis45:7 Katonda yansindika okubakulemberamu, mbafunire abo abaliwonagho ku nsi, era mponie abantu kamaala mu nsambo eyeewuunhisa." 
Genesis45:8 Kale ni ti niimwe mwansidika eno, aye Katonda n'eyansindika. Era yanfuula omukungu ow'oku ntwiko owa kyabazinga w'ensi eno, alabirira ebibye byonabyona, era omukulu afuga ensi yoonayoona ey'e Misiri." 
Genesis45:9 “Mperaano ni, mwangugheku, mwireyo eri lata wange, mumukobe muti omwana wo Yosefu akoba ati, ‘Katonda yanfuula omufuzi wa Misiri yoonayoona. Idha eno ye ndi era otalwa." 
Genesis45:10 Oidha kubanga mu nsi ey'e Gosheni, obenga kumpi ninze, iwe n'abaana bo, ni baidhukulu bo, n'entaama dho, n'embuzi dho, n'ente dho, era ni byonabyona by'oli nabyo." 
Genesis45:11 Ndidha kukulabiriranga ng'oli eyo, iwe n'ab'omu ndhu yo, ni byonabyona by'oli nabyo, mulobe kulambuka, kuba ekaasigaireyo emyaka egindi etaanu egy'endhala.’ ”" 
Genesis45:12 “Mpegaano imwe mwenamwena muli kubona, era n'iwe Benjamini oli kubona, nga ninze Yosefu mwenemwene ali kwogera n'imwe." 
Genesis45:13 Mukobere lata wange ekitiisa kyange kyonakyona kye ndi nakyo ghano mu Misiri, era ni byonabyona bye muboine. Mwangugheku, muleete lata wange ghano.”" 
Genesis45:14 Agho Yosefu yaagwa muganda we Benjamini mu kifuba, era yaalira amaziga. Benjamini yeena yaalira amaziga ng'amwevumbye." 
Genesis45:15 Yosefu yaagwa baganda be boonaboona mu bifuba, ng'ali kulira amaziga. Ebyo bwe byawa, baganda be baatoolera okughaya naye." 
Genesis45:16 Amawulire ag'okwidha kwa baganda ba Yosefu bwe gaatuuka mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, kyabazinga n'abakungu be baasangaala inho." 
Genesis45:17 Kyabazinga yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Koba baganda bo oti, ‘Mutwike ebintu ku nsolo dhaimwe, mwireyo mu nsi y'e Kanaani," 
Genesis45:18 mutooleyo iseimwe n'ab'omu maka gaimwe, mwidhe ye ndi. Ndidha kubagha eitaka erisinga bugimu mu Misiri, era munaalyanga ku birungi eby'omu nsi eno.’" 
Genesis45:19 Era balagire oti, ‘Mukole muti: Bwe munaaba nga muva ghano mu Misiri, muje n'ebigaali eby'okutambuliraku okwo kwe mulireetera abaana baimwe abato ni bakazi baimwe, era mwidhe n'iseimwe." 
Genesis45:20 Era ni bwemuliba nga muleseeyo ebintu byaimwe timweraliikiriranga, kuba ebintu ebisinga kuba birungi mu nsi eno Misiri yoonayoona biriba byaimwe.’ ”" 
Genesis45:21 Batabane ba Isiraeli baakola nga bwe baalagirwa. Yosefu yaabagha ebigaali eby'okutambuliraku nga kyabazinga bweyalagira. Era yaabagha n'eby'okuliira mu lugendo. 
Genesis45:22 Buli muntu ku boonaboona yaamugha ebivaalo ebiyaaka aye Benjamini yaamugha ebivaalo ebiyaaka bya mikuzi etaanu, era yaamugha n'ebitundu bya feeza ebikumi bisatu." 
Genesis45:23 Yaasindikira ise endogoyi ikumi edheetwise ebintu ebirungi eby'omu Misiri, n'endogoyi enkazi ikumi edheetwise engaano, n'emigaati, n'eby'okulya ebindi, ise by'aliriira mu lugendo." 
Genesis45:24 Agho yaasiibula baganda be, yaabakoba ati: “Mutasoolera mu ngira.”" 
Genesis45:25 Kale baava mu Misiri, baaja eri Yakobo iseibwe, mu nsi y'e Kanaani." 
Genesis45:26 Baamughayira bati: “Yosefu akaali mulamu, era n'afuga ensi yoonayoona ey'e Misiri.” Yakobo omwoyo gwamwezinduka era yaaloba kwikiriza kye bakoba." 
Genesis45:27 Aye bwe baamughayira ebyo byonabyona Yosefu bye yabakoba, era n'abona ebigaali eby'okutambuliraku Yosefu bye yasindika okumutwaliraku, yairamu omwoyo." 
Genesis45:28 Isiraeli yaakoba ati: “Mulekere agho, ebyo bye mukobye bimala omwana wange Yosefu akaali mulamu. Ndidha kuja mmuboneku nga nkaali kufa.”" 
Genesis46:1 Agho Isiraeli yaatoolera olugendo lwe ni byonabyona bye yali nabyo. Bweyatuuka e Beerisheba, yaaghaayo omusengo eri Katonda wa Isaaka ise." 
Genesis46:2 Katonda yaayogera ni Isiraeli oyo, nga amubonekeire obwire, yaakoba ati: “Yakobo, Yakobo!” Yakobo yaavugira ati: “Ndi ghano!”" 
Genesis46:3 Katonda yaakoba ati: “Ninze Katonda, Katonda oyo owa lata wo. Otatya kuja mu Misiri, kuba baidhukulu bo ndibafuulira eyo eighanga ery'amaani." 
Genesis46:4 Ndidha kuja n'iwe e Misiri, era ndiiza baidhukulu bo mu nsi eno. Era bw'olifa Yosefu aliba ng'aligho yaakuziika.”" 
Genesis46:5 Yakobo yaasitula okuva mu Beerisheba, batabane be baatoola mwene, n'abaana baibwe era ni bakazi baibwe, baabata ku bigaali eby'okutambuliraku kyabazinga ow'e Misiri bye yamusindikira." 
Genesis46:6 Era baatwala ensolo dhaibwe, n'ebintu byaibwe bye baafunira e Kanaani, baaja e Misiri. Yakobo yaaja n'eizaire lye lyonalyona:" 
Genesis46:7 batabane be, ni baghala be, ni baidhukulu be abalenzi n'abaghala." 
Genesis46:8 Gano n'amaina g'eizaire lya Yakobo ni batabane be abaaja e Misiri: Reubeni omwana omuberi owa Yakobo 
Genesis46:9 ni batabane ba Reubeni: Hanoka ni Pallu, ni Hezironi, ni Karumi." 
Genesis46:10 Simeoni ni batabane be bano: Yemueli, ni Yamini, ni Ohadi, ni Yakini, ni Zohara, ni Shaulo omwana w'omukazi Omukanaani." 
Genesis46:11 Levi ni batabane be bano: Gereshoni, ni Kohathi, ni Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Yuda ni batabane be bano: Eri, ni Onani, ni Shela, ni Perezi, ni Zera. Aye Eri ni Onani baafiira mu nsi y'e Kanaani. Batabane ba Perezi baali: Hezironi ni Hamuli." 
Genesis46:13 Issakari ni batabane be bano: Tola, ni Puva, ni Yobu, ni Shimuroni." 
Genesis46:14 Zebuluni ni batabane be bano: Seredi, ni Eloni, ni Yahaleeli." 
Genesis46:15 Abo ni batabane ba Leeya, be yazaalira Yakobo mu Paddanarama nga totaireeku mughala we Dina. Eizaire lyonalyona erya Yakobo eryasimuka mu Leeya baali abantu amakumi asatu na basatu." 
Genesis46:16 Gadi ni batabane be bano: Zifioni, ni Haggi, ni Shuni, ni Eziboni, ni Eri, ni Arodi, ni Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Asheri ni batabane be bano: Imuna, ni Ishiva, ni Ishivi, ni Beria, ni mwanhinaibwe Sera. Batabane ba Beria baali: Heberi ni Malakieli." 
Genesis46:18 Abo eikumi n'omukaaga, n'eizaire lya Yakobo eryasimuka mu Zilipa, omwiru omukazi, Labani ye yagha mughala we Leeya." 
Genesis46:19 Rakeli muka Yakobo, yazaalira Yakobo oyo abaana abalenzi babiri: Yosefu ni Benjamini." 
Genesis46:20 Yosefu ng'ali mu Misiri, Asenathi mughala wa Potifera kabona ow'e Oni, yamuzaalira abaana abalenzi babiri: Manasse ni Efuraimu." 
Genesis46:21 Batabane ba Benjamini baali: Bela, ni Bekeri, ni Ashibeli, ni Gera, ni Naamani, ni Ehi, ni Roshi, ni Muppimu, ni Huppimu, ni Aridi." 
Genesis46:22 Abo eikumi n'abana, n'eizaire lya Yakobo eryasimuka mu Rakeli." 
Genesis46:23 Dani yali ni mutabane we Hushimu. 
Genesis46:24 Batabane ba Nafutali baali: Yahazeeli, ni Guni, ni Yezeri, ni Shillemu." 
Genesis46:25 Abo omusanvu, n'eizaire lya Yakobo eryasimuka mu Biliha, omwiru omukazi, Labani ye yagha mughala we Rakeli." 
Genesis46:26 Eizaire lya Yakobo eryaja mu Misiri lyalimu abantu nkaaga na mukaaga (66), nga tobaliireeku baka batabane be." 
Genesis46:27 Batabane ba Yosefu abaamuzaalirwa mu Misiri, baali babiri. Abantu boonaboona ab'omu ndhu ya Yakobo abaaja mu Misiri, baali nsanvu." 
Genesis46:28 Yakobo yaatuma Yuda okumusookayo, aje eri Yosefu amukobe abaagaane e Gosheni. Baatuuka mu kiketezo eky'e Gosheni," 
Genesis46:29 Yosefu yaategeka ekigaali kye eky'omu lutalo, y'aja e Gosheni okwagaanana ni Isiraeli ise. Bwe baayagaanana, Yosefu yaagwa ise mu kifuba, era yaalira amaziga okumala entangama." 
Genesis46:30 Isiraeli yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Ni bwe nfa mpegaano tifaayo, kasita nkuboineku naamanha ng'okaali mulamu.”" 
Genesis46:31 Yosefu yaakoba baganda be n'ab'omu ndhu ya ise ati: “Ka nje mmanhise kyabazinga nti baganda bange, n'ab'omu ndhu ya lata wange abaabanga mu nsi y'e Kanaani, baidhie ye ndi." 
Genesis46:32 Ndidha kumukobera nti muli baayi, era nti muleese entaama dhaimwe, n'embuzi dhaimwe, n'ente dhaimwe, era n'ebyaimwe byonabyona bye muli nabyo." 
Genesis46:33 Kyabazinga bw'anaabeeta n'ababuuza ati, ‘Mukola mulimo ki.’" 
Genesis46:34 Munaamwiramu muti, ‘Ife abagheereza bo, tubaire baayi okuva mu buto bwaife n'okutuusa mpegaano, ng'oti ni badhaadha baife bwe baali’—olwo musobole okuba mu kiketezo ky'e Gosheni, kuba kya muzizo eri Abamisiri okuba aghalala n'abaayi.”" 
Genesis47:1 Agho Yosefu yaalonda bataanu ku baganda be, yaaja nabo eri kyabazinga, yaamukoba ati: “Lata wange ni baganda bange batuuse, nga bava mu nsi y'e Kanaani. Baidhie n'entaama n'embuzi n'ente dhaibwe, ni byonabyona bye bali nabyo. Era mpegaano bali mu kiketezo eky'e Gosheni.”" 
Genesis47:2 Yaayandhula baganda be abo eri kyabazinga. 
Genesis47:3 Kyabazinga yaababuuza ati: “Mukola mulimo ki?” Baamwiramu bati: “Ife abagheereza bo tuli baayi, ng'oti ni badhaadha baife bwe baali." 
Genesis47:4 Twidhie okusengaku mu nsi eno, kuba mu nsi y'e Kanaani endhala eriyo nnene, era ezira isubi lya kuliisa byayo byaife. Kale ni mpegaano, tukweghembye, tuganhe tube mu kiketezo eky'e Gosheni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Kyabazinga yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Mpegaano lata wo ni baganda bo nga bwe baidhie y'oli," 
Genesis47:6 ensi y'e Misiri eri agho. Bate aghasinga kuba ghalungi, babe mu kiketezo eky'e Gosheni. Era oba nga oidhi nga mu abo mulimu abali n'obusobozi, baghe okulabirira ebyayo byange.”" 
Genesis47:7 Agho Yosefu yaaleeta Yakobo ise, yaamwandhula eri kyabazinga. Yakobo yayendeza kyabazinga enkabi." 
Genesis47:8 Kyabazinga yaabuuza Yakobo ati: “Oli n'emyaka emeka egy'obukulu?” 
Genesis47:9 Yakobo yairamu ati: “Emyaka gye naakamala ku nsi, nga ntambulatambula ng'omusenze, giri kikumi n'asatu. Emyaka egyo gibaire mizibu era nga mitono, tigyaze na myaka emingi badhaadha bange gye baamala ku nsi nga batambulatambula ng'abasenze.”" 
Genesis47:10 Yakobo kabiri yaayendeza kyabazinga enkabi, yaavaagho." 
Genesis47:11 Agho Yosefu yaagha ise ni baganda be eitaka mu nsi y'e Misiri, baasenga aghasinga kuba ghalungi mu kiketezo ky'e Ramesesi, nga kyabazinga bweyalagira." 
Genesis47:12 Yosefu yaafuniranga ise ni baganda be era n'ab'omu maka ga ise boonaboona emere, ng'ajiira ku bantu buli muntu be yabanga nabo." 
Genesis47:13 Endhala yeeyongera okuluma einho, emere yaabula mu nsi yoonayoona. Abantu ab'omu Misiri n'ab'omu Kanaani baagoogomba olw'endhala." 
Genesis47:14 Yosefu yaasoloza empiiya dhoonadhoona edhaali mu nsi ey'e Misiri ni mu nsi ey'e Kanaani, ng'aguza abantu engaano. Empiiya edho yaadhita mu ndhu ya kyabazinga." 
Genesis47:15 Empiiya dhoonadhoona bwe dhaawaayo mu nsi y'e Misiri, ni mu nsi y'e Kanaani, Abamisiri boonaboona baidha eri Yosefu, baakoba bati: “Tughe emere tulobe kufa ng'olingiriire. Kuba empiiya dhituwoireku.”" 
Genesis47:16 Yosefu yaakoba ati: “Oba nga empiiya dhibawoireku, muleete ensolo dhaimwe mbagheemu emere.”" 
Genesis47:17 Kale baaleeta ensolo dhaibwe dhoonadhoona eri Yosefu: embalaasi, entaama, embuzi, ente, n'endogoyi. Yosefu yaabaghaamu emere omwaka ogwo." 
Genesis47:18 Omwaka ogwo bwe gwawaaku, baidha y'ali mu mwaka ogwairirira, baamukoba bati: “Titwidha kukugisa, isebo: empiiya dhaife dhoonadhoona dhaatuwaaku, n'ensolo dhaife twakugha ira. Titukaali na kintu kindi kya kukugha, isebo, okutoolaku okukwegha ife beene n'ebibandha byaife." 
Genesis47:19 Otatuleka kufa ng'olingiriire. Tugule, ife n'ebibandha byaife, otugheemu emere. Tunaabanga bairu ba kyabazinga, era n'ebibandha byaife binaabanga bibye. Tughe engaano ey'okulya n'ey'okusiga tulobe kufa, tulime ensi yaife erobe kuzika.”" 
Genesis47:20 Kale Yosefu yaagulira kyabazinga ensi yoonayoona ey'e Misiri. Kiisi Mumisiri yaatundamu ekibandha kye, kuba endhala yabaluma inho. Eitaka lyonalyona lyafuuka lya kyabazinga." 
Genesis47:21 Yosefu yaafuula abantu okuba abairu, okuva ku nsalosalo ya Misiri eyindi, okutuuka ku yindi." 
Genesis47:22 Eitaka lya bakabona ni lyonka ly'ataagula, kuba bakabona baali n'omugabo ogwaibwe kyabazinga gwe yabaghanga ogwababeesangagho, kye baava ni batatundamu itaka lyaibwe." 
Genesis47:23 Agho Yosefu yaakoba abantu ati: “Mubone, mpegaano nguliire kyabazinga eitaka lyaimwe, n'imwe mwena naabagula. Kale ensigo dhiidho dhe munaasiga." 
Genesis47:24 Mu biseera eby'amakungula, munaaghanga kyabazinga ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bitaanu eby'engaano. Ebitundu ebina ebisigairegho, n'ebinaabanga ebyaimwe eby'okusiga n'okulya, imwe beene ghalala n'ab'omu maka gaimwe.”" 
Genesis47:25 Baakoba bati: “Otuwoniiza okufa! Era isebo tuganhe tubenga bairu ba kyabazinga.” 
Genesis47:26 Kale Yosefu yaataagho eiteeka erikaaligho ni ye buli eno mu Misiri, ery'abantu okughanga kyabazinga ekitundu ekirala ekirala ku buli bitundu ebitaanu eby'amakungula. Eitaka lya bakabona lyonka n'eritaafuuka lya kyabazinga." 
Genesis47:27 Abaisiraeli baaba mu nsi y'e Misiri, mu kiketezo eky'e Gosheni. Baakombaghalira omwo, era baazaala abaana kamaala, beeyongera okwala." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobo yaamala emyaka ikumi na musanvu mu nsi y'e Misiri; kale yaaba ng'agheziiza emyaka kikumi n'ana na musanvu (147) egy'obukulu. 
Genesis47:29 Isiraeli bweyali ng'anaatera okufa, yaayeta omwana we Yosefu, yaamukoba ati: “Ngemerwa ekivunika, oleete omukono gwo okakase by'oja okulayira: layira oti tolinziika mu Misiri." 
Genesis47:30 Nhenda nziikibwe aghali badhaadha bange ontoolanga mu Misiri, wantwala wanziika mu kifo mwe baaziikibwa.” Yosefu yairamu ati: “Ndikola ntyo nga bw'okobye.”" 
Genesis47:31 Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Layira ng'oidha kukola otyo.” Yosefu yaalayira. Isiraeli yeebaliza ku buliri bwe. 
Genesis48:1 Ebyo nga bimaze okubaagho, Yosefu baamukobera bati: “Lata wo mulwaire.” Kale yaaja ni batabane be bombi, Manasse ni Efuraimu, okumubona." 
Genesis48:2 Bwe baakobera Yakobo bati: “Omwana wo Yosefu aidhie okukubona,” Yakobo yeekakabya, yaatyama ku buliri." 
Genesis48:3 Yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona yambonekera e Luzi mu nsi y'e Kanaani, yampa enkabi." 
Genesis48:4 Era yankoba ati, ‘Bona, ndikugha okuzaala abaana kamaala, baidhukulu bo naabafuula amaghanga kamaala. Era ndigha baidhukulu bo ensi eno, yaaba yaibwe ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Genesis48:5 Era mpegaano batabane bo bombi, abaakuzaalirwa eno mu nsi y'e Misiri, nga nkaali kwidha y'oli, bange. Efuraimu ni Manasse baidha kubanga batabane bange, ng'oti ni Reubeni ni Simeoni bwe bali." 
Genesis48:6 Abaana abandi b'olizaala ni baira ku bano, abo n'abaliba ababo, era obusika balibufunira ku baganda baibwe abo, Efuraimu ni Manasse." 
Genesis48:7 Kino nkikoze olwa inhoko Rakeli: bwe nali nga nva mu Paddani, yafiira ku ngira e Kanaani, nga ghakaasigaireyo entangama okutuuka mu Efurathi. Naamuziika eyo ku mbali kw'engira eja mu Efurathi, ekyo era nga ni Bethelehemu.’ ”" 
Genesis48:8 Isiraeli bweyabona batabane ba Yosefu, yaabuuza ati: “Bano ni baani?”" 
Genesis48:9 Yosefu yaira mu ise ati: “Bano n'abaana bange, Katonda be yampeera eno.” Isiraeli yaakoba ati: “Baleete ghe ndi, mbasabire enkabi.”" 
Genesis48:10 Amaiso ga Isiraeli gaali gaidhieku ekifu olw'okukairigha nga takaabona bukalamu. Kale Yosefu yaabaseesa gh'ali, yaabagwa mu kifuba, yaabeevumba." 
Genesis48:11 Isiraeli yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Nali tidhuuba nga ndiirayo kabiri okukubonaku. Aye mpegaano Katonda anganhie okubona ni ku baana bo!” 
Genesis48:12 Agho Yosefu yaabatoola ku makiryaivu ga Isiraeli, era yaakuba amakiryaivu n'obweni bwatuuka ku itaka." 
Genesis48:13 Yosefu yaagema abaana bombi: Efuraimu mu mukono gwe omusaadha, ku luuyi olw'omugooda olwa Isiraeli, ni Manasse mu mukono gwe omugooda, ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olwa Isiraeli. Agho yaabaseesa aghali ise." 
Genesis48:14 Aye Isiraeli yaagolola emikono gye ng'agigodye gyabitaganamu: omukono omusaadha yaaguta ku mutwe gwa Efuraimu omuto, ate omukono omugooda yaaguta ku mutwe gwa Manasse omwana omuberi." 
Genesis48:15 Agho yaasabira Yosefu enkabi, ng'akoba ati: “Katonda oyo, dhaadha wange Aburahamu ni lata wange Isaaka ye baagheerezanga; era Katonda oyo eyandabiriranga okuva mu buto bwange okutuusa mpegaano, aghe abaana bano enkabi." 
Genesis48:16 Katonda oyo eyatuma malaika n'amponia mu buli kabi koonakoona, abaghe enkabi. Eriina lyange n'erya dhaadha wange Aburahamu, n'erya lata wange Isaaka, gatuumibwenga mu baana baibwe. Bazaalenga abaana kamaala, era bafune abaidhukulu kamaala inho ku nsi.”" 
Genesis48:17 Yosefu bweyabona nga ise ataire omukono gwe omusaadha ku mutwe gwa Efuraimu, yaanakughala. Kale yaagema omukono gwa ise okugutoola ku mutwe gwa Efuraimu, okuguta ku mutwe gwa Manasse." 
Genesis48:18 Yosefu yaakoba ise ati: “Bbaaba otakola otyo, kuba ono ali ku mukono gwo omusaadha n'omwana omuberi. Ta omukono gwo omusaadha ku mutwe gwe.”" 
Genesis48:19 Aye ise yaaloba. Yaakoba ati: “Mwana wange, ekyo nkiidhi bukalamu. Baidhukulu ba Manasse boona balifuuka ighanga, era baliba bakologho. Aye muto we n'alimusinga obukologho, era baidhukulu be balifuuka amaghanga kamaala.”" 
Genesis48:20 Kale yaabasabira enkabi ku lunaku olwo, ng'akoba ati: “Abantu ab'omu Isiraeli baidha kusabiranga omuntu enkabi, nga bakozesa amaina gaimwe bati, ‘Katonda akufuule nga Efuraimu ni Manasse.’ ” Mu nsambo eyo Yakobo yaakulembeza Efuraimu, ate Manasse yaava einhuma." 
Genesis48:21 Agho Isiraeli yaakoba Yosefu ati: “Bona, ndi kumpi kufa, aye Katonda aidha kubanga n'imwe, era alibaizaayo mu nsi ya badhaadha baimwe." 
Genesis48:22 Era ekiketezo eky'e Shekemu ekigimu, kye natoola ku Bamori nga nwanisa empiima yange n'akalaso, nkighaire iwe, se ti baganda bo.”" 
Genesis49:1 Agho Yakobo yaayeta batabane be, yaakoba ati: “Mwidhe ghalala, mbakobere ebiribatuukaku ye bwidha." 
Genesis49:2 Mwesoloze imwe batabane ba Yakobo, muwulire iseimwe Isiraeli by'akoba." 
Genesis49:3 Reubeni, niiwe omwana wange omuberi, niiwe amaani gange; niiwe omwana omuberi ow'omu buvubuka bwange, asinga okuba omukologho era ow'amaani." 
Genesis49:4 Oli ng'oti n'amaadhi agali kwefuukuula. Aye toliba mukologho kusinga baino, kuba waba ni mukazi wange ow'embali waayonoona obuliri bwange." 
Genesis49:5 Simeoni ni Levi bafaanania ebidhuubo. Batoola eby'okulwanisa byaibwe, baakola ebikolwa eby'obukambwe." 
Genesis49:6 Tiryeyimba nabo mu ntegeka dhaibwe edh'okukola ebibi, waire okutyama nabo mu neekobaano dhaibwe; kuba mu busungu bwaibwe baita abasaadha, era mu iralu lyaibwe baatema ente ebigere." 
Genesis49:7 Obusungu bwaibwe bukolimirwe, kuba bwa kikambwe; n'ekiruyi kyaibwe kikolimirwe, kuba kikambwe. Ndibagabaniagabania mu Yakobo, ndibasansaaniza mu Isiraeli." 
Genesis49:8 Iwe Yuda, baganda bo banaakusaakanga. Abazigu bo onaabaghangulanga. Baganda bo banaakukubiranga amakiryaivu." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda oli ng'oti mpologoma nto: era mwana wange oize ng'ova okuyiiga. Okutaime, waabwama ng'oti mpologoma nsaadha, oba ng'oti mpologoma nkazi. Ghazira akana kukukobaku." 
Genesis49:10 Yuda n'anaagemanga omwigo ogw'obwakyabazinga, era baidhukulu be n'abanaafuganga, okutuusa mwene bwakyabazinga lw'aliidha. Era oyo abantu ye banaawuliranga." 
Genesis49:11 Aja yaasiba endogoyi ye ento mu isamba ly'emizabbibu, ku muzabbibu ogusinga bulungi. Yaayoza ebivaalo bye mu mwenge omumyufu ogw'emizabbibu." 
Genesis49:12 Amaiso ge gaidha kumumyukanga olw'okunhwa omwenge gw'emizabbibu; n'amaino ge ganaabanga meeru olw'okunhwa amata. 
Genesis49:13 Zebuluni aidha kubanga kumpi n'enhanda. Ku bukalu bwe n'okunaabanga omwalo gw'amaato. Ensalosalo ye eidha kubanga ku Sidoni. 
Genesis49:14 Issakari ali ng'oti ndogoyi ey'amaani, etyama mu bisibo by'entaama." 
Genesis49:15 Abona ng'ekifo ekiwuumulirwamu kirungi, era nga kyesiimisa; kale yaafunhamu omugongo gwe okwetwika, yaafuuka omwiru akakibwa okukola emirimo." 
Genesis49:16 Dani aneefugiranga abantu be, ng'oti n'ebika ebindi ebya Isiraeli." 
Genesis49:17 Dani aidha kubanga musota ogw'obusagwa ku ngira, ogumoodha embalaasi ebibbonge, ole agityaimeku n'awanuka n'agwa." 
Genesis49:18 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkuteegereire oidhe ondokole." 
Genesis49:19 Gadi alirumbibwa abanhazi, aye alibairirizaayo yaababingirira." 
Genesis49:20 Eitaka lya Asheri liidha kubanga igimu eribaza emere. Aidha kuleetanga eby'okulya ebisaanira kyabazinga. 
Genesis49:21 Nafutali ali ng'oti n'empongo erigita emisinde nga yeetaaya, era ezaala abaana baayo abalungi." 
Genesis49:22 Yosefu ali ng'oti n'omuti ogwama einho, oguli okumpi n'ensulo y'amaadhi, ng'ensaga dhaagwo dheeyandhaliire ghaigulu ku kimante." 
Genesis49:23 Abazigu be bamulumba n'obukambwe, baamulasa n'obulaso bwaibwe era baamukiriga." 
Genesis49:24 Aye akalaso ke kasigala nga kakaagumye, emikono gye gyagheebwa amaani agava eri ow'Obukumu Katonda wa Yakobo; Omwayi era Omukuumi wa Isiraeli." 
Genesis49:25 Oyo ni Katonda wa lata wo, era n'anaakubeeranga. Oyo n'Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, era n'anaakughanga enkabi n'ebirungi ebiva ghaigulu mu igulu, n'ebirungi ebiva ghansi mu itaka, n'enkabi edh'okuzaala abaana n'okwaza ebyayo." 
Genesis49:26 Enkabi dha lata wo dhisingira irala enkabi edh'oku nsozi edh'olubeerera, n'ebirungi eby'oku busozi obutawaagho. Enkabi edho dhibenga ku mutwe gwa Yosefu, ku bisige by'oyo eyayawulwa ku baganda be." 
Genesis49:27 Benjamini ali ng'oti n'omusege omuswankuzi. Enkyo alya by'ayiize, eigulo yaagabaniamu by'anhaze.”" 
Genesis49:28 Ebyo n'ebika eikumi n'ebibiri ebya Isiraeli, era ebyo n'ebibono iseibwe bye yabakoba, ng'ali kusabira buli muntu enkabi edhimujaamu." 
Genesis49:29 Agho Yakobo yaasikirira abaana be, yaabakoba ati: “Mpegaano nja kutwalibwa eri badhaadha bange. Munziikanga ghalala ni badhaadha bange, mu mpuku eri mu nimiro ya Efuroni Omuhitti," 
Genesis49:30 e Makipela, e buvandhuba bwa Mamure, mu Kanaani. Aburahamu yagula empuku eyo ghalala n'enimiro, ku Efuroni Omuhitti, ebenga ekifo eky'okuziikangamu." 
Genesis49:31 Omwo mwe baaziika Aburahamu ni Sara mukazi we, omwo mwe baaziika ni Isaaka ni mukazi we Rebekka, era omwo mwe naziika Leeya." 
Genesis49:32 Enimiro eyo n'empuku egirimu, byagulibwa ku Bahitti.”" 
Genesis49:33 Agho Yakobo bweyamala okusikirira abaana be, yaalambaala ku buliri, yaagheera omuuka gwe ogw'enkomerero, yaafa." 
Genesis50:1 Yosefu yeesuula ku ise nga bw'alira era yaamunhwegera. 
Genesis50:2 Yosefu yaalagira abagheereza be abayigha, okukaza omulambo gwa ise gulobe kuvunda. Abayigha baakola nga Yosefu bweyalagira." 
Genesis50:3 Baamala enaku amakumi ana nga bali kugukaza ekyo n'ekiseera kye baamalanga nga bali kukaza omulambo. Abamisiri baamala enaku nsanvu nga bamulira. 
Genesis50:4 Enaku edh'okulira bwe dhaawaaku, Yosefu yaakoba abakungu ba kyabazinga ati: “Mbeeghembye, munkobere kyabazinga," 
Genesis50:5 muti lata wange yandayiza ati, ‘Ndi kumpi kufa. Onziikanga mu magombe ge neesimira mu nsi Kanaani.’ Kale mpegaano nkweghembye, nganha nje nziike lata wange memale ndhire.”" 
Genesis50:6 Kyabazinga yairamu ati: “Kale ja oziike lata wo nga bweyakulayiza.” 
Genesis50:7 Agho Yosefu yaaja okuziika ise, n'abagheereza ba kyabazinga boonaboona, n'abakungu ab'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, n'abakungu abandi boonaboona ab'omu nsi Misiri." 
Genesis50:8 Era yaaja n'ab'omu ndhu ye boonaboona, ni baganda be, n'ab'omu ndhu ya lata we boonaboona. Abaana baibwe abato, n'entaama, n'embuzi, n'ente dhaibwe, ni byonka bye baaleka mu kiketezo ky'e Gosheni." 
Genesis50:9 Era ku baaja naye kwaliku n'abaali ku bigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'abaali bali kuvuga embalaasi; lyaba ikuukuubira inene inho." 
Genesis50:10 Bwe baatuuka mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano, eky'e Atadi e buvandhuba wa Yorudani, baakubira eyo empungu nhingi inho okumala ekiseera. Era Yosefu yaamala enaku musanvu ng'alira ise." 
Genesis50:11 Abantu abatyamye ab'omu Kanaani bwe baabona abantu abo, nga bali kulirira mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano eky'e Atadi, baakoba bati: “Abamisiri nga bali kulira inho amaziga!” Ekifo ekyo kye kyava kituumibwa eriina Abeli Miziraimu." 
Genesis50:12 Kale abaana ba Yakobo baakola nga mwene bweyabalagira. 
Genesis50:13 Baabbeeda omulambo gwe, baagutwala mu nsi Kanaani, baaguziika mu mpuku ey'omu nimiro ey'e Makipela e buvandhuba bwa Mamure. Empuku eyo Aburahamu yagigulira ghalala n'enimiro eyo ku Efuroni Omuhitti, ebenga ekifo eky'okuziikangamu." 
Genesis50:14 Yosefu bweyamala okuziika ise, yairayo mu Misiri ni baganda be, ni boonaboona be yaja nabo okuziika ise." 
Genesis50:15 Baganda ba Yosefu bwe baabona nga iseibwe amaze okufa, baakoba bati: “Tomanha Yosefu bw'atukyagha, ni yeesasuuza olw'ebibi bye twamukola!”" 
Genesis50:16 Kale baatumira Yosefu obukwenda obukoba buti: “Iseife bweyali ng'akaali kufa," 
Genesis50:17 yatukoba tukusabe osonighe omusango n'ebibi bya baganda bo, kuba bye baakukola bibi inho. Mpegaano tukweghembye, tusonighe ebibi bye twakukola, ife abagheereza ba Katonda wa lata wo.” Yosefu yaalira amaziga bwe baamukoba ebyo." 
Genesis50:18 Agho baganda be era baidha, baamukubira amakiryaivu, baakoba bati: “Bona, tuli ghano, tuli bairu bo.”" 
Genesis50:19 Aye Yosefu yaabakoba ati: “Mutatya, nze tighanga kweta mu kifo kya Katonda." 
Genesis50:20 Imwe mwayenda okunkola ekibi, aye Katonda yaayenda kiveemu ekirungi olw'okuwonia obulamu obw'abantu kamaala. Abantu abo bakaali balamu mpegaano, olw'ekyo ekyabaagho." 
Genesis50:21 Kale ni mutatya naire, ndidha kubalabiriranga imwe, n'abaana baimwe abato.” Yaabagumya atyo n'ebibono eby'ekisa." 
Genesis50:22 Yosefu yaabanga mu Misiri ghalala n'ab'endhu ya ise, yaaghangaala emyaka kikumi na ikumi (110)." 
Genesis50:23 Yaabona abaana n'abaidhukulu aba Efuraimu kamaala. Era yaalera ni ku baana ba Makiri mutabane wa Manasse. 
Genesis50:24 Agho Yosefu yaakoba baganda be ati: “Ndi kumpi okufa, aye Katonda taliroba kubalabirira n'okubatoola mu nsi eno, okubatwala mu nsi gye yalayirira Aburahamu, ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo.”" 
Genesis50:25 Agho Yosefu yaalayiza abaana ba Isiraeli ng'akoba ati: “Mulayire muti Katonda bw'alibatoola mu nsi eno, mulitwala amagumba gange.”" 
Genesis50:26 Kale ni, Yosefu yaafa ng'agheziiza emyaka egy'obukulu kikumi na ikumi (110). Baakaza omulambo gwe gulobe kuvunda, era baamuta mu sanduuku mu Misiri." 
Exodus1:1 Gano n'amaina aga batabane ba Yakobo be yaja nabo mu Misiri, nga buli muntu aja n'ab'omu maka ge:" 
Exodus1:2 Reubeni, Simeoni, Levi, Yuda," 
Exodus1:3 Issakari, Zebuluni, Benjamini," 
Exodus1:4 Dani, Nafutali, Gadi ni Ashera." 
Exodus1:5 Yosefu baamwagaanayo mu Misiri, kale abantu boonaboona abaali basimuka mu Yakobo baaba nsanvu." 
Exodus1:6 Agho ekiseera kyatuuka Yosefu, ni baganda be, n'abantu abandi ab'oluse olwo lwonalwona, baaba nga bafiire." 
Exodus1:7 Aye Abaisiraeli abo, abaana be baaleka baazaalagana inho era baaba ba maani agataloodheka, kumpi baidhuza Misiri yoonayoona." 
Exodus1:8 Agho omuntu ataamanha bya Yosefu yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Misiri. 
Exodus1:9 Yaakoba abantu be ati: “Bona eno, abantu bano Abaisiraeli bali kamaala inho ekibitiriire, era batusingira ghala amaani." 
Exodus1:10 Tuteekwa okubasalira amagezi aganaabasobola balobe kweyongera mu bungi, kuba bwe ghaidhagho olutalo basobola okweyimba ku bazigu baife, baatulwanisa era baalumuka mu Misiri.”" 
Exodus1:11 Kale baabataaku Abamisiri abaabasaliranga amakatala, baabakozesanga emirimo emikalangufu. Batyo Abaisiraeli baazimbira Kyabazinga wa Misiri ebyagi ebikologho eby'okuterekangamu emere mu bibuga Pithomu ni Raamusesi." 
Exodus1:12 Aye Abamisiri ye baakomya okutuntuza Abaisiraeli, n'Abaisiraeli boona ye baakomya okweyongera okuzaalagana n'okusansaanira mu biketezo ebindi ebya Misiri ye baali bakaali kutuuka. Abamisiri baakyagha Abaisiraeli era nga n'okubatya babatya." 
Exodus1:13 Kale baabakozesanga emirimo mu bukaluubirivu 
Exodus1:14 n'obulamu bwabakaayira. Baabakozesanga mu kuzimba, ni mu mirimo egindi gyonagyona egy'omu nimiro. Era nga tibabasaasiraku naire." 
Exodus1:15 Agho kyabazinga ow'e Misiri yaalagira Shifura era ni Pua abaali abazaalisa ab'abakazi Abaheburayi. 
Exodus1:16 Yaabakoba ati: “Bwe muzaalisanga omukazi Omuheburayi ni mubona ng'omwana y'azaire mulenzi mumwitanga, bw'abanga omughala oyo mumulekanga nga mulamu.”" 
Exodus1:17 Aye abazaalisa abo baatya Katonda, baaloba kukola ekyo kyabazinga ow'e Misiri kye yabalagira baalekanga abaana abalenzi boona nga tibabaise." 
Exodus1:18 Kyabazinga n'okubeeta n'ababuuza ati: “Lwaki mukoze ekyo ni muleka abaana abalenzi boona nga balamu?” 
Exodus1:19 Abazaalisa baamwiramu bati: “Abakazi Abaheburayi tibali ng'oti bakazi Bamisiri. Kuba bazira buzibu mu kuzaala, era bazaala ng'omuzaalisa akaali na kubatuukaku.”" 
Exodus1:20 Kale Katonda yaaba mulungi eri abazaalisa abo. Abaisiraeli baazaalagana, beeyongera okuba kamaala era n'okuba n'amaani." 
Exodus1:21 Era olw'okuba abazaalisa abo baali batya Katonda, Katonda yaabagha buli muntu okuba n'ab'omu maka ababe ku bubwe." 
Exodus1:22 Agho kyabazinga yaalagira abantu be boonaboona ati: “Musuulenga buli mwana mulenzi azaalibwa Abaheburayi mu mwiga Kiyira aye abaghala mubalekenga nga balamu.” 
Exodus2:1 Mu kiseera ekyo ghaabaagho omusaadha ow'ekika ekya Levi, yaafuna omukazi we nga wa mu kika kyene ekyo." 
Exodus2:2 Omukazi oyo yaatoola enda yaazaala omwana mulenzi. Bwe yabona nga omwana oyo mulungi inho mu mboneka, yaamugisa okumala emyezi esatu." 
Exodus2:3 Agho yaabona nga takaasobola kumugisa. N'okufunayo ekiibo ekyalukibwa mu bitoogo yaakimaalaku obulimbo okukirobera okudimira, yaamuta omwo. Bwe yamala, yaakita mu bitoogo ebyakulira ku mbali okw'omwiga." 
Exodus2:4 Mwanhina w'omwana oyo yaafuna aghantu nga gheeswireku akata okuva aghali omwana, yaaba agho, aghange okubona ekinaatuuka ku mwanhina oyo." 
Exodus2:5 Mperaano, mughala wa kyabazinga yaidha okunaaba mu mwiga. Abairu be abakazi baasigala nga batambulatambula ku mbali okw'omwiga. Yaja okubona, ng'abona ekiibo mu bitoogo ebyakulira ku mbali okw'omwiga yaatuma omwiru we omukazi yaakinona." 
Exodus2:6 Omumbeedha bweyakisandukula ati, yaabonamu omwana omulenzi. Omwana yali ali kulira. Omumbeedha oyo yaamugemerwa ekivunika era yaakoba ati: “Ono ateekwa okuba nga mwana wa Baheburayi.”" 
Exodus2:7 Mwanhina w'omwana yaakoba omumbeedha ati: “Nje nkwetere omukazi Omuheburayi ayonse omwana oyo?” 
Exodus2:8 Omumbeedha yaamwiramu ati: “Kale ja.” Omughala yaaja yaayeta inhina w'omwana mwenemwene. 
Exodus2:9 Bwe yatuuka omumbeedha yaamukoba ati: “Twala omwana ono omuunhonkeze, ndikugha empeera yo.” Kale omukazi yaatwala omwana yaatoolera okumwonsa," 
Exodus2:10 era bweyakula yaamwiriza omumbeedha mughala wa kyabazinga, oyo yaamufuula mwana we era yaamutuuma eriina Musa ati, “Kuba namutoola mu maadhi.”" 
Exodus2:11 Lwali lulala nga Musa amaze okukulira irala, yaafuluma mu kisaagaati yaaja okubona ku bantu be Abaheburayi. Bwe yatuuka yaalingirira yaabona engeri ye baabakakanga okukola emirimo emikalangufu. Era yaabona Omumisiri ng'ali kukuba owundi ku bantu be abo, ate nga Musa yeena yali Muheburayi." 
Exodus2:12 Agho yaalingalinga eno n'ere nga ghazira ali kumubona, yaita Omumisiri oyo, omulambo gwe yaagugisa mu musenho." 
Exodus2:13 Bwe yafuluma kabiri olunaku olwairirira, yaja okubona ng'ayagaana Abaheburayi babiri bali kulwana. Kyeyava n'abuuza ole eyali ali kufufunkiriza mwine ati: “Kale lwaki okuba Omuheburayi mwino?”" 
Exodus2:14 Ole yaamwiramu ati: “Koodhi naani eyakufuula omufuzi era omulamuzi waife? Oli kwenda kundhita ng'oti ni bwewaise Omumisiri idho?” Agho Musa yaatya inho ng'akoba mule ati: “Bwenebwene kye nakoze idho kyamanhiibwa.” 
Exodus2:15 Kyabazinga bweyakiwulira yaayenda aite Musa. Aye Musa yaamulumukaku, yaaja yaasenga mu nsi ey'e Midia. Yaatuukira ku nsulo yaatyama." 
Exodus2:16 Mperaano, kabona ow'e Midia yali ni baghala be musanvu, era boona baidha ku nsulo okwo okusena amaadhi baidhuze ebintu byaibwe ensolo mwe dhinhwera, baghange okunhwesa ebyayo bya lata waibwe." 
Exodus2:17 Ghaidhagho abaayi baafufunkiriza abaghala abo nga babalobera amaadhi. Aye Musa yaasituka yaababeera, yaagha ebyayo byaibwe amaadhi." 
Exodus2:18 Bwe bairayo ye lata waibwe Yethuro, yaababuuza ati: “Musoboire mutya okwira amangu mutyo olwaleero?”" 
Exodus2:19 Baamwiramu bati: “Ebaireyo omusaadha Omumisiri atuwoniiza abaayi ababaire bali kutulobera amaadhi, era yaatusenera n'amaadhi yaatugheera ebyayo byaife.”" 
Exodus2:20 Lata waibwe yaababuuza ati: “Memale ali gha? Lwaki mumuleseeyo? Muje mumwete alye ku mere.” 
Exodus2:21 Agho Musa yaabona ng'amaka ag'omusaadha oyo malungi ga kubaamu. Era omusaadha oyo yaamugha mughala we Zippori. 
Exodus2:22 Zippori yaazaalira Musa omwana omulenzi, Musa yaamutuuma Gereshomu, ng'akoba ati, “Kuba mmuzaire nga ndi musenze ghano mu nsi etali yange.”" 
Exodus2:23 Bwe ghaabitagho ekiseera ekireeyi, kyabazinga ow'e Misiri yaafa. Era mu kiseera ekyo ng'Abaisiraeli bali mu nnaku olw'okubakozesa ng'abairu. Era mu bulumi obwo nga balira n'enaku olw'okubula ow'okubayamba. Okulira kwaibwe okwo kwatuuka ku Katonda." 
Exodus2:24 Katonda yaawulira okulira kwaibwe, era yaidhukira endagaano ye ni Aburahamu, ni Isaaka era ni Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Katonda yaalingirira Abaisiraeli, yaamanha nga bali bubi, era yaabalumirwa." 
Exodus3:1 Agho Musa bweyali ng'ali kwaya ebyayo bya Yethuro mukoirume we eyamuzaaliranga mukazi we, era nga Yethuro oyo ni kabona w'e Midia, yabitambuza mu irungu e bugwandhuba yaabituusa ni ku lusozi lwa Katonda olwetebwa Horebu." 
Exodus3:2 Ghano malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaamubonekera mu lulimi olw'omuliro nga luva mu kisaka ghagati. Musa yaalingirira ekisaka nga kigemye omuliro aye nga tikiri kusiriira. 
Exodus3:3 Yaakoba mule ati: “Kino kyewuunhisa! Omuliro gwagema guti ekisaka, aye kyaloba kusiriira! Ka nseete mbone bukalamu.”" 
Exodus3:4 Musengwa Katonda bweyabona nga Musa ali kuseeta, yaamwetera ghagati mu kisaka ekyo ati: “Musa, Musa.” Musa yaavugira ati: “Ndi ghano.”" 
Exodus3:5 Katonda oyo yaamukoba ati: “Otayongera kuseeta. Toolamu engaito dho, kuba gh'oyemereire kifo kitukuvu.”" 
Exodus3:6 Era yeeyongera okumukoba ati: “Ninze Katonda wa lata wo, Katonda wa Aburahamu, Katonda wa Isaaka era Katonda wa Yakobo.” Musa yeeghemba mu maiso ng'ali kutya okulinga ku Katonda." 
Exodus3:7 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Mboine okudaazibwadaazibwa okw'abantu bange abali mu Misiri, era naawulira okulira kwe bandirira nga benda okubawonia abo Abamisiri ababasalira amakatala. Ndidhi obughafu bwe balimu," 
Exodus3:8 era n'okwika mbawonie Abamisiri, mbatoole mu nsi eyo, mbatwale mu nsi enene, engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala ensi omuli buti Abakanaani, Abahitti, Abamori, Abaperizzi, Abahivi, n'Abayebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Bwenebwene okulira okw'abantu bange Abaisiraeli kuntuuseeku, era naabona n'ensambo Abamisiri ye babatuntuzaamu." 
Exodus3:10 Ka nkutume ye kyabazinga ow'e Misiri otoole abantu bange abo mu Misiri.” 
Exodus3:11 Aye Musa yaakoba Katonda ati: “Katyo nze ninze ani, aja ye kyabazinga ow'e Misiri nti mbu kutoola Baisiraeli mu Misiri?”" 
Exodus3:12 Agho Katonda yaamusuubiza ati: “Ndidha kubanga n'iwe, era kano kalikubeera akamanhiso, okwoleka nga ninze nkutumye: bw'olimala okutoola abantu abo mu Misiri, mulinsinziza ku lusozi luno.”" 
Exodus3:13 Aye Musa yaakoba Katonda ati: “Bwe ndituuka ku Baisiraeli ni mbakoba nti, ‘Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe antumye ye muli,’ memale ni bambuuza bati, ‘Eriina lye naani?’ Ndibakoba ntya?”" 
Exodus3:14 Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “NDI OYO ALIGHO. Ekyo ky'obe oje okobe Abaisiraeli oti, ‘NDI antumye ye muli.’ ”" 
Exodus3:15 Era yaayongera okukoba Musa ati: “Ekyo ky'obe oje okobe Abaisiraeli oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe, Katonda wa Aburahamu, Katonda wa Isaaka era Katonda wa Yakobo, antumye ye muli’ eryo n'eriina lyange ebyanda n'ebyanda, era ntyo bwe ndidha okwetebwanga ense dhoonadhoona edhiriiragho." 
Exodus3:16 Ja oyete abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli beesoloze ghalala obakobe oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe, Katonda wa Aburahamu, owa Isaaka era owa Yakobo yambonekera yankoba ati mbalingiriire, naabona bye babakola mu Misiri." 
Exodus3:17 Era nsazeegho nti nja kubatoola mu kudaazibwadaazibwa kwe mulimu mu Misiri mbatwale mu nsi ey'Abakanaani, n'Abahitti, n'Abamori, n'Abaperizzi, n'Abahivi n'Abayebusi ensi engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala.’" 
Exodus3:18 Baidha kwikiriza ky'onaabakoba. Ng'olwo iwe n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu abo muja ye kyabazinga w'e Misiri nga mumukoba muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda, Katonda w'Abaheburayi yatweyolekera era buti tuli kukusaba otuleke tuje mu irungu nga tutambula olugendo olumala enaku eisatu, tugheereyo eyo omusengo eri Musengwa Katonda waife oyo.’" 
Exodus3:19 Nkiidhi bukalamu nti kyabazinga ow'e Misiri taidha kubaleka buleke muveeyo, okutoolaku ng'akakiibwa bukakibwe n'amaani agataloodheka." 
Exodus3:20 Kale nja kukozesa amaani gange mbonereze Misiri nga ngisindikira ebintu ebitiisa era ebyewuunhisa. Oluvainhuma lw'ebyo kyabazinga alibaleka mwavaayo. 
Exodus3:21 Era ndidha kuleetera Abamisiri okutya Abaisiraeli, Abaisiraeli abo balobe kuva mu Misiri na ngalo ndhereere." 
Exodus3:22 Kiisi mukazi Muisiraeli alisaba muliraanwa we Omumisiri, na kiisi mukazi aliba ng'asula mu ndhu eyo, baamugha ebintu ebyakolebwa mu feeza, ni mu zaabu, era n'ebivaalo. Ebintu ebyo mulibitwika batabane baimwe ni baghala baimwe. Mu nsambo ng'oti n'eyo, mulitwala eby'obukombe eby'Abamisiri mu magezi.”" 
Exodus4:1 Agho Musa yairamu Musengwa Katonda ati: “Aye bona eno, tibaja kundhikiriza waire okuwulirisa bye ndiba ndi kubakoba. Kuba balikoba bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda tiyakubonekera?’”" 
Exodus4:2 Musengwa Katonda n'okumubuuza ati: “Kiki ekyo ekikuli mu ngalo?” Musa yaamwiramu ati: “Mwigo.” 
Exodus4:3 Yaamukoba ati: “Gusuule ghansi.” Musa yaagusuula ghansi, gwafuukamu omusota yaagulumuka." 
Exodus4:4 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Kola omukono ogugeme omukira.” Yeena yaakola atyo yaagugema omukira era gwafuuka mwigo kabiri nga gumuli mu ngalo. 
Exodus4:5 Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Otyo bw'olikola, baakakasa nti nze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe, Katonda wa Aburahamu, Katonda wa Isaaka, era Katonda wa Yakobo, nakubonekera.”" 
Exodus4:6 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Ingiza omukono gwo mu kanzu yo.” Era Musa yaakola atyo. Yaja okugutoolamu nga gwidhieku ebigenge era nga gweruukiriire ng'oti mugozi. 
Exodus4:7 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Ingiza kabiri omukono gwo mu kanzu yo.” Musa yaingiza omukono gwe mu kanzu, mu kugutoolamu yaja okubona nga gwizeegho, nga guli ng'oti n'omubiri gwe ogundi gwonagwona." 
Exodus4:8 Era yaamukoba ati: “Bwe batalikwikiriza oba okukuwulirisa olw'akamanhiso akasooka, balikwikiriza olw'ako akairaku." 
Exodus4:9 Bwe batalikwikiriza oba okukuwulirisa waire ng'omaze okukola obumanhiso obwo bwombi, olisena amaadhi mu mwiga Kiyira waagafuka ghansi ku itaka eikalu. Amaadhi ago galifuuka musaayi ku itaka eryo eikalu.”" 
Exodus4:10 Aye Musa yaakoba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, tibangaku mwogezi mulungi okuva eira n'eira. Waire ni mperaano kasookanga otoolera okwogera ninze, nkaali kufuuka mwogezi mulungi. Ndhogera mpola ng'ebigambo ndowoolereza bulowoolereze.”" 
Exodus4:11 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaamubuuza ati: “Naani eyata ku muntu omunwa? Era naani asobola okumufuula kasiru oba omusigha oba abona, oba omutulu? Ti ninze, nze Musengwa Katonda?" 
Exodus4:12 Mperaano ni ja, nze mwene ndikozesa omunwa gwo, era ndikugha eby'okwogera.”" 
Exodus4:13 Aye Musa yairamu ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghembye tuma omuntu owundi.”" 
Exodus4:14 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaasungughalira Musa, yaamukoba ati: “Aaroni muganda wo Omulevi azirayo? Ndidhi nti oyo asobola okwogera obukalamu bwene. Era, bona eno, ali kwidha y'oli, era bw'anaakubona aidha kusangaala." 
Exodus4:15 Oidha kwogera naye omukobere eby'okukoba, era nze mwene ndiba n'iwe naakugalagira eby'okukoba. Era yeena ndiba naye naamugalagira yeena eby'okukoba era ndibagalagira mwembi eky'okukola." 
Exodus4:16 Oyo alikwogereragho eri abantu ng'ali ng'oti n'omunwa gwo. Ate iwe oliba ng'oti Katonda y'ali ng'omukobera eby'okukoba. 
Exodus4:17 Era oidha kuja n'omwigo ogwo gw'oli nagwo mu ngalo, ni gw'olikozesa obumanhiso obwo.”" 
Exodus4:18 Agho Musa yairayo eka ye Yethuro mukoirume we eyamuzaaliranga mukazi we, yaamukoba ati: “Nkusaba ondeke ndhireyo e Misiri y'ab'eighanga lyange, mbone oba nga bakaali balamu.” Yethuro yaamwiramu ati: “Tuuka bukalamu.”" 
Exodus4:19 Musa bweyali ng'akaali mu Midia, Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Irayo e Misiri, kuba abantu boonaboona abaayendanga okukwita baafa.”" 
Exodus4:20 Musa yaata mukazi we ni batabane be ku ndogoyi, baaja e Misiri, nga mwene agemye omwigo Katonda gwe yamukoba okuja nagwo." 
Exodus4:21 Era Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Bw'otuuka e Misiri bona nti okolera mu maiso ga kyabazinga ebyewuunhio byonabyona nga bwendi kukugha obukumu okubikola, aye nja kukalangusa omwoyo gwe alobe kutya, era alobe kuleka bantu bange kuvaayo." 
Exodus4:22 Era oidha kukoba kyabazinga oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda ati bw'akoba: Isiraeli n'omwana wange omuberi," 
Exodus4:23 era ndi kukukoba nti leka omwana wange oyo aje ampeereze. Aye bw'onaaloba okumuleka ndidha kwita mutabane wo omuberi.’ ” 
Exodus4:24 Bwe baali nga bali mu lugendo, baatuuka aghantu agh'okusula, baasula agho. Musengwa Katonda yaayagaana agho Musa yaayenda okumwita." 
Exodus4:25 Agho Zippori yaatoola akambe akoogi yaakeketa mutabane we, yaatoola akawutu k'akekeite ku mwana oyo, yaakabisa ku bigere bya Musa ng'akoba ati: “Bwenebwene ye ndi oli baze wa musaayi.”" 
Exodus4:26 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaaleka Musa. Era olwo ni lwonka Zippori lwe yakoba ati: “Oli baze wa musaayi.” Era yakikoba olw'okukeketa kwe yakeketa omwana we. 
Exodus4:27 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Aaroni ati: “Ja mu irungu osangaaze Musa.” Kale yaaja yaayagaana Musa ng'ali ku lusozi lwa Katonda. Era bweyamwagaana yaamugwa mu kifuba. 
Exodus4:28 Agho Musa yaakobera Aaroni ebibono byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yamutuma okumukobera, n'obumanhiso bwonabwona bwe yamulagira okukola." 
Exodus4:29 Bwe baamala Musa ni Aaroni baaja baayeta abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli beesoloza. 
Exodus4:30 Aaroni yaabakobera ebibono byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yayogera ni Musa, era yaabakolera obumanhiso boonaboona nga babona." 
Exodus4:31 Agho abakulu ab'ebikunsu abo baikiriza, era bwe baawulira nga Musengwa Katonda bweyabalumirwa ng'aboine okudaazibwadaazibwa kwaibwe, baakuba amakiryaivu baamusinza." 
Exodus5:1 Ebyo nga biwoire, Musa ni Aaroni baaja ye kyabazinga ow'e Misiri baamukoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, leka abantu be baje mu irungu bakolere eyo ekibinuko eky'okumusinza.”" 
Exodus5:2 Aye kyabazinga yaabakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda naani, ye ndi n'okuwulira era ni ndeka Abaisiraeli okuja? Nze tiidhi Musengwa Katonda oyo, era tiidha kuleka Baisiraeli kuva ghano.”" 
Exodus5:3 Baamukobera bati: “Katonda ow'Abaheburayi yatweyolekera era buti tuli kukusaba otuleke tuje mu irungu nga tutambula olugendo olumala enaku eisatu, tugheereyo eyo omusengo eri Musengwa Katonda waife oyo; kuba bwe tutakola tutyo asobola okutusindikira obulwaire obubi, oba okutusindikira olutalo baatwita baatumalagho.”" 
Exodus5:4 Aye kyabazinga yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni ati: “Lwaki muli kwenda okutoola abantu ku mirimo gyaibwe? Muje mukole gye muteekwa okukola.” 
Exodus5:5 Era kyabazinga yaakoba ati: “Mubona abantu abagheze obwaga agho mu nsi, nga kabiri mwenda kubawuumuza baleke agho emirimo gye bateekwa okukola!”" 
Exodus5:6 Ku lunaku lwene olwo kyabazinga yaalagira Abamisiri abaasalanga amakatala, n'Abaisiraeli abaakakanga banaibwe emirimo" 
Exodus5:7 yaabakoba ati: “Okuva n'olwaleero mulekere agho okufuniranga abantu eisubi ery'okukozesanga amatoofaali nga bwemubaire nga mukola. Mubasindike baje balyesololeze beene. 
Exodus5:8 Aye ate mutakendeeza ku mughendo gwa matoofaali ge bali n'okuwumba buli lunaku. Kuba bakongoze tibenda kukola, kyebava ni baba agho nga bansiniriza bati, ‘Tuleke tuje tugheeyo omusengo eri Katonda waife.’" 
Exodus5:9 Abantu abo mubongere emirimo emikalangufu babe nga bakola inho, babule ekiseera eky'okuwulirisa eby'obuguya.”" 
Exodus5:10 Kale Abamisiri abaasalanga amakatala, n'Abaisiraeli abaakakanga banaibwe emirimo, baaja baakobera abantu bati: “Kyabazinga akobye ati takaabafunira isubi." 
Exodus5:11 Muje beene, mufune eisubi lyaimwe woonawoona ghe musobola okulifuna. Ate omughendo ogw'amatoofaali ge muli n'okuwumba buli lunaku tigukendeireeku naire.”" 
Exodus5:12 Kale abantu baasaatuukira mu biketezo byonabyona ebya Misiri nga baagala eisubi. 
Exodus5:13 Abamisiri abaasalanga amakatala, nga babadeeba buli kaseera bati: “Mumaleyo omughendo ogw'amatoofaali aga buli lunaku agaabasalirwa, nga bwe mwakolanga nga babafunira eisubi.”" 
Exodus5:14 Era baagwa ku Baisiraeli be baataagho okukaka banaibwe emirimo baabakuba nga bababuuza bati: “Lwaki omughendo ogw'amatoofaali ge muli n'okuwumba buli lunaku tiguwoireeyo olwaleero?” 
Exodus5:15 Agho Abaisiraeli abaakakanga banaibwe emirimo baaja, baalirira kyabazinga bati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, lwaki obisa otyo abairu bo?" 
Exodus5:16 Tibakaatugha isubi, aye ate baatukaka okukuba amatoofaali. Era bona eno, abairu bo tukubwa inho ate nga omusango guli ku bantu bo beene.”" 
Exodus5:17 Aye yaabairamu ati: “Muli bakongoze timwenda kukola. Era kye muva ni munsiniriza muti, ‘Tuleke tuje tugheeyo omusengo eri Musengwa Katonda waife.’" 
Exodus5:18 Muje mukole! Ghazira isubi lija kubagheebwa. Ate muteekwa okuwumba amatoofaali mu bungi obwabuliidho ng'eira.” 
Exodus5:19 Abaisiraeli abaakakanga banaibwe emirimo baabona nga batuuse ku budaaga okukobwa bati, “Mu buli ngeri timukendeeza ku bungi bwa matoofaali ge mubairenga nga muwumba buli lunaku okuva einhuma ere.”" 
Exodus5:20 Bwe baali bava ye kyabazinga baayagaana Musa ni Aaroni abaali agho nga babateegereire," 
Exodus5:21 baabakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda aboine kye mukoze, era aidha kubasalira omusango gubasinge! Kuba mutuleeteire okukyayibwa kyabazinga n'abakungu be, era mwabaleetera okuba n'ensonga ye banaavangaku okutwita.”" 
Exodus5:22 Agho Musa yaira ye Musengwa Katonda yaasaba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, lwaki oleese obuzibu ku bantu bano? Lwaki wantuma nze." 
Exodus5:23 Kuba kasookanga ndidha kwogera ni kyabazinga mu liina lyo, kyabazinga oyo atuusiiza ku bantu bano obuzibu kamaala, aye iwe waaloba kubatoola mu buzibu obwo.”" 
Exodus6:1 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Buti oja kubona kye nja okukola kyabazinga oyo, kuba aja kukakibwa bukakibwe na maani abakobe baje bwenebwene olw'okukakibwa okwo aja na kubabinga bubinge bave mu nsi ye.”" 
Exodus6:2 Agho Katonda yaayogera ni Musa, yaamukoba ati: “Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus6:3 Nabonekera Aburahamu ni Isaaka era ni Yakobo nga Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona aye tibeeyolekerangaku nga nkozesa eriina lyange eitukuvu erya Musengwa Katonda. 
Exodus6:4 Era nakola nabo endagaano okubagha ekiketezo eky'e Kanaani, ekiketezo mwe baabanga ng'abasenze." 
Exodus6:5 Ate ekindi naawulira okulira okw'Abaisiraeli, Abamisiri be baafuula abairu, naidhukira endagaano yange." 
Exodus6:6 Agho ni, kobera Abaisiraeli oti, ‘Ninze Musengwa Katonda, era ndidha kubatwikula emirimo emikalangufu Abamisiri gye babakaka okukola. Nja kugolola omukono gwange ogw'amaani, mbonereze Abamisiri n'ebibonerezo ebikakali, mbanunule imwe era mbawonie okuba abairu baibwe." 
Exodus6:7 Ndidha kubafuula bantu bange, era nze mbenga Katonda waimwe. Olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, nga mbatwikwire emirimo emikalangufu Abamisiri gye babakaka okukola."
