Exodus6:8 Era ndidha kubatwala mu nsi ye nalayira okugha Aburahamu, Isaaka ni Yakobo. Ensi eyo nja kugibagha imwe, ebe yaimwe ku bwaimwe. Ninze Musengwa Katonda.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 Musa yaakobera atyo Abaisiraeli aye baaloba kumuwulirisa, kuba okukozesebwa obwiru n'obukambwe byali byabamalamu amaani n'eisuubi." 
Exodus6:10 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus6:11 “Ja ye kyabazinga ow'e Misiri omukobe aleke Abaisiraeli bave mu nsi ye.” 
Exodus6:12 Aye Musa yairamu Musengwa Katonda ati: “Bona eno, ate oba nga Abaisiraeli tibampuliriisa, memale kyabazinga anampulirisa atya? Nze tiri mwogezi mulungi.”" 
Exodus6:13 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaagha Musa ni Aaroni ekiragiro, okutwalira Abaisiraeli ni kyabazinga ow'e Misiri, nga kya kutoola Abaisiraeli mu Misiri." 
Exodus6:14 Reubeni mutabane wa Yakobo omukulu yali n'abaana bano: Hamoki, Pallu, Hezironi, ni Karumi. Buli muntu ku abo yavaamu ekika. Edho n'enda edhaasimuka mu Reubeni." 
Exodus6:15 Simeoni yazaala abaana mukaaga era nga ni bano: Yemueli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Zohara ni Shaulo omwana w'omukazi Omukanaani. Edho n'enda edhaasimuka mu Simeoni." 
Exodus6:16 Levi yazaala abaana basatu era nga ni bano ng'ojiira ku nse dhaibwe: Gereshoni, Kohathi ni Merari. Era Levi oyo yaaghangaala emyaka kikumi n'asatu na musanvu (137)." 
Exodus6:17 Gereshoni yazaala abana babiri era nga ni bano ng'ojiira ku nda dhaibwe, Libuni ni Shimei." 
Exodus6:18 Kohathi yazaala abaana bana era nga ni bano: Amarama, Izahara, Heburoni ni Uzzieli. Era yaaghangaala emyaka kikumi n'asatu n'esatu (133)." 
Exodus6:19 Merari yazaala abaana babiri era nga ni bano: Mahali ni Mushi. Abo boonaboona baaba nga n'enda edhaasimuka mu Levi okujiira ku nse dhaibwe. 
Exodus6:20 Amuramu mu kufuna omukazi, yafuna songa we nga bamweta Yokebeda era baazaala abaana abalenzi bano: Aaroni ni Musa. Era yaaghangaala emyaka kikumi n'asatu na musanvu (137)." 
Exodus6:21 Izahara yazaala abaana basatu era nga ni bano: Kora, Nefega ni Zikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Uzzieli yeena yaazaala abaana basatu era nga ni bano: Mishaeli, Elizafani ni Sithiri." 
Exodus6:23 Aaroni yaafuna omukazi nga bamweta Elisheba, mughala wa Amminadabu era nga mwanhina Nahashoni. Baazaala abaana era nga ni bano: Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazari ni Ithamari." 
Exodus6:24 Kora yazaala abaana basatu: Assiri, Elukana ni Abiasafu; edho nga n'enda edhaasimuka mu Kora." 
Exodus6:25 Eleazari mutabane wa Aaroni yaafuna omukazi ku baghala ba Putieli, baazaala omwana baamutuuma eriina Finehasi. Edho n'enda edhaasimuka mu Levi era abo n'abakulu baadho." 
Exodus6:26 Aaroni oyo ni Musa, Musengwa Katonda ni be yakoba okutoola Abaisiraeli mu Misiri nga babatoolayo mu bikunsu bikunsu." 
Exodus6:27 Era ni beene abo abaayogera ni kyabazinga ow'e Misiri ku ky'okutoola Abaisiraeli mu Misiri. 
Exodus6:28 Ku lunaku Musengwa Katonda lwe yayogera ni Musa mu Misiri," 
Exodus6:29 Musengwa Katonda oyo yakoba Musa ati: “Ninze Musengwa Katonda. Kobera kyabazinga ow'e Misiri, byonabyona bye nkukoba.”" 
Exodus6:30 Aye Musa yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, okiidhi bukalamu nga nze tiri mwogezi mulungi. Memale kyabazinga anampulirisa atya?”" 
Exodus7:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Bona, nja kukufuula obe ng'oti oli Katonda ye kyabazinga, ate Aaroni muganda wo abe ng'oti mulanzi wo." 
Exodus7:2 Bye nkukoba byonabyona bikobere Aaroni. Aaroni akobe kyabazinga aleke Abaisiraeli baje, bave mu nsi ye." 
Exodus7:3 Aye nja kukalangusa omwoyo gwe alobe kutya, waire nga ndikola obumanhiso n'ebyewuunhio emikuzi egigheraku mu Misiri." 
Exodus7:4 Ndidhi nti taja kuwulira agho ni, ndita ku Misiri omukono gwange ogw'amaani era naatoolayo abantu bange Abaisiraeli mu bikunsu, nga mmaze okubonereza Misiri n'ebintu ebitiisa." 
Exodus7:5 Ku lunaku olwo lwe ndigolola omukono gwange ni nkuba Abamisiri, era ni mbatoolamu abantu bange Abaisiraeli, Abamisiri abo lwe balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Exodus7:6 Musa ni Aaroni baakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyabalagira. 
Exodus7:7 Musa yali agheza emyaka kinaana egy'obukulu, ate Aaroni ng'agheza kinaana n'esatu, mu kiseera ghe baayogerera ni kyabazinga." 
Exodus7:8 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni 
Exodus7:9 ati: “Kyabazinga bw'alibakoba ati, ‘Okukakasa kye mukoba mukoleyo ekyewuunhio,’ olikoba Aaroni oti, ‘Toola omwigo gwo ogusuule ghansi agho mu maiso ga kyabazinga gufuuke omusota.’ ”" 
Exodus7:10 Kale Musa ni Aaroni baaja ye kyabazinga, baakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyabalagira. Aaroni yaasuula omwigo gwe ghansi mu maiso ga kyabazinga n'abakungu be, gwafuuka omusota." 
Exodus7:11 Agho kyabazinga yaayetesa abasaadha be abagezigezi n'abalogo, boona baakozesa obulogo bwaibwe baakola ekintu n'ekirala." 
Exodus7:12 Kuba buli muntu ku abo yasuula omwigo gwe ghansi, era gyonagyona gyafuuka emisota. Aye omwigo gwa Aaroni gwamira egyaibwe gyonagyona." 
Exodus7:13 Aye era omwoyo gwa kyabazinga gwasigala nga mukalangufu, yaaloba kutya era yaaloba kuwulira nga Musengwa Katonda bweyakoba." 
Exodus7:14 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Omwoyo gwa kyabazinga mukalangufu era taidha kuleka bantu baje. 
Exodus7:15 Kale ja ye kyabazinga oyo ku nkyo, omuteege ng'ali kuja ku mwiga, agho nga ku mbali kwa gwo. Ja ng'ogemye omwigo gule ogwafuukaku omusota," 
Exodus7:16 omukobe oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda, Katonda ow'Abaheburayi yantuma y'oli, yaakukoba oleke abantu be baje mu irungu bamusinzize eyo, aye ni ye buli eno okaadheemye okuwulira.’" 
Exodus7:17 Buti ni, Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Kino kye nja okukola kw'onaamanhira nga ninze Musengwa Katonda: nja kukuba ku ngulu ku maadhi ag'omwiga Kiyira n'omwigo guno gwe ndi nagwo mu ngalo, era amaadhi ago gaja kufuuka musaayi." 
Exodus7:18 Ebyenhandha bija kufa era omwiga Kiyira guja kuduuka ekiwunha ekinene ng'Abamisiri tibasobola na kunhwa maadhi gaamu.’ ” 
Exodus7:19 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Koba Aaroni oti, ‘Toola omwigo gwo ogololere omukono gwo ku bifo mu Misiri byonabyona ebibaamu amaadhi bino: emiiga, emyala, ebibali n'ebidiba amaadhi gaamu goonagoona gafuuke musaayi. Era ghaja kuba omusaayi mu nsi Misiri yoonayoona, waire ni mu bintu ebiterekebwamu amaadhi.’ ”" 
Exodus7:20 Agho Musa ni Aaroni baakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyabalagira, nga kyabazinga n'abakungu be babona. Yaaghanika omwigo, yaakuba amaadhi agaali mu mwiga Kiyira, era amaadhi ago goonagoona gaafuuka musaayi." 
Exodus7:21 Ebyenhandha ebyali mu mwiga Kiyira byafa era omwiga ogwo gwaduuka ekiwunha ekinene ng'Abamisiri tibaghanga na kunhwa maadhi gaamu. Buli ghantu mu Misiri nga ghaidhwire bwa musaayi. 
Exodus7:22 Aye abalogo ab'omu Misiri boona baakola ekintu n'ekirala ekyo nga bakozesa eirogo lyaibwe kale omwoyo gwa kyabazinga gwasigala nga mukalangufu, yaaloba kuwulira, era nga Musengwa Katonda bweyakoba." 
Exodus7:23 Agho Kyabazinga yaakyuka yairayo mu ndhu ye. Ebyo ebyaligho byonabyona yaaloba kubitwala ng'ekikulu mu mwoyo gwe. 
Exodus7:24 Abamisiri boonaboona baaja nga basimasima agho okumpi ni Kiyira okufuna amaadhi ag'okunhwa, kuba baali nga tibasobola kunhwa maadhi gava mu Kiyira omwo." 
Exodus7:25 Ekyo kyaba kityo okumala enaku musanvu okuva Musengwa Katonda lwe yakuba omwiga Kiyira. 
Exodus8:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Ja oingire mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga omukobe oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Leka abantu bange baje bansinze." 
Exodus8:2 Bw'oloba okubaleka okuja, ndidha kubonereza ensi yo nga ngisindikira ebikere." 
Exodus8:3 Omwiga Kiyira gwidha kwidhula ebikere kamaala bituuke n'okwingira mu ndhu yo, ni mu kisenge y'osula, bituumire ni ku buliri bwo kwene. Era bija kwingira ni mu ndhu dh'abakungu bo, ni mu dh'abantu bo boonaboona, era ni mu ziiko dho dhe bafumbiramu emigaati, ni mu ntamu dhe bakandiramu engaano." 
Exodus8:4 Ebikere bija kukutuumiraku iwe, bituumire ku bantu bo era ni ku bakungu bo boonaboona.’ ”" 
Exodus8:5 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Koba Aaroni oti, ‘Golola omukono gwo ogugemye omwigo gwo, ogwolekeze emiiga, emyala n'ebidiba, obireetere okuvaamu ebikere biidhule ku nsi yoonayoona Misiri.’ ”" 
Exodus8:6 Kale Aaroni yaagolola omukono ng'agusonse ku bifo ebyo ebyalimu amaadhi, era ebikere byavaamu byaidhula ku nsi yoonayoona Misiri." 
Exodus8:7 Aye abalogo baakozesa eirogo lyaibwe, boona baaleetera ebikere okwidhula ku nsi Misiri." 
Exodus8:8 Kyabazinga yaayetesa Musa ni Aaroni yaabakoba ati: “Muneegayiriregho eri Musengwa Katonda antooleku ebikere bino era abitoole ni ku bantu bange, ndidha kuleka Abaisiraeli baje bagheeyo omusengo ye Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Exodus8:9 Musa yairamu kyabazinga ati: “Gh'onaayendera gh'onankobera, naakusabira iwe n'abakungu bo, era n'abantu bo, ebikere bizikirizibwe bibaveeku era bive ni mu ndhu dhaimwe, bisigale mu mwiga Kiyira mwonka.”" 
Exodus8:10 Kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Nsabira olwaidho.” Musa yaamukoba ati: “Ndidha kukola nga bw'osabye, era olwo onaamanha nga ezirayo katonda ali nga Musengwa Katonda waife." 
Exodus8:11 Ebikere biidha kukuvaaku iwe, era bive ni mu ndhu dho, ni ku bakungu bo, ni ku bantu bo; biidha kusigala mu Kiyira mwonka.”" 
Exodus8:12 Musa ni Aaroni baava aghali kyabazinga baafuluma. Musa yaaja yaasaba Musengwa Katonda atoolegho ebikere nga bweyali amaze okusuubiza kyabazinga. 
Exodus8:13 Musengwa Katonda yaakola nga Musa bweyamusaba, ebikere byafa ebyali mu ndhu n'ebyali mu mpya, n'ebyali mu nsiko." 
Exodus8:14 Baabibunga byavaamu emungo kamaala, ekiwunha kyaidhula Misiri." 
Exodus8:15 Aye kyabazinga bweyabona ng'ekizibu ekyo kiviiregho yaakalangusa omwoyo gwe, yaaloba kutya era yaaloba kuwulira nga Musengwa Katonda bweyakoba." 
Exodus8:16 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Koba Aaroni oti, ‘Ginga omwigo gwo okube enkungu eri ghansi ku itaka woonawoona mu Misiri efuuke obudhuuni.’ ”" 
Exodus8:17 Baakola batyo Aaroni yaakuba n'omwigo gwe enkungu eyali ghansi ku itaka, obudhuuni bweyugha ku bantu ni ku nsolo. Enkungu yoonayoona eyali ghansi ku itaka woonawoona mu Misiri yaafuuka budhuuni." 
Exodus8:18 Abalogo baagezaaku okukozesa eirogo lyaibwe okufuula enkungu obudhuuni, aye baalemwa. Obudhuuni bwebbuutanga ku bantu ni ku nsolo." 
Exodus8:19 Abalogo baakoba kyabazinga bati: “Ago maani ga Katonda.” Aye omwoyo gwa kyabazinga gwasigala nga mukalangufu ogutatya, era tiyawulira nga Musengwa Katonda bweyakoba." 
Exodus8:20 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Wuuna inho oje oteege kyabazinga ng'ali kuja ku mwiga omukobe oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, leka abantu bange baje bansinze." 
Exodus8:21 Bw'oloba okubaleka baje, manha oti ndidha kukusindikira ebikuukuulu eby'ensowera bikwidheku iwe, biidhe ku bakungu bo, ni ku bantu bo. Ensowera dhiidha kweyugha dhiidhule mu ndhu dho, ni mu ndhu edh'Abamisiri abandi buli ghantu ghaidha kwidhula nsowera, waire ghansi ku itaka." 
Exodus8:22 Aye ku lunaku olwo, ekiketezo eky'e Gosheni eyo abantu bange ye baba, nja kukibisa mu nsambo ya ndhawulo. Eyo teja kubaayo bikuukuulu bya nsowera, era olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda ali kukola ebintu ebyo mu Misiri." 
Exodus8:23 Era ntyo bwe nja okwoleka nga bwe ghaligho endhawulo ghagati agh'abantu bo n'abantu bange. Ekyo ekyewuunhio kija kubaagho olwaidho.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Era atyo Musengwa Katonda bweyakola yaabasindikira ebikuukuulu eby'ensowera byaidhula mu ndhu ya kyabazinga, ni mu ndhu edh'abakungu be. Ensowera dhaidhula ensi yoonayoona Misiri era ensi eyo yaafafaagana olw'ensowera edho." 
Exodus8:25 Agho kyabazinga yaayetesa Musa ni Aaroni, yaabakoba ati: “Muje mugheeyo emisengo eri Katonda waimwe nga muli mu Misiri muno.”" 
Exodus8:26 Aye Musa yaamwiramu ati: “Bwetunaakola tutyo tikiibe kituufu, kuba tunaaba nga tuli kughaayo ebintu ebyenhinhasa Abamisiri ng'emisengo ye Musengwa Katonda waife. Era bwe balitubona baja kutwitisa mabaale." 
Exodus8:27 Tuteekwa kuja mu irungu nga tutambula olugendo olumala enaku eisatu memale tugheereyo eyo emisengo ye Musengwa Katonda waife, nga mwene bw'alitulagira.”" 
Exodus8:28 Agho kyabazinga yaabakoba ati: “Kale ndidha kubaleka muje mu irungu mugheereyo eyo emisengo ye Musengwa Katonda waimwe, kasita muba nga timuuje ghala inho. Muneegayiriregho eri Musengwa Katonda oyo.”" 
Exodus8:29 Musa yaamwiramu ati: “Olunaava ghano nti, nga neegayirira Musengwa Katonda, olwaidho atoolegho ebikuukuulu eby'ensowera okuva ku iwe, ni ku bakungu bo, era ni ku bantu bo abandi boonaboona. Aye ku mukuzi guno otairamu kutuguyaguya ng'olobera abantu okuja okughaayo emisengo eri Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Exodus8:30 Kale Musa yaava aghaali, kyabazinga yaaja yeegayirira Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus8:31 Musengwa Katonda yaakola nga Musa bweyamwegayirira yaatoola ebikuukuulu eby'ensowera okuva ku kyabazinga mwene, ni ku bakungu be, ni ku bantu be abandi boonaboona ghaabula ensowera esigala naire endala eti." 
Exodus8:32 Aye kyabazinga ni ku mukuzi guno yaakalangusa omwoyo gwe yaaloba kutya, era yaaloba kuleka Baisiraeli ni baja." 
Exodus9:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Ja oingire mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga omukobe oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda, Katonda ow'Abaheburayi akoba ati, leka abantu bange baje bansinze." 
Exodus9:2 Kuba bw'oloba okubaleka baje, n'obaloberaku," 
Exodus9:3 manha oti omukono gwange guja kwika n'endwaire embi einho, gukube ensolo dho dhoonadhoona dhe baaya: embalaasi, endogoyi, engamiya, ente, embuzi n'entaama." 
Exodus9:4 Ate nja kubisa bundi ensolo edh'Abaisiraeli okuva ku dh'Abamisiri ensolo edh'Abaisiraeli tidhija kufaaku naire endala eti. 
Exodus9:5 Nze Musengwa Katonda ntairegho olwaidho nga lwenja okukola ekyo.’ ” 
Exodus9:6 Olunaku olwairirira Musengwa Katonda yaakola nga bweyakoba. Ensolo dhoonadhoona edh'Abamisiri dhaafa, aye ku dh'Abaisiraeli kwaloba kufaaku naire ndala eti." 
Exodus9:7 Kyabazinga yaatuma okubuuliriza, era baamukobera nga ku nsolo edh'Abaisiraeli bwe kutaafaaku naire ndala. Aye era omwoyo gwa kyabazinga gwasigala nga mukalangufu yaaloba kutya, era yaaloba kuleka Baisiraeli kuja." 
Exodus9:8 Olwo Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni ati: “Muyoole ku ivu n'engalo dhaimwe okuva mu kifo aghookerwa ebiwumbe, memale Musa alisuule ghaigulu nga kyabazinga alingiriire." 
Exodus9:9 Liidha kufuumuukira ku nsi Misiri yoonayoona ng'oti nkungu, era buli ghantu lireete ku bantu ni ku nsolo amabuubuuto agaabika ni gavaamu amabwa.”" 
Exodus9:10 Kale baayoola ku ivu okuva mu kifo aghookerwa ebiwumbe, baaja baayemerera mu maiso ga kyabazinga, Musa yaasuula eivu ghaigulu mu mpewo. Lyaja lyaleeta ku bantu ni ku nsolo amabuubuuto agaabika ni gavaamu amabwa." 
Exodus9:11 Abalogo ku luno tibaasobola kwegeza mu Musa, kuba boona baali baidhwire amabuubuuto ng'oti n'Abamisiri abandi boonaboona." 
Exodus9:12 Aye era Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera kyabazinga okukalanguka omwoyo, yaaloba kutya era yaaloba kuwulira nga Musengwa Katonda bweyali amaze okukobera Musa." 
Exodus9:13 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Enkyo wuuna inho oje ye kyabazinga oyemerere mu maiso ge omukobe oti, Musengwa Katonda, Katonda ow'Abaheburayi akoba ati, ‘Leka abantu bange baje bansinze." 
Exodus9:14 Ku mukuzi guno nja kukubonereza nga nkusindikira ebibamba iwe mwene, n'abakungu bo, n'abantu bo abandi, olwo omanhe ng'ezirayo wundi ali ng'oti ninze Musengwa Katonda, mu nsi yoonayoona." 
Exodus9:15 Kuba mu kiseera kino nandibaire nga naginga omukono gwange naakukuba iwe n'abantu bo, nga mbasindikira obulwaire obubi, era ngoli iwe buti oli mufu." 
Exodus9:16 Aye ekyakulesaagho ng'oli mulamu lwa kwenda nkwoleke amaani gange, eriina lyange lisaakibwe mu nsi yoonayoona." 
Exodus9:17 Weetwala ng'owa ghaigulu einho, waaloba kuleka bantu be ni baja." 
Exodus9:18 Aye bona eno, enkyo mu kiseera ng'oti ni kino, nja kubasindikira omugozi gugwe ogutagwangaku kasookanga Misiri ebaagho." 
Exodus9:19 Kale ni tuma baize eka ebyayo byo byonabyona ebiri mu nsiko era babingize. Kuba omugozi guja kukuba era gwite kiisi ekiriba mu nsiko kyonakyona k'abe omuntu oba ensolo.’ ” 
Exodus9:20 Agho abandi ku bakungu ba kyabazinga baatya olw'ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yakoba, baalagira abairu baibwe okungira n'okungiza ebyayo byaibwe." 
Exodus9:21 Aye yaabaayo abataafaayo abaaleka abairu baibwe n'ebyayo byaibwe ku luya. 
Exodus9:22 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Ghanika omukono ng'ogwolekeza ku igulu, omugozi gugwe ku nsi Misiri yoonayoona, gugwe ku bantu, ni ku nsolo, ni ku kiisi kimera mu nsiko kyonakyona aghazira kubitiza, mu Misiri mwonamwona.”" 
Exodus9:23 Kale Musa yaaghanika omwigo gwe ng'agusonse ku igulu. Musengwa Katonda yaasindika ku nsi okumyansa, n'olukuba, n'omugozi, byagwira ensi Misiri." 
Exodus9:24 Omugozi gwagwa, okumyansa kwayaka ng'oti muliro ghagati mu mugozi obutazikira, era omugozi gwaba mungi inho ogutagwangaku mu Misiri kasookanga ebaagho." 
Exodus9:25 Omugozi gwakuba kiisi ekyali mu nsiko mu Misiri mwonamwona: gwaita abantu n'ensolo, gwamenhamenha emiti gyonagyona era gwazikiriza ebimera ebindi byonabyona." 
Exodus9:26 Mu kiketezo eky'e Gosheni Abaisiraeli mwe baabanga, ni mwonka omutaagwa mugozi." 
Exodus9:27 Agho kyabazinga yaayetesa Musa ni Aaroni yaabakoba ati: “Ku mukuzi guno, ndhikiriiza gunsinze, Musengwa Katonda mutuufu aye nze n'abantu bange niife abakyamu." 
Exodus9:28 Muneegayiriregho eri Musengwa Katonda, kuba titukaaghanga kugumira kubwatuka kwa lukuba na mugozi bino. Ndidha kubaleka muje era tikikaabeetaagisa kusigala nga mukaali muno.”" 
Exodus9:29 Musa yaamwiramu ati: “Olunaafuluma ekibuga kino nti, ndidha kughanika emikono nsabe Musengwa Katonda, okubwatuka okw'olukuba kusirike era n'omugozi gwonagwona guweegho, olwo omanhe ng'ensi ya Musengwa Katonda yenka." 
Exodus9:30 Aye ndidhi nga iwe n'abakungu bo mukaali kutoolera kutya Musengwa Katonda.” 
Exodus9:31 Mperaano, emisiri egy'obuti obwavangamu wuuzi dhe baalukangamu engoye empegheevu era n'emisiri egya sayiri, omugozi gwagizikiriza; kuba sayiri yali amaze okwenga era ng'obuti bule bwakamulisa." 
Exodus9:32 Aye engaano, tiyayonoonekaku naire, kuba erwagho okutuuka." 
Exodus9:33 Kale Musa yaafuluma ekibuga ekyo, yaaghanika emikono yaasaba Musengwa Katonda okubwatuka okw'olukuba n'omugozi era n'amaadhi byalekera." 
Exodus9:34 Aye era kyabazinga olwabona ng'amaadhi, n'omugozi, n'okubwatuka birekeire, mwene n'abakungu be kabiri baayonoona, baakalangusa emyoyo baaloba kutya." 
Exodus9:35 Kale omwoyo gwa kyabazinga gwasigala nga mukalangufu yaaloba kutya. Era yaaloba kuleka Baisiraeli ni baja, era nga Musengwa Katonda bweyali amaze okukoba ng'abita mu Musa." 
Exodus10:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Ja ongire mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, kuba nkalangwisa omwoyo gwe n'egy'abakungu be, balobe kutya. Olwo mbakolemu ebyewuunhio babibone," 
Exodus10:2 musobole mwena okukobera abaana baimwe n'abaidhukulu engeri ye nsirughaizaamu Abamisiri, n'ebyewuunhio bye mbakozeemu. Mwenamwena musobole okumanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Exodus10:3 Kale Musa ni Aaroni baaja bangira mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, baamukoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda w'Abaheburayi akoba ati, ‘Olirekera li okuloba okumpulira? Leka abantu bange baje bansinze." 
Exodus10:4 Kuba, bona eno, bw'oloba okubaleka ni baja, olwenkyo nja kuleeta enzige mu nsi yo." 
Exodus10:5 Era dhija kughemba ku nsi yo yoonayoona, omuntu abe nga taghanga kubona ku itaka era dhija kulya kiisi kintu kyonakyona ekyaimwe ekyasigala, omugozi kye gutaakuba, era na kiisi muti gwaimwe gwonagwona ogw'omu nsiko." 
Exodus10:6 Dhija kwidhula mu ndhu dhaimwe: edhidho iwe, n'edh'abakungu bo, n'edh'Abamisiri boonaboona. Dhija kuba kamaala inho ekitabonebwangaku bazaire baimwe waire badhaadha baimwe, kasookanga baba ku nsi okutuuka ni ye buli eno.’ ” Agho Musa yaafuluma omwa kyabazinga." 
Exodus10:7 Abakungu baakoba kyabazinga bati: “Ono omusaadha aja kulekera li okutweraliikiriza? Leka abasaadha Abaisiraeli baje, basinze Musengwa Katonda waibwe. Tobona nga Misiri eri kufafaagana?”" 
Exodus10:8 Kale Musa ni Aaroni baayetebwa baira ye kyabazinga, yaabakoba ati: “Muje musinze Musengwa Katonda waimwe aye ni baani beenebeene abali kuja?”" 
Exodus10:9 Musa yaamwiramu ati: “Twidha kuja abakulu n'abato, era tuje ni batabane baife ni baghala baife. Twidha kutwala entaama, n'embuzi, n'ente dhaife, kuba tuteekwa okukola ekibinuko eky'okwoleka nga tusiima Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Exodus10:10 Agho kyabazinga yaabakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda anaaba ng'ali n'imwe bwembalekanga bwenebwene ni muja, imwe abakulu n'abato! Kuba muteekwa okuba nga muli n'ekigendererwa ekibi mu myoyo gyaimwe." 
Exodus10:11 Busa, ndobye. Abasaadha mwenka niimwe mube muje musinze Musengwa Katonda anti n'ekyo kye mwenda.” Agho Musa ni Aaroni baabingibwa okuva mu maiso ga kyabazinga." 
Exodus10:12 Olwo Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Golola omukono gwo ng'ogwolekeza ensi Misiri, enzige dhiidhe dhirye kiisi kimera ekirimu ebyo byonabyona omugozi bye gutaakuba.”" 
Exodus10:13 Kale Musa yaagolola omwigo gwe ng'agusonse ku nsi Misiri. Musengwa Katonda yaaleeta empewo ng'eva e buvandhuba, yaakunta omusana ogwo gwonagwona n'obwire bwonabwona, era okuja okuwuuna enkyo ng'empewo eyo eyava e buvandhuba ereese enzige." 
Exodus10:14 Enzige dhaidha dhaika ku nsi Misiri yoonayoona, ng'obungi bwadho tibubonebwangaku era nga tibuliirayo kubonebwaku lundi kabiri." 
Exodus10:15 Kuba dhaaghemba ku nsi yoonayoona, yairugala olw'enzige edho, dhaalya ebimera byonabyona ebyali mu Misiri, n'ebibala ebyali ku miti byonabyona omugozi bye gutaakunkumula. Ghazira muti gwonagwona, oba ekimera ekindi kyonakyona, waire nga kya mu nsiko, ekyasigazaaku olwa kiragala mu nsi yoonayoona Misiri." 
Exodus10:16 Agho kyabazinga yaagwidhubana okwetesa Musa ni Aaroni yaabakoba ati: “Nhonoine eri Musengwa Katonda waimwe era n'eri imwe. 
Exodus10:17 Kale nsaba kusoniyibwa, okwonoona kwange okwo, era nsaba, leero ku mukuzi guno, muneegayiriregho eri Musengwa Katonda waimwe antooleku olumbe luno.”" 
Exodus10:18 Kale Musa yaafuluma omwa kyabazinga era yaaja yaamwegayiriragho eri Musengwa Katonda. 
Exodus10:19 Era Musengwa Katonda yaakyusa empewo ey'e buvandhuba, yaaviira e bugwandhuba n'amaani, yaasitula enzige yaadhisindiikiriza, yaadhituusa mu Nhandha Emyufu. Mu nsi yoonayoona Misiri timwasigala nzige naire endala eti." 
Exodus10:20 Aye era Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera kyabazinga okukalanguka omwoyo, yaaloba kutya era yaaloba kuleka Baisiraeli ni baja." 
Exodus10:21 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Ghanika omukono ng'ogwolekeza ku igulu, ghaidhegho enzikiiza egeme ku nsi Misiri enzikiiza ere yeene eri bedimudimu.”" 
Exodus10:22 Kale Musa yaagololera omukono y'eigulu, memale ghaidhagho enzikiiza ere yeene eri bedimudimu, yaagema ku nsi Misiri okumala enaku isatu." 
Exodus10:23 Mu nnaku eisatu edho nga ghazira Mumisiri aghanga kubona mwine, waire okusituka okuva mu kifo. Aye ng'ate Abaisiraeli boonaboona baalinga n'obutangaavu ghe baabanga." 
Exodus10:24 Agho kyabazinga yaayeta Musa yaamukoba ati: “Muje musinze Musengwa Katonda muje ni bakazi baimwe, n'abaana baimwe, aye entaama dhaimwe, n'embuzi, n'ente, muteekwa okubireka.”" 
Exodus10:25 Aye Musa yaamwiramu ati: “Oteekwa okutuleka tutwale ensolo dhe tulighaayo ng'emisengo era ng'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, tuje tugheeyo ye Musengwa Katonda waife emisengo." 
Exodus10:26 Kale tuli n'okutwala n'ensolo dhaife dhoona, aghazira kulekaku naire ndala. Tuli n'okudhitwala, kuba tuli n'okudhikozesa mu kusinza Musengwa Katonda. Ate, nga tukaali kutuuka ghale ghe tuja okusinziza, titughanga kumanha nsolo ki dhe tuteekwa okughaayo.”" 
Exodus10:27 Aye era Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera kyabazinga okukalanguka omwoyo, yaaloba kutya era yaaloba kubaleka ni baja." 
Exodus10:28 Era yaakoba Musa ati: “Nva mu maiso! Era toirangayo kwidha ye ndi, kuba bwendikubona nga kabiri oize, ku olwo lw'olifa.”" 
Exodus10:29 Musa yaamwiramu ati: “Oli mutuufu, toja kwirayo kumbonaku kabiri.”" 
Exodus11:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Ekaasigaireyo ekibamba kirala kye nja okusindikira kyabazinga n'Abamisiri boonaboona era ng'ekyo kiwoire aja kubaleka muve muno. Ate mu butuufu aja bwa kubabingira irala okuva mu Misiri. 
Exodus11:2 Mpegaano ni, koba Abaisiraeli boonaboona oti, ‘Kiisi musaadha Omuisiraeli aje asabe omusaadha muliraanwa we Omumisiri, era kiisi mukazi Omuisiraeli asabe omukazi muliraanwa we Omumisiri ebintu ebyakolebwa mu feeza ni mu zaabu.’ ”" 
Exodus11:3 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera Abamisiri okutya Abaisiraeli. Ate ekindi, Abamisiri abo ng'otwaliizaamu n'abakungu ba kyabazinga beene, baatwalanga Musa okuba omuntu omukologho." 
Exodus11:4 Musa yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Agho nga mu bwire ghagati aidha kubita mu Misiri," 
Exodus11:5 abaana abalenzi ababeri boonaboona ab'omu Misiri bafe: okuva ku muberi wo iwe kyabazinga oli ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, okutuuka ku muberi ow'omwiru omukazi asa ku lubengo. Era n'ensolo dhaimwe dhoonadhoona enume edhaazaalibwa mu nzaalo edhaasooka, dhoona dhija kufa." 
Exodus11:6 Era ghaidha kubaagho okulira okw'amaani mu Misiri mwonamwona, okutabangaghooku era okutaja kubaagho kabiri lundi." 
Exodus11:7 Aye Abaisiraeli ghe baba teidha kubaayo kafufuma naire, waire embwa okuboigolera omuntu yeenayeena oba ensolo yoonayoona ey'Omuisiraeli. Olwo mulimanha nga Musengwa Katonda aboola Abamisiri ku Baisiraeli.’ ”" 
Exodus11:8 Musa yaamaliriza ng'akoba ati: “Era bano abakungu bo boonaboona baidha kwidha ye ndi bankubire amakiryaivu nga bakoba bati, ‘Tukweghembye va muno n'abantu bo boonaboona.’ Era olwo ndidha kuva muno.” Agho Musa, nga yeenayeena aidhwire obusungu, yaava aghaali kyabazinga." 
Exodus11:9 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Kyabazinga taja kubawulira, era olwo ndikola ebyewuunhio mu Misiri emikuzi kamaala.”" 
Exodus11:10 Musa ni Aaroni baakola ebyewuunhio bino byonabyona nga kyabazinga abona. Aye Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera kyabazinga oyo okukalanguka omwoyo, yaaloba kutya era yaaloba kuleka Baisiraeli kuva mu nsi ye." 
Exodus12:1 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni nga bali mu Misiri ati: 
Exodus12:2 “Mwidha kutwalanga omwezi guno nga n'ogwinhama omwaka. 
Exodus12:3 Era kobera Abaisiraeli boonaboona nga beesoloiza, oti omwezi guno ng'enaku ikumi, kiisi musaadha wa maka aidha kutoola entaama ento oba embuzi ento olwa ab'omu maka ge." 
Exodus12:4 Ab'omu maka ge bwe baba nga batono nga tibamalaagho ntaama eyo oba mbuzi eyo, aidha kweyimba ku muliraanwa we, bagabane ensolo ndala nga buli maka gatwala emamba emala abantu abagalimu." 
Exodus12:5 Entaama oba embuzi ye muba musazeegho okwita, eteekwa kuba nga nume ey'omwaka omulala era ng'eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Exodus12:6 Ensolo eyo mugikuume okutuusa ku lunaku olweikumi n'eina olw'omwezi guno. Olwo eigulo ery'olunaku olwo Abaisiraeli boonaboona baite ensolo dhoonadhoona dhe baakuuma olw'olunaku olwo. 
Exodus12:7 Agho batoole ku musaayi gwadho bagusiige ku myango egy'emiryango egy'endhu eriirwamu ensolo edho ku gy'omu mbali gyombi, ni ku gwa ghaigulu." 
Exodus12:8 Obwire obwo emamba eri n'okwokebwa ku muliro, eriibwe n'emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa era n'eiva erikaagha." 
Exodus12:9 Mutagiryangaku mbisi oba ntogose mu maadhi, eri na kuba ndhokye yoonayoona: omutwe, amagulu era n'ebyenda." 
Exodus12:10 Era ghatabangagho mamba ye mulekagho kutuusa nkyo. Emamba yoonayoona esigalagho okutuusa enkyo eri na kwokebwa n'omuliro. 
Exodus12:11 Mugiryanga mu bwangu era nga mumaze n'okuvaalira irala ng'abaja mu lugendo, nga muvaire engaito mu bigere, mugemye n'omwigo mu ngalo. Ekyo n'Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa eky'okwebaza nze Musengwa Katonda olw'okubabitiza," 
Exodus12:12 kuba obwire obwo ndidha kubita mu Misiri nje nga ndhita abaana abalenzi ababeri boonaboona Abamisiri. Era ndhite n'ensolo dhaibwe enume dhoonadhoona edhaazaalibwa mu nzaalo edhisooka. Era ndidha kubonereza emisambwa egy'omu Misiri gyonagyona. Ninze Musengwa Katonda. 
Exodus12:13 Aye imwe, omusaayi gwe munaasiiga ku myango, n'akanaaba akamanhiso akooleka endhu dhe mulimu. Bwe nnaabonanga omusaayi, ndidha kubabitizanga. Era ezira kibamba kiribagwaku kubazikiriza lwe ndikuba Misiri." 
Exodus12:14 “Olunaku olwo, mwidha kulwidhukiranga era mulukuzenga nga mukola ekibinuko ekyoleka okusiima kwaimwe eri nze Musengwa Katonda. Ense n'ense edhiriiragho dhiri n'okulukuzanga, era kino kiragiro ekiri n'okugonderwa ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Exodus12:15 “Mwidha kumalanga enaku musanvu nga mulya migaati egitazimbulukusiibwa gyonka. Ku lunaku olusooka mu edho omusanvu, muli n'okutoola mu ndhu dhaimwe kiisi kizimbulukusa kyonakyona. Omuntu yeenayeena anaalyanga omugaati oguzimbulukusiibwa mu nnaku edho omusanvu, anaabanga nga takaabalirwa mu Baisiraeli." 
Exodus12:16 Ku lunaku olusooka ni ku lwomusanvu mu nnaku edho, muneesolozanga olw'okunsinza nze Musengwa Katonda. Era mu nnaku edho mutakolerangamu mulimo gwonagwona okutoolaku okutegeka emere yaimwe ey'okulya." 
Exodus12:17 Mwidha kukuzanga Ekibinuko eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa, kuba ku lunaku lwene olwo ni kwe natooleraku olukunkumuli lwaimwe Abaisiraeli mu Misiri. Kale muli n'okulukuzanga imwe n'ense dhoonadhoona edhiriiragho. Kino kiragiro ekiri n'okugonderwa ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Exodus12:18 Okuva eigulo ery'olunaku olweikumi n'eina olw'omwezi ogusooka, okutuusa eigulo ery'olunaku olwabiri n'olulala olw'omwezi gwene ogwo, mwidha kulyanga emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa." 
Exodus12:19 Mwidha kumalanga enaku musanvu nga timuba na kizimbulukusa mu ndhu dhaimwe. Era omuntu yeenayeena anaalyanga omugaati oguzimbulukusiibwa mu nnaku edho, anaabanga nga takaabalibwa nga Muisiraeli, k'abe musenze oba Muisiraeli." 
Exodus12:20 Mutalyanga mugaati gwonagwona mu ndhu dhaimwe oguzimbulukusiibwa. Mulyenga migaati gitazimbulukusiibwa gyonka.” 
Exodus12:21 Agho Musa yaayetesa abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli yaabakoba ati: “Buli muntu atoole mu byayo bye entaama oba embuzi ento ndala, eja mu bantu ab'omu maka ge, agiite ng'ekigheebwayo olw'okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa." 
Exodus12:22 Bw'amala atoole akasaga ak'akati akeetebwa hissopu akainhike mu musaayi ogw'ensolo eyo nga guli mu kibya, agusiige ku myango egy'omulyango ogw'endhu ye ku gy'omu mbali gyombi ni ku gwa ghaigulu. Era ghatabaagho afuluma kuva mu ndhu ye okutuusa nga bukyeire," 
Exodus12:23 kuba Musengwa Katonda aja kubita mu Misiri ng'aita abaana abalenzi ababeri ab'Abamisiri. Kale bw'anaabonanga omusaayi ku myango, aidha kubitizanga omulyango ogwo alobe kuganha lumbe kwingira mu ndhu dhaimwe kubaitaku baana baimwe." 
Exodus12:24 Mwidha kukolanga omukolo ogwo ng'ekiragiro ekiri n'okugonderwanga imwe, n'abaana, n'abaidhukulu, ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Exodus12:25 Era bwe mutuukanga mu nsi Musengwa Katonda ye yasuubiza okubagha, mutalobanga kukuza mukolo ogwo." 
Exodus12:26 Abaana baimwe bwe bababuuzanga bati, ‘Guno omukolo gutegeeza ki?’" 
Exodus12:27 Mubairangamu muti, ‘Ogwo n'omusengo ogugheebwayo olw'okwebaza Musengwa Katonda olw'Okutubitiza, kuba yabitiza endhu edh'Abaisiraeli nga tuli mu Misiri, lwe yaita abaana abalenzi ababeri ab'Abamisiri n'atulekera abaife nga balamu.’ ” Agho Abaisiraeli baakuba amakiryaivu baasinza Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus12:28 Baaja baakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa ni Aaroni. 
Exodus12:29 Mu bwire ghagati Musengwa Katonda yaita abaana abalenzi ababeri boonaboona ab'Abamisiri, okuviira irala ku muberi wa kyabazinga, ali ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, okutuukira irala ku muberi ow'omusibe ali mu ikomera. Era yaita n'ensolo dhoonadhoona enume edhaazaalibwa mu nzaalo edhaasooka." 
Exodus12:30 Obwire obwo, kyabazinga, n'abakungu be, n'Abamisiri boonaboona, baasituka, ghaabaagho okulira okw'amaani mu Misiri mwonamwona, kuba tighaabaagho ndhu ya Mumisiri etaalimu mufu." 
Exodus12:31 Era obwire bwene obwo kyabazinga yaayetesa Musa ni Aaroni yaabakoba ati: “Musituke muje, muve mu bantu bange. Mwenamwena Abaisiraeli muje musinze Musengwa Katonda nga bwe mwakoba." 
Exodus12:32 Mutwale entaama dhaimwe, n'embuzi, n'ente, mugolole. Mbasaba zeena munsabire enkabi.”" 
Exodus12:33 Agho Abamisiri baagwidhubania Abaisiraeli bave mu Misiri mu bwangu nga bakoba bati: “Bwe mutaja tuja kufa tuweegho.” 
Exodus12:34 Kale Abaisiraeli baatoola engaano yaibwe ye baali bamaze okukanda aye nga bakaali kutaamu kizimbulukusa, baagita mu ntamu dhe bakandiramu, baagizinga mu bivaalo baagitwalira ku mabega." 
Exodus12:35 Abaisiraeli baali bamaze okukola nga Musa bweyabakoba, kuba baali bamaze okusaba Abamisiri ebintu ebyakolebwa mu feeza ni mu zaabu era n'ebivaalo." 
Exodus12:36 Era, nga ni Musengwa Katonda amaze okuleetera Abamisiri okutya Abaisiraeli, kale kiisi kye baasabanga nga bakibagha. Mu nsambo ng'oti n'eyo, Abaisiraeli baatwala eby'obukombe eby'Abamisiri mu magezi." 
Exodus12:37 Abaisiraeli baatoolera olugendo lwaibwe ku bigere, era baatambula okuva e Ramesesi baatuuka e Sukkothi. Baali abasaadha ng'oti mitwalo nkaaga (600,000), nga tobaze bakazi na baana." 
Exodus12:38 Olukunkumuli olw'abantu abandi abatali Baisiraeli lwabeeyimbaku baaja nabo. Baaja n'entaama n'embuzi n'ente, n'endogoyi, nga byonabyona biri mu bungi." 
Exodus12:39 Baafumba emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa mu ngaano ere enkande ye baava nayo mu Misiri, kuba Abamisiri baabagwidhubania nga bava mu Misiri, baabula ekiseera eky'okwesibirira entanda, waire okufunira ekizimbulukusa mu ngaano ye baavaayo nayo." 
Exodus12:40 Abaisiraeli baaba nga babaire mu Misiri okumala emyaka ebikumi bina n'asatu. 
Exodus12:41 Era olunaku emyaka ebikumi ebina n'asatu (430) lwe gyawaayo giti, olukunkumuli olw'abantu ba Musengwa Katonda lwe baava mu Misiri." 
Exodus12:42 Obwire obwo, Musengwa Katonda bweyakuumiramu abantu be abo ng'ali kubatoola mu Misiri. Kale, Abaisiraeli boonaboona ense n'ense bakuuma obwire bwene obwo nga bwa kwebalizaaku Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus12:43 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni ati: “Gano n'amateeka ge munaajiirangaku nga mulya Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa: Omuntu ow'endha atali Muisiraeli atakiryangaku. 
Exodus12:44 Aye omwiru ye mwagula n'empiiya aghanga okukiryaku, bwe muba nga mwamala okumukeketa." 
Exodus12:45 Omusenze n'omupakasi batakiryangaku. 
Exodus12:46 Ekibinuko ekyo kiteekwa okuliirwa mu ndhu omwo mwonka mwe kitegekeibwa, aghazira kufulumyaku kintu ku luya. Era ensolo ekozeseibwa mu kibinuko ekyo teteekwa kumenhebwa igumba lyayo waire eirala liti." 
Exodus12:47 Abaisiraeli boonaboona bateekwa okukola Ekibinuko ekyo. 
Exodus12:48 Omuntu ow'endha bw'abasengangamu memale n'ayenda okulya ku Kibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa olw'okusinza Musengwa Katonda, musooka kukeketanga bantu be abasaadha n'abalenzi memale mwamuganha era oyo mumutwalanga ng'Omuisiraeli mwene. Aye omuntu yeenayeena atali mukekete atalyanga ku Kibinuko ekyo." 
Exodus12:49 Amateeka gano gaidha kugemanga ku muntu ow'endha aba ng'abasenzeemu, ni ku Baisiraeli baamu.”" 
Exodus12:50 Abaisiraeli baakola batyo nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa ni Aaroni. 
Exodus12:51 Ku lunaku lwene olwo Musengwa Katonda yaatoola Abaisiraeli boonaboona mu Misiri. 
Exodus13:1 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus13:2 “Mugheeyo abaana ababeri boonaboona babe bange, kuba kiisi ekinaazaalibwanga mu luzaalo olusooka mu Baisiraeli, k'abe omuntu oba ensolo, kinaabanga kyange.”" 
Exodus13:3 Musa yaakoba abantu ati: “Mwidhukirenga olunaku luno lwe mwaviiraku mu Misiri, ye mwabanga nga muli bairu. Luno n'olunaku Musengwa Katonda lwe yabatoolera mu nsi eyo, ng'akozesa amaani ge agataloodheka. Mutaluliirangaku migaati gizimbulukusiibwa." 
Exodus13:4 Olunaku luno lwe muli kuviiraku mu Misiri, luli mu mwezi ogusooka ogwetebwa Abibu." 
Exodus13:5 Era Musengwa Katonda bw'alibatuusa mu nsi ey'Abakanaani, n'Abahitti, n'Abamori, n'Abahivi, n'Abayebusi, ensi ye yalayirira badhaadha baimwe ng'aja kugigha imwe, mukuzanga olunaku luno mu mwezi guno. Ensi eyo ngimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala." 
Exodus13:6 Mwidha kumalanga enaku musanvu nga mulya migaati egitazimbulukusiibwa gyonka, era ku lunaku olwomusanvu mwidha kukuzanga ekibinuko eky'okusiima Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus13:7 Emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa ni gyonka eginaalibwanga okumala enaku omusanvu; ezira muntu ku imwe anaikirizibwanga kuba na mugaati oguzimbulukusiibwa era ezira kizimbulukusa kinaikirizibwanga kubonebwa na muntu yeenayeena ow'omu kiketezo kyaimwe. 
Exodus13:8 Ku lunaku olwo olw'ekibinuko, mwidha kwinhonholanga abaana baimwe muti, ‘Tulukuza olw'ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yatukolera lwe twava mu Misiri.’" 
Exodus13:9 Era lwidha kubabeereranga kamanhiso ng'oti n'omuntu k'ata ku mukono, era lubabeerenga ekiidhukizo ng'oti n'omuntu ky'asiba mu bweni, olwo amateeka ga Musengwa Katonda galobenga kubava ku minwa; kuba Musengwa Katonda yabatoola mu Misiri ng'akozesa amaani ge agataloodheka." 
Exodus13:10 Kale mwidha kukuzanga olunaku olwo mu biseera bya lwo buli mwaka. 
Exodus13:11 “Musengwa Katonda bw'alibatuusa mu nsi ey'Abakanaani nga bweyalayirira imwe ni badhaadha baimwe, n'agibagha," 
Exodus13:12 mughangayo abaana abalenzi ababeri boonaboona baaba ba Musengwa Katonda. Era n'ensolo enume edhaazaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka dhoona dha Musengwa Katonda. 
Exodus13:13 Endogoyi enume ezaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka, muginunulanga nga mughaayo entaama ento. Aye bwe mubanga nga timuginunwire muginiolanga enkoto, yaafa. Era n'omwana omulenzi omuberi munaamununulanga mu nsambo n'endala." 
Exodus13:14 Era mu biseera eby'omu maiso eyo, abaana baimwe bwe balibabuuzanga bati, ‘Kino kitegeeza ki?’ Mubainhonholanga muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda yatutoola mu Misiri mu bwiru ng'akozesa amaani ge agataloodheka," 
Exodus13:15 kuba kyabazinga ow'e Misiri bweyakalanguka omwoyo n'aloba okutuleka tuve mu Misiri, Musengwa Katonda yaita abaana abalenzi ababeri boonaboona ab'Abamisiri era yaita n'ensolo dhaibwe enume dhoonadhoona edhaazaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka. Kale kye tuva ni tughaayo eri Musengwa Katonda omusengo ogw'ensolo enume dhoonadhoona edhizaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka aye abaana baife ababeri boonaboona tubanunula.’" 
Exodus13:16 Ako n'akaidha okubanga akamanhiso akanaabanga ku mikono oba mu bweni okutwidhukiza nga Musengwa Katonda bweyatutoola mu Misiri ng'akozesa amaani ge agataloodheka.” 
Exodus13:17 Kyabazinga ow'e Misiri bweyaleka Abaisiraeli ni baja, Katonda tiyababisa mu ngira ebita mu nsi ey'Abafilisiti waire nga n'eyali ey'okumpi, kuba Katonda yamanha ng'Abaisiraeli basobola okukyuka bairayo e Misiri, bwe babona ng'okuja emberi baba bali n'okulwana olutalo." 
Exodus13:18 Kale yaababisa mu ngira ey'okwekooloobya mu irungu nga boolekeire Enhandha Emyufu. Abaisiraeli okuva mu Misiri baali beetegefu okulwana olutalo. 
Exodus13:19 Bwe baali bava mu Misiri Musa yaaja n'amagumba ga Yosefu, kuba Yosefu oyo ng'akaali kufa yabalayiza ati: “Katonda bw'alibatoola mu Misiri muno, mujanga n'amagumba gange.”" 
Exodus13:20 Agho Abaisiraeli baava e Sukkothi baatambula baatuuka mu Ethamu ku mbali okw'eirungu, baasimba agho weema dhaibwe." 
Exodus13:21 Musengwa Katonda yaabayambanga basobole okutambula omusana n'obwire: omusana yabakulemberangamu ng'ali mu kire ekiri ng'oti mpango okubooleka engira ye babe babitemu, ate obwire yaabanga mu muliro oguli ng'oti mpango okubamuliikirira." 
Exodus13:22 Omusana, ng'ekire ekiri ng'oti mpango tikibulagho okubakulemberamu, ate buli bwire ng'omuliro oguli ng'oti mpango gwona tigubulagho okubakulemberamu." 
Exodus14:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus14:2 “Koba Abaisiraeli bakyuke baje basimbe weema dhaibwe emberi wa Pihahirothi ghagati gha Migidoli n'enhandha, era emberi w'ekibuga Baaluzefoni nga bali kumpi nakyo." 
Exodus14:3 Nhenda kyabazinga alowooze ati, ‘Buti Abaisiraeli amagezi gabeesibye bazira ghe baja, eirungu tiriri kubaganha kuja mberi.’" 
Exodus14:4 Mu kiseera n'ekirala ndidha kumukalangusa omwoyo alobe kutya, atoolere okubabinga ng'ayenda okubagema, aye kye nja okukola kyabazinga n'abalwani be kija kumpeesa ekitiisa, era Abamisiri balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.” Abaisiraeli baakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyabakoba." 
Exodus14:5 Abantu bwe baakobera kyabazinga ow'e Misiri bati Abaisiraeli beibyegho, kyabazinga oyo n'abakungu be baakyusa emyoyo gyaibwe, baawulira nga babaire bakeetaaga Abaisiraeli, n'okukoba bati: “Tukoze ki kino? Tulese Abaisiraeli baatweibaku, baalekera okuba abairu baife?”" 
Exodus14:6 Kale kyabazinga yeetegeka n'ekigaali kye eky'omu lutalo n'abalwani be boonaboona. 
Exodus14:7 Yaalonda ebigaali eby'omu lutalo lukaaga bye yasinganga okwesiga, era n'ebigaali ebindi byonabyona eby'omu lutalo ebya Misiri nga byonabyona biriku abaduumizi." 
Exodus14:8 Musengwa Katonda yaakalangusa omwoyo gwa kyabazinga ow'e Misiri yaaloba kutya, yaatoolera okubinga ng'ayenda okugema Abaisiraeli abaali bali kutambula nga ghazira kye batya." 
Exodus14:9 Abalwani ba Misiri boonaboona, n'embalaasi dhaibwe dhoonadhoona, n'ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo, n'abavuzi boonaboona, baabingirira Abaisiraeli baabaagaana nga basimbye weema dhaibwe ku mbali kw'enhandha, kumpi n'ekibuga Pihahirothi emberi wa Baaluzefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Abaisiraeli baaja okulinga bati, baalengera kyabazinga wa Misiri n'abalwani be boonaboona nga bali kubaidhira. Agho baatya ebitoogerekeka era baalirira Musengwa Katonda abayambe." 
Exodus14:11 Beemuluguunhiza Musa nga bakoba bati: “Lwa kuba mu Misiri yali ezira magombe ganditumaze kutuziikamu, kye wava n'otutoolayo twidhe tufiire eno mu irungu? Watukola ki kino okututoola mu Misiri?" 
Exodus14:12 Ebyo ti bye twakukoba nga tukaali mu Misiri? Ife twali tukukobye otuleke tusigale nga tukaali bairu ba Bamisiri. Okusigala nga tukolera Abamisiri, kyandisinzeeku okwidha okufiira eno mu irungu.”" 
Exodus14:13 Aye Musa yaabairamu ati: “Mutatya, imwe mube bube bagumu, mwidha kubona Musengwa Katonda ky'anaakola okubawonia Abamisiri abo olwaleero luno. Kuba Abamisiri abo be muli kubona olwaleero timuja kwirayo kubabona kabiri." 
Exodus14:14 Musengwa Katonda aja kubalwanirira, kale imwe musirike busirike.”" 
Exodus14:15 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Lwaki oli kundirira okubayamba? Koba abantu beeyongereyo mu lugendo lwaibwe. 
Exodus14:16 Iwe toola omwigo gwo, ogusonke ku nhandha, amaadhi gaidha kwegabaniamu ghabiri, Abaisiraeli baghange okubita mu nhandha nga batambulira ku itaka ikalu." 
Exodus14:17 Ndidha kukalangusa emyoyo egy'Abamisiri balobe kutya, boona bangire mu nhandha nga bababingirira, aye kye nja okukola kyabazinga n'abalwani be boonaboona, n'ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, n'abavuzi be ab'embalaasi, kija kumpeesa ekitiisa." 
Exodus14:18 Era bwe nnaamala okufuna ekitiisa ekyo olw'ekyo kye nja okubakola, Abamisiri baidha kumanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Exodus14:19 Malaika wa Katonda eyakulemberangamu Abaisiraeli yaakyuka yaabaira einhuma, n'ekire ekiri ng'oti mpango kyona kyava emberi waibwe kyabaira einhuma" 
Exodus14:20 agho kyaba nga kiri ghagati gh'Abaisiraeli n'Abamisiri. Ekire ekyo kyakolera Abamisiri enzikiiza, aye kyagha Abaisiraeli obutangaavu. Obwire obwo bwabita nga ebikunsu byombi tibituukagaineeku." 
Exodus14:21 Agho Musa yaagolola omukono ng'agusonse ku nhandha. Musengwa Katonda yaasindika empewo ey'amaani eva e buvandhuba, yaayeyaagho amaadhi ag'enhandha obwire bwonabwona. Amaadhi geeyawulamu, aghabaire enhandha ghaafuuka itaka ikalu." 
Exodus14:22 Abaisiraeli baingira mu nhandha nga batambulira ku itaka ikalu, ng'amaadhi geebunze ku mbali ni ku mbali ng'oti bimante." 
Exodus14:23 Abamisiri boona baingira mu nhandha nga bali kubabinga n'embalaasi dha kyabazinga dhoonadhoona, n'ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, n'abavuzi be." 
Exodus14:24 Aye agho obwire nga buli kumpi okukya, Musengwa Katonda ng'ali mu muliro n'ekire, ebiri ng'oti mpango, yaalinga ghansi ku Bamisiri yaabaleetera okutya n'okusoberwa." 
Exodus14:25 Yaaleetera enkede edh'ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo okwesiba, byaloba kutambula bukalamu. Abamisiri baakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda ali kulwaniragho Abaisiraeli. Mukole tuve ghano tubalumuke.”" 
Exodus14:26 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Ghanika omukono ng'ogusonse ku nhandha, amaadhi gaire ku Bamisiri, ni ku bigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo, ni ku bavuzi baibwe.”" 
Exodus14:27 Kale Musa yaaghanika omukono ng'agusonse ku nhandha, amaadhi gaatoolera okwira era bwaja okukya nga gali mu kifo kyago ekyabuliidho. Abamisiri baagezaaku okulumuka okuva mu maadhi, aye Musengwa Katonda yaabadimiza mu nhandha ghagati." 
Exodus14:28 Amaadhi gairagho gaasaaniagho ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'abavuzi ab'embalaasi, n'abalwani ba kyabazinga boonaboona abaanonereza Abaisiraeli mu nhandha ghazira naire mulala ati eyasigalagho." 
Exodus14:29 Aye nga Abaisiraeli baabita mu nhandha nga batambulira ku itaka ikalu, ng'amaadhi geebunze ku mbali ni ku mbali ng'oti bimante." 
Exodus14:30 Atyo Musengwa Katonda bweyawonia Abaisiraeli ng'abatoola mu buyinza bw'Abamisiri, era Abaisiraeli baabona emirambo gy'Abamisiri nga giri agho ku mbali okw'enhandha." 
Exodus14:31 Abaisiraeli bwe baabona amaani agataloodheka Musengwa Katonda ge yakozesa okughangula Abamisiri, baamutya inho baamwikiriza era baikiriza n'omugheereza we Musa." 
Exodus15:1 Musa n'Abaisiraeli abandi baayembera Musengwa Katonda olwembo luno, olukoba luti: “Ka nhembere Musengwa Katonda, kuba aghangwire n'ekitiisa; aswire embalaasi n'abavuzi baadho mu nhandha." 
Exodus15:2 Bwemba ni Musengwa Katonda nfuna amaani n'okwemba naayemba; Musengwa Katonda oyo amponia abazigu. Oyo ni Katonda wange era ndidha kumusaakanga. Oyo ni Katonda wa lata wange era mmugulumiza. 
Exodus15:3 Musengwa Katonda mulwani wa ntalo, eriina lye ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus15:4 Yasuula abalwani ba Misiri n'ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo mu nhandha; abaduumizi ba Misiri abaasinganga okwesigibwa, baasaanagho mu maadhi." 
Exodus15:5 Amaadhi gaabamira; baika ku ntobo ey'enhandha ng'oti mabaale. 
Exodus15:6 Wo Musengwa Katonda, omukono gwo omusaadha gukola eby'amaani ebitaloodheka; gutentena omuzigu gwamukutulakutula." 
Exodus15:7 Ng'oli mu kitiisa kyo eky'obwakyabazinga oghangula abazigu bo; obasindikira ekiruyi kyo kyabamamula ng'oti n'omuliro bwe gumamula eisubi eikalu. 
Exodus15:8 Wafuuwa omuuka okuva mu nhindo yo amaadhi geebunga emungo, amaadhi amangi gaayemerera ng'oti kimante; amaadhi ag'oku ntobo ey'enhandha geegema, gaakalanguka ng'oti ibaale." 
Exodus15:9 Omuzigu yaakoba mule ati, ‘Ka mbabinge ndidha kubaagaana, ndidha kubatoolaku omunhago nga bwe naaba nhenze; ndidha kutoolayo empiima yange mbazikirize.’" 
Exodus15:10 Wafuuwa amaadhi gairagho gaabasaaniagho; baadimira mu maadhi amangi ng'oti byuma bizito. 
Exodus15:11 Wo Musengwa Katonda, mu bakatonda boonaboona, naani ali ng'oti niiwe? Naani ali n'obutukuvu obutiisa ng'oti niiwe? Naani aghanga okukola ebintu ebyewuunhisa era ebyoleka amaani ng'oti niiwe?" 
Exodus15:12 Waghanika omukono gwo omusaadha, ensi yaamira Abamisiri abazigu bo." 
Exodus15:13 Waatambuza abantu bo be wanunula ng'obooleka okugonza okutakoma. Wabagema ku mukono n'omukono gwo ogw'amaani waabatuusa gh'oba aghatukuvu. 
Exodus15:14 Amaghanga gaabiwulira gaadhugumira olw'okutya. Abantu ab'omu Filisitia baalumwa emyoyo olw'okweraliikirira. 
Exodus15:15 Ab'obuyinza ab'omu Edomu baatya inho; abafuzi ab'omu Moabu baatengera; abantu ab'omu Kanaani baazirika. 
Exodus15:16 Baatya baawaamu, olw'ebyo omukono gwo bye gwakola eby'amaani. Baaba agho nga basiriike ng'oti mabaale, okutuusa abantu bo, Iwe Musengwa Katonda, bwe baabitagho; abantu bo be watoola mu bwiru." 
Exodus15:17 Obaleeta waabata ku lusozi lwo, ekifo Iwe Musengwa Katonda kye weerondera nga mw'onaabanga, eisinzizo iwe mwene lye wataagho." 
Exodus15:18 Musengwa Katonda ni kyabazinga aidha okufuganga ebyanda n'ebyanda.” 
Exodus15:19 Abaisiraeli baabita mu nhandha ghagati nga batambulira ku itaka ikalu. Aye ebigaali eby'Abamisiri eby'omu lutalo, n'embalaasi dhaaku, n'abavuzi baadho bwe bangira mu nhandha, Musengwa Katonda yaiza amaadhi g'enhandha mu kifo kyago era gaabasaaniagho." 
Exodus15:20 Agho Miriamu omulanzi omukazi era mwanhina Aaroni, yaatoola akagoma yaakagema mu ngalo, n'abakazi abandi boonaboona baagema obugoma, baamunonereza nga babukuba bwe bakina." 
Exodus15:21 Miriamu yaabakulemberamu ati: “Leka nhembere Musengwa Katonda, kuba aghangwire n'ekitiisa, aswire embalaasi n'abavuzi baadho mu nhandha.”" 
Exodus15:22 Agho Musa yaalagira Abaisiraeli batambule bave agho ku Nhandha Emyufu beeyongereyo mu irungu eryetebwa Shura. Baatambulira enaku isatu mu irungu nga tibatuukaku ghali maadhi. 
Exodus15:23 Bwe baatuuka e Mara, baayagaana amaadhi ge bataaghanga kunhwa olw'okuba gaali maka eyo n'ensonga eyayetesa ekifo ekyo Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Abantu beemuluguunhia nga babuuza Musa bati: “Olwo mperaano ife tunaanhwa ki?” 
Exodus15:25 Musa yaalirira Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda yaamwoleka omuti. Musa yaasuula omuti ogwo mu maadhi, amaadhi gaawooma. Mu kifo ekyo era Musengwa Katonda yaabagheeragho amateeka n'ebiragiro, era yaabaleba." 
Exodus15:26 Musengwa Katonda yaabakoba ati: “Bwe muliba abawulize obulungi bwene, nga mukola ebyo ebituufu ye ndi, era nga mugondera amateeka gange n'ebiragiro, tija kubabonereza na bulwaire ku obwo bwe nasindikira Abamisiri. Kuba ninze Musengwa Katonda abawonia endwaire.”" 
Exodus15:27 Agho baaja baatuuka mu Elimu eyali ensulo eikumi n'ebiri, n'emiti eminaazi ensanvu, baasimba weema dhaibwe agho aghaali amaadhi." 
Exodus16:1 Abaisiraeli boonaboona baasimbuka okuva e Elimu, baaja baatuuka mu irungu eryetebwa Sina, eriri ghagati gha Elimu ni Sinai. Abaisiraeli abo baatuuka mu irungu lino ku lunaku olweikumi n'eitaanu olw'omwezi ogwokubiri, okuva ku lunaku lwe baaviiraku e Misiri." 
Exodus16:2 Abaisiraeli abo beemuluguunhiza mu irungu nga bakoba Musa ni Aaroni bati: 
Exodus16:3 “Nguli Musengwa Katonda yatwitira mu Misiri ye twatyamanga ku nsaka edh'emamba ni ku biiwulo eby'emere, ni tulya ni twiguta, ekyo n'ekyandisinzeeku imwe okutuleeta mu irungu lino twenatwena tulambukire muno endhala.”" 
Exodus16:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Bona eno, nja kumagalisa emere okuva mu igulu ku lwaimwe. Era abantu baidha kujanga buli lunaku basoloze enaabamalanga olunaku olwo. Mu nsambo oti n'eyo ndidha kubaleba mbone oba nga banaajiira ku biragiro byange." 
Exodus16:5 Ku lunaku olwomukaaga, obungi obw'emere ye banaasolozanga bwidha kubanga bwa mikuzi ebiri okusinga bwe banaasolozanga ku nnaku edhindi.”" 
Exodus16:6 Kale Musa ni Aaroni baakobera Abaisiraeli boonaboona bati: “Eigulo lino mwidha kukakasa nga Musengwa Katonda n'eyabatoola mu Misiri. 
Exodus16:7 Enkyo ku nkyo mwidha kubona ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda, kuba awuliire bye mumwemuluguunhiaku buliidho. Okwemuluguunhia okwo tikusobola kwidha ku ife, kuba katyo ife niife baani?”" 
Exodus16:8 Era Musa yaabakoba ati: “Ogw'eigulo Musengwa Katonda aidha kubagha emamba ey'okulya, era enkyo abaghe emere mulye mwigute, kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo awuliire bye mumwemuluguunhiamu. Bwe mwemuluguunhia muba timuli kukoba ife, aye muba muli kukoba Musengwa Katonda, kuba katyo ife niife baani?”" 
Exodus16:9 Agho Musa yaakoba Aaroni ati: “Koba abantu Abaisiraeli boonaboona oti, ‘Museete eno ye Musengwa Katonda, kuba awuliire okwemuluguunhia kwaimwe.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 Aaroni bweyali ali kwogera eri Abaisiraeli, baaja okulinga bati mu irungu, nga babona ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda nga kibonekera mu kire." 
Exodus16:11 Era Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus16:12 “Mpuliire okwemuluguunhia okw'abantu Abaisiraeli. Bakobe oti, ‘Eigulo mwidha kulya mamba, era enkyo mulye emere mwigute, olwo mutegeere nga ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 Eigulo eryo, obunhonhi obuli ng'oti bukologo bwaidha bwagwa ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe bwaidhula buli ghantu, era mu nkyo omusulo gwagwa gwabunia buli ghantu okwezungulula weema dhaibwe." 
Exodus16:14 Omusulo bwe gwakala, gwalekagho agho ku musenho ogw'omu irungu olubwibwi olugheghere oluli ng'oti n'engaano enhukiibwa." 
Exodus16:15 Abaisiraeli bwe baalubona beebuuzagania beene na beene bati: “Kino ki?” Musa yaabairamu ati: “Eyo n'emere Musengwa Katonda y'abaghaire okulya. 
Exodus16:16 Musengwa Katonda alagiire ati buli muntu aidha kusoloza ku mere eyo obungi bw'asobola okulya. Era asoloze akaibo kalala kalala babiri babiri olwa buli muntu ali mu weema ye.” 
Exodus16:17 Abaisiraeli baakola batyo abandi baasoloza kamaala, abandi baasoloza ntono." 
Exodus16:18 Aye bwe baagipima mu bwibo, beeyagaana ng'eyasoloza enhingi yafuna obungi obumumala, n'eyasoloza entono nga yeena yafuna obungi obumumala buli muntu yasoloza obungi bw'aghanga okulya." 
Exodus16:19 Era Musa yaabakoba ati: “Ezira muntu kuterekaku ku mere eyo okutuusa enkyo.” 
Exodus16:20 Aye abandi baaloba kuwulira bye yabakoba, baaterekaku emere eyindi aye okutuuka enkyo ng'eidhiemu enhengere era ng'ewunha bubi. Musa yaabanakughalira." 
Exodus16:21 Buli ku nkyo nga basoloza buli muntu obungi bw'asobola okulya, aye akasana bwe kaayakanga einho ng'emere eyo esaanuuka." 
Exodus16:22 Olunaku olwomukaaga, baasoloza obungi bwa mannu bwa mikuzi ebiri okusinga ye baasolozanga ku nnaku edhindi obwibo bubiri bubiri ku lwa buli muntu. Abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli bwe baakobera Musa ekintu ekyo," 
Exodus16:23 Musa yaabakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda yalagira olwenkyo lube olunaku olw'okuwuumulira irala eyo ni Sabbato ya Musengwa Katonda entukuvu. Kale mannu yoonayoona mugifumbe lwaleero, nga mugigoya oba nga mugitogosa. Etaaliibwe lwaleero mugitereke, mugirye olwaidho.”" 
Exodus16:24 Kale baaterekaku eyindi okutuuka enkyo nga Musa bweyabakoba, era tiyawunha, waire okwidwamu enhengere." 
Exodus16:25 Musa yaabakoba ati: “Eyo ni mannu ye mube mulye olwaleero, kuba olwaleero Sabbato ya Musengwa Katonda, timwidha kufuna mere yindi yoonayoona ku luya." 
Exodus16:26 Mwidha kugisolozanga okumala enaku mukaaga, aye ku lwomusanvu, olwa Sabbato, teidha kubangayo.”" 
Exodus16:27 Agho ku lunaku olwomusanvu ghaabaagho abaagezaaku okuja okusoloza emere eyo, aye tibaayagaanayo kintu kyonakyona." 
Exodus16:28 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Mulirekera li okudheemera amateeka gange n'ebiragiro? 
Exodus16:29 Bona eno, nze Musengwa Katonda nabagha Sabbato, era kyenva ni mbagha emere emala enaku eibiri ku lunaku olwomukaaga. Kale ku lunaku olwomusanvu buli muntu asigale ghaka aghazira kuja kukola mulimo gwonagwona.”" 
Exodus16:30 Kale ku lunaku olwomusanvu baaloba kukola mulimo gwonagwona. 
Exodus16:31 Abaisiraeli baayeta emere eyo mannu, ng'eri ng'oti kamuuma akatono ate nga keeru, era ng'ewooma ng'oti n'emigaati emitono gye bafumbiramu omudheenene." 
Exodus16:32 Musa yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda yatulagira tulekeghooku akaibo aka mannu, tukaterekere abaana n'abaidhukulu abaliiragho, babone ku mere Musengwa Katonda ye yatughanga nga tuli mu irungu, lwe yatutoola mu Misiri.”" 
Exodus16:33 Agho Musa yaakoba Aaroni ati: “Funayo ekidoome, ofukemu akaibo ka mannu, memale okite mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda olw'okuterekera abaana n'abaidhukulu abaliiragho.”" 
Exodus16:34 Kale nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa, Aaroni bweyakola, yaatoola ekidoome yaakita aghali Sanduuku ey'Endagaano, kiterekebwe." 
Exodus16:35 Abaisiraeli baalya mannu okumala emyaka amakumi ana, okutuusa lwe baatuuka mu nsi ey'e Kanaani ghe baafuula obutaka bwaibwe." 
Exodus16:36 (Okusinziira ku bipimo ebitongole ebyaligho mu biseera ebyo, ng'akaibo akalala kajaamu kilo ng'oti ndala ey'obuse.)" 
Exodus17:1 Abaisiraeli boonaboona baasimbuka okuva mu irungu eryetebwa Sina, baajanga nga basula mu bifo eby'endhawulo nga Musengwa Katonda bweyabalagiranga. Oluvainhuma baasimba weema dhaibwe e Refidimu, aye ate yaabulayo amaadhi ge basobola okunhwa." 
Exodus17:2 Kale beemuluguunhiza Musa nga bamukanda bati: “Ife tufunire amaadhi ag'okunhwa.” Musa yaabairamu ati: “Lwaki muneemuluguunhiza? Lwaki muleba Musengwa Katonda.” 
Exodus17:3 Aye abantu olw'okuba baali ndiwo, nga bazira maadhi ga kunhwa, baaja mu maiso n'okwemuluguunhiza Musa nga baamukoba bati: “Lwaki watutoola e Misiri okutwisa endiwo, ife n'abaana baife, n'ensolo dhaife?”" 
Exodus17:4 Kale Musa yaalirira Musengwa Katonda ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkole ntya abantu bano? Babulaku katono okunkuba amabaale nfe.”" 
Exodus17:5 Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Toola abandi ku bakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli, muje mwesookenga abantu emberi. Era ja n'omwigo gwo gwe wakuba ku mwiga Kiyira." 
Exodus17:6 Nze ndidha kuba nga ndi eyo ku lusozi Horebu emberi waimwe. Oidha kukuba olubaale era amaadhi gaidha kuvaamu, abantu ge baghanga okunhwa.” Musa yaakola atyo ng'abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli babona." 
Exodus17:7 Abantu abo Abaisiraeli beemuluguunhiza Musengwa Katonda era baamuleba nga bakoba bati: “Aye bwene Musengwa Katonda ali mu ife oba bbe?” Kale Musa kyeyava n'atuuma ekifo ekyo amaina gano: Massa, eritegeeza “okuleba”, ni Meriba, eritegeeza “Okwemuluguunhia”." 
Exodus17:8 Agho Abamaleki baidha okulwana n'Abaisiraeli e Refidimu. 
Exodus17:9 Musa yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Londayo abasaadha muje enkyo mulwane n'Abamaleki. Nze ndidha kuba ku mutwe ogw'olusozi nga ngemye omwigo Katonda gwe yankoba okuja nagwo.” 
Exodus17:10 Yoshua yaakola nga Musa bweyamukoba, yaalwana n'Abamaleki Musa, ni Aaroni, ni Hura, baaja baaniina ku mutwe ogw'olusozi." 
Exodus17:11 Kiisi Musa lwe yaghanikanga omukono ng'Abaisiraeli banhigiriza Abamaleki, ate kiisi lwe yagwisanga ng'Abamaleki n'abanhigiriza Abaisiraeli." 
Exodus17:12 Aye Musa yaaluyirira emikono, kale Aaroni ni Hura baaleeta eibaale yaatyamaku, beene baamwemerera ku mbali ni ku mbali, baamugemerera emikono nga bagighaniike kale gyaba nga giri ghaigulu okutuusa endhuba okugwa." 
Exodus17:13 Mu nsambo eyo yaaghangula Abamaleki. 
Exodus17:14 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Obughanguzi obwo bughandiike mu kitabo bulobe kwerabirwa. Era okobere Yoshua oti ndidha kuzikiriza Abamaleki mbamaliregho irala.” 
Exodus17:15 Musa yaazimba alutaari yaagituuma eriina “Musengwa Katonda ni bendera yange.” 
Exodus17:16 Era yaakoba ati: “Mughanike ebendera ya Musengwa Katonda ghaigulu inho. Musengwa Katonda aidha kulwananga n'Abamaleki buli luse olunairangagho.” 
Exodus18:1 Yethuro omusaadha eyazaalanga muka Musa era nga kabona ow'e Midia, yaawulira byonabyona Katonda bye yakolera Musa, Abaisiraeli boonaboona, n'abantu be, bweyali ng'ali kubatoola mu Misiri." 
Exodus18:2 Mperaano, Musa yali yagheereza mukazi we Zippori ye Yethuro mukoirume we, era nga Yethuro yamutwala yaamukuuma" 
Exodus18:3 ghalala ni batabane bombi, Musa be yatuuma amaina gano: Gereshomu, ng'akoba ati, “Kuba mmuzaire nga ndi musenze ghano mu nsi etali yange”," 
Exodus18:4 ni Eliezeri, ng'akoba ati: “Kuba Katonda wa badhaadha bange yaanhamba yamponia okwitibwa kyabazinga ow'e Misiri.”" 
Exodus18:5 Kale Yethuro oyo yaidha ni muka Musa, ni batabane ba Musa, mu irungu Musa n'Abaisiraeli ye baali nga basimbye weema dhaibwe ku lusozi lwa Katonda." 
Exodus18:6 Yaamugheereza obukwenda ati: “Nze mukoirume wo Yethuro, ndi kwidha y'oli ni mukazi wo, ni batabane bo bombi.”" 
Exodus18:7 Musa yaaja yaakuba amakiryaivu yaamusangaaza, yaamala yaasituka, yaamunhwegera baalamusagania, olwo baingira mu weema ya Musa." 
Exodus18:8 Musa yaaghayiraku mukoirume we ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yakola kyabazinga ow'e Misiri, ni bye yakola Abamisiri olw'okununula Abaisiraeli. Era yaamughayira ku bizibu bye baayagaana mu ngira, n'ensambo Musengwa Katonda ye yabawoniamu." 
Exodus18:9 Yethuro yaasagamba olw'ebirungi byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yakolera Abaisiraeli okubatoola mu ngalo edh'Abamisiri. 
Exodus18:10 Era yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda oyo asaakibwe, eyabatoola mu ngalo dha kyabazinga ow'e Misiri, ni mu ngalo edh'Abamisiri." 
Exodus18:11 Buti ntegeire nga Musengwa Katonda wa maani okusinga bakatonda boonaboona, kuba yatoola abantu be mu ngalo edh'Abamisiri abaabeeyagalirangaku nga tibababonamu ka buntu.”" 
Exodus18:12 Agho Yethuro yaataagho ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa kyonakyona okuwaagho, n'emisengo egindi egy'okughaayo eri Katonda. Aaroni n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli boonaboona baidha balya ni mukoirume wa Musa mu maiso ga Katonda." 
Exodus18:13 Olunaku olwairirira Musa yaatyama okusalira abantu emisango, era abantu kamaala baaba agho ghe yali okuva ku nkyo, baazibya obwire." 
Exodus18:14 Yethuro bweyabona ebyo byonabyona mukoirume we bye yali ng'ali kukolera abantu, yaamukoba ati: “Biki bino by'oli kukola. Lwaki obaagho wenka okusalira abantu emisango, abantu boonaboona ni bakwemereraku agho okuva ku nkyo ni bazibya obwire?”" 
Exodus18:15 Musa yaamwiramu ati: “Ndi n'okukola ntyo, kuba abantu baidha ye ndi okubuuza Katonda by'akoba ku nsonga edh'endhawulo." 
Exodus18:16 Bwe ghabaagho abali n'obutaisania baidha ye ndi naabakobera ku bombi omutuufu n'omukyamu, nga mbakobera amateeka ga Katonda n'ebiragiro bye.”" 
Exodus18:17 Yethuro yaamukoba ati: “Ky'oli kukola ti kikalamu. 
Exodus18:18 Oli kwerumya inho era waalumya n'abantu abo, kuba omulimo muzito inho okugukola wenka." 
Exodus18:19 Mpulirisa nkughe ku magezi, era Katonda abe n'iwe! Iwe sigala ng'oli ghagati gha Katonda n'abantu, era ng'ensonga dhaibwe odhimutwalira okudhigondhoola." 
Exodus18:20 Beegese amateeka ga Katonda n'ebiragiro bye, era obaleetere okumanha engeri ye bateekwa okwebisaamu, ni bye bateekwa okukola." 
Exodus18:21 Era linga mu bantu boonaboona obone abantu abali n'obusobozi, abatya Katonda, abeesigwa era abatenda kulya nguzi. Olondemu abasobola okukulembera abantu olukumi olukumi, n'abantu ekikumi ekikumi, n'abantu ataanu ataanu, n'abantu eikumi eikumi." 
Exodus18:22 Leka abo n'ababe basalirenga abantu emisango gyaibwe buliidho. Bwe ghabaagho ensonga enkulu bagireetenga y'oli, aye ensonga entonotono dhoonadhoona badhimalenga. Kale iwe kiidha kukwanguyira kuba banaaba bakukendeziizaaku obuzito." 
Exodus18:23 Bw'onaakola otyo, era nga Katonda bw'ali kukulagira, oidha kuwona okwerumya, n'abantu boonaboona bairengayo ewaibwe ng'ensonga dhaibwe dhikoleibwaku.”" 
Exodus18:24 Musa yaakozesa amagezi ago mukoirume we ge yamugha," 
Exodus18:25 yaalinga mu Baisiraeli boonaboona, yaalondamu abantu abali n'obusobozi, yaabafuula abakulembeze b'abantu olukumi olukumi, n'abantu ekikumi ekikumi, n'abantu ataanu ataanu, n'abantu eikumi eikumi." 
Exodus18:26 Abo baasaliranga abantu emisango buliidho. Emisango egyalinga emikalangufu nga bagitwalira Musa, aye emitonotono gyonagyona nga bagimala beene." 
Exodus18:27 Agho Musa yaasiibula mukoirume we, yaagolola ewuwe mu nsi ye." 
Exodus19:1 Nga ghaakabita emyezi ebiri kasookanga Baisiraeli bava mu Misiri, ku lunaku olwinhama omwezi ogwokusatu baatuuka mu irungu eryetebwa Sinai," 
Exodus19:2 nga bamaze okuva mu kifo ekyetebwa Refidimu. Era bwe baatuuka baasimba weema dhaibwe kumpi n'olusozi Sinai. 
Exodus19:3 Musa yaaniina ghaigulu ku lusozi okwogera ni Katonda. Agho Musengwa Katonda ng'ali ku lusozi yaamweta yaamukoba ati: “Ja okobere Abaisiraeli, baidhukulu ba Yakobo abo oti," 
Exodus19:4 ‘Mwabona bye nakola Abamisiri, era mwabona bwe nabaleeta okubatuusa ghano ghe ndi, nga mbaginze ng'oti n'enkookooma bw'eginga omwana waayo ku maghagha." 
Exodus19:5 Kale ni, bwe munaagonderanga bye mbakoba, ni mukuuma endagaano yange, mwidha kubanga bantu bange ab'endhawulo ku bantu bange abandi boonaboona. Ensi yoonayoona yange, aye imwe munaabanga bantu bange abalondemu." 
Exodus19:6 Era munaabanga eighanga eitukuvu, mwampeerezanga nga bakabona. Ebyo by'obe okobe Abaisiraeli.’ ”" 
Exodus19:7 Kale Musa yaaja yaayeta abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli, yaabakobera ebibono ebyo nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Exodus19:8 Abantu boonaboona bamwiramu bati: “Ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda by'atukobye okukola twidha kubikola.” Era Musa yaaja okukobera Musengwa Katonda ng'abantu bwe baakoba. 
Exodus19:9 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Ndidha kwidhira mu kire ekigemu, abantu baghange okuwulira nga ndi kwogera n'iwe, okuva olwo bakwikirizenga buliidho.” Musa, kabiri yaakobera Musengwa Katonda ebyo abantu bye bairamu." 
Exodus19:10 Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Ja y'abantu obatukuze olwaleero n'idho, era booze ebivaalo byaibwe," 
Exodus19:11 olwadhuuzi babe nga beetegefu, kuba ku olwo nze Musengwa Katonda ndiika ku lusozi Sinai ng'abantu boonaboona babona." 
Exodus19:12 Era ja oteegho ensalosalo olusozi kwe lukanga, okobe abantu beegendereze obutaja ku lusozi waire okutuuka okumpi n'ensalosalo eyo. Oyo yeenayeena anaaniina ekigere ku lusozi olwo ali n'okwitibwa." 
Exodus19:13 Era ghatabaagho amugemaku naire, aye bamukube bwa mabaale oba okumulasa n'akalaso afe. Kino kitwalizaamu abantu era n'ensolo. Endeka bw'efuuwa omukuzi omulala guti nga muleeyiriri, abantu baseete y'olusozi.”" 
Exodus19:14 Kale Musa yaika okuva ku lusozi, yaaja y'abantu yaabatukuza, era baayoza ebivaalo byaibwe." 
Exodus19:15 Yaabakoba ati: “Olwadhuuzi mube nga muli beetegefu, abasaadha mulobe kuba na bakazi mu buliri.”" 
Exodus19:16 Olunaku olwokusatu ku nkyo ghaabaagho okutyabuka n'okumyansa okw'olukuba, n'ekire ekigemu kyaidha ku lusozi, era ghaabaagho n'okuvuga okw'endeka okw'amaani einho. Abantu boonaboona, nga bali mu weema dhaibwe, baatya inho baadhugumira." 
Exodus19:17 Olwo Musa yaalagira abantu bave mu weema dhaibwe baje baagaanane ni Katonda. Baaja baayemerera ghansi gh'olusozi. 
Exodus19:18 Olusozi Sinai lwaidhula omwosi, kuba Musengwa Katonda yalwikaku ng'ali mu muliro. Era omwosi ogwaluvangaku okuja ghaigulu nga guli ng'oti n'oguva mu kifo aghookerwa ebiwumbe olusozi lwonalwona lwatengeeta bubi inho." 
Exodus19:19 Okuvuga okw'endeka bwe kwaja nga kweyongera einho, Musa yaayogera era Katonda yaamwiramu mu mamiro agali ng'oti kutyabuka kwa lukuba." 
Exodus19:20 Musengwa Katonda yaika ku lusozi Sinai ku mutwe yaayeta Musa yeena aje ghaigulu ku lusozi ku mutwe. Era Musa yaaja. 
Exodus19:21 Yaamukoba ati: “Ika ghansi olabule abantu batatuuma nsalosalo kwidha kuneerolera, kuba bwe banaakikola, abantu kamaala ku abo baidha kufa." 
Exodus19:22 Bakabona abaseeta ghe ndi bateekwa okwetukuza, bwebataakikolenga ndidha kubabonerezanga.”" 
Exodus19:23 Musa yaakoba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Abantu tibasobola kwidha ghaigulu ku lusozi Sinai, kuba iwe mwene watusikirira tulutwale nga lutukuvu era tuteegho ensalosalo okulwezungulula.”" 
Exodus19:24 Musengwa Katonda era yaamukoba ati: “Ika ghansi onone Aaroni mwire naye ghano aye bakabona n'abantu otabaganha kutuuma nsalosalo kwidha ghe ndi, bwe banaakola batyo ndidha kubabonereza.”" 
Exodus19:25 Kale Musa yaika ghansi, yaakobera abantu Musengwa Katonda bye yamukoba." 
Exodus20:1 Agho Katonda yaayogera ebibono bino 
Exodus20:2 ati: “Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, eyabatoola mu Misiri ye mwali nga mukola obwiru." 
Exodus20:3 “Mutasinzanga katonda wundi okutoolaku nze. 
Exodus20:4 “Muteekoleranga kibaadhe oba kiwumbe ekifaanana ekintu kyonakyona ekiri ghaigulu ku igulu, oba ghansi ku nsi, oba waire ekiri mu maadhi agali ghansi agh'ensi." 
Exodus20:5 Ebintu ebyo mutabisinzanga, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe ndi wa nkikidi ku bantu bange. Abo abankyagha mbabonereza, era naabonereza n'abaana baibwe, n'abaidhukulu, okutuukira irala ku luse olwokusatu n'olwokuna." 
Exodus20:6 Aye abantu enkumi n'enkumi abangonza, ni bagondera ebiragiro byange, mbooleka okugonza okutakoma." 
Exodus20:7 “Mutakozesanga liina lyange nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe mu bya matamatama, kuba tija kuloba kubonereza oyo yeenayeena akozesa eriina lyange obubi." 
Exodus20:8 “Muteerabiranga kukuza lunaku lwa Sabbato nga lutukuvu. 
Exodus20:9 Muli n'enaku mukaaga edh'okukolerangaku emirimo gyaimwe gyonagyona. 
Exodus20:10 Aye olunaku olwomusanvu, lwa Sabbato yange nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe. Olwo mutalukolerangaku mulimo gwonagwona waire imwe beene, waire batabane baimwe, waire baghala baimwe, waire abairu baimwe abasaadha oba abakazi, waire ensolo dhaimwe, era waire abasenze be musuza;" 
Exodus20:11 kuba mu nnaku omukaaga nze Musengwa Katonda nakola eigulu, n'ensi, n'enhandha n'ebirimu byonabyona, naawuumula ku lunaku olwomusanvu. Kye nava ni ndugha enkabi era ni ndutukuza." 
Exodus20:12 “Balata baimwe ni bainhaimwe mubaghenga ekitiibwa, olwo mughangaale enaku kamaala mu nsi nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe ye ndi kubagha." 
Exodus20:13 “Mutatemulanga. 
Exodus20:14 “Mutayendanga. 
Exodus20:15 “Mutaibanga. 
Exodus20:16 “Mutaghanga ku muntu budhulizi bwa bulimba. 
Exodus20:17 “Muteegwanizanga ndhu dha bantu bandi. Muteegwanizanga baka beene, waire okwegwaniza abairu baibwe abasaadha oba abakazi, waire ente dhaibwe, oba endogoyi dhaibwe, oba ebintu byaibwe ebindi byonabyona.”" 
Exodus20:18 Abantu boonaboona bwe baawulira okutyabuka okw'olukuba n'okuvuga okw'endeka, ni babona n'okumyansa okw'olukuba, n'olusozi nga luli kunioka omwosi, baatya inho baadhugumira era baayemerera ere ghalaku." 
Exodus20:19 Baakoba Musa bati: “Iwe yogera n'ife twidha kuwulira, aye Katonda atayogera n'ife, kuba tusobola okufa.”" 
Exodus20:20 Musa yaakoba abantu ati: “Mutatya, kuba Katonda aidhie kubaleba, n'okubongeramu okumutya, mulobe kwonoona.”" 
Exodus20:21 Era abantu baasigala nga bakaayemereire ghala, aye Musa ng'ali kuseeta y'ekire ekigemu Katonda mwe yali." 
Exodus20:22 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa okukoba abantu Abaisiraeli ati: “Muboine nze Musengwa Katonda bwe ndhogeire n'imwe nga ndi mu igulu. 
Exodus20:23 Mutakolanga bakatonda mu feeza ni mubasinziza ghalala ninze, waire okwekolera bakatonda mu zaabu." 
Exodus20:24 Nzimbira alutaari ey'eitaka era ogheereyo ku alutaari okwo entaama, oba embuzi, oba ente, ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, era n'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Mu kifo kyonakyona kye nnaasalangagho okunsinzizaamu, ndidha kwidhanga nkughe enkabi." 
Exodus20:25 Bw'onzimbira alutaari ey'amabaale, otakozesanga mabaale mabaadhe bw'ogabaadhaku ogafuula agatagwaniire kuzimba alutaari ya kunsinzizangaku." 
Exodus20:26 Otakolanga alutaari yeetaaga kuniinaku na madaala, kuba osobola okughemukiraku omubiri.”" 
Exodus21:1 “Abantu boonaboona Abaisiraeli baghe amateeka gano: 
Exodus21:2 Bw'ogulanga omwiru Omuheburayi omusaadha, aidha kukukoleranga obwiru okumala entangama ya myaka mukaaga. Ogwomusanvu bwe gutuuka omulekanga yaaja nga wa idembe, era ghazira ky'ateekwa kukusasula." 
Exodus21:3 Bw'omugulanga ng'azira mukazi, atajanga na mukazi. Aye bw'omugulanga ng'ali n'omukazi, ajanga ni mukazi we." 
Exodus21:4 Musengwa Katonda we bw'anaabanga nga n'eyamugha omukazi n'amuzaalira abaana abalenzi oba abaghala, omukazi n'abaana banaasigalanga nga ba musengwa we era omusaadha oyo atajanga nabo." 
Exodus21:5 Aye omwiru bw'asalangagho n'akoba ati agonza musengwa we, ni mukazi we, n'abaana be, era nga tayenda kumuleka aje nga wa idembe," 
Exodus21:6 musengwa we amutwalanga mu isinzizo yaamwemereza gha lwigi oba gha mwango, yaamufuwula kutu owundi ng'akozesa olugera olusongovu. Olwo omwiru oyo anaabanga mwiru we okutuusa okufa." 
Exodus21:7 “Omusaadha bw'anaatundanga mughala we ng'omwiru omukazi, omwiru oyo taalekebwenga kuja nga wa idembe ng'oti n'abairu abasaadha bwe balekebwa." 
Exodus21:8 Bw'anaabanga nga tasanhusa musengwa we eyamwegulira ng'omukazi, musengwa we oyo anaamwizangayo ye yamugula baamununula bye yamugula era musengwa we oyo taamuguzenga ba ndha, kuba yamukola bubi okumwekyusaaku." 
Exodus21:9 Omusaadha bw'anaaguliranga mutabane we omwiru ng'omukazi, agho anaabanga n'okumubisa nga mughala we." 
Exodus21:10 Omusaadha bw'afunanga omukazi owundi, atakendeezanga ku by'abaire akolera ole abairengagho ng'okumufunira emere, n'ebivaalo, n'okumulabirira mu by'obufumbo." 
Exodus21:11 Bw'anaabanga nga tamukoleire bintu ebyo ebisatu, omukazi oyo anaabanga wa idembe okuvaagho nga ghazira mpiiya yoonayoona esaswirwa musaadha oyo.”" 
Exodus21:12 “Omuntu yeenayeena anaakubanga omuntu n'amwita, yeena anaabanga n'okwitibwa." 
Exodus21:13 Aye bw'anaabanga nga tiyamweteega mu bugenderevu, aye nga nze Katonda ninze nasalagho afe mu nsambo eyo, agho ndidha kutangagho ekifo mw'anaalumukiranga, n'awona omusango ogwo." 
Exodus21:14 Aye omuntu anaalumbanga mwine mu bugenderevu, n'asala amagezi n'amwita, oyo ni bw'anaabanga ng'alumukiire ku alutaari yange okwewonia, anaatoolebwangayo yaitibwa." 
Exodus21:15 “Omuntu yeenayeena anaakubanga ise oba inhina, wa kwitibwanga." 
Exodus21:16 “Omuntu yeenayeena anaawuuyanga omuntu n'amutunda, oba n'ayagaanibwa ng'ali naye, wa kwitibwanga." 
Exodus21:17 “Omuntu yeenayeena anaakolimiranga ise oba inhina, wa kwitibwanga." 
Exodus21:18 “Abantu bwe banaasoolanga memale owundi n'akuba mwine eibaale, oba n'amufunta ekifunsi, ole ye bakubye n'atafa aye n'agwa ku ndiri," 
Exodus21:19 bw'anaawonangamu n'aba ng'asobola okukoomera ku mwigo okujaaku ku luya, eyamukuba taabengaku musango. Aye aidha kusasuliranga ye yakuba olw'ebiseera bye by'anaabanga ng'afiiriirwa, era amwidhandhabenga okutuusa lw'anaawoneranga irala." 
Exodus21:20 “Omuntu bw'anaatoolanga omwigo n'akuba omwiru we omusaadha oba omwiru we omukazi n'amwitiragho, omuntu oyo aidhanga kubonerezebwa." 
Exodus21:21 Aye omwiru oyo bw'ataafiirengagho aye n'amalaghooku olunaku oba eibiri ng'akaali mulamu, omuntu oyo taidha kubonerezebwanga. Kuba anaabanga amaze okufiirwa omwiru we ye yagula n'empiiya dhe." 
Exodus21:22 “Bwebanaabanga nga bali kulwana, memale owundi ku abo n'alumya omukazi ali enda, enda n'evaamu aye omukazi n'ataba bubi, oyo amulumiiza aidha kumuliyiranga omughendo iba w'omukazi oyo ye balumiiza gw'anaasalanga ni gwikirizibwa abalamuzi." 
Exodus21:23 Aye omukazi bw'anaabanga obubi, amulumiiza aidha kumuliyiranga bulamu olw'obulamu," 
Exodus21:24 oba eriiso olw'eriiso, oba eriino olw'eriino, oba omukono olw'omukono, oba ekigere olw'ekigere," 
Exodus21:25 oba okwokebwa olw'okwokya, oba okuteebwaku ekibwa olw'ekibwa, oba okunuubulwa olw'okunuubula." 
Exodus21:26 “Omuntu bw'anaakubanga eriiso ery'omwiru we omusaadha oba omwiru we omukazi n'alyonoona, aidha kulekanga omwiru oyo aje nga wa idembe olw'okusasulira eriiso lye." 
Exodus21:27 “Bw'anaakubanga eriino ery'omwiru we omusaadha oba omwiru we omukazi n'alitoolamu, aidha kulekanga omwiru oyo aje nga wa idembe olw'okusasulira eriino lye.”" 
Exodus21:28 “Ente bw'enaafulanga omuntu n'emwita, ente eyo enaakubwanga amabaale yaafa, era emamba yaayo teeriibwenga. Aye mwene yo taabonerezebwenga." 
Exodus21:29 Aye ente eyo bw'eba ng'ebairenga erumbagana abantu, era nga mwene yo yalabulwa aye yaaba nga tagisiba, memale n'efula omuntu n'emwita, ente eyo enaakubwanga amabaale yaafa, ni mwene yo anaitibwanga yeena." 
Exodus21:30 Aye bwe banaamuganhanga okuligha olw'okuwonia obulamu bwe, anaabanga n'okusasula mu bwidhuvu kye banaamusaliranga." 
Exodus21:31 Ente bw'enaafulanga omwana ow'omuntu, omulenzi oba omughala, eiteeka lyene eryo n'erinaakozesebwanga." 
Exodus21:32 Ente bw'enaafulanga omwiru n'emwita, mwene nte aidha kughanga mwene mwiru ebitundu bya feeza amakumi asatu olw'okumuliyira, era ente eidha kukubwanga amabaale efe." 
Exodus21:33 “Omuntu bw'anaalekanga ekiina nga takisandiikeeku, oba omuntu bw'anaasimanga ekiina n'atakighembaku, memale ente oba endogoyi n'ekigwamu," 
Exodus21:34 mwene kiina anaabanga n'okuligha ensolo eyo. Aidha kughanga mwene nsolo empiiya, era olwo ensolo enfu enaabanga yiye." 
Exodus21:35 “Ente ey'omuntu bw'enaalumyanga ente ey'omuntu owundi, ere erumiziibwa n'efa, banaatundanga ente enamu baagabana empiiya era baagabana n'emamba ey'ere enfu." 
Exodus21:36 Aye bwekinaabanga nti ente eyo erumiiza yiinaayo ebairenga emanhiibwa okuva einhuma ere nga nfulagani, aye mwene yo n'aloba okugisiba, mwene yo oyo aidha kutoolanga ente enamu aliyire mwene ere enfu, olwo ensolo eyo enfu enaafuukanga yiye.”" 
Exodus22:1 “Omuntu bw'anaibanga ente oba entaama, n'agiita oba n'agitunda, aidha kusasulanga ente itaanu olw'ente endala ye yaiba, oba entaama ina olw'entaama endala ye yaiba." 
Exodus22:2 Omuntu oyo anaabanga n'okusasula ekyo kye yaiba. Era bw'anaabanga ng'azira kya kusasulisa, banaamutundanga ng'omwiru olw'okusasula kye yaiba. Ensolo ye yaiba, k'ebe nte, oba ndogoyi, oba ntaama, bw'enaayagaanibwanga nga nnamu eri mu dhidhe, aidha kugisasulangamu ensolo ibiri. “Omwibi bw'anaayagaanibwanga obwire ng'ali kumenha endhu okwingira memale n'aitibwa, oyo amwise taabengaku musango gwa butemo. Aye bw'anaayagaanibwanga omusana memale n'aitibwa, oyo amwise anaavunaanibwanga omusango ogw'obutemo." 
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 “Omuntu bw'anaalekuliranga ensolo dhe okuliira mu musiri gwe oba mu isamba lye ery'emizabbibu, memale ni dhija ni dhirya emere mu musiri ogw'omuntu owundi, aidha kusasulanga emere ye dhiriire ng'atoola ku bisinga obulungi ebiri mu musiri gwe oba isamba lye ery'emizabbibu." 
Exodus22:6 “Bw'anaateeranga oluyiira mu kibandha kye, memale ni lukunkuna mu isubi ni lutuuka mu kibandha eky'omuntu owundi ni lwokya emere ye, ye yakungula naabunga mu musiri oba eyo y'akaali kukungula, oba ni lwokya omusiri gwonagwona, oyo eyateera oluyiira aidhanga kusasula mwene mere byonabyona by'anaabanga ng'afiiriirwa." 
Exodus22:7 “Omuntu bw'anaaghanga mwine empiiya oba ebintu bye eby'omughendo okubimukuumira, memale ni babiibira mu ndhu y'oyo ye babighaire okubikuuma, omwibi bw'anaagemwanga anaasasulanga ebintu ebyo emikuzi ebiri." 
Exodus22:8 Aye omwibi bw'anaabanga nga tagemeibwa, mwene ndhu ebintu mwe byaibirwa anaaleetebwanga mu isinzizo yaalayira mu maiso ga Katonda oba nga bwenebwene tiyaiba bintu bya mwine." 
Exodus22:9 “Bwe ghanaabangagho abantu abakaayanira ekintu kyonakyona, k'ebe nte, oba ndogoyi, oba ntaama, oba mbuzi, oba kivaalo, oba ekintu kyonakyona ekyabula, nga buli muntu akoba ati, ‘Kyange’, ensonga dha bombi dhinaatwalibwanga mu isinzizo. Oyo Katonda y'anaasalangagho nga n'omukyamu, anaasasulanga ole mwine ekintu ekyo emikuzi ebiri." 
Exodus22:10 “Omuntu bw'anaaghanga mwine endogoyi ye, oba ente ye, oba entaama ye, oba embuzi ye, oba ensolo ye, eyindi yoonayoona okugimukuumira, memale n'efa, oba n'erumizibwa obubi, oba n'eibibwa nga ghazira ali kubona," 
Exodus22:11 banaajanga mu isinzizo. Ole ye baagha okukuuma anaalayiranga mu maiso ga Katonda oba nga bwenebwene tiyatuusa ku nsolo ya mwine ekyo ekyagituukaku, era mwene nsolo aidha kwikirizanga okulayira okwo, era taidhanga kumusasuza." 
Exodus22:12 Aye bw'enaabanga nga yaibibwa okuva ku ye baagikuumisa, oyo ye baagikuumisa aidhanga kugisasula mwene yo." 
Exodus22:13 Ensolo eyo bw'enaabanga nga yaitibwa nsolo dha mu nsiko era nga ye baagikuumisa asobola okwoleka ku bitundu byayo ebyasigalagho, t'agisasulenga." 
Exodus22:14 “Omuntu bw'aneeyazikwanga ensolo ya mwine, memale n'erumizibwa obubi oba n'efa nga mwene yo ti n'ali nayo, aidha kugisasulanga." 
Exodus22:15 Aye mwene yo bw'anaabanga nga n'eyali nayo, ole taidha kugisasulanga. Bw'enaabanga empangise, ole aidha kusasulanga mpiiya dha kugipangisa dhonka.”" 
Exodus22:16 “Omusaadha bw'anaasendasendanga omughala omuto omwegha akaali okwandhula n'aba naye, anaaghangayo omwandu yaamubayiza." 
Exodus22:17 Aye ise ow'omughala bw'anaaloberanga omusaadha oyo okubayiza mughala we, era omusaadha oyo anaabanga n'okutoola omwandu ogusasulirwa omughala omwegha, yaagugha ise w'omughala oyo." 
Exodus22:18 “Otaganhanga mukazi mulogo kubaagho nga mulamu. 
Exodus22:19 “Omusaadha yeenayeena anaabanga n'ensolo mu nsambo abasaadha ye baba n'abakazi mu buliri, anaitibwanga." 
Exodus22:20 “Omuntu yeenayeena bw'anaaghangayo omusengo eri omusambwa mu kifo eky'okugugha nze Musengwa Katonda, anaazikirizibwanga." 
Exodus22:21 “Omuntu ow'eighanga erindi otamubisanga bubi oba okumutuntuza, kuba mwena mwali ba ighanga lindi nga muli e Misiri." 
Exodus22:22 “Otabisanga bubi namwandu oba mulekwa. 
Exodus22:23 Bw'olibabisa obubi, baja kundirira era zeena mpulire okulira kwaibwe," 
Exodus22:24 nsungughale era nkusindike ofiire mu lutalo. Olwo weena bakazi bo babe banamwandu, n'abaana bo babe bamulekwa." 
Exodus22:25 “Bw'owolanga empiiya omuntu yeenayeena ku bantu bange abaavu b'olimu, otakolanga ng'abaghozi abandi, n'omutoolaku magoba." 
Exodus22:26 “Bw'ogemanga ku mwino ekivaalo kye ng'omusingo, okimwirizanga ng'endhuba ekaali kugwa," 
Exodus22:27 kuba ekyo kye yeebwika era n'ekikunta kye ekimusuuya. Kale aghanga atya okutenduka nga tiyeebwise? Era bw'anandiriranga ndidha kumuwuliranga, kuba nze ndi wa kivunika." 
Exodus22:28 “Otavumanga Katonda oba okukolimira omufuzi ow'abantu bo. 
Exodus22:29 “Oidha kundeeteranga ebigheebwayo ku birime by'osooka okukungula, ni ku muzigo ogw'emiti emyoliva gy'okamula, ni ku mwenge gw'emizabbibu gw'okunha. Era oidha kumpanga omwana omulenzi anaasookanga okuzaalibwa." 
Exodus22:30 Era otyo bw'onaakolanga n'ente, n'entaama, n'embuzi enume enaazaalibwanga mu luzaalo olusooka enaabangaku ni dhiinaadho okumala enaku musanvu, olwomunaana waagimpa ng'ekigheebwayo."
