Exodus22:31 “Mwidha kubanga bantu bange abatukuvu. Olw'ekyo mutalyanga mamba ya nsolo eitiibwa nsolo dha mu nsiko, mugisuuliranga mbwa." 
Exodus23:1 “Otasansaanianga ngambo, era oteeyimbanga na mukozi wa bibi ng'ogha obudhulizi obutali butuufu." 
Exodus23:2 “Otajiiranga ku kintu abantu abasinga bungi kye bakoba nga kikyamu, oba okubajiiraku nga bali kugha obudhulizi obubuzaabuza ekituufu." 
Exodus23:3 Era oteekubiranga ku luuyi lwa mwavu n'omuleetera kusinga musango, mbu olw'okuba mwavu." 
Exodus23:4 “Bw'obonanga ente oba endogoyi ey'omuzigu wo ng'eri kumubulaku, ogigemanga waagimwiriza." 
Exodus23:5 Era bw'oyagaananga endogoyi ey'omuntu atakwenda ng'egwire olw'obuzito bwe bagitwise, otamubitangaku bubite omubeerangaku okugibbeeda, mwagiiza ku magulu gaayo." 
Exodus23:6 “Otabuzaabuzanga nsonga dha muntu mwavu ng'ali kuwozesebwa. 
Exodus23:7 “Weesambirenga irala okughaayiriza omuntu yeenayeena. Omuntu aziraku musango era omutuufu, otamusaliranga gwa kufa. Kuba tiriroba kuvunaana kiisi mukozi wa kibi." 
Exodus23:8 “Otalyanga nguzi, kuba enguzi eziba abantu amaiso era yaafuulaniafuulania ensonga dh'oyo omutuufu." 
Exodus23:9 “Otabisanga bubi muntu wa ighanga lindi ali mu imwe mwidhi bwe kiruma okuba ow'eighanga erindi, kuba mwena bwe mwali e Misiri." 
Exodus23:10 “Onaamalanga emyaka omukaaga ng'osimba emere yo, era ng'ogikungula." 
Exodus23:11 Aye mu mwaka ogwomusanvu olekanga eitaka lyo lyawuumulaku, era emere yoonayoona ebala mu misiri erekebwangayo, abaavu baagirya. Ate eyo abaavu ye baba nga tibaliire bagirekeranga ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhaalya. Mu nsambo n'endala eyo, otyo bw'onaakolanga amasamba go ag'emizabbibu n'ag'emiti emyoliva." 
Exodus23:12 “Oli n'enaku mukaaga dh'oghanga okukoleramu emirimo gyo, aye olwomusanvu oidhanga kuwuumula. Olwo ente dho n'endogoyi dho dhighange okuwuumula, era abairu bo, n'abamaghanga agandi abakukolera bawuumule bairemu amaani." 
Exodus23:13 “Mukuume ebiragiro ebyo byonabyona mulobe kubisobya. Mwerabirire irala emisambwa gyonagyona, era mutaganhanga maina gaagyo na kubabita mu kanwa." 
Exodus23:14 “Buli mwaka mwidha kwidhanga munkolere ebibinuko bya mikuzi esatu olw'okumpa ekitiisa. 
Exodus23:15 Ekibinuko ekisooka n'eky'omu mwezi gwa Abibu, omwezi gwe mwaviiramu mu Misiri. Nga bwe nabalagira, bwe mukolanga ekibinuko kino mulyanga migaati gitazimbulukusiibwa gyonka okumala entangama ya nnaku musanvu. Era ghatabangagho aidhanga kunsinza ng'azira kigheebwayo." 
Exodus23:16 “Ekibinuko eky'Amakungula n'ekyokubiri, ekibaagho nga muli kukungula bye mwasiga mu misiri gyaimwe ebisooka. “Ku nkomerero ey'omwaka munaakolanga ekibinuko ekyokusatu eky'okusololeza ebirime mu byagi, ekyetebwa Ekibinuko eky'Entindi." 
Exodus23:17 Kiisi musaadha anaabanga n'okwidha okunsinza nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe mu bibinuko ebyo eby'emikuzi esatu buli mwaka. 
Exodus23:18 “Bw'oghangayo ensolo eitiibwa ng'omusengo, otaleeterangaku migaati gizimbulukusiibwa. Era amasavu ag'ensolo edhigheebwayo ng'omusengo mu bibinuko ebyo, gatasulangagho kutuusa nkyo." 
Exodus23:19 “Emere ye musookanga okukungula mu misiri gyaimwe mugireetanga mu ndhu yange nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mwagighaayo. “Mutafumbiranga mamba ya mbuzi nto oba ya ntaama nto, mu mata ga inhaayo.”" 
Exodus23:20 “Bona eno, ndidha kubatumira malaika okubakulemberamu ng'abakuuma, era abatuuse mu kifo kye mbategekeire." 
Exodus23:21 Imwe mumuwulire, mugondere kiisi ky'abakoba. Mutamudheemera, taidha kubasonigha kwonoona kwaimwe, kuba ali kwidha mu liina lyange." 
Exodus23:22 “Aye bwe mwisaayo einho omwoyo okugondera by'akoba era ni mukola byonabyona bye mbalagira, ndidha kubanga muzigu wa bazigu baimwe era ndidha kulumbanga abo ababalumba." 
Exodus23:23 Malaika wange aidha kubakulembera, abatwale mu biketezo bino: eky'Abamori n'eky'Abahitti, n'eky'Abaperizzi, n'eky'Abakanaani, n'eky'Abahivi, n'eky'Abayebusi, ate abantu ab'omu biketezo ebyo abazikirize." 
Exodus23:24 Otakubiranga misambwa gyaibwe makiryaivu, oba okugisinza, oba okukola ebyo beene bye bagikolera. Aye ogizikirizanga, era waamenhamenhanga empango dhaagyo edh'amabaale." 
Exodus23:25 Nze Musengwa Katonda wo, ninze y'obenga osinze, era nze ndidha kukughanga enkabi mu mere ni mu maadhi, era ntoolegho obulwaire obubadaaza." 
Exodus23:26 Ezira mukazi aja kuvaamu nda, oba kuba mugumba mu nsi yaimwe era ezira ye nja kusala ku myaka." 
Exodus23:27 “Ndidha kuleeteranga abazigu abanaabanga emberi ye muja okutya einho, era ndeetengagho okutabukatabuka mu bantu abagezaaku okubalwanisa. Abazigu baimwe boonaboona baidha kukyukanga babalumuke." 
Exodus23:28 Ndidha kusindikanga ebiziinhuusi emberi ye muja bibingengamu Abahivi, n'Abakanaani, n'Abahitti, babasegulire." 
Exodus23:29 Aye okubabingagho emberi ye muja tija kukikola mu mwaka mulala gwonka, kuba olwo ensi eba esigala nga ndhereere, ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhaazaalagana ekibitiriire era dhaabafuukira ekizibu." 
Exodus23:30 Kale ndidha kubabinganga ye muja katonokatono, okutuusa lwe mulizaalagana ni mughera ni mwidhuza ensi." 
Exodus23:31 Nja kutaagho ensalosalo yaimwe eve ku Nhandha Emyufu okutuuka ku nhandha ey'ab'e Filisitia era eve ku irungu etuuke ku mwiga Eufurate. Abantu abo ababa mu biketezo ebyo nja kubata mu ngalo dhaimwe, era mwidha kujanga nga mubabingagho nga bwe munaajanga nga museetayo." 
Exodus23:32 Otakolanga na bantu abo ndagaano, oba okugikola n'emisambwa gyaibwe." 
Exodus23:33 Otalekanga bantu abo ni baba mu nsi yaimwe, kuba baghanga okubaleetera okwonoona ye ndi. Kuba bw'onaasinzanga emisambwa gyaibwe, onaabanga ng'okagwireku.”" 
Exodus24:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Iwe, ni Aaroni, ni Nadabu, ni Abihu, aghalala n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli nsanvu, muniine olusozi nga mwidha ye ndi nze. Aye bwe munaaba nga mukaali ghalaku, musooke mukube amakiryaivu munsinze." 
Exodus24:2 Iwe Musa niiwe wenka oidha okuseeta ye ndi, aye abantu abandi boonaboona, bataseeta. Era abantu ababuliidho bataniina ku lusozi n'iwe naire.”" 
Exodus24:3 Agho Musa yaaja yaakobera abantu ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yamukoba era n'ebiragiro. Era abantu boonaboona bairamu n'omwoyo mulala bati: “Ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda by'atukobye twidha kubikola.” 
Exodus24:4 Musa yaaghandiika ebibono bya Musengwa Katonda ebyo byonabyona. Era yaazuuka ku nkyo yaazimba alutaari ghansi agh'olusozi. Yaazimba n'empango edh'amabaale ikumi na ibiri ng'ebika eby'Abaisiraeli bwe biri. 
Exodus24:5 Yaatuma abaisuka Abaisiraeli baaja baaghaayo ye Musengwa Katonda ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'emisengo egy'okutabagana, nga baghaayo ente." 
Exodus24:6 Musa yaatoola ogundi ku musaayi yaaguta mu bibya, ate ogwasigalagho yaagumansira ku alutaari." 
Exodus24:7 Agho yaatoola ekitabo eky'endagaano yaakisoma ng'abantu boonaboona bawulira, era baakoba bati: “Ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda by'atukobye okukola twidha kubikola, era twidha kumugonderanga.”" 
Exodus24:8 Agho Musa yaatoola omusaayi yaagumansira ku bantu nga bw'akoba ati: “Omusaayi n'akamanhiso akakakasa endagaano Musengwa Katonda y'akoze n'imwe ng'ebibono bino byonabyona bwe bikoba.” 
Exodus24:9 Agho Musa, ni Aaroni, ni Nadabu, ni Abihu, ghalala n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli nsanvu, baaniina olusozi" 
Exodus24:10 baabona Katonda wa Isiraeli. Ghansi gh'ebigere bye nga ghali ng'oti ni ghe baayaliira amabaale ag'omughendo ageetebwa saffiro, aga langi ya bbululu omutangaavu obukalamu ng'eigulu." 
Exodus24:11 Katonda tiyagalula mukono kukola kabi bakulu ba bikunsu mu Isiraeli abo. Beerolera Katonda, bwe baamala baalya era baanhwa ku kibigiya." 
Exodus24:12 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Niina olusozi oidhe ye ndi. Bw'otuuka nteegerera, ndidha kukugha ebibaadho eby'amabaale agaliku amateeka n'ebiragiro bye naghandiikira abantu olw'okubagalagira.”" 
Exodus24:13 Kale Musa yaasituka ni Yoshua eyamuyambangaku, era Musa yaaniina ku lusozi lwa Katonda." 
Exodus24:14 Musa oyo yaakoba abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli ati: “Mututeegere ghano okutuusa lwe tunaira,” era ati: “Muli ghano ni Aaroni ni Hura, bweghabangagho ali n'ensonga yeenayeena ajanga ye bali baagigondhoola.”" 
Exodus24:15 Agho Musa yaaniina ku lusozi era ekire kyalughembaku. 
Exodus24:16 Olusozi Sinai lwaidhula ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda era ekire kyalughembaku okumala enaku mukaaga. Ku lunaku olwomusanvu Musengwa Katonda ng'ali mu kire, yaayeta Musa." 
Exodus24:17 Abaisiraeli baabona ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda nga kiri ng'oti muliro oguli kubbeibbera ku lusozi ghaigulu. 
Exodus24:18 Musa yaaniina ku lusozi ghaigulu, yangira mu kire era yaaba okwo okumala enaku amakumi ana omusana n'obwire." 
Exodus25:1 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus25:2 “Koba abantu Abaisiraeli, buli muntu atoole ekigheebwayo ky'anaaba asazeegho akikughe okindeetere." 
Exodus25:3 Bino n'ebintu bye babe bakughe ng'ebigheebwayo: zaabu, feeza, ekyuma eky'ekikomo," 
Exodus25:4 engoye edha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, n'engoye empegheevu, n'edho edhaakolebwa mu buviiri obw'embuzi," 
Exodus25:5 n'amawu amakunhe ag'entaama enume, n'amawu amakunhe ag'ensolo edhindi, n'embaawo edhaasalibwa mu muti ogwetebwa akasia," 
Exodus25:6 n'amafuta ag'entaala, n'obuwoowo obutabulwa mu muzigo ogw'okusiiga, n'obuwoowo obw'okuniosa," 
Exodus25:7 n'amabaale ageetebwa onikisi, era n'amabaale ag'omughendo agandi agateebwa ku kivaalo eky'obwakabona ni ku kivaalo kabona ky'avaala mu kifuba." 
Exodus25:8 Era koba abantu bankolere eisinzizo memale olwo mbabengamu. 
Exodus25:9 Eisinzizo lino n'ebintu byamu, biri n'okukolebwa nga bijiira ku ntegeka ye ndidha okukwoleka.”" 
Exodus25:10 “Era koba abantu, bankolere esanduuku mu mbaawo edh'omuti ogwetebwa akasia, nga obuleeyi bwayo egheza mita ndala ni sentimita ikumi, ate obugazi ng'egheza sentimita nkaaga na mukaaga era n'obugungumavu ng'egheza sentimita nkaaga na mukaaga." 
Exodus25:11 Esanduuku eyo mugirimbyeku zaabu omukenenule munda mwayo ni ku ngulu kwayo. Era mugikolereku olukomo lwa zaabu omukenenule okugyezunguluza yoonayoona. 
Exodus25:12 Era mukole emikonda mu zaabu emyekulungirivu ng'oti mpeta, mugite ku magulu ga sanduuku ana, mu mbali ebiri ni mu mbali ebiri." 
Exodus25:13 Agho mubaadhireku emiti egy'okubbeedesa mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, memale emiti egyo mugilimbyeku zaabu okugyezunguluza gyonagyona." 
Exodus25:14 Mute emiti egyo mu mikonda gire emyekulungirivu egiri ku mbali ni ku mbali okw'esanduuku, gibe egy'okubbeedesanga sanduuku eyo." 
Exodus25:15 Emiti egyo gya kusigalanga mu mikonda egy'esanduuku nga tigyakutoolebwangamu. 
Exodus25:16 Mu sanduuku omwo oidha kutaamu ekiidhukizo kye ndidha okukugha. 
Exodus25:17 Agho okolereku ekisandikiza nga kya zaabu omukenenule obuleeyi bwakyo nga kigheza mita ndala ni sentimita ikumi, ate obugazi kibe sentimita nkaaga na mukaaga." 
Exodus25:18 Era mukole ebifaananie bibiri eby'ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi, nga mubikola mu zaabu, bibe ku ndhuyi dhombi edh'ekisandikiza eky'esanduuku eyo." 
Exodus25:19 Ekifaananie ekindi mukite ku luuyi lule olundi olw'ekisandikiza, ate ekindi mukite ku luuyi luno olundi olw'ekisandikiza ekyo. Aye ng'ebifaananie byombi mubikolera ghalala, byegema ghalala ku kisandikiza, byaba kintu kirala nga tibyawukaine." 
Exodus25:20 Ebifaananie ebyo mubikole nga mubirinzagainia, aye nga amaiso gaabyo galingiriire ku kisandikiza, era nga byandhulwiza amaghagha gaabyo nga gaghemba ku kisandikiza ekyo." 
Exodus25:21 Ekyo nga kiwoire oidha kuta mu sanduuku eyo ekiidhukizo kye ndidha okukugha, era ote ekisandikiza kire ku ngulu okw'esanduuku eyo." 
Exodus25:22 Agho ghe ndidha okukwagaana, era agho ghaigulu agh'ekisandikiza eky'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano era ghagati agh'ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi, ghe ndidha okukugheera ebiragiro byange byonabyona by'oidha okukobera Abaisiraeli.”" 
Exodus25:23 “Era oidha kukola emeeza mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, ng'obuleeyi bwayo egheza sentimita kinaana na munaana, obugazi bwayo nga bwa sentimita amakumi ana na ina, n'obugungumavu bwayo nga bwa sentimita nkaaga na mukaaga." 
Exodus25:24 Omuti gw'akasia ogwo mwidha kugulimbyaku zaabu omukenenule munda ni ku ngulu, era emeeza mugiteeku omugo gwa zaabu okugyezunguluza." 
Exodus25:25 Era ogikolereku akabaawo akagyezungulula, ng'obugazi kaagayaga n'ekyala eky'omuntu, era nga keezungulwirwa omugo gwa zaabu." 
Exodus25:26 Okole emikonda ena mu zaabu emyekulungirivu ng'oti mpeta, ogite mu nsonda eina edh'emeeza, kiisi ghali mugulu." 
Exodus25:27 Kumpi agho n'akabaawo kale, n'aghaidha okuba emikonda egyo, era nga n'egiidha okubitamu emiti egy'okubbeedesanga emeeza eyo." 
Exodus25:28 Emiti egyo mugibaadhe mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, memale mugirimbyeku zaabu gyonagyona okugyezunguluza, gibe egy'okubbeedesanga emeeza eyo." 
Exodus25:29 Emeeza eyo mugikolereku ebibya n'enkaayi, era mugikolereku n'ensugha, n'ebikopo, olw'ebigheebwayo ebifukibwa. Ebintu ebyo mubikole mu zaabu omukenenule." 
Exodus25:30 Era oidha kutanga Emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda ku meeza eyo, mu maiso gange buliidho.”" 
Exodus25:31 “Era oidha kukola ekikondo eky'entaala mu zaabu omukenenule. Ekikolo ghalala n'ekitundu eky'eitale eky'ekikondo ekyo, oidha kubikola mu zaabu omukenenule oyo. Era obukopo obugemerera entaala, n'okudholiga okuli ng'oti bimuli, byona oidha kubikola nga byegemeire ghalala ni bire byonabyona mu zaabu omukenenule, nga ghazira kyawukaineku." 
Exodus25:32 Ekikondo ekyo kiidha kuba n'ensaga mukaaga nga dhiva mu mbali ni mu mbali mwakyo ensaga eisatu nga dhiva ku luuyi lwakyo olundi, ate ensaga eisatu edhindi dhaava ku lundi." 
Exodus25:33 Buli lusaga, nga bwe dhiri omukaaga, lwidha kubaaku obukopo busatu, nga buli kakopo kafaanana ng'oti n'ekimuli eky'omuti ogwetebwa alumondi, nga kiramba n'obukaba bwaku." 
Exodus25:34 Ekitundu eky'eitale eky'ekikondo kiidha kubaaku obukopo buna obufaanana ng'oti n'ekimuli eky'omuti ogwetebwa alumondi, nga kiramba n'obukaba bwaku." 
Exodus25:35 Kiisi ensaga eibiri ghe dhitandiikira okuva ku kitundu eky'eitale eky'ekikondo, ghaidha kubaagho ekiri ng'oti kimuli era nga kikoleirwagho kyegemeragho irala aghazira kwawukanamu." 
Exodus25:36 Ekintu ekyo ekiri ng'oti kimuli, n'ensaga, n'ekikondo kyene, oidha kubikola nga byegemeire ghalala mu zaabu omukenenule, nga ghazira kyawukaineku." 
Exodus25:37 Bw'omala oidha kukola entaala musanvu edh'okubanga ku kikondo ekyo, era odhiteeku dhibe nga dhimulisa mberi wa kikondo ekyo." 
Exodus25:38 Makansu edhisala ebisiriiza ku ntambi, ni sowaani edhiteebwaku ebisiriiza ebyo, oidha kudhikola mu zaabu omukenenule." 
Exodus25:39 Ekikondo ekyo n'ebinaakolerwaku ebindi, bya kumalagho talanta namba edho ni kilo asatu n'eina edha zaabu omukenenule." 
Exodus25:40 Era bona nti obikola mu nsambo ye ndi kukwoleka ghano ku lusozi.” 
Exodus26:1 Era Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Oidha kukola ensuubo ikumi odhite mu Weema, nga dhaakolebwa mu ngoye empegheevu edhaalukibwa obukalamu, edha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi. Era mutungiremu ebifaananie eby'ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi, nga mukozesa empiso n'ewuuzi." 
Exodus26:2 Obuleeyi obw'olusuubo olulala bwidha kuba mita ikumi na ibiri, obugazi bwalwo bube mita ibiri ensuubo dhoonadhoona dhiidha kuba nga dhaagayaga." 
Exodus26:3 Ensuubo eitaanu dhiidha kutungibwa dhiyimbibwe nga buli lulala luyungibwa ku lwinaalwo, n'ensuubo eitaanu edhindi dhoona dhiyimbibwe dhityo." 
Exodus26:4 Ku buli lusuubo olusembayo ku edho edhinaaba dhiyimbiibwa eitaanu edhisooka, oidha kutaaku obukondo obukoleibwa mu lugoye lwa langi ya bbululu, era ni ku itaanu edhinairirira oidha kukola n'ekirala." 
Exodus26:5 Obukondo obwo bwidha kuba amakumi ataanu ku lusuubo olusembayo ku itaanu edhinaasooka okuyimbwa, n'obundi amakumi ataanu bube ku itaanu dhire edhindi. Obukondo obwo bwidha kuba nga bugemagana mu lunhiriri." 
Exodus26:6 Agho oidha kukola obuntu amakumi ataanu obugemagania obukondo obw'oluuyi olundi ku bw'oluuyi olundi nga bwa zaabu. Endhuyi dhombi bwe dhinaayimbibwa, olwo Weema enaaba efuuse enambirira." 
Exodus26:7 “Era oidha kukola ensuubo ikumi na lulala mu ngoye edhaakolebwa mu buviiri obw'embuzi, dhighembe ku Weema eyo." 
Exodus26:8 Buli lusuubo lube nga lugheza mita ikumi na isatu obuleeyi ate obugazi lube mita ibiri, era dhoonadhoona eikumi n'olulala dhiidha kuba nga dhaagayaga mu bipimo." 
Exodus26:9 Ensuubo eitaanu oidha kudhitunga odhiyimbe gha dhonka nga buli lulala luyungibwa ku lwinaalwo. Ni dhire edhindi omukaaga dhoona odhiyimbe gha dhonka mu nsambo n'endala. Olusuubo olwomukaaga oidha kulufunhamu gha mulyango ogwingira mu Weema eyo. 
Exodus26:10 Ku mbali okw'olusuubo olusembayo ku itaanu edhinaasooka okuyimbibwa, oidha kukoleraku obukondo amakumi ataanu. Ni ku mbali okw'olusuubo olusembayo ku mukaaga edhinairirira okuyimbibwa, kwona okolereku obukondo amakumi ataanu." 
Exodus26:11 Agho oidha kukola obuntu obugemagania obukondo obw'oluuyi olundi ku bw'oluuyi olundi nga bwa kyuma kya kikomo, era obute mu bukondo bule, buyimbe endhuyi dhombi dhikole ekikingiriza ekiramba." 
Exodus26:12 Ekitundu eky'olusuubo olw'Eweema eyo ekifiikagho, kiidha kulengeedheranga einhuma ow'Eweema." 
Exodus26:13 Ebitundu ebindi eby'ensuubo edh'Eweema eyo ebifiikagho ku luuyi ni ku luuyi, nga bigheza kitundu kya mita mu bugazi bwabyo, biidha kulengeedheranga ku luuyi ni ku luuyi olw'Eweema nga bigighemba." 
Exodus26:14 “Oidha kukola ebintu ebighemba ku Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda bibiri: eky'omunda nga kyakolebwa mu mawu amakunhe ag'entaama enume, ate eky'oku ngulu nga kyakolebwa mu mawu amakunhe ag'ensolo edhindi." 
Exodus26:15 “Era oidha kukola ebikondo eby'Eweema mu muti ogwetebwa akasia. 
Exodus26:16 Obuleeyi obwa buli kikondo bwidha kuba emita ina, ate obugazi bube ekitundu kya mita." 
Exodus26:17 Buli kikondo kiidha kubaaku ebintu ebisongovu bibiri eby'okukiyungisa ku kiinaakyo. Era ebikondo byonabyona eby'Eweema biidha kuba bityo. 
Exodus26:18 Oidha kukola ebikondo amakumi abiri nga n'eby'okuba ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba olw'Eweema. 
Exodus26:19 Ebikondo ebyo oidha kubikolera ebikolo amakumi ana nga bya feeza kwe binaayemereranga. Nga buli kikondo kiri n'ebikolo bibiri ebirimu ebituli omwingira ebintu bire ebibiri ebisongovu eby'ekikondo ekyo. 
Exodus26:20 Oidha kukola ebikondo amakumi abiri nga n'eby'okuba ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba olw'Eweema. 
Exodus26:21 Ebikondo ebyo oidha kubikolera ebikolo amakumi ana nga bya feeza, era nga buli kikolo kiri n'ebikondo bibiri." 
Exodus26:22 Einhuma w'Eweema ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba, oidha kukolerayo ebikondo mukaaga." 
Exodus26:23 Mu nsonda eibiri edh'einhuma y'Eweema oidha kukolerayo ekikondo kirala kirala. 
Exodus26:24 Ebikondo ebyo biidha kuba nga biyimbe okuva ghansi okutuukira irala ghaigulu ku mutwe aghali omukonda. Ebikondo ebyo byombi ebikola ensonda, bityo bwe biidha okukolebwa." 
Exodus26:25 Kale, ebikondo biidha kuba munaana n'ebikolo byabyo ikumi na mukaaga ebya feeza, nga buli kikondo kyemereire ku bikolo bibiri." 
Exodus26:26 “Era oidha kubaadha embaawo edhikiikamu mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, ng'eitaanu dha kugemagania ebikondo eby'oluuyi olundi olw'Eweema," 
Exodus26:27 n'edhindi eitaanu nga dha kugemagania bikondo eby'oluuyi olundi olw'Eweema eyo, n'edhindi eitaanu nga dha kugemagania bikondo eby'oluuyi olw'einhuma olw'e bugwandhuba w'Eweema." 
Exodus26:28 Olubaawo olukiikamu olubita ghagati agha buli kikondo, lwidha kuba lulambirira nga lumalaku oluuyi lwonalwona olw'Eweema." 
Exodus26:29 Ebikondo ebyo mwidha kubirimbyaku zaabu byonabyona okubyezunguluza, era mubikolereku n'emikonda egya zaabu egibitamu embaawo dhire edhikiikamu. Embaawo edho dhoona mwidha kudhirimbyaku zaabu dhoonadhoona okudheezunguluza." 
Exodus26:30 Oidha kukola eisinzizo ng'ojiira ku ntegeka eri kukwolekebwa ku lusozi luno. 
Exodus26:31 “Era mwidha kukolayo olutimbe mu ngoye edha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, era ni mu ngoye empegheevu. Era mutungiremu ebifaananie eby'ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi, nga mukozesa empiso n'ewuuzi." 
Exodus26:32 Olutimbe olwo oidha kulusiba ku mpango ina edh'omuti ogwetebwa akasia, era nga dhirimbiibwaku zaabu dhoonadhoona okudheezunguluza. Olutimbe olwo oidha kulusibya obusumaali bwa zaabu ku mpango edho eina, nga dheemereire ku bikolo bina ebya feeza." 
Exodus26:33 Bw'omala okusiba olutimbe ku mpango eina n'obusumaali, oidha kuleeta esanduuku erimu ekiidhukizo ogite mu lutimbe omwo. Olutimbe olwo lube nga lwawula Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho ku Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus26:34 Agho ote ekisandikiza ku ngulu okw'esanduuku eyo ng'eri mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho. 
Exodus26:35 Era oleete emeeza eteebwaku emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda, ogite agho ku luya lwe Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho, ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba w'Eweema. Ate ekikondo eky'entaala okite ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'Eweema eyo, nga byolekaine n'emeeza ere." 
Exodus26:36 “Mu mulyango ogwingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho oidha kukoleragho ekintu ekikinzaagho nga kyakolebwa mu lugoye olwa langi ya bbululu, n'olw'eya nakasooma, n'olw'eya kasaayisaayi, ni mu lugoye olughegheevu era okitungiremu ebimuli ng'okozesa empiso n'ewuuzi." 
Exodus26:37 Ekikinzaagho ekyo, oidha kukikolera empango itaanu edh'omuti ogwetebwa akasia, era nga dhirimbiibwaku zaabu dhoonadhoona okudheezunguluza. Empango oidha kudhikoleraku obusumaali bwa zaabu obugemerera ekikinzaagho ekyo, era odhikolere ebikolo bitaanu eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo kwe dhinaayemereranga." 
Exodus27:1 “Era oidha kukola alutaari mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, ng'endhuyi dhaayo eina dhaagayaga era nga dhigheza nga mita ibiri buli luuyi, ate obugungumavu ng'egheza nga mita ndala." 
Exodus27:2 Ku alutaari okwo oidha kukoleraku ebintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ku nsonda dhaayo eina. Amayiga ago ghalala ni alutaari yeene oidha kubikola nga biri kintu kirala, nga tibyawukainemuuku naire. Bw'omala, alutaari yoonayoona oidha kugirimbyaku ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
Exodus27:3 Ogikolereku obulobo obw'okusuulangamu eivu ery'amasavu. Ogikolereku n'ebitiiyo, n'ebibya eby'okutaamu omusaayi ogw'okumansira, n'ebyuma eby'amaino ng'oti wuuma, n'ebintu eby'okutwalirangaku amanda agaliku omuliro. Ebintu ebikozesebwa ku alutaari byonabyona, oidha kubikola mu kyuma eky'e kikomo." 
Exodus27:4 Era ku alutaari oidha kulukiraku ekiibo kya nsonda ina, ekiri ng'oti kasengeedho nga kyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo. Ku buli nsonda ya kyo okolereku omukonda omwekulungirivu oti mpeta mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, nga n'egy'okubbeedesanga ekiibo ekyo." 
Exodus27:5 Ekiibo ekyo okite mu alutaari ghansi agh'omugo gwayo, kibe nga kiika kyatuuka ghagati ghaayo." 
Exodus27:6 Era ku alutaari oidha kubaadhiraku emiti egy'okubbeedesa, mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, era ogirimbyeku ekyuma eky'ekikomo gyonagyona okugyezunguluza." 
Exodus27:7 Era oidha kuta emiti egyo mu mikonda, olwo emiti egyo gibe ku mbali ni ku mbali okw'alutaari bw'eba ng'eri kubbeedebwa." 
Exodus27:8 Alutaari eyo oidha kukola endhuyi dhaayo eina mu mbaawo, aye ghagati ghaayo ghasigale nga gheereere, ng'ojiira ku ntegeka eri kukwolekebwa ku lusozi luno." 
Exodus27:9 “Oidha kutaagho olugugiriro okwezunguluza Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, oidha kutimbayo engoye empegheevu edhigheza mita amakumi ana na ina mu buleeyi." 
Exodus27:10 Engoye edho dhiidha kuba ku mpango amakumi abiri, edhinaaba nga dheemereire ku bikolo amakumi abiri. Empango edho n'ebikolo byadho, biidha kukolebwa mu kyuma kya kikomo, ate obusumaali bwadho n'obuntu obudhigemagania bikolebwe mu feeza." 
Exodus27:11 Era ni ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba oidha kukolayo ekintu n'ekirala nga ky'onaaba okoze ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha, ng'otaayo olugugiriro." 
Exodus27:12 E bugwandhuba w'oluya, oidha kutimbayo engoye nga dhigheza mita amakumi abiri na ibiri obuleeyi, nga dhiri ku mpango ikumi edhinaaba dheemereire ku bikolo eikumi." 
Exodus27:13 E buvandhuba w'oluya eri omulyango, yoona oidha kutimbayo engoye nga dhigheza mita amakumi abiri na ibiri obuleeyi." 
Exodus27:14 Engoye dhe munaatimba ku buli luuyi olw'omulyango ogwo dhiidha kuba nga dhigheza mita mukaaga n'ekitundu buli luuyi, nga dhiri ku mpango isatu isatu n'ebikolo byadho ebisatu ebisatu." 
Exodus27:15  
Exodus27:16 Mu mulyango mwene oidha kukoleramu ekikinzaagho nga kigheza mita mwenda obuleeyi, nga kyakolebwa mu lugoye lwa langi ya bbululu, n'olw'eya nakasooma, n'olw'eya kasaayisaayi, ni mu lugoye olughegheevu era okitungiremu ebimuli ng'okozesa empiso n'ewuuzi. Kino kiidha kuba ku mpango ina nga dheemereire ku bikolo bina." 
Exodus27:17 Olugugiriro lwonalwona lwidha kubaamu empango edhiriku obuntu obudhigemagania era n'obusumaali nga bwa feeza, era nga dhiri ku bikolo eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
Exodus27:18 Obuleeyi obw'olugugiriro bwidha kuba mita amakumi ana na ina, obugazi bwalwo bube mita amakumi abiri na ibiri, ate empango dhibe mita ibiri okuja ghaigulu nga dhiriku engoye empegheevu era nga dheemereire ku bikolo eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
Exodus27:19 Ebintu byonabyona eby'okukozesanga mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, n'enkondo edhigigemerera ku itaka, ghalala n'enkondo edhigemerera olugugiriro ku itaka, oidha kubikola mu kyuma kya kikomo.”" 
Exodus27:20 Era Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: “Koba Abaisiraeli bakuleetere omuzigo omukenenule ogukamwirwa mu bibala eby'emiti emyoliva ebisekwirwa, ogw'okuta mu ntaala enaayakanga obutazikira." 
Exodus27:21 Buli igulo Aaroni ni batabane baidha kugikunaanianga bagireke ng'eyaka obutazikira okutuusa ku nkyo, agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, ku luya kw'olutimbe oluli emberi y'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, agho mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Eiteeka eryo linaakuumibwanga Abaisiraeli boonaboona ense n'ense.”" 
Exodus28:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: “Mu bantu boonaboona Abaisiraeli oidha kulondamu Aaroni muganda wo, ni batabane, Nadabu, ni Abihu, ni Eleazari, ni Ithamari, obaawule bampeereze nga bakabona." 
Exodus28:2 Era oidha kukolera muganda wo oyo Aaroni ebivaalo ebiidhwire obutukuvu ebimugheesa ekitiisa, era ni bimubonesa obulungi." 
Exodus28:3 Oidha kwogera n'abantu abasobola okukola ekyo, abantu be nagha amagezi n'obumanhi, bamukolere ebivaalo ayawulibwe ankolere omulimo ogw'obwakabona." 
Exodus28:4 Ebivaalo bye babe bakole ni bino: eky'omu kifuba, eky'obwakabona, ekanzu, ekivaalo ekidholige n'empiso n'ewuuzi, ekitambaala eky'oku mutwe, n'olukoma. Baidha kukolera muganda wo oyo Aaroni ni batabane ebivaalo ebitukuvu bampeereze nga bakabona." 
Exodus28:5 Abaja okukola ebivaalo bali n'okukozesa engoye edha langi ya zaabu, n'edh'eya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, era n'engoye empegheevu." 
Exodus28:6 “Ekivaalo eky'obwakabona baidha kukikola mu ngoye edha langi ya zaabu, n'edh'eya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, era n'engoye empegheevu, nga bakidholiga n'empiso n'ewuuzi." 
Exodus28:7 Kiri n'okubaaku ensibiro edhikisiba ku mabega. 
Exodus28:8 Era kiri n'okubaaku olusibiro lwaku olw'omu nkende, nga lwalukibwa bukalamu era nga lwatungibwa ku kivaalo ekyo eky'obwakabona, era nga lwakolebwa mu ngoye ndala edho edha langi ya zaabu, n'edh'eya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, era n'engoye empegheevu." 
Exodus28:9 Oidha kufunayo ebibaadho bibiri eby'eibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa onikisi, oghandiikeku amaina ag'abaana ba Yakobo ng'okozesa ekyuma ekisongovu." 
Exodus28:10 Amaina ag'abaana omukaaga oidha kugaghandiika ku kibaadho ekindi, n'omukaaga ag'abandi ku kindi ng'ojiira ku bwe bairaganwaku mu kuzaalibwa." 
Exodus28:11 Oidha kughandiika amaina ag'abaana ba Yakobo ku bibaadho ebyo ebibiri eby'eibaale, ng'oti n'omubaadhi ow'amabaale ag'omughendo bw'asala obumanhiso. Bw'omala obiteeku emigo egya zaabu," 
Exodus28:12 era obite ku nsibiro edhisiba ekivaalo ekyo eky'obwakabona ku mabega, dhibe eky'okwidhusa eri Abaisiraeli. Mu nsambo eyo Aaroni aidha kubanga n'amaina gaibwe ku mabega ge mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ng'ekiidhukizo." 
Exodus28:13 Era oidha kukolayo emigo egindi ebiri nga gya zaabu," 
Exodus28:14 n'endhegere ibiri edha zaabu omukenenule, ng'odhiruse ng'oti migugha. Olwo oyunge endhegere edho ku migo gire.”" 
Exodus28:15 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: “Era oidha kukola ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba Omukulu wa Bakabona ky'anaakozesanga okumanha Katonda ky'ayenda. Oidha kukikola mu nsambo n'endala ng'oti n'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, ng'okozesa engoye edha langi ya zaabu, n'edh'eya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, n'engoye empegheevu." 
Exodus28:16 Kiri n'okuba nga kiwumbe kyamu, endhuyi dhaakyo eina dhaaba nga dhaagayaga, obuleeyi sentimita amakumi abiri na ibiri, n'obugazi sentimita amakumi abiri na ibiri." 
Exodus28:17 Ku kivaalo ekyo oidha kutaanhaku obunhiriri buna obw'amabaale ag'omughendo. Akanhiriri akasooka kaidha kubaaku amabaale ageetebwa, saradiu, ni topazi, ni karabunkule." 
Exodus28:18 Ate akanhiriri akokubiri kabeeku ageetebwa emeraludo, saffiro, ni diamondi." 
Exodus28:19 Ate akanhiriri akokusatu kabeeku ageetebwa yasintha, agate, ni amethisiti." 
Exodus28:20 Olwo akokuna kabeeku ageetebwa berulo, onikisi, ni yasipera. Amabaale ago gali n'okubaaku omugo gwa zaabu," 
Exodus28:21 era nga bwe gali amabaale eikumi n'abiri, buli irala liidha kukolebwa ng'oti n'empeta ekozesebwa ng'akamanhiso, nga lighandiikiibwaku n'ekyuma ekisongovu eriina irala ku maina ag'abaana ba Yakobo, ku lw'ebika byaibwe eikumi n'ebibiri." 
Exodus28:22 Ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba kino kyona oidha kukikolera endhegere edha zaabu omukenenule, nga dhirukiibwa ng'oti migugha." 
Exodus28:23 Era oidha kukikoleraku obukondo bubiri nga bwa zaabu, obute ku nsonda dhaakyo eibiri edha ghaigulu." 
Exodus28:24 Mu bukondo omwo mw'onaasiba endhegere dhire edha zaabu. 
Exodus28:25 Ate endhuyi edhindi edh'endhegere edho odhisibe ku migo gire ebiri, olwo ekivaalo kino eky'omu kifuba kibe nga kiyimbibwa emberi ku nsibiro edhisiba ekivaalo eky'obwakabona ku mabega." 
Exodus28:26 Kabiri oidha kukolayo obukondo bubiri obwa zaabu obute ku nsonda eibiri edha ghansi, edh'olukugiro olw'omunda olw'ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba okuliiraana n'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona." 
Exodus28:27 Era okoleyo obukondo obundi bubiri obw'obuuma bwa zaabu, obute ku lukugiro olwa ghansi olw'emberi ku nsibiro edhisiba ekivaalo eky'obwakabona ku mabega okumpi n'olusibiro olw'omu nkende olwalukirwa obukalamu ku kivaalo eky'obwakabona." 
Exodus28:28 Agho oidha kusiba ghalala obukondo obw'oku kivaalo eky'omu kifuba n'obukondo obw'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, ng'okozesa akagugha aka langi ya nakasooma. Era olwo ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba ekyo kibe nga kiika bukalamu ku lusibiro olw'omu nkende olwalukirwa obukalamu ku kivaalo eky'obwakabona, era kibe nga tikirekuka kuva ku kivaalo ekyo eky'obwakabona." 
Exodus28:29 “Mu nsambo eyo, Aaroni aidha kubanga n'amaina ag'abaana ba Yakobo ku kivaalo kye eky'omu kifuba, mwene ng'Omukulu wa Bakabona ky'anaakozesanga okumanha Katonda ky'ayenda buli lw'anaajanga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu mu maiso ga Katonda kibe eky'okwidhusa eri Abaisiraeli." 
Exodus28:30 Era mu kivaalo ekyo eky'omu kifuba, Omukulu wa Bakabona ky'anaakozesanga okumanha nze Musengwa Katonda kye nhenda, oidha kutaamu ebintu eby'okukozesebwanga kabona oyo okumanha kye nhenda ebyetebwa Urimu ni Thummimu, bibenga mu kifuba kye ng'ali kwidha mu maiso gange. Mu nsambo eyo Aaroni, aidha kubanga n'obusobozi mu kifuba kye obw'okumanhanga kye nhenda Abaisiraeli bakole.”" 
Exodus28:31 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: “Era oidha kukola ekanzu enaateebwangaku ekivaalo eky'obwakabona nga yoonayoona ya langi ya nakasooma. 
Exodus28:32 Oidha kugitaaku ekituli omubita omutwe era ku nkoto olukireku olukugiro, ng'oluba ku kanzu edhindi, erobe kukanuka." 
Exodus28:33 Okwezunguluza ekitundu eky'eifo eky'ekanzu, oidha kutungiraku ebifaananie eby'ebibala eby'oku muti omukomamawanga mu langi ya bbululu, n'eya nakasooma, n'eya kasaayisaayi. Era otungireku endege nga dha zaabu, nga dhiri ndalandala buli ghagati gh'ebifaananie eby'emikomamawanga ebibiri." 
Exodus28:34 Kibe nti ekifaananie eky'omukomamawanga okiriiraania endege, kabiri waataagho ekifaananie eky'omukomamawanga, otyo otyo okutuusa bw'omala okwezunguluza ekitundu eky'eifo kyonakyona eky'ekanzu." 
Exodus28:35 Ekyo n'ekivaalo Aaroni ky'aidha okubangamu ng'akola egy'obwakabona, era okuvuga okw'endege kwidha kuwulirwanga ng'angira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu mu maiso gange, era ni bw'anaabanga ng'afuluma, memale alobe kufa.”" 
Exodus28:36 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: “Era oidha kukola akabaati aka zaabu omukenenule okaghandiikeku ng'oti n'ole asala obumanhiso mu mabaale bw'akola oidha kughandiikaku oti, ‘Yayawulibwa nga wa Musengwa Katonda.’" 
Exodus28:37 Akabaati ako oidha kukasiba emberi ku kitambaala eky'oku mutwe n'akagugha ak'erangi ya nakasooma. 
Exodus28:38 Era kaidha kubanga mu bweni bwa Aaroni okwoleka nti aikiriiza okwetwika ensobi dhoonadhoona edhisobola okukolebwa mu kughaayo ebigheebwayo ebitukuvu, Abaisiraeli bye bampa nze Musengwa Katonda, olwo mbe nga mbiikiriza." 
Exodus28:39 “Era oidha kuluka ekivaalo ekidholige n'empiso n'ewuuzi nga kya lugoye olughegheevu, era okole ekitambaala eky'oku mutwe nga kyona kya lugoye olughegheevu, era okole n'olukoma ng'olutungiiremu ebifaananie eby'ebimuli n'empiso n'ewuuzi." 
Exodus28:40 “Oidha kukolera batabane ba Aaroni ebivaalo ebidholige n'empiso n'ewuuzi, obakolere n'enkoma, n'enkuufiira, nga bibagheesa ekitiisa era byababonesa bulungi." 
Exodus28:41 Bw'omala oidha kuvaaza muganda wo Aaroni ni batabane ebivaalo byaibwe ebyo, olwo obasiige omuzigo olw'okubatukuza obaawule, era obagemye omulimo ogw'okumpeereza nga bakabona." 
Exodus28:42 Era bakolere n'empale edh'engoye empegheevu, balobenga kughemuka mubiri." 
Exodus28:43 Aaroni ni batabane baidha kuvaalanga ebivaalo ebyo buliidho memale bangire mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, oba baseete ye Alutaari okugheereza nga bakabona mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Bwe batakola batyo balyereetaku omusango era baafa. Kino kiragiro ekitaja kuvaagho eri Aaroni n'abaana be era n'abaidhukulu." 
Exodus29:1 “Buti kino ky'oja okubakolaku mu kubaawula, olwo bampeereze nga bakabona. Funayo ente enume ento n'entaama enume ibiri, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona" 
Exodus29:2 Ofuneyo emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa, nga gya bika bisatu bino: eminene egitabwirwamu omuzigo, n'egindi egiziramu muzigo, n'emitono egisiigiibwaku omuzigo. Era nga mugifumbye mu buwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu." 
Exodus29:3 Oidha kugita mu kiibo kirala ogindeetere ghalala n'ente ere enume era n'entaama dhire enume eibiri. 
Exodus29:4 Agho oleete Aaroni ni batabane gha mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, obanaaze n'amaadhi." 
Exodus29:5 Era ovaaze Aaroni ebivaalo bino: ekivaalo ekidholige n'empiso n'ewuuzi, ekanzu enaateebwangaku ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, oizeeku ekivaalo eky'obwakabona kyene, n'ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba, era omusibe olusibiro olw'omu nkende olw'oku kivaalo eky'obwakabona olwalukibwa obukalamu." 
Exodus29:6 Oidha kumusiba ekitambaala ku mutwe era ote engule entukuvu ku kitambaala ekyo. 
Exodus29:7 Bw'omala oidha kuleeta omuzigo ogusiigibwa ogumufuke ku mutwe omutukuze. 
Exodus29:8 “Ng'omaze oyo oidha kuleeta batabane obavaaze ebivaalo ebidholige n'empiso n'ewuuzi," 
Exodus29:9 obasibe enkoma mu nkende era obavaaze n'enkuufiira ku mitwe. Otyo bw'oidha okwawula Aaroni ni batabane babe bakabona. Era obwakabona bwidha kubanga bwaibwe olw'ekiragiro ekitaja kuvaagho. 
Exodus29:10 “Bw'omala oidha kuleeta ente ere enume emberi ow'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, Aaroni ni batabane bate emikono gyaibwe ku mutwe gwayo." 
Exodus29:11 Memale ogiitire agho ku mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu Musengwa Katonda mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. 
Exodus29:12 Oidha kutoola ogundi ku musaayi ogw'ente eyo ogusiige ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari, ng'okozesa olwala lwo. Omusaayi ogunaaba gusigairegho, oidha kugufuka ku ntobo y'alutaari." 
Exodus29:13 Amasavu goonagoona agali ku byenda, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi ku ini, n'ensigo dhombi ghalala n'amasavu agadhiriku, oidha kubyokera ku alutaari ng'ekigheebwayo ye ndi." 
Exodus29:14 Aye emamba ey'ente eyo n'oluwu lwaku era n'obusa, oidha kubyokya omuliro mu kifo aghazira weema dha bantu, ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa olw'ebibi." 
Exodus29:15 “Bw'omala ekyo, oidha kuleeta entaama enume esooka, Aaroni ni batabane bagiteeku emikono gyaibwe ku mutwe," 
Exodus29:16 memale ogiite. Olwo otoole omusaayi gwayo ogumansire ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari. 
Exodus29:17 Agho oidha kugitematemamu, onaaze ebyenda n'ebibbonge byayo, obite ghalala n'ebitundu byayo ebisigairegho, nga kw'otaire n'omutwe, obyokere ku alutaari." 
Exodus29:18 Ekyo n'ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda ekyokebwa, ekiri n'akawoowo akamusangaaza." 
Exodus29:19 “Bw'omala ekyo oidha kuleeta entaama ere enume eyokubiri, Aaroni ni batabane bate emikono gyaibwe ku mutwe gwayo," 
Exodus29:20 memale ogiite. Olwo oidha kutoola ku musaayi gwayo ogundi ogusiige ku ntobo ya kutu ow'oku mukono omusaadha ow'Aaroni n'owa buli mutabane, ni ku byala byaibwe ebisaadha eby'oku mikono gyaibwe emisaadha, ni ku bigere byaibwe ebisaadha eby'oku migulu gyaibwe emisaadha. Olwo otoole omusaayi ogunaasigalagho ogumansire ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari." 
Exodus29:21 Agho oidha kutoola ku musaayi ogunaaba ku alutaari, ni ku muzigo ogusiigibwa, byombi obimansire ku Aaroni ni ku bivaalo bye, ni ku batabane ni ku bivaalo byaibwe. Olwo onaaba otukwiza Aaroni n'ebivaalo bye, ni batabane n'ebivaalo byaibwe." 
Exodus29:22 “Entaama eyo, n'ekozesebwa mukwawula n'okugemya Aaroni ni batabane be omulimo ogw'obwakabona. Kale oidha kusoloza amasavu gaayo goonagoona, nga n'omuli: amasavu ag'omukira, n'agali ku byenda, n'ekitundu ekisinga bulungi ku ini, n'ensigo dhombi ghalala n'amasavu agadhiriku, n'ekisambi eky'oku mukono omusaadha." 
Exodus29:23 Era oidha kutoola omugaati mulala mulala okuva ku migaati egitazimbulukusiibwa egy'ebika ebisatu bino egiri mu kiibo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda: eminene egitabwirwamu omuzigo, n'egindi egiziramu muzigo, n'emitono egisiigiibwaku omuzigo." 
Exodus29:24 Ebyo byonabyona, oidha kubita mu ngalo dha Aaroni n'edha batabane, babiwuube bibe ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda nga biwuubibwa." 
Exodus29:25 Agho obibatoole mu ngalo obyokere ku alutaari ng'oyongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekinaaba kiriku. Akawoowo akava ku kigheebwayo ekyo ekyokebwa kasangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda. 
Exodus29:26 “Bw'omala oidha kutoola akafumito ak'entaama eyo enume egheebwayo olw'okwawulibwa kwa Aaroni, ogiwuube ebe ekigheebwayo ye ndi nga kiwuubibwa. Ekitundu ekyo eky'ensolo n'ogunaabanga omugabo gwo." 
Exodus29:27 “Era ku ntaama enume eyo egheebwayo olw'okwawulibwa kw'Aaroni ni batabane, oidha kutukuzaaku akafumito kaayo, n'ekisambi kyayo, byombi bibe ekigheebwayo nga kiwuubibwa." 
Exodus29:28 Buli Baisiraeli lwe banaaleetanga akafumito n'ekisambi ng'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, ebintu ebyo byombi binaateekwanga okuba ebya Aaroni ni batabane lubeerera. Ebintu ebyo n'ekigheebwayo abantu kye bampa nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus29:29 “Ebivaalo bya Aaroni eby'obwakabona biidha kugheebwanga mutabane anaamusikiranga, era oyo by'anaavaalanga nga bamusiiga omuzigo olw'okumwawula." 
Exodus29:30 Mutabane oyo aidha kufuukanga kabona mu kifo kye, aidha kuvaalanga ebivaalo ebyo okumala entangama ya nnaku musanvu ng'aidhie mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda okukola emirimo egy'obwakabona mu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus29:31 “Agho oidha kutoola emamba ey'entaama enume egheebwayo olw'okwawula Aaroni, ogitogokeze mu maadhi mu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus29:32 Bw'eya, oidha kugigha Aaroni ni batabane bagirye n'emigaati eginaaba gisigaire mu kiibo, era nga bagiriira gha mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus29:33 Baidha kulyanga ebintu ebyo ebinaaba bigheereibwayo ng'omusengo olw'ebibi byaibwe ku mukolo ogw'okubaawula. Era atali kabona atabiryangaku, kuba bitukuvu." 
Exodus29:34 Era bweghabaagho ku mamba eyo oba ku migaati egyo ebiba nga tibiriiriibwa ni bisigalagho okutuusa enkyo lyaku, tibiirangayo kuliibwa, mubyokyanga bwa muliro kuba bitukuvu." 
Exodus29:35 “Oidha kukola omukolo ogw'okwawula Aaroni ni batabane, ogwidha okutwala enaku omusanvu, ng'ojiira ku ebyo byonabyona bye nkulagiire." 
Exodus29:36 Buli lunaku mu nnaku edho omusanvu, oidha kughangayo ente enume ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Era ogheeyo ekigheebwayo olw'okutukuza alutaari, olwo ogisiige omuzigo olw'okugitukuza." 
Exodus29:37 Enaku omusanvu edho oidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi okutukuza alutaari, olwo ebe ng'eidhwire obutukuvu ng'ekintu kyonakyona ekigyekontaku kifuuka kitukuvu." 
Exodus29:38 “Buli lunaku oidha kugheerangayo ku alutaari okwo entaama ento ibiri, edh'omwaka omulala omulala." 
Exodus29:39 Entaama eyindi oidha kugighangayo enkyo, ate eyindi ogighengayo eigulo." 
Exodus29:40 Bw'oghaayo entaama esooka, oghaayo ni kilo ey'engaano eseereibwa obukalamu ng'etabwirwamu lita ey'omuzigo omukenenule ogukamwirwa mu bibala eby'emiti emyoliva ebisekwirwa, waateeraku ni lita ey'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ng'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa." 
Exodus29:41 Ere entaama eyindi y'oli n'okughaayo olw'eigulo, oidha kugighaayo n'ebintu bire ebisatu by'onaaba ng'ogheereire ku ere ey'enkyo: engaano, omuzigo n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu era mu bipimo nga bire eby'ey'enkyo. Ekyo n'ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza." 
Exodus29:42 Buliidho mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyo ekyokebwa n'omuliro ebyanda n'ebyanda. Mwidha kukigheerangayo ku mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, ghe naayagaanananga n'abantu bange era ni ndhogera n'iwe." 
Exodus29:43 Mu kifo ekyo mwe ndidha okwagaanananga n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, era ekitiisa kyange kiidha kukifuulanga kitukuvu." 
Exodus29:44 Ndidha kutukuza alutaari n'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu, era ntukuze ni Aaroni ni batabane be, bampeerezenga nga bakabona." 
Exodus29:45 Era nnaabanga mu bantu bange Abaisiraeli, era nnaabanga Katonda waibwe." 
Exodus29:46 Baidha kukitegeera nga ninze Musengwa Katonda waibwe eyabatoola mu Misiri, mbabengamu. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waibwe.”" 
Exodus30:1 Era Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Oidha kukola alutaari mu mbaawo edh'omuti ogwetebwa akasia, nga ya kuniokezangaku bubbaani." 
Exodus30:2 Ng'endhuyi dhaayo eina dhaagayaga obuleeyi sentimita amakumi ana na itaanu n'obugazi sentimita amakumi ana na itaanu. Obugungumavu eidha kuba sentimita kyenda. Oidha kukoleraku ebintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ku nsonda dhaayo eina. Ebintu ebyo ebiri ng'oti mayiga, ni alutaari, biri n'okuba nga byegemye ghalala nga tibyawukaine." 
Exodus30:3 Bw'omala, ku ngulu kwayo kwonakwona, n'okwezunguluza endhuyi dhaayo, ni ku bintu ebyo ebiri ng'oti mayiga, oidha kulimbyaku zaabu omukenenule. Era ogikolereku omugo nga gwona gwa zaabu omukenenule okugyezunguluza yoonayoona." 
Exodus30:4 Ghansi w'omugo ogwo ku ndhuyi dhaayo eibiri edhiringagaine, oidha kukoleragho emikonda ebiri egya zaabu emyekulungirivu oti mpeta. Gino n'egiidha okubitangamu emiti egy'okubbeedesanga alutaari eyo." 
Exodus30:5 Agho obaadhireku emiti mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, ng'emiti egyo ogirimbiizaaku zaabu gyonagyona okugyezunguluza." 
Exodus30:6 Alutaari eyo oidha kugita gha mberi agh'olutimbe oluli gha Sanduuku ey'Endagaano. Era agho gha mberi agh'ekisandikiza ekiri ku Sanduuku ey'Endagaano eyo, ghe nnaayagaanananga n'iwe." 
Exodus30:7 Ku alutaari okwo Aaroni kw'aidha okuniokezanga obubbaani obw'akawoowo buli ku nkyo ng'ajiire okutegeka entaala. 
Exodus30:8 Era bw'anaajanga okukunaania entaala olw'eigulo, anaaniosanga kabiri obubbaani obwo. Era bwidha kuniosebwanga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ense n'ense." 
Exodus30:9 Ku alutaari okwo otaniokezangaku bubbaani obutaikirizibwaku, oba okwokeraku ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekitaikirizibwa, oba okugigheeraku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke ekitaikirizibwa, oba waire okugigheeraku ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa ekitaikirizibwa." 
Exodus30:10 alutaari eyo eidha kutukuzibwanga omukuzi mulala buli mwaka, aghazira kulekera ense n'ense. Aaroni aidha kugitukuzanga ng'akozesa omusaayi oguva ku nsolo enaagheebwangayo olw'ebibi, yaaguta ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari eyo. Alutaari eyo eidha kubanga ntukuvu inho era nga yange nze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Exodus30:11 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus30:12 “Bw'onaaba ng'oli kubala Abaisiraeli, buli muntu aidha kwesasulira olw'okwenunula eri nze Musengwa Katonda olw'obulamu bwe okubalibwa, alobe kugwibwaku kibamba." 
Exodus30:13 Buli muntu abalibwa aidha kughaayo ebitundu bya feeza ng'ajiira ku mbalirira entongole ey'omu isinzizo. Buli muntu anaabanga n'okughaayo ekigheebwayo ekyo eri nze Musengwa Katonda. 
Exodus30:14 Buli muntu anaabanga ng'abaliibwa era ng'agheza emyaka amakumi abiri oba okusingagho, aidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyo." 
Exodus30:15 Omukombe taidhanga kugha bitundu bya feeza bingi okusinga eby'embala entongole, n'omwavu taidhanga kugha bitundu bya feeza bitatuuka ku mbala ntongole eyo, nga bali kughaayo ekigheebwayo ekyo eri nze Musengwa Katonda olw'ebibi byaibwe." 
Exodus30:16 Oidha kusoloza feeza oyo okuva ku Baisiraeli, ye baidhanga okughaayo olw'ebibi byaibwe, omukozese mu mirimo egy'omu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Omutango ogwo gwidha kubanga ekiidhukizo mu maiso gange nze Musengwa Katonda eri Abaisiraeli olw'obulamu bwaimwe.”" 
Exodus30:17 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus30:18 “Kola ekyogero n'ekityamo kyakyo mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, nga kya kunaabirangamu okite ghagati gha Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda ni alutaari, era okiteemu n'amaadhi." 
Exodus30:19 Aaroni ni batabane baidha kukozesanga amaadhi ago, okunaaba mu ngalo ni ku bigere." 
Exodus30:20 Bwe banaabanga nga baja mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, oba okuja gha alutaari okukola egy'obwakabona, nga bookya ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda, baidha kunaabanga n'amaadhi balobe kufa." 
Exodus30:21 Baidha kunaabanga mu ngalo ni ku bigere balobe kufa. Ekyo kiidha kuba kiragiro kye baidha okukuumanga beene, n'abaana, n'abaidhukulu ense n'ense.”" 
Exodus30:22 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus30:23 “Funayo obuwoowo obusinga bulungi obw'ebika bino: mirra ow'amaadhi agheza obuzito bwa kilo mukaaga, ni sinnamoni awunha obulungi einho agheza obuzito bwa kilo isatu, ni keini awunha obulungi einho, yeena obuzito bwa kilo isatu," 
Exodus30:24 ni kassiya azitogha kilo omukaaga. Ebyo byonabyona bipime ng'ojiira ku mbala ey'eisinzizo entongole. Era oteereku elita ina edh'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva. 
Exodus30:25 Obuwoowo obwo oidha kubutabula nga bwe batabula ebizigo eby'okwesiiga ofunemu omuzigo omutukuvu ogusiigibwa. 
Exodus30:26 Era omuzigo ogwo ogukozese okutukuza ebintu bino: Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu Musengwa Katonda, Esanduuku ey'Endagaano," 
Exodus30:27 emeeza n'ebikozesebwa byaku byonabyona, ekikondo eky'entaala n'ebikozesebwa byaku byonabyona, alutaari ey'okuniokezaaku obubbaani," 
Exodus30:28 ni alutaari ey'okwokeraku ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'ebikozesebwa byaku byonabyona, n'ekyogero ghalala n'ekityamo kyakyo." 
Exodus30:29 Otyo bw'oidha okutukuza ebintu ebyo byonabyona bibe nga bitukuvu inho, era ng'ekintu kyonakyona ekibyekontaku kifuuka kitukuvu." 
Exodus30:30 Memale olwo osiige Aaroni ni batabane omuzigo obatukuze baghange okumpeereza nga bakabona. 
Exodus30:31 Era okobere Abaisiraeli boonaboona oti, ‘Ogwo n'ogunaabanga omuzigo omutukuvu ogunaasiigibwanga, abaana n'abaidhukulu gwe banaakozesanga ense n'ense." 
Exodus30:32 Mutagusiiganga bantu buntu babuliidho, era mutatabulangayo gundi gugufaanana, kuba muzigo mutukuvu era muli na kugutwalanga nga mutukuvu." 
Exodus30:33 Omuntu yeenayeena atabula omuzigo ogugufaananaku oba agukozesa ku muntu atali kabona, anaabanga takaabalirwa mu bantu bange.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Era Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Funayo obuwoowo obuwooma okuwunhiza bwa bika bisatu, mu buzito obwagayaga. Ebika ebyo ni bino: amasando ag'omuti ogwetebwa sitakite, n'akawoowo akakolebwa mu masonko akeetebwa onika, n'amasando ag'omuti ogwetebwa galubano, ghalala obubbaani obusinga bulungi," 
Exodus30:35 Ebyo byonabyona oidha kubitabulira ghalala nga bwe batabula ebizigo eby'okwesiiga, ofunemu obubbaani obuwunha akawoowo. Omwo oidha kutaamu omuunhu era bube butukuvu." 
Exodus30:36 Era oidha kutoola ku obwo butonotono obusekule bukalamu, obumwage gha mberi w'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, ghe ndidha okukwagaana. Muli n'okutwala obubbaani obwo ng'ekintu ekitukuvu einho." 
Exodus30:37 Entabula eyo mutagikozesanga nga mutabula obubbaani obwaimwe, mugitwale nga ntabula ya bubbaani butukuvu obukozesebwa ku lwange nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus30:38 Omuntu yeenayeena alikozesa entabula eyo ng'akola bizigo bya kwesiiga bwesiige, anaabanga takaabalirwa mu bantu bange.”" 
Exodus31:1 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus31:2 “Bona eno, nonze Bezalelo mutabane wa Uri era mwidhukulu wa Hura, era nga wa mu kika ekya Yuda." 
Exodus31:3 Naamugha ku maani gange, naamugha obusobozi, n'amagezi, n'obumanhi, era naamugha okutetenkania n'okuyiiya." 
Exodus31:4 Nhenda ayiiye ng'akozesa amagezi amangi einho, ng'akola ebintu ebitali bya nsambo ndala, mu zaabu, mu feeza, ni mu byuma eby'ekikomo." 
Exodus31:5 Era ng'abaadha amabaale ag'omughendo ag'okutaanha, era ng'asala obuntu obudholiga ku mbaawo, era ng'atetenkania yaayiiya mu nsambo kamaala." 
Exodus31:6 Era naamulonderaku Oholiabu mutabane wa Ahisamaka ow'ekika kya Dani. Era naagha ekitone eky'obusobozi abo boonaboona abakozi ab'amagezi, baghange okukola ebyo byonabyona bye ndi kulagira okukola." 
Exodus31:7 Bye ndi kulagira ni bino: Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, Esanduuku ey'Endagaano n'ekisandikiza kyaku, ni byonabyona eby'okukozesanga mu Weema eyo, bino" 
Exodus31:8 emeeza n'ebikozesebwa byaku byonabyona, ekikondo eky'entaala nga kikolebwa mu zaabu omukenenule n'ebikozesebwa byaku byonabyona, alutaari ey'okuniokezaaku obubbaani," 
Exodus31:9 ni alutaari ey'okwokeraku ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'ebikozesebwa byaku byonabyona, n'ekyogero ghalala n'ekityamo kyakyo." 
Exodus31:10 N'ebivaalo ebirungi einho ebya Aaroni, n'ebya batabane, eby'okukola obwakabona," 
Exodus31:11 n'omuzigo ogw'okusiiga, n'obubbaani obuwunha akawoowo obw'okuniokeza mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Ebyo byonabyona biri na kukolebwa nga bwe nakulagira.”" 
Exodus31:12 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus31:13 “Koba abantu Abaisiraeli oti mukuzenga olunaku lwange olwa Sabbato, kuba n'akamanhiso ghagati ghange n'imwe, n'abaana baimwe, n'abaidhukulu ense n'ense olwo mughange okumanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda ninze mbatukuza." 
Exodus31:14 Mwidha kukuzanga olunaku lwa Sabbato, kuba lutukuvu. Ole ataalutwalenga nga lutukuvu wa kwitibwanga, era omuntu yeenayeena anaalukolerangaku omulimo gwonagwona anaabanga takaabalirwa mu bantu bange." 
Exodus31:15 Emirimo giidha kukolebwanga mu nnaku mukaaga, aye olunaku olwomusanvu, ni Sabbato, lunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda lwa kuwuumula era lutukuvu. Omuntu yeenayeena anaakolanga omulimo gwonagwona ku Sabbato aidha kwitibwanga." 
Exodus31:16 Kale Abaisiraeli boonaboona, abaana n'abaidhukulu, baidha kukuzanga olunaku lwa Sabbato ng'akamanhiso ak'endagaano etawaagho." 
Exodus31:17 Era kaidha kubanga kamanhiso akatawaagho ghagati ghange n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona okubaidhusanga nze Musengwa Katonda bwe nakola eigulu n'ensi mu nnaku omukaaga, ku lwomusanvu ni ndekera agho okukola, ni mpuumula.”" 
Exodus31:18 Katonda bweyamala okwogera ni Musa ku lusozi Sinai, yaamugha ebibaadho ebibiri eby'amabaale Katonda mwene bye yaghandiikaku amateeka." 
Exodus32:1 Abantu bwe baabona nga Musa alwire okuniinuka okuva ku lusozi, beesoloza baidha ye Aaroni, baamukoba bati: “Situkiramu otukolere bakatonda abanaatukulemberamu. Ono omusaadha Musa eyatutoola mu Misiri titwidhi kyamutuukaku.”" 
Exodus32:2 Agho Aaroni n'okubakoba ati: “Kale mutoole ku matu ga bakazi baimwe, ni ku ga batabane baimwe, ni ku ga baghala baimwe, empeta edha zaabu mudhindeetere.”" 
Exodus32:3 Kale abantu boonaboona beetoolaku empeta dha zaabu dhe baali nadho ku matu gaibwe, baadhigheereza Aaroni." 
Exodus32:4 Aaroni yaadhitoola, yaadhisaanuusa, era yaakozesa akatiba yaabakoleramu ekifaananie eky'ente ento enume. Agho baakoba bati: “Isiraeli, ono ni katonda wo eyakutoola mu Misiri!”" 
Exodus32:5 Aaroni bweyamala, yaakola alutaari agho gha mberi agh'ekifaananie ekyo, era yaakola ekirangiriro ati: “Enkyo twidha kuba ku kibinuko eky'okusinza Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Exodus32:6 Era olunaku olwairirira baawuuna baaghaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, baaleeta n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Abantu baatyama baalya era baanhwa, era baatoolera n'okukola eby'ensoni." 
Exodus32:7 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Irayo ghansi gh'olusozi era tezaaku, kuba abantu bo be watoola mu Misiri boonooneike beekola ebiswaza." 
Exodus32:8 Amangu gano baviire ku biragiro bye nabagha. Baasaanuusiiza zaabu, beekolera ekifaananie eky'ente ento enume era baakisinza, baakigha omusengo nga bakoba mbu, ‘Isiraeli, ono ni katonda wo eyakutoola mu Misiri!’" 
Exodus32:9 Nze Musengwa Katonda ndidhi nti abantu bano ba mpwitu inho. 
Exodus32:10 Kale, iwe ndeka obusungu bwange bubaakireku ng'oti muliro mbamalegho. Aye iwe tiidha kukuzikiriza ndidha kukufuulamu eighanga ery'amaani.”" 
Exodus32:11 Musa yeeghemba Musengwa Katonda we ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, lwaki obusungu bwo bwakira ku bantu bo obwaga agho ng'oti muliro? Mbo abantu bo be watoola mu Misiri n'amaani go agataloodheka era n'obukumu, waabasungughalira otyo?" 
Exodus32:12 Abamisiri baidha kukoba bati watoola abantu bo mu Misiri, ng'oli n'ekigendererwa ekibi, era ng'ekigendererwa ekyo kya ku baitira mu biketezo bino eby'ensozi, n'okubazikiriza baweere irala ku nsi. Nkusaba okyuse obusungu bwo obukambwe, oleke kukola bantu bo ekyo ky'otegeike okubakola." 
Exodus32:13 Idhukira abagheereza bo, Aburahamu, ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo, be weelayirira iwe mwene. Wabakoba oti oidha kubazaalagania babe n'abaidhukulu kamaala ng'oti ni muunienie edhiri ku igulu. Era waabasuubiza oti ensi ye wabagha eja kuba yaibwe n'abaana baibwe n'abaidhukulu, ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Exodus32:14 Kale Musengwa Katonda yaakyusa ekidhuubo kye, yaaleka kubazikiriza nga bweyali abeesoomeire." 
Exodus32:15 Agho Musa yaakyusa yaaserengeta ng'ava ku lusozi, yaika n'ebibaadho ebibiri eby'amabaale ng'abigemye mu ngalo dhe. Ebibaadho ebyo byali nga bighandiikiibwaku amateeka ku ndhuyi dhaabyo dhombi." 
Exodus32:16 Katonda mwene n'eyabikola era n'eyabighandiikamu amateeka. 
Exodus32:17 Yoshua yaawulira amamiro ag'abantu nga bali kwasiikana. Agho yaakoba Musa ati: “Ndi kuwulira amamiro ag'abantu abali kulwana nga gava mu Baisiraeli.” 
Exodus32:18 Aye Musa yaamwiramu ati: “Busa, okwo ti kwasiikana lwa kughangula oba kulira kwa kughangulwa. Aye mamiro ga bantu bali kwemba nze ge ndi kuwulira.”" 
Exodus32:19 Agho Musa bweyaseeta okumpi n'Abaisiraeli ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, yaabona ekifaananie eky'ente ento enume, n'abantu nga bali kukina. Agho obusungu obw'amaani bwamusituka, yaasuula ebibaadho eby'amabaale bye yali agemye mu ngalo, byamenheka nga yaakatuuka agho olusozi ghe luweeraku." 
Exodus32:20 Yaatoola ekifaananie ekyo eky'ente ento enume yaakisaanuusa, yaakisa kyafuuka nsaano. Ensaano eno yaagimansira ku maadhi, yaamala yaaganhwesa Abaisiraeli boonaboona." 
Exodus32:21 Musa yaabuuza Aaroni ati: “Bwenebwene abantu bano baakukola ki memale obaleeteku ekibi ekikologho ekyo?” 
Exodus32:22 Aaroni yaamwiramu ati: “Musengwa Katonda wange, otansungughalira bujiiririire, kuba oidhi bukalamu ng'abantu bano bwe benda einho okwonoona." 
Exodus32:23 Kale beene n'abaakoba bati, ‘Tukolere bakatonda abanaatukulemberamu. Ono omusaadha Musa eyatutoola mu Misiri, titwidhi kyamutuukaku.’" 
Exodus32:24 Zeena naabakoba nti, ‘Kale kiisi avaire zaabu amutooleku amuleete.’ Kale bampa zaabu waibwe, naamusuula mu muliro, era ekyavaamu n'ekifaananie ekyo eky'ente ento enume.”" 
Exodus32:25 Musa yaabona ng'abantu bafuuse ng'oti n'ensolo edhikutwire, engeri Aaroni bweyabaleka ni beebisa eyo batyo mu nsambo ebaswaza mu maiso ag'abazigu baibwe." 
Exodus32:26 Agho yaayemerera gha mulyango ogwingira mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, yaalangirira ati: “Kiisi ali ku luuyi lwa Musengwa Katonda, aidhe ghano ghe ndi.” Era Abalevi boonaboona beesololeza ghalala agho ghe yali." 
Exodus32:27 Agho yaabakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Buli muntu ageme empiima ye, era aje ng'abitabita mu weema dhoonadhoona okuva ku esooka okutuuka ku esembayo, aje ng'aita oba muganda we, oba mukagwa we, oba muliraanwa we.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Abalevi baakola nga Musa bweyabalagira, era ku lunaku olwo baatirimbula abasaadha oti nkumi isatu." 
Exodus32:29 Era Musa yaabakoba ati: “Olwaleero mutukuziibwa okugheereza Musengwa Katonda nga bakabona, olwa buli muntu okwita mutabane ni muganda we. Kale Musengwa Katonda abaghaire enkabi olwaleero luno.”" 
Exodus32:30 Enkyo lyaku Musa yaakoba abantu ati: “Mukoze ekibi ekikologho! Aye leka nniine ye Musengwa Katonda ku lusozi oba katyo nnaamwikirizisa okukibasonigha.” 
Exodus32:31 Kale Musa yairayo ye Musengwa Katonda, yaamukoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, abantu bo bakoze ekibi ekikologho, beekolera bakatonda mu zaabu!" 
Exodus32:32 Aye ndi kukusaba obasonighe ekibi kyaibwe ekyo. Bw'oba nga toobasonighe, sasa eriina lyange mu kitabo kyo mw'oghandiika abantu bo.”" 
Exodus32:33 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Eriina ly'oyo ansobiiza n'akola ekibi, lye ndidha okusasa mu kitabo kyange." 
Exodus32:34 Aye iwe ja okulembere abantu obatuuse mu kifo ekyo kye nakukoba. Era, bona eno, malaika wange aidha kukukulembera. Aye era ekiseera kiidha kutuuka mbabonereze olw'ekibi kyaibwe ekyo.”" 
Exodus32:35 Era Musengwa Katonda yasindika ku bantu ekibamba kyabalumya einho, olw'okuba baakoba Aaroni okubakolera ekifaananie eky'ente ento enume." 
Exodus33:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Muve ghano, iwe n'abantu be watoola mu Misiri, muje mu nsi ye nalayira okugha Aburahamu, ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo, n'abaana baibwe, n'abaidhukulu." 
Exodus33:2 Ndidha kutuma malaika emberi waimwe, era ndidha kubinga mu nsi eyo Abakanaani, n'Abamori, n'Abahitti, n'Abaperizzi, n'Abahivi, n'Abayebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Muje mu nsi engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala. Aye nze tiidha kujiira ghalala n'imwe, kuba nsobola okubaita naabamaliragho mu ngira, olw'okuba muli ba mpwitu inho.”" 
Exodus33:4 Abantu bwe baawulira amawulire ago amabi baatoolera okulira, era baaloba kuvaala byamadholobera byaibwe;" 
Exodus33:5 kuba Musengwa Katonda yali amaze okukoba Musa akobe abantu ati: “Muli ba mpwitu inho, era bwe njiira aghalala n'imwe, ni bwekaba akaseera akatono kati, mbaita naabamalagho. Buti ni mutoolemu ebyamadholobera byaimwe, nze mwene ndidha kumanha eky'okubakolera.”" 
Exodus33:6 Kale abantu baava agho ku lusozi Sinai, beeyongerayo nga batoiremu ebyamadholobera byaibwe, era tibairayo kubivaala." 
Exodus33:7 Mperaano buli Abaisiraeli ghe baasimbanga weema dhaibwe, nga Musa ataagho eweema nga yeeswireku akata okuva agho. Eweema eyo ng'agyeta Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Era kiisi eyayendanga okwebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda ng'aja ye Weema eyo." 
Exodus33:8 Era kiisi Musa lwe yajanga mu Weema eyo, ng'abantu boonaboona basituka, buli muntu yaayemerera ku mulyango ogw'eweema ye yaalingirira Musa okutuusa lwe yangiranga mu Weema eyo." 
Exodus33:9 Musa bweyangiranga mu Weema eyo, ng'ekire ekiri ng'oti mpango kiika, nga kyesimba gha mulyango ogw'Eweema eyo, nga Musengwa Katonda ayogera ni Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Era abantu bwe baabonanga ekire ekiri ng'oti mpango nga kyesimbye gha mulyango ogw'Eweema eyo, ng'abantu boonaboona basituka, nga basinza nga buli muntu ali gha mulyango ogw'eweema ye." 
Exodus33:11 Atyo Musengwa Katonda bweyayogeranga ni Musa maiso ku maiso, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'ayogera ni mukagwa we. Musa bweyamalanga, yairanga agho Abaisiraeli ghe baalinga nga basimbye weema dhaibwe, aye omugheereza we omwisuka ye baayetanga Yoshua, mutabane wa Nuni, tiyavanga mu Weema eyo." 
Exodus33:12 Musa yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, wankoba okukulembera abantu bano, aye tiwankobera muntu y'oja kuntuma naye. Era wankoba oti ondidhi bukalamu, era oti osiima bye nkola." 
Exodus33:13 Buti ni kye nkusaba, nga bw'osiima bye nkola, ndholeka ensambo ye mbe neebiseemu, nsobole okukumanha obukalamu era nhongere okukusiimya. Wo Musengwa Katonda, idhukira ng'abantu bano niiwe mwene owabeerondera babe abantu bo.”" 
Exodus33:14 Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Kale nze ndidha kuja n'iwe era ndidha kukuganha okuwuumula” 
Exodus33:15 Musa, era yaakoba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Bw'oba nga tooje ninze tuleke tusigale ghano," 
Exodus33:16 kuba abantu balimanha batya ng'osiima nze ni beene bye tukola? Bw'oja n'ife, olwo oidha kwoleka nga ghaligho endhawulo ghagati gha ife n'abantu abandi boonaboona ab'oku nsi.”" 
Exodus33:17 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Ekyo kyenekyene ky'okobye ndidha kukikola, kuba nkwidhi bukalamu inho era nsiima by'okola.”" 
Exodus33:18 Musa yaamukoba ati: “Nkusaba mbone ekitiisa kyo.” 
Exodus33:19 Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Ndidha kubisa obulungi bwange bwonabwona mu maiso go, era ndhatule eriina lyange nze Musengwa Katonda ng'owulira. Ndidha kugemerwa ekivunika oyo ye nhenda okugemerwa ekivunika, era nsaasire oyo ye nhenda okusaasira." 
Exodus33:20 Aye toidha kumbona mu maiso, kuba omuntu tasobola kumbona mu maiso n'asigala nga mulamu." 
Exodus33:21 Aye ghano kumpi ninze ghaligho ekifo gh'oghanga okwemerera, ku ibaale." 
Exodus33:22 Kale, ekitiisa kyange bwe kinaaba kibitagho, ndidha kukuta mu lwatika olw'eibaale, era nkughembeku n'engalo dhange okutuusa nga mmaze okubitagho." 
Exodus33:23 Bwe nnaamala okubitagho ndidha kukughembulaku engalo dhange obone omugongo gwange, aye tombone mu maiso.”" 
Exodus34:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Baadha ebibaadho bibiri eby'amabaale ebiri ng'ebyasooka, ndidha kughandiikaku ebibono ebyali ku bire ebyasooka bye wamenha." 
Exodus34:2 Weetegeke, idho enkyo oidhe ku lusozi Sinai, onteegere eyo ghaigulu ku lusozi." 
Exodus34:3 Ghatabaagho muntu yeenayeena y'oidha naye, waire omuntu yeenayeena okubonebwaku aghantu woonawoona ku lusozi olwo. Era ghatabaagho nsolo yoonayoona eyayirwa ku lusozi olwo, oba okumpi na lwo, k'ebe entaama, oba embuzi, oba ente.”" 
Exodus34:4 Kale Musa yaabaadha ebibaadho bibiri eby'amabaale ebiri ng'ebyasooka, era yaasituka ku nkyo inho yaaniina ku lusozi Sinai n'ebibaadho ebyo mu ngalo dhe nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Exodus34:5 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaikira mu kire, yaayemerera agho ni Musa era yaayatula eriina lye erya “Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Exodus34:6 Musengwa Katonda yaabita mu maiso ga Musa era yaalangirira ati: “Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze Katonda asaasira era agemerwa abantu ekivunika, alwagho okusungughala, agonza abantu obutalekera era omwesigwa einho." 
Exodus34:7 Ninze ayoleka enkumi n'enkumi edh'abantu okugonza kwange okwo okutakoma. Era mbasonigha olw'okukola ebibi, n'olw'obudheemu, n'olw'empwitu. Aye tiroba kubonereza baana na baidhukulu lwa bibi bya bazaire baibwe, mu nse dhoonadhoona okutuuka ku lwokusatu ni ku lwokuna.”" 
Exodus34:8 Amangu ago Musa yeeyala ku itaka yaasinza. 
Exodus34:9 Era yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, oba nga ongemeirwa ekivunika, nkusaba obe mu ife tujiire ghalala niiwe. Waire ng'abantu bano ba mpwitu, tukusaba otusonighe olw'okukola ebibi n'olw'empwitu otutwale nga tuli bantu bo.”" 
Exodus34:10 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Bona eno, buti ndi kukola n'imwe endagaano. Ndidha kukola ebyewuunhio ng'abantu bo boonaboona babona, ebyewuunhio ebitakolwangaku mu ighanga lyonalyona mu nsi yoonayoona. Abantu boonaboona balikibona ekyo kye nja okukola, kuba kye nja okukola mu imwe kiriba kitiisa." 
Exodus34:11 Mugondere kye ndi kubalagira olwaleero, ndidha kubinga ye muja, Abamori, Abakanaani, Abahitti, Abaperizzi, Abahivi n'Abayebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Mwegendereze mubone nga timukola ndagaano n'abantu be mulyagaana mu nsi ye muli kujaamu, kuba ekyo kisobola okubaleetera okwonoona." 
Exodus34:13 Mu kifo eky'okukola nabo endagaano, mumenhemenhegho alutaari dhaibwe, n'ebituuti byaibwe eby'amabaale, era n'ebifaananie bya Ashera, omusambwa gwaibwe omukazi." 
Exodus34:14 Mutasinzanga katonda yeenayeena, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda, ayetebwa ‘Nkikidi’, bwenebwene ndi wa nkikidi." 
Exodus34:15 Mubone nga timukola ndagaano na bantu be mulyagaana mu nsi ye muli kujaamu. Kuba abantu abo bwe baliba nga bali kusinza emisambwa gyaibwe era nga bali kugigha emisengo, balisobola okubeeta imwe mubeeyimbeku, era mulisobola okulya ku ebyo bye baliba baghaireyo ng'emisengo." 
Exodus34:16 Era mulisobola okufunira batabane baimwe ku baghala baibwe okubabayira. Kale baghala baibwe abo bwe balitoolera okusinza bakatonda baibwe, ni batabane baimwe balisobola okubeeyimbaku boona baasinza bakatonda abo." 
Exodus34:17 “Muteewumbiranga kifaananie kya katonda nga mukozesa akatiba n'ekyuma ekisaanuuse, ni mumala ni mumusinza." 
Exodus34:18 “Mwidha kukolanga Ekibinuko eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa. Mwidha kulyanga emigaati egyo okumala enaku musanvu, nga bwe nabalagira, mu biseera ebyateebwagho, mu mwezi gwa Abibu. Kuba mu mwezi gwa Abibu ogwo, ni gwe mwaviiramu mu Misiri." 
Exodus34:19 “Abaana ababeri boonaboona abalenzi, baidha kubanga bange. Era n'ensolo edhizaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka nga nume, mu nte, mu ntaama, ni mu mbuzi, dhoona dhange." 
Exodus34:20 Endogoyi enume ezaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka muginunulanga nga mughaayo entaama ento. Aye bwe mubanga nga timuginunwire, muginiolanga enkoto yaafa. N'omwana omulenzi omuberi munaamununulanga mu nsambo n'endala eyo. “Ghatabangagho aidha kusinza ng'azira kigheebwayo." 
Exodus34:21 “Oli n'enaku mukaaga edh'okukoleraku emirimo gyo gyonagyona. Aye ku lunaku olwomusanvu otakolanga mulimo gwonagwona ka bibe biseera bya kulima oba bya kukungula. 
Exodus34:22 “Buli makungula lwe ganaatuukanga mwidha kukolanga Ekibinuko eky'Amakungula ag'engaano esooka. Era ku nkomerero ey'omwaka mwidha kukolanga ekibinuko eky'Entindi eky'okusololeza ebirime mu byagi. 
Exodus34:23 Kiisi musaadha anaabanga n'okwidha okunsinza nze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda owa Isiraeli, mu bibinuko ebyo eby'emikuzi esatu buli mwaka." 
Exodus34:24 Ndidha kubinga amaghanga agali ye muli kuja, ngaziye ekiketezo kye muja okutyamamu. Era ezira muntu aja kwegomba kutoola itaka lyaimwe, emikuzi egyo esatu buli mwaka, gye munaidhanga okunsinza nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Exodus34:25 “Bw'oghangayo ensolo eitiibwa ng'omusengo ogugheebwayo ku Kibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa, otaleeterangaku mugaati guzimbulukusiibwa. Era otalekangagho yindi ku mamba ey'ensolo egheereibwayo ng'omusengo n'etuusa enkyo ery'olunaku olwiririra." 
Exodus34:26 “Emere ye musookanga okukungula mu misiri gyaimwe, mugireetanga mu ndhu yange nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mwagighaayo. “Mutafumbiranga mamba ya mbuzi nto, oba ya ntaama nto mu mata ga inhaayo.”" 
Exodus34:27 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Ghandiika ebibono ebyo, kuba nja kukola endagaano n'iwe, n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, nga njiira ku bibono ebyo.”" 
Exodus34:28 Kale Musa yaaghandiika ebibono eby'endagaano, amateeka eikumi, ku bibaadho eby'amabaale. Yaaba eyo ni Musengwa Katonda okumala enaku amakumi ana omusana n'obwire, era nga talya mere waire okunhwa amaadhi." 
Exodus34:29 Agho Musa yaaniinuka okuva ku lusozi Sinai, ng'ali n'ebibaadho ebibiri eby'amabaale ebiriku amateeka. Oluwutu olw'omu maiso ge lwali luli kumesunkana olw'okwogera ni Katonda, aye mwene yali taidhi." 
Exodus34:30 Era Aaroni n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona bwe baamubona, baatya okuseeta y'ali, kuba oluwutu olw'omu maiso ge lwali luli kumesunkana." 
Exodus34:31 Aye Musa yaabeeta, era Aaroni n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli baira y'ali, yaayogera nabo." 
Exodus34:32 Olumaliira Abaisiraeli boonaboona baaseeta gh'ali, yaabakobera amateeka goonagoona nga Musengwa Katonda bweyagamugha bweyayogera naye ku lusozi Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Musa bweyamala okwogera nabo, yeeghemba ekitambaala mu maiso." 
Exodus34:34 Aye buli lwe yajanga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda okwogera naye, nga yeeghembula ku maiso ekitambaala era yaaba atyo, okutuusa lwe yavangayo naira y'Abaisiraeli okubakobera ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yabanga ng'amulagiire okubakobera." 
Exodus34:35 Agho Abaisiraeli baabonanga oluwutu olw'omu maiso ga Musa nga lumesunkana, era Musa yairangamu okweghemba ekitambaala mu maiso okutuusa kabiri lwe yajanga okwogera ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus35:1 Agho Musa yaayeta Abaisiraeli boonaboona beesololeza gh'ali. Yaabakoba ati: “Bino n'ebintu Musengwa Katonda by'abalagiire okukola: 
Exodus35:2 Emirimo giidha kukolebwanga mu nnaku mukaaga, aye olunaku olwomusanvu, ni Sabbato, lunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda lwa kuwuumula era lutukuvu. Omuntu yeenayeena anaakolanga omulimo gwonagwona ku Sabbato aidha kwitibwanga." 
Exodus35:3 Waire okukuma obw'omuliro mu maka gaimwe ku Sabbato, mutakikolanga.”" 
Exodus35:4 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli boonaboona ati: “Kino Musengwa Katonda ky'abalagiire. 
Exodus35:5 Buli muntu atoole ekigheebwayo akighe Musengwa Katonda. Kiisi ali n'omwoyo omugabi aleetere Musengwa Katonda ekigheebwayo, nga ku bino: zaabu, feeza, n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
Exodus35:6 Oba aleete ku bino: engoye dha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, n'engoye empegheevu, n'edho edhaakolebwa mu buviiri obw'embuzi." 
Exodus35:7 Oba aleete ku bino: amawu amakunhe ag'entaama enume, n'amawu amakunhe ag'ensolo edhindi, n'embaawo edhaasalibwa mu muti ogwetebwa akasia." 
Exodus35:8 Oba aleete ku bino: amafuta ag'entaala, obuwoowo obutabulwa mu muzigo ogw'okusiiga, n'obuwoowo obw'okuniosa." 
Exodus35:9 Oba aleete ku bino: amabaale ageetebwa onikisi, n'amabaale ag'omughendo agandi agateebwa ku kivaalo eky'obwakabona, ni ku kivaalo kabona ky'avaala mu kifuba." 
Exodus35:10 “Kiisi ali n'obumanhi obw'okukola, aidhe tukole ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira." 
Exodus35:11 Tukole Weema nga tukozesa bino: ekintu ekigighembaku, n'obuntu obugemagania ekigighembaku ekyo, n'ebikondo byaku, n'embaawo edhikiikamu, n'empango dhaayo, n'ebikolo kwe dheemerera." 
Exodus35:12 Era tukozese bino: Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, n'emiti gyayo egy'okugibbeedesanga, n'ekisandikiza, n'ekintu ekikinzaagho." 
Exodus35:13 Era tukozese bino: emeeza n'emiti egy'okugibbeedesanga, n'ebikozesebwa byaku byonabyona, n'emigaati egigheebwayo ye Katonda," 
Exodus35:14 n'ekikondo eky'entaala olw'okumuliikirira, n'ebikozesebwa bya ku, n'entaala dhaaku, n'amafuta gaadho." 
Exodus35:15 Era tukozese bino: alutaari ey'okuniokezaaku obubbaani, n'emiti egy'okugibbeedesanga, n'omuzigo ogw'okusiiga, n'obubbaani obuwunha akawoowo, n'ekintu ekikinzaagho mu mulyango ogwingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho." 
Exodus35:16 Era tukozese bino: alutaari ey'okwokeraku ebigheebwayo, n'ekiibo ekyagirukirwaku eky'ensonda eina, ekiri ng'oti kasengeedho nga kyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, n'emiti egy'okubbeedesanga alutaari eyo, n'ebikozesebwa byaku byonabyona ekyogero n'ekityamo kyakyo." 
Exodus35:17 Era tukozese bino: olugugiriro olwezungulula Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, n'empango kwe lutimbibwa, n'ebikolo empango edho kwe dheemerera, n'ekintu ekikinzaagho mu mulyango ogw'olugugiriro olwo." 
Exodus35:18 Era tukozese bino: enkondo edhigemerera Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda ku itaka, ghalala n'enkondo edhigemerera olugugiriro ku itaka, n'emigugha gyaku." 
Exodus35:19 Era tukozese bino: ebivaalo ebirungi einho, eby'okugheerezebwamu kabona mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, n'ebivaalo bya Aaroni kabona ebitukuvu, n'ebivaalo ebitukuvu ebya batabane eby'okugheererezangamu nga bakabona.”" 
Exodus35:20 Agho abantu boonaboona baagolola, baava mu maiso ga Musa." 
Exodus35:21 Buli muntu eyawulira mu mwoyo gwe ng'alumirwa Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, yaidha ng'aleese ekigheebwayo ye Musengwa Katonda, kikozesebwe mu kukola Weema eyo, n'ebikozesebwa mu Weema omwo, era n'ebivaalo ebitukuvu." 
Exodus35:22 Abasaadha n'abakazi baidha beene nga benda aghazira kukakibwa, baaleeta ebintu bya zaabu bye batunga ku ngoye, empeta edh'oku matu, ebinhere eby'omu nkoto, n'ebyamadholobera ebindi ebya zaabu. Buli muntu eyaghangayo, ng'aghaayo ekintu kya zaabu eri Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus35:23 Buli muntu yaleeta kye yali nakyo: engoye edha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, n'empegheevu, n'edhaakolebwa mu buviiri obw'embuzi, n'amawu amakunhe ag'entaama, n'amawu amakunhe ag'ensolo edhindi." 
Exodus35:24 Buli muntu eyali aghanga okughaayo feeza oba ekyuma eky'ekikomo, yaakireeta ng'ekigheebwayo ye Musengwa Katonda. Era buli muntu eyali n'olubaawo okuva mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, yaaluleeta lukole omulimo gwonagwona ogubaagho." 
Exodus35:25 Abakazi boonaboona abaali baidhi okulanga ewuuzi n'engalo baalanga ewuuzi edha bbululu, n'edha nakasooma, n'edha kasaayisaayi, n'edh'engoye empegheevu, baadhireeta." 
Exodus35:26 Era abo abaali n'obumanhirivu, baaleeta wuuzi dhe baalanga mu buviiri obw'embuzi." 
Exodus35:27 Abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli baaleeta amabaale ag'omughendo ageetebwa onikisi ag'okuta ku kivaalo eky'obwakabona, n'ag'okutaanha ku kivaalo eky'omu kifuba." 
Exodus35:28 Era baaleeta n'amafuta ag'entaala, n'obuwoowo obuteebwa mu muzigo ogw'okusiiga, era n'obuteebwa mu bubbaani okubuwunhisa akawoowo." 
Exodus35:29 Abaisiraeli boonaboona, abasaadha n'abakazi, abaawulira mu myoyo gyaibwe nga balumirwa omulimo Musengwa Katonda gwe yalagira ng'abita mu Musa, baaleeta ebigheebwayo ebyo beene nga benda aghazira kukakibwa, baabighaayo ye Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus35:30 Agho Musa yaakobera Abaisiraeli ati: “Musengwa Katonda yalonda Bezalelo mutabane wa Uri, era mwidhukulu wa Hura, era nga wa mu kika kya Yuda." 
Exodus35:31 Katonda yaatoola ku maani ge ye mwene yaagamugha, era yaamugha obusobozi, n'amagezi, n'obumanhi, era yaamugha okutetenkania n'okuyiiya." 
Exodus35:32 Katonda oyo yayenda Bezalelo ayiiye ng'akozesa amagezi amangi einho, akole ebintu ebitali bya nsambo ndala mu zaabu, mu feeza, ni mu byuma eby'ekikomo." 
Exodus35:33 Era abaadhe amabaale ag'omughendo ag'okutaanha, era asale obuntu obudholiga ku mbaawo, era atetenkanie nga bw'ayiiya mu nsambo kamaala." 
Exodus35:34 Era Katonda oyo yaagha Bezalelo oyo ghalala ni Oholiabu omwoyo ogwenda okugalagira abantu abandi okutetenkania n'okuyiiya kwaibwe okwo. Oholiabu oyo, ni mutabane wa Ahisamaka ow'ekika ekya Dani." 
Exodus35:35 Musengwa Katonda yaabaidhuza amagezi, nga basobola okukola kiisi mulimo gwonagwona: ka gube ogw'omubaadhi ow'amabaale ag'omughendo, oba ogw'omuyiiya, oba ogw'omulusi ow'engoye, oba ogw'adholiga engoye ng'akozesa n'empiso n'ewuuzi ka dhibe dha bbululu, oba dha nakasooma, oba dha ngoye mpegheevu. Era baasobola okukola kiisi mulimo ogwetaagisa okutetenkania." 
Exodus36:1 “Bezalelo, ni Oholiabu, na kiisi muntu yeenayeena aghanga okukola, Musengwa Katonda b'aghaire obusobozi n'okutegeera ebyetaagisa mu kukola Weema entukuvu, baidha kukola ebyo byonabyona nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira.”" 
Exodus36:2 Agho Musa yaayeta Bezalelo, ni Oholiabu, na kiisi muntu yeenayeena aghanga okukola, Musengwa Katonda ye yagha obusobozi, era eyawulira mu mwoyo gwe ng'alumirwa Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus36:3 Bano baidha ye Musa yaabagha ebintu Abaisiraeli bye baaghaayo beene nga benda, aghazira kukakibwa, bikozesebwe ku Weema eyo. Abantu beeyongeranga buli nkyo okuleetera Musa ebintu bye baaghangayo beene ekyeyendere." 
Exodus36:4 Agho abantu boonaboona abaali nga bali kukola Weema eyo, baava ku mirimo gyaibwe." 
Exodus36:5 Baaja baakoba Musa bati: “Abantu bali kuleeta ebintu kamaala inho okusinga ebyo ebyetaagibwa okukola omulimo Musengwa Katonda gwe yatulagira okukola.” 
Exodus36:6 Kale Musa yaagha ekiragiro kyatuuka ku buli muntu nga kirobera abantu okwongera okuleeta ebirabo era abantu baalekera agho. 
Exodus36:7 Kuba ebintu bye baali baleese byali bimala okukola omulimo gwonagwona byafiika nagho. 
Exodus36:8 Abantu abasinga kuba na bumanhi mu bakozi boonaboona, n'abaakola Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Baagikola mu nsuubo ikumi nga dhaakolebwa mu ngoye empegheevu edhaalukibwa obukalamu edha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi. Era baatungiramu ebifaananie eby'ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi, nga bakozesa empiso n'ewuuzi." 
Exodus36:9 Obuleeyi obw'olusuubo olulala nga buli mita ikumi na ibiri, obugazi bwalwo bwaba mita ibiri, era ng'ensuubo dhoonadhoona dhaagayaga." 
Exodus36:10 Ensuubo eitaanu dhaatungibwa nga dhiyimbiibwa, nga buli lulala luyungiibwa ku lwinaalwo n'eitaanu edhindi dhoona dhaayimbibwa dhityo." 
Exodus36:11 Ku buli lusuubo olusembayo ku dhaayimbibwa eitaanu edhisooka, baataaku obukondo bwe baakola mu lugoye lwa langi ya bbululu, ni ku itaanu edhairirira baakola ekintu n'ekirala." 
Exodus36:12 Baata obukondo amakumi ataanu ku lusuubo olusembayo ku itaanu edhaasooka okuyimbwa, n'obundi amakumi ataanu ku itaanu dhire edhindi, olwo bwaba nga bugemagaine mu lunhiriri." 
Exodus36:13 Agho baakola obuntu amakumi ataanu obugemagania obukondo obw'oluuyi olundi ku bw'oluuyi olundi nga bwa zaabu. Endhuyi dhombi bwe dhaayimbibwa, olwo Weema eyo yaaba ng'efuuse enambirira." 
Exodus36:14 Era baakola ensuubo ikumi na lulala mu ngoye edhaakolebwa mu buviiri obw'embuzi, nga dha kughemba ku Weema eyo." 
Exodus36:15 Buli lusuubo lwali nga lugheza mita ikumi na isatu obuleeyi, ate obugazi lwaba mita ibiri, era dhoonadhoona eikumi n'olulala dhaali nga dhaagayaga mu bipimo." 
Exodus36:16 Ensuubo eitaanu dhaatungibwa dhaayimbibwa gha dhonka nga buli olulala luyungibwa ku lwinaalwo, ni dhire edhindi omukaaga dhoona dhaayimbibwa gha dhonka." 
Exodus36:17 Ku mbali okw'olusuubo olusembayo ku itaanu edhaasooka okuyimbibwa, baakoleraku obukondo amakumi ataanu, ni ku mbali okw'olusuubo olusembayo ku mukaaga edhairirira okuyimbibwa, baakoleraku obukondo amakumi ataanu." 
Exodus36:18 Era baakola obuntu obugemagania obukondo obw'oluuyi olundi ku bw'oluuyi olundi nga bwa kyuma kya kikomo, baabuta mu bukondo bule, bwayimba endhuyi dhombi dhaafuuka ekikingiriza ekiramba." 
Exodus36:19 Era baakola ebintu ebighemba ku Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda ebindi bibiri, eky'omunda nga kyakolebwa mu mawu amakunhe ag'entaama enume, ate eky'oku ngulu nga kyakolebwa mu mawu amakunhe ag'ensolo edhindi." 
Exodus36:20 Era baakola ebikondo eby'Eweema mu muti ogwetebwa akasia. 
Exodus36:21 Obuleeyi obwa buli kikondo bwali emita ina, ate obugazi bwaba ekitundu kya mita." 
Exodus36:22 Buli kikondo kyaliku ebintu ebisongovu bibiri eby'okukiyungisa ku kiinaakyo, era ebikondo byonabyona eby'Eweema eyo batyo bwe baabikola." 
Exodus36:23 Baakola ebikondo amakumi abiri byaba ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba olw'Eweema. 
Exodus36:24 Era ebikondo ebyo baabikolera ebikolo amakumi ana ebya feeza nga kwe binaayemereranga. Nga buli kikondo kiri n'ebikolo bibiri ebirimu ebituli omwingira ebintu bire ebibiri ebisongovu eby'ekikondo ekyo. 
Exodus36:25 Baakola ebikondo amakumi abiri byaba ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba olw'Eweema. 
Exodus36:26 Era baabikolera ebikolo amakumi ana ebya feeza. Nga buli kikondo kiri n'ebikolo bibiri ebirimu ebituli omwingira ebintu bire ebisongovu eby'ekikondo ekyo. 
Exodus36:27 Einhuma w'Eweema ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba, baakolerayo ebikondo mukaaga." 
Exodus36:28 Mu nsonda eibiri edh'einhuma y'Eweema baakolerayo ekikondo kirala kirala. 
Exodus36:29 Ebikondo ebyo byombi baabikola nga biyimbiibwa okuva ghansi okutuukira irala ghaigulu ku mutwe aghali omukonda. Ebikondo ebyo byombi ebikola ensonda, bityo bwe byakolebwa." 
Exodus36:30 Kale, baakola ebikondo munaana n'ebikolo byabyo ikumi na mukaaga ebya feeza, nga buli kikondo kyemereire ku bikolo bibiri." 
Exodus36:31 Era baabaadha embaawo edhikiikamu mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, ng'eitaanu dha kugemagania ebikondo eby'oluuyi olundi olw'Eweema."
