Exodus36:32 N'edhindi eitaanu nga dha kugemagania bikondo eby'oluuyi olundi olw'Eweema eyo, n'edhindi eitaanu nga dha kugemagania bikondo eby'oluuyi olw'einhuma olw'e bugwandhuba olw'Eweema eyo." 
Exodus36:33 Era baabaadhayo olubaawo olukiikamu olubita ghagati agha buli kikondo, lwaba lulambirira nga lumalaku oluuyi lwonalwona olw'Eweema." 
Exodus36:34 Ebikondo ebyo, baabirimbyaku zaabu byonabyona okubyezunguluza, era baabikoleraku n'emikonda egya zaabu egibitamu embaawo dhire edhikiikamu. Embaawo edho dhoona baadhirimbyaku zaabu dhoonadhoona okudheezunguluza." 
Exodus36:35 Era baakolayo olutimbe, mu ngoye edha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, ni mu ngoye empegheevu. Era baalutungiramu ebifaananie eby'ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi nga bakozesa empiso n'ewuuzi." 
Exodus36:36 Olutimbe olwo baalukolera empango ina edh'omuti ogwetebwa akasia, era baadhirimbyaku zaabu dhoonadhoona okudheezunguluza. Baakola obusumaali bwa zaabu obw'okusibya olutimbe olwo ku mpango, era baakolera empango edho ebikolo bya feeza bina kwe dhaayemereranga." 
Exodus36:37 Mu mulyango ogwingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, baakoleragho ekintu ekikinzaagho nga bakikola mu lugoye olwa langi ya bbululu, n'olw'eya nakasooma, n'olw'eya kasaayisaayi, ni mu lugoye olughegheevu era baakitungiramu ebimuli nga bakozesa empiso n'ewuuzi." 
Exodus36:38 Ekikinzaagho ekyo baakikolera empango itaanu n'obusumaali obw'okukisibisa. Ku mitwe egy'empango edho baalimbyaku zaabu. Era baakoleraku emige nga gya zaabu, aye ebikolo byadho baabikola nga bya kyuma kya kikomo." 
Exodus37:1 Bezalelo yaakola Esanduuku ey'Endagaano mu mbaawo edh'omuti ogwetebwa akasia, ng'obuleeyi bwayo egheza mita ndala ni sentimita ikumi, obugungumavu yaaba sentimita nkaaga na mukaaga." 
Exodus37:2 Yaamala yaalimbya ku sanduuku eyo zaabu omukenenule munda mwayo ni ku ngulu kwayo. Era baagikoleraku olukomo lwa zaabu omukenenule okugyezunguluza yoonayoona. 
Exodus37:3 Agho yaakola mu zaabu emikonda emyekulungirivu ena nga giri ng'oti mpeta. Yaagita ku magulu ga sanduuku eyo ana, mu mbali ebiri, ni mu mbali ebiri." 
Exodus37:4 Agho yaabaadhiraku emiti egy'okugibbeedesa mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, memale emiti egyo yaagirimbyaku zaabu gyonagyona okugyezunguluza." 
Exodus37:5 Yaata emiti egyo mu mikonda gire emyekulungirivu egiri ku mbali ni ku mbali okw'esanduuku eyo olw'okugibbeederangaku. 
Exodus37:6 Yaagikoleraku ekisandikiza mu zaabu omukenenule, ng'obuleeyi kigheza mita ndala ni sentimita ikumi, ate obugazi kyaba sentimita nkaaga na mukaaga." 
Exodus37:7 Yaakola mu zaabu ebifaananie bibiri eby'ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi. 
Exodus37:8 Yaabita ku ndhuyi dhombi edh'ekisandikiza eky'esanduuku eyo. Ebifaananie bino byombi yaabikolera ghalala, byegema ghalala, byaba kintu kirala nga tibyawukaine." 
Exodus37:9 Ebifaananie ebyo yaabikola ng'abirinzagania, aye ng'amaiso galingiriire ku kisandikiza ekyo, era nga byandhulwiza amaghagha gaabyo gaaghemba ku kisandikiza ekyo." 
Exodus37:10 Era yaakola emeeza mu muti ogwetebwa akasia ng'obuleeyi bwayo egheza sentimita kinaana na munaana, obugazi bwaba sentimita amakumi ana na ina (44), n'obugungumavu bwayo nga buli sentimita nkaaga na mukaaga (66)." 
Exodus37:11 Omuti ogwo ogw'akasia yaagulimbyaku zaabu omukenenule, era emeeza yaagitaaku omugo gwa zaabu okugyezunguluza." 
Exodus37:12 Yaagikoleraku akabaawo akagyezungulula ng'obugazi kaagayaga n'ekyala eky'omuntu, era nga keezungulwirwa omugo gwa zaabu." 
Exodus37:13 Yaakola emikonda ena mu zaabu emyekulungirivu ng'oti mpeta, yaagita mu nsonda eina edh'emeeza, kiisi ghali mugulu." 
Exodus37:14 Kumpi agho n'akabaawo ako, yaataagho emikonda egyo, era nga n'egibitamu emiti egy'okubbeedesanga emeeza eyo." 
Exodus37:15 Yaabaadha emiti egyo mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, memale yaagirimbyaku zaabu gyonagyona okugyezunguluza, gyaba egy'okubbeedesanga meeza eyo." 
Exodus37:16 Yaakola ebikozesebwa ku meeza eyo byonabyona mu zaabu omukenenule, nga ni bino: ebibya, n'enkaayi. Era yaakola n'ebikopo n'ensugha olw'ebigheebwayo ebifukibwa." 
Exodus37:17 Era yaakola ekikondo eky'entaala mu zaabu omukenenule. Ekikolo ghalala n'ekitundu eky'eitale eky'ekikondo ekyo, yaabikola mu zaabu omukenenule oyo. Era obukopo obugemerera entaala, n'okudholiga okuli ng'oti bimuli, byona yaabikola nga byegemeire ghalala ni bire byonabyona mu zaabu omukenenule, nga ghazira kyawukaineku." 
Exodus37:18 Ekikondo ekyo kyaliku ensaga mukaaga nga dhiva mu mbali ni mu mbali mwakyo ensaga eisatu nga dhiva ku luuyi lwakyo olundi, ate edhindi eisatu dhaava ku lundi." 
Exodus37:19 Buli lusaga, nga bwe dhaali omukaaga, nga luliku obukopo busatu, nga buli kakopo kafaanana n'ekimuli eky'omuti ogwetebwa alumondi, nga kiramba n'obukaba bwaku." 
Exodus37:20 Ekitundu eky'eitale eky'ekikondo kyaliku obukopo buna, nga buli kakopo kafaanana n'ekimuli eky'omuti ogwetebwa alumondi nga kiramba n'obukaba bwaku." 
Exodus37:21 Era nga kiisi ensaga eibiri ghe dhitandiikira okuva ku kitundu eky'eitale eky'ekikondo, nga ghaligho ekintu ekiri ng'oti kimuli era nga kikoleirwagho kyegemeragho irala aghazira kwawukanamu." 
Exodus37:22 Ekintu ekyo ekiri ng'oti kimuli, n'ensaga, n'ekikondo kyene, byakolebwa nga byegemeire ghalala mu zaabu omukenenule, nga ghazira kyawukaineku." 
Exodus37:23 Agho yaakola entaala musanvu edh'okubanga ku kikondo ekyo, ni makansu edhisala ebisiriiza ku ntambi, n'esowaani edhiteebwaku ebisiriiza ebyo. Ebyo byonabyona yaabikola mu zaabu omukenenule." 
Exodus37:24 Ekikondo ekyo, n'ebindi byonabyona ebyakolerwaku byamalagho talanta namba edho nga ni kilo asatu n'eitaanu edha zaabu omukenenule." 
Exodus37:25 Era yaakola alutaari mu mbaawo edh'omuti ogwetebwa akasia ey'okuniokezangaku obubbaani. Ng'endhuyi dhaayo eina dhaagayaga obuleeyi sentimita amakumi ana na itaanu (45), n'obugazi sentimita amakumi ana na itaanu. Obugungumavu bwayo nga buli sentimita kyenda. Yaakoleraku ebintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo, byaba nga byegemye ni alutaari eyo ghalala nga tibyawukaine." 
Exodus37:26 Ku ngulu kwayo, n'okugyezunguluza endhuyi dhaayo, ni ku bintu ebyo ebiri ng'oti mayiga, yaalimbyaku zaabu omukenenule, era yaagikoleraku omugo mu zaabu omukenenule, okugyezunguluza yoonayoona." 
Exodus37:27 Ghansi w'omugo ogwo, ku ndhuyi dhaayo eibiri edhiringagaine, yaakoleragho emikonda egya zaabu emyekulungirivu oti mpeta. Egyo nga n'egibitamu emiti egy'okubbeedesanga alutaari eyo." 
Exodus37:28 Era yaabaadhiraku emiti mu muti ogwetebwa akasia. Emiti egyo yaagirimbyaku zaabu gyonagyona okugyezunguluza. 
Exodus37:29 Era yaakola omuzigo ogusiigibwa omutukuvu, n'obubbaani obuwunha akawoowo obusinga bulungi, bweyatabula ng'oti ni bwe batabula ebizigo eby'okwesiiga." 
Exodus38:1 Bezalelo yaakola alutaari ey'okwokerangaku ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, mu mbaawo edh'omuti ogwetebwa akasia. Endhuyi dhaayo eina nga dhaagayaga, era nga dhigheza nga mita ibiri buli luuyi. Obugungumavu bwayo ng'egheza nga mita ndala." 
Exodus38:2 Yaagikoleraku ebintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ku nsonda dhaayo eina, aye ebintu ebyo n'alutaari yeene yaabikola nga biri kintu kirala, nga tibyawukainemuuku naire. Alutaari yoonayoona yaagirimbyaku ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
Exodus38:3 Yaakola ebikozesebwa ku alutaari eyo byonabyona mu kyuma ky'ekikomo, era ni bino: obulobo obw'okusuulangamu eivu ery'amasavu, n'ebitiiyo, n'ebibya eby'okutaamu omusaayi ogw'okumansira, n'ebyuma eby'amaino ng'oti wuuma, n'ebintu eby'okutwalirangaku amanda agaliku omuliro." 
Exodus38:4 Ku alutaari yaalukiraku ekiibo nga kya nsonda ina, nga kiri ng'oti kasengeedho era nga kyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo. Ekiibo kino yaakita mu alutaari ghansi agh'omugo gwayo, kyaba nga kiika kyatuuka ghagati ghaayo." 
Exodus38:5 Yaakola emikonda ena emyekulungirivu oti mpeta, yaagita ku nsonda eina edh'ekiibo ekyo, nga n'egy'okukibbeedesanga." 
Exodus38:6 Yaabaadha emiti mu muti ogwetebwa akasia, baagirimbyaku ekyuma eky'ekikomo gyonagyona okugyezunguluza." 
Exodus38:7 Era yaata emiti egyo mu mikonda gire egyali ku mbali ni ku mbali okw'alutaari, nga n'egy'okugibbeedesanga. Yaakola endhuyi dh'alutaari eyo eina mu mbaawo, aye ghagati ghaayo ghaasigala nga gheereere." 
Exodus38:8 Yaakola ekyogero n'ekityamo kyakyo mu kyuma eky'ekikomo. Ekikomo ekyo, kyava mu mbonerwamu edh'abakazi abaagheerezanga ku mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus38:9 Agho yaakola olugugiriro olw'oku Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, yaatimbayo engoye empegheevu edhigheza mita amakumi ana na ina (44) mu buleeyi." 
Exodus38:10 Engoye edho yaadhirengeedhia ku mpango amakumi abiri, dhe yayemereza ku bikolo amakumi abiri. Empango edho n'ebikolo byadho, yaabikola mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, ate obusumaali bwadho n'obuntu obudhigemagania, yaabikola mu feeza." 
Exodus38:11 Era ni ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba yaakolayo ekintu n'ekirala nga kye yali akoze ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha ng'ataayo olugugiriro. 
Exodus38:12 Ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba yaatimbayo engoye nga dhigheza mita amakumi abiri na ibiri obuleeyi. Yaadhirengeedhia ku mpango ikumi dhe yayemereza ku bikolo eikumi, era ng'obusumaali bwadho n'obuntu obudhigemagania, byakolebwa mu feeza." 
Exodus38:13 Ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba eyali omulyango, yoona yaatimbayo engoye nga dhigheza mita amakumi abiri na ibiri obuleeyi." 
Exodus38:14 Engoye dhe yatimba ku buli luuyi olw'omulyango ogwo, nga dhigheza mita mukaaga n'ekitundu buli luuyi, nga dhiri ku mpango isatu isatu n'ebikolo byadho ebisatu ebisatu." 
Exodus38:15  
Exodus38:16 Engoye dhoonadhoona dhe yatimba okwezunguluza olugugiriro dhaali mpegheevu. 
Exodus38:17 Ebikolo bye yaayemerezaaku empango edho yaabikola mu kyuma kya kikomo, ate obusumaali n'obuntu obudhigemagania byaba bya feeza. Emitwe egy'empango edho gyonagyona yaagirimbyaku feeza okugyezunguluza." 
Exodus38:18 Ekintu ekikinzaagho mu mulyango ogw'olugugiriro yaakikola mu lugoye olwa langi ya bbululu, n'olw'eya nakasooma, n'olw'eya kasaayisaayi, ni mu lugoye olughegheevu era yaakitungiramu ebimuli ng'akozesa empiso n'ewuuzi. Ekikinzaagho ekyo nga kigheza mita mwenda obuleeyi ate obugungumavu mita ibiri, ng'oti n'engoye edhindi dhoonadhoona edh'oku lugugiriro." 
Exodus38:19 Yaakitimba ku mpango eina dhe yaayemereza ku bikolo ebina ebyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo. Obusumaali obw'oku mpango edho yaabukola mu feeza, ate emitwe egy'empango edho gyonagyona yaagirimbyaku feeza okugyezunguluza. Era empango edho yaadhitaaku obuntu obudhigemerera nga bwa feeza." 
Exodus38:20 Enkondo dhoonadhoona edhaakozesebwa mu Weema eyo, n'edhaakozesebwa mu lugugiriro, dhaakolebwa mu kyuma kya kikomo." 
Exodus38:21 Bino n'ebyuma ebyakozesebwa mu kukola Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, eyalimu endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda. Musa n'eyalagira bibalibwe, era byabalibwa Abalevi nga bakulemberwa Ithamari mutabane wa Aaroni kabona." 
Exodus38:22 Bezalelo mutabane wa Uri, era mwidhukulu wa Hura, era nga wa mu kika kya Yuda, yakola byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira, nga Musa bweyamukoberanga." 
Exodus38:23 Yayambibwa ku Oholiabu mutabane wa Ahisamaka, ow'ekika kya Dani. Oholiabu oyo yali mubaadhi wa mabaale ag'omughendo, nga muyiiya, nga mulusi wa ngoye, era nga engoye dhoonadhoona: ka dhibe edha bbululu, oba edha nakasooma, oba edha kasaayisaayi, oba empegheevu, ng'adhidholiga n'empiso n'ewuuzi." 
Exodus38:24 Zaabu yeenayeena eyakozesebwa mu kuzimba Weema entukuvu, nga n'oyo eyaleetebwa abantu mu byagheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda, yagheramu kilo ng'oti lukumi (1,000) ng'ojiira ku mbala entongole ey'eisinzizo." 
Exodus38:25 Ni feeza eyasolozebwa ku abo abaabalibwa, yagheramu kilo enkumi isatu na bina n'asatu, ng'ojiira ku mbala entongole ey'eisinzizo." 
Exodus38:26 Buli muntu eyali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri egy'obukulu oba okusingagho eyabalibwa, yali n'okughaayo omughendo ogumusabibwa ng'ajiira ku mbala entongole ey'eisinzizo. Era abantu abo baali abantu emitwalo nkaaga n'enkumi isatu na bitaanu n'ataanu." 
Exodus38:27 Ku feeza oyo eyasolozebwa, baakozesaaku obuzito bwa kilo nkumi isatu na bina olw'okukola ebikolo eby'Eweema entukuvu, n'ebyo eby'olutimbe olwawula Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho ku Kifo Ekitukuvu. Omwo baakolamu ebikolo kikumi nga buli kikolo kimalagho feeza azitogha kilo asatu na ina." 
Exodus38:28 Kilo dha feeza amakumi asatu edhaasigalagho baadhikolamu obusumaali obw'oku mpango, n'okulimbya ku mitwe gyadho, n'okudhikoleraku obuntu obudhigemagania." 
Exodus38:29 Ekyuma eky'ekikomo ekyaleetebwa abantu ni kigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda kyagheza obuzito bwa kilo enkumi ibiri na bina n'abiri na itaanu. 
Exodus38:30 Era omwo baakolamu ebikolo eby'oku mulyango ogwingira mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Era baakolamu alutaari, n'ekiibo kye baalukiraku eky'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, n'eby'okukozesebwa ku alutaari eyo byonabyona." 
Exodus38:31 Era baakolamu ebikolo eby'oku lugugiriro, n'eby'oku mulyango ogwingira mu lugugiriro olwo, era n'enkondo dhoonadhoona edh'omu Weema entukuvu n'edh'olugugiriro olwo." 
Exodus39:1 Agho baakola ebivaalo bya bakabona mu langi ya bbululu, n'eya nakasooma, n'eya kasaayisaayi, eby'okugheererezangamu mu kifo ekitukuvu. Baakola ebivaalo bya Aaroni ebitukuvu nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Baakola ekivaalo eky'obwakabona nga kya zaabu, mu ngoye edha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi n'empegheevu." 
Exodus39:3 Baagheesa n'amagezi mangi obubaati bwa zaabu, baabusala mu ngeri ya buwuuzi, baabutungira mu ngoye edha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, n'empegheevu." 
Exodus39:4 Baakikoleraku ensibiro edhikisiba ku mabega, baadhiyunga ku ndhuyi dhaakyo ibiri." 
Exodus39:5 Baakirukiraku olusibiro olw'omu nkende olwalukibwa obukalamu era nga lwatungibwa ku ekivaalo ekyo eky'obwakabona. Byombi ebyo byakolebwa mu ngoye ndala, dhino edha langi ya zaabu, n'edh'eya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, n'empegheevu. Atyo Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Baafunayo amabaale amabaadhe abiri ag'ekika eky'eibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa onikisi, baagataaku emigo gya zaabu, baagasalaku amaina ag'abaana ba Yakobo, ng'oti n'omubaadhi ow'amabaale ag'omughendo bw'agasalaku obumanhiso." 
Exodus39:7 Bwe baamala baagata ku nsibiro edhisiba ekivaalo eky'obwakabona ku mabega, gabe ag'okwidhusanga eri Abaisiraeli nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:8 Baakola ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba mu nsambo n'endala ng'oti n'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona nga bakozesa engoye edha langi ya zaabu, n'edh'eya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, n'empegheevu" 
Exodus39:9 Baakikola nga kiwumbe kyamu era ng'endhuyi dhaakyo eina dhaagayaga, sentimita amakumi abiri na ibiri obuleeyi, n'obugazi sentimita amakumi abiri na ibiri." 
Exodus39:10 Baataanhaku obunhiriri buna obw'amabaale ag'omughendo. Akanhiriri akasooka kaaliku amabaale ageetebwa saradiu, ni topazi, ni karabunkule." 
Exodus39:11 Akanhiriri akokubiri kaabaaku ageetebwa emeraludo, ni saffiro, ni diamondi." 
Exodus39:12 Ate akanhiriri akokusatu kaabaaku ageetebwa yasintha, agate, ni amethisiti." 
Exodus39:13 Olwo akokuna kaabaaku ageetebwa berulo, ni onikisi, ni yasipera. Bwe baamala baagataaku omugo gwa zaabu." 
Exodus39:14 Nga bwe gaali amabaale eikumi n'abiri, buli irala lyakolebwa ng'oti kamanhiso nga lighandiikibwaku n'ekyuma ekisongovu eriina irala ku maina ag'abaana ba Yakobo, ku lw'ebika byaibwe eikumi n'ebibiri." 
Exodus39:15 Ekivaalo kino eky'omu kifuba baakikoleraku endhegere edha zaabu omukenenule, nga dhirukiibwa ng'oti migugha." 
Exodus39:16 Baakola emigo ebiri nga gya zaabu n'obukondo bubiri nga bwona bwa zaabu. Obukondo obwo baabuta ku nsonda dhaakyo eibiri edha ghaigulu. 
Exodus39:17 Baasiba endhegere dhire edha zaabu mu bukondo obwo. 
Exodus39:18 Ate endhuyi edhindi edh'endhegere edho, baadhisiba ku migo gire ebiri. Olwo ekivaalo kino eky'omu kifuba kyaba nga kiyimbiibwa emberi ku nsibiro edhisiba ekivaalo eky'obwakabona ku mabega." 
Exodus39:19 Kabiri baakolayo obukondo bubiri obwa zaabu, baabuta ku nsonda eibiri edha ghansi edh'olukugiro olw'omunda olw'ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba okuliiraana n'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona." 
Exodus39:20 Era baakolayo obukondo obundi bubiri obw'obuuma bwa zaabu, baabuta ku lukugiro olwa ghansi olw'emberi ku nsibiro edhisiba ekivaalo eky'obwakabona ku mabega, okumpi n'olusibiro olw'omu nkende olwalukirwa obukalamu ku kivaalo eky'obwakabona ekyo." 
Exodus39:21 Agho baasiba ghalala obukondo obw'oku kivaalo eky'omu kifuba n'obukondo obw'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, nga bakozesa akagugha aka langi ya nakasooma. Era olwo ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba ekyo kyaba nga kiika bukalamu ku lusibiro olw'omu nkende olwalukirwa obukalamu ku kivaalo eky'obwakabona, era nga tikirekuka kuva ku kivaalo ekyo eky'obwakabona. Atyo Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Era baakola ekanzu enaateebwangaku ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, nga yoonayoona yalukibwa mu langi ya nakasooma." 
Exodus39:23 Baagitaaku ekituli omubita omutwe, era ku nkoto baalukiraku olukugiro ng'oluba ku kanzu edhindi, erobe kukanuka." 
Exodus39:24 Okwezunguluza ekitundu eky'eifo eky'ekanzu, baatungiraku ebifaananie eby'ebibala eby'oku muti omukomamawanga mu lugoye olughegheevu olulukiibwa mu langi ya bbululu, n'eya nakasooma, n'eya kasaayisaayi." 
Exodus39:25 Era baatungiraku endege nga dha zaabu omukenenule, era nga dhiri ndalandala buli ghagati gh'ebifaananie by'emikomamawanga ebibiri." 
Exodus39:26 Kyaba nti ekifaananie eky'omukomamawanga bakiriiraania endege, kabiri bataagho ekifaananie eky'omukomamawanga; batyo batyo okutuusa bwe baamala okwezunguluza ekitundu eky'eifo eky'ekanzu eyo ey'okugheererezangamu. Atyo Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:27 Era baakolera Aaroni ni batabane be ebivaalo," 
Exodus39:28 n'ebitambaala eby'oku mutwe, n'enkuufiira, n'empale, nga bino bya ngoye mpegheevu." 
Exodus39:29 Era baabakolera enkoma edh'omu nkende mu ngoye empegheevu edha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi. Era enkoma edho baadhidholiga n'empiso n'ewuuzi. Atyo Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Agho baakola akabaati ak'engule entukuvu mu zaabu omukenenule, baakataaku ekighandiiko, ng'omubaadhi ow'amabaale ag'omughendo bw'agasalaku obumanhiso ng'akozesa ekyuma ekisongovu, ekighandiiko nga kikoba kiti: “Yayawulibwa nga wa Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Exodus39:31 Baakozesa akagugha ak'erangi ya nakasooma, baasiba akabaati ako ku kitambaala eky'oku mutwe ghaigulu. Atyo Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Agho omulimo ogw'okukola Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda gwawa. Abaisiraeli baakola ebyo byonabyona nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa. 
Exodus39:33 Agho baaleetera Musa ebintu eby'okukola Weema entukuvu bino: ensuubo, n'eby'okukozesebwa mu Weema eyo byonabyona, obuntu obugemagania, ebikondo, embaawo edhikiikamu, empango n'ebikolo byadho." 
Exodus39:34 Era baamuleetera ekighemba ku Weema ekyakolebwa mu mawu ag'entaama amakunhe amamyufu, n'ekindi ekyakolebwa mu mawu amakunhe ag'ensolo edhindi, n'olutimbe." 
Exodus39:35 Era baamuleetera Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, n'emiti egy'okugibbeedesa, n'ekisandikiza kyayo." 
Exodus39:36 Era baamuleetera emeeza n'ebikozesebwaku, n'emigaati egigheereibwayo ye Katonda." 
Exodus39:37 Era baamuleetera ekikondo eky'entaala ekyakolebwa mu zaabu omukenenule, n'entaala dhaaku, n'ebikozesebwaku ebindi byonabyona, n'amafuta ag'entaala." 
Exodus39:38 Era baamuleetera alutaari eyakolebwa mu zaabu, n'omuzigo ogusiigibwa, n'obubbaani obuwunha akawoowo, n'ekikinzaagho mu mulyango ogwingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho." 
Exodus39:39 Era baamuleetera alutaari eyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, n'ekiibo kyona ekyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, n'emiti egy'okugibbeedesa, n'ebikozesebwaku byonabyona, n'ekyogero aghalala n'ekityamo kyakyo." 
Exodus39:40 Era baamuleetera entimbe edh'oku lugugiriro olw'oku Weema Entukuvu, n'empango dhaayo, n'ebikolo byaku, n'ekikinzaagho mu mulyango ogw'olugugiriro, n'emigugha gyaku, n'enkondo dhaaku, n'ebikozesebwa byonabyona mu Weema." 
Exodus39:41 Era baamuleetera ebivaalo ebirungi einho eby'okugheererezaamu nga kabona mu Kifo Ekitukuvu ebivaalo ebitukuvu ebya Aaroni kabona, n'ebivaalo bya batabane eby'okugheererezangamu nga bakabona." 
Exodus39:42 Abaisiraeli baakola omulimo ogwo gwonagwona nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa. 
Exodus39:43 Musa yaakebera byonabyona bye baakola, yaabona nga bwenebwene baabikola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira. Musa yaabasabira enkabi." 
Exodus40:1 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Exodus40:2 “Ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogusooka mwidha kutaagho Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. 
Exodus40:3 Mwidha kutaamu Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, era mugikingirize n'olutimbe olwawula Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho ku Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus40:4 Agho mwidha kuleeta emeeza mugiteegho n'ebikozesebwa byaku, era muleete ekikondo eky'entaala mukyemerezeegho, mukiteeku n'entaala dhaaku." 
Exodus40:5 Olwo mute alutaari eyakolebwa mu zaabu ey'okuniokezaaku obubbaani, mu maiso ag'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, era muteegho ekikinzaagho ekyakolebwa okuba mu omulyango ogwingira mu Weema Entukuvu." 
Exodus40:6 Bwe mumala mwidha kuta alutaari ey'okwokeraku ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa mu kifo kyayo, agho okulingirira omulyango ogwingira mu Weema Entukuvu." 
Exodus40:7 Olwo mute ekyogero ghagati agh'Eweema Entukuvu eyo ni alutaari eyo, era mukiteemu amaadhi." 
Exodus40:8 Mwidha kukola olugugiriro ku Weema Entukuvu, era mu mulyango gwalwo muteemu ekikinzaagho." 
Exodus40:9 “Agho mwidha kufuna omuzigo ogusiigibwa musiige ku Weema Entukuvu n'ebirimu byonabyona ebija okukozesebwanga, bibe bitukuvu." 
Exodus40:10 Era mwidha kusiiga alutaari ey'okwokerangaku ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'ebikozesebwaku byonabyona mubitukuze n'omuzigo. 
Exodus40:11 Era mutyo bwe munaatukuza ekyogero n'ekityamo kyakyo, nga mubisiiga omuzigo." 
Exodus40:12 “Agho oidha kuleeta Aaroni ni batabane ku mulyango ogw'Eweema Entukuvu okole omukolo ogw'okubanaaza n'amaadhi. 
Exodus40:13 Era ovaaze Aaroni ebivaalo ebitukuvu, omusiige omuzigo, omutukuze ampeereze nga kabona." 
Exodus40:14 Oidha kuleeta ni batabane boona, obavaaze ebivaalo byaibwe," 
Exodus40:15 obasiige omuzigo nga bw'onaaba okoze lata waibwe, baghange okumpeereza nga bakabona. Okusiiga omuzigo okwo kwidha kubangiza mu bugheereza obw'obwakabona, beene, n'abaana baibwe, n'abaidhukulu ense n'ense.”" 
Exodus40:16 Musa yaakola byonabyona, nga bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Exodus40:17 Kale ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogusooka ogw'omwaka ogwokubiri ogw'okuva kwaibwe mu Misiri, yaataagho Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Exodus40:18 Musa yaasimba Weema eyo ng'atoolera n'okutaagho ebikolo, yaayemerezaaku ebikondo, yaataaku emiti egikiikamu, era yaasitusa empango dhaayo." 
Exodus40:19 Agho yaayandhuluza ekighemba ku Weema Entukuvu, kabiri yaataaku n'ekindi eky'oku ngulu, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira." 
Exodus40:20 Yaatoola ebibaadho eby'amabaale ebyaliku amateeka yaabita mu Sanduuku ey'Endagaano. Esanduuku eyo yaagitaaku emiti egy'okugibbeedesa n'ekisandikiza. 
Exodus40:21 Olwo yaaleeta Esanduuku ey'Endagaano yaagita mu Weema entukuvu, era yaakola olutimbe yaalusiba ku mpango dhaalwo eina, agho yaaba ng'akingiriiza Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Exodus40:22 Yaata emeeza mu Weema entukuvu, ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba w'Eweema eyo, agho ku luya okw'olutimbe olwawula Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho ku Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus40:23 Yaata emigaati egigheereibwayo ye Katonda ku meeza okwo nga Musengwa Katonda mwene bweyamulagira. 
Exodus40:24 Yaata ekikondo eky'entaala mu Weema Entukuvu, ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'Eweema Entukuvu eyo, agho okulingiriza emeeza." 
Exodus40:25 Era yaata entaala mu bifo byadho ku kikondo, dhaaba nga dhimulisa nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Exodus40:26 Yaata alutaari eyakolebwa mu zaabu mu Weema Entukuvu emberi w'olutimbe olwawula Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho ku Kifo Ekitukuvu. 
Exodus40:27 Era yaaniokezaaku obubbaani obuwunha akawoowo nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira. 
Exodus40:28 Olwo yaasiba ekintu ekikinzaagho ku mpango edh'omu mulyango ogwingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho. 
Exodus40:29 Yaata alutaari eyokerwaku ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa emberi w'omulyango ogw'Eweema Entukuvu, era yaayokeraku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Exodus40:30 Yaata ekyogero ghagati w'Eweema eyo ni alutaari eyo, era yaakitaamu amaadhi ag'okunaaba." 
Exodus40:31 Amaadhi ago, Musa ni Aaroni ni batabane, ge baanaabanga mu ngalo ni ku bigere," 
Exodus40:32 memale ni bangira mu Weema Entukuvu, oba ni baseeta gh'alutaari nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Exodus40:33 Agho yaataagho olugugiriro okwezunguluza Eweema Entukuvu n'alutaari, era yaasiba ekintu ekikinzaagho mu mulyango ogw'oku lugugiriro olwo. Agho Musa yaaba ng'amaze omulimo." 
Exodus40:34 Agho ekire kyaidha kyaghemba ku Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, era ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kyaidhula Eweema eyo." 
Exodus40:35 Olw'ensonga eyo, Musa yaaba nga taghanga kungira mu Weema eyo." 
Exodus40:36 Okuva n'olwo, ekire ekyo bwe kyavanga ku Weema eyo, nga n'Abaisiraeli boona batambula okuva ghe baalinga basimbye weema dhaibwe." 
Exodus40:37 Aye ekire bwe kyasigalanga nga kiri ku Weema eyo, nga baba ghalala agho okutuusa lwe kiritoolebwaku." 
Exodus40:38 Era mu kutambula kwaibwe kwonakwona, ng'ekire kya Musengwa Katonda ekyo kiba ku Weema Entukuvu omusana, ate obwire nga mu kire omwo mwakamu omuliro ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona babona." 
Leviticus1:1 Musengwa Katonda yayeta Musa, yaayogera naye mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati:" 
Leviticus1:2 “Kobera Abaisiraeli oti bweghabangagho omuntu yeenayeena mu imwe aghaayo omusengo eri Musengwa Katonda, aidha kugughangayo ng'atoola mu byayo bye." 
Leviticus1:3 Bw'anaabanga ng'aja kughaayo musengo ogwokebwa gwonagwona ni guwaagho ng'atoola mu nte dhe, aidha kughangayo enume eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona. Anaagigheerangayo ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, olwo Musengwa Katonda oyo asobole okumusiima." 
Leviticus1:4 Omuntu oyo aidha kutanga omukono gwe ku mutwe gwayo, olwo Musengwa Katonda asiimenga omusengo gwe, olw'okutoolebwaku ebibi bye." 
Leviticus1:5 Anaitiranga ente agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, era bakabona ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni baatwala omusaayi, baagumansira ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari eri ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus1:6 Era anaagibaagangaku oluwu yaagitematemamu. 
Leviticus1:7 Agho bakabona banaayaliiranga enku ku alutaari, baakunaania omuliro." 
Leviticus1:8 Era banaatoolanga emamba eyo ye batemyetemyemu, n'omutwe n'amasavu, baagitegeka bukalamu ku nku edho edhiri ku muliro ku alutaari." 
Leviticus1:9 Aye ebyenda n'ebibbonge binaanaazibwanga n'amaadhi. Agho kabona anaayokeranga byonabyona ku alutaari, ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa n'omuliro. Akawoowo kaakyo kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus1:10 “Bw'anaabanga ng'aja kughaayo musengo ogwokebwa omulomba, ng'atoola mu ntaama dhe oba mu mbuzi dhe, aidha kughangayo enume eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Leviticus1:11 Anaagiitiranga ku luuyi lw'alutaari olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Agho bakabona ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni banaamansiranga omusaayi gwayo ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari. 
Leviticus1:12 Ekyo nga kiwoire, omuntu oyo anaatematemanga mu nsolo eyo, kabona yaatoola emamba eyo, n'omutwe, n'amasavu, yaabitegeka bukalamu ku nku edhiri ku muliro ku alutaari." 
Leviticus1:13 Aye byenda n'ebibbonge binaanaazibwanga n'amaadhi. Agho kabona anaayokeranga byonabyona ku alutaari, ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa n'omuliro. Akawoowo kaakyo kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus1:14 “Bw'anaabanga ng'aja okughaayo omusengo ogwokebwa omulomba nga gwa nhonhi, aidha kughangayo njiibwa oba ighemba." 
Leviticus1:15 Kabona anaaleetanga enhonhi eyo ku alutaari, yaaginiola enkoto, yaagikutulaku omutwe, yaagwokera ku alutaari, yaakamulira omusaayi gw'enhonhi ku mbali kw'alutaari." 
Leviticus1:16 Anaagitoolangamu ekisakiro kyayo n'ebikirimu, yaabisuula gha mbali gh'alutaari, ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba aghateebwa eivu." 
Leviticus1:17 Agho kabona anaagigemanga amaghagha, yaagiyuza aye nga tagikutwiremu ghabiri, yaagyokera ku nku edhiri ku muliro ku alutaari ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, nga kyokeibwa n'omuliro. Akawoowo kaakyo kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus2:1 “Omuntu yeenayeena bw'anaabanga ng'ali kughaayo ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke eri Musengwa Katonda, emere anaamalanga kugisa bukalamu, yaateeraku n'omuzigo, n'obubbaani." 
Leviticus2:2 Ekigheebwayo ekyo anaakireetanga ye bakabona ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni. Owundi ku bakabona abo anaayoolangaku omuganda ku mere eyo eseereibwa obukalamu, yaagyokera ghalala n'omuzigo, n'obubbaani bwonabwona ako kabe nga n'akamanhiso akooleka nga byonabyona bigheereibwayo eri Musengwa Katonda. Akawoowo kaabyo kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus2:3 Ekyo ekisigalagho ku kigheebwayo ekyo eky'emere ey'empeke, kiba kya bakabona kitukuvu inho, kuba kitoolebwa ku ekyo ekigheereibwayo ye Musengwa Katonda, nga kyokebwa n'omuliro." 
Leviticus2:4 “Ekigheebwayo ekinaaleetebwanga bwe kinaabanga eky'emigaati egifumbiibwa nga giziikiibwa mu ziiko, giidha kubanga nga giteekwa okuba emigaati eminene egitazimbulukusiibwa, egy'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo, oba emigaati emitono egitazimbulukusiibwa, egisiigiibwaku omuzigo." 
Leviticus2:5 “Ekigheebwayo bwe kinaabanga eky'emigaati egikalangiibwa ku lugyo, giidha kubanga gya buwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu nga butabwirwamu omuzigo, aye nga buziramu kizimbulukusa." 
Leviticus2:6 Ole ali kugheereza ekigheebwayo ekyo anaamegulanga mu migaati egyo ebitundutundu, yaagifukaku omuzigo, yaagighaayo ng'ekyo n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke." 
Leviticus2:7 “Ekigheebwayo bwe kinaabanga eky'emigaati egifumbibwa mu ntamu, ginaabanga gya buwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, ghalala n'omuzigo." 
Leviticus2:8 Ole anaaleetanga ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke ekikoleibwa mu bintu ebyo eri Musengwa Katonda, anaakigemyanga kabona, kabona yaakitwala ku alutaari." 
Leviticus2:9 Kabona anaatoolanga ekitundu ku kigheebwayo ekyo, kibe akamanhiso akooleka nga byonabyona bigheereibwayo eri Musengwa Katonda. Era anaayokeranga ekitundu ekyo ku alutaari. Akawoowo ak'ekigheebwayo ekyo ekyokebwa, kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus2:10 Ekyo ekisigalagho ku kigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke ekyo, kiba kya bakabona kitukuvu inho, kuba kitoolebwa ku ekyo ekigheebwayo ye Musengwa Katonda, nga kyokeibwa n'omuliro." 
Leviticus2:11 “Tighaabengagho kigheebwayo kya mere ya mpeke, ekinaagheebwangayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga kirimu ekizimbulukusa. Mutakozesanga kizimbulukusa waire omudheenene gw'endhuki, mu kigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga kyokebwa." 
Leviticus2:12 Mughengayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebigheebwayo ku birime ebisooka okukungulwa buli mwaka, aye bitayokebwanga ku alutaari." 
Leviticus2:13 Buli kigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke mukitengaku omuunhu, kuba omuunhu n'akamanhiso k'endagaano ghagati waimwe ni Katonda. Mu butuufu, ebigheebwayo byonabyona mubitengaku omuunhu." 
Leviticus2:14 “Ole ng'aja okughaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ekigheebwayo eky'ebirime ebisooka okukungulwa, aghengayo engaano empyaka ekalangiibwaku." 
Leviticus2:15 Ateerengaku omuzigo n'obubbaani, ekyo n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke." 
Leviticus2:16 Kabona anaayokyanga ekitundu eky'engaano, n'eky'omuzigo, ghalala n'obubbaani bwonabwona, nga n'akamanhiso akooleka nga byonabyona bigheereibwayo; ekyo n'ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga kyokebwa n'omuliro." 
Leviticus3:1 “Omuntu bw'anaaghangayo ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, aidha kughangayo ente enkazi oba enume ng'eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Leviticus3:2 Omuntu oyo aidha kutanga omukono gwe ku mutwe gwayo, era anaagiitiranga agho ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Agho bakabona ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni banaamansiranga omusaayi gwayo ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari." 
Leviticus3:3 Era omuntu oyo anaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebitundu bino eby'ensolo eyo, ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa: amasavu goonagoona agali ku byenda," 
Leviticus3:4 n'ensigo dhombi ghalala n'amasavu agadhiriku, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi ku ini." 
Leviticus3:5 Bakabona ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni banaayokeranga ebyo byonabyona ku alutaari, ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiromba ekiri ku nku ku muliro. Akawoowo kaabyo kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus3:6 “Omuntu bw'anaaghangayo entaama oba embuzi ng'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, aghengayo enkazi oba enume ng'eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Leviticus3:7 Omuntu oyo bwanaabanga ng'ali kughaayo entaama ento, anaagigheerangayo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus3:8 Anaatanga omukono gwe ku mutwe gwayo, yaagiitiranga agho emberi w'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Agho bakabona ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni banaamansiranga omusaayi gwayo ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari." 
Leviticus3:9 Era omuntu oyo anaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebitundu bino eby'ensolo eyo ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa: amasavu, omukira omusavu omulamba okusalira ku igumba ery'omugongo, amasavu goonagoona agali ku byenda," 
Leviticus3:10 ensigo dhombi ghalala n'amasavu agadhiriku, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi ku ini." 
Leviticus3:11 Kabona anaabyokeranga byonabyona ku alutaari ng'ekigheebwayo eky'eby'okulya ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda ekyokebwa. 
Leviticus3:12 “Omuntu bw'anaaghangayo embuzi, anaagigheerangayo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus3:13 Aidha kutanga omukono gwe ku mutwe gwayo, era anaagiitiranga agho emberi w'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Agho bakabona ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni banaamansiranga omusaayi gwayo ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari." 
Leviticus3:14 Era omuntu oyo anaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebitundu bino eby'ensolo eyo, ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa: amasavu goonagoona agali ku byenda," 
Leviticus3:15 n'ensigo dhombi ghalala n'amasavu agadhiriku, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi ku ini." 
Leviticus3:16 Kabona anaayokeranga ebyo byonabyona ku alutaari ng'ekigheebwayo eky'eby'okulya ekyokebwa, olw'akawoowo kaakyo akasangaaza Musengwa Katonda. Amasavu goonagoona ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus3:17 Mutalyanga ku masavu oba ku musaayi; eryo n'erinaabanga eiteeka ery'olubeerera, lye munaakuumanga buli ghe munaabanga enaku dhoonadhoona.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa," 
Leviticus4:2 akobere Abaisiraeli ati omuntu bw'anaakolanga ekibi nga tagendereire, n'asobya mu kintu kyonakyona ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira, anaabanga n'okukola bino:" 
Leviticus4:3 Omukulu wa Bakabona bw'anaabanga nga n'akoze ekibi, mu nsambo eyo n'aleeta ku bantu omusango, aidha kughangayo eri Musengwa Katonda olw'ekibi kye, ente enume entototo ng'eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Leviticus4:4 Aidha kugireetanga ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, era anaatanga omukono gwe ku mutwe gwayo, yaagiitira agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus4:5 Agho Omukulu wa Bakabona oyo, aidha kutoolanga ku musaayi gw'ente eyo, agutwale mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus4:6 Anainhikanga olwala mu musaayi ogwo, yaagutoonhia emikuzi musanvu emberi gh'olutimbe olutukuvu." 
Leviticus4:7 Agho aidha kutoolangaku omusaayi ogundi, yaagusiiga ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari eniokezebwaku obubbaani obw'akawoowo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, eri mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Omusaayi gwonagwona ogusigairegho anaagufukanga ku ntobo y'alutaari eyokerwaku ebigheebwayo, eri ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus4:8 Omukulu wa Bakabona oyo anaatoolanga amasavu goonagoona ag'ente eyo, ago agali ku byenda," 
Leviticus4:9 n'ago agali ku nsigo ghalala n'ensigo dhaaku, era n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi ku ini," 
Leviticus4:10 nga bwe bitoolebwa mu nte ey'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Bino anaabyokeranga ku alutaari eyokerwaku ebigheebwayo. 
Leviticus4:11 Aye ebisigairegho byonabyona bino: oluwu lwayo, emamba yoonayoona, omutwe, ebibbonge, ebyenda n'obusa," 
Leviticus4:12 binaatwalibwanga kuliya kw'ekifo abantu kye baasimbamu weema dhaibwe, mu kifo ekirongoofu kye bafukamu eivu. Eyo ye banaabyokeranga n'omuliro ku nku." 
Leviticus4:13 Abaisiraeli boonaboona aghalala bwe banaabanga nga n'abakoze ekibi nga tibagendereire, ni basobya ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira, era ekibi ekyo ni kitamanhikiragho," 
Leviticus4:14 ekibi ekyo olunaamanhikanga, boonaboona ghalala baidha kughangayo ente enume entototo ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, baagireeta emberi w'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus4:15 Era abakulu ab'ebikunsu banaatanga emikono gyaibwe ku mutwe gwayo, nga bali mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, era baagiitira agho." 
Leviticus4:16 Olwo Omukulu wa Bakabona aidha kutoolanga ku musaayi gw'ente eyo, agutwale mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus4:17 Anainhikanga olwala mu musaayi ogwo, yaagutoonhia emikuzi musanvu emberi gh'olutimbe olutukuvu." 
Leviticus4:18 Agho aidha kutoolangaku omusaayi ogundi, yaagusiiga ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari eri mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Omusaayi gwonagwona ogusigairegho anaagufukanga ku ntobo y'alutaari eyokerwaku ebigheebwayo, eri ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus4:19 Agho anaatoolanga amasavu goonagoona ag'ente eyo, yaagookera ku alutaari." 
Leviticus4:20 Anaakolanga ku nte eyo nga bw'akola ku nte ey'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, olwo agheeyo omusengo olw'ebibi by'abantu abo basoniyibwe." 
Leviticus4:21 Agho ente eyo enaatwalibwanga kuliya kwa weema, Omukulu wa Bakabona yaagyokera eyo ng'oti ni bw'ayokya ere y'aba ng'aghaireyo olw'ekibi kye. Ekyo n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi eby'abantu boonaboona aghalala." 
Leviticus4:22 Omufuzi bw'anaabanga n'akoze ekibi nga tagendereire, n'asobya ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira," 
Leviticus4:23 bw'anaamanhisibwanga ekibi kye, aidha kuleetanga ekigheebwayo kye nga kya mbuzi nume eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Leviticus4:24 Anaatanga omukono gwe ku mutwe gwayo, yaagiitira ku luuyi olw'omugooda olw'alutaari ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba, agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda aghaitirwa ensolo edh'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa; ekyo n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Leviticus4:25 Agho Kabona anainhikanga olwala lwe mu musaayi ogw'ensolo eyo, yaagusiiga ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari eyokerwaku ebigheebwayo. Ogusigairegho yaagufuka ku ntobo y'alutaari eyo." 
Leviticus4:26 Amasavu gaayo goonagoona anaagookeranga ku alutaari, ng'oti ni bw'ayokya amasavu ag'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Atyo Kabona bw'anaaghangayo omusengo olw'ekibi ky'omufuzi, era omufuzi oyo aidha kusoniyibwanga." 
Leviticus4:27 Omuntu yeenayeena ku bantu ababuliidho bw'anaabanga nga n'akoze ekibi nga tagendereire, n'asobya ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira," 
Leviticus4:28 bw'anaamanhisibwanga ekibi kye, aidha kuleetanga ekigheebwayo kye nga kya mbuzi nkazi eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Leviticus4:29 Anaatanga omukono gwe ku mutwe gwayo, yaagiitira ku luuyi olw'omugooda olw'alutaari ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba, agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, aghaitirwa ensolo edh'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa." 
Leviticus4:30 Agho kabona anainhikanga olwala lwe mu musaayi gw'ensolo eyo, yaagusiiga ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari eyokerwaku ebigheebwayo. Ogusigairegho yaagufuka ku ntobo y'alutaari eyo." 
Leviticus4:31 Omuntu oyo aleese ensolo eyo, anaagitoolangamu amasavu goonagoona, ng'oti ni bwe gatoolebwa mu nsolo ey'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Olwo kabona yaagookera ku alutaari, gaavaamu akawoowo akasangaaza Musengwa Katonda. Atyo kabona bw'anaaghangayo omusengo olw'ekibi ky'omuntu oyo, era omuntu oyo aidha kusoniyibwanga." 
Leviticus4:32 Omuntu bw'anaaleetanga entaama nga n'ekigheebwayo kye olw'ebibi, eidha kubanga nkazi ng'eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Leviticus4:33 Anaatanga omukono gwe ku mutwe gwayo, yaagiitira ku luuyi olw'omugooda olw'alutaari ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba, aghaitirwa ensolo edh'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa." 
Leviticus4:34 Agho kabona anainhikanga olwala lwe mu musaayi gw'ensolo eyo, yaagusiiga ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari eyokerwaku ebigheebwayo. Ogusigairegho yaagufuka ku ntobo y'alutaari eyo." 
Leviticus4:35 Omuntu oyo aleese ensolo eyo, anaagitoolangamu amasavu goonagoona, ng'oti ni bwe gatoolebwa mu ntaama egheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Olwo kabona yaagookera ku alutaari ghalala n'eby'okulya ebigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda. Atyo kabona bw'anaaghangayo omusengo olw'ekibi ky'omuntu oyo, era omuntu oyo aidha kusoniyibwanga." 
Leviticus5:1 Omuntu bw'anaalayizibwanga okugha obudhulizi ku musango, aye n'atakoba kye yabona oba kye yawulira, anaabonerezebwanga." 
Leviticus5:2 Omuntu bw'anaagemanga ku kintu ekitali kirongoofu nga tategeire, ka tukobe ng'emamba ey'ensolo ey'omu nsiko oba ey'ensolo enfuge etali nongoofu oba ey'ekintu ekyeghaluliza ku itaka, anaabangaku omusango amangu geene ng'ategeire ky'akoze." 
Leviticus5:3 Omuntu bw'anaagemanga ku kintu kyonakyona ekiviire ku muntu ekitali kirongoofu, nga tategeire, anaabangaku omusango amangu geene ng'ategeire ky'akoze." 
Leviticus5:4 Omuntu bw'anaayanguyirizanga okweyama okukola ekintu ekirungi oba ekibi, nga tataireyo mwoyo ng'abantu bwe bakola, anaabangaku omusango amangu geene ng'ategeire ky'akoze." 
Leviticus5:5 Omuntu bw'anaizanga omusango gwonagwona mu ebyo, aidha kwatulanga ekibi kye yakola." 
Leviticus5:6 Era anaaleetanga eri Musengwa Katonda entaama enkazi oba embuzi ng'omutango olw'omusango ogwo gw'aiziiza. Kabona anaaghangayo ebintu ebyo byaba ekigheebwayo ng'omutango olw'ekibi eky'omuntu oyo. 
Leviticus5:7 Aye omuntu oyo bw'anaabanga nga tasobola kughaayo ntaama oba mbuzi, olw'okuba ow'entoola ghatono, anaaleetanga enhonhi dhino eri Musengwa Katonda dhaaba ekigheebwayo ng'omutango olw'omusango gw'aiziiza: amaghemba abiri oba enjiibwa ibiri enhonhi eyindi ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, ate eyindi ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus5:8 Anaadhireetanga eri kabona, kabona yaasooka okughaayo eyo egheebwayo olw'ebibi, yaaginiola enkoto aye nga tagikutulaku mutwe." 
Leviticus5:9 Era anaamansiranga ogundi ku musaayi gwayo mu mbali mw'alutaari ogusigairegho gwonagwona yaagukamulira ku ntobo y'alutaari eyo. Ekyo n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. 
Leviticus5:10 Anaaghangayo enhonhi ere eyindi, ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, ng'ajiira ku mateeka. Mu nsambo eyo kabona anaabanga aghaireyo omusengo olw'ekibi omuntu oyo ky'akoze, era omuntu oyo anaasoniyibwanga." 
Leviticus5:11 Aye omuntu oyo bw'anaabanga nga tasobola kughaayo maghemba abiri oba njiibwa ibiri, anaaleetanga kilo ndala ey'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Taateerengaku muzigo waire obubbaani, kuba ekyo n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, se ti ni kire ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke." 
Leviticus5:12 Anaaleetanga obuwunga obwo eri kabona, kabona oyo yaayoolaku omuganda ng'akamanhiso akooleka nga bwonabwona bugheereibwayo eri Musengwa Katonda, era yaabwokera ku alutaari ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa n'omuliro. Ekyo n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Leviticus5:13 Mu nsambo eyo kabona anaabanga aghaireyo omusengo olw'ekibi omuntu oyo ky'akoze, era omuntu oyo anaasoniyibwanga. Obuwunga obusigairegho bunaabanga bwa kabona, nga bwe kiba ku kigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke." 
Leviticus5:14 Musengwa Katonda yaagha Musa ebiragiro bino ati: 
Leviticus5:15 “Omuntu bw'anaakolanga ekibi nga tagendereire, olw'obutaghaayo ebitukuvu by'ateekwa okughaayo eri Musengwa Katonda, anaaleetanga eri Musengwa Katonda entaama enume, oba embuzi eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona ebe ekigheebwayo ng'omutango. Omughendo ogw'empiiya oguja mu nsolo eyo, gunaabalirirwanga mu mbala entongole ey'eisinzizo." 
Leviticus5:16 Era anaaleetanga ekyo ky'ataaghaayo, yaayongeraku n'omutango gwa kitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bitaanu eby'ekyo ky'ataaghaayo. Ebyo anaabireetanga eri kabona, kabona oyo yaaghaayo ensolo eyo yaaba ekigheebwayo ng'omusengo olw'ebibi by'omuntu oyo, era omuntu oyo yaasoniyibwa." 
Leviticus5:17 “Omuntu bw'anaakolanga ekibi, n'asobya mu kintu kyonakyona ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira, waire nga taidhi, anaabanga n'omusango, era anaabonerezebwanga." 
Leviticus5:18 Anaaleetanga eri musengwa entaama enume, oba embuzi eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona ng'eviire mu kisibo kye, yaagighaayo ebe ekigheebwayo ng'omutango. Omughendo ogw'empiiya oguja mu nsolo eyo, gunaabalirirwanga mu mbalirira entongole ey'omu isinzizo. Kabona anaaghangayo omusengo olw'ebibi omuntu oyo bye yakola nga tagendereire, era omuntu oyo yaasoniyibwa." 
Leviticus5:19 Ekyo n'ekigheebwayo ng'omutango olw'ebibi omuntu oyo bye yakola mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda.” 
Leviticus6:1 Musengwa Katonda era yagha Musa ebiragiro bino ati: 
Leviticus6:2 “Ekigheebwayo olw'okusasula kinaagheebwangayo, omuntu bw'anaakolanga ekibi mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, ng'aloba okwiriza Muisiraeli mwine ekintu kye yamulekera ng'omusingo, oba ng'amunhagaku ekintu, oba ng'amutoolaku ekintu mu kuguyaguya," 
Leviticus6:3 oba ng'aboine ekintu ekyabula yaakyeiriza, era yaalayira ebiziramu ati takibonangaku." 
Leviticus6:4 Ole anaakolanga ekibi ku ebyo ebyogeirwaku, era abantu ni bamanha ng'ali n'omusango, anaizangagho ekintu ekyo kye yanhaga, oba ekyo kye yafuna mu kuguyaguya, oba ekyo Muisiraeli mwine kye yamulekera ng'omusingo n'aloba okukimwiriza, oba ekyo ekyabula n'akyeiriza ng'akiboine," 
Leviticus6:5 oba ekyo kyonakyona kye yeelayiriraku ebiziramu ati takibonangaku. Omuntu oyo, ku lunaku lw'anaagheerangaku ekigheebwayo kye ng'omutango, anaizangagho ekintu ekyo nga kiramba, era yaayongeraku n'omutango gwa kitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bitaanu eby'ekintu ekyo era anaatoolanga ekintu ekyo yaakigemya ole mwene kyo." 
Leviticus6:6 Anaaleetanga eri kabona entaama enume eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona, ebe ekigheebwayo ng'omutango. Omughendo ogw'empiiya oguja mu ntaama eyo gunaabalirirwanga mu mbalirira entongole ey'omu isinzizo." 
Leviticus6:7 Kabona anaaghangayo omusengo olw'omuntu oyo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, era omuntu oyo anaasoniyibwanga.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa 
Leviticus6:9 aghe Aaroni ni batabane be amateeka aganaafuganga ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ati: “Ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, kinaasigalanga ku nku ku alutaari obwire bwonabwona, era omuliro gunaakuumibwanga nga guli kwaka." 
Leviticus6:10 Agho kabona anaavaalanga ekivaalo eky'olugoye olughegheevu, n'empale ey'olugoye olughegheevu, era yaatoola eivu eriva ku kigheebwayo ekyokeibwa ku alutaari, yaalita gha mbali gh'alutaari eyo." 
Leviticus6:11 Agho anaatoolangamu ebivaalo ebyo yaavaala ebindi, yaatwala eivu kuliya kwa weema, mu kifo ekirongoofu." 
Leviticus6:12 Omuliro oguli ku alutaari gunaakuumibwanga nga guli kwaka, aghazira kuzikira naire. Buli nkyo kabona anaagutangaku enku yaayaliiraku ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, era anaagwokerangaku amasavu ag'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Leviticus6:13 Omuliro gunaakuumibwanga nga guli kwaka buliidho ku alutaari, aghazira kuzikira naire." 
Leviticus6:14 “Gano n'amateeka aganaafuganga ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke: kabona ow'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni anaakighangayo eri Musengwa Katonda emberi gh'alutaari. 
Leviticus6:15 Anaayoolangaku omuganda ku buwunga obwo obuseereibwa obukalamu, n'omuzigo, n'obubbaani bwonabwona ebireeteirwaku, byonabyona yaabyokera ku alutaari, ng'akamanhiso akooleka nga byonabyona bigheereibwayo eri Musengwa Katonda. Akawoowo kaabyo kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus6:16 Ekyo ekisigalagho bakabona n'abanaakiryanga. Kinaafumbwangamu emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa, era baagiriira mu kifo ekitukuvu, mu luya lw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus6:17 Tikiifumbirwengamu kizimbulukusa. Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene nkighaire bakabona, kibe omugabo gwaibwe ku byange ebigheebwayo nga byokebwa omuliro. Kitukuvu inho ng'oti n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, era ng'oti n'ekigheebwayo ng'omutango." 
Leviticus6:18 Mu byanda byonabyona ebiriidha, kiisi musaadha ku b'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni anaabanga wa idembe okukiryaku, ogwo nga n'omugabo gwaibwe ogw'olubeerera ku by'okulya ebigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga byokebwa omuliro. Kiisi anaakigemangaku, anaabanga mutukuvu. ”" 
Leviticus6:19 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus6:20 “Kino n'ekigheebwayo Aaroni ni baidhukulu be kye banaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda, ku lunaku lwe banaasiigirwangaku omuzigo okwawulibwa. Banaaghangayo buli lunaku kilo ndala ey'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu ekitundu kyabwo ekindi ku nkyo, n'ekitundu kyabwo ekindi eigulo." 
Leviticus6:21 Bunaatabulwangamu omuzigo, bwakalangirwa ku lugyo. Bwe bunaamalanga okukalangibwamu ebitole, bunaaleetebwanga ng'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke. Akawoowo kaakyo kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus6:22 Mu byanda byonabyona ebiriidha, ekigheebwayo kino kinaagheebwangayo mwidhukulu wa Aaroni yeenayeena anaabanga nga n'akola ng'Omukulu wa Bakabona. Kinaayokebwanga kyonakyona ekiramba." 
Leviticus6:23 Ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke ekigheebwayo kabona, tikiiriibwengaku. Kinaayokebwanga kyonakyona.”" 
Leviticus6:24 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa 
Leviticus6:25 aghe Aaroni ni batabane be amateeka aganaafuganga ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi ati: “Mu kifo mwene mwe baitira ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, mwe banaitiranga n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Ekigheebwayo kino kitukuvu inho." 
Leviticus6:26 Kabona anaakighangayo n'aidhanga okukirya era kinaaliirwanga mu kifo ekitukuvu, mu luya lw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus6:27 Buli ekinaagemanga ku mamba yaakyo, kinaakolwangaku amaani ag'obutukuvu bwakyo. Era ekivaalo ekinaamansirwangaku omusaayi gwakyo, banaakyolezanga mu kifo ekitukuvu." 
Leviticus6:28 Entamu ey'eitosi efumbiibwamu emamba yaakyo, enaamenhebwanga. Aye entamu ey'ekyuma eky'ekikomo bw'enaabanga nga n'efumbiibwamu emamba yaakyo, enaakolokotebwanga yaanaazibwa n'amaadhi." 
Leviticus6:29 Kiisi musaadha ow'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni, anaabanga wa idembe okukiryaku. Kitukuvu inho." 
Leviticus6:30 Aye omusaayi gwakyo bwe gunaaleetebwanga mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, era ni gukozesebwa mu musengo ogugheebwayo olw'ebibi, olwo tikiiriibwengaku kinaayokebwanga bwokebwe." 
Leviticus7:1 “Gano n'amateeka aganaafuganga ekigheebwayo ng'omutango. Kiba kitukuvu inho. 
Leviticus7:2 Ensolo ey'ekigheebwayo kino enaitirwanga ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba, agho ghe baitira ensolo edhigheebwayo okwokebwa. Era omusaayi gwayo gunaamansirwanga ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari." 
Leviticus7:3 Amasavu gaayo goonagoona ganaagheerwangayo ku alutaari, n'omukira omusavu, n'amasavu goonagoona agali ku byenda," 
Leviticus7:4 n'ensigo dhombi ghalala n'amasavu agadhiriku, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi ku ini." 
Leviticus7:5 Kabona anaayokeranga byonabyona ku alutaari ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa omuliro. Ekyo n'ekigheebwayo ng'omutango. 
Leviticus7:6 Kiisi musaadha ow'oku lulyo lwa bakabona, anaabanga wa idembe okukiryaku. Aye kiteekwa okuliirwa mu kifo ekitukuvu, kuba kitukuvu inho." 
Leviticus7:7 “Eiteeka erifuga ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi era ni lyene eryo erinaafuganga ekigheebwayo ng'omutango: emamba ey'ebigheebwayo ebyo, enaatwalibwanga kabona anaabanga nga n'akoze ku bigheebwayo ebyo." 
Leviticus7:8 Era kabona anaabanga nga n'akoze ku kigheebwayo ekinaaleetebwanga omuntu yeenayeena, anaatwalanga oluwu olw'ekigheebwayo ekyo." 
Leviticus7:9 Buli ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, ekifumbibwa nga kiziikibwa mu ziiko, oba ekifumbibwa mu ntamu, oba ekikalangibwa ku lugyo, kinaatwalibwanga kabona akikozeeku." 
Leviticus7:10 Aye ebigheebwayo byonabyona eby'emere ey'empeke ebitali bifumbe, ka bibe nga bireeteirwaku omuzigo oba nga tibireeteirwaku, binaabanga bya bakabona boonaboona ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni, era banaabigabananga nga baagayaza." 
Leviticus7:11 “Gano n'amateeka aganaafuganga ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda olw'okutabagana: 
Leviticus7:12 Omuntu bw'anaaghangayo ekigheebwayo ekyo olw'okwebaza Katonda, anaagheerangaku emigaati eminene egitazimbulukusiibwa egitabwirwamu omuzigo, oba emigaati emitono egitazimbulukusiibwa egisiigiibwaku omuzigo, oba emigaati egikoleibwa mu buwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo." 
Leviticus7:13 Okwongereza ku kigheebwayo kye eky'okutabagana ky'ali kughaayo olw'okwebaza Katonda, anaaleeterangaku emigaati egizimbulukusiibwa." 
Leviticus7:14 Anaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda mulala mulala ku buli kika eky'emigaati egyo ogwo gunaabanga gwa kabona amansira omusaayi ogw'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. 
Leviticus7:15 Emamba ey'ekigheebwayo ekyo, enaaliibwanga ku olwo lwe kigheereibwayo, tighaabengagho esula." 
Leviticus7:16 “Aye ekigheebwayo omuntu ky'aghaayo bwe kinaabanga olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba eky'ekyeyendere, emamba yaakyo enaaliibwanga ku olwo lwe kigheereibwayo ng'omusengo, era esigalagho enaaliibwanga enkyo." 
Leviticus7:17 Aye emamba enaasigalangagho n'etuuka ku lunaku olwokusatu, enaayokebwanga omuliro." 
Leviticus7:18 Emamba eyo bw'enaaliibwangaku ku lunaku olwokusatu, Musengwa Katonda taasiimenga kigheebwayo ekyo, era n'oyo akighaireyo taasiimibwenga. Emamba eyo enaatwalibwanga okuba ekyenhinhalwa, era kiisi anaagiryangaku, anaabonerezebwanga." 
Leviticus7:19 Emamba eyo bw'eneekubanga ku kintu ekitali kirongoofu, teeriibwenga, enaayokebwanga bwokebwe. “Kiisi oyo abalibwa okuba omulongoofu n'anaalyanga ku mamba ey'omusengo ogwo." 
Leviticus7:20 Aye omuntu anaagiryangaku nga tiimulongoofu, anaabanga takaabalirwa mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus7:21 Era omuntu bw'anaagemanga ku kintu ekitali kirongoofu ekiva ku muntu oba ku nsolo, oba ekintu ekindi ekyenhinhalwa, memale n'alya ku mamba y'omusengo ogugheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda olw'okutabagana, omuntu oyo anaabanga takaabalirwa mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Musengwa yaalagira Musa," 
Leviticus7:23 akobere Abaisiraeli ati: “Mutalyanga masavu ga nte, oba ag'entaama, oba ag'embuzi." 
Leviticus7:24 Amasavu g'ensolo efiire obufe yeene, n'amasavu ag'eyo eitiibwa ensolo edh'omu nsiko mutagalyanga, aye gasobola okukozesebwa mu migaso egindi." 
Leviticus7:25 Kiisi anaalyanga amasavu ag'ensolo agagheereibwayo eri Musengwa Katonda ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, anaabanga takaabalirwa mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus7:26 Era woonawoona ghe munaabanga, mutalyanga ku musaayi gwonagwona, ka gube gwa nhonhi oba gwa nsolo." 
Leviticus7:27 Kiisi anaalyanga ku musaayi gwonagwona, anaabanga takaabalirwa mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Leviticus7:28 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa 
Leviticus7:29 akobere Abaisiraeli ati: “Kiisi aghaayo omusengo olw'okutabagana, anaatoolangaku ekitundu kyaba ekigheebwayo eky'endhawulo eri Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus7:30 Anaakireetanga mwene mu ngalo dhe, kibe ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa anaaleetanga amasavu n'ekifuba, kibe ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga kiwuubibwa." 
Leviticus7:31 Kabona anaayokeranga amasavu ku alutaari, aye ekifuba tikiiyokebwenga, kinaabanga kya bakabona." 
Leviticus7:32 Era ekisambi eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha kyona munaakighanga kabona, kyaba ekigheebwa kabona oyo nga kitoolebwa ku musengo ogugheebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Leviticus7:33 Kabona oyo ow'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni ow'okwokyanga amasavu era n'okumansiranga omusaayi ogw'ekigheebwayo ekyo, n'anaatwalanga ekisambi ekyo ng'omugabo gwe." 
Leviticus7:34 Ekifuba ekigheebwayo nga kiwuubibwa n'ekisambi ekigheebwa kabona nga kitoolebwa ku musengo ogugheebwayo olw'okutabagana, mbitoire ku Baisiraeli okuva ku misengo gye baghaayo olw'okutabagana, naabigha Aaroni n'abaana be. Bino Abaisiraeli banaateekwanga okubigha bakabona enaku dhoonadhoona." 
Leviticus7:35 Ogwo n'omugabo ogutoolebwa ku by'okulya ebigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebyokebwa, ogwagheebwa Aaroni ni batabane be ku lunaku lwe baasiigibwa omuzigo, ni baawulibwa okugheereza Musengwa Katonda nga bakabona." 
Leviticus7:36 Ku lunaku olwo Musengwa Katonda yalagira Abaisiraeli okughanga bakabona abo omugabo ogwo. Ekyo Abaisiraeli bali n'okukituukirizanga enaku dhoonadhoona.” 
Leviticus7:37 Ago n'amateeka agafuga ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke, n'ebigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'ebigheebwayo ng'omutango, n'ebigheebwayo olw'okwawulibwa, n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Leviticus7:38 Eyo ku lusozi Sinai mu irungu, Musengwa Katonda ye yagheera Musa ebiragiro ebyo, ku lunaku lwe yakoberaku Abaisiraeli okumuleeteranga ebigheebwayo byaibwe." 
Leviticus8:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus8:2 “Twala Aaroni ni batabane be, otwale n'ebivaalo, n'omuzigo ogusiigibwa, n'ente ey'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'entaama enume eibiri, n'ekiibo ekirimu emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa." 
Leviticus8:3 Memale oyete abantu boonaboona baidhe ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda.” 
Leviticus8:4 Agho Musa yaakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira. Abantu beesololeza ku mulyango gwa Weema eyo," 
Leviticus8:5 yaabakoba ati: “Kino Musengwa Katonda ky'andagiire okukola.” 
Leviticus8:6 Agho yaaleeta Aaroni ni batabane be, yaakola omukolo ogw'okubanaaza n'amaadhi." 
Leviticus8:7 Yaavaaza Aaroni esaati n'ekanzu, yaamusiba olukoma mu nkende, yaamuvaaza n'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, yaakisiba n'olusibiro lwakyo olwalukibwa obukalamu, yaakimunhweza mu nkende." 
Leviticus8:8 Yaamuvaaza ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba, yaakitaamu ebintu ebyetebwa Urimu ni Thummimu." 
Leviticus8:9 Yaamusiba ekitambaala ku mutwe, era agho mu maiso gaakyo yaakisibaku akapande aka zaabu, ng'eyo n'engule entukuvu, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Leviticus8:10 Agho Musa yaatoola omuzigo ogusiigiibwa, yagusiiga ku Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, era ni ku bintu byonabyona ebigirimu, olwo yaabitukuza okubyawula bibe ebya Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus8:11 Yaatoola ku muzigo, yaagumansira emikuzi musanvu ku alutaari ni ku bintu byonabyona ebikozesebwa ku alutaari, ni ku benseni ni ku kityamo kyayo, yaabitukuza okubyawula bibe ebya Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus8:12 Yaasiiga Aaroni omuzigo ku mutwe okumwawula. 
Leviticus8:13 Agho Musa yaaleeta batabane ba Aaroni, yaabavaaza amasaati, yaabasiba enkoma mu nkende, era n'ebitambaala ku mitwe, nga Musengwa bweyamulagira." 
Leviticus8:14 Agho Musa yaaleeta ente egheebwayo olw'ebibi, Aaroni ni batabane be baata emikono gyaibwe ku mutwe gwayo." 
Leviticus8:15 Musa oyo yaagiita, era yaatoolaku omusaayi ogundi yaagusiigisa olwala lwe ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari ku ndhuyi dhaayo dhoonadhoona okugyawulira Musengwa Katonda. Omusaayi ogwasigalagho gwonagwona, yaagufuka ku ntobo y'alutaari. Mu nsambo eyo yaagyawula ebe eya Musengwa Katonda era yaaghaayo omusengo olw'okugitukuza." 
Leviticus8:16 Musa yaatoola amasavu goonagoona agaali ku byenda, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi ku ini, n'ensigo dhombi ghalala n'amasavu agaadhiriku, yaabyokera byonabyona ku alutaari." 
Leviticus8:17 Ebyasigalagho byonabyona ku nte eyo: oluwu, emamba, n'obusa, yaabyokya omuliro mu kifo aghazira weema dha bantu, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Leviticus8:18 Agho Musa yaaleeta entaama enume ey'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Aaroni ni batabane be, baata emikono gyaibwe ku mutwe gwayo." 
Leviticus8:19 Musa oyo yaagiita era yaamansira omusaayi ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari. 
Leviticus8:20 Bwe yamala okugitematemamu, yaagyokera ku alutaari ghalala n'omutwe n'amasavu." 
Leviticus8:21 Era bweyamala okunaaza ebyenda n'ebibbonge, yaabyokera ku alutaari ghalala n'ebitundu ebyasigalagho, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira ekyo nga n'ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda ekyokebwa, ekiri n'akawoowo akamusangaaza." 
Leviticus8:22 Agho Musa yaaleeta entaama enume eyokubiri, ey'okwawulibwa kwa bakabona. Aaroni ni batabane be baata emikono gyaibwe ku mutwe gwayo." 
Leviticus8:23 Musa oyo yaagiita, yaatoolaku omusaayi ogundi yaagusiiga ku ntobo ya kutu wa Aaroni ow'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku kyala kye ekisaadha eky'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku kigere kye ekisaadha eky'oku mukono omusaadha." 
Leviticus8:24 Agho Musa yaaleeta batabane ba Aaroni, yaasiiga ogundi ku musaayi ku ntobo ya kutu waibwe ow'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku byala byaibwe ebisaadha eby'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku bigere byaibwe ebisaadha eby'oku mukono omusaadha. Omusaayi ogwasigalagho yaagumansira ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari." 
Leviticus8:25 Yaatoola amasavu, omukira omusavu, amasavu goonagoona ag'oku byenda, ekitundu ekisinga obulungi ku ini, ensigo dhombi ghalala n'amasavu agadhiriku, n'ekisambi eky'oku mukono omusaadha." 
Leviticus8:26 Era yaatoola n'omugaati mulala mu kiibo ekirimu emigaati eminene egitazimbulukusiibwa egigheereibwayo eri Musengwa Katonda, n'omugaati mulala ogutabwirwamu omuzigo, n'omugaati omutono mulala, yaagita ku masavu ni ku kisambi eky'oku mukono omusaadha." 
Leviticus8:27 Ebyo byonabyona yaabigemya Aaroni ni batabane be, era bano baabiwuuba, byaba ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga kiwuubibwa." 
Leviticus8:28 Agho Musa yaabitoola mu ngalo dhaibwe, yaabyokera ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa, ekyagheebwayo olw'okwawulibwa kwaibwe. Akawoowo kaakyo kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus8:29 Agho Musa yaagema akafumito, yaakawuuba, kaaba ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga kiwuubibwa. Ogwo n'ogwali omugabo gwa Musa ku ntaama eyagheebwayo olw'okwawulibwa kwaibwe, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Leviticus8:30 Musa yaatoola ku muzigo ogusiigibwa, ni ku musaayi ogwali ku alutaari, yaagumansira ku Aaroni ni ku bivaalo bye, era ni ku batabane be, ni ku bivaalo byaibwe. Mu nsambo eyo yaayawula Aaroni ni batabane be baaba ba Musengwa Katonda, ghalala n'ebivaalo byaibwe." 
Leviticus8:31 Musa yaakoba Aaroni ni batabane be ati: “Mutwale emamba ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, mugifumbe era mugiriire eyo, n'emigaati egiri mu kiibo eky'ebigheebwayo olw'okwawulibwa, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyabalagira okugiryanga." 
Leviticus8:32 Era ekisigalagho ku mamba ni ku migaati, mukyokye bwokye." 
Leviticus8:33 Mutava ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, okumala enaku musanvu, okutuusa emikolo egy'okwawulibwa kwaimwe lwe girimalirizibwa." 
Leviticus8:34 Musengwa Katonda n'eyatulagira okukola ebyo bye tukoze olwaleero, olw'okutoolagho ebibi byaimwe." 
Leviticus8:35 Muteekwa okusigala ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, okumala enaku musanvu, okutuukiriza ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda, memale mulobe kufa, kuba atyo Musengwa Katonda bweyandagira.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Kale, Aaroni ni batabane be baakola byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira ng'abita mu Musa." 
Leviticus9:1 Ku lunaku olwairaku ng'emikolo egy'okwawulibwa giwoire, Musa yaayeta Aaroni ni batabane be, n'abakulembeze mu Isiraeli," 
Leviticus9:2 yaakoba Aaroni ati: “Twala ente enume ento, n'entaama enume, dhombi nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona, oje odhigheeyo eri Musengwa Katonda ente eyo enume ebe ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'entaama eyo enume ebe ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus9:3 Era okobe Abaisiraeli batwale embuzi enume, ebe ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'ente ento ey'omwaka omulala, n'entaama ento ey'omwaka omulala, dhombi nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona, dhibe ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa," 
Leviticus9:4 n'ente era n'entaama, nga dhombi nume, dhibe ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Bino bali n'okubighaayo ng'omusengo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, aghalala n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke ekitabwirwamu omuzigo. Bali n'okukola batyo, kuba Musengwa Katonda aidha kubabonekera olwaleero.”" 
Leviticus9:5 Ebyo byonabyona Musa bye yalagira, baabireeta emberi w'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Abaisiraeli boonaboona baaseeta, baayemerera mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus9:6 Musa yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda abalagiire okukola kino, memale ekitiisa kye ekimesunkana kibabonekere.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Agho yaakoba Aaroni ati: “Ja kumpi n'alutaari, ogheeyo ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, ogheeyo omusengo olw'ebibi byo n'olw'ebibi eby'abantu. Ghaayo ekigheebwayo eky'abantu, era ogheeyo omusengo olw'ebibi byaibwe, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Agho Aaroni yaaja kumpi n'alutaari, yaita ente enume ento, nga n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi ebibye." 
Leviticus9:9 Batabane be baamuleetera omusaayi gw'ente eyo, yainhikamu olwala, yaagutoonhia ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari ogwasigalagho yaagufuka ku ntobo y'alutaari eyo." 
Leviticus9:10 Ate amasavu n'ensigo, n'ekitundu ekisinga obulungi ku ini, yaabyokera ku alutaari, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa." 
Leviticus9:11 Aye emamba n'oluwu, yaabyokera kuliya kw'ekifo abantu kye baasimbamu weema dhaibwe." 
Leviticus9:12 Era yaita ensolo ey'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Batabane be baamuleetera omusaayi, yaagumansira ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari." 
Leviticus9:13 Baamuleetera omutwe n'ebitundu ebindi eby'ensolo eyo, yaabyokera ku alutaari." 
Leviticus9:14 Era yaanaaza ebyenda n'ebibbonge, yaabyokera ku alutaari n'ebitundu ebindi eby'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus9:15 Aaroni bweyamala ebyo, yaaleeta ekigheebwayo eky'abantu: yaatoola embuzi ey'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, yaagiita era yaagighaayo olw'ebibi by'abantu ng'oti ni bweyakola ng'aghaayo olw'ebibi bye." 
Leviticus9:16 Era yaaleeta ensolo ey'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, yaagighaayo ng'ajiira ku mateeka bwe gakoba." 
Leviticus9:17 Yaaleeta ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, yaayoolaku omuganda gw'obuwunga, yaabwokera ku alutaari ng'ayongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Leviticus9:18 Era yaita ente enume n'entaama enume ku lw'abantu, ng'omusengo ogugheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Batabane be baamuleetera omusaayi, yaagumansira ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'alutaari." 
Leviticus9:19 Aaroni yaatoola amasavu goonagoona, n'ensigo, n'ebitundu ebisinga obulungi eby'ente eyo n'entaama eyo," 
Leviticus9:20 yaabita ku bifuba eby'ensolo edho, byonabyona yaabitwala ku alutaari. Amasavu yaagookera ku alutaari." 
Leviticus9:21 Aye ebifuba n'ebisambi eby'oku mukono omusaadha eby'ensolo edho, yaabighaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ng'abiwuuba, byaba ekigheebwayo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda nga kiwuubibwa ebintu ebyo biba bya bakabona, nga Musa bweyalagira." 
Leviticus9:22 Aaroni bweyamala okughaayo emisengo egyo, ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, n'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, yaagololera emikono eri abantu, yaabasabira enkabi. Yaika ghansi ng'ava aghaali ekigheebwayo ekyo." 
Leviticus9:23 Musa ni Aaroni baingira mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Bwe baafuluma, baasabira abantu enkabi, era ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda ekimesunkana kyabonekera abantu boonaboona." 
Leviticus9:24 Amangu ago Musengwa Katonda yaasindika omuliro, gwayokya ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa era n'amasavu ku alutaari. Abantu bwe baagubona, boonaboona baawowoigana, baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka." 
Leviticus10:1 Agho Nadabu ni Abihu batabane ba Aaroni, baatoola ebiniokezebwaku obubbaani, buli mulala ekikye, baabitaamu omuliro baataaku obubbaani, baabuniokeza mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Aye omuliro ogwo tigwali mutukuvu, kuba Musengwa Katonda ti n'eyabalagira okuguleeta." 
Leviticus10:2 Amangu ago Musengwa Katonda yaasindika omuliro, gwabookya, baafiira mu maiso ge." 
Leviticus10:3 Agho Musa yaakoba Aaroni ati: “Kino Musengwa Katonda kye yayogeraku bweyakoba ati, ‘Ndyeyoleka nga ndi mutukuvu mu abo abampeereza, era nnaasaakibwanga mu maiso g'abantu boonaboona.’ ” Aye Aaroni yaasirika busirike." 
Leviticus10:4 Musa yaayeta Mishaeli ni Elizafani, batabane ba Uzzieli muganda wa lata wa Aaroni, yaabakoba ati: “Mwidhe mubbeedegho emirambo gya batabane ba muganda waimwe, mugitoole mu Weema Entukuvu mugitwale kuliya okuva ghano aghaasimbwa weema dhaife.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Kale baidha, baagibbeedera ku ngoye, baagitwala kuliya kw'ekifo abantu kye baasimbamu weema dhaibwe, nga Musa bweyalagira." 
Leviticus10:6 Musa yaakoba Aaroni ni batabane be, Eleazari ni Ithamari, ati: “Mutaloba kusunsula nviiri dhaimwe era mutakanulamu ebivaalo byaimwe okwoleka nga munakughaire. Bwe munaakola ekyo mwidha kufa, era Musengwa Katonda aidha kusungughalira ekikunsu kyonakyona eky'abantu. Aye Baisiraeli banaimwe abandi boonaboona, baikirizibwa okulira olw'okufiirwa okwo, okuleeteibwa omuliro Musengwa Katonda gw'asindiike." 
Leviticus10:7 Mutava ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, lwe mutaafe, kuba muliku omuzigo ogwabasiigibwa okubaawula mube ba Musengwa Katonda.” Kale baakola nga Musa bweyakoba." 
Leviticus10:8 Musengwa Katonda yalagira Aaroni ati: 
Leviticus10:9 “Iwe ni batabane bo, bwe munaabanga munhweire ku mwenge ogw'emizabbibu, oba ekitamiiza ekindi kyonakyona, mutaingiranga mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Bwe mulikikola, muja kufa. Eiteeka eryo linaakuumibwanga ab'olulyo lwaimwe enaku dhoonadhoona." 
Leviticus10:10 Mwawulengagho ebintu ebitukuvu n'ebitali bitukuvu, ebirongoofu n'ebitali birongoofu." 
Leviticus10:11 Era mwegeresenga Abaisiraeli amateeka goonagoona ge mbaghaire nga mbita mu Musa.” 
Leviticus10:12 Agho Musa yaakoba Aaroni ni batabane be abaasigalagho nga balamu, Eleazari ni Ithamari, ati: “Mutwale ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke ekisigairegho ku bigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebyokebwa, mubikolemu emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa, mugiriire ku mbali kw'alutaari, kuba ekigheebwayo ekyo kitukuvu inho." 
Leviticus10:13 Mugiriire mu Kifo Ekitukuvu mwonka, kuba ogwo n'omugabo gwo iwe Aaroni, ni batabane bo, ku by'okulya ebigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda. Ekyo Musengwa kye yandagira." 
Leviticus10:14 Aye ekifuba ekigheebwayo nga kiwuubibwa, n'ekisambi ekigheebwayo obugheebwe, iwe ni batabane bo ni baghala bo, munaabanga ba idembe okubiriira mu kifo kyonakyona ekirongoofu, kuba ebyo bikugheebwa iwe n'abaana bo, nga n'omugabo gwaimwe bakabona, ku misengo egigheebwayo Abaisiraeli olw'okutabagana." 
Leviticus10:15 Banaaleetanga ekisambi ekigheebwayo obugheebwe n'ekifuba ekigheebwayo nga kiwuubibwa, nga baleeta amasavu okuba ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda ekyokebwa. Ebitundu ebyo banaabiwuubanga, bibe ebigheebwayo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda nga biwuubibwa. Era binaabanga bibyo era bya baana bo enaku dhoonadhoona, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Musa yaabuuza ebigema ku mbuzi ey'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Yaazuula nga yamaze ira okwokebwa! Agho yasungughalira Eleazari ni Ithamari, batabane ba Aaroni. Yaababuuza ati:" 
Leviticus10:17 “Ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi lwaki timukiriiriire mu Kifo Ekitukuvu? Ekigheebwayo ekyo Kitukuvu inho, era Musengwa Katonda yakibagha okutoolagho ebibi by'abantu, nga mughaayo omusengo olw'ebibi eby'abantu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus10:18 Omusaayi gwakyo nga bwegutaaleeteibwa mu Weema Entukuvu, mubaire muli n'okukiriira omwo nga bwe nalagira.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Agho Aaroni yairamu ati: “Olwaleero abantu baleese ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, era baghaireyo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, aye era naatuukibwaku ebizibu bino eby'okufiirwa! Memale ngoli ndiire ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, Musengwa Katonda yandinsiimye?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Musa bweyawulira ebyo, yainhongoka." 
Leviticus11:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ni Aaroni 
Leviticus11:2 bakobere Abaisiraeli bati: “Bino n'ebiramu bye mwikirizibwa okulya mu nsolo dhoonadhoona edhiri ku bukalu. 
Leviticus11:3 Buli nsolo eri n'ebinuulo nga byawulemu era eiza obwekulumo, eyo mwikirizibwa okugirya." 
Leviticus11:4 Aye mutalyanga nsolo nga dhino: engamiya, omusu, n'akamyu. Munaadhibaliranga mu ebyo ebitali birongoofu, kuba waire biiza obwekulumo, aye bizira binuulo byawulemu." 
Leviticus11:5  
Leviticus11:6  
Leviticus11:7 Era mutalyanga mbiidhi. Munaagibaliranga mu ebyo ebitali birongoofu, kuba waire eri n'ebinuulo ebyawulemu, aye teiza bwekulumo." 
Leviticus11:8 Mutalyanga ku mamba ya nsolo edho, waire okudhigemaku nga dhifiire. Ti nongoofu." 
Leviticus11:9 “Mwikirizibwa okulya kiisi kya mu maadhi ekiri n'obukuba amaadhi, n'ebigalagamba." 
Leviticus11:10 Aye buli kiramu ekiba mu maadhi ekizira bukuba maadhi na bigalagamba, kinaabanga kyenhinhalwa ye muli." 
Leviticus11:11 Ebyo binaabanga kyenhinhalwa ye muli. Mutalyanga ku mamba yaabyo, waire okubigemaku nga bifu." 
Leviticus11:12 Buli ekiba mu maadhi ekizira bukuba maadhi na bigalagamba, kinaabanga kyenhinhalwa ye muli." 
Leviticus11:13 “Mu nhonhi edhinaabanga ekyenhinhalwa ye muli era dhe mutalyanga, n'omuli dhino: enkookooma, ensega, mawudi," 
Leviticus11:14 akakubi, eikoli, n'edhindi edhiri mu bika byadho;" 
Leviticus11:15 n'amakoova aga buli kika," 
Leviticus11:16 ni maaya, n'ensega ey'oku maadhi, n'akakologo, n'edhindi edhiri mu bika byadho;" 
Leviticus11:17 n'ekiwigulu eky'obwire, n'eky'oku maadhi, n'ekyo ekinene." 
Leviticus11:18 Era n'ekiwigulu eky'amatu, n'eky'amayiga, n'ensega endheru," 
Leviticus11:19 ni sekenhulya, ni mpaabaana n'edhindi edhiri mu bika byadho; n'eikokootezi, n'eirenha." 
Leviticus11:20 “Ebisiisa byonabyona ebiri n'amaghagha, ebitambuza amagulu ana (4), binaabanga kyenhinhalwa ye muli" 
Leviticus11:21 okutoolaku ebyo ebisobola okutuuma n'amagulu gaabyo. 
Leviticus11:22 Kale ni mwikirizibwa okulya enzige, enseenene, namadhedhe, n'ebindi ebiri mu bika byabyo." 
Leviticus11:23 Aye ebisiisa byonabyona ebindi ebiri n'amaghagha, n'amagulu ana, binaabanga kyenhinhalwa ye muli." 
Leviticus11:24 “Kiisi anaagemanga ku mulambo ogw'ensolo dhino anaafuukanga atali mulongoofu era anaasigalanga nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo. 
Leviticus11:25 Era kiisi anaabbeedanga ekitundu kyonakyona ku mulambo ogw'ensolo dhino anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye, aye era anaasigalanga nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo:" 
Leviticus11:26 Buli nsolo eri n'ebinuulo aye nga tibyawulemu era nga teiza bwekulumo, munaagibaliranga mu dhitali nongoofu. Kiisi anaagigemangaku ng'efiire taabenga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus11:27 Era buli nsolo ey'amagulu ana eri n'enkumu, munaagibaliranga mu dhitali nongoofu. Kiisi anaagigemangaku, anaasigalanga nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus11:28 Era oyo anaabbeedanga omulambo gw'ensolo eyo, anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye, aye era anaasigalanga nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo. Ensolo edho munaadhibaliranga mu dhitali nongoofu." 
Leviticus11:29 “Ebiramu bino byona munaabibaliranga mu ebyo ebitali birongoofu: enfuko, empube, omudolome omunene n'ebindi ebiri mu kika kyagwo;" 
Leviticus11:30 n'akafuuwante, n'embulu, n'omunha, n'omudolome, n'olukaanianvu." 
Leviticus11:31 Ebyo munaabibaliranga mu bitali birongoofu. Kiisi anaabigemangaku nga bifiire, anaasigalanga nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus11:32 Era buli kintu ekinaagwibwangaku ebintu ebyo nga bifiire, ka kibe kya muti, oba kya lugoye, oba luwu, oba kutiya, oba ekindi kyonakyona ekikozesebwa, tikiibenga kirongoofu. Kinaateekwanga okwinhikibwa mu maadhi, aye era kyasigala nga tiikirongoofu okutuusa eigulo; memale kyaba ekirongoofu." 
Leviticus11:33 Era ebintu ebyo ebibalirwa mu bitali birongoofu bwe bigwa mu kintu ekyawumbibwa mu itosi, byonabyona ebiri mu kintu ekyo tibiibenga birongoofu era ekintu ekyo kinaamenhebwanga." 
Leviticus11:34 Buli kya kulya ekiikirizibwa okuliibwa, ekifukiibwaku amaadhi agaviire mu kintu ekyo ekigwiremu ebintu ebyo ebitali birongoofu, tikiibenga kirongoofu, era buli kyakunhwa ekiri mu kintu ekyo, tikiibenga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus11:35 Buli kintu ekinaagwangamu ebintu ebyo ebitali birongoofu nga bifiire, tikiibenga kirongoofu, ka kibe ziiko ey'eitosi, oba mayiga amawumbe, ebyo binaamenhebwanga bumenhebwe. Ti birongoofu, era binaabanga kyenhinhalwa ye muli." 
Leviticus11:36 Aye ensulo oba ekidiba ekirimu amaadhi, binaasigalanga nga birongoofu, waire ng'ekintu ekindi kyonakyona ekigemye ku bintu byo nga bifiire tikiba kirongoofu." 
Leviticus11:37 Era ekindi ku bintu ebyo ekifiire, bwe kigwa ku nsigo eja okusigibwa, ensigo esigala nga nongoofu." 
Leviticus11:38 Aye ensigo bw'eba nga einhikiibwa mu maadhi, memale ekindi ku bintu ebyo ebitali birongoofu ekifiire ni kigigwaku, ensigo eyo teebenga nongoofu." 
Leviticus11:39 “Ensolo eikirizibwa okuliibwa bw'efa, kiisi muntu anaagigemangaku, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus11:40 Era oyo anaalyanga ku mamba yaayo anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye, aye era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo. N'oyo anaagibbeedanga ng'efiire anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye, aye era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus11:41 “Obusolo obutono obutambula ku nsi mutabulyanga, bunaabanga kyenhinhalwa ye muli;" 
Leviticus11:42 ka bube nga bwekulula, oba nga butambuza amagulu ana, oba nga buli n'amagulu kamaala." 
Leviticus11:43 Muteeyonoonanga nga mulya ku mamba ey'ebyekulula ebyo, era muteereeteranga kuba batali balongoofu olw'ebitonde ebyo." 
Leviticus11:44 Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe. Mubenga batukuvu, kuba nze ndi mutukuvu. Muteereeteranga kuba batali batukuvu nga mulya ku mamba ey'ebyekululira ku itaka ebyo." 
Leviticus11:45 Ninze Musengwa Katonda eyabatoola mu Misiri, mbenga Katonda waimwe. Kale ni mubenga batukuvu, kuba nze ndi mutukuvu.”" 
Leviticus11:46 Ago n'amateeka agagema ku nsolo ni ku nhonhi, ni ku buli kiramu ekiba mu maadhi, ni ku buli kiramu ekitambula ku itaka." 
Leviticus11:47 Ago n'aganaakozesebwanga okwawulanga ebirongoofu ku bitali birongoofu, n'okwawulanga ebiramu ebiikirizibwa okuliibwa, ku ebyo ebitaikirizibwa." 
Leviticus12:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus12:2 “Kobera Abaisiraeli oti omukazi bw'anaatoolanga enda n'azaala omwana omulenzi, enaku omusanvu edhinaiririranga taabenga mulongoofu, ng'oti ni bw'ataba mulongoofu ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'okulwala." 
Leviticus12:3 Ku lunaku olwomunaana, omwana anaakeketebwanga." 
Leviticus12:4 Olwo omukazi oyo anaamalanga enaku edhindi amakumi asatu na isatu ng'atwalibwa okuba ng'akaali kutukuzibwa, olw'omusaayi ogwamuvaamu ng'azaala. Taagemenga ku kintu kitukuvu oba okwingira mu kifo ekitukuvu, okutuusa enaku edh'okutukuzibwa kwe lwe dhinaawangaku." 
Leviticus12:5 Aye bw'anaazaalanga omwana omughala, anaamalanga enaku ikumi na ina nga tiimulongoofu, nga bw'ataba mulongoofu ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'okulwala. Olwo anaamalanga enaku edhindi nkaaga na mukaaga ng'atwalibwa okuba ng'akaali kutukuzibwa olw'omusaayi ogwamuvaamu ng'azaala." 
Leviticus12:6 “Agho enaku edh'okutukuzibwa kwe bwe dhinaawangaku, edh'omwana omulenzi oba omughala, omukazi oyo anaaleetanga eri kabona ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, entaama ento ey'omwaka omulala, ebe ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, n'enjiibwa oba eighemba eito, okuba ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Leviticus12:7 Kabona anaaghangayo ekigheebwayo ekyo ng'omusengo eri Musengwa Katonda, omukazi oyo yaatukuzibwa olw'omusaayi ogwamuvaamu. Eryo n'eiteeka erifuga omukazi ng'azaire omwana omulenzi oba omughala." 
Leviticus12:8 “Omukazi bw'aba nga taghanga kughaayo ntaama nto, anaaghangayo amaghemba amato abiri oba enjiibwa ibiri, olw'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, n'olw'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Kabona anaaghangayo ebigheebwayo ebyo ng'omusengo eri Musengwa Katonda olw'omukazi oyo, yaaba mulongoofu.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ni Aaroni ati: 
Leviticus13:2 “Omuntu bw'anaabanga n'obuzimbu, oba okubutukabutuka, oba ebintu okumwaguka ku mubiri gwe, nga muno musobola okufuukamu endwaire ey'ebigenge, anaaleetebwanga eri Aaroni kabona, oba eri owundi ku bakabona ab'oku lulyo lw'Aaroni." 
Leviticus13:3 Kabona aneekebeedhanga aghalwaire ku mubiri. Era obuviiri obuli aghalwaire bwe bunaabanga bweruukiriire, nga n'aghalwaire ghaboneka nga gheesimye mu mubiri, olwo ng'eyo n'endwaire ey'ebigenge. Agho kabona anaamulangiriranga ati tiimulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:4 Aye aghalwaire ku mubiri bwe ghanaabanga nga tiweeruukiriire, nga ghaboneka nga tigheesimye mu mubiri, n'obuviiri nga tibweruukiriire, kabona anaakuumiranga omuntu oyo mu kifo yenka, okumala enaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:5 Agho kabona anairangamu okumwekebeedha ku lunaku olwomusanvu. Era bw'anaabonanga ng'aghalwaire ghasigaire nga bwe ghaali, nga tigheeyongeire kusansaana ku mubiri, anaamukuumiranga mu kifo yenka, okumala enaku edhindi musanvu."
