Leviticus13:6 Kabona anaamwekebeedhanga kabiri ku lunaku olwomusanvu. Era aghalwaire bweghanaabanga ghakendeire, nga tigheeyongeire kusansaana ku mubiri, kabona anaamulangiriranga ati mulongoofu, ali na bulwaire bwa kubutukabutuka bwonka. Agho omuntu oyo anaayozanga ebivaalo bye, yaaba mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:7 Aye kabona bw'anaabanga ng'amaze okumwekebeedha n'okumulangirira bw'ali omulongoofu, ate okubutukabutuka ni kweyongera okusansaana ku mubiri, omuntu oyo anairangamu okweyandhula eri kabona." 
Leviticus13:8 Kabona anairangamu okumwekebeedha. Era okubutukabutuka bwe kunaabanga nga kweyongeire okusansaana ku mubiri, anaamulangiriranga ati tiimulongoofu; olwo anaabanga ng'ali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge." 
Leviticus13:9 “Omuntu ng'agemeibwa endwaire embi ey'ebigenge, anaaleetebwanga eri kabona" 
Leviticus13:10 yaamwekebeedha. Bw'anaabanga n'obuzimbu nga bweruukiriire ku mubiri, nga bweruukiriiza n'obuviiri era ng'omubiri gwesazesaze aghazimbye," 
Leviticus13:11 ebyo nga n'ebigenge ebitawona. Kabona anaamulangiriranga ati tiimulongoofu. Tikyetaagisa kumukuumira mu kifo yenka, kuba bwenebwene oyo tiimulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:12 Aye ebigenge ebyo bw'ebinaasansaananga ni bibuna omulwaire oyo okuva ku mutwe okutuuka ku bigere," 
Leviticus13:13 kabona anaamwekebeedhanga kabiri. Bw'anaabonanga ng'ebigenge bibunie omubiri gwonagwona, anaamulangiriranga ati mulongoofu; omubiri gwe gwonagwona bwe guba nga gweruukiriire, oyo abalibwa nga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:14 Aye bw'anaabonekanga ng'omubiri gwesazesaze taabenga mulongoofu. 
Leviticus13:15 Kabona anaamwekebeedhanga kabiri. Era bw'anaabonanga ng'omubiri gwesazesaze, anaamulangiriranga ati tiimulongoofu, kuba eyo n'endwaire ey'ebigenge. Era omuntu oyo taabenga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:16 Aye omubiri ogwesazesaze bwe gunaawonanga ni ghairagho obweruukirivu, omuntu oyo anaajanga eri kabona," 
Leviticus13:17 kabona yairamu okumwekebeedha. Aghaali omubiri ogwesazesaze bwe ghanaabanga nga weeruukiriire, oyo nga mulongoofu, era kabona anaamulangiriranga ati mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:18 “Omuntu bw'anaabanga n'okubutukabutuka ni kuwona," 
Leviticus13:19 aye aghabaire okubutukabutuka okwo ni ghairagho obuzimbu obweruukirivu oba ni ghamwaguka ebintu ebimyukirivu, omuntu oyo anaajanga eri kabona." 
Leviticus13:20 Kabona anaamwekebeedhanga. Era bwe kinaabonekanga ng'ebintu ebyo ebimumwagwikeku byesimye mu mubiri, n'obuviiri bwagho nga bweruukiriire, kabona anaamulangiriranga ati tiimulongoofu, eyo n'endwaire ey'ebigenge efulumiire mu kubutukabutuka." 
Leviticus13:21 Aye kabona bw'aneekebeedhanga aghalwaire, n'abona ng'obuviiri bwagho tibweruukiriire, era nga tigheeyongeire kwesima mu mubiri aye nga ghakendeire, olwo kabona anaamukuumiranga mu kifo yenka okumala enaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:22 Ebintu ebyo ebimumwagwikeku bwe binaabunanga ku mubiri gwe, olwo kabona anaamulangiriranga ati tiimulongoofu, mulwaire." 
Leviticus13:23 Aye bwebinaakomanga agho ni bitasansaana ku mubiri, eyo nga n'enkovu ey'okubutukabutuka okuwonie. Agho kabona anaamulangiriranga ati mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:24 “Omuntu bw'anaayokebwanga omuliro, ni ghaidhagho omubiri ogwesazesaze ni gweruukirira, oba ni ghafuuka agheeru era nga ghamyukirivu," 
Leviticus13:25 kabona anaamwekebeedhanga. Obuviiri mu kifo ekyo bwe bunaayeruukiriranga era ni kiboneka nga gheesimye mu mubiri, eyo nga n'endwaire ey'ebigenge efulumiire aghaayokebwa. Kabona anaamulangiriranga ati tiimulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:26 Aye kabona bw'aneekebeedhanga aghalwaire, n'abona ng'obuviiri bwagho tibweruukiriire era nga tigheeyongeire kwesima mu mubiri, aye nga ghakendeire, olwo kabona anaamukuumiranga mu kifo yenka, okumala enaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:27 Kabona anairangamu okumwekebeedha ku lunaku olwomusanvu. Era bwe ghanaabanga nga gheeyongeire okusansaana ku mubiri, anaamulangiriranga ati tiimulongoofu, eyo n'endwaire ey'ebigenge." 
Leviticus13:28 Aye aghalwaire bwe ghanaakomanga agho, ni ghatasansaana ku mubiri era nga ghatooleire okuwona, eyo nga ti n'endwaire ey'ebigenge. Era kabona anaamulangiriranga ati mulongoofu, kuba eyo nkovu bukovu ya muliro." 
Leviticus13:29 “Omusaadha oba omukazi bw'anaabanga n'obulwaire ku mutwe oba ku kalevu," 
Leviticus13:30 kabona anaabwekebeedhanga. Bwe bunaabonekanga nga bwesimye mu mubiri, era ng'enviiri edhirimu dhengereire era nga ntaagataaga, kabona anaamulangiriranga ati ti mulongoofu; olwo lukuku, endwaire ey'ebigenge ey'oku mutwe oba ey'oku kalevu." 
Leviticus13:31 Era kabona bw'aneekebeedhanga obulwaire obwo, n'abona nga tibwesimye mu mubiri, aye ate ng'enviiri edhirigho ti nnamu, anaakuumiranga omulwaire oyo mu kifo yenka, okumala enaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:32 Kabona anairangamu okumwekebeedha ku lunaku olwomusanvu. Era obulwaire bwe bunaabanga nga tibweyongeire kusansaana ku mubiri, nga n'enviiri dhaagho tidhengereire, era nga tibuboneka kuba nga bwesimye mu mubiri," 
Leviticus13:33 omulwaire anaamwangaku enviiri okutoolaku agho aghalwaire, olwo kabona yaamukuumira mu kifo yenka okumala enaku edhindi musanvu." 
Leviticus13:34 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu kabona anairangamu kabiri okwekebeedha aghalwaire. Obulwaire bwe bunaabanga nga tibweyongeire kusansaana ku mubiri, era nga tibuboneka kuba nga bwesimye mu mubiri, anaamulangiriranga ati mulongoofu. Omulwaire anaayozanga ebivaalo bye, yaaba mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:35 Aye obulwaire bwe bunaasansaananga ku mubiri ng'omulwaire amaze okulangirirwa ati mulongoofu," 
Leviticus13:36 agho kabona anaamwekebeedhanga kabiri. Bwe bunaabanga nga busansaine ku mubiri, kabona oyo tiyeetaagenga kunoonia nviiri dhengereire. Bwenebwene oyo anaabanga nga tiimulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:37 Aye kabona bw'anaabonanga ng'obulwaire bukomye agho era ng'enviiri endhirugavu dhimezeegho, olwo ng'obulwaire buwonie, era anaamulangiriranga ati mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:38 “Omusaadha oba omukazi bw'anaabanga n'okubutukabutuka okwengereire ku mubiri," 
Leviticus13:39 kabona anaamwekebeedhanga. Okubutukabutuka okwo bwe kunaabanga nga tikwa maani, ekyo kinaabanga kimyamya bumyamya nga kifulwime mu mubiri; oyo anaabanga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:40 “Omusaadha bw'anaakuunhuukanga enviiri ku mutwe mu kawompo oba ku mutwe emberi, oyo anaabanga wa mpaata era nga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus13:41  
Leviticus13:42 Aye ekipaapi ekimyukiriire era ekyeruukiriire bwe kinaabonekanga aghakuunhwike enviiri, eyo nga n'endwaire ey'ebigenge." 
Leviticus13:43 Kabona anaamwekebeedhanga, era bw'anaamubonangaku obuzimbu obumyukiriire era obweruukiriire," 
Leviticus13:44 anaamulangiriranga ati tiimulongoofu, olw'endwaire eyo ey'ebigenge eri ku mutwe gwe." 
Leviticus13:45 “Omuntu alwaire ebigenge, anaavaalanga ngoye nkanufu, yaalekanga n'enviiri dhe nga ti nsunsule okwoleka enaku ye. Era anaaghembanga ku mutwe gwe, yaalangiriranga ati: ‘Tiri mulongoofu, tiri mulongoofu!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Taabenga mulongoofu ekiseera kyonakyona ky'anaamalanga ng'akaali mulwaire. Taabenga ghalala na bantu batali balwaire. 
Leviticus13:47 “Endwaire ey'ebigenge bw'enaabanga mu kivaalo, ka kibe nga kyakolebwa mu buviiri bwa ntaama oba nga kya lugoye lughegheevu," 
Leviticus13:48 oba n'eba mu kighero kyonakyona eky'olugoye olughegheevu oba ekyakolebwa mu buviiri bw'entaama, oba ku luwu, oba ku kintu ekyakolebwa mu luwu," 
Leviticus13:49 era endwaire eyo n'eba eya kiragalalagala oba emyukirivu, mu kivaalo oba ku luwu oba ku kintu ekyakolebwa mu luwu, enaalagibwanga kabona." 
Leviticus13:50 Kabona anaagyekebeedhanga, yaakuumira ekintu ekyo aghantu okumala enaku musanvu." 
Leviticus13:51 Anairangamu okwekebeedha endwaire eyo ku lunaku olwomusanvu. Bw'enaabanga ng'esansaine, ekintu ekyo kinaabanga nga tiikirongoofu." 
Leviticus13:52 Kabona anaakyokyanga, kuba eyo n'endwaire ey'ebigenge. Eteekwa okuzikirizibwa." 
Leviticus13:53 “Aye kabona bw'aneekebeedhanga n'abona ng'endwaire tesansaine mu kintu ekyo," 
Leviticus13:54 anaalagiranga baakyoza, era kyaterekebwa okumala enaku edhindi musanvu." 
Leviticus13:55 Agho kabona anaakyekebeedhanga kabiri. Endwaire bw'enaabanga nga tekyusiiza langi yaayo, waire nga tesansaine mu kintu ekyo, ekintu ekyo era tikiibenga kirongoofu. Kinaayokebwanga, ka kibe ng'obukuku buli munda oba ku ngulu." 
Leviticus13:56 Aye kabona bw'anairangamu okukyekebeedha n'abona ng'endwaire ekendeire, anaakanulangagho ekipaapi ekyo endwaire ky'erimu mu kivaalo oba mu luwu." 
Leviticus13:57 Endwaire bw'enairangamu okuboneka, olwo enaabanga ng'eri kusansaana kabiri, era ekintu ekyo kinaayokebwanga." 
Leviticus13:58 Aye bw'anaakyozanga ekimyamya ni kiwaamu, anairangamu okukyoza kabiri era kyabalibwa nga kirongoofu.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Ago n'amateeka agagema ku ndwaire ey'ebigenge ng'eri mu kivaalo, ka kibe nga kyakolebwa mu buviiri bwa ntaama oba kya lugoye lughegheevu, oba mu kintu kyonakyona ekyakolebwa mu luwu. Amateeka ago n'aganaakozesebwanga okusalagho ekirongoofu n'ekitali kirongoofu." 
Leviticus14:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus14:2 “Gano n'amateeka agagema ku kutukuzibwa kw'omuntu awonie endwaire ey'ebigenge. Ku lunaku lw'aja okulangirirwaku ati mulongoofu, anaaleetebwanga eri kabona." 
Leviticus14:3 Kabona oyo anaavanga mu kifo aghali weema edh'abantu abatali balwaire, yaaja yaamwekebeedha. Endwaire bw'enaabanga ng'ewonie," 
Leviticus14:4 kabona oyo aidha kulagiranga okuleeta enhonhi ibiri enamu era enongoofu, n'omuti oguwunha akawoowo, n'oluwuuzi olw'olugoye olw'erangi ya kasaayisaayi, n'akati akeetebwa hissopu." 
Leviticus14:5 Agho kabona aidha kulagiranga okwitira eyindi ku nhonhi edho, mu kibya eky'eitosi omuli amaadhi agaviire mu nsulo edhikuuluula." 
Leviticus14:6 Aidha kutoolanga enhonhi esigairegho enamu ghalala n'omuti gule oguwunha akawoowo, n'oluwuuzi lule olw'olugoye lw'erangi ya kasaayisaayi, n'akati kale akeetebwa hissopu, byonabyona yaabiinhika mu musaayi gw'enhoni eitiibwa." 
Leviticus14:7 “Aidha kumansiranga omusaayi ogwo emikuzi musanvu ku oyo aja okutukuzibwaku endwaire eyo ey'ebigenge, memale yaamulangirira ati mulongoofu. Era anaalekulanga enhonhi enamu eyo, yaaja ng'egulukira mu ibbanga." 
Leviticus14:8 Omuntu oyo aja okutukuzibwa anaayozanga ebivaalo bye, yaamwaku enviiri dhoonadhoona, yaanaaba, olwo yaabalibwa nga mulongoofu, memale yaaja eri weema edh'abatali balwaire. Aye anaamalanga enaku musanvu ng'ali ku luya lwa weema ye." 
Leviticus14:9 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu kabiri anaamwangaku enviiri dhoonadhoona, n'ekirevu, n'ebisige, n'obuviiri bwonabwona ku mubiri. Era anaayozanga ebivaalo bye, yaanaaba omubiri, olwo yaabalibwa nga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:10 “Ku lunaku olwomunaana anaaleetanga entaama ento enume ibiri, n'entaama enduusi ndala ey'omwaka omulala, dhoonadhoona nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona. Era anaaleetanga kilo isatu edh'obuwunga bw'engaano obuseereibwa obukalamu, nga butabwirwamu omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva. Era yaaleeta ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu ebya lita ey'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva." 
Leviticus14:11 Kabona aidha kutwalanga omuntu oyo n'ebintu ebyo emberi w'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. 
Leviticus14:12 Agho kabona anaatoolanga eyindi ku ntaama edho enume ento, ghalala n'ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu ebya lita ey'omuzigo ogw'emiti emyoliva, yaabighaayo ng'omutango, yaabiwuuba, bibe ekigheebwayo nga kiwuubibwa mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus14:13 Agho anaitiranga entaama eyo ento mu kifo ekitukuvu aghaitirwa ensolo dhe baghaayo ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'edho dhe baghaayo ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Anaakolanga atyo, kuba ekigheebwayo ng'omutango kiba kya kabona ng'oti n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi bwe kiba, era kitukuvu inho." 
Leviticus14:14 “Kabona anaatoolanga ku musaayi ogw'ekigheebwayo ng'omutango, yaagusiiga ku ntobo ya kutu ow'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku kyala ekisaadha, ni ku kigere ekisaadha eky'oku mugulu omusaadha, ogw'oyo aja okulangirirwa ng'omulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:15 Kabona anaatoolanga ku muzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, yaagufuka mu ngalo dhe dheene edh'oku mukono omugooda," 
Leviticus14:16 yainhika olwala lwe olw'oku mukono omusaadha mu muzigo ogwo oguli mu ngalo dhe edh'oku mugooda, yaagumansira emikuzi musanvu agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus14:17 Anaatoolanga ku muzigo ogunaabanga nga gusigairegho mu ngalo dhe, ni ku musaayi ogw'ekigheebwayo ng'omutango, yaagusiiga ku ntobo ya kutu ow'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku kyala ekisaadha eky'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku kigere ekisaadha eky'oku mugulu omusaadha, ogw'oyo aja okulangirirwa nga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:18 Omuzigo ogunaabanga nga gusigaire mu ngalo dhe, anaagusiiganga ku mutwe gw'oyo aja okulangirirwa nga mulongoofu. Agho kabona oyo anaaghangayo omusengo olw'okutukuza omuntu oyo, mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus14:19 “Kabona anaaghangayo ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, ng'omusengo olw'oyo aja okutoolebwaku obutali bulongoofu. Ekyo nga kiwoire, anaitanga ensolo ey'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa," 
Leviticus14:20 yaakighaayo ku alutaari ghalala n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke. Mu nsambo eyo kabona anaaghangayo omusengo olw'omuntu oyo, era omuntu oyo yaaba mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:21 “Aye bw'anaabanga omwavu atasobola kufuna byaga agho, anaaleetanga entaama ento enume, ebe ekigheebwayo ng'omutango. Enaabanga ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga kiwuubibwa, ekiba ekya kabona. Anaaleetanga kilo ndala ey'obuwunga obw'engaano, obutabwirwamu omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, era yaaleeta ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu ebya lita ey'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva." 
Leviticus14:22 Era aidha kuleetanga enjiibwa ibiri, oba amaghemba amato abiri nga bw'anaabanga ng'aghanze. Eighemba erindi linaabanga ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'erindi ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus14:23 Ku lunaku olwomunaana anaabireetanga eri kabona olw'okutukuzibwa kwe mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus14:24 “Kabona anaatoolanga entaama ento ey'ekigheebwayo ng'omutango, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, yaabighaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ng'abiwuuba, bibe ekigheebwayo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus14:25 Anaitanga entaama ento eyo, yaatoola ku musaayi gwayo yaagusiiga ku ntobo ya kutu ow'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku kyala ekisaadha eky'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku kigere ekisaadha eky'oku mugulu omusaadha ogw'oyo aja okulangirirwa nga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:26 Agho kabona anaafukanga ku muzigo mu ngalo dhe dheene edh'oku mukono omugooda," 
Leviticus14:27 yaagumansira n'olwala lwe olw'oku mukono omusaadha emikuzi musanvu agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. 
Leviticus14:28 Anaatoolanga ku muzigo ogwo, yaagusiiga ku ntobo ya kutu ow'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku kyala ekisaadha eky'oku mukono omusaadha, ni ku kigere ekisaadha eky'oku mugulu omusaadha, ogw'oyo aja okulangirirwa nga mulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:29 Omuzigo ogunaabanga nga gusigaire mu ngalo dhe, anaagusiiganga ku mutwe gw'oyo aja okulangirirwa nga mulongoofu. Mu nsambo eyo kabona oyo anaaghangayo omusengo olw'okutukuza omuntu oyo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus14:30 Agho anaaghangayo eyindi ku njiibwa, oba erindi ku maghemba amato, ng'ole bw'anaabanga ng'asoboire okufuna," 
Leviticus14:31 ebyo bibe ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'ekindi ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Mu nsambo eyo kabona anaaghangayo omusengo olw'oyo aja okulangirirwa ng'omulongoofu." 
Leviticus14:32 Ago n'amateeka agagema ku oyo ali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge ataghanga kufuna bigheebwayo ebyabuliidho olw'okutukuzibwa kwe.” 
Leviticus14:33 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ni Aaroni ati: 
Leviticus14:34 “Bwe muliba nga mutuuse mu nsi Kanaani ye mbagha okuba obutaka bwaimwe, memale ni nta endwaire ey'ebigenge mu ndhu ey'omuntu mu nsi eyo," 
Leviticus14:35 mwene ndhu eyo anaajanga yaakobera kabona nga bw'aboneka okuba ng'ali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge mu ndhu ye. 
Leviticus14:36 Kabona ng'akaali kwingira okwekebeedha endwaire embi eyo, anaalagiranga okufulumya buli kintu mu ndhu eyo, birobe kufuuka ebitali birongoofu. Olwo kabona anaingiranga endhu," 
Leviticus14:37 okwekebeedha endwaire embi eyo. Bwe ghanaabangagho ebitundu ebya kiragalalagala oba ebimyukirivu, ebiboneka nga biri kusima ekimante," 
Leviticus14:38 kabona anaavanga mu ndhu eyo, yaagiigala okumala enaku musanvu." 
Leviticus14:39 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu anairanga kabiri yaagyekebeedha. Endwaire bw'enaabanga ng'esansaine," 
Leviticus14:40 anaalagiranga okutoolamu ebifo ebyo ebirimu endwaire, n'okusuula ebyo ebitooleibwamu ku luya w'ekibuga mu kifo aghasuulibwa ebitali birongoofu." 
Leviticus14:41 Era anaalagiranga baakalakata endhu eyo ku bimante munda mwayo mwonamwona, era ebimunku ebikalakatiibwa byasuulibwa ku luya w'ekibuga, mu kifo aghasuulibwa ebitali birongoofu." 
Leviticus14:42 Olwo banaatoolanga amabaale, baagazimba mu bifo bire ebitooleibwamu, era baatoola seminti owundi baakuba ku bimante." 
Leviticus14:43 “Agho endwaire bw'enairangamu okusisiitula endhu eyo ng'ebifo bire bimaze okutoolebwamu era nga n'ebimante bikalakatiibwa era byakubwaku seminti," 
Leviticus14:44 kabona anaingiranga yaagyekebeedha kabiri. Endwaire eyo bw'enaabanga ng'esansaine, eyo nga n'endwaire ey'ebigenge erya endhu, era endhu eyo teebenga nongoofu." 
Leviticus14:45 Enaamenhebwangagho, era amabaale gaayo n'embaawo, n'ebimunku byayo byonabyona, binaatwalibwanga ku luya w'ekibuga mu kifo aghasuulibwa ebitali birongoofu." 
Leviticus14:46 Kiisi anaingiranga mu ndhu eyo nga kabona agiigaire, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus14:47 Era kiisi anaalambaalanga mu ndhu eyo, oba anaaliirangamu, anaayozanga ebivaalo bye." 
Leviticus14:48 “Aye kabona bw'anaingiranga n'abona ng'endwaire teizeemu kuboneka mu ndhu eyo ng'emaze okwiramu okukubwa ni seminti ku bimante, anaagirangiriranga ati nongoofu, kuba endwaire ewonie." 
Leviticus14:49 Okutukuza endhu, kabona aidha kukozesanga enhonhi ibiri, n'omuti oguwunha akawoowo, n'oluwuuzi olw'olugoye olw'erangi ya kasaayisaayi, n'akati akeetebwa hissopu." 
Leviticus14:50 Aidha kwitiranga eyindi ku nhonhi edho, mu kibya eky'eitosi omuli amaadhi agaviire mu nsulo edhikuuluula." 
Leviticus14:51 Aidha kutoolanga omuti oguwunha akawoowo, n'akati akeetebwa hissopu, n'enhonhi esigairegho enamu, byonabyona yaabiinhika mu musaayi gw'enhonhi eitiibwa, ni mu maadhi agaviire mu nsulo edhikuuluula, yaamansira endhu eyo emikuzi musanvu." 
Leviticus14:52 Atyo bw'anaatukuzanga endhu eyo, ng'akozesa omusaayi gw'enhonhi, n'amaadhi agaviire mu nsulo edhikuuluula, n'omuti oguwunha akawoowo, n'akati akeetebwa hissopu, era n'oluwuuzi olw'olugoye olw'erangi ya kasaayisaayi." 
Leviticus14:53 Anaalekanga enhonhi ere enamu, yaaja ng'egulukira mu ibbanga okuva mu kibuga. Mu nsambo eyo anaatukuzanga endhu eyo yaaba nongoofu.”" 
Leviticus14:54 “Ago n'amateeka agagema ku ndwaire dhoonadhoona edh'ebigenge: 
Leviticus14:55 obuzimbu, okubutukabutuka n'ebintu okumwaguka ku mubiri. Era amateeka geene ago n'agagema ni ku ndwaire edh'ebigenge edhiba mu ngoye era ni mu ndhu." 
Leviticus14:56  
Leviticus14:57 Ago n'aganaakozesebwanga okusalagho ekirongoofu n'ekitali kirongoofu.” 
Leviticus15:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ni Aaroni ati: 
Leviticus15:2 “Kobera Abaisiraeli oti buli musaadha anaatoonhanga okuva mu bitundu bye eby'ekyama olw'obulwaire, taabenga mulongoofu," 
Leviticus15:3 k'abe ng'akaatoonha oba ng'azibikiire olw'obulwaire obwo. 
Leviticus15:4 Buli buliri bw'anaalambaalangaku, na buli kintu ky'anaatyamangaku, tibiibenga birongoofu." 
Leviticus15:5 Era kiisi anaagemanga ku buliri obw'ow'obulwaire obwo, anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye era yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi, era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:6 N'oyo anaatyamanga ku kintu ow'obulwaire obwo ky'abaire atyaimeku, anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye era yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi, aye era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:7 Era n'oyo anaagemanga ku w'obulwaire obwo anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye era yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi, aye era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:8 Ow'obulwaire obwo bw'anaafuudhanga amatanta ku muntu omulongoofu, omuntu oyo anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye era yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi, aye era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:9 Ekintu ekityamibwaku ku nsolo ali n'obulwaire obwo ky'anaatyamangaku tikiibenga kirongoofu. 
Leviticus15:10 Kiisi anaagemanga ku kintu ow'obulwaire obwo ky'abaire atyaimeku, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa eigulo. Era n'oyo anaakibbeedanga anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye era yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi, aye era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:11 Ow'obulwaire obwo bw'anaagemanga ku muntu nga tamaze kunaaba mu ngalo, ole ye bagemyeku anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye era yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi, aye era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:12 Ekintu eky'eitosi ow'obulwaire obwo ky'anaagemangaku, kinaamenhebwanga. Na buli kintu kya muti ky'anaagemangaku, kinaanaazibwanga mu maadhi." 
Leviticus15:13 “Ow'obulwaire obwo bw'anaawonanga obulwaire obwo, anaateegangaku enaku musanvu okwetukuza, memale yaayoza ebivaalo bye era yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi agaviire mu nsulo edhikuuluula, olwo yaaba mulongoofu." 
Leviticus15:14 Ku lunaku olwomunaana aidha kutwalanga enjiibwa ibiri oba amaghemba amato abiri, ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, yaabigha kabona." 
Leviticus15:15 Kabona anaabighangayo olw'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'olw'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Mu nsambo eyo kabona anaabighangayo ng'omusengo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, olw'okutukuzibwa okw'omuntu oyo." 
Leviticus15:16 “Omusaadha bw'anaavangamu amaadhi ag'obusaadha, anaabanga n'okunaaba omubiri gwonagwona mu maadhi, aye era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:17 Buli kintu kya lugoye oba kya luwu, amaadhi ag'obusaadha ago kwe ganaatoonhanga kinaabanga n'okwozebwa, aye era kyasigala nga tiikirongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:18 Era omusaadha bw'anaabanga ng'abaire n'omukazi bombi banaabanga n'okunaaba omubiri mu maadhi, aye era baasigala nga tiibalongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:19 “Omukazi bw'anaabanga ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'okulwala, anaamalanga enaku musanvu nga tiimulongoofu. Era kiisi anaamugemangaku, taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:20 Na buli kintu ky'anaalambalangaku, oba ky'anaatyamangaku ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'okulwala, tikiibenga kirongoofu." 
Leviticus15:21 Kiisi anaagemanga ku buliri obw'omukazi oyo oba ku kintu kyonakyona ky'abaire atyaimeku, anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye era yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi, aye era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:22  
Leviticus15:23  
Leviticus15:24 Omusaadha anaabanga naye ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'okulwala, yeena taabenga mulongoofu okumala enaku musanvu, era buli buliri omusaadha oyo bw'anaalambaalangaku tibuubenga bulongoofu." 
Leviticus15:25 “Omukazi bw'anaavanga omusaayi okumala enaku kamaala nga ti n'ebiseera bye eby'okulwala, anaasigalanga nga tiimulongoofu. Era bw'anaabisangamu mu biseera by'amala buliidho ng'alwaire, anaasigalanga nga tiimulongoofu enaku dhoonadhoona dh'anaamalanga ng'ali kuva omusaayi." 
Leviticus15:26 Buli buliri bw'anaalambaalangaku, na buli kintu ky'anaatyamangaku mu kiseera ekyo, tibiibenga birongoofu." 
Leviticus15:27 Na kiisi muntu anaagemanga ku bintu ebyo taabenga mulongoofu, anaabanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye era yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi, aye era yaasigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus15:28 Omukazi oyo bw'anaalekeranga okuva omusaayi, anaateeganga ghaabitagho enaku musanvu, memale yaaba omulongoofu." 
Leviticus15:29 Ku lunaku olwomunaana, aidha kutwalanga enjiibwa ibiri oba amaghemba amato abiri, eri kabona ku mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus15:30 Kabona anaabighangayo olw'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'olw'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Mu nsambo eyo kabona anaabighangayo ng'omusengo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, olw'okutukuzibwa okw'omukazi oyo.”" 
Leviticus15:31 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni ati: “Kale ni mutyo bwe munaalabulanga Abaisiraeli ku butali bulongoofu bwaibwe, balobe kufa olw'okwonoona Eweema yange ebalimu ghagati.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Ago n'amateeka agagema ku musaadha anaatoonhanga okuva mu bitundu bye eby'ekyama, oba anaavangamu amaadhi ag'obusaadha." 
Leviticus15:33 Era amateeka geene ago n'agagema ni ku mukazi ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'okulwala, era ni ku musaadha aba n'omukazi atali mulongoofu." 
Leviticus16:1 Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ni Musa, nga Aaroni amaze okufiirwa batabane be ababiri, bwe baaseeta mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda mu nsambo etaasiimya Musengwa Katonda oyo eyamala n'abaita." 
Leviticus16:2 Yaakoba ati: “Koba Aaroni muganda wo, alobe kumalanga gaja buli gh'ayendeire munda gh'olutimbe mu Kifo Ekitukuvu gha kisandikiza eky'Esanduuku y'Endagaano. Olwo alobe kufa, kuba ndidha kubonekeranga mu kire ghaigulu gh'ekisandikiza ekyo." 
Leviticus16:3 Aye anaingiranga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu ng'ali n'ente enume entototo ey'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'entaama enume ey'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus16:4 Anaamalanga kunaaba mubiri mu maadhi, yaavaala ebivaalo ebitukuvu eby'engoye empegheevu: ekanzu empale, olusibiro, n'ekitambaala ku mutwe." 
Leviticus16:5 “Abantu Abaisiraeli banaaghanga Aaroni embuzi enume ibiri edh'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'entaama enume ndala ey'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus16:6 Aaroni oyo aidha kughangayo ente enume eyiye ku bubwe ey'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, olwa mwene n'olw'ab'endhu ye okutoolebwaku ebibi." 
Leviticus16:7 Agho anaatwalanga embuzi dhombi ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda," 
Leviticus16:8 yaadhikubiraku akalulu okulondagho enaaba eya Musengwa Katonda, n'enaaba eya Azazeli." 
Leviticus16:9 Aaroni anaaghangayo embuzi akalulu ye kagwireku okuba eya Musengwa Katonda, yaagiita ebe ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Leviticus16:10 Aye embuzi akalulu ye kagwireku okuba eya Azazeli, enaateebwanga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda nga nnamu, memale yaasindiikirizibwa eri Azazeli oyo mu irungu olw'okutoola ku bantu ebibi." 
Leviticus16:11 “Aaroni bw'anaaghangayo ente enume eyiye ku bubwe ey'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, olwa mwene n'olw'ab'endhu ye okutoolebwaku ebibi," 
Leviticus16:12 anaatoolanga ekiniokezebwaku obubbaani ekiidhwire amanda ag'omuliro g'atoire ku alutaari mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, n'emiganda ebiri egy'obubbaani obw'akawoowo obusekwirwa einho, yaabireeta munda mw'olutimbe." 
Leviticus16:13 Agho anaatanga obubbaani ku muliro mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, omwosi ogw'obubbaani gwaghemba ekisandikiza eky'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano yaaloba kukibona, olwo alobe kufa." 
Leviticus16:14 Anaatoolanga ku musaayi gw'ente enume, yaagumansira n'olwala lwe ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba olw'ekisandikiza eky'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, era yaagumansira mu maiso g'esanduuku eyo emikuzi musanvu." 
Leviticus16:15 “Agho anaitanga embuzi ey'abantu ey'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, yaatwala omusaayi gwayo munda mw'olutimbe, yaagumansira ku kisandikiza eky'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, ni mu maiso ag'esanduuku eyo, nga bw'akola ku musaayi gw'ente enume." 
Leviticus16:16 Mu nsambo eyo aidha kughangayo omusengo olw'Ekifo Ekitukuvu, okukitoolaku obutali bulongoofu obw'Abaisiraeli, n'ensobi dhaibwe, n'ebibi byaibwe byonabyona. Era atyo bw'aidhanga okukola ni ku Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda eba ghagati mu bantu abo abatali balongoofu." 
Leviticus16:17 Mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda timwidha kubangamu muntu yeenayeena, okuva Aaroni lw'anaingiranga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu okukola omukolo ogw'okutukuza, okutuusa lw'anaafulumanga ng'amaze okukola omukolo ogwo ku lulwe, ni ku lw'ab'endhu ye, ni ku lw'Abaisiraeli boonaboona." 
Leviticus16:18 Olwo anaafulumanga yaaja ku alutaari eri mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, yaakola omukolo ogw'okutukuza ku lwayo. Yaatoola ku musaayi gw'ente enume, ni ku gw'embuzi, yaagusiiga ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari eyo, ku nsonda dhaayo dhoonadhoona." 
Leviticus16:19 Yaagimansira omusaayi n'olwala lwe emikuzi musanvu, yaagirongoosa okugitoolaku obutali bulongoofu obw'Abaisiraeli, ng'agitukuza." 
Leviticus16:20 “Aaroni bw'anaamalirizanga okukola omukolo ogw'okutukuza Ekifo Ekitukuvu n'Eweema yoonayoona ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, ni alutaari, anaatwalanga ye Musengwa Katonda embuzi ere enamu." 
Leviticus16:21 Anaatanga emikono gye gyombi ku mutwe gw'embuzi eyo enamu, yaalaamiriza ng'ayatula ebyonoono n'ebibi eby'Abaisiraeli n'obudheemu bwonabwona yaabisindika ku mutwe gwayo, olwo yaagisindiikiriza mu irungu ng'etwalibwa omuntu eyategekebwa okukola ekyo." 
Leviticus16:22 Embuzi eyo n'enaatwalanga ebibi byaibwe byonabyona, yaaja nabyo mu nsi eziramu bantu. Oyo agitwala anaagirekuliranga eyo mu irungu." 
Leviticus16:23 “Agho Aaroni aidha kwingiranga mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, atoolemu ebivaalo ebighegheevu bye yavaire ng'aingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, era abireke omwo." 
Leviticus16:24 Anaanaabiranga omubiri mu Kifo Ekitukuvu ekyo, yaavaala ebivaalo bye ebyabuliidho, yaafuluma, yaaghaayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekikye, n'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa eky'abantu, olw'okutoolagho ebibi ebibye n'eby'abantu boonaboona." 
Leviticus16:25 Amasavu ag'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi anaagookeranga ku alutaari. 
Leviticus16:26 Oyo asindiikiriza embuzi mu irungu eri Azazeli, anaayozanga ebivaalo bye era yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi, memale yaira mu kifo omuba abantu." 
Leviticus16:27 Ente enume n'embuzi edh'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, dheene musaayi ogwingizibwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu olw'okukola omukolo ogw'okutukuza, dhinaafulumizibwanga ku luya dhaatwalibwa mu kifo omutaba bantu, dhaayokebwa. Amawu, emamba n'ebyenda byadho, binaayokebwanga." 
Leviticus16:28 Oyo abyokya anaayozanga ebivaalo bye, yaanaaba omubiri mu maadhi, memale yaira mu kifo omuba abantu." 
Leviticus16:29 “Eiteeka lino munaalikuumanga enaku dhoonadhoona: Ku lunaku olweikumi olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu, Abaisiraeli n'abasenze abaabasengamu, baneebonerezanga era tibaakolenga mulimo waire omulala." 
Leviticus16:30 Ku lunaku olwo ghanaakolebwangagho omukolo olwa imwe okutukuzibwa, mutoolebweku ebibi byaimwe byonabyona, mube balongoofu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus16:31 Olwo lunaabanga lunaku lutukuvu lwa kuwuumulira irala, era muneebonerezanga. Eiteeka eryo linaakuumibwanga enaku dhoonadhoona." 
Leviticus16:32 Kabona eyasiigibwa omuzigo n'ayawulibwa okuba kabona mu kifo kya ise, n'anaakolanga omukolo ogw'okutukuza ng'avaire ebivaalo ebighegheevu ebitukuvu." 
Leviticus16:33 Aidha kukolanga omukolo ogw'okutukuza ekifo Ekitukuvu, n'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, n'alutaari, era ni bakabona, n'abantu boonaboona." 
Leviticus16:34 Eiteeka eryo munaalikuumanga enaku dhoonadhoona, nga mutaagho omukolo ogw'okutukuza, omukuzi mulala buli mwaka, olw'okutoola ku Baisiraeli ebibi byaibwe.” Musa yaakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Leviticus17:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus17:2 “Koba Aaroni ni batabane be, n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona oti, ‘Kino Musengwa Katonda ky'alagiire:" 
Leviticus17:3 Omuisiraeli anaitiranga aghantu aghandi ente oba entaama oba embuzi," 
Leviticus17:4 n'atagireeta ku mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda okugighaayo ng'ekigheebwayo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, anaavunaanibwanga omusango ogw'okuyugha omusaayi. Era anaabanga nga takaabalirwa mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus17:5 Ekinuyirirwa mu iteeka lino, n'Abaisiraeli okuleetanga eri Musengwa Katonda ensolo dhaibwe dhe babaire baitiranga mu nsiko eyo, badhireetenga eri kabona, badhiite, dhibe emisengo egigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda olw'okutabagana." 
Leviticus17:6 Agho kabona aidha kumansiranga omusaayi ku alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda, ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, era yaayokya amasavu, gaavaamu akawoowo akasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus17:7 Kale Abaisiraeli tibaidha kwongeranga kuba batali beesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda, nga baghaayo emisengo gyaibwe eri emisambwa egiri ng'oti mbuzi. Eiteeka eryo banaalikuumanga enaku dhoonadhoona.’" 
Leviticus17:8 “Era bakobe oti, ‘Omuisiraeli oba omusenze yeenayeena eyasenga mu Isiraeli, bw'anaaghangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa oba omusengo," 
Leviticus17:9 n'atakireeta ku mulyango gw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda okukighaayo eri Musengwa Katonda, anaabanga nga takaabalirwa mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda.’" 
Leviticus17:10 “Omuisiraeli oba omusenze yeenayeena eyasenga mu Isiraeli bw'anaalyanga ku musaayi, ndidha kumukyaghanga era mbenga nga tikaamubalira mu bantu bange." 
Leviticus17:11 Obulamu bwa buli kintu ekiri n'omubiri buba mu musaayi. Eyo n'ensonga lwaki nabalagira okugufukanga ku alutaari olw'okutoola ku bantu ebibi byaibwe. Omusaayi, n'obulamu, era n'ogutoolagho ebibi." 
Leviticus17:12 Kye nviire ni nkoba Abaisiraeli nti, Ghatabangagho waire omulala ku imwe alya omusaayi, era n'omusenze eyabasengamu yeena atalyanga musaayi." 
Leviticus17:13 “Omuisiraeli oba omusenze yeenayeena eyasenga mu Isiraeli, bw'anaayiiganga ensolo oba enhonhi eikirizibwa okuliibwa, anaafukanga omusaayi gwayo yaagughembaku eitaka." 
Leviticus17:14 Kuba obulamu bwa buli kintu ekiri n'omubiri, buba mu musaayi. Kye nviire ni nkoba Abaisiraeli nti, ‘Mutalyanga ku musaayi gwa kintu waire ekirala ekiri n'omubiri, kuba obulamu bwakyo, n'omusaayi gwakyo. Kiisi anaagulyangaku, nnaabanga nga tikaamubalira mu bantu bange.’" 
Leviticus17:15 “Buli muntu k'abe Omuisiraeli oba omusenze, bw'anaalyanga ensolo efiire yeene oba eitiibwa ensolo edh'omu nsiko, aidha kubanga n'okwoza ebivaalo bye era n'okunaaba omubiri mu maadhi. Aye era aidha kusigalanga nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo." 
Leviticus17:16 Bw'ataayozenga bivaalo bye era n'atanaabanga mubiri, aidha kubonerezebwanga.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus18:2 “Kobera Abaisiraeli oti: Ninze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus18:3 Muteebisanga ng'abantu ab'e Misiri ye mwabanga, oba ng'abantu ab'omu nsi Kanaani, ye ndi kubatwala. Mutajiiranga ku mpisa dhaibwe." 
Leviticus18:4 Mugonderenga amateeka gange, era mukolenga bye mbalagira. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus18:5 Agho ni mugemenga amateeka n'ebiragiro bye mbagha. Anaabituukirizanga, anaabanga mulamu. Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus18:6 “Ghatabangagho ku imwe aseeta eri muntu amuliku luganda n'aba naye mu buliri. Ninze Musengwa Katonda. 
Leviticus18:7 Otawemulanga lata wo ng'oba n'inhoko mu buliri. Oyo ni inhoko, otamuwemulanga." 
Leviticus18:8 Otawemulanga lata wo ng'oba n'owundi ku bakazi be mu buliri. 
Leviticus18:9 Otabanga na mwanhoko mu buliri, waire mwanhoko ku lata wo ow'omukazi owundi, oba mwanhoko ku inhoko ow'omusaadha owundi, k'abe nga yakulira ghalala n'iwe ghaka, oba nga yakulira ghandi." 
Leviticus18:10 Otabanga na mwana wa mutabane wo mu buliri, oba owa mughala wo, kuba agho oba oghemwike." 
Leviticus18:11 Otabanga na mughala wa muka lata wo mu buliri, kuba yeena mwanhoko." 
Leviticus18:12 Otabanga na songa wo mu buliri, kuba mwanhina lata wo." 
Leviticus18:13 Otabanga na muganda wa inhoko, mu buliri, kuba yeena inhoko." 
Leviticus18:14 Otabanga na muka muganda wa lata wo mu buliri. Oyo yeena aba inhoko. 
Leviticus18:15 Otabanga na muka mutabane wo mu buliri," 
Leviticus18:16 era otabanga na muka muganda wo mu buliri. 
Leviticus18:17 Otabanga na mukazi mu buliri, kabiri n'omala n'oba na mughala we mu buliri, oba mughala wa mutabane we, oba mughala wa mughala we. Ekyo kiive, kuba abo bakuliku obuko." 
Leviticus18:18 Otabayizanga muganda wa mukazi wo n'aba mughalikwa we. 
Leviticus18:19 “Otabanga na mukazi mu buliri ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'okulwala, kuba abalibwa obutaba mulongoofu." 
Leviticus18:20 Otabanga na muka beene mu buliri. Ekyo kikufuula atali mulongoofu. 
Leviticus18:21 Otaghangayo waire omulala ku baana bo, okukozesebwa mu kusinza omusambwa Moleki, n'ovumagania eriina lya Katonda wo. Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus18:22 Otabanga na musaadha mwino mu buliri, mu nsambo abasaadha ye babaamu n'abakazi. Ekyo kyenhinhalwa." 
Leviticus18:23 Omusaadha oba omukazi atabanga na nsolo, mu nsambo abasaadha ye babaamu n'abakazi mu buliri. Obudankaanu obwo bumufuula atali mulongoofu." 
Leviticus18:24 “Mutakolanga ekindi ku bintu ebyo waire ekirala kiti, kuba kibafuula abatali balongoofu. Ebyo byonabyona n'ebyafuula abantu abamaghanga agandi agatantya okuba abatali balongoofu, ge ndi kubinga mu nsi eno okuleetamu imwe." 
Leviticus18:25 Ebikolwa byaibwe byafuula ensi eno obutaba nongoofu, kye nva ndi kubabonereza nga mbabingira kuliya okubamaliramu irala." 
Leviticus18:26 Abantu abo baakolanga ebyenhinhalwa ebyo byonabyona, baaleetera ensi obutaba nongoofu. Aye imwe mutabikolanga. Mwenamwena Abaisiraeli n'abasenze abaasenga mu imwe, mugemenga amateeka n'ebiragiro byange," 
Leviticus18:27  
Leviticus18:28 mulobe kubingibwa mu nsi eno ng'oti n'abantu abamaghanga abaabasooka okugibaamu bwe baagireetera obutaba nongoofu ni babingibwamu. 
Leviticus18:29 Kuba kiisi anaakolanga ekyenhinhalwa kyonakyona ku ebyo, anaabanga nga takaabalirwa mu bantu bange." 
Leviticus18:30 “Kale mugonderenga bye mbalagira, mulobenga kujiiranga ku mpisa edho edheenhinhalwa, edh'abo abaabasooka okuba mu nsi eno, era mulobenga kwereetaku butali bulongoofu nga mukola ebyo. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Musengwa yaalagira Musa 
Leviticus19:2 akobere ekikunsu kyonakyona eky'Abaisiraeli ati: “Mubenga batukuvu, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe ndi omutukuvu." 
Leviticus19:3 Kiisi muntu ku imwe ate nga mu ise n'inhina ekitiisa, era akuzenga olunaku olwa Sabbato nga bwe nalagira. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus19:4 “Mutanvangaku ni musinza bitali Katonda, era muteekoleranga misambwa mu byuma bisaanuusiibwa ni mugisinza. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus19:5 “Bwe munaaghangayo, eri nze Musengwa Katonda, omusengo ogugheebwayo olw'okutabagana, munaagughangayo mu nsambo egwaine nga bwe nabalagira, memale olwo ngusiime." 
Leviticus19:6 Emamba ey'ekigheebwayo ekyo enaalibwanga ku lunaku olwo ensolo lw'eitibwa, ni ku lunaku olunaiririranga. Era emamba enaasigalangagho n'etuuka ku lunaku olwokusatu enaayokebwanga bwokebwe," 
Leviticus19:7 kuba olwo enaabanga ng'efuuse etali nongoofu. Era bw'enaalibwanga ku lunaku olwo olwokusatu, tiiganhenga kusiima musengo ogwo." 
Leviticus19:8 Kiisi anaagiryangaku anaabonerezebwanga olw'obutagha kintu kya Musengwa Katonda ekitukuvu ekitiibwa kyakyo, era omuntu oyo anaabanga nga takaabalirwa mu bantu bange." 
Leviticus19:9 “Bwe munaabanga mukungula ebirime byaimwe, mutamalirangayo irala ebisembayo ku mbibi dh'enimiro dhaimwe, oba okwirayo einhuma okulonderera ebyo ebiba bisigaireyo." 
Leviticus19:10 Era mutairangayo inhuma mu masamba gaimwe ag'emizabbibu okusoloza egyo egyerabiirwa okusala oba okulonderera egiba gikunkumwike. Ebyo byonabyona mubirekeranga abaavu n'abasenze. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe. 
Leviticus19:11 “Mutaibanga, mutakupankupanianga, era mutaguyaguyanga." 
Leviticus19:12 Mutalayiriranga bwereere liina lyange eitukuvu ni mulyonoona. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe. 
Leviticus19:13 “Mutanhigirizanga muntu yeenayeena, oba okumunhagaku ekikye. Empeera ey'omukozi gw'okozesa oteekwa okugimugheerangagho ku lunaku lwene olwo lw'amaze omulimo." 
Leviticus19:14 Mutakolimiranga musigha, era mutateeranga mutulu kitimuguunha mu ngira ni yeekontolaku. Aye mutyenga nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus19:15 “Musalenga emisango mu butuufu. Muteekubiranga ku luuyi lwa mwavu, era mutatiisanga mukombe maiso." 
Leviticus19:16 Otasansaanianga ngambo mu bantu bo, era oteesimbangagho kulumiriza muntu yeenayeena mu musango ogusobola okumuviiramu okwitibwa. Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus19:17 “Otakyaghanga muntu yeenayeena n'omwegemerera, aye omunenianga byaweera agho, olobe kugwa mu kibi olw'oyo." 
Leviticus19:18 Oteesasuulizanga ku muntu yeenayeena, oba okumukyagha n'omwegemerera. Aye ogonzanga muntu mwino ng'oti ni bwe weegonza mwene. Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus19:19 “Mugemenga ebiragiro byange. Otaganhanga nsolo dho kuzaalagana na dha kika kindi. Otasiganga mu nimiro yo nsigo dha bika bibiri. Otavaalanga kivaalo kya ngoye dha bika bibiri ebirukiirwa aghalala. 
Leviticus19:20 “Omusaadha yeenayeena bw'anaabanga n'omwiru omukazi mu buliri, eyamala okwandhula omusaadha owundi, aye ng'omusaadha eyayandhulwa akaali kusasula bintu, era ng'omwiru akaali kugheebwa idembe, omusaadha abaire n'omwiru omukazi oyo anaabonerezebwanga ghalala n'omwiru omukazi oyo. Aye tibaitibwenga, kuba omwiru omukazi aba akaali kugheebwa idembe." 
Leviticus19:21 Omusaadha oyo aidha kuleetanga ku mulyango gwa Weema ey'Okundhagaanirangamu, entaama enume nga n'ekigheebwayo ng'omutango." 
Leviticus19:22 Kabona aidha kukozesanga ekigheebwayo ekyo, okukola omukolo ogw'okutukuza omusaadha oyo mu maiso gange, olw'ekibi kye yakola, era ndidha kumusonighanga." 
Leviticus19:23 “Bwe mulituuka mu nsi Kanaani ni musimba emiti egy'ebibala egya buli nsambo, ebibala byagyo tibiibenga birongoofu okumala emyaka esatu. Era mutabiryangaku okumala emyaka esatu egyo." 
Leviticus19:24 Mu mwaka ogwokuna, ebibala byonabyona bija kumpeebwa, ng'ekigheebwayo ekitukuvu olw'okuneebaza." 
Leviticus19:25 Aye mu mwaka ogwokutaanu, muliba ba idembe okulya ku bibala byagyo. Ebyo byonabyona bwe mulibituukiriza, emiti gyaimwe giribala inho. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus19:26 “Mutalyanga mamba ng'ekaalimu omusaayi. Mutakolanga bya bulogo oba eby'okulagulwa. 
Leviticus19:27 Mutakendeezanga ku nviiri dhaimwe edh'omu mbali, oba okukendeeza ku birevu byaimwe." 
Leviticus19:28 Muteesalasalanga ku mibiri gyaimwe ng'akamanhiso ak'okulira abafu, oba okwetonaku endhola olw'okwewoomya. Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus19:29 “Mutayonoonanga baghala baimwe nga mubaghaayo okukozesebwa nga bamalaaya ab'omu masabo, kuba ensi eidha kwidhula empisa embi." 
Leviticus19:30 Mukuzenga olunaku lwa Sabbato, era mutenga ekitiisa mu kifo kyange Ekitukuvu. Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus19:31 “Mutajanga kwebuuza ku basamize, oba ku balogo. Mutabaagalanga ye bali, kuba baidha kubafuula abatali balongoofu. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus19:32 “Mutenga ekinhagansi mu bantu abakairiighe, era mubaisengamu ekitiisa. Era muntyenga nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus19:33 “Mutabisanga bubi basenze abaasenga mu nsi yaimwe. 
Leviticus19:34 Mubabisenga ng'oti Baisiraeli banaimwe abazaale baamu, era mubagonzenga ng'oti ni bwe mwegonza beene, kuba mwena mwali basenze mu nsi Misiri. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus19:35 “Mutakupankupanianga muntu yeenayeena nga mukozesa ebipimo ebitali bituufu mu kupima obuleeyi, oba obuzito, oba obungi obw'ebintu." 
Leviticus19:36 Mukozesenga minzaani entuufu nga n'ebipimo byonabyona bituufu. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, eyabatoola mu nsi Misiri." 
Leviticus19:37 Mugemenga amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange, era mubigonderenga. Ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Leviticus20:1 Musengwa yaalagira Musa 
Leviticus20:2 akobere Abaisiraeli ati: “Bweghanaabangagho Omuisiraeli oba omusenze yeenayeena eyasenga mu Isiraeli, aghaayo ku baana be okukozesebwa mu kusinza omusambwa Moleki, abantu boonaboona banaamukubanga amabaale yaafa." 
Leviticus20:3 Era zeena ndyefuulira omuntu oyo naamuboola naalekera agho okumubalira mu bantu bange, olw'okughaayo omwana we eri Moleki n'ayonoona Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu, era n'ayonoona eriina lyange eitukuvu." 
Leviticus20:4 Aye abantu bwebataafengayo ku ky'akoze ni batamwita," 
Leviticus20:5 Nze mwene ndyefuulira omuntu oyo n'ab'omu ndhu ye boonaboona, n'abo boonaboona abamweyimbaku mu butaba beesigwa ye ndi ni basinza Moleki. Ndirekera okubabalira mu bantu bange." 
Leviticus20:6 “Omuntu yeenayeena bw'anaajanga okwebuuza ku basamize n'abalogo, n'ataba mwesigwa eri nze, nnaamwefuuliranga, naalekera agho okumubalira mu bantu bange." 
Leviticus20:7 Kale mubenga batukuvu, kuba ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus20:8 Mugemenga amateeka gange era mugajiirengaku, kuba ninze Musengwa abafuula abatukuvu." 
Leviticus20:9 “Kiisi anaakolimiranga ise oba inhina, anaitibwanga mwene n'anaabanga nga yeereeteire okwitibwa." 
Leviticus20:10 “Omusaadha bw'anaabanga ni muka musaadha mwine mu buliri, abenzi bombi, omusaadha oyo n'omukazi, banaitibwanga." 
Leviticus20:11 Omusaadha bw'anaabanga n'owundi ku baka ise mu buliri, anaabanga ng'awemwire ise. Era bombi, omusaadha oyo n'omukazi, banaitibwanga. Beene n'abanaabanga nga beereeteire okwitibwa." 
Leviticus20:12 Omusaadha bw'anaabanga ni muka mutabane we mu buliri, omusaadha oyo n'omukazi banaitibwanga. Banaabanga nga bakoze kiive, era beene n'abanaabanga nga beereeteire okwitibwa." 
Leviticus20:13 Omusaadha bw'anaabanga ni musaadha mwine mu buliri mu nsambo abasaadha ye babaamu n'abakazi, banaabanga nga bakoze ekyenhinhalwa. Bombi banaitibwanga, era beene n'abanaabanga nga beereeteire okwitibwa." 
Leviticus20:14 Omusaadha bw'anaabayizanga omukazi n'inhina w'omukazi oyo, ekyo kinaabanga kiive. Abasatu abo banaayokebwanga omuliro baafa. Era mutaganhanga kibi ng'oti n'ekyo okuba mu imwe." 
Leviticus20:15 Omusaadha bw'anaabanga n'ensolo, mu nsambo abasaadha ye baba n'abakazi mu buliri, anaitibwanga era ensolo eyo yoona enaitibwanga." 
Leviticus20:16 N'omukazi bw'anaabanga n'ensolo mu nsambo abasaadha ye baba n'abakazi mu buliri, anaitibwanga era n'ensolo eyo yoona yaitibwa mwene era n'ensolo eyo n'abanaabanga nga beereeteire okwitibwa." 
Leviticus20:17 Omusaadha bw'anaabayizanga mwanhina, waire nga mwanhina ku ise ow'omukazi owundi, oba mwanhina ku inhina ow'omusaadha owundi, banaabanga bakoze kiive. Banaabanga nga tibakaabalirwa mu bantu baibwe. Omusaadha oyo anaabonerezebwanga olw'ekibi kye ekyo, eky'okuba ni mwanhina mu buliri." 
Leviticus20:18 Omusaadha bw'anaabanga n'omukazi mu buliri ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'okulwala, bombi banaabanga nga tibakaabalirwa mu bantu bange, kuba bamenhie amateeka agagema ku bulongoofu." 
Leviticus20:19 “Omusaadha bw'anaabanga n'inhina omuto oba ni songa we mu buliri, banaabanga bakoze kiive. Banaabonerezebwanga olw'ekibi kyaibwe ekyo." 
Leviticus20:20 Omusaadha bw'anaabanga ni muka muganda wa ise mu buliri, anaabanga nga awemwire muganda wa ise oyo, era mwene n'omukazi oyo banaabonerezebwanga olw'ekibi kyaibwe ekyo. Balifa nga baziraku mwana naire." 
Leviticus20:21 Omusaadha bw'anaabayizanga muka muganda we, anaabanga akoze kibi, ng'awemwire muganda we. Balifa nga baziraku mwana naire." 
Leviticus20:22 “Mugemenga amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange byonabyona, olwo mulobe kubingibwa mu nsi Kanaani ye nja okubaingizaamu okubangamu." 
Leviticus20:23 Muteebisanga ng'abantu abo be ndi kubingamu okuleetamu imwe kuba baakolanga ebyo byonabyona, bandeetera okubeesinwa." 
Leviticus20:24 Aye imwe nabasuubiza okubagha ensi eno engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala, era ndigibagha yaaba yaimwe. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, eyabaawula ku maghanga agandi." 
Leviticus20:25 Kale ni mwawulengagho ensolo n'enhonhi enongoofu n'edhitali nongoofu. Muteereeteranga kuba kyenhinhalwa eri nze, nga mulya ensolo, oba enhonhi, oba ekintu ekindi kyonakyona ku nsi ekitali kirongoofu." 
Leviticus20:26 Mubenga batukuvu, era nga muli bange zenka, kuba nze Musengwa ndi mutukuvu era nabaawula ku maghanga agandi, mughange okuba abange zenka." 
Leviticus20:27 “Omusaadha oba omukazi omusamize, oba omulogo, anaitibwanga. Anaakubwanga amabaale yaitibwa. Mwene n'anaabanga yeereeteire okwitibwa.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Musengwa yaalagira Musa ati: “Kobera bakabona batabane ba Aaroni oti ghatabangagho waire omulala ati ku beene aneereeteranga okuba atali mulongoofu nga yeeyimba mu mikolo egibaagho mu kufiirwa ab'enganda dhe," 
Leviticus21:2 okutoolaku abo abamuliku oluganda einho: inhina, n'ise, ni mutabane we, ni mughala we, ni muganda we," 
Leviticus21:3 oba mwanhina akaali kufumbirwa, ali mu mikono gye." 
Leviticus21:4 Ateereeteranga kuba atali mulongoofu olw'omuntu aba ng'afiire e bukoirume bwe. 
Leviticus21:5 “Bakabona batakendeezanga ku nviiri dhaibwe edh'omu mbali, oba okukendeeza ku birevu byaibwe, era bateesalasalanga ku mibiri gyaibwe ng'akamanhiso ak'okulira abafu." 
Leviticus21:6 Babenga batukuvu eri Nze Katonda waibwe, era balobenga kwonoona liina lyange, kuba bagheereza eri Nze Musengwa Katonda waibwe ebigheebwayo eby'okulya ebyokebwa. Kyebanaavanga ni baba abatukuvu." 
Leviticus21:7 “Kabona atabayizanga mukazi eyakolaku obwamalaaya, oba omukazi atali mwegha, oba oyo eyabingibwa ewa iba, kuba kabona yayawulirwa Katonda we." 
Leviticus21:8 Kale munaamwawulanga yaaba wa Katonda, kuba agheereza eri Katonda waimwe ekigheebwayo eky'eby'okulya. Munaamubalanga nga mutukuvu, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda atukuza imwe, ndi mutukuvu." 
Leviticus21:9 Era mughala wa kabona bw'aneeyonoonanga ng'akola obwamalaaya, anaabanga aswaziiza ise. Anaayokebwanga omuliro yaafa." 
Leviticus21:10 “Omukulu wa Bakabona yasiigibwa omuzigo ku mutwe, era yaatukuzibwa okuvaala ebivaalo eby'obwakabona. N'olw'ekyo taalekenga nviiri dhe nga ti nsunsule, era taakanulengamu bivaalo bye kwoleka ng'anakughaire." 
Leviticus21:11 Tiyeereeterenga kuba atali mulongoofu oba okwonoona Ekifo kyange Ekitukuvu, ng'akivaamu okuseeta aghali omulambo, ni bwe guba ogwa ise oba ogwa inhina, kuba yayawulirwa nze Katonda we ng'asiigibwa omuzigo omutukuvu." 
Leviticus21:12  
Leviticus21:13 Anaabayizanga omukazi akaali omwegha," 
Leviticus21:14 se ti namwandu, oba omukazi eyaliku malaaya, oba oyo eyabingibwa ewa iba. Anaabayizanga omughala akaali omwegha ow'omu bantu be beene," 
Leviticus21:15 alobe kuleetera baana be kuba batali balongoofu kuba ninze Musengwa Katonda amufuula omutukuvu.” 
Leviticus21:16 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa 
Leviticus21:17 akobere Aaroni ati: “Buli wa ku lulyo lwo mu nse dhoonadhoona, anaabangaku ekikyamu taaseetenga kugheereza Katonda we ekigheebwayo eky'eby'okulya." 
Leviticus21:18 Buli aliku kikyamu kyonakyona, taaseetenga kugheereza: omutulu, oba aghenhera, oba eyayonooneka mu maiso, oba omulema ow'omukono oba omugulu," 
Leviticus21:19 oba eyamenhekaku omugulu oba omukono; 
Leviticus21:20 oba ow'enfeete, oba eyakona, oba aliku ekikyamu ku maiso, oba ali n'endwaire ey'oku mubiri, oba omulaawe." 
Leviticus21:21 Ghatabangagho muntu yeenayeena ow'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni kabona, aliku ekikyamu kyonakyona, anaaseetanga okughaayo ekigheebwayo ekya Musengwa Katonda eky'eby'okulya ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus21:22 Omuntu oyo, aikirizibwa okulya ku bigheereibwayo eri Katonda we, ku by'okulya ebitukuvu einho, ni ku bindi ebitukuvu." 
Leviticus21:23 Aye olw'okuba ng'aliku ekikyamu, taingirenga ghali lutimbe lutukuvu era taaseetenga ghali alutaari alobe kwonoona ebitukuvu ebyo, kuba ninze Musengwa Katonda abifuula ebitukuvu.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Kale ni ebyo Musa bye yakobera Aaroni, ni batabane be, n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona." 
Leviticus22:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus22:2 “Koba Aaroni ni batabane be, batenga ekitiisa mu bintu ebitukuvu, Abaisiraeli bye bantonera, balobenga kwonoona liina lyange eitukuvu. Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus22:3 Bakobe oti mu nse dhoonadhoona edhiriiragho, kiisi musaadha ow'oku lulyo lwaibwe atali mulongoofu anaaseetanga eri ebitukuvu Abaisiraeli bye bantonera, tairengayo kwikirizibwa kwidha mu maiso gange kumpeereza. Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus22:4 “Ghatabangagho muntu yeenayeena ow'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni alwaire endwaire ey'ebigenge, oba atoonha okuva mu bitundu bye eby'ekyama olw'obulwaire, anaalyanga ku bintu ebitukuvu, okutuusa lw'anaamalanga okuba omulongoofu. Era kabona anaafuukanga atali mulongoofu bw'anaagemanga ku kintu ekifuuse ekitali kirongoofu, olw'okwekonta ku kintu ekifiire, oba olwa mwene okuvaamu amaadhi ag'obusaadha," 
Leviticus22:5 oba bw'anaagemanga ku kitonde kyonakyona ekitali kirongoofu, oba ku muntu yeenayeena atali mulongoofu." 
Leviticus22:6 Kiisi kabona anaafuukanga atali mulongoofu mu nsambo oti n'eyo, anaasigalanga nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa eigulo era atalyanga ku bigheebwayo ebitukuvu, okutoolaku ng'amaze okunaaba omubiri." 
Leviticus22:7 Endhuba ng'egwire anaabanga mulongoofu; olwo ng'asobola okulya ku bigheebwayo ebitukuvu, kuba ebyo n'emere ye nga kabona." 
Leviticus22:8 Atalyanga mamba ya nsolo efiire yeene, oba eitiibwa ensolo eyindi, olwo alobenga kwereetera kuba atali mulongoofu. Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus22:9 “Bakabona boonaboona banaatuukirizanga bye mbalagira, balobenga kwonoona ni bafa olw'okubinhooma. Ninze Musengwa Katonda abafuula abatukuvu." 
Leviticus22:10 “Atali wa ku lulyo lwa bakabona atalyanga ku bigheebwayo ebitukuvu, waire omugeni akyaliire kabona, oba omukozi we y'asasula empeera." 
Leviticus22:11 Aye abairu, abo kabona be yagula n'empiiya dhe, n'abo abaazaalirwa mu maka ge, banaikirizibwanga okulya ku mere ya kabona." 
Leviticus22:12 Mughala wa kabona bw'anaabayiranga omusaadha atali kabona, atalyanga ku bigheebwayo ebyo ebitukuvu." 
Leviticus22:13 Aye mughala wa kabona bw'aba namwandu oba ng'agobeibwa iba ng'aziraku mwana, era ng'aize mu ndhu ya ise okutyama, anaalyanga ku mere ya ise. Aye atali wa ku lulyo lwa kabona, atalyanga." 
Leviticus22:14 “Omuntu atali wa ku lulyo lwa bakabona bw'anaalyanga ku kigheebwayo ekitukuvu nga tagendereire, anairizangagho kabona ekigheebwayo ekyo ekitukuvu, yaayongeraku n'omutango gwa kitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bitaanu eby'ekigheebwayo ekyo." 
Leviticus22:15 Bakabona batayonoonanga bigheebwayo ebitukuvu Abaisiraeli bye baghaayo eri Musengwa Katonda," 
Leviticus22:16 nga baganha abantu abatali bakabona okubiryaku, olwo baaleetera abantu abo okubaaku omusango era n'okubonerezebwa. Ninze Musengwa Katonda abifuula ebitukuvu.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus22:18 “Koba Aaroni, ni batabane be, n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona oti, Omuisiraeli oba omusenze ali mu Isiraeli, bw'anaaleetanga eri Musengwa Katonda ekigheebwayo kye ekyokebwa kye yeeyama, oba ekyo ky'aghaayo nga kya kyeyendere," 
Leviticus22:19 kinaateekwanga okuba nga kya nte nume, oba mbuzi nume, oba ntaama nume, ng'eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona, memale Musengwa Katonda yaaganha okukisiima." 
Leviticus22:20 Mutaghangayo kintu kyonakyona ekiriku ekikyamu, kuba Musengwa Katonda taja kukisiima." 
Leviticus22:21 Omuntu bw'anaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda omusengo olw'okutabagana ng'atuukiriza kye yeeyama, oba ng'aghaayo gwa kyeyendere, ensolo enaateekwanga okuba ng'eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona, memale Musengwa Katonda yaagisiima." 
Leviticus22:22 Mutaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ensolo entulu, oba eyamenhekaku, oba eghenhera, oba eriku amabwa, oba eri n'endwaire ey'oku mubiri. Ensolo edhiri ng'oti n'edho mutadhighangayo ku alutaari ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus22:23 Ente oba entaama eriku ekitundu ekitali kitereevu, oba eri n'ekibulaku ku bitundu byayo, eikirizibwa okugheebwayo ng'ekigheebwayo omuntu eky'ekyeyendere, aye teikirizibwa kugheerezebwa ng'ekigheebwayo omuntu olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo." 
Leviticus22:24 Mutaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ensolo ng'obusaadha bwayo bwanhigibwa, oba bwanuubulwa, oba bwayuzika, oba bwasalibwaku. Ekyo mutakikolanga mu nsi yaimwe." 
Leviticus22:25 “Ensolo dhe mutoire mu basenze, mutadhighangayo eri Katonda waimwe ng'ekigheebwayo eky'eby'okulya. Edho dhibalibwa ng'edhiriku ekikyamu era Musengwa Katonda taja kudhisiima.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Musengwa Katonda yaayongera okukoba Musa ati: 
Leviticus22:27 “Ente, oba entaama, oba embuzi, bw'enaazaalibwanga, enaalekebwanga yaayonka inhina waayo okumala enaku musanvu. Okuva ku lunaku olwomunaana n'okweyongerayo, enaikirizibwanga okuba ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus22:28 Mutaitanga nte na nhana yaayo, oba entaama n'enhana yaayo, oba embuzi n'enhana yaayo, ku lunaku lulala." 
Leviticus22:29 Bwe munaabanga mughaayo omusengo eri Musengwa Katonda olw'okwebaza, mugughangayo nga mujiira ku mateeka, memale yaagusiima." 
Leviticus22:30 Mugulyanga ku lunaku olwo lwene aghazira kulekagho waire akatono kati ni katuusa enkyo. Ninze Musengwa Katonda. 
Leviticus22:31 “Kale ni mugemenga ebiragiro byange era mubijiirengaku. Ninze Musengwa Katonda. 
Leviticus22:32 Mutayonoonanga liina lyange eitukuvu, aye nhenda Abaisiraeli mwenamwena mwatulenga nga bwendi omutukuvu. Ninze Musengwa Katonda abafuula abatukuvu," 
Leviticus22:33 era eyabatoola mu nsi Misiri, mbenga Katonda waimwe. Ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa 
Leviticus23:2 akobere Abaisiraeli ati: “Dhino n'enaku edh'okukolerangaku embaga edh'ebibinuko byange nze Musengwa Katonda bye nalagira, dhe munaalangiriranga okwesololezaaku okunsinza." 
Leviticus23:3 “Enaku dhiri mukaaga edhinaakolerwangaku emirimo, aye olunaku olwomusanvu, lwa Sabbato, lunaku lwa kuwuumula. Ku lunaku olwo mutakolanga mulimo gwonagwona, aye mwesolozenga okunsinza. Olwa Sabbato lunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda yoonayoona ye munaabanga." 
Leviticus23:4 “Dhino n'enaku edh'okukolerangaku embaga edh'ebibinuko bya Musengwa Katonda, dhe munaalangiriranga mu biseera byadho ebyalagirwa." 
Leviticus23:5 Olw'okubitizibwa kw'Abaisiraeli, lutoolera eigulo ku lunaku olweikumi n'eina, olw'omwezi ogusooka." 
Leviticus23:6 “Ekibinuko eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa kinaatooleranga ku lunaku olweikumi n'eitaanu olw'omwezi gwene ogwo ogusooka. Munaalyanga emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa okumala enaku musanvu. 
Leviticus23:7 Ku lunaku olusooka ku edho omusanvu, muneesolozanga okunsinza. Mutakolanga mulimo waire omulala ku egyo gye mukola buliidho." 
Leviticus23:8 Enaku edho omusanvu munaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Ku lunaku olwomusanvu muneesolozanga okusinza. Aye mutakolanga mulimo waire omulala ku egyo gye mukola buliidho.” 
Leviticus23:9 Musengwa Katonda yaayongera okulagira Musa 
Leviticus23:10 akobere Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe mulituuka mu nsi Musengwa Katonda y'abagha ni mukungula engaano, ekinhwa ekisooka mukitwalanga wa kabona." 
Leviticus23:11 Anaakighangayo ng'akiwuuba mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, olwo Musengwa Katonda oyo yaakisiima. Kabona anaakighangayo ku lunaku olwiririra Sabbato." 
Leviticus23:12 Era ku lunaku lwe munaagheerangayo ekinhwa ky'engaano ekyo, munaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda entaama enume ento ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, ng'eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona, era nga ya mwaka mulala gwonka." 
Leviticus23:13 Era ku kigheebwayo ekyo, munaagheerangaku kilo ibiri edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu era obutabwirwamu omuzigo ogw'emiti emyoliva, ng'ekigheebwayo eky'eby'okulya. Akawoowo ak'ekigheebwayo ekyo kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda. Era munaaghangayo lita ndala ey'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, ng'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa." 
Leviticus23:14 Mutalyanga ku ngaano mpyaka naire, k'ebe nga mbisi, oba nga nkalange, oba ng'ekoleibwamu omugaati, okutuusa nga mumaze okuleeta ekigheebwayo kya Katonda waimwe. Eiteeka lino linaakuumibwanga ab'olulyo lwaimwe boonaboona, enaku dhoonadhoona, buli ye banaabanga." 
Leviticus23:15 “Munaabalanga wiiki musanvu okuva ku lunaku olwiririra Sabbato eyo lwe muleeteireku ekinhwa kyaimwe eky'engaano okukighaayo eri Musengwa Katonda. 
Leviticus23:16 Ku lunaku olwamakumi ataanu olwiririra Sabbato eyomusanvu, munaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ekigheebwayo ekindi eky'emere ey'empeke." 
Leviticus23:17 Buli maka ganaaleetanga emigaati ebiri eri Musengwa Katonda ng'ekigheebwayo ekiwuubibwa. Buli mugaati gunaakolebwanga mu kilo ibiri edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, nga butabwirwamu ekizimbulukusa. Emigaati egyo munaagighangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ng'ekigheebwayo eky'ebirime ebisooka okukungula." 
Leviticus23:18 Aghalala n'emigaati egyo, munaaghangayo entaama musanvu edh'omwaka omulala omulala, n'ente enume ento ndala, n'entaama enume enkulu ibiri; dhoonadhoona tidhiibengaku kikyamu kyonakyona. Dhinaagheebwangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, ghalala n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, n'eky'ebyokunhwa. Akawoowo ak'ekigheebwayo ekyo kasangaaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus23:19 Era munaaghangayo embuzi enume ndala, ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, n'entaama ento ibiri edh'omwaka omulala omulala, ng'ekigheebwayo eky'okutabagana." 
Leviticus23:20 Kabona anaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda emigaati gire ghalala n'entaama, ng'ekigheebwayo ekiwuubibwa, ekiba ekya bakabona. Ebigheebwayo ebyo bitukuvu." 
Leviticus23:21 Ku lunaku olwo munaalangiriranga, mwesoloza okunsinza. Mutakolanga mulimo waire omulala ku egyo gye mukola buliidho. Eiteeka lino munaalikuumanga ebyanda n'ebyanda, mu nse dhoonadhoona, eyo yoonayoona ye munaabanga." 
Leviticus23:22 “Bwe munaabanga mukungula ebirime byaimwe, mutamalirangayo irala ebisembayo ku mbibi dh'enimiro dhaimwe. Oba okwirayo einhuma okulonderera ebyo ebiba bisigaireyo. Ebyo byonabyona mubirekerenga abaavu n'abasenze. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus23:24 “Kobera Abaisiraeli oti ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu, ghanaabangagho okuwuumulira irala olw'ekiidhukizo. Kunaalangirirwanga nga bafuuwa endeka, era muneesolozanga okusinza." 
Leviticus23:25 Munaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, era timuukolenga waire omulala ku mirimo egyo gye mukola buliidho.”" 
Leviticus23:26 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Leviticus23:27 “Olunaku olweikumi olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu, lunaabanga lwa kutoolebwaku bibi. Ku lunaku olwo, muneebonerezanga, era mwesoloza okusinza, mwaghaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus23:28 Ku olwo, mutakolanga mulimo waire omulala ku egyo gye mukola buliidho, kuba lunaku lwaimwe lwa kutoolebwaku bibi mu maiso ga Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus23:29 Kiisi muntu ateebonerezenga ku olwo, anaabanga nga takaabalirwa mu bantu ba Katonda," 
Leviticus23:30 era kiisi anaakolanga omulimo ku olwo, Musengwa Katonda anaamutoolanga mu bantu be yaamuzikiriza." 
Leviticus23:31 Mutakolanga mulimo waire omulala. Eiteeka eryo linaakuumibwanga ab'olulyo lwaimwe enaku dhoonadhoona, eyo yoonayoona ye banaabanga." 
Leviticus23:32 Okuva eigulo ery'olunaku olwomwenda olw'omwezi, okutuuka eigulo ery'olunaku olweikumi, munaakuumanga olunaku luno nga lwa kuwuumulira irala ng'oti Sabbato, era muneebonerezanga.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus23:34 “Kobera Abaisiraeli ati olweikumi n'eitaanu olw'omwezi ogwo ogwomusanvu, ghanaabangagho Ekibinuko eky'Entindi ekikolerwa Musengwa Katonda, okumala enaku musanvu." 
Leviticus23:35 Ku lunaku olusooka ku edho omusanvu, muneesolozanga okusinza, era mutakolanga mulimo waire omulala ku egyo gye mukola buliidho." 
Leviticus23:36 Buli lunaku, mu nnaku edho omusanvu, munaaghangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Ku lunaku olwomunaana, muneesolozanga okusinza, era mwaghaayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Lunaabanga lunaku lukologho lwa kusinza, era mutakolanga mulimo waire omulala ku egyo gye mukola buliidho." 
Leviticus23:37 “Edho n'enaku edh'okukolerangaku embaga edh'ebibinuko Musengwa Katonda dh'alagiire, dhe munaalangiriranga okwesoloza okusinza n'okughaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke, emisengo, n'ebigheebwayo eby'okunhwa, buli kirala mu biseera byakyo." 
Leviticus23:38 Ebibinuko ebyo n'ebyeyongeire ku Sabbato dha Musengwa Katonda edhabuliidho. Era ebigheebwayo ebyo n'ebyeyongeire ku byabuliidho, bye mughaayo eri Musengwa Katonda olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo, ni bye mughaayo eby'ekyeyendere." 
Leviticus23:39 “Bwe munaamalanga okukungula ebirime byaimwe, munaakuzanga ekibinuko kino, okumala enaku musanvu, nga mutoolera n'olunaku olweikumi n'eitaanu olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu. Ku lunaku olusooka ni ku lusembayo, ghanaabangagho okuwuumulira irala." 
Leviticus23:40 Ku lunaku olwo olusooka, munaatwalanga ku bibala eby'emiti gyaimwe ebisinga bulungi. Munaatwalanga ensaga edh'emiti eminaazi, n'ensaga edh'emiti egy'amakaba amangi, n'obuti obukulira ku mbali kw'omwiga, memale mwasagamba okumala enaku musanvu, nga musaaka Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus23:41 Munaakuzanga ekibinuko kino okumala enaku musanvu buli mwaka. Eiteeka eryo munaalikuumanga ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Leviticus23:42 Abaisiraeli mwenamwena munaabanga mu ntindi okumala enaku musanvu," 
Leviticus23:43 olwo Abaisiraeli ab'omu nse edhiriiragho bamanhe ng'Abaisiraeli abaabasooka nabaleetera okusula mu ntindi, bwe nabatoola e Misiri. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe.”" 
Leviticus23:44 Kale atyo Musa yaakobera Abaisiraeli embaga edh'ebibinuko Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira okukuzanga. 
Leviticus24:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus24:2 “Koba Abaisiraeli bakuleetere omuzigo omukenenule ogukamwirwa mu bibala eby'emiti emyoliva ebisekwirwa, ogw'okuta mu ntaala enaayakanga obutazikira." 
Leviticus24:3 Buli igulo, Aaroni aidha kugikunaanianga, agireke ng'eyaka obutazikira okutuusa ku nkyo, agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, ku luya kw'olutimbe oluli emberi ow'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, mu Kifo Ekitukuvu einho agho mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Eiteeka eryo liidha kukuumibwanga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Leviticus24:4 Aaroni anaalabiriranga buliidho entaala edhiri ku kikondo ekya zaabu omukenenule, mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus24:5 “Mutoolanga kilo ikumi na ibiri edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, mwafumbamu emigaati ikumi n'ebiri." 
Leviticus24:6 Mugitegekanga mu miteeko ebiri nga buli muteeko gulimu emigaati mukaaga, mwagita mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ku meeza ya zaabu omukenenule." 
Leviticus24:7 Era mutanga obubbaani obusinga bulungi ku buli muteeko, bukole mu kifo ky'emigaati nga n'akamanhiso akooleka nga byonabyona bigheereibwayo eri Musengwa Katonda oyo ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus24:8 Buli Sabbato aghazira kwosaamu, emigaati egyo mugitanga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ku lw'Abaisiraeli, nga n'endagaano ey'olubeerera." 
Leviticus24:9 Emigaati egyo ginaabanga gya Aaroni ni batabane be, era bagiriiranga mu kifo ekitukuvu, kuba ekyo n'ekitundu ekitukuvu einho eky'eby'okulya ebigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Agho olwatuuka ghaabaagho omusaadha nga ise Mumisiri, aye nga inhina Muisiraeli eyayetebwanga Shalomithi mughala wa Diburi ow'omu kika eky'Abadaani. Omusaadha yaaba n'enkaayana n'omusaadha Omuisiraeli, yaavuma eriina lya Musengwa Katonda ng'akolima. Baamuleeta eri Musa." 
Leviticus24:11  
Leviticus24:12 Baamukuumira aghantu nga bali kuteega Musengwa Katonda abakobere eky'okumukolera. 
Leviticus24:13 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Leviticus24:14 “Oyo omusaadha eyakoliime, mumutwale mu kifo aghazira weema dha bantu. Era abo boonaboona abaamuwuliire, bate emikono gyaibwe ku mutwe gwe, okukakasa nti yakoliime, memale olwo abantu boonaboona bamukube amabaale afe." 
Leviticus24:15 Era omale okobere Abaisiraeli oti kiisi anaakolimanga Katonda, anaabonerezebwanga olw'ekibi kye." 
Leviticus24:16 Omuisiraeli yeenayeena oba omusenze anaavumanga eriina lya Musengwa Katonda, abantu boonaboona bamukubanga amabaale yaafa." 
Leviticus24:17 “Oyo aitanga omuntu, yeena aitibwanga." 
Leviticus24:18 N'oyo aitanga ensolo etali yiye, aliyiranga mwene yo eyindi enamu. Obulamu busasulwa bulamu." 
Leviticus24:19 “Omuntu bw'atuusanga ku muntu mwine okulumizibwa, yeena atuusibwangaku okulumizibwa mu nsambo n'endala." 
Leviticus24:20 Amenhanga mwine eigumba, yeena erirye limenhebwanga. Eriiso lisasulwanga liiso, n'eriino lisasulwanga liino. Obulumi omuntu bw'anaatuusanga ku wundi, yeena bw'anaatuusibwangaku." 
Leviticus24:21 Aitanga ensolo, agirighangamu eyindi enamu. Oyo aitanga omuntu, yeena aitibwanga." 
Leviticus24:22 Eiteeka eryo ligema ku Baisiraeli ni ku basenze abali mu Isiraeli, kuba ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Agho Musa ng'amaze okukobera ebyo Abaisiraeli, baatwala oyo eyakolima mu kifo aghazira weema dha bantu, baamukuba amabaale yaafa. Mu nsambo eyo Abaisiraeli baakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyakoba Musa." 
Leviticus25:1 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ku lusozi Sinai 
Leviticus25:2 akobere Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe mulituuka mu nsi ye nja okubagha, mutanga mu Musengwa Katonda ekitiisa nga muleka okulima ensi eyo buli mwaka ogwomusanvu." 
Leviticus25:3 Munaasiganga ensigo mu nimiro dhaimwe, mwawooleranga amasamba gaimwe ag'emizabbibu, era mwakungulanga ebibala byamu okumala emyaka mukaaga." 
Leviticus25:4 Aye omwaka ogwomusanvu, gunaabanga mwaka gwa kuleka eitaka liwuumulire irala, omwaka ogugheereibwayo eri Musengwa Katonda. Mutasiganga nsigo mu nimiro dhaimwe, era mutawooleranga masamba gaimwe ag'emizabbibu." 
Leviticus25:5 Endhiraira enaameranga mu nimiro dhaimwe mutagikungulanga, era n'emiti gy'emizabbibu egitali miwoolere mutaginogangaku. Gunaabanga mwaka gwa kuleka itaka liwuumulire irala." 
Leviticus25:6 Waire ng'eitaka tiriirimwenga omwaka ogwo gwonagwona, aye linaababalizanga emere, imwe, n'abairu baimwe, n'abakozi baimwe, n'abasenze abali mu imwe," 
Leviticus25:7 n'ensolo dhaimwe enfuge n'edh'omu nsiko. Byonabyona bye linaabazanga, binaabanga bya kulya." 
Leviticus25:8 “Munaabalanga emyaka musanvu emikuzi musanvu, ng'egyo gyonagyona aghalala n'emyaka amakumi ana n'omwenda." 
Leviticus25:9 Agho ku lunaku olweikumi olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu, olunaku olw'okutoolebwaku ebibi, munaatumanga omuntu yaaja ng'afuuwa endeka mu nsi yaimwe mwonamwona." 
Leviticus25:10 Mu nsambo eyo munaatukuzanga omwaka ogwamakumi ataanu (50). Munaalangiriranga eri abatyamye b'omu nsi yaimwe muti baidha kulekulwa babe ba idembe. Mu mwaka ogwo abantu banairizibwanga ebintu byaibwe ebyatundibwa, era abantu abaatundibwa mu bwiru, banaalekulwanga bairayo mu bantu baibwe." 
Leviticus25:11 Mutasiganga nsigo mu nimiro dhaimwe, era mutakungulanga endhiraira enaameranga mu nimiro dhaimwe. Era mutanonganga mizabbibu ku miti gitali miwoolere." 
Leviticus25:12 Omwaka ogwo gwonagwona gunaabanga mutukuvu ye muli. Munaalyanga ebyo ebinaabalanga byene mu nimiro ku bwabyo. 
Leviticus25:13 Mu mwaka ogwo, buli ekyatundibwa kinairizibwanga mwene kyo eyasooka." 
Leviticus25:14 Kale bwe mubanga muguza Baisiraeli banaimwe eitaka, oba nga mubagulaku, mutaseeragananga." 
Leviticus25:15 Omughendo gunaagerekebwanga, nga gujiira ku myaka eitaka gye linaamalanga nga liri kubalaku ebibala, memale omwaka ogw'okuliiriza oyo ali kulitunda gutuuke." 
Leviticus25:16 Emyaka egikaabulayo bwe ginaabanga emingi, omughendo gunaabanga munene. Emyaka egikaabulayo bwe ginaabanga emitono, n'omughendo gunaabanga mutono, kuba omughendo ogw'ebikungulwa n'ogunaabanga guli kutundibwa." 
Leviticus25:17 Mutaseeragananga, aye mutyenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus25:18 “Mugemenga amateeka gange, era mugonderenga ebiragiro byange, olwo munaabanga n'emiraala mu nsi." 
Leviticus25:19 Era ensi enaabazanga ebibala byayo, mwafuna bye mulya mwaiguta, mwaba n'emiraala." 
Leviticus25:20 “Aye muteebuuza kye munaalyanga mu mwaka ogwomusanvu, nga timusize era nga muzira kye mukungula." 
Leviticus25:21 Nze Musengwa Katonda ndibagha enkabi mu mwaka ogwomukaaga, ensi yaabaza emere enaabamazangaku emyaka ebiri." 
Leviticus25:22 Bwe munaasiganga mu mwaka ogwomunaana, munaabanga mukaalya ku bye mwakungula mu mwaka ogwomukaaga, era munaabanga mukaali n'emere ebamala okutuusa bye musize omwaka ogwo lwe binaakungulwanga." 
Leviticus25:23 “Eitaka tiriitundibwenga butaizibwa, kuba ninze mwene lyo. Imwe muli basenze busenze ku itaka eryo." 
Leviticus25:24 Eitaka bwe linaatundibwanga, munaaganhanga mwene lyo eyasooka yaalinunula." 
Leviticus25:25 “Omuisiraeli bw'anaayavughalanga n'atunda eitaka lye, owoluganda lwe anaanunulanga eitaka eryo." 
Leviticus25:26 Oyo aziraku muntu wa kulinunula, bw'anaakombaghalanga n'afuna ebimala okulinunula," 
Leviticus25:27 anaabalanga emyaka gy'amaze ng'alitunze, yaasasula eyaligula ekyo ekija mu myaka egikaasigaireyo okutuuka ku mwaka omutukuvu, memale yaalyeiriza." 
Leviticus25:28 Bw'anaabanga nga tasobola kulinunula, linaabanga mu mikono gy'oyo eyaligula okutuuka ku mwaka omutukuvu, memale olwo lyamwirizibwa." 
Leviticus25:29 “Omuntu bw'anaatundanga endhu ye eri mu kibuga ekyezungulwirwa ekimante, anaabanga wa idembe okuginunula mu ntangama ya mwaka mulala okuva ghe yagitundira." 
Leviticus25:30 Aye bw'ataaginunulenga mu ntangama eyo ey'omwaka omulamba, enaafuukiranga irala y'oyo eyagigula, yaaba yiye ni baidhukulu be enaku dhoonadhoona. Teizibwengayo waire mu mwaka omutukuvu." 
Leviticus25:31 Aye endhu edh'omu byalo ebiteezungulwirwa bimante, dhinaabalirwanga mu ise irala n'enimiro: beene dho banaabanga ba idembe okudhinunula, era dhinaabairizibwanga mu mwaka omutukuvu." 
Leviticus25:32 Aye Abalevi banaabanga ba idembe okununula endhu dhaibwe edhaazimbibwa mu bibuga byaibwe ebyabagheebwa, ekiseera kyonakyona kye banaayenderangaku." 
Leviticus25:33 Omulevi bw'anaatundanga endhu ye eri mu kindi ku bibuga ebyo n'ataginunula, endhu eyo enaamwirizibwanga mu mwaka omutukuvu, kuba endhu Abalevi dhe baba nadho mu bibuga byaibwe, dhibeera irala nga dhaibwe enaku dhoonadhoona mu Baisiraeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Aye eitaka lye baayiraku eryezungulwire ebibuga byaibwe, tiriitundibwenga, kuba liba lyaibwe enaku dhoonadhoona." 
Leviticus25:35 “Muisiraeli mwino bw'anaayavughalanga nga tasobola kubaagho ku lulwe yenka, onaamughanga obuyambi yaaba gh'oli, ng'oti ni bwe wandighaire omuntu ow'endha oba omusenze." 
Leviticus25:36 Otamutoolangaku magoba waire, aye otyanga Katonda wo, waaleka Muisiraeli mwino yaaba gh'oli." 
Leviticus25:37 Otamusabanga magoba ku mpiiya dh'omuwola, oba ku mere y'omuguza." 
Leviticus25:38 Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe eyabatoola mu Misiri, ni mbagha ensi Kanaani, era ni mba Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus25:39 “Muisiraeli mwino bw'anaayavughalanga ni yeetunda y'oli, otamukozesanga mirimo ng'oti mwiru." 
Leviticus25:40 Anaabanga gh'oli ng'omukozi asasulwa empeera era ng'omusenze. Anaakugheerezanga okutuusa ku mwaka omutukuvu. 
Leviticus25:41 Olwo anaakuvangaku ghalala n'abaana be, yairayo mu bantu be" 
Leviticus25:42 kuba Abaisiraeli bairu bange, be natoola mu Misiri. Kale batatundibwanga mu bwiru." 
Leviticus25:43 Muisiraeli mwino otamufugisanga bukambwe, aye otyanga Katonda wo." 
Leviticus25:44 Bwe munaayendanga abairu, munaabagulanga mu maghanga agabeezungulwire." 
Leviticus25:45 Munaabanga ba idembe okugula abasenze n'ab'enganda dhaibwe ababa mu imwe. Abaana ng'oti n'abo be bazaalira mu nsi yaimwe, munaabanga ba idembe okubafuula abaimwe ku bwaimwe." 
Leviticus25:46 Munaabanga ba idembe okubalaamira abaana baimwe ng'eky'obusika, baafuuka baibwe ku bwaibwe obulamu bwaibwe bwonabwona. Abo be munaafuganga obwiru. Aye Baisiraeli banaimwe mutabafugisanga bukambwe." 
Leviticus25:47 “Omusenze aba mu imwe bw'anaakombaghalanga, aye Muisiraeli munaimwe n'ayavughala, ni yeetunda eri omusenze oyo oba eri ow'omu maka ge, okuba omwiru," 
Leviticus25:48 bw'anaamalanga okwetunda, anaikirizibwanga okununulibwa owundi ku baganda be," 
Leviticus25:49 oba ise omuto, oba mutabane wa ise omuto, oba owundi ku boluganda lwe. Oba ni mwene bw'anaakombaghalanga, anaabanga wa idembe okwenunula." 
Leviticus25:50 Anaateesanga n'oyo eyamugula, baabalirira emyaka okuva mu kiseera kye yeetundiramu okutuuka ku mwaka omutukuvu, memale olwo omughendo gw'asasula okwenunula gwagererwa ku mpeera y'omukozi egwanira emyaka egyo." 
Leviticus25:51 Anaizangayo ekitundu ky'omughendo gwe yamugula, nga bagerera ku myaka egikaasigaireyo," 
Leviticus25:52  
Leviticus25:53 ng'ali ng'oti n'abaire akolera empeera eya buli mwaka. Amugula atamufugisanga bukambwe. 
Leviticus25:54 Bw'ataanunulibwenga mu nsambo ng'oti n'eyo, anaalekulwanga ghalala n'abaana be bafuuka ba idembe, mu mwaka omutukuvu." 
Leviticus25:55 Kuba Abaisiraeli bairu bange, ninze eyabatoola mu Misiri. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus26:1 “Muteekoleranga bifaananie, oba ebiwumbe, oba empango ezimbibwa, oba eibaale eibaadhe, nga bya kusinzibwa. Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Leviticus26:2 Mukuzenga olunaku lwa Sabbato, era mutenga ekitiisa mu Kifo kyange Ekitukuvu. Ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Leviticus26:3 “Bwe munaajiiranga ku mateeka gange, era ni mugondera ebiragiro byange," 
Leviticus26:4 nnaabaghanga amaadhi mu biseera byago, ensi yaabaza ebirime, n'emiti gyabala ebibala." 
Leviticus26:5 Ebirime byaimwe binaabalanga inho, mwakuba engaano okutuukiza irala ni mu biseera eby'okunoga emizabbibu, era mwanoga emizabbibu okutuukiza irala ni mu biseera eby'okusigiramu engaano. Munaalyanga emere mwaiguta, era munaabanga n'emiraala mu nsi yaimwe." 
Leviticus26:6 “Nnaabaghanga emiraala mu nsi yaimwe, mwatendukanga nga ghazira kibatiisa. Era ndimalagho ensolo edh'akabi mu nsi yaimwe, ensi yaimwe yaaloba kubangamu ntalo." 
Leviticus26:7 Mwidha kughangulanga abazigu baimwe. 
Leviticus26:8 Abataanu ku imwe baidha kughangulanga ekikumi, n'ekikumi ku imwe baidha kughangulanga omutwalo omulamba. Mu lutalo, abazigu baimwe munaabaitanga mwabamaliriragho." 
Leviticus26:9 Imwe nnaabaghanga enkabi, n'okuzaala abaana kamaala, era nnaakuumanga endagaano ye nakola n'imwe." 
Leviticus26:10 Munaalyanga ku bingi bye mwakungula eira, era munaabifulumyanga ku luya mughange okwingiza ebiyaaka ebikungwirwa." 
Leviticus26:11 Nnaabanga mu imwe, era tiibakyaghenga." 
Leviticus26:12 Nnaabanga mu imwe, nga ninze Katonda waimwe, mwena munaabanga bantu bange." 
Leviticus26:13 Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, eyabatoola mu Misiri, mulekere okuba abairu. Naatoolagho obuyinza obwali bubasibiire ghansi, naabatambuza nga mwesimbye.”" 
Leviticus26:14 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Aye bwe mutampulirenga ni mugondera biragiro byange ebyo byonabyona," 
Leviticus26:15 era bwe munaalobanga okugema amateeka gange ni mukyagha obukyaghe bye mbakoba, era ni mutagondera biragiro byange byonabyona, mu nsambo eyo ni mumenha endagaano ye nakola n'imwe," 
Leviticus26:16 ndibabonereza nti: ndireeta entiisa mu imwe. Omusuudha ogw'amaani n'endwaire edhitawonezeka biribatulughaza amaiso, byaleetera obulamu bwaimwe okuja nga buwaagho. Mulisiga ensigo aye tidhiribagasa, kuba abazigu baimwe balibaghangula baalya bye musize." 
Leviticus26:17 Imwe ndibeefuulaku, mwaghangulwa abazigu baimwe, mwafugibwa abantu abatabenda. Munaabanga n'entiisa, mwalumuka nga ghazira n'ali kubabinga." 
Leviticus26:18 “Ebyo byonabyona bwe binaamalanga okubaagho, era ni musigala nga timukampulira, ekibonerezo kyaimwe ndidha kukyongerangaku emikuzi musanvu olw'ebibi byaimwe." 
Leviticus26:19 Ndidha kutoolangagho obuyinza bwaimwe obubaleetera okwekuluntaza. Tighaabenga maadhi gagwa, olwo ensi yaimwe yaakala, yaabbalanguka ng'oti kyuma kya kikomo." 
Leviticus26:20 Bwe munaakolanga emirimo, amaani gaimwe ganaabafanga busa, kuba ensi teebazenga birime, n'emiti tigiibalenga bibala." 
Leviticus26:21 “Bwe munaayongeranga okukola empwitu n'obutampulira, ndidha kwongeranga kabiri ku kibonerezo kyaimwe emikuzi musanvu, nga njiira ku bungi bw'ebibi byaimwe." 
Leviticus26:22 Ndidha kusindikanga ensolo edh'omu nsiko, dhiite abaana baimwe era dhizikirize ebyayo byaimwe. Dhinaabakendeezanga obungi, engira dhaimwe dhaawolongera dhaazika." 
Leviticus26:23 “Ebibonerezo ebyo era bwe binaalemwanga okubaiza ye ndi, ni mwongera okukola empwitu," 
Leviticus26:24 zeena ndibeefuulaku naababonereza emikuzi musanvu okuwulagho olw'ebibi byaimwe. 
Leviticus26:25 Ndidha kubaleeteranga entalo okubabonereza olw'okumenha endagaano yange n'imwe. Era bwe muneesololezanga aghalala mu bibuga byaimwe okwewonia, ndidha kubasindikangamu obulwaire obubi, muwalirizibwenga okweghaayo eri abazigu baimwe." 
Leviticus26:26 Ndidha kubasindikiranga endhala, emere yaimwe ekendeere, abakazi eikumi babe nga beetaaga bwa ziiko ndala yonka okufumbiramu emigaati egirigho. Banaagibapimiranga bupimire mwagirya gyonagyona, aye ate mwaloba kwiguta." 
Leviticus26:27 “Era ebyo bwe binaalemwanga okubafuula abawulize, aye ni mwongera okukola empwitu," 
Leviticus26:28 zeena ndibeefuulaku mu busungu naayongera okubabonereza emikuzi musanvu okusingagho olw'ebibi byaimwe. 
Leviticus26:29 Endhala ey'amaani einho eidha kubalumanga, mutuuke n'okulyanga abaana baimwe." 
Leviticus26:30 Ndidha kuzikiriza ebifo byaimwe ebigulumivu bye musinzizaamu emisambwa, era mmenheregho irala alutaari dhe muniokezaaku obubbaani olw'emisambwa egyo, n'emirambo gyaimwe ngisuule ku bifaananie eby'emisambwa egyo gye musinza. Mu busungu obungi" 
Leviticus26:31 ndidha kusaaniagho ebibuga byaimwe, n'ebifo mwe musinziza, ndobe na kusiimanga misengo gyaimwe."
