Numbers11:25 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaikira mu kire yaayogera ni Musa, era yaatoola ku mwoyo ogwali ku Musa yaaguta ku bantu abo. Era omwoyo ogwo bwe gwabaidhaku baayogera eby'obulanzi. Aye baakoma ku olwo, tibaakikola mukuzi gundi." 
Numbers11:26 Ghaaligho abantu babiri, ku bakulembeze ensanvu, abaasigala mu kifo abantu ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, owundi nga ni Elidadi ate owundi nga ni Medadi. Abo baali nga tibajiire mu Weema ni banaibwe. Agho omwoyo gwabaidhiraku eyo, baayogera eby'obulanzi." 
Numbers11:27 Ghaabaagho omwisuka eyalumuka n'aja n'akobera Musa ati: “Elidadi ni Medadi bali eyo mu kifo abantu ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, bali kwogera eby'obulanzi.”" 
Numbers11:28 Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni, nga mugheereza wa Musa, era owundi ku bantu ba Musa oyo abalondemu, yaakoba Musa ati: “Musengwa balobere!”" 
Numbers11:29 Aye Musa yaamwiramu ati: “Enkikidi ekugemye ku lwange? Kyandibaire kikalamu nguli Musengwa Katonda ata omwoyo gwe ku bantu be boonaboona baaba balanzi.” 
Numbers11:30 Agho Musa n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli bairayo ere abantu ye baasimba weema dhaibwe. 
Numbers11:31 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaasindika empewo ng'eva ku nhandha, yaafuuwa obunhonhi obuli ng'oti bukologo. Bwaidha nga bugulukira ghansi inho mita ng'oti ndala yonka okuva ku itaka, bwagwa agho okwezungulula ekifo Abaisiraeli ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe. Nga buli luuyi lw'osimbiraku otambula olugendo lwa lunaku lulamba memale waatuuka ghe bukanga." 
Numbers11:32 Abantu baasituka, baamala olunaku olwo lwonalwona, n'obwire bwonabwona, n'olunaku olwairirira lwonalwona, nga bali kusoloza obunhonhi obwo bwebabubunga. Eyasoloza obusinga okuba obutono, n'eyali n'obuzito obwa kilo olukumi (1,000). Agho baamala, buli muntu yaayanika obubwe okwezunguluza ekifo ekyo." 
Numbers11:33 Bwe baali nga bakaalya emamba yaibwe mu bungi, obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwabatumbukiraku ng'oti muliro, yaababonereza ng'abasindikira ekibamba eky'amaani." 
Numbers11:34 Ekifo ekyo baakyeta Kiburothi Hattaava, ekitegeeza: Amagombe ag'ab'amairu; kuba baaziikagho abantu ab'amairu." 
Numbers11:35 Bwe baava e Kiburothi Hattaava, beeyongerayo baatuuka e Hazerothi, baasimba eyo weema dhaibwe." 
Numbers12:1 Agho Miriamu ni Aaroni beemuluguunhiza Musa, olwa Musa oyo okufumbirwa omukazi Omukushi." 
Numbers12:2 Baakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda ayogerera mu Musa yenka? Tayogereraku ni mu ife twena?” Musengwa Katonda yaabawulira nga beemuluguunhia. 
Numbers12:3 Musa yali muntu muwombeefu inho, okusinga abantu boonaboona ab'oku nsi." 
Numbers12:4 Mangu ago, Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa, n'Aaroni, ni Miriamu, ati: “Mwensatule muje mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda.” Era bonsatule baaja." 
Numbers12:5 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaikira mu kire ekiri ng'oti mpango, yaayemerera mu mulyango ogw'Eweema eyo, yaayeta Aaroni ni Miriamu, era bombi baidha." 
Numbers12:6 Yaakoba ati: “Muwulire kye nkoba, bweghabaagho omulanzi mu imwe, nze Musengwa Katonda mwene mmweyoleka mu kubonekerwa, era naayogera naye mu kirooto." 
Numbers12:7 Aye ntyo ti bwe nkola ku mugheereza wange Musa. Namugha okulabirira abantu bange boonaboona. 
Numbers12:8 Oyo ndhogera naye butereevu maiso ku maiso, se ti mu bikoiko. Era ambona bukalamu nga bwe nfaanana. Kale mukana mutya ni mwemuluguunhiza omugheereza wange oyo Musa?”" 
Numbers12:9 Agho obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwabatumbukiraku ng'oti muliro, era Musengwa Katonda oyo yaavaagho." 
Numbers12:10 Ekire kire bwe kyava ku Weema eyo, okuja okubona nga Miriamu aidhwire endwaire ey'ebigenge, era ng'apaaluuse ng'oti mugozi. Aaroni bweyamulingaku n'abona nga yeenayeena aidhwire endwaire eyo," 
Numbers12:11 yaakoba Musa ati: “Wo musengwa wange, otatubonereza, olw'ekyo kye tukoze mu busiru ni twonoona." 
Numbers12:12 Otamuleka kuba ng'omuntu eyava mu nda ya inhina nga mufu, ng'omubiri gwe gwavundaku oluuyi.”" 
Numbers12:13 Agho Musa yaasaba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Wo Katonda wange, nkweghembye muwonie.”" 
Numbers12:14 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Nguli ise n'abaire ng'amufuudhie amatanta mu maiso, ti yandibaire na buswavu kumala nnaku musanvu? Kale leka asibirwe kuliya okw'ekifo abantu ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe okumala enaku musanvu, memale bamale bamwingize kabiri.”" 
Numbers12:15 Kale Miriamu yaasibirwa kuliya okw'ekifo abantu ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe okumala enaku musanvu. Era abantu tibaasimbukagho kutambula okutuusa lwe baamwiza ni bamwingiza kabiri. 
Numbers12:16 Ebyo bwe byawa abantu baatoolera okutambula nga baava e Hazerothi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu irungu ery'e Parani." 
Numbers13:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers13:2 “Tuma abantu baje bakeete ensi Kanaani, ye ndi kubagha imwe Abaisiraeli. Oidha kutumangaku mulala okuva mu buli kika, nga mukulembeze.”" 
Numbers13:3 Kale Musa yaatuma abakulembeze abo ab'ebika mu Isiraeli, nga bali mu irungu ery'e Parani nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira." 
Numbers13:4 Gano n'amaina gaibwe: Shammua mutabane wa Zakkuri ow'omu kika kya Reubeni; 
Numbers13:5 Shafati mutabane wa Hori ow'omu kika kya Simeoni; 
Numbers13:6 Kalebu mutabane wa Yefune ow'omu kika kya Yuda; 
Numbers13:7 Igali mutabane wa Yosefu ow'omu kika kya Issakari; 
Numbers13:8 Hoshea mutabane wa Nuni ow'omu kika kya Efuraimu; 
Numbers13:9 Palati mutabane wa Rafu ow'omu kika kya Benjamini; 
Numbers13:10 Gaddieli mutabane wa Sodi ow'omu kika kya Zebuluni; 
Numbers13:11 Gaddi mutabane wa Susi ow'omu kika kya Yosefu, ekyo nga n'ekika kya Manasse;" 
Numbers13:12 Ammieli mutabane wa Gemalli ow'omu kika kya Dani; 
Numbers13:13 Sethuri mutabane wa Mikaeli ow'omu kika kya Asheri; 
Numbers13:14 Nahabi mutabane wa Vopusi ow'omu kika kya Nafutali; 
Numbers13:15 ni Geueli mutabane wa Maki ow'omu kika kya Gadi. 
Numbers13:16 Ago n'amaina ag'abantu Musa be yatuma okukeeta ensi Kanaani. Era Musa yakyusa eriina lya Hoshea mutabane wa Nuni, yaamweta Yoshua." 
Numbers13:17 Agho musa yaabatuma okukeeta mu nsi Kanaani, ng'abakoba ati: “Muje mubitire mu kiketezo ekikalukalu eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, mungire mu kiketezo eky'ensozi." 
Numbers13:18 Mubone ensi eyo nga bw'eri, mubone oba abantu abagirimu ba maani oba banafu." 
Numbers13:19 Mubone oba erimu abantu kamaala oba batono, oba nsi nungi oba mbi, oba ebibuga byamu baabizimba na weema oba biriku ebimante ebigumu." 
Numbers13:20 Era mubone oba eitaka lyayo igimu oba ikalukalu, era oba kuliku emiti oba kuzira. Era mufube okuleeta ku bibala byayo.” Ebiseera ebyo byali bya mizabbibu ghe gisookereza okwenza." 
Numbers13:21 Kale abantu abo baaja baakeeta ensi eyo okuva ku irungu ery'e Zini okutuuka e Rehobu, agho gh'oingirira mu Hamathi." 
Numbers13:22 Baaniinaniina baingira mu kiketezo ekikalukalu eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, baaja baatuuka e Heburoni. Eyo n'eyali ab'ekika kya Ahimani n'ab'ekika kya Sheshai n'ab'ekika kya Talumai, baidhukulu ba Anaki. Heburoni ekyo, n'ekyasooka okuzimbibwa ghaabitagho emyaka musanvu, memale Zoani kyazimbibwa mu Misiri." 
Numbers13:23 Agho baatuuka mu kiiko eky'e Eshikoli, baatemayo olusaga olwaliku ekifaaganda eky'emizabbibu kirala kiti, abantu babiri baakitwalira ku muti, ng'owundi agemyeku eruuyi n'owundi eruuyi. Baatwala ni ku bibala eby'emikomamawanga n'eby'emitiini." 
Numbers13:24 Era ekifo ekyo baakituuma Ekiiko eky'Ekifaaganda, olw'ekifaaganda eky'emizabbibu Abaisiraeli kye baatemayo." 
Numbers13:25 Nga bamaze okukeeta ensi Kanaani okumala enaku amakumi ana, abantu abo baira." 
Numbers13:26 Baaja ye Musa ni Aaroni, ni y'Abaisiraeli boonaboona nga beesoloiza e Kadeshi mu irungu ery'e Parani, baabakobera bye baabonayo, era baabooleka ni ku bibala bye baatoolayo." 
Numbers13:27 Baakobera Musa bati: “Twatuuka mu nsi ye watutuma okukeeta, twabona nga ngimu era ng'erimu ebirungi kamaala, era bino n'ebibala byamu." 
Numbers13:28 Aye abantu baayo ba maani, n'ebibuga byaibwe binene inho era nga baabyezunguluza ebimante ebigumu. Ate ebyo nga bikaali agho, twabonayo baidhukulu ba Anaki." 
Numbers13:29 Twabona nga Abamaleki baba mu kiketezo kyayo ekikalukalu eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, Abahitti n'Abayebusi n'Abamori, baaba mu kiketezo kyayo eky'ensozi, ate Abakanaani baaba ku mbali okw'enhandha, ni ku mbali okw'omwiga Yorudani.”" 
Numbers13:30 Agho Kalebu yaasirisa abantu, agho mu maiso ga Musa, yaakoba ati: “Mukole tusitukiremu tuje tutwale ensi eyo. Kuba tusobolera irala bukalamu okugighangula.”" 
Numbers13:31 Aye abantu be yaja nabo baakoba bati: “Titusobola naire kuja kulumba bantu bale, kuba ba maani inho okutusinga.”" 
Numbers13:32 Kale baaleetera Abaisiraeli amawulire ag'obulimba agagema ku nsi ye baaja okukeeta, nga bakoba bati: “Ensi ye twaja okukeeta tebaza mere emala kuliisa bantu baamu. Abantu be twabonayo boonaboona baleeyi inho." 
Numbers13:33 Era twabonayo ni baidhukulu ba Anaki abawaigufu, abasimuka mu Nefili. Ife twebona nga tuli ng'oti bwa masisi, era boona tutyo bwe twababonekera.”" 
Numbers14:1 Agho abantu boonaboona baakuba empungu era baagegenga obwire obwo. 
Numbers14:2 Beemuluguunhiza Musa ni Aaroni nga bakoba bati: “Nguli twafiira mu nsi Misiri, oba ni tufiira ghano mu irungu, ekyo n'ekyandisinze!" 
Numbers14:3 Lwaki Musengwa Katonda ali kututwala mu nsi eyo okufiira mu lutalo? Bakazi baife n'abaana baife baidha kufuuka munhago! Okwirayo e Misiri ti n'ekyandisinzeeku?” 
Numbers14:4 Agho beeteesaamu beene na beene bati: “Ka twerondemu omukulembeze twireyo e Misiri.” 
Numbers14:5 Agho Musa ni Aaroni baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka agho mu maiso ag'Abaisiraeli boonaboona abeesoloza. 
Numbers14:6 Aye Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni, ni Kalebu mutabane wa Yefune, abaali ku abo abaaja okukeeta, baakanulamu ebivaalo byaibwe olw'okunakughala." 
Numbers14:7 Baakoba Abaisiraeli boonaboona abeesoloza bati: “Ensi ye twaja okukeeta nungi ebitaloodheka. 
Numbers14:8 Musengwa Katonda bw'aba ng'atusiimye aidha kututwala mu nsi eyo engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala, agitughe." 
Numbers14:9 Kye mutagwaine kukola, n'okudheemera Musengwa Katonda. Mutatya bantu bale, kuba baidha kutwanguyira okughangula, ng'oti bwetwanguyirwa okulya emere. Ekibakuuma kibatooleibwaku, era Musengwa Katonda ali ku luuyi lwaife.”" 
Numbers14:10 Aye abantu boonaboona abeesoloza baayenda bwa kubakuba mabaale. Agho ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kyabonekera Abaisiraeli boonaboona ku Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. 
Numbers14:11 Era Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Abantu bano balituusa li okuunhooma? Era balituusa li obutaneesiga, waire nga nkoze obumanhiso kamaala nga babona." 
Numbers14:12 Ndidha kubasindikira obulwaire obubi mbazikirize, iwe nkufuulemu eighanga einene era ery'amaani okusinga beene.”" 
Numbers14:13 Aye Musa yaakoba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe watoola abantu bano ku Bamisiri ng'okozesa obuyinza bwo. Mperaano Abamisiri bwe baliwulira ng'okoze otyo," 
Numbers14:14 baja kukobera abantu ababa mu nsi eno, kuba baawulira nga iwe oba mu bantu bano era ng'obonebwa maiso ku maiso. Era baawulira ng'ekire kyo kyemerera ghaigulu gh'abantu bano, ng'oli kubakulemberamu ng'oli mu kire ekiri ng'oti mpango omusana, era waaba mu muliro oguli ng'oti mpango obwire." 
Numbers14:15 Kale bw'onaita abantu bano boonaboona n'obamalagho, amaghanga agaakuwuliraku eby'amaani bye wakoba, galikoba gati," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Musengwa Katonda yalemwa okutuusa abantu bano mu nsi ye yabalayirira okubagha, kyeyava n'abaitira mu irungu.’" 
Numbers14:17 Kale buti ni nkweghemba, oyoleke obuyinza bwo, okole kye wasuubiza, bwe wakoba oti," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Nze Musengwa Katonda ndwagho okusungughala, ngonza abantu obutalekera, era naasonigha aboonooni n'abadheemu. Aye tiriroba kubonereza aliku musango. Ndibonereza abaana n'abaidhukulu olw'ebibi eby'abazaire baibwe, okutuukira irala ku luse olwokusatu n'olwokuna.’" 
Numbers14:19 Nkweghemba osonighe abantu bano ebibi byaibwe olw'okugonza kwo okungi okutakoma, era nga bw'obaire obasonighanga kasookanga bava e Misiri n'okutuusa mpegaano.”" 
Numbers14:20 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Kale mbasoniighe nga bw'osabye. 
Numbers14:21 Aye bwenebwene nga bwendi omulamu, era ng'ensi bw'eidhula ekitiisa kyange," 
Numbers14:22 ghazira ku bantu abo alituuka mu nsi eyo. Abantu abo baabona ekitiisa kyange n'obumanhiso bye nakolera mu Misiri ni mu irungu, aye era bansonsoonia emikuzi gino eikumi, baaloba kuwulira bye mbakoba." 
Numbers14:23 Abantu abo tibalibona ku nsi ye nasuubiza okugha badhaadha baibwe, era ghazira waire omulala ku abo boonaboona abaanhooma, aligingiramu." 
Numbers14:24 Aye olw'okuba omugheereza wange Kalebu ali n'omwoyo ogw'endhawulo, era nga aneesigira irala mu bwidhuvu, ndidha kumwingiza mu nsi ye yakeeta. Era baidhukulu be n'abaliba beene nsi eyo." 
Numbers14:25 Nga mpegaano Abamaleki n'Abakanaani bwe bali mu biiko, imwe enkyo mukyuke mutambule nga mwolekeire eirungu, mugeme engira etuuka ku Nhandha Emyufu.”" 
Numbers14:26 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni ati: 
Numbers14:27 “Abantu bano abakozi b'ebibi, balirekera li okuneemuluguunhiza? Mpuliire okwemuluguunhia kwaibwe, kwatuuka n'okunsina." 
Numbers14:28 Kale ni mubakobe muti, Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Nga nze Musengwa Katonda bwendi omulamu, ndidha kubakola ekyo kyene kye mukobye nga mpulira." 
Numbers14:29 Mwidha kufa, emirambo gyaimwe gigwe mu irungu muno. Era abo boonaboona ku imwe abagheza emyaka amakumi abiri egy'obukulu n'okusingagho, abaneemuluguunhiza," 
Numbers14:30 ghazira waire mulala ati alituuka mu nsi ye nabalayirira okubagha, okutoolaku Kalebu mutabane wa Yefune, ni Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni." 
Numbers14:31 Aye abaana baimwe abato be mwakoba muti baja kufuuka munhago, abo be ndingiza ni batyama mu nsi eyo, imwe ye mwanhoomerera." 
Numbers14:32 Aye imwe emirambo gyaimwe giidha kuziikibwa mu irungu muno. 
Numbers14:33 Abaana baimwe baidha kuba baayi mu irungu lino okumala emyaka amakumi ana nga badaagadaaga, olwa imwe obutaba beesigwa, okutuusa omulambo gw'oyo alisembayo ku imwe okufa lwe guligwa mu irungu muno." 
Numbers14:34 Mwidha kudaagadaaga olw'ebibi byaimwe okumala emyaka amakumi ana. Buli lunaku, ku nnaku amakumi ana dhe mwamala nga mukeeta ensi eyo, mwidha kulusasulangamu mwaka mulamba. Memale olwo mumanhe nga tiri musangaavu." 
Numbers14:35 Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze ndhogeire. Bwenebwene ntyo bwenja okukola abantu bano ababi abeesoloiza okuntakania. Mu irungu lino boonaboona mwe baja okufiira baweegho.’ ”" 
Numbers14:36 Abantu Musa be yatuma okukeeta ensi eyo, ni baira ni baleetera Abaisiraeli boonaboona okwemuluguunhia olw'amawulire ag'obulimba ge baaleeta agagema ku nsi eyo," 
Numbers14:37 Musengwa Katonda yabasindikira ekibamba baafa. 
Numbers14:38 Okutoolaku Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni ni Kalebu mutabane wa Yefune, n'abataafa ku abo abaaja okukeeta ensi eyo." 
Numbers14:39 Musa bweyakobera Abaisiraeli boonaboona ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'akobye, baalira gaabawa." 
Numbers14:40 Baawuuna ku nkyo inho baaniinaniina nga baaja mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi, bakoba bati: “Bona eno tuli beetegefu okuja mu kifo Musengwa Katonda kye yatusuubiza. Bwenebwene tuboine nga twayonoona olw'okwemuluguunhia.”" 
Numbers14:41 Aye Musa yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki mpegaano muli kudheemera ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda? Ti mwidha kughangula. 
Numbers14:42 Mutaja, abazigu baidha kubakubira eyo, kuba Musengwa Katonda tali n'imwe." 
Numbers14:43 Mwidha kwagaanana n'Abamaleki n'Abakanaani abali eyo, babaitire mu lutalo. Musengwa Katonda taidha kuba n'imwe, kuba mwamuvaaku mwaloba okumugondera.”" 
Numbers14:44 Aye beene baakana, baaniinaniina mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi, waire ng'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda tiyava mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, oba Musa okuva mu kifo ekyo." 
Numbers14:45 Agho Abamaleki n'Abakanaani abaabanga mu biketezo ebyo eby'oku nsozi, baabalumba, baabaghangula, era baababingirira okubatuukiza irala e Horuma." 
Numbers15:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Kobera Abaisiraeli oti 
Numbers15:2 amateeka gano ge munaajiirangaku mu nsi ye muja okutyamamu, ye ndidha okubagha:" 
Numbers15:3 Bwe munaayendanga okugha nze Musengwa Katonda ekigheebwayo okuva mu nte dhaimwe, oba mu ntaama dhaimwe, oba mu mbuzi dhaimwe, ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, oba ng'omusengo ogugheebwayo olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ng'ekigheebwayo eky'ekyeyendere, oba nga muli ku mbaga edh'ebibinuko ebyalagirwa, akawoowo ak'ebigheebwayo ebyo kaidha kunsangaazanga nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers15:4 Omuntu yeenayeena bw'ayendanga okughaayo ye nze Musengwa Katonda ekigheebwayo eky'ensambo ng'oti n'eyo, akighangayo ghalala ni kilo ndala ey'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, nga butabwirwamu lita ey'omuzigo. Ekyo nga n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke." 
Numbers15:5 Era aidha kughangayo e lita ey'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ng'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa. Ekyo kye mwidha okutegekanga kijiirenga ghalala na buli kigheebwayo ekyokebwa oba omusengo ogw'entaama ento. 
Numbers15:6 Bw'aghangayo entaama enume enkulu, ategekangayo kilo ibiri edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, nga butabwirwamu lita ndala n'ekitundu ey'omuzigo, ekyo kibe ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke." 
Numbers15:7 Era aghangayo lita ndala n'ekitundu ey'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, ng'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa. Akawoowo kaabyo kansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers15:8 Ole bw'ategekanga okughaayo ye nze Musengwa Katonda ente endaagho ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, oba ng'omusengo ogw'okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ng'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana," 
Numbers15:9 agigheerangayo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo isatu edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, nga butabwirwamu lita ibiri edh'omuzigo." 
Numbers15:10 Era aghangayo lita ibiri edh'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ng'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa. Akawoowo kaabyo kansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda. 
Numbers15:11 “Ebyo bye mwidha okukolanga buli lwe munaaghangayo ente enume, oba entaama enume enkulu, oba entaama ento, oba embuzi." 
Numbers15:12 Obungi obw'ebintu ebinaajiiranga ku bigheebwayo ebyo, bwidha kujiiranga ku bungi obw'ensolo edhinaagheebwangayo." 
Numbers15:13 Abo boonaboona abatyamye ab'omu Isiraeli bakolanga batyo, buli lwe baghangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers15:14 Era bweghabangagho omusenze aba mu imwe, oba omuntu yeenayeena abaire n'imwe ekiseera kyonakyona kye mubairegho, memale n'ayenda okughaayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, akolanga nga imwe bwe mukola." 
Numbers15:15 Amateeka malala ago n'agaidha okufuganga imwe Abaisiraeli n'abasenze abali mu imwe, era tigaakyukengamu ense n'ense. Imwe n'abasenze mwidha kubisibwanga bulala." 
Numbers15:16 Amateeka n'amalala ago, n'ebiragiro n'ebirala ebyo ebinaafuganga imwe n'abasenze ababa mu imwe.”" 
Numbers15:17 Musengwa Katonda era yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers15:18 “Kobera Abaisiraeli oti, bwe mutuukanga mu nsi ye ndi kubatwalamu," 
Numbers15:19 era ekiseera bwe kituukanga ni mulya ku mere ey'omu nsi eyo, mughangayo ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers15:20 Ku ngaano ye musookanga okukanda, mufumbangaku omugaati omutono mugugheeyo ng'ekigheebwayo, nga bwe mughaayo ekigheebwayo olw'ekifo aghakubirwa engaano." 
Numbers15:21 Ku ngaano ye musookanga okukanda, mutoolangaku mwaghaayo ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda, mu nse dhaimwe dhoonadhoona edhiirangagho." 
Numbers15:22 “Aye kisoboka, omuntu yaasobya mu butali bugenderevu, yaaloba kutuukiriza biragiro bino byonabyona, nze Musengwa Katonda bye nakobera Musa." 
Numbers15:23 Era kisoboka, omuntu yaaloba okutuukiriza ebyo byonabyona nze Musengwa Katonda bye nabalagira nga mbita mu Musa okuviira irala ku lunaku lwe nateeka amateeka, n'okweyongerayo okubita mu nse dhoonadhoona edhiriiragho." 
Numbers15:24 Aye okusobya bwe kuba nga tikwakolebwa mu bugenderevu era ng'abantu boonaboona tibaakimanha, olwo abantu boonaboona baghangayo ente ento enume ndala olw'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda. Era bateerangaku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, n'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, ng'amateeka bwe galagira. Era baghangayo n'embuzi ndala enume ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Numbers15:25 Agho kabona akolanga omukolo ogw'okutoolebwaku ebibi, olw'Abaisiraeli boonaboona okusoniyibwanga, kuba ekisobyo ekyo tikyali kigenderere ate nga bandeeteire nze Musengwa Katonda ekigheebwayo kyaibwe ekyokebwa n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, olw'ekisobyo kyaibwe ekyo." 
Numbers15:26 Abaisiraeli boonaboona n'abasenze ababanga nga babalimu basoniyibwanga, kuba boonaboona bavunaanibwa ekisobyo ekyo." 
Numbers15:27 “Omuntu bw'akolanga ekibi nga tagendereire, aghangayo embuzi enduusi ey'omwaka omulala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Numbers15:28 Kabona akoleranga mu maiso gange, nze Musengwa Katonda, omukolo ogw'okutoolebwaku ebibi olw'omuntu akoze ekibi nga tagendereire, era omuntu oyo asoniyibwanga." 
Numbers15:29 Mubanga n'amateeka malala ago agavunaana omuntu akola ekibi nga tagendereire, k'abe omutyamye Omuisiraeli oba abe omusenze abanga ng'abalimu." 
Numbers15:30 “Aye ole akola ekibi ng'agendereire, k'abe Omuisiraeli omuzaale waamu oba omusenze, aba ng'annhoomye nze Musengwa Katonda era omuntu oyo aba nga takaabalirwa mu bantu bange." 
Numbers15:31 Olw'okuba aba ng'anhoomye ekibono kyange nze Musengwa Katonda era ng'amenhie eiteeka lyange, omuntu oyo aba nga takaabalirwa mu bantu bange naire, era aba nga yeereeteire mwene omusango okumusinga.”" 
Numbers15:32 Lwali lulala, ng'Abaisiraeli bakaali mu irungu, baayagaana omuntu ng'ali kugherera enku ku lunaku lwa Sabbato." 
Numbers15:33 Abo abaamwagaana, baamuleeta eri Musa ni Aaroni n'Abaisiraeli abandi boonaboona." 
Numbers15:34 Baamukuuma butiribiri olw'okuba baali nga tibaidhi bukalamu kya kumukolera. 
Numbers15:35 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Omuntu oyo ateekwa kwitibwa. Abantu boonaboona baidha kumukuba amabaale afe, nga bamutoire mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe.”" 
Numbers15:36 Kale abantu boonaboona baamutoola mu ekifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, baaja baamukuba amabaale yaafa, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers15:38 “Koba Abaisiraeli oti mutungenga amadhwenge ku buli nsonda edhiri ku bivaalo byaimwe, ku buli idhwenge mutungengaku akawuuzi aka bululu. Buli luse olunairangagho lwidha kukolanga lutyo." 
Numbers15:39 Amadhwenge ago buli lwe munaagalingangaku gaidha kubanga akamanhiso akanaabaidhusanga amateeka gange nze Musengwa Katonda n'okugagonderanga, mulobenga kunvaaku ni mujiira ku ebyo emyoyo gyaimwe n'amaiso gaimwe bye bibaleetera okwegomba." 
Numbers15:40 Kale mwidha kwidhukiranga era mugonderenga amateeka gange, olwo mubenga abatuukiriire eri nze Katonda waimwe." 
Numbers15:41 Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, eyabatoola mu nsi Misiri, nsobole okubanga Katonda waimwe. Ni nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe.”" 
Numbers16:1 Agho Kora mutabane wa Izahara era nga mwidhukulu wa Kohathi ow'ekika kya Levi, ghalala ni Dathani ni Abiramu batabane ba Eliabu, era ni Oni mutabane wa Pelethi, ow'ekika kya Reubeni," 
Numbers16:2 beesitula nga bali n'abantu ebikumi bibiri n'ataanu, nga bakulembeze mu Isiraeli era nga bamanhiibwa bukalamu." 
Numbers16:3 Beesoloza, baaja baadheemera Musa ni Aaroni, baabakoba bati: “Mubitiriiza okwekuluntaza! Abantu boonaboona ab'eighanga lino ba Musengwa Katonda era Musengwa Katonda aba mu ife. Kale lwaki mwetwala nga muli ba ghaigulu inho okusinga abantu ba Musengwa Katonda abo?”" 
Numbers16:4 Musa bweyawulira ebyo yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. 
Numbers16:5 Bwe yamala, yaakoba Kora ni baine boonaboona ati: “Enkyo Musengwa Katonda aidha kutwoleka oyo owuwe atuukiriire, era oyo aidha kumuseesa kumpi ni mwene. Oyo y'anaalonda aidha kumuseesa kumpi ni mwene." 
Numbers16:6 Mpegaano mwidha kukola muti: iwe Kora ni baino boonaboona mwidha kugema ebiniokezebwamu obubbaani," 
Numbers16:7 mubiteemu omuliro enkyo era mute obubbaani ku muliro okwo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Omuntu Musengwa Katonda y'anaalonda n'aidha okuba atuukiriire. Imwe baidhukulu ba Levi mubitiriiza okwekuluntaza!” 
Numbers16:8 Musa era yaakoba Kora ati: “Muwulire, imwe baidhukulu ba Levi." 
Numbers16:9 Mukibona nga kintu kitono, Katonda wa Isiraeli okulonda imwe mu bantu be Abaisiraeli boonaboona n'abaseesa okumpi ni mwene, mugheerezenga mu Weema ye era mwemererenga mu maiso g'abantu be abo okubagheereza?" 
Numbers16:10 Katonda yabaseesa kumpi ni mwene, iwe ni baganda bo baidhukulu ba Levi. Buti muli kwenda mufune n'obwakabona bwona?" 
Numbers16:11 Kale mukimanhe muti, iwe ni baino boonaboona muli kudheemera Musengwa Katonda mwene kuba, katyo Aaroni naani memale mumwemuluguunhize?”" 
Numbers16:12 Agho Musa yaayetesa Dathani ni Abiramu batabane ba Eliabu, aye baakoba bati: “Titwidha kwidha." 
Numbers16:13 Okututoola mu nsi engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala n'otuleeta okutwitira ghano mu irungu, ti kikumala? Mpegaano oli na kwenda kwefuula mufuzi waife?" 
Numbers16:14 Mu butuufu bwene tiwatuleeta mu nsi ngimu erimu birungi kamaala, era tiwatugha bibandha na masamba ga mizabbibu ni biba byaife ku bwaife. Aye oli kwenda kuziba bwa bantu bano maiso? Kale titwidha kwidha.”" 
Numbers16:15 Agho Musa yaasungughala inho era yaakoba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Otasiima kigheebwayo kyaibwe kyonakyona kye banaakuleetera. Nze nzira kintu kye natoola ku bantu abo, waire endogoyi endala eti. Era ghazira waire omulala ku abo ye nakolaku akabi.”" 
Numbers16:16 Agho Musa yaakoba Kora ati: “Enkyo, iwe ni baino boonaboona ni Aaroni, mwidhe mubeegho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers16:17 Buli muntu ku imwe atoole ekiniokezebwamu obubbaani ekikye, akiteemu obubbaani era akireete mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, ebyo nga n'ebiniokezebwamu obubbaani ebikumi ebibiri n'ataanu, era n'iwe ni Aaroni, buli muntu n'ekiniokezebwamu obubbaani ekikye.”" 
Numbers16:18 Kale buli muntu yaatoola ekiniokezebwamu obubbaani ekikye, yaakitaamu omuliro n'obubbaani, era boonaboona baayemerera ku mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, nga bali ni Musa ni Aaroni." 
Numbers16:19 Kora yaasoloza abantu boonaboona, baayemerera ku mulyango ogw'Eweema eyo nga balingiriire Musa ni Aaroni. Agho ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kyabonekera abantu boonaboona." 
Numbers16:20 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni ati: 
Numbers16:21 “Mwesende muve mu bantu bano, mbazikirize amangu gano.”" 
Numbers16:22 Aye Musa ni Aaroni baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka, baakoba bati: “Wo Katonda waife, niiwe ensimuko ey'obulamu obwa buli kintu. Omuntu omulala bw'akola ekibi osungughalira abantu boonaboona?”" 
Numbers16:23 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers16:24 “Koba abantu boonaboona bave okumpi ni weema dha Kora, Dathani, ni Abiramu.”" 
Numbers16:25 Agho Musa yaasituka, yaaja ye Dathani, ni Abiramu. Abakulembeze mu Isiraeli baamunonereza." 
Numbers16:26 Yaakoba abantu boonaboona ati: “Mbeeghemba muve okumpi ni weema edh'abantu bano ababi era mutagema ku kintu kyaibwe kyonakyona. Bwe mutaakole mutyo, musobola okuzikirizibwa ghalala nabo olw'ebibi byaibwe.”" 
Numbers16:27 Kale abantu beesenda, baaba ghala ni weema dha Kora, ni Dathani, ni Abiramu. Dathani ni Abiramu baafuluma baayemerera gha miryango egy'eweema dhaibwe, ghalala ni bakazi baibwe era n'abaana baibwe abato." 
Numbers16:28 Musa yaakoba abantu ati: “Ku kino kwe munaamanhira nga Musengwa Katonda n'eyantuma okukola ebintu ebyo byonabyona, era nga tibikola ku bwange zenka." 
Numbers16:29 Abantu bano bwe bafanga olumbe olwabuliidho, oba enkomerero yaibwe n'eba ng'ey'abantu ababuliidho, agho Musengwa Katonda anaabanga nga ti n'eyantuma." 
Numbers16:30 Aye Musengwa Katonda bw'anaakolagho ekintu ekitabangaghooku, eitaka ni lyasama ni libamira beene n'ebyaibwe byonabyona, ni bawolomera mu magombe nga balamu, mwidha kumanha ng'abantu abo baanhooma Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Numbers16:31 Bwe yali amaliriza okwogera ebyo byonabyona, eitaka Dathani ni Abiramu kwe baali beemereire lyetema olutanda olunene," 
Numbers16:32 lyabamira aghalala n'eby'omu maka gaibwe, era n'abantu boonaboona abaanonereza Kora ghalala n'ebintu byaibwe byonabyona." 
Numbers16:33 Kale batyo baika e magombe nga balamu, n'ebyaibwe byonabyona. Eitaka lyabaziika baasaanagho, abantu nga babona." 
Numbers16:34 Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaali okumpi agho, baalumukagho bwe baawulira okulira kwaibwe. Baakoba bati: “Tulumuke. Eitaka twena litatumira.”" 
Numbers16:35 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaasindika omuliro gwayokya abantu ebikumi ebibiri n'ataanu abaali nga bali kuniosa obubbaani. 
Numbers16:36 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers16:37 “Koba Eleazari mutabane wa Aaroni kabona atoolegho ebiniokezebwamu obubbaani okuva mu kyokero aghayiiriire abantu abo. Amanda agasansaanize eyo eghala, kuba ebiniokezebwamu obubbaani ebyo bitukuvu." 
Numbers16:38 Ebiniokezebwamu obubbaani ebyo eby'abantu abo abaayonoona ni baitibwa, bitukuvu, kuba baabighaayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda. Kale ni ka babigheeseemu amabaati ag'okughembanga ku alutaari, kabenga akamanhiso ak'okulabulanga Abaisiraeli.”" 
Numbers16:39 Kale Eleazari kabona yaatoola ebiniokezebwamu obubbaani ebyo ebyakolebwa mu kyuma ky'ekikomo, abantu abo abaayokebwa bye baaghaayo, yaabighaayo baabigheesaamu eky'okughembanga ku alutaari." 
Numbers16:40 Ekyo kiidha kwidhukizanga Abaisiraeli, ghalobe kubangagho muntu yeenayeena atali kabona wa ku lulyo lw'Aaroni, aseeta mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda okuniokeza obubbaani; kuba asobola okuzikirizibwa nga Kora ni baine bwe baazikirizibwa. Ebyo byakolebwa nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Eleazari ng'abita mu Musa." 
Numbers16:41 Ku lunaku olwairirira, abantu boonaboona beemuluguunhiza Musa ni Aaroni, nga bakoba bati: “Mwaise abantu ba Musengwa Katonda!”" 
Numbers16:42 Bwe beesoloza boonaboona okwemuluguunhiza Musa ni Aaroni batyo, baaja okulinga y'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, nga babona ekire kigighembyeku, era ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kyaboneka." 
Numbers16:43 Musa ni Aaroni baidha emberi ow'Eweema eyo. 
Numbers16:44 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers16:45 “Mwesende muve mu bantu bano, mbazikirize buti buti!” Musa ni Aaroni baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka." 
Numbers16:46 Musa yaakoba Aaroni ati: “Toola ekiniokezebwamu obubbaani ekikyo, okiteemu omuliro okuva ku alutaari era ote obubbaani ku muliro ogwo. Bw'omala okitwale mangu eri abantu okole omukolo ogw'okubatoolaku ebibi; kuba obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bumaze okubatuukaku era endwaire embi etooleire okubaita.”" 
Numbers16:47 Kale Aaroni yaatoola ekiniokezebwamu obubbaani ekikye, yaalumuka yaaja mu bantu, yayagaana nga bwenebwene endwaire embi eri kwita abantu. Agho yaata obubbaani mu kiniokezebwamu ekyo, era yaakola omukolo ogw'okutoola ku bantu ebibi." 
Numbers16:48 Yaayemerera ghagati gh'abafu n'abakaali abalamu, endwaire embi eyo yaakoma agho." 
Numbers16:49 Abaafa obulwaire obubi obwo baali omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ina na lusanvu (14,700), nga tobaliireeku abo abaafiira mu keediimo ka Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Endwaire embi bweyalekera agho okwita abantu, Aaroni yaira ye Musa gha mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers17:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers17:2 “Koba Abaisiraeli boonaboona bakughe emiigo ikumi n'ebiri, mulala mulala okuva ku buli mukulu wa kika. Era omale oghandiike eriina lya buli mukulu wa kika ku mwigo gwe." 
Numbers17:3 Era oidha kughandiika eriina ly'Aaroni ku mwigo ogw'ekika kya Levi, kuba buli mukulu wa kika aidha kuba n'omwigo mulala." 
Numbers17:4 Oidha kutwala emiigo egyo mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, ogite gha mberi w'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ghe twagaananira n'iwe." 
Numbers17:5 Omwigo ogw'omuntu ye nnaalonda gwidha kusibuka. Mu nsambo eyo ndidha kulekeza Abaisiraeli okukwemuluguunhizanga.” 
Numbers17:6 Musa yaayogera n'Abaisiraeli, era abakulembeze baibwe baamugha omwigo mulala mulala okuva mu buli kika. Egyo gyaba emiigo ikumi n'ebiri, nga n'ogw'Aaroni gulimu." 
Numbers17:7 Musa yaata emiigo egyo mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, gha mberi w'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano." 
Numbers17:8 Ku lunaku olwairirira, Musa bweyaja mu Weema eyo, yaabona ng'omwigo gw'Aaroni ogw'ab'ekika kya Levi gusibwike, gwaleeta amakaba, gwamulisa ebimuli, era gwataaku ebibala ebyetebwa alumondi ebyenvu." 
Numbers17:9 Musa yaatoolayo emiigo gyonagyona okuva gha mberi gh'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, yaagireetera Abaisiraeli boonaboona baabona, era buli mukulembeze yaatoola omwigo ogugwe." 
Numbers17:10 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Izaayo omwigo gw'Aaroni gha mberi w'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, gukumirwe agho ng'akamanhiso eri abadheemu, nti baidha kufa bwe batalekera agho kuneemuluguunhizanga.”" 
Numbers17:11 Musa yaakola atyo nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira. 
Numbers17:12 Agho Abaisiraeli baakoba Musa bati: “Bona eno, tutuuse okuzikirira. Tufiire, tuwoiregho." 
Numbers17:13 Oba nga buli muntu aseeta okumpi ni Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda ateekwa kufa, olwo twenatwena tituuweegho buwe?”" 
Numbers18:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Aaroni ati: “Iwe ni batabane bo n'ab'omu kika kyo boonaboona, niimwe mwidha okuvunaanibwanga byonabyona ebinaabanga nga bisobye mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Aye ebinaabanga nga bisobye mu bwakabona, biidha kuvunaanibwanga iwe ni batabane bo mwenka." 
Numbers18:2 Era oidha kuleetanga baganda bo ab'ekika kya Levi, bakweyimbeku, bakuyambengaku iwe ni batabane bo, nga muli kugheereza mu Weema." 
Numbers18:3 Baidha kukolanga emirimo gy'onaabaghanga era bakolenga n'emirimo egindi egy'omu Weema. Aye bataseetanga kumpi na bintu bikozesebwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, oba okuseeta ku alutaari olwo beene n'iwe mulobe kufa." 
Numbers18:4 Baidha kukoleranga ghalala n'iwe, mu kulabiriranga Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, nga mukola emirimo gyamu gyonagyona. Aye ghatabangagho muntu atali Mulevi, n'aseeta ye muli." 
Numbers18:5 Era niimwe abanaalabiriranga Ekifo Ekitukuvu ni alutaari, memale olwo ndobe kwirayo kusungughalira Baisiraeli." 
Numbers18:6 Era bona eno, nonze baganda bo Abalevi, naabakugha ng'ekirabo okuva mu Baisiraeli boonaboona. Bagheereibwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda, okugheerezanga mu Weema." 
Numbers18:7 Aye iwe ni batabane bo, niimwe mwenka abanaakolanga emirimo egy'obwakabona egy'oku alutaari n'egy'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Mbaghaire obwakabona ng'ekirabo, era omuntu atali Mulevi bw'anaaseetanga okumpi, aidha kwitibwanga.”" 
Numbers18:8 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Aaroni ati: “Era bona eno, nkughaire ebyo byonabyona ebirekebwagho nga tibyokeibwa ku bigheebwayo ebitukuvu Abaisiraeli bye bampa nze Musengwa Katonda. Mbikughaire iwe ni batabane bo ng'omugabo gwe munaafunanga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Numbers18:9 Bino n'ebinaabanga ebyaimwe ku bintu ebitukuvu einho byonabyona ebigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda, ebirekebwagho nga tibyokeibwa: buli ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, buli ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, na buli ekigheebwayo ng'omutango. Byonabyona ebitukuvu einho ebigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda, biidha kubanga bibyo ni batabane bo." 
Numbers18:10 Ebintu ebyo mwidha kubiriiranga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, era buli musaadha anaabanga wa idembe okubiryaku. Mubitwalenga nga bitukuvu." 
Numbers18:11 “Okwongereza ku ebyo, ebintu ebindi byonabyona Abaisiraeli bye banaaghangayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda ng'ekigheebwayo eky'endhawulo nga kiwuubibwa, biidha kubanga bibyo iwe, ni batane bo, ni baghala bo ng'omugabo gwe munaafunanga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Buli muntu yeenayeena ow'omu ndhu yo anaabanga wa idembe okubiryaku kasita anaabanga nga mulongoofu." 
Numbers18:12 “Nkughaire ebirime ebisinga bulungi ebisooka okukungulwa Abaisiraeli bye bampa, era nga ni bino: omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, omwenge ogw'emizabbibu n'emere ey'empeke." 
Numbers18:13 Era nkughaire ebibala ebisooka okwenga mu misiri gyaibwe gyonagyona bye bandeetera nze Musengwa Katonda. Buli muntu yeenayeena ow'omu ndhu yo nga mulongoofu, anaabanga wa idembe okubiryaku." 
Numbers18:14 “Buli kintu kyonakyona ekinaagheebwangayo mu Isiraeli okuba ekyange, kiidha kubanga kikyo." 
Numbers18:15 “Buli kintu kyonakyona ekinaazaalibwanga mu luzaalo olusooka ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda, k'abe omuntu oba k'ebe ensolo, kiidha kubanga kikyo. Aye oidha kuganhanga okutwala ekyo ekinaagheebwangayo okununula omwana omuberi, n'ekyo ekinaagheebwangayo okununula ensolo ezaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka etali nongoofu." 
Numbers18:16 Abaana banaanunulwanga nga ba mwezi mulala, era buli mwana aidha kusasulirwanga ebitundu bitaanu ebya feeza, ng'ojiira ku mbala entongole ey'eisinzizo." 
Numbers18:17 Aye ente n'entaama n'embuzi edhinaazaalibwanga mu luzaalo olusooka, tibaadhinunulenga. Edho dhange ku bwange, kale ntukuvu. Oidha kudhiitanga, omansirenga omusaayi gwadho ku alutaari, era oyokyenga amasavu gaadho ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Akawoowo kaadho kansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers18:18 Emamba yaadho eidha kubanga yiyo, mu nsambo n'endala ng'ekifuba ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda nga kiwuubibwa n'ekisambi eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha, bwe biri ebibyo." 
Numbers18:19 Nkughaire iwe, ni batabane bo, ni baghala bo, ebigheebwayo ebitukuvu byonabyona Abaisiraeli bye banandeeteranga nze Musengwa Katonda, bibe omugabo gwaimwe gwe munaafunanga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Eyo n'endagaano ye nkoze n'iwe era n'eizaire lyo, etaja kumenhebwagho ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Numbers18:20 Era Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Aaroni ati: “Timwidha kufuna kintu kyonakyona kya nsikirano, waire okugheebwa omugabo gwonagwona mu nsi y'Abaisiraeli. Ninze omugabo gwaimwe ogunaababeesangagho mu Baisiraeli.”" 
Numbers18:21 Era Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Abalevi mbaghaire ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu eikumi Abaisiraeli kye bampa, gube omugabo gwaibwe olw'okusasulira obugheereza bwe bakola mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers18:22 Okuva ni mpegaano, Abaisiraeli abandi abatali Balevi bataseetanga kumpi na Weema eyo, olwo balobe kwereetaku kibi kya kubaitisa." 
Numbers18:23 Aye Abalevi bonka n'abanaagheerezanga mu Weema eyo, era n'abanaavunaanizibwanga ebisobu ebinaagibangamu. Eiteeka eryo liidha kubangagho mu nse dhoonadhoona edhiriiragho. Abalevi tibaidha kugheebwanga mugabo mu Baisiraeli." 
Numbers18:24 Olw'okuba mpaire Abalevi ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi Abaisiraeli kye bampa, gube omugabo gwaibwe, kye nviire ni nkoba nti tibaidha kugheebwanga mugabo mu Baisiraeli.”" 
Numbers18:25 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers18:26 “Koba abalevi oti, ‘Bwe munaamalanga okutoola ku Baisiraeli ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu eikumi kye bampa, nze Musengwa kye mbaghaire ng'omugabo gwaimwe, mwena mwidha kutoolanga ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi ku ebyo bye mufunie, kibenga ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers18:27 Ekigheebwayo kyaimwe ekyo kiidha kutwalibwanga ng'oti n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke eva mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano, era ng'oti n'ekigheebwayo ekiidhuvu ekiva mu kikunhiro eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
Numbers18:28 Kale mutyo mwena bwe mwidhanga okutoola ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu eikumi Abaisiraeli boonaboona bye banaabaghanga, mukigheeyo ng'ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda. Ekigheebwayo kyaimwe ekyo mwidha kukighanga Aaroni kabona." 
Numbers18:29 Ku bintu byonabyona bye munaafunanga, mwidha kutoolangaku ebisinga bulungi mubighengayo mu bwidhuvu ng'ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers18:30 Bwe munaamalanga okughaayo ebyo ebisinga bulungi, ebisigalagho mwidha kubisigazanga ng'omuntu bw'asigaza ebiva mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano n'ebiva mu kikunhiro eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
Numbers18:31 Munaabanga ba idembe, imwe beene era n'ab'omu ndhu dhaimwe, okubiriira mu kifo kyonakyona ekibaagho, kuba ebyo n'ebisasulira obugheereza bwe mukola mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers18:32 Era timuubenga na kibi kye mukoze olw'okubirya, kasita munaabanga nga mughaireyo ebisinga bulungi. Aye mwegenderezenga mulobe kwonoona ebintu ebitukuvu Abaisiraeli bye baleeta, memale olwo mulobe kufa.’ ”" 
Numbers19:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni ati: 
Numbers19:2 “Kino n'ekiragiro ekiri mu mateeka nze Musengwa ge nataagho: Mukobe Abaisiraeli babaleetere ente eya langi ya kasaayisaayi eziraku kikyamu kyonakyona, era etakozesebwangaku mulimo gwonagwona." 
Numbers19:3 Ente eyo mwidha kugigha Eleazari kabona, etoolebwe mu kifo abantu ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, eje eitirwe eyo embali nga Eleazari abona." 
Numbers19:4 Agho Eleazari kabona aidha kutoola ku musaayi gwayo n'engalo ye, agumansire emikuzi musanvu ng'agwolekeiza emberi w'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers19:5 Olwo ente eyo eidha kwokebwa yoonayoona nga Eleazari abona ng'omwo mw'otwaliire oluwu lwayo, emamba yaayo, omusaayi gwayo, n'obusa bwayo." 
Numbers19:6 Kabona aidha kutoola omuti oguwunha akawoowo, n'akati akeetebwa hissopu, n'oluwuuzi olw'olugoye olw'erangi ya kasaayisaayi, abisuule ku nte eri kwokebwa." 
Numbers19:7 Bw'anaamala aidha kunaaba omubiri n'amaadhi era ayoze n'ebivaalo bye, memale aire mu kifo abantu ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, aye era aidha kusigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa olw'eigulo." 
Numbers19:8 Omuntu anaayokya ente eyo aidha kunaaba omubiri era ayoze ebivaalo bye, aye era aidha kusigala nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa olw'eigulo." 
Numbers19:9 Omuntu omulongoofu aidha kuyoolagho eivu ery'ente eyo, aje alite mu kifo ekirongoofu ezira weema dha bantu, ye liri n'okukuumirwa. Eivu eryo liidha kukozesebwanga Abaisiraeli, mu kutegeka amaadhi agakozesebwa mu mukolo ogw'okwetukuza, ogukolebwa mu kutoolagho ebibi." 
Numbers19:10 Omuntu anaayoolagho eivu ery'ente eyo, aidha kwoza ebivaalo bye, aye era asigale nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa olw'eigulo. Ekiragiro kino kiidha kugemwanga Abaisiraeli boonaboona n'abasenze abanaabasengangamu ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Numbers19:11 “Omuntu bw'anaagemanga ku mulambo ogw'omuntu, aidha kusigalanga nga tiimulongoofu okumala enaku musanvu." 
Numbers19:12 Ku lunaku olwokusatu ni ku lunaku olwomusanvu aidha kunaabanga n'amaadhi ag'okwetukuza, memale abenga omulongoofu. Aye bw'ateetukuzenga ku nnaku edho dhombi, olwokusatu n'olwomusanvu, taabenga mulongoofu." 
Numbers19:13 Omuntu yeenayeena agema ku muntu afiire, aye n'ateetukuza, ayonoona Weema ya Musengwa Katonda. Era omuntu oyo aidha kulekeranga okubalibwa mu Baisiraeli; kuba aba tamansiirwaku maadhi ga kumutukuza. Aidha kubanga nga tiimulongoofu, era asigalenga n'obutali bulongoofu bwe." 
Numbers19:14 “Lino n'eiteeka erigema ku muntu afiira mu weema: Omuntu yeenayeena aidha mu weema eyo, aidha kubanga nga tiimulongoofu okumala enaku musanvu. N'oyo aba ng'agirimu mu kiseera ekyo omuntu oyo ky'afiiriiremu, yeena aidha kubanga nga tiimulongoofu okumala enaku omusanvu." 
Numbers19:15 Era buli kintu ekikozesebwa mu weema eyo ekinaabanga nga tikiteereibwaku kisandikiza kyakyo ekisibiirwaku, kyona kiidha kubanga nga tiikirongoofu." 
Numbers19:16 Omuntu yeenayeena bw'anaabanga ng'ali eyo kuliya, n'agema ku muntu ye baise obwite, oba ku muntu afiire mwene, oba ku igumba ery'omuntu, oba ku magombe, aidha kubanga nga tiimulongoofu okumala enaku musanvu." 
Numbers19:17 Abo abatali balongoofu baidha kutoolanga ku ivu ery'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi ekimaze okwokebwa, balitenga mu kibya, baliyughengaku amaadhi agatooleibwa mu mwiga." 
Numbers19:18 Agho omuntu omulongoofu aidha kutoolanga akati akeetebwa hissopu akainhike mu maadhi ago, memale agamansire mu weema eyo, ni ku bintu byamu byonabyona, ni ku bantu abaagirimu, ni ku oyo anaabanga ng'agemye ku muntu aitiibwa obwitibwe, oba ku afiire mwene, oba ku igumba, oba ku magombe." 
Numbers19:19 Omuntu oyo omulongoofu aidha kumansiranga amaadhi ago ku ole atali mulongoofu, ku lunaku olwokusatu ni ku lunaku olwomusanvu. Ku lunaku olwomusanvu aidha kumutukuzanga, era omuntu oyo atukuziibwa aidha kwozanga ebivaalo bye era anaabenga omubiri n'amaadhi. Olwo, eigulo eryo aidha kubanga mulongoofu." 
Numbers19:20 “Aye omuntu atali mulongoofu bw'anaalobanga okutukuzibwa, anaabanga nga takaabalirwa mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda, kuba anaabanga ng'ayonoine ekifo kya Musengwa Katonda ekitukuvu. Era aidha kusigalanga nga tiimulongoofu, kuba amaadhi agakozesebwa okutoolagho ebibi ganaabanga nga tigamumansiirwaku." 
Numbers19:21 Ekiragiro ekyo baidha kukikuumanga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Oyo anaamansiranga amaadhi agakozesebwa mu kutoolagho ebibi, aidha kwozanga ebivaalo bye. N'oyo anaagemanga ku maadhi ago agakozesebwa mu kutoolagho ebibi, aidha kubanga nga tiimulongoofu okutuuka olw'eigulo." 
Numbers19:22 Era buli kintu omuntu atali mulongoofu ky'anaagemangaku kiidha kufuukanga ekitali kirongoofu, n'oyo anaakigemangaku aidha kubanga nga tiimulongoofu okutuusa olw'eigulo.”" 
Numbers20:1 Agho Abaisiraeli boonaboona baatuuka mu irungu ery'e Zini mu mwezi ogusooka, baaba e Kadeshi. Miriamu yaafiira eyo, era baamuziika eyo." 
Numbers20:2 Mu kifo ekyo timwali maadhi ga bantu kukozesa, kale abantu beesoloza balumba Musa ni Aaroni." 
Numbers20:3 Abantu beemuluguunhiza Musa bati: “Kyandisinzeeku ngoli twafa, ku lule baganda baife lwe baafiira mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda!" 
Numbers20:4 Lwaki waleeta abantu ba Musengwa Katonda boonaboona mu irungu lino? Wayenda tufiire muno n'ebyayo byaife? 
Numbers20:5 Era lwaki watutoola mu Misiri okutuleeta mu kifo kino ekibi? Ghazira kintu kighanga kulimwagho, k'ebe engaano, oba emiti emitiini, oba emizabbibu, waire emikomamawanga! Ghazira waire maadhi ga kunhwa!”" 
Numbers20:6 Agho Musa ni Aaroni baava agho mu bantu, baaja gha mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka. Agho ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kyababonekera." 
Numbers20:7 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers20:8 “Toola omwigo gwo, osoloze abantu boonaboona ng'oli ghalala ni muganda wo Aaroni. Memale okobe olubaale luveemu amaadhi gaalwo, nga boonaboona babona. Olwo oidha kutoola amaadhi mu lubaale, oghe abantu banhwe n'ebyayo byaibwe.”" 
Numbers20:9 Musa yatoola omwigo ogwo okuva agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira." 
Numbers20:10 Musa ni Aaroni baasololeza abantu boonaboona agho gha lubaale. Musa yaakoba abantu ati: “Muwulire imwe abadheemu. Tunaabatoolera amaadhi mu lubaale luno?” 
Numbers20:11 Era Musa yaagalula omukono yaakuba olubaale emikuzi ebiri n'omwigo gwe. Amaadhi amangi einho gaava mu lubaale olwo, abantu baanhwa n'ebyayo byaibwe." 
Numbers20:12 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni ati: “Olw'okuba timubaire na kwikiriza mu nze, mwaloba kwoleka bantu bano boonaboona nga bwendi n'obuyinza, ti mwidha kubatuusa mu nsi ye nabagha.”" 
Numbers20:13 Ago n'amaadhi ag'e Meriba Abaisiraeli ye beemuluguunhiza Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa oyo n'abooleka nga bw'ali omutukuvu." 
Numbers20:14 Musa ng'ali e Kadeshi, yaagheereza kyabazinga owa Edomu abakwenda okumukoba bati: “Baganda bo Abaisiraeli bali kukukoba bati, oidhi bukalamu ebizibu ebyatutuukaku." 
Numbers20:15 Oidhi nga badhaadha baife bwe baaja mu Misiri, ye twaba emyaka kamaala, Abamisiri ni babisa obubi badhaadha baife abo era n'ife." 
Numbers20:16 Bwe twalirira Musengwa Katonda, Musengwa Katonda oyo yawulira okulira kwaife, yaatutumira malaika yaatutoola mu Misiri. Mpegaano tuli ghano e Kadeshi, ekibuga ekiri ku nsalosalo n'ekiketezo kyo." 
Numbers20:17 Tukweghemba otuleke tubiteku mu nsi yo. Titwidha kubita waire mu musiri oba mu isamba ery'emizabbibu, oba okunhwa amaadhi mu nsulo. Twidha kutambulira mu luguudo mwonka aghazira kugonhokeraku ku mukono mugooda oba ku mukono ogulya, okutuusa nga tumaze okuva mu kiketezo kyo.”" 
Numbers20:18 Aye Abaedomu baabairamu bati: “Timwidha kubita ghano. Bwemunaagezaaku twidha kutoolayo bwa mpiima tubalwanise.” 
Numbers20:19 Abaisiraeli baabakoba bati: “Twidha kutambulira bwa mu luguudo mwonka, era singa tunhwa ku maadhi gaimwe oba okugagha ku byayo byaife, twidha kugasasulira. Tuli kubasaba ekintu kirala kyonka: mutuleke tubitemu bubite nga tutambulira ku bigere.”" 
Numbers20:20 Aye Abaedomu baabairamu bati: “Ti mwidha kubita ghano.” Era baavaayo n'eigye enene ery'amaani okulumba Abaisiraeli. 
Numbers20:21 Mu nsambo eyo Abaedomu baalobera Abaisiraeli okubita mu kiketezo kyaibwe. Kale Abaisiraeli baakyuka baagema engira eyindi. 
Numbers20:22 Agho Abaisiraeli boonaboona baava e Kadeshi, baatambula baatuuka ku lusozi Hora," 
Numbers20:23 oluli ku nsalosalo ey'ekiketezo kya Edomu. Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Aaroni nga bali ku lusozi olwo ati: 
Numbers20:24 “Aaroni aidha kutwalibwa yeeyimbe ku bantu be abaafa. Taidha kwingira mu nsi ye nagha Abaisiraeli, kuba mwadheemera ekiragiro kyange nga muli gha maadhi ag'e Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Toola Aaroni ni mutabane we Eleazari, obaleete ghaigulu ghano ku lusozi luno Hori." 
Numbers20:26 Bwe mutuuka, Aaroni oidha kumutoolamu ebivaalo bye, obivaaze mutabane we Eleazari. Aaroni aidha kutwalibwa ng'ali ku lusozi luno yeeyimbe ku bantu be abaafa.”" 
Numbers20:27 Musa yaakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira, baaniina ku lusozi Hori ng'abantu boonaboona babona." 
Numbers20:28 Musa yaavaalulula Aaroni ebivaalo bye, yaabivaaza mutabane we Eleazari, era Aaroni yaafiira ghaigulu ku lusozi. Agho Musa ni Eleazari baaniinuka okuva ku lusozi." 
Numbers20:29 Abaisiraeli boonaboona bwe bamanha nga Aaroni afiire, bamulirira enaku amakumi asatu." 
Numbers21:1 Agho Aradi kyabazinga ow'Abakanaani eyabanga mu kiketezo ekikalukalu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba olwa Kanaani, yaawulira ng'Abaisiraeli bali kwidhira mu ngira ebita mu Atharimu. Kale yaaja okubalumba era yaanhagaku abandi, yaabatwala nga basibe." 
Numbers21:2 Abaisiraeli beeyama eri Musengwa nga bakoba bati: “Bw'onaatugha okughangula abantu bano, twidha kuzikiriza ebibuga byaibwe tubimaliregho irala.”" 
Numbers21:3 Musengwa Katonda yaaganha Abaisiraeli kye baamusaba, yaabagha okughangula Abakanaani, era baabazikiriza okubamaliragho irala aghalala n'ebibuga byaibwe. Kale ekifo ekyo baakituuma eriina Horuma." 
Numbers21:4 Abaisiraeli bwe baava ku lusozi Hori, baagema engira eja ku Nhandha Emyufu, basobole okwekooloobya nga tibabiseeku mu kiketezo eky'ensi Edomu. Bwe baali nga bakaatambula, abantu beesinwa olugendo." 
Numbers21:5 Kale baatoolera okwemuluguunhiza Katonda ni Musa nga bakoba bati: “Lwaki mwatutoola mu Misiri okwidha okufiira ghano mu irungu? Ghano ghazira mere waire amaadhi, era bino ebimere bitusinie.”" 
Numbers21:6 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaabasindikira emisota egy'obusagwa, gyabamoodha, Abaisiraeli kamaala baafa." 
Numbers21:7 Agho abantu baaja ye Musa baamukoba bati: “Twayonoona okwemuluguunhiza Musengwa n'iwe. Tusabire Musengwa atutooleku emisota gino.” Kale Musa yaabasabira. 
Numbers21:8 Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa ati: “Kola omusota ogufaanana ng'oti n'egyo egy'obusagwa, ogughanike ku mpango. Buli muntu omusota ye gunaamoodhanga bw'anaalinganga ku ogwo oguli ku mpango, aidha kuwonanga.”" 
Numbers21:9 Kale Musa yaakola omusota mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, yaagughanika ku mpango. Era buli muntu omusota ye gwamoodhanga, memale n'alinga ku ogwo ogw'ekikomo, ng'awona." 
Numbers21:10 Agho Abaisiraeli baasitula, baaja baatuuka mu Obothi, baasimba agho weema dhaibwe." 
Numbers21:11 Bwe baasitula okuva mu Obothi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu Iye Abarimu, mu irungu eriringiriire Moabu, ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba." 
Numbers21:12 Bwe baasitula okuva agho, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu kiiko eky'e Zeredi." 
Numbers21:13 Bwe baava agho, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe ku luuyi lule nga bamaze okusomoka omwiga Arunoni, oguli mu irungu erituukira irala ku nsalosalo y'Abamori. Omwiga Arunoni n'ogwawula ekiketezo eky'Abamoabu ku ky'Abamori." 
Numbers21:14 Mu kitabo ky'entalo dha Musengwa kyebava bakoba bati: “Ekibuga kya Wahebu ekiri mu biketezo bya Sufa, n'ebiiko by'oku mwiga Arunoni," 
Numbers21:15 n'obuserengeto obw'ebiiko, ebija ni bituuka ku kibuga Ari, kumpi n'ensalosalo ni Moabu.”" 
Numbers21:16 Bwe baava agho, beeyongerayo baatuuka ku Beeri eyo nga n'ensulo Musengwa ye yakoba Musa ati: “Soloza abantu ghalala, ndidha kubagha amaadhi.”" 
Numbers21:17 Agho Abaisiraeli baayemba olwembo luno bati: “Nsulo iwe, sembula enhindo dho dhiveemu amaadhi, twidha kugembera olwembo." 
Numbers21:18 Ensulo eyasimwa abakologho, abakungu ab'abantu; nga basimisa emiigo gyaibwe egy'obwakyabazinga, emiigo gyaibwe egy'omu ngalo.” Bwe baava mu irungu, baaja e Mattana." 
Numbers21:19 Bwe baava e Mattana, baaja e Nahalieli. Bwe baava e Nahalieli, baaja e Bamothi." 
Numbers21:20 Bwe baava e Bamothi, baatuuka mu kiiko ekiri mu biketezo bya Moabu gh'olengerera eirungu, kumpi n'entwiko y'olusozi Pisiga." 
Numbers21:21 Agho Abaisiraeli baatuma abakwenda ye kyabazinga Sihoni ow'Abamori, okumukoba bati:" 
Numbers21:22 “Tukweghemba otuleke tubiteku mu nsi yo. Titwidha kubita waire mu musiri oba mu isamba ery'emizabbibu, oba okunhwa amaadhi mu nsulo. Twidha kutambulira mu luguudo mwonka, okutuusa nga tumaze okuva mu kiketezo kyo.”" 
Numbers21:23 Aye Sihoni yaalobera Abaisiraeli okubita mu kiketezo kye. Era yaasoloza abantu be, yaaja nabo e Yahazi mu irungu, yaalwanisa Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers21:24 Abaisiraeli baita abasaadha be mu lutalo olwo, era baabanhagaku ekiketezo kye, okuva ku mwiga Arunoni okutuukira irala ku Bammoni, ku mwiga Yabboki kuba e Yazeri n'aghaali ensalosalo n'Abammoni" 
Numbers21:25 Abaisiraeli baanhaga era baaba mu bibuga eby'Abamori byonabyona, nga batwaliizaamu n'ekibuga Heshiboni n'ebyalo ebikyezungulwire." 
Numbers21:26 Heshiboni kyali nga n'ekibuga ekikulu ekya kyabazinga Sihoni ow'Abamori. Einhuma ere, Sihoni oyo yali nga yamala okulwanisa eyali kyabazinga wa Moabu, yaamunhagaku ekiketezo kye, okutuukira irala ku mwiga Arunoni." 
Numbers21:27 Abembi kye baava ni bemba bati: “Mwidhe mu Heshiboni, kizimbibwe, leka ekibuga kya Sihoni kiizibwegho." 
Numbers21:28 Omuliro gwava mu Heshiboni; enimi dhaagwo dhaava mu kibuga kya Sihoni. Gwayokya ekibuga Ari ekya Moabu; gwamamulamamula abakungu ab'ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu 1 ku mwiga Arunoni. 
Numbers21:29 Mukagwireku imwe ab'e Moabu! Muzikiriire imwe abasinza omusambwa Kemoshi! Omusambwa ogwo gulese batabane baimwe baafuuka ekiyiigibwa, ate baghala baimwe baafuuka abanhage ba Sihoni kyabazinga ow'Abamori." 
Numbers21:30 Abaana n'abaidhukulu tubazikiriiza okuva e Heshiboni okutuuka e Diboni, twabasaaniagho mu bibuga, okutuukira irala e Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Kale mu nsambo eyo, Abaisiraeli baatyama mu kiketezo ekyali eky'Abamori." 
Numbers21:32 Era Musa yaatuma abantu baakeeta ekibuga Yazeri. Abaisiraeli baanhaga ebyalo byakyo, baabingamu Abamori abaali babibaamu." 
Numbers21:33 Agho Abaisiraeli baakyuka, baagema engira eja e Bashani. Kyabazinga Ogi ow'e Bashani yaavaayo n'abantu be boonaboona okulwanisa Abaisiraeli mu Edurei." 
Numbers21:34 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Otamutya, ndidha kukugha obughanguzi, omughangule n'abantu be boonaboona n'ekiketezo kye kyonakyona. Oidha kumukolaku nga bwe wakola ku kyabazinga Sihoni ow'Abamori eyafugiranga mu Heshiboni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Kale Abaisiraeli baita Ogi ni batabane be n'abantu be boonaboona, aghazira kulekaghooku waire muntu mulala ati, era baamala baanhaga ekiketezo kye, kyaba kyaibwe." 
Numbers22:1 Agho Abaisiraeli baasitula, baaja baatuuka e Yeriko, ere ng'osomoike omwiga Yorudani, mu kiketezo ky'e Moabu eky'oku museetwe, baasimba eyo weema dhaibwe." 
Numbers22:2 Kyabazinga Balaki mutabane wa Zippori yali amaze okubona byonabyona Abaisiraeli bye baakola Abamori. 
Numbers22:3 Abamoabu baatya inho Abaisiraeli era baafootookerera, olw'okubona ng'Abaisiraeli abo baali bangi inho." 
Numbers22:4 Agho Abamoabu baakoba abakulembeze ab'Abamidia bati: “Luno olukunkumuli olw'Abaisiraeli luja kusaaniagho buli kintu ekitwezungulwire ghano, ng'oti n'ente bw'esaaniagho eisubi ku nsiko.” Kale Balaki, mutabane wa Zippori, eyali nga ni kyabazinga wa Moabu mu biseera ebyo," 
Numbers22:5 yaatuma abakwenda ye Balaamu mutabane wa Beori e Pethori, ekiri okumpi n'omwiga Eufurate mu kiketezo ekyetebwa Amawa. Bamukobe bati: “Bona eno, abantu ab'eighanga eiramba baava e Misiri, baidha baasiisira era baamaamira ekiketezo kyaife, era bali ghano kumpi n'ife." 
Numbers22:6 Kale mperaano nkweghembye, oidhe onkolimirire abantu abo, kuba batusinga inho amaani; oba katyo tunaasobola okubaghangula twababingagho. Ndidhi nti omuntu y'osabira enkabi aba wa nkabi, ate y'okolimira yaaba mukolimire.”" 
Numbers22:7 Kale abakulembeze b'e Moabu n'abakulembeze b'e Midia baaja, nga beetwise eby'okusasula Balaamu olw'okukolima. Bwe baatuuka ye Balaamu baamugha obukwenda Balaki bwe yabatuma." 
Numbers22:8 Balaamu yaabakoba ati: “Musule ghano obwire buno, ndidha kubairamu Musengwa ky'anankoba.” Kale abakulembeze abo abaava e Moabu baasigala agho ni Balaamu." 
Numbers22:9 Katonda yaidha eri Balaamu, yaamubuuza ati: “Ni baani abo b'oli nabo ghano?”" 
Numbers22:10 Balaamu yaakoba Katonda ati: “Balaki, kyabazinga wa Moabu, mutabane wa Zippori, antumiire abakwenda bano ng'akoba ati," 
Numbers22:11 ‘Bona eno, abantu ab'eighanga eiramba baava e Misiri, baidha baasiisira era baamaamira ekiketezo kyaife. Kale mperaano nkweghembye, oidhe onkolimirire abantu abo oba katyo tunaasobola okubalwanisa twababingagho.’ ”" 
Numbers22:12 Aye Katonda yaakoba Balaamu ati: “Otaja nabo, era otakolimira bantu Baisiraeli bale, kuba bali n'enkabi.”" 
Numbers22:13 Enkyo Balaamu yaakobera abakwenda abaava ye Balaki ati: “Mwireyo ewaimwe, kuba nze Musengwa andobeire okuja n'imwe.”" 
Numbers22:14 Kale abakwenda abo abaava e Moabu, baasituka bairayo ye Balaki baamukobera bati: “Balaamu alobye okwidha n'ife.”" 
Numbers22:15 Kabiri Balaki yaatuma abakulembeze abandi, nga bangi okusinga bale era nga babasinga n'ekitiibwa." 
Numbers22:16 Baaja baakoba Balaamu bati: “Balaki mutabane wa Zippori, akobye ati, ‘Nkweghembye ghatabaagho kintu kikulobera kwidha ye ndi," 
Numbers22:17 kuba ndidha kukuleetera okuba ow'ekitiibwa einho, era ky'onankoba okukola kyonakyona ndidha kukikola. Idha onkolimirire abantu abo.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 Aye Balaamu yairamu abakwenda ba Balaki ati: “Waire Balaki ampa endhu ye ng'eidhwire feeza ni zaabu, tighanga kuva ku kiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda wange okukikendeezaaku oba okukyongeraku." 
Numbers22:19 Mbeeghemba mwena musule ghano obwire buno, nsobole okumanha kiki Musengwa Katonda ky'anaayongera okunkoba.”" 
Numbers22:20 Obwire obwo Katonda yaidha yaakoba Balaamu ati: “Oba nga abantu abo baidhie kukweta, situka oje nabo. Aye kye nnaakukoba okukola kyonka ky'onaakola.”" 
Numbers22:21 Kale Balaamu yaasituka enkyo, yaata ekintu ekityamibwaku ku ndogoyi ye, yaaja n'abakulembeze abaava e Moabu." 
Numbers22:22 Aye obusungu bwa Katonda bwatumbukira ku Balaamu ng'oti muliro, olw'okuja. Agho Balaamu bweyali ali kuvuga endogoyi ye ng'ali n'abagheereza be babiri, malaika wa Musengwa yeekiika mu ngira okumulobera okweyongerayo." 
Numbers22:23 Endogoyi yaabona malaika wa Musengwa ng'ayemereire mu ngira, ng'asowoire empiima mu kiruutu kyayo agigemye mu ngalo. Agho endogoyi eyo yaava mu ngira yaakyukira mu misiri egyali agho. Balaamu yaagikuba okugiiza mu ngira." 
Numbers22:24 Kabiri malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaayemerera mu kagira akatono akabita ghagati mu masamba ag'emizabbibu, nga ku luuyi ni ku luuyi eriyo ekimante." 
Numbers22:25 Endogoyi bweyabona malaika wa Musengwa Katonda, yeesugeenhia ku kimante era yaanhigiririzaamu ekigere kya Balaamu. Kabiri Balaamu yaagikuba." 
Numbers22:26 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaaja emberi, yaayemerera aghanhigirivu nga ghazira luuyi lw'osobola kukyukiraku." 
Numbers22:27 Endogoyi bweyabona malaika wa Musengwa Katonda, yaalambaala ghansi gha Balaamu. Balaamu yaasungughala inho era yaagikuba n'omwigo gwe." 
Numbers22:28 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaasobozesa endogoyi okwogera. Endogoyi eyo yaabuuza Balaamu eti: “Nkukoze ki okunkuba emikuzi gino esatu?” 
Numbers22:29 Balaamu yaagiiramu ati: “Nkukubye kuba onnhoomye. Ngoli mbaire na mpiima nandikwise bwite.” 
Numbers22:30 Endogoyi yaamukoba eti: “Ti ninze endogoyi yo, y'ovuze obulamu bwo bwonabwona okutuusa n'olwaleero luno? Naali nkubisiisaaku ntyo omukuzi waire omulala guti?” Balaamu yaagiiramu ati: “Busa.”" 
Numbers22:31 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaazibula Balaamu amaiso, yaabona malaika wa Musengwa ng'ayemereire mu ngira, ng'asowoire empiima mu kiruutu kyayo yaagigema mu ngalo. Balaamu yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka." 
Numbers22:32 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda, yaabuuza Balaamu ati: “Lwaki okubye endogoyi yo emikuzi egyo esatu? Bona eno, ndidhye okwekiika mu ngira yo, kuba olugendo lwo luno tirusemba." 
Numbers22:33 Endogoyi yo emboine ku mikuzi egyo esatu, yanviirayo yaakyukira ku mbali. Era ngoli tekyusenga n'enviirayo, bwenebwene ngoli buti nkwise, yeene naagireka nga nnamu.”" 
Numbers22:34 Agho Balaamu yaakoba malaika wa Musengwa ati: “Nhonoine, kuba mbaire timanhie nga niiwe weekiise mu ngira okundobera okuja. Aye mpegaano oba nga kiba kibi y'oli nze okuja, ka nkyuke ndhireyo.”" 
Numbers22:35 Aye malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Ja n'abasaadha abo, aye kye nnaakukoba okwogera kyonka ky'onaayogera.” Kale Balaamu yeeyongerayo, yaaja n'abakwenda ba Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Balaki bweyawulira nga Balaamu aidhie, yaaja okumusangaaza mu kibuga kya Moabu ekiri ku mbali kw'omwiga Arunoni, aghasemberayo irala ku nsalosalo." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki yaamukoba ati: “Lwaki tiwaidha, bwe nakwetesa omukuzi ogwasooka? Okoba oti tisobola kukuleetera kuba wa kitiibwa?”" 
Numbers22:38 Balaamu yairamu Balaki ati: “Buti ndidhie. Aye obwo odhuuba oti ndi n'obukumu okuba ni kye ndhogera? Ekyo kyonka Katonda ky'andagira, kye nteekwa okwogera.”" 
Numbers22:39 Agho Balaamu ni Balaki baaja, baatuuka mu kibuga Kiriathi Huzothi." 
Numbers22:40 Balaki yaaghaayo ente n'entaama ng'omusengo, era yaagheerezaaku Balaamu n'abakungu abaali naye emamba." 
Numbers22:41 Bwe bwakya enkyo, Balaki yaatwala Balaamu mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu e Bamothi Baali. Balaamu ng'ali eyo, yaabonaku abandi ku Baisiraeli abaamuli okumpi." 
Numbers23:1 Balaamu yaakoba Balaki ati: “Nzimbira ghano alutaari musanvu, era ondeetere ghano ente enume musanvu n'entaama enume musanvu.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balaki yaakola nga Balaamu bweyamukoba, era bombi baagheerayo ku buli alutaari, ente enume ndala n'entaama enume ndala." 
Numbers23:3 Balaamu yaakoba Balaki ati: “Yemerera kumpi n'ekigheebwayo kyo ekyokebwa. Nze ka nje mbone oba nga Musengwa anaidha okwagaanana ninze. Era buli ky'anandholeka kyonakyona, ndidha kwira nkikukobere.” Agho yaaja yaaniina ghaigulu ku lusozi." 
Numbers23:4 Katonda yaayagaanana ni Balaamu oyo. Balaamu yaakoba Katonda ati: “Mmaze okutegeka alutaari musanvu era ku buli ndala mpeereireyo ekigheebwayo kya nte enume ndala n'entaama enume ndala.” 
Numbers23:5 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Balaamu by'anaayogera, era yaamukoba ati: “Irayo ye Balaki oyogere otyo.”" 
Numbers23:6 Balaamu yaira ye Balaki, yaamwagaana ng'akaayemereire kumpi n'ekigheebwayo kye ekyokebwa, ghalala n'abakungu boonaboona aba Moabu." 
Numbers23:7 Agho Balaamu yaayogera ebibono eby'obulanzi bino, ati: “Balaki kyabazinga wa Moabu yandheta okuva mu Aramu, mu nsozi edh'omu buvandhuba: Yankoba ati, ‘Idha onkolimirire aba Yakobo idha ovumirire Abaisiraeli abo.’" 
Numbers23:8 Nnaakolimira ntya oyo Katonda y'atakolimiire? Nnaavumirira ntya oyo Musengwa y'atavumiriire? 
Numbers23:9 Mbabona nga ndi ku ngulu ku nsozi enene, naabalengera nga ndi ku busozi obutono. Abantu abo bali eighanga eriba lyonka, eighanga eriteetabula na maghanga gandi." 
Numbers23:10 Naani asobola okubala baidhukulu ba Yakobo abangi ng'oti bwa nkungu? Oba naani asobola okumanha omughendo oguli mu kitundu obutundu ekirala ku buli bitundu ebina eby'Abaisiraeli abo? Leka nfe ng'abatuufu bwe bafa, leka enkomerero yange ebe ng'ey'abatya Katonda abo bw'eba!”" 
Numbers23:11 Agho Balaki yaakoba Balaamu ati: “Onkoze ki kino? Nakuleese kukolimira bazigu bange, aye kabiri iwe waabula ekindi ky'okola okutoolaku okubasabira obw'enkabi?”" 
Numbers23:12 Balaamu yaamwiramu ati: “Nteekwa okwogera ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'andagira byonka.” 
Numbers23:13 Agho Balaki yaakoba Balaamu ati: “Idha tuje mu kifo ekindi gh'onaabonera abandi ku Baisiraeli abanaakuba okumpi, waire nga toobabone boonaboona. Memale olwo obankolimirire ng'oli eyo.”" 
Numbers23:14 Yaamutwala mu musiri gwa Zofimu ku ngulu okw'olusozi Pisiga. Yaazimba alutaari musanvu era yaagheerayo ku buli ndala ente enume n'entaama enume. 
Numbers23:15 Balaamu yaakoba Balaki ati: “Yemerera kumpi n'ekigheebwayo kyo ekyokebwa, nze nje ere ndhagaanane ni Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Numbers23:16 Musengwa Katonda yaayagaanana ni Balaamu era yaamulagira by'anaayogera. Yaamukoba ati: “Irayo ye Balaki oyogere otyo.” 
Numbers23:17 Balaamu yaira ye Balaki, yaamwagaana ng'akaayemereire kumpi n'ekigheebwayo kye ekyokebwa, ghalala n'abakungu aba Moabu. Balaki yaamubuuza ati: “Musengwa akobye ki?”" 
Numbers23:18 Agho Balaamu yaayogera ebibono eby'obulanzi bino, ati: “Balaki, idha owulire, ntegera kutu, iwe mutabane wa Zippori." 
Numbers23:19 Katonda talimba, aye abantu balimba; Katonda takyuka, aye abantu bakyuka. Ky'akoba taloba kukikola; ky'ayogera taloba kukituukiriza." 
Numbers23:20 Bona eno, Katonda yandagira okusabira abantu enkabi. Kale Katonda bw'agha enkabi, nze ekyo ti kikyusaamu naire." 
Numbers23:21 Ghazira kikyamu kinaidhira bantu ba Yakobo, ghazira kizibu kinaatuuka ku Baisiraeli abo. Musengwa Katonda waibwe aba ghalala nabo, baayatula nga bw'ali kyabazinga waibwe." 
Numbers23:22 Beesiga Katonda oyo eyabatoola mu Misiri, ng'oti n'embogo bweyeesiga amayiga gaayo." 
Numbers23:23 Ghazira irogo lisobola kulumya ba Yakobo, ghazira kulagula kusobola kutuusa kabi ku Baisiraeli abo. Okutoolaku abantu baidhanga kwogera ku Baisiraeli abo, bati, ‘Katonda ng'abakoleire eby'amaani!’" 
Numbers23:24 Bona eighanga eryo! Lisituka ng'oti mpologoma nkazi, lyebbeeda ng'oti mpologoma nume. Tiriwuumula nga tirituukiriiza kigendererwa kyalyo, ng'oti n'empologoma bwetawuumula nga temaze kuvaabira omuyiigo gwayo, n'okunhwa omusaayi gw'ekyo ky'eise.”" 
Numbers23:25 Agho Balaki yaakoba Balaamu ati: “Nga bw'olobye okubakolimira, n'enkabi otabasabira.”" 
Numbers23:26 Aye Balaamu yaamwiramu ati: “Tyakukobeire nti kyonakyona Musengwa ky'anankoba kye nteekwa okukola?” 
Numbers23:27 Kabiri Balaki yaakoba Balaamu ati: “Mpegaano idha, ka nkutwale mu kifo ekindi, oba katyo Katonda anaikiriza okukuleka waabankolimirira eyo.”" 
Numbers23:28 Kale yaatwala Balaamu oyo ghaigulu ku lusozi Peori olulingiriire eirungu. 
Numbers23:29 Balaamu yaakoba Balaki ati: “Nzimbira ghano alutaari musanvu, era ondeetere ghano ente enume musanvu n'entaama enume musanvu.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balaki yaakola nga Balaamu bweyamukoba, yaagheerayo ku buli alutaari ente enume ndala n'entaama enume ndala." 
Numbers24:1 Balaamu bweyamala okutegeera nga Musengwa amwendeza kusabira Baisiraeli nkabi, yaaloba kuja kwebuuzaaku nga bweyakola ku mikuzi gire egindi. Aye yaalingiriza bwa maiso ge eri eirungu," 
Numbers24:2 yaabona Abaisiraeli nga basimbye weema dhaibwe, ng'ebika byaibwe bwe biiraganwaku. Agho omwoyo gwa Katonda gwamwidhaku," 
Numbers24:3 yaayogera ebibono eby'obulanzi bino, ati: “Bino n'ebibono bya Balaamu mutabane wa Beori, ebibono eby'omuntu abona obukalamu." 
Numbers24:4 Bino n'ebibono by'oyo awulira Katonda by'ayogera, ebibono by'oyo atenduka aye n'asigala ng'amoga, n'abona okubonekerwa kw'oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona." 
Numbers24:5 Weema dhaimwe, imwe aba Yakobo, n'ebifo imwe Abaisiraeli ghe musula, bikalamu!" 
Numbers24:6 Ebifo ebyo biri ng'oti biiko ebyegolomoire, era ng'oti nimiro edhiri ku mbali okw'omwiga. Biri ng'oti miti egiri n'akawoowo k'alowe, Musengwa gye yasimba era ng'oti mivule egiri kumpi n'amaadhi." 
Numbers24:7 Amaadhi gaidha kubagwiranga mangi, ensigo dhaibwe dhibenga mu nimiro edhifukiriirwa obukalamu. Kyabazinga waibwe aidha kubanga mukologho okusinga kyabazinga Agagi, n'obwakyabazinga bwe bwidha kugheebwanga ekitiisa." 
Numbers24:8 Beesiga Katonda oyo eyabatoola mu Misiri ng'oti n'embogo bweyeesiga amayiga gaayo. Baidha kweyangagho amaghanga ag'abazigu baibwe, bamenhemenhenga amagumba gaibwe, babafumitenga n'obulaso bwaibwe." 
Numbers24:9 Babwama era baalambaala ng'oti mpologoma. Naani akana okubasitusa? Kiisi asabira Abaisiraeli abo enkabi, yeena agheebwenga enkabi. Kiisi abakolimira, yeena akolimirwenga.”" 
Numbers24:10 Agho Balaki yaasungughalira inho Balaamu, era yaakuba mu ngalo bukiika, ng'amukoba ati: “Nakwese oidhe okolimire abazigu bange, aye bona obasabire bwa nkabi emikuzi gino esatu!" 
Numbers24:11 Kale ni, mperaano lumuka oireyo ewuwo. Nali nkusuubiiza okukuleetera okuba ow'ekitiibwa, aye Musengwa Katonda akulemeisa.”" 
Numbers24:12 Balaamu yaidhusa Balaki ati: “Tyakobera bakwenda be wantumira nti," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Waire Balaki ampa endhu ye ng'eidhwire feeza ni zaabu, tighanga kuva ku kiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda, ni nkola kyange ku bwange, ka kibe ekirungi oba ekibi? Era nti, Musengwa ky'anankoba kyonka kye ndidha okwogera?’" 
Numbers24:14 Mperaano ndi kwirayo mu bantu bange. Aye bona eno, ka nkukobere abantu abo Abaisiraeli kye balikola abantu bo mu biseera eby'oluvainhuma.”" 
Numbers24:15 Agho yaayogera ebibono eby'obulanzi bino, ati: “Bino n'ebibono bya Balaamu mutabane wa Beori, ebibono eby'omuntu abona obukalamu." 
Numbers24:16 Bino n'ebibono by'oyo awulira Katonda by'ayogera, n'amanha amagezi g'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, era atenduka aye n'asigala ng'amoga, n'abona okubonekerwa kw'oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona." 
Numbers24:17 Bwe ningirira ye bwidha eyo, mbona Abaisiraeli abo, aye ti nga bwe bali mperaano. Kyabazinga alisituka mu Yakobo ng'oti n'emuunienie bw'evaayo, ng'ogwo n'omwigo ogw'obwakyabazinga oguja okusimuka mu Baisiraeli abo. Alisasambula abakulembeze b'e Moabu, era yaasaaniagho abaana ba Shethi boonaboona." 
Numbers24:18 Alighangula abazigu be mu Edomu, yeiriza ensi yaibwe Seiri, eno ng'Abaisiraeli bwe beeyongera okuba abaghanguzi." 
Numbers24:19 Oyo asimuka mu ba Yakobo aliba mufuzi, era alizikiriza abaliba basigaire mu bibuga.”" 
Numbers24:20 Agho Balaamu ng'akaali mu kubonekerwa, yaabona Abamaleki era yaayogera ebibono eby'obulanzi bino, ati: “Abamaleki n'eighanga eryali lisinga agandi goonagoona, aye ku nkomerero lija kuzikirizibwa.”" 
Numbers24:21 Era ng'akaali mu kubonekerwa, yaabona Abakeni era yaayogera ebibono eby'obulanzi bino, ati: “Ekifo kye mubaamu kigumu, kiri ng'oti n'ekisu ekyazimbibwa mu ibaale." 
Numbers24:22 Aye era imwe Abakeni mulizikirira, Abasshuri balibatwala mu bunhage.”" 
Numbers24:23 Kabiri Balaamu oyo yaayogera ebibono eby'obulanzi bino, ati: “Tukagwireku! Naani alisigalagho nga mulamu, nga Katonda akoze ekyo?" 
Numbers24:24 Abalwani baliidhira mu maato okuva e Kittimu, baalumba Abasshuri n'Abaeberi, aye era boona balizikirizibwa.”" 
Numbers24:25 Agho Balaamu yaasitula yairayo ewaibwe, Balaki yeena yaaja mu dhidhe." 
Numbers25:1 Abaisiraeli bwe baali e Shittimu, baatoolera obutaba beesigwa eri Katonda waibwe, baakolanga obwamalaaya n'abakazi Abamoabu." 
Numbers25:2 Abakazi abo bwe baakolanga embaga edh'emisengo gye baaghangayo eri emisambwa gyaibwe, nga beeta Abaisiraeli abo okubeeyimbaku. Abaisiraeli abo baalyanga nabo, era baakubiranga emisambwa egyo amakiryaivu." 
Numbers25:3 Kale Abaisiraeli baasinzanga omusambwa Baali ogw'e Peori. Agho obusungu bwa Musengwa bwabatumbukiraku ng'oti muliro. 
Numbers25:4 Musengwa oyo yaakoba Musa ati: “Twala abakulembeze ab'Abaisiraeli boonaboona obaitire mu maiso gange omusana ng'abantu boonaboona babona, memale obusungu bwange obubitirivu bubaveeku imwe Abaisiraeli.”" 
Numbers25:5 Agho Musa yaakoba abalamuzi ati: “Buli mulala ku imwe aje aite abasaadha boonaboona abali mu kikunsu kye, abaasinza omusambwa Baali ogw'e Peori.”" 
Numbers25:6 Mu kiseera ekyo, ng'Abaisiraeli bakaali agho ku mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, nga bali kulira, ghaabaagho Omuisiraeli eyaleeta omukazi Omumidia mu ndhu ye, nga Musa n'abantu abandi boonaboona babona." 
Numbers25:7 Finehasi mutabane wa Eleazari era nga mwidhukulu wa Aaroni kabona, bweyababona yaasituka, yaaleka agho abantu abandi boonaboona, yaagema eifumo," 
Numbers25:8 yaanonereza omusaadha oyo Omuisiraeli n'omukazi oyo Omumidia. Yaabaagaana mu kisenge, yaabafumita eifumo lyababitamu bombi. Agho ekibamba Musengwa kye yali asindikiire Abaisiraeli kyalekera agho okubaita." 
Numbers25:9 Aye nga kyali kimaze okwita abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
Numbers25:10 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers25:11 “Finehasi mutabane wa Eleazari era nga mwidhukulu wa Aaroni kabona, alekeiza obusungu bwange okuba ku Baisiraeli. Agemeibwa enkikidi eyange ye ndi nayo ku bantu bange abo Abaisiraeli, yaaloba kuguminkirizaaku waire omulala ku bo, okusinza katonda atali nze. Kye nviire ni ntabazikiriza mu busungu bwange." 
Numbers25:12 Kale ni mukobere oti, ndi kukola naye endagaano yange ey'emiraala," 
Numbers25:13 emufuula mwene n'eizaire eririmwiririra okubanga bakabona olubeerera; kuba enkikidi yamugema ku lwange nze Katonda we, era yaaleetera Abaisiraeli okutoolebwaku ekibi kyaibwe.”" 
Numbers25:14 Omusaadha Omuisiraeli, Finehasi ye yaitira aghalala n'omukazi Omumidia, yali ayetebwa Zimuri mutabane wa Salu eyali akulira enda ndala ku dhaali mu kika eky'Abasimeoni." 
Numbers25:15 Omukazi ye yamwita naye yali ayetebwa Kozubi mughala wa Zuri, nga yeena ali n'enda y'akulira mu Midia." 
Numbers25:16 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Lumba Abamidia, obaite," 
Numbers25:17 olw'ekibi kye baabakola. Baabasalira enkwe," 
Numbers25:18 baabasenderasendera e Peori. Era balumbe, obaite, olwa Kozubi mwanhinaibwe, mughala w'omufuzi ow'e Midia. Kozubi oyo yaitibwa mu biseera ekibamba ghe kyaitira abantu, nze Musengwa kye nasindika olw'ebyo ebyali e Peori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Ekibamba bwe kyawa, Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ni Eleazari mutabane wa Aaroni kabona ati:" 
Numbers26:2 “Mubale Abaisiraeli boonaboona abagheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingagho, abali mu buli nda, abasobola okulwana mu lutalo.”" 
Numbers26:3 Agho Musa ni Eleazari kabona, baayogera n'abantu e Yeriko ekiri mu kiketezo ky'e Moabu eky'oku museetwe, ku mbali okw'omwiga Yorudani. Baabakoba bati:" 
Numbers26:4 “Mubale abantu abagheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingagho, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa.” Abaisiraeli abaava mu nsi Misiri, ni bano:" 
Numbers26:5 Ekika kya Reubeni, eyali omwana omuberi owa Yakobo, kyalimu enda dhino: eya Hanoka, n'eya Pallu," 
Numbers26:6 n'eya Hezironi, n'eya Karumi." 
Numbers26:7 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Reubeni, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo ena n'enkumi isatu na lusanvu n'asatu (43,730)." 
Numbers26:8 Pallu n'eyazaala Eliabu. 
Numbers26:9 Eliabu yaazaala Nemueli, ni Dathani, ni Abiramu. Dathani ni Abiramu abo, n'abo abaalondebwa abantu boonaboona okutakania Musa ni Aaroni, era beeyimba ku Kora ni baine, lwe baatakania Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers26:10 Era ku olwo eitaka lyayasama, lyabamira ghalala ni Kora. Mu nsambo eyo, ekikunsu ky'abantu abo kyafa, ku lule omuliro lwe gwasenkeenha abantu abaaghera ebikumi ebibiri n'ataanu, ni bafuuka akamanhiso ak'okulabula abandi." 
Numbers26:11 Aye batabane ba Kora tibaali mu abo abaafa. 
Numbers26:12 Ekika ekya Simeoni kyalimu enda dhino: eya Nemueli, n'eya Yamini, n'eya Yakini," 
Numbers26:13 n'eya Zera, n'eya Shaulo." 
Numbers26:14 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Simeoni, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ibiri na bibiri (22,200)." 
Numbers26:15 Ekika ekya Gadi kyalimu enda dhino: eya Zefoni, n'eya Haggi, n'eya Shuni," 
Numbers26:16 n'eya Ozini, n'eya Eri," 
Numbers26:17 n'eya Arodi, n'eya Areli." 
Numbers26:18 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Gadi, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo ena na bitaanu (40,500)." 
Numbers26:19 Yuda yazaala abaana bano: Eri, ni Onani. Eri ni Onani abo, baafiira mu nsi Kanaani." 
Numbers26:20 Ekika ekya Yuda oyo kyalimu enda dhino: eya Shela, n'eya Perezi, n'eya Zera." 
Numbers26:21 Perezi yaazaala Hezironi ni Hamuli. Hezironi ni Hamuli abo, boona baasimukamu enda ey'Abahezironi n'ey'Abahamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Yuda, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo musanvu na kakaaga na bitaanu (76,500)." 
Numbers26:23 Ekika ekya Issakari kyalimu enda dhino: eya Tola, n'eya Puva," 
Numbers26:24 n'eya Yashubu, n'eya Shimuroni." 
Numbers26:25 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Issakari, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo mukaaga n'enkumi ina na bisatu (64,300)." 
Numbers26:26 Ekika ekya Zebuluni kyalimu enda dhino: eya Seredi, n'eya Eloni, n'eya Yahaleeli." 
Numbers26:27 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Zebuluni, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo mukaaga na bitaanu (60,500)." 
Numbers26:28 Yosefu yazaala Manasse ni Efuraimu. 
Numbers26:29 Manasse yazaala Makiri, Makiri yazaala Gileadi eyasimukamu enda dhino:" 
Numbers26:30 eya Iezeri, n'eya Heleki," 
Numbers26:31 n'eya Asirieli, n'eya Shekemu," 
Numbers26:32 n'eya Shemida, n'eya Heferi." 
Numbers26:33 Heferi yazaala Zelofehadi, Zelofehadi yaazaala baghala beereere nga muzira mulenzi, era ni bano: Mahala, Noa, Hogula, Milika ni Tiruza." 
Numbers26:34 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Manasse, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo etaanu n'enkumi ibiri na lusanvu (52,700)." 
Numbers26:35 Ekika ekya Efuraimu kyalimu enda dhino: eya Shuthela, n'eya Bekeri, n'eya Tahani." 
Numbers26:36 Shuthela oyo yaazaala Erani eyasimukamu olulyo olw'Abaerani. 
Numbers26:37 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Efuraimu, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo esatu n'enkumi ibiri na bitaanu (32,500). Abo boonaboona baasimuka mu Yosefu." 
Numbers26:38 Ekika kya Benjamini kyalimu enda dhino: eya Bela, n'eya Ashubeli, n'eya Ahiramu," 
Numbers26:39 n'eya Shefufamu, n'eya Hufamu." 
Numbers26:40 Bela yaazaala Aradi ni Naamani. Bela oyo yaasimukamu olulyo olw'Ababela, ni Naamani yaasimukamu olulyo olw'Abanaamani." 
Numbers26:41 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Efuraimu, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo ena n'enkumi itaanu na lukaaga (45,600)." 
Numbers26:42 Ekika ekya Dani kyalimu enda ndala yonka, eya Shuhamu," 
Numbers26:43 era enda eyo yalimu abantu emitwalo mukaaga n'enkumi ina na bina (64,400)." 
Numbers26:44 Ekika ekya Asheri kyalimu enda dhino: eya Imuna, n'eya Ishuvi, n'eya Beria." 
Numbers26:45 Beria oyo yaazaala Heberi eyasimukamu olulyo olw'Abaheberi. Era yaazaala Malakieli eyasimukamu olulyo olw'Abamalakieli. 
Numbers26:46 Asheri oyo yali ni mughala we ye baayetanga Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Asheri, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo etaanu n'enkumi isatu na bina (53,400)." 
Numbers26:48 Ekika kya Nafutali kyalimu enda dhino: eya Yahazeeli, eya Guni," 
Numbers26:49 eya Yezeri, n'eya Shillemu." 
Numbers26:50 Edho n'enda edhaali mu kika kya Nafutali, era dhaalimu abantu emitwalo ena n'enkumi itaanu na bina (45,400)." 
Numbers26:51 Agho Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaabalibwa, baaba emitwalo nkaaga na lukumi na lusanvu n'asatu (601,730)." 
Numbers26:52 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers26:53 “Abantu abo baidha kugheebwa eitaka ng'omugabo gwaibwe, nga bajiira ku bunene obw'ebika." 
Numbers26:54 Ebika ebinene oidha kubigha eitaka inene, ate ebika ebitono obighe eitaka itono. Buli kika kiidha kugheebwa omugabo gwakyo ogw'eitaka, nga bajiira ku bunene bwakyo." 
Numbers26:55 Aye era eitaka liidha kugabibwa nga likubirwa bululu, nga bajiira ku maina ga badhaadha baibwe." 
Numbers26:56 Buli kika kiidha kugheebwa eitaka lyakyo, nga likubirwa bululu. Era buli kika kiidha kufuna eitaka, nga bajiira ku bungi bw'abantu baakyo.”" 
Numbers26:57 Bano n'Abalevi abaabalibwa ng'ojiira ku nda dhaibwe: abaasimuka mu Gereshoni, abaasimuka mu Kohathi, n'abaasimuka mu Merari." 
Numbers26:58 Era mu Balevi abo n'omwasimuka n'enda dhino: ey'Abalibuni, ey'Abaheburoni, ey'Abamahili, ey'Abamushi, n'ey'Abakora. Kohathi n'eyali lata wa Amuramu." 
Numbers26:59 Muka Amuramu oyo yayetebwanga Yokebedi, era nga mughala wa Levi ye yazaalira e Misiri. Amuramu oyo ni mukazi we oyo Yokebedi, n'abaazaala Aaroni, ni Musa, ni mwanhinaibwe Miriamu." 
Numbers26:60 Aaroni yaazaala Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazari ni Ithamari." 
Numbers26:61 Aye Nadabu ni Abihu baafa, bwe baaleeta omuliro ogutali mutukuvu mu maiso ga Musengwa ng'ekigheebwayo."
