Numbers26:62 Abasaadha Abalevi boonaboona abaabalibwa, okuva ku mwana omulenzi agheziiza omwezi omulala n'okusingagho, baali emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi isatu (23,000). Abo tibaabalirwa ghalala na Baisiraeli bandi, kuba Abalevi abo tibaagheebwa mugabo gwa itaka lya nsikirano mu Baisiraeli banaibwe." 
Numbers26:63 Abo n'abantu Musa ni Eleazari kabona, be baabala e Yeriko okumpi n'omwiga Yorudani, mu biketezo eby'oku museetwe eby'e Moabu." 
Numbers26:64 Aye ku abo tikwali muntu waire omulala ati, eyali ng'akaali mulamu ku Baisiraeli bale Musa ni Aaroni kabona, be baabala mu irungu ery'e Sinai," 
Numbers26:65 kuba Musengwa Katonda yabakoba ati boonaboona baja kufiira mu irungu. Era boonaboona baafa, okutoolaku Kalebu mutabane wa Yefune ni Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 Agho ghaabaagho abaghala bano: Mahala, Noa, Hogula, Milika ni Tiruza. Abo baali baghala ba Zelofehadi mutabane wa Heferi. Heferi oyo yali mutabane wa Gileadi. Gileadi oyo yaaba mutabane wa Makiri. Makiri oyo yaaba mutabane wa Manasse. Ate Manasse oyo yaaba mutabane Yosefu." 
Numbers27:2 Abaghala abo baaja baayemerera mu maiso ga Musa, ni Eleazari kabona, n'abakulembeze, n'abantu boonaboona, agho ku mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Baakoba bati:" 
Numbers27:3 “Lata waife yafiira mu irungu nga tazaireeku mwana mulenzi. Aye tiyeeyimbaku n'abo abeekungaania ni batakania Musengwa Katonda ghalala ni Kora. Mwene yafa lwa kibi kye kindi. 
Numbers27:4 Kale lwaki eriina lya lata waife lisaanagho mu kika kye olw'okubulwa obubulwe omwana omulenzi? Mutughe twena omugabo ogw'eitaka ogwaife ku bwaife mu boluganda lwa lata waife.” 
Numbers27:5 Agho Musa yaatwala ensonga yaibwe eyo eri Musengwa Katonda. 
Numbers27:6 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers27:7 “Baghala ba Zelofehadi batuufu mu kye bali kukoba. Oidha kubagha omugabo ogw'eitaka ery'ensikirano ogwaibwe ku bwaibwe mu boluganda lwa lata waibwe, olwo oleetere obusika bwa lata waibwe okwira ku beene." 
Numbers27:8 Era oidha kukobera Abaisiraeli oti, ‘Omusaadha bw'afanga nga talese mwana mulenzi, mughanga mughala we obusika." 
Numbers27:9 Bw'abanga nga n'omwana omughala yeena amuzira, agho obusika mubughanga baganda be." 
Numbers27:10 Bw'abanga ng'azira baganda be, agho obusika mubughanga baganda ba ise." 
Numbers27:11 Ise bw'abanga ng'azira baganda be, agho obusika mubughanga amuliku oluganda olusinga kuba lwa kumpi. Eryo eiteeka Abaisiraeli lye banaakuumanga olubeerera, nga nze Musengwa Katonda bwe nkulagiire iwe Musa.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Niina ku lusozi luno Abarimu olengere ensi ye mpaire Abaisiraeli. 
Numbers27:13 Bw'onaamala okugirengera, oidha kutwalibwa weeyimbe ku bantu bo abaafa, nga muganda wo Aaroni bweyatwalibwa" 
Numbers27:14 kuba mwadheemera ekiragiro kyange mu irungu ery'e Zini. Abantu bwe beemuluguunhia nga muli gha maadhi ag'e Meriba mu Kadeshi, timwayoleka bantu abo nga nze ndi n'obuyinza.”" 
Numbers27:15 Agho Musa yaasaba Musengwa ati: 
Numbers27:16 “Wo Musengwa Katonda, Katonda ow'emyoyo era n'emibiri, londa mu bantu bano, oyo anaaba omukulu waibwe." 
Numbers27:17 Omuntu aidha okubakulemberangamu era abakuumenga mu buli kye banaakolanga. Olwo abantu bo abo, iwe Musengwa Katonda, balobe kubanga ng'oti n'entaama edhiziraku mwayi.”" 
Numbers27:18 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Twala Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni, omusaadha aliku omwoyo, ote emikono gyo ku mutwe gwe." 
Numbers27:19 Omale omutwale ayemerere mu maiso ga Eleazari kabona nga n'abantu boonaboona abeesoloiza babona, omugemye ogw'okubakulemberanga." 
Numbers27:20 Era omughe ku buyinza bwo, Abaisiraeli boonaboona bamuwulirenga." 
Numbers27:21 Yoshua oyo aidha kujanga ye Eleazari kabona, Eleazari kabona oyo akozesenga Urimu ni Thummimu okumubuulizaagho eri nze Musengwa Katonda, aghange okumanha kye nhenda akole. Era ekyo Eleazari ky'anaazuulanga, Yoshua n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona kye banaajiirangaku mu buli kye banaakolanga.”" 
Numbers27:22 Agho Musa yaakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira. Yaatwala Yoshua, yaamwemereza mu maiso ga Eleazari kabona nga n'abantu boonaboona beesoloiza." 
Numbers27:23 Musa oyo yaata emikono gye ku mutwe gwa Yoshua, yaamugemya ogw'okukulemberanga abantu abo, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa oyo." 
Numbers28:1 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers28:2 “Lagira Abaisiraeli oti, bali n'okughangayo ebigheebwayo eby'emere ebyokebwa, ebiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza. Bakobe batengayo inho omwoyo okubighaayo ku nnaku dhaabyo edhaalagirwa." 
Numbers28:3 Era bakobe oti, kino n'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa kye munaaghangayo ye Musengwa: entaama enume ibiri edh'omwaka omulala omulala edhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona dhibenga ekigheebwayo ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers28:4 Entaama eyindi ku edho mwidha kugighangayo ku nkyo, ate eyindi mugighengayo olw'eigulo." 
Numbers28:5 Era mwidha kugheerangayo ku ntaama eyo ey'oku nkyo ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke nga kya kilo ndala ey'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu lita y'omuzigo omukenenule ogukamwirwa mu bibala eby'emiti emyoliva." 
Numbers28:6 Ekyo n'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku ekyagheerwa ku lusozi Sinai, akawoowo kaakyo kansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers28:7 Era mwidha kugheerangayo ku ntaama eyo ey'oku nkyo ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa ebitamiiza nga kya lita ndala. Mwidha kukifukanga mu kifo ekitukuvu ng'ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda. 
Numbers28:8 Entaama eyindi mwidha kugighangayo olw'eigulo, mu nsambo n'endala nga bwe munaabanga nga mughaireyo ey'oku nkyo nga kuliku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke n'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa ekijiiraku. Olwo ekyo kibe ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers28:9 “Ku lunaku lwa Sabbato mwidha kughangayo entaama enume ibiri edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona. Era mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo kyaku eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo ibiri edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu nga butabwirwamu omuzigo. Era mughengayo n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'ebyokunhwa." 
Numbers28:10 Mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekyo ekya buli lwa Sabbato, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku, n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'ebyokunhwa." 
Numbers28:11 “Ku lunaku olusooka olwa buli mwezi, mwidha kughangayo eri nze Musengwa ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, nga kirimu bino: ente enume ento ibiri, entaama enume enkulu ndala, n'entaama ento enume musanvu edh'omwaka omwaka omulala omulala, nga byonabyona biziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers28:12 Ku buli nte mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo isatu edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo. Ate ku ntaama enume enkulu, mugheerengaku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo ibiri edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo." 
Numbers28:13 Ate ku buli ntaama dhire ento omusanvu mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo ndala ndala ey'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo. Ekyo nga n'ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa ekyokebwa akawoowo kaakyo kansangaaza." 
Numbers28:14 Era mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa ekijiiraku, nga kya lita ibiri edh'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ku buli nte ento enume, lita ndala n'ekitundu ku ntaama enkulu enume, ni lita ndala ku buli ntaama ento enume. Ekyo nga n'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lusooka mu mwezi, okumalaku omwaka gwonagwona." 
Numbers28:15 Era Mwidha kughangayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku, n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'ebyokunhwa." 
Numbers28:16 “Olunaku olweikumi n'eina olw'omwezi ogusooka, n'olw'okwidhukiriraku nga Musengwa Katonda bweyatubitiza." 
Numbers28:17 Ku lunaku olweikumi n'eitaanu olw'omwezi gwene ogwo, ekibinuko ekinaamalanga enaku omusanvu lwe kinaatooleranga. Enaku edho omusanvu mwidha kulyanga migaati gitazimbulukusiibwa gyonka." 
Numbers28:18 Ku lunaku olusooka ku edho omusanvu, mwidha kwesolozanga okunsinza. Mutalukolerangaku mulimo gwonagwona." 
Numbers28:19 Ku lunaku olwo, mwidha kughangayo eri nze Musengwa ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, nga kirimu bino: ente enume ento ibiri, entaama enume enkulu ndala, n'entaama ento enume musanvu edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga byonabyona biziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers28:20 Ku buli nte mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo isatu edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo. Ate ku ntaama enume enkulu, mugheerengaku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo ibiri edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo." 
Numbers28:21 Ate ku buli ntaama dhire ento omusanvu mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo ndala ndala ey'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo." 
Numbers28:22 Era mwidha kughangayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, olw'okutoolebwaku ebibi byaimwe." 
Numbers28:23 Ebyo mwidha kubighangayo, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers28:24 Mutyo bwe mwidha okughangayo buli lunaku, okumala enaku musanvu, ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa akawoowo kaakyo kansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda. Mwidha kukighangayo okwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku, n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'ebyokunhwa." 
Numbers28:25 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu mwidha kwesolozanga okunsinza. Mutalukolerangaku mulimo gwonagwona. 
Numbers28:26 “Ku lunaku olw'ebirime ebisooka okukungulwa, lwe mugheeraku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke ku Kibinuko kyaimwe eky'Amakungula, mwidha kwesolozanga okunsinza. Mutalukolerangaku mulimo gwonagwona." 
Numbers28:27 Ku lunaku olwo, mwidha kughangayo eri nze Musengwa ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza, nga kirimu bino: ente enume ento ibiri, entaama enume enkulu ndala, n'entaama ento enume musanvu edh'omwaka omulala omulala." 
Numbers28:28 Ku buli nte mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo isatu edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo. Ate ku ntaama enume enkulu, mugheerengaku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo ibiri edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo." 
Numbers28:29 Ate ku buli ntaama dhire ento omusanvu mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, nga kya kilo ndala ndala ey'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, obutabwirwamu omuzigo." 
Numbers28:30 Era mwidha kughangayo embuzi enume ndala olw'okutoolebwaku ebibi byaimwe. 
Numbers28:31 Mwidha kughangayo ebintu ebyo nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku, ghalala n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'ebyokunhwa. Mwegenderezenga ebintu ebyo birobenga kubaaku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:1 “Ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu mwidha kwesolozanga okunsinza, era mutalukolerangaku mulimo gwonagwona. Ku lunaku olwo mwidha kufuuwanga endeka," 
Numbers29:2 era mughengayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga kirimu bino: ente ento enume ndala, entaama enume enkulu ndala, n'entaama ento enume musanvu edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:3 Nga mughaayo ebyo, mugheerengaku ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke kya buwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu nga butabwirwamu omuzigo. Ku nte mugheerengaku kilo isatu, ku ntaama enume mugheerengaku kilo ibiri," 
Numbers29:4 ni ku buli ntaama ku dhire ento omusanvu, kilo ndala." 
Numbers29:5 Era mughengayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, olw'okutoolebwaku ebibi byaimwe." 
Numbers29:6 Mubighengayo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'ebyokunhwa, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa eky'omwezi ogwakaboneka. Akawoowo kaakyo kansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers29:7 “Ku lunaku olweikumi olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu mwidha kwesolozanga okunsinza, n'okwebonerezanga era mutalukolerangaku mulimo gwonagwona." 
Numbers29:8 Ku lunaku olwo mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga kirimu bino: ente ento enume ndala, entaama enume enkulu ndala, n'entaama ento enume musanvu edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:9 Nga mughaayo ebyo mugheerengaku ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke kya buwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu nga butabwirwamu omuzigo. Ku nte mugheerengaku kilo isatu, ku ntaama enume mugheerengaku kilo ibiri," 
Numbers29:10 ni ku buli ntaama ku dhire ento omusanvu, kilo ndala." 
Numbers29:11 Era mughengayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, olw'okutoolebwaku ebibi byaimwe. Mubighengayo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'ebyokunhwa, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers29:12 “Ku lunaku olweikumi n'eitaanu olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu mwidha kwesolozanga okunsinza, era mutalukolerangaku mulimo gwonagwona okumala enaku musanvu, nga muli ku kibinuko ekyo olw'okugheesa Musengwa Katonda ekitiisa." 
Numbers29:13 Mu nnaku edho omusanvu mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda. “Ku lunaku olusooka mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga kirimu bino: ente ento enume ikumi na isatu, entaama enume enkulu ibiri, n'entaama ento enume ikumi na ina edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:14 Era mwidha kugheerengaku ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke kya buwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu nga butabwirwamu omuzigo. Ku buli nte ku dhire enume eikumi n'eisatu mugheerengaku kilo isatu, ku buli ntaama ku dhire enume enkulu eibiri mugheerengaku kilo ibiri," 
Numbers29:15 ni ku buli ntaama ku dhire ento eikumi n'eina, kilo ndala." 
Numbers29:16 Era mughengayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Mwidha kubighangayo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers29:17 “Ku lunaku olwokubiri mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga kirimu bino: ente ento enume ikumi na ibiri, entaama enume enkulu ibiri, n'entaama ento enume ikumi na ina edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:18 Era mwidha kugheerengaku ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'eky'ebyokunhwa, ku nte enume, ni ku ntaama enkulu enume, ni ku ntaama ento enume, nga mujiira ku bungi bw'ensolo ng'eiteeka bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:19 Era mughengayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Mwidha kughangayo ebintu ebyo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers29:20 “Ku lunaku olwokusatu mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga kirimu bino: ente ento enume ikumi na ndala, entaama enume enkulu ibiri, n'entaama ento enume ikumi na ina edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:21 Era mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'eky'ebyokunhwa, ku nte ento enume, ni ku ntaama enume enkulu, ni ku ntaama ento enume, nga mujiira ku bungi bwadho ng'eiteeka bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:22 Era mughengayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Mwidha kubighangayo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers29:23 “Ku lunaku olwokuna mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga kirimu bino: ente ento enume ikumi, entaama enume enkulu ibiri, n'entaama ento enume ikumi na ina edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:24 Era mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'eky'ebyokunhwa, ku nte enume, ni ku ntaama enume enkulu, ni ku ntaama ento, nga mujiira ku bungi bwadho ng'eiteeka bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:25 Era mughengayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Mwidha kubighangayo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers29:26 “Ku lunaku olwokutaanu mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga kirimu bino: ente enume mwenda, entaama enume enkulu ibiri, n'entaama ento enume ikumi na ina edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:27 Era mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'eky'ebyokunhwa, ku nte enume, ni ku ntaama enume enkulu, ni ku ntaama ento enume, nga mujiira ku bungi bwadho ng'eiteeka bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:28 Era mughengayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Mwidha kubighangayo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers29:29 “Ku lunaku olwomukaaga mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga kirimu bino: ente enume munaana, entaama enume enkulu ibiri, n'entaama ento enume ikumi na ina edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:30 Era mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'eky'ebyokunhwa, ku nte enume, ni ku ntaama enume enkulu, ni ku ntaama ento enume, nga mujiira ku bungi bwadho ng'eiteeka bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:31 Era mughengayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Mwidha kubighangayo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers29:32 “Ku lunaku olwomusanvu mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga kirimu bino: ente enume musanvu, entaama enume enkulu ibiri, n'entaama ento enume ikumi na ina edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:33 Era mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'eky'ebyokunhwa, ku nte enume, ni ku ntaama enume enkulu, ni ku ntaama ento enume, nga mujiira ku bungi bwadho ng'eiteeka bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:34 Era mughengayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Mwidha kubighangayo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers29:35 “Ku lunaku olwomunaana mwidha kwesolozanga okunsinza, era mutalukolerangaku mulimo gwonagwona." 
Numbers29:36 Aye mwidha kughangayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri n'akawoowo akansangaaza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga kirimu bino: ente enume ndala, entaama enume enkulu ndala, n'entaama ento enume musanvu edh'omwaka omulala omulala, nga dhiziraku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
Numbers29:37 Era mwidha kugheerangaku ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'eky'ebyokunhwa, ku nte enume, ni ku ntaama enume enkulu, ni ku ntaama ento enume, nga mujiira ku bungi bwadho ng'eiteeka bwe liragira." 
Numbers29:38 Era mughengayo embuzi enume ndala ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Mwidha kubighangayo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ekijiiraku eky'emere ey'empeke, n'ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, nga mwongereza ku kigheebwayo ekyokebwa ekya buli lunaku." 
Numbers29:39 “Ebyo bye mwidha okughangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ku mbaga edh'ebibinuko ebyalagirwa, bibenga ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke, n'ebigheebwayo eby'ebyokunhwa, era n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Mwidha kubighangayo nga mwongereza ku bye mughaayo olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo, ni ku bye mughaayo eby'ekyeyendere.”" 
Numbers29:40 Kale atyo Musa yaakobera Abaisiraeli byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yamulagira. 
Numbers30:1 Agho Musa yaakobera abakulu ab'ebika ebya Abaisiraeli ati: “Bino Musengwa Katonda by'alagiire: 
Numbers30:2 Omusaadha bw'aneeyamanga okugha Musengwa Katonda ekintu, oba n'akola ekirayiro ekimusiba, aidha kuteekwanga buteekwe okutuukiriza ky'asuubiiza. Taakimenhengagho naire." 
Numbers30:3 “Omughala akaali kubayira, ng'akaali mu maka g'abazaire be, bw'aneeyamanga okugha Musengwa Katonda ekintu, oba n'akola ekirayiro ekimusiba," 
Numbers30:4 memale ise n'awulira obweyamo obwo n'ekirayiro ekyo, aye n'abula ky'amutakaniamu, olwo omughala oyo aidha kuteekwanga buteekwe okutuukiriza ky'asuubiiza. Taakimenhengagho naire." 
Numbers30:5 Aye ise oyo bw'anaatakanianga obweyamo obwo n'ekirayiro ekyo ku lunaku lw'abiwuliire, omughala oyo taavunaanizibwenga kubituukiriza. Era Musengwa Katonda aidha kumusonighanga, kuba ise n'amulobeire okubituukiriza." 
Numbers30:6 “Aye kisoboka omughala oyo yaaja okufumbirwa ng'ate akaali kutuukiriza kye yeeyama, k'abe nga yeeyama mu bugenderevu oba mu butali bugenderevu, oba kyaba nti afumbiirwa ng'akaali kutuukiriza kirayiro kye yalayira." 
Numbers30:7 Bwe kibanga kityo, memale iba n'awulira obweyamo obwo n'ekirayiro ekyo aye n'abula ky'amutakaniamu, olwo omughala oyo aidha kuteekwanga buteekwe okutuukiriza ky'asuubiiza. Taakimenhengagho naire." 
Numbers30:8 Aye iba bw'anaamuloberanga ku lunaku lw'abiwuliire, olwo anaabanga ng'amenhiegho obweyamo mukazi we oyo bwe yakola, ka bube mu bugenderevu oba mu butali bugenderevu. Era anaabanga ng'amenhiegho n'ekirayiro mukazi we oyo kye yalayira. Era Musengwa Katonda aidha kusonighanga omukazi oyo." 
Numbers30:9 “Aye namwandu oba omukazi eyayawukana n'iba, aidha kuteekwanga buteekwe okutuukiriza obweyamo bwe oba ekirayiro kye. Taakimenhengagho naire." 
Numbers30:10 Era bw'anaabanga ng'aliku kye yeeyama oba kye yalayira nga mufumbo," 
Numbers30:11 era nga iba yakiwulira aye yaabula ky'amutakaniamu okumulobera, olwo omukazi oyo aidha kuteekwanga buteekwe okutuukiriza ky'asuubiiza. Taakimenhengagho naire." 
Numbers30:12 Aye iba bw'anaabimuloberanga n'abisazaamu ku lunaku lw'abiwuliire, olwo byonabyona omukazi oyo bye yayogera eby'obweyamo bwe oba eby'ekirayiro kye yasuubiza okubaaku ekintu ky'aneerumyamu, binaabanga nga tibikaamufuga. Era Musengwa Katonda aidha kumusonighanga." 
Numbers30:13 Iba w'omukazi oyo asobola okukakasa oba okumenhagho obweyamo n'endagaano omukazi oyo yaaba ng'akoze ng'alayira okubaaku ekintu ky'aneerumyamu. 
Numbers30:14 Aye bweghabitagho enaku nga iba oyo azira ky'amukobye, olwo anaabanga ng'akakaisa byonabyona mukazi we bye yeeyama ni bye yalayira; kuba okuva lwe yabiwulira azira kye yamukobaku." 
Numbers30:15 Ate bw'anaamalanga n'abimenhagho nga ghabiseegho enaku bukyanga abiwulira, olwo mwene n'anaavunaanibwanga omusango gwa mukazi we ogw'obutabituukiriza.”" 
Numbers30:16 Ago n'amateeka Musengwa Katonda ge yagha Musa agagema ku bweyamo ni ku birayiro omukazi ali n'iba by'akola, era agagema ni ku mughala akaali kubayira ng'akaali mu maka g'abazaire be." 
Numbers31:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers31:2 “Mubonereze Abamidia nga mwesasuuza olw'ebyo bye baakola Abaisiraeli. Bw'onaamala okukola ekyo oidha kutwalibwa weeyimbe ku bantu bo abaafa.” 
Numbers31:3 Kale Musa yaakoba abantu ati: “Mu imwe mwerondemu abantu mubaghe eby'okulwanisa, baje balumbe Abamidia bababonereze nga beesasuuza nga Musengwa Katonda bw'alagiire." 
Numbers31:4 Mulonde abantu lukumi (1,000) okuva mu buli kika ky'Abaisiraeli, baje balwane.”" 
Numbers31:5 Agho baalonda abantu lukumi lukumi okuva mu buli kika, nga bava mu nkumi n'enkumi edh'Abaisiraeli. Abantu abo baaghera omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000), nga bagemye eby'okulwanisa era nga beetegeike okulwana mu lutalo." 
Numbers31:6 Musa yaabasindika okulwana nga baduumirwa Finehasi mutabane wa Eleazari kabona, eyali n'ebintu ebikozesebwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, ghalala n'amagwala agafuuyibwa ng'akamanhiso ak'ebiragiro." 
Numbers31:7 Baalumba Abamidia nga Musengwa Katonda bweyabalagira ng'abita mu Musa. Baita buli musaadha. 
Numbers31:8 Baita bakyabazinga abataanu ab'Abamidia, bano: Evi, Rekema, Zuri, Huri ni Reba. Era mu lutalo olwo mwe baitira ni Balaamu mutabane wa Beori." 
Numbers31:9 Abaisiraeli baanhaga abakazi n'abaana abato ab'Abamidia, baabatwala nga basibe ghalala n'ente dhaibwe dhoonadhoona, n'entaama n'embuzi n'ebintu byaibwe ebindi byonabyona." 
Numbers31:10 Baayokya ebibuga eby'Abamidia ni weema dhaibwe. 
Numbers31:11 Baatoola ebintu byonabyona bye baanhaga, omwali abantu n'ensolo," 
Numbers31:12 baabitwalira Musa ni Eleazari kabona, n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaali beesoloiza mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, e Yeriko mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe ogw'e Moabu, okuliiraana n'omwiga Yorudani." 
Numbers31:13 Agho Musa, ni Eleazari kabona, n'abakulembeze ab'Abaisiraeli, baava mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, baaja okweisuusaayo eigye lya Isiraeli." 
Numbers31:14 Musa yaasungughalira abakulu mu igye eryo abaira okuva mu lutalo. Abo n'abaaduumira enkumi n'enkumi era baaduumira ebikumi n'ebikumi eby'abalwani. 
Numbers31:15 Yaababuuza ati: “Lwaki mulese abakazi bano boonaboona nga bakaali balamu? 
Numbers31:16 Mwidhukire nga baali bakazi abo, mu bizibu ebyali e Peori, nga bajiira ku magezi ga Balaamu, baaleetera Abaisiraeli okughemukira Musengwa Katonda baalekera okuba abeesigwa y'ali. Ekyavaamu n'ekibamba okwidha mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda abo." 
Numbers31:17 Kale mperaano mwite buli mwana mulenzi, era na buli mukazi eyaali abaireku n'omusaadha mu buliri." 
Numbers31:18 Aye abaghala abato abakaali kubaaku na basaadha mu buliri, mubaleke nga balamu, mubasigaze nga baimwe." 
Numbers31:19 Era buli muntu ku imwe eyaita omuntu, n'oyo eyagema ku mufu, asigale eyo kuliya okw'ekifo ghe twasimba weema dhaife, okumala enaku musanvu. Ku lunaku olwokusatu ni ku lwomusanvu mwidha kwetukuza, imwe aghalala n'abantu be mwanhaga." 
Numbers31:20 Era mwidha kutukuza buli kivaalo, na buli kintu kya luwu, n'ebintu byonabyona ebyakolebwa mu buviiri obw'embuzi, era n'ebyo byonabyona ebyakolebwa mu muti.”" 
Numbers31:21 Eleazari kabona yaakoba abantu abaali baakava mu lutalo okulwana, ati: “Lino n'eiteeka Musengwa Katonda lye yalagira Musa:" 
Numbers31:22 Zaabu, feeza, ekyuma eky'ekikomo, ekyuma ekigumu einho, eibaati, ekyuma ekizitogha einho," 
Numbers31:23 na buli kintu ekigumira omuliro, mwidha kukibisa mu muliro olw'okukitukuza. Aye era mwidha kukitukuza n'amaadhi ag'okutukuza. Ate buli kintu ekitaghanga kugumira muliro, mwidha kukibisa mu maadhi ago ag'okutukuza gonka." 
Numbers31:24 Muteekwa okwoza ebivaalo byaimwe ku lunaku olwomusanvu, olwo mube abalongoofu. Memale mughange okwidha mu kifo ghe twasimba weema dhaife.”" 
Numbers31:25 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers31:26 “Iwe ni Eleazari kabona, n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli, mubale ebintu byonabyona ebyanhagibwa mu lutalo, abantu n'ensolo." 
Numbers31:27 Memale mubigabaniemu ghabiri, ebindi bibe bya balwani beene abaaja mu lutalo, ate ebindi bibe bya bantu abandi boonaboona." 
Numbers31:28 Ku mugabo ogw'abalwani beene abaaja mu lutalo, oidha kutoolaku empooza ya Musengwa Katonda nga ya muntu mulala mulala ku buli bantu abanhage ebikumi ebitaanu. Era oidha kukola otyo ku nte, ku ndogoyi, ku ntaama ni ku mbuzi." 
Numbers31:29 Empooza eyo oidha kugitoola ku mugabo gwaibwe, ogighe Eleazari kabona, ebe ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers31:30 Ku mugabo ogw'Abaisiraeli abandi abasigairegho oidha kutoolaku omuntu mulala mulala ku buli bantu ataanu abanhage, era oidha kukola otyo ku nte, ku ndogoyi, ku ntaama, ku mbuzi, era ni ku nsolo edhindi dhoonadhoona, obighe Abalevi abalabirira Weema ya Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Numbers31:31 Musa ni Eleazari kabona n'abakulu baakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa. 
Numbers31:32 Ku bintu eigye ery'Abaisiraeli bye lyanhaga ku Bamidia ebyasigalagho byali biti: Entaama emitwalo nkaaga na musanvu n'enkumi itaanu (675,000)," 
Numbers31:33 ente emitwalo musanvu n'enkumi ibiri (72,000)," 
Numbers31:34 endogoyi emitwalo mukaaga na lukumi (61,000)," 
Numbers31:35 n'abantu emitwalo esatu n'enkumi ibiri (32,000); ng'abo n'abaghala abaali nga tibabangaku na basaadha mu buliri." 
Numbers31:36 Kale mu kugabaniamu aghabiri, abalwani abaaja mu lutalo beene, baafuna entaama emitwalo asatu n'esatu na kasanvu na bitaanu (337,500)." 
Numbers31:37 Okwo baatoolaku entaama lukaaga na nsanvu na itaanu (675), ng'empooza ye baagha Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers31:38 Ente dhaali emitwalo esatu na kakaaga (36,000), kwe baatoola ente ensanvu n'eibiri ng'empooza ya Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers31:39 Endogoyi dhaali emitwalo esatu na bitaanu (30,500), kwe baatoola endogoyi enkaaga n'endala ng'empooza ya Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers31:40 Abantu baali omutwalo mulala na kakaaga (16,000), kwe baatoola abantu asatu n'ababiri ng'empooza ya Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers31:41 Musa yaatoola empooza eyo eyali ng'ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda, yaagigha Eleazari kabona, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa oyo." 
Numbers31:42 Nga Musa amaze okwawulaku ebintu eby'abalwani abaaja mu lutalo beene, Abaisiraeli abaasigalagho bye baafuna byali biti:" 
Numbers31:43 Entaama emitwalo amakumi asatu n'esatu na kasanvu na bitaanu (337,500)," 
Numbers31:44 ente emitwalo esatu na kakaaga (36,000)," 
Numbers31:45 endogoyi emitwalo esatu na bitaanu (30,500)," 
Numbers31:46 n'abantu omutwalo mulala na kakaaga (16,000)." 
Numbers31:47 Ku mugabo ogwo Abaisiraeli abaasigalagho gwe baafuna, Musa yatoolaku omuntu mulala mulala ku buli bantu amakumi ataanu, era yaatoola n'ensolo ndala ndala ku buli nsolo amakumi ataanu, yaabigha Abalevi abalabirira Eweema ya Musengwa Katonda. Musa ekyo yakikola nga Musengwa Katonda oyo bweyamulagira." 
Numbers31:48 Agho abakulu mu igye abaaduumira enkumi n'enkumi edh'abalwani n'ebikumi n'ebikumi eby'abalwani, baidha ye Musa," 
Numbers31:49 baamukoba bati: “Isebo, ife abagheereza bo tubaze abalwani boonaboona be twaduumira nga baligho boonaboona." 
Numbers31:50 Era tuleese ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga buli muntu bweyafuna. Tuleese ebintu bya zaabu eby'okwewoomya, ebikomo, empeta edh'oku ngalo n'edh'oku matu n'ebinhere, nga tusaba Musengwa Katonda atutooleku ebibi byaife.”" 
Numbers31:51 Musa ni Eleazari kabona, baabatoolaku ebintu ebyo byonabyona eby'okwewoomya bye baaleeta, ebyakolebwa mu zaabu." 
Numbers31:52 Zaabu yeenayeena abakulu mu igye abo abaaduumira enkumi n'enkumi edh'abalwani n'ebikumi n'ebikumi eby'abalwani, ye baaghaayo ng'ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda, yagheramu kumpi kilo ebikumi bibiri." 
Numbers31:53 Aye abalwani beene abaaja mu lutalo, bale abandi abataali baduumizi, buli muntu yasigaza bye yanhaga ku Bamidia." 
Numbers31:54 Musa ni Eleazari kabona, baatwala zaabu oyo ye baatoola ku baduumizi abo ab'abaisirukale enkumi n'enkumi n'ebikumi n'ebikumi, baamuta mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, abenga ekiidhukizo eky'Abaisiraeli mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Numbers32:1 Ab'ekika kya Reubeni n'ab'ekya Gadi baali n'ebyayo kamaala inho. Agho baabona ekiketezo eky'e Yazeri n'eky'e Gileadi nga birungi bya kwayiramu. 
Numbers32:2 Kale baaja ye Musa ni Eleazari kabona, ni y'abakulembeze mu Isiraeli, baabakoba bati:" 
Numbers32:3 “Atarothi, ni Diboni, ni Yazeri, ni Nimura, ni Heshiboni, ni Eleale, ni Sebamu, ni Nebo, ni Beoni;" 
Numbers32:4 ebyo n'ebiketezo Musengwa Katonda bye yaghangula ng'Abaisiraeli babona. Ebiketezo ebyo birungi bya kwayiramu, ate nga ife abagheereza baimwe tuli baayi.”" 
Numbers32:5 Agho baakoba bati: “Tubeeghembye mutughe ekiketezo ekyo kibe obutaka bwaife. Mutatutwala ere ng'osomoike omwiga Yorudani.” 
Numbers32:6 Aye Musa yaabairamu ati: “Baganda baimwe banaaja mu lutalo nga imwe mutyaime butyame ghano? 
Numbers32:7 Lwaki muli kwenda okumala mu Baisiraeli amaani, balobe okusomoka okuja okutwala ensi Musengwa Katonda ye yabagha?" 
Numbers32:8 Ekyo badhaadha baimwe boona kye baakola, bwe nabasindika nga tuli e Kadeshi Barinea okukeeta ensi eyo." 
Numbers32:9 Baaja, baatuuka mu Kiiko ekya Eshikoli, baabona ensi eyo, aye baamala mu Baisiraeli amaani, balobe kuja kutwala nsi Musengwa Katonda ye yabagha." 
Numbers32:10 Agho obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwatumbuka ng'oti muliro ku lunaku olwo, yeefuugha, ati," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Bwenebwene ghazira waire omuntu omulala ati ku bantu abaava e Misiri, abagheziiza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingagho, alibona ku nsi ye nalayira okugha Aburahamu, Isaaka ni Yakobo kuba abantu abo tibaaneesiga na mwoyo mulala." 
Numbers32:12 Ezira naire omulala ku abo, okutoolaku Kalebu mutabane wa Yefune Omukenizzi ni Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni, kuba abo baaneesiga nze Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo mulala.’" 
Numbers32:13 Agho obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwatumbukira ku Baisiraeli ng'oti muliro, yaabaleetera okutambulatambula eyo batyo mu irungu okumala emyaka amakumi ana, okutuusa oluse olwo olwakola ebibi ye Musengwa Katonda bwe lwafa ni luwaagho." 
Numbers32:14 Mperaano bona, niimwe mwize mu kifo kya badhaadha baimwe abo, mube oluse olw'abakozi ab'ebibi, era mwongere okuleetera Musengwa Katonda okusungughalira Abaisiraeli ekibitiriire." 
Numbers32:15 Imwe ab'ekika kya Reubeni n'ab'ekya Gadi, bwe munaakyuka ni muloba okujiira ku bya Musengwa Katonda, Musengwa yeena kabiri aidha kulekulira agho abantu bano mu irungu, olwo mube nga niimwe omubaleeteire boonaboona okuzikirira.”" 
Numbers32:16 Agho ab'ekika kya Reubeni n'ab'ekya Gadi baaseeta ye Musa, baamukoba bati: “Twidha kuzimbira ensolo dhaife ebigo, era tuzimbire n'abaana baife abato ebibuga ebigumu." 
Numbers32:17 Aye ife twidha kugema eby'okulwanisa tukulemberemu Baisiraeli banaife okutuusa lwe tulibatuusa mu kiketezo ekija okuba ekyaibwe. Olwo tunaaba nga tulese abaana baife abato mu bibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu, balobe kulumbibwa batyamye ba mu kiketezo kino." 
Numbers32:18 Tituja kwira ghano mu maka gaife, okutuusa nga buli Muisiraeli amaze okugheebwa obutaka bwe." 
Numbers32:19 Tituja kugabana nabo butaka ku luuyi lule olw'omwiga Yorudani n'okweyongerayo, kuba ife tumaze okufuna obutaka obwaife ku luuyi luno olw'e buvandhuba w'omwiga Yorudani ogwo.”" 
Numbers32:20 Musa yaabairamu ati: “Bwemuba nga mutyo bwe munaakola, kale ni buti mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda mugeme eby'okulwanisa mwetegeke okuja mu lutalo." 
Numbers32:21 Abalwani baimwe boonaboona baidha kusomoka Yorudani nga Musengwa Katonda n'abakulembeire, okutuusa lw'anaamala okughangula abazigu be," 
Numbers32:22 n'okunhaga ensi eyo. Memale mwire nga muzira kibabandhibwa Musengwa Katonda oba Baisiraeli banaimwe. Olwo aja kukakasa ekiketezo kino kibe obutaka bwaimwe. 
Numbers32:23 Aye bwemutaakole mutyo, mukimanhe nti munaaba mukoze ekibi eri Musengwa Katonda, era nga bwenebwene muja kubonerezebwa olw'ekibi ekyo." 
Numbers32:24 Kale muzimbire abaana baimwe abato ebibuga, muzimbire n'ensolo dhaimwe ebigo, era mutuukirize kye musuubiiza okukola.”" 
Numbers32:25 Agho ab'ekika kya Reubeni n'ab'ekya Gadi baakoba Musa bati: “Isebo, ife abagheereza bo twidha kukola nga bw'olagiire." 
Numbers32:26 Bakazi baife, n'abaana baife abato, baidha kusigala ghano mu bibuga eby'e Gileadi, ghalala n'ebyayo byaife." 
Numbers32:27 Aye ife abagheereza bo twidha kusomoka, nga buli muntu agemye eky'okulwanisa, tuje mu lutalo tulwane nga Musengwa Katonda atukulembeire, nga iwe musengwa waife Musa bw'okobye.”" 
Numbers32:28 Kale Musa yaalagira Eleazari kabona, ni Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni, n'abakulu ab'ebika mu Isiraeli, ekiragiro ekigema ku bika ebyo byombi, ati:" 
Numbers32:29 “Ab'ekika kya Reubeni n'ab'ekya Gadi bwe balyetegeka okulwana, Musengwa Katonda ng'abakulembeiremu, ni basomoka n'imwe Yorudani, memale ni mughangula ekiketezo ekyo eky'e bugwandhuba wa Yorudani, mulibagha ekiketezo eky'e Gileadi ng'obutaka bwaibwe." 
Numbers32:30 Aye bwe batalisomoka n'imwe okuja okulwana, olwo balifunira ghalala n'imwe obutaka mu kiketezo eky'e Kanaani.”" 
Numbers32:31 Agho ab'ekika kya Reubeni n'ekya Gadi bairamu bati: “Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'atulagiire ife abagheereza bo, tutyo bwe twidha okukola." 
Numbers32:32 Twidha kusomoka nga twetegeike okulwana, Musengwa Katonda ng'atukulembeiremu, tungire mu kiketezo eky'e Kanaani, olwo tusigaze obutaka bwaife eno e buvandhuba wa Yorudani.”" 
Numbers32:33 Kale Musa yaagha ab'ekika kya Gadi, n'ab'ekika kya Reubeni, n'ekitundu eky'ekika kya Manasse mutabane wa Yosefu, ekiketezo ekyafugibwanga kyabazinga Sihoni ow'Abamori, n'ekiketezo ekyafugibwanga kyabazinga Ogi ow'e Bashani. Yaabagheeraku n'ebibuga n'ebyalo byonabyona ebibyezungulwire." 
Numbers32:34 Agho ab'ekika kya Gadi bairamu okuzimba buyaaka ebibuga: Diboni, Atarothi, Aroeri," 
Numbers32:35 Aturothi Shofani, Yazeri, Yogubeha," 
Numbers32:36 Bethi Nimira, ni Bethi Harani, era baabyezunguluza ebimante ebigumu. Baazimbira n'ebyayo byaibwe ebigo." 
Numbers32:37 Ab'ekika kya Reubeni bairamu okuzimba obuyaaka ebibuga: Heshiboni, Eleale, Kiriathaimu," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, ni Baali Meoni, nga baakyusiisa amaina gaabyo baabigha agandi. Era bairamu okuzimba obuyaaka n'ekibuga Sibuma." 
Numbers32:39 Ate ab'olulyo lwa Makiri mutabane wa Manasse, baaja baanhaga ekiketezo eky'e Gileadi ku Bamori abaakirimu." 
Numbers32:40 Era Musa yaakibagha baatyama omwo. 
Numbers32:41 Yairi ow'omu kika kya Manasse, yeena yaabaaku n'ebyalo bye yalumba n'abinhaga era yaabyeta “Ebyalo bya Yairi”." 
Numbers32:42 Noba yaaja yaalumba ekibuga Kenathi yaakigema n'ebyalo byakyo, era yaakyusa n'eriina lyakyo, yaakituuma erirye, Noba." 
Numbers33:1 Bino n'ebifo Abaisiraeli bye baajanga nga basimbamu weema dhaibwe, bwe baava e Misiri nga bali bikunsu bikunsu, nga Musa ni Aaroni babakulembeire." 
Numbers33:2 Musa yajanga ng'aghandiika buli kifo kye baavangamu okweyongerayo mu lugendo lwaibwe, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyamulagira. Era bino n'ebifo nga bwe byairaganwangaku." 
Numbers33:3 Abaisiraeli baasitula okuva e Ramesesi mu Misiri, ku lunaku olweikumi n'eitaanu olw'omwezi ogusooka mu mwaka ogwo. Olwo n'olunaku olwairirira Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa. Era Abaisiraeli baajiira mu kitiibwa ng'Abamisiri boonaboona babona." 
Numbers33:4 Baalekanga ng'Abamisiri bali kuziika abaana baibwe ababeri, Musengwa Katonda be yaita n'ayoleka nga bw'ali n'obuyinza okusinga emisambwa gyaibwe." 
Numbers33:5 Kale Abaisiraeli baasitula okuva e Ramesesi, baaja baatuuka e Sukkothi, baasimba agho weema dhaibwe." 
Numbers33:6 Baava e Sukkothi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu Ethamu ekiri ku mbali okw'eirungu." 
Numbers33:7 Baava e Ethamu baakyuka baira einhuma, baabita e Pihahirothi ekiri e buvandhuba wa Baali Zefoni, baasimba weema dhaibwe kumpi ni Migidoli." 
Numbers33:8 Baava agho okumpi n'e Hahirothi, baabita ghagati mu Nhandha Emyufu baatuuka ku irungu ery'e Ethamu. Mu irungu eryo baatambulamu olugendo lwa nnaku isatu, olwo baatuuka e Mara baasimba agho weema dhaibwe." 
Numbers33:9 Baava e Mara, baaja mu Elimu aghaali ensulo eikumi n'eibiri n'emiti eminaazi ensanvu, baasimba agho weema dhaibwe." 
Numbers33:10 Baasitula okuva mu Elimu, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe kumpi n'Enhandha Emyufu." 
Numbers33:11 Baava agho okumpi n'Enhandha Emyufu, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu irungu ery'e Sini." 
Numbers33:12 Baava agho mu irungu ery'e Sini, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Dofuka." 
Numbers33:13 Baava e Dofuka, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu Alushi." 
Numbers33:14 Baava mu Alushi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Refidimu etaali maadhi bantu ge baghanga kunhwa." 
Numbers33:15 Baasitula okuva e Refidimu, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu irungu ery'e Sinai." 
Numbers33:16 Baava mu irungu ery'e Sinai, baasimba weema dhaibwe e Kiburothi Hattaava." 
Numbers33:17 Baava e Kiburothi Hattaava, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Hazerothi." 
Numbers33:18 Baava e Hazerothi, baaja basimba weema dhaibwe e Rithima." 
Numbers33:19 Baava e Rithima, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Rimmoni Perezi." 
Numbers33:20 Baava e Rimmoni Perezi, baaja basimba weema dhaibwe e Libuna." 
Numbers33:21 Baava e Libuna, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Rissa." 
Numbers33:22 Baava e Rissa, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Kehelatha." 
Numbers33:23 Baava e Kehelatha, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe ku lusozi Sheferi." 
Numbers33:24 Baava ku lusozi Sheferi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Harada." 
Numbers33:25 Baava e Harada, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Makehelothi." 
Numbers33:26 Baava e Makehelothi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Tahathi." 
Numbers33:27 Baava e Tahathi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Tera." 
Numbers33:28 Baava e Tera, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Mithuka." 
Numbers33:29 Baava e Mithuka, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Hashimona." 
Numbers33:30 Baava e Hashimona, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Moserothi." 
Numbers33:31 Baava e Moserothi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Bene Yaakani." 
Numbers33:32 Baava e Bene Yaakani, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Hori Haggidigadi." 
Numbers33:33 Baava e Hori Haggidigadi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Yotubatha." 
Numbers33:34 Baava e Yotubatha, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu Aburona." 
Numbers33:35 Baava mu Aburona, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu Ezioni Geberi." 
Numbers33:36 Baava mu Ezioni Geberi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu irungu ery'e Zini, ekyo nga ni Kadeshi." 
Numbers33:37 Baava e Kadeshi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe ku lusozi Hori, ku mbali okw'ekiketezo eky'Abaedomu." 
Numbers33:38 Agho Aaroni kabona yaaniina ku lusozi Hori, era yaafiira okwo nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira. Ebyo byaligho ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogwokutaanu, mu mwaka ogwamakumi ana (40), kasookanga Baisiraeli bava mu Misiri." 
Numbers33:39 Aaroni oyo yaja okufiira ku lusozi Hori, ng'agheziiza emyaka kikumi n'abiri n'esatu (123) egy'obukulu." 
Numbers33:40 Agho ghaabaagho kyabazinga Omukanaani ow'e Aradi mu kiketezo ekikalukalu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, yaawulira ati Abaisiraeli bali kwidha." 
Numbers33:41 Agho Abaisiraeli baasitula okuva ku lusozi Hori, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Zalumona." 
Numbers33:42 Baava e Zalumona, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Punoni." 
Numbers33:43 Baava e Punoni, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu Obothi." 
Numbers33:44 Baava mu Obothi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu kifo ekyetebwa Iye Abarimu, mu biketezo bya Moabu." 
Numbers33:45 Baava mu kifo ekyetebwa Iyimu, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Diboni Gadi." 
Numbers33:46 Baava e Diboni Gadi, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu Alumoni Dibulathaimu." 
Numbers33:47 Baava mu Alumoni Dibulathaimu, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe mu nsozi edh'e Abarimu, ng'olingiriire Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Baava mu nsozi edh'e Abarimu, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Yeriko mu biketezo by'e Moabu eby'oku museetwe, okuliiraana Yorudani." 
Numbers33:49 Baasimba weema dhaibwe okumpi n'omwiga Yorudani, okuva e Bethi Yeshimothi okutuukira irala mu Abeli Shittimu, mu biketezo by'e Moabu eby'oku museetwe." 
Numbers33:50 Bwe baali eyo e Yeriko, mu biketezo by'e Moabu eby'oku museetwe okuliiraana omwiga Yorudani, Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa" 
Numbers33:51 ati: “Koba Abaisiraeli oti, bwemunaamala okusomoka Yorudani ni mungira mu Kanaani," 
Numbers33:52 mwidha kubingangamu abatyamye baamu boonaboona be munaayagaanangamu, muzikirizenga ebifaananie byaibwe byonabyona ebibaadhe mu mabaale, n'ebyo ebyakolebwa mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, era musaaniengagho ebifo byaibwe ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu." 
Numbers33:53 Mwidha kutwala ensi eyo mugibeemu, kuba ngibaghaire ebe yaimwe." 
Numbers33:54 Mwidha kugigabana mu bika byaimwe ni mu nda dhaimwe nga mukozesa obululu. Ekika ekinene mwidha kukigha ghanene, ate ekika ekitono mukighe ghatono. Omuntu akalulu ghe kanaamugha n'aghanaaba aghaghe, ng'agabanira mu kika kya ise." 
Numbers33:55 Aye bwe mutalisooka kubingamu batyamye be munaayagaanangamu, olwo abo be mulireka okusigalamu baja kubafuukira ng'oti n'ekintu ekikusonka mu liiso era ng'oti n'amawa agakufumita mu mbavu. Baja kubaleetera ebizibu kamaala mu nsi eyo ye mulibaamu." 
Numbers33:56 Bwe mutalibabingamu, olwo kye nalowooza okukola beene ndikikola imwe.”" 
Numbers34:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Musa 
Numbers34:2 akobe Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwemulingira mu nsi Kanaani, ensi ye ndi kubagha ebe obutaka bwaimwe, ensalosalo dhaayo dhija kuba dhiti:" 
Numbers34:3 Ensalosalo ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, eidha kuvanga ku irungu ery'e Zini, ebitirenga ku nsalosalo ey'e Edomu. Ensalosalo ey'e bugwandhuba eidha kuvanga Enhandha Eyomuunhu gh'ekoma mu buvandhuba." 
Numbers34:4 Agho eidha kukyukanga esimbire ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, eniineniine Akirabbimu era ebite kumpi ni Zini. Era ku luuyi olwo eidha kukomanga ku Kadeshi Barinea. Olwo eidha kukyukanga esimbire ghagati gh'e bugwandhuba n'oluuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, etuuke mu Hazari Addari, era yeeyongereyo mu Azimoni." 
Numbers34:5 Ensalosalo eyo eidha kukyukanga okuva mu Azimoni, esimbire ku kaiga ak'e Misiri, era ekomenga ku Nhandha Eyaghagati." 
Numbers34:6 “Ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba, ensalo eidha kubanga Enhandha Eyaghagati." 
Numbers34:7 “Ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ensalo eidha kuvanga ku Nhandha Eyaghagati etuuke ku lusozi Hori." 
Numbers34:8 Bw'enaavanga ku lusozi Hori eidha kujanga etuuke aghaingirirwa e Hamathi okukoma e Zedadi," 
Numbers34:9 era yeeyongereyo etuuke e Zifuroni, memale ekome e Hazari Enani. Eyo n'eidha okubanga ensalosalo ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba." 
Numbers34:10 “Ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba, ensalosalo eidha kuvanga e Hazari Enani etuuke e Shefamu." 
Numbers34:11 Ensalosalo eyo eidha kuvanga e Shefamu, eikirire e Ribula ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba olwa Aini. Era eidha kweyongeranga okwikirira etuuke ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba olw'enhandha Kinnerethi." 
Numbers34:12 Ensalosalo eyo eidha kweyongeranga okwikirira, etuuke ku mwiga Yorudani, era ekomenga ku Nhandha Eyomuunhu. “Eyo n'eidha okubanga ensi yaimwe, era edho n'ensalosalo dhaayo okugyezunguluza.”" 
Numbers34:13 Agho Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Eyo n'ensi ye mwidha okugabana nga mukuba obululu, Musengwa Katonda y'alagiire okugha ebika omwenda n'ekitundu;" 
Numbers34:14 kuba ab'ekika kya Reubeni, n'ab'ekika kya Gadi, n'ekitundu eky'ekika kya Manasse, baamala ira okugheebwa obutaka obwaibwe, nga bujiira ku nda dha baiseibwe." 
Numbers34:15 Ebika ebyo ebibiri n'ekitundu, byamala ira okugheebwa obutaka bwabyo ere ng'osomoike Yorudani, ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba ng'olingiriire Yeriko.”" 
Numbers34:16 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: 
Numbers34:17 “Gano n'amaina ag'abantu abaidha okubagabaniamu ensi eja okuba obutaka bwaimwe: Eleazari kabona, ni Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni." 
Numbers34:18 Ku abo oidha kwongerezaaku omukulembeze mulala okuva mu buli kika, abo bayambeku mu kugabaniamu ensi yo." 
Numbers34:19 Era gano n'amaina gaibwe: Kalebu mutabane wa Yefunne, okuva mu kika kya Yuda;" 
Numbers34:20 Shemueli mutabane wa Ammihudi, okuva mu kika kya Simeoni;" 
Numbers34:21 Elidadi mutabane wa Kisiloni, okuva mu kika kya Benjamini;" 
Numbers34:22 Bukki mutabane wa Yoguli, okuva mu kika kya Dani;" 
Numbers34:23 Hannieli mutabane wa Efodi, okuva mu b'olulyo lwa Yosefu, mu kika kya Manasse;" 
Numbers34:24 Kemueli mutabane wa Shifutani, okuva mu kika kya Efuraimu;" 
Numbers34:25 Elizafani mutabane wa Parunaki, okuva mu kika kya Zebuluni;" 
Numbers34:26 Palutieli mutabane wa Azzani, okuva mu kika kya Issakari;" 
Numbers34:27 Ahihudi mutabane wa Shelomi, okuva mu kika kya Asheri;" 
Numbers34:28 Padaheli mutabane wa Ammihudi, okuva mu kika kya Nafutali.”" 
Numbers34:29 Abo n'abantu Musengwa Katonda be yalagira okugabania Abaisiraeli obutaka mu nsi Kanaani. 
Numbers35:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ni Musa e Yeriko kumpi ni Yorudani, mu biketezo by'e Moabu eby'oku museetwe. Yaakoba Musa ati:" 
Numbers35:2 “Lagira Abaisiraeli oti, mughe Abalevi ebibuga eby'okubangamu, nga mutoola ku ebyo imwe Abaisiraeli bye mwagabana bibe obutaka bwaibwe. Era mughe Abalevi abo eitaka ery'okwayiramu eryezungulwire ebibuga ebyo." 
Numbers35:3 Ebibuga ebyo biidha kubanga bya Balevi abo nga bya kubangamu, n'eitaka eribyezungulwire libenga lya kwayirangamu nte dhaibwe, n'entaama, n'embuzi, n'ensolo edhindi." 
Numbers35:4 Eitaka ery'okwayirangamu eryezungulwire ebibuga bye mwidha okugha Abalevi, liidha kuba lya bugazi bwa mita ebikumi bina n'ataanu, okuva ku kimante ky'ekibuga okwezungulula endhuyi dh'ekibuga ekyo dhoonadhoona." 
Numbers35:5 Kale ni mwidha kupimanga mita lwenda kuliya okw'ekibuga ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba, ni mita lwenda ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, ni mita lwenda ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba, ni mita lwenda ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ng'ekibuga kirimu ghagati. Eryo n'eriidha okubanga eitaka ery'okwayiramu eryezungulwire ebibuga eby'Abalevi ebyo." 
Numbers35:6 Ebibuga mukaaga ku ebyo bye mwidha okugha Abalevi, biidha kubanga bya kulumukirwamu ole yeenayeena aita omuntu nga tagendereire. Ku ebyo mwidha kubongereraku ebibuga ebindi amakumi ana na bibiri." 
Numbers35:7 Ebibuga byonabyona aghalala bye munaagha Abalevi, biidha kuba amakumi ana na munaana n'eitaka lyaku ery'okwayirangamu." 
Numbers35:8 Mwidha kutoola ku bibuga imwe Abaisiraeli bye mwagabana, mubighe Abalevi nga mujiira ku bunene obwa buli kika. Ebika ebinene biidha kughangayo ebibuga kamaala, ate ebika ebitono bigheeyo ebibuga bitono.”" 
Numbers35:9 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ni Musa, yaamukoba ati:" 
Numbers35:10 “Koba Abaisiraeli oti, bwe muliba mumaze okusomoka omwiga Yorudani ni mungira mu nsi Kanaani," 
Numbers35:11 mulirondamu ebindi ku bibuga, byaba bya kulumukirangamu ole anaitanga omuntu nga tagendereire." 
Numbers35:12 Ebibuga ebyo mwe mwidha okulumukiranga olw'okwewonia oyo ayenda okwesasuuza. Olwo, ole anaitanga omuntu nga tagendereire, alobe kwitibwanga ng'akaali kwewozaaku mu maiso g'abantu nga beesoloiza." 
Numbers35:13 Ebibuga ebyo bye munaaghaayo, omuntu mw'asobola okulumukira, biidha kuba mukaaga." 
Numbers35:14 Mwidha kughaayo ebibuga bisatu eruuyi ere ng'osomoike Yorudani, n'ebindi bisatu mu nsi Kanaani, bibe ebibuga omuntu mw'asobola okulumukira." 
Numbers35:15 Omuisiraeli yeenayeena, oba omuntu ow'endha, oba omusenze, bw'anaitanga omuntu nga tagendereire, aidha kubanga wa idembe okulumukira mu bibuga ebyo omukaaga olw'okwewonia." 
Numbers35:16 “Aye ole bw'akubisa omuntu ekiisi eky'ekyuma ekigumu einho, omuntu oyo n'amala n'afa, oyo amukubye aba mutemo, era omutemo oyo aidhanga kwitibwa." 
Numbers35:17 Era ole bw'agema ekiisi eky'eibaale ekighanga okwita omuntu, n'akikubisa omuntu, era omuntu oyo n'amala n'afa, oyo amukubye aba mutemo, era omutemo oyo aidhanga kwitibwa." 
Numbers35:18 Era ole bw'agema ekiisi eky'omuti ekisobola okwita omuntu, n'akikubisa omuntu era omuntu oyo n'amala n'afa, oyo amukubye aba mutemo, era omutemo oyo aidhanga kwitibwa." 
Numbers35:19 Ali n'oluganda ku muntu oyo ye baise, n'aidhanga okwita omutemo oyo. Kasita anaamwagaananga ng'amwita." 
Numbers35:20 Ole bw'akyagha omuntu n'amufumita ekintu, oba n'amweteega n'amukonhoogerera ekintu n'amwita," 
Numbers35:21 oba n'amukuba ebifunsi n'afa, oyo amukubye aba mutemo era aidhanga kwitibwa. Ali n'oluganda ku muntu oyo ye baise, aidhanga kwita omutemo oyo kasita anaamwagaananga." 
Numbers35:22 “Aye kisoboka okuba nga ole yafumita omuntu mu kwanguyiriza ng'amuziraku nzigu yoonayoona, oba kyaba nga yamukonhoogerera ekintu nga tasoose kumweteega," 
Numbers35:23 oba kyaba nga yamukuba eibaale erighanga okwita omuntu, aye nga tamanhienga ng'ali agho, kale omuntu oyo yaafa, ate nga tabangaku muzigu we, era nga tiyagenderera kumukola kabi." 
Numbers35:24 Agho abantu abeesoloiza baidha kusalangagho omusango ghagati gh'eyaita n'owoluganda ku mufu ayenda okwesasuuza, nga bajiira ku mateeka ago." 
Numbers35:25 Era abantu abeesoloiza baidha kuwonianga oyo eyaita omuntu nga tagendereire, bamutoole mu ngalo dh'ole ali n'oluganda ku mufu ayenda okwesasuuza, bamwizeeyo mu kibuga omuntu mw'asobola kulumukira kye yali alumukiiremu. Olwo abenga eyo okutuusa Omukulu wa Bakabona aliku lw'anaafanga." 
Numbers35:26 Aye ole eyaita omuntu nga tagendereire bw'anaatuumanga ensalosalo ey'ekibuga eky'okulumukiramu kye yali alumukiiremu," 
Numbers35:27 memale ali n'oluganda ku mufu ayenda okwesasuuza n'amwagaana kuliya okw'ekibuga ekyo era n'amwita, olwo ali n'oluganda ku mufu oyo taabengaku musango gwa butemo." 
Numbers35:28 Oyo taabengaku musango, kuba ole eyaita omuntu ali n'okusigalira irala mu kibuga ekyo eky'okulumukiramu okutuusa Omukulu wa Bakabona lw'afa, memale yaikirizibwa okwirayo ku butaka bwe." 
Numbers35:29 Ago n'agaidha okubanga amateeka ge munaakuumanga, imwe n'abalibairirira boonaboona, buli ghe munaabanga." 
Numbers35:30 “Ole bw'anaitanga omuntu, aidha kwitibwanga nga ghamaze kubaagho obudhulizi obumulumiriza obuswika obw'omuntu omulala. Aye omudhulizi amulumiriza bw'anaabanga omulala ati yenka, omuntu oyo taitibwenga." 
Numbers35:31 Mutaikirizanga mutemo kusasula kintu kyonakyona, olw'okununula obulamu bwe nga bamusaliire ogw'okufa. Aye mumwitenga bwite." 
Numbers35:32 Era oyo eyalumukira mu kibuga eky'okulumukiramu, mutamwikirizanga kusasula kintu kyonakyona ng'ayenda okwirayo ku butaka bwe, ng'ate Omukulu wa Bakabona akaali kufa." 
Numbers35:33 Kale ni mutayonoonanga nsi ye mubaamu, kuba obutemo bwonoona ensi. Era ezira ky'oghanga kukola okufunisa ensi ekisonigho olw'obutemo obwo obugikoleirwamu, okutoolaku okwita oyo eyatemula." 
Numbers35:34 Mutayonoonanga nsi ye mubaamu, ensi nze Musengwa Katonda mwemba kuba nze Musengwa Katonda mba mu bantu bange Abaisiraeli.”" 
Numbers36:1 Agho abakulu ab'enda edhisimuka mu kika kya Gileadi mutabane wa Makiri era mwidhukulu wa Manasse, nga Manasse oyo yali mutabane wa Yosefu, baaja ye Musa ni y'abakulembeze abandi mu Isiraeli." 
Numbers36:2 Baakoba bati: “Baisebo, Musengwa Katonda yakulagira okugha Abaisiraeli obutaka bwaibwe obw'ensikirano ng'okozesa obululu. Era Musengwa Katonda yaakulagira otoole obutaka obw'ensikirano obwa muganda waife Zelofehadi, obughe baghala be." 
Numbers36:3 Aye abaghala abo bwe balibayira mu bika ebindi ebya Isiraeli, olwo obutaka bwaibwe obwo buja kuva ku nsikirano ya badhaadha baife, buje bwongerwe ku butaka obw'ebika ebyo bye baliba nga babayiiremu." 
Numbers36:4 Era omwaka omutukuvu ogw'Abaisiraeli ni bwe gulituuka ghazira kija kukyukamu. Obutaka bwaibwe buja kuva ku nsikirano ya badhaadha baife, bwongerwe ku butaka obw'ebika ebyo bye baliba nga babayiiremu.”" 
Numbers36:5 Agho Musa yaagha Abaisiraeli ekiragiro kino ekyava ye Musengwa Katonda, ati: “Ab'ekika kya mutabane wa Yosefu, kye bali kukoba kituufu." 
Numbers36:6 Kale ni kino Musengwa Katonda ky'alagiire ku baghala ba Zelofehadi abo, ati, ‘Bali n'eidembe okubayira omuntu yeenayeena ye baba nga basiimye. Aye omuntu oyo ateekwa kuba nga wa ku nda edhiri mu kika kya Zelofehadi, ise w'abaghala abo.’" 
Numbers36:7 Obutaka obw'ensikirano obw'Abaisiraeli tibwidha kukyusibwanga kuva mu kika kino kwira mu kindi. Buli Muisiraeli aidha kukuumanga obutaka obw'ensikirano obw'ekika kya badhaadha be. 
Numbers36:8 Era buli mughala yeenayeena anaafunanga obutaka obw'ensikirano mu kika kyonakyona eky'Abaisiraeli, aidha kubayiranga muntu wa ku nda edhiri mu kika kya ise. Olwo buli Muisiraeli asobolenga okuba n'obutaka obw'ensikirano obwa badhaadha be." 
Numbers36:9 Agho ni, ezira butaka bwa nsikirano bunaakyusibwanga kuva mu kika kire kwira mu kindi. Buli kika eky'Abaisiraeli kiidha kukuumanga obutaka bwakyo obw'ensikirano.”" 
Numbers36:10 Kale baghala ba Zelofehadi baakola nga Musengwa Katonda bweyalagira Musa. 
Numbers36:11 Mahala, Tiruza, Hogula, Milika, ni Noa, abo nga ni baghala ba Zelofehadi, baabayira batabane ba baganda baiseibwe." 
Numbers36:12 Baabayira ku nda dha batabane ba Manasse, mutabane wa Yosefu. Era obutaka bwaibwe obw'ensikirano bwasigala mu kika eky'enda ya iseibwe." 
Numbers36:13 Ago n'amateeka n'ebiragiro Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira Musa okukobera Abaisiraeli nga bali e Yeriko okumpi n'omwiga Yorudani mu kiketezo ky'e Moabu eky'oku museetwe. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Bino n'ebibono Musa bye yakoba Abaisiraeli boonaboona, nga bali mu irungu, ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba olw'omwiga Yorudani. Baali mu kiiko kyagwo okumpi n'ekifo ekyetebwa Sufu, ghagati gh'ekibuga Parani nga kiri ku luuyi olundi, n'ebibuga Tofeli, Labani, Hazerothi ni Dizahabu, nga biri ku luuyi olundi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Omuntu kimutwalira enaku ikumi na lulala okutambula n'ebigere, okuva ku lusozi Sinai ng'ali kubitira mu nsi Edomu, okutuuka e Kadeshi Barinea." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogweikumi n'omulala, mu mwaka ogwamakumi ana (40) ng'Abaisiraeli baviire mu Misiri, Musa yaakobera Abaisiraeli byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yamulagira okubakobera." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Ebyo byabaagho ng'amaze okughangula kyabazinga Sihoni ow'Abamori eyafugiranga mu Heshiboni, ni kyabazinga Ogi ow'e Bashani eyafugiranga mu Ashitarothi ni mu Edurei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Mu nsi Moabu, ere ng'omaze okusomoka omwiga Yorudani, Musa ye yatoolerera okwinhonhola amateeka ga Katonda, ng'akoba ati:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Bwe twali ku lusozi Sinai, Musengwa Katonda waife yatukoba ati, ‘Ekiseera kye mumaze ku lusozi luno kimala." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Mpegaano mukole muje, mweyongere mu lugendo lwaimwe. Muje mu biketezo eby'oku nsozi eby'Abamori, ni mu biketezo byonabyona ebibiriiraine: mu kiiko kya Yorudani, ni mu biiko ebindi, ni mu nsozi, ni mu biketezo ebikalukalu eby'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, n'eby'oku Nhandha Eyaghagati. Muje mu nsi y'Abakanaani, ni mu nsozi edh'e Lebanoni, okutuukira irala ku mwiga omukologho Eufurate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Eyo n'ensi nze Musengwa Katonda ye nasuubiza okugha badhaadha baimwe Aburahamu, ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo, ni baidhukulu baibwe. Yiiyo ngibooleike, muje mugitwale.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Musa yaakoba abantu ati: “Bwe twali nga tukaali ku lusozi Sinai, nabakoba nti, ‘Tighanga kubakulembera zenka." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Musengwa Katonda waimwe abafiire bangi, era mpegaano muli bangi ng'oti n'emuunienie edh'oku igulu." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Neeghemba Musengwa Katonda oyo Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe, ayongere okubafuula abangi emikuzi lukumi (1,000) okusinga bwe muli buti, era abaghe enkabi nga bweyabasuubiza." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Aye nze zenka nsobola ntya okwetwika obuvunaanizibwa obwaga agho, obw'okubalabirira n'okubagondhoola mu nsonga dhaimwe?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Mulonde okuva mu buli kika, abantu abagezi, abategeevu era abali n'obumanhirivu, nze mbateegho babe bakulembeze baimwe.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Mwandhiramu muti, ‘Kikalamu tukole nga bw'okobye.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Kale naatoola abakulembeze abagezi era abali n'obumanhirivu mu buli kika, naabataagho okuba abakulu baimwe. Abandi baakulira abantu olukumi olukumi, n'abandi ebikumi ebikumi, n'abandi amakumi ataanu ataanu, n'abandi eikumi eikumi. Naataagho n'abakulembeze abandi mu bika byaimwe." 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Era mu kiseera ekyo nga tukaali ku Lusozi Sinai, naasikirira abalamuzi baimwe nti, ‘Muwulirisenga ensonga era musalenga mu butuufu emisango ka gibe ghagati gha ab'eighanga lyaimwe beene na beene, oba ghagati gha ab'eighanga lyaimwe n'abasenze." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Mutasalirizanga mu nsala yaimwe, muwulirisenga ensonga edh'abaavu n'edh'abakombe mu nsambo n'endala. Mutabangaku muntu yeenayeena ye mutiisa maiso, kuba emisango mugisala mu buyinza bwa Katonda. Era ensonga enaabanga ebalemye, mugireetenga ye ndi ngiwulire.’”" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Era mu kiseera kyene ekyo nga tukaali ku lusozi Sinai, nabalagira byonabyona bye mugwaine okukola." 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Twakola nga Musengwa Katonda waife bweyatulagira, twava ku lusozi Sinai. Twatambula okubita mu irungu eryo lyonalyona einene era eritiisa lye mwabona, nga tugemye engira eja mu nsi y'ensozi ey'Abamori, twatuuka e Kadeshi Barinea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Naabakoba nti, ‘Mutuuse mu nsi ey'ensozi ey'Abamori, Musengwa Katonda waife y'ali kutugha." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Eyo n'ensi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'abooleike. Muje mugitwale nga Musengwa Katonda oyo, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe bw'abakobye, aghazira kutyamu naire.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Aye mwenamwena mwaidha ye ndi mwankoba muti, ‘Tusooke tutumeyo abantu batukeetere ensi eyo, baire batukobere engira ye tunaabitamu, era n'ebibuga bye tunaayagaanayo bwe biri.’”" 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Naabona ng'ekyo kirungi. Naalonda mu imwe abasaadha ikumi na babiri, mulala mulala okuva mu buli kika." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Baaja mu nsi ey'ensozi, baatuuka ku kiiko kya Eshikoli, baakikeeta." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Baanoga ku bibala byayo, baabireeta ye tuli. Baatukobera bati, ‘Ensi Musengwa Katonda waife y'ali kutugha, ngimu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Aye imwe mwadheemera ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mwaloba okwingira mu nsi eyo." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Mwemuluguunhiza mu weema dhaimwe nga mukoba muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda yatukyagha, kyeyava n'atutoola e Misiri okutughaayo mu ngalo dh'Abamori, olwo atuzikirize." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Kifo ki kye tuli kujaamu ekyo? Banaife be twatumye yo, batumazeemu amaani nga bakoba bati abantu abaliyo bakologho era baleeyiriri okutusinga. Ebibuga byayo bikologho era byezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu ebituuka ku igulu. Era bati baabonayo n'abantu Abanaki!’”" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Aye nze naabakoba nti, ‘Mutatya era abantu abo batabamalamu maani." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Musengwa Katonda waimwe abakulemberamu, n'aidha okubalwaniragho, nga bwe mwabona byonabyona bye yakolera e Misiri" 
Deuteronomy1:31 ni mu irungu. Mu lugendo lwonalwona lwe mwatambula nga muli eyo mu irungu okutuusa lwe mwatuuka mu kifo kino, mwabona Musengwa Katonda waimwe nga bweyababbeeda, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'abbeeda omwana we.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Aye waire nga nabakobera ebyo byonabyona, timwaikiriza kwesiga Musengwa Katonda waimwe," 
Deuteronomy1:33 eyabakulemberangamu okubaagalira ekifo eky'okusimbamu weema dhaimwe. Obwire ng'aba mu muliro oguli ng'oti mpango, ate omusana yaaba mu kire ekiri ng'oti mpango, okubooleka engira ye munaabitamu.”" 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Agho Musengwa Katonda yaawulira okwemuluguunhia kwaimwe yaasungughala. Era yaalayira ng'akoba ati," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Ghazira muntu waire omulala ku b'oluse luno olubi alibona ku nsi engimu ye nasuubiza okugha badhaadha baimwe," 
Deuteronomy1:36 okutoolaku Kalebu mutabane wa Yefunne. Oyo n'aligingiramu. Era mwene n'abaana be, ndibagha ensi ye yalambuula. Kuba yasigala nga mwesigwa ye ndi mu byonabyona.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Era ku lwaimwe, zeena Musengwa Katonda yansungughalira, yankoba ati, ‘N'iwe Musa, weena tolingira mu nsi eyo," 
Deuteronomy1:38 aye omubeezi wo Yoshua, mutabane wa Nuni n'aligingiramu. Kale gumya Yoshua oyo omwoyo, kuba n'alituusa Abaisiraeli mu nsi eyo ni bagitwala ng'obutaka bwaibwe’." 
Deuteronomy1:39 “Agho Musengwa Katonda yaatukoba twenatwena ati, ‘Abaana baimwe, abakaali na kwawulagho kirungi na kibi, be mwakoba muti baidha kunhagibwa abazigu, n'abalingira mu nsi eyo. Abo be ndigigha yaaba yaibwe." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Aye imwe mukyuke mutambule nga mwira mu irungu, nga mugemye engira eja ku Nhandha Emyufu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Mwandhiramu muti, ‘Twakola ekibi, twasungughaza Musengwa Katonda. Aye mpegaano ka tuje, tulwane nga Musengwa Katonda waife bweyatulagira.’ Olwo buli muntu yaagema eby'okulwanisa bye, nga mudhuuba muti kiidha kuba kyangu okulumba ensi ey'ensozi." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Aye Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Bakobe batageza kuja kulwana kuba nze tiidha kuba ghalala nabo. Abazigu baibwe baidha kubaghangula?’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Nze naabakobera Musengwa Katonda bye yakoba, aye mwaloba kumpulirisa, mwadheemera ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda. Era mwekuluntaza, mwaja mu nsi ey'ensozi." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Agho Abamori abaali mu nsi eyo ey'ensozi, baavaayo okubalumba nga bali ng'oti muzinga gwa ndhuki: Baababinga okutuukira irala e Horuma, era baabaghangulira eyo mu nsi ey'ensozi Edomu." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Olwo mwaira, mwalirira Musengwa Katonda ababeere. Aye Musengwa Katonda yaaloba okubawulirisa, waire okubataaku omwoyo." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Kale mwasigala eyo e Kadeshi okumala entangama ndeeyi.” 
Deuteronomy2:1 Musa yakobera Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe twava agho, twakyuka. Twatambula nga twira mu irungu nga twolekeire Enhandha Emyufu, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyandagira. Twamala entangama ndeeyi nga tutambulatambula eyo tutyo mu nsi ey'ensozi Edomu." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Mutambwiretambwire eyo mutyo mu nsi eno okumala ekiseera ekimala. Mpegaano mukyuke, muje ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba.’" 
Deuteronomy2:4 Era yankoba ati, ‘Lagira abantu oti muli kumpi kubita mu nsi ey'ensozi ey'aboluganda lwaimwe baidhukulu ba Esau, ababa mu Edomu. Baidha kubatya. Aye mwegendereze inho," 
Deuteronomy2:5 mutabatanulaku lutalo. Imwe tiidha kubaghaaku ku itaka lyaibwe naire waire akatundu akaniinibwaku obuniinibwe ekigere. Kuba Edomu nagigha Esau ebe yiye. 
Deuteronomy2:6 Munaabagulangaku bugule emere ey'okulya, n'amaadhi ag'okunhwa.’" 
Deuteronomy2:7 “Musengwa Katonda waimwe yabagha enkabi, ebintu byonabyona byabajiira bukalamu. Yaabalabirira nga muli kubita mu irungu lino einene. Emyaka gino amakumi ana yaaba ghalala n'imwe, nga muzira kye mudhulirira." 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Agho twabita ku boluganda lwaife, baidhukulu ba Esau, ababa mu Edomu. Twagema engira eja mu irungu, okuva ku kibuga Elathi ni Ezioni Geberi. Twakyuka, twabita mu ngira ey'omu irungu ly'e Moabu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Mutadaazadaaza bantu ab'e Moabu, baidhukulu ba Loti, era mutabatanulaku lutalo. Imwe tiidha kubaghaaku kitundu waire ekitono kiti ku nsi yaibwe, okuba ekyaimwe. Ekibuga Ari nakigha ira Abamoabu abo kibe kyaibwe.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 Mu biseera eby'eira, mu Ari mwabangamu abantu Abaemi. Bano baali eighanga eikologho era ery'amaani, nga bawaigufu ng'oti Banaki." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Era boona baayetebwanga Barefa ng'Abanaki, aye nga Abamoabu babeeta Baemi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Abahori boona baabanga mu Edomu mu kusooka. Aye baidhukulu ba Esau, Abaedomu, bwe baidha, baababingamu, baazikiriza eighanga lyaibwe, era baasenga mu kifo kyaibwe. Baakola ekyo ng'oti n'Abaisiraeli bwe baamala ni bakola, bwe baabinga abazigu baibwe mu nsi Musengwa Katonda ye yagha Abaisiraeli abo okuba obutaka bwaibwe." 
Deuteronomy2:13 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Agho Musengwa Katonda mu biseera ebyo yaatukoba ati, ‘Mpegaano ni, musituke musomoke akaiga Zeredi.’ Twasomoka akaiga ako Zeredi, nga Musengwa Katonda oyo bweyatukoba." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Okuva lwe twava e Kadeshi Barinea, okutuusa lwe twasomoka akaiga Zeredi, gyali gigheze emyaka amakumi asatu na munaana. Abasaadha abalwani ab'oluse olwo boonaboona baali nga bamaze okuwaagho okufa, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyeesoomera okubamalagho." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Kuba bwenebwene yabalwanisa okutuusa lwe yabazikiriza n'abamaliragho irala. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Agho abalwani abo boonaboona bwe baamala okufa ni bawaagho," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Olwaleero muja kusala ensalosalo ey'ekiketezo ky'e Moabu, nga mubitira mu kibuga Ari." 
Deuteronomy2:19 Bwe munaaba nga muli kumpi okutuuka mu nsi ey'Abammoni, mutabadaazadaaza era mutabatanulaku lutalo. Kuba imwe tija kubaghaaku kitundu waire ekitono kiti ku nsi yaibwe, okuba ekyaimwe. Ensi eyo namala ira okugigha Abammoni abo baidhukulu ba Loti, ebe yaibwe.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Ensi eyo era eyetebwa ya Barefa. Abarefa abo n'abaagibangamu eira. Aye Abammoni nga beeta Abarefa abo bati, Bazamuzumu." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Baali eighanga eikologho ery'abantu kamaala abawaigufu ng'oti Banaki. Aye Musengwa Katonda yaabazikiriza. Olwo Abammoni baababingamu, beene baasenga mu kifo kyaibwe." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Musengwa Katonda era atyo bweyakolera Abaedomu, baidhukulu ba Esau, ababa mu nsi ey'ensozi Edomu. Yazikiriza Abahori, olwo baidhukulu ba Esau baabingamu Abahori abo, beene baasenga mu kifo kyaibwe n'okutuusa mpegaano." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Ate ebiketezo ebiiririra okutuukira irala e Gaza, byabangamu Abavvi. Aye Abafilisiti abaava e Filisitia, baabazikiriza, beene baasenga mu kifo kyaibwe." 
Deuteronomy2:24 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe twamala okubita mu Moabu, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Musituke, mweyongereyo mu lugendo lwaimwe, mubite mu kiiko Arunoni. Kyabazinga w'e Heshiboni, ayetebwa Sihoni Omuamori, mmubataire mu ngalo. Mumutanuleku olutalo mutwale ensi ye, ebe yaimwe." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Okuva n'olwaleero, nja kukuba amaghanga goonagoona agali ku nsi entiisa, gabatye. Kiisi anaawuliranga ku liina lyaimwe, aidha kudhugumiranga olw'okutya.’”" 
Deuteronomy2:26 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Nga tuli mu irungu ery'e Kedemothi, nagheereza kyabazinga w'e Heshiboni ayetebwa Sihoni, obukwenda obw'emiraala, nga nkoba nti," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Tuleke tubiteku mu nsi yo. Twidha kubita bwa mu ngira mwonka aghazira kugonhokaku naire. 
Deuteronomy2:28 Twidha kugulanga bugule emere ye tunaalya n'amaadhi ge tunaanhwa. Kye tukusaba n'okutuganha tubiteku mu nsi yo," 
Deuteronomy2:29 okutuusa lwe tunaasomoka omwiga Yorudani, ni twingira mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waife y'ali kutugha. Tukusaba otuganhe ng'oti ni baidhukulu ba Esau ababa mu Edomu, n'Abamoabu ababa mu Ari, bwe baatuganha okubita mu nsi yaibwe.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Aye kyabazinga w'e Heshiboni, ayetebwa Sihoni, yaaloba kutuganha kubita mu nsi ye, kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe yamukalangusa omwoyo. Yaamuleetera okudheema, olwo tughange okumughangula, n'okutwala ensi ye, mwe tukaali ni mpegaano." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: ‘Bona, Sihoni wuuyo mmubataire mu ngalo ghalala n'ensi ye. Kale ni mutwale ensi ye ebe yaimwe.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Olwo Sihoni yaidha n'abantu be boonaboona okutulwanisa mu lutalo e Yahazi. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Era Musengwa Katonda waife yaamutugha, twamughangula ni batabane, n'abantu be boonaboona." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Mu biseera ebyo twanhaga ebyali ebibuga bye byonabyona, twabizikiriza n'abantu boonaboona, abasaadha, n'abakazi, n'abaana abato, aghazira kulekagho waire omulala ati." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Ebyayo byonka bye twatwalaku nga n'omunhago, aghalala n'ebintu bye twanhaga mu bibuga." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Okuva ku Aroeri ekiri ku mugo ogw'ekiiko Arunoni, n'ekibuga ekiri mu kiiko ekyo mwene, okutuukira irala e Gileadi, ghazira kibuga kyatulema lwa bugulumivu bwa bimante bigumu ebikyezungulwire. Byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waife yabitugha twabinhaga." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Aye titwaseeta ku nsi y'Abammoni, waire ku kiketezo kyaibwe ekiri ku mbali kw'omwiga Yabboki, n'ebibuga eby'omu nsi ey'ensozi, n'ebifo ebindi byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waife ye yatulobera okuja.”" 
Deuteronomy3:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Ebyo bwe byawa, twakyuka, twagema engira eja e Bashani. Kyabazinga w'e Bashani, ayetebwa Ogi, yaidha n'abantu be boonaboona okutulwanisa mu lutalo mu Edurei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Aye Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Otamutya, kuba ndidha kumughaayo omughangule n'abantu be boonaboona, era onhage n'ensi ye yoonayoona. Oidha kumukola kye wakola kyabazinga w'Abamori, Sihoni, eyabanga mu Heshiboni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Agho Musengwa Katonda waife yaatugha ni kyabazinga w'e Bashani oyo Ogi. Twamughangula era twamuzikiriza n'abantu be boonaboona, aghazira kulekayo waire omulala ati." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Twanhaga ebyali ebibuga bye byonabyona mu biseera ebyo. Ghazira kibuga waire ekirala kye tutaanhaga. Byonabyona aghalala byali ebibuga nkaaga. Ebibuga ebyo n'ebyali eby'omu kiketezo kyonakyona eky'e Arugobu, era n'ebyali obwakyabazinga bwa Ogi oyo mu Bashani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Ebibuga ebyo byonabyona byali byezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu ebigulumivu, era nga biriku endhigi edhiriku ebisiba eby'ekyuma munda. Ghaabaagho n'ebyalo kamaala ebitaaliku bimante bibyezungulwire, bye twanhaga." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Twazikiriza ebibuga byonabyona n'abantu boonaboona, abasaadha, n'abakazi, n'abaana abato, nga bwe twakola mu bibuga ebyali ebya kyabazinga w'e Heshiboni, Sihoni." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Aye twatwala ebyayo byonabyona ng'omunhago, aghalala n'ebintu bye twanhaga mu bibuga." 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Kale ni, mu biseera ebyo, twanhaga ensi dha bakyabazinga abo bombi Abamori abaabanga ere ng'osomoike Yorudani, okuva ku kiiko Arunoni okutuuka ku lusozi Herimoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 Abasidoni nga beeta olusozi Herimoni olwo Sirioni, ate Abamori baalweta Seniri." 
Deuteronomy3:10 Twanhaga ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'obwakyabazinga bwa Ogi ow'e Bashani: ebibuga byonabyona eby'oku museetwe, n'ebiketezo byonabyona ebya Gileadi n'ebya Bashani, okutuukira irala e Saleka n'Edurei.”" 
Deuteronomy3:11 Kyabazinga ow'e Bashani oyo, Ogi, n'eyali akaasigairegho ku lulyo olw'Abarefa. Obuliri bwe nga bwa kyuma ekigumu einho. Bwali bugheza mita ina mu buleeyi, n'emita kumpi ibiri mu bugazi, ng'ojiira ku bipimo ebitongole abantu bye baapimisanga. Obuliri obwo bukaaliyo mu Rabba, ekibuga ky'Abamori." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe twanhaga ensi eno mu biseera ebyo, nagabira Abareubeni n'Abagadi ekiketezo ekiva ku Aroeri, ekiri ku mugo gw'ekiiko Arunoni, n'ekitundu eky'ekiketezo eky'ensi ey'ensozi edhiri e Gileadi, n'ebibuga byamu." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Ekitundu eky'ekiketezo eky'e Gileadi ekyasigalagho, n'ekiketezo eky'e Bashani kyonakyona obwali obwakyabazinga Ogi bwe yafuganga, ekyo nga n'ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'e Arigobu, nabigabira ekitundu eky'ekika kya Manasse.” Bashani yoonayoona yali eyetebwa nsi ya Barefa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yairi ow'omu kika kya Manasse yatwala ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'e Arigobu ekyo nga ni Bashani. Ekiketezo ekyo nga kituukira irala ku nsalosalo ey'Abageshuri n'Abamaaka. Ebyalo ebyo byonabyona yaabituuma eriina lye, era bimanhiibwa ng'ebyalo bya Yairi n'okutuusa mpegaano." 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Ekiketezo eky'e Gileadi nakigabira ab'ekika kya Makiri mutabane wa Manasse. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Ate Abareubeni n'Abagadi, naabagabira ekiketezo okuva ku Gileadi okutuuka ku kiiko Arunoni, nga ghagati gh'ekiiko ekyo, n'aghali ensalosalo ku luuyi lw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Ate omwiga Yabboki nga n'ensalosalo n'Abammoni, ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Mu bugwandhuba, ng'ekiketezo eky'ebika ebyo ebisatu kituuka ku mwiga Yorudani, okuva ku nhandha y'e Galilaaya ku luuyi lw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Olwo kyaserengeta ku Nhandha Eyomuunhu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, n'okutuuka ghansi gh'olusozi Pisiga mu buvandhuba." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Agho naabalagira mu biseera ebyo nti, ‘Musengwa Katonda waimwe abaghaire ensi eno ebe yaimwe. Kale ni abalwani baimwe nga bagemye eby'okulwanisa baidha kwesookayo baganda baibwe Abaisiraeli." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Aye bakazi baimwe, n'abaana baimwe abato, n'ebyayo byaimwe (ndidhi nga muli n'ebyayo kamaala), biidha kusigala mu bibuga byaimwe, bye nabagabira." 
Deuteronomy3:20 Mubeereku baganda baimwe abo, okutuusa lwe balitwala ekiketezo kyaibwe, Musengwa Katonda ky'ali kubagha e bugwandhuba gh'omwiga Yorudani, era okutuusa boona Musengwa Katonda lw'alibagha okutyama ni batereera ng'oti niimwe. Memale mwaira, kiisi muntu ku butaka bwe, bwe namugha.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Naalagira Yoshua mu biseera ebyo nti, ‘Weeboneireku n'agago ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waimwe by'akoze ku bakyabazinga abo ababiri, Sihoni ni Ogi. Atyo ni, bw'aja okukola ku buli bwakyabazinga bwe munaajanga okulumba." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Mutabatyanga naire, kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe, n'aidhanga okubalwaniragho.’”" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Mu biseera ebyo naasaba Musengwa Katonda nti: 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, nze ndidhi nga waakatoolera butoolere okundholeka ebikologho n'ebyewuninkiriza by'oja okukola. Ezira katonda mu igulu oba mu nsi asobola okukola eby'amaani by'okoze." 
Deuteronomy3:25 Nkweghemba, onganhe nsomoke omwiga Yorudani, mbone ensi ey'ensozi eri eyo enungi, era mbone n'ekiketezo ky'e Lebanoni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Aye Musengwa Katonda yansungughalira ku lwaimwe, yaaloba kumpulirisa. Yankoba ati, ‘Lekera agho. Otairayo kwogera ninze ku kintu ekyo." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Ja, oniine ghaigulu ku lusozi Pisiga, olinge e buvandhuba n'e bugwandhuba, era olinge ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ni ku lw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba ensi eyo ogyekalirise bukalamu. Kuba toja kusomoka mwiga Yorudani guno." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Aye sikirira Yoshua abe mumalirivu era omugumye, kuba n'alikulemberamu abantu bano basomoke, okuja okutwala ensi eyo y'oja okulengera.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Kale twasigala mu kiiko ekiringiriire ekibuga Bethi Peori.” 
Deuteronomy4:1 Musa yaayongera okukoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Agho ni muwulirenga amateeka n'ebiragiro bye ndi kubeegeresa mubituukirizenga, olwo mughange okuba abalamu, mwingire mu nsi Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe y'ali kubagha, era mugitwale." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Mutayongeranga kintu kyonakyona ku bye ndi kubalagira, waire okubikendeezaaku. Mugemenga ebiragiro bya Musengwa Katonda waimwe bye ndi kubagha." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Imwe beene mweboneraku n'agaimwe, Musengwa Katonda waimwe bye yakolera e Peori, ebigema ku Baali. Nga bweyazikiriza mu imwe abo boonaboona abaali basinza Baali oyo." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Aye imwe abaagumira ku Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mukaali balamu ni leero." 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Nze mbeegereisa amateeka n'ebiragiro nga Musengwa Katonda wange bweyandagira. Mubigemenga, nga muli mu nsi ye muja okwingiramu okutwala." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Mubikuumenga era mubituukirizenga, kuba ekyo n'ekinaayolekanga abantu abamaghanga agandi nga bwe muli n'amagezi n'okutegeera. Bwe banaawuliranga amateeka ago goonagoona, baidha kukobanga bati, ‘Bwenebwene eighanga lino eikologho, lya bantu bagezi era abategeevu!’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 “Agho Musa yaayongera okukoba ati: ‘Ezirayo ighanga lindi, ni bweriba eikologho litya, liri na katonda aliri okumpi einho, ng'oti ni Musengwa Katonda waife bw'atuba okumpi nga tumusabye okutubeera." 
Deuteronomy4:8 Era ezirayo ighanga lindi, ni bweriba eikologho litya, liri na mateeka ga butuufu ng'oti n'amateeka gano goonagoona ge ndi kubateeragho olwaleero." 
Deuteronomy4:9 “Aye mwegenderezenga era mwekuumenga, mulobe kwerabiranga mu bulamu bwaimwe bwonabwona, ebyo imwe beene bye mweboneraku n'agaimwe. Mukoberenga abaana n'abaidhukulu" 
Deuteronomy4:10 olunaku lwe mwayemerera mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe ku lusozi Sinai. Ku olwo Musengwa Katonda lwe yankoba ati, ‘Nsololeza abantu baidhe. Nhenda bawulire bye nja okubakoba, beege okuntyanga n'okumpuliranga enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwaibwe, era beegerese n'abaana baibwe okukolanga batyo boona.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Mukoberenga abaana baimwe nga bwe mwaseeta ni mwemerera ghansi gh'olusozi olwali lughembeibwa ebire ebigemu eby'omwosi omwirugavu, ni lwaka omuliro ni gweruupiika okutuuka ni ku igulu." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Mubakoberenga nga Musengwa Katonda bweyayogera n'imwe ng'ali mu muliro, ni muwulira amamiro obumiro gonka ng'ali kwogera, aye ni mutamubona nga bw'afaanana naire." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Yaabakobera endagaano ye, ye yabalagira okutuukiriza, ago nga n'amateeka eikumi. Era yaagaghandiika ku bibaadho bibiri eby'amabaale." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Musengwa Katonda yandagira mu biseera ebyo okubeegeresa amateeka n'ebiragiro, mubituukirizenga mu nsi ye muja okwingiramu okutwala.”" 
Deuteronomy4:15 Musa yaayongera okukoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Ku lunaku Musengwa Katonda lwe yayogera n'imwe ng'ali mu muliro ku lusozi Sinai, timwamubona nga bw'afaanana naire. Kale ni mwegendereze inho," 
Deuteronomy4:16 mwekuume mulobe kwonoona nga mwekolera ekisinzibwa ekitali Katonda eky'ensambo yoonayoona, ekifaanana ng'oti musaadha oba mukazi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 oba ensolo yoonayoona ey'oku nsi, oba enhonhi ey'amaghagha eguluka," 
Deuteronomy4:18 oba ekintu kyonakyona ekyekululira ku itaka, oba ekyenhandha ekiba ghansi mu maadhi." 
Deuteronomy4:19 “Mulobenga kusendebwasendebwa kusinza na kugheereza ebyo bye mubona ku igulu: endhuba, omwezi, n'emuunienie. Ebyo Musengwa Katonda waimwe yabitaagho abantu abandi boonaboona abali ku nsi n'ababe babisinzenga." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Aye imwe yabagemaku, yaabatoola e Misiri ye mwabanga ng'oti n'abali mu muliro ogw'amaani ogusaanuusa ekyuma ekigumu einho. Yaabafuulira irala abantu be nga bwe muli mpegaano." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Era Musengwa Katonda yansungughalira ku lwaimwe, yeefuugha nga bwe ntaja kusomoka mwiga Yorudani, era nga bwe ntaja kwingira mu nsi eyo engimu, Musengwa Katonda oyo Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha okuba obutaka bwaimwe."
