Deuteronomy4:22 Nze nja kufiira mu nsi eno. Tiidha kusomoka mwiga Yorudani. Aye imwe mwidha kusomoka, muje mutwale ensi eyo engimu." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Mwekuume, mulobenga kwerabira ndagaano Musengwa Katonda waimwe ye yakola n'imwe. Muteekoleranga kisinzibwa kitali Katonda eky'ensambo yoonayoona kye yabalobera" 
Deuteronomy4:24 kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe ali ng'oti muliro oguzikiriza buli kiri mu ngira yaagwo, era enkikidi emugema ku lw'abantu be." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Ni bwe muliba nga mumaze entangama endeeyi mu nsi eyo, nga muzaire abaana era nga muli n'abaidhukulu, mutagezangaku kwonoona nga mwekolera ekisinzibwa ekitali Katonda eky'ensambo yoonayoona. Ekyo kibi mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, era kirimusungughaza." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Ndayira olwaleero eri eigulu n'ensi, babe abadhulizi bange ababalumiriza, nti bwe muligeza ni mwekolera ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, mulizikirira mangu, mwasaanagho mu nsi ye muli kumpi okwingiramu okutwala, ere nga musomoike omwiga Yorudani. Timuligibaamu ntangama ndeeyi, aye mulizikirira mwasaanagho." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Musengwa Katonda alibasansaaniza eyo mu maghanga agandi, era batono ku imwe abalisigala nga bakaali balamu." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Eyo ye mulisinziza ebintu ebitali Katonda ebyakolebwa abantu obuntu mu miti ni mu mabaale ebitabona waire okuwulira, era ebitalya waire okuwunhiza." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Aye nga muli eyo, mwidha kusabanga Musengwa Katonda waimwe. Era bwe munaamusabanga n'omutima gwaimwe gwonagwona era n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona, aidhanga kubawulira." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Bwe munaabanga nga muli mu nnaku ng'ebyo byonabyona bibaidhiire, mu biseera eby'oluvainhuma muliira eri Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mwagondera by'abakoba" 
Deuteronomy4:31 kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe wa kivunika. Talibalekulira agho waire okubazikiriza, era talyerabira ndagaano ye yakola ni badhaadha baimwe.”" 
Deuteronomy4:32 Musa yaayongera okukoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mwekebeedhe ebyaligho mu byanda eby'eira, okuviira irala einhuma ere, bukyanga Katonda atonda abantu ku nsi. Mwekebeedhe ensi yoonayoona. Ekintu ekikologho ng'oti ni kino kyali kibaireghooku, era ghaligho eyaali akiwuliireku?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Ghalighooku abantu abaawuliraku amamiro ga Katonda nga gali kwogera mu muliro, aye ni basigala nga bakaali balamu, ng'oti niimwe?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Oba ghalighooku katonda eyaali ageziizaaku okuja okutwala abantu ab'eighanga erindi, abafuule ababe ng'abatoola ghagati mu ighanga erindi, nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe bweyabakolera imwe mu Misiri? Yakozesa amaani ge agataloodheka, yaasindika ebibamba n'olutalo, yaakola ebyewuunhio n'ebyewuninkiriza, era yaaleetera ebintu ebitiisa einho okubaagho, nga mubona." 
Deuteronomy4:35 Ebyo Musengwa Katonda yabibooleka, musobole okumanha nga mwene ni Katonda yenka, ezirayo wundi." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Imwe yabaleetera okuwulira amamiro ge ng'ali mu igulu, asobole okubeegeresa okumuwuliranga. Ni ku nsi yabooleka omuliro gwe ogw'amaani, mwawulira bye yayogerera ghagati ghaagwo." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Olw'okugonza badhaadha baimwe, yalonda imwe baidhukulu baibwe, era yaakozesa obuyinza bwe obungi, mwene yaabatoola mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Era bwe mwalinga nga muli kumpi okutuuka aghantu, yajanga ng'abingagho abantu ab'amaghanga agasinga eryaimwe obukologho n'amaani. Yababinganga mu biketezo byaibwe, aingizeemu imwe era abibaghe bibe obutaka bwaimwe, nga bw'eri mpegaano." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Kale ni mukimanhe olwaleero era mukikuume mu myoyo gyaimwe muti Musengwa Katonda, ni Katonda mu igulu ni mu nsi. Ezirayo wundi." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Mukuumenga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, bye ndi kubagha olwaleero, mughange okubanga obukalamu, imwe n'abaana baimwe abaliiragho, era mughangaalire mu nsi, Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha okubanga eyaimwe enaku dhoonadhoona.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Agho Musa yaalondagho ebibuga bisatu e buvandhuba wa Yorudani," 
Deuteronomy4:42 omuntu mw'asobola okulumukira n'awona, bw'aba ng'aise omuntu y'aziraku nzigu, nga tagendereire. Omuntu oyo ng'aghanga okulumukira mu kindi ku bibuga ebyo, yaawonia obulamu bwe." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Ab'ekika kya Reubeni baafuna Bezeri eky'oku museetwe mu irungu. Ab'ekika kya Gadi baafuna Ramothi eky'omu kiketezo ky'e Gileadi. Ate ab'ekika kya Manasse baafuna Golani eky'omu kiketezo ky'e Bashani. 
Deuteronomy4:44 Gano n'amateeka ga Katonda, Musa ge yagha Abaisiraeli." 
Deuteronomy4:45 Kuno n'okulamba, n'amateeka, n'ebiragiro, Musa bye yakobera Abaisiraeli bwe baava mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy4:46 Yabibagheera mu kiiko ekiringiriire Bethi Peori, e buvandhuba wa Yorudani, mu nsi eyali eya kyabazinga Sihoni ow'Abamori, eyabanga mu Heshiboni. Musa n'Abaisiraeli baaghangula Sihoni oyo nga baviire mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Baanhaga ensi ye, n'ensi eya kyabazinga owundi ow'Abamori eyayetebwanga Ogi, era eyabanga e Bashani e buvandhuba wa Yorudani." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Ekiketezo ekyo kiva ku kibuga Aroeri, ekiri ku mbali kw'ekiiko ekirimu omwiga Arunoni, okutuuka ku lusozi Sirioni, olwo nga ni Herimoni." 
Deuteronomy4:49 Era kyatwalizaamu ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'e buvandhuba w'omwiga Yorudani, okutuuka ku Nhandha Eyomuunhu, ghansi gh'olusozi Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Agho Musa yaayeta Abaisiraeli boonaboona, yaabakoba ati: “Imwe Abaisiraeli, muwulire amateeka n'ebiragiro bye ndi kubagha olwaleero. Mubyege era mwegendereze okubituukirizanga." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Musengwa Katonda waife yakola n'ife endagaano ku lusozi Sinai. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Endagaano eyo tiyagikola na badhaadha baife bonka, aye yagikola n'ife twena abalamu, abali ghano mpegaano." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Musengwa Katonda yayogera n'imwe maiso ku maiso eyo ku lusozi, ng'ali mu muliro ghagati." 
Deuteronomy5:5 Mu biseera ebyo nze nayemerera ghagati waimwe ni Musengwa Katonda, okubakobera bye yali ali kubakoba. Kuba mwatya omuliro, mwaloba kuniina lusozi. Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘Ninze Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda waimwe eyabatoola mu Misiri, ye mwali nga mukola obwiru." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Mutasinzanga Katonda wundi okutoolaku nze. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “ ‘Muteekoleranga kibaadhe oba kiwumbe ekifaanana ekintu kyonakyona ekiri ghaigulu ku igulu, oba ghansi ku nsi, oba waire ekiri mu maadhi agali ghansi agh'ensi." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Ebintu ebyo mutabisinzanga, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe ndi wa nkikidi ku bantu bange. Abo abankyagha mbabonereza, era naabonereza n'abaana baibwe n'abaidhukulu, okutuukira irala ku luse olwokusatu n'olwokuna." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Aye ndholeka okugonza okutakoma eri abantu enkumi n'enkumi abangonza, ni bagondera ebiragiro byange." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “ ‘Mutakozesanga liina lyange nze Musengwa Katonda mu bya matamatama, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe tija kuloba kubonereza oyo yeenayeena akozesa eriina lyange obubi." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “ ‘Mukuumenga olunaku lwa Sabbato nga lwange, nga nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe bwe nabalagira." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Muli n'enaku mukaaga edh'okukolerangaku emirimo gyaimwe gyonagyona. 
Deuteronomy5:14 Aye olunaku olwomusanvu, lwa Sabbato yange nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe. Olwo mutalukolerangaku mulimo gwonagwona waire imwe beene, waire batabane baimwe, waire baghala baimwe, waire abairu baimwe abasaadha oba abakazi, waire ensolo dhaimwe, waire abasenze be musuza. Olwo abairu baimwe abasaadha n'abakazi, boona baghange okuwuumulanga ng'oti niimwe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Mwidhukirenga nga mwali bairu mu Misiri, nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe naabatoolayo, nga nkozesa amaani n'obuyinza bwange. Kyenva ni, mbalagira okukuumanga olunaku lwa Sabbato." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “ ‘Mughenga balata baimwe ni bainhaimwe ekitiibwa, nga nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe bwe mbalagira, olwo mughange okubanga obukalamu era mughangaalire mu nsi ye ndi kubagha." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “ ‘Mutatemulanga. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “ ‘Mutayendanga. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “ ‘Mutaibanga. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “ ‘Mutaghanga ku bantu budhulizi bwa bulimba. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “ ‘Muteegwanizanga baka beene. Muteegwanizanga ndhu dha bantu bandi, waire enimiro dhaibwe, waire abairu baibwe abasaadha oba abakazi, waire ente dhaibwe, oba endogoyi, oba ekintu ekindi kyonakyona eky'omuntu owundi.”" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Ago n'amateeka Musengwa Katonda ge yabagha mwenamwena nga mwesoloiza ku lusozi. Yagabagha ng'ayogera mu mamiro ag'amaani, ng'ali mu muliro ghagati mu kire ekigemye enzikiiza, era tiyayongeraku bindi. Yagaghandiika ku bibaadho bibiri eby'amabaale, yaabimpa.”" 
Deuteronomy5:23 Musa yaayongera okukoba ati: “Bwe mwawulira amamiro nga gava mu nzikiiza, olusozi nga luli kwaka omuliro, mwaseeta ghe ndi, nga muli n'abakulembeze baimwe, n'abakulu b'ebika byaimwe boonaboona." 
Deuteronomy5:24 Mwakoba muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda waife atwoleike ekitiisa kye n'obukulu bwe. Tuwuliire amamiro ge nga gaviira mu muliro ghagati. Olwaleero tuboine nga Katonda ayogera n'omuntu, aye omuntu yaasigala ng'akaali mulamu." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Aye mpegaano lwaki twereeterezaaku okufa? Omuliro guno ogw'amaani gwidha kutusaaniagho. Bwe tunairamu okuwulira amamiro ga Musengwa Katonda waife, twidha kufa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Naani mu bantu boonaboona, eyaali awuliireku amamiro ga Katonda omulamu ng'ali kwogera mu muliro ghagati, nga ife bwe tuwuliire, aye omuntu oyo n'asigala ng'akaali mulamu?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Musa, niiwe obe oje, owulire Musengwa Katonda waife by'anaakoba. Memale oire otukobere byonabyona by'anaaba akukobye. Twidha kubiwulirisa, tubituukirize.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Musengwa Katonda bweyawulira ebibono bye mwayogera ninze, yankoba ati, ‘Mpuliire ebibono abantu bano bye bakukobye. Byonabyona bye boogeire bituufu." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Kale ngoli baba n'omwoyo ng'oti n'ogwo buliidho, ni bantya era ni bakuumanga ebiragiro byange byonabyona! Olwo beene n'abaidhukulu baibwe bandibairenga bukalamu enaku dhoonadhoona." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Ja, obakobe baireyo eka." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Aye iwe oire ghano ghe ndi, nkukobere amateeka goonagoona n'ebiragiro byonabyona by'onaabeegeresa, babituukirizenga mu nsi ye ndi kubagha okuba eyaibwe.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy5:32 Musa yaayongera okukoba ati: “Mwegenderezenga nga mukola nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe bweyabalagira, aghazira kudaaliimira eno oba ere." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Mujiirenga ku ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waimwe bye yabalagira, mughange okuba obukalamu, mughangaalire mu nsi ye muja okutwala.”" 
Deuteronomy6:1 Agho Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Gano n'amateeka, n'ebiragiro, n'okulamba, Musengwa Katonda waimwe bye yandagira okubeegeresa. Mubituukirizenga mu nsi ye muli kumpi okwingiramu okutwala, ere nga musomoike omwiga Yorudani." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Imwe n'abaana baimwe era n'abaidhukulu baimwe, mutenga mu Musengwa Katonda waimwe ekitiisa enaku edh'obulamu bwaimwe dhoonadhoona. Mutuukirizenga amateeka ge goonagoona n'ebiragiro bye, bye ndi kubagha, mughange okughangaalira mu nsi eyo." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Imwe Abaisiraeli muwulire: mwegendereze okutuukirizanga ebyo, musobole okubanga obukalamu era mweyongerenga okuba abangi einho era ab'amaani, nga muli mu nsi eyo engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala, nga Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe bweyasuubiza." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Imwe Abaisiraeli muwulire: Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda oyo yenka, ni Katonda waife." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Mugonzenga Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda waimwe, n'omutima gwaimwe gwonagwona, n'amaani gaimwe goonagoona." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Muteerabirangaku waire ekirala ku biragiro bino bye ndi kubagha olwaleero. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Mubyegeresenga abaana baimwe. Era mubyogerengaku nga muli ghaka oba nga muli mu ngira mutambula, nga mulambaire oba nga musitwikegho." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Mubyesibenga ku mikono gyaimwe, era mubyetimbenga mu byeni byaimwe ng'akamanhiso." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Mubighandiikenga ku myango egy'emiryango gy'endhu dhaimwe, ni ku miryango gy'ebibuga byaimwe.”" 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe bweyasuubiza badhaadha baimwe, Aburahamu, Isaaka ni Yakobo, aidha kubagha imwe ensi erimu ebibuga ebikologho era ebirungi bye mutaazimba." 
Deuteronomy6:11 Endhu dhaamu nga dhiidhwire ebintu ebirungi bye mutaataamu, era nga mulimu n'ensulo ensime dhe mutaasima, n'amasamba ag'emizabbibu n'ag'emiti emyoliva ge mutaasimba. Aye bwe munaamalanga okulya ni mwiguta nga muli mu nsi eyo," 
Deuteronomy6:12 mwegenderezenga mulobe kwerabiranga Musengwa Katonda eyabatoola e Misiri, ye mwali nga mukola obwiru." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Mutyenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mumusinzenga, era eriina lye lyonka lye mube mulayirenga." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Mutasinzanga waire omulala ku bakatonda amaghanga agandi be gasinza. 
Deuteronomy6:15 Bwe mulisinza bakatonda abandi, obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bulibatumbukiraku ng'oti muliro bwabasaaniagho, kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe oyo aba mu imwe, enkikidi emugema ku lw'abantu be." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Mutalebanga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, nga bwe mwamuleba e Massa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Mwegenderezenga okukuuma ebiragiro n'amateeka n'okulamba, Musengwa Katonda waimwe bye yabagha." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Mukolenga ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'abona nga bituufu era nga birungi. Olwo musobole okuba obukalamu, n'okwingira okutwala ensi enungi, Musengwa Katonda ye yasuubiza badhaadha baimwe." 
Deuteronomy6:19 Abazigu baimwe boonaboona be mulyagaana mu nsi eyo, mulibabingamu nga Musengwa Katonda bweyasuubiza." 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Ye bwidha, abaana baimwe baidhanga kubabuuza imwe bati, ‘Amateeka n'ebiragiro n'okulamba, Musengwa Katonda waife bye yatuteeragho bitegeeza ki?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Olwo munaabairangamu muti, ‘Twali bairu ba kyabazinga w'e Misiri, aye Musengwa Katonda yaatutoolayo ng'akozesa amaani ge agataloodheka." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Tweboneraku beene n'amaiso gaife ebyewuunhio n'ebyewuninkiriza eby'amaani era ebitiisa, Musengwa Katonda oyo bye yakola ku Misiri, ni ku kyabazinga waayo, ni ku bakungu ba kyabazinga oyo boonaboona." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Ife yaatutoolayo yaatuleeta ghano, yaatugha ensi eno ye yasuubiza badhaadha baife." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Musengwa Katonda waife oyo yaatulagira okutuukirizanga amateeka ago goonagoona n'okumutyanga, olwo tughange okubanga obukalamu buliidho, era atukuumenga nga tuli balamu, nga bwe tuli mpegaano." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Ife kye tugwaine okukola, n'okwegendereza tutuukirizenga byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waife bye yatulagira.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kubaingiza mu nsi ye muja okutwala okuba obutaka bwaimwe. Amaghanga musanvu agasinga eryaimwe obukologho n'amaani, buti n'agaba mu nsi eyo, era ni gano: Abahitti, Abagirigashi, Abamori, Abakanaani, Abaperizzi, Abahivi, n'Abayebusi. Aye bwe munaabanga nga muli kumpi okutuukayo, Musengwa Katonda waimwe oyo aidha kugabingangamu goonagoona." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Musengwa Katonda waimwe bw'alita abantu abo mu ngalo dhaimwe ni mu baghangula, muteekwa okubasaaniagho boonaboona. Mutakolanga nabo ndagaano waire ndala eti, era mutabagemerwanga kivunika naire." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Mutafumbirwagananga nabo, nga mughaayo baghala baimwe okubayira batabane baibwe, oba okutwala baghala baibwe okubayira batabane baimwe." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Bwe mulikikola, olwo abantu abo baliba nga baghanga okukyusa abaana baimwe baabatoola ku Musengwa Katonda, baasinza bakatonda abandi. Olwo obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bulibatumbukiraku ng'oti muliro, yaabazikiriza mu kaseera buseera." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Agho ni mubabisenga muti: mumenhemenhenga alutaari dhaibwe, mutemetemenga empango dha bakatonda baibwe edh'amabaale, mwasaageyasaagenga ebifaananie ebibaadhe eby'omusambwa gwaibwe omukazi Ashera, era mwokyenga n'omuliro ebintu byaibwe bye basinza ebitali Katonda." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Kuba muli ighanga lya Musengwa Katonda waimwe. Yabalondamu okuba eighanga lye erirye ku bubwe mu maghanga goonagoona agali ku nsi. 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Musengwa Katonda yabagonza era yaabalondamu, ti lwa kuba nga mwali kamaala inho okusinga amaghanga agandi mu butuufu mwali eighanga erisingayo obutono mu maghanga goonagoona." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Aye olw'okuba Musengwa Katonda yabagonza, era yaayenda okukuuma ekisuubizo, kye yasuubiza badhaadha baimwe, kyeyava n'akozesa amaani ge agataloodheka okubanunula. Yaabatoola mu ngalo dha kyabazinga ow'e Misiri, ye mwakolanga obwiru." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Agho ni, mukimanhe nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe ni Katonda yenka era nga mwesigwa. Akuuma endagaano n'abantu ab'ense n'ense abamugonza era ni bakuuma ebiragiro bye, era abagonza obutalekera." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Aye abamukyagha alibeesasuuza ng'abazikiriza. Talirwagho naire kubonereza muntu amukyagha. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Kale ni mwegendereze okutuukirizanga amateeka, n'ebiragiro, n'okulamba, bye mbaghaire olwaleero.”" 
Deuteronomy7:12 Musa yaayongera okukoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe munaajiiranga ku biragiro bino, ni mu bigema era ni mu bituukiriza, Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kukuumanga endagaano, ye yakola n'imwe. Era aidha kubagonzanga obutalekera nga bweyasuubiza badhaadha baimwe." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Aidha kubagonzanga, abaghe enkabi mweyongerenga okwala nga muzaala abaana kamaala. Aidha kughanga eitaka lyaimwe enkabi mufunenga emere, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva. Aidha kuleeteranga ebyayo byaimwe okuzaalagana: ente, embuzi, n'entaama. Ebirungi ebyo byonabyona aidhanga kubibagheera mu nsi ye yasuubiza badhaadha baimwe okugibagha imwe." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Musengwa Katonda aidha kubaghanga enkabi okusinga amaghanga agandi goonagoona. Mu imwe timuubengamu musaadha atazaala, oba mukazi mugumba, oba waire mu byayo byaimwe okubaamu ekitazaala." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Musengwa Katonda aidha kubakugiranga endwaire dhoonadhoona dhirobe kubagema. Taidha kubasindikiranga ndwaire mbi dhe mwabona nga muli e Misiri. Aye aidha kudhisindikiranga abo ababakyagha. 
Deuteronomy7:16 Muzikirizenga amaghanga goonagoona Musengwa Katonda waimwe g'anaabatanga mu ngalo, era mutagagemerwanga kivunika. Mutasinzanga bakatonda baago, kuba ekyo kisobola okubafuukira imwe omutego." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Mughanga okwebuuza mule muti, ‘Abantu bano batusinga obungi! Tughanga tutya okubabingamu?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Aye mutabatyanga. Mwidhukirenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe kye yakola kyabazinga w'e Misiri, ni ku bantu b'e Misiri boonaboona." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Mwidhukirenga ebibamba ebitiisa bye mweboneraku beene n'amaiso gaimwe, n'ebyewuunhio, n'ebyewuninkiriza, n'amaani agataloodheka, Musengwa Katonda waimwe bye yakozesa okubanunulayo. Atyo Musengwa Katonda waimwe bw'aidha okukola ni ku bantu abo boonaboona be muli kutya." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Alibaleetamu okutya n'okudhugumira, okutuusa lw'alizikiriza abo abaliba nga bakaasigairegho nga beegisiisa." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Kale ni mutabatyanga, kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe aba mu imwe, era oyo n'omukologho ali n'okutiibwa." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Bwe munaabanga nga muli kumpi okutuuka mu kiketezo, Musengwa Katonda aidha kubingangamu abo abamaghanga agandi, batonobatono. Timulisobola kubamalamu mukuzi mulala, olwo ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhirobe kweyongera inho obungi na kubabitiriraku." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Musengwa Katonda waimwe alita abazigu baimwe mu ngalo dhaimwe era yaabaleetamu okutya n'okudhugumira, okutuusa lwe balizikirizibwa." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Alita bakyabazinga baibwe mu ngalo dhaimwe, mwabazikiriza beerabirwa ku nsi. Tighaliba muntu waire omulala alisobola kubalobera mulibasaaniagho boonaboona." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Mwokyenga n'omuliro ebifaananie ebibaadhe eby'emisambwa gyaibwe. Muteegwanizanga feeza waire zaabu abiriku, era mutamutwalanga, olwo alobe kubafuukira imwe mutego, kuba okusinza ebitali Katonda kiba ekyenhinhalwa eri Musengwa Katonda." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Mutaleetanga waire ekirala ku bisinzibwa ebyo ebitali Katonda, mu ndhu dhaimwe, olwo mulobe kwereetaku kikolimo kya Musengwa Katonda ekibiriku. Ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda ebyo mubikyayirenga irala era mubyesambenga, kuba Musengwa Katonda yabikolimira. ”" 
Deuteronomy8:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mutenga inho omwoyo ku biragiro byonabyona bye mbaghaire olwaleero, mubituukirizenga bukalamu. Olwo musobole okwala, mutwale ensi Musengwa Katonda ye yasuubiza okugha badhaadha baimwe." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Era muteerabiranga nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe bweyabakulemberamu mu lugendo lwonalwona, emyaka gino amakumi ana mu irungu, ng'agendereramu okubafuula abawulize. Era yaabaleba, asobole okumanha ekiri mu myoyo gyaimwe, abone oba nga munaakuumanga ebiragiro bye." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Yaabaleka endhala yaabaluma, aye yaamala yaabagha mannu mwalya, emere ye mwali nga timulyangaku waire badhaadha baimwe. Ekyo yakikola okubeegeresa nti omuntu taba mulamu na mere yonka, aye aba mulamu lwa buli kibono Musengwa Katonda mwene ky'ayogera." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Emyaka egyo amakumi ana, ebivaalo byaimwe tibyakairighaku n'ebigere tibyabazimbaku." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Kale ni mukimanhenga muti, ng'omuntu bw'akangaivula omwana we, ni Musengwa Katonda waimwe atyo bw'abakangaivula imwe." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Mukuumenga ebiragiro bye, mujiirenga ku ebyo by'abakoba, era mumutyenga." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ali kubatwala mu nsi engimu, erimu emiiga n'ensulo edh'amaadhi agakuuluulira mu biiko ni mu nsozi." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Ensi eyo ebaza engaano, ni sayiri, n'emizabbibu, n'emitiini, n'emikomamawanga, n'emyoliva, era erimu omudheenene ogw'endhuki." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Mu nsi eyo mwidha kulyanga emere nga tewaagho, era timuubenga na kye mudhulirira. Embaale edh'omu nsi eyo dhirimu ekyuma ekigumu einho, n'ensozi dhaamu musobola okusimamu ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Mwidha kulyanga mwigute, era musiimenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe olw'ensi engimu y'ali kubagha.”" 
Deuteronomy8:11 Musa yaayongera okukoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mwekuumenga mulobenga kwerabira Musengwa Katonda waimwe, nga muloba okukuuma amateeka ge, n'ebiragiro bye, n'okulamba kwe, bye ndi kubagha olwaleero." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Mulifuna emere ebamala, mwazimba amayumba amalungi era mwagasulamu." 
Deuteronomy8:13 Era muligheza engo edh'ente, n'embuzi, n'entaama. Ni feeza, ni zaabu waimwe alyeyongera obungi, ghalala n'ebintu byaimwe ebindi byonabyona." 
Deuteronomy8:14 Aye ebyo byonabyona nga bimaze okubaagho, mutagezangaku naire kwekuluntaza, ni mwerabira Musengwa Katonda waimwe eyabatoola e Misiri ye mwakolanga obwiru." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Yababisa mu irungu einene era eritiisa, omwali emisota n'ebiyiri eby'obusagwa. Mu irungu omwo omuzira maadhi, yaabafunira amaadhi okuva mu lubaale olubbalangufu.”" 
Deuteronomy8:16 Yabagha mannu mwalya mu irungu, emere badhaadha baimwe ye baali nga tibalyangaku." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Kale ni mulobenga kukoba mule muti, “Amagezi gaife n'amaani gaife n'ebitufuniisa obukombe.”" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Aye Mwidhukirenga muti Musengwa Katonda waimwe, n'abagha amagezi okukombaghala, ng'atuukiriza endagaano ye yakola ni badhaadha baimwe ni ye buli eno." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Bwe mulyerabira Musengwa Katonda, ni mujiira ku bakatonda era ni mubasinza, mbalabula olwaleero nti timuliroba kuzikirira." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Bwe muliroba okuwulira Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mulizikirira ng'oti n'amaghanga ago Musengwa Katonda g'aja okuzikiriza nga muli kumpi okugatuukaku." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Imwe Abaisiraeli muwulire: Olwaleero muja kusomoka omwiga Yorudani, mwingire mutwale ensi ey'amaghanga agasinga eryaimwe obukologho n'amaani. Ebibuga byago bikologho, era byezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu ebituuka ku igulu." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Abantu baamu bakologho era baleeyiriri baidhukulu ba Anaki abawaigufu, be mwawuliraku nga baboogeraku bati, ghazira asobola kukana kubalwanisa." 
Deuteronomy9:3 Agho ni mukimanhe muti Musengwa Katonda waimwe n'aidha okubakulemberangamu, ng'ali ng'oti muliro oguzikiriza buli kiri mu ngira yaagwo. Mwene aidha kughangula abantu abo nga mukaali kubatuukaku. Olwo musobole okubabingamu n'okubazikiriza amangu, nga bweyabasuubiza imwe." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Musengwa Katonda waimwe bw'alimala okubinga abantu abo mu nsi eyo nga mukaali kutuukayo, mutakobanga mule muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda atuleese mu nsi eno okugitwala lwa kuba nga tugwaniire.’ Busa naire! Musengwa Katonda alibingamu abantu abo lwa bibi byaibwe." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Musengwa Katonda ali kubaleka okutwala ensi yaibwe, ti lwa kuba nga mugwaniire, oba nti mugondera ebiragiro bye. Aye beene ali kubabingamu, nga imwe mukaali kutuukayo, lwa bibi byaibwe, era lwa kuba ayenda okutuukiriza ekisuubizo, kye yasuubiza badhaadha baimwe, Aburahamu, Isaaka, ni Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Kale ni mumanhe nti Musengwa Katonda waimwe tali kubagha nsi eno enungi mugitwale, lwa kuba nga mugwaniire. Busa naire! Muli ba mpwitu." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Mutagezangaku naire okwerabira nga bwe mwaleetera Musengwa Katonda waimwe okubasungughalira mu irungu. Okuviira irala ku lunaku lwe mwaviiraku mu Misiri, okutuusa lwe mwatuuka mu kifo kino, mubairenga nga mumudheemera." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Ni ku lusozi Sinai mwamuleetera okubasungughalira einho, yaatuuka n'okwenda okubazikiriza." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Nze naniina olusozi okugheebwa ebibaadho eby'amabaale ebyaghandiikibwaku endagaano Musengwa Katonda ye yakola n'imwe. Naasigalayo okumala enaku amakumi ana, omusana n'obwire, nga tirya mere waire okunhwa amaadhi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Agho Musengwa Katonda yampa ebibaadho ebibiri eby'amabaale, mwene bye yaghandiikaku n'omukono gwe ebibono byonabyona bye yayogera n'imwe ng'ali mu muliro ghagati, ku lunaku lwe mwesololezaaku eyo ku lusozi." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Kale ni enaku edho amakumi ana, omusana n'obwire, bwe dhaawaaku, Musengwa Katonda yampa ebibaadho ebibiri eby'amabaale, bye yaghandiikaku endagaano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Situka oserengete mangu, kuba abantu be watoola e Misiri boonooneike baakola ekibi. Bakyuse amangu ago, baava ku bye nabalagira okujiirangaku, beekolera ekifaananie mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Musengwa Katonda yaayongera okunkoba ati, ‘Neekaliriisa abantu bano, naabona nga bali n'empwitu." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Ndeka mbazikirize beerabirirwe irala ku nsi. Ndidha kusimusa mu iwe eighanga eikologho era ery'amaani okusinga beene.’ 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Agho naakyuka naaserengeta okuva ku lusozi nga ngemye ebibaadho ebibiri eby'amabaale okwaghandiikibwa endagaano. Olusozi lwali luli kwaka omuliro. 
Deuteronomy9:16 Naja okulinga nti, nga mbona mwamaze ira okukyuka, mwava amangu ago ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yabalagira okujiirangaku. Mwakola ekibi y'ali, mwekolera ekifaananie eky'ente ento enume mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Agho naaghanika ebibaadho eby'amabaale byombi, naabikubiragho ku itaka, naabimenha nga muli kubona." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Neeyala ku itaka nga neefundiike mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, nga bwe nali mmaze okukola mu kusooka. Naamala enaku amakumi ana, omusana n'obwire, nga tirya mere waire okunhwa amaadhi. Kuba mwali nga mukoze ekibi mwasungughaza Musengwa Katonda." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Naatya olw'obusungu n'ekiruyi Musengwa Katonda bye yali nabyo ng'ali kwenda na kubazikiriza. Aye Musengwa Katonda oyo yaawulira kye namusaba ni ku mukuzi ogwo. 
Deuteronomy9:20 Era Musengwa Katonda yaasungughalira ni Aaroni, yaayenda na ku mwita. Kale nze naasabira ni Aaroni mu kiseera ekyo." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Naagema ekintu ekyo eky'ekibi kyaimwe, eyo nga n'ente ento enume ye mwali mukoze, naagisuula mu muliro. Naagikontakonta, naagisekulasekula inho okutuusa lwe yafuuka ng'oti nkungu. Naayugha enkungu yaayo eyo mu kaiga akaalinga nga kakuuluula okuva ku lusozi." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Ni bwe mwali e Tabera, n'e Massa, n'e Kiburothi Hattaava, yoona mwasungughalizaayo Musengwa Katonda." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Era Musengwa Katonda bweyabasindika okuva e Kadeshi Barinea ng'akoba ati, ‘Muje mutwale ensi ye mbaghaire’, mwadheemera ekiragiro kye. Musengwa Katonda waimwe timwamwesiga, waire okugondera ky'akoba." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Mubaire mudheemeranga Musengwa Katonda okuviira irala lwe nabamanha. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Kale neeyala ku itaka nga neefundiike mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda okumala enaku edho amakumi ana, omusana n'obwire, kuba Musengwa Katonda yali ankobye ati aja kubazikiriza." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Neeghemba Musengwa Katonda nga nkoba nti, ‘Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, otazikiriza bantu bo ababo ku bubwo, be wanunula n'obuyinza bwo, era be watoola mu Misiri n'amaani go agataloodheka." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Idhukira abagheereza bo, Aburahamu, Isaaka, ni Yakobo. Otalingirira mpwitu ya bantu bano, waire ebibi byaibwe, oba waire okwonoona kwaibwe." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Kuba olwo onaaba oghaire Abamisiri kya kwogera, nga bakoba bati Musengwa Katonda tiyasobola kutuusa bantu be mu nsi ye yabasuubiza, era olw'okuba yabakyagha kyeyava n'abatwala mu irungu okubaita." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Ate nga abo n'abantu bo, ababo ku bubwo, be watoola mu Misiri n'obuyinza bwo obungi era n'amaani amangi.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy10:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Baadhayo ebibaadho bibiri eby'amabaale, ebiri ng'oti ni bire ebyasooka, era okoleyo esanduuku ey'embaawo, memale oniine oidhe ye ndi ku lusozi." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Ndidha kughandiika ku bibaadho ebyo ebibono ebyali ku bibaadho bire ebyasooka, bye wamenha, olwo obite mu sanduuku eyo.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Agho naakolayo esanduuku ey'embaawo edh'omuti ogwetebwa akasia, naabaadha n'ebibaadho bibiri eby'amabaale, ebiri ng'oti ni bire ebyasooka, memale naaniina olusozi nga ngemye ebibaadho byombi mu ngalo." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Musengwa Katonda yaaghandiika ku bibaadho ebyo ebibono ebiri ng'oti ni bire ebyasooka, amateeka eikumi, ge yabagha ng'ali mu muliro ghagati, ku lunaku lwe mwesololezaaku ku lusozi. Musengwa Katonda yampa ebibaadho ebyo," 
Deuteronomy10:5 naika nabyo okuva ku lusozi. Era nga bweyandagira, naabita mu sanduuku ye nakola, mwe bikaali ni mpegaano.”" 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Agho Abaisiraeli baasimbuka, baatambula nga bava ku nsulo edh'Abayaakani, baatuuka e Mosera. Aaroni yaafiira eyo, era yaaziikibwa eyo. Mutabane we Eleazari yaamusikira nga kabona." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Eyo baavaayo, baatambula okutuuka e Gudugoda. Baava e Gudugoda baatuuka e Yotubatha, ensi erimu obwiga obw'amaadhi kamaala." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Mu biseera ebyo Musengwa Katonda yaayawula ab'ekika kya Levi okubbeedanga Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ye, n'okumugheerezanga, n'okughanga abantu enkabi mu liina lye. Egyo n'emirimo gyaibwe n'okutuusa mpegaano." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Eyo n'ensonga lwaki ab'ekika kya Levi tibaafuna mugabo gwa itaka lya nsikirano ng'oti n'ab'ebika ebindi. Bo baagabanaku kya kuba bakabona ba Musengwa Katonda, nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe bweyabakoba beene.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 Musa yaayongera okukoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Naba ku lusozi okumala enaku amakumi ana omusana n'obwire, nga bwe nakola ku mukuzi ogwasooka. Ni ku mukuzi guno, Musengwa Katonda yaawulira kye namusaba, yaaganha obutabazikiriza imwe." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Agho yankoba ati, ‘Situka weeyongere okutambula olugendo lwo okulemberemu abantu, baje batwale ensi ye nasuubiza badhaadha baibwe okubagha.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy10:12 Musa yaayongera okukoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mpegaano ni, imwe Abaisiraeli, Musengwa Katonda waimwe ky'ayenda mukole ni kino: Mumutyenga era mujiirenga ku ebyo byonabyona by'abalagira. Mumugonzenga era mumusinzenga n'omutima gwaimwe gwonagwona, n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona," 
Deuteronomy10:13 era mukuumenga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, bye ndi kubagha olwaleero, mughange okubanga obukalamu." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Bona eno, eigulu lyonalyona eyo ye likoma okweruupiika, lya Musengwa Katonda waimwe, era n'ensi n'ebigirimu byonabyona bibye." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Aye Musengwa Katonda yagonza inho badhaadha baimwe, kyeyava n'alonda imwe baidhukulu baibwe mu b'amaghanga agandi goonagoona. Era n'okutuusa mpegaano mukaali abantu be abalondemu." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Kale ni mubenga bawulize y'ali, mulekere agho okubanga n'empwitu," 
Deuteronomy10:17 kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ni Katonda afuga bakatonda boonaboona, era ni Musengwa Katonda afuga basengwa boonaboona. Musengwa Katonda oyo, n'omukologho era ow'amaani ali n'okutiibwa. Tasaliriza era talya nguzi." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Asala mu butuufu ensonga dha bamulekwa ni banamwandu. Yaagonza abasenze abali mu imwe, yaabagha eby'okulya n'eby'okuvaala." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Agho ni, mugonzenga abasenze abo, kuba mwena mwali basenze mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Mutyenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, era yenka ye mube musinzenga. Mubenga beesigwa y'ali, era eriina lye lyonka, lye mube mulayirenga." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Mumusaakenga, oyo ni Katonda waimwe. Mweboneraku n'amaiso gaimwe eby'amaani era ebitiisa bye yabakolera." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Ebiseera badhaadha baimwe bye baajiiramu e Misiri baali abantu nsanvu bonka. Aye mpegaano Musengwa Katonda waimwe abafiire bangi ng'oti n'emuunienie edh'oku igulu.” 
Deuteronomy11:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mugonzenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe buliidho, era mutuukirizenga byonabyona by'ayenda mukole: amateeka ge, n'ebiragiro bye, n'okulamba kwe." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Mukimanhe olwaleero muti tiri kwogera na baana baimwe abakaali kumanha na kubona nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe bw'akangaivula. Niimwe omwabona nga bw'ali omukologho, era ow'amaani amangi agataloodheka." 
Deuteronomy11:3 Mwabona ebyewuunhio n'ebyewuninkiriza, bye yakolera e Misiri ku kyabazinga waayo, ni ku nsi Misiri yoonayoona." 
Deuteronomy11:4 Mwabona nga Musengwa Katonda bweyasaanizaagho irala eigye ly'Abamisiri, n'embalaasi dhaibwe, n'ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo. Yaabayoolookezaaku amaadhi g'Enhandha Emyufu, gaabamira bwe baali nga bali kulumuukirira imwe." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Mwidhi bye yabakolera nga muli mu irungu, okutuusa lwe mwatuuka mu kifo kino." 
Deuteronomy11:6 Era mwidhukira kye yakola Dathani ni Abiramu batabane ba Eliabu ow'omu kika kya Reubeni. Musengwa Katonda oyo yaleetera eitaka okwasama ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona babona, lyamira abantu abo, n'ab'omu maka gaibwe, n'eweema dhaibwe, na kiisi kiramu kye baali nakyo." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Bwenebwene mwabona eby'amaani ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yakola. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Kale ni mutuukirizenga ebiragiro byonabyona bye ndi kubagha olwaleero, mughange okuba n'amaani, musomoke omwiga, muje mutwale ensi ye muli kumpi okwingiramu." 
Deuteronomy11:9 Era olwo musobole okughangaalira mu nsi eyo engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala, Musengwa Katonda ye yasuubiza okugha badhaadha baimwe n'eizaire lyaibwe." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Ensi ye muli kuja okwingiramu okutwala, teri ng'oti ni Misiri ye mwavaamu, mwe mwasiganga ensigo ni mukola n'amaani okudhifukirira, ng'enimiro y'eiva." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Aye nsi ya nsozi na biiko, efukirirwa amaadhi agagwa." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Ensi eyo Musengwa Katonda waimwe agirabirira ekiseera kyonakyona, okuva omwaka lwe gutoolera okutuusa lwe guwaaku." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Kale ni mufubenga okutuukiriza ebiragiro, bye mbaghaire olwaleero. Mugonzenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mumugheerezenga n'omutima gwaimwe gwonagwona, n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona." 
Deuteronomy11:14 Olwo aidha kugwisanga amaadhi mu nsi yaimwe mu biseera byago eby'omusambya n'eby'omutoigo. Olwo musobolenga okukungula engaano, n'okufuna omwenge ogw'emizabbibu n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Aidha kubaghanga eisubi ery'ensolo dhaimwe mu byayiro byaimwe. N'imwe beene mwidhanga kufuna emere yoonayoona ye mwetaaga. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Mwekuume mulobenga kusendebwasendebwa ni muva ku Musengwa Katonda, ni musinza bakatonda abandi era ni mubagheereza." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Bwe mulikola mutyo, obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bulibatumbukiraku ng'oti muliro, Musengwa Katonda oyo yaalobera amaadhi okugwa, ensi yaakala yaaloba kubaza mere, era mwazikirira mangu, waire nga muliba mu nsi engimu Musengwa Katonda y'ali kubagha." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Mukuumenga ebiragiro byange ebyo mu mitima ni mu myoyo gyaimwe. Mubyesibenga ku mikono gyaimwe, era mubyetimbenga mu byeni byaimwe ng'akamanhiso." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Mubyegeresenga abaana baimwe. Era mubyogerengaku nga muli ghaka, oba nga muli mu ngira muli kutambula, nga mulambaire, oba nga musitwikegho." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Mubighandiikenga ku myango egy'emiryango egy'endhu dhaimwe, ni ku miryango gy'ebibuga byaimwe." 
Deuteronomy11:21 Olwo imwe n'abaana baimwe, mughange okughangaalira mu nsi Musengwa Katonda ye yasuubiza okugha badhaadha baimwe. Era mugibeemu ekiseera kyonakyona eigulu kye lirimala nga liri ghaigulu gh'ensi." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Mukuumenga amateeka ge mbateereiregho obutagavangaku, nga mugonza Musengwa Katonda waimwe, nga mujiira ku ebyo by'abalagira, era nga muba beesigwa y'ali." 
Deuteronomy11:23 Olwo aidha kubingangamu amaghanga agandi ago goonagoona nga mukaali kugatuukaku. Olwo imwe mwingire mutwale ensi ey'amaghanga agasinga eryaimwe obukologho n'amaani. 
Deuteronomy11:24 Buli kifo kye munaaniinangaku ekigere, kiidha kubanga kyaimwe. Ensalosalo dhaimwe dhinaavanga ku irungu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, dhaatuuka ku nsozi dh'e Lebanoni ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Era dhinaavanga ku mwiga Eufurate mu buvandhuba, dhaatuuka ku Nhandha Eyaghagati mu bugwandhuba." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Tighaliba muntu waire omulala alighanga kubeekiikamu. Kuba buli ye munaajanga, Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kuleeteranga abantu baayo kubatya butye, nga bweyabasuubiza imwe." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Olwaleero ndi kubagha mulondegho, okugheebwa enkabi oba okukolimirwa." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Mwidha kugheebwanga enkabi, bwe munaawuliranga ebiragiro bya Musengwa Katonda waimwe bye ndi kubagha olwaleero." 
Deuteronomy11:28 Mwidha kukolimirwanga bwe mutaawulirenga biragiro bya Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ni mukyuka okuva ku bye ndi kubalagira olwaleero, aye ni mwira mu kusinza bakatonda be mutasinzangaku." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Kale ni Musengwa Katonda waimwe bw'alibatuusa mu nsi ye muja okutwala, mulirangirira enkabi nga muli ku lusozi Gerizimu, ate mwalangirira ekikolimo nga muli ku lusozi Ebali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Ensozi edho dhombi dhiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Yorudani, mu nsi y'Abakanaani ababa mu kiiko kya Yorudani okwolekera Giligali, mu mbali mw'omuti omukologho ogw'e More." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Muli kumpi okusomoka omwiga Yorudani, okwingira okutwala ensi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha. Bwe muligitwala ni mugibaamu," 
Deuteronomy11:32 mwegenderezanga okutuukiriza amateeka goonagoona n'ebiragiro bye ndi kubagha olwaleero.” 
Deuteronomy12:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Gano n'amateeka n'ebiragiro bye muli n'okutuukiriza n'obwegendereza enaku dhoonadhoona dhe munaamala nga muli balamu, mu nsi Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe y'ali kubagha okutwala." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Muli n'okuzikiriza ebifo byonabyona, ab'amaghanga ge muja okutwala mwe basinziza bakatonda baibwe: ku nsozi enene, ni ku busozi obutono, ni ghansi mu binsense by'emiti emizibirivu." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Mumenhemenhengagho alutaari dhaibwe, mutemetemenga empango dha bakatonda baibwe edh'amabaale, mwokyeyokyenga ebifaananie ebibaadhe eby'omusambwa gwaibwe omukazi Ashera, era mwasaageyasaagenga ebintu byaibwe bye basinza ebitali Katonda, byerabirirwenga irala ku nsi." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Imwe mutasinzanga Musengwa Katonda waimwe mu nsambo abantu abo ye basinzaamu bakatonda baibwe. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Mu biketezo by'ebika byaimwe byonabyona, Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kulondamu ekifo kirala, abantu ye banaajanga mu maiso ge okumusinza." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Eyo ye munaatwalanga ebigheebwayo byaimwe ebyokebwa, n'emisengo gyaimwe, n'ekintu ekirala kye mughaayo ku buli bintu eikumi bye mufuna, n'ebigheebwayo byaimwe ebindi bye mughaayo, n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo, n'ebigheebwayo eby'ekyeyendere, n'ensolo dhaimwe edhizaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka dhe mughaayo." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Eyo, nga muli mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, imwe n'ab'omu maka gaimwe ye mwidha okuliiranga n'okusagambiranga, olw'ebyo byonabyona bye munaabanga nga mukoze nga Musengwa Katonda oyo abaghaire enkabi." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kituukanga, mutakolanga nga bwe tubairenga tukola okutuusa ni leero. Buli muntu abairenga ng'akola ekyo ky'abona nga n'ekituufu," 
Deuteronomy12:9 kuba mukaali kutuuka mu nsi eyo, Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha ye munaabangamu nga mutyaime miraala." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Aye bwe munaasomoka omwiga Yorudani, Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kubagha ensi eyo mugitwale. Aidha kubawonianga abazigu baimwe ababeezungulwire, mubenga miraala." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Musengwa Katonda waimwe alirondagho ekifo eky'okumusinzizangamu. Eyo ye munaatwalanga ebyo byonabyona bye mbalagiire: ebigheebwayo byaimwe ebyokebwa, n'emisengo gyaimwe, n'ekintu ekirala kye mughaayo ku buli bintu eikumi bye mufuna, n'ebigheebwayo byaimwe ebindi bye mughaayo, n'ebyo ebigheebwayo olw'okutuukiriza obweyamo bwaimwe ye Musengwa Katonda." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Mwidha kusagambiranga eyo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, nga muli ghalala ni batabane baimwe, n'abairu baimwe abasaadha n'abakazi, n'Abalevi abali mu bibuga byaimwe kuba, Abalevi abo tibaja kufuna mugabo gwa itaka lya nsikirano, gwaibwe ku bwaibwe." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Mwekuumenga mulobe kugheerangayo ebigheebwayo byaimwe ebyokebwa mu buli kifo kye muba muboine. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Aye mubigheerengayo mu kifo ekyo kyonka Musengwa Katonda ky'aidha okulondagho, mu kiketezo eky'ekindi ku bika byaimwe. Eyo ye munaagheerangayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, era ye munaakoleranga ebyo byonabyona bye ndi kubalagira." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Aye mwidha kubanga ba idembe okwitira ensolo n'okuliira emamba yaadho woonawoona ghe munaabanga, era nga Musengwa Katonda bw'anaabanga ng'abaghaire. Abalongoofu n'abatali balongoofu banaabanga ba idembe okulya ku mamba eyo, ng'oti ni bwe balya ku y'empuuli n'ey'empongo." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Aye mutalyanga ku musaayi gwa nsolo yoonayoona. Mwidha kuguyughanga bwa ku itaka ng'oti maadhi. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Kiisi kye mughaayo ye Musengwa Katonda, mutakiriiranga eyo ye muba: ka kibe ekitundu ekirala ekirala ku buli bitundu ikumi eby'engaano yaimwe, oba eby'omwenge gwaimwe ogw'emizabbibu, oba eby'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva oba ka dhibe ensolo dhaimwe, ng'ente, entaama, oba embuzi, edhizaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka oba ekigheebwayo kyaimwe eky'okutuukiriza obweyamo bwaimwe ye Musengwa Katonda, oba ekigheebwayo kyaimwe eky'ekyeyendere, oba ebigheebwayo byaimwe ebindi bye mughaayo." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Aye imwe, ni batabane baimwe, ni baghala baimwe, n'abagheereza baimwe abasaadha n'abakazi, n'Abalevi ababa mu bibuga byaimwe, mwidha kulyanga ebigheebwayo ebyo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mu kifo ekyo Musengwa Katonda waimwe oyo ky'aidha okulondagho. Era mwidha kusagambiranga eyo olwa byonabyona bye munaabanga nga mukoze." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Mwegenderezenga mulobe kusuulirira Balevi, ekiseera kyonakyona kye munaamala nga muli balamu ku nsi." 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Musengwa Katonda waimwe bw'aligaziya ekiketezo kyaimwe nga bweyabasuubiza, ni muwulira mule nga muli kwenda okulya emamba, mwidha kubanga ba idembe okugirya nga bwe mwenda." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Ekifo Musengwa Katonda waimwe ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu bwe kinaabanga eghala einho, munaitanga nga bwe mbalagiire ku nsolo dhaimwe, ente, entaama n'embuzi, Musengwa Katonda dh'abaghaire, mwadhiriira ye munaabanga, nga bwe munaabanga mwenze." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Abalongoofu n'abatali balongoofu banaabanga ba idembe okulya ku mamba eyo, ng'oti ni bwe balya ku y'empuuli n'ey'empongo." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Aye mwegenderezenga mulobe kulya ku musaayi, kuba omusaayi n'obulamu. Kale ni mutalyanga bulamu ghalala na mamba." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Mutalyanga musaayi. Muguyughenga bwa ku itaka ng'oti maadhi. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Mutagulyanga naire, olwo mughange okubanga obukalamu, imwe n'abaana baimwe abaliiragho. Kuba olwo munaabanga nga mukoze ekyo Musengwa Katonda ky'abona nga n'ekituufu." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Mwidha kutwalanga ebigheebwayo byaimwe n'ebyo bye mweyama okugha Musengwa Katonda, mu kifo ekyo Musengwa Katonda ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Mwidha kughangayo ku alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa byonabyona ni biwaagho. Era mughengayo n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, ng'omusaayi gwabyo guyuyibwa ku alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda, aye emamba mwagirya." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Mujiirenga buliidho ku bibono bino byonabyona bye mbalagiire, olwo mughange okubanga obukalamu, imwe n'abaana baimwe abaliiragho ebyanda n'ebyanda. Kuba olwo munaabanga nga muli kukola ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'abona nga birungi era nga bituufu.”" 
Deuteronomy12:29 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kuzikirizanga abantu abali mu maghanga ge muli kumpi okwingiramu okutwala. Era mwidhanga kugatwala mubenga omwo. 
Deuteronomy12:30 Bwe banaamalanga okuzikirizibwa nga muli kumpi okutuukayo, mwekuumenga mulobe kutwalirizibwa kugema mpisa dhaibwe. Era mulobenga kwebuuzisabuuzisanga ku nsambo ye basinzaamu bakatonda baibwe, nga mwenda mwena musinzenga mu nsambo eyo." 
Deuteronomy12:31 “Mutasinzanga Musengwa Katonda waimwe mu nsambo beene ye basinzaamu bakatonda baibwe, kuba bwe baba nga bali kusinza bakatonda baibwe, bakola buli kyenhinhasa Musengwa Katonda era ky'atayenderaku irala. Bookya n'abaana baibwe mu muliro, ng'emisengo eri bakatonda baibwe." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Mufubenga okutuukiriza buli kye mbalagira. Mutabangaku kye mwongeraku, waire kye mukendeezaaku." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Ghasobola okubaagho mu imwe omulanzi oba omuvuunuzi w'ebirooto, yaabasuubiza ekyewuunhio oba ekyewuninkiriza okubaagho." 
Deuteronomy13:2 Ekyo aghanga okukikola ng'ayenda mutoolere okusinza bakatonda be mutasinzangaku. Aye ekirooto ekyo oba ekyewuninkiriza ekyo ky'asuubiiza ni bwe kituukiriranga," 
Deuteronomy13:3 mutamuwulirisanga, kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kubanga ng'ali kubaleba bulebe, abone oba nga mumugonza n'omutima gwaimwe gwonagwona, n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Mujiirenga ku Musengwa Katonda waimwe by'abalagira, era mumutyenga. Mumuwulirenga era mukuumenga ebiragiro bye. Mumusinzenga era mubenga beesigwa y'ali" 
Deuteronomy13:5 Aye omulanzi oyo oba omuvuunuzi w'ebirooto oyo, aitibwenga, kuba abakoba kudheemera Musengwa Katonda waimwe, eyabatoola mu Misiri, ye mwakolanga obwiru. Omuntu ng'oti n'oyo aba ali kubadaaliimya okubatoola ku mpisa, Musengwa Katonda waimwe dhe yabalagira okugemanga, ky'anaavanga n'aitibwa, ni mwetoolaku ekibi ekyo." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Ni bw'aba muganda wo mwene, oba mutabane wo, oba mughala wo, oba mukazi wo y'oyenda einho, oba mukagwa wo einho, yeena asobola okukusendasenda mu kyama ng'akukoba muje naye musinze bakatonda iwe ni badhaadha bo be mutasinzangaku." 
Deuteronomy13:7 Owundi ku abo asobola okukusendasenda okusinzanga bakatonda ab'amaghanga agabeezungulwire agho okumpi, oba ab'ago agabali eghala mu biketezo byonabyona eby'ensi." 
Deuteronomy13:8 Aye iwe otaganhanga by'akukoba, oba okumuwulirisa, oba okumusaasira, waire okumuwonia ng'ogisa ekibi kye ekyo." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Mwitenga bwite! Era niiwe obe osookenga okumukuba okutoolereza okumwita, memale abandi boonaboona bamukubenga afe." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Oidha kumukubanga amabaale afe, kuba yagezaaku okukusendasenda ove ku Musengwa Katonda wo, eyakutoola mu Misiri, ye mwakolanga obwiru." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Agho Abaisiraeli boonaboona bwe banaawuliranga ekibairegho, baidha kutyanga. Olwo ghalobe kubaagho muntu wundi mu imwe airayo kukola kibi kyaga agho." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Bwe muba nga muli mu bibuga Musengwa Katonda waimwe by'ali kubagha, musobola okuwulira abantu nga babakobera bati," 
Deuteronomy13:13 ghaligho abantu ab'eighanga lyaimwe abadankaanu, abamaze okusendasenda abatyamye b'omu kibuga kyaibwe okusinza bakatonda be mutasinzangaku." 
Deuteronomy13:14 Bwe munaawuliranga olubono ng'oti n'olwo, munoonerezenga n'obwegendereza nga muli kubuuliriza ku ekyo. Era bwe kinaabanga nga kikakasiibwa nga kituufu, nti ekyenhinhalwa ekyaga agho kikoleibwa mu imwe," 
Deuteronomy13:15 mwitenga bwite abatyamye ab'omu kibuga ekyo,n'ebyayo byaibwe, ekibuga mukisaaniengagho." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Ebintu byonabyona eby'abantu baamu, munaabisolokezanga mu luguudo ghagati gh'ekibuga ekyo. Memale olwo mwayokya ekibuga ekyo n'ebintu byonabyona ebikirimu, byaba ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda waimwe nga kyokebwa. Ekibuga ekyo kinaasigalanga bifunfugu ebyanda n'ebyanda, era tikiirengamu kuzimbibwa." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Muteesigalizangayo kintu waire ekirala ku ebyo ebigheereibwayo okuzikirizibwa. Olwo Musengwa Katonda asobole okukomya obusungu bwe obubitirivu. Aidha kubagemerwanga ekivunika, abasaasire, era abafuule bangi nga bweyasuubiza badhaadha baimwe." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Aye muli n'okumuwuliranga, nga mukuuma ebiragiro bye byonabyona, bye ndi kubagha olwaleero, era nga mukola ebyo Musengwa Katonda waimwe by'abona nga n'ebituufu.”" 
Deuteronomy14:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Imwe muli bantu ba Musengwa Katonda waimwe. Kale ni muteesalasalanga ku mibiri gyaimwe, oba okumwa enviiri gha mberi ku mitwe gyaimwe ni giba ng'oti gya mpaata, ng'abantu abandi bwe bakola nga bali kulira abafu." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Imwe muli ighanga itukuvu erya Musengwa Katonda waimwe. Yabalondamu okuba eighanga erirye ku bubwe mu maghanga agandi goonagoona agali ku nsi.” 
Deuteronomy14:3 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mutalyanga ku kintu kyonakyona, Musengwa Katonda kye yalangirira okuba nga tiikirongoofu." 
Deuteronomy14:4 Dhino n'ensolo dhe munaabanga ab'eidembe okulya: ente, entaama, embuzi," 
Deuteronomy14:5 empongo, empuuli, endhobe, embuzi edh'omu nsiko, n'entaama edh'omu nsiko," 
Deuteronomy14:6 na buli nsolo eri n'ebinuulo nga byawulemu era ng'eiza obwekulumo. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Aye mutalyanga nsolo dhitali na binuulo nga byawulemu era nga tidhiiza bwekulumo, nga dhino: engamiya, akamyu, n'akaduuyu. Edho mwidha kudhibaliranga mu dhitali nongoofu, kuba waire nga dhiiza obwekulumo, aye dhizira binuulo byawulemu." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Era mutalyanga mbiidhi. Yoona mwidha kugibaliranga mu nsolo edhitali nongoofu, kuba waire eri n'ebinuulo ebyawulemu, aye teiza bwekulumo. Mutalyanga ku mamba ya nsolo edho, waire okudhigemaku nga dhifiire." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Mwikirizibwa okulyanga kiisi kya mu maadhi ekiri n'obukuba amaadhi, n'ebigalagamba." 
Deuteronomy14:10 Aye buli kiramu ekiba mu maadhi, ekizira bukuba maadhi na bigalagamba, mutakiryanga. Mwidha kukibaliranga mu bitali birongoofu." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Mwikirizibwa okulyanga ku nhonhi dhoonadhoona enongoofu. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Aye dhino dhe mutaalyengaku: enkookooma, ensega, mawudi," 
Deuteronomy14:13 akakubi, eikoli, n'edhindi edhiri mu bika byadho" 
Deuteronomy14:14 n'amakoova aga buli kika 
Deuteronomy14:15 ni maaya, ni sekanhulya, n'ensega ey'oku maadhi, n'edhindi edhiri mu bika byadho" 
Deuteronomy14:16 n'akawigulu akatono, n'ekiwigulu ekinene, n'ekyo ekyeru" 
Deuteronomy14:17 n'ekiwigulu eky'omu irungu, n'ekyo eky'oku maadhi, n'ensega endheru" 
Deuteronomy14:18 ni sekanhulya ow'oku maadhi, ni mpaabaana, n'edhindi edhiri mu bika byadho n'eikokootezi, n'eirenha." 
Deuteronomy14:19 “Ebisiisa byonabyona ebiri n'amaghagha, mwidha kubibaliranga mu bitali birongoofu. Era mutabiryanga." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Aye mwikirizibwa okulyanga ebintu ebindi ebiri n'amaghagha, ebirongoofu." 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Mutalya ku kintu kyonakyona ekifiire kyene. Munaabanga ba idembe okukigha abasenze ababa mu nsi yaimwe okukirya, oba munaabanga ba idembe okukiguza abasenze abandi. Aye imwe muli ighanga, Musengwa Katonda waimwe lye yafuula erirye. “Mutafumbiranga mamba ya mbuzi nto oba ya ntaama nto, mu mata ga inhaayo.”" 
Deuteronomy14:22 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mwidha kutoolangaku ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi ku birime bye mukungula mu nimiro dhaimwe. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Memale olwo mujenga mu kifo Musengwa Katonda waimwe ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu, muliire eyo mu maiso ge ekitundu ekirala ekirala ku buli bitundu ikumi eky'engaano yaimwe, n'eky'omwenge gwaimwe ogw'emizabbibu, n'eky'omuzigo gwaimwe ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, ghalala n'ente, n'entaama, n'embuzi dhaimwe edhizaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka. Mukolenga mutyo, olwo mughange okwega okutyanga Musengwa Katonda waimwe enaku dhoonadhoona." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Aye olugendo bwe lunaababitirirangaku obuleeyi olw'okuba ng'ekifo Musengwa Katonda ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu kiri ghala, nga timusobola kutwalayo ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu ikumi eky'ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'abaghaire okukungula, olwo munaakolanga muti:" 
Deuteronomy14:25 Mwidha kutundanga ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu ikumi ekyo, mufunemu empiiya, muje nadho mu kifo Musengwa Katonda waimwe ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Empiiya edho munaadhigulangamu kye munaabanga nga mwenze: ente, oba entaama, oba omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, oba ekitamiiza ekindi kyonakyona, oba ekintu ekindi kyonakyona kye munaabanga nga mwegombye okulya. Munaaliiranga eyo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mwasagambira ghalala n'ab'omu maka gaimwe." 
Deuteronomy14:27 “Abalevi ababa mu bibuga byaimwe mutabalekuliranga agho, kuba beene bazira mugabo gwa itaka lya nsikirano ng'oti n'imwe." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Buli ku nkomerero y'omwaka ogwokusatu, mwidha kuleetanga ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi eky'ebirime bye mukungwire omwaka ogwo. Ebintu ebyo bye munaaleetanga, munaabiterekanga mu bibuga byaimwe." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Olwo Abalevi abazira mugabo gwa itaka lya nsikirano nga imwe bwe muli nagwo, n'abasenze, ni bamulekwa, ni banamwandu abali mu bibuga byaimwe, banaidhanga baafuna ku mere eyo, baalya baiguta olwo Musengwa Katonda waimwe aghange okubagha imwe enkabi mu byonabyona bye munaakolanga.”" 
Deuteronomy15:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Buli ku nkomerero y'emyaka omusanvu, mwidha kusonighanga abantu amabandha ge mubabandha." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Eno n'ensambo ye munaakikolangamu: Kiisi anaabanga ni Muisiraeli mwine y'abandha, aidha kumusonighanga kye yamuwola. Atagezangaku kumubandha, kuba Musengwa Katonda mwene n'alagiire ekisonigho ekyo." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Munaabanga ba idembe okusasuza omusenze kye mumubandha. Aye Muisiraeli munaimwe munaakimulekeranga bulekere. 
Deuteronomy15:4 “Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kubaghanga enkabi mu nsi y'ali kubagha okutwala, ebe obutaka bwaimwe. Era mu imwe timuubengamu mwavu," 
Deuteronomy15:5 bwe munaawuliranga Musengwa Katonda waimwe by'akoba, ni mutuukiriza ebiragiro bye n'obwegendereza, bye ndi kubagha olwaleero." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Musengwa Katonda aidha kubaghanga enkabi nga bwe yasuubiza. Mwidha kuwolanga amaghanga kamaala, aye imwe timwidha kugeewolangaku. Mwidha kufuganga amaghanga kamaala, aye imwe tigaidha kubafuganga." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Bwe ghanaabangagho Muisiraeli munaimwe omwavu ng'ali mu kindi ku bibuga byaimwe, mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha, muteerowoozangaku mwenka ni muloba kumulaadha." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Aye mumugemerwenga ekivunika, mumuwolenga byonabyona by'anaabanga nga yeetaaga." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Mutalobanga kumuwola nga mukoba muti kuba omwaka ogwomusanvu ogw'okusoniyiramu amabandha guli kumpi okutuuka, mube nga timusasulwa bye mubandha. Mutaganhanga ndowooza mbi eyo kwingira mu myoyo gyaimwe. Bwe munaalobanga okumuwola, memale n'alirira Musengwa Katonda okubavunaana, olwo mwidha kubanga nga muli n'omusango." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Mumughenga na mwoyo mulala aghazira kukakibwa. Olwo Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kubaghanga enkabi mu byonabyona bye munaakolanga. 
Deuteronomy15:11 Buliidho ghaidha kubanga nga ghaligho Abaisiraeli abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu mu nsi. Kyenva ni mbalagira nti mutalobanga kubayamba.” 
Deuteronomy15:12 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe bakuguzanga Muheburayi mwino ng'omwiru, k'abe musaadha oba mukazi, memale n'akugheereza okumala emyaka omukaaga, mu mwaka ogwomusanvu oidhanga kumuleka agolole nga wa idembe." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Era bw'onaamalanga okumuleka okugolola nga wa idembe, otamulekanga kuja buje atyo ng'azira kantu." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Oidha kumughanga n'omwoyo omugabi, ng'otoola ku ntaama dho, ni ku mbuzi dho, ni ku mere yo ey'empeke, ni ku mwenge gwo ogw'emizabbibu. Musengwa Katonda wo y'anaakomyanga okukugha ebingi, weena y'onaakomyanga okugha omuntu oyo ebingi." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Mwidhukire nga mwali bairu mu Misiri, Musengwa Katonda waimwe yaabanunula. Kyenva ndi kubagha ekiragiro ekyo mpegaano." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Aye omwiru asobola okuba nga tayenda kukuvaaku, kuba akugonza iwe n'ab'omu maka go, era nga mumativu okusigala n'iwe." 
Deuteronomy15:17 Olwo oidha kugemanga olugera olusongovu omufuwule kutu owundi ng'ali gha lwigi, olwo abeerenga irala mwiru wo enaku dhoonadhoona. N'omwiru wo omukazi yeena otyo bw'onaamubisanga." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Aye omwiru wo bw'anaabanga nga tayenze kusigala n'iwe, otawuliranga mule bubi ng'omulese okugolola nga wa idembe. Kuba anaabanga ng'akukoleire emyaka mukaaga, ng'egyo n'emirimo gy'okubisaamu emikuzi ebiri mu egyo omukozi akolera empeera gy'akola. Bw'onaakolanga otyo, Musengwa Katonda wo aidha kukughanga enkabi mu byonabyona by'onaakolanga.”" 
Deuteronomy15:19 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mwawulenga ente dhaimwe enume, n'entaama dhaimwe, n'embuzi dhaimwe, edhizaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka, dhibenga dha Musengwa Katonda waimwe. Ente edho mutadhikozesanga mirimo, n'entaama edho mutadhisalangaku buviiri." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Aye buli mwaka, imwe n'ab'omu maka gaimwe, munaalyanga ensolo edho nga muli mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mu kifo ekyo ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Aye ensolo edho bwe dhinaabangaku ekikyamu, nga nema, oba nga ntulu, oba nga dhiriku ekikyamu ekindi kyonakyona, timuudhighengayo eri Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Mwidhanga kudhiriira mu bibuga byaimwe. Abalongoofu n'abatali balongoofu banaabanga ba idembe okudhiryaku, ng'oti ni bwe balya ku mpuuli n'empongo." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Aye mutalyanga ku musaayi gwadho. Mwidha kuguyughanga bwa ku itaka ng'oti maadhi.” 
Deuteronomy16:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mukuzenga omwezi gw'Abibu, nga mukola Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa. Kuba mu mwezi ogwo, Musengwa Katonda waimwe gwe yabatooleramu e Misiri obwire." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Mwidha kujanga mu kifo Musengwa Katonda ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu, mugheerengayo eyo omusengo ogw'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa, nga mwita ku nte dhaimwe, oba ku ntaama dhaimwe, oba ku mbuzi dhaimwe." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Ensolo eyo mutagiriirangaku migaati gizimbulukusiibwa. Mwidha kumalanga enaku musanvu nga muli kulya emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa, nga bwe mwakola nga muva mu bwiru e Misiri, ye mwava embirombiro. Egyo n'emigaati egy'okunakughala. Mwidhanga kugirya, mughange okwidhukiranga mu bulamu bwaimwe bwonabwona olunaku lwe mwaviiraku e Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Mu nsi yaimwe timuubengamu ali na kizimbulukusa, okumala enaku musanvu. Era emamba ey'ensolo edhinaitibwanga eigulo ku lunaku olusooka, teesulengagho kutuusa nkyo." 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Mutagheeranga musengo ogw'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa nga muli eyo mu bibuga byaimwe Musengwa Katonda waimwe by'abagha. 
Deuteronomy16:6 Aye mwidha kugugheeranga mu kifo ky'aliba alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu. Eyo ye munaagugheerangayo eigulo, ng'endhuba eri kugwa, mu kiseera nga kye mwaviiramu mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Mwidha kufumbanga emamba ey'ensolo eyo era mugiriire, mu kifo Musengwa Katonda waimwe ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu. Nga mumaze munairangayo mu weema dhaimwe, nga bukyeire enkyo." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Mu nnaku omukaaga edhinairangaku, mwidha kulyanga emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa. Ku lunaku olwomusanvu, mwidhanga kwesoloza musinze Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda waimwe, era timuulukolerengaku mulimo gwonagwona.”" 
Deuteronomy16:9 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mwidha kubalanga wiiki musanvu okuva lwe munaatooleranga okukungula engaano mu nimiro," 
Deuteronomy16:10 memale olwo mukolenga Ekibinuko eky'Amakungula, eky'okuta mu Musengwa Katonda waimwe ekitiisa. Mwidha kumuleeteranga ekigheebwayo eky'ekyeyendere, nga mujiira ku bungi bw'ebintu by'anaabaghanga." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Era mwidha kusagambiranga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mu kifo ky'aliba ng'asazeegho okumusinzizangamu, ghalala ni batabane baimwe, ni baghala baimwe, n'abagheereza baimwe abasaadha n'abakazi, n'Abalevi ab'omu bibuga byaimwe, n'abasenze, ni bamulekwa, ni banamwandu ababa mu imwe." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Mufengayo inho okutuukiriza amateeka gano, nga timwerabiire bwe mwali abairu mu Misiri.”" 
Deuteronomy16:13 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe munaamalanga okukuba emere yaimwe ey'empeke n'okugikunguuta, ni mumala n'okukunha omwenge gwaimwe ogw'emizabbibu, munaakolanga Ekibinuko eky'Entindi okumala enaku musanvu." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Mu kibinuko ekyo, mwidha kusagambiranga ghalala ni batabane baimwe, ni baghala baimwe, n'abagheereza baimwe abasaadha n'abakazi, n'Abalevi, n'abasenze, ni bamulekwa, ni banamwandu abali mu bibuga byaimwe." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Mwidha kutanga mu Musengwa Katonda waimwe ekitiisa nga mukola Ekibinuko ekyo okumala enaku musanvu, mu kifo Musengwa Katonda ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu. Kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo aidha kubaghanga enkabi mu bye munaakolanga byonabyona ni mu bye munaakungulanga byonabyona. Era byonabyona biidha kubaleeteranga okusagamba." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Abasaadha boonaboona ab'omu ighanga lyaimwe, baidha kujanga basinze Musengwa Katonda waimwe emikuzi esatu mu mwaka, mu kifo ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu. Baidha kukolerangayo ebibinuko bino: eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa, eky'Amakungula, n'eky'Entindi. Era tibaidhenga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda nga bazira kye baleese." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Buli muntu aidha kughangayo nga bw'aghanga, ng'ajiira ku bungi bw'ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'amughaire.”" 
Deuteronomy16:18 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mwidha kutangagho abalamuzi n'abakulembeze mu bibuga byaimwe byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waimwe by'abagha, nga mubatoola mu buli kika kyaimwe. Baidha kusaliranga abantu ensonga mu butuufu." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Batasalirizanga, waire okwekubiranga, oba okulyanga enguzi, kuba enguzi etulughaza amaiso g'omugezi gaava ku kituufu, era ereetera omuntu okufuulaniafuulania by'akoba." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Buliidho musalenga ensonga mu butuufu, olwo musobole okutwala ensi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha, era mugighangaaliremu." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Bwe munaabanga nga mukolera Musengwa Katonda waimwe alutaari, mutasimbangagho mu mbali mwayo muti gwa kamanhiso ka musambwa omukazi, Ashera." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Era mutasimbangagho mpango ya ibaale ey'okusinzizangaku ebitali Katonda ebyo Musengwa Katonda waimwe tabyenderaku irala. 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Mutaghangayo musengo ye Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ogw'ente oba entaama eriku ekikyamu, oba eriku akantu koonakoona akatali kalungi; kuba ekyo kiba kyenhinhalwa ye Musengwa Katonda." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Ghasobola okubaagho, mu kindi ku bibuga byaimwe, omusaadha oba omukazi yaakola ekibi, ng'amenha endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Deuteronomy17:3 Yaaja yaakubira amakiryaivu ebintu Musengwa Katonda bye yalobera okusinza, bino: bakatonda, oba endhuba, oba omwezi, oba edhindi ku muunienie." 
Deuteronomy17:4 Bwe munaawuliranga ekintu ekyo, munoonerezenga n'obwegendereza nga muli kukibuulirizaaku. Era bwe kinaabanga nga kikakasiibwa nga kituufu, nti ekyenhinhalwa ekyaga agho kikoleibwa mu Isiraeli," 
Deuteronomy17:5 omusaadha oyo oba omukazi oyo akoze ekibi ekyo, munaamufulumyanga ku luya kw'ekibuga kyaimwe, mwamukuba amabaale yaafa." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Aye aidha kwitibwanga nga ghaligho abadhulizi babiri oba basatu abamulumiriza. Bwe ghanaabangagho omudhulizi omulala yenka, omuntu oyo taidha kwitibwanga." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Abadhulizi n'abanaasookanga okumukuba okutoolereza okumwita, memale abantu abandi boonaboona baamukuba mu nsambo eyo, mwidha kwetoolangaku ekibi ekyo." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Ghasobola okubaagho emisango gye mutasobola kusalira mu bibuga byaimwe: ng'egy'abakaayanira ebintu, oba egy'ebiwundu ebituusiibwa ku bantu, oba egy'okwawulagho obutemo n'okwita omuntu ng'ole tagendereire. Ekyo bwekinaabangagho, munaasitukanga mwaja mu kifo Musengwa Katonda waimwe ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Olwo mwayandhula emisango egyo ye bakabona Abalevi, ni y'omulamuzi anaabanga nga n'aligho mu kiseera ekyo abo n'abanaabaghanga ensala y'emisango egyo." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Olwo munaabanga nga muli n'okujiira ku nsala yaibwe, mwatuukiriza byonabyona bye balagiire aghazira kukyusaamu naire." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Munaikirizanga ensala yaibwe, era mwatuukirizanga byonabyona bye balagiire aghazira kukyusaamu waire ekintu ekirala kiti." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Omuntu yeenayeena aneekuluntazanga, n'atawulira mulamuzi oba kabona ali eyo mu luwalo olw'okugheereza mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, aidha kwitibwanga bwitibwe mu nsambo eyo mwidha kwetoolangaku ekibi ekyo mu Isiraeli." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Agho abantu boonaboona bwe banaawuliranga ekibairegho, baidha kutyanga. Olwo ghalobe kubaagho muntu wundi airayo kwekuluntaza atyo.”" 
Deuteronomy17:14 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe mulimala okutuuka mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'aja okubagha, ni mugitwala era ni mu gityamamu, kisoboka okuba nga mulyetaaga okutaagho kyabazinga abafuge ng'oti n'amaghanga agandi goonagoona agaliba nga gabeezungulwire." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Aye mumalanga kukakasa, nga ye muli kutaagho n'oyo Musengwa Katonda y'alonze. Ateekwa okuba nga wa ighanga lyaimwe. Mutagezangaku kutaagho musenze kuba kyabazinga waimwe." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Era kyabazinga oyo atagezangaku kufuna mbalaasi kamaala, waire okwizaayo abantu e Misiri ayongere okufunayo embalaasi edhisingagho obungi. Kuba Musengwa Katonda yakoba ati timuja kwirayo eyo kabiri." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Kyabazinga alobenga kubayiza bakazi kamaala, olwo omwoyo gwe lwe gunaalobanga okutwalirizibwa einho. Era alobenga kwebbuutaku bukombe bungi obwa feeza ni zaabu." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Bw'alityama ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, alyeghandiikira amateeka gano mu kitabo ng'agatoola mu ekyo ekiri ni bakabona Abalevi." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Ekitabo ekyo kiidha kumubanga kumpi, era aidhanga kukisoma enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwe, aghange okwega okutyanga Musengwa Katonda we n'okukuumanga byonabyona ebiragirwa mu kitabo ekyo." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Bw'anaakolanga atyo, ekyo kinaamuwonianga okwekuluntaza n'okulowooza ati n'asinga Baisiraeli baine. Era kyamuwonia okudaaliimanga n'ava ku biragiro bino. Olwo anaaghangaaliranga ku bwakyabazinga bwe, ni baidhukulu be abalimwiririra boona baabughangaaliraku, mu Isiraeli.”" 
Deuteronomy18:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bakabona ab'ekika kya Levi tibaabenga na mugabo gwa itaka lya nsikirano mu Isiraeli. Aye baidha kulyanga ku bigheebwayo ebyokebwa, ni ku misengo egindi egigheebwayo ye Musengwa Katonda." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Tibaabenga na itaka lya nsikirano ng'ab'ebika ebindi. Omugabo gwaibwe gunaabanga mu kuba bakabona ba Musengwa Katonda, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyasuubiza." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Guno n'omugabo abantu abali kughaayo omusengo, gwe banaaghanga bakabona: bw'enaabanga ente oba entaama, banaaghanga bakabona omukono, n'emba dhombi, n'ebyenda." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Bakabona era banaafunanga ekitundu ekisooka okukungulwa, eky'engaano yaimwe, n'eky'omwenge gwaimwe ogw'emizabbibu, n'eky'omuzigo gwaimwe ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva. Era bafunenga n'ekitundu eky'obuviiri bwe musooka okusala ku ntaama dhaimwe." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Kuba mu bika byaimwe byonabyona, Musengwa Katonda waimwe yalondamu eky'Abalevi, bamugheerezenga enaku dhoonadhoona mu kifo kye eky'okumusinzizangamu." 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Kiisi Mulevi anaabanga ng'asazeegho okuva mu kibuga kyonakyona mw'aba mu Isiraeli, ng'ayenda aje mu kifo Musengwa Katonda ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu, anaabanga wa idembe okukola ekyo." 
Deuteronomy18:7 Era aidha kugheerezanga Musengwa Katonda we ng'oti ni Balevi baine boonaboona abagheerezaayo bwe bakola. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Aidha kufunanga omugabo gw'emere nga n'omulala n'ogwa baine, ng'otoireku ebyo by'anaabanga ng'afunie okuva mu boluganda lwe.”" 
Deuteronomy18:9 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe mulimala okutuuka mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'aja okubagha, mutagezangaku kwega kujiiranga ku mpisa edheenhinhalwa, ng'abamaghanga ago dhe bajiiraku." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Mu imwe mutabangamu muntu waire omulala ati ayokya mutabane we oba mughala we mu muliro ng'amughaayo ng'omusengo, oba akola eby'obulaguzi, oba akola eby'obulogo," 
Deuteronomy18:11 oba avaala talasimu, oba akozesa amaghembe, oba asamira." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Kuba kiisi akola ebintu ng'oti n'ebyo, aba kyenhinhalwa ye Musengwa Katonda. Era olw'ebikolwa ebyo, Musengwa Katonda oyo ky'ali kuva n'abinga amaghanga ago mu biketezo bye muli kumpi okutuukamu." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Imwe mubenga beesimbu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe.” 
Deuteronomy18:14 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Abantu ab'omu nsi eyo ye muli kumpi okutwala, bajiira ku bya bulaguzi na bya bulogo. Aye imwe, Musengwa Katonda waimwe tabaganha kujiira ku ebyo." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Aye aidha kubasindikira omulanzi okuva mu ighanga lyaimwe, ali ng'oti ninze. Oyo ye munaawuliranga." 
Deuteronomy18:16 “Ku lunaku lule lwemwesololezaaku eyo ku lusozi Sinai, mweghemba Musengwa Katonda waimwe mulobe kwirayo kuwulira ng'ali kwogera, waire okwiramu okubona omuliro gwe ogw'amaani. Kuba mwali muli kutya, muti musobola okufa." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati, ‘Byonabyona bye boogeire bituufu." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ndidha kubasindikira omulanzi okuva mu ighanga lyaibwe, ali ng'oti niiwe. Ndidha kumukobera eby'okwogera, olwo abakoberenga byonabyona bye ndimulagira." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Era kiisi ataatengayo mwoyo ku bibono byange omulanzi oyo by'anaayogeranga mu liina lyange, ndidha kumuvunaananga." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Aye omulanzi aneetulinkirizanga n'ayogera mu liina lyange ebibono bye ntamulagiire, oba n'ayogera mu liina lya bakatonda abandi, aidha kwitibwanga bwitibwe.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Musobola okwebuuza mule muti: ‘Tunaategeereranga ku ki ekibono Musengwa Katonda ky'ayogeire?’ 
Deuteronomy18:22 Mwidha kutegeeranga, kuba omulanzi bw'ayogera mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda, aye ky'ayogeire ni kitabaagho oba ni kitatuukirira, ekyo kiba nga Musengwa Katonda ti n'akyogeire. Omulanzi aba ng'akyogeire lwa kwetulinkiriza, era kitabatiisanga.”" 
Deuteronomy19:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kuzikiriza abamaghanga agandi, abali buti mu nsi imwe y'ali kubagha. Olwo imwe mutwale ebibuga byaibwe n'endhu dhaibwe." 
Deuteronomy19:2 Mwidha kusala mu nsi eyo ebiketezo bisatu, mu buli kiketezo mulondemu ekibuga kirala era mulongoose n'enguudo. Olwo, ole anaabanga ng'aise omuntu, anaasobolanga okulumukira mu kindi ku bibuga ebyo ebisatu." 
Deuteronomy19:3  
Deuteronomy19:4 Ole anaabanga ng'aise omuntu, nga tagendereire era ng'omuntu y'aise tabaire muzigu y'ali, aidha kulumukiranga mu kindi ku bibuga ebyo, awonienga obulamu bwe." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Eky'okuboneraku kiikino: Omuntu asobola okuja ni mwine mu kibira okutema omuti. Yaaghanika empasa okugutema, aye empasa yaaghanguka mu muyini gwayo, yaakuba mwine yaamwita. Oyo aise, anaasobolanga okulumukira mu kindi ku bibuga ebyo, yaawonia obulamu bwe." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Aye olugendo lusobola okuba oluleeyi einho okukituukamu. Olwo, owoluganda lw'ole ye baise avunaanizibwa okumwesasuulizaagho, olw'obusungu bw'ali nabwo yaabingirira ole aise, yaamutuukaku yaamwita. Ate nga tiyandigwaniire kufa, kuba y'aise aba nga tabaire muzigu y'ali." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Kyenva ndi kubalagira mulondegho ebibuga bisatu. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kugaziya ekiketezo kyaimwe nga bwe yasuubiza badhaadha baimwe, era abaghe ensi yoonayoona ye yasuubiza okugha badhaadha baimwe abo." 
Deuteronomy19:9 Ekyo aidha kukikola kasita munaakuumanga ebiragiro bino byonabyona bye ndi kubagha olwaleero, ni mugonza Musengwa Katonda waimwe, era ni mujiira ku ebyo by'alagira. Olwo ku bibuga ebyo ebisatu, mulyongeraku ebindi bisatu." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Mwidha kukolanga mutyo, olwo abantu abaziraku musango balobenga kwitibwa, era mwena mulobenga kuvunaanibwa lwa kwita bantu baziraku musango, mu nsi yaimwe Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Aye omuntu asobola okukyagha mwine, yaamweteega, yaamuzinduukiriza, yaamukuba, yaamwita, olwo yaalumukira mu kindi ku bibuga ebyo." 
Deuteronomy19:12 Omuntu ng'oti n'oyo, abakulembeze b'omu kibuga kyaimwe banaatumanga abantu baaja baamutoolayo, yaagheebwayo y'owoluganda lw'ole ye baise avunaanizibwa okumwesasuulizaagho, olwo yaitibwa." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Mutamusaasiranga naire, aye mutoolengagho ekibi eky'okwita abantu abaziraku musango mu Isiraeli, memale mughange okubanga abalamu.”" 
Deuteronomy19:14 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Nga muli mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha okutwala ebe obutaka bwaimwe, mutakyusanga mbibi dha bibandha bya baliraanwa baimwe, edhaamala eira okusimbibwa abantu abaabasookamu.”" 
Deuteronomy19:15 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Omudhulizi omulala yenka taasingisenga muntu musango, olw'ekibi oba ekintu ekikyamu kyonakyona omuntu oyo ky'anaabanga ng'akoze. Omuntu anaakakasibwanga okuba ng'aliku omusango lwa budhulizi bwa bantu babiri oba basatu." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Omuntu omubi bw'anaaghaamanga mwine olw'okwenda okumusingisa omusango," 
Deuteronomy19:17 bombi banaajanga mu kifo kire eky'okusinzizangamu Musengwa Katonda, baalamulwa bakabona n'abalamuzi abanaabanga nga n'abaligho mu kiseera ekyo." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Abalamuzi baidha kunoonerezanga n'obwegendereza nga bali kukibuulirizaaku. Bwe banaazuulanga ng'omudhulizi muguya era ng'aghaamye bughaame mwine," 
Deuteronomy19:19 munaamughanga ekibonerezo ky'abaire ayendeza mwine. Mu nsambo eyo mwidha kwetoolangaku ekibi ekyo. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Agho abantu boonaboona bwe banaawuliranga ekibairegho, baidha kutyanga. Olwo ghalobe kubaagho muntu wundi airayo kukola kibi ng'oti n'ekyo mu imwe." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Omuntu ng'oti n'oyo mutamusaasiranga naire. Ekibonerezo kiidha kubanga, bulamu kusasulwa bulamu, liiso kusasulwa liiso, liino kusasulwa liino, na kigere kusasulwa kigere.”" 
Deuteronomy20:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe munaajanga okulwanisa abazigu baimwe, aye ni mubona embalaasi, n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'eigye erisinga eryaimwe obunene, mutatyanga kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe eyabatoola e Misiri, ali n'imwe buliidho." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Bwe munaabanga nga mukaali kutoolera kulwana, kabona anaidhanga yaayogera n'eigye." 
Deuteronomy20:3 Yaabakoba ati, ‘Imwe Abaisiraeli muwulire! Olwaleero muli kuja okulwanisa abazigu baimwe. Mulobenga kuwaamu myoyo, oba okutya, waire okudhugumira. Abazigu baimwe balobe kubamalamu maani." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kuja n'imwe, abalwaniregho era abaleetere okughangula.’" 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Agho abakulu mu igye baidha kwogeranga n'abalwani, nga bakoba bati, ‘Ghano ghaligho omuntu abaire nga yaakamala okuzimba endhu ye, aye ng'akaali kukola mukolo gwa kugighaayo ye Katonda? Bw'aba ng'aligho, aireyo eka kuba tomanha bw'afiira mu lutalo, omuntu owundi n'akola mukolo ogwo." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Ghano ghaligho omuntu eyaakasimba eisamba ery'emizabbibu, aye ng'akaali kukungulamu bibala? Bw'aba ng'aligho, aireyo eka. Kuba tomanha bw'afiira mu lutalo, omuntu owundi n'akungula bibala ebyo." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Ghano ghaligho omuntu eyayandhulwa omukazi, aye ng'akaali kumubayiza? Bw'aba ng'aligho, aireyo eka kuba tomanha bw'afiira mu lutalo, omusaadha owundi n'abayiza mukazi oyo.’" 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Abakulu mu igye era baneeyongeranga okukoba abalwani bati, ‘Ghano ghaligho omuntu atiire ng'awoiremu omwoyo? Bw'aba ng'aligho, aireyo eka kuba tomanha bw'amala mu baine mwoyo.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Agho abakulu mu igye bwe banaamalanga okwogera n'abalwani, banaatangagho abaduumizi abanaakulemberanga ebikunsu by'abaisirukale mu igye." 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Bwe munaaseetanga ku kibuga okukirwanisa, munaasookanga kugha abakirimu omukisa ogw'okweghaayo obweghe mu mikono gyaibwe." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Bwe banaabairangamu bati baikiriiza okweghaayo era ni babaigulirangagho emiryango gy'ekibuga kyaibwe, olwo abantu boonaboona abakirimu munaabafuulanga bairu baimwe, baabakoleranga emirimo egy'olukako." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Aye bwebanaalobanga okweghaayo mu mikono gyaimwe, ni basalagho okubalwanisa obulwanise, olwo mwidha kuzingizanga ekibuga ekyo okukyezunguluza." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Era Musengwa Katonda waimwe bw'anaaghangayo ekibuga ekyo mu mikono gyaimwe, ni mukighangula, mwidha kwitanga bwite abasaadha boonaboona abakirimu." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Aye munaatwalanga abakazi, n'abaana abato, n'ebyayo, na buli kintu ekinaabanga mu kibuga ekyo, ng'omunhago. Era munaakozesanga ebintu byonabyona bye munaatoolanga ku bazigu baimwe. Ebyo Musengwa Katonda waimwe anaabanga ng'abibaghaire." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Mutyo bwe munaakolanga n'ebibuga ebindi byonabyona ebibali eghala einho, ebitali mu nsi ye mujanga kubaamu." 
Deuteronomy20:16 “Aye bwe munaaghambanga ebibuga ebibiri mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha, mutalekangagho kiramu waire ekirala nga kikaagheera." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Mwidha kusaanizangagho irala abantu boonaboona: Abahitti, n'Abamori, n'Abakanaani, n'Abaperizzi, n'Abahivi, n'Abayebusi, nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe bwe yabalagira." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Mubaitenga bwite, balobe kubaleeteranga kwonoona ye Musengwa Katonda, nga babeegeresa okujiiranga ku mpisa edheenhinhalwa, dhe bajiiraku mu kusinza bakatonda baibwe." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Ni bwe munaatwalanga ekiseera ekinene nga muzingiiza ekibuga okukyezunguluza, nga muli kukirwanisa okukighamba, mutazikirizanga miti gyakyo nga mugitemagho. Mulyenga ebibala byagyo aye mutagitemangagho kuba emiti egyo ti n'abazigu baimwe." 
Deuteronomy20:20 Emiti egyo gyonka egitataaku bibala, gye munaabanga ab'eidembe okutemagho, okuzimbisa ekintu kye mweyambisa okulwanisa ekibuga, okutuusa lwe munaakighambanga.”" 
Deuteronomy21:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Omuntu asobola okwagaanibwa ng'aitiibwa eyo mu nsiko mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha, aye ng'amwise tamanhiibwa." 
Deuteronomy21:2 Ekyo bwe kinaabangagho, abakulembeze n'abalamuzi baimwe baidha kujanga bapime obuleeyi obuligho, okuva ku mulambo okutuuka ku buli kindi ku bibuga ebiriiraine agho." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Abakulembeze ab'ekibuga ekisinga okuba okumpi n'omulambo gw'omuntu eyaitiibwa, banaatwalanga ente ento etakozesebwangaku mirimo," 
Deuteronomy21:4 baagiserengesa mu kiiko omuli amaadhi agakuuluula, nga tikirimwangamu waire okusigibwamu ebirime. Olwo baamenha enkoto yaayo." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Ni bakabona Abalevi boona banaajanga, kuba abo Musengwa Katonda waimwe be yalondamu okumugheerezanga, n'okusabiranga abantu enkabi mu liina lye. Era abo n'abasalagho ensonga dh'abakaayana, n'abatuusagainiaku ebiwundu." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Olwo abakulembeze boonaboona ab'omu kibuga ekisinga okuba okumpi n'omulambo gw'omuntu eyaitiibwa, banaanaabiranga engalo dhaibwe ku nte ento ere emenheibwa enkoto mu kiiko." 
Deuteronomy21:7 Era banaakobanga bati, ‘Ti niife otwatemula omuntu ono, era titwidhi yamutemula." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda, sonigha abantu bo Abaisiraeli be wanunula, olobe kubavunaana kutemula muntu aziraku musango.’" 
Deuteronomy21:9 Kale ni bwe munaakolanga ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'abona nga bituufu, munaabanga nga mwetoireku ekibi eky'okwita abantu abaziraku musango.”" 
Deuteronomy21:10 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe munaajanga mu lutalo okulwana, Musengwa Katonda waimwe n'abata abazigu baimwe mu ngalo ni mubaghangula, era ni mubatwala nga basibe," 
Deuteronomy21:11 memale iwe n'obonamu omukazi omulungi, n'oyenda okumubayiza," 
Deuteronomy21:12 onaamutwalanga ewuwo mu ndhu yo. Anaamwanga omutwe gwe, era yaasalaku n'enkumu." 
Deuteronomy21:13 Olwo yaakyusa ebivaalo, yaatoolamu bye yaghambirwamu, yaaba mu ndhu yo okumala omwezi mulamba ng'ali kulira ise n'inhina. Ekyo nga kiwoire, onaabanga wa idembe okumubayiza waaba naye." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Agho bw'onaabanga nga takaakunhoonha, onaamulekanga yaaja y'ayenda, aye otamutundangamu mpiiya. Era otamubisanga ng'oti mwiru, kuba wamala okumukaka okukubayira.”" 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Omusaadha asobola okuba ni bakazi be babiri, ng'owundi mwende aye ng'owundi munobe. Bombi baamuzaalira abaana abalenzi, aye ng'omwana omulenzi omuberi, n'ow'omukazi omunobe." 
Deuteronomy21:16 Omusaadha oyo bw'anaatuusanga okulaamira abaana be ebintu by'ali nabyo, taatoolenga mwana wa mukazi mwende n'amufuula kuba muberi mu kifo ky'omwana omuberi omutuufu eyazaalibwa omukazi omunobe."
