Deuteronomy21:17 Aye aidha kuganhanga okutwala omwana ow'omukazi omunobe, nga n'omuberi. Olwo aghenga omwana oyo omugabo gwe ogw'emikuzi ebiri, ku bintu bye byonabyona by'ali nabyo. Kuba oyo n'omwana we eyasooka okuva mu maani ge. N'olw'ekyo oyo n'agwaniire ebintu ebiri n'okugheebwa omwana omuberi.”" 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Abazaire basobola okuba ni mutabane waibwe ow'empwitu era omudheemu, atagondera ise oba inhina, era nga ni bwe bamubonereza taganha kubawulira." 
Deuteronomy21:19 Abazaire abo banaamutwalanga y'abakulembeze b'ekibuga eky'ewaibwe, mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango ogwingira ekibuga ekyo," 
Deuteronomy21:20 baabakobera bati, ‘Omwana waife ono ali n'empwitu era mudheemu, taganha kugondera bye tumukoba. Ali n'omuwuudu gw'okulya era mutamiivu.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Agho abasaadha boonaboona ab'omu kibuga ekyo, baidha kumukubanga amabaale bamwite. Mu nsambo eyo munaabanga nga mwetoiremu ekibi ekyo. Agho Abaisiraeli boonaboona bwe banaawuliranga ekibairegho, baidha kutyanga.”" 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Omuntu bw'anaakolanga ekibi ekimugwaniiza okufa, era nga mumaze okumwita, ni mumughanika ku muti n'alengeedhera okwo," 
Deuteronomy21:23 omulambo gwe tiguusulenga ku muti okwo, aye munaaguziikanga ku lunaku olwo lwene. Kuba omulambo ogughanikiibwa ku muti ni gulengeedhera okwo guleeta ekikolimo kya Katonda ku nsi. Kale ni mulobenga kwonoona nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha okuba obutaka bwaimwe.”" 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Otabonanga nte ya mwino oba ntaama ye, ng'eri kubula, n'ogireka buleke. Ogiizanga y'ali." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Aye mwene yo bw'anaabanga nga tali kumpi n'iwe, oba bw'onaabanga nga tomwidhi bwidhi, olwo onaagitwalanga eka ewuwo waagikuuma okutuusa lw'aliidha ng'ali kugyagala, waagimwiriza." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Era otyo bw'onaakolanga ng'obaire oyagaine endogoyi, oba olugoye, oba ekintu kya mwino kyonakyona ekinaabanga kimubuzeeku." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Otabonanga ndogoyi ya mwino oba nte ye, ng'egwire ku ngira, n'ogibitaku bubite. Omuyambangaku mwagisitusa yaayemerera." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Omukazi atavaalanga bivaalo bya musaadha, n'omusaadha atavaalanga bivaalo bya mukazi. Kuba kiisi akola ebintu ng'oti n'ebyo, aba kyenhinhalwa ye Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Bw'onaayagaananga ekisu eky'enhonhi ku muti oba ghansi, nga kirimu amagi oba obwana, n'enhonhi ng'eri ku bwana bwayo oba ku magi gaayo, otagitwalanga na bwana obwo." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Onaabanga wa idembe okutwala obwana aye waalekula inhaabwo, oghange okubanga obukalamu n'okughangaala." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Bw'onaazimbanga endhu ey'akasolya abantu kwe basobola okutyama, akasolya ako oidha kukeezunguluzanga olukomera. Olwo olobe kubangaku musango gwa kwita, bwe ghanaabangagho aghanukayo n'agwa." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Otasimbanga kirime kindi mu isamba lyo lya mizabbibu. Bw'anaakolanga ekyo, emizabbibu n'ebibala eby'ekirime ekyo byonabyona biidha kufuukanga bya isinzizo." 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Otasibanga nte na ndogoyi ku kikoligo kirala okudhirimisa. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Otavaalanga lugoye lulukiibwa nga batabika wuuzi edh'obuviiri bw'entaama, n'edh'engoye empegheevu." 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Oidha kutunganga omadhwenge ku nsonda eina edh'ekivaalo kyo.” 
Deuteronomy22:13 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Omusaadha asobola okubayiza omukazi, yaaba naye, aye nga ghabiseegho ekiseera yaamukyagha." 
Deuteronomy22:14 Olwo yaamughaghabira ng'amwogeraku eby'ensoni, era yaayonoona eriina lye ng'akoba ati, ‘Nabayiza omukazi ono, aye bwe naba naye naamwagaana nga ti mwegha.’" 
Deuteronomy22:15 “Ekyo bwe kinaabangagho, abazaire b'omughala oyo banaatwalanga eisuuka eryakozesebwa ku buliri ku lunaku lule, baalyoleka abakulembeze ab'ekibuga mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango ogwingira ekibuga, okukakasa ng'omughala yali mwegha." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Lata w'omughala oyo aidha kukoberanga abakulembeze ati, Omusaadha ono namugha mughala wange okumubayiza, aye mpegaano amukyaye." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Era wuuno amughaghabiire ng'amwogeraku eby'ensoni, ng'akoba ati yamwagaana nga ti mwegha. Aye amabala g'omusaayi gano, n'obumanhiso obwoleka nga mughala wange yali mwegha. Olwo baayandhuluza eisuuka mu maiso g'abakulembeze b'ekibuga." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Agho abakulembeze b'ekibuga banaagemanga omusaadha ole baamubonereza. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Era baidha kumutanzanga ebitundu kikumi ebya feeza babighe ise w'omughala, kuba omusaadha oyo yayonoona eriina ly'omughala omwegha Omuisiraeli. Omughala oyo aidha kusigalanga ng'akaali mukazi we, era omusaadha oyo mu bulamu bwe bwonabwona taabingenga mukazi oyo." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Aye omusaadha oyo by'akoba bwe binaabanga ebituufu, nga ghazira bukakafu bwoleka nti omughala yali mwegha," 
Deuteronomy22:21 baidha kufulumyanga omughala oyo ku mulyango gw'endhu ya ise, abasaadha ab'omu kibuga ky'ewaibwe bamukube amabaale bamwite; kuba yakola eky'ensoni mu Isiraeli, yaaba n'omusaadha ate ng'akaali mu ndhu ya ise. Mutyo bwe muneetoolangaku ekibi ekyo." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Omusaadha bw'anaayagaanibwanga ng'ali n'omukazi ow'omusaadha owundi mu buliri, bombi omusaadha n'omukazi baidha kwitibwanga. Mu nsambo eyo munaabanga nga mwetoireku ekibi ekyo mu Isiraeli." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Ghasobola okubaagho omughala omwegha eyamala okwandhula omusaadha, aye omusaadha owundi yaayagaana omughala oyo mu kibuga, era yaaba naye." 
Deuteronomy22:24 Ekyo bwe kinaabangagho, bombi mwidha kubafulumyanga, ku luya kw'omulyango gw'ekibuga ekyo, mubakube amabaale bafe. Omughala aidha kwitibwanga olw'obutakuba nduulu ate nga yali mu kibuga. N'omusaadha aidha kwitibwanga olw'okuba yakaka muka beene yaaba naye. Mu nsambo eyo munaabanga nga mwetoireku ekibi ekyo." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Aye omusaadha bw'anaayagaananga omughala eyamala okwandhula ng'ali eyo mu kifo omuzira bantu ekiri eghala n'ekibuga, memale n'amukaka n'aba naye, olwo omusaadha yenka n'anaitibwanga." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Mutabangaku kabi ke mutuusa ku mughala oyo, kuba aidha kubanga ng'azira kibi kimugwaniza kufa. Ekikolwa ekyo kifaanana ng'oti n'eky'omuntu alumba mwine n'amutemula." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Kuba omusaadha yayagaana omughala oyo, eyo mu kifo omuzira bantu, omughala oyo yaakuba enduulu, aye ghaabulagho amwiruukirira." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Ghasobola okubaagho omusaadha, yaayagaanibwa ng'akase omughala omwegha akaali kwandhula, era yaaba naye." 
Deuteronomy22:29 Omusaadha oyo aidha kughanga lata w'omughala oyo ebitundu ataanu ebya feeza, era omughala oyo aidha kufuukanga mukazi we. Kuba yamala okumukaka yaaba naye, era omusaadha oyo mu bulamu bwe bwonabwona, taabingenga mukazi oyo." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Omusaadha atawemulanga ise ng'aba n'owundi ku baka ise mu buliri.” 
Deuteronomy23:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Oyo ye baaniantula oba ye baasalaku ekitundu ky'omubiri gwe eky'ekyama, taabalirwenga mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda." 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Omwana azaalibwa embali, ghalala n'abaidhukulu abanaamuvangamu boonaboona, okutuukira irala ku luse olweikumi, tibaabalirwenga mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda." 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Omuammoni n'Omumoabu, ni baidhukulu baibwe, okutuukira irala ku luse olweikumi, tibaabalirwenga mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Kuba mu lugendo lwaimwe nga muli kuva e Misiri, baaloba okubagha emere n'amaadhi. Era baagulirira Balaamu mutabane wa Beori ow'e Pethori ekibuga ky'e Mesopotamia, okubakolimira." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Aye Musengwa Katonda waimwe yabagonza, yaaloba kuwulirisa bya Balaamu. Mu kifo eky'ekikolimo, yaabaghaamu nkabi." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Mutakolereranga kuleetagho miraala na bantu abo enaku dhoonadhoona, waire okubayamba babe obukalamu." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Mutanhoomanga Baedomu, kuba baluganda n'imwe. Mutanhoomanga Bamisiri, kuba mwaliku basenze mu nsi yaibwe." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Baidhukulu baibwe okuva ku luse olwokusatu n'okweyongerayo, banaikirizibwanga okubalirwa mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Deuteronomy23:9 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe munaabanga nga muli mu kifo ghe musimbye weema dhaimwe nga muja okulwanisa abazigu baimwe, mwekuumenga mulobe kutuukibwaku kintu kibi kyonakyona." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Bwe ghanaabangagho omusaadha afuuse atali mulongoofu olw'okuva amaadhi ag'obusaadha ng'aloota, aidha kuvanga mu kifo ghe musimbye weema dhaimwe abe kuliya." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Aye eigulo bwerinaatuukanga aidha kunaabanga n'amaadhi, aire mu kifo ghe musimbye weema dhaimwe ng'endhuba egwire." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Mwidha kubanga n'ekifo okuva agho ghe musimbye weemwa dhaimwe. Eyo ye mwidhanga okuja okweyamba. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Mwidha kubanga n'ekintu eky'okusimisa nga kiri ghalala n'eby'okulwanisa byaimwe. Kale ole bw'anaajanga okweyamba, aidhanga kusima ekiina. Ate ng'amaze okweyamba, aidha kukiziikiranga." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Mukuumenga ekifo ghe munaasimbanga weema dhaimwe nga kirongoofu. Kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kubanga ghalala n'imwe mu kifo ekyo ng'abakuuma, olwo abasobozesenga okughangula abazigu baimwe. Mweghalenga ekintu ekibi kyonakyona, ekighanga okumusungughaza n'abavaaku n'abalekulira agho.”" 
Deuteronomy23:15 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Omwiru bw'aneibanga ku musengwa we n'aidha n'asenga ewuwo, otamwizangayo ye musengwa we oyo." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Aidha kubanga ewaimwe mu kifo ky'anaabanga ng'alonzeegho, mu kindi ku bibuga byaimwe. Mutamukiriganga naire." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Ghatabangagho mukazi oba musaadha nga Muisiraeli anaakolanga obwamalaaya obw'omu isabo. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Empiiya edhifuniibwa omukazi oba omusaadha mu bwamalaaya, mutadhireetanga mu ndhu ya Musengwa Katonda waimwe okutuukiriza bye mweyama, kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe yeenhinhata obwamalaaya." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Baisiraeli banaimwe bwe munaabawolanga empiiya, oba emere, oba ekintu ekindi kyonakyona, mutabatoolangaku magoba." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Mwidha kubanga ba idembe okutoola amagoba ku basenze nga mubawoze. Aye mutatoolanga magoba ku Baisiraeli banaimwe be muwoze. Olwo Musengwa Katonda waimwe abaghenga enkabi mu byonabyona bye munaakolanga, eyo mu nsi ye muja okutwala okuba obutaka bwaimwe." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Bwe munaabangaku ni kye mweyamye okukolera Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mutalobanga kukituukiriza mangu. Kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe taliroba kukibabuuza ni kibaviiramu okwonoona." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Aye bwe muteeyamenga kintu kyonakyona, timuubengaku kibi kye mukoze." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Ekyo kye munaabanga nga musuubiiza Musengwa Katonda waimwe, nga ghazira abakase, mufubenga okukituukiriza." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Bw'onaabitanga mu isamba ery'emizabbibu ery'omuntu owundi, onaabanga wa idembe okulya ku mizabbibu nga bw'oyenda. Aye otabangaku muzabbibu waire omulala guti gw'otwalira mu kintu kyo." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Bw'onaabitanga mu musiri ogw'omuntu owundi, onaabanga wa idembe okunoga ku ngaano waalya. Aye otasalangaku kifaaganda kya ngaano waire ekirala kiti okugikesa.”" 
Deuteronomy24:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Ghasobola okubaagho musaadha, yaabayiza omukazi. Aye ekiseera nga kibiseegho, omukazi oyo yaaba nga takaasanhusa musaadha oyo, olw'omusaadha okuba ng'amuboinemu ekitali kirungi. Ekyo bwe kinaabanga kityo, olwo omusaadha oyo aidha kumughandiikiranga embaluwa ey'okumubinga, agimugemye, era amusiibule mu maka ge." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Ate kisoboka okuba nti omukazi oyo ng'aviire mu maka ago, aja yaabayira omusaadha owundi." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Era iba oyo owokubiri yeena yaamukyagha, yaamughandiikira embaluwa ey'okumubinga, era yaamusiibula mu maka ge, oba iba oyo owokubiri yaafa bufe." 
Deuteronomy24:4 Ekyo bwe kinaabanga kityo, olwo iba ole eyasooka okumubinga tairengamu kabiri kumubayiza. Omukazi oyo aidha kubanga ng'amaze okufuulibwa atali mulongoofu. Okwiramu okumubayiza kiba kyenhinhalwa ye Musengwa Katonda. Mutakolanga kibi kyaga agho mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha okuba obutaka bwaimwe.”" 
Deuteronomy24:5 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Omusaadha bw'anaabanga nga yaakamala okubayiza, taajenga kulwana mu magye oba okukozesebwanga omulimo ogundi gwonagwona ogw'okukolera obulungi bw'ensi. Baidha kumulekanga abe ghaka okumala omwaka mulamba, aghange okusanhuka ni mukazi we y'abayiiza." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Bw'owolanga mwino eibandha, otamutoolangaku lubengo lwe oba enso ye ng'omusingo. Okwo kuba ng'oti n'okubatoolaku obulamu ng'omusingo." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Omuntu bw'anaawuuyanga Muisiraeli mwine n'amufuula omwiru we oba n'amutunda, aidha kwitibwanga bwitibwe, olwo musobole okwetoolaku ekibi ekyo." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Bwe munaalwalanga endwaire ey'ebigenge, mwidha kwegenderezanga okubona nga mutuukiriza byonabyona bakabona Abalevi bye babakoba. Bye nalagira bakabona abo bye mube mujiirengaku." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Mwidhukire Musengwa Katonda waimwe kye yakola Miriamu, bwe mwali mu lugendo nga muva e Misiri." 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Bw'onaabangaku n'eibandha ly'owoze mwino, otaingiranga mu ndhu ye okutoolayo ekivaalo ky'aja okukugha ng'omusingo." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Oidha kwemereranga kuliya, ole y'owoze akikuleetere mwene." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Era bw'anaabanga omwavu, ky'akusingiire otakisigazanga kutuusa nkyo." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Oidha kukimwirizanga eigulo aghange okukisulamu. Olwo akusabire enkabi, era Musengwa Katonda wo akusiime olw'okukola ekituufu." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Omuntu akolera empeera, nga mwavu era ng'ali mu bwetaavu, otamutetenkerezanga n'olobera ku mpeera ye, k'abe Muisiraeli mwino, oba omusenze aba mu kindi ku bibuga byaimwe." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Buli lunaku lw'akoze oidhanga kumugha empeera ye ng'endhuba ekaali kugwa kuba empeera ye agyetaaga, era aba ng'ateegereire okugifuna. Bw'otaagimughenga, aidha kuliriranga Musengwa Katonda ng'akughaghabira, olwo obeeku omusango olw'ekibi ekyo." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Abazaire mutabaitanga lwa misango baana baibwe gye baiziiza, n'abaana mutabaitanga lwa misango bazaire baibwe gye baiziiza. Omuntu aidha kwitibwanga lwa musango gw'anaabanga ng'aiziiza mwene." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Mutasalirizanga nga musala omusango ogw'omusenze waire ogwa mulekwa. Era mutatoolanga ku namwandu kivaalo kye ng'omusingo ogw'eibandha lye mwamuwola. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Mwidhukire nga mwali bairu mu Misiri, Musengwa Katonda waimwe yaabanunula. Kyenva ndi kubagha ekiragiro kino." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Bwe munaakungulanga ebirime byaimwe, aye ni mwerabirayo ekinhwa ky'engaano mu misiri, mutairangayo kukitoolayo. Ekyo mwidha kukirekeranga abasenze, ni bamulekwa, ni banamwandu. Olwo Musengwa Katonda waimwe aghange okubaghanga enkabi mu byonabyona bye munaakolanga." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Bwe munaamalanga okughanula ebibala ku miti emyoliva, mutairangayo ku nsaga dhaagyo kabiri kughanulaku ebisigaireku. Ebyo mwidha kubirekeranga basenze, ni bamulekwa, ni banamwandu." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Bwe munaamalanga okukungula emizabbibu mu masamba gaimwe, mutairangayo kulonderera gisigairemu. Egyo mwidha kugirekerenga basenze, ni bamulekwa, ni banamwandu." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Mwidhukire nga mwali bairu mu Misiri, Musengwa Katonda waimwe yaabanunula. Kyenva ndi kubagha ekiragiro kino.”" 
Deuteronomy25:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Ghasobola okubaagho Abaisiraeli babiri nga bali n'enkaayana ghagati ghaibwe. Baaja y'abalamuzi baabagha ensala owundi yaasinga omusango, ate owundi gwamusinga." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Ole ye gusinze bw'anaabanga ng'aiziiza omusango ogumugwaniza okukubwa, omulamuzi aidha kulagiranga bamulambaaze mu maiso ge, memale bamukube emikuzi egisaanira omusango gwe yaiza." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Omulamuzi asobola okumusalira okumukuba emikuzi egighera amakumi ana, aye taidha kuswikangagho. Okumukuba egisinga agho kuba kumuswaza mu baine." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Otasibanga nte munwa bw'eba ng'emulungula engaano.” 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Abasaadha aboluganda bwe banaabanga nga baba ghalala, owundi n'afa nga tazaire mwana wa bulenzi, namwandu taabayirenga musaadha wundi atali waluganda lwa mufu. Muganda w'omufu aidha kutwalanga namwandu oyo amubayize, amukolere ekyo muganda w'omusaadha omufu ky'ateekwa okukolera namwandu." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Omwana omulenzi ye banaasookanga okuzaala baidhanga kumugulika eriina lya muganda we eyafa, olwo eriina eryo lirobe kusaanagho mu Isiraeli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Aye omusaadha oyo bw'anaabanga nga tayenda kubayiza namwandu wa muganda we, namwandu oyo anaajanga y'abakulembeze mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango ogwingira ekibuga, yaabakoba ati, ‘Muganda wa baze ali kuloba okugulika eriina lya muganda we okwidhukirwanga mu Isiraeli. Tali kwenda kunkolera ekyo muganda w'omusaadha ky'ateekwa okukolera namwandu.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Agho abakulembeze b'ekibuga banaamwetanga baayogera naye. Era bw'anaabanga ng'akaalobye okumubayiza," 
Deuteronomy25:9 namwandu wa muganda we oyo aidha kwidhanga gh'ali mu maiso g'abakulembeze, amutoolemu engaito mu kigere ekindi, amufuudhe n'amatanta mu maiso ng'amukoba ati, ‘Omusaadha aloba okuzaalira muganda we omusika, atyo bw'abisibwa.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Amaka ge mu Isiraeli ganaayetebwanga, ‘Amaka ag'eyatoolebwamu engaito.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy25:11 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Abasaadha bwe banaabanga nga bali kulwana beene na beene, memale omukazi ow'owundi n'aidha okuteekuluza iba ku ole ali kumukuba, olwo n'agema ebitundu eby'ekyama eby'ole ali kukuba iba," 
Deuteronomy25:12 omukazi oyo aidha kutemwangaku omukono aghazira kusaasira naire. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Mutabanga bakupankupania, nga mukozesa ebipimo ebitali bituufu mu kupima obuzito," 
Deuteronomy25:14 n'ebigero ebitali bituufu mu kugera obungi bw'ebintu. 
Deuteronomy25:15 Mukozesenga ebipimo ebituufu n'ebigero ebiidhuvu, memale olwo mughange okughangaalira mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe yeenhinhata kiisi akola ebibi ebiri ng'oti n'ebyo.” 
Deuteronomy25:17 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mwidhukire Abamaleki kye baabakola, bwe mwali mu lugendo nga muva e Misiri." 
Deuteronomy25:18 Baabalumba bwe mwali nga mukooye era nga muwoiremu amaani, baaloba kutya Katonda, baita boonaboona abaali nga basembyeyo einhuma waimwe, ng'amagulu gabazitoighe." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Agho ni, Musengwa Katonda waimwe bw'alibagha okutyama mu nsi ni mutereera, n'atoolagho abazigu baimwe boonaboona ababeezungulwire mu nsi y'ali kubagha okuba obutaka bwaimwe, mulizikiriza Abamaleki abo mwabasaaniagho, baaloba kwidhukirwanga ku nsi. Muteerabiranga kukola ekyo.”" 
Deuteronomy26:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe mulimala okutwala ensi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha okuba obutaka bwaimwe, ni mugityamamu ni mutereera," 
Deuteronomy26:2 buli muntu aidha kutanga mu kiibo ku birime bye byonabyona ebisooka okukungulwa. Abitwale mu kifo Musengwa Katonda waimwe ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu. 
Deuteronomy26:3 Aidha kujanga ye kabona anaabangagho mu kiseera ekyo, amukobe ati, ‘Olwaleero ndi kwatula ye Musengwa Katonda wo nti naingira mu nsi ye yasuubiza badhaadha baife okutugha.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Agho kabona anaatoolanga ekiibo mu ngalo dhe, yaakita ghansi mu maiso g'alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda wo." 
Deuteronomy26:5 “Olwo aidha kwogeranga ebibono bino mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda wo, oti, Dhaadha wange yali Muaramea ng'atambulatambula eyo atyo. Yaja e Misiri yaaba eyo n'ab'omu maka ge abataali bangi naire. Aye bwe baatuuka eyo baayala, baafuuka eighanga eikologho ery'amaani." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Abamisiri baatubisa bubi, baatukozesanga emirimo emikalangafu, obulamu bwatukaayira." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Agho twalirira Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baife, yaawulira okulira kwaife. Yaabona Abamisiri bwe baatudaazadaaza nga batukooya era nga batukiriga." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Yaatutoola mu Misiri ng'akozesa amaani ge agataloodheka. Yaakola ebyewuunhio n'ebyewuninkiriza, era yaaleetera ebintu ebitiisa einho okubaagho." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Yaatuleeta ghano, yaatugha ensi eno engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Era mpegaano bona, ndeese ku birime bye nsoose okukungula mu itaka lye wampa, iwe Musengwa Katonda. “Agho aidha kutanga ebintu ebyo agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda we era amusinzizenga agho." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Aidha kusagambiranga ghalala n'ab'omu maka ge, n'abalevi, n'abasenze ababa mu imwe, olw'ebirungi byonabyona Musengwa Katonda we by'anaabanga ng'amughaire." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Buli mwaka ogwokusatu aidha kuleetanga ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi eky'ebirime by'akungwire mu mwaka ogwo, akighe Abalevi, n'abasenze, ni bamulekwa, ni banamwandu, boona balyenga baigute. Bw'onaamalanga okukola ekyo," 
Deuteronomy26:13 olwo oidha kwogeranga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda wo oti, ‘Ebintu byo ebitukuvu eby'ekintu ekirala ku buli bintu ikumi bye nkungwire, mbitoire mu ndhu yange naabigha Abalevi, n'abasenze, ni bamulekwa, ni banamwandu, nga bwe wandagira okukola. Ghazira kiragiro kyo waire ekirala kye ntatuukiriiza, oba kye neerabiire." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Ku bintu byo ebyo ebitukuvu, ghazira waire ekirala kye ndiireku nga ndi mu kulira abafu, oba okukitoola mu ndhu yange nga tiri mulongoofu, oba okukitoolaku ekitundu ni nkighaayo y'abafu. Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkoze nga bw'okoba, era naatuukiriza byonabyona bye wandagira." 
Deuteronomy26:15 linga ghansi ng'oli mu igulu mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu, owe enkabi abantu bo Abaisiraeli, era owe enkabi n'ensi engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala y'otughaire, nga bwe wasuubiza badhaadha baife.’" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Olwaleero Musengwa Katonda waimwe ali kubalagira okutuukirizanga amateeka ago n'ebiragiro. Agho ni mwegenderezenga okubituukiriza n'omutima gwaimwe gwonagwona, n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Mukakaisa olwaleero muti Musengwa Katonda ni Katonda waimwe, era nga mwidha kujiiranga ku by'alagira, nga mukuuma amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Era Musengwa Katonda akakaisa olwaleero ati muli eighanga erirye ku bubwe nga bwe yasuubiza. Era yaabalagira okugemanga ebiragiro bye byonabyona," 
Deuteronomy26:19 memale olwo abafuule bakologho okusinga amaghanga agandi goonagoona ge yatonda abantu babasaakenga era babatengamu ekitiisa, nga muli bamanhifu, era mubeerenga irala ighanga lya Musengwa Katonda nga bwe yasuubiza.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Agho Musa, ng'ali ghalala n'abakulembeze b'Abaisiraeli, yaakoba abantu ati: “Mukuumenga ebiragiro byonabyona bye ndi kubagha olwaleero." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Ku lunaku lwe mulisomoka omwiga Yorudani, ni mwingira mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha, mulisimba amabaale amakologho, mwagasiigaku langi endheru." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Olwo mwaghandiikaku ebibono byonabyona eby'amateeka gano nga mumaze okusomoka, ni mwingira mu nsi Musengwa Katonda, Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha, engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala, Musengwa Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe oyo ye yabasuubiza." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Kale, nga mumaze okusomoka omwiga Yorudani, mulisimba amabaale ago ku lusozi Ebali, nga bwendi kubalagira olwaleero, era mwagasiigaku langi endheru." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Eyo mulizimbirayo Musengwa Katonda waimwe alutaari ey'amabaale ge mutakozeisa kyuma kugaawuzaamu. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Kuba alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mwidha kugizimbisanga mabaale gatali mateme gaaku. Era ku alutaari okwo kwe mwidha okugheerangayo ye Musengwa Katonda waimwe ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Mwidha kughangayo omusengo ogw'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, muliirenga eyo era musagambirenga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Era mulighandiikira irala bukalamu ku mabaale ago, ebibono byonabyona eby'amateeka ago.”" 
Deuteronomy27:9 Agho Musa ng'ali ni bakabona Abalevi, yaakoba Abaisiraeli boonaboona ati: “Musirike muwulire, imwe Abaisiraeli. Olwaleero mufuuse ighanga lya Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Kale ni mumuwulirenga era mutuukirizenga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, bye ndi kubagha olwaleero.”" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Agho Musa yaasikirira abantu ku lunaku olwo ng'akoba ati: 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Bwe mulimala okusomoka omwiga Yorudani, ab'ebika bino n'abalyemerera ku lusozi Gerizimu okusabira abantu enkabi: ekika ekya Simeoni, n'ekya Levi, n'ekya Yuda, n'ekya Issakari, n'ekya Yosefu, n'ekya Benjamini." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Ate ab'ebika bino n'abalyemerera ku lusozi Ebali okukolima: ekika ekya Reubeni, n'ekya Gadi, n'ekya Ashera, n'ekya Zebuluni, n'ekya Dani, n'ekya Nafutali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Olwo Abalevi balikoba Abaisiraeli boonaboona mu mamiro ag'amaani bati: 
Deuteronomy27:15 ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaakolanga ekifaananie ekibaadhe, oba ekisaanuusiibwa mu kyuma, memale n'akitaagho n'akisinza, akolimirwenga! Kuba okusinza ebitali Katonda kiba ekyenhinhalwa ye Musengwa Katonda.’ Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “ ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaanhoomanga ise oba inhina, akolimirwenga!’ “Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaakyusanga embibi edh'ekibandha kya muliraanwa we, akolimirwenga! “Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaabuzanga omutulu okumutoola ku ngira entuufu, akolimirwenga!’ “Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaasalirizanga omusango ogw'omusenze ni mulekwa ni namwandu, akolimirwenga!’ Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘Omusaadha yeenayeena anaawemulanga ise, ng'aba n'owundi ku baka ise oyo mu buliri, akolimirwenga!’ “Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaabanga n'ensolo, mu nsambo abasaadha ye baba n'abakazi mu buliri, akolimirwenga!’ “Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:22 “ ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaabanga ni mwanhina mu buliri, waire nga mwanhina ku ise oba ku inhina, akolimirwenga!’ “Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaabanga n'inhazaala we mu buliri, akolimirwenga!’ “Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaatemulanga mwine mu ngiso, akolimirwenga!’ “Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaaganhanga okugulirirwa okutemula omuntu aziraku musango, akolimirwenga!’ “Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Omuntu yeenayeena ataatuukirizenga mateeka gano, akolimirwenga!’ “Olwo abantu boonaboona baliiramu bati, ‘Amiina.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy28:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Bwe muneekalangulanga okuwulira Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ni mugema ebiragiro bye byonabyona bye ndi kubagha olwaleero, era ni mubituukiriza, Musengwa Katonda waimwe alibafuula eighanga eikologho erisinga amaghanga agandi goonagoona agali ku nsi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Bwe munaawuliranga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, enkabi dhino dhoonadhoona dhinaabaidhiranga, mwadhifuna." 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Mwidha kubanga n'enkabi mu bibuga byaimwe, era mubenga n'enkabi ni mu nimiro dhaimwe." 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Mwidha kubanga n'enkabi, muzaale abaana kamaala era mwaze ebirime, n'ente, n'entaama, n'embuzi." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Mwidha kubanga n'enkabi mulimenga, era mufunenga amakungula mangi, n'emere ey'okulya kamaala." 
Deuteronomy28:6 “Mwidha kubanga n'enkabi nga mwingira era mubenga n'enkabi nga mufuluma. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Musengwa Katonda aidha kuleeteranga abazigu baimwe abanaabalumbanga, okughangulwa nga mubona. Baidha kwidhiranga mu ngira ndala nga baidha okubalumba, aye baidha kwirirangayo mu ngira kamaala nga bali kughaba okulumuka okuva ghe muli." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kubaghanga enkabi mu byonabyona bye munaakolanga, aidhuzenga emere mu byagi byaimwe. Aidha kubaghanga enkabi mu nsi y'ali kubagha." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Bwe munaawuliranga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ni mujiira ku ebyo by'abalagira, aidha kubakuumanga nga muli ighanga lye eitukuvu, nga bwe yabasuubiza." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Olwo amaghanga goonagoona ag'oku nsi gaidha kubatyanga, nga gabona Musengwa Katonda nga bw'abeeta abantu be abalondemu." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Era Musengwa Katonda aidha kubaghanga ebirungi kamaala, muzaale abaana, mube n'ebyayo bingi era mwaze ebirime mu itaka lyaimwe, mu nsi Musengwa Katonda ye yasuubiza badhaadha baimwe okubagha." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Musengwa Katonda aidha kubaigulirangagho eiterekero lye ery'ebirungi, eigulu ligwisenga amaadhi mu nsi yaimwe mu biseera byago. Era aidha kubaghanga enkabi mu byonabyona bye munaakolanga, musobole okuwolanga amaghanga kamaala, aye nga imwe timugeewolwaku." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Musengwa Katonda aidha kubafuulanga bakulemberamu, se ti abasembayo. Mwidha kweyongeranga ghaigulu se ti kwika ghansi, kasita munaawuliranga ebiragiro bye byonabyona bye ndi kubagha olwaleero, ni mubikuuma era ni mubituukiriza." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Mwegenderezenga mulobe kudaaliima kuva ku ebyo bye ndi kubalagira olwaleero, na kujiira ku bakatonda bandi waire okubasinza.”" 
Deuteronomy28:15 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Aye bwe munaalobanga okuwulira Musengwa Katonda waimwe, n'okugema amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye n'obwegendereza, ebikolimo bino byonabyona biidha kubaidhiranga era bibabeeku:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 Mwidha kukolimirwanga mu bibuga byaimwe, era mukolimirwenga ni mu nimiro dhaimwe." 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Amakungula gaimwe gaidha kukolimirwanga n'emere ye munaafumbanga okulya yoona ekolimirwe. 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Abaana baimwe be munaazaalanga baidha kukolimirwanga, n'ebirime bye munaalimanga mu itaka lyaimwe, ghalala n'ente n'entaama, n'embuzi dhaimwe, byona bikolimirwe." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “Mwidha kukolimirwanga nga mwingira, era mukolimirwenga nga mufuluma." 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Bwe munaakolanga ebibi ni muva ku Musengwa Katonda, Musengwa Katonda oyo aidha kubasindikiranga ebikolimo, okusoberwa era n'okutabulwa, mu byonabyona bye munaakolanga, okutuusa lwe mulizikirizibwa ni muwaagho amangu geene." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Aidha kubasindikiranga kawumpuli abeesibengaku, okutuusa lw'anaabamalangagho mwenamwena okubaita, mu nsi ye muli kuja okwingiramu okutwala." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Musengwa Katonda aidha kubasindikiranga endwaire edhitawonezeka, n'omusuudha, n'okuzimba, n'okwokerera okungi. Aidha kubasindikiranga endoboozi, n'okuvuluka kw'ebirime. Ebyo byonabyona biidha kubeesibangaku okutuusa lwe munaazikiriranga." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Ku igulu kwidha kubanga kukalu ng'oti n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, nga tikugwisa maadhi. Era eitaka lyaimwe liidha kukalanga, libbalanguke ng'oti n'ekyuma ekigumu einho." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Mu kifo ky'amaadhi okugwa, Musengwa Katonda aidha kubasindikiranga kiwunga alimu enkungu n'omusenho mu nsi yaimwe, okutuusa lwe munaazikiriranga." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Musengwa Katonda aidha kuleeteranga abazigu baimwe babaghangulenga nga babona. Mwidha kujiiranga mu ngira ndala nga muja okubalumba, aye mwidha kwiriranga mu ngira kamaala nga muli kughaba okulumuka okuva ghe bali. Amaghanga goonagoona ku nsi bwe ganaabonanga ebibatuuseeku, gaidha kutyanga inho." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Era nga mufiire, enhonhi n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhiidha kulyanga emirambo gyaimwe, nga ghazira adhibingagho." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Musengwa Katonda aidha kubasindikiranga amabuubuuto nga ge yalwaza Abamisiri. Abalwaze n'amabwa, n'ebizimba, n'omubiri okusiigha. Ebyo byonabyona nga tibiwona." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Musengwa Katonda aidha kubagwisanga eiralu, abafuulenga batulu, era abaleeterenga okusoberwa." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Mwidha kughaamantanga mu kasana ghagati, ng'oti n'omutulu bw'aghaamanta mu nzikiiza, era timuubenga na nkabi mu bye mukola. Mwidha kutuntuzibwanga era munhagibwengaku ebyaimwe buli kiseera, nga ghazira ababeera." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Mwidha kwandhulanga abakazi, aye abasaadha abandi n'abaidhanga okubatwala babe nabo. Mwidha kuzimbanga endhu, aye mulobe kudhibangamu. Era mwidha kusimbanga amasamba g'emizabbibu, aye mulobe kukungulanga ku bibala byago." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Ente dhaimwe dhiidha kwitibwanga nga mubona, aye timuulyenga ku mamba yaadho. Endogoyi dhaimwe baidha kudhibanhagangaku era tibaadhibairizenga. Entaama dhaimwe baidha kudhigabiranga abazigu baimwe, era imwe ghazira anaababeeranga." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Batabane baimwe ni baghala baimwe ndidha kubagabiranga abamaghanga agandi nga mubona. Buli lunaku munaakandanga kumoga nga mwenda baire, aye nga muzira kye musobola kukolagho." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Ab'eighanga erindi balinhaga emere ye mwafaabiikana okulima ku itaka lyaimwe era ni bye mwadaagirira ebindi byonabyona, aye nga imwe babatuntuza butuntuze na kubabisa bubi." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Enaku eyo ye munaabonanga eidha kubasuulanga bwa iralu. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Musengwa Katonda aidha kubasindikiranga amabuubuuto ga kokolo ku makiryaivu ni ku magulu, era gabaidhulenga okuva ku bigere okutuuka ku mutwe." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Musengwa Katonda aidha kubatwalanga mu ighanga erindi imwe ni badhaadha baimwe lye mutabangamuuku. Aidha kubatwalanga ghalala ni kyabazinga ye munaabanga nga mutairegho okubafuga. Mu ighanga eryo ye mulisinziza bakatonda abaabaadhibwa mu miti ni mu mabaale. 
Deuteronomy28:37 Mu nsi Musengwa Katonda mw'anaabanga ng'abatwaire, abantu baayo bwe banaabonanga ebibatuuseeku, baidhanga kutya inho, olwo mufuuke eky'okwogerwaku era eky'okuyeeyereza." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Mwidha kusiganga ensigo kamaala mu nimiro, aye mwidha kukungulanga kitono, kuba enzige dhiidha kulyanga ebirime byaimwe." 
Deuteronomy28:39 “Mwidha kusimbanga amasamba g'emizabbibu era mugalabirirenga bukalamu, aye timuukungulengamu mizabbibu, waire okunhwa ku mwenge gwagyo, kuba obusiisa bwidha kugiryanga." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Mwidha kubanga n'emiti emyoliva woonawoona mu kiketezo kyaimwe, aye timwesiigenga ku muzigo gwagyo, kuba ebibala byagyo biidha kukunkumukanga." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Mwidha kuzaalanga abaana abalenzi n'abaghala aye timuubenga ghalala nabo, kuba abazigu baimwe baidha kubabatwalangaku mu bunhage." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Emiti n'ebirime byaimwe byonabyona, biidha kuliibwanga enzige." 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Abasenze ababa mu nsi yaimwe baidha kweyongeranga okukulankulana okusinga imwe, aye nga imwe mweyongera bwa kuba bubi." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Beene baidha kubawolanga, aye imwe timuubenga na kye musobola kubawola. Beene n'abaidha okukulemberangamu imwe musembeyo." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Ebikolimo ebyo byonabyona biidha kubaidhiranga era bibabeeku, okutuusa lwe mulizikirizibwa. Kuba mwaloba okuwulira Musengwa Katonda waimwe, n'okugema amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, bye yabagha." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Ebikolimo ebyo biidha kubabangaku imwe ni baidhukulu baimwe enaku dhoonadhoona, bibenga ebyewuunhio n'ebyewuninkiriza." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Musengwa Katonda waimwe yabagha ebirungi kamaala, aye imwe mwaloba okumusinza n'omwoyo ogw'eisanhu n'okusagamba." 
Deuteronomy28:48 Kale ni aidha kubasindikiranga abazigu, imwe mufuuke bagheereza baibwe, endhala n'endiwo bibalumenga, nga muli madu era nga muzira kintu kyonakyona kye muli nakyo. Musengwa Katonda oyo aidhanga kubaleetera okutuntuzibwa einho, okutuusa lwe mulizikirizibwa." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Musengwa Katonda alibasindikira abantu ab'eighanga erindi, aboogera olulimi lwe mutategeera. Abantu abo alibatoola ku nkomerero y'ensi, baabalumba nga baziinhuuka ng'oti n'enkookooma bw'eziinhuuka." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Balimoga bukambwe bwereere, nga tibafa ku bakaire, waire okusaasira abaana abato." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Balirya ensolo dhaimwe n'emere yaimwe ye mulimye, aghazira kubalekeragho ngaano, na mwenge gwa mizabbibu, na muzigo gwa bibala bya miti myoliva, oba ente, n'entaama, n'embuzi. Balikola batyo okutuusa lwe balibasaanizaagho irala." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Balibazingiza mu bibuga byaimwe byonabyona okubyezunguluza, mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha. Balibazingiza mu bibuga byaimwe ebyo, okutuusa ebimante byaimwe ebibyezungulwire ebigumu era bigulumivu bye mwesiga, lwe birigwa." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Abazigu baimwe balibazingiza okubeezunguluza, baabeeraliikiriza, mwaweeramu irala eisuubi, mwatuuka n'okulya abaana baimwe Musengwa Katonda waimwe be yabagha." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Omusaadha ow'empisa enkalamu era omwegendereza einho, alitungulira muganda we amaiso, ni mukazi we y'agonza einho, n'abaana be abaliba nga bakaasigairegho, yaabaleetera okutya." 
Deuteronomy28:55 Olwo ghabule y'agha ku mamba y'abaana be beene b'aliba ali kulya, ng'abuliirwa ekintu ekindi eky'okulya olw'okuzingizibwa okw'ebibuga ebyo." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Omukazi ow'empisa enkalamu era omwegendereza einho, ataganha na kuniina kigere ku itaka olw'okuba ow'ekitiisa era omukombe, alitungulira iba y'agonza einho amaiso era yaagatungulira n'abaana be," 
Deuteronomy28:57 yaabalyaku mu ngiso omwana y'azaire n'ekitani kyaku, olw'okubulwa eby'okulya ng'abazigu bazingiiza ebibuga byaimwe okubyezunguluza." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Bwe mutaagemenga biri mu mateeka gano goonagoona agaaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kino ni mu bituukiriza, era bwe mutaatyenga liina lya Musengwa Katonda waimwe ery'ekitiisa erireetera abantu okumutya," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Musengwa Katonda oyo aidha kubasindikiranga imwe n'eizaire lyaimwe ebibamba n'okudaazibwadaazibwa nga tibisalaku, era abasindikirenga n'endwaire embi edhitawonezeka." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Era aidha kwiramu okubalwazanga endwaire embi edh'e Misiri, dhibeesibengaku nga tidhiwona." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Era aidha kubasindikiranga ebibamba n'endwaire ebya buli nsambo ebitaghandiikiibwa mu kitabo kya mateeka kino, okutuusa lwe mulizikirizibwa." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Ni bwe mulyeyongera obungi, ni muba ng'oti n'emuunienie edh'oku igulu, abaliwonagho muliba batono, kasita muliroba okuwulira Musengwa Katonda waimwe." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yasanhuka okubakolera ebirungi n'okubafuula abangi, atyo bw'aidha n'okubasaaniagho abamalegho mu nsi ye muli kuja okutwala." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “Musengwa Katonda aidha kubasansaanizanga eyo mu maghanga goonagoona, okuva ensi y'eva okutuuka y'ekanga. Eyo ye mwidha okusinzizanga bakatonda abaabaadhibwa mu miti ni mu mabaale, imwe ni badhaadha baimwe be mutasinzangaku." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Era nga muli mu maghanga ago timulityama ni mutereera naire oba okubaaku ni ghe mweta aghaimwe. Aye Musengwa Katonda alibaleetera okutya, n'okweraliikirira, n'okuwaamu eisuubi." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Obulamu bwaimwe bwidha kubanga mu kabi ekiseera kyonakyona. Omusana n'obwire mwidha kubanga mu kutya, nga timwidhi bulamu bwaimwe bwebunaaba." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Enkyo bwerinaatukanga mwidha kukobanga muti, ‘Ngoli lino igulo!’ Ate eigulo bwerinaatuukanga mwidha kukobanga muti, ‘Ngoli lino nkyo!’ Ebyo mwidha kubyogeranga olw'emyoyo gyaimwe okwezinduka buli kye mubona." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Musengwa Katonda alibaizaayo n'amaato e Misiri, ye yabakoba ati timuliirayo kabiri. Nga muli eyo mwidha kweghangayo y'abazigu baimwe nga mwenda babagule mube bairu, aye tighaabenga abagula.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Eno n'endagaano Musengwa Katonda ye yalagira Musa okukola n'Abaisiraeli mu nsi Moabu, ng'eyongerwa ku ndagaano Musengwa Katonda ye yakola nabo ku lusozi Sinai." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Musa yaayeta Abaisiraeli boonaboona, yaabakoba ati: “Mwabona n'amaiso gaimwe ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yakola mu nsi Misiri ku kyabazinga waayo, ni ku bakungu be, ni ku bantu b'ensi eyo boonaboona." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Mwabona ebibamba bye yasindika, n'ebyewuunhio bye yakola, ghalala n'ebyewuninkiriza." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Aye n'okutuusa mpegaano, Musengwa Katonda akaali kubagha kutegeera ebyo amaiso gaimwe bye gabona, n'amatu gaimwe bye gawulira." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Namala emyaka amakumi ana nga mbakulembera mu irungu aye ebivaalo byaimwe tibyabakanukaku naire, oba engaito dhaimwe okubakutukaku." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Timwali na mere ye mulya, oba omwenge gw'emizabbibu, waire ekitamiiza ekindi kyonakyona eky'okunhwa, aye Musengwa Katonda ng'abagha byonabyona bye mwetaaga, olwo mughange okumanha nga Musengwa Katonda oyo, ni Katonda waimwe." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Era bwe twatuuka mu kifo kino, kyabazinga w'e Heshiboni eyayetebwanga Sihoni, ni kyabazinga w'e Bashani ayayetebwanga Ogi, baasituka okutulumba okutulwanisa. Aye twabaghangula," 
Deuteronomy29:8 twatwala ensi yaibwe, era twagigabania mu bika bino: ekya Reubeni, n'ekya Gadi, n'ekitundu eky'ekika kya Manasse." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Kale ni mukuumenga n'obwegendereza ebibono ebiri mu ndagaano eno era mubituukirizenga. Olwo musobole okubanga n'enkabi mu byonabyona bye mukola. 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Olwaleero mwemereire mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waimwe mwenamwena: abakulu ab'ebika, n'abakulembeze, n'abakungu, n'abasaadha," 
Deuteronomy29:11 n'abakazi, n'abaana abato, n'abasenze ababa mu imwe ababaasaagira enku ni babajiira n'amaadhi." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Mwidhie okuba mu ndagaano ya Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kukola n'imwe olwaleero, erimu okulayira okugituukiriza." 
Deuteronomy29:13 Olwo Musengwa Katonda abakuumenga nga muli bantu be, era mwene abenga Katonda waimwe, nga bwe yabasuubiza ni badhaadha baimwe Aburahamu, ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Musengwa Katonda tali kukola n'imwe mwenka endagaano eno erimu okulayira okugituukirizanga. 
Deuteronomy29:15 Aye ali kugikola n'ife twenatwena abeemereire ghano mu maiso ge olwaleero, era n'abaana baife, n'abaidhukulu abalizaalibwa." 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Mwidhi bukalamu embeera ye twalimu mu Misiri, ni bwe twatambula nga tuli kubita mu nsi dh'abamaghanga agandi." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Mwabona ebisinzibwa byaibwe ebitali Katonda ebyenhinhalwa bye baali nabyo, ebyakolebwa mu miti, mu mabaale, mu feeza, ni mu zaabu." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Mwekuumenga ghalobe kubaagho musaadha oba mukazi, oba maka, oba kika, mu bali ghano olwaleero, akyusa mwoyo gwe n'ava ku Musengwa Katonda waife, n'asinza bakatonda b'amaghanga gandi. Okukola ekyo kuba ng'oti n'omuzi ogusibuka ku kimera ekikaagha era eky'obutwa." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ghatabangagho awulira bibono bya ndagaano eno erimu okulayira, n'akoba mule ati: ‘Ndidha kuba bukalamu ni bwe nnaasigala nga tiri kujiira ku ndagaano eyo, nga neekolera byange.’ Okukola ekyo, kuba kuleetera abalungi n'ababi okuzikirira aghazira kubitiza." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Musengwa Katonda enkikidi y'egema ku lw'abantu be, taidha kusonighanga muntu oyo. Aidha kumutumbukizangaku obusungu bwe ng'oti muliro, ebikolimo byonabyona ebighandiikiibwa mu kitabo kino bimwidhirenga, okutuusa Musengwa Katonda lw'anaamusaanizangagho irala, ni yeerabirwa ku nsi." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Era Musengwa Katonda alimufuula eky'okuboneraku mu bika bya Isiraeli byonabyona, yaamutuusaaku akabi, ng'ebikolimo byonabyona eby'endagaano eghandiikiibwa mu kitabo kino eky'amateeka bwe biri." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Mu byanda ebiriidha, baidhukulu baimwe n'abasenze abanaavanga mu nsi edh'eghala, baidha kubonanga ebibamba ebiri mu nsi yaimwe, n'endwaire Musengwa Katonda dh'agireeseemu." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Balibona ng'ensi eyo yoonayoona eyokeibwa, ng'efuuse buganga bwa salufa na muunhu. Eriba nga tekaasigibwamu kantu, ng'ezira ky'esobola kubaza era nga tekaameramu isubi. Eriba ng'ezikiriziibwa nga Sodoma ni Gomorra, era ng'Adama ni Zeboiimu, Musengwa Katonda bye yagemerwa obusungu n'ekiruyi n'abizikiriza." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Abantu abamaghanga goonagoona balyebuuza bati, ‘Lwaki Musengwa Katonda akoze ekyo ku nsi eyo? Kiki ekyamusungughaza einho atyo?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Abantu baidhanga kwiramu bati, ‘Lwa kuba baamenha endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe, ye yakola nabo bwe yabatoola mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Baaja baagheereza era baasinza bakatonda be baali nga tibasinzangaku, Musengwa Katonda be yabalobera okusinza." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Musengwa Katonda oyo kyeyava n'asungughalira ensi eno, n'agireetaku ebikolimo byonabyona ebighandiikiibwa mu kitabo kino." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Musengwa Katonda ng'aidhwire obusungu era ng'ali n'ekiruyi ekibitirivu, yabasiguukulula mu nsi yaibwe, yaabasuula mu nsi eyindi n'okutuusa mpegaano.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy29:29 Musa yaayongera okukoba ati: “Ebintu Musengwa Katonda waife by'atatumanhisa, bisigala nga bya kyama. Aye yatumanhisa amateeka ge, ife ni baidhukulu baife, tughange okugakuumanga enaku dhoonadhoona.”" 
Deuteronomy30:1 Musa yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mpegaano mbaghaire okulondagho ku bintu bino ebibiri: okugheebwa enkabi oba okusindikirwa ebikolimo. Ebintu ebyo bwe birimala okubatuukaku nga muli eyo mu maghanga agandi, Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'alibasansaaniza, muliidhukiranga nga nabagha okulondagho ku ebyo." 
Deuteronomy30:2 Imwe n'abaidhukulu abaliiragho, bwe munaakyukanga ni mwira eri Musengwa Katonda waimwe, era ni mugonderanga ebiragiro bye, bye ndi kubagha olwaleero, n'omutima gwaimwe gwonagwona era n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona," 
Deuteronomy30:3 Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kubagemerwanga ekivunika. Aidha kubasolozanga eyo mu maghanga goonagoona y'anaabasansaanizanga, abaize mwiremu okuba obukalamu." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Ni bwe muliba nga musansaaniire mu nsonda dh'ensi edh'eghala, Musengwa Katonda waimwe alibasolozaayo," 
Deuteronomy30:5 yaabata mu nsi eyagheebwa badhaadha baimwe, olwo imwe mugitwale. Era yaabaleetera okuba n'ebirungi kamaala, n'okuba abangi okusinga badhaadha baimwe bwe baali." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Musengwa Katonda waimwe alireetera emyoyo gyaimwe n'egya baidhukulu baimwe abaliiragho okuba emigonvu, mwamugonza n'omutima gwaimwe gwonagwona era n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona, memale mwaba abalamu." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Alisindika ebikolimo ebyo byonabyona ku bazigu baimwe abaabakyaghanga era abaabakiriganga. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Era muliiramu kabiri okugonderanga Musengwa Katonda, n'okutuukirizanga ebiragiro bye, bye ndi kubagha olwaleero." 
Deuteronomy30:9 “Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kubaghanga enkabi kamaala mu byonabyona bye munaakolanga. Mwidha kuzaalanga abaana kamaala, n'ensolo dhaimwe dheeyongerenga okwala, era mubazenga inho ebirime. Musengwa Katonda aliiramu kabiri okuba omusangaavu okubagha enkabi, nga bweyali omusangaavu okudhigha badhaadha baimwe." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Aye muli n'okumuwuliranga n'okutuukirizanga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, ebighandiikiibwa mu kitabo kino eky'Amateeka. Era muli n'okukyuka mwaira y'ali n'omutima gwaimwe gwonagwona era n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Ebiragiro bino bye ndi kubagha olwaleero ti bizibu inho, era tibibaswikiriire." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Tibiri ku igulu, olwo mukobe muti, ‘Naani anaatuniinirayo abituleetere, memale tughange okubiwulira n'okubituukiriza.’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Era tibiri ere ng'osomoike enhandha, olwo mukobe muti, ‘Naani anaatusomokera enhandha abituleetere, memale tughange okubiwulira n'okubituukiriza?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Aye biri kumpi inho n'imwe. Bibali ku munwa, ni ku myoyo, olwo mughange okubituukirizanga." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Bona, olwaleero ndi kubagha okulondagho okuba obulungi oba okuba obubi, okuba abalamu oba okufa." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Kuba ndi kubalagira olwaleero okugonzanga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, n'okujiiranga ku by'abagalagira, n'okukuumanga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye byonabyona. Olwo mughange okubanga abalamu, muzaalenga mweyongere obungi, era Musengwa Katonda waimwe abaghenga enkabi mu nsi ye muja okutwala." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Aye bwe munaakyukanga ni mutawulira, era ni musendebwasendebwa, ni mukuba amakiryaivu okusinza bakatonda abandi n'okubagheereza," 
Deuteronomy30:18 mbalabula olwaleero nti timuliroba kuzikirira. Timulighangaalira mu nsi ye muli kuja okutwala nga musomoike omwiga Yorudani. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Ndayira olwaleero eigulu n'ensi bibe abadhulizi bange ababalumiriza, nti mbaghaire okulondagho okuba abalamu oba okufa, okugheebwa enkabi oba okukolimirwa. Kale ni mulondegho obulamu, mughange okubanga abalamu n'eizaire lyaimwe." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Mugonzenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mumuwulirenga, era mubenga beesigwa y'ali. Kuba oyo, n'obulamu bwaimwe, era n'obughanguzi bwaimwe. Olwo mwidha kubanga mu nsi Musengwa Katonda waimwe ye yasuubiza okugha badhaadha baimwe Aburahamu, ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Musa yaayongera okwogera n'Abaisiraeli," 
Deuteronomy31:2 yaabakoba ati: “Mpegaano mpeziiza emyaka kikumi n'abiri (120). Tikaaghanga kuba mukulembeze waimwe. Ate era bwona, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Toidha kusomoka mwiga guno Yorudani.’" 
Deuteronomy31:3 Musengwa Katonda waimwe n'aidha okubakulemberamu nga musomoka, azikirize abamaghanga agaliyo, nga mukaali kutuukayo, olwo mughange okutwala ensi yaibwe. Era Yoshua n'aidha okubakulembera okusomoka, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Musengwa Katonda aidha kughangula abantu abo nga bwe yaghangula bakyabazinga b'Abamori, Sihoni ni Ogi, be yazikiriza n'ensi yaibwe." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Musengwa Katonda aidha kuta abantu abo mu ngalo dhaimwe, mubakoleku nga bwe mbalagiire." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Mube bagumu era bamalirivu. Mutatya bantu abo era batabamalamu maani. Musengwa Katonda waimwe mwene, n'aidhanga okuja n'imwe. Talibavaaku, waire okubalekulira agho.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Agho Musa yaayeta Yoshua, yaamukobera agho mu maiso g'Abaisiraeli boonaboona ati: “Ba mugumu era mumalirivu. Niiwe oidha okukulembera abantu bano okuja okutwala ensi Musengwa Katonda ye yasuubiza okugha badhaadha baibwe." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Era Musengwa Katonda mwene n'aidha okukukulemberamu era abenga n'iwe. Talikuvaaku waire okukulekulira agho. Otatya era otawaamu maani.” 
Deuteronomy31:9 Agho Musa yaaghandiika Amateeka ago, yaagagemya bakabona Abalevi abaabbeedanga Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda. Era yaagagemya n'abakulembeze boonaboona aba Isiraeli." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Yaalagira bakabona Abalevi n'abakulembeze abo ati: “Buli ku nkomerero y'emyaka omusanvu, mu kiseera ekyateebwagho okusoniyirangamu abantu amabandha, mwidha kusomeranga Amateeka gano ku Kibinuko eky'Entindi." 
Deuteronomy31:11 Mwidha kugasomanga mu maiso g'Abaisiraeli boonaboona nga bawulira, nga beesoloiza okusinza Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mu kifo ky'aliba ng'alonzeegho okumusinzizangamu." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Mwidha kusolozanga abantu boonaboona, abasaadha, n'abakazi, n'abaana abato, n'abasenze ababa mu bibuga byaimwe, bawulirenga era beegenga okutya Musengwa Katonda waimwe. Era beegenderezenga nga bagema Amateeka gano goonagoona n'okugatuukiriza." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Olwo ni, baidhukulu baimwe abatagawulirangaku, baghange okwega okutya Musengwa Katonda waimwe, enaku dhoonadhoona dhe mulimala mu nsi ye muli kuja okutwala nga musomoike omwiga Yorudani.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Mpegaano osigaizaayo enaku ntono ofe. Mbeeni yeta Yoshua, mweyandhule mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, nsobole okumutaagho ng'omukulembeze wa Isiraeli.” Agho Musa ni Yoshua baaja beeyandhula mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Musengwa Katonda yaababonekera nga bali eyo, ng'ali mu kire ekyesimbye ng'oti mpango. Empango eyo yeesimba gha lwigi lw'Eweema." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Bona, oli kumpi kufa oje weeyimbe ku badhaadha bo. Aye ng'omaze okufa, abantu bano baidha kulekera agho okuba abeesigwa ye ndi. Baidha kumenha endagaano ye nakola nabo, banveeku, basinze emisambwa egy'omu nsi ye bali kuja okubangamu." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Olwo ndibasungughalira, naabalekulira agho era naabeegisaaku, baazikirizibwa. Ebizibu n'okudaazibwadaazibwa okungi biribaidhira. Olwo baategeera ng'ebyo byonabyona bibatuuseeku, lwa kuba nze Katonda waibwe tikaali ghalala nabo." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Bwenebwene ndibeegisaaku olw'ebibi bye bakoze nga bakyuka okusinza emisambwa. 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Kale ni mpegaano ghandiika olwembo luno, olwegerese Abaisiraeli olubembese. Olwembo luno n'olwidha okubanga omudhulizi wange alumiriza Abaisiraeli abo;" 
Deuteronomy31:20 kuba mpegaano ndi kuja kubaingiza mu nsi engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala ye nasuubiza badhaadha baibwe. Aye bwe balimala okulya ni baiguta era ni bageedha, balinvaaku baira ku misambwa baagisinza, nze bankyagha era baamenha endagaano yange." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Ekiseera bwekirituuka, ebizibu n'okudaazibwadaazibwa okungi ni bibaidhira, olwembo luno lwidha kwembebwanga lube omudhulizi abalumiriza, kuba ni baidhukulu baimwe tibalirwerabira naire. Ni mpegaano, nga nkaali kubatwala mu nsi ye nasuubiza okubagha, ndidhi bukalamu kye bali kudhuuba okukola.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Agho Musa yaaghandiika olwembo luno ku lunaku lwene olwo, yaalwegeresa Abaisiraeli." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaataagho Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni ng'omukulembeze wa Isiraeli, yaamukoba ati: “Ba mugumu era mumalirivu. Kuba niiwe oidha okutuusa Abaisiraeli mu nsi ye nasuubiza, era ndidha kubanga ghalala n'iwe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Musa yaaghandiika mu kitabo ebibono by'amateeka gano byonabyona aghazira kulekayo waire ekirala. 
Deuteronomy31:25 Bwe yamala okukola ekyo, yaalagira Abalevi abaabbeedanga Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda ati:" 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Mutwale ekitabo kino eky'Amateeka, mukite gha mbali gh'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda waimwe, kibenga eyo ng'obudhulizi obulumiriza abantu be." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Ndidhi bukalamu nga bwe bali abadheemu era ab'empwitu. Kuba oba nga badheemera Musengwa Katonda mpegaano nga nkaali mulamu, memale olwo tibalisinzaagho kumudheemera nga mmaze okufa?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Munsololeze abakulu boonaboona ab'ebika byaimwe n'abakulembeze baimwe, nsobole okubakobera ebibono bino nga bawulira, era ndayire eigulu n'ensi bibe abadhulizi bange ababalumiriza." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Kuba ndidhi nti bwe ndimala okufa balifuukira irala ababi, baaloba kukola bye mbalagiire. Era ye bwidha, ebizibu biribaidhira, olw'okuleetera Musengwa Katonda okusungughala nga bakola by'atayenda.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Agho Musa yaayogera ebibono by'olwembo luno byonabyona, ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona abeesoloiza bali kuwulira, ati:" 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Iwe eigulu, ntegera kutu ndhogere, n'iwe ensi, wulirisa bye nkoba." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Nsaba bye ndhegeresa bibe ng'oti n'amaadhi agali kugwa, bye ndhogera bigwe ng'oti musulo, ng'oti n'oluudhi olufuunhagala ku bimera ebigonvu, ng'oti n'olumiiyirizi ku isubi eito." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Ndidha kukobera abantu nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omukologho, ndhatule nga Katonda waife bw'ali omubbede." 
Deuteronomy32:4 Oyo n'ow'amaani atulwanirira, era akola ebituukiriire, atasaliriza nsonga. Katonda mwesigwa era wa mazima, akola mu butuufu aghazira kuboola." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Aye abantu be boonooni era tibakaali babe olw'okwonoona kwaibwe. Bafuuse ighanga idankaanu eryadaaliima. 
Deuteronomy32:6 Obwo bwene, mutyo bwe mugwaine okubisa Musengwa Katonda, imwe abantu abasiru era abatategeera? Ti ni iseimwe eyabataagho? Ti n'eyabafuula eighanga?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Mwidhukire ebiseera eby'eira, mulowooze ku myaka egy'ebyanda kamaala. Mubuuze baiseimwe ebyaligho, mubuuze badhaadha baimwe babakobere ebyabita." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene yagabira amaghanga obutaka bwago, bwe yayawulamu abantu. Yaabateeragho ensalosalo ng'ajiira ku mughendo gw'abaana ba Katonda." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Yalondamu aba Yakobo yaabafuula babe, baaba bantu be ku bubwe." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Yabaagaana nga batambulatambula eyo batyo mu irungu eikalu, eriidhwire kiwunga w'empewo. Yaabakuuma, yaabalabirira, ng'omuntu bw'alabirira emboni y'eriiso lye." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Ng'enkookooma bw'eyaliira ekisu kyayo, n'eghambaatira abaana baayo, n'ebabbeedera ku maghagha gaayo, ni Musengwa Katonda atyo bwe yabagemerera obutagwa." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Musengwa Katonda yenka n'eyabakulemberamu. Ghazira musambwa gwamugemeraku. 
Deuteronomy32:13 Yabagha okuba mu nsi ey'ensozi, baalya emere erimiibwa mu nimiro. Baayagaananga omudheenene gw'endhuki mu mbaale, emiti gyaibwe emyoliva gyabalira mu itaka ery'olubaalebaale." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Ente dhaibwe dhaabagha omuzigo, n'embuzi dhaibwe dhaabagha amata. Baazaaza entaama ensavu einho, baafuna engaano enungi einho, baakunha omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omuka oguwooma." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Abantu ba Musengwa Katonda abo baakombaghala, aye baaba badheemu. Emere yaabageedhulusa, yaabazimbagatania. Baava ku Katonda omutonzi waibwe, baava ku mununuzi waibwe oyo ow'amaani." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Baamuleetera okuba n'enkikidi, nga basinza emisambwa, baamusungughaza nga bakola ebyenhinhalwa." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Baaghangayo emisengo eri emizimu emibi egitali Katonda; emisambwa emiyaaka badhaadha baibwe gye bataamanhaku waire okusinzaaku. 
Deuteronomy32:18 Beerabira omulwanirizi waibwe ow'amaani, baaloba kwidhukira Katonda waibwe eyabagha obulamu." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Musengwa Katonda bwe yakibona, yaasungughala. Yaakyagha batabane be ni baghala be abo." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Agho yaakoba ati, ‘Ndidha kubalekulira agho, mbone enkomerero yaibwe bw'enaaba; kuba badankaanu era baziramu kwikiriza." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Bandeetera okuba n'enkikidi nga basinza ebitali nze Katonda, bansungughaza nga beesiga ebisinzibwa ebitali nze Katonda. Kale, zeena ndidha kubasaaliza nga numirwa abatali bantu bange. Ndidha kubasungughaza nga ngonza eighanga ery'abaziramu magezi." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Obusungu bwange bwidha kutumbuka ng'oti muliro, bwokye kiisi kiri ku nsi kyonakyona. Bwidha kwaka okutuuka e magombe ghansi eyo, bwokye emisingi gy'ensozi." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndidha kubasindikiranga akabi buli kiseera. Ndidha kubakubanga obusaale bwange bubaweereku. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Baidha kufanga endhala n'omusuudha, bazikirizibwenga endwaire edhitiisa. Ndidha kubasindikangaku ensolo enkambwe dhibalye, n'emisota egy'obusagwa gibamoodhe." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Abazigu baidha kubaitiranga mu ntalo mu nguudo, ate eka mu ndhu dhaibwe mwidhule ebitiisa. Abazigu baidha kwitanga abaisuka n'abaguna, era baitenga abakaire ab'envu n'abato abonka." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Naalikobye nti, ka mbasansaanize eyo eghala, ghalobe kubaagho abaidhukira waire omulala ati." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Aye naatya nti abazigu baibwe ababakyagha baidha kwesuuta ebiziramu, bati beene n'ababaghangwire se ti nze Musengwa Katonda.’" 
Deuteronomy32:28 Isiraeli n'eighanga ly'abantu abaziramu magezi, era abaziramu kutegeera naire." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Ngoli baali n'amagezi banditegeire ekibaleeteire abazigu okubaghangula. 
Deuteronomy32:30 Omulwani omulala yandibinze atya abalwani olukumi (1,000), n'abalwani ababiri ni balumusa omutwalo; okutoolaku nga bwenebwene omulwanirizi waibwe ow'amaani abalekuliire agho, nga Musengwa Katonda waibwe oyo yaabavaaku?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Kuba emisambwa gy'abazigu baife minafu, aye Katonda waife wa maani. N'abazigu baife beene ekyo bakiidhi." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Boonooni ng'oti n'ab'e Sodoma n'e Gomorra. Bali ng'oti n'amasamba g'emizabbibu, agabala emizabbibu egikaagha era egy'obutwa." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Omwenge gwagyo guli ng'oti busagwa bwa musota, obukambwe bwene ng'oti busagwa bwa siga." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Musengwa Katonda aidhukira abazigu ba Isiraeli abo kye bakoze, era ali kuteega ekiseera ky'ategeike kituuke, memale ababonereze;" 
Deuteronomy32:35 kuba olunaku luli kumpi okutuuka, lw'alibeesasuulizaaku ng'ababonereza. Ekiseera kiidha kutuuka bagwe, era akabi kali kumpi inho okubagwira." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Musengwa Katonda bw'alibona abantu be boonaboona nga bawoiremu amaani, alisala omusango baagusinga. Bw'alibona nga tighakaali yeesobola k'abe omwiru oba ow'eidembe, alibagemerwa ekivunika." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Agho alibabuuza ati, ‘Emisambwa gyaja gha egy'amaani gye mwesiganga?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Gyalyanga amasavu ag'emisengo gyaimwe, era gyanhwanga omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogw'ebigheebwayo byaimwe eby'okunhwa. Leka giidhe mpegaano gibawonie, gibe obulumukiro bwaimwe.’" 
Deuteronomy32:39 Mpegaano ni mukimanhe, nga nze, era Nze zenka, ni Nze Katonda; ezirayo katonda wundi okutoolaku Nze. Ninze aita, era ninze agha obulamu. Nfumita era naawonia; ghazira asobola kuntoolaku kiri mu buyinza bwange." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Ngololera omukono gwange y'eigulu, naalayira nti: ‘Nga bwendi omulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda," 
Deuteronomy32:41 ndidha kubangula empiima yange emesunkana, ngikozese okuleetagho enkola entuufu. Ndidha kwesasuuliza ku bazigu bange, mbonereze abo abankyagha." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Obusaale bwange buliidhula omusaayi, n'empiima yange yaafumita emamba n'omusaayi ogw'abaitiibwa n'abanhagiibwa, okuva mu bazigu ab'emitwe egiriku enviiri endeeyi.’" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Agho Musa yaakoba ati: ‘Imwe amaghanga musaake abantu ba Musengwa Katonda, kuba yeesasuuliza ku bazigu be abaita abagheereza be, yaagemerwa ensi ye n'abantu be ekivunika.’" 
Deuteronomy32:44 “Musa yaidha, yaayogera ebibono by'olwembo olwo byonabyona, ng'abantu bawulira, ng'ali ni Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni." 
Deuteronomy32:45 “Musa bwe yamala okwogera y'Abaisiraeli ebibono ebyo byonabyona," 
Deuteronomy32:46 yaakoba ati: ‘Mutengayo inho omwoyo ku bibono byonabyona bye mbakobeire olwaleero. Mubyegeresenga abaana baimwe, bafengayo inho okutuukiriza byonabyona ebiragirwa mu mateeka gano." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Kuba bino ti bibono bya kudhondha budhondhe. Aye n'obulamu bwaimwe bwene, era n'ebiribaleetera okughangaalira mu nsi ye muli kuja okutwala nga musomoike omwiga Yorudani.’”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ku lunaku lwene olwo, ati:" 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Ja mu nsozi dh'e Abarimu mu nsi Moabu, eringiriire ekibuga Yeriko, oniine ku lusozi Nebo, olengere ensi Kanaani, ye ndi kuja okugha Abaisiraeli ebe obutaka bwaibwe." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Oidha kufiira ku lusozi olwo, weeyimbe ku badhaadha bo, nga muganda wo Aaroni bwe yafiira ku lusozi Hori, ni yeeyimba ku badhaadha be;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 kuba imwe mwembi mwasobya, mwaloba okuba beesigwa ye ndi nga muli mu maiso g'Abaisiraeli. Bwe mwali gha maadhi g'e Meriba kumpi n'e Kadeshi, mu irungu ly'e Zini, timwantaamu kitiisa." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Oidha kulengera bulengere ensi ye ndi kuja okugha Abaisiraeli, aye toidha kugingiramu.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Dhino n'enkabi, Musa omusaadha wa Katonda dhe yasabira Abaisiraeli ng'akaali kufa." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Yakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda yava ku lusozi Sinai, yaavaayo ng'oti ndhuba ku Edomu yaatwakira, yaayaka ng'ava ku lusozi Parani, ng'ali ghalala n'omutwalo mulala ogwa bamalaika, ng'ali n'omuliro ogwaka ku luuyi lwe olw'omukono omusaadha." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Bwenebwene agonza abantu be, era yaakuuma abo be yalondamu. Batyama gha bigere bye okuwulira ebibono bye." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Musa yatugha Amateeka, ng'eky'omughendo einho eky'eighanga lya Isiraeli." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Musengwa Katonda yafuuka kyabazinga w'Abaisiraeli, ebika byaibwe n'abakulembeze baibwe nga beesoloiza.”" 
Deuteronomy33:6 Musa yaasabira Abareubeni ati: “Abareubeni ka babenga balamu balobe kufa kuwaagho, era balobenga kuba batono.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Yaasabira Abayuda ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, wulira okusaba kw'Abayuda, obaize mu baganda baibwe. Obalwanirire obawonie abazigu baibwe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Yaasabira Abalevi ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, kozesa Urimu ni Thummimu, oyoleke abantu bo ky'oyenda, ng'obita mu Balevi abagheereza bo abeesigwa. Wabaleba e Massa, waakakasa nga batuufu gha maadhi g'e Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Abalevi abo baagumira ku iwe, okusinga okufa ku bazaire baibwe ni ku baganda baibwe ni ku baana baibwe. Baawulira ebiragiro byo, era baakuuma endagaano yo." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Baidha kwegeresanga abantu bo ebiragiro byo n'amateeka go. Baidha kuniokezanga obubbaani gh'oli. Baidha kughangayo emisengo egyokebwa ku alutaari yo. 
Deuteronomy33:11 Wo Musengwa Katonda, baghenga enkabi bakombaghale. Siimanga bye bakola. Era osaaniengagho abazigu baibwe, abo ababakyagha balobenga kwiramu kusituka.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Yaasabira Ababenjamini ati: “Bano n'abantu Musengwa Katonda b'agonza. Baidha kubanga mu miraala gh'ali. Aidha kubakuumanga ekiseera kyonakyona, era aidha kubabangamu.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Yaasabira Abayosefu ati: “Musengwa Katonda aghenga ekiketezo kyaibwe enkabi. Akighenga ku musulo oguva ghaigulu mu igulu, era akighenga n'omusulo oguva ghansi mu itaka." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Ekiketezo kyaibwe kibengamu ebibala ebyenze obukalamu n'endhuba, era kibengamu ebirungi kamaala mu buli makungula." 
Deuteronomy33:15 Kibenga n'amakungula amalungi agava ku nsozi edh'eira, era kibenga n'ebirungi kamaala ebiva ku busozi obutawaagho." 
Deuteronomy33:16 Ekiketezo kyaibwe kiidhulenga ebirungi ebya buli nsambo, n'enkabi dha Musengwa Katonda oyo eyayogera ng'ali mu kisaka ekiri kwaka omuliro. Enkabi edho dhijenga ku b'ekika kya Yosefu, kuba Yosefu n'eyali omukulembeze mu baganda be." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Yosefu ali n'amaani ng'oti ga nte nume, n'amayiga ng'oti ga mbogo. Amayiga ago, n'enkumi n'enkumi edh'abalwani Abamanasse, era n'emitwalo n'emitwalo egy'abalwani Abaefuraimu. Amayiga ago aligakozesa okufula amaghanga, yaagasindiikiriza okugatuusa ensi y'ekoma.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Yaasabira Abazebuluni n'Abaissakari ati: “Abazebuluni bakombaghalenga nga basuubula ku nhandha, n'Abaissakari bafunenga obukombe mu maka gaibwe." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Baidha kwetanga abamaghanga agandi ku lusozi lwaibwe, bagheerenga eyo emisengo emituufu. Baidha kufunanga eby'obukombe mu nhandha, ni mu musenho ku bukalu bw'enhandha.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Yaasabira Abagadi ati: “Katonda asaakibwe, oyo agaziya ensi ey'Abagadi. Abagadi babwama ng'oti mpologoma, okukutula omukono ku muntu, oba okuyuza akawompo k'omu mutwe gw'omuntu." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Beetwalira ekiketezo ekirungi einho okusinga ebindi kuba ogwo n'ogwali omugabo gwaibwe ng'abakulembeze. Baaja n'abakulembeze b'abantu, baatuukiriza ebiragiro bya Musengwa Katonda, n'amateeka ge yagha Isiraeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Yaasabira Abadani ati: “Abadani bali ng'oti mpologoma nto, batuuma baava mu Bashani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Yaasabira Abanafutali ati: “Imwe Abanafutali, Musengwa Katonda abagemeirwa ekivunika era yaabagha inho enkabi. Mutwale ekiketezo eky'oku luuyi lw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba olw'enhandha.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Yaasabira Abasheri ati: “Imwe Abasheri, mufune enkabi okusinga ebika ebindi byonabyona. Mubenga bagonzi ye baganda baimwe. Ekiketezo kyaimwe kibengamu omuzigo kamaala." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Ebibuga byaimwe biigalwenga na ndhigi dha kyuma kigumu inho era na kyuma kya kikomo. Mubenga bagumu obulamu bwaimwe bwonabwona. 
Deuteronomy33:26 Imwe Abaisiraeli, ezira katonda ali ng'oti ni Katonda waife, aseeyeeya ku igulu mu bire ng'ali mu kitiisa eky'obwakyabazinga, n'aidha okubabeera." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Katonda ow'ebyanda n'ebyanda, n'omukuumi waimwe. Emikono gye egy'olubeerera n'egibagemerera. Aidha kubinganga abazigu baimwe mu nsi, nga muli kumpi okutuukayo. Olwo aidha kubakobanga ati, ‘Mubasaaniegho boonaboona.’" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Kale ni Abaisiraeli baidha kubanga mu miraala; baidhukulu ba Yakobo abo baidha kubanga bonka, nga batyamiisa mu nsi eidhwire engaano n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, era efukirirwa omusulo oguva mu igulu." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Weesiimye iwe Isiraeli! Naani ali ng'oti niiwe, eighanga erirokolebwa Musengwa Katonda? Musengwa Katonda mwene n'engabo yo era n'empiima yo, oyo n'akugha obughanguzi. Abazigu bo baliidha nga bakweghemba obagemerwe ekivunika, era iwe olibaniinaku.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Agho Musa yaava mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe e Moabu, yaaniinaniina ku lusozi Nebo, entwiko ya Pisiga, olulingiriire Yeriko. Musengwa Katonda yaamwoleka ekiketezo kyonakyona okuva e Gileadi, okutuuka e Dani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 n'ekiketezo kyonakyona ekya Nafutali, n'ekya Efuraimu ni Manasse, n'ekiketezo kyonakyona ekya Yuda, okutuuka e bugwandhuba ku Nhandha Eyaghagati." 
Deuteronomy34:3 Era yaamwoleka n'ekiketezo ekikalukalu eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba wa Yuda, n'eky'oku museetwe oguli mu kiiko eky'e Yeriko, ekibuga eky'emiti eminaazi, okutuuka e Zoari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Musa ati: “Eyo n'ensi ye nasuubiza Aburahamu, ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo, nti ndigigha baidhukulu baibwe. Nkuganhie waagibonaku bubone, aye toidha kusomoka kujaayo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Agho Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda yaafiira eyo mu nsi Moabu, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Musengwa Katonda yaamuziika e Moabu mu kiiko ekiringiriire ekibuga Peori. Aye n'okutuusa mpegaano, ghazira aidhi kifo kyene ghe yaziikibwa." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Musa yaja okufa ng'agheziiza emyaka kikumi n'abiri egy'obukulu. Aye yali ng'akaabona bukalamu, era ng'akaali wa maani." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Agho Abaisiraeli baalira Musa okumala enaku amakumi asatu, nga bali mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe e Moabu, okutuusa ekiseera eky'okumulira bwe kyawaaku." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni yali ng'aidhwire amagezi, kuba Musa yali ng'amaze okumutaagho aire mu kifo kye. Kale ni Abaisiraeli baawuliranga Yoshua oyo, era baakolanga nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira Musa." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Okuva ku olwo tighabangaghooku kabiri mulanzi mu Isiraeli ali ng'oti ni Musa, Musengwa Katonda ye yamanha n'ayogeranga naye maiso ku maiso." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Ghazira mulanzi wundi eyakola ebyewuunhio n'ebyewuninkiriza, ng'oti n'ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yatuma Musa okukola ku kyabazinga w'e Misiri, ni ku bakungu be, ni ku bantu b'ensi eyo boonaboona." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Era ghazira mulanzi wundi eyakola eby'amaani ebyo n'ebitiisa einho ebyo byonabyona, nga Musa bwe yakola ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona babona." 
Joshua1:1 Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda bwe yafa, Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ni Yoshua, mutabane wa Nuni, eyali omuyambi wa Musa yaamukoba ati:" 
Joshua1:2 “Musa, abaire omugheereza wange, yafa. Kale ni, iwe weetegeke n'Abaisiraeli abandi boonaboona, musomoke omwiga Yorudani, mwingire mu nsi ye ndi kubagha." 
Joshua1:3 Nga bwe nakobera Musa, kiisi ghe munaaniina ekigere woonawoona mbaghairegho." 
Joshua1:4 Ekiketezo kyaimwe kiidha kuvanga ku irungu okutuuka ku nsozi dh'e Lebanoni, n'okuva ku mwiga omunene Eufurate oguli e buvandhuba, nga mutwaliizaamu ensi yoonayoona ey'Abahitti, mutuuke ku Nhandha Eyaghagati ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba." 
Joshua1:5 Ndidha kubanga n'iwe buliidho nga bwe nabanga ni Musa. Tija kukulekulira agho naire. Ezira muntu aja kukughangula, enaku dhoonadhoona dh'olimala ng'oli mulamu ku nsi." 
Joshua1:6 Banga mumalirivu era atatya. Niiwe oja okukulemberamu abantu bano obaleetere okutwala ensi ye nabasuubiza okubagha nga mbita mu badhaadha baibwe. 
Joshua1:7 Iwe ky'oli n'okukola, n'okuba n'obumalirivu era n'obutatya nga weegendereza okugondera amateeka goonagoona, omugheereza wange Musa ge yakugha. Togavangaku waire akatono kati, olwo buli kintu kiidha kukujiiranga bukalamu woonawoona." 
Joshua1:8 Ebiri mu kitabo kino eky'Amateeka bitakuvanga ku munwa. Bisomenga omusana n'obwire era ng'ogondera byonabyona ebyaghandiikibwamu. Olwo ebintu byonabyona biidha kukujiiranga bukalamu ng'ezira kikulema. 
Joshua1:9 Oteerabira kye nkulagiire nti: Banga mumalirivu era atatya, otatiribiranga oba okuwaamu amaani, kuba Nze Musengwa Katonda wo ndidha kubanga n'iwe buli gh'oja.”" 
Joshua1:10 Agho Yoshua yaalagira abakulembeze ab'abantu mu Isiraeli ati: 
Joshua1:11 Mubitebite mu bantu eyo mu weema dhaibwe ye bali mu bakobe muti: “Mwetegekereyo emere ey'omu lugendo, kuba olwadhuuzi muja okusomoka omwiga Yorudani okuja okutwala ensi, Musengwa Katonda waimwe y'ali kubagha.”" 
Joshua1:12 Yoshua yaakoba ab'ekika kya Abareubeni, n'ab'ekika ekya Abagadi, n'ekitundu eky'ekika ekya Abamanasse ati:" 
Joshua1:13 “Mwidhukire, nga Musa eyali omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda yabakobera ati Musengwa Katonda waimwe yabasuubiza okubagha ekiketezo kino eky'e buvandhuba ew'omwiga Yorudani kibe obutaka bwaimwe." 
Joshua1:14 Agho ni muleke bakazi baimwe n'abaana baimwe abato basigale ghano, era n'ebyayo byaimwe byona bisigale ghano. Aye abasaadha boonaboona abasobola okulwana basomokenga bakulemberemu Baisiraeli banaibwe era bababeerenga," 
Joshua1:15 okutuusa boona lwe balitwala ekiketezo kyaibwe eky'e bugwandhuba ew'omwiga Yorudani, Musengwa Katonda waibwe ky'ali kubagha. Musengwa Katonda bw'aligha ebika byonabyona eby'Abaisiraeli okutyama ni bitereera mu biketezo byabyo, olwo mwena muliira mwatyama ghano mu kiketezo kyaimwe Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda kye yabagha.”" 
Joshua1:16 Baamwiramu bati: “Twidha kukolanga byonabyona by'otukobye, era twidha kujanga woonawoona gh'onaatukobanga okuja." 
Joshua1:17 Era twidha kukugonderanga buliidho nga bwe twagonderanga Musa. Tusaba bwa Musengwa Katonda wo, abenga n'iwe nga bweyalinga ni Musa." 
Joshua1:18 Oyo yeenayeena ataakuwulirenga oba anaalobanga okukola ky'omukobye, wa kwitibwanga. Iwe banga mumalirivu era atatya.”" 
Joshua2:1 Agho Yoshua yaatuma abantu babiri nga baviira agho e Shittimu ghe baali basimbye weema dhaibwe, baje babone mu nkweko ensi Kanaani bw'efaanana, n'okusingira irala ekibuga Yeriko, baire bamukobere. Bwe baatuuka mu kibuga, baaja okusula mu ndhu ya malaaya ye baayetanga Rahabu." 
Joshua2:2 Aye ghaabaagho abaaja ni bakobera omukulu w'ekibuga Yeriko bati: “Ghaligho Abaisiraeli abaidhie eigulo lino okukeeta ensi yaife.” 
Joshua2:3 Kale omukulu w'ekibuga oyo yaatumira Rahabu ng'amukoba ati: “Abasaadha ababiri abaidhie ewuwo, baidhie kukeeta nsi yaife eno yoonayoona. Kale bampeereze.”" 
Joshua2:4 Rahabu yaamwiramu ati: “Kituufu ghaligho abasaadha abaidhie ghano, aye timanhie ye baviire. Era baizeeyo agho ng'endhuba eri kugwa, ng'omulyango ogw'ekibuga gukaali kwigalwa. Titegeire ye babaire bali kuja, aye bwe mubalumuukirira musobola okubaagaana mwabagema.” Agho yali amaze okubatwala ghaigulu ku ndhu ye, era ng'abagisiiza mu mmungo edh'obuti dhe yali amaze okutegeka obukalamu. Obuti obwo n'omwavanga wuuzi dhe baalukangamu engoye empegheevu." 
Joshua2:5  
Joshua2:6  
Joshua2:7 Kale abasaadha abaava ew'omukulu w'ekibuga baafuluma okuva mu kibuga, era olwafuluma bati omulyango ogw'ekibuga gwaigalwa. Baaja nga baagala abakeesi Abaisiraeli okutuukiza irala mu kifo omwiga Yorudani ghe gusomokerwa." 
Joshua2:8 Ng'abakeesi Abaisiraeli bakaali kutenduka waire okulambaala, Rahabu yaajaayo ye baali ghaigulu ku ndhu." 
Joshua2:9 Yaabakoba ati: “Ndidhi nga Musengwa Katonda yabagha ensi eno era twenatwena tubatya emyoyo gyaife gyatweghanika ira. 
Joshua2:10 Kuba twawulira nga Musengwa Katonda yakaliiza Enhandha Emyufu bwe mwagituukaku nga muva e Misiri. Era twawulira bye mwakola bakyabazinga Abamori abaali e buvandhuba ew'omwiga Yorudani: Sihoni ni Ogi be mwazikiriza. 
Joshua2:11 Bwe twawulira ekintu ekyo twatya inho era twawaamu n'amaani olwaimwe, kuba twidhi nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ni Katonda ow'eigulu ghaigulu era ow'ensi ghansi." 
Joshua2:12 Agho ni mundayirire mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda oyo muti mulibisa bukalamu, ab'endhu ya lata wange, ng'oti ninze bwembabisiisa obukalamu. Era mbasaba mumpe akamanhiso akakakafu." 
Joshua2:13 Muwonie obulamu bwa lata ni maama, n'obwa baganda bange ni baanhinaze, n'obw'abantu baibwe boonaboona be bali nabo. Mutuwonie okwitibwa.”" 
Joshua2:14 Abakeesi baamukoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda atwalanga obulamu bwaife bwemufanga. Bw'otalikoberaku bandi ku bye tuli kukola, twidha kuba beesigwa y'oli era tukubise bukalamu, nga Musengwa Katonda atughaire ensi eno.”" 
Joshua2:15 Endhu Rahabu ye yasulangamu yali ku mbali kwa kibuga, era ng'oluuyi lwayo olundi lwayungibwa ku kimante ekyezungululanga ekibuga. Kale ku luuyi lwene olwo kwe yabaikiza ku mugugha ng'ababisa mu dinisa." 
Joshua2:16 Yaabakoba ati: “Musooke muje mu nsozi mwegiseeku eyo enaku isatu, abasaadha b'omukulu w'ekibuga balobe kubabona. Olumaliira bwe baliba baize muliirayo mu idembe.”" 
Joshua2:17 Ng'akaali kubaisa, abakeesi baamukoba bati: “Titwidha kuloba kutuukiriza ebyo by'otulayiiza." 
Joshua2:18 Era ka tukugalagire ky'olikola: bwe tulingira mu nsi yaimwe, osibanga akawuuzi kano ak'olugoye lw'erangi ya kasaayisaayi mu dinisa eno y'oja okutwikizaamu. Era osololezanga ghano lata wo, n'inhoko, ni baanhoko, n'abantu boonaboona ab'omu ndhu ya lata wo, mwaba ghalala mu ndhu yo." 
Joshua2:19 Omuntu yeenayeena alifuluma okuva mu ndhu yo n'aitirwa eyo mu nguudo edh'ekibuga, omusango guliba gugwe ti gwaife, aye ye baligemaku ng'ali mu ndhu yo muno, ogwo omusango guliba gwaife." 
Joshua2:20 Aye bye tuli kukola bw'olibikobera abantu, agho ghaliba ghazira kiritukaka kukuuma kirayiro ky'otulayiiza.”" 
Joshua2:21 Agho yaabakoba ati: “Ndidha kukola nga bwe munkobye.” Yaabasiibula baaja. Era nga bamaze okuja, yaasiba akawuuzi kale ak'olugoye lw'erangi ya kasaayisaayi mu dinisa." 
Joshua2:22 Agho abakeesi baaja mu nsozi, baamalayo enaku isatu okutuusa abasaadha b'omukulu w'ekibuga bwe bairayo mu kibuga, nga babanooniiza mu ngira mwonamwona baaloba kubabona." 
Joshua2:23 Olwo abakeesi bombi baava mu nsozi, baasomoka Yorudani, bairayo ye Yoshua baamukobera byonabyona bye baabitamu." 
Joshua2:24 Era baakakasa Yoshua bati: “Bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda yatugha ensi ere yoonayoona. Abantu baayo boonaboona emyoyo gyabeeghanika ira bwe baawulira nga tuli kubajiira.” 
Joshua3:1 Enkeera Yoshua n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, baawuuna baava e Shittimu ghe baali basimbye weema dhaibwe, baaja baagumba ku mwiga Yorudani nga bateegerera okusomoka." 
Joshua3:2 Nga bamazeeyo enaku isatu, abakulembeze ab'abantu mu Isiraeli baabitabita mu bantu eyo mu weema dhaibwe nga babakoba bati:" 
Joshua3:3 “Bwe mubona bakabona nga babbeeda Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda waimwe, musansula weema dhaimwe mwaginonereza." 
Joshua3:4 Agho mwidha kumanha ghe muja okubita, kuba mubaire timubitangaku eno. Aye mutaseeta kumpi na Sanduuku ya Ndagaano eyo, mulekeghooku eibanga nga lya kilomita namba.”" 
Joshua3:5 Yoshua yaakoba abantu ati: “Mwetegeke, mwetukuze, kuba enkyo Musengwa Katonda aja kukola ekyewuunhio ekikologho nga tubona.”" 
Joshua3:6 Era yaakoba bakabona ati: “Mubbeede Sanduuku y'Endagaano, mukulemberemu abantu.” Era boona baabbeeda Sanduuku y'Endagaano baakulemberamu, abantu baabanonereza." 
Joshua3:7 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Ku lunaku luno nja kwoleka Abaisiraeli boonaboona nga bw'oli n'ekitiisa ekya ghaigulu. Baidha kumanha nga ndidha kubanga n'iwe, nga bwe nalinga ni Musa." 
Joshua3:8 Era koba bakabona ababbeedie Sanduuku y'Endagaano oti, ‘Bwe muba mwakangira muti mu mwiga Yorudani, mwemerere.’ ”" 
Joshua3:9 Agho Yoshua yaakoba abantu ati: “Mwenamwena mwidhe ghano muwulire ebibono bya Musengwa Katonda waimwe. 
Joshua3:10 Bwe munaaja nga mweyongerayo emberi, mwidha kumanha nga Katonda oyo omulamu ali n'imwe, kuba aidha kuja ng'abingagho Abakanaani, Abahitti, Abahivi, Abaperizzi, Abagirigashi, Abamori n'Abayebusi." 
Joshua3:11 “Mubone, Sanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda afuga ensi yoonayoona, eidha kubakulemberamu okutuuka mu Yorudani." 
Joshua3:12 Buti mu bika byaimwe Abaisiraeli mwerondemu abantu ikumi na babiri: nga buli kika mulondamu omuntu mulala mulala. 
Joshua3:13 Bakabona ababbeedie Sanduuku y'Endagaano eyo bwebanaaniina ebigere byaibwe mu mwiga Yorudani, amaadhi gaidha kulekera agho okutambula, agabaire nga gava eitale gaidha kwebunga mu kifo kirala.”" 
Joshua3:14 Ebiseera Abaisiraeli bye baaviiramu ghe baali basimbye weema dhaibwe, ni baja okusomoka Yorudani, byali bya makungula. Ebiseera ebyo omwiga Yorudani gwidhula gwabanda. Agho bakabona abaali babbeedie Sanduuku y'Endagaano nga bakulembereiremu abantu boonaboona, olwaniina ebigere byaibwe mu mwiga," 
Joshua3:15  
Joshua3:16 amaadhi gaalekera okutambula, geebunga kumpi n'ekibuga Adamu ekiriiraine ekibuga Zarethani. Amaadhi agaali gaserengeta nga gaja mu Nhandha Eyomuunhu gaalekera agho, abantu baasobola okusomoka nga boolekeire Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Abaisiraeli boonaboona baasomoka Yorudani nga batambulira ku itaka ikalu, ng'olwo bakabona beemereire ghagati mu mwiga era boona ku itaka ikalu, nga babbeedie Sanduuku y'Endagaano. Bakabona abo baasigala nga beemereire agho okutuusa abantu boonaboona bwe baamala okusomoka." 
Joshua4:1 Abaisiraeli boonaboona bwe baamala okusomoka Yorudani, Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati:" 
Joshua4:2 “Mulonde abantu ikumi na babiri, nga mu buli kika mulondamu omuntu mulala." 
Joshua4:3 Mubakobe baje mu kifo gheene bakabona ghe babaire beemereire, batoolegho amabaale ikumi n'abiri muje nago, bagate mu kifo ghe muja okusula obwire bwaleero.”" 
Joshua4:4 Agho Yoshua yaayeta abantu eikumi n'ababiri be yali amaze okulonda, yaabakoba ati:" 
Joshua4:5 “Muje mu mwiga Yorudani, mubite ku Sanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda waimwe, buli muntu abbeede eibaale ku ibega ku lw'ekika kye." 
Joshua4:6 Amabaale ago gaidha kubabeeranga kamanhiso, abaana baimwe bwe bali buuzanga eyo mu biseera ebiidha bati, ‘Okuta ghano amabaale gano mwali mutegeeza ki.’" 
Joshua4:7 Nga mubakobera muti, ‘Amaadhi ag'omwiga Yorudani gaalekera agho okutambula, Sanduuku y'Endagaano bweyali ng'eri kusala omwiga ogwo.’ Kale amabaale ago ganaabanga kiidhukizo eri abantu Abaisiraeli ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Joshua4:8 Abaisiraeli baakola byonabyona Yoshua bye yabalagira era nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yamulagira. Baabbeeda amabaale ikumi n'abiri ng'ebika byaibwe bwe byali, baagatoola ghagati mu mwiga Yorudani, baaja nago okugatuusa mu kifo ghe baasula obwire obwo, baagaisa agho."
