Joshua4:9 Yoshua era yaaja ghagati mu mwiga Yorudani, mu kifo bakabona ghe baayemerera nga babbeedie Sanduuku y'Endagaano, yaasimbagho amabaale ikumi n'abiri amabaale ago gakaaligho ni ye buli eno." 
Joshua4:10 Bakabona abaabbeeda Sanduuku y'Endagaano baayemerera ghagati mu mwiga Yorudani okutuusa nga buli kintu Musengwa Katonda kye yalagira Yoshua okukoba abantu ng'abita mu Musa, kiwoire. Abantu baayangugha okusala omwiga Yorudani" 
Joshua4:11 era boonaboona bwe baamala okusala, bakabona ababbeedie Sanduuku y'Endagaano baakulemberamu abantu." 
Joshua4:12 Abasaadha ab'ekika kya Reubeni, n'ab'ekika kya Gadi, n'ekitundu eky'ab'ekika kya Manasse n'abaasala omwiga okusooka nga bakulembeiremu abantu abandi boonaboona, era nga beetegefu okulwana, nga Musa bwe yabakoba." 
Joshua4:13 Bano baali baghera emitwalo ng'ena (40,000), nga beetegekeire bukalamu olutalo. Agho baasala omwiga nga Musengwa Katonda ali nabo, bangira ekiketezo ky'e Yeriko eky'omuseetwe." 
Joshua4:14 Ku lunaku olwo, Musengwa Katonda yayoleka Abaisiraeli boonaboona nga Yoshua bweyali n'ekitiisa ekya ghaigulu, era okuva n'olwo baamutya enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwe, ng'oti ni bwe baatyanga Musa." 
Joshua4:15 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua 
Joshua4:16 ati: “Lagira bakabona ababbeedie Sanduuku y'Endagaano bave mu Yorudani.” 
Joshua4:17 Kale Yoshua yaalagira bakabona baava mu mwiga. 
Joshua4:18 Era bakabona nga babbeedie Sanduuku y'Endagaano olwava mu mwiga, ebigere byaibwe ni biniina ku bukalu biti, amaadhi gairagho mu kifo kyago era gaabanda n'okubanda nga bwe gaali ng'ebyo bikaali kubaagho." 
Joshua4:19 Olunaku Abaisiraeli lwe baasomokeraku Yorudani lwali lwa ikumi olw'omwezi ogusooka, era baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Giligali ekiri e buvandhuba wa Yeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Era agho Yoshua ghe yasimba amabaale eikumi n'abiri ge baatoola mu Yorudani. 
Joshua4:21 Agho yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Eyo mu biseera ebiidha abaana baimwe bwe balibabuuzanga amabaale gano kye gategeeza," 
Joshua4:22 muli bakoberanga muti, ‘Isiraeli yasomoka Yorudani ku itaka eikalu.’" 
Joshua4:23 Kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe yabakaliza amaadhi mu mwiga Yorudani okutuusa bwe mwagusala, era ng'oti ni bwe yakola Enhandha Emyufu ye yatukaliza okutuusa bwe twamala okugisala." 
Joshua4:24 Olw'ekyo abantu boonaboona ku nsi baidhanga kumanha, nga Musengwa Katonda wa bukumu obutaloodheka, era mwena mwidha kutyanga Musengwa Katonda waimwe oyo ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Joshua5:1 Bakyabazinga boonaboona Abamori abaali e buvandhuba wa Yorudani, ni bakyabazinga boonaboona Abakanaani ab'ebiketezo ebituuka ku Nhandha Eyaghagati, bwe baawulira nga Musengwa Katonda yakaliza Abaisiraeli omwiga Yorudani okutuusa bwe baamala okugusala nga mukalu, emyoyo gyabawaamu era boonaboona baawaamu amaani olw'okutya Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua5:2 Mu biseera ebyo Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Kola obuntu obusala nga bwogi, okekete Abaisiraeli ababaire nga bakaali kukeketebwa okuva lwe mwava e Misiri.”" 
Joshua5:3 Kale Yoshua yaakola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yamulagira, yaabakeketera e Gibeathi Haaralothi." 
Joshua5:4 Musengwa Katonda yalagira abantu bakeketebwe kuba abasaadha boonaboona abaava mu Misiri nga batuusiiza emyaka egibasobozesa okutabaala, baafiira mu ngira mu irungu nga bamaze okuva mu Misiri." 
Joshua5:5 Kale waire ng'abantu boonaboona baava mu Misiri nga bakekete, abaana abaazaalirwa mu ngira mu irungu oluvainhuma olw'okuvaayo, baali nga tibakeketebwanga" 
Joshua5:6 kuba Abaisiraeli baatambulira emyaka amakumi ana mu irungu okutuusa abasaadha boonaboona abaava mu Misiri nga batuusiiza emyaka egibasobozesa okutabaala bwe baafa ni bawaagho. Ekyo kyaligho kuba baadheemera Musengwa Katonda. Kale Musengwa Katonda yaaloba kubaganha kubona ku nsi ye yali amaze okusuubiza okugha badhaadha baibwe ensi engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala. 
Joshua5:7 Abaana b'abantu abo abaadheemera Katonda baali nga tibakeketebwanga, kuba tiyabaayo kukeketa nga bakaatambula. Kale n'abo Yoshua be yakeketa." 
Joshua5:8 Abasaadha Abaisiraeli boonaboona bwe baamala okukeketebwa, baasigala mu kifo mwe baasimba weema dhaibwe okutuusa bwe baawona." 
Joshua5:9 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Olwaleero mbatoireku eriina eibi ery'okwetebwanga abairu ab'Abamisiri.” Ekifo ekyo kwe kyava okwetebwa Giligali, eriina lye bakaakyeta ni ye buli eno." 
Joshua5:10 Abaisiraeli bwe baali nga bakaagumbye agho e Giligali mu biketezo by'e Yeriko eby'omuseetwe, olw'eigulo baakola Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa, ng'enaku edh'omwezi ikumi na ina." 
Joshua5:11 Olunaku olwairirira ng'Okubitizibwa kuweire, baalya ku birime eby'omu nsi eyo omukuzi ogusooka: emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa, n'emere ey'empeke enkalange." 
Joshua5:12 Ku olwo mannu yaalekera okumagala, ng'olwo Abaisiraeli tibakaagifuna. Era okuva olwo n'okweyongerayo, nga balya mere eyalimwanga mu nsi eyo Kanaani." 
Joshua5:13 Yoshua bweyali ng'akaali agho okumpi n'e Yeriko, yaja okulinga ati, ng'abona omusaadha ng'amwemereire mu maiso, era ng'agemye empiima. Yoshua yaaja y'ali, yaamubuuza ati: “Oli ku luuyi lwaife oba lwa bazigu baife?”" 
Joshua5:14 Omusaadha yaamwiramu ati: “Busa. Ndi ghano ng'aduumira eigye lya Musengwa Katonda.” Yoshua yeeyala ghansi, nga bw'amukoba ati: “Nze ndi mugheereza wo, ky'onankoba kye naakola.”" 
Joshua5:15 Ole aduumira eigye lya Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Toolamu engaito, kuba ghano gh'oli, oli mu kifo kitukuvu.” Yoshua yaatoolamu engaito." 
Joshua6:1 Mu kiseera ekyo emiryango egingira mu kibuga Yeriko baali baagiigala begulugulu okulobera Abaisiraeli okwingira. Ng'ezira muntu afulumamu oba angiramu. 
Joshua6:2 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Ekibuga Yeriko nkikutaire mu ngalo, ni kyabazinga wamu, n'abalwani baamu ab'amaani." 
Joshua6:3 Iwe n'abasaadha bo boonaboona abasobola okulwana mwidha kukyezungululanga omukuzi mulala buli lunaku, okumala enaku mukaaga." 
Joshua6:4 Bakabona musanvu, nga buli muntu agemye endeka eyakolebwa mu iyiga ery'entaama, baidha kukulemberamu Sanduuku y'Endagaano. Ku lunaku olwomusanvu mulyezungulula ekibuga emikuzi musanvu nga bakabona bafuuwa endeka." 
Joshua6:5 Agho bakabona abo balifuuwayo endeka omukuzi mulala nga muleeyiriri, era bwe muliguwulira abasaadha bo boonaboona balireekaanira ghaigulu omukuzi mulala. Olwo ebimante ebyezungulwire ekibuga byagwa byonabyona ku itaka. Olwo abasaadha bo bangira mu kibuga okuva buli muntu gh'aliba ng'ali.”" 
Joshua6:6 Yoshua yaayeta bakabona yaabakoba ati: “Mubbeede Sanduuku y'Endagaano, era abantu musanvu ku imwe, buli muntu ageme endeka eyakolebwa mu iyiga ery'entaama, bakulemberemu Sanduuku y'Endagaano eyo.”" 
Joshua6:7 Era yaakoba abasaadha ati: “Mutoolere okutambula nga mwezungulula ekibuga, era ghabeeghooku abantu abali n'eby'okulwanisa bakulemberemu olw'okukuuma Sanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Joshua6:8 Kale baakola nga Yoshua bwe yalagira ghaabaagho ekikunsu eky'abasaadha nga bagemye eby'okulwanisa ekyakulemberamu. Memale bakabona omusanvu, abaajanga nga bafuuwa endeka nga tibasirisaamu, bairirira. Okwo kwairaku bakabona abaabbeeda Sanduuku y'Endagaano. Olwo ekikunsu ekindi eky'abasaadha abaali nga bagemye eby'okulwanisa kyakoobera." 
Joshua6:9  
Joshua6:10 Aye Yoshua yali amaze okulagira abantu obutaleekaana, waire okwogera ekibono kyonakyona, oba waire okuleka amamiro gaibwe okuwulirwaku, okutuusa ng'olunaku lwe yali aja okubakoba okuleekaana lutuuse." 
Joshua6:11 Kale nga bwe yalagira, abantu abo beezunguluza Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda ekibuga omukuzi mulala, bwe baamala baira mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, baasula agho obwire obwo." 
Joshua6:12 Mu nkyonkyo Yoshua yasituka, yaagha bakabona n'abasaadha be ebiragiro n'ebirala nga bye yabagha olunaku olwali lwakabita. Kale bakabona baabbeeda Sanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda," 
Joshua6:13 baatoolera okutambula mu bikunsu byaibwe nga bwe yakoba biiraganeku. Ekikunsu eky'abasaadha nga bagemye eby'okulwanisa kyakulemberamu, bakabona omusanvu abaajanga nga bafuuwa endeka edhaakolebwa mu mayiga ag'entaama bairirira, era nga bafuuwa nga tibasirisaamu. Okwo kwairaku bakabona abaabbeeda Esanduuku y'Endagaano. Olwo ekikunsu ekindi eky'abasaadha nga bagemye eby'okulwanisa kyakoobera." 
Joshua6:14 Ku lunaku luno lwona, baatambula nga beezungulula ekibuga omukuzi mulala, bwe baamala baira mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe. Enaku mukaaga nga bakolanga batyo." 
Joshua6:15 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu baasituka mu nkyo inho, baatambula okwezungulula ekibuga mu nsambo n'endala emikuzi musanvu. Luno n'olunaku lwonka lwe baakyezungulula emikuzi omusanvu." 
Joshua6:16 Era ku mukuzi ogwomusanvu, bakabona bwe baafuuwa endeka, Yoshua yaalagira abantu ati: “Muleekaane! Kuba Musengwa Katonda abaghaire ekibuga kino." 
Joshua6:17 Era mukizikirize n'ebikirimu byonabyona, kibe ng'ekigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda. Okutoolaku Rahabu malaaya, ni boonaboona b'ali nabo mu ndhu ye, abo n'abali n'okulekebwa nga balamu, kuba yakweka mu ndhu ye abakwenda be twatuma." 
Joshua6:18 Ghatabaagho ku imwe atwala kintu kyonakyona ku ebyo ebiri n'okuzikirizibwa bwe ghanaabaagho anaakikola anaaba aleese obuzibu n'okuzikirira mu ife. 
Joshua6:19 Ebintu byonabyona ebya feeza, ni zaabu, n'eby'ekikomo, n'eby'ekyuma ekigumu einho, bitukuvu bya Musengwa Katonda. Era bija kuteebwa mu biterekerwa Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Joshua6:20 Kale bakabona baafuuwa endeka. Era abantu olwawulira endeka baaleekaana inho n'amaani, ebimante ebyali byezungulwire ekibuga byagwa byonabyona ku itaka. Olwo abantu bangira mu kibuga butereevu okuva buli muntu ghe yali, baakigema." 
Joshua6:21 Baatoolera okwita buli muntu ye baayagaanamu nga bakozesa empiima dhe baali nadho: abasaadha n'abakazi, abakulu n'abato. Era baita n'ente, n'entaama, n'endogoyi." 
Joshua6:22 Agho Yoshua yaakoba abasaadha ababiri abaakeeta Yeriko ati: “Muje mu ndhu ya malaaya mumutooleyo n'abantu be boonaboona nga bwe mwamulayirira.” 
Joshua6:23 Kale baaja baatoolayo Rahabu n'ise, n'inhina, ni baanhina, n'abantu be boonaboona. Baabatoolayo boonaboona baabaleeta kumpi n'Abaisiraeli ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, bawone akabi." 
Joshua6:24 Bwe baamala okubatoola mu kibuga, baakikumaku omuliro kyaya kyonakyona n'ebyakirimu byonabyona okutoolaku feeza, ni zaabu, n'ebintu ebyakolebwa mu kikomo, ni mu kyuma ekigumu einho, ebyateebwa mu biterekerwa Musengwa Katonda." 
Joshua6:25 Aye Yoshua yaawonia Rahabu, n'ab'endhu ya ise, n'ab'ekika kye abandi boonaboona, baaloba kwitibwa. Ni ye buli eno Rahabu akaali mu Isiraeli kuba yakweka abakwenda Yoshua be yatuma okukeeta Yeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Mu kiseera ekyo, Yoshua yaalabula abantu ng'abasikirira ati: “Oyo yeenayeena aligezaaku okwiramu okuzimba ekibuga Yeriko, Musengwa Katonda amukolimire. ‘Era Musengwa Katonda, oyo amwitengaku abaana be boonaboona, okuva ku muberi okutuuka ku esembayo obuto.’" 
Joshua6:27 “Kale Musengwa Katonda yaabanga ku luuyi lwa Yoshua mu byonabyona bye yakolanga, era Yoshua oyo yaamanhikana mu nsi yoonayoona.”" 
Joshua7:1 Musengwa Katonda yalagira Abaisiraeli okuzikiriza Yeriko n'ebikirimu byonabyona. Aye omusaadha eyayetebwanga Akyani tiyagondera kiragiro ekyo, yaatwala ku bintu ebyali biri n'okuzikirizibwa. Akyani ono yali mutabane wa Karumi era mwidhukulu wa Zabudi, era mwidhukulu wa Zera ow'ekika kya Yuda. Agho obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwayakira ku Baisiraeli ng'oti muliro." 
Joshua7:2 Yoshua ng'akaali e Yeriko yatuma abasaadha baje e Ayi, ekyali okumpi n'ekibuga Bethaveni e buvandhuba ow'e kibuga Betheli. Yaabakoba ati: “Muje mukeete ensi eyo.” Era abasaadha baaja baakeeta Ayi." 
Joshua7:3 Bwe baira baakobera Yoshua bati: “Otadaaza bantu boonaboona kuja ere, kuba abantu abaliyo batono bati. Leka abantu ng'enkumi ibiri oba isatu n'ababe baje bakirumbe.”" 
Joshua7:4 Kale abantu ng'enkumi isatu (3,000) baava mu Baisiraeli baaja okulumba Ayi. Aye bale baabaiririza nga balumuka" 
Joshua7:5 era abasaadha ab'e Ayi abo baabingirira Abaisiraeli okuviira irala ku mulyango okubatuusa a Shebarimu. Abaisiraeli bwe baali nga baserengeta, bale baabaitamu abantu ng'asatu na mukaaga, era baawaamu amaani baatenha." 
Joshua7:6 Agho Yoshua n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli baayuza ebivaalo byaibwe, beeyala wa mberi gh'Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda, era beeyugha enkungu mu mitwe, baaba agho okutuusa eigulo. Ebyo byonabyona baabikola olw'okunakughala." 
Joshua7:7 Yoshua yaasaba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe afuga abantu boonaboona, bwenebwene lwaki watusomosa Yorudani? Obwo bwene wayenda kutughaayo mu ngalo dh'Abamori batuzikirize? Ngoli twasigala ku luuyi kule okwa Yorudani tikyandisinze?" 
Joshua7:8 Musengwa Katonda, Abaisiraeli bakyuse baalumuka abazigu, tiidhi na kya kwogera" 
Joshua7:9 kuba Abakanaani n'abantu abandi boonaboona abali mu nsi eno baja kukiwulira, batuzingize batwite twenatwena. Olwo Musengwa Katonda olikola ki, eriina lyo eikologho okusigaza ekitiisa?”" 
Joshua7:10 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Situka! Weeyalira ki ghansi otyo? 
Joshua7:11 Abaisiraeli n'abaakola ekibi, baadheemera ekiragiro kye na balagira, baatwala ku bintu ebyali biri n'okuzikirizibwa. Baabiiba, baaguya bati byaibwe, era baabita ghalala n'ebyaibwe." 
Joshua7:12 Eyo n'ensonga lwaki buti tibasobola kulwanisa muzigu abalumbye. Bamulumuka bulumuke, kuba beene boona baafuuka ba kuzikiriza. Tikairayo kuba ku luuyi lwaimwe kabiri, okutoolaku nga muzikiriiza ebyo bye nabalagira okuzikiriza bye muli nabyo." 
Joshua7:13 Situkiramu okobe abantu beetukuze era beetegeke okwidha ye ndi. Bakobe enkyo babe nga beetegeike, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli ndi kuja okubakoba nti, ‘Imwe Abaisiraeli, ghaligho ebintu bye muli nabyo bye nabalagira okuzikiriza. Buti timusobola kulwanisa muzigu abalumbye okutuusa nga mwetoiremu ebintu ebyo.’" 
Joshua7:14 Kale bakobe oti enkyo baidha kwesoloza ghalala, olwo abantu abali mu buli kika baire emberi, nga buli kika kiidha lwakyo ndidha kwoleka ekika ekirimu eyasobya. Abantu abali mu buli nda baidha kwidha emberi, nga buli nda eidha lwayo ndidha kwoleka enda erimu eyasobya. Abantu abali mu buli ndhu edhiri mu nda eyo, baidha kwidha emberi, nga buli ndhu eidha lwayo ndidha kwoleka endhu erimu eyasobya. “Abantu ab'endhu eyo baidha kwidha emberi, nga buli muntu aidha lulwe." 
Joshua7:15 Ndidha kwoleka omuntu ali n'ebintu ebyo ebyali biri n'okuzikirizibwa. Omuntu oyo mwidha kumwokya n'ab'omu maka ge boonaboona, na kiisi kintu kyayeta ati kikye, kuba yakola bubi inho okudheemera ekiragiro kyange era n'okuswaza Isiraeli obwaga agho.”" 
Joshua7:16 Enkyo einho ku lunaku olwairirira, Yoshua yaayeta Abaisiraeli boonaboona ghalala. Yaayeta ebika, nga buli kika kiidha lwakyo emberi. Ekika ekya Yuda kyalondebwamu." 
Joshua7:17 Mu kika ekyo yaayetamu enda edhirimu, nga buli ndala eidha lwayo emberi. Enda ya Zera yaalondebwamu. Mu nda ya Zera, yaayetamu endhu edhirimu, nga buli ndhu eidha lwayo emberi. Endhu ya Zabudi yaalondebwamu." 
Joshua7:18 Mu ndhu ya Zabudi yaayetamu abasaadha abaalimu, nga buli musaadha aidha lulwe. Akyani mutabane wa Karumi, era mwidhukulu wa Zabudi yaalondebwamu." 
Joshua7:19 Yoshua kyeyava naakoba Akyani ati: “Mwana wange, yogera amazima mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli weenenie. Nkobera kye wakola otakingisa.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akyani yairamu ati: “Mu butuufu bwene nakola ekibi eri Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli era biti bwe byali: 
Joshua7:21 mu bintu bye twanhaga nabonamu ekivaalo ekiboneka obulungi einho, nga kyakolebwa e Babilonia. Naabonamu ni kilo ng'oti ibiri edha feeza, n'ekitundu ekya kilo ekya zaabu, naabyegomba era naabitwala. Ebintu ebyo mwidha kubyagaana nga nabiziika mu weema yange, nga feeza n'eri ghansi.”" 
Joshua7:22 Kale Yoshua yaatuma abasaadha, baalumuka baaja mu weema baayagaana nga bwenebwene ebintu biziike omwo, nga feeza n'eri ghansi." 
Joshua7:23 Baabitoola mu weema baabitwalira Yoshua n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, baabiisa agho ghansi mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Joshua7:24 Yoshua n'Abaisiraeli abandi boonaboona baagema Akyani, ni feeza, n'ekivaalo, n'ekitundu kya zaabu era okwo kwe baateera ni batabane ba Akyani ni baghala be, n'ente, n'endogoyi, n'entaama, ni weema ye, na kiisi kintu kyonakyona ekikye. Baabatwala mu kyetebwa Ekiiko eky'Ebizibu." 
Joshua7:25 Bwe baatuuka eyo Yoshua yaakoba Akyani ati: “Lwaki watuleetaku obuzibu obwaga agho? Leka buti weena Musengwa Katonda akuleeteku obuzibu!” Agho abantu boonaboona baakuba Akyani amabaale yaafa. N'ab'omu maka ge boona baabakuba amabaale baafa, era baabookya n'ebyaibwe byonabyona." 
Joshua7:26 Bwe baamala, baamubungaku emungo ey'amabaale enkologho ekaaliyo ni ye buli eno. Era ekifo ekyo kyekiva kyetebwa Ekiiko eky'Ebizibu. Olwo Musengwa Katonda yaalekera agho okusungughala." 
Joshua8:1 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Lekera agho okutya n'okuwaamu amaani. Situkiramu n'abasaadha bo abalwani boonaboona, muje mulumbe Ayi. Kuba bona eno, mmaze okukuta mu ngalo kyabazinga wa Ayi n'abantu be, n'ekibuga, n'ensi ye." 
Joshua8:2 Kye mwakola Yeriko ni kyabazinga waakyo, kye mube mukole ekibuga Ayi ni kyabazinga waakyo. Aye ku luno musobola okutwala kye munaaba munhaze, ng'ebintu n'ensolo. Mubazinduukirize mubagweku nga mubava inhuma.”" 
Joshua8:3 Kale Yoshua yaategeka okuja e Ayi n'abasaadha be abalwani boonaboona. Yaalondaku abasaadha emitwalo esatu (30,000) abalwani einho, yaabalagira baje obwire," 
Joshua8:4 ng'abakoba ati: “Muje mubwame einhuma ow'ekibuga era nga timuli ghala nakyo, nga muli beetegefu okulumba." 
Joshua8:5 Nze n'abantu boonaboona be ndi nabo, twidha kwidha nga tukiva emberi waakyo. Bwe tunaabona abasaadha ab'e Ayi nga baidha okutulumba, twidha kukyuka tulumuke nga bwe twakola ku mukuzi gule." 
Joshua8:6 Baidha kudhuuba bati tuli kubalumuka, nga ku mukuzi gule, batubingirire okutuusa nga tubalesiiza ekibuga ghala." 
Joshua8:7 Ng'olwo musituka okuva ghe munaaba mubwaime, nga mugema ekibuga ekyo kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kukibata mu ngalo." 
Joshua8:8 Bwe mumala okukigema mukikunaanieku omuliro, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira. Mugeme ebiragiro ebyo obutabivaaku.”" 
Joshua8:9 Kale Yoshua yaabasindika, baaja baabwama nga ghazira ababona e bugwandhuba wa Ayi okwolekera Betheli. Beeteega agho obwire obwo, aye Yoshua obwire obwo yaabumala mu bantu abaasigala." 
Joshua8:10 Enkyo einho ku lunaku olwairirira, Yoshua yaawuuna yaayeta abasaadha abalwani boonaboona, mwene yaabakulemberamu n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu eby'endhawulo, baayolekera Ayi." 
Joshua8:11 Baaja baatuuka kumpi n'ekibuga, agho emberi waakyo, ku luuyi lwakyo olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, baagumba agho nga ghaligho bwa kiiko ghagati ghaibwe n'ekibuga Ayi." 
Joshua8:12 Yoshua yaalagira abasaadha ng'enkumi itaanu (5,000) baabwama e bugwandhuba ow'ekibuga Ayi ku luuyi lwakyo oluliku ekibuga Betheli." 
Joshua8:13 Kale batyo abasaadha be abalwani bwe baategekebwa ekikunsu ekisinga bunene kyaba ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba ow'ekibuga ekyo Ayi, abandi baaba e bugwandhuba wa kyo. Yoshua mwene obwire obwo yasula mu kiiko." 
Joshua8:14 Kyabazinga ow'e Ayi bwe yababona, mwene n'abasaadha be boonaboona baayangugha, baaja nga boolekeire ekiiko ekirimu Yorudani okulwana n'Abaisiraeli mu kifo kirala ekyo ng'omukuzi gule. Baali nga tibaidhi ng'eriyo abaja okubalumba nga babava e mugongo." 
Joshua8:15 Yoshua n'abasaadha be beefuula ng'abali kubalumuka, baaja mu irungu." 
Joshua8:16 Abantu boonaboona abaali mu Ayi baayetebwa okubingirira Abaisiraeli. Era mu nsambo oti n'eyo Abaisiraeli baalesa ab'e Ayi ekibuga kyaibwe. 
Joshua8:17 Mu Ayi timwasigala musaadha yeenayeena ataaja kubinga Baisiraeli, era baaleka emiryango egy'ekibuga nga gyasaamiriire." 
Joshua8:18 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Lingiriza eifumo lyo ekibuga ekyo Ayi, kuba ndidha kukikugha.” Yoshua yaakola nga bwe baamukoba," 
Joshua8:19 era olwagalula omukono n'eifumo eryamuli mu ngalo ati, abasaadha abaali babwaime nga beeteeze, baziinhuukayo, bangira mu kibuga baakigema. Era mu kiseera kyene ekyo baakikumaku omuliro." 
Joshua8:20 Abasaadha ab'e Ayi baaja okulingaku einhuma, nga babona omwosi ogw'ekibuga kyaibwe ekiri kuya guli mu bire ng'ate bazira na gha kulumukira. Kuba Abaisiraeli abaali bali kulumuka nga boolekeire eirungu, baakyuka baatoolera okulumuka nga baidha ye bali okubalumba." 
Joshua8:21 Yoshua n'abasaadha be, bwe baabona nga banaibwe bagemye ekibuga era nga bakikunaaniizaaku n'omuliro, baatoolera okwita abasaadha ab'e Ayi." 
Joshua8:22 Bale abaagema ekibuga boona bwe baamala, baidha okulumba ab'e Ayi. Kale ab'e Ayi baaba nga bali ghagati gh'ebikunsu byombi eby'Abaisiraeli. Abaisiraeli baita ab'e Ayi ghaabula asigala nga mulamu oba abalumukaku" 
Joshua8:23 okutoolaku kyabazinga we Ayi ye baagema ni bamutwalira Yoshua ng'akaali mulamu. 
Joshua8:24 Abaisiraeli bwe baamala okwita abasaadha ab'omu Ayi boonaboona, abaali bali kubabingirira eyo mu irungu, baaja baita abo boonaboona abaali basigaire mu kibuga." 
Joshua8:25 Abantu ab'e Ayi boonaboona abaafa ku lunaku olwo baali omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000), abasaadha n'abakazi." 
Joshua8:26 Kuba Yoshua tiyaisa mukono gwe ogwalimu eifumo ng'aliringiriiza Ayi, okutuusa nga bamaze okwita abantu baamu boonaboona." 
Joshua8:27 Abaisiraeli baatwala ensolo n'ebintu ebindi bye baanhaga mu kibuga, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba Yoshua." 
Joshua8:28 Kale Yoshua yaayokya ekibuga Ayi, yaakireka nga kiri byanhe byereere nga bwekiri ni ye buli eno." 
Joshua8:29 Era yaaghanika kyabazinga ow'e Ayi ku muti, yaalengeedhera okwo yaafa. Omulambo gwe baaguleka ku muti okwo okutuusa olw'eigulo. Endhuba bweyali ng'eri kumpi kugwa Yoshua yaalagira, baatoola omulambo ogwo ku muti, baagusuula aghaalinga omulyango ogwangiranga mu kibuga. Bwe baamala, baagubungaku emungo ey'amabaale enkologho ekaaligho ni ye buli eno." 
Joshua8:30 Nga ghabiseeghooku entangama, Yoshua yaaja ku Lusozi Ebali yaazimbirayo Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli Alutaari." 
Joshua8:31 Yagizimba ng'ajiira ku ebyo Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda bye yagalagira Abaisiraeli, nga bwekiri mu mateeka ga Musa oyo, nti: alutaari ezimbwa na mabaale gatali mateme gaaku na kyuma. Ku alutaari okwo baagheeraku Musengwa Katonda emisengo egyokebwa, era n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Joshua8:32 Nga bakaali agho, Yoshua yaaghandiika amateeka ku mabaale ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona balingiriire, nga Musa bwe yaleka ng'agaghandiise." 
Joshua8:33 Abaisiraeli boonaboona abazaale baamu n'abasenze, baayemerera gha Sanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda nga bagiri eruuyi n'eruuyi. Baali n'abakulu baibwe ab'ebikunsu, n'abakulembeze baibwe, era n'abalamuzi baibwe, nga balingiriire bakabona Abalevi abaabbeedanga Sanduuku eyo. Abandi baali bakubye Olusozi Gerizimu emigongo, ate ng'abandi emigongo gyaibwe bagiringiriiza Olusozi Ebali. Atyo Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira okusabiranga Abaisiraeli enkabi." 
Joshua8:34 Agho Yoshua yaasomera abantu amateeka goonagoona nga bawulira, ng'omwo n'omuli n'enkabi, n'ebikolimo, nga bwe byaghandiikibwa mu kitabo eky'Amateeka." 
Joshua8:35 Ku ebyo Musa bye yalagira ghazira Yoshua ky'ataasoma, era mu Baisiraeli abeesoloza okumuwulira ng'asoma, n'omwali abakazi, n'abaana, n'abasenze abaali baba aghalala n'Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua9:1 Bakyabazinga ab'e bugwandhuba obw'omwiga Yorudani baawulira ng'Abaisiraeli bwe baaghangula abazigu baibwe. Bakyabazinga abo, ni bano: ab'omu biketezo eby'ensozi, n'ab'omu biiko, n'ab'omu biketezo ebiri ku mbali okw'Enhandha Eyaghagati ng'oja e Lebanoni. Abantu abaali mu biketezo bino, ni bano: Abahitti, Abamori, Abakanaani, Abaperizzi, Abahivi, n'Abayebusi." 
Joshua9:2 Bano baaba ghalala boonaboona, baisania beeyimbe balwanise Yoshua n'Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua9:3 Aye abantu ab'e Gibeoni, nga Bahivi, baawulira Yoshua kye yakola Yeriko ni Ayi." 
Joshua9:4 Kale beene baasalagho okumuguya. Baafunayo emere baagita mu ndyanga enkaire einho, baagitwika endogoyi dhaibwe ghalala n'ensawo enkaire edh'amawu edh'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu dhe baagheraghera ni dhiidula ebighero." 
Joshua9:5 Baavaala mu bigere engaito edhaaseenena era nga baadhigheraghera, era baavaala n'ebivaalo ebikuunhuufu. Emere ye baasiba ng'entanda yali yakala ira era nga yamera obukuku." 
Joshua9:6 Baaja e Giligali Abaisiraeli ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, baakoba Yoshua n'Abaisiraeli abo bati: “Tuva eyo mu nsi ya ghala era twidhie okukola n'imwe endagaano.”" 
Joshua9:7 Aye Abaisiraeli baabakoba bati: “Tusobola tutya okukola n'imwe endagaano? Musobola okuba nga muva kumpi ghano.” 
Joshua9:8 Baakoba Yoshua bati: “Kye munaatukoba kyonakyona kye tunaakola.” Yoshua yaababuuza ati: “Niimwe baani era muva gha?” 
Joshua9:9 Agho baamukoba bati: “Tuva ghala inho aye olw'okuba twawulira ku bintu Musengwa Katonda waimwe by'akola, kye tuviire ni twidha." 
Joshua9:10 Twawulira bye yakola bakyabazinga ababiri Abamori abaali e buvandhuba ewa Yorudani: Sihoni eyali kyabazinga wa Heshiboni, ni Ogi eyali kyabazinga wa Bashani eyabanga mu kibuga Ashitarothi." 
Joshua9:11 Abakulira ebikunsu byaife era n'abantu abandi ab'ensi yaife boonaboona, baatukoba tusibe entanda twetegekere olugendo luno, era twidhe tubabone. Batutumye tubakobere tuti tuli beetegefu okuba abagheereza baimwe, era tubasabe mukole n'ife endagaano." 
Joshua9:12 Mubone emere yaife eno, yali nsu bukalamu ghe twagisibira nga tuva eka okwidha okubabona aye buti yakala era yaagema obukuku." 
Joshua9:13 Mu nsambo n'endala, ensawo dhino edh'amawu dhaali mpyaka ghe twadhifukiramu omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, aye buti dhaatulikatulika. Era n'ebivaalo byaife bikuunhwike n'engaito dhaaseenena, olw'olugendo okuba oluleeyi einho.”" 
Joshua9:14 Kale Abaisiraeli baaganha okulya ku mere eyo abasaadha abo ye baasiba, ng'akamanhiso ak'endagaano. Aye kino baakikola nga tibeebuuziizaaku ku Musengwa Katonda." 
Joshua9:15 Yoshua yaakola nabo endagaano, yaabalayirira obutabaita era n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli baakola batyo." 
Joshua9:16 Bwe ghaabitagho enaku eisatu nga bamaze okukola endagaano, Abaisiraeli baakizuula ng'abantu abo baliraanwa baibwe era nga baba nabo ghalala." 
Joshua9:17 Agho Abaisiraeli baatoolera okutambula, era ku lunaku olwokusatu baatuuka mu bibuga eby'abantu abo era ni bino: Gibeoni, Kyefira, Beerothi, ni Kiriathi Yearimu." 
Joshua9:18 Aye ng'Abaisiraeli tibaghanga kwita bantu abo, kuba abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli baali nga bamaze okubalayirira mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli. Agho Abaisiraeli boonaboona beemuluguunhiza abakulu abo." 
Joshua9:19 Aye abakulu abo baabakoba bati: “Abantu abo twabalayirira mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, buti titughanga kubakola kabi koonakoona." 
Joshua9:20 Kye tuli n'okukola, kubaleka nga balamu bwe tutakola tutyo, obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwidha kutwakiraku ng'oti muliro." 
Joshua9:21 Mubaleke baidha kutwasaagiranga enku n'okutusomberanga amaadhi.” Era kityo bwe kyali. 
Joshua9:22 Yoshua yaayetesa abantu ab'e Gibeoni yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki mwatuguya muti muva ghala inho ate nga muli ba ghano, mu ife mwene?" 
Joshua9:23 Mbeeni nga bwemwakola mutyo, Musengwa Katonda aidha kubabonereza, abantu baimwe baidha kubanga bairu kwasaaganga nku na kuja maadhi ga ndhu ya Katonda wange.”" 
Joshua9:24 Baamwiramu bati: “Ekyatukoza ekyo lwa kuba ife abagheereza bo twawulira aghazira kubuusabuusa, nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe yalagira omugheereza we Musa, okubagha ekiketezo kino kyonakyona, era n'okuzikiriza abantu baamu boonaboona kiisi ye munaabanga muja. Kale twatya inho nga mwidha kutwita." 
Joshua9:25 Era buti tukuli mu ngalo okutukola iwe mwene ky'onaabona nga n'ekirungi era ekituufu.” 
Joshua9:26 Yoshua yaabatangirira, yaalobera Abaisiraeli okubaita." 
Joshua9:27 Aye yaabafuula bairu okwasaagiranga Abaisiraeli enku n'okubajiiranga amaadhi, era n'okwasaagiranga alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda enku n'okugijiiranga amaadhi. Ebyo bye bakola ni ye buli eno, mu kifo woonawoona Musengwa Katonda gh'aba ng'alonze okumusingiza." 
Joshua10:1 Agho Adonizedeki eyali kyabazinga wa Yerusalemu yaawulira nga Yoshua yagema ekibuga Ayi, yaakizikiriza kyonakyona ni kyabazinga waamu. Era yaawulira nga yakola Yeriko ni kyabazinga waamu ekintu n'ekirala ekyo. Era yaayongera okuwulira ng'abantu ab'e Gibeoni baakola endagaano n'Abaisiraeli, era nga baba nabo ghalala. Bwe yawulira ebintu ebyo yaatya inho ebitaloodheka." 
Joshua10:2 Kuba Gibeoni kyali kibuga kinene ng'ebibuga ebinene bwe byali, ebyalingamu bakyabazinga. Kyali kinene okusinga Ayi, era n'abasaadha baamu baali baidhi inho okulwana entalo." 
Joshua10:3 Kale Adonizedeki n'okugheereza obukwenda ye Hohamu kyabazinga ow'e Heburoni, ni ye Piramu kyabazinga ow'e Yaramuthi, ni ye Yafia kyabazinga ow'e Lakishi, ni ye Debiri kyabazinga ow'Eguloni, ng'abakoba" 
Joshua10:4 ati: “Mwidhe mumbeereku tukube Gibeoni, kuba abantu baamu baakola endagaano ni Yoshua n'Abaisiraeli.”" 
Joshua10:5 Agho bakyabazinga abo abataanu Abamori: owa Yerusalemu, owa Heburoni, owa Yaramuthi, owa Lakishi n'owa Eguloni, beesoloza, baata amagye gaibwe ghalala okwezungulula Gibeoni era baakirumba." 
Joshua10:6 Abasaadha ab'e Gibeoni baagheereza Yoshua obukwenda e Giligali, Abaisiraeli ye baali basimbye weema dhaibwe, nga bukoba buti: “Ife abagheereza bo, otatulekulira agho, yangughaku okwidha okutubeera otuwonie kuba bakyabazinga boonaboona Abamori, ababa eyo mu biketezo eby'ensozi, beesoloiza baatulumba.”" 
Joshua10:7 Kale Yoshua n'eigye lye lyonalyona, nga n'omuli n'abasaadha abaali abalwani abalungi einho, baatoolera olugendo nga bava e Giligali." 
Joshua10:8 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Otatya bakyabazinga abo, kuba mmaze okubakuta mu ngalo. Ghazira muntu anaaghanga kukulwanisa ng'akuboineku.”" 
Joshua10:9 Yoshua n'eigye lye baatambula obwire bwonabwona okuva e Giligali okutuuka e Gibeoni, era olwatuuka baazinduukiriza Abamori, baabagwaku nga tibeetegeike." 
Joshua10:10 Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera Abamori abo okutya einho nga baboine Abaisiraeli. Abaisiraeli baita inho Abamori abo e Gibeoni, era baababingirira nga bagemye engira ebita ku lusozi Bethi Horoni. Baaja nga babaita okutuukira irala e Azeka n'e Makkeda." 
Joshua10:11 Abamori bwe baali nga bali kulumuka Abaisiraeli, nga bagemye engira eyo ebita ku lusozi Bethi Horoni, Musengwa Katonda yaabasuulaku amabaale ag'omugozi amakologho nga gava mu igulu. Gaaja nga gabamagalikaku okutuukira irala e Azeka, era gaabaita. Abaafa amabaale ago baawula abo Abaisiraeli be baita n'empiima." 
Joshua10:12 Olunaku Musengwa Katonda lwe yagha Abaisiraeli obughanguzi ni baghangula Abamori, Yoshua yaakoba Musengwa Katonda ebibono bino, ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona bawulira, ati: “Iwe endhuba yemerera agho e Gibeoni era tovaagho; n'iwe omwezi obe ghaigulu gh'ekiiko eky'e Aiyaloni.”" 
Joshua10:13 Agho endhuba yaayemerera obutavaagho, n'omwezi gwasigala ghe gwali okutuusa Isiraeli bwe yamaliriza okubonereza abazigu be. Bino byaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Yashari. Endhuba yayemerera ghaigulu ku igulu, yaaloba kuvaagho olunaku lulamba." 
Joshua10:14 Einhuma ere yali tebangayooku lunaku luli ng'oti n'olwo, era kasookanga olwo lubita, kabiri tebangayooku luli ng'oti n'olwo Musengwa Katonda lwe yagondera ekibono eky'omuntu kuba ku olwo Musengwa Katonda yalwanirira Isiraeli." 
Joshua10:15 Ebyo bwe byawa, Yoshua n'eigye lyonalyona erya Isiraeli bairayo e Giligali ye baali basimbye weema dhaibwe." 
Joshua10:16 Bakyabazinga Abamori abataanu baali nga balumwike, baaja beegisa mu mpuku e Makkeda." 
Joshua10:17 Ghaabaagho eyababona n'aidha n'akobera Yoshua ghe baali beegisiisa. 
Joshua10:18 Yoshua yaalagira ati: “Muje musiringise agabaale agakologho musembe omunwa ogw'empuku eyo era muteegho abantu bakuumegho. 
Joshua10:19 Aye imwe mutasigala agho, muje mu maiso n'okubingirira abazigu, mubave einhuma mubagweku, era timubaganha kungira mu bibuga byaibwe. Musengwa Katonda waimwe ababaghaire mwidha kubaghangula.”" 
Joshua10:20 Yoshua n'abasaadha be Abaisiraeli baita inho Abamori, aye abatonotono abaawonagho baaghanga okulumuka baatuuka mu bibuga byaibwe ebyaliku ebimante ebigumu einho." 
Joshua10:21 Agho abasaadha ba Yoshua boonaboona baira y'ali e Makkeda, ye baasimba weema dhaibwe, nga balamu be dherengerere. Era olwo nga ghazira akana n'ayogera ku Baisiraeli waire ekibono ekirala kiti." 
Joshua10:22 Agho Yoshua yaalagira ati: “Musembule omunwa ogw'empuku mundeetere bakyabazinga abo abataanu.” 
Joshua10:23 Baasembula omunwa ogw'empuku baatoolamu bakyabazinga bale abataanu: ow'e Yerusalemu, ow'e Heburoni, ow'e Yaramuthi, ow'e Lakishi, n'ow'e Eguloni," 
Joshua10:24 baabatwalira Yoshua. Yoshua yaayeta abasaadha be abalwani boonaboona baidha gh'ali. Yaakoba abakulembeze baibwe ati: “Museete ghano, mute ebigere byaimwe ku nkoto dha bakyabazinga bano.” Baaseeta baakola batyo." 
Joshua10:25 Agho Yoshua yaakoba abakulembeze ab'abasaadha be ati: “Mutatyanga waire okuwaamu amaani, mubenga bagumu era nga mumaliriire, kuba atyo Musengwa Katonda bw'aidhanga okukola abazigu baimwe boonaboona be munaalwananga nabo.”" 
Joshua10:26 Bwe yamala, yaita bakyabazinga abo era yaabaghanika ku miti etaanu. Emirambo gyaibwe gyalengeedhera okwo okutuusa olw'eigulo." 
Joshua10:27 Endhuba bweyali ng'eri kumpi kugwa, Yoshua yaalagira baaghanulayo emirambo egyo, baagisuula mu mpuku yeene eyo mwe baali beegisiisa. Baatoola agabaale agakologho baasemba omunwa ogw'empuku eyo ni ye buli eno." 
Joshua10:28 Era ku lunaku olwo, Yoshua yaagema ekibuga Makkeda, yaita kyabazinga waamu, n'abantu abaalimu boonaboona yaabazikiriza. Kye yakola kyabazinga ow'e Yeriko ni kyene ekyo kye yakola kyabazinga ow'e Makkeda." 
Joshua10:29 Ebyo bwe byawa, Yoshua n'abasaadha be abalwani boonaboona, baava e Makkeda, baaja okughamba ekibuga Libuna." 
Joshua10:30 Kino kyona Musengwa Katonda yaakibata mu ngalo baakighangula. Baita kyabazinga waamu, n'abantu boonaboona baabazikiriza. Kye yakola kyabazinga ow'e Yeriko ni kyene ekyo kye yakola kyabazinga ow'e Libuna." 
Joshua10:31 Ebyo bwe byawa Yoshua, n'abasaadha be abalwani boonaboona baava e Libuna, baaja baabwama okwezungulula ekibuga Lakishi era baakirumba." 
Joshua10:32 Ku lunaku olwokubiri Musengwa Katonda yaakibata mu ngalo baakighangula. Baita buli muntu eyali mu kibuga omwo ng'oti ni bwe baakola abaali mu Libuna. 
Joshua10:33 Horamu kyabazinga ow'e Gezeri yali aidhie okubeeraku abantu ab'e Lakishi, aye Yoshua yaamughangula ghalala n'eigye lye lyonalyona. Yaabaita, boonaboona okubazikiriza." 
Joshua10:34 Ekyairaku, Yoshua n'abasaadha be abalwani boonaboona, baava e Lakishi baaja baabwama okwezungulula ekibuga Eguloni, era baakirumba." 
Joshua10:35 Ku lunaku lwene olwo baakighangula. Baita buli muntu eyali mu kibuga omwo ng'oti ni bwe baakola abaali mu Lakishi. 
Joshua10:36 Ebyo bwe byawa, Yoshua n'abasaadha be abalwani boonaboona, baava e Eguloni baaja baalumba ekibuga Heburoni ekyali mu biketezo eby'ensozi." 
Joshua10:37 Baakigema era baita kyabazinga waamu n'abantu boonaboona abaakirimu. Baaja ni mu bibuga ebyali biriiraine Heburoni, yoona baitayo abantu abaaliyo boonaboona. Yoshua yaalagira abasaadha be okuzikiriza ekibuga kyonakyona nga bwe baazikiriza Eguloni. Ghaabulagho omuntu ye baaleka nga mulamu." 
Joshua10:38 Agho Yoshua, n'abasaadha be abalwani boonaboona, baakyuka baira einhuma, baalumba ekibuga Debiri," 
Joshua10:39 baakighangula era baita kyabazinga waamu n'abantu boonaboona abaakirimu. Era baalumba n'ebibuga ebindi ebiriiraine ekibuga ekyo Debiri, baabighangula era baita n'abantu abaabirimu ng'oti ni bwe baakola Heburoni ni Libuna, ni bakyabazinga baamu." 
Joshua10:40 Atyo Yoshua ni bwe yaghangula ebiketezo ebyo byonabyona ni bakyabazinga baamu: ebiketezo n'eby'oku nsozi, n'eby'oku buserengeto, n'eby'omu biiko, n'eby'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba ebyali ebikalukalu. Nga ghazira mulamu y'alekagho, aye nga boonaboona abazikiriza nga Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli bwe yalagira." 
Joshua10:41 Yabaghangula okuva e Kadeshi Barinea okutuuka e Gaza, era n'okuva ku kiketezo eky'e Gosheni okutuukira irala e Gibeoni." 
Joshua10:42 Yoshua n'abasaadha be, baaghangula mu lulwana lulala bakyabazinga abo boonaboona, era baabatoolaku ebiketezo byaibwe. Kuba Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, yalwanirira Isiraeli." 
Joshua10:43 Ebyo bwe byawa, Yoshua n'eigye lyonalyona erya Isiraeli bairayo e Giligali ye baasimba weema dhaibwe." 
Joshua11:1 Kyabazinga Yabini ow'e Hazori bwe yawulira ku bughanguzi obw'Abaisiraeli, yaagheereza obukwenda eri bakyabazinga abaali bamuliiraine. Bano baali: Yobabu kyabazinga ow'e Madoni, ni kyabazinga ow'e Shimuroni, ni kyabazinga ow'e Akishafu." 
Joshua11:2 Era yaagheereza obukwenda eri bakyabazinga ab'omu biketezo eby'oku nsozi ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, era n'ab'omu kiiko ekirimu omwiga Yorudani, n'ab'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'enhandha Kinnerothi n'ab'omu biketezo eby'omu biiko, era n'ab'omu biketezo eby'oku nhandha kumpi ni Dori." 
Joshua11:3 Era yaagheereza obukwenda eri Abakanaani e buvandhuba n'e bugwandhuba bwa Yorudani, n'eri Abamori, Abahitti, Abaperizzi, n'Abayebusi abaali mu biketezo eby'oku nsozi, era n'eri Abahivi ab'e Mizipa mu kiketezo ky'omu kiiko ky'olusozi Herimoni." 
Joshua11:4 Baidha n'amagye gaibwe goonagoona, baaba abalwani kamaala inho, nga bali ng'oti musenho gwa ku nhandha. Baaba n'embalaasi n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo kamaala." 
Joshua11:5 Bakyabazinga bano boonaboona beeyimba, baidha baasimba weema dhaibwe ghalala e Meromu ku mwiga, okulwana n'Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua11:6 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Abo otabatya kuba ndidha kubaita boonaboona, idho ku saawa ng'oti ni dhino banaaba bafiire. Embalaasi dhaibwe mwidha kudhisala eminho, n'ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo mubyokye.”" 
Joshua11:7 Kale Yoshua n'abasaadha be baazinduukiriza abazigu bale, baabagwaku nga tibabeetegekeire, agho e Meromu ku mwiga." 
Joshua11:8 Musengwa Katonda yaagha Isiraeli obughanguzi, baabingirira abazigu baibwe baabalwanisa okubatuukiza irala mu kibuga Sidoni Ekikologho n'e Misirefothi Maimu ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba. Era baababingirira n'okubatuukiza irala mu kiiko eky'e Mizipa ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba. Baaja nga babalwanisa okutuusa lwe baabamalagho okubaita." 
Joshua11:9 Yoshua yaabakola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yamulagira: yaasala embalaasi dhaibwe eminho, era yaayokya ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo omuliro." 
Joshua11:10 Mu biseera ebyo, obwakyabazinga obw'e Hazori, bwali nga n'obusinga amaani mu kiketezo ekyo. Agho Yoshua n'abasaadha be baakyuka baabulumba era baabughangula." 
Joshua11:11 Baita abantu boonaboona abaali mu kibuga Hazori, era ekibuga ekyo baakyokya omuliro." 
Joshua11:12 Yoshua yaagema ebibuga eby'omu kiketezo ekyo byonabyona, yaita bakyabazinga baamu n'abantu baibwe boonaboona, nga Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira." 
Joshua11:13 Aye ghazira kibuga kyonakyona kyazimbibwa ku kasozi, Baisiraeli kye baayokya okutoolaku Hazori Yoshua kye yayokya." 
Joshua11:14 Ebintu byonabyona Abaisiraeli bye baanhaga mu bibuga ebyo era n'ebyayo, baabyetwalira, aye abantu boonaboona nga babaita aghazira kulekagho naire mulala nga mulamu." 
Joshua11:15 Nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira Musa omugheereza we, yeena Musa bwe yalagira Yoshua. Era Yoshua oyo yaakola byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira Musa aghazira kulekayo naire ekintu ekirala." 
Joshua11:16 Bino n'ebiketezo Yoshua n'abasaadha be bye baanhaga: ebiketezo eby'ensozi n'eby'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ebiketezo by'e Gosheni n'eby'omu kiiko, ebiketezo eby'e Araba, ebiketezo bya Isiraeli eby'ensozi n'eby'omu kiiko," 
Joshua11:17 ebiketezo ebiva ku lusozi Halaka oluli ku mukono omusaadha ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba kumpi ni Edomu, okutuuka e Baalagada ku mugooda ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba mu kiiko ekirimu Lebanoni, ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'olusozi Herimoni ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba. Yoshua yaghangula bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'omu biketezo ebyo, yaabaita" 
Joshua11:18 waire nga kyamutwalira ekiseera kireeyi okubalwanisa. 
Joshua11:19 Ebibuga byonabyona byanhagibwanga nga bimaze kughangulwa mu lutalo, okutoolaku Abahivi ab'e Gibeoni abaakola endagaano n'Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua11:20 Musengwa Katonda n'eyaleeteranga abantu abo, okukanaghala ni balwana n'Abaisiraeli. Olwo basalirwe omusango gubasinge, era bazikirizibwe aghazira kusaasirwa, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira Musa." 
Joshua11:21 Mu kiseera ekyo, Yoshua yaja yaazikiriza olulyo olw'abantu abawaigufu abaayetebwanga Abanaki, abaabanga mu bibuga Heburoni, Debiri, Anabu, ni mu biketezo byonabyona eby'ensozi eby'omu Buyudaaya ni mu Isiraeli. Yoshua yabazikiriza boonaboona n'ebibuga byaibwe." 
Joshua11:22 Mu biketezo byonabyona eby'Abaisiraeli timwasigala Muanaki waire mulala, okutoolaku abatonotono abaasigalaku mu Gaza, Gathi ni mu Ashidodi." 
Joshua11:23 Kale atyo Yoshua bwe yanhaga ekiketezo ekyo kyonakyona eky'ensi, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira Musa. Yoshua yaamala yaakigabaniamu mu Baisiraeli boonaboona, buli kika nga kifunaku aghaakyo. Agho abantu baalekera okulwana entalo baafunaku emiraala." 
Joshua12:1 Musa bweyali ng'akaakulemberamu Abaisiraeli, baaghangula bakyabazinga babiri abaali e buvandhuba wa Yorudani, era baabanhagaku ebiketezo byaibwe. Bakyabazinga abo baali bafuga ekiketezo okuva mu kiiko ekirimu omwiga Arunoni ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, okutuuka ku kiiko ekirimu omwiga Yorudani e buvandhuba ew'omwiga ogwo, era n'okutuukira irala ku lusozi Herimoni ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba." 
Joshua12:2 Kyabazinga ye baasooka okughangula nga bamweta Sihoni, ng'afuga ekibuga Heshiboni era nga Muamori. Obwakyabazinga bwe nga butwalizaamu ekitundu kya Gileadi: nga buva ku kibuga Aroeri ekiri kumpi n'ekiiko ekirimu omwiga Arunoni, ku luuyi olw'ekiiko ekyo olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, bwatuuka ku mwiga Yabboki, ku nsalosalo y'Abammoni." 
Joshua12:3 Yali era nga n'afuga ekiiko ekirimu Yorudani okuva ku nhandha ey'e Galilaaya okutuuka e Bethi Yeshimothi e buvandhuba ow'Enhandha Eyomuunhu. Obwakyabazinga buno nga butuuka mu kiiko eky'olusozi Pisiga. 
Joshua12:4 Kyabazinga owokubiri ye baaghangula nga bamweta Ogi kyabazinga owe Bashani. Yafugiranga mu bibuga bibiri, eky'e Ashitarothi n'eky'Ederei, era n'eyasembayo mu lulyo olw'abantu abawaigufu abaayetebwanga Abarefa." 
Joshua12:5 Obwakyabazinga bwe nga butwalizaamu olusozi Herimoni, n'ekiketezo ekyetebwa Saleka ni Bashani yeenayeena okutuuka ku nsalo y'ab'e Geshuri n'ab'e Maaka. Era nga ku Gileadi afugaku ekitundu okutuuka ku kiketezo kya Sihoni kyabazinga wa Heshiboni." 
Joshua12:6 Bakyabazinga bano bombi baaghangulwa Abaisiraeli nga bakulemberwa Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda. Era bwe yamala, yaagabaniamu ekiketezo kyaibwe yaakigha eb'ekika kya Reubeni, n'ekya Gadi, n'ekitundu eky'ekika kya Manasse, ng'omugabo gwaibwe." 
Joshua12:7 Bano ni bakyabazinga abaaghangulwa Abaisiraeli nga bakulemberwamu Yoshua: bakyabazinga abo boonaboona abaafuganga ekiketezo ekiri e bugwandhuba wa Yorudani okuva e Baalagada mu kiiko eky'e Lebanoni, okutuuka ku lusozi Halaka oluli okumpi n'ensi Edomu. Ekiketezo kino Yoshua yakigabaniamu mu bika ebya Abaisiraeli, buli kika kyafunaku omugabo gwakyo." 
Joshua12:8 Mu kiketezo kino n'omwali ebitundu eby'ensozi, n'eby'omu kiiko, ni Araba ekiiko ekirimu omwiga Yorudani, n'obuserengeto, n'eirungu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. Yoshua n'Abaisiraeli nga bakaali kunhaga kiketezo kino, mwalingamu Abahitti, Abamori, Abakanaani, Abaperizzi, Abahivi n'Abayebusi." 
Joshua12:9 Abaisiraeli baaghangula bakyabazinga ab'ebibuga bino: Yeriko, Ayi ekiri okumpi ni Betheli," 
Joshua12:10 Yerusalemu, Heburoni," 
Joshua12:11 Yaramuthi, Lakishi," 
Joshua12:12 Eguloni, Gezeri," 
Joshua12:13 Debiri, Gederi," 
Joshua12:14 Horuma, Aradi," 
Joshua12:15 Libuna, Adullamu," 
Joshua12:16 Makkeda, Betheli," 
Joshua12:17 Tappua, Heferi," 
Joshua12:18 Afeki, Lasharoni," 
Joshua12:19 Madoni, Hazori," 
Joshua12:20 Shimuroni, Akishafu," 
Joshua12:21 Taanaki, Megiddo," 
Joshua12:22 Kedeshi, Yokineamu ekiri mu Karumeli," 
Joshua12:23 Dori ekiri kumpi n'enhandha, Goiimu ekiri mu Galilaaya," 
Joshua12:24 ni Tiruza woonawoona bali bakyabazinga amakumi asatu na mulala (31). 
Joshua13:1 Agho Yoshua bweyali ng'akairiighe inho, Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Okairiighe inho aye ghakaaligho ekiketezo kinene ekiri n'okunhagibwa:" 
Joshua13:2 ekiketezo eky'Abafilisiti n'eky'Abageshuri. 
Joshua13:3 Ekiketezo kino, kiva ku mwiga Shihori, oguli e buvandhuba wa Misiri okwira ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, okutuuka ku nsalosalo ni Ekuroni. Era kitwalibwa ng'eky'Abakanaani, era nga kirimu abafuzi bataanu ow'e Gaza, ow'e Ashidodi, ow'e Ashikeloni, ow'e Gathi n'ow'e Ekuroni. Ekiketezo ekindi n'eky'e Avvimu" 
Joshua13:4 ekiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. Ghaligho ekiketezo eky'Abakanaani kyene, ghaabaagho ni Meara ekyali eky'Abasidoni ekituuka e Afeki ku nsalosalo n'Abamori." 
Joshua13:5 Ghaligho ekiketezo eky'Abagebali n'eky'e Lebanoni kyonakyona ekiri e buvandhuba ow'e Baalagada nga kiva ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha ogw'olusozi Herimoni ku ngira eja e Hamathi. 
Joshua13:6 Era ghaligho ekiketezo eky'Abasidoni kyonakyona ababa ghagati gh'ensozi dha Lebanoni ni Misirefothi Maimu kyona kiri n'okunhagibwa. Nze mwene ndidha kubingangayo abantu mu buli kiketezo Abaisiraeli ghe banaatuukanga. Iwe ky'oli n'okukola, n'okubagabaniamu ebiketezo ebyo nga bwe nakulagira." 
Joshua13:7 Kale ni mperaano ebiketezo ebyo bigabaniemu mu bika omwenda n'ekitundu eky'ekika eky'Abamanasse.” 
Joshua13:8 Ebika bino: eky'Abareubeni, n'eky'Abagadi, n'ekitundu eky'ekika eky'Abamanasse, byali byamala okufuna ekiketezo Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda kye yabigha, nga kiri e buvandhuba wa Yorudani." 
Joshua13:9 Ekiketezo kino, kyali kiva ku Aroeri ekiri kumpi n'ekiiko ekirimu omwiga Arunoni, kyatwalizaamu ekibuga ekiri ghagati mu kiiko, era kyatwalizaamu n'omuseetwe oguva e Medeba okutuuka e Diboni." 
Joshua13:10 Era kyeyongera kyatuukira irala ku nsalosalo ni Ammoni nga kitwaliizaamu ebibuga byonabyona ebyali bifugibwa Sihoni kyabazinga Omuamori ow'e Heshiboni. 
Joshua13:11 Era kyatwalizaamu Gileadi n'ekiketezo eky'Abageshuri, n'eky'Abamaka, n'olusozi Herimoni lwonalwona, ni Bashani yeenayeena okutuuka e Saleka." 
Joshua13:12 Era kyatwalizaamu obwakyabazinga bwa Ogi ow'e Bashani. Ono yafugiranga mu bibuga bibiri, eky'e Ashitarothi n'eky'Ederei, era n'eyasembayo mu lulyo olw'abantu abawaigufu abaayetebwanga Abarefa. Bano Musa yabaghangula era yaababingamu." 
Joshua13:13 Aye ate Abaisiraeli tibaabinga Bageshuri na Bamaaka, era nga baba nabo ghalala okutuusa ni ye buli eno." 
Joshua13:14 Ekika eky'Abalevi ni kyonka Musa ky'ataagha mugabo. Omugabo gwaibwe nga guli na kuva ku ebyo ebigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga byokerwa ku alutaari nga Musengwa Katonda oyo bwe yalagira Musa. 
Joshua13:15 Musa yali amaze okugabira ekika eky'Abareubeni obutaka bwaibwe ng'ajiira ku nda edhaali mu kika omwo. 
Joshua13:16 Ekiketezo kyaibwe kyali kiva ku Aroeri ekiri kumpi n'ekiiko ekirimu omwiga Arunoni, kyatwalizaamu ekibuga ekiri ghagati mu kiiko ekyo, n'omuseetwe ogwezungulwire ekiketezo eky'e Medeba." 
Joshua13:17 Era kyatwalizaamu ni Heshiboni n'ebibuga ebindi byonabyona ebikiriiraine ebiri ku museetwe ogwo, era ni bino: Diboni, Bamothi Baali, Bethi Baalimeoni," 
Joshua13:18 Yahaza, Kedemothi, Mefaathi," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriathaimu, Sibuma, ni Zerethi Shahara ekiri ku kasozi akali mu kiiko." 
Joshua13:20 Era ni Bethipeori ekiketezo eky'omu maserengeta ag'olusozi Pisiga ni Bethi Yeshimothi. 
Joshua13:21 Era n'ebibuga byonabyona eby'oku museetwe aghalala n'obwakyabazinga bwonabwona obwa Sihoni Omuamori eyafugiranga e Heshiboni n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu bano be yafuganga nabo Midia: ow'e Rekemu, ow'e Zuri, ow'e Huri, n'ow'e Reba. Aye Musa yabaghangula boonaboona yaabanhagaku ebiketezo byaibwe." 
Joshua13:22 Era mu bantu Abaisiraeli be baita n'omwali Balaamu omulaguzi era mutabane wa Beora. 
Joshua13:23 Mu bugwandhuba Abareubeni nga bakoma ku Yorudani nga n'ensalosalo. Ebibuga ebyo byonabyona n'ebyalo byaku n'ebyabagheebwa ng'omugabo era ng'obutaka bwaibwe, nga bajiira ku nda edhaali mu kika omwo." 
Joshua13:24 Musa yali amaze okugabira ekika eky'Abagadi obutaka bwaibwe ng'ajiira ku nda edhaali mu kika ekyo. 
Joshua13:25 Ekiketezo kyaibwe kyali kitwalizaamu Yazeri, n'ebibuga bya Gileadi byonabyona. Era kyatwalizaamu ekitundu eky'ekiketezo eky'Abammoni okutuukira irala ku Aroeri ekiri e buvandhuba wa Rabba." 
Joshua13:26 Era nga kiva e Heshiboni kyatuuka e Ramathi Mizipe era n'e Betonimu. N'okuva e Mahanaimu okutuuka ku nsalosalo ni Lidebiri. 
Joshua13:27 Era kyatwalizaamu ebibuga bino ebyali mu kiiko ekirimu Yorudani: Bethiharamu, Bethinimura, Sukkothi, ni Zafoni ekiketezo kino n'ekyafiikagho ku bwali obwakyabazinga bwa Sihoni eyali kyabazinga ow'e Heshiboni. Era omwiga Yorudani nga n'ogukola ensalosalo yaibwe ey'e bugwandhuba okutuukira irala ku Nhandha Galilaaya ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda ng'olingiriire olw'e buvandhuba." 
Joshua13:28 Ebibuga ebyo n'ebyalo byaku n'ebyagheebwa Abagadi ng'omugabo era ng'obutaka bwaibwe, nga bajiira ku nda edhaali mu kika omwo." 
Joshua13:29 Musa yali amaze okugabira ekitundu eky'ekika eky'Abamanasse obutaka bwaibwe ng'ajiira ku nda edhaali mu kitundu eky'ekika ekyo. 
Joshua13:30 Ekiketezo kyaibwe nga kija kyatuuka e Mahanaimu era nga kitwalizaamu Bashani yeenayeena, obwali obwakyabazinga bwa Ogi, era ng'omwo n'omuli ebyalo bya Yaira eby'e Bashani nkaaga." 
Joshua13:31 Era kyatwalizaamu ekitundu ku Gileadi, era kyatwalizaamu ebibuga bino: Ashitarothi ni Edurei ebibuga bino kyabazinga Ogi owa Bashani mwe yafugiranga. Bino byonabyona byagheebwa edhindi ku nda edha baidhukulu ba Makiri mutabane wa Manasse." 
Joshua13:32 Atyo Musa bwe yagabaniamu Abaisiraeli ekiketezo ky'e Moabu ekiri e buvandhuba wa Yeriko ni Yorudani. 
Joshua13:33 Aye ekika eky'Abalevi tiyakigha mugabo. Yabakoba ati omugabo gwaibwe gwidha kuvanga ku binaagheebwangayo eri Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli. 
Joshua14:1 Kiti ekiketezo ky'e Kanaani eky'e bugwandhuba wa Yorudani bwe kyagabanizibwamu mu Baisiraeli, ng'okugabania kuno kukolebwa Eleazari kabona, ni Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni, n'abakulu ab'ebika eby'Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua14:2 Nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira Musa, engabania ey'ekiketezo kino mu bika omwenda n'ekitundu, yali ya kukuba bululu." 
Joshua14:3 Musa yali amaze okugha ebika ebibiri n'ekitundu omugabo gwaibwe e buvandhuba wa Yorudani, aye Abalevi tiyabagha." 
Joshua14:4 Baidhukulu ba Yosefu baayawulwamu ebika bibiri: eky'Abamanasse n'eky'Abaefuraimu. Waire nga Abalevi Musa tiyabagha, baafuna ebibuga eby'okubangamu, n'ensiko ey'okwayirangamu ebisolo byaibwe." 
Joshua14:5 Abaisiraeli baagabana eitaka nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira Musa. 
Joshua14:6 Lulala, abantu ab'ekika ekya Yuda baidha ye Yoshua nga bakaali e Giligali. Owundi ku bantu abo ye baayetanga Kalebu mutabane wa Yefunne ow'oku nda ya Kenizzi yaamukoba ati: “Oidhi Musengwa Katonda kye yakoba Musa omusaadha we, ekigema ku iwe ni ku nze, nga tuli e Kadeshi Barinea." 
Joshua14:7 Agho nali ndi ku myaka amakumi ana egy'obukulu, Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda bwe yantuma okuja okukeeta ensi eno nga tuviira e Kadeshi Barinea. Naira naamukobera kyenekyene kye twabona." 
Joshua14:8 Abantu be naja nabo, baira baatiisa abantu. Aye nze naasigala nga ndi mwesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda wange." 
Joshua14:9 Olw'okuba nakola ntyo Musa yatusuubiza ati nze n'abaana bange, tuja kugheebwa eitaka eryo lye natambuliraku, libe lyaife." 
Joshua14:10 Aye mperaano bona, ghaakabitagho emyaka amakumi ana n'etaanu kasookanga Musengwa Katonda akoba Musa ekyo. Ebyo byali nga n'ebiseera Abaisiraeli ghe twabeerera mu irungu nga tuli kutambula okulibitamu, era Musengwa Katonda akaakuuma ekisuubizo kye, akandeseegho nga ndi mulamu. Nningaaku! Buti ndi ku myaka kinaana n'etaanu egy'obukulu." 
Joshua14:11 Nkaali n'amaani gange ng'oti ni bwe nali nago Musa ghe yantumira. Ndimu amaani ag'okulwana oba okukola ekintu ekindi kyonakyona. 
Joshua14:12 Agho ni kyenva nsaba nti mpa ebiketezo ebyo ebirimu ensozi, Musengwa Katonda bye yansuubiza ku olwo kuba wawulira ku olwo nga bw'eriyo Abanaki, abantu abawaigufu, mu bibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu. Musengwa Katonda aghanga okuba ninze, naababingamu nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba.”" 
Joshua14:13 Agho Yoshua yaasabira Kalebu enkabi era yaamugha ekibuga Heburoni ng'omugabo gwe. 
Joshua14:14 Ni ye buli eno Heburoni n'obutaka obwa baidhukulu ba Kalebu mutabane wa Yefunne Omukenizzi, olw'okuba yawulira era yaagondera Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
Joshua14:15 Ng'ekyo kikaali kubaagho Heburoni kyayetebwanga kibuga kya Araba. Araba nga n'asinga bukologho mu bantu abawaigufu abaayetebwanga Abanaki. Olwo ensi yaafunaku akalembereza, entalo dhaasiriikiriramu." 
Joshua15:1 Ekiketezo eky'ab'ekika kya Yuda kye baafuna nga kija kyatuuka ku irungu lya Zini ghe likoma, ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, aghali ensalosalo ni Edomu." 
Joshua15:2 Ensalosalo eno ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, ng'eva ku kikono eky'Enhandha Eyomuunhu," 
Joshua15:3 yaaja nga yeeyongerayo ku mukono gwene ogwo, yaaniinaniina Akirabbimu, era yeeyongerayo okutuuka ku Zini. Era yeeyongerayo ku luuyi lwene olwo olw'ekibuga Kadeshi Barinea, yaabita ku Hezironi yaatuuka ku Addari, yaakyuka yaayolekera Karika." 
Joshua15:4 Nga bw'etuuka Azimoni enonereza omwiga oguli ku nsalosalo ni Misiri, yaatuuka ku Nhandha Eyaghagati yaakoma agho. Eyo n'eyali ensalosalo ya Yuda ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Joshua15:5 Ensalosalo yaakyo ey'e buvandhuba yali Enhandha Eyomuunhu okuva agho omwiga Yorudani ghe gufukira mu nhandha aghali ekikono kyayo. Era agho nga n'aghatoolerera ensalosalo ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba," 
Joshua15:6 yaaja, yaatuuka ku Bethi Hogula, era yaaja ng'ebita ku luuyi lwene olwo era olwa Bethi Araba, yaatuuka ku ibaale lya Bohani mutabane wa Reubeni." 
Joshua15:7 Ensalosalo eyo ng'ebita mu kyetebwa Ekiiko eky'Ebizibu yaatuuka e Debiri, yeeyongerayo ku luuyi lwene olwo, yaakyuka okwolekera Giligali ekiringiriire olusozi Adummimu, ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba olw'ekiiko ekyo. Agho yaaja ng'ebita ku miiga egy'e Enishemeshi okutuuka ku kibuga Enirogeli." 
Joshua15:8 Nga bw'etuuka agho enonereza ekiiko ekya mutabane wa Hinnomu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba mu mbali mw'olusozi Yebusi ng'ekyo ni Yerusalemu. Agho nga eja yaaniina ku lusozi oluli e bugwandhuba w'Ekiiko kya Hinnomu, ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba w'Ekiiko ky'Abarefa." 
Joshua15:9 Kabiri yaava ghaigulu ku lusozi olwo yaaserengeta okutuuka ku miiga egy'e Mefutoa, era yaabitagho okutuuka ku bibuga ebiri ku lusozi Efuroni. Agho yaakyuka yaayolekera e Baala ng'ekyo ni Kiriathi Yearimu." 
Joshua15:10 Nga bw'etuuka e Baala eja ng'ekyezungulula, yaakibita e bugwandhuba yaatuuka ku lusozi Seiri, yeeyongerayo yatuuka ku lusozi Yearimu, ng'ekyo ni Kesaloni, yaalubita ku luuyi lwalwo olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Agho yaaja yatuuka e Bethi Shemeshi, era yaabita ku Timuna," 
Joshua15:11 yaaja ku lusozi Ekuroni ng'erubita ku luuyi lwene olwo, kabiri yaakyuka okutuuka e Shikkeroni, yaaja yaabisa olusozi Baala, yaabita ku Yabuneeli, yaakoma ku Nhandha Eyaghagati." 
Joshua15:12 E bugwandhuba, ensalosalo yaibwe yali Enhandha Eyaghagati. Eyo n'ensalosalo eyeezungulula ekiketezo eky'Abayuda ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali." 
Joshua15:13 Nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira, Yoshua yagha Kalebu mutabane wa Yefunne era ow'omu kika kya Yuda, ekitundu ku kiketezo kye yagha Abayuda. Yamugha ekibuga Heburoni, ekyo nga ni Kiriathi Araba, Araba nga n'azaala Anaki." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebu yaabingamu baidhukulu ba Anaki abaava mu baana be bano: Sheshai, Ahimani ni Talumai." 
Joshua15:15 Bwe yava agho yaja yaalumba ekibuga Debiri ekyayetebwangaku Kiriathi Seferi. 
Joshua15:16 Kalebu yaakoba abasaadha be ati: “Omuntu yeenayeena anaakuba n'aghangula Kiriathi Seferi, ndidha kumugha mughala wange Akisa abe mukazi we.”" 
Joshua15:17 Agho Othinieli mutabane wa Kenazi, nga Kenazi ono muganda wa Kalebu, yaakikuba yaakighangula, era Kalebu yaamugha mughala we Akisa." 
Joshua15:18 Olunaku lwe yaidha okumufumbirwa, Othinieli yaakoba Akisa asabe ise ekibandha. Akisa yaaja yaatuuka, yaava ku ndogoyi ye. Kalebu yaamubuuza ati: “Oyenda nkughe ki.”" 
Joshua15:19 Akisa yaamwiramu ati: “Ensi y'ongabyemu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, nkalukalu, kale nkusaba ompe ekirabo, ompeeku aghali ensulo edh'amaadhi.” Kale Kalebu yaamugha ensulo ey'eitale n'ey'eifo." 
Joshua15:20 Guno n'omugabo ogwagheebwa ekika kya Yuda nga bajiira ku nda dhaibwe. 
Joshua15:21 Ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba aghasemberayo irala era ng'oyolekeire ensalosalo ni Edomu, baagheebwayo ebibuga bino: Kabuzeelo, Ederi, Yagura," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona, Adada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedeshi, Hazori, Ithinani," 
Joshua15:24 Zifu, Telemu, Bealothi," 
Joshua15:25 Hazori Hadatta, Keriothi Hezironi, ekyo nga ni Hazori." 
Joshua15:26 Amamu, Shema, Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Hazari Gadda, Heshimoni, Bethipeleti," 
Joshua15:28 Hazari Shuali, Beerisheba, Biziothia," 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Iyimu, Ezemu," 
Joshua15:30 Elitoladi, Kyesili, Horuma," 
Joshua15:31 Zikulaga, Madimanna, Sansanna," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaothi, Shilihimu, Aini ni Rimmoni byonabyona nga n'ebibuga abiri n'omwenda n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:33 Mu kiketezo eky'omu kiiko, baagheebwayo ebibuga bino: Eshitaolo, Zora, Ashina," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoa, Engannimu, Tappua, Enamu," 
Joshua15:35 Yaramuthi, Adullamu, Soko, Azeka," 
Joshua15:36 Shaaraimu, Adithaimu, Gedera, ni Gederothaimu byonabyona nga n'ebibuga eikumi n'ebina (14) n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:37 Baagheebwayo n'ebibuga ebindi bino: Zenani, Hadasha, Migidaligadi," 
Joshua15:38 Dileani, Mizipa, Yokitheeli," 
Joshua15:39 Lakishi, Bozikathi, Eguloni," 
Joshua15:40 Kabboni, Lahamamu, Kitilishi," 
Joshua15:41 Gederothi, Bethidagoni, Naama, ni Makkeda byonabyona nga n'ebibuga eikumi n'omukaaga n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:42 Baagheebwayo n'ebibuga ebindi bino: Libuna, Etheri, Ashani," 
Joshua15:43 Ifuta, Ashina, Nezibu," 
Joshua15:44 Keila, Akazibu ni Maresha. Bino byali ebibuga mwenda n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:45 Era baagheebwayo ekibuga ekinene ekyetebwa Ekuroni, ghalala n'ebibuga ebindi ebitonotono ebikiriiraine, n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:46 N'ebibuga ebiriiraine Ashidodi, n'ebyalo byaku okuva e Ekuroni okutuuka ku Nhandha Eyaghagati." 
Joshua15:47 Era baagheebwayo ekiketezo ekindi nga kirimu ebibuga bino: Ashidodi ni Gaza, n'ebibuga ebitonotono ebibiriiraine, n'ebyalo byaku, okutuuka ku mwiga ogukola ensalosalo ni Misiri n'ebifo eby'oku Nhandha Eyaghagati." 
Joshua15:48 Mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi baagheebwayo ebibuga bino: Shamiri, Yattiri, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Danna, Kiriathi Sanna, ng'ekyo ni Debiri," 
Joshua15:50 Anabu, Eshitemoa, Animu," 
Joshua15:51 Gosheni, Holoni, ni Gilo. Bino byali ebibuga ikumi na kirala n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:52 Era baagheebwayo n'ekiketezo ekindi omwali ebibuga bino: Araba, Duma, Eshani," 
Joshua15:53 Yanimu, Bethi Tappua, Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 Humuta, Kiriathi Araba, ekyo nga ni Heburoni, ni Ziori. Bino byali ebibuga mwenda n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:55 Era baagheebwayo ekiketezo ekindi nga kirimu ebibuga bino: Maoni, Karumeli, Zifa, Yutta," 
Joshua15:56 Yezireeli, Yokodeamu, Zanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kaini, Gibea, ni Timuna. Bino byali ebibuga ikumi n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:58 Era baagheebwayo n'ekiketezo ekindi ekyalimu ebibuga bino: Halahulu, Bethizuri, Gedori," 
Joshua15:59 Maarathi, Bethanothi, ni Elutekoni. Bino byali ebibuga mukaaga n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:60 Era baagheebwayo n'ekiketezo ekindi ekyalimu ebibuga bino: Kiriathi Baala, ekyo nga ni Kiriathi Yearimu, ni Rabba. Bino byali ebibuga bibiri n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:61 Mu irungu baagheebwayo ebibuga bino: Bethi Araba, Middini, Sakaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibushani, ekyo nga n'Ekibuga Ekyomuunhu, n'ekiketezo ekyetebwa Engedi. Bino byali ebibuga mukaaga n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua15:63 Abayuda tibaaghanga kubinga Bayebusi be baayagaana nga n'ababa mu Yerusalemu. Era ni ye buli eno Abayebusi baba mu Yerusalemu ghalala n'Abayuda. 
Joshua16:1 Ensalosalo ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba ey'ekiketezo ekyagheebwa baidhukulu ba Yosefu, ng'etoolerera ku Yorudani, okumpi ni Yeriko, yaaja nga yeeyongerayo mu irungu. Bw'eva e Yeriko eniinaaniina ekiketezo eky'oku nsozi yaatuuka e Betheli." 
Joshua16:2 Yaava e Betheli yaaja e Luzi, era yeeyongerayo okutuuka e Atarothi Addari, ekiketezo eky'Abaraki." 
Joshua16:3 Agho yaaja ng'eyolekera e bugwandhuba, ng'ebita mu kiketezo eky'Abayafuleti, yaabita ghansi gh'olusozi Bethi Horoni. Era yaava agho yaabita e Gezeri yaatuuka ku Nhandha Eyaghagati." 
Joshua16:4 Ekyo n'ekiketezo ekyagheebwa ebika ebibiri ebyava mu Yosefu eky'Abaefuraimu n'eky'Abamanasse e Bugwandhuba. 
Joshua16:5 Ekiketezo eky'Abaefuraimu kyalinga n'ensalosalo ng'eva mu Atarothi Addari e buvandhuba, yaatuuka e Bethi Horoni eky'eitale," 
Joshua16:6 era yeeyongerayo okutuuka ku Nhandha Eyaghagati. Ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, nga bagabana ensalosalo ni Mikamethathi e buvandhuba ng'ensalosalo eyo ekyuka yaaja ng'eyolekera Taanathi Shilo, era yaakibita ku luuyi lwakyo olw'e buvandhuba yaatuuka e Yanoa." 
Joshua16:7 Okuva agho, ng'eserengeta yaatuuka e Atarothi n'e Naara, yaagemaku ku Yeriko katono, era yaakoma ku Yorudani." 
Joshua16:8 Okuva e Tappua ensalosalo eno ng'eja e bugwandhuba yaatuuka ku kaiga ke baayetanga Kana, era yaaja yaakoma ku Nhandha Eyaghagati. Ogwo n'omugabo ogwagheebwa ekika eky'Abaefuraimu nga bajiira ku nda dhaibwe." 
Joshua16:9 Okwo nga ni kw'oyongereza ebibuga ebindi n'ebyalo byaku ebyali mu kiketezo eky'Abamanasse, aye nga byagheebwa Baefuraimu." 
Joshua16:10 Aye tibaabingamu Bakanaani be baayagaana nga n'ababa mu Gezeri. Era ni ye buli eno Abakanaani baba ghalala n'Abaefuraimu aye nga baafuulibwa bairu abakola emirimo egy'olukako. 
Joshua17:1 Abandi ku baidhukulu ba Yosefu nga bava mu mutabane we omukulu Manasse, baagheebwa ekiketezo e bugwandhuba ew'omwiga Yorudani kibe obutaka bwaibwe. Makiri, lata wa Gileadi, n'eyali mutabane wa Manasse omukulu era yaaba omulwani omumanhifu einho. Kyeyava n'agheebwa Gileadi ni Bashani ebiri e buvandhuba wa Yorudani." 
Joshua17:2 Enda edhindi edha baidhukulu ba Manasse mutabane wa Yosefu, dhaagheebwa emigabo gyadho e bugwandhuba wa Yorudani. Enda edho dhaali nga dhikulirwa abaana ab'abalenzi bano: Abiezeri, Heleki, Asirieli, Shekemu, Heferi ni Shenida." 
Joshua17:3 Mu baidhukulu ba Makiri mutabane wa Manasse omukulu, n'omwali omusaadha ye baayetanga Zelofehadi mutabane wa Heferi era nga mwidhukulu wa Gileadi mutabane wa Makiri. Zelofehadi ono yazaala baghala beereere nga muzira mulenzi era nga babeeta: Mahala, Noa, Hogula, Milika ni Tiruza." 
Joshua17:4 Bano beesitula baaja ye Eleazari kabona, ni Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni, n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu, baabakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda yalagira Musa okutugha twena emigabo ng'oti ni Bamanasse banaife abasaadha.” Kale nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira baagheebwa emigabo ng'oti ni Bamanasse banaibwe abasaadha." 
Joshua17:5 Eno n'ensonga lwaki Abamanasse baafuna emigabo ikumi okwongereza ku kiketezo eky'e Gileadi n'eky'e Bashani, ebiri ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba olwa Yorudani." 
Joshua17:6 Kuba abaghala abo baafuna emigabo okwongereza ku b'ekika ekyo abasaadha gye baafuna. Ekiketezo kya Gileadi kyagheebwa Abamanasse abandi abaasigalagho. 
Joshua17:7 Ekiketezo ekyagheebwa Abamanasse nga kiva e Ashera kyatuuka e Mikamethathi e buvandhuba wa Shekemu. Olwo ensalosalo yaaja ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, yaazingiramu abantu ab'e Entappua." 
Joshua17:8 Ku nsalosalo y'ekiketezo eky'Abamanasse n'eky'Abaefuraimu, ghaaligho ekibuga ekyetebwa Tappua. Ng'ekiketezo ekyezungulwire ekibuga ekyo kya Bamanasse, aye ekibuga kyene nga kya Baefuraimu." 
Joshua17:9 Era ensalosalo yaaja yaatuuka ku kaiga akeetebwa Kana. Ebibuga ebiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba olw'akaiga ako, bya Baefuraimu, waire nga biri mu kiketezo kya Bamanasse. Ensalosalo ya Manasse yaaja ng'enonereza oluuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba olw'akaiga ako, era yaatuuka ku Nhandha Eyaghagati." 
Joshua17:10 Ekiketezo ky'Abaefuraimu nga kiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'ekiketezo ky'Abamanasse, Enhandha Eyaghagati yaaba ensalosalo ey'e bugwandhuba wa byombi. Ashera kyaba e bugwandhuba w'ekiketezo eky'Abamanasse ekyo, ate Issakari kyaba buvandhuba w'ekiketezo ekyo." 
Joshua17:11 Mu biketezo ebyezungulwire Issakari ni Ashera, Abamanasse baalimu n'ebibuga bino n'ebyalo byaku: Bethi Shani, Ibuleamu, Dora ekiri ku mbali okw'enhandha, Endori, Tanaka, Megiddo." 
Joshua17:12 Aye Abamanasse tibaasobola kubinga bantu be baayagaana nga baba mu bibuga ebyo kale Abakanaani baasigala nga bakaali mu bibuga omwo. 
Joshua17:13 Abaisiraeli ni bwe beeyongera okuba ab'amaani tibaabinga Bakanaani boonaboona kubamalamu aye baabafuula bairu baibwe. 
Joshua17:14 Lwali lulala baidhukulu ba Yosefu baakoba Yoshua bati: “Lwaki watugha omugabo mulala gwonka okuba obutaka bwaife? Ate nga Musengwa Katonda yatugha enkabi tuli abantu kamaala.” 
Joshua17:15 Yoshua yaabairamu ati: “Oba nga muli kamaala era ng'ekiketezo ekya Efuraimu eky'ensozi tikibamala, muje musaaghe ebibira mu kiketezo ekirimu Abaperizzi n'Abarefa.”" 
Joshua17:16 Baamukoba bati: “Bwenebwene ekiketezo eky'ensozi kitono inho tikitumala, aye Abakanaani ababa mu biketezo eby'oku museetwe e Bethi Shani n'ebyalo byakyo ebikyezungulwire n'abo ababa mu Kiiko ky'e Yezireeli, bali n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ebyakolebwa mu byuma.”" 
Joshua17:17 Yoshua yairamu Abaefuraimu n'Abamanasse ab'e bugwandhuba ati: “Kituufu muli kamaala era muli ba maani timwidha kuba na mugabo mulala gwonka. 
Joshua17:18 Ekiketezo eky'ensozi kiidha kuba kyaimwe waire nga kirimu ebibira mwidha kubisaagha, bube butaka bwaimwe okuva ye kiva okutuuka ye kikanga. Abo Abakanaani mwidha kubabingamu waire nga ba maani era nga bali n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ebyakolebwa mu byuma.”" 
Joshua18:1 Abaisiraeli bwe baamala okughangula ekiketezo kyonakyona Katonda kye yabagha, beesololeza e Shilo boonaboona, era nga bali eyo baasimba Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Joshua18:2 Ghaali nga ghakaaligho ebika musanvu eby'Abaisiraeli ebyali bikaali kugheebwa migabo gyabyo egy'obutaka. 
Joshua18:3 Kale Yoshua yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Muja kumala kiseera kyaga gha nga muteegerera, memale mutoole ekiketezo Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe kye yabagha?" 
Joshua18:4 Mwerondemu abantu basatubasatu okuva mu buli kika. Abantu abo ndidha kubatuma baje bakebere bukalamu nga baghandiika ebifa ku kiketezo kye mwenda okutwala ng'obutaka bwaimwe memale baidhe bankobere. 
Joshua18:5 Olumaliira baidha kukigabaniamu ebitundu musanvu: Abayuda baidha kusigala nga bakaali mu kiketezo kyaibwe ekiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e bugwandhuba, ate ab'enda ya Yosefu boona basigale mu kyaibwe ku luuyi olw'omugooda era olw'e buvandhuba." 
Joshua18:6 Baidha kundeetera ebighandiiko ebiinhonhola ebitundu ebyo omusanvu, nze mbakubire obululu ghano mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waife." 
Joshua18:7 Abalevi bazira mugabo mu imwe, kuba omugabo gwaibwe kugheereza Musengwa Katonda nga bakabona. Ate Abagadi, n'Abareubeni, n'Abamanasse ab'e buvandhuba, baamala ira okufuna emigabo gyaibwe e buvandhuba wa Yorudani, Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda gye yabagha.”" 
Joshua18:8 Kale abasaadha abo be baalonda baatoolera olugendo lwaibwe okuja okughandiika Yoshua bye yabakoba. Yoshua era yaabakoba ati: “Muje mukebere bukalamu nga mughandiika ebifa ku kiketezo ekyo, memale mwidhe munkobere. Nze ndidha kubakubira obululu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ghano e Shilo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Kale abasaadha abo baaja, baakebera bukalamu nga baghandiika ebifa ku bitundu omusanvu eby'ekiketezo ekyo nga kiisi kibuga bakiinhonhola lwakyo. Bwe baamala bairayo ye Yoshua ye baasimba weema dhaibwe e Shilo." 
Joshua18:10 Yoshua yaabakubira obululu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda agho e Shilo. Yaagabira ebika omusanvu eby'Abaisiraeli ebyali bisigaire, ekiketezo ekyo." 
Joshua18:11 Ekiketezo ekyasooka okukubwaku akalulu kyali ghagati gh'ekiketezo eky'Abayuda n'eky'Abayosefu. Era akalulu kaagwa ku Babenjamini ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali. 
Joshua18:12 Ensalosalo yaakyo ng'eva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olwa Yorudani olw'e buvandhuba, yaaja yaatuuka ku lusozi Yeriko oluli ku luuyi lwene olwo, yaaniinaniina mu nsozi edhiri e bugwandhuba, yaakoma ku irungu ery'e Bethaveni." 
Joshua18:13 Yaava agho ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba yaatuuka ku kibuga Luzi, ekyo nga ni Betheli, agho yaaserengeta yaatuuka ku kibuga Atarothi Addari ekiri ku lusozi oluli ku luuyi lwene olwo olw'ekibuga Bethi Horoni Ekyeifo." 
Joshua18:14 Agho ensalosalo yaakyusa ku luuyi olundi yaasimbira e bugwandhuba, ku lusozi oluli ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, olulingagaine ni Bethi Horoni, era yaakoma e Kiriathi Baali ekyo nga ni Kiriathi Yearimu ekibuga eky'Abayuda. Eyo n'eyali ensalosalo ey'e bugwandhuba." 
Joshua18:15 Ensalosalo ey'oku luuyi lwene olwo, ng'eva mu mbali omw'ekibuga Kiriathi Yearimu, yaaja yaatuuka ku Efuroni ku kaiga ak'Amaadhi ga Nefutoa." 
Joshua18:16 Agho yaaserengeta yaatuuka ghansi gh'olusozi olulingiriire ekiiko kya mutabane wa Hinnomu ekiri aghakoma ekiiko ky'Abarefa, ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Era yaava agho yaika mu kiiko kya Hinnomu ekyo, ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba mu mbali mw'olusozi olw'Abayebusi, kabiri yaaserengeta okutuuka ku kibuga Enirogeli." 
Joshua18:17 Agho yaakyuka yaasimbira ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, yaaja yaatuuka ku kibuga Enishemeshi, era yeeyongerayo okutuuka e Gelilothi ekiringagaine n'olusozi Adummimu, olwo yaaserengeta ku ibaale lya Bohani mutabane wa Reubeni" 
Joshua18:18 yaalibitaku ku luuyi lwene olwo olw'olusozi Bethi Araba, yaika okutuuka ku kiiko ekirimu omwiga Yorudani." 
Joshua18:19 Yeeyongerayo ng'ebitira ku luuyi lwene olwo olw'olusozi Bethi Hogula, era yaakoma ku kikono eky'Enhandha Eyomuunhu ekiri ku luuyi lwene olwo olwa Yorudani, ghe gufukira mu nhandha eyo. Eyo nga n'ensalosalo ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba ey'ekiketezo ekyo." 
Joshua18:20 Omwiga Yorudani nga n'ogukola ensalosalo ey'ekiketezo ekyo e buvandhuba. Edho dhoonadhoona n'ensalosalo edh'ekiketezo ekyagheebwa ekika eky'Ababenjamini, ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali." 
Joshua18:21 Ebibuga ghalala n'ebyalo byaku ebyagheebwa ekika eky'Ababenjamini nga bajiira ku nda dhaibwe byali nga ni bino: Yeriko, Bethi Hogula. Emeki Kezizi," 
Joshua18:22 Bethi Araba, Zemaraimu, Betheli," 
Joshua18:23 Avvimu, Para, Ofura," 
Joshua18:24 Kefarammoni, Ofuni, ni Geba. Ebyo nga n'ebibuga eikumi n'ebibiri n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua18:25 Ghaabaagho ekiketezo ekindi kye baabagha ekyalimu ebibuga bino: Gibeoni, Rama, Beerothi," 
Joshua18:26 Mizipa, Kefira, Moza," 
Joshua18:27 Rekemu, Irupeela, Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 Zela, Haelefu, Yebusi, ekyo nga ni Yerusalemu, Gibea, ni Kiriathi Yearimu. Ebyo nga n'ebibuga eikumi n'ebina (14) n'ebyalo byaku. Ebyo byonabyona nga n'omugabo ogwagheebwa ekika eky'Ababenjamini ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali." 
Joshua19:1 Akalulu bwe kaakubwa omukuzi ogwokubiri, kaagwa ku kika eky'Abasimeoni ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali. Ekiketezo kyaibwe nga kiri munda mwa kiketezo kya Bayuda." 
Joshua19:2 Era kyalimu ebibuga bino: Beerisheba, Sheba, Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Hazari Shuali, Bala, Ezemu," 
Joshua19:4 Elitoladi, Bethuli, Horumona," 
Joshua19:5 Zikulaga, Bethi Marikabothi, Hazari Susa," 
Joshua19:6 Bethi Lebaothi ni Sharuheni. Ebyo nga n'ebibuga eikumi n'ebisatu n'ebyalo byaku. 
Joshua19:7 Baafuna n'ekiketezo ekindi nga kirimu ebibuga bina n'ebyalo byaku era nga ni bino: Aini, Rimmoni, Etheri ni Ashani." 
Joshua19:8 Ekiketezo ekyo nga kizingiramu ebyalo byonabyona ebyezungulwire ebibuga ebyo, okutuukira irala e Baalathi Beeri, ekyo nga ni Rama mu kiketezo ekikalukalu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. Ebyo byonabyona, n'ogwali omugabo ogw'ekika eky'Abasimeoni ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali." 
Joshua19:9 Abayuda baafuna ekiketezo kinene inho okusinga kye baali beetaaga, kyova kyasalibwaku ekitundu kyagheebwa ekika eky'Abasimeoni." 
Joshua19:10 Akalulu bwe kaakubwa omukuzi ogwokusatu kaagwa ku kika eky'Abazebuluni ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali. Era ekiketezo kye baafuna ng'omugabo gwaibwe kyaja kyatuukira irala ku kibuga Saridi. 
Joshua19:11 Okuva agho ensalosalo yaasimbira e bugwandhuba, yaatuuka e Mareali, n'e Dabbeshethi, agho yaanonereza akaiga akali e buvandhuba wa Yokoneamu." 
Joshua19:12 Ensalosalo nga bw'eva ku luuyi lule olundi olwa Saridi esimbira buvandhuba, yaatuuka ku nsalosalo y'e Kisilothi Tabori, n'e Daberathi, era yeeyongerayo okutuuka e Yafia." 
Joshua19:13 Era yeeyongerayo ku luuyi lwene olwo, yaatuuka e Gathi Heferi n'e Ethikazini, agho yaakyuka okwolekera Nea era yaatuuka e Rimmoni." 
Joshua19:14 Ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ensalosalo ekyuka yaayolekera Hannathoni, yaakoma e Ifutaheli mu kiiko." 
Joshua19:15 Era yaazingiramu ebibuga bino: Kattathi, Nahalali, Shimuroni, Idala, ni Bethelehemu byonabyona byaghera ebibuga ikumi na bibiri n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua19:16 Ebibuga ebyo byonabyona n'ebyalo byaku, n'ebyali omugabo ogw'ekika eky'Abazebuluni ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali." 
Joshua19:17 Akalulu bwe kaakubwa omukuzi ogwokuna, kaagwa ku kika kya Abaissakari ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali." 
Joshua19:18 Era ekiketezo kye baafuna nga kizingiramu ebibuga bino: Yezireeli, Kesullothi, Shunemu," 
Joshua19:19 Hafaraimu, Shioni, Anaharathi," 
Joshua19:20 Rabbithi, Kishioni, Ebezi," 
Joshua19:21 Remethi, Engannimu, Enihadda ni Bethi Pazzezi." 
Joshua19:22 Ensalosalo yaibwe ng'ebita ku Tabori, ni ku Shahazuma, ni ku Bethi Shemeshi, yaakoma ku Yorudani. Ng'ekiketezo kyaibwe kizingiramu ebibuga ikumi na mukaaga n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua19:23 Ebyo byonabyona nga n'omugabo ogw'ekika ky'Abaissakari ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali. 
Joshua19:24 Akalulu bwe kaakubwa omukuzi ogwokutaanu, kaagwa ku kika ekya Abasheri ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali." 
Joshua19:25 Ekiketezo kyaibwe nga kizingiramu ebibuga bino: Helikathi, Hali, Beteni, Akishafu," 
Joshua19:26 Allamu Meleki, Amadi ni Mishali. E bugwandhuba nga kibita ku Karumeli ni Shihori Libunathi." 
Joshua19:27 Ensalosalo yaibwe ng'ekyuka yaayolekera e buvandhuba, yaaja yaatuuka e Bethidagona, era ng'ebita ku Zebuluni ni ku Efutaheli mu kiiko, olwo yaasimbira ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, yatuuka e Bethemeki n'e Neieli. Agho yaasimba, yaatuuka e Kabuli" 
Joshua19:28 n'Eburoni, n'e Rehobu, n'e Hammoni, n'e Kana, era yaatuukira irala e Sidoni ekikologho." 
Joshua19:29 Olwo yaakyuka yaabita e Rama, yaatuuka e Tiro ekibuga ekyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu. Kabiri yaakyuka yaabita e Hosa era yaakoma ku Nhandha Eyaghagati. Era yaazingiramu n'ebibuga bino: Makalabu, Akazibu," 
Joshua19:30 Umma, Afeki, ni Rehobu. Ebyo nga n'ebibuga amakumi abiri n'ebibiri aghalala n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua19:31 Ebibuga ebyo byonabyona n'ebyalo byaku, n'ebyali omugabo ogw'ekika eky'Abasheri ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali." 
Joshua19:32 Akalulu bwe kaakubwa omukuzi ogwomukaaga kaagwa ku kika eky'Abanafutali ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali. 
Joshua19:33 Ensalosalo yaibwe ng'eva ku kibuga Helefu yaabita ku muvule ogwali agho mu Zaanannimu, yaatuuka Adaminekebu n'e Yamonia, n'okutuukira irala e Lakkumu, yaakoma ku Yorudani." 
Joshua19:34 Agho kabiri yaakyuka yaasimbira e bugwandhuba, yaaja yaatuuka Azanothi Tabori, era yeeyongerayo e Hukkoki, yaatuuka e Zebuluni ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, era yaatuuka n'e Asheri e bugwandhuba, era ni ku Yuda e buvandhuba w'omwiga Yorudani." 
Joshua19:35 Ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu byali nga ni bino: Ziddimu, Zeri, Hamathi, Rakkathi, Kinnerethi," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama, Hazori," 
Joshua19:37 Kedeshi, Edurei, Enihazori," 
Joshua19:38 Yironi, Migadaleli, Horemu, Bethanathi, ni Bethi Shemeshi. Ebyo nga n'ebibuga eikumi n'omwenda aghalala n'ebyalo byaku." 
Joshua19:39 Ebibuga ebyo byonabyona n'ebyalo byaku n'ebyali omugabo ogw'ekika eky'Abanafutali ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali. 
Joshua19:40 Akalulu bwe kaakubwa omukuzi ogwomusanvu, kaagwa ku kika eky'Abadani ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali." 
Joshua19:41 Ekiketezo kyaibwe kyalimu ebibuga bino: Zora, Eshitaolo, Irishemeshi," 
Joshua19:42 Shaalabimu, Aiyaloni, Ithala," 
Joshua19:43 Eloni, Timuna, Ekuroni," 
Joshua19:44 Eliteke, Gibbethoni, Baalathi," 
Joshua19:45 Yehudi, Beneberaki, Gathirimmoni," 
Joshua19:46 Meyarakoni, ni Rakkoni, era n'ekiketezo ekyezungulwire Yoppa." 
Joshua19:47 Ekiseera kyatuuka, ekiketezo eky'Abadani kyabanhagibwaku abazigu. Agho Abadani baaja mu kibuga Leshemu baakirumba, baakighangula era baita abantu baamu, baakyeiriza. Baatoolera okukityamamu era baakikyusa n'eriina okuva ku Leshemu baakyeta Dani eriina lya dhaadha waibwe." 
Joshua19:48 Ebibuga ebyo byonabyona aghalala n'ebyalo byaku, n'omugabo ogwagheebwa ekika eky'Abadani ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali." 
Joshua19:49 Abaisiraeli nga bamaze okugabana emigabo egy'ebiketezo byaibwe, baagha Yoshua omwana wa Nuni yeena omugabo ogugwe." 
Joshua19:50 Ng'ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda bwe kyali, baamugha ekibuga kye yasaba, nga ni Timunathi Sera ekyali mu bitundu eby'ensozi ebya Efuraimu. Yairamu yaakizimba bukalamu era yaatyama omwo." 
Joshua19:51 Egyo n'emigabo, Eleazari kabona, ni Yoshua omwana wa Nuni, n'abakulu ab'ebika eby'Abaisiraeli, gye baagaba nga bakuba obululu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, agho ku mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda e Shilo. Kale batyo baamaliriza okugabaniamu eitaka." 
Joshua20:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yoshua ati: 
Joshua20:2 “Koba abantu Abaisiraeli oti, ‘Mulondegho ebibuga ole aise omuntu nga tagendereire mw'asobola okulumukira, nga bwe nakoba Musa abakobere." 
Joshua20:3 Ole aise omuntu nga tagendereire asobola okulumukira omwo yaawona mwene muntu oyo, aba ng'ali kumwagala olw'okwenda okwesasuuza." 
Joshua20:4 Omuntu oyo aghanga okulumukira mu kindi ku bibuga ebyo, era bw'atuuka eyo ali n'okuja aghasalirwa emisango, agho ku luya ku mulyango ogw'ekibuga, yainhonhola abataka abakulu ab'ekibuga ekyo byonabyona nga bwe byali. Bw'amala nga bamungiza mu kibuga nga bamugha agh'okubanga." 
Joshua20:5 Mwene muntu y'aise bw'amunonerezanga ng'ali kwenda okwesasuuza, n'atuuka mu kibuga omwo, ab'omu kibuga omwo tibamumughanga. Bateekwa okumukuuma kuba yaita omuntu aye nga tagendereire." 
Joshua20:6 Era abanga mu kibuga omwo okutuusa ng'amaze okusalirwa omusango, ng'abantu beesoloiza, era n'okutuusa ng'Omukulu wa Bakabona aligho mu kiseera ekyo amaze okufa. Olwo omuntu oyo yaaghanga okwirayo mu maka ge mu kibuga eky'ewaibwe ye yava.’ ”" 
Joshua20:7 Kale e bugwandhuba wa Yorudani baalondayo Kedeshi eky'e Galilaaya, mu kiketezo eky'ensozi ekya Nafutali ate mu kiketezo eky'ensozi ekya Efuraimu baalondayo Shekemu. Mu kiketezo eky'ensozi ekya Yuda baalondayo Kiriathi Araba, ekyo nga ni Heburoni." 
Joshua20:8 E buvandhuba wa Yorudani mu museetwe ogw'eirungu, era eyo nga n'e buvandhuba wa Yeriko, baalondayo Bezera mu kiketezo ekya Reubeni. Mu Gileadi baalondayo Ramothi eky'omu kika kya Gadi. Mu Bashani ekiketezo kya Manasse baalondayo Golani." 
Joshua20:9 Ebyo nga n'ebibuga omuntu mw'asobola okulumukira, ebyalondebwa olw'abantu boonaboona Abaisiraeli era n'olw'omuntu omusenze yeenayeena, kasita yabanga ng'aba mu Isiraeli. Ole yeenayeena eyaitanga omuntu aye nga tagendereire, ng'aghanga okulumukira mu kindi ku bibuga ebyo era yaawona mwene muntu y'aise. Era nga taitibwa okutoolaku ng'amaze okusalirwa omusango ng'abantu beesoloiza." 
Joshua21:1 Agho abakulu ab'enda edh'Abalevi baidha aghali Eleazari kabona, ni Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni, n'abakulu ab'ebika byonabyona eby'Abaisiraeli," 
Joshua21:2 e Shilo mu kiketezo eky'Abakanaani. Baabakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda ng'abita mu Musa yalagira ati tuli n'okugheebwa ebibuga mwe tube tubenga. Era tugheebwe n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi, twayirengamu ebyayo byaife.”"
