Joshua21:3 Kale nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira atyo, Abaisiraeli boonaboona baagha Abalevi ku bibuga byaibwe n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi, olw'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:4 Baidhukulu ba Aaroni kabona, ab'enda ya Kohathi, n'abaasooka okukubirwa akalulu baagheebwa ebibuga ikumi na bisatu okuva ku biketezo bino: ekya Yuda, n'ekya Simeoni, n'ekya Benjamini." 
Joshua21:5 Abaasigalagho ku nda ya Kohathi, boona baakubirwa akalulu, baagheebwa ebibuga ikumi okuva ku biketezo bino: ekya Efuraimu, n'ekya Dani n'eky'Abamanasse ab'e bugwandhuba." 
Joshua21:6 Era nga bakozesa akalulu, baagha baidhukulu ba Gereshoni ebibuga ikumi na bisatu okuva ku biketezo bino: ekya Issakari, n'ekya Asheri, n'ekya Nafutali, n'eky'Abamanasse ab'e buvandhuba." 
Joshua21:7 Ab'enda ya Merari baagheebwa ebibuga ikumi na bibiri okuva ku biketezo bino: ekya Reubeni, n'ekya Gadi, n'ekya Zebuluni." 
Joshua21:8 Batyo Abaisiraeli bwe baagha Abalevi ebibuga eby'okubangamu, n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu. Ekyo baakikola nga bakuba bululu nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira ng'abita mu Musa." 
Joshua21:9 Gano n'amaina ag'ebibuga ebyatoolebwa ku biketezo: ekya Yuda n'ekya Simeoni. Ebibuga ebyo byagheebwa," 
Joshua21:10 ab'ekika kya Levi, baidhukulu ba Aaroni ku nda ya Kohathi, kuba, ku abo akalulu kwe kaasooka okugwa." 
Joshua21:11 Baagheebwa ekibuga kya Araba, buti ekyetebwa Heburoni, ekiri mu kiketezo eky'ensozi ekya Yuda, era baabagheeraku n'ekiketezo ekikyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu. Araba oyo nga n'azaala Anaki." 
Joshua21:12 Aye ebyayiro ebyezungulwire ekibuga ekyo Heburoni n'ebyalo byakyo, byali nga byamala ira okugheebwa Kalebu mutabane wa Yefunne ng'omugabo gwe." 
Joshua21:13 Heburoni ekyo n'ekindi ku bibuga ebyalondebwa okulumukirangamu ole aise omuntu nga tagendereire. Ku ekyo Abalevi baayongerezebwaku ebibuga bino: Libuna," 
Joshua21:14 Yattiri, Eshitemoa," 
Joshua21:15 Holoni, Debiri" 
Joshua21:16 Aini, Yutta, ni Bethi Shemeshi, nga ku byonabyona babagheeraku n'ebiketezo omwalinga eisubi ery'okwayirangamu. Bino byali ebibuga mwenda era nga n'ebyava ku biketezo bino: ekya Yuda n'ekya Simeoni." 
Joshua21:17 Okuva ku kiketezo kya Benjamini baabaghaaku ebibuga bina, nga ni bino: Gibeoni, Geba," 
Joshua21:18 Anathothi, ni Alumoni, nga babagheeraku n'ebiketezo omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:19 Woonawoona, bakabona baidhukulu ba Aaroni baagheebwa ebibuga ikumi na bisatu, ghalala n'ebiketezo byaku omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:20 Abaasigalagho ku nda ya Kohathi era nga ba kika kya Levi, baagheebwa ku bibuga ebyatoolebwa ku Baefuraimu." 
Joshua21:21 Baagheebwa ebibuga bina, nga ni bino: Shekemu, n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu, nga kino kiba mu kiketezo eky'ensozi eky'Abaefuraimu, era nga n'ekindi ku bibuga ebyalondebwa okulumukirangamu ole aise omuntu nga tagendereire. Ebibuga ebindi byali nga ni bino: Gezeri," 
Joshua21:22 Kibuzaimu, ni Bethi Horoni, aghalala n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:23 Era baagheebwa ebibuga bina nga bitoolebwa ku Badani, nga ni bino: Eliteke, Gibbethoni," 
Joshua21:24 Aiyaloni, ni Gathirimmoni, aghalala n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:25 Era baagheebwa ebibuga bibiri nga bitoolebwa ku Bamanasse ab'e bugwandhuba nga ni bino: Taanaki, ni Gathirimmoni, n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:26 Woonawoona, ab'enda ya Kohathi abo baafuna ebibuga ikumi, ghalala n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:27 Abalevi abandi abaagheebwa ebibuga, n'abo abaava mu nda ya Gereshoni, era bano baafuna ebibuga bibiri okuva ku kiketezo eky'Abamanasse ab'e buvandhuba nga ni bino: Golani eky'omu Bashani era nga n'ekirala ku ebyo ebyalondebwa okulumukirangamu ole aise omuntu nga tagendereire, ni Beeshitera, era n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:28 Era baafuna ebibuga bina okuva ku kiketezo eky'Abaissakari nga ni bino: Kishioni, Daberathi," 
Joshua21:29 Yaramuthi, ni Engannimu, era n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:30 Era baafuna ebibuga bina okuva ku kiketezo eky'Abasheri, nga ni bino: Mishali, Abudoni," 
Joshua21:31 Helikathi, ni Rehobu, n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:32 Era baafuna ebibuga bisatu okuva ku kiketezo eky'Abanafutali, nga ni bino: Kedeshi eky'omu Galilaaya era ekindi ku byalondebwa okulumukirangamu ole aise omuntu nga tagendereire, ni Hammothi Dori, ni Karitanu, n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:33 Woonawoona, enda ya Gereshoni yafuna ebibuga ikumi na bisatu n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:34 Abalevi abaasigalagho, ab'enda ya Merari, baafuna ebibuga bina okuva ku kiketezo eky'Abazebuluni, nga ni bino: Yokoneamu Karita," 
Joshua21:35 Dimuna, ni Nahalali, era n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:36 Era baafuna ebibuga bina okuva ku kiketezo eky'Abareubeni, nga ni bino: Bezeri, Yahazi," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemothi, ni Mefaathi, n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:38 Era baafuna ebibuga ebindi bina okuva ku kiketezo eky'Abagadi, nga ni bino: Ramothi eky'omu Gileadi, ekindi ku ebyo ebyalondebwa okulumukirangamu ole aise omuntu nga tagendereire, ni Mahanaimu," 
Joshua21:39 Heshiboni, ni Yazeri, n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu." 
Joshua21:40 Woonawoona, ab'enda ya Merari baafuna ebibuga ikumi na bibiri." 
Joshua21:41 Ku kiketezo kyonakyona Abaisiraeli kye baafuna, ebibuga amakumi ana na munaana byagheebwa Abalevi." 
Joshua21:42 Ebibuga bino buli kirala nga kyezungulwirwa ekiketezo omuli eisubi ery'okwayirangamu. 
Joshua21:43 Kale Musengwa Katonda yaagha Abaisiraeli ekiketezo kyonakyona kye yasuubiza okugha badhaadha baibwe. Era bwe baakifuna baakityamamu baatereera. 
Joshua21:44 Musengwa Katonda yaabagha emiraala woonawoona mu kiketezo ekyo, era nga bwe yasuubiza badhaadha baibwe. Ku bazigu baibwe nga ghazira waire mulala ati asobola okubeegezaamu, kuba Musengwa Katonda ng'asobozesa Abaisiraeli okughangula abazigu baibwe abo boonaboona." 
Joshua21:45 Musengwa Katonda yaatuukiriza kiisi kyonakyona kye yasuubiza okukolera Abaisiraeli. 
Joshua22:1 Agho Yoshua yaayeta ab'ekika eky'Abareubeni, n'eky'Abagadi, n'eky'Abamanasse ab'e buvandhuba, boonaboona baidha gh'ali." 
Joshua22:2 Yaabakoba ati: “Mukoze byonabyona Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda bye yabalagira, era mwagondera ebiragiro byange byonabyona." 
Joshua22:3 Ekiseera kino kyonakyona mubaire mulwanira ghalala n'Abaisiraeli banaimwe nga timubaleka. Era nga mwegendereza okubona nga mugondera ebiragiro bya Musengwa Katonda waimwe. 
Joshua22:4 Buti Musengwa Katonda oyo Katonda waimwe, aghaire Baisiraeli banaimwe abo emiraala nga bwe yabasuubiza. Kale, mwireyo mu maka gaimwe, mu kiketezo kye mwamala okutwala nga buti kyaimwe, e buvandhuba wa Yorudani, Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda kye yabagha." 
Joshua22:5 Mwegenderezenga mulobe kuva ku mateeka n'ebiragiro Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda bye yabagha: okugonzanga Musengwa Katonda oyo Katonda waimwe okwebisanga nga mwene bw'ayenda okukuumanga ebiragiro bye obutamuvangaku era n'okumugheerezanga n'omwoyo omulala.” 
Joshua22:6 Kale Yoshua yaabasabira enkabi yaabasiibula, era baaja ewaibwe mu maka gaibwe." 
Joshua22:7 Ekitundu ku Bamanasse, Musa yali amaze okubagha obutaka bwaibwe e Bashani e buvandhuba wa Yorudani, ate ekitundu ekindi Yoshua yaakigha obutaka bwakyo e bugwandhuba wa Yorudani, ghalala n'ebika ebindi ebya Isiraeli. Era Yoshua bweyali asiibula abaali baja ewaibwe," 
Joshua22:8 yabakoba ati: “Muli kwirayo mu maka gaimwe n'obukombe kamaala, n'ente kamaala, ni feeza, ni zaabu, n'ebyuma eby'ekikomo, n'ebyuma ebigumu einho, n'ebivaalo kamaala mugabane ni baganda baimwe ebyo bye mwanhaga ku bazigu baimwe.”" 
Joshua22:9 Kale batyo Abareubeni, n'Abagadi, n'ekitundu ku Bamanasse, baaleka ebika ebindi nga bikaali e Shilo mu Kanaani, bairayo ewaibwe e Gileadi mu kiketezo kye baafuna beene ng'obutaka bwaibwe, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira ng'abita mu Musa." 
Joshua22:10 Ab'ekika eky'Abareubeni, n'eky'Abagadi, n'eky'Abamanasse ab'e buvandhuba bwe baatuuka e Gelilothi, nga bakaali e bugwandhuba wa Yorudani, baazimba alutaari enkologho agho kumpi n'omwiga Yorudani." 
Joshua22:11 Abaisiraeli bale abandi baakoberwa bati: “Muwulire! Abareubeni, n'Abagadi, n'Abamanasse ab'e buvandhuba, baazimba alutaari e Gelilothi ku luuyi olwaife olwa Yorudani!”" 
Joshua22:12 Abaisiraeli abo abandi bwe baakiwulira, boonaboona beesololeza e Shilo nga benda baje balwane n'ebika ebyo eby'e buvandhuba." 
Joshua22:13 Aye nga bakaali, baasooka baatumayo Finehasi mutabane wa Eleazari kabona," 
Joshua22:14 ghalala n'abantu abandi ikumi abakulu ab'ebika. 
Joshua22:15 Baatuuka e Gileadi eri Abareubeni, n'Abagadi, n'ekitundu ku Bamanasse ab'e Buvandhuba." 
Joshua22:16 Agho boonaboona baabakoba bati: “Tuli kwogera mu liina ly'abantu ba Musengwa Katonda boonaboona tuti, lwaki mukoze ekintu kino ekibi Katonda wa Isiraeli ky'atenda? Okuzimba alutaari eno kitegeeza muli kudheemera Musengwa Katonda, mwalekera agho okukola by'ayenda." 
Joshua22:17 Aye mwidhukire ekibi kye twakola nga tuli e Peori, era mwidhukire Musengwa Katonda bwe yasindika mu bantu be endwaire embi ng'ekibonerezo. Endwaire eyo ekaatudaaza, imwe mudhuuba ng'ekyo kyali kitono?" 
Joshua22:18 Buti musazeegho obutakola nga Musengwa Katonda mwene bw'ayenda? Bwe musalagho okumudheemera olwaleero, enkyo aja kusungughalira Abaisiraeli twenatwena." 
Joshua22:19 “Ekiketezo kyaimwe bwe kiba nga tiikirongoofu, nga timusobola kusinzizaamu Musengwa Katonda, mwidhe eno eri Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Mwidhe mufune eno ye tuli obutaka, aye mutadheemera Musengwa Katonda oba okutufuula twenatwena abadheemu nga muzimbayo alutaari eyindi ate nga eya Musengwa Katonda waife erigho." 
Joshua22:20 “Mwidhukire Akyani mutabane wa Zera eyaloba okugondera ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda, ng'aloba okuzikiriza ebyo bye baamukoba okuzikiriza Abaisiraeli boonaboona baabonerezebwa olw'ekyo. Akyani ti n'eyafa yenka olw'ekibi kye ekyo.”" 
Joshua22:21 Agho Abareubeni, n'Abagadi, n'ekitundu ku Bamanasse, bairamu abakulu ab'ebika bire ebindi eby'e bugwandhuba bati:" 
Joshua22:22 “Ow'amaani ni Katonda! Oyo ni Musengwa Katonda! Aidhi lwaki twakola ekyo era twenda mwena mukimanhe. Bwe tuba nga twadheema era nga tituli beesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda, mutwite tulobe kwongera kuba balamu." 
Joshua22:23 Bwe tuba nga twadheemera Musengwa Katonda, ni twezimbira alutaari eyaife ku bwaife nga ya kwokerangaku misengo, oba okugheerangaku ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke, oba ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, leka Musengwa Katonda mwene atubonereze." 
Joshua22:24 Aye ekyo twakikola lwa kutya tuti tomanha ye bwidha eyo baidhukulu baimwe bwe baboola baidhukulu baife nga babakoba bati, ‘Imwe mwidhi ki ku Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli?" 
Joshua22:25 Yataagho Yorudani ng'ensalosalo ghagati ghaife n'imwe Abareubeni n'Abagadi ebya Musengwa Katonda waife ghazira ghe bibagemeraku.’ Olwo baidhukulu baimwe baaba nga balobera baidhukulu baife okusinza Musengwa Katonda. 
Joshua22:26 Tuzimba alutaari ti lwa kwokerangaku misengo oba okugheerangaku ebigheebwayo," 
Joshua22:27 aye ebe ng'akamanhiso okwoleka abantu baife n'abantu baimwe, n'okwoleka ense edhiritwiririra, nga bwenebwene bwe tusinza Musengwa Katonda era nga bwe tuja mu maiso ga Weema ye entukuvu okumugheereza ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'emisengo, era n'okughaayo ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Ekyo kyaligho olw'okulobera baidhukulu baimwe okukoba abaife bati ebya Musengwa Katonda ghazira ghe bibagemeraku." 
Joshua22:28 Ekyo n'ekyali ekidhuubo kyaife, tuti bweghabaagho atukoba ebibono ng'oti n'ebyo, oba abikoba baidhukulu baife mu biseera ebiidha, olwo tuliba nga tusobola okukoba tuti, ‘Bona! Badhaadha baife baazimba ekifaanana ng'oti alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda, aye nga ti kya kwokerangaku bigheebwayo oba kugheerangaku misengo, aye nga kamanhiso bumanhiso eri ife n'abantu baife, n'eri imwe n'abantu baimwe.’" 
Joshua22:29 Ife titusobola naire okudheemera Musengwa Katonda, oba buti okukyuka ni tulekera okujiira ku by'akoba, ni tuzimba alutaari okwokerangaku ebigheebwayo, oba okugheerangaku emere ey'empeke, oba emisengo. Titusobola kuzimba alutaari yindi ate nga eya Musengwa Katonda waife eri agho gha mberi gha Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Joshua22:30 Finehasi kabona n'abasaadha bale eikumi abakulu ab'ebika be yali nabo, bwe baawulira okwinhonhola okw'Abareubeni, n'Abagadi, n'Abamanasse ab'e buvandhuba, baikiriza." 
Joshua22:31 Era Finehasi oyo mutabane wa Eleazari kabona yaabakoba ati: “Buti twidhi nga Musengwa Katonda ali n'ife, era olw'okuba timwamudheemera, ife Abaisiraeli twenatwena mutuwoniiza Musengwa Katonda oyo okutubonereza.”" 
Joshua22:32 Olwo Finehasi mutabane wa Eleazari kabona n'abakulu ab'ebika bale, baaleka Abareubeni n'Abagadi mu Gileadi, bairayo mu Kanaani y'Abaisiraeli, baabakobera nga bwe byali." 
Joshua22:33 Abaisiraeli baasangaala okuwulira ebyo bye baabakobera, baasaaka Katonda era n'eby'okulwana n'Abareubeni n'Abagadi, n'okuzikiriza ekiketezo ghe baasenga, baabivaaku." 
Joshua22:34 Abareubeni n'Abagadi baatuuma alutaari eriina “Budhulizi” nga bakoba bati alutaari eyo n'obudhulizi ye bali boonaboona, nga baikiriza nga Musengwa Katonda ni Katonda." 
Joshua23:1 Nga ghabiseegho ekiseera kireeyi inho, era nga Musengwa Katonda amaze okugha Abaisiraeli emiraala, nga baliraanwa baibwe ti bakaabalumba, Yoshua yali akairiighe inho." 
Joshua23:2 Kale Yoshua oyo yaayeta, abakulu ab'ebika, abakulu ab'ebikunsu eby'endhawulo, abalamuzi, n'abakulembeze mu Isiraeli, n'Abaisiraeli abandi yaabakoba ati: “Buti nkairiighe n'emyaka gimpoireku." 
Joshua23:3 Muboine byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waimwe bye yakola amaghanga ag'endhawulo ku lwaimwe kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo n'abaire abalwaniranga entalo dhaimwe. 
Joshua23:4 Ekiketezo kyonakyona okuva e buvandhuba ew'omwiga Yorudani okwira e bugwandhuba okutuuka ku Nhandha Eyaghagati, namala okukibagabaniamu mu bika byaimwe. Omwo nga n'omuli ebiketezo bye twamala okunhaga ku maghanga, era n'ebyo bye tubaire tukaali okunhaga." 
Joshua23:5 Musengwa Katonda waimwe aja kubingangagho abantu mu buli biketezo ghe munaatuukanga, era aja kubairirizangayo einhuma, imwe mutwale ekiketezo kyaibwe. Kuba atyo bwe yabasuubiza." 
Joshua23:6 Kale ni mufubenga inho okubona nga mugondera byonabyona ebyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo eky'Amateeka ga Musa. Ghatabangagho katundu koonakoona ke musuula ere. 
Joshua23:7 Timukolagananga na bantu abo abanaasigalanga mu biketezo bye tuja okunhaga. Timwogeranga bigema ku bakatonda baibwe, oba okulayira nga mukozesa amaina gaibwe, oba okubakubira amakiryaivu n'okubasinza." 
Joshua23:8 Aye mubenga beesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda nga bwe mubairenga okutuusa ni mpegaano. 
Joshua23:9 Musengwa Katonda yabingagho amaghanga amakologho era ag'amaani, buli ghe mwatuukanga, ghaabulagho akana okubalwanisa." 
Joshua23:10 Omuntu yeenayeena ku imwe, asobola okuleetera abantu olukumi (1,000) okulumukagho. Kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe n'abalwaniragho entalo dhaimwe, nga bwe yabasuubiza." 
Joshua23:11 Buti ni mufubenga inho okugonza Musengwa Katonda waimwe. 
Joshua23:12 “Bwemutaliba beesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda, aye ni musalagho okukolagana n'abantu abo abanaasigalanga mu biketezo bye tuja okunhaga, ni mubayiza baghala baibwe, era boona ni mubaganha babayize baghala baimwe," 
Joshua23:13 olwo mumanhanga nga Musengwa Katonda waimwe aliba takaabingagho maghanga ago mu buli kiketezo ghe munaatuukanga. Amaghanga ago gaja kubafuukira ekizibu ng'oti lutuula oba olwina oluleeyi. Era ng'obulumi bwe gabaleetera buli ng'oti bwa muntu ye bakubye enkoba mu mugongo, oba ali n'eiwa mu liiso, okutuusa lwe mulizikirira ni muva ku nsi eno enungi, Musengwa Katonda waimwe ye yabagha." 
Joshua23:14 “Buti ndi mu lugendo, ndi kuja e magombe nga badhaadha boonaboona bwe baaja. Mwenamwena mwidhi bukalamu mu myoyo gyaimwe ng'ebirungi byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waimwe bye yabasuubiza, ghazira ky'ataatuukiriza. Byonabyona yabikola era ghazira kyamulema." 
Joshua23:15 Aye ng'ebirungi byonabyona bye yabasuubiza bwe yabituukiriza, n'ebibi byonabyona bye yeesoomera okubakola, atyo bw'alibituukiriza, okutuusa lw'alibazikiriza ni muwa ku nsi eno enungi ye yabagha." 
Joshua23:16 Kasita muloba okukuuma endagaano Musengwa Katonda waimwe ye yabalagira okukuuma, ni mugheereza era ni musinza bakatonda abandi, aja kubasungughalira era ababonereze okutuusa lwe mulizikirira ni muwa ku nsi eno enungi ye yabagha.”" 
Joshua24:1 Agho Yoshua yaayeta ebika eby'Abaisiraeli byonabyona byesololeza e Shekemu. Yaaja ng'ayeta abakulu ab'ebika, abakulu ab'ebikunsu, n'abakulembeze mu Isiraeli, baidha baayemerera aghali Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda." 
Joshua24:2 Yoshua yaakoba abantu boonaboona ati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Eira, badhaadha baimwe, Tera lata wa Aburahamu ni Nahori, baabanga luuyi ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, era nga basinza bakatonda abandi." 
Joshua24:3 Agho naatoola Aburahamu eyo ye yali ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, naamubisa mu kiketezo eky'e Kanaani kyonakyona, naamugha Isaaka n'abaidhukulu kamaala." 
Joshua24:4 Isaaka naamugha Yakobo ni Esau. Esau naamugha ensi ey'ensozi Edomu nga n'obutaka bwe. Aye dhaadha waimwe Yakobo n'abaana be, baaja e Misiri." 
Joshua24:5 Nga ghabiseegho ekiseera naatuma Musa ni Aaroni, okubatoola mu Misiri, era naata ku Misiri obuzibu obutakobeka, naabatoolayo." 
Joshua24:6 Badhaadha baimwe abo bwe nabatoola mu Misiri ni batuuka ku Nhandha Emyufu, Abamisiri baababingirira n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, ghalala n'abalwani ab'oku mbalaasi." 
Joshua24:7 Badhaadha baimwe bwe baatuuka ku Nhandha Emyufu bandirira mbabeere. Agho naaleetagho enzikiiza ghagati ghaibwe n'Abamisiri, era naalagira enhandha okubayoolookeraku era ebasandikire. Mwidhi bukalamu kye nakola Abamisiri. “ ‘Imwe mwaba mu irungu okumala entangama ndeeyi" 
Joshua24:8 memale olwo naabatuusa mu kiketezo eky'Abamori abaabanga ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba olwa Yorudani. Bano baabalwanisa aye naagha imwe obughanguzi, naabazikiriza era mwatwala ekiketezo kyaibwe." 
Joshua24:9 Kyabazinga w'e Moabu ye baayetanga Balaki mutabane wa Zippori, yeena yabalwanisa era yaayeta Balaamu mutabane wa Beori abakolimire." 
Joshua24:10 Aye nze naaloba kumuganha kukikola, mu kifo ky'ekyo naamuleetera okubasabira enkabi, agho naaba nga mbawoniiza Balaki." 
Joshua24:11 Mwasomoka Yorudani mwatuuka e Yeriko, abasaadha ab'e Yeriko baabalwanisa nga kw'otaire n'Abamori, n'Abaperizzi, n'Abakanaani, n'Abahitti, n'Abagirigashi, n'Abahivi era n'Abayebusi. Aye naagha imwe obughanguzi mwababinga." 
Joshua24:12 Mwaja okubatuukaku nga mbaswiremu okutya n'okudhugumira, ekyaleetera bakyabazinga Abamori ababiri okulumuka embiro empiima dhaimwe n'obulaso bwaimwe ti n'ebyabaleetera okughangula." 
Joshua24:13 Nabagha emisiri gye mutaasimba, era naabagha ebibuga bye mutaazimba, era buti mwe muli. Mulya emizabbibu n'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva gye mutaasimba.’" 
Joshua24:14 “Mpegaano ni mutyenga Musengwa Katonda era mumugheerezenga n'omwoyo mulala nga muli beesigwa. Musuule ere bakatonda badhaadha baimwe be baagheerezanga nga bakaali eruuyi ere ng'osomoike omwiga era ni bwe baali nga bakaali e Misiri, mugheereze Musengwa Katonda yenka." 
Joshua24:15 Aye oba nga timuli beetegefu kugheereza Musengwa Katonda, musalegho olwaleero luno ye munaagheerezanga: oba musalagho kugheereza bakatonda badhaadha baimwe be baasinzanga nga bakaali eruuyi ere ng'osomoike omwiga, oba bakatonda ab'Abamori abaali beene kiketezo kino buti ghe muli. Aye nze ku lwange n'ab'endhu yange twidha kugheerezanga Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Joshua24:16 Agho abantu bairamu bati: “Tituja kuleka Musengwa Katonda ni tugheereza bakatonda bandi. 
Joshua24:17 Musengwa Katonda waife n'eyatoola badhaadha baife, n'ife beene, mu Misiri ye twalinga mu bwiru, era n'eyakola ebyewuunhisa ebikologho nga tubona. Yatukuumanga bukalamu eyo yoonayoona ye twabitanga, era yaatubisanga bukalamu mu maghanga goonagoona ge twabitamu." 
Joshua24:18 Yabingangho Abamori abaabanga ghano. Kale twena twidha kugheerezanga Musengwa Katonda, kuba oyo ni Katonda waife.”" 
Joshua24:19 Aye Yoshua yaakoba abantu ati: “Timusobola kugheereza Musengwa Katonda, kuba oyo ni Katonda omutukuvu era Katonda ow'enkikidi. Taja kubasonigha kwonoona kwaimwe oba ebibi bye mukola." 
Joshua24:20 Bwe mumuvaaku ni mugheereza bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi be basinza, aja kukyusa abakole bubi inho abazikirize, abe ng'oti tabangaku mulungi ye muli.”" 
Joshua24:21 Abantu baakoba Yoshua bati: “Busa, ife tuja kugheerezanga Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Joshua24:22 Yoshua yaabakoba ati: “Oba nga beene musazeegho okugheereza Musengwa Katonda, imwe beene niimwe abadhulizi b'ekyo kye musazeegho.” Abantu baamwiramu bati: “Yii, bwenebwene tuli badhulizi baakyo.”" 
Joshua24:23 Yoshua yaabakoba ati: “Kale ni musuule ere emisambwa gye muli nagyo egisinzibwa abamaghanga agandi, era mweyame okubanga abeesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli.”" 
Joshua24:24 Abantu baakoba Yoshua bati: “Twidha kugheerezanga Musengwa Katonda waife, era twidha kugonderanga ebiragiro bye.”" 
Joshua24:25 Kale ku lunaku olwo Yoshua yaakolera abantu endagaano e Shekemu, era yaabagha amateeka n'ebiragiro eby'okujiirangaku." 
Joshua24:26 Yoshua yaaghandiika ebiragiro bino mu kitabo eky'amateeka ga Katonda. Agho yaatoola eibaale eikologho yaalisimba ghansi agh'omuti omuvule mu kifo kya Musengwa Katonda ekitukuvu. 
Joshua24:27 Yaakoba abantu boonaboona ati: “Eibaale lino liidha kubanga mudhulizi, kuba liwuliire ebibono byonabyona Musengwa Katonda by'atukobye. Kale liidha kubanga mudhulizi abalumiriza okubalobera okudheemera Katonda waimwe.”" 
Joshua24:28 Agho Yoshua yaasiibula abantu era buli muntu yairayo mu kiketezo kye. 
Joshua24:29 Ebyo nga biwoire Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni era omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda yaafa ng'agheziiza emyaka egy'obukulu kikumi na ikumi. 
Joshua24:30 Era baamuziika ghe yafuna ng'obutaka bwe e Timunathi Sera ekiri mu kiketezo eky'ensozi eky'Abaefuraimu, ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba w'olusozi Gaashi." 
Joshua24:31 Abaisiraeli baagheerezanga Musengwa Katonda ekiseera kyonakyona Yoshua kye yamala ng'ali kubakulembera, era n'ekiseera ekyairirira kye baamala nga bakulemberwa abakulu ab'ebikunsu Yoshua be yalekagho. Abakulu abo n'abaamanha ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yakolera Isiraeli." 
Joshua24:32 Amagumba ga Yosefu, Abaisiraeli ge baidha nago okuva e Misiri, baagaziika e Shekemu mu itaka Yakobo lye yagula ku batabane ba Hamori lata wa Shekemu. Eitaka eryo yaligula ebitundu bya feeza kikumi, era lyafuuka obutaka obwa baidhukulu ba Yosefu." 
Joshua24:33 Mu biseera ebyo, Eleazari mutabane wa Aaroni yeena yaafa, era baamuziika kumpi n'ekibuga Gibea ekiri mu kiketezo eky'ensozi eky'Abaefuraimu, ekibuga ekyo nga kyagheebwa mutabane we Finehasi." 
Judges1:1 Agho Yoshua ng'amaze okufa, Abaisiraeli baabuuza Musengwa Katonda bati: “Kika ki ekibe kisooke okuja okulumba Abakanaani okubalwanisa?”" 
Judges1:2 Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Ekika kya Yuda n'ekibe kisooke okuja. Nkighaire okufuga ensi eyo.” 
Judges1:3 Agho ab'ekika kya Yuda baakoba ab'ekika kya Simeoni bati: “Mwidhe muje n'ife mu kiketezo Musengwa Katonda ky'atughaire, tulwanise Abakanaani nga tuli ghalala. Mu nsambo n'endala twena tulija n'imwe mu kiketezo Musengwa Katonda ky'abaghaire.”" 
Judges1:4 Kale ab'ekika kya Simeoni n'ab'ekika kya Yuda baajiira ghalala mu lutalo. Musengwa Katonda yaabagha okughangula abasaadha abaghera omutwalo (10,000) e Bezeki, Abakanaani n'Abaperizzi." 
Judges1:5 E Bezeki eyo baayagaanayo kyabazinga ayetebwa Adonibezeki, baamulwanisa era baaghangula Abakanaani n'Abaperizzi." 
Judges1:6 Yaalumuka, aye baamubingirira baamugema, baamutemaku ebyala ebisaadha n'ebigere ebisaadha." 
Judges1:7 Adonibezeki oyo yaabakoba ati: “Bakyabazinga ensanvu be natemaku ebyala ebisaadha n'ebigere ebisaadha, baasolozanga obukunkumuka bw'emere ghansi gh'emeeza yange. Mpegaano Katonda aneesasuliizaaku olw'ekyo kye nabakola.” Agho baamutwala e Yerusalemu, yaafiira eyo." 
Judges1:8 Agho ab'ekika kya Yuda baalumba ekibuga Yerusalemu, baakigema, baita abantu baamu, era baakyokya omuliro." 
Judges1:9 Ebyo bwe byawa, baaja okulwanisa Abakanaani ab'omu kiketezo eky'ensozi, n'ab'omu kiketezo eky'omu kiiko, n'ab'omu kiketezo ekikalukalu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Judges1:10 Agho baaja, baalumba Abakanaani abaabanga mu kibuga Heburoni, ekyayetebwangaku Kiriathi Araba, era eyo baaghangulirayo abantu bano: ab'ekika kya Sheshai, n'ab'ekya Ahimani, n'ab'ekya Talumai." 
Judges1:11 Ab'ekika kya Yuda bwe baava eyo, baalumba ekibuga Debiri ekyayetebwangaku Kiriathi Seferi." 
Judges1:12 Agho owundi ku bo ng'ayetebwa Kalebu yaakoba ati: “Ole anaalumba Kiriathi Seferi era n'akighangula, ndidha kumugha mughala wange Akisa abe mukazi we.”" 
Judges1:13 Agho Othinieli mutabane wa Kenazi, nga Kenazi ono ni muto wa Kalebu, yaakikuba yaakighangula, era Kalebu yaamugha mughala we Akisa." 
Judges1:14 Olunaku Akisa lwe yaidha okufumbirwa Othinieli, Othinieli yaakoba Akisa oyo asabe ise ekibandha. Akisa yaaja. Bwe yatuuka, yaava ku ndogoyi ye. Kalebu yaamubuuza ati: “Oyenda nkughe ki?”" 
Judges1:15 Akisa yaamwiramu ati: “Ensi y'ongabyemu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, nkalukalu, kale nsaba ekirabo, ompe aghali ensulo edh'amaadhi.” Kale Kalebu yaamugha ensulo edh'eitale n'edh'eifo." 
Judges1:16 Agho baidhukulu b'omusaadha Omukeni, eyali lata wa muka Musa, nga bali ghalala n'ab'ekika kya Yuda, baava e Yeriko, ekibuga eky'emiti eminaazi. Baaja mu irungu lya Buyudaaya eriri mu kiketezo ekikalukalu eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba okumpi ni Aradi. Baasenga eyo mu Bamaleki." 
Judges1:17 Agho ab'ekika kya Yuda baaja n'ab'ekika kya Simeoni baaghangula Abakanaani abaali mu kibuga Zefathi, era baazikiriza ekibuga ekyo okukimalagho. Kyebaava ni bakituuma eriina Horuma." 
Judges1:18 Era ab'ekika kya Yuda abo baaghangula n'ebibuga bino: Gaza, ni Ashikeloni, ni Ekuroni, ghalala n'ebiketezo ebibyezungulwire." 
Judges1:19 Era Musengwa Katonda yaababeera, baatwala ekiketezo eky'ensozi. Aye baaloba kughanga kubingamu batyamye ba mu kiketezo kya ku museetwe, kuba abatyamye abo baali n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo nga byakolebwa mu kyuma ekigumu einho." 
Judges1:20 Agho ekibuga Heburoni kyagheebwa Kalebu, nga Musa bwe yalagira. Kalebu yaabingamu abaidhukulu abaava mu baana ba Anaki abasatu." 
Judges1:21 Aye ab'ekika kya Benjamini tibaaghanga kubinga Bayebusi be baayagaana nga n'ababa mu Yerusalemu. Era ni ye buli eno Abayebusi baba mu Yerusalemu ghalala n'Ababenjamini. 
Judges1:22 Agho ab'ekika kya Efuraimu n'ekya Manasse boona Musengwa Katonda yaababeera, baalumba ekibuga Betheli, ekyayetebwangaku Luzi." 
Judges1:23 Baatuma abakeesi mu kibuga ekyo. 
Judges1:24 Abakeesi abo baabona omusaadha ali kukivaamu, baamukoba bati: “Tukweghemba otulagirire ghe tughanga okubita okwingira mu kibuga, twidha kukubisa bukalamu.”" 
Judges1:25 Omusaadha yaabalagirira. Bale baita ab'omu kibuga boonaboona, okutoolaku omusaadha oyo n'ab'omu maka ge." 
Judges1:26 Omusaadha oyo yaaja mu nsi ey'Abahitti, yaazimbayo ekibuga, yaakituuma eriina Luzi. Era bakaakyeta eriina eryo okutuusa ni mpegaano." 
Judges1:27 Ab'ekika kya Manasse tibaabinga batyamye ba mu bibuga bino: Bethi Sheani, ni Tanaka, ni Dori, ni Ibuleamu, ni Megiddo. Era tibaabinga batyamye ba mu byalo ebyezungulwire ebibuga ebyo. Kale Abakanaani baasigala nga bakaaba mu bibuga omwo." 
Judges1:28 Abaisiraeli ni bwe beeyongera okuba ab'amaani tibaabingamu Bakanaani boonaboona kubamalamu aye baabakakanga bwa kubakolera mirimo. 
Judges1:29 Ab'ekika kya Efuraimu tibaabinga Bakanaani abaali mu kibuga Gezeri. Kale Abakanaani baasigala nga bakaali ghalala nabo. 
Judges1:30 Ab'ekika kya Zebuluni tibaabinga batyamye ba mu bibuga, Kituroni ni Nahaloli. Kale Abakanaani baasigala nga bakaali ghalala nabo: aye bale baabakakanga okubakolera emirimo." 
Judges1:31 Ab'ekika kya Asheri tibaabinga batyamye ba mu bibuga bino: Akko, ni Sidoni, ni Ahalabu, ni Akazibu, ni Afiki, ni Rehobu." 
Judges1:32 Kale ab'ekika kya Asheri abo, baasigala nga bakaali ghalala n'abatyamye abo Abakanaani, kuba tibaababingamu." 
Judges1:33 Ab'ekika kya Nafutali tibaabinga batyamye ba mu bibuga bino: Bethi Shemeshi, ni Bethanathi. Kale ab'ekika kya Nafutali abo, baasigala nga bakaali ghalala n'abatyamye abo Abakanaani aye baabakakanga okubakolera emirimo." 
Judges1:34 Abamori baasindiikiriza ab'ekika kya Dani, baabairirizaayo mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi, baaloba kubaganha kwika mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe." 
Judges1:35 Kale Abamori abo beeyongera okuba mu Aiyaloni, ni mu Shaalabimu, ni ku lusozi Heresi. Aye ab'ekika kya Efuraimu n'ekya Manasse baabafuganga, era baabakakanga okubakolera emirimo." 
Judges1:36 Ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba wa Sela, ensalosalo ey'Abamori ng'ebitira ku ntwiko ya Akirabbimu." 
Judges2:1 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaava e Giligali, yaaja e Bokimu. Yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Nabatoola mu nsi Misiri, naabaleeta mu nsi ye nasuubiza badhaadha baimwe. Naakoba nti, ‘Tirimenhagho ndagaano ye nakola n'imwe." 
Judges2:2 Era mwena naabakoba obutakolanga ndagaano na bantu ababa mu nsi eno mumenhemenhengagho bwa alutaari dhaibwe.’ Aye mukoze ki kino? Timukoze nga bwe nabalagira. 
Judges2:3 Kale mpegaano ndi kubakoba nti tiidha kubingangagho bantu abo nga muli kumpi okutuukagho. Baidha kubanga bazigu baimwe, era mwidha kukemebwanga okusinza emisambwa gyaibwe.”" 
Judges2:4 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, Abaisiraeli boonaboona baalira amaziga." 
Judges2:5 Ekifo ekyo baakituuma eriina Bokimu, era baaghaayo emisengo ye Musengwa Katonda nga bali eyo." 
Judges2:6 Agho Yoshua bwe yamala okusiibula Abaisiraeli, Abaisiraeli abo baaja, buli muntu okutwala ekiketezo kye yagabana." 
Judges2:7 Abaisiraeli baagheerezanga Musengwa Katonda ekiseera kyonakyona Yoshua kye yamala ng'ali kubakulembera, era n'ekiseera ekyairirira kye baamala nga bakulemberwa abakulu b'ebikunsu Yoshua be yalekagho. Abakulu abo n'abaabona ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yakolera Isiraeli." 
Judges2:8 Yoshua, mutabane wa Nuni era omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda, yafa ng'agheziiza emyaka egy'obukulu kikumi na ikumi." 
Judges2:9 Era baamuziika ghe yafuna ng'obutaka bwe e Timunathi Sera, ekiri mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi eky'Abaefuraimu, ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba w'olusozi Gaashi." 
Judges2:10 Agho n'abantu ab'oluse olwo boonaboona baafa. Ghairagho oluse olundi olw'abantu, abataamanha Musengwa Katonda waire okumanha ebyo bye yakolera Isiraeli." 
Judges2:11 Agho Abaisiraeli baayonoona ye Musengwa Katonda, baasinza emisambwa egyetebwa Baali." 
Judges2:12 Baava ku Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe eyabatoola mu nsi Misiri, baasinza emisambwa egy'abantu abaali nga babeezungulwire. Baakubira emisambwa egyo amakiryaivu, era mu nsambo eyo baaleetera Musengwa Katonda okusungughala." 
Judges2:13 Baava ku Musengwa Katonda, baagheereza emisambwa egyetebwa Baali ni Ashitarothi." 
Judges2:14 Kale obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwatumbukira ku Baisiraeli ng'oti muliro, era yaabaghaayo mu ngalo dh'abanhazi, baabanhagaku ebyaibwe. Yaaleka abazigu baibwe abaali nga babeezungulwire baabaghangula. Olwo Abaisiraeli baaba nga tibakaaghanga kwerwanaku." 
Judges2:15 Kiisi bwe baajanga okulwana olutalo, nga Musengwa Katonda abasindikira akabi, nga bweyali amaze okubeesoomera. Kale baaba mu kabi akataloodheka." 
Judges2:16 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaabateeragho abakulembeze okubawonia abanhazi. 
Judges2:17 Aye Abaisiraeli baaloba kuwulirisa bakulembeze baibwe. Baaloba kuba beesigwa ye Musengwa Katonda, baasinza emisambwa. Waire nga badhaadha baibwe baawuliranga ebiragiro bya Musengwa Katonda, bano tibaakola batyo naire." 
Judges2:18 Musengwa Katonda bwe yateerangagho Abaisiraeli omukulembeze, Musengwa Katonda oyo ng'aba ghalala n'omukulembeze oyo, era yaawonianga abantu abazigu baibwe, ekiseera kyonakyona omukulembeze oyo kye yamalanga ng'akaali mulamu. Musengwa Katonda yabagemerwanga ekivunika, kuba baasindanga olw'abo abaabadaazadaazanga ni babatuntuza." 
Judges2:19 Aye buli mukulembeze bwe yafanga, abantu bairangayo mu mize gyaibwe egy'eira, baabanga babi n'okusinga badhaadha baibwe. Baagheerezanga emisambwa era baagikubiranga amakiryaivu okugisinza, era baalobanga kulekayo mpisa dhaibwe embi naire endala." 
Judges2:20 Agho obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwatumbukira ku Baisiraeli ng'oti muliro, yaakoba ati: “Abantu ab'eighanga lino bamenhie endagaano ye nalagira badhaadha baibwe okukuumanga, era tibakampulira naire." 
Judges2:21 Kale okuva n'olwaleero, bwe banaabanga nga bali kumpi okutuuka mu nsi eyo, tiidhanga kubingamu bamaghanga abaabangayo mu kiseera Yoshua ghe yafiira." 
Judges2:22 Ndidha kubeeyambisanga okuleba Abaisiraeli, mbone oba nga banaakolanga bye mbalagira, nga badhaadha baibwe bwe baakolanga, oba busa.”" 
Judges2:23 Kale Musengwa Katonda yaaleka abamaghanga ago mu nsi eyo, yaaloba kubabingamu mangu, era yaaloba kuganha Yoshua kubaghangula." 
Judges3:1 Kale Musengwa Katonda yaaleka amaghanga agandi gaasigala mu nsi eyo, okuleba Abaisiraeli abataabona ku ntalo edhaali e Kanaani." 
Judges3:2 Ekyo yakikola ng'ayenda okwegeresa Abaisiraeli aba buli luse eby'entalo, okusingira irala abo abaali nga tibabangaku mu lutalo." 
Judges3:3 Abantu abaalekebwa mu nsi eyo ni bano: abantu ab'omu bibuga eby'Abafilisiti ebitaanu n'abafuzi baibwe, n'Abakanaani boonaboona, n'Abasidoni, n'Abahivi abatyamye b'omu nsozi dh'omu Lebanoni, okuva ku lusozi Baali Herimoni okutuuka gh'oingirira e Hamathi." 
Judges3:4 Abo Musengwa Katonda be yali ab'okweyambisa okuleba Abaisiraeli, okubona oba nga banaawuliranga ebiragiro bya Musengwa Katonda, bye yalagira badhaadha baibwe ng'abita mu Musa." 
Judges3:5 Kale Abaisiraeli baabanga mu Bakanaani, ni mu Bahitti, ni mu Bamori, ni mu Baperizzi, ni mu Bahivi, ni mu Bayebusi." 
Judges3:6 Agho baafumbirwanga abakazi okuva mu bantu abo, era baaghangayo baghala baibwe okufumbirwa mu bantu abo. Era baasinzanga emisambwa egy'abantu abo." 
Judges3:7 Agho Abaisiraeli beerabira Musengwa Katonda waibwe. Baayonoona y'ali, nga basinza emisambwa Baali ni Ashera." 
Judges3:8 Kale obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwatumbukira ku Baisiraeli ng'oti muliro, yaaleka kyabazinga Kushani Rishathaimu ow'e Mesopotamia yaabaghangula era yaabafuga okumala emyaka munaana." 
Judges3:9 Aye Abaisiraeli bwe baalirira Musengwa Katonda, Musengwa Katonda yaabateeragho omuntu eyabanunula, nga ni Othinieli mutabane wa Kenazi. Kenazi oyo nga ni muto wa Kalebu." 
Judges3:10 Omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwaidha ku Othinieli, yaakulembera Abaisiraeli. Yaaja okulwana olutalo ni kyabazinga Kushani Rishathaimu ow'e Mesopotamia, era Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera Othinieli oyo okughangula." 
Judges3:11 Olwo ensi yaabaamu emiraala okumala emyaka amakumi ana. Agho Othinieli yaafa. 
Judges3:12 Abaisiraeli bairamu kabiri baayonoona ye Musengwa Katonda. Kale Musengwa Katonda yaagha kyabazinga Eguloni ow'e Moabu amaani okulwanisa Abaisiraeli. 
Judges3:13 Eguloni yeeyimba n'Abammoni, n'Abamaleki, baaghangula Isiraeli, baagema ekibuga Yeriko, eky'emiti eminaazi." 
Judges3:14 Eguloni yaafuga Abaisiraeli okumala emyaka ikumi na munaana. 
Judges3:15 Aye Abaisiraeli bwe baalirira Musengwa Katonda, Musengwa Katonda oyo yaabateeragho omuntu eyabanunula, nga ni Ehudi mutabane wa Gera, ow'omu kika kya Benjamini. Ehudi oyo yali wa igooda. Agho Abaisiraeli baatuma Ehudi oyo okutwala ebirabo ye kyabazinga Eguloni ow'e Moabu." 
Judges3:16 Ehudi yali amaze okwekolerayo empiima endhogi ku ndhuyi dhaayo dhombi, ng'egheza sentimita ng'amakumi ataanu obuleeyi. Yaagyesiba ku kiteege eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha, munda mu kivaalo kye." 
Judges3:17 Yaatwala ebirabo ye kyabazinga Eguloni ow'e Moabu. Eguloni yali musaadha mubba inho. 
Judges3:18 Ehudi bwe yamala okughaayo ebirabo, yaakoba abantu abaabyetwika baireyo ewaibwe." 
Judges3:19 Aye mwene yaakoma ku mabaale amabaadhe agaali okumpi n'e Giligali, yairayo y'Eguloni, yaakoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ndi n'obukwenda obw'okukugha mu kyama.” Agho kyabazinga yaalagira abagheereza be ati: “Mutuleke twenka.” Boonaboona baava gh'ali, baafuluma." 
Judges3:20 Agho kyabazinga bweyali ng'atyaime yenka mu kisenge kye ekiwolu eky'okuwuumuliramu ku ngulu ku ndhu ye, Ehudi yaidha y'ali. Yaamukoba ati: “Ndi n'obukwenda bwo obuviire ye Katonda.” Kyabazinga yaasituka ku kityamo kye." 
Judges3:21 Ehudi yaakozesa omukono gwe omugooda, yaasowolayo empiima ku kiteege kye eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha, yaagifumita kyabazinga mu mabunda." 
Judges3:22 Empiima yoonayoona yaamubuliramu n'ekiti kyayo, amasavu gaasemba gh'eingiriire. Ehudi yaaloba kwiwulula mpiima eyo mu mabunda ga kyabazinga. Agho obubi bwafuluma mu kyabazinga." 
Judges3:23 Ehudi yaafuluma yaamwigalizaamu, endhigi yaadhisiba," 
Judges3:24 yaaja. Abagheereza be bwe baidha ni babona ng'endhigi dh'ekisenge eky'oku ngulu ku ndhu nsibe, baadhuuba bati katyo kyabazinga alimu, aye ali kweyambaku mu kasenge ak'omunda." 
Judges3:25 Baateegaku okumala ekiseera kye baadhuuba okuba nga kimala. Bwe baabona nga tali kwigulagho, baatoola ekisimuluzo baigulagho. Baaja okubona, nga musengwa waibwe agalaamiriire ku itaka, ng'afiire!" 
Judges3:26 Ehudi yabeibaku bwe baali nga bakaateegerera, yaabitira y'amabaale amabaadhe, yaatuuka e Seira." 
Judges3:27 Bwe yatuuka eyo mu kiketezo eky'ensozi ekya Efuraimu, yaafuuwa endeka okweta Abaisiraeli. Yaabakulembera, baaserengeta naye okuvaayo." 
Judges3:28 Yaabakoba ati: “Munnonereze, Musengwa Katonda abaghaire okughangula abazigu baimwe Abamoabu.” Agho baamunonereza, baaserengeta, baagema ekifo Abamoabu ghe baali ab'okusomokera omwiga Yorudani, baaloba kuganha muntu waire omulala okusomoka." 
Judges3:29 Ku mukuzi ogwo baita abasaadha Abamoabu ab'amaani einho abaghera ng'omutwalo omulamba, ghaabulagho awonagho." 
Judges3:30 Ku lunaku olwo Abaisiraeli baaghangula Moabu. Ensi yaabaamu emiraala okumala emyaka kinaana. 
Judges3:31 Omukulembeze eyairaku, yali ng'ayetebwa Shamugari, nga mutabane wa Anathi. Yeena yanunula Isiraeli bwe yaita Abafilisiti olukaaga (600) ng'akozesa oluti olusongovu lwe bakozesa okusindiikiriza ente okutambula." 
Judges4:1 Ehudi bwe yamala okufa, Abaisiraeli bairamu kabiri okwonoona ye Musengwa Katonda." 
Judges4:2 Agho yaabaleka baaghangulwa kyabazinga Yabini ow'e Kanaani, eyafugiranga mu kibuga Hazori. Omuduumizi w'eigye lye yali nga ni Sisera, ng'aba mu Haroshethi Hagoyiimu." 
Judges4:3 Yabini yali n'ebigaali lwenda eby'omu lutalo eby'ekyuma ekigumu einho. Era yafuga Abaisiraeli ng'abatuntuza n'obukambwe, okumala emyaka amakumi abiri. Agho Abaisiraeli baalirira Musengwa Katonda ababeere." 
Judges4:4 Mu biseera ebyo, Debora muka Lappidothi yali mulanzi era nga mulamuzi wa Baisiraeli." 
Judges4:5 Yaatyamanga ghansi mu muti omunaazi ogwayetebwanga ogwa Debora, ogwalinga ghagati gha Rama ni Betheli, mu kiketezo eky'ensozi ekya Efuraimu. Abaisiraeli baajanga eyo y'ali okubasalira emisango." 
Judges4:6 Agho yaatumisa Baraki mutabane wa Abinoamu ow'omu kibuga Kadeshi eky'e Nafutali. Yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akulagiire ati, ‘Twala abasaadha omutwalo mulala ku b'ekika kya Nafutali n'ekya Zebuluni, mwesolokeze ku lusozi Tabori." 
Judges4:7 Ndidha kuleeta Sisera omuduumizi w'eigye lya Yabini, aidhe akulwanise ku mwiga Kishoni. Aidha kwidha n'ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo n'abaisirukale be, aye ndidha kukugha okumughangula.’ ”" 
Judges4:8 Baraki yaamukoba ati: “Iwe bw'onaaja ninze, zeena ndidha kuja. Aye bw'otaaje ninze, zeena tiidha kuja.”" 
Judges4:9 Debora yaamwiramu ati: “Bwenebwene ndidha kuja n'iwe. Aye ekitiibwa eky'obughanguzi tikiidha kuba kikyo, kuba Musengwa Katonda aidha kughaayo Sisera aghangulwe omukazi.” Agho Debora yaasituka, yaaja ni Baraki e Kedeshi." 
Judges4:10 Baraki yaayeta ab'ekika kya Nafutali n'ekya Zebuluni. Agho abasaadha omutwalo mulala baamunonereza, ni Debora yeena yaaja naye." 
Judges4:11 Mu kiseera ekyo, Heberi Omukeni yali yeeyawire ku Bakeni baine, baidhukulu ba Hobabu mwanhina muka Musa. Era yali ng'amaze okusimba weema ye aghali omuti omukologho mu Zonannimu, okumpi n'e Kedeshi." 
Judges4:12 Abantu baakobera Sisera bati, Baraki aniinie ku lusozi Tabori." 
Judges4:13 Sisera yaayetesa ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo olwenda (900) eby'ekyuma ekigumu einho n'abasaadha be boonaboona abaali naye. Baava e Haroshethi Hagoyiimu, baaja ku mwiga Kishoni." 
Judges4:14 Debora yaakoba Baraki ati: “Situkiramu, oje. Musengwa Katonda akukulembeiremu. Olwaleero akughaire okughangula Sisera.” Agho Baraki yaaserengeta olusozi Tabori, ghalala n'abasaadha be omutwalo omulala." 
Judges4:15 Baraki bwe yalumba Sisera, Musengwa Katonda yaavuyavuya Sisera oyo ghalala n'ebigaali bye byonabyona eby'omu lutalo, n'eigye lye lyonalyona. Sisera yaava ku kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo, yaalumuka na bigere." 
Judges4:16 Baraki yaabingirira eigye lya Sisera ghalala n'ebigaali byalyo eby'omu lutalo okutuuka mu Haroshethi Hagoyiimu. Eigye eryo lyonalyona lyaitibwa. Ghaaloba kusigalagho muntu waire omulala. 
Judges4:17 Aye Sisera yaalumuka na bigere, yaatuuka ku weema ya Yaeli muka Heberi Omukeni kuba ghaaligho emiraala ghagati gha kyabazinga Yabini ow'e Hazori n'ab'endhu ya Heberi." 
Judges4:18 Yaeli yaafuluma mu weema ye, yaaja okusangaaza Sisera. Yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda wange, ingira.” Sisera yaingira mu weema. Yaeli yaamubwikaku ekigoye okumukweka." 
Judges4:19 Sisera yaamukoba ati: “Nkweghembye mpa ku maadhi nhweku, kuba ndi ndiwo.” Yaeli yaasibula ensawo ey'oluwu omuba amata, yaamugha yaanhwa. Kabiri yaamubwikaku ekigoye." 
Judges4:20 Sisera yaakoba Yaeli ati: “Yemerera ku mulyango gwa weema. Bwe ghabaagho aidha n'akubuuza ati, ‘Ghaligho omuntu yeenayeena ali muno?’ Koba oti, ‘Busa.’ ”" 
Judges4:21 Aye Yaeli yaagema enkondo ey'eweema n'enhundo, yaaseeta y'ali ng'adhooma, yaamukomerera enkondo eyo mu kyeni, yabitamu yaatuuka ni ku itaka. Mu nsambo eyo Sisera yaafa." 
Judges4:22 Baraki bwe yaidha ng'ali kubingirira Sisera, Yaeli yaafuluma okumusangaaza. Yaamukoba ati: “Idha nkulage omusaadha y'oli kunoonia.” Agho Baraki yaingira naye, yaayagaana Sisera ng'agalaamiriire ku itaka, mufu, era nga bamukomereire enkondo mu kyeni." 
Judges4:23 Kale ku lunaku olwo, Katonda yaagha Abaisiraeli okughangula kyabazinga Yabini ow'e Kanaani." 
Judges4:24 Abaisiraeli beeyongera okumunhigiriza okutuusa lwe baamuzikiriza. 
Judges5:1 Agho ku lunaku olwo, Debora ni Baraki mutabane wa Abinoamu, baayemba olwembo luno bati:" 
Judges5:2 Musaake Musengwa Katonda, kuba abakulembeze mu Isiraeli baali bamalirivu okulwana, n'abantu beeghaayo ekyeyendere!" 
Judges5:3 Muwulire imwe bakyabazinga, mutege amatu imwe abafuzi; ndidha kwembera Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, olwembo." 
Judges5:4 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bwe wava mu Seiri, n'ova mu kiketezo eky'e Edomu, ensi yatengeeta n'eigulu lyagwisa amaadhi. Bwenebwene amaadhi gaafukumuka okuva mu bire." 
Judges5:5 Musisi yatengeesa ensozi mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ow'e Sinai, Musengwa Katonda oyo Katonda owa Isiraeli." 
Judges5:6 Mu byanda bya Shamugari mutabane wa Anathi, mu biseera bya Yaeli, ababise baalekera okubita mu nguudo, n'abatambuze baabitanga eyo mu masokolosokolo." 
Judges5:7 Ebyalo byawaamu abantu byawolongera, okutuusa iwe Debora lwe waidha, nga inhina wa Isiraeli." 
Judges5:8 Abaisiraeli bwe baalondagho okusinza bakatonda abayaaka, olwo ghaabaagho olutalo mu Isiraeli. Mu basaadha emitwalo ena (40,000) mu Isiraeli, ghaabulagho eyagemaku ku ngabo oba ku ifumo mu ngalo dhe." 
Judges5:9 Ndi musangaavu olw'abaduumizi ba Isiraeli, abantu abo abeeghaayo ekyeyendere. Musaake Musengwa Katonda!" 
Judges5:10 Mukighayeeku imwe abatyama ku ndogoyi edh'erangi, imwe abatyama ku bisampa eby'omughendo einho, n'imwe abatambula mu ngira." 
Judges5:11 Muwulire amamiro ag'abali ku nsulo edh'amaadhi. Boogera ku bughanguzi Musengwa Katonda bwe yagha Isiraeli. Agho abantu ba Musengwa Katonda baatambuza maani, okuja ku miryango gy'ebibuga byaibwe." 
Judges5:12 Zuuka, zuuka Debora, situka oyembe olwembo! Zuuka Baraki mutabane wa Abinoamu, twala abo be wanhaga." 
Judges5:13 Agho abakungu abaawonagho baatambuza maani; abantu ba Musengwa Katonda baidha y'ali okulwanisa ab'amaani. 
Judges5:14 Baava mu Efuraimu baaja mu kiiko, nga banonereza abantu ab'ekika kya Benjamini. Abaduumizi baava mu Makiri, ate abakulu b'abalwani baava mu Zebuluni." 
Judges5:15 Abakulembeze ba Issakari baidha ni Debora, nga baisa kirala ni Baraki, baamunonereza mu kiiko. Aye ab'ekika kya Reubeni beesalamu, baaloba kusalagho oba banaaja." 
Judges5:16 Kiki ekyabasigaza einhuma mu bigo by'entaama, okuwulirisa obuleetu bwe bafuuyira entaama okudheeta? Ab'ekika kya Reubeni beesalamu, baaloba kusalagho oba banaaja." 
Judges5:17 Ab'ekika kya Gadi baasigala ere ng'osomoike Yorudani. Ab'ekika kya Dani, kiki ekyabasigaza mu maato? Ab'ekika kya Asheri baaba ku bukalu bw'enhandha nga basiriike, beesigalira ku myalo." 
Judges5:18 Aye ab'ekika kya Zebuluni baaghaayo obulamu okufiira mu lutalo, n'ab'ekika kya Nafutali baaguma okulwana olutalo." 
Judges5:19 Bakyabazinga baidha baalwana, bakyabazinga ab'e Kanaani baalwanira e Tanaka ku maadhi g'e Megiddo, aye baaloba kufunayo munhago gwa mpiiya." 
Judges5:20 Emuunienie dhaalwanira ku igulu, dhaalwanisa Sisera nga dhiri mu ngira dhaadho." 
Judges5:21 Omwidhuzo ogw'omu mwiga Kishoni gwabaghalabania, gwabayoolookeraku gwabeeyaagho. Nze ndidha kutambuza maani, nga tiira inhuma!" 
Judges5:22 Agho embalaasi dhaidha nga dhiri kuduma, ng'ebinuulo byadho biri kubbagalya ku itaka." 
Judges5:23 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mukolimire Merozi, mukolimire inho abatyamye baamu; kuba tibaidha kubeeraku Musengwa Katonda, mu kulwanisa ab'amaani.”" 
Judges5:24 Abakazi boonaboona abasula mu weema, Yaeli muka Heberi Omukeni n'abasinga okuba ow'enkabi." 
Judges5:25 Sisera yasaba maadhi, aye Yaeli yaamugha mata, yaamugheera amata amasunde mu kibya eky'ekikungu." 
Judges5:26 Yaagema ekikondo ky'eweema mu mukono gwe ogundi, yaagema n'enhundo mu mukono gwe gundi. Yaakomerera Sisera enkondo yaamutulisa omutwe enkondo yaafuwula mu kyeni kya Sisera oyo." 
Judges5:27 Sisera yagangalima agho gha bigere bya Yaeli nga tiyeesegenhia; yaagwa agho gha bigere bya Yaeli yaagalaamirira yaasigala agho gh'agwire, nga mufu." 
Judges5:28 Inhina wa Sisera yaalengeza mu idinisa, yaalingirira inho mu katimba kaamu. Yabuuza ati, “Lwaki embalaasi dhe tidhiize mangu? Lwaki ekigaali kye eky'omu lutalo kirwiregho okwira?”" 
Judges5:29 Abakazi ba inhina wa Sisera oyo abasinga kuba bagezi bamwiramu, nkani yeiramu mwene ati," 
Judges5:30 “Bakaayagaaza munhago, na ngeri yakugugabanamu: kiisi musaadha afuneku omughala mulala oba babiri, engoye enungi dha Sisera, zeena nfuneyo ebinhere eby'omu nkoto ebidholige.”" 
Judges5:31 “Wo Musengwa Katonda, abazigu bo batyo bwe bagwaniire okuzikiriranga boonaboona. Aye abakugonza boonaboona bagwaniire kumesunkananga, ng'oti n'endhuba eri kuvaayo.” Agho ensi yaabaamu emiraala okumala emyaka amakumi ana." 
Judges6:1 Agho Abaisiraeli kabiri baayonoona ye Musengwa Katonda. Musengwa Katonda yaaleka Abamidia okubafuga okumala emyaka musanvu. 
Judges6:2 Abamidia baasingira ghala Abaisiraeli amaani. Era olw'ekyo Abaisiraeli beesimira endungu edh'okwekwekamu mu nsozi, era beekwekanga mu mpuku ni mu bifo ebindi eby'okwewogomamu" 
Judges6:3 kuba Abaisiraeli buli lwe baamalanga okusiga, olwo nga Abamidia, n'Abamaleki, n'abatyamye ab'omu buvandhuba, beeyimba okwidha okubalumba." 
Judges6:4 Baabaidhiranga, baasimbanga eyo ni weema dhaibwe, baazikirizanga ebirime byaibwe, okutuukira irala okumpi n'ekiketezo eky'e Gaza. Baaloba kulekangagho kya kulya kyonakyona mu Isiraeli, waire okulekagho entaama, ente, oba endogoyi." 
Judges6:5 Baidhanga n'ente dhaibwe, n'egamiya dhaibwe, n'eweema dhaibwe, nga bangi ng'oti nzige. Beene ghalala n'engamiya dhaibwe nga tibabalika olw'obungi. Agho baaja nga bazikiriza ensi eyo buli ghe baabitanga." 
Judges6:6 Kale Abaisiraeli baadaazibwadaazibwa inho Abamidia abo. 
Judges6:7 Agho Abaisiraeli baalirira Musengwa Katonda abayambe olw'Abamidia abo. 
Judges6:8 Era Musengwa Katonda yaatuma omulanzi ye bali, yaabakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Nabatoola mu Misiri ye mwali mufugirwa obwiru," 
Judges6:9 naabawonia Abamisiri abo. Era naabawonia n'abo boonaboona abaabakiriganga mu nsi eno mwe muli. Abo naababingamu nga imwe muli kumpi okutuuka, ensi yaibwe naagigha imwe." 
Judges6:10 Agho naakoba imwe nti, Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mutasinzanga misambwa gya Bamori beene nsi ye mulimu.’ Aye imwe mwaloba kuwulirisa kye nkoba.”" 
Judges6:11 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaidha mu kiketezo ekyetebwa Ofura. Yaatyama ghansi gh'omuti omukologho ogwa Yoashi Omubiezeri. Gideoni, mutabane wa Yoashi oyo, yali ng'ali kukuba ngaano mu kikunhiro ky'omwenge gw'emizabbibu, olw'okwenda okugikweka ku Bamidia." 
Judges6:12 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaamubonekera, yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda ali n'iwe, iwe omusaadha ow'amaani era omuzira.”" 
Judges6:13 Gideoni yaamukoba ati: “Isebo, nkweghembye ka mbuuzeeku: oba nga Musengwa Katonda ali n'ife, lwaki bino byonabyona bitutuukaku? Era ebyewuninkiriza bye yakolanga, badhaadha baife bye baatughayiranga, biri gha? Baatughayiranga bati Musengwa Katonda yabatoola mu Misiri. Aye mpegaano Musengwa Katonda atulekuliire agho, era atughaireyo mu buyinza bw'Abamidia.”" 
Judges6:14 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Gideoni ati: “Ja n'amaani go ago goonagoona, otoole Isiraeli mu buyinza bw'Abamidia. Nze mwene ninze nkutumye.”" 
Judges6:15 Gideoni yaamukoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghembye ka mbuzeeku: Isiraeli nnaamununula ntya? Ekika kyange n'ekisingayo obunafu mu lulyo lwa Manasse, ate nze, ninze nsembayo obuto mu ndhu ya lata.”" 
Judges6:16 Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Ndidha kuba ghalala n'iwe, era oidha kughangula Abamidia ng'oti n'ali kughangula omuntu omulala ati.”" 
Judges6:17 Gideoni yairamu ati: “Oba nga onsiimye, mpa akamanhiso akooleka nga niiwe Musengwa Katonda mwene ali kwogera ninze." 
Judges6:18 Nkweghembye otava ghano, ka mmale okukuleetera ekigheebwayo kyange.” Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Ndidha kuba ghano okutuusa gh'onairira.”" 
Judges6:19 Kale Gideoni yaingira mu ndhu ye, yaita embuzi entototo, yaagifumba. Era yaakanda kilo ng'oti ikumi edh'obuwunga, yaakolamu emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa. Emamba yaagita mu kiibo, omuunhu gwamu yaagufuka mu kibya, yaabireeta ye malaika wa Musengwa Katonda ali ghansi gh'omuti omukologho, yaabimugha." 
Judges6:20 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Toola emamba n'emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa obite ku ibaale lino, obifukeku omuunhu ogw'omu mamba eyo.” Gideoni yaakola atyo." 
Judges6:21 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaagalula omwigo gwe yali nagwo mu ngalo, yaagukontesa ghansi ghaagwo ku mamba ni ku migaati egitazimbulukusiibwa. Omuliro gwava mu ibaale, gwayokya emamba n'emigaati. Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaabulagho." 
Judges6:22 Olwo Gideoni yaamanha nga y'aboine abaire malaika wa Musengwa Katonda. Agho yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, nkagwireku! Mboine malaika wo maiso ku maiso!”" 
Judges6:23 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Emiraala gibe n'iwe. Leka kutya, toidha kufa.”" 
Judges6:24 Gideoni yaazimbira Musengwa Katonda alutaari mu kifo ekyo, yaagituuma eriina: “Musengwa Katonda oyo n'emiraala.” N'okutuusa mpegaano alutaari eyo ekaali mu Ofura ekya Ababiezeri." 
Judges6:25 Mu bwire obwo, malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Gideoni ati: “Toola ente ya lata wo enume, n'ente eyindi enume ey'emyaka omusanvu, omenhemenhegho alutaari lata wo ye yazimbira Baali, era otemeteme n'empagi ya Ashera egiri ku mbali agho." 
Judges6:26 Olwo ozimbire Musengwa Katonda wo alutaari ghaigulu ku kigulumo kino, ng'okozesa amabaale agataanhiibwa obukalamu. Era, olwo otoole ente ere eyokubiri ogigheeyo ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, ng'ogyokesa enku edh'empagi ere eya Ashera y'otemyetemye.”" 
Judges6:27 Kale Gideoni yaatwala abasaadha ikumi ku bagheereza be, yaakola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yamulagira. Aye olw'okutya ab'endhu ya ise n'ab'omu kibuga, tiyaghanga kukikola musana, yaakikola bwire." 
Judges6:28 Abantu ab'omu kibuga bwe baazuuka enkyo ku nkyo, baaja okulinga bati nga babona alutaari ya Baali emenheibwagho, n'empagi ya Ashera egibaire ku mbali agho ng'etemeibwagho, nga n'ente enume eyokubiri eyokeirwa ku alutaari ezimbiibwagho." 
Judges6:29 Agho buli muntu yaabuuza mwine ati: “Naani akoze kino?” Era baabuuliriza, okutuusa lwe baazuula nga Gideoni mutabane wa Yoashi n'akikoze." 
Judges6:30 Agho baakoba Yoashi bati: “Fulumya mutabane wo tumwite, kuba amenhiegho alutaari ya Baali era yaatemagho empagi ya Ashera egibaire ku mbali agho.”" 
Judges6:31 Aye Yoashi yaakoba abo boonaboona abaamulumba ati: “Obwo Baali ye muli kuwolereza? Oba ye muli kwenda okulwanirira? Kiisi ayenda okumuwolereza aidha kwitibwa nga bukaali na kukya. Oba nga Baali bwenebwene katonda, ka yeewolereze mwene, kuba alutaari ye bamenhiegho yiye.”" 
Judges6:32 Okuva n'olwo, Gideoni yaatuumibwa eriina Yerubbaali, ekitegeeza kiti: “Baali yeewolereze mwene, kuba alutaari ye bamenhiegho yiye.”" 
Judges6:33 Agho Abamidia boonaboona, n'Abamaleki, n'abatyamye ab'e buvandhuba, beesoloza. Baasomoka omwiga Yorudani, baasimba weema dhaibwe mu kyetebwa Ekiiko ky'e Yezireeli." 
Judges6:34 Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwaidha ku Gideoni, yaafuuwa endeka okweta ab'ekika kya Abiezeri baidhe y'ali." 
Judges6:35 Yaatuma abakwenda mu biketezo bya Manasse byonabyona okubeeta baidhe bamweyimbeku. Era yaatuma abakwenda ni y'ekika kya Asheri, n'ekya Zebuluni, n'ekya Nafutali, boona baidha baamweyimbaku." 
Judges6:36 Agho Gideoni yaakoba Katonda ati: “Wo Katonda wange, wakoba oti oidha kununula Abaisiraeli ng'onkozesa nze." 
Judges6:37 Kale ni ndidha kuta obuviiri bw'entaama mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano. Ku nkyo, omusulo bwe gunaaba ku buviiri obwo kwonka, eitaka nga ikalu, olwo ndidha kumanha ng'oidha kununula Isiraeli ng'okozesa nze.”" 
Judges6:38 Era kityo bwe kyali. Gideoni bwe yazuuka ku nkyo, yaakamula omusulo ogwali mu buviiri bw'entaama, mwavaamu amaadhi agamala okwidhuza n'ekibya ekiramba." 
Judges6:39 Agho Gideoni yaakoba Katonda ati: “Wo Katonda wange, otansungughalira. Aye leka ndhogereyo kabiri omukuzi mulala gwonka. Ganha ngezese kabiri obuviiri bw'entaama omukuzi mulala gwonka. Ku mukuzi guno, leka obuviiri bw'entaama bube bukalu, aye eitaka libe nga n'eriboze n'omusulo.”" 
Judges6:40 Obwire obwo, Katonda yaakola atyo. Ku nkyo, obuviiri bw'entaama bwonka n'obwali obukalu, aye eitaka lyonalyona lyaba nga n'eriboze n'omusulo." 
Judges7:1 Agho Yerubbaali, oyo nga ni Gideoni, n'abantu abaali naye boonaboona, baazuuka ku nkyo, baasimba weema dhaibwe kumpi n'akaiga akeetebwa Horidi. Weema edh'Abamidia nga dhibali ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, mu kiiko ekiri ku mbali kw'olusozi More." 
Judges7:2 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Gideoni ati: “Abantu abali n'iwe babitiriire obungi, nze okubagha okughangula Abamidia, kuba baghanga okuneesuutiraku nga bakoba bati baghangwire lwa maani gaibwe." 
Judges7:3 Mpegaano ni, langirira mu bantu oti, ‘Kiisi awulira ng'atya era ng'adhugumira, aireyo ewaibwe.’ ” Kale Gideoni yaabaleba atyo, era abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ibiri (22,000) bairayo ewaibwe. Abantu omutwalo mulala (10,000) n'abaasigala." 
Judges7:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Gideoni ati: “Abantu bakaabitiriire okuba abangi. Baserengese ku maadhi nje mbalebe, mbakulonderemu eyo. Oyo ye nnaakoba nti aidha kuja n'iwe, n'aidha okuja n'iwe. Ate ye nnaakoba taaje n'iwe, taidha kuja n'iwe.”" 
Judges7:5 Kale Gideoni yaaserengesa abantu ku maadhi. Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Yawula abantu abo boonaboona abakomba amaadhi n'olulimi ng'oti n'embwa bw'ekomba, bave mu bale abamala okukuba amakiryaivu memale ni banhwa amaadhi.”" 
Judges7:6 Abaasena amaadhi mu ngalo dhaibwe ni bagakomba n'olulimi, baali ebikumi bisatu (300). Abaasigalagho boonaboona baakuba amakiryaivu memale baanhwa amaadhi." 
Judges7:7 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Gideoni ati: “Ndidha kubanunula nga nkozesa abasaadha abo ebikumi ebisatu abakombye amaadhi, nkughe okughangula Abamidia. Abandi boonaboona, bakobe buli muntu aireyo ewaibwe.”" 
Judges7:8 Kale Gideoni yaasindika Abaisiraeli boonaboona bairayo ewaibwe, okutoolaku bale ebikumi ebisatu, be yasigala nabo, ni basigaza eby'okulya byonabyona n'amagwala. Weema edh'Abamidia dhaali nga dhibali ghansi mu kiiko." 
Judges7:9 Mu bwire obwo, Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Gideoni ati: “Situka, oje olumbe Abamidia mu weema dhaibwe mbakughaire obaghangule." 
Judges7:10 Aye oba nga oli kutya okulumba, serengetayo n'omugheereza wo Pura." 
Judges7:11 Oidha kuwulira bye bali kwogera, olwo ofune amaani okubalumba mu weema dhaibwe.” Agho Gideoni yaaserengeta n'omugheereza we Pura ku mbali kw'eweema dh'abazigu." 
Judges7:12 Abamidia, n'Abamaleki, n'abatyamye b'e buvandhuba, baali nga bamaze okwidhula woonawoona mu kiiko. Nga bali kamaala ng'oti nzige, era nga engamiya dhe bali nadho tidhibalika ng'oti n'omusenho ku bukalu bw'enhandha." 
Judges7:13 Gideoni bwe yatuukayo, yaawulira omusaadha ng'ali kukobera mwine ekirooto, ati: “Naloose omugaati gwa sayiri nga guli kugwa mu kifo Abamidia ghe basimbye weema dhaibwe. Gwatuuka ku weema gwagikuba yaagwa, yaagalaamirira era yeeyala ku itaka.”" 
Judges7:14 Mwine yaamwiramu ati: “Eyo n'empiima ya Gideoni, mutabane wa Yoashi, Omuisiraeli! Ghazira kindi kabiri ekyo kye kisobola kutegeeza. Katonda amughaire okughangula ensi Midia n'eigye lyaife lyonalyona.”" 
Judges7:15 Gideoni bwe yawulira ekirooto ky'omusaadha oyo n'amakulu gaakyo, yaasinza Katonda. Era yairayo ku weema dh'Abaisiraeli, yaabakoba ati: “Musituke! Musengwa Katonda abaghaire okughangula eigye ly'e Midia.”" 
Judges7:16 Agho yaagabaniamu abasaadha be ebikumi ebisatu (300) mu bikunsu bisatu. Kiisi musaadha yaamugemya eigwala n'ensuwa enkalu, ng'erimu engada edhiri kwaka." 
Judges7:17 Yaabakoba ati: “Bwe nnaatuuka ku mbali kw'ekifo aghasimbiibwa weema, mwidha kuuningirira. Kye nnaakola, mwena kye mwidha okukola." 
Judges7:18 Nze ghalala ni be naaba nabo boonaboona bwe tunaafuuwa endeka dhaife, olwo mwena mwidha kufuuwa edhaimwe woonawoona okwezunguluza ekifo ekyo aghasimbiibwa weema. Era mwidha kwasiikana muti, ‘Ku lwa Musengwa Katonda ni ku lwa Gideoni!’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Agho Gideoni n'abasaadha kikumi abaali naye, baatuuka ku mbali kw'ekifo aghaasimbibwa weema. Baatuukayo agho kumpi mu bwire ghagati, ng'abakuumi baakamalanga okukyusibwa. Agho baafuuwa amagwala gaibwe, era baamenha n'ensuwa dhe baali bagemye." 
Judges7:20 N'ebikunsu bire ebindi ebibiri byakola bityo. Boonaboona baagema engada edhiri kwaka mu mikono gyaibwe emigooda, n'amagwala mu mikono gyaibwe emisaadha. Era baayasiikana bati: “Empiima ya Musengwa Katonda era ya Gideoni!”" 
Judges7:21 Kiisi muntu yaayemerera mu kifo kye okwezunguluza ekifo ekyo aghaasimbibwa weema. Ab'eigye lyonalyona ery'omuzigu baalumuka nga baasiikana. 
Judges7:22 Abasaadha ba Gideoni bwe baafuuwa endeka dhaibwe ebikumi ebisatu, Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera ab'eigye ery'omuzigu buli muntu okulumba mwine, buli muntu ng'alwanisa mwine n'empiima. Baalumuka okutuuka e Bethi Shitta okwolekera Zerera, okutuuka ku nsalosalo ni Abeli Mehola, okumpi n'e Tabbathi." 
Judges7:23 Agho abasaadha Abaisiraeli baayetebwa okuva mu kika ekya Nafutali, n'ekya Asheri, n'ekya Manasse kyonakyona, baidha baabingirira Abamidia." 
Judges7:24 Gideoni yaatuma abakwenda mu kiketezo kyonakyona ekya Efuraimu eky'ensozi, yaabakoba ati: “Muserengete ghansi mulwanise Abamidia. Muzingize, mugeme omwiga Yorudani n'ebiketezo ebindi eby'amaadhi okutuuka e Bethibara.” Kale ab'ekika kya Efuraimu baayetebwa, baidha baagema omwiga Yorudani n'ebiketezo ebindi eby'amaadhi." 
Judges7:25 Baagema abalangira b'e Midia ababiri, Orebu ni Zeebu. Baitira Orebu ku lubaale olwetebwa olwa Orebu, ni Zeebu baamwitira ku kikunhiro ky'omwenge gw'emizabbibu ekyetebwa ekya Zeebu. Omutwe gwa Orebu n'ogwa Zeebu baagitwalira Gideoni ere ng'osomoike Yorudani." 
Judges8:1 Agho abasaadha b'Efuraimu baakoba Gideoni bati: “Lwaki watubisa otyo, n'otatwetaku ng'oja okulwanisa Abamidia?” Baamunenia inho n'amaani." 
Judges8:2 Aye yaabakoba ati: “Kye nakola kitono inho, bw'okigerangerania n'ekyo imwe kye mukoze. Imwe abantu aba Efuraimu kye mukoze, kisinga ghala ekyo ife ab'endhu ya Abiezeri kye tukoze." 
Judges8:3 Kuba imwe Katonda abaghaire okwita abalangira ababiri, Orebu ni Zeebu, ab'e Midia. Aye nze katyo nkoze ki ekyagayaga n'ekyo?” Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo obusungu bwabawaaku." 
Judges8:4 Agho Gideoni n'abasaadha be ebikumi ebisatu baatuuka ku mwiga Yorudani, baagusomoka nga bakoowu, aye baasigala nga bakaabingirira omuzigu." 
Judges8:5 Bwe yatuuka e Sukkothi, Gideoni yaakoba abantu baayo ati: “Mbeeghembye mugheeku abasaadha bange ku mere, kuba bakoowu, ate nga ndi kubingirira bakyabazinga, Zeba ni Zalumunna, ab'e Midia.”" 
Judges8:6 Aye abakulembeze ab'omu Sukkothi baababuuza bati: “Obwo abalwani bo bamaze okugema Zeba ni Zalumunna, memale olwo ife tubaghe emere?”" 
Judges8:7 Gideoni yaakoba ati: “Kale, Musengwa Katonda bw'anaamala okuta Zeba ni Zalumunna mu ngalo dhange, ndidha kubakubisa amawa n'enkandwa eby'omu irungu.”" 
Judges8:8 Gideoni olwava agho, yaaja e Penueli, era yaasaba abantu baayo ekintu n'ekirala. Aye ab'omu Penueli baamwiramu mu nsambo n'endala ng'oti n'ab'omu Sukkothi." 
Judges8:9 Agho yaakoba abaayo ati: “Bwe ndiira kabiri nga ndi mu miraala, ndimenhamenha omunaala gwaimwe ogwo.”" 
Judges8:10 Zeba ni Zalumunna baali nga bali mu Karikori n'eigye lyaibwe. Ku igye eryo lyonalyona ery'abantu ab'e buvandhuba, kwali nga kukaasigaireku abalwani omutwalo mulala n'enkumi itaanu (15,000). Abalwani emitwalo ikumi n'ebiri (120,000) baali nga bamaze okwitibwa." 
Judges8:11 Gideoni yaagema engira ey'e buvandhuba bw'e Noba n'e Yogubeha, yaalumba eigye eryo nga tirimwetegekeire." 
Judges8:12 Bakyabazinga bombi Abamidia, Zeba ni Zalumunna, baalumuka. Aye Gideoni yaababingirira, yaabagema, era yaaleetera eigye lyaibwe lyonalyona okutabukatabuka." 
Judges8:13 Gideoni bweyali ng'ali kwira okuva mu lutalo, ng'ali kubitira mu Heresi," 
Judges8:14 yaagema omwisuka ow'e Sukkothi. Yaabaaku ni by'amubuuza. Omwisuka yaaghandiikira Gideoni amaina nsanvu na musanvu, ag'abakungu n'abakulembeze mu Sukkothi." 
Judges8:15 Agho Gideoni yaaja y'abantu b'omu Sukkothi yaabakoba ati: “Mubone Zeba ni Zalumunna, be mwavaaku okuunumya nga mukoba muti, ‘Obwo abalwani bo bamaze okugema Zeba ni Zalumunna, memale olwo ife tughe abalwani bo abo abakoowu emere?’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Agho yaagema amawa n'enkandwa eby'omu irungu, yaabonereza abakulembeze ab'omu kibuga ekyo Sukkothi." 
Judges8:17 Era yaamenhamenha omunaala gw'omu kibuga Penueli, yaita n'abasaadha baamu." 
Judges8:18 Agho Gideoni yaabuuza Zeba ni Zalumunna ati: “Abasaadha be mwaitira e Tabori baali bafaanana batya?” Bale bamwiramu bati: “Baali bafaanana n'iwe, nga buli muntu ali ng'oti n'omwana wa kyabazinga.”" 
Judges8:19 Gideoni yaakoba ati: “Abo baali baganda bange, abaana ba maama beene. Ndayira Musengwa Katonda omulamu nti ngoli timwabaita, mwena tinandibaise.”" 
Judges8:20 Agho yaakoba mutabane we omuberi, Yetheri, ati: “Situka, obaite!” Aye omwisuka oyo yaaloba kusowolayo mpiima ye. Yatya, kuba yali akaali mulenzi bulenzi." 
Judges8:21 Agho Zeba ni Zalumunna baakoba Gideoni bati: “Iwe mwene, niiwe obe otwite, kuba ekikolwa ng'oti n'ekyo, kikolebwa musaadha!” Gideoni yaasituka, yaita Zeba ni Zalumunna era yaatwala ebyamadholobera ebyali mu nkoto dh'engamiya dhaibwe, nga byakolebwa mu kifaananie ekiri ng'oti mwezi nga gwakaboneka." 
Judges8:22 Agho Abaisiraeli baakoba Gideoni bati: “Tufugenga, iwe mwene, ni batabane bo, n'abaidhukulu bo, kuba otuwoniiza Abamidia.”" 
Judges8:23 Gideoni yaabairamu ati: “Nze tija kubafuganga, waire mutabane wange. Musengwa Katonda n'anaabafuganga.”" 
Judges8:24 Aye yaabakoba ati: “Ka mbasabe kino: kiisi muntu ampe empeta edh'omu matu dhe yanhaga.” Kuba Abamidia baavaalanga empeta dh'omu matu edha zaabu ng'oti n'Abaishimaeli abandi boonaboona. 
Judges8:25 Bale bairamu bati: “Twidha kuba basangaavu okudhikugha.” Baayalagho olugoye, kiisi muntu yaata okwo empeta dh'omu matu dhe yanhaga." 
Judges8:26 Empeta dhe yafuna dhaazitogha kilo kumpi amakumi abiri, nga tobaliireeku byamadholobera byakolebwa mu bifaananie ebiri ng'oti mwezi ogwakaboneka, n'ebinhere eby'omu nkoto, n'engoye dha nakasooma bakyabazinga ab'e Midia dhe baali nga bavaire, n'endhegere edhaali mu nkoto edh'engamiya dhaibwe." 
Judges8:27 Gideoni yaakola mu zaabu oyo ekisinzibwa ekitali Katonda, yaakita mu kibuga kye ekiri mu Ofura. Abaisiraeli boonaboona baava ku Katonda, baajangayo okukisinza, kyafuuka omutego eri Gideoni n'ab'omu maka ge." 
Judges8:28 Kale Isiraeli yaaghangula Abamidia, era Abamidia abo baaloba kwiramu kabiri kubeeraliikiriza. Ensi yaabaamu emiraala okumala emyaka amakumi ana, okutuusa Gideoni bwe yafa." 
Judges8:29 Yerubbaali, oyo nga ni Gideoni mutabane wa Yoashi, yairayo mu maka ge, yaaba eyo." 
Judges8:30 Yaazaala abaana ab'obulenzi nsanvu, kuba yali n'abakazi kamaala." 
Judges8:31 Era yali n'omukazi ow'embali eyali e Shekemu. Yeena yaamuzaalira omwana ow'obulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Agho Gideoni mutabane wa Yoashi yaafa ng'akairiighe inho yaawola n'okuwola. Baamuziika mu lwambiidhi lwa lata we Yoashi, mu Ofura, ekibuga ekya Ababiezeri." 
Judges8:33 Gideoni nga yaakafa, Abaisiraeli baakyuka kabiri, bairamu obutaba beesigwa ye Katonda. Baasinzanga Baali, era baafuula Baali Berithi okuba omusambwa gwaibwe." 
Judges8:34 Baalekera okusinza Musengwa Katonda waibwe, eyabawonia abazigu baibwe boonaboona abaali babeezungulwire." 
Judges8:35 Era baaloba kuba basiimu naire y'ab'endhu ya Gideoni, olw'ebirungi byonabyona bye yakolera Isiraeli." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleki mutabane wa Gideoni yaaja e Shekemu y'aboluganda lwa inhina, yaabakoba boonaboona ati:" 
Judges9:2 “Mubuuze abantu ab'e Shekemu boonaboona muti, ‘Kye mwenda n'ekiri gha ku bino: okufugibwanga batabane ba Gideoni boonaboona ensanvu, oba okufugibwanga omuntu omulala yenka?’ Mwidhukire nga nze ndi musaayi gwaimwe.”" 
Judges9:3 Aboluganda lwa inhina baamutuukiza ebibono ebyo byonabyona y'abantu ab'e Shekemu. Abantu ab'e Shekemu abo baasalagho okunonereza Abimeleki, nga bakoba bati: “Oyo atuliku oluganda.”" 
Judges9:4 Baamugha ebitundu bya feeza nsanvu, bye baatoola mu isabo lya Baali Berithi. Empiiya edho, Abimeleki dhe yakozesa okupangisa abasaadha abazira kye bagasa naire era ababbamu, abaamunonereza." 
Judges9:5 Agho yaaja mu ndhu ya ise mu Ofura, yaitirayo, ku ibaale irala, baganda be ensanvu, batabane ba Gideoni. Aye Yothamu mutabane wa Gideoni asembayo obuto, yeekweka, yaaloba kwitibwa." 
Judges9:6 Abatyamye ab'e Shekemu n'ab'e Bethimillo boonaboona, beesoloza, baafuula Abimeleki kyabazinga, agho ghansi gh'omuti omukologho ogw'empagi e Shekemu." 
Judges9:7 Yothamu bwe yakimanha, yaaja yaayemerera ghaigulu ku ngulu ku lusozi Gerizimu, yaayogerera ghaigulu, yaabalagiriza ati: “Mumpulirise imwe abatyamye b'e Shekemu, Katonda aghange okubawulira." 
Judges9:8 Agho olwatuuka, emiti gyaja okulonda kyabazinga anaagifuganga. Gyakoba omuti omwoliva giti, ‘Ba kyabazinga waife.’" 
Judges9:9 Aye omuti omwoliva gwairamu guti, ‘Ndekeyo okuvaamu omuzigo gwe bakozesa okwisa ekitiibwa mu misambwa ni mu bantu, ndhire mu kufuga obw'emiti?’" 
Judges9:10 Emiti gyakoba omuti omutiini giti, ‘Iwe idha, obe kyabazinga waife.’" 
Judges9:11 Aye omuti omutiini gwairamu guti, ‘Ndekeyo okubala ebibala ebirungi era ebidhuudhuula, ndhire mu kufuga obw'emiti?’" 
Judges9:12 Emiti gyakoba omuti omuzabbibu giti, ‘Iwe idha, obe kyabazinga waife.’" 
Judges9:13 Aye omuti omuzabbibu gwairamu guti, ‘Ndekeyo okuvaamu omwenge gwange ogusangaaza emisambwa n'abantu, ndhire mu kufuga obw'emiti?’" 
Judges9:14 Agho emiti gyonagyona gyakoba omuti namukodolya giti, ‘Iwe idha, obe kyabazinga waife.’" 
Judges9:15 Omuti namukodolya gwakoba emiti guti, ‘Oba nga bwene mwenda okunfuula kyabazinga waimwe, kale mwidhe mwewogome mu kinsense kyange. Aye oba nga ti n'ekyo, omuliro gwidha kuva mu nsaga dhange edh'amawa, gumalegho emivule egy'omu Lebanoni.’ ”" 
Judges9:16 Yothamu yaayongera okukoba ati: “Mpegaano ni mwebuuze: Eky'okufuula Abimeleki kyabazinga, mukikoze mu bwesimbu na mazima? Mwidhukira ebirungi Gideoni bye yabakolera? Era ab'endhu ye mubabisiisa bukalamu nga bwe kigwaniire?" 
Judges9:17 Mwidhukire nga lata wange yabalwanirira yaaghaayo obulamu bwe, yaabawonia Abamidia." 
Judges9:18 Aye imwe olwaleero mwefuuliire ab'endhu ya lata wange mwaitira ku ibaale irala batabane be, abantu ensanvu. Mwatoola Abimeleki, mutabane w'omwiru omukazi owa lata wange, mwamufuula kyabazinga ow'e Shekemu, kuba waluganda lwaimwe." 
Judges9:19 Kale ni oba nga kye mukoze Gideoni n'ab'endhu ye, mu kikoze mu mwoyo mulungi na mu mazima, mbeeni musangaalire Abimeleki, era yeena abasangaalire." 
Judges9:20 Aye oba nga ti bwekiri, omuliro ka guve mu Abimeleki gusaaniegho ab'omu Shekemu n'ab'e Bethimillo, era omuliro guve mu bantu ab'e Shekemu n'ab'e Bethimillo gusaaniegho Abimeleki.”" 
Judges9:21 Agho Yothamu, olw'okutya muganda we Abimeleki, yaalumukira e Beeri, yaaba eyo." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleki yaafuga Isiraeli okumala emyaka esatu. 
Judges9:23 Agho Katonda yaakyaghagania Abimeleki n'abantu b'omu Shekemu. Abantu ab'omu Shekemu baaghemukira Abimeleki nga tibakaali beesigwa y'ali. 
Judges9:24 Ekyo kyaligho, Abimeleki n'abantu ab'e Shekemu abaamughaganga okwita batabane ba Gideoni ensanvu, beesasuuzibwe olw'omusango gwaibwe ogwo." 
Judges9:25 Abantu ab'e Shekemu baataagho abasaadha okweteeganga Abimeleki ku ngulu okw'ensozi, era baanhaganga ebintu ku bantu boonaboona abaabitanga mu ngira eyo. Ekyo abantu baakikobera Abimeleki." 
Judges9:26 Agho Gaali mutabane wa Ebedi, yaidha n'aboluganda lwe, e Shekemu. Era abantu ab'e Shekemu baamutaamu obwesige," 
Judges9:27 baaja mu masamba gaibwe ag'emizabbibu, baanoga emizabbibu baagikunhamu omwenge. Era baakola ekibinuko, baingira mu isabo ly'omusambwa gwaibwe, baalya, baanhwa, era baavumirira Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Gaali oyo mutabane wa Ebedi yaakoba ati: “Tuli bantu ba nsambo ki ife ab'omu Shekemu muno? Lwaki tugheereza Abimeleki? Ye Abimeleki oyo naani? Era abimeleki oyo ni Zebuli omukungu we, bombi tibaagheerezanga basaadha ba Hamori, lata wa Shekemu? Kale lwaki tumugheereza?" 
Judges9:29 Ngoli ninze omukulembeze w'abantu bano, nanditoiregho Abimeleki! Nandimukobye nti, ‘Yongera mu igye lyo amaani, oveeyo oidhe olwane.’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Zebuli omukulu w'ekibuga bwe yawulira Gaali, mutabane wa Ebedi by'akobye, yaasungughala." 
Judges9:31 Yaatuma abakwenda y'Abimeleki mu Aruma okumukobera ati: “Gaali mutabane wa Ebedi n'aboluganda lwe baidhie e Shekemu, era baasiikuula abantu ab'omu kibuga okukulwanisa." 
Judges9:32 Mpegaano ni, iwe n'abasaadha bo, muje obwire mweteege mu nsiko." 
Judges9:33 Olwo musituke ku nkyo ng'endhuba yaakavaayo, mulumbe ekibuga. Gaali n'abasaadha be bwe banaavaayo okubalumba, mwidha kubakubira irala nga bwe munaaba musoboire.”" 
Judges9:34 Agho Abimeleki n'abasaadha be baasituka mu bwire, beeteega ku mbali kwa Shekemu mu bikunsu bina." 
Judges9:35 Agho Gaali yaafuluma yaayemerera mu mulyango ogw'ekibuga. Abimeleki n'abasaadha be baasituka okuva ghe baali babwaime. 
Judges9:36 Gaali bwe yababona, yaakoba Zebuli ati: “Bona abantu bali kuserengeta nga bava ku ngulu okw'ensozi.” Aye Zebuli yaamwiramu ati: “Oli kubona binsense bya nsozi nga biri ng'oti bantu!”" 
Judges9:37 Gaali yaakoba kabiri ati: “Bona, abantu bali kuserengeta nga bava ghagati gh'ekiketezo. Ghaligho ekikunsu eky'abantu ekindi ekiri kufuluma mu ngira ey'oku muti omukologho ogw'abalaguzi.”" 
Judges9:38 Agho Zebuli yaamukoba ati: “Mpegaano okwesuutiriza kwo kujiire gha? Wakoba oti, ‘Abimeleki katyo naani, ife okumugheereza?’ Abo ni, n'abantu be wanhoomerera. Mpegaano weeveemu obalwanise.”" 
Judges9:39 Gaali yaakulembera abasaadha ab'e Shekemu, yaalwanisa Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Gaali yaalumuka, Abimeleki yaamubingirira. Abantu kamaala baaja nga bagwa okutuukira irala ku mulyango ogw'ekibuga, olw'okufumitibwa." 
Judges9:41 Abimeleki yaaba mu Aruma. Zebuli yaabinga Gaali n'aboluganda lwe mu Shekemu, balobe kubangamu." 
Judges9:42 Ku lunaku olwairirira, abantu ab'e Shekemu baaja mu nimiro. Ekyo abantu baakikobera Abimeleki." 
Judges9:43 Agho yaatwala abasaadha be, yaabagabania mu bikunsu bisatu, beeteega. Bwe yabona abantu nga bafuluma mu kibuga, yaabazinduukiriza yaabaita." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleki n'ab'omu kikunsu ekyali naye, baaziinhuuka, baaja okukuuma omulyango ogw'ekibuga. Mu kiseera n'ekirala, ab'omu bikunsu bire ebibiri ebindi, baalumba abantu abaali mu nimiro, baabaita boonaboona." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleki yaamala olunaku olwo lwonalwona ng'ali kulwanisa ekibuga ekyo. Yaakigema, yaita abantu baamu, era yaakimenhamenha, yaakimansiramu omuunhu." 
Judges9:46 Abantu boonaboona abaali mu munaala ogw'e Shekemu bwe baawulira ekyo, baaja baingira mu kifo eky'okwewogomamu mu isabo lya Eliberithi." 
Judges9:47 Abantu baakobera Abimeleki bati abantu bale boonaboona beesololeiza omwo. 
Judges9:48 Agho yaaniinaniina, yaaja ku lusozi Zalumoni n'abasaadha be. Yaagema empasa, yaatema omuganda gw'ensaga ku muti, yaaguta ku ibega lye. Yaalagira abasaadha be bangughe, boona bakole nga bw'akoze." 
Judges9:49 Agho kiisi muntu yaatema omuganda gw'ensaga ku muti, yaanonereza Abimeleki. Baabunga ensaga edho mu kifo eky'okwewogomamu kire, baakikumaku omuliro. Olwo abantu boonaboona abaali mu munaala ogw'e Shekemu, boona baafa, abasaadha n'abakazi nga baghera ng'oti lukumi (1,000)." 
Judges9:50 Agho Abimeleki yaaja mu kibuga Thebezi, yaakizingiza okukyezunguluza, era yaakinhaga." 
Judges9:51 Ekibuga ekyo kyalimu ekimante ekigumu einho. Kale abantu boonaboona ab'omu kibuga, abasaadha n'abakazi, baalumukira omwo beesibiramu, era baaniina ku kasolya." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleki bwe yaja okulumba ekimante ekigumu ekyo, yaaseeta gha mulyango gwakyo okukikumaku omuliro." 
Judges9:53 Aye omukazi yaasuula enso ey'oku lubengo ku mutwe gw'Abimeleki, yaamwawula ekighanga." 
Judges9:54 Agho Abimeleki yaayangugha okweta omwisuka eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa bye, yaamulagira ati: “Sowolayo empiima yo ondhite, abantu balobenga kundhogeraku bati mukazi n'eyandhita.” Kale omwisuka yaamufumita yaafa." 
Judges9:55 Abaisiraeli bwe baabona nga Abimeleki afiire, bairayo ewaibwe boonaboona." 
Judges9:56 Mu nsambo eyo, Katonda yeesasuuliza ku Abimeleki olw'omusango gwe yaiza ku ise ng'aita baganda be ensanvu." 
Judges9:57 Katonda era yaabonereza abantu b'omu Shekemu olw'ekibi kyaibwe. Ni Yothamu, mutabane wa Gideoni, kye yakolima kyatuukirira." 
Judges10:1 Abimeleki bwe yamala okufa, Tola mutabane wa Pua era mwidhukulu wa Dodo, yaidha okununula Isiraeli. Yali wa mu kika kya Issakari, ng'aba mu kiketezo eky'ensozi ekya Efuraimu." 
Judges10:2 Yaaba mukulembeze wa Isiraeli okumala emyaka amakumi abiri n'esatu. Yaamala yaafa, baamuziika mu Shamiri." 
Judges10:3 Tola bwe yamala okufa, ghairagho Yairi, eyava e Gileadi. Yaakulembera Isiraeli okumala emyaka amakumi abiri n'ebiri." 
Judges10:4 Yali ni batabane amakumi asatu, abaajiiranga ku ndogoyi amakumi asatu. Baali n'ebibuga amakumi asatu, mu Gileadi, ebikaayetebwa ebyalo bya Yairi ni ye buli eno." 
Judges10:5 Yairi yaafa, baamuziika mu Kamoni." 
Judges10:6 Agho Abaisiraeli kabiri baakola ebibi ye Musengwa Katonda, nga basinza emisambwa, Baali ni Ashitarothi. Era baasinza bakatonda b'Abasiria, n'ab'Abasidoni, n'ab'Abamoabu, n'ab'Abammoni, n'ab'Abafilisiti. Abaisiraeli abo, baava ku Musengwa Katonda, baalekera agho okumusinza." 
Judges10:7 Musengwa Katonda yaasungughalira Abaisiraeli abo, yaaleka Abafilisiti n'Abammoni baabaghangula." 
Judges10:8 Abafilisiti n'Abammoni abo baamala emyaka ikumi na munaana nga batuntuza era nga bakiriga Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaali ere ng'osomoike omwiga Yorudani, mu kiketezo eky'Abamori ekiri mu Gileadi." 
Judges10:9 Abammoni baasomoka n'omwiga Yorudani okulwanisa ab'ekika kya Yuda, n'ekya Benjamini, n'ekya Efuraimu. Olwo Isiraeli yoonayoona yaaba mu bweraliikirivu obubitirivu." 
Judges10:10 Agho Abaisiraeli baalirira Musengwa Katonda nga bakoba bati: “Twayonoona mu maiso go, kuba twakuvaaku iwe Katonda waife, twasinza emisambwa gi Baali.”" 
Judges10:11 Musengwa Katonda yairamu Abaisiraeli ati: “Nze tyabawonia bwe mwali nga muli kutuntuzibwa Abamisiri, n'Abamori n'Abammoni, n'Abafilisiti," 
Judges10:12 n'Abasidoni, n'Abamaleki, n'Abamoani? Bwe mwandirira tyabawonia?" 
Judges10:13 Aye mwanvaaku mwasinza bakatonda abandi. Kale, tija kwirayo kubanunula." 
Judges10:14 Muje mulirire bakatonda be mulonzeegho okusinza. Abo n'ababe babawonienga nga mugwire mu buzibu.” 
Judges10:15 Aye Abaisiraeli baakoba Musengwa Katonda bati: “Twayonoona. Iwe tukole kyonakyona ky'onaabona nga n'ekitugwaniire. Aye tukweghemba otununule olwaleero.” 
Judges10:16 Kale baasuula ere bakatonda b'abamaghanga agandi, baasinza Musengwa Katonda. Musengwa Katonda oyo yaawulira enaku ku mwoyo olw'okudaazibwadaazibwa kwa Isiraeli." 
Judges10:17 Agho Abammoni beetegeka okulwana, baasimba weema dhaibwe mu Gileadi. N'Abaisiraeli beesoloza, baasimba weema dhaibwe e Mizipa mu Gileadi." 
Judges10:18 Abakulembeze b'Abaisiraeli mu Gileadi beebuuzagania beene na beene bati: “Naani anaakulembera olutalo olw'okulwanisa Abammoni? Oyo n'aidha okuba omukulembeze ow'abatyamye boonaboona ab'omu Gileadi.” 
Judges11:1 Yefutha yali Mugileadi omulwani ow'amaani omuzira, aye nga mutabane wa mukazi malaaya. Lata we nga ni Gileadi," 
Judges11:2 eyali ni batabane abandi aba mukazi we. Batabane abo bwe baakula, baabinga Yefutha ghaka, nga bakoba bati: “Ghazira ky'olisika mu ndhu ya iseife, kuba oli mwana wa mukazi wundi.”" 
Judges11:3 Agho Yefutha yaalumuka baganda be, yaaja yaabanga mu kiketezo eky'e Tobu. Ng'ali eyo, abantu abazira kye bagasa baamweyimbaku, baajanga okukambula abantu." 
Judges11:4 Nga ghabiseeghooku entangama, Abammoni baaja okulwanisa Abaisiraeli." 
Judges11:5 Agho abakulembeze mu Gileadi baaja okunonayo Yefutha mu kiketezo ky'e Tobu. 
Judges11:6 Baamukoba bati: “Idha otukulembere, tulwanise Abammoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Aye Yefutha yaabairamu ati: “Timwankyagha ni muuminga mu ndhu ya lata? Lwaki mpegaano mwidha ye ndi nga muli mu buzibu?” 
Judges11:8 Abakulembeze b'omu Gileadi baakoba Yefutha bati: “Twidhie y'oli mpegaano, kuba twenda oje n'ife tulwanise Abammoni, era obe mukulembeze ow'abatyamye boonaboona mu Gileadi.”" 
Judges11:9 Yefutha yaakoba ati: “Bwe munandhizaayo ewaife okulwanisa Abammoni, memale Musengwa Katonda n'ampa obughanguzi, ndidha kuba mufuzi waimwe.”" 
Judges11:10 Bale bairamu bati: “Twikiriiza. Musengwa Katonda n'omudhulizi waife.” 
Judges11:11 Agho Yefutha yaaja n'abakulembeze b'e Gileadi, abantu baamufuula mufuzi era mukulembeze waibwe. Yefutha yaayogera ebibono bye byonabyona mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda e Mizipa." 
Judges11:12 Agho Yefutha yaatuma abakwenda ye kyabazinga ow'Abammoni bamukobe bati: “Otuvunaana ki, ky'oviireku okulumba ensi yaife?”" 
Judges11:13 Kyabazinga ow'Abammoni yairamu ati: “Abaisiraeli bwe baava e Misiri, baatwala ekiketezo eky'ensi yange, okuva ku mwiga Arunoni okutuuka ku mwiga Yabboki, ni ku mwiga Yorudani. Kale mpegaano ekiketezo ekyo mukitwirize bya bulungi.”" 
Judges11:14 Yefutha yaatuma kabiri abakwenda ye kyabazinga ow'Abammoni ng'amukoba ati: 
Judges11:15 “Isiraeli tanhagangaku kiketezo kya Moabu, waire ekya Ammoni." 
Judges11:16 Aye ekituufu kiri kiti, Abaisiraeli bwe baava e Misiri, baabita mu irungu okutuuka ku Nhandha Emyufu, baigukira e Kadeshi." 
Judges11:17 Agho baatuma abakwenda ye kyabazinga ow'Edomu okumusaba abaganhe okubita mu kiketezo kye. Aye kyabazinga ow'e Edomu yaaloba kubaganha. Era Abaisiraeli baatuma abakwenda ni ye kyabazinga ow'e Moabu. Aye yeena yaaloba kubaganha. Kale, Abaisiraeli abo baasigala e Kadeshi."
