Judges11:18 Agho beekooloobya nga babita ku mbali kw'ekiketezo eky'e Edomu n'eky'e Moabu, baatuuka ku luuyi lw'ekiketezo eky'e Moabu olw'e buvandhuba, baasimba weema dhaibwe ku mbali kw'omwiga Arunoni. Aye tibaingira mu kiketezo kya Moabu, kuba omwiga Arunoni n'ensalosalo yaakyo." 
Judges11:19 Agho Abaisiraeli baatuma abakwenda ye kyabazinga w'Abamori, Sihoni ow'e Heshiboni, baamusaba abaganhe okubita mu kiketezo kye, baje mu kyaibwe." 
Judges11:20 Aye Sihoni yaaloba kwesiga Baisiraeli kubita mu kiketezo kye. Kale yaasoloza eigye lye lyonalyona, baasimba weema dhaibwe e Yahazi, baalwanisa Abaisiraeli." 
Judges11:21 Agho Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, yaagha Abaisiraeli okughangula Sihoni n'eigye lye lyonalyona. Olwo Abaisiraeli baatwala ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'Abamori abaabanga mu nsi eyo." 
Judges11:22 Baatwala ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'Abamori, okuva ku Arunoni okutuuka ku Yabboki, n'okuva ku irungu okutuuka ku Yorudani." 
Judges11:23 Kale ni Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, n'eyabinga Abamori mu kiketezo ekyo olw'abantu be Abaisiraeli. Obwo iwe oja kukyeiriza?" 
Judges11:24 Iwe twala ebyo byonabyona omusambwa gwo Kemoshi, bye gukugha okuba ebibyo. Aye ife twidha kutwala ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waife by'atoola ku bandi n'atugha." 
Judges11:25 Olowooza oti niiwe osinga Balaki, mutabane wa Zippori, kyabazinga w'e Moabu? Wamuwuliraku ng'asonsooniaku Abaisiraeli, waire okubalwanisaaku?" 
Judges11:26 Isiraeli amaze entangama ya myaka ebikumi bisatu mu Heshiboni, ni mu Aroeri, n'ebyalo ebibyezungulwire, ni mu bibuga byonabyona ebiri ku mbali kw'omwiga Arunoni. Kiki ekyakulobera okubyeiriza mu kiseera ekyo?" 
Judges11:27 Kale ni ti ninze nsobiiza y'oli, aye niiwe oli kusobya ng'onwanisa. Musengwa Katonda, n'omulamuzi. Leka alamule olwaleero ghagati gh'Abaisiraeli n'Abammoni.”" 
Judges11:28 Aye kyabazinga w'Abammoni tiyafaayo ku bukwenda Yefutha bwe yamutumira. 
Judges11:29 Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwaidha ku Yefutha, yaabita mu Gileadi ni mu Manasse, yaira mu Mizipa eky'omu Gileadi, yaaja y'Abammoni." 
Judges11:30 Yefutha yeeyama ye Musengwa Katonda ati: “Bw'olimpa okughangula Abammoni," 
Judges11:31 omuntu alisooka okufuluma mu miryango gy'endhu yange okwidha okunsangaaza nga ndhize n'obughanguzi, aliba wuwo. Ndimughaayo ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa.”" 
Judges11:32 Kale, Yefutha yaasomoka omwiga okulwanisa Abammoni, era Musengwa Katonda yaamugha okubaghangula." 
Judges11:33 Yaabakuba okuva ku Aroeri okutuuka mu biketezo ebiriinaine Minnithi, ebibuga amakumi abiri, n'okutuuka ku Abeli Keramimu. Yaabaita inho. Mu nsambo eyo Abammoni baaghangulwa Abaisiraeli." 
Judges11:34 Yefutha bwe yairayo eka mu Mizipa, yaja okulinga ati ng'abona mughala we ali kwidha okumusangaaza ng'akina era ng'akuba obugoma n'ensaasi. Oyo yali nga n'omwana wa Yefutha yenka ati. Yali azirayo mwana wundi k'abe wa bulenzi oba wa bughala, okutoolaku oyo yenka." 
Judges11:35 Yefutha bwe yamubona, yaakanulamu ebivaalo olw'enaku, ng'akoba ati: “Nkagwireku mwana wange! Onnakughaiza inho, era ondeeteire obulumi ku mwoyo, kuba neeyama ye Musengwa Katonda era tisobola kumenhagho bweyamo obwo!”" 
Judges11:36 Mughala we yaamukoba ati: “Lata, oba nga weeyama ye Musengwa Katonda, tuukiriza ekyo kye wakoba okunkolaku kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo yakugha okwesasuuliza ku bazigu bo, Abammoni.”" 
Judges11:37 Aye yaakoba ise ati: “Nkolera ekintu kirala kiti: ndeka, okumala emyezi ebiri, nje ni bakagwa bange ntambuletambule eyo ntyo ku nsozi, neerire olw'okufa nga ndi mughala mwegha.”" 
Judges11:38 Yefutha yaamukoba ati: “Ja.” Yaamusiibula aje amale emyezi ebiri. Omughala yaaja ni bakagwa be ku nsozi, yeeririra eyo olw'okufa nga mwegha." 
Judges11:39 Emyezi ebiri bwe gyawaaku, omughala yaira ye ise. Ise yaakola nga bwe yeeyama ye Musengwa Katonda, omughala yaafa nga mwegha. Okwo n'okwava empisa mu Isiraeli," 
Judges11:40 ey'abaghala okujanga buli mwaka, ni bamala enaku ina nga balira mughala wa Yefutha ow'e Gileadi." 
Judges12:1 Agho Abaefuraimu beetegeka okulwana olutalo, baasomoka omwiga Yorudani, baaja e Zafoni, baabuuza Yefutha bati: “Lwaki waja okulwanisa Abammoni, n'otatweta kuja n'iwe? Twidha kukwokera mu ndhu yo!”" 
Judges12:2 Yefutha yaabairamu ati: “Nze n'abantu bange twali n'enkaayana nnene n'Abammoni. Imwe nabeeta, aye mwaloba kwidha kubamponia." 
Judges12:3 Bwenabona nga timwidhie kubamponia, naaghaayo obulamu bwange, naaja okulwanisa Abammoni abo era Musengwa Katonda yampa okubaghangula. Kale, lwaki mwidhie olwaleero okuunwanisa?”" 
Judges12:4 Agho Yefutha yaasoloza abasaadha boonaboona ab'e Gileadi, yaalwanisa Abaefuraimu yaabaghangula kuba Abaefuraimu baali nga bakobye bati: “Imwe Abagileadi abali mu Efuraimu ni mu Manasse, mwalumuka ku Efuraimu.”" 
Judges12:5 Agho Abagileadi baagema ebifo byonabyona omwiga Yorudani ghe gusomokerwa, nga benda okulobera Abaefuraimu okulumuka. Era kiisi Muefuraimu eyagezangaku okulumuka, bwe yaidhanga n'asaba bamuganhe okusomoka, nga bamubuuza bati: “Oli Muefuraimu?” Bwe yairangamu ati: “Busa”," 
Judges12:6 olwo nga bale bamukoba akobe ati: “Shibbolethi.” Aye ole yaakoba ati: “Sibbolethi”, kuba nga tasobola kukyatula bukalamu. Olwo nga bale bamugema, nga bamwitira mu kifo omwiga Yorudani ghe gusomokerwa. Mu biseera ebyo, Abaefuraimu emitwalo ena n'enkumi ibiri (42,000) n'abaitibwa." 
Judges12:7 Yefutha yaakulembera Isiraeli okumala emyaka mukaaga. Agho yaafa, baamuziika mu kibuga kye mu Gileadi." 
Judges12:8 Yefutha bwe yavaagho, Ibuzani ow'e Bethelehemu yaakulembera Isiraeli." 
Judges12:9 Yali ni batabane amakumi asatu, ni baghala be amakumi asatu. Yafumbiza baghala be abo mu bika ebindi, era yaatoola abaghala amakumi asatu mu bika ebindi, yaabaleeta okufumbirwa batabane. Ibuzani oyo yaakulembera Isiraeli okumala emyaka musanvu." 
Judges12:10 Agho yaafa, baamuziika e Bethelehemu." 
Judges12:11 Ibuzani bwe yavaagho, Eloni Omuzebuluni yaakulembera Isiraeli okumala emyaka ikumi." 
Judges12:12 Agho yaafa, baamuziika mu Aiyaloni mu kiketezo ky'e Zebuluni." 
Judges12:13 Eloni bwe yavaagho, Abudoni mutabane wa Hilleli Omupirathoni yaakulembera Isiraeli." 
Judges12:14 Yali ni batabane amakumi ana (40), ni baidhukulu be amakumi asatu (30), abaajiiranga ku ndogoyi nsanvu. Abudoni oyo yaakulembera Isiraeli okumala emyaka munaana." 
Judges12:15 Agho yaafa, baamuziika mu Pirathoni, mu nsi ya Efuraimu, mu kiketezo eky'Abamaleki eky'oku nsozi." 
Judges13:1 Agho Abaisiraeli kabiri baayonoona ye Musengwa Katonda. Musengwa Katonda yaabaleka okufugibwa Abafilisiti okumala emyaka amakumi ana. 
Judges13:2 Ghaaligho omusaadha, eriina lye nga ni Manoa, ow'e Zora, nga wa mu kika kya Dani. Mukazi we yali mugumba, nga tazaalangaku mwana." 
Judges13:3 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaabonekera omukazi oyo, yaamukoba ati: “Oli mugumba, tozaalangaku mwana. Aye bona, oidha kutoola enda ozaale omwana mulenzi." 
Judges13:4 Weekuume olobe kunhwa ku mwenge gwa mizabbibu oba ekitamiiza kyonakyona, waire okulya ku kintu kyonakyona ekitali kirongoofu," 
Judges13:5 kuba bona, oidha kutoola enda ozaale omwana omulenzi. Omwana oyo taasalengaku nviiri ku mutwe gwe, kuba aidha kugheebwayo ye Katonda abe Munaziri okuva lw'alizaalibwa. Oyo n'alitoolera omulimo ogw'okununula isiraeli mu mikono gy'Abafilisiti.”" 
Judges13:6 Agho omukazi yaaja, yaakobera iba ati: “Omuntu wa Katonda aidhie ye ndi, ng'amaiso ge gatiisa inho ng'oti ga malaika wa Katonda. Timubuuziiza y'aviiriire, era tankobeire liina lye." 
Judges13:7 Aye ankobye ati, ‘Bona, oidha kutoola enda ozaale omwana mulenzi. Kale ni otanhwanga mwenge gwa mizabbibu oba ekitamiiza kyonakyona, waire okulya ekintu kyonakyona ekitali kirongoofu kuba omwana oyo aliba Munaziri, okuva lw'alizaalibwa okutuusa lw'alifa.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Agho Manoa yaasaba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghembye leka omuntu wa Katonda ye watumye, aidhe ye tuli kabiri atwegerese kye tuli n'okukolera omwana aja okuzaalibwa.”" 
Judges13:9 Katonda yaakola ekyo Manoa kye yasaba, malaika yaira kabiri y'omukazi, bweyali ng'atyaime mu nimiro. Aye iba, Manoa, tiyali naye agho." 
Judges13:10 Agho omukazi yaalumuka mangu, yaakobera iba ati: “Bona, omuntu ole eyaidha ye ndi ku lunaku lule, aidhie kabiri yambonekera!”" 
Judges13:11 Manoa yaasituka, yaanonereza mukazi we. Yaaja y'omuntu ole, yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe omuntu ole eyayogera ni mukazi wange?” Ole yairamu ati: “Ninze.”" 
Judges13:12 Manoa yaamubuuza ati: “Ebibono bye wakoba bwe birituukirira, obulamu bw'omwana oyo buliba bwa nsambo ki, era kiki ky'aliba n'okukola?”" 
Judges13:13 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Mukazi wo yeegenderezenga okukola byonabyona bye namukoba. 
Judges13:14 Atalyanga kintu kyonakyona ekiva ku mizabbibu. Atanhwanga mwenge gwa mizabbibu oba ekitamiiza kyonakyona, waire okulya ekintu kyonakyona ekitali kirongoofu. Ebyo bye namulagira by'abe agemenga.”" 
Judges13:15 Manoa yaakoba malaika wa Katonda ati: “Tukweghembye sigala ng'okaaliku n'ife, tukufumbireyo embuzi entototo.”" 
Judges13:16 Aye malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Ni bwe nnaasigala nga nkaaliku n'imwe, era tiirye ku mere yaimwe. Aye bwe mwenda okutegeka ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, mugwaniire kukigha Musengwa Katonda.” Manoa yali amukobye ebyo lwa kuba tiyategeera ng'oyo malaika wa Musengwa Katonda." 
Judges13:17 Manoa yaakoba malaika wa Musengwa Katonda ati: “Tukobere eriina lyo. Olwo bye wakoba bwe birituukirira, tughange okukutaamu ekitiisa.”" 
Judges13:18 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Lwaki ombuuza eriina lyange eryewuninkiriza?” 
Judges13:19 Agho Manoa yaagema embuzi entototo, n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, yaabigheerayo agho ku lubaale, ye Musengwa Katonda akola ebyewuninkiriza." 
Judges13:20 Enimi edh'omuliro bwe dhaava ku alutaari, ni dhitumbukira ghaigulu, malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaajiira mu nnimi edho ghaigulu, nga Manoa ni mukazi we babona. Agho Manoa ni mukazi we baakuba amakiryaivu, baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka." 
Judges13:21 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda tiyairayo kubabonekera kabiri. Agho Manoa yaategeera ng'oyo abaire malaika wa Musengwa Katonda. 
Judges13:22 Manoa yaakoba mukazi we ati: “Bwenebwene twidha kufa, kuba tuboine Katonda!”" 
Judges13:23 Aye mukazi we yairamu ati: “Ngoli Musengwa Katonda abaire ayenda kutwita, tiyandituganhie kumugha ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, n'ekyo eky'emere ey'empeke. Era tiyanditwoleike bino byonabyona, waire okutukobera ebintu ng'oti n'ebyo mpegaano.”" 
Judges13:24 Agho ekiseera nga kibiseegho, omukazi yaazaala omwana mulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Samusoni. Omwana yaakula, Musengwa Katonda yaamugha enkabi." 
Judges13:25 Omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwatoolera okumugha amaani ng'ali ghagati gh'e Zora n'e Eshitaolo mu Mahanehedani. 
Judges14:1 Lwali lulala, Samusoni yaaserengeta e Timuna, eyo yaabonayo omughala Omufilisiti." 
Judges14:2 Bwe yamala okumubona, yairayo eka, yaakoba ise n'inhina ati: “Mboine omughala Omufilisiti e Timuna. Kale mumunfunire mmubayize.”" 
Judges14:3 Aye ise n'inhina baamubuuza bati: “Lwaki oyenda okubayiza omukazi mu Bafilisiti abatali bakekete? Toghanga kufuna mukazi mu batuliku luganda, oba mu bantu baife boonaboona?” Aye Samusoni yaakoba ise ati: “Nfunira oyo, kuba ye nsiimye.”" 
Judges14:4 Aye ise n'inhina baali tibaidhi nga Musengwa Katonda n'eyasindika Samusoni okukola ekyo kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo yali ali kunoonia ensonga ey'okuvaaku okulwanisa Abafilisiti. Mu biseera ebyo, Abafilisiti n'abaafuganga Isiraeli." 
Judges14:5 Agho Samusoni yaaserengeta n'ise n'inhina e Timuna. Bwe baali nga bali kubita mu masamba g'emizabbibu, yaja okuwulira ati, ng'empologoma entototo eri kumuwologomera." 
Judges14:6 Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwamugha amaani, yaagiyuzaamu ghabiri ng'azira ky'akozeisa mu ngalo dhe, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'ayuzaamu embuzi ento. Aye yaaloba kukobera bazaire be ky'akoze." 
Judges14:7 Agho yaaja, yaayogera n'omughala, era yaasiima omughala oyo." 
Judges14:8 Nga ghabiseeghooku enaku, yairayo okuleeta omughala amubayize. Agho yaagonhokaku katono okuva ku ngira, aje abone empologoma ye yaita. Okuja okubona ati, nga mu mulambo gwayo mulimu omuzinga gw'endhuki n'omudheenene gwadho." 
Judges14:9 Agho yaakaagha omudheenene ogwo n'engalo dhe, yaajanga ng'alya bw'atambula. Yaaja ye ise n'inhina, yaabaghaaku baalya. Aye yaaloba kubakobera ng'omudheenene ogwo agutoire mu mulambo ogw'empologoma." 
Judges14:10 Ise yaaja mu maka g'omughala, era Samusoni yaakolerayo embaga, kuba abaisuka abaabayizanga, batyo bwe baakolanga." 
Judges14:11 Abafilisiti bwe baamubona, baagheereza abaisuka amakumi asatu okuba naye nga bamukuumaku." 
Judges14:12 Agho Samusoni yaabakoba ati: “Ka mbaghe ekikoiko. Bwe munaasobola okukiita ng'enaku omusanvu edh'embaga dhikaali kuwaaku, ndidha kubagha engoye empegheevu amakumi asatu, n'ebivaalo eby'oku mbaga amakumi asatu." 
Judges14:13 Aye bwe munaalemwa okukiita, niimwe omwidha okumpa engoye empegheevu amakumi asatu n'ebivaalo eby'oku mbaga amakumi asatu.” Bale baamukoba bati: “Tughe ekikoiko kyo tukiwulire.”" 
Judges14:14 Agho yaakoba ati: “Mu kintu ekirya, mwavaamu eky'okulya. Mu kintu eky'amaani, mwavaamu ekidhuudhuula!” Enaku isatu dhaabitagho nga bakaalemereirwa okwita ekikoiko ekyo." 
Judges14:15 Ku lunaku olwokuna, baakoba muka Samusoni bati: “Sendasenda balo atwitire ekikoiko ekyo. Bw'otaakole otyo, twidha kukwokya iwe n'ab'endhu ya lata wo. Mwatweta okwidha ghano, kutwavughaza?”" 
Judges14:16 Muka Samusoni yaaja ye iba ng'ali kulira, yaakoba ati: “Iwe toonhenda, onkyaye bukyaghe! Wagha ab'eighanga lyange ekikoiko, waaloba ku nkobera kye kitegeeza!” Iba yaamukoba ati: “Bona, tyakobera ni bw'aba lata oba maama, obwo iwe ye nnaakobera?”" 
Judges14:17 Omukazi yaamuliriranga olw'ekyo buli lunaku, okumalaku enaku omusanvu edh'embaga. Aye ku lunaku olwomusanvu yaamukobera, kuba yamudeeberera inho. Omukazi yaakobera ab'eighanga lye." 
Judges14:18 Agho ku lunaku olwomusanvu, abasaadha ab'omu kibuga baakoba Samusoni ng'endhuba ekaali kugwa, bati: “Eriyo ekisinga omudheenene gw'endhuki okudhuudhuula? Eriyo ekisinga empologoma amaani?” Samusoni yaabairamu ati: “Ngoli timwalimisa nte yange, timwandighanze kwita kikoiko kyange.”" 
Judges14:19 Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwamwidhaku n'amaani, yaaserengeta mu Ashikeloni, yaitayo abasaadha amakumi asatu, yaabanhagaku ebintu byaibwe, ebivaalo byaibwe eby'oku mbaga yaabitwalira abasaadha abaita ekikoiko kye. Olwo yairayo mu maka ga ise ng'aliku obusungu obubitirivu." 
Judges14:20 Agho baatoola muka Samusoni baamugha omusaadha, mwine wa Samusoni, eyalabirira Samusoni oyo ku mbaga." 
Judges15:1 Bwe ghaabitaghooku entangama, Samusoni yaaja okukyalira mukazi we mu biseera eby'okukungula engaano, ng'amutwaliire embuzi entototo. Yaakoba ati: “Nhenda kwingira mu kisenge kya mukazi wange.” Aye lata wa mukazi we yaaloba kumuganha kwingira," 
Judges15:2 ng'amukoba ati: “Nze nadhuuba nti bwenebwene wamukyayira irala. Kale ni, n'okumugha mwino. Aye muganda we omuto n'amusinga obulungi. Nkweghemba oyo y'obe otwale mu kifo ky'ole.”" 
Judges15:3 Samusoni yairamu ati: “Ku mukuzi guno tiidha kubaaku musango olw'akabi ke nnaakola Abafilisiti!” 
Judges15:4 Agho yaaja, yaagema ebibe ebikumi bisatu, yaasiba bibiri bibiri emikira ghalala, yaasibira engada mu kifundwa ky'asibiisa emikira egyo." 
Judges15:5 Bwe yamala okukunaania omuliro ku ngada edho, yaalekula ebibe, byaja mu misiri gy'engaano egy'Abafilisiti. Mu nsambo eyo, yaayokya ebinhwa eby'engaano ebikungwirwa, era n'engaano ekaali kukungulwa, ghalala n'emiti emyoliva." 
Judges15:6 Agho Abafilisiti beebuuza bati: “Naani akoze kino?” Baabakoba bati: “Samusoni mukoirume w'omusaadha ow'e Timuna, n'akoze ekyo kuba omusaadha oyo yatoola muka Samusoni oyo, yaamugha mwine wa Samusoni.” Agho Abafilisiti baaja baayokya omukazi oyo n'ab'omu ndhu ya ise." 
Judges15:7 Samusoni yaakoba ati: “Mutyo bwe mukoze? Ndayira nti ndidha kumala kubeesasuulizaaku, memale ngolole.”" 
Judges15:8 Agho yaabalumba n'amaani mangi, yaabaita inho. Olwo yaaja yaaba mu mpuku eri mu lwatika olw'olubaale, mu kiketezo eky'e Etamu." 
Judges15:9 Agho Abafilisiti baaja, baasimba weema dhaibwe mu Buyudaaya, era baalumba ekibuga Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya baababuuza bati: “Lwaki mwidhie okutulumba?” Baabairamu bati: “Twidhie okugema Samusoni tumusibe, olwo tumukole nga mwene bwe yatukola.”" 
Judges15:11 Agho abasaadha enkumi isatu (3,000) ab'e Buyudaaya, baaja ku mpuku eri mu lwatika olw'olubaale, mu kiketezo eky'e Etamu. Baakoba Samusoni bati: “Toidhi ng'Abafilisiti n'abatufuga? Kale kiki kino ky'otukoze?” Yaabairamu ati: “Abo nabakola nga beene bwe bankola.”" 
Judges15:12 Baamukoba bati: “Twidhie kukusiba, tukugheeyo ye bali.” Samusoni yaabakoba ati: “Mulayire muti timwidha kundhita imwe beene.”" 
Judges15:13 Baakoba bati: “Tuja kukusiba busibe, tukugheeyo ye bali, aye tituja kukwita.” Kale baamusiba emigugha ebiri emiyaaka, baamutoolayo mu lubaale." 
Judges15:14 Bwe baamutuusa e Lehi, Abafilisiti baalumuka okuja y'ali nga baleekaana. Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwamwidhaku n'amaani, emigugha egyali gimusibye amakono gyakutuka ng'oti n'ewuuzi edhookeibwa omuliro, n'ebifundwa ebyali bimusibye ku ngalo byalekula." 
Judges15:15 Agho Samusoni yaabona eigumba ery'oluba olw'endogoyi eyali yaakafa nga liri agho, yaalironda, yaaliitisa abasaadha lukumi (1,000)." 
Judges15:16 Yaakoba ati: “Eigumba ery'oluba lw'endogoyi ndiitiisa abasaadha lukumi (1,000), naababunga emungo n'eigumba ery'oluba lw'endogoyi.”" 
Judges15:17 Bwe yamala okwogera, yaasuula eigumba eryo ery'oluba olw'endogoyi. Ekifo ekyo kyatuumibwa eriina Ramathi Lehi." 
Judges15:18 Agho endiwo yaagema Samusoni, yaayeta Musengwa Katonda ati: “Ompaire obughanguzi buno obw'amaani. Aye obwo mpegaano nfe endiwo, era abo abatali bakekete bangeme?”" 
Judges15:19 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaatuna ekituli eyo e Lehi, mwavaamu amaadhi. Samusoni bwe yamala okunhwa, yairamu obulamu n'amaani. Ensulo eyo baagituuma eriina Enihakkore. Era ekaaliyo e Lehi n'okutuusa mpegaano." 
Judges15:20 Agho Samusoni yaakulembera Isiraeli okumala emyaka amakumi abiri, ng'Abafilisiti n'abafuga." 
Judges16:1 Samusoni yaaja e Gaza, yaabonayo omukazi malaaya, yaaba naye mu buliri." 
Judges16:2 Abantu ab'e Gaza baamanha ng'ali eyo. Kale baazingiza ekifo ekyo okukyezunguluza, era baamweteega ku mulyango gw'ekibuga obwire bwonabwona ng'abasiriikiriire, baakoba mule bati: “Obwire ka bukye memale tumwite.”" 
Judges16:3 Aye Samusoni yalambaalaku kutuusa bwa mu bwire ghagati wonka. Yaasituka, yaagema endhigi edh'omulyango ogwingira mu kibuga n'emyango gyaku gyombi, yaadhikuukulagho n'ebisiba byaku n'ebidhiriku ebindi byonabyona. Olwo yaabbeedera endhigi edho ku mabega, yaadhitwala ku ntwiko y'olusozi olulingiriire Heburoni." 
Judges16:4 Ebyo bwe byawa, Samusoni yaayenda omukazi mu kiiko ky'e Soreki, ng'eriina lye ni Delila." 
Judges16:5 Agho abakungu b'Abafilisiti baaja y'omukazi oyo, baamukoba bati: “Musendesende omanhe amaani ge amangi ghe gamuva, n'ensambo yetughanga okumugemamu ni tumusiba, amaani ago ni gamuwa. Olwo buli muntu ku ife aidha kukugha ebitundu bya feeza lukumi na kikumi (1,100).”" 
Judges16:6 Agho Delila yaaja, yaakoba Samusoni ati: “Nkweghembye nkobera amaani go amangi ghe gakuva, n'engeri ole y'asobola okukugemamu n'akusiba, amaani ago ni gakuwaamu.”" 
Judges16:7 Samusoni yairamu ati: “Bwe bansibisa obugugha obuyaaka omusanvu obw'akalaso, obukaali kukala, mba munafu ng'oti n'omuntu owundi yeenayeena.”" 
Judges16:8 Agho abakungu b'Abafilisiti baaleetera Delila obugugha obuyaaka omusanvu obw'akalaso, obukaali kukala, yaabusibisa Samusoni." 
Judges16:9 Delila oyo era yaliyo n'abasaadha nga bateeze mu kisenge eky'omunda. Agho yaaleekaana yaamukoba ati: “Samusoni, Abafilisiti bakugwireku!” Aye Samusoni yaakutula obugugha ng'oti n'ewuuzi bwe dhikutuka ng'omuliro gudhigemye. Kale, ekyama ekigema ku maani ge kyasigala nga kikaali kumanhibwa." 
Judges16:10 Delila yaakoba Samusoni ati: “Bona, oli kumbuzaabuza, waaloba kunkobera kituufu. Nkweghembye nkobera ole bw'aghanga okukusiba.”" 
Judges16:11 Samusoni yaamukoba ati: “Bwe bansibisa emigugha emiyaaka egitakozesebwangaku, mba munafu ng'oti n'omuntu owundi yeenayeena.”" 
Judges16:12 Kale Delila yaagema emigugha emiyaaka, yaamusiba, yaamukoba ati: “Samusoni, Abafilisiti bakugwireku!” Abasaadha abaali nga beeteeze, baali mu kisenge eky'omunda. Aye Samusoni yaakutula emigugha ku mikono gye ng'oti wuuzi buwuuzi." 
Judges16:13 Delila yaakoba Samusoni ati: “N'okutuusa buti oli kumbuzaabuza, waaloba kunkobera kituufu. Nkobera ole bw'aghanga okukusiba.” Yaamukoba ati: “Bw'oluka emiganda omusanvu egy'enviiri dhange ku mutwe, n'ogikalanguza n'ekifundwa ekisibiirwa ku nkondo, mba munafu ng'oti n'omuntu owundi yeenayeena.”" 
Judges16:14 Kale Samusoni bweyali ng'ali kutenduka, Delila yaaluka emiganda omusanvu egy'enviiri ku mutwe gwa Samusoni oyo, era yaagikalanguza n'ekifundwa ekisibiirwa ku nkondo. Agho yaamukoba ati: “Samusoni Abafilisiti bakugwireku!” Aye Samusoni yaasitukagho mu ndoolo, yaasikula ekifundwa ekisibiirwa ku nkondo, enviiri dhaasimulukuka." 
Judges16:15 Agho Delila yaamukoba ati: “Osobola okukoba oti onhendha, ate nga omwoyo gwo tigundiiku naire? Waakambuzaabuza buti emikuzi giigino esatu, waaloba kunkobera amaani go amangi ghe gakuva.”" 
Judges16:16 Delila oyo yaamudeebanga buli lunaku ng'amubuuza, okutuusa Samusoni lwe yeesinwa ekibitiriire." 
Judges16:17 Kale yaamukobera byonabyona, ati: “Tibansalangaku nviiri ku mutwe, kuba ndi Munaziri okuviira irala mu nda ya maama. Enviiri dhange bwe badhisalaku, amaani gange ganvaaku, naaba munafu ng'oti n'omuntu owundi yeenayeena.”" 
Judges16:18 Delila bwe yabona nga Samusoni amaze okumukobera byonabyona, yaatuma y'abakungu b'Abafilisiti okubeeta, ng'akoba ati: “Mwire ku mukuzi guno gwonka, kuba ankobeire byonabyona.” Agho baidha y'ali nga n'empiiya bali nadho mu ngalo." 
Judges16:19 Delila yaatenduukiriza Samusoni ng'amuleze ku mubiri, era yaayeta omusaadha yaasala emiganda omusanvu egy'enviiri dha Samusoni. Agho Delila yaatoolera okumudaazadaaza, amaani gaamuvaamu." 
Judges16:20 Era yaamukoba ati: “Samusoni, Abafilisiti bakugwireku!” Samusoni yaasitukagho mu ndoolo, yaakoba mule ati: “Ndidha kubeenhunhunkuzaaku nje, nga bwe mbairenga nkola ku mikuzi gire egindi.” Yali taidhi nga Musengwa Katonda amulekuliire agho." 
Judges16:21 Abafilisiti baamugema, baamutundulamu amaiso. Era baamutwala e Gaza, baamusibisa endhegere edh'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, baamuta ku mulimo ogw'okuseeranga ku lubengo mu ikomera." 
Judges16:22 Aye enviiri dhe dhaatoolera okwiraku okumera. 
Judges16:23 Abakungu b'Abafilisiti beesoloza okusagambya n'okughaayo omusengo omukologho y'omusambwa gwaibwe Dagoni, nga bakoba bati: “Omusambwa gwaife gutughaire okughangula omuzigu waife Samusoni.”" 
Judges16:24 Abantu bwe baamubona baasaaka omusambwa gwaibwe bati: “Omusambwa gwaife gutughaire okughangula omuzigu waife, eyaitaitana ensi yaife era n'atwitaku abantu kamaala.”" 
Judges16:25 Agho bwe baali nga bali kusagambya, baakoba bati: “Mwete Samusoni aidhe atusanhuseeku!” Kale baamuleeta okuva mu ikomera yaabasanhusa, baamwemereza ghagati gh'empango." 
Judges16:26 Agho Samusoni yaakoba omwisuka eyali amugemye ku mukono, ati: “Ka ngemeku mpulire empango edhigemereire endhu eno, nsobole okudheesiiraku.”" 
Judges16:27 Endhu yali ng'ekubyeku abasaadha n'abakazi. N'abakungu boonaboona ab'Abafilisiti baali omwo. Era ghaigulu ku ngulu kwayo, kwona kwaliku abasaadha n'abakazi ng'oti enkumi isatu (3,000), abaali balingiriire Samusoni ng'ali kubasanhusa." 
Judges16:28 Agho Samusoni yaasaba Musengwa Katonda ng'akoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, nkweghemba ondidhukire ompe amaani ku mukuzi guno gwonka. Olwo nsobole, mu kikolwa kino ekirala, okwesasuuliza ku Bafilisiti olw'okuntundulamu amaiso gange gombi.”" 
Judges16:29 Samusoni yaagema empango dhombi edha ghagati, edhaali dhigemereire endhu eyo, yaadhimaliraku amaani ge goonagoona, omukono gwe omusaadha yaaguta ku yindi, n'omugooda ku yindi." 
Judges16:30 Yaakoba ati: “Ka nfiire ghalala n'Abafilisiti.” Yaasindika n'amaani ge goonagoona, endhu yaagwa ku bakungu ni ku bantu boonaboona abaali omwo. Kale, abantu Samusoni be yaita mu kufa kwe, baaba kamaala inho okusinga be yaita nga mulamu." 
Judges16:31 Agho baganda be n'ab'endhu ya ise boonaboona, baidha okutwala omulambo gwe. Baamutwala, baamuziika ghagati gh'e Zora n'e Ashitaoli, mu lwambiidhi lwa lata we Manoa. Yali akulembeire Isiraeli okumala emyaka amakumi abiri." 
Judges17:1 Ghaaligho omusaadha ng'eriina lye ni Mika, eyali ow'omu kiketezo eky'e Efuraimu eky'oku nsozi." 
Judges17:2 Yaakoba inhina ati: “Ebitundu bya feeza olukumi n'ekikumi bye baakutwalaku, n'okolima nga mpulira, ninze nabitwala era ndi nabyo.” Inhina yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akughe enkabi mwana wange.”" 
Judges17:3 Agho yairiza inhina ebitundu bya feeza ebyo. Inhina yaakoba ati: “Ka mpeeyo feeza ono abe wa Musengwa Katonda, ku lw'omwana wange, bamusaanuuse asiigibwe ku kifaananie ekibaadhe. Kale ni, feeza ono nja kumukwiriza.”" 
Judges17:4 Agho Mika bwe yairiza inhina ebitundu bya feeza ebyo, inhina yaatoolaku ebitundu ebikumi bibiri, yaabigha omugheesi w'ebintu bya feeza, yaabaadha ekifaananie yaakisiigaku feeza oyo. Ekifaananie ekyo baakita mu ndhu ya Mika." 
Judges17:5 Omusaadha oyo Mika, yali n'eisinzizo erirye. Agho yaatunga ekivaalo eky'obwakabona era yaakola ebintu ebyetebwa terafimu. Yaayawula owundi ku batabane, yaafuuka kabona we." 
Judges17:6 Mu biseera ebyo, tighaaligho kyabazinga mu Isiraeli. Buli muntu yakolanga nga bw'abona." 
Judges17:7 Ghaaligho omwisuka Omulevi, eyali nga yasenga e Bethelehemu mu Buyudaaya." 
Judges17:8 Yaamala yaavaayo ng'ali kwagala aghandi gh'anaaba. Bwe yali ng'ali kutambula, yaatuuka ku ndhu ya Mika mu kiketezo eky'e Efuraimu eky'oku nsozi." 
Judges17:9 Mika yaamubuuza ati: “Ova gha?” Yairamu ati: “Ndi Mulevi ow'e Bethelehemu mu Buyudaaya. Ndi kwagala aghantu ghe nnaaghanga okusenga.” 
Judges17:10 Mika yaamukoba ati: “Ba ghano ninze, obe omughabuzi era kabona wange. Ndidha kukughanga ebitundu ikumi ebya feeza omwaka, n'eby'okuvaala, n'eby'okulya.”" 
Judges17:11 Agho omwisuka Omulevi yaikiriza okusenga ew'omusaadha oyo, era yaabeera irala ng'oti mutabane we mwene." 
Judges17:12 Omusaadha oyo Mika, yaamutaagho abe kabona we, era omwisuka oyo Omulevi, yaabanga mu maka ga Mika oyo." 
Judges17:13 Agho Mika yaakoba ati: “Mpegaano nga bwendi n'Omulevi nga ni kabona wange, ndidhi nga Musengwa Katonda aidha kundeetera ebintu okunjiiranga obukalamu.”" 
Judges18:1 Mu biseera ebyo tighaaligho kyabazinga mu Isiraeli. Era ab'omu kika kya Dani baali nga bakaayagala ekiketezo ekyaibwe eky'okubaamu, kuba baali nga bakaali kufuna mugabo gwaibwe mu bika bya Isiraeli." 
Judges18:2 Agho ab'omu kika kya Dani boonaboona, beerondamu abasaadha abaziramu ntete bataanu. Baabatuma, nga bava mu Zora ni mu Eshitaolo, okuja okukeeta n'okwetegereza ensi eyo. Bwe baatuuka mu maka ga Mika, mu kiketezo eky'e Efuraimu eky'oku nsozi, baaba agho." 
Judges18:3 Bwe baali nga bali eyo, baategeera endhogera y'omwisuka Omulevi. Agho baaja y'ali, baamubuuza bati: “Okola ki ghano? Era naani eyakuleeta ghano?”" 
Judges18:4 Yaabairamu ati: “Tuti bwe twaisania ni Mika: yampangisa nga wa kunsasulanga, nze mbe kabona we.”" 
Judges18:5 Baamukoba bati: “Tukweghembye buuza Katonda atumanhise oba nga olugendo lwe tuli kujaamu lunaaba lukalamu.” 
Judges18:6 Kabona oyo yaabairamu ati: “Muje miraala, Musengwa Katonda ali kubalabirira mu lugendo lwaimwe.”" 
Judges18:7 Agho abasaadha abo abataanu baaja, baatuuka e Laishi. Baabona ng'abantu baayo bali miraala ng'oti n'ab'e Sidoni bwe baali. Abantu abo baali baikaikamu, nga tibasuubira muntu yeenayeena kubalumba naire, nga bali na kiisi kye beetaaga era nga bakombe. Baali ghala inho n'Abasidoni, era nga bazira bantu bandi be bakolagana nabo." 
Judges18:8 Abasaadha abataanu bwe bairayo e Zora n'e Eshitaolo, baganda baibwe baababuuza kye bazwire." 
Judges18:9 Baabairamu bati: “Musituke tuje tubalumbe. Kuba bona, tumaze okuzuula ng'ensi yaibwe ngimu inho. Mulobe kuba bwagho. Mwangughe, muje mugitwale ebe yaife." 
Judges18:10 Bwe munaatuukayo, mwidha kwagaana abantu abatasuubira muntu yeenayeena kubalumba naire. Ensi eyo ngazi, era erimu buli kintu omuntu kye yeetaaga. Bwenebwene, Katonda agibaghaire mugighangule.”" 
Judges18:11 Agho abasaadha lukaaga (600) ab'omu kika kya Dani, baasitula nga bagemye eby'okulwanisa okuva e Zora n'e Eshitaolo." 
Judges18:12 Baaniinaniina, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Kiriathi Yearimu mu Buyudaaya. Kyova, okutuusa ni mpegaano, ekifo ekyo kikaayetebwa, Ekifo Dani ghe yasimba weema dhe." 
Judges18:13 Bwe baava agho baatuuka mu ndhu ya Mika mu kiketezo eky'e Efuraimu eky'oku nsozi. 
Judges18:14 Abasaadha bale abataanu abaaja okukeeta ensi y'e Laishi, baakoba banaibwe bati: “Mubaire mwidhi nga mu ndhu dhino mulimu ekifaananie ekibaadhe, ekisiigiibwaku feeza omusaanuuse? Era mubaire mwidhi nga mu ndhu dhino mulimu n'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, era mwabaamu n'ebintu ebyetebwa terafimu? Kale ni mulowooze ku kye mugwaniire okukola.”" 
Judges18:15 Kale baakyukira agho, baaja mu maka ga Mika, baatuuka ku ndhu omwisuka Omulevi mwe yabanga, baamubuuza ebimufaaku." 
Judges18:16 Olwo abasaadha bale olukaaga (600) ab'omu kika kya Dani abagemye eby'okulwanisa, baali beemereire ku mulyango." 
Judges18:17 Agho abasaadha abataanu abaakeeta ku lule, baingira mu ndhu, baatoolamu ekifaananie ekibaadhe, n'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, n'ebintu ebyetebwa terafimu, n'ekifaananie ekikoleibwa mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa. Baakolanga ebyo, nga kabona ayemereire ku mulyango ghalala n'abasaadha olukaaga (600) abagemye eby'okulwanisa." 
Judges18:18 Abasaadha bale bwe baingira mu ndhu ya Mika, ni batoolamu ekifaananie ekibaadhe, n'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, n'ebintu ebyetebwa terafimu, n'ekifaananie ekikoleibwa mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, kabona oyo yaababuuza ati: “Muli kukola ki ekyo?”" 
Judges18:19 Baamwiramu bati: “Sirika, otageza kwogera! Idha oje n'ife, obe omuwi w'amagezi era kabona waife. Tikisingaku okuba kabona ow'ekika ky'Abaisiraeli ekiramba, mu kifo eky'okuba kabona ow'endhu ey'omuntu omulala obulala ati?”" 
Judges18:20 Kabona yaasangaala inho, yaatoola ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, n'ebintu ebyetebwa terafimu, n'ekifaananie ekibaadhe, yaaja nabo." 
Judges18:21 Agho baakyusa, baatoolera olugendo nga bakulembeizaamu abaana abato, n'ensolo, n'ebintu." 
Judges18:22 Bwe baali nga batambwireku olugendo olughera okuva ku ndhu ya Mika, Mika yaayeta baliraanwa be, baababingirira era baatuuka ku bantu b'omu kika kya Dani abo," 
Judges18:23 baabakaabukira. Ab'omu kika kya Dani baakyuka, baabuuza Mika bati: “Kiki ekikutuuseeku, okwidha n'ekikunsu ekinene kityo?”" 
Judges18:24 Mika yairamu ati: “Muntoireku emisambwa gyange gye nakola, mwantoolaku ni kabona wange, mwatwala. Kiki kye nsigaizaagho? Olwo nga mumbuuza muti, ‘Kiki ekikutuuseeku?’ ”" 
Judges18:25 Ab'omu kika kya Dani baakoba bati: “Ekisinga, otayongera kwogera, okutoolaku ng'oyenda abasaadha bano abakambwe bakulumbe, bakwite iwe n'ab'omu ndhu yo.”" 
Judges18:26 Agho ab'omu kika kya Dani beetambulira. Mika bwe yabona nga bamusinga inho amaani, yaakyuka yairayo ewuwe." 
Judges18:27 Ab'omu kika kya Dani bwe baamala okutwala ebintu bya Mika bye yali akoze, ni kabona we, baalumba Laishi, ekibuga eky'abantu abaikaikamu era abatasuubira muntu yeenayeena kubalumba naire. Baabaita n'ekibuga baakikumaku omuliro kyaya." 
Judges18:28 Tighaaligho yaidha kubawonia, kuba Laishi kyali mu kiiko ekiriiraine Bethirehobu, nga kyeswire inho ni Sidoni ate nga abaayo ghazira bantu bandi be bakolagana nabo. Agho ab'omu kika kya Dani baazimba buyaaka ekibuga ekyo, baaba omwo." 
Judges18:29 Eriina ery'ekibuga ekyo eryali Laishi baalikyusa, baakituuma Dani erya dhaadha waibwe eyali mutabane wa Yakobo." 
Judges18:30 Ab'omu kika kya Dani abo, baataagho ekifaananie ekibaadhe kire, okukisinzanga. Agho Yonathani mutabane wa Gereshomu, era mwidhukulu wa Musa, yaaba kabona waibwe. Yonathani oyo ni baidhukulu be abaamwiririra, n'abaali bakabona b'Abadani abo okutuusa abantu lwe baatwalibwa mu bunhage." 
Judges18:31 Kale baataagho ekifaananie ekibaadhe Mika kye yakola, kyasigalayo ekiseera kyonakyona endhu ya Katonda kye yabeeragho e Shilo." 
Judges19:1 Mu biseera ebyo, nga ghakaali kubaagho kyabazinga mu Isiraeli, ghaaligho Omulevi eyabanga eghala mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi eky'e Efuraimu. Omulevi oyo yaafuna omukazi ow'embali mu Bethelehemu e Buyudaaya." 
Judges19:2 Aye omukazi oyo yaasungughalira iba oyo, yaavulumuka yairayo mu ndhu ya ise mu Bethelehemu e Buyudaaya, yaaba eyo okumala emyezi ena." 
Judges19:3 Agho iba yaasitula, yaaja okumuwooyawooya amwize. Yaatwala omugheereza we n'endogoyi ibiri. Yaatuuka ku ndhu ya lata w'omughala. Lata w'omughala bwe yamubona, yaamusangaalira inho." 
Judges19:4 Lata w'omughala oyo, yaikirizisa mukoirume we okusigalayooku okumala enaku isatu. Kale baalya, baanhwa era baasulayo." 
Judges19:5 Ku nkyo ly'olunaku olwokuna, baasituka, beetegeka okugolola. Aye lata w'omughala yaakoba mukoirume we ati: “Mumale okulya ku kamere memale muje.”" 
Judges19:6 Agho baatyama, baalya era baanhwa bombi ghalala. Lata w'omughala yaakoba mukoirume we ati: “Nkweghembye ganha osule, osanhukeku.”" 
Judges19:7 Omusaadha yaasituka okugolola, aye lata w'omughala yaamupikiriza, yaasulayo kabiri." 
Judges19:8 Ku nkyo ly'olunaku olwokutaanu, yaasituka okugolola. Aye lata w'omughala yaamukoba ati: “Mala okulya ku kamere, olindeku okutuusa ebiseera nga bijiirejiireku.” Kale baalya bombi ghalala." 
Judges19:9 Omusaadha ni mukazi we, n'omugheereza we, bwe baasituka okugolola, lata w'omughala yaakoba ati: “Bona, mpegaano ebiseera biibino bijiire inho. Mbeeghemba musule. Obwire buja kuziba. Mube ghano musanhukeku. Enkyo munaawuuna buwuune, mwagolola eka.”" 
Judges19:10 Aye omusaadha yaaloba kuganha kusula bwire bundi. Agho yaasituka yaatambula, ng'ali ni mukazi we, n'omugheereza we, n'endogoyi dhaibwe eibiri edhiriku ebintu ebityamibwaku, baatuuka agho ng'olingiriire Yebusi, ekyo nga ni Yerusalemu." 
Judges19:11 Ghe baatuukira agho ng'olingiriire Yebusi ng'obwire bujiire inho. Agho omugheereza yaakoba musengwa we ati: “Ka tukyukire ghano mu kibuga kino eky'Abayebusi, tusule ghano.”" 
Judges19:12 Aye musengwa we yaamukoba ati: “Tituja kukyuka kusula mu kibuga kya batali Baisiraeli. Ka tubitegho tweyongereyo katono, tusule mu Gibea oba mu Rama.”" 
Judges19:13  
Judges19:14 Kale baabita ku Yebusi, beejiira. Obwire bwabazibirira nga bali kumpi n'e Gibea mu kiketezo ky'ab'ekika kya Benjamini." 
Judges19:15 Baakyuka okuja okusula eyo. Baingira mu kibuga, baatyama mu luya, ghaabulagho omuntu abaingiza mu ndhu ye okubasuza." 
Judges19:16 Bwe baali bakaali agho, omusaadha omukaire yaidha ng'ava mu mirimo gye mu nimiro eigulo. Omusaadha oyo yali asimuka mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi eky'e Efuraimu, aye yali ng'asenze mu Gibea, ng'abantu baamu ba kika kya Benjamini." 
Judges19:17 Omusaadha omukaire oyo yaja okulinga ati, ng'abona omubise ole, mu luya olw'ekibuga. Yaamukoba ati: “Ova gha? Era oja gha?”" 
Judges19:18 Omulevi yaamwiramu ati: “Tuva Bethelehemu mu Buyudaaya, nga twirayo eka eghala mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi eky'e Efuraimu. Aye ghazira muntu atwingiiza mu ndhu ye kutusuza." 
Judges19:19 Tuli n'eisubi n'eby'okulya eby'endogoyi dhaife, era twaba n'emere n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, ebyange, ni mukazi wange, n'omugheereza wange. Kiisi kye twetaaga tuli nakyo.”" 
Judges19:20 Omusaadha omukaire yaakoba ati: “Emiraala gibe n'imwe. Ndidha kubagha byonabyona bye mwetaaga. Mutasula mu luya.” 
Judges19:21 Agho yaabaingiza mu ndhu ye, yaagha endogoyi eby'okulya. Ni beene baanaaba ebigere, baalya era baanhwa." 
Judges19:22 Bwe baali nga bakaasanhuka, abasaadha ab'omu kibuga abadankaanu baazingiza endhu eyo okugyezunguluza. Baakonta ku lwigi, baakoba omusaadha omukaire mwene ndhu bati: “Fulumya omusaadha oyo aingiire mu ndhu yo, tube naye mu nsambo abasaadha ye babaamu n'abakazi mu buliri!”" 
Judges19:23 Omusaadha mwene ndhu yaafuluma, yaabakoba ati: “Bakagwa, mbeeghembye mutakola kiive kyaga agho. Omusaadha ono, mugeni wange. Mutakola kikolwa kya budankaanu ekyo." 
Judges19:24 Bona, ghaligho mukazi we ni mughala wange omwegha. Ka nfulumye abo mpegaano, mubakole kyonakyona kye mwenda. Aye omusaadha ono mutamukolaku kya budankaanu kyaga agho!”" 
Judges19:25 Aye abasaadha baaloba kumuwulirisa. Kale omusaadha yaagema mukazi we yaamufulumya ye bali. Baamukaka baaba naye era baamukolaku ebintu ebibi obwire bwonabwona okutuusa enkyo. Baamuleka yaaja nga buli kukya. 
Judges19:26 Agho obwire nga buli kukya, omukazi yaidha yaagwa agho gha mulyango gw'endhu y'omusaadha omukaire omwali iba, yaaba agho okutuusa lwe bwakyera irala." 
Judges19:27 Iba bwe yasitukagho ku nkyo, yaigulagho olwigi ng'ayenda okugolola ewuwe. Yaja okulinga ati, ng'abona mukazi we agwire agho gha mulyango gw'endhu, emikono gye nga girikughaaniriza olwigi." 
Judges19:28 Yaamukoba ati: “Situka tuje.” Aye ng'omukazi tali kumwiramu. Agho yaamuta ku ndogoyi, yaagolola ewuwe." 
Judges19:29 Bwe yatuuka eka yaingira mu ndhu ye, yaatoolayo akambe, yaagema omulambo gwa mukazi we yaagusalasalamu ebitundu ikumi na bibiri, buli kika kya Isiraeli yaakigheerezaaku ekitundu." 
Judges19:30 Agho boonaboona abaabona ekyo baakoba bati: “Ekintu ng'oti n'ekyo tikibangaghooku era tikibonebwangaku bukyanga Baisiraeli bava mu Misiri. Mukirowoozeeku, mukiteeseeku, tubone eky'okukola!”" 
Judges20:1 Agho Abaisiraeli boonaboona, okuva mu kiketezo kya Dani okutuuka e Beerisheba, n'okuva e Gileadi, beesoloza ghalala nga bali kitole mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda e Mizipa." 
Judges20:2 Abakulembeze b'ebika bya Isiraeli byonabyona baaligho mu lwekobaano lw'abantu ba Katonda, abalwani emitwalo amakumi ana (400,000) ab'oku bigere." 
Judges20:3 Mu kiseera ekyo ab'omu kika kya Benjamini baawulira bati Baisiraeli banaibwe abandi boonaboona beesololeiza e Mizipa. Abaisiraeli baabuuza bati: “Tukobere, ekibi kino kyava ku ki okukolebwa?”" 
Judges20:4 Omulevi, iba w'omukazi eyaitibwa, yairamu ati: “Naja e Gibea mu kiketezo kya Benjamini okusulayo, nga ndi ghalala ni mukazi wange." 
Judges20:5 Abasaadha ab'e Gibea baanumba, baazingiza endhu mwe nali obwire, baagyezunguluza. Baali benda kundhita, aye baamala baika ku mukazi wange baamukaka, yaafa." 
Judges20:6 Naatwala omulambo gwe, naagusalasalamu ebitundu, naagheereza mu biketezo byonabyona ebyagheebwa Isiraeli ng'omugabo kuba baakola ekyenhinhalwa era eky'obudankaanu mu Isiraeli." 
Judges20:7 Kale imwe Abaisiraeli mwenamwena, muteese mubone eky'okukola.”" 
Judges20:8 Abantu boonaboona baasituka nga bali kitole, baakoba bati: “Ghazira waire omulala ku ife anairayo mu weema oba mu ndhu ye." 
Judges20:9 Aye kino kye twidha okukola Gibea: twidha kukuba akalulu, memale tuje tukirwanise." 
Judges20:10 Abasaadha ikumi ku buli kikumi mu bika bya Isiraeli baidha kuleetera abalwani emere, abandi boonaboona baje beesasuulize ku Gibea ekya Benjamini, olw'ekikolwa ekyo eky'obudankaanu kye baakola mu Isiraeli.”" 
Judges20:11 Kale abasaadha boonaboona ab'omu Isiraeli beesoloza nga bali kitole, okulumba ekibuga ekyo." 
Judges20:12 Agho ab'ekika kya Isiraeli baatuma abakwenda mu kiketezo kya Benjamini kyonakyona okubakoba bati: “Kiive ki kino kye mwakola? 
Judges20:13 Kale ni mpegaano, mugheeyo abasaadha abadankaanu abali mu Gibea tubaite, tutoolegho ekibi kino mu Isiraeli.” Aye Ababenjamini baaloba kuwulirisa Baisiraeli banaibwe abo." 
Judges20:14 Baava mu bibuga bya Benjamini byonabyona, beesololeza mu Gibea okulwanisa Baisiraeli banaibwe." 
Judges20:15 Baatoola mu bibuga byaibwe abalwani emitwalo ebiri na kakaaga (26,000) ku lunaku olwo nga tobaliireeku abo abaalondebwa okuva mu batyamye b'omu Gibea mwene, abaaghera olusanvu." 
Judges20:16 Mu basaadha abo boonaboona mwalimu abaalondebwa n'obwegendereza lusanvu abakozesa omugooda, nga buli muntu asobola okuta eibaale mu nsuumulo, yaakuba oluviiri olulala luti aghazira kulemwa kuluteeba." 
Judges20:17 Ebika eby'Abaisiraeli ebindi, ng'otoireku ekya Benjamini, byasoloza abalwani beene abaziramu ntete, emitwalo amakumi ana (400,000)." 
Judges20:18 Abaisiraeli beesitula baaniinaniina okuja e Betheli, baabuuza Katonda bati: “Kika ki ekibe kisooke okulumba Ababenjamini?” Yaabairamu ati: “Ekika kya Yuda n'ekibe kisooke.”" 
Judges20:19 Kale ku lunaku olwairirira, Abaisiraeli baawuuna ku nkyo, baazingiza ekibuga Gibea okukyezunguluza." 
Judges20:20 Baata abalwani mu lunhiriri, okulingiriza Ababenjamini, agho mu Gibea." 
Judges20:21 Ababenjamini baava mu kibuga ekyo Gibea baidha okulwana. Baita abalwani Abaisiraeli emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ibiri (22,000) ku lunaku olwo." 
Judges20:22 Aye ekyo kyaloba kumala mu Baisiraeli maani. Baaguma baata kabiri abalwani mu lunhiriri, mu kifo gheene ghe baabata ku lunaku olwasooka." 
Judges20:23 Agho baaniinaniina okuja mu kifo ye basinziza, baalirira mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda okutuusa eigulo. Baabuuza Musengwa Katonda bati: “Twiremu kabiri okulumba baganda baife Ababenjamini tubalwanise?” Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Muje mubalwanise.”" 
Judges20:24 Kale baalumba Ababenjamini baabalwanisa olunaku olwokubiri. 
Judges20:25 N'Ababenjamini boona baava mu kibuga Gibea okubalwanisa omukuzi ogwokubiri. Ku mukuzi guno baita Abaisiraeli omutwalo mulala na kanaana (18,000), abalwani beene abaziramu ntete." 
Judges20:26 Agho abalwani ba Isiraeli boonaboona baaniinaniina baaja e Betheli, baalirira eyo. Baaba eyo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda olunaku olwo, nga ghazira ke bali kulya naire okutuusa eigulo. Baaghaayo ye Musengwa Katonda oyo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Judges20:27 Mu biseera ebyo, Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda yabanga eyo e Betheli, era nga Finehasi mutabane wa Eleazari era mwidhukulu wa Aaroni, n'agirabirira. Abaisiraeli baabuuza Musengwa Katonda bati: “Twiremu kabiri okulwanisa baganda baife Ababenjamini, oba tubiveeku?” Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Muje mulwane, kuba olwaidho ndidha kubagha Ababenjamini abo mubaghangule.”" 
Judges20:28  
Judges20:29 Agho Abaisiraeli baataagho abalwani, baabwama nga beeteeze agho ku kibuga Gibea okukyezunguluza." 
Judges20:30 Olwo baaniinaniina baaja okulwanisa Ababenjamini olunaku olwokusatu. Beetegeka mu nhiriri okulingiriza Gibea, bakirwanise ng'oti ni bwe baakola ku mikuzi gire." 
Judges20:31 Ababenjamini baavaayo okulwana, baasendebwasendebwa okuva mu kibuga. Baakola ng'oti ni ku mikuzi egindi, baatoolera okukubira n'okwitira abandi ku Baisiraeli ku nguudo; ku lundi oluniinaniina e Betheli, ni ku lundi oluja e Gibea, era ni mu irungu. Baita Abaisiraeli ng'amakumi asatu." 
Judges20:32 Ababenjamini baakoba bati: “Tubaghangwire nga bwe twakola ku mikuzi egyasooka.” Aye Abaisiraeli baakoba bati: “Ka tulumuke tubasendesende bave mu kibuga, baire mu nguudo.”" 
Judges20:33 Kale Abaisiraeli boonaboona baasituka baava mu kifo kye baalimu, baaja beeteega mu nhiriri e Baalitamari. Olwo n'Abaisiraeli abaali babwaime nga beeteeze, baaziinhuuka mu kifo kye baalimu e bugwandhuba wa Gibea." 
Judges20:34 Abasaadha omutwalo mulamba abaalondebwa n'obwegendereza mu Isiraeli yoonayoona, baalumba Gibea, era okulwana kwaba kwa maani inho. Aye Ababenjamini baali nga tibategeire ng'akabi kabali kumpi." 
Judges20:35 Musengwa Katonda yaagha Isiraeli okughangula Ababenjamini ku lunaku olwo. Abaisiraeli baita abasaadha emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi itaanu na kikumi (25,100) ku balwani Ababenjamini. Abo baali abalwani beene abaziramu ntete." 
Judges20:36 Agho Ababenjamini baamanha nga baghangwirwa. Ekikunsu eky'abalwani Abaisiraeli kyalumuka Ababenjamini, kuba baali beesiga ekikunsu eky'abalwani Baisiraeli banaibwe abaabwama nga beeteeze okumpi ni Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Abalwani abo abaabwama baaziinhuuka embiro, baalumba Gibea, baita abaakirimu boonaboona." 
Judges20:38 Ebikunsu ebyo byombi byali bitairegho akamanhiso, biti ekikunsu eky'abalwani abo abaabwama bwe kinaaniosa omwosi omungi oguli ng'oti kire mu kibuga," 
Judges20:39 olwo ekikunsu eky'abalwani abaali bali kulumuka nga kikyuka okulwanisa Ababenjamini. Olwo Ababenjamini baali bamaze okukuba n'okwita Abaisiraeli ng'amakumi asatu, nga baakoba bati: “Tubaghangwire nga bwe twakola ku mikuzi egyasooka.”" 
Judges20:40 Aye akamanhiso kaaboneka, ekyo nga n'ekire eky'omwosi ekiri ng'oti mpango, ekyanioka okuva mu kibuga okutuuka ku igulu. Ababenjamini bwe baakyuka okulinga einhuma, baaja okubona ng'ekibuga kyonakyona kiri kuya." 
Judges20:41 Agho Abaisiraeli be baali bali kubingirira baakyuka, olwo Ababenjamini baadhugumira nga bali kubona akabi kabatuuseeku!" 
Judges20:42 Baakyuka, balumukire mu ngira eja mu irungu, aye nga bazira ye baja! Agho baagemerwa ghagati gh'ekikunsu eky'Abaisiraeli abalwani abaali bali kulumuka n'ekikunsu eky'Abaisiraeli bale abaabwama, olwo baazikirizibwa." 
Judges20:43 Abaisiraeli baazingiza Ababenjamini okubeezunguluza, baababingirira aghazira kugheera, okubatuusa mu kifo ekiri e buvandhuba wa Gibea, nga baja bwe babaita." 
Judges20:44 Mu Babenjamini mwafaamu abalwani beene abaziramu ntete omutwalo mulala na kanaana (18,000)." 
Judges20:45 Abandi baakyuka, baalumuka nga baja mu irungu, nga boolekeire Olubaale lwa Rimmoni. Enkumi itaanu ku abo baitibwa ku nguudo. Abaisiraeli baayongera okubinga abasigairegho okutuuka e Gidoma, baabaitamu enkumi ibiri." 
Judges20:46 Kale Ababenjamini boonaboona abaafa ku lunaku olwo, baaba emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi itaanu (25,000), boonaboona nga balwani beene abaziramu ntete." 
Judges20:47 Aye abasaadha lukaaga n'abasobola okulumukira mu irungu, baatuuka ku Lubaale lwa Rimmoni, era baaba eyo emyezi ena." 
Judges20:48 Abaisiraeli baakyuka kabiri, baalwanisa Ababenjamini abasigairegho, baabaita boonaboona, abasaadha, abakazi, abaana abato, n'ensolo. Era baayokya ebibuga byonabyona bye baayagaana." 
Judges21:1 Abaisiraeli bwe baali e Mizipa, baalayira bati: “Ghazira muntu waire omulala mu ife, aligha wa mu kika kya Benjamini mughala we okumubayiza.”" 
Judges21:2 Agho Abaisiraeli baaja e Betheli, baatyama eyo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda okutuusa eigulo. Baawowoola nga balira amaziga kamaala," 
Judges21:3 nga bakoba bati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, kiviire ku ki ekika kya Benjamini okutuuka okusaanagho?”" 
Judges21:4 Ku lunaku olwairaku ku nkyo, abantu baazimba alutaari, baaghaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
Judges21:5 Baabuuza bati: “Ni baani ku b'omu bika bya Isiraeli, abataaja mu lwekobaano ng'abantu beesoloiza mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda e Mizipa?” Baabuuza ekyo, kuba baali nga beerayiriire inho, ku muntu yeenayeena aloba okuniinaniina okuja e Mizipa, nga bakoba bati: “Wa kwitibwa.”" 
Judges21:6 Abaisiraeli baalumirwa baganda baibwe Ababenjamini, baakoba bati: “Olwaleero Isiraeli efiiriirwa ekindi ku bika byayo!" 
Judges21:7 Tunaakola tutya okufunira abasaadha Ababenjamini abasigairegho abakazi, ate nga twalayira ye Musengwa Katonda obutabagha baghala baife?”" 
Judges21:8 Agho baabuuza bati: “Ni baani mu b'omu bika bya Isiraeli abataaja mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda e Mizipa?” Baaja okukizuula ng'e Yabeshi eky'omu Gileadi tiyavaayo muntu waire omulala, eyaidha okubaagho ng'abantu beesoloiza;" 
Judges21:9 kuba abantu bwe baabalibwa tighaaligho mutyamye waire omulala ku b'e Yabeshi eyabonekaku. 
Judges21:10 Kale Abaisiraeli abaali beesoloiza, baatumayo abasaadha abalwani beene abasinga kubulamu ntete omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000), baabalagira bati: “Muje mwite ab'e Yabeshi eky'omu Gileadi boonaboona, obutalekaayo mukazi, waire omwana omuto." 
Judges21:11 Kino kye mwidha okukola: muzikiririze irala buli muntu ayetebwa musaadha, na buli mukazi eyabaaku n'omusaadha.”" 
Judges21:12 Mu batyamye b'omu Yabeshi, baayagaanamu abaghala abeegha ebikumi bina. Baabaleeta mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe e Shilo, ekiri mu nsi Kanaani." 
Judges21:13 Agho abantu boonaboona abaali beesoloiza, baasindika obukwenda obw'okukomya olutalo, y'Ababenjamini abaali ku Lubaale olw'e Rimmoni." 
Judges21:14 Kale Ababenjamini n'okwira, bale ni babagha abakazi ab'e Yabeshi abataitibwa. Aye baaloba kubamala boonaboona." 
Judges21:15 Abantu baalumirwa Ababenjamini, kuba Musengwa Katonda yali atoiregho okukolaganira aghalala mu bika bya Isiraeli." 
Judges21:16 Agho abakulembeze b'abantu abaali beesoloiza, baakoba bati: “Abakazi baazikirizibwa, baawa mu kika kya Benjamini. Mpegaano tunaakola tutya okufunira abasaadha Ababenjamini abo abasigairegho abakazi?”" 
Judges21:17 Tugwaniire okubaaku kye tukolagho okukuuma Ababenjamini abaasigalagho, ekika kirobe kusasibwagho mu Isiraeli." 
Judges21:18 Aye titusobola kubagha ku baghala baife kubafumbirwa, kuba twamala okulayira tuti, “Oyo yeenayeena aligha Omubenjamini mughala we okumufumbirwa, akolimirwe.”" 
Judges21:19 Agho baakoba bati: “Ghaligho ekibinuko kya Musengwa Katonda ekya buli mwaka e Shilo.” Shilo ekyo kiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba wa Betheli, ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba w'engira eva e Betheli okuja e Shekemu, era ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba wa Lebanoni." 
Judges21:20 Agho baakoba Ababenjamini bati: “Muje mubwame mu masamba g'emizabbibu mweteege omwo. 
Judges21:21 Abaghala b'e Shilo bwe banaafuluma okukina ku kibinuko, olwo mwidha kuva mu masamba g'emizabbibu, kiisi muntu ku imwe agememu mulala bya ntaka amufuule mukazi we, muje nabo mu kiketezo kya Benjamini." 
Judges21:22 Baiseibwe oba baanhinaibwe bwe baliidha ye muli okubavunaana, mulibakoba muti, ‘Tubeeghembye mubatulekere, kuba titwababanhagaaku bunhage mu lutalo okubafuula bakazi baife. Ate, nga bwe mutaabatugha bughe, muziraku musango gubavunaanibwa lwa kumenha kirayiro kye mwalayira.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Agho Ababenjamini baakola batyo, baanhaga abandi ku baghala abakini, baabafuula bakazi baibwe, baabatwala. Bairayo mu kiketezo kyaibwe, bairamu okuzimba ebibuga, baaba omwo." 
Judges21:24 Agho Abaisiraeli mu kiseera ekyo baagolola, buli muntu yaira mu bantu be, ni mu kibandha kye." 
Judges21:25 Mu biseera ebyo, tighaaligho kyabazinga mu Isiraeli. Buli muntu yakolanga nga bw'abona." 
Ruth1:1 Eira einho, ensi Isiraeli ng'efugibwa balamuzi, endhala yagwa mu nsi eyo Isiraeli. Ghaabaagho omusaadha ow'e Bethelehemu eky'omu Buyudaaya, yaalumuka mu nsi eyo Isiraeli yaaja yaasenga mu nsi Moabu. Yaja ni mukazi we ni batabane baibwe babiri." 
Ruth1:2 Eriina ery'omusaadha oyo nga ni Elimeleki, ate erya mukazi we nga ni Naomi, ate aga batabane baibwe nga ni ba Mahaloni ni Kilioni. Ekika kyaibwe baali Baefuratha. Baali bakaali eyo," 
Ruth1:3 Elimeleki yaafa, Naomi yaasigala yenka nga namwandu, ni batabane be bombi." 
Ruth1:4 Bano baabayiza ku baghala Abamoabu, owundi nga ni Orupa era n'owundi nga ni Ruthi." 
Ruth1:5 Bwe ghaabitagho emyaka ng'oti ikumi, abalenzi abo bombi boona baafa. Naomi yaasigala agho nga namwandu, era nga n'abaana bamuwoireku." 
Ruth1:6 Nga ghabiseeghooku entangama, Naomi yaawulira nga Musengwa Katonda yaidhukira abantu be yaabagha omwero ogw'emere. Olwo yeetegeka okuva mu Moabu ni banamwandu ba batabane be bombi." 
Ruth1:7 Baatoolera olugendo bonsatule okwirayo e Buyudaaya. Aye bwe baali baja," 
Ruth1:8 Naomi yaakoba banamwandu abo ati: “Mwireyo buli muntu ye maama we. Nsaba Musengwa Katonda abe mulungi ye muli, nga imwe bwe mubaire abalungi eri nze n'eri abo abaafa." 
Ruth1:9 Musengwa Katonda abaghe buli muntu abayire omusaadha owundi era afune amaka ge.” Agho yaabanhwegera ng'abasiibula, aye bombi baatoolera okulira amaziga." 
Ruth1:10 Baamukoba bati: “Busa. Ife twidha kuja n'iwe, tubenga ghalala n'iwe n'abantu bo.”" 
Ruth1:11 Naomi yaabakoba ati: “Baana bange, mwireyo. Lwaki mwandyenze okuja ninze? Mudhuuba muti nkaaghanga okuzaalayo abalenzi baafuuka baibaimwe?" 
Ruth1:12 Mwireyo ewaimwe, baana bange, nze nkairiighe, tighanga kubayira nti oba oli agho nandibaireku n'eisuubi aye era ni bwenandibayiire obwire buno ni nzaala abaana abalenzi," 
Ruth1:13 mwandibateeze okutuusa ghe bandikuliire? Mwandyekuumye mwaloba kubayira bandi? Busa, baana bange, mbalumirwa inho olw'ekyo Musengwa Katonda kye yankola.”" 
Ruth1:14 Agho kabiri baayongera okulira amaziga. Orupa yaanhwegera inhazaala we, yaamusiibula, aye Ruthi yaasigala ng'akeegemye ku inhazaala we." 
Ruth1:15 Naomi yaakoba Ruthi ati: “Oli kubona mughalikwa wo aizeeyo mu bantu be, ni ye bakatonda be, weena irayo.”" 
Ruth1:16 Aye Ruthi yaamwiramu ati: “Lekera agho okunkoba oti nkuleke, oba oti ndekere okuja n'iwe. Gh'onaaja woonawoona zeena ghe nnaaja. Amaka g'onabangamu zeena ge nnaabangamu. Abantu bo n'abanaabanga abantu bange, era Katonda wo n'anaabanga Katonda wange." 
Ruth1:17 Mu kifo mw'olifiira zeena mwe ndifiira, era eyo ye balinziika. Musengwa Katonda ampanga ekibonerezo ekisembayo kuba kibi, bwenganhanga ekintu kyonakyona ni kintoola ku iwe, ni bwe kuliba okufa.”" 
Ruth1:18 Naomi bwe yabona nga Ruthi mumalirivu okuja naye, yaamuleka baaja." 
Ruth1:19 Baaja batyo bombi okutuusa bwe baatuuka e Bethelehemu. Bwe baatuuka ekibuga kyonakyona kyasuuyirira, ng'abakazi beewuunhia bati: “Ono ni Naomi?”" 
Ruth1:20 Aye yaabakoba ati: “Mutandheta Naomi, mundhete Mara ekitegeeza okukaayirira, kuba Katonda oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona yandeetera obulamu okunkaayira." 
Ruth1:21 Kuba nava kuno nga ndi n'ebyange kamaala aye ndhize makaya. Kale agho nga lwaki mundheta Naomi, ng'ate Musengwa Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona aneefuukiire yandeetera okudaagadaaga kuno.”" 
Ruth1:22 Atyo Naomi bwe yaira ng'ava e Moabu yaira ni Ruthi Omumoabu, namwandu wa mutabane eyafiira e Moabu. Baatuuka e Bethelehemu ng'abantu baakatoolera okukungula sayiri." 
Ruth2:1 Naomi yali n'omumanhe mu kibuga omwo nga bamweta Boazi era nga ba kika kirala ni Elimeleki eyali iba. Yali mukombe era nga mutaka mukulu. 
Ruth2:2 Lulala, Ruthi Omumoabu yakoba Naomi ati: “Njeeku mu misiri eyo nonderonde ku sayiri aja ng'akunkumuka ku bakungula? Nkakasa nga ndidha kwagaanayo ananganha okukola ekyo.” Naomi yaamwiramu ati: “Kola oje mwana wange.”" 
Ruth2:3 Agho Ruthi yaaja mu misiri yaavanga einhuma ew'abakungula ng'alondalonda sayiri eyajanga ng'akunkumuka ku bakungula. Yaja okweyagaana ng'omusiri gwe yajaamu gwali gwa Boazi eyali n'oluganda ku Elimeleki. 
Ruth2:4 Bwe ghaabitaghooku entangama, Boazi mwene yaatuuka ng'ava e Bethelehemu. Yaalamusa abakungula ati: “Musengwa Katonda abe n'imwe.” Baamwiramu bati: “Musengwa Katonda akughe enkabi.”" 
Ruth2:5 Boazi yaabuuza omukulu w'abakungula ati: “Omughala ole naani?” 
Ruth2:6 Omukulu ow'abakungula yairamu ati: “Oyo n'ole omughala Omumoabu eyaidha ni Naomi lwe yaira okuva e Moabu. 
Ruth2:7 Ansabye mmuganhe avenga einhuma ew'abakungula ng'alondalonda sayiri aja ng'akunkumuka, era okuva enkyo na buti ali kukola atyo. Abaire yaakalekeramu era n'okuja mu kinsense agho okuwolaku.”" 
Ruth2:8 Agho Boazi yaakoba Ruthi ati: “Muna, wulira. Otaja kulonda sayiri mu musiri gundi gwonagwona n'oleka guno. Londeranga agho mu kikunsu kya bakazi baino abali kunkolera." 
Ruth2:9 Weetegereze omusiri mwe bali kukesa era mw'obe osigale mwonka. Mmaze okukoba abasaadha abali kukungula obutakukobaaku. Era buli lw'owulira endiwo ng'oja onhwa ku maadhi okuva mu nsugha dhe baseneiremu amaadhi.” 
Ruth2:10 Ruthi yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Yaakoba Boazi ati: “Yenga oli wa kivunika! Kiviire ku ki ninze omugwira n'ombona era n'ongemerwa ekisa?”" 
Ruth2:11 Boazi yaamwiramu ati: “Nawulira bukalamu byonabyona bye wakolera inhazaala wo kasookanga balo afa. Era naawulira ni bwe wasalagho okuleka lata wo ni inhoko, n'ensi yo, n'oidha okutyama mu bantu be wali toidhiiku naire." 
Ruth2:12 Nsaba Musengwa Katonda akughe ebirungi olw'ebyo bye wakola Musengwa Katonda oyo owa Isiraeli ye waidha okwewogomamu.” 
Ruth2:13 Ruthi yaamwiramu ati: “Isebo ondholeike ekisa ekinene, bw'oyogeire ninze mu bibono ebindhiziizaamu amaani, waire nga tibalirwa mu bakozi bo abakazi.”" 
Ruth2:14 Esaawa ey'okulya bwe yatuuka, Boazi yaayeta Ruthi ati: “Idha olye ku mere. N'eiva liirino koza.” Kale Ruthi yaatyama ghalala n'abakozi, Boazi yaamugha emere ey'empeke enkalange, yaalya yaiguta bukalamu, yaalekerera n'okulekerera." 
Ruth2:15 Bwe yamala yaasituka yairayo okulonda sayiri. Ng'amaze okuja, Boazi yaalagira abakozi be ati: “Mumuleke alonde sayiri waire oyo agwire agho ebinhwa ghe biri, mutamulobera." 
Ruth2:16 Ekindi, mumutoolerengaku sayiri ku miganda egibali mu ngalo mumulekere agho alonde. Ghatabaagho ayogera kumutiisa.”" 
Ruth2:17 Kale atyo yaalonda sayiri mu musiri ogwo okutuusa eigulo einho bwe lyatuuka, yaamukuba yaafunamu sayiri agheza kilo ng'oti ikumi." 
Ruth2:18 Yaamubbeeda yairayo naye mu kibuga. Bwe yatuuka yaamwoleka inhazaala we era yaamugha n'emere ere yeyalekerera. 
Ruth2:19 Inhazaala we yaamubuuza ati: “Ono sayiri yeenayeena omulonze gha olwaleero luno? Musiri gw'ani gw'obairemu? Katonda aghe enkabi omuntu oyo akuboine n'akugemerwa ekivunika!” Agho Ruthi yaakobera Naomi ati sayiri yamulonda mu musiri ogw'omuntu ayetebwa Boazi. 
Ruth2:20 Naomi yaakoba ati: “Nsaba Musengwa Katonda aghe Boazi enkabi, kuba olw'okusaasira kwe talekuliire agho balamu oba okwerabira abaafa.” Era yaaja mu maiso yaakoba ati: “Omusaadha oyo waluganda n'ife. Oyo asobola n'okuba omusika wa balo yaatulabirira.”" 
Ruth2:21 Agho Ruthi yaayongeraku ati: “Era akobye ati nsobola okuja naalondanga sayiri ghalala n'abakozi be okutuusa lwe balimala okukungula omusiri gwonagwona.” 
Ruth2:22 Naomi yaamwiramu ati: “N'ekyo kyene mwana wange. Kiba kikalamu okuja okulondanga sayiri n'abakazi abakozi ba Boazi. Bw'oja mu musiri ogw'omuntu owundi baghanga okukulumba.” 
Ruth2:23 Kale Ruthi yaajanga, yaalondanga sayiri ghalala n'abakazi abakozi ba Boazi okutuusa bwe baamaliriza okukungula sayiri n'engaano. Ruthi yaasigala ng'aba ghalala n'inhazaala we." 
Ruth3:1 Nga ghabiseeghooku entangama, Naomi yaakoba Ruthi ati: “Mwana wange, nteekwa okukufunira omusaadha ofune amaka agago ku bubwo." 
Ruth3:2 Oidhukira bukalamu oti omusaadha ono Boazi, mwene bakozi bale abakazi be mwalondanga nabo sayiri, atuliku oluganda. Mperaano ni bona, eigulo lino aidha kuba ghale ghe bakubira sayiri, ng'ali kusensa sayiri." 
Ruth3:3 Kale naabaku, weesiige akawoowo era ovaale ebivaalo byo ebisinga bukalamu. Bw'omala, oje agho ghe bakubira sayiri, aye bw'otuuka agho bona gh'oba era tiweyolekera Boazi, okutuusa ng'amaze okulya n'okunhwa." 
Ruth3:4 Bw'omala, weetegereze gh'anaalambaala, era endoolo bwe dhimutoolagho, oje oghembule gha bigere bye, olambaale agho. Aidha kukukobera eky'okukola.”" 
Ruth3:5 Ruthi yaamwiramu ati: “Ebyo byonabyona by'onkobye ndidha kubikola.” 
Ruth3:6 Kale Ruthi yaaja ghe bakubira sayiri era yaakola nga inhazaala we bwe yamukoba. 
Ruth3:7 Boazi bwe yamala okulya n'okunhwa yaawulira emiraala n'eisanhu. Kale yaabona agho emungo ya sayiri, yaaja yaalambaala agho. Agho Ruthi yaadhooma mpola, yaaja yaaghembula gha bigere bye, yaalambaala agho." 
Ruth3:8 Agho nga mu bwire ghagati Boazi bweyaira engulu ni yeekyusa, yaamwezinduka. Okuja okubona nga ghaligho omukazi alambaire gha bigere bye." 
Ruth3:9 Yaabuuza ati: “Niiwe ani?” Omukazi yaamwiramu ati: “Isebo, ninze Ruthi. Nga bw'ondiku oluganda nkusaba okundabirira.”" 
Ruth3:10 Boazi yaamwiramu ati: “Muna, Musengwa Katonda akughe enkabi, kuba obwesigwa bw'oli kwoleka buti businga obwo bwe wayoleka mu ebyo bye wakolera inhazaala wo. Kuba wandibaire buti ng'oli kwenoonezaayo mulenzi muto, k'abe mukombe oba mwavu, aye ekyo ti ky'okoze." 
Ruth3:11 Kale ni muna, otafaayo. Ndidha kukukolera kyonakyona ky'oba onsabye, kuba ekibuga kyonakyona kiidhi nga bw'oli omukazi omulungi." 
Ruth3:12 Aye ekituufu kiri nti waire nze nsobola okuba omusika wa balo, eriyo asooka memale nze naamwiririra." 
Ruth3:13 Mperaano sigala ghano obwire bukye, bwe bunaaba bukyeire twidha kumubuuza oba nga anaakulabirira. Bw'anaaba ng'anaakulabirira, kinaaba kikalamu aye bw'anaaba nga taakulabirire, nze ndayira mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda omulamu nti ndidha kukulabiriranga. Aye buti lambaala bukye.”" 
Ruth3:14 Kale yaalambaala agho gha bigere bya Boazi, aye yasitukagho mangu nga bukaali kukyera irala, muntu kughanga kwetegereza mwine kuba Boazi tiyayenda bamanhe nga Ruthi yajaaku ghe bakubira sayiri." 
Ruth3:15 Boazi yaakoba Ruthi ati: “Toolaku ekikubiro ky'ovaire okyandhuluze ghano.” Era Ruthi yaakola atyo. Boazi yaapima kilo ng'oti abiri edha sayiri yaadhimufukira mu kikubiro kye era yaadhimutwika. Ruthi yaira nadho mu kibuga. 
Ruth3:16 Bwe yatuuka ye inhazaala we, inhazaala we yaamubuuza ati: “Mwana wange bikujiiriire bitya?” Yaamubitiramu byonabyona Boazi bye yamukolera." 
Ruth3:17 Era yaayongeraku ati: “Boazi yankobye ati ntaira ye iwe na ngalo nsa, n'okumpa sayiri ono yeenayeena.”" 
Ruth3:18 Naomi n'okumukoba ati: “Mwana wange, iwe tyama oteegerere, oidha kubona ekinaavaamu. Boazi taidha kuwuumula olwaleero ng'akaali kugondhoola nsonga dhino.”" 
Ruth4:1 Boazi yaaja mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango ogwingira ekibuga, yaatyama. Agho omusaadha asobola okuba omusika wa Elimeleki, Boazi ye yayogeraku asooka, yaidha. Boazi yaamweta ati: “Idha Mukagwa, otyameku ghano.” Yeena yaaja yaatyama." 
Ruth4:2 Boazi yaabonayo abataka abakulu mu kibuga ikumi, yaabasaba boona batyame agho. Era baatyama agho." 
Ruth4:3 Agho yaakoba ow'ekika kye oyo ati: “Naomi eyaira ng'ava mu nsi ey'e Moabu, ali kutunda ekibandha ekyali ekya Elimeleki ow'ekika kyaife," 
Ruth4:4 era nze naadhuuba nti ogwaine okukimanha. Mpegaano ndi kukoba nti oba nga okyenda kigule, ng'abantu abakulu bano abatyaime ghano babona. Aye oba nga tookigule koba, nze nkigule, kuba niiwe omusika asooka memale nze naakwiririra.” Omusaadha yairamu ati: “Ndidha kukigula.”" 
Ruth4:5 Boazi yaakoba ati: “Otyo, ekyo kirungi! Anti okiidhi nti bw'ogula ekibandha ekyo okuva ku Naomi, oba oli n'okutwaliramu Ruthi namwandu Omumoabu, era nga kisigala mu maina ga mufu.”" 
Ruth4:6 Agho omusaadha n'okukoba ati: “Oba nga ebyo bityo bwe biri, nkulekuliire obukumu bwange bwe ndi nabwo okukigula. Tiidha ku kigula, iwe kigule kuba kiba kitegeeza kudobania busika bwa baana bange.”" 
Ruth4:7 Mperaano mu biseera ebyo mu Isiraeli, nga ghaligho empisa ekolebwa mu kugulaana, oba mu kufaanisaamu ekintu: Ng'okukakasa nga mwene kintu ekyo tanhagiibwaku bunhagibwe, ng'atoolamu engaito mu kigere yaagigha ole ali kufuuka mwene kintu ekyo omuyaaka." 
Ruth4:8 Kale omusaadha bwe yakoba Boazi ati: “Tiidha kukigula, iwe kigule,” yamutooleramu n'engaito yaagimugheeraku." 
Ruth4:9 Ebyo nga biwoire Boazi yaakoba abataka abakulu abaaligho n'abantu abandi ati: “Olwaleero muli badhulizi, nga ndi kugula ku Naomi ebyo byonabyona ebyali eby'omufu Elimeleki, n'ebyo ebyali eby'abafu batabane be, Kilioni ni Mahaloni." 
Ruth4:10 Okwo kwe nhongereza okutwala Ruthi Omumoabu namwandu wa Mahaloni nga mukazi wange. Olwo, ebintu ebyo tibiidha kuva mu maina ga bafu, era n'amaina gaibwe tigaidha kwerabirwa mu bantu ab'omu kibuga, nti lwa kubulwa musika. Imwe muli badhulizi b'ebyo olwaleero luno.”" 
Ruth4:11 Agho abataka abakulu n'abantu abandi abaali mu kifo eky'olwekobaano, agho munda ng'omaze okubita mu mulyango ogwingira mu kibuga, baakoba bati: “Yii, tuli badhulizi. Musengwa Katonda aghe enkabi mukazi wo oyo, abe ng'oti ni Rakeli ni Leeya, abo bombi abaavaamu ekika eky'Abaisiraeli. Musengwa Katonda akughe obukombe mu kika eky'Abaefuratha era obe mumanhifu inho mu Bethelehemu." 
Ruth4:12 N'abaana Musengwa Katonda baaja okukugheera mu mughala oyo bagwananga baaleetera amaka go okwegombebwa ng'aga Perezi mutabane wa Yuda ye yazaala mu Tamari.” 
Ruth4:13 Kale Boazi yaatwala Ruthi ewuwe nga mukazi we. Musengwa Katonda yaamugha enkabi yaatoola enda era yaazaala omwana mulenzi. 
Ruth4:14 Abakazi baakoba Naomi bati: “Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe atakulekuliire agho nga ghazira musika wa kukulabirira! Omwana oyo agwananga yaakula yaaba mumanhifu inho mu Isiraeli mwonamwona! 
Ruth4:15 Mughala wo oyo akugonza inho, akukoleire ebintu kamaala okusinga n'abaana abalenzi omusanvu. Era mpegaano akuzaaliire omwidhukulu, oyo aidha okukwiza obuto, era akulabirire mu myaka gyo egy'obukaire.”" 
Ruth4:16 Naomi yaatoola omwana yaamulera okutuusa lwe yakula. 
Ruth4:17 Abakazi ab'oku muliiraano baatuuma omwana eriina Obedi, era baakobera buli muntu bati: “Ruthi azaaliire Naomi omwana omulenzi.” Obedi oyo n'eyazaala Yesse, eyazaala Daudi." 
Ruth4:18 Bano ni baidhukulu ba Perezi: Perezi n'eyazaala Hezironi, Hezironi yaazaala Ramu, Ramu yaazaala Amminadabu, Amminadabu yaazaala Nahashoni, Nahashoni yaazaala Salumoni, Salumoni yaazaala Boazi, Boazi yaazaala Obedi, Obedi yaazaala Yesse, Yesse yaazaala Daudi." 
Ruth4:19  
Ruth4:20  
Ruth4:21  
Ruth4:22  
1Samuel1:1 Ghaaligho omusaadha ye baayetanga Elukana eyabanga mu Ramathaimu Zofimu mu biketezo bya Efuraimu eby'ensozi. Elukana oyo yali mutabane wa Yerohamu. Yerohamu oyo yali mutabane wa Elihu. Elihu oyo yali mutabane wa Tohu. Ate Tohu oyo yaaba mutabane wa Zufa Omuefuraimu. 
1Samuel1:2 Elukana yali n'abakazi babiri: owundi nga ni Hanna ate owundi nga ni Pennina. Pennina yaliku abaana, aye nga Hanna aziraku." 
1Samuel1:3 Buli mwaka Elukana yavanga mu kibuga ky'ewaibwe, yaaja e Shilo okusinza n'okughaayo emisengo eri Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye. Eyo n'eyali batabane ba Eli ababiri, Hofuni ni Finehasi, abaali bakabona ba Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel1:4 Ku lunaku Elukana lwe yagheerangayo omusengo, yatoolanga ku mamba y'omusengo ogwo yaaghaaku Pennina omugabo, era yaagha buli mwana owa Pennina oyo omugabo, k'abe omughala oba omulenzi." 
1Samuel1:5 Aye waire Elukana yagonzanga inho Hanna, yamughanga omugabo mulala gwonka, kuba Musengwa Katonda yamusiba yaaba nga tazaala." 
1Samuel1:6 Era mughalikwa we Pennina yamuyeeyerezanga inho olwa Musengwa Katonda okumusiba n'atazaala, yaamuleeteranga okunakughala." 
1Samuel1:7 Kityo bwe kyalinga buli mwaka. Buli lwe baajanga mu ndhu ya Musengwa Katonda, nga Pennina oyo amuyeeyereza. Olw'ekyo Hanna yaaliranga bwa bulire, nga n'okulya emere talya." 
1Samuel1:8 Agho Elukana, iba, yaamubuuza ati: “Hanna, lwaki oliranga otyo, n'oloba n'okulya emere? Lwaki onakughala okwaga agho? Nze tikusingira baana balenzi ikumi?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Lwali lulala, nga bamaze okulya n'okunhwa e Shilo, Hanna yaasituka. Mu kiseera ekyo Eli kabona yali atyaime ku kityamo kye kumpi n'omwango ogw'omulyango gw'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel1:10 Hanna yaaja yaasaba Musengwa Katonda nga munakughavu inho, era ng'ali kulira amaziga inho." 
1Samuel1:11 Yeeyama ng'akoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, bw'onaalingirira okudaazibwadaazibwa kwange nze omwiru wo omukazi, n'ondidhukira n'otaneerabira, n'ompa omwana omulenzi, nja kumukugha iwe Musengwa Katonda enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwe, era taasalengaku nviiri.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Bwe yali ng'akaaja mu maiso n'okusaba Musengwa Katonda, Eli yeetegereza omunwa gwe." 
1Samuel1:13 Hanna yali ali kwogera mule mu mwoyo gwe ng'amamiro tigali kuwulikika, aye ng'omunwa gwe n'oguli kutengeeta gwonka. Agho Eli yaadhuuba ati katyo omukazi atamiire." 
1Samuel1:14 Kale yaamukoba ati: “Olituusa li okuba omutamiivu? Lekera agho okunhwanga omwenge.” 
1Samuel1:15 Aye Hanna yaamwiramu ati: “Busa, musengwa wange. Nkaali kunhwa ku mwenge gwa mizabbibu oba ekitamiiza kyonakyona. Nze ndi mukazi aidhwire enaku, era mbaire ndi kufukumula ebiri ku mwoyo gwange mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel1:16 Nze omwiru wo omukazi otantwala ng'omukazi aziramu makulu, kuba agho woonawoona mbaire ndi kukobanga ebindeeteire enaku n'okweraliikirira.”" 
1Samuel1:17 Agho Eli yaamwiramu ati: “Ja n'emiraala! Nsaba Katonda wa Isiraeli akughe ekyo ky'omusabye.” 
1Samuel1:18 Hanna yaakoba ati: “Nkweghemba nze omwiru wo omukazi, ondeeterenga okusiimibwanga.” Agho yaaja yaalya emere, era yaalekera agho okunakughala." 
1Samuel1:19 Bwe bwakya enkyo Elukana n'ab'omu ndhu ye baasinza Musengwa Katonda. Bwe baamala bairayo mu maka gaibwe e Rama. Agho Elukana yaaba ni mukazi we Hanna mu buliri, era Musengwa Katonda yaidhukira Hanna oyo." 
1Samuel1:20 Hanna oyo yaatoola enda, yaazaala omwana mulenzi, yaamutuuma eriina Samueli, kuba yakoba ati: “Namusaba Musengwa Katonda”." 
1Samuel1:21 Agho Elukana oyo yaaja kabiri n'ab'endhu ye okughaayo eri Musengwa Katonda omusengo ogwa buli mwaka, era n'okutuukiriza kye yeeyama." 
1Samuel1:22 Aye ku mukuzi ogwo Hanna tiyaja nabo, kuba yakoba iba ati: “Omwana bw'alikula n'ava ku mabeere, ndimutwala naamwandhulayo ye Musengwa Katonda era yaaba eyo enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwe.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Elukana yaamwiramu ati: “Kale kola ky'obona nga n'ekigwaine, okutuusa lw'alikula n'ava ku mabeere. Aye nsaba Musengwa Katonda akakase ekibono kye.” Kale Hanna yaasigala ghaka ng'alera omwana we okutuusa bwe yakula naava ku mabeere." 
1Samuel1:24 Omwana bwe yakula n'ava ku mabeere, Hanna yaamutwala ghalala n'ente ey'emyaka esatu, ni kilo ikumi edh'obuwunga obw'engaano, n'ensawo ey'oluwu eidhwire omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Yaamutwala mu ndhu ya Musengwa Katonda e Shilo, waire ng'era omwana yali akaali muto." 
1Samuel1:25 Agho baita ente eyo, era baatwala omwana ye Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 Hanna yaakoba Eli ati: “Musengwa Katonda ghangaala! Ninze omukazi ole eyali ghano mu maiso go ng'ali kusaba Musengwa Katonda. 
1Samuel1:27 Namusaba omwana ono, era yampa kye namusaba." 
1Samuel1:28 Kale buti ndi kumughaayo abe wa Musengwa Katonda enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwe.” Era baasinza Musengwa Katonda nga bali eyo. 
1Samuel2:1 Hanna yaasaba ng'akoba ati: “Ndi kusagamba olwa Musengwa Katonda ky'ankoleire, Musengwa Katonda andhiziizaamu amaani. Nsekerera abazigu bange, naasagamba kuba iwe Musengwa Katonda omponiiza." 
1Samuel2:2 Ezirayo mutukuvu ng'oti ni Musengwa Katonda, ezira wundi naire; ezirayo lubaale lwa kwewogomamu luli ng'oti ni Katonda waife bw'atukuuma." 
1Samuel2:3 Mulekere agho okwogera nga mwesuuta, mukomye ebibono eby'okwesaaka; kuba Musengwa Katonda ni Katonda aidhwire okumanha, era alamula ebikolwa eby'abantu." 
1Samuel2:4 Obulaso obw'ab'amaani bumenhekamu, ate abanafu beeyongera okuba ab'amaani." 
1Samuel2:5 Abo abaalyanga ni baiguta, mpegaano bapakasa bupakase okufuna kye banaalya; aye abo endhala be yalumanga, buti tekaabaluma. Omukazi eyali omugumba buti aliku abaana musanvu, aye ow'abaana kamaala tasigaizaagho waire mulala." 
1Samuel2:6 Musengwa Katonda aita era yaizaagho obulamu; aserengesa omuntu ghansi e magombe, era yaamuzuukiza okuva e magombe." 
1Samuel2:7 Musengwa Katonda ayavughaza omuntu era yaamukombaghaza; aisa omuntu ghansi era yaamugulumiza. 
1Samuel2:8 Abbeeda abaavu yaabatoola mu nkungu, yaasitula abali mu bwetaavu yaabatoola mu ivu, yaabatyamya ghalala n'abakungu, yaabata mu bifo eby'ebitiibwa; kuba empango edh'ensi dha Musengwa Katonda, era ku mpango edho kwe yata ensi." 
1Samuel2:9 Aidha kukuumanga ebigere by'abo abeesigwa y'ali, aye ababi aidha kubaleeteranga okufiira mu nzikiiza; kuba omuntu taghangula lwa maani g'ali nago." 
1Samuel2:10 Abazigu ba Musengwa Katonda aja kubazikiriza baweegho; aja kubabwatukira ng'oti lukuba ng'ali mu igulu. Musengwa Katonda aja kulamula ensi yoonayoona, aghe kyabazinga we amaani, agulumize obukumu bw'oyo ye yasiiga omuzigo.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Agho Elukana yairayo eka. Omulenzi yaasigala ng'agheereza Musengwa Katonda, nga Eli n'amulabirira." 
1Samuel2:12 Batabane ba Eli baali abantu abazira kye bagasa, nga tibaisaayo mwoyo ku Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel2:13 Ensambo bakabona abo ye baabisangamu abantu yali eti: omuntu bwe yaghangayo omusengo, omugheereza wa kabona ng'aidha nga bakaafumba emamba, ng'agemye wuuma ey'amaino asatu," 
1Samuel2:14 yaagifumita mu seepiki, oba mu nsaka, oba mu ntamu. Ebyo byonabyona ebyaidhiranga ku wuuma nga biba bya kabona, era nga babitwaliragho. Batyo bwe baabisanga Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaidhanga e Shilo okughaayo emisengo." 
1Samuel2:15 Era n'ekindi, bwe baabanga nga bakaali kwokya masavu, omugheereza wa kabona ng'aidha yaakoba omuntu ali kughaayo omusengo ati: “Mpa emamba ya kabona ey'okwokya, kuba taidha kuganha kumugha mamba nfumbe, okutoolaku embisi yonka.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Ole bweyamwirangamu ati: “Ka bamale okwokya amasavu memale otwale emamba y'onaayenda yoonayoona,” agho ng'omugheereza amwiramu ati: “Busa oteekwa okugimpa buti, bw'oloba ndidha kugitwala bya ntaka.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Kale, ekibi eky'abaisuka abo kyaba kinene inho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda kuba ebigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda tibaabitangamu kinhagansi." 
1Samuel2:18 Samueli yali ng'agheereza mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ng'akaali mwisuka, ng'avaala ekivaalo eky'obwakabona ekyakolebwa mu lugoye olughegheevu." 
1Samuel2:19 Buli mwaka inhina ng'amutungira akakanzu, yaakamuleetera buli lwe baidhanga n'iba okughaayo omusengo ogwa buli mwaka." 
1Samuel2:20 Eli yaasabiranga Elukana ni mukazi we ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akughe abaana abandi olw'oyo ye waghaayo ye Musengwa Katonda.” Bwe baamalanga nga bairayo ewaibwe. 
1Samuel2:21 Musengwa Katonda yaayongera okugha Hanna enkabi, yaazaala abaana abandi abalenzi basatu n'abaghala babiri. Omulenzi Samueli yaayongera okukula ng'agheereza Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel2:22 Agho Eli yali akairiighe inho, era ng'awulira batabane be bye baakolanga Abaisiraeli boonaboona, era ni babanga mu buliri n'abakazi abaagheerezanga ku mulyango ogw'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel2:23 Yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki mukola ebintu ng'oti n'ebyo? Abantu boonaboona bankobera ebikolwa byaimwe ebibi. 
1Samuel2:24 Mulekere agho, baana bange! Ebintu bye mpulira ng'abantu baboogeraku eyo, ti bikalamu naire." 
1Samuel2:25 Omuntu bw'asobya ye muntu mwine, Katonda amutabagania n'omuntu oyo, aye omuntu bw'asobya ye Musengwa Katonda, naani asobola okumuwolereza?” Aye tibaawulirisa iseibwe bye yabakoba kuba Musengwa Katonda yali amaze okusalagho okubaita." 
1Samuel2:26 Agho omulenzi Samueli yeeyongera okukula n'okugonzebwa Musengwa Katonda n'abantu. 
1Samuel2:27 Agho omuntu wa Katonda yaidha ewa Eli, yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akobye ati, ‘Nabonekera ab'endhu ya dhaadha wo, bwe baali nga bairu ba kyabazinga w'e Misiri." 
1Samuel2:28 Era naamulonda mu bika byonabyona ebya Isiraeli abe kabona wange, ajenga ku alutaari yange, aniokezenga obubbaani, era avaalenga ekivaalo eky'obwakabona mu maiso gange. Era naagha ab'endhu ye ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa byonabyona Abaisiraeli bye bampa." 
1Samuel2:29 Lwaki timwisa kitiisa mu misengo gyange n'ebigheebwayo byange bye nalagira abantu bange okumpa? Iwe Eli, lwaki ogha batabane bo ekitiisa ekinene okusinga ky'ompa nze, ni mugeedhera ku bisinga obulungi, mu ebyo abantu bange Abaisiraeli bye baghaayo?" 
1Samuel2:30 Nze Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli kyenva ni nkoba nti, nasuubiza ng'ab'endhu yo n'ab'endhu ya dhaadha wo banampeerezanga ekiseera kyonakyona. Aye mpegaano nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti ekyo nkimenhiegho, kuba abo abantaamu ekitiisa, be ndidha okutangamu ekitiisa, ate abo abaanhooma, tibaateebwengamu kanhagansi." 
1Samuel2:31 Bona ekiseera kiri kwidha, lwe ndizikiriza abaisuka boonaboona ab'omu ndhu yo, n'ab'omu ndhu ya dhaadha wo, ghalobe kubaagho akula n'akairigha mu ndhu yo." 
1Samuel2:32 Agho ng'oli mu nnaku olibona ebirungi Abaisiraeli bye balifunanga, ensaalwa yaakugema. Mu ndhu yo timuja kubaamu muntu mukaire enaku dhoonadhoona." 
1Samuel2:33 Aye omuntu ow'omu ndhu yo, ye ndirekagho okugheerezanga ku alutaari yange, aja kulira amaziga n'amaiso gende bwa kumutuumamu, n'enaku emulume ku mwoyo gwende bwa kumutuumamu. Eizaire lyaimwe lyonalyona liidha kwitibwanga bwitibwe." 
1Samuel2:34 Era kino ekija okutuuka ku batabane bo bombi, Hofuni ni Finehasi, kiidha kuba akamanhiso akakakasa; bombi baja kufa ku lunaku lulala." 
1Samuel2:35 Ndidha kweronderayo kabona omwesigwa anaakolanga bye nhenda era ebinsangaaza. Nja kumugha eizaire era nditeegho ligheerezenga lubeerera oyo ye nasiiga omuzigo. 
1Samuel2:36 Ow'eizaire lyo yeenayeena aliwonagho alija ye kabona oyo okusabiriza akasente n'akamere, ng'amukoba ati, nkweghembye, mpa nkole ogundi ku mirimo gya bakabona, nsobole okufuna eky'okulya.’ ”" 
1Samuel3:1 Agho mu biseera ebyo, omulenzi Samueli yali agheereza Musengwa Katonda nga Eli n'amulabirira. Era Musengwa Katonda yali tatera kwogera na bantu, waire okubabonekera." 
1Samuel3:2 Lwali lulala obwire, Eli ng'alambaire mu kifo kye, aye yali takaabona bukalamu olw'ekifu ekyali kitooleire okumwidha ku maiso." 
1Samuel3:3 Eitaala lya Katonda lyali likaali kuzikira era nga Samueli alambaire mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda omwali Esanduuku ya Katonda. 
1Samuel3:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayeta ati: “Samueli, Samueli!” Samueli yaavugira ati: “Wangi.”" 
1Samuel3:5 Yaalumuka yaaja ye Eli, yaamukoba ati: “Ndi ghano ndidhie isebo, kuba ondhese.” Aye Eli yaamukoba ati: “Tikwese, irayo olambaale.” Kale Samueli yairayo, yaalambaala." 
1Samuel3:6 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yaayeta ati: “Samueli.” Era Samueli yaasituka, yaaja ye Eli yaamukoba ati: “Ndi ghano ndidhie isebo, kuba ondhese.” Aye Eli yaamukoba ati: “Mwana wange, tikwese. Irayo olambaale.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Samueli yali akaali kumanha Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda yali tayogerangaku na Samueli oyo." 
1Samuel3:8 Musengwa Katonda yaayeta Samueli kabiri omukuzi ogwokusatu. Era yaasituka yaaja ye Eli yaamukoba ati: “Ndi ghano ndidhie isebo kuba ondhese.” Olwo Eli yaakitegeera nga Musengwa Katonda n'eyali ali kweta omulenzi. 
1Samuel3:9 Kale yaakoba Samueli ati: “Ja olambaale. Bw'anaakweta oidha kumukoba oti, ‘Wo Musengwa Katonda, yogera, omwiru wo ali kuwulira.’ ” Kale Samueli yairayo yaalambaala mu kifo kye." 
1Samuel3:10 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaidha yaayemerera agho, yaayeta nga bwe yakola ku mikuzi gire egindi, ati: “Samueli, Samueli.” Samueli yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda yogera, omwiru wo ali kuwulira.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Samueli ati: “Bona eno, ndi kumpi okukola ekintu mu Isiraeli muno, ekiriwaawaaza amatu ga buli muntu alikiwulira." 
1Samuel3:12 Ku lunaku olwo nja kutuukiriza byonabyona bye neesoomera okukola Eli n'ab'endhu ye, okuva ku kisooka okutuuka ku kisembayo." 
1Samuel3:13 Era nakobera Eli oyo nti nja kubonereza ab'endhu ye ebyanda n'ebyanda, olw'ebibi bye yamanha obukalamu kuba batabane be baavuma Katonda aye yaaloba kubaloberanga." 
1Samuel3:14 Olw'ekyo neerayiriire eri endhu ya Eli, nti mu byanda byonabyona ebiriiragho, ezira musengo oba kigheebwayo kirisobola kubatoolaku kibi kyaibwe ekyo.”" 
1Samuel3:15 Samueli yaasigala mu buliri okutuusa bwe bwakya. Agho yaasituka, yaigula endhigi edh'endhu ya Musengwa Katonda. Yali ali kutya okukobera Eli ebyali mu kubonekerwa okwo." 
1Samuel3:16 Aye Eli yaamweta ati: “Mwana wange, Samueli.” Samueli yaavugira ati: “Wangi isebo.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Eli yaamubuuza ati: “Kiki Musengwa Katonda kye yakukobye? Otakingisa. Katonda k'akubonereze inho, bw'ongisa ekintu kyonakyona ku ebyo bye yakukobye.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Kale Samueli yaamukobera byonabyona nga ghazira ky'amugisiisa naire. Eli yaakoba ati: “Oyo ni Musengwa Katonda, k'akole mwene ky'abona nga n'ekirungi.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Samueli yaakula, era Musengwa Katonda yaabanga ghalala naye. Musengwa Katonda yaaloba kuganhanga Samueli oyo ky'akobye ni kiroba kutuukirira." 
1Samuel3:20 Agho Abaisiraeli boonaboona, okuva e Dani okutuuka e Beerisheba, baamanha bati Samueli akakasiibwa okuba omulanzi wa Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel3:21 Musengwa Katonda yaayongeranga okubonekera mu Shilo, ye yeeyolekera Samueli, era yaayogeranga naye. Era buli Samueli kye yayogeranga, ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona bakiwulirisa." 
1Samuel4:1 Agho Abaisiraeli baaja okulwana n'Abafilisiti. Baasimba weema dhaibwe mu kifo ekyetebwa Ebenezeri, ate Abafilisiti baasimba edhaibwe mu Afeki." 
1Samuel4:2 Abafilisiti beetegeka mu nhiriri okulwanisa Abaisiraeli, era olutalo bwe lweyongera okutaama Abafilisiti baaghangula Abaisiraeli, era baabaitamu abantu ng'enkumi ina mu irwaniro." 
1Samuel4:3 Abalwani Abaisiraeli abaawonagho bwe baira ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, abakulu baibwe beebuuzagania bati: “Olwaleero lwaki Musengwa Katonda atughaireyo Abafilisiti ni batughangula obwaga agho? Ka tuje tuleete Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda okuva e Shilo, Musengwa Katonda aidhe abe ghalala n'ife, atuwonie abazigu baife.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Kale baatuma abakwenda e Shilo, baatoolayo Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda, oyo Afuga Amagye era atyama ku bitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi. Batabane ba Eli bombi, Hofuni ni Finehasi, boona baidhira ghalala n'Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Katonda."
