1Samuel4:5 Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda bwe yatuuka mu kifo Abaisiraeli ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, Abaisiraeli boonaboona bakuba emizira egy'amaani, n'ensi yaatengeeta." 
1Samuel4:6 Abafilisiti bwe baawulira okukuba emizira okw'amaani kutyo, beebuuzagania bati: “Okukuba emizira okw'amaani okwo okuli mu Baisiraeli kutegeeza ki?” Era bwe baakitegeera bati Sanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda n'eyali etuuse mu kifo Abaisiraeli ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe," 
1Samuel4:7 Abafilisiti abo baatya, nga bakoba bati: “Omusambwa gwidhie mu Baisiraeli. Tukagwireku, kuba ekintu ng'oti n'ekyo tikibangaghooku." 
1Samuel4:8 Tukagwireku! Naani anaatuwonia emisambwa egyo egy'amaani gityo? Egyo n'emisambwa egyaita Abamisiri nga gibasindikira ebibamba ebya buli nsambo mu irungu. 
1Samuel4:9 Imwe Abafilisiti, mugume, mulwane kisaadha, mulobe kufuuka bairu ba Baisiraeli, nga beene bwe baali abairu baimwe. Mugume, mulwane kisaadha!”" 
1Samuel4:10 Kale Abafilisiti baalwana era baaghangula Abaisiraeli. Abaisiraeli baalumuka, buli muntu yairayo mu maka ge. Era abantu abaitibwa baali kamaala inho, kuba abalwani b'Abaisiraeli ab'oku bigere baafaamu emitwalo esatu (30,000)." 
1Samuel4:11 Esanduuku ey'Endagaano baaginhaga, ni batabane ba Eli bombi, Hofuni ni Finehasi, baabaita." 
1Samuel4:12 Agho omuntu ow'omu kika kya Benjamini, yaalumuka ng'ava mu lutalo, yaaja yaatuuka e Shilo ku lunaku lwene olwo, ng'akanwiremu ebivaalo bye, era ng'asiize eitaka mu mutwe gwe, olw'enaku." 
1Samuel4:13 Bwe yatuuka, yaayagaana Eli ng'atyaime ku kityamo kye agho ku mbali ku luguudo ng'alingiriire oluguudo kuba omwoyo gwali guli kumutengera olw'Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Katonda. Omusaadha oyo bwe yatuuka mu kibuga n'akobera abantu amawulire ago, abantu boonaboona baakuba enduulu baalira." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli bwe yawulira okulira okwo, yaabuuza ati: “Okwasiikana okwo kwaki?” Agho omuntu ole yaayangughaku, yaidha okumukobera." 
1Samuel4:15 Eli yali agheziiza emyaka kyenda na munaana (98) egy'obukulu, era ng'ekifu kyamugema ku maiso, takaabona bukalamu." 
1Samuel4:16 Agho omuntu ole yaamukoba ati: “Ninze ndeese amawulire okuva mu lutalo. Nnumwikeyo lwaleero lwene luno.” Eli yaamubuuza ati: “Mwana wange, bijiire bitya?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Ole eyaleeta amawulire yaamwiramu ati: “Abaisiraeli balumwike Abafilisiti, era Abaisiraeli kamaala inho babaise. Batabane bo bombi, Hofuni ni Finehasi, babaise, n'Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Katonda baginhaze.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Ole bwe yayogera ku ky'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda, Eli yaaghanuka ku kityamo kye, yaagwa kya mugongo kumpi n'omulyango. Olw'okuba yali mukaire era nga munene, bwe yagwa yaamenheka enkoto era yaafa. Yali amaze entangama ya myaka amakumi ana ng'akulembera Isiraeli." 
1Samuel4:19 Agho mukaamwana wa Eli, muka Finehasi, yali ng'alinda era ng'ali kumpi kuzaala. Bwe yawulira ati Esanduuku ya Katonda baginhaze, era ati nhazaala we n'iba bafiire, ebisa byaidha, yaafukamira yaazaala." 
1Samuel4:20 Bwe yali ali kumpi okufa, abakazi abaali bali kumulabirira baamukoba bati: “Guma, kuba ozaire omwana mulenzi.” Aye tiyabairamu waire okubafaaku." 
1Samuel4:21 Yaatuuma omwana eriina Ikabodi, ng'akoba ati: “Ekitiibwa kiviire ku Isiraeli”, olw'okuba Esanduuku ya Katonda baaginhaga, n'olw'okuba nhazaala we yafa, era n'iba baamwita." 
1Samuel4:22 Yaakoba ati: “Ekitiibwa kiviire ku Isiraeli, kuba Esanduuku ya Katonda baginhaze.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Abafilisiti bwe baamala okunhaga Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda baagitoola mu Ebenezeri, baagitwala mu Ashidodi." 
1Samuel5:2 Baagitwala baagita mu isabo lya omusambwa gwaibwe Dagoni, era baagita kumpi n'omusambwa ogwo." 
1Samuel5:3 Abantu ab'omu Ashidodi bwe baasitukagho ku nkyo ku lunaku olwairirira, baaja okubona ng'ekiwumbe eky'omusambwa Dagoni kigwire n'obweni bwakyo bwatuuka ku itaka, emberi w'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda. Agho baakibbeeda baakiiza mu kifo kyakyo." 
1Samuel5:4 Aye bwe baasitukagho ku nkyo ku lunaku olundi olwairirira, baaja okubona ng'ekiwumbe eky'omusambwa Dagoni kabiri kigwire n'obweni bwakyo bwatuuka ku itaka, emberi w'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda ng'omutwe n'emikono bikutwikeku, nga bigwire gha mulyango. Ekiwumbe eky'omusambwa Dagoni ogwo, kyasigala kiwuduwudu kyereere." 
1Samuel5:5 Eyo n'ensonga lwaki bakabona b'omusambwa Dagoni era n'abantu boonaboona, batuuma gha mulyango agho mu Ashidodi, baaloba kuniinagho ni ye buli eno." 
1Samuel5:6 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaabonereza inho abantu ab'omu Ashidodi, yaabaleetera okutya einho era yaabasindikira okulwala ebizimba." 
1Samuel5:7 Abantu ab'omu Ashidodi bwe baabona nga biri bityo, baakoba bati: “Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda wa Isiraeli eteekwa kutuvaamu, kuba ali kutubonereza inho ife era n'omusambwa gwaife Dagoni.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Kale baatuma abakwenda, baayeta abafuzi ab'Abafilisiti boonaboona. Agho baababuuza bati: “Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda wa Isiraeli tugikolere ki?” Bale bairamu bati: “Etwalibwe e Gathi.” Kale baatwala Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda e Gathi." 
1Samuel5:9 Aye olwagituusa e Gathi bati, Musengwa Katonda yaatoolera okubonereza ekibuga ekyo. Yaabaleetera okutya einho, era yaabasindikira okulwala ebizimba byabafukumukaku boonaboona, abakulu n'abato." 
1Samuel5:10 Kale Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda baagigheereza mu Ekuroni. Aye olwagituusaayo bati, abantu baayo baaleekaana bati: “Batuleeteire Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda wa Isiraeli okutwita ife n'abantu baife!”" 
1Samuel5:11 Agho baatuma, baayeta abafuzi ab'Abafilisiti boonaboona, baabakoba bati: “Mwizeeyo Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda wa Isiraeli mu kifo kyayo y'eba, erobe kutwita ife n'abantu baife.” Ghaaligho okutya einho ekibitiriire mu kibuga kyonakyona, kuba Katonda yali ali kubabonereza inho." 
1Samuel5:12 Abo abataafa Katonda yabasindikira okulwala ebizimba. Agho abantu ab'omu kibuga baalira, era okulira kwaibwe kwatuuka mu igulu." 
1Samuel6:1 Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda yamala emyezi musanvu ng'eri mu nsi ey'Abafilisiti. 
1Samuel6:2 Agho Abafilisiti baayeta bakabona n'abalaguzi, baababuuza bati: “Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda tugikolere ki? Mutukobere kye tunaagiizaayo nakyo, eireyo mu kifo kyayo?”" 
1Samuel6:3 Baabairamu bati: “Bwe munaaba nga mwizaayo Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda wa Isiraeli, timwidha kugiizaayo ndhereere. Mu buli ngeri muli n'okugiizaayo ye Katonda oyo ghalala n'ekigheebwayo ng'omutango. Olwo mwidha kuwona era mumanhe lwaki abaire ababonerezanga nga tasalaku.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Abafilisiti baababuuza bati: “Kigheebwayo ki kye tunaamugheereza ng'omutango?” Baabairamu bati: “Ebiwumbe ebya zaabu bitaanu ebifaanana ng'oti bizimba, n'ebiwumbe ebindi ebya zaabu bitaanu ebifaanana ng'oti mpube, nga mujiira ku bungi obw'abafuzi Abafilisiti kuba ekibamba Katonda kye yasindika ku imwe mwenamwena, n'ekirala ekyo kye yasindika ni ku bafuzi baimwe." 
1Samuel6:5 Kale ni mukole ebiwumbe ebifaanana ng'oti n'ebizimba byaimwe n'ebindi ebifaanana ng'oti n'empube dhaimwe edhiri kwitaitana ensi. Olwo mwise ekitiisa mu Katonda wa Isiraeli, memale katyo oba anaalekera agho okubabonereza imwe, n'emisambwa gyaimwe, era n'ensi yaimwe." 
1Samuel6:6 Lwaki mwenda okukalangusa emyoyo gyaimwe ng'Abamisiri ni kyabazinga waibwe bwe baakola? Katonda bwe yababonereza n'abamalamu, tibaalwa eira ni baleka Baisiraeli kuva mu Misiri ni baja?" 
1Samuel6:7 Kale mpegaano mutegekeyo ekigaali eky'okutambuliraku ekiyaaka, mukisibeku ente ibiri edhikamwa, dhe batasibangaku kikoligo. Enhana dhaadho mudhidhitooleku, mudhiizeeyo eka." 
1Samuel6:8 Memale mute Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda ku kigaali ekyo. N'ebiwumbe bire ebya zaabu, bye muli kugheereza Musengwa Katonda bibe ekigheebwayo ng'omutango, mubite mu sanduuku eyindi, mugiriinaanie Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda. Olwo musame ente dhighaluze ekigaali, mudhireke Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda eje y'eyenda." 
1Samuel6:9 Agho mugiringirire: Bw'enaasimbira e Bethi Shemeshi mu nsi yaayo, kiidha kumanhika nga Katonda w'Abaisiraeli n'atukoze akabi akanene katyo. Aye bwe kitaba kityo, olwo twidha kumanha tuti ebibonerezo ebyatutuukaku, byatugwaku bugwe.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Kale abantu baakola batyo. Baatoola ente ibiri edhikamwa baadhisiba n'ekikoligo ku kigaali eky'okutambuliramu, era baigaliza enhana dhaadho eka." 
1Samuel6:11 Baata Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda ku kigaali ekyo, n'esanduuku ere ye baataamu ebiwumbe bya zaabu ebifaanana ng'oti mpube, ni bire ebifaanana ng'oti n'ebizimba byaibwe." 
1Samuel6:12 Agho dhaatambula butereevu nga dhigemye luguudo lulala lwonka oluja e Bethi Shemeshi. Dhaaja nga dhimoola, aye dhaaloba kukyukiraku ku luuyi lwa mukono musaadha oba lwa mugooda. Abafuzi ab'Abafilisiti baaja nga badhinonereza okutuukira irala ku nsalosalo ey'e Bethi Shemeshi." 
1Samuel6:13 Abantu ab'e Bethi Shemeshi baali nga bali kukungula ngaano mu kiiko. Baaja okusitula amaiso bati, nga babona Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda. Agho baasagamba inho okugibona." 
1Samuel6:14 Ekigaali kyaidha kyatuuka mu musiri ogw'omuntu ayetebwa Yoshua ow'e Bethi Shemeshi, kyayemerera agho kumpi n'eibaale eikologho. Abantu baayasaaga emiti egy'ekigaali, baaghaayo ente edho ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa eri Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel6:15 Abalevi baabbeeda Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda, n'esanduuku ere eyali nayo omwali ebiwumbe ebya zaabu, baadhita ku ibaale eryo eikologho. Abantu ab'e Bethi Shemeshi baidha baaghaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'emisengo, ku lunaku olwo." 
1Samuel6:16 Abafuzi ab'Abafilisiti bwe baamala okubona ebyo, bairayo mu Ekuroni ku lunaku olwo." 
1Samuel6:17 Bino n'ebiwumbe ebyakolebwa nga bifaanana ng'oti bizimba, Abafilisiti bye baagheereza Musengwa Katonda bibe ekigheebwayo ng'omutango: ekirala olw'ekibuga Ashidodi, ekindi olw'ekibuga Gaza, n'ekindi olw'ekibuga Ashikeloni, n'ekindi olw'ekibuga Gathi, era n'ekindi olw'ekibuga Ekuroni." 
1Samuel6:18 Era baagheereza n'ebiwumbe ebya zaabu ebyakolebwa nga bifaanana ng'oti mpube, nga byagayaga n'obungi bw'ebibuga byonabyona ebyafugibwanga abafuzi b'Abafilisiti abataanu ebyali nga byezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu, era n'ebyalo ebiziraku bimante. Eibaale eikologho kwe baata Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda mu musiri gwa Yoshua ow'e Bethi Shemeshi, likaaligho ni ye buli eno, okukakasa ebyo ebyaligho." 
1Samuel6:19 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaita abantu ab'e Bethi Shemeshi nsanvu, olw'okuba baalinga mu Sanduuku ey'endagaano ye. Abantu baalira inho olwa Musengwa Katonda okwita abantu abangi batyo." 
1Samuel6:20 Agho abantu ab'e Bethi Shemeshi baakoba bati: “Naani aghanga okuba mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ono omutukuvu? Era anaaja w'ani atuveeku?” 
1Samuel6:21 Kale baatuma abakwenda y'abantu ab'e Kiriathi Yearimu, okubakoba bati: “Abafilisiti baiziiza Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda. Mwidhe muginone.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Agho abantu ab'e Kiriathi Yearimu baanona Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda, baagitwala mu ndhu ya Abinadabu ku lusozi. Era baayawula mutabane we Eleazari okugirabiriranga." 
1Samuel7:2 Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda yamala ekiseera kinene ng'eri mu Kiriathi Yearimu emyaka ng'oti makumi abiri. Abaisiraeli baamala ekiseera ekyo nga balirira Musengwa Katonda abayambe. 
1Samuel7:3 Agho Samueli yaakoba Abaisiraeli boonaboona ati: “Oba nga mwenda okukyuka okwira ku Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona, mutoolegho emisambwa egy'amaghanga agandi gyonagyona era mutoolegho n'ebifaananie eby'omusambwa omukazi Ashitarothi. Mwegheereyo irala eri Musengwa Katonda, yenka ye mube mugheereze. Aidha kubawonia Abafilisiti.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Kale Abaisiraeli baatoolagho ebifaananie by'emisambwa Baali ni Ashitarothi, baagheereza Musengwa Katonda yenka." 
1Samuel7:5 Agho Samueli yaakoba ati: “Musoloze Abaisiraeli boonaboona, baje e Mizipa. Nze ndidha kubasabira ye Musengwa Katonda.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Kale beesololeza e Mizipa, baasena amaadhi baagafuka agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, ng'ekigheebwayo. Baasiiba ku lunaku olwo, era baakoba bati: “Twakola ekibi ye Musengwa Katonda.” Eyo e Mizipa, Samueli ye yalamuliranga Abaisiraeli." 
1Samuel7:7 Abafilisiti bwe baawulira bati Abaisiraeli beesoloiza e Mizipa, abafuzi ab'Abafilisiti abo baaja baalumba Abaisiraeli. Era Abaisiraeli bwe baakiwulira, baatya inho Abafilisiti abo." 
1Samuel7:8 Abaisiraeli baakoba Samueli bati: “Otalekera kweghemba Musengwa Katonda waife, atuwonie Abafilisiti.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Kale Samueli yaatoola entaama ekaayonka yaagiita, yaagighaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa kyonakyona ni kiwaagho. Samueli oyo yaalirira Musengwa Katonda ku lwa Isiraeli, era Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu." 
1Samuel7:10 Samueli bweyali ali kughaayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, Abafilisiti baaseeta nga benda okulumba Abaisiraeli. Aye ku lunaku olwo, Musengwa Katonda yaakaabukira Abafilisiti n'amamiro ag'amaani ng'oti kutyabuka kwa lukuba. Abafilisiti baatabulwatabulwa olw'okutya, era baalumuka Abaisiraeli." 
1Samuel7:11 Abaisiraeli baava e Mizipa, baabingirira Abafilisiti nga baja bwe babaita, okubatuukiza irala e Bethikari." 
1Samuel7:12 Agho Samueli yatoola eibaale yaalisimba ghagati wa Mizipa ni Sheni, yaalituuma eriina Ebenezeri ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda atuyambye okutuusa mperaano.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Kale Abafilisiti baaghangulwa batyo, baaweeramu irala amaani. Era Musengwa Katonda yaabalemesa okulumba ensi y'Abaisiraeli ekiseera kyonakyona Samueli kye yamala nga mulamu." 
1Samuel7:14 N'ebibuga byonabyona Abafilisiti bye baali banhaze ku Baisiraeli, ebiri ghagati gha Ekuroni ni Gathi, byairira Abaisiraeli. Kale Isiraeli yeiriza ebiketezo byayo byonabyona, era ghaabaagho emiraala ghagati gh'Abaisiraeli n'Abamori." 
1Samuel7:15 Samueli yaakulembera Isiraeli ekiseera kyonakyona kye yamala nga mulamu. 
1Samuel7:16 Buli mwaka yaajanga mu ngobo e Betheli, e Giligali, n'e Mizipa, yaalamuliranga Abaisiraeli mu bifo ebyo." 
1Samuel7:17 Bwe yamalanga, yairayo e Rama, n'eyabanga amaka ge. Era eyo yoona yaalamulirangayo Abaisiraeli, era yaazimbirayo Musengwa Katonda alutaari." 
1Samuel8:1 Samueli bwe yakairigha, yaafuula batabane be abakulembeze ba Isiraeli." 
1Samuel8:2 Eriina lya mutabane omuberi nga ni Yoeli ate owokubiri nga ni Abiya, era nga balamuzi mu Beerisheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Aye batabane ba Samueli abo tibeebisanga mu nsambo iseibwe ye yeebisangamu. Baajiiranga inho ku by'okufuna, n'okulya enguzi, era n'okusaliriza emisango." 
1Samuel8:4 Agho abakulu b'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli beesoloza baaja ye Samueli e Rama. 
1Samuel8:5 Baamukoba bati: “Bona eno, buti okairiighe, ate batabane bo tibeebisa mu nsambo iwe ye weebisaamu. Mperaano ni, tulondere kyabazinga atukulemberenga, tube ng'oti n'amaghanga agandi goonagoona bwe gali.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Aye eky'okukoba bati: “Tughe kyabazinga atukulemberenga,” kyanakughaza Samueli. Kale Samueli oyo yaasaba Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel8:7 Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Wulirisa ebintu byonabyona abantu bye bali kukukoba, kuba ti niiwe ye balobye, aye ninze ye balobye okuba kyabazinga waibwe." 
1Samuel8:8 Nga bwe babairenga beebisa eri nze, okuviira irala lwe nabatoola mu Misiri okutuusa n'olwaleero, nga banvaaku baagheereza emisambwa, n'iwe weena bwe bali kukwebikizaaku." 
1Samuel8:9 Kale ni wulirisa kye bali kukukoba. Aye balabule bukalamu ku nsambo kyabazinga y'aja okubabisangamu.” 
1Samuel8:10 Kale Samueli yaakobera abo abaamusaba okubafunira kyabazinga, ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yamukoba." 
1Samuel8:11 Yaabakoba ati: “Eno n'ensambo kyabazinga waimwe y'aja okubabisangamu: aidha kutwalanga batabane baimwe mu magye, abandi bakolenga ku bigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, abandi bavugenga embalaasi dhe, n'abandi balumukirenga ku bigere nga bakulembeiremu ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo." 
1Samuel8:12 Abandi aidha kubatangagho okuba abaduumizi b'ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi, n'abandi okuduumira ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale amakumi ataanu ataanu. Abandi aidha kubalimyanga mu masamba ge, bamukungulirenga ebirime bye, ate abandi bamugheekezenga eby'okulwanisa n'ebikozesebwa ku bigaali bye eby'omu lutalo." 
1Samuel8:13 Aidha kutwalanga baghala baimwe bamukolerenga eby'obuwoowo, era bamufumbirenga emere n'emigaati." 
1Samuel8:14 Aidha kutoolanga amasamba gaimwe agasinga bulungi ag'emizabbibu n'ag'emiti emyoliva, agaghe abagheereza be." 
1Samuel8:15 Aidha kutoolanga ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu ikumi eby'emere yaimwe ey'empeke, era atoolenga n'ekitundu kirala ku buli bitundu ikumi eby'ebibala byaimwe eby'emizabbibu, abighe abakungu be n'abagheereza be." 
1Samuel8:16 Aidha kutwalanga abagheereza baimwe abasaadha n'abakazi abakozesenga emirimo gye, era n'ente n'endogoyi dhaimwe edhisinga bulungi." 
1Samuel8:17 Aidha kutwalanga ensolo ndala ku buli nsolo dhaimwe eikumi dhe munaayayanga, era mwidha kubanga bairu be." 
1Samuel8:18 Mu kiseera ekyo mulirira olwa kyabazinga waimwe, beene ye mwerondera, aye Musengwa Katonda talibairamu.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Aye abantu baaloba kuwulirisa Samueli bye yabakoba, era baakoba bati: “Busa! Ife twidha kuba ni kyabazinga anaatufuganga," 
1Samuel8:20 olwo twena tube ng'oti n'amaghanga agandi goonagoona. Kyabazinga oyo aidha kutufuganga era atukulemberenga atulwaniregho entalo dhaife.” 
1Samuel8:21 Samueli bwe yamala okuwulira byonabyona abantu bye baakoba, yaaja yaabikobera Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel8:22 Era Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Kola kye bali kwenda, obateeregho kyabazinga.” Agho Samueli yaakoba abantu ati: “Kale, buli muntu aireyo ewaibwe.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Ghaaligho omusaadha omukombe era nga mumanhifu, ow'omu kiketezo kya Benjamini, eriina lye nga ni Kishi. Kishi oyo yali mutabane wa Abieli, Abieli yaaba mutabane wa Zerori, Zerori yaaba mutabane wa Bekorathi, Bekorathi yaaba mutabane wa Afia eyali Omubenjamini." 
1Samuel9:2 Kishi yali ni mutabane we eyayetebwanga Saulo, nga mulungi inho mu mboneka ye era nga mwisuka. Mu mboneka, nga ghazira amusinga bulungi mu Baisiraeli boonaboona. Okuva ku mabega ge okuja ghaigulu, yali asinga abantu boonaboona obuleeyi." 
1Samuel9:3 Agho edhindi ku ndogoyi dha Kishi lata wa Saulo, dhaali dhibuze. Kishi yaakoba mutabane we Saulo ati: “Twalaku owundi ku bagheereza, muje mwagale endogoyi edho.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Baabita mu kiketezo ky'ensozi ekya Efuraimu ni mu kiketezo eky'e Shalisha, aye baaloba kudhibona. Baabita mu kiketezo eky'e Shalimu, aye nga dhizirayo. Era baabita mu kiketezo ekya Benjamini, aye baaloba kudhaagaana yo." 
1Samuel9:5 Bwe baatuuka mu kiketezo ky'e Zufu, yaakoba omugheereza we eyali naye ati: “Kola twireyo eka, kuba tughanga okuleetera lata wange okuva ku kulowooza ku ndogoyi, yaira ku kweraliikirira ife.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Aye omugheereza yaamwiramu ati: “Bona eno, mu kibuga kino mulimu omuntu wa Katonda abantu ye baisaamu ekitiisa, era kiisi ky'ayogera kituukirira. Ka tuje y'ali, oba katyo anaatukobera eby'olugendo lwaife lwe tuli kutambula.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Saulo yaabuuza omugheereza we ati: “Bwe tunaaja y'ali tunaamutwalira kirabo ki? Ensawo dhaife dhiwoiremu emere, ate tuzira kintu kyonakyona kya kumugha. Kiki kye tuli nakyo ghano?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Omugheereza yairamu ati: “Ndi ghano n'akapiiya aka feeza. Ndidha kukagha omuntu wa Katonda oyo, atukobere ye tughanga okwagaana endogoyi edho.”" 
1Samuel9:9 (Eira mu Isiraeli, omuntu bwe yajanga okwebuuza ye Katonda, ng'akoba ati: “Kola tuje y'omuboni.” Mu biseera ebyo omulanzi baamwetanga muboni.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Saulo yairamu omugheereza ati: “Okobye bukalamu, kale tuje.” Agho baaja mu kibuga aghaabanga omuntu wa Katonda oyo." 
1Samuel9:11 Bwe baali bali kuniinaniina akasozi batuuke mu kibuga, baayagaanana n'abaghala abaali bali kuva mu kibuga nga bali kuja kusena maadhi. Baababuuza bati: “Omuboni aliyo?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Abaghala baabairamu bati: “Aliyo, era wuuyo abakulembeiremu. Mwangugheku mumwagaane, yaakatuuka mu kibuga, kuba olwaleero abantu baja kughaayo omusengo mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu." 
1Samuel9:13 Bwe munaaba nga mwakaingira ekibuga, mwidha kumwagaana ng'akaali kuja kulya mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu. Abantu tibaidha kulya ng'akaali kutuuka, kuba n'ali n'okusabira omusengo enkabi, memale olwo abantu abeeteibwa baghange okulya. Kale ni muniineniine, mwidha kumubona mangu.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Agho Saulo n'omugheereza we baaja mu kibuga. Bwe baali nga baakakingiramu, baabona Samueli ng'ali kufuluma ng'aidhira ye bali, olwo ng'ali kuja mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu." 
1Samuel9:15 Ng'ekaabulayo olunaku lulala memale Saulo aidhe, Musengwa Katonda yali ayoleike Samueli ekyama ng'akoba ati:" 
1Samuel9:16 “Enkyo mu kiseera ng'oti ni kino, ndidha kugheereza y'oli omusaadha okuva mu kiketezo kya Benjamini. Oidha kumusiiga omuzigo, abe omukulembeze ow'abantu bange Abaisiraeli. Oyo n'alitoola abantu bange abo mu mikono gy'Abafilisiti, kuba mboine okudaazibwadaazibwa kwaibwe n'okulira kwaibwe kwatuuka ye ndi.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Samueli bwe yabona Saulo, Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Oyo n'omusaadha ye nakukobeireku. Oyo n'aidha okufuga abantu bange.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Agho Saulo yaaseeta ye Samueli mu mulyango, yaamukoba ati: “Nkweghembye nkobera: endhu ey'omuboni eba gha?”" 
1Samuel9:19 Samueli yaakoba Saulo ati: “Ninze omuboni. Buti nkulemberaamu tuje mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu, kuba oidha kulya ninze olwaleero. Enkyo ku nkyo ndidha kukukobera byonabyona ebikuli ku mwoyo, memale mbasiibule muje." 
1Samuel9:20 N'endogoyi dhire edhimaze enaku eisatu nga dhibuze, otadheeraliikirira, kuba dhimaze okuboneka. Aye Abaisiraeli boonaboona naani ye bayayaanira einho? Ti niiwe, n'ab'omu ndhu ya lata wo yoonayoona?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Saulo yairamu ati: “Nze ndi wa mu kika kya Benjamini, ekika ekisemberayo irala mu Isiraeli. Era endhu yaife n'esemberayo irala okumanhika mu kika kya Benjamini. Kale kiki ky'oviireku okunkoba otyo?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Agho Samueli yaatwala Saulo n'omugheereza we, yaabaingiza mu kisenge ekinene, yaabatyamya mu kifo eky'emberi aghalala n'abageni abeete, abaali baghera ng'oti makumi asatu." 
1Samuel9:23 Samueli yaakoba omufumbi ati: “Leeta emamba ye nakughaire, era ye nakukobye nti gitereke.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Agho omufumbi yaaleeta ekisambi n'ebyakiriku, yaakita mu maiso ga Saulo. Samueli yaakoba Saulo ati: “Eno n'emamba ye nakugisiire. Girye, kuba nagitoireku naagikugisira, oghange okugirya mu kaseera kano ghalala n'abageni be nayese.”" 
1Samuel9:25 Mu nsambo eyo Saulo yaaliira ghalala ni Samueli ku lunaku olwo. Bwe baava agho mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu, baaja mu kibuga. Baayalira Saulo obuliri ku ngulu kw'endhu, yaalambaala okwo." 
1Samuel9:26 Agho obwire nga buli kukya, Samueli yaayeta Saulo ghaigulu ku ndhu, ng'amukoba ati: “Situkagho nkusiibule oje.” Agho Saulo yaasitukagho, baafuluma bombi ni Samueli." 
1Samuel9:27 Bwe baatuuka ekibuga ghe kikanga, Samueli yaakoba Saulo ati: “Koba omugheereza wo abitegho, ajenga emberi. Iwe oyemerereku ghano katono, nkumanhise Katonda ky'akobye.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Agho Samueli yaatoola akadoome k'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, yaafuka omuzigo ku mutwe gwa Saulo, era yaamugwa mu kifuba ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akufuseeku omuzigo ogwo obe omukulembeze ow'abantu be Abaisiraeli. Oidha kufuganga abantu ba Musengwa Katonda, era oidha kubawonianga abazigu baibwe ababeezungulwire. Era kano n'akamanhiso akakakasa nga Musengwa Katonda akusiize omuzigo obe omukulembeze w'abantu be." 
1Samuel10:2 Olwaleero bw'onaava ghano ghe ndi, oidha kwagaana abantu babiri, nga bali kumpi n'amagombe ga Rakeli e Zeluza mu kiketezo kya Benjamini. Baidha kukukobera bati endogoyi dhe wajiire okwagala dhiboneike, era bati mpegaano lata wo aviire ku kulowooza ku ndogoyi, yaira ku kweraliikirira bwa iwe, ng'akoba ati, ‘Nnaakola ntya olw'omwana wange?’" 
1Samuel10:3 Agho oidha kuvaagho, weeyongereyo otuuke ku muti omukologho oguli e Tabori, y'onaayagaana abantu basatu nga bali kuja e Betheli okusinza Katonda. Omulala ku abo aidha kuba ng'ali kutwala embuzi entototo isatu, owundi ng'ali kutwala emigaati esatu, n'owundi ng'ali kutwala ensawo ey'omwenge gw'emizabbibu ey'oluwu." 
1Samuel10:4 Abantu abo baidha kukulamusa, bakughe emigaati ebiri, era oganhe ogitwale." 
1Samuel10:5 Olwo oidha kuja ku lusozi lwa Katonda Abafilisiti ghe baata enkambi dhaibwe edh'abalwani. Bw'onaaba oli kutuuka ku kibuga, oidha kwagaana ekikunsu ky'abalanzi nga bali kwikirira okuva mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu, nga bali kulanga era nga bakulembeirwamu ab'entongooli, ab'obugoma, ab'endere, n'ab'endingidi." 
1Samuel10:6 Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwidha kukwidhaku n'amaani mangi, ofuuke muntu wundi era olange ghalala nabo." 
1Samuel10:7 Obumanhiso obwo bwe bunaakutuukaku, iwe kola bukole kyonakyona ky'osobola okukola, kuba Musengwa Katonda ali ghalala n'iwe." 
1Samuel10:8 Oidha kuja e Giligali oneesookengayo. Eyo ye ndidha okukwagaana, mpeeyo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'emisengo egigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Oidha kunteegera eyo okumala enaku musanvu, memale ndidhe nkulage eky'okukola.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Saulo bwe yakyuka n'akuba Samueli omugongo okuva gh'ali, Katonda yaakyusa Saulo oyo omwoyo. Era obumanhiso obwo bwonabwona bwatuukirira ku lunaku olwo." 
1Samuel10:10 Agho Saulo n'omugheereza we bwe baatuuka ku lusozi lwa Katonda, ekikunsu ky'abalanzi kyayagaanana nabo. Omwoyo gwa Katonda gwamwidhaku n'amaani mangi, era yaalanga ghalala nabo." 
1Samuel10:11 Abantu boonaboona abaali bamwidhi okuva eira bwe baamubona ng'ali kulanga ghalala n'abalanzi, beebuuzagania beene na beene bati: “Kiki ekituuse ku Saulo mutabane wa Kishi? Obwo yeena abalirwa mu balanzi?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Agho omuntu ow'omu kiketezo ekyo yairamu ati: “Ate bano abalanzi abandi, iseibwe naani?” Okwo n'okwava endhogera ekoba eti: “Obwo Saulo yeena abalirwa mu balanzi?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Saulo bwe yamala okulanga, yaaja mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu." 
1Samuel10:14 Muganda wa lata wa Saulo, yaabuuza Saulo n'omugheereza we ati: “Mwabaire mujiire gha?” Saulo yaamwiramu ati: “Twabaire tujiire kwagala ndogoyi. Aye bwe twaboine nga tidhiboneike, twaja eri Samueli.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Muganda wa lata wa Saulo, yaakoba Saulo ati: “Nkweghembye nkobera Samueli bye yakukobye.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Saulo yaakoba muganda wa lata we ati: “Yatukakaisa ati bwenebwene endogoyi dhaaboneike.” Aye tiyamukoberaku naire ku bigema ku bwakyabazinga, Samueli bye yayogera." 
1Samuel10:17 Samueli yaayeta abantu, beesololeza e Mizipa okusinza Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel10:18 Yaakoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Nabatoola e Misiri naabawonia Abamisiri okubatuntuza, era naabawonia n'amaghanga agandi goonagoona agaabanhigirizanga." 
1Samuel10:19 Aye olwaleero muviire ku Katonda waimwe abawonia ebibamba n'ebizibu ebibagwira. Era munkobye mbateeregho kyabazinga abafuge. Kale ni, buti mwesoloze nga muli munda dhaimwe ni mu bika byaimwe.’ ”" 
1Samuel10:20 Agho Samueli yaayeta buli kika kiri mu Isiraeli akalulu kaagwa ku kika kya Benjamini, kyalondebwamu." 
1Samuel10:21 Yaayeta buli nda eri mu kika kya Benjamini akalulu kaagwa ku nda ya Maturi, yaalondebwamu. Era yaayeta buli musaadha ali mu nda ya Maturi akalulu kaagwa ku Saulo mutabane wa Kishi, yaalondebwamu. Aye bwe baamunoonia, yaababula." 
1Samuel10:22 Beeyongera okwebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda bati: “Omusaadha oyo ali ghano, oba ekaaliyo owundi?” Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Wuule yeegisiisa mu bintu.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Agho baalumuka, baaja baamutoolayo. Saulo bwe yayemerera mu bantu, yali abasinga boonaboona obuleeyi, okuva ku mabega ge okwira ghaigulu." 
1Samuel10:24 Agho Samueli yaakoba abantu boonaboona ati: “Muboine oyo Musengwa Katonda y'alonze? Ezira ayaga naye mu bantu boonaboona.” Abantu boonaboona baakuba emizira bati: “Kyabazinga ghangaala!” 
1Samuel10:25 Samueli yainhonhola abantu ebyo kyabazinga by'ali n'okukolera abantu, n'ebyo abantu beene bye bali n'okukolera kyabazinga oyo. Ebintu ebyo yaabighandiika mu kitabo, yaabita mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Agho Samueli yaasiibula abantu boonaboona, buli muntu yairayo ewaibwe." 
1Samuel10:26 Ni Saulo yeena yaaja ewuwe e Gibea. Yaaja n'abasaadha abaziramu ntete naire, Katonda be yagumya emyoyo." 
1Samuel10:27 Aye ghaabaagho abantu abazira kye bagasa, abaakoba bati: “Omusaadha oyo alituwonia atya?” Kale baamunhooma, baaloba kumutwalira birabo. Aye mwene yaabaleka buleke." 
1Samuel11:1 Agho kyabazinga Omuammoni eyayetebwanga Nahashi, yaaja yaalumba ekibuga Yabeshi Gileadi, yaakizingiza okukyezunguluza. Abantu ab'e Yabeshi baakoba Nahashi oyo bati: “Kola n'ife endagaano, olwo twidha kukugheerezanga.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Aye Nahashi yaabakoba ati: “Ndidha kukola n'imwe endagaano, bwe munaaganha ni ntundulamu eriiso lya buli muntu ery'oku mukono omusaadha, olwo ndeetere Isiraeli yoonayoona okunhoomebwa.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Abakulembeze b'e Yabeshi baamweghemba bati: “Tughe ekiseera kya nnaku musanvu, tughange okutuma abakwenda mu Isiraeli mwonamwona. Bwe ghataabeegho atununula, olwo twidha kweghaayo y'oli.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Abakwenda bwe baatuuka e Gibea ekya Saulo, baakobera abantu ebibono ebyo. Agho abantu boonaboona baalira inho amaziga." 
1Samuel11:5 Saulo yali ali kuva mu nimiro, ng'akulembeizaamu ente. Agho yaabuuza ati: “Abantu babaire ki, okutuuka okulira amaziga?” Baamukobera ebyo abantu abaava e Yabeshi bye baayogera." 
1Samuel11:6 Saulo bwe yawulira ebibono ebyo, omwoyo gwa Katonda gwamwidhaku n'amaani, obusungu bwe bwatumbuka ng'oti muliro." 
1Samuel11:7 Yaatoola ente ibiri, yaadhitematemamu ebitundu, yaabigha abakwenda babitwale woonawoona mu Isiraeli nga bakoba abantu bati: “Kiisi ataaveeyo kunonereza Saulo ni Samueli, ente dhe baidha kudhitematema batyo.” Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera abantu okutya, baavaayo boonaboona nga bali kwisa kirala." 
1Samuel11:8 Saulo yaababalira e Bezeki. Abaava mu Isiraeli baali emitwalo amakumi asatu (300,000), ate abaava mu Buyudaaya emitwalo esatu (30,000)." 
1Samuel11:9 Agho baakoba abakwenda bale abaidha, bati: “Muje mukobe abantu b'e Yabeshi Gileadi muti, ‘Enkyo endhuba enaaja okutuuka mu kasana ghagati, nga mumaze okununulwa.’ ” Abakwenda bwe baaja ni bakobera abantu b'e Yebeshi batyo, abantu ab'e Yebeshi abo baasangaala!" 
1Samuel11:10 Kale abantu b'e Yebeshi abo baakoba Abammoni bati: “Enkyo twidha kweghaayo ye muli mutukole kyonakyona kye mwenda.” 
1Samuel11:11 Agho ku lunaku olwairirira, Saulo yaagabaniamu abantu be mu bikunsu bisatu. Baalumba Abammoni mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, baabaita okutuusa mu kasana ghagati. Abaawonagho baalumuka, nga buli muntu ali ku lulwe aghazira kusigala na mwine." 
1Samuel11:12 Abantu baakoba Samueli bati: “Ni baani abaakoba bati Saulo taidha kutufuga? Baleete tubaite.” 
1Samuel11:13 Aye Saulo yaakoba ati: “Ghazira muntu waire omulala anaitibwa olwaleero, kuba luno n'olunaku Musengwa Katonda lw'anunuliireku Isiraeli.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Agho Samueli yaakoba abantu ati: “Mwidhe tuje e Giligali twizeegho obwakyabazinga.” 
1Samuel11:15 Kale boonaboona baaja e Giligali, era nga bali eyo mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, baalangirira Saulo nga ni kyabazinga. Baagheerayo eyo emisengo egy'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, era Saulo n'abantu boonaboona baasagamba inho nga bali eyo." 
1Samuel12:1 Agho Samueli yaakoba Abaisiraeli boonaboona ati: “Mubone eno, nkoze byonabyona bye mwansaba, naabateeragho kyabazinga ow'okubafuga." 
1Samuel12:2 Mperaano wuuyo aidha kubakulemberanga. Nze ndi mukaire ow'envu, era mubona batabane bange abali n'imwe. Nze mbakulembeire okuva nga ndi mwisuka okutuusa ni ye buli eno." 
1Samuel12:3 Ndi ghano, mpegaano muunumirize mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ni mu maiso ga kyabazinga ye yasiiga omuzigo. Naani ye nanhagaku ente ye? Oba naani ye nanhagaku endogoyi ye? Naani ye nakupankupaniaku oba waire okumutetenkereza mu kintu kyonakyona? Oba naani ye nalyakuuku enguzi? Bwe mba nga ghaligho ku ebyo kye nakola, muunumirize, ndidha kukibairizaagho.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Baamukoba bati: “Busa. Totukupankupaniangaku waire okututetenkereza, oba okutwala ekintu eky'omuntu yeenayeena.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Samueli yaabakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda ghalala ni kyabazinga ye yasiiga omuzigo, n'abadhulizi ababalumiriza imwe, okukakasa nga nziraku kye nvunaanibwa.” Bairamu bati: “Yii, Musengwa Katonda n'omudhulizi.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Samueli era yaakoba abantu ati: “Musengwa Katonda n'eyataagho Musa ni Aaroni, era n'eyatoola badhaadha baimwe mu nsi Misiri." 
1Samuel12:7 Kale ni, buti mwemerere bukalamu mbalumirize mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda olw'ebirungi byonabyona bye yabakolera imwe ni badhaadha baimwe." 
1Samuel12:8 Yakobo bwe yaja e Misiri n'ab'endhu ye, memale Abamisiri ni babatuntuza, badhaadha baimwe abo baalirira Musengwa Katonda. Era Musengwa Katonda yaatuma Musa ni Aaroni, baatoola badhaadha baimwe abo e Misiri, baabaleeta okuba mu nsi eno." 
1Samuel12:9 Aye badhaadha baimwe beerabira Musengwa Katonda waibwe. Era Musengwa Katonda oyo yaabaghaayo mu mikono gya Sisera omuduumizi w'eigye lya kyabazinga Yabini ow'e Hazori, ni mu mikono gy'Abafilisiti, era ni mu mikono gya kyabazinga w'e Moabu abo boonaboona baalwanisa badhaadha baimwe abo." 
1Samuel12:10 Agho badhaadha baimwe baalirira Musengwa Katonda, nga bakoba bati: ‘Twakola ebibi, kuba twava ku Musengwa Katonda twagheereza emisambwa Baali ni Ashitarothi. Aye mperaano tukweghemba otuwonie abazigu baife, twidha kukugheerezanga.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaatuma Yerubbaali, ni Baraki, ni Yefutha, ni Samueli, olwo yaajanga ng'awonia imwe abazigu baimwe ababeezungulwire, era mwaba mu miraala." 
1Samuel12:12 Aye bwe mwabona nga kyabazinga Nahashi ow'Abammoni ali kwidha okubalumba, mwaloba Musengwa Katonda waimwe okuba kyabazinga waimwe. Mwankoba muti, ‘Twenda kyabazinga n'abe atufugenga.’" 
1Samuel12:13 “Mperaano ni, mubone, kyabazinga ye mulonze wuuyo. Mwasaba kyabazinga, era wuuyo Musengwa Katonda amubaghaire okubafuga." 
1Samuel12:14 Ebintu byonabyona biidha kubajiiranga bukalamu, bwe munaisanga mu Musengwa Katonda ekitiisa, ni mumugheereza nga mumuwulira era nga mugema ebiragiro bye, era ni mujiiranga ku Musengwa Katonda waimwe oyo nga muli ghalala ni kyabazinga waimwe abafuga." 
1Samuel12:15 Aye bwe mutaawulirenga Musengwa Katonda, era ni mutagema biragiro bye, olwo aidha kubalwanisanga imwe era ni kyabazinga waimwe." 
1Samuel12:16 Kale ni, buti mwemerere bukalamu, mubone Musengwa Katonda ky'aja okukola." 
1Samuel12:17 Ekiseera kino kya makungula ga ngaano. Aye nja kweghemba Musengwa Katonda aleetegho okutyabuka kw'olukuba era agwise n'amaadhi, memale mumanhe ng'ekibi kyaimwe kye mwakola ye Musengwa Katonda kinene, eky'okumusaba kyabazinga.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Kale Samueli yeeghemba Musengwa Katonda. Musengwa Katonda yaaleetagho okutyabuka kw'olukuba era yaagwisa amaadhi ku lunaku olwo. Abantu boonaboona baatya inho Musengwa Katonda ni Samueli. 
1Samuel12:19 Baakoba Samueli bati: “Tusabire eri Musengwa Katonda wo, ife abagheereza bo tulobe kufa, kuba ku bibi byaife byonabyona bye tuli nabyo, kabiri twongeireku ni kino eky'okwesabira kyabazinga.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samueli yaakoba abantu ati: “Mutatya. Waire mukoze ekibi ekyaga agho mutavanga ku Musengwa Katonda, aye mumugheerezenga n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona." 
1Samuel12:21 Era mutadaaliimanga ni mujiira ku bintu ebiziramu muganhulo, ebitaghanga kugasa waire okuwonia omuntu, kuba biziramu muganhulo." 
1Samuel12:22 Musengwa Katonda, olw'eriina lye eikologho, taja kubalekulira agho imwe, kuba yasiima mwene okubafuula eighanga lye." 
1Samuel12:23 Era ku lwange, neeghemba Musengwa Katonda ansaasire ndobe kukola kibi ni mmusungughaza, nga ndekayo okubasabira imwe. Era ndidha kubeegeresanga ekirungi era ekituufu kye mugwaine okukola." 
1Samuel12:24 Kale ni mwisenga mu Musengwa Katonda ekitiisa, mumugheerezenga nga muli beesigwa n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona, nga mwidhukira ebintu ebikologho by'abakoleire." 
1Samuel12:25 Aye bwe muneeyongera okukola ebibi, mwidha kuzikirira era ni kyabazinga waimwe.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Saulo yali ng'agheza emyaka…egy'obukulu ghe yatoolerera okufuga, era yaafugira Isiraeli emyaka …n'ebiri." 
1Samuel13:2 Saulo yalonda mu Baisiraeli abasaadha enkumi isatu (3,000). Ku abo yaatoolaku enkumi ibiri (2,000) baabanga ghalala naye e Mikamashi ni mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi eky'e Betheli. Ate olukumi (1,000) baabanga ghalala ni Yonathani e Gibea mu kiketezo kya Benjamini. Abantu abandi boonaboona yaabasiibula, bairayo ewaibwe." 
1Samuel13:3 Yonathani yaaghangula enkambi y'abalwani Abafilisiti e Geba, era Abafilisiti baakiwulira. Agho Saulo yaafuuwa eigwala okubuna eighanga lyonalyona, ng'akoba ati: “Abaheburayi boonaboona ka bawulire!”" 
1Samuel13:4 Abaisiraeli boonaboona baawulira bati Saulo aghangwire enkambi y'abalwani Abafilisiti. Era baawulira bati Abafilisiti beesiniirwa Abaisiraeli. Kale abantu baayetebwa okuja okweyimba ku Saulo e Giligali. 
1Samuel13:5 Agho Abafilisiti beesoloza okulwanisa Abaisiraeli. Baali n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo emitwalo esatu (30,000), n'abalwani kakaaga (6,000) ab'oku mbalaasi, era n'abalwani abaali abangi ng'oti musenho oguba ku mbali kw'enhandha. Abalwani Abafilisiti abo, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Mikamashi, ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba wa Bethaveni." 
1Samuel13:6 Abaisiraeli bwe baabona nga bali mu kabi, era ng'eigye lyaibwe balinhigiriiza, beegisa mu mpuku, mu biina, mu mabaale, mu magombe, ni mu nsulo edh'amaadhi." 
1Samuel13:7 Abandi ku Baisiraeli baabitira mu kifo omwiga Yorudani ghe gusomokerwa, baingira mu kiketezo kya Gadi n'ekya Gileadi. Saulo yali akaali e Giligali. Abantu boonaboona baamunonereza nga bali kudhugumira." 
1Samuel13:8 Yaamala enaku musanvu ng'ali kuteega Samueli, nga Samueli oyo bweyamulagira. Aye Samueli yaaba ng'akaali kwidha Giligali. Abantu baatoolera okusansaana nga bava ku Saulo." 
1Samuel13:9 Agho Saulo yaakoba ati: “Mundeetere ghano ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana.” Yaaghaayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. 
1Samuel13:10 Yali yaakamala ati okughaayo ekyokebwa ekyo, Samueli yaatuuka. Agho Saulo yaaja okumusangaaza n'okumulamusa." 
1Samuel13:11 Samueli yaakoba ati: “Okoze ki kino?” Saulo yairamu ati: “Naboine ng'abantu bali kusansaana nga banvaaku, ate nga iwe toidhiire mu nnaku dhe wakoba, n'Abafilisiti nga beesoloiza e Mikamashi." 
1Samuel13:12 Kale naakoba nti Abafilisiti baidha kwidha baanumbe ghano e Giligali, ate nga nkaali kweghemba Musengwa Katonda kungemerwa kivunika. Kye naviire ni neeghaliriza okughaayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Samueli yaakoba Saulo ati: “Ekyo okoze kya busiru. Togemye kiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda wo kye yakugha. Ngoli okigemye, Musengwa Katonda yandibaire mpegaano nga yamala ira okuleetera obwakyabazinga bwo okukakata, bwabanga bwa nsikirano mu Isiraeli enaku dhoonadhoona." 
1Samuel13:14 Aye mpegaano obwakyabazinga bwo tibuubenga bwa nsikirano. Musengwa Katonda anooniizaayo omuntu mwene y'asiimye, yaamutaagho okukulemberanga abantu be, kuba iwe togemye kye yakulagira.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Agho Samueli yaasitula yaava e Giligali, yaaja e Gibea ekya Benjamini. Saulo yaabala abantu abaali agho naye, nga baghera ng'oti lukaaga." 
1Samuel13:16 Saulo, ni mutabane we Yonathani, n'abantu abaali aghalala nabo, baasigala e Geba ekya Benjamini. Aye Abafilisiti baasimba weema dhaibwe e Mikamashi." 
1Samuel13:17 Agho Abafilisiti nga bali mu bikunsu bisatu, baaja okunhaga nga bava mu kifo ekyo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe: Ekikunsu kirala kyagema engira eja mu Ofura mu kiketezo ky'e Suali." 
1Samuel13:18 Ekikunsu ekindi kyagema engira eja e Bethi Horoni. Ate ekikunsu ekindi kyagema engira eja ku nsalosalo eringiriire ekiiko ky'e Zeboimu, okwolekera eirungu." 
1Samuel13:19 Mu Isiraeli mwonamwona timwalimu mugheesi waire omulala ati, kuba Abafilisiti baali nga balekeiza Abaisiraeli okugheesa empiima n'amafumo." 
1Samuel13:20 Abaisiraeli baalinga n'okuja eri Abafilisiti okughagala embago dhaibwe, n'emiwolo gyaibwe, n'empasa dhaibwe, n'ebifumo byaibwe." 
1Samuel13:21 Abafilisiti abo baabawoozangaku empiiya ibiri okughagala embago n'emiwolo, ate baabatoolangaku empiiya ndala okughagala empasa n'okusongola enti dhe baakozesanga okusindiikiriza ente okutambula." 
1Samuel13:22 Kale, ku lunaku olw'olutalo tighaali muntu waire omulala ati, ku abo abaali ni Saulo ni Yonathani, eyali n'empiima oba eifumo, okutoolaku Saulo ni mutabane we Yonathani bonka." 
1Samuel13:23 Abafilisiti abalwani baava mu nkambi, baaja okukuuma aghaingirirwa e Mikamashi." 
1Samuel14:1 Lwali lulala, Yonathani mutabane wa Saulo yaakoba omwisuka eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa ati: “Idha tuje mu nkambi y'abalwani Abafilisiti.” Aye tiyakoberaku lata we Saulo." 
1Samuel14:2 Saulo oyo yali ali kumpi ni Gibea, ghansi gh'omuti omukomamawanga ogwali e Migironi, era ng'ali n'abantu ng'oti lukaaga." 
1Samuel14:3 Era Saulo oyo yali ng'ali ghalala ni Ahiya mutabane wa Ahitubu era muganda wa Ikabodi. Ikabodi oyo nga mutabane wa Finehasi, ate Finehasi oyo yaaba mutabane wa Eli kabona wa Musengwa Katonda e Shilo. Ahiya oyo yali avaire ekivaalo eky'obwakabona. Abantu tibaamanha nga Yonathani ajiire." 
1Samuel14:4 Aghantu aghaingirirwa, Yonathani ghe yali n'okubita okutuuka mu nkambi ey'abalwani Abafilisiti, ghaaligho embaale ku buli luuyi edhaalimu enkompe. Olubaale olundi nga lwetebwa Bozezi, ate olundi lwayetebwa Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Olubaale olundi lwali ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba ng'olingiriire Mikamashi, ate olundi lwaba ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba ng'olingiriire Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonathani yaakoba omwisuka eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa ati: “Idha tuje mu nkambi y'abalwani bano abatali bakekete. Tomanha Musengwa Katonda bw'atuyamba, kuba ghaziragho kighanga kulobera Musengwa Katonda okununula ng'akozesa abangi oba abatono.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Ole eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa yaamukoba ati: “Kola ekikuli ku mwoyo. Bona eno, nze ndi ghalala n'iwe.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Yonathani yairamu ati: “Kale, twidha kusomoka tuje y'abasaadha abo batubone." 
1Samuel14:9 Bwe banaatukoba bati, ‘Mube eyo okutuusa lwe tunaidha ye muli’, olwo twidha kusigala nga twemereire ghe tuli, tulobe kuja ye bali." 
1Samuel14:10 Aye bwe banaakoba bati, ‘Mwidhe ye tuli’, olwo twidha kuja, kuba ako n'akanaaba akamanhiso akatwoleka nga Musengwa Katonda abagabwire mu ngalo dhaife.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Kale bombi beeyoleka eri enkambi ey'abalwani Abafilisiti. Abafilisiti baakoba bati: “Mubone, Abaheburayi bali kuvaayo mu biina mwe baali beegisiisa.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Agho baayeta Yonathani n'ole eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa nga bakoba bati: “Mwidhe eno ye tuli ghaligho kye twidha okubooleka.” Yonathani yaakoba eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa ati: “Nnonereza, kuba Musengwa Katonda abagabwire mu ngalo dha Isiraeli.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Agho Yonathani yaaniina nga yeeghaluliza ku mikono ni ku magulu, yaaja Abafilisiti ye baali. Eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa yaamunonereza. Yonathani yaabaita inho. N'eyamugemerangaku eby'okulwanisa yeena yaabaita ng'amuvaaku einhuma." 
1Samuel14:14 Ku mukuzi ogwo ogwasooka, Yonathani n'eyamugemerangaku eby'okulwanisa baita abantu ng'oti makumi abiri mu kiketezo ekigheza ekitundu ky'eyiika." 
1Samuel14:15 Abafilisiti abaali mu kifo we baasimba weema dhaibwe, n'abaali mu nimiro, era n'abandi boonaboona, baadhugumira olw'okutya. Abalwani abaali mu nkambi, n'abo abaajanga okunhaga, baadhugumira. Ensi yaatengeeta, buli ghantu ghaidhula ensisi ey'amaani." 
1Samuel14:16 Abakuumi ba Saulo abaali mu Gibea ekya Benjamini, baaja okulinga bati, nga babona eikuukuubira ly'Abafilisiti nga liyoolookera eno n'ere." 
1Samuel14:17 Agho Saulo yaakoba abantu be yali nabo ati: “Mubale abantu abaligho, tubone abaziragho.” Era bwe baabala abantu, baakizuula nga Yonathani n'omuntu eyamugemerangaku eby'okulwanisa baziragho." 
1Samuel14:18 Saulo yaakoba Ahiya kabona ati: “Leeta ghano Esanduuku ya Katonda”, kuba mu biseera ebyo Abaisiraeli baajanga n'Esanduuku ya Katonda buli ghe baajanga." 
1Samuel14:19 Saulo yabanga eno ng'ali kwogera ni kabona, ere okutabuka okwali mu kifo Abafilisiti ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe nga kuli kweyongera. Agho Saulo yaakoba kabona ati: “Toolagho omukono gwo!”" 
1Samuel14:20 Agho Saulo n'abantu boonaboona be yali nabo beesoloza, baaja mu lutalo. Baaja okubona ng'Abafilisiti bali kufumitagana beene na beene mu kutabuka okw'amaani." 
1Samuel14:21 Ghaaligho Abaheburayi abaali nga bali ku luuyi olw'Abafilisiti, era nga baaja nabo mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe. Abo boona baakyuka, beeyimba ku Baisiraeli banaibwe abaali ni Saulo ni Yonathani." 
1Samuel14:22 Mu nsambo n'endala eyo, Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaali beegisiisa mu kiketezo kya Efuraimu eky'oku nsozi, bwe baawulira ng'Abafilisiti bali kulumuka, boona baavaayo baababingirira n'amaani, baabalwanisa." 
1Samuel14:23 Olutalo lwaja, lwatuuka e Bethaveni n'okubisaagho. Atyo Musengwa Katonda yaawonia Isiraeli ku lunaku olwo." 
1Samuel14:24 Agho Abaisiraeli baaba bubi ku lunaku olwo, kuba Saulo yabalayiza ng'akoba ati: “Omuntu yeenayeena anaalya ng'eigulo likaali era nga nkaali kumala kwesasuuliza ku bazigu bange, akolimirwe.” Kale ghaabulagho akomba ku kamere waire omulala." 
1Samuel14:25 Abantu boonaboona baatuuka mu kibira, baayagaana nga mulimu omudheenene ogw'endhuki." 
1Samuel14:26 Baabona ng'omudheenene guli kutoonha, aye ghaabulagho akana okugukombaku, kuba baatya ekikolimo." 
1Samuel14:27 Aye Yonathani yali tawuliire ise ng'asikirira abantu n'ekirayiro. Kale yaatoola omwigo gwe yali agemye, yaagusonka mu bisasala by'endhuki, yaagutoolesaayo omudheenene yaagulya, yairamu amaani." 
1Samuel14:28 Aye ghaabaagho omuntu eyamukoba ati: “Lata wo asikiriire abantu n'ekikolimo ng'akoba ati, ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaalya emere olwaleero luno, akolimirwe.’ ” Abantu boonaboona baali nga bawoiremu amaani." 
1Samuel14:29 Yonathani yairamu ati: “Lata wange aleeteire abantu kudaagadaaga budaagedaage. Bona nze bwe ndhizeemu amaani olw'okulyaku obw'akatono ku mudheenene guno. 
1Samuel14:30 Tikyandisinzeegho bulungi, nguli olwaleero abantu baliire ni baiguta ku munhago gw'abazigu baibwe gwe baagaine, era tibandiise Bafilisiti bangi n'okusingagho?”" 
1Samuel14:31 Ku lunaku olwo Abaisiraeli baita inho Abafilisiti, okuva e Mikamashi okutuuka mu Aiyaloni. Era Abaisiraeli abo baawaamu inho amaani." 
1Samuel14:32 Baagwidhubanira ku munhago, baatoola entaama n'ente baadhiitira agho, baalya emamba ng'erimu n'omusaayi." 
1Samuel14:33 Agho baakobera Saulo bati: “Bonayo, abantu bali kukola ekibi eri Musengwa Katonda nga balya emamba ng'erimu n'omusaayi.” Saulo yaabakoba ati: “Mughemukiire Musengwa Katonda mwalekera okuba abeesigwa y'ali. Mungalangulire eibaale eikologho mulindeetere ghano.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Era yaakoba ati: “Muje mu bantu mubakobe, buli muntu aleete ghano ente ye oba entaama ye, agiitire ghano era agiriire ghano. Mulekere agho okukola ekibi eri Musengwa Katonda nga mulya emamba erimu omusaayi.” Kale abantu boonaboona baakola batyo. Buli muntu yaaleeta ente ye yaagiitira agho obwire obwo." 
1Samuel14:35 Saulo yaazimbira agho Musengwa Katonda alutaari. Eyo n'alutaari Saulo oyo ye yasooka okuzimbira Musengwa Katonda. 
1Samuel14:36 Agho Saulo yaakoba ati: “Mukole tuje tulumbe Abafilisiti obwire, tubanhage ebintu okutuusa bwe bunaakya, era tubaite boonaboona tubamalegho.” Baamwiramu bati: “Kola kyonakyona ky'obona nga n'ekirungi.” Aye kabona yaakoba ati: “Leka twebuuzeeku ku Katonda memale.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Kale Saulo yaabuuza Katonda ati: “Nje numbe Abafilisiti? Onaabagabula mu ngalo dh'Abaisiraeli?” Aye Katonda tiyamwiramu ku lunaku olwo. 
1Samuel14:38 Saulo yaakoba ati: “Imwe abakulembeze b'abantu mwenamwena museete, mumanhe era mubone ekibi nga bwe kikoleibwa olwaleero." 
1Samuel14:39 Ndayira Musengwa Katonda omulamu alokola Isiraeli nti, ekibi ekyo ni bwe kiba nga kikoleibwa mutabane wange Yonathani, bwenebwene aidha kwitibwa.” Aye mu bantu boonaboona ghazira yamwiramu." 
1Samuel14:40 Agho yaakoba Abaisiraeli boonaboona ati: “Imwe mube ku luuyi olundi, ate nze ni mutabane wange Yonathani tube ku lundi.” Abantu baamwiramu bati: “Kola ekyo ky'obona nga n'ekirungi.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Saulo yaasaba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, lwaki tondhizeemu olwaleero luno, nze omugheereza wo? Bwemba nga ninze ndiku omusango guno oba mutabane wange Yonathani, ndhiraamu ng'obita mu Urimu. Aye bwe baba ng'abantu bo Abaisiraeli n'abaliku omusango guno, ndhiraamu ng'obita mu Thummimu.” Agho kyazuuka nga Yonathani ni Saulo n'abaliku omusango ogwo, aye abantu baawona." 
1Samuel14:42 Saulo yaakoba ati: “Mukube akalulu ku nze ni ku mutabane wange Yonathani.” Akalulu kaagwa ku Yonathani. 
1Samuel14:43 Agho Saulo yaakoba Yonathani ati: “Nkobera kye wakoze.” Yonathani yairamu ati: “Nakombye ku mudheenene gw'endhuki, gwe natooziizaayo omwigo ogwambaire mu ngalo. Ndhikiriiza, ndidha kufa.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Saulo yaamukoba ati: “Katonda agwananga yambonereza n'obukambwe, bw'otaitibwe iwe Yonathani.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Aye abantu baakoba Saulo bati: “Obwo bwenebwene Yonathani agwaniire okufa, ate nga aleeteire Isiraeli obughanguzi obwaga agho? Busa naire! Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu, tighaidha kuba luviiri naire olulala luti olunaava ku mutwe gwe ni lugwa ku itaka kuba akoleire ghalala ni Katonda olwaleero.” Kale, abantu batyo baawonia Yonathani yaaloba kwitibwa." 
1Samuel14:46 Ebyo bwe byawa, Saulo yaalekera agho okubingirira Abafilisiti, era Abafilisiti abo bairayo ewaibwe." 
1Samuel14:47 Saulo bwe yamala okufuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, yalwanisa abazigu be ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona: Yalwanisa Abamoabu, n'Abammoni, n'Abaedomu, ni bakyabazinga b'e Zoba, era n'Abafilisiti. Buli be yalwanisanga ng'abaghangula." 
1Samuel14:48 Yalwana ng'aziramu ntete yaaghangula Abamaleki, yaawonia Isiraeli abo abaaginhagangaku ebintu byayo." 
1Samuel14:49 Saulo yali ni batabane be bano: Yonathani, Ishavi, ni Malakishua. Era yaaba ni baghala be bano: omuberi nga ni Merabu, ate muto we nga ni Mikali." 
1Samuel14:50 Muka Saulo yali nga ni Ahinoamu, mughala wa Ahimaazi. Omuduumizi w'eigye lya Saulo nga ni Abuneri, mutabane wa Neri. Neri oyo yali lata wa Saulo omuto." 
1Samuel14:51 Lata wa Saulo nga ni Kishi, ate lata wa Abuneri nga ni Neri, mutabane wa Abieli." 
1Samuel14:52 Ghaabangagho okulwanagana okw'amaani n'Abafilisiti, ekiseera kyonakyona kyabazinga Saulo kye yamala nga mulamu. Era Saulo buli lwe yabonanga omuntu ow'amaani oba aziramu ntete, ng'amwingiza mu igye lye." 
1Samuel15:1 Agho Samueli yaakoba Saulo ati: “Musengwa Katonda yantuma okwidha y'oli okukusiiga omuzigo, obe kyabazinga ow'abantu be Abaisiraeli. Buti ni wulira by'akoba." 
1Samuel15:2 Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye akoba ati, ‘Ndidha kubonereza Abamaleki olw'ekyo kye baakola, eky'okulobera Abaisiraeli okubitagho bwe baali nga bava e Misiri." 
1Samuel15:3 Mpegaano ja oite Abamaleki, era ozikirize ni bye bali nabyo byonabyona. Ghatabaagho y'osaasira, aye baite boonaboona: abasaadha n'abakazi, abaana abato n'abayonka, era oite n'ente, n'entaama, n'engamiya, n'endogoyi.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Kale Saulo yaayeta abantu e Telaimu, yaababala. Baali abalwani emitwalo abiri (200,000) abaava mu Isiraeli, n'abandi omutwalo mulala (10,000) abaava mu Buyudaaya." 
1Samuel15:5 Saulo n'abalwani be baaja baatuuka ku kibuga eky'Abamaleki, baaja mu kiiko baabeeteega." 
1Samuel15:6 Saulo yaakoba Abakeni ati: “Imwe muje muve mu Bamaleki, ndobe kubazikiriza ghalala nabo, kuba imwe mwagemerwa Abaisiraeli ekivunika bwe baali bava e Misiri.” Kale Abakeni baaja, baava mu Bamaleki." 
1Samuel15:7 Saulo yaaghangula Abamaleki okuviira irala e Havila okutuuka e Shuri, ekiri e buvandhuba wa Misiri." 
1Samuel15:8 Yaatwala Agagi, kyabazinga w'Abamaleki, nga mulamu, yaazikiriza abantu boonaboona okubamalagho." 
1Samuel15:9 Aye Saulo n'abalwani be baasaasira Agagi baaloba kumwita. Era baalekagho entaama n'ente empiite ensavu, n'entaama entototo, n'ebintu ebindi eby'omugaso, baaloba kubizikiriza. Ebintu ebindi bye bataabonamu kalungi oba omugaso baabizikiriza." 
1Samuel15:10 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Samueli ati: 
1Samuel15:11 “Neidhwisa okuba nga nafuula Saulo kyabazinga, kuba anviireku yaalekera agho okuwulira ebiragiro byange.” Agho Samueli yaasungughala, obwire bwonabwona yaasula nga yeegayirira Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel15:12 Bwe bwakya, Samueli yaawuuna okuja okubona Saulo. Baamukobera bati: “Saulo yajiire Karumeli, mwene ye yeezimbira ekiidhukizo, era yamaze yeeyongerayo yaatuuka e Giligali.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Samueli yaaja yatuuka ku Saulo. Saulo yaamulamusa ati: “Musengwa Katonda akughe enkabi. Ntuukiriiza ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda.” 
1Samuel15:14 Samueli yaamubuuza ati: “Ate lwaki ndi kuwulira entaama nga dhibbaalaaga n'ente nga dhimoola?” 
1Samuel15:15 Saulo yaamwiramu ati: “Abalwani bange baadhireeta nga badhitoola ku Bamaleki, kuba baalekaghooku ku ntaama ni ku nte edhisinga bulungi, okudhighaayo eri Musengwa Katonda wo ng'omusengo. Aye ebintu ebindi byonabyona twabizikiriza.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Samueli yaakoba Saulo ati: “Sooka oleke, nkukobere Musengwa Katonda bye yankobye obwire.” Saulo yairamu ati: “Kale nkobera.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Samueli yaamukoba ati: “Waire iwe mwene weebona nga toli wa ndhawulo ku bantu bandi, aye ti niiwe akulira ebika byonabyona mu Isiraeli? Musengwa Katonda yakusiiga omuzigo obe kyabazinga wa Isiraeli." 
1Samuel15:18 Yaakutuma okukola omulimo ng'akoba ati, ‘Ja ozikirize abakozi ab'ebibi abo, Abamaleki, ng'obalwanisa okutuusa lw'olibaita n'obamalagho.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Kale, lwaki tiwagondera kiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda? Lwaki wagwidhubanira ku kutwala omunhago, n'okola ekibi ekisungughaza Musengwa Katonda?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Saulo yairamu ati: “Nagondera ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda, naaja naakola omulimo gwe yantuma. Naaleeta Agagi kyabazinga w'Abamaleki, era naazikiriza Abamaleki boonaboona." 
1Samuel15:21 Aye abalwani bange n'abaatoola ku munhago, entaama n'ente edhaali dhisingamu obulungi, mu ebyo byonabyona ebyali eby'okuzikiriza, baabireeta okubighaayo ng'omusengo eri Musengwa Katonda wo, ghano e Giligali.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Samueli yaakoba Saulo ati: “Iwe odhuuba oti Musengwa Katonda asiima inho ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'emisengo, ng'oti ni bw'asiima okugondera ebiragiro bye? Bona eno, okumugondera kusinga okumugha emisengo, n'okumuwulira kwasinga okumugha amasavu ag'entaama enume." 
1Samuel15:23 Obudheemu kuba kukola kibi ng'oti n'okweraguza bwe kuba, n'okwekuluntaza kuba kukola kibi ng'oti n'okusinza ebitali Katonda bwe kuba. Nga bwe waloba okukola Musengwa Katonda kye yakulagira, Musengwa Katonda yeena alobye okukuleka ku bwakyabazinga.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Saulo yairamu ati: “Nayonoona naadheemera ebiragiro bya Musengwa Katonda, era naaloba kujiira ku ebyo bye wansikirira, kuba natya abantu, naajiira ku bye bankoba." 
1Samuel15:25 Aye nkusaba onsonighe ekibi ekyo era oireyo ninze, nsobole okusinza Musengwa Katonda.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Samueli yaamwiramu ati: “Tiidha kwirayo n'iwe, kuba waloba okukola Musengwa Katonda kye yakulagira, era Musengwa Katonda yeena alobye okukuleka ku bwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Agho Samueli yali akyuka ati okuja, Saulo yaamugema ekivaalo era kyakanuka." 
1Samuel15:28 Samueli yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akukanwireku obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli olwaleero, yaabugha muliraanwa wo akusinga obulungi." 
1Samuel15:29 Ate ekindi, oyo Ekitiisa kya Isiraeli talimba oba okweidhusa, kuba ti muntu amala ni yeidhusa.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Agho Saulo yaakoba ati: “Nayonoona, mala gantaamuuku ku kanhagansi mperaano mu maiso g'abakulembeze ab'abantu bange n'ag'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, oireyo ninze nsobole okusinza Musengwa Katonda wo.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Kale Samueli yairayo ni Saulo, era Saulo yaasinza Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel15:32 Agho Samueli yaakoba ati: “Mundeetere ghano Agagi kyabazinga w'Abamaleki.” Agagi yaidha ng'aliku akamwenhumwenhu ng'akoba mule ati: “Bwenebwene obulumi obw'okufa mbuwonie.” 
1Samuel15:33 Samueli yaamukoba ati: “Ng'empiima yo bwe yalekanga abakazi nga baziraku baana, ni inhoko yeena atyo bw'aja okusigala ng'aziraku mwana mu bakazi baine.” Era agho Samueli yaatematema Agagi bukutukutu, agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda e Giligali." 
1Samuel15:34 Agho Samueli yaaja e Rama, ni Saulo yeena yaaja mu maka ge e Gibea ekya Saulo." 
1Samuel15:35 Era Samueli tiyairayo kubona ku Saulo okutuusa bwe yafa. Aye yasigala ng'ali mu nnaku olwa Saulo oyo. Era Musengwa Katonda yeidhusa olw'okufuula Saulo okuba kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. 
1Samuel16:1 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Samueli ati: “Olituusa li okunakughala, olw'okuba nga nabinga Saulo ku bwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli? Gema eiyiga lyo ly'otaamu omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva oliidhuze omuzigo, oje. Ndidha kukutuma ewa Yesse Omubethelehemu, kuba nonze owundi ku batabane be okuba kyabazinga.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Samueli yaakoba ati: “Nsobola ntya okuja eyo? Saulo bw'alikiwulira aja kundhita!” Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Ja n'ente ento, olikoba oti, ‘Ndidhie kughaayo musengo eri Musengwa Katonda.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Agho oyete Yesse ku kughaayo omusengo ogwo nze ndikukobera eky'okukola. Omuntu ye ndikukoba, y'olisiiga omuzigo.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Samueli yaakola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yamulagira, yaaja e Bethelehemu. Abakulembeze ab'omu kibuga ekyo baidha okumusangaaza nga badhugumira. Baamubuuza bati: “Oidhie na miraala, oba busa?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Yaabairamu ati: “Na miraala. Ndidhie kughaayo musengo eri Musengwa Katonda. Mukole mwetukuze, mwidhe ninze okughaayo omusengo.” Agho yaatukuza Yesse ni batabane be, era yaabeeta ku kughaayo omusengo ogwo." 
1Samuel16:6 Yesse ni batabane be bwe baatuuka, Samueli yaabonamu Eliabu, yaadhuuba mule ati: “Bwenebwene ono ayemereire mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, n'oyo Musengwa Katonda y'anaasiiga omuzigo.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Samueli ati: “Otalingirira mboneka ye oba buleeyi bwe, kuba oyo mmulobye. Musengwa Katonda tabona ng'oti n'abantu bwe babona, kuba abantu balingirira mboneka ya ku ngulu, aye Musengwa Katonda alingirira mwoyo.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Agho Yesse yaayeta mutabane we Abinadabu, yaamukoba ayemerere mu maiso ga Samueli. Aye Samueli yaakoba ati: “Ni bw'aba oyo yeena, Musengwa Katonda tamulonze.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Yesse yaamuleetera mutabane we Shamma. Samueli yaakoba ati: “Ni bw'aba oyo yeena, Musengwa Katonda tamulonze.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Yesse yaaleetera Samueli batabane be musanvu. Aye Samueli yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda talonze ku abo.” 
1Samuel16:11 Yaamala yaamubuuza ati: “Batabane bo boonaboona bali ghano?” Yesse yaamwiramu ati: “Ekaasigaireyo asinga buto. Aye ate ali kwaya ntaama.” Samueli yaamukoba ati: “Tuma omuntu amunone, kuba titwidha kutyama kutereera okutuusa ng'atuuse ghano.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Era yaatuma omuntu yaamuleeta. Yali anhirira, ng'ali n'amaiso amalungi era ng'aboneka bulungi. Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Saulo ati: “Situka omusiige omuzigo, kuba n'oyo.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Samueli yaatoola eiyiga eryalimu omuzigo, yaamusiiga omuzigo nga baganda be babona. Omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwaidha ku Daudi n'amaani okuva ku lunaku olwo n'okweyongerayo. Samueli yaasituka yaaja e Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwava ku Saulo. Era Musengwa Katonda oyo yaasindika omuzimu omubi gwadaazadaaza Saulo ebitaloodheka. 
1Samuel16:15 Abagheereza ba Saulo baamukoba bati: “Bona eno, omuzimu omubi Musengwa Katonda gwe yasindika n'oguli kukudaazadaaza ebitaloodheka." 
1Samuel16:16 Mpegaano ni, musengwa waife, tulagire ife abagheereza bo abali ghano, twagale omuntu aidhi einho okukuba endingidi. Omuzimu omubi oguva ye Katonda bwe gunaakwidhangaku, anaakubanga endingidi eyo, waaba bukalamu.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Kale Saulo yaabakoba ati: “Munfunire omuntu aidhi okugikuba obukalamu, mumundeetere ghano.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Ghaabaagho omwisuka yaakoba ati: “Bona eno, nze nabona eyo mutabane wa Yesse Omubethelehemu ng'aidhi inho okugikuba. Omusaadha oyo mulwani wa ntalo aziramu ntete, mwogezi mulungi, mulungi mu mboneka ye, era Musengwa Katonda ali naye.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Kale Saulo yaagheereza abakwenda ye Yesse, ng'amukoba ati: “Mpeereza mutabane wo Daudi ayaya entaama.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Yesse yaatoola endogoyi yaagitwika emigaati n'ensawo ey'oluwu erimu omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, era yaatoola n'embuzi entototo, ebyo byonabyona yaabigha mutabane we Daudi abitwalire Saulo." 
1Samuel16:21 Era Daudi yaaja ewa Saulo, yaatoolera okumugheereza. Saulo yaagonza Daudi, era yaamulonda okumubbeederangaku eby'okulwanisa bye." 
1Samuel16:22 Saulo oyo yaatuma ye Yesse ng'amukoba ati: “Ndekera Daudi asigale ng'akampeereza, kuba nsiima by'akola.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Era omuzimu omubi Katonda gwe yasindika, buli lwe gwaidhanga ku Saulo, nga Daudi atoola entongooli yaakuba. Olwo Saulo yaawoleera, yaawulira bukalamu era n'omuzimu omubi gwamuvaaku." 
1Samuel17:1 Agho Abafilisiti baasoloza amagye gaibwe, beetegeka okulwana olutalo. Beesololeza e Soko eky'omu Buyudaaya, era baasimba weema dhaibwe mu kifo ekyayetebwanga Efesi Dammimu, nga kiri ghagati gha Soko ni Azeka." 
1Samuel17:2 Saulo n'abalwani be Abaisiraeli beesoloza, baasimba weema dhaibwe mu kiiko ky'e Ela, era beetegeka okulwanisa Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel17:3 Abafilisiti baayemerera ku lusozi ku luuyi olundi, ate Abaisiraeli baayemerera ku lusozi ku luuyi olundi, ekiiko kyababaamu ghagati." 
1Samuel17:4 Mu balwani Abafilisiti mwalimu eyali abasinga boonaboona, nga bamweta Goliathi ow'omu kibuga Gathi. Obuleeyi yali agheza kumpi mita isatu." 
1Samuel17:5 Yali avaire enkoofiira ku mutwe nga ya kyuma kya kikomo, era yaavaala ekivaalo eky'omu lutalo nga kya kyuma kya kikomo nga kizitogha kilo ng'oti makumi ataanu na musanvu." 
1Samuel17:6 Ku magulu ge yali avaire ebintu eby'ekyuma ky'ekikomo, era ng'ali n'eifumo ery'ekyuma ky'ekikomo ku mabega." 
1Samuel17:7 Olunhago olw'eifumo lye lwali nga lwaga n'ekiti kye balukisa olugoye obunene. Ate eifumo lyene nga lizitogha kilo ng'oti musanvu. Era yali n'omuntu eyamugemeranga engabo, nga n'amukulemberamu." 
1Samuel17:8 Agho Goliathi yaayemerera, yaakoba abalwani Abaisiraeli ng'aleekaana ati: “Lwaki mwidhie okwetegeka okulwana? Nze ndi Mufilisiti, ate imwe muli bagheereza ba Saulo. Mwerondemu omuntu aidhe ye ndi." 
1Samuel17:9 Bw'anaasobola okulwana ninze n'andhita, olwo ife twidha kuba bagheereza baimwe. Aye nze bwe nnaamughangula ni mmwita, olwo imwe mwidha kuba bagheereza baife mutugheerezenga.”" 
1Samuel17:10 Omufilisiti oyo era yaakoba ati: “Olwaleero ndi kusonsoonia eigye lya Isiraeli. Mumpe omuntu nwane naye.” 
1Samuel17:11 Agho Saulo n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona bwe baawulira ebibono ebyo eby'Omufilisiti, baawaamu amaani era baatya ebitaloodheka." 
1Samuel17:12 Daudi yali mutabane wa Yesse Omuefurathi ow'e Bethelehemu mu Buyudaaya. Yesse oyo yali ni batabane be munaana. Mu biseera bya Saulo, Yesse oyo yali akairiighe inho." 
1Samuel17:13 Batabane ba Yesse oyo abakulu baali bajiire ni Saulo mu lutalo. Amaina gaibwe ni gano: Eliabu nga n'omwana omuberi, Abinadabu yaamwiraku, ate Shamma yairaku." 
1Samuel17:14 Daudi yali nga n'asembayo obuto. Kale engeri bakulu be ye baali nga bajiire ni Saulo," 
1Samuel17:15 yali n'okujanga ye Saulo okubaluutaku, era n'okujanga e Bethelehemu okwaya entaama dha ise." 
1Samuel17:16 Omufilisiti oyo yaidhanga buli lunaku, enkyo n'eigulo, yaasonsoonianga Abaisiraeli okumala enaku amakumi ana." 
1Samuel17:17 Lwali lulala Yesse yaakoba mutabane we Daudi ati: “Yangughaku oje ye baganda bo ere mu kifo aghaasimbwa weema, obatwalire kilo dhino eikumi edh'emere eno ey'empeke enkalange n'emigaati gino eikumi." 
1Samuel17:18 Era twalira n'omuduumizi ebitole bino eikumi eby'omuzigo omugemu. Ja obone baganda bo bwe bali era ondeetere akamanhiso okuva ye bali.” 
1Samuel17:19 Saulo, ni baganda ba Daudi, era n'abalwani Abaisiraeli boonaboona baali nga bali mu kiiko eky'e Ela, nga bali kulwana n'Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel17:20 Daudi yaasitukagho ku nkyo, entaama yaadhirekera omuntu anaadhirabirira, yaatwala eby'okulya nga Yesse bwe yamulagira. Yaatuuka mu kifo Abaisiraeli ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, ng'eigye liri kufuluma okuja okulwana, eno nga bwe lyemba enhembo edh'omu lutalo." 
1Samuel17:21 Agho Abaisiraeli n'Abafilisiti baalingagana, beetegeka okulwanagana." 
1Samuel17:22 Daudi yaatoola ebintu bye yatwala, yaabirekera omukuumi w'eiterekero, mwene yaalumuka okutuuka ku igye, yaaja yaalamusa baganda be." 
1Samuel17:23 Yali akaayogera ni baganda be, omulwani ole asinga boonaboona Omufilisiti ow'e Gathi, eyayetebwanga Goliathi, yeesowolayo mu igye ly'Abafilisiti, yaidha yaayogera ebibono n'ebirala nga bye yayogera ku mukuzi ogundi. Daudi yaamuwulira ng'ayogera." 
1Samuel17:24 Agho abalwani Abaisiraeli bwe baabona omusaadha oyo, baatya inho baalumuka." 
1Samuel17:25 Era baakoba bati: “Muboine omusaadha oyo eyeesowoireyo n'aidha? Bwenebwene aidhie kusonsoonia Isiraeli. Omuntu anaamwita, kyabazinga aidha kumugha obukombe kamaala, amughe ni mughala we amufumbirwe era afuule n'ab'omu ndhu ya ise okuba ab'eidembe mu Isiraeli.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Daudi yaabuuza abantu abaali beemereire okumpi naye, ati: “Kiki kye baja okukolera omuntu anaita Omufilisiti oyo, n'atoola ku Isiraeli ekyobeera ekyo? Obwo katyo Omufilisiti oyo atali mukekete naani, yeena okunhooma eigye lya Katonda omulamu?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Abantu baamwiramu mu nsambo n'endala nga bwe baali bamaze okukoba, bati: “Omuntu anaita omusaadha oyo, ekyo kye baidha okumukolera.”" 
1Samuel17:28 Eliabu muganda wa Daudi eyali abasinga boonaboona obukulu, bwe yawulira nga Daudi ali kwogera n'abantu abo, obusungu bwe bwatumbukira ku Daudi oyo ng'oti muliro. Yaamubuuza ati: “Lwaki oidhie ghano? Era entaama edho odhirekeire ani eyo mu irungu? Ndidhi okwepankapanka kwo kw'oli nakwo. Era olwo oidhie kubona lutalo bwe luli.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Daudi yaakoba ati: “Buti nkoze ki? Kibi okubuuzaaku?” 
1Samuel17:30 Agho yaakyuka, yaabuuza omuntu owundi ekintu n'ekirala kire. Era abantu baamwiramu nga bwe baamwiramu mu kusooka." 
1Samuel17:31 Abantu abaawulira Daudi bye yayogera, baaja baabikobera Saulo, era Saulo yaayetesa Daudi." 
1Samuel17:32 Daudi yaakoba Saulo ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ghatabaagho awaamu maani olw'Omufilisiti oyo. Nze omugheereza wo ndidha kuja nwane naye.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Saulo yaamwiramu ati: “Toghanga kuja kulwana na Mufilisiti oyo, kuba oli muto inho ku mwene. Ate nga mwene abaire mulwani mu ntalo okuva mu buto bwe.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Aye Daudi yaakoba Saulo ati: “Nze omugheereza wo mbairenga nga ndhaya ntaama dha lata wange. Era nga bwemba nga ndi kudhaaya, memale empologoma oba ensolo enkambwe n'eidha n'etwalaku entaama ento," 
1Samuel17:35 nga ngibingirira, naaja naagirwanisa, naagigisuuza. Era ensolo eyo nga bw'esituka okuunwanisa, nga ngigema akalevu, n'agikuba naagiita." 
1Samuel17:36 Nze omugheereza wo, nga bwembairenga nga ndhita empologoma n'ensolo enkambwe, era ntyo bwe ndidha okwita n'Omufilisiti oyo atali mukekete, anhoomye amagye ga Katonda omulamu.”" 
1Samuel17:37 Era Daudi yaakoba ati: “Eyantoola mu nkumu edh'empologoma n'edh'ensolo enkambwe, aidha kuntoola ni mu ngalo edh'Omufilisiti oyo.” Agho Saulo yaakoba Daudi ati: “Kale ja, Musengwa Katonda abe n'iwe.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Saulo yaatoola ebivaalo eby'omu lutalo ebibye byene, yaabivaaza Daudi. Era nga ni bino: enkoofiira ey'oku mutwe ey'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, n'ekivaalo eky'omu lutalo ekindi." 
1Samuel17:39 Daudi yeesiba empiima ku kivaalo ekyo eky'omu lutalo, yaagezaaku okutambula aye nga taghanga, kuba yali tabimanhiriire. Agho yaakoba Saulo ati: “Tisobola kuja ni bino, kuba tibimanhiriire.” Era yaabyetoolamu." 
1Samuel17:40 Agho Daudi yaagema omwigo gwe, yaalonda amabaale mu kaiga amaseene obukalamu ataanu, yaagata mu ndyanga ye ey'omwayi. Era yaagema n'ensuumulo ye, yaaseeta eri Omufilisiti." 
1Samuel17:41 Omufilisiti yaidha ng'aseeta ye Daudi, ng'ali n'amugemera engabo amukulembeiremu." 
1Samuel17:42 Omufilisiti bwe yalinga ati n'abona Daudi, yaamunhoomerera, kuba yali mwisuka bwisuka, ng'anhirira era ng'aboneka bulungi." 
1Samuel17:43 Omufilisiti yaakoba Daudi ati: “Nze ondhese mbwa, memale ondhidhire n'emiigo obwigo.” Agho yakolimira Daudi mu liina ly'emisambwa gye." 
1Samuel17:44 Era yaamukoba ati: “Kale idha ghano ghe ndi, omulambo gwo ndidha kugugabula enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Daudi yaakoba Omufilisiti ati: “Iwe oli kwidha ye ndi n'empiima, n'eifumo einene ghalala n'eifumo eitono, aye nze ndi kwidha mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, era Katonda ow'amagye ga Isiraeli, g'osoononkereiza." 
1Samuel17:46 Olwaleero luno Musengwa Katonda aidha kukuta mu ngalo dhange nkukube ghansi, era nkutemeku omutwe. Era emirambo egy'eigye ery'Abafilisiti nja kugigabula enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko. Olwo ensi yoonayoona emanhe nga mu Isiraeli mulimu Katonda." 
1Samuel17:47 Era olwo abantu bano boonaboona abeesoloiza ghano bamanhe nga Musengwa Katonda talokola na mpiima waire na ifumo kuba Musengwa Katonda ni mwene lutalo luno, era imwe aidha kubata mu ngalo dhaife tubaghangule.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Agho Omufilisiti bwe yaidha ng'aseeta ye Daudi, Daudi oyo yaalumuka mangu okuja y'ali okumulwanisa." 
1Samuel17:49 Daudi yaagema mu ndyanga ye, yaatoolamu eibaale yaalita mu nsuumulo, yaalikonhoogerera Omufilisiti mu bweni. Eibaale eryo lyaingira mu kighanga ky'Omufilisiti oyo, yaagwa kya bweni." 
1Samuel17:50 Kale Daudi yaaghangula Omufilisiti ng'akozesa nsuumulo na ibaale. Yaakuba Omufilisiti oyo yaamwita nga takozeisa mpiima naire. 
1Samuel17:51 Agho Daudi yaalumuka yaayemerera ku Mufilisiti, yaatoola empiima y'Omufilisiti oyo mu kiruutu kyayo, yaagimwitisa era yaamusalaku omutwe ni yeene eyo. Abafilisiti bwe baabona omulwani waibwe asinga boonaboona ng'afiire, baalumuka." 
1Samuel17:52 Abalwani Abaisiraeli n'Abayudaaya baasituka nga bali kuleekaana, baabingirira Abafilisiti okutuukira irala e Gathi, ni ku miryango gya Ekuroni. Abafilisiti abaafumitibwa, baaja nga bagwa ku ngira okuva e Shaaraimu n'okutuukira irala e Gathi n'e Ekuroni." 
1Samuel17:53 Abaisiraeli bwe baira nga bava okubingirira Abafilisiti, baanhaga ebintu mu kifo Abafilisiti abo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe." 
1Samuel17:54 Daudi yaatoola omutwe ogw'Omufilisiti oyo yaagutwala e Yerusalemu, aye ebivaalo eby'omu lutalo eby'Omufilisiti oyo yaabita mu weema eyiye mwene." 
1Samuel17:55 Saulo bwe yabona Daudi ng'ali kuja okulwanisa Omufilisiti, yaabuuza Abuneri omuduumizi w'eigye ati: “Abuneri, omwisuka oyo mutabane w'ani?” Abuneri yaamwiramu ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ndayira mu maiso go nti tiidhi naire.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Kyabazinga yaakoba Abuneri ati: “Ja obuulirize ise w'omwisuka oyo.” 
1Samuel17:57 Kale Daudi bwe yaira ng'amaze okwita omufilisiti, Abuneri yaamutwala eri Saulo, nga Daudi oyo agemye mu ngalo dhe omutwe ogw'Omufilisiti." 
1Samuel17:58 Saulo yaamubuuza ati: “Omwisuka iwe, oli mutabane w'ani.” Daudi yaamwiramu ati: “Nze ndi mutabane w'omugheereza wo Yesse Omubethelehemu.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Daudi bwe yamala okwogera ni Saulo, Yonathani mutabane wa Saulo oyo, yaatoolera mule okugonza einho Daudi, era yaamugonzanga nga bwe yeegonzanga mwene." 
1Samuel18:2 Okuva ku olwo, Saulo yaatwala ewuwe Daudi oyo, yaabanga eyo nga tamuganha kwirayo wa ise." 
1Samuel18:3 Agho Yonathani yaita omukago ni Daudi, kuba yagonzanga inho Daudi oyo nga bwe yeegonzanga mwene." 
1Samuel18:4 Yonathani yaatoolamu ekanzu ye yali avaire, yaagigha Daudi, yaamugha n'ekivaalo kye eky'omu lutalo, n'empiima ye, n'akalaso ke, era n'olusibiro lwe." 
1Samuel18:5 Daudi yaajanga, yaakolanga bukalamu buli kintu Saulo kye yamutumanga okukola. Kale Saulo yaamufuula omukulu w'abaisirukale. Ekyo kyasangaaza inho abagheereza ba Saulo n'abantu boonaboona." 
1Samuel18:6 Agho bwe baali nga bali kwira eka, nga Daudi yeena ali kwira ng'amaze okwita Omufilisiti, abakazi baava mu bibuga byonabyona ebya Isiraeli, baaja okweisuusaayo kyabazinga Saulo. Baaja nga bemba enhembo edh'eisanhu nga bwe bakina. Era baakuba obugoma n'ebivuga ebindi bye bakubiraku enhembo." 
1Samuel18:7 Abakazi abo baayemba nga basagamba bati: “Saulo aise nkumi na nkumi, Daudi yaita mitwalo na mitwalo.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Agho Saulo yaasungughala inho olw'ebyo bye baakoba. Yaakoba ati: “Daudi bamubaliire mitwalo na mitwalo, aye nze bambalira bwa nkumi dhonka? Agho aba akaasigaiza kufuna ki, okutoolaku obwakyabazinga?”" 
1Samuel18:9 Okuva ku lunaku olwo, yaalingiriranga Daudi ng'amwekengeera." 
1Samuel18:10 Ku lunaku olwairirira, omuzimu omubi Katonda gwe yasindika, gwaidha ku Saulo yaatawukira mu ndhu ye. Daudi yali ali kumukubira endingidi nga bwe yakolanga buli lunaku. Saulo yali agemye eifumo." 
1Samuel18:11 Agho Saulo oyo yaakonhoogerera Daudi eifumo emikuzi ebiri ng'akoba mule ati: “Ka mmufumite eifumo limutunge ni ku kimante.” Aye Daudi yaalyewoma ku mikuzi egyo gyombi. 
1Samuel18:12 Saulo yaatya Daudi, kuba Musengwa Katonda yali ng'ali ni Daudi oyo, aye ng'aviire ku Saulo." 
1Samuel18:13 Kale Saulo yaalekeza Daudi okubanga agho mu maiso ge, yaamufuula muduumizi wa baisirukale lukumi (1,000) Daudi yaabakulemberanga okuja mu ntalo." 
1Samuel18:14 Byonabyona Daudi bye yakolanga nga bimujiira bukalamu, kuba Musengwa Katonda yalinga ghalala naye." 
1Samuel18:15 Saulo bwe yabona nga byonabyona Daudi by'akola bimujiira bukalamu inho, yeeyongera okumutya." 
1Samuel18:16 Aye abantu boonaboona mu Isiraeli ni mu Buyudaaya, baayenda inho Daudi, kuba yabakulemberanga bukalamu." 
1Samuel18:17 Agho Saulo yaakoba Daudi ati: “Ndidha kukugha mughala wange omukulu Merabu, akufumbirwe. Aye oli n'okubanga omuntu aziramu ntete, olwanenga entalo dha Musengwa Katonda.” Saulo yakola ekyo ng'ali kukoba mule ati: “Nze ka ndeke okumwita, aye Abafilisiti n'ababe bamwite.”" 
1Samuel18:18 Daudi yaakoba Saulo ati: “Katyo nze ninze ani? Era ab'endhu ya lata wange ni baani mu Isiraeli, nze okuba mukoirume wa kyabazinga?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Aye ekiseera bwe kyatuuka eky'okugha Daudi Merabu amufumbirwe, ate Merabu oyo baamugha Adirieli ow'e Mehola, n'abe amufumbirwe." 
1Samuel18:20 Aye ate mughala wa Saulo owundi ye baayetanga Mikali, yaayenda Daudi. Ekyo baakikobera Saulo era yaakisiima." 
1Samuel18:21 Saulo yaakoba mule ati: “Ka mmumughe, mmweyambise ng'omutego, era neeyambise n'Abafilisiti balwanise Daudi oyo.” Kale Saulo yaakoba Daudi omukuzi ogwokubiri ati: “Oidha kuba mukoirume wange.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Era Saulo yaalagira abagheereza be ati: “Mwogere ni Daudi eyo nga muli mu kyama, mumukobe muti, ‘Bona eno, kyabazinga akusiima, n'abagheereza be boonaboona bakugonza. Kale ni kola obe mukoirume wa kyabazinga.’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Agho abagheereza ba Saulo, baakoba Daudi batyo. Daudi yaabakoba ati: “Mukyeta kintu kitono omuntu ng'oti ninze okuba mukoirume wa kyabazinga, ate nga ndi mwavu era atamanhiibwa naire?”" 
1Samuel18:24 Abagheereza abo baaja baakobera Saulo, ebyo Daudi bye yakoba." 
1Samuel18:25 Agho Saulo yaabakoba ati: “Muje mukobe Daudi muti, ‘Kyabazinga taidha kusala mwandu ku mugole, okutoolaku obuwutu kikumi obukeketeibwa ku Bafilisiti. Olwo kyabazinga abe nga yeesasuuliiza ku bazigu be abo.’ ” Saulo yalowooza ati Abafilisiti baidha kwita Daudi." 
1Samuel18:26 Agho Abagheereza ba Saulo bwe baakobera Daudi ebibono ebyo, Daudi yaasangaalira inho eky'okuba mukoirume wa kyabazinga. Era enaku nga dhikaali kubita," 
1Samuel18:27 Daudi yaasitukiramu yaaja n'abasaadha be, yaita Abafilisiti ebikumi bibiri. Yaatwala obuwutu bwe yabakeketaku, yaabughaayo bwonabwona ye kyabazinga era yaabumubalira, olwo aghange okufumbirwa mughala we. Kale Saulo yaagha Daudi mughala we Mikali, yaamufumbirwa." 
1Samuel18:28 Aye era Saulo yaakibona era yaakitegeera nga Musengwa Katonda ali ni Daudi, era nga Abaisiraeli boonaboona bagonza Daudi oyo." 
1Samuel18:29 Kale yeeyongera okutya Daudi, era yaaba muzigu we ekiseera kyonakyona kye yamala nga mulamu." 
1Samuel18:30 Agho abafuzi ab'Abafilisiti baavangayo okulwana n'Abaisiraeli. Aye buli mukuzi gwe baidhanga, nga Daudi aba n'obughanguzi okusinga abagheereza ba Saulo abandi boonaboona. Kale Daudi yaamanhikana inho." 
1Samuel19:1 Agho Saulo yaakoba mutabane we Yonathani n'abakungu be boonaboona, baite Daudi. Aye Yonathani mutabane wa Saulo oyo, yali agonza inho Daudi." 
1Samuel19:2 Kale Yonathani oyo yaakobera Daudi ati: “Lata wange Saulo ayenda kukwita. Kale weekuume. Enkyo weegise mu kifo ekyekusifu. 
1Samuel19:3 Nze ndidha kuja nhemerere kumpi naye eyo mu nimiro y'onaaba weegisiisa, olwo ndhogere naye ku iwe. Bwe ghanaabaagho kye nnaamufunamu, ndidha kukikumanhisa.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Agho Yonathani yaayogera bukalamu ku Daudi ng'ali n'ise Saulo. Yaakoba ati: “Lata wange kyabazinga, togwaine kukola kabi ku Daudi, kuba mwene takukolangaku kabi, era ebintu by'abairenga akukolera bibaire bikalamu byereere." 
1Samuel19:5 Yata obulamu bwe aghabi, yaaja yaita Omufilisiti ole, olwo Musengwa Katonda yaatuusa Isiraeli ku bughanguzi obw'amaani. Era ekyo bwe wakibona wasagamba. Kale lwaki oyenda okukola akabi ku muntu aziraku musango, ng'oita Daudi aghazira nsonga?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Saulo yaikiriza ebyo Yonathani bye yamukoba, era yaalayira ng'akoba ati: “Bwenebwene mu Katonda omulamu, tiidha kwita Daudi.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Kale Yonathani yaayeta Daudi, yaamukobera ebintu ebyo byonabyona, era yaatwala Daudi oyo ye Saulo, yaagheerezanga Saulo oyo nga bwe yakolanga mu kusooka." 
1Samuel19:8 Kabiri ghaabaagho olutalo n'Abafilisiti, era Daudi yaaja yaabalwanisa, yaabaitamu abantu kamaala, abaasigalagho baalumuka." 
1Samuel19:9 Lwali lulala, Saulo bweyali atyaime mu ndhu ng'agemye eifumo lye, era nga Daudi ali kumukubira endingidi, omuzimu omubi Musengwa Katonda gwe yasindika gwamwidhaku." 
1Samuel19:10 Saulo oyo yaayenda okufumita Daudi eifumo limutunge ni ku kimante, aye Daudi yaalyewoma lyafumita bwa kimante. Daudi yaalumuka yaabulagho." 
1Samuel19:11 Obwire obwo, Saulo yaasindika abakwenda ku ndhu ya Daudi, bamweteege bamwite enkyo ku nkyo. Aye Mikali muka Daudi oyo yaamulabula ati: “Bw'otaalumuke bwire buno kuwonia bulamu bwo, enkyo baidha kukwita.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Kale Mikali yaikiza Daudi mu dinisa, Daudi oyo yaalumuka yaawona." 
1Samuel19:13 Agho Mikali yaagema ekifaananie ky'omusambwa gw'omu maka, yaakirambaaza ku buliri. Yaata emintwetwe waakyo omwito ogwakolebwa mu buviiri bw'embuzi, yaakighembaku engoye." 
1Samuel19:14 Saulo bwe yatuma abakwenda okunona Daudi, Mikali yaabakoba ati: “Daudi mulwaire.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Agho Saulo yaatuma abakwenda baireyo bamuboneku beene. Yaabakoba ati: “Muje mumubbeedere ku buliri bwe, mumuleete ghano, mmwite.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Abakwenda bwe baingira, baaja okulinga bati nga babona ekifaananie ky'omusambwa gw'omu maka, nga n'ekiri mu buliri, nga n'omwito ogwakolebwa mu buviiri bw'embuzi guli emintwetwe waakyo." 
1Samuel19:17 Saulo yaabuuza Mikali ati: “Lwaki onimbye otyo, n'oleka omuzigu wange okuja n'abulagho?” Mikali yaamwiramu ati: “Yankobye ati, ‘Ndeka nje, ntakwita!’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 Agho Daudi yaalumuka yaabulagho, yaaja yaatuuka ye Samueli e Rama, yaamukobera byonabyona Saulo bye yamukola. Daudi oyo ni Samueli baaja e Naiothi baaba eyo." 
1Samuel19:19 Ghaabaagho eyakobera Saulo ati: “Daudi ali e Naiothi mu Rama.” 
1Samuel19:20 Kale Saulo yaatuma abakwenda okugema Daudi. Aye abakwenda abo bwe baabona ekikunsu eky'abalanzi nga bali kulanga, nga Samueli ali nabo era nga n'omukulembeze waibwe, omwoyo gwa Katonda gwabaidhaku, boona baatoolera okulanga." 
1Samuel19:21 Agho abantu baakobera Saulo, yaatumayo abakwenda abandi, aye boona baatoolera okulanga. Era Saulo yaatumayo abakwenda abandi omukuzi ogwokusatu. Aye era boona baatoolera okulanga." 
1Samuel19:22 Kale mwene yaaja e Rama, yaatuuka ku nsulo enkologho eri e Seku, yaabuuza ati: “Samueli ni Daudi bali luuyi gha?” Agho ghaabaagho eyamukobera ati: “Bona eno, bali e Naiothi mu Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Kale yaava agho, yaaja e Naiothi mu Rama. Bwe yali ali kuja, omwoyo gwa Katonda yeena gwamwidhaku. Yaaja ng'ali kulanga okutuusa bwe yatuuka e Naiothi mu Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 Yeena yaatoolamu ebivaalo bye, yaalanga ng'ali mu maiso ga Samueli. Yaalambaala agho ng'ali madu obwire obwo bwonabwona. Okwo n'okwava endhogera ekoba eti: “Obwo Saulo yeena yafuuka mulanzi?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Agho Daudi yaalumuka okuva e Naiothi mu Rama, yaaja eri Yonathani, yaamukoba ati: “Kiki kye nakola? Musango ki gwe naiza? Era kibi ki kye nakola ku lata wo memale ayende okundhita?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Yonathani yaamukoba ati: “Busa naire. Toidha kufa. Bona eno, lata wange ghazira ky'akola n'aloba kunkoberaku, ka kibe kinene oba kitono. Kale lwaki yandingisiisa ekyo? Ekyo ti kituufu naire.”"
