1Samuel20:3 Aye Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Lata wo akiidhi bukalamu nga iwe ongonza inho, kale yaakoba mule ati, ‘Kino Yonathani atakimanha, alobe kuwulira nnaku ku mwoyo mbitirivu.’ Aye nkulayirira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu nti nsigaizaayo kaseera buseera nfe.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Yonathani yaakoba Daudi ati: “Ky'onaayenda kyonakyona ndidha kukikukolera.” 
1Samuel20:5 Daudi yaakoba Yonathani ati: “Bona eno, enkyo n'olunaku olw'Ekibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi. Era nandibaire nga nteekwa okutyama ni kyabazinga okulya. Aye ndeka nje neegise mu nsiko okutuusa eigulo ly'olunaku olunairirira olwenkyo." 
1Samuel20:6 Lata wo bw'anaakizuula nga nziragho, oidha kumukobera oti, ‘Daudi yaneegayiriire mmuganhe aje e Bethelehemu mu kibuga ky'ewaibwe, kuba ab'endhu ya lata we boonaboona baja kughaayo omusengo gwe baghaayo buli mwaka.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Bw'anaakoba ati, ‘Kirungi’, olwo nze omugheereza wo ndidha kuba nga ndi bukalamu. Aye bw'anaasungughala, ng'omanha nga ghaligho akabi k'ategeike okunkola." 
1Samuel20:8 Kale ni ngemerwa ekivunika nze omugheereza wo, kuba twaita omukago mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Aye bwemba ng'omusango gunsinga, iwe mwene ndhita, kuba tibona nsonga ekuntwazisa ya lata wo kundhita.”" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonathani yaakoba ati: “Ekyo tikiribaagho ku iwe! Nze nsobola ntya okumanha nga ghaligho akabi lata wange k'ategeike okukukolaku, memale ni ndoba okukukobera?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Daudi yaabuuza Yonathani ati: “Aye naani anankobera nga lata wo akwizeemu na busungu.” 
1Samuel20:11 Yonathani yaamukoba ati: “Kola tuje mu nsiko.” Kale bombi baafuluma, baaja mu nsiko." 
1Samuel20:12 Era Yonathani yaayongera okukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli k'abe omudhulizi. Olwaidho mu kiseera ng'oti ni kino oba olwadhuuzi, ndidha kuleba lata wange ankobere. Bwe nnaabona ng'ali kukwogeraku bukalamu, ndidha kukusindikira obukwenda nkumanhise." 
1Samuel20:13 Aye lata wange bw'anaaba ng'ali kwenda kukukola kabi, memale ni ntakumanhisaaku era ni ntakuyamba kulumuka kwewonia, Musengwa Katonda agwananga yandhita. Nsaba Musengwa Katonda oyo abenga n'iwe, nga bw'abairenga aba ni lata wange!" 
1Samuel20:14 Bwembanga nga nkaali mulamu, ondaganga okugonza okw'amazima okwa Musengwa Katonda, naaloba kufa." 
1Samuel20:15 Era olaganga ab'endhu yange okugonza kwene okwo ebyanda n'ebyanda. Musengwa Katonda ni bw'azikirizanga abazigu bo, iwe Daudi, okubamalagho," 
1Samuel20:16 otaganhanga liina lya Yonathani kwerabirwa ba mu ndhu yo. Era Musengwa Katonda akughenga okwesasuuliza ku bazigu bo.” 
1Samuel20:17 Yonathani yairamu okulayiza Daudi amugonzenga, kuba Yonathani yagonzanga inho Daudi ng'oti ni bwe yeegonzanga mwene." 
1Samuel20:18 Agho Yonathani oyo yaakoba Daudi ati: “Olwaidho n'olunaku olw'Ekibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, era abantu baidha kumanha ng'oziragho, kuba ekityamo kyo tikiidha kubaaku muntu." 
1Samuel20:19 Ate olwadhuuzi baja kwewuunhia inho okubona ng'oziragho. Kale ni ja mu kifo mwe weegisaaku ku mukuzi gule, obe einhuma w'emungo ey'amabaale." 
1Samuel20:20 Ndidha kulasa obulaso busatu ku mmungo eyo ng'oti ghaligho kye ndi kuteeba. 
1Samuel20:21 Kale bwe nnaatuma omwisuka nga mmukoba nti, ‘Ja onoonie obulaso obwo’, era ni mmukoba nti, ‘Bona, obulaso buli ku luuyi lwo luno eno’, ng'olwo ovaayo. Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu nti ghaidha kuba nga ghazira kabi koonakoona." 
1Samuel20:22 Aye bwe nnaakoba omwisuka nti, ‘Bona, obulaso bubiseegho buli ere emberi’, olwo ng'oja, kuba Musengwa Katonda anaaba ng'akusindiike kuja." 
1Samuel20:23 Aye ebyo bye tulayiire twembi, Musengwa Katonda n'aidha okubanga omudhulizi ghagati wo ninze, ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Kale Daudi yeegisa mu nsiko, era ku lunaku olw'Ekibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, kyabazinga Saulo yaatyama ku kiiwulo okulya." 
1Samuel20:25 Era nga buliidho, yaatyama ku kityamo kye kumpi n'ekimante. Yonathani yaamutyama mu maiso nga balingagaine, ate Abuneri yaatyama mu mbali mwa Saulo oyo. Ekityamo kya Daudi kyali nga kiziraku muntu." 
1Samuel20:26 Aye Saulo ghazira kye yakoba ku lunaku olwo. Yadhuuba mule ati: “Ghaligho ekituuse ku Daudi kyamufuula atali mulongoofu, era bwenebwene tiimulongoofu.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Aye ku lunaku olwairirira lule olw'Ekibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, ekityamo kya Daudi era kyaba nga kiziraku muntu. Saulo yaabuuza Yonathani mutabane we ati: “Lwaki mutabane wa Yesse taidhie ku kiiwulo leero, ate nga n'idho tiyaidhie?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonathani yaamwiramu ati: “Daudi yaneegayiriire mmuganhe aje e Bethelehemu. 
1Samuel20:29 Yankobye ati, ‘Nkweghembye nganha nje, kuba ab'endhu yaife bali n'omukolo mu kibuga ogw'okughaayo omusengo, era muganda wange yankobye obutabulayo. Kale ni bw'oba ng'ongemeirwa ekivunika, ndeka nje mbone baganda bange.’ Isebantu kyabazinga, eyo n'ensonga emuleeteire obutaba ku kiiwulo kyo.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Agho obusungu bwa Saulo bwatumbukira ku Yonathani ng'oti muliro, yaamukoba ati: “Iwe omwana w'omukazi omudheemu era omudankaanu, nkiidhi bukalamu nti wasalagho okuba ku luuyi lwa mutabane wa Yesse, weereetera okweswaza iwe mwene era n'okuswaza inhoko." 
1Samuel20:31 Oli n'okukimanha nti mutabane wa Yesse oyo bw'asigala ng'akaali mulamu ku nsi, iwe tolifuuka kyabazinga. Kale mpegaano mwetese aidhe, omundeetere, kuba ateekwa buteekwe okufa.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Yonathani yaabuuza lata we Saulo ati: “Lwaki Daudi ateekwa kufa? Kiki ky'akoze?” 
1Samuel20:33 Agho Saulo yaamukonhoogerera eifumo limufumite! Olwo Yonathani yaamanha nga lata we yali mumalirivu okwita Daudi. 
1Samuel20:34 Kale Yonathani yaasituka ku kiiwulo mu busungu obubitirivu, era yaaloba kulya ku mere naire, ku lunaku olwo olwiririra lule olw'Ekibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi kuba yanakughala inho olwa lata we Saulo okughemukira Daudi." 
1Samuel20:35 Ku nkyo Yonathani yaaja mu nsiko nga bwe baalagaana ni Daudi. Yaaja ng'agherekeirwaku omwisuka omutomuto. 
1Samuel20:36 Yonathani yaakoba omwisuka ati: “Lumuka oje onoonie obulaso bwe nnaalasa.” Omwisuka bweyali ali kulumuka, Yonathani yaalasa akalaso, kaabita ku mwisuka oyo, kaagwa emberi we." 
1Samuel20:37 Omwisuka bwe yatuuka aghali akalaso Yonathani ke yalasa, Yonathani oyo yaamweta yaamukoba ati: “Akalaso kali mberi wo.”" 
1Samuel20:38 Agho Yonathani yaamukoba ati: “Yangugha mangu, otalwayo eyo.” Kale omwisuka yaalondalonda obulaso mangu, yaira ye musengwa we." 
1Samuel20:39 Aye omwisuka ghazira kye yamanha naire. Yonathani ni Daudi bonka n'abaamanha. 
1Samuel20:40 Agho Yonathani yaatoola eby'okulwanisa bye, yaabigemya omwisuka, ng'amukoba ati: “Ja obitwale mu kibuga.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Omwisuka olwamala okuja ati, Daudi yaasituka okuva einhuma w'emungo ey'amabaale. Yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka emikuzi esatu, ng'ali ku makiryaivu. Agho baanhwegeragana bombi nga bwe balira, okutuusa Daudi bwe yamala n'aguma." 
1Samuel20:42 Yonathani yaakoba Daudi ati: “Ja miraala. Twembi ka tusigale nga bwe tulayiire mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda, nga tukoba tuti, ‘Musengwa Katonda aidha kubanga ghagati ghange n'iwe, era abenga ghagati gh'eizaire lyange n'eriryo ebyanda n'ebyanda.’ ” Agho Daudi yaasituka yaaja, ate Yonathani yairayo mu kibuga." 
1Samuel21:1 Agho Daudi yaaja, yaatuuka e Nobu ye Ahimeleki kabona. Ahimeleki yaidha okumusangaaza ng'adhugumira, yaamubuuza ati: “Lwaki oli wenka nga ghazira akugherekeireku?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Daudi yairamu Ahimeleki kabona ati: “Kyabazinga ali ni ky'antumye okukola, era yankoba ati, ‘Ghatabaagho muntu yeenayeena amanha kye nkutumye, waire kye nkulagiire.’ Aye abasaadha bange ghaligho ghe tulagaine okwagaanana nabo." 
1Samuel21:3 Buti kya kulya ki ky'oli nakyo agho? Nfuniraayo emigaati etaanu oba ekirigho kyonakyona.” 
1Samuel21:4 Kabona oyo yairamu Daudi ati: “Nziragho ghano migaati gyabuliidho. Emigaati gye ndi nagyo n'emitukuvu. Nsobola okugikugha, abasaadha bo bwe baba nga beekuumye obutaba na bakazi.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Daudi yaamwiramu ati: “Mu butuufu, buli lwe tuja okukola kye batutumye, tituganha bakazi kuseeta ye tuli. Ate oba abasaadha bange beekuuma nga balongoofu nga tuli kuja mu lugendo ni bwe luba olwabuliidho, memale luno tibaasinzeegho inho?”" 
1Samuel21:6 Kale kabona oyo yaagha Daudi emigaati emitukuvu, kuba tighaali migaati gindi okutoolaku egyo egigheereibwayo eri Katonda, gye baatoolanga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, era ku lunaku lwene olwo lwe baagitoolangagho, ni baizaagho egindi egyakafumbibwa." 
1Samuel21:7 Ku lunaku olwo, ghaaligho owundi ku bagheereza ba Saulo, ng'ali n'ensonga emusigaiza mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Eriina lye nga ni Doegi, eyava mu Edomu era ng'akulira abaayi ba Saulo." 
1Samuel21:8 Daudi yaabuuza Ahimeleki ati: “Oziraku ghano ifumo oba mpiima? Titambwire na mpiima waire eby'okulwanisa ebindi, kuba kyabazinga ky'antumye okukola kibaire kya mangu.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Agho kabona oyo yairamu ati: “Ghaligho ghano empiima ya Goliathi Omufilisiti ye waitira mu kiiko ky'e Ela. Empiima eyo eri einhuma w'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona, nga nzingirire mu lugoye. Oba oyenda okutwala eyo, gitwale, kuba ghaziragho yindi okutoolaku eyo.” Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Mpa eyo, ezirayo yindi eri ng'oti n'eyo.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Kale Daudi yaasitula ku lunaku olwo, yaalumuka Saulo. Yaaja ye Akishi kyabazinga w'e Gathi." 
1Samuel21:11 Abagheereza ba Akishi baakoba bati: “Ono ti ni Daudi kyabazinga ow'ensi eyo? Oyo ti ye baayembanga mu lwembo bwe bakina, nga bakoba bati, ‘Saulo aise nkumi na nkumi, Daudi yaita mitwalo na mitwalo.’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Daudi yeeraliikirira olw'ebibono ebyo, yaatya inho Akishi kyabazinga w'e Gathi." 
1Samuel21:13 Agho yaakyusanga eneebisa ye ng'abalimu, yeegwisanga eiralu nga bamugemye, yaakwadulakwadulanga ku ndhigi edh'omulyango gw'ekibuga. Era yaalekanga amatanta gaakuuluulira mu kirevu." 
1Samuel21:14 Agho Akishi yaakoba abagheereza be ati: “Mubone, ono omusaadha agwire iralu, kale lwaki mumundeeteire?" 
1Samuel21:15 Abalalu n'abambuze, memale mundeetere omusaadha ono akolere ghano eiralu mu maiso gange? Obwo mudhuuba muti omusaadha oyo anaingira mu ndhu yange?”" 
1Samuel22:1 Agho Daudi yaava mu kibuga ky'e Gathi, yaalumukira mu mpuku y'e Adullamu. Baganda be n'ab'endhu ya ise bwe baakiwulira, baaja eyo ye yali." 
1Samuel22:2 Abantu abaali batuntuzibwa, n'abaali babandhibwa, era n'abo abataali basiimu, boonaboona beesololeza aghaali Daudi. Daudi yaafuuka mukulembeze waibwe, nga boonaboona baghera ng'oti ebikumi bina." 
1Samuel22:3 Eyo Daudi yaavaayo, yaaja e Mizipa eky'e Moabu, yaakoba kyabazinga w'e Moabu ati: “Nkweghembye ganha lata wange ni maama baidhe babe ghano n'iwe, okutuusa nga mmaze okumanha Katonda ky'aja okunkolera.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Agho Daudi yaaleka abazaire be abo ewa kyabazinga w'e Moabu, era baasigala eyo entangama yoonayoona Daudi ye yamala ng'ali mu mpuku." 
1Samuel22:5 Agho Gadi omulanzi yaakoba Daudi ati: “Lekera okuba mu mpuku, ja obenga mu kiketezo ky'e Buyudaaya.” Kale Daudi yaavaayo, yaaja mu kibira eky'e Herethi." 
1Samuel22:6 Lwali lulala, abantu baakobera Saulo bati bazwire Daudi gh'ali n'abantu be yali nabo. Saulo oyo yali ali ku lusozi, ng'atyaime ghansi gh'omuti omutamarisiki, ng'agemye eifumo lye mu ngalo. Abagheereza be boonaboona baali beemereire agho okumwezunguluza." 
1Samuel22:7 Agho Saulo yaakoba abagheereza be abo ati: “Imwe Ababenjamini, muwulire bino: Mulowooza muti mutabane wa Yesse aidha kugha buli muntu ku imwe ebibandha n'amasamba g'emizabbibu? Oba muti mwenamwena aidha kubafuula baduumizi, muduumirenga ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi, n'eby'abaisirukale ekikumi ekikumi?" 
1Samuel22:8 Obwo ekyo kye muviireku okundyamu olukwe? Ghazira muntu waire omulala ku imwe eyankoberaku ati mutabane wange yeeyimbye ni mutabane wa Yesse. Ghazira ku imwe yansaasiraku waire okunkoberaku, ati mutabane wange yapikiriza Daudi, omulala ku bagheereza bange, yaategeka okuneeteega nga bw'akoze olwaleero.”" 
1Samuel22:9 Agho Doegi Omuedomu, eyali nga yeena ayemereire agho ni bagheereza baine aba Saulo, yairamu ati: “Nabona mutabane wa Yesse oyo ng'aidhie e Nobu ye Ahimeleki mutabane wa Ahitubu." 
1Samuel22:10 Ahimeleki oyo yaamwebuulizaagho eri Musengwa Katonda, era yaamugha eby'okulya era n'empiima ya Goliathi Omufilisiti.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Kale kyabazinga yaatuma beete Ahimeleki kabona, n'ab'endhu yaise boonaboona abaali bakabona e Nobu, boonaboona baidha ye kyabazinga." 
1Samuel22:12 Saulo yaakoba Ahimeleki ati: “Wulira iwe mutabane wa Ahitubu.” Ahimeleki yaamwiramu ati: “Ndi kuwulira, musengwa wange.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Saulo yaamubuuza ati: “Lwaki iwe ni mutabane wa Yesse mwandyamu olukwe? Lwaki wamugha eby'okulya, n'empiima, era n'omwebuulizaagho ye Katonda, memale n'aneefuulaku okuneeteega nga bw'akoze olwaleero.”" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki yairamu kyabazinga ati: “Mu bagheereza bo boonaboona naani omwesigwa ng'oti ni Daudi? Daudi oyo, mukoirume wo era n'akulira ekikunsu eky'abakukuuma, era wa kitiibwa mu ndhu yo." 
1Samuel22:15 Guno ti n'omukuzi gwe nsoose okumwebuulizaagho ye Katonda! Busa, ti n'ogusoose. Isebantu kyabazinga, otavunaana nze kintu kyonakyona waire okuvunaana ab'endhu ya lata wange, kuba nze omugheereza wo bino eby'okukulyamu olukwe, ghazira kye mbiidhiku naire akatono kati.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Aye kyabazinga yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene, iwe Ahimeleki n'ab'endhu ya lata wo boonaboona, muteekwa kufa.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Agho kyabazinga oyo yaakoba abakuumi be abaali beemereire okumpi naye, ati: “Mukyuke mwite bakabona ba Musengwa Katonda, kuba beeyimba ku Daudi, baamanha ng'alumwike baaloba kunkobera.” Aye abagheereza ba kyabazinga abo, baaloba kusitula mikono gyaibwe kwita bakabona ba Musengwa Katonda." 
1Samuel22:18 Agho kyabazinga yaakoba Doegi ati: “Iwe kyuka oite bakabona abo.” Era Doegi Omuedomu yaagwa ku bakabona yaabaita. Ku lunaku olwo yaita bakabona kinaana na bataanu abaavalanga ebivaalo eby'obwakabona ebyakolebwa mu ngoye empegheevu. 
1Samuel22:19 Saulo bwe yamala, yaaja e Nobu mu kibuga kya bakabona, yaita abasaadha n'abakazi, abaana abato n'abayonka, ente, endogoyi, n'entaama byonabyona yaabiita." 
1Samuel22:20 Aye ku batabane ba Ahimeleki, mutabane wa Ahitubu, kwaliku mulala eyalumuka n'awona nga bamweta Abiathari, yaaja yeeyimba ku Daudi." 
1Samuel22:21 Abiathari oyo yaakobera Daudi ati Saulo aise bakabona ba Musengwa Katonda. 
1Samuel22:22 Daudi yaakoba Abiathari ati: “Bwe nabona Doegi Omuedomu ng'ali mu kibuga Nobu, naamanha nga taidha kuloba kukobera Saulo. Ninze naitisa ab'endhu ya lata wo." 
1Samuel22:23 Sigala ghano ninze, otatya, kuba ali kwenda okwita iwe, n'ali kwenda okwita ninze. Ba ghano ninze ndidha okukukuuma.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Agho abantu baakobera Daudi bati: “Abafilisiti bali kulwanisa ekibuga Keila, era bali kunhaga emere eyaakakungulwa.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Kale Daudi yeebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda ati: “Nje numbe Abafilisiti abo?” Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Ja obalwanise, owonie ab'omu kibuga Keila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Aye abasaadha ba Daudi baamukoba bati: “Ate oba nga ghano mu Buyudaaya tuli mu kutya, memale leero bwe tunaaja e Keila okulwanisa amagye ag'Abafilisiti, tituubitirire okutya?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Agho Daudi yeebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda kabiri. Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Situkiramu oje e Keila, kuba ndidha kukugha Abafilisiti abo obaghangule.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Kale Daudi n'abasaadha be baaja e Keila, baalwana n'Abafilisiti baabaita inho, era baabatoolaku ente dhaibwe. Kale atyo Daudi bwe yawonia abatyamye ab'e Keila." 
1Samuel23:6 Abiathari mutabane wa Ahimeleki bwe yalumuka ni yeeyimba ku Daudi e Keila, yaja n'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona." 
1Samuel23:7 Agho baakobera Saulo bati: “Daudi aidhie mu kibuga Keila.” Saulo yaakoba mule ati: “Katonda amungabwire, kuba yeigaliiza mwene bw'aingiire mu kibuga ekiriku endhigi edhiriku ebisiba.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Agho Saulo yaayeta abalwani be boonaboona mu lutalo, baje bazingize Daudi n'abasaadha be okubeezunguluza." 
1Samuel23:9 Daudi yaakitegeera nga Saulo ali kutegeka okumukola akabi. Kale yaakoba Abiathari kabona ati: “Leeta ghano ekivaalo eky'obwakabona.” 
1Samuel23:10 Daudi oyo yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, nze omugheereza wo mpuliire nga Saulo ali kutegeka okwidha e Keila okuzikiriza ekibuga ku lwange." 
1Samuel23:11 Obwo abantu ab'e Keila banampaayo mu ngalo dhe? Obwo bwenebwene Saulo anaidha nga nze omugheereza wo bwe mpuliire? Wo Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, nkweghembye nkobera nze omugheereza wo.” Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Aidha kwidha.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Daudi yaabuuza ati: “Abantu ab'e Keila banampaayo nze n'abasaadha bange mu ngalo dha Saulo?” Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Baidha kukughaayo.” 
1Samuel23:13 Agho Daudi n'abasaadha be abaali baghera ng'oti lukaaga, baasitukiramu baava e Keila, baaja kiisi ye baasobolanga okuja. Saulo bwe baamukobera bati Daudi alumwike e Keila, yaaleka kye yali ategeike okukola." 
1Samuel23:14 Daudi yaabanga eyo nga yeegisiisa mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi, mu irungu ery'e Zifu. Era Saulo yaamuyiiganga buli lunaku, aye Katonda yaaloba kumughaayo mu ngalo dhe." 
1Samuel23:15 Daudi yaatya inho, kuba yabona nga Saulo yali ali kumuyiiga amwite. Daudi oyo yali e Horeshi mu irungu ery'e Zifu." 
1Samuel23:16 Agho Yonathani mutabane wa Saulo yeesitula, yaaja ye Daudi eyo e Horeshi, yaamugumya ayongere okwesiga Katonda." 
1Samuel23:17 Yaamukoba ati: “Otatya, kuba lata wange Saulo taaghange kukukolaku kabi naire. Iwe oidha kuba kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, nze nkwiririre mu kitiibwa. Era ekyo ni lata wange Saulo akiidhi.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Agho bombi baakola endagaano mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Bwe baamala, Yonathani yairayo eka ate Daudi yaasigala e Horeshi." 
1Samuel23:19 Agho abantu baava e Zifu baaja ye Saulo, baamukoba bati: “Daudi yeegisiisa ewaife e Horeshi ku lusozi Hakila, oluli ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba olwa Yeshimoni." 
1Samuel23:20 Buti ni, Isebantu kyabazinga, nga bw'oyenda einho okumugema, ife twidha kumughaayo mu ngalo dho.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Saulo yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda abaghe enkabi, olw'okungemerwa ekivunika." 
1Samuel23:22 Muje mwongere okukakasa, mubonere irala ekifo mw'aba era n'abantu abaamuboineku, kuba mpulira mbu mugezigezi inho." 
1Samuel23:23 Kale ni muje mubonere irala ebifo mw'abwama ni yeegisa, memale mwire nga muli n'amawulire amakakafu. Olwo ndidha kuja n'imwe, era bw'anaaba ng'ali mu kiketezo ekyo, ndidha kumwagaaza mu nkumi n'enkumi edh'Abayudaaya.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Kale baasitula bairayo e Zifu, beesookangayo Saulo. Mu kiseera ekyo, Daudi n'abasaadha be baali mu irungu ly'e Maoni mu kiiko ekirimu omwiga Yorudani, ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba wa Yeshimoni." 
1Samuel23:25 Agho Saulo n'abasaadha be baaja okwagala Daudi. Aye ghaabaagho eyakobera Daudi. Kale Daudi yaaja aghali olubaale mu irungu ly'e Maoni. 
1Samuel23:26 Saulo yaaja ku luuyi olundi olw'olusozi, ate Daudi n'abasaadha be baaba ku luuyi olundi, nga bali kwangugha okuvaagho kuba Saulo n'abasaadha be baali bazingiiza Daudi n'abasaadha be ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona." 
1Samuel23:27 Mu kaseera ako omukwenda yaatuuka, yaakoba Saulo ati: “Yangughaku okwidha, kuba Abafilisiti balumbye ensi yo.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Kale Saulo yaalekera agho okubingirira Daudi, yairayo okulwanisa Abafilisiti. Ekifo ekyo baakyeta Olubaale Olwokuwoneraku." 
1Samuel23:29 Daudi yaava agho, yaaja mu kiketezo ekyayetebwanga Engedi, yeegisa eyo." 
1Samuel24:1 Saulo bwe yaira ng'ava okubingirira Abafilisiti, baamukobera bati: “Bona, Daudi ali mu irungu ery'omu kiketezo ekyetebwa Engedi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Kale Saulo yaaja n'abalwani enkumi isatu (3,000), abaalondebwamu mu Isiraeli yoonayoona, yaaja okwagala Daudi n'abasaadha be, mu kifo ekyayetebwanga Amabaale ag'Embuzi edh'Omunsiko." 
1Samuel24:3 Agho Saulo yatuuka ku mpuku eyali okumpi n'ebisibo by'entaama ku ngira, yaingira omwo okweyamba. Mu kiseera ekyo, Daudi n'abasaadha be, baali batyaime mu bitundu eby'omunda einho eby'empuku eyo." 
1Samuel24:4 Abasaadha ba Daudi baakoba Daudi bati: “Luno n'olunaku Musengwa Katonda lwe yakukoba ati, ‘Bona eno, nja kukuta omuzigu wo mu ngalo. Olimukola kyonakyona ky'olyenda.’ ” Agho Daudi yaasituka, yeibirira, yaaja yaasala akatundu k'eigemo ku kanzu ya Saulo." 
1Samuel24:5 Aye Daudi bwe yamala okukola ekyo, omwoyo gwamuluma olw'okusala akatundu k'eigemo ku kanzu ya Saulo." 
1Samuel24:6 Yaakoba abasaadha be ati: “Musengwa Katonda anhambe ndobe kubaaku kabi ke nkola musengwa wange kyabazinga, Musengwa Katonda oyo ye yasiiga omuzigo. Tighanga naire kugalula mukono ni ndhita oyo Musengwa Katonda ye yasiiga omuzigo.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Kale Daudi yaikirizisa abasaadha be n'ebibono ebyo, yaaloba kubaganha kukola kabi ku Saulo. Saulo yaasituka, yaava mu mpuku, yaaja." 
1Samuel24:8 Nga ghabiseeghooku akaseera, Daudi yeena yaafuluma mu mpuku, yaayeta Saulo ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga!” Saulo yaalinga einhuma. Daudi yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka." 
1Samuel24:9 Agho Daudi yaakoba Saulo ati: “Lwaki ojiira ku bibono by'abo abakoba bati nze nhenda okukukola akabi? 
1Samuel24:10 Olwaleero weeboneireku n'amaiso go geene, nga Musengwa Katonda abaire okutaire mu ngalo dhange ng'oli mu mpuku. Abandi bankobye nkwite, aye nze naaloba, nga nkoba nti, ‘Tiidha kugalula mukono kwita musengwa wange kyabazinga, kuba n'oyo Musengwa Katonda ye yasiiga omuzigo.’" 
1Samuel24:11 Era lata wange kyabazinga, bwenebwene bona, akatundu k'eigemo ery'ekanzu yo ndi nako mu ngalo dhange. Kale ni, nze okusobola okusala akatundu ku igemo ly'ekanzu yo, aye ni ntakwita, okwo kw'obe omanhire nga nzira kabi ke nkwendeza oba okwenda okukudheemera. Ghazira kibi kyonakyona kye naali nkukozeeku, waire nga iwe oyiigania obulamu bwange obumalegho." 
1Samuel24:12 Musengwa Katonda n'abe asale omusango ghagati ghange n'iwe, era n'abe akwesasuulizeeku olw'ebyo by'onkola, aye nze ku lwange nzira kibi kye ndidha kukukola." 
1Samuel24:13 Ng'ensambo ey'abeira bw'ekoba eti, ‘Omubi n'akola ebibi’, nze tiidha kukukolaku kabi koonakoona." 
1Samuel24:14 Iwe kyabazinga omulamba owa Isiraeli, naani y'oidhie okulumba? Naani y'oidhie okubingirira? Oli kubingirira embwa enfu, era enkukuni obukukuni?" 
1Samuel24:15 Nsaba Musengwa Katonda asale omusango ghagati ghange n'iwe, anoonereze ensonga, ampolereze era antoole mu ngalo dho.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Daudi bwe yamala okukoba Saulo ebibono ebyo, Saulo yaakoba ati: “Mwana wange Daudi, bwenebwene niiwe oli kwogera?” Agho Saulo oyo yaatimbuka yaalira amaziga." 
1Samuel24:17 Yaakoba Daudi ati: “Niiwe omutuufu, kuba onkoleire ebirungi, aye nze naakusasulamu bibi." 
1Samuel24:18 Era olwaleero oyoleike nga bw'ombisiisa obukalamu n'otandhita, ate nga Musengwa Katonda antaire mu ngalo dho." 
1Samuel24:19 Bwenebwene muntu ki atuuka ku muzigu we, n'amuleka n'aja emiraala? Kale ni nsaba Musengwa Katonda akusasulemu ebirungi olw'ekyo ky'onkoleire olwaleero." 
1Samuel24:20 Era bona eno, buti ndidhi nga bwenebwene oidha kuba kyabazinga, era ng'obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli bwidha kukakata nga niiwe oli kufuga." 
1Samuel24:21 Aye ndayirira mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda nga tolizikiriza izaire lyange nga nviiregho, era tolisaaniagho liina lyange mu ba ndhu ya lata wange.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Daudi yaikiriza yaalayirira Saulo atyo. Agho Saulo yairayo ewuwe, aye Daudi n'abasaadha be bairayo mu kifo kyaibwe eky'okwewogomamu." 
1Samuel25:1 Agho Samueli yaafa. Abaisiraeli boonaboona beesoloza okumulira, baamuziika mu maka ge e Rama. Ebyo olwawa, Daudi yaasitula, yaaja mu irungu ery'e Parani." 
1Samuel25:2 Yaabaayo omusaadha e Maoni, eyakoleranga emirimo gye mu Karumeli. Yali mukombe inho, ng'ali n'entaama enkumi isatu (3,000) n'embuzi lukumi (1,000). Mu kiseera ekyo yaliyo e Karumeli, ng'ali kusala ku ntaama dhe obuviiri." 
1Samuel25:3 Omusaadha oyo yali wa ku lulyo lwa Kalebu era nga eriina lye ni Nabali, ate eriina lya mukazi we nga ni Abigaili. Omukazi oyo yali nga mutegeevu era nga mulungi mu mboneka ye. Aye iba oyo, yali wa ikabyo era nga wa mpisa mbi." 
1Samuel25:4 Agho Daudi ng'ali eyo mu irungu, yaawulira ati Nabali yali ali kusala ku ntaama dhe obuviiri." 
1Samuel25:5 Kale yaatuma abaisuka ikumi, yaabakoba ati: “Muje e Karumeli ye Nabali, mumuunamukize." 
1Samuel25:6 Mwidha kumulamusa muti, ‘Emiraala gibe ku iwe, ni ku b'omu ndhu yo, ni ku byonabyona by'oli nabyo." 
1Samuel25:7 Nawuliire nti oli n'abasala ku ntaama obuviiri. Abaayi bo baali n'ife, twaloba kubakolaku kabi koonakoona. Era ekiseera kyonakyona kye baamala e Karumeli, ghazira kintu kyaibwe waire ekirala ekyababulaku." 
1Samuel25:8 Iwe babuuze, baidha kukukobera. Kale ni sangaaza abaisuka bange n'ekisa, kuba twidhiire ku lunaku lwa kibinuko. Nkweghembye ganha oghe abagheereza bo abo, kyonakyona ky'onaaba nakyo era ompeerezeeku zeena, nze mutabane wo Daudi.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Abaisuka ba Daudi bwe baatuuka ye Nabali, baamukoba ebyo byonabyona nga Daudi bwe yabibakoba. Bwe baamala baateega ky'anaabairamu." 
1Samuel25:10 Agho Nabali yairamu abagheereza ba Daudi abo, ng'akoba ati: “Daudi naani? Mutabane wa Yesse naani? Enaku dhino ghaligho abagheereza kamaala abeiba ku basengwa baibwe ni babalumukaku." 
1Samuel25:11 Olwo nze ntoole emere yange, n'amaadhi gange, n'emamba yange ye ndhitiire abantu abali kunsalira ku ntaama obuviiri, mpe abantu be ntaidhi ye bava?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Kale abavubuka ba Daudi abo baakyuka, bairayo ye Daudi, baamukobera ebyo byonabyona." 
1Samuel25:13 Daudi yaakoba abasaadha be ati: “Buli muntu yeesibe empiima ye.” Agho buli muntu yeesiba empiima ye. Daudi yeena yeesiba eyiye. Abantu ng'oti ebikumi bina baanonereza Daudi oyo, ate ebikumi ebibiri baasigala okukuuma ebintu ebikozesebwa." 
1Samuel25:14 Omwisuka mulala ku bagheereza ba Nabali, yaakobera Abigaili muka Nabali oyo, ati: “Bona eno, Daudi atumye abakwenda okuva eyo mu irungu, baidha okulamusa musengwa waife. Aye musengwa waife abavumye buvume." 
1Samuel25:15 Ate nga abasaadha abo baatubisa bukalamu inho. Ghazira kabi koonakoona akaatutuukaku waire ekintu kyonakyona okutubulaku, ekiseera kyonakyona kye twamala nabo eyo mu nsiko." 
1Samuel25:16 Baatukuumanga omusana n'obwire ekiseera kyonakyona kye twamala nabo nga twaya entaama. 
1Samuel25:17 Kale ni ekyo kirowoozeeku era osalegho ky'onaakola, kuba kiidha kuleetera musengwa waife akabi okumwidhira aghalala n'ab'endhu ye. Ate musengwa waife oyo muntu wa ikabyo inho, ghazira aghanga kwogeraku naye.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Agho Abigaili yaayangugha, yaatoola emigaati ebikumi bibiri, n'ensawo ibiri edh'amawu edhirimu omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'entaama itaanu enfumbire irala, n'ebiibo bitaanu eby'emere ey'empeke enkalange, n'obufaaganda kikumi obw'emizabbibu emikaze, n'ebitole ebikumi bibiri eby'ebibala eby'emiti emitiini ebikaziibwa. Ebyo byonabyona yaabitwika ku ndogoyi." 
1Samuel25:19 Yaakoba abagheereza be ati: “Muje muneesookengayo, zeena ndidha kubavaaku einhuma.” Aye yaaloba kukoberaku Nabali iba." 
1Samuel25:20 Abigaili bweyali ng'ali kuvuga endogoyi, ng'ali kwikirira okuva mu ikoona ly'olusozi, yaja okulinga ati, ng'abona Daudi n'abasaadha be nga bali kwidha y'ali. Agho yaayagaanana nabo." 
1Samuel25:21 Nga bakaali kwagaanana, Daudi yali amaze okukoba mule ati: “Obwo bwenebwene lwaki nakuuma ebintu by'omusaadha oyo byonabyona ebyali mu irungu, ni kutabulaku waire ekirala kiti? Ebirungi bye namukolera buti ali kubinsasulamu bibi?" 
1Samuel25:22 Katonda agwananga yambonereza n'obukambwe, bwe bunaakya enkyo nga nkaaleseegho omuntu omulamu ayetebwa omusaadha, ku bantu be boonaboona b'ali nabo.”" 
1Samuel25:23 Abigaili bwe yabona Daudi yaayangugha, yaava ku ndogoyi, yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka." 
1Samuel25:24 Yaagwa agho gha bigere bya Daudi, ng'amukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda wange, omusango ogwo gute ku nze zenka. Era nkweghembye wulirisa nze omugheereza wo omukazi bye nja okukoba." 
1Samuel25:25 Nkusaba, musengwa wange, olobe kufa ku Nabali, kuba omuntu oyo mubi. Era eriina lye kye likoba, yeena ky'ali ayetebwa Nabali, era nga bwenebwene musiru. Aye nze omugheereza wo omukazi tyabona baisuka iwe musengwa wange be watuma." 
1Samuel25:26 Agho ni, musengwa wange, Musengwa Katonda n'akulobeire okwiza omusango ogw'okwita n'ogw'okwesasuuliza ku bazigu bo. Kale ni nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu era nga weena bw'oli omulamu, abazigu bo n'abo abenda okukukolaku akabi, ka babonerezebwe ng'oti ni Nabali." 
1Samuel25:27 Era mperaano, musengwa wange, ekirabo kino nze omugheereza wo omukazi kye nkuleeteire, kighe abasaadha bo." 
1Samuel25:28 Nkweghembye nsonigha nze omugheereza wo omukazi bye nsobiiza. Bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda aidha kukugha obwakyabazinga obutaja kuvaagho, kuba, iwe musengwa wange, niiwe olwana entalo dha Musengwa Katonda oyo. Era tibalikwagaanamu kibi, obulamu bwo bwonabwona." 
1Samuel25:29 Bwe ghanaabangagho asituka okukuyiigania ng'ayenda okukwita, Musengwa Katonda wo aidha kukukuumanga ng'oti n'omuntu bw'akuuma eky'obukombe eky'omughendo. Aye abazigu bo, Musengwa Katonda aidha kubakonhoogereranga ng'oti n'omuntu bw'akonhoogerera amabaale mu nsuumulo." 
1Samuel25:30 Agho Musengwa Katonda bw'alimala okukukolera ebirungi byonabyona bye yakusuubiza iwe musengwa wange, n'akufuula kyabazinga wa Isiraeli," 
1Samuel25:31 olwo tolibaaku kikweraliikiriza waire kikulumya mwoyo, olw'okwiza ogw'okwita abaziraku musango n'olw'okwesasuuliza ku bazigu bo. Era Musengwa Katonda bw'aliba ng'amaze okukugha enkabi, ondidhukiranga nze omugheereza wo omukazi.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Daudi yaakoba Abigaili ati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli asaakibwe, oyo akutumye olwaleero okwidha ye ndi." 
1Samuel25:33 Weena Katonda oyo akughenga enkabi olw'amagezi go n'olw'okumponia omusango ogw'okwita era n'okwesasuuliza ku bazigu bange. 
1Samuel25:34 Nga Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli bw'ali omulamu, oyo andobeire okukukolaku akabi, bwenebwene ngoli toyangwighe n'oidha ye ndi, bwandijiire okukya nga ku bantu ba Nabali, tighakaaligho waire omulala ati ayetebwa omusaadha, akaali omulamu.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Agho Daudi yaikiriza okutoola ebyo Abigaili bye yamutwalira, era yaamukoba ati: “Irayo ewuwo n'emiraala. Mpuliire by'okobye, era ndhikiriiza okukola nga bw'okobye.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Abigaili yairayo ye Nabali, yaamwagaana ng'afumbye embaga ey'amaani mu ndhu ye embaga eyo ng'eri ng'oti ya kyabazinga. Yali atamiire inho era nga musangaavu inho. Kale Abigaili yaaloba kumukobera kintu kyonakyona okutuusa bwe bwakya enkyo." 
1Samuel25:37 Nabali, omwenge bwe gwamuwa ku mutwe enkyo, mukazi we Abigaili yaamukobera byonabyona. Nabali bwe yabiwulira, omwoyo gwamugwa mu bigere, era yaasigala agho ng'ali ng'oti ibaale." 
1Samuel25:38 Bwe ghaabitagho enaku ng'oti ikumi, Musengwa Katonda yaakuba Nabali, yaafa." 
1Samuel25:39 Daudi bwe yawulira nga Nabali afiire, yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe, oyo eyeesasuliiza ku Nabali eyanvuma, era asaakibwe olw'okunkuuma nze omugheereza we ni ndoba okugwa mu kibi. Buti Musengwa Katonda oyo abonereiza Nabali olw'ekibi kye.” Agho Daudi yaayetesa Abigaili, ng'amukobya abe mukazi we." 
1Samuel25:40 Abagheereza ba Daudi baaja ye Abigaili e Karumeli, baamukoba bati: “Daudi atutumye y'oli tukutwale y'ali obe mukazi we.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Abigaili yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka, yaakoba ati: “Nze ndi mugheereza mukazi agwaine obw'okunaaza ebigere eby'abagheereza ba musengwa wange oyo!”" 
1Samuel25:42 Agho Abigaili yaayangugha okusituka, yaatyama ku ndogoyi. Yaaja n'abagheereza ba Daudi, ng'agherekeirwaku abagheereza be abakazi bataanu. Abigaili oyo yaafuuka muka Daudi." 
1Samuel25:43 Daudi yaabayiza ni Ahinoamu ow'e Yezireeli, bombi ni Abigaili baaba bakazi be." 
1Samuel25:44 Mu kiseera ekyo, Saulo yali amaze okutoola mughala we Mikali, eyali muka Daudi, yaamugabira Palati mutabane wa Laishi ow'e Gallimu." 
1Samuel26:1 Abantu ab'e Zifu baidha baakobera Saulo e Gibea bati: “Daudi yeegisiisa ku lusozi Hakila, oluli e buvandhuba wa Yeshimoni.”" 
1Samuel26:2 Kale Saulo yaasitukiramu, yaaja mu irungu ery'e Zifu okuyiiga Daudi, ng'ali n'abalwani enkumi isatu (3,000) abaalondebwamu mu Isiraeli yoonayoona." 
1Samuel26:3 Saulo yaasimba weema dhe ku lusozi Hakila olwali ku luguudo e buvandhuba wa Yeshimoni. Mu kiseera ekyo Daudi yali ng'akaali mu irungu. Aye Daudi oyo yaamala yaamanha nga Saulo aidhie mu irungu okumuyiiga. 
1Samuel26:4 Kale yaatuma abakeesi baakakalisa irala bati Saulo atuuse. 
1Samuel26:5 Agho Daudi yaasituka, yaaja mu kifo Saulo mwe yasimba weema dhe. Yaabona ekifo Saulo ghe yalambaala, era yaabona ni Abuneri mutabane wa Neri ghe yalambaala, eyali omuduumizi w'eigye lya Saulo. Saulo oyo yali alambaire munda mu kifo ghe baasimba weema, ng'eigye lisimbye weema okumwezunguluza." 
1Samuel26:6 Daudi yaakoba Ahimeleki Omuhitti, ni Abishai muganda wa Yoabu era Mutabane Zeruia, ati: “Naani anaaja ninze ye Saulo, mu kifo ghe baasimba weema?” Abishai yaakoba ati: “Nze ndidha kuja n'iwe.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Kale Daudi ni Abishai baaja mu igye lya Saulo, baayagaana nga Saulo atendwike munda mu kifo ghe baasimba weema, ng'asimbye eifumo lye mu itaka gha mutwe gwe. Abuneri n'abalwani baali balambaire okwezunguluza Saulo." 
1Samuel26:8 Abishai yaakoba Daudi ati: “Katonda akughaire omuzigu wo mu ngalo olwaleero. Kale ni leka mmubiseemu eifumo irala liti, lingire ni mu itaka. Tiidha kumufumita lyakubiri.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Aye Daudi yaakoba Abishai ati: “Busa, otamuzikiriza, kuba naani akola akabi ku oyo Musengwa Katonda ye yasiiga omuzigo, n'atabaaku musango?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Daudi era yaakoba ati: “Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu, era mwene oyo n'alimwita entuuko dhe dhirituuka yaafa, oba alija mu lutalo yaafiira eyo." 
1Samuel26:11 Tikiribaagho nze okukola akabi ku muntu Musengwa Katonda ye yasiiga omuzigo! Aye toola eifumo eryo gha mutwe gwe, n'ekidoome eky'amaadhi, ife tuje.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Kale Daudi yaatoola eifumo n'ekidoome eky'amaadhi ebyali gha mutwe gwa Saulo, baaja. Ghazira muntu waire omulala eyabona, oba eyamanha, waire okubaagho eyairaku engulu, kuba boonaboona Musengwa Katonda yabatendusa endoolo enhingi einho." 
1Samuel26:13 Agho Daudi yaaja ku luuyi olundi, yaayemerera ghalaku ku ngulu ku lusozi, nga ghaligho eibanga inene ghagati ghe n'eigye lya Saulo." 
1Samuel26:14 Yaaba eyo, yaalagiriza ng'akoba eigye ni Abuneri mutabane wa Neri, ati: “Iwe Abuneri, tovugira?” Abuneri yaabuuza ati: “Niiwe ani, ali kweta kyabazinga?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Daudi yaakoba Abuneri ati: “Toli musaadha? Naani ayagayaga n'iwe mu Isiraeli? Memale lwaki tokuumye kyabazinga, musengwa wo? Ghaligho omuntu aidhie eyo okuzikiriza kyabazinga musengwa wo." 
1Samuel26:16 Ekyo ky'okoze ti kirungi. Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu ogwaniire kufa, kuba tokuumye musengwa wo, Musengwa Katonda ye yasiiga omuzigo. Mpegaano eifumo lya kyabazinga n'ekidoome eky'amaadhi ebibaire gha mutwe gwe biri gha?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Agho Saulo yaamanha ng'ago n'amamiro ga Daudi, yaabuuza ati: “Mwana wange Daudi, ago n'amamiro go?” Daudi yairamu ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ago n'amamiro gange.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Daudi era yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene musengwa wange, lwaki oli kundhiigania nze omugheereza wo? Kiki kye nakukola? Musango ki gwe naiza?" 
1Samuel26:19 Isebantu kyabazinga, mperaano ni nkweghemba owulire bye nja okukoba, nze omugheereza wo: Bw'aba nga Musengwa Katonda n'akuleeteire okundhiigania, ka mmusabe aganhe okumugha ekigheebwayo. Aye bwe baba nga bantu, abo Musengwa Katonda abakolimire kuba mperaano baaminze mu nsi ya Musengwa Katonda ey'ensikirano, bansindika mu nsi ey'endha okugheereza emisambwa!" 
1Samuel26:20 Nsaba omusaayi gwange gulobe kuyuyibwa mu nsi Musengwa Katonda mw'atali, kuba kyabazinga wa Isiraeli adhie okuyiiga nze enkukuni obukukuni, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'ayiiga akakologo mu nsozi.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Agho Saulo yairamu ati: “Nkoze bubi. Ira, mwana wange Daudi, tikairayo kabiri kukukolaku kabi, kuba owoniiza obulamu bwange olwaleero. Bwenebwene mbaire musiru, era nkoze kibi inho.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Daudi yaamwiramu ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, eifumo liirino. Omulala ku baisuka k'aidhe alinone" 
1Samuel26:23 Musengwa Katonda asasula buli muntu olw'obutuufu bwe n'obwesigwa bwe. Olwaleero Musengwa Katonda oyo akumpaire mu ngalo dhange, aye nze naaloba kugalula mukono gwange kukola kabi ku oyo Musengwa Katonda ye yasiiga omuzigo." 
1Samuel26:24 Bona eno, nga nze bwe mponiiza obulamu bwo olwaleero, ni Musengwa Katonda k'awonie obwange era ambisenga mu bizibu byonabyona.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Saulo yaakoba Daudi ati: “Mwana wange Daudi, Musengwa Katonda akughenga enkabi. Oidha kubanga mughanguzi mu byonabyona by'onaakolanga.” Agho Daudi yaagema engira yaaja, ate Saulo yairayo ewuwe." 
1Samuel27:1 Agho Daudi yaakoba mule ati: “Luliba lulala Saulo yandhita. Ekisingaku obulungi, n'okulumukira mu nsi y'Abafilisiti. Olwo Saulo aidha kulekera agho okuunoonia mu Isiraeli, mbe n'emiraala.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Kale Daudi n'abasaadha be olukaaga (600) abaali naye, baaja ewa Akishi mutabane wa Maoki, kyabazinga w'e Gathi." 
1Samuel27:3 Daudi n'abasaadha be baasenga ewa kyabazinga Akishi oyo ow'e Gathi, buli mulala ng'ali n'ab'omu maka ge. Daudi yali ni bakazi be bombi: Ahinoamu ow'e Yezireeli, ni Abigaili namwandu wa Nabali ow'e Karumeli." 
1Samuel27:4 Bwe baakobera Saulo bati Daudi alumukiire e Gathi, yaalekera agho okumunoonia." 
1Samuel27:5 Agho Daudi yaakoba Akishi ati: “Bw'oba ng'onsiimye, ganha ompe ekifo mwe nnaabanga, mu kirala ku bibuga ebitonotono. Nze omugheereza wo tigwaine kuba mu kibuga kino ekikulu iwe mw'oba.”" 
1Samuel27:6 Kale ku lunaku olwo, Akishi yaagha Daudi ekibuga Zikulaga. Era ekibuga ekyo kyasigala nga kya bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya ni ye buli eno." 
1Samuel27:7 Daudi yaaba mu nsi y'Abafilisiti okumala omwaka mulala n'emyezi ena. 
1Samuel27:8 Mu kiseera ekyo Daudi n'Abasaadha be, baajanga baalumba Abageshuri, n'Abagirizi, n'Abamaleki, kuba okuva eira n'eira, abo n'abaali abatyamye ab'ekiketezo ekyo okutuukira irala e Shuri ku nsalosalo ni Misiri." 
1Samuel27:9 Daudi yaalumbanga ekiketezo ekyo, yaalobanga kulekagho musaadha waire omukazi nga mulamu. Era yaanhaganga entaama, n'ente, n'endogoyi, n'engamiya, n'ebivaalo, memale yairangayo ye Akishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akishi bwe yamubuuzanga ati: “Gha gh'ojiire okulumba olwaleero?” Nga Daudi amwiramu ati: “Tulumbye ebiketezo ebikalukalu ebya Buyudaaya ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba.” Oba ati: “Tulumbye ebiketezo ebikalukalu ebya Abayerahameeli.” Oba ati: “Tulumbye ebiketezo ebikalukalu eby'Abakeni.” 
1Samuel27:11 Daudi yaaloba kulekangagho musaadha waire omukazi nga mulamu. Olwo ghalobe kubaagho aleeta mawulire e Gathi, kuba Daudi yakobanga mule ati: “Tomanha bwe baja ni batuseegha, nga bakoba bati: ‘Daudi akola ati n'ati.’ ” Atyo Daudi bwe yakolanga ekiseera kyonakyona kye yamala mu nsi y'Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel27:12 Agho Akishi yeesiga Daudi, ng'akoba mule ati: “Bwenebwene Daudi yeereeteire abantu be Abaisiraeli okumukyayira irala, n'olw'ekyo aidha kubanga mugheereza wange buliidho.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Mu biseera ebyo Abafilisiti baasoloza amagye gaibwe okulwanisa Abaisiraeli. Akishi yaakoba Daudi ati: “Okiidhi bukalamu nga iwe n'abasaadha bo mwidha kuja ninze mu lutalo.” 
1Samuel28:2 Daudi yaamwiramu ati: “N'ekyo kyene, era oidha kutegeera nze omugheereza wo kye nsobola okukola.” Akishi yaakoba Daudi ati: “Kale ndidha kukufuula ankuuma ow'olubeerera.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Mu kiseera ekyo Samueli yali amaze okufa, nga n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona bamaze okumulira n'okumuziika e Rama mu kibuga kye. Era Saulo yali amaze okubinga abalaguzi n'abasamize mu Isiraeli." 
1Samuel28:4 Agho Abafilisiti beesoloza, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Shunemu. Saulo yaasoloza Abaisiraeli boonaboona, baaja baasimba weema dhaibwe e Giliboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Saulo bwe yabona eigye erya Abafilisiti, yaatya yaadhugumira inho." 
1Samuel28:6 Era yeebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda, aye Musengwa Katonda yaaloba kumwiramu, ka mube mu birooto, oba mu kukozesa Urimu, oba waire ng'abita mu balanzi." 
1Samuel28:7 Agho Saulo yaakoba abagheereza be ati: “Muje mundhagalire omukazi omusamize, nje mmwebuuzeeku.” Abagheereza be bamwiramu bati: “Ghaligho omukazi omusamize ali mu Endori.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Kale Saulo yeefuusafuusa, yaavaala ebivaalo ebindi. Yaaja n'abasaadha be babiri eri omukazi oyo ng'obwire buzibye, yaamukoba ati: “Ndagula eri emizimu era ondhetere omuzimu ogw'omuntu ye nnaakoba eriina.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Omukazi yaamukoba ati: “Bwenebwene oidhi bukalamu Saulo kye yakola, nga bwe yamalagho abalaguzi n'abasamize mu Isiraeli. Kale mperaano lwaki oli kwenda okunsuula ku mutego okundhisa?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Aye Saulo yaamulayirira mu Musengwa Katonda, ng'akoba ati: “Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu ezira kibonerezo kija kukutuukaku olw'okukola kye ndi kukukoba.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Agho omukazi yaamubuuza ati: “Naani ye mbe nkwetere?” Saulo yaamwiramu ati: “Ndhetera Samueli.” 
1Samuel28:12 Omukazi bwe yabona Samueli, yaayasiikanira ghaigulu ng'akoba Saulo ati: “Lwaki onsubaighe? Niiwe Saulo kyabazinga!”" 
1Samuel28:13 Aye kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Otatya! Kiki ky'oli kubona?” Omukazi yaamwiramu ati: “Ndi kubona omuzimu nga guva mu itaka.” 
1Samuel28:14 Saulo yaamubuuza ati: “Gufaanana gutya?” Yaamwiramu ati: “Omusaadha omukaire n'ali kuva mu itaka, ng'avaire ekanzu.” Agho Saulo yaamanha nga ni Samueli, yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka." 
1Samuel28:15 Samueli yaabuuza Saulo ati: “Lwaki ontabwiretabwire n'ontoola e magombe?” Saulo yaamwiramu ati: “Ndi mu buzibu obutaloodheka! Abafilisiti bantanwireku olutalo, ate Katonda andekuliire agho, yaaloba okundhiramu, ni bwe kuba okubita mu balanzi oba mu birooto. Kyenviire ni nkweta onkobere kye mbe nkole.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Agho Samueli yaamukoba ati: “Memale lwaki obuuza nze, oba nga Musengwa Katonda akulekuliire agho era ng'afuuse muzigu wo?" 
1Samuel28:17 Musengwa Katonda oyo akoze kye yakukoba ng'abita mu nze. Akutoireku obwakyabazinga yaabugha mwino Daudi," 
1Samuel28:18 kuba wadheemera ekiragiro kye, waaloba kuzikiriza Bamaleki nga bwe yayenda. Musengwa Katonda ekyo ky'aviireku okukubisa atyo olwaleero." 
1Samuel28:19 Era Musengwa Katonda aidha kukughaayo iwe ni Isiraeli yoonayoona, mu ngalo dh'Abafilisiti.”" 
1Samuel28:20 Amangu ago, Saulo yaagwa ghansi yeegolomola, ng'aidhwire okutya olw'ebyo Samueli bye yakoba. Yaaweeramu irala amaani, kuba yali nga taliire omusana gwonagwona n'obwire." 
1Samuel28:21 Omukazi yaaseeta aghali Saulo, yaabona ng'atiire inho. Yaamukoba ati: “Bona eno, nze omugheereza wo omukazi ngondeire ky'onkobye, naawaayo obulamu bwange naakola nga bw'okobye." 
1Samuel28:22 Kale mperaano, nze omugheereza wo omukazi, nkweghemba weena okole kye ndi kukusaba. Ganha nkuleetere ku kamere olyeku, ofune amaani ag'okutambula nga mwirayo.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Saulo yaaloba ati: “Tiidha kulya.” Aye abagheereza be ghalala n'omukazi oyo, baamwikirizisa yaagondera bye baamukoba. Kale yaasituka yaava ku itaka ghansi ghe yali, yaatyama ku buliri." 
1Samuel28:24 Omukazi yaligho agho n'ente entototo ye baapiita ensavu mu ndhu. Agho yaayangughaku okugiita, yaatoola engaano yaagikanda, yagifumbamu emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa." 
1Samuel28:25 Yaabireetera Saulo n'abagheereza be, baalya. Bwe baamala baasituka baagolola obwire obwo." 
1Samuel29:1 Agho Abafilisiti baasololeza amagye gaibwe goonagoona mu Afeki, ate Abaisiraeli baasimba weema dhaibwe kumpi n'ensulo ey'e Yezireeli." 
1Samuel29:2 Abafuzi b'Abafilisiti bwe baabitagho n'ebikunsu byaibwe eby'abasaadha olukumi olukumi n'eby'ekikumi ekikumi, Daudi n'abasaadha be ghalala ni Akishi, boona baabitagho nga n'abasembyeyo." 
1Samuel29:3 Abaduumizi b'Abafilisiti baabuuza bati: “Bano Abaheburayi bakola ki ghano?” Akishi yaakobera abaduumizi abo ati: “Ono ni Daudi omugheereza wa Saulo kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. Abaire ninze okumala entangama nnene, era kasookanga alumuka ku musengwa we n'aidha ye ndi, timubonangamu kisobyo kyonakyona ni ye buli eno.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Aye abaduumizi abo baasungughalira Akishi era baamukoba bati: “Koba omusaadha wo oyo aireyo abe mu kifo kye wamugha. Taidha kuja n'ife mu lutalo, tiikulwa ng'atuuka mu lutalo yaafuuka omuzigu waife. Ghazira kisobola kumutabagania na musengwa we mangu, ekisinga emitwe egy'abasaadha baife ng'abaise." 
1Samuel29:5 Oyo ti ni Daudi ye bemba bwe bakina, nga bakoba bati, ‘Saulo aise nkumi na nkumi, Daudi yaita mitwalo na mitwalo.’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Agho Akishi yaayeta Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu nti obaire mwesigwa ye ndi. Era nze mbona nga kyandibaire kikalamu okuja ninze mu lutalo luno, kuba tikuboinemu kisobyo kyonakyona kasookanga oidha ye ndi okutuusa ni ye buli eno. Aye abafuzi bale abandi tibali kwenda oje n'ife." 
1Samuel29:7 Kale buti irayo mu miraala, olobe kusungughaza bafuzi ba Bafilisiti abo.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Daudi yaabuuza Akishi ati: “Aye kiki kye nkoze? Kisobyo ki ky'omboinemu nze omugheereza wo, kasookanga nkugheereza n'okutuusa ye buli eno, ekindobera okuja okulwanisa abazigu bo iwe musengwa wange kyabazinga?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akishi yaamwiramu ati: “Ndidhi nti mu maiso gange oziraku musango gwonagwona ng'oti malaika wa Katonda. Aye abaduumizi b'Abafilisiti bakobye bati, ‘Taidha kuja n'ife mu lutalo’." 
1Samuel29:10 Kale ni enkyo wuuna buwuune n'abagheereza ba musengwa wo Saulo be waidha nabo, muje mangu geene ng'obwire bwakabona.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Agho Daudi n'abasaadha be baawuuna mu nkyo inho, baatoolera okutambula nga bairayo mu nsi ey'Abafilisiti. Aye Abafilisiti beeyongerayo, baatuuka e Yezireeli." 
1Samuel30:1 Agho Daudi n'abasaadha be baatuuka e Zikulaga ku lunaku olwokusatu. Baayagaana nga Abamaleki balumbye ekiketezo kya Buyudaaya ekikalukalu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, era nga balumbye n'ekibuga Zikulaga baakighangula, baakyokya omuliro." 
1Samuel30:2 Era baanhaga abakazi ni boonaboona abaakirimu, abato n'abakulu. Tibaita muntu yeenayeena, aye baabanhaga bunhage baaja nabo." 
1Samuel30:3 Daudi n'abasaadha be bwe baatuuka mu kibuga, baayagaana nga bakyokiikya omuliro era nga bakazi baibwe, ni batabane baibwe, ni baghala baibwe, babatwaire nga banhage." 
1Samuel30:4 Agho Daudi n'abantu be yali nabo baatimbuka baalira amaziga mangi, okutuusa amaani agalira bwe gaabawaamu." 
1Samuel30:5 Ni baka Daudi bombi, Ahinoamu ow'e Yezireeli ni Abigaili namwandu wa Nabali ow'e Karumeli, boona baali babatwaire nga banhage." 
1Samuel30:6 Daudi yaaba mu buzibu obutaloodheka, kuba abantu baakoba okumukuba amabaale. Abantu boonaboona baali banakughavu, nga balumirwa batabane baibwe ni baghala baibwe. Aye Daudi yaafuna amaani mu kwesiga Musengwa Katonda we." 
1Samuel30:7 Daudi oyo yaakoba Abiathari kabona mutabane wa Ahimeleki ati: “Ndeetera ekivaalo eky'obwakabona.” Abiathari yaaleeta ekivaalo eky'obwakabona eri Daudi. 
1Samuel30:8 Daudi yeebuuzaaku ku Musengwa Katonda ati: “Mingirire abanhazi abo? Nnaabagema?” Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Babingirire, kuba bwenebwene oidha kubagema era onunule abanhage.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Kale Daudi n'abasaadha olukaaga (600) abaali naye, baaja. Bwe baatuuka ku kaiga Besori, abandi baasigala agho." 
1Samuel30:10 Aye Daudi yeeyongerayo n'abasaadha ebikumi bina, kuba abasaadha ebikumi ebibiri baali bakooye inho, nga tibaghanga kusomoka kaiga Besori, kale n'okusigala agho." 
1Samuel30:11 Abasaadha abaaja ni Daudi baayagaana Omumisiri mu irungu, baamuleeta ye Daudi. Baamugha emere yaalya, era baamugha n'amaadhi yaanhwa." 
1Samuel30:12 Baamugha n'ekitole ky'ebibala ebikaziibwa eby'emitiini, era n'obufaaganda obw'emizabbibu obukaziibwa bubiri. Bwe yamala okulya yairamu amaani, kuba yali amaze enaku isatu, omusana n'obwire, nga talya ku mere waire okunhwa ku maadhi." 
1Samuel30:13 Daudi yaamubuuza ati: “Musengwa wo naani? Era ova gha?” Omumisiri yairamu ati: “Nze ndi mwisuka Mumisiri, omugheereza w'Omuamaleki. Musengwa wange yandekulira ghano kuba nalwala, buti ghabiseegho enaku isatu." 
1Samuel30:14 Twalumba ekiketezo ekikalukalu eky'Abakerethi, n'ekya Buyudaaya ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, n'ekya Kalebu, era twayokya ekibuga Zikulaga omuliro.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Daudi yaamubuuza ati: “Oghanga okuntwala eri abanhazi abo?” Omwisuka yairamu ati: “Ndayirira mu liina lya Katonda nga toidha kundhita oba okumpaayo mu ngalo dha musengwa wange, olwo ndidha kukutwala eri abanhazi abo.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Omwisuka Omumisiri oyo yaatwala Daudi eri abanhazi abo. Baabaagaana nga basansaaniire agho woonawoona, nga bali kulya, bali kunhwa, era nga bali kukina. Baali mu kusagamba olw'omunhago omungi gwe baatoola mu nsi Bufilisiti ni Buyudaaya." 
1Samuel30:17 Agho nga buli kuziba, Daudi yaabalumba yaabalwanisa okutuusa eigulo ery'olunaku olwairirira. Ghazira yawonagho okutoolaku abaisuka ebikumi ebina (400) abaaniina engamiya ni balumukagho." 
1Samuel30:18 Daudi yaiza abantu boonaboona, n'ebintu byonabyona Abamaleki bye baali banhaze. Era yaiza ni bakazi be bombi." 
1Samuel30:19 Ghazira kintu kyonakyona kyabula, ka kibe ekinene oba ekitono, ka babe abaana abalenzi oba abaghala, ka gube omunhago oba ekintu kyonakyona Abamaleki kye baali batwaire byonabyona Daudi yabiiza." 
1Samuel30:20 Daudi era yaanhaga entaama, n'embuzi, n'ente ebyo byonabyona baabikulembezaamu, nga mwene ali kubivaaku einhuma. Era baakoba bati: “Guno munhago gwa Daudi.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Agho Daudi yaaja eri abasaadha bale abaasigala ku kaiga Besori, abataaghanga kuja naye olw'okuba abakoowu einho. Baavaayo okumweisuusaayo ni be yali nabo. Daudi bwe yabatuukaku, yaabalamusa." 
1Samuel30:22 Agho abasaadha ababi era abazira kye bagasa, abaali mu abo abaaja ni Daudi, baakoba bati: “Abo abataajiire n'ife ghazira kye twidha kubagha ku munhago gwe tuleese, okutoolaku okubaganha batwale bakazi baibwe n'abaana baibwe, memale bagolole.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Aye Daudi yaabakoba ati: “Baganda bange, mutakola mutyo ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'atughaire. Yatukuumye nga tuli balamu, yaata mu ngalo dhaife abanhazi abo abaatulumba." 
1Samuel30:24 Ghazira muntu aidha kuwulirisa kye muli kukoba. Ole eyasigala einhuma okukuuma ebintu, n'ole eyaja mu lutalo, bateekwa okufuna omugabo n'omulala. Boonaboona baidha kwagayaza nga bagabana.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Era okuva n'olwo, eryo lyafuuka iteeka era kiragiro mu Isiraeli, okutuusa ni ye buli eno." 
1Samuel30:26 Daudi bwe yatuuka e Zikulaga yaatoola ku munhago, yaagheereza ku bakagwa be abakulembeze mu Buyudaaya, ng'akoba ati: “Ekirabo kino kye mbagheereiza, kiva ku munhago gwe twatoola ku bazigu ba Musengwa Katonda.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Era yaagheerezaaku ab'e Betheli, n'ab'e Ramothi mu kiketezo kya Buyudaaya ekikalukalu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, n'ab'e Yattiri," 
1Samuel30:28 n'ab'e Aroeri, n'ab'e Sifumothi, n'ab'e Eshitemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 n'ab'e Rakali, n'ab'omu bibuga eby'Abeyerahameeli, n'ab'omu bibuga eby'Abakeni," 
1Samuel30:30 n'ab'e Horuma, n'ab'e Borashani, n'ab'omu Athaki," 
1Samuel30:31 n'ab'e Heburoni, n'ab'omu bifo Daudi oyo n'abasaadha be mwe baatambuliratambuliranga." 
1Samuel31:1 Agho Abafilisiti baalwanisa Abaisiraeli. Abaisiraeli abo baalumuka, era kamaala baitirwa ku lusozi Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:2 Abafilisiti baabingirira Saulo ni batabane be, baita Yonathani, ni Abinadabu, ni Malakishua, batabane ba Saulo." 
1Samuel31:3 Olutalo lwanhigiriza inho Saulo, ab'obulaso baamwagaana baamulasa, baamutaaku ebibwa ebinene einho." 
1Samuel31:4 Agho Saulo yaakoba eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa ati: “Sowolayo empiima yo onfumite, abo abatali bakekete balobe kwidha kunfumita na kuneesanhukizaaku.” Aye eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa yaaloba kumufumita olw'okutya einho. Kale Saulo mwene yaasowolayo empiima eyiye, yaagyetungaku." 
1Samuel31:5 Ole eyagemeranga Saulo eby'okulwanisa bwe yabona nga Saulo afiire, yeena yeetunga ku mpiima eyiye, yaafiira ghalala naye." 
1Samuel31:6 Kale atyo Saulo yaafa, ni batabane bonsatule, n'ole eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa, era n'abasaadha boonaboona aba Saulo oyo. Boonaboona baafiira ghalala ku lunaku olwo." 
1Samuel31:7 Abaisiraeli abaali ku luuyi lule olw'ekiiko, n'abo abaali ere ng'osomoike Yorudani, bwe baabona ng'eigye lya Isiraeli lirumwike era nga Saulo ni batabane be bafiire, baalekulira agho ebibuga byaibwe, baalumuka. Abafilisiti baidha baabibaamu." 
1Samuel31:8 Enkyo ku lunaku olwairirira ng'olutalo luwoire, Abafilisiti bwe baidha okutoola ebivaalo ku mirambo, baayagaana nga Saulo ni batabane be abasatu baagwire ku lusozi Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Saulo baamutemaku omutwe, era baamuvaalulula eby'okulwanisa bye. Agho baatuma abakwenda woonawoona mu nsi y'Abafilisiti okutuusaayo amawulire ago, mu masabo ag'ebisinzibwa byaibwe ebitali Katonda era ni mu bantu boonaboona." 
1Samuel31:10 Baata eby'okulwanisa bya Saulo mu isabo ly'omusambwa omukazi Ashitarothi, era baakomerera omulambo gwe ku kimante ky'ekibuga Bethi Shani." 
1Samuel31:11 Abatyamye ab'omu kibuga Yabeshi e Gileadi bwe baawulira ekyo Abafilisiti kye baakola Saulo," 
1Samuel31:12 abasaadha abaziramu ntete boonaboona baasituka, baatambula obwire bwonabwona. Baaja baaghanulayo ku kimante ky'ekibuga Bethi Shani omulambo gwa Saulo n'emirambo gya batabane be, baagireeta e Yabeshi baagyokera eyo." 
1Samuel31:13 Baatwala amagumba gaibwe, baagaziika ghansi gh'omuti omutamarisiki, era baasiiba enaku musanvu." 
2Samuel1:1 Agho Saulo ng'amaze okufa, Daudi yaira e Zikulaga ng'amaze okutirimbula Abamaleki, yaabayooku enaku eibiri." 
2Samuel1:2 Ku lunaku olwokusatu yaja okubona ng'omwisuka atuuka, ng'ava mu kifo Saulo ghe yasimba weema dhe. Omwisuka oyo yali akanwiremu ebivaalo bye nga n'omutwe gwe gwidhwire nkungu olw'enaku. Bwe yatuuka eri Daudi yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka." 
2Samuel1:3 Daudi yaamubuuza ati: “Ova gha?” Yaamwiramu ati: “Neibye mu kifo Abaisiraeli ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe.” 
2Samuel1:4 Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Nkobera. Byajiire bitya?” Yairamu ati: “Abaisirukale baife baalumwike mu lutalo era abantu baife kamaala baabaise. Era Saulo ni mutabane we Yonathani, boona baabaise.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Daudi yaamubuuza ati: “Wamanhie otya nga Saulo ni mutabane we Yonathani, baafiire?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Omwisuka oyo yairamu ati: “Neeyagaine nga ndi ku lusozi Giliboa. Okuja okulinga nti, nga mbona Saulo yeesiire ku ifumo lye. Era okuja okulinga nti, nga mbona ebigaali eby'omu lutalo n'abalwani ab'oku mbalaasi nga bali kumwidhira." 
2Samuel1:7 Bwe yalinze einhuma we yambona, yandheta, naavugira nti, ‘Wangi isebo.’" 
2Samuel1:8 Yambuuza ati, ‘Niiwe ani?’ Naamwiramu nti, ‘Ndi Muamaleki.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Yankoba ati, ‘Nkweghembye seeta ghano ondhite, kuba banfumiite ebiwundu eby'amaani, waire nga nkaagheera.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Kale naaseeta naamwita, kuba bwenebwene nabaire ndidhi ng'olunaagwa ati, aidha kufa bufe. Kale naatoola engule eyabaire ku mutwe gwe n'ekikomo ekyabaire ku mukono gwe, biibino mbikuleeteire iwe musengwa wange.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Agho Daudi yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'enaku, n'abasaadha be boonaboona be yali nabo agho baakola batyo." 
2Samuel1:12 Baalira amaziga, baagegenga era baaloba kulya mmere okutuusa eigulo, olw'okuba Saulo, ni Yonathani mutabane we, n'Abaisiraeli abantu ba Musengwa Katonda, baafiira mu lutalo." 
2Samuel1:13 Daudi yaabuuza omwisuka oyo eyamuleetera amawulire ago ati: “Oviira gha?” Yairamu ati: “Ndi mwana wa musaadha musenze Omuamaleki.” 
2Samuel1:14 Daudi yaamubuuza ati: “Oghanga otya obutatya kugolola mukono gwo, okuzikiriza omuntu wa Musengwa Katonda eyasiigibwa omuzigo?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Agho Daudi yaakoba owundi ku baisuka be ati: “Ja omwite.” Era ole yaaja yaamufumita, yaamwita." 
2Samuel1:16 Daudi yaakoba Omuamaleki oyo ati: “Niiwe mwene oweereeteire okufa, kuba omunwa gwo gwene n'ogughaire obudhulizi obukulumiriiza, ng'okoba oti, ‘Naita omuntu wa Musengwa Katonda eyasiigibwa omuzigo.’ ”" 
2Samuel1:17 Agho Daudi yaalira Saulo ni mutabane we Yonathani mu olwembo olw'okulira. 
2Samuel1:18 Yaalagira olwembo olwo balwegerese abantu b'omu Buyudaaya. Era bona, lwaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo kya Yashari. Olwembo olwo luja luti:" 
2Samuel1:19 Wo Isiraeli, abakugheesa ekitiibwa babaitiire ku nsozi dho! Abantu ab'amaani bagwire inho!" 
2Samuel1:20 Mutakikoberaku bantu b'e Gathi, waire okukisansaania mu nguudo edh'e Ashikeloni; kuba mwidha kuleetera baghala b'Abafilisiti okusagamba, olwo muleetere baghala b'abantu abo abatali bakekete okutuumira ghaigulu olw'eisanhu." 
2Samuel1:21 “Imwe ensozi edh'e Giliboa, mugwananga mwaloba kugwaku maadhi waire omusulo obusulo, oba waire amasamba gaimwe okuvaamu ebikungulwa; kuba ku imwe, engabo edh'ab'amaani kwe dhaayonoonerwa, engabo ya Saulo baalekera okugisiiga omuzigo." 
2Samuel1:22 Akalaso ka Yonathani tikairanga, nga tikasaabaine musaayi gwa bafiire era nga tikafumiite masavu ga b'amaani; n'empiima ya Saulo tiyairiranga agho bwereere." 
2Samuel1:23 Saulo ni Yonathani baali bagonzi era abasanhusa! Mu bulamu ni mu kufa tibaayawukana, baali ba mbiro okusinga enkookooma, era baaba ba maani okusinga empologoma." 
2Samuel1:24 Imwe baghala b'Abaisiraeli mulire Saulo, eyabavaazanga ebivaalo eby'ebitiibwa ni mutoonha, era eyabavaazanga ebyamadholobera ebya zaabu." 
2Samuel1:25 Abalwani ab'amaani bagwire inho, baabaitira mu lutalo! Yonathani agwire yaafiira mu nsozi." 
2Samuel1:26 Muganda wange Yonathani, ndi mu bughafu bubitirivu ku lulwo! Obaire mukagwa wange inho. Obairenga ng'ondholeka okugonza okutaloodheka, nga kusinga n'okugonza okw'abakazi." 
2Samuel1:27 Abantu ab'amaani bagwire inho, n'eby'okulwanisa baabirekulira bw'agho.”" 
2Samuel2:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, Daudi yeebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda ati: “Nje mbe mu kindi ku bibuga bya Yuda?” Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Ja.” Daudi yaabuuza ati: “Kibuga ki kye mbe njeemu?” Yaamwiramu ati: “Ja e Heburoni.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Kale Daudi yaaja e Heburoni ni bakazi be bombi: Ahinoamu ow'e Yezireeli, ni Abigaili namwandu wa Nabali ow'e Karumeli." 
2Samuel2:3 Daudi era yaaja n'abasaadha be ghalala n'ab'omu maka gaibwe, baaba mu bibuga ebyezungulwire Heburoni." 
2Samuel2:4 Agho abantu ab'omu kika kya Yuda baidha e Heburoni, baasiiga Daudi omuzigo okumufuula kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Daudi bwe baamukobera bati: “Abantu ab'e Yebeshi eky'omu Gileadi n'abaaziika Saulo,”" 
2Samuel2:5 Daudi yaagheereza abakwenda y'abantu abo, okubakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda abaghe enkabi, kuba mwayoleka obwesigwa bwaimwe eri musengwa waimwe Saulo, mwamuziika." 
2Samuel2:6 Nsaba Musengwa Katonda abagonzenga obutalekera era abenga mwesigwa ye muli. Zeena ndidha kubakoleranga ebirungi olw'ekyo kye mwakola. 
2Samuel2:7 Mpegaano ni, mugume mulobe kubaamu ntete naire, kuba waire nga musengwa waimwe Saulo yafa, aye ab'endhu ya Yuda bansiiga omuzigo, banfuula kyabazinga waibwe.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Mu kiseera ekyo, Abuneri mutabane wa Neri era omuduumizi ow'eigye lya Saulo, yali alumwike ni Ishiboshethi mutabane wa Saulo, ng'ajiire naye e Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:9 Abuneri yaafuulira eyo Ishiboshethi oyo okuba kyabazinga wa Gileadi, n'ow'Abashuri, n'owa Yezireeli n'owa Efuraimu, n'owa Benjamini, era owa Isiraeli yoonayoona." 
2Samuel2:10 Ishiboshethi oyo mutabane wa Saulo, yali wa agheza emyaka amakumi ana egy'obukulu ghe baamufuulira kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. Era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka ebiri. Aye ng'ab'endhu ya Yuda bajiira ku bya Daudi." 
2Samuel2:11 Era Daudi oyo yaafugira ab'endhu ya Yuda mu Heburoni okumala entangama ya myaka musanvu n'emyezi mukaaga. 
2Samuel2:12 Agho Abuneri mutabane wa Neri n'abagheereza ba Ishiboshethi mutabane wa Saulo, baava e Mahanaimu, baaja e Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:13 Yoabu mutabane w'omukazi eyayetebwanga Zeruia, ghalala n'abagheereza ba Daudi, boona baaja baayagaanana nabo ku kidiba eky'e Gibeoni. Baatyama ku luuyi olundi olw'ekidiba, ni bale baatyama ku luuyi olundi." 
2Samuel2:14 Abuneri yaakoba Yoabu ati: “Abaisuka okuva ku buli luuyi ka basituke batuzaanhiremuuku eby'okulwana.” Yoabu yairamu ati: “Kale basituke bazaanhe.” 
2Samuel2:15 Agho abaisuka ikumi na babiri baasituka aba Ishiboshethi mutabane wa Saulo nga ba kika kya Benjamini, n'abandi ikumi na babiri okuva ku bagheereza ba Daudi." 
2Samuel2:16 Buli muntu ku abo yaagema ow'okulwana naye omutwe, yaamufumita empiima mu mbavu, bombi baagwira kulala baafa. Kyova ekifo ekyo baakyeta “Ekibandha eky'Empiima”, era kiri e Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:17 Agho olutalo olw'amaani lwatanukagho ku lunaku olwo. Abasaadha ba Daudi baaghangula Abuneri n'abasaadha be Abaisiraeli. 
2Samuel2:18 Batabane ba Zeruia abasatu boona baali mu lutalo olwo: Yoabu, Abishai, ni Asaheli eyalumukanga einho ng'oti mpuuli." 
2Samuel2:19 Asaheli oyo yaabingirira Abuneri, aghazira kulingalinga." 
2Samuel2:20 Abuneri yaalingaku einhuma, yaamubuuza ati: “Asaheli, niiwe oli kuuminga?” Asaheli yairamu ati: “Ninze.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abuneri yaamukoba ati: “Lekera agho okuumingirira! Kyukira ku mukono gwo omusaadha oba ku mugooda, ogeme mulala ku baisuka omunhageku by'ali nabyo.” Aye Asaheli yaayongera bwongere okumubingirira." 
2Samuel2:22 Kabiri Abuneri yaakoba Asaheli ati: “Lekera agho okuumingirira! Lwaki oli kwenda okundeetera okukwita? Nnaalinganga ntya ku muganda wo Yoabu, nga mmaze okukwita?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Aye Asaheli yaayongera bwongere okumubingirira. Kale Abuneri yaamufumita mu mabunda ng'akozesa omusabi ogw'eifumo lye, eifumo lyamubitamu lyamufulumira mu mugongo, yaagwa era yaafiira gheene agho. Abantu boonaboona abaatuukanga Asaheli ghe yagwa n'afiira, nga beemerera beesimba agho ng'oti bafu." 
2Samuel2:24 Aye Yoabu ni Abishai baabingirira Abuneri. Agho endhuba ng'eri kugwa, baatuuka ku lusozi Amma lw'obitaku memale n'otuuka e Gia, ku ngira eja mu irungu ery'e Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Agho ab'ekika kya Benjamini beesololeza aghali Abuneri ku ngulu ku lusozi, beeyimba ghalala kitole, nga beetegeka okulwana." 
2Samuel2:26 Agho Abuneri yaayeta Yoabu ng'alagiriza, yaamukoba ati: “Tunaalwanagana kutuuka byanda na byanda? Toidhi nga ku nkomerero muvaamu bulumi bwereere? Olirekeza li abantu bo okutubingirira ife baganda baibwe?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Agho Yoabu yaakoba ati: “Ndayira Katonda omulamu, nti ngoli toyogeire, abasaadha bange tibandirekeire kubabingirira n'okutuusa enkyo.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Agho Yoabu yaafuuwa eigwala, abantu be boonaboona baalekera agho okubingirira Abaisiraeli, era baalekera n'okulwana." 
2Samuel2:29 Agho Abuneri n'abasaadha be baatambula obwire obwo bwonabwona nga babita mu kiiko ekirimu omwiga Yorudani, ekyetebwa Araba. Baasomoka omwiga Yorudani, era baatambula enkyo eryo lyonalyona, baatuuka e Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Yoabu ng'amaze okwira y'okubingirira Abuneri, yaayeta abasaadha be beesoloza, yaakizuula nga kubulaku abantu ikumi na mwenda nga tobaliireeku Asaheli." 
2Samuel2:31 Aye abasaadha ba Daudi baita ab'ekika kya Benjamini ebikumi bisatu na nkaaga, abaali abasaadha ba Abuneri." 
2Samuel2:32 Yoabu n'abasaadha be baatwala omulambo gwa Asaheli, baaguziika mu magombe ga ise agaali e Bethelehemu. Yoabu n'abasaadha be baatambula obwire obwo bwonabwona bwabakyeraku nga batuuse e Heburoni." 
2Samuel3:1 Okuva olwo, okulwanagana ghagati gh'abantu ab'oku luuyi olwa Saulo n'abantu ab'oku luuyi olwa Daudi, kwaja nga kubaagho. Oluuyi olwa Daudi lwaja nga lweyongera amaani, ate oluuyi olwa Saulo lwaja nga lweyongera okunafugha." 
2Samuel3:2 Bano ni batabane ba Daudi be yazaalira e Heburoni: Omuberi yali Amunoni, inhina nga ni Ahinoamu ow'e Yezireeli." 
2Samuel3:3 Owokubiri yaaba Kileabu, inhina nga ni Abigaili namwandu wa Nabali ow'e Karumeli. Owokusatu yaaba Abusalomu, inhina nga ni Maaka, mughala wa Talumai eyali kyabazinga wa Geshuri." 
2Samuel3:4 Owokuna yaaba Adoniya, inhina nga ni Haggithi. Owokutaanu yaaba Shefatia, inhina nga ni Abitali." 
2Samuel3:5 Owomukaaga yaaba Ithireamu, inhina nga ni Egila." 
2Samuel3:6 Okulwanagana ghagati gh'abantu ab'oku luuyi olwa Saulo n'abantu ab'oku luuyi olwa Daudi, bwe kwali kukaaja mu maiso, Abuneri yaajanga nga yeeyongera okuba ow'amaani mu bantu ab'oku luuyi lwa Saulo." 
2Samuel3:7 Saulo yali ni mukazi we ow'embali ye baayetanga Rizipa, mughala wa Aya. Agho Ishiboshethi yaakoba Abuneri ati: “Lwaki waja n'oba ni muka lata wange ow'embali mu buliri?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Abuneri yaasungughalira inho Ishiboshethi olw'ebibono ebyo. Yaamukoba ati: “Olowooza oti nze ndi mugheereza wa Yuda? Nga ate n'okutuusa olwaleero luno nkaali mwesigwa eri ab'endhu ya lata wo Saulo, n'eri baganda be, n'eri bakagwa be. Era nga tikughangayooku mu ngalo dha Daudi. Aye ate olwaleero wantaaku omusango ogugemagana n'omukazi!" 
2Samuel3:9 Kale ni Katonda agwananga yambonereza inho, Nze Abuneri, bwentatuukirizanga ekyo Musengwa Katonda kye yalayirira Daudi," 
2Samuel3:10 ati alitoola obwakyabazinga ku b'endhu ya Saulo, yaataagho Daudi abe kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ni Buyudaaya, okuva ku Dani okutuuka e Beerisheba.”" 
2Samuel3:11 Ishiboshethi tiyaghanga kwiramu Abuneri kibono kindi kyonakyona, kuba yali ali kumutya." 
2Samuel3:12 Abuneri yaagheereza abakwenda ye Daudi e Heburoni, bamukobe bati: “Naani mwene nsi eno? Bona eno, bw'onaakola ninze endagaano, ndidha kukozesa obuyinza bwange ndhize Isiraeli yoonayoona ku luuyi lwo.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Kale, ndidha kukola n'iwe endagaano, aye ndi kukwendaku ekintu kirala kiti: oteekwa buteekwe okundeetera Mikali mughala wa Saulo, bw'oliba ng'oli kwidha okumbona.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Daudi era yaagheereza abakwenda ye Ishiboshethi mutabane wa Saulo ng'amukoba ati: “Mpa mukazi wange Mikali ye nagheeraku omwandu ogw'obuwutu ekikumi bwe nakeketa ku basaadha Abafilisiti.” 
2Samuel3:15 Agho Ishiboshethi yaatuma abantu, baatoola Mikali ku iba eyali ayetebwa Palutieli, mutabane wa Laishi." 
2Samuel3:16 Aye Palutieli oyo yaaja ng'anonereza Mikali, nga bw'alira engira yoonayoona okutuuka e Bahurimu. Abuneri yaamukoba ati: “Ja, irayo.” Era yairayo." 
2Samuel3:17 Agho Abuneri yaayogera n'abakulembeze mu Isiraeli. Yaabakoba ati: “Mumaze ekiseera kinene nga mwenda Daudi abe kyabazinga waimwe. 
2Samuel3:18 Kale mpegaano ekyo mukituukirize, kuba Musengwa Katonda yasuubiza Daudi ati, ‘Ndidha kukozesa omugheereza wange Daudi okununula abantu bange Abaisiraeli mu ngalo edh'Abafilisiti, ni mu ngalo edh'abazigu baibwe abandi boonaboona.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abuneri era yaayogera n'abantu ab'ekika kya Benjamini. Bwe yamala yaaja okukobera Daudi ab'ekika kya Benjamini n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona kye baasalagho okukola. 
2Samuel3:20 Abuneri yaaja ye Daudi e Heburoni n'abantu amakumi abiri, Daudi yaabakolera embaga." 
2Samuel3:21 Abuneri yaakoba Daudi ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ka nkole nje nkusololeze Abaisiraeli boonaboona iwe musengwa wange, bakole n'iwe endagaano obafugenga boonaboona nga bwe wayenda.” Agho Daudi yaasiibula Abuneri ng'amaze okumukakasa ng'aidha kuja mu miraala." 
2Samuel3:22 Nga ghabiseegho akaseera katono, Yoabu yaira n'abagheereza ba Daudi nga bava okunhaga, era nga baize n'omunhago mungi inho. Aye mu kiseera ekyo Abuneri yali amaze okuva ye Daudi e Heburoni, nga Daudi amaze okumusiibula n'okumukakasa nga bw'aidha okuja mu miraala." 
2Samuel3:23 Yoabu bwe yatuuka n'eigye lyonalyona lye yali nalyo, baamukobera bati: “Abuneri mutabane wa Neri aidhie okubona kyabazinga, era kyabazinga amusiibwire yaaja miraala.”" 
2Samuel3:24 Agho Yoabu yaaja ye kyabazinga Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Okoze ki ekyo? Lwaki Abuneri aidhie y'oli n'omuleka obuleke n'aja? 
2Samuel3:25 Oidhi bukalamu nga Abuneri mutabane wa Neri aidhie kukuguya, na kubona byonabyona by'okola n'eyo yoonayoona y'otambulira.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Yoabu bwe yava ewa Daudi, yaatuma abakwenda okulumuukirira Abuneri. Baamwagaana ku nsulo eyetebwa eya Sira, baamwiza. Aye Daudi tiyakimanhaku naire." 
2Samuel3:27 Era Abuneri bwe yaira e Heburoni, Yoabu yaamwiza gha mbali gh'omulyango, yaaba ng'oti ali kwenda kwogera naye kyama. Bwe baali nga bali eyo, Yoabu yaamufumita mu mabunda yaafa. Okwo kwali kwesasuuza, kuba Abuneri yaita Asaheli muganda wa Yoabu oyo." 
2Samuel3:28 Daudi bwe yakimanha nga ghabiseeghooku ekiseera, yaakoba ati: “Nze n'abantu ab'omu bwakyabazinga bwange, tuziraku musango gwonagwona mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, olw'okufa kwa Abuneri mutabane wa Neri." 
2Samuel3:29 Yoabu n'ab'endhu ya ise boonaboona, n'ababe bavunaanibwenga omusango ogwo. Mu buli luse olw'ab'endhu eyo mugwananga mwabaamu ali n'endwaire ey'okutoonha okuva mu bitundu eby'ekyama, oba ali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge, oba omulema azira ky'aghanga, oba aitibwa mu lutalo, oba abulwa emere.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Kale Yoabu ni muganda we Abishai, batyo bwe baita Abuneri nga bamwesasuulizaaku olw'okwita muganda waibwe Asaheli, mu lutalo olwali e Gibeoni." 
2Samuel3:31 Agho Daudi yaalagira Yoabu n'abantu be yali nabo bakanulemu ebivaalo byaibwe olw'okunakughala, beesibe ebikaakaati, balire Abuneri. Era kyabazinga Daudi mwene, yaanonereza omulambo gw'Abuneri nga baja okuguziika." 
2Samuel3:32 Baaziika Abuneri e Heburoni, kyabazinga yaakuba empungu, yaalira amaziga, ku magombe ga Abuneri n'abantu abandi boona baalira." 
2Samuel3:33 Kyabazinga yaalira Abuneri ng'akoba ati: “Bwenebwene lwaki Abuneri yafa ng'oti n'omusiru bw'afa? 
2Samuel3:34 Emikono gyo tigyali misibe, n'ebigere byo tibyaliku ndhegere. Wafa ng'oti n'omuntu aitiibwa abantu ababi!” Agho abantu boonaboona kabiri bairamu okulira Abuneri." 
2Samuel3:35 Agho abantu boonaboona baajanga beegayirira Daudi alye ku mmere omusana ogwo. Aye Daudi yeefuugha ng'akoba ati: “Katonda agwananga yambonereza inho, bwe nkombanga ku mmere oba ekintu ekindi kyonakyona ng'endhuba ekaali kugwa.”" 
2Samuel3:36 Ekikolwa ekyo, abantu boonaboona baakibona era baakisiima, ng'oti ni bwe baasiimanga ebintu byonabyona kyabazinga bye yakolanga." 
2Samuel3:37 Agho abantu ba Daudi boonaboona n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, baakitegeera ku lunaku olwo ng'okwita Abuneri mutabane wa Neri tiyali ntegeka ya kyabazinga." 
2Samuel3:38 Kyabazinga yaakoba abagheereza be ati: “Timubona nga Isiraeli olwaleero luno efiiriirwa omukulembeze ow'amaani era omukologho? 
2Samuel3:39 Olwaleero luno mpulira nga nziramu maani, waire nga ninze kyabazinga eyasiigibwa omuzigo. Batabane ba Zeruia bano, banfuukire ekizibu. Oyo eyakola ekibi ekyo, Musengwa Katonda agwananga yaamwesasuulizaaku mu nsambo emugwaniire olw'obubi bwe.”" 
2Samuel4:1 Ishiboshethi mutabane wa Saulo bwe yawulira nga Abuneri bamwitiire e Heburoni, yaawaamu amaani n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona baasoberwa inho." 
2Samuel4:2 Ishiboshethi oyo mutabane wa Saulo, yali n'abasaadha be babiri abaakuliranga ebikunsu ebyajanga okulumba mu ntalo. Owundi nga ni Baana, ate owundi nga ni Rekabu, bombi nga batabane ba Rimmoni, omusaadha ow'e Beerothi, nga wa kika kya Benjamini. (Beerothi ekyo, kyona kitwalibwa okuba ekiketezo ekya Benjamini." 
2Samuel4:3 Abatyamye b'omu Beerothi ekyo, baalumukira e Gittaimu, era ye babairenga baba okutuusa ni ye buli eno.)" 
2Samuel4:4 Yonathani mutabane wa Saulo yali ni mutabane we eyalemala amagulu, nga bamweta Mefiboshethi. Omwana oyo yali agheza emyaka etaanu egy'obukulu, mu kiseera kye baitiramu Saulo ni Yonathani. Amawulire aga Saulo ni Yonathani okufiira e Yezireeli bwe gaatuuka, omulezi w'omwana oyo yaamubbeeda yaalumuka. Aye mu kugwidhubana agho, omwana yaagwa yaalemala." 
2Samuel4:5 Agho Rekabu ni Baana, batabane ba Rimmoni Omubeerothi, baja ewa Ishiboshethi. Baatuukayo mu kasana ghagati ku saawa ng'oti mukaaga edh'omusana, nga Ishiboshethi ali kuwuumulaku." 
2Samuel4:6 Bwe baatuuka ku mulyango ogw'endhu, baaja okulinga bati ng'omukazi omwigazi ow'omulyango abairenga ali kusensa engaano agho, awongeire yaalambaala endoolo. Kale Rekabu ni muganda we Baana, beibirira baingira." 
2Samuel4:7 Baayagaana nga Ishiboshethi alambaire ku buliri bwe mu kisenge kye, baamufumita baamwita, era baamutemaku omutwe baaja nagwo. Baatambula obwire bwonabwona nga bagemye engira ebita mu kiiko ekirimu omwiga Yorudani ekyetebwa Araba." 
2Samuel4:8 Baatwalira Daudi omutwe gwa Ishiboshethi e Heburoni, baamukoba bati: “Omutwe guuguno ogwa Ishiboshethi mutabane wa Saulo omuzigu wo, eyakuyiiganianga. Olwaleero Musengwa Katonda yeesasuuliiza ku Saulo ni ku izaire lye, ku lwa iwe Isebantu kyabazinga.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Aye Daudi yairamu ati: “Ndayira Musengwa Katonda omulamu eyamponianga buli kabi koonakoona akandhidhiranga, nti" 
2Samuel4:10 omuntu eyaidha okunkobera ati, ‘Saulo afiire,’ ng'adhuuba ati ali kundeetera mawulire malungi, namugema naamwita nga ndi e Zikulaga. Ekyo n'ekirabo kye namusasulamu mu mawulire ge." 
2Samuel4:11 Memale obwo imwe abantu ababi mutyo, abajiire ni mwita Ishiboshethi omuntu aziraku musango mu buliri bwe, mudhuuba muti tiibavunaane kusingagho ni mbazikiriza kuva ku nsi?”" 
2Samuel4:12 Agho Daudi yaalagira abaisuka be baita Rekabu ni Baana, baabatemaku emikono n'ebigere, era emirambo gyaibwe baagirengeedhia agho ku mbali kw'ekidiba ekiri e Heburoni. Omutwe gwa Ishiboshethi baagutwala, baaguziika mu magombe ga Abuneri e Heburoni." 
2Samuel5:1 Agho abantu ab'ebika bya Isiraeli byonabyona baidha ye Daudi e Heburoni, baamukoba bati: “Bona eno, ife tuli baluganda era ba musaayi mulala n'iwe." 
2Samuel5:2 Mu biseera ebyabita nga Saulo ni kyabazinga waife, niiwe owakulemberangamu eigye lya Isiraeli okuja mu ntalo. Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakukoba ati, ‘Oidha kukulemberanga abantu bange Abaisiraeli, obenga mufuzi waibwe.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Kale abakulembeze mu Isiraeli baidha ye kyabazinga Daudi e Heburoni. Daudi oyo yaakola nabo endagaano mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, baamusiiga omuzigo okumufuula kyabazinga wa Isiraeli." 
2Samuel5:4 Daudi yali agheza emyaka amakumi asatu egy'obukulu, ghe yaafuukira kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. Era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi ana." 
2Samuel5:5 Yaafugira Buyudaaya e Heburoni okumala entangama ya myaka musanvu n'emyezi mukaaga, ate yaafugira Isiraeli yoonayoona ghalala ni Buyudaaya e Yerusalemu okumala entangama ya myaka asatu n'esatu." 
2Samuel5:6 Agho kyabazinga Daudi n'abasaadha be baaja e Yerusalemu okulwanisa Abayebusi abaali abatyamye ab'omu kiketezo ekyo. Abayebusi abo baakoba Daudi bati: “Toidha kwingira ghano, kuba abatulu obutulu n'abalema obulema baidha kukulwanisa bakulemeese.” Baali badhuuba mule bati: “Daudi tasobola kughangula kibuga kino.”" 
2Samuel5:7 Aye ate Daudi oyo yaagema ekifo kyaibwe eky'okwewogomamu eky'e Sioni, ekyo kyafuuka “Ekibuga kya Daudi.”" 
2Samuel5:8 Ku lunaku olwo Daudi yakoba abasaadha be ati: “Omuntu yeenayeena akyaye Abayebusi ng'oti ninze Daudi, abitire mu mweta ogw'amaadhi, aje alumbe abalema n'abatulu abo.” Okwo n'okwava endhogera ekoba eti: “Abatulu n'abalema tibaidha kungira mu ndhu.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Agho Daudi yaaba mu kifo ekyo eky'okwewogomamu, yaakituuma eriina “Ekibuga kya Daudi.” Yaazimba ku kifo ekyo ekibuga okukyezunguluza, ng'aviira mu kifo kye baidhuzaamu eitaka olw'okwekuuma abazigu, ekyayetebwanga Millo, yaaja ng'aira munda." 
2Samuel5:10 Daudi oyo yaajanga nga yeeyongera okuba omukologho, kuba Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yali ali naye." 
2Samuel5:11 Agho kyabazinga Hiramu ow'e Tiro yaagheereza Daudi abakwenda, n'emiti emivule, n'ababaadhi, n'abazimbisa amabaale, baghange okuzimbira Daudi ekisaagaati eky'obwakyabazinga." 
2Samuel5:12 Agho Daudi yaategeera nga bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda amuleeteire okukakata nga kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era ng'aleeteire obwakyabazinga bwa Daudi oyo okugheebwa ekitiisa ku lw'abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
2Samuel5:13 Daudi ng'amaze okuva e Heburoni n'abeera irala mu Yerusalemu, yeeyongera okubayiza abakazi, yaafuniramu n'ab'embali. Yaazaala abaana abandi abalenzi n'abaghala." 
2Samuel5:14 Gano n'amaina ag'abaana be yazaala ng'ali mu Yerusalemu: Shammua, Shobabu, Nathani, Solomoni," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibuhari, Elishua, Nefegi, Yafia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishama, Eliada ni Elifeleti." 
2Samuel5:17 Abafilisiti bwe baawulira nga Daudi asiigiibwa omuzigo okumufuula kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, boonaboona baaja okumuyiiga. Daudi bwe yakiwulira, yeegisa mu kifo eky'okwewogomamu." 
2Samuel5:18 Agho, Abafilisiti baatuuka mu kiiko ky'e Refa, baakibuna kyonakyona." 
2Samuel5:19 Daudi yeebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda ati: “Nje nwane n'Abafilisiti? Onandeetera okubaghangula?” Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Ja. Bwenebwene ndidha kukuleetera okubaghangula.” 
2Samuel5:20 Agho Daudi yaidha e Baali Perazimu, yaaghangulirayo Abafilisiti. Yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda aneesooseeyo emberi yaaghaguza mu bazigu ng'oti n'omwidhuzo ogw'amaadhi bwe gughaguza ghe gubita.” Kale kyova ekifo ekyo bakyeta Baali Perazimu." 
2Samuel5:21 Abafilisiti baalumuka, baaleka n'agho ebifaananie byaibwe bye baasinzanga. Daudi n'abasaadha be baabitwala." 
2Samuel5:22 Kabiri Abafilisiti baidha mu kiiko ky'e Refa, baakibuna kyonakyona." 
2Samuel5:23 Era Daudi bwe yeebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda. Musengwa Katonda yamwiramu ati: “Otabalumba ng'ova ghano, aye weetooloole obave e mugongo, obalumbire kumpi n'emiti emibalisamu." 
2Samuel5:24 Bw'onaawulira empindo edh'abali kukumba, nga dhiviira ghaigulu ku miti emibalisamu egyo, ng'olwo obalumba. Olwo nze Musengwa Katonda nnaaba nkwesooseeyo emberi okughangula eigye ery'Abafilisiti eryo.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Daudi yaakola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yamulagira, yaaja ng'aita Abafilisiti okuva e Geba okutuuka e Gezeri." 
2Samuel6:1 Agho Daudi kabiri yaasoloza abaisirukale abasinga okulwana mu Isiraeli, nga baghera emitwalo esatu (30,000)." 
2Samuel6:2 Yaakulembera abantu boonaboona be yali nabo, baaja e Baale eky'omu kiketezo kya Yuda, okutoolayo Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda eyetebwa eriina lya Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, oyo atyama ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga ekiri ku bitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi." 
2Samuel6:3 Agho baata Esanduuku eyo ku kigaali ekiyaaka, Uzza ni Ahio batabane ba Abinadabu baakivuga nga bakitoola mu ndhu ya Abinadabu oyo eyali ku lusozi" 
2Samuel6:4 Ahio nga n'akulembeiremu Esanduuku eyo eri ku kigaali. 
2Samuel6:5 Daudi n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona baajanga nga bakina n'amaani gaibwe goonagoona mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Baayemba nga bwe bakuba endingidi, n'entongooli, n'obugoma, n'ensaasi, n'ebide." 
2Samuel6:6 Bwe baatuuka mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano ekya Nakoni, ente dhaaba oti dhenda kugwa. Kale, Uzza yaagema n'engalo dhe ku Sanduuku ey'endagaano." 
2Samuel6:7 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaamutumbukizaaku obusungu bwe ng'oti muliro, yaamwitiragho olw'okwetulinkiriza n'agema ku Sanduuku eyo. Uzza oyo yaafiira agho gha mbali gh'Esanduuku ya Katonda." 
2Samuel6:8 Daudi yaasungughala olwa Musengwa Katonda okubonereza Uzza atyo. Ekifo ekyo baakituuma eriina Perezi Uzza okutuusa ni ye buli eno. 
2Samuel6:9 Daudi yaatya inho Musengwa Katonda ku lunaku olwo, yaakoba ati: “Nnaasobola ntya okutwala Sanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda eno ey'Endagaano?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Kale Daudi yaaloba kuganha kutwala Sanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda mu kibuga kye ekyetebwa ekya Daudi. Aye baagonhoka, baagitwala mu ndhu ya Obedi Edomu ow'e Gathi." 
2Samuel6:11 Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda eyo yaamala emyezi esatu mu ndhu ya Obedi Edomu, era Musengwa Katonda yaagha Obedi Edomu oyo n'ab'omu ndhu ye boonaboona enkabi." 
2Samuel6:12 Agho baakobera kyabazinga Daudi bati: “Musengwa Katonda yagha ab'endhu ya Obedi Edomu ni by'ali nabyo byonabyona enkabi, olw'Esanduuku ya Katonda.” Kale Daudi yaaja yaatoolayo Esanduuku ya Katonda mu ndhu ya Obedi Edomu, yaagitwala mu kibuga kye ekyetebwa ekya Daudi, n'okusagamba okw'amaani." 
2Samuel6:13 Abaabbeeda Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda bwe baali baakatambulaku ebigere omukaaga, Daudi yaatoola ente endaagho n'ente entototo empiite, yaabighaayo ng'omusengo eri Musengwa Katonda." 
2Samuel6:14 Daudi yaakinira Musengwa Katonda n'amaani ge goonagoona, nga yeesibye bwa mu nkende ekivaalo eky'obwakabona ekyakolebwa mu ngoye empegheevu." 
2Samuel6:15 Kale atyo Daudi n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona baaleeta Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda nga bali kukuba emizira, eno nga bwe bafuuwa n'endeka." 
2Samuel6:16 Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda bwe baali bali kugireeta mu kibuga kya Daudi, Mikali mughala wa Saulo yaalengeza mu dinisa yaalinga kuliya, yaabona kyabazinga Daudi ng'ali kutuuma bw'akinira Musengwa Katonda. Yaamunhooma mule." 
2Samuel6:17 Baaleeta Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda baagita mu kifo kyayo, mu Weema Daudi ye yagisimbiragho. Daudi yaaghaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
2Samuel6:18 Bwe yamala okughaayo ebigheebwayo ebyo, yaasabira abantu enkabi mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye." 
2Samuel6:19 Yaagabula abantu olukunkumuli mu Isiraeli: buli muntu, k'abe musaadha oba mukazi, yaamugha omugaati, n'ekinofu ky'emamba, n'ekitole eky'ebibala eby'emizabbibu ebikaze. Agho abantu baagolola, buli muntu ewuwe." 
2Samuel6:20 Agho Daudi yairayo eka okusabira abantu ab'omu ndhu ye enkabi. Aye Mikali mughala wa Saulo bwe yafuluma okumweisuusaayo, yaakoba ati: “Nga kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yeetairemu ekinhagansi olwaleero luno!
