Yaaja yeeghembulaghembula mu maiso ag'abairu abakazi abagheereza abakungu be! Yaaba ng'oti n'abasaadha abasirusiru abazira kye bagasa bwe bakola nga baziramu na nsoni!”" 
2Samuel6:21 Daudi yairamu Mikali ati: “Mbaire ndi kukinira Musengwa Katonda eyalonda nze n'anfuula omukulembeze ow'abantu be Abaisiraeli, mu kifo ky'okulonda lata wo oba omuntu owundi yeenayeena mu ndhu ya lata wo. Era ndidha kuja mu maiso n'okukinira Musengwa Katonda." 
2Samuel6:22 Ndidha kwongera okwemalamu ekinhagansi n'okusinga agho, nfuuke anhoomebwa y'oli. Aye abairu abakazi b'oli kukoba, baidha kuntaamu ekinhagansi.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Mikali oyo mughala wa Saulo, tiyazaalaku mwana okutuusa okufa." 
2Samuel7:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera Daudi okutyama mu miraala mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga, era yaaleetera abazigu be abaali bamwezungulwire okulekera okumulumbanga." 
2Samuel7:2 Lwali lulala, Daudi oyo yaakoba Nathani omulanzi ati: “Bona eno, nze nsula mu ndhu eyazimbwa n'emiti emivule, aye Esanduuku ya Katonda yaaba bwa mu weema!”" 
2Samuel7:3 Nathani yaamwiramu ati: “Ja okole byonabyona ebikuli ku mwoyo, kuba Musengwa Katonda ali niiwe.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Aye obwire bwene obwo Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Nathani ati: 
2Samuel7:5 “Ja okobe omugheereza wange Daudi oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Odhuuba oti niiwe oja okunzimbira endhu ey'okubangamu?" 
2Samuel7:6 Tibangaku mu ndhu okuviira irala ku lunaku lwe natoola Abaisiraeli e Misiri okutuusa ni ye buli eno. Buli ghe mbairenga nja, nga mba mu weema." 
2Samuel7:7 Mu bifo byonabyona bye mbairenga njaamu nga ndi n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, waali owuliireku nga mbuuza waire omulala ati ku bakulembeze be nataagho okulabiriranga abantu bange Abaisiraeli, nti lwaki timunzimbira ndhu ya miti mivule?’" 
2Samuel7:8 “Kale ni oidha kukoba omugheereza wange Daudi oti nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye nkoba nti, ‘Nakutoola ku gw'okwayanga entaama mu byayiro, naakufuula omukulembeze ow'abantu bange Abaisiraeli." 
2Samuel7:9 Naabanga ghalala niiwe buli ye wajanga, naasaaniangagho abazigu bo ng'oli kumpi okutuukayo. Era ndidha kukufuula mukologho obe ng'oti n'abantu abakologho ab'oku nsi." 
2Samuel7:10 Ntegekeire abantu bange Abaisiraeli ekifo, mbate omwo babenga mu kifo ekyo nga kyaibwe ku bwaibwe, ghalobe kubaagho ekibatabula kabiri. Abantu ababi tibaja kwirayo kubadaazadaaza," 
2Samuel7:11 nga bwe baakolanga eira mu biseera bye nateeragho abalamuzi abaakulemberanga abantu bange Abaisiraeli. Ndidha kukuwonianga okulumbibwa abazigu bo boonaboona. N'ekindi, nze Musengwa Katonda nkukoba nti ndikwaliza abaana n'abaidhukulu." 
2Samuel7:12 Enaku dho bwe dhiriwaaku n'ofa, n'oja okweyimba ku badhaadha bo abaafa, ndikusikiza omulala ku baana bo beene be weezaalira, naamutaagho okuba kyabazinga era naaleetera obwakyabazinga bwe okukakata." 
2Samuel7:13 Oyo n'alinzimbira endhu, era ndireetera obwakyabazinga bwe okukakata ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
2Samuel7:14 Nze ndiba lata we ate mwene yaaba mwana wange. Bw'anaakolanga ekibi ndidha kumukangaivulanga ng'omuzaire bw'akangaivula omwana we. 
2Samuel7:15 Aye tija kukomya kumugonzanga, nga bwe nakomya okugonza Saulo, ye natoolagho memale iwe oiregho." 
2Samuel7:16 Ndidha kuleeteranga eizaire lyo okwala, ndeeterenga n'obwakyabazinga bwo okukakata mu maiso gange ebyanda n'ebyanda. Ekityamo kyo eky'obwakyabazinga kiidha kubanga kya maani ebyanda n'ebyanda.’ ”" 
2Samuel7:17 Kale Nathani yaakobera Daudi byonabyona nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yabimukoba, era nga bwe yabimwoleka." 
2Samuel7:18 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yangira mu Weema, yaatyama mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, katyo nze ninze ani era n'ab'endhu yange ni baani, iwe okutukolera ebyo byonabyona by'otukoleire?" 
2Samuel7:19 Ate nga ekyo kyali kintu kitono inho ku iwe Musengwa Katonda, kuba era osuubiiza bingi ku izaire lyange mu biseera eby'omu maiso. Era ebyo, iwe Musengwa Katonda wange obyoleike nze omuntu obuntu naabimanha." 
2Samuel7:20 Ate kiki ekindi nze Daudi kye nnaayongera okukukoba? Iwe Musengwa Katonda wange ondidhi bukalamu nze omugheereza wo. 
2Samuel7:21 Olw'okwenda kwo waleetera ebintu bino byonabyona ebikologho okubaagho nga bwe wasuubiza, ng'oyenda nze omugheereza wo mbimanhe." 
2Samuel7:22 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, bwenebwene oli mukologho. Tituwulirangaku wundi ali ng'oti niiwe. Niiwe Katonda wenka, ezira wundi." 
2Samuel7:23 Kale ighanga ki erindi ku nsi, eriri ng'oti n'ery'abantu bo Abaisiraeli iwe Katonda be waja n'onunula babe abantu bo? Waabakolera ebintu ebikologho era ebitiisa, ebyaleetera eriina lyo okumanhika mu nsi yoonayoona, ng'obingayo abamaghanga agandi n'emisambwa gyaibwe mu biketezo bye baalimu, ng'abantu bo bali kumpi okutuukayo." 
2Samuel7:24 Wataagho Abaisiraeli babenga bantu bo ebyanda n'ebyanda ate iwe Musengwa Katonda waafuuka Katonda waibwe. 
2Samuel7:25 “Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, mperaano ni kuumanga ekyo ky'osuubiiza nze omugheereza wo n'ab'endhu yange era okituukirizenga." 
2Samuel7:26 Oidha kubanga mukologho ebyanda n'ebyanda, abantu bakwogerengaku bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye oyo, ni Katonda wa Isiraeli.’ Era nkweghemba okuumenga ab'endhu yange nze omugheereza wo Daudi." 
2Samuel7:27 Wo Musengwa Katonda iwe Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, nze omugheereza wo ngumye naakusaba ebintu ebyo, olw'ebyo by'ondholeike ng'okoba oti, olisikiza abaana n'abaidhukulu abange ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Samuel7:28 “Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, niiwe Katonda, otuukiriza buli ky'okoba, era niiwe osuubiiza nze omugheereza wo ebintu ebyo ebirungi." 
2Samuel7:29 Nkweghemba iwe Musengwa Katonda wange, oghe enkabi ab'endhu yange nze omugheereza wo, babenga bagonzi y'oli ebyanda n'ebyanda, nga bw'onsuubiiza. Era olw'enkabi dho, ab'endhu yange nze omugheereza wo baidha kubanga ba nkabi ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, Daudi kabiri yaalwana n'Abafilisiti yaabaghangula, era yaabanhagaku ekibuga Methegamma." 
2Samuel8:2 Bwe yamala yaaghangula Abamoabu. Yaabalambaaza ghansi mu nhiriri isatu. Olwo yaitaku enhiriri eibiri, yaalekagho lulala. Agho Abamoabu baafuuka bagheereza ba Daudi, era nga bamughanga omusolo." 
2Samuel8:3 Bwe yamala yaaghangula kyabazinga w'e Zoba ng'ayetebwa Hadadezeri mutabane wa Rehobu. Hadadezeri oyo yali ali kuja okweiriza ebiketezo bye ebyali bimudheemyeku ku mwiga Eufurate. 
2Samuel8:4 Daudi yaamunhagaku abalwani ab'oku mbalaasi lukumi na lusanvu (1,700), n'ab'oku bigere emitwalo ebiri (20,000). Yaasala eminho egy'embalaasi dhoonadhoona, aye yaalekagho edhimala okughaluza ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ekikumi dhonka." 
2Samuel8:5 Abasiria ab'e Damasiko bwe baidha okubeera Hadadezeri okulwana, Daudi yaabaitamu abasaadha emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ibiri (22,000)." 
2Samuel8:6 Agho Daudi yaata enkambi edh'abalwani mu Aramu eky'e Damasiko, Abasiria baafuuka bagheereza be nga bamugha omusolo. Musengwa Katonda yaaghanga Daudi obughanguzi buli ye yajanga." 
2Samuel8:7 Daudi oyo yaanhaga engabo edha zaabu abalwani ba Hadadezeri dhe baali nadho, yaadhitwala e Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel8:8 Era yaatoola n'ebintu kamaala eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo okuva mu bibuga Beta ni Berothai ebyafugibwanga Hadadezeri. 
2Samuel8:9 Kyabazinga Toi ow'e Hamathi bwe yawulira nga Daudi aghangwire eigye lyonalyona erya Hadadezeri. 
2Samuel8:10 Kale yaatuma mutabane we Yoramu ye Daudi oyo n'obukwenda obw'okumulamusa n'okumukangaalusa olw'okulwanisa Hadadezeri n'amughangula; kuba Hadadezeri oyo yalwanisanga Toi emikuzi kamaala. Yoramu oyo yaatwalira Daudi ebintu ebya feeza, n'ebya zaabu, n'eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
2Samuel8:11 Ebintu ebyo kyabazinga Daudi yaabighaayo byaba bya Musengwa Katonda, ghalala ni feeza ni zaabu Daudi oyo ye yanhaga ku maghanga goonagoona ge yaghangula, gano:" 
2Samuel8:12 Edomu, Moabu, Ammoni, Filisitia, ni Amaleki. N'omunhago gwe yatoola ku kyabazinga Hadadezeri ow'e Zoba mutabane wa Rehobu, gwona yaagughaayo gwaba gwa Musengwa Katonda." 
2Samuel8:13 Daudi yeeyongera okwekolera eriina, bwe yaira ng'aise Abaedomu omutwalo mulala na kanaana (18,000) mu Kiiko ekyetebwa eky'Omuunhu." 
2Samuel8:14 Agho yaata enkambi edh'abalwani mu Edomu mwonamwona, Abaedomu boonaboona baafuuka bagheereza be. Musengwa Katonda yaaghanga Daudi obughanguzi yoonayoona ye yajanga." 
2Samuel8:15 Kale atyo Daudi yaafuga Isiraeli yoonayoona, yaakoleranga abantu be ebintu mu butuufu ni mu mazima." 
2Samuel8:16 Yoabu mutabane w'omukazi eyayetebwanga Zeruia, nga n'aduumira amagye. Yehoshafati mutabane wa Ahiludi yaakuuma ebighandiiko." 
2Samuel8:17 Zadoki mutabane wa Ahitubu ni Ahimeleki mutabane wa Abiathari, baaba bakabona. Seraia yaaba mughandiisi." 
2Samuel8:18 Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada yaakulira Abakerethi n'Abapelethi. Ate batabane ba Daudi baaba bakabona. 
2Samuel9:1 Lwali lulala Daudi yaabuuza ati: “Ghakaalighooku omuntu ow'omu ndhu ya Saulo akaasigairegho, mmukolere eby'ekisa ku lwa Yonathani?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Agho ghaabaagho omuntu eyagheerezanga mu ndhu ya Saulo, nga bamweta Ziba. Baamweta aje ye Daudi. Kyabazinga Daudi oyo yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe Ziba?” Ziba yairamu ati: “Isebo, ninze omugheereza wo.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Kyabazinga oyo yaamubuuza ati: “Ezirayooku akaasigairegho ku b'omu ndhu ya Saulo, mmwoleke ekivunika kya Katonda?” Ziba yaamwiramu ati: “Ghakaaligho omwana wa Yonathani, eyalemala amagulu.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Kyabazinga yaamubuuza ati: “Aba gha?” Ziba yaamwiramu ati: “Aba mu ndhu ya Makiri mutabane wa Ammieli e Lodebari.” 
2Samuel9:5 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaatumayo, baamuleeta okuva mu ndhu ya Makiri mutabane wa Ammieli e Lodebari." 
2Samuel9:6 Agho Mefiboshethi mutabane wa Yonathani era mwidhukulu wa Saulo, yaidha ye Daudi, yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Daudi yaamweta ati: “Mefiboshethi.” Mefiboshethi yaavugira ati: “Isebo, ndi ghano nze omugheereza wo.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Otatya. Ndidha ku kwoleka ekivunika ku lwa lata wo Yonathani, nkwirize eitaka lyonalyona eryali erya dhaadha wo Saulo. Era oidha kuliiranga ghalala ninze ku kiiwulo.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Mefiboshethi yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka yaakoba ati: “Katyo nze omugheereza wo, ninze ani iwe y'olowoozaaku, nze ali ng'oti n'embwa obubwa enfu!”" 
2Samuel9:9 Agho kyabazinga yaayeta Ziba eyali omugheereza wa Saulo, yaamukoba ati: “Ebintu byonabyona ebyali ebya Saulo n'ebyali eby'ab'omu ndhu ye, mbighaire mwidhukulu wa musengwa wo oyo Saulo." 
2Samuel9:10 Ate iwe, ni batane bo, n'abagheereza bo, mwidha kulimiranga ab'endhu ya musengwa wo oyo eitaka eryo, mubaleeterenga bye mukungwire. Olwo baghange okubanga n'emere ey'okulya. Aye Mefiboshethi mwene aidha kuliiranga ghalala ninze ku kiiwulo.” Ziba oyo yali ni batabane be ikumi na bataanu, n'abagheereza amakumi abiri." 
2Samuel9:11 Ziba yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, nze omugheereza wo ndidha kukola ebyo byonabyona by'ondagiire.” Agho Mefiboshethi yaaliiranga ghalala ni Daudi ku kiiwulo, ng'oti ni batabane ba Daudi oyo." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefiboshethi oyo yali ni mutabane we nga muto, nga bamweta Mika. Abantu abaali mu ndhu ya Ziba, baafuuka bagheereza ba Mefiboshethi." 
2Samuel9:13 Kale Mefiboshethi, eyali omulema ow'amagulu gombi, yaabanga mu Yerusalemu, era ng'aliira ghalala ni kyabazinga ku kiiwulo." 
2Samuel10:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, kyabazinga Nahashi ow'Abammoni yaafa, mutabane we Hanuni yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Samuel10:2 Daudi yaakoba mule ati: “Ndidha kulaga Hanuni mutabane wa Nahashi omukwano ogw'amazima, nga ise gwe yandaganga.” Kale Daudi yaatuma ku bagheereza be baje ye Hanuni, bamumusaasirire olw'okufiirwa ise. Agho abagheereza ba Daudi baatuuka bukalamu mu nsi ey'Abammoni." 
2Samuel10:3 Aye abakulembeze ab'Abammoni baakoba musengwa waibwe Hanuni bati: “Olowooza oti Daudi akutumiire abagheereza be okukusaasira, lwa kwenda kuta mu lata wo kinhagansi? Busa naire. Atumye abagheereza be kwagaaza kibuga bakikeete, era olumaliira bakigeme.”" 
2Samuel10:4 Kale Hanuni yaagema abagheereza ba Daudi, buli muntu yaamusalaku oluuyi olw'ekirevu kye era yaamusalaku ebivaalo bye okutuusa mu nkende, memale yaabalekula baaja." 
2Samuel10:5 Daudi bwe baamukobera ebibairegho, yaatuma abakwenda y'abagheereza abo, kuba baali bali kuwulira ensoni. Yaabakoba basigale mu kibuga Yeriko okutuusa ng'ebirevu byaibwe bimaze okumera memale baireyo." 
2Samuel10:6 Abammoni bwe baabona nga baleeteire Daudi okubakyagha, baapangisa abalwani ab'oku bigere Abasiria ab'e Betherehobu n'ab'e Zoba nga baghera emitwalo ebiri (20,000), baapangisa ni kyabazinga w'e Maaka yaidha n'abalwani lukumi (1,000), era baapangisa n'abalwani omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000) abaava e Tobu." 
2Samuel10:7 Daudi bwe yakiwulira yaatuma Yoabu n'eigye lyonalyona ery'abalwani ab'amaani. 
2Samuel10:8 Abammoni beesowolayo baasimba enhiriri gha mulyango ogwingira mu kibuga kyaibwe, nga beetegeike okulwana olutalo. Ate Abasiria ab'e Zoba n'ab'e Rehobu, n'abalwani ab'e Tobu n'e Maaka, baaba bonka mu irungu." 
2Samuel10:9 Yoabu bwe yabona ng'abazigu baidha kumulumba nga bamuva emberi n'emugongo, yaalonda mu balwani ba Isiraeli abasaadha abasinga kulwana, baasimba enhiriri nga boolekeire Abasiria." 
2Samuel10:10 Abalwani abaasigalagho yaabagemya muganda we Abishai, yaabasimbya enhiriri okwolekera Abammoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Yoabu oyo yaakoba Abishai ati: “Abasiria bwe banansinga amaani munaidha mwambeera, mwena Abammoni bwe banaabasinga amaani tunaidha twababeera." 
2Samuel10:12 Guma omwoyo, tulwane kisaadha ku lw'abantu baife n'ebibuga bya Katonda waife. Ka tusabe Musengwa Katonda akole ekyo ky'abona nga n'ekigwaine.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Kale Yoabu ni be yali nabo baaja okulumba Abasiria, Abasiria baabalumuka." 
2Samuel10:14 Abammoni bwe baabona ng'Abasiria balumwike, boona baalumuka Abishai bangira mu kibuga. Agho Yoabu yaakyuka yaavaayo y'okulwana n'Abammoni, yaira e Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel10:15 Aye Abasiria bwe baabona ng'Abaisiraeli babaghangwire, beesololeza ghalala." 
2Samuel10:16 Kyabazinga Hadadezeri yaatumisa Abasiria abaali ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, baidha e Helamu nga Shobaki omuduumizi ow'eigye lya Hadadezeri n'ali kubakulembera." 
2Samuel10:17 Ekyo bwe baakikobera Daudi, yeena yaasoloza Abaisiraeli boonaboona ghalala, baasomoka omwiga Yorudani baatuuka e Helamu. Abasiria baasimba enhiriri nga boolekeire Daudi, baalwana naye." 
2Samuel10:18 Abasiria baalumuka Abaisiraeli. Daudi yaita abalwani Abasiria ab'oku bigaali eby'omu lutalo lusanvu, n'ab'oku mbalaasi emitwalo ena (40,000). Era baafumita Shobaki omuduumizi ow'eigye ly'Abasiria, yaafiira mu lutalo." 
2Samuel10:19 Bakyabazinga boonaboona abaali abagheereza ba Hadadezeri bwe baabona nga Abaisiraeli babaghangwire, baakola endagaano ey'emiraala n'Abaisiraeli, era Abaisiraeli abo baabafuganga. Agho Abasiria baatya okwirayo kabiri okubeera Abammoni." 
2Samuel11:1 Agho ng'omwaka gutoolera, mu biseera bakyabazinga ghe baajiiranga okulwana entalo, Daudi yaatuma Yoabu ng'ali n'abagheereza be ghalala n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona. Baaja baalumba Abammoni, baabaghangula era baazingiza ekibuga Rabba okukyezunguluza. Aye Daudi mwene yaasigala e Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel11:2 Lwali lulala eiguloigulo, Daudi yaasituka yaava ku buliri bwe ng'amaze okulambaala okuwuumulaku, yaatambulatambula ghaigulu ku ngulu okw'endhu ye. Ng'ali eyo ghaigulu yaalengera omukazi ali kunaaba, ng'aboneka bulungi inho." 
2Samuel11:3 Agho Daudi yaatuma abakwenda babuulirize ebigema ku mukazi oyo. Baamukobera bati, ni Bathisheba mughala wa Eliamu era muka Uria Omuhitti." 
2Samuel11:4 Kale Daudi yaatuma abakwenda baamunona baamumutwalira, yaaba naye mu buliri. Omukazi oyo yali ali kwetukuza, nga yaakava mu kulwala okwa buli mwezi." 
2Samuel11:5 Agho omukazi oyo yaatoola enda, yaatuma baakobera Daudi bati ali mabunda." 
2Samuel11:6 Daudi yaagheereza Yoabu obukwenda ng'akoba ati: “Mpeereza Uria Omuhitti aidhe.” Yoabu yaagheereza Uria eri Daudi. 
2Samuel11:7 Uria bwe yatuuka ye Daudi, Daudi yaamubuuza Yoabu n'abalwani bwe bali, n'olutalo bwe luli kuja." 
2Samuel11:8 Olwamala, Daudi yaakoba Uria ati: “Ja ewuwo owuumuleku.” Uria yaafuluma mu ndhu ya kyabazinga yaaja. Agho ekirabo kyamuvaaku einhuma nga bakireeta okuva ye kyabazinga." 
2Samuel11:9 Aye Uria yaaloba kuja ka, yaasula agho gha mulyango gw'endhu ya kyabazinga n'abagheereza ba musengwa we oyo abandi boonaboona." 
2Samuel11:10 Daudi baamukobera bati: “Uria tiyajiire wuwe.” Agho yaabuuza Uria ati: “Tiwaviire mu lugendo luleeyi? Memale lwaki tiwajiire wuwo?” 
2Samuel11:11 Uria yaamwiramu ati: “Esanduuku y'Endagaano eri mu ntindi, n'abasaadha aba Isiraeli n'aba Yuda boonaboona basula mu ntindi. Era musengwa wange Yoabu n'abagheereza be, basimbye weema dhaibwe mu irungu. Memale nze nnaaja ntya eka, okulya, okunhwa n'okusula ni mukazi wange? Busa naire. Ndayira musengwa wange iwe kyabazinga omulamu nti, tiidha kukola kintu ng'oti n'ekyo.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Agho Daudi yaakoba Uria ati: “Kale sigala ghano n'olwaleero. Enkyo ndidha kukusiibula oje” Uria yaasigala mu Yerusalemu olunaku olwo n'olwairirira. 
2Samuel11:13 Daudi yaamweta yaalya naye era yaanhwa naye, yaamutamiiza. Aye era Uria yaaloba kuja wuwe. Yaasula ghalala n'abagheereza ba musengwa we Daudi oyo." 
2Samuel11:14 Bwe bwakya enkyo Daudi yaaghandiikira Yoabu embaluwa, yaagigha Uria agimutwalire." 
2Samuel11:15 Mu mbaluwa omwo yaghandiikamu ati: “Ta Uria emberi mu lutalo aghasinga kuba ghabi, memale imwe mumuleke eyo mwire einhuma, abazigu bamufumite bamwite.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Kale Yoabu bwe yaazingiza ekibuga okukyezunguluza, yaata Uria mu kifo ghe yali aidhi nga n'aghali abasaadha abaziramu ntete." 
2Samuel11:17 Agho abasaadha ab'omu kibuga baidha baalwana ni Yoabu. Baita abandi ku bagheereza ba Daudi. Uria Omuhitti yeena baamwitiramu. 
2Samuel11:18 Agho Yoabu yaagheereza Daudi amawulire goonagoona agagema ku lutalo. 
2Samuel11:19 Yaalagira omukwenda ye yatuma ati: “Bw'onaamala okukobera kyabazinga amawulire goonagoona agagema ku lutalo," 
2Samuel11:20 kyabazinga n'asungughala era n'akubuuza ati, ‘Lwaki mwaseeta kumpi inho n'ekibuga nga mukirwanisa? Ti mwamanha nga baidha kubalasa nga bali ku kimante?" 
2Samuel11:21 Naani eyaita Abimeleki mutabane wa Yerubbeshethi? Omukazi tiyali ku kimante memale n'amusuulaku enso ey'olubengo, n'afiira e Thebezi? Lwaki mwaseeta kumpi inho n'ekimante mutyo?’ Oidha kumukoba oti, ‘N'omugheereza wo Uria Omuhitti yeena bamwise.’ ”" 
2Samuel11:22 Kale omukwenda yaaja ye Daudi, yaamukobera byonabyona Yoabu bye yamutuma." 
2Samuel11:23 Yamukobera ati: “Abazigu baasooka baatunhigiriza, baavaayo mu kibuga baidha okutulwanisa mu nsiko. Aye twamala twababingirira twabaizaayo ku mulyango ogw'ekibuga ekyo." 
2Samuel11:24 Agho ab'obulaso baatoolera okutulasa nga bali ku kimante, baita abandi ku bagheereza bo, Isebantu kyabazinga. N'omugheereza wo Uria Omuhitti yeena bamwise.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Daudi yaakoba omukwenda ati: “Ja okobe Yoabu oti, ‘Ebyo ebibairegho bitakumalamu maani, kuba ghazira aghanga kumanha oyo anaafiira mu lutalo. Kale ni weeyongere bwa kulumba ekibuga ekyo n'amaani, okigeme.’ Era weena omwizeemu amaani.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Bathisheba bwe yawulira nga Uria iba bamwise, yaamulira." 
2Samuel11:27 Ekiseera eky'okulira bwe kyawaaku, Daudi yaatuma abakwenda baaleeta Bathisheba oyo mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, yaamufuula mukazi we, era yamuzaalira omwana omulenzi. Aye ekintu ekyo Daudi kye yakola kyasungughaza Musengwa Katonda." 
2Samuel12:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaatuma Nathani omulanzi ye Daudi. Yaaja yaamukoba ati: “Ghaaligho abantu babiri mu kibuga kirala, owundi nga mukombe ate owundi yaaba mwavu." 
2Samuel12:2 Omukombe yali n'ebyayo kamaala: entaama, n'embuzi, n'ente." 
2Samuel12:3 Aye omwavu ng'azira kantu, okutoolaku akataama akaluusi ke yagula. Akataama ako ng'akalabirira era nga kaba ghalala n'abaana be. Nga kalya ku mere ye yalyangaku, kaanhweranga ku kikopo kye, era yaakaleranga nga kali ng'oti mwana y'ali." 
2Samuel12:4 Lwali lulala omugeni omubise yaidha ew'omukombe oyo. Omukombe yaaloba kwenda kwitaku endala ku nte dhe, oba ku mbuzi dhe, waire ku ntaama dhe, afumbire omutambuze oyo eyaidha ewuwe. Aye yaatoola akataama akato ak'ole omwavu, yaakaitira omubise oyo.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Agho obusungu bwa Daudi bwatumbukira ku muntu oyo ng'oti muliro. Yaakoba Nathani ati: “Ndayira Musengwa Katonda omulamu nti omuntu eyakola ekintu ekyo agwaniire kufa. 
2Samuel12:6 Era ateekwa okuliyira omwavu oyo entaama ina, olw'akataama ke akato ako kuba ekyo kye yakola yakikola ng'azira kusaasira.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Agho Nathani yaakoba Daudi ati: “Niiwe omuntu oyo. Era Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Nakusiiga omuzigo obe kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, naakuwonia omuzigu wo Saulo." 
2Samuel12:8 Naakugha endhu ya musengwa wo oyo Saulo, n'abakazi be naabakugha babe babo. Era naakugha okufuga abantu Abaisiraeli n'aba Yuda boonaboona. Ebyo bwe byandibaire nga tibikumala nandikwongeireku ebindi kamaala ebyaga n'ebyo obungi nga bya mikuzi ebiri." 
2Samuel12:9 Lwaki wanhooma ebiragiro bya Musengwa Katonda, n'okola ebibi y'ali? Waita Uria Omuhitti nga weeyambisa Abammoni, waatoola mukazi we waamufuula wuwo." 
2Samuel12:10 Kale ni mu b'endhu yo timuja kulekera kubangamu aitibwa, kuba onnhoomye nze waatwala muka Uria Omuhitti waamufuula mukazi wo.’" 
2Samuel12:11 Musengwa Katonda oyo era akoba ati, ‘Bona eno, ndidha kuleetera omuntu ow'omu ndhu yo mwene, akutuuseeku akabi. Ndidha kutoola bakazi bo ng'obona, mbaghe musaadha mwino, abe nabo mu buliri, omusana gwene." 
2Samuel12:12 Iwe kye wakola wakikola mu ngiso, aye nze kye nja okukola nja kukikola nga Abaisiraeli boonaboona babona, omusana gwene.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Agho Daudi yaakoba Nathani ati: “Nakola ekibi naasungughaza Musengwa Katonda.” Nathani yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akusoniighe toidha kufa. 
2Samuel12:14 Aye olw'okuba wakola ekikolwa ekyo wanhooma inho Musengwa Katonda, omwana wo aidha kufa.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Nathani yairayo ewuwe. Agho Musengwa Katonda yaasindika obulwaire bwagema omwana Daudi ye yazaala mu muka Uria, yaalwala inho." 
2Samuel12:16 Kale Daudi yaasabira omwana oyo eri Katonda, yaasiiba, era yangiranga mu ndhu yaalambaalanga ghansi obwire bwonabwona." 
2Samuel12:17 Abakungu ab'omu ndhu ye baaja y'ali okumusitusa ave ghansi, aye yaaloberagho, era yaaloba okulya emere nabo." 
2Samuel12:18 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu omwana yaafa. Abagheereza ba Daudi baatya okumukobera bati omwana afiire, nga bakoba bati: “Bona eno, omwana ng'akaali mulamu twagezaaku okwogera naye, yaaloba okutuwulirisa, memale tughanga tutya okumukobera tuti omwana afiire? Aghanga okwekola ekibi.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Aye Daudi bwe yabona ng'abagheereza be bali kukubagana obwama, yaakitegeera ng'omwana afiire. Kale n'okubabuuza ati: “Omwana afiire?” Bamwiramu bati: “Yii, afiire.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Agho Daudi yaava ghansi, yaanaaba, yeesiiga omuzigo, yaavaala ebivaalo ebindi, yaaja mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda yaasinza. Bwe yamala yaaja mu ndhu ye, yaasaba emere baamugha yaalya." 
2Samuel12:21 Abagheereza be baamukoba bati: “Ekyo ky'okoze kitegeeza ki? Wasiiba era waalirira omwana wo ng'akaali mulamu, aye bw'afiire waasituka waalya n'emere!”" 
2Samuel12:22 Yaabakoba ati: “Kituufu, omwana bweyali ng'akaali mulamu, nasiiba era naalira nga nkoba mule nti, ‘Tomanha, oba katyo Musengwa Katonda aidha kungemerwa ekivunika, omwana alobe kufa?’" 
2Samuel12:23 Aye buti amaze okufa, kale lwaki nsiiba? Nkaaghanga okumwiza? Luliba lulala nze naaja y'ali, aye mwene taja kwira ye ndi.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Agho Daudi yaagumya mukazi we Bathisheba, yaaba naye mu buliri yaatoola enda, yaazaala omwana mulenzi. Daudi yaatuuma omwana oyo eriina Solomoni. Musengwa Katonda yaagonzanga inho omwana oyo," 
2Samuel12:25 era yaatuma Nathani omulanzi yaagha omwana oyo eriina Yedidia, kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo yamugonzanga inho." 
2Samuel12:26 Agho Yoabu yaalumba ekibuga Rabba eky'Abammoni, yaakigema." 
2Samuel12:27 Yaagheereza Daudi abakwenda ng'amukoba ati: “Nnumbye ekibuga Rabba, naagema ekifo ekirimu amaadhi." 
2Samuel12:28 Mperaano ni, soloza abantu boonaboona abasigairegho ozingize ekibuga ekyo Rabba okigeme, tiikulwa nga nze nkinhaga naakyeta eriina eryange.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Kale Daudi yaasoloza abantu ghalala, yaaja yaalwanisa ekibuga Rabba, yaakigema." 
2Samuel12:30 Daudi yaatoola engule ku mutwe gwa kyabazinga waibwe yaagita ku mutwe gwe. Engule eyo yali ya zaabu n'amabaale ag'omughendo, ng'ezitogha kilo ng'oti amakumi asatu na itaanu. Daudi era yaanhaga ebintu kamaala inho mu kibuga." 
2Samuel12:31 Era yaatwala n'abantu abaali mu kibuga omwo, yaabakozesanga emirimo nga bakozesa emisumeeni, ensuuluulu, n'empasa, era yaabakozesanga okwokya amatoofaali. Era atyo bwe yakola abantu boonaboona abaali mu bibuga eby'Abammoni byonabyona. Agho Daudi n'abantu be boonaboona bairayo e Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel13:1 Abusalomu mutabane wa Daudi yali ni mwanhina aboneka obulungi einho, ng'ayetebwa Tamari. Bwe ghaabitaghooku ekiseera, Amunoni mutabane wa Daudi owundi yeegomba Tamari oyo." 
2Samuel13:2 Ekyo kyaleetera Amunoni oyo obulumi bungi, yaalwala n'okulwala olw'okwenda einho mwanhina oyo Tamari kuba Tamari yali mughala mwegha, kale nga Amunoni abona nga ghazira gh'amutuukiraku." 
2Samuel13:3 Aye Amunoni yali ni mukagwa we nga bamweta Yonadabu mutabane wa Shimea, nga Shimea oyo yali muganda wa Daudi. Yonadabu oyo yali musaadha agetageta ebintu einho ng'amagezi tigamuwaaku." 
2Samuel13:4 Agho yaakoba Amunoni ati: “Iwe omwana owa kyabazinga, lwaki oba nga agho ng'oli munakughavu buli kaakyeire? Lwaki tonkoberaku kizibu kyo?” Amunoni yaamwiramu ati: “Neegomba inho Tamari mwanhina wa muganda wange Abusalomu.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabu yaamukoba ati: “Lambaala ku buliri bwo weefuule okuba omulwaire. Lata waimwe bw'anaidha okukubona, oidha kumukoba oti, ‘Nkusaba, mwanhinaze Tamari aidhe ampe ku mere ndyeku. Nhenda aidhe afumbire ghano ghe ndi nga mmubona, andeetere emere ghano mwene mu ngalo dhe, ndye.’ ”" 
2Samuel13:6 Kale Amunoni yaalambaala, yeefuula okuba omulwaire. Kyabazinga bwe yaja okumubona, Amunoni yaamukoba ati: “Nkusaba, mwanhinaze Tamari aidhe anfumbire yo emigaati ghano ghe ndi, agindeetere ghano mwene mu ngalo dhe, ndye.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Agho Daudi yaayetesa Tamari ng'amukoba ati: “Ja mu ndhu ya mwanhoko Amunoni omufumbire ku mere.” 
2Samuel13:8 Tamari yaaja mu ndhu ya mwanhina Amunoni mwe yali ng'alambaire. Yaatoola engaano, yaagikanda, yaagikolamu emigaati nga Amunoni ali kumubona, yaamala yaagifumba." 
2Samuel13:9 Yaaja yaiwulira agho mu maiso ga Amunoni emigaati gyonagyona egyali mu ntamu ye yafumbamu. Aye Amunoni yaaloba kugirya, era yaakoba ati: “Koba abantu boonaboona bave ghe ndi.” Kale abantu boonaboona baava gh'ali." 
2Samuel13:10 Agho Amunoni yaakoba Tamari ati: “Leeta eno eby'okulya mu kisenge, iwe mwene ompe ndye.” Tamari yaatoola emigaati gye yafumba, yaagitwala mu kisenge eri Amunoni mwanhina." 
2Samuel13:11 Aye bwe yagiseesa kumpi naye alye, Amunoni yaamugema omukono, yaamukoba ati: “Mwanhinaze, idha obe ninze mu buliri.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Tamari yaamwiramu ati: “Busa mwanhinaze, otankaka, kuba ekintu ng'oti n'ekyo tikikolebwa mu Isiraeli. Otakola kintu ekyo kya budankaanu." 
2Samuel13:13 Nze nzira ye ndija nga mmaze okuswala ntyo. Ate iwe oidha kutwalibwanga ng'omudankaanu mu Isiraeli. Kale ni nkweghembye yogera ni kyabazinga, taidha kukundobera.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Aye Amunoni yaaloba kumuwulirisa, era olw'okuba yali amusinga amaani, yamukaka yaaba naye mu buliri." 
2Samuel13:15 Agho Amunoni yaakyagha Tamari yaabitiriza, kuba ensambo ye yamukyaghamu yasingira ghala inho okwegomba kwe yamwegombangamu mu kusooka. Era yaamukoba ati: “Situkiramu oje!”" 
2Samuel13:16 Aye Tamari yaamukoba ati: “Busa mwanhinaze, okunsindiikiriza otyo kibi inho okusinga kire ky'osoose okunkola.” Aye Amunoni yaaloba kumuwulirisa," 
2Samuel13:17 yaayeta omwisuka amugheereza yaamukoba ati: “Toola ghano omukazi ono omufulumye kuliya, omale osibegho olwigi.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Tamari yali avaire ekivaalo kireeyi nga kya mikono mireeyi, kuba baghala ba kyabazinga abaalinga nga bakaali beegha, batyo bwe baavaalanga mu biseera ebyo. Kale omugheereza yaafulumya Tamari kuliya, yaamala yaasibagho n'olwigi." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamari yeemansira eivu mu mutwe, yaakanulamu ekivaalo kye ekireeyi kye yali avaire, yeetwika emikono gye yaaja ng'ali kuwowoola." 
2Samuel13:20 Abusalomu mwanhina bwe yamubona, yaamubuuza ati: “Mwanhoko Amunoni abaire n'iwe mu buliri? Mwanhinaze, iwe sirika. Ekyo kitakunakughaza inho, kuba oyo mwanhoko.” Kale Tamari yaabanga ewa Abusalomu mwanhina nga munakughavu." 
2Samuel13:21 Kyabazinga Daudi bwe yawulira ebintu ebyo byonabyona, yaasungughala ebitaloodheka." 
2Samuel13:22 Abusalomu yaakyagha Amunoni olw'okukaka Tamari mwanhina, era nga tayogera kintu ni Amunoni oyo, ka kibe ekirungi oba ekibi." 
2Samuel13:23 Nga ghabiseegho emyaka ebiri emiramba, Abusalomu yaafuna abantu baamusalira ku ntaama dhe ebiviiri e Baali Hazori okumpi ni Efuraimu. Abusalomu oyo yaayeta batabane ba kyabazinga boonaboona ku mukolo ogwo," 
2Samuel13:24 era yaaja ye kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Bona eno, nze omugheereza wo ndi n'abasala ku ntaama ebiviiri, kale nkweghemba Isebantu kyabazinga n'abagheereza bo, mwidhe tuje ninze omugheereza wo.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Aye kyabazinga yaakoba Abusalomu ati: “Mwana wange titwidha kwidha twenatwena, kuba tughanga okukuzitoogherera einho. Abusalomu yaakanda kumwegayirira, nga kyabazinga Daudi alobye. Aye kyabazinga Daudi yaamusabira enkabi.”" 
2Samuel13:26 Abusalomu yaamukoba ati: “Kale ni nkweghemba omale gaganha muganda wange Amunoni aje n'ife.” Kyabazinga yaamubuuza ati: “Lwaki aidha n'imwe?” 
2Samuel13:27 Aye Abusalomu yeegayirira kyabazinga okutuusa bwe yaleka Amunoni ni batabane ba kyabazinga abandi boonaboona okuja ni Abusalomu. 
2Samuel13:28 Agho Abusalomu yaalagira abagheereza be ati: “Mugenderere Amunoni gh'anaabeera ng'atamiire omwenge, nze ndidha kubalagira nti, ‘Mumufumite’, ng'olwo mumwita. Mutatya, kuba ninze naaba mbalagiire. Mugume emyoyo, mutabaamu ntete naire.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Kale abagheereza ba Abusalomu baakola nga bwe yabalagira, baita Amunoni. Agho batabane ba kyabazinga abandi baasitukiramu, buli muntu yaaniina enhumbu ye yaalumukagho." 
2Samuel13:30 Bwe baali bakaali mu ngira, olubono lwatuuka ku Daudi nga lukoba luti: “Abusalomu aise batabane bo boonaboona, era ghazira awoniegho!”" 
2Samuel13:31 Agho kyabazinga yaasituka yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'okunakughala, yalambaala ku itaka. N'abagheereza be abaali naye agho, boona baakanulamu ebivaalo byaibwe." 
2Samuel13:32 Aye Yonadabu mutabane wa Shimea, nga Shimea oyo yali muganda wa Daudi, yaakoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, otadhuuba oti baise abaisuka batabane bo boonaboona. Amunoni yenka n'afiire, kuba Abusalomu abairenga ng'aboneka okuba omumalirivu okumwita, kasookanga Amunoni oyo akaka Tamari mwanhina." 
2Samuel13:33 Agho ni musengwa wange kyabazinga, otakitwala inho oti batabane bo boonaboona bafiire, kuba Amunoni yenka n'afiire.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Ebyo byabanga nga biri kubaagho, ate ng'ere Abusalomu alumwike. Mu kiseera ekyo, omwisuka eyali ku gw'okukuuma, yaja okulinga ati ng'abona abantu kamaala bali kwidha nga baviira mu luguudo oluva e Horonaimu ku mbali okw'olusozi." 
2Samuel13:35 Yonadabu yaakobera Kyabazinga ati: “Musengwa Katonda wange, bona ere! Batabane bo batuuse. Nze omugheereza wo kye nkobye kituukiriire.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Olwamala okwogera ati, nga batabane ba kyabazinga batuuka. Bwe baatuuka baakuba empungu, baalira inho. Ni kyabazinga ghalala n'abagheereza be, boona baagegenga." 
2Samuel13:37 Abusalomu yalumuka, yaaja ewa kyabazinga Talumai ow'e Geshuri mutabane wa Ammihudi. Kyabazinga Daudi yaaliranga mutabane we buli lunaku." 
2Samuel13:38 Abusalomu bwe yalumuka n'aja e Geshuri, eyo yamalayo entangama ya myaka esatu." 
2Samuel13:39 Aye kyabazinga Daudi bwe yamala okwenaliza olw'okufiirwa Amunoni, omwoyo gwamulumira mutabane we Abusalomu." 
2Samuel14:1 Agho Yoabu mutabane wa Zeruia yaakitegeera nga kyabazinga Daudi omwoyo gumulumira mutabane we Abusalomu. 
2Samuel14:2 Kale Yoabu yaayetesa omukazi omugezigezi, baamuleeta okuva e Tekoa. Yaamukoba ati: “Weekoze obe ng'oti n'omuntu afiiriirwa, weesibe ekikaakaati, era olobe kwesiigaku kazigo naire obeere irala ng'omuntu amaze entangama ng'alira omufu." 
2Samuel14:3 Olwo ni oje ye kyabazinga omukobe oti n'oti.” Agho Yoabu yaakobera omukazi bye yali aja okukoba kyabazinga. 
2Samuel14:4 Kale omukazi oyo yaaja yaatuuka ye kyabazinga, yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, mbeera.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Kyabazinga yaamubuuza ati: “Kiki ky'oyenda nkukolere?” Omukazi yaamwiramu ati: “Wo, nze ndi namwandu, baze yafa." 
2Samuel14:6 Era nze omwiru wo omukazi nali ni batabane bange babiri, baasoolera eyo mu nsiko nga ghazira anaabagaya, owundi yaakuba mwine yaamwita." 
2Samuel14:7 Mperaano ab'endhu ya iseibwe boonaboona bantanwireku olutalo, nze omwiru wo omukazi, nga bakoba bati, ‘Tughe omusaadha oyo eyaita muganda we tumwite, twesasuuze olwa muganda we ye yaita.’ Bwe bakola ekyo, banaaba nga bazikiriiza n'eyandibaire omusika yeena. Olwo nze bandeke nga nziraku mwana, era bazikirize baze abuleku yaawoniagho naire, eriina lye balisaaniegho ku nsi.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Kyabazinga yaakoba omukazi ati: “Irayo ewuwo ndidha kulagira ensonga dho badhikoleku.” 
2Samuel14:9 Omukazi yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, omusango ka gubenga ku nze ni ku b'endhu ya lata wange, aye iwe n'ab'omu kisaagaati kyo eky'obwakyazinga batabangaku musango naire.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Omuntu yeenayeena bw'akutiisatiisa mundeetere ghano, taidha kwirayo kukudaaza kabiri.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Omukazi yaakoba ati: “Nkweghemba Isebantu kyabazinga, osabe Musengwa Katonda wo, alobere oyo ayenda okwesasuuza olw'ole ye baita, alobe kweyongera kwita. Olwo mutabane wange awone okuzikirizibwa.” Kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Ndayira Musengwa Katonda omulamu, nti mutabane wo tibaidha kumutuusaaku kabi waire akatono kati.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Omukazi yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Nkusaba nze omwiru wo omukazi, ndhogereyo ekibono ekindi eri iwe Isebantu kyabazinga.” Kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Yogera.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Omukazi yaakoba ati: “Kale lwaki otegeike okukola abantu ba Katonda ekibi ekyo? Mu ekyo ky'ova okusalagho, Isebantu kyabazinga, oba oli kwesalira mwene omusango okukusinga, bw'oloba okweta mutabane wo ye wali obinze, aire eka." 
2Samuel14:14 Twenatwena tuja kufa, era tuli ng'oti maadhi agayuyiike ku itaka omuntu g'atasobola kuyoolagho kabiri. Aye Katonda taja kutwala bulamu bwa muntu ali kusala amagezi ag'okwiza oyo ye baabinga ali kudaagiradaagira eyo." 
2Samuel14:15 Kale ni, Isebantu kyabazinga, nze omwiru wo omukazi ndidhie okukukobera ebintu ebyo, kuba abantu bantiisiisatiisiisa. Naakoba mule nti, ‘Ka nje ndhogere ni kyabazinga. Kisoboka okuba nga kyabazinga anaakola nze kye nnaamusaba." 
2Samuel14:16 Aidha kuwulira kye nkoba, amponie nze oyo ayenda okutuzikiriza nze ni mutabane wange, tuve ku butaka bwaife obw'ensikirano Katonda bwe yatugha.’" 
2Samuel14:17 Era nze omwiru wo omukazi, naakoba mule nti, ‘Ekibono musengwa wange kyabazinga ky'anankoba, kiidha kundeetera okuguma omwoyo’ kuba iwe musengwa wange kyabazinga oli nga malaika wa Katonda, okwawula ekirungi n'ekibi. Musengwa Katonda wo abenga n'iwe.”" 
2Samuel14:18 Agho kyabazinga yaakoba omukazi ati: “Otangisa kintu kyonakyona ku bye nja okukubuuza.” Omukazi yaakoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, mbuuza.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Kyabazinga yaamubuuza ati: “Yoabu ti n'eyakughaire amagezi ago goonagoona?” Omukazi yaamwiramu ati: “Bwenebwene nkulayirira iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, nti mu ekyo ky'okobye muziramu kubuusabuusa naire. Omugheereza wo Yoabu n'eyankobye ebyo byonabyona, era yangalagira nze omwiru wo omukazi bwembe mbikukobe." 
2Samuel14:20 Omugheereza wo Yoabu yakoze atyo olw'okwenda okukyusaamu mu ebyo ebirigho mpegaano. Aye iwe Isebantu kyabazinga oli n'amagezi ng'oti ga malaika wa Katonda, okumanha ebintu byonabyona ebiri ku nsi.”" 
2Samuel14:21 Ebyo nga biwoire, kyabazinga Daudi yaayeta Yoabu, yaamukoba ati: “Bona eno, buti ndhikiriiza. Ja oleete omwisuka oyo Abusalomu omwize eka.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Yoabu yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka, yaasabira kyabazinga enkabi. Agho yaakoba ati: “Olwaleero nze omugheereza wo ntegeire nga iwe Isebantu kyabazinga osiima bye nkola, kuba iwe musengwa wange oikiriiza okukola nze omugheereza wo kye nkusabye.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Kale Yoabu yaasitukiramu yaaja e Geshuri, yaiza Abusalomu e Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel14:24 Aye kyabazinga yagha ekiragiro ati: “Abusalomu aje abenga mu ndhu ye yenka, era ataidhanga ye kyabazinga.”" 
2Samuel14:25 Mu Isiraeli mwonamwona timwali muntu amanhiibwa inho lwa kuba mulungi mu mboneka ng'oti ni Abusalomu. Okuva ghansi ku bigere bye, okutuuka ghaigulu ku mutwe gwe, tiyaliiku kikyamu kyonakyona." 
2Samuel14:26 Buli ku nkomerero y'omwaka, Abusalomu ng'asala enviiri ku mutwe gwe, kuba dhaamuzitooghereranga. Bwe yamalanga okudhisala n'adhipimamu, nga dhizitogha kilo edhisingaku eibiri, ng'ojiira ku mbala entongole eya kyabazinga." 
2Samuel14:27 Abusalomu yazaala abaana abalenzi basatu n'omughala mulala, ye yatuuma eriina Tamari. Tamari oyo yali aboneka bulungi inho." 
2Samuel14:28 Abusalomu yaamala emyaka emiramba ebiri mu Yerusalemu nga tajiireeku ye kyabazinga. 
2Samuel14:29 Agho yaatuma baamwetere Yoabu amujiiregho ye kyabazinga, aye Yoabu yaaloba kwidha. Kabiri yaatuma bamwete omukuzi ogwokubiri, aye era Yoabu yaaloba okwidha." 
2Samuel14:30 Agho Abusalomu yaakoba abagheereza be ati: “Mubone, enimiro ya Yoabu yiire eriiraine eyange, era erimu sayiri ye yasimbamu. Muje mugikunaanieku omuliro.” Baaja baagikunaaniaku omuliro." 
2Samuel14:31 Olwo Yoabu yaasitukiramu yaaja ewa Abusalomu, yaamubuuza ati: “Lwaki abagheereza bo bakunaaniiza omuliro ku nimiro yange?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abusalomu yaamwiramu ati: “Bona eno, nakugheereza obukwenda obukoba buti, ‘Idha onjiiregho ye kyabazinga, omubuuze ensonga lwaki nava e Geshuri. Kasinga nandisigaire eyo n'okutuusa mpegaano. Kale ni buti ka nje ye kyabazinga. Bwemba nga ndi n'omusango, kyabazinga k'andhite.’ ”" 
2Samuel14:33 Olwo Yoabu n'okuja ye kyabazinga n'amukobera. Era kyabazinga yaayetesa Abusalomu aje y'ali. Abusalomu yaaja ye kyabazinga, yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Kyabazinga yaamunhwegera." 
2Samuel15:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, Abusalomu yaategeka ekigaali eky'omu lutalo, n'embalaasi, n'abasaadha makumi ataanu ab'okumukuumanga." 
2Samuel15:2 Abusalomu oyo yaawuunanga, yaayemerera ku ngira aghali omulyango ogwingira mu kibuga. Omuntu yeenayeena eyaidhanga ng'ali n'ensonga yaayenda kyabazinga awulire, Abusalomu oyo ng'amweta yaamubuuza ati: “Oviira mu kibuga ki?” Ole bweyamwirangamu ati: “Nze omugheereza wo ndi wa mu kika lebe eky'omu Isiraeli,”" 
2Samuel15:3 nga Abusalomu amukoba ati: “Ensonga dho nungi era ntuufu, aye ghazira muntu kyabazinga ye yataagho kudhiwulira.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Abusalomu oyo era yaayongeraku ati: “Kale nguli nali mulamuzi mu nsi yaife! Olwo buli muntu eyandibairenga n'omusango oba ensonga yoonayoona, yandiidhienga ye ndi, naamusaliranga mu mazima.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Era omuntu bwe yaseetanga eri Abusalomu oyo okumukubira amakiryaivu, ng'Abusalomu agolola omukono ng'amugema era ng'amunhwegera." 
2Samuel15:6 Abusalomu yaakolanga atyo ku buli Muisiraeli yeenayeena eyaidhanga ye kyabazinga okumumalira ensonga dhe. Mu nsambo eyo yaaleetera Abaisiraeli okukyuka, baamwikiririzaamu." 
2Samuel15:7 Bwe ghaabitagho emyaka ena, Abusalomu yaakoba kyabazinga Daudi ati: “Nkweghemba ondhikirize nje e Heburoni ntuukirize obweyamo bwange bwe neeyama eri Musengwa Katonda." 
2Samuel15:8 Nze omugheereza wo bwe nali nga nkaali e Geshuri mu Aramu, neeyama nti, ‘Bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda bw'alindhizaayo e Yerusalemu, ndimusinziza mu Heburoni.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:9 Kyabazinga Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Ja miraala.” Kale Abusalomu yaasitula yaaja e Heburoni. 
2Samuel15:10 Aye yaagheereza abakwenda mu ngiso mu bika bya Isiraeli byonabyona, ng'akoba ati: “Kasita muwulira nga bali kufuuwa amagwala, nga mukoba muti, ‘Abusalomu ni kyabazinga mu Heburoni.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 Mu kuva e Yerusalemu, abantu ebikumi bibiri n'abaaja ni Abusalomu e Heburoni ng'abageni abeete. Baaja mu mwoyo mulungi, nga bazira kye baidhi ku ntegeka dhe." 
2Samuel15:12 Era Abusalomu bweyali ali kughaayo emisengo, yaayetesa Ahithofeli Omugiloni eyabanga mu kibuga Gilo, nga yali muwi wa magezi owa Daudi. Agho abantu abaali ku luuyi lwa Abusalomu baaja nga beeyongera obungi, n'olukwe lweyongeramu amaani." 
2Samuel15:13 Ghaabaagho omukwenda eyaja n'akobera Daudi ati: “Abaisiraeli bakuviireku baize ku luuyi lwa Abusalomu.” 
2Samuel15:14 Agho Daudi yaakoba abagheereza be boonaboona be yali nabo e Yerusalemu ati: “Musitukiremu mukole tulumuke, tiikulwa nga tubulwa engeri ey'okuwonamu Abusalomu. Mwangughe tuveegho, atatwagaana n'atukolaku kabi, n'aita na bantu ba mu kibuga boonaboona.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Abagheereza ba kyabazinga baamukoba bati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ife abagheereza bo tuli beetegefu okukola kyonakyona iwe musengwa waife ky'onaaba ng'osazeegho.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Kale kyabazinga Daudi yaalumuka mu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu ndhu ye boonaboona. Aye yaalekayo bakazi be ab'embali ikumi, baakuuma ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga." 
2Samuel15:17 Kyabazinga yaava mu kibuga ng'abantu boonaboona bali kumunonereza, yaaja yaatuuka ku ndhu esembayo, yaayemerera." 
2Samuel15:18 Abagheereza be boonaboona baamubitaku. N'abaamukuumanga Abakerethi n'Abapelethi boonaboona baamubitaku. N'abalwani boonaboona olukaaga (600) Abagitti, abaamunonereza ng'ava e Gathi, boona baamubitaku." 
2Samuel15:19 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaakoba Ittai Omugitti ati: “Lwaki weena oli kuja n'ife? Irayo, obe eyo ni kyabazinga omuyaaka, kuba iwe oli musenze busenze eyaidha okufuna obubudamo." 
2Samuel15:20 Waakaidha bwidhe muno, kale lwaki mperaano nkutambuzatambuza eyo ntyo nga tiidhi ni ye nja? Busa, irayo otwale ni Bagitti baino. Nsaba Musengwa Katonda abagonzenga obutalekera era abenga mwesigwa ye muli.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Aye Ittai yairamu kyabazinga Daudi ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu, era naakulayirira Isebantu kyabazinga, nti buli y'onaajanga zeena yeenaajanga, ni bwe kinaabanga nga kyetaagisa kufa.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaakoba Ittai ati: “Kale bitagho, oje.” Ittai Omugitti yaabitagho n'abasaadha be yali nabo boonaboona, n'abaana baibwe boonaboona be baali nabo." 
2Samuel15:23 Abantu boonaboona baalira nga bawowoola, nga kyabazinga Daudi n'abantu be yaja nabo bali kubita. Kyabazinga n'abantu boonaboona be yali nabo, baaja baasomoka akaiga Kiduroni, beeyongerayo nga boolekeire eirungu." 
2Samuel15:24 Agho Abiathari yaidha, era okuja okubona nga ni Zadoki kabona yeena aidha n'Abalevi boonaboona nga babbeedie Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda. Baisa ghansi Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, okutuusa abantu boonaboona bwe baamala okuva mu kibuga." 
2Samuel15:25 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaakoba Zadoki ati: “Mubbeede Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda mugiizeeyo mu kibuga. Musengwa Katonda bw'aliba angemeirwa ekivunika, alindhiza naagibonaku, naabona n'ekifo kyayo mw'eba." 
2Samuel15:26 Aye bw'alinkoba ati, ‘By'okola tibisiima,’ kale nze ndigho, alinkola mwene ky'alibona nga n'ekingwaniire.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Kyabazinga Daudi era yaakoba Zadoki kabona ati: “Bona eno, irayo mu kibuga n'emiraala, ghalala ni mutabane wo Ahimaazi, ni Yonathani mutabane wa Abiathari." 
2Samuel15:28 Nze ndidha kusigala nga nteegereire mu kifo omwiga ghe gusomokerwa okuja mu irungu, okutuusa lwe ndifuna obukwenda obuva y'oli okunkobera ebiriyo.”" 
2Samuel15:29 Kale Zadoki ni Abiathari baatwala Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda e Yerusalemu, era baasigala eyo." 
2Samuel15:30 Daudi yaaja ng'ali kulira amaziga, yaaniinaniina Olusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva nga yeeghembereire omutwe olw'okunakughala, era ng'ali mu bigere byereere. Ni be yali nabo boonaboona baaja nga bali kulira amaziga, baaniinaniina nga beeghembereire emitwe." 
2Samuel15:31 Agho ghaabaagho abaakobera Daudi bati: “Ahithofeli ali mu abo abakudheemeire abali ni Abusalomu.” Daudi bwe baamukobera, yaasaba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghembye fafaagania amagezi Ahithofeli g'anaagha Abusalomu, gafuukemu busiru.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Daudi bwe yatuuka ku ngulu ku lusozi kwe baasinzizanga Katonda, yaja okulinga ati ng'abona Hushai Omuaraki ng'ali kwidha y'ali. Yali akanwiremu ekivaalo kye era ng'omutwe gwe agusiize eitaka." 
2Samuel15:33 Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Bw'onaaja ninze ozira ky'oidha kuunhambamu naire. 
2Samuel15:34 Aye bw'onairayo mu kibuga n'okoba Abusalomu oti, ‘Isebantu kyabazinga, ndidha kuba mugheereza wo nga bwe mbairenga omugheereza wa lata wo mu biseera ebibise, era ntyo bwe ndidha okuba omugheereza wo mperaano,’ olwo oidha kuunhamba okutakania amagezi Ahithofeli g'agha." 
2Samuel15:35 Bakabona Zadoki ni Abiathari baidha kuba eyo n'iwe. Kale kyonakyona ky'onaabanga ng'owuliire mu ndhu ya kyabazinga oidha kukikoberanga abo. 
2Samuel15:36 Era abo bali eyo ni batabane baibwe: Ahimaazi nga ni mutabane wa Zadoki ate Yonathani yaaba mutabane wa Abiathari. Kale abo be mwidhanga okutuma, bandeeterenga amawulire goonagoona ge munaawuliranga.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Kale Hushai mukagwa wa Daudi, yairayo mu kibuga Yerusalemu era yaatuukayo nga ni Abusalomu ali kwingira ati." 
2Samuel16:1 Kyabazinga Daudi bweyali ng'amaze okubitaku akabanga katono ku mutwe gw'olusozi, yayagaanana ni Ziba omugheereza wa Mefiboshethi. Yali n'endogoyi ibiri edhiriku ebintu ebityamibwaku, nga dheetwise emigaati ebikumi bibiri, n'obufaaganda kikumi obw'emizabbibu emikaze, n'ebifaaganda kikumi eby'ebibala ebisookereza okwenga, n'ensagho ey'oluwu ey'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
2Samuel16:2 Kyabazinga Daudi yaabuuza Ziba ati: “Bino byonabyona oleese byaki?” Ziba yaamwiramu ati: “Endogoyi dha ba mu ndhu yo iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, batambulirengaku. Emigaati n'ebibala ebisookereza okwenga bya baisuka bo kulya. Omwenge ogw'emizabbibu gw'abo abanaazirikanga mu irungu kunhwangaku.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Kyabazinga Daudi yaamubuuza ati: “Ate musengwa wo Mefiboshethi mwidhukulu wa Saulo ali gha?” Ziba yaamwiramu ati: “Asigaireyo mu Yerusalemu ng'akoba ati, ‘Olwaleero Abaisiraeli baidha kundhiriza obwakyabazinga obwali obwa dhaadha wange.’ ”" 
2Samuel16:4 Kyabazinga yaakoba Ziba ati: “Byonabyona ebibaire ebya Mefiboshethi, mperaano bifuuse bibyo.” Ziba yaamukoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, nkutaamu ekinhagansi! Era ngwananga naakola ebikusiimya buliidho.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Kyabazinga Daudi bwe yatuuka e Bahurimu, ghaabaagho omusaadha ow'oku lulyo lwa Saulo nga bamweta Shimei mutabane wa Gera. Omusaadha yaidha nga bw'avuma kyabazinga Daudi oyo aghazira kusalaku." 
2Samuel16:6 Yaakonhoogerera kyabazinga Daudi oyo amabaale n'abagheereza be boonaboona, n'abantu boonaboona, n'abasaadha ab'amaani abaamuba ku luuyi olw'omukono gwe omusaadha ni ku lw'omugooda." 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei oyo yaavuma Daudi ati: “Ja, ja! Omusaadha omutemo iwe era aziraku ky'agasa!" 
2Samuel16:8 Musengwa Katonda akwesasuuliizaaku olw'okwita ab'endhu ya Saulo, era n'omunhagaku obwakyabazinga bwe. Buti Musengwa Katonda obwakyabazinga obwo abughaire Abusalomu mutabane wo, era iwe otuuse okuzikirira olw'okuba omutemo.”" 
2Samuel16:9 Agho Abishai mutabane w'omukazi eyayetebwanga Zeruia, yaakoba kyabazinga Daudi ati: “Lwaki eno embwa obubwa enfu ekuvuma, iwe Isebantu kyabazinga? Ndeka mmujiire, mmutemeku omutwe.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Aye kyabazinga Daudi yaakoba Abishai ati: “Mundeke, imwe batabane ba Zeruia. Musengwa Katonda bw'aba nga n'amukobye ati, ‘Vuma Daudi’, naani aghanga okumubuuza ati, ‘Lwaki okoze otyo?’ ”" 
2Samuel16:11 Agho Daudi yaakoba Abishai oyo n'abagheereza be boonaboona ati: “Bona eno, ate oba mutabane wange mwene ayenda kundhita, me kitasi Omubenjamini oyo! Mumuleke avume, kuba Musengwa Katonda n'amulagiire." 
2Samuel16:12 Oba katyo Musengwa Katonda anaalingirira okudaagadaaga kwange, yansasulamu ebirungi mu kuvumibwa kwange kuno olwaleero luno.”" 
2Samuel16:13 Kale Daudi n'abasaadha be beeyongerayo nga batambulira mu luguudo, ng'eno Shimei bw'abanonereza ng'atambulira ku mbali kw'olusozi. Yeeyongera okuvuma kyabazinga Daudi, eno nga bw'amukonhoogerera amabaale, n'okumusuulaku enkungu." 
2Samuel16:14 Kyabazinga Daudi n'abantu be yali nabo, baatuuka ku mwiga Yorudani nga bakoowu inho, baawuumuliraku eyo." 
2Samuel16:15 Agho Abusalomu ng'ali ni Ahithofeli era n'Abaisiraeli be yali nabo, baaja e Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel16:16 Hushai Omuaraki, mukagwa wa Daudi, bwe yaja ye Abusalomu, yaakoba Abusalomu ati: “Ghangaala kyabazinga! Ghangaala Kyabazinga.”" 
2Samuel16:17 Abusalomu yaakoba Hushai ati: “Obwesigwa bwo eri mukagwa wo Daudi bwaja gha? Lwaki tiwaja naye?” 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai yaamwiramu ati: “Busa, ndidha kubanga ku luuyi olw'oyo Musengwa Katonda y'alonze, era n'abantu bano boonaboona Abaisiraeli ye balonze. Kale nze ndidha kubanga ghalala n'iwe." 
2Samuel16:19 Ate n'ekindi, naani owundi ye ngwaniire okugheereza okutoolaku mutabane wa musengwa wange? Nga bwe nagheerezanga lata wo, era ntyo weena bwe ndidha okukugheerezanga.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Agho Abusalomu yaakoba Ahithofeli ati: “Buti tughe ku magezi. Tukole ki?” 
2Samuel16:21 Ahithofeli yaamwiramu ati: “Ja obe ni baka lata wo ab'embali mu buliri, be yaleka okukuuma ekisaagaati eky'obwakyabazinga. Olwo Abaisiraeli boonaboona bwe banaakiwulira, baidha kukitegeera bati ofuuse muzigu eri lata wo. Ekyo kireetere abantu abali n'iwe okweyongeramu amaani.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Kale baasimbira Abusalomu eweema ghaigulu ku ngulu kw'endhu ya kyabazinga, yaaja yaaba ni baka lata we ab'embali mu buliri, ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona babona." 
2Samuel16:23 Mu biseera ebyo amagezi goonagoona Ahithofeli ge yaghanga ng'abantu bagatwala ng'oti n'ole ge yeebuuziiza ku Katonda. Daudi ni Abusalomu boona batyo bwe baagatwalanga okuba. 
2Samuel17:1 Ebyo nga bikaali agho, Ahithofeli yaakoba Abusalomu ati: “Ka nondeyo abantu omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000), nje nabo tubingirire Daudi obwire buno." 
2Samuel17:2 Ndidha kumwagaana ng'akaali mukoowu inho era ng'awoiremu amaani. Olwo mmuleetere okutya einho, n'abantu boonaboona baali nabo balumukegho memale ndhite kyabazinga mwene yenka." 
2Samuel17:3 Nga mmaze ekyo, ndidha kwiza y'oli abantu boonaboona b'ali nabo, ng'oti n'omugole omukazi bw'aira ewa iba. Iwe y'oyenda okwita ali mulala yenka, olwo abantu abandi boonaboona basigale nga bali miraala.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Abusalomu n'abakulembeze mu Isiraeli boonaboona, baasiima amagezi ago Ahithofeli ge yagha." 
2Samuel17:5 Abusalomu yaakoba ati: “Mundhetere Hushai Omuaraki, tuwulire yeena ky'akoba.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Hushai bwe yatuuka, Abusalomu yaamukoba ati: “Ahithofeli akobye ati n'ati. Tukole nga bw'akobye oba busa? Bw'oba okoba oti tutakola tutyo, iwe tukobere bwe tube tukole.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Hushai yairamu Abusalomu ati: “Ku mukuzi guno amagezi Ahithofeli g'aghaire ti malungi.” 
2Samuel17:8 Hushai era yaayongeraku ati: “Okiidhi nga lata wo n'abasaadha be ba maani agataloodheka, ate nga bali n'obusungu ng'oti n'ekisolo ekikambwe ekitooleibwaku ebyana byakyo. N'ekindi lata wo eby'entalo abiidhi inho, taidha kutenduka ghalala na bantu." 
2Samuel17:9 Bona eno, ni saawa eno yeene aghanga okuba nga yeegisiisa mu biina oba okwegisa aghantu aghandi. Era ku bantu abaife bwe kunaabaaku abafa mu lulumba olusooka, kiisi anaakiwulira aidha kukoba ati, ‘Abantu ab'oku luuyi lwa Abusalomu baitiibwa inho.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Olwo n'omulwani mwene aziramu ntete, ali n'omwoyo omugumu ng'oti gwa mpologoma, aidha kutekemuka atye kuba abantu boonaboona mu Isiraeli baidhi nga lata wo mulwani wa maani era nga n'abantu baali nabo balwani beene abaziramu ntete." 
2Samuel17:11 Kale nze mpa amagezi gano: soloza Abaisiraeli boonaboona okuva e Dani okutuuka e Beerisheba, babe kamaala ng'oti musenho gwa ku nhandha, olwo iwe mwene oje nabo mu lutalo aghazira kutuma." 
2Samuel17:12 Twidha kumutuukaku woonawoona gh'anaaba, tumugweku ng'oti n'omusulo bwe gugwa ku isubi. Era agho mwene, n'abantu boonaboona b'ali nabo twidha kubaita aghazira kulekagho waire omulala ati." 
2Samuel17:13 Bw'anaalumukira mu kibuga, Abaisiraeli boonaboona baidha kuta emigugha ku kibuga ekyo tukikwekwebye okukituusa mu kiiko tukimaliregho irala ghalobe kusigalagho kabaale waire akalala kati.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Agho Abusalomu n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona baakoba bati: “Amagezi ga Hushai Omuaraki malungi okusinga aga Ahithofeli.” Musengwa Katonda yali asazeegho ng'aja kubaleetera balobe kukolera ku magezi amalungi Ahithofeli ge yagha, mu nsambo eyo aleete akabi ku Abusalomu." 
2Samuel17:15 Agho Hushai yaakobera Zadoki ni Abiathari bakabona, amagezi mwene ge yagha Abusalomu n'abakulembeze mu Isiraeli, n'ago Ahithofeli ge yabagha." 
2Samuel17:16 Hushai oyo yaayongeraku ati: “Buti ni mwangughe mugheereze Daudi obukwenda nga mumukoba muti, ‘Obwire bwaleero mutasula mu bifo eby'omu irungu omwiga ghe gusomokerwa, aye musomoke mweyongereyo, kuba iwe Isebantu kyabazinga n'abantu boonaboona b'oli nabo, abazigu basobola okubalumba baabasaaniagho.’ ”" 
2Samuel17:17 Mu kiseera ekyo Yonathani mutabane wa Abiathari ni Ahimaazi mutabane wa Zadoki, baali bateegereire nga bali mu kifo ekyetebwa Enirogeli, kuba baali tibenda bantu kubabona nga baingira mu kibuga. Omugheereza omughala n'eyabatwaliranga obukwenda, ni baja bakobera kyabazinga Daudi." 
2Samuel17:18 Aye ghaabaagho omwisuka eyababona, yaaja yaakobera Abusalomu. Agho bombi baavaagho mangu, baaja baatuuka e Bahurimu ku ndhu ey'omusaadha eyali n'ensulo okumpi n'endhu ye baika mu nsulo omwo." 
2Samuel17:19 Omukazi yaaghemba ekintu ku munwa ogw'ensulo eyo, ekintu ekyo yaakifukaku emere ey'empeke era yaagyandhalamu. Ghaaloba kubaagho kimanhikaku naire." 
2Samuel17:20 Abagheereza ba Abusalomu bwe baidha ni batuuka ku ndhu eyo, baabuuza omukazi oyo bati: “Ahimaazi ni Yonathani bali gha?” Omukazi yaabairamu ati: “Basomoike akaiga baaja.” Agho baabanoonia aye baaloba kubabona, kale bairayo e Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel17:21 Abo bwe baamala okuja, Ahimaazi ni Yonathani baavaayo mu nsulo, baaja baatwalira kyabazinga Daudi obukwenda. Baamukoba bati: “Musitukiremu mangu musomoke omwiga, kuba Ahithofeli aghaire Abusalomu amagezi ag'okubalwanisa, ati n'ati.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Kale Daudi yaasitukiramu ni boonaboona be yali nabo, baasomoka omwiga Yorudani. Obwire bwaja okusansaana nga ghaziragho akaali kusomoka." 
2Samuel17:23 Ahithofeli bwe yabona ng'amagezi ge tibagajiiriireeku, yaata ku ndogoyi ye ekintu ekityamwaku yairayo eka mu kibuga eky'ewaibwe. Yaatereeza eby'omu ndhu ye, memale yeetuga. Baamuziika mu lwambiidhi lwa badhaadha be." 
2Samuel17:24 Agho Daudi yaatuuka e Mahanaimu, eno nga Abusalomu bw'asomoka omwiga Yorudani n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona." 
2Samuel17:25 Abusalomu yali nga yalonda Amasa okukulira amagye ng'aira mu kifo kya Yoabu. Amasa oyo yali mutabane w'omusaadha eyayetebwanga Ithura Omuishimaeli, eyali afumbiirwa Abigaili mughala wa Nahashi, era muganda wa Zeruia eyazaala Yoabu." 
2Samuel17:26 Agho Abusalomu oyo n'Abaisiraeli, baasimba weema dhaibwe mu kiketezo ky'e Gileadi." 
2Samuel17:27 Daudi bwe yaatuuka e Mahanaimu, Shobi mutabane wa Nahashi ow'e Rabba eky'Abammoni, ni Makiri mutabane wa Ammieli ow'e Lodebari, ni Barazillai Omugileadi ow'e Rogelimu," 
2Samuel17:28 baaleeta ebyebwiko, ebbakuli, ebibya n'entamu, engaano, sayiri, obuwunga, emere ey'empeke enkalange, ebidhandhaali, empindi," 
2Samuel17:29 omudheenene ogw'endhuki, amata amasaadhe, entaama, omuzigo omugemu. Ebyo byonabyona baabireetera Daudi n'abantu boonaboona be yali nabo, nga bakoba mule bati: “Abantu buti endhala n'endiwo biri kubaluma, ate nga bakoowu eyo mu irungu ye bali.”" 
2Samuel18:1 Agho Daudi yaabala abantu be yali nabo, yaabataaku abaduumizi ab'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi n'abaduumizi ab'abaisirukale ekikumi ekikumi." 
2Samuel18:2 Yagabaniamu eigye mu bikunsu bisatu nga byagayaga: ekikunsu ekirala ku ebyo nga kiduumirwa Yoabu, ekindi kyaduumirwa Abishai mutabane wa Zeruia era muganda wa Yoabu, ate ekindi kyaduumirwa Ittai Omugitti. Era kyabazinga Daudi yaakoba abantu ati: “Ninze mwene zeena ndidha kuja n'imwe.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Aye abantu baamukoba bati: “Busa, iwe otaja n'ife, kuba ife bwetunaalumuka abazigu tibaidha kutufaaku. Ni bwetunaafa abangi, nga ku buli bantu ababiri ababiri kufaaku omuntu mulala mulala, era abazigu tibaidha kufaayo. Aye iwe ovaamu ife omutwalo mulamba (10,000). Kale, ekisingaku bukalamu, niiwe okusigala mu kibuga n'otugheerezanga obuyambi.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Kyabazinga Daudi yaabakoba ati: “Ndidha kukola kyonakyona kye mubona nga n'ekisinga byonabyona obukalamu.” Kale yaayemerera ku mbali kw'omulyango ogw'ekibuga, eigye lyonalyona lyafuluma nga liri mu bikunsu eby'abantu ekikumi ekikumi n'eby'abantu olukumi olukumi." 
2Samuel18:5 Kyabazinga Daudi yaalagira Yoabu, ni Abishai, ni Ittai, ati: “Ku lwange, omwisuka oyo Abusalomu mutamukolaku kabi koonakoona.” Abantu boonaboona baawulira nga kyabazinga Daudi agha abaduumizi ekiragiro ekyo, ekigema ku Abusalomu." 
2Samuel18:6 Kale eigye lya Daudi lyaja okulwana olutalo n'Abaisiraeli, era baalwanira mu kibira kya Efuraimu." 
2Samuel18:7 Abasaadha ba Daudi baaghangula Abaisiraeli ku lunaku olwo, baabaitamu abantu kamaala abaghera emitwalo ebiri (20,000)." 
2Samuel18:8 Olutalo lwabunia ekiketezo ekyo kyonakyona, era ku lunaku olwo abantu abaafiira mu kibira baaba kamaala n'okusinga abaitibwa mu lutalo." 
2Samuel18:9 Agho Abusalomu yaayagaanana n'abasaadha ba Daudi nga takyetegekeire. Yali ali kuvuga enhumbu ye. Enhumbu eyo yaabita ghansi agh'ensaga enzibirivu edh'omuti omukologho einho, omutwe gwe gwalaalira mu nsaga edho. Yaasigala agho ng'ali kulengeedhera mu ibbanga, aye ng'enhumbu ye yali ali kuvuga ekaaja bwa buje." 
2Samuel18:10 Ghaabaagho omuntu eyabona, yaaja yaakobera Yoabu ati: “Bona eno, mboine Abusalomu ng'ali kulengeedhera mu muti omukologho!”" 
2Samuel18:11 Yoabu yaakoba omusaadha oyo ati: “Eki? Omuboine? Memale lwaki tomwitiireegho n'agwa ghansi? Nandisangaire inho, naakugha ebitundu bya feeza ikumi, n'olusibiro.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Aye omusaadha yairamu Yoabu ati: “Ni bwe nandibaire nga ngemye ku bitundu olukumi (1,000) ebya feeza, tyandighanze kugalula mukono okukola akabi mutabane wa kyabazinga. Twenatwena twawulira nga kyabazinga akulagira iwe ni Abishai, ni Ittai, ati, ‘Ku lwange, omwisuka oyo Abusalomu mutamukolaku kabi koonakoona.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Kale nze bwe nandighemukiire kyabazinga ni nkola akabi ku mutabane we, ate nga ghazira kintu kyonakyona kighanga kugisibwa ku kyabazinga, olwo n'iwe mwene wandineefiireku.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Yoabu yaakoba omusaadha ati: “Tiidha kumalira biseera byange ku iwe.” Kale yaatoola obusaale busatu, yaabulasa bwafumita Abusalomu mu kifuba ng'akaali mulamu mu muti omukologho." 
2Samuel18:15 Olwo abaisuka ba Yoabu ikumi abaamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa bye, beezungulula Abusalomu, baamukuba baamwita." 
2Samuel18:16 Agho Yoabu yaafuuwa eigwala, yaalekeza eigye okubingirira Abaisiraeli, lyavaayo lyaira." 
2Samuel18:17 Baatoola Abusalomu baamusuula mu gwina oguleeyi ogwali mu kibira omwo, baamubungaku emungo ey'amabaale enkologho. Abaisiraeli baalumuka buli muntu yaaja ewuwe." 
2Samuel18:18 Abusalomu ng'akaali mulamu yeezimbira empango mu Kiiko kya Kyabazinga, ng'akoba ati: “Nziraku mwana mulenzi ye banaidhukirirangaku eriina lyange.” Kale empango eyo yaagituuma eriina lye, era ni ye buli eno eyetebwa Ekiidhukizo kya Abusalomu." 
2Samuel18:19 Agho Ahimaazi mutabane wa Zadoki yaakoba ati: “Ka numukeku nje nkobere kyabazinga amawulire gano, nti Musengwa Katonda amuwoniiza abazigu be.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Aye Yoabu yaamukoba ati: “Busa, toidha kutwala mawulire ago lwaleero luno. Oghanga okugatwala olunaku olundi, aye olwaleero luno toidha kugatwala, kuba mutabane wa kyabazinga afiire.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Agho Yoabu yaakoba Omukushi ati: “Ja okobere kyabazinga by'oboine.” Omukushi yaakuba amakiryaivu mu maiso ga Yoabu, olwamala yaaja ng'alumuka." 
2Samuel18:22 Ahimaazi mutabane wa Zadoki kabiri yaakoba Yoabu ati: “Ka kibe ki oba ki, zeena ka numuukirire Omukushi.” Yoabu yaamukoba ati: “Mwana wange, lwaki oli kwenda inho okulumuka ng'ate ghazira na mpeera y'oja kufuna lwa kutwala mawulire ago?”" 
2Samuel18:23 Ahimaazi yaakoba ati: “Ka kibe ki oba ki, ndidha kulumuka.” Yoabu yaamukoba ati: “Kale lumuka.” Ahimaazi yaalumuka ng'abitira mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe, yaabisa Omukushi." 
2Samuel18:24 Mu kiseera ekyo Daudi yali atyaime ghansi ghagati gh'emiryango egy'emikuzi ebiri egy'ekibuga, ogw'omunda n'ogw'oku luya. Agho omukuumi yaaniina ghaigulu ku mulyango okumpi n'ekimante. Yaja okulinga ati ng'abona omuntu ali kulumuka yenka." 
2Samuel18:25 Omukuumi yaaba eyo yaalagiriza, yaakobera kyabazinga. Kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Bw'aba ng'ali yenka, ali n'amawulire amalungi g'aleese.” Agho omuntu yeeyongera okulumuka ng'ali kwidha bw'aseeta." 
2Samuel18:26 Omukuumi yaabona omuntu owundi ng'ali kwidha ng'alumuka. Omukuumi oyo yaalagiriza yaakobera omwigazi w'omulyango ati: “Bona, eriyo omuntu owundi ali kulumuka yenka!” Kyabazinga yaakoba ati: “Oyo yeena ali kuleeta mawulire malungi.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Omukuumi yaakoba ati: “Ndi kubona ng'omuntu akulembeiremu alumuka ng'oti ni Ahimaazi, mutabane wa Zadoki.” Kyabazinga yaakoba ati: “Oyo muntu mukalamu era ali kuleeta mawulire malungi.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaazi olwatuuka ati, yaakoba kyabazinga mu mamiro ag'amaani ati: “Byonabyona biri miraala.” Bwe yamala yaakubira kyabazinga amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda wo asaakibwe, akughaire okughangula abantu abaakudheemera iwe Isebantu kyabazinga.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Kyabazinga yaamubuuza ati: “Omwisuka Abusalomu ali bukalamu?” Ahimaazi yairamu ati: “Yoabu bw'antumye nze omugheereza wo, mboine nga ghaligho akasasamalo ak'amaani aye nga tiidhi kye kaviireku.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Ira eruuyi eno oyemerere eno.” Ahimaazi yaira eyo yaayemerera. 
2Samuel18:31 Agho Omukushi yaatuuka yaakoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, nkuleeteire amawulire amalungi. Olwaleero luno Musengwa Katonda akughaire okughangula abantu abaakudheemera.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Kyabazinga yaamubuuza Omukushi ati: “Omwisuka Abusalomu ali bukalamu?” Omukushi yaamwiramu ati: “Wo musengwa wange kyabazinga, ekyo ekituuse ku mwisuka oyo kigwananga kyatuuka ku bazigu bo, ni ku abo boonaboona abakudheemera ni bakukola akabi.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Agho kyabazinga enaku yaamugema ey'amaani. Yaaja ghaigulu mu kimante ekyali ku mulyango ogw'ekibuga, yaalira amaziga. Yaaja nga bw'alira ati: “Woowe omwana wange Abusalomu, omwana wange, omwana wange Abusalomu. Nze nandifiire mu kifo kyo. Woowe Abusalomu omwana wange, omwana wange!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Baakobera Yoabu bati: “Bona eno, kyabazinga ali kulira amaziga era yaagegenga olw'Abusalomu.”" 
2Samuel19:2 Kale abantu boonaboona abandibaire nga basagamba olw'obughanguzi ku lunaku olwo, baira bwa mu kunakughala, kuba baawulira ku olwo bati kyabazinga enaku emugemye olwa mutabane we." 
2Samuel19:3 Ku lunaku olwo abantu baira mu kibuga nga bali kweiba bweibe, ng'oti n'abalwani bwe beiba nga baswaire olw'okulumuka mu lutalo." 
2Samuel19:4 Kyabazinga yeeghemba mu maiso, yaawowoola ati: “Woowe, omwana wange Abusalomu! Woowe, Abusalomu omwana wange! Omwana wange!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Agho Yoabu yaidha, yangira mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Olwaleero oleeteire abagheereza bo boonaboona okuswala. Ate nga bawoniiza obulamu bwo, n'obwa batabane bo, n'obwa baghala bo, n'obwa bakazi bo ab'omu ndhu n'ab'embali." 
2Samuel19:6 Oyoleike nga bw'ogonza abakukyagha ate n'okyagha abakugonza. Era okikakaisa olwaleero oti abaduumizi bo n'abagheereza bo, ti kintu y'oli. Olwaleero nkitegeire nti nguli Abusalomu n'abaire omulamu, ife abandi twenatwena nga tufiire, wandisangaire inho." 
2Samuel19:7 Kale ni situkiramu oje oyogere bukalamu n'abagheereza bo, kuba ndayira Musengwa Katonda nti bw'otaaje, tighaidha kubaagho muntu asigala n'iwe obwire buno. Ekyo kiidha kukuviiramu akabi akatakobeka, akatakutuukangaku kasookanga obaagho.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Agho kyabazinga yaasituka, yaaja yaatyama ku kityamo kye gha mulyango ogw'ekibuga. Abantu boonaboona bwe baabakobera bati kyabazinga atyaime gha mulyango ogw'ekibuga, boonaboona beesololeza gh'ali. Mu kiseera ekyo Abaisiraeli boonaboona baali balumukiire mu maka gaibwe, buli muntu ng'aizeeyo ewuwe." 
2Samuel19:9 Ghaidhagho okukaayana mu bika byonabyona ebya Isiraeli, ng'abantu bakoba bati: “Kyabazinga Daudi yatuwonianga abazigu baife, yaatuwonia n'Abafilisiti. Aye buti yalumuka Abusalomu, yaava mu nsi ye." 
2Samuel19:10 Ate Abusalomu ye twasiiga omuzigo abe kyabazinga waife, wuuyo yafiira mu lutalo. Kale lwaki ghazira ayogeraku ku kya kwiza kyabazinga Daudi?”" 
2Samuel19:11 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaagheereza obukwenda ye Zadoki ni Abiathari bakabona, ng'akoba ati: “Mukobe abakulembeze ab'ekika kya Yuda muti, ‘Lwaki niimwe omuli kusembayo mu ky'okwiza kyabazinga mu kisaagaati kye, ng'ate Abaisiraeli boonaboona bye bali kwogera bituuse ku kyabazinga?" 
2Samuel19:12 Muli baganda bange ab'omusaayi gwange gwene. Kale lwaki niimwe omuli kusembayo mu ky'okwiza kyabazinga?’ ” 
2Samuel19:13 Kyabazinga Daudi era yaakoba Zadoki ni Abiathari ati: “Era mukobe Amasa muti, ‘Iwe ow'omusaayi ogwange gwene, okuva ni mpegaano bw'otaafuuke muduumizi wa igye lyange mu kifo kya Yoabu, Katonda agwananga yambonereza inho.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 Mu nsambo eyo Daudi yaikirizisa ab'ekika kya Yuda boonaboona, baafuuka muntu mulala. Kale baamugheereza obukwenda obukoba buti: “Ira, ghalala n'abagheereza bo boonaboona.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaira, yaatuuka ku mwiga Yorudani. Ab'omu kika kya Yuda baidha e Giligali okumusangaaza n'okumusomosa omwiga Yorudani." 
2Samuel19:16 Mu kiseera n'ekirala ekyo, Shimei mutabane wa Gera Omubenjamini, yaayangughaku yaidhira mu b'ekika Yuda okusangaaza kyabazinga Daudi." 
2Samuel19:17 Yaidha n'abantu lukumi (1,000) Ababenjamini. Ni Ziba omugheereza w'endhu ya Saulo yeena yaidha, ni batabane be ikumi na bataanu, n'abagheereza be amakumi abiri, baayangughaku okuja ku mwiga Yorudani okusangaaza kyabazinga Daudi." 
2Samuel19:18 Baasomoka omwiga baghange okusomosa ab'endhu ya kyabazinga n'okukola kyonakyona kyabazinga kye yali ayenda kikolebwe. Kyabazinga Daudi bweyali ali kuja okusomoka omwiga Yorudani, Shimei mutabane wa Gera yeeyala ku itaka mu maiso ge," 
2Samuel19:19 ng'amukoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, nkusaba olobe kuneegemerera oba okwidhukira nze omugheereza wo bwe nakubisa obubi iwe musengwa wange kyabazinga, ku lunaku lwe wava mu Yerusalemu. Isebantu kyabazinga, ekyo otakisiba ku mwoyo," 
2Samuel19:20 kuba nze omugheereza wo ndidhi nga nayonoona. Kyova obona nga ndidhie olwaleero luno, nga ninze asoose okuva mu ndhu yoonayoona eya Yosefu okwidha okukusangaaza iwe Isebantu kyabazinga.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Agho Abishai mutabane wa Zeruia yairamu ati: “Shimei ono eyavuma oyo Musengwa Katonda ye yasiiga omuzigo, tagwaniire kwitibwa bwitibwe?”" 
2Samuel19:22 Aye kyabazinga Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Ye mumbeereire ki imwe abaana ba Zeruia? Lwaki mwenda okundeetaku obuzibu olwaleero? Mudhuuba muti ghaligho anaitibwa mu Isiraeli olwaleero luno? Nkiidhi bukalamu nti mperaano ninze kyabazinga wa Isiraeli.” 
2Samuel19:23 Agho kyabazinga yaalayirira Shimei ati: “Nkukakasa nti toidha kwitibwa.” 
2Samuel19:24 Agho Mefiboshethi mwidhukulu wa Saulo yaidha okusangaaza kyabazinga. Mefiboshethi oyo yaloba okunaaba ebigere, waire okumwa ebirevu, oba okwoza engoye dhe, okuva ku lunaku kyabazinga lwe yava mu Yerusalemu okutuusa lwe yaira nga ghaligho emiraala." 
2Samuel19:25 Agho bwe yava e Yerusalemu okuja okusangaaza kyabazinga, kyabazinga yaamubuuza ati: “Mefiboshethi, lwaki tiwaja ninze?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Yaamwiramu ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, nze omugheereza wo nga bwendi omulema, nakoba omugheereza wange nti, ‘Nteera ekintu ekityamibwaku ku ndogoyi, nvuge nje ni kyabazinga,’ aye omugheereza wange oyo yanguya." 
2Samuel19:27 Era yaidha yandhogeraku nze omugheereza wo, yaakoba ebintu bitali bituufu eri iwe musengwa wange kyabazinga. Aye iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, oli ng'oti malaika wa Katonda. Kale kola kyonakyona ky'onaabona nga n'ekirungi," 
2Samuel19:28 Ab'endhu ya lata wange twenatwena twali tugwaniire bwa kwitibwa iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, aye nze omugheereza wo wanta mu abo abalya ku kiiwulo kyo. Kabiri obukumu mbutoola gha okusaba Isebantu kyabazinga okunkolera ekisinga agho?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Agho kyabazinga yaamwiramu ati: “Ye lwaki odaaga okwongera ebingi bityo? Nze mmaze okusalagho nti iwe ni Ziba mwidha kugabana eitaka.” 
2Samuel19:30 Mefiboshethi yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Leka Zika atwale lyonalyona, kasita iwe Isebantu kyabazinga oize eka mu miraala.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Agho Barazillai Omugileadi yaava e Rogelimu yaidha ku mwiga Yorudani, yaagherekeraku kyabazinga okusomoka." 
2Samuel19:32 Barazillai oyo yali musaadha mukaire inho, ng'agheza emyaka kinaana egy'obukulu. Yali mukombe inho, nga n'agha kyabazinga emere ekiseera kyonakyona kyabazinga oyo kye yamala e Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel19:33 Kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Idha tuje n'iwe e Yerusalemu, ndidha kukulabiriranga.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Aye Barazillai yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Nkaaliyo n'emyaka emeka egy'obulamu bwange eginsigula okuja n'iwe Isebantu kyabazinga e Yerusalemu? 
2Samuel19:35 Buti ndi ku myaka kinaana (80) egy'obukulu. Nkaasobola okwawulagho ekisanhusa n'ekitasanhusa? Nze omugheereza wo nkaasobola okuwoomerwa bye ndi kulya oba bye ndi kunhwa? Nkaasobola okuwulirisa amamiro ag'abasaadha n'ag'abakazi abali kwemba? Kale lwaki nze omugheereza wo neeyongera ku mugugu gw'oli nagwo, iwe Isebantu kyabazinga?" 
2Samuel19:36 Nze omugheereza wo ndidha kukugherekeraku katono, nkusomose omwiga Yorudani. Kale onsasulira ki empeera eyaga agho?" 
2Samuel19:37 Nze omugheereza wo nkweghemba ondeke ndhireyo nfiire mu kibuga eky'ewaife, kumpi n'amagombe ga lata ni maama. Aye omugheereza wo Kimuhamu wuuyo, leka aje n'iwe Isebantu kyabazinga. Oidha kumukolera kyonakyona ky'onaabona nga kirungi.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Kyabazinga Daudi yairamu ati: “Ndidha kuja ni Kimuhamu era ndidha kumukolera kyonakyona ky'onaaba ng'oyenze mmukolere. N'iwe weena kyonakyona ky'onaayenda nkukolere, ndidha kukikukolera.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Agho abantu boonaboona baasomoka Yorudani, ni kyabazinga Daudi yeena yaasomoka. Kyabazinga yaanhwegera Barazillai, yaamusabira enkabi. Barazillai yairayo eka ewuwe." 
2Samuel19:40 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaaja e Giligali ghalala ni Kimuhamu. Ab'omu kika kya Yuda boonaboona n'ekitundu ku Baisiraeli baamugherekera. 
2Samuel19:41 Abaisiraeli boonaboona baaja ye kyabazinga baamukoba bati: “Lwaki baganda baife ab'omu kika kya Yuda baakutwibaku ni bakusomosa omwiga Yorudani iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, n'ab'endhu yo, n'abantu boonaboona be wali nabo?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Ab'omu kika kya Yuda bairamu Abaisiraeli bati: “Lwa kuba kyabazinga n'ife, tuli ba nda ndala. Kale lwaki ekyo kibasungughaza? Ghalighooku ekintu waire ekirala kiti ekya kyabazinga kye tuliire? Oba ghalighooku ekirabo kyonakyona ky'atughaire?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Abaisiraeli bairamu bati: “Ife tuli n'obukumu bwa mikuzi kikumi ku bwakyabazinga, okusinga imwe bwe muli nabwo. Era ni Daudi oyo waife inho okusinga bw'ali owaimwe. Kale lwaki mutunhoomerera? Ti niife abaasooka okuleeta ekidhuubo eky'okwiza kyabazinga waife?” Aye ab'omu kika kya Yuda bye baayogera byaba bikambwe okusinga eby'Abaisiraeli." 
2Samuel20:1 Ghaaligho omusaadha azira ky'agasa nga bamweta Sheba, mutabane wa Bikiri Omubenjamini. Sheba oyo yaafuuwa eigwala, yaakoba ati: “Ife tuzira mugabo na Daudi, Era tuzira kya nsikirano kye tuli nakyo na mutabane wa Yesse. Imwe Abaisiraeli, ka twireyo ewaife.”" 
2Samuel20:2 Kale Abaisiraeli boonaboona bava ku Daudi, baaja ni Sheba mutabane wa Bikiri. Aye ab'omu kika kya Yuda baagumira ku kyabazinga waibwe, baaja naye okuva e Yorudani okutuuka e Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel20:3 Daudi bwe yatuuka mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga e Yerusalemu, yaatoola bakazi be bale eikumi ab'embali be yaleka okulabiriranga ekisaagaati ekyo, yaabata mu ndhu ndala ng'agitaireku n'abakuumi. Abakazi abo yaabaghanga bye beetaaganga, aye nga taba nabo mu buliri. Kale yaabasibira mu ndhu eyo okutuusa okufa, nga bali ng'oti banamwandu." 
2Samuel20:4 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaakoba Amasa ati: “Yeta ab'omu kika kya Yuda boonaboona beesololeze ghano ghe ndi mu nnaku isatu, era weena oidhe obeegho.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Kale Amasa yaaja okweta ab'omu kika kya Yuda, aye yaalwayo yaaswisa mu kiseera kye baamugha." 
2Samuel20:6 Daudi n'okukoba Abishai ati: “Sheba oyo mutabane wa Bikiri aidha kutukola ekibi ekiwulaku n'ekya Abusalomu kye yatukola. Kale twala ku bagheereza bange omubingirire, ng'akaali na kwefunira bibuga ebiriku ebimante ebigumu, kutufuukira kizibu.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Abishai bwe yamala okuja, kwairaku Yoabu n'abasaadha be, n'abaakuumanga kyabazinga Abakerethi n'Abapelethi, n'abasaadha ab'amaani boonaboona. Baava mu Yerusalemu, baaja okubingirira Sheba mutabane wa Bikiri." 
2Samuel20:8 Bwe baatuuka ku ibaale eikologho mu Gibeoni, Amasa yaidha ye bali. Yoabu yali avaire ebivaalo eby'omu lutalo, nga yeesibye mu nkende olusibiro oluliku empiima ng'eri mu kiruutu kyayo. Aye bweyali ali kuseeta emberi eri Amasa, empiima eyo yaasowokayo." 
2Samuel20:9 Yoabu yaabuuza Amasa ati: “Kiri mulaala, muganda wange?” Era yaakozesa omukono gwe omusaadha yaamugema ekirevu, okumunhwegera." 
2Samuel20:10 Aye Amasa tiyabona mpiima Yoabu ye yali agemye. Kale Yoabu yaamufumita empiima omukuzi mulala guti aghazira kumwiramu gundi, n'ebyenda byamufukika ku itaka, yaafa. Ebyo bwe byawa, Yoabu ni muganda we Abishai beeyongerayo nga babingirira Sheba mutabane wa Bikiri." 
2Samuel20:11 Ghaabaagho omuntu mulala ku basaadha ba Yoabu, yaayemerera kumpi ni Amasa yaakoba ati: “Kiisi ayenda Yoabu era ng'ali ku luuyi lwa Daudi, anonereze Yoabu.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Amasa yali yeegolomoire mu musaayi gwe agho mu luguudo. Kiisi eyaidhanga n'amubona ng'ayemerera. Omusaadha wa Yoabu bwe yabona ng'abantu boonaboona bali kwemereranga, yaatoola Amasa mu luguudo yaamutwala mu nsiko yaamusuulaku ekivaalo okumughembaku." 
2Samuel20:13 Omulambo gwa Amasa bwe baamala okugutoola mu luguudo, abantu boonaboona baanonereza Yoabu okubingirira Sheba mutabane wa Bikiri." 
2Samuel20:14 Agho Sheba yaabita mu bika byonabyona ebya Isiraeli, yaatuuka mu kibuga Abeli eky'e Bethi Maaka. Ababikiri boonaboona beesoloza, baamunonereza ng'aingira ekibuga." 
2Samuel20:15 Abantu abaali ni Yoabu bwe baawulira ng'ali eyo, boonaboona baidha baazingiza ekibuga ekyo Abeli eky'e Bethi Maaka. Baabunga emungo ey'eitaka ey'okuniiniraku baagyazayaza n'ekimante ekigumu ekyezungulwire ekibuga, era baakiguumulaguumula kigwe." 
2Samuel20:16 Ghaabaagho omukazi omugezi ng'ali mu kibuga ekyo, yaaba eyo yaayeta ati: “Muwulire, muwulire! Mbeeghembye munkobere Yoabu aseete ghano ndhogereku naye.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Yoabu yaaseeta kumpi n'omukazi ghe yali. Omukazi yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe Yoabu?” Yoabu yairamu ati: “Ninze.” Omukazi yaamukoba ati: “Nkweghemba owulirise bye nkukoba nze omugheereza wo omukazi.” Yoabu yaamwiramu ati: “Ndi kuwulirisa.” 
2Samuel20:18 Agho omukazi yaamukoba ati: “Ab'eira baakobanga bati, ‘Muje mwebuuzeeku amagezi mu kibuga Abeli.’ Kale baamaliranga eyo ensonga." 
2Samuel20:19 Ninze omulala ku abo abenda emiraala era abeesigwa mu Isiraeli. Iwe oli kwenda okuzikiriza ekibuga ekizaire mu Isiraeli. Lwaki oli kwenda okusaaniagho abantu ba Musengwa Katonda?” 
2Samuel20:20 Yoabu yaamwiramu ati: “Ekyo tikiribaagho, tikiribaagho naire, nze okwenda okusaaniagho oba okuzikiriza!" 
2Samuel20:21 Era ekyo ti kye ndi kuja okukola naire. Aye ghaligho omusaadha ava mu biketezo eby'oku nsozi ebya Efuraimu ng'ayetebwa Sheba mutabane wa Bikiri, eyadheemera kyabazinga Daudi. Kale ni mumugheeyo oyo yenka ati, ng'olwo nze ekibuga nkireka.” Omukazi yaamukoba ati: “Bona eno, omutwe gwe twidha kugukusuulira tugutumye ekimante.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Agho omukazi oyo yaaja y'abantu be mu magezi ge, baasala ku Sheba omutwe baagusuulira Yoabu ku luya ye yali. Kale Yoabu yaafuuwa eigwala, abasaadha be baagumbulukuka okuva ku kibuga ekyo, buli muntu yairayo ewuwe. Yoabu yairayo mu Yerusalemu ye kyabazinga." 
2Samuel20:23 Yoabu n'eyali omuduumizi ow'eigye lyonalyona erya Isiraeli, ate Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada yaaduumira abaakuumanga kyabazinga Abakerethi n'Abapelethi." 
2Samuel20:24 Adoramu nga n'avunaanizibwa abo abakola emirimo egy'olukako, ate Yehoshafati mutabane wa Ahiludi yaakuuma ebighandiiko." 
2Samuel20:25 Sheva yali mughandiisi ate Zadoki ni Abiathari baaba bakabona. 
2Samuel20:26 Ira eyali Omuyairi, yeena yali kabona wa Daudi." 
2Samuel21:1 Agho mu kiseera Daudi kye yafugiramu Isiraeli endhala yaagwa, yaalumira emyaka esatu egiiraganwaku. Daudi yaaja yeebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda. Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Saulo n'ab'endhu ye baliku omusango ogw'obutemo, kuba Saulo yaita Abagibeoni.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Kale kyabazinga Daudi yaayeta Abagibeoni. Abagibeoni abo tibaali Baisiraeli, aye baali Abamori abaawonagho. Saulo yayenda okwita Abagibeoni abo kuba yalumirwanga inho Abaisiraeli n'ab'omu kika kya Yuda, waire nga Abaisiraeli abo baali bamaze okulayirira Abagibeoni abo obutabaita." 
2Samuel21:3 Kale Daudi yaakoba Abagibeoni ati: “Mbakolere ki? Mutango ki gwe mbe mbaghe, memale musabire enkabi abantu ba Musengwa Katonda ababe ku bubwe?”" 
2Samuel21:4 Abagibeoni baamwiramu bati: “Ensonga eri ghagati ghaife ni Saulo oba n'ab'endhu ye, tesobola kuwaagho na feeza oba na zaabu. Era titwenda omuntu waire omulala ati aitibwe mu Isiraeli ku lwaife.” Agho Daudi n'okubabuuza ati: “Buti mukoba mbakolere ki?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Baamwiramu bati: “Saulo oyo yatutirimbula, yaayenda bwa kutuzikiriza twenatwena tuweegho mu Isiraeli." 
2Samuel21:6 Kale ni batughe abantu musanvu ku baidhukulu be, tubasibe emigugha mu nkoto tubalengeedhie mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda e Gibea ku lusozi lwa Musengwa Katonda.” Kyabazinga yaabairamu ati: “Ndidha kubagha abantu abo omusanvu.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Aye kyabazinga Daudi yaawonia Mefiboshethi mutabane wa Yonathani era mwidhukulu wa Saulo, yaaloba kumughaayo, olw'ekirayiro Daudi oyo ni Yonathani oyo mutabane wa Saulo kye baakola mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda." 
2Samuel21:8 Kale kyabazinga yaaghaayo abalenzi ababiri batabane ba Saulo be yazaala mu Rizupa mughala wa Aya, omulala nga ni Arumoni ate owundi yaaba nga ni Mefiboshethi. Era yaaghaayo n'abalenzi abataanu Merabu mughala wa Saulo be yazaala ni Adirieli mutabane wa Barazillai Omumeholathi." 
2Samuel21:9 Abo omusanvu yaabaghaayo eri Abagibeoni babaghanika baabalengeedhia mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ku lusozi, era baafiira ghalala boonaboona. Baabaita mu nnaku edhisooka edh'amakungula, ng'abantu baakainhama okukungula sayiri." 
2Samuel21:10 Agho Rizupa mughala wa Aya era eyali muka Saulo ow'embali, yaatoola ekutiya yaagyeyalira ku lubaale, okuva ku kiseera eky'amakungula ghe kyainhamira okutuusa ku ekiseera ekya amaadhi okugwa. Omusana yaaloba kuganhanga nhonhi kwidha ku mirambo egyo, ate obwire yaalobanga kuganha nsolo kugiidhaku." 
2Samuel21:11 Bwe baakobera Daudi ebyo Rizupa mughala wa Aya era eyali muka Saulo bye yakola," 
2Samuel21:12 Daudi yaaja yaatoola amagumba ga Saulo n'aga Yonathani mutabane wa Saulo oyo, ku bantu ab'e Yabeshi eky'omu Gileadi. Abantu ab'e Yabeshi abo baali nga baibye amagumba ago mu luya olw'ekibuga Bethi Shani, Abafilisiti ye baabaghanika ni babalengeedhia ku lunaku lwe baabaitiraku ku lusozi Giliboa." 
2Samuel21:13 Daudi yaatoolayo amagumba ga Saulo n'aga Yonathani mutabane we. Era baasoloza n'amagumba aga bale be baaghanika ni babalengeedhia. 
2Samuel21:14 Kale baaziika amagumba ga Saulo n'aga mutabane we Yonathani mu magombe ga Kishi lata wa Saulo oyo e Zela mu kiketezo kya Benjamini. Era baakola byonabyona kyabazinga Daudi bye yalagira. Ebyo bwe byawa, Katonda yaabagha bye baasabira ensi yaibwe." 
2Samuel21:15 Kabiri Abafilisiti bairamu okulwana n'Abaisiraeli. Kale Daudi yaaja n'abasaadha be okulwana n'Abafilisiti abo. Daudi oyo yaakoogha inho. 
2Samuel21:16 Ghaabaagho Ishibibenobu nga wa ku lulyo olw'abantu abawaigufu. Yali n'eifumo lya kyuma kya kikomo nga lizitogha kilo ng'oti isatu n'ekitundu, era nga yeesibye olusibiro mu nkende olwaliku empiima empyaka. Agho omusaadha oyo yaagezaaku okwita Daudi."
