2Samuel21:17 Aye Abishai mutabane wa Zeruia yaidha yaayamba Daudi, yaalumba Omufilisiti oyo yaamwita. Agho abasaadha ba Daudi baamulayirira bati: “Iwe oli ng'oti itaala lya Isiraeli, kale tokairayo kuja n'ife mu lutalo, tiikulwa ng'eitaala eryo lizima.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Olwo nga luwoire, kabiri ghaabalukagho olutalo olundi n'Abafilisiti e Gobu. Sibbekai ow'e Husha yaita Safi, ow'oku lulyo olw'abantu abawaigufu." 
2Samuel21:19 Era ghaabalukagho kabiri olutalo olundi n'Abafilisiti e Gobu. Elihanani mutabane wa Yaareoregimu Omubethilehemu, Goliathi Omugitti eyali n'eifumo eryali n'olunhago olunene olwaga n'ekiti kye balukisa olugoye." 
2Samuel21:20 Kabiri era ghaabaayo olutalo e Gathi omwali omusaadha omukologho ng'ali n'engalo mukaaga ku buli mukono, n'obugere mukaaga ku buli kigere byonabyona aghalala amakumi abiri na bina. Yeena yali wa ku lulyo olw'abantu abawaigufu." 
2Samuel21:21 Oyo bwe yasoononkereza Abaisiraeli, Yonathani mutabane wa Shimei muganda wa Daudi, yaamwita." 
2Samuel21:22 Abo abana baali ba ku lulyo olw'abantu abawaigufu abaali e Gathi, era Daudi n'abasaadha be n'abaabaita." 
2Samuel22:1 Agho Daudi yaayembera Musengwa Katonda olwembo luno, ku lunaku Musengwa Katonda oyo lwe yamuwonia omuzigu we Saulo n'abazigu be abandi boonaboona:" 
2Samuel22:2 Musengwa Katonda n'olubaale mwe neegisa, era n'ekifo kyange eky'okwewogomamu, antoola mu bizibu." 
2Samuel22:3 Musengwa Katonda ni Katonda wange, n'olubaale lwe numukiramu okwewonia, era n'engabo mwe neewoma; n'omulwanirizi wange amponia byonabyona. Musengwa Katonda n'obulumukiro bwange, era n'ekifo kyange eky'okwewogomamu, oyo n'amponia abakambwe." 
2Samuel22:4 Ndirira Musengwa Katonda okumbeera, yamponia abazigu bange, era agwaniire okusaakibwanga." 
2Samuel22:5 Olumbe lwanzingiza, omuzigu ng'ayenda kunsaaniagho ng'oti mataba." 
2Samuel22:6 Emigugha egy'emagombe gyaneezungulula, era okufa kwantega olutuula." 
2Samuel22:7 Bwenali ndi mu buzibu, nasaba Musengwa Katonda, naalirira Katonda wange ambeere; yaawulira amamiro gange ng'ali mu isinzizo lye, era okulira kwange kwamutuuka mu kutu." 
2Samuel22:8 Olwo ensi yaayuuga, yeesunda, emisingi egy'eigulu gyatengeeta era gyadhugumira; kuba agho Musengwa Katonda yali asungughaire." 
2Samuel22:9 Omwosi gwamuva mu nhindo, ate enimi edh'omuliro n'amanda agaaka, byamuva mu kanwa." 
2Samuel22:10 Yaigulagho eigulu yaika ku nsi nga ghansi gh'ebigere bye ghaligho ekire ekiirugavu bezigizigi. 
2Samuel22:11 Yaika ng'ali ku kitonde ekiri n'amaghagha ekyetebwa kerubi, era nga kiri kuguluka naye, baamubona ng'ali kuziinhuukira mu mpewo." 
2Samuel22:12 Yeeghemberera enzikiiza, era yeegisa mu bire eby'amaadhi agazigwire." 
2Samuel22:13 Mu bimyanso ebyali agho, mwavaamu amanda agaliku enimi edh'omuliro." 
2Samuel22:14 Musengwa Katonda yaatyabuka oti lukuba mu igulu, oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene yaayogera n'amamiro ge." 
2Samuel22:15 Yaalasa obulaso bwe yaasansaania abazigu be, yaamyansa olukuba yaababingagho." 
2Samuel22:16 Musengwa Katonda bwe yabakaabukira, n'empiriito ey'omuuka ogw'omu nhindo dhe n'ewulirwa, emisingi egy'ensi gyayerulwa, n'entobo y'enhandha yaaboneka." 
2Samuel22:17 Okuva ghaigulu eyo, yagolola omukono gwe yantoola, yaanhinhulula mu maadhi agenda okuumira." 
2Samuel22:18 Yamponia abazigu bange ab'amaani n'abo abankyagha; kuba baali ba maani inho okunsinga. 
2Samuel22:19 Baanumba ku lunaku lwe nali mu buzibu obutaloodheka, aye Musengwa Katonda yambeera." 
2Samuel22:20 Yantuusa mu kifo ekigazi yaabamponia, kuba nali nga nkola by'ayenda." 
2Samuel22:21 Musengwa Katonda yansasula ng'ajiira ku butuufu bwange yampa enkabi dhe, kuba nziraku musango." 
2Samuel22:22 Nze njiira ku biragiro bya Musengwa Katonda, era tigwangaku mu kibi kya kudaaliima kuva ku Katonda wange." 
2Samuel22:23 Ebiragiro bye byonabyona mbigema butiribiri, era mu mateeka ge ghazira lye ngayaalirira." 
2Samuel22:24 Mu maiso ge nzira musango, era neekuuma ndobe kugwa mu kibi." 
2Samuel22:25 Musengwa Katonda kyava n'ansasula ng'ajiira ku butuufu bwange, era ng'ajiira ku ky'okuba nti nzira musango mu maiso ge." 
2Samuel22:26 Oli mwesigwa eri abeesigwa, era waaba wa mazima eri ab'amazima." 
2Samuel22:27 Oli mutukuvu eri abo ab'emyoyo emitukuvu, olabukira mangu abo abakozi b'ebibi." 
2Samuel22:28 Olokola abo abagonvu aye olingirira abo abeetwala nga ba ghaigulu, waabaisa ghansi." 
2Samuel22:29 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bwenebwene oli itaala lyange, era niiwe Katonda wange amuliikirira mu nzikiiza." 
2Samuel22:30 Ku lulwo nsobola okughangula eigye eiramba; iwe Katonda wange ombeera naaghalampa ebisenge mwe beegisa. 
2Samuel22:31 Katonda ono, kiisi ky'akola kiba kituufu, kiisi ky'asuubiza akituukiriza, era yaaba ng'oti ngabo eri abo abamweyuna okubawonia." 
2Samuel22:32 Ghazira Katonda wundi okutoolaku Musengwa Katonda; ghazira lubaale lundi lwa kwewogomamu okutoolaku Katonda waife oyo. 
2Samuel22:33 Katonda oyo n'ekifo ekigumu eky'okwewogomamu, era yantoolera mu ngira ebizibu." 
2Samuel22:34 Yangumya ebigere ku itaka ng'oti bya mpongo era yangumiza irala eyo ghaigulu mu nsozi. 
2Samuel22:35 Andhegeresa okulwana olutalo, naasobola okukozesa akalaso kale keene ak'ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
2Samuel22:36 Iwe Musengwa Katonda, onkuuma era wandokola era olw'okumbeera kwo ndi mukologho." 
2Samuel22:37 Ogha ebigere byange okwetaaya nga ghazira angemaku, byaloba kutyerera ni ngwa." 
2Samuel22:38 Nabingirira abazigu bange naabatuukaku, naabazikiriza, era tyakyusa kwira okutuusa nga mmaze okubamulungula." 
2Samuel22:39 Nabamulungula naabafumitafumita baaba nga tibaghanga kusituka, baagwa ku itaka naabaniinaniinaku." 
2Samuel22:40 Niiwe owampa amaani ag'okulwana olutalo olwo, abo abaanumba waabasuula ku itaka naabaniinaniinaku." 
2Samuel22:41 Waleetera abazigu bange okukyuka baalumuka naababona bwa nkoone, naazikiriza abo abankyagha." 
2Samuel22:42 Baakanula amaiso aye nga tibabona wa kubawonia, baalirira Musengwa Katonda aye yaaloba kubavugira." 
2Samuel22:43 Nabasekula, naabasa baaba ng'oti nkungu; naabatyankirira ng'oti bityanka eby'omu nguudo, naabasansaania." 
2Samuel22:44 Wamponia abantu abadheemu, wanfuula omufuzi ow'amaghanga kamaala abantu be nali tiidhi waabafuula bagheereza bange." 
2Samuel22:45 Abamaghanga agandi baidha ye ndi nga baavula bwavule; olwampuliraku bati, baatoolera okugondera ebiragiro byange." 
2Samuel22:46 Emyoyo gyabawaamu ira, era baavaayo mu bufo bwaibwe obugumu obw'okwegisaamu nga badhugumira." 
2Samuel22:47 “Musengwa Katonda mulamu! Oyo olubaale mwe neewogoma asaakibwenga; Katonda oyo obulokozi bwange agulumizibwenga! 
2Samuel22:48 Katonda oyo, anwaniragho abazigu bange, n'ampangulira amaghanga ni ngafuga," 
2Samuel22:49 yamponia abazigu bange. Bwenebwene ombeedie, abaanumbagana baasigala ghansi; omponiiza abo abakola eby'obukambwe." 
2Samuel22:50 Kale ni nnaakusaakanga mu maghanga goonagoona, era naayembanga nga nsaaka eriina lyo." 
2Samuel22:51 Katonda agha kyabazinga y'agonza obughanguzi, oyo ye yalonda amwoleka nga bw'amugonza einho, era oyo nga ni Daudi ni baidhukulu be ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Bino n'ebibono bya Daudi ebyasembayo: Kuno n'okwogera kwa Daudi mutabane wa Yesse, okwogera okw'omuntu Katonda ye yagulumiza, omuntu Katonda wa Yakobo oyo ye yasiiga omuzigo, omwembi wa zabbuli mu Isiraeli ataloodheka." 
2Samuel23:2 Daudi oyo yakoba ati: “Omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwogerera mu nze, antaire ebibono bye mu kanwa." 
2Samuel23:3 Katonda wa Isiraeli yayogera, oyo olubaale lwa Isiraeli olw'okwewogomamu yankoba ati: Omuntu bw'afuga abantu ng'asala mu butuufu, n'afuga ng'atya Katonda," 
2Samuel23:4 ababonekera ng'oti n'akasana ak'oku nkyo, ak'endhuba evaayo ku lunaku oluziraku bire ku igulu aba ng'oti maadhi agaleetera eisubi okusibuka okuva mu itaka." 
2Samuel23:5 Bwenebwene atyo Katonda bw'ali eri ab'olulyo lwange, kuba yakola ninze endagaano ey'olubeerera, endagaano ensengeke obukalamu era etalivaagho. Nkakasa nti aidha kumbeeranga mu buli kintu, era ampenga byonabyona bye nhenda." 
2Samuel23:6 Aye abantu abatatya Katonda boonaboona bali ng'oti mawa ge basuula obw'ere, kuba toghanga kugagema na ngalo." 
2Samuel23:7 Aye ole ayenda okugagemaku, akozesa ekyuma ekigumu einho era n'olunhago olw'eifumo, yaagookya n'omuliro gwagamaliragho irala.”" 
2Samuel23:8 Gano n'amaina ag'abalwani ab'amaani Daudi be yali nabo: Asooka nga ni Yoshebu Basshebethi ow'e Tahakemoni n'eyali ng'akulira abasatu ab'amaani. Ono ghaligho omukuzi gwe yalwanisa eifumo lye n'abalwani olunaana (800), yaabaita boonaboona." 
2Samuel23:9 Owokubiri ku basatu abo ab'amaani nga ni Eleazari mutabane wa Dodo, ate Dodo oyo yaaba mutabane wa Ahohi. Oyo n'eyali ni Daudi ni bakana okulwanisa Abafilisiti abaali beesoloiza okulwana, waire nga Abaisiraeli baaleka olutalo bairayo einhuma." 
2Samuel23:10 Mwene yaakana yaita Abafilisiti okutuusa omukono gwe bwe gwakoogha, engalo ni dhimwefunhira ku mpiima. Musengwa Katonda yaabagha obughanguzi obw'amaani olunaku olwo. Abaisiraeli baamala baira bwa kutoola ku baitibwa bintu." 
2Samuel23:11 Owokusatu ku basatu abo ab'amaani nga ni Shamma mutabane wa Agee ow'e Harari. Oyo ghaaligho olunaku Abafilisiti lwe beesololeza e Lehi aghaali omusiri ogwidhwire ebidhandhaali, Abaisiraeli baalumuka Abafilisiti abo." 
2Samuel23:12 Aye Shamma oyo yaasigala mu musiri ogwo yaagulwanirira, yaita Abafilisiti. Musengwa Katonda yaagha Isiraeli obughanguzi obw'amaani." 
2Samuel23:13 Agho nga mu biseera eby'amakungula, abasatu ku balwani amakumi asatu abaakuliranga banaibwe mu igye, baaja Daudi ye yali mu mpuku ey'e Adullamu. Ekikunsu eky'Abafilisiti kyali kisimbye weema dhaakyo mu kiiko eky'e Refa." 
2Samuel23:14 Mu kiseera ekyo Daudi yali mu kifo eky'okwewogomamu, ate ekikunsu eky'Abafilisiti nga kisimbye enkambi yaakyo e Bethelehemu." 
2Samuel23:15 Omwoyo gwadhuuba Daudi oyo, yaakoba ati: “Kale nguli ghaligho omuntu andeeteraku amaadhi ag'okunhwa agava mu nsulo eri ku mulyango ogw'ekibuga e Bethelehemu!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Agho abalwani bale abasatu ab'amaani baaja baaghaguza mu kifo Abafilisiti ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, baasena amaadhi mu nsulo eyo, baagaleetera Daudi. Aye yaaloba kuganhwaku naire, yaagafukira Musengwa Katonda" 
2Samuel23:17 ng'akoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, tikiribaagho nze okukola ekintu ng'oti n'ekyo. Olwo mba ng'ali kunhwa omusaayi ogw'abasaadha bano abaghaireyo obulamu bwaibwe ni baja okuganona!” Kale yaaloba kuganhwa. Ebyo n'ebikolwa abalwani abo abasatu ab'amaani bye baakola nga baziramu ntete naire." 
2Samuel23:18 Abishai muganda wa Yoabu era nga inhina ni Zeruia, n'eyali akulira abalwani amakumi asatu ab'amaani. Abishai oyo yaalwanisa abantu ebikumi bisatu n'eifumo lye yaabaita, yeekolera eriina mu balwani amakumi asatu abo." 
2Samuel23:19 Oyo n'eyasinga okumanhikana einho mu abo amakumi asatu, era yaafuuka muduumizi waibwe. Aye ti yatuuka ku idaala lya bale abasatu." 
2Samuel23:20 Benaia ow'e Kabuzeeli era mutabane wa Yehoiada, yali mulwani wa ntalo aziramu ntete. Yakola eby'amaani kamaala, nga n'omuli n'okwita abalwani ab'amaani ababiri Abamoabu. Olundi yaita empologoma ng'eri mu kiina, mu biseera eby'omugozi nga gugwire." 
2Samuel23:21 Era yaita Omumisiri nga wa kighaga, ate ng'agemye eifumo mu ngalo. Benaia oyo yaamulumba nga mwene ali na mwigo bwigo, yaamuswankulaku eifumo mu ngalo yaamwitisa lyene eryo." 
2Samuel23:22 Ebyo n'eby'amaani Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada bye yakola, ni yeekolera eriina mu abo amakumi asatu ab'amaani." 
2Samuel23:23 Benaia oyo yamanhikana inho mu abo amakumi asatu, aye tiyatuuka ku idaala lya bale abasatu. Daudi yaamutaagho okukuliranga abaisirukale be abaamukuumanga." 
2Samuel23:24 Abandi ku abo amakumi asatu ni bano: Asaheli muganda wa Yoabu, Elihanani mutabane wa Dodo ow'e Bethelehemu, Shamma ow'e Harodi," 
2Samuel23:25 Elika ow'e Harodi," 
2Samuel23:26 Helezi Omupaleti, Ira mutabane wa Ikkeshi ow'e Tekoa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiezeri ow'e Anathothi, Mebunnai Omuhushathi," 
2Samuel23:28 Zalumoni Omuahohi, Maharai ow'e Netofa," 
2Samuel23:29 Helebu mutabane wa Baana ow'e Netofa, Ittai mutabane wa Ribai ow'e Gibea eky'Ababenjamini," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaia ow'e Pirathoni, Hiddai ow'oku bwiga obw'e Gaashi," 
2Samuel23:31 Abialiboni Omuarubathi," 
2Samuel23:32 Azimavethi ow'e Bahurimu, Eliahaba ow'e Shaaluboni, Batabane ba Yasheni, Yonathani," 
2Samuel23:33 Shamma Omuharari, Ahiamu mutabane wa Sharari Omuharari," 
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti mutabane wa Ahasibai ow'e Maaka, Eliamu mutabane wa Ahithofeli ow'e Gilo," 
2Samuel23:35 Heziro ow'e Karumeli, Paarai Omuarubi," 
2Samuel23:36 Igali mutabane wa Nathani ow'e Zoba, Bani Omugadi," 
2Samuel23:37 Zeleka Omuammoni, Naharai ow'e Beerothi eyagemeranga Yoabu mutabane wa Zeruia eby'okulwanisa bye," 
2Samuel23:38 Ira Omuithiri, Garebu Omuithiri," 
2Samuel23:39 ni Uria Omuhitti. Agho boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu amakumi asatu na musanvu. 
2Samuel24:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda kabiri yaasungughalira inho Abaisiraeli, yaaleetera Daudi okubatuusaaku akabi. Yaakoba Daudi ati: “Ja obale Abaisiraeli n'Abayudaaya.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Kale Kyabazinga Daudi yaalagira Yoabu n'abaduumizi abandi ab'eigye be yali nabo ati: “Muje mubitebite mu bika byonabyona ebya Isiraeli okuva e Dani okutuuka e Beerisheba, mubale abantu mmanhe omughendo gwaibwe.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Yoabu yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda wo agwananga yaayongera ku bungi obw'abantu ba Isiraeli emikuzi kikumi okusinga bwe bali, era n'iwe Isebantu kyabazinga ekyo waakyeboneraku n'amaiso go. Aye Isebantu kyabazinga, eky'okubala abantu kikusanhukiza ki?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Aye Yoabu n'abaduumizi abandi ab'eigye, baalwa eira baakakibwa okukola ekyo kyabazinga kye yalagira. Kale baava mu maiso ga kyabazinga, baaja okubala abantu abaali mu Isiraeli." 
2Samuel24:5 Baasomoka omwiga Yorudani, baaja okubala abantu nga basookera mu Aroeri ekiri ghagati mu kiiko, beeyongerayo mu kiketezo ky'e Gadi baatuuka e Yazeri." 
2Samuel24:6 Olwo baaja baatuuka e Gileadi n'e Kadeshi mu kiketezo eky'Abahitti. Beeyongerayo baatuuka e Dani, ate baava eyo beezungulula baaja e Sidoni." 
2Samuel24:7 Agho baatuuka e Tiro mu kifo eky'okwewogomamu, baamala baaja mu bibuga byonabyona eby'Abahivi n'Abakanaani, era baaja baabita mu kiketezo kya Buyudaaya ekikalukalu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, baatuuka e Beerisheba." 
2Samuel24:8 Kale olumaliira olw'emyezi omwenda n'enaku amakumi abiri, bairayo e Yerusalemu nga bamaze okubitabita mu biketezo by'ensi eyo byonabyona." 
2Samuel24:9 Yoabu yaatwalira kyabazinga Daudi omughendo ogw'abantu be baabala: mu Isiraeli mwalimu abasaadha abalwani b'entalo abaziramu ntete emitwalo kinaana (800,000), ate mu Buyudaaya mwabaamu emitwalo ataanu (500,000)." 
2Samuel24:10 Aye Daudi bwe yamala okubala abantu yeeraliikirira mu omwoyo, yaakoba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda nhonoine inho olw'ekyo kye nkoze. Era buti nkweghembye ntoolaaku ekibi ekyo nze omugheereza wo, kuba nkoze kya busiru inho.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Gadi omulanzi yali nga n'agha Daudi ku magezi. Kale Daudi oyo bwe yasitukagho ku nkyo, Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Gadi ati:" 
2Samuel24:12 “Ja okobe Daudi oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Ndi kukugha ebintu bisatu, olondeku kirala kye mbe nkukole.’ ”" 
2Samuel24:13 Kale Gadi yaaja ye Daudi yaamukobera nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yamukoba. Yaamukoba ati: “Ku bisatu bino olondaku kirigha? Endhala okugwa mu nsi yo okumala emyaka esatu? Oba iwe okumala emyezi esatu ng'oli kulumuka abazigu bo abakuyiigania? Oba ekibamba okwidha mu nsi yo ni kigigoya okumala enaku eisatu? Buti dhuubiriza osalegho kye mbe ndhiremu oyo antumye.” 
2Samuel24:14 Agho Daudi yaakoba Gadi ati: “Enaku engemye inho naasoberwa. Aye ekisinga leka Katonda ali n'ekisa ekyodo atubonereze mwene, mu kifo eky'abantu obuntu okutubonereza.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Kale Musengwa Katonda yasindika ku Isiraeli ekibamba okuva ku nkyo eryo okutuusa ku kiseera ekyateebwagho. Abantu baafa okuva e Dani okutuuka e Beerisheba abaaghera emitwalo omusanvu (70,000)." 
2Samuel24:16 Malaika bwe yagolola omukono gwe okuzikiriza Yerusalemu, Musengwa Katonda yaakyusa ekirowoozo kye eky'okukola Abaisiraeli akabi. Kale Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Ekyo kinaamala. Lekera agho!” Agho malaika yali atuuse mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano ekya Arauna Omuyebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Daudi bwe yabona malaika eyali ali kwita abantu, yaasaba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Linga, nze ninze eyayonoona, naakola ekibi einho, aye abantu bano bazira kye baakola kiri kubaitisa. Kyenva ni nsaba nti, omukono gwo gugwaine kukuba nze n'ab'endhu ya lata wange.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Ku lunaku lwene olwo Gadi yaidha yaakoba Daudi ati: “Ja mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano agha Arauna Omuyebusi ozimbire agho Musengwa Katonda alutaari.” 
2Samuel24:19 Kale Daudi yaaja ng'ajiira ku kiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda Gadi kye yamukobera. 
2Samuel24:20 Arauna bwe yalinga ati yaabona kyabazinga Daudi n'abakungu be nga bali kwidha y'ali, yeena yaaja ye bali. Era bwe yatuuka ye kyabazinga yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka." 
2Samuel24:21 Yaabuuza kyabazinga ati: “Kibaire ki iwe Isebantu kyabazinga okwidha ye nze omugheereza wo?” Daudi yaamwiramu ati: “Ndidhie kukugulaku kifo kyo aghakubirwa engaano nzimbiregho Musengwa Katonda alutaari olwo atoole ku bantu ekibamba.” 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Niiwe Isebantu kyabazinga, toola kyonakyona ky'obona nga kirungi, okigheeyo. Ente dhiidho edh'okughaayo ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, n'ekiti ekibairenga kikozesebwa okumulungula engaano kiikyo, era n'emiti egibaire egy'ebikoligo by'ente, gikozese ng'enku." 
2Samuel24:23 Ebyo byonabyona, Isebantu kyabazinga, nze Arauna mbikughaire iwe kyabazinga, era nsaba Musengwa Katonda asiime ekigheebwayo kyo.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Aye kyabazinga yaakoba Arauna ati: “Busa toidha kubimpa bughe, aye ndidha kubigula omughendo ogubijaamu. Tiidha kughaayo kigheebwayo kyokebwa eri Musengwa Katonda wange kye ntaguze na mughendo kuva mu nsawo yange.” Kale Daudi yaagula ekifo aghakubirwa engaano n'ente dhaaku ebitundu amakumi ataanu ebya feeza." 
2Samuel24:25 Era yaazimbira agho Musengwa Katonda alutaari yaagheerayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Kale Musengwa Katonda yaabagha bye baasabira ensi era yaalekeza n'ekibamba ekyali kiri kwita abantu mu Isiraeli. 
1Kings1:1 Mu kiseera ekyo kyabazinga Daudi yali ng'akairiighe inho, era nga waire bamubwika ebyebwiko ebigheraku, nga tasuugha." 
1Kings1:2 Kale abagheereza be baamukoba bati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ka tukunoonezeeyo omughala omutomuto akugheerezenga era ng'akulabirira. Era asulenga ghalala n'iwe musengwa waife kyabazinga, oghange okusuughanga.”" 
1Kings1:3 Agho baayagala mu Isiraeli mwonamwona omughala aboneka obulungi, era baazuula Abishagi Omushunami, baamuleetera kyabazinga." 
1Kings1:4 Omughala oyo yali aboneka bulungi inho, era yaafuuka omugheereza wa kyabazinga, ng'amulabirira. Aye kyabazinga tiyamufuulaku mukazi we naire." 
1Kings1:5 Agho Adoniya mutabane wa kyabazinga Daudi, ye yazaala mu mukazi ayetebwa Haggithi, yeekuluntaza ng'akoba mule ati: “Ninze ndidha okuba kyabazinga.” Era yeetegekerayo ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'abavuzi b'embalaasi, n'abasaadha amakumi ataanu ab'okumukuumanga." 
1Kings1:6 Lata we Daudi, yali nga tamuneniangaku mu kintu kyonakyona. Adoniya oyo yali mulungi mu mboneka ye, era nga ni muto wa Abusalomu amwiraku." 
1Kings1:7 Adoniya oyo yaayogera ni Yoabu mutabane w'omukazi ayetebwa Zeruia, era yaayogera ni Abiathari kabona, era abo bombi baamughagira era baamubeera." 
1Kings1:8 Aye Zadoki kabona, ni Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada, ni Nathani omulanzi, ni Shimei, ni Rei, n'abasaadha ba Daudi ab'amaani, tibaali ku luuyi lwa Adoniya." 
1Kings1:9 Agho Adoniya yaaghaayo bino ng'omusengo: entaama, ente enume n'ente entototo empiite ensavu. Yaabigheerayo agho gha ibaale eryetebwa Eibaale ery'Emisota, eriri okumpi n'akaiga akeetebwa Enirogeli. Yaayeta baganda be boonaboona, abo nga n'abaana ba kyabazinga Daudi, era yaayeta n'abakungu ba kyabazinga boonaboona ab'e Buyudaaya, okwidha okubaagho." 
1Kings1:10 Aye yaaloba kweta Nathani omulanzi, oba Benaia, oba abasaadha bale abalwani ab'amaani, waire okweta muganda we Solomoni." 
1Kings1:11 Agho Nathani omulanzi yaaja, yaakoba Bathisheba inhina wa Solomoni ati: “Iwe okaali kuwulira ng'Adoniya mutabane wa mughalikwa wo Haggithi yafuuse kyabazinga, era nga musengwa waife Daudi taidhi?" 
1Kings1:12 Kale ni ka nkughe ku magezi osobole okuwonia obulamu bwo n'obwa mutabane wo Solomoni: 
1Kings1:13 Situkiramu oje ye kyabazinga Daudi, omukobe oti, ‘Isebantu kyabazinga, tiwandayirira nze omugheereza wo omukazi, oti mutabane wange Solomoni n'alikusikira era nga n'alityama ku kityamo kyo eky'obwakyabazinga? Memale kabiri Adoniya afuuse atya kyabazinga?’ ”" 
1Kings1:14 Nathani yaayongeraku ati: “Agho bw'onaaba ng'okaayogera ni kyabazinga, zeena ndidha kutuukiragho mu kiseera ekyo era nkakase by'okoba.”" 
1Kings1:15 Agho Bathisheba yaaja ye kyabazinga mu kisenge ye yali. Mu kiseera ekyo kyabazinga yali akairiighe inho, era nga Abishagi, omughala Omushunemi, n'amulabirira." 
1Kings1:16 Agho Bathisheba yaakubira kyabazinga amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Kyabazinga yaamubuuza ati: “Oyenda ki?” 
1Kings1:17 Bathisheba yairamu ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, nze omugheereza wo omukazi wandayirira mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda wo, oti mutabane wange Solomoni n'alikusikira, era nga n'alityama ku kityamo kyo eky'obwakyabazinga." 
1Kings1:18 Aye mpegaano bona, Adoniya afuuse kyabazinga, waire nga iwe musengwa wange toidhi." 
1Kings1:19 Era aghaireyo bino ng'omusengo: ente enume, ente entototo empiite ensavu n'entaama kamaala. Era ayese batabane bo boonaboona, ni Abiathari kabona, ni Yoabu omuduumizi w'eigye. Aye Solomoni omugheereza wo tamwese." 
1Kings1:20 Agho ni Isebantu kyabazinga, Abaisiraeli boonaboona balingiriire ku iwe okubakobera ow'okukusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Kings1:21 Bw'otaakole otyo, kiidha kuba nti iwe musengwa wange kyabazinga olulimala okufa ni weeyimba ku badhaadha bo, nze ni mutabane wange tuja kubalirwa mu bantu ababi.”" 
1Kings1:22 Bathisheba yali akaayogera ni kyabazinga, Nathani omulanzi yaingira." 
1Kings1:23 Baakobera kyabazinga bati: “Nathani omulanzi wuuno aidhie.” Era Nathani oyo bwe yaingira aghali kyabazinga yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka." 
1Kings1:24 Agho yaakoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, obwo bwene wakoba oti Adoniya n'alikusikira, era nga n'alityama ku kityamo kyo eky'obwakyabazinga?" 
1Kings1:25 Olwaleero luno lwene, ajiire yaaghaayo bino ng'omusengo: ente enume, ente entototo empiite ensavu n'entaama. Era ayese batabane bo boonaboona, ni Yoabu omuduumizi w'eigye, ni Abiathari kabona. Era bali eyo bali kulya era baanhwera mu maiso ge, nga bwe bakoba bati, ‘Ghangaala, kyabazinga Adoniya!’" 
1Kings1:26 Aye nze omugheereza wo, ni Zadoki kabona, ni Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada, ni Solomoni omugheereza wo, tatwese." 
1Kings1:27 Isebantu kyabazinga, niiwe eyakoze ekyo nga tokobeireeku bagheereza bo, muntu alikusikira ku bwakyabazinga?”" 
1Kings1:28 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yairamu ati: “Ndhetera Bathisheba, aidhe.” Era Bathisheba yaidha, yaayemerera mu maiso ga kyabazinga." 
1Kings1:29 Kyabazinga yaalayira ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu eyamponia buli kabi koonakoona," 
1Kings1:30 ng'oti ni bwe nakulayirira mu Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, nga nkoba nti, ‘Solomoni n'alinsikira ku bwakyabazinga era n'aliira mu kifo kyange, atyamenga ku kityamo kyange eky'obwakyabazinga. Era ntyo bwe ndidha okukola olwaleero.’ ”" 
1Kings1:31 Agho Bathisheba yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka mu maiso ga kyabazinga. Yaakoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga Daudi, ghangaala byanda na byanda!”" 
1Kings1:32 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaayetesa Zadoki kabona, ni Nathani omulanzi, ni Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada. Bwe baidha gh'ali," 
1Kings1:33 kyabazinga yaabakoba ati: “Muje n'abakungu bange, mutyamye mutabane wange Solomoni ku nhumbu yange yeene, y'abe avuge. Olwo muserengete e Gihoni," 
1Kings1:34 Zadoki kabona ni Nathani omulanzi bamusiigire eyo omuzigo, abe kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. Ekyo nga kiwoire, mwidha kufuuwa eigwala, mukobe muti, ‘Ghangaala kyabazinga Solomoni!’" 
1Kings1:35 Eyo mwidha kuvaayo nga mumunonereza, aidhe atyame ku kityamo kyange eky'obwakyabazinga kuba n'aidha okuba kyabazinga mu kifo kyange. Era mmutairegho okuba omufuzi wa Isiraeli ni Buyudaaya.”" 
1Kings1:36 Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada yairamu ati: “Amiina. Era, musengwa wange kyabazinga, neeghemba Musengwa Katonda wo akikakase." 
1Kings1:37 Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'abairenga n'iwe, Isebantu kyabazinga, era atyo bw'abe abenga ni Solomoni, era aleetere obufuzi bwe okuba obukologho einho okusinga obubwo.”" 
1Kings1:38 Agho Zadoki kabona, ni Nathani omulanzi, ni Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada, ni bale abaakuumanga kyabazinga Abakerethi n'Abapelethi, baatyamya Solomoni ku nhumbu ya kyabazinga Daudi, yaagivuga era baaja naye e Gihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Nga bali eyo, Zadoki kabona yaaja mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, yaatoolayo eiyiga ery'ensolo lye baatangamu omuzigo, yaatoolamu omuzigo, yaagusiiga Solomoni. Olwo baafuuwa eigwala, era abantu boonaboona baakoba bati: “Ghangaala kyabazinga Solomoni.”" 
1Kings1:40 Agho abantu boonaboona baaja nga bamunonereza nga bafuuwa endere, era nga basagambya n'eisanhu lingi inho, n'eitaka kumpi lyeyatiseemu olw'okuwowoigana kwaibwe." 
1Kings1:41 Adoniya n'abageni be boonaboona be yali nabo, baali nga bali kumaliriza ekibinuko kyaibwe, baawulira okuwowoigana okwo. Era Yoabu bwe yawulira okuvuga kw'eigwala, yaabuuza ati: “Okwasiikana okwo kwonakwona mu kibuga kutegeeza ki?”" 
1Kings1:42 Yali akaayogera, yaja okubona, nga Yonathani mutabane wa Abiathari kabona, aidha. Adoniya yaakoba Yonathani oyo, ati: “Ingira, kuba oli musaadha mukalamu, era n'amawulire g'oleese malungi.”" 
1Kings1:43 Yonathani yaira mu Adoniya ati: “Busa naire, kuba musengwa waife kyabazinga Daudi atairegho Solomoni okuba kyabazinga." 
1Kings1:44 Era atumye Zadoki kabona, ni Nathani omulanzi, ni Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada, ni bale abaakuumanga kyabazinga Abakerethi n'Abapelethi, baaja baatyamya Solomoni ku nhumbu ya kyabazinga, era yaagivuga." 
1Kings1:45 Era Zadoki kabona ni Nathani omulanzi, bamusiize omuzigo e Gihoni, abe kyabazinga, era baavaayo baaja mu kibuga nga basagamba, olwo ekibuga kyabaamu okuwowoigana. Kale ni okwo n'okwasiikana kwe muwuliire." 
1Kings1:46 Solomoni buti ni kyabazinga. 
1Kings1:47 Ate ekindi, abakungu ba kyabazinga baidhie okweisuusa musengwa waife kyabazinga Daudi, baakoba bati, ‘Tweghemba Katonda wo afuule Solomoni okuba omumanhifu okusinga iwe bw'obaire, era afuule obwakyabazinga bwa Solomoni oyo bube bukologho inho okusinga obubwo bwe bubaire.’ Agho kyabazinga Daudi yeebaliza ku buliri bwe," 
1Kings1:48 era yasaaka Katonda ati, ‘Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli asaakibwe, oyo aghaire omulala ku b'omusaayi gwange okutyama ku kityamo kyange eky'obwakyabazinga, era n'anganha okuba omulamu ni mbona ku ekyo.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Agho abageni ba Adoniya baadhugumira era baasituka, buli muntu yaagema engira yiye." 
1Kings1:50 Adoniya olw'okutya Solomoni, yaasituka, yaaja yeegema ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari, mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda." 
1Kings1:51 Baakobera Solomoni bati: “Bona, Adoniya akutiire iwe kyabazinga Solomoni, era wuule yeegemye ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku alutaari, ng'akoba ati, ‘Kyabazinga Solomoni asooke andayirire, nga taidha kundhita nze omugheereza we.’ ”" 
1Kings1:52 Solomoni yairamu ati: “Bw'aneebisa obukalamu, ghazira luviiri waire olulala lwe baidha kwigha mu mutwe gwe. Aye bwe balimuzuula nga yeebisa bubi, balimwita.”" 
1Kings1:53 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaatuma abantu, baaja baatoola Adoniya ku alutaari. Adoniya yaidha mu maiso ga kyabazinga Solomoni, yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaamukoba ati: “Irayo ewuwo.”" 
1Kings2:1 Agho Daudi bweyali ng'ali kumpi okufa, yaasikirira mutabane we Solomoni ati:" 
1Kings2:2 “Ekiseera kyange eky'okufa ng'abantu boonaboona bwe bali n'okufa, kiri kumpi okutuuka. Kale oba nga wa maani era ogumanga kisaadha." 
1Kings2:3 Otuukirizanga ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda wo by'ayenda okole, ng'ojiira ku ebyo by'akukoba mu mateeka ge ni mu biragiro bye, nga bwe byaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka ga Musa. Olwo obenga n'enkabi mu byonabyona by'onaakolanga, ni yoonayoona y'onaajanga." 
1Kings2:4 Era olwo Musengwa Katonda atuukirizenga kye yansuubiza, bwe yankoba ati ku baidhukulu bange n'okunaabanga anaafuganga Isiraeli, kasita baidhukulu bange abo baneegenderezanga okugema bye yalagira n'omutima gwaibwe gwonagwona, era n'omwoyo gwaibwe gwonagwona." 
1Kings2:5 “Ate era oidhi Yoabu mutabane wa Zeruia kye yankola, bwe yatemula abaduumizi b'eigye lya Isiraeli ababiri Abuneri mutabane wa Neri, ni Amasa mutabane wa Yetheri. Yabatemulira mu biseera eby'emiraala, ng'abeesasuulizaaku olw'abantu abaitibwa mu ntalo. Mu nsambo eyo yandeetera okuvunaanibwa ogw'okwita abantu abaziraku musango." 
1Kings2:6 Kale ni okolanga nga bw'oidhi. Otalobanga kumwita, ni bw'aliba nga mukaire wa nvu." 
1Kings2:7 “Aye bisanga bukalamu batabane ba Barazillai Omugileadi, era ka babenga mu abo b'onaalabiriranga, kuba bambisa bukalamu bwe nali nga ndi kulumuka muganda wo Abusalomu." 
1Kings2:8 “Era ghaligho ni Shimei ali n'iwe, ng'oyo ni mutabane wa Gera Omubenjamini ow'e Bahurimu. Shimei oyo yanvuma bubi inho ku lunaku lwe naja e Mahanaimu. Aye bwe yaidha okundhagaana ku mwiga Yorudani, namulayirira mu Musengwa Katonda nti, tiidha kumwita." 
1Kings2:9 Kale ni otamusonighanga naire. Oli musaadha mugezi era oidha kumanha eky'okumukola. Otalobanga kumwita waire nga mukaire.” 
1Kings2:10 Agho Daudi yaafa yeeyimba ku baadhaadha be abaafa, yaziikibwa mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi." 
1Kings2:11 Yali afugiire Isiraeli okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi ana; yafugira emyaka musanvu mu Heburoni, era yaafugira emyaka amakumi asatu n'esatu mu Yerusalemu." 
1Kings2:12 Agho Solomoni yaasikira lata we Daudi ku bwakyabazinga, era obwakyabazinga bwe bwaba bugumu bwene." 
1Kings2:13 Agho Adoniya mutabane wa Daudi ye yazaala mu Haggithi, yaidha eri Bathisheba inhina wa Solomoni. Bathisheba yaamubuuza ati: “Oidhie bya bulungi?” Adoniya yairamu ati: “Yii, bya bulungi.”" 
1Kings2:14 Era yaakoba ati: “Ndi ni kye nhenda okukukoba.” Bathisheba yaakoba ati: “Kyogere.” 
1Kings2:15 Adoniya yaakoba ati: “Oidhi bukalamu nga ninze eyali ow'okusikira obwakyabazinga, era ng'abantu boonaboona mu Isiraeli ekyo kye baali basuubira. Aye muganda wange yaafuuka kyabazinga, kuba Musengwa Katonda atyo bwe yayenda." 
1Kings2:16 Kale, mpegaano ndi kukusaba ekintu kirala, era nkweghembye otakiinhima.” Bathisheba yaamukoba ati: “Kyogere.”" 
1Kings2:17 Adoniya yaamukoba ati: “Nkweghembye nsabiraagho kyabazinga Solomoni, kuba iwe taidha kukwima, ampe Abishagi Omushunemi, abe mukazi wange.”" 
1Kings2:18 Bathisheba yaakoba ati: “Kale ndhikiriiza. Ndidha kukwogererayo ye kyabazinga.” 
1Kings2:19 Kale Bathisheba yaaja ye kyabazinga Solomoni okwogererayo Adoniya. Kyabazinga yaasituka okusangaaza inhina ng'akutaimeku. Yaatyama ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga. Yaalagira baaleetera inhina ekityamo, inhina yaatyama ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olwa kyabazinga." 
1Kings2:20 Inhina yaakoba ati: “Ndi n'akantu akatono kalala kati, ke nhenda okukusaba. Otakaanhima.” Kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Maama, kasabe. Tiidha kukakwima.”" 
1Kings2:21 Inhina yaamukoba ati: “Leka muganda wo Adoniya atwale Abishagi Omushunemi, abe mukazi we.”" 
1Kings2:22 Kyabazinga Solomoni yairamu inhina ati: “Lwaki oli kusabira Adoniya, Abishagi Omushunemi abe mukazi we? Musabire n'obwakyabazinga bwona, kuba ni mukulu wange, ate nga Abiathari kabona ni Yoabu mutabane wa Zeruia bali ku luuyi lwe.”" 
1Kings2:23 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaalayira mu Musengwa Katonda ati: “Adoniya bw'ataitibwe olw'ekyo ky'asabye, Katonda agwananga yambonereza inho." 
1Kings2:24 Ndayira Musengwa Katonda omulamu eyampa obwakyabazinga bwa lata wange Daudi, nze n'ab'endhu yange, era n'andeetera okukakata ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, nga bwe yasuubiza. Ndayira nti bwenebwene olwaleero Adoniya aidha kwitibwa.”" 
1Kings2:25 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaalagira Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada, yaaja yaita Adoniya." 
1Kings2:26 Kyabazinga Solomoni yaakoba Abiathari kabona ati: “Ja mu kyalo kyo mu Anathothi. Ogwaniire okwitibwa, aye tiidha kukwita mpegaano, kuba walabiriranga Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda ey'Endagaano, bwe wali ni lata wange Daudi, era waabanga ghalala naye mu bizibu bye byonabyona.”" 
1Kings2:27 Kale atyo Solomoni yaabinga Abiathari ku mulimo ogw'okuba kabona wa Musengwa Katonda. Mu nsambo eyo, yaatuukiriza Musengwa Katonda kye yakoba ku b'endhu ya Eli mu Shilo." 
1Kings2:28 Amawulire ago bwe gaatuuka ku Yoabu, yaalumukira mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, yeegema ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo, ebiri ku alutaari. Yoabu yatya, kuba yeeyimba ni Adoniya, waire nga tiyeeyimbaku na Abusalomu." 
1Kings2:29 Bwe baakobera kyabazinga Solomoni bati: “Yoabu alumukiire mu Weema ya Musengwa Katonda, era ali gh'alutaari,” Solomoni yaalagira Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada ati: “Ja omwite.”" 
1Kings2:30 Benaia yaaja yaatuuka ku Weema ya Musengwa Katonda, yaakoba Yoabu ati: “Kyabazinga akulagiire ati, ‘Fuluma.’ ” Yoabu yaakoba ati: “Busa, ndidha kufiira ghano.” Benaia yaiza ye kyabazinga obukwenda ati: “Yoabu akobye ati n'ati. Atyo bw'andhizeemu.”" 
1Kings2:31 Agho kyabazinga yaakoba Benaia ati: “Kola nga bw'akobye. Mwite, omuziike, nze n'ab'endhu ya lata wange tulobe kuvunaanibwa kufa kwa bantu Yoabu oyo be yaita nga baziraku musango." 
1Kings2:32 Musengwa Katonda aidha kumubonereza ng'amulanga ebikolwa bye eby'ekitemo, kuba yaita abasaadha babiri nga lata wange Daudi taidhi. Abasaadha abo baali batuufu era nga bali n'ebisaanizo okumusinga, era nga ni bano: Abuneri mutabane wa Neri era omuduumizi w'eigye lya Isiraeli, ni Amasa mutabane wa Yetheri era omuduumizi w'eigye lya Buyudaaya." 
1Kings2:33 Yoabu n'eizaire lye baidha kubonerezebwanga enaku dhoonadhoona, nga babalanga olw'okwita abantu abo. Aye Daudi n'eizaire lye era n'abasika be ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, Musengwa Katonda aidha kubaghanga emiraala enaku dhoonadhoona.”" 
1Kings2:34 Kale Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada yaaja yaita Yoabu, baamuziika ewuwe mu irungu." 
1Kings2:35 Agho kyabazinga yaataagho Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada okuba omuduumizi ow'eigye mu kifo kya Yoabu. Era kyabazinga yaataagho Zadoki kabona mu kifo kya Abiathari. 
1Kings2:36 Agho kyabazinga yaayetesa Shimei, yaamukoba ati: “Weezimbire endhu mu Yerusalemu, obenga omwo. Era otagezangaku kuva mu kibuga omwo, n'oja ghantu ghandi naire." 
1Kings2:37 Kimanhe bumanhe nti k'olivaayo n'osomoka akaiga Kiduroni, oliitibwa bwitibwe. Era oliba nga niiwe mwene weereeteire okufa.”" 
1Kings2:38 Shimei yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ky'okobye kirungi. Era nga bw'okobye, zeena omugheereza wo bwe ndidha okukola.” Kale Shimei yaaba mu Yerusalemu ekiseera kinene." 
1Kings2:39 Aye nga ghabiseegho emyaka esatu, babiri ku bairu ba Shimei baalumuka, baaja eri Akishi mutabane wa Maaka, kyabazinga w'e Gathi. Abantu baakobera Shimei bati: “Bona eno, abairu bo bali mu Gathi.”" 
1Kings2:40 Shimei yaasituka, yaatyama ku ndogoyi ye, yaaja e Gathi ewa Akishi okunoonia abairu be. Bwe yatuukayo, yaabatoolayo." 
1Kings2:41 Abantu baakobera Solomoni bati Shimei yava e Yerusalemu yaaja e Gathi, era yaira." 
1Kings2:42 Kyabazinga yaayetesa Shimei, yaamukoba ati: “Tyakulayiza mu Musengwa Katonda, ni nkukaninkiriza nga nkoba nti k'oliva e Yerusalemu n'oja aghantu aghandi woonawoona, kimanhe bumanhe nti oliitibwa bwitibwe? Era tiwandhiramu oti, ‘Ky'okobye kirungi. Ndidha kukigondera?’" 
1Kings2:43 Kale, lwaki totuukiriiza kye walayira mu Musengwa Katonda, era lwaki omenhie ekiragiro kye nakulagira?”" 
1Kings2:44 Kyabazinga era yaakoba Shimei ati: “Oidhi bukalamu mu mwoyo gwo ebibi byonabyona bye wakola lata wange Daudi. Kale Musengwa Katonda ky'anaava n'akubonereza. 
1Kings2:45 Aye nze Solomoni, Musengwa Katonda aidha kumpa enkabi era aidha kuleetera obwakyabazinga bwa Daudi okukakata enaku dhoonadhoona.”" 
1Kings2:46 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaalagira Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada, yaaja yaita Shimei. Agho obwakyabazinga bwakakata mu mikono gya Solomoni." 
1Kings3:1 Agho Solomoni yaaleetagho enkolagana ni kyabazinga w'e Misiri, ng'abayiza mughala wa kyabazinga oyo. Era Solomoni yaaleeta omughala oyo mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi, okutuusa lwe yamala okwezimbira endhu n'ekisaagaati kyaku ekikye, n'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, n'ekimante okwezungulula ekibuga Yerusalemu." 
1Kings3:2 Okutuusa mu kiseera ekyo, abantu baali nga bakaagheerayo emisengo mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, kuba ghaali nga ghakaali kuzimbwagho ndhu ya kusinzizangamu Musengwa Katonda." 
1Kings3:3 Solomoni yagonzanga Musengwa Katonda ng'ajiira ku ebyo lata we Daudi bye yamusikirira. Aye era Solomoni oyo, yeena yagheerangayo emisengo era yaaniokezanga obubbaani mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu." 
1Kings3:4 Agho Solomoni yaaja e Gibeoni okugheerayo eyo emisengo, kuba ekyo n'ekyali ekifo ekigulumivu eky'oku kasozi ekyali ekikulu. Solomoni yagheerangayo ku alutaari y'omu kifo ekyo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa bikumi na bikumi." 
1Kings3:5 Bwe yali ng'ali eyo e Gibeoni, Musengwa Katonda yaamubonekera obwire mu kirooto, yaamukoba ati: “Saba ky'oyenda, nkughe.”" 
1Kings3:6 Solomoni yaakoba ati: “Buliidho obairenga ng'oyoleka nga bw'ogonza einho lata wange Daudi omugheereza wo obutalekera; kuba yali mwesigwa, omutuufu era omwesimbu mu kukolagana n'iwe. Era omukuumiire okugonza kwo okwo okutakoma, waamugha omwana omulenzi afuga mpegaano mu kifo kye." 
1Kings3:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, iwe buti onfiire nze omugheereza wo, mbe kyabazinga mu kifo kya lata wange Daudi, waire nga ndi mwana muto. Nzira kye ndidhi naire." 
1Kings3:8 Ate nze omugheereza wo ndi mu bantu be walondamu, eighanga eikologho, olukunkumuli olw'abantu abatasoboka kubalika." 
1Kings3:9 Kale ni mpa nze omugheereza wo amagezi, nsobole okufuganga abantu bo, n'okwawulangagho ekirungi n'ekibi kuba naani aghanga okufuga eighanga lyo lino eikologho liti, aghazira ekyo?”" 
1Kings3:10 Musengwa Katonda yaasangaala okubona nga Solomoni ekyo ky'asabye. 
1Kings3:11 Agho yaamukoba ati: “Nga bw'osabye ekyo, n'oteesabira kughangaala, oba obukombe, oba okufa kw'abazigu bo, aye ni weesabira amagezi okwawulangagho ekituufu," 
1Kings3:12 kale ky'osabye nkikughaire. Era bona eno, nkughaire amagezi n'okutegeera, ebisinga omuntu owundi yeenayeena ku abo abaakusookayo bye yaali afunie, era ebisinga omuntu owundi yeenayeena ku abo abalikwiririra, by'alifuna." 
1Kings3:13 Era nkughaire n'ebindi by'otasabye: obukombe n'ekitiibwa mu bulamu bwo bwonabwona, ghabule kyabazinga owundi yeenayeena ayagayaga n'iwe." 
1Kings3:14 Era bw'onaabanga omuwulize ye ndi, n'ogemanga amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange byonabyona, nga lata wo Daudi bwe yakolanga, ndikugha obughanguzi.”" 
1Kings3:15 Agho Solomoni yaasitukagho. Okuja okwetegereza ati nga kibaire kirooto. Yaaja e Yerusalemu, yaayemerera mu maiso g'Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda, yaaghaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Era yaakolera abagheereza be boonaboona embaga." 
1Kings3:16 Lwali lulala abakazi bamalaaya babiri baidha eri kyabazinga Solomoni, baayemerera mu maiso ge." 
1Kings3:17 Malaaya owundi yaakoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, nze n'omukazi ono tusula mu ndhu ndala. Nazaala omwana nga tuli mu ndhu ndala n'omukazi ono." 
1Kings3:18 Ku lunaku olwokusatu nga mmaze okuzaala, omukazi ono yeena yaazaala. Era twali twenka nga ghazira muntu wundi, okutoolaku ife twenka ababiri mu ndhu." 
1Kings3:19 Agho omwana w'omukazi ono yaafa obwire, kuba omukazi ono yamulambaalaku." 
1Kings3:20 Omukazi ono yaasituka mu bwire ghagati, yaatoola omwana wange mu buliri bwange nga nze ndi mu ndoolo, yaamuta mu kifuba kye, ate yaata omwana we afiire mu kifuba kyange." 
1Kings3:21 Bwe nasitukagho enkyo okwonsa omwana wange, naja okubona ng'afiire. Aye bwe namwekalirisa obukalamu, naja okubona nga ti n'omwana wange ye nazaala.”" 
1Kings3:22 Aye omukazi ole owundi yaakoba ati: “Busa, omwana omulamu n'owange, omufu n'owuwo.” N'ono eyasooka yaakoba ati: “Busa, omufu n'owuwo, omulamu n'owange.” Baakaayana batyo mu maiso ga kyabazinga." 
1Kings3:23 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaakoba ati: “Owundi ali kukoba ati, ‘Omwana omulamu n'owange, omufu n'owuwo.’ Ate owundi yaakoba ati, ‘Busa, omwana omufu n'owuwo, omulamu n'owange.’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Agho kyabazinga yaakoba ati: “Mundeetere empiima!” Bwe baagireeta," 
1Kings3:25 yaakoba ati: “Musalemu omwana omulamu ghabiri, ekitundu mukighe owundi, n'ekitundu mukighe owundi.”" 
1Kings3:26 Agho inhina w'omwana omulamu, omwoyo gwamulumira omwana we, yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, omwana mutamwita. Mumumughe nga mulamu.” Aye omukazi ole owundi yaakoba ati: “Taidha kuba wange oba wuwo mumutugabaniemu.”" 
1Kings3:27 Agho kyabazinga yaakoba ati: “Mutaita mwana, mumughe omukazi asoose, oyo ni inhina w'omwana mwenemwene.”" 
1Kings3:28 Abaisiraeli boonaboona bwe baawulira kyabazinga Solomoni bw'asaze omusango ogwo, baamwewuunhia inho, kuba baabona ng'amagezi ga Katonda gamulimu, asobole okusalanga mu butuufu." 
1Kings4:1 Kyabazinga Solomoni yali kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yoonayoona," 
1Kings4:2 era bano n'abakungu ab'oku ntwiko: Azaria mutabane wa Zadoki, n'eyali kabona." 
1Kings4:3 Elihorefu ni Ahiya nga bombi batabane ba Shisha, n'abaali abaghandiisi. Yehoshafati mutabane wa Ahiludi, n'eyali omukuumi w'ebighandiiko." 
1Kings4:4 Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada, n'eyali omuduumizi w'eigye. Zadoki ni Abiathari baali bakabona." 
1Kings4:5 Azaria mutabane wa Nathani n'eyali akulira abakungu. Zabudi mutabane wa Nathani, yali kabona era nga mukagwa wa kyabazinga." 
1Kings4:6 Ahishari n'eyali alabirira ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Adoniramu mutabane wa Abuda, n'eyali akozesa abo abaakolanga emirimo egy'olukako." 
1Kings4:7 Solomoni yali n'abakungu ikumi na babiri mu Isiraeli mwonamwona, abaaleeteranga kyabazinga n'ab'omu ndhu ye eby'okulya. Buli muntu ku abo ng'ali n'okuleeta eby'okulya bya mwezi mulala buli mwaka." 
1Kings4:8 Gano n'amaina gaibwe: Benihuri nga n'alabirira ekiketezo eky'oku nsozi ekya Efuraimu; 
1Kings4:9 Benidekeri yaalabirira ebibuga Makazi, Shaalabimu, Bethishemeshi, Eloni ni Bethi Hanani;" 
1Kings4:10 Benihesedi yaalabirira ebibuga Arubbothi, era ng'oyo ni mwene kibuga Soko ghalala n'ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'e Heferi;" 
1Kings4:11 Benabinadabu yaalabirira ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'e Nafathidori, era ng'oyo n'eyabayiza Tafathi mughala wa Solomoni;" 
1Kings4:12 Baana mutabane wa Ahiludi yaalabirira ebibuga Taanaki ni Megiddo, ghalala n'ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'e Bethi Sheani ekiriiraine ekibuga Zarethani, eifo gh'ekibuga Yezireeli. Baana oyo era yaalabirira n'ekiketezo ekiva e Bethi Sheani okutuuka ku kibuga Abeli Mehola, n'okutuukira irala ku luuyi lule olw'ekibuga Yokimeamu." 
1Kings4:13 Benigeberi yaalabirira ekibuga Ramothi eky'omu Gileadi, n'ebyalo bya Yairi mutabane wa Manasse ebiri mu Gileadi, n'ekiketezo ky'e Arugobu mu Bashani; woonawoona ng'ebyo n'ebibuga ebikologho enkaaga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu era ebiri n'eminhololo egisiba endhigi dhaabyo egyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo." 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabu mutabane wa Iddo, yaalabirira ebiketezo by'e Mahanaimu;" 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaazi yaalabirira ekiketezo kya Nafutali, era ng'oyo n'eyabayiza Basemathi owundi ku baghala ba Solomoni;" 
1Kings4:16 Baana mutabane wa Hushai yaalabirira ekiketezo kya Asheri n'ekibuga Bealothi; 
1Kings4:17 Yehoshafati mutabane wa Parua yaalabirira ekiketezo kya Issakari; 
1Kings4:18 Shimei mutabane wa Ela yaalabirira ekiketezo kya Benjamini; 
1Kings4:19 Geberi mutabane wa Uri yaalabirira Gileadi ekyali ekiketezo kya kyabazinga Sihoni ow'Abamori ni kyabazinga Ogi ow'e Bashani. Era ghaabaagho omukulembeze mulala, eyalabiriranga Buyudaaya yoonayoona." 
1Kings4:20 Abantu mu Buyudaaya ni mu Isiraeli baali kamaala inho ng'oti musenho oguba ku mbali kw'enhandha, era baalyanga n'okunhwa baanhwanga, nga basangaavu." 
1Kings4:21 Solomoni yafuga obwakyabazinga obwali mu kiketezo ekiva ku mwiga Eufurate okutuuka ku nsi y'Abafilisiti, n'okutuuka ku nsalosalo ni Misiri. Abantu b'omu biketezo ebyo baamughanga empooza era baamugheerezanga ekiseera kyonakyona kye yamala nga mulamu." 
1Kings4:22 Eby'okulya Solomoni bye yeetaaganga buli lunaku, byabanga kilo enkumi itaanu (5,000) edh'obuwunga obw'engaano obuseereibwa obukalamu, ni kilo omutwalo mulala (10,000) edh'obuwunga obundi," 
1Kings4:23 n'ente ikumi ensavu, n'ente amakumi abiri dhe baaya obwaye, n'entaama kikumi, nga tobaliireeku mpongo, na mpuuli, na nkoko mpiite ensavu." 
1Kings4:24 Solomoni yafuganga ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'e bugwandhuba bw'omwiga Eufurate, okuva ku Tifusha okutuuka e Gaza, ng'afuga bakyabazinga baamu boonaboona. Era yali mu miraala n'ebiketezo byonabyona ebyali bimwezungulwire." 
1Kings4:25 Ekiseera kyonakyona kye yamala nga mulamu, abantu boonaboona mu Buyudaaya ni mu Isiraeli, baali mu miraala okuva e Dani okutuuka e Beerisheba. Buli maka gaabanga n'eisamba lyago ery'emizabbibu n'ery'emiti emitiini." 
1Kings4:26 Solomoni yali n'embalaasi emitwalo ena (40,000) edhaaghaluzanga ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, nga buli ndala eri n'akasenge kaayo. Era yali n'abavuzi b'embalaasi omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000)." 
1Kings4:27 Abakungu bale eikumi n'ababiri, baalinga n'okuleetera kyabazinga Solomoni eby'okulya bye yeetaaganga, era n'okuleetera n'abo abaalyanga ewa kyabazinga oyo bye beetaaganga. Buli mukungu yaleetanga mu mwezi ogugwe, era nga tibaganha ni ghabaagho bwetaavu bwa kintu kyonakyona." 
1Kings4:28 Baaleetanga ni sayiri yeena, n'eisubi ery'embalaasi, n'ery'ensolo enumusi dh'embiro, nga babireeta woonawoona ghe byabanga nga byetaagibwa, buli muntu nga bwe yabanga ng'alagiirwa." 
1Kings4:29 Katonda yaagha Solomoni amagezi n'okutegeera mu nsambo eswikiriire, era n'obwongo obungi ng'oti musenho gwa ku mbali kwa nhandha." 
1Kings4:30 Amagezi ga Solomoni nga gasinga amagezi ag'abantu b'e buvandhuba n'ag'abagezi ab'e Misiri goonagoona. 
1Kings4:31 Solomoni n'eyali asinga abantu boonaboona amagezi. Yasinga Ethani Omuezera, yaasinga ni Hemani, ni Kalukoli, ni Darida, abo nga batabane ba Maholi. Era yaamanhikana mu maghanga goonagoona ageezungulwire agho." 
1Kings4:32 Yayiiya ensambo enkumi isatu (3,000), n'enhembo edhiswika mu lukumi (1,000)." 
1Kings4:33 Yayogera ku miti, okuva ku muvule ogw'omu Lebanoni, okutuuka ku kati akeetebwa hissopu, akamera ku bimante. Yaayogera ni ku nsolo, ni ku nhonhi, ni ku byeghaluliza ku itaka, ni ku byenhandha." 
1Kings4:34 Abantu baava mu maghanga goonagoona okwidha okuwulira ku magezi ga Solomoni. Era bakyabazinga ab'ensi dhoonadhoona abaawulira ku magezi ge, baatuma abantu okwidha okugawulirisa." 
1Kings5:1 Agho kyabazinga Hiramu ow'e Tiro yaawulira nga Solomoni asiigiibwa omuzigo, okusikira lata we ku bwakyabazinga. Kale yaasindika abagheereza be ye Solomoni, kuba Hiramu oyo yali mukagwa wa Daudi okuva eira." 
1Kings5:2 Solomoni yaasindika obukwenda ye Hiramu ng'akoba ati: 
1Kings5:3 “Oidhi nga lata wange, olw'entalo dhe yali n'okulwana n'ensi dh'abazigu edhaali dhimwezungulwire ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, tiyaghanga kuzimbira Musengwa Katonda we isinzizo, okutuusa Musengwa Katonda oyo bwe yamusobozesa okughangula abazigu be boonaboona." 
1Kings5:4 Aye mpegaano Musengwa Katonda wange ampaire emiraala. Ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, ezira muzigu waire akabi koonakoona." 
1Kings5:5 Kale kye nviire ni nsalagho okuzimbira Musengwa Katonda wange eisinzizo, nga Musengwa Katonda oyo bwe yakoba lata wange Daudi ati, ‘Mutabane wo, ye ndita ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga okukusikira, n'alinzimbira eisinzizo.’" 
1Kings5:6 Kale, mpegaano lagira bantemere emivule e Lebanoni. Abagheereza bange baidha kukolera ghalala n'ababo. Era ndidha kukusasula empeera y'onaayenda olw'abagheereza bo abo. Nga bw'oidhi obukalamu, eno ewaife ezira baidhi kutema miti ng'oti n'Abasidoni bwe batema.”" 
1Kings5:7 Hiramu bwe yafuna obukwenda bwa Solomoni, yaasagamba inho, era yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda olwaleero asaakibwe, eyagha Daudi omwana ow'amagezi okufuga eighanga lino eikologho.”" 
1Kings5:8 Agho Hiramu yaagheereza Solomoni obukwenda ati: “Nfunie obukwenda bwo. Era ebigema ku miti emivule n'emisipuressi, ndi mwetegefu okubikola byonabyona nga bw'oyenda." 
1Kings5:9 Abagheereza bange baidha kugitoola e Lebanoni, bagiserengese ku nhandha. Ndidha kubalagira bagisibe ghalala mu binhwa, bagibise ku nhandha gituuke mu kifo ky'onaalondagho. Era ndidha kubalagira bagisimululire eyo, memale ogitooleyo. Iwe kye nhenda okole, n'okufunira ab'endhu yange emere.”" 
1Kings5:10 Kale Hiramu yaagha Solomoni emiti gyonagyona, emivule n'emisipuressi gye yayenda." 
1Kings5:11 Era buli mwaka Solomoni yeena yaaghanga Hiramu kilo dh'engaano edhigheza obukaire bubiri n'emitwalo amakumi ana (2,400,000), n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva omukenenule, ogugheza lita enkumi eina (4,000). Ebyo byonabyona nga byakuliisa ab'endhu ya Hiramu." 
1Kings5:12 Musengwa Katonda yaagha Solomoni amagezi nga bwe yasuubiza. Ghaabaagho emiraala ghagati gha Hiramu ni Solomoni, era baakola endagaano ghagati waibwe bombi." 
1Kings5:13 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaalagira baasoloza mu Isiraeli yoonayoona abasaadha emitwalo esatu (30,000) ab'okukolanga emirimo egy'olukako." 
1Kings5:14 Yaasindikanga e Lebanoni abasaadha omutwalo mulala mulala (10,000) buli mwezi, mu ngobo. Baamalanga omwezi mulala e Lebanoni, ate bairanga baamalanga emyezi ebiri ewaibwe eka. Adoniramu n'eyateebwagho okukuliranga abo abaasolozebwa." 
1Kings5:15 Solomoni era yali n'abasaadha emitwalo musanvu (70,000) abeetwisi, n'abandi emitwalo munaana (80,000) abaabaadhanga amabaale mu kiketezo eky'oku nsozi," 
1Kings5:16 nga tobaliireeku abasaadha enkumi eisatu n'ebisatu (3,300) abaakozesanga abantu emirimo." 
1Kings5:17 Kyabazinga yaalagira, baasima amabaale amakologho ag'omughendo, ag'okuzimbisa omusingi gw'eisinzizo." 
1Kings5:18 Kale abazimbi aba Solomoni, n'aba Hiramu, n'abasaadha abaava e Gebali, baabaadha amabaale era baatema emiti, baabitegeka okuzimbisa eisinzizo." 
1Kings6:1 Mu mwaka ogwebikumi ebina n'ekinaana (480) ng'Abaisiraeli bamaze okuva mu nsi Misiri, mu mwaka ogwokuna okuva Solomoni lwe yatoolera okufuga Isiraeli, mu mwezi ogwetebwa Zivu, ogwo nga n'omwezi ogwokubiri mu mwaka, Solomoni oyo yainhama okuzimba eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Kings6:2 Eisinzizo kyabazinga Solomoni oyo lye yazimbira Musengwa Katonda lyali mita amakumi abiri na musanvu mu buleeyi, mita mwenda mu bugazi, era lyaba mita ikumi na isatu na kitundu mu bugungumavu." 
1Kings6:3 Baalizimbaku ekisasi emberi waalyo nga kya bugazi bwa mita ina n'ekitundu, ate nga mu buleeyi kya mita mwenda, okwagayaga n'obuleeyi bw'eisinzizo eryo." 
1Kings6:4 Eisinzizo eryo yalitaaku amadinisa ag'emyango egyaja nga gifundaghala okwira kuliya. 
1Kings6:5 Yaalizimbaku ekizimbe kya kalina isatu ekyakookerwaku okwezungulula ebimante eby'okuliya kwalyo, mu mbali n'einhuma." 
1Kings6:6 Buli kisenge mu kalina eya ghansi, kyali mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri mu bugazi. Mu kalina eyokubiri, buli kisenge kyali mita ibiri n'obutundu musanvu mu bugazi. Ate mu kalina eyokusatu, buli kisenge kyali mita isatu n'akatundu kalala mu bugazi. Ekimante ky'eisinzizo ku buli kalina gh'etandiikira kyajanga nga kitonigha mu bunene bwakyo, okusinga ku kalina eri ghansi, olwo ebisenge ebyo byasobola okwesigama ku kimante ekyo, aye nga emiti gyabyo tibagizimbiire ku kyo." 
1Kings6:7 Eisinzizo bwe baali balizimba, amabaale ge baazimbisa baagabaadhiranga mu kifo ghe bagasima. Olwo kyaba nti tighaali nhundo, waire empasa, oba ekintu ekindi kyonakyona eky'ekyuma ekigumu einho ekyawulirwa mu isinzizo nga balizimba." 
1Kings6:8 Omulyango ogwingira mu kisenge ekya kalina ekya ghansi, gwali ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'eisinzizo. Era nga ghaligho amadaala ge baniiniraku okuja mu kisenge eky'omu kalina eyokubiri n'eky'omu yokusatu." 
1Kings6:9 Mu nsambo eyo, kyabazinga Solomoni yaazimba eisinzizo era yaalimaliriza. Yaalitaamu olubani olw'emyango n'embaawo, nga bya muvule." 
1Kings6:10 Yaazimba ekizimbe kya kalina ekyo okwezungulula eisinzizo eryo, nga buli kalina egheza mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri mu buleeyi okuja ghaigulu. Era nga kalina edho dhiyungiibwa ku isinzizo n'embaawo edh'omuvule." 
1Kings6:11 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Solomoni ati: 
1Kings6:12 “Kino kigema ku isinzizo lino ly'oli kuzimba: bw'onaajiiranga ku mateeka gange, n'ogonderanga ebiragiro byange, era n'ogemanga ebyo bye nkoba, ndituukiriza kye nasuubiza lata wo Daudi okumukolera." 
1Kings6:13 Ndidha kubanga ghalala n'abantu bange Abaisiraeli era tiibalekulirenga agho.” 
1Kings6:14 Kale Solomoni yaazimba eisinzizo, yaalimaliriza." 
1Kings6:15 Munda mu isinzizo ku bimante kwonakwona, okuva ghansi okutuuka ku lubani, yaghembaku embaawo edh'emivule. Ate ghansi woonawoona yaayaliiragho embaawo edh'emiti emisipuressi." 
1Kings6:16 Einhuma munda mu isinzizo, yaazimbayo ekisenge eky'embaawo edh'emivule nga dhiva ghansi dhaatuuka ku lubani. Mu nsambo eyo yaayawula ku isinzizo ekifo kya mita mwenda, ekyo nga n'Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho." 
1Kings6:17 Ekitundu eky'eisinzizo eryo ekyali emberi y'Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho, kyali kigheza mita ikumi na munaana obuleeyi." 
1Kings6:18 Embaawo dhe baaghemba ku bimante by'eisinzizo, dhaali nga dhitoneibwaku ebifaananie by'amabuga, n'ebimuli ebyandhulwiza. Munda mwonamwona, ebimante baabighembaku embaawo edh'emivule, ng'amabaale ge baazimbisa tigaboneka." 
1Kings6:19 Munda mu isinzizo omwo, yaategekamu aghantu agheetebwa Ekifo Ekitukuvu, okutangamu Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Kings6:20 Ekifo ekyo Ekitukuvu kyali mita mwenda mu buleeyi, mita mwenda mu bugazi, n'emita mwenda mu bugungumavu, era yaalimbya zaabu omukenenule munda mwakyo mwonamwona. Era yaakola alutaari mu mbaawo edh'emivule." 
1Kings6:21 Yaalimbya zaabu omukenenule munda mw'eisinzizo mwonamwona. Yaata endhegere edha zaabu aghaingirirwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, nga dhoona adhirimbiizaaku zaabu." 
1Kings6:22 Eisinzizo lyonalyona yaalirimbyaku zaabu okulibunia. Ni alutaari ey'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu yoona yaagirimbyaku zaabu. 
1Kings6:23 Mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho yaakolerayo ebifaananie eby'ebitonde bibiri ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi. Yaabikola mu miti emyoliva, nga buli kifaananie kigheza mita ina n'obutundu buna mu bugungumavu." 
1Kings6:24 Eighagha eirala erya kerubi lyali ligheza mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri mu buleeyi. Okuva ku ghasembayo ku ighagha eirala, okutuuka ku ghasembayo ku lindi, nga ghaligho obuleeyi bwa mita ina n'obutundu buna." 
1Kings6:25 Ni kikerubi kire ekindi kyali kigheza mita ina n'obutundu buna mu bugungumavu. Bikerubi ebyo byombi byali byagayaga era nga bifaanana. 
1Kings6:26 Kikerubi ekindi kyali kigheza mita ina n'obutundu buna mu bugungumavu, era nga ni kiinaakyo kityo bwe kyaga." 
1Kings6:27 Bikerubi ebyo yaabita ghagati mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho. Amaghagha gaabyo gaakolebwa nga mandhuluze, ng'eighagha ery'ekindi lituuka ku kimante eky'oluuyi olundi, n'ery'ekindi lyatuuka ku kimante eky'oluuyi olundi. Ate amaghagha gaabyo agandi nga gagemaganira ghagati gh'Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho." 
1Kings6:28 Era bikerubi ebyo byombi yaabirimbyaku zaabu yaabibunia. 
1Kings6:29 Yaadholiga ku bimante eby'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho n'eby'omu isinzizo lyonalyona, ng'atonaku ebifaananie ebya bikerubi, n'eby'emiti eminaazi, n'eby'ebimuli ebyandhulwiza." 
1Kings6:30 Ghansi mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho ni mu isinzizo lyonalyona, yaalimbyagho zaabu woonawoona." 
1Kings6:31 Mu mulyango ogwingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, yaaghangamu olwigi olw'omuti omwoliva nga lulimu ebitundu bibiri ebiigulwa ku luuyi ni ku luuyi. Emyango gyalwo, egy'omu mbali gyombi, ogwa ghansi n'ogwa ghaigulu ogwalimu ensonda esonse ghaigulu, nga woonawoona gikola ensonda itaanu." 
1Kings6:32 Ebitundu by'olwigi olwo byombi yaabidholiga, ng'atonaku ebifaananie ebya bikerubi, n'eby'emiti eminaazi, n'eby'ebimuli ebyandhulwiza. Ebitundu eby'olwigi ebyo byombi, n'ebifaananie bya bikerubi, n'eby'emiti eminaazi, n'eby'ebimuli ebyandhulwiza, yaabirimbyaku zaabu." 
1Kings6:33 Era yaakola emyango egy'omulyango ogwingira mu isinzizo, nga gyonagyona gyagayaga mu buleeyi." 
1Kings6:34 Mu mulyango ogwo yaakoleramu endhigi ibiri edh'omuti omusipuressi, nga buli lulala lulimu pata ghagati, nga lughanga okwigukaku ekitundu." 
1Kings6:35 Yaadhitonaku ebifaananie ebya bikerubi, n'eby'emiti eminaazi, n'eby'ebimuli ebyandhulwiza. Era yaadhirimbyaku zaabu bukalamu ghalala n'ebifaananie ebyo bye yadhitonaku." 
1Kings6:36 Yaazimba oluya olw'omunda nga lwa myaliiro esatu egy'amabaale, n'omwaliiro mulala ogw'emiti emivule." 
1Kings6:37 Omusingi gw'eisinzizo eryo gwazimbibwa mu mwezi ogwokubiri ogwetebwa Zivu, mu mwaka ogwokuna ogw'obufuzi bwa Solomoni." 
1Kings6:38 Mu mwezi ogwomunaana ogwetebwa Buli, mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omulala ogw'obufuzi bwa Solomoni, eisinzizo eryo lyonalyona lyawa okuzimbibwa, ng'entegeka yaalyo bweyali. Solomoni lyamutwalira emyaka musanvu okulizimba." 
1Kings7:1 Solomoni yeezimbira ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga, kyamutwalira emyaka ikumi n'esatu okukimaliriza." 
1Kings7:2 Yazimba endhu eyayetebwanga Ekibira kya Lebanoni, ng'egheza mita amakumi ana na ina (44) mu buleeyi, mita amakumi abiri na ibiri (22) mu bugazi, n'emita ikumi na isatu n'ekitundu (13.5) mu bugungumavu. Yagizimbira ku nhiriri isatu edh'empango edh'omuvule, kwe baata emiti emikiika gyona nga gya muvule." 
1Kings7:3 Yaazimba ebisenge byayo ku mpango amakumi ana na itaanu (45), nga ku buli lunhiriri kuliku empango ikumi na itaanu (15). Yaataamu olubani olw'embaawo edh'omuti omuvule." 
1Kings7:4 Mu bisenge byayo mwalimu enhiriri isatu edh'amadinisa, nga galinzagainia." 
1Kings7:5 Emiryango gyayo n'emyango, gyali nga gyonagyona gyagayaga. N'amadinisa goona gaali n'emyango egyagayaga era nga gali mu nhiriri isatu, nga buli dinisa eringiriire yiinaayo ey'oku luuyi olundi." 
1Kings7:6 Era yaazimba endhu eyetebwa Endhu ey'Empango, ng'egheza mita amakumi abiri na ibiri (22) mu buleeyi, n'emita ikumi na isatu n'ekitundu (13.5) mu bugazi. Emberi waayo yaayemerezaayo empango, era yaadhizimbiraku ekisasi." 
1Kings7:7 Yaazimba endhu eyetebwa Endhu ey'Ekityamo eky'Obwakyabazinga era eyatuumibwa eriina Endhu ey'Okulamuliramu. Omwo mwe yasaliranga emisango. Ku bimante eby'omu ndhu eyo kwonakwona, okuva ghansi okutuuka ghaigulu, yaaghembaku embaawo edh'omuvule." 
1Kings7:8 Endhu Solomoni mwene mwe yasulanga, yali mu luya lundi olwali emandhu w'Endhu eyo ey'Okulamuliramu. Enzimba yaayo yali n'endala n'ey'ebizimbe ebindi. Solomoni yaazimbira ni mukazi we, mughala wa kyabazinga w'e Misiri, endhu efaanana ng'oti n'eyo." 
1Kings7:9 Endhu edho dhoonadhoona, ng'otwaliiremu n'oluya lwonalwona okuva ku isinzizo okutuuka ku luya olukologho, dhaazimbibwa mu mabaale ag'omughendo, okuva ku musingi okutuukira irala ghaigulu ebimante ghe bikoma. Amabaale ago baagasala n'emisumeeni nga bajiira ku bipimo, era baagaseena bukalamu munda ni ku ngulu." 
1Kings7:10 Omusingi gwona baaguzimba n'amabaale ag'omughendo amanene, ng'agandi gagheza mita ina mu buleeyi ate agandi gaagheza mita isatu n'ekitundu." 
1Kings7:11 Ku ngulu kw'amabaale ago, kwaliku amabaale agandi ag'omughendo ge baabaadha nga bajiira ku bipimo, era kwabaaku n'embaawo edh'emivule." 
1Kings7:12 Oluya olunene lwali lwezungulwirwa ekimante kye baazimba mu myaliiro esatu egy'amabaale amabaadhe, era nga lwezungulwirwa n'omwaliiro mulala ogw'embaawo edh'omuvule. N'oluya olw'omunda olw'eisinzizo, n'ekisasi ekyazimbibwa emberi w'eisinzizo eryo, byona bityo bwe baabizimba." 
1Kings7:13 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaatuma bamuleetere Hiramu okuva e Tiro. 
1Kings7:14 Hiramu oyo yali musaadha mugezi, ng'ali n'obumanhi mu kutetenkania n'okukola emirimo gyonagyona egy'okugheesa ebintu mu kyuma eky'ekikomo. Yali mutabane wa namwandu ow'omu kika kya Nafutali. Ise yali mutyamye ow'e Tiro, era nga mugheesi wa bintu eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo. Hiramu oyo, yaidha eri kyabazinga Solomoni, yaamukolera emirimo gye gyonagyona." 
1Kings7:15 Hiramu yaagheesa empango ibiri mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, nga buli ndala egheza mita munaana mu buleeyi, era yaagheza emita itaanu n'obutundu busatu mu kugyezunguluza. Yalimu empongolo munda, era ng'obunene obw'omubiri gwayo bwaga ngalo ina." 
1Kings7:16 Era yaakola emitwe ebiri mu kyuma eky'ekikomo ekisaanuusiibwa, egy'okuta ku ntwiko edh'empango edho eibiri, nga buli mutwe gugheza mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri mu buleeyi." 
1Kings7:17 Buli mutwe ogwali ku buli mpango, yaagwezunguluza ebifaananie eby'ebimuli, era yaakolaku n'ebifaananie eby'endhegere edhirukiibwa ng'oti katimba," 
1Kings7:18 era yaakolaku n'enhiriri ibiri edh'ebifaananie by'emikomamawanga okwezungulula akatimba ako. 
1Kings7:19 Emitwe egyali ku ntwiko dh'empango edh'omu kisasi gyali gifaanana ng'oti n'ebimuli ebyetebwa liri, era nga gigheza mita ndala n'obutundu munaana mu bugungumavu." 
1Kings7:20 Emitwe egyo gyali nga giteereibwa mu kitundu ekyezunguluvu ku mpango dhombi ghaigulu w'ekifaananie eky'endhegere edhirukiibwa ng'oti katimba. Ku buli mutwe kwaliku ebifaananie by'emikomamawanga ebikumi bibiri, nga biri mu nhiriri ibiri." 
1Kings7:21 Hiramu yaasimba empango edho dhombi gha kisasi ky'eisinzizo. Yaasimba ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, yaagituuma eriina Yakini. Era yaasimba n'ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, yaagituuma eriina Boazi." 
1Kings7:22 Ku ntwiko edh'empango edho baakoleraku ebifaananie eby'ebimuli ebyetebwa liri. Agho omulimo ogw'okukola empango gwawa. 
1Kings7:23 Hiramu yaasaanuusa ekyuma eky'ekikomo, yaakolamu tanka ey'amaadhi eneetooloovu. Yali egheza mita ina n'obutundu buna mu bukiika, okuva ku mugo gwayo ogw'oluuyi olundi okutuuka ku gw'olundi. Era nga mu bugungumavu egheza mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri, n'emita ikumi na isatu n'obutundu bubiri okugyezunguluza." 
1Kings7:24 Ghansi gh'omugo ogw'etanka eyo okugyezunguluza, ghaaligho enhiriri ibiri edhaakolerwa aghalala nayo, nga dhiriku ebifaananie eby'amabuga, era nga dhigheza mita ikumi na isatu n'ekitundu okwezunguluza tanka eyo." 
1Kings7:25 Etanka eyo yatyamizibwa ku bifaananie by'ente enume ikumi na ibiri ebyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo. Ebifaananie ebyo byali biti: ebisatu nga biringiriire ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, n'ebisatu ebindi ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba, n'ebisatu ebindi ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, ate ebisatu ebisigairegho byalingirira ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba, nga birinzagainia emikira." 
1Kings7:26 Omubiri ogw'etanka eyo gwali gugheza milimita nsanvu na itaanu obunene. Omugo gwayo gwakolebwa ng'ogw'ekibya era ng'oti n'ekimuli ekyetebwa liri. Etanka eyo yali ejaamu lita emitwalo ng'oti mukaaga (60,000)." 
1Kings7:27 Hiramu yaakola ebituuti eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo. Nga buli kituuti kigheza mita ndala n'obutundu munaana mu buleeyi, n'emita ndala n'obutundu munaana mu bugazi, n'emita ndala n'obutundu busatu mu bugungumavu." 
1Kings7:28 Ebituuti ebyo byakolebwa mu mabaati, nga gateereibwa mu fuleemu." 
1Kings7:29 Ku mabaati ago agaali mu fuleemu kwaliku ebifaananie by'empologoma, n'ente, n'ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi. Ni ku fuleemu, ghaigulu ni ghansi gh'ebifaananie by'empologoma n'ente, ghaaligho emige gy'ebimuli egireebeeta." 
1Kings7:30 Buli kituuti kyaliku enkede ina edh'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, n'ebyuma, n'emisumaali egiba ghagati ghaadho kwe dheekulungulira, nga gyona gya kyuma kya kikomo. Ku nsonda dhaakyo eina, kwaliku ghe batengeka ebenseni. Ghe batengeka ebenseni agho baatonagho emige gy'ebimuli ku mbali ni ku mbali." 
1Kings7:31 Ku ngulu ku mutwe ogw'ekituuti kwaliku enkata ey'okutengekamu ebenseni, nga baagisitulaku sentimita amakumi ana na itaanu (45) okusingaku ekituuti, ate yaika mu kituuti munda sentimita ikumi na munaana (18), era nga neekulungirivu. Omunwa ogw'enkata gwali nga mutone gwaku. Amabaati ag'ekituuti gaali n'endhuyi ina edhaagayaga, nga ti neekulungirivu." 
1Kings7:32 Enkede eina dhaali ghansi gh'amabaati, ng'emisumaali egiba ghagati ghaadho kwe dheekulungulira gyakolerwa ghalala n'ebituuti nga tibyawukaineemu naire. Enkede edho dhaali dhigheza sentimita nkaaga na mukaaga mu bugungumavu nga dheemereire." 
1Kings7:33 Enkede edho dhaakolebwa ng'oti n'enkede dh'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo. Emisumaali egiba ghagati ghaadho kwe dheekulungulira, n'empanka dhaadho, n'empagi dhaadho, n'ebyoto byadho, byonabyona byakolebwa mu kyuma kya kikomo ekisaanuusiibwa." 
1Kings7:34 Mu buli nsonda ku dhoonadhoona eina edha buli kituuti, mwalimu emiziziko ena egy'ekintu ekitengekebwaku benseni, nga gyakolerwa ghalala n'ekituuti aghazira kwawukanaku naire." 
1Kings7:35 Entwiko ya buli kituuti baagyezuguluza ekintu ekiri ng'oti lusibiro, nga kigheza sentimita amakumi abiri na ibiri obugazi. Ebikondo eby'oku kituuti n'amabaati gaaku byakolerwa ghalala n'ekituuti nga tibyawukanamu naire." 
1Kings7:36 Ku ngulu okwa buli kituuti ni ku mabaati gaakyo, Hiramu yaatonaku ebifaananie eby'ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi, n'eby'empologoma, n'eby'emiti eminaazi, buli ghe byabanga nga bisobola okuja. Era yaatonaku emige egy'ebimuli okwezungulula woonawoona." 
1Kings7:37 Atyo bwe yakola ebituuti ebyo eikumi. Byonabyona yabikola mu nsambo ndala mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, nga bifaanana mu mboneka era nga byagayaga mu bipimo." 
1Kings7:38 Hiramu era yaakola ebenseni ikumi edh'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, ndala ndala ku buli kituuti nga bwe byali eikumi. Buli benseni yali egheza mita ndala n'obutundu munaana mu bugazi, ng'ejaamu lita nga lunaana." 
1Kings7:39 Yaata ebituuti bitaanu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'eisinzizo, n'ebindi bitaanu ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba w'eisinzizo eryo. Era yaata etanka ere mu nsonda eringiriire ghagati gh'oluuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba n'oluuyi olw'e buvandhuba olw'eisinzizo." 
1Kings7:40 Hiramu era yaakola ensugha, n'ebitiiyo, n'ebenseni. Mu nsambo eyo, yaamaliriza omulimo gwonagwona gwe yakolera kyabazinga Solomoni mu isinzizo, ogwalimu bino:" 
1Kings7:41 empango eibiri, emitwe ebiri egyakolebwa ng'oti bibya ku mpango edho eibiri, ebifaananie ebyalukibwa ng'oti katimba ni babitimba ku buli mpango," 
1Kings7:42 ebifaananie eby'emikomamawanga ebikumi ebina (400) bye baata mu nhiriri eibiri okwezungulula ebifaananie bire ebyalukibwa ng'oti katimba ebyali ku mutwe ogwa buli mpango," 
1Kings7:43 ebituuti eikumi n'ebenseni eikumi edh'oku bituuti ebyo," 
1Kings7:44 etanka n'ebifaananie by'ente enume eikumi n'eibiri tanka eyo kwe baagitengeka," 
1Kings7:45 ensugha, ebitiiyo, n'ebenseni. Ebintu ebyo byonabyona Hiramu bye yakolera kyabazinga Solomoni okukozesebwanga mu isinzizo, byali bya kyuma kya kikomo ekizigule." 
1Kings7:46 Kyabazinga yakola ebintu ebyo mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, ere mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe gwa Yorudani, aghali eitaka ery'eitosi, ghagati gh'ebibuga Sukkothi ni Zarethani." 
1Kings7:47 Ebintu ebyo byonabyona Solomoni tiyabipima buzito bwabyo, kuba byali kamaala inho. Kale obuzito obw'ekyuma eky'ekikomo kye baakozesa tibwamanhika." 
1Kings7:48 Solomoni yaakola mu zaabu omukenenule ebintu byonabyona eby'okukozesebwanga mu isinzizo, bino: alutaari ni meeza kwe bata emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda," 
1Kings7:49 ebikondo eikumi eby'entaala bye bata mu maiso ag'Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho, ng'ebitaanu biri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'ekifo ekyo ate ebitaanu byaba ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba waakyo. Solomoni oyo era yaakola ni bino: ebimuli, entaala, entooleso," 
1Kings7:50 ebikopo, makansu edhisala ebisiriiza ku ntambi, ebibya, ebintu bye bataaku obubbaani, ebintu eby'okutwaliraku amanda agaliku omuliro, pata edh'endhigi edh'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho n'edh'endhigi edh'eisinzizo edh'okuliya. Ebintu ebyo byonabyona byali bya zaabu." 
1Kings7:51 Mu nsambo eyo omulimo gwonagwona kyabazinga Solomoni gwe yakola ku isinzizo gwawa. Era Solomoni oyo yaingiza mu isinzizo eryo ebintu byonabyona lata we Daudi bye yaghaayo okubanga ebya Musengwa Katonda: feeza, ni zaabu, n'ebikozesebwa byonabyona, yaabitereka mu iterekero ery'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Kings8:1 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaayeta abakulembeze boonaboona ab'omu Isiraeli, abakulu b'ebika n'abakulu b'enda dh'abantu, okwidha y'ali e Yerusalemu, baje batoole Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi, ekyo nga ni Sioni." 
1Kings8:2 Kale abantu boonaboona beesoloza ewa kyabazinga Solomoni ku Kibinuko eky'Entindi, mu mwezi ogwomusanvu ogwetebwa Ethanimu." 
1Kings8:3 Abakulu ab'ebika ab'omu Isiraeli boonaboona bwe baidha, bakabona baabbeeda Esanduuku ey'Endagaano," 
1Kings8:4 baagitwala mu isinzizo. Era bakabona abo nga bali ghalala n'Abalevi, baatwala n'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, ghalala n'ebintu byonabyona ebitukuvu ebyali mu Weema eyo, byona baabitwala mu isinzizo." 
1Kings8:5 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaali beesoloiza gh'ali, baaba agho mu maiso g'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, era baaghaayo ente n'entaama ng'omusengo, nga tidhibalika olw'obungi." 
1Kings8:6 Kale bakabona baaleeta mu isinzizo Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda ey'Endagaano, baagita mu kifo kyayo munda mu isinzizo, mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, ghansi gh'amaghagha ag'ebitonde ebyetebwa bikerubi" 
1Kings8:7 kuba bikerubi ebyo byakolebwa nga byandhulwiza amaghagha gabyo, era nga ghansi gh'amaghagha ago n'aghali ekifo kye bataamu Sanduuku eyo n'emiti gyayo egy'okugibbeedesa." 
1Kings8:8 Emiti egyo gyali mireeyi inho, ng'omuntu ali mu isinzizo ng'ali mu maiso g'Ekifo Ekitukuvu aghanga okubona enkomerero yagyo, aye ng'ole ali kuliya taghanga kugibona. Emiti egyo gikaaliyo ni ye buli eno." 
1Kings8:9 Mu Sanduuku ey'Endagaano eyo timwalimu kintu kindi, okutoolaku ebibaadho by'amabaale ebibiri, Musa bye yagitaamu ku lusozi Sinai, Musengwa Katonda bwe yakola endagaano n'Abaisiraeli nga baviire mu nsi Misiri." 
1Kings8:10 Agho bakabona bwe baamala okuva mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, ekire kyagema woonawoona mu isinzizo," 
1Kings8:11 nga bakabona tibaghanga kwingira kukola gwa bugheereza olw'ekire ekyo, kuba ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kyabuna woonawoona mu isinzizo." 
1Kings8:12 Agho Solomoni yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe wata endhuba ghaigulu ku igulu, aye waakoba oti oidha kubanga mu nzikiiza egemye bedimudimu." 
1Kings8:13 Mpegaano nkuzimbiire eisinzizo ery'ekitiibwa, ekifo mw'onaabanga enaku dhoonadhoona.”" 
1Kings8:14 Agho kyabazinga yaakyuka, yaalingirira Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaali beesoloiza nga bali agho, yaabasabira enkabi." 
1Kings8:15 Yaabakoba ati: “Musaake Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, atuukiriiza kye yasuubiza lata wange Daudi, bwe yakoba ati," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Kasookanga ntoola abantu bange Abaisiraeli mu Misiri, tirondangaghooku mu bika bya Isiraeli byonabyona kibuga waire ekirala kiti, mwe bananzimbira eisinzizo. Aye nalonda Daudi akulembere abantu bange Abaisiraeli.’ ”" 
1Kings8:17 Solomoni yaayongera okukoba ati: “Lata wange Daudi yali n'ekidhuubo eky'okuzimbira Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli eisinzizo. 
1Kings8:18 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati, ‘Wakola bukalamu okuba n'ekidhuubo eky'okunzimbira eisinzizo." 
1Kings8:19 Aye ti niiwe oja okulizimba. Mutabane wo, iwe mwene y'olizaala, n'alinzimbira eisinzizo.’" 
1Kings8:20 “Mpegaano Musengwa Katonda atuukiriiza kye yasuubiza, kuba nze nsikiire lata wange Daudi, n'atyama ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli nga Musengwa Katonda bweyasuubiza. Era nzimbiire Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli oyo eisinzizo," 
1Kings8:21 naalitaamu ekifo ekibaamu Sanduuku y'Endagaano, endagaano eyo Musengwa Katonda ye yakola ni badhaadha baife, bwe yabatoola mu nsi Misiri.”" 
1Kings8:22 Agho Solomoni yaayemerera mu maiso g'alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda, ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona abeesoloiza baligho, yaayandhululiza emikono gye eri eigulu." 
1Kings8:23 Yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, ezirayo katonda ali ng'oti niiwe, k'ebe ghaigulu mu igulu oba ghansi ku nsi; kuba iwe okuuma endagaano y'okola n'abantu bo era waabagonza obutalekera, kasita bagumira ku iwe n'omwoyo gwaibwe gwonagwona." 
1Kings8:24 Wakuuma ekyo kye wasuubiza omugheereza wo, lata wange Daudi. Bwenebwene wakimusuubiza iwe mwene, era olwaleero okituukiriiza." 
1Kings8:25 Wo Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, mpegaano ni kuuma kye wasuubiza omugheereza wo lata wange Daudi oyo, bwe wakoba oti, ‘Mu b'eizaire lyo toobulengamu muntu ye ntaagho okutyama ku kityamo kyo eky'obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli, kasita banaawuliranga bye nkoba, ni bagumira ku nze nga iwe bwe wakola.’" 
1Kings8:26 Wo Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, nkweghembye ni, ganha ekyo kye wasuubiza omugheereza wo lata wange Daudi kituukirire." 
1Kings8:27 “Aye obwo bwenebwene iwe Katonda oghanga okuba ku nsi? Ate oba waire mu igulu lyene, erisingayo okuba ghaigulu tosugamu, memale onaasuga otya mu isinzizo lino lye nzimbye!" 
1Kings8:28 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, nkweghemba owulire okusaba kwange n'okugegenga kwange nze omugheereza wo, ompe kye nkusaba olwaleero." 
1Kings8:29 Kuumanga eisinzizo lino omusana n'obwire, kuba kino n'ekifo kye wakoba oti, ‘Omwo mwe banansinzizanga.’ Nkweghembye wulirisanga bye nnaakusabanga nze omugheereza wo, nga ningiriire eisinzizo lino." 
1Kings8:30 Wulirisanga bye nnaakusabanga nze omugheereza wo, era n'abantu bo Abaisiraeli bye banaakusabanga nga balingiriire ekifo kino. Bwenebwene tuwulirisenga ng'oli mu igulu eyo y'oba, era otusonighenga ng'otuwuliire." 
1Kings8:31 “Omuntu bw'anaakolanga mwine ekibi ni bamukoba alayire, era n'aidha gh'alutaari yo mu isinzizo lino n'alayira," 
1Kings8:32 wuliranga ng'oli eyo mu igulu era olamulenga abagheereza bo. Era bonerezanga aliku omusango nga bw'agwaniire, ate weedheerezenga aziraku musango, omusasulenga ng'ojiira ku butuufu bwe." 
1Kings8:33 “Abantu bo Abaisiraeli bwe banaaghangulwanga abazigu baibwe olw'okukola ebibi y'oli, aye ni baira y'oli okwenenia era ni bakusaba nga bakweghemba mu isinzizo lino," 
1Kings8:34 bawulirenga eyo y'oli mu igulu. Era sonighanga ebibi by'abantu bo abo Abaisiraeli, obaizenga mu nsi ye wagha badhaadha baibwe." 
1Kings8:35 “Eigulu bwe lineesibanga amaadhi ni gatagwa, olw'abantu okuba nga bakoze ebibi ni bakusungughaza, aye olumaliira ni balekayo okukola ebibi ng'omaze okubabonereza, ni bakweghemba nga balingiriire ekifo kino," 
1Kings8:36 bawulirenga eyo y'oli mu igulu. Era sonighanga ebibi by'abagheereza bo, Abaisiraeli abantu bo, obeegeresanga okukola ebituufu. Era gwisanga amaadhi ku nsi yo eno, ye wagha abantu bo okuba omugabo gwaibwe." 
1Kings8:37 “Mu nsi bwe munaagwangamu endhala, oba ni mubaamu endwaire ya kawumpuli, oba ebirime ni bifungalala ni biidhaku obukuku, oba ni byonoonebwa enzige oba ebisiisa ebindi, oba abazigu ni balumba abantu bo mu kindi ku bibuga byaibwe, oba ni ghabaagho ekibamba kyonakyona oba okulumizibwa kwonakwona," 
1Kings8:38 memale abantu bo Abaisiraeli ni bakusaba nga bakweghemba nga bayandhululiza emikono okugyolekeza eisinzizo lino, omuntu omulala ku lulwe yenka oba boonaboona aghalala, olw'enaku ebaluma ku mwoyo," 
1Kings8:39 bawulirenga eyo y'oli mu igulu, era obasonighenga. Kiisi muntu omukoleranga ku bibye nga bw'agwaniire, kuba iwe wenka, niiwe oidhi emyoyo gy'abantu." 
1Kings8:40 Olwo bakutyenga ekiseera kyonakyona kye balimala mu nsi ye wagha badhaadha baife. 
1Kings8:41 “Omusenze ataba mu bantu bo Abaisiraeli, bw'anaavanga mu nsi ey'eghala ng'awuliire nga bw'oli omukologho," 
1Kings8:42 kuba abantu baliwulira nga bw'oli omukologho era nga bw'okola eby'amaani ebitaloodheka, memale n'aidha okukusinza ng'alingiriire eisinzizo lino," 
1Kings8:43 wuliranga by'akusaba eyo y'oli mu kifo kyo mu igulu. Olwo abantu boonaboona mu nsi baghange okukumanha era n'okukutya ng'oti n'abantu bo Abaisiraeli bwe bakuwulira. Era bamanhe bati eisinzizo lino lye nzimbye, n'ekifo eky'okukusinzizangamu." 
1Kings8:44 “Abantu bo bwe banaajanga y'onaabanga ng'obatumye okulwanisa abazigu baibwe, memale ni bakusaba nga balingiriire ekibuga kino kye walonda, era nga balingiriire eisinzizo lino lye nkuzimbiire," 
1Kings8:45 wuliranga okusaba kwaibwe nga bakweghemba eyo y'oli mu igulu, era obaghenga bye bakusaba." 
1Kings8:46 “Abantu bo bwe banaakolanga ebibi y'oli, nga bwekiri nti ghazira muntu atakola kibi, memale n'obasungughalira era n'oleka abazigu baibwe ni babaghangula era ni babatwala nga banhage mu nsi ey'abazigu k'ebe ey'okumpi oba ey'eghala," 
1Kings8:47 aye ni bamala beerowooza nga bali eyo mu nsi ye baatwalibwa ng'abanhage, ni beenenia era ni bakweghemba bati, ‘Twayonoona, twadaaliima era twakola ebibi’, wuliranga okusaba kwaibwe." 
1Kings8:48 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bawulirenga bwe baneenenianga n'omwoyo gwaibwe gwonagwona nga bali eyo mu nsi y'abazigu baibwe abaabatwala nga banhage. Era obawulirenga bwe banaakusabanga nga balingiriire ensi yaibwe ye wagha badhaadha baibwe, era nga balingiriire ekibuga kye walonda, era n'eisinzizo lino lye nkuzimbiire." 
1Kings8:49 Wuliranga bye bakusaba nga bakweghemba eyo y'oli mu igulu, era obaghenga bye bakusaba." 
1Kings8:50 Sonighanga abantu bo abo olw'okukola ebibi y'oli ni bakusungughaza, era oleeterenga abo abaabatwala nga banhage okubagemerwa ekivunika," 
1Kings8:51 kuba abo n'abantu bo ababo ku bubwo, be watoola mu nsi Misiri, ye baali ng'oti n'abali mu muliro ogw'amaani ogusaanuusa ekyuma ekigumu einho." 
1Kings8:52 “Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, buliidho mpulirisanga nze omugheereza wo, era owulirisenga n'abantu bo Abaisiraeli bye bakusaba nga bakweghemba," 
1Kings8:53 kuba wabalonda mu maghanga goonagoona ag'oku nsi, okuba ababo ku bubwo, nga bwe wakoba ng'obita mu mugheereza wo Musa, bwe watoola badhaadha baife mu Misiri.”" 
1Kings8:54 Solomoni bwe yamala okusaba Musengwa Katonda ebyo byonabyona ng'amweghemba, yaasituka gh'alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda, ghe yali akubye amakiryaivu ng'ayandhululiiza emikono gye y'eigulu." 
1Kings8:55 Agho yaayemerera, yaasabira Abaisiraeli boonaboona abeesoloiza mu mamiro ag'amaani, ati:" 
1Kings8:56 “Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe, oyo aghaire abantu be Abaisiraeli emiraala nga bwe yasuubiza. Ghaziragho waire ekintu ekirala kiti ky'atatuukiriiza, ku birungi bye yasuubiza ng'abita mu Musa omugheereza we." 
1Kings8:57 Musengwa Katonda waife abenga ghalala n'ife, nga bwe yabanga aghalala ni badhaadha baife, era alobenga kutuvaaku waire okutulekulira agho." 
1Kings8:58 Akyukizenga emyoyo gyaife y'ali, tughange okujiiranga ku by'akoba, era tugemenga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro, bye yagha badhaadha baife." 
1Kings8:59 Ebibono byange bino bye ndhogeire mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda nga nsaba okubeerwa, Musengwa Katonda waife oyo abiidhukirenga omusana n'obwire, era ampenga nze omugheereza we kyabazinga ghalala n'abantu be Abaisiraeli, ebyetaago ebya buli lunaku." 
1Kings8:60 Olwo abantu ab'omu maghanga goonagoona ku nsi basobole okumanha nga Musengwa Katonda oyo Katonda, era nga ni Katonda yenka, ghazira wundi naire." 
1Kings8:61 Kale imwe abantu be, mubenga beesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda waife, mujiirenga ku mateeka ge era mugemenga ebiragiro bye, nga bwe mukola mpegaano.”" 
1Kings8:62 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni ghalala n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaali naye, baaghaayo emisengo ye Musengwa Katonda." 
1Kings8:63 Solomoni yaghaayo ente emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ibiri (22,000) n'entaama emitwalo ikumi n'ebiri (120,000) ng'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Kale atyo kyabazinga Solomoni n'Abaisiraeli baaghaayo eisinzizo okuba erya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Kings8:64 Ku lunaku olwo, kyabazinga yaatukuza oluya olwa ghagati olwali mu maiso g'eisinzizo, kuba eyo ye yagheerayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa kyonakyona okuwaagho, n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, n'amasavu agaava ku bigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Yabigheerayo eyo, kuba alutaari ey'ekyuma eky'ekikomo eyali mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, yali ntono inho nga tibisobola kusugaku." 
1Kings8:65 Kale mu kiseera ekyo, Solomoni ng'ali ghalala n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona nga beesoloiza, baakola embaga ey'ekibinuko mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda waife, kye baamalaku enaku omusanvu. Ekibinuko ekyo kyaliku abantu abeesoloiza kamaala inho, okuva eruuyi ere aghaingirirwa e Hamathi, okutuuka ku kaiga ak'oku nsalosalo ni Misiri."
