1Kings8:66 Ku lunaku olwomunaana, kyabazinga yaasiibula abantu okwirayo ewaibwe. Abantu baamusabira enkabi, bairayo ewaibwe nga basangaavu era nga basagamba mu myoyo gyaibwe olw'ebirungi Musengwa Katonda bye yagha Daudi omugheereza we, n'abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
1Kings9:1 Solomoni bwe yamala okuzimba eisinzizo n'ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga, era n'okumaliriza byonabyona bye yayenda okuzimba," 
1Kings9:2 Musengwa Katonda yaamubonekera omukuzi ogwokubiri, nga bwe yamubonekera e Gibeoni." 
1Kings9:3 Yaamukoba ati: “Mpuliire by'onsabye ng'oneeghemba agho mu maiso gange. Ntukwiza eisinzizo lino ly'onzimbiire, libe ery'okunsinzizangamu enaku dhoonadhoona. Ndidha kulikuumanga obutatemya enaku dhoonadhoona." 
1Kings9:4 Weena bw'onaajiiranga ku bye nkoba, n'oba omwesigwa era omwesimbu nga lata wo Daudi bwe yakolanga, n'ogonderanga biragiro byange era n'ogemanga amateeka gange," 
1Kings9:5 ndireetera obwakyabazinga bwo okusigalagho nga bugumu ebyanda n'ebyanda, nga bwe nasuubiza lata wo Daudi nti, ‘Mu b'eizaire lyo toobulengamu muntu atyama ku kityamo kya bwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli.’" 
1Kings9:6 Aye iwe oba baidhukulu bo, bwe mulinvaaku ni mudheemera amateeka n'ebiragiro byange bye mbaghaire, ate ni mwira ku kugheereza n'okusinza bakatonda abandi," 
1Kings9:7 olwo nditoola Abaisiraeli mu nsi ye mbaghaire, era naalekulira agho eisinzizo lino lye ntukwiza okunsinzizangamu. Isiraeli erifuuka eky'okwogeraku era yaafuuka enseko dh'abalamu mu maghanga goonagoona." 
1Kings9:8 Eisinzizo lino lirifuuka mmungo ya bimunku, era kiisi baliribitangaku balitengeesanga bwa mitwe beewuunhia. Era balibuuzanga bati, ‘Lwaki Musengwa Katonda yakola atyo ensi eno n'eisinzizo lino?’" 
1Kings9:9 Olwo abantu baliirangamu bati, ‘Lwa kuba baava ku Musengwa Katonda waibwe, eyatoola badhaadha baibwe mu nsi Misiri, ate baira ku kugheereza n'okusinza bakatonda abandi. Musengwa Katonda kyaviire n'abatuusa ku kabi akaaga agho.’ ”" 
1Kings9:10 Agho emyaka amakumi abiri Solomoni gye yazimbiramu ebizimbe byombi, eisinzizo n'ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga, bwe gyawaaku," 
1Kings9:11 kyabazinga Solomoni oyo yaagha kyabazinga Hiramu ebibuga amakumi abiri mu kiketezo ky'e Galilaaya. Hiramu oyo, kyabazinga w'e Tiro, n'eyaleeteranga Solomoni ebintu byonabyona bye yeetaaganga okuzimbisa: emivule, emiti emisipuressi, ni zaabu." 
1Kings9:12 Aye Hiramu oyo bwe yaja okulambuula ebibuga Solomoni bye yamugha, yaaloba kubisiima." 
1Kings9:13 Kyeyava n'akoba Solomoni ati: “Bibuga ki bino by'ompaire, muganda wange?” Okuva n'olwo, ebibuga ebyo byayetebwa Kabuli ni ye buli eno." 
1Kings9:14 Hiramu oyo, zaabu ye yagheereza kyabazinga Solomoni, yagheramu kilo ng'oti enkumi ina (4,000)." 
1Kings9:15 Bino n'ebintu kyabazinga Solomoni bye yakola ng'akozesa abantu be yakakanga obukake: Yazimba eisinzizo n'ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga; yaazimba ekifo kye baidhuzaamu eitaka ekyetebwa Millo; yaazimba ekimante ku kibuga Yerusalemu okukyezunguluza; yaazimba n'ebibuga, Hazori, Megiddo ni Gezeri." 
1Kings9:16 Kyabazinga w'e Misiri yali yalumba Gezeri ekyo yaakigema, yaakyokya omuliro, yaita Abakanaani abaakirimu, yaakigha mughala we ng'ekirabo, bwe yabayira Solomoni." 
1Kings9:17 Kale Solomoni yaakizimba buyaaka. Era yaakozesa abaakakibwanga okukola emirimo, yaazimba ni Bethi Horoni eky'Eifo," 
1Kings9:18 ni Baalathi, ni Tamari mu irungu ery'e Buyudaaya," 
1Kings9:19 n'ebibuga bye ebyalimu amaterekero, n'ebibuga mwe yakuumiranga ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, n'ebibuga by'abasaadha be abavuzi b'embalaasi, n'ebindi byonabyona Solomoni bye yayenda okuzimba mu Yerusalemu ni mu Lebanoni, n'aghandi woonawoona mu biketezo bye yali afuga." 
1Kings9:20 Ghaaligho abantu abaawonagho abataali Baisiraeli, nga n'omuli Abamori, Abahitti, Abaperizzi, Abahivi, n'Abayebusi abaali mu nsi Kanaani." 
1Kings9:21 Abaidhukulu b'abantu abo, Abaisiraeli be bataaghanga kuzikiriza, Solomoni be yakozesanga emirimo egy'olukako egy'obwiru. Era abo n'abakaagikola ni ye buli eno." 
1Kings9:22 Aye ghazira muntu waire omulala ati ku Baisiraeli, Solomoni ye yafuulaku mwiru. Baabanga baisirukale be, na bakungu be, na baduumizi be ba magye, na bakulu be mu magye, na bavuzi be ba bigaali bya mu lutalo, na bavuzi be ba mbalaasi." 
1Kings9:23 Ghaaligho abakulembeze abakologho ebikumi bitaanu n'ataanu (550), abaakuliranga abantu abaakolanga emirimo gya Solomoni." 
1Kings9:24 Mughala wa kyabazinga w'e Misiri bwe yamala okuva mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi n'aira mu kisaagaati ekikye ku bubwe Solomoni kye yamuzimbira, agho Solomoni yaazimba ekifo kye baidhuzaamu eitaka ekyetebwa Millo." 
1Kings9:25 Emikuzi esatu buli mwaka, Solomoni yaaghangayo ku alutaari ye yazimbira Musengwa Katonda, ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Era yaaniokezanga obubbaani mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Kale yaamaliriza eisinzizo." 
1Kings9:26 Kyabazinga Solomoni yaazimba olugololiro olw'amaato mu Ezionigeberi ekiriiraine Elothi, ku mbali kw'Enhandha Emyufu, mu nsi Edomu." 
1Kings9:27 Kyabazinga Hiramu yaasindika ku bagheereza be n'amaato, abaali n'obumanhi ku by'oku nhandha, baajiira mu maato ago ghalala n'abagheereza ba Solomoni." 
1Kings9:28 Baaja mu nsi Ofiri, baatoolayo zaabu agheza kilo ng'oti enkumi ina (4,000), baamuleetera kyabazinga Solomoni." 
1Kings10:1 Agho kyabazinga omukazi ow'e Sheba bwe yawulira obumanhifu bwa Solomoni obwamugheebwa Musengwa Katonda, yaidha n'ebibuuzo ebikalangafu okumuleba." 
1Kings10:2 Yaidha e Yerusalemu n'ekikunsu eky'abagheereza be nga kinene inho, n'engamiya edheetwise obuwoowo, ni zaabu mungi inho, n'amabaale ag'omughendo. Era bwe yatuuka ewa Solomoni yaamukobera byonabyona ebyamuli ku mwoyo." 
1Kings10:3 Solomoni yaamwiramu ebibuuzo bye. Ghazira kintu waire ekirala kiti ekyazibughalira Solomoni okwinhonhola. 
1Kings10:4 Kyabazinga omukazi ow'e Sheba oyo yaabona amagezi ga Solomoni, n'ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga kye yazimba," 
1Kings10:5 n'emere ye yagabulanga ku meeza ye, n'ensambo abakungu be ye baatyamangamu, n'ensambo abagheereza be ye baagheerezangamu nga bali mu bivaalo byaibwe, n'abo abaagheerezanga eby'okunhwa. Era yaabona n'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa Solomoni bye yaghangayo mu isinzizo. Ebyo byonabyona byamwewuunhisa inho ekibitiriire." 
1Kings10:6 Agho yaakoba Solomoni ati: “Bye nawulira nga ndi mu nsi yange ku bikolwa byo ni ku magezi go, byali bituufu." 
1Kings10:7 Aye tyabiikiriza, okutuusa lwe ndidhie ni mbyeboneraku n'agange. Era bwenebwene bye nawulira byali katundu butundu ak'ebyo bye mboine. Amagezi n'obukombe by'oli nabyo bisingira ghala ebyo bye nawuliraku." 
1Kings10:8 Bakazi bo beesiimye! N'abagheereza bo ababa buliidho mu maiso go ni bawulira eby'amagezi by'oyogera beesiimye! 
1Kings10:9 Musengwa Katonda wo asaakibwe, eyayoleka nga bw'akusiimye, n'akufuula kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. Musengwa Katonda oyo agonza inho Isiraeli, kyeyava n'akufuula kyabazinga, olamulenga mu mazima ni mu butuufu.”" 
1Kings10:10 Agho yaatonera kyabazinga zaabu agheza kilo ng'oti enkumi ina (4,000), n'obuwoowo kamaala inho, n'amabaale ag'omughendo. Era tighaidhangaghooku kabiri bya buwoowo byaga agho bungi ng'oti n'ebyo kyabazinga omukazi ow'e Sheba bye yatonera kyabazinga Solomoni." 
1Kings10:11 Olugololiro olw'amaato ga Hiramu olwaleeta zaabu okuva mu Ofiri, era ni lwene olwo olwaleeta n'embaawo edhaali kamaala einho edh'emiti egyetebwa emyalumugi, n'amabaale ag'omughendo." 
1Kings10:12 Kyabazinga Solomoni yaakozesa embaawo edho okukolera obukomera ku madaala ag'omu isinzizo, n'ag'omu kisaagaati kye. Yaadhikolamu n'endingidi, n'entongooli edh'abembi. N'okuva ku olwo, mu Isiraeli timwairamu kuleetebwamu waire okubonekamu embaawo edh'emiti emyalumugi edhiri ng'oti n'edho, okutuusa ni ye buli eno." 
1Kings10:13 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaagha kyabazinga omukazi ow'e Sheba byonabyona bye yayenda na buli kye yasaba, nga tobaliireeku ebyo kyabazinga Solomoni mwene bye yayiiya okumugha mu mwoyo omugabi. Kale kyabazinga omukazi oyo yaasiibula, yairayo mu nsi ye, ghalala n'abagheereza be." 
1Kings10:14 Zaabu Solomoni ye yafunanga omwaka, yaghezanga kilo ng'oti emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi isatu (23,000)," 
1Kings10:15 nga tobaliireeku oyo eyavanga mu basuubuzi ni mu mpooza ku bitundibwa, n'oyo eyavanga mu bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'e Buwarabu, ni mu bafuzi ab'ebiketezo mu Isiraeli." 
1Kings10:16 Kyabazinga Solomoni yagheesa engabo enene ebikumi bibiri (200), buli ndala yaagirimbyaku zaabu azitogha kilo ng'oti musanvu." 
1Kings10:17 Yaagheesa n'engabo entono ebikumi bisatu, buli ndala yaagirimbyaku zaabu azitogha kilo ng'oti ibiri. Dhoonadhoona yaadhita mu ndhu eyayetebwanga Ekibira kya Lebanoni." 
1Kings10:18 Kyabazinga era yaakola ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga ekikologho mu isanka, yaakirimbyaku zaabu omukenenule." 
1Kings10:19 Ekityamo ekyo kyaliku amadaala mukaaga, ng'einhuma waakyo eriyo ekifaananie eky'omutwe ogw'ente ento. Era kyaliku ekintu kw'owuumuliza emikono eruuyi n'eruuyi, nga ku mbali okwa buli kintu kw'owuumuliza emikono, ghaligho ekifaananie ky'empologoma eyemereire." 
1Kings10:20 Ghaaligho n'ebifaananie ebindi eby'empologoma ikumi na bibiri, nga dheemereire ndala ndala ku luuyi ni ku luuyi okwa buli idaala, ku madaala gale omukaaga. Tighaalighooku kityamo kya bwakyabazinga kyakolebwa kabiri mu bwakyabazinga bundi, nga kifaanana n'ekyo." 
1Kings10:21 Ebintu byonabyona ebya kyabazinga Solomoni bye yakozesanga ku by'okunhwa, byali bya zaabu. Era ebintu byonabyona ebyakozesebwanga ku by'okulya mu ndhu eyayetebwanga Ekibira kya Lebanoni, byali bya zaabu mukenenule. Tighaaligho kintu kyonakyona kya feeza, kuba mu biseera bya Solomoni, feeza tiyatwalibwanga ng'ekintu eky'omughendo." 
1Kings10:22 Kyabazinga yali n'olugololiro olw'amaato agaajanga e Tarushishi ku nhandha enene nga gali ghalala n'olugololiro olw'amaato ga Hiramu. Buli lumaliira lwa myaka esatu, olugololiro olw'amaato olwo lwairanga okuva e Tarushishi nga luleese zaabu, ni feeza, n'amasanka, n'ensude, n'enkembo." 
1Kings10:23 Kale atyo kyabazinga Solomoni yaasingira ghala bakyabazinga boonaboona ku nsi, obukombe n'amagezi." 
1Kings10:24 Abantu ab'omu nsi yoonayoona baayendanga okwidha aghali Solomoni oyo, okuwulira ebibono eby'amagezi ge, Katonda ge yamugha." 
1Kings10:25 Buli muntu eyaidhanga, ng'aleeta ekirabo: ebintu bya feeza n'ebya zaabu, ebivaalo, eby'okulwanisa, obuwoowo, embalaasi n'enhumbu. Abantu baaleetanga ebintu ebyo buli mwaka." 
1Kings10:26 Solomoni yasoloza ebigaali eby'omu lutalo n'abavuzi b'embalaasi. Yali n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo lukumi na bina (1,400), n'abavuzi b'embalaasi omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000) abandi yaabata mu bibuga ebikuumirwamu ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, ate abandi yaabata mu Yerusalemu, mwene ye yali." 
1Kings10:27 Mu biseera bye, feeza yayala mu Yerusalemu, yaaba mungi ng'oti bwa mabaale. N'emivule gyaba mingi ng'oti miti emisikamore egy'omu biketezo eby'omu biiko." 
1Kings10:28 Embalaasi Solomoni dhe yali nadho, yadhiragirizanga kuva mu Misiri ni mu Kue, era abasuubuzi be baadhisasuliranga." 
1Kings10:29 Ekigaali eky'omu lutalo ekirala kyagulwanga mu Misiri ku bitundu lukaaga ebya feeza, n'embalaasi endala yaagulwanga ku bitundu kikumi n'ataanu ebya feeza. Bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'Abahitti n'ab'e Siria, baagulanga ebigaali eby'omu lutalo n'embalaasi, ku basuubuzi ba Solomoni abo." 
1Kings11:1 Kyabazinga Solomoni yayenda abakazi kamaala abamaghanga agandi, omwali ni mughala wa kyabazinga ow'e Misiri, n'abakazi Abamoabu, n'Abammoni, n'Abaedomu, n'Abasidoni, n'Abahitti." 
1Kings11:2 Solomoni yabayiza abakazi okuva mu maghanga ago, waire nga Musengwa Katonda yali amaze okukoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mutafumbiraganwanga na bantu abo, kuba bwenebwene baja kubakyusa emyoyo gyaimwe, musinze emisambwa gyaibwe.” Aye Solomoni yaabeesibaku, yaabenda." 
1Kings11:3 Yali n'abakazi be abambeedha nga baghera lusanvu, ate yaaba n'abakazi be ab'embali nga baghera ebikumi bisatu. Abakazi abo baakyusa omwoyo gwe," 
1Kings11:4 era ghe yakairikira baali nga bamuleeteire okusinza emisambwa, yaaloba kugumira ku Musengwa Katonda we, nga lata we Daudi bwe yamugumiraku." 
1Kings11:5 Solomoni yaasinza omusambwa omukazi Ashitorethi ogw'Abasidoni, n'omusambwa Milikomu ogw'Abammoni, ogwenhinhalwa." 
1Kings11:6 Kale mu nsambo eyo Solomoni yaakola ekibi eri Musengwa Katonda, yaaloba kugumira ku Musengwa Katonda oyo, nga lata we Daudi bwe yamugumiraku." 
1Kings11:7 Agho yaazimba ku lusozi oluli ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba wa Yerusalemu, ekifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu omusambwa Kemoshi ogw'Abamoabu ogwenhinhalwa, n'eky'okusinzizaamu omusambwa Moleki ogw'Abammoni, gwona era ogwenhinhalwa." 
1Kings11:8 Era mu nsambo n'endala eyo, yaazimbira bakazi be boonaboona abamaghanga agandi, ebifo mwe baaniokezanga obubbaani era ni baghangayo emisengo y'emisambwa gyaibwe." 
1Kings11:9 Musengwa Katonda yaasungughalira Solomoni, kuba yakyuka yaava ku Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, eyamubonekera emikuzi ebiri," 
1Kings11:10 n'amusikirira obutasinzanga misambwa, aye ate Solomoni n'aloba okujiira ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda oyo bye yamulagira." 
1Kings11:11 Kale Musengwa Katonda kyeyava n'akoba Solomoni ati: “Nga bw'okoze ekyo, n'oloba okukuuma endagaano ye nakola n'iwe, era n'odheemera amateeka ge nakulagira, bwenebwene ndidha kukutoolaku obwakyabazinga, mbughe owundi ku bagheereza bo." 
1Kings11:12 Aye ku lwa lata wo Daudi, ekyo tiidha kukikola ng'okaali mulamu, ndikikola ng'omwana wo n'afuga." 
1Kings11:13 Ate era tirimutoolaku bwakyabazinga bwonabwona, aye ndimulekeragho ekika kirala ku lwa Daudi omugheereza wange, ni ku lwa Yerusalemu, ekibuga kye nalonda okuba ekyange.”" 
1Kings11:14 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaasiikuula omulangira Hadadi ow'e Edomu, yaafuuka omuzigu wa Solomoni." 
1Kings11:15 Einhuma ere nga bino bikaali kubaagho, Daudi bwe yaghangula Edomu, Yoabu omuduumizi w'eigye yaja okuziika abaitibwa, era yaita kiisi musaadha mu Edomu." 
1Kings11:16 Yoabu oyo n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona be yali nabo, baali eyo okumala emyezi mukaaga, okutuusa lwe baamala okwita kiisi musaadha," 
1Kings11:17 okutoolaku Hadadi n'abandi ku bagheereza Abaedomu aba lata we, abaalumuka ni baja e Misiri ni Hadadi oyo ng'akaali mwana muto." 
1Kings11:18 Baava mu Midia, baaja e Parani baatoolayooku abasaadha be baaja nabo e Misiri. Agho baatuuka ye kyabazinga w'e Misiri, yaagha Hadadi ekibandha n'endhu, era yaamughanga n'ensako kwe yalyanga." 
1Kings11:19 Hadadi yaaba mugonzi inho ye kyabazinga w'e Misiri, era kyabazinga oyo yaatoola mulamu we, muganda wa mukazi we, yaamumugha okumubayiza. Omukazi oyo yali inhebantu, ng'eriina lye ni Tahapenesi." 
1Kings11:20 Muganda wa Tahapenesi oyo yaazaalira Hadadi omwana omulenzi, yaamweta Genubathi. Omwana oyo yaatuusa okuva ku mabeere nga Tahapenesi ali mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Kale Genubathi yaakulira mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga w'e Misiri ghalala n'abaana ba kyabazinga." 
1Kings11:21 Agho Hadadi bwe yawulira ng'ali e Misiri ati, Daudi afiire era nga ni Yoabu omuduumizi w'eigye yeena afiire, yaakoba kyabazinga w'e Misiri ati: “Ndeka nje, ndhireyo mu nsi y'ewaife.”" 
1Kings11:22 Aye kyabazinga yaamubuuza ati: “Kiki ky'oli kudhulirira ng'oli eno ewange, ekiri kukwendesa okwirayo mu nsi y'ewaimwe?” Hadadi yairamu ati: “Iwe ndeka buleke, nje.”" 
1Kings11:23 Agho Katonda yaasiikuulira Solomoni omuzigu owundi, nga ni Rezori mutabane wa Eliada. Rezori oyo yalumuka ku musengwa we Hadadezeri, kyabazinga w'e Zoba." 
1Kings11:24 Daudi bwe yamala okwita ab'e Zoba, Rezori oyo yaasoloza abasaadha, yaaba mukulu waibwe. Baaja e Damasiko baaba eyo, era baamufuulira eyo kyabazinga waayo." 
1Kings11:25 Yaafuga Siria, era yaaba muzigu wa Isiraeli inho mu biseera bya Solomoni byonabyona, yaataghaania Isiraeli ng'oti ni Hadadi bwe yakola." 
1Kings11:26 Era ni Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati ow'e Zereda mu Efuraimu, inhina nga ni namwandu ayetebwa Zerua, yeena yaadheemera kyabazinga Solomoni, musengwa we." 
1Kings11:27 Ekyaviiraku Yeroboamu okudheema ni kino: Kyabazinga Solomoni yali ali kuzimba ekifo kye baidhuzaamu eitaka ekyetebwa Millo, era ng'ali kusemba mu bituli ebyali mu kimante ky'ekibuga ekyetebwa ekya Daudi lata we." 
1Kings11:28 Omusaadha oyo Yeroboamu yali wa maani. Era Solomoni bwe yamubona nga mwisuka akola n'amaani, yaamugha okulabiriranga emirimo gyonagyona egy'olukako egyakolebwanga mu kiketezo ky'Abamanasse n'eky'Abaefuraimu." 
1Kings11:29 Lwali lulala mu kiseera ekyo, Yeroboamu ng'ali kutambulaku ng'ava e Yerusalemu, omulanzi Ahiya ow'e Shilo yaamwagaana mu ngira, olwo baaba nga bali bwa babiri bonka mu irungu. Ahiya yali avaire ekivaalo ekiyaaka." 
1Kings11:30 Agho Ahiya oyo yaagema ekivaalo ekiyaaka kye yali avaire, yaakikanulakanulamu ebitundu ikumi na bibiri." 
1Kings11:31 Yaakoba Yeroboamu ati: “Twalaku ebitundu ikumi ku ebyo, kuba Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Ndidha kutoola obwakyabazinga ku Solomoni nkugheeku ebika ikumi." 
1Kings11:32 Solomoni aidha kusigaza ekika kirala ku lw'omugheereza wange Daudi, ni ku lwa Yerusalemu ekibuga kye nalondamu mu bika byonabyona ebya Isiraeli." 
1Kings11:33 Ndidha kukola ntyo, kuba Solomoni oyo yanvaaku yaasinza omusambwa omukazi Ashitorethi ogw'Abasidoni, n'omusambwa Kemoshi ogw'Abamoabu, n'omusambwa Milikomu ogw'Abammoni. Yandheemera yaakola ebibi, yaaloba kugema mateeka na biragiro byange, nga lata we Daudi bwe yakolanga." 
1Kings11:34 Aye tiidha kutoola ku Solomoni oyo bwakyabazinga bwe bwonabwona. Ndidha kumuleka afuge ekiseera kye ky'anaamala nga mulamu, ku lw'omugheereza wange Daudi ye nalondamu, eyagemanga ebiragiro byange n'amateeka gange." 
1Kings11:35 Nditoola obwakyabazinga ku mwana wa Solomoni oyo, naakugha iwe ebika ikumi." 
1Kings11:36 Aye ate omwana wa Solomoni oyo ndimulekera ekika kirala, olwo buliidho omugheereza wange Daudi abenga ng'akaaligho n'omuntu ow'oku lulyo lwe afuga mu Yerusalemu, ekibuga kye nalonda kibe ekifo mwe banansinzizanga." 
1Kings11:37 Iwe Yeroboamu ndidha kukutwala obe kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era ofuge ekiketezo kyonakyona ky'onaayenda." 
1Kings11:38 Bw'onaatanga omwoyo ku byonabyona bye nkulagira, n'ogumira ku nze, n'okola bye nsiima, era n'ogemanga amateeka n'ebiragiro byange ng'omugheereza wange Daudi bwe yakolanga, ndidha kubanga ghalala n'iwe. Ndikugha okufuga Isiraeli, era naaleetera ab'endhu yo okusigalagho nga bakaafuga, nga bwe nagha omugheereza wange Daudi." 
1Kings11:39 Era ndibonereza baidhukulu ba Daudi olw'ebibi bya Solomoni, aye tiribabonereza byanda na byanda.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 Agho Solomoni yaasala amagezi okwita Yeroboamu, aye Yeroboamu yaalumukira mangu e Misiri ewa kyabazinga waayo eyayetebwanga Shishaki, yaaba eyo okutuusa Solomoni bwe yafa." 
1Kings11:41 Ebindi byonabyona ebyogerwa ku Solomoni, ni byonabyona bye yakola, era n'amagezi ge, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebikolwa bya Solomoni." 
1Kings11:42 Entangama Solomoni ye yamala ng'afuga Isiraeli yoonayoona mu Yerusalemu, yali ya myaka makumi ana (40)." 
1Kings11:43 Agho Solomoni oyo yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, yaaziikibwa mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi lata we. Mutabane we Rehoboamu yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Kings12:1 Agho Rehoboamu yaaja e Shekemu Abaisiraeli ye baali beesolokeiza okumufuula kyabazinga. 
1Kings12:2 Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati yaakiwulira ng'akaali mu Misiri ye yali alumukiire okuwona kyabazinga Solomoni. Agho yaira," 
1Kings12:3 kuba Abaisiraeli baamwetesa. Era bwe yatuuka, yaabeeyimbaku boonaboona abeesoloza, baaja baakoba Rehoboamu bati:" 
1Kings12:4 “Lata wo Solomoni yatukaluubiriza inho ekibitiriire, yaatukozesa emirimo emikakali era emizito. Aye iwe tugondeze ku bulamu, otukendeereze ku buzito obwo, twidha kukugheerezanga.”" 
1Kings12:5 Rehoboamu yaabakoba ati: “Muje, muliira ye ndi nga ghabiseegho enaku isatu.” Abantu baaja." 
1Kings12:6 Kyabazinga Rehoboamu yeebuuza ku bantu abakulu, abaaghanga lata we Solomoni amagezi ng'akaali mulamu. Yaababuuza ati: “Magezi ki ge mumpa? Abantu bano mbairemu ntya?”" 
1Kings12:7 Baamwiramu bati: “Bw'oba ng'oyenda okuba omugheereza w'abantu bano olwaleero, oidha kubairamu ng'okozesa ebibono ebikalamu, olwo baidha kubanga bagheereza bo enaku dhoonadhoona.”" 
1Kings12:8 Aye kyabazinga Rehoboamu yaava ku magezi g'abantu abakulu ge baamugha, yeebuuza ku baisuka abaakula naye era abaali nga n'abamugheereza mu kiseera ekyo." 
1Kings12:9 Yaababuuza ati: “Magezi ki ge mumpa? Twiremu tutya abantu bano abankobye bati, ‘Kendeeza ku buzito lata wo bwe yatutaaku?’ ”" 
1Kings12:10 Agho abaisuka abo baamukoba bati: “Abantu abo abakukobye bati, ‘Lata wo yatukaluubiriza inho ekibitiriire, yaatukozesa emirimo emizito, aye iwe tukendeezeeku ku buzito obwo,’ bakobe oti, ‘Akaala kange akansubi, kanene okusinga enkende ya lata wange." 
1Kings12:11 Kale ni oba nga lata wange yabakaluubiriza ekibitiriire, nze ndidha kwongera bwongere okubakaluubiriza einho. Era oba nga lata wange yabakangaivulanga ng'abakubisa enkoba edhabuliidho, nze ndidha kubakangaivulanga nga mbakubisa enkoba edhiriku obusuna!’ ”" 
1Kings12:12 Kale nga ghabiseegho enaku isatu, Yeroboamu n'abantu boonaboona baidha ye kyabazinga Rehoboamu nga bwe yabakoba, ati: “Muliira ye ndi nga ghabiseegho enaku isatu.”" 
1Kings12:13 Agho kyabazinga yaabairamu na bukambwe, kuba yava ku magezi abantu abakulu ge baamugha," 
1Kings12:14 yaajiira ku g'abaisuka ge baamugha, ng'akoba ati: “Oba nga lata wange yabakaluubiriza ekibitiriire, nze ndidha kwongera bwongere okubakaluubiriza einho. Era oba nga lata wange yabakangaivulanga ng'abakubisa enkoba edhabuliidho, nze ndidha kubakangaivulanga nga mbakubisa enkoba edhiriku obusuna!”" 
1Kings12:15 Kale atyo kyabazinga yaaloba kuwulirisa bantu. Musengwa Katonda n'eyaleetera ebintu okuja bityo, olwo atuukirize kye yakoba Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati ng'abita mu Ahiya ow'e Shilo." 
1Kings12:16 Abantu bwe baabona nga kyabazinga tabawuliriisa, baamwiramu bati: “Mugabo ki gwe tuli nagwo ni Daudi? Tuzira kye tuli nakyo kya nsikirano ni mutabane wa Yesse. Imwe Abaisiraeli, ka twireyo ewaife. Daudi alabirire ab'endhu ye.” Kale Abaisiraeli baagolola ewaibwe." 
1Kings12:17 Aye Rehoboamu yaasigala ng'akaafuga Abaisiraeli abaabanga mu kiketezo eky'e Buyudaaya bonka. 
1Kings12:18 Agho kyabazinga Rehoboamu yaatuma mu Baisiraeli Adoramu eyali akulira abo abaasaliranga abantu abaakolanga emirimo egy'olukako amakatala. Aye Abaisiraeli baamukuba amabaale, baamwita. Agho kyabazinga Rehoboamu yaayangugha, yaaniina ekigaali kye eky'omu lutalo, yaalumukira e Yerusalemu." 
1Kings12:19 Okuva n'olwo, Abaisiraeli ab'omu kiketezo eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba wa Isiraeli, baadheema okufugibwa ab'endhu ya Daudi ni ye buli eno." 
1Kings12:20 Agho abantu ab'omu Isiraeli yoonayoona, bwe baawulira nga Yeroboamu aize okuva e Misiri, baamwetesa okwidha ghe baali beesololeiza, era baamufuula kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yoonayoona. Ekika kya Yuda kyonka n'ekyasigala nga kikaafugibwa ab'endhu ya Daudi." 
1Kings12:21 Agho Rehoboamu bwe yatuuka e Yerusalemu, yaayeta abantu ab'omu kika kya Yuda n'ekya Benjamini. Abasaadha abalwani einho abaghera emitwalo eikumi n'omunaana (180,000), beesoloza okuja okulwanisa Abaisiraeli ab'omu kiketezo eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba wa Isiraeli, Rehoboamu oyo asobole okukiizaayo mu bwakyabazinga bwe." 
1Kings12:22 Aye Katonda yaakoba omusaadha we Shemaia ati: 
1Kings12:23 “Koba Rehoboamu mutabane wa Solomoni era kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, okobe n'ab'omu kika kya Yuda, n'ekya Benjamini, era n'abantu boonaboona abandi, oti," 
1Kings12:24 ‘Musengwa Katonda akoba ati mutaja kulumba baganda baimwe, Baisiraeli banaimwe. Mwireyo buli muntu mu maka ge, kuba ebyo ebibairegho, ninze nabireetagho.’ ” Agho baagondera ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda, bairayo ewaibwe nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yabalagira." 
1Kings12:25 Agho Yeroboamu yaazimba ekibuga Shekemu mu kiketezo kya Efuraimu eky'oku nsozi, yaaba omwo. Era yaava agho yaazimba ekibuga Penueli." 
1Kings12:26 Yaakoba mule ati: “Obwakyabazinga bwidha kabiri kwirira ab'endhu ya Daudi," 
1Kings12:27 kasita abantu bano banaajanga e Yerusalemu okughaayo emisengo ye Musengwa Katonda mu isinzizo. Olwo omwoyo gwaibwe kabiri gukyukire eri musengwa waibwe Rehoboamu kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, nze bandhite, baire y'ali.”" 
1Kings12:28 Kale kyabazinga Yeroboamu oyo yaalowoolereza inho ku kintu ekyo, era yaamala yaakola ebifaananie eby'ente ento bibiri mu zaabu. Agho yaakoba abantu ati: “Mubairenga nga muja e Yerusalemu okumala ekiseera ekireeyi ekimala. Mubone eno, imwe Abaisiraeli, bano ni bakatonda baimwe abaabatoola mu Misiri.”" 
1Kings12:29 Agho yaata ekifaananie eky'ente ento ekindi mu Betheli, n'ekindi yaakita mu Dani." 
1Kings12:30 Ekyo kyaleetera abantu okwonoona, kuba baajanga okusinza omusambwa ogwali mu Betheli, era baajanga n'okusinza gule ogwali eghala mu Dani." 
1Kings12:31 Yeroboamu era yaazimba amasabo mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, yaataagho bakabona ng'abatoola mu bantu abatali ba mu kika kya Levi." 
1Kings12:32 Era yaataagho ekibinuko, kibengagho mu mwezi ogwomunaana, ku lunaku olweikumi n'eitaanu, nga kye baabanga nakyo mu Buyudaaya. Yaaja ku alutaari e Betheli yaaghaayo emisengo y'ebifaananie eby'ente ento bye yakola, era yaataagho bakabona abaagheerezanga mu masabo ge yazimba." 
1Kings12:33 Ku lunaku olweikumi n'eitaanu olw'omwezi ogwomunaana, omwezi mwene gwe yalonda ku lulwe, yaaja ku alutaari ye yazimba e Betheli. Yaateeragho Abaisiraeli ekibinuko, yaaja ku alutaari yaaniokeza obubbaani." 
1Kings13:1 Agho omulanzi yaava mu Buyudaaya nga Musengwa Katonda n'amulagiire, yaaja e Betheli. Yaayagaana Yeroboamu ng'ayemereire aghali alutaari, okuniokeza obubbaani." 
1Kings13:2 Omulanzi oyo, yaavumirira alutaari eyo ng'ajiira ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yamulagira, ati: “Alutaari iwe, alutaari iwe, Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Bona eno, omwana omulenzi alizaalibwa mu ndhu ya Daudi, ng'eriina lye ni Yosia. Aliitira ku iwe bakabona ab'ebifo ebigulumivu ebisinzibwamu abakuniokerezaaku obubbaani, baaba ng'oti n'omusengo ogugheebwayo. Era amagumba g'abantu galyokerwa ku iwe.’ ”" 
1Kings13:3 Era omulanzi oyo yaagha akamanhiso ku lunaku olwo, ati: “Kino kw'onaamanhira nga Musengwa Katonda n'ayogeire: alutaari eno eidha kumenhekagho, eivu erigiriku liyuyike.”" 
1Kings13:4 Agho kyabazinga Yeroboamu bwe yawulira ebyo omulanzi bye yayogera ng'avumirira alutaari mu Betheli, yaagalula omukono ghe yali gh'alutaari, yaamusonkaku ng'akoba ati: “Mumugeme!” Amangu ago omukono ogwo gwakadambala nga taghanga kugwiza." 
1Kings13:5 Alutaari yoona yaamenhekagho, eivu eryagiriku lyayuyika okutuukiriza akamanhiso omulanzi ke yagha mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Kings13:6 Agho kyabazinga Yeroboamu yaakoba omulanzi ati: “Weeghembe Musengwa Katonda wo onsabire, omukono gwange gwiregho.” Omulanzi yeeghemba Musengwa Katonda, omukono gwa kyabazinga ogwo gwairagho, gwaba mu mbeera yaagwo eyabuliidho." 
1Kings13:7 Kyabazinga yaakoba omulanzi ati: “Idha tuje eka ewange, olye ku mere oiremu amaani, era ndidha kukugha n'ekirabo.”" 
1Kings13:8 Omulanzi yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Ni bwetugabaniramu ghagati obukombe bwonabwona obw'omu kisaagaati kyo, tiidha kuja n'iwe, waire okulya emere, oba okunhwa amaadhi mu kifo kino." 
1Kings13:9 Musengwa Katonda atyo bwe yandagiire, ng'akoba ati, ‘Otalyayo mere waire okunhwayo amaadhi, era otairira mu ngira ye wagemye ng'ojaayo.’ ”" 
1Kings13:10 Agho yaabita mu ngira yindi, yaaloba kwirirayo mu eyo ye yabitamu ng'aja e Betheli." 
1Kings13:11 Mu kiseera ekyo, ghaaligho omulanzi omukaire eyali ng'aba mu Betheli. Agho batabane be baidha, baamukobera byonabyona omulanzi ole eyava mu Buyudaaya bye yakola mu Betheli ku lunaku olwo. Era baamukobera n'ebyo bye yakoba kyabazinga Yeroboamu." 
1Kings13:12 Iseibwe yaababuuza ati: “Ngira ki ye yagemye ng'ali kwirayo?” Batabane be baamulagirira engira omulanzi oyo ye yagema. 
1Kings13:13 Yaakoba batabane be ati: “Munteere ekintu ekityamibwaku ku ndogoyi.” Agho baakimuteera ku ndogoyi, yaatyama ku ndogoyi eyo era yaagivuga." 
1Kings13:14 Yaalumuukirira omulanzi ole, yaamwagaana ng'atyaime ghansi gh'omuti omukologho. Yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe omulanzi eyaviire mu Buyudaaya.” Ole yaamwiramu ati: “Ninze.”" 
1Kings13:15 Agho yaamukoba ati: “Idha tuje eka ewange, olye ku mere.”" 
1Kings13:16 Aye omulanzi ole yaamukoba ati: “Tighanga kwirayo n'iwe waire okwingira n'iwe mu ndhu, era tiidha kulya mere waire okunhwa amaadhi n'iwe mu kifo kino" 
1Kings13:17 kuba Musengwa Katonda yandagira ati, ‘Otalyayo mere waire okunhwayo amaadhi, era otairirayo mu ngira ye wagema ng'ojaayo.’ ”" 
1Kings13:18 Agho omulanzi omukaire ow'e Betheli yaamukoba ati: “Zeena ndi mulanzi ng'oti niiwe. Musengwa Katonda yalagiire malaika yankoba ati, ‘Ja omwize, aidhe n'iwe mu ndhu yo, alye ku mere era anhwe ni ku maadhi.’ ” Aye nga yali ali kumulimba." 
1Kings13:19 Kale omulanzi eyava mu Buyudaaya yairayo ghalala n'omulanzi ow'e Betheli, yaalya emere mu ndhu ye era yaanhwa n'amaadhi." 
1Kings13:20 Agho bwe baali nga batyaime ku kiiwulo, ekibono kya Musengwa Katonda kyaidha y'omulanzi omukaire eyaiza ole." 
1Kings13:21 Yaakoba omulanzi ole eyava mu Buyudaaya, ng'alangirira, ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Nga bw'odheemeire nze Musengwa Katonda wo kye nakukoba, n'otakola kye nakulagira," 
1Kings13:22 aye n'oira, n'olya emere era n'onhwa amaadhi mu kifo kye nakulobera okulyamu emere n'okunhwamu amaadhi, omulambo gwo tiguliziikibwa mu badhaadha bo.’ ”" 
1Kings13:23 Omulanzi omukaire bwe yamala okulya emere n'okunhwa, yaateera omulanzi ye yaiza ekintu ekityamibwaku ku ndogoyi ye." 
1Kings13:24 Era omulanzi oyo bweyali aja, yaayagaanana n'empologoma mu ngira, yaamwita. Omulambo gwe gwagwa agho mu ngira. Endogoyi n'empologoma byayemerera agho gha mbali ghaagwo." 
1Kings13:25 Abantu abaali nga bali kubitagho, baaja okulinga bati, nga babona omulambo ogugwire agho mu ngira, nga n'empologoma eyemereire kumpi nagwo. Baaja baakobera abantu ab'omu kibuga omulanzi omukaire mwe yabanga." 
1Kings13:26 Omulanzi omukaire eyaiza ole bwe yakiwulira, yaakoba ati: “Oyo n'omulanzi eyadheemera Musengwa Katonda kye yamulagira, olwo Musengwa Katonda oyo n'okumughaayo, empologoma n'emuyuzayuza n'emwita. Ekyo kyatuukiriza Musengwa Katonda oyo bye yakoba omulanzi oyo ati biidha kubaagho.”" 
1Kings13:27 Agho yaakoba batabane be ati: “Munteere ku ndogoyi ekintu ekityamibwaku.” Baakimuteera ku ndogoyi. 
1Kings13:28 Yaavuga endogoyi, yaaja yaayagaana omulambo gw'omulanzi nga gugwire agho mu ngira. Era ng'endogoyi n'empologoma byemereire kumpi nagwo empologoma nga teguliire era nga teyuziizayuziiza ndogoyi." 
1Kings13:29 Omulanzi oyo omukaire, yaabbeeda omulambo yaaguta ku ndogoyi, yaira nagwo e Betheli mu kibuga okugulira n'okuguziika." 
1Kings13:30 Yaatoola omulambo ogwo, ogw'omulanzi oyo eyava mu Buyudaaya, yaaguta mu magombe agage mwene, era baalira omulanzi oyo bati: “Woowe, muganda wange kwe ndigwa!”" 
1Kings13:31 Bwe yamala okumuziika, yaakoba batabane be ati: “Bwe nfanga, munziikanga mu magombe mwe tuziise omulanzi oyo. Amagumba gange mugatanga kumpi n'agage." 
1Kings13:32 Era Musengwa Katonda bye yamulagira okwogera, n'avumirira alutaari eri mu Betheli n'amasabo goonagoona ag'omu bifo ebigulumivu ebisinzibwamu ebiri mu bibuga by'e Samaria, tibiriroba kutuukirira.”" 
1Kings13:33 Ebyo nga biwoire, kyabazinga Yeroboamu era tiyakyuka naire n'alekayo mpisa dhe mbi. Aye yeeyongera bweyongere okutaagho baakabona ab'ebifo ebigulumivu ebisinzibwamu, ng'abatoola mu bantu ababuliidho. Yaayawulanga kiisi muntu eyayendanga okuba kabona, yaamufuula kabona w'ekifo ekigulumivu ekisinzibwamu." 
1Kings13:34 Ekibi kya Yeroboamu ekyo, kyaleetera ab'endhu ye okuzikirira n'okuweekereragho irala ku nsi." 
1Kings14:1 Mu biseera ebyo, mutabane wa kyabazinga Yeroboamu yaalwala, eriina lye nga ni Abiya." 
1Kings14:2 Yeroboamu yaakoba mukazi we ati: “Kola weefuusefuuse olobe kumanhika nga niiwe mukazi wange. Olwo oje e Shilo eri omulanzi Ahiya, eyankoba ati ndiba kyabazinga w'abantu bano." 
1Kings14:3 Mutwalire emigaati eminene ikumi, otwale ni ku migaati emitono, n'ekidoome eky'omudheenene gw'endhuki. Aidha kukukobera omwana bw'anaaba.”" 
1Kings14:4 Agho muka Yeroboamu yaakola atyo, yaasitula yaaja e Shilo, yaatuuka ku ndhu ya Ahiya. Ahiya yali takaaghanga kubona, ng'amaiso gamwidhieku ekifu olw'obukaire." 
1Kings14:5 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Ahiya ati: “Muka Yeroboamu wuuyo ali kwidha okukwebuuzaaku amanhe mutabane we bw'anaaba, kuba mulwaire. Kale oidha kumukoba oti n'oti.” Muka Yeroboamu bwe yatuuka, yeefuula okuba omukazi owundi." 
1Kings14:6 Aye Ahiya yaawulira empindo dh'ebigere bye ng'atuuse ku mulyango okwingira. Yaakoba ati: “Muka Yeroboamu, ingira. Lwaki weefuula okuba omuntu owundi. Bye ntumiibwa okukukoba ti bikalamu naire." 
1Kings14:7 Ja okobere Yeroboamu oti Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Nakugulumiza, naakulondamu mu bantu, naakufuula omufuzi w'abantu bange Abaisiraeli." 
1Kings14:8 Natoola obwakyabazinga ku b'endhu ya Daudi, naabukugha iwe. Aye tobaire ng'oti n'omugheereza wange Daudi, eyagema ebiragiro byange, n'agumira ku nze n'omwoyo gwe gwonagwona, n'akolanga ebyo byonka ebituufu mu maiso gange." 
1Kings14:9 Wakola ebibi okusinga boonaboona abaakusooka okufuga. Wanvaaku waaja weekolera emisambwa n'ebifaananie mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, waabisinza, olwo wandeetera okusungughala." 
1Kings14:10 Kale ni bona eno, ndidha kutuusa akabi ku b'endhu yo iwe Yeroboamu, mmaliregho irala kiisi wa ku lulyo lwo ayetebwa omusaadha, k'abe omusibe oba ow'eidembe. Era ndidha kusaanizaagho irala ab'endhu yo, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'ayokya obusa okutuusa lwe buweekereragho bwonabwona." 
1Kings14:11 Kiisi wa ku lulyo lwo anaafiiranga mu kibuga, embwa dhiidha kumulyanga, ate anaafiiranga mu irungu, enhonhi dhimulyenga. Musengwa Katonda n'ayogeire ekyo.’ ”" 
1Kings14:12 Ahiya yaayongera okukoba muka Yeroboamu ati: “Kale ni kola oireyo eka. Era olunaaniina ekigere mu kibuga oti, ng'omwana afa." 
1Kings14:13 Abantu boonaboona mu Isiraeli baja kumulira, bamuziike. Ku bantu ab'oku lulyo lwa Yeroboamu, oyo yenka n'aidha okuziikibwa, kuba oyo n'ayagaaniibwa ng'alimu akalungi akasiimibwa Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
1Kings14:14 Ate era olwaleero luno, Musengwa Katonda aja kweteeragho kyabazinga ow'okufuga Isiraeli. Kyabazinga oyo alisaaniagho ab'endhu ya Yeroboamu boonaboona." 
1Kings14:15 N'okuva ku olwo, Musengwa Katonda aja kubonereza ensi Isiraeli edhugumire ng'oti n'olugada bwe lutengeeta mu maadhi. Era aja kutoola Abaisiraeli mu nsi eno enungi ye yagha badhaadha baibwe, abasansaanize eyo ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, kuba baamusungughaza nga beekolera ebifaananie by'omusambwa omukazi, Ashera." 
1Kings14:16 Musengwa Katonda aja kulekulira agho Isiraeli olw'ebibi bya Yeroboamu bye yakola, n'ebyo bye yaleetera Abaisiraeli okukola.”" 
1Kings14:17 Agho muka Yeroboamu yaasituka yaagolola, yaatuuka e Tiruza. Bwe yali ali kwingira ati mu mulyango gw'endhu, omwana yaafa." 
1Kings14:18 Isiraeli yoonayoona yaamulira era yaamuziika nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba ng'abita mu mugheereza we omulanzi Ahiya. 
1Kings14:19 Ebindi byonabyona Yeroboamu bye yakola, entalo dhe yalwana, n'ensambo ye yafugamu, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings14:20 Yeroboamu oyo yafugira emyaka amakumi abiri, yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa. Agho mutabane we Nadabu yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Kings14:21 Rehoboamu mutabane wa Solomoni yafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya ng'agheza emyaka amakumi ana na mulala (41). Yaafugira entangama ya myaka ikumi na musanvu (17) mu Yerusalemu, ekibuga Musengwa Katonda kye yalondamu okumusinzizangamu mu bibuga byonabyona eby'ebika bya Isiraeli. Inhina wa Rehoboamu oyo yali ayetebwa Naama, nga Muammoni." 
1Kings14:22 Abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya baakola ebibi ebisinga ebya badhaadha baibwe boonaboona bye baakola. Kale baaleetera Musengwa Katonda okuba n'enkikidi ku lwaibwe. 
1Kings14:23 Baamusungughaza kuba boona beezimbira ku buli lusozi olugulumivu, na buli ghansi mu kinsense kya muti muzibirivu, baataagho ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, n'empango, n'ebifaananie eby'omusambwa omukazi, Ashera." 
1Kings14:24 Era mu nsi eyo mwalimu abasaadha abaakolanga obwamalaaya obw'omu isabo. Kale abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya baakolanga ebyenhinhalwa eby'abamaghanga agandi, Musengwa Katonda be yabinga mu nsi eyo ng'Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okugituukamu." 
1Kings14:25 Agho mu mwaka ogwokutaanu nga kyabazinga Rehoboamu n'afuga Buyudaaya, Shishaki kyabazinga w'e Misiri yaidha yaalumba Yerusalemu." 
1Kings14:26 Yaanhaga eby'obukombe eby'omu isinzizo n'eby'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, byonabyona yaabitwala. Yaatwala n'engabo dhoonadhoona edha zaabu, Solomoni dhe yagheesa." 
1Kings14:27 Kyabazinga Rehoboamu yaagheesa engabo mu kyuma ky'ekikomo okwira mu kifo ky'edho, yaadhigemya abakulu ab'abakuumi abaakuumanga omulyango gw'ekisaagaati kye." 
1Kings14:28 Kyabazinga buli lwe yaingiranga mu isinzizo, ng'abakuumi batwala engabo edho, ate baamalanga baadhiizaayo mu ndhu mwe baadhikuumiranga." 
1Kings14:29 Ebindi byonabyona Rehoboamu bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo eky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
1Kings14:30 Ekiseera ekyo kyonakyona, ghaabangagho entalo edhomwidhirano ghagati gha Rehoboamu ni Yeroboamu." 
1Kings14:31 Rehoboamu yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa. Yaaziikibwa mu lwambiidhi lwa badhaadha be abo, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Inhina wa Rehoboamu yali ng'ayetebwa Naama, era nga Muammoni. Mutabane wa Rehoboamu oyo eyayetebwanga Abiyamu, n'eyasikira ise oyo ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Kings15:1 Agho mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omunaana nga kyabazinga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati n'afuga Isiraeli, Abiyamu yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
1Kings15:2 Yaafugira entangama ya myaka esatu mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali nga ni Maaka, mughala wa Abishalomu." 
1Kings15:3 Abiyamu oyo yaakola ebibi nga lata we bwe yakola. Yaaloba kugumira ku Musengwa Katonda we, nga dhaadha we Daudi bwe yamugumiraku." 
1Kings15:4 Aye ku lwa Daudi, Musengwa Katonda yaagha Abiyamu oyo omwana omulenzi okumusikira ku bwakyabazinga mu Yerusalemu, n'okukuuma Yerusalemu nga kiri miraala." 
1Kings15:5 Musengwa Katonda yaakola ekyo, kuba Daudi yakolanga ebituufu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda oyo, era tiyavanga ku kye yamulagira enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwe, okutoolaku ekyo kye yakola Uria Omuhitti." 
1Kings15:6 Ekiseera kyonakyona Abiyamu kye yamala ng'afuga, entalo edhaatanukagho ghagati gha Rehoboamu ni Yeroboamu dhaasigala nga dhikaaja mu maiso." 
1Kings15:7 Era dhaaligho ghagati gha Abiyamu oyo ni Yeroboamu. Ebindi byonabyona Abiyamu bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo eky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
1Kings15:8 Agho Abiyamu oyo yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Mutabane we Asa yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Kings15:9 Agho mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri (20) nga kyabazinga Yeroboamu n'afuga Isiraeli, Asa yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
1Kings15:10 Yaafugira entangama ya myaka amakumi ana na mulala (41) mu Yerusalemu. Dhaadha we omukazi nga ni Maaka mughala wa Abishalomu. 
1Kings15:11 Asa oyo yaakolanga ebituufu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, nga dhaadha we Daudi bwe yakolanga." 
1Kings15:12 Yaatoolagho mu nsi eyo omuze ogw'abasaadha ogw'okukolanga obwamalaaya obw'omu isabo. Era yaatoolagho n'ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, badhaadha be bye baakola." 
1Kings15:13 Era yaatoola ni ku dhaadha we Maaka ekitiibwa eky'okuba inhina owa kyabazinga, kuba Maaka oyo yali n'ekifaananie ekyenhinhalwa ekyasinzibwanga eky'omusambwa omukazi Ashera. Asa yaatemagho ekifaananie ekyo, yaakyokera ku kaiga Kiduroni." 
1Kings15:14 Aye waire Asa oyo tiyatoolagho bifo bigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu emisambwa, obulamu bwe bwonabwona yali mwesigwa ye Musengwa Katonda." 
1Kings15:15 Yaata mu isinzizo ebintu lata we bye yeeyama okughaayo bibe ebya Musengwa Katonda, era ni mwene bye yeeyama okughaayo, ebya zaabu ni feeza." 
1Kings15:16 Asa kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya oyo ni Baasha kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, baalwanagananga mu ntalo mu kiseera kyonakyona eky'obufuzi bwaibwe." 
1Kings15:17 Kyabazinga Baasha owa Isiraeli yaalumba Buyudaaya. Yaazimba ekimante ekigumu okwezunguluza ekibuga Rama, ghalobe kubaagho ava mu Buyudaaya, waire ajaayo okutuuka ku kyabazinga waayo Asa." 
1Kings15:18 Agho Asa yaatoolayo feeza yeenayeena ni zaabu eyali asigaire mu iterekero ly'eisinzizo ni mu iterekero erirye nga kyabazinga, yaamugemya abagheereza be bamutwalire kyabazinga Benihadadi ow'e Siria, eyabanga mu Damasiko. Benihadadi oyo, nga ni mutabane wa Taburimmoni era mwidhukulu wa Hezironi. Kyabazinga Asa yaagheereza kyabazinga Benihadadi obukwenda obukoba buti:" 
1Kings15:19 “Ka tukole endagaano ey'enkolagana ey'aghalala, nga balata baife ye baakola. Bona eno, nkugheereiza ekirabo ekya feeza ni zaabu. Ja omenhegho endagaano yo ey'enkolagana ni kyabazinga Baasha owa Isiraeli, olwo abe ng'ali n'okutoola amagye ge mu kiketezo kyange.”" 
1Kings15:20 Agho Benihadadi yaaganha kyabazinga Asa bye yamukoba. Yaatuma abaduumizi b'eigye lye okulumba ebibuga bya Isiraeli, yaagema ebibuga bino: Iyoni, ni Dani, ni Abeli Bethi Maaka, ni Kinnerothi, n'ekiketezo kyonakyona ekya Nafutali." 
1Kings15:21 Kyabazinga Baasha bwe yawulira ebigwiregho, yaalekera agho okuzimba ekimante ekigumu okwezunguluza ekibuga Rama, yaaja yaaba e Tiruza." 
1Kings15:22 Agho kyabazinga Asa yaagha Abayudaaya boonaboona ekiragiro, aghazira okulekayo waire omulala ati, baaja baatoola e Rama amabaale n'emiti Baasha bye yali ali kuzimbisa. Asa yaabizimbisa ekimante ekigumu okwezunguluza ebibuga Mizipa era ni Geba eky'omu kiketezo kya Benjamini." 
1Kings15:23 Ebindi byonabyona Asa bye yakola eby'amaani, n'ebibuga bye yazimba, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya. Aye mu biseera eby'obukaire bwe, yalwala ebigere." 
1Kings15:24 Agho Asa oyo yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu badhaadha be abo, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi dhaadha we. Mutabane we Yehoshafati, yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Kings15:25 Agho mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga kyabazinga Asa n'afuga Buyudaaya, Nadabu mutabane wa Yeroboamu yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafugira entangama ya myaka ebiri." 
1Kings15:26 Yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda nga lata we bwe yakola n'ayonoona, era n'aleetera ni Isiraeli okwonoona." 
1Kings15:27 Agho Baasha mutabane wa Ahiya ow'omu kika kya Issakari, yaalya mu Nadabu oyo olukwe era yaamwitira e Gibbethoni eky'Abafilisiti, Nadabu oyo n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona kye baali bazingiiza okwezunguluza." 
1Kings15:28 Yamwita mu mwaka ogwokusatu ogwa kyabazinga Asa nga n'afuga Buyudaaya. Kale Baasha yaasikira Nadabu oyo ku bwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli. 
1Kings15:29 Era olwamala okufuuka kyabazinga ati, ng'atoolera kwita ba ndhu ya Yeroboamu boonaboona okubasaaniagho, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yayogera ng'abita mu mugheereza we omulanzi Ahiya ow'e Shilo." 
1Kings15:30 Ebyo byaligho olw'ebibi Yeroboamu bye yakola, n'aleetera Isiraeli okwonoona, era n'asungughaza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
1Kings15:31 Ebindi byonabyona Nadabu bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings15:32 Kyabazinga Asa ni kyabazinga Baasha owa Isiraeli, bombi baalwanagananga mu ntalo ebiseera byonabyona eby'obufuzi bwaibwe." 
1Kings15:33 Agho mu mwaka ogwokusatu ogwa kyabazinga Asa nga n'afuga Buyudaaya, Baasha mutabane wa Ahiya yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yoonayoona, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi abiri n'ena, ng'aba e Tiruza." 
1Kings15:34 Yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda nga Yeroboamu bye yakola, n'aleetera Isiraeli okwonoona." 
1Kings16:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ni Yehu mutabane wa Hanani, yaamugha obukwenda obw'okutwalira Baasha okumuvumirira, ati:" 
1Kings16:2 “Walinga ng'oli bw'agho otyo, naakugulumiza, naakufuula mukulembeze ow'abantu bange Abaisiraeli. Aye weena ogemye empisa dha Yeroboamu embi, waaleetera abantu bange Abaisiraeli okwonoona, naabasungughalira olw'ebibi byaibwe." 
1Kings16:3 Kale ni ndidha kusaanizaagho irala ab'endhu yo boonaboona, nga bwe nasaanizaagho irala ab'endhu ya Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati." 
1Kings16:4 Iwe Baasha, omuntu wo yeenayeena anaafiiranga mu kibuga, embwa dhiidha kumulyanga, n'oyo yeenayeena anaafiiranga mu nsiko enhonhi dhiidha kumulyanga.”" 
1Kings16:5 Ebindi byonabyona Baasha bye yakola eby'amaani, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings16:6 Agho Baasha yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa e Tiruza. Mutabane we Ela, yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Kings16:7 Mu butuufu Musengwa Katonda yayogera ng'abita mu mulanzi Yehu mutabane wa Hanani, yaavumirira Baasha n'ab'endhu ye, olw'ebibi byonabyona Baasha oyo bye yakola n'asungughaza Musengwa Katonda. Yasungughaza Musengwa Katonda ti lwa bibi bye yakola byonka nga Yeroboamu eyamusooka bwe yakola, aye n'olw'okwita ab'endhu ya Yeroboamu oyo boonaboona." 
1Kings16:8 Mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri n'omukaaga (26) ogwa Asa nga n'afuga Buyudaaya, Ela mutabane wa Baasha yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafugira entangama ya myaka ebiri mu Tiruza." 
1Kings16:9 Aye Zimuri, owundi ku bakungu be eyaduumiranga ekitundu ku bigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, yaamulyamu olukwe. Lwali lulala, Ela yaanhwa omwenge, yaatamiirira mu maka ga Aruza eyalabiriranga ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga e Tiruza" 
1Kings16:10 Zimuri yaingira, yaamufumita yaamwita. Agho Zimuri oyo yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga, mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri n'omusanvu (27) ogwa kyabazinga Asa nga n'afuga Buyudaaya." 
1Kings16:11 Zimuri olwamala okufuuka kyabazinga, nga yaakatyama ati ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, yaita ab'endhu ya Baasha boonaboona obutalekaagho naire omwana eyetebwa omulenzi, k'abe owuwe mwene, oba ow'ab'oku lulyo lwe, waire owa bakagwa be." 
1Kings16:12 Mu nsambo eyo, Zimuri yaazikiriza ab'endhu ya Baasha boonaboona, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yayogera ng'abita mu mulanzi Yehu." 
1Kings16:13 Ebyo byaligho, lwa kuba ebibi byonabyona Baasha ni mutabane we Ela bye baakola nga basinza ebitali Katonda, era ni bye baakola ebyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona, byasungughaza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
1Kings16:14 Ebindi byonabyona Ela bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings16:15 Mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri n'omusanvu (27) ogwa kyabazinga Asa nga n'afuga Buyudaaya, Zimuri yaafuuka kyabazinga, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya nnaku musanvu e Tiruza. Abaisirukale Abaisiraeli baali nga bazingiiza ekibuga Gibbethoni eky'Abafilisiti okukyezunguluza." 
1Kings16:16 Era ab'amagye abo bwe baawulira nga Zimuri yaliire mu kyabazinga olukwe yaamwita, ku lunaku lwene olwo boonaboona, baafuula Omuri omuduumizi w'eigye okuba kyabazinga wa Isiraeli." 
1Kings16:17 Kale Omuri oyo n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, baava e Gibbethoni, baaja baazingiza ekibuga Tiruza okukyezunguluza." 
1Kings16:18 Zimuri bwe yabona ng'ekibuga bakighambye, yaingira mu kifo eky'okwewogomamu eky'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Agho yaakunaania ku kisaagaati ekyo omuliro, ni mwene yeeyokeramu, yaafa." 
1Kings16:19 Yafa olw'ebibi bye, bye yakola eri Musengwa Katonda nga Yeroboamu bwe yakola, n'aleetera Isiraeli okwonoona. Zimuri oyo yakola nga Yeroboamu bwe yakola, yaasungughaza Musengwa Katonda olw'ebibi bye mwene bye yakola, era yaamusungughaza olw'okuleetera Isiraeli okwonoona." 
1Kings16:20 Ebindi byonabyona Zimuri bye yakola, omuli n'olukwe lwe yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings16:21 Agho Abaisiraeli beesalamu ebitundu bibiri: abandi nga benda Tibuni mutabane wa Ginathi ye babe bafuule kyabazinga, ate abandi nga benda Omuri." 
1Kings16:22 Abaayenda Omuri baasinza amaani bale abaayenda Tibuni mutabane wa Ginathi. Kale Tibuni yaafa, ate Omuri yaafuuka kyabazinga." 
1Kings16:23 Kale kyaba nti, mu mwaka ogwamakumi asatu n'omulala (31), ogwa kyabazinga Asa nga n'afuga Buyudaaya, Omuri yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi n'ebiri. Ku myaka egyo eikumi n'ebiri, omukaaga yaagifugira mu Tiruza." 
1Kings16:24 Yaagula ku Shemeri olusozi Samaria ebitundu kakaaga (6,000) ebya feeza, yaaluzimbaku ekibuga. Ekibuga ekyo kye yaluzimbaku yaakituuma eriina Samaria, ng'ajiira ku liina lya Shemeri eyali mwene lusozi olwo." 
1Kings16:25 Omuri oyo yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, yaayonoona okusinga n'abaamusooka boonaboona." 
1Kings16:26 Yaakolera irala nga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati bwe yakola, n'asungughaza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli era n'aleetera Abaisiraeli okwonoona nga basinza ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda." 
1Kings16:27 Ebindi byonabyona Omuri bye yakola eby'amaani, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings16:28 Agho yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu Samaria. Mutabane we Ahabu, yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Kings16:29 Mu mwaka ogwamakumi asatu n'omunaana (38) ogwa kyabazinga Asa nga n'afuga Buyudaaya, Ahabu mutabane wa Omuri yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafuga Isiraeli ng'ali mu Samaria okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi abiri n'ebiri." 
1Kings16:30 Ahabu oyo mutabane w'Omuri, yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, okusinga n'abaamusooka boonaboona." 
1Kings16:31 Eky'okukola ebibi nga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati bwe yakola tikyamumala ng'oti se kitono, aye yaataaku n'okubayiza Yezebeli, mughala wa kyabazinga Ethibaali ow'Abasidoni. Ahabu oyo era yaatuuka n'okuja okugheereza omusambwa Baali era n'okugusinza." 
1Kings16:32 Yaazimbira omusambwa ogwo eisabo mu Samaria, era munda mu isabo eryo yaaguzimbiramu alutaari." 
1Kings16:33 Ahabu era yaakola ekifaananie ky'omusambwa omukazi Ashera. Ahabu oyo yaakola ebisungughaza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, okusinga bakyabazinga boonaboona aba Isiraeli abaamusooka." 
1Kings16:34 Mu biseera bye yafugiramu, Hieli ow'e Betheli mwe yazimbira obuyaaka ekibuga Yeriko. Bwe yali ng'ataagho omusingi gw'ekibuga ekyo, yaafiirwa mutabane we omuberi Abiramu. Ate bweyali aghangamu endhigi dhaakyo, yaafiirwa mutabane we Segubu, eyali nga n'asembayo obuto. Ebyo byali bityo, okutuukiriza Musengwa Katonda bye yakoba ng'abita mu Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni." 
1Kings17:1 Agho Eliya Omutishube ow'e Tishube, eky'omu Gileadi, yaakoba kyabazinga Ahabu ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, Katonda oyo omulamu ye mpeereza, nti bwenebwene tighaidha kubangagho musulo waire amaadhi mu myaka gino, okutoolaku nga nkobye nti bibeegho.”" 
1Kings17:2 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Eliya ati: 
1Kings17:3 “Va ghano oje e buvandhuba, weegise okumpi n'akaiga Kerithi, e buvandhuba wa Yorudani." 
1Kings17:4 Mu kaiga ako mw'oidha okutoolanga amaadhi ag'okunhwa, era ndagiire amakoova gakuleeterenga eby'okulya.”" 
1Kings17:5 Kale Eliya yaakola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yamulagira. Yaaja yaaba okumpi n'akaiga Kerithi, e buvandhuba wa Yorudani." 
1Kings17:6 Amakoova gaamuleeteranga emere n'emamba enkyo n'eigulo, era yaanhwanga amaadhi mu kaiga ako." 
1Kings17:7 Bwe ghaabitaghooku ekiseera, akaiga kaakamiira olw'amaadhi obutagwa mu nsi eyo." 
1Kings17:8 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Eliya ati: 
1Kings17:9 “Situka oje e Zarefathi eky'omu Sidoni, obe eyo. Ndagiire namwandu okukughanga eby'okulya eyo.”" 
1Kings17:10 Agho Eliya yaasituka, yaaja e Zarefathi. Bwe yatuuka ku mulyango ogw'ekibuga, yaayagaanagho namwandu ng'ali kulondereza obuku. Yaamweta, yaamukoba ati: “Nkweghembye ndeetera ku maadhi nhweku.”" 
1Kings17:11 Omukazi bweyali ng'ali kuja okugaleeta, Eliya yaamweta yaamukoba ati: “Nkweghembye ndeeteraayooku ni ku kamere.”" 
1Kings17:12 Omukazi yaakoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda wo omulamu, nti bwenebwene nzira mere, okutoolaku omuganda ogw'obuwunga bw'engaano mu kaibo, n'otuzigo mu kadoome. Era mpegaano ndi kulondereza ku buku, nje eka, neefumbire akamere ako, nze n'omwana wange tukalye, memale tumale tufe endhala.”" 
1Kings17:13 Agho Eliya yaamukoba ati: “Otatya. Ja okole nga bw'okobye. Aye sooka onfumbireku akamere okandeetere, memale weefumbire iwe n'omwana wo" 
1Kings17:14 kuba Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Obuwunga obw'engaano mu kaibo ako tibuja kuwaagho, n'akadoome ak'omuzigo tikaja kuwaamu, okutuusa ng'olunaku Musengwa Katonda lw'anaagwisa amaadhi ku nsi lutuuse.’ ”" 
1Kings17:15 Omukazi yaaja yaakola nga Eliya bwe yamukoba. Agho omukazi oyo, n'Eliya, ghalala n'ab'endhu y'omukazi oyo, baaba n'emere ey'okulya, okumala enaku kamaala." 
1Kings17:16 Obuwunga obw'engaano tibwawa mu kaibo, n'akadoome tikaawaamu muzigo, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba ng'abita mu Eliya." 
1Kings17:17 Nga ghabiseeghooku entangama, omwana w'omukazi oyo mwene ndhu, yaalwala. Obulwaire bwamutaamirira, yaawaamu n'akagheera." 
1Kings17:18 Agho omukazi yaakoba Eliya ati: “Ondiku nzigu yaaki, iwe omuntu wa Katonda? Waidha ghano kwidhusa Katonda bibi byange, na kwitisa mwana wange?”" 
1Kings17:19 Eliya yaamukoba ati: “Leeta omwana wo.” Agho yaamumutoola mu kifuba, yaamubbeeda yaamutwala mu kisenge ekya ghaigulu mu kalina, mwene ye yasulanga, era yaamulambaaza ku buliri bwe bwene." 
1Kings17:20 Yeeghemba Musengwa Katonda ng'akoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, obwo otuusiisa akabi ni ku namwandu ono ansuza, waita omwana we?”" 
1Kings17:21 Agho yeegololera ku mwana emikuzi esatu, yeeghemba Musengwa Katonda ng'akoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, ganha omwana ono airemu obulamu.”" 
1Kings17:22 Musengwa Katonda yaikiriza Eliya kye yamusaba, omwana yaira engulu, yaalamuka." 
1Kings17:23 Agho Eliya yaagema omwana yaamutoola mu kisenge ekya ghaigulu mu kalina, yaamutwala yaamugha inhina, ng'akoba ati: “Omwana wo wuuno mulamu.”" 
1Kings17:24 Agho omukazi yaakoba Eliya ati: “Mpegaano mmanhiire irala ng'oli muntu wa Katonda, era nga bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda ky'ayogera ng'abita mu iwe kiba kya mazima.”" 
1Kings18:1 Nga ghabiseeghooku ekiseera, Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Eliya mu mwaka ogwokusatu ogw'endoboozi, ati: “Ja weeyoleke y'Ahabu. Ndidha kugwisa amaadhi ku nsi.”" 
1Kings18:2 Kale Eliya yaaja yeeyoleka y'Ahabu. Olwo endhala yali eri kuluma inho mu Samaria. 
1Kings18:3 Kale Ahabu yaayeta Obadia eyali nga n'alabirira ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Obadia oyo yali ng'ata inho mu Musengwa Katonda ekitiisa," 
1Kings18:4 era Yezebeli bwe yaita abalanzi ba Musengwa Katonda, Obadia oyo yaatwala abalanzi kikumi yaabagisa mu mpuku mu bikunsu bibiri eby'abantu ataanu ataanu. Era yaabafuniranga emere n'amaadhi." 
1Kings18:5 Agho Ahabu yaakoba Obadia ati: “Ja ku nsulo edh'amaadhi dhoonadhoona ni mu biiko. Oba katyo tunaayagaanayo eisubi, twawonia embalaasi n'enhumbu okufa, olwo tulobe kubaaku nsolo dhe tufiirwa.”" 
1Kings18:6 Kale baisania bombi ekitundu ky'ensi buli muntu ky'anaalambuula. Ahabu yaagema ku luuyi olundi, ni Obadia yaagema ku lundi." 
1Kings18:7 Obadia bweyali mu ngira ng'ali kutambula, yaja okubona ng'ayagaanana n'Eliya. Obadia yaamutegeera nga n'Eliya, agho yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka, ng'akoba ati: “Bwenebwene niiwe musengwa wange Eliya?”" 
1Kings18:8 Eliya yaamwiramu ati: “Ninze. Ja okobere musengwa wo kyabazinga oti ndi ghano.” 
1Kings18:9 Obadia yaakoba ati: “Kibi ki kye nakola memale oyende okumpaayo ye kyabazinga Ahabu andhite? 
1Kings18:10 Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda wo, nti ezirayo ighanga waire obwakyabazinga, musengwa wange kyabazinga y'ataatumya kukunooniayo. Era bwe baakobanga bati, ‘Ghano aziragho’, ng'alayiza obwakyabazinga obwo oba eighanga eryo, okukakasa nga tibakubonangaku." 
1Kings18:11 Mpegaano iwe oli kunkoba nje nkobere musengwa wange nti oli ghano. 
1Kings18:12 Aye naaba naakava gh'oli nti, ng'omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gukutwala ye ntaidhi! Agho bwe nnaatuuka ni nkobera Ahabu, aye ate n'atasobola kukubona, aidha kundhita, ate nga nze omugheereza wo ndhisiisa ekitiisa mu Musengwa Katonda okuviira irala mu buto bwange." 
1Kings18:13 Musengwa Katonda wange, tibaakukobera kye nakola, Yezebeli bweyali ng'ali kwita abalanzi ba Musengwa Katonda? Natwala abantu kikumi ku balanzi ba Musengwa Katonda abo, naabagisa mu mpuku mu bikunsu bya bantu makumi ataanu ataanu, era naabafuniranga emere n'amaadhi." 
1Kings18:14 Kale mpegaano iwe butya bw'onkoba nje nkobere musengwa wange nti oli ghano? Aidha kundhita bwite.” 
1Kings18:15 Eliya yaakoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu Afuga Amagye, ye mpeereza, nti bwenebwene ndidha kweyolekera kyabazinga olwaleero.”" 
1Kings18:16 Kale Obadia yaaja ye Ahabu, yaamukobera. Era Ahabu yaaja okubona Eliya." 
1Kings18:17 Ahabu bwe yabona Eliya, yaamukoba ati: “Bwenebwene obwo niiwe otabulatabula Isiraeli?”" 
1Kings18:18 Eliya yaamwiramu ati: “Nze ti ninze atabulatabula Isiraeli, aye niiwe n'ab'endhu ya lata wo, kuba mwava ku biragiro bya Musengwa Katonda mwasinza emisambwa Baali." 
1Kings18:19 Mpegaano ni, soloza Abaisiraeli boonaboona, baidhe twagaanane ku lusozi Karumeli, ghalala n'abalanzi ba Baali ebikumi ebina n'ataanu (450) era n'abalanzi ebikumi ebina (400) ab'omusambwa omukazi Ashera, abalya ku kiiwulo kya Yezebeli.”" 
1Kings18:20 Kale Ahabu yaayetesa Abaisiraeli boonaboona, beesololeza ku lusozi Karumeli ghalala n'abalanzi boonaboona." 
1Kings18:21 Agho Eliya yaaja eri abantu abo boonaboona, yaabakoba ati: “Mulituusa li okuyuugira eno n'ere nga timusalagho? Oba nga Musengwa Katonda ni Katonda, oyo ye mube musinze. Aye oba nga Baali ni Katonda, kale musinze oyo.” Aye abantu baaloba kumwiramu kibono waire ekirala." 
1Kings18:22 Agho Eliya yaakoba abantu ati: “Ninze zenka omulanzi wa Musengwa Katonda akaasigairegho, aye abalanzi ba Baali bali ebikumi bina n'ataanu." 
1Kings18:23 Kale batughe ente enume ibiri. Abalanzi ba Baali balondeku enaaba eyaibwe, bagisalesalemu bagite ku nku, aye batagikunaaniaku muliro. Zeena ndidha kutegeka ente ere eyindi, ngite ku nku nga tigikunaaniizaaku muliro." 
1Kings18:24 Olwo imwe mwidha kweta omusambwa gwaimwe, ate nze ndhete Musengwa Katonda. Kale oyo anaasindika omuliro mu kuvugira, nga ni Katonda.” Abantu boonaboona bairamu bati: “Ky'okobye kirungi.”" 
1Kings18:25 Agho Eliya yaakoba abalanzi ba Baali ati: “Mwerondereku ente ndala era niimwe mube musooke okubaaga, kuba muli kamaala, memale mwete omusambwa gwaimwe. Aye mutagikunaaniaku muliro.”" 
1Kings18:26 Abalanzi ba Baali baatwala ente ye baabagha, baagitegeka. Agho baayeta omusambwa baali okuva ku nkyo okutuuka mu kasana ghagati, nga bakoba bati: “Wo Baali, wulira otwiremu.” Aye ghaaloba kubaagho mamiro gawulikika, waire okubaagho airamu. Baatuumiratuumira gh'alutaari ye baazimba." 
1Kings18:27 Mu kasana ghagati Eliya yaabakiina, ng'akoba ati: “Mwete inho, kuba oyo katonda mwene. Bw'ataba nga ghaligho ky'ali kulowooza einho, asobola okuba ng'ajiire kwetereezaaku, oba ng'aliku gh'ajiire mu lugendo. Oba katyo asobola okuba ng'atendwike, nga kyetaagisa okumuzuusa.”" 
1Kings18:28 Abalanzi ba Baali baayeta inho, era beesala n'empiima n'ebyambe, nga bweyali empisa yaibwe, okutuusa omusaayi okukuuluula." 
1Kings18:29 Ekiseera eky'omu kasana ghagati bwe kyabita, beeyongera okweyasa okutuuka ku kiseera ekyeigulo eky'okughaayo emisengo. Aye ghaaloba kubaagho mamiro gawulikika, waire okubaagho abairamu, oba abafaaku." 
1Kings18:30 Agho Eliya yaakoba abantu boonaboona ati: “Museete ghano ghe ndi.” Abantu boonaboona baaseeta gh'ali. Yaazimba buyaaka alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda eyali emenheibwagho. 
1Kings18:31 Yaatoola amabaale ikumi n'abiri, ng'ajiira ku bungi obw'ebika eby'abantu ebisimuka mu Yakobo. Yakobo oyo, Musengwa Katonda ye yakoba ati: “Oidha kwetebwanga Isiraeli.”" 
1Kings18:32 Amabaale ago yaagazimbisa alutaari ey'okusinzizangaku Musengwa Katonda. Yaagisimaku olukonko okugyezunguluza, nga lujaamu lita ng'oti ikumi na ina edh'amaadhi." 
1Kings18:33 Agho yaatindirira enku ku alutaari, yaasalasala mu nte, yaagita ku nku edho. Yaakoba ati: “Mwidhuze ensugha ina amaadhi, mumale mugafuke ku kigheebwayo ekyo ekyokebwa ni ku nku.” Baakola batyo." 
1Kings18:34 Yaakoba ati: “Kabiri mukole mutyo omukuzi ogwokubiri.” Baakola batyo omukuzi ogwokubiri. Era yaakoba ati: “Kabiri mukole mutyo n'omukuzi ogwokusatu.” Era baakola batyo n'omukuzi ogwokusatu. 
1Kings18:35 Amaadhi gaakuuluula okwezungulula alutaari, gaidhuza n'olukonko." 
1Kings18:36 Ekiseera eky'okughaayo ekigheebwayo ekyeigulo bwe kyatuuka, Eliya omulanzi yaaseeta kumpi ni alutaari, yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Aburahamu, owa Isaaka, era owa Yakobo, olwaleero ka bakimanhe nga niiwe Katonda mu Isiraeli, era nga nze ndi mugheereza wo, era nga bino byonabyona mbikoze nga iwe omaze kundagira." 
1Kings18:37 Wo Musengwa Katonda ndhiraamu, nkweghembye ndhiraamu, abantu bano baghange okumanha nga iwe Musengwa Katonda, niiwe Katonda, era ng'okyusiisa emyoyo gyaibwe okugiiza y'oli.”" 
1Kings18:38 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaasindika omuliro gwaika, gwayokya ekigheebwayo ekyo n'enku n'amabaale n'eitaka, era gwakaza amaadhi agaali mu lukokonko." 
1Kings18:39 Abantu boonaboona bwe baabona ekyo, baakuba amakiryaivu era baakutama n'ebyeni bya tuuka ku itaka. Baakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda ni Katonda! Musengwa Katonda ni Katonda!”" 
1Kings18:40 Agho Eliya yaabakoba ati: “Mugeme abalanzi ba Baali, ghalobe kubaagho alumukagho waire omulala.” Kale baabagema. Eliya yaabaserengesa ku kaiga Kishoni, yaabaitira eyo." 
1Kings18:41 Agho Eliya yaakoba kyabazinga Ahabu ati: “Ja olye, onhwe. Ndi kuwulira okuwuuma okw'amaadhi amangi agatoonha.”" 
1Kings18:42 Kale Ahabu yaaja okulya n'okunhwa. Ate Eliya yaaja ku ntwiko y'olusozi Karumeli, yaakutama ku itaka, yaata omutwe gwe mu bikiryaivu bye." 
1Kings18:43 Yaakoba omugheereza we ati: “Ja ghaigulu olinge ku luuyi olw'enhandha.” Omugheereza yaaja ghaigulu yaalingayo. Yaakoba ati: “Ezirayo kintu.” Eliya yaamukoba ati: “Irayo emikuzi musanvu.” 
1Kings18:44 Ku mukuzi ogwomusanvu, omugheereza yaakoba ati: “Mboine, akale akatono akaaga ng'oti mukono gwa muntu, kali kusituka nga kava ku nhandha.” Eliya yaakoba omugheereza we ati: “Ja okobe kyabazinga Ahabu oti, ‘Tegeka ekigaali kyo eky'omu lutalo, oireyo eka ng'amaadhi gakaali kukulobera.’ ”" 
1Kings18:45 Mu kaseera katono, eigulu lyazibirira n'ebire, empewo yaatoolera okukunta, amaadhi gaagwa ebitaloodheka. Ahabu yaaniina mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo, yaavuga yaaja e Yezireeli." 
1Kings18:46 Agho amaani ga Musengwa Katonda gaidha ku Eliya, yaanhweza ekivaalo kye mu nkende, yaalumuka yeesooka Ahabu aghaingirirwa e Yezireeli." 
1Kings19:1 Agho Kyabazinga Ahabu yaakobera mukazi we Yezebeli byonabyona Eliya bye yakola, era nga bwe yaita abalanzi ba Baali boonaboona." 
1Kings19:2 Agho Yezebeli yaatuma omukwenda y'Eliya, ng'akoba ati: “Emisambwa gigwananga gyambonereza n'obukambwe, bwe bunaatuuka enkyo mu kiseera nga kino nga nkaali kukwita, ng'oti niiwe bwe waise abantu abo.”" 
1Kings19:3 Agho Eliya yaatya, yaasituka yaalumuka okuwonia obulamu bwe. Yaaja e Beerisheba eky'omu Buyudaaya. Yaaleka eyo omugheereza we," 
1Kings19:4 aye mwene yaatambula mu irungu olugendo lwa lunaku lulamba, yaaja yaatyama ghansi gh'omuti ogw'ekyeyo, yaasaba afe ng'akoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda bye mboine bimala! Twala obulamu bwange mpegaano, kuba ghazira kye nsinga badhaadha bange!”" 
1Kings19:5 Yaalambaala ghansi gh'omuti ogwo ogw'ekyeyo, endoolo dhaamugema. Yaja okubona nga malaika amusiinhaku, ng'amukoba ati: “Situka olye.”" 
1Kings19:6 Eliya yaja okulinga ati, ng'abona agho gha mutwe gwe omugaati ogufumbiibwa ku manda, era n'ekidoome eky'amaadhi. Yaalya era yaanhwa, memale kabiri yairayo okulambaala." 
1Kings19:7 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaidha omukuzi ogwokubiri, yaamusiinhaku ng'akoba ati: “Situka olye, tomanha lugendo bwe lukulemerera ng'ate lukaali luleeyi.”" 
1Kings19:8 Eliya yaasituka yaalya era yaanhwa. Eby'okulya ebyo byamugha amaani, yaatambula enaku amakumi ana (40) omusana n'obwire, yaatuuka ku Sinai olusozi lwa Katonda." 
1Kings19:9 Eliya bwe yatuuka ku lusozi Sinai, yaayagaana empuku, yaasula omwo. Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera naye, ng'amubuuza ati: “Oli kukola ki ghano?”" 
1Kings19:10 Eliya yairamu ati: “Enkikidi engemye ku lulwo, iwe Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, kuba Abaisiraeli baamenha endagaano ye wakola nabo. Baamenhagho alutaari dho, era baita abalanzi bo. Nze zenka, ninze nsigairegho, ate zeena bali kwenda kundhita.”" 
1Kings19:11 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Fuluma, oje oyemerere ku lusozi mu maiso gange.” Agho Musengwa Katonda yaabitagho, kiwunga ow'amaani yaayuzayuza ensozi era yaamenhamenha embaale emberi wa Musengwa Katonda. Aye Musengwa Katonda nga tali mu kiwunga oyo. Kiwunga bwe yamala okubita, ghaabaagho musisi, yaatengeesa ensi. Aye Musengwa Katonda nga tali mu musisi oyo." 
1Kings19:12 Musisi bwe yalekera, ghaabaagho omuliro. Aye Musengwa Katonda nga tali mu muliro ogwo. Omuliro bwe gwavaagho, ghaabaagho akamiro akatono akaghegheevu." 
1Kings19:13 Eliya bwe yawulira akamiro ako, yeeghemba mu maiso ekivaalo kye, yaafuluma mu mpuku, yaayemerera ku mulyango gwayo. Olwo yaawulira amamiro nga gamukoba gati: “Eliya oli kukola ki ghano?”" 
1Kings19:14 Eliya yairamu ati: “Enkikidi engemye ku lulwo, iwe Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, kuba Abaisiraeli baamenha endagaano ye wakola nabo. Baamenhagho alutaari dho, era baita abalanzi bo. Nze zenka, ninze nsigairegho, ate zeena bali kwenda kundhita.”" 
1Kings19:15 Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Irayo mu irungu ery'e Damasiko. Bw'onaatuukayo, oidha kusiiga Hazaeli omuzigo afuuke kyabazinga wa Siria," 
1Kings19:16 osiige ni Yehu mutabane wa Nimushi abe kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era osiige ni Elisha mutabane wa Shafati ow'e Abeli Mehola abe omulanzi mu kifo kyo." 
1Kings19:17 Kale omuntu yeenayeena anaawonanga okwitibwa Hazaeli, aidha kwitibwanga Yehu. Ate anaawonanga okwitibwa Yehu, aidha kwitibwanga Elisha." 
1Kings19:18 “Aye ndirekagho abantu kasanvu (7,000) mu Isiraeli, abo boonaboona abataakubiranga Baali makiryaivu era abataamunhwegeranga.”" 
1Kings19:19 Kale Eliya yaaja, yaayagaana Elisha mutabane wa Shafati ng'ali kulimisa ente yali n'emiyimbo gy'ente ikumi n'ebiri agho, nga mu kiseera ekyo yali ali kulimisa omuyimbo ogweikumi n'ebiri. Agho Eliya yaabita gh'ali, yaamusuulaku ekivaalo kye." 
1Kings19:20 Elisha yaaleka agho ente, yaalumuka embiro okunonereza Eliya, yaamukoba ati: “Ka mmale okunhwegera lata ni maama, memale ndidhe nje n'iwe.” Eliya yaamukoba ati: “Irayo, nze nkulobeire?”" 
1Kings19:21 Agho yaasooka yaaleka eby'okunonereza Eliya, yairayo, yaagema ente dhe yali ali kulimisa, yaadhiita. Yaafumba emamba yaadho ng'akozesa ebikoligo byadho ng'enku, yaagigabula abantu baalya. Ebyo bwe byawa, Elisha yaaja yaabanga ewa Eliya ng'amugheereza." 
1Kings20:1 Benihadadi, kyabazinga wa Siria, yaasoloza eigye lye lyonalyona, era ni bakyabazinga abandi amakumi asatu na babiri baamweyimbaku, nga bali n'embalaasi n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo. Agho yaaja, yaazingiza Samaria okukyezunguluza era yaakirwanisa." 
1Kings20:2 Yaatuma abakwenda mu kibuga ye kyabazinga Ahabu owa Isiraeli, okumukoba ati:" 
1Kings20:3 “Feeza ni zaabu wo, byange, era ni bakazi bo n'abaana bo abasinga bulungi, bange.”" 
1Kings20:4 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yairamu ati: “N'agh'agho musengwa wange kyabazinga, nze ndi wuwo ni byonabyona bye ndi nabyo, nga bw'okobye.”" 
1Kings20:5 Nga ghabiseeghooku akaseera, abakwenda kabiri bairayo ye kyabazinga Ahabu, baakoba bati: “Benihadadi ali kukoba ati, ‘Natuma abakwenda y'oli, nga nkukoba ompeereze feeza wo ni zaabu wo, ni bakazi bo, n'abaana bo." 
1Kings20:6 Aye enkyo, mu kiseera ng'oti ni kino, ndidha kukusindikira abakungu bange, baidhe baagaaze mu ndhu yo ni mu ndhu dh'abakungu bo. Era kiisi ekinaabasanhusa kye banaagemangaku, baidha kukitwala.’ ”" 
1Kings20:7 Agho kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaayeta abakulembeze boonaboona mu ighanga, yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene mugwaine mukimanhe nti omusaadha ono ali kutusonsoonia, kuba yansindikira abakwenda mbu mmughe abakazi bange, n'abaana bange, ni feeza wange, ni zaabu wange. Era tyamulobera naire.”" 
1Kings20:8 Abakulembeze boonaboona era n'abantu boonaboona bairamu bati: “Otawulirisa ebyo, era otaganha naire.”" 
1Kings20:9 Agho Ahabu yaakoba abakwenda ba Benihadadi ati: “Mukobe musengwa wange kyabazinga muti, nze omugheereza we ndidha kukola bire byonabyona bye yasooka okunkoba. Aye kino tighanga kukikola.” Abakwenda baagolola, baatwalira Benihadadi obukwenda obwo." 
1Kings20:10 Agho Benihadadi yaamusindikira obukwenda, ng'akoba ati: “Ndidha kuleeta abasaadha bange bazikirize Samaria, bakifuule ng'oti nkungu bukungu, ate era enkungu eyo erobe na kubabuna buli mulala okuyoolaku omuganda. Ekyo bwe ntaakituukirize, emisambwa gimbonerezanga n'obukambwe.”" 
1Kings20:11 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaamwiramu ati: “Mumukobe muti, ‘Ole agemye eby'okulwanisa okuja mu lutalo, tagwaine kwesuutiriza ng'oti n'ole amaze okubiisa ghansi ng'alughangwire.’ ”" 
1Kings20:12 Benihadadi bwe yaawulira obukwenda obwo ng'ali kunhwa mu ntindi ghalala ni bakyabazinga bale abaamweyimbaku, yaalagira abasaadha be ati: “Mwemerere mu bifo byaimwe!” Baayemerera mu bifo byaibwe nga beetegeike okulumba ekibuga." 
1Kings20:13 Mu kiseera ekyo ghaabaagho omulanzi eyaja eri Ahabu kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Oli kubona eigye eryo lyonalyona eikologho? Ndidha kulita mu ngalo dho olwaleero, memale omanhe nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.’ ”" 
1Kings20:14 Ahabu yaabuuza ati: “Ni baani abanaalirumba?” Omulanzi yairamu ati: “Abaisuka, abagheereza ab'abafuzi ab'omu biketezo, n'abanaalirumba.” Kyabazinga yaabuuza ati: “Naani anaasooka okulumba?” Omulanzi yairamu ati: “Niiwe.”" 
1Kings20:15 Agho kyabazinga Ahabu yaabala abaisuka abagheereza ab'abafuzi ab'omu biketezo, baaba nga baghera ebikumi bibiri n'asatu na babiri (232). Ng'amaze ekyo, yaabala eigye lyonalyona era Isiraeli lyaba nga ligheramu abantu kasanvu (7,000)." 
1Kings20:16 Baalumba mu kasana ghagati, nga Benihadadi ni bakyabazinga amakumi asatu n'ababiri abaidha okumuyambaku mu lutalo, nga bali mu ntindi bali bwa kunhwa kutamiira!" 
1Kings20:17 Abaisuka abagheereza ab'abafuzi ab'omu biketezo, n'abaasooka okulumba. Benihadadi yaatuma abakeesi, baamukobera bati ghaligho abalwani abaviire mu Samaria." 
1Kings20:18 Yaalagira ati: “Bwe baba nga baidhie lwa miraala, mubageme mubaleete nga balamu, ni bwe banaaba nga baidhie kulwana, era mubageme mubaleete nga balamu.”" 
1Kings20:19 Kale abaisuka abagheereza ab'abafuzi ab'omu biketezo baafuluma ekibuga, n'eigye lyabavaaku einhuma." 
1Kings20:20 Era buli muntu ku beene, yaita omuntu ye yalwana naye. Abasiria baalumuka, era Abaisiraeli baababingirira. Aye Benihadadi kyabazinga wa Siria yaawona ng'alumukira ku mbalaasi, ghalala n'ab'eigye lye ab'oku mbalaasi." 
1Kings20:21 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaalwana olutalo, yaanhaga embalaasi n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, era yaita Abasiria kamaala inho." 
1Kings20:22 Agho omulanzi ole yaaja ye kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, yaamukoba ati: “Ja weenhweze era weetegereze bukalamu ky'onaakola, kuba omwaka bwe gunaaba nga gwinhama, kyabazinga wa Siria aidha kwira akulumbe.”" 
1Kings20:23 Agho abakungu ba kyabazinga wa Siria baamukoba bati: “Emisambwa gy'Abaisiraeli abo misambwa gya ku nsozi, kye baava ni batusinga amaani. Aye ka tulwane nabo ku museetwe, olwo bwenebwene twidha kubasinga amaani." 
1Kings20:24 Era kino ky'obe okole: toola bakyabazinga bale, buli mulala mu kifo ky'obaire omutairemu, mu kifo kyaibwe oteemu abaduumizi ab'amagye." 
1Kings20:25 Era bala, ogheze eigye eryagayaga ni lire lye wafiirwa: aghaali embalaasi oizeegho embalaasi, n'aghaali ekigaali eky'omu lutalo oizeegho ekigaali eky'omu lutalo. Memale olwo tulwane nabo ku museetwe, bwenebwene tituulobe kubasinga maani.” Kyabazinga Benihadadi yaikiriza amagezi ge baamugha, era yaakola nga bwe baamukoba." 
1Kings20:26 Omwaka bwe gwali nga guli kwinhama, yaasoloza Abasiria, yaaja nabo mu Afeki okulwanisa Abaisiraeli." 
1Kings20:27 N'Abaisiraeli boona baasolozebwa, baagheebwa ebikozesebwa, baaja okulwana n'Abasiria abo. Abaisiraeli baasimba weema dhaibwe nga balinzagainia nabo, nga bali ng'oti bwa bughaso bwa mbuzi bubiri obutono, aye Abasiria nga babunie woonawoona." 
1Kings20:28 Agho omuntu wa Katonda yaaja yaakoba Ahabu kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Olw'okuba Abasiria baakoba bati nze Musengwa Katonda ndi musambwa gwa ku nsozi ogutali gwa mu biiko, ndidha kukuta mu ngalo olukunkumuli olwo lwonalwona olw'abalwani, memale mumanhe nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.’ ”" 
1Kings20:29 Abasiria n'Abaisiraeli baasimba weema dhaibwe nga badhirinzagainia okumala enaku musanvu. Ku lunaku olwomusanvu baatoolera okulwana. Mu lunaku lulala, Abaisiraeli baita mu igye lya Siria abaisirukale ab'oku bigere emitwalo ikumi (100,000)." 
1Kings20:30 Abaawonagho baalumukira mu kibuga Afeki. Eyo ate ekimante eky'oku kibuga kyagwa ku baisirukale emitwalo ebiri na kasanvu (27,000). Benihadadi yeena yaalumuka, yaaja mu kibuga, yeegisa mu kisenge eky'omunda." 
1Kings20:31 Abakungu be baamukoba bati: “Twawulira tuti bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli baba ba kisa. Tukusaba otuganhe twesibe ekutiya mu nkende n'emigugha mu nkoto, tuje eri kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, tomanha bw'awonia bulamu bwo.”" 
1Kings20:32 Kale beesiba ekutiya mu nkende n'emigugha mu nkoto, baaja eri kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, baakoba bati: “Omugheereza wo Benihadadi ali kukoba ati, ‘Nkweghemba ndekera obulamu bwange.’ ” Ahabu yaabuuza ati: “Akaali mulamu? Oyo muganda wange.”" 
1Kings20:33 Abasaadha abo baali nga bali kwekalirisa inho Ahabu oyo ky'ayogera. Kale bwe yakoba ati: “Oyo muganda wange,” amangu ago beenhuka ku ekyo, baakoba bati: “Yii, muganda wo Benihadadi.” Ahabu yaakoba ati: “Muje mumuleete.” Benihadadi yaidha ye Ahabu. Ahabu oyo yaamuniinisa mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo." 
1Kings20:34 Agho Benihadadi yaakoba Ahabu ati: “Ebibuga lata wange bye yanhaga ku lata wo, nze ndidha kubikwiriza. Era oidha kuba wa idembe okwezimbira obutale mu Damasiko, nga lata wange bwe yeezimbira mu Samaria.” Ahabu yaamukoba ati: “Ku kakalu ako, ndidha kukuleka oje.” Agho yaakola naye endagaano, yaamuleka yaaja." 
1Kings20:35 Agho omusaadha mulala ku balanzi, nga Musengwa Katonda n'amulagiire, yaakoba mwine ati: “Nkweghembye nkuba.” Aye mwine yaaloba." 
1Kings20:36 Agho yaamukoba ati: “Nga bw'odheemeire ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda, bw'onaaba nga waakava ghe ndi, empologoma eidha kukwita.” Era olwali okuva oyo ghe yali ati, empologoma yaamwita." 
1Kings20:37 Agho omulanzi oyo yaayagaanana n'omusaadha owundi, yaamukoba ati: “Nkweghembye nkuba.” Omusaadha yaamukuba yaamunoza, yaamutaaku n'eibwa." 
1Kings20:38 Agho omulanzi oyo yeesiba ekighero mu maiso okwefuusafuusa, yaaja yaateega kyabazinga Ahabu ku ngira." 
1Kings20:39 Kyabazinga bweyali ng'ali kubitagho, omulanzi oyo yaamweta ng'akoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, nze omugheereza wo bwe nali nga ndi kulwana mu lutalo, omwisirukale mulala yaava ere yandeetera omusaadha, era yankoba ati, ‘Kuuma omusaadha ono. Aye bwe kalikutanda n'akweibaku, obulamu bwo bw'olisasulamu obubwe, oba olirigha ebitundu bya feeza lukumi (1,000).’" 
1Kings20:40 Kale, nze omugheereza wo bwe nali nga ndi kukola ebintu kamaala eno n'ere, omusaadha yeiba.” Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaamukoba ati: “Omusango n'iwe mwene ogwesaliire.”" 
1Kings20:41 Agho omulanzi yeetoola mangu ekighero mu maiso. Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli bwe yamubona, yaamutegeera nga n'omulala ku balanzi." 
1Kings20:42 Omulanzi yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Nga bwe walekula omusaadha ye nalagira okwita, n'omuleka n'aja, obulamu bwo bw'oidha okusasuzaamu obubwe, n'abantu bo b'oidha okusasuzaamu ababe.’ ”" 
1Kings20:43 Agho kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yairayo ewuwe e Samaria nga yeenhiinkaire era nga mweraliikirivu. 
1Kings21:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, ghaabaagho omusaadha Omuyezireeli ye baayetanga Nabothi, eyali n'eisamba ly'emizabbibu e Yezireeli okumpi n'ekisaagaati ky'Ahabu kyabazinga w'e Samaria." 
1Kings21:2 Agho Ahabu yaakoba Nabothi ati: “Mpa eisamba lyo ery'emizabbibu. Nga bwe liri okumpi n'ekisaagaati kyange, nhenda ndifuulemu enimiro yange ey'eiva. Ndidha kukughaamu eisamba erindi ery'emizabbibu erisingagho obulungi. Oba, bw'onaaba ng'oyenze, ndidha kukusasulamu omughendo gw'empiiya ogulijaamu.”" 
1Kings21:3 Aye Nabothi yaakoba Ahabu ati: “Musengwa Katonda agwananga yaaloba kundeka ni nkugha omugabo ogw'ensikirano ogwagheebwa badhaadha bange.” 
1Kings21:4 Ahabu yairayo ewuwe nga yeenhiinkaire era nga musungughavu olw'ebibono Nabothi ow'e Yezireeli bye yamukoba ati: “Tiidha kukugha mugabo gwa nsikirano ogwagheebwa badhaadha bange.” Ahabu oyo yaalambaala ku buliri bwe, yaalinga n'ere, era yaaloba n'okulya emere." 
1Kings21:5 Mukazi we Yezebeli yaidha y'ali, yaamubuuza ati: “Kiki ekikunakughaiza obwaga agho, n'otuuka n'obutalya mere?”" 
1Kings21:6 Ahabu yairamu ati: “Nkobye Nabothi ow'e Yezireeli nti, ‘Mpa eisamba lyo ery'emizabbibu ndigule. Oba, bw'onaaba oyenze, ndidha kukughaamu eisamba erindi ery'emizabbibu.’ Aye andhizeemu ati, ‘Tiidha kukugha isamba lyange lya mizabbibu.’ ”" 
1Kings21:7 Mukazi we Yezebeli yaamwiramu ati: “Ti niiwe ofuga Isiraeli? Situka olye emere, era omwoyo ka gukwike. Nze ndidha kukugha eisamba ly'emizabbibu erya Nabothi ow'e Yezireeli.”" 
1Kings21:8 Agho Yezebeli yaaghandiika embaluwa mu liina lya Ahabu, yaadhisibaku akamanhiso ka Ahabu oyo, yaadhigheereza abakulembeze n'abakungu ab'omu kibuga Nabothi mw'aba." 
1Kings21:9 Yaaghandiika mu mbaluwa edho ati: “Mulangirire olunaku olw'okusiiba, mwete abantu beesoloze, era mute Nabothi mu kifo eky'emberi eky'ekitiibwa." 
1Kings21:10 Olwo muleete mu maiso ge abantu babiri abazira kye bagasa, bamulumirize bati, ‘Wavuma Katonda era waavuma ni kyabazinga.’ Memale olwo mumutoolegho, mumutwale mumukube amabaale afe.”" 
1Kings21:11 Agho abantu b'omu kibuga Yezireeli, abakulembeze n'abakungu, baakola nga Yezebeli bwe yabalagira mu mbaluwa dhe yabagheereza." 
1Kings21:12 Baalangirira olunaku olw'okusiiba, baayeta abantu beesoloza, era baata Nabothi mu kifo eky'emberi eky'ekitiibwa." 
1Kings21:13 Abantu babiri abazira kye bagasa baidha baatyama mu maiso ge, era baamulumiriza mu maiso g'abantu nga bakoba bati: “Nabothi yavuma Katonda era yaavuma ni kyabazinga.” Kale abantu baamutwala kuliya kw'ekibuga, baamukuba amabaale, yaafa." 
1Kings21:14 Agho baagheereza Yezebeli obukwenda bati: “Nabothi bamukubye amabaale, era afiire.”" 
1Kings21:15 Yezebeli olwawulira ati Nabothi bamukubye amabaale, era afiire, yaakoba Ahabu ati: “Situka, oje weetwalire eisamba ery'emizabbibu erya Nabothi ow'e Yezireeli, lye yaloba okukuguza kuba Nabothi oyo takaali mulamu, aye mufu wa ira!”" 
1Kings21:16 Ahabu olwawulira ati Nabothi afiire, yaasituka okuja okwetwalira eisamba ery'emizabbibu erya Nabothi oyo ow'e Yezireeli." 
1Kings21:17 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Eliya Omutishubi ati: 
1Kings21:18 “Situka oje eri Ahabu kyabazinga wa Isiraeli aba mu Samaria. Oidha kumwagaana mu isamba ery'emizabbibu erya Nabothi, ng'ajiire okulitwala libe lirye." 
1Kings21:19 Oidha kumukoba oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, omaze okutemula omuntu, obwo era otwale n'ebintu bye?’ Era oidha kumukoba oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, mu kifo mwene embwa mwe dhaakombeire omusaayi gwa Nabothi, era mwe dhiidha okukombera n'ogugwo.’ ”" 
1Kings21:20 Ahabu bwe yabona Eliya, yaamukoba ati: “Ongwikiriiza, omuzigu wange iwe?” Eliya yaamwiramu ati: “Yii, nkugwikiriiza, kuba weegheereireyo irala mu kukola ebibi mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
1Kings21:21 Agho ni Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Iwe Ahabu, ndidha kukutuusaaku akabi, nkuzikirize irala. Era ndimalagho mu Isiraeli buli muntu ayetebwa musaadha k'abe omusibe oba ow'eidembe." 
1Kings21:22 Ab'endhu yo ndibakola nga bwe nakola ab'endhu ya kyabazinga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati. Era ndibakola nga bwe nakola ab'endhu ya kyabazinga Baasha mutabane wa Ahiya kuba wasiikuula obusungu bwange, ng'oleetera Isiraeli okwonoona.’" 
1Kings21:23 Era Musengwa Katonda akoba ni ku Yezebeli ati, ‘Embwa dhiidha kumuliira mu kibuga Yezireeli." 
1Kings21:24 Era iwe Ahabu, omuntu wo yeenayeena anaafiiranga mu kibuga, embwa dhiidha kumulyanga. Ate oyo yeenayeena anaafiiranga mu irungu, enhonhi dhiidha kumulyanga.’ ”" 
1Kings21:25 Bwenebwene tighaalighooku muntu wundi kabiri eyeegheerayo irala okukola ebibi mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, ng'oti ni Ahabu eyapikirizibwanga mukazi we Yezebeli."
