1Kings21:26 Ahabu oyo yakolanga ebyenhinhalwa einho ng'asinza ebitali Katonda, ng'oti n'Abamori Musengwa Katonda be yabinga mu nsi eyo, ng'Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuukayo." 
1Kings21:27 Ahabu bwe yawulira ebibono ebyo, yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'enaku, yaavaala ekutiya. Yaaloba okulya emere, yaasulanga mu kutiya, era yaatambulanga nga munhiinkaavu ate nga mweraliikirivu." 
1Kings21:28 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Eliya Omutishubi ati: 
1Kings21:29 “Oboine Ahabu bwe yeewooyiiza mu maiso gange? Kale nga bwe yeewooyiiza mu maiso gange atyo, akabi tija kukaleeta mu biseera bye ng'akaali mulamu, aye ndikaleeta ku b'endhu ye mu biseera bya mutabane we.”" 
1Kings22:1 Agho baamala emyaka esatu nga ghazira lutalo ghagati wa Siria ni Isiraeli. 
1Kings22:2 Aye mu mwaka ogwokusatu, Yehoshafati kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya yaaja okubona Ahabu kyabazinga wa Isiraeli." 
1Kings22:3 Agho kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaakoba abakungu be ati: “Mwidhi bukalamu nga Ramothi eky'e Gileadi kyaife. Aye lwaki tusirika obusirike ni tutakitoola ku kyabazinga wa Siria?” 
1Kings22:4 Yaabuuza Yehoshafati ati: “Onaaja ninze mu Ramothi eky'e Gileadi okulwana olutalo?” Yehoshafati yaamwiramu ati: “Nze n'iwe tuli kirala. Abantu bange n'ekirala n'ababo, era embalaasi dhange n'ekirala n'edhidho.”" 
1Kings22:5 Aye era Yehoshafati yaakoba kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ati: “Mala kwebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda owulire ky'akoba.” 
1Kings22:6 Agho kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaasoloza abalanzi ng'ebikumi bina, yaababuuza ati: “Nje numbe Ramothi eky'e Gileadi, oba ntakirumba?” Bairamu bati: “Ja okirumbe, Musengwa Katonda aidha kukikugha okighangule.”" 
1Kings22:7 Aye Yehoshafati yaakoba ati: “Ghano ghaziraghooku mulanzi wa Musengwa Katonda wundi tumwebuuzeeku?” 
1Kings22:8 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaakoba Yehoshafati ati: “Ghakaaligho omuntu ye tusobola okubitamu okwebuuzaaku ku Musengwa Katonda. Oyo ni Mikaia, mutabane wa Imula. Aye timwenda naire, kuba talangangaku bikalamu ku nze, okutoolaku ebibi.” Yehoshafati yaakoba ati: “Kyabazinga, otakoba otyo.”" 
1Kings22:9 Agho kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaayeta mulala ku bakungu be, yaamukoba ati: “Ja mangu oleete ghano Mikaia mutabane wa Imula.”" 
1Kings22:10 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ni kyabazinga Yehoshafati owa Buyudaaya, baali bavaire ebivaalo byaibwe eby'obwakyabazinga, nga batyaime, buli muntu ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, agho gha kifo aghakubirwa engaano, okumpi n'omulyango ogwingira Samaria. Abalanzi boonaboona baali bali kulanga agho mu maiso gaibwe." 
1Kings22:11 Agho owundi ku balanzi abo, eriina lye nga ni Zedekia mutabane Kenaana, yeekolera amayiga mu kyuma ekigumu einho, yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Amayiga gano g'oidha okukozesa okufula Abasiria okutuusa lw'olibaghangula.’ ”" 
1Kings22:12 N'abalanzi abandi boonaboona baalangirira batyo, nga bakoba bati: “Ja olumbe Ramothi eky'e Gileadi, oidha kukighangula. Musengwa Katonda aidha kukikugha okighangule.”" 
1Kings22:13 Agho omukwenda eyaja okweta Mikaia, yaakoba Mikaia oyo ati: “Bona eno, abalanzi abandi boonaboona balanze bughanguzi eri kyabazinga. Weena ogwaine olange nga beene bwe bakoze, ng'oyogera bikalamu.”" 
1Kings22:14 Aye Mikaia yaakoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu nti, ndidha kwogera ekyo Musengwa Katonda oyo ky'anankoba okwogera.”" 
1Kings22:15 Mikaia bwe yatuuka mu maiso ga kyabazinga Ahabu, kyabazinga oyo yaamubuuza ati: “Nje numbe Ramothi eky'e Gileadi, oba ntakirumba?” Mikaia yaamwiramu ati: “Ja olumbe Ramothi eky'e Gileadi, oidha kukighangula. Musengwa Katonda aidha kukikuta mu ngalo.”" 
1Kings22:16 Aye Ahabu yaamukoba ati: “Nakukoba nti bw'obanga ng'oli kwogera ninze mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda, ogwaine oyogere mazima gonka. Oyenda nkwiraganemu ekintu ekyo mikuzi emeka?”" 
1Kings22:17 Mikaia yaakoba ati: “Mboine abaisirukale ba Isiraeli boonaboona nga basansaaniire eyo ku nsozi, ng'oti n'entaama edhiziraku mwayi. Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Abantu abo baziraku mukulembeze, buli mulala leka aireyo miraala mu maka ge.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Kyabazinga Ahabu owa Isiraeli yaakoba Yehoshafati ati: “Tyakukobeire nti taidha kulanga bikalamu ku nze, okutoolaku ebibi!”" 
1Kings22:19 Mikaia yeeyongera okukoba ati: “Kale ni wulira Musengwa Katonda by'akoba: Mboine Musengwa Katonda oyo ng'atyaime ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, ng'eigye lyonalyona ery'omu igulu lyemereire ku luuyi lwe olw'omukono omusaadha ni ku lw'omugooda." 
1Kings22:20 Musengwa Katonda yaabuuza ati, ‘Naani anaasendasenda Ahabu okuja e Ramothi eky'e Gileadi, bamwite?’ Ono yaakoba kino, ate ole yaakoba kire." 
1Kings22:21 Agho ghaidhagho omwoyo gwayemerera mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, gwakoba guti, ‘Nze ndidha kumusendasenda.’" 
1Kings22:22 “Musengwa Katonda yaagubuuza ati, ‘Mu nsambo ki?’ “Omwoyo gwamwiramu guti, ‘Ndidha kuja ndhogeze abalanzi be boonaboona eby'obuguya.’ “Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati, ‘Oidha kusobola okumusendasenda. Kale ja okole otyo.’ ”" 
1Kings22:23 Mikaia yaamaliriza ng'akoba ati: “Kale ni Musengwa Katonda ataire omwoyo ogw'obuguya mu kanwa omw'abalanzi bo boonaboona, era iwe by'akwogeireku bya kabi.”" 
1Kings22:24 Agho omulanzi Zedekia mutabane wa Kenaana, yaaseeta ye Mikaia, yaamukuba oluyi ku itama era yaamubuuza ati: “Omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwanviireku gutya, memale gwogere n'iwe?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaia yairamu ati: “Mu butuufu, ekyo olikimanha ku lunaku lw'olingira mu kisenge eky'omunda okwegisa.”" 
1Kings22:26 Agho kyabazinga Ahabu yaalagira ati: “Mugeme Mikaia mumutwale eri Amoni omukulu w'ekibuga, n'eri omulangira Yoashi mutabane wa kyabazinga," 
1Kings22:27 mubakobe muti, ‘Kyabazinga alagiire ati omusaadha oyo mumute mu ikomera, era mumughenga emere n'amaadhi nga mumupimiraku bupimire, okutuusa nga ndhize bukalamu.’ ”" 
1Kings22:28 Agho Mikaia yaakoba ati: “Bw'oiranga obukalamu, nga koodhi Musengwa Katonda tayogereire mu nze.” Era yaayongeraku ati: “Imwe abantu mwenamwena, muwulire kye ndhogeire.”" 
1Kings22:29 Agho kyabazinga Ahabu owa Isiraeli ni kyabazinga Yehoshafati owa Buyudaaya, baaja okulumba ekibuga Ramothi eky'e Gileadi." 
1Kings22:30 Ahabu yaakoba Yehoshafati ati: “Nze ndidha kuja mu lutalo nga neefuusiisafuusiisa ng'oti ndi muntu wundi, aye iwe oidha kuvaala ebivaalo byo eby'obwakyabazinga.” Kale baaja mu lutalo, nga kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yeefuusiisafuusiisa." 
1Kings22:31 Kyabazinga wa Siria yali amaze okulagira abaduumizi b'ebigaali bye amakumi asatu n'ebibiri eby'omu lutalo, ati: “Mutalwanisa muntu wundi yeenayeena, k'abe omukulu oba omuto, okutoolaku kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yenka.”" 
1Kings22:32 Agho abaduumizi b'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo abo bwe baabona kyabazinga Yehoshafati, baadhuuba bati ni kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era baakyuka okumulwanisa. Aye Yehoshafati oyo bwe yayana einho," 
1Kings22:33 abaduumizi abo baabona nga ti ni kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era baalekera agho okumubingirira." 
1Kings22:34 Agho ghaabaagho omwisirukale Omusiria eyalasa akalaso ke eyo atyo, aye yaagemya kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, agho ekivaalo kye eky'omu lutalo eky'ekyuma ghe kyegaitira mu kifuba. Kyabazinga yaakoba omuvuzi w'ekigaali kye eky'omu lutalo ati: “Kyusa ekigaali ontoole mu lutalo, kuba banfumiite.”" 
1Kings22:35 Olutalo lwataama inho ku lunaku olwo. Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli baamugemerera bugemerere mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo okwolekera Abasiria. Omusaayi gwava mu kibwa kye, gwakuuluulira mu kigaali kye ekyo, era yaafa eigulo eryo." 
1Kings22:36 Endhuba ng'eri kumpi okugwa, kyalangirirwa mu igye lyonalyona erya Isiraeli nti: “Buli muntu aireyo mu kiketezo ky'ewaibwe, ni mu kibuga ky'ewaibwe.”" 
1Kings22:37 Mu nsambo eyo kyabazinga Ahabu yaafa, baamuleeta e Samaria baamuziika." 
1Kings22:38 Baanaakiza ekigaali kye eky'omu lutalo ku nsulo y'e Samaria, embwa dhaakombera eyo omusaayi gwe, ni bamalaaya baagunaabiramu eyo, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba." 
1Kings22:39 Ebindi byonabyona Ahabu bye yakola, n'endhu ye yazimba n'agitimba n'amasanka, n'ebibuga byonabyona bye yazimba, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings22:40 Atyo Ahabu yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa. Mutabane we Ahazia yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Kings22:41 Mu mwaka ogwokuna ogwa kyabazinga Ahabu nga n'afuga Isiraeli, Yehoshafati mutabane wa Asa yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
1Kings22:42 Yali ng'agheza emyaka amakumi asatu n'etaanu egy'obukulu, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali nga ni Azuba, mughala wa Shilihi." 
1Kings22:43 Yehoshafati oyo yali wa mpisa nkalamu era nga tadhivaaku, ng'oti n'ise bweyali. Yaakolanga ebirungi Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, aye ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu tiyabitoolagho. Abantu baasigala nga bakaagheerayo eyo emisengo era nga bakaaniokeza eyo obubbaani mu bifo ebyo." 
1Kings22:44 Era Yehoshafati oyo yaakola endagaano ey'emiraala ni kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. 
1Kings22:45 Ebindi byonabyona Yehoshafati bye yakola eby'amaani, n'entalo dhe yalwana, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
1Kings22:46 Yehoshafati oyo yamaliragho irala mu nsi ye, abasaadha abaakolanga obwamalaaya obw'omu isabo, abaali bakaasigairegho okuva mu byanda bya lata we Asa." 
1Kings22:47 Mu kiseera ekyo, ensi Edomu tiyali na kyabazinga, aye musigire n'eyagifuganga, nga kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya n'amutaagho." 
1Kings22:48 Yehoshafati yakola amaato amakologho ag'oku nhandha enene, nga ga kujanga mu Ofiri okunonayo zaabu. Aye gaaloba kuja, kuba gaamenhekera mu Ezionigeberi." 
1Kings22:49 Agho kyabazinga Ahazia mutabane wa Ahabu yaakoba Yehoshafati ati: “Abagheereza bange ka bajiire ghalala n'ababo mu maato.” Aye Yehoshafati yaaloba. 
1Kings22:50 Agho Yehoshafati oyo yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu lwambiidhi lwa badhaadha be abo, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi dhaadha we. Mutabane we Yehoramu yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Kings22:51 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omusanvu (17) ogwa kyabazinga Yehoshafati nga n'afuga Buyudaaya, Ahazia yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka ebiri mu Samaria." 
1Kings22:52 Yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, ng'ajiira ku mpisa embi edha lata we Ahabu, n'edha inhina Yezebeli, n'edha kyabazinga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati eyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona." 
1Kings22:53 Ahazia oyo yaagheerezanga omusambwa Baali era yaagusinzanga. Olwo yaasungughaza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, mu nsambo n'endala nga lata we bwe yakola." 
2Kings1:1 Kyabazinga Ahabu owa Isiraeli bwe yamala okufa, ensi Moabu yaadheemera Isiraeli." 
2Kings1:2 Agho kyabazinga Ahazia owa Isiraeli, yaaghanuka ku lubalaza olwa ghaigulu ku ndhu ye, mu kisaagaati kye mu Samaria, yagwa ghansi yeerumiriza inho. Kale yaatuma abakwenda ng'abakoba ati: “Muje mwebuuze ku musambwa Baalizebubu ogw'e Ekuroni, mmanhe oba nga nnaawona.”" 
2Kings1:3 Aye malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaakoba omulanzi Eliya ow'e Tishubi, ati: “Situka oje y'abakwenda ba kyabazinga Ahazia, obakobe oti, ‘Obwo muli kuja okwebuuza ku musambwa Baalizebubu ogw'e Ekuroni, lwa kuba mu Isiraeli muziramu Katonda?" 
2Kings1:4 Kale ni mukobe kyabazinga muti, Musengwa Katonda akoba ati toidha kuwona ove ku buliri okwo kw'oli, oli wa kufa.’ ” Kale Eliya yaaja." 
2Kings1:5 Abakwenda bairayo ye kyabazinga, era kyabazinga yaababuuza ati: “Lwaki mwize?”" 
2Kings1:6 Baamwiramu bati: “Omusaadha aidhie, yaatukoba ati, ‘Mwireyo ye kyabazinga abatumye, mumukobe muti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, obwo oli kutuma abakwenda okuja okwebuuza ku musambwa Baalizebubu ogw'e Ekuroni, lwa kuba mu Isiraeli muziramu Katonda? Kale ni toidha kuwona ove ku buliri okwo kw'oli, oli wa kufa.’ ”" 
2Kings1:7 Kyabazinga yaababuuza ati: “Omusaadha oyo aidhie n'abakoba ebibono ebyo, abaire afaanana atya?”" 
2Kings1:8 Bairamu bati: “Abaire avaire ekivaalo ekyakolebwa mu buviiri, era nga yeesibye mu nkende olusibiro olw'oluwu.” Kyabazinga yaakoba ati: “Oyo ni Eliya Omutishubi.”" 
2Kings1:9 Agho kyabazinga yaatuma omusaadha akulira abaisirukale amakumi ataanu, aje n'abaisirukale be amakumi ataanu, aleete Eliya. Omusaadha oyo yaaja yaaniina olusozi, yaayagaana Eliya ng'atyaime ku ngulu ku lusozi olwo. Yaamukoba ati: “Muntu wa Katonda iwe, kyabazinga alagiire ati, ‘Va ghaigulu ku lusozi oike.’ ”" 
2Kings1:10 Aye Eliya yairamu omusaadha oyo akulira abalwani amakumi ataanu, ati: “Oba nga ndi muntu wa Katonda, omuliro ka guve mu igulu gukwokye gukusaaniegho, iwe n'abaisirukale bo amakumi ataanu.” Era mu kiseera kyene ekyo, omuliro gwava mu igulu gwamusaaniagho n'abaisirukale be amakumi ataanu." 
2Kings1:11 Agho kyabazinga yaatuma omusaadha owundi akulira abaisirukale amakumi ataanu, ng'ali n'abaisirukale be amakumi ataanu, yaaniina olusozi era yaakoba Eliya ati: “Muntu wa Katonda iwe, kyabazinga alagiire ati, ‘Va mangu ghaigulu ku lusozi, oike.’ ”" 
2Kings1:12 Aye Eliya yaabairamu ati: “Oba nga ndi muntu wa Katonda, omuliro ka guve mu igulu gukwokye gukusaaniegho, iwe n'abalwani bo amakumi ataanu.” Era mu kiseera kyene ekyo, omuliro gwava mu igulu gwamusaaniagho n'abalwani be amakumi ataanu." 
2Kings1:13 Kyabazinga yaatuma omusaadha owokusatu akulira abaisirukale amakumi ataanu, ng'ali n'abaisirukale be amakumi ataanu, yaaniina olusozi yaakuba amakiryaivu mu maiso ga Eliya. Yaamwegayirira ng'akoba ati: “Nkweghembye muntu wa Katonda iwe, ngemerwa ekivunika owonie obulamu bwange n'obw'abagheereza bo bano amakumi ataanu." 
2Kings1:14 Bwenebwene omuliro gwaviire mu igulu gwasaaniagho abasaadha ababiri abakulira abalwani ataanu ataanu abaasoose, ghalala n'abalwani baibwe. Aye mpegaano, nkusaba owonie obulamu bwange.”" 
2Kings1:15 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Eliya ati: “Ika olusozi oje naye, otamutya.” Eliya yaasituka yaika olusozi ghalala n'omusaadha oyo akulira abaisirukale amakumi ataanu, yaaja ye kyabazinga." 
2Kings1:16 Eliya oyo bwe yatuuka ye kyabazinga, yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Nga bwe watuma abakwenda okuja okwebuuza ku musambwa Baalizebubu ogw'Ekuroni, ng'oti se mu Isiraeli muziramu Katonda, kale ni toidha kuwona ove ku buliri okwo kw'oli, bwenebwene oidha kufa.’ ”" 
2Kings1:17 Kale Ahazia yaafa nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba ng'abita mu Eliya. Ahazia oyo yali aziraku mwana mulenzi, kale muganda we Yehoramu yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga, mu mwaka ogwokubiri ogw'obufuzi bwa Yehoramu mutabane wa Yehoshafati kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
2Kings1:18 Ebindi byonabyona kyabazinga Ahazia bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings2:1 Agho ekiseera nga kiri kumpi okutuuka Musengwa Katonda atwale Eliya mu igulu, ng'amutwalira mu mpewo eyeezungulula n'amaani, Eliya oyo ni Elisha baali nga bali kuva Giligali." 
2Kings2:2 Agho Eliya yaakoba Elisha ati: “Nkweghemba osigale ghano, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda antumye nje ntuuke e Betheli.” Aye Elisha yaakoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu era weena nga bw'oli omulamu nti tiidha kukuleka.” Kale baaja e Betheli." 
2Kings2:3 Agho ekikunsu eky'abalanzi abaali e Betheli baidha ye Elisha, baamubuuza bati: “Okiidhi nga Musengwa Katonda olwaleero aja kukutoolaku musengwa wo amutwale?” Elisha yairamu ati: “Yii, nkiidhi. Imwe mwesirikire.”" 
2Kings2:4 Agho Eliya yaakoba Elisha ati: “Elisha, nkweghemba osigale ghano, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda antumye e Yeriko.” Aye Elisha yaakoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu era weena nga bw'oli omulamu nti tiidha kukuleka.” Kale baaja e Yeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Agho ekikunsu eky'abalanzi abaali e Yeriko baaseeta ye Elisha, baamubuuza bati: “Okiidhi nga Musengwa Katonda olwaleero aja kukutoolaku musengwa wo amutwale?” Elisha yairamu ati: “Yii, nkiidhi. Imwe mwesirikire.”" 
2Kings2:6 Agho Eliya yaakoba Elisha ati: “Nkweghemba osigale ghano, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda antumye nje ku mwiga Yorudani.” Aye Elisha yaakoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu era weena nga bw'oli omulamu nti tiidha kukuleka.” Kale bombi beeyongerayo," 
2Kings2:7 baatuuka baayemerera ku mbali kw'omwiga Yorudani. Abalanzi amakumi ataanu okuva mu kikunsu ky'abalanzi, boona baaja, baayemerera nga ghakaalighooku akata okutuuka ku Eliya ni Elisha." 
2Kings2:8 Agho Eliya yaagema ekivaalo kye, yaakizingamu, yaakikozesa okukuba ku maadhi, amaadhi geegabamu ghabiri ku luuyi ni ku luuyi, bombi baasomoka nga babita ku itaka ikalu." 
2Kings2:9 Bwe baamala okusomoka, Eliya yaakoba Elisha ati: “Saba kye mbe nkukolere nga bakaali kuntwala kukuvaaku.” Elisha yairamu ati: “Nkusaba onganhe nfune omugabo gwa mikuzi ebiri ogw'omwoyo gwo.”" 
2Kings2:10 Eliya yaamukoba ati: “Ky'osabye kikalangufu. Aye bw'onambona nga bali kuntwala okukuvaaku, oidha kukifuna. Aye bw'otambone, toidha kukifuna.”" 
2Kings2:11 Bwe baali nga bakaatambula nga bwe baghaya, amangu ago ghaidhagho ekigaali eky'omu lutalo eky'omuliro n'embalaasi edh'omuliro, byayawula buli muntu ku mwine, Eliya yaatwalibwa ghaigulu ng'ali mu mpewo eyeezungulula n'amaani." 
2Kings2:12 Elisha yaakibona, era yaaleekaana ati: “Lata wange, lata wange! Iwe ow'amaani ng'oti n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo n'embalaasi ebirwanirira Isiraeli!” Yaalekera agho okumubona. Agho Elisha oyo yaagema ebivaalo ebibye, yaabikanulamu ghabiri olw'okunakughala." 
2Kings2:13 Yaalonda ekivaalo ekyava ku Eliya ni kigwa, yairayo, yaayemerera ku mbali kw'omwiga Yorudani." 
2Kings2:14 Yaakozesa ekivaalo ekyava ku Eliya ni kigwa, yaakuba ku maadhi ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Eliya, ali gha?” Bwe yakuba ku maadhi, geegabamu ghabiri ku luuyi ni ku luuyi, Elisha oyo yaasomoka." 
2Kings2:15 Abalanzi abaali e Yeriko bwe baamubona, baakoba bati: “Obuyinza bwa Eliya buli ku Elisha.” Agho baidha okumweisuusaayo, era baakuba amakiryaivu agho mu maiso ge," 
2Kings2:16 baamukoba bati: “Bona eno, ife abagheereza bo tuli ghano n'abasaadha amakumi ataanu ab'amaani. Tukweghemba obaganhe baje, baagale musengwa wo. Kisoboka okuba nti omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwamubbeedie gwamuta ku lusozi, oba mu kiiko.” Elisha yaabairamu ati: “Busa, mutabatuma.”" 
2Kings2:17 Aye baayongera okumupikiriza okutuusa ensoni lwe dhaamugema n'akoba ati: “Kale mubatume.” Agho baatuma abasaadha amakumi ataanu, baayagala Eliya okumala enaku isatu, aye baalemwa okumubona." 
2Kings2:18 Agho baira ye Elisha ng'abateegereire e Yeriko, yaabakoba ati: “Nze tyabakoba nti mutaja?”" 
2Kings2:19 Agho abandi ku basaadha ab'omu kibuga Yeriko baaja ye Elisha, baamukoba bati: “Isebo, ekibuga kino kiri ghalungi, nga weena bw'oli kubona. Aye amaadhi gaagho mabi, n'eitaka tiribaza mere.”" 
2Kings2:20 Elisha yaakoba ati: “Mute omuunhu mu kibya ekiyaaka, mukindeetere ghano.” Baakireeta gh'ali." 
2Kings2:21 Yaaja aghali ensulo y'amaadhi, yaasuulamu omuunhu ogwo ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Amaadhi gano ngafiire malamu. Tigakairayo kuvaamu lumbe waire okutoolamu abantu enda.’ ”" 
2Kings2:22 N'okuva ku olwo, amaadhi ago gaasigala nga malamu ni ye buli eno, ng'Elisha bwe yakoba." 
2Kings2:23 Agho Elisha yaava e Yeriko, yaaja e Betheli. Bwe yali ng'ali kutambula mu ngira, abaisuka abatobato baava mu kibuga, baamuyeeyereza nga bakoba bati: “Va agho oje, iwe kapaata! Va agho oje, iwe kapaata!”" 
2Kings2:24 Elisha yaakyuka, yaalinga einhuma yaababona, era yaabakolimira mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda. Agho ebisolo ebikambwe bibiri ebikazi byava mu kibira, byayuzayuza abaana amakumi ana n'ababiri (42) ku abo." 
2Kings2:25 Mwene yeeyongerayo yaatuuka ku lusozi Karumeli, ate yaamala yaava eyo yaaja e Samaria." 
2Kings3:1 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omunaana nga kyabazinga Yehoshafati n'afuga Buyudaaya, Yehoramu mutabane wa Ahabu yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafugira mu Samaria okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi n'ebiri." 
2Kings3:2 Yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, aye tibyatuuka ku bya lata we na bya inhina kuba yamenhagho empango y'omusambwa Baali, lata we ye yakola." 
2Kings3:3 Aye era Yehoramu oyo yaakola ebibi ebyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona ng'oti ni kyabazinga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati bwe yakola. Era Yehoramu oyo yaaloba kuva mu bibi ebyo. 
2Kings3:4 Ghaabaagho Mesha kyabazinga wa Moabu eyali omwayi w'entaama. Buli mwaka ng'ali n'okugha kyabazinga wa Isiraeli entaama ento emitwalo ikumi (100,000), n'obuviiri obwavanga ku ntaama emitwalo ikumi (100,000) enume." 
2Kings3:5 Aye kyabazinga Ahabu owa Isiraeli bwe yafa, Mesha oyo yaadheemera kyabazinga wa Isiraeli." 
2Kings3:6 Kyabazinga Yehoramu kyeyava n'ava mu Samaria, n'asoloza eigye lye mu Isiraeli yoonayoona," 
2Kings3:7 era n'agheereza obukwenda ye Yehoshafati kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, ng'akoba ati: “Kyabazinga wa Moabu andheemeire. Onaaneeyimbaku mu lutalo twaja okumulwanisa?” Kyabazinga Yehoshafati yairamu ati: “Yii, ndidha kukweyimbaku tuje. Nze n'iwe twisa kirala, abantu bange babo, n'embalaasi dhange dhidho.”" 
2Kings3:8 Agho yaabuuza ati: “Tunaagema ngira ki okulumba?” Yehoramu yairamu ati: “Twidha kugema engira ey'omu irungu lya Edomu.” 
2Kings3:9 Agho kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, n'owa wa Buyudaaya, n'owa Edomu baajiira ghalala. Bwe baamala okutambula olugendo olw'enaku omusanvu nga lwa kwezungulula, baaba nga tibakaali na maadhi ga kugha igye waire ensolo dhe baali nadho." 
2Kings3:10 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaakoba ati: “Tukagwireku! Musengwa Katonda atusoloiza ife bakyabazinga abasatu, atute mu ngalo dha Moabu.”" 
2Kings3:11 Yehoshafati kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya yaabuuza ati: “Ghano ghaziraghooku mulanzi wa Musengwa Katonda, ye tusobola okubitamu ni twebuuzaaku ku Musengwa Katonda?” Agho owundi ku bagheereza ba kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yairamu ati: “Elisha mutabane wa Shafati eyali omugheereza wa Eliya, aligho ghano.”" 
2Kings3:12 Kyabazinga Yehoshafati yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda ayogera ng'abita mu oyo.” Kale kyabazinga owa Isiraeli, ni kyabazinga Yehoshafati owa Buyudaaya, ni kyabazinga wa Edomu, baaja eri Elisha." 
2Kings3:13 Elisha yaakoba kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ati: “Nze ndi na nkolagana ki n'iwe? Ja y'abalanzi ba lata wo ni y'abalanzi ba inhoko.” Aye kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yairamu ati: “Busa, Musengwa Katonda n'atwese ife bakyabazinga abasatu okututa mu ngalo dha Moabu.”" 
2Kings3:14 Elisha yaakoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu Afuga Amagye ye mpeereza, nti ngoli ti kugemerwa nsoni Yehoshafati kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, tyandikufiireku naire, waire okukulingaku obulinge." 
2Kings3:15 Aye mpegaano ndeetera omukubi w'entongooli.” Omukubi w'entongooli bwe yakuba, amaani ga Musengwa Katonda gaidha ku Elisha," 
2Kings3:16 yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Ekiiko kino ekikalu ndidha kukiidhuza ensulo dh'amaadhi.’" 
2Kings3:17 Musengwa Katonda oyo era akoba ati, ‘Ti mwidha kubona mpewo ng'efuuwa, waire okubona amaadhi nga gagwa. Aye ekiiko ekyo kiidha kwidhula amaadhi, imwe munhwe era n'ensolo dhaimwe dhoona dhinhwe.’ ”" 
2Kings3:18 Elisha yaayongera okukoba ati: “Ate ekyo kitono na inho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, kuba era aidha kuta n'Abamoabu mu ngalo dhaimwe." 
2Kings3:19 Mwidha kumenha buli kibuga ekyezungulwirwa ekimante ekigumu, na buli kibuga ekiboneka obulungi, muteme buli muti omulungi, musembe ensulo dhoonadhoona edh'amaadhi, era mubunge amabaale mu buli bulime obulungi, mubwonoone.”" 
2Kings3:20 Olunaku olwairirira, agho nga mu kiseera eky'okugheerayo emisengo, amaadhi gaidha nga gava ku luuyi lwa Edomu, okutuusa lwe gaidhula mu kiketezo ekyo kyonakyona." 
2Kings3:21 Abamoabu boonaboona bwe baawulira nga bakyabazinga abasatu baidhie okubalwanisa, baasoloza abantu boonaboona abato n'abakulu abaali nga basobola okugema eby'okulwanisa, baabaleeta ku nsalosalo." 
2Kings3:22 Abamoabu bwe baasitukagho enkyo ku nkyo, endhuba yaayaka ku maadhi agaboolekeire, baagabona nga gamyuse ng'oti musaayi." 
2Kings3:23 Baakoba bati: “Guno musaayi! Bwenebwene bakyabazinga balwanagaine beene na beene, baitagana. Imwe Abamoabu, mukole tuje ku munhago!”" 
2Kings3:24 Aye bwe baatuuka Abaisiraeli ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, Abaisiraeli baasituka baalumba Abamoabu abo, baabatwaliriza embiro. Abamoabu baalumuka, aye Abaisiraeli baababingirira nga baja bwe babaita." 
2Kings3:25 Abaisiraeli baazikiriza ebibuga, buli mulala yaasuula eibaale mu bulime obulungi, okutuusa nga babwidhwiza amabaale. Baasemba ensulo dhoonadhoona edh'amaadhi, era baatema emiti gyonagyona emirungi. Mu kibuga Kiriharesethi mwonka mwe baaleka amabaale gaamu, ab'ensuumulo baakyezunguluza baakighangula." 
2Kings3:26 Kyabazinga wa Moabu bwe yabona ng'olutalo luli kumunhigiriza, yaatwala abasaadha lusanvu abalwanisa empiima, baje baghaguze batuuke ku kyabazinga wa Edomu, aye baalemwa." 
2Kings3:27 Agho yaatoola mutabane we asinga obukulu eyali ow'okumusikira ku bwakyabazinga, yaamugheerayo ku kimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga, ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Abaisiraeli baatya inho, baalekera agho okumulwanisa, bairayo mu nsi y'ewaibwe." 
2Kings4:1 Agho namwandu ow'owundi ku b'ekikunsu ky'abalanzi, yaalirira Elisha ng'akoba ati: “Omugheereza wo, baze, yafa. Era oidhi omugheereza wo oyo nga bweyali atya Musengwa Katonda. Aye mpegaano omuntu eyali amubandha, aidhie okutwala abaana bange bombi abafuule abairu be.”" 
2Kings4:2 Elisha yaamubuuza ati: “Oyenda nkukolere ki? Nkobera, kiki ky'oli nakyo mu ndhu yo?” Omukazi yairamu ati: “Nze omugheereza wo, nzira kantu naire mu ndhu, okutoolaku akadoome konka akalimu omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva.”" 
2Kings4:3 Elisha yaamukoba ati: “Ja weeyazike ku baino boonaboona ab'oku muliiraano ebidoome ebikalu ate nga bingi. 
2Kings4:4 Memale oje oingire mu ndhu yo weigalizeemu ni batabane bo, olwo oitululire omuzigo mu bidoome ebyo byonabyona, nga buli ekiidhula okiiza gha mbali.”" 
2Kings4:5 Kale omukazi yaava ye Elisha, yaaja yaingira mu ndhu ye ni batabane be, beigalizaamu. Yaagema akadoome ak'omuzigo, yaatoolera okwitulula nga batabane be bwe bamuleetera ebidoome eby'okwitululiramu." 
2Kings4:6 Ebidoome bwe byaidhula, yaakoba owundi ku batabane be ati: “Ndeetera ekidoome ekindi.” Mutabane we yaamukoba ati: “Ghaziragho kidoome kindi.” Agho omuzigo gwalekera agho okwidha." 
2Kings4:7 Omukazi yaaja yaakobera Elisha omusaadha wa Katonda. Elisha yaamukoba ati: “Ja otunde omuzigo ogwo, osasule eibandha ly'oli nalyo, ate ogunaafikagho mwidha kugukozesa, iwe ni batabane bo.”" 
2Kings4:8 Lwali lulala, Elisha yaaja e Shunemu. Eyo e Shunemu yaliyo omukazi omukombe, yaamwegayirira alye ku mere mu maka ge. Era okuva ku olwo, Elisha buli lwe yabitanga oluuyi olwo, ng'aja yaalya emere mu maka ago." 
2Kings4:9 Omukazi oyo yaakoba iba ati: “Bona, mpegaano ntegeire ng'omusaadha oyo atera okubitira ewaife, muntu wa Katonda mutukuvu." 
2Kings4:10 Ka tumuzimbire akasenge ku kasolya k'endhu yaife tumuteeremu obuliri, n'emeeza, n'ekityamo, n'entaala, olwo asobole okubanga omwo buli lw'anaatukyaliranga.”" 
2Kings4:11 Lwali lulala Elisha yaidha e Shunemu, yaingira mu kasenge ako, yaawuumuliraku omwo." 
2Kings4:12 Agho yaakoba Gehazi omugheereza we ati: “Yeta Omushunami oyo.” Gehazi yaayeta omukazi, yaidha yaayemerera agho." 
2Kings4:13 Elisha yaakoba Gehazi ati: “Mukobe oti, ‘Otawaine inho okutulabirira. Mpegaano kiki ky'oyenda tukukolere? Oyenda tuje tukwogerereyo ye kyabazinga oba y'omuduumizi w'eigye.’ ” Omukazi yairamu ati: “Nze ghano ndi mu bantu bange.”" 
2Kings4:14 Elisha yaabuuza Gehazi ati: “Obwo kiki kye mbe mmukolere?” Gehazi yairamu ati: “Omukazi oyo aziraku mwana, ate iba mukaire.”" 
2Kings4:15 Elisha yaakoba ati: “Kale mwete aidhe.” Gehazi yaamweta. Omukazi yaidha, yaayemerera mu mulyango." 
2Kings4:16 Elisha yaamukoba ati: “Mu kiseera nga kino omwaka ogwidha, oliba olera omwana owuwo omulenzi.” Omukazi yairamu ati: “Busa, musengwa wange, iwe oli muntu wa Katonda, otanguyaguya nze omugheereza wo.”" 
2Kings4:17 Aye omukazi yaatoola enda, era mu kiseera ng'oti n'ekyo mu mwaka ogwairirira, yazaala omwana mulenzi, ng'Elisha bwe yamukoba." 
2Kings4:18 Lwali lulala omwana oyo ng'akuze, yaaja ye ise mu isamba ye yali n'abakunguzi b'emere." 
2Kings4:19 Yaalirira ise ati: “Omutwe guli kundhita, omutwe guli kundhita!” Ise yaakoba omugheereza we ati: “Mubbeede omutwale ye inhina.”" 
2Kings4:20 Omugheereza yaamubbeeda, yaamutwala ye inhina. Inhina yaamulera. Bwe bwatuuka mu kasana ghagati, omwana yaafa." 
2Kings4:21 Inhina yaamutwala ghaigulu, yaamulambaaza ku buliri bwa Elisha, omuntu wa Katonda, yaamwigalizaamu, mwene yaafuluma." 
2Kings4:22 Yaayeta iba ng'akoba ati: “Nsindikira omugheereza mulala n'endogoyi ndala, nje mangu ew'omuntu wa Katonda era mmale ndhire.”" 
2Kings4:23 Iba yaamubuuza ati: “Lwaki oli kuja y'ali olwaleero, ate nga ti lunaku lwa Sabbato waire okuba olw'Ekibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi?” Omukazi yairamu ati: “Iwe otafaayo.”" 
2Kings4:24 Agho omukazi yaatyama ku ndogoyi, era yaalagira omugheereza we ati: “Vuga endogoyi eyangughe inho, era otakendeeza ku mbiro dhaayo okutoolaku nga nkukobye.”" 
2Kings4:25 Kale yaaja yaatuuka y'Elisha omuntu wa Katonda, ku lusozi Karumeli. Omuntu wa Katonda bwe yalengera omukazi oyo ng'akaaliku ghala, yaakoba Gehazi omugheereza we ati: “Omukazi Omushunami wuule!" 
2Kings4:26 Lumuka embiro omwagaane, omubuuze oti, ‘Oli bukalamu? Ni balo mukalamu? N'omwana mukalamu?’ ” Omukazi yairamu ati: “Tuli bukalamu.”" 
2Kings4:27 Aye bwe yatuuka ku lusozi omuntu wa Katonda ghe yali, yaamugemerera ebigere. Gehazi yaaseeta okumughaluzaagho, aye omuntu wa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Muleke, kuba ali n'enaku nnene ku mwoyo. Ate Musengwa Katonda ekyo akingisiisa yaaloba kunkobera.”" 
2Kings4:28 Omukazi yaakoba ati: “Isebo, nze nkusabangaku omwana omulenzi? Tyakukoba nti otanguyaguya?”" 
2Kings4:29 Elisha yaakoba Gehazi ati: “Yangugha mangu ogeme omwigo gwange, oje. Bw'oyagaana omuntu mu ngira, otamulamusa. Era bweghabaagho akulamusa otamwiramu. Bw'onaatuuka oidha kuta omwigo gwange ku mwana.”" 
2Kings4:30 Inhina w'omwana yaakoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu, era nga weena bw'oli omulamu, nti tiidha kukuleka.” Kale, Elisha yaasituka, yaaja naye." 
2Kings4:31 Gehazi yaaja yaabeesookangayo, yaata omwigo ku mwana, aye omwana yaaloba kwesagasa waire okubaamu akakuba. Gehazi yairayo y'Elisha, yaamukobera ati: “Omwana tazuuse.”" 
2Kings4:32 Elisha bwe yatuuka yaingira mu kisenge, yaabona ng'omwana afiire era nga bamulambaaziiza ku buliri bwe." 
2Kings4:33 Agho yeigalizaamu yenka n'omwana, yaasaba Musengwa Katonda." 
2Kings4:34 Yaaja ku buliri, yeeyala ku mwana, yaata omunwa gwe ku munwa gw'omwana, n'amaiso ge ku maiso g'omwana, n'emikono gye ku mikono gy'omwana. Bwe yeegololera ku mwana atyo, omubiri gw'omwana gwasuugha." 
2Kings4:35 Elisha yaasooka yaasitukagho yaatambulatambula mu kisenge omwo, ate kabiri yaamala yairayo yeegololera ku mwana. Omwana yaayasimula emikuzi musanvu, yaazibula amaiso." 
2Kings4:36 Elisha yaayeta Gehazi, yaamukoba ati: “Yeta Omushunami oyo.” Gehazi yaamweta. Era omukazi bwe yaidha, Elisha yaamukoba ati: “Omwana wo wuuyo.”" 
2Kings4:37 Omukazi yaidha yaakuba amakiryaivu gha bigere bya Elisha, yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka, yaabbeeda omwana we, yaafuluma." 
2Kings4:38 Agho Elisha yaira e Giligali ng'endhala egwire. Ab'omu kikunsu eky'abalanzi bwe baali batyaime mu maiso ge, yaakoba omugheereza we ati: “Taaku entamu enene ofumbire abalanzi abo eby'okulya.”" 
2Kings4:39 Omuntu owundi ku abo yaaja mu nsiko okunogayo eiva. Yaayagaana ekiryo eky'omu nsiko, yanogaku ebibala ebiri ng'oti mabuga. Yaatwalaku bingi nga bye yasobola okubbeeda, yaaja yaabisalirasalira mu ntamu erimu eby'okulya, aye nga tabiidhi." 
2Kings4:40 Agho baasenera abantu eby'okulya balye. Aye olwalyaku bati, baaleekaana bati: “Wo muntu wa Katonda, mu ntamu mulimu obutwa!” Era baaloba kwongera kulya." 
2Kings4:41 Elisha yaakoba ati: “Muleeteyooku ku buwunga.” Yaabumiigha mu ntamu. Yaakoba ati: “Mubasenere balye.” Agho mu ntamu mwaba nga timukaalimu kabi naire. 
2Kings4:42 Olundi ghaidhagho omusaadha eyava e Baali Shalisha ng'aleeteire mu nsawo ye ebirime ebisooka okukungulwa eri Elisha omuntu wa Katonda. Mwalimu obufaaganda obw'engaano ye baakakungula, n'emigaati amakumi abiri egya sayiri ye baasooka okukungula. Elisha yaakoba omugheereza we ati: “Ebyo bighe abantu balye.”" 
2Kings4:43 Aye omugheereza we yaamukoba ati: “Nnaasobola ntya okugha obuntu buno bwonka, eri abantu ekikumi.” Elisha yairamu ati: “Iwe gha abantu balye, kuba Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Baidha kulya balekerere n'okulekerera.’ ”" 
2Kings4:44 Kale omugheereza yaata eby'okulya ebyo mu maiso gaibwe, baalya era baalekerera n'okulekerera, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba." 
2Kings5:1 Agho olwatuuka ghaabaagho omusaadha nga ni Naamani, eyali omuduumizi w'eigye lya kyabazinga wa Siria. Naamani oyo yali muntu wa kitiibwa era ng'asiimibwa inho musengwa we, kuba olwa Naamani oyo, Musengwa Katonda yagha Siria obughanguzi. Naamani yali musaadha wa maani aziramu ntete naire, aye yali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge." 
2Kings5:2 Abasiria mu lulumba lwaibwe olundi ku edho dhe baalumbangamu Isiraeli, baali nga baanhaga omughala Omuisiraeli omutomuto, yaafuuka mugheereza wa muka Naamani." 
2Kings5:3 Lwali lulala, omughala oyo yaakoba muka Naamani ati: “Ngoli musengwa wange ajaaku y'omulanzi ali e Samaria, omulanzi oyo yandimuwoniiza endwaire ye ey'ebigenge.”" 
2Kings5:4 Kale Naamani yaaja yaakobera musengwa we ati: “Omughala ye baatoola mu Isiraeli akobye ati n'ati.” 
2Kings5:5 Kyabazinga wa Siria yaakoba ati: “Kale ja. Ndidha kughandiikira kyabazinga wa Isiraeli embaluwa ogimutwalire.” Agho Naamani yaaja ng'atwaire n'ebitundu bya feeza enkumi isatu (3,000), n'ebya zaabu kakaaga (6,000), era n'ebivaalo ikumi ebirungi." 
2Kings5:6 Embaluwa ye yatwalira kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ng'ekoba eti: “Embaluwa eno bw'ekutuukaku, manha nga ninze ntumye Naamani omugheereza wange aidhe y'oli, osobole okumuwonia endwaire ye ey'ebigenge.”" 
2Kings5:7 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli bwe yasoma embaluwa eyo, yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'okusoberwa. Yaakoba ati: “Obwo nze ndi Katonda, ali n'obuyinza okwita n'okugha obulamu? Omusaadha ono aghanga atya okunsindikira omuntu mmuwonie endwaire ye ey'ebigenge? Bwenebwene ali bwa kuneesonsaaku bwesonse afune bw'anaatoolereza okusoola ninze!”" 
2Kings5:8 Elisha omuntu wa Katonda bwe yawulira nga kyabazinga wa Isiraeli akanwiremu ebivaalo bye olw'okusoberwa, yaamusindikira obukwenda ng'akoba ati: “Lwaki okanwiremu ebivaalo byo n'osoberwa otyo? Iwe muleke aidhe ye ndi aghange okumanha nga mu Isiraeli mulimu omulanzi.”" 
2Kings5:9 Kale Naamani yaaja n'embalaasi dhe, n'ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, yaasibira ku mulyango gw'endhu ya Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Elisha yaamutumira omukwenda okumukoba ati: “Ja onaabe emikuzi musanvu mu mwiga Yorudani, oidha kuwona obe mulongoofu.”" 
2Kings5:11 Aye Naamani yaasungughala inho, yaaja ng'akoba ati: “Bona, mbaire ndhuuba nti anaavaayo yaidha yaayemerera ghe ndi, yeeghemba Musengwa Katonda we era yaagheegheeta n'engalo dhe aghali obulwaire, yamponia endwaire ey'ebigenge." 
2Kings5:12 Ate n'ekindi, emiiga Abana ni Farupari egy'e Damasiko giziramu maadhi agasinga amaadhi ag'omu Isiraeli goonagoona obulungi? Tisobola kunaaba omwo ni mba mulongoofu?” Kale yaakyuka yaagolola, nga musungughavu inho." 
2Kings5:13 Aye abagheereza be baaseeta gh'ali, baamukoba bati: “Isebo, ngoli omulanzi akukobye okukola ekintu ekikalangafu, tiwandikikoze? Kale tikikwanguyira inho, bw'akukoba ati, ‘Naaba obe mulongoofu.’ ”" 
2Kings5:14 Agho Naamani yaaserengeta, yaaja yeinhika mu mwiga Yorudani emikuzi musanvu, ng'Elisha omuntu wa Katonda bwe yamukoba. Era omubiri gwe gwaira buto ng'oti gwa mwana muto, yaaba mulongoofu." 
2Kings5:15 Yairayo y'omuntu wa Katonda ghalala ni be yali nabo boonaboona, yaayemerera mu maiso ge, yaakoba ati: “Bona, mpegaano ntegeereire irala nga mu nsi muzira katonda wundi okutoolaku Katonda wa Isiraeli. Kale ganha nze omugheereza wo nkughe ekirabo kye nkuleeteire.”" 
2Kings5:16 Elisha yaakoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu ye mpeereza nti tiidha kubaaku kintu kye ntwala waire ekirala.” Naamani yaamwegayirira inho akitwale, aye yaaloba." 
2Kings5:17 Agho Naamani yaakoba ati: “Oba olobye okutwala ekirabo, nkweghemba ompe eitaka erighanga okwetwikibwa enhumbu eibiri, nditwale ewaife, kuba okuva ni mpegaano, nze omugheereza wo tiidha kughangayo bigheebwayo byokebwa oba misengo eri musambwa waire omulala, okutoolaku eri Musengwa Katonda." 
2Kings5:18 Aye nsaba Musengwa Katonda ansonighenga nze omugheereza wo, bwe naagherekerangaku musengwa wange kyabazinga wa Siria, okuja okusinziza mu isabo lya Rimmoni omusambwa gwa Siria. Bwe nnaakubanga amakiryaivu mu isabo lya Rimmoni, Musengwa Katonda ansonighenga mu ekyo.”" 
2Kings5:19 Elisha yaamukoba ati: “Ja miraala.” Agho Naamani yaaja. Aye yali yaakatambulaku katono," 
2Kings5:20 Gehazi omugheereza wa Elisha omuntu wa Katonda, yaakoba mule ati: “Bona, musengwa wange alese Naamani Omusiria yaaja, nga tamutoireeku ebyo bye yaleeta! Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu nti ndidha kumulumuukirira mbeeku ni kye mmutoolaku.”" 
2Kings5:21 Kale Gehazi oyo yaalumuukirira Naamani. Naamani bwe yabona omuntu ali kumulumuukirira ng'amuvaaku einhuma, yaava mu kigaali eky'omu lutalo okumubona. Yaamubuuza ati: “Eriyo ekizibu?”" 
2Kings5:22 Gehazi yairamu ati: “Busa, ezirayo kizibu. Aye musengwa wange antumye nkukobe nti, ‘Mu kaseera kano abaisuka babiri ku b'omu kikunsu ky'abalanzi, bava kwidha ye ndi nga baviira mu kiketezo kya Efuraimu eky'ensozi. Nkweghemba obampeere ebitundu bya feeza enkumi isatu (3,000), n'ebivaalo ebirungi bibiri.’”" 
2Kings5:23 Naamani yaakoba ati: “Ganha otwale ebitundu bya feeza kakaaga (6,000).” Yaamwegayirira inho, era yaasiba ebitundu bya feeza ebyo mu nsawo ibiri ghalala n'ebivaalo bibiri ebirungi, byonabyona yaabitwika abagheereza be, baabitwala nga bakulembeiremu Gehazi." 
2Kings5:24 Bwe baatuuka ku lusozi Elisha kwe yali, Gehazi yaabibatwikula, yaabitereka mu ndhu. Yaakoba abagheereza ba Naamani bairayo." 
2Kings5:25 Yaingira mu ndhu, yaayemerera mu maiso ga Elisha musengwa we. Elisha yaamubuuza ati: “Ova gha, Gehazi?” Gehazi yairamu ati: “Nze omugheereza wo nkaali kujaaku ghantu woonawoona.”" 
2Kings5:26 Aye Elisha yaamukoba ati: “Tibaire n'iwe mu mwoyo, omusaadha bw'aviire mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo okukubona? Kino n'ekiseera okwefunira empiiya n'ebivaalo, amasamba g'emiti emyoliva n'ag'emizabbibu, entaama n'ente, oba abairu abasaadha n'abairu abakazi?" 
2Kings5:27 Kale ni endwaire ey'ebigenge eya Naamani eidha kukugema, era egemenga n'ab'eizaire lyo ebyanda n'ebyanda.” Gehazi yaja okuva aghaali Elisha ng'ali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge, nga mweru ng'oti mugozi." 
2Kings6:1 Lwali lulala, ab'omu kikunsu ky'abalanzi abaabanga ni Elisha baamukoba bati: “Isebo, weena nga bw'oli kubona, ekifo kye tubaamu n'iwe kitono inho." 
2Kings6:2 Tuganhe tuje ku mwiga Yorudani tutemeyo omuti mulala mulala buli muntu, twezimbiregho ekifo eky'okubaamu.” Elisha yairamu ati: “Kale muje.”" 
2Kings6:3 Omulala ku abo yaakoba ati: “Nkweghemba oganhe oje n'ife abagheereza bo.” Elisha yairamu ati: “Kale tuje.” 
2Kings6:4 Kale yaaja ghalala nabo, era bwe baatuuka ku mwiga Yorudani, baatema emiti." 
2Kings6:5 Aye omulala ku abo bweyali ali kutema omuti, empasa yaaghanguka mu muyini yaagwa mu maadhi. Yaaleekaana ng'akoba ati: “Nkagwireku nze, musengwa wange! Empasa ngyeyaziike bweyazike!”" 
2Kings6:6 Elisha omuntu wa Katonda yaabuuza ati: “Egwire gha?” Ole yaamwoleka ekifo gh'egwire. Elisha yaatema akati, yaakasuula mu maadhi, yaaleetera empasa okulera ku maadhi." 
2Kings6:7 Agho yaakoba ati: “Gitooleyo.” Ole yaaghaaniriza omukono yaagitoolayo. 
2Kings6:8 Lwali lulala kyabazinga wa Siria yaatanula olutalo ku Isiraeli. Yeebuuza ku bakungu be, yaalondagho ekifo mwe banaasimba weema dhaibwe." 
2Kings6:9 Aye Elisha omuntu wa Katonda yagheereza kyabazinga wa Isiraeli obukwenda obulabula ng'akoba ati: “Otageza naire kubita mu kifo ekyo, kuba Abasiria bali kujaayo.”" 
2Kings6:10 Agho kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaagheereza obukwenda obwo obulabula eri ab'omu kiketezo ekyo Elisha omuntu wa Katonda kye yamukoberaku. Elisha yalabulanga kyabazinga ku kifo ekyo emikuzi egigheraku, kale mu nsambo eyo kyabazinga yaawonanga akabi okumutuukaku mu kifo ekyo." 
2Kings6:11 Ekyo kyaleetera kyabazinga wa Siria okutabulwa einho. Yaayeta abakungu be, yaababuuza ati: “Naani mu ife ali ku luuyi lwa kyabazinga wa Isiraeli?”" 
2Kings6:12 Owundi ku bakungu be yairamu ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ghaziragho waire omulala ati. Aye Elisha, omulanzi ali mu Isiraeli, n'akobera kyabazinga wa Isiraeli byonabyona, ni bwe biba ebyo by'oyogerera mu kisenge kyo ky'osulamu.”" 
2Kings6:13 Kyabazinga wa Siria yaakoba ati: “Muje muzuule gh'ali, nsobole okutumayo abantu bamuleete.” Baamukobera bati: “Bona, Elisha ali Dothani.”" 
2Kings6:14 Agho yaasindikayo eigye enene n'embalaasi, n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo. Eigye eryo lyatuukayo bwire, lyazingiza ekibuga okukyezunguluza." 
2Kings6:15 Omugheereza wa Elisha omuntu wa Katonda bwe yazuuka enkyo ku nkyo, yaafuluma. Okuja okulinga ati, ng'abona eigye n'embalaasi, n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, nga bazingiiza ekibuga okukyezunguluza. Agho yaakoba Elisha ati: “Tukagwireku, musengwa wange! Tunaakola tutya?”" 
2Kings6:16 Elisha yaamwiramu ati: “Otatya, kuba abali ku luuyi olwaife, bangi okusinga abali ku luuyi olwaibwe.”" 
2Kings6:17 Agho Elisha yeeghemba Musengwa Katonda ng'akoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghemba oigule amaiso ge aghange okubona.” Musengwa Katonda yaigula amaiso g'omugheereza oyo. Yaja okulinga ati, ng'abona olusozi nga lwidhwire embalaasi n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ebiri kwaka omuliro, nga byezungulwire Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Abasiria bwe baidha okulumba Elisha, Elisha oyo yaasaba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghemba oleetere amaiso g'abantu bano okutulughala.” Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera amaiso gaibwe okutulughala ng'Elisha bwe yasaba." 
2Kings6:19 Agho Elisha yaaja ye bali yaabakoba ati: “Eno engira ye mugemye ti n'entuufu, era kino ti n'ekibuga kye mwidhiriire. Muunonereze nze, ndidha kubatuusa ku muntu ye muli kwagala.” Yaabatwala e Samaria." 
2Kings6:20 Olwatuuka bati mu Samaria, Elisha yaasaba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghemba oigule amaiso g'abantu bano baghange okubona.” Kale Musengwa Katonda yaigula amaiso gaibwe, baabona. Baaja okulinga bati, nga bali mu Samaria ghagati." 
2Kings6:21 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli bwe yabona Abasiria abo, yaabuuza Elisha ati: “Lata wange, mbaite? Mbaite?”" 
2Kings6:22 Elisha yairamu ati: “Busa, otabaita. Ky'okoba oti n'abantu b'oba onhaze mu lutalo, obaita bwite? Baghe emere n'amaadhi balye era banhwe, memale obaleke baireyo ye musengwa waibwe.”" 
2Kings6:23 Agho kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaabafumbira embaga enene. Bwe baamala okulya n'okunhwa, kyabazinga oyo yaabasiibula, bairayo ye musengwa waibwe. Okuva n'olwo, Abasiria baalekera agho okujanga okulumba ensi Isiraeli." 
2Kings6:24 Ebyo bwe byawa, Benihadadi kyabazinga wa Siria yaasoloza eigye lye lyonalyona, yaaja yaazingiza ekibuga Samaria." 
2Kings6:25 Okuzingiza okwo kwaleeta endhala ey'amaani mu kibuga, omutwe gw'endogoyi gwatuuka okugula ebitundu ekinaana ebya feeza, n'akatundu akalala ku buli butundu obuna obwa saabira w'enjiibwa kaagula ebitundu bitaanu ebya feeza." 
2Kings6:26 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli bweyali ng'ali kubita kumpi n'ekimante ky'ekibuga, omukazi mulala yaamulirira ng'akoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, nhamba.”" 
2Kings6:27 Kyabazinga yaamwiramu ati: “Musengwa Katonda mwene bw'ataakuyambe, nze nnaatoola gha eby'okukuyamba, ate nga zeena mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano nzirayo ka kulya, waire mu kikunhiro eky'omwenge gw'emizabbibu okubaayo n'ak'okunhwa?”" 
2Kings6:28 Kyabazinga yaamubuuza ati: “Kizibu ki ky'oli nakyo?” Omukazi yairamu ati: “Omukazi ono yankoba ati, ‘Leeta omwana wo tumulye olwaleero, ate olwaidho twidha kulya owange.’" 
2Kings6:29 Kale twafumba omwana owange, twamulya. Ku lunaku olwairirira naamukoba nti leeta omwana owuwo tumulye, aye mwene yaagisa owuwe!”" 
2Kings6:30 Kyabazinga bwe yawulira omukazi oyo bye yayogera, yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'okunakughala. Abantu abaali agho gha kimante ky'ekibuga ghe yali ali kubita, baabona ng'avaire ekutiya ku mubiri gwe olw'okwebonereza." 
2Kings6:31 Kyabazinga oyo yaakoba ati: “Katonda agwananga yambonereza n'obukambwe, Elisha mutabane wa Safati bwe bataamutemeku mutwe olwaleero.”" 
2Kings6:32 Agho yaatuma omukwenda okweta Elisha. Mu kiseera ekyo Elisha yali ng'atyaime mu ndhu ye eka ghalala n'abakulembeze b'abantu abaidha okumubona. Omukwenda wa kyabazinga bweyali ng'akaali kutuuka, Elisha yaakoba abakulembeze abo ati: “Muli kubona omutemo oyo bw'atumye bantemeku omutwe? Kale mubone eno, omukwenda bw'anaatuuka, mwidha kwigalagho olwigi mulukalangule, alobe kwingira. Ni kyabazinga mwene aidha kuba ng'ali kumuvaaku einhuma.”" 
2Kings6:33 Yali akaayogera nabo, kyabazinga yaatuuka gh'ali, yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda n'atutuusiisaaku akabi kano. Kale lwaki nhongera okuteega okubona Musengwa Katonda ky'anaakola?”" 
2Kings7:1 Elisha yaakoba ati: “Muwulire Musengwa Katonda ky'akoba. Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Olwaidho mu kiseera ng'oti ni kino, ku mulyango ogwingira mu kibuga Samaria, kilo eisatu edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu dhiidha kuba nga dhigula ekitundu kirala ekya feeza, ni kilo omukaaga edha sayiri dhoona dhiidha kuba nga dhigula ekitundu kirala kyonka ekya feeza.’ ”" 
2Kings7:2 Agho omugheereza wa kyabazinga ataamuvangaku, yaabuuza omuntu wa Katonda ati: “Ni bw'aba Musengwa Katonda mwene nga n'agwisiisa amaadhi amangu ago, bwenebwene ekyaga agho kighanga okubaagho?” Elisha yairamu ati: “Oidha kukibonera irala n'amaiso go geene oti, aye ebyo toidha kubiryaku naire.”" 
2Kings7:3 Agho ghaabaagho abasaadha bana abali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge nga bali kuliya kw'omulyango ogwingira mu kibuga Samaria. Beekobaana beene na beene bati: “Lwaki tuli kutyama obwa ghano okutuusa lwe tunaafa? 
2Kings7:4 Bwe tukoba tuti, ‘Twingire mu kibuga,’ ekibuga kirimu endhala era twidha bwa kufiira eyo. Ate bwe tutyama obutyame ghano, era twidha kufa. Kale ni mukole tuje mu kifo Abasiria ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe. Bwe banaatuleka nga tuli balamu, twidha kuba balamu. Aye bwe banaatwita, twidha kufa.”" 
2Kings7:5 Kale baasitula ng'obwire buli kuziba, baaja mu kifo Abasiria ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe. Bwe baakituukaku, baaja okulinga bati nga ghaziragho muntu waire omulala ati" 
2Kings7:6 kuba Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera ab'eigye lya Siria okuwulira okupakalana okw'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'okugabbalya okw'ebigere by'embalaasi, nga kuli ng'oti kwa igye inene. Kale beekobaana beene na beene bati: “Bona, kyabazinga wa Isiraeli apangiisa bakyabazinga ab'Abahitti n'ab'Abamisiri okwidha okutulwanisa!”" 
2Kings7:7 Kale baalumukagho ng'obwire buli kuziba baaja, baalekulira agho eweema dhaibwe, n'embalaasi dhaibwe, n'endogoyi dhaibwe, era n'ekifo kyonakyona ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe baakireka nga bwe kyali." 
2Kings7:8 Abasaadha abo ab'endwaire ey'ebigenge bwe baatuuka ku kifo Abasiria ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, baingira mu yindi ku weema, baalya, baanhwa, era baatoolamu feeza ni zaabu n'ebivaalo, baaja baabigisa. Baamala baira, kabiri baingira mu weema eyindi, baatoolamu ebyalimu, byona baaja baabigisa." 
2Kings7:9 Agho beekobaana beene na beene bati: “Kye tuli kukola ti kituufu. Olwaleero lwa mawulire malungi. Aye bwe tunaagasirikira ni tuteega obwire okukya memale tugasansaanie, baidha kutubonereza. Kale ni mwidhe tuje tukobere abakungu ba kyabazinga.”" 
2Kings7:10 Agho bairayo ku kibuga Samaria, baayeta abaigazi b'ekibuga ekyo, baabakobera bati: “Tujiire mu kifo Abasiria ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, twaloba kwagaanayo waire okuwulirayo omuntu naire omulala ati. Aye ghabairegho bwa mbalaasi na ndogoyi nga nsibe, ni weema nga badhirese nga bwe dhaabaire.”" 
2Kings7:11 Abaigazi b'ekibuga baalangirira amawulire ago, era baagatuusa mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
2Kings7:12 Agho kyabazinga yaasituka mu bwire obwo, yaakoba abakungu be ati: “Ka mbakobere Abasiria kye bategeike: Baidhi ng'endhala etuli bubi, kye baviire ni bava mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, ni baja okwegisa mu irungu nga bakoba bati, ‘Abaisiraeli bwe banaafuluma mu kibuga, twidha kubagema nga balamu twingire ekibuga.’ ”" 
2Kings7:13 Omulala ku bakungu be yaakoba ati: “Leka abasaadha bageme eitaanu ku mbalaasi edhikaasigaireyo, badhivuge bajeeyo, kuba era kiri nti abantu abasigairegho mu kibuga kino, ba kufa ng'oti n'Abaisiraeli abandi boonaboona abafiire. N'olw'ekyo ka tutumeyo tubone.”" 
2Kings7:14 Kale baaleeta ebigaali bibiri eby'omu lutalo, kyabazinga yaatuma abantu okunonereza eigye ery'Abasiria, ng'akoba ati: “Muje mubone ekiriyo.”" 
2Kings7:15 Abakwenda baaja baatuukira irala ku Yorudani, era baabona nga mu ngira mwonamwona mwidhwire ebivaalo n'ebintu ebindi Abasiria bye baasuula nga bali kulumuka. Agho bairayo baakobera kyabazinga." 
2Kings7:16 Abantu ab'omu Samaria baaja baanhaga ebintu mu kifo Abasiria ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe. Kilo eisatu edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu dhaagula ekitundu kirala ekya feeza, ni kilo omukaaga edha sayiri dhoona dhaagula ekitundu kirala kyonka ekya feeza, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba." 
2Kings7:17 Mu kiseera ekyo kyabazinga yali alonze omugheereza we ataamuvangaku, yaamutaagho okukuuma omulyango ogwingira mu kibuga. Abantu baatyankirira omugheereza oyo ng'ali mu mulyango, yaafa ng'Elisha omuntu wa Katonda bwe yalanga ku lule kyabazinga lwe yaja y'ali okumubona." 
2Kings7:18 Elisha oyo yali akobye kyabazinga ati: “Olwaidho mu kiseera ng'oti ni kino, ku mulyango ogwingira mu kibuga Samaria, kilo eisatu edh'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu dhiidha kuba nga dhigula ekitundu kirala ekya feeza, ni kilo omukaaga edha sayiri dhoona dhiidha kuba nga dhigula ekitundu kirala kyonka ekya feeza.”" 
2Kings7:19 Aye omugheereza oyo yairamu Elisha ati: “Ni bw'aba Musengwa Katonda mwene nga n'agwisiisa amaadhi amangu ago, bwenebwene ekyaga agho kighanga okubaagho?” Elisha yairamu ati: “Oidha kukibonera irala n'amaiso go geene oti, aye ebyo toidha kubiryaku naire.”" 
2Kings7:20 Mu nsambo eyo ekyo kyatuukirira, kuba abantu baamutyankirira ng'ali mu mulyango, yaafa." 
2Kings8:1 Elisha yali akobye omukazi Omushunami mwene mwana Elisha oyo ye yaizaamu obulamu, ati: “Kola oje n'ab'endhu yo, obone y'onaaghanga okusenga, kuba Musengwa Katonda aja kusindika endhala ku nsi emale emyaka musanvu ng'eri kuluma.”" 
2Kings8:2 Kale omukazi oyo yaasituka, yaakola ng'omuntu wa Katonda bwe yamukoba. Yaaja n'ab'endhu ye, yaasenga mu nsi ey'Abafilisiti okumala emyaka musanvu." 
2Kings8:3 Emyaka egyo omusanvu bwe gyawaaku, omukazi oyo yaava mu nsi ey'Abafilisiti, yairayo mu Isiraeli. Era yaaja eri kyabazinga okumusaba amwirize endhu ye n'ekibandha kye." 
2Kings8:4 Yaayagaana nga kyabazinga ali kwogera ni Gehazi omugheereza wa Elisha omuntu wa Katonda, ng'ali kukoba ati: “Nkobera byonabyona eby'amaani Elisha bye yakola.”" 
2Kings8:5 Gehazi bweyali ali kukobera kyabazinga ng'Elisha bwe yaiza mu muntu eyali afiire obulamu, omukazi oyo mwene mwana Elisha ye yaizaamu obulamu yaatuuka mu kaseera ako, yaasaba kyabazinga amwirize endhu ye n'ekibandha kye. Agho Gehazi yaakoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, omukazi ye ndi kwogeraku wuuno era n'omwana we n'ono Elisha ye yaizaamu obulamu!”" 
2Kings8:6 Kyabazinga bwe yabuuza omukazi nga bwe byali, omukazi yaamukobera byonabyona. Kale ni, kyabazinga yaamutaaku omukungu ng'amukoba ati: “Omukazi ono mwirize ebintu byonabyona ebyali ebibye, oteeku n'omughendo oguja mu bibala byonabyona ebyava mu kibandha kye, ekiseera kyonakyona kye yamala ng'aziragho.”" 
2Kings8:7 Agho Elisha yaaja e Damasiko. Mu kiseera ekyo Benihadadi kyabazinga wa Siria yali mulwaire. Bwe baakobera Benihadadi oyo bati: “Omuntu wa Katonda aidhie kuno,”" 
2Kings8:8 yaakoba Hazaeli ati: “Twala ekirabo, oje obone omuntu wa Katonda, obite mu oyo weebuuze ku Musengwa Katonda oba nga nnaawona obulwaire buno.”" 
2Kings8:9 Agho Hazaeli yaaja okubona Elisha, ng'atwaire ku bintu byonabyona ebirungi eby'omu Damasiko, ng'abitwise ku ngamiya amakumi ana (40). Bwe yatuuka aghali Elisha, yaakoba ati: “Mutabane wo Benihadadi kyabazinga wa Siria antumye y'oli nkubuuze oba nga anaawona obulwaire obumuluma.”" 
2Kings8:10 Elisha yaamwiramu ati: “Iwe ja omukobe oti, ‘Bwenebwene oidha kuwona.’ Aye mu butuufu nze Musengwa Katonda andholeike ng'aidha kufa.”" 
2Kings8:11 Agho Elisha yaalingirira Hazaeli obutatemya, okutuusa ensoni lwe dhaagema Hazaeli oyo. Elisha omuntu wa Katonda oyo yaalira amaziga." 
2Kings8:12 Hazaeli yaabuuza ati: “Musengwa Katonda wange, lwaki oli kulira?” Elisha yairamu ati: “Lwa kuba ndidhi ebiinoino by'olikola ku Baisiraeli. Olikuma omuliro ku bifo byaibwe eby'okwewogomamu, waita abaana baibwe abaakaisuka, era waabaagamu abakazi baibwe abali enda.”" 
2Kings8:13 Hazaeli yaabuuza ati: “Katyo nze omugheereza wo ndi ng'embwa obubwa, ndisobola ntya okukola ekyaga agho?” Elisha yairamu ati: “Musengwa Katonda andholeike ng'oliba kyabazinga wa Siria.”" 
2Kings8:14 Agho Hazaeli yairayo ye Benihadadi musengwa we. Benihadadi yaamubuuza ati: “Elisha akukobye ki?” Hazaeli yairamu ati: “Ankobye ati bwenebwene oidha kuwona.” 
2Kings8:15 Aye ku lunaku olwairirira, Hazaeli yaatoola ekyebwiko, yaakiinhika mu maadhi, yaakisemba mu nhindo ni mu kanwa mwa kyabazinga Benihadadi, yaafa ekiziyiro. Agho Hazaeli yaasikira Benihadadi ku bwakyabazinga bwa Siria." 
2Kings8:16 Mu mwaka ogwokutaanu nga kyabazinga Yoramu mutabane wa Ahabu n'afuga Isiraeli, Yehoramu yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Yehoramu oyo yali mutabane wa Yehoshafati eyali kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
2Kings8:17 Yali agheza emyaka amakumi asatu n'ebiri egy'obukulu, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka munaana mu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings8:18 Yafumbirwa mughala wa Ahabu, era yaakola ng'ab'endhu ya Ahabu oyo bwe baakola, yaajiira ku mpisa embi edha bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli, yaakola ebibi ye Musengwa Katonda." 
2Kings8:19 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaaloba kuzikiriza Buyudaaya, kuba yasuubiza omugheereza we Daudi ati eizaire lye n'erinaafuganga obwakyabazinga obwo ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
2Kings8:20 Mu biseera bya Yehoramu oyo, Abaedomu baadheemera Buyudaaya, beeteeragho obwakyabazinga obwaibwe." 
2Kings8:21 Yehoramu yaaja e Zairi n'ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo byonabyona. Eigye ery'Abaedomu lyabazingiza okubeezunguluza. Agho mwene ghalala n'abaduumizi b'ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, baasituka obwire baita Abaedomu. Aye ab'eigye lye baalumuka, bairayo eka." 
2Kings8:22 Kale ensi Edomu yaadheema ku Buyudaaya ni ye buli eno. Era mu kiseera kyene ekyo, ekibuga Libuna kyona kyadheema." 
2Kings8:23 Ebindi byonabyona Yehoramu bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings8:24 Kale Yehoramu yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu lwambiidhi ni badhaadha be abo, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Mutabane we Ahazia yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings8:25 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'ebiri (12) nga Kyabazinga Yoramu mutabane wa Ahabu n'afuga Isiraeli, Ahazia mutabane wa Yehoramu yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
2Kings8:26 Yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'ebiri egy'obukulu, era yaafugira entangama ya mwaka mulala mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali nga ni Athalia mughala wa kyabazinga Ahabu, era mwidhukulu wa kyabazinga Omuri owa Isiraeli." 
2Kings8:27 Ahazia nga bweyali omwidhukulu mu ndhu ya Ahabu, yeena yajiira ku mpisa embi edh'ab'endhu ya Ahabu oyo, era yaakola ebibi ye Musengwa Katonda nga bwe baakola." 
2Kings8:28 Kyabazinga Ahazia oyo yaja mu lutalo ni kyabazinga Yoramu owa Isiraeli mutabane wa Ahabu, okulwanisa kyabazinga Hazaeli owa Siria. Olutalo olwo lwataamira e Ramothi Gileadi, Abasiria baafumitira eyo Yoramu ebibwa." 
2Kings8:29 Kyabazinga Yoramu oyo, yairayo e Yezireeli amale okuwona ebibwa Abasiria bye baamufumitira e Rama ng'alwanisa kyabazinga Hazaeli owa Siria. Agho kyabazinga Ahazia mutabane wa Yehoramu kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, yaajaayo okumubona obulwaire." 
2Kings9:1 Agho Elisha omulanzi yaayeta omwisuka mulala ku b'ekikunsu eky'abalanzi, yaamukoba ati: “Weetegeke, ogeme akadoome kano ak'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, oje e Ramothi Gileadi." 
2Kings9:2 Bw'onaatuukayo oidha kwagala Yehu mutabane wa Yehoshafati era mwidhukulu wa Nimushi. Olwo oingire mu ndhu mw'ali, omutoole mu baine, omutwale mu kisenge eky'omunda." 
2Kings9:3 Agho otoole akadoome ak'omuzigo, ogumufuke ku mutwe ng'okoba oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Nkusiize omuzigo guno obe kyabazinga wa Isiraeli.’ Ng'omaze, oidha kwigulagho olwigi olumuke, oveeyo mangu.”" 
2Kings9:4 Agho omwisuka omulanzi yaaja e Ramothi Gileadi," 
2Kings9:5 yaatuukayo ng'abaduumizi b'eigye batyaime mu lwekobaano. Yaakoba ati: “Isebo ndi n'obukwenda bwo.” Yehu yaamubuuza ati: “Naani ku ife y'oli kukoba.” Yairamu ati: “Iwe isebo.” 
2Kings9:6 Yehu yaasituka, bombi baingira mu ndhu. Omwisuka omulanzi yaafuka omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva ku mutwe gwa Yehu, ng'amukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Nkusiize omuzigo guno obe kyabazinga w'abantu bange Abaisiraeli." 
2Kings9:7 Era oidha kwita ab'endhu ya Ahabu musengwa wo, mmwesasuulizeeku olw'abagheereza bange abalanzi n'olw'abagheereza bange abandi, Yezebeli be yaita." 
2Kings9:8 Ab'endhu ya Ahabu boonaboona balizikirira. Era ndimaliragho irala mu Isiraeli buli ayetebwa musaadha asimuka mu Ahabu, k'abe omwiru oba ow'eidembe." 
2Kings9:9 Ab'endhu ya Ahabu ndibakolaku nga bwe nakola ab'endhu ya kyabazinga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati owa Isiraeli, era nga ni bwe nakola ku b'endhu ya kyabazinga Baasha mutabane wa Ahiya owa Isiraeli." 
2Kings9:10 Ghazira muntu aliziika Yezebeli, omulambo gwe embwa dhiriguliira mu kiketezo eky'e Yezireeli.’ ” Omwisuka omulanzi bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, yaigulagho olwigi, yaafuluma yaalumuka." 
2Kings9:11 Agho Yehu yaafuluma, yairayo ye baduumizi baine. Owundi ku abo yaamubuuza ati: “Bye mubaireku bya miraala? Omusaadha oyo omubbamu abaire ali kukukoba ki?” Yehu yaabakoba ati: “Mwena mwidhi bukalamu omusaadha oyo n'ebibono bye.”" 
2Kings9:12 Baamukoba bati: “Busa, ife tukobere mpegaano.” Yehu yaakoba ati: “Akobye ati Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Ndi kukusiiga omuzigo obe kyabazinga wa Isiraeli.’ ”" 
2Kings9:13 Amangu geene ago buli muntu ku baduumizi abo, yaatoolamu ekivaalo kye ky'avaire, yaakyaliirira ku madaala Yehu aniineku. Baafuuwa eigwala baakoba bati: “Yehu ni kyabazinga!”" 
2Kings9:14 Agho Yehu mutabane wa Yehoshafati era mwidhukulu wa Nimushi yaakola olukwe okwita Yoramu. Mu kiseera ekyo, Yoramu n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona baali nga bali kukuuma Ramothi Gileadi kirobe kunhagibwa Hazaeli, kyabazinga wa Siria." 
2Kings9:15 Aye kyabazinga Yoramu yali aizeeyo e Yezireeli amale okuwona ebibwa, Abasiria bye baamufumita ng'alwanisa Hazaeli kyabazinga wa Siria. Agho Yehu yaakoba baduumizi baine ati: “Oba nga muli ku luuyi lwange, mutaganha muntu yeenayeena kuseguka ni yeiba mu kibuga, okuja okukobera ab'e Yezireeli.”" 
2Kings9:16 Agho Yehu yaaniina mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo, yaaja e Yezireeli Yoramu ye yali ng'ali kulwalira. Ni Ahazia kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya yali ajiireyo okumubona obulwaire." 
2Kings9:17 Agho omukuumi yali ayemereire ku kituuti ekirengererwaku mu Yezireeli, yaalengera Yehu n'ekikunsu kye eky'abantu nga kiri kwidha. Yaakoba ati: “Ndi kubona ekikunsu eky'abantu ekiri kwidha.” Yoramu yaakoba ati: “Funayo omuntu omutume ku mbalaasi, aje ye bali ababuuze ati, ‘Mwidhie lwa miraala?’ ”" 
2Kings9:18 Kale omuntu yaajiira ku mbalaasi, yaaja ye Yehu. Yaamukoba ati: “Kyabazinga ali kubuuza ati, ‘Mbu oidhie lwa miraala?’ ” Yehu yairamu ati: “Emiraala oli ku gifaaku gyaki? Bitagho, oire einhuma wange, onnonereze!” Omukuumi eyali eyemereire ku kituuti ekirengererwaku, yaatuusa amawulire ati: “Omukwenda ye ntumye abatuuseeku ye bali, aye tali kwira!”" 
2Kings9:19 Kabiri yaatuma owundi ku mbalaasi, yaabatuukaku era yaakoba ati: “Kyabazinga ali kubuuza ati, ‘Mbu oidhie lwa miraala.’ ” Yehu yairamu ati: “Emiraala oli ku gifaaku gyaki? Bitagho, oire einhuma wange, onnonereze!”" 
2Kings9:20 Omukuumi oyo era yaatuusa amawulire ng'akoba ati: “Omukwenda abatuuseeku ye bali, aye tali kwira! N'envuga y'ekigaali eri ng'oti n'eya Yehu mwidhukulu wa Nimushi, avuga ekiralu!”" 
2Kings9:21 Yoramu yaakoba ati: “Mutegeke ekigaali kyange eky'omu lutalo.” Baakitegeka. Agho Yoramu oyo kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ni Ahazia kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, baasitula nga buli muntu ali mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo, baaja okwagaanana ni Yehu, baamwagaana mu kibandha ekyali ekya Nabothi Omuyezireeli." 
2Kings9:22 Yoramu bwe yabona Yehu, yaamubuuza ati: “Yehu, oidhie lwa miraala?” Yehu yairamu ati: “Miraala ki egisobola okubaagho, ng'okusinza ebitali Katonda n'obulogo ebya inhoko Yezebeli bikaaligho ebingi bityo?”" 
2Kings9:23 Yoramu yaakyusa ekigaali kye eky'omu lutalo, yaalumuka nga bw'akoba Ahazi ati: “Ahazia, luno lukwe!”" 
2Kings9:24 Yehu yaadhuumuula akalaso ke n'amaani ge goonagoona, yaalasa Yoramu akasaale mu mugongo, kaamubita mu mutima, yaagwa mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo." 
2Kings9:25 Yehu yaakoba omugheereza we Bidikari ati: “Mubbeede, omusuule mu kibandha ekyali ekya Nabothi Omuyezireeli, kuba oidhukira bukalamu nga iwe ninze bwe twali ku mbalaasi twembi nga tuli kunonereza lata we Ahabu, Musengwa Katonda yayogera ebibono bino ebikolimira Ahabu, ati," 
2Kings9:26 ‘Bwenebwene ng'olwaidho bwe naboine nga Nabothi ni batabane be babatemwire, nkukakasa nti ndikwesasuulizaaku ghano mu kibandha kino.’ Kale ni mubbeede, omusuule mu kibandha ekyo okutuukiriza ekyo Musengwa Katonda kye yakoba.”" 
2Kings9:27 Ahazia kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya bwe yabona ebibairegho, yaalumukira mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo ng'agemye engira eja e Bethi Haggani. Yehu yaamubingirira, era yaakoba abasaadha be ati: “N'oyo yeena mumufumite.” Baamufumitira mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo, ere ng'oniinaniina Guri ekiri okumpi ni Ibuleamu. Yaalumukira e Megiddo yaafiira eyo." 
2Kings9:28 Abagheereza be baamutwalira mu kigaali eky'omu lutalo, baamwizaayo e Yerusalemu. Baamuziika mu magombe ge mu lwambiidhi lwa badhaadha be, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi." 
2Kings9:29 Ahazia oyo yali nga yafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omulala (11) nga kyabazinga Yoramu mutabane wa Ahabu n'afuga Isiraeli. 
2Kings9:30 Agho Yehu yatuuka mu Yezireeli. Yezebeli yaategeera ebibairegho, yeetonatona amaiso era yaawoomya enviiri ku mutwe gwe, yaalingirira kuliya ng'ali mu idinisa." 
2Kings9:31 Yehu bweyali ng'ali kwingira mu mulyango, Yezebeli yaamweta ati: “Iwe Zimuri eyatemula musengwa wo, oidhie lwa miraala?”" 
2Kings9:32 Yehu yaakyukiza amaiso ghaigulu aghali dinisa, yaakoba ati: “Naani ali ku luuyi lwange? Naani?” Abalaawe ab'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga babiri oba basatu, baamulengezaaku." 
2Kings9:33 Yehu yaabakoba ati: “Mumusuule ghansi!” Baamusuula ghansi, omusaayi gwe gwasambukira ku kimante ni ku mbalaasi. Era embalaasi dhaamutyankirira." 
2Kings9:34 Yehu yaingira mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, yaalya era yaanhwa. Memale yaakoba ati: “Mubone nti muziika omukazi oyo eyakolimirwa, kuba mughala wa kyabazinga.”" 
2Kings9:35 Aye bwe baaja okumuziika tibaayagaanagho kitundu kindi ku mubiri gwe kyonakyona, okutoolaku ekighanga, n'ebigere bye, n'ag'engalo dhe byonka." 
2Kings9:36 Bwe baira ni bakobera Yehu, Yehu yaabakoba ati: “Ekyo Musengwa Katonda kye yakoba ng'abita mu mugheereza we Eliya Omutishubi ati, ‘Embwa dhiririira omulambo gwa Yezebeli mu kiketezo ky'e Yezireeli." 
2Kings9:37 Omulambo gwe guliba mu nsiko ey'eyo mu Yezireeli ng'oti bwa busa, ghabulegho aghanga n'okukoba ati ono ni Yezebeli.’ ”" 
2Kings10:1 Ahabu yaliku abaana nsanvu mu kibuga Samaria. Kale Yehu yaaghandiika embaluwa, yaadhigheereza mu Samaria, eri abafuzi b'ekibuga, n'abakulembeze, n'abakuza ab'abaana n'abaidhukulu ba Ahabu, ng'akoba ati:" 
2Kings10:2 “Mpegaano muli n'abaana aba musengwa waimwe, era mwaba n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'embalaasi, n'eby'okulwanisa, n'ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu. Kale ni embaluwa eno olunaabatuukaku eti," 
2Kings10:3 mulonde omwisuka mulala ku baana ba musengwa waimwe abo, asinga baine boonaboona era agwaniire, mumufuule kyabazinga, mulwanirire ab'endhu ya musengwa waimwe.”" 
2Kings10:4 Aye bale bwe baasoma embaluwa eyo, baatya ekibitiriire, baakoba bati: “Oba nga bakyabazinga ababiri, Yoramu ni Ahazia, tibaaghanga kumulwanisa, memale ife tunaaghanga tutya?”" 
2Kings10:5 Agho akulira ab'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, n'abafuzi b'ekibuga, n'abakulembeze, n'abakuza ab'abaana, baagheereza obukwenda eri Yehu nga bakoba bati: “Ife tuli bagheereza bo, era twidha kukola byonabyona by'onaatulagira. Titwidha kutaagho muntu waire omulala ati okuba kyabazinga. Iwe kola kyonakyona ky'obona nga n'ekirungi.”" 
2Kings10:6 Yehu yaabaghandiikira embaluwa eyindi ng'akoba ati: “Oba nga muli ku luuyi lwange, era nga muli beetegefu okukola bye mbalagira, kale ni muteme emitwe ku baana ba musengwa waimwe, mugindeetere olwaidho e Yezireeli mu kiseera ng'oti ni kino.” Abaana abo ensanvu aba kyabazinga Ahabu, baali mu mikono gy'abantu abakologho ab'omu kibuga abaabalabiriranga." 
2Kings10:7 Kale embaluwa ya Yehu bwe yabatuukaku, baatwala abaana abo boonaboona ensanvu baabaita, baata emitwe gyaibwe mu biibo, baagigheereza Yehu e Yezireeli." 
2Kings10:8 Agho omukwenda yaidha, yaakobera Yehu ati: “Baleese emitwe egy'abaana ba kyabazinga Ahabu.” Yehu yaalagira ati: “Mugibunge mu mmungo ibiri ku mulyango ogwingira ekibuga, gibe agho okutuusa enkyo.”" 
2Kings10:9 Enkyo ku nkyo, yaafuluma yaakoba abantu boonaboona agho ku mulyango gw'ekibuga, ati: “Imwe muziraku musango. Ninze nakola olukwe ni ndhita musengwa wange. Aye naani eyaise bano boonaboona?" 
2Kings10:10 Kale ni mukimanhe nga buli kintu Musengwa Katonda kye yakoba ku b'endhu ya Ahabu, tikiriroba kutuukirira. Musengwa Katonda akoze ekyo kye yayogera ng'abita mu mugheereza we Eliya.”" 
2Kings10:11 Agho Yehu yaita abaali nga bakaasigairegho ku b'endhu ya Ahabu abaali mu Yezireeli, n'abakungu ba Ahabu oyo, ni bakagwa be einho, ni bakabona be. Yehu tiyalekagho muntu waire omulala ati owa Ahabu nga mulamu." 
2Kings10:12 Agho Yehu yaava e Yezireeli okuja e Samaria. Bwe yali ali mu ngira mu kifo ekyetebwa Endhu ey'Abaayi b'Entaama," 
2Kings10:13 yaayagaanana n'ab'endhu ya Ahazia eyali kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Yaababuuza ati: “Niimwe baani?” Baamwiramu bati: “Ife tuli ba ndhu ya Ahazia. Tuli kuja Yezireeli okulamusa ku baana ba Yezebeli inhebantu, era n'abalangira n'abambeedha abandi.”" 
2Kings10:14 Yehu yaalagira ati: “Mubageme nga balamu.” Baabagema, baabaitira kumpi n'ekiina ekyali agho. Baali abantu amakumi ana na babiri (42), era ghazira waire omulala ku abo Yehu ye yalekagho nga mulamu." 
2Kings10:15 Yehu bwe yava agho, yaayagaana Yehonadabu mutabane wa Rekabu ng'ali kwidha okumubona. Yehu yaamulamusa, yaamubuuza ati: “Iwe ninze tufaanania endowooza?” Yehonadabu yairamu ati: “N'ekyo kyene, isebo.” Yehu yaakoba ati: “Oba nga kityo bwekiri, kale mpe eno omukono gwo.” Yehonadabu yaamugha omukono gwe. Yehu yaamuniinisa mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo," 
2Kings10:16 yaamukoba ati: “Idha tuje twembi, obone nga bwe neeghaireyo okutuukiriza ebya Musengwa Katonda.” Agho baajiira bombi mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo." 
2Kings10:17 Bwe baatuuka e Samaria, Yehu yaita ab'endhu ya Ahabu boonaboona abaali bakaasigairegho mu Samaria, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba Eliya." 
2Kings10:18 Agho Yehu yaayeta abantu boonaboona beesoloza, yaabakoba ati: “Ahabu yasinzanga omusambwa Baali katono, aye nze ndidha kugusinza okusingagho." 
2Kings10:19 Kale ni mundhetere abalanzi aba Baali boonaboona, n'abamusinza boonaboona, ni bakabona be boonaboona. Ghatabulagho waire omulala ati, kuba ndi n'omusengo omukologho gwe nja okughaayo eri Baali. Kiisi anaabulagho ku abo aidha kwitibwa.” Aye Yehu yali ali kusala bwa magezi aghange okuzikiriza boonaboona abaali basinza Baali." 
2Kings10:20 Agho Yehu yaalagira ati: “Mulangirire olunaku abantu lwe baneesolokezaaku okusinza Baali.” Era baalulangirira. 
2Kings10:21 Yehu yaayetesa mu Isiraeli mwonamwona abantu abasinza Baali. Baidha boonaboona, ghaaloba kubaayo waire omulala asigalayo. Agho baingira mu isabo lya Baali, lyonalyona lyaidhula." 
2Kings10:22 Yehu yaakoba oyo akulira eiterekero ery'ebivaalo, ati: “Toolerayo abasinza Baali boonaboona ebivaalo, obibaghe.” Yaabibatoolerayo, yaabibagha." 
2Kings10:23 Agho Yehu ni Yehonadabu mutabane wa Rekabu, baingira mu isabo lya Baali. Yehu yaakoba abasinza Baali ati: “Mwagaaze mubone nga ghano mu imwe ghaziragho muntu yeenayeena asinza Musengwa Katonda, okutoolaku abasinza Baali bonka.”" 
2Kings10:24 Agho baingira okughaayo omusengo n'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa. Yehu yali ng'amaze okutaagho abasaadha kinaana kuliya kw'eisabo, ng'abakobye ati: “Oyo anaaleka omuntu yeenayeena okulumuka n'awona, mwene n'aidha okwitibwa mu kifo kye.”" 
2Kings10:25 Yehu bwe yamala okughaayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, yaakoba abakuumi n'abaduumizi ati: “Mwingire mubaite, ghalobe kubaagho alumuka kuwona waire omulala.” Kale baasowolayo empiima baabaita, emirambo baagisuula kuliya. Olwo abakuumi n'abaduumizi baingira mu kifo eky'omunda eky'eisabo lya Baali," 
2Kings10:26 baatoolamu empango ya Baali, baagyokya." 
2Kings10:27 Kale baamenhagho empango ya Baali eyo, era baamenhagho n'eisabo lye. Eisabo eryo ghe lyali, baafuulagho ekifo eky'okujangamu okweyamba, era kityo bwe kikaali ni ye buli eno." 
2Kings10:28 Atyo Yehu bwe yazikiriza okusinza Baali, n'akumaliragho irala mu Isiraeli." 
2Kings10:29 Aye ate yeena yakola ebibi ng'oti ni Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati bwe yakola, ebyaleetera Abaisiraeli okwonoona nga basinza ebifaananie eby'ente ento ebyakolebwa mu zaabu, ebyali e Betheli n'e Dani." 
2Kings10:30 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yehu ati: “Nga bw'okoze obukalamu ebyo bye nsiima, n'otuukiriza byonabyona bye nayenda okukola ab'endhu ya Ahabu, nkusuubiza nti ab'eizaire lyo okutuuka ku luse olwokuna, balityama ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli.”" 
2Kings10:31 Aye Yehu yaaloba kufaayo kujiiranga ku mateeka ga Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli n'omwoyo gwe gwonagwona, yaasigala ng'akaakola ebibi ng'oti ni Yeroboamu bye yakola, ebyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona." 
2Kings10:32 Mu kiseera ekyo, Musengwa Katonda yaatoolera okukendeeza ku nsi Isiraeli. Hazaeli kyabazinga wa Siria yaaghangula ekiketezo kya Isiraeli kyonakyona:" 
2Kings10:33 okuva ku mwiga Yorudani okuja mu bugwandhuba, ekiketezo eky'e Gileadi, n'eky'Abagadi, n'eky'Abareubeni, n'eky'Abamanasse, okuva ku kibuga Aroeri okumpi n'ekiiko ekirimu omwiga Arunoni ekyo nga n'ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'e Gileadi n'e Bashani." 
2Kings10:34 Ebindi byonabyona Yehu bye yakola, omuli n'ebyo bye yakola eby'amaani, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings10:35 Agho Yehu yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu Samaria. Mutabane we Yehoahazi yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings10:36 Yehu yali ng'afugiire Isiraeli mu Samaria, okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi abiri na munaana." 
2Kings11:1 Agho Athalia inhina wa kyabazinga Ahazia bwe yabona nga mutabane we oyo bamwise, yaasituka, yaazikiriza ab'oku lulyo olulangira boonaboona." 
2Kings11:2 Aye Yehosheba mughala wa kyabazinga Yoramu era nga mwanhina Ahazia, yaawoniagho Yoashi omulala ku batabane ba Ahazia oyo. Yamutoola mu balangira abaali baja okwitibwa ng'amwibagho bwibe, yaaja yaamugisa ghalala n'omulezi we mu kisenge ekisulwamu, mu nsambo eyo yaamuwonia Athalia okumwita." 
2Kings11:3 Era Yehosheba oyo yaamulabiriranga ng'amugisiisa mu isinzizo, okumala entangama ya myaka mukaaga, nga Athalia n'afuga nga inhebantu." 
2Kings11:4 Aye mu mwaka ogwomusanvu, Yehoiada kabona yaayetesa abaduumizi b'abakuumi ekikumi ekikumi aba kyabazinga, era yaayetesa n'abakulira abakuumi b'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Baidha y'ali mu isinzizo, yaakola nabo endagaano ng'abalayiza okutuukiriza kye yali ategeike okukola. Agho yaabooleka Yoashi mutabane wa kyabazinga," 
2Kings11:5 era yaabalagira ati: “Kino kye mwidha okukola: bwe munaidha okukuuma mu mpalo dhaimwe ku Sabbato, mwidha kwegabaniamu ebikunsu bisatu nga byagayaga. Ekikunsu ekindi ku ebyo ebisatu eby'abakuumi, baidha kukuuma ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
2Kings11:6 Ekikunsu ekindi era ku bisatu ebyo baidha kuba ku mulyango ogwetebwa Suri. Ate ekikunsu ekinaasigalagho baidha kuba ku mulyango einhuma w'abakuumi bale abandi. 
2Kings11:7 Ab'omu bikunsu ebibiri abamaze empalo dhaibwe ku Sabbato, baidha kukuuma eisinzizo nga beezungulwire kyabazinga Yoashi." 
2Kings11:8 Mwidha kwemerera nga mwezungulwire kyabazinga ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, buli muntu ng'agemye eby'okulwanisa bye. Omuntu yeenayeena anaaseetaku okumpi n'enhiriri dhaimwe nga mumwita. Mwidha kuba ghalala ni kyabazinga buli gh'anaajanga.”" 
2Kings11:9 Abaduumizi baakola byonabyona Yehoiada kabona bye yalagira: buli muduumizi yaaleeta eri Yehoiada oyo abasaadha be abaali baja okukuuma ku Sabbato, ghalala n'abo abaali bamaze okukuuma." 
2Kings11:10 Agho Yehoiada kabona yaagha abaduumizi amafumo n'engabo ebya kyabazinga Daudi, ebyali mu isinzizo." 
2Kings11:11 Abakuumi baayemerera nga buli muntu agemye eby'okulwanisa bye okuva ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'eisinzizo, okutuuka ku luuyi lwalyo olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, n'okwezunguluza alutaari n'eisinzizo." 
2Kings11:12 Agho Yehoiada yaafulumya Yoashi, yaamuvaaza engule ey'obwakyabazinga, yaamugemya n'ekighandiiko ekirimu Amateeka. Agho baasiiga Yoashi omuzigo, baamufuula kyabazinga, era baakuba mu ngalo nga bwe bakoba bati: “Kyabazinga ghangaala!”" 
2Kings11:13 Athalia bwe yawulira okuleekaana kw'abakuumi n'okw'abantu abandi, yaaja mu isinzizo abantu ye baali beesololeiza." 
2Kings11:14 Okuja okulinga ati, ng'abona kyabazinga ayemereire gha mpango, agheemerera kyabazinga ng'empisa bweyali, ng'abafuuyi b'amagwala bamuli kumpi. Era ng'abantu boonaboona bali kusagamba nga bwe bafuuwa amagwala. Agho Athalia yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'okunakughala, nga bw'akoba ati: “Mundiiremu olukwe! Mundiiremu olukwe!”" 
2Kings11:15 Yehoiada tiyayenda Athalia bamwitire mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda. Kale yaalagira abaduumizi b'eigye, ati: “Mumufulumye nga mumubikiza mu nhiriri dh'abaisirukale, era omuntu yeenayeena agezaaku okumutoola mu nhiriri, mumwite bwite.”" 
2Kings11:16 Agho baagema Athalia, baamutwala ku mulyango embalaasi ghe dhingirira mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, baamwitira eyo." 
2Kings11:17 Yehoiada kabona yaaleetera kyabazinga n'abantu, okukola endagaano ni Musengwa Katonda ekakasa nga bwe baidha okubanga abantu aba Musengwa Katonda. Era yaakola endagaano ghagati gha kyabazinga n'abantu." 
2Kings11:18 Agho abantu boonaboona baaja baingira mu isabo lya Baali, baalimenhagho. Era baamenhamenha alutaari n'ebifaananie bye. Ni kabona we eyayetebwanga Mattani, baamwitira emberi w'alutaari. Yehoiada kabona yaataagho abakuumi okukuumanga eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
2Kings11:19 Agho Yehoiada oyo, n'abaduumizi b'abakuumi ekikumi ekikumi aba kyabazinga, n'abakulira abakuumi b'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, era n'abantu boonaboona, baatoola kyabazinga mu isinzizo baamutwala mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, nga babitira mu Mulyango ogw'Abakuumi. Kyabazinga yaaja yaatyama ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga." 
2Kings11:20 Agho abantu boonaboona baasagamba, ekibuga kyatereera, nga bamaze okwitira Athalia mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
2Kings11:21 Yoashi yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya ng'agheza emyaka musanvu egy'obukulu. 
2Kings12:1 Mu mwaka ogwomusanvu nga kyabazinga Yehu n'afuga Isiraeli, Yoashi yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi ana (40) mu Yerusalemu. Eriina lya inhina nga ni Zibia ow'e Beerisheba." 
2Kings12:2 Yoashi yaakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima ekiseera kyonakyona, kuba Yehoiada kabona ng'atyo bw'amwegeresa." 
2Kings12:3 Aye era ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu tiyabitoolagho, kale abantu baasigala nga bakaagheera emisengo n'okuniokeza obubbaani mu bifo ebyo." 
2Kings12:4 Agho Yoashi yaakoba bakabona ati: “Empiiya dhoonadhoona edhiva mu bintu ebigheebwayo ye Musengwa Katonda edhireetebwa mu isinzizo, edho nga n'empiiya kiisi muntu dh'agerekerwa okugha, era oteeku n'edho omuntu dh'aba nga yeeyamye mwene okugha," 
2Kings12:5 dhigemesebwenga bakabona, nga buli kabona agema edh'abantu b'akolamu. Olwo empiiya edho dhiidha kukozesebwanga okulongoosa eisinzizo buli lwe kinaabanga nga kyetaagisa.”" 
2Kings12:6 Aye omwaka ogwamakumi abiri n'esatu (23) nga kyabazinga Yoashi n'afuga gwatuuka, aye nga bazira ghe balongoosiisaaku naire." 
2Kings12:7 Kyabazinga Yoashi kyeyava n'ayeta Yehoiada kabona ni bakabona abandi, yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki timuli kulongoosa isinzizo? Kale ni mulekere agho okutoolanga empiiya ku bantu be mukolamu ni mu dhisigaza. Aye mudhighengayo dhikozesebwe okulongoosa eisinzizo.”" 
2Kings12:8 Bakabona baikiriza obutayongera kutoola ku bantu mpiiya, era baikiriza obutalongoosa isinzizo eryo beene." 
2Kings12:9 Agho Yehoiada kabona yaatoola esanduuku, yaagitunamu ekituli ku kisandikiza kyayo, yaagita kumpi ni alutaari ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha, omuntu ng'ali kwingira mu isinzizo. Bakabona abaakuumanga omulyango ogwingira, n'abaatanga mu sanduuku eyo empiiya dhoonadhoona abantu dhe baaleetanga mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
2Kings12:10 Bwe baabonanga nga mu sanduuku mughezeemu empiiya kamaala, omughandiisi wa kyabazinga n'Omukulu wa Bakabona baidhanga, baabala empiiya edho dhe baagaine mu isinzizo, baadhisiba mu bisawo." 
2Kings12:11 Empiiya edho dhe babaze, baadhigemya abo abalabirira omulimo ogw'okulongoosa eisinzizo, ate abo baadhisasula ababaadhi, n'abazimbi abakola mu isinzizo," 
2Kings12:12 n'abazimbisa amabaale, era n'abagatema. Era baagula emiti n'amabaale amateme, babikozese mu kulongoosa eisinzizo. Era baasasulira n'ebindi byonabyona ebyetaagisa ku mulimo ogwo." 
2Kings12:13 Aye empiiya edho dhe baasolozanga mu isinzizo, tibaadhikozesaaku kusasulira benseni edha feeza, ni makansu edhisala ebisiriiza ku ntambi dh'entaala, n'ebibya, n'amagwala, n'ebintu ebindi byonabyona ebikozesebwa mu isinzizo, ka bibe bya zaabu oba bya feeza." 
2Kings12:14 Dhoonadhoona baadhikozesa kusasula bakozi na kugula byonabyona bye baakozesa mu kulongoosa eisinzizo. 
2Kings12:15 Era abantu be baagemyanga empiiya okusasula abakozi, tibaabasabanga kwinhonhola nsambo ye badhikozeisaamu, kuba abantu abo baadhikozesanga na bwesigwa." 
2Kings12:16 Empiiya edhaagheebwangayo ng'omutango era n'edho edhaagheebwangayo olw'ebibi, tibaadhireetanga mu isinzizo dhaabanga dha bakabona." 
2Kings12:17 Mu kiseera ekyo Hazaeli kyabazinga wa Siria yaalumba ekibuga Gathi yaakighangula. Agho yaakyuka okuja okulwanisa ekibuga Yerusalemu. 
2Kings12:18 Aye Yoashi kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya yaatoola ebintu byonabyona badhaadha be Yehoshafati ni Yehoramu ni Ahazia, abaaliku bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya bye baaghaayo ye Musengwa Katonda, era n'ebyo mwene bye yali aghaireyo, ni zaabu yeenayeena eyali mu iterekero ly'eisinzizo ni mu ly'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, yaabigheereza Hazaeli kyabazinga wa Siria. Olwo Hazaeli yaava mu Yerusalemu, yaaja." 
2Kings12:19 Ebindi byonabyona Yoashi bye yakola byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo eky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya. 
2Kings12:20 Abakungu be baakola olukwe baamwitira mu ndhu ey'omu kifo ekyaidhuzibwamu eitaka ekyetebwa Millo, ku ngira eja e Silla." 
2Kings12:21 Abakungu be, Yozakari mutabane wa Shimeathi ni Yehozabadi mutabane wa Shomeri, n'abaamufumita, n'afa. Era baamuziika mu badhaadha be abaafa, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Mutabane we Amazia yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings13:1 Mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri n'esatu (23) nga kyabazinga Yoashi mutabane wa Ahazia n'afuga Buyudaaya, Yehoahazi mutabane wa Yehu yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafugira mu Samaria okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi na musanvu." 
2Kings13:2 Yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, nga kyabazinga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati bye yakola, ebyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona. Era Yehoahazi oyo yaaloba kuva mu bibi ebyo." 
2Kings13:3 Obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwatumbukira ku Isiraeli ng'oti muliro, yaaleetera Hazaeli kyabazinga wa Siria ni mutabane we Benihadadi okubaghangulanga emikuzi egighera." 
2Kings13:4 Agho Yehoahazi yeeghemba Musengwa Katonda ng'amusaba, era Musengwa Katonda yaawulira okusaba kwe, kuba yabona kyabazinga wa Siria bweyali abisa obubi Abaisiraeli." 
2Kings13:5 Musengwa Katonda yaagha Abaisiraeli omuntu yaabanunula, yaabawonia okufugibwa Abasiria. Abaisiraeli baaba mu miraala nga bwe baabanga eira."
