2Kings13:6 Aye ate baaloba kuva mu bibi ab'endhu ya Yeroboamu bye baabaleetera okukola, beeyongera bweyongere okubikola. N'ekifaananie ky'omusambwa omukazi Ashera, kyasigala mu Samaria." 
2Kings13:7 Yehoahazi tiyasigazaagho igye lirimu balwani baswika mu makumi ataanu (50) ab'oku mbalaasi, oba ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ebiswika mu ikumi (10), waire abaisirukale abaswika mu mutwalo omulala (10,000) ab'oku bigere kuba kyabazinga wa Siria yazikiriza abandi boonaboona, yaabatyankirira ng'oti nkungu ey'omu kifo ghe bakubira engaano." 
2Kings13:8 Ebindi byonabyona Yehoahazi bye yakola, omuli n'eby'amaani bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings13:9 Agho Yehoahazi yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu Samaria. Mutabane we Yehoashi yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings13:10 Mu mwaka ogwamakumi asatu n'omusanvu (37) nga kyabazinga Yoashi n'afuga Buyudaaya, Yehoashi mutabane wa Yehoahazi yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafugira mu Samaria okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi na mukaaga." 
2Kings13:11 Yeena yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, ng'oti n'ebya kyabazinga Yeroboamu ebyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona. Era Yehoashi oyo yaaloba kuleka bibi ebyo, aye yaaja bwa mu maiso na kubikola." 
2Kings13:12 Ebindi byonabyona Yehoashi bye yakola, omuli n'eby'amaani bye yakola ng'ali kulwanisa Amazia kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings13:13 Agho Yehoashi yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa e Samaria mu lwambiidhi lwa bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli. Mutabane we Yeroboamu yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings13:14 Agho Elisha yaalwala obulwaire obwamuviiraku okufa. Yehoashi kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaaja y'ali okumubona. Yaalira amaziga ng'akoba ati: “Lata wange, lata wange! Iwe ow'amaani ng'oti bigaali bya mu lutalo n'embalaasi, ebirwanirira Isiraeli!”" 
2Kings13:15 Elisha yaamukoba ati: “Gema akalaso n'obusaale.” Yehoashi yaagema akalaso n'obusaale. 
2Kings13:16 Elisha yaakoba Yehoashi kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ati: “Dhuumuula akalaso.” Kyabazinga yaakadhuumuula. Elisha yaata emikono gye ku mikono gya kyabazinga. 
2Kings13:17 Yaakoba ati: “Igulagho eidinisa eriringiriire e buvandhuba.” Yaaliigulagho. Agho Elisha yaakoba ati: “Lasa akalaso.” Kyabazinga yaalasa. Elisha yaakoba ati: “Ako n'akalaso ka Musengwa Katonda ak'obughanguzi, akalaso akalighangula Siria. Olirwanisa Abasiria mu Afeki okutuusa lw'olibamalagho.”" 
2Kings13:18 Agho Elisha yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Gema obusaale.” Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaabugema. Elisha yaamukoba ati: “Bulase bukube ku itaka.” Kyabazinga yaabulasa emikuzi esatu bwakuba ku itaka, yaalekera agho." 
2Kings13:19 Omuntu wa Katonda oyo Elisha yaasungughalira kyabazinga, yaamukoba ati: “Wandibaire okubye emikuzi etaanu oba mukaaga. Olwo wandibaire okubye Abasiria okutuusa lwe wandibazikiriiza. Aye mpegaano oja kubaghangula bwa mikuzi esatu gyonka.”" 
2Kings13:20 Agho Elisha yaafa, baamuziika. Ghaabaagho ebikunsu eby'Abamoabu ebyaidhanga okulumba ensi Isiraeli agho ng'omwaka gwakainhama." 
2Kings13:21 Lwali lulala, ghaabaagho Abaisiraeli abaali baja okuziika omuntu, baabona ekindi ku bikunsu ebyo nga kiri kwidha. Agho baasuula omulambo bwa mu magombe ga Elisha, baalumuka. Omulambo ogwo olwasiinha ku magumba ga Elisha guti, ng'omusaadha oyo alamuka, era ng'ayemerera." 
2Kings13:22 Kyabazinga Hazaeli owa Siria yatuntuzanga Abaisiraeli ekiseera kyonakyona kyabazinga Yehoahazi kye yafugiramu Isiraeli. 
2Kings13:23 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaabagemerwa ekivunika, yaabasaasira. Yaira ku luuyi lwaibwe yaababeera olw'endagaano ye yakola ni Aburahamu ni Isaaka ni Yakobo, era yaaloba kubazikiriza waire okubabinga mu maiso ge ni ye buli eno." 
2Kings13:24 Hazaeli kyabazinga wa Siria bwe yafa, mutabane we Benihadadi yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings13:25 Agho kyabazinga Yehoashi owa Isiraeli, mutabane wa Yehoahazi, yaaghangula Benihadadi emikuzi esatu, yaamutoolaku ebibuga bya Isiraeli, Benihadadi oyo bye yali anhaze ng'alwanisa Yehoahazi lata wa Yehoashi oyo." 
2Kings14:1 Mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga kyabazinga Yehoashi mutabane wa Yehoahazi n'afuga Isiraeli, Amazia mutabane wa Yoashi yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
2Kings14:2 Yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi abiri na mwenda mu Yerusalemu. Eriina lya inhina nga ni Yehoaddini ow'e Yerusalemu." 
2Kings14:3 Amazia yakola ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, aye tiyatuuka ku ebyo dhaadha we Daudi bye yakola. Amazia oyo yakola ebyo byonabyona lata we Yoashi bye yakolanga." 
2Kings14:4 Aye ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu tibaabitoolagho. Abantu baasigala nga bakaagheera emisengo n'okuniokeza obubbaani mu bifo ebyo. 
2Kings14:5 Agho Amazia bwe yamala okukakata ku bwakyabazinga, yaita abakungu be abaita lata we, kyabazinga Yoashi." 
2Kings14:6 Aye tiyaita baana baibwe, kuba yajiira ku kyaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo eky'Amateeka ga Musa, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira ati: “Abazaire mutabaitanga lwa misango baana baibwe gye baiziiza, n'abaana mutabaitanga lwa misango gya bazaire baibwe gye baiziiza. Omuntu aidha kwitibwanga lwa musango gw'anaabanga ng'aiziiza mwene.”" 
2Kings14:7 Amazia yaitiramu Kiiko ky'Omuunhu abaisirukale Abaedomu omutwalo mulala (10,000), yaanhaga ekibuga Sela mu lutalo, yaakituuma eriina Yokitheeli, lye bakaakyeta ni ye buli eno." 
2Kings14:8 Agho Amazia yaatuma abakwenda eri kyabazinga Yehoashi owa Isiraeli, mutabane wa Yehoahazi era mwidhukulu wa Yehu, ng'akoba ati: “Idha twagaanane, tulinzaganie obweni.”" 
2Kings14:9 Ate kyabazinga Yehoashi owa Isiraeli yaagheereza kyabazinga Amazia owa Buyudaaya obukwenda ng'akoba ati: “Olukandwa olwali ku lusozi Lebanoni lwagheereza obukwenda eri omuvule ogwali ku lusozi olwo Lebanoni, nga lukoba luti: ‘Gha mutabane wange mughala wo amubayize.’ Agho ensolo ey'omu nsiko ey'oku lusozi Lebanoni bweyali ebita, yaatyankirira olukandwa olwo." 
2Kings14:10 Kituufu waghangula Edomu, ekyo kyakuleetera okwekuluntaza. Kale ni ba ewuwo weesaake n'ekyo. Lwaki onaawuula ebizibu eby'okukuzikiriza iwe ni Buyudaaya yoonayoona?”" 
2Kings14:11 Aye Amazia yaaloba okuwulirisa. Kale Yehoashi kyabazinga wa Isiraeli kyeyava ni yeesowolayo okulumba Amazia kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, baalinzagania obweni mu lutalo olwali e Bathi Shemeshi ekya Buyudaaya." 
2Kings14:12 Isiraeli yaaghangula Buyudaaya, kiisi mwisirukale wa Buyudaaya yaalumuka okwirayo ewuwe." 
2Kings14:13 Agho kyabazinga Yehoashi owa Isiraeli, yaagema kyabazinga Amazia owa Buyudaaya mutabane wa Yoashi era mwidhukulu wa Ahazia, ng'amugemera e Bethi Shemeshi. Yaamuleeta e Yerusalemu era Yehoashi oyo yaamenha ekisenge ekyezungulwire ekibuga Yerusalemu ekyo, okuva ku Mulyango gwa Efuraimu okutuuka ku Mulyango Ogwokunsonda obwo nga n'obuleeyi bwa mita ng'oti ebikumi bibiri (200)." 
2Kings14:14 Yaanhaga zaabu ni feeza yeenayeena, n'ebintu ebikozesebwa byonabyona bye yayagaana mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, n'eby'obukombe eby'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, era yaatwala n'abantu ng'omusingo. Agho yairayo e Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Ebindi byonabyona Yehoashi bye yakola, omuli n'eby'amaani bye yakola, ni bwe yalwanisa Amazia kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings14:16 Agho Yehoashi yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu lwambiidhi lwa bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli e Samaria. Mutabane we Yeroboamu yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings14:17 Kyabazinga Amazia owa Buyudaaya, mutabane wa Yoashi, yasigala ng'akaaligho okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi n'etaanu, nga kyabazinga Yehoashi mutabane wa Yehoahazi amaze okufa." 
2Kings14:18 Ebindi byonabyona Amazia bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings14:19 Ghaaligho abaakola olukwe mu Yerusalemu okwita Amazia oyo. Kale yaalumukira mu kibuga ky'e Lakishi, aye era baatumayo abantu okumunooniayo, baamwitirayo." 
2Kings14:20 Omulambo gwe baaguleetera ku mbalaasi, baamuziika mu Yerusalemu mu lwambiidhi lwa badhaadha be, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi." 
2Kings14:21 Abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya, baalonda Azaria eyali ng'agheza emyaka eikumi n'omukaaga egy'obukulu, baamufuula kyabazinga okusikira lata we Amazia." 
2Kings14:22 Azaria yaiza ekibuga Elathi ku Buyudaaya era yaakizimba buyaaka, nga lata we amaze okufa ni yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa." 
2Kings14:23 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'etaanu (15) nga kyabazinga Amazia mutabane wa Yoashi n'afuga Buyudaaya, Yeroboamu mutabane wa Yehoashi yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafugira mu Samaria okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi ana na mulala (41)." 
2Kings14:24 Yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda nga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati bye yakola, ebyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona." 
2Kings14:25 Yaghangula yaizaayo ensalosalo ya Isiraeli okuva aghaingirirwa e Hamathi okutuukira irala ku Nhandha Eyomuunhu, nga Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli bwe yakoba ng'abita mu mugheereza we, omulanzi Yona mutabane wa Amittai ow'e Gathi Heferi." 
2Kings14:26 Musengwa Katonda yabona okudaazibwadaazibwa okw'Abaisiraeli okutaloodheka, era nga ghaziragho muntu yeenayeena aghanga kubayamba, k'abe omusibe oba ow'eidembe." 
2Kings14:27 Aye Musengwa Katonda tiyayenda kusaaniagho Baisiraeli kubamalagho ku nsi. Kyeyava n'abawonia ng'abita mu Yeroboamu owokubiri mutabane wa Yehoashi. 
2Kings14:28 Ebindi byonabyona Yeroboamu owokubiri bye yakola, omuli n'eby'amaani bye yakola, n'entalo dhe yalwana, era n'ensambo ye yaizaamu ku Isiraeli ebibuga Damasiko ni Hamathi ebyali mu Buyudaaya, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings14:29 Agho Yeroboamu Owokubiri yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli. Mutabane we Zekaria yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings15:1 Mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri n'omusanvu (27) nga kyabazinga Yeroboamu Owokubiri n'afuga Isiraeli, Uzzia mutabane wa Amazia yafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
2Kings15:2 Yali agheza emyaka ikumi na mukaaga egy'obukulu, era yaafugira mu Yerusalemu okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi ataanu n'ebiri (52). Inhina nga ni Yekolia ow'e Yerusalemu." 
2Kings15:3 Uzzia yaakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, nga lata we Amazia bye yakolanga." 
2Kings15:4 Aye ate ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu tiyabitoolagho. Kale abantu baasigala nga bakaagheera emisengo n'okuniokeza obubbaani mu bifo ebyo. 
2Kings15:5 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera Uzzia okulwala endwaire ey'ebigenge, yaaba nayo okutuusa lwe yafa. Yaabanga mu ndhu yiye yenka. Mutabane we Yothamu yaasigala nga n'alabirira ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyazinga, era nga n'afuga ensi eyo." 
2Kings15:6 Ebindi byonabyona Azaria bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings15:7 Agho Uzzia yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu lwambiidhi lwa badhaadha be abo mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Mutabane we Yothamu yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings15:8 Mu mwaka ogw'amakumi asatu n'omunaana (38) nga kyabazinga Uzzia n'afuga Buyudaaya, Zekaria yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, kyabazinga Yeroboamu owokubiri nga n'amuzaala. Yaafugira mu Samaria okumala entangama ya myezi mukaaga." 
2Kings15:9 Yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda nga badhaadha be bwe baakolanga. Yaakola ebibi ng'ebya Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati, ebyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona." 
2Kings15:10 Agho Shallumu mutabane wa Yabeshi yaamukolera olukwe, yaamufumitira mu Ibuleamu, yaamwita, era yaafuga mu kifo kye." 
2Kings15:11 Ebindi byonabyona Zekaria bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:12 Ekyo kyatuukiriza Musengwa Katonda kye yasuubiza kyabazinga Yehu, ati: “Ab'eizaire lyo okutuuka ku luse olwokuna, balityama ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli.”" 
2Kings15:13 Mu mwaka ogwasatu n'omwenda (39) nga kyabazinga Uzzia n'afuga Buyudaaya, Shallumu mutabane wa Yabeshi yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafugira mu Samaria okumala entangama ya mwezi mulala." 
2Kings15:14 Agho Menahemu mutabane wa Gadi, yaava e Tiruza yaaja e Samaria, yaita Shallumu, yaafuga mu kifo kye." 
2Kings15:15 Ebindi byonabyona Shallumu bye yakola, omuli n'olukwe olw'okwita Zekaria lwe yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:16 Agho Menahemu yaazikiriza ekibuga Tappua, n'abaakirimu boonaboona, n'ebiketezo ebikiriiraine okuviira irala e Tiruza kuba baaloba okumwiguliragho okwingira. N'abakazi boonaboona abaakirimu nga bali mabunda, amabunda yaagabaagamu!" 
2Kings15:17 Mu mwaka ogwamakumi asatu n'omwenda (39) nga Uzzia n'afuga Buyudaaya, Menahemu mutabane wa Gadi yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. Yaafugira mu Samaria okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi." 
2Kings15:18 Yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, era enaku edh'obulamu bwe dhoonadhoona yaaloba kulekera okukola ebibi ng'ebya Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati, ebyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona." 
2Kings15:19 Agho Puli kyabazinga w'e Siria, yaalumba Isiraeli. Menahemu yaagha Puli oyo kilo emitwalo amakumi asatu n'ena (340,000) edha feeza, olwo Puli oyo aghange okuyamba Menahemu okukakata ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings15:20 Empiiya edho dhe yagha kyabazinga w'e Siria, Menahemu yadhisoloza ku basaadha boonaboona abakombe ab'omu Isiraeli. Kiisi musaadha yaghaayo ebitundu amakumi ataanu ebya feeza. Agho Puli kyabazinga w'e Siria yaakyuka yairayo, yaaloba kusigala mu nsi eyo Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:21 Ebindi byonabyona Menahemu bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:22 Agho Menahemu yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa. Mutabane we Pekahia yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga. 
2Kings15:23 Mu mwaka ogwamakumi ataanu (50) nga kyabazinga Uzzia n'afuga Buyudaaya, Pekahia mutabane wa Menahemu yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. Yaafugira mu Samaria okumala entangama ya myaka ebiri." 
2Kings15:24 Yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda nga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati bye yakola, ebyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona." 
2Kings15:25 Agho omuduumizi ow'eigye lye ayetebwa Peka, mutabane wa Remalia, yaakola olukwe n'abasaadha amakumi ataanu abaava e Gileadi, yaamwitira e Samaria mu kifo eky'okwewogomamu eky'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Olwo Peka oyo yaafuuka kyabazinga mu kifo kya Pekahia." 
2Kings15:26 Ebindi byonabyona Pekahia bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:27 Mu mwaka ogwamakumi ataanu n'ebiri (52) nga kyabazinga Uzzia n'afuga Buyudaaya, Peka mutabane wa Remalia yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. Yaafugira mu Samaria okumala entangama ya myaka makumi abiri." 
2Kings15:28 Yaakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda nga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati bye yakola, ebyaleetera Isiraeli okwonoona." 
2Kings15:29 Mu biseera Peka bye yafugiramu Isiraeli, ghaabaagho kyabazinga Tigulathi Pileseri ow'e Assiria yaidha yaagema ebibuga Iyoni, ni Abeli Bethi Maaka, ni Yanoa, ni Kedeshi, ni Hazori, n'ebiketezo eby'e Gileadi, n'eby'e Galilaaya, n'eby'e Nafutali. Era yaatwala n'abantu mu Assiria nga banhage." 
2Kings15:30 Mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri (20) nga kyabazinga Yothamu mutabane wa Uzzia n'afuga Buyudaaya, Hoshea mutabane wa Ela yaakola olukwe, yaafumita Peka mutabane wa Remalia, yaamwita. Olwo Hoshea oyo yaafuuka kyabazinga mu kifo kye." 
2Kings15:31 Ebindi byonabyona Peka bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:32 Mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga kyabazinga Peka mutabane wa Remalia n'afuga Isiraeli, Yothamu mutabane wa Uzzia yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
2Kings15:33 Yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu egy'obukulu, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi na mukaaga mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali nga ni Yerusha mughala wa Zadoki." 
2Kings15:34 Yothamu yaakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, nga lata we Uzzia bye yakolanga." 
2Kings15:35 Yaazimba omulyango ogw'eitale ogw'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda. Aye ate ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu tiyabitoolagho. Kale abantu baasigala nga bakaagheerayo emisengo n'okuniokeza obubbaani mu bifo ebyo. 
2Kings15:36 Ebindi byonabyona Yothamu bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings15:37 Mu biseera Yothamu bye yafugiramu, Musengwa Katonda mwe yatoolereza okusindika Rezini kyabazinga wa Siria ni Peka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli era mutabane wa Remalia, baaja baalumba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings15:38 Agho Yothamu yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu badhaadha be abo, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi dhaadha we. Mutabane we Ahazi yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings16:1 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omusanvu nga kyabazinga Peka mutabane wa Remalia n'afuga Isiraeli, Ahazi mutabane wa Yothamu yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
2Kings16:2 Yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri egy'obukulu, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi na mukaaga mu Yerusalemu. Tiyajiiranga ku mpisa nungi edha dhaadha we Daudi, eyakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda we by'asiima." 
2Kings16:3 Aye yaajiiranga ku mpisa embi edha bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli. Yaatuuka n'okwokya mutabane we ng'ekigheebwayo, ng'empisa eyenhinhalwa bweyali ey'abamaghanga agandi, Musengwa Katonda be yabinga mu nsi eyo nga Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuukayo." 
2Kings16:4 Yaaghangayo emisengo era yaaniokezanga obubbaani mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, ni ku nsozi, na buli ghansi mu kinsense kya muti muzibirivu." 
2Kings16:5 Agho Rezini kyabazinga wa Siria, ni Peka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli era mutabane wa Remalia, baidha okulumba Yerusalemu. Baazingiza Ahazi okumwezunguluza, aye baaloba kusobola kumughangula." 
2Kings16:6 Mu kiseera ekyo, kyabazinga wa Edomu yaaghangula ekibuga Elathi, yaakiizaayo ku Edomu kwe kyabanga. Era yaakibingamu Abayudaaya abaakirimu, Abaedomu baidha baakibaamu okutuusa ni ye buli eno." 
2Kings16:7 Agho Ahazi yaagheereza abakwenda ye kyabazinga Tigulathi Pileseri ow'e Assiria, ng'akoba ati: “Nze ndi mugheereza wo era mwana wo. Idha omponie kyabazinga wa Siria ni kyabazinga wa Isiraeli abaanumbye.”" 
2Kings16:8 Agho Ahazi yaatoolayo feeza ni zaabu ebyali mu isinzizo ni mu iterekero ly'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, yaabigheereza kyabazinga w'e Assiria ng'ekirabo." 
2Kings16:9 Kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaikiriza, yaaja yaalumba ekibuga Damasiko yaakigema, yaita kyabazinga Rezini, era yaatwala abantu baayo e Kiri nga banhage." 
2Kings16:10 Agho kyabazinga Ahazi yaaja e Damasiko ye kyabazinga Tigulathi Pileseri ow'e Perusia. Ahazi oyo yaabona alutaari eyali e Damasiko. Agho yaagheereza Uria kabona ekifaananie ky'alutaari eyo, ekyoleka ensambo ye yakolebwamu, aghazira kulekayo kintu waire ekirala kiti." 
2Kings16:11 Uria kabona yaazimba alutaari ng'ajiira ku ebyo byonabyona kyabazinga Ahazi bye yamugheereza ng'ali e Damasiko. Yaagikola atyo era yaagimaliriza nga kyabazinga Ahazi akaali kwira okuva e Damasiko. 
2Kings16:12 Kyabazinga bwe yaira okuva e Damasiko, yaabona ng'alutaari ewoire okuzimba. Agho yaaseeta gh'eri," 
2Kings16:13 yaagyokeraku ekigheebwayo kye ekyokebwa, n'ekigheebwayo kye eky'emere ey'empeke, era yaagiyughaku ekigheebwayo eky'ebyokunhwa, era yaagimansiraku omusaayi ogw'ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
2Kings16:14 Alutaari ey'ekyuma eky'ekikomo eya Musengwa Katonda, yali ghagati gh'alutaari empyaka n'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda. Aye Ahazi yaagitoolagho, yaagita ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba w'alutaari ere empyaka." 
2Kings16:15 Agho kyabazinga Ahazi yaalagira Uria kabona ati: “Ku alutaari eno enkologho kw'onaayokeranga ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa eby'enkyo, n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke eby'eigulo, n'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa era n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke ebya kyabazinga n'eby'abantu ab'omu ighanga lino, era n'ebigheebwayo eby'abantu eby'okunhwa. Era ku alutaari eyo kw'onaamansiranga omusaayi ogw'emisengo egigheebwayo egyokebwa. Aye alutaari ey'ekyuma eky'ekikomo enaabanga yange, ya kwebuulizangaku eri Musengwa Katonda.”" 
2Kings16:16 Uria kabona yaakola byonabyona nga kyabazinga Ahazi bwe yamulagira. 
2Kings16:17 Kyabazinga Ahazi yaasala ku bituuti fuleemu dhaaku, yaatoolamu ebenseni yaamu. Era yaatoola etanka ku bifaananie eby'ente enume eikumi n'eibiri ebyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, yaagita ku musingi ogw'amabaale amataanhe." 
2Kings16:18 Era olw'okwenda okusanhusa kyabazinga w'e Assiria, Ahazi yaatoolagho olukuubo olusereke olw'okubitamu ku Sabbato olwali munda mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Yaaziba n'omulyango kyabazinga gwe yaingirirangamu mu isinzizo." 
2Kings16:19 Ebindi byonabyona Ahazi bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings16:20 Agho Ahazi yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu badhaadha be abo mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Mutabane we Hezekia yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings17:1 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'ebiri nga kyabazinga Ahazi n'afuga Buyudaaya, Hoshea mutabane wa Ela yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era yaafugira mu Samaria okumala entangama ya myaka mwenda." 
2Kings17:2 Yaakolanga ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, aye ate yaaloba kwagayaga na bakyabazinga abaamusooka okufuga Isiraeli." 
2Kings17:3 Agho kyabazinga Shalumaneseri ow'e Assiria, yaalumba Hoshea yaamughangula mu lutalo, Era Hoshea oyo yaaghanga Shalumaneseri omusolo." 
2Kings17:4 Aye kyabazinga oyo ow'e Assiria yaagwa mu lukwe lwa Hoshea olw'okudheema, nga Hoshea oyo agheereiza abakwenda okusaba kyabazinga So owa Misiri amuyambe, era nga Hoshea oyo alekeire n'okugha kyabazinga w'e Assiria omusolo nga bwe yakolanga buli mwaka. Agho kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaagema Hoshea oyo, yaamusiba mu ikomera." 
2Kings17:5 Agho kyabazinga Shalumaneseri ow'e Assiria yaalumba ensi Isiraeli, yaazingiza ekibuga Samaria okumala entangama ya myaka esatu." 
2Kings17:6 Mu mwaka ogwomwenda nga kyabazinga Hoshea n'afuga Isiraeli, kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaagema ekibuga Samaria, era yaakukumba abantu ab'omu Isiraeli yaabatwala mu Assiria nga banhage. Abandi yaabata mu kibuga Hala, abandi kumpi n'omwiga Habori mu kiketezo ky'e Gozani, ate abandi mu bibuga eby'Abamedia." 
2Kings17:7 Ebyo byabaagho, kuba Abaisiraeli baakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda waibwe, eyabatoola mu nsi Misiri mu mikono gya kyabazinga waayo. Abaisiraeli abo baasinzanga emisambwa," 
2Kings17:8 era baajiiranga ku mpisa dh'abamaghanga agandi, Musengwa Katonda ge yabinga mu nsi eyo nga beene Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuukayo. Abaisiraeli abo baajiiranga ni ku mpisa bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli dhe baatangagho," 
2Kings17:9 era baakolanga mu ngiso ebintu ebitaalinga bituufu, Musengwa Katonda waibwe by'ataasiimanga. Beezimbiranga ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, mu bibuga byaibwe byonabyona, okuviira irala ku kisembayo obutono okutuukira irala ku kisingamu obunene." 
2Kings17:10 Baasimba empango n'ebifaananie eby'omusambwa omukazi, Ashera, ku buli lusozi olugungumavu, na buli ghansi mu kinsense kya muti muzibirivu." 
2Kings17:11 Baaniokezanga obubbaani mu bifo ebigulumivu byonabyona eby'okusinzizaamu, ng'abamaghanga agandi bwe baakolanga, Musengwa Katonda be yabingamu nga beene Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuukayo. Baakolanga ebibi, baaleetera Musengwa Katonda okusungughala," 
2Kings17:12 baasinzanga ebitali Katonda, Musengwa Katonda bye yabakoba ati: “Mutabisinzanga!”" 
2Kings17:13 Ate nga Musengwa Katonda yalabulanga Isiraeli ni Buyudaaya ng'abita mu balanzi ni mu baboni, ng'akoba ati: “Mukyuke, muve mu mpisa dhaimwe embi mugeme ebiragiro byange ebiri mu Mateeka gange, ge nagha badhaadha baimwe nga mbita mu bagheereza bange abalanzi.”" 
2Kings17:14 Aye baaloba kuwulira, baaba ba mpwitu nga badhaadha baibwe bwe baakola, abaaloba okwesiga Musengwa Katonda waibwe." 
2Kings17:15 Baaloba kugemanga biragiro bye, waire okukuuma endagaano ye yakola ni badhaadha baibwe, era baaloba kufangayo ku kulabula, kwe yabalabulangamu. Baasinzanga ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda ebitagasa, olwo ni beene baafuuka ebitagasa, era baajiiranga ku mpisa edh'abamaghanga agandi agabeezungulwire. Ate nga Musengwa Katonda yabalobera okwebisanga ng'oti n'abamaghanga ago." 
2Kings17:16 Baava ku biragiro byonabyona ebya Musengwa Katonda waibwe, beekolera ebifaananie bibiri eby'ente ento mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, beekolera n'ekifaananie ky'omusambwa omukazi Ashera. Baasinzanga emuunienie dhoonadhoona edh'oku igulu, era baasinzanga ni Baali yeena." 
2Kings17:17 Baaghangayo abaana baibwe abalenzi n'abaghala ng'emisengo egyokebwa. Beeraguzanga era baakolanga eby'obulogo, era beegheerangayo irala okukola ebibi, baaleetera Musengwa Katonda okusungughala." 
2Kings17:18 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaasungughalira inho Abaisiraeli, yaababinga mu maiso ge ghaaloba kusigalagho waire omulala ati, okutoolaku ab'omu Buyudaaya bonka." 
2Kings17:19 N'ab'omu Buyudaaya boona tibaagema biragiro bya Musengwa Katonda waibwe, aye baajiiranga ku mpisa ab'omu Isiraeli dhe beeteeragho." 
2Kings17:20 Musengwa Katonda yaalekulira agho baidhukulu ba Isiraeli boonaboona, yaababonereza ng'abaghaayo mu mikono gy'abazigu baibwe, okutuusa lwe yababingira irala mu maiso ge." 
2Kings17:21 Musengwa Katonda bwe yamala okwawula Isiraeli ku b'endhu ya Daudi, ab'omu Isiraeli baafuula Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati kyabazinga waibwe. Yeroboamu oyo yaaleetera ab'omu Isiraeli okuva ku Musengwa Katonda, era mu nsambo eyo yaabaleetera okukola ebibi ebitaloodheka." 
2Kings17:22 Ab'omu Isiraeli abo baakolanga ebibi byonabyona Yeroboamu bye yakolanga, baaloba kulekera," 
2Kings17:23 okutuusa Musengwa Katonda lwe yababinga mu maiso ge, nga bwe yabalabula ng'abita mu bagheereza be abalanzi boonaboona. Agho ab'omu Isiraeli baabatoola mu nsi yaibwe, baabatwala mu Assiria ye bakaali ni ye buli eno." 
2Kings17:24 Agho kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaasengula abantu okubatoola mu bibuga, Babiloni, ni Kutha, ni Avva, ni Hamathi, ni Sefarivaimu. Yaabatwala okubasenza mu bibuga bya Samaria, mu kifo ky'Abaisiraeli. Abantu abo baatwala ensi Samaria yaaba yaibwe, baabanga mu bibuga byayo." 
2Kings17:25 Bwe baali nga baakatoolera okubaayo, tibaasinzanga Musengwa Katonda. N'olw'ekyo Musengwa Katonda oyo kyeyava n'abasindikira empologoma ni dhibaitamu abandi." 
2Kings17:26 Ghaabaagho abaakobera kyabazinga w'e Assiria bati: “Abantu be watwala okubasenza mu bibuga by'e Samaria, tibaidhi mateeka ga musambwa gwa mu nsi eyo. N'olw'ekyo omusambwa ogwo kye gwava ni gubasindikira empologoma, era dhiri eyo dhiri kubaita.”" 
2Kings17:27 Agho kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaalagira ati: “Mutwaleyo owundi ku bakabona be mwatoolayo aje abenga eyo abeegerese amateeka ag'omusambwa gw'omu nsi eyo.” 
2Kings17:28 Agho owundi ku bakabona be baatoola mu Samaria, yaaja yaabanga e Betheli, yaabeegeresanga bwe bagwaine okutyanga Musengwa Katonda." 
2Kings17:29 Aye abantu aba buli ighanga mu bibuga byaibwe mwe baabanga, baayongeranga okwekolera ebifaananie by'emisambwa gyaibwe, baabita mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, Abasamaria bye baaleka nga bazimbye." 
2Kings17:30 Abantu abaava e Babiloni baakola ebifaananie by'omusambwa Sukkothi Benothi, abaava e Kuthi baakola eby'omusambwa Nerugali, Abaava e Hamathi baakola eby'omusambwa Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 abaava mu Avva baakola eby'emisambwa Nibuhazi ni Tarutaki, ate abantu abaava e Sefarivaimu baaghangayo abaana baibwe ng'emisengo egyokebwa eri emisambwa gyaibwe, Adurammeleki ni Anammeleki." 
2Kings17:32 Abantu abo baasinzanga ni Musengwa Katonda, era beerondangamu bakabona abaabagheerangayo emisengo mu masabo ag'omu bifo ebigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu." 
2Kings17:33 Kale ni baasinzanga Musengwa Katonda, aye nga era basinza n'emisambwa gyaibwe, nga bajiira ku mpisa dh'ensi ye baava." 
2Kings17:34 Ni ye buli eno bakaakola nga bwe baakolanga eira. Tibatya Musengwa Katonda, era tibagema mateeka ge waire okugondera ebiragiro bye, bye yagha ab'eizaire lya Yakobo ye yatuuma eriina Isiraeli." 
2Kings17:35 Musengwa Katonda yakola nabo endagaano, yaabalagira ati: “Mutasinzanga bakatonda bandi era mutabikubiranga makiryaivu, waire okughangayo emisengo ye bali." 
2Kings17:36 Aye mutyenga nze Musengwa Katonda eyabatoola mu nsi Misiri nga nkozesa amaani agataloodheka. Ninze ye munaakubiranga amakiryaivu era ninze ye munaaghanga emisengo. 
2Kings17:37 Mutenga inho omwoyo era mugemenga buliidho amateeka goonagoona n'ebiragiro bye nabaghandiikira. Mutasinzanga bakatonda bandi," 
2Kings17:38 era muteerabiranga ndagaano ye nakola n'imwe. 
2Kings17:39 Aye nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ninze ye mube mutyenga, era ninze ndidha okubawonianga abazigu baimwe boonaboona.”" 
2Kings17:40 Aye abantu abo baaloba okuwulira, baasigala nga bakaajiira ku mpisa dhaibwe edh'eira." 
2Kings17:41 Kale abantu ab'amaghanga ago baasinzanga Musengwa Katonda, aye nga era basinza n'ebifaananie ebibaadhe eby'emisambwa gyaibwe. N'abaana baibwe boona baakolanga batyo, era n'abaidhukulu baibwe batyo bwe bakaakola ni ye buli eno." 
2Kings18:1 Mu mwaka ogwokusatu nga kyabazinga Hoshea mutabane wa Ela n'afuga Isiraeli, Hezekia mutabane wa Ahazi yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
2Kings18:2 Yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu egy'obukulu, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi abiri na mwenda mu Yerusalemu. Inhina nga bamweta Abi mughala wa Zekaria." 
2Kings18:3 Yaakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, ng'oti n'ebyo dhaadha we Daudi bye yakolanga." 
2Kings18:4 Yaatoolagho ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, yaamenhagho empango, era yaatematema ebifaananie by'omusambwa omukazi Ashera. Era yaamenhamenha omusota ogw'ekyuma eky'ekikomo Musa gwe yakola n'agweta Nehushitani kuba n'okutuusa mu biseera ebyo, Abaisiraeli baali bakaaguniokeza obubbaani." 
2Kings18:5 Hezekia yeesiganga Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, ghaaloba kubaagho kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya yeenayeena amutuukaku, ku baamusookagho n'abaamwiririra." 
2Kings18:6 Yaagumiranga ku Musengwa Katonda aghazira kumuvaaku naire, era yaagemanga ebiragiro Musengwa Katonda oyo bye yalagira Musa." 
2Kings18:7 Musengwa Katonda yaabanga ghalala naye, era ebintu byonabyona bye yakolanga byamujiira bukalamu. Yaadheemera kyabazinga w'e Assiria, yaaloba kumugheereza." 
2Kings18:8 Yaaghangula Abafilisiti okutuukira irala e Gaza n'ebiketezo ebikyezungulwire, okuva ku kabuga akasembayo obutono okutuuka ku kibuga ekisingayo obunene." 
2Kings18:9 Mu mwaka ogwokuna nga kyabazinga Hezekia n'afuga Buyudaaya, ogwo nga n'omwaka ogwomusanvu nga kyabazinga Hoshea mutabane wa Ela n'afuga Isiraeli, Shalumaneseri kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaalumba Isiraeli era yaazingiza ekibuga Samaria okukyezunguluza." 
2Kings18:10 Emyaka esatu bwe gyawaaku okuva lwe baakizingiza okukyezunguluza, baakighangula ogwo gwali nga n'omwaka ogwomukaaga nga kyabazinga Hezekia n'afuga Buyudaaya, ate gwaba omwaka ogwomwenda nga kyabazinga Hoshea n'afuga Isiraeli." 
2Kings18:11 Kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaakukumba abantu ab'omu Isiraeli yaabatwala mu Assiria. Abandi yaabata mu kibuga Hala, abandi kumpi n'omwiga Habori mu kiketezo ky'e Gozani, ate abandi mu bibuga eby'Abamedi." 
2Kings18:12 Ekibuga Samaria baakighangula kuba Abaisiraeli baaloba okugondera Musengwa Katonda waibwe, baamenha endagaano ye yakola nabo, era baadheemera byonabyona Musa omugheereza we bye yalagira, baaloba kubiwulirisa oba okubigondera." 
2Kings18:13 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'ena (14) nga kyabazinga Hezekia n'afuga Buyudaaya, Sennakeribu kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaalumba ebibuga byonabyona ebya Buyudaaya ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu, yaabighangula." 
2Kings18:14 Agho kyabazinga Hezekia owa Buyudaaya yaagheereza obukwenda eri kyabazinga w'e Assiria, eyali e Lakishi mu kiseera ekyo, nga bukoba buti: “Nayonoona. Nkusaba olekere agho okuunumba. By'onansalira byonabyona ndidha kubikugha.” Agho kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaasalira kyabazinga Hezekia kilo omutwalo mulala (10,000) edha feeza, ni kilo lukumi (1,000) edha zaabu." 
2Kings18:15 Hezekia yaamugha feeza yeenayeena eyali mu isinzizo, ni mu iterekero ly'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
2Kings18:16 Mu kiseera ekyo, Hezekia yaakakampula ni zaabu eyali ku ndhigi dh'eisinzizo ni ku myango, kyabazinga mwene oyo Hezekia ye yali alimbiizaaku, yaamugha kyabazinga w'e Assiria." 
2Kings18:17 Agho kyabazinga w'e Assiria ng'ali e Lakishi, yaasindika eigye eikologho nga likulirwa abakungu be basatu abakulira bakungu banaibwe boonaboona, lyaja okulumba Hezekia e Yerusalemu. Bwe baatuukayo, baayemerera gha mweta oguleeta amaadhi okuva mu nsulo y'eitale eri ku ngira eja mu kifo ekyetebwa Ekyolezo." 
2Kings18:18 Bwe baayetesa kyabazinga Hezekia, abakungu be bano baidha ye bali: Eliakimu mutabane wa Hilikia, nga n'eyalabiriranga ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga Shebuna eyali omughandiisi w'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga ni Yoa mutabane wa Asafu, nga n'eyali omukuumi w'ebighandiiko." 
2Kings18:19 Omukungu Omuassiria yaabakoba ati: “Mukobe kyabazinga Hezekia muti, ‘Kyabazinga omukologho ow'e Assiria ali kukubuuza ati, kiki ekiri kukwesiguza?" 
2Kings18:20 Olowooza oti okwogera obwogere n'okunaafuuka amagezi n'amaani ag'okulwana olutalo? Naani y'oli kwesiga okutuuka n'okundheemera? 
2Kings18:21 Bona, oli kwesiga ensi Misiri eri ng'oti n'olugada olumenhefu, olufumita engalo dh'oyo alugema n'alwesigamaku. Atyo kyabazinga w'e Misiri bw'ali y'abo abamwesiga.’ ”" 
2Kings18:22 Omukungu Omuassiria yaayongera okukoba ati: “Aye bwe munkoba muti, ‘Twesiga Musengwa Katonda waife,’ ndidha kubabuuza nti Musengwa Katonda oyo ti n'oyo Hezekia ye yatooleragho ebifo bye ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizangamu ni alutaari dhe, era Hezekia oyo n'akoba abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu ati, ‘Mwidha kusinzizanga ku alutaari ey'omu Yerusalemu yonka?’" 
2Kings18:23 Mpegaano ni, ka mbasonsoonie mu liina lya musengwa wange kyabazinga w'e Assiria: ndidha kubagha imwe embalaasi enkumi ebiri (2,000), bwe munaasobola okufunayo abanaadhivuga!" 
2Kings18:24 Oba nga timusobola naire kulwanisa muduumizi mulala ati ow'eidaala erisembayo mu baduumizi b'eigye lya musengwa wange, olwo musobola mutya okwesiga ensi Misiri olw'ebigaali byayo eby'omu lutalo n'olw'abavuzi baayo ab'embalaasi?" 
2Kings18:25 Mulowooza muti nalumba ekifo kino okukizikiriza nga Musengwa Katonda tali ghalala ninze? Musengwa Katonda mwene n'eyankoba ati, ‘Lumba ensi eyo ogizikirize.’ ”" 
2Kings18:26 Agho Eliakimu mutabane wa Hilikia, ni Shebuna, ni Yoa, baakoba omukungu oyo Omuassiria bati: “Tukweghembye, yogera n'ife mu lulimi Oluaramaika, kuba tulutegeera. Aye otayogera n'ife mu Luheburayi ng'abantu abali ku kimante bawulira.”" 
2Kings18:27 Omukungu Omuassiria yairamu ati: “Mulowooza muti musengwa wange yantuma okukobera ebibono ebyo musengwa waimwe n'imwe mwenka? Busa, yantuma okubikobera n'abantu abo abatyaime ku kimante, abanaatuuka n'okulya obubi obwaibwe bwene n'okunhwa enkali eyaibwe yeene, ng'oti n'imwe bwe munaakola.”" 
2Kings18:28 Agho omukungu Omuassiria oyo yaayemerera, yaalangirira mu lulimi Oluyudaaya, ng'ayogera mu mamiro ag'amaani ati: “Muwulire kyabazinga omukologho ow'e Assiria ky'akoba!" 
2Kings18:29 Ali kubalabula ati Hezekia atabaguumaaza, kuba tasobola kubatoola mu ngalo dhange n'abawonia." 
2Kings18:30 Era atabasendasenda kwesigulira ku Musengwa Katonda, nga mukoba muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda aidha kutuwonia, era aidha kulobera kyabazinga w'Abassiria okugema ekibuga kyaife.’" 
2Kings18:31 Mutawulirisa Hezekia, kuba kyabazinga w'e Assiria akoba ati, ‘Muveeyo bya bulungi mwegheeyo ye ndi. Olwo kiisi muntu aidha kulyanga ku bibala by'emizabbibu egigye ku bubwe, n'eby'emiti emitiini egigye ku bubwe, era anhwenga amaadhi ag'omu nsulo eyiye ku bubwe," 
2Kings18:32 okutuusa lwe ndiidha ni mbatwala mu nsi eri ng'oti n'eyaimwe, ensi erimu engaano, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'amasamba ag'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'emiti emyoliva, era n'omudheenene gw'endhuki. Bwe munaakola mutyo, mwidha kuba balamu mulobe kufa. Aye mutawulirisa Hezekia ali kubaguyaguya ati Musengwa Katonda aidha kubawonia!" 
2Kings18:33 Ghalighooku omusambwa waire omulala guti ogw'abamaghanga agandi ogwali gusoboireku okuwonia ensi yaagwo ni gugitoola mu ngalo dha kyabazinga w'e Assiria? 
2Kings18:34 Emisambwa egy'e Hamathi n'egy'e Arupadi, buti giri gha? Ate emisambwa egy'e Sefarivaimu, n'egy'e Hena, n'egy'e Ivva, buti giri gha? Gyali giwoniizaaku ekibuga Samaria, kyanva mu ngalo?" 
2Kings18:35 Musambwa ki, ku misambwa egy'ensi dhoonadhoona, ogwali guwoniizaaku ensi yaagwo ni gugintoola mu ngalo, memale olwo katyo mudhuube muti Musengwa Katonda aghanga okuwonia Yerusalemu, yaakintoola mu ngalo?’ ”" 
2Kings18:36 Aye abantu baasirika busirike, baaloba kumwiramu kibono naire, kuba kyabazinga Hezekia yali abalagiire ati: “Mutamwiramu.”" 
2Kings18:37 Agho Eliakimu mutabane wa Hilikia, nga n'eyalabiriranga ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, ni Shebuna eyali omughandiisi w'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, era ni Yoa mutabane wa Asafu, nga n'eyali omukuumi w'ebighandiiko, baaja eri Kyabazinga Hezekia nga bakanwirekanwire ebivaalo byaibwe olw'okunakughala. Baamukobera omukungu w'e Assiria bye yakoba." 
2Kings19:1 Kyabazinga Hezekia bwe yawulira ebibono ebyo, yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye era yaavaala ekutiya olw'okunakughala. Agho yaaja mu isinzizo." 
2Kings19:2 Yaatuma Eliakimu eyalabiriranga ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, ni Shebuna omughandiisi w'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, n'abakulira bakabona, baaja eri Isaia omulanzi mutabane wa Amozi nga bavaire ekutiya olw'okunakughala." 
2Kings19:3 Baamukoba bati: “Hezekia akoba ati, ‘Olunaku luno lwa kudaazibwadaazibwa, kubonerezebwa na kuswazibwa. Tuli ng'oti n'omukazi atuusiisa okuzaala, aye ng'aziramu maani gasindika mwana." 
2Kings19:4 Kyabazinga w'e Assiria yatuma omukungu we omukologho okwidha okudhooga Katonda omulamu. Musengwa Katonda wo agwaine awulire ebyo byonabyona omukungu oyo by'ayogeire, era amubonereze olw'okubyogera.’ Kale ni sabira abo abanaawonagho ni basigala nga bakaaligho.”" 
2Kings19:5 Abakwenda ba kyabazinga Hezekia bwe baatuusa obukwenda bwe eri Isaia," 
2Kings19:6 Isaia yaabakoba okwirayo ye musengwa waibwe, bamukobe bati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Otatya bibono by'owuliire, abakungu ba kyabazinga w'e Assiria bye boogeire nga banvuma." 
2Kings19:7 Bona eno, ndidha kumutaamu ekidhuubo, mmuleetere okujiira ku lubono lw'awulira nga lwogerwa mu bantu, aireyo mu nsi ye. Era mmuleetere okwitibwa ng'ali eyo.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Agho omukungu oyo Omuassiria yaawulira nga kyabazinga w'ewaibwe aviire e Lakishi, era ng'ali kulwanisa ab'omu kibuga Libuna, kale ni n'okuja y'ali." 
2Kings19:9 Agho kyabazinga w'e Assiria baamukobera bati: “Bona, Tirihaka kyabazinga w'e Ethiopia asitwire eigye okukulwanisa.” Bwe yakiwulira, yairamu okugheereza abakwenda ye kyabazinga Hezekia, ng'akoba ati:" 
2Kings19:10 “Muje mukobe Hezekia kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya muti, ‘Katonda wo ye weesiga atakulimba ng'akoba ati Yerusalemu tikiidha kugheebwayo mu ngalo dha kyabazinga w'e Assiria." 
2Kings19:11 Wawulira bakyabazinga ab'e Assiria bye baakola ensi dhoonadhoona, ni badhizikiriza okudhisaaniagho. Obwo iwe olowooza oti onaawona?" 
2Kings19:12 Badhaadha bange baazikiriza ebibuga, Gozani, ni Harani, ni Rezefu, era baazikiriza Abaedeni abaali mu Telassari. Aye ghaalighooku omusambwa waire omulala ogwasobola okubawonia?" 
2Kings19:13 Bakyabazinga ab'ebibuga, Hamathi, ni Arupadi, ni Sefarivaimu, ni Hena, ni Ivva, buti bali gha?’ ”" 
2Kings19:14 Kyabazinga yaatoola embaluwa eyo ku bakwenda, yaagisoma. Yaamala yaaja mu isinzizo, yaagyandhuluza mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda," 
2Kings19:15 yaasaba Musengwa Katonda ng'akoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, iwe atyama ku bitonde eby'amaghagha ebyetebwa bikerubi, niiwe Katonda wenka. Niiwe wenka afuga obwakyabazinga bwonabwona ku nsi. Era niiwe watonda eigulu n'ensi." 
2Kings19:16 Wo Musengwa Katonda lingirira obone ebitutuuseeku, era otege kutu owulire ebibono Sennakeribu by'agheereiza okukuvuma, iwe Katonda omulamu." 
2Kings19:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda, mu butuufu bakyabazinga ba Assiria bazikiriiza amaghanga kamaala, baaleka ensi edh'amaghanga ago nga dhifafaagaine." 
2Kings19:18 Baayokya emisambwa gy'amaghanga ago, mu butuufu egitaali Katonda, aye ebifaananie obufaananie abantu bye baakola n'emikono gyaibwe mu miti ni mu mabaale. Ekyo n'ekyaleetera emisambwa egyo okuzikirizibwa." 
2Kings19:19 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, mpegaano ni tukweghemba otuwonie, otutoole mu ngalo edh'Abassiria. Olwo abantu abamaghanga agandi boonaboona baghange okumanha nga iwe, Musengwa Katonda, niiwe Katonda wenka.”" 
2Kings19:20 Agho Isaia mutabane wa Amozi yaagheereza Hezekia obukwenda obukoba buti Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati awuliire okusaba kwo ku bigema ku Sennakeribu kyabazinga w'e Assiria. 
2Kings19:21 Era bino Musengwa Katonda oyo by'akoba ku kyabazinga Sennakeribu oyo: “Ekibuga Sioni kikunhoomye, kyakusekerera iwe Sennakeribu; era ekibuga ekyo Yerusalemu kikukongoire." 
2Kings19:22 Olowooza oti naani y'ovumye era y'odhooze? Naani y'okaabukiire era y'oziimwire? Ninze Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli! 
2Kings19:23 Otumye abakwenda bo okuneesuutiraku nze Musengwa Katonda, nga bakoba nga bwe wakozesa ebigaali byo eby'omu lutalo, n'oghangula ensozi dhoonadhoona endeeyi edh'omu Lebanoni. Weesuuta ng'eyo bwe watemayo emivule egisinga obuleeyi, era n'otemayo n'emiti emisipuressi egisinga bulungi. Waakoba nga bwe waingirira irala mu bibira, mu kitundu ekisinga kuba kizibirivu." 
2Kings19:24 Weesuuta nga bwe wasima ensulo, n'onhwa amaadhi mu nsi edh'abagwira, era ng'ebigere eby'abaisirukale bo bwe byakaza emiiga gyonagyona egy'e Misiri." 
2Kings19:25 Towulirangaku ng'ebyo byonabyona nabitegeka ira nga byakubaagho? Ebyo bye ndeeteire okubaagho mpegaano, nabyekoota ira mu biseera ebyabita. Kyewava n'ozikiriza ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante, ni bifuuka bwa mmungo ya bimunku." 
2Kings19:26 N'abaabirimu kye baava bawaamu amaani, ni batya einho era ni baasaamirira, ni baba ng'oti isubi ery'omu nsiko, era ng'oti isubi erimeze ghaigulu ku ndhu, eriniala nga likaali kukula." 
2Kings19:27 Aye ndidhi byonabyona ebikufaaku, ndidhi buli ky'okola, naamanha na buli y'oja, era naamanha nga bw'oneedundeekezaaku." 
2Kings19:28 Mmaze okuwulira nga bw'oneedundeekezaaku era nga bw'oneekuluntalizaaku. Mpegaano nja kukutunga eirobo lyange mu nhindo yo, nkusibe n'olukoba lwange mu kanwa mwo, nkwiririzeeyo mu ngira yeene ye wabitamu ng'oidha.”" 
2Kings19:29 Agho Isaia yaakoba kyabazinga Hezekia ati: “Kano n'akanaaba akamanhiso akakwoleka ebinaabaagho: Mu mwaka guno ni mu mwaka ogwidha, muja kulya emere ng'emeze yeene. Aye mu mwaka oguliiraku mulisiga emere yaimwe mwagikungula. Mulisimba amasamba g'emizabbibu, mwalya n'ebibala byamu." 
2Kings19:30 Abo abaliwonagho mu Buyudaaya, balisibuka ng'ebimera ebisimba emizi gyabyo ghansi mu itaka, ni bitaaku ebibala ghaigulu." 
2Kings19:31 Ghaja kubaagho abandi abaliwonagho mu Yerusalemu, abaliva ku lusozi Sioni. Musengwa Katonda amaliriire okutuukiriza ekyo." 
2Kings19:32 “Bino Musengwa Katonda by'akoba ku kyabazinga w'e Assiria: ‘Taidha kwingira mu kibuga kino, waire okulasaayo akasaale. Taidha kukirumba na ngabo, waire okukibungaku emungo ey'eitaka ey'okuniiniraku okukirwanisa." 
2Kings19:33 Engira emuleese yeene eyo yaidha okugema, aireyo nga taingiireeku mu kibuga kino. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
2Kings19:34 Ndidha kulwanirira ekibuga kino, nkikuume olw'ekitiibwa kyange, ni ku olw'omugheereza wange Daudi.’ ”" 
2Kings19:35 Agho obwire obwo, malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaaja mu kifo Abassiria ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, yaita abantu emitwalo ikumi na munaana n'enkumi itaanu (185,000). Abantu bwe baazuuka ku nkyo, baaja okulinga bati ng'abo boonaboona mirambo!" 
2Kings19:36 Agho Sennakeribu kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaavaagho yairayo, yaaja e Nineve yaaba eyo." 
2Kings19:37 Lwali lulala bweyali mu isabo ng'ali kusinza omusambwa gwe Nisiroki, batabane be Adurammeleki ni Sharezeri baamwita n'empiima, baamala baalumukira mu nsi y'e Ararati. Agho mutabane we owundi Esarahaddoni yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings20:1 Agho mu biseera ebyo, Hezekia yalwala inho kumpi afe. Omulanzi Isaia mutabane wa Amozi yaajaayo okumubona, yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Tegeka eby'omu ndhu yo bukalamu, kuba oja kufa, toidha kuwona.’ ”" 
2Kings20:2 Agho Hezekia yaakyuka yaalinga eri ekimante, yeeghemba Musengwa Katonda ng'akoba ati:" 
2Kings20:3 “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghemba oidhukire nga bwe mbairenga omwesigwa y'oli, nga ngondera by'ondagira n'omwoyo mulala, era nga nfuba buliidho okukola by'osiima.” Hezekia oyo yaatimbuka, yaalira inho amaziga." 
2Kings20:4 Agho Isaia bweyali ava aghali kyabazinga, aye ng'akaali na kubita mu luya olwa ghagati, Musengwa Katonda yaayogera naye." 
2Kings20:5 Yaamukoba okwirayo akobe Hezekia omukulembeze w'abantu ba Musengwa Katonda oyo ati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Daudi dhaadha wo akoba ati, ‘Mpuliire ky'onsabye era naabona n'amaziga go. Kale ni bona, ndidha kukuwonia, era ku lunaku olwokusatu oidha kuja mu isinzizo." 
2Kings20:6 Ndidha kwongera emyaka ikumi n'etaanu ku bulamu bwo. Era ndidha kukuwonia iwe n'ekibuga kino Yerusalemu, nkutoole mu ngalo dha kyabazinga w'e Assiria. Ndidha kulwaniriranga ekibuga kino olw'ekitiibwa kyange n'olw'ebyo bye nasuubiza omugheereza wange Daudi.’ ”" 
2Kings20:7 Agho Isaia yaakoba ati: “Muleete ekitole ky'ebibala ebikaziibwa eby'emitiini, mutoolekuuku, muteeku ku ibwa lya Hezekia, asobole okuwona.”" 
2Kings20:8 Agho Hezekia yaabuuza Isaia ati: “Kamanhiso ki akanaakakasa nga Musengwa Katonda aidha kumponia, era nga ku lunaku olwokusatu nnaasobola okuja mu isinzizo?”" 
2Kings20:9 Isaia yairamu ati: “Musengwa Katonda aidha kukugha akamanhiso akakakasa ng'aja kutuukiriza ekyo ky'akobye. Mpegaano londaku ky'oyenda: Oyenda ekinsense kije emberi obuleeyi bwa bigere ikumi, oba kiire einhuma obuleeyi bwa bigere ikumi?”" 
2Kings20:10 Hezekia yairamu ati: “Kiba kyangu okuja emberi obuleeyi obw'ebigere eikumi. Aye kireke kiire einhuma obuleeyi obw'ebigere eikumi.” 
2Kings20:11 Isaia yaasaba Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda oyo yaizaayo ekinsense einhuma ebigere ikumi, ku lupimo olw'amadaala kyabazinga Ahazi lwe yakola." 
2Kings20:12 Mu biseera ebyo, kyabazinga w'e Babilonia ng'ayetebwa Merodaki Baladani, mutabane wa Baladani, yaawulira nga Hezekia bweyali alwaire. Agho yaamughandiikira embaluwa, yaagigha abakwenda baagitwala, baatwaliraku n'ekirabo." 
2Kings20:13 Hezekia yaabasangaalira, yaabalaga eby'obukombe bwe byonabyona ebyali mu iterekero: feeza, zaabu, obuwoowo, omuzigo ogw'omughendo einho, eby'okulwanisa, ni byonabyona ebyali mu materekero ge. Ghazira kintu waire ekirala kiti ekyali mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga oba mu bwakyabazinga bwe bwonabwona, ky'ataabalaga." 
2Kings20:14 Agho Isaia omulanzi yaidha eri kyabazinga Hezekia, yaamubuuza ati: “Abasaadha bano baviiriire gha okwidha y'oli era bakobye ki?” Hezekia yairamu ati: “Baviire mu nsi ey'eghala, e Babilonia.”" 
2Kings20:15 Era Isaia yaabuuza ati: “Baboine ki mu kisaagaati kyo eky'obwakyabazinga?” Hezekia yairamu ati: “Baboine ebiri mu kisaagaati kyange eky'obwakyabazinga byonabyona, ghazira kintu kiri mu materekero gange kya ntabalaze.”" 
2Kings20:16 Isaia yaakoba Hezekia ati: “Wulira Musengwa Katonda ky'akoba: 
2Kings20:17 ‘Manha ng'ekiseera kiidha kutuuka, byonabyona ebiri mu kisaagaati kyo eky'obwakyabazinga, n'ebyo badhaadha bo bye baatereka okutuusa buti, babitwale e Babilonia. Tighalibaagho waire ekirala kiti ekirisigalagho." 
2Kings20:18 N'abandi ku batabane bo beene, balibatwala baabalaawa, baafuuka bagheereza ba mu kisaagaati ekya kyabazinga w'e Babilonia.’ ”" 
2Kings20:19 Agho Hezekia yaakoba Isaia ati: “Musengwa Katonda by'ayogeire birungi.” Hezekia yakoba atyo, kuba yalowooza mule ati: “Bisobola bitya obutaba birungi, ng'ate ghaja kubaagho miraala na butebenkevu mu biseera byange?”" 
2Kings20:20 Ebindi byonabyona Hezekia bye yakola, omuli n'eby'amaani bye yakola, n'ensambo ye yasimamu ensulo n'omweta n'aingiza amaadhi mu kibuga, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings20:21 Agho Hezekia yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa. Mutabane we Manasse yaamusikira ku bwa kyabazinga." 
2Kings21:1 Manasse yali agheza emyaka ikumi n'ebiri egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi ataanu n'etaanu (55) mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali nga ni Hefuziba." 
2Kings21:2 Manasse oyo yaakolanga ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, ng'ajiira ku mpisa edheenhinhalwa edh'abamaghanga agandi Musengwa Katonda oyo be yabinga mu nsi eyo ng'Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuukayo." 
2Kings21:3 Yaazimba buyaaka ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, lata we Hezekia bye yali azikiriiza. Yaataagho alutaari edh'okusinzizaaku omusambwa Baali, era yaakola ekifaananie eky'omusambwa omukazi Ashera, nga kyabazinga Ahabu owa Isiraeli bwe yakola. Yaasinzanga eby'oku igulu byonabyona era yaafuuka mugheereza waabyo." 
2Kings21:4 Yaazimba alutaari mu isinzizo Musengwa Katonda lye yayogeraku ati: “Mu Yerusalemu mwe banansinzizanga.” 
2Kings21:5 Era yaazimbira eby'oku igulu byonabyona alutaari mu mpya eibiri edh'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda. 
2Kings21:6 Yaayokya mutabane we ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, yaajanga mu balaguzi ni mu basamize, era yaakolanga eby'obulogo n'eby'emizimu. Yaakolanga inho ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, yaamuleetera okusungughala." 
2Kings21:7 Yaata mu isinzizo ekifaananie eky'omusambwa omukazi Ashera kye yabaadha. Ate nga eisinzizo eryo Musengwa Katonda lye yakoba Daudi ni mutabane we Solomoni ati: “Mu isinzizo lino eriri mu kibuga Yerusalemu kye nalondamu mu bibuga byonabyona eby'ebika bya Isiraeli, mwe banansinzizanga enaku dhoonadhoona." 
2Kings21:8 Era tiriirayo kutoola Baisiraeli mu nsi ye nagha badhaadha baibwe, ni mbaleetera kutambulatambula eyo batyo, kasita banaatangayo omwoyo okukola byonabyona bye nabalagira, n'okukuuma amateeka goonagoona n'ebiragiro omugheereza wange Musa bye yabagha.”" 
2Kings21:9 Aye abantu baaloba kugondera Musengwa Katonda, era Manasse yaabasendasenda yaabaleetera okukola ebibi okusinga n'abantu abamaghanga agandi bye baakola, Musengwa Katonda be yazikiriza ng'Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuuka yo." 
2Kings21:10 Agho Musengwa Katonda ng'abita mu bagheereza be abalanzi, yaakoba ati:" 
2Kings21:11 “Kyabazinga Manasse owa Buyudaaya akoze ebyenhinhalwa ebyo, era yaakola ebibi ebisinga ebyo byonabyona Abamori abaamusooka bye baakola. Mu nsambo eyo aleeteire n'ab'omu Buyudaaya okwonoona nga basinza ebitali Katonda bye yataagho." 
2Kings21:12 N'olw'ekyo nze Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, nkoba nti, ndidha kuleeta akabi ku Yerusalemu ni ku Buyudaaya, kiisi anaakawulirangaku amatu ge gamuwaawaalenga buwaawaale." 
2Kings21:13 Ndibonereza Yerusalemu ng'oti bwe nabonereza Samaria, era ng'oti bwe nabonereza kyabazinga Ahabu owa Isiraeli n'ab'endhu ye. Ndisaaniagho abantu mu Yerusalemu, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'asiimuula esowaani n'agikaza, ate n'amala n'agifundika." 
2Kings21:14 Ndirekulira agho abantu bange abaliwonagho, naabaghaayo mu ngalo dh'abazigu baibwe, baabeegabula era baabafuula omunhago gwaibwe." 
2Kings21:15 Abantu bange abo ndibakola ekyo, kuba baakola ebibi ye ndi bansungughaza, okuviira irala ku lunaku badhaadha baibwe lwe baaviiraku e Misiri n'okutuusa ni ye buli eno.”" 
2Kings21:16 Kyabazinga Manasse yaita abantu kamaala inho abaziraku musango, yaidhuza Yerusalemu kyonakyona omusaayi kyabuna. Okwo yaayongeraku ekibi eky'okuleetera ab'omu Buyudaaya okukola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda." 
2Kings21:17 Ebindi byonabyona Manasse bye yakola n'ebibi bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings21:18 Agho Manasse yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu nimiro y'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, eyetebwa eya Uzza. Mutabane we Amoni yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'ebiri egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka ebiri mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali nga ni Meshullemethi, mughala wa Haruzi ow'e Yotiba." 
2Kings21:20 Amoni oyo yaakolanga ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, nga lata we Manasse bye yakolanga." 
2Kings21:21 Yaajiiranga ku mpisa dha lata we, yaasinzanga ebitali Katonda lata we oyo bye yasinzanga, era yaabikubiranga amakiryaivu." 
2Kings21:22 Yaava ku Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha be, yaaloba kugema biragiro bye naire." 
2Kings21:23 Agho abakungu be baamukolera olukwe, baamutemulira mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga." 
2Kings21:24 Aye abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya baita abo boonaboona abaakolera Amoni oyo olukwe, era baataagho mutabane we Yosia yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Kings21:25 Ebindi byonabyona Amoni bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings21:26 Agho Amoni baamuziika mu magombe ge mu nimiro eyetebwa eya Uzza. Mutabane we Yosia yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga. 
2Kings22:1 Yosia yali agheza emyaka munaana egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi asatu na mulala (31) mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali ayetebwa Yedida, mughala wa Adaia ow'e Bozikathi." 
2Kings22:2 Yosia yaakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, yaajiira ku mpisa ng'edha dhaadha we Daudi, yaaloba kukyuka kudhireka kwira eno oba ere." 
2Kings22:3 Kyabazinga Yosia, mu mwaka gwe ogweikumi n'omunaana nga n'afuga Buyudaaya, yaatuma omughandiisi we Shafani, mutabane wa Azalia era mwidhukulu wa Meshullamu, aje mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, ng'amukoba ati:" 
2Kings22:4 “Ja eri Hilikia Omukulu wa Bakabona, omukobe abale empiiya abaigazi b'omulyango ogwingira mu isinzizo dhe basoloizaagho ku bantu." 
2Kings22:5 Badhighe abasaadha abalabirira omulimo ogw'okulongoosa eisinzizo, ate abo badhisasule" 
2Kings22:6 ababaadhi, n'abazimbi, n'abatemi b'amabaale, era baguleku embaawo n'amabaale amateme okulongoosa eisinzizo." 
2Kings22:7 Aye empiiya edhinaagemesebwa abasaadha abo, tidhiidha kwetaagisa kubalirirwa kubona bwe dhikozeseibwa, kuba bakola na bwesigwa.”" 
2Kings22:8 Agho Hilikia Omukulu wa Bakabona yaakoba Shafani omughandiisi ati: “Nzwire ekitabo ky'Amateeka mu isinzizo.” Yaakigha Shafani, yaakisoma." 
2Kings22:9 Shafani oyo yairayo eri kyabazinga, yaamukobera ati: “Abagheereza bo batoireyo empiiya dhoonadhoona dhe baagaine mu isinzizo, baadhigemya abasaadha abali ku gw'okulongoosa eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda eryo.”" 
2Kings22:10 Era Shafani yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Hilikia kabona ampaire ekitabo.” Yaakisomeramu kyabazinga. 
2Kings22:11 Agho kyabazinga bwe yawulira ebyasomwa mu kitabo ky'Amateeka, yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'okunakughala." 
2Kings22:12 Yaagha ekiragiro eri Hilikia kabona, ni Ahikamu mutabane wa Shafani, ni Akabori mutabane wa Mikaia, ni Shafani omughandiisi, ni Asaia omugheereza wa kyabazinga. Yaabakoba ati:" 
2Kings22:13 “Muje mubuuze Musengwa Katonda ku lwange ni ku lw'abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya, ebigema ku ebyo ebyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kino ekizuuliibwa. Obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda buli kututumbukiraku ng'oti muliro, kuba badhaadha baife tibaagondera bibono ebyo ebiri mu kitabo kino, ni babikoleraku nga bwe byali n'okukolerwaku.”" 
2Kings22:14 Agho Hilikia kabona, ni Ahikamu, ni Akabori, ni Shafani, ni Asaia, baaja eri Huluda omulanzi omukazi, muka Shallumu. Shallumu oyo yali mutabane wa Tikava era mwidhukulu wa Harahasi. Omukazi oyo yabanga mu kiketezo ekiyaaka ekya Yerusalemu, era nga iba oyo Shallumu n'akuuma eiterekero ly'ebivaalo eby'omu isinzizo. Agho baayogera n'omukazi oyo ku nsonga eyo." 
2Kings22:15 Yaabakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Omuntu abatumye ye ndi mumukobe muti," 
2Kings22:16 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, akabi akoogerwaku mu kitabo kino kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya ky'asomye, nja kukatuusa ku kifo kino ni ku bantu baamu." 
2Kings22:17 Nga bwe banviireku ni baniokeza obubbaani eri emisambwa, ni bansungughaza n'ebyo byonabyona bye bakoze, obusungu bwange bwidha kutumbukira ku kifo kino ng'oti muliro, era tibulizikira." 
2Kings22:18 Aye kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, abatumye okuneebuuzaaku, mumukobe muti nze Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli nkoba nti, bw'owuliire ebyo ebighandiikiibwa mu kitabo ekyo," 
2Kings22:19 weeneniiza era weewombeeka mu maiso gange. Era okanwiremu ebivaalo byo olw'okunakughala era waalira amaziga, bw'owuliire ebyo bye nayogera ku kifo kino ni ku bantu abakibaamu, nga bwe balizikirira ni bafuuka ekibono abantu kye bakozesa okukolima. Kale ni mpuliire okusaba kwo." 
2Kings22:20 Ndikutwala weeyimba ku badhaadha bo abaafa, waaziikibwa mu miraala. Era tolibona ku kabi ke ndituusa ku kifo kino.’ ” Agho abasaadha bairayo baakobera kyabazinga ebibono ebyo." 
2Kings23:1 Agho kyabazinga Yosia yaayetesa abakulembeze boonaboona aba Buyudaaya n'aba Yerusalemu, beesololeza gh'ali." 
2Kings23:2 Yaaja nabo mu isinzizo, aghalala n'abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya, n'abo boonaboona ab'omu Yerusalemu, ni bakabona, n'abalanzi, n'abantu abandi boonaboona abakologho n'abatali bakologho. Agho nga bali kuwulira, yaasoma ebyali mu kitabo eky'endagaano ekyazuulibwa mu isinzizo." 
2Kings23:3 Kyabazinga Yosia era yaayemerera gha mpango, yaakola endagaano mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, nga bw'aidha okugemanga amateeka n'ebiragiro bye n'omutima gwe gwonagwona era n'omwoyo gwe gwonagwona, era atuukirizenga ebiri mu ndagaano eyo, nga bwe byaghandiikibwa mu kitabo ekyo. Abantu boonaboona baakakasa nga bwe baidha okukuumanga endagaano eyo." 
2Kings23:4 Agho kyabazinga Yosia yaayeta Hilikia Omukulu wa Bakabona, ni bakabona abamwiririra, n'abaigazi b'eisinzizo, yaabalagira okufulumya mu isinzizo ebintu byonabyona ebyakozesebwanga mu kusinza omusambwa Baali n'omusambwa omukazi Ashera, ni mu kusinza ebyakira ku igulu byonabyona. Kyabazinga yaabyokera kuliya wa Yerusalemu mu nsiko, mu kiiko Kiduroni, era eivu lyabyo baalitwala e Betheli." 
2Kings23:5 Yaatoolagho bakabona abaasinzanga ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya be baataagho okuniokezanga obubbaani mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, ebyali mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya ni mu bifo ebyezungulwire Yerusalemu. Yaatoolagho bakabona abo abaaniokezanga obubbaani eri omusambwa Baali, n'endhuba, n'emuunienie, n'ebindi byonabyona ebiri ku igulu." 
2Kings23:6 Yaatoola mu isinzizo ekifaananie ky'omusambwa omukazi Ashera, yaakitwala kuliya wa Yerusalemu eri akaiga Kiduroni, yaakyokera eyo, yaakisekulasekula kyafuuka bwa nkungu, yaamansira enkungu eyo mu kifo mwe baaziikanga abantu ababuliidho." 
2Kings23:7 Yaamenhagho ebisulo ebyali mu isinzizo eby'abasaadha abaakolanga obwamalaaya obw'omu isabo. Mu bisulo ebyo abakazi mwe baalukiranga engoye edhaakozesebwanga mu kusinza omusambwa omukazi Ashera. 
2Kings23:8 Yaatoolayo bakabona boonaboona eyo ye baali mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya. Yaayonoona ebifo byonabyona ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu mu ighanga lyonalyona, okuva e Geba okutuuka e Beerisheba, bakabona mwe baaniokezanga obubbaani. Era yaazikiriza ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu ebyali okumpi n'aghaingirirwa mu mulyango ogwetebwa ogwa Yoshua, eyali omukulu w'ekibuga. Omulyango ogwo gwali ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda, ng'oli kwingira mu kibuga." 
2Kings23:9 Aye bakabona abo abaali ab'omu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, tibaabaikiriza kugheerezanga mu isinzizo lya Yerusalemu, okutoolaku okubaikiriza okulyanga ku migaati egitazimbulukusiibwa egigheereibwa bakabona banaibwe." 
2Kings23:10 Kyabazinga Yosia era yaayonoona ekifo ekyayetebwanga Tofethi, ekyali mu kiiko eky'Abahinnomu. Olwo ghalobenga kubaagho muntu yeenayeena ayokerayo mutabane we oba mughala we, ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa eri omusambwa Moleki." 
2Kings23:11 Yaatoolayo embalaasi bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya dhe baali baghaireyo eri endhuba. Era yaayokya ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ebyali mu luya okumpi n'aghaingirirwa mu isinzizo, okuliiraana n'endhu ya Nathani Meleki, eyali owundi ku bakungu." 
2Kings23:12 Yaamenhamenhagho alutaari, bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya dhe baali bazimbye ghaigulu ku ngulu kw'endhu ya kyabazinga Ahazi, era n'edho kyabazinga Manasse dhe yali azimbye mu mpya dhombi edh'eisinzizo. Edho dhoonadhoona yaadhisaaniagho, dhaafuuka bwa nkungu, era enkungu eyo yaagiyugha mu kaiga Kiduroni." 
2Kings23:13 Kyabazinga Yosia yaayonoona ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu ebyali ku lwetebwa Olusozi olw'Okwonoona oluli ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba wa Yerusalemu. Ebifo ebyo, kyabazinga Solomoni owa Isiraeli yali abizimbiire ebifaananie eby'emisambwa egyenhinhalwa: ekindi nga kya musambwa omukazi Ashera ogw'Abasidoni, ekindi kyaba kya musambwa Kemoshi ogw'Abamoabu, n'ekindi kyaba kya musambwa Moleki ogw'Abammoni." 
2Kings23:14 Kyabazinga Yosia yaamenhamenha empango, era yaatematema n'ebifaananie eby'omusambwa Ashera. Mu bifo byabyo yaidhuzaamu amagumba g'abafu." 
2Kings23:15 Kyabazinga Yosia yaamenhagho n'ekifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu ekyali e Betheli, kyabazinga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati kye yazimba n'aleetera Isiraeli okwonoona. Yosia oyo yaamenhagho alutaari ghalala n'ekifo ekyo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu, yaamulungula amabaale ge baabizimbisa gaafuuka bwa nkungu, era yaayokya n'ekifaananie ky'omusambwa omukazi Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 Agho Yosia oyo bwe yakyuka ati yaabona amagombe agali agho ku lusozi. Yaalagira bagaziikulemu amagumba, era amagumba ago yaagookera ku alutaari ng'agyonoona nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba ng'abita mu mulanzi we eyalanga ebiribaagho mu kifo ekyo." 
2Kings23:17 Agho kyabazinga yaabuuza ati: “Amagombe ago ge ndi kubona g'ani?” Abantu ab'omu kibuga ekyo Betheli baamukobera bati: “Ago n'amagombe g'omuntu wa Katonda eyava mu Buyudaaya, n'alanga ebintu ebyo by'okoze ku alutaari eno ey'e Betheli.”" 
2Kings23:18 Kyabazinga Yosia yaakoba ati: “Oyo mumuleke, ghatabaagho muntu yeenayeena agema ku magumba ge.” Kale ni baaleka amagumba ge, era baaleka n'amagumba g'omulanzi eyava e Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Yosia yaatoolagho amasabo goonagoona ag'omu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu agaali mu bibuga eby'e Samaria, bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli ge baali bazimbye, ni baleetera Musengwa Katonda okusungughala. Amasabo ago yaagakolaku ebyo byonabyona nga bye yakola e Betheli." 
2Kings23:20 Yaitira bakabona ab'omu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu ku alutaari dhe baagheerezangaku, era alutaari edho yaadhookeraku amagumba g'abafu. Olwamala okukola atyo, yairayo e Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Agho kyabazinga Yosia yaalagira abantu ati: “Mukolere Musengwa Katonda waimwe Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa, nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kino eky'endagaano.”" 
2Kings23:22 Okuviira irala mu biseera abalamuzi bye baafugiramu Isiraeli okutuukira irala mu biseera bakyabazinga bye baafugiramu Isiraeli ni Buyudaaya, ghaali nga tighabangaghooku Kibinuko kya Kubitizibwa ekyaga agho." 
2Kings23:23 Aye mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omunaana (18) nga kyabazinga Yosia n'afuga, Ekibinuko ekyo eky'Okubitizibwa baakikolera Musengwa Katonda mu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:24 Yosia era yaatoolagho mu Yerusalemu ni mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona, abasamize, n'abalogo, n'emisambwa egy'omu maka, n'ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, era n'ebintu ebindi byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa. Yaakola ekyo, aghange okuleetera amateeka ago okukakata mu bantu, agaaghandiikibwa mu kitabo Hilikia Omukulu wa Bakabona kye yazuula mu isinzizo." 
2Kings23:25 Mu bakyabazinga boonaboona abaasookagho Yosia, tighaalighooku waire omulala eyamutuukaku mu kugheereza Musengwa Katonda n'omutima gwe gwonagwona, n'omwoyo gwe gwonagwona, n'amaani ge goonagoona, ng'ajiira ku mateeka ga Musa goonagoona. Ni mu bakyabazinga abaamwiririra mwona timwalimu yamutuukaku." 
2Kings23:26 Aye era Musengwa Katonda yaaloba kulekeza busungu bwe kutumbukira ku Buyudaaya ng'oti muliro, olw'ebyo Manasse bye yakola ebyamusungughaza." 
2Kings23:27 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Ndidha kubinga Buyudaaya mu maiso gange, ng'oti bwe nabinga Isiraeli. Ndidha kulekulira agho ekibuga kino Yerusalemu kye nalondamu, era ndekulire agho n'eisinzizo lye nakoba nti mwe banansinzizanga.”" 
2Kings23:28 Ebindi byonabyona kyabazinga Yosia bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings23:29 Mu biseera bye ng'akaali kyabazinga, kyabazinga Neko ow'e Misiri yaidha n'eigye okubeeraku kyabazinga w'e Assiria kumpi n'omwiga Eufurate. Agho kyabazinga Yosia yaaja okumulwanisa. Neko bwe yabona Yosia, yaamwitira e Megiddo." 
2Kings23:30 Abagheereza be baamutwalira mu kigaali eky'omu lutalo nga mufu, okumutoola e Megiddo okumutwala e Yerusalemu, baamuziika mu magombe ge. Abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya baalonda mutabane we Yehoahazi, baamusiiga omuzigo okumufuula kyabazinga mu kifo kya lata we oyo." 
2Kings23:31 Yehoahazi yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'esatu egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myezi esatu mu Yerusalemu. Inhina nga ni Hamutali, mughala wa Yeremia ow'e Libuna." 
2Kings23:32 Yehoahazi yaakolanga ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda ng'oti n'ebyo byonabyona badhaadha be bye baakola. 
2Kings23:33 Agho kyabazinga Neko ow'e Misiri yaasibira Yehoahazi e Ribula mu nsi y'e Hamathi, alobe kufuga mu Yerusalemu. Yaasalira Buyudaaya omusolo gwa kilo enkumi isatu na bina (3,400) edha feeza ni kilo amakumi asatu na ina (34) edha zaabu." 
2Kings23:34 Kyabazinga Neko oyo yaataagho Eliakimu mutabane wa Yosia, yaamufuula kyabazinga mu kifo kya lata we Yosia. Era yaakyusa eriina lya Eliakimu, yaamutuuma Yehoiakimu. Aye kyabazinga Neko oyo yaatwala Yehoahazi e Misiri, Yehoahazi yaafiira eyo." 
2Kings23:35 Kyabazinga Yehoiakimu yaasolozanga feeza ni zaabu ku bantu b'omu nsi ye ng'ajiira ku nfuna yaibwe, aghange okugheza omughendo gw'empiiya edh'omusolo kyabazinga w'e Misiri gwe yamulagira okusasulanga." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoiakimu yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi na mulala mu Yerusalemu. Inhina nga ni Zebida, mughala wa Pedaia ow'e Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Yehoiakimu yaakolanga ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda ng'oti n'ebyo byonabyona badhaadha be bye baakola. 
2Kings24:1 Yehoiakimu bweyali nga ni kyabazinga, ghaabaagho kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia yaalumba Buyudaaya. Yehoiakimu yaakakibwa okufuuka omugheereza we okumala entangama ya myaka esatu. Aye yaamala yaamwefuulaku, yaamudheemera." 
2Kings24:2 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaasindika ebikunsu eby'abalwani Abakaladea, n'eby'Abasiria, n'eby'Abamoabu, n'eby'Abammoni, baidha okulumba Yehoiakimu, bazikirize Buyudaaya nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba ng'abita mu bagheereza be abalanzi." 
2Kings24:3 Bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda n'eyalagira kibe kityo, abantu b'omu Buyudaaya baghange okutoolebwa mu maiso ge, olw'ebibi byonabyona Manasse bye yakola," 
2Kings24:4 n'olw'abantu abaziraku musango Manasse oyo be yaita kuba yaidhuza Yerusalemu omusaayi gw'abantu be yaitira obwereere. Musengwa Katonda nga taghanga kusonigha Manasse oyo olw'ekyo. 
2Kings24:5 Ebindi byonabyona kyabazinga Yehoiakimu bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya." 
2Kings24:6 Agho Yehoiakimu oyo yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa. Mutabane we Yehoiakini yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga. 
2Kings24:7 Kyabazinga wa Misiri tiyairamu kabiri kuva mu nsi ye kwidha kulumba, kuba kyabazinga w'e Babilonia yali amaze okunhaga ekiketezo kyonakyona ekyabanga ekya kyabazinga w'e Misiri, okuva ku kaiga k'e Misiri okutuuka ku mwiga Eufurate." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoiakini yali agheza emyaka ikumi na munaana egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myezi esatu mu Yerusalemu. Inhina nga ni Nehushita, mughala wa Elinathani ow'e Yerusalemu." 
2Kings24:9 Yehoiakini yaakolanga ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda ng'oti n'ebyo byonabyona badhaadha be bye baakola. 
2Kings24:10 Mu biseera ebyo, eigye lya kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia lyaidha e Yerusalemu, lyazingiza ekibuga okukyezunguluza." 
2Kings24:11 Ni Nebukadinezzari mwene yaidha e Yerusalemu, ng'eigye lye lizingiiza ekibuga okukyezunguluza." 
2Kings24:12 Kyabazinga Yehoiakini owa Buyudaaya, ng'ali ghalala n'inhina, n'abagheereza be, n'abakungu be, n'abakulira ekisaagaati kye, yaavaayo, yeeghaayo mu ngalo dha kyabazinga w'e Babilonia. Mu mwaka ogwomunaana ogwo, nga Nebukadinezzari n'afuga Babilonia, Nebukadinezzari oyo yaatwala Yehoiakini nga musibe." 
2Kings24:13 Yaatoola eby'obukombe byonabyona eby'omu isinzizo, n'eby'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, yaabitwala. Era nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba, Nebukadinezzari yaamenhamenha ebintu byonabyona ebya zaabu, kyabazinga Solomoni owa Isiraeli bye yali ataire mu isinzizo." 
2Kings24:14 Nebukadinezzari yaatwala abantu b'omu Yerusalemu ng'abanhage: abakungu boonaboona, n'abantu boonaboona ab'amaani abaziramu ntete naire, baagherera irala abasibe omutwalo mulamba (10,000) woonawoona. Era yaatwala abagheesi n'abakugu mu mirimo egya buli nsambo. Ghazira baasigalayo mu Buyudaaya, okutoolaku abo abaali abaavu bweyavuyavu." 
2Kings24:15 Kyabazinga w'e Babilonia yaatwala Yehoiakini e Babilonia ghalala n'inhina, ni bakazi be, n'abakungu be, n'abantu abakologho mu Buyudaaya. Yabatoola e Yerusalemu, yaabatwala e Babilonia nga basibe." 
2Kings24:16 Abasaadha boonaboona ab'amaani abaziramu ntete naire baali kasanvu (7,000). Ate abakugu mu kukola emirimo, omwali n'abagheesi, baali lukumi (1,000). Abo boonaboona baali ba maani abaziramu ntete naire, nga basobola okulwana olutalo. Abo boonaboona yaabatwala e Babilonia nga basibe." 
2Kings24:17 Agho kyabazinga w'e Babilonia yaataagho Mattania, lata wa Yehoiakini omuto, yaamufuula kyabazinga mu kifo kya Yehoiakini, era yaamukyusa n'eriina, yaamutuuma Zedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekia yali agheza emyaka abiri na mulala egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Era yaafugira entangama ya myaka ikumi na mulala mu Yerusalemu. Inhina nga ni Hamutali, mughala wa Yeremia ow'e Libuna." 
2Kings24:19 Zedekia oyo yaakolanga ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, ng'oti ni byonabyona Yehoiakimu bye yakola." 
2Kings24:20 Musengwa Katonda yaasungughalira ab'omu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya ebitaloodheka, yaababingagho mu maiso ge. Agho Zedekia yaadheemera kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia." 
2Kings25:1 Ku lunaku olweikumi, mu mwezi ogweikumi, mu mwaka ogwomwenda nga Zedekia n'afuga Buyudaaya, kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia yaidha n'eigye lyonalyona okulumba ekibuga Yerusalemu. Baakizingiza era baakibungaku emungo ey'eitaka ey'okuniiniraku okukirwanisa." 
2Kings25:2 Kyasigala nga bakizingiiza batyo okutuusa mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omulala (11) nga Zedekia n'afuga Buyudaaya. 
2Kings25:3 Ku lunaku olwomwenda mu mwezi ogwokuna, endhala yeekalangula okuluma abantu mu kibuga, nga tibakaali na kya kulya." 
2Kings25:4 Agho baawomola ekituli mu kimante eky'oku kibuga, kyabazinga n'abaisirukale boonaboona baalumuka obwire, waire nga Abababilonia baali bazingiiza ekibuga ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona. Baagema engira ebitira mu nimiro ya kyabazinga, baabita mu mulyango oguyimba ebimante ebibiri, baaja nga boolekeire ekiiko ekirimu omwiga Yorudani." 
2Kings25:5 Aye ab'eigye ly'Abababilonia baabingirira kyabazinga Zedekia, baamutuukaku mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe eky'e Yeriko, eigye lye lyonalyona lyasansaana lyamulekulira agho." 
2Kings25:6 Agho Abababilonia baamugema baamutwala ye kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia ng'ali e Ribula, yaamusalira omusango gwamusinga." 
2Kings25:7 Baitira batabane be mu maiso ge ng'alingiriire ati. Era mwene baamutundulamu amaiso, baamusiba mu ndhegere, baamutwala e Babilonia." 
2Kings25:8 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu, mu mwezi ogwokutaanu, mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omwenda (19) nga kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari n'afuga Babilonia, omukungu akulira abakuumi ba kyabazinga w'e Babilonia ayetebwa Nebuzaradani, yaidha e Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:9 Yaayokya eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, n'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, n'ebizimbe byonabyona ebikologho eby'omu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:10 Era eigye ery'Abababilonia eryali naye, lyamenhagho ekimante ekyezungulwire Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:11 Agho Nebuzaradani oyo yaabatwala e Babilonia mu bunhage, abantu abaali basigaire mu kibuga, n'abo abaali beeghaireyo ni baira ku luuyi lwa kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, era n'abandi boonaboona." 
2Kings25:12 Aye yaaleka mu Buyudaaya abandi ku bantu abaavu einho abazira ke bali nako, balimenga era balabirirenga amasamba g'emizabbibu." 
2Kings25:13 Abababilonia baamenhamenha empango edh'ekyuma eky'ekikomo edhaali mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, n'ebituuti ebiriku enkede eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, n'etanka enkologho nga yoona ya kyuma kya kikomo. Bwe baamala, baatoola ekyuma eky'ekikomo ekyava mu bintu ebyo, baakitwala e Babilonia." 
2Kings25:14 Baatwala ensugha, n'ebitiiyo, ni makansu edhisala ebisiriiza ku ntambi dh'entaala, n'ebintu mwe baatanga obubbaani, n'ebintu ebindi byonabyona eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo bye baakozesanga mu kugheereza mu isinzizo." 
2Kings25:15 Nebuzaradani yaatwala kiisi kintu ekyakolebwa mu zaabu oba mu feeza, omwali ebintu bye bataamu omuliro, n'ebibya." 
2Kings25:16 Obungi bw'ekyuma eky'ekikomo kyabazinga Solomoni kye yakolamu empango eibri, n'etanka enkologho, n'ebituuti ebiriku enkede, byonabyona ebyo nga byali mu isinzizo, bwali buzito inho baaloba kusobola kubupima." 
2Kings25:17 Empango endala ng'egheza mita munaana mu buleeyi, ng'eriku omutwe ogw'ekyuma eky'ekikomo ogugheza mita endala n'obutundu obusatu mu buleeyi. Ku mutwe ogwo nga kuliku ebifaananie eby'endhegere edhirukiibwa ng'oti katimba n'ebifaananie by'emikomamawanga, okugwezunguluza gwonagwona. N'empango eyokubiri yoona baali nga bagikoze mu nsambo n'endala eyo." 
2Kings25:18 Nebuzaradani era yaagema Seraia Kabona Omukulu, ni Zefania kabona amwiririra, n'abakuumi b'omulyango ogwingira mu isinzizo abasatu." 
2Kings25:19 Ni mu kibuga yaatoolamu omuduumizi w'eigye, n'abataanu ku bawi b'amagezi aba kyabazinga abaali bakaali mu kibuga, n'omughandiisi eyakuumanga enkalala edh'abaisirukale mu ighanga, n'abantu nkaaga abandi ku batyamye abaali bakaali mu kibuga." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradani yaabatwala eri kyabazinga w'e Babilonia e Ribula," 
2Kings25:21 mu kiketezo ky'e Hamathi. Kyabazinga oyo yaabakuba era yaabaitira eyo. Batyo Abayudaaya bwe baabatoola mu nsi yaibwe nga basibe, baabatwala mu bunhage." 
2Kings25:22 Kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia yaataagho Gedalia, mutabane wa Ahikamu era mwidhukulu wa Shafani, abe omufuzi w'abantu abaasigala mu Buyudaaya, kyabazinga oyo be yalekamu." 
2Kings25:23 Ghaaligho abakulu mu magye ga Buyudaaya n'abaisirukale baibwe abaali mu irungu, nga bakaali kweghaayo. Bwe baawulira nga kyabazinga w'e Babilonia aghaire Gedalia obufuzi, baidha eri Gedalia oyo e Mizipa. Abaidha baali bano: Ishimaeli mutabane wa Nethania, ni Yohanani mutabane wa Karea, ni Seraia mutabane wa Tanhumethi ow'e Netofa, ni Yaazania mutabane w'omusaadha ow'e Maaka." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia yaabalayirira, ng'akoba ati: “Mutatya bakungu Abababilonia. Imwe musigale mu nsi eno mugheereze bugheereze kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, byonabyona biidha kubajiira bukalamu.”" 
2Kings25:25 Aye mu mwezi ogwomusanvu, Ishimaeli mutabane wa Nethania era mwidhukulu wa Elishama ow'oku lulyo olulangira, yaaja n'abantu ikumi e Mizipa, baalumba baita Gedalia, n'Abayudaaya, era n'Abababilonia abaali naye eyo." 
2Kings25:26 Agho abantu boonaboona, abakulu n'abato, nga kw'otaire n'abakulu mu magye bale, baasituka baalumukira e Misiri, nga bali kutya Abababilonia." 
2Kings25:27 Agho kyabazinga Evilimerodaki ow'e Babilonia, yaagemerwa kyabazinga Yehoiakini ow'e Buyudaaya ekivunika mu mwaka gwene Evilimerodaki oyo gwe yafuukiramu kyabazinga. Yaamutoola mu ikomera ku lunaku olwamakumi abiri n'omusanvu, mu mwezi ogweikumi n'ebiri (12), mu mwaka ogwamakumi asatu n'omusanvu (37), okuva Yehoiakini oyo kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya lwe yasibwa." 
2Kings25:28 Evilimerodaki oyo yaamubisa bukalamu, yaamuta mu kifo kya ghaigulu okusinga bakyabazinga abandi abaali naye mu bunhage e Babilonia." 
2Kings25:29 Yehoiakini baamuganha okutoolamu ebivaalo by'eikomera, era buli lunaku yaaliiranga ku kiiwulo kya kyabazinga." 
2Kings25:30 Kyabazinga yaalagira bamughenga omugabo ogwa buli lunaku, ekiseera kyonakyona kye yamala nga mulamu." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu n'eyazaala Sethi, Sethi yaazaala Enoshi, Enoshi yaazaala Kenani," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani yaazaala Mahaleli, Mahaleli yaazaala Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Yaredi yazaala Enoka, Enoka yaazaala Methusela, Methusela yaazaala Lameka, Lameka" 
1Chronicles1:4 yaazaala Noa, Noa yaazaala abaana basatu: Shemu, Hamu, ni Yafethi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Yafethi yaazaala: Gomeri, Magogi, Madai, Yavani, Tubali, Mesheki, ni Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Gomeri yaazaala: Ashekenazi, Difathi, ni Togarima." 
1Chronicles1:7 Yavani yaazaala: Elisha, Tarushishi, Kittimu, ni Rodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Hamu yaazaala: Kushi, Misiri, Puti, ni Kanaani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Kushi yaazaala: Seba, Havila, Sabita, Raama, ni Sabiteka. Raama yaazaala: Sheba, ni Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi n'eyazaala Nimurodi eyasooka okuba omulwani ow'amaani ku nsi. 
1Chronicles1:11 Misiri yaazaala: Ludimu, Anami, Lehabu, Nafutu," 
1Chronicles1:12 Pathurusi, Kafutori, ni Kasulu eyasimukamu Abafilisiti." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaani yaazaala: Sidoni eyali omwana we omuberi, ni Hethi," 
1Chronicles1:14 era n'eyasimukamu Abayebusi, n'Abamori, n'Abagirigashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 n'Abahivi, n'Abaraki, n'Abasini," 
1Chronicles1:16 n'Abaruvadi, n'Abazemari, n'Abahamathi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Shemu yaazaala: Elamu, Assihuri, Aripakishadi, Ludi, Aramu, Uzi, Huli, Getheri, ni Mesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Aripakishadi yaazaala Shela, Shela yaazaala Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi yaazaala abaana babiri: eriina ery'owundi nga ni Pelegi, kuba mu biseera bye yabeeragho ensi yeeyawulamu. Ate eriina ery'owundi nga ni Yokutani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokutani yazaala: Alumodadi, Shelefu, Hazarimavethi, Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoramu, Uzali, Dikula," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebali, Abimaeli, Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havila, ni Yobabu. Abo boonaboona baali baana ba Yokutani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Okuva ku Shemu okutuuka ku Aburamu: Shemu yaazaala Aripakishadi, Aripakishadi yaazaala Shela, Shela yaazaala" 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Eberi yaazaala Pelegi, Pelegi yaazaala Reu, Reu yaazaala" 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Serugi yaazaala Nahori, Nahori yaazaala Tera, Tera yaazaala" 
1Chronicles1:27 Aburamu, oyo nga ni Aburahamu." 
1Chronicles1:28 Aburahamu yazaala batabane be babiri: Isaaka ni Ishimaeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Obuzaale bwaibwe ni buno: Nebaiothi n'eyali omwana omuberi owa Ishimaeli, ku oyo kwairaku Kedari, Adubeeli, Mibisamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishama, Duma, Massa, Hadadi, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi, Nafishi, ni Kedema. Abo n'abaana ba Ishimaeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Aburahamu yali n'omukazi ow'embali ng'ayetebwa Ketura, ye yazaalamu abaana bano: Zimurani, Yokoshani, Medani, Midiani, Ishibaki, ni Shua. Yokoshani yaazaala Sheba, ni Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midiani yaazaala Efa, Eferi, Hanoka, Abida, ni Eluda. Abo boonaboona baali baidhukulu ba Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Aburahamu yaazaala Isaaka. Isaaka yazaala Esau, ni Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles1:35 Esau yaazaala: Elifazi, Reweli, Yeusha, Yalamu, ni Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifazi yaazaala: Temani, Omari, Zefi, Gatamu, Kenazi, Timuna, ni Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reweli yaazaala: Nahathi, Zera, Shamma, ni Mizza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Seiri yaazaala: Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Ana, Dishoni, Ezeri, ni Dishani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Lotani yaazaala Hori, ni Homamu. Era Lotani oyo yali ni mwanhina nga ni Timuna." 
1Chronicles1:40 Shobali yaazaala: Aliani, Manahathi, Ebali, Shefi, ni Onamu. Zibeoni yaazaala Aya, ni Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Ana yaazaala Dishoni. Dishoni yaazaala: Hamurani, Eshibani, Ithirani, ni Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ezeri yaazaala Bilihani, Zaavani, ni Yaakani. Ate Dishani yaazaala Uzi, ni Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Bano ni bakyabazinga abaajanga nga bairaganwaku okufuga mu nsi Edomu, nga Abaisiraeli bakaali kubaaku na kyabazinga abafuga: Bela mutabane wa Beori, eriina ly'ekibuga kye nga ni Dinahaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela bwe yafa, Yobabu mutabane wa Zera ow'e Bozira yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabu bwe yafa, Hushamu eyava mu nsi y'Abatemani yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushamu bwe yafa, Hadadi mutabane wa Bedadi yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga. Hadadi oyo n'eyaghangula Abamidia mu lutalo olwali mu nsi y'e Moabu, era eriina ly'ekibuga kye lyali Avithi."
