1Chronicles1:47 Hadadi bwe yafa, Samula ow'e Masireka yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samula bwe yafa, Shaulo ow'e Rohobothi ekiri ku Eufurate yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Chronicles1:49 Shaulo bwe yafa, Baali Hanani mutabane wa Akabori yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baali Hanani bwe yafa, Hadadi ow'e Pai yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga. Muka Hadadi oyo yali nga ni Mehetabela mughala wa Matiredi era mwidhukulu wa Mezahabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi bwe yafa, ensi Edomu yaafugibwa abakungu bano: Timuna, Aliva, Yethethi," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenazi, Temani, Mibuzari," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magadieli, ni Iramu. Abo n'abakungu abaafuga Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Bano n'abaana Yakobo be yazaala: Reubeni, Simeoni, Levi, Yuda, Issakari, Zebuluni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani, Yosefu, Benjamini, Nafutali, Gadi, ni Asheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Yuda yaazaala abaana bano abasatu ni mukazi we Omukanaani eyayetebwanga Bathishua: Eri, Onani, ni Shela. Eri oyo, eyali omwana omuberi owa Yuda, yali muntu mubi inho, era Musengwa Katonda yaamwita n'okumwita." 
1Chronicles2:4 Yuda era yaazaala abaana abandi bano mu Tamari mukaamwana we: Perezi ni Zela. Abaana ba Yuda boonaboona aghalala, baali bataanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Perezi yaazaala Hezironi ni Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Zera yaazaala abaana bataanu bano: Zimuri, Ethani, Hemani, Kalokoli, ni Dara." 
1Chronicles2:7 Karumi yaazaala Akari eyaleetera Abaisiraeli obuzibu, olw'okwonoona ebintu ebyali bigheereibwayo okuba ebya Katonda." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ethani yaazaala Azaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezironi yaazaala: Yerahameeli, Ramu, ni Kelibai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu yaazaala Amminadabu, Amminadabu yaazaala Nahashoni omukulembeze w'ab'ekika kya Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahashoni yaazaala Saluma, Saluma yaazaala Boazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 Boazi yaazaala Obedi, Obedi yaazaala Yesse." 
1Chronicles2:13 Yesse yaazaala abaana abalenzi musanvu: Eliabu nga n'omuberi, kwairaku Abinadabu, kwairaku Shimea," 
1Chronicles2:14 kwairaku Nethaneli, kwairaku Raddai," 
1Chronicles2:15 kwairaku Ozemu, ate ku oyo kwairaku Daudi." 
1Chronicles2:16 Era yaazaala n'abaana abaghala babiri: Zeruia ni Abigaili. Zeruia yaazaala abaana abalenzi basatu: Abishai, Yoabu, ni Asaheli." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaili yaazaala Amasa. Lata wa Amasa oyo nga ni Yetheri Omuishimaeli. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mutabane wa Hezironi yaazaala ni mukazi we Azuba omwana omughala, nga ni Yeriothi. Era mukazi we Azuba oyo, yaazaala abaana abalenzi bano: Yesheri, Shobabu, ni Arudoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba bwe yafa, Kalebu yaabayiza Efurathi yaamuzaalamu omwana nga ni Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri oyo yaazaala Uri, ate Uri Yazaala Bezaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Hezironi bweyali ng'agheza emyaka nkaaga egy'obukulu, yaabayiza mughala wa Makiri yaamuzaalamu omwana nga ni Segubu. Makiri oyo nga ni lata wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu yaazaala Yairi eyali mwene bibuga amakumi abiri n'ebisatu mu kiketezo ky'e Gileadi. 
1Chronicles2:23 Aye obwakyabazinga bw'e Geshuri ni mu Aramu bwabanhagaku ebibuga bya Yairi ni Kenathi nkaaga, ghalala n'ebyalo ebibyezungulwire. Abantu boonaboona abaali eyo, nga n'abasimuka mu Makiri, lata wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Hezironi bwe yamala okufa, Kalebu yaazaala ni Efurathi namwandu wa lata we Hezironi oyo omwana, nga ni Ashuhuri. Ashuhuri oyo ni lata wa Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Yerahameeli eyali omwana omukulu owa Hezironi, yaazaala abaana bano: Ramu nga n'omuberi, ni Buna, ni Oreni, ni Ozemu, ni Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yerahameeli yali n'omukazi owundi nga ni Atara, ye yazaala naye Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Ramu eyali omwana omukulu owa Yerahameeli, yaazaala Maazi, ni Yamini, ni Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Onamu yaazaala Shammai ni Yada. Ate Shammai yaazaala Nadabu ni Abishuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Abishuri yaabayiza omukazi nga ni Abihaili, yaamuzaalamu Ahibani ni Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Ate Nadabu yaazaala Seledi ni Appaimu. Aye Seledi yaafa nga tazaireeku mwana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Appaimu yazaala Ishi, Ishi yaazaala Sheshani, ate Sheshani yaazaala Ahalai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Yada muganda wa Shammai yaazaala Yetheri ni Yonathani. Aye Yetheri yaafa nga tazaireeku mwana. 
1Chronicles2:33 Yonathani yaazaala Pelethi ni Zaza. Abo ni baidhukulu ba Yerahameeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshani tiyazaalaku mwana mulenzi, yazaala baghala beereere. Aye yali n'omwiru we Omumisiri nga ni Yaruha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Kale Sheshani yaatoola mughala we yaamugha omwiru we oyo Yaruha yaamubayiza, era yaazaala naye Attai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Attai yaazaala Nathani, Nathani yaazaala Zabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi yaazaala Efulali, Efulali yaazaala Obedi." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi yaazaala Yehu, Yehu yaazaala Azaria." 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaria yaazaala Helezi, Helezi yaazaala Eleasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa yaazaala Sisimai, Sisimai yaazaala Shallumu." 
1Chronicles2:41 Shallumu yaazaala Yekamia, Yekamia yaazaala Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Mesha n'eyali omwana omukulu owa Kalebu, ate Kalebu oyo nga muganda wa Yerahameeli. Mesha oyo yaazaala Zifu, Zifu yaazaala Maresha, Maresha yaazaala Heburoni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Heburoni yaazaala Kora, ni Tappua, ni Rekemu, ni Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema yaazaala Rahamu eyali lata wa Yorukeamu, ate Rekemu yaazaala Shammai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Shammai yaazaala Maoni, ate Maoni yaazaala Bethizuri." 
1Chronicles2:46 Kalebu yali n'omukazi ow'embali nga ni Efa, yaamuzaalamu Harani, ni Moza, ni Gazezi. Harani oyo yazaala omwana yeena baamweta Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Yahadai yaazaala: Regemu, ni Yothamu, ni Geshani, ni Peleti, ni Efa, ni Shaafu." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kalebu yali n'omukazi owundi ow'embali nga ni Maaka, yaamuzaalamu Sheberi ni Tirihana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Era yaamuzaalamu Shaafu lata wa Madimanina, ni Sheva lata wa Makibena era lata wa Gibea. Kalebu yaliku mughala we nga bamweta Akisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Bano n'abaasimuka mu Kalebu: Huri n'eyali omwana omukulu owa Kalebu, ye yazaala mu mukazi we Efuratha. Huri oyo yaazaala Shobali lata wa Kiriathi Yearimu." 
1Chronicles2:51 Mutabane we owokubiri Saluma ni lata wa Bethelehemu. Mutabane we owokusatu Harefu ni lata wa Bethigaderi. 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobali lata wa Kiriathi Yearimu, n'eyali dhaadha wa Haroe n'ekitundu ekirala ku bitundu ebibiri eby'Abamenuhothi." 
1Chronicles2:53 Era yaaba dhaadha w'ebika ebyali mu Kiriathi Yearimu, bino: Abaithiri, Abaputhi, Abashumathi, n'Abamishirai. Mu bika ebyo n'omwava Abazorathi n'Abeshitaoli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Saluma n'eyali lata wa Bethelehemu, era eyasimukamu Abanetofathi, Abatirothi Bethi Yoabu, era n'Abazori abaali ekitundu ekirala ku bitundu ebibiri eby'Abamanahathi." 
1Chronicles2:55 Bino n'ebika eby'abaghandiisi abaabanga e Yabezi: Abatirathi, Abashimeathi, n'Abasukathi. Abo n'Abakeni abaava e Hamathi eyasimuka Abarekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Bano n'abaana Daudi be yazaala ng'ali e Heburoni: Amunoni n'eyali omuberi, inhina nga ni Ahinoamu Omuyezireeli kwairaku Danieli, inhina nga ni Abigaili Omukarumeli" 
1Chronicles3:1 Bano n'abaana Daudi be yazaala ng'ali e Heburoni: Amunoni n'eyali omuberi, inhina nga ni Ahinoamu Omuyezireeli kwairaku Danieli, inhina nga ni Abigaili Omukarumeli" 
1Chronicles3:2 kwairaku Abusalomu, inhina nga ni Maaka mughala wa kyabazinga Talumai ow'e Geshuri kwairaku Adoniya, inhina nga ni Haggithi" 
1Chronicles3:3 kwairaku Shefatia, inhina nga ni Abitali Ithureamu, ate ono inhina nga ni Egula." 
1Chronicles3:4 Abo boonaboona omukaaga yabazaala ng'ali e Heburoni, ye yafugira okumala entangama ey'emyaka omusanvu n'emyezi omukaaga. Mu Yerusalemu Daudi oyo yafugiramu entangama ya myaka asatu n'esatu." 
1Chronicles3:5 Era bano n'abaana be yazaala ng'ali eyo: Shimea, Shobabu, Nathani, Solomoni. Abo bana, inhaibwe nga ni Bathishua mughala wa Ammieli." 
1Chronicles3:6 Era yaazaala n'abaana abandi mwenda: Ibuhari, Elishama, Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefegi, Yafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishama, Eliada, ni Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles3:9 Daudi era yazaala abaana abandi abalenzi ni bakazi be ab'embali. Era yaazaala n'omwana omughala nga ni Tamari. 
1Chronicles3:10 Solomoni yazaala Rehoboamu, Rehoboamu yaazaala Abiya, Abiya yaazaala Asa, Asa yaazaala Yehoshafati," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yehoshafati yaazaala Yoramu, Yoramu yaazaala Ahazia, Ahazia yaazaala Yoashi," 
1Chronicles3:12 Yoashi yaazaala Amazia, Amazia yaazaala Azaria, Azaria yaazaala Yothamu," 
1Chronicles3:13 Yothamu yaazaala Ahazi, Ahazi yaazaala Hezekia, Hezekia yaazaala Manasse," 
1Chronicles3:14 Manasse yaazaala Amoni, Amoni yaazaala Yosia." 
1Chronicles3:15 Yosia oyo yaazaala abaana bana: Yohanani nga n'omuberi, kwairaku Yehoiakimu, kwairaku Zedekia, kwairaku Shallumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Yehoiakimu yaazaala abaana babiri: Yekonia ni Zedekia. 
1Chronicles3:17 Bano ni baidhukulu ba Yekonia eyatwalibwa e Babilonia nga munhage: Shealutieli," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malikiramu, Pedia, Shenazzari, Yekamia, Hoshama, ni Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedia yaazaala Zerubbabeli, ni Shimei. Zerubbabeli yaazaala Meshullamu, ni Hanania, ni Shelomithi mwanhinaibwe," 
1Chronicles3:20 n'abandi bataanu: Hashuba, Oheli, Berekia, Hasadia, ni Yushabu Hesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hanania yaazaala abaana babiri, Pelatia ni Yeshaia. Yeshaia yaazaala Refaia, Refaia yaazaala Arunani, Arunani yaazaala Obadia, Obadia yaazaala Shekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Shekania yaazaala omwana mulala, nga ni Shemaia. Shemaia oyo yaazaala: Hattushi, Igali, Baria, Nearia, ni Shafati." 
1Chronicles3:23 Nearia yaazaala abaana basatu, Elioenai, Hizikia, ni Azarikamu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elioenai yaazaala abaana musanvu Hodavia, Eliashibu, Pelaia, Akkubu, Yohanani, Delaia, ni Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Bano n'abandi ku baidhukulu ba Yuda: Perezi, Hezironi, Karumi, Huri, ni Shobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobali yaazaala Reaya, Reaya yaazaala Yahathi, Yahathi yaazaala Ahumai ni Lahadi abaasimukamu abatyamye b'e Zora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Etamu yaazaala abaana abalenzi basatu: Yezireeli, Ishima, ni Idibbashi. Era yaazaala n'omwana omughala mulala, nga ni Hazzeleliponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penueli lata wa Gedori ni Ezeri lata wa Husha, baali batabane ba Huri omwana omuberi owa Efuratha eyali muka Kalebu. Huri oyo n'eyasimukamu Bethelehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuhuri lata wa Tekoa yali n'abakazi babiri: Hela ni Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 Ashuhuri oyo yaazaala ni Naara abaana bano: Ahuzzamu, Heferi, Temeni, ni Haahashitari." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ate yaazaala ni Hela abaana bano: Zerethi, Izahara, ni Ethinani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Kozi yaazaala Anubu, ni Zobeba, era yaaba dhaadha w'enda edhaasimuka mu Ahariheli mutabane wa Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Ghaaligho omusaadha nga ni Yabezi, eyali ow'ekitiibwa okusinga baganda be. Inhina yamutuuma eriina eryo Yabezi, kuba yamuluma inho ng'amuzaala." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabezi yaasaba Katonda ati: “Wo Katonda, mpa enkabi, ogaziye ekiketezo kyange, era banga ghalala ninze okumponia buli kabi, kalobenga kuntuukaku.” Era Katonda yaamugha kye yasaba." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kalebu muganda wa Shuha yaazaala Mehiri, Mehiri yaazaala Eshitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni yaazaala abaana basatu: Bethirafa, Pasea, ni Tehinna. Tehinna yaazaala Irinahashi. Abaasimuka mu abo, n'abatyamye b'e Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Kenazi yaazaala abaana babiri: Othinieli ni Seraia. Othinieli yaazaala abaana babiri: Hathathi ni Meonothai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai yaazaala Ofura. Seraia yaazaala Yoabu eyasimukamu ab'omu Kiiko ekyetebwa eky'Abagheesi, kuba abantu baamu baali bagheesi." 
1Chronicles4:15 Kalebu mutabane wa Yefune yazaala Iru, Ela, ni Naamu. Ela yaazaala Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Yehalleleli yaazaala: Zifu, Zifa, Tiria, ni Asareli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezira yaazaala: Yetheri, Meredi, Eferi, ni Yaloni. Meredi yaabayiza Bithia mughala wa kyabazinga w'e Misiri, baazaala omwana omughala nga ni Miriamu, era baazaala n'abaana abalenzi babiri: Shammai ni Ishiba. Ishiba oyo yaazaala Eshitemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Meredi yaabayiza n'omukazi Omuyudaaya, baazaala abaana abalenzi basatu: Yeredi eyazaala Gedori, Heberi eyazaala Soko, ni Yekuthieli eyazaala Zanoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Hodia yaabayiza mwanhina Nahamu. Batabane ba muka Hodia oyo, baasimukamu Keila ow'e Garumi ni Eshitemoa ow'e Maakathi." 
1Chronicles4:20 Shimoni yaazaala: Amunoni, Rinna, Benihanani, ni Tiloni. Ishi yaazaala Zohethi ni Benizohethi." 
1Chronicles4:21 Shela mutabane wa Yuda n'eyasimukamu bano: Eri eyazaala Leka; ni Laada eyazaala Maresha, abo nga baali ba ku nda edh'abantu abaalukanga engoye empegheevu ab'e Bethi Ashibea;" 
1Chronicles4:22 ni Yokimu n'abatyamye ab'e Kozeba; era ni Yoashi ni Sarafu, abaafuganga mu Moabu ni mu Bethelehemu (Ebyafaayo ebyo byaligho ira inho)." 
1Chronicles4:23 Abantu abo baali bawumbi abaakoleranga kyabazinga, nga baba mu Netaimu ni mu Gedera." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simeoni yaazaala: Nemueli, Yamini, Yaribu, Zera, ni Shaulo." 
1Chronicles4:25 Shaulo yaazaala Shallumu, Shallumu yaazaala Mibusamu, Mibusamu yaazaala Mishima." 
1Chronicles4:26 Mishima yazaala Hammueli, Hammueli yaazaala Zakkuri, Zakkuri yaazaala Shimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei yaazaala abaana abalenzi ikumi na mukaaga, n'abaghala mukaaga. Aye baganda be tibaazaala baana kamaala, era ekika kyaibwe tikyayala ng'ekya Yuda bwe kyayala." 
1Chronicles4:28 Baidhukulu ba Simeoni baasenga mu bibuga bino: Beerisheba, Molada, Hazarishualo," 
1Chronicles4:29 Biliha, Ezemu, Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 Bethueli, Horuma, Zikulaga," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bethi Marukabothi, Hazarisusimu, Bethibiri, ni Shaaraimu. Ebyo n'ebyali ebibuga byaibwe okutuusa Daudi bwe yafuuka kyabazinga." 
1Chronicles4:32 N'ebyalo byaibwe byali bino: Etamu, Aini, Rimmoni, Tokeni, ni Ashani. Byonabyona aghalala byali ebibuga bitaanu," 
1Chronicles4:33 nga kw'otaire ebyalo ebyezungulwire ebibuga ebyo okutuukira irala e Baali. Bino n'ebighandiiko ebyogera ku bakulu b'enda dhe baasimukamu, ni ku biketezo bye baabangamu:" 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobabu, ni Yamuleki, ni Yosha mutabane wa Amazia," 
1Chronicles4:35 ni Yoeli, ni Yehu mutabane wa Yoshibia, Yoshibia eyali mutabane wa Seraia, Seraia eyali mutabane wa Asieli." 
1Chronicles4:36 Okwo waayongeraku ni Elioenai, ni Yaakoba, ni Yeshohaia, ni Asaia, ni Adieli," 
1Chronicles4:37 ni Yesimieli, ni Benaia, ni Ziza mutabane wa Shifi, Shifi eyali mutabane wa Alloni, Alloni eyali mutabane wa Yedaia, Yedaia eyali mutabane wa Shimuri, Shimuri eyali mutabane wa Shemaia." 
1Chronicles4:38 Abo beene maina agoogeirwaku baali bakulu ba nda dhaibwe. Era olulyo lwaibwe bwe lweyongera okwala einho," 
1Chronicles4:39 baasengukira ere aghaingirirwa e Gedori ku luuyi lw'e buvandhuba w'ekiiko, nga bali kwagalira ebyayo byaibwe eisubi." 
1Chronicles4:40 Baayagaanayo aghantu aghali eisubi eirungi eigimu, mu kiketezo ekigazi era ekiwolu ekiidhwire emiraala. Abatyamye baamu abaasooka baali nga basimuka mu Hamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Mu biseera kyabazinga Hezekia bye yafugiramu Buyudaaya, abo beene maina agoogeirwaku baalumba ekiketezo ekyo, baazikiriza weema dh'abatyamye baayo, baazikiriza n'Abameuni be baayagaanayo. Beene baasenga mu kifo kyaibwe ni ye buli eno, kuba ghaaligho eisubi ery'okwayiramu ebyayo byaibwe." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ebikumi bitaanu ku abo baaja ku lusozi Seiri, nga bakulembeirwamu batabane ba Ishi bano: Pelatia, Nearia, Refaia, ni Uzzieli." 
1Chronicles4:43 Eyo baitirayo Abamaleki abaali bawoniegho nga balumukiireyo, beene baasengayo ni ye buli eno." 
1Chronicles5:1 Bano n'abaana n'abaidhukulu aba Reubeni omwana omuberi owa Isiraeli. Aye waire nga Reubeni oyo n'eyali omwana omuberi, omugabo gwe ogw'omwana omuberi baagumutoolaku, baagugha abaana ba Yosefu muganda we kuba Reubeni oyo yaba n'owundi ku baka lata we Yakobo mu buliri. Kale mu lukalala olw'obuzaale tiyaghandiikibwa ghe yandibaire ng'omwana omuberi." 
1Chronicles5:2 Mu butuufu, waire nga Yuda yafuuka ow'amaani mu baganda be boonaboona, era waire nga mu kika kye mwavaamu omukulembeze, aye era obukulu obw'okuzaalibwa bwasigala nga bwa Yosefu." 
1Chronicles5:3 Reubeni oyo omwana omuberi owa Isiraeli yazaala: Hanoka, ni Pallu, ni Hezironi, ni Karumi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Bano ni baidhukulu ba Yoeli: Shemaia yazaala Gogi, Gogi yaazaala Shimei, Shimei" 
1Chronicles5:5 yaazaala Mika, Mika yaazaala Reaya, Reaya yaazaala Baali, Baali" 
1Chronicles5:6 yaazaala Beera, kyabazinga Tigulathi Piluneseri ow'e Assiria ye yatwala mu bunhage. Beera oyo n'eyali akulira abasimuka mu Reubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Enkalala dhooleka ng'abakulira enda edhiri mu kika kya Reubeni ni bano: Yeieli, ni Zekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 ni Bela mutabane wa Azazi, Azazi mutabane wa Shema, Shema mutabane wa Yoeli. Baidhukulu ba Reubeni abo baabanga mu kiketezo ekiva mu Aroeri okutuukira irala e Nebo n'e Baali Meoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Mu buvandhuba baali mu kiketezo ekyali okuva eirungu ghe liinhamira, okutuukira irala ku mwiga Eufurate kuba ebyayo byaibwe byali nga byeyongeire inho obungi mu kiketezo ky'e Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mu biseera bya kyabazinga Saulo, Abareubeni abo baalwana n'Abahagari mu lutalo baabaita, era baasenga mu kiketezo kyaibwe ekiri ku luuyi lw'e buvandhuba wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ab'ekika kya Gadi baasenga ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba w'Abareubeni, okuva e Bashani okutuukira irala e Saleka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoeli nga n'abakulira, kwairaku Shafamu, kwairaku Yanai ni Shafati mu Bashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Baganda baibwe ng'ojiira ku nda dha baiseibwe ni bano: Mikaeli, Meshullamu, Sheba, Yorai, Yakani, Zia, ni Eberi. Boonaboona n'abantu omusanvu." 
1Chronicles5:14 Abo baali baidhukulu ba Abihaili mutabane wa Huri, Huri yaaba mutabane wa Yaroa, Yaroa yaaba mutabane wa Gileadi, Gileadi yaaba mutabane wa Mikaeli, Mikaeli yaaba mutabane wa Yeshishai, Yeshishai yaaba mutabane wa Yahudo, Yahudo yaaba mutabane wa Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mutabane wa Abudieli era mwidhukulu wa Guni, n'eyali akulira enda dha baiseibwe edho." 
1Chronicles5:16 Abagadi baabanga mu kiketezo ky'e Gileadi n'eky'e Bashani, mu bibuga byayo byonabyona ni mu biketezo eby'e Sharoni byonabyona ebyalimu ebyayiro." 
1Chronicles5:17 Abo boonaboona baaghandiikibwa mu nkalala ng'obuzaale bwaibwe bwe bwali, mu biseera kyabazinga Yothamu bye yafugiramu Buyudaaya, ni mu biseera kyabazinga Yeroboamu Owokubiri bye yafugiramu Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ekika kya Reubeni, n'ekya Gadi, n'ekitundu ku kika kya Manasse, byonabyona aghalala byali n'abalwani abaziramu ntete emitwalo ena n'enkumi ina na lusanvu na nkaaga (44,760) nga bali n'obumanhirivu mu kukozesa engabo, n'empiima, n'obulaso, era nga baatendekebwa bukalamu mu kulwana entalo." 
1Chronicles5:19 Agho baaja baatanula olutalo ku Bahagari, ni ku Bayeturi, ni ku Banafishi, ni ku Banodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Baata obwesige mu Musengwa Katonda nga bamusaba ababeere, era yaababeera yaabaleetera okughangula Abahagari ghalala ni boonaboona abaali nabo." 
1Chronicles5:21 Baanhaga ku bazigu abo engamiya emitwalo etaanu (50,000), entaama emitwalo amakumi abiri n'etaanu (250,000), n'endogoyi enkumi ibiri (2,000), era baatwala n'abasibe emitwalo ikumi (100,000)." 
1Chronicles5:22 Era baita mu bazigu abo abantu kamaala, kuba Katonda n'eyalwana olutalo olwo. Baaba mu biketezo ebyo nga babyefuze, okutuusa lwe baatwalibwa mu bunhage." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ekitundu ku kika eky'Abamanasse baaja nga beeyongerera irala obungi, baabanga mu kiketezo eky'ensi eyo, okuva e Bashani okutuukira irala e Baali Herimoni, n'e Seniri, ni ku lusozi Herimoni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Bano nga n'abakulira enda dha baiseibwe: Eferi, Ishi, Elieli, Azarieli, Yeremia, Hodavia, ni Yahudieli. Abo boonaboona baali balwani abaziramu ntete, nga bamanhifu inho, era nga n'abakulira enda dha baiseibwe." 
1Chronicles5:25 Aye abantu abo baamala baaloba kuba beesigwa eri Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe. Baamuvaaku, baasinzanga emisambwa gy'abantu Katonda be yabinga mu nsi eyo nga beene Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuukayo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Agho Katonda wa Isiraeli yaasiikuula enzigu mu mwoyo gwa Puli kyabazinga w'e Assiria, eriina lye erindi nga ni Tigulathi Pileseri, yaaja yaatwala mu bunhage Abareubeni, n'Abagadi, n'ekitundu ku Bamanasse. Yaabatwala e Hala, n'e Habori, n'e Hara, ni ku mwiga Gozani, baabeera irala eyo ni ye buli eno." 
1Chronicles6:1 Levi yazaala Gereshomu, ni Kohathi, ni Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kohathi yaazaala Amuramu, ni Izahara, ni Heburoni, ni Uzzieli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amuramu yaazaala Aaroni, ni Musa, ni Miriamu. Aaroni yaazaala Nadabu, ni Abihu, ni Eleazari, ni Ithamari." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazari yaazaala Finehasi, Finehasi yaazaala Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua yaazaala Bukki, Bukki yaazaala Uzzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzzi yaazaala Zerahia, Zerahia yaazaala Meraiothi," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiothi yaazaala Amaria, Amaria yaazaala Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubu yaazaala Zadoki, Zadoki yaazaala Ahimaazi," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaazi yaazaala Azaria, Azaria yaazaala Yohanani," 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanani yaazaala Azaria eyakola obwakabona mu isinzizo, Solomoni lye yazimba mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaria yaazaala Amaria, Amaria yaazaala Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubu yaazaala Zadoki, Zadoki yaazaala Shallumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 Shallumu yaazaala Hilikia, Hilikia yaazaala Azaria." 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaria yaazaala Seraia, Seraia yaazaala Yehozadaki," 
1Chronicles6:15 Yehozadaki oyo yeena baamutwala mu bunhage, Musengwa Katonda bwe yatwala ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu mu bunhage ng'akozesa Nebukadinezzari." 
1Chronicles6:16 Levi yazaala Gereshomu, ni Kohathi, ni Merari:" 
1Chronicles6:17 Gereshomu yaazaala Libuni ni Shimei 
1Chronicles6:18 Kohathi yaazaala Amuramu, ni Izahara, ni Heburoni, ni Uzzieli" 
1Chronicles6:19 ate Merari yaazaala Mahili ni Mushi. Edho n'enda edhisimukamu Abalevi ng'ojiira ku baiseibwe. 
1Chronicles6:20 Bano n'abasimuka mu Gereshomu: Gereshomu yazaala Libuni, Libuni yaazaala Yahathi, Yahathi yaazaala Zimma," 
1Chronicles6:21 Zimma yaazaala Yoa, Yoa yaazaala Iddo, Iddo yaazaala Zera, Zera yaazaala Yeatherai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Bano n'abasimuka mu Kohathi: Kohathi yazaala Amminadabu, Amminadabu yaazaala Kora, Kora yaazaala Assiri." 
1Chronicles6:23 Assiri yaazaala Elukana, Elukana yaazaala Ebiasafu, Ebiasafu yaazaala Assiri," 
1Chronicles6:24 Assiri yaazaala Tahathi, Tahathi yaazaala Urieli, Urieli yaazaala Uzzia, Uzzia yaazaala Shaulo." 
1Chronicles6:25 Bano n'abasimuka mu Elukana: Elukana yazaala Amasai ni Ahimothi. Ahimothi 
1Chronicles6:26 yaazaala Elukana, Elukana yaazaala Zofai, Zofai yaazaala Nahathi, Nahathi" 
1Chronicles6:27 yaazaala Eliabu, Eliabu yaazaala Yerohamu, Yerohamu yaazaala Elukana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samueli yazaala abaana babiri: Yoeli nga n'omwana omuberi, ate Abiya nga n'omuto." 
1Chronicles6:29 Bano n'abasimuka mu Merari: Merari yazaala Mahili, Mahili yaazaala Libuni, Libuni yaazaala Shimei, Shimei yaazaala Uzza, Uzza" 
1Chronicles6:30 yaazaala Shimea, Shimea yaazaala Haggia, Haggia yaazaala Asaia." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ghaligho abantu Daudi be yataagho okukulira eby'okwemba mu kifo eky'okusinzizaamu Musengwa Katonda, ng'Esanduuku y'Endagaano bamaze okugingiza mu kifo ekyo." 
1Chronicles6:32 Baagheerezanga mu ngobo nga bemba mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, okutuusa kyabazinga Solomoni bwe yazimba eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles6:33 Abantu abo abaateebwagho, ni bano n'abaana baibwe: Ku nda ya Kohathi kwaliku Hemani omukulu w'abembi, nga mutabane wa Yoeli, Yoeli mutabane wa Samueli, Samueli" 
1Chronicles6:34 mutabane wa Elukana, Elukana mutabane wa Yerohamu, Yerohamu mutabane wa Elieli, Elieli mutabane wa Toa, Toa" 
1Chronicles6:35 mutabane wa Zufu, Zufu mutabane wa Elukana, Elukana mutabane wa Mahathi, Mahathi mutabane wa Amasai, Amasai" 
1Chronicles6:36 mutabane wa Elukana, Elukana mutabane wa Yoeli, Yoeli mutabane wa Azaria, Azaria mutabane wa Zefania, Zefania" 
1Chronicles6:37 mutabane wa Tahathi, Tahathi mutabane wa Assiri, Assiri mutabane wa Ebiasafu, Ebiasafu mutabane wa Kora, Kora" 
1Chronicles6:38 mutabane wa Izahara, Izahara mutabane wa Kohathi, Kohathi mutabane wa Levi, Levi mutabane wa Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Eyabanga ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha ogwa Hemani era nga muganda we, nga ni Asafu mutabane wa Berekia, Berekia mutabane wa Shimea, Shimea" 
1Chronicles6:40 mutabane wa Mikaeli, Mikaeli mutabane wa Baaseia, Baaseia mutabane wa Malikiya, Malikiya" 
1Chronicles6:41 mutabane wa Ethini, Ethini mutabane wa Zera, Zera mutabane wa Adaia, Adaia" 
1Chronicles6:42 mutabane wa Ethani, Ethani mutabane wa Zimma, Zimma mutabane wa Shimei, Shimei" 
1Chronicles6:43 mutabane wa Yahathi, Yahathi mutabane wa Gereshomu, Gereshomu mutabane wa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ate eyabanga ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda ogwa Hemani ni Ethani, nga wa ku nda ya Merari mutabane wa Kishi, Kishi mutabane wa Abudi, Abudi mutabane wa Malluki, Malluki" 
1Chronicles6:45 mutabane wa Hashabia, Hashabia mutabane wa Amazia, Amazia mutabane wa Hilikia, Hilikia" 
1Chronicles6:46 mutabane wa Amuzi, Amuzi mutabane wa Bani, Bani mutabane wa Shemeri, Shemeri" 
1Chronicles6:47 mutabane wa Mahili, Mahili mutabane wa Mushi, Mushi mutabane wa Merari, Merari mutabane wa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Balevi banaibwe abandi boonaboona, n'abaagheebwa emirimo egindi gyonagyona egyasigalagho mu kifo eky'okusinzizaamu." 
1Chronicles6:49 Aaroni ni baidhukulu be baagheerangayo ebigheebwayo ku alutaari edh'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, era baaniokezanga obubbaani ku alutaari edh'okuniokezaaku obubbaani. Baakolanga emirimo gyonagyona egy'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, era baasabiranga Abaisiraeli batoolebweku ebibi byaibwe, nga Musa omugheereza wa Katonda bwe yalagira." 
1Chronicles6:50 Era bano ni baidhukulu ba Aaroni: Aaroni yazaala Eleazari, Eleazari yaazaala Finehasi, Finehasi yaazaala Abishua, Abishua" 
1Chronicles6:51 yaazaala Bukki, Bukki yaazaala Uzzi, Uzzi yaazaala Zerahia, Zerahia" 
1Chronicles6:52 yaazaala Meraiothi, Meraiothi yaazaala Amaria, Amaria yaazaala Ahitubu, Ahitubu" 
1Chronicles6:53 yaazaala Zadoki, Zadoki yaazaala Ahimaazi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Bino n'ebiketezo bye baagha baidhukulu ba Aaroni ng'akalulu kamaze okukubwa: Ab'oku nda ya Kohathi be baasooka okugha agh'okuba mu kiketezo ekyagheebwa Abalevi. 
1Chronicles6:55 Baabagha ekibuga Heburoni eky'omu Buyudaaya, n'ebiketezo ebikyezungulwire ebirimu eisubi ery'okwayiramu." 
1Chronicles6:56 Aye ebibandha byaku ghalala n'ebyalo byaku, byagheebwa Kalebu mutabane wa Yefunne." 
1Chronicles6:57 Era baagha baidhukulu ba Aaroni ab'oku nda ya Kohathi abo, ebibuga ebyalondebwa okulumukirangamu okwewonia ni bino: Heburoni, ni Libuna, ghalala n'ebyayiro byabyo; Yattiri, ni Eshitemoa, ghalala n'ebyayiro byabyo;" 
1Chronicles6:58 Hileni, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo; Debiri, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:59 Ashani, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo ni Bethishemeshi, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo." 
1Chronicles6:60 Mu kiketezo ekyagheebwa Ababenjamini, Abalevi abo baafunayo ebibuga bino: Geba, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo; Alemethi, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo ni Anathothi, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo. Ebibuga byonabyona aghalala bye baabagha, byali ikumi na bisatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Akalulu bwe kaakubwa kabiri, ab'oku nda ya Kohathi abandi baabagha ebibuga ikumi ebyali mu kiketezo ekyagheebwa ekitundu eky'ekika kya Manasse, nga bajiira ku nda dhaibwe." 
1Chronicles6:62 Ab'oku nda ya Gereshomu baabagha ebibuga ikumi na bisatu nga bajiira ku nda dhaibwe. Ebibuga ebyo bye baabagha baabitoola ku bika bino: ekya Issakari, n'ekya Asheri, n'ekya Nafutali, n'ekya Manasse mu Bashani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Ab'oku nda ya Merari baabagha ebibuga ikumi na bibiri nga bajiira ku nda dhaibwe. Ebibuga ebyo bye baabagha baabitoola ku bika bino: ekya Reubeni, n'ekya Gadi, n'ekya Zebuluni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Mu nsambo eyo, Abaisiraeli baagha Abalevi ebibuga eby'okubaamu, nga babagheeraku n'ebyayiro." 
1Chronicles6:65 Ebibuga ebyo ebyatwirwa amaina gaabyo, baabitoola ku kika kya Yuda, n'ekya Simeoni, n'ekya Benjamini, byona baabigha Abalevi nga babikubira kalulu." 
1Chronicles6:66 Abandi ku b'oku nda ya Kohathi baabagha ebibuga nga babitoola ku kika kya Efuraimu," 
1Chronicles6:67 ebyalondebwa okulumukirangamu okwewonia, era nga ni bino: Shekemu, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo eby'oku nsozi dha Efuraimu; Gezeri, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokimeamu, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo; Bethi Horoni, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:69 Aiyaloni, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo; Gathi Rimmoni, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo." 
1Chronicles6:70 Era baabagha ebibuga ebyatoolebwa ku kiketezo ekyagheebwa ekitundu eky'ekika kya Manasse bino: Aneri, ghalala n'ebiketezo byakyo ebirimu eisubi ery'okwayiramu, ni Bileamu, ghalala n'ebiketezo byakyo ebirimu eisubi ery'okwayiramu." 
1Chronicles6:71 Ab'oku nda ya Gereshomu baabagha ebibuga bino nga babitoola ku kiketezo ekyagheebwa ekitundu eky'ekika kya Manasse: Golani eky'omu Bashani, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo ni Ashitarothi, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo." 
1Chronicles6:72 Ku bibuga eby'ekika kya Issakari baabaghaaku ebibuga bino: Kedeshi, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo; Daberathi, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramothi, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo ni Anemu, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo." 
1Chronicles6:74 Ku bibuga eby'ekika kya Asheri baabaghaaku ebibuga bino: Mashali, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo; Abudoni, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukoki, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo ni Rehobu, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo." 
1Chronicles6:76 Ku bibuga eby'ekika kya Nafutali baabaghaaku ebibuga bino: Kedeshi eky'omu Galilaaya, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo; Hammoni, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo ni Kiriathaimu, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Ab'oku nda ya Merari abaali basigairegho nga bakaali kufuna bibuga, baabagha bino ebyatoolebwa ku kika kya Zebuluni: Rimmono, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo ni Tabori, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo." 
1Chronicles6:78 Ku bibuga eby'ekika kya Reubeni e buvandhuba w'omwiga Yorudani, baabaghaaku ebibuga bino: Bezeri eky'oku museetwe, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo; Yahaza, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemothi, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo ni Mefaathi, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo." 
1Chronicles6:80 Ku bibuga eby'ekika kya Gadi baabaghaaku ebibuga bino: Ramothi eky'omu Gileadi, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo; Mahanaimu, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo;" 
1Chronicles6:81 Heshiboni, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo ni Yazeri, ghalala n'ebyayiro byakyo." 
1Chronicles7:1 Issakari yali ni batabane be bana, nga ni bano: Tola, ni Pua, ni Yashubu, ni Shimuroni." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola yaazaala: Uzzi, ni Refaia, ni Yerieli, ni Yahumai, ni Ibusamu, ni Shemueli, baaba nga n'abakulira enda edh'abaasimuka mu Tola oyo. Era baali balwani ba maani inho mu luse lwaibwe. Mu biseera bya kyabazinga Daudi, abantu abaasimuka mu Tola baali emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ibiri na lukaaga (22,600)." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzzi yaazaala Izarahia. Izarahia oyo yaazaala abaana abalenzi bana, nga ni bano: Mikaeli, ni Obadia, ni Yoeli, ni Issihia, nga n'abakulira enda dha baiseibwe." 
1Chronicles7:4 Baabayiza abakazi kamaala era baazaala abaana kamaala, abaasobola okuvaamu eigye ly'abaisirukale emitwalo esatu n'akakaaga (36,000)." 
1Chronicles7:5 Enkalala edh'obuzaale bw'abantu ab'oku nda edhaasimuka mu kika kya Issakari, dhiraga nga baalimu abalwani ab'amaani emitwalo munaana na kasanvu (87,000)." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjamini yazaala abaana abalenzi basatu, nga ni bano: Bela, ni Bekeri, ni Yediaeli." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela yaazaala abaana abalenzi bataanu: Eziboni, ni Uzzi, ni Uzzieli, ni Yerimothi, ni Iri. Boonaboona baali bakulu ba nda dha baiseibwe era nga balwani ba maani. Enkalala edh'obuzaale bw'abantu ab'oku nda dha baiseibwe, dhiraga nga baalimu abalwani ab'amaani emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ibiri n'asatu na bana (22,034)." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekeri yaazaala: Zemira, ni Yoashi, ni Eliezeri, ni Elioenai, ni Omuri, ni Yeremothi, ni Abiya, ni Anathothi, ni Alemethi. Abo boonaboona baali baana ba Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Era enkalala edh'obuzaale bw'abantu ab'oku nda dha baiseibwe, dhiraga nga baalimu abalwani ab'amaani emitwalo ebiri n'ebikumi bibiri (20,200)." 
1Chronicles7:10 Yediaeli yaazaala Bilihani. Bilihani oyo yaazaala: Yeushi, ni Benjamini, ni Ehudi, ni Kenaana, ni Zethani, ni Tarushishi, ni Ahishahari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Abo boonaboona baali baana ba Yediaeli, nga bakulu ba nda dha baiseibwe. Era mu bantu abaasimuka mu nda edho, mwalimu abalwani ab'amaani omutwalo mulala na kasanvu na bibiri (17,200)." 
1Chronicles7:12 Iri yaazaala Shuppimu ni Huppimu, ate Aheri yaazaala Hushimu." 
1Chronicles7:13 Nafutali yazaala Yahazieli, ni Guni, ni Yezeri, ni Shallumu abo nga baidhukulu ba Biliha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manasse yali n'omukazi Omuaramea, ye yazaala naye abaana bano: Asirieli, ni Makiri eyasimukamu Abagileadi." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri yaafunira Huppimu omukazi era yaafunira ni Shuppimu yeena omukazi, eriina lya mwanhina nga ni Maaka. Ate omwana owokubiri omulenzi owa Makiri oyo nga ni Zelofehadi. Zelofehadi oyo yazaala baana baghala beereere." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka muka Makiri, yaazaala omwana omulenzi yaamutuuma eriina Pereshi. Era yaazaala omulenzi owundi muganda w'oyo, yaamutuuma eriina Shereshi. Pereshi yaazaala Ulamu ni Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulamu yaazaala Bedani. Abo ni baidhukulu ba Gileadi mutabane wa Makiri, ate Makiri oyo nga mutabane wa Manasse." 
1Chronicles7:18 Gileadi yaliku mwanhina nga ni Hammolekethi, eyazaala Ishihodi, ni Abiezeri, ni Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Shemida yaazaala Ahiani, ni Shekemu, ni Likihi, ni Aniamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Efuraimu yazaala Shuthela, Shuthela yaazaala Beredi, Beredi yaazaala Tahathi, Tahathi yaazaala Eleada, Eleada yaazaala Tahathi, Tahathi" 
1Chronicles7:21 yaazaala Zabadi, Zabadi yaazaala Shuthela. Efuraimu era yaliku batabane be abandi babiri, Ezeri ni Eleadi, abantu Abagathi abazaale b'omu nsi eyo be baita nga bajiire okubanhagaku ebyayo byaibwe." 
1Chronicles7:22 Iseibwe Efuraimu yaabalira okumala enaku kamaala, baganda be baidha okumugumya." 
1Chronicles7:23 Agho Efuraimu oyo yaaba ni mukazi we mu buliri, omukazi oyo yaatoola enda, yaazaala omwana mulenzi. Efuraimu yaamutuuma eriina Beria, kuba akabi kaagwira amaka ge." 
1Chronicles7:24 Efuraimu yaliku omwana omughala nga ni Sheera, eyazimba ebibuga Bethi Horoni byombi, eky'Eifo n'eky'Eitale, era yaazimba ni Uzzeni Sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Efuraimu yaliku mutabane we owundi nga ni Refa. Refa oyo yaazaala Reshefu, Reshefu yaazaala Tela, Tela yaazaala Tahani, Tahani yaazaala" 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladani, Ladani yaazaala Ammihudi, Ammihudi yaazaala Elishama, Elishama yaazaala" 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuni, Nuni yaazaala Yoshua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Obutaka bwaibwe bwali Betheli n'ebibuga ebikyezungulwire, bwaja okutuukira irala e Naarani mu buvandhuba, n'e Gezeri mu bugwandhuba n'ebibuga ebikyezungulwire. Era bwatwalizaamu ebibuga Shekemu ni Ayya n'ebibuga ebibyezungulwire." 
1Chronicles7:29 Baidhukulu ba Manasse baali mu Bethi Sheani n'ebibuga ebikyezungulwire, ni mu Taanaki n'ebibuga ebikyezungulwire, ni mu Megiddo n'ebibuga ebikyezungulwire, ni mu Dori n'ebibuga ebikyezungulwire. Ebifo ebyo byonabyona, n'ebyasengamu baidhukulu ba Yosefu mutabane wa Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles7:30 Ashera yazaala abaana abalenzi bano: Imuna, ni Ishiva, ni Ishivi, ni Beria. Era yaazaala n'omwana omughala, nga ni Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beria yaazaala Heberi, ni Malakieli eyali lata wa Birizaithi." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi yazaala abaana abalenzi bano: Yafuleti, ni Shomeri, ni Hothamu. Era yaazaala n'omwana omughala nga ni Shua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Yafuleti yaazaala Pasaki, ni Bimuhali, ni Ashuvati." 
1Chronicles7:34 Muganda we Shomeri yaazaala Rohuga, ni Yehubba, ni Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Ate muganda we Helemu yaazaala Zofa, ni Imuna, ni Sheleshi, ni Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Zofa yaazaala Sua, ni Harineferi, ni Shuali, ni Beri, ni Imura," 
1Chronicles7:37 ni Bezeri, ni Hodi, ni Shamma, ni Shalisha, ni Ithurani, ni Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Yetheri yaazaala Yefunne, ni Pisipa, ni Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ate Ulla yaazaala Ara, ni Hannieli, ni Rizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Abo boonaboona baali baidhukulu ba Ashera, nga bakulu ba nda dha baiseibwe abamanhiibwa einho, era nga balwani ba maani. Enkalala edh'obuzaale bw'abantu ab'oku nda dha baiseibwe dhiraga nga baalimu abalwani ab'amaani emitwalo ebiri na kakaaga (26,000)." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjamini yazaala Bela, nga n'omwana omuberi, yaizaaku Ashibeli, yaizaaku Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 yaizaaku Noha, ate yaizaaku Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela yaazaala Addari, ni Gera, ni Abihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 ni Abishua, ni Naamani, ni Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 ni Gera, ni Sefufani, ni Huramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Bano n'abaasimuka mu Ehudi, abaakuliranga enda dha badhaadha b'abantu b'e Geba abaatwalibwa mu bunhage e Manahathi:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani, ni Ahiya, ni Gera eyabatwala mu bunhage era nga n'eyali lata wa Uzza ni Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaimu bwe yamala okubinga bakazi be Hushimu ni Baara," 
1Chronicles8:9 yaazaala abaana bano e Moabu ni mukazi we Hodeshi: Yobabu, ni Zibia, ni Mesha, ni Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 ni Yeuzi, ni Sakia, ni Mirama. Abo boonaboona baali batabane be abaafuuka abakulu b'enda dha baiseibwe." 
1Chronicles8:11 Mukazi we Hushimu yazaala naye abaana bano: Abitubu ni Elipaali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elipaali yazaala Eberi, ni Mishamu, ni Shemedi. Shemedi oyo n'eyazimba ebibuga, Ono ni Lodi, era n'obubuga obubyezungulwire." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria ni Shema n'abaali abakulu b'enda dha badhaadha b'abantu ab'e Aiyaloni, abaaja e Gathi ni babingayo abatyamye baayo." 
1Chronicles8:14 Mu basimuka mu Beria mwalimu Ahio, ni Shashaki, ni Yeremothi," 
1Chronicles8:15 ni Zebadia, ni Aradi, ni Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 ni Mikaeli, ni Ishipa, ni Yoha." 
1Chronicles8:17 Elipaali yazaala Zebadia, ni Meshullamu, ni Hiziki, ni Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 ni Ishimerai, ni Izilia, ni Yobabu." 
1Chronicles8:19 Shimei yaazaala Yakimu, ni Zikiri, ni Zabadi," 
1Chronicles8:20 ni Elienai, ni Zillethai, ni Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:21 ni Adaia, ni Beraia ni Shimurathi." 
1Chronicles8:22 Shashaki yaazaala Ishipani, ni Eberi, ni Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:23 ni Abudoni, ni Zikari, ni Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 ni Hanania, ni Elamu, ni Anathothiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 ni Ifudeia, ni Penueli." 
1Chronicles8:26 Yehoramu yaazaala Shamasherai, ni Sheharia, ni Athalia," 
1Chronicles8:27 ni Yaareshia, ni Eliya ni Zikiri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Abo n'abaali abakulu b'enda dha baiseibwe, ng'ense dhaibwe bwe dhaajanga nga dhiiraganwaku. Era baabanga mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 Yeiyeli eyatandiikagho ekibuga Gibeoni yabanga yeene eyo e Gibeoni, nga mukazi we ayetebwa Maaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 Yaazaala abaana bano: Abudoni nga n'omuberi, yaizaaku Zura, ni Kishi, ni Baali, ni Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 ni Gedori, ni Ahio, ni Zekeri," 
1Chronicles8:32 ni Mikilothi. Mikilothi oyo n'eyali lata wa Shimea. Abo boona baabanga mu Yerusalemu ghalala ni baganda baibwe, okumpi n'ab'ekika kyaibwe abandi." 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri yazaala Kishi, Kishi yaazaala Saulo, Saulo yaazaala Yonathani, ni Malakishua, ni Abinadabu, ni Eshibaali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yonathani yaazaala Meribbaali, Meribbaali yaazaala Mika." 
1Chronicles8:35 Mika yaazaala Pithoni, ni Meleki, ni Tarea, ni Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi yaazaala Yehoadda, Yehoadda yaazaala Alemethi, ni Azimavethi, ni Zimuri. Zimuri yaazaala Moza," 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza yazaala Binea, Binea yaazaala Rafa, Rafa yaazaala Eleasa, Eleasa yaazaala Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeli yaazaala abaana abalenzi mukaaga, nga ni bano: Azarikamu, ni Bokeru, ni Ishimaeli, ni Shearia, ni Obadia, ni Hanani. Abo boonaboona baali batabane ba Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Esheki muganda wa Azeli oyo yaazaala abaana bano: Ulamu nga n'omuberi, yaizaaku Yeushi, ate yaizaaku Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles8:40 Batabane ba Ulamu baali balwani ba maani, abakugu mu kulasa obusaale. Baaliku abaana n'abaidhukulu kamaala, nga boonaboona aghalala baghera kikumi n'ataanu. Abo boonaboona n'abaali mu kika kya Benjamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Abaisiraeli boonaboona baaghandiikibwa mu nkalala edh'obuzaale bwaibwe. Enkalala edho dhaaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo kya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli. Agho abantu b'omu kika kya Yuda baali nga bamaze okutwalibwa e Babilonia mu bunhage, ng'ekibonerezo olw'ebibi byaibwe." 
1Chronicles9:2 Kale abaasooka okwira mu bibandha byaibwe ni mu bibuga byaibwe, baali abandi ku Baisiraeli ababuliidho, ni bakabona, n'Abalevi, abaagheerezanga mu isinzizo." 
1Chronicles9:3 Abandi ku b'omu kika kya Yuda, n'ekya Benjamini, n'ekya Efuraimu, n'ekya Manasse, baaja baaba mu Yerusalemu. Era abantu abo, ni bano:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Mu baasimuka mu Perezi mutabane wa Yuda, mwalimu Uthai mutabane wa Ammihudi, era mwidhukulu wa Omuri, mutabane wa Imuri, mutabane wa Bani." 
1Chronicles9:5 Mu baasimuka mu Shilo nga yeena mutabane wa Yuda, mwalimu Asaia eyali omwana omuberi, ni batabane be." 
1Chronicles9:6 Mu baasimuka mu Zera era nga yeena mutabane wa Yuda, mwalimu Yeueli ni baganda be. Ab'omu kika kya Yuda abo boonaboona aghalala, baali abantu lukaaga na kyenda (690)." 
1Chronicles9:7 Mu baasimuka mu kika kya Benjamini mwalimu bano: Sallu mutabane wa Meshullamu, era mwidhukulu wa Hodavia eyali mutabane wa Hassenua" 
1Chronicles9:8 ni Ibuneia mutabane wa Yerohamu ni Ela mutabane wa Uzzi era mwidhukulu wa Mikiri ni Meshullamu mutabane wa Shefatia, era mwidhukulu wa Reweli eyali mutabane wa Ibuniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 Ab'omu kika kya Benjamini abo boonaboona aghalala, ng'ense dhaibwe bwe dhaaja nga dhiiraganwaku, baali lwenda n'ataanu na mukaaga (956). Abo boonaboona baali bakulu ba nda dha baiseibwe." 
1Chronicles9:10 Bano ni bakabona abaabanga mu Yerusalemu: Yedaia, ni Yehoaribu, ni Yakini," 
1Chronicles9:11 ni Azaria mutabane wa Hilikia era mwidhukulu wa bano: Meshullamu, ni Zadoki, ni Meraiothi, ni Ahitubu eyalabiriranga eisinzizo." 
1Chronicles9:12 Bakabona abandi baali ni bano: Adaia mutabane wa Yerohamu era mwidhukulu wa bano: Pashuhuri, Malikiya, Maasai, Adieli, Yahuzera, Meshullamu, Meshillemithi, ni Immeri." 
1Chronicles9:13 Bakabona abo baali bakulu ba nda dha baiseibwe, era boonaboona aghalala ni baganda baibwe, baali lukumi na lusanvu na nkaaga (1,760). Baali bakugu inho mu kukola emirimo gyonagyona egy'omu isinzizo." 
1Chronicles9:14 Bano n'Abalevi abaabanga mu Yerusalemu: Shemaia mutabane wa Hassihubu, era mwidhukulu wa Azirikamu ni Hashabia abaasimuka mu Merari." 
1Chronicles9:15 Abalevi abandi baali ni bano: Bakubakkari, Hereshi, Galali, ni Mattania mutabane wa Mika, nga mwidhukulu wa Zikiri, era nga mwidhukulu wa Asafu." 
1Chronicles9:16 Era ghaabaagho n'Abalevi abandi bano: Obadia mutabane wa Shemaia era mwidhukulu wa Galali ni Yeduthuni ni Berekia mutabane wa Asa era mwidhukulu wa Elukana eyabanga mu byalo by'Abanetofa. 
1Chronicles9:17 Abakuumi b'eisinzizo baali bano: Shallumu, ni Akkubu, ni Talumoni, ni Ahimani, ni baganda baibwe. Shallumu n'eyali omukulu waibwe." 
1Chronicles9:18 Abo n'abaakuumanga omulyango ogw'e buvandhuba ogwetebwa Omulyango gwa Kyabazinga. Era n'abaakuumanga emiryango mu kifo Abalevi ghe baasimbanga weema dhaibwe. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shallumu mutabane wa Kore, era mwidhukulu wa Abiasafu eyali mutabane wa Kora, ghalala n'ab'oku nda ye abaasimuka mu dhaadha we Kora, n'abaakolanga ogw'okukuuma emiryango gy'Eweema nga badhaadha baibwe bwe baakuumanga emiryango gy'ekifo ghe baasimbanga Weema ya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finehasi mutabane wa Eleazari n'eyakuliranga abakuumi abo mu biseera eby'eira, Musengwa Katonda ng'aba ghalala naye." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekaria mutabane wa Meshelemia n'eyali omukuumi w'omulyango ogwingira mu Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. 
1Chronicles9:22 Abo boonaboona abaalondebwa okuba abakuumi b'emiryango, baali ebikumi bibiri na ikumi na babiri (212). Baabaghandiika mu nkalala edh'obuzaale bwaibwe, nga bajiira ku byalo byaibwe bye baabangamu. Kyabazinga Daudi n'omulanzi Samueli, n'abaataagho abantu abo okukolanga mu butongole." 
1Chronicles9:23 Kale abantu abo ghalala n'abaana, ni baidhukulu baibwe, baajanga nga bakuuma emiryango gy'eisinzizo." 
1Chronicles9:24 Abakuumi abo baabanga ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'eisinzizo: e buvandhuba, e bugwandhuba, ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ni ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
1Chronicles9:25 Aboluganda lwaibwe abaabanga mu byalo, baidhanga baababeeraku mu ngobo okukuuma emiryango, okumala enaku musanvu musanvu." 
1Chronicles9:26 Ku bakuumi ab'emiryango abo kwaliku abaabakuliranga bana nga Balevi, abaalabiriranga ebisenge n'amaterekero eby'oku isinzizo." 
1Chronicles9:27 Baasulanga agho nga beezungulwire eisinzizo, kuba baabagemya omulimo ogw'okulikuuma n'ogw'okuliigulangagho buli nkyo." 
1Chronicles9:28 Abandi ku Balevi baabagemya ogw'okulabiriranga ebintu ebikozesebwa mu kusinza kuba baabibalanga nga babitwala okubikozesa, era baabibalanga nga babiizaayo okubitereka." 
1Chronicles9:29 Abandi baabagemya ogw'okulabiriranga ebintu ebindi ebikozesebwa, n'okulabiriranga obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, n'obubbaani, n'obuwoowo." 
1Chronicles9:30 Aye abandi ku bakabona n'abaatabulanga obuwoowo. 
1Chronicles9:31 Owundi ku Balevi abo ye baayetanga Mattithia, nga n'omwana omuberi owa Shallumu eyasimuka mu Kora, n'eyakolanga ogw'okufumba emigaati emitono." 
1Chronicles9:32 Abandi ku baganda baibwe ab'oku nda ya Kohathi, n'abaategekanga emigaati egigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda, gye baatanga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda buli Sabbato." 
1Chronicles9:33 Abandi ku Balevi baali bembi, era nga n'abakulira enda dha baiseibwe. Baasulanga mu bisenge by'oku isinzizo, era tibaabaghanga mulimo gundi gwonagwona, kuba ogwaibwe ogw'okwemba baagukolanga omusana n'obwire." 
1Chronicles9:34 Abantu abo boonaboona baali bakulu ba nda dha baiseibwe, ng'ense dhaibwe bwe dhairaganwangaku. Baali bakulembeze era nga baba mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeiyeli eyatandiikagho ekibuga Gibeoni yabanga yeene eyo e Gibeoni, nga mukazi we ayetebwa Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Yaazaala abaana bano: Abudoni nga n'omuberi, yaizaaku Zura, ni Kishi, ni Baali, ni Neri, ni Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 ni Gedori, ni Ahio, ni Zekaria, ni Mikilothi." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikilothi oyo n'eyali lata wa Shimea. Abo boona baabanga mu Yerusalemu ghalala ni baganda baibwe, okumpi n'ab'ekika kyaibwe abandi." 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri yazaala Kishi, Kishi yaazaala Saulo, Saulo yaazaala Yonathani, ni Malakishua, ni Abinadabu, ni Eshibaali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Yonathani yaazaala Meribbaali, Meribbaali yaazaala Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Mika yaazaala Pithoni, ni Meleki, ni Taharea, ni Ahazi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi yaazaala Yara, Yara yaazaala Alemethi, ni Azimavethi, ni Zimuri. Zimuri yaazaala Moza," 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza yazaala Binea, Binea yaazaala Rafaia, Rafaia yaazaala Eleasa, Eleasa yaazaala Azeli." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeli yaazaala abaana abalenzi mukaaga, era amaina gaibwe ni gano: Azarikamu, ni Bokeru, ni Ishimaeli, ni Shearia, ni Obadia, ni Hanani. Abo n'abaali batabane ba Azeli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Agho Abafilisiti baalwanisa Abaisiraeli. Abaisiraeli abo baalumuka, era kamaala baitirwa ku lusozi Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Abafilisiti baabingirira Saulo ni batabane be baabatuukaku, baita Yonathani, ni Abinadabu, ni Malakishua, batabane ba Saulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Olutalo lwanhigiriza inho Saulo, ab'obulaso baamwagaana baamulasa, baamutaaku ebibwa ebinene einho." 
1Chronicles10:4 Agho Saulo yaakoba eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa ati: “Sowolayo empiima yo onfumite, abo abatali bakekete balobe kwidha kunfumita na kuneesanhukizaaku.” Aye eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa yaaloba kumufumita olw'okutya einho. Kale Saulo mwene yaasowolayo empiima eyiye, yaagyetungaku." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ole eyagemeranga Saulo eby'okulwanisa bwe yabona nga Saulo afiire, yeena yeetunga ku mpiima eyiye, yaafiira ghalala naye." 
1Chronicles10:6 Kale atyo Saulo yaafa, ni batabane bonsatule, n'ole eyamugemeranga eby'okulwanisa, era n'ab'endhu ya Saulo oyo boonaboona. Abo boonaboona baafiira ghalala." 
1Chronicles10:7 Abaisiraeli abaali mu kiiko bwe baabona ng'eigye lya Isiraeli lirumwike era nga Saulo ni batabane be bafiire, baalekulira agho ebibuga byaibwe, baalumuka. Abafilisiti baidha baabibaamu." 
1Chronicles10:8 Enkyo ku lunaku olwairirira ng'olutalo luwoire, Abafilisiti bwe baidha ku mirambo okugitoolamu ebivaalo, baayagaana nga Saulo ni batabane be abasatu nga baagwire ku lusozi Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Saulo baamuvaalulula eby'okulwanisa bye era baamutemaku omutwe baagutwala. Agho baatuma abakwenda woonawoona mu nsi y'Abafilisiti okutuusaayo amawulire ago, mu masabo ag'ebisinzibwa byaibwe ebitali Katonda era ni mu bantu boonaboona." 
1Chronicles10:10 Baata eby'okulwanisa bya Saulo mu isabo ly'emisambwa gyaibwe, era baakomerera omutwe mu isabo ly'omusambwa Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Abatyamye boonaboona ab'omu kibuga Yabeshi e Gileadi bwe baawulira ekyo Abafilisiti kye baakola Saulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 abasaadha abaziramu ntete boonaboona baasituka, baaja baatoolayo omulambo gwa Saulo n'emirambo gya batabane be, baagireeta e Yabeshi. Baaziika amagumba gaibwe eyo e Yabeshi ghansi gh'omuti omukologho, era baasiiba okumala enaku musanvu." 
1Chronicles10:13 Kale Saulo yaafa atyo, olw'obutaba mwesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda. Yaloba okukola ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yamulagira, yaira mu kweraguza ku basamize," 
1Chronicles10:14 mu kifo eky'okwebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda. Musengwa Katonda oyo kyeyava n'amwita, obwakyabazinga yaabugha Daudi mutabane wa Yesse." 
1Chronicles11:1 Agho Abaisiraeli boonaboona beesoloza, baidha ye Daudi e Heburoni, baamukoba bati: “Bona eno, ife tuli baluganda era ba musaayi mulala n'iwe." 
1Chronicles11:2 Mu biseera ebyabita nga Saulo n'akaali kyabazinga waife, niiwe owakulemberangamu eigye lya Isiraeli okuja mu ntalo. Agho Musengwa Katonda wo yaakukoba ati, ‘Oidha kukulemberanga abantu bange Abaisiraeli, obenga mufuzi waibwe.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Kale abakulembeze mu Isiraeli baidha ye kyabazinga Daudi e Heburoni. Daudi oyo yaakola nabo endagaano mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, baamusiiga omuzigo okumufuula kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yakoba ng'abita mu Samueli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Agho Daudi n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona baaja, baalumba Yerusalemu. Mu biseera ebyo baali bakyeta Yebusi, ng'Abayebusi abatyamye b'omu nsi eyo n'abakibaamu." 
1Chronicles11:5 Abayebusi abo baakoba Daudi bati: “Toidha kungira ghano.” Aye ate Daudi yaagema ekifo kyaibwe eky'okwewogomamu eky'e Sioni, ekyo kyatuuka okwetebwa “Ekibuga kya Daudi”." 
1Chronicles11:6 Daudi yaakoba abasaadha be ati: “Omuntu yeenayeena anaasooka okwitayo Omuyebusi, n'aidha okuba omukulu era omuduumizi w'eigye.” Agho Yoabu, nga inhina ni Zeruia, yaakulembera okulumba okwasooka, era yaafuuka omukulu w'eigye." 
1Chronicles11:7 Agho Daudi yaaja yaaba mu kifo ekyo eky'okwewogomamu, kyebaava ni bakituuma eriina “Ekibuga kya Daudi”." 
1Chronicles11:8 Yaazimba ku kifo ekyo ekibuga okukyezunguluza, ng'aviira mu kifo kye baidhuzaamu eitaka olw'okwekuuma abazigu, ekyayetebwanga Millo, yaaja ng'aira munda. Ate Yoabu yaazimba buyaaka ebitundu ebindi eby'ekibuga ekyo." 
1Chronicles11:9 Daudi oyo yaajanga nga yeeyongera okuba omukologho, kuba Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yali ali naye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Bano n'abaali abalwani ab'amaani abakologho Daudi be yali nabo. Abo nga bali ghalala n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona baamuleetera okufuuka kyabazinga nga Musengwa Katonda bweyasuubiza eighanga Isiraeli, era baaleetera obwakyabazinga bwe okukakata." 
1Chronicles11:11 Amaina ag'abalwani ab'amaani abo Daudi be yali nabo ni gano: Asooka nga ni Yashobeamu Omuhakimoni eyali nga n'akulira abasatu abo ab'amaani. Ono ghaligho omukuzi gwe yalwanisa eifumo lye n'abalwani ebikumi ebisatu, yaabaita boonaboona." 
1Chronicles11:12 Owokubiri ku basatu abo ab'amaani nga ni Eleazari mutabane wa Dodo Omuahohi. 
1Chronicles11:13 Oyo n'eyali ni Daudi e Pasi Dammimu, Abafilisiti ye baali beesololeiza okubalwanisa mu lutalo, mu musiri ogwalimu sayiri, Abaisiraeli abandi ni bamala balumuka." 
1Chronicles11:14 Aye mwene ng'ali ghalala n'abalwani be, baayemerera ghagati mu musiri baalwanisa Abafilisiti era baabaita. Musengwa Katonda yaabagha obughanguzi obw'amaani." 
1Chronicles11:15 Lwali lulala, abasatu ku balwani amakumi asatu abaakuliranga banaibwe mu igye, baaja ku lubaale Daudi ye yali kumpi n'empuku ey'e Adullamu. Ekikunsu eky'Abafilisiti kyali kisimbye weema dhaakyo mu kiiko eky'e Refa." 
1Chronicles11:16 Mu kiseera ekyo Daudi yali mu kifo eky'okwewogomamu, ate ekikunsu eky'Abafilisiti nga kisimbye enkambi yaakyo e Bethelehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Omwoyo gwadhuuba Daudi oyo, yaakoba ati: “Kale nguli ghaligho omuntu andeeteraku amaadhi ag'okunhwa agava mu nsulo eri ku mulyango ogw'ekibuga e Bethelehemu!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Agho abalwani bale abasatu ab'amaani baaja baaghaguza mu kifo Abafilisiti ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, baasena amaadhi mu nsulo eyo, baagaleetera Daudi. Aye yaaloba kuganhwaku naire, yaagafukira Musengwa Katonda" 
1Chronicles11:19 ng'akoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, tikiribaagho nze okukola ekintu ng'oti n'ekyo. Olwo mba ng'ali kunhwa omusaayi ogw'abasaadha bano abaghaireyo obulamu bwaibwe ni baja okuganona!” Kale yaaloba kuganhwa. Ebyo n'ebikolwa abalwani abo abasatu ab'amaani bye baakola nga baziramu ntete naire." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai muganda wa Yoabu, n'eyali akulira abalwani amakumi asatu ab'amaani. Abishai oyo yaalwanisa abantu ebikumi bisatu n'eifumo lye, yaabaita, yeekolera eriina mu balwani amakumi asatu abo." 
1Chronicles11:21 Oyo n'eyasinga okumanhikana einho mu abo amakumi asatu, era yaafuuka muduumizi waibwe. Aye ti yatuuka ku idaala lya bale abasatu." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaia ow'e Kabuzeeli era mutabane wa Yehoiada, yali mulwani wa ntalo aziramu ntete. Yakola eby'amaani kamaala, nga n'omuli n'okwita abalwani ab'amaani ababiri Abamoabu. Olundi yaita empologoma ng'eri mu kiina, mu biseera eby'omugozi nga gugwire." 
1Chronicles11:23 Era yaita Omumisiri nga wa kighaga eyali abisa mu mita eibiri mu buleeyi, ate ng'agemye eifumo mu ngalo eririku olunhago olwaga n'ekiti kye balukisa engoye. Benaia oyo yaamulumba nga mwene ali na mwigo bwigo, yaamuswankulaku eifumo mu ngalo, yaamwitisa lyene eryo." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ebyo n'eby'amaani Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada bye yakola, ni yeekolera eriina mu abo amakumi asatu ab'amaani." 
1Chronicles11:25 Benaia oyo yamanhikana inho mu abo amakumi asatu, aye tiyatuuka ku idaala lya bale abasatu. Daudi yaamutaagho okukuliranga abaisirukale be abaamukuumanga." 
1Chronicles11:26 Amaina ag'abalwani abandi ab'amaani ni gano: Asaheli muganda wa Yoabu, Elihanani mutabane wa Dodo ow'e Bethelehemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 Shammothi ow'e Harodi, Helezi ow'e Peloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira mutabane wa Ikkeshi ow'e Tekoa, Abiezeri ow'e Anathothi," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibbekai ow'e Husha, Ilai Omuahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai ow'e Netofa, Heledi mutabane wa Baana ow'e Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Ithai mutabane wa Ribai ow'e Gibea eky'Ababenjamini, Benaia ow'e Pirathoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai ow'oku bwiga obw'e Gaashi, Abieli ow'e Araba," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azimavethi ow'e Baharumu, Eliahaba ow'e Shaaluboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 Batabane ba Hashemu ow'e Gizomu, Yonathani mutabane wa Shagee ow'e Harari," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiamu mutabane wa Sakari Omuharari, Elifali mutabane wa Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi ow'e Mekera, Ahiya ow'e Peloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Heziro ow'e Karumeli, Naarai mutabane wa Ezibai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoeli muganda wa Nathani, Mibuhari mutabane wa Hagari," 
1Chronicles11:39 Zeleka Omuammoni, Naharai ow'e Beerothi eyagemeranga Yoabu mutabane wa Zeruia eby'okulwanisa bye." 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira Omuithiri, Garebu Omuithiri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria Omuhitti, Zabadi mutabane wa Ahalai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina mutabane wa Shiza Omureubeni era omukulembeze mu kika kya Reubeni, n'ekikunsu kye eky'abalwani amakumi asatu." 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mutabane wa Maaka, Yoshafati ow'e Mithani," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uzzia ow'e Ashitera, Shama ni Yeiyeli batabane ba Hothamu ow'e Aroeri," 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediaeli ni Yoha batabane ba Shimuri ow'e Tizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Elieli ow'e Mahava, Yeribai ni Yoshavia batabane ba Elinaamu, Ithima ow'e Moabu," 
1Chronicles11:47 Elieli, ni Obedi, ni Yaasieli ow'e Zoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Daudi bweyali e Zikulaga ye yalumukira okuwona kyabazinga Saulo mutabane wa Kishi, bano n'abandi ku balwani ab'amaani abaaja y'ali okumweyimbaku okulwana entalo." 
1Chronicles12:2 Baali ba mu kika kya Benjamini nga Saulo bweyali, era nga baghanga okukozesa omukono gwonagwona, ka gube omusaadha oba omugooda, okulasa obusaale n'okuwoloba amabaale mu nsuumulo." 
1Chronicles12:3 Ahiezeri n'eyali akulira abalwani abo ate Yoashi yaamwiraku, abo bombi nga batabane ba Shema ow'e Gibea. Amaina ag'abalwani abo ni gano: Yezieli ni Peleti, batabane ba Azimafethi, Beraka, ni Yehu ow'e Anathothi," 
1Chronicles12:4 Ishimaia ow'e Gibeoni, omulwani ow'amaani mu bale amakumi asatu era omulala ku bakulembeze baibwe. Yeremia, ni Yahazieli, ni Yohanani, ni Yozabadi ow'e Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai, ni Yerimothi, ni Shemaria, ni Shefatia ow'e Harufu." 
1Chronicles12:6 Elukana, ni Issihia, ni Azareli, ni Yoezeri, ni Yashobeamu ow'oku nda ya Kora." 
1Chronicles12:7 Yoela ni Zebadia, batabane ba Yerohamu ow'e Gedori." 
1Chronicles12:8 Mu kika kya Gadi mwavaamu abalwani ab'amaani, abaaja okweyimba ku Daudi mu kifo ye yeewogoma mu irungu. Baali n'obumanhirivu mu kulwana entalo, nga bakozesa engabo n'amafumo, nga bamoga bukambwe ng'oti mpologoma era nga basobola okuligita embiro ng'oti n'empuuli edh'oku nsozi." 
1Chronicles12:9 Amaina ag'abalwani abo ni gano nga bwe bairaganwangaku mu mase gaibwe: Ezeri nga n'abakulira, kwairaku Obadia, kwairaku Eliabu," 
1Chronicles12:10 kwairaku Mishimannu, kwairaku Yeremia," 
1Chronicles12:11 kwairaku Attai, kwairaku Elieli," 
1Chronicles12:12 kwairaku Yohanani, kwairaku Elizabadi," 
1Chronicles12:13 kwairaku Yeremia, kwairaku Makubannai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Abandi ku b'omu kika kya Gadi abo baali bakulu mu igye, ab'eidaala erya ghansi nga bakulira ebikunsu bya bantu kikumi kikumi, ate ab'eidaala erya ghaigulu baakulira ebikunsu bya bantu lukumi lukumi." 
1Chronicles12:15 Abo n'abaasomoka omwiga Yorudani mu mwezi ogusooka mu mwaka, ekiseera omwiga ogwo kye gwidhuliramu ni gubanda, amaadhi gaagwo ni gataalaalira ku mbali kwagwo kwonakwona. Bwe baasomoka, baabinga abatyamye boonaboona ab'omu biiko, baabasansaaniza e buvandhuba n'ebugwandhuba w'omwiga." 
1Chronicles12:16 Mu kika kya Benjamini n'ekya Yuda mwavaamu abantu baaja okweyimba ku Daudi mu kifo ye yeewogoma. 
1Chronicles12:17 Daudi yaavaayo okubabona, yaabakoba ati: “Oba nga mwidhie okumbeera nga bakagwa bange, mbasangaaliire. Aye oba nga mwidhie kundyamu lukwe mumpeeyo y'abazigu bange, waire nga ghazira kabi ke mbakoze, Katonda wa badhaadha baife agwananga yaakibona yaababonereza.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwaidha ku Amasai omukulu wa bale amakumi asatu, yaakoba ati: “Wo Daudi, ife tuli babo wo iwe omwana wa Yesse, ife tuli ku luuyi lwo! Emiraala gibenga n'iwe, era gibenga n'abo abakubeera, kuba Katonda wo n'akubeera.” Agho Daudi yaabasangaaza, yaabafuula bakulu mu igye lye." 
1Chronicles12:19 Abandi ku balwani ab'omu kika kya Manasse baira ku luuyi lwa Daudi, bweyali ng'ali kujiira ghalala n'Abafilisiti mu lutalo okulwanisa Saulo. Aye ate Daudi tiyamala n'abeera Bafilisiti abo, kuba abakungu baibwe baamala beeteesaamu, baasalagho okumulobera baamukoba aireyo, nga bakoba: “Tomanha bw'atughaayo eri musengwa we Saulo, ni batutemaku mitwe.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Daudi bweyali ng'airayo e Zikulaga, bano n'ab'omu kika kya Manasse abaira ku luuyi lwe: Adana, Yozabadi, Yediaeli, Mikaeli, Yozabadi, Elihu, ni Zillethai. Abo baalinga baduumizi ba bikunsu bya baisirukale lukumi lukumi mu igye ly'Abamanasse." 
1Chronicles12:21 Kale baabeeranga Daudi okulwanisa ebikunsu eby'abanhazi ebyamulumbanga, kuba boonaboona baali balwani ba maani abaziramu ntete." 
1Chronicles12:22 Kumpi nga buli lunaku abantu abayaaka baidha okwingira eigye lya Daudi, lyafuuka eikologho einho ng'oti n'eigye lya Musengwa Katonda mwene." 
1Chronicles12:23 Gino n'emighendo gy'abalwani abaidha nga bagemye eby'okulwanisa eri Daudi mu Heburoni okumuyambaku okufuuka kyabazinga mu kifo kya Saulo, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyasuubiza:" 
1Chronicles12:24 Ab'omu kika kya Yuda baali kakaaga na lunaana (6,800), nga bagemye engabo n'amafumo, nga beetegeike okulwana olutalo." 
1Chronicles12:25 Ab'omu kika kya Simeoni baali kasanvu na kikumi (7,100), nga balwani ba maani abaziramu ntete." 
1Chronicles12:26 Ab'omu kika kya Levi baali enkumi ina na lukaaga (4,600)." 
1Chronicles12:27 Abaidha nga bakulembeirwa Yehoiada mwidhukulu wa Aaroni, baali enkumi isatu na lusanvu (3,700)." 
1Chronicles12:28 Abaidha ni Zadoki omwisuka omulwani ow'amaani aziramu ntete, nga bava mu b'endhu ya lata we, baali abakungu amakumi abiri na babiri (22)." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ab'omu kika kya Benjamini, baganda ba Saulo, baali enkumi isatu (3,000) mu kiseera ekyo abasinga bungi ku b'omu kika ekyo baali nga bakaagumiire ku b'endhu ya Saulo." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ab'omu kika kya Efuraimu baali emitwalo ebiri na lunaana (20,800), nga balwani ba maani abaziramu ntete, era abamanhifu einho ku nda dha baiseibwe." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ab'omu kitundu ku kika kya Manasse baali omutwalo mulala na kanaana (18,000), nga n'abaalondebwa mu butongole okuja okufuula Daudi kyabazinga." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ab'omu kika kya Issakari baali abakulembeze ebikumi bibiri (200) nga bali ghalala ni baganda baibwe abagondera ebiragiro byaibwe boonaboona. Abakulembeze abo baali bantu abaategeera ng'ebiseera ebyo bwe byali, ni bamanha Isiraeli ky'egwaniire okukola." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ab'omu kika kya Zebuluni baali emitwalo etaanu (50,000), nga beesigwa era nga bamalirivu, abaatendekebwa okukozesa buli kya kulwanisa kyonakyona." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ab'omu kika kya Nafutali baali abaduumizi lukumi (1,000), nga bali ghalala n'abalwani baibwe emitwalo esatu na kasanvu (37,000) nga bagemye engabo n'amafumo." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ab'omu kika kya Dani baali abalwani emitwalo ebiri na kanaana na lukaaga (28,600), nga batendekeibwa bukalamu okulwana olutalo." 
1Chronicles12:36 Ab'omu kika kya Asheri baali emitwalo ena (40,000), nga beetegefu mu kulwana entalo." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ab'omu bika eby'e buvandhuba wa Yorudani: ekya Reubeni, n'ekya Gadi, n'ekitundu ku kika kya Manasse, baali emitwalo ikumi n'ebiri (120,000), nga bali n'eby'okulwanisa ebya buli nsambo." 
1Chronicles12:38 Abaisirukale abo boonaboona abaali batendekeibwa mu kulwana, baaja e Heburoni nga bamalirivu okufuula Daudi kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yoonayoona. Abaisiraeli abandi boona baali bamalirivu mu nsambo n'endala eyo, okufuula Daudi kyabazinga." 
1Chronicles12:39 Baamalayo enaku isatu nga bali eyo ni Daudi, nga bali kulya era nga bali kunhwa ebyo ab'eighanga lyaibwe bye baabategekera." 
1Chronicles12:40 Abantu baaviira irala ghala mu bika: ekya Issakari, n'ekya Zebuluni, n'ekya Nafutali, baaleetera emere ku ndogoyi, ni ku ngamiya, ni ku nhumbu ni ku nte, nga n'omuli: obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, ebitole eby'ebibala ebikalu eby'emitiini, obufaaganda obw'emizabbibu emikalu, omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva. Baaleeta n'ente, n'entaama kamaala edh'okwita okulya, kuba mu Isiraeli mwonamwona mwalimu eisanhu." 
1Chronicles13:1 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yeebuuza ku bakulu boonaboona abaduumira ebikunsu by'abalwani olukumi olukumi, n'abaduumira ebikunsu by'abalwani ekikumi ekikumi, n'abakulembeze abandi boonaboona." 
1Chronicles13:2 Yaakoba Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaali beesoloiza ati: “Bwe muba nga mukisiima era ni kiba nti ni Musengwa Katonda waife ekyo ky'ayenda, ka tutume abakwenda baje beete baganda baife abandi boonaboona mu biketezo bya Isiraeli byonabyona beete ni bakabona ghalala n'Abalevi be bali nabo mu bibuga byaibwe ebiriku ebyayiro, babakobe baidhe batweyimbeku." 
1Chronicles13:3 Olwo tuje twize Esanduuku y'Endagaano eya Katonda waife, ye twali tusuuliriire nga titukaagifaaku mu biseera Saulo bye yafugiramu.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Boonaboona abaali beesoloiza baakisiima, kuba baakibona nga kituufu." 
1Chronicles13:5 Agho Daudi yaasoloza Abaisiraeli boonaboona, okuva e Shihori ku nsalosalo ni Misiri okutuuka aghaingirirwa e Hamathi, baje batooleyo Esanduuku y'Endagaano eya Katonda e Kiriathi Yearimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Kale Daudi yaasituka n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, baaja e Baala, ekyo nga ni Kiriathi Yearimu eky'omu kiketezo kya Yuda, baaja okutoolayo Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Katonda eyetebwa eriina lya Musengwa Katonda, oyo atyama ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga ekiri ku bitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa bikerubi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Baata Esanduuku eyo ku kigaali ekiyaaka, Uzza ni Ahio batabane ba Abinadabu baakivuga nga bakitoola mu ndhu ya Abinadabu oyo." 
1Chronicles13:8 Daudi n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona baajanga nga bakina n'amaani gaibwe goonagoona mu maiso ga Katonda. Baayemba nga bwe bakuba endingidi, n'entongooli, n'obugoma, n'ensaasi, n'ebide, nga bwe bafuuwa n'amagwala." 
1Chronicles13:9 Bwe baatuuka mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano ekya Kidoni, ente dhaaba oti dhenda kugwa. Kale, Uzza yaagolola omukono, yaagema n'engalo dhe ku Sanduuku ey'endagaano erobe kugwa." 
1Chronicles13:10 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaamutumbukizaaku obusungu bwe ng'oti muliro, yaamwitiragho olw'okwetulinkiriza n'agema ku Sanduuku eyo. Uzza oyo yaafiira agho mu maiso ga Katonda." 
1Chronicles13:11 Daudi yaasungughala olwa Musengwa Katonda okubonereza Uzza atyo. Ekifo ekyo baakituuma eriina Perezi Uzza okutuusa ni ye buli eno. 
1Chronicles13:12 Ku lunaku olwo Daudi yaatya inho Musengwa Katonda, yaakoba ati: “Nnaasobola ntya okutwala Sanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda eno ey'Endagaano ewange?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Kale Daudi yaaloba kuganha kutwala Sanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda mu kibuga kye ekyetebwa ekya Daudi. Aye baagonhoka, baagitwala mu ndhu ya Obedi Edomu ow'e Gathi." 
1Chronicles13:14 Esanduuku ya Katonda eyo yaamala emyezi esatu n'ab'omu ndhu ya Obedi Edomu, era Musengwa Katonda yaagha enkabi Obedi Edomu oyo, n'ab'omu ndhu ye, n'ebintu bye yali nabyo byonabyona." 
1Chronicles14:1 Agho kyabazinga Hiramu ow'e Tiro yaagheereza Daudi abakwenda, n'emiti emivule, n'ababaadhi, n'abazimbisa amabaale, bazimbire Daudi ekisaagaati eky'obwakyabazinga." 
1Chronicles14:2 Agho Daudi yaakitegeera nga bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda amukakaisa ku bwa kyabazinga bwa Isiraeli, era ng'aleeteire obwakyabazinga obwo okugheebwa ekitiisa ku lw'abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Daudi ng'ali eyo mu Yerusalemu, yeeyongera okubayiza abakazi, yaazaala abaana abandi abalenzi n'abaghala." 
1Chronicles14:4 Gano n'amaina ag'abaana be yazaala ng'ali mu Yerusalemu: Shammua, Shobabu, Nathani, Solomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibuhari, Elishua, Elupeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefegi, Yafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishama, Beeliada, ni Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Abafilisiti bwe baawulira nga Daudi asiigiibwa omuzigo okumufuula kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yoonayoona, beesoloza boonaboona baaja okumuyiiga. Daudi bwe yakiwulira, yaidha okubalwanisa." 
1Chronicles14:9 Agho Abafilisiti baatuuka mu kiiko ky'e Refa, baakinhagulula." 
1Chronicles14:10 Daudi yeebuuza ku Katonda ati: “Nje nwane n'Abafilisiti? Onaabampa naabaghangula?” Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Ja. Bwenebwene ndidha kubakugha obaghangule.” 
1Chronicles14:11 Agho Daudi yaidha e Baali Perazimu, yaaghangulirayo Abafilisiti. Yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda andeeteire okughaguza mu bazigu ng'oti n'omwidhuzo ogw'amaadhi bwe gughaguza ghe gubita.” Kale kyova ekifo ekyo bakyeta Baali Perazimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Abafilisiti baalumuka, baaleka n'agho ebifaananie byaibwe bye baasinzanga. Daudi yaalagira abasaadha be baabyokya." 
1Chronicles14:13 Kabiri Abafilisiti baidha mu kiiko eky'e Refaimu, baakinhagulula." 
1Chronicles14:14 Era Daudi yeebuuza ku Katonda. Katonda yaamwiramu ati: “Otabalumba ng'ova ghano, aye weetooloole, obalumbire emberi w'emiti emibalisamu." 
1Chronicles14:15 Bw'onaawulira empindo edh'abali kukumba, nga dhiviira ghaigulu ku miti emibalisamu egyo, ng'olwo obalumba. Olwo nze Katonda naaba nkwesooseeyo emberi okughangula eigye ery'Abafilisiti eryo.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Daudi yaakola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yamulagira, yaaja ng'aita Abafilisiti okuva e Geba okutuuka e Gezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Daudi oyo yaamanhika mu nsi dhoonadhoona, era Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera amaghanga goonagoona okumutya." 
1Chronicles15:1 Daudi yazimba amayumba ge mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Yaategeka n'ekifo eky'okutaamu Esanduuku ya Katonda, yaakisimbaku weema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Agho Daudi yaakoba ati: “Ghazira bantu bandi banaabbeeda Sanduuku ya Katonda okutoolaku Abalevi, kuba Musengwa Katonda abo be yalonda okugibbeedanga n'okugirabiriranga enaku dhoonadhoona.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Kale Daudi yaayeta Abaisiraeli boonaboona, baaja beesololeza e Yerusalemu okutwala Sanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda mu kifo kye yali agitegekeire." 
1Chronicles15:4 Yaayeta baidhukulu ba Aaroni, n'Abalevi abandi bano:" 
1Chronicles15:5 Ku b'oku nda ya Kohathi kwaidhaku Urieli ng'akulembeire baganda be kikumi n'abiri (120) 
1Chronicles15:6 ku b'oku nda ya Merari kwaidhaku Asaia ng'akulembeire baganda be ebikumi bibiri n'abiri (220) 
1Chronicles15:7 ku b'oku nda ya Gereshoni kwaidhaku Yoeli ng'akulembeire baganda be kikumi n'asatu (130) 
1Chronicles15:8 ku b'oku nda ya Elizafani kwaidhaku Shemaia ng'akulembeire baganda be ebikumi bibiri (200) 
1Chronicles15:9 ku b'oku nda ya Heburoni kwaidhaku Elieli ng'akulembeire baganda be kinaana (80) 
1Chronicles15:10 ku b'oku nda ya Uzzieli kwaidhaku Amminadabu ng'akulembeire baganda be kikumi na ikumi na babiri (112). 
1Chronicles15:11 Agho Daudi yaayeta bakabona Zadoki, ni Abiathari, ghalala n'Abalevi bale omukaaga: Urieli, Asaia, Yoeli, Shemaia, Elieli, ni Amminadabu." 
1Chronicles15:12 Yaabakoba ati niimwe abakulu b'enda dha baiseimwe mu kika kya Levi. Mwetukuze imwe beene ni baganda baimwe, mughange okuleeta Sanduuku ya Musengwa wa Isiraeli mu kifo kye ngitegekeire." 
1Chronicles15:13 Olw'okuba ti niimwe omwagibbeeda ku mukuzi ogwasooka, Musengwa Katonda waife kyeyava n'atubonereza olw'obutakola nga bwe yalagira." 
1Chronicles15:14 Kale bakabona n'Abalevi abandi beetukuza, baghange okutwala Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles15:15 Baagibbeedera ku mabega gaibwe n'emiti egy'okugibbeedesa, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira ng'abita mu Musa." 
1Chronicles15:16 Daudi yaalagira abakulu b'Abalevi bateegho Balevi banaibwe, bembe n'amaani enhembo edh'eisanhu nga bakubiraku entongooli, n'endingidi, n'ebide." 
1Chronicles15:17 Kale abalevi baataagho Hemani mutabane wa Yoeli, n'owundi ku baganda be Asafu mutabane wa Berekia ni Ethani mutabane wa Kushaia ow'oku nda ya Merari." 
1Chronicles15:18 Era baataagho Balevi banaibwe okwiririra abo, nga n'ab'okubabeeraku: Zekaria, Yaazieli, Shemiramothi, Yehieli, Unni, Eliabu, Benaia, Maaseia, Mattithia, Elifelehu, ni Mikaneia ghalala ni Obededomu, ni Yeiyeli, abakuumi b'emiryango." 
1Chronicles15:19 Baataagho abembi bano: Hemani, Asafu, ni Ethani, okukuba ebide eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
1Chronicles15:20 Ate baataagho ab'okukuba entongooli edhivuga mu maloboozi aga ghaigulu, nga ni bano: Zekaria, Azieli, Shemiramothi, Yehieli, Unni, Eliabu, Maaseia, ni Benaia." 
1Chronicles15:21 Baataagho n'ab'okukuba endingidi edhivuga mu maloboozi aga ghansi, nga ni bano: Mattithia, Elifelehu, Mikaneia, Obededomu, Yeiyeli, ni Azazia." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenania omukulu w'Abalevi, nga bweyali omukugu mu by'okwemba, n'eyali ow'okukulira abembi." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekia ni Elukana, n'abaali ab'okukuuma Esanduuku ey'Endagaano." 
1Chronicles15:24 Bakabona bano nga n'ab'okufuuwa amagwala mu maiso g'Esanduuku ya Katonda: Shebania, Yoshafati, Nethaneli, Amasai, Zekaria, Benaia, ni Eliezeri." 
1Chronicles15:25 Kale Daudi, n'abakulembeze mu Isiraeli, n'abaduumizi b'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi, baaja baatoolayo Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda mu ndhu ya Obedi Edomu, n'okusagamba okw'amaani." 
1Chronicles15:26 Baaghaayo omusengo ogw'ente enume musanvu n'entaama enume musanvu eri Katonda, kuba yasobozesa Abalevi okubbeeda Sanduuku y'Endagaano." 
1Chronicles15:27 Daudi yaavaala ekanzu ey'olugoye olughegheevu, era n'abembi, ni Kenania omukulembeze waibwe, n'Abalevi boonaboona abaabbeeda Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, nga boona bavaire batyo. Daudi yali avaire n'ekivaalo eky'obwakabona eky'olugoye olughegheevu." 
1Chronicles15:28 Kale batyo Abaisiraeli boonaboona baaleeta Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda nga bali kukuba emizira, eno nga bwe bafuuwa endeka n'amagwala, era nga bwe bakuba n'ebide, n'entongooli, n'endingidi, nga biri kuvuga inho." 
1Chronicles15:29 Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda bwe baali bali kugireeta mu kibuga ekyetebwa ekya Daudi, Mikali mughala wa Saulo yaabisa amaiso mu dinisa yaalinga kuliya, yaabona kyabazinga Daudi ng'ali kukina bw'asagamba. Yaamunhooma mule." 
1Chronicles16:1 Baaleeta Esanduuku ya Katonda baagita mu kifo kyayo, mu Weema Daudi ye yagisimbiragho. Olwo baaghaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana." 
1Chronicles16:2 Daudi bwe yamala okughaayo ebigheebwayo ebyo, yaasabira abantu enkabi mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda," 
1Chronicles16:3 era yaagabula abantu boonaboona: buli muntu, k'abe musaadha oba mukazi, yaamugha omugaati, n'ekinofu eky'emamba, n'ekitole eky'ebibala eby'emizabbibu ebikalu." 
1Chronicles16:4 Daudi yaataagho abandi ku Balevi okugheerezanga mu maiso g'Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda nga basaba, beebaza, era baasaaka Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu ye baataagho okuba omukulu, Zekaria nga n'amwiririra. Ate bano baabataagho okukubanga entongooli n'endingidi: Yeiyeli, Shemiramothi, Yehieli, Mattithia, Eliabu, Benaia, Obededomu, ni Yeiyeli owundi. Asafu n'eyakubanga ebide," 
1Chronicles16:6 ate bakabona babiri, Benaia ni Yahazieli, nga ba kufuuwanga buliidho amagwala mu maiso g'Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Katonda." 
1Chronicles16:7 Ku lunaku olwo Daudi lwe yasooka okutaagho Asafu oyo ni Balevi baine abo, okwebazanga Musengwa Katonda nga bamwembera." 
1Chronicles16:8 Mwenamwena musiime Musengwa Katonda, musaake eriina lye, mumanhise amaghanga agandi ebyo bye yakola." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mumwembere, nga mwemba enhembo edhimusaaka, era nga mukobera abantu ebyewuunhisa byonabyona bye yakola." 
1Chronicles16:10 Muwulire okwesiima olw'eriina lye eitukuvu; abo abasinza Musengwa Katonda ka basagambe. 
1Chronicles16:11 Musabe Musengwa Katonda ababeerenga, mumusinzenga nga muli gh'ali ekiseera kyonakyona." 
1Chronicles16:12 Muteerabiranga ebyewuunhio n'eby'amaani bye yakola, era n'ensala ye yasalamu emisango," 
1Chronicles16:13 ku lwaimwe abaana ba Isiraeli omugheereza we, era baidhukulu ba Yakobo oyo ye yeerondera." 
1Chronicles16:14 Oyo ni Musengwa Katonda waife, ebiragiro bye bikola mu nsi yoonayoona." 
1Chronicles16:15 Akuuma endagaano ye ebyanda n'ebyanda, yaagumira ku kibono kye yasuubiza ni bweghabitagho ense olukumi (1,000)." 
1Chronicles16:16 Akuuma endagaano ye yakola ni Aburahamu, n'ekisuubizo kye yasuubiza Isaaka nga yeerayirira." 
1Chronicles16:17 Endagaano eyo yagikola n'omugheereza we Yakobo, yaagitaagho ng'eiteeka era ng'endagaano n'Abaisiraeli etaliwaagho," 
1Chronicles16:18 ng'akoba ati: “Ndikugha ensi Kanaani, yaaba yaimwe ku bwaimwe.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Abantu ba Katonda baali bakaali batono abazira ghe baaga, era nga basenze mu nsi eyo." 
1Chronicles16:20 Baatambulatambulanga eyo batyo, baava mu nsi eyindi kabiri baaja mu yindi; baava mu bwakyabazinga obundi baaja mu bundi." 
1Chronicles16:21 Aye Katonda tiyaganha muntu yeenayeena kubatuntuza; ku lwaibwe yakaabukira bakyabazinga," 
1Chronicles16:22 ng'abakoba ati: “Ghatabaagho agema ku bantu bange be nasiiga omuzigo, abalanzi bange abo mutabakola kibi kyonakyona.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Mwembere Musengwa Katonda imwe ensi dhoonadhoona, era mukoberenga abantu buli kaakyeire nga bwe yatulokola." 
1Chronicles16:24 Mumanhise ensi dhoonadhoona nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali ow'ekitiisa, era mumanhise abantu boonaboona nga bw'akola ebyewuunhisa." 
1Chronicles16:25 Musengwa Katonda mukologho era agwaine okusinzibwa einho. Oyo n'ali n'okutiibwa okusinga ebyo byonabyona ebyetebwa bakatonda. 
1Chronicles16:26 Emisambwa gyonagyona abantu gye basinza, bifaananie bufaananie. Aye Musengwa Katonda n'eyakola eigulu." 
1Chronicles16:27 Aidhwire ekitiisa era mufuzi, mu kifo kye mwidhwire ebyoleka nga wa maani era nga musangaavu." 
1Chronicles16:28 Imwe abantu ab'ensi dhoonadhoona musaake Musengwa Katonda, mwatule nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali ow'ekitiisa era ow'obukumu." 
1Chronicles16:29 Mughe eriina lya Musengwa Katonda ekitiisa ekirigwaniire; mwidhe mu maiso ge era mumuleetere ebigheebwayo. Musinze Musengwa Katonda mu butukuvu bwe," 
1Chronicles16:30 imwe mwenamwena ab'oku nsi mudhugumire mu maiso ge. Yii, ensi ngumu mu kifo kyayo gh'eri, era ghazira kighanga kugisegenhia naire." 
1Chronicles16:31 Eigulu ka lisangaale n'ensi esagambe, era abantu bakobe mu nsi dhoonadhoona bati: “Musengwa Katonda ni kyabazinga!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Enhandha k'ewolomboke n'ebigirimu byonabyona olw'eisanhu. Enimiro n'ebidhirimu byonabyona bisangaale. 
1Chronicles16:33 Memale olwo emiti gyonagyona egy'omu kibira gyembe n'eisanhu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, kuba ali kwidha okusalira ensi omusango." 
1Chronicles16:34 Kale ni mwenamwena musiime Musengwa Katonda kuba mulungi, era okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
1Chronicles16:35 Era musabe Musengwa Katonda oyo muti: “Wo Katonda Omulokozi waife tuwonie, era otusoloze okuva eyo mu maghanga ye twasansaanira. Olwo tukusiimenga olw'eriina lyo eitukuvu, era tukusaakenga olw'ekitiisa kyo.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli asaakibwe! Asaakibwe buti, era asaakibwenga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Agho abantu boonaboona bakoba bati: “Amiina!” Era baasaaka Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles16:37 Kale kyabazinga Daudi yaataagho Asafu ni Balevi baine, bakulirenga eby'okusinza, nga bwe kyali kyetaagisa buli lunaku, agho mu maiso ag'Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles16:38 Yaataagho ni Obededomu mutabane wa Yeduthuni, ni Hosa, ghalala ni balevi banaibwe nkaaga na munaana nga bombi abo, Obededomu ni Hosa, n'abakulira abakuumi b'emiryango." 
1Chronicles16:39 Yaataagho Zadoki kabona ni bakabona baine bakulirenga eby'okusinza mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu ekyali e Gibeoni. 
1Chronicles16:40 Buli nkyo n'eigulo nga bali n'okughaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ku alutaari ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, nga bajiira ku ebyo byonabyona ebyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka ga Musengwa Katonda, ge yagha eighanga lya Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Aghalala n'abo, yaataagho Hemani, ni Yeduthuni, n'abandi boonaboona abaalondebwa okwebazanga Musengwa Katonda, kuba okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani ni Yeduthuni era n'abaakuumanga amagwala, n'ebide, n'ebivuga ebindi byonabyona bye baakubanga okwembera Katonda. Ate batabane ba Yeduthuni yaabata ku gw'okukuumanga emiryango." 
1Chronicles16:43 Agho abantu baagolola, buli muntu ewuwe. Ni Daudi yeena yairayo eka okuba n'ab'omu ndhu ye." 
1Chronicles17:1 Agho kyabazinga Daudi ng'amaze okutyama mu miraala mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga, yaakoba Nathani omulanzi ati: “Bona eno, nze nsula mu ndhu eyazimbwa n'emiti emivule, aye Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda yaaba bwa mu weema!”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathani yaamwiramu ati: “Ja okole byonabyona ebikuli ku mwoyo, kuba Katonda ali n'iwe.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Aye obwire bwene obwo Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Nathani ati: 
1Chronicles17:4 “Ja okobe omugheereza wange Daudi oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Ti niiwe oja okunzimbira endhu ey'okubangamu." 
1Chronicles17:5 Tibangaku mu ndhu okuviira irala ku lunaku lwe natoola Abaisiraeli e Misiri okutuusa ni ye buli eno. Buli ghe mbairenga nja, nga mba mu weema."
