1Chronicles17:6 Mu bifo byonabyona bye mbairenga njaamu nga ndi n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, ghaligho ye nkobangaku waire omulala ati ku bakulembeze be nataagho okulabiriranga abantu bange Abaisiraeli, nti lwaki timunzimbira ndhu ya miti mivule?’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Kale ni oidha kukoba omugheereza wange Daudi oti nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye nkoba nti, ‘Nakutoola ku gw'okwayanga entaama mu byayiro, naakufuula omukulembeze ow'abantu bange Abaisiraeli." 
1Chronicles17:8 Naabanga ghalala niiwe buli ye wajanga, naasaaniangagho abazigu bo ng'oli kumpi okutuukayo. Era ndidha kukufuula mukologho obe ng'oti n'abantu abakologho ab'oku nsi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ntegekeire abantu bange Abaisiraeli ekifo, mbate omwo babenga mu kifo ekyo nga kyaibwe ku bwaibwe, ghalobe kubaagho ekibatabula kabiri. Abantu ababi tibaja kwirayo kubadaazadaaza, nga bwe baakolanga eira" 
1Chronicles17:10 mu biseera bye nateeragho abalamuzi abaakulemberanga abantu bange Abaisiraeli. Ndidha kukuwonianga okulumbibwa abazigu bo boonaboona. N'ekindi, nze Musengwa Katonda nkukoba nti ndikwaliza abaana n'abaidhukulu." 
1Chronicles17:11 Enaku dho bwe dhiriwaaku n'ofa, n'oja okweyimba ku badhaadha bo abaafa, ndikusikiza owundi ku baana bo beene be weezaalira, naamutaagho okuba kyabazinga era naaleetera obwakyabazinga bwe okukakata." 
1Chronicles17:12 Oyo n'alinzimbira endhu, era ndireetera obwakyabazinga bwe okukakata ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
1Chronicles17:13 Nze ndiba lata we ate mwene yaaba mwana wange, era tija kukomya kumugonzanga, nga bwe nakomya okugonza Saulo, ye natoolagho memale iwe oiregho." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ndidha kumutaagho alabirirenga abantu bange n'obwakyabazinga bwange, era ndeeterenga n'obwakyabazinga bwe okukakata ebyanda n'ebyanda.’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Kale Nathani yaakobera Daudi byonabyona nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yabimukoba, era nga bwe yabimwoleka." 
1Chronicles17:16 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yangira mu Weema, yaatyama mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, katyo nze ninze ani era n'ab'endhu yange ni baani, iwe okutukolera ebyo byonabyona by'otukoleire?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ate nga ekyo kyali kintu kitono inho ku iwe Katonda wange, kuba era osuubiiza bingi ku izaire lyange mu biseera eby'omu maiso. Era ebyo, iwe Musengwa Katonda wange obyoleike nze omuntu obuntu naabimanha." 
1Chronicles17:18 Ate kiki ekindi nze Daudi kye nnaayongera okukukoba? Iwe Musengwa Katonda wange ondidhi bukalamu nze omugheereza wo. 
1Chronicles17:19 Olw'okwenda kwo waleetera ebintu bino byonabyona ebikologho okubaagho, ng'oyenda nze omugheereza wo mbimanhe." 
1Chronicles17:20 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, bwenebwene tituwulirangaku wundi ali ng'oti niiwe. Niiwe Katonda wenka, ezira wundi." 
1Chronicles17:21 Kale ighanga ki erindi ku nsi, eriri ng'oti n'ery'abantu bo Abaisiraeli iwe Katonda be waja n'onunula babe abantu bo? Waabakolera ebintu ebikologho era ebitiisa, ebyaleetera eriina lyo okumanhika mu nsi yoonayoona, waabingayo abamaghanga agandi mu biketezo bye baalimu, ng'abantu bo be wanunula e Misiri bali kumpi okutuukayo." 
1Chronicles17:22 Wataagho Abaisiraeli babenga bantu bo ebyanda n'ebyanda, ate iwe Musengwa Katonda waafuuka Katonda waibwe." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, mperaano ni kuumanga ekyo ky'osuubiiza nze omugheereza wo n'ab'endhu yange era okituukirizenga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
1Chronicles17:24 Oidha kubanga mukologho ebyanda n'ebyanda, abantu bakwogerengaku bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye oyo, ni Katonda wa Isiraeli.’ Era nkweghemba okuumenga ab'endhu yange nze omugheereza wo Daudi." 
1Chronicles17:25 Wo Katonda wange, nze omugheereza wo ngumye naakusaba ebintu ebyo, olw'ebyo by'ondholeike ng'okoba oti, olinsikiza abaana n'abaidhukulu abange ku bwakyabazinga bwange." 
1Chronicles17:26 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, niiwe Katonda, otuukiriza buli ky'okoba, era niiwe osuubiiza nze omugheereza wo ebintu ebyo ebirungi." 
1Chronicles17:27 Era mpegaano siima okugha enkabi ab'endhu yange nze omugheereza wo, beeyongerenga okuba abagonzi y'oli enaku dhoonadhoona, kuba iwe Musengwa Katonda b'ogha enkabi, baba ba nkabi ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, Daudi kabiri yaalwana n'Abafilisiti yaabaghangula, era yaabanhagaku ekibuga Gathi n'obubuga obukyezungulwire." 
1Chronicles18:2 Yaaghangula n'ensi Moabu, Abamoabu baafuuka bagheereza be era baamughanga omusolo." 
1Chronicles18:3 Bwe yamala yaaghangula ni kyabazinga Hadadezeri ow'e Zoba, ekiri okumpi n'e Hamathi. Hadadezeri oyo yali ali kuja okweiriza ebiketezo bye ebyali bimudheemyeku ku mwiga Eufurate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Daudi yaamunhagaku ebigaali eby'omu lutalo lukumi (1,000), n'abalwani ab'oku mbalaasi kasanvu (7,000), n'ab'oku bigere emitwalo ebiri (20,000). Yaasala eminho egy'embalaasi dhoonadhoona, aye yaalekagho edhimala okughaluza ebigaali eby'omu lutalo kikumi dhonka." 
1Chronicles18:5 Abasiria ab'e Damasiko bwe baidha okubeera Hadadezeri okulwana, Daudi yaabaitamu abasaadha emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ibiri (22,000)." 
1Chronicles18:6 Agho Daudi yaata enkambi edh'abalwani mu Siria eky'e Damasiko, Abasiria baafuuka bagheereza be nga bamugha omusolo. Musengwa Katonda yaaghanga Daudi obughanguzi buli ye yajanga." 
1Chronicles18:7 Daudi oyo yaanhaga engabo edha zaabu abalwani ba Hadadezeri dhe baali nadho, yaadhitwala e Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles18:8 Era yaatoola n'ebintu kamaala eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo okuva mu bibuga Tibahathi ni Kuni ebyafugibwanga Hadadezeri. Ekyuma eky'ekikomo ekyo Solomoni kye yakozesa okukola etanka enkologho, n'empango, n'ebintu ebindi eby'okukozesa eby'ekyuma ky'ekikomo." 
1Chronicles18:9 Kyabazinga Tou ow'e Hamathi bwe yawulira nga Daudi aghangwire eigye lyonalyona erya Hadadezeri. 
1Chronicles18:10 Kale yaatuma mutabane we Hadoramu ye Daudi oyo n'obukwenda obw'okumulamusa n'okumukangaalusa olw'okulwanisa Hadadezeri n'amughangula; kuba Hadadezeri oyo yalwanisanga Tou emikuzi kamaala. Hadoramu oyo yaatwalira Daudi ebintu ebya feeza, n'ebya zaabu, n'eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ebintu ebyo kyabazinga Daudi yaabighaayo byaba bya Musengwa Katonda, ghalala ni feeza ni zaabu Daudi oyo ye yanhaga ku maghanga goonagoona ge yaghangula, gano: Edomu, Moabu, Ammoni, Filisitia, ni Amaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Agho Abishai mutabane w'omukazi eyayetebwanga Zeruia, yaita Abaedomu omutwalo mulala na kanaana (18,000) mu Kiiko ekyetebwa eky'Omuunhu." 
1Chronicles18:13 Yaata enkambi edh'abalwani mu Edomu, Abaedomu boonaboona baafuuka bagheereza ba Daudi. Musengwa Katonda yaaghanga Daudi obughanguzi yoonayoona ye yajanga." 
1Chronicles18:14 Kale atyo Daudi yaafuga Isiraeli yoonayoona, yaakoleranga abantu be ebintu mu butuufu ni mu mazima." 
1Chronicles18:15 Yoabu mutabane w'omukazi eyayetebwanga Zeruia, nga n'aduumira amagye. Yehoshafati mutabane wa Ahiludi yaakuuma ebighandiiko." 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadoki mutabane wa Ahitubu ni Ahimeleki mutabane wa Abiathari, baaba bakabona. Shavusha yaaba mughandiisi." 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada yaakulira Abakerethi n'Abapelethi. Ate batabane ba Daudi baaba bakungu abakulira emirimo gya kyabazinga. 
1Chronicles19:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, kyabazinga Nahashi ow'Abammoni yaafa, mutabane we Hanuni yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Chronicles19:2 Daudi yaakoba mule ati: “Ndidha kulaga Hanuni mutabane wa Nahashi omukwano ogw'amazima nga ise gwe yandaganga.” Kale Daudi yaatuma ku bagheereza be baje ye Hanuni, bamumusaasirire olw'okufiirwa ise. Agho abagheereza ba Daudi abo baatuuka bukalamu mu nsi ey'Abammoni." 
1Chronicles19:3 Aye abakulembeze ab'Abammoni baakoba musengwa waibwe Hanuni bati: “Odhuuba oti Daudi akutumiire abagheereza be okukusaasira, lwa kwenda kuta mu lata wo kinhagansi? Busa naire. Atumye abagheereza be kwagaaza kibuga bakikeete, era olumaliira bakigeme.”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Kale Hanuni yaagema abagheereza ba Daudi, buli muntu yaamusalaku oluuyi olw'ekirevu kye era yaamusalaku ebivaalo bye okutuusa mu nkende, memale yaabalekula baaja." 
1Chronicles19:5 Daudi bwe baamukobera ebibairegho, yaatuma abakwenda y'abagheereza abo, kuba baali baswaziibwa inho. Yaabakoba basigale mu kibuga Yeriko okutuusa ng'ebirevu byaibwe bimaze okumera memale baireyo." 
1Chronicles19:6 Kyabazinga Hanuni n'Abammoni bwe baabona nga baleeteire Daudi okubakyagha, baasasula kilo dha feeza emitwalo esatu n'enkumi ina (34,000), okupangisa ebigaali eby'omu lutalo n'abavuzi b'embalaasi okuva e Mesopotamia, n'e Aramu Maaka ekya Siria, n'e Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Era baapangisa ebigaali eby'omu lutalo emitwalo esatu n'enkumi ibiri (32,000), ni kyabazinga w'e Maaka n'eigye lye. Abo baidha baasimba weema dhaibwe okwolekera Medeba. Abammoni beesoloza okuva mu bibuga byaibwe, beetegeka okulwana olutalo." 
1Chronicles19:8 Daudi bwe yakiwulira yaatuma Yoabu n'eigye lyonalyona ery'abalwani ab'amaani. 
1Chronicles19:9 Abammoni beesowolayo baasimba enhiriri gha mulyango ogwingira mu kibuga kyaibwe, nga beetegeike okulwana olutalo. Ate bakyabazinga abaidha, baaba bonka mu irungu." 
1Chronicles19:10 Yoabu bwe yabona ng'abazigu beetegeike okumulumba nga bamuva emberi n'emugongo, yaalonda mu balwani ba Isiraeli abasaadha abasinga kulwana, baasimba enhiriri nga boolekeire Abasiria." 
1Chronicles19:11 Abalwani abaasigalagho yaabagemya muganda we Abishai, yaabasimbya enhiriri okwolekera Abammoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Yoabu oyo yaakoba Abishai ati: “Abasiria bwe banansinga amaani munaidha mwambeera, mwena Abammoni bwe banaabasinga amaani tunaidha twababeera." 
1Chronicles19:13 Guma omwoyo, tulwane kisaadha ku lw'abantu baife n'ebibuga bya Katonda waife. Ka tusabe Musengwa Katonda akole ekyo ky'abona nga n'ekigwaine.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Kale Yoabu ni be yali nabo baaja okulumba Abasiria, Abasiria baabalumuka." 
1Chronicles19:15 Abammoni bwe baabona ng'Abasiria balumwike, boona baalumuka Abishai bangira mu kibuga. Agho Yoabu yaakyuka yaavaayo y'okulwana n'Abammoni, yaira e Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Aye Abasiria bwe baabona ng'Abaisiraeli babaghangwire, baatuma abakwenda baatoolayo Abasiria abaali ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate baidha ni Shofaki omuduumizi w'eigye lya Hadadezeri nga n'ali kubakulembera." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ekyo bwe baakikobera Daudi, yeena yaasoloza eigye lya Isiraeli lyonalyona, baasomoka omwiga Yorudani yaatuuka ku Basiria abo, yeetegeka okubalwanisa. Abasiria abo baatoolera okumulwanisa." 
1Chronicles19:18 Abasiria baalumuka Abaisiraeli. Daudi yaita abalwani Abasiria ab'oku bigaali eby'omu lutalo kasanvu (7,000), n'ab'oku bigere emitwalo ena (40,000). Era yaita ni Shofaki omuduumizi ow'eigye ly'Abasiria." 
1Chronicles19:19 Bakyabazinga boonaboona abaali abagheereza ba Hadadezeri bwe baabona nga Abaisiraeli babaghangwire, baakola endagaano ey'emiraala ni Daudi, Daudi oyo yaabafuganga. Agho Abasiria baaloba kwirayo kabiri kubeera Bammoni." 
1Chronicles20:1 Agho omwaka nga gutoolera, mu kiseera bakyabazinga kye bajiiramu okulwana entalo, Yoabu yaakulembera eigye yaalumba ensi eya Abammoni. Yaazingiza ekibuga Rabba era yaakizikiriza. Aye kyabazinga Daudi yaasigala e Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles20:2 Daudi oyo yaatoola engule ku mutwe gwa kyabazinga waibwe yaagita ku mutwe gwe. Engule eyo yali ya zaabu n'amabaale ag'omughendo einho, ng'ezitogha kilo ng'oti amakumi asatu na ina. Daudi oyo era yaanhaga ebintu kamaala inho mu kibuga ekyo." 
1Chronicles20:3 Era yaatwala n'abantu abaali mu kibuga omwo, yaabakozesanga emirimo nga bakozesa emisumeeni, ensuuluulu, n'empasa. Era atyo bwe yakola abantu boonaboona abaali mu bibuga eby'Abammoni byonabyona. Agho Daudi n'abantu be boonaboona bairayo e Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ebyo nga biwoire, ghaabaagho olutalo e Gezeri ghagati gh'Abaisiraeli n'Abafilisiti. Sibbekai ow'e Husha yaita Sippai, ow'oku lulyo olw'abantu abawaigufu. Abafilisiti baaghangulwa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Kabiri ghaabalukagho olutalo olundi n'Abafilisiti. Elihanani mutabane wa Yairi yaita Lahimi muganda wa Goliathi Omugitti, eyali n'eifumo eryali n'olunhago olunene, olwaga n'ekiti kye balukisa engoye." 
1Chronicles20:6 Kabiri era yaabaayo olutalo e Gathi omwali omusaadha omukologho, ng'ali n'engalo mukaaga ku buli mukono n'obugere mukaaga ku buli kigere byonabyona aghalala n'amakumi abiri n'ebina (24). Yeena yali wa ku lulyo olw'abantu abawaigufu." 
1Chronicles20:7 Oyo bwe yayeeyereza Abaisiraeli, Yonathani mutabane wa Shimea muganda wa Daudi, yaamwita." 
1Chronicles20:8 Abo abasatu baali ba ku lulyo olw'abantu abawaigufu abaali e Gathi, era Daudi n'abasaadha be n'abaabaita." 
1Chronicles21:1 Agho Sitaani yaasituka okuleeta akabi ku Isiraeli, yaasendasenda Daudi okubala Abaisiraeli." 
1Chronicles21:2 Kale Kyabazinga Daudi yaalagira Yoabu n'abaduumizi abandi ab'eigye, be yali nabo ati: “Muje mu Isiraeli mwonamwona, okuva e Dani okutuuka e Beerisheba, mubale abantu mmanhe omughendo gwaibwe.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Yoabu yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda wo agwananga yaayongera ku bungi obw'abantu ba Isiraeli emikuzi kikumi okusinga bwe bali. Isebantu kyabazinga, abo boonaboona mbona bantu bo era bagheereza mulala iwe. Aye musengwa wange kyabazinga, lwaki oyenda okukola ekintu ekyo ekinaaleeta ku Isiraeli yoonayoona omusango?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Aye ekiragiro kya kyabazinga kyasinza Yoabu amaani. Kale Yoabu oyo yaaja ng'abitabita mu Isiraeli mwonamwona ng'abala abantu, olwo yaamala yaira e Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles21:5 Yoabu yaatwalira kyabazinga Daudi omughendo ogw'abantu be baabala: mu Isiraeli mwonamwona mwalimu abasaadha abasobola okulwana entalo akakaire kalala n'emitwalo ikumi (1,100,000), ate mu Buyudaaya mwabaamu emitwalo amakumi ana na musanvu (470,000)." 
1Chronicles21:6 Aye olw'okuba Yoabu tiyasiima kiragiro kya kyabazinga, ab'omu kika ekya Levi n'ekya Benjamini tiyababala." 
1Chronicles21:7 Katonda yaasungughala olw'ekyo ekyakolebwa, kyeyava n'abonereza Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles21:8 Daudi yaasaba Katonda ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda nhonoine inho olw'ekyo kye nkoze. Era nkweghembye ntoolaaku ekibi ekyo nze omugheereza wo, kuba nkoze kya busiru inho.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Gadi omulanzi eyaghanga Daudi ku magezi, ati:" 
1Chronicles21:10 “Ja okobe Daudi oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Ndi kukugha ebintu bisatu, olondeku kirala kye mbe nkukole.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Kale Gadi yaaja ye Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Ku bino olondaku kiri gha?" 
1Chronicles21:12 Endhala okugwa mu nsi okumala emyaka esatu? Oba iwe okumala emyezi esatu ng'olumukanga abazigu bo abakuyiigania? Oba okumala enaku eisatu nga Musengwa Katonda ali kukugoyagoya, asindike ekibamba okwidha mu nsi yo ng'akozesa malaika we, okuja ng'aita abantu mu Isiraeli yoonayoona? Buti dhuubiriza osalegho kye mbe ndhiremu oyo antumye.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Agho Daudi yaakoba Gadi ati: “Enaku engemye inho naasoberwa. Aye ekisinga leka Katonda ali n'ekivunika ekyodo ambonereze mwene, mu kifo eky'okubonerezebwa abantu obuntu.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Kale Musengwa Katonda yasindika ku Isiraeli ekibamba, mwafaamu abantu emitwalo musanvu (70,000)." 
1Chronicles21:15 Agho Katonda oyo yaatuma malaika e Yerusalemu okukizikiriza. Aye Malaika oyo bwe yagolola omukono gwe okukizikiriza, Musengwa Katonda oyo yaakyusa ekirowoozo kye eky'okukola akabi. Kale yaakoba oyo azikiriza ati: “Ekyo kinaamala. Lekera agho!” Agho malaika yali atuuse mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano ekya Orunani Omuyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Daudi yaja okulinga ati, ng'abona malaika wa Musengwa Katonda ayemereire ghagati gh'ensi n'eigulu, ng'asowoire empiima mu kiruutu kyayo yaagigema mu ngalo, era yaagigololera ku Yerusalemu. Agho Daudi n'abakulembeze b'abantu, baakuba amakiryaivu era baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka, nga bavaire ekutiya olw'okunakughala." 
1Chronicles21:17 Agho Daudi yaakoba Katonda ati: “Ninze nalagira okubala abantu. Ninze eyayonoona, naakola ekibi einho. Aye abantu bano abali ng'oti ntaama butaama bakoze ki? Kyenva ni nkusaba, iwe Musengwa Katonda wange, omukono gwo gukube nze n'ab'endhu ya lata wange. Otaganha kibamba kugwira bantu bo.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaalagira Gadi okukoba Daudi, aje mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano ekya Orunani Omuyebusi, azimbireyo Musengwa Katonda alutaari." 
1Chronicles21:19 Kale Daudi yaaja ng'ajiira ku kiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda Gadi kye yamukobera. 
1Chronicles21:20 Mu kiseera ekyo Orunani yali ng'ali mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano ni batabane be abana, ng'ali kukuba engaano. Olwakyuka ati, yaabona malaika, era batabane be beegisa." 
1Chronicles21:21 Orunani bwe yalengera kyabazinga Daudi ng'ali kwidha y'ali, yaava mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano, yaaja y'ali, yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka." 
1Chronicles21:22 Daudi yaamukoba ati: “Nguza ekifo kyo aghakubirwa engaano, nkisasule omughendo gwene ogukijaamu, nzimbiregho Musengwa Katonda alutaari olwo atoole ku bantu ekibamba.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Orunani yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ekifo kitwale okikozese kyonakyona ky'oyenda. N'ente dhiidho ndhikughaire dhibe ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, n'ekiti ekibairenga kikozesebwa okumulungula engaano kiikyo kikozese ng'enku, ate engaano ebe ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Aye kyabazinga Daudi yaakoba Orunani ati: “Busa, ndidha kubigula bugule n'omughendo gwene ogubijaamu. Tiidha kutoola kintu kikyo kukigha Musengwa Katonda, waire okughaayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa eri Musengwa Katonda wange kye ntaguze na mughendo kuva mu nsawo yange.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Kale Daudi yaagula ekifo ekyo ebitundu lukaaga ebya zaabu. 
1Chronicles21:26 Era yaazimbira agho Musengwa Katonda alutaari yaaghaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Yaasaba Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda oyo yaamwiramu ng'asindika omuliro ku alutaari nga guva mu igulu." 
1Chronicles21:27 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalagira malaika okwiza empiima mu kiruutu kyayo. 
1Chronicles21:28 Daudi bwe yabona nga Musengwa Katonda amughaire ky'amusabye ng'ali mu kifo ekyo aghakubirwa engaano, yeeyongera okughangayo emisengo mu kifo ekyo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Mu kiseera ekyo Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda Musa ye yakolera mu irungu, ni alutaari ye baayokerangaku emisengo, byali bikaali mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu e Gibeoni." 
1Chronicles21:30 Aye Daudi nga tasobola kujaayo kwebuuza ku Katonda, kuba yali atya empiima ya malaika wa Katonda oyo." 
1Chronicles22:1 Kale Daudi yaakoba ati: “Ghano n'aghaidha okubanga eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda waife, era ghano n'aghaidha okubanga alutaari Abaisiraeli ye banaagheerangaku ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Agho Daudi yaalagira okusoloza abasenze boonaboona abaali mu nsi Isiraeli. Yaalonda ab'okusiguukulula amabaale n'okugabaadha, nga ga kuzimbisa eisinzizo lya Katonda." 
1Chronicles22:3 Yaataagho ekyuma ekigumu einho mu bungi, nga kya kugheesaamu misumaali n'obubaati, eby'okukola ku ndhigi edhiigala emiryango eminene. Yaataagho n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo mu bungi, ekitasoboka na kupimika." 
1Chronicles22:4 Yaataagho n'embaawo edh'emiti emivule kamaala inho edhitasoboka kubalika, abantu b'e Sidoni n'ab'e Tiro dhe baamuleetera." 
1Chronicles22:5 Daudi yaakoba mule ati: “Eisinzizo lye baja okuzimbira Musengwa Katonda ligwaine okuba nga lya kitiisa inho era nga limanhikaine mu nsi yoonayoona. Aye Solomoni aja okulizimba akaali mwana muto, azira bumanhirivu naire. Kyenva ndi n'okutaagho eby'okulizimbisa.” Kale Daudi yaataagho eby'okuzimbisa kamaala inho ng'akaali kufa." 
1Chronicles22:6 Agho yaayeta mutabane we Solomoni, yaamusikirira okuzimbira Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli eisinzizo." 
1Chronicles22:7 Daudi yaakoba Solomoni oyo ati: “Mwana wange, nayenda inho okuzimbira Musengwa Katonda wange eisinzizo okumugheesa ekitiisa." 
1Chronicles22:8 Aye Musengwa Katonda yandobera ng'akoba ati, ‘Walwana entalo kamaala, waita abantu kamaala inho. Kale olw'omusaayi omungi gwe wayugha nga mbona, toidha kunzimbira isinzizo." 
1Chronicles22:9 Aye olizaala omwana mulenzi yaaba muntu wa miraala, kuba ndimugha emiraala yaaloba kulumbibwa bazigu be ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona. Olimutuuma eriina Solomoni, kuba mu bufuzi bwe ndigha ensi Isiraeli okuba emiraala n'okutebenkera." 
1Chronicles22:10 Oyo n'alinzimbira eisinzizo okumpeesa ekitiisa. Aliba mwana wange, ate nze naaba lata we. Era ndireetera ekityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga okukakata mu Isiraeli ebyanda n'ebyanda.’ ”" 
1Chronicles22:11 Daudi yaayongera okukoba ati: “Kale ni mwana wange, nsaba Musengwa Katonda wo abenga n'iwe, akughe enkabi oghange okumuzimbira eisinzizo nga bwe yakusuubiza." 
1Chronicles22:12 Era nsaba inho Musengwa Katonda wo akughenga amagezi n'okutegeera, oghange okufuganga Isiraeli ng'ojiira ku Mateeka ge." 
1Chronicles22:13 Bw'onaagonderanga Amateeka n'ebiragiro Musengwa Katonda bye yagha Isiraeli ng'abita mu Musa, ebintu byonabyona biidha kukujiiranga bukalamu. Guma omwoyo, otatya, era otawaamu maani." 
1Chronicles22:14 Nze ku lwange mu bukaluubirivu obungi, nkoze kyonakyona ekisoboka, naateeragho eisinzizo talanta edha zaabu edhighera emitwalo eikumi (100,000) ni talanta edha feeza edhighera akakaire akalamba (1,000,000) n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, taaku n'ekyuma ekigumu einho, ebitasoboka kupimika olw'obungi bwabyo. Era naataagho n'emiti, n'amabaale. Weena okwo kw'obe oyongereze ebindi." 
1Chronicles22:15 Era oli n'abakozi kamaala: ababaadhi ab'amabaale n'abo abagazimbisa, n'ababaadhi ab'emiti, n'abagheesi kamaala abaghanga okugheesa ebintu" 
1Chronicles22:16 mu zaabu, ni mu feeza, ni mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, era ni mu kyuma ekigumu einho. Situkiramu otoolere omulimo. Nsaba Musengwa Katonda abenga n'iwe.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Daudi yaalagira abakulembeze boonaboona aba Isiraeli okubeeraku Solomoni omulimo ogwo. 
1Chronicles22:18 Yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda waimwe ali ghalala n'imwe, era abaghaire emiraala ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona. Yansobozesa okughangula abantu abaabanga mu nsi eno, era mpegaano bagondera Musengwa Katonda n'imwe abantu be." 
1Chronicles22:19 Kale ni, mperaano mugheerezenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe n'omutima gwaimwe era n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona. Musitukiremu, mutoolere okuzimba eisinzizo, musobole okutaamu Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda, n'ebintu ebindi byonabyona ebitukuvu eby'okukozesa, bibenga mu isinzizo lyemuja okuzimba okumugheesa ekitiisa.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Daudi bwe yakairigha einho, yaafuula mutabane we Solomoni kyabazinga wa Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaayeta abakulembeze boonaboona mu Isiraeli, ni bakabona, n'abalevi, beesoloza." 
1Chronicles23:3 Yaabala abasaadha Abalevi boonaboona ab'emyaka amakumi asatu n'okusingagho, baaghera emitwalo esatu na kanaana (38,000)." 
1Chronicles23:4 Ku abo yaatoolaku emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000), yaabagha gwa kukolanga mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda; akakaaga (6,000) yaabagha gwa kukulira banaibwe na kubalamula" 
1Chronicles23:5 enkumi eina yaabagha gwa kuba bakuumi ba miryango ate enkumi eina (4,000) abandi yaabagha gwa kusaakanga Musengwa Katonda nga bakozesa ebivuga kyabazinga bye yataagho olw'omulimo ogwo." 
1Chronicles23:6 Daudi yaagaba mu Balevi ebikunsu bisatu, nga batabane ba Levi bwe baali: Gereshoni, Kohathi, ni Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gereshoni yazaala Ladani ni Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladani yaazaala abaana abalenzi basatu: Yehieli nga n'omukulu, yaazaala ni Zethamu, ni Yoeli." 
1Chronicles23:9 Shimei yaazaala abaana abalenzi basatu: Shelomothi, Hazieli, ni Harani. Abo n'abaali abakulu ab'enda edhaasimuka mu Ladani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Shimei yaazaala Yahathi, ni Zina, ni Yeushi, ni Beria abo abana n'abaali batabane ba Shimei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yahathi n'eyali omukulu, Ziza yairaku. Aye Yeushi ni Beria tibaazaala baana bangi, kyebava babalibwa ng'enda endala." 
1Chronicles23:12 Kohathi yaazaala Amuramu, Izahara, Heburoni, ni Uzzieli." 
1Chronicles23:13 Amuramu yaazaala Aaroni ni Musa. Aaroni yaayawulibwa n'ab'oku nda ye okulabiriranga ebintu ebitukuvu ebyanda n'ebyanda, okuniokezanga obubbaani mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda n'okumugheerezanga, n'okusabiranga abantu enkabi mu liina lye." 
1Chronicles23:14 Aye abaana ba Musa omuntu wa Katonda, baababalira mu Balevi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Musa oyo yazaala Gereshomu ni Eliezeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Omukulu mu baana ba Gereshomu yali Shebueli. 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliezeri yazaala omwana mulala yenka, nga ni Rehabia. Aye Rehabia oyo yaazaala abaana kamaala." 
1Chronicles23:18 Mu baana ba Izahara, Shelomithi n'eyali omukulu." 
1Chronicles23:19 Mu baana ba Heburoni, Yeria n'eyali omukulu, kwairaku Amaria, kwairaku Yahazieli, ate ku oyo kwairaku Yekameamu." 
1Chronicles23:20 Uzzieli yaazaala Mika, nga n'omukulu, ate Issihia yairaku." 
1Chronicles23:21 Merari yaazaala Mahuli ni Mushi. Mahuli yaazaala Eleazari ni Kishi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazari yaafa nga tazaireeku mwana mulenzi okutoolaku abaghala abeereere. Abaghala abo baafumbirwa baanhinaibwe, batabane ba Kishi eyali muganda wa iseibwe." 
1Chronicles23:23 Mushi yaazaala abaana abalenzi basatu: Mahuli, Ederi, ni Yeremothi." 
1Chronicles23:24 Abo n'ab'omu kika kya Levi ng'enda dhaibwe bwe dhaali, era nga n'abaali abakulu b'enda edho. Enda edho n'edhaavaamu abasaadha abaaba nga bagheziiza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingagho, abaabalibwa ni baghandiikibwa, nga n'ab'okukolanga omulimo ogw'okugheereza mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles23:25 Daudi yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli aghaire abantu be emiraala, era ni mwene yeena aidha kubanga mu Yerusalemu ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
1Chronicles23:26 Kale ni Abalevi tikikaabeetaagisa kubbeeda Weema ya Musengwa Katonda n'ebintu eby'okukozesa mu Weema eyo.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Olw'ebyo Daudi bye yasembyayo okusikirira abantu, Abalevi abaaba nga bagheziiza emyaka amakumi abiri n'okusingagho bonka, n'abaaghandiikibwanga okukolanga" 
1Chronicles23:28 emirimo egy'okubeerangaku bakabona ab'oku lulyo lw'Aaroni, mu byonabyona ebigema ku kugheereza mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, era nga ni gino:" 
1Chronicles23:29 okulabiriranga ebigema ku migaati egigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda, obuwunga bwe baakozesanga mu kigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, emigaati emitono egitazimbulukusiibwa, ebigheebwayo ebifumbibwa, n'ebigheebwayo eby'obuwunga obutabwirwamu omuzigo ogw'ebibala by'emiti emyoliva. Era n'okupimanga obungi, n'obuzito, n'obunene obw'ebigheebwayo mu isinzizo." 
1Chronicles23:30 Abalevi abo nga bali n'okwebazanga Musengwa Katonda n'okumusaakanga buli nkyo n'eigulo," 
1Chronicles23:31 n'okughangayo eri Musengwa Katonda oyo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, ku Sabbato, ni ku buli Kibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, era ni ku nnaku edhindi edhaateebwagho. Ebyo byonabyona nga bali n'okubikolanga mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda aghazira kwosaamu naire, era nga bajiira ku mughendo ogulagirwa." 
1Chronicles23:32 Era baagheebwa ogw'okulabiriranga Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, n'Ekifo Ekitukuvu, nga babeeraku baganda baibwe bakabona ab'olulyo lwa Aaroni okugheerezanga mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni baabagabamu bati: Aaroni yazaala Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazari, ni Ithamari." 
1Chronicles24:2 Aye Nadabu ni Abihu baasooka iseibwe okufa ate nga tibazaireeku mwana naire. Kale Eleazari ni Ithamari baafuuka bakabona. 
1Chronicles24:3 Kyabazinga Daudi yagabamu bakabona mu bikunsu ng'ajiira ku mirimo gye baali baja okukolanga. Ekyo yakikola ng'ayambibwaku Zadoki mwidhukulu wa Eleazari, ni Ahimeleki mwidhukulu wa Ithamari." 
1Chronicles24:4 Mu bantu abaasimuka mu Eleazari mwalimu abakulu b'enda kamaala okusingaku abo abaali mu bantu abaasimuka mu Ithamari. Kale abo abaasimuka mu Eleazari baabagabamu mu bikunsu bya nda ikumi na mukaaga, ate abaasimuka mu Ithamari baabagabamu mu bikunsu bya nda munaana." 
1Chronicles24:5 Aye mu bantu ab'omu bikunsu ebyo byombi, eky'abaasimuka mu Eleazari n'eky'abaasimuka mu Ithamari, mwalimu abakulira eisinzizo n'abakulira eby'okusinza. Kale kyaba nti emirimo gyonagyona baagigaba nga bakuba bwa kalulu." 
1Chronicles24:6 Abaasimuka mu Eleazari n'abaasimuka mu Ithamari baakuba akalulu nga baja mu ngobo. Shemaia owundi ku Balevi, eyali mutabane wa Nethaneli era nga mughandiisi, yaabaghandiika mu nkalala nga bano boonaboona babona: Kyabazinga mwene, n'abakungu, ni Zadoki kabona, ni Ahimeleki mutabane wa Abiathari, n'abakulu b'enda dha bakabona n'edha Balevi." 
1Chronicles24:7 Agho akalulu akaasooka (1) kaagwa ku Yehoaribu, akokubiri (2) kaagwa ku Yedaia," 
1Chronicles24:8 akokusatu (3) kaagwa ku Harimu, akokuna (4) kaagwa ku Seorimu," 
1Chronicles24:9 akokutaanu (5) kaagwa ku Malikiya, akomukaaga (6) kaagwa ku Miyamini," 
1Chronicles24:10 akomusanvu (7) kaagwa ku Hakkozi, akomunaana (8) kaagwa ku Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 akomwenda (9) kaagwa ku Yeshua, akeikumi (10) kaagwa ku Shekania," 
1Chronicles24:12 akeikumi n'akalala (11) kaagwa ku Eliashibu, akeikumi n'obubiri (12) kaagwa ku Yakimu," 
1Chronicles24:13 akeikumi n'obusatu (13) kaagwa ku Huppa, akeikumi n'obuna (14) kaagwa ku Yeshebeabu," 
1Chronicles24:14 akeikumi n'obutaanu (15) kaagwa ku Biliga, akeikumi n'omukaaga (16) kaagwa ku Immeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 akeikumi n'omusanvu (17) kaagwa ku Heziri, akeikumi n'omunaana (18) kaagwa ku Happizzezi," 
1Chronicles24:16 akeikumi n'omwenda (19) kaagwa ku Pethahia, akamakumi abiri (20) kaagwa ku Yehezikeli," 
1Chronicles24:17 akamakumi abiri n'akalala (21) kaagwa ku Yakini, akamakumi abiri n'obubiri (22) kaagwa ku Gamuli," 
1Chronicles24:18 akamakumi abiri n'obusatu (23) kaagwa ku Delaia, ate akamakumi abiri n'obuna (24) kaagwa ku Maazia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Eyo n'engeri ye baabaghaamu omulimo ogw'okujanga mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, bakolenga omulimo ogw'okugheereza, dhaadha waibwe Aaroni gwe yabateeragho ng'ajiira ku kiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles24:20 Bano n'abakulu b'enda abandi abaasimuka mu Levi: Yehedeia eyasimuka mu Shubaeli, ate nga Shubaeli oyo yasimuka mu Amuramu." 
1Chronicles24:21 Issihia eyasimuka mu Rehabia," 
1Chronicles24:22 Yahathi eyasimuka mu Shelomithi, ate nga Shelomithi oyo yasimuka mu Izahara," 
1Chronicles24:23 batabane ba Heburoni bano: Yeria nga n'omukulu, kwairaku Amaria, kwairaku Yahazi, ate ku oyo kwairaku Yekameamu," 
1Chronicles24:24 Shamiri eyasimuka mu Mika, ate nga Mika oyo yasimuka mu Uzzieli," 
1Chronicles24:25 Zekaria muganda wa Mika, nga yasimuka mu Issihia eyasimuka mu Uzzieli," 
1Chronicles24:26 Mahuli, Mushi, ni Yaazia, abaasimuka mu Merari." 
1Chronicles24:27 Yaazia oyo yazaala abaana bano: Beno, Shohamu, Zakkuri, ni Ibiri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Eleazari ataazaalaku mwana mulenzi, yasimuka mu Mahuli." 
1Chronicles24:29 Aye Kishi, nga yeena mutabane wa Mahuli, yazaala omwana omulenzi, nga ni Yerahameeli." 
1Chronicles24:30 Ate Mushi yaazaala abaana bano: Mahuli, Ederi, ni Yeremothi. Abo n'abaasimuka mu Levi ng'enda dha baiseibwe bwe dhaali." 
1Chronicles24:31 Era abo baakola nga Balevi banaibwe abaasimuka mu Aaroni bwe baakola eira, nga kiisi mukulu wa nda ni muganda we omuto bakuba akalulu. Ekyo baakikola mu maiso ga kyabazinga Daudi, nga Zadoki ni Ahimeleki boona baligho, ghalala n'abakulu b'enda dha bakabona n'edha Balevi." 
1Chronicles25:1 Daudi ng'ali ghalala n'abaakuliranga eby'okusinza, baalonda ab'oku nda edh'Abalevi dhino okulangiriranga obukwenda bwa Musengwa Katonda nga bemba enhembo bwe bakubiraku endingidi, entongooli, n'ebide: ab'oku nda ya Asafu, n'ab'oku ya Hemani, n'ab'oku ya Yeduthuni. Luno n'olukalala olw'abo be baalonda okukola omulimo ogwo nga bajiira ku mirimo gye baali baja okukolanga:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Mu bantu abaasimuka mu Asafu, baalondamu bano: Zakkuri, Yosefu, Nethania, ni Asharela. Asafu n'eyakulemberanga batabane be abo, baalangiriranga obukwenda bwa Musengwa Katonda, nga kyabazinga bwe yabalagiranga." 
1Chronicles25:3 Mu bantu abaasimuka mu Yeduthuni, baalondamu batabane ba Yeduthuni oyo omukaaga bano: Gedalia, Zeri, Yeshaia, Shimei, Hashabia, ni Mattithia. Iseibwe oyo Yeduthuni n'eyakulemberanga, baalangiriranga obukwenda bwa Musengwa Katonda, nga bemba enhembo edh'okumwebaza n'okumusaaka nga bwe bakubiraku endingidi." 
1Chronicles25:4 Mu bantu abaasimuka mu Hemani, baalondamu batabane ba Hemani oyo bano: Bukkia, Mattania, Uzzieli, Shebueli, Yerimothi, Hanania, Hanani, Eliatha, Gaddaliti, Romamutiezeri, Yoshibekasha, Mallothi, Hothiri, ni Mahaziothi." 
1Chronicles25:5 Katonda yagha Hemani oyo abaana abalenzi eikumi n'abana abo boonaboona era yaamugha n'abaghala basatu, olw'okumugheesa ekitiibwa nga bwe yamusuubiza. Hemani oyo n'eyaghanga kyabazinga amagezi ku bigema ku Katonda," 
1Chronicles25:6 era n'eyakulemberanga batabane abo mu nhembo edh'omu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, nga bakubiraku ebide, endingidi n'entongooli. Asafu, Yeduthuni, ni Hemani, baakolanga nga kyabazinga bwe yabalagiranga." 
1Chronicles25:7 Abo boonaboona aghalala ni Balevi banaibwe abaatendekebwa ni baba abakugu mu by'okwembera Musengwa Katonda, baali ebikumi bibiri na kinaana na munaana (288)." 
1Chronicles25:8 Boonaboona abo baabakubiranga bululu okubalonda okubagha emirimo, k'abe omukulu oba omuto, omukugu oba omwega." 
1Chronicles25:9 Mu b'oku nda ya Asafu akalulu akaasooka kaagwa ku Yosefu. Akokubiri kaagwa ku Gedalia, ni baganda be, era ni batabane be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:10 Akokusatu kaagwa ku Zakkuri, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:11 Akokuna kaagwa ku Iziri, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:12 Akokutaanu kaagwa ku Nethania, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:13 Akomukaaga kaagwa ku Bukkia, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:14 Akomusanvu kaagwa ku Yesharela, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:15 Akomunaana kaagwa ku Yeshaia, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:16 Akomwenda kaagwa ku Mattania, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:17 Akeikumi kaagwa ku Shimei, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:18 Akeikumi n'akalala kaagwa ku Shimei, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:19 Akeikumi n'obubiri kaagwa ku Hashabia, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:20 Akeikumi n'obusatu kaagwa ku Shubaeli, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:21 Akeikumi n'obuna kaagwa ku Mattithia, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:22 Akeikumi n'obutaanu kaagwa ku Yerimothi, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:23 Akeikumi n'omukaaga kaagwa ku Hanania, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:24 Akeikumi n'omusanvu kaagwa ku Yoshibekasha, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:25 Akeikumi n'omunaana kaagwa ku Hanani, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:26 Akeikumi n'omwenda kaagwa ku Mallothi, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:27 Akamakumi abiri kaagwa ku Eliatha, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:28 Akamakumi abiri n'akalala kaagwa ku Hothiri, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:29 Akamakumi abiri n'obubiri kaagwa ku Giddaluti, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:30 Akamakumi abiri n'obusatu kaagwa ku Mahaziothi, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:31 Ate akamakumi abiri n'obuna kaagwa ku Romamti Ezera, ni batabane be, era ni baganda be, boonaboona aghalala baaba abantu ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles26:1 Bano n'abaali abakuumi b'emiryango gy'eisinzizo: Mu bantu abaasimuka mu Kora, mwalimu Meshelemia mutabane wa Kore ow'oku nda ya Asafu." 
1Chronicles26:2 Meshelemia oyo yazaala abaana abalenzi bano: Zekaria nga n'omuberi, kwairaku Yediaeli, kwairaku Zebadia, kwairaku Yathinieli," 
1Chronicles26:3 kwairaku Elamu, kwairaku Yehohanani, memale kwairaku Eliehoenai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Ghaabaagho ni Obededomu, Katonda ye yagha enkabi n'azaala abaana abalenzi bano: Shemaia nga n'omuberi, kwairaku Yehozabadi, kwairaku Yoa, kwairaku Sakari, kwairaku Nethaneli," 
1Chronicles26:5 kwairaku Ammieli, kwairaku Issakari, memale kwairaku Peullethai." 
1Chronicles26:6 Shemaia mutabane wa Obededomu oyo, yeena yaazaala abaana abalenzi abaali abafuzi b'abantu ab'oku nda dha baiseibwe." 
1Chronicles26:7 Batabane ba Shemaia abo ni bano: Othini, Refaeli, Obedi, Elizabadi, ni baganda baibwe abaali abakugu mu kukola emirimo, Elihu ni Semakia." 
1Chronicles26:8 Abo boonaboona baali nga basimuka mu Obededomu, ghalala ni batabane baibwe, ni baganda baibwe. Baali ba maani, nga bakugu mu kukola emirimo era nga boonaboona aghalala bali nkaaga na babiri." 
1Chronicles26:9 Mu ndhu ya Meshelemia mwavaamu batabane be ni baganda be, abakugu mu kukola emirimo, nga baghera ikumi na munaana." 
1Chronicles26:10 Mu Balevi abaasimuka mu Merari, mwalimu Hosa eyazaala abaana abalenzi bano: Shimuri, ise ye yafuula omukulu waire nga ti n'eyali omwana omuberi." 
1Chronicles26:11 Kwairaku Hilikia, kwairaku Tebalia, memale kwairaku Zekaria. Batabane ba Hosa oyo boonaboona aghalala ni baganda be, baali baghera abantu ikumi na basatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Abakuumi b'emiryango baabagaba mu bikunsu bikunsu, baabata mu ngobo edh'okugheereza mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda nga bajiira ku bakulu b'enda dha baiseibwe, ng'oti bwe kyalinga ku Balevi banaibwe abandi." 
1Chronicles26:13 Buli nda, k'ebe nga yalimu abantu kamaala oba batono, baagikubiranga kalulu okubona omulyango gwe banaakuuma." 
1Chronicles26:14 Akalulu ak'okukuumanga omulyango ogw'e buvandhuba, kaagwa ku Shelemia. Ate ak'okukuumanga omulyango ogw'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, kaagwa ku mutabane we Zekaria, eyalinga omuwi w'amagezi omulungi." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obededomu yaalondebwa okukuumanga omulyango ogw'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha lw'e buvandhuba. Ate batabane be baalondebwa okukuumanga eiterekero. 
1Chronicles26:16 Shuppimu ni Hosa baalondebwa okukuumanga omulyango ogw'oku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba, era n'omulyango ogwetebwa Shallekethi oguli ku luguudo oluniinaniina eitale. Bombi abo baakuumanga mu ngobo." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba kwalingaku abakuumi mukaaga buli lunaku ku lw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba kwabangaku bana ni ku lw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba kwona kwabangaku bana, buli lunaku. Eiterekero lyakuumibwanga abantu babiri babiri buli lunaku." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ate okuliiraana n'olukuubo olw'e bugwandhuba, ghaaligho abakuumi bana abaakuumanga ku luguudo, n'abandi babiri abaakuumanga olukuubo lwene." 
1Chronicles26:19 Ebyo n'ebikunsu bye baagabamu abakuumi b'emiryango, abaasimuka mu Kora ni mu Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Abalevi abandi, nga n'omuli ni Ahiya, n'abaakuliranga eiterekero ly'eisinzizo n'amaterekero g'ebintu ebigheereibwayo okuba ebya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles26:21 Ladani, eyali owundi ku baana ba Gereshoni, yasimukamu enda kamaala, nga n'omuli n'eya Yehieli mutabane we." 
1Chronicles26:22 Batabane ba Yehieli oyo, bano: Zethamu ni muganda we Yoeli, n'abaakuliranga amaterekero g'eisinzizo." 
1Chronicles26:23 Mu Balevi abaasimuka mu Amuramu, ni Izahara, ni Heburoni, ni Uzzieli," 
1Chronicles26:24 mwalimu Shebueli ow'oku lulyo lwa Gereshomu mutabane wa Musa, nga n'akulira amaterekero." 
1Chronicles26:25 Shebueli oyo yali n'oluganda ku bantu abaasimuka mu Eliezeri muganda wa Gereshomu. Eliezeri oyo n'eyazaala Rehabia, Rehabia yaazaala Yeshaia, Yeshaia yaazaala Yoramu, Yoramu yaazaala Zikuri, Zikuri yaazaala Shelomothi." 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomothi oyo ni baganda be, n'abaakuliranga amaterekero omwateebwanga ebintu byonabyona ebigheereibwayo okuba ebya Katonda nga bigheebwayo bano: kyabazinga, n'abaakuliranga enda dha baiseibwe, n'abaakuliranga ebikunsu by'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi n'ekikumi ekikumi, era n'abaduumizi mu magye." 
1Chronicles26:27 Ku munhago gwe baanhaganga mu ntalo, baatoolangaku ebintu ebindi baabighaayo ng'ebirabo, ebyakozesebwanga mu kulabirira eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles26:28 Shelomothi oyo ni baganda be, n'abaakuumanga ebintu byonabyona kiisi muntu bye yaghangayo okuba ebya Musengwa Katonda; nga n'omwali n'ebyo Samueli omulanzi, ni kyabazinga Saulo mutabane wa Kishi, ni Abuneri mutabane wa Neri, ni Yoabu mutabane wa Zeruia, bye baaghaayo." 
1Chronicles26:29 Mu Balevi abaasimuka mu Izahara, mwalimu Kenania ni batabane be, abaagheebwa omulimo ogutali gwa mu isinzizo nga gwa kukulira banaibwe na kubalamula." 
1Chronicles26:30 Mu Balevi abaasimuka mu Heburoni, mwalimu Hashabia n'aboluganda lwe ab'amaani, nga baghera lukumi na lusanvu (1,700). Abo baagheebwa omulimo ogw'okulabiriranga Isiraeli mu by'okusinza Musengwa Katonda ni mu kugheereza kyabazinga, mu kiketezo eky'oku luuyi lw'e bugwandhuba bw'omwiga Yorudani." 
1Chronicles26:31 Yeriya n'eyali omukulembeze wa Abalevi boonaboona abaasimuka mu Heburoni, nga bwe baabaghandiika nga bajiira ku nkalala edh'obuzaale bwaibwe oba ku nda dha baiseibwe. Mu mwaka ogwamakumi ana (40) nga Daudi ni kyabazinga, ghaaligho okunoonenkereza okwakolebwa ku Balevi abo abaasimuka mu Heburoni. Kyazuulibwa nga ghaaligho abalwani ab'amaani ab'oku lulyo lwaibwe abaali e Yazeri mu kiketezo ky'e Gileadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Agho Daudi yaalonda Yeriya oyo n'Abalevi abo abaamuliku oluganda, abasaadha abaali ab'amaani era abakulu b'enda dha baiseibwe, nga baghera enkumi ibiri na lusanvu (2,700). Yaabataagho okulabiriranga Abareubeni, n'Abagadi, n'ekitundu ku Bamanasse, mu by'okusinza Katonda n'okugheereza kyabazinga." 
1Chronicles27:1 Luno n'olukalala lw'abakulu b'enda dha baiseibwe, n'abaduumizi b'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi n'ekikumi ekikumi, n'abakungu abaagheerezanga kyabazinga mu bukulembeze mu Isiraeli. Buli mwezi, okumalaku omwaka gwonagwona, ghaabangagho ekikunsu ky'abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000) ekyabanga mu lugobo olw'okugheereza okwo, nga kiriku akikulira:" 
1Chronicles27:2 Yashobeamu mutabane wa Zabadieli n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogusooka, olwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi eina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:3 Yashobeamu oyo yali asimuka mu Perezi, era nga n'akulira abaduumizi boonaboona ab'eigye eryalinga mu lugobo olw'omwezi ogusooka." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dodai mwidhukulu wa Ahohi n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogwokubiri, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:5 Benaia mutabane wa Yehoiada kabona n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogwokusatu, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:6 Oyo nga ni Benaia eyali omulwani ow'amaani, owundi ku bale “Amakumi Asatu” era nga n'eyali omukulu waibwe. Ni mutabane we Ammizabadi yali mukulu mu lugobo lwe." 
1Chronicles27:7 Asaheli muganda wa Yoabu n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogwokuna, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000). Mutabane we Zebadia n'eyamusikira." 
1Chronicles27:8 Shamahuthi mwidhukulu wa Izahara n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogwokutaanu, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:9 Ira mutabane wa Ikkeshi ow'e Tekoa n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogwomukaaga, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:10 Helezi Omuefuraimu ow'e Peloni n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogwomusanvu, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:11 Sibbekai ow'e Husha, asimuka mu Zera, n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogwomunaana, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:12 Abiezeri Omubenjamini ow'e Anathothi n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogwomwenda, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:13 Maharai ow'e Netofa, asimuka mu Zera, n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogweikumi, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:14 Benaia ow'e Pirathoni, asimuka mu Efuraimu, n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogweikumi n'omulala, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:15 Heledai ow'e Netofa, asimuka mu Othinieli, n'eyakuliranga ekikunsu eky'omu lugobo olw'omu mwezi ogweikumi n'ebiri, lwona nga lwalimu abantu emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ina (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:16 Luno n'olukalala olw'abaakuliranga ebika bya Isiraeli: Eliezeri mutabane wa Zikuri n'eyakuliranga ekika ekya Reubeni Sefatia mutabane wa Maaka yaakulira ekya Simeoni 
1Chronicles27:17 Hashabia mutabane wa Kemeuli yaakulira ekya Levi Zadoki yaakulira eky'abaasimuka mu Aaroni 
1Chronicles27:18 Elihu, owundi ku baganda ba kyabazinga Daudi, yaakulira ekya Yuda Omuri mutabane wa Mikaeli yaakulira ekya Issakari" 
1Chronicles27:19 Ishimaia mutabane wa Obadia yaakulira ekya Zebuluni Yeremothi mutabane wa Azarieli yaakulira ekya Nafutali 
1Chronicles27:20 Hoshea mutabane wa Azazia yaakulira ekya Efuraimu Yoeli mutabane wa Pedaia yaakulira ekitundu ku kika ekya Manasse eky'e bugwandhuba 
1Chronicles27:21 Iddo mutabane wa Zekaria yaakulira ekitundu ku kika ekya Manasse eky'e buvandhuba mu Gileadi Yaasieli mutabane wa Abuneri yaakulira ekya Benjamini 
1Chronicles27:22 ate Azareli mutabane wa Yerohamu yaakulira ekya Dani. Abo n'abaali abakulu b'ebika bya Isiraeli. 
1Chronicles27:23 Kyabazinga Daudi tiyabala bantu abakaali okutuusa emyaka amakumi abiri egy'obukulu, kuba Musengwa Katonda yali amaze okusuubiza ng'aja kuleetera Abaisiraeli babe kamaala inho ng'oti n'emuunienie edh'oku igulu." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yoabu mutabane w'omukazi eyayetebwanga Zeruia, yatoolera okubala abantu, aye yaaloba kusobola kumaliriza. Okubala okwo kwaleetera Musengwa Katonda okusungughalira Isiraeli, era omughendo gwe baabala tibaagughandiika mu kitabo eky'Ebyomubyanda bya kyabazinga Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Azimavethi mutabane wa Adieli n'eyalabiriranga amaterekero ga kyabazinga ate Yonathani mutabane wa Uzzia yaalabiriranga amaterekero agandi agaabanga mu biketezo, ni mu bibuga, ni mu byalo, ni mu bisenge ebigumu." 
1Chronicles27:26 Eziri mutabane wa Kelubi n'eyakuliranga abaakolanga ogw'okulima mu nimiro 
1Chronicles27:27 Shimei ow'e Rama yaakuliranga amasamba g'emizabbibu ate Zabadi ow'e Shifamu yaalabiriranga emizabbibu gye baanoganga mu masamba, okugita mu bikunhiro by'omwenge." 
1Chronicles27:28 Baalihanani ow'e Gederi n'eyalabiriranga emiti emyoliva n'emisikamore mu biketezo eby'omu biiko ate Yoashi yaakuliranga amaterekero ge baatangamu omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva 
1Chronicles27:29 Shiturai ow'e Sharoni n'eyalabiriranga ente dhe baayayiranga mu Sharoni ate Shafati mutabane wa Adulai yaalabiriranga ente edhaabanga mu biiko. 
1Chronicles27:30 Obili Omuishimaeli n'eyalabiriranga engamiya Yehedeia ow'e Meronothi yaalabiriranga endogoyi 
1Chronicles27:31 ate Yazizi Omuhagari yaalabiriranga entaama n'embuzi. Abo boonaboona n'abaalabiriranga ebintu bya kyabazinga Daudi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonathani, muganda wa lata wa Daudi, yali muwi wa magezi, nga musaadha mutegeevu era nga mumanhi inho mu by'amateeka. Yonathani oyo ni Yehieli mutabane wa Hakimoni, n'abaalabiriranga batabane ba kyabazinga." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahithofeli yali muwi wa magezi wa kyabazinga, ate Hushai Omuaraki yaaba mukagwa wa kyabazinga." 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahithofeli bwe yavaagho, Abiathari ni Yehoiada mutabane wa Benaia baira mu kifo kye. Yoabu n'eyali omuduumizi w'eigye lya kyabazinga." 
1Chronicles28:1 Kyabazinga Daudi yaalagira abakungu boonaboona mu Isiraeli okwesoloza. Kale bano beesololeza e Yerusalemu: abakulu b'ebika, n'abakulira ebikunsu ebyagheerezanga kyabazinga, n'abaduumizi b'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi n'ekikumi ekikumi, n'abaalabiriranga ebintu n'ebyayo bya kyabazinga ni batabane be, ghalala n'abakungu b'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, era n'abaisirukale boonaboona ab'amaani." 
1Chronicles28:2 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaayemerera, yaakoba ati: “Muwulire bye nkoba, imwe baganda bange era bantu bange. Nayenda inho okuzimbira Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda endhu mw'enaabanga, kibenga ekifo Katonda waife mw'afugira. Era nali ntegeike okuzimba," 
1Chronicles28:3 aye Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Busa, otanzimbira isinzizo, kuba iwe oli mulwani wa ntalo era wayugha omusaayi gw'abantu.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 Aye ate mu b'oku nda ya lata wange boonaboona, Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli ninze ye yalondamu okuba kyabazinga wa Isiraeli oyo ebyanda n'ebyanda. Mu nda edh'abaasimuka mu Yuda, yalondamu enda ya lata wange. Ate mu baana ba lata wange, yaasiimamu nze okunfuula kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yoonayoona." 
1Chronicles28:5 Musengwa Katonda oyo yampa abaana kamaala era mu batabane bange boonaboona, yaalondamu Solomoni okutyama ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli, Musengwa Katonda mwene oyo bwe yataagho." 
1Chronicles28:6 “Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Mutabane wo Solomoni n'alinzimbira eisinzizo ghalala n'empya dhange, kuba namulonda abe mutabane wange, nze mbe lata we." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ndidha kuleeteranga obwakyabazinga bwe okukakata ebyanda n'ebyanda, bw'anaafubanga okugondera amateeka gange n'ebiragiro byange nga bw'ali kukola mpegaano.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 “Kale ni bantu bange, mu maiso g'abantu ba Musengwa Katonda Abaisiraeli abeesoloiza, mbasikirira nga ni Katonda waife awulira, nti: Mwisengayo inho omwoyo okugondera ebiragiro byonabyona ebya Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mughange okusigala nga mukaali beene nsi eno enkalamu, mugirekere abaana baimwe n'abaidhukulu abanaabaiririranga, ebenga yaibwe ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
1Chronicles28:9 Agho yaakoba Solomoni ati: “Era iwe mwana wange Solomoni, manhanga Katonda wange nze lata wo, omugheerezenga n'omwoyo mulala aghazira kusagansagana, kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo ayagaaza yaazuula ebiri mu myoyo gy'abantu era yaategeera bye bategeike okukola byonabyona. Bw'onaamunoonianga, oidha kumuzuulanga. Aye bw'onaamuvangaku, aidhanga kukulekulira agho ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
1Chronicles28:10 Kale ni ogwaine okimanhe nga Musengwa Katonda akulonze okuzimba endhu ey'okusinzizaamu. Kale omulimo ogwo gukole n'obumalirivu.” 
1Chronicles28:11 Agho Daudi yaagha mutabane we Solomoni entegeka ey'enzimba y'eisinzizo nga bw'eja okuba: ekisasi kyaku, n'endhu dhaaku, n'amaterekero gaaku, n'ebisenge byaku ebya ghaigulu, n'ebisenge byaku eby'omunda, n'Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho ekisoniyirwamu ebibi." 
1Chronicles28:12 Yaamugha n'entegeka ey'enzimba y'ebyo byonabyona bye yayenda okuzimbira ku isinzizo eryo: empya dhaaku, n'ebimante ebyezungulwire empya edho, n'amaterekero g'ebintu eby'okukozesanga mu isinzizo, n'ago ag'okutangamu ebintu ebigheereibwayo okuba ebya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles28:13 Era yaamugha entegeka yoonayoona ey'engobo dha bakabona n'Abalevi, n'entegeka ey'omulimo gwonagwona ogw'okugheereza mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, n'ey'ebintu byonabyona eby'okukozesanga mu isinzizo eryo." 
1Chronicles28:14 Yaamugha n'obuzito bwa zaabu ni feeza ow'okukolamu ebintu byonabyona ebya zaabu ni feeza eby'okukozesanga ku buli mulimo 
1Chronicles28:15 n'obuzito bwa zaabu ow'okukolamu buli kikondo kya ntaala ghalala n'entaala dhaaku, nga bajiira ku mirimo ebintu ebyo gye bikola" 
1Chronicles28:16 n'obuzito bwa zaabu ow'okukolamu buli meeza ey'okutangaku emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda, n'obwa feeza ow'okukolamu meeza edha feeza." 
1Chronicles28:17 Yaamugha n'obuzito bwa zaabu omukenenule ow'okukolamu ebyuma eby'amaino ng'oti wuuma, n'ow'okukolamu ebibya n'ebikopo n'obuzito bwa zaabu n'obwa feeza ow'okukolamu entamu" 
1Chronicles28:18 n'obuzito bwa zaabu omukenenule ow'okukolamu alutaari ey'okuniokezangaku obubbaani, n'ow'okukolamu ekigaali eky'okutaaku ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa bikerubi, ebyandhuluza amaghagha gaabyo okughemba Esanduuku y'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles28:19 Kyabazinga Daudi yaakoba ati: “Ebyo byonabyona biri mu ntegeka eyaghandiikibwa ng'ejiira ku biragiro ebyo, Musengwa Katonda mwene bye yandagira okutuukiriza.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Agho Daudi yaakoba mutabane we Solomoni ati: “Guma omwoyo obe mumalirivu, okole omulimo ogwo. Otatyanga era otawangamu maani, kuba Musengwa Katonda wange ali ghalala n'iwe. Talikuvaaku, waire okukulekulira agho, aidha kubanga ghalala n'iwe akusobozese okumaliriza omulimo gwonagwona ogw'okukola ku isinzizo lye." 
1Chronicles28:21 Bakabona n'Abalevi baabo bamaze okugheebwa emirimo gyonagyona gye banaakolanga mu ngobo mu isinzizo. Abakozi abali n'obumanhirivu obw'okukola kiisi mulimo baligho era beetegefu okukola. N'abakulembeze boona, ghalala n'abantu boonaboona baidha kugonderanga by'onaabalagiranga.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaakoba abaali beesoloiza ati: “Mutabane wange Solomoni Katonda y'alonzeemu akaali mwana muto, ate nga omulimo oguli n'okukolebwa mukologho inho kuba kino ti kisaagaati kya bwakyabazinga bwa bantu buntu, aye isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
1Chronicles29:2 Kale kye nviire ni nfuba nga bwe nsoboire, ni ntaagho ebintu byonabyona eby'okuzimbisa eisinzizo lya Katonda wange, bino: zaabu ow'okukolamu ebintu ebya zaabu, ni feeza ow'okukolamu ebintu ebya feeza, n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo eky'okukolamu ebintu eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, n'ekyuma ekigumu einho eky'okukolamu ebintu eby'ekyuma ekigumu einho, n'emiti egy'okukolamu ebintu eby'emiti, n'amabaale ag'omughendo ageetebwa onikisi, n'agandi ag'okuzimbisa, n'ag'okudholigadholiga, n'agandi ag'omughendo agamirimiinha ag'ensambo kamaala." 
1Chronicles29:3 Era nhongereiza ku ebyo bye nteereiregho eisinzizo, naaghaayo zaabu ni feeza nga ntoola ku by'obukombe ebyange ku bwange, olw'okuba ngonza inho eisinzizo lya Katonda wange eryo." 
1Chronicles29:4 Mpaireyo talanta enkumi isatu (3,000) edha zaabu omukenenule ow'e Ofiri, naaghaayo ni talanta kasanvu (7,000) edha feeza nga yeena mukenenule, ow'okulimbya ku bimante by'eisinzizo," 
1Chronicles29:5 n'okukolamu ebintu byonabyona ebya zaabu n'ebya feeza, abagheesi bye balikola. Kale ni olwaleero luno, naani owundi omwetegefu okwevaamu ekyeyendere, okubaaku by'aghaayo bibe ebya Musengwa Katonda?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Agho abakulu b'enda dha baiseibwe, n'abakulu b'ebika, n'abaduumizi b'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi n'ab'ekikumi ekikumi, n'abo abaalabiriranga emirimo gya kyabazinga, baaghaayo ebigheebwayo eby'ekyeyendere," 
1Chronicles29:7 Edho ni kilo ng'oti kinaana na itaanu (85), kuba “dariki” olw'omulimo gw'eisinzizo: talanta enkumi itaanu (5,000) edha zaabu, n'ebidhegedhege ebya zaabu ebyetebwa dariki omutwalo mulala (10,000), n'ebindi ebya feeza omutwalo mulala (10,000) ni talanta omutwalo mulala na kanaana (18,000) edh'ekyuma eky'ekikomo ni talanta emitwalo ikumi (100,000) edh'ekyuma ekigumu einho." 
1Chronicles29:8 Abo abaali n'amabaale ag'omughendo, baagaghaayo mu iterekero ly'eisinzizo eryali lirabirirwa Yehieli eyasimuka mu Gereshoni." 
1Chronicles29:9 Agho abantu baasagamba olw'abo abaaghaayo ku byaibwe eri Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo omulala ekyeyendere. Kyabazinga Daudi yeena yaasagamba inho. 
1Chronicles29:10 Agho kyabazinga Daudi yaasaaka Musengwa Katonda ng'abantu boonaboona abeesoloiza bali agho. Yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda wa dhaadha waife Isiraeli, ogwaine osaakibwenga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
1Chronicles29:11 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe omukologho, ow'obuyinza, ow'ekitiisa, omughanguzi era omufuzi kuba byonabyona ebiri mu igulu n'ebiri mu nsi, bibyo iwe Musengwa Katonda. Niiwe kyabazinga ali ghaigulu gh'ebintu byonabyona." 
1Chronicles29:12 Niiwe ogaba obukombe n'ekitiibwa. Niiwe ow'amaani n'obuyinza, afuga ebintu byonabyona, era aleetera abantu okuba abakologho, era ab'amaani." 
1Chronicles29:13 Agho ni Katonda waife, ife tukusiima era twasaaka eriina lyo ery'ekitiisa." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Aye nze n'abantu bange katyo niife baani, twena okukoba tuti tughanga okukugha iwe ekintu kyonakyona nga twenda? Byonabyona niiwe obitugha, era ku bibyo by'otugha kwe tutoire okukutonera." 
1Chronicles29:15 Wo Musengwa Katonda, okiidhi bukalamu nga ku nsi kuno ife tuli ng'abatamanhiibwa y'oli, tuli basenze busenze abali mu lugendo, nga badhaadha baife boonaboona bwe baali. Enaku dhaife edh'oku nsi dhibitagho bubite ng'oti kinsense, tidhiraalagho naire." 
1Chronicles29:16 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, ebintu bino byonabyona bye tutairegho okuzimbisa eisinzizo erinaagheesanga eriina lyo eitukuvu ekitiisa, niiwe owabitugha era byonabyona bibyo." 
1Chronicles29:17 Era ndidhi nga iwe Katonda wange oleba omwoyo gw'omuntu, waasangaalira omwesimbu. Zeena ni mpaireyo ebintu bino byonabyona kyeyendere n'omwoyo omwesimbu. Era mperaano mboine abantu bo abali ghano nga baleeta y'oli ebigheebwayo ekyeyendere era nga basangaavu." 
1Chronicles29:18 Wo Musengwa Katonda wa badhaadha baife, Aburahamu, Isaaka, ni Isiraeli, kuumanga buliidho enkola ey'okwevaamu eri ng'oti n'eyo mu bantu bo, era okuumenga emyoyo gyaibwe nga gigumiire ku iwe." 
1Chronicles29:19 Nkweghemba oghe mutabane wange Solomoni omwoyo ogw'okwegheerayo irala okugema amateeka go ni by'olagira byonabyona, n'okuzimba eisinzizo, lye nteereiregho ebintu ebyo.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Agho Daudi yaakoba abantu boonaboona abaali beesoloiza ati: “Musaake Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda waimwe.” Kale abantu boonaboona abaali beesoloiza baasaaka Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe. Baakuba amakiryaivu era baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka, baasinza Musengwa Katonda era baagha ni kyabazinga ekitiibwa." 
1Chronicles29:21 Baaghaayo emisengo eri Musengwa Katonda, era ku lunaku olwairirira baaghaayo emisengo egyokebwa gyonagyona okuwaagho: ente enume lukumi (1,000), n'entaama enume lukumi (1,000), n'entaama ento lukumi (1,000), n'ebigheebwayo eby'okunhwa ebijiiraku, n'emisengo egindi kamaala, gye baaghaayo ku lwa Isiraeli yoonayoona." 
1Chronicles29:22 Ku lunaku olwo baaliira era baanhwera mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, nga basagamba ebitaloodheka. Agho bairamu okulangirira Solomoni mutabane wa Daudi okuba kyabazinga, baamusiiga omuzigo abafugenga mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda, ni Zadoki abenga kabona." 
1Chronicles29:23 Kale Solomoni yaatyama ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga Musengwa Katonda kye yataagho, yaaba kyabazinga mu kifo kya lata we Daudi. Ebintu byajiiranga Solomoni oyo bukalamu, era eighanga Isiraeli lyamugonderanga." 
1Chronicles29:24 Abakungu boonaboona, n'abaisirukale, ni batabane ba kyabazinga Daudi abandi boonaboona, beeyama okugonderanga kyabazinga Solomoni." 
1Chronicles29:25 Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera Isiraeli yoonayoona okugha Solomoni ekitiibwa eky'obwakyabazinga, ekitabangaghooku ku kyabazinga wundi yeenayeena eyaali afuzeeku mu Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles29:26 Daudi mutabane wa Yesse yafuga Isiraeli yoonayoona 
1Chronicles29:27 okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi ana (40). Yafugira mu Heburoni emyaka musanvu, ni mu Yerusalemu emyaka amakumi asatu n'esatu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Yaafa ng'aghangaire inho, nga mukaire mwenemwene, nga mukombe, era nga wa kitiibwa. Mutabane we Solomoni yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
1Chronicles29:29 Byonabyona kyabazinga Daudi bye yakola, okuviira irala ku kyasooka okutuukira irala ku kyasembayo, biri mu bighandiiko by'abalanzi, Samueli, ni Nathani, ni Gadi." 
1Chronicles29:30 Ebighandiiko ebyo byogera ku bufuzi bwe nga bwe bwali, n'amaani ge yali nago, n'ebintu byonabyona ebyamutuukaku n'ebyatuuka ku Isiraeli, ni ku bwakyabazinga bwonabwona obw'ensi edhiriiraine agho." 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomoni mutabane wa Daudi yaakakata mu bufuzi mu bwakyabazinga bwe, era Musengwa Katonda we yaabanga ghalala naye, yaamufuula omukologho einho." 
2Chronicles1:2 Agho Solomoni oyo yaalagira abaduumizi ab'ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi n'ekikumi ekikumi, n'abalamuzi, n'abakulembeze boonaboona mu Isiraeli, era n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona." 
2Chronicles1:3 Abantu abo boonaboona abeesoloza, yaaja nabo mu kifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu ekyali e Gibeoni kuba mu kifo ekyo n'omwali Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda oyo gye yakolera mu irungu." 
2Chronicles1:4 Aye Esanduuku ey'Endagaano yali mu Yerusalemu, nga bagikuumira mu kifo Daudi kye yagitegekera, bwe yagitoola e Kiriathi Yearimu." 
2Chronicles1:5 Ate alutaari ey'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, Bezaleli mutabane wa Uri era mwidhukulu wa Huri ye yakola, yoona yali e Gibeoni emberi w'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda. Kyabazinga Solomoni n'abantu boonaboona baasinziza eyo Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomoni oyo yaaniinaniina, yaaja yaaghaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, nga buli kigheebwayo kyokebwa kyonakyona okuwaagho ku alutaari eyo ey'ekyuma eky'ekikomo. Yaaghaayo ensolo lukumi (1,000)." 
2Chronicles1:7 Obwire obwo Katonda yaabonekera Solomoni, yaamukoba ati: “Saba ky'oyenda nkughe.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomoni yaakoba ati: “Buliidho obairenga ng'oyoleka nga bw'ogonza einho obutalekera lata wange Daudi, era mpegaano ondhikiriiza okumusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles1:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, tuukiriza kye wasuubiza lata wange. Nga bw'onfiire kyabazinga w'abantu abangi ng'oti n'enkungu eri ku nsi," 
2Chronicles1:10 nkusaba ompe amagezi n'okumanha, nsobole okukulembera abantu bano kuba naani asobola okufuga eighanga lyo lino eikologho liti?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Agho Katonda yaakoba Solomoni ati: “Nga bw'olowooziiza ku ekyo, n'oteesabira kufuna bukombe, oba ebintu, oba ekitiibwa, oba okuzikiriza abazigu bo, oba okughangaala, aye ni weesabira amagezi n'okumanha, osobole okufuganga abantu bange be nakugemya obe kyabazinga waibwe," 
2Chronicles1:12 kale amagezi n'okumanha by'osabye mbikughaire. Era ndidha kukugha obukombe, n'ebintu, n'ekitiibwa, nga tighabangaghooku kyabazinga owundi yeenayeena ku baakusooka eyaali abifunieku, waire okubaagho kyabazinga owundi yeenayeena alikwiririra alibifuna.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Agho Solomoni yaava e Gibeoni mu kifo eky'okusinzizaamu aghaali Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, yaira e Yerusalemu yaafugira eyo Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles1:14 Yaasoloza ebigaali eby'omu lutalo n'abavuzi b'embalaasi. Yali n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo lukumi na bina (1,400), n'abavuzi b'embalaasi omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000) abandi yaabata mu bibuga ebikuumirwamu ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, ate abandi yaabata mu Yerusalemu, mwene ye yali." 
2Chronicles1:15 Mu biseera bye, feeza yayala mu Yerusalemu, yaaba mungi ng'oti bwa mabaale. N'emivule gyaba mingi ng'oti miti emisikamore egy'omu biketezo bya Buyudaaya eby'omu biiko." 
2Chronicles1:16 Embalaasi Solomoni dhe yali nadho, yadhiragirizanga kuva mu Misiri ni mu Kue, era abasuubuzi be baadhisasuliranga." 
2Chronicles1:17 Ekigaali eky'omu lutalo ekirala kyagulwanga mu Misiri ku bitundu lukaaga ebya feeza, n'embalaasi endala yaagulwanga ku bitundu kikumi n'ataanu ebya feeza. Bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'Abahitti n'ab'e Siria, baagulanga ebigaali eby'omu lutalo n'embalaasi, ku basuubuzi ba Solomoni abo." 
2Chronicles2:1 Agho Solomoni yaategeka okuzimba eisinzizo ery'okusinzizangamu Musengwa Katonda, era ni mwene okwezimbira ekisaagaati eky'obwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles2:2 Yaataagho abantu emitwalo musanvu (70,000) ab'okubbeedanga ebintu eby'okuzimbisa, n'abandi emitwalo munaana (80,000) ab'okubaadhanga amabaale mu biketezo eby'oku nsozi. Era yaataagho n'abandi enkumi isatu na lukaaga (3,600) ab'okubalabiriranga." 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomoni yaagheereza Hiramu kyabazinga w'e Tiro obukwenda obukoba buti: “Ka ghabeegho enkolagana ninze nga ye wali nayo ni lata wange Daudi, bwe wamugheerezanga emivule gye yazimbisa ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles2:4 Bona, ndi kutegeka okuzimbira Musengwa Katonda wange eisinzizo, okumugheesa ekitiisa. Ndidha kughaayo eisinzizo eryo libe lya Musengwa Katonda oyo olw'okumuniokezangamu obubbaani obuwunha akawoowo, n'okumuteerangamu emigaati egigheereibwayo y'ali, n'okumugheerangamu ebigheebwayo eby'enkyo n'eigulo ebya buli lunaku, n'eby'oku Sabbato, n'eby'oku mbaga edh'Ebibinuko eby'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, n'eby'oku mbaga edh'ebibinuko ebindi ebyateebwagho, nga Musengwa Katonda waife oyo bwe yalagira Abaisiraeli okukolanga olubeerera." 
2Chronicles2:5 Era eisinzizo lye nja okuzimba lija kuba ikologho, kuba Katonda waife mukologho okusinga bakatonda boonaboona." 
2Chronicles2:6 Aye naani asobola okumuzimbira eisinzizo, ate nga n'eigulu lyene erisingayo okuba ghaigulu tirisobola kumumala kubaamu, waire nga inene okwaga agho? Ninze ani asobola okumuzimbira eisinzizo, okutoolaku okumuteeragho ekifo obufo eky'okumuniokezaamu obubbaani?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Kale ni mpeereza omuntu omukugu mu kugheesa ebintu ebya zaabu, n'ebya feeza, n'eby'ekikomo, n'eby'ekyuma ekigumu einho, n'okukola engoye edha langi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi. Era nga mukugu mu kubaadha amabaale, asobole okukoleranga ghalala n'abakozi bange abakugu ghano mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu, lata wange be yataagho." 
2Chronicles2:8 Mpeereza emiti emivule, n'emisipuressi, n'emyalumugi, okuva mu Lebanoni, kuba ndidhi ng'abantu bo bwe baidhi einho okutema emiti eyo mu Lebanoni. Era abantu bange baidha kukolera ghalala n'ababo," 
2Chronicles2:9 bantegekere emiti kamaala, kuba eisinzizo lye nja okuzimba lija kuba ikologho era nga irungi ebitaloodheka." 
2Chronicles2:10 Abantu bo abatema emiti ndidha kubafunira kilo dh'engaano ye bamaze okukuba edhigheza obukaire bubiri n'emitwalo amakumi ana (2,400,000), n'edha sayiri dhoona nga dhigheza kilo obukaire bubiri n'emitwalo amakumi ana (2,400,000), n'elita dh'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu emitwalo amakumi ana (400,000), n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva nga gwona gugheza lita emitwalo amakumi ana (400,000).”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Agho Hiramu kyabazinga w'e Tiro yaaghandiikira Solomoni embaluwa emwiramu ng'ekoba eti: “Musengwa Katonda akufiire kyabazinga w'abantu be, lwa kuba agonza inho abantu be abo." 
2Chronicles2:12 Agho ni Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa Isiraeli asaakibwe, eyatonda eigulu n'ensi, era aghaire Daudi omwana ategeera era ow'amagezi amangi, aidha okuzimbira Musengwa Katonda oyo eisinzizo, ni mwene yeezimbire ekisaagaati eky'obwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles2:13 Mperaano ndi kukugheereza omuntu omugezi ayetebwa Huramu. 
2Chronicles2:14 Inhina wa mu kika kya Dani, ate lata we yaaba omutyamye w'e Tiro. Huramu oyo mukugu mu kugheesa ebintu bya zaabu, n'ebya feeza, n'eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, n'eby'ekyuma ekigumu einho. Era mukugu mu kubaadha amabaale n'emiti, ni mu kukola ebintu mu ngoye edh'erangi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, n'empegheevu. Era mukugu mu kukola ogw'okutona ku bintu, n'okukola omusono gwonagwona gwe baba bamughaire. Wuuyo mmukugheereiza akolere ghalala n'abantu bo abakugu, abaakoleranga musengwa wange, lata wo Daudi." 
2Chronicles2:15 Kale ni tugheereze engaano, ni sayiri, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, bye wasuubiza." 
2Chronicles2:16 Twidha kutema emiti gyonagyona gye weetaaga okuva mu Lebanoni, tugisibe mu binhwa, tugite ku nhandha giseeyeeye okutuuka e Yoppa. Eyo y'oligitoolera okugitwala e Yerusalemu.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Agho Solomoni yaalagira okubala abasenze boonaboona abaali mu Isiraeli, ng'oti ni lata we Daudi bwe yakola. Abasenze abo baagheramu emitwalo ikumi n'etaanu n'enkumi isatu na lukaaga (153,600)." 
2Chronicles2:18 Ku abo, yaatoolaku emitwalo musanvu (70,000) yaabata ku gw'okubbeedanga ebintu eby'okuzimbisa, n'abandi emitwalo munaana (80,000) yaabata ku gw'okubaadhanga amabaale mu biketezo eby'oku nsozi. Ate abandi enkumi isatu na lukaaga (3,600) yaabata ku gw'okulabiriranga abantu abo." 
2Chronicles3:1 Kyabazinga Daudi, lata wa Solomoni, yali yamala ira okutegeka ekifo eky'okuzimbamu eisinzizo. Ekifo ekyo kyali mu Yerusalemu ku lusozi Moria, Musengwa Katonda ye yamubonekera. Ekifo ekyo, Arunani Omuyebusi kye yakubirangamu engaano." 
2Chronicles3:2 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaatoolera okuzimba mu mwezi ogwokubiri ogw'omwaka ogwokuna kasookanga afuuka kyabazinga. 
2Chronicles3:3 Eisinzizo kyabazinga Solomoni oyo lye yazimbira Katonda lyali mita amakumi abiri na musanvu mu buleeyi, ate mu bugazi lyaba mita mwenda." 
2Chronicles3:4 Baalizimbaku ekisasi emberi waalyo nga kya bugazi bwa mita mwenda okwagayaga n'obugazi bw'eisinzizo eryo, ate nga mu bugungumavu kya mita amakumi ataanu na ina. Munda ku bimante, baalimbyaku zaabu omukenenule." 
2Chronicles3:5 Ekisenge ekinene baakighembaku embaawo edh'emiti emisipuressi, ate ku ngulu kwadho baalimbyaku zaabu omukenenule era baatonaku ebifaananie eby'emiti eminaazi n'eby'endhegere." 
2Chronicles3:6 Baatonatona eisinzizo n'amabaale ag'omughendo, era baalitonatona ni zaabu eyava mu nsi y'Abaparavi." 
2Chronicles3:7 Baalimbya zaabu oyo ku bimante byalyo, ni ku mbaawo edh'akasolya kaalyo, ni ku myango egy'emiryango gyalyo, ni ku ndhigi dhaalyo. Era ku bimante byalyo ebyo yaatonaku ebifaananie eby'ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi." 
2Chronicles3:8 Baazimba ekisenge eky'omunda ekyetebwa Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho, nga mu buleeyi kiri mita mwenda ate ni mu bugazi mwona kyaba mita mwenda nga kyagayaga n'eisinzizo eryo mu bugazi. Baalimbya ku bimante by'Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho ekyo zaabu omukenenule agheza talanta lukaaga (600)." 
2Chronicles3:9 Okukola emisumaali kwatwala zaabu agheramu obuzito bwa guraamu ebikumi bitaanu na nsanvu (570). Era ebimante ebya ghaigulu byona baabirimbyaku zaabu. 
2Chronicles3:10 Yaakola ebifaananie eby'ebitonde bibiri ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi, yaabita mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho. Yaabikola nga bya muti, era byombi yaabirimbyaku zaabu, yaabibunia." 
2Chronicles3:11 Amaghagha ga bikerubi ebyo byombi gaakolebwa nga mandhuluze, era nga gagheza mita mwenda mu buleeyi. Eighagha eirala erya kikerubi ekisooka lyali ligheza mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri mu buleeyi, era nga lituuka ku kimante ky'eisinzizo ku luuyi olundi. Ate eighagha lyakyo eryokubiri nga lyona ligheza mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri, lyagema ku ighagha eirala erya kikerubi ekyokubiri, lyona eryali nga ligheza mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri mu buleeyi." 
2Chronicles3:12 Ate eighagha eryokubiri erya kikerubi ekyo ekyokubiri, lyona nga ligheza mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri mu buleeyi era lyatuuka ku kimante ky'eisinzizo ku luuyi olundi." 
2Chronicles3:13 Amaghagha ga bikerubi ebyo byombi geeyandhuluza mu bugazi bwa mita mwenda, era byayemerera nga biringiriire mu ekisenge ky'eisinzizo ekya ghagati." 
2Chronicles3:14 Agho baakola olutimbe olw'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, mu ngoye edh'erangi ya bbululu, n'edh'eya nakasooma, n'edh'eya kasaayisaayi, n'empegheevu. Era olutimbe olwo baalutonatonamu ebifaananie bya bikerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Emberi gh'eisinzizo baakoleragho empango ibiri, nga dhigheza mita ikumi na itaanu obuleeyi, era nga buli ndala eriku omutwe ogugheza emita eibiri n'obutundu obubiri mu buleeyi." 
2Chronicles3:16 Buli mutwe ogwali ku buli mpango, yaagukoleraku ebifaananie eby'endhegere edhirukiibwa ng'oti katimba, n'ebifaananie by'emikomamawanga kikumi." 
2Chronicles3:17 Baasimba empango edho dhombi gha kisasi ky'eisinzizo, eyindi ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, ate eyindi ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba baagituuma eriina Yakini, ate ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba baagituuma eriina Boazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Kyabazinga Solomoni yaakola alutaari ey'ekyuma ky'ekikomo, ng'endhuyi dhaayo eina dhaagayaga, era nga dhigheza mita mwenda buli luuyi, ate obugungumavu ng'egheza mita ina n'ekitundu." 
2Chronicles4:2 Era yaasaanuusa ekyuma eky'ekikomo, yaakolamu tanka ey'amaadhi eneetooloovu. Yali egheza mita ina n'obutundu buna mu bukiika, okuva ku mugo gwayo ogw'oluuyi olundi okutuuka ku gw'olundi. Era nga mu bugungumavu egheza mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri, ate yaagheza mita ikumi na isatu n'obutundu bubiri okugyezunguluza." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ghansi gh'omugo ogw'etanka eyo okugyezunguluza, ghaaligho enhiriri ibiri edhaakolerwa aghalala nayo, nga dhiriku ebifaananie eby'amabuga, era nga dhigheza mita ikumi na isatu n'ekitundu okwezunguluza tanka eyo." 
2Chronicles4:4 Etanka eyo yatyamizibwa ku bifaananie by'ente enume ikumi na ibiri ebyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo. Ebifaananie ebyo byali biti: ebisatu nga biringiriire ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, n'ebisatu ebindi ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba, n'ebisatu ebindi ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, ate ebisatu ebisigairegho byalingirira ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba, nga birinzagainia emikira." 
2Chronicles4:5 Omubiri ogw'etanka eyo gwali gugheza milimita nsanvu na itaanu obunene. Omugo gwayo gwakolebwa ng'ogw'ekibya era ng'oti n'ekimuli ekyetebwa liri. Etanka eyo yali ejaamu lita emitwalo ng'oti mukaaga (60,000)." 
2Chronicles4:6 Era yaakola ebenseni ikumi: eitaanu yaadhita ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'eisinzizo, ate eitaanu edhisigairegho yaadhita ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba waalyo. Ebenseni edho nga dha kunaakizangamu bye bakozesa mu bigheebwayo ebyokebwa. Amaadhi agaabanga mu tanka, nga ga bakabona ga kunaabisa." 
2Chronicles4:7 Yaakola ebikondo by'entaala ikumi mu zaabu, mu nsambo ye byali nga biri n'okukolebwa, yaabita mu isinzizo: ebitaanu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'eisinzizo eryo, n'ebitaanu ebindi ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba waalyo." 
2Chronicles4:8 Yaakola n'emeeza ikumi yaadhita mu isinzizo: eitaanu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'eisinzizo eryo, n'eitaanu edhindi ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba waalyo. Yaakola n'ebibya kikumi mu zaabu." 
2Chronicles4:9 Yaakola oluya olwa bakabona, era n'oluya olukologho. Endhigi edh'oku mulyango ogwali ghagati gh'empya edho dhombi yaadhirimbyaku ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
2Chronicles4:10 Etanka yaagita mu nsonda ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'eisinzizo, aye nga weekubiireku e buvandhuba." 
2Chronicles4:11 Huramu era yaakola ensugha, n'ebitiiyo, n'ebenseni. Mu nsambo eyo, yaamaliriza omulimo gwonagwona gwe yakolera kyabazinga Solomoni mu isinzizo, ogwalimu bino:" 
2Chronicles4:12 empango eibiri, emitwe ebiri egyakolebwa ng'oti bibya ku mpango edho eibiri, ebifaananie ebyalukibwa ng'oti katimba ni babitimba ku buli mpango," 
2Chronicles4:13 ebifaananie eby'emikomamawanga ebikumi ebina (400) bye baata mu nhiriri eibiri okwezungulula ebifaananie bire ebyalukibwa ng'oti katimba ebyali ku mutwe ogwa buli mpango," 
2Chronicles4:14 n'ebenseni eikumi n'ebityamo byadho," 
2Chronicles4:15 etanka, n'ebifaananie by'ente enume eikumi n'eibiri tanka eyo kwe baagitengeka," 
2Chronicles4:16 ensugha, ebitiiyo, n'ebenseni. Ebintu ebyo byonabyona Huramu bye yakolera kyabazinga Solomoni okukozesebwanga mu isinzizo, byali bya kyuma kya kikomo ekizigule." 
2Chronicles4:17 Kyabazinga yakola ebintu ebyo mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, ere mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe gwa Yorudani, aghali eitaka ery'eitosi, ghagati gh'ebibuga Sukkothi ni Zereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Ebintu ebyo byonabyona Solomoni tiyabipima buzito bwabyo, kuba byali kamaala inho. Kale obuzito obw'ekyuma eky'ekikomo kye baakozesa tibwamanhika." 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomoni yaakola mu zaabu omukenenule ebintu ebyo byonabyona eby'okukozesebwanga mu isinzizo: alutaari, ni meeza kwe bata emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda," 
2Chronicles4:20 ebikondo by'entaala nga biriku n'entaala dhaaku edh'okwakiranga mu maiso ag'Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho, ng'entegeka bwe yalinga," 
2Chronicles4:21 ebimuli, entaala, entooleso," 
2Chronicles4:22 makansu edhisala ebisiriiza ku ntambi, ebibya, ebintu bye bataaku obubbaani, ebintu eby'okutwaliraku amanda agaliku omuliro, pata edh'endhigi edh'omu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho n'edh'endhigi edh'eisinzizo edh'okuliya. Ebintu ebyo byonabyona byali bya zaabu mukenenule." 
2Chronicles5:1 Mu nsambo eyo omulimo gwonagwona kyabazinga Solomoni gwe yakola ku isinzizo gwawa. Era Solomoni oyo yaingiza mu isinzizo eryo ebintu byonabyona lata we Daudi bye yaghaayo okubanga ebya Musengwa Katonda: feeza, ni zaabu, n'ebikozesebwa byonabyona, yaabitereka mu iterekero ery'eisinzizo lya Katonda." 
2Chronicles5:2 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaayeta abakulembeze boonaboona ab'omu Isiraeli, n'abakulu b'ebika n'abakulu b'enda dh'abantu, okwidha y'ali e Yerusalemu, baje batoole Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ya Musengwa Katonda mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi, ekyo nga ni Sioni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Kale abantu boonaboona beesoloza ewa kyabazinga Solomoni ku Kibinuko eky'Entindi, mu mwezi ogwomusanvu." 
2Chronicles5:4 Abakulu ab'ebika ab'omu Isiraeli boonaboona bwe baidha, Abalevi baabbeeda Esanduuku ey'Endagaano," 
2Chronicles5:5 baagitwala mu isinzizo. Era bakabona nga bali ghalala n'Abalevi abo, baatwala n'Eweema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda, ghalala n'ebintu byonabyona ebitukuvu ebyali mu Weema eyo, byona baabitwala mu isinzizo." 
2Chronicles5:6 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaali beesoloiza gh'ali, baaba agho mu maiso g'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, era baaghaayo ente n'entaama ng'omusengo, nga tidhibalika olw'obungi." 
2Chronicles5:7 Kale bakabona baaleeta mu isinzizo Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda ey'Endagaano, baagita mu kifo kyayo munda mu isinzizo, mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, ghansi gh'amaghagha ag'ebitonde ebyetebwa bikerubi" 
2Chronicles5:8 kuba bikerubi ebyo byakolebwa nga byandhulwiza amaghagha gabyo, era nga ghansi gh'amaghagha ago n'aghali ekifo kye bataamu Sanduuku eyo n'emiti gyayo egy'okugibbeedesa." 
2Chronicles5:9 Emiti egyo gyali mireeyi inho, ng'omuntu ali mu isinzizo ng'ali mu maiso g'Ekifo Ekitukuvu aghanga okubona enkomerero yagyo, aye ng'ole ali kuliya taghanga kugibona. Emiti egyo gikaaliyo ni ye buli eno." 
2Chronicles5:10 Mu Sanduuku ey'Endagaano eyo timwalimu kintu kindi, okutoolaku ebibaadho by'amabaale ebibiri, Musa bye yagitaamu ku lusozi Sinai, Musengwa Katonda bwe yakola endagaano n'Abaisiraeli nga baviire mu nsi Misiri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Bakabona boonaboona abaaligho, baali bamaze okwetukuza. Kale boonaboona baaseeta aghazira kufaayo ku bikunsu byaibwe bye baabangamu." 
2Chronicles5:12 Ate Abalevi abembi boonaboona: Asafu, ni Hemani, ni Yeduthuni, ghalala ni batabane baibwe n'aboluganda lwaibwe, baayemerera ku luuyi lw'alutaari olw'e buvandhuba nga bali mu bivaalo ebyakolebwa mu lugoye olughegheevu era nga bagemye ebide, n'entongooli, n'endingidi. Baali nga beemereire ghalala ni bakabona kikumi n'abiri (120) abafuuyi b'amagwala." 
2Chronicles5:13 Agho abembi n'ab'ebivuga baakwania amamiro, nga basaaka era nga beebaza Musengwa Katonda. Baagemagania ghalala mu lwembo amamiro gaibwe, n'ag'amagwala, n'ebide, n'ebivuga ebindi, bati: “Musaake Musengwa Katonda kuba mulungi, okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda.” Agho ekire kyagema woonawoona mu isinzizo," 
2Chronicles5:14 nga bakabona tibakaasobola kusigalamu kukola gwa bugheereza olw'ekire ekyo, kuba ekitiisa kya Katonda kyabuna woonawoona mu isinzizo." 
2Chronicles6:1 Agho Solomoni yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe wakoba oti oidha kubanga mu nzikiiza egemye bedimudimu." 
2Chronicles6:2 Mpegaano nze nkuzimbiire eisinzizo ery'ekitiibwa, ekifo mw'onaabanga enaku dhoonadhoona.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Agho kyabazinga yaakyuka, yaalingirira Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaali beesoloiza nga bali agho, yaabasabira enkabi." 
2Chronicles6:4 Yaabakoba ati: “Tumusaake Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa Isiraeli, atuukiriiza kye yasuubiza lata wange Daudi, bwe yakoba ati,"
