2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kasookanga ntoola bantu bange Abaisiraeli mu Misiri, tirondangaghooku mu bika bya Isiraeli byonabyona kibuga waire ekirala kiti, mwe bananzimbira eisinzizo. Era titangaghooku muntu waire omulala ati, akulemberenga abantu bange Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles6:6 Aye mpegaano nonzeegho Yerusalemu kibe ekifo mwe banansinzizanga, era naataagho iwe Daudi okulemberenga abantu bange Abaisiraeli.’ ”" 
2Chronicles6:7 Solomoni yaayongera okukoba ati: “Lata wange Daudi yali n'ekidhuubo eky'okuzimbira Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa Isiraeli eisinzizo." 
2Chronicles6:8 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati, ‘Wakola bukalamu okuba n'ekidhuubo eky'okunzimbira eisinzizo." 
2Chronicles6:9 Aye ti niiwe oja okulizimba. Mutabane wo, iwe mwene y'olizaala, n'alinzimbira eisinzizo.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 “Mpegaano Musengwa Katonda atuukiriiza kye yasuubiza, nze naasikira lata wange Daudi, n'atyama ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyasuubiza. Era nzimbiire Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa Isiraeli eisinzizo." 
2Chronicles6:11 Naalitaamu ekifo ekibaamu Sanduuku y'Endagaano, endagaano eyo Musengwa Katonda ye yakola n'Abaisiraeli.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Solomoni yaayemerera mu maiso g'alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda, ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona abeesoloiza bali agho, yaayandhuluza emikono gye." 
2Chronicles6:13 Solomoni oyo yali amaze okukola ekituuti mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, ng'endhuyi dhaakyo dhoonadhoona eina dhaagayaga, buli lulala lwa mita ibiri n'obutundu bubiri. Ate obugungumavu bw'ekituuti ekyo nga bwa mita ndala n'obutundu busatu. Era ng'amaze n'okukita ghagati mu luya. Agho yaaniina ghaigulu ku kituuti ekyo, yaakuba amakiryaivu ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona abeesoloiza bali agho, era yaayandhululiza emikono gye eri eigulu." 
2Chronicles6:14 Yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe Katonda wa Isiraeli, ezirayo katonda ali ng'oti niiwe, k'ebe mu igulu oba ku nsi; kuba iwe okuuma endagaano y'okola n'abantu bo era waabagonza obutalekera, kasita bagumira ku iwe n'omwoyo gwaibwe gwonagwona." 
2Chronicles6:15 Wakuuma ekyo kye wasuubiza omugheereza wo, lata wange Daudi. Bwenebwene wakimusuubiza iwe mwene, era olwaleero okituukiriiza." 
2Chronicles6:16 Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe Katonda wa Isiraeli, mpegaano ni kuuma kye wasuubiza omugheereza wo lata wange Daudi oyo, bwe wakoba oti, ‘Mu b'eizaire lyo toobulengamu muntu ye ntaagho okutyama ku kityamo kyo eky'obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli, kasita banaawuliranga bye nkoba, ni bagumira ku nze nga iwe bwe wakola.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe Katonda wa Isiraeli, nkweghembye ni, ganha ekyo kye wasuubiza omugheereza wo Daudi kituukirire." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Aye obwo bwenebwene iwe Katonda osobola okuba aghalala n'abantu ab'oku nsi? Ate oba waire mu igulu lyene, erisingayo okuba ghaigulu tosugamu, memale onaasuga otya mu isinzizo lino lye nzimbye!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, nkweghemba owulire okusaba kwange n'okugegenga kwange nze omugheereza wo, ompe kye nkusaba." 
2Chronicles6:20 Kuumanga eisinzizo lino omusana n'obwire, kuba kino n'ekifo kye wakoba oti mwe banaakusinzizanga. Nkweghembye wulirisanga bye nnaakusabanga nze omugheereza wo, nga ningiriire eisinzizo lino." 
2Chronicles6:21 Wulirisanga bye nnaakusabanga nze omugheereza wo, era n'abantu bo Abaisiraeli bye banaakusabanga nga balingiriire ekifo kino. Bwenebwene tuwulirisenga ng'oli mu igulu eyo y'oba, era otusonighenga ng'otuwuliire." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Omuntu bw'anaakolanga mwine ekibi ni bamukoba alayire, era n'aidha gh'alutaari yo mu isinzizo lino n'alayira," 
2Chronicles6:23 wuliranga ng'oli eyo mu igulu era olamulenga abagheereza bo. Era bonerezanga aliku omusango nga bw'agwaniire, ate weedheerezenga aziraku musango, omusasulenga ng'ojiira ku butuufu bwe." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Abantu bo Abaisiraeli bwe banaaghangulwanga abazigu baibwe olw'okukola ebibi y'oli, aye ni baira y'oli okwenenia era ni bakusaba nga bakweghemba mu isinzizo lino," 
2Chronicles6:25 bawulirenga eyo y'oli mu igulu. Era osonighenga ebibi by'abantu bo abo Abaisiraeli, obaizenga mu nsi ye wagha badhaadha baibwe." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Eigulu bwe lineesibanga amaadhi ni gatagwa, olw'abantu okuba nga bakoze ebibi ni bakusungughaza, aye ku nkomerero ni bamala balekayo okukola ebibi ng'omaze okubabonereza, era ni bakweghemba nga balingiriire ekifo kino," 
2Chronicles6:27 bawulirenga eyo y'oli mu igulu. Era osonighenga ebibi by'abagheereza bo, Abaisiraeli abantu bo, obeegeresanga okukola ebituufu. Era gwisanga amaadhi ku nsi yo eno, ye wagha abantu bo okuba omugabo gwaibwe." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Mu nsi bwe munaagwangamu endhala, oba ni mubaamu endwaire ya kawumpuli, oba ebirime ni bifungalala ni biidhaku obukuku, oba ni byonoonebwa enzige oba ebisiisa ebindi, oba abazigu ni balumba abantu bo mu kindi ku bibuga byaibwe, oba ni ghabaagho ekibamba kyonakyona oba okulumizibwa kwonakwona," 
2Chronicles6:29 memale abantu bo Abaisiraeli ni bakusaba nga bakweghemba nga bayandhululiza emikono okugyolekeza eisinzizo lino, omuntu omulala ku lulwe yenka oba boonaboona aghalala, olw'enaku ebaluma ku mwoyo," 
2Chronicles6:30 bawulirenga eyo y'oli mu igulu, era obasonighenga. Kiisi muntu omukoleranga ku bibye nga bw'agwaniire, kuba iwe wenka, niiwe oidhi emyoyo gy'abantu." 
2Chronicles6:31 Olwo bakutyenga ekiseera kyonakyona kye balimala mu nsi ye wagha badhaadha baife. 
2Chronicles6:32 “Omusenze ataba mu bantu bo Abaisiraeli, bw'anaavanga mu nsi ey'eghala ng'awuliire nga bw'oli omukologho, era ow'obuyinza, era nga bw'okola eby'amaani ebitaloodheka, memale n'aidha okukusinza ng'alingiriire eisinzizo lino," 
2Chronicles6:33 wuliranga by'akusaba eyo y'oli mu kifo kyo mu igulu. Olwo abantu boonaboona mu nsi basobole okukumanha era n'okukutya ng'oti n'abantu bo Abaisiraeli bwe bakuwulira. Era bamanhe bati eisinzizo lino lye nzimbye, n'ekifo eky'okukusinzizangamu." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Abantu bo bwe banaajanga y'onaabanga ng'obatumye okulwanisa abazigu baibwe, memale ni bakusaba nga balingiriire ekibuga kino kye walonda, era nga balingiriire eisinzizo lino lye nkuzimbiire," 
2Chronicles6:35 wuliranga okusaba kwaibwe nga bakweghemba eyo y'oli mu igulu, era obaghenga bye bakusaba." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Abantu bo bwe banaakolanga ebibi y'oli, nga bwekiri nti ghazira muntu atakola kibi, memale n'obasungughalira era n'oleka abazigu baibwe ni babaghangula era ni babatwala nga banhage mu nsi ey'abazigu k'ebe ey'okumpi oba ey'eghala," 
2Chronicles6:37 aye ni bamala beerowooza nga bali eyo mu nsi ye baatwalibwa ng'abanhage, ni beenenia era ni bakweghemba bati, ‘Twayonoona, twadaaliima era twakola ebibi’," 
2Chronicles6:38 bawulirenga bwe baneenenianga n'omwoyo gwaibwe gwonagwona nga bali eyo mu nsi y'abazigu baibwe abaabatwala nga banhage. Era obawulirenga bwe banaakusabanga nga balingiriire ensi yaibwe ye wagha badhaadha baibwe, era nga balingiriire ekibuga kye walonda, era n'eisinzizo lino lye nkuzimbiire." 
2Chronicles6:39 Wuliranga bye bakusaba nga bakweghemba eyo y'oli mu igulu, era obaghenga bye bakusaba. Sonighanga abantu bo abo olw'okukola ebibi y'oli ni bakusungughaza." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Wo Musengwa Katonda, mpegaano ni tulingeku n'amaiso go era otege kutu wo, owulire bye tukusaba mu kifo kino." 
2Chronicles6:41 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, situkiramu otyame mu kifo kyo, obeemu n'Esanduuku yo ey'Endagaano eyoleka obukumu bwo. Bakabona bo baleetere okukolanga ebituufu buliidho, ekyo kibenga ng'ekivaalo ekitabavaaku; era abo abakutya baleetere okukubanga emizira olw'eisanhu." 
2Chronicles6:42 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, kola nga bwe wasuubiza omugheereza wo Daudi, otamusuula ere oyo kyabazinga ye walonda.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Solomoni bwe yamala okusaba kwe, omuliro gwaghanuka okuva mu igulu, gwayokya ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'emisengo gwabisaanaigho. N'okumesunkana okw'ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kwabuna eisinzizo eryo." 
2Chronicles7:2 Bakabona tibaasobola kwingira mu isinzizo, kuba okumesunkana okw'ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kwali kulibunie lyonalyona." 
2Chronicles7:3 Abaisiraeli boonaboona bwe baabona omuliro n'okumesunkana okw'ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda nga biri kwika ku isinzizo, baakuba amakiryaivu ku mabaale amataanhe era baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka. Era baasinza Katonda nga bamwebaza, nga bakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda mulungi okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Agho kyabazinga n'abantu boonaboona, baaghaayo emisengo ye Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles7:5 Kyabazinga Solomoni yaaghaayo ente emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ibiri (22,000), n'entaama emitwalo ikumi n'ebiri (120,000) ng'emisengo. Kale atyo kyabazinga Solomoni n'abantu boonaboona baatukuza eisinzizo okulighaayo libe erya Katonda." 
2Chronicles7:6 Bakabona baayemerera mu bifo byaibwe. N'Abalevi boona baayemerera nga balingagaine ni bakabona abo, nga bagemye ebivuga Daudi bye yakola okusaakirangaku Musengwa Katonda era baabikozesa mu lwembo Daudi oyo lwe yabeegeresa olw'okwebaza Musengwa Katonda, olw'okuba okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda. Bakabona baafuuwa amagwala nga n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona beemereire." 
2Chronicles7:7 Kyabazinga Solomoni yaatukuza oluya olwa ghagati olwali emberi gh'eisinzizo, kuba eyo ye yagheerayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa kyonakyona okuwaagho, n'ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, n'amasavu agaava ku bigheebwayo olw'okutabagana. Yabigheerayo eyo, kuba alutaari ey'ekyuma eky'ekikomo ye yakola, yali ntono inho ng'ebigheebwayo ebyo byonabyona tibisobola kusugaku." 
2Chronicles7:8 Kale mu kiseera ekyo, Solomoni ng'ali ghalala n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona nga beesoloiza, baakola embaga ey'ekibinuko kye baamalaku enaku omusanvu. Ekibinuko ekyo kyaliku abantu abeesoloiza kamaala inho, okuva eruuyi ere aghaingirirwa e Hamathi, okutuuka ku kaiga ak'oku nsalosalo ni Misiri." 
2Chronicles7:9 Baamala enaku omusanvu edh'okutukuza alutaari ebe eya Musengwa Katonda, n'enaku edhindi omusanvu edh'ekibinuko ekyo. Ku lunaku olwomunaana boonaboona beesoloza ghalala okusinza." 
2Chronicles7:10 Ku lunaku olwairirira, olwamakumi abiri n'eisatu (23) olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu, kyabazinga Solomoni yaasiibula abantu okwirayo ewaibwe. Abantu bairayo ewaibwe nga basangaavu era nga basagamba mu myoyo gyaibwe olw'ebirungi Musengwa Katonda bye yagha Daudi, ni Solomoni oyo, n'abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles7:11 Mu nsambo eyo, Solomoni yaamaliriza okuzimba eisinzizo n'ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga, era yaamaliriza byonabyona bye yayenda okuzimba nga bwe yabitegeka." 
2Chronicles7:12 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaamubonekera obwire, yaamukoba ati: “Mpuliire by'onsabye, era ndhikiriiza eisinzizo lino libenga ery'okugheerangamu emisengo ye ndi." 
2Chronicles7:13 Bwe nnaasibanga amaadhi ni gatagwa, oba ni nsindika enzige okulya ebirime, oba ninsindika obulwaire obubi mu bantu bange," 
2Chronicles7:14 aye abantu bange abo ni bagonda ni bansaba, era ni balekera agho okukola ebibi ni baira ye ndi, olwo nze ndidha kubawulirisanga eyo mu igulu ye mba, mbasonighenga ebibi byaibwe era mponienga ensi yaibwe." 
2Chronicles7:15 Ndidha kulabiriranga eisinzizo lino era ntegenga amatu okuwulira byonabyona bye banansabanga nga bali omwo 
2Chronicles7:16 kuba mpegaano ntukwiza eisinzizo lino, libe ery'okunsinzizangamu enaku dhoonadhoona. Ndidha kulikuumanga obutatemya enaku dhoonadhoona." 
2Chronicles7:17 Era iwe bw'onaajiiranga ku bye nkoba, nga lata wo Daudi bwe yakolanga, n'ogonderanga biragiro byange era n'ogemanga amateeka gange," 
2Chronicles7:18 ndireetera obwakyabazinga bwo okusigalagho nga bugumu, nga bwe nasuubiza lata wo Daudi nti, ‘Mu b'eizaire lyo toobulengamu muntu atyama ku kityamo kya bwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 Aye bwe mulinvaaku ni mudheemera amateeka n'ebiragiro byange bye mbaghaire, ate ni mwira ku kugheereza n'okusinza bakatonda abandi," 
2Chronicles7:20 olwo ndibinga Abaisiraeli mu nsi ye mbaghaire, era naalekulira agho eisinzizo lino lye ntukwiza okunsinzizangamu, naalifuula eky'okwogeraku era enseko dh'abalamu mu maghanga goonagoona." 
2Chronicles7:21 Eisinzizo lino mpegaano lya kitiisa inho, aye mu biseera ebyo buli abaliribitangaku balyewuunhianga. Era balibuuzanga bati, ‘Lwaki Musengwa Katonda yakola atyo ensi eno n'eisinzizo lino?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Olwo abantu baliirangamu bati, ‘Lwa kuba baava ku Musengwa Katonda waibwe, eyatoola badhaadha baibwe mu nsi Misiri, ate baira ku kugheereza n'okusinza bakatonda abandi. Musengwa Katonda kyaviire n'abatuusa ku kabi akaaga agho.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Agho emyaka amakumi abiri Solomoni gye yazimbiramu eisinzizo n'ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga bwe gyawaaku," 
2Chronicles8:2 Solomoni oyo yaazimba buyaaka ebibuga Hiramu bye yamugha, era yaabigha Abaisiraeli baabibaamu." 
2Chronicles8:3 Agho Solomoni oyo yaaja, yaanhaga ekiketezo ky'e Hamathi n'eky'e Zoba." 
2Chronicles8:4 Yaazimba ekibuga Tadimori mu irungu, era yaazimba n'ebibuga mu Hamathi ebyalimu amaterekero." 
2Chronicles8:5 Era yaazimba ebibuga Bethi Horoni eky'Eitale, ni Bethi Horoni eky'Eifo, nga byezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu era nga biriku endhigi edhiriku ebisiba eby'ekyuma." 
2Chronicles8:6 Era yaazimba ekibuga Baalathi, n'ebibuga bye ebyalimu amaterekero, n'ebibuga mwe yakuumiranga ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, n'ebibuga by'abasaadha be abavuzi b'embalaasi, n'ebindi byonabyona Solomoni bye yayenda okuzimba mu Yerusalemu ni mu Lebanoni, n'aghandi woonawoona mu biketezo bye yali afuga." 
2Chronicles8:7 Ghaaligho abantu abaawonagho abataali Baisiraeli, nga n'omuli Abamori, Abahitti, Abaperizzi, Abahivi, n'Abayebusi, abaali mu nsi Kanaani." 
2Chronicles8:8 Abaidhukulu b'abantu abo, Abaisiraeli be bataazikiriza, Solomoni be yakozesanga emirimo egy'olukako. Era abo n'abakaagikola ni ye buli eno." 
2Chronicles8:9 Aye ghazira muntu waire omulala ati ku Baisiraeli, Solomoni ye yafuulaku mwiru wa kukola mirimo. Baabanga baisirukale be, na bakulu mu magye, na baduumizi ba magye, na bakulu ba bavuzi be ab'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, na bavuzi be ba mbalaasi." 
2Chronicles8:10 Ghaaligho abakungu abakologho ebikumi bibiri n'ataanu (250), abaafuganga abantu." 
2Chronicles8:11 Agho Solomoni yaatoola mukazi we mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi, yaamuta mu kisaagaati ekikye kye yamuzimbira, ng'akoba ati: “Mukazi wange taidha kuba mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga Daudi owa Isiraeli, kuba ebifo Esanduuku ya Musengwa Katonda bye yatuukamuuku biba bitukuvu.” Mukazi wa Solomoni oyo yali mughala wa kyabazinga w'e Misiri." 
2Chronicles8:12 Agho Solomoni yaaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ku alutaari ye yazimba emberi gh'eisinzizo. 
2Chronicles8:13 Yaabighangayo nga bwe kyalinga kiragirwa buli lunaku, ng'Amateeka ga Musa bwe galagira okubighaayo: ku Sabbato, ni ku Kibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, ni ku bibinuko ebisatu ebya buli mwaka eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa, n'eky'Amakungula, n'eky'Entindi." 
2Chronicles8:14 Solomoni oyo yaakola nga lata we Daudi bwe yalagira, yaataagho engobo bakabona dhe baakolerangamu omulimo gwaibwe. Yaataagho n'engobo Abalevi dhe baakolerangamu omulimo gwaibwe ogw'okwemba enhembo edhisaaka, n'okugheereza nga bayambaku bakabona, nga bwe kyetaagisanga buli lunaku. Yaataagho n'abakuumi b'emiryango mu ngobo, ku buli mulyango kuba atyo Daudi omuntu wa Katonda bwe yalagira." 
2Chronicles8:15 Kyabazinga Daudi bye yalagira bakabona n'Abalevi ku bintu ebyaterekebwa ni ku bintu ebindi, baabituukiriza bukalamu." 
2Chronicles8:16 Mu nsambo eyo Solomoni yaamaliriza omulimo gwonagwona, okuviira irala ku lunaku lwe baataagho omusingi gw'eisinzizo, okutuusa lwe lyawa okuzimba. Kale eisinzizo eryo lyamalirizibwa." 
2Chronicles8:17 Agho Kyabazinga Solomoni yaaja mu Ezionigeberi ni mu Elothi, ku mbali kw'enhandha, mu nsi Edomu." 
2Chronicles8:18 Kyabazinga Hiramu yaasindika ku bagheereza be n'amaato, abaali n'obumanhi ku by'oku nhandha, baajiira mu maato ago ghalala n'abagheereza ba Solomoni. Baaja mu nsi Ofiri, baatoolayo zaabu agheza kilo ng'oti omutwalo mulala n'enkumi itaanu (15,000), baamuleetera kyabazinga Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:1 Agho kyabazinga omukazi ow'e Sheba bwe yawulira obumanhifu bwa Solomoni, yaidha e Yerusalemu n'ebibuuzo ebikalangafu okumuleba. Yaidha n'ekikunsu eky'abagheereza be nga kinene inho, n'engamiya edheetwise obuwoowo, ni zaabu mungi inho, n'amabaale ag'omughendo. Bwe yatuuka ewa Solomoni yaamukobera byonabyona ebyamuli ku mwoyo." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomoni yaamwiramu ebibuuzo bye byonabyona. Ghazira kintu waire ekirala kiti ekyazibughalira Solomoni okwinhonhola. 
2Chronicles9:3 Kyabazinga omukazi ow'e Sheba oyo yaabona amagezi ga Solomoni, n'ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga kye yazimba," 
2Chronicles9:4 n'emere ye yagabulanga ku meeza ye, n'ensambo abakungu be ye baatyamangamu, n'ensambo abagheereza be ye baagheerezangamu nga bali mu bivaalo byaibwe, n'ensambo abo abaagheerezanga eby'okunhwa ye baavaalangamu. Era yaabona n'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa Solomoni bye yaghangayo mu isinzizo. Ebyo byonabyona byamwewuunhisa inho ekibitiriire." 
2Chronicles9:5 Agho yaakoba Solomoni ati: “Bye nawulira nga ndi mu nsi yange ku bikolwa byo ni ku magezi go, byali bituufu." 
2Chronicles9:6 Aye tyabiikiriza, okutuusa lwe ndidhie ni mbyeboneraku n'agange. Era bwenebwene bye nawulira byali katundu butundu ak'ebyo bye mboine. Amagezi g'oli nago gasingira ghala ebyo bye nawuliraku." 
2Chronicles9:7 Bakazi bo beesiimye! N'abagheereza bo ababa buliidho mu maiso go ni bawulira eby'amagezi by'oyogera beesiimye! 
2Chronicles9:8 Musengwa Katonda wo asaakibwe, eyayoleka nga bw'akusiimye, n'akufuula kyabazinga, ofugenga mu liina lye. Musengwa Katonda oyo agonza inho abantu be Abaisiraeli era ayenda okubakuuma babeegho lubeerera, kyeyava n'akufuula kyabazinga waibwe, olamulenga mu mazima ni mu butuufu.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Agho yaatonera kyabazinga zaabu agheza kilo ng'oti enkumi ina (4,000), n'eby'obuwoowo kamaala inho, n'amabaale ag'omughendo. Era ghaali tighabangaghooku buwoowo ng'oti n'obwo kyabazinga omukazi ow'e Sheba bwe yatonera kyabazinga Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:10 Abagheereza ba Hiramu n'aba Solomoni abaaleeta zaabu okuva mu Ofiri, baaleeta n'embaawo edh'emiti egyetebwa emyalumugi, n'amabaale ag'omughendo." 
2Chronicles9:11 Kyabazinga Solomoni yaakozesa embaawo edho okukola amadaala ag'omu isinzizo, n'ag'omu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga. Yaadhikolamu n'endingidi, n'entongooli edh'abembi. Mu Buyudaaya mwali timubangamuuku mbaawo edhiri ng'oti n'edho." 
2Chronicles9:12 Agho kyabazinga Solomoni yaagha kyabazinga omukazi ow'e Sheba byonabyona bye yayenda, na buli kye yasaba ng'otoireku ebyo kyabazinga omukazi oyo bye yamuleetera. Kale kyabazinga omukazi oyo yaasiibula, yairayo mu nsi ye, ghalala n'abagheereza be." 
2Chronicles9:13 Zaabu Solomoni ye yafunanga omwaka, yaghezanga kilo ng'oti emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi isatu (23,000)," 
2Chronicles9:14 nga tobaliireeku oyo eyavanga mu musolo abasuubuzi gwe baasasulanga, ni mu mpooza ku bitundibwa. Ni bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'e Buwarabu, n'abafuzi ab'ebiketezo mu nsi eyo, boona baaleeteranga Solomoni zaabu ni feeza." 
2Chronicles9:15 Kyabazinga Solomoni yagheesa engabo enene ebikumi bibiri (200), buli ndala yaagirimbyaku zaabu azitogha kilo ng'oti musanvu." 
2Chronicles9:16 Yaagheesa n'engabo entono ebikumi bisatu, buli ndala yaagirimbyaku zaabu azitogha kilo ng'oti isatu. Dhoonadhoona yaadhita mu ndhu eyayetebwanga Ekibira kya Lebanoni." 
2Chronicles9:17 Kyabazinga era yaakola ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga ekikologho mu isanka, yaakirimbyaku zaabu omukenenule." 
2Chronicles9:18 Ekityamo ekyo kyaliku amadaala mukaaga, n'ekintu ky'otaaku ebigere ekya zaabu. Kyabaaku ni kw'ota emikono eruuyi n'eruuyi, nga ku mbali okwa buli mukono, ghaligho ekifaananie ky'empologoma eyemereire." 
2Chronicles9:19 Ghaaligho n'ebifaananie ebindi eby'empologoma ikumi na bibiri, nga dheemereire ndala ndala ku luuyi ni ku luuyi okwa buli idaala, ku madaala gale omukaaga. Tighaalighooku kityamo kya bwakyabazinga kyakolebwa kabiri mu bwakyabazinga bundi, nga kifaanana n'ekyo." 
2Chronicles9:20 Ebintu byonabyona ebya kyabazinga Solomoni bye yakozesanga ku by'okunhwa, byali bya zaabu. Era ebintu byonabyona ebyakozesebwanga ku by'okulya mu ndhu eyayetebwanga Ekibira kya Lebanoni, byali bya zaabu mukenenule. Mu biseera bya Solomoni, feeza tiyatwalibwanga ng'ekintu eky'omughendo." 
2Chronicles9:21 Kyabazinga yali n'olugololiro olw'amaato agaajanga e Tarushishi ku nhandha enene nga gali ghalala n'olugololiro olw'amaato ga Hiramu. Buli ku nkomerero ya myaka esatu, olugololiro lw'amaato olwo lwairanga okuva e Tarushishi nga luleese zaabu, ni feeza, n'amasanka, n'ensude, n'enkembo." 
2Chronicles9:22 Kale atyo kyabazinga Solomoni yaasingira ghala mu bukombe n'amagezi bakyabazinga boonaboona ku nsi. 
2Chronicles9:23 Bakyabazinga ab'omu nsi yoonayoona baayendanga okwidha aghali Solomoni oyo, okuwulira ebibono eby'amagezi ge, Katonda ge yamugha." 
2Chronicles9:24 Buli eyaidhanga, ng'aleeta ekirabo: ebintu bya feeza n'ebya zaabu, ebivaalo, obuwoowo, embalaasi, n'enhumbu. Baaleetanga ebintu ebyo mu bungi buli mwaka." 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomoni era yali n'ebisenge enkumi ina (4,000) eby'embalaasi dhe, n'ebigaali byadho eby'omu lutalo, n'abavuzi ab'embalaasi omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000), be yata mu bibuga ebikuumirwamu ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ni mu Yerusalemu, mwene mwe yali." 
2Chronicles9:26 Era Solomoni oyo yafuganga bakyabazinga boonaboona okuviira irala ku mwiga Eufurate, okutuukira irala ku nsi y'Abafilisiti, ni ku nsalosalo y'e Misiri." 
2Chronicles9:27 Mu biseera bye, feeza yayala mu Yerusalemu, yaaba mungi ng'oti bwa mabaale. N'emivule gyaba mingi ng'oti miti emisikamore egy'omu biketezo bya Buyudaaya eby'omu biiko." 
2Chronicles9:28 Embalaasi Solomoni dhe yali nadho, yadhiragirizanga kuva mu Misiri ni mu nsi edhindi." 
2Chronicles9:29 Ebindi byonabyona Solomoni bye yakola, okuva lwe yainhama okufuga okutuuka ku nkomerero ye, byaghandiikibwa mu Byafaayo bya Nathani Omulanzi, ni mu Byalangibwa Ahiya ow'e Shilo, ni mu Byali mu Kubonekerwa kwa Iddo Omulanzi nga bigema ku Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati." 
2Chronicles9:30 Entangama Solomoni ye yamala ng'afuga Isiraeli yoonayoona mu Yerusalemu, yali ya myaka makumi ana (40)." 
2Chronicles9:31 Agho Solomoni oyo yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, yaaziikibwa mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi lata we. Mutabane we Rehoboamu yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles10:1 Agho Rehoboamu yaaja e Shekemu Abaisiraeli ye baali beesolokeiza okumufuula kyabazinga. 
2Chronicles10:2 Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati yaakiwulira ng'akaali mu Misiri ye yali alumukiire okwewonia kyabazinga Solomoni. Agho yaira," 
2Chronicles10:3 kuba Abaisiraeli baamwetesa. Era bwe yatuuka, yaabeeyimbaku boonaboona abeesoloza, baaja baakoba Rehoboamu bati:" 
2Chronicles10:4 “Lata wo Solomoni yatukaluubiriza inho n'ekikoligo ekizito, yaatukozesa emirimo emikakali era emizito. Aye iwe tugondeze ku bulamu, otukendeereze ku buzito obwo, twidha kukugheerezanga.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Rehoboamu yaabakoba ati: “Muje, muliira ye ndi nga ghabiseegho enaku isatu.” Kale abantu baaja." 
2Chronicles10:6 Kyabazinga Rehoboamu yeebuuza ku bantu abakulu, abaaghanga lata we Solomoni amagezi ng'akaali mulamu. Yaababuuza ati: “Magezi ki ge mumpa? Abantu bano mbairemu ntya?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Baamwiramu bati: “Bw'onaaba ow'ekisa eri abantu bano, n'obawooyawooya ng'okozesa ebibono ebikalamu, era n'obasanhusa, baidha kubanga bagheereza bo enaku dhoonadhoona.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Aye kyabazinga Rehoboamu yaava ku magezi g'abantu abakulu ge baamugha, yeebuuza ku baisuka abaakula naye era abaali nga n'abamugheereza mu kiseera ekyo." 
2Chronicles10:9 Yaababuuza ati: “Magezi ki ge mumpa? Twiremu tutya abantu bano abankobye bati, ‘Kendeeza ku buzito lata wo bwe yatukaluubirizanga nabwo?’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Agho abaisuka abo baamukoba bati: “Abantu abo abakukobye bati, ‘Lata wo yatukaluubiriza inho n'ekikoligo ekizito, yaatukozesa emirimo emizito, aye iwe tukendeezeeku ku buzito obwo,’ bakobe oti, ‘Akaala kange akansubi, kanene okusinga enkende ya lata wange." 
2Chronicles10:11 Kale ni oba nga lata wange yabataaku ekikoligo ekizito, nze ndidha kukyongeraku obuzito. Era oba nga lata wange yabakangaivulanga ng'abakubisa enkoba edhabuliidho, nze ndidha kubakangaivulanga nga mbakubisa enkoba edhiriku obusuna!’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Kale nga ghabiseegho enaku isatu, Yeroboamu n'abantu boonaboona baidha ye kyabazinga Rehoboamu nga bwe yabakoba, ati: “Muliira ye ndi nga ghabiseegho enaku isatu.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Agho kyabazinga yaabairamu na bukambwe, kuba yaava ku magezi abantu abakulu ge baamugha," 
2Chronicles10:14 yaajiira ku g'abaisuka ge baamugha, ng'akoba ati: “Oba nga lata wange yabataaku ekikoligo ekizito, nze ndidha kukyongeraku obuzito. Era oba nga lata wange yabakangaivulanga ng'abakubisa enkoba edhabuliidho, nze ndidha kubakangaivulanga nga mbakubisa enkoba edhiriku obusuna!”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Kale atyo kyabazinga yaaloba kuwulirisa bantu. Musengwa Katonda n'eyaleetera ebintu okuja bityo, olwo atuukirize kye yakoba Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati ng'abita mu Ahiya ow'e Shilo." 
2Chronicles10:16 Abantu bwe baabona nga kyabazinga tabawuliriisa, baamwiramu bati: “Mugabo ki gwe tuli nagwo ni Daudi? Tuzira kye tuli nakyo kya nsikirano ni mutabane wa Yesse. Imwe Abaisiraeli, ka twireyo ewaife. Daudi alabirire ab'endhu ye.” Kale Abaisiraeli baagolola ewaibwe." 
2Chronicles10:17 Aye Rehoboamu yaasigala ng'akaafuga Abaisiraeli abaabanga mu kiketezo eky'e Buyudaaya bonka. 
2Chronicles10:18 Agho kyabazinga Rehoboamu yaatuma mu Baisiraeli Adoramu eyali akulira abo abaasaliranga abantu abaakolanga emirimo egy'olukako amakatala. Aye Abaisiraeli baamukuba amabaale, baamwita. Agho kyabazinga Rehoboamu yaayangugha, yaaniina ekigaali kye eky'omu lutalo, yaalumukira e Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Okuva n'olwo, Abaisiraeli ab'omu kiketezo eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba wa Isiraeli, baadheema okufugibwa ab'endhu ya Daudi ni ye buli eno." 
2Chronicles11:1 Agho Rehoboamu bwe yatuuka e Yerusalemu, yaasoloza mu kika kya Yuda n'ekya Benjamini, abasaadha abalwani einho abaghera emitwalo eikumi n'omunaana (180,000). Abalwani abo nga ba kuja kulwanisa Abaisiraeli ab'omu kiketezo eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba wa Isiraeli, Rehoboamu oyo asobole okukiizaayo mu bwakyabazinga bwe." 
2Chronicles11:2 Aye Katonda yaakoba omusaadha we Shemaia ati: 
2Chronicles11:3 “Koba Rehoboamu mutabane wa Solomoni era kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, okobe n'ab'omu kika kya Yuda, n'ekya Benjamini, oti," 
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Musengwa Katonda akoba ati mutaja kulumba baganda baimwe, Baisiraeli banaimwe. Mwireyo buli muntu mu maka ge, kuba ebyo ebibairegho, ninze nabireetagho.’ ” Agho baagondera ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda, bairayo ewaibwe, baaloba kuja kulumba Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Kale Rehoboamu yaasigala mu Yerusalemu, yaazimba ebimante ebigumu okwezunguluza ebibuga bino eby'omu kiketezo eky'omu Buyudaaya n'eky'omu Benjamini:" 
2Chronicles11:6 Bethelehemu, ni Etamu, ni Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 ni Bethizuri, ni Soko, ni Adullamu," 
2Chronicles11:8 ni Gathi, ni Maresha, ni Zifu," 
2Chronicles11:9 ni Adoraimu, ni Lakishi, ni Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 ni Zora, ni Aiyaloni, ni Heburoni." 
2Chronicles11:11 Yaazimba ebifo eby'okwewogomamu nga bigumu, yaabitaamu ababikulira, era yaabitaamu amaterekero g'emere, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
2Chronicles11:12 Era ebibuga ebyo byonabyona yaabitaamu engabo n'amafumo. Mu ngeri eyo yaasigaza abantu ab'omu kika kya Yuda n'ekya Benjamini nga n'abafuga. 
2Chronicles11:13 Agho bakabona abaali mu Isiraeli mwonamwona, baava eyo yoonayoona ye baabanga, baidha eri Rehoboamu." 
2Chronicles11:14 Abalevi abo baaleka eyo ebyayiro byaibwe n'ebibandha, baidha mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu, kuba kyabazinga Yeroboamu n'abo abaamusikira, baabinga Abalevi abo, baabalobera okugheereza Musengwa Katonda nga bakabona." 
2Chronicles11:15 Yeroboamu oyo yeeteeragho bakabona ababe abaagheerezanga mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, n'abo abaagheerezanga emisambwa n'ebifaananie eby'ente ento." 
2Chronicles11:16 Abantu ab'omu bika byonabyona eby'omu Isiraeli abaawulira mule nga benda okusinza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, boona baidha e Yerusalemu okughaayo emisengo eri Musengwa Katonda oyo, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe." 
2Chronicles11:17 Kale abantu abo baaleetera obwakyabazinga bwa Buyudaaya okuba obugumu, era baamala emyaka esatu nga bagha Rehoboamu mutabane wa Solomoni amaani. Mu myaka egyo esatu, embeera y'obulamu yaaba nga bwe yabanga mu biseera bya Daudi n'ebya Solomoni." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehoboamu yafumbirwa Mahalathi mughala wa Yerimothi, Yerimothi oyo nga mutabane wa Daudi. Ate inhina wa Mahalathi oyo nga ni Abihaili, mughala wa Eliabu, Eliabu oyo nga mutabane wa Yesse." 
2Chronicles11:19 Rehoboamu yazaala ni Mahalathi abaana abalenzi basatu: Yeushi, ni Shemaria, ni Zahamu." 
2Chronicles11:20 Rehoboamu yaamala yaafumbirwa ni Maaka mughala wa Abusalomu, ye baazaala naye abaana abalenzi bano: Abiya, ni Attai, ni Ziza, ni Shelomithi." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehoboamu yayendanga inho Maaka oyo mughala wa Abusalomu, okusinga bakazi be abandi ab'omu ndhu boonaboona, ni bakazi be ab'embali boonaboona. Abakazi be ab'omu ndhu boonaboona aghalala baali ikumi na munaana, ate abakazi be ab'embali baaba nkaaga. Yaazaala abaana abalenzi amakumi abiri na munaana (28), n'abaana abaghala nkaaga (60)." 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehoboamu yaalondamu Abiya mutabane wa Maaka okukulira baana baine boonaboona, kuba oyo ye yayenda amusikire." 
2Chronicles11:23 Era Rehoboamu oyo yaayiiya amagezi, yaata batabane be mu biketezo byonabyona ebya Yuda n'ebya Benjamini, babirabirirenga, nga boonaboona bali mu bibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu. Yaabagha ebintu eby'okukozesanga kamaala, era yaabafunira n'abakazi kamaala." 
2Chronicles12:1 Rehoboamu bwe yamala okukakata ku bwakyabazinga n'aba ow'amaani, olwo mwene n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, baava ku mateeka ga Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles12:2 Agho mu mwaka ogwokutaanu nga kyabazinga Rehoboamu oyo n'afuga Buyudaaya, Shishaki kyabazinga w'e Misiri yaidha yaalumba Yerusalemu olw'okuba baadheemera Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles12:3 Yaidha n'eigye nga liri n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo lukumi na bibiri (1,200), n'abalwani ab'oku mbalaasi emitwalo mukaaga (60,000), n'abaisirukale abandi abatasoboka kubalika olw'obungi, nga n'omuli Abalibiya, n'Abasukki, n'Abaethiopia." 
2Chronicles12:4 Yaanhaga ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu eby'omu Buyudaaya, okutuukira irala n'e Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles12:5 Agho Shemaia omulanzi yaaja eri kyabazinga Rehoboamu ye yali ng'ali n'abakungu ba Buyudaaya abeesololeza mu Yerusalemu okulumuka Shishaki. Yaabakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Olw'okuba imwe mwanvaaku, zeena kyenviire ni mbaghaayo eri Shishaki.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Agho kyabazinga n'abakungu ba Isiraeli baagonda, baakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda mutuufu.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Musengwa Katonda bwe yabona nga bagonze, yaakoba Shemaia ati: “Nga bwebagonze batyo, tiidha kubazikiriza. Aye era ndidha kubasaasiramuuku bwa katono, olwo ndobe kumalira busungu bwange bwonabwona ku Yerusalemu, nga Shishaki akirumbye" 
2Chronicles12:8 kuba bwenebwene Shishaki oyo aidha kubaghangula basobole okubona endhawulo ghagati gh'okugheereza nze n'okugheereza bakyabazinga ab'ensi.” 
2Chronicles12:9 Kale kyabazinga Shishaki ow'e Misiri yaidha yaalumba Yerusalemu. Yaanhaga eby'obukombe eby'omu isinzizo n'eby'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, byonabyona yaabitwala. Yaatwala n'engabo dhoonadhoona edha zaabu, Solomoni dhe yagheesa." 
2Chronicles12:10 Kyabazinga Rehoboamu yaagheesa engabo mu kyuma ky'ekikomo okwira mu kifo ky'edho, yaadhigemya abakulu ab'abakuumi abaakuumanga omulyango gw'ekisaagaati kye." 
2Chronicles12:11 Kyabazinga buli lwe yaingiranga mu isinzizo, ng'abakuumi batwala engabo edho, ate baamalanga baadhiizaayo mu ndhu mwe baadhikuumiranga." 
2Chronicles12:12 Olw'okuba Rehoboamu yagonda, Musengwa Katonda kyeyava n'atamusungughalira kumuzikiriza, n'ensi Buyudaaya yaasigala ng'ebintu bikaagijiira bukalamu." 
2Chronicles12:13 Kale Rehoboamu yaakakata ku bwakyabazinga mu Yerusalemu. Ghe yainhamira okufuga yali agheza emyaka egy'obukulu amakumi ana na mulala (41), era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi na musanvu (17) mu Yerusalemu, ekibuga Musengwa Katonda kye yalondagho mu Isiraeli yoonayoona okumusinzizangamu. Inhina wa Rehoboamu yali ng'ayetebwa Naama, era nga Muammoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Rehoboamu oyo yaakola ebibi, yaaloba kufaayo kujiiranga ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'ayenda." 
2Chronicles12:15 Ebindi byonabyona Rehoboamu bye yakola, okuva lwe yatoolera okufuga okutuuka ku nkomerero, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo eky'Ebyomubyanda eby'omulanzi Shemaia n'omulanzi Iddo. Ekiseera ekyo kyonakyona, ghaabangagho entalo edhomwidhirano ghagati gha Rehoboamu ni Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles12:16 Agho Rehoboamu oyo yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, yaaziikibwa mu lwambiidhi lwa badhaadha be abo, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Mutabane we eyayetebwanga Abiya, n'eyasikira ise oyo ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles13:1 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omunaana nga kyabazinga Yeroboamu n'afuga Isiraeli, Abiya yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
2Chronicles13:2 Yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka esatu mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali nga ni Mikaia, mughala wa Urieli ow'e Gibea. Agho olwatuuka ghaatanukagho olutalo ghagati wa Abiya ni Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abiya yaaja okulwana ng'ali n'eigye ery'abalwani abaziramu ntete, emitwalo amakumi ana (400,000), abaalondebwa n'obwegendereza. Ate Yeroboamu yaidha okumulwanisa ng'ali n'eigye ery'abalwani ab'amaani, emitwalo kinaana (800,000), boona nga baalondebwa n'obwegendereza." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abiya yaaniina ku lusozi Zemaraimu olw'omu kiketezo kya Efuraimu eky'oku nsozi, yaakoba ati: “Iwe Yeroboamu, n'imwe Abaisiraeli mwenamwena, muwulire bye nkoba." 
2Chronicles13:5 Timwidhi nti Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, ng'abita mu ndagaano etaja kukyusibwamu, yagha Daudi n'eizaire lye okufuganga nga bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli lubeerera?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Aye ate Yeroboamu mutabane wa Nebati, omugheereza wa Solomoni mutabane wa Daudi, yaadheemera musengwa we." 
2Chronicles13:7 Abantu abazira kye bagasa baidha beeyimba naye, baanhooma Rehoboamu mutabane wa Solomoni era baamweyawulaku, alobe kuba kyabazinga waibwe. Rehoboamu oyo yali akaali muto, ng'azira bumanhirivu obumusobozesa okubalobera okukola ekyo." 
2Chronicles13:8 “Mpegaano muli kusala amagezi okulwanisa obwakyabazinga bwa Musengwa Katonda, mubutoole ku b'eizaire lya Daudi olw'okuba muli igye inene, era nga muli n'ebifaananie eby'ente ento ebya zaabu, Yeroboamu bye yabakolera bibenga bakatonda baimwe." 
2Chronicles13:9 Mwabinga bakabona ba Musengwa Katonda ob'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni, mwabinga n'Abalevi. Mweteeragho bakabona abaimwe, ng'abamaghanga agandi bwe bakola. Ole bw'aidha okwetukuza, ng'aleese ente enume ento ndala n'entaama enume musanvu, mumwikiriza yaafuuka kabona w'ebintu ebyo ebitali Katonda." 
2Chronicles13:10 Aye ife, Musengwa Katonda oyo ni Katonda waife era titumuvangaku naire. Bakabona be tuli nabo, abamugheereza, ba ku lulyo lwa Aaroni, era bayambibwaku Abalevi." 
2Chronicles13:11 Baniokeza obubbaani obuwunha akawoowo eri Musengwa Katonda, baaghaayo n'emisengo egyokebwa gyonagyona okuwaagho, buli nkyo na buli igulo. Baata emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda ku meeza entukuvu, era buli igulo baalabiriranga ekikondo ky'entaala ekya zaabu, okubona ng'entaala dhaaku dhaaka. Ife tukola ebyo Musengwa Katonda waife bye yalagira. Aye imwe mwamuvaaku." 
2Chronicles13:12 Bona eno, Katonda mwene n'omuduumizi waife. Ni bakabona be, bali ghano nga bagemye amagwala ag'okufuuyira abaja okulwanisa imwe. Kale ni Abaisiraeli imwe, mutalwanisa Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe, kuba timwidha kughangula naire.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Mu kiseera ekyo, Yeroboamu yali amaze okusindika abandi ku balwani be, beeteege eigye lya Buyudaaya, balizinduukirize nga baliva einhuma. Ate abalwani abandi nga ba kulirumba nga baliva emberi." 
2Chronicles13:14 Abayudaaya baaja okulinga bati, nga babona olutalo luli kubava emberi n'einhuma. Agho baalirira Musengwa Katonda nga bamweghemba abawonie. Ni bakabona baafuuwa amagwala." 
2Chronicles13:15 Abayudaaya baaleekaana okuleekaana okw'omu lutalo, era bwe baaleekaana einho batyo, Katonda yaaghangula Yeroboamu n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, mu maiso ga Abiya n'ag'Abayudaaya." 
2Chronicles13:16 Abaisiraeli baalumuka Abayudaaya, Katonda yaaleetera Abayudaaya okughangula Abaisiraeli abo." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abiya n'eigye lye, baaghangulira irala Abaisiraeli era Abaisiraeli abo baafiirwa abalwani baibwe ab'amaani einho, abaghera emitwalo amakumi ataanu (500,000)." 
2Chronicles13:18 Kale Abaisiraeli baaghangulwa batyo ku mukuzi ogwo, ate Abayudaaya baaba baghanguzi, kuba Abayudaaya abo beesiga Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abiya yaabingirira Yeroboamu, yaamunhagaku ebibuga bino: Betheli, ni Yeshana, ni Efuroni, ghalala n'ebyalo ebyali bibiriiraine." 
2Chronicles13:20 Yeroboamu tiyairamu kuba wa maani, nga Abiya oyo akaali kyabazinga. Era ku nkomerero, Musengwa Katonda yaleetera Yeroboamu oyo okulwala, yaamala yaafa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Aye Abiya yaafuuka wa maani. Yaabayiza abakazi ikumi na bana. Yaazaala abaana abalenzi amakumi abiri na babiri, n'abaghala ikumi na mukaaga." 
2Chronicles13:22 Ebindi Abiya oyo bye yakola, n'empisa dhe, ni bye yayogera, byaghandiikibwa mu Byafaayo bya Iddo Omulanzi." 
2Chronicles14:1 Agho Abiya yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, yaaziikibwa mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Mutabane we Asa yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga. Mu biseera bya Asa oyo, ensi yaaba mu miraala okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa yaasiimya Musengwa Katonda we, olw'ebirungi n'ebituufu bye yakola." 
2Chronicles14:3 Yaatoolagho alutaari edh'abamaghanga agandi n'ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, yaamenhamenhagho empango edh'amabaale, era yaatemagho n'ebifaananie bya Ashera, omusambwa gwaibwe omukazi." 
2Chronicles14:4 Yaalagira abantu b'omu Buyudaaya okukolanga ebyo Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe by'ayenda, n'okugemanga amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye." 
2Chronicles14:5 Era yaatoola mu bibuga byonabyona ebya Buyudaaya, ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, ni alutaari edh'okuniokezaaku obubbaani. Kale, mu biseera bye, obwakyabazinga bwe bwaba mu miraala." 
2Chronicles14:6 Yaazimba mu Buyudaaya ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu, kuba ensi yali mu miraala. Mu myaka egyo, Asa tiyali na ntalo, kuba Musengwa Katonda yamugha okuba emiraala." 
2Chronicles14:7 Yaakoba abantu b'omu Buyudaaya ati: “Ka tuzimbe ebibuga bino, tubyezunguluzeeku n'ebimante ebigumu, tubizimbeku n'ebituuti ebirengererwaku, era tubiteeku n'endhigi edhiriku ebisiba munda. Ensi eno ekaali yaife, kuba twakola Musengwa Katonda waife by'ayenda. Twakola by'ayenda kyeyava n'atugha emiraala ku ndhuyi dhaife dhoonadhoona.” Kale baazimba, era ebintu byabajiiranga bukalamu." 
2Chronicles14:8 Kyabazinga Asa yali n'eigye ly'abalwani emitwalo amakumi asatu (300,000) abaava mu kika kya Yuda, abaalwanisanga engabo n'amafumo. Era yaaba n'abalwani emitwalo abiri na munaana (280,000) abaava mu kika kya Benjamini, abaalwanisanga engabo n'obulaso. Abo boonaboona baali balwani ba maani abaziramu ntete." 
2Chronicles14:9 Agho ghaabaagho Omwethiopia ayetebwa Zera, yaabalumba n'eigye lya balwani akakaire kalamba (1,000,000), n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ebikumi bisatu. Yaidha yaatuukira irala e Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa yaaja okumulwanisa. Endhuyi dhombi dhaasimbya abalwani baadho enhiriri mu kiiko ky'e Zefatha okumpi n'e Maresha, baalingagana nga beetegeike okulwana." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa yaasaba Musengwa Katonda we ng'akoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, ezirayo ali ng'oti niiwe mu kuyamba abanafu n'ab'amaani. Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, tuyambe ife, kuba niiwe ye twesiga era twidhie mu liina lyo okulwanisa eigye lino einene liti. Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe Katonda waife. Otaikiriza muntu kukughangula naire.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaaghangula Abaethiopia mu maiso ga Asa n'ag'Abayudaaya. Abaethiopia baalumuka. 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa n'abantu be yali nabo baababingirira okutuuka e Gerari. Abaethiopia kamaala inho baitibwa, eigye lyaibwe nga tirikaasobola kwesoloza ghalala kulwana, kuba Musengwa Katonda yabaghangula yaabamala amaani n'eigye lye. Abayudaaya baatwala omunhago mungi inho." 
2Chronicles14:14 Baazikiriza ebibuga byonabyona ebyetooloire Gerari, kuba abantu baayo Musengwa Katonda yabaleetera okutya. Baanhagulula ebibuga ebyo byonabyona, kuba byalimu ebintu kamaala eby'okunhaga." 
2Chronicles14:15 Era baalumba ni weema edh'abaayi, baanhaga entaama n'engamiya kamaala inho. Bwe baamala, bairayo e Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwaidha ku Azaria, mutabane wa Odedi." 
2Chronicles15:2 Azaria oyo yaaja ewa Asa, yaamukoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, mpulirisa. N'imwe ab'ekika kya Yuda n'ab'ekya Benjamini, mumpulirise. Musengwa Katonda ali ghalala n'imwe, kasita mwena ni muba aghalala naye. Bwe mumunoonia, musobola okumuzuula, aye bwe mumuvaaku, nga yeena abalekulira agho." 
2Chronicles15:3 Abaisiraeli baamala ekiseera kinene nga bazira Katonda mwenemwene, era nga bazira kabona ayegeresa, waire okuba n'amateeka." 
2Chronicles15:4 Aye bwe baali mu buzibu, baakyukira eri Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, baamunoonia era baamuzuula." 
2Chronicles15:5 Mu biseera ebyo tighaaligho miraala. Ng'omuntu tasobola kutambula n'aja era n'aira nga ghazira kimutuuseeku, kuba ghaaligho obutabanguko kamaala obweraliikirizanga abatyamye boonaboona ab'omu nsi." 
2Chronicles15:6 Tighaaligho kwegaita: ng'ekiketezo kino kirwanisa kire, ate ekibuga kire kyalwanisa ekindi, kuba Katonda yabatuusa ku kudaazibwadaazibwa yaabaleetera okweraliikirira okutakobeka." 
2Chronicles15:7 Aye imwe mugume bugume, mulobe kuwaamu maani, muligheebwa empeera olw'ebyo bye mukola.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Asa bwe yawulira eby'obulanzi Azaria mutabane wa Odedi bye yayogera, yaafuna amaani. Yaatoola mu kiketezo kya Yuda n'ekya Benjamini, ebintu ebyenhinhalwa ebitali Katonda ebyasinzibwanga. Yaatoolayo n'ebyo ebyali mu bibuga ebyo byonabyona bye yanhaga mu kiketezo kya Efuraimu eky'oku nsozi. Era yaizaagho buyaaka alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda eyali emberi gh'eisinzizo." 
2Chronicles15:9 Agho Asa yaasoloza ab'ekika kya Yuda boonaboona, n'ab'ekya Benjamini. Yaasoloza n'abandi abaabanga aghalala n'abo eyo, abaava mu biketezo bino: ekya Efuraimu, n'ekya Manasse, n'ekya Simeoni kuba abantu kamaala inho baasenguka baava mu biketezo ebyo ebya Isiraeli, baasenga mu bwakyabazinga bwa Asa oyo, nga bamaze okubona Musengwa Katonda we, bw'ali aghalala naye." 
2Chronicles15:10 Agho beesololeza e Yerusalemu, mu mwezi ogwokusatu, mu mwaka ogweikumi n'etaanu, nga kyabazinga Asa oyo n'afuga." 
2Chronicles15:11 Baaghaayo emisengo eri Musengwa Katonda ku lunaku olwo, gino: ente enume lusanvu (700), n'entaama kasanvu (7,000), nga batoola ku munhago gwe baaleeta." 
2Chronicles15:12 Baakola endagaano okusinzanga Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe n'omutima gwaibwe gwonagwona era n'omwoyo gwaibwe gwonagwona." 
2Chronicles15:13 Era nga kiisi muntu aloba okusinza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, omuntu oyo k'abe mukulu oba muto, k'abe musaadha oba mukazi, aba wa kwitibwa." 
2Chronicles15:14 Baalayirira Musengwa Katonda nga boogerera ghaigulu n'amaani, era nga bafuuwa amagwala n'endeka." 
2Chronicles15:15 Abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya baasangaalira okulayira okwo, kuba baalayira n'omutima gwaibwe gwonagwona. Era kuba baanoonia Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwaibwe gwonagwona baamuzuula, yaabagha emiraala ku ndhuyi dhaibwe dhoonadhoona." 
2Chronicles15:16 Era kyabazinga Asa oyo yaatoola ni ku dhaadha we Maaka ekitiibwa eky'okuba inhina owa kyabazinga, kuba Maaka oyo yakola ekifaananie ekyenhinhalwa ekyasinzibwanga, eky'omusambwa omukazi Ashera. Asa yaatemagho ekifaananie ekyo, yaakimenhamenha, yaakyokera ku kaiga Kiduroni." 
2Chronicles15:17 Aye waire Asa oyo tiyamaliragho irala mu Isiraeli bifo bigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu, obulamu bwe bwonabwona yali mwesigwa ye Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles15:18 Yaata mu isinzizo ebintu lata we bye yeeyama okughaayo bibe ebya Musengwa Katonda, era ni mwene bye yeeyama okughaayo, ebya zaabu ni feeza." 
2Chronicles15:19 Tighaalighooku lutalo kabiri, okutuusa mu mwaka ogwasatu n'etaanu (35) ogw'obufuzi bwa Asa oyo." 
2Chronicles16:1 Mu mwaka ogwasatu n'omukaaga (36) nga kyabazinga Asa n'afuga Buyudaaya, kyabazinga Baasha owa Isiraeli yaalumba Buyudaaya. Yaazimba ekimante ekigumu okwezunguluza ekibuga Rama, ghalobe kubaagho ava mu Buyudaaya, waire ajaayo okutuuka ku kyabazinga waayo Asa." 
2Chronicles16:2 Agho Asa yaatoola feeza ni zaabu mu iterekero ly'eisinzizo, ni mu iterekero erirye nga kyabazinga, yaamugheereza kyabazinga Benihadadi ow'e Siria, eyabanga mu Damasiko, ng'amukoba ati:" 
2Chronicles16:3 “Ka tukole endagaano ey'enkolagana ey'aghalala, nga balata baife ye baakola. Bona eno, nkugheereiza feeza ni zaabu. Ja omenhegho endagaano yo ey'enkolagana ni kyabazinga Baasha owa Isiraeli, olwo abe ng'ali n'okutoola amagye ge mu kiketezo kyange.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Benihadadi yaaganha kyabazinga Asa bye yamukoba. Yaatuma abaduumizi b'eigye lye okulumba ebibuga bya Isiraeli. Baagema ebibuga bino: Iyoni, ni Dani, ni Abeli Maimu, n'ebibuga bya Nafutali byonabyona ebyalimu amaterekero." 
2Chronicles16:5 Kyabazinga Baasha bwe yawulira ebigwiregho, yaalekera agho okuzimba ekimante ekigumu okwezunguluza ekibuga Rama, yaakomya agho omulimo ogwo." 
2Chronicles16:6 Agho kyabazinga Asa yaatwala abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona, baaja baatoola e Rama amabaale n'emiti, Baasha bye yali ali kuzimbisa. Asa yaabizimbisa ebibuga, Geba ni Mizipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Mu kiseera ekyo, omulanzi Hanani yaaja ye kyabazinga Asa owa Buyudaaya, yaamukoba ati: “Olw'okuba weesiga kyabazinga wa Siria, waaloba kwesiga Musengwa Katonda wo, eigye lya Isiraeli likweibyeku lyakulumukaku." 
2Chronicles16:8 Abaethiopia n'Abalibiya tibaali igye inene inho, nga liri n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo n'abavuzi b'embalaasi kamaala? Aye olw'okuba weesiga Musengwa Katonda, Musengwa Katonda oyo yaakuleetera okubaghangula." 
2Chronicles16:9 Musengwa Katonda abona mu nsi mwonamwona buli kiseera, asobole okugha amaani abo ab'emyoyo egimwesiga. Kale kino ky'okoze kya kisiru. Okuva n'olwaleero oidha kubanga mu kulwana ntalo.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Agho Asa yaasungughalira inho omulanzi oyo olw'ebyo bye yayogera, yaamugema yaamuta mu ikomera. Mu biseera n'ebirala ebyo, Asa oyo yaabisanga bubi n'obukambwe abantu abandi." 
2Chronicles16:11 Asa bye yakola, okuva lwe yatoolera okufuga okutuuka lwe yakoma, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo ebya bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya n'aba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles16:12 Mu mwaka gwe ogwamakumi asatu n'omwenda (39) ku bwakyabazinga, yaalwala ebigere, yaaba bubi inho. Aye era, waire nga yalumizibwa inho, tiyasaba Musengwa Katonda kumuwonia. Yakozesanga bwa bayigha okumwidhandhaba." 
2Chronicles16:13 Agho Asa oyo yaafa mu mwaka gwe ogwamakumi ana n'omulala (41) ku bwakyabazinga, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa." 
2Chronicles16:14 Era yaaziikibwa mu magombe, mwene ge yeesimira mu lubaale, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Omulambo gwe baagulambaaza ku buliri obwidhwire obuwoowo obwa buli ngeri, obwatabulwa abakugu. Baakuma ekisiki eky'omuliro ekikologho, olw'okumulira." 
2Chronicles17:1 Agho Yehoshafati yaasikira lata we oyo Asa ku bwakyabazinga, era yeenhweza okulwanisa Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles17:2 Yaata amagye mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya byonabyona ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu. Ni mu biketezo bya Buyudaaya eby'omu byalo yaataayo enkambi dh'abalwani, ni mu bibuga by'omu Efuraimu lata we Asa bye yanhaga, mwona yaataamu enkambi dh'abalwani." 
2Chronicles17:3 Musengwa Katonda yaagha Yehoshafati enkabi, kuba yajiiranga ku mpisa enkalamu edha lata we edhaasooka, yaaloba kusinzanga emisambwa egyetebwa Baali." 
2Chronicles17:4 Yaasinzanga Katonda owa lata we ng'agema ebiragiro bye, yaaloba kujiiranga ku ebyo abantu ab'omu Isiraeli bye baakolanga." 
2Chronicles17:5 Kale Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera obwakyabazinga bwa Yehoshafati okukakata, era abantu b'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona baaleeteranga Yehoshafati oyo omusolo, yaakombaghala era yaaba wa kitiibwa inho." 
2Chronicles17:6 Omwoyo gwe yagumaliranga ku kukola ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'ayenda, era yaatoolagho mu Buyudaaya ebifo ebigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu, n'ebifaananie by'omusambwa omukazi Ashera." 
2Chronicles17:7 Mu mwaka gwe ogwokusatu nga ni kyabazinga, yaatuma abakungu be okuja okwegeresa mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya, bano: Benihaili, ni Obadia, ni Zekaria, ni Nethaneli, ni Mikaia." 
2Chronicles17:8 Abakungu abo baagherekerwaku Abalevi bano: Shemaia, ni Nethania, ni Zebadia, ni Asaheli, ni Shemiramothi, ni Yehonathani, ni Adoniya, ni Tobiya, ni Tobadoniya. Ate Abalevi abo baagherekerwaku bakabona, Elishama ni Yehoramu." 
2Chronicles17:9 Baatwala ekitabo eky'Amateeka ga Musengwa Katonda, baaja nga babitabita mu bibuga byonabyona ebya Buyudaaya, nga beegeresa abantu amateeka ago." 
2Chronicles17:10 Musengwa Katonda yaata okutya mu bantu b'obwakyabazinga bwonabwona obwali bwetooloire Buyudaaya, baaloba kutanulagho lutalo lwonalwona ku Yehoshafati." 
2Chronicles17:11 Abandi ku Bafilisiti baaleetera Yehoshafati ebirabo era baamugha ni feeza ng'omusolo. Abawarabu boona baamugha entaama enume kasanvu na lusanvu (7,700), n'embuzi enume dhoona kasanvu na lusanvu (7,700)." 
2Chronicles17:12 Yehoshafati yaaja nga yeeyongera okuba ow'amaani, yaazimba ebifo eby'okwewogomamu, n'ebibuga ebyalimu amaterekero," 
2Chronicles17:13 olwo yaaba ng'ali n'amaterekero amakologho mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya. Yaata mu Yerusalemu abaisirukale ab'amaani abaziramu ntete," 
2Chronicles17:14 nga bategekeibwa nga bajiira ku nda dha baiseibwe: Adana n'eyali akulira baduumizi baine abaaduumiranga ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi ab'omu kika kya Yuda boonaboona aghalala ng'akulira abaisirukale ab'amaani abaziramu ntete, emitwalo amakumi asatu (300,000)." 
2Chronicles17:15 Yehohanani n'eyali omuduumizi amwiririra, ng'akulira abaisirukale emitwalo amakumi abiri na munaana (280,000)." 
2Chronicles17:16 Ku oyo kwairaku Amasia mutabane wa Zikiri, eyeeghaayo ekyeyendere okugheereza Musengwa Katonda, ng'ali n'abaisirukale ab'amaani abaziramu ntete emitwalo amakumi abiri (200,000)." 
2Chronicles17:17 Omuduumizi w'ebikunsu by'eigye ery'ekika kya Benjamini yali nga ni Eliada, omulwani ow'amaani aziramu ntete, ng'akulira abaisirukale emitwalo amakumi abiri (200,000) abalwanisa obulaso n'engabo." 
2Chronicles17:18 Yehozabadi n'eyali omuduumizi amwiririra, ng'akulira abaisirukale emitwalo ikumi na munaana (180,000) abatendekebwa obukalamu mu by'okulwana." 
2Chronicles17:19 Abo n'abaagheerezanga kyabazinga, nga tobaliireeku abo be yata mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona, mu bibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu." 
2Chronicles18:1 Agho kyabazinga Yehoshafati owa Buyudaaya yaaba mukombe inho era nga wa kitiibwa. Yaataagho enkolagana ni kyabazinga Ahabu owa Isiraeli, ng'aleetagho okufumbiraganwa ghagati gh'ab'endhu ye n'ab'endhu ya Ahabu oyo." 
2Chronicles18:2 Emyaka nga gibiseeghooku, yaaja e Samaria ewa Ahabu. Ahabu yaitira Yehoshafati oyo n'abantu be yali nabo, entaama n'ente kamaala inho, era yaagezaaku okumwikirizisa aje alumbe ekibuga Ramothi eky'e Gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahabu yaabuuza Yehoshafati ati: “Onaaja ninze okulumba Ramothi eky'e Gileadi?” Yehoshafati yaamwiramu ati: “Nze n'iwe tuli kirala. Abantu bange n'ekirala n'ababo. Twidha kuja n'iwe.” 
2Chronicles18:4 Aye Yehoshafati yaakoba kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ati: “Mala kwebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda owulire ky'akoba.” 
2Chronicles18:5 Agho kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaasoloza abalanzi ebikumi bina (400), yaababuuza ati: “Nje numbe Ramothi eky'e Gileadi, oba ntakirumba?” Bairamu bati: “Ja okirumbe, Musengwa Katonda aidha kukikugha okighangule.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Aye Yehoshafati yaakoba ati: “Ghano ghaziraghooku mulanzi wa Musengwa Katonda wundi tumwebuuzeeku?” 
2Chronicles18:7 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaakoba Yehoshafati ati: “Ghakaaligho mulala ye tusobola okubitamu okwebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda. Oyo ni Mikaia, mutabane wa Imula. Aye timwenda naire, kuba talangangaku bikalamu ku nze, okutoolaku ebibi.” Yehoshafati yaakoba ati: “Kyabazinga, otakoba otyo.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Agho kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yaayeta mulala ku bakungu be, yaamukoba ati: “Ja mangu oleete ghano Mikaia mutabane wa Imula.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ni kyabazinga Yehoshafati owa Buyudaaya, baali bavaire ebivaalo byaibwe eby'obwakyabazinga, nga batyaime, buli muntu ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, agho gha kifo aghakubirwa engaano, okumpi n'omulyango ogwingira Samaria. Abalanzi boonaboona baali bali kulanga agho mu maiso gaibwe." 
2Chronicles18:10 Agho owundi ku balanzi abo, eriina lye nga ni Zedekia mutabane Kenaana, yeekolera amayiga mu kyuma ekigumu einho, yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Amayiga gano g'oidha okukozesa okufula Abasiria okutuusa lw'olibaghangula.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 N'abalanzi abandi boonaboona baalanga batyo, nga bakoba bati: “Ja olumbe Ramothi eky'e Gileadi, oidha kukighangula. Musengwa Katonda aidha kukikugha okighangule.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Agho omukwenda eyaja okweta Mikaia, yaakoba Mikaia oyo ati: “Bona eno, abalanzi abandi boonaboona balanze bughanguzi eri kyabazinga. Weena ogwaine olange nga beene bwe bakoze, ng'oyogera bikalamu.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Aye Mikaia yaakoba ati: “Ndayira mu Musengwa Katonda omulamu nti, ndidha kwogera ekyo Katonda oyo ky'anankoba okwogera.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Mikaia bwe yatuuka mu maiso ga kyabazinga Ahabu, kyabazinga Ahabu oyo yaamubuuza ati: “Nje numbe Ramothi eky'e Gileadi, oba ntakirumba?” Mikaia yaamwiramu ati: “Ja olumbe Ramothi eky'e Gileadi, oidha kukighangula. Musengwa Katonda aidha kukikuta mu ngalo.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Aye Ahabu yaamukoba ati: “Nakukoba nti bw'obanga ng'oli kwogera ninze mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda, ogwaine oyogere mazima gonka. Oyenda nkwiraganemu ekintu ekyo mikuzi emeka?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Mikaia yaakoba ati: “Mboine abaisirukale ba Isiraeli boonaboona nga basansaaniire eyo ku nsozi, ng'oti n'entaama edhiziraku mwayi. Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati, ‘Abantu abo baziraku mukulembeze. Leka buli muntu aireyo miraala mu maka ge.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Kyabazinga Ahabu owa Isiraeli yaakoba Yehoshafati ati: “Tyakukobeire nti taidha kulanga bikalamu ku nze, okutoolaku ebibi!”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaia yeeyongera okukoba ati: “Kale ni wulira Musengwa Katonda by'akoba: Mboine Musengwa Katonda oyo ng'atyaime ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, ng'eigye lyonalyona ery'omu igulu lyemereire ku luuyi lwe olw'omukono omusaadha ni ku lw'omugooda." 
2Chronicles18:19 Musengwa Katonda yaabuuza ati, ‘Naani anaasendasenda Ahabu okuja e Ramothi eky'e Gileadi, bamwite?’ Ono yaakoba kino, ate ole yaakoba kire." 
2Chronicles18:20 Agho ghaidhagho omwoyo gwayemerera mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, gwakoba guti, ‘Nze ndidha kumusendasenda.’" 
2Chronicles18:21 “Musengwa Katonda yaagubuuza ati, ‘Mu nsambo ki?’ “Omwoyo gwamwiramu guti, ‘Ndidha kuja ndhogeze abalanzi be boonaboona eby'obuguya.’ “Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati, ‘Oidha kusobola okumusendasenda. Kale ja okole otyo.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:22 Mikaia yaamaliriza ng'akoba ati: “Kale ni Musengwa Katonda ataire omwoyo ogw'obuguya mu kanwa omw'abalanzi bo boonaboona, era iwe by'akwogeireku bya kabi.”" 
2Chronicles18:23 Agho omulanzi Zedekia mutabane wa Kenaana, yaaseeta ye Mikaia, yaamukuba oluyi ku itama era yaamubuuza ati: “Omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwanviireku gutya, memale gwogere n'iwe?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaia yairamu ati: “Mu butuufu, ekyo olikimanha ku lunaku lw'olingira mu kisenge eky'omunda okwegisa.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Agho kyabazinga Ahabu yaalagira ati: “Mugeme Mikaia mumutwale eri Amoni omukulu w'ekibuga, n'eri omulangira Yoashi mutabane wa kyabazinga," 
2Chronicles18:26 mubakobe muti, ‘Kyabazinga alagiire ati omusaadha oyo mumute mu ikomera, era mumughenga emere n'amaadhi nga mumupimiraku bupimire, okutuusa nga ndhize miraala.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Agho Mikaia yaakoba ati: “Bw'oiranga emiraala, nga koodhi Musengwa Katonda tayogereire mu nze.” Era yaayongeraku ati: “Imwe abantu mwenamwena, muwulire kye ndhogeire.”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Agho kyabazinga Ahabu owa Isiraeli ni kyabazinga Yehoshafati owa Buyudaaya, baaja okulumba ekibuga Ramothi eky'e Gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:29 Ahabu yaakoba Yehoshafati ati: “Nze ndidha kuja mu lutalo nga neefuusiisafuusiisa ng'oti ndi muntu wundi, aye iwe oidha kuvaala ebivaalo byo eby'obwakyabazinga.” Kale baaja mu lutalo, nga kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yeefuusiisafuusiisa." 
2Chronicles18:30 Kyabazinga wa Siria yali amaze okulagira abaduumizi b'ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, ati: “Mutalwanisa muntu wundi yeenayeena, k'abe omukulu oba omuto, okutoolaku kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yenka.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Agho abaduumizi b'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo abo bwe baabona kyabazinga Yehoshafati, baadhuuba bati ni kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, era baakyuka okumulwanisa. Aye Yehoshafati oyo bwe yayana einho, Musengwa Katonda yaamubeera, yaamubawonia." 
2Chronicles18:32 Abaduumizi abo bwe baabona nga ti ni kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, baalekera agho okumubingirira." 
2Chronicles18:33 Agho ghaabaagho omwisirukale Omusiria eyalasa akalaso ke eyo atyo, aye yaagemya kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, agho ekivaalo kye eky'omu lutalo eky'ekyuma ghe kyegaitira mu kifuba. Kyabazinga yaakoba omuvuzi w'ekigaali kye eky'omu lutalo ati: “Kyusa ekigaali ontoole mu lutalo, kuba banfumiite.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Olutalo lwataama inho ku lunaku olwo. Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli baamugemerera bugemerere mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo okwolekera Abasiria. Yaamala yaafa eigulo eryo, ng'endhuba eri kugwa." 
2Chronicles19:1 Agho kyabazinga Yehoshafati owa Buyudaaya yaira miraala mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga e Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles19:2 Omulanzi ayetebwa Yehu, mutabane wa Hanani, yaaja okumweisuusaayo, era yaamukoba ati: “Obwo bwene, obona nga iwe ogwaniire okuyamba ababi n'okugonza abo abakyagha Musengwa Katonda? Ekyo ky'okoze kikuleeteire obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda okukwidhira." 
2Chronicles19:3 Aye era iwe okaaliku ebirungi, kuba wasaaniagho mu nsi yo ebifaananie by'omusambwa omukazi Ashera, era waafuba okukolanga ebyo Katonda by'ayenda.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Agho Yehoshafati yaabanga mu Yerusalemu. Aye era yaavangayo emikuzi egindi, yaajanga mu bantu olw'okubaiza eri Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe, ng'aviira irala e Beerisheba okutuukira irala mu biketezo bya Efuraimu eby'oku nsozi." 
2Chronicles19:5 Yaataagho abalamuzi mu kiisi kibuga kya mu Buyudaaya ekyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu. 
2Chronicles19:6 Era yaasikirira abalamuzi abo ati: “Mwegenderezenga bye mukola, kuba timulamula na bukumu bwa bantu buntu, aye mulamula ku lwa Musengwa Katonda aba aghalala n'imwe nga muli kusala emisango." 
2Chronicles19:7 Kale ni mutyenga Musengwa Katonda era mutenga omwoyo ku bye mukola, kuba Musengwa Katonda waife oyo aziramu kufuulaniafuulania nsonga, oba okusaliriza, waire okulya enguzi.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Ate mu Yerusalemu, Yehoshafati oyo yataamu Abalevi, ni bakabona, n'abandi ku bakulira enda mu Isiraeli, yaabagha okusalanga emisango egiizibwa ku Mateeka ga Musengwa Katonda, n'okulamulanga enkaayana mu bantu." 
2Chronicles19:9 Agho yaabasikirira ng'abakoba ati: “Mugwaine mukolenga omulimo ogwo nga mutya Musengwa Katonda, nga muli beesigwa, era nga mukola n'omutima gwaimwe gwonagwona." 
2Chronicles19:10 Baganda baimwe ababa mu bibuga ebindi bwe banaabaleeteranga emisango, ka gibe egy'obutemo, oba egy'okumenha amateeka n'ebiragiro, oba egy'obutatuukiriza byonabyona ebibalagirwa, mubagalagirenga balobe kwonoona ye Musengwa Katonda. Bwemutaakolenga mutyo, tomanha Musengwa Katonda bw'abasungughalira imwe ghalala ni baganda baimwe abo. Kale ni mukolenga mutyo, mulobenga kubaaku musango." 
2Chronicles19:11 Era bona eno, Amaria Kabona Omukulu n'aidha okubalabiriranga mu byonabyona ebigemagana ni Musengwa Katonda. Ate Zebadia mutabane wa Ishimaeli akulira endhu ya Yuda, n'aidha okubalabiriranga mu ebyo ebigemagana ni kyabazinga. Olwo Abalevi bavunaanizibwenga okubona ng'ebinaabanga bisaliibwagho bituukirizibwa. Mubenga bagumu nga mukola omulimo ogwo, era Musengwa Katonda abenga ghalala n'abo abeesimbu.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Ebyo nga biwoire, Abamoabu, n'Abammoni, ghalala n'abandi ku Bameuni, baidha baalumba Yehoshafati okumulwanisa." 
2Chronicles20:2 Ghaidhagho abakwenda baakoba Yehoshafati bati: “Eigye einene liidhie okukulumba nga liva mu Edomu, ere ng'osomoike Enhandha Eyomuunhu. Era mpegaano liri Hazazoni Tamari ekyo era nga n'ekiketezo ekyetebwa Engedi.”" 
2Chronicles20:3 Yehoshafati yaatya, yaasaba Musengwa Katonda ng'amweghemba, era yaalangirira ghabeegho okusiiba mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona." 
2Chronicles20:4 Abantu baava mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya byonabyona, beesoloza okusaba Musengwa Katonda abayambe." 
2Chronicles20:5 Agho Yehoshafati yaayemerera mu maiso g'abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu abaali beesololeiza emberi gh'oluya oluyaaka olw'eisinzizo. 
2Chronicles20:6 Yaasaba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baife, iwe oba eyo mu igulu waafuga obwakyabazinga obw'amaghanga goonagoona. Oli n'obuyinza n'amaani, era ghazira asobola kukutakania." 
2Chronicles20:7 Wo Katonda waife, iwe wabinga mu nsi eno abantu abaagirimu ng'abantu bo Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuukayo. Waagigha baidhukulu ba mukagwa wo Aburahamu, ebenga yaibwe lubeerera." 
2Chronicles20:8 Era bagibairemu baakuzimbira n'eisinzizo ery'okukusinzizangamu, nga bakoba bati," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Akabi bwe kanaatutuukangaku, ka lube olutalo, oba okusalirwa omusango, oba obulwaire obubi, oba endhala, twidha kwemereranga mu maiso go emberi gh'eisinzizo lino kuba agho ghe twidha twakusinza, twakukobera nga bwe tudaazibwadaazibwa, era iwe waatuwulirisa waatuwonia.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 “Mpegaano bona, Abammoni, n'Abamoabu, n'abantu ab'oku lusozi Seiri batulumbye. Ate nga badhaadha baife bwe baava mu nsi Misiri, tiwabaganha kulumba bantu abo. Badhaadha baife baabita ghala n'abantu abo, baaloba kuseeta ye bali era baaloba kubazikiriza." 
2Chronicles20:11 Buti bali kutusasulamu na kutubinga mu nsi ye watugha okubanga obutaka bwaife. 
2Chronicles20:12 Wo Katonda waife, babonereze, kuba ife tuzira maani ga kulwanisa igye inene lino eritulumbye. Titwidhi kya kukola, aye tulingiriire ku iwe.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Mu kiseera n'ekirala ekyo, abasaadha boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya baali beemereire agho ni bakazi baibwe, n'abaana baibwe." 
2Chronicles20:14 Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwaidha ku Mulevi eyali mu bantu abaali beesololeiza agho. Omulevi oyo ng'ayetebwa Yahazieli mutabane wa Zekaria, Zekaria mutabane wa Benaia, Benaia mutabane wa Yeieli, Yeieli mutabane wa Mattania, owundi ku baana ba Asafu." 
2Chronicles20:15 Yahazieli oyo yaakoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga Yehoshafati, n'imwe mwenamwena abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu, muwulirise: Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, mutatya, era eigye lino einene litabamalamu maani, kuba olutalo luno ti niimwe mwidha okululwana, aye Katonda mwene n'aidha okululwana." 
2Chronicles20:16 Olwaidho imwe muje mubalumbe. Mwidha kubabona nga bali kuniinaniina ghale aghaingirirwa mu Zizi, olwo mubaagaane ekiiko ghe kikoma, aghatandiikira eirungu ery'e Yerueli." 
2Chronicles20:17 Tikiidha kubeetaagisa imwe kulwana lutalo luno. Imwe mwetegeke, mwemerere bwemerere, olwo mubone obughanguzi Musengwa Katonda bw'anaabagha. Imwe abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, mutatya era mutawaamu maani. Olwaidho imwe muje mubalumbe, Musengwa Katonda aidha kuba ghalala n'imwe.”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Agho Yehoshafati yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. N'abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu baakuba amakiryaivu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, baamusinza." 
2Chronicles20:19 Abalevi abasimuka mu Kohathi ni mu Kora, baayemerera, baasaaka Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli mu mamiro ag'amaani einho." 
2Chronicles20:20 Bwe bwakya, baasituka ku nkyo okuja mu irungu ly'e Tekoa. Bwe baali bali kuja, Yehoshafati yaayemerera, yaakoba ati: “Imwe abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, mumpulirise. Mwikirize Musengwa Katonda waimwe, olwo mwidha kuba bagumu. Mwikirize eby'abalanzi be, olwo mwidha kughangula.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Bwe yamala okwebuuzaaku ku bantu, yaataagho ab'okwembera Musengwa Katonda okumusaaka, nga bavaire ebivaalo eby'emikolo emitukuvu. Abo baakulemberamu eigye, baaja nga bemba bati: “Musaake Musengwa Katonda, kuba okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Bwe baatoolera okwemba n'okusaaka, Musengwa Katonda yaazinduukiriza Abammoni, n'Abamoabu, n'abantu ab'oku lusozi Seiri, abaali balumbye Buyudaaya eigye lyaibwe lyagumbulukuka." 
2Chronicles20:23 Abammoni n'Abamoabu baalumba abantu ab'oku lusozi Seiri, baabaita okubasaaniagho. Era bwe baamala okubasaaniagho, olwo boonaboona baatoolera okwitagana beene na beene." 
2Chronicles20:24 Abayudaaya bwe baatuuka ku kituuti ekirengererwaku eky'omu mu irungu, baalengeza eri eigye ery'abazigu eribaire einene. Baabona nga boonaboona mirambo egigwire agho, era ghazira muntu awoniegho." 
2Chronicles20:25 Yehoshafati n'abantu be bwe baajaayo okutoolayo omunhago, baayagaanayo eby'obukombe kamaala, n'engoye, n'ebintu eby'omughendo, baatwalaku bye baasobola, ebindi byabalemeragho. Baamala enaku isatu nga bakaasomba omunhago ogwo, kuba gwali mungi." 
2Chronicles20:26 Ku lunaku olwokuna beesololeza mu kiiko kya Beraka, baasaaka Musengwa Katonda. Era okuva ku olwo ekifo ekyo kyayetebwanga ekiiko kya Beraka." 
2Chronicles20:27 Agho Yehoshafati yaakulembera abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, bairayo e Yerusalemu nga basangaavu, kuba Musengwa Katonda yaghangula abazigu baibwe." 
2Chronicles20:28 Bwe baatuuka e Yerusalemu, baaja mu isinzizo nga bali kukuba entongooli n'endingidi, eno nga bwe bafuuwa n'amagwala." 
2Chronicles20:29 Abantu ab'omu bwakyabazinga obw'ensi dhoonadhoona bwe baawulira nga Musengwa Katonda alwaniisa abazigu ba Isiraeli, baatya inho Katonda oyo." 
2Chronicles20:30 Kale obwakyabazinga bwa Yehoshafati bwaba bwa miraala, kuba Katonda yamugha emiraala ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona." 
2Chronicles20:31 Yehoshafati yafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya ng'agheza emyaka amakumi asatu n'etaanu egy'obukulu, era yaafugira entangama ya myaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali nga ni Azuba, mughala wa Shilihi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Yehoshafati oyo yali wa mpisa nkalamu era nga tadhivaaku, ng'oti ni lata we Asa bweyali. Yaakolanga ebirungi Musengwa Katonda by'asiima." 
2Chronicles20:33 Aye ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu tiyabitoolagho. Abantu baasigala nga bakaali kwemalira ku kugheereza Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe. 
2Chronicles20:34 Ebindi byonabyona Yehoshafati bye yakola, okuva lwe yatoolera okufuga okutuuka lwe yakoma, byaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Yehu mutabane wa Hanani, era byamala byaingizibwa mu kitabo eky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles20:35 Ebyo nga biwoire, kyabazinga Yehoshafati oyo owa Buyudaaya, yeeyimba ni kyabazinga Ahazia owa Isiraeli eyakola ebibi kamaala." 
2Chronicles20:36 Baakola naye amaato ag'okujanga e Tarushishi, nga bagakolera mu Ezionigeberi." 
2Chronicles20:37 Agho Eliezeri mutabane wa Dodavahu ow'e Maresha, yaalanga ng'alabula Yehoshafati ati: “Nga bwe weeyimbye ni Ahazia, Musengwa Katonda aidha kuzikiriza by'okoze.” Kale amaato ago gaamenhekera mu nhandha, gaaloba kusobola kuja e Tarushishi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Agho Yehoshafati oyo yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu lwambiidhi lwa badhaadha be abo, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Mutabane we Yehoramu yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles21:2 Yehoramu yali ni baganda be bano: Azaria, ni Yehieli, ni Zekaria, ni Azaria owundi, ni Mikaeli, ni Shefatia boonaboona abo nga batabane ba Yehoshafati kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya." 
2Chronicles21:3 Iseibwe oyo Yehoshafati yabagha ebintu kamaala: feeza, ni zaabu, n'ebintu ebindi eby'omughendo, ghalala n'ebibuga mu Buyudaaya ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu. Aye obwakyabazinga yaabugha Yehoramu, kuba n'eyali omwana omuberi." 
2Chronicles21:4 Era Yehoramu oyo bwe baamala okumutyamya ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga bwa ise, n'amala n'okukakata ku bwakyabazinga obwo, yaita baganda be boonaboona, n'abandi ku bakungu mu Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yehoramu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, yali agheza emyaka amakumi asatu n'ebiri egy'obukulu, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka munaana mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles21:6 Yafumbirwa mughala wa Ahabu, era yaakola ng'ab'endhu ya Ahabu oyo bwe baakola, yeebisa bubi nga bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli bwe baakola, yaakola ebibi ye Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles21:7 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaaloba kwenda kuzikiriza bantu ba ndhu ya Daudi kubamaliriragho, kuba yasuubiza omugheereza we Daudi oyo ati eizaire lye n'erinaafuganga obwakyabazinga obwo ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
2Chronicles21:8 Mu biseera bya Yehoramu oyo, Abaedomu baadheemera Buyudaaya, beeteeragho obwakyabazinga obwaibwe." 
2Chronicles21:9 Agho Yehoramu n'abaduumizi be, ng'ali ghalala n'ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo byonabyona, baaja baalumba ensi Edomu. Eigye ery'Abaedomu lyabazingiza okubeezunguluza. Agho mwene ghalala n'abaduumizi b'ebigaali bye eby'omu lutalo, baasituka obwire, baasobola okughaguza era baaja." 
2Chronicles21:10 Kale Abaedomu batyo bwe baadheemera Buyudaaya ni ye buli eno. Era mu biseera byene ebyo, n'ab'omu kibuga Libuna boona baadheemera Yehoramu oyo, olw'okuba yava ku Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha be." 
2Chronicles21:11 Ate n'ekindi, yazimba ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu ku biketezo bya Buyudaaya eby'oku nsozi, yaaleetera abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona, okwonoona eri Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles21:12 Agho omulanzi Eliya yaagheereza Yeroboamu embaluwa ng'ekoba eti: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa dhaadha wo Daudi akoba ati, waloba okwebisanga obukalamu nga lata wo Yehoshafati bwe yakolanga, era nga dhaadha wo Asa kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya yeena bwe yakolanga." 
2Chronicles21:13 Aye weebisanga bubi nga bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli bwe baakolanga, waaleetera abantu b'omu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona okuva ku Musengwa Katonda, ng'oti ni Ahabu n'ab'endhu ye bwe baaleetera Abaisiraeli okuva ku Musengwa Katonda oyo. Era okwo waayongeraku n'eky'okwita baganda bo, abaana ba lata wo mwene, abaali abantu abakalamu okusinga n'iwe." 
2Chronicles21:14 Kale ni bona eno, Musengwa Katonda aidha kuleeta endwaire embi einho egeme abantu bo, n'abaana bo, ni bakazi bo, era aidha kuzikiriza n'ebintu byo byonabyona." 
2Chronicles21:15 N'iwe mwene weena oidha kulwala endwaire enkakali ey'omu byenda, erikuleetera ebyenda okukufulumanga buli lunaku aghazira kulekeraku naire.”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Era Musengwa Katonda yaasiikuula obusungu bw'Abafilisiti n'obw'Abawarabu abaalinga nga baba kumpi n'Abaethiopia, yaabaleetamu omwoyo ogw'okulwanisa Yehoramu." 
2Chronicles21:17 Baalumba ensi Buyudaaya baagighangula, baanhaga ebintu byonabyona mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Baanhaga ni bakazi be, n'abaana be boonaboona, okutoolaku Yehoahazi omwana we omulenzi nkoma." 
2Chronicles21:18 Ebyo byonabyona nga bimaze okubaagho, Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera Yehoramu oyo okulwala endwaire ey'omu byenda etawona." 
2Chronicles21:19 Bwe ghaabitagho entangama ya myaka ebiri, ebyenda byamufuluma mu nda olw'endwaire eyo, yaafiira mu bulumi obutaloodheka. Abantu be baaloba okumukumira ekisiki eky'omuliro okumulira, nga bwe kyakolebwanga ku badhaadha be." 
2Chronicles21:20 Yatoolera okufuga ng'agheza emyaka amakumi asatu n'ebiri egy'obukulu, era yaafugira entangama ya myaka munaana mu Yerusalemu. Bwe yafa, ghazira muntu waire omulala ati eyawulira mule ng'amusaire. Agho baamuziika mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi, aye ti mu lwambiidhi lwe baazikangamu bakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles22:1 Agho abantu b'omu Yerusalemu baataagho Ahazia, asembayo obuto mu batabane ba Yehoramu, yaasikira ise ku bwakyabazinga kuba ekikunsu eky'abalwani abaidha n'Abawarabu okulumba, kyali kimaze okwita abaana ba Yehoramu oyo abakulu boonaboona. Kale Ahazia mutabane wa Yehoramu kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, yaatoolera okufuga." 
2Chronicles22:2 Yali agheza emyaka amakumi ana n'ebiri (42) egy'obukulu, era yaafugira entangama ya mwaka mulala mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali nga ni Athalia mughala wa kyabazinga Ahabu, era mwidhukulu wa kyabazinga Omuri owa Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles22:3 Ahazia nga bweyali omwidhukulu mu ndhu ya Ahabu, yeena yajiira ku mpisa embi edh'ab'endhu ya Ahabu oyo, kuba inhina n'eyamughanga amagezi agaamukozesanga ebibi." 
2Chronicles22:4 Yaakolanga ebibi yaasungughaza Musengwa Katonda, ng'ab'endhu ya Ahabu bwe baakolanga kuba ise bwe yamala okufa, abo n'abaamughanga amagezi agaamutuusa ku kugwa." 
2Chronicles22:5 Era kyabazinga Ahazia oyo ng'ajiira ku magezi ge baamugha, yaaja mu lutalo ni kyabazinga Yoramu owa Isiraeli mutabane wa Ahabu, okulwanisa kyabazinga Hazaeli owa Siria. Olutalo olwo lwataamira e Ramothi Gileadi, Abasiria baafumitira eyo Yoramu ebibwa." 
2Chronicles22:6 Kyabazinga Yoramu oyo, yairayo e Yezireeli amale okuwona ebibwa Abasiria bye baamufumitira e Rama ng'alwanisa kyabazinga Hazaeli owa Siria. Agho kyabazinga Ahazia mutabane wa Yehoramu kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, yaajaayo okumubona obulwaire." 
2Chronicles22:7 Aye Musengwa Katonda yali amaze okutegeka ng'okuzikirira kwa Ahazia kuja kumwidhira lwa kukyalira Yoramu, kuba Ahazia oyo bwe yatuukayo, yaja ni Yoramu okubona Yehu mutabane wa Nimushi, Musengwa Katonda ye yali amaze okulonda nga n'ow'okuzikiriza ab'endhu ya Ahabu." 
2Chronicles22:8 Agho Yehu bweyali ali kutuukiriza ekibonerezo Katonda kye yasalira ab'endhu ya Ahabu, yaayagaana abakungu ba Buyudaaya n'abaana ba baganda ba Ahazia, abaali bagherekeireku Ahazia oyo ku bugeni. Yehu yaabaita." 
2Chronicles22:9 Yaalagira baayagaaza woonawoona nga banoonia Ahazia, era baamugema nga yeegisiisa mu Samaria. Baamuleeta eri Yehu, baamwita, era baamuziika olw'okuba baakoba bati: “Ono mwidhukulu wa Yehoshafati eyafubanga einho okugheereza Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo omulala.” Mu b'endhu ya Ahazia timwasigalamu muntu asobola kufuga bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles22:10 Agho Athalia inhina wa kyabazinga Ahazia bwe yabona nga mutabane we oyo bamwise, yaasitukiramu, yaazikiriza ab'oku lulyo olulangira boonaboona." 
2Chronicles22:11 Aye Yehosheba mughala wa kyabazinga Yoramu, ng'aba mwanhina Ahazia oyo era nga yafumbirwa Yehoiada kabona, yaawoniagho Yoashi owundi ku batabane ba Ahazia oyo. Yamutoola mu balangira abaali baja okwitibwa, ng'amwibagho, yaaja yaabagisa bombi n'omulezi we, mu kisenge ekisulwamu mu isinzizo mu nsambo eyo yaamuwonia Athalia okumwita." 
2Chronicles22:12 Era Yehosheba oyo yaabanga ghalala naye ng'amugisiisa mu isinzizo, okumala entangama ya myaka mukaaga, nga Athalia n'afuga nga kyabazinga omukazi." 
2Chronicles23:1 Aye mu mwaka ogwomusanvu, Yehoiada kabona yaaguma, yeekobaana n'abaduumizi b'abaisirukale, bano: Azaria mutabane wa Yerohamu, ni Ishimaeli mutabane wa Yehohanani, ni Azaria owundi mutabane wa Obedi, ni Maaseia mutabane wa Adaia, ni Elishafati mutabane wa Zikuri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Baaja nga babitabita mu bibuga byonabyona eby'omu Buyudaaya, baatoolayo Abalevi, n'abakulira enda dha balata b'abantu Abaisiraeli, baidha nabo e Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles23:3 Boonaboona beesolokeza mu isinzizo, baakola endagaano ni Yoashi, mutabane wa kyabazinga. Yehoiada yaabakoba ati: “Bona eno, mutabane wa kyabazinga wuuno. Oyo n'abe afuuke kyabazinga, nga Musengwa Katonda bweyasuubiza baidhukulu ba Daudi.”" 
2Chronicles23:4 Era yaabakoba ati: “Kino kye mwidha okukola. Imwe bakabona n'Abalevi, bwe munaidha okukuuma mu ngobo dhaimwe ku Sabbato, mwidha kwegabaniamu ebikunsu bisatu nga byagayaga. Ekikunsu ekindi ku ebyo ebisatu eby'abakuumi, baidha kukuuma emiryango gy'eisinzizo." 
2Chronicles23:5 Ekikunsu ekindi era ku bisatu ebyo baidha kukuuma ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga. N'ekikunsu ekinaasigalagho baidha kuba ku gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Omusingi. Ate abantu boonaboona baidha kuba mu luya olw'eisinzizo. 
2Chronicles23:6 Ghatabaagho muntu yeenayeena aingira mu isinzizo, okutoolaku bakabona n'Abalevi abali mu lugobo olw'okugheereza. Abo ba idembe okwingira, kuba baatukuzibwa. Aye abantu abandi boonaboona baidha kujiira ku kiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda, basigale kuliya." 
2Chronicles23:7 Abalevi baidha kukuuma kyabazinga Yoashi nga bamwezungulwire era nga buli muntu agemye eby'okulwanisa bye. Omuntu yeenayeena anaingira mu isinzizo wa kwitibwa. Baidha kuba ghalala ni kyabazinga buli gh'anaajanga.” 
2Chronicles23:8 Abalevi n'abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona, baakola byonabyona Yehoiada kabona bye yalagira. Buli muduumizi yaaleeta abasaadha be abaali baja okukuuma ku Sabbato, ghalala n'abo abaali bamaze okukuuma kuba Yehoiada oyo kabona tiyaleka bikunsu kuja eby'abo abamaze engobo dhaibwe ku Sabbato." 
2Chronicles23:9 Agho Yehoiada kabona yaagha abaduumizi amafumo n'engabo enene n'entono ebya kyabazinga Daudi, ebyali mu isinzizo." 
2Chronicles23:10 Era yaataagho abantu boonaboona okukuuma kyabazinga, nga buli muntu agemye eby'okulwanisa bye okuva ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba w'eisinzizo, okutuuka ku luuyi lwalyo olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, n'okwezunguluza alutaari n'eisinzizo." 
2Chronicles23:11 Agho yaafulumya Yoashi, yaamuvaaza engule ey'obwakyabazinga, yaamugemya n'ekighandiiko ekirimu Amateeka, yaafuuka kyabazinga. Olwo Yehoiada oyo kabona ghalala ni batabane be, baasiiga Yoashi omuzigo, era baakoba bati: “Kyabazinga ghangaala!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Athalia bwe yawulira okuleekaana okw'abantu abali kusagamba nga bwe basaaka kyabazinga, yaaja mu isinzizo abantu ye baali beesolokeiza." 
2Chronicles23:13 Okuja okulinga ati, ng'abona kyabazinga ayemereire okumpi n'omulyango gha mpango agheemerera kyabazinga, ng'abaduumizi b'eigye n'abafuuyi ab'amagwala bamuli agho kumpi. Era ng'abantu boonaboona bali kusagamba nga bwe bafuuwa amagwala. N'abembi boona nga bali kukuba ebivuga byaibwe, nga bakulemberamu enhembo. Agho Athalia yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'okunakughala, nga bw'akoba ati: “Mundiiremu olukwe! Mundiiremu olukwe!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Yehoiada kabona yaayeta abaduumizi b'eigye, yaabakoba ati: “Mutamwitira mu isinzizo. Aye mumufulumye nga mumubikiza mu nhiriri dh'abaisirukale, era omuntu yeenayeena agezaaku okumuwonia mu nhiriri, mumwite bwite.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Agho baagema Athalia, baamutwala ku gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Embalaasi ku kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, baamwitira eyo." 
2Chronicles23:16 Agho Yehoiada kabona yaakola endagaano ni kyabazinga, era n'abantu boonaboona aghalala, ekakasa nga bwe baidha okubanga abantu aba Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles23:17 Agho abantu boonaboona baaja baingira mu isabo ly'omusambwa Baali, baalimenhagho. Era baamenhamenha alutaari n'ebifaananie byagwo. Ni kabona waagwo eyayetebwanga Mattani, baamwitira emberi w'alutaari." 
2Chronicles23:18 Yehoiada yaagemya bakabona n'Abalevi omulimo ogw'okukolanga mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda abo nga Daudi be yataagho mu isinzizo eryo, okughangayo eri Musengwa Katonda ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka ga Musa. Era ekyo bakikolenga nga basagamba era nga bemba, nga Daudi oyo bwe yalagira." 
2Chronicles23:19 Yehoiada era yaataagho abakuumi ku miryango gy'eisinzizo, lirobenga kwingirwamu atali mulongoofu." 
2Chronicles23:20 Agho Yehoiada oyo, n'abaduumizi b'eigye, n'abakungu, n'abakulembeze, era n'abantu boonaboona, baatoola kyabazinga mu isinzizo baamutwala mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, nga babitira mu mulyango ogw'eitale. Baamutyamya ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles23:21 Agho abantu boonaboona baasagamba, ekibuga kyatereera, nga bamaze okwita Athalia." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yoashi yafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, ng'agheza emyaka musanvu egy'obukulu, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi ana (40) mu Yerusalemu. Eriina lya inhina nga ni Zibia ow'e Beerisheba."
