2Chronicles24:2 Yoashi yaakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima ekiseera kyonakyona Yehoiada kabona kye yamala nga mulamu. 
2Chronicles24:3 Yehoiada yaamufunira abakazi babiri, yaazaala nabo abaana abalenzi n'abaghala." 
2Chronicles24:4 Ebyo nga biwoire, Yoashi yaasalagho okulongoosa eisinzizo." 
2Chronicles24:5 Yaasoloza bakabona n'Abalevi, yaabakoba ati: “Mujenga mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya buli mwaka, musolozenga ku Baisiraeli boonaboona empiiya edh'okulongoosanga eisinzizo lya Katonda waimwe. Era mubone ng'ekyo mukikolaku mangu geene.” Aye Abalevi baalwagho okukikola." 
2Chronicles24:6 Kale kyabazinga yaayeta Yehoiada omukulu waibwe, yaamukoba ati: “Lwaki tiwasalira Balevi kuleetanga musolo okuva mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu, ogwasalibwagho Musa omugheereza wa Katonda, era mwene gwe yatoolanga ku Baisiraeli olw'okulabirira Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda?” (" 
2Chronicles24:7 Batabane ba Athalia, omukazi omubi oyo, baali bamenhie eisinzizo lya Katonda, baingira era baatoolamu ebintu byonabyona ebyagheebwayo okuba eby'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda eryo, baabigha emisambwa Baali.)" 
2Chronicles24:8 Kale kyabazinga yaalagira okukola esanduuku, baagita kuliya gha mulyango ogw'eisinzizo." 
2Chronicles24:9 Agho baalangirira mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu mwonamwona, abantu baleete eri Musengwa Katonda omusolo, Musa omugheereza wa Katonda gwe yata ku Baisiraeli nga bali mu irungu." 
2Chronicles24:10 Abakungu n'abantu boonaboona baasanhukira ekintu ekyo, era baaleetanga empiiya baadhita mu sanduuku eyo, okutuusa boonaboona lwe baamalayo omusolo gwaibwe. Kale baakolanga batyo buli lunaku, era baasolozanga empiiya kamaala inho." 
2Chronicles24:11 Abalevi baatwalanga esanduuku eyo eri abakungu ba kyabazinga babone ekirimu. Bwe baabonanga nga mughezeemu empiiya kamaala, omughandiisi wa kyabazinga ni Kabona Omukulu baidhanga, baadhitoolamu, ate sanduuku baagiizaayo mu kifo kyayo." 
2Chronicles24:12 Kyabazinga ni Yehoiada, baagemyanga empiiya edho abo abaalabiriranga omulimo ogw'okulongoosa eisinzizo. Ate abo baapatananga n'abakozi ab'okulongoosa eisinzizo, bano: abazimbisa amabaale, n'ababaadhi, n'abagheesa ebintu mu kyuma eky'ekikomo ni mu kyuma ekigumu einho." 
2Chronicles24:13 Abakozi abo baalongoosa eisinzizo baaliiza buyaaka, era baaligumya inho." 
2Chronicles24:14 Bwe baamala omulimo ogwo, empiiya edhaasigalagho baadhigemya kyabazinga ni Yehoiada. Ate abo baadhigulamu ebintu eby'omu isinzizo, ebikozesebwa mu kusinza ni mu kughaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa: ebintu ebiniokezebwaku obubbaani, n'ebintu ebindi ebya zaabu ni feeza. Ekiseera kyonakyona Yehoiada kye yamala ng'akaali mulamu, abantu baaghangayo mu isinzizo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, aghazira kwosaamu." 
2Chronicles24:15 Aye Yehoiada oyo yaamala yaakairika, era yaafa ng'agheziiza emyaka kikumi n'asatu (130) egy'obukulu." 
2Chronicles24:16 Baamuziika mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi, mu lwambiidhi lwa bakyabazinga, kuba yali akoleire Katonda n'eisinzizo lye ebirungi mu Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles24:17 Yehoiada bwe yamala okufa, abakungu mu Buyudaaya baaja baakubira kyabazinga amakiryaivu era baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka. Agho kyabazinga yaawulirisa bye baamukoba." 
2Chronicles24:18 Baava ku kusinzizanga mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe, baira ku kusinzanga omusambwa omukazi Ashera n'ebisinzibwa ebindi ebitali Katonda. Era Musengwa Katonda oyo yaasungughalira Buyudaaya ni Yerusalemu, olw'omusango gwaibwe ogwo." 
2Chronicles24:19 Musengwa Katonda yaabagheereza abalanzi okubalabula baire y'ali, aye baaloba kwefiirayo." 
2Chronicles24:20 Agho omwoyo gwa Katonda gwaidha ku Zekaria mutabane wa Yehoiada kabona. Yaayemerera ghaigulu abantu ghe bamubonera obukalamu, yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, lwaki mudheemera ebiragiro bye, ni mwereetera akabi? Nga imwe bwe mwava ku Musengwa Katonda oyo, yeena abalekuliire agho.”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Aye abantu baamukolera olukwe, baamukubira amabaale mu luya lw'eisinzizo, nga baajiira ku kiragiro kya kyabazinga." 
2Chronicles24:22 Mu ngeri eyo kyabazinga Yoashi yaaloba kwidhukira ekisa Yehoiada kye yamukolera, yaita Zekaria mutabane wa Yehoiada oyo. Zekaria bweyali ali kumpi okufa, yaakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda agwananga yaabona kino ky'okoze, yaakwesasuulizaaku.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Agho ng'omwaka guli kuwaaku, ab'eigye ly'Abasiria baalumba Yoashi. Baidha mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu, baita abakulembeze ab'abantu boonaboona okubasaaniagho, baatoola n'omunhago gwe baanhaga gwonagwona, baagutwala ye kyabazinga ow'e Damasiko." 
2Chronicles24:24 Waire ng'eigye ery'Abasiria lyali itono, Musengwa Katonda yaligha okughangula eigye ly'Abayudaaya eryali eikologho lyene kuba abantu b'omu Buyudaaya baali baviire ku Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe. Kale kyabazinga Yoashi baamubonereza batyo." 
2Chronicles24:25 Abasiria bwe baagolola, baaleka Yoashi oyo nga bamufumiite inho ebibwa. Agho abagheereza be beene baamukolera olukwe, baamutemulira mu buliri bwe olw'okwita mutabane wa Yehoiada kabona. Kale yaafa, baamuziika mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi, aye ti mu lwambiidhi lwa bakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles24:26 Abaakola olukwe okumwita, baali: Zabadi mutabane w'omukazi Omuammoni ayetebwa Shimeathi, ni Yehozabadi mutabane w'omukazi Omumoabu ayetebwa Shimurithi." 
2Chronicles24:27 Byonabyona ebigema ku batabane ba Yoashi oyo, ni ku ebyo abalanzi bye baalanga okumuvumirira, ni ku kuzimba obuyaaka eisinzizo, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ekiinhonhola ebifa ku bakyabazinga. Mutabane we Amazia n'eyamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amazia yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya ng'agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu egy'obukulu, era yaafugira entangama ya myaka amakumi abiri na mwenda mu Yerusalemu. Eriina lya inhina nga ni Yehoaddani ow'e Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles25:2 Amazia yakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, aye nga tabikola na mwoyo mulala." 
2Chronicles25:3 Era olwamala okukakata ati ku bwakyabazinga, ng'aita abagheereza be bale abaita lata we." 
2Chronicles25:4 Aye tiyaita baana baibwe, kuba yajiira ku kyaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo eky'Amateeka ga Musa, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira ati: “Abazaire mutabaitanga lwa misango baana baibwe gye baiziiza, n'abaana mutabaitanga lwa misango gya bazaire baibwe gye baiziiza. Omuntu aidha kwitibwanga lwa musango gw'anaabanga ng'aiziiza mwene.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Agho Amazia yaasoloza abasaadha boonaboona ab'omu kika kya Yuda n'ab'omu kya Benjamini, yaabagabamu ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale ng'ajiira ku nda dha baiseibwe, nga bakulemberwa abaduumizi b'abaisirukale olukumi olukumi n'ekikumi ekikumi. Yaabala abo abaali nga bagheziiza emyaka amakumi abiri egy'obukulu n'okusingagho. Yaakizuula nga bagheramu abasaadha emitwalo amakumi asatu (300,000) abalondeibwa n'obwegendereza, nga basobola okuja mu lutalo, era nga bali n'obumanhirivu mu kulwanisa amafumo n'engabo." 
2Chronicles25:6 Era yaapangisa n'abaisirukale ab'amaani abaziramu ntete emitwalo ikumi (100,000), ng'abatoola mu Isiraeli, ku mughendo gwa talanta edha feeza kikumi." 
2Chronicles25:7 Aye omuntu wa Katonda yaidha yaamukoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, otageza kuja na bantu ba igye lya Isiraeli, kuba Musengwa Katonda tali ghalala na bantu abo Abaefuraimu." 
2Chronicles25:8 Aye bw'obona ng'abo n'abanaakuleetera okuba ow'amaani mu lutalo, ja nabo. Aye Katonda aidha kukukuba enume y'ekigwo mu maiso g'abazigu bo, kuba Katonda oyo ali n'obuyinza obw'okubeera omuntu n'aghangula, era yaaba n'obw'okumuleka ni bamughangula.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Amazia yaakoba omuntu wa Katonda ati: “Ate nnaakola ntya talanta ekikumi, dhe mmaze okusasula eigye lya Isiraeli?” Omuntu wa Katonda yairamu ati: “Musengwa Katonda asobola okukugha n'ebisinga agho.”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Agho Amazia yaasiibula ab'eigye eryali liidhie y'ali nga liva mu Efuraimu, yaabalagira okwirayo ewaibwe. Abantu abo bairayo ewaibwe nga basungughaliire abantu b'omu Buyudaaya ekibitiriire." 
2Chronicles25:11 Amazia yaasiba omwoyo, yaakulembera eigye lye, yaaja mu Kiiko ky'Omuunhu, yaitirayo abaisirukale Abaedomu omutwalo mulamba (10,000)." 
2Chronicles25:12 Abayudaaya baagema n'abantu abandi omutwalo mulala, baabatwala ghaigulu ku ngulu ku lubaale, memale baabawoloba ghansi, boonaboona baamanhianguka." 
2Chronicles25:13 Ebyo nga bikaali agho, abaisirukale Abaisiraeli Amazia be yaizaayo ng'abalobeire okuja naye mu lutalo, baaja baalumba ebibuga bya Buyudaaya, okuva e Samaria okutuuka e Bethi Horoni, baitamu abantu enkumi isatu (3,000) era baatwala n'omunhago mungi." 
2Chronicles25:14 Amazia bweyali ng'amaze okwita Abaedomu, yaaleeta emisambwa gy'abantu abo ab'e Seiri. Yaagitaagho gibenga bakatonda be, era yaagisinza n'okuginiokeza obubbaani." 
2Chronicles25:15 Musengwa Katonda kyeyava n'asungughalira Amazia, yaamusindikira omulanzi. Omulanzi oyo yaamukoba ati: “Lwaki oli kusinza emisambwa egy'abantu egyalemwa okuwonia abantu baagyo okubatoola mu buyinza bwo?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Aye yali akaayogera, kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Twakulonda li okuba omuwi ow'amagezi wa kyabazinga? Sirika, okutoolaku ng'oli kunoonia kukwita!” Omulanzi yaasirika, aye era ng'amaze okumukoba ati: “Ndidhi nga Katonda mumalirivu okukuzikiriza, kuba okoze ekyo era waaloba kuwulirisa magezi ge nkughaire.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Agho kyabazinga Amazia owa Buyudaaya ng'amaze okwebuuzaaku ku bamugha amagezi, yaatuma abakwenda eri kyabazinga Yoashi owa Isiraeli, mutabane wa Yehoahazi era mwidhukulu wa Yehu, ng'akoba ati: “Ale idha twagaanane, tulinzaganie obweni.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Ate kyabazinga Yehoashi owa Isiraeli yaagheereza kyabazinga Amazia owa Buyudaaya obukwenda ng'akoba ati: “Olukandwa olwali ku lusozi Lebanoni lwagheereza obukwenda eri omuvule ogwali ku lusozi olwo Lebanoni, nga lukoba luti, ‘Gha mutabane wange mughala wo amubayize.’ Agho ensolo ey'omu nsiko ey'oku lusozi Lebanoni bweyali ebita, yaatyankirira olukandwa olwo." 
2Chronicles25:19 Mpegaano oli kukoba oti, ‘Bona eno, naghangula Edomu!’ Ekyo kyakuleetera okwekuluntaza. Kale ni ba ewuwo weesaake n'ekyo. Lwaki onaawuula ebizibu eby'okukuzikiriza iwe ni Buyudaaya yoonayoona?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Aye Amazia yaaloba okuwulirisa, kuba Katonda yayenda okubaghaayo baghangulwe abazigu baibwe, olw'okusinza emisambwa egya Abaedomu." 
2Chronicles25:21 Kale Yehoashi kyabazinga wa Isiraeli kyeyava ni yeesowolayo okulumba Amazia kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, baalinzagania obweni mu lutalo olwali e Bathi Shemeshi ekya Buyudaaya." 
2Chronicles25:22 Isiraeli yaaghangula Buyudaaya, kiisi mwisirukale wa Buyudaaya yaalumuka okwiragho ewuwe." 
2Chronicles25:23 Agho kyabazinga Yehoashi owa Isiraeli, yaagema kyabazinga Amazia owa Buyudaaya mutabane wa Yoashi era mwidhukulu wa Ahazia, ng'amugemera e Bethi Shemeshi. Yaamuleeta e Yerusalemu, era Yehoashi oyo yaamenha ekimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga Yerusalemu ekyo, okuva ku Mulyango gwa Efuraimu okutuuka ku Mulyango Ogwokunsonda obwo nga n'obuleeyi bwa mita ng'oti ebikumi bibiri." 
2Chronicles25:24 Yaanhaga zaabu ni feeza yeenayeena, n'ebintu ebikozesebwa byonabyona bye yayagaana mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, ebyakuumibwanga Obedi Edomu. Yaatwala n'eby'obukombe eby'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, era yaatwala n'abantu ng'omusingo. Agho yairayo e Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Kyabazinga Amazia owa Buyudaaya, mutabane wa Yoashi, yasigala ng'akaaligho okumala entangama ya myaka ikumi n'etaanu, nga kyabazinga Yehoashi mutabane wa Yehoahazi amaze okufa." 
2Chronicles25:26 Ebindi byonabyona Amazia bye yakola okuva mu mainhama okutuuka ku nkomerero, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya n'aba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles25:27 Okuviira irala Amazia lwe yakyuka n'ava ku Musengwa Katonda, ghaaligho abaakola olukwe mu Yerusalemu okumwita. Kale yaalumukira mu kibuga ky'e Lakishi, aye era baatumayo abantu okumunooniayo, era baamwitirayo." 
2Chronicles25:28 Omulambo gwe baaguleetera ku mbalaasi, baamuziika mu Yerusalemu mu lwambiidhi lwa badhaadha be, mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi." 
2Chronicles26:1 Agho abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya, baalonda Uzzia eyali ng'agheza emyaka eikumi n'omukaaga egy'obukulu, baamufuula kyabazinga okusikira lata we Amazia." 
2Chronicles26:2 Uzzia yaiza ekibuga Elothi ku Buyudaaya era yaakizimba buyaaka, nga lata we amaze okufa ni yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uzzia oyo yali agheza emyaka ikumi na mukaaga egy'obukulu, era yaafugira mu Yerusalemu okumala entangama ya myaka ataanu n'ebiri. Inhina nga ni Yekolia ow'e Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles26:4 Uzzia yaakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, nga lata we Amazia bye yakolanga." 
2Chronicles26:5 Yeeghaayo yaagheerezanga Katonda, ebiseera byonabyona Zekaria eyamwegeresa okutyanga Katonda oyo bye yamala ng'akaali mulamu. Era Musengwa Katonda yaaleetera Uzzia ebintu okumujiiranga obukalamu, ekiseera kyonakyona Uzzia oyo kye yamala ng'amugheereza." 
2Chronicles26:6 Uzzia oyo yaaja yaalumba Abafilisiti, yaabalwanisa, yaamenhagho ebimante eby'oku bibuga, Gathi, ni Yabune, ni Ashidodi. Era yaazimba ebibuga mu biketezo by'e Ashidodi, n'aghandi mu nsi y'Abafilisiti." 
2Chronicles26:7 Katonda yaamubeeraku okughangula Abafilisiti, n'Abawarabu abaabanga e Gurubaali, n'Abameuni." 
2Chronicles26:8 Abammoni baamughanga omusolo, era yaamanhikana inho okutuukira irala ku nsalosalo ni Misiri, kuba yafuuka wa maani inho." 
2Chronicles26:9 Uzzia era yaazimba ebituuti ebirengererwaku, ku kimante ekyezungulwire Yerusalemu ku Mulyango ogw'omu Nsonda, ni ku Mulyango ogw'omu Kiiko, n'ekimante ghe kigonhokera." 
2Chronicles26:10 Era yaazimba ebituuti ebirengererwaku mu irungu, yaasima n'ensulo kamaala, kuba yali n'ebyayo kamaala mu biketezo eby'omu biiko n'eby'oku museetwe. Era yali n'abalimi abaalabiriranga emizabbibu mu nsozi, ni mu itaka eigimu, kuba yayendanga inho okulima." 
2Chronicles26:11 Uzzia era yali n'eigye ery'abaisirukale abeetegefu okulwana olutalo, nga bali mu bikunsu ebirimu abaisirukale ababaliibwa era ni baghandiikibwa Yeieli omughandiisi ni Maaseia omukungu, nga bombi bakulemberwa Hanania owundi ku baduumizi ba kyabazinga." 
2Chronicles26:12 Abaduumizi abo baakuliranga enda dha baiseibwe, nga ba maani abaziramu ntete, era nga baghera enkumi ibiri na lukaaga (2,600)." 
2Chronicles26:13 Abo n'abaaduumiranga eigye ery'abaisirukale emitwalo amakumi asatu n'akasanvu n'ebikumi ebitaanu (307,500), abaabanga n'amaani amangi einho, nga basobola okuyamba kyabazinga okulwanisa abazigu be." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uzzia yaategekera eigye lyonalyona engabo, n'amafumo, n'enkuufiira edh'ekyuma, n'ebivaalo eby'omu kifuba eby'ekyuma, n'obulaso, n'amabaale ag'okusuula n'ensuumulo." 
2Chronicles26:15 Abasaadha abakugu baayiiya, baakola mu Yerusalemu ebyuma ebiteebwa ku bituuti ebirengererwaku ni ku nsonda dh'ebimante, ni birasa obusaale era ni bisuula amabaale amanene. Kale yaamanhika inho woonawoona, era yaaba wa maani olw'obuyambi obungi einho bwe yafuna." 
2Chronicles26:16 Aye kyabazinga Uzzia bwe yafuuka ow'amaani atyo, yaidhamu okwekuluntaza era ekyo kyamuviiraku okugwa kuba yeetulinkiriza yaingira mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, yaaniokeza obubbaani ku alutaari eniokezebwaku obubbaani." 
2Chronicles26:17 Aye Azaria kabona, ni bakabona ba Musengwa Katonda kinaana, abasaadha abaziramu ntete, baingira nga bali kumuvaaku einhuma," 
2Chronicles26:18 baamulobera nga bakoba bati: “Uzzia, ti mulimo gwo okuniokeza Musengwa Katonda obubbaani. Ogwo mulimo gwa bakabona ab'oku lulyo lw'Aaroni abaayawulibwa okubuniosanga. Fuluma mu kifo kino ekitukuvu kuba okoze kisobyo, era Musengwa Katonda taidha kukugha kitiibwa naire olw'ekyo ky'okoze.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Agho Uzzia yaasungughalira bakabona. Yali ayemereire agho mu isinzizo okuliiraana ni alutaari eniokezebwaku obubbaani, ng'agemye n'ekintu ekiniokezebwamu obubbaani. Bwe yasungughalira bakabona atyo, endwaire ey'ebigenge yaamufukumuka mu kyeni nga bakabona abo babona." 
2Chronicles26:20 Agho Azaria Kabona Omukulu ni bakabona abandi boonaboona, bwe baamulingirira baategeera ng'endwaire ey'ebigenge emufukumwike mu kyeni. Kale baamubinga ave mangu mu isinzizo. Ni mwene yeena yaayangughaku okufulumamu, kuba Musengwa Katonda yali amubonereiza." 
2Chronicles26:21 Kyabazinga Uzzia yaaba n'endwaire eyo ey'ebigenge okutuusa lwe yafa. Era olw'okuba yali n'endwaire eyo, yaabanga mu ndhu yiye yenka, nga taikirizibwa kwingira mu isinzizo. Mutabane we Yothamu yaasigala nga n'akulira ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyazinga, era nga n'afuga abantu b'ensi eyo." 
2Chronicles26:22 Ebindi byonabyona Uzzia bye yakola mu mainhama okutuuka ku nkomerero, byaghandiikibwa Isaia omulanzi, mutabane wa Amozi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Agho Uzzia oyo yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa kumpi nabo, aye nga ti mu lwambiidhi lwa bakyabazinga, kuba abantu baakoba bati: “Ali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge.” Mutabane we Yothamu yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yothamu yafuuka kyabazinga ng'agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu egy'obukulu, era yaafugira entangama ya myaka ikumi na mukaaga mu Yerusalemu. Inhina yali nga ni Yerusha mughala wa Zadoki." 
2Chronicles27:2 Yothamu yaakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, nga lata we Uzzia bye yakolanga. Aye tiyaghaguza kwingira mu isinzizo kuniokeza bubbaani, ng'oti ni ise bwe yakola waire ng'abantu baaja mu maiso n'okukola ebibi." 
2Chronicles27:3 Yaazimba omulyango ogw'eitale ogw'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, era yaakola inho ku kuzimba ekimante ekigumu eky'oku kibuga Yerusalemu, mu kitundu ekyetebwa Ofeli." 
2Chronicles27:4 Yaazimba ebibuga mu biketezo bya Buyudaaya eby'oku nsozi, era yaazimba ebifo eby'okwewogomamu n'ebituuti ebirengererwaku mu bibira eby'oku nsozi." 
2Chronicles27:5 Yaalwanisa kyabazinga w'Abammoni yaamughangula. Abammoni abo baamugha omusolo mu mwaka ogwo, nga gwa talanta kikumi (100) edha feeza, n'ensawo omutwalo mulala (10,000) edh'engaano, n'ensawo omutwalo mulala (10,000) edhindi edha sayiri. Era baamugha omusolo ogwaga n'ogwo, mu mwaka ogwokubiri ni mu gwokusatu." 
2Chronicles27:6 Kale Yothamu yaafuuka wa maani, kuba yagonderanga Musengwa Katonda we." 
2Chronicles27:7 Ebindi byonabyona Yothamu bye yakola, n'entalo dhe dhoonadhoona dhe yalwana, era n'enkola ye, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo kya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli n'aba Buyudaaya." 
2Chronicles27:8 Yothamu oyo yafuuka kyabazinga ng'agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu egy'obukulu, era yaafugira entangama ya myaka ikumi na mukaaga mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles27:9 Agho yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi. Mutabane we Ahazi yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahazi yaafuuka kyabazinga ng'agheza emyaka amakumi abiri egy'obukulu, era yaafugira entangama ya myaka ikumi na mukaaga mu Yerusalemu. Tiyajiiranga ku mpisa nungi edha dhaadha we Daudi, eyakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda we by'asiima." 
2Chronicles28:2 Aye yaajiiranga ku mpisa embi edha bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli, era yaakola n'ebifaananie by'emisambwa Baali, mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa." 
2Chronicles28:3 Yaaniokezanga obubbaani mu kiiko kya mutabane wa Hinnomu. Yaatuuka n'okwokyanga batabane be ng'ebigheebwayo, ng'empisa eyenhinhalwa bweyali ey'abamaghanga agandi, Musengwa Katonda be yabinga mu nsi eyo nga Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuukayo." 
2Chronicles28:4 Yaaghangayo emisengo era yaaniokezanga obubbaani mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, ni ku nsozi, na buli ghansi mu kinsense kya muti muzibirivu." 
2Chronicles28:5 Olw'ebibi ebyo Ahazi bye yakola, Musengwa Katonda we kyeyava n'amughaayo ye kyabazinga w'e Siria, yaamughangula, era yaatwala abantu be kamaala inho e Damasiko, nga basibe. Kabiri Musengwa Katonda oyo yaamughaayo ye kyabazinga Peka owa Isiraeli, yaamughangula ng'aise n'abantu be kamaala inho." 
2Chronicles28:6 Peka oyo mutabane wa Remalia yaita mu Bayudaaya abantu emitwalo ikumi n'ebiri (120,000) mu lunaku lulala, olw'okuba baava ku Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe. Abantu abo boonaboona baali abasaadha abaziramu ntete." 
2Chronicles28:7 Ate Zikuri omulwani ow'amaani Omuisiraeli ow'omu kika kya Efuraimu, yaita Maaseia mutabane wa kyabazinga Ahazi, ni Azurikamu eyalabiriranga ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, ni Elukana eyaiririranga kyabazinga mu buyinza." 
2Chronicles28:8 Abaisiraeli baagema abakazi Abayudaaya, n'abaana abalenzi n'abaghala, emitwalo amakumi abiri (200,000), baabatwala nga basibe waire nga Abayudaaya abo baluganda lwaibwe. Era baabatoolaku n'ebintu kamaala ng'omunhago omunhago ogwo baagutwala e Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 Aye ghaaligho omulanzi wa Musengwa Katonda ng'aba Samaria, eriina lye nga ni Odedi. Oyo yaaja okweisuusaayo eigye nga liri kwira e Samaria, yaabakoba ati: “Bona eno, olw'okuba Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe yasungughalira ab'omu Buyudaaya, kyaviire n'abaghaayo ye muli okubaghangula. Aye mperaano awuliire engeri ye mubaiseemu n'obukambwe obutaloodheka." 
2Chronicles28:10 Ate imwe buti muli kwenda kufuula abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, abasaadha n'abakazi, babe bairu baimwe. Aye obwo imwe muzirakuuku bibi byaimwe, bye mwakola ni musungughaza Musengwa Katonda waimwe?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Kale ni muwulirise kye nkoba, mwizeeyo abasibe abo kuba baluganda lwaimwe. Bwe mutaakole mutyo, Musengwa Katonda aidha kubabonereza n'obukambwe.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Agho abandi ku bakulembeze, boona nga ba mu kika kya Efuraimu, baatakania abo abaali bali kwira okuva mu lutalo. Abakulembeze abo nga ni bano: Azaria mutabane wa Yohanani, ni Berekia mutabane wa Meshillemothi, ni Yehizekia mutabane wa Shallumu, ni Amasa mutabane wa Hadulai." 
2Chronicles28:13 Baakoba abo abaali bali kwira okuva mu lutalo, bati: “Timwidha kuleeta ghano basibe abo. Ife twakola ebibi twasungughaza Musengwa Katonda mu Isiraeli, era tuli n'omusango munene. Aye ate imwe muli kwenda kwongereza ku bibi bye twakola, ni ku musango gwe tuli nagwo.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Agho abaisirukale baaleka abasibe n'omunhago mu maiso g'abakulembeze n'ag'abantu boonaboona. 
2Chronicles28:15 Agho abasaadha bale ab'omu kika kya Efuraimu aboogeirwaku baasituka, baatwala abasibe abaali amadu, baabagha engoye nga batoola ku munhago baabavaaza era baabagha n'engaito. Baabafunira eby'okulya n'eby'okunhwa, era baabasiiga omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva. Abo abaali nga baziramu maani baabatwalira ku ndogoyi, baabatuusa mu boluganda lwaibwe e Yeriko, ekibuga eky'emiti eminaazi. Agho Abaisiraeli bairayo e Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Mu biseera ebyo, kyabazinga Ahazi yaasaba kyabazinga w'e Assiria okumubeera," 
2Chronicles28:17 kuba Abaedomu baali kabiri nga balumbye ab'omu Buyudaaya, baabaghangula era baatwala n'abasibe." 
2Chronicles28:18 Abafilisiti boona nga balumbye ebibuga eby'omu biketezo eby'omu biiko bya Buyudaaya. Baagema ebibuga bino era baabibaamu: Bethi Shemeshi, ni Aiyaloni, ni Gederothi, ni Soko ghalala n'ebyalo byakyo, ni Timuna ghalala n'ebyalo byakyo, ni Gimuzo ghalala n'ebyalo byakyo." 
2Chronicles28:19 Ebyo byaligho, kuba kyabazinga Ahazi oyo yakola eidhoogo mu Buyudaaya era yaaloba kuba mwesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda, yaaleetera Musengwa Katonda okusindika ebizibu ku Buyudaaya." 
2Chronicles28:20 Era kyabazinga Tigulathi Pileseri ow'e Assiria bwe yaidha, tiyayamba Ahazi naire, aye yamukiriga bukirige, yaayongera bwa kumweraliikiriza." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ahazi yaatoola ku bintu ebyali mu isinzizo, ni mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga, ni mu ndhu edh'abakungu, yaabigha kyabazinga w'e Assiria oyo, aye era byona ghazira kye byamuyamba naire." 
2Chronicles28:22 Kyabazinga Ahazi oyo, ni mu kiseera kye yabeeramu mu buzibu, yeeyongera bweyongere okukola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles28:23 Yaaghaayo emisengo eri bakatonda b'e Damasiko abaamughangula, ng'akoba ati: “Bakatonda b'e Siria baayamba bakyabazinga baayo, zeena ka mbaghe emisengo baanhambe.” Aye byamuviiramu bwa kuzikirira, mwene n'ensi ye yoonayoona." 
2Chronicles28:24 Agho Ahazi yaasoloza ebintu ebikozesebwa mu isinzizo, yaabimenhamenha byonabyona. Yaigalagho eisinzizo, yeekolera alutaari mu buli kifo mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles28:25 Ni mu buli kibuga kya Buyudaaya yaazimbamu ebifo ebigulumivu ebisinzibwamu, eby'okuniokezangaku obubbaani eri bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi. Ekyo kyaleetera Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha be okumusungughalira." 
2Chronicles28:26 Ebindi byonabyona Ahazi bye yakola, n'empisa dhe dhoonadhoona, okuva mu mainhama okutuuka ku nkomerero, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo kya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya n'aba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles28:27 Agho Ahazi yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu kibuga Yerusalemu aye ti mu lwambiidhi lwa bakyabazinga. Mutabane we Hezekia yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekia yafuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya ng'agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu egy'obukulu, era yaafugira entangama ya myaka amakumi abiri na mwenda mu Yerusalemu. Inhina nga bamweta Abiya mughala wa Zekaria." 
2Chronicles29:2 Hezekia yaakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, ng'oti n'ebyo dhaadha we Daudi bye yakolanga." 
2Chronicles29:3 Mu mwezi gwe yatooleramu okufuga mu mwaka gwe ogwasooka, yaigulagho endhigi dh'eisinzizo era yaalirongoosa." 
2Chronicles29:4 Yaingiza bakabona n'Abalevi, beesololeza mu luya lw'eisinzizo ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba." 
2Chronicles29:5 Yaabakoba ati: “Imwe Abalevi mumpulirise. Mukole mwetukuze, era mutukuze n'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baimwe. Ekifo ekitukuvu kino mukitoolemu ebyo byonabyona ebikireetera okwonooneka." 
2Chronicles29:6 Badhaadha baife baakola ebibi baaloba kuba beesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda waife. Baamuvaaku, era n'ekifo ky'abaamu baakikuba bwa nkoone." 
2Chronicles29:7 Baigalagho endhigi edhingira mu isinzizo, baazikiza entaala, era baaloba okuniokeza obubbaani, waire okughaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa eri Katonda wa Isiraeli, mu kifo kye ekitukuvu." 
2Chronicles29:8 Musengwa Katonda kyeyava n'asungughalira ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, yaabatuusa ku buzibu obuleetera buli muntu okubeewuunhia n'okubeesiimooza, nga bwe mukyeboneraku beene n'amaiso gaimwe." 
2Chronicles29:9 Balata baife babaitira mu ntalo, ate bakazi baife ni batabane baife era ni baghala baife, baabatwala mu bunhage." 
2Chronicles29:10 “Mperaano nsazeegho okukola endagaano ni Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, olwo alekere agho okutwolekeza obusungu bwe obubitiriire." 
2Chronicles29:11 Baana bange, mutalwa naire, kuba Musengwa Katonda abalonze okwemereranga mu maiso ge, mumugheereze nga mumusinza era nga mumuniokeza obubbaani.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Agho Abalevi bano baasituka: Ku b'oku nda ya Kohathi mwalimu, Mahathi mutabane wa Amasai, ni Yoeli mutabane wa Azaria. Ku b'oku nda ya Merari mwalimu, Kishi mutabane wa Abudi, ni Azaria mutabane wa Yehalleleli. Ku b'oku nda ya Gereshoni mwalimu, Yoa mutabane wa Zimma, ni Edeni mutabane wa Yoa." 
2Chronicles29:13 Ku b'oku nda ya Elizafani mwalimu, Shimuri ni Yeueli. Ku b'oku nda ya Asafu mwalimu, Zekaria ni Mattania." 
2Chronicles29:14 Ku b'oku nda ya Hemani mwalimu, Yehueli ni Shimei. Ku b'oku nda ya Yeduthuni mwalimu, Shemaia ni Uzzieli." 
2Chronicles29:15 Abalevi abo baasoloza Balevi banaibwe, beetukuza. Baingira ni mu isinzizo baalitukuza, nga kyabazinga bwe yabalagira ng'ajiira ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira." 
2Chronicles29:16 Ate bakabona baingira mu kisenge eky'omunda mu isinzizo, baakirongoosa. Baatoolayo ebyo byonabyona bye baayagaanayo ebitali birongoofu, baabireeta mu luya olw'eisinzizo. Abalevi baabifulumya kuliya, baabitwala baabisuula mu kaiga Kiduroni." 
2Chronicles29:17 Baatoolera okulongoosa eisinzizo ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogusooka. Era olunaku olwomunaana olw'omwezi gwene ogwo lwaja okutuuka, nga bamaze okutuuka ku kisasi aghaingirirwa mu isinzizo. Kabiri baakola enaku edhindi munaana nga bategeka eisinzizo okulitukuza. Ku lunaku olweikumi n'omukaaga olw'omwezi gwene ogwo, baamaliriza." 
2Chronicles29:18 Agho Abalevi baaja ye kyabazinga Hezekia, baamukoba bati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, tumaze okulongoosa eisinzizo lyonalyona, n'alutaari y'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ghalala n'ebikozesebwaku byonabyona, n'emeeza kwe bata emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda ghalala n'ebikozesebwaku byonabyona." 
2Chronicles29:19 Ebikozesebwa byonabyona kyabazinga Ahazi bye yasuula ere, mu biseera bye yaviira ku Katonda, tubitegeike, twabitukuza, era buti biri mu maiso g'alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Agho kyabazinga Hezekia yaasitukiramu ku nkyo, yaayetesa abakulembeze b'omu kibuga, beesoloza baaja mu isinzizo." 
2Chronicles29:21 Baaleeta ente enume musanvu, n'entaama enume musanvu, n'entaama ento musanvu, n'embuzi enume musanvu. Ebyo nga n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, ku lw'obwakyabazinga, ni ku lw'eisinzizo, ni ku lwa Buyudaaya. Era yaalagira bakabona baidhukulu b'Aaroni okubigheerayo ku alutaari." 
2Chronicles29:22 Agho baita ente enume, bakabona baatoola omusaayi gwadho baagumansira ku alutaari. Ate baita entaama enume, baatoola omusaayi gwadho baagumansira ku alutaari. Era baita n'entaama ento, omusaayi gwadho gwona baagumansira ku alutaari." 
2Chronicles29:23 Olwo baaleeta embuzi enume mu maiso ga kyabazinga n'ag'abantu abeesoloiza, ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, era abo baadhitaaku emikono gyaibwe." 
2Chronicles29:24 Bakabona baadhiita, baayugha omusaayi gwadho ku alutaari, ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi by'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, bisobole okubatoolebwaku kuba kyabazinga yalagira okughaayo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa n'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, ku lw'Abaisiraeli boonaboona." 
2Chronicles29:25 Yaata Abalevi mu isinzizo nga bagemye n'ebide, n'entongooli, n'endingidi, ng'ajiira ku kiragiro Musengwa Katonda kye yagha kyabazinga Daudi, ng'abita mu Gadi omulanzi wa kyabazinga ni Nathani omulanzi." 
2Chronicles29:26 Abalevi baayemerera nga bagemye n'ebivuga bya Daudi, ni bakabona boona baayemerera nga bagemye amagwala." 
2Chronicles29:27 Agho Hezekia yaabalagira bagheeyo ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa ku alutaari. Era omukolo ogw'ekigheebwayo bwe gwatoolera, abantu baatoolera okwembera Musengwa Katonda, n'okufuuwa amagwala, n'okukuba ebivuga bya kyabazinga Daudi owa Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles29:28 Abantu boonaboona abaali beesolokeiza agho, baasinza. Abembi baayemba, n'abafuuyi b'amagwala baagafuuwa. Ebintu byaba bityo, okutuukiza irala ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa lwe kyawaagho." 
2Chronicles29:29 Ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa bwe kyawaagho, kyabazinga n'abaaligho boonaboona baakuba amakiryaivu, baasinza." 
2Chronicles29:30 Kyabazinga Hezekia n'abakungu be baalagira Abalevi okwemba enhembo edhisaaka Musengwa Katonda, edhaayiiyizibwa Daudi ni Asafu omulanzi. Baayemba enhembo edhisaaka nga basangaavu, era baakuba amakiryaivu, baasinza." 
2Chronicles29:31 Agho Hezekia yaakoba abantu ati: “Mpegaano ni, nga bwe mumaze okwetukuza ni muba aba Musengwa Katonda, museete muleete mu isinzizo emisengo n'ebigheebwayo olw'okwebaza.” Abantu abaali beesoloiza baaleeta emisengo n'ebigheebwayo olw'okwebaza. Era abandi baaleeta ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa eby'ekyeyendere." 
2Chronicles29:32 Baaleeta ente enume nsanvu (70), n'entaama enume kikumi (100), n'entaama ento ebikumi bibiri (200), ebyo byonabyona byaba ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa eri Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles29:33 Ebindi bye baaleeta okughaayo bibe ebya Musengwa Katonda, byali ente enume lukaaga (600), n'entaama enkumi isatu (3,000)." 
2Chronicles29:34 Aye bakabona baali batono nga tibasobola kwita nsolo edho dhoonadhoona edh'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa kuba Abalevi baafangayo inho okwetukuza okusinga bakabona. Kale baganda baibwe Abalevi baababeeraku, okutuusa ni bakabona abandi boona bwe baamala okwetukuza ni babeeyimbaku, okutuusa omulimo lwe gwawa." 
2Chronicles29:35 Okwongereza ku bigheebwayo ebyayokebwa byonabyona okuwaagho, ghaaligho n'amasavu ag'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, n'ebigheebwayo ebifukibwa, ebyagheerwayo aghalala n'ebigheebwayo ebyayokebwa ebyo. Kale okusinza okw'omu isinzizo kwaizibwagho kutyo." 
2Chronicles29:36 Agho Hezekia n'abantu boonaboona baasagamba, kuba Katonda yababeera, baakola ebintu ebyo byonabyona amangu gatyo." 
2Chronicles30:1 Agho kyabazinga Hezekia yaagheereza obukwenda eri abantu boonaboona ab'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya, era yaaghandiikira n'ab'omu kiketezo kya Efuraimu n'ab'omu kya Manasse, ng'abakoba okwidha mu isinzizo e Yerusalemu, bakolere Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa." 
2Chronicles30:2 Kyabazinga oyo yali amaze okwekobaana n'abakungu be, era n'abantu boonaboona abaali beesolokeiza mu Yerusalemu, ng'ekibinuko ekyo ba kukikola mu mwezi gwakubiri." 
2Chronicles30:3 Aye tibaasobola kukikola mu nnaku dhaakyo, kuba omughendo gwa bakabona abaali beetukwiza gwali tigumala, ate n'abantu baali nga tibeesololeiza bukalamu mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:4 Agho kyabazinga n'abantu boonaboona abaali beesoloiza, baasiima entegeka eyo." 
2Chronicles30:5 Kale baalagira kirangirirwe mu Isiraeli yoonayoona, okuva e Beerisheba okutuuka e Dani, nti abantu baidhe e Yerusalemu bakolere Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa kuba baali tibakikolangaku nga bali kamaala nga bwe kiragirwa." 
2Chronicles30:6 Agho abakwenda baakola nga kyabazinga bwe yalagira, baaja mu Isiraeli ni mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona nga bali n'embaluwa edhiva ye kyabazinga oyo n'abakungu be, edhikoba dhiti: “Imwe Abaisiraeli abaawonagho ni mutatwalibwa bakyabazinga ba Siria, mukyuke mwire eri Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Aburahamu, ni Isaaka, ni Isiraeli, memale yeena aire ye muli." 
2Chronicles30:7 Mulobe kuba ng'oti ni badhaadha baimwe ni baganda baimwe, abaasungughaza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe, n'abaghaayo okuzikirizibwa nga bwe muli kubona." 
2Chronicles30:8 Era mulobe kuba na mpwitu ng'oti ni badhaadha baimwe, aye mwegheeyo eri Musengwa Katonda, mwingire mu isinzizo lye, lye yatukuza ebyanda n'ebyanda. Mugheerezenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe, olwo alekere agho okuboolekeza obusungu bwe obubitiriire." 
2Chronicles30:9 Bwe munaakyuka ni mwira eri Musengwa Katonda, abo abaatwala baganda baimwe n'abaana baimwe nga basibe, baidha kubagemerwa ekivunika, babalekule baire mu nsi eno kuba Musengwa Katonda waimwe wa kisa era asaasira. Taja kubakuba nkoone nga mwize y'ali.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Agho abakwenda baaja mu buli kibuga ekiri mu kiketezo kya Efuraimu n'ekya Manasse, era baaja baatuukira irala ni mu kiketezo kya Zebuluni. Aye abantu baayo baabasekerera busekerere era baabanhooma inho." 
2Chronicles30:11 Okutoolaku abatono bati ku b'omu bika, ekya Asheri, n'ekya Manasse, n'ekya Zebuluni, abaagonda ni baidha e Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:12 Era amaani ga Katonda gaakolera mu Bayudaaya, beeyimba kitole nga bamalirivu okujiira ku kiragiro kyabazinga n'abakungu be, kye baabagha nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira." 
2Chronicles30:13 Agho abantu kamaala inho beesolokeza e Yerusalemu mu mwezi ogwokubiri, okukuza Ekibinuko eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa." 
2Chronicles30:14 Baasitukiramu, baatoolagho alutaari dhoonadhoona edhaali mu Yerusalemu, edhaagheerwangaku emisengo n'okuniokezebwangaku obubbaani, baadhisuula mu kaiga Kiduroni." 
2Chronicles30:15 Ku lunaku olweikumi n'eina olw'omwezi ogwokubiri, baita entaama ento edh'okukuza Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa. Bakabona n'Abalevi abaali nga bakaali kwetukuza, ensoni dhaabagema, baaja beetukuza era baamala baaleeta mu isinzizo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa." 
2Chronicles30:16 Baayemerera mu bifo byaibwe, ng'Amateeka ga Musa omusaadha wa Katonda bwe galagira. Abalevi baatwaliranga bakabona omusaayi ogw'emisengo, ate bakabona baagumansiranga." 
2Chronicles30:17 Mu bantu abaali beesoloiza, mwalimu kamaala abaali nga tibeetukwiza. Kale Abalevi baaja nga baitira buli muntu ku abo entaama ento ey'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa, esobole okugheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles30:18 Era mu bantu abaali kamaala batyo, mwalimu bangi ku baava mu bika, ekya Efuraimu, n'ekya Manasse, n'ekya Issakari, n'ekya Zebuluni, abaali nga tibeetukwiza. Olwo baaba nga bali kukuza Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa mu nsambo etali ntuufu. Aye Hezekia yali amaze okubasabira ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda omulungi asonighe buli muntu," 
2Chronicles30:19 ali kusinza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baife oyo n'omwoyo omulala, waire ng'omuntu oyo tiimulongoofu ng'amateeka g'eisinzizo bwe galagira.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Musengwa Katonda yaawulira Hezekia kye yamusaba, yaasonigha abantu yaaloba kubakolaku kabi." 
2Chronicles30:21 Agho Abaisiraeli abaali beesololeiza mu Yerusalemu, baamala enaku musanvu nga bali kukola embaga ey'Ekibinuko eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa mu kusagamba okungi. Abalevi ni bakabona baasaakanga Musengwa Katonda buli lunaku, nga bakuba ebivuga n'amaani gaibwe goonagoona." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekia yaasiima Abalevi abaayoleka obukugu mu kugheereza Musengwa Katonda. Yaayogera nabo ng'abaizaamu amaani. Kale abantu baamala enaku musanvu nga bali kulya ebyali ku kibinuko. Baaghaayo emisengo egy'okutabagana n'egy'okwebaza eri Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe." 
2Chronicles30:23 Agho boonaboona abaali beesoloiza, baasalagho okumala enaku edhindi musanvu nga bali kukuza ekibinuko ekyo. Kale baamala enaku edhindi musanvu nga bali kukikuza mu kusagamba." 
2Chronicles30:24 Kyabazinga Hezekia owa Buyudaaya yaagha abantu abo boonaboona ente enume lukumi (1,000) n'entaama kasanvu (7,000), edh'okughaayo ng'ebigheebwayo. N'abakungu ba kyabazinga boona baagha abantu abo ente enume lukumi (1,000) n'entaama omutwalo mulala (10,000). Era bakabona bangi inho beetukuza." 
2Chronicles30:25 Kale abantu abeesoloza ab'omu Buyudaaya, ghalala ni bakabona, n'Abalevi, n'abantu abeesoloza okuva mu Isiraeli, n'abantu ab'endha abaasenga mu Isiraeli ni mu Buyudaaya, boonaboona baasagamba." 
2Chronicles30:26 Era ekibuga Yerusalemu kyaidhula okusagamba, kuba ghaali tighabangaghooku kiri ng'oti n'ekyo, okuva mu biseera bya Solomoni mutabane wa Daudi, kyabazinga wa Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles30:27 Agho bakabona n'Abalevi baasituka, baasabira abantu enkabi. Katonda yaawulira amamiro gaibwe, yaasiima okusaba kwaibwe mu kifo kye ekitukuvu y'aba mu igulu." 
2Chronicles31:1 Ebyo byonabyona nga biwoire, Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaaligho baaja mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya, baamenhamenha empango edh'amabaale, baasimulagho ebifaananie eby'omusambwa omukazi Ashera n'ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, ni alutaari. Baaja baakola batyo mu biketezo ebindi byonabyona ebya Yuda, n'ebya Benjamini, n'ebya Efuraimu, n'ebya Manasse, okutuusa lwe baabizikiriza byonabyona. Agho abantu boonaboona bairayo mu bibuga byaibwe, buli muntu mu kibandha kye." 
2Chronicles31:2 Agho kyabazinga Hezekia yaataagho bakabona n'Abalevi mu bikunsu bikunsu, nga bagheereza mu ngobo ng'omulimo gwa buli muntu bwe gwali okughangayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, okwo nga kw'otaire okugheerezanga Musengwa Katonda, n'okumwebazanga, n'okumusaakanga mu isinzizo." 
2Chronicles31:3 Kyabazinga yaatoola ku bintu ebibye ku bubwe, yaaghaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, ebya buli nkyo n'ebya buli igulo, n'eby'oku Sabbato, n'eby'oku mbaga ey'Ekibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, n'eby'oku mbaga edh'ebibinuko ebindi ebyalagirwa, nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka ga Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles31:4 Era yaalagira abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu okuleetanga omugabo ogw'okughanga bakabona, basobolenga okutuukiriza Amateeka ga Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo mulala." 
2Chronicles31:5 Ekiragiro ekyo bwe kyamala okulangirirwa, baaleeta mu bungi ebisooka okukungulwa, ku ngaano, ni ku mwenge ogw'emizabbibu, ni ku muzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, ni ku mudheenene ogw'endhuki, ni ku birime byonabyona. Era baaleeta mu bungi n'ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi ku ebyo bye baali nabyo." 
2Chronicles31:6 Abantu boonaboona abaabanga mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya baaleeta ente ndala ndala ku buli nte ikumi, n'entaama ndala ndala ku buli ntaama ikumi dhe baali nadho. Era baaleeta n'ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi bye baali nabyo, baabibunga agho, nga babighaireyo bibe ebya Musengwa Katonda waibwe." 
2Chronicles31:7 Ebintu ebyo baatoolera okubibunga mu mwezi ogwokusatu, baamaliriza mu mwezi ogwomusanvu." 
2Chronicles31:8 Agho Hezekia n'abakungu be bwe baidha ni babona emungo edho, beebaza Musengwa Katonda, era beebaza n'abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles31:9 Hezekia oyo yaabuuza bakabona ebigema ku mmungo edho. 
2Chronicles31:10 Agho Azaria Kabona Omukulu, mwidhukulu wa Zadoki, yaakoba ati: “Okuva abantu lwe baatoolera okuleeta ebintu mu isinzizo, tulya emere twaiguta twalekerera n'okulekerera, yaasigalagho nhingi inho kuba Musengwa Katonda aghaire abantu be enkabi.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Agho Hezekia yaalagira bategekeyo ebisenge mu isinzizo, era baabitegeka." 
2Chronicles31:12 Baingiza omwo n'obwegendereza ebyagheebwayo okuba ebya Musengwa Katonda, n'ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu eikumi omuntu bye yali nabyo. Baataagho Konania Omulevi okukolanga ogw'okubirabirira, nga Shimei muganda we n'amwiririra." 
2Chronicles31:13 Ate abaayambangaku Konania oyo ni muganda we oyo Shimei, nga ni bano: Yehieli, ni Azazia, ni Nahathi, ni Asaheli, ni Yerimothi, ni Yozabadi, ni Elieli, ni Isimakia, ni Mahathi, ni Benaia. Era nga baalondebwa kyabazinga Hezekia ni Azaria Kabona Omukulu ow'eisinzizo lya Katonda." 
2Chronicles31:14 Ate Kore mutabane wa Imuna, omukuumi w'omulyango ogw'e buvandhuba, n'eyalabiriranga ebyo abantu bye baaghaayo ye Musengwa Katonda ekyeyendere nga n'agabaniamu ebigheereibwayo okuba ebitukuvu einho ebya Musengwa Katonda oyo." 
2Chronicles31:15 Abaamuyambangaku baali, Edeni, ni Miniaminu, ni Yeshua, ni Shemaia, ni Amaria, ni Shekania. Baamuyambangaku n'obwesigwa mu bibuga bya bakabona, okugabira Balevi banaibwe ebintu, abakulu n'abato, mu bikunsu byaibwe" 
2Chronicles31:16 aye mu abo timwalimu abo abaali baghandiikiibwa mu nkalala edh'obuzaale. Baagabiranga abasaadha n'abaana abalenzi boonaboona, ab'emyaka esatu egy'obukulu n'okusingagho, abaajanga mu isinzizo okugheereza mu ngobo edh'ebikunsu byaibwe." 
2Chronicles31:17 Bakabona baaghandiikibwanga mu nkalala dh'obuzaale nga bajiira ku nda dha baiseibwe. Ate Abalevi baaghandiikibwanga okuva ku b'emyaka amakumi abiri egy'obukulu n'okusingagho, nga bajiira ku mirimo gye baakolanga mu bikunsu byaibwe." 
2Chronicles31:18 Bakabona baaghandiikibwanga ghalala ni bakazi baibwe, n'abaana baibwe abalenzi n'abaghala, n'ab'omu maka gaibwe boonaboona kuba kyabeetaagisanga okwekuuma nga batukuvu okukola omulimo gwaibwe ekiseera kyonakyona." 
2Chronicles31:19 Ebigema ku bakabona baidhukulu b'Aaroni abaabanga mu nimiro edh'omu byalo eby'oku bibuga byaibwe, ghaaligho abantu abaateebwagho mu butongole okughanga omugabo kiisi musaadha abalirwa mu bakabona, na kiisi Mulevi eyaghandiikibwa." 
2Chronicles31:20 Kale Hezekia yaakolanga atyo mu Buyudaaya yoonayoona. Yaakolanga ebirungi n'ebituufu ebisiimya Musengwa Katonda we, era yaabanga mwesigwa y'ali." 
2Chronicles31:21 Ebintu byamujiiranga bukalamu, kuba buli mulimo ogw'okusinza Katonda we mu isinzizo yagukolanga na mwoyo mulala, ng'ajiira ku mateeka n'ebiragiro." 
2Chronicles32:1 Ebyo Hezekia bye yakola n'obwesigwa nga bimaze okuwa, Sennakeribu kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaidha okulumba Buyudaaya. Yaasimba weema dhe kumpi n'ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu, ng'asuubira okubighangula abigeme." 
2Chronicles32:2 Hezekia bwe yabona nga Sennakeribu aidhie, era nga mwetegefu okulwanisa Yerusalemu," 
2Chronicles32:3 yaaba ghalala n'abakungu be era n'abasaadha be ab'amaani, baategeka okusemba ensulo edh'amaadhi edhaali kuliya kw'ekibuga." 
2Chronicles32:4 Agho abantu kamaala beesoloza, baasemba ensulo dhoonadhoona edh'amaadhi era n'akaiga akaakuuluuliranga mu kiketezo ekyo, nga bakoba bati: “Tusobola tutya okuleka obuleke bakyabazinga ba Assiria okwagaana amaadhi amangi gatyo nga baidhie?”" 
2Chronicles32:5 Agho kyabazinga yaazimba n'omwoyo mulala ekimante eky'oku kibuga ekyali kimenheibwagho, era yaakizimbaku n'ebituuti ebirengererwaku. Yaazimba n'ekimante ekindi kuliya ku ekyo. Yaalongoosa mu Kibuga kya Daudi, ekifo kye baidhuzaamu eitaka olw'okwekuuma abazigu, ekyayetebwanga Millo, kyaba kigumu inho. Yaakola eby'okulwanisa kamaala n'engabo kamaala inho." 
2Chronicles32:6 Abantu yaabataaku abaduumizi b'amagye babalabirire, era yaabasololeza ghe yali mu luya olw'oku mulyango gw'ekibuga. Agho yaayogera nabo ng'abagumya ati:" 
2Chronicles32:7 “Mube bagumu era nga muli bamalirivu. Mutatya era mutawaamu maani olw'okubona kyabazinga w'e Assiria, oba olw'okubona eigye lye einene, kuba ife tuli n'ali n'amaani okusinga abo." 
2Chronicles32:8 Mwene ali na igye lya bantu buntu, aye ife tuli ni Musengwa Katonda waife, nga n'atubeera era nga n'atulwaniragho entalo dhaife.” Agho abantu bairamu amaani olw'ebyo kyabazinga Hezekia owa Buyudaaya bye yabakoba." 
2Chronicles32:9 Ebyo nga biwoire, kyabazinga Sennakeribu ow'e Assiria eyali ng'azingiiza Lakishi n'amagye ge goonagoona, yaatuma abagheereza be eri kyabazinga Hezekia owa Buyudaaya, n'eri abantu b'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona abaali e Yerusalemu. Yaakoba ati:" 
2Chronicles32:10 “Kyabazinga Sennakeribu ow'e Assiria akoba ati, ‘Kiki ekiri kubeesiguza, ni mulinda babazingirize mu Yerusalemu?’" 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekia bw'abakoba ati, ‘Musengwa Katonda waimwe aidha kubawonia Abassiria,’ mulowooza muti aba tali kubasendasenda kubaghaayo, olwo mufe endhala n'endiwo?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Hezekia mwene oyo ti n'eyatoolagho alutaari n'ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, memale n'alagira abantu b'omu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu okusinzizanga mu maiso g'alutaari endala obulala eti, era nga ku yeene eyo kwe bali n'okuniokezanga n'obubbaani?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Timwidhi nze ni badhaadha bange kye twakola abantu abamaghanga agandi? Mulowooza muti bakatonda ab'abantu b'omu nsi edho baasobola okubaaku kye bakola, okuwonia ensi dhaibwe badhitoole mu buyinza bwange?" 
2Chronicles32:14 Mundageku katonda yeenayeena, ku bakatonda boonaboona ab'amaghanga ago badhaadha bange ge baasaaniagho, eyasobola okutoola abantu be mu ngalo dhange n'abawonia. Obwo mperaano imwe kiki ekibalowoozesa nti Katonda waimwe aidha kusobola okubawonia, abatoole mu buyinza bwange?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Kale ni mulobe kuganha Hezekia kubaguyaguya waire okubasendasenda atyo, mutaikiriza by'abakoba; kuba oba nga ghazira katonda yeenayeena wa ighanga oba wa bwakyabazinga, eyaali asoboireku okuwonia abantu be n'abatoola mu buyinza bwange oba mu bwa badhaadha bange, memale olwo Katonda owaimwe anaabawonia atya n'abatoola mu buyinza bwange?”" 
2Chronicles32:16 N'abakungu ba Assiria boona baayongera okwo okuvuma Musengwa Katonda n'omugheereza we Hezekia, era baasinza nagho." 
2Chronicles32:17 Era kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaaghandiika embaluwa ey'okunhooma n'okuvuma Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, ng'akoba ati: “Nga bakatonda b'omu maghanga ag'omu nsi edhindi bwe bataawonia bantu baibwe kubatoola mu buyinza bwange, ni Katonda wa Hezekia yeena atyo bw'ataidha kuwonia bantu be kubatoola mu buyinza bwange.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Baasoma ebibono ebyo nga baasiikana mu lulimi lw'Abayudaaya, nga benda okutiisatiisa n'okumala amaani mu bantu b'e Yerusalemu abaali ku kimante eky'oku kibuga, olwo ekibuga ekyo kibanguyire okukigema." 
2Chronicles32:19 Baayogera ku Katonda wa Yerusalemu mu nsambo n'endala nga bwe boogera ku bakatonda b'amaghanga agandi, abantu bye baakola obukole n'engalo." 
2Chronicles32:20 Agho kyabazinga Hezekia ni Isaia omulanzi mutabane wa Amozi, baalirira Katonda nga bamusaba okubabeera." 
2Chronicles32:21 Musengwa Katonda yaatuma malaika, yaita okumaliragho irala abaisirukale boonaboona ab'amaani abaziramu ntete, n'abaduumizi, n'abakulu b'eigye, abaali mu kifo kyabazinga w'e Assiria mwe yasimba weema dhe. Agho kyabazinga w'e Assiria yairayo mu nsi ye nga yeenayeena ensoni dhimugemye. Lwali lulala ng'ali mu isabo lya katonda ye yasinzanga, abandi ku batabane be baamufumita empiima yaafa." 
2Chronicles32:22 Kale atyo Musengwa Katonda yaawonia Hezekia n'abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu, yaabatoola mu buyinza bwa kyabazinga Sennakeribu ow'e Assiria n'obw'abazigu baibwe abandi boonaboona. Yaabaleetera okuba mu miraala ku ndhuyi dhaibwe dhoonadhoona." 
2Chronicles32:23 Agho abantu kamaala baidha e Yerusalemu nga baleeteire Musengwa Katonda ebirabo, era nga baleeteire ni kyabazinga Hezekia owa Buyudaaya ebintu eby'omughendo. Okuva ku olwo, amaghanga goonagoona gaatanga mu Hezekia oyo ekinhagansi kya maani." 
2Chronicles32:24 Mu biseera ebyo, Hezekia yalwala inho kumpi afe. Agho yaasaba Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda oyo yaayogera naye, yaamugha akamanhiso ati aidha kuwona." 
2Chronicles32:25 Aye Hezekia yaamala yeekuluntaza bwekuluntaze, yaaloba kusiima Musengwa Katonda nga bwe kyali kigwaniire, olw'ekirungi kye yamukolera. Kale Musengwa Katonda yaamusungughalira, era yaasungughalira n'abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, n'ab'omu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles32:26 Aye Hezekia yaamala yaagonda ghalala n'abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu, era baalekera agho okwekuluntaza. Kale Musengwa Katonda yaaloba kubamaliraku busungu bwe mu biseera bya Hezekia oyo." 
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekia yafuuka mukombe inho era yaaba wa kitiibwa ekitaloodheka. Yaazimba amaterekero ag'okutangamu, feeza, ni zaabu, n'amabaale ag'omughendo, n'obuwoowo, n'engabo, n'ebintu ebindi eby'omughendo." 
2Chronicles32:28 Yaaba n'amaterekero ag'engaano, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, n'ebigo by'ensolo edh'okwaya edha buli nsambo, n'ebisibo by'entaama." 
2Chronicles32:29 Era yaazimba ebibuga kamaala, yaafuna entaama n'embuzi n'ente kamaala, kuba Katonda yamugha ebintu kamaala inho." 
2Chronicles32:30 Era Hezekia mwene oyo, n'eyasemba omweta ogw'amaadhi ogw'eitale, ogw'ensulo ya Gihoni. Yaasimagho ogundi ogwaleetera amaadhi ago okukuuluulira ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba bw'ekibuga kya Daudi. Hezekia oyo ebintu byonabyona byamujiiranga bukalamu." 
2Chronicles32:31 Era n'abakwenda ab'abakungu b'e Babiloni bwe baidha, nga babatumye okubuuza Hezekia oyo ku byewuninkiriza ebyagwa mu nsi ye, Katonda yamuleka buleke asobole okumuleba, amanhe byonabyona ebiri mu mwoyo gwe." 
2Chronicles32:32 Ebindi byonabyona ebigema ku Hezekia, omuli n'ebirungi bye yakola, byaghandiikibwa mu Kubonekerwa kwa Isaia Omulanzi mutabane wa Amozi, ni mu Kitabo kya Bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya ni Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles32:33 Agho Hezekia yaafa, yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu kitundu eky'eitale mu lwambiidhi lwe baazikangamu baidhukulu ba Daudi. Abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu baamulira mu kitiibwa inho. Mutabane we Manasse yaamusikira ku bwa kyabazinga." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manasse yali agheza emyaka ikumi n'ebiri egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, era yaafugira okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi ataanu n'etaanu mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles33:2 Yaakolanga ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, ng'ajiira ku mpisa edheenhinhalwa edh'abamaghanga agandi Musengwa Katonda oyo be yabinga mu nsi eyo ng'Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuukayo." 
2Chronicles33:3 Yaazimba buyaaka ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, lata we Hezekia bye yali azikiriiza. Yaateeragho omusambwa Baali alutaari edh'okugusinzizaaku, era yaakola ebifaananie eby'omusambwa omukazi Ashera. Yaasinzanga eby'oku igulu byonabyona era yaafuuka mugheereza waabyo." 
2Chronicles33:4 Yaazimba alutaari mu isinzizo Musengwa Katonda lye yayogeraku ati: “Mu Yerusalemu mwe banansinzizanga lubeerera.” 
2Chronicles33:5 Era yaazimbira eby'oku igulu byonabyona alutaari mu mpya eibiri edh'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda. 
2Chronicles33:6 Yaayokyanga batabane be ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa, yaajanga mu balaguzi ni mu basamize, era yaakolanga eby'obulogo n'eby'emizimu. Yaakolanga inho ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, yaamuleetera okusungughala." 
2Chronicles33:7 Yaata mu isinzizo ekifaananie eky'omusambwa omukazi Ashera kye yabaadha. Ate nga eisinzizo eryo, Musengwa Katonda lye yakoba Daudi ni mutabane we Solomoni ati: “Mu isinzizo lino eriri mu kibuga Yerusalemu kye nalondamu mu bibuga byonabyona eby'ebika bya Isiraeli, mwe banansinzizanga enaku dhoonadhoona." 
2Chronicles33:8 Era tiriirayo kutoola Baisiraeli mu nsi ye nagha badhaadha baibwe, ni mbaleetera kutambulatambula eyo batyo, kasita banaatangayo omwoyo okukola byonabyona bye nabalagira, n'okukuuma amateeka goonagoona n'ebiragiro bye nabagha nga mbita mu Musa.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Aye Manasse yaasendasenda abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, yaabaleetera okukola ebibi okusinga n'abantu abamaghanga agandi bye baakola, Musengwa Katonda be yazikiriza ng'Abaisiraeli bali kumpi okutuuka yo." 
2Chronicles33:10 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ni Manasse n'abantu be, aye baaloba kufaayo naire." 
2Chronicles33:11 Kale Musengwa Katonda oyo yaaleeta abaduumizi b'eigye lya kyabazinga ow'e Assiria baalumba Buyudaaya, baagema Manasse n'ebyuma ebiri ng'oti malobo era baamusiba ku ndhegere edh'ekyuma ky'ekikomo, baamutwala e Babilonia." 
2Chronicles33:12 Agho bweyali ng'ali eyo mu kudaazibwadaazibwa, yeegayirira Musengwa Katonda we era yeewooya ekibitiriire mu maiso ga Katonda wa badhaadha be oyo." 
2Chronicles33:13 Yaasaba Katonda, era Katonda oyo yaikiriza okwegayirira kwe, n'okusaba kwe yaakuwulirisa, yaamwiza e Yerusalemu ku bwakyabazinga bwe. Olwo Manasse yaamanha nga Musengwa Katonda ni Katonda." 
2Chronicles33:14 Ebyo nga biwoire, Manasse yaazimba ekimante eky'okuliya ku kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi ku luuyi lwa Gihoni olw'e buvandhuba mu kiiko, okutuuka aghaingirirwa mu gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Ebyenhandha, n'okutuukira irala mu kitundu ekyetebwa Ofeli ekiri mu kibuga ekyo. Yaakizimba yaakituusa ghaigulu inho. Era yaata n'abaduumizi b'eigye mu bibuga ebindi ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu mu Buyudaaya." 
2Chronicles33:15 Yaatoola mu isinzizo bakatonda b'amaghanga agandi, n'ekisinzibwa ekitali Katonda kye yali atairemu, n'alutaari dhe yali azimbye ku lusozi olwazimbwaku eisinzizo eryo. Yaatoola ebintu ebyo ni mu bifo ebindi mu Yerusalemu, byonabyona yaabisuula kuliya kw'ekibuga." 
2Chronicles33:16 Yaazimba buyaaka alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda, era yaagheerayo ku alutaari eyo ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana n'ebigheebwayo olw'okwebaza. Era yaalagira abantu b'omu Buyudaaya okusinzanga Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles33:17 Aye waire ng'abantu baasigala nga bakaagheerayo emisengo mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, emisengo egyo baagighangayo eri Musengwa Katonda waibwe yenka." 
2Chronicles33:18 Ebindi byonabyona Manasse bye yakola, ni bye yasaba Katonda we, n'ebyo abalanzi bye baayogeranga naye mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles33:19 Ate ebigema ku ebyo Manasse bye yasaba Katonda, n'ebyo Katonda oyo bye yamwiramu olw'okusaba okwo, n'ebibi ghalala n'ebisobyo byonabyona bye yakola, n'ebifo ebigulumivu bye yazimba okusinzizangamu, n'ebifaananie eby'omusambwa omukazi Ashera bye yataagho, n'ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda bye yasinzanga ng'akaali kugonda kwenenia, byonabyona byaghandiikibwa mu Byafaayo eby'abalanzi." 
2Chronicles33:20 Agho Manasse yaafa yeeyimba ku badhaadha be abaafa, era yaaziikibwa mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga. Mutabane we Amoni yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'ebiri egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka ebiri mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles33:22 Amoni oyo yaakolanga ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, nga lata we Manasse bye yakolanga. Yaaghangayo emisengo eri ebifaananie byonabyona ise bye yakola, era yaabisinzanga." 
2Chronicles33:23 Yaaloba kugonderanga Musengwa Katonda nga lata we Manasse bwe yakolanga, aye yeeyongeranga bweyongere kukola bibi." 
2Chronicles33:24 Agho abakungu be baamukolera olukwe, baamutemulira mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles33:25 Aye abantu b'omu Buyudaaya baita abo boonaboona abaakolera Amoni oyo olukwe, era baataagho mutabane we Yosia yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles34:1 Yosia yali agheza emyaka munaana egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Era yaafuga okumala entangama ya myaka amakumi asatu na mulala mu Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles34:2 Yosia oyo yaakolanga ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'asiima, yaajiira ku mpisa enkalamu edha dhaadha we Daudi, yaaloba kukyuka kudhireka kwira eno oba ere." 
2Chronicles34:3 Kyabazinga Yosia bweyali ng'akaali muto, mu mwaka gwe ogwomunaana nga n'afuga Buyudaaya, yaatoolera okusinza Katonda wa dhaadha we Daudi. Era mu mwaka gwe ogweikumi n'ebiri yaatoolera okugogola mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu, okumalamu ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, n'ebifaananie eby'omusambwa omukazi Ashera, n'ebifaananie ebindi ebibaadhe n'ebyo ebyakolebwa mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa." 
2Chronicles34:4 Baamenhamenha alutaari edh'omusambwa Baali nga Yosia aligho mwene, baatematema ni alutaari edh'okuniokezebwaku obubbaani edhaali ghaigulu gh'edho. Baamulungula ebifaananie eby'omusambwa omukazi Ashera, n'ebifaananie ebindi ebibaadhe, n'ebyo ebyakolebwa mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, baabisa byafuuka nkungu era enkungu eyo baagimansira ku magombe g'abo abaaghangayo emisengo y'ebifaananie ebyo." 
2Chronicles34:5 Baayokera ku alutaari edho amagumba ga bakabona abaadhisinzizangaku. Mu nsambo eyo, Yosia yaagogola Buyudaaya ni Yerusalemu, byafuuka birongoofu." 
2Chronicles34:6 Yaakola atyo ni mu bibuga bya Manasse, n'ebya Efuraimu, n'ebya Simeoni, okutuukira irala ni mu Nafutali, ni mu bifo ebyazikirizibwa ebibyezungulwire." 
2Chronicles34:7 Yaamenhamenha alutaari, yaamulungula ebifaananie eby'omusambwa omukazi Ashera, n'ebifaananie ebindi, yaabisa byafuuka nkungu. Yaatematema n'alutaari dhoonadhoona edhiniokezebwaku obubbaani mu Isiraeli yoonayoona, memale yaira e Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omunaana (18) nga kyabazinga Yosia n'afuga Buyudaaya, kyabazinga Yosia oyo bwe yamala okugogola ensi eyo n'eisinzizo n'abifuula ebirongoofu, yaatuma omughandiisi we Shafani mutabane wa Azalia, ni Maaseia omufuzi w'ekibuga, ni Yoa mutabane wa Yoahazi omukuumi w'ebighandiiko. Yaabakoba baje balongoose eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda we." 
2Chronicles34:9 Baaja eri Hilikia Omukulu wa Bakabona, baaghaayo empiiya edhaaleetebwa mu isinzizo, Abalevi abaigazi b'omulyango ogwingira mu isinzizo, dhe baasoloza ku bantu ba Manasse, n'aba Efuraimu, n'ab'ebiketezo ebindi byonabyona ebya Isiraeli, n'aba Yuda, n'aba Benjamini, n'ab'omu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:10 Baadhigemya abakozi abaalabiriranga omulimo ogw'okulongoosa eisinzizo, ate abo baadhighaayo okulongoosa eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
2Chronicles34:11 Baadhisasula ababaadhi n'abazimbi n'abatemi b'amabaale, baguleku embaawo n'amabaale amateme, n'emiti, balongoose endhu bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya dhe baaleka agho ni dhoonooneka." 
2Chronicles34:12 Abasaadha abo baakola omulimo n'obwesigwa, nga balabirirwa Abalevi bano: Yahathi ni Obadia ab'oku nda ya Merari, ni Zekaria ni Meshullamu ab'oku nda ya Kohathi. Abalevi boonaboona baali bakugu mu bivuga." 
2Chronicles34:13 Abalevi abandi baalabiriranga abo abeetwikanga ebintu, era baakozesanga n'abo boonaboona abaakolanga emirimo egya buli ngeri. Ate abandi baabanga baghandiisi, bakulembeze, oba baigazi ba miryango." 
2Chronicles34:14 Bwe baali batoolayo empiiya edhaaleetebwa mu isinzizo, Hilikia kabona yaazuula ekitabo ky'Amateeka, Musengwa Katonda ge yagha ng'abita mu Musa." 
2Chronicles34:15 Agho Hilikia oyo yaakoba Shafani omughandiisi ati: “Nzwire ekitabo ky'Amateeka mu isinzizo.” Yaakigha Shafani. 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafani yaakitwala eri kyabazinga, era yaamukobera ati: “Abagheereza bo bakoze byonabyona bye walagira." 
2Chronicles34:17 Batoireyo empiiya dhe baagaine mu isinzizo, baadhigemya abo abali kulabirira omulimo ogw'okulongoosa eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda eryo.”" 
2Chronicles34:18 Era Shafani yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Hilikia kabona ampaire ekitabo.” Agho yaakisomeramu kyabazinga. 
2Chronicles34:19 Agho kyabazinga bwe yawulira ebyasomwa mu kitabo ky'Amateeka, yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye olw'okunakughala." 
2Chronicles34:20 Yaagha ekiragiro eri Hilikia, ni Ahikamu mutabane wa Shafani, ni Abudoni mutabane wa Mika, ni Shafani omughandiisi, ni Asaia omugheereza wa kyabazinga. Yaabakoba ati:" 
2Chronicles34:21 “Muje mwebuuze ku Musengwa Katonda ku lwange ni ku lw'abo abaasigalagho mu Isiraeli ni mu Buyudaaya, ebigema ku ebyo ebighandiikiibwa mu kitabo kino ekizuuliibwa. Obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda buli kututumbukiraku ng'oti muliro, kuba badhaadha baife tibaagondera bibono bya Musengwa Katonda ebiri mu kitabo kino, ni babikoleraku nga bwe byali n'okukolerwaku.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Agho Hilikia n'abo kyabazinga be yatuma, baaja eri Huluda omulanzi omukazi, muka Shallumu. Shallumu oyo yali mutabane wa Tokathi era mwidhukulu wa Hasara. Omukazi oyo yabanga mu kiketezo ekiyaaka ekya Yerusalemu, era nga iba oyo Shallumu n'akuuma eiterekero ly'ebivaalo eby'omu isinzizo. Agho baayogera n'omukazi oyo ku nsonga eyo." 
2Chronicles34:23 Yaabakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Omuntu abatumye ye ndi mumukobe muti," 
2Chronicles34:24 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ebikolimo ebyogerwaku mu kitabo kino kye basomeire kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, nja kubituusa ku kifo kino ni ku bantu baamu." 
2Chronicles34:25 Nga bwe banviireku ni baniokeza obubbaani eri emisambwa, ni bansungughaza n'ebyo byonabyona bye bakoze, obusungu bwange bwidha kutumbukira ku kifo kino ng'oti muliro, era tibulizikira." 
2Chronicles34:26 Aye kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, abatumye okuneebuuzaaku, mumukobe muti nze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli nkoba nti, bw'owuliire ebyo ebighandiikiibwa mu kitabo ekyo," 
2Chronicles34:27 weeneniiza era weewombeeka mu maiso gange. Era okanwiremu ebivaalo byo olw'okunakughala era waalira amaziga, bw'owuliire ebibono bye nayogera ku kifo kino ni ku bantu abakibaamu. Kale ni mpuliire okusaba kwo." 
2Chronicles34:28 Era bona eno, ndikutwala weeyimba ku badhaadha bo abaafa, waaziikibwa mu miraala, waaloba kubona ku kabi ke ndituusa ku kifo kino ni ku bantu abakibaamu.’ ” Agho abasaadha bairayo baakobera kyabazinga obukwenda obwo." 
2Chronicles34:29 Agho kyabazinga Yosia yaayetesa abakulembeze boonaboona aba Buyudaaya n'aba Yerusalemu, beesolokeza gh'ali." 
2Chronicles34:30 Yaaja nabo mu isinzizo, aghalala n'abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya, n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, ni bakabona, n'abalanzi, n'abantu abandi boonaboona abakologho n'ababuliidho. Agho nga bali kuwulira, yaasoma ebyali mu kitabo eky'endagaano ekyazuulibwa mu isinzizo." 
2Chronicles34:31 Kyabazinga Yosia yaayemerera mu kifo kye, yaakola endagaano mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, nga bw'aidha okugemanga amateeka n'ebiragiro bye n'omutima gwe gwonagwona era n'omwoyo gwe gwonagwona, era atuukirizenga ebiri mu ndagaano eyo, nga bwe byaghandiikibwa mu kitabo ekyo." 
2Chronicles34:32 Agho yaakubiriza abantu ba Benjamini n'abantu boonaboona abaaligho mu Yerusalemu, bakakase nga bwe baidha okukuumanga endagaano eyo. Era abantu b'omu Yerusalemu baakuuma endagaano eyo eya Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe." 
2Chronicles34:33 Yosia yaatoola ebyenhinhalwa byonabyona mu kiketezo ky'Abaisiraeli. Olwo yaaleetera Abaisiraeli boonaboona okugheereza Musengwa Katonda waibwe. Era ekiseera kyonakyona kye yamala nga mulamu, abantu tibaalekeraku naire okugheereza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe." 
2Chronicles35:1 Agho kyabazinga Yosia yaakuza mu Yerusalemu Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa olwa Musengwa Katonda. Baita entaama ento dhe baakozesa ku mukolo ogwo, ku lunaku olweikumi n'eina olw'omwezi ogusooka." 
2Chronicles35:2 Kyabazinga yaataagho bakabona okukolanga emirimo mu isinzizo, era yaabakubirizanga okugikolanga obukalamu." 
2Chronicles35:3 Yaakoba Abalevi abaayegeresanga abantu mu Isiraeli mwonamwona era abaalinga abatukuvu eri Musengwa Katonda, ati: “Mute Esanduuku entukuvu ey'Endagaano mu isinzizo, Solomoni mutabane wa kyabazinga Daudi owa Isiraeli lye yazimba. Tikikaabeetaagisa kugibbeederanga ku mabega gaimwe. Mpegaano mugheereze Musengwa Katonda waimwe n'abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles35:4 Mwetegeke mukolere mu ngobo nga mujiira ku nda dha badhaadha baimwe nga bwe dhiri, era nga mujiira ku kiragiro kya kyabazinga Daudi owa Isiraeli ni mutabane we Solomoni." 
2Chronicles35:5 Muje mu isinzizo nga muli mu bikunsu bikunsu eby'enda dha badhaadha ba baganda baimwe abatali Balevi buli kikunsu kibeeku ab'oku nda ya badhaadha b'Abalevi. 
2Chronicles35:6 Olwo mwite entaama ento edh'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa era mwetukuze. Memale mutegekere baganda baimwe basobole okukola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira ng'abita mu Musa.” 
2Chronicles35:7 Agho Yosia yaatoola mu byayo ebibye entaama ento n'embuzi ento emitwalo esatu (30,000), n'ente enume enkumi isatu (3,000), yaadhigha abantu boonaboona abatali Balevi, dhibe ebigheebwayo eby'Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa." 
2Chronicles35:8 N'abakungu be baaghaayo kyeyendere eri abantu ni bakabona n'Abalevi, ebintu eby'okukozesa. Hilikia ni Zekaria ni Yehieli abaakuliranga eisinzizo, baagha bakabona entaama ento n'embuzi ento enkumi ibiri na lukaaga (2,600), n'ente enume ebikumi bisatu, dhibe ebigheebwayo eby'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa." 
2Chronicles35:9 N'abakulu b'Abalevi, Konania ni baganda be babiri Shemaia ni Nethaneli, ng'otaireku n'abakulu abandi, Hashabia ni Yeieli, ni Yozabadi, boona baagha Abalevi entaama ento n'embuzi ento enkumi itaanu (5,000), n'ente enume ebikumi bitaanu (500), dhibe ebigheebwayo eby'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa." 
2Chronicles35:10 Ebintu byonabyona bwe byamala okutegekebwa, bakabona n'Abalevi baayemerera mu bifo byaibwe nga kyabazinga bwe yalagira." 
2Chronicles35:11 Entaama ento n'embuzi ento edh'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa bwe dhaamala okwitibwa, Abalevi baadhibaagaku empu ate bakabona baamansira omusaayi ogudhiviiremu." 
2Chronicles35:12 Baatoola edhindi ku ntaama n'embuzi edho, dhaaba ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, baadhigabaniamu nga bajiira ku bikunsu eby'enda dha badhaadha b'abantu abatali Balevi, basobole okudhighaayo eri Musengwa Katonda, nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Musa. Era baakola batyo ni ku nte enume." 
2Chronicles35:13 Baayokya emisengo egy'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa, ng'amateeka bwe galagira. Era baafumba ebigheebwayo ebitukuvu mu seepiki ni mu nsaka ni mu ntamu, baamala baabitwalira mangu abantu boonaboona abatali Balevi." 
2Chronicles35:14 Bwe baamala okukola ekyo, Abalevi abo beetegekera beene era baategekera ni bakabona ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni, kuba bakabona abo tibaafuna kiseera naire nga bali kughaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa byonabyona okuwaagho, n'okughaayo amasavu, okutuusa obwire okuziba. Kale abalevi kye baava beetegekera beene, era ni bategekera ni bakabona ab'oku lulyo lwa Aaroni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Abembi ab'oku nda ya Asafu bano: Asafu, ni Hemani, ni Yeduthuni omulanzi wa kyabazinga, baali mu bifo byaibwe nga kyabazinga Daudi bwe yalagira. N'abaigazi b'emiryango gy'eisinzizo tibaava ku miryango, kuba Balevi banaibwe abandi baabategekera." 
2Chronicles35:16 Kale omukolo gwonagwona ogw'okusinza Musengwa Katonda gutyo bwe gwategekebwa ku lunaku olwo, baakuza Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa era baaghaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ku alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda, nga kyabazinga Yosia bwe yalagira." 
2Chronicles35:17 Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaaligho, baamala enaku musanvu nga bakuza Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa n'Ekibinuko eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa." 
2Chronicles35:18 Okuviira irala mu biseera bya Samueli omulanzi, ghaali tighabangaghooku Kibinuko kya Kubitizibwa kyonakyona kye baakuza mu Isiraeli ng'oti ni kino. Era ku bakyabazinga boonaboona abaasooka, tikwaliku waire omulala ati eyakuza Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa ng'oti ni Yosia bwe yakikuza, nga bakabona baligho, n'Abalevi, n'abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Isiraeli, n'ab'omu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa ekyo kyakuzibwa mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omunaana (18) ogw'obufuzi bwa kyabazinga Yosia oyo. 
2Chronicles35:20 Ebyo byonabyona bwe byamala okuwa, Yosia ng'amaze okutegeka eisinzizo, kyabazinga Neko owa Misiri yaidha okulwanira olutalo e Karikemishi ku mwiga Eufurate. Yosia yaaja okumulwanisa." 
2Chronicles35:21 Aye Neko yaamugheereza abakwenda ng'akoba ati: “Ku iwe kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya ni ku nze, naani ali n'ensonga ku mwine? Nze leero tiidhie kulwanisa iwe. Ndidhie kulwanisa bazigu bange, era Katonda andagiire okwangughaku. Katonda ali ghalala ninze, kale loba kumulwanisa, olwo aleke okukuzikiriza.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Aye era Yosia yaaloba kubivaaku naire, yaaloba kuwulirisa Katonda bye yayogera ng'abita mu Neko. Kale yeefuusafuusa era yaaja okulwana olutalo mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe e Megiddo." 
2Chronicles35:23 Agho abalasi b'obusaale baalasa kyabazinga Yosia, era yaakoba abagheereza be ati: “Mundhizeeyo, banfumiite inho ebibwa.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Kale abagheereza be baamutoola mu kigaali kye eky'omu lutalo kye yalimu, baamwiza mu kigaali kye ekindi eky'omu lutalo, olwo baamutwala e Yerusalemu. Yaafiira eyo era baamuziika mu lwambiidhi lwa badhaadha be. Abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu baamulira." 
2Chronicles35:25 Ni Yeremia omulanzi yeena yaalira Yosia. Era okulira kwe okwo, abembi boonaboona abasaadha n'abakazi baakufuulamu mpisa mu Isiraeli ni ye buli eno, okwembanga ku Yosia nga bamulira." 
2Chronicles35:26 Ebindi byonabyona ebigema ku Yosia, n'ebirungi bye yakola ng'ajiira ku byaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka ga Musengwa Katonda," 
2Chronicles35:27 era n'ebyo ebimugemaku ebyasooka n'ebyasembayo, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo kya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli ni Buyudaaya." 
2Chronicles36:1 Agho abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya baalonda Yehoahazi mutabane wa Yosia, baamufuula kyabazinga mu kifo kya lata we oyo mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yehoahazi yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'esatu egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Era yaafugira entangama ya myezi esatu mu Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles36:3 Kyabazinga Neko owa Misiri yaamutoola ku bwakyabazinga mu Yerusalemu, era yaaleetera Buyudaaya okughanga omusolo gwa talanta kikumi edha feeza ni talanta ndala eya zaabu." 
2Chronicles36:4 Kyabazinga Neko oyo yaatoola Eliakimu muganda wa Yehoahazi, yaamufuula kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya ni Yerusalemu. Era yaakyusa n'eriina lya Eliakimu, yaamutuuma Yehoiakimu. Yaagema Yehoahazi muganda wa Yehoiakimu oyo, yaamutwala e Misiri." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoiakimu yali agheza emyaka amakumi abiri n'etaanu egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Era yaafugira entangama ya myaka ikumi na mulala mu Yerusalemu. Yaakolanga ebibi ebitaasiimya Musengwa Katonda we. 
2Chronicles36:6 Kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia yaidha yaamulwanisa, era yaamala yaamusiba ku ndhegere, yaamutwala e Babilonia." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadinezzari oyo yaatoola n'ebindi ku bintu ebyakozesebwanga mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, yaabitwala yaabita mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga e Babilonia." 
2Chronicles36:8 Ebindi byonabyona ebigema ku kyabazinga Yehoiakimu, omuli ebyenhinhalwa bye yakola, n'ebindi bye baamuvuunaana, byaghandiikibwa mu Kitabo ky'Ebyafaayo bya Bakyabazinga ba Isiraeli ni Buyudaaya. Mutabane we Yehoiakini yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoiakini yali agheza emyaka munaana egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Era yaafugira entangama ya myezi esatu n'enaku ikumi mu Yerusalemu. Yaakolanga ebibi ebitaasiimya Musengwa Katonda. 
2Chronicles36:10 Agho omwaka nga guli kutoolera, ekiseera ebimera kye bisibukiramu, kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari yaatwala Yehoiakini e Babilonia nga musibe, yaatwala n'ebintu eby'omughendo eby'omu isinzizo. Yaataagho Zedekia muganda wa Yehoiakini oyo, yaamufuula kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya ni Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekia yali agheza emyaka abiri na mulala egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga. Era yaafugira entangama ya myaka ikumi na mulala mu Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles36:12 Yaakolanga ebibi ebitaasiimya Musengwa Katonda we. Yaaloba n'okugondera Yeremia omulanzi, ng'aidhie okumukobera Musengwa Katonda oyo bye yamutuma." 
2Chronicles36:13 Zedekia era yaadheemera ni kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari, eyali amaze okumulayiza mu Katonda, ng'ali n'okuwuliranga ebiragiro bya Nebukadinezzari oyo. Aye Zedekia oyo yaakola bwa mpwitu era yaakalangusa omwoyo gwe, yaaloba kwenenia kwira eri Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles36:14 Ni bakabona abakulu nga kw'otaire n'abakulembeze abantu, boona baakola ebibi einho nga bajiira ku byenhinhalwa byonabyona eby'abamaghanga agandi. Kale baayonoona batyo eisinzizo Musengwa Katonda mwene lye yatukuza mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:15 Musengwa Katonda oyo, Katonda wa badhaadha baibwe yayongera okubagheerezanga abakwenda aghazira kukoogha naire, kuba yali ayenda okubawonia beene era n'okuwonia eisinzizo lye." 
2Chronicles36:16 Aye baayeeyereza abakwenda ba Katonda baanhooma bye yabakoba, era baasekerera abalanzi be, okutuusa lwe baaleetera Musengwa Katonda oyo okubasungughalira ekibitiriire, nga tibakaasobola kuwona." 
2Chronicles36:17 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaaleeta kyabazinga w'e Babilonia okwidha okubalwanisa, yaitira abaana baibwe abaakaisuka ni mu isinzizo mwene, aghazira kusaasira muntu waire omulala k'abe mukulu oba muto, musaadha oba mukazi, mulamu oba mulwaire. Musengwa Katonda yaabaghaayo boonaboona mu ngalo edh'abazigu." 
2Chronicles36:18 Yaatoola n'ebintu byonabyona ebyakozesebwanga mu isinzizo ka bibe ebinene oba ebitono, n'eby'obukombe eby'omu isinzizo, n'eby'obukombe ebya kyabazinga, n'eby'abakungu be, byonabyona yaabitwala e Babilonia." 
2Chronicles36:19 Yaayokya eisinzizo, yaamenhagho ekimante ekyali kyezungulula Yerusalemu, yaayokya amayumba gaamu goonagoona, era yaazikiriza n'ebintu byamu ebirungi byonabyona." 
2Chronicles36:20 Yaatoola abo abaawonagho mu lutalo, yaabatwala e Babilonia. Baabanga eyo nga bamugheereza era baamala baagheereza n'abaamwiririra ng'aviiregho, okutuusa obwakyabazinga obw'e Perusia bwe bwaidhagho." 
2Chronicles36:21 Ekyo kyabaagho okutuukiriza Musengwa Katonda bye yayogera ng'abita mu Yeremia omulanzi, ati: “Ensi erirekebwa agho etyo okumala entangama ya myaka nsanvu ng'ewuumula, olw'okwesasuuza ekiwuumulo kya Sabbato kye baali tibakuzanga.”" 
2Chronicles36:22 Mu mwaka ogwasooka ogwa kyabazinga Kuro okufuga Perusia, Musengwa Katonda yatuukiriza ekyo kye yayogera ng'abita mu Yeremia omulanzi. Musengwa Katonda oyo yaleetera kyabazinga Kuro oyo okulangirira ekiragiro mu bwakyabazinga bwe bwonabwona, era yaakita mu bughandiike ati:" 
2Chronicles36:23 “Kyabazinga Kuro ow'e Perusia akoba ati: Musengwa Katonda, Katonda ow'eigulu, yampa obwakyabazinga bwonabwona obw'oku nsi, era ampaire obuvunaanizibwa okumuzimbira eisinzizo e Yerusalemu ekiri mu Buyudaaya. Kale ni buli muntu ku imwe abantu be, aje eyo. Nsaba Musengwa Katonda oyo abe n'imwe mwenamwena abantu be.”" 
Ezra1:1 Mu mwaka ogwasooka ogwa kyabazinga Kuro okufuga Perusia, Musengwa Katonda yatuukiriza ekyo kye yayogera ng'abita mu Yeremia omulanzi. Musengwa Katonda oyo yaleetera kyabazinga Kuro oyo okulangirira ekiragiro mu bwakyabazinga bwe bwonabwona, nga kighandiikiibwa kiti:" 
Ezra1:2 “Kyabazinga Kuro ow'e Perusia akoba ati: Musengwa Katonda ow'eigulu, yampa obwakyabazinga bwonabwona obw'oku nsi, era ampaire obuvunaanizibwa okumuzimbira eisinzizo e Yerusalemu ekiri mu Buyudaaya." 
Ezra1:3 Nsaba Katonda abe n'imwe mwenamwena abantu be. Mwidha kuja e Yerusalemu ekiri mu Buyudaaya, muzimbe buyaaka eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, oyo ni Katonda ali mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:4 Kiisi Muyudaaya yeenayeena eyawonagho, eyo yoonayoona ye yasenga, agwaine ayambibwe abantu b'aba nabo aghalala, nga bamugha ebintu bino: feeza, ni zaabu, n'ebintu ebindi ebikozesebwa, n'ensolo ng'okwo kw'otaire n'ebigheebwayo eby'ekyeyendere eby'okughaayo mu isinzizo lya Katonda eriri mu Yerusalemu.”" 
Ezra1:5 Agho abakulu b'enda dha baiseibwe mu bika, ekya Yuda n'ekya Benjamini, ni bakabona, n'Abalevi abandi, na buli muntu yeenayeena Katonda ye yaleetera okwenda okuja, baasituka okuja okuzimba obuyaaka eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:6 Abantu be baabanga nabo aghalala, baabayamba nga babagha ebintu ebya feeza, ni zaabu, n'ebintu ebindi, n'ensolo, n'ebintu eby'omughendo einho, nga kw'otaire n'ebigheebwayo eby'ekyeyendere." 
Ezra1:7 Era kyabazinga Kuro yaafulumya ebintu eby'omu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari bye yali atoire mu Yerusalemu n'abitwala n'abita mu masabo ag'emisambwa gye." 
Ezra1:8 Kuro oyo kyabazinga w'e Perusia, yaagemya ebintu ebyo Mithuredathi omughanika, eyabibala n'abigha Sheshibazzari eyali nga n'omufuzi ow'e Buyudaaya." 
Ezra1:9 Guno n'ogwali omughendo gwabyo: Ebbakuli dha zaabu lukumi (1,000), ebbakuli dha feeza lukumi (1,000), ebiniokezebwaku obubbaani amakumi abiri na mwenda," 
Ezra1:10 ebibya bya zaabu makumi asatu, n'ebibya bya feeza ebikumi bina na ikumi (410), n'ebikozesebwa ebindi lukumi (1,000)." 
Ezra1:11 Ebintu byonabyona ebya zaabu n'ebya feeza aghalala, byali enkumi itaanu na bina (5,400). Ebintu ebyo byonabyona Sheshibazzari yabitwala e Yerusalemu ghalala n'abaali mu bunhage, okuva mu nsi Babilonia." 
Ezra2:1 Gano n'amaina ag'abantu ab'omu kiketezo eky'e Buyudaaya abaira okuva mu nsi Babilonia mu bunhage, kyabazinga waayo Nebukadinezzari ye yali abatwaire nga basibe. Abantu abo baira e Yerusalemu n'e Buyudaaya, buli muntu ng'airayo mu kibuga eky'ewaibwe." 
Ezra2:2 Abakulembeze baibwe baali: Zerubbabeli, Yoshua, Nehemia, Seraia, Reelaia, Morodekai, Bilishani, Misipari, Bigivai, Rehumu, ni Baana. Guno n'omughendo ogw'Abaisiraeli abaira okuva mu bunhage:" 
Ezra2:3 Ab'oku nda ya Paroshi baali enkumi ibiri na kikumi na nsanvu na babiri (2,172);" 
Ezra2:4 ab'oku nda ya Shefatia baali ebikumi bisatu na nsanvu na babiri (372); 
Ezra2:5 ab'oku nda ya Ara baali lusanvu na nsanvu na bataanu (775); 
Ezra2:6 ab'oku nda ya Pahathimoabu era nga baidhukulu ba Yeshua ni Yoabu baali enkumi ibiri na lunaana na ikumi na babiri (2,812);" 
Ezra2:7 ab'oku nda ya Elamu baali lukumi na bibiri n'ataanu na bana (1,254);" 
Ezra2:8 ab'oku nda ya Zattu baali lwenda n'ana na bataanu (945); 
Ezra2:9 ab'oku nda ya Zakkai baali lusanvu na nkaaga (760); 
Ezra2:10 ab'oku nda ya Bani baali lukaaga n'ana na babiri (642); 
Ezra2:11 ab'oku nda ya Bebai baali lukaaga n'abiri na basatu (623); 
Ezra2:12 ab'oku nda ya Azigadi baali lukumi na bibiri n'abiri na babiri (1,222);" 
Ezra2:13 ab'oku nda ya Adonikamu baali lukaaga na nkaaga na mukaaga (666); 
Ezra2:14 ab'oku nda ya Bigivai baali enkumi ibiri n'ataanu na mukaaga (2,056);" 
Ezra2:15 ab'oku nda ya Adini baali ebikumi bina n'ataanu na bana (454); 
Ezra2:16 ab'oku nda ya Ateri, era ayetebwa Hezekia, baali kyenda na munaana (98);" 
Ezra2:17 ab'oku nda ya Bezai baali ebikumi bisatu n'abiri na basatu (323); 
Ezra2:18 ab'oku nda ya Yora baali kikumi na ikumi na babiri (112); 
Ezra2:19 ab'oku nda ya Hushumu baali ebikumi bibiri n'abiri na basatu (223); 
Ezra2:20 ate ab'oku nda ya Gibbari baaba kyenda na bataanu (95). 
Ezra2:21 Abantu ab'e Bethelehemu baali kikumi n'abiri na basatu (123); 
Ezra2:22 abantu ab'e Netofa baali amakumi ataanu na mukaaga (56); 
Ezra2:23 abantu ab'e Anathothi baali kikumi n'abiri na munaana (128); 
Ezra2:24 abantu ab'e Azimavethi baali amakumi ana na babiri (42); 
Ezra2:25 abantu ab'e Kiriathi Yearimu, n'ab'e Kefira, n'ab'e Beerothi baali lusanvu n'ana na basatu (743);" 
Ezra2:26 abantu ab'e Rama n'ab'e Geba baali lukaaga n'abiri na mulala (621); 
Ezra2:27 abantu ab'e Mikimasi baali kikumi n'abiri na babiri (122); 
Ezra2:28 abantu ab'e Betheli n'ab'e Ayi baali ebikumi bibiri n'abiri na basatu (223); 
Ezra2:29 abantu ab'e Nebo baali amakumi ataanu na babiri (52); 
Ezra2:30 abantu ab'e Magibishi baali kikumi n'ataanu na mukaaga (156); 
Ezra2:31 abantu ab'e Elamu kire ekindi baali lukumi na bibiri n'ataanu na bana (1,254);" 
Ezra2:32 abantu ab'e Harimu baali ebikumi bisatu n'abiri (320). 
Ezra2:33 Abantu ab'e Lodi, n'ab'e Hadida, n'ab'e Ono baali lusanvu n'abiri na bataanu (725);" 
Ezra2:34 abantu ab'e Yeriko baali ebikumi bisatu n'ana na bataanu (345); 
Ezra2:35 ate abantu ab'e Sena baaba enkumi isatu na lukaaga n'asatu (3,630)."
