Ezra2:36 Mu baira okuva mu bunhage mwalimu bakabona bano: Ab'oku nda ya Yedaia nga baasimuka mu Yeshua, baali lwenda na nsanvu na basatu (973);" 
Ezra2:37 ab'oku nda ya Immeri baali lukumi n'ataanu na babiri (1,052);" 
Ezra2:38 ab'oku nda ya Pashuhuri baali lukumi na bibiri n'ana na musanvu (1,247);" 
Ezra2:39 ate ab'oku nda ya Harimu baaba lukumi na ikumi na musanvu (1,017)." 
Ezra2:40 Mu baira okuva mu bunhage mwalimu Abalevi bano: Ab'oku nda ya Yeshua, n'ab'oku nda ya Kadimieli, nga baasimuka mu Hodavia, baali nsanvu na bana (74)." 
Ezra2:41 Abembi b'omu isinzizo baali ba ku nda ya Asafu, era baali kikumi n'abiri na munaana (128)." 
Ezra2:42 Abakuumi b'emiryango gy'eisinzizo baali, ba ku nda ya Shallumu, n'ab'oku ya Ateri, n'ab'oku ya Talumoni, n'ab'oku ya Akkubu, n'ab'oku ya Hatita, n'ab'oku ya Shobai boonaboona aghalala baaba kikumi n'asatu na mwenda (139)." 
Ezra2:43 Abaagheerezanga mu isinzizo baali, ba ku nda ya Ziha, n'ab'oku ya Hasufa, n'ab'oku ya Tabbaothi;" 
Ezra2:44 ab'oku nda ya Kerosi, n'ab'oku ya Siaha, n'ab'oku ya Padoni;" 
Ezra2:45 ab'oku nda ya Lebana, n'ab'oku ya Hagaba, n'ab'oku ya Akkubu;" 
Ezra2:46 ab'oku nda ya Hagabu, n'ab'oku ya Shamulai, n'ab'oku ya Hanani;" 
Ezra2:47 ab'oku nda ya Giddeli, n'ab'oku ya Gahari, n'ab'oku ya Reayia;" 
Ezra2:48 ab'oku nda ya Rezini, n'ab'oku ya Nekoda, n'ab'oku ya Gazzamu;" 
Ezra2:49 ab'oku nda ya Uzza, n'ab'oku ya Pasea, n'ab'oku ya Besai;" 
Ezra2:50 ab'oku nda ya Asina, n'ab'oku ya Meunimu, n'ab'oku ya Nefisimu;" 
Ezra2:51 ab'oku nda ya Bakabuka, n'ab'oku ya Hakufa, n'ab'oku ya Harahura;" 
Ezra2:52 ab'oku nda ya Bazaluthi, n'ab'oku ya Mehida, n'ab'oku ya Harasha;" 
Ezra2:53 ab'oku nda ya Barakosi, n'ab'oku ya Sisera, n'ab'oku ya Tema;" 
Ezra2:54 n'ab'oku nda ya Nezia, n'ab'oku ya Hatifa." 
Ezra2:55 Mu baira okuva mu bunhage mwalimu abagheereza aba Solomoni bano: Ab'oku nda ya Sotai, n'ab'oku ya Hassoferethi, n'ab'oku ya Peruda;" 
Ezra2:56 ab'oku nda ya Yaala, n'ab'oku ya Darikoni, n'ab'oku ya Giddeli;" 
Ezra2:57 ab'oku nda ya Shefatia, n'ab'oku ya Hattili, n'ab'oku ya Pokerethi; n'ab'oku ya Hazzebaimu, n'ab'oku ya Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Abagheereza ab'omu isinzizo n'abagheereza aba Solomoni boonaboona aghalala baali ebikumi bisatu na kyenda na babiri (392). 
Ezra2:59 Mu baira okuva mu bunhage mwalimu abaava e Telimela, n'e Teliharisha, n'e Kerubu, n'e Addani, n'e Immeri. Aye abantu abo baali bazira bukakafu bwoleka nda dha baiseibwe dhe baavaamu, waire obukakafu obwoleka oba nga baali Baisiraeli beenebeene." 
Ezra2:60 Baali ba ku nda ya Delaia, n'eya Tobia, n'eya Nekoda. Era boonaboona aghalala baali lukaaga n'ataanu na babiri (652)." 
Ezra2:61 Ghaligho n'abandi abaali abaana ba bakabona, nga ni bano: Ab'oku nda ya Habaia, n'ab'oku ya Hakkozi, n'ab'oku ya Barazillai, ye baatuuma eriina eryo olw'okuba yafumbirwa owundi ku baghala ba Barazillai Omugileadi." 
Ezra2:62 Abantu abo baabanoonia mu nkalala dh'obuzaale aye nga tibabonekamu, kale baabalekeza okukola nga bakabona, nga batwalibwa ng'abatali balongoofu." 
Ezra2:63 Eyali omufuzi mu kiseera ekyo yaabalobera okulyanga ku bigheebwayo eri Katonda okutuusa nga bafunie kabona asobola okwebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda ng'akozesa Urimu ni Thummimu. 
Ezra2:64 Ekikunsu kyonakyona aghalala eky'abo abaira okuva mu bunhage, kyalimu abantu emitwalo ena n'enkumi ibiri na bisatu na nkaaga (42,360)." 
Ezra2:65 Abagheereza abasaadha n'abakazi be baira nabo baali, kasanvu na bisatu n'asatu na musanvu (7,337). Baira n'abembi abasaadha n'abakazi ebikumi bibiri (200)." 
Ezra2:66 Baira n'embalaasi dhaibwe lusanvu n'asatu na mukaaga (736), n'enhumbu ebikumi bibiri n'ana na itaanu (245)," 
Ezra2:67 n'engamiya ebikumi bina n'asatu na itaanu (435), n'endogoyi kakaaga na lusanvu n'abiri (6,720)." 
Ezra2:68 Abandi ku bakulu ab'enda dha baiseibwe bwe baatuuka e Yerusalemu aghaabanga eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, baaghaayo ebigheebwayo eby'ekyeyendere olw'endhu ya Katonda eyo ezimbibwe mu kifo kyayo." 
Ezra2:69 Buli muntu yaaghaayo ebintu ebyakolanga omulimo ogwo nga bwe yasobola: kilo ebikumi bitaanu (500) edha zaabu, ni kilo enkumi ibiri na lunaana (2,800) edha feeza, n'ebivaalo bya bakabona kikumi (100)." 
Ezra2:70 Agho bakabona, n'Abalevi, n'abembi, n'abakuumi b'emiryango gy'eisinzizo, n'abagheereza b'omu isinzizo, n'abantu abandi, baasenga mu Yerusalemu n'ebiketezo ebikiriiraine. N'Abaisiraeli abandi boonaboona baaja baasenga mu bibuga ebyalingamu badhaadha baibwe." 
Ezra3:1 Mu mwezi ogwomusanvu ng'Abaisiraeli boonaboona bamaze okuja mu bibuga byaibwe era nga batyaime batereire, beesololeza e Yerusalemu boonaboona nga bali kitole." 
Ezra3:2 Agho Yeshua mutabane wa Yozadaki, ni bakabona baine, ni Zerubbabeli mutabane wa Shealutieli aghalala n'aboluganda lwe, baazimba buyaaka alutaari ya Katonda wa Isiraeli, ey'okugheerangaku ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka ga Musa omuntu wa Katonda." 
Ezra3:3 Baazimba alutaari eyo mu kifo kye yalimu mu kusooka, waire nga baali batya abantu be baayagaana nga n'ababa mu biketezo ebyo. Era baaghangayo eri Musengwa Katonda, ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ku alutaari eyo, buli nkyo n'eigulo." 
Ezra3:4 Baakolanga embaga ey'Ekibinuko eky'Entindi nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa, era baaghangayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ebya buli lunaku, nga bajiira ku mikuzi amateeka ge giragira okubighaayo ku lunaku olwo." 
Ezra3:5 Bwe baamalanga ekyo baayongeranga okughaayo ebigheebwayo ebya buli lunaku ebyokebwa byonabyona okuwaagho, n'ebigheebwayo ku mbaga edh'Ekibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, n'ebigheebwayo ku mbaga edh'ebibinuko ebindi Musengwa Katonda bye yalagira, n'ebigheebwayo ebya buli muntu eby'ekyeyendere." 
Ezra3:6 Okuviira irala ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu, baatoolera okughaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa eri Musengwa Katonda, waire ng'omusingi ogw'eisinzizo baali bakaali na kugutaagho." 
Ezra3:7 Kale baaghaayo empiiya okusasulira abazimbisa amabaale n'ababaadhi. Baagha ab'e Sidoni n'ab'e Tiro emere n'eby'okunhwa, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, batoole emiti emivule e Lebanoni nga bagiseeyeeyeza ku maadhi bagireete e Yoppa, nga kyabazinga Kuro ow'e Perusia bweyali amaze okubaikiriza." 
Ezra3:8 Mu mwezi ogwokubiri ogw'omwaka ogwokubiri nga bamaze okutuuka mu kifo aghaali eisinzizo lya Katonda e Yerusalemu, Zerubbabeli mutabane wa Shealutieli ni Yeshua mutabane wa Yozadaki, beeyimba ku Baisiraeli banaibwe, bakabona, Abalevi, ni boonaboona abaira e Yerusalemu nga baava mu bunhage. Agho baatoolera omulimo ogw'okuzimba. Baalonda Abalevi abaali bagheziiza emyaka amakumi abiri egy'obukulu n'okusingagho, balabirirenga omulimo ogwo ogw'okwiramu okuzimba eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezra3:9 Yeshua ni batabane be, n'ab'oluganda lwe, ni Kadimieli ni batabane be ab'oku nda ya Yuda, beeyimba ghalala baatwala obuvunaanizibwa obw'okulabiriranga abantu abaali ku gw'okuzimba eisinzizo lya Katonda. Ab'oku nda ya Henadadi, n'Abalevi nga bali ghalala ni batabane baibwe, n'aboluganda lwaibwe baabeeyimbaku mu kukola omulimo ogwo." 
Ezra3:10 Abazimbi bwe baatoolera okutaagho omusingi gw'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, bakabona nga bali mu bivaalo byaibwe eby'obwakabona baidha n'amagwala, n'Abalevi ab'oku nda ya Asafu boona baidha n'ebide, nga boonaboona baidha okusaaka Musengwa Katonda, nga Daudi kyabazinga wa Isiraeli bwe yalagira." 
Ezra3:11 Baayemba eno nga bwe bairamu, nga basaaka era nga basiima Musengwa Katonda, bati: “Musengwa Katonda mulungi okugonza kwe tikukoma, era kubaagho ghalala n'Abaisiraeli ebyanda n'ebyanda.” Abantu boonaboona baakuba emizira n'amaani agataloodheka, nga basaaka Musengwa Katonda olw'okuteebwagho okw'omusingi ogw'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda oyo." 
Ezra3:12 Aye bangi ku bakabona, n'Abalevi, n'abakulu ab'enda dha baiseibwe, abaali abakulu mu myaka nga n'abaabona ku isinzizo eryasooka, bwe baabona omusingi ogwo nga guli kuteebwagho, baawowoola amaziga. Aye abandi abaali agho, baakuba emizira olw'eisanhu." 
Ezra3:13 Kale kyali kizibu okwawulagho emizira n'okuwowoola amaziga, kuba abantu baayasiikana n'amaani, amamiro gaibwe gaaja gaatuukira irala ghala." 
Ezra4:1 Agho abazigu ab'abantu b'ekika kya Yuda n'ekya Benjamini baawulira ng'abantu abaava mu bunhage bwe baali bali kuzimba obuyaaka eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
Ezra4:2 Kale baaja ye Zerubbabeli ni y'abakulu ab'enda dha baiseibwe, baabakoba bati: “Ka tubeeyimbeku tuzimbire ghalala endhu ya Katonda kuba twena tusinza Katonda waimwe nga imwe bwe mukola, era tubairenga tughaayo emisengo y'ali okuviira irala mu biseera bya kyabazinga Esarahaddoni ow'e Assiria, eyatuleeta ghano.”" 
Ezra4:3 Aye Zerubbabeli, ni Yeshua, n'abakulu ab'enda dha baiseibwe mu Isiraeli baabakoba bati: “Titwetaaga buyambi bwaimwe okusobola okuzimbira Musengwa Katonda waife isinzizo. Ife beene tuja kulizimba, nga kyabazinga Kuro ow'e Perusia bwe yatulagira.”" 
Ezra4:4 Agho abantu abaali baba mu kiketezo ekyo baagezaaku okumala mu Bayudaaya amaani nga babatiisatiisa, balekere okuzimba." 
Ezra4:5 Baaguliriranga abafuzi babatabuletabule mu kigendererwa kyaibwe ekyo. Ekyo baakikola ekiseera kyonakyona Kuro kye yamala nga ni kyabazinga w'e Perusia, n'okutuusa mu biseera Daria mwe yabeera kyabazinga w'e Perusia." 
Ezra4:6 Agho mu mainhama g'obufuzi bwa kyabazinga Ahasuero, abantu abo baaghandiika embaluwa embi ku batyamye b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu nga babavunaana." 
Ezra4:7 Kabiri mu kiseera Arutazerizesi mwe yabeera nga ni kyabazinga w'e Perusia, Bishilamu, ni Mithuredathi, ni Tabeeli, ghalala ni bakagwa baibwe abandi boonaboona, baamughandiikira embaluwa. Embaluwa eyo yakyusibwa okuva mu lulimi Oluaramaika." 
Ezra4:8 Rehumu eyali omufuzi ni Shimushai omughandiisi, baaghandiikira kyabazinga Arutazerizesi embaluwa evunaana abantu ab'e Yerusalemu, ng'esoma eti:" 
Ezra4:9 “Eviire wa Rehumu omufuzi, ni Shimushai omughandiisi, ni bakagwa baibwe abandi bano: abalamuzi, abafuzi, n'abantu ab'e Perusia, n'ab'e Ereki, n'ab'e Babilonia, n'ab'e Susa eky'omu nsi y'e Elamu," 
Ezra4:10 ghalala n'abantu abamaghanga agandi goonagoona, Osinappari omukologho be yatoola mu maka gaibwe eby'entaka, okusenga mu bibuga eby'e Samaria ni mu kiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate.”" 
Ezra4:11 Bino n'ebibono ebyali mu mbaluwa eyo: “Ya kyabazinga Arutazerizesi. Ife abagheereza bo abali mu kiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, tukulamwisa inho." 
Ezra4:12 “Isebantu kyabazinga, tuli kukumanhisa tuti Abayudaaya abaidha eno nga baviire eyo iwe y'oli, baamala baaja Yerusalemu. Era bali kuzimba buyaaka ekibuga ekyo eky'abantu abadheemu era abakozi ab'ebibi bali kwizaagho omusingi n'ebimante byakyo. Bali kumpi na kumaliriza." 
Ezra4:13 Isebantu kyabazinga, abantu abo bwe bairamu okuzimba ekibuga ekyo, n'ebimante byakyo ebikyezungulwire ni babimaliriza, baidha kulekera agho okukughanga omusolo, n'empooza, n'ebisale ebindi byonabyona, era ekyo kiidha kukendeeza enfuna ey'obwakyabazinga." 
Ezra4:14 Kale ife nga bwe tufuna obuyambi obuva mu kisaagaati kyo eky'obwakyabazinga, titugwaine kusirika busirike, bwe tubona ng'ekitiibwa kyo iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, bali kukidhuuluusa. Kyetuviire ni tukugheereza amawulire gano okukumanhisa," 
Ezra4:15 oghe ekiragiro banoonereze mu bighandiiko bya badhaadha bo eby'ebyafaayo. Oidha kukizuula mu bighandiiko ebyo nga buliidho ekibuga ekyo kibaire kya bantu badheemu, abakaluubiriza bakyabazinga n'abafuzi ab'ebiketezo. Abantu baamu buliidho babaire bakalangafu inho okubafuga era ekibuga ekyo kye baava ni bakizikiriza." 
Ezra4:16 Isebantu kyabazinga, abantu abo bwe bairamu okuzimba ekibuga ekyo, n'ebimante byakyo ebikyezungulwire ni babimaliriza, onaaba nga tokaali na kiketezo ky'obala nga kikyo, ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate.”" 
Ezra4:17 Kyabazinga yaabairamu mu bughandiike ati: “Ya Rehumu omufuzi, ni Shimushai omughandiisi, ni bakagwa baimwe abandi boonaboona ababa mu Samaria ni mu biketezo ebindi ebiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate. Mbalamwisa inho." 
Ezra4:18 “Embaluwa ye mwatugheereza baaginsomera bukalamu," 
Ezra4:19 era naagha ekiragiro baanoonereza, baazuula ng'ab'omu kibuga ekyo kuva ira nga badheemera bakyabazinga, era nga n'okutuusa mpegaano bakeediima." 
Ezra4:20 Era bakyabazinga ab'amaani baafuganga Yerusalemu ekyo, era baafuganga n'ekiketezo ekyo kyonakyona ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, nga baasolozaamu empooza, n'omusolo, n'ebisale ebindi." 
Ezra4:21 Kale ni mughe abantu abo ekiragiro ekibalekeza okuzimba ekibuga ekyo, okutuusa lwe ndigha ekiragiro ekindi." 
Ezra4:22 Era mubone nti ekyo mukikola mangu, obwakyabazinga bulobe kwonoonekerwa na kufiirizibwa.”" 
Ezra4:23 Embaluwa eyo eyava ye kyabazinga Arutazerizesi bwe baagisomera Rehumu, ni Shimushai omughandiisi, ni banaibwe abandi boonaboona, baasitukiramu baajiiragho y'Abayudaaya e Yerusalemu, baakaka bya ntaka Abayudaaya okulekera okuzimba." 
Ezra4:24 Kale omulimo ogwali guli kukolebwa e Yerusalemu ku isinzizo lya Katonda baagwemereza, okutuusa mu mwaka ogwokubiri ogw'obufuzi bwa kyabazinga Dario ow'e Perusia." 
Ezra5:1 Agho abalanzi babiri, Haggai ni Zekaria mutabane wa Iddo, baalanga eri Abayudaaya abaali mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu, nga babita mu liina lya Katonda wa Isiraeli eyabalabiriranga." 
Ezra5:1 Agho abalanzi babiri, Haggai ni Zekaria mutabane wa Iddo, baalanga eri Abayudaaya abaali mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu, nga babita mu liina lya Katonda wa Isiraeli eyabalabiriranga." 
Ezra5:2 Kale Zerubbabeli mutabane wa Shealutieli ni Yeshua mutabane wa Yozadaki, bairamu okuzimba eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda e Yerusalemu, nga bayambibwaku abalanzi abo bombi." 
Ezra5:3 Mu kiseera kyene ekyo Tattenai eyafuganga ekiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, ni Shetharibozenai, ni bakagwa baibwe abandi, baidha e Yerusalemu baababuuza bati: “Naani eyabagha obukumu okuzimba eisinzizo lino n'okulimaliriza?”" 
Ezra5:4 Era baababuuza n'amaina ag'abo abaali bali kulizimba. 
Ezra5:5 Aye Katonda yaakuuma abakulembeze ab'Abayudaaya, kale abakungu abo ab'e Perusia baaloba kubalobera kuzimba, nga benda bagheereze kyabazinga Dario amawulire ago, era abairemu mu bughandiike memale." 
Ezra5:6 Eno n'embaluwa Tattenai eyafuganga ekiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, ni Shetharibozenai, ni bakagwa baibwe abandi bwe baafuganga ekiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, ye baagheereza kyabazinga Dario:" 
Ezra5:7 “Ya kyabazinga Dario. Emiraala gibenga n'iwe. 
Ezra5:8 “Isebantu kyabazinga, tuli kukumanhisa tuti twaja mu kiketezo eky'e Buyudaaya, twatuuka ku isinzizo lya Katonda oyo omukologho. Twayagaana nga bali kulizimba n'amabaale amabaadhe amanene, nga n'emiti bali kugizimbira mu bimante. Omulimo bali kugukola n'obwegendereza era guli kuja mu maiso." 
Ezra5:9 “Agho twabuuza abakulembeze b'abantu tuti, ‘Naani eyabagha obukumu okuzimba eisinzizo lino n'okulimaliriza’?" 
Ezra5:10 Era twababuuza n'amaina gaibwe, tusobole okukukobera abantu abakulira omulimo ogwo." 
Ezra5:11 “Baatwiramu bati, ‘Ife tuli bagheereza ba Katonda ow'eigulu n'ensi. Tuli kuzimba buyaaka eisinzizo kyabazinga wa Isiraeli eyali omukologho lye yazimba n'alimaliriza, buti ghabiseegho emyaka kamaala." 
Ezra5:12 Aye badhaadha baife baasungughaza Katonda oyo ow'eigulu, yaaleetera Nebukadinezzari eyali kyabazinga w'Abakaladea e Babilonia okubagema, yaabatwala mu nsi Babilonia eyo nga banhage, era n'eisinzizo lino yaalizikiriza." 
Ezra5:13 Aye mu mwaka ogwasooka nga kyabazinga Kuro n'afuga Babilonia, Kuro oyo yaagha ekiragiro okwiramu okuzimba eisinzizo lino." 
Ezra5:14 Era ghaligho ebintu ebya zaabu n'ebya feeza Nebukadinezzari bye yali atoire mu isinzizo lya Katonda lino e Yerusalemu n'abitwala mu isabo e Babilonia. Aye kyabazinga Kuro oyo yabitoolayo mu isabo e Babilonia, yaabigemya omusaadha ye baayetanga Sheshibazzari, kyabazinga Kuro oyo ye yali amaze okutaagho ng'omufuzi mu Buyudaaya." 
Ezra5:15 Yaamukoba okutwala ebintu ebyo, abiizeeyo mu isinzizo e Yerusalemu era abone ng'eisinzizo lya Katonda lizimbibwa buyaaka mu kifo ghe lyali." 
Ezra5:16 Kale Sheshibazzari oyo yaidha yaataagho omusingi ogw'eisinzizo lya Katonda e Yerusalemu. Era okuva n'olwo okutuusa ni ye buli eno babairenga balizimba era likaalinga kuwa.’ 
Ezra5:17 “Agho ni, Isebantu kyabazinga, bw'oba okisiimye lagira banoonereze mu bighandiiko eby'ebyafaayo eby'obwakyabazinga e Babilonia, babone oba nga bwenebwene kyabazinga Kuro yagha ekiragiro bazimbe buyaaka eisinzizo lya Katonda lino mu Yerusalemu. Era, Isebantu kyabazinga, tukusaba otumanhise ky'onaaba osiimye okukola ku nsonga eyo.”" 
Ezra6:1 Agho kyabazinga Dario yaagha ekiragiro banoonereze mu bighandiiko eby'ebyafaayo eby'obwakyabazinga ebyali mu materekero g'ebitabo mu nsi Babilonia. 
Ezra6:2 Baayagaana mu kibuga Ekubatana ekyali mu kiketezo eky'e Media, enzingo y'ekitabo eyalimu ekighandiiko ekikoba kiti:" 
Ezra6:3 “Mu mwaka ogwasooka nga kyabazinga Kuro n'afuga, kyabazinga Kuro oyo yagha ekiragiro ati, eisinzizo lya Katonda eriri e Yerusalemu bairemu okulizimba, libenga ekifo mwe bagheerayo emisengo n'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa. Obugungumavu bube mita amakumi abiri na musanvu, n'obugazi bwalyo bwona bube mita amakumi abiri na musanvu." 
Ezra6:4 Ekisenge bakizimbe n'enhiriri isatu edh'amabaale amabaadhe amanene, ku ngulu kwago bateeku olunhiriri lw'embaawo lulala. Endyanga ey'obwakyabazinga n'ebe esasulire omulimo ogwo gwonagwona." 
Ezra6:5 Era n'ebintu ebya zaabu n'ebya feeza eby'omu isinzizo lya Katonda eryo, Nebukadinezzari bye yatoola e Yerusalemu n'abireeta e Babilonia, babiizeeyo babite mu isinzizo eryo, buli kintu mu kifo kyakyo.”" 
Ezra6:6 Agho Dario yairamu ng'agheereza obukwenda buno, ati: “Ya Tattenai omufuzi ow'ekiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, ni Shetharibozenai, ni bafuzi banaimwe abali mu kiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate ogwo. “Ebigema ku mulimo ogw'okuzimba eisinzizo mubiveeku." 
Ezra6:7 Muleke omulimo ogwo gwe bali kukola ku isinzizo lya Katonda eryo guje mu maiso. Muleke omufuzi wa Buyudaaya n'abakulembeze b'Abayudaaya bairemu okuzimba eisinzizo eryo mu kifo kyalyo ghe lyalinga. 
Ezra6:8 Ate era ndi kubalagira kye munaakolera abakulembeze ab'Abayudaaya abali kuzimba eisinzizo lya Katonda eryo: Mwidha kubasasulanga mangu era mu bwidhuvu, nga mutoola mu ndyanga ey'obwakyabazinga ku misolo egiva mu kiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate." 
Ezra6:9 Era mughenga bakabona ab'e Yerusalemu, buli lunaku aghazira kukoosaamu, ebintu byonabyona ebineetaagisanga: ente enume entototo, n'entaama enume n'enkazi, bigheebwengayo eri Katonda ow'eigulu, ng'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa. Era mubaghenga n'engaano, n'omuunhu, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva." 
Ezra6:10 Olwo baghengayo eri Katonda ow'eigulu emisengo gy'asiima, era bansabirenga nze kyabazinga n'eizaire lyange." 
Ezra6:11 Era ndi kulagira nti omuntu yeenayeena anaakyusaamu ku kiragiro kino, baidha kutoolanga omulabba ku ndhu ye yeene, bamale bamulengeedhezenga okwo afe. Era endhu ye baidha kugifuulanga kifo ghe babunga obusa." 
Ezra6:12 Nsaba Katonda eyalonda Yerusalemu okuba ekifo eky'okumusinzizangamu, azikirize kyabazinga yeenayeena oba omuntu owundi yeenayeena alikyusaamu ku kiragiro kino, oba okuzikiriza eisinzizo lya Katonda eryo eriri e Yerusalemu. Nze Dario, ninze mpaire ekiragiro kino. Byonabyona bye ndagiire bigwaine bikolebwe n'obwegendereza.”" 
Ezra6:13 Kale Tattenai, omufuzi w'ekiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, ni Shetharibozenai, nga bali ghalala ni bakagwa baibwe, baakolera irala byonabyona nga kyabazinga Dario bwe yalagira." 
Ezra6:14 Era abakulembeze b'Abayudaaya baazimba eisinzizo eryo bukalamu. Abalanzi Haggai ni Zekaria mutabane wa Iddo baabaizangamu amaani olw'ebyo bye baalanganga. Baamaliriza okuzimba nga bajiira ku biragiro bya Katonda wa Isiraeli, ni ku kwikirizibwa kwa bakyabazinga, Kuro ni Dario ni Arutazerizesi, ab'e Perusia." 
Ezra6:14 Era abakulembeze b'Abayudaaya baazimba eisinzizo eryo bukalamu. Abalanzi Haggai ni Zekaria mutabane wa Iddo baabaizangamu amaani olw'ebyo bye baalanganga. Baamaliriza okuzimba nga bajiira ku biragiro bya Katonda wa Isiraeli, ni ku kwikirizibwa kwa bakyabazinga, Kuro ni Dario ni Arutazerizesi, ab'e Perusia." 
Ezra6:15 Kale eisinzizo eryo lyawa okuzimba ku lunaku olwokusatu olw'omwezi ogwetebwa Adari, nga kyabazinga Dario ali kufuga omwaka gwe ogwomukaaga." 
Ezra6:16 Agho Abaisiraeli, ni bakabona, n'Abalevi, n'abantu abandi abaira okuva mu bunhage, baasagamba inho nga batukuza eisinzizo lya Katonda eryo." 
Ezra6:17 Era ku mukolo ogwo baaghaayo ente enume kikumi (100), entaama enume ebikumi bibiri (200), n'entaama ento ebikumi bina (400). Baaghaayo n'embuzi enume ikumi na ibiri (12), embuzi ndalandala olwa buli kika kya Isiraeli, kibe ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi eby'Abaisiraeli boonaboona." 
Ezra6:18 Agho baataagho bakabona mu bikunsu byaibwe, n'Abalevi mu ngobo dhaibwe, baagheerezanga Katonda mu isinzizo e Yerusalemu, nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Musa." 
Ezra6:19 Ku lunaku olweikumi n'eina olw'omwezi ogusooka, abo abaira okuva mu bunhage baakola Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa." 
Ezra6:20 Bakabona ghalala n'Abalevi baali bamaze okwetukuza, nga boonaboona balongoofu. Kale baita entaama ento edhigheebwayo ku Kibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa ku lw'abo boonaboona abaira okuva mu bunhage, ni ku lwa bakabona banaibwe, ni ku lwaibwe beene." 
Ezra6:21 Omusengo ogw'ekibinuko ekyo bano n'abaagulyaku: Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaira okuva mu bunhage, n'abo boonaboona abaabeyimbaku ni baleka empisa enhonoonefu edh'abantu abaabanga mu nsi eyo, olw'okwenda okusinzanga Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
Ezra6:22 Baakola embaga ey'Ekibinuko eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa okumala enaku musanvu nga basagamba kuba Musengwa Katonda yakyusa omwoyo gwa kyabazinga ow'e Assiria, yaamuleetera okuyamba Abaisiraeli abo ku mulimo ogw'okuzimba eisinzizo lya Katonda oyo owa Isiraeli." 
Ezra7:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, mu biseera kyabazinga Arutazerizesi bye yafugiramu Perusia, ghaabaagho omusaadha ng'eriina lye ni Ezera era nga mutabane wa Seraia, Seraia oyo yaaba mutabane wa Azaria, Azaria oyo yaaba mutabane wa Hilikia," 
Ezra7:2 Hilikia oyo yaaba mutabane wa Shallumu, Shallumu oyo yaaba mutabane wa Zadoki, Zadoki oyo yaaba mutabane wa Ahitubu," 
Ezra7:3 Ahitubu oyo yaaba mutabane wa Amaria, Amaria oyo yaaba mutabane wa Azaria, Azaria oyo yaaba mutabane wa Meraiothi," 
Ezra7:4 Meraiothi oyo yaaba mutabane wa Zerahia, Zerahia oyo yaaba mutabane wa Uzzi, Uzzi oyo yaaba mutabane wa Bukki," 
Ezra7:5 Bukki oyo yaaba mutabane wa Abishua, Abishua oyo yaaba mutabane wa Finehasi, Finehasi oyo yaaba mutabane wa Eleazari, ate Eleazari oyo yaaba mutabane wa Aaroni Kabona Omukulu." 
Ezra7:6 Ezera oyo yaava mu nsi Babilonia nga munamateeka mulamba eyali aidhi einho amateeka, Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli ge yagha Musa. Era olw'okuba Musengwa Katonda yabanga ghalala ni Ezera oyo, kyabazinga yaamugha byonabyona bye yamusabanga." 
Ezra7:7 Ezera yaatuuka e Yerusalemu n'Abaisiraeli abandi, omwali bakabona, Abalevi, abembi b'omu isinzizo, abakuumi b'emiryango, n'abagheereza b'omu isinzizo." 
Ezra7:8 Baasimbuka okuva mu nsi Babilonia ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogusooka, mu mwaka ogwomusanvu nga kyabazinga Arutazerizesi n'afuga." 
Ezra7:9 Katonda yaaba ghalala nabo, baatuuka e Yerusalemu ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogwokutaanu." 
Ezra7:10 Ezera yeefubirizanga inho okusoma Amateeka ga Musengwa Katonda, n'okugajiiraku, era n'okusomesa ebiragiro ebigalimu mu Isiraeli." 
Ezra7:11 Eno n'embaluwa eyakoopololwa ku ere kyabazinga Arutazerizesi ye yagha Ezera kabona era omunamateeka eyali aidhi einho amateeka n'ebiragiro Musengwa Katonda bye yagha Abaisiraeli: 
Ezra7:12 “Nze Arutazerizesi kyabazinga asinga mu bakyabazinga boonaboona, nkulamwisa iwe Ezera kabona aidhi einho amateeka ga Katonda ow'eigulu." 
Ezra7:13 “Buti ndi kugha ekiragiro, nti Omuisiraeli yeenayeena ali mu bwakyabazinga bwange, k'abe kabona oba Omulevi, ayenda okuja ekyeyendere e Yerusalemu, wa idembe okuja n'iwe." 
Ezra7:14 Nze kyabazinga n'abawi bange ab'amagezi omusanvu, tukutumye oje onoonereze mu Yerusalemu ni mu Buyudaaya, obone oba nga amateeka ga Katonda waimwe agaakugemesebwa, abantu bali kugajiiraku bukalamu." 
Ezra7:15 Oidha kutwala feeza ni zaabu nze kyabazinga n'abawi bange ab'amagezi bye tughaireyo ekyeyendere eri Katonda wa Isiraeli. Ono n'eyasalagho ati eriina lye balisinzizenga mu Yerusalemu. 
Ezra7:16 Era oidha kutwala feeza ni zaabu yeenayeena, by'onaasoloza mu kiketezo kya Babilonia kyonakyona. Otwale n'ebintu byonabyona, abantu ni bakabona bye beeyama okughaayo ekyeyendere olw'eisinzizo lya Katonda waibwe eriri mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:17 “Oidha kukozesa empiiya edho n'obwegendereza ogule ente enume, n'entaama enume, n'entaama ento. Oguleku n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke ebijiiraku, n'ebigheebwayo eby'okunhwa ebijiiraku. Ebintu ebyo mwidha kubigheerayo ku alutaari ey'omu isinzizo lya Katonda eri e Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:18 Iwe ni baino mwidha kukozesa feeza ni zaabu anaasigalagho, kyonakyona kye munaabona nga n'ekigwaine, nga mujiira ku ebyo Katonda by'asiima." 
Ezra7:19 Ebintu bye bakughaire okukozesebwanga mu isinzizo lya Katonda waimwe, mwidha kubitwala mubigheeyo eri Katonda e Yerusalemu nga mutuuse." 
Ezra7:20 Ebindi byonabyona ebinaaba byetaagibwa mu isinzizo lya Katonda waimwe, oidha kubifuna okuva mu ndyanga ey'obwakyabazinga." 
Ezra7:21 “Era nze kyabazinga Arutazerizesi ndi kugha ekiragiro abaghanika ab'ebiketezo Siria ni Foenikia, nti Ezera kabona eyasoma n'akuguka mu Mateeka ga Katonda ow'eigulu, bamughenga buli kintu kyonakyona ky'anaasabanga bakimukolerenga, aghazira kwegemya nsonga yoonayoona." 
Ezra7:22 Bamughenga nga tibaswisa kilo enkumi isatu na bina (3,400) edha feeza, ni kilo omutwalo mulala (10,000) edh'engaano, ni lita enkumi ibiri (2,000) edh'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, ni lita enkumi ibiri (2,000) edh'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, era bamughenga omuunhu gwonagwona ogwetaagibwa." 
Ezra7:23 Ekintu kyonakyona Katonda ow'eigulu ky'alagira kigwaine kikolebwenga mu bwidhuvu olw'eisinzizo lya Katonda oyo ow'eigulu. Olwo Katonda oyo alobe kunsungughalira, waire okusungughalira abo abalinsikira ku bufuzi." 
Ezra7:24 Twenda n'okubamanhisa tuti timwikirizibwa kusoloza musolo, oba empooza, oba ebisale ebindi byonabyona, okuva ku kabona yeenayeena, oba ku Balevi, oba ku bembi, oba ku bakuumi b'emiryango, oba waire ku bagheereza abandi boonaboona ab'omu isinzizo." 
Ezra7:25 “Iwe Ezera, ng'okozesa amagezi ga Katonda wo ge yakugha, londa abafuzi n'abalamuzi abanaalamulanga abantu boonaboona abaidhi amateeka ga Katonda wo, abali mu kiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate. Era oyegerese amateeka ago abo abatagaidhi." 
Ezra7:26 Oyo yeenayeena anaadheemeranga amateeka ga Katonda wo oba aga kyabazinga, abonerezebwenga ng'amateeka bwe galagira: aitibwenga, oba atwalibwenga mu bunhage bamusibire eyo, oba bamugemengaku ebintu bye, oba bamusibenga mu ikomera.”" 
Ezra7:27 Agho Ezera yaakoba ati: “Tusaake Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa badhaadha baife, eyata ekidhuubo ekyo mu mwoyo gwa kyabazinga okulungiya eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda oyo, eriri mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:28 Ansaasiire yaaleetera kyabazinga okungonza, aghalala n'abawi b'amagezi be, n'abakungu be abandi ab'amaani. Musengwa Katonda wange ampaire amaani, naasoloza abakulembeze mu Isiraeli, baaganha okuja ninze.”" 
Ezra8:1 Luno n'olukalala olw'abakulu mu bika n'abakulu ab'enda dha baiseibwe abaira ninze Ezera, nga tuva mu nsi Babilonia mu kiseera Arutazerizesi kye yabeeramu kyabazinga:" 
Ezra8:2 Gereshomu n'eyali akulira ab'oku nda ya Finehasi; Danieli yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Ithamari; Hattushi yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Daudi; 
Ezra8:2 Gereshomu n'eyali akulira ab'oku nda ya Finehasi; Danieli yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Ithamari; Hattushi yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Daudi; 
Ezra8:3 Zekaria yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Shekania, baidhukulu ba Paroshi. Zekaria oyo yeeghandiisa n'abantu kikumi n'ataanu (150)." 
Ezra8:4 Eliehoenai mutabane wa Zerahia yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Pahathimoabu, era yeeghandiisa n'abantu ebikumi bibiri (200)." 
Ezra8:5 Shekania mutabane wa Yahazieli yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Zattu, era yeeghandiisa n'abantu ebikumi bisatu (300)." 
Ezra8:6 Ebedi mutabane wa Yonathani yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Adini, era yeeghandiisa n'abantu amakumi ataanu (50)." 
Ezra8:7 Yeshaia mutabane wa Athalia yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Elamu, era yeeghandiisa n'abantu nsanvu (70)." 
Ezra8:8 Zebadia mutabane wa Mikaeli yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Shefatia, era yeeghandiisa n'abantu kinaana (80)." 
Ezra8:9 Obadia mutabane wa Yehieli yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Yoabu, era yeeghandiisa n'abantu ebikumi bibiri na ikumi na munaana (218)." 
Ezra8:10 Shelomithi mutabane wa Yosifia yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Bani, era yeeghandiisa n'abantu kikumi na nkaaga (160)." 
Ezra8:11 Zekaria mutabane wa Bebai yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Bebai, era yeeghandiisa n'abantu amakumi abiri na munaana (28)." 
Ezra8:12 Yohanani mutabane wa Hakkatani yaakulira ab'oku nda ya Azigadi, era yeeghandiisa n'abantu kikumi na ikumi (110)." 
Ezra8:13 Elifeleti, Yeueli, ni Shemaia, abaira nga ghabiseeghooku ekiseera, baakulira ab'oku nda ya Adonikamu, era beeghandiisa n'abantu nkaaga (60)." 
Ezra8:14 ate Uthai ni Zakkuri baakulira ab'oku nda ya Bigivai, era beeghandiisa n'abantu nsanvu (70)." 
Ezra8:15 Agho naayeta abantu abo boonaboona, twesololeza ku mwiga ogukulukuta mu Ahava, twamalagho enaku isatu. Bwe nalingalinga mu bantu ni mu bakabona, naakizuula nga mu boonaboona muziramu Balevi." 
Ezra8:16 Kale naayetesa abakulembeze bano: Eliezeri, ni Arieli, ni Shemaia, ni Elinathani, ni Yaribu, ni Elinathani owundi, ni Nathani, ni Zekaria, ni Meshullamu. Era naayetesa Yoiaribu ni Elinathani, abaali abantu abategeera einho." 
Ezra8:17 Naabatuma ye Iddo omukulembeze w'e Kasifia, bamusabe ye mwene ni baine bwe bagheereza mu isinzizo eyo e Kasifia, batugheereze abantu ab'okugheerezanga Katonda waife mu isinzizo." 
Ezra8:18 Era nga bayambibwaku Katonda waife baatugheereza Sherebia, omusaadha Omuisiraeli omugezi, owundi ku batabane ba Mahili eyali mutabane wa Levi. Yaidha ni batabane be ni baganda be, baaghera abantu ikumi na munaana." 
Ezra8:19 Baatugheereza ni Hashabia ni Yeshaia eyali owundi ku batabane ba Merari, baidha ni baganda baibwe era ni batabane baibwe boonaboona aghalala baaghera abantu amakumi abiri." 
Ezra8:20 Okwo kweyongeraku abagheereza ab'omu isinzizo ebikumi ebibiri n'abiri (220), Daudi be yataagho ng'ali n'abakungu be, bagheerezenga Abalevi. Abo boonaboona baabaghandiika amaina gaibwe." 
Ezra8:21 Agho naalangirira okusiiba nga tuli eyo ku mwiga Ahava. Naakoba twewombeeke mu maiso ga Katonda waife nga tumusaba atukulembere mu lugendo lwaife, era atukuume n'abaana baife ni byonabyona bye twali nabyo." 
Ezra8:22 Ensoni dhangema okusaba kyabazinga atughe ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale ab'oku bigere n'ab'oku mbalaasi okutugherekera nga batukuuma tuwone abazigu mu ngira, kuba nali mmaze okumukoba nti: “Katonda waife agha enkabi kiisi amwesiga, aye yaasungughalira era yaabonereza kiisi amuvaaku.”" 
Ezra8:23 Kale twasiiba era twasaba Katonda waife oyo okutukuuma, era yaawulira okusaba kwaife." 
Ezra8:24 Agho ku bakabona abaali nga n'abakulira banaibwe naalondaku bano: Sherebia, ni Hashabia, ni banaibwe abandi ikumi." 
Ezra8:25 Naapima feeza ni zaabu, n'ebintu kyabazinga n'abawi ab'amagezi be, n'abakungu be, era n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona, bye baaghaayo okukozesebwanga mu isinzizo lya Katonda waife. Byonabyona naabigemya bakabona abo, era nga biri mu buzito buno:" 
Ezra8:26 feeza ng'azitogha kilo emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi ibiri (22,000); ebintu ebikozesebwa ebya feeza nga bizitogha kilo enkumi isatu na bina (3,400); zaabu ng'azitogha kilo enkumi isatu na bina (3,400);" 
Ezra8:27 ebibya amakumi abiri ebya zaabu, nga bizitogha kilo nga munaana n'ekitundu; n'ebibya ebindi bibiri ebyazigulwa obukalamu mu kyuma eky'ekikomo era eby'omughendo ogwaga n'ogwa zaabu." 
Ezra8:28 Naabakoba nti: “Muli batukuvu eri Musengwa Katonda, n'ebikozesebwa bino byona bitukuvu. Era feeza ni zaabu ebyo, bigheereibwayo kyeyendere eri Musengwa Katonda wa badhaadha baife." 
Ezra8:29 Mu bikuume bukalamu okutuusa lwe mulituuka e Yerusalemu mu isinzizo lya Musengwa, ni mubipimira mu kisenge kya bakabona abakulu, memale ni mubibagemya ghalala, n'Abalevi, n'abakulu ab'enda dha baiseibwe mu Isiraeli.”" 
Ezra8:30 Kale bakabona n'Abalevi baatoola feeza, ni zaabu, n'ebikozesebwa nga bwe byapimibwa, babitwale e Yerusalemu mu isinzizo lya Katonda waife." 
Ezra8:31 Agho twava ku mwiga Ahava ku lunaku olweikumi n'eibiri olw'omwezi ogusooka, twaja e Yerusalemu. Katonda waife yaaba ghalala n'ife, yaatuwonia okugwa mu ngalo edh'abazigu baife abaatweteeganga nga tuli mu ngira." 
Ezra8:32 Bwe twatuuka e Yerusalemu, twawuumulaku okumala enaku isatu." 
Ezra8:33 Ku lunaku olwokuna twaja mu isinzizo lya Katonda waife, twapima feeza, ni zaabu, n'ebintu ebikozesebwa. Byonabyona twabigemya kabona Meremothi mutabane wa Uria, ng'ali ni Eleazari mutabane wa Finehasi, n'Abalevi babiri Yozabadi mutabane wa Yeshua, ni Noadia mutabane wa Binnui." 
Ezra8:34 Buli kintu twakibala, twakipima obuzito bwakyo, era twakighandiika mu kiseera kyene ekyo." 
Ezra8:35 Mu kiseera ekyo, abo boonaboona abaira okuva mu bunhage, baaghaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa eri Katonda wa Isiraeli. Baaghaayo ente enume ikumi na ibiri ku lwa Isiraeli yoonayoona, baaghaayo entaama enume kyenda na mukaaga, n'entaama ento nsanvu na musanvu. Era baaghaayo n'embuzi enume ikumi na ibiri, ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi. Ebyo byonabyona baabighaayo eri Musengwa Katonda ng'ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Ezra8:36 Era baatwala ekighandiiko ekyalimu ebiragiro bya kyabazinga, baakigha abafuzi n'abakungu ab'ekiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate. Abo baabayamba inho era bairuukirira n'eisinzizo." 
Ezra9:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, abandi ku bakulembeze ab'abantu Abaisiraeli baidha ye ndi, bankoba bati: “Bakabona, n'Abalevi, n'Abaisiraeli abandi, bakaali n'enkolagana n'abantu ab'omu biketezo bino mwe tuli. Bakola ebintu ebyenhinhalwa ng'oti n'Abakanaani, n'Abahitti, n'Abaperizzi, n'Abayebusi, n'Abammoni, n'Abamoabu, n'Abamisiri, n'Abamori bye bakola." 
Ezra9:2 Abaisiraeli abo abantu ba Katonda abatukuvu baayonooneka, kuba beene ni batabane baibwe bafuna abakazi abamaghanga agandi. Aye ate abakungu n'abakulembeze, n'abasinze kwonooneka mu nsambo eyo.”" 
Ezra9:3 Bwe nawulira ekyo naakanulamu ebivaalo byange olw'okunakughala, neemaanhuula enviiri ku mutwe ni ku kirevu, era naatyama ghansi nga nsobeirwa inho mu nnaku." 
Ezra9:4 Agho abo boonaboona abaalumirwa ebyo Katonda wa Isiraeli bye yayogera ku kibi ekyo abo abaira okuva mu bunhage kye baakola, baidha baaneetooloola agho ghe nali ntyaime nga nsobeirwa inho mu nnaku. Baabaagho okutuusa ku kiseera eky'okughaayo ekigheebwayo ekyeigulo." 
Ezra9:5 Ekiseera eky'okughaayo omusengo ogw'eigulo bwe kyatuuka, naasituka ghe nali ntyaime nga ndi kusiiba era nga nkaali mu bivaalo byange ebikanufu. Naakuba amakiryaivu era naayandhululiza eri Musengwa Katonda wange emikono nga nkoba nti:" 
Ezra9:6 “Wo Katonda wange, nswaire inho era ensoni dhiri kungema okusitula amaiso ninge y'oli, iwe Katonda wange kuba ebibi byaife byebunze emungo etusinga n'obuleeyi, n'emisango gyaife gyebunga emungo etuuka ni ku igulu." 
Ezra9:7 Okuviira irala ku biseera bya badhaadha baife okutuusa ni ye buli eno, tukola inho ebibi. Era olw'ebibi byaife, ife, n'ebya bakyabazinga baife, n'ebya bakabona baife, tubairenga tugheebwayo mu ngalo dha bakyabazinga abamaghanga agandi, baatwitira mu ntalo, baatutwala mu bunhage, baatunhagaku ebyaife, era twaswala nga bwe tuli buti." 
Ezra9:8 Aye mperaano mu kiseera ekitono kiti, Musengwa Katonda waife atwoleike ekivunika, yaaleetera abandi ku ife okuwonagho era yaatugha okuba abagumu mu kifo kye kino ekitukuvu. Olwo Katonda waife oyo yaatuwonia obwiru, yaatugha obulamu obuyaaka." 
Ezra9:9 Tuli bairu, aye era Katonda waife tatulekuliire agho mu bwiru bwaife. Atwoleike nga bw'atugonza obutalekera, yaaleetera bakyabazinga b'e Perusia okutugonza, baatulekagho nga tukaali balamu. Olwo tusobole okuzimbira Katonda waife oyo eisinzizo lye eryali lyonooneibwa, era atukuumenga ng'atuwonia abazigu mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra9:10 Wo Katonda waife, mperaano tunaakoba ki ng'ebyo byonabyona bimaze okubaagho? Tuviire ku biragiro byo," 
Ezra9:11 bye watugha ng'obita mu bagheereza bo abalanzi, ng'otukoba oti, ‘Ensi ye muli kwingiramu okutwala ebe eyaimwe, ti nongoofu naire. N'abantu baamu tiibalongoofu, kuba baagyonoona n'ebibi ebyenhinhalwa bye bagikoleramu okuva y'eva okutuuka y'ekanga." 
Ezra9:12 Mbeeni mutaganhanga baghala baimwe kubayira batabane baibwe, waire okuganha batabane baimwe okubayiza baghala baibwe. Era mutabendezanga miraala oba okukulankulana, olwo musobole okuba ab'amaani n'okulya ebirungi eby'ensi eyo era mugirekere abaana baimwe ng'obusika bwaibwe obw'olubeerera.’" 
Ezra9:13 Aye waire ng'ebyo byonabyona bitutuuseeku olw'ebikolwa byaife ebibi, n'olw'omusango omukologho ogutuliku, tubona nga iwe Katonda waife watugha ekibonerezo kitono inho ku ekyo ebibi byaife kye byali bigwaniire kuba watulekagho ife abaawonagho nga tuli bangi." 
Ezra9:14 Kale tughanga tutya okwiramu okudheemera ekiragiro kyo ni tufumbiraganwa n'abantu abo abakola ebintu ebyo ebyenhinhalwa? Leero tolitusungughalira n'otuzikiriza ni ghabulagho awonagho naire omulala ati? 
Ezra9:15 Wo Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, iwe osala mu butuufu, aye watusaasira twawonagho okutuusa ni mperaano. Bona, tuli ghano mu maiso go nga tuliku omusango, ate nga titugwaniire na kwemerera mu maiso go olw'omusango ogwo.”" 
Ezra10:1 Ezera bweyali ng'ali kusaba bw'ayatula ebibi, eno nga bw'alira amaziga ng'akubye amakiryaivu gha mberi gh'eisinzizo lya Katonda, eikuukuubira ery'Abaisiraeli abasaadha n'abakazi n'abaana abato, lyesololeza gh'ali. Boonaboona nga bali kulira inho amaziga." 
Ezra10:2 Agho Shekania mutabane wa Yehieli owundi ku batabane ba Elamu yaakoba Ezera ati: “Tusungughaiza inho Katonda waife, olw'okubayiza abakazi abamaghanga agandi agali mu nsi eno. Aye waire ebyo biri bityo, Isiraeli ekaaliyo n'eisuubi." 
Ezra10:3 Kale ni tukole endagaano ni Katonda waife, tutoolegho abakazi abo n'abaana baibwe, nga tujiira ku magezi ge tunaafuna okuva ye iwe musengwa wange, ni y'abo boonaboona abagondera ebiragiro bya Katonda waife oyo. Ekyo twidha kukikola nga tujiira ku mateeka." 
Ezra10:4 Situkiramu, kuba ogwo mulimo gwo era ife tuli ghalala n'iwe. Iwe guma okikole.”" 
Ezra10:5 Ezera yaasituka, yaakoba abakulembeze ba bakabona, n'aba Abalevi, n'aba Abaisiraeli boonaboona, balayire bati baidha kwawukana n'abakazi abamaghanga agandi. Kale baakola omukolo ogw'okulayira." 
Ezra10:6 Agho Ezera yaava mu luya emberi gh'eisinzizo lya Katonda, yaaja mu kisenge kya Yehohanani mutabane wa Eliashibu, yaaba eyo okutuusa obwire okukya nga tali kulya waire okunhwa ekintu kyonakyona ng'enaku emugemye olw'Abaisiraeli abaava mu bunhage obutaba beesigwa." 
Ezra10:7 Agho baalangirira mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona ni mu Yerusalemu, bati abo boonaboona abaira okuva mu bunhage beesololeze e Yerusalemu." 
Ezra10:8 Era bati anaamala enaku eisatu ng'akaali kwidha, ng'abakungu n'abakulembeze bwe balagiire, ebintu bye byonabyona baja kubimutoolaku, ni mwene yeena bamubinge mu kikunsu eky'abaava mu bunhage." 
Ezra10:9 Agho abasaadha boonaboona ab'omu kika kya Yuda n'ekya Benjamini, beesololeza e Yerusalemu mu nnaku eisatu edho. Olwo n'olwali olunaku olwamakumi abiri (20) olw'omwezi ogwomwenda. Abantu boonaboona baatyama mu luya emberi gh'eisinzizo lya Katonda nga bali kudhugumira, olw'ensonga eyabeesa n'olw'amaadhi amangi einho agaali gali kugwa." 
Ezra10:10 Ezera kabona yaasituka yaakoba abantu ati: “Mwayonoona okubayiza abakazi abamaghanga agandi, kuba mwayongera bwongere ku musango ensi Isiraeli gw'eri nagwo." 
Ezra10:11 Kale ni mpegaano mwatule ebibi byaimwe eri Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda wa badhaadha baife, mukolenga ebyo by'ayenda. Mweyawule ku bantu abamaghanga agandi abali mu nsi eno, ni ku bakazi baimwe abamaghanga agandi.”" 
Ezra10:12 Agho abantu boonaboona abaali beesoloiza bamwiramu nga baleekaana bati: “N'ekyo kyene. Tuteekwa kukola nga bw'okobye. 
Ezra10:13 Aye tuli abantu kamaala ate amaadhi gali kugwa mangi, titukaaghanga kugabaamu tuti. Ate era, ekintu ekyo titusobola kukikola mu lunaku lulala oba ibiri, kuba bwenebwene abaayonoona bangi inho mu ife." 
Ezra10:14 Leka abakulembeze baife babeegho mu liina lyaife twenatwena abeesoloiza. Olwo ab'omu bibuga byaife boonaboona abaabayiza abakazi abamaghanga agandi, baidhe mu kiseera ekiragaane nga bali ghalala n'abakulembeze n'abalamuzi okuva mu buli kibuga. Mu nsambo eyo ekiruyi ekitaloodheka Katonda waife ky'ali nakyo ku ife ku nsonga eyo, kiidha kutuvaaku.”" 
Ezra10:15 Ghazira muntu yatakania ntegeka eyo, okutoolaku Yonathani mutabane wa Asaheli ni Yahazeia mutabane wa Tikuva, nga bayambibwaku Meshullamu ni Shabbethai Omulevi, boona abaali nga baisania nabo." 
Ezra10:16 Kale abaava mu bunhage baikiriza entegeka eyo. Ezera yaalonda abandi ku baakuliranga enda dha baiseibwe, ng'ajiira ku nda dhe basimukamu era amaina gaibwe gaaghandiikibwa. Ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogweikumi, baatyama baatoolera okunoonereza ku nsonga eyo." 
Ezra10:17 Era olunaku olusooka, mu mwezi ogusooka mu mwaka, lwaja okutuuka nga bamaze okuzuula abasaadha abaali babayiiza abakazi abamaghanga agandi." 
Ezra10:18 Luno n'olukalala olw'abasaadha abaali babayiiza abakazi abamaghanga agandi: Mu bakabona mwalimu, Maaseia, Eliezeri, Yaribu, ni Gedalia nga ba ku nda ya Yeshua mutabane wa Yozadaki ni baganda be." 
Ezra10:19 Abo baasuubiza okwawukana ni bakazi baibwe abo abamaghanga agandi era baaghaayo entaama enume ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi byaibwe. 
Ezra10:20 Mu b'oku nda ya Immeri mwalimu, Hanani, ni Zebadia." 
Ezra10:21 Mu b'oku nda ya Harimu mwalimu, Maaseia, Eliya, Shemaia, Yehieli, ni Uzzia." 
Ezra10:22 Mu b'oku nda ya Pashuhuri mwalimu, Elioenai, Maaseia, Ishimaeli, Nethaneli, Yozabadi ni Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Mu Balevi mwalimu, Yozabadi, Shimei, Kelaia era eyayetebwanga Kelita, Pethahia, Yuda, ni Eliezeri." 
Ezra10:24 Mu bembi ab'omu isinzizo mwalimu, Eliashibu. Mu bakuumi b'emiryango gy'eisinzizo mwalimu: Shallumu, Telemu, ni Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Mu Baisiraeli abandi, mu b'oku nda ya Paroshi mwalimu: Ramia, Izzia, Malikiya, Miyamini, Eleazari, Hashabia, ni Benaia." 
Ezra10:26 Mu b'oku nda ya Elamu mwalimu: Mattania, Zekaria, Yehieli, Abudi, Yeremothi, ni Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 Mu b'oku nda ya Zattu mwalimu: Elioenai, Eliashibu, Mattania, Yeremothi, Zabadi, ni Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 Mu b'oku nda ya Bebai mwalimu: Yehohanani, Hanania, Zabbai, ni Athalai." 
Ezra10:29 Mu b'oku nda ya Bani mwalimu: Meshullamu, Malluki, Adaia, Yashubu, Sheali, ni Yeremothi." 
Ezra10:30 Mu b'oku nda ya Pahathi Moabu mwalimu: Adana, Kelali, Benaia, Maaseia, Mattania, Bezaleli, Binnui, ni Manasse." 
Ezra10:31 Mu b'oku nda ya Harimu mwalimu: Eliezeri, Issihiya, Malikiya, Shemaia, Shimeoni," 
Ezra10:32 Benjamini, Malluki, ni Shemaria." 
Ezra10:33 Mu b'oku nda ya Hashumu mwalimu: Mattenai, Mattatta, Zabadi, Elifeleti, Yeremai, Manasse, ni Shimei." 
Ezra10:34 Mu b'oku nda ya Bani mwalimu: Maadai, Amuramu, Ueli," 
Ezra10:35 Benaia Bedeia, Keluhi," 
Ezra10:36 Vania, Meremothi, Eliashibu," 
Ezra10:37 Mattania, Mattenai, ni Yaasu." 
Ezra10:38 Mu b'oku nda ya Binnui mwalimu: Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 Shelemia, Nathani, Adaia," 
Ezra10:40 Makinadebai, Shashai, Sharai," 
Ezra10:41 Azareli, Shelemia, ni Shemaria," 
Ezra10:42 Shallumu, Amaria ni Yosefu." 
Ezra10:43 Mu b'oku nda ya Nebo mwalimu: Yeiyeli, Mattithia, Zabadi, Zebina, Yaddai, Yoeli, ni Benaia." 
Ezra10:44 Abasaadha abo boonaboona baali n'abakazi abamaghanga agandi, baamala baabasiibula. Era abakazi abo baaja n'abaana baibwe." 
Nehemiah1:1 Bino n'ebibono bya Nehemia mutabane wa Hakalia: Mu mwezi ogwetebwa Kisilevu, mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri (20) ogwa kyabazinga Arutazerizesi nga n'afuga Perusia, nali ndi e Susa mu kibuga ekikulu eky'ensi eyo Perusia." 
Nehemiah1:2 Owundi ku baganda bange ayetebwa Hanani, yaidha n'abantu abandi nga bava e Buyudaaya. Naababuuza ebifa ku Bayudaaya abaawonagho ni bava mu bunhage, n'ebifa ku Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Bankoba bati: “Abo abaawonagho ni bava mu bunhage, bali mu buzibu obw'amaani era baswavu inho. Ekimante ekyezungululanga ekibuga Yerusalemu kyamenhebwa n'emiryango gyakyo gyayokebwa omuliro.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Bwe nawulira ebyo byonabyona naatyama ghansi, naalira amaziga. Naamala enaku nga ndi kulira obughafu, naasiiba era naasaba Katonda ow'eigulu," 
Nehemiah1:5 nga nkoba nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda ow'eigulu, oli mukologho era ow'entiisa. Iwe akuuma endagaano yo era waagonza obutalekera abo abakugonza ni bagema ebiragiro byo." 
Nehemiah1:6 Lingirira nze omugheereza wo, otege kutu wo owulire bye nkusaba omusana n'obwire ku lw'abagheereza bo Abaisiraeli. Ndhatula nti bwenebwene ife Abaisiraeli twayonoona." 
Nehemiah1:7 Twebisa bubi y'oli, twaloba okugema amateeka go n'ebiragiro bye watugha ng'obita mu mugheereza wo Musa." 
Nehemiah1:8 Idhukira ekibono kye wakoba omugheereza wo Musa, oti, ‘Bwe mutaabenga beesigwa ye ndi, ndidha kubasansaanizanga eyo mu maghanga." 
Nehemiah1:9 Aye bwe munaakyukanga ni mwira ye ndi, ni mujiira ku biragiro byange, ndidha kubakungaanianga ni bwe munaabanga nga musansaanire eyo eghala einho, mbaleete mu kifo kye nalonda okunsinzizangamu.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 “Wo Musengwa Katonda, abo n'abantu bo abakugheereza be wanunula n'obuyinza bwo obungi era n'amaani go agataloodheka." 
Nehemiah1:11 Wo Musengwa Katonda, tega kutu wo owulire nze omugheereza wo bye nkusaba, owulire n'eby'abagheereza bo abandi, abasanhukira einho okutya eriina lyo. Nze omugheereza wo nkusaba ompe obughanguzi olwaleero luno, oleetere omusaadha ono okunsaasira.” Mu kiseera ekyo, ninze nagheerezanga kyabazinga eby'okunhwa." 
Nehemiah2:1 Mu mwezi ogwetebwa Nisani mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri (20) nga Arutazerizesi n'afuga Perusia, naaja naagheereza kyabazinga Arutazerizesi oyo omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogwali mu maiso ge. Yali tambonangaku nga nnakughaire." 
Nehemiah2:2 Kale yambuuza ati: “Lwaki weekapye mu maiso, ate nga ndi kubona nga toli mulwaire? Kiboneka ghaligho enaku ekuli ku mwoyo.”" 
Nehemiah2:3 Agho naatya inho, naakoba kyabazinga nti: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ghangaala byanda na byanda! Nnaalobera ki okwekapa mu maiso, ng'ate ekibuga omuli amagombe ga badhaadha bange bakizikiriiza kiri bifulukwa byereere, nga n'emiryango gyakyo bagyokiikya omuliro?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Kyabazinga yambuuza ati: “Buti oli kunsaba nkukolere ki?” Agho naasooka naasaba Katonda ow'eigulu," 
Nehemiah2:5 memale naakoba kyabazinga nti: “Isebantu kyabazinga, bw'oba ng'osiima bye nkola era nga tikiikusungughaze, nkusaba ondeke nje e Buyudaaya, mu kibuga omuli amagombe ga badhaadha bange, ndhiremu okukizimba.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Agho Isebantu kyabazinga oyo, nga n'inhebantu amutyamiire kumpi agho, yambuuza ati: “Oja kubaayo enaku imeka, era oliira li?” Kale kyabazinga yaaganha okundeka nje. Naamukobera ekiseera kye nali ow'okwiriraku." 
Nehemiah2:7 Era naasaba kyabazinga ampe embaluwa ndhitwalire abafuzi b'ebiketezo ebiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, banganhe mbite mu biketezo byaibwe okutuuka e Buyudaaya." 
Nehemiah2:8 Era naasaba n'embaluwa ntwalire Asafu omukuumi w'ekibira kya kyabazinga, aganhe okumpa emiti egy'okukolamu emiryango egy'ekifo eky'okwewogomamu ekyezungulwire eisinzizo, n'egy'okukolamu emiryango egy'ekimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga, era n'egy'okuzimbamu endhu ye nnaabangamu. Agho kyabazinga yaaganha okunkolera kye namusaba, kuba Katonda wange yali ghalala ninze." 
Nehemiah2:9 Naatuuka eri abafuzi b'ebiketezo ebiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate, naabagha embaluwa edhaava ye kyabazinga. Buti kyabazinga oyo yali amaze okuntuma, ghalala n'abandi ku bakulira amagye ge, n'abandi ku baisirukale ab'oku mbalaasi." 
Nehemiah2:10 Aye Saniballati ow'e Bethi Horoni ni Tobia omugheereza Omuammoni bwe baakiwulira, baanakughala ebitaloodheka, okubona nga ghaligho omuntu eyali ali kukola ku lw'obulungi obw'abantu Abaisiraeli." 
Nehemiah2:11 Kale naaja naatuuka e Yerusalemu, naabaayo enaku isatu." 
Nehemiah2:12 Agho naasituka obwire, naaja n'abasaadha batonotono, aye nga ghazira muntu yeenayeena ye nkobeireku ekindi ku mwoyo, Katonda kye yankoba okukolera Yerusalemu. Tyali na nsolo yindi yoonayoona okutoolaku eyo ye nali ntyaimeku, nga ndi kuvuga." 
Nehemiah2:13 Naaja obwire obwo naabita mu Mulyango ogw'omu Kiiko, era naabitira ku Nsulo ey'Ogusota, naatuuka ku Mulyango gw'Obusa. Naajanga nga neekebeedha ebimante ebyezungulwire Yerusalemu bye baamenhamenha, n'emiryango gyakyo gye baayokya omuliro." 
Nehemiah2:14 Agho naaja ku gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Ensulo, ku Kidiba kya Kyabazinga. Aye ng'eyo ezira ngira mwe mpanga kubisa nsolo ye nali ndi kuvuga." 
Nehemiah2:15 Era obwire obwo naaja naabita mu kiiko nga bweneekebeedha ekimante ekyo. Bwe namala, naakyuka naira einhuma, naingirira mu Mulyango ogw'omu Kiiko, nairayo mu kibuga." 
Nehemiah2:16 Abafuzi ti baamanha ye naja waire kye nakolayo. Era nali nkaali na kukobera Bayudaaya banange, oba bakabona, oba abakungu, oba abakulembeze, waire abantu abandi boonaboona abaali baja okukola omulimo ogwo." 
Nehemiah2:17 Agho naabakoba nti: “Mubona obuzibu bwe tulimu? Buti Yerusalemu baakizikiriza kyafuuka bifulukwa byereere, n'emiryango gyakyo baagyokya omuliro. Kale ni mwidhe tuzimbe ekimante ku Yerusalemu tulekere agho kuswala.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Kale naabakobera nga Katonda wange bwe yaba aghalala ninze n'anhamba, era naabakobera n'ebyo kyabazinga bye yankoba. Agho bankoba bati: “Tusitukiremu tuzimbe.” Era baafungiza beetegekera okukola omulimo ogwo omukalamu." 
Nehemiah2:19 Aye Saniballati ow'e Bethi Horoni, ni Tobia omugheereza Omuammoni, ni Geshemu Omuwarabu, bwe baawulira kye tutegeka okukola, baatusekerera inho era baatunhooma. Batubuuza bati: “Muli kukola ki ekyo? Muli kudheemera kyabazinga?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Naabairamu nti: “Katonda ow'eigulu, aidha kutugha obughanguzi. Kale ni ife abagheereza be twidha kusitukiramu tuzimbe. Aye imwe mu Yerusalemu muno, muziramu mugabo gwaimwe, oba okubaamu n'ekintu ekyaimwe, waire ekiidhukizo obwidhukizo.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Agho Eliashibu Omukulu wa Bakabona ni bakabona baine, baasitukiramu baazimba ogwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Entaama, baakola omukolo ogw'okugutukuza, era baagutaamu n'endhigi dhaamu. Baatukuza ekimante ekyo okutuuka ku kyetebwa Ekituuti Ekirengererwaku Ekyekikumi, n'okutuuka ku kindi ekyetebwa Ekituuti ekya Hananeli." 
Nehemiah3:2 Abantu ab'e Yeriko baazimba ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo. Zakkuri mutabane wa Imuri yaazimba ekitundu ekyairaku. 
Nehemiah3:3 Batabane ba Hassena baazimba ogwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Ebyenhandha. Baasimbagho emyango gyagwo, baataamu endhigi dhaamu, era endhigi edho baadhitaaku eminhololo n'ebisiba ebindi." 
Nehemiah3:4 Ekitundu ekyairaku, Meremothi mutabane wa Uria era mwidhukulu wa Hakkozi, n'eyakizimba. Ku oyo kwairaku Meshullamu mutabane wa Berekia era mwidhukulu wa Meshezabeli, yaazimba ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo. Zadoki mutabane wa Baana yairaku, yaazimba ekitundu ekyairaku." 
Nehemiah3:5 Abantu ab'e Tekoa baazimba ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, aye abakungu baayo baaloba okukola omulimo Musengwa Katonda waibwe gwe yabagha." 
Nehemiah3:6 Yoiyada mutabane wa Pasea ni Meshullamu mutabane wa Besodeia, baalongoosa ogwetebwa Omulyango Omukaire. Baasimbagho emyango gyagwo, baataamu endhigi dhaamu, era endhigi edho baadhitaaku eminhololo n'ebisiba ebindi." 
Nehemiah3:7 Ku abo kwairaku Melatia ow'e Gibeoni, ni Yadoni ow'e Meronothi, n'abantu abandi ab'e Gibeoni n'ab'e Mizipa abaali bafugibwa omukungu w'ekiketezo ekiri ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate abo boona baakola ogw'okulongoosa." 
Nehemiah3:8 Uzzieli mutabane wa Harihaia, omugheesi w'ebintu bya zaabu, yairaku, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo. Ku oyo kwairaku Hanania omukozi w'obuwoowo, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, okutuuka ku Kimante Ekigazi." 
Nehemiah3:9 Ku oyo kwairaku Refaia mutabane wa Huri eyafuganga ekitundu ku kiketezo ky'e Yerusalemu, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo." 
Nehemiah3:10 Ku oyo kwairaku Yedaia mutabane wa Harumafa, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, ekyali okumpi n'endhu ye. Ku oyo kwairaku Hattushi mutabane wa Hashabuneia, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malikiya mutabane wa Harimu, ni Hassihubu mutabane wa Pahathi Moabu, bombi baalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, era baalongoosa n'Omunaala ogw'Eziiko." 
Nehemiah3:12 Ku abo kwairaku Shallumu mutabane wa Halloheshi, eyafuganga ekitundu ekindi ku kiketezo kire eky'e Yerusalemu, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, ng'ayambibwaku baghala be." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuni n'abatyamye ab'omu kibuga Zanoa n'abaalongoosa ogwetebwa Omulyango ogw'omu Kiiko. Baaguzimba buyaaka, baagutaamu endhigi dhaamu, era endhigi edho baadhitaaku eminhololo n'ebisiba ebindi. Era baalongoosa ekitundu ku kimante ekyo nga kigheza mita ebikumi bina n'ana (440), baakituusa ku Mulyango gw'Obusa." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malikiya mutabane wa Rekabu eyafuganga ekiketezo ky'e Bethi Hakkeremu n'eyalongoosa ogwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Obusa. Yaaguzimba buyaaka, yaagutaamu endhigi dhaamu, era endhigi edho yaadhitaaku eminhololo n'ebisiba ebindi." 
Nehemiah3:15 Shallumu mutabane wa Kolihoze, eyafuganga ekiketezo ky'e Mizipa, n'eyalongoosa ogwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Ensulo. Yaaguzimba buyaaka, yaagusereka, yaagutaamu endhigi dhaamu, era endhigi edho yaadhitaaku eminhololo n'ebisiba ebindi. Era yaazimba n'ekimante eky'oku Kidiba kya Shela okumpi n'enimiro ya kyabazinga, yaakituukiza irala aghaali amadaala agaika okuva mu kyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Ku oyo kwairaku Nehemia mutabane wa Azibuka eyafuganga ekitundu ku kiketezo ky'e Bethizuri, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo okutuukira irala ku magombe ga Daudi, ni ku kidiba kye baasima obusime, ni ku ndhu ey'abalwani ab'amaani." 
Nehemiah3:17 Abalevi bano, n'abaalongoosa ebitundu ebyairaku ku kimante ekyo: Rehumu mutabane wa Bani n'eyasooka okulongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo. Ku oyo kwairaku Hashabia eyafuganga ekitundu ku kiketezo eky'e Keila, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, ku lw'abantu b'ekiketezo kye." 
Nehemiah3:18 Ku oyo kwairaku Bavvai mutabane wa Henadadi eyafuganga ekitundu ekindi ku kiketezo kire eky'e Keila, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo." 
Nehemiah3:19 Ku oyo kwairaku Ezeri mutabane wa Yeshua eyafuganga ekiketezo eky'e Mizipa, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekiringiriire ghe batereka eby'okulwanisa, okutuukira irala ku kimante ghe kigonhokera." 
Nehemiah3:20 Ku oyo kwairaku Baruku mutabane wa Zabbai, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekindi okuva ekimante ghe kigonhokera, okutuuka ku mulyango ogw'endhu ey'Omukulu wa Bakabona ayetebwa Eliashibu." 
Nehemiah3:21 Ku oyo kwairaku Meremothi mutabane wa Uria era mwidhukulu wa Hakkozi, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, okuva ku mulyango gw'endhu ya Eliashibu okutuuka endhu eyo gh'ekanga." 
Nehemiah3:22 Bakabona ab'omu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe bano, n'abaalongoosa ebitundu ebyairaku ku kimante ekyo:" 
Nehemiah3:23 Benjamini ni Hassihubu, n'abaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, ekyali nga kirinzagainia n'endhu dhaibwe. Ku abo kwairaku Azaria mutabane wa Maaseia era mwidhukulu wa Anania, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, ekyali kiriiraine endhu ye." 
Nehemiah3:24 Ku oyo kwairaku Binnui mutabane wa Henadadi, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, okuva ku ndhu ya Azaria okutuuka ekimante ghe kigonhokera." 
Nehemiah3:25 Palali mutabane wa Uzai n'eyalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, okuva ghale ng'olingiriiza ekimante ghe kigonhokera aghaali n'ekituuti ekirengererwaku ekiri ku ndhu ya kyabazinga ghaigulu, okumpi n'endhu y'abakuumi. Ku oyo kwairaku Pedaia mutabane wa Paroshi," 
Nehemiah3:26 n'abagheereza ab'omu isinzizo abaabanga mu kifo ekyayetebwanga Ofeli. Abo baalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, okutuuka mu kifo ekiringiriire ogwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Amaadhi mu buvandhuba, era nga n'aghali ekituuti ekirengererwaku ekireeyiriri." 
Nehemiah3:27 Abantu ab'e Tekoa baalongoosa kabiri ekitundu ekindi ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, okuva agho ng'olingiriire ekituuti ekirengererwaku ekikologho era ekireeyiriri, okutuuka ku kimante kya Ofeli." 
Nehemiah3:28 Ghaabaagho bakabona abaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, okuva eitale ku Mulyango ogw'Embalaasi, nga buli muntu alongoosa ekitundu ku kimante ekyo ekiringiriire endhu ye." 
Nehemiah3:29 Ku abo kwairaku Zadoki mutabane wa Immeri, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo ekiringiriire endhu ye. Ku oyo kwairaku Shemaia mutabane wa Shekania omukuumi w'Omulyango ogw'e Buvandhuba, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo." 
Nehemiah3:30 Ku oyo kwairaku Hanania mutabane wa Shelemia, ni Hanuni omwana owomukaaga owa Zalafu, baalongoosa kabiri ekitundu ekindi ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo. Ku abo kwairaku Meshullamu mutabane wa Berekia, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo ekiringiriire endhu ye." 
Nehemiah3:31 Ku oyo kwairaku Malikiya omugheesi ow'ebintu bya zaabu, yaalongoosa ekitundu ekyairaku ku kimante ekyo, okutuuka ku ndhu ey'abagheereza ab'omu isinzizo n'ey'abasuubuzi, edhaali dhirinzagainia n'ogwetebwa Omulyango gwa Hammifakadi okumpi n'ensonda y'ekimante ekyo kwe baazimbira akasenge aka ghaigulu." 
Nehemiah3:32 Agho abagheesi ab'ebintu bya zaabu, N'abasuubuzi, baalongoosa ekitundu ekyasembayo ku kimante ekyo, okuva ku nsonda eyo eyaliku akasenge aka ghaigulu okutuuka ku Mulyango ogw'Entaama." 
Nehemiah4:1 Agho Saniballati bwe yawulira ati tuli kuzimba ekimante okwezunguluza Yerusalemu, yaasungughala inho era yaabaaku ekiruyi ekitaloodheka. Olwo yaatoolera okutuma ife Abayudaaya." 
Nehemiah4:2 Yaayogera ng'ali ghalala ni baine, n'eigye lya Samaria, yaakoba ati: “Katyo bano Abayudaaya abadoofu bali kugezaaku kukola ki? Basuubira okwizaagho ebintu nga bwe byali? Obwo basuubira kughaayo misengo? Obwo omulimo Banaagumala mu lunaku lulala? Obwo banaaghanga okutoola amabaale agaayonoonebwa omuliro mu mmungo edh'ebikaba, bairamu okugazimbisa?”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobia Omuammoni eyali agho naye yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ekimante kyaibwe ekyo eky'amabaale kye bali kuzimba, ekibe bwe kikiniinaku kimenheka bumenheke.”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Agho naasaba nti: “Wo Katonda waife, wulira bwe bali kutunhoomoola. Nkusaba ebivumo bye bali kutuvuma bibairirengaku beene. Era obagheeyo y'abazigu babanhageku ebyaibwe, babatwale mu nsi eyindi nga banhage." 
Nehemiah4:5 Otabasonigha naire omusango gwaibwe ogwo, waire okwerabira ekibi kyaibwe ekyo, kuba bakusoononkereiza, baakusungughaza mu maiso gaife abali kuzimba.”" 
Nehemiah4:6 Kale tweyongera okuzimba ekimante, twaja nga tukiyunga ghalala kyonakyona okwezungulula, twakituusa ghagati mu kuja ghaigulu kuba abantu baali n'omwoyo ogwenda okukola." 
Nehemiah4:7 Aye Saniballati, ni Tobia, n'abantu ab'e Buwarabu, n'ab'omu Ammoni, n'ab'omu Ashidodi, bwe baawulira bati omulimo ogw'okulongoosa ekimante ekyezungulula Yerusalemu guli kuja mu maiso, era ng'abazimbi batooleire n'okusemba mu bituli ebyali mu kimante ekyo, baasungughala inho." 
Nehemiah4:8 Era boonaboona beekobaana okulumba Yerusalemu, bakireetemu okutabukatabuka." 
Nehemiah4:9 Aye twasaba Katonda waife era twataagho abakuumi omusana n'obwire okutangira abazigu abo. 
Nehemiah4:10 Abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya baakoba bati: “Abantu ababbeeda ebizito amaani gali kuja nga gabawaamu, ate ng'ebifunfugu bikeebunze agho! Kale titukaaghanga kuzimba kimante.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Abazigu baife beekobaana bati: “Tibaidha kumanha era tibaidha kubona, okutuusa bwe tunaabatuukamu ni tubaita, ni tulekeza omulimo ogw'okuzimba okuja mu maiso.”" 
Nehemiah4:12 Abayudaaya abaabanga aghalala n'abazigu baife, nga baidha emikuzi kamaala baatukoba bati: “Abazigu baife baidha kuva mu bifo yoonayoona ye baba, baidhe batulumbe.”" 
Nehemiah4:13 Kale buli inhuma gha kimante, ghe kyali nga kikaali kuwa kuzimbibwa, naajanga nga ntaayo abantu nga njiira ku nda dhaibwe, nga bagemye empiima dhaibwe, n'amafumo gaibwe, n'obulaso bwaibwe." 
Nehemiah4:14 Bwe nabona ntyo naasitukiramu, naakoba abakulembeze, n'abakungu, n'abantu abandi boonaboona nti: “Abazigu abo mutabatya. Mwidhukire nga Musengwa Katonda mukologho era wa ntiisa. Kale mulwanirire baganda baimwe, ni batabane baimwe, ni baghala baimwe, ni bakazi baimwe, era n'amaka gaimwe.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Abazigu baife baawulira nga twamanha olukwe lwaibwe, era nga Katonda n'eyatabulatabula entegeka dhaibwe. Agho twenatwena twairayo ku mulimo ogw'okuzimba ekimante." 
Nehemiah4:16 Okuva olwo n'okweyongerayo, omulala ku buli bakozi bange ababiri ababiri, yaakolanga ogw'okuzimba, ate owundi yaagemanga eifumo, n'engabo, n'akalaso, era yaavaalanga n'ekivaalo eky'omu lutalo. Abakulembeze baizanga inho amaani mu Bayudaaya" 
Nehemiah4:17 abaali ku gw'okuzimba ekimante. Abo abaabbeedanga ebizito nga bakozesa omukono mulala, ate omukono ogundi gwagema eky'okulwanisa." 
Nehemiah4:18 Era buli muzimbi yazimbanga nga yeesibye empiima ye mu nkende. Omuntu ow'okufuuwa eigwala ng'akamanhiso k'olutalo, ng'aba ghalala ninze." 
Nehemiah4:19 Agho naakoba abakulembeze, n'abakungu, n'abantu abandi boonaboona, nti: “Omulimo gwe tuli kukola munene era gwesuulaine inho amabanga. Ekyo kituleeteire obutaba ghalala, buli muntu yaaba ghala okuva ku mwine." 
Nehemiah4:20 Kale bwe munaawuliranga eigwala eyo yoonayoona muli, mwidha kwesolokezanga ghe ndi. Katonda waife aidha kutulwaniriranga.”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Mu nsambo eyo twafaabiikananga n'omulimo, okuva obwire ghe busansaanira okutuusa emuunienie ghe dhiviirayo nga ku buli bantu bange ababiri ababiri, omulala agema eifumo ate owundi yaakola." 
Nehemiah4:22 Era naakoba abantu mu kiseera ekyo nti: “Buli muntu ng'ali n'omugheereza we, basigalenga mu Yerusalemu, batukuumenga obwire era bakolenga omulimo omusana.”" 
Nehemiah4:23 Ghazira muntu yeenayeena eyatoolangamu ebivaalo bye, k'abe nze, oba banange, oba abakozi bange, oba abankuumanga be natambulanga nabo. Buli muntu yagemanga eky'okulwanisa kye mu ngalo ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Nehemiah5:1 Agho ghaabaagho abasaadha ni bakazi baibwe abeemuluguunhiza Bayudaaya banaibwe. 
Nehemiah5:2 Abandi nga bakoba bati: “Ife n'abaana baife tuli abantu kamaala, kale twetaaga engaano tulye tube abalamu.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Ghaabaagho abandi nga bakoba bati: “Ife tuli kusinga enimiro dhaife, n'amasamba gaife ag'emizabbibu, n'endhu dhaife, okufuna engaano ey'okulya tuwone endhala.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Ate abandi nga bakoba bati: “Twewola empiiya okusasula omusolo gwa kyabazinga ku nimiro dhaife, ni ku masamba gaife ag'emizabbibu." 
Nehemiah5:5 Ate nga twena tuli ba musaayi mulala ni Bayudaaya banaife abo. Abaana abaife, boona baana ng'oti n'abaibwe bwe bali. Aye ife tukaka batabane baife ni baghala baife okuba abairu. Era baghala baife abandi twabatunda ira mu bwiru. Ate nga ekyo titughanga kukyebeera, kuba enimiro dhaife, n'amasamba gaife ag'emizabbibu, biri mu buyinza bwa bantu bandi.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Bwe nawulira okwemuluguunhia kwaibwe, naasungughala inho." 
Nehemiah5:7 Kale neebuuza mwene mule mu mwoyo eky'okukola. Agho naavumirira abakulembeze n'abakungu abo. Naabakoba nti: “Imwe muli kukamula mu baganda baimwe amagoba!” Era naayeta abantu okwesoloza, memale mbakobeku." 
Nehemiah5:8 Agho naabakoba nti: “Tukoze inho nga bwe tusobola, twanunula baganda baife, Bayudaaya banaife, okubatoola mu maghanga agandi ye baatundibwa. Aye mperaano mwena muli kutunda baganda baife abo, ife beene tubagule!” Abakulembeze abo baasiriikirira ng'eky'okwogera kibabuze." 
Nehemiah5:9 Naabakoba nti: “Kye muli kukola ti kirungi naire! Ekyandibagwaniire n'okutyanga Katonda waife memale olwo mwalobera abazigu baife abo abamaghanga agandi okutuyeeyerezanga. 
Nehemiah5:10 Nze mwene, ni banange, n'abakozi bange, tubairenga nga tuwola abantu abo empiiya n'engaano. Nze mbeeghemba tubasonighe amagoba ago." 
Nehemiah5:11 Mubairize olwaleero luno ebyo bye mubaire mubakakanga babaghe: enimiro dhaibwe, n'amasamba gaibwe ag'emizabbibu, n'ag'emiti emyoliva, n'endhu dhaibwe, n'ekitundu ekirala ekirala ku buli bitundu kikumi eby'empiiya dhe bafuna, n'engaano, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'emiti emyoliva.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Agho abakulembeze abo baakoba bati: “Twidha kubairiza ebintu ebyo, era titukaababandha kintu kyonakyona. Twidha kukola nga bw'okobye.” Naayeta bakabona baalayiza abakulembeze abo, okukola nga bwe baasuubiza." 
Nehemiah5:13 Era naakunkumula olusibiro lwange nga nkoba nti: “Katonda agwananga yaakunkumula atyo omuntu yeenayeena ataatuukirizenga kisuubizo ky'akoze olwaleero luno, yaamutoola mu ndhu ye ni ku mulimo gwe. Omuntu oyo akunkumulwenga, asigalenga mukaya bekayakaya.” Abantu abaali beesoloiza bairamu buti: “Amiina!” Era baasaaka Musengwa Katonda. Abantu baakola nga bwe baasuubiza." 
Nehemiah5:14 Mu myaka gyonagyona eikumi n'ebiri gye namala nga ndi mufuzi wa Buyudaaya, okuva mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri (20) nga Arutazerizesi ni kyabazinga, okutuuka mu mwaka gwe ogwamakumi asatu n'ebiri (32), nze waire baganda bange, ghazira yalya ku mere eyandibaire esalirwa abantu okugireetera omufuzi." 
Nehemiah5:15 Abafuzi abansooka okufuga Buyudaaya, baakaluubirizanga abantu nga babasalira okuleeta emere, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'ebitundu bya feeza amakumi ana (40). Ate n'abagheereza b'abafuzi abo, boona baakaluubirizanga abantu. Aye nze nga tikola ntyo, kuba nga ntya Katonda." 
Nehemiah5:16 Nze neefubirizanga ku mulimo gwa kuzimba kimante kino gwonka, naaloba kwegulira kibandha. N'abagheereza bange boonaboona beemalira ku kukolanga mulimo ogwo ogw'okuzimba." 
Nehemiah5:17 Ate nga naliisanga abantu kikumi n'ataanu (150), nga mu abo n'omuli Abayudaaya, n'abakulembeze, n'abantu abaidhanga ye tuli nga bava mu maghanga agatwezungulwire." 
Nehemiah5:18 Buli lunaku nagabulanga ente enume ndala, n'entaama ensavu einho mukaaga, n'enkoko kamaala. Era enaku eikumi buli lwe dhaawangaku, nga ngabula omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omuyaaka kamaala. Aye waire ebyo byali bityo, tyasaliraku bantu kundeeteranga mere eyandibaire egheebwa omufuzi, kuba abantu abo baakakibwanga okukola ebintu kamaala ebyabakaluubirizanga." 
Nehemiah5:19 Wo Katonda wange, idhukiranga ebyo byonabyona bye nkoleire abantu bano, zeena onsasulemu ebirungi." 
Nehemiah6:1 Agho baakobera Saniballati, ni Tobia, ni Geshemu Omuwarabu, n'abazigu baife abandi boonaboona, bati namala okuzimba ekimante ekyo, era nga tikikaalimu bituli aye nga mu butuufu, mu kiseera ekyo nali nkaali kuta ndhigi mu miryango." 
Nehemiah6:2 Saniballati ni Geshemu bampeereza obukwenda nga bakoba bati: “Idha twagaanane mu kyalo ekirala ku ebyo ebiri mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe ogwetebwa Ono.” Aye nga baali n'ekigendererwa kyaibwe kya kunkola kabi. 
Nehemiah6:3 Naabagheereza abakwenda nga mbakoba nti: “Tighanga kwidha eyo, kuba omulimo gwe ndiku mukologho. Ndeka ntya omulimo ni gwemerera mbu kuba ndi kwidha eyo ye muli?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Bampeereza obwo batyo emikuzi ena, era zeena nga mbairamu mu nsambo n'endala." 
Nehemiah6:5 Agho Saniballati yaatuma omugheereza we mu nsambo n'endala eyo omukuzi ogwokutaanu, yaidha ng'ali n'embaluwa mu ngalo etali nsibe yaaku." 
Nehemiah6:6 Embaluwa eyo yagighandiika ati: “Abamaghanga agandi bakoba, era ni Geshemu yeena yaakikakasa ati, iwe n'Abayudaaya muli kwetegeka kudheema. Kyemuva muli kuzimba ekimante ekyo. Era akoba ati iwe oli kwenda kufuuka kyabazinga waibwe," 
Nehemiah6:7 era otairegho abalanzi akulangirira mu Yerusalemu bati niiwe kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Kale ni idha tugheedhagane amagezi ku nsonga eyo, kuba abantu tibaalobe kugikoberaku kyabazinga.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Agho naabagheereza obukwenda nga bukoba buti: “Ghazira ku ebyo byonabyona bye muli kukoba, kyali kibaireghooku naire, muli kubipaatiikagho bupaatiike imwe beene.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Baali bali kugezaaku bwa kututiisa nga badhuuba bati ekyo kinaatunafuya, twalekera agho okukola. Aye naasaba nti: “Wo Katonda wange nhongera amaani.”" 
Nehemiah6:10 Agho naajaaku mu ndhu ya Shemaia mutabane wa Delaia era nga mwidhukulu wa Mehetabela, eyali nga taikirizibwa kuva agho. Yankoba ati: “Tuje tweigalize mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, mu isinzizo lya Katonda, kuba baidha kwidha bakwite. Obwire baidha kwidha bakwite.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Aye nze naamwiramu nti: “Omuntu ng'oti ninze nsobola ntya okulumukagho ni neegisa? Era nsobola ntya okuja mu isinzizo olw'okuwonia obulamu bwange? Busa, ekyo tiidha kukikola.”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Bwe nakirowoozaaku einho, naakitegeera nga Katonda ti n'eyatuma Shemaia oyo okwogera ebyo, aye nga Tobia ni Saniballati, n'abaamugula yeeyogeze ebyo abe ng'oti n'ali kundabula." 
Nehemiah6:13 Baamugula ayogere atyo, nze ntye era nkole ekibi, olwo beene bandhogereku bubi era banswazeswaze." 
Nehemiah6:14 Agho naasaba nti: “Wo Katonda wange, otasonigha Tobia ni Saniballati okusinziira ku ebyo bye bakoze, oba waire okusonigha omulanzi omukazi Noadia, n'abalanzi abandi boonaboona abaayenda okuntiisatiisa.”" 
Nehemiah6:15 Kale ku lunaku olwamakumi abiri n'eitaanu (25) olw'omwezi ogwetebwa Elulu, twamaliriza okuzimba ekimante ekyo. Omulimo ogwo twagukola mu nnaku amakumi ataanu na ibiri." 
Nehemiah6:16 Abazigu baife boonaboona abaali mu maghanga agandi agatwezungulwire bwe baakiwulira, baatya era baaweeramu irala amaani, kuba baakimanha ng'omulimo ogwo gwawa lwa Katonda mwene kutuyamba." 
Nehemiah6:17 Ate era, mu biseera ebyo abakungu Abayudaaya baaghandiikiranga Tobia embaluwa kamaala. Tobia yeena yaabairangamu." 
Nehemiah6:18 Baakolanga batyo, kuba mu Buyudaaya mwalimu abantu kamaala be yasala nabo omukago, bwe yabayiza mughala wa Shekania mutabane wa Ara. Ate ni mutabane we Yehohanani yali nga yabayiza mughala wa Meshullamu mutabane wa Berekia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Era abantu nga bwe baba ghe ndi, boogera ku birungi Tobaia oyo by'akola, era baamukoberanga bye nayogeranga. Agho Tobia oyo yaayongeranga okumpandiikira embaluwa okuntiisatiisa." 
Nehemiah7:1 Ekimante bwe kyawa okuzimbibwa era nga mmaze n'okutaamu endhigi dhaamu, naataagho abakuumi b'emiryango, n'abembi, era naagha n'Abalevi abandi emirimo gyaibwe egy'okukolanga." 
Nehemiah7:2 Agho naataagho muganda wange Hanani ni Hanania omufuzi eyakuliranga ekifo eky'okwewogomamu, naabagha obukumu okulabiriranga Yerusalemu. Hanania oyo yali mwesigwa era nga atya Katonda okusinga abantu abandi boonaboona." 
Nehemiah7:3 Naabakoba nti: “Mutalagiranga kwigulagho miryango gya Yerusalemu nkyo, okutuusa ng'akasana kali kwebbalangula. Era mulagirenga bagiigale bagisibe ng'abakuumi bakaakuma. Mutengagho abakuumi nga mubatoola mu batyamye b'omu Yerusalemu mwene omwo, bakuumenga mu mpalo, nga buli mukuumi akuuma ekiketezo ekiri emberi w'endhu ye.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Ekibuga Yerusalemu kyali kinene era nga kigazi, aye ng'abantu abakirimu batono era nga n'endhu dhe baakazimbamu ti nhingi." 
Nehemiah7:5 Katonda yanta mu mwoyo ekirowoozo, nkobe abakungu n'abakulembeze b'abantu, n'abantu abandi boonaboona, beesoloze beeghandiise ng'obuzaale bwaibwe bwe bwali. Era naazuula ekitabo kye baaghandiikamu obuzaale bw'abo abaasooka okuva mu bunhage nga kirimu bino:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Gano n'amaina ag'abantu ab'omu kiketezo eky'e Buyudaaya abaira nga bava e Babilonia mu bunhage, kyabazinga waayo Nebukadinezzari ye yali abatwaire nga basibe. Abantu abo baira e Yerusalemu n'e Buyudaaya, buli muntu ng'airayo mu kibuga eky'ewaibwe." 
Nehemiah7:7 Abakulembeze baibwe baali bano: Zerubbabeli, Yeshua, Nehemia, Azaria, Raamia, Nahamani, Morodekai, Bilishani, Misiperethi, Bigivai, Nehumu, ni Baana. Guno n'omughendo ogw'Abaisiraeli abaira okuva mu bunhage:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Ab'oku nda ya Paroshi baali enkumi babiri na kikumi na nsanvu na ibiri (2,172);" 
Nehemiah7:9 ab'oku nda ya Shefatia baali ebikumi bisatu na nsanvu na babiri (372); 
Nehemiah7:10 ab'oku nda ya Ara baali lusanvu na nsanvu na bataanu (775); 
Nehemiah7:11 ab'oku nda ya Pahathimoabu, batane ba Yeshua ni Yoabu baali enkumi ibiri na lunaana na ikumi na babiri (2,812);" 
Nehemiah7:12 ab'oku nda ya Elamu baali lukumi na bibiri n'ataanu na bana (1,254);" 
Nehemiah7:13 ab'oku nda ya Zattu baali lwenda na bina n'ana na bataanu (945); 
Nehemiah7:14 ab'oku nda ya Zakkai baali lusanvu na nkaaga (760); 
Nehemiah7:15 ab'oku nda ya Bani baali lukaaga na bina na babiri (642); 
Nehemiah7:16 ab'oku nda ya Bebai baali lukaaga na bibiri na basatu (623); 
Nehemiah7:17 ab'oku nda ya Azigadi baali lukumi na bibiri n'abiri na babiri (1,222);" 
Nehemiah7:18 ab'oku nda ya Adonikamu baali lukaaga na nkaaga na mukaaga (666); 
Nehemiah7:19 ab'oku nda ya Bigivai baali enkumi ibiri n'ataanu na mukaaga (2,056);" 
Nehemiah7:20 ab'oku nda ya Adini baali ebikumi bina n'ataanu na bana (454); 
Nehemiah7:21 ab'oku nda ya Ateri, oyo era nga ni Hezekia, baali Kyenda na munaana (98);" 
Nehemiah7:22 ab'oku nda ya Bezai baali ebikumi bisatu n'abiri na basatu (323); 
Nehemiah7:23 ab'oku nda ya Yora baali kikumi na ikumi na babiri (112); 
Nehemiah7:24 ab'oku nda ya Hushumu baali ebikumi bibiri n'abiri na basatu (223); 
Nehemiah7:25 ate ab'oku nda ya Gibbari baaba kyenda na bataanu (95). 
Nehemiah7:26 Abantu ab'e Bethelehemu n'ab'e Netofa baali kikumi na kinaana na munaana (188); 
Nehemiah7:27 abantu ab'e Anathothi baali kikumi n'abiri na munaana (128); 
Nehemiah7:28 abantu ab'e Bethi Azimavethi baali amakumi ana na babiri (42); 
Nehemiah7:29 abantu ab'e Kiriathi Yearimu, n'ab'e Kefira, n'ab'e Beerothi, baali lusanvu n'ana na basatu (743);" 
Nehemiah7:30 abantu ab'e Rama n'ab'e Geba baali lukaaga n'abiri na mulala (621); 
Nehemiah7:31 abantu ab'e Mikimasi baali kikumi n'abiri na babiri (122); 
Nehemiah7:32 abantu ab'e Betheli n'ab'e Ayi baali ebikumi bibiri n'abiri na basatu (223); 
Nehemiah7:33 abantu ab'e Nebo kire ekindi baali amakumi ataanu na babiri (52); 
Nehemiah7:34 abantu ab'e Elamu kire ekindi baali lukumi na bibiri n'ataanu na bana (1,254);" 
Nehemiah7:35 abantu ab'e Harimu baali ebikumi bisatu n'abiri (320); 
Nehemiah7:36 abantu ab'e Yeriko baali ebikumi bisatu n'ana na bataanu (345); 
Nehemiah7:37 Abantu ab'e Lodi, n'ab'e Hadida, n'ab'e Ono, baali lusanvu n'abiri na mulala (721);" 
Nehemiah7:38 ate abantu ab'e Senaa baaba enkumi isatu na lwenda n'asatu (3,930)." 
Nehemiah7:39 Mu baira okuva mu bunhage, mwalimu bakabona bano: Ab'oku nda ya Yedaia nga basimuka mu Yeshua baali lwenda na nsanvu na basatu (973);" 
Nehemiah7:40 ab'oku nda ya Immeri baali lukumi n'ataanu na babiri (1,052);" 
Nehemiah7:41 ab'oku nda ya Pashuhuri baali Lukumi na bibiri n'ana na musanvu (1,247);" 
Nehemiah7:42 ate ab'oku nda ya Harimu baaba lukumi na ikumi na musanvu (1,017)." 
Nehemiah7:43 Mu baira okuva mu bunhage mwalimu Abalevi bano: Ab'oku nda ya Yeshua, n'ab'oku nda ya Kadimieli, nga basimuka mu Hodavia, baali nsanvu na bana (74)." 
Nehemiah7:44 Abembi b'omu isinzizo baali ba ku nda ya Asafu, era baali kikumi n'ana munaana (148)." 
Nehemiah7:45 Abakuumi b'emiryango gy'eisinzizo baali, ba ku nda ya Shallumu, n'ab'oku ya Ateri, n'ab'oku ya Talumoni, n'ab'oku ya Akkubu, n'ab'oku ya Hatita, n'ab'oku ya Shobai boonaboona aghalala baaba kikumi n'asatu na munaana (138)." 
Nehemiah7:46 Abagheereza b'omu isinzizo baali, ba ku nda ya Ziha, n'ab'oku ya Hasufa, n'ab'oku ya Tabbaothi;" 
Nehemiah7:47 ab'oku nda ya Kerosi, n'ab'oku ya Sia, n'ab'oku ya Padoni;" 
Nehemiah7:48 ab'oku nda ya Lebana, n'ab'oku ya Hagaba, n'ab'oku ya Shalimai;" 
Nehemiah7:49 ab'oku nda ya Hanani, n'ab'oku ya Giddeli, n'ab'oku ya Gahari;" 
Nehemiah7:50 ab'oku nda ya Reayia, n'ab'oku ya Rezini, n'ab'oku ya Nekoda;" 
Nehemiah7:51 ab'oku nda ya Gazzamu, n'ab'oku ya Uzza, n'ab'oku ya Pasea;" 
Nehemiah7:52 ab'oku nda ya Besai, n'ab'oku ya Meunimu, n'ab'oku ya Nefushesimu;" 
Nehemiah7:53 ab'oku nda ya Bakubuku, n'ab'oku ya Hakufa, n'ab'oku ya Harihura;" 
Nehemiah7:54 ab'oku nda ya Bazalithi, n'ab'oku ya Mehida, n'ab'oku ya Harisha;" 
Nehemiah7:55 ab'oku nda ya Barakosi, n'ab'oku ya Sisera, n'ab'oku ya Tema;" 
Nehemiah7:56 n'ab'oku nda ya Nezia, n'ab'oku ya Hatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Mu baira okuva mu bunhage mwalimu abagheereza aba Solomoni bano: Ab'oku nda ya Sotai, n'ab'oku ya Soferethi, n'ab'oku ya Perida;" 
Nehemiah7:58 ab'oku nda ya Yaala, n'ab'oku ya Darikoni, n'ab'oku ya Giddeli;" 
Nehemiah7:59 ab'oku nda ya Shefatia, n'ab'oku ya Hattili, n'ab'oku ya Pokerethi, n'ab'oku ya Hazzebaimu, n'ab'oku ya Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Abagheereza b'omu isinzizo n'abagheereza aba Solomoni boonaboona aghalala baali ebikumi bisatu na kyenda na babiri (392). 
Nehemiah7:61 Mu baira okuva mu bunhage mwalimu abaava e Telimela, n'e Teliharisha, n'e Kerubu, n'e Addoni, n'e Immeri aye ng'abantu abo tibeekakasa nda dha baiseibwe dhe baavaaku, waire okukakasa nga Baisiraeli beenebeene." 
Nehemiah7:62 Abantu abo ni bano: Ab'oku nda ya Delaia, n'ab'oku ya Tobia, n'ab'oku ya Nekoda. Abo boonaboona aghalala baali lukaaga n'ana na babiri (642)." 
Nehemiah7:63 Ghaligho n'abandi abaali abaana ba bakabona, nga ni bano: Ab'oku nda ya Habaia, n'ab'oku ya Hakkozi, n'ab'oku ya Barazillai, ye baatuuma eriina eryo olw'okuba yafumbirwa owundi ku baghala ba Barazillai Omugileadi." 
Nehemiah7:64 Abantu abo baabanoonia mu nkalala dh'obuzaale aye nga tibabonekamu, kale baabalekeza okukola nga bakabona, nga batwalibwa ng'abatali balongoofu." 
Nehemiah7:65 Eyali omufuzi mu kiseera ekyo yaabalobera okulyanga ku bigheebwayo eri Katonda okutuusa nga bafunie kabona aghanga okwebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda ng'akozesa Urimu ni Thummimu. 
Nehemiah7:66 Ekikunsu kyonakyona aghalala eky'abo abaira okuva mu bunhage, kyalimu abantu emitwalo ena n'enkumi ibiri na bisatu na nkaaga (42,360)." 
Nehemiah7:67 Abagheereza abasaadha n'abakazi be baira nabo baali, kasanvu na bisatu na n'asatu na musanvu (7,337). Baira n'abembi abasaadha n'abakazi ebikumi bibiri n'ana na bataanu (245)." 
Nehemiah7:68 Baira n'embalaasi dhaibwe lusanvu n'asatu na mukaaga (736), n'enhumbu ebikumi bibiri n'ana na itaanu (245)," 
Nehemiah7:69 n'engamiya ebikumi bina n'asatu na itaanu (435), n'endogoyi kakaaga na lusanvu n'abiri (6,720)." 
Nehemiah7:70 Agho abandi ku bakulu b'endhu dha baiseibwe baaghaayo ebintu eby'okukola omulimo ogw'okuzimba. Omufuzi w'omu kiketezo ekyo yaaghaayo: kilo munaana (8) edha zaabu, n'ebbakuli amakumi ataanu (50), n'ebivaalo bya bakabona ebikumi bitaanu n'asatu (530)." 
Nehemiah7:71 N'abandi ku bakulu b'endhu dha baiseibwe baaghaayo: kilo kikumi na nkaaga na munaana (168) edha zaabu, ni kilo lukumi na bibiri n'ataanu (1,250) edha feeza." 
Nehemiah7:72 Abantu boonaboona abaasigalagho baaghaayo: kilo kikumi na nkaaga na munaana (168) edha zaabu, ni kilo kikumi n'ana (140) edha feeza, n'ebivaalo bya bakabona nkaaga na musanvu (67)." 
Nehemiah7:73 Kale bakabona n'Abalevi, n'abaigazi b'emiryango, n'abembi, n'abandi ku bantu ababuliidho, n'abagheereza b'omu isinzizo, n'Abaisiraeli abandi, baaja baaba mu bibuga byaibwe. Era omwezi ogwomusanvu okuja okutuuka ng'Abaisiraeli abandi boonaboona bali mu bibuga byaibwe." 
Nehemiah8:1 Agho Abaisiraeli boonaboona nga bali kitole, beesololeza mu luya emberi gh'ogwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Amaadhi. Baakoba Ezera omunamateeka aleete Ekitabo ky'Amateeka, Musengwa Katonda ge yagha Isiraeli ng'abita mu Musa." 
Nehemiah8:2 Kale ku lunaku olusooka olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu, Ezera kabona yaaleeta Ekitabo ekyo mu kifo abantu boonaboona, abasaadha, abakazi, n'abantu abandi boonaboona abaali nga basobola okutegeera, ghe baali nga beesololeiza." 
Nehemiah8:3 Yaakibasomera boonaboona okuva ku nkyo okutuusa mu kasana ghagati, ng'alingiriire y'oluya oluli emberi gh'Omulyango ogw'Amaadhi. Era boonaboona baatega amatu okuwulirisa ebiva mu Kitabo ekyo eky'Amateeka." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezera oyo, eyali omunamateeka, yaayemerera ku kituuti kye baakola mu mbaawo olw'omukolo ogwo. Era agho okumpi naye, ku luuyi lwe olw'omukono omusaadha ghaayemereragho, Mattithia, Shema, Anaia, Uria, Hilikia, ni Maaseia. Ate ku luuyi lwe olw'omukono omugooda, ghaayemereragho bano: Pedaia, Mishaeli, Malikiya, Hashumu, Hashibaddana, Zekaria, ni Meshullamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Agho Ezera yaabwikula ekitabo ng'abantu boonaboona babona, kuba yali ghaigulu ghaibwe boonaboona. Olwakibwikula ati, abantu boonaboona baayemerera."
