Nehemiah8:6 Ezera oyo yaasaaka Musengwa Katonda, Katonda omukologho. Abantu boonaboona bairamu bati: “Amiina, Amiina,” nga basituliire emikono gyaibwe ghaigulu. Era baakuba amakiryaivu, baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka, baasinza Musengwa Katonda." 
Nehemiah8:7 Agho abantu baasigala mu bifo byaibwe, Yeshua, ni Bani, ni Sherebia, ni Yamini, ni Akkubu, ni Shabbethai, ni Hodia, ni Maaseia, ni Kelita, ni Azaria, ni Yozabadi, ni Hanani, ni Pelaia, n'Abalevi, bainhonhola abantu abo amateeka." 
Nehemiah8:8 Baasoma mu Kitabo eky'Amateeka ga Katonda mu nsambo etegeerekeka obukalamu, era nga bagha n'amakulu agalimu, abantu boonaboona baategeera ebisomeibwa." 
Nehemiah8:9 Abantu bwe baawulira Amateeka bye gabalagira okukola, boonaboona baalira amaziga. Kale Nehemia eyali omufuzi w'ekiketezo ekyo, ni Ezera kabona era omunamateeka, n'Abalevi abaayegeresa abantu Amateeka, baabakoba bati: “Olunaku luno lwa Musengwa Katonda waimwe era lutukuvu. Kale ni mulobe kunakughala waire okulira amaziga." 
Nehemiah8:10 Buti mwireyo ewaimwe, mulye ebisavu, munhwe omwenge ogw'emizabbibu oguwooma einho, era mugabireku n'abo abazira ghe batoola kuba olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda waife luno lutukuvu. Agho ni mutanakughala, kuba eisanhu Musengwa Katonda ly'abagha imwe, n'eribaleetera okuba ab'amaani.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Kale Abalevi baawooyawooya abantu nga babakoba bati: “Mube baikaikamu kuba luno olunaku lutukuvu, mutanakughala.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Agho abantu boonaboona baagolola ewaibwe, baalya, baanhwa, era baagabiraku n'abo abazira ghe batoola. Baaba mu kusagamba okw'amaani olw'okuba baategeera ebibono bye baabakoba." 
Nehemiah8:13 Ku lunaku olwairirira, abakulu ab'enda dha balata b'abantu boonaboona, ghalala ni bakabona n'Abalevi, baidha ye Ezera omunamateeka okwega ebiri mu mateeka." 
Nehemiah8:14 Baazuula nga kyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka, Musengwa Katonda ge yagha ng'abita mu Musa, kiti Abaisiraeli bali n'okusulanga mu ntindi mu kiseera eky'ekibinuko eky'omu mwezi ogwomusanvu." 
Nehemiah8:15 Era baazuula nga bali n'okulangirira bamanhise ab'omu bibuga byaibwe byonabyona ni mu Yerusalemu bati: “Muje mu nsozi muleete ensaga edh'emiti emyoliva, egyo gye baasimba obusimbe n'egyo egyamera gyene, n'ensaga edh'emiti eminaazi, n'edh'emiti egindi egy'amakaba amangi, muzimbise entindi, nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Kale abantu baaja baaleeta ensaga edho, baazimba entindi ku ngulu kw'endhu dhaibwe, ni mu mpya dhaibwe, ni mu luya olw'eisinzizo lya Katonda, ni mu luya oluli gha Mulyango ogw'Amaadhi, ni mu luya oluli gha Mulyango ogw'Efuraimu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Abantu boonaboona abaira okuva mu bunhage, baazimba entindi, baadhisulamu. Guno n'ogwali omukuzi ogusooka okukola batyo, okuviira irala mu biseera bya Yoshua mutabane wa Nuni. Kale ghaabaagho okusagamba okw'amaani." 
Nehemiah8:18 Buli lunaku, okuva ku lwasooka mu kibinuko ekyo okutuuka ku lwasembayo, baasomanga ekitundu okuva mu Kitabo eky'Amateeka ga Katonda. Baaba ku kibinuko okumala enaku musanvu, ate ku lw'omunaana beesoloza okusinza Katonda, ng'Amateeka bwe galagira." 
Nehemiah9:1 Ku lunaku olwamakumi abiri n'eina (24) olw'omwezi gwene ogwo, Abaisiraeli beesoloza, baasiiba nga tibaliire, nga bavaire ekutiya era nga beefuse n'enkungu mu mitwe, olw'ebibi byaibwe okubanakughaza." 
Nehemiah9:2 Agho Abaisiraeli abo, nga beeyawire ku bamaghanga agandi, baayemerera okwatula ebibi byaibwe n'ebyonoono bya badhaadha baibwe." 
Nehemiah9:3 Baayemerera batyo okumala esaawa ng'oti isatu, nga bawulirisa Amateeka ga Musengwa Katonda waibwe ge baali bali kubasomera. Baamala esaawa ng'oti isatu edhindi nga baatula ebibi byaibwe era nga basinza Musengwa Katonda waibwe." 
Nehemiah9:4 Abalevi bano: Yeshua, Bani, Kadimieli, Shebania, Bunni, Sherebia, Bani, ni Kenani, baayemerera ku madaala g'Abalevi, baasaba Musengwa Katonda waibwe mu mamiro ag'amaani." 
Nehemiah9:5 Agho Abalevi bano: Yeshua, Kadimieli, Bani, Hashabuneia, Hodia, Shebania, ni Pethahia, baakoba abantu bati: “Mwemerere musaake Musengwa Katonda waimwe; mumusaakenga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Eriina lye ery'ekitiisa lisaakibwenga, eriswikiriire okusaaka okw'abantu kwonakwona.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 Ezera yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe wenka eyatonda eigulu, n'ebiri ghaigulu mu ibbanga byonabyona. Niiwe eyatonda ensi n'ebigirimu byonabyona. Waatonda n'enhandha n'ebigirimu byonabyona, era byonabyona waabigha obulamu. Ebiri mu igulu byonabyona bikusinza." 
Nehemiah9:7 Niiwe Musengwa Katonda, Katonda oyo eyalonda Aburamu, n'omutoola mu Uri ensi ey'Abakaladea, n'omutuuma Aburahamu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Wamubona ng'omwoyo gwe mwesigwa y'oli, waakola naye endagaano. Waasuubiza okugha baidhukulu be, ensi ey'Abakanaani, n'Abahitti, n'Abamori, n'Abaperizzi, n'Abayebusi, n'Abagirigashi. Era waatuukiriza kye wasuubiza, kuba oli mutukuvu." 
Nehemiah9:9 Wabona okudaazibwadaazibwa kwa badhaadha baife nga bali mu Misiri, era waabawulira bwe baakulirira nga bali ku Nhandha Emyufu." 
Nehemiah9:10 Wakola ebyewuunhio n'ebyewuninkiriza eri kyabazinga w'e Misiri, n'eri abakungu be boonaboona, n'abantu b'omu nsi ye, kuba wamanha nga bwe baatuntuza badhaadha baife. Agho weekolera eriina erikaaligho ni ye buli eno." 
Nehemiah9:11 Waleetera amaadhi g'enhandha okweyawulamu aghabiri, Abaisiraeli baabita ghagati mu nhandha ku itaka eikalu. Abo abaali bali kubabingirira waabasuula mu maadhi amaleeyi, ng'oti n'amabaale bwe gadimira mu maadhi amangi einho." 
Nehemiah9:12 Omusana wabakulemberangamu ng'oli mu kire ekiri ng'oti mpango ate obwire waabanga mu muliro oguli ng'oti mpango, okubamuliikirira engira ye babe babitemu." 
Nehemiah9:13 Wava mu igulu waika ku lusozi Sinai, waayogera nabo, waabagha endhegeresa entuufu, ey'amateeka n'ebiragiro eby'amazima." 
Nehemiah9:14 Wabeegeresa okukuumanga olunaku lwo olwa Sabbato nga lutukuvu, waabagha ebiragiro byo n'amateeka go ng'obita mu mugheereza wo Musa." 
Nehemiah9:15 Wabagha emere okuva mu igulu okubawonia endhala, era waabagha amaadhi okuva mu lubaale okubawonia endiwo. Waabakoba baje batoole ebiketezo bye wasuubiza okubagha, bibe ebyaibwe ku bwaibwe." 
Nehemiah9:16 Aye badhaadha baife beekuluntaza, baakalangusa emyoyo gyaibwe, baaloba kugondera biragiro byo." 
Nehemiah9:17 Baaloba kuwulira na kwidhukira ebyewuninkiriza bye wabakolamu. Baakalangusa bwa myoyo gyaibwe, baataagho omuntu abakulembere abaizeeyo mu bwiru e Misiri. Aye iwe oli Katonda asonigha, ekiseera kyonakyona. Oli wa kivunika, osaasira, era olwagho okusungughala. Era olw'okuba iwe obagonza inho obutalekera, tiwabalekulira agho." 
Nehemiah9:18 Beekolera ekifaananie eky'ente ento enume mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, baakoba bati: ‘Isiraeli, ono ni katonda wo eyakutoola mu Misiri.’ Era baakola ebintu kamaala ebikunhoomesa." 
Nehemiah9:19 Aye iwe olw'okusaasira kwo okungi tiwabalekulira agho nga bali mu irungu. Tiwabatoolaku kire ekiri ng'oti mpango, ekyabakulemberangamu omusana, waire okubatoolaku omuliro oguli ng'oti mpango, ogwabamuliikiriranga obwire engira ye babe babitemu." 
Nehemiah9:20 Wabagha omwoyo gwo omulungi gubagalagirenga eky'okukola. Tiwalekeraku kubaghanga mannu kulya, era waabaghanga amaadhi okubawonia endiwo." 
Nehemiah9:21 Wabakuuma okumala emyaka amakumi ana (40) nga bali mu irungu, nga ghazira kye badhulirira. Ebivaalo byaimwe tibyakairighaku waire ebigere okubazimbaku." 
Nehemiah9:22 Wabagha okughangula bakyabazinga n'amaghanga agandi agabeezungulwire. Baatwala ensi ya Sihoni kyabazinga w'e Heshiboni, n'eya Ogi kyabazinga w'e Bashani, dhaaba dhaibwe ku bwaibwe." 
Nehemiah9:23 Wabagha abaidhukulu kamaala, baayala ng'oti n'emuunienie edh'oku igulu, waabatuusa mu nsi ye wakoba badhaadha baibwe batwale ebe eyaibwe ku bwaibwe." 
Nehemiah9:24 Kale abaidhukulu abo bangira mu nsi eyo, baagitwala yaaba yaibwe ku bwaibwe. Waabaghangulira Abakanaani abaali abatyamye baamu. Bakyabazinga Abakanaani n'abantu baibwe, waabata mu ngalo dh'abaidhukulu abo, okubakola kye benda." 
Nehemiah9:25 Abaidhukulu abo baanhaga ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu baatoola eitaka eigimu n'endhu edhiidhwire ebintu ebirungi; baatoola ensulo ensime, amasamba ag'emizabbibu, n'ag'emiti emyoliva, n'ag'emiti egindi egy'ebibala kamaala. Kale baalyanga baigutanga era baageedha, beesanhukiza ku birungi ebingi bye wabagha." 
Nehemiah9:26 Aye abantu bo abo baakudheemera, baalobanga kukuwulira, baava ku Mateeka go. Baita abalanzi bo abaabalabulanga okubakyusa baire y'oli. Baakola ebintu kamaala ebikuvumagania." 
Nehemiah9:27 Kye wava n'obaghaayo mu ngalo edh'abazigu baibwe, abaabadaazadaaza. Nga bali mu kudaagadaaga batyo, baakulirira, waabawulira ng'oli mu igulu. Era olw'okusaasira kwo okungi einho, waabagheerezanga abanunuzi abaabanunulanga okuva mu ngalo dh'abazigu baibwe." 
Nehemiah9:28 Bwe baafunangamu emiraala, nga kabiri bairamu okwonoona. Era waabalekuliranga agho, abazigu baibwe baabafuganga. Ate bwe baakyukanga ni bakulirira, waabawuliranga ng'oli mu igulu. Emikuzi kamaala waabanunulanga olw'okusaasira kwo okutaloodheka." 
Nehemiah9:29 Waabalabulanga, basobole okukyuka bagondere amateeka go. Aye beekuluntaza, baaloba kugondera biragiro byo, baakola bukole bibi. Ate nga mu kutuukiriza ebiragiro omuntu mw'afunira obulamu. Aye baakolanga bwa mpwitu era baakalangusanga emyoyo gyaibwe, baaloba kukugondera." 
Nehemiah9:30 Waabaguminkiriza emyaka kamaala, era waata omwoyo gwo mu balanzi bo baje babalabule, aye nga basembye amatu gaibwe. Kyewava n'obaghaayo mu ngalo edh'abamaghanga agandi." 
Nehemiah9:31 Aye era olw'okusaasira kwo okutaloodheka, tiwabalekulira agho waire okubazikiriza, kuba oli Katonda wa kivunika era asaasira." 
Nehemiah9:32 Wo Katonda waife omukologho, oli w'amaani era wa ntiisa. Iwe okuuma endagaano era waagonza abantu obutakoma. Agho ni, ebizibu byonabyona ebyatwidhira, ife ni bakyabazinga baife, n'abakungu baife, ni bakabona baife, n'abalanzi baife, ni badhaadha baife, n'abantu bo boonaboona, okuviira irala ku byanda bya bakyabazinga ba Assiria, okutuusa ni ye buli eno, otabitwala ng'ekintu ekitono." 
Nehemiah9:33 Aye ate, mu byonabyona ebyatutuukaku, iwe wali mutuufu okutubonereza, kuba iwe wasigala ng'oli mwesigwa, aye ife twayonoona bwonoone." 
Nehemiah9:34 Bakyabazinga baife, n'abakungu baife, ni bakabona baife, ni badhaadha baife, tibaagemanga Mateeka go, oba okujiiranga ku biragiro byo, waire okufangayo ku kulabula kwo." 
Nehemiah9:35 Tibaakyuka ni bava ku bibi byaibwe kukugheereza, waire nga mu bwakyabazinga bwaibwe wabagha ebirungi kamaala, baaba mu ensi engazi era engimu." 
Nehemiah9:36 Bona, mperaano tuli bairu bwiru mu nsi ye wagha badhaadha baife okubangamu n'okulyanga ebibala byamu, n'ebirungi ebindi ebigirimu byonabyona." 
Nehemiah9:37 Bakyabazinga be wataagho okutufuganga, n'abatwala ebyo ebiva mu nsi eyo, olw'okuba twayonoona. Bali n'obuyinza okukola kye benda ku byayo byaife ni ku ife beene. Kale tuli mu bughafu obutoogerekeka.”" 
Nehemiah9:38 “Olw'ebyo byonabyona, kyetuva tuli kukola endagaano enkakafu mu bughandiike. Era abakungu baife, n'Abalevi baife, ni bakabona baife, bagitaireku ebinkumu byaibwe.”" 
Nehemiah10:1 Bano n'abantu abaataaku ebinkumu byaibwe: Nehemia eyali omufuzi era nga mutabane wa Hakalia, ni Zedekia. Bano ni bakabona abataaku ebinkumu byaibwe:" 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraia, ni Azaria, ni Yeremia," 
Nehemiah10:3 ni Pashuhuri, ni Amaria, ni Malikiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 ni Hattushi, ni Shebania, ni Malluki," 
Nehemiah10:5 ni Harimu, ni Meremothi, ni Obadia," 
Nehemiah10:6 ni Danieli, ni Ginnethoni, ni Baruku," 
Nehemiah10:6 ni Danieli, ni Ginnethoni, ni Baruku," 
Nehemiah10:7 ni Meshullamu, ni Abiya, ni Miyamini," 
Nehemiah10:8 ni Maazia, ni Biligai, ni Shemaia." 
Nehemiah10:9 Bano n'Abalevi abaataaku ebinkumu byaibwe: Yeshua mutabane wa Azania, ni Binnui owundi ku batabane ba Henadadi, ni Kadimieli." 
Nehemiah10:10 Ni baganda baibwe bano: Shebania, ni Hodia, ni Kelita, ni Pelaia, ni Hanani," 
Nehemiah10:11 ni Mika, ni Rehobu, ni Hashabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 ni Zakkuri, ni Sherebia, ni Shebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 ni Hodia, ni Bani, ni Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Bano n'abakulembeze ab'abantu abaataaku ebinkumu byaibwe: Paroshi, ni Pahathi Moabu, ni Elamu, ni Zattu, ni Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 ni Bunni, ni Azigadi, ni Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 ni Adoniya, ni Bigivai, ni Adini," 
Nehemiah10:17 ni Ateri, ni Hezekia, ni Azzuri," 
Nehemiah10:18 ni Hodia, ni Hashumu, ni Bezai," 
Nehemiah10:19 ni Harifu, ni Anathothi, ni Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 ni Magipiashi, ni Meshullamu, ni Hezira," 
Nehemiah10:21 ni Meshezabeli, ni Zadoki, ni Yaddua," 
Nehemiah10:22 ni Pelatia, ni Hanani, ni Anaia," 
Nehemiah10:23 ni Hoshea, ni Hanania, Hassihubu," 
Nehemiah10:24 ni Halloheshi, ni Piliha, ni Shobeki," 
Nehemiah10:25 ni Rehumu, ni Hashabina, ni Maaseia," 
Nehemiah10:26 ni Ahia, ni Hanani, ni Anani," 
Nehemiah10:27 ni Malluki, ni Harimu, ni Baana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Ife Abaisiraeli abasigairegho twenatwena tuli kitole: bakabona, n'Abalevi, n'abakuumi ab'emiryango, n'abembi, n'abagheereza ab'omu isinzizo, n'abo boonaboona abeeyawula ku bantu b'omu kiketezo kino ni bagonderanga Amateeka ga Katonda, nga bali ghalala ni bakazi baibwe, ni batabane baibwe, ni baghala baibwe, boonaboona abalimu amagezi n'okutegeera." 
Nehemiah10:29 Tweyimba ku baganda baife, n'abakungu, nga tulayira tuti: “Tukolimirwanga bwe tulobanga okujiira ku Mateeka ga Katonda, ge yatugha ng'abita mu mugheereza we Musa, era ni tuloba okwegenderezanga okukola ng'ebiragiro bya Musengwa Katonda waife n'amateeka ge goonagoona bwe gakoba." 
Nehemiah10:30 Titwidha kufumbirwagananga na bamaghanga gandi, nga tughaayo baghala baife okubayira batabane baibwe, oba okutoola baghala baibwe okubayira batabane baife." 
Nehemiah10:31 Abamaghanga agandi abo bwe banaaleetanga eby'okulya oba ebintu ebindi byonabyona okubitunda ku Sabbato, oba ku lunaku olundi olutukuvu, titwidha kubagulangaku. “Buli mwaka ogwomusanvu titwidha kukungulanga bibala bya mu misiri, era twidha kusonighanga abantu amabandha ge tubabandha." 
Nehemiah10:32 “Buli mwaka twidha kutoolanga guraamu itaanu edha feeza, kiisi muntu, tudhigheeyo dhikole emirimo mu isinzizo lya Katonda waife." 
Nehemiah10:33 Era twidha kughangayo ebintu bino: emigaati egigheebwayo eri Katonda, n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke ebya buli lunaku, n'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ebya buli lunaku, n'ebigheebwayo ku buli lwa Sabbato, n'ebigheebwayo ku mbaga ey'Ekibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, n'ebigheebwayo ku mbaga edh'ebibinuko ebindi ebyalagirwa, n'ebintu ebindi ebitukuvu, n'ebigheebwayo ku lw'Abaisiraeli olw'okutoolebwaku ebibi. Twidha kughangayo n'ebintu ebindi byonabyona ebyetaagisa mu isinzizo." 
Nehemiah10:34 “Ife Abaisiraeli abandi, ni bakabona, n'Abalevi, twidha kukubanga akalulu buli mwaka okubona abanaaleetanga ekigheebwayo eky'enku mu isinzizo lya Katonda waife, olw'okwokya ebigheebwayo ku alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda waife, nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka. Ekyo twidha kukikolanga nga tujiira ku nda dha baiseife." 
Nehemiah10:35 “Tweyamye okuleetanga mu isinzizo buli mwaka, ebirime bye tunaasookanga okukungula mu misiri gyaife, n'ebibala bye tunaasookanga okunoga ku miti gyonagyona egy'ebibala." 
Nehemiah10:36 “Twidha kutwalanga batabane baife ababeri, ye bakabona mu isinzizo, tubaghengayo eri Musengwa Katonda nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka. Era twidha kughangayo eri Musengwa Katonda oyo, ente dhaife, n'embuzi, n'entaama, edhinaazaalibwanga mu luzaalo olusooka." 
Nehemiah10:37 “Buli mwaka twidha kuleetanga eri bakabona mu isinzizo, engaano ye tunaasookanga okukanda, n'ebintu ebindi, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, n'ebibala eby'oku miti egya buli nsambo. “N'Abalevi twidha kubaleeteranga ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi bye tufuna mu itaka lyaife, kuba Abalevi n'abasoloza ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu ikumi ebifunibwa mu byalo byaife byonabyona ye tulimira." 
Nehemiah10:38 Bakabona baidhukulu ba Aaroni baidha kubangagho ng'Abalevi bafuna ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu eikumi ebyo. Era Abalevi abo baidha kutoolanga ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi ku ebyo bye bafunie, babitwale babite mu iterekero ly'eisinzizo." 
Nehemiah10:39 Abaisiraeli abandi, n'Abalevi, baidha kutwalanga emere ey'empeke esondeibwa, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, babite mu iterekero omukuumirwa ebintu ebikozesebwa mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, okumpi n'ekifo bakabona abali ku mulimo, n'abakuumi, n'abembi, ghe baba. “Bwenebwene titwidha kulekuliranga agho ndhu ya Katonda waife.”" 
Nehemiah11:1 Agho abakulembeze b'abantu baasenga mu Yerusalemu baabanga omwo, aye abantu abaasigalagho abandi baakuba obululu okulonda omuntu omulala omulala ku buli bantu eikumi, okubanga mu Yerusalemu ekibuga ekitukuvu. Ate bale omwenda abasigalagho ku buli bantu eikumi, nga ba kubanga mu bibuga ebindi." 
Nehemiah11:2 Era abantu nga basanhukira inho omuntu asalagho ku lulwe okuja okubanga mu Yerusalemu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Aye Abaisiraeli abandi, ni bakabona, n'Abalevi, n'abagheereza b'omu isinzizo, n'abaidhukulu ab'abagheereza ba Solomoni, nga buli muntu aba mu kibandha kye ekiri mu kibuga eky'ewaibwe. Bano n'abatyamye abakulu ab'omu kiketezo ekyo ekya Buyudaaya, abaabanga mu Yerusalemu:" 
Nehemiah11:4 Mwalimu abandi ku baidhukulu ba Yuda, n'abandi ku baidhukulu ba Benjamini. Mu baidhukulu ba Yuda mwalimu: Athaia mutabane wa Uzzia era mwidhukulu wa Zekaria, Zekaria yaaba mutabane wa Amaria, Amaria yaaba mutabane wa Shefatia, Shefatia yaaba mutabane wa Mahalaleli asimuka mu Perezi mutabane wa Yuda." 
Nehemiah11:5 Mwalimu ni Maaseia mutabane wa Baruku, Baruku yaaba mutabane wa Kolihoze, Kolihoze yaaba mutabane wa Hazaia, Hazaia yaaba mutabane wa Adaia, Adaia yaaba mutabane wa Yoiaribu, Yoiaribu yaaba mutabane wa Zekaria asimuka mu Shela mutabane wa Yuda." 
Nehemiah11:6 Abantu boonaboona abaasimuka mu Perezi abaabanga mu Yerusalemu baali ebikumi bina na nkaaga na munaana (468), nga boonaboona bantu abaziramu ntete." 
Nehemiah11:7 Mu baidhukulu ba Benjamini mwalimu: Sallu mutabane wa Meshullamu, Meshullamu yaaba mutabane wa Yoedi, Yoedi yaaba mutabane wa Pedaia, Pedaia yaaba mutabane wa Kolaia, Kolaia yaaba mutabane wa Maaseia, Maaseia yaaba mutabane wa Ithieli, ate Ithieli yaaba mutabane wa Yeshaia." 
Nehemiah11:8 Baidhukulu ba Benjamini abandi baali, Gabbai ni Sallai. Ababenjamini boonaboona abaabanga mu Yerusalemu baali lwenda n'abiri na munaana (928)." 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoeli mutabane wa Zikuri n'eyali omukulembeze waibwe, ate Yuda mutabane wa Hassenua n'eyaiririranga omukulu ow'ekibuga." 
Nehemiah11:10 Mu bakabona mwalimu: Yedaia mutabane wa Yoiaribu, ni Yakini," 
Nehemiah11:11 ni Seraia mutabane wa Hilikia, Hilikia mutabane wa Meshullamu, Meshullamu yaaba mutabane wa Zadoki, Zadoki yaaba mutabane wa Meraiothi, Meraiothi yaaba mutabane wa Ahitubu, eyali Omukulu wa Bakabona akulira eisinzizo." 
Nehemiah11:12 Abantu boonaboona aghalala abaagheerezanga mu isinzizo baali lunaana n'abiri na babiri (822). Okwo nga kw'otaire ni Adaia mutabane wa Yerohamu, Yerohamu mutabane wa Pelalia, Pelalia yaaba mutabane wa Amuzi, Amuzi yaaba mutabane wa Zekaria, Zekaria yaaba mutabane wa Pashuhuri, ate Pashuhuri yaaba mutabane wa Malikiya." 
Nehemiah11:13 Adaia oyo ni baganda be boonaboona aghalala, baali abantu ebikumi bibiri n'ana na babiri (242) abaakuliranga endha dha baiseibwe. Ate kabona owundi nga ni Amashisai mutabane wa Azareli, Azareli mutabane wa Ahazai, Ahazai yaaba mutabane wa Meshillemothi, Meshillemothi yaaba mutabane wa Immeri." 
Nehemiah11:14 Abo boonaboona ghalala ni baganda baibwe, baali abantu kikumi n'abiri na munaana (128) nga balwani ba maani abaziramu ntete. Omukulu waibwe yali Zabadieli mutabane wa Haggedolimu." 
Nehemiah11:15 Mu Balevi mwalimu: Shemaia mutabane wa Hassihubu, Hassihubu mutabane wa Azarikamu, Azarikamu yaaba mutabane wa Hashabia, ate Hashabia yaaba mutabane wa Bunni." 
Nehemiah11:16 Okwo nga kw'otaire Shabbethai ni Yozabadi abandi ku Balevi abakulu, abaalabiriranga emirimo egy'okuliya okw'eisinzizo." 
Nehemiah11:17 Waataaku ni Mattania mutabane wa Mika, Mika yaaba mutabane wa Zabadi, ate Zabadi yaaba mutabane wa Asafu, eyakulemberanga okusaba okw'okwebaza mu isinzizo. Waataaku ni Bakabukia, eyaiririranga Mattania, ni Abada mutabane wa Shammua, Shammua mutabane wa Galali, ate Galali yaaba mutabane wa Yeduthuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Abalevi boonaboona aghalala abaabanga mu Yerusalemu ekibuga ekitukuvu, baali ebikumi bibiri na kinaana na bana (284)." 
Nehemiah11:19 Mu bakuumi ab'emiryango egy'eisinzizo mwalimu: Akkubu, ni Talimoni, ni baganda baibwe. Boonaboona aghalala baali abantu kikumi na nsanvu na babiri (172)." 
Nehemiah11:20 Abaisiraeli abandi, ni bakabona, n'Abalevi, baabanga mu bibuga ebindi byonabyona ebya Buyudaaya, nga buli muntu aba mu kibandha kye." 
Nehemiah11:21 Aye abantu abaagheerezanga mu isinzizo, baabanga mu Yerusalemu mu kiketezo ekyetebwa Ofeli, era Ziha ni Gishipa nga n'abalabirira emirimo gyaibwe." 
Nehemiah11:22 Eyalabiriranga Abalevi abaabanga mu Yerusalemu yali nga ni Uzzi mutabane wa Bani, Bani mutabane wa Hashabia, Hashabia mutabane wa Mattania, ate Mattania yaaba mutabane wa Mika. Uzzi ono yali asimuka mu Asafu, era ab'oku nda ya Asafu oyo n'abaali abembi mu isinzizo." 
Nehemiah11:23 Era kyabazinga yali nga yataagho enkola abembi abo ye baajiirangaku mu kukola omulimo gwaibwe buli lunaku. 
Nehemiah11:24 Pethahia mutabane wa Meshezabeli ow'oku nda ya Zera mutabane wa Yuda, n'eyayogererangayo abantu ye kyabazinga." 
Nehemiah11:25 Abantu abandi baabanga mu bibuga ni mu byalo ebyabanga okumpi n'enimiro dhaibwe. Ab'ekika kya Yuda nga baba mu bibuga Kiriathi Araba, ni Diboni, ni Yekabizeeli, ni mu byalo ebibyezungulwire." 
Nehemiah11:26 Abandi nga baba mu bibuga Yeshua, ni Molada, ni Bethipeleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 ni Hazarishualo, ni Beerisheba, ni mu byalo ebibyezungulwire." 
Nehemiah11:28 Abandi baaba mu bibuga Zikulaga, ni Mekona, ni mu byalo ebibyezungulwire." 
Nehemiah11:29 Abandi baaba mu bibuga Enarimmoni, ni Zora, ni Yaramuthi," 
Nehemiah11:30 ni Zanoa, ni Adullamu, ni mu byalo ebibyezungulwire. Ate abandi baaba mu Lakishi, ni mu masamba agakiriinaine, ni mu Azeka, ni mu byalo ebikyezungulwire. Kale kyaba nti ab'ekika kya Yuda baabanga mu kiketezo ekiri ghagati gha Beerisheba n'ekiiko ky'e Hinnomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ab'ekika kya Benjamini nga baba mu kibuga Geba, n'okweyongerayo okutuuka e Mikamashi, Aiya, Betheli, ni mu byalo ebibyezungulwire." 
Nehemiah11:32 Abandi baaba mu Anathothi, ni mu Nobu, ni mu Anania," 
Nehemiah11:33 ni mu Hazori, ni mu Rama, ni mu Gittaimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 ni mu Hadida, ni mu Zeboimu, ni mu Neballati," 
Nehemiah11:35 ni mu Lodi, ni mu Ono, ni mu kiiko eky'abagheesi." 
Nehemiah11:36 Ghaligho ebikunsu eby'Abalevi ebyabanga mu kiketezo kya Yuda, ebyasengulwa ni biizibwa mu kiketezo kya Benjamini." 
Nehemiah12:1 Luno n'olukalala lwa bakabona n'Abalevi abaira okuva mu bunhage, ni Zerubbabeli mutabane wa Shealutieli, era ni Yeshua. Seraia, ni Yeremia, ni Ezera," 
Nehemiah12:2 ni Amaria, ni Malluki, ni Hattushi," 
Nehemiah12:3 ni Shekania, ni Rehumu, ni Meremothi," 
Nehemiah12:4 ni Iddo, ni Ginnethoi, ni Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 ni Miyamini, ni Maadia, ni Biliga," 
Nehemiah12:6 ni Shemaia, ni Yoiaribu, ni Yedaia," 
Nehemiah12:7 ni Sallu, ni Amoki, ni Hilikia, ni Yedaia. Abo n'abaakuliranga bakabona banaibwe mu biseera Yeshua ghe yabeera Kabona Omukulu." 
Nehemiah12:8 Abalevi baali bano: Yeshua, ni Binnui, ni Kadimieli, ni Sherebia, ni Yuda, ni Mattania. Abo n'abaakulemberanga enhembo edh'okwebaza ni Balevi banaibwe abandi." 
Nehemiah12:9 Ate Bakabukia, ni Unni, ni Balevi banaibwe abandi nga n'abeemerera emberi gh'abo, okwemba eby'okwiramu." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yeshua yazaala Yoiakimu, Yoiakimu yaazaala Eliashibu, Eliashibu yaazaala Yoiada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoiada yaazaala Yonathani, Yonathani yaazaala Yaddua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Mu biseera bya Yoiakimu, bano n'abaakuliranga enda dha bakabona: Meraia nga n'akulira enda ya Seraia; Hanania yaakulira eya Yeremia;" 
Nehemiah12:13 Meshullamu yaakulira eya Ezera; Yehohanani yaakulira eya Amaria; 
Nehemiah12:14 Yonathani yaakulira eya Malluki; Yosefu yaakulira eya Shebania; 
Nehemiah12:15 Adana yaakulira eya Harimu; Helikai yaakulira eya Meraiothi; 
Nehemiah12:16 Zekaria yaakulira eya Iddo; Meshullamu yaakulira eya Ginnethoni; 
Nehemiah12:17 Zikiri yaakulira eya Abiya;... yaakulira eya Miniamini; Pilitai yaakulira eya Moadia; 
Nehemiah12:18 Shammua yaakulira eya Biliga; Yehonathani yaakulira eya Shemaia; 
Nehemiah12:19 Mattenai yaakulira eya Yoiaribu; Uzzi yaakulira eya Yedaia; 
Nehemiah12:20 Kallai yaakulira eya Sallai; Eberi yaakulira eya Amoki; 
Nehemiah12:21 Hashabia yaakulira eya Hilikia; ate Nethaneli yaakulira eya Yedaia. 
Nehemiah12:22 Mu biseera bya Eliashibu n'ebya Yoiada n'ebya Yohanani n'ebya Yaddua, bye baabeera nga n'Abakulu ba Bakabona, abakulu ab'enda edh'Abalevi aghalala n'abakulu ab'enda dha bakabona baaja nga baghandiikibwa okutuusa mu biseera Dario bye yabeeramu kyabazinga w'e Perusia." 
Nehemiah12:23 Aye abakulu ab'enda edh'Abalevi baaghandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'Ebyomubyanda bya Bakyabazinga, kutuuka bwa mu biseera bya Yohanani mutabane wa Eliashibu." 
Nehemiah12:24 Abalevi nga bakulemberwa Hashabia, ni Sherebia, ni Yeshua mutabane wa Kadimieli, beegabaniamu ebikunsu. Nga ku buli mukuzi ghabaagho ebikunsu bibiri ebiba biri kwemba enhembo edhisaaka n'okwebaza Katonda, ng'ekindi kiri kwemba eby'okwiramu, nga kyabazinga Daudi omuntu wa Katonda bwe yalagira." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mattania, ni Bakabukia, ni Obadia, ni Meshullamu, ni Talimoni, ni Akkubu, n'abaali abaigazi b'emiryango abaakuumanga amaterekero agaali ku miryango." 
Nehemiah12:26 Abantu abo baaligho mu kiseera kya Yoiakimu mutabane wa Yeshua era mwidhukulu wa Yozadaki, ni mu kiseera kya Nehemia eyali omufuzi, ni mu kya Ezera eyali kabona era omunamateeka." 
Nehemiah12:27 Ekiseera bwe kyatuuka okutukuza ekimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga Yerusalemu, baasoloza Abalevi boonaboona ye baali baba, baidhe beeyimbe mu mukolo ogwo ogw'okusagamba n'okwebaza, nga bemba enhembo era nga bakubiraku ebide, n'entongooli, n'endingidi." 
Nehemiah12:28 Abalevi ab'oku nda edh'abembi beesoloza okuva mu biketezo ebyezungulwire Yerusalemu ni mu byalo by'e Netofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 n'okuva e Bethigiligali, n'okuva mu kiketezo ky'e Geba ni mu Azimavethi kuba abembi baali basenze mu byalo ebyezungulwire Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah12:30 Agho bakabona n'Abalevi baakola omukolo ogw'okwetukuza, n'okutukuza abantu, n'emiryango, n'ekimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga." 
Nehemiah12:31 Agho naayeta abakulu ab'omu Buyudaaya, beesololeza ku kimante ghaigulu. Naabagemya ebikunsu by'abantu bibiri ebikologho, byatambula nga bija bwe byemba enhembo edheebaza Katonda. Ekikunsu ekindi kyasimbira ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha, ku ngulu ku kimante, nga kyolekeire omulyango ogwetebwa Ogwobusa." 
Nehemiah12:32 Hoshaia yaabavangaku einhuma, ng'ali n'ekitundu ku bakulu bale ab'omu Buyudaaya," 
Nehemiah12:33 ni Azaria, ni Ezera, ni Meshullamu," 
Nehemiah12:34 ni Yuda, ni Benjamini, ni Shemaia, ni Yeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 n'abandi ku bakabona abaajanga nga bafuuwa amagwala, bano: Zekaria mutabane wa Yonathani era mwidhukulu wa Shemaia, Shemaia yaaba mutabane wa Mattania, Mattania yaaba mutabane wa Mikaia, Mikaia yaaba mutabane wa Zakkuri, ate Zakkuri yaaba mutabane wa Asafu." 
Nehemiah12:36 Hoshaia oyo era yaaja n'aboluganda lwe abandi bano: Shemaia, ni Azareli, ni Milalai, ni Gilalai, ni Maai, ni Nethaneli, ni Yuda, ni Hanani, abaajanga nga bakuba ebivuga ng'ebya kyabazinga Daudi omuntu wa Katonda. Ezera omunamateeka n'eyabakulemberamu." 
Nehemiah12:37 Agho baatuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Ensulo, baaja busimbalaala baaniina amadaala ag'ekyetebwa Ekibuga kya Daudi, okutuuka ekimante ekyo ghe kibitira ku ndhu ya Daudi, olwo baatuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Amaadhi e buvandhuba w'ekibuga." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ekikunsu ekindi eky'abo abaali nga baidhie okwebaza, kyasimbira ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda, era nga boona bali ku ngulu ku kimante. Nze n'ekitundu kire ekyasigalagho ku bakulu b'omu Buyudaaya bale, twabanonereza. Twabita ku kyetebwa Ekituuti Ekyebyokero, twatuuka ku kyetebwa Ekimante Ekigazi." 
Nehemiah12:39 Bwe twava agho, twatuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango Ogwa Efuraimu, era twaja twatuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango Omukaire. Era tweyongerayo twatuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Ebyenhandha, ni ku kyetebwa Ekituuti ekya Hananeli, era ni ku kyetebwa Ekituuti Ekyekikumi. Bwe twava agho twatuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango gw'Entaama, olwo twatuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango Ogwabakuumi, era twakoma agho." 
Nehemiah12:40 Kale ebikunsu ebyo byombi eby'abo abaali nga baidhie okwebaza, byatuuka aghali eisinzizo. Ninze zeena, nga ndi ghalala n'ekitundu kire ekyasigalagho ku bakulu b'omu Buyudaaya bale, twayemerera agho," 
Nehemiah12:41 aghalala ni bakabona bano: Eliakimu, ni Maaseia, ni Miniamini, ni Mikaia, ni Elioenai, ni Zekaria, ni Hanania, nga bali kufuuwa amagwala gaibwe." 
Nehemiah12:42 Ni bakabona bano boona baayemerera agho: Maaseia, ni Shemaia, ni Eleazari, ni Uzzi, ni Yehohanani, ni Malikiya, ni Elamu, ni Ezeri. Abembi baayemba nga bakulemberwa Yezerahia." 
Nehemiah12:43 Ku lunaku olwo baaghaayo emisengo kamaala inho, nga basagamba olw'okuba Katonda yabagha eisanhu lingi inho. Abakazi n'abaana boona baasagamba, era okusanhuka okwali mu Yerusalemu kwatuuka ghala inho okuva agho." 
Nehemiah12:44 Ku lunaku olwo baataagho abantu ab'okulabiriranga amaterekero omwateebwanga ebigheebwayo eby'eisinzizo bino: ebirime ebisooka okukungulwa, n'ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu ikumi omuntu by'afuna. Era mu materekero omwo, mwe baasololezanga emigabo egyagheebwanga bakabona n'Abalevi okuva mu misiri egya buli kibuga, ng'Amateeka bwe galagira. Abayudaaya baakola batyo kuba baasanhukira inho ensambo bakabona n'Abalevi ye baagheerezangamu Katonda," 
Nehemiah12:45 nga baakola emikolo egy'okwetukuza, n'emikolo egindi, ng'oti n'abembi boona bwe baakolanga ogw'okwemba, n'abakuumi b'emiryango ni baakola ogw'okukuuma, bajiira ku kiragiro kya Daudi ni mutabane we Solomoni." 
Nehemiah12:46 Okuviira irala mu biseera bya Daudi ni Asafu, ghaabangagho akulira abembi era ghaabangagho n'enhembo edh'okusaaka n'edh'okwebaza Katonda." 
Nehemiah12:47 Era mu biseera bya Zerubbabeli ni mu bya Nehemia, Abaisiraeli boonaboona baaghangayo omugabo buli lunaku gwe baaghanga abembi n'abakuumi ab'emiryango. Era baaghangayo n'emigabo gy'Abalevi, ate Abalevi boona baayawulanga ku egyo, baaghaaku abaana ba Aaroni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Ku lunaku olwo baasoma mu kitabo kya Musa ng'abantu boonaboona bawulira. Baayagaanamu nga kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Omuammoni n'Omumoabu yeenayeena, taabalirwenga mu bantu ba Katonda," 
Nehemiah13:2 kuba abantu abo baaloba okugha Abaisiraeli emere n'amaadhi mu lugendo lwaibwe nga buli kuva e Misiri. Era baagulirira Balaamu abakolimire. Aye Katonda waife mu kifo eky'ekikolimo, yaatughaamu nkabi.”" 
Nehemiah13:3 Abantu bwe baawulira eiteeka eryo, baayawula mu Baisiraeli abantu boonaboona abaasimuka mu bamaghanga agandi." 
Nehemiah13:4 Ebyo nga bikaali kubaagho, Eliashibu kabona eyateebwagho okukuliranga ebimante by'omu isinzizo lya Katonda waife, yali ali n'enkolagana ni Tobia." 
Nehemiah13:5 Kale yaaghaaku Tobia oyo ekisenge ekinene, mu kusooka kye baatangamu: ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke, n'obubbaani, n'ebintu ebikozesebwa mu isinzizo, n'ebigheebwayo eby'ekitundu ekirala ekirala ku buli bitundu eikumi omuntu bye yafunanga eky'engaano, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva. Ebintu ebyo, kyabanga kya iteeka nga bali n'okubigha: Abalevi, n'abembi, n'abakuumi ab'emiryango, era nga bali n'okusoloza eby'okugha bakabona." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ate ebyo byaja okubaagho nga nze tiri mu Yerusalemu, kuba mu mwaka ogwamakumi asatu n'ebiri (32) ogw'obufuzi bwa kyabazinga Arutazerizesi ow'e Babilonia, nali nga njiire Babilonia ye kyabazinga mwene oyo. Aye nga ghabiseeghooku entangama, naamusaba yanganha, naira e Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah13:7 Bwe natuuka e Yerusalemu, naakizuula ekibi ekyo Eliashibu kabona kye yakola, okugha Tobia ekisenge ekiri mu isinzizo lya Katonda waife." 
Nehemiah13:8 Naasungughala inho era naatoola mu kisenge ekyo ebintu bya Tobia byonabyona, naabisuula kuliya." 
Nehemiah13:9 Agho naalagira batukuze ekisenge ekyo. Bwe baamala okukitukuza naizaamu ebintu ebikozesebwa mu isinzizo, n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke, n'obubbaani." 
Nehemiah13:10 Era naakizuula nti Abalevi n'abembi baali tibakaafuna migabo gyaibwe, kale nga baalumuka ku mirimo gyaibwe, buli muntu yairirayo mu kibandha kye." 
Nehemiah13:11 Kale neemuluguunhiza abafuzi nti: “Lwaki endhu ya Katonda mugirese bw'agho mutyo?” Agho naamala naaja, naasoloza Abalevi n'abembi, naabaiza ku mirimo gyaibwe." 
Nehemiah13:12 Olwo Abayudaaya boonaboona baatoolera okuleeta mu materekero ekitundu ekirala ekirala ku buli bitundu eikumi omuntu by'afuna eky'engaano, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva." 
Nehemiah13:13 Agho naataagho abantu bano babenga abaghanika mu materekero ago: Shelemia kabona, Zadoki omunamateeka, ni Pedaia Omulevi. Era naabagha Hanani mutabane wa Zakkuri era mwidhukulu wa Mattania, okubayambangaku. Abantu abo baali nga bamanhiibwa okuba abeesigwa, era omulimo gwaibwe gwali gwa kughanga Balevi banaibwe emigabo gyaibwe." 
Nehemiah13:14 Naasaba nti: “Wo Katonda wange, oteerabiranga ebyo ebirungi bye nkoleire eisinzizo lyo, n'emirimo gye bakoleramu okukusinza." 
Nehemiah13:15 “Mu biseera ebyo, naabonanga mu Buyudaaya abantu abakunha omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ku lunaku lwa Sabbato! Abandi baatwikanga ku ndogoyi dhaibwe, emungo edh'engaano, n'omwenge gw'emizabbibu, n'emizabbibu gyene, n'ebibala eby'emiti emitiini, n'emigugu egya buli nsambo. Abantu abo naababonanga nga baleeta ebintu ebyo mu Yerusalemu ku lunaku lwa Sabbato! Aye nze naabalabulanga obutatunda kintu kyonakyona ku lunaku lwa Sabbato." 
Nehemiah13:16 Ghaabaagho n'abantu ab'e Tiro abaabanga mu Yerusalemu, baaleetanga ebyenhandha n'eby'amatano ebya buli nsambo, baabiguza Abayudaaya ku lwa Sabbato mu Yerusalemu!" 
Nehemiah13:17 Kale neemuluguunhiza abakungu mu Buyudaaya: ‘Lwaki muli kukola ekibi kino eky'okwonoona olunaku lwa Sabbato? 
Nehemiah13:18 Badhaadha baimwe batyo ti bwe baakola, memale Katonda n'atuleetaku obuzibu buno bwonabwona, ife ni ku kibuga kino? Aye ate kabiri muli kwenda kuleetera Katonda oyo okusungughalira Isiraeli, nga mwonoona olunaku lwa Sabbato.’”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Kale naalagira okwigalanga emiryango egingira mu Yerusalemu nga buli kuziba, ng'enkyo n'olunaaba olwa Sabbato, era girobe kwigulwanga okutuusa ng'olwa Sabbato lubise. Naata abandi ku bagheereza bange ku miryango egyo bagikuume, obutaikiriza kwingiza kintu kyonakyona mu Yerusalemu ku Sabbato." 
Nehemiah13:20 Olwo ku mikuzi ng'oti ebiri, abasuubuzi ghalala n'abo abaali batunda ebintu ebya buli nsambo, baasula kuliya kwa Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah13:21 Aye naabalabula nti: “Mulekere agho okusulanga okumpi n'ekisenge eky'ekibuga. Bwe munairayo okusulagho ndidha kubagema.” Okuva ku olwo tibairayo kwidhanga ku Sabbato. 
Nehemiah13:22 Kale naalagira Abalevi okwetukuza, bamale baje bakuume emiryango olw'okukuuma Sabbato nga ntukuvu. Agho naasaba nti: “Wo Katonda wange, oteerabiranga n'ekyo kyona kye nkoze. Nkweghemba onsaasirenga, ongonze obutalekera.”" 
Nehemiah13:23 Mu biseera ebyo, era naabona Abayudaaya abaabayiza abakazi abaava mu Ashidodi, ni mu Ammoni, ni mu Moabu." 
Nehemiah13:24 Nga buli mwana omulala ku baana baibwe ababiri, ayogera lulimi Olushidodi oba olulimi olundi, aye nga tibaidhi Luyudaaya." 
Nehemiah13:25 Naavumirira inho abasaadha abo, era naabakolimira. Ate abandi naabakuba, era naabakuunhuula n'enviiri. Naabalayiza mu liina lya Katonda nti: “Mutafumbirwagananga nabo, nga mughaayo baghala baimwe okubayira batabane baibwe, oba okutoola baghala baibwe okubayira batabane baimwe, oba okubayira imwe beene.”" 
Nehemiah13:26 Naabakoba nti: “Timwidhi nga Solomoni kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, abakazi ng'oti n'abo n'abaamuleetera okwonoona? Mu maghanga goonagoona tiyabaayooku kyabazinga eyali ng'oti ni ye, era Katonda we yamwenda inho yaamufuula kyabazinga wa Isiraeli yoonayoona. Aye ate abakazi abamaghanga agandi baamuleetera yeena okwonoona." 
Nehemiah13:27 Obwo twenatwena tujiire ku kibi ekitakobeka imwe kye mwakola, tughemukire Katonda waife nga tubayiza abakazi okuva mu maghanga agandi?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Owundi ku batabane ba Yehoiada mutabane wa Eliashibu eyali Omukulu wa Bakabona, yali yabayiza mughala wa Saniballati Omuhoroni. Kale naamubinga mu Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah13:29 Agho naasaba nti: “Wo Katonda wange, oteerabiranga ngeri ye boonoinemu obwakabona, ni basuula n'ere endagaano ye baakola ey'obwakabona n'Obulevi.”" 
Nehemiah13:30 Kale, naatukuza abantu okubatoolaku byonabyona eby'abamaghanga agandi. Naasengeka bukalamu emirimo gya bakabona n'Abalevi. Buli muntu yaamanha omulimo gwe." 
Nehemiah13:31 Era naakola entegeka abantu okuleetanga enku mu biseera ebituufu, edh'okwokya ebigheebwayo ku alutaari. Era n'okuleetanga ebigheebwayo byaibwe eby'ebirime ebisooka okukungulwa. Naasaba nti: “Wo Katonda wange, oteerabiranga ebyo bye nkoze. Nkweghemba ompenga ebirungi.”" 
Job1:1 Ghaaligho omusaadha mu nsi eyetebwa Uzi, ng'ayetebwa Yobu. Omusaadha oyo yali muntu aziraku musango era omwesimbu, ng'atya Katonda era nga yeekuuma obutakola kibi." 
Job1:2 Yali n'abaana abalenzi musanvu, n'abaana abaghala basatu." 
Job1:3 Yali n'entaama kasanvu (7,000), engamiya enkumi isatu (3,000), ente edhirima lukumi (1,000), endogoyi enkazi ebikumi bitaanu (500), era n'abairu kamaala inho. Omusaadha oyo n'eyali asinga okuba omukombe mu bantu ab'e buvandhuba boonaboona." 
Job1:4 Batabane be baafumbanga embaga mu mpalo, buli mulala mu ndhu ye, baayeta baanhinaibwe abasatu, baidha okulya n'okunhwa nabo." 
Job1:5 Enaku edh'embaga dhaibwe bwe dhaawangaku, Yobu yaabeetanga okubatukuza. Yaawuunanga mu nkyo, yaagheerayo buli muntu ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Kuba Yobu yakobanga mule ati: “Tomanha baana bange bwe baba nga baliku ekibi kye bakoze, ni bavuma Katonda mu myoyo gyaibwe.” Atyo Yobu bwe yakolanga buliidho." 
Job1:6 Olunaku lwali lulala, abakwenda ab'omu igulu baidha okweyandhula mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Ni Sitaani yeena yaidhiramu." 
Job1:7 Musengwa Katonda yaabuuza Sitaani ati: “Ova gha?” Sitaani yairamu Musengwa Katonda ati: “Nva kubitabita mu nsi, n'okugitambulatambulamu.”" 
Job1:8 Musengwa Katonda yaabuuza Sitaani ati: “Weekaliriisa bukalamu omugheereza wange Yobu? Omusaadha oyo azira amutuukaku kuba n'omuntu aziraku musango era omwesimbu, antya era eyeekuuma obutakola kibi.”" 
Job1:9 Agho Sitaani yairamu Musengwa Katonda ati: “Olowooza Yobu akutiira bwereere? 
Job1:10 Wamukolera olukomera okumwezunguluza mwene n'amaka ge, n'ebibye byonabyona by'ali nabyo. By'akola byonabyona obigha enkabi, n'obukombe bwe, bweyongeire obungi mu nsi." 
Job1:11 Aye mpegaano golola omukono gwo omutooleku byonabyona by'ali nabyo, aja ku kuvuma ng'obona n'okubona.”" 
Job1:12 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Sitaani ati: “Kale, byonabyona by'ali nabyo biri mu buyinza bwo. Aye mwene otamukolaku kabi.” Agho Sitaani yaava mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Job1:13 Lwali lulala, batabane ba Yobu ni baghala be bwe baali nga bali kulya era nga bali kunhwa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu mu ndhu ya muganda waibwe omukulu," 
Job1:14 omukwenda yaidha eri Yobu yaakoba ati: “Ente dhibaire dhiri kulima, n'endogoyi nga dhidhiriinaine agho dhiri kulya," 
Job1:15 abanhazi Abasabea baadhigwaku, baadhinhaga. Baita abagheereza bo boonaboona; era nze zenka ninze mponiegho okwidha okukukobera.”" 
Job1:16 Oyo yali akaayogera, owundi yaidha yaakoba ati: “Omuliro gwa Katonda gugwire nga guva mu igulu, gwazikiriza entaama n'abaayi ababaire nga bali kudhaaya; era nze zenka ninze mponiegho okwidha okukukobera.”" 
Job1:17 Oyo yali akaayogera, owundi yaidha yaakoba ati: “Abanhazi Abakaladea, nga beegabyemu ebikunsu bisatu, baidhie baagwa ku ngamiya, baadhinhaga. Baita abagheereza bo boonaboona; era nze zenka ninze mponiegho okwidha okukukobera.”" 
Job1:18 Oyo yali akaayogera, owundi yaidha yaakoba ati: “Batabane bo ni baghala bo babaire bali kulya era nga bali kunhwa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu mu ndhu ya muganda waibwe omukulu," 
Job1:19 kiwunga ow'amaani yaava mu irungu yaakuba ensonda eina edh'endhu, endhu yaabagwaku era bafiire; era nze zenka ninze mponiegho okwidha okukukobera.”" 
Job1:20 Agho Yobu yaasituka, yaakanulamu ekivaalo kye era yaamwa omutwe gwe olw'okunakughala, yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka, yaasinza Katonda." 
Job1:21 Yaakoba ati: “Mu nda ya maama navaamu nga ndi bwereere, era ndifa nga ndi bwereere. Musengwa Katonda n'eyampa ebyo, era Musengwa Katonda oyo n'atoiregho kale asaakibwe.”" 
Job1:22 Mu ebyo byonabyona ebyagwagho, Yobu tiyayonoona, waire okunenia Katonda." 
Job2:1 Kabiri olunaku olundi, abakwenda ab'omu igulu baidha okweyandhula mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Ni Sitaani yeena yaidhiramu okweyandhula mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Job2:2 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaabuuza Sitaani ati: “Ova gha?” Sitaani yairamu Musengwa Katonda ati: “Nva kubitabita mu nsi, n'okugitambulatambulamu.”" 
Job2:3 Musengwa Katonda yaabuuza Sitaani ati: “Weekaliriisa bukalamu omugheereza wange Yobu? Omusaadha oyo azira amutuukaku kuba n'omuntu aziraku musango era omwesimbu, antya era eyeekuuma obutakola kibi. Era akaagumiire ku bwesigwa bwe, waire nga iwe wagezaaku okundhikirizisa mmuzikirize eby'obwereere.”" 
Job2:4 Agho Sitaani yairamu Musengwa Katonda ati: “Ekigema ku mubiri gw'omuntu, n'ekimulumya. Omuntu aghaayo by'ali nabyo byonabyona olw'obulamu bwe." 
Job2:5 Aye mpegaano golola omukono gwo ogeme ku mubiri gwe, aja kukuvuma ng'obona n'okubona.”" 
Job2:6 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Sitaani ati: “Kale, wuuyo ali mu buyinza bwo. Aye mulekere obulamu.”" 
Job2:7 Agho Sitaani yaava mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, yaaja, yaaleetera omubiri gwa Yobu okumwaguka amabwa amabi einho, okuva ku mutwe okutuuka ku bigere." 
Job2:8 Yobu yaatoola akagyo ak'okweyagisanga ku mubiri, era yatyamanga mu ivu olw'okunakughala." 
Job2:9 Agho mukazi we yaamukoba ati: “Era okaagumiire ku bwesigwa bwo? Vuma Katonda, ofe.”" 
Job2:10 Aye Yobu yaamukoba ati: “Oli kwogera ng'oti n'abakazi abasirusiru bwe boogera. Obwo, tunaasanhukiranga birungi byonka Katonda by'atugha, twaloba kusanhukira bitunhiga by'atugha?” Mu ebyo byonabyona ebyagwagho Yobu tiyayogera bubi ku Katonda." 
Job2:11 Agho bakagwa ba Yobu basatu: Elifazi Omutemani, Bilidadi Omushuhi, ni Zofari Omunaamathi, bwe baawulira ebizibu byonabyona ebyamugwaku, bonsatuli baasalagho okuja okumugumya." 
Job2:12 Bwe baamulengera, tibaamutegeereragho. Aye bwe baamutegeera, baawowoola era baalira amaziga. Baakanula ebivaalo byaibwe olw'okunakughala, beeyugha enkungu mu mitwe, nga bwe bagimansa ghaigulu." 
Job2:13 Era baatyama naye ku itaka okumala enaku musanvu, omusana n'obwire, nga ghazira ayogera naye kibono. Kuba baabona ng'okudaazibwadaazibwa kwe yalimu kwali kunene." 
Job3:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, Yobu yaatoolera okwogera, yaakolima olunaku lwe yazaalirwaku." 
Job3:2 Yobu oyo yaakoba ati: 
Job3:3 “Olunaku lwe nazaalirwaku luzikirire, era n'obwire obwakoba buti omukazi atoire enda ya mwana mulenzi." 
Job3:4 Olunaku olwo lube lwa nzikiiza Katonda mu igulu alwerabire, n'endhuba erobe kulwakiraku." 
Job3:5 Enzikiiza etiisa einho erutwale. Ekire kiruwembeku endhuba erobe kulwakaku, lwidhule okutya." 
Job3:6 Obwire obwo maama bwe yatooleramu enda yange, bwidhule enzikiiza egemye bedimudimu. Butoolebwe mu nnaku edh'omwaka, bulobe kubalirwa mu myezi." 
Job3:7 Bwenebwene obwire obwo, bulobe kwirayo kubaamu mukazi wundi abutooleramu nda bulobe kuwulirwamu muzira naire." 
Job3:8 Obwire obwo bukolimirwe abo abakolimira enaku; abo abali n'obusobozi obw'okusiikuula Leviathani okukola kye benda. 
Job3:9 Emuunienie edh'oku nkyo dhirobe kuboneka mu bwire obwo; obutangaavu bulobe kubaagho, n'endhuba erobe kuvaayo nga bukyeire." 
Job3:10 Kuba obwire obwo bwaleka maama yaatoola enda yange, bwandeetera okudaagadaaga n'enaku nti." 
Job3:11 Lwaki tyafiiragho nga naakazaalibwa, ni ndhisa ogusembayo nga nva mu nda ya maama?" 
Job3:12 Lwaki maama yandera ku mubiri? Lwaki yaanhonsa amabeere? 
Job3:13 Kuba olwo nandifiire naasirika, era nanditendwike naawuumula," 
Job3:14 ghalala ni bakyabazinga n'abafuzi abandi ab'oku nsi, abaazimbira obuyaaka ebisaagaati ebyabanga ebifulukwa." 
Job3:15 Nanditendwike ghalala n'abalangira abaidhuzanga endhu dhaibwe zaabu ni feeza. 
Job3:16 Nandibaire nga ntooleibwagho ng'oti n'ekintu ekiviire mu nda eviiremu obuve, oba naaziikibwa ng'oti n'omwana azaalibwa nga mufu, atabona ku ndhuba naire." 
Job3:17 Eyo mu magombe, ababi balekera agho okutigomya abantu, era eyo, abaweekereiremu amaani ye bawuumulira." 
Job3:18 Eyo abasibe bafuna obugheereso, baawona okudhuukibwa abo ababasalira amakatala." 
Job3:19 Abantu ab'ebika n'ebika bali eyo, abamanhifu n'abatali bamanhifu, n'abairu nga tibakaafugibwa basengwa baibwe." 
Job3:20 Kigasa ki okuleka abantu abali mu nnaku, ni basigala nga bakaali balamu, n'okuleka abo abadaazibwadaazibwa okuba mu butangaavu?" 
Job3:21 Abantu abo beegomba okufa, aye okufa kwabeesamba; era banoonia okufa okusingaku n'ole ayagaaza ng'anoonia obukombe obwakwekebwa." 
Job3:22 Basangaala inho era baasagamba, bwe bafa ni bateebwa mu magombe." 
Job3:23 Lwaki Katonda agha abantu obulamu ng'ate ebiseera byaibwe eby'omu maiso bikwekeibwa, era lwaki abataaku olukomera?" 
Job3:24 Nze okulira n'okwafuuka emere yange, era okuwowoola okwange tikukoma." 
Job3:25 Ebintu bye ntya n'ebindidhira, era ebyo ebintiisa einho n'ebingwira." 
Job3:26 Nzira miraala waire obugheereso, bizibu byonka n'ebyesomba.”" 
Job4:1 Agho Elifazi Omutemani yairamu Yobu ati: 
Job4:2 “Bwe nnaayogeraku kinaakubisa bubi? Aye tighanga kwefuga ni ntabaaku ni kye ndhogera. 
Job4:3 Bona, oyegereisa abantu kamaala, era waagumya abanafu." 
Job4:4 Ole bwe yeekontola omugemerera, yaaguma, yaaloba kugwa." 
Job4:5 Aye buti bwe kituuse ku iwe, waawaamu obuguminkiriza era kikutenhiiza weeraliikirira." 
Job4:6 Katonda wamusinzanga, waaba mwesigwa y'ali era waaba muntu mwesimbu. Ekyo tikikugha isuubi?”" 
Job4:7 “Mpegaano sooka oidhukire: wawuliraku omuntu aziraku musango ng'asaaniziibwagho, oba omuntu omutuufu ng'azikiriziibwa?" 
Job4:8 Nze mboine ng'abantu abakola ebikolwa ebibi, bakungulamu bibi." 
Job4:9 Katonda abafuuwa omuuka ogw'obusungu bwe oguli ng'oti kiwunga, yaabazikiriza." 
Job4:10 Abantu ababi bawologoma ng'oti n'empologoma enkambwe, aye Katonda abasirisa era yaabamenha amaino." 
Job4:11 Bafa ng'oti n'empologoma edhizira kye dhiita kulya, n'abaana baibwe basansaana.”" 
Job4:12 “Lwali lulala naafuna obukwenda kisiriikiriza, nga buli mu kaama inho, kumpi ndobe n'okubuwulira." 
Job4:13 Nali mu kulogootana obwire, endoolo enhingi einho nga dhingemye." 
Job4:14 Entiisa yangema era naatengera; amagumba gange gaasagala. 
Job4:15 Empewo ey'omuzimu yanfuuwa mu maiso, enviiri dhampwa ku mutwe." 
Job4:16 Naabona ekintu ekyemereire agho; naamoga inho, aye naaloba kukitegeera. Woonawoona nga ghaligho kasiriikiriro. Agho naawulira eiroboozi nga likoba liti," 
Job4:17 ‘Omuntu alifa, asobola okuba omutuufu mu maiso ga Katonda? Oba, omuntu obuntu aghanga okuba omulongoofu mu maiso g'oyo Eyamutonda?" 
Job4:18 Oba nga Katonda tiyeesiga waire abo abamugheereza mu igulu, era ni bamalaika be boona abanenia olw'ensobi dhaibwe," 
Job4:19 memale obwo waalowooza oti aneesiga abantu abakolebwa mu itaka, abali ng'oti nkungu era b'asobola n'okuniantula ng'oti bisiisa." 
Job4:20 Okuzikirira kwaibwe tikutwala na kiseera. Baba balamu okuva ku nkyo, aye buja okutuuka eigulo nga babuzeegho, baaloba na kwidhukirwa." 
Job4:21 Bafa nga bakaali kuba na magezi; bye babaire nabyo byonabyona byatwalibwa abandi.’ ” 
Job5:1 “Mpegaano yeta, obone oba nga ghaligho anaakuvugira. Onaakyukira ye malaika ki anaakubeera?" 
Job5:2 Bwenebwene okweraliikirira kwita omusiru, n'ensaalwa eita azira magezi." 
Job5:3 Nabona omusiru eyambonekera okuba obulungi, aye nze mu kiseera kyene ekyo, naakolimira ekifo mw'aba." 
Job5:4 Abaana be baba mu kabi; emisango gyaibwe gisalirizibwa abalamuzi, ghaabula aboogererayo." 
Job5:5 By'akungula biriibwa abo abali endhala, baatoolayo n'ebyo ebyakulira mu mawa; obukombe bwe bwegombebwa abo ababuguniriire." 
Job5:6 Kuba okudaazibwadaazibwa tikumeruka kuva mu nkungu ng'oti nsigo, oba ebizibu okusibuka okuva mu itaka." 
Job5:7 Aye abantu beene n'abaazaalirwa okuba n'ebizibu, ng'oti n'obusambuka bw'omuliro bwe busambukira ghaigulu nga buva ku muliro.”" 
Job5:8 “Ngoli mbaire nga ninze, nandyebuuziiza ku Katonda, era Katonda oyo ye nandyandhuliire ensonga dhange." 
Job5:9 Oyo akola eby'amaani bye tutasobola kutegeera bukalamu, era n'ebyewuunhisa ebitabalika." 
Job5:10 Agwisa amaadhi ku nsi, yaafukirira enimiro." 
Job5:11 Abo abeisa ghansi abasitula, era yaagumya abo abali mu maziga, yaabatuusa ku kusagamba." 
Job5:12 Alemesa entegeka edh'ab'olugezigezi, baalemwa okudhituukiriza." 
Job5:13 Ategamu abagezi, ng'abita mu magezi gaibwe geene, era yaakomya mangu entegeka edh'abali n'enkwe." 
Job5:14 Omusana baba bali mu nzikiiza, era baaghaamanta mu kasana ghagati oti bwire." 
Job5:15 Aye Katonda awonia abaghafu okwitibwa; abali mu bwetaavu yaabawonia okutuntuzibwa ab'amaani. 
Job5:16 Olwo abaavu baaba n'eisuubi, era abakozi ab'ebibi baabula eky'okwogera." 
Job5:17 Bona eno, wa nkabi omuntu Katonda y'agolola okuva mu nsobi. Kale otanhoomanga kukangaivulwa kw'Oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona." 
Job5:18 Kuba aja yaakuba omuntu oluguma, aye yaamunhiga amabwa; akubisa engalo dhe omuntu, aye engalo dhe edho dhaamuwonia." 
Job5:19 Aidha kukuwonianga mu bizibu byonabyona; buliidho tootuukibwengaku kabi koonakoona. 
Job5:20 Aidha kukuwonianga okufa ng'endhala egwire, era akukugirenga mu lutalo olobe kwitibwa." 
Job5:21 Aidha kukuwonianga abakwogeraku eby'obuguya; toidha kutyanga kuzikirira, bwe kunaidhanga." 
Job5:22 Endhala n'okuzikirira, biidha kubanga kintu kitono inho y'oli, era ensolo edh'omu nsiko toidhanga kudhitya;" 
Job5:23 kuba mu nimiro yo timuubengamu mabaale, n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko tidhiikulumbenga." 
Job5:24 Oidha kubanga mugumu ng'oidhi oti mu ndhu yo oli miraala; era oidha kukeberanga mu byayo byo nga muziramu kibuze. 
Job5:25 Oidha kubanga n'abaidhukulu kamaala; eizaire lyo liidha kweyongeranga okwala ng'oti isubi ku nsi. 
Job5:26 Olifa waateebwa mu magombe ng'omaze okughangaala waawola, ng'oti n'engaano ye bakungwire mu biseera byayo ebituufu, n'ereetebwa ekubwe." 
Job5:27 Bona eno, ebyo ife twabyekebeedha, twabona nga bya mazima. Kale biwulire, obimanhe, ku lw'obulungi bwo.”" 
Job6:1 Agho Yobu yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job6:2 “Ngoli okweraliikira kwange kupimwa, era n'enaku yange n'eteebwa ku minzaani," 
Job6:3 byandisinze omusenho ogw'enhandha obuzito. Kale bye ndhogeire bibaire bya kwanguuyiriza. 
Job6:4 Kuba Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona ankubye obusaale bwe bwanhingira mu mubiri, obusagwa bwabwo bwabuna omubiri gwange. Katonda aleese ebitiisa by'ali nabyo, yaabisimbya enhiriri okuntanulaku olutalo." 
Job6:5 Endogoyi emeera ng'eri n'eisubi ly'erya? Oba, ente emoola ng'eri n'emere yaayo?" 
Job6:6 Ekintu ekiziramu nsa kiriika nga tikirungiirwamu muunhu? Oba, omuntu afunamu ki mu kulya ekintu ekitawooma?" 
Job6:7 Nzira mwoyo gwenda kulya bintu biri ng'oti n'ebyo, kuba bineenhinhasa okubirya.”" 
Job6:8 “Ngoli Katonda awulira kye nsaba, era n'ampa kye neegomba" 
Job6:9 Ngoli aganha okuuniantula, n'andhita!" 
Job6:10 Ekyo kyandindhizizaamu amaani, naasagamba, era neerabira n'obulumi obungi bwe ndimu; kuba tirobangaku Omutukuvu oyo by'alagira." 
Job6:11 Amaani gakaali gha, ge ndi nago okwongera okuba omulamu? Lwaki neeyongera okuba omulamu, nga nzira isuubi?" 
Job6:12 Nze ndi mugumu ng'oti ibaale, oba omubiri gwange guli ng'oti gwakolebwa mu kyuma kya kikomo?" 
Job6:13 Mu butuufu tikaali na maani geeyamba, era tikaali na kye nsobola.”" 
Job6:14 “Omuntu ali mu buzibu ng'oti ni buno bwe ndimu, agwaine okuyambibwa baine, ni bw'aba nga yeegaine Katonda oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona." 
Job6:15 Aye bakagwa bange tibeesigika, bali ng'oti n'obwiga obubaamuuku amaadhi, ate ni gamala gakamiira." 
Job6:16 Obwiga obwo bugema omuzira bwabbalanguka. 
Job6:17 Aye bwekusuugha bukamiira era bwabulagho, olw'omusana okubwokya." 
Job6:18 Abatambuze bava mu njira yaibwe, nga baagala amaadhi; baatambulatambula eyo batyo mu irungu, baazikirira." 
Job6:19 Ababise ab'e Tema baagala obwiga obwo n'abatambuze ab'e Sheba baata eisubi mu bwiga obwo. 
Job6:20 Aye baswala, kuba baabwesigira bwereere bwe babutuukaku ni batabona maadhi, basoberwa baayasaamirira." 
Job6:21 Mwena muli ng'oti n'obwiga obwo ye ndi, kuba mubona nga ndi mu kabi, mwatya butye." 
Job6:22 Mbakobyeku nti, ‘Mumpe ekirabo?’ Oba nti, ‘Mutoole ku byaimwe mugheeyo enguzi ku lwange?’" 
Job6:23 Oba nti, ‘Mumponie omuzigu?’ Oba nti, ‘Muununule mu ngalo edh'abo abaanhigiriza?’ ”" 
Job6:24 “Ka nsirike munsomese, munkobere mmanhe kye nasobya." 
Job6:25 Ebibono ebituufu bimatiza omuntu. Aye ebyo bye muli kwogera bigasa ki? 
Job6:26 Mudhuuba muti musobola okungalagira mu bye nkobye, ate nga beene imwe muli kumbona ng'omuntu ali kwogera eby'obwereere, ebiri ng'oti mpewo?" 
Job6:27 Imwe musobola n'okukubira ku bamulekwa akalulu olw'okubafunamu! Era musobola n'okukola ekintu kyonakyona ku bakagwa baimwe, olw'okubafunamu amagoba!" 
Job6:28 Aye mpegaano muuningirire mu maiso kuba tiibaguye nga muuningiriire. 
Job6:29 Mbeeghembye mweireku mwerowooze mulobe kunsibaku kibi. Mweireku mpegaano, mulobe kunsalira musango kunsinga, kuba ensonga dhange ntuufu." 
Job6:30 Ghaligho ekikyamu kye ndhogeire? Mudhuuba muti tisobola kwawulagho kirungi na kibi?” 
Job7:1 “Obulamu bw'omuntu buba bwa kukakaalukana ku nsi. Enaku dhe dhoonadhoona dhaaba dha kukola mirimo mikalangufu. 
Job7:2 Ng'omwiru bwe yeegomba okuwuumulaku mu kiwoleeze, era ng'omupakasi bw'asuubira empeera ye," 
Job7:3 zeena ntyo bwemala emyezi n'emyezi nga ghazira mugaso gwe nfuniemu, era obwire bwaira ku bwinaabwo nga nzira bugheereso." 
Job7:4 Bwenambaala obwire buba ng'oti n'obutaakye; neegalula mu buliri, neesinwa, naakoba mule nti, ‘Obwire bunaakya li?’" 
Job7:5 Omubiri gwange gwidhwire enhengere n'eiko; era gwidhwire bikobolo ebyesala ni bivaamu amasira. 
Job7:6 Enaku edh'obulamu bwange dhiziinhuuka okusinga empiso ey'ekyalaani; dhiwaaku mangu nga nzira isuubi lye ndi na lyo. 
Job7:7 Wo Katonda wange, idhukira nti obulamu bwange muuka buuka, tiriirayo kufuna isanhu." 
Job7:8 Eriiso ly'oyo aningirira buti tiririirayo kumbonaku kabiri; amaiso go galiinoonia aye nga tikaaligho.” 
Job7:9 “Ng'ekire bwe kiwaagho ni kibula, n'omuntu aika e magombe atyo bw'atairayo kuboneka." 
Job7:10 Tairayo kuba mu maka ge kabiri, waire abo be yabanga nabo okumwidhukira." 
Job7:11 Kale tiidha kusirika, ndidha kulira obughafu bwange, ndidha kwogera enaku endi ku mwoyo." 
Job7:12 Olowooza oti nze ndi nhandha oba ogusota ogw'omu nhandha, memale onteeku abankuuma?" 
Job7:13 Bwe nkoba nti, ‘Ekitanda kyange ka kimpegheezeeku; obuliri bwange buneerabizeeku ku kwemuluguunhia kwange,’" 
Job7:14 iwe ontiisa n'ebirooto, wandholeka ebinzindula." 
Job7:15 Nze mmala gatugibwa naafa, ntabaire magumba meereere nti." 
Job7:16 Neesiniirwa obulamu tikaayenda kubaagho nga ndi mulamu. Ndeka, kuba obulamu bwange bwa kaseera buseera." 
Job7:17 Omuntu katyo ni, ki iwe okumufaaku n'okumudhuuba," 
Job7:18 era n'okumwekebeedha buli nkyo, n'okumuleba buli kaseera?" 
Job7:19 Olikituusa gha obutantoolaku maiso, ni nsobola kumira ku matanta?" 
Job7:20 Bwemba nga nkoze ekibi, mba nkukozeeku kabi ki iwe alingiriza abantu? Lwaki nkufuukiire ekikuzitoogherera?" 
Job7:21 Kale lwaki tonsonigha kiisi kye nasobya kyonakyona, n'osasaagho ekibi kyange? Kuba mpegaano nja kufa nhingire eitaka, era olija okundhagala nga tikaaligho.”" 
Job8:1 Agho Bilidadi Omushuhi yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job8:2 “Onaatuusa gha okwogera ebibono ebyo, ebiri ng'empewo obuwewo?" 
Job8:3 Bwenebwene Katonda asobola okusaliriza ensonga? Oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, asobola okugha ensala etali ntuufu?" 
Job8:4 Abaana bo bateekwa okuba nga baakola ekibi baamusungughaza, kyeyava n'abagha ekibonerezo kyaibwe ekibasaana." 
Job8:5 Aye bw'onaakyuka n'ogondera Katonda, era n'omweghemba oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona," 
Job8:6 era bw'onaaba omwesimbu ng'oli mulongoofu, Katonda oyo taalobe kwidha kukubeera, nakukwirizaagho maka go agakusaaniire." 
Job8:7 Ebintu bye wafiirwa mu kusooka byali bitono inho, bw'obigerangerania ku ebyo by'olifuna mu biseera eby'oluvainhuma.”" 
Job8:8 “Ndi kukusaba weebuuze ku magezi ag'ab'eira weetegereze badhaadha bye baazuula. 
Job8:9 Kuba obulamu bwaife bumpi, tuzira kye twidhi; enaku dhe tumala ku nsi, dhiri ng'oti kinsense ekibita obubite." 
Job8:10 Bwenebwene ab'eira abo baidha kukwegeresa, era bakukobere bye baidhi." 
Job8:11 Ebitoogo bisobola okukulira aghazira kibali? Ebigada bighanga okukulira aghazira maadhi? 
Job8:12 Amaadhi bwe gakala, ebyo n'ebisooka ebimera ebindi byonabyona okuwotoka, waire nga biba bikaali kutuuka kutemebwa bikozesebwe." 
Job8:13 N'abantu abava ku Katonda batyo bwe baba; abatatya Katonda abo tibaba na isuubi. 
Job8:14 Ekintu kye beesiga kikutuka ng'oti wuuzi; ekibayinula kinafu ng'oti n'olutuula lwa nabumbuli. 
Job8:15 Bwebeesigama ku ndhu dhaibwe, dhigwa bugwe ni bwebadhigemerera, tidhigumiragho." 
Job8:16 Baba ng'oti n'ebimera ebiboneka obulungi ng'omusana gukaali kwaka, ensaga dhaabyo ni dheeyandhalira mu nimiro." 
Job8:17 Emizi gyabyo gikunkuna mu mmungo y'amabaale, era gyerangira ku buli ibaale." 
Job8:18 Aye bwe babiighagho mu kifo ekyo, biba nga tibikaidhukirwa nga byalighooku." 
Job8:19 Oboine, eisanhu ery'ababi tiriraalagho kumala ntangama, era ababi abandi bamala baidha baira mu kifo ky'abo.”" 
Job8:20 Aye Katonda talekulira agho bantu baziraku musango, ate tayamba bakozi ba bibi." 
Job8:21 Aidha kukwiza enseko ku matama, era okube emizira." 
Job8:22 Aidha kuleetera abakukyagha okuswala einho, era asaaniegho endhu edh'abakozi b'ebibi." 
Job9:1 Agho Yobu yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job9:2 “Bwenebwene ndidhi ng'ebyo bityo bwe biri. Aye omuntu aghanga atya okuwoza ni Katonda, n'asinga?" 
Job9:3 Bw'ayenda okuwoza naye, Katonda asobola okubuuza ebibuuzo olukumi (1,000), omuntu yaalemwa okwiramu waire ekirala." 
Job9:4 Katonda mugezi era wa maani. Naani aghanga okumwetantala? Ghazira aghanga kwetantala Katonda. 
Job9:5 Asiguukulula ensozi ng'azira y'akobeireku, yaadhisaaniagho mu busungu bwe." 
Job9:6 Aleetera ensi okutengeeta mu kifo kyayo, era yaaleetera empango kw'etyaime okuyuuga." 
Job9:7 Alobera endhuba okuvaayo; yaaghemba ku muunienie dhaaloba kwaka. 
Job9:8 Yabamba eigulu yenka, yaawoza okwefuukuula okw'enhandha." 
Job9:9 Yaghanika emuunienie mu ibbanga ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ni ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, era ni ghagati gh'endhuyi edh'oku mikono egyo gyombi." 
Job9:10 Akola eby'amaani bye tutategeera, n'ebyewuunhio ebitabalika." 
Job9:11 Bwenebwene ambitaku, naaloba kumubona aja, aye naaloba kutegeera ng'abiseegho." 
Job9:12 Bw'atwala ekintu kyonakyona ky'ayenda, naani asobola okumulobera? Naani akana okumubuuza ati, ‘Oli kukola ki ekyo?’" 
Job9:13 Obusungu bwa Katonda tibukoma, aghangula abazigu be, abayambi ba Rahabu." 
Job9:14 Kale nsobola ntya okufuna ebibono eby'okumwiramu nga ndi kwewozaaku? 
Job9:15 Waire nga nziraku musango, tisobola kwewozaaku, aye nsaba bwa Katonda oyo omulamuzi wange ansaasire." 
Job9:16 Ni bwe nandimwese okwidha okuwoza n'aganha, tinandiikiriiza nti awuliire kye nkoba." 
Job9:17 Ankubisa kiwunga yantentena, yandhidhuza ebinuubule ku mubiri aghazira nsonga." 
Job9:18 Tanganha kugheeraku naire, aye anhongera bwa nnaku." 
Job9:19 Bwe kuba kwegera maani, mwene yenka n'aligho! Bwe kuba kuwoza musango, naani aghanga okumweta, n'aganha okwidha okuwoza?" 
Job9:20 Waire nga nziraku musango, bye ndhogera bigunsinza. Waire nga nziraku kye baananga, mwene ayoleka nga bwendi omukyamu." 
Job9:21 Nziraku musango aye neesiniirwa obulamu. 
Job9:22 Byonabyona n'ekirala era kye nva ni nkoba nti, azikiriza abaziraku musango n'abakozi b'ebibi." 
Job9:23 Akabi bwe kagwagho ni kaitiragho abantu, Katonda asekerera abantu abo abaziraku musango abagwiriirwa ekibamba ekyo." 
Job9:24 Yaghaayo ensi mu mikono gy'ababi bagifuge. Aghemba ku maiso g'abalamuzi balobe kusala misango mu butuufu. Oba Katonda ti n'akola ebyo, kale naani?”" 
Job9:25 “Enaku dhange dhirumuka embiro okusinga omulumusi; dhiwaaku nga nze tidhifuniemu kalungi. 
Job9:26 Dhibita bubite ng'oti n'amaato ag'embiro, era ng'oti n'enkookooma eika ku muyiigo gwayo." 
Job9:27 Bwe nkoba nti, ‘Ka neerabire okwemuluguunhia kwange, mmwenheku, nsangaale,’" 
Job9:28 ndidhula okutya olw'okudaazibwadaazibwa kwange kuba ndidhi nti Katonda talikobaku ati nziraku musango. 
Job9:29 Nkiidhi nti omusango guli n'okunsinga, kale ndaagira ki okwewozaaku?" 
Job9:30 Ni bwenaaba amaadhi, ni ntukuza engalo dhange ni saabbuuni," 
Job9:31 era oidha kunsuula mu kiina ekiidhwire obunhaga, n'engoye dhange dhineesinwe." 
Job9:32 Kuba ngoli Katonda abaire muntu buntu nga nze, nandimwizeemu, naawoza naye." 
Job9:33 Aye ghazira mulamuzi ghagati wange naye, anaatuwozesa n'atusaliragho." 
Job9:34 Neeghemba Katonda alekere agho okunkubisa omwigo gwe; alekere agho okunzindula n'okuntiisa. 
Job9:35 Memale olwo nsobole okweinhonholaku nga bwe nandyenze.” 
Job10:1 “Neesiniirwa obulamu, ndidha kwemuluguunhia abantu bawulire, ndidha kwatula enaku endi ku mwoyo." 
Job10:2 Ndidha kukoba Katonda nti otansalira bwa musango kunsinga, aye mmanhisa ky'onvunaana." 
Job10:3 Kirungi ki ky'ofuna mu kukayukira n'okunhooma ebintu mwene bye wakola n'engalo dho, ate n'osanhukira entegeka edh'ababi?" 
Job10:4 Iwe ebintu obibona ng'omuntu bw'abibona? Oba obitegeera ng'omuntu bw'abitegeera? 
Job10:5 Enaku dh'oghangaala dhaaga n'edh'abantu abafa? Oba emyaka gy'oghangaala gyaga n'egy'abantu? 
Job10:6 Ku lwaki oyenda okubuuliriza ku bibi byange, n'okunoonereza ku kwonoona kwange?" 
Job10:7 Ate nga oidhi nga nze nziraku musango, era nga ghazira asobola kumponia n'antoola mu ngalo dho.”" 
Job10:8 “Niiwe mwene owampumba n'engalo dho. Aye mpegaano oneefuuliire okunsaaniagho. 
Job10:9 Idhukira nga wampumba mu itosi. Onandhizaayo wanfuula enkungu kabiri? 
Job10:10 Ti niiwe owanfuka ng'oti mata mu nda ya maama, n'ompumba ng'oti kitole kya muzigo?" 
Job10:11 Wayunga amagumba gange n'emiziisa, waagaghembaku emamba n'omubiri." 
Job10:12 Wampa obulamu wangonza obutalekera, era wakuuma bukalamu obulamu bwange." 
Job10:13 Aye ghaligho bino bye wagisa nga bya kyama. Ndidhi nga wabitegeka bintuukeku. 
Job10:14 Waneekalirisanga obone oba nga nkola ekibi, olwo olobe okukinsonigha." 
Job10:15 Bwe nkola ekibi, olwo mba nga nkagwireku! Ni bwe nkola ekituufu nsigala nga neewumbye naidhula ensoni, era naawaamu olw'okudaazibwadaazibwa." 
Job10:16 Bwe nkola ekintu ekindeetera okwenhumiriza, oba ng'oti mpologoma wandhiiga; waakola ebyewuunhisa okuunumya." 
Job10:17 Onumba buyaaka okundaazadaaza weeyongera okunsungughalira era wansindikira ebizibu kamaala, ebiri ng'oti n'ebikunsu kamaala eby'abalwani ab'amaani.”" 
Job10:18 “Kale ku lwaki waleka ni nzaalibwa? Kasinga nandifiire nga ghazira naire muntu amboineku. 
Job10:19 Olwandiviire mu nda nti, nga banziikiragho, naaba ng'atabangaghooku." 
Job10:20 Obulamu bwange tibusigaizaayo bwa nnaku ntono dhiti? Kale ni ndeka nsangaaleku akatono," 
Job10:21 nga nkaali kuja mu nsi eyo ey'ekinsense n'enzikiiza etiisa einho, ye ntaja kuva naire;" 
Job10:22 ensi egemye enzikiiza bedimudimu, eidhwire okutabukatabuka, era obutangaavu ye buli ng'oti nzikiiza.”" 
Job11:1 Agho Zofari Omunaamathi, yaakoba ati:" 
Job11:2 Obwo, omuntu ayogera ebibono kamaala bityo, tasaine kwiribwamu? Okwogera ebingi kitegeeza kusinga musango?" 
Job11:3 Obwo, Yobu olowooza oti okwesuutiriza kwo kunaasirisa abantu abandi? Bw'okiina abantu, obwo tighaabe akukobaku?" 
Job11:4 Kuba okoba oti by'oikiriza n'ebituufu; era oti Katonda abona ng'oziraku musango. 
Job11:5 Aye ha, nguli Katonda ayogera n'iwe maiso ku maiso." 
Job11:6 Yandikukobeire eby'amagezi ebigisiibwa, ebitaghanga kumanhika ni biwaayo. Kale ni manha nti Katonda ali kukubonereza katono okusinga bw'ogwaine." 
Job11:7 Osobola okwagaaza ebifa ku Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, waabizuula waabimalayo?" 
Job11:8 Bigulumivu okusinga eigulu. Oghanga kukola ki? Biika ghansi okusinga e magombe. Oghanga kubimanha otya? 
Job11:9 Bw'obipima bisinga ensi obunene, n'enhandha bigisinga obugazi." 
Job11:10 Katonda bw'aidha n'asiba abantu mu ikomera, n'abeeta okubasalira omusango, naani asobola okumulobera?" 
Job11:11 Kuba aidhi abantu abazira kye bagasa. Abona ebibi bye bakola, yaabita ku mwoyo." 
Job11:12 Tikiribaagho bantu basiru kutegeera, ng'oti bwekitalibaagho endogoyi edh'omu nsiko okuzaala endogoyi enfuge." 
Job11:13 “Yobu, bw'oneenenia mu mwoyo gwo, oidha kusobola okugololera emikono gyo ye Katonda omusabe." 
Job11:14 Bw'oba ng'oli n'ebikyamu by'okola kanga agho, olobe kuganha bibi kubanga mu maka go." 
Job11:15 Olwo oidha kuba nga tokeebwalabwala, era oidha kuba ng'oli mugumu, nga ghazira ky'otya." 
Job11:16 Oidha kwerabira enaku yo, ng'oti ni bwe weerabira amaadhi agakuulwire ni gaja." 
Job11:17 Obulamu bwo bwidha kwakayakana okusinga obutangaavu obw'omu kasana ghagati. Ebizibu eby'omu bulamu bwo biidha kukyuka ng'oti n'enzikiiza bw'efuuka obutangaavu ku nkyo. 
Job11:18 Oidha kubanga n'emiraala olw'okuba n'eisuubi. Katonda aidha kukukuumanga owuumule ng'ozira ky'otya. 
Job11:19 Oidha kutendukanga nga ghazira akutiisa; abantu kamaala baidha kukusabanga obuyambi. 
Job11:20 Aye ababi baidha kumagamaganga, babulwe obulumukiro. Eisuubi lyaibwe liri mu kufa.”" 
Job12:1 Agho Yobu yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job12:2 “Bwenebwene niimwe amamiro ag'abantu, era bwe mulifa, abagezi baliwaagho." 
Job12:3 Aye zeena ntegeera ng'oti niimwe; timunsinga naire. Naani ataidhi ebyo byonabyona bye mwogeire? 
Job12:4 Nsekererwa bakagwa bange, nze eyasabanga Katonda n'andhiramu. Nze omuntu akola ekituufu, aziraku musango, mpegaano nsekererwa bantu." 
Job12:5 Omuntu azira nnaku asekerera ole adaaga. Omuntu adaagadaaga era n'aidhirwa ebizibu. 
Job12:6 Amaka ag'abanhazi gaba bukalamu, n'abo abasungughaza Katonda bazira kibatiisa; amaani gaibwe n'agafuuka katonda waibwe ye beesiga.”" 
Job12:7 “Aye buuza ensolo, dhiidha kukwegeresa; n'enhonhi dhiidha kukukobera." 
Job12:8 Oba buuza ebitonde eby'oku nsi, n'eby'omu nhandha, biidha kukwinhonhola." 
Job12:9 Mu bitonde ebyo byonabyona, kiri gha ekitaidhi, nti ebibaagho byonabyona bikolebwa Musengwa Katonda?" 
Job12:10 Buli kintu ekiramu kiri mu mikono gye; obulamu bw'abantu bwona n'abufuga. 
Job12:11 Omuntu mu by'awulira, kutu we tayawulagho bituufu na bitali bituufu, ng'oti n'olulimi lwe bwelwawulagho emere ewooma n'etawooma?" 
Job12:12 Amagezi gaba na bakaire, n'okutegeera kwajiira ku nnaku edh'obulamu bw'omuntu.”" 
Job12:13 Katonda ali n'amagezi n'obuyinza; ali n'okutetenkania n'okutegeera. 
Job12:14 Katonda ekintu ky'amenhie ghazira asobola kukizimba buyaaka; Katonda omuntu y'asibiire mu ikomera ghazira asobola kumusibula. 
Job12:15 Bw'alobera amaadhi okugwa, ghabaagho endoboozi; bw'agaleka ni gagwa, omwidhuzo gughemba ensi." 
Job12:16 Katonda wa maani era mughanguzi, ole ye baguya n'ole aguya, bombi bali mu buyinza bwe." 
Job12:17 Abafuzi b'ensi abamalamu amagezi, abalamuzi yaabafuula abasirusiru." 
Job12:18 Avaalulula bakyabazinga ebivaalo eby'ekitiisa yaabafuula abairu, yaabasiba ebikerebetu." 
Job12:19 Bakabona abamalamu amagezi, abafuzi ab'amaani yaabatoola mu buyinza." 
Job12:20 Asirisa abo, abantu boonaboona be beesiga, n'abakaire yaabatoolaku okutegeera." 
Job12:21 “Aleetera abakungu okunhoomebwa, ab'obukumu yaabamala amaani." 
Job12:22 Ayoleka ebigise ebitaboneka, yaamulisa ebiri mu nzikiiza egemye bedimudimu." 
Job12:23 Akulankulania amaghanga, ate yaamala yaagazikiriza; agafuula ag'amaani, ate yaamala yaagasaaniagho." 
Job12:24 Abafuzi b'abantu abafuula basiru, yaabaleetera okuyengeetera eyo mu irungu ezira ngira." 
Job12:25 Baghaamanta mu nzikiiza eri bedimudimu, yaabaleetera okutagala ng'oti batamiivu.”" 
Job13:1 “Bona, ebyo byonabyona nabibona ira, era naabiwulira, naabitegeera." 
Job13:2 Imwe bye mwidhi, zeena mbiidhi, timunsinga." 
Job13:3 Aye nze nhenda ndhogere ni Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, oyo ye nhenda okwoleka nti nziraku musango." 
Job13:4 Aye imwe mwogera bya buguya okughemba ku mazima muli ng'oti n'abayigha abatasobola kuwonia muntu. 
Job13:5 Nguli ni musiriike busirike, olwo mwandyoleike bwe muli abagezi.”" 
Job13:6 “Muwulire kye nkoba; mutege amatu muwulire empoza yange. 
Job13:7 Mutyo bwe munaawolereza Katonda, nga mwogera ebitali bituufu, era nga muleeta eby'obuguya?" 
Job13:8 Mutyo bwe munaasaliriza nga mwekubiire ku luuyi lwe, olwo muwoze omusango gwe asinge?" 
Job13:9 Katonda bw'anaabeekebeedha einho, munaasigala ng'ebintu bikaabajiira bukalamu? Munaamuguya ng'oti bwe muguya abantu obuntu?" 
Job13:10 Katonda oyo taalobe kubabonereza, ni bwe munaagisa okusaliriza kwaimwe." 
Job13:11 Obuyinza bwe tibuubatiise, ni bubagemya ntete?" 
Job13:12 Endheso dhaimwe tidhigasa dhiri ng'oti ivu buvu. N'empoza yaimwe muzira makulu, emulunguka ng'oti itosi.”" 
Job13:13 “Musirike, muleke nze ndhogere, ebintuukaku bintuukeku." 
Job13:14 Ndidha kwevaamu, mpeeyo n'obulamu." 
Job13:15 Bona, oba Katonda andhita, andhite, kiki kye nkaasuubirayo? Aye ndidha kwewozaaku mu maiso ge." 
Job13:16 Ekyo n'ekinandokola, kuba ezira mukozi wa bibi akana n'ayemerera mu maiso ge.”" 
Job13:17 “Muwulirise bukalamu ebibono byange, mwekalirise bye nkoba." 
Job13:18 Bona, nsengeike empoza yange bukalamu, ndidhi nga ndidha kwedheerera." 
Job13:19 Naani anaanumiriza omusango? Kuba neetegeike okusirika era nfe bwe guba gunsinze. 
Job13:20 Nkusaba ebintu bibiri byonka, olwo ndobe kukwekweka:" 
Job13:21 Lekera agho okumbonereza, era olobe kuneeraliikiriza na bintu bintiisa." 
Job13:22 Wo Katonda wange, iwe sooka oyogere, nze ndidha kukwiramu. Oba leka nze ndhogere memale iwe ondhiremu." 
Job13:23 Ndholeka ensobi dhange n'okudaaliima kwange. Nkobera obudheemu bwange n'ekibi kyange.” 
Job13:24 “Ku lwaki oneegisaaku, n'ondheta omuzigu wo?" 
Job13:25 Oli kuntiisa nze ali ng'oti n'eikoola obukoola, eritwalibwa empewo? Oli kukiriga nze ali ng'oti n'akasubi obusubi akakalu?" 
Job13:26 Onumiriza emisango emikakali, wanvunaana n'ensobi edh'omu buvubuka bwange." 
Job13:27 Osiba ebigere byange n'endhegere, waalingirira buli kigere kye nsitula, era buli ghe nniina waalambagho." 
Job13:28 Kyenva ni nseenena ng'oti n'ekintu ekivunda; oba ng'oti n'ekivaalo ekiriibwa ebisiisa.” 
Job14:1 “Buli muntu azaalibwa mukazi, era obulamu bwe buba bumpi ate nga bwidhwire bizibu." 
Job14:2 Omuntu akula yaaniala ng'oti kimuli, era yaabulagho yaaweekereragho ng'oti kinsense." 
Job14:3 Kale iwe Katonda waadaaga okulingirira omuntu ali atyo, era waamuleeta mu maiso go omusalire omusango?" 
Job14:4 Naani aghanga okufuula ekintu ekitali kirongoofu, ni kiba ekirongoofu? Ghazira naire omulala ati." 
Job14:5 Buli muntu wamusaliragho enaku dh'alighangaala, waamugerera n'emyezi era waamupimira ekiseera kye, ky'ataghanga kuswisaagho." 
Job14:6 Kale lekera okumulingirira, omuleke awuumuleku, asobole okumalaku olunaku lwe ng'oti n'omupakasi.”" 
Job14:7 “Bwe batema omuti, ghabaagho eisuubi ery'omuti ogwo okusibuka ni gwiragho." 
Job14:8 Waire emizi gyagwo gikairigha mu itaka, ekikonge kyagwo ni kivunda," 
Job14:9 bwe gutuukibwaku amaadhi, gulisibuka, gwaleeta ensaga ng'oti n'ekisimbe ekiyaaka." 
Job14:10 Aye omuntu afa yaaweeramu irala; bw'agheera ogw'enkomerero aba nga takaaligho. 
Job14:11 Ng'enhandha bw'ekamiira, era ng'omwiga bwe gukaliira," 
Job14:12 n'omuntu atyo bw'afa, yaagalaamirira obutasituka. Taja kwira ngulu naire, oba okuzuusibwa mu ndoolo dhe ng'eigulu likaaligho." 
Job14:13 Nguli ongisiisa e magombe n'onkuumira eyo, okutuusa obusungu bwo lwe buliwaagho. Era n'ongerera ekiseera n'omala n'ondidhukira." 
Job14:14 Omuntu bw'afa amala yairamu obulamu? Aye nze nandiguminkiriiza mu bizibu bino, okutuusa lwe nandirekwirwa." 
Job14:15 Olwo wandindhese naavugira wansangaalira nze ye wakola n'engalo dho. 
Job14:16 Olwo wandabirira buli kigere kye nsitula, aye waaloba kwekalirisa bibi byange." 
Job14:17 Olwo wansonigha ebibi byange ebyo, waabitoolagho; waasasaagho ebisobyo byange ebyo." 
Job14:18 Aye ensozi dhigwa dhaamulunguka, n'olubaale lwasiguukululwa mu kifo kya lwo." 
Job14:19 Era amaadhi gaseenenia amabaale, ni mukoka yaatwala eitaka. Weena otyo bw'ozikiriza eisuubi omuntu ly'aba nalyo." 
Job14:20 Oidha waamusinza amaani, waamumaliragho irala, era waamufaanania bundi mu maiso ng'afiire." 
Job14:21 Batabane be bwe batuuka ku kitiibwa, ebyo tabimanha; ni bwe batoolebwa ku kitiibwa, ebyo tabibona." 
Job14:22 Awulira bulumi obumuliku mwene bwonka, era awulira na nnaku emugemaku mwene yenka.”" 
Job15:1 Agho Elifazi Omutemani yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job15:2 “Ow'amagezi tairamu na bibono biziramu makulu; tayogera bibono biri ng'oti mpewo buwewo. 
Job15:3 Tatakana biziramu muganhulo, oba okwogera ebibono ebitavaamu kalungi koonakoona." 
Job15:4 Otuuse okulobera abantu okutya Katonda, n'okuja mu maiso ge okumusaba." 
Job15:5 Ebibi byo byeyolekera mu ebyo by'oyogera, era okozesa lulimi lwa buguya." 
Job15:6 Omunwa gwo gwene n'ogukusalira omusango okukusinga, se ti ninze. By'oyogera byene n'ebikulumiriza." 
Job15:7 Olowooza oti niiwe owasooka abantu boonaboona okuzaalibwa? Oba oti iwe wazaalibwa nga n'ensozi dhikaali kubaagho? 
Job15:8 Katonda bweyali ng'ateesa mu igulu waliyo? Niiwe wenka omugezi? 
Job15:9 Kiki ky'oidhi ife kye tutaidhi? Kiki ky'otegeera ife kye tutategeera? 
Job15:10 Ife tuli ghano n'ab'envu era n'abakaire einho, abakulu okusinga ni lata wo." 
Job15:11 Katonda by'akukolera okukugumya, obitwala nga bitono inho y'oli? Tukukobeire ebibono ebikalamu ku lulwe." 
Job15:12 Ku lwaki osuuyirira otyo, n'omoga n'obukambwe otyo?" 
Job15:13 Ku lwaki osungughalira Katonda, n'oyogera ebibono ebiri bityo?" 
Job15:14 Omuntu obuntu asobola okuba omulongoofu? Omuntu eyazaalibwa obuzaalibwe, Katonda aghanga okumubala ati mutuufu?" 
Job15:15 Ate oba Katonda tiyeesiga waire bamalaika be! Era nga n'eigulu ti irongoofu mu maiso ge! 
Job15:16 Memale olwo aghanga atya okwesiga omuntu omwonoonefu era atagasa, eyeededa ebyonoono ng'oti yeededa maadhi!”" 
Job15:17 “Yobu, ntegera kutu ndhogere nkukobere bye mboine," 
Job15:18 n'ebyo abagezigezi bye bakoba nga babitoola ku badhaadha baibwe. 
Job15:19 Badhaadha baibwe abo bonka n'abaagheebwa ensi eno, ng'eziramu bantu bagwira; ng'eziramu muntu asobola kubadaaliimya kuva ku Katonda." 
Job15:20 Omuntu omubi, oyo abisa obubi abandi, adaagadaaga obulamu bwe bwonabwona." 
Job15:21 Awulira mu matu ge amamiro agatiisa. Lw'afunaku akalembereza lw'alumbibwa abanhazi. 
Job15:22 Tasuubira kuva mu nzikiiza; ateegerera bwa kwitibwa. 
Job15:23 Atambula eyo atyo ng'anoonia k'anaalya, nga yeebuuza y'anaakaagaana. Aidhi ati olunaku olw'enzikiiza lumukyereire." 
Job15:24 Enaku n'okweraliikirira bimutiisa, oti ni kyabazinga ow'amaani bw'atiisa be yeetegeike okulumba." 
Job15:25 Kuba asonse mu Katonda olwala, yaasonsoonia Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona." 
Job15:26 Omuntu omubi oyo adheemera Katonda, yaaja okumulumba n'engabo ye enkologho," 
Job15:27 waire ng'azira ky'aghanga, olw'okugeedhagana." 
Job15:28 Era aba mu bibuga ebyasengukamu abantu; ate endhu, asula mu bifulukwa ebidhuliriire okugwa." 
Job15:29 Obukombe bwe bulibita bubite, talimala nabwo kiseera kireeyi, ni mwene yeena talighangaala." 
Job15:30 Era taja kuva mu nzikiiza. Aliba ng'oti n'ensaga dh'omuti edhibabwirwa omuliro, era nga n'ebimuli byagwo bitwaliibwa empewo." 
Job15:31 Bw'aira agho ni yeesiga ebiziramu muganhulo aba musiru, kuba byene ebyo by'alisasulwamu." 
Job15:32 Alikala mangu ng'ekiseera kye kikaali; taliiramu kusibuka ng'oti lusaga. 
Job15:33 Aliba ng'oti muzabbibu ogukunkumusa ebibala byagwo ebikaali kwenga; era ng'oti muti mwoliva ogukunkumusa ekimuli. 
Job15:34 Kuba abatatya Katonda baidha kubanga bagumba. Era omuliro gwidha kwokyanga endhu dhe bafuna mu kukupankupania. 
Job15:35 Abantu abo bategeka okukola ebibi, era baabikola, baidhwire buguya bwereere.”" 
Job16:1 Agho Yobu yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job16:2 “Mpuliire ebintu kamaala ebiri ng'oti n'ebyo. Kale okunsaasira kwaimwe, nnaku ndhereere." 
Job16:3 Ebibono ebyo ebiri ng'oti mpewo buwewo, tibiikome? Ye kiki einho ekikusonsooniiza okundhiramu otyo?" 
Job16:4 Zeena nandisoboire okwogera nga bwe mwogeire, ngoli niimwe omuli mu mbeera nze ye ndimu. Nandiboogereire ebisongovu, nga bwe ntengeesa n'omutwe nga mbanhooma." 
Job16:5 Nandyogeire ebibagumya na munwa bunwa gwonka, era bye nandibakobye obukobe byandibamaze okubawoleezaaku ku bulumi bwaimwe.”" 
Job16:6 “Aye ni bwe ndhogera ntya, obulumi bwange tibuwoleera. Ni bwe nsiriikirira ntya, tighegheeraku naire." 
Job16:7 Katonda wange, bwenebwene ommaze amaani, n'abantu bange boonaboona obazikiriiza." 
Job16:8 Omaze okunsiba, oli muzigu wange. Obugoogombe bwange, abantu kwe bava okukakasa bati omusango gunsinga." 
Job16:9 Katonda ankyaye era mu busungu bwe yandhuzayuza; omuzigu wange oyo antunguliire amaiso. 
Job16:10 Abantu baaningiriire baayasaamirira. Baneebbuuseeku bankuba empi ku matama. 
Job16:11 Katonda ampaireyo y'ababi, yansuula mu ngalo dh'aboonooni." 
Job16:12 Nali nga ntyamiisa, aye yaidha yankontakonta yangema mu mamiro, yankuba ekigwo ghansi yaamaniangula. Yantaagho ng'ekintu eky'okwegeraku endeega," 
Job16:13 olwo abalasa obusaale bwe baaneezungulula. Atulisa ensigo dhange n'akasaale aghazira kusaasira naire, yaafumita akaka kange, amaadhi gaamu gaayuyika ku itaka." 
Job16:14 Anumba ng'oti n'omulwani ow'omu lutalo, yaamenhamenha buli buyungiro bwange." 
Job16:15 Neetungiire ekutiya era naagivaala olw'okunakughala, era naagyeta ku mubiri. Mpoiremu amaani, naagalaamirira agho mu nkungu." 
Job16:16 Amaiso gaamyuse olw'okulira, era ganzimbye gaidhaku ekifu." 
Job16:17 Ate nga tikolangaku bukambwe, era nsinza Katonda bukalamu.”" 
Job16:18 “Iwe ensi otalobera musaayi gwange, n'ogulobera kululuma; otaganha kulira kwange kusirisibwa." 
Job16:19 Ni mu kaseera kano mu igulu eriyo andhulira; ghaigulu eyo eriyo ansemba nga ndi mutuufu. 
Job16:20 Bakagwa bange baanhooma, aye ye Katonda ye numukira nga ndira amaziga." 
Job16:21 Nandyenze ghabeegho ampolerezaayo ye Katonda, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'awolerezaayo muntu mwine, eri omuntu amuvunaana omusango." 
Job16:22 Kuba emyaka mitono gye nsigaiza, ntambule okuja eyo ye ntaliva kwira.”" 
Job17:1 “Obulamu bwange bujiire, enaku dhange dhiwoireku; amagombe gonka ge nteegereire." 
Job17:2 Bwenebwene buli muntu anhooma mulala nze, era mbabona boonaboona nga bali kunsonsoonia.”" 
Job17:3 “Wo Katonda, niiwe obe onteeregho akabega, ghazira wundi anampolerezaayo." 
Job17:4 Nga bw'obaleese enzimeera ku mwoyo ni batasobola kutegeera, otabaleka kughangula." 
Job17:5 Omuntu yeenayeena alya mu baine olukwe olw'okufuna ebintu byaibwe, abaana be balidaagadaaga.”" 
Job17:6 “Nfuuliibwa nseko dha balamu, era abantu ye bafuudhaku amatanta." 
Job17:7 Amaiso gandidhieku ekifu olw'enaku, zeenazeena ngoogombye, nsigaire magumba." 
Job17:8 Abantu abeeyeta abalungi bwe babona kino batya inho, era bansungughalira nga banvunaana obutatya Katonda." 
Job17:9 Aye abo abeeyeta abatuufu, beeyongera bwa kwegumya bati batuufu." 
Job17:10 Aye ngoli boonaboona baidha baayemerera mu maiso gange, tyandyagainemu mugezi waire omulala ati.”" 
Job17:11 “Enaku dhange dhijiire; bye ntegeka bifiire, era ni bye nsuubira byona bityo." 
Job17:12 Bakagwa bange obwire babweta musana, enzikiiza bw'eba erikugema, bati bunaatera okutangaala." 
Job17:13 E magombe ni yonka ye nsuubira okuba amaka gange, neeyalire eyo obuliri, ntenduke mu nzikiiza." 
Job17:14 Ndhete amagombe lata, n'enhengere ndheete maama era ndheete baanhinaze." 
Job17:15 Olwo eisuubi liri gha? Kye nsuubira naani ali kukibona? 
Job17:16 Ndiikirira n'eisuubi eryo e magombe? Tulija nalyo tutyo eyo mu itaka?” 
Job18:1 Agho Bilidadi Omushuhi yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job18:2 “Munaatuusa gha okunoonia eby'okwogera? Musooke mwefumintirize memale olwo twogere. 
Job18:3 Ku lwaki otubalira mu nsolo? Ku lwaki otufuula abasiru? 
Job18:4 Iwe ali kwekulubula omubiri mu busungu wulira: Olowooza oti ensi enaafuuka oti irungu ku lulwo? Oba oti ensozi dhinaasiguukululwa mu kifo kyadho olw'okukusanhusa?
