Job18:5 Bwenebwene obulamu bw'omubi buzimizibwa ng'oti ntaala, oba ng'oti mmuli edhimulika, edhitairayo kwaka." 
Job18:6 Ali ng'oti n'endhu eidhamu enzikiiza, entaala emulisaamu ng'ezikiire." 
Job18:7 Eyali atambula nga yeekakasa, mpegaano yeekengeera gh'aniina. Amagezi g'agha abandi mwene gamuswire." 
Job18:8 Ebigere bye bimutunze, yeeswire mwene mu mutego." 
Job18:9 Omutego gumugemye ekibbonge gwamukalangula. 
Job18:10 Bamuteze omugugha mu itaka gumugemye; bagisiisa olutuula mu ngira ye. 
Job18:11 Ebimutiisa bimuli ku buli luuyi, bimubingirira buli gh'atoola ekigere." 
Job18:12 Endhala emuluma y'awaamu amaani, akabi kali agho kamuteegereire." 
Job18:13 Endwaire embi emuliire omubiri, era yaamuvunza amakono n'amagulu." 
Job18:14 Bamughalwiza mu ndhu ye y'abaire nga yeesiga, baamughaluudhania okumutwala ye Kyabazinga afuga okufa." 
Job18:15 Omuntu aba ng'ayenze n'eyeesulira mu ndhu eyo etakaali yiye, nga bamaze okumansiramu obuganga bwa salufa." 
Job18:16 Ali ng'oti muti ogukala okuviira irala ku mizi, okutuuka ghaigulu ku busanso bw'ensaga" 
Job18:17 Balimwerabirira irala ku nsi, ghaabulagho amwidhukira naire." 
Job18:18 Balimutoola mu butangaavu baamubingira mu nzikiiza, ave mu nsi y'abalamu." 
Job18:19 Ku babe tighalisigalagho mwana waire omwidhukulu. Era ye yabanga teriwonayo muntu naire omulala. 
Job18:20 E buvandhuba n'e bugwandhuba, abaliwulira ebimutuuseeku, baligemwa entiisa baatya inho." 
Job18:21 Bwenebwene eyo n'enkomerero y'ababi ekyo n'ekirituuka ku abo abateefiirayo ku Katonda.” 
Job19:1 Agho Yobu yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job19:2 “Mulituusa gha okuneeraliikiriza n'okuunumiriza n'ebibono. 
Job19:3 Mwiragainemu emikuzi kamaala nga muli ku nze mwevumira, timuswalaku kumbisa mutyo?" 
Job19:4 Ni bwe kyandibaire ekituufu nti nasobya, ensobi yange imwe yandibagemeireku gha?" 
Job19:5 Muli kuneekuluntalizaaku muti munsinga, era mwatoola enaku yange mwagifuula obukakafu nti ndi mwonooni." 
Job19:6 Aye mugwaine mukimanhe muti Katonda n'antuusisaaku ekyo, ng'anzingiza n'olutuula okungemya.”" 
Job19:7 “Bona, ndi kwasiikana nti, ‘Bandhita’, aye ghaabula ampulira; ndi kukuba enduulu aye ghazira ali kumbisa mu butuufu." 
Job19:8 Katonda asembye engira yange, nzira bwe mbitagho; ansibiire mu nzikiiza, tikaabona ye nja." 
Job19:9 Antoireku ebitiibwa, yantoola n'engule ku mutwe." 
Job19:10 Antenteine ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, tikaaliku ni bwendi? Eisuubi lyange aliiyeegho ng'oti muti." 
Job19:11 Angemeirwa obusungu obwaka ng'oti muliro; ali kumbisa ng'oti ndi muzigu we. 
Job19:12 Amagye ge gaidhira ghalala nga gategeka okuunumba, gaabwama okuzingiza weema yange.”" 
Job19:13 “Katonda andhawukainia ni baganda bange, n'abamanhe mbafuukiire ng'oti mugwira." 
Job19:14 Aboluganda ni bakagwa bange baneetoireku. 
Job19:15 Abantu be nakyazanga ewange baneerabiire, abairu bange abakazi bambisa ng'oti mugwira era ow'endha." 
Job19:16 Bwe ndheta omwiru tanvugira, ni bwe mmwegayirira tanfaaku." 
Job19:17 Mukazi wange aneesuula ghala olw'omuuka gwange; baganda bange tibanseetaku. 
Job19:18 N'abaana abato baanhooma, bwe bambona bansekerera." 
Job19:19 Bakagwa bange einho bankyaye; abo be nagonzanga einho baneegaine. 
Job19:20 Omubiri guneeriipye ku magumba, mponeire ghatono obutafa." 
Job19:21 Munsaasire, munsaasire imwe bakagwa bange, kuba Katonda ankubye." 
Job19:22 Ku lwaki Katonda ankiriga, n'imwe mwena ni munkiriga? Okudaazibwadaazibwa okwo kwe ntuuseeku tikubamala?”" 
Job19:23 “Ngoli okwemuluguunhia kwange kughandiikiibwa, ni kukubwa mu kitabo!" 
Job19:24 Ngoli kubaadhiibwa mu lubaale n'ekyuma ekisongovu, ni baidhuza mu nukuta eisasi eisaanuuse, olwo kusomebwenga enaku dhoonadhoona." 
Job19:25 Aye ndidhi ng'Omununuzi wange mulamu, era n'alisalagho eky'enkomerero ku nsi." 
Job19:26 Ndibona Katonda nga ndi n'omubiri, waire ng'endwaire egumazeegho." 
Job19:27 Ndimubona nze mwene n'amaiso gange, nga n'oyo mwene, se ti wundi. Omwoyo gwange gweraliikirira" 
Job19:28 kuba mukoba muti, ‘Ka tumukirige inho, olw'okuba ensonga kwe tusinziira eva mu mwene.’" 
Job19:29 Aye mpegaano mutye empiima: empiima eyo ereeta ekibonerezo kya Katonda ku babi, olwo mumanhe nti eriyo okusala omusango.”" 
Job20:1 Agho Zofari Omunaamathi yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job20:2 “Olw'ebibono by'oyogeire ebintabwire, mpulira mule nga ndi n'okukwiramu amangu einho." 
Job20:3 Mpuliire by'okobye ng'onenia era ng'onvuma, aye ndidhi munda mule kye ndidha okukwiramu.”" 
Job20:4 “Bwenebwene oidhi bukalamu ng'okuva eira n'eira, bukyanga muntu ateebwa ku nsi," 
Job20:5 eisanhu ly'omubi likoma mangu; omuntu atatya Katonda asangaalaku kaseera buseera. 
Job20:6 Omubi asobola okukula yaawaiguka okutuuka ku igulu, ng'omutwe gwe gutuuka ku bire." 
Job20:7 Aye alifuuyibwa empewo yaawaagho ng'oti nkungu. Abo ababaire bamubona balyebuuza ye yaaja. 
Job20:8 Alibulagho ng'oti kirooto oba ng'oti kubonekerwa kwa mu bwire. Era taliirayo kubonekaku kabiri. 
Job20:9 Alibulagho mu kifo ghe yabanga, abantu baaloba kwirayo kumubona." 
Job20:10 Abaana be baliiriza abaavu obukombe bweyali abaibyeku. 
Job20:11 Amaani g'abaire ali nago mu buvubuka, aligalaamirira nago mu nkungu." 
Job20:12 Omuntu omubi awoomerwa ekibi ng'oti sukaali, yaakikwekaku ni ghansi gh'olulimi lwe." 
Job20:13 Akisigaza mu kanwa, akole ng'akaanuuna ku." 
Job20:14 Aye okudhuudhuula okwo kumala kwafuuka buka mu nda ye, obuli ng'oti busagwa." 
Job20:15 Asesema obukombe bwe yaiba, Katonda yaabumutoola mu nda." 
Job20:16 Ky'anuuna kiri ng'oti butwa; kimwita ng'oti n'amoodheibwa omusota ogw'obusagwa. 
Job20:17 Talighangaala kubona ku birungi Katonda by'agaba, ebingi einho ng'oti maadhi agaidhwire mu mwiga." 
Job20:18 Alighaayo bye yakolerera byonabyona, yaaloba kubyeyagaliramu amagoba ge yafuna mu bye yakola taligeesiimiramu," 
Job20:19 olw'okuba yatuntuza abaavu yaabalekulira agho, yaanhaga endhu dh'ataazimba." 
Job20:20 Olw'okululunkanira ebintu kw'ali nakwo okutakoma, taliwoniagho waire ekirala ku ebyo by'agonza einho." 
Job20:21 Ghazira ky'alya n'alekagho. N'eisanhu lye kye liriva ni limuwaaku. 
Job20:22 Ekiseera ky'alibeeramu n'ebintu ebingi ebivuluudha, ebizibu kamaala birimwidhira yaadaagadaaga." 
Job20:23 Omubi aliba ng'akaali kulya kwiguta, Katonda yaamumaliraku obusungu obubitirivu, bwamufuukira emere." 
Job20:24 Bw'aligezaaku okulumuka olw'okwewonia okufumitibwa eky'okulwanisa eky'ekyuma ekigumu einho, alifumitibwa akasaale ak'ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
Job20:25 Kalimubitamu kaafuluma, omunwa gwako ogumesunkana gwabita mu ini lye, entiisa yaamugema." 
Job20:26 Eby'obukombe bwe biritokomoka, omuliro ogutakumiibwa bantu gulimwokya, gwasaaniagho ni by'asigaizaagho mu ndhu." 
Job20:27 Eigulu liryoleka ebibi bye, n'ensi yaamulumiriza." 
Job20:28 Eby'omu ndhu ye birinhagibwa, era byatwalibwa ku olwo Katonda lw'alisungughala." 
Job20:29 Ogwo n'omugabo Katonda gw'agha omwonooni, eyo n'enkomerero y'amuteeragho.”" 
Job21:1 Agho Yobu yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job21:2 “Muwulirise bukalamu bye nkoba; okwo n'okungumya kwe mbasaba munkolere. 
Job21:3 Munganhe ndhogere, bwe nnaamala munaayongera okunsekerera." 
Job21:4 Nze ku lwange tiri kwemuluguunhiza bantu. Kale ku lwaki nteekwa okuba omuguminkiriza? 
Job21:5 Muuningirire, mwewuunhie, era mugeme ni ku minwa!" 
Job21:6 Bwe ndhuuba ku kyantuukaku, neezinduka, naatengera n'okutengera." 
Job21:7 Ku lwaki abakola ebibi baghangaala ni bakairigha, nga bali n'obuyinza n'amaani?" 
Job21:8 Bafuna abaana n'abaidhukulu, era baabaagho, baabona nga boonaboona bakula." 
Job21:9 Amaka gaibwe tigaba na bigatiisa, ni Katonda tababonereza naire." 
Job21:10 Ebisolo byaibwe bighaka, era byazaala bukalamu." 
Job21:11 Abaana baibwe baligita embiro, nga bali kuzaanha oti butaama buto." 
Job21:12 Bembera ku bugoma ni ku ntongooli, baawoomerwa okuvuga kw'endere." 
Job21:13 Bafuna ebirungi mu bulamu, era baafiira mu miraala." 
Job21:14 Bakoba Katonda bati, ‘Tuveeku! Titwenda kumanha by'oyenda tukole." 
Job21:15 Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona ni ki einho, memale obwo tumugheereze? Tuganhulwamu ki mu kumusaba?’" 
Job21:16 Bakoba mbu baghangaala lwa maani gaibwe. Aye nze amagezi g'ababi tigaikiririzaamu.” 
Job21:17 “Entaala ey'ababi yaali ezikiziibwaku? Akabi kaali kabatuuseeku? Era Katonda yaali ababonereizaaku mu busungu: 
Job21:18 ni baba ng'oti bikaba ebifuuyibwa empewo, oba enkungu etwalibwa kiwunga?" 
Job21:19 Imwe mukoba muti, ‘Katonda abonereza abaana olw'ebibi bya baiseibwe.’ Aye leka Katonda abonereze abo beene, baghange okumanha nti babonerezeibwa lwa bibi byaibwe ebyo." 
Job21:20 Ababi abo ka babone beene nga bwe bazikirizibwa, bawulire obusungu bw'oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona." 
Job21:21 Kuba bwe bamala okufa baba bakaafaayo ki ku bituuka ku b'omu maka gaibwe? 
Job21:22 Basobola kwegeresa ki Katonda, oyo asalira omusango n'abo abali mu bifo ebya ghaigulu?" 
Job21:23 Ghaligho abafiira mu maani ghagati nga bali bukalamu: 
Job21:24 emibiri gyaibwe nga migimu era nga minhirivu. 
Job21:25 Abandi baafa n'ekikansu ku mwoyo, nga tibabangaku basangaavu naire." 
Job21:26 Aye boonaboona baba bafiire, enhengere dhaabaidhula.”" 
Job21:27 “Bona, ebidhuubo byaimwe mbiidhi era n'akabi ke mweteesa okunkolaku." 
Job21:28 Kuba mubuuza muti, ‘Endhu y'omukungu eri luuyi gha? Amaka ag'eyakolanga ebibi gali luuyi gha?’" 
Job21:29 Timwogerangaku na batambula ngendo? Timuwulirangaku mawulire ge baira nago? 
Job21:30 Ku lunaku Katonda lw'asungughala n'abonereza, omubi buliidho n'awonagho." 
Job21:31 Ghazira yeesimba mu maiso ge kumulumiriza musango gw'aiziiza, oba kumwesasuulizaaku olw'ebyo by'akoze." 
Job21:32 Bw'atwalibwa okuziikibwa, amagombe ge bagakuuma bukalamu." 
Job21:33 Olukunkumuli lw'abantu lumugherekera nga baja okumuziika: abandi bakulemberamu ate abandi baavaaku einhuma, era bamuyughaku eitaka bukalamu kawola." 
Job21:34 Kale imwe munangumya mutya n'ebibono ebiziramu makulu? Bye muli kundhiramu byonabyona biidhwire buguya!” 
Job22:1 Agho Elifazi Omutemani yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job22:2 “Omuntu asobola okuba ow'omugaso ye Katonda? Bwenebwene ni bw'aba omugezi, era aba yeegasa mwene." 
Job22:3 Oti iwe okuba omutuufu ghaligho kye kiganhulamu Katonda? Oba, iwe obutabaaku musango ghaligho kye kimwongeraku?" 
Job22:4 Oti akuvunaana lwa kumwisaamu kitiisa, era oti ekyo ky'avaaku okukuwozesa?" 
Job22:5 Busa, akuvunaana lwa bibi byo ebingi n'ebyonoono byo ebitakoma." 
Job22:6 Watoola ku baganda bo emisingo mu bukyamu nga weesasula by'obabandha; waabatoolamu ebivaalo byaibwe, wabaleka madu." 
Job22:7 Abakooye tiwabaghanga maadhi kunhwa, era waimanga abayala emere." 
Job22:8 Olw'okuba oli wa buyinza, eitaka lyonalyona walyefuga ng'olirekaku abo bonka abagonzi y'oli." 
Job22:9 Banamwandu wabeebingaku nga tobaghaire kantu; waalumyanga bamulekwa ng'obanhagaku ebyaibwe. 
Job22:10 Kyova mpegaano weezungulwirwa emitego, era waidhirwa ebitiisa ebikuzindula." 
Job22:11 Enzikiiza ekusandikiire waaloba kubona, era omiriibwa omwidhuzo gw'amaadhi.”" 
Job22:12 “Katonda ali ghaigulu mu igulu, era abona n'emuunienie ye dheeghaniike." 
Job22:13 Osobola okwebuuza oti, ‘Katonda kiki ky'aidhi? Aghanga okusalira abantu emisango ate ng'aghembeibwaku ebire ebigemye enzikiiza?’" 
Job22:14 Olowooza oti ebire ebigemu bimulobera okubona, ng'ali kutambulira ku nsalosalo ey'eigulu n'ensi?”" 
Job22:15 “Oli kwenda kukuuma mpisa edh'eira, ababi dhe beebisangamu?" 
Job22:16 Baafa ng'ekiseera kyaibwe eky'okufa kikaali, baayeyebwagho ng'oti n'ekizimbe bwekyeyebwagho amaadhi ag'omwidhuzo." 
Job22:17 Abantu abo n'abaakoba Katonda bati, ‘Tuveeku.’ Era bati, ‘Oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona asobola kutukola ki?’" 
Job22:18 Ate nga Katonda n'eyaidhuza endhu dhaibwe ebirungi. Aye nze amagezi g'ababi tigaikiririzaamu. 
Job22:19 Abatuufu basangaala n'abaziraku musango baaseka, bwe babona ababi nga babonerezebwa." 
Job22:20 Bakoba bati, ‘Bwenebwene abazigu baife bazikiriziibwa. Ni bye baleseegho, omuliro gubisaaniizaagho.’ ”" 
Job22:21 “Yobu, tabagana ni Katonda obe n'emiraala, olwo oidha kufuna ebirungi." 
Job22:22 Ikiriza by'akulagira, okuume ebibono bye mu mwoyo gwo." 
Job22:23 Weewooye, okyuke oire eri Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, okomye agho ebibi byonabyona ebikolebwa mu ndhu yo." 
Job22:24 Suula ere zaabu wo mu nkungu, ni zaabu wo omukenenule ow'e Ofiri omusuule mu mabaale ag'omu mwiga." 
Job22:25 Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, n'abe afuuke zaabu wo. Era n'abe afuuke emungo yo eya feeza." 
Job22:26 Olwo Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona aidha kukugha okusangaala einho, era omulingirire nga ghazira ky'otya." 
Job22:27 Aidha kukuwuliranga ng'oli ni ky'omusaba, era oidha kutuukirizanga ky'onaabanga weeyamye okukola." 
Job22:28 Buli ky'onaakolanga kiidha kukujiiranga bukalamu, n'engira y'obitamu eidha kubangamu obutangaavu;" 
Job22:29 kuba Katonda aisa ghansi abo abeekuluntaza, aye yaalokola abo abeisa ghansi." 
Job22:30 Awonia omuntu aziraku musango. Kale aidha kukuwonianga bw'onaabanga ng'oziraku kibi.” 
Job23:1 Agho Yobu yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job23:2 “Olwaleero era ndi kwemuluguunhiza Katonda bubi inho; tisobola kulekera kusinda olw'obulumi. 
Job23:3 Ngoli mmanha ye nsobola okwagaana Katonda, ni ntuuka aghali ekityamo kye," 
Job23:4 nandisengeike ensonga dhange mu maiso ge, naaloba kulekayo waire endala." 
Job23:5 Nandimanhie by'andhiramu; naategeera by'ankoba. 
Job23:6 Obwo, bwenebwene yandiinumiriiza n'obuyinza bwe mu bukulu bwe obwo? Busa, yandiwuliriisa bye nkoba." 
Job23:7 Eyo omuntu omwesimbu asobola okuwoza naye, era omulamuzi wange oyo yandineedheereiza omusango, byawa.”" 
Job23:8 “Bona, ndhagaire e buvandhuba, aye Katonda azirayo; n'e bugwandhuba yoona timuboineeyo." 
Job23:9 Era naayagala ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ni ku lw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, aye era timuboine." 
Job23:10 Aye mwene aidhi engira ye ngema. Bw'alimala okundeba, alindhagaana nga ndi mutukuvu ng'oti ni zaabu omukenenule." 
Job23:11 Ntambulira mu ngira y'abitamu, era tigivaamu kudaaliima." 
Job23:12 Nkola by'andagira; naajiira ku by'ayenda, se ti ebyo nze bye neegomba.”" 
Job23:13 “Aye Katonda takyuka era ghazira asobola kumukyusa, oba okumutakania alobe kukola ky'ayenda." 
Job23:14 Aidha kutuukiriza ekyo ky'antegekeire, era ali n'ebindi kamaala ebiri ng'oti n'ekyo by'ategeike." 
Job23:15 Kyenva ni ntengera nga ndi gh'ali era ni ntya nga mmulowooziiza. 
Job23:16 Katonda ammazeemu omwoyo; oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona andhugumiiza. 
Job23:17 Katonda mwene n'antiisa se ti nzikiiza, waire ng'enzikiiza n'engemye ku maiso.”" 
Job24:1 “Ku lwaki oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona tataagho biseera bya kusaliramu musango? Ku lwaki abagheereza be tibabona bw'asala musango mu butuufu? 
Job24:2 Ghaligho abaiba eitaka lya banaibwe, baalyetwalira, baanhaga ensolo, baadhaaya ng'edhaibwe." 
Job24:3 Batwala endogoyi ya walekwa, baatoola ente ku namwandu ye baawola eibandha, baagisigaza ng'omusingo." 
Job24:4 Babinga abaavu babaviire mu ngira, baaghaliriza abaghafu okulumukagho n'okwegisa." 
Job24:5 Olwo abaavu baaba ng'oti ntulege, baaba eyo mu irungu nga baagala akamere, ak'okugha abaana baibwe balye." 
Job24:6 Era Baayagala eby'okuliisa ensolo dhaibwe, mu nimiro edhitali dhaibwe. Baanoga ku mizabbibu egirekeibwa mu nimiro dh'aboonooni." 
Job24:7 Abaavu basula madu, nga ghazira kye beebwise okuwona empewo okubafuuwa." 
Job24:8 Amaadhi gagwa gaababoleza mu nsozi, beegema ku lubaale olw'okubulwa ghe bageigama." 
Job24:9 Ghaligho abantu ababi abaswankula abaana abaziraku baiseibwe, baabatoola ku bainhaibwe, baatwala abaana abo ab'abaavu ng'omusingo gw'eibandha." 
Job24:10 Aye abaavu babita madu nga bazira kye bavaire. Endhala ebaluma nga beetwise emere y'empeke ye bakunguliire ababi. 
Job24:11 Baakamulira ababi abo omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, era baabakunhira omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, aye beene baasigala nga bali ndiwo." 
Job24:12 Abantu abali kufa basinda mu kibuga, n'abafumitiibwa baalira, aye Katonda yaaloba kufaayo ku bisobyo bikolebwa.”" 
Job24:13 “Ghaligho abakyagha obutangaavu, nga tibakaabwenda era tibatambulira mu ngira muli butangaavu obwo." 
Job24:14 Omutemo azuuka mu nzikiiza, yaita omwavu n'omughafu, era obwire aba mwibi." 
Job24:15 Omusaadha omwenzi yeena ateega bwire kuziba, ng'akoba ati, ‘Ghazira aidha kumbona.’ Era yeefuusafuusa mu maiso, abantu balobe kumumanha." 
Job24:16 Mu bwire abaibi mwe basimira ebituli mu ndhu, omusana beigaliza baaloba kubona butangaavu." 
Job24:17 Batya ng'obwire bukyeire, aye ebiba mu nzikiiza tibibatiisa.”" 
Job24:18 “Omubi amaadhi ag'omwidhuzo gamweyaagho, n'ekibandha kye kyakolimirwa Katonda, era tighakaaligho akola mu mizabbibu gye." 
Job24:19 Ng'akasana ak'endoboozi bwe kamalagho omugozi ogusaanuuse, n'amagombe gatyo bwe gamalagho omwonooni." 
Job24:20 Ni inhina ow'omwonooni oyo mwene amwerabira. Enhengere dhaamweriira yaazikirira ng'omuti ogukuukwikegho. 
Job24:21 Omwonooni abisa bubi omugumba, era ni namwandu tamukolera kalungi naire." 
Job24:22 Aye Katonda mu buyinza bwe azikiriza ab'amaani; asituka yaabamalaku eisuubi ery'okuba abalamu. 
Job24:23 Aja yaabagha emiraala baatoolera okwesigula, aye yaasigala ng'abasimbyeku amaiso." 
Job24:24 Ababi babaaku bukalamu kumala bwa ntangama, oluvainhuma baabulagho. Batoolebwagho ng'abandi boonaboona; baaba ng'oti n'ebifaaganda eby'engaano ebisaliibwa ku kikolo." 
Job24:25 Oba nga ti bwekiri, naani anaanumiriza ati ndi muguya, era n'ayoleka ati bye ndhogera muzira nsa?”" 
Job25:1 Agho Bilidadi Omushuhi yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job25:2 “Katonda n'ali n'obukumu obufuga era atiibwa; aleeta emiraala mu bwakyabazinga bwe obw'omu igulu. 
Job25:3 Amagye g'ali nago tigabalika. Obutangaavu bwe bwakira buli ghantu. 
Job25:4 Ghaligho omuntu yeenayeena asobola okuba omutuufu mu maiso ga Katonda? Omuntu eyazaalibwa obuzaalibwe, aghanga okuba omulongoofu?" 
Job25:5 Mu maiso ga Katonda, ni bwe guba omwezi tigwaka ni guboneka, n'emuunienie dhiba ng'oti dhizira butangaavu." 
Job25:6 Memale leero omuntu obuntu, enhengere obuyengere, omwana w'omuntu, olugereegere obugereegere!”" 
Job26:1 Agho Yobu yairamu ng'akoba ati: 
Job26:2 “Kale ng'onhambye nze omunafu ali ati, bwenebwene onumuukiriire!" 
Job26:3 Kale ng'ompaire amagezi nze azira ky'aidhi, era waayoleka by'otegeera obukalamu!" 
Job26:4 Naani akuyambyeku okwogera obukalamu otyo? Naani akughaire by'oyogeire?” 
Job26:5 “Abafu batengera nga batiire, eyo e magombe mu maadhi agali ghansi." 
Job26:6 E magombe ezira kikwekeibwa ku Katonda; abona byonabyona ebiri mu kifo ekyo eky'okuzikirira. 
Job26:7 Abamba eigulu ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, era yaalengeedhia ensi mu ibbanga." 
Job26:8 Asibira amaadhi mu bire ebigemu, obuzito bwago bwaloba kubyabya." 
Job26:9 Agisa entebe ye ng'agighembaku ebire. 
Job26:10 Yataagho olukoloboze okwezunguluza enhandha, okwawula obutangaavu ku nzikiiza." 
Job26:11 Empagi dh'eigulu dhitengera era dhaadhugumira, Katonda bw'atiisaamu obutiise okudhisaaniagho." 
Job26:12 Olw'obuyinza bwe yaghangula enhanda; olw'amagezi ge yaazikiriza Rahabu ogusota gwamu. 
Job26:13 Yafuuwa ebire yaabyeya ku igulu; yaagema empiima yaafumita ogusota ogw'omu nhandha nga guli kulumuka okwewonia. 
Job26:14 Aye ebyo katundu butundu ak'ebintu by'akola. Era bye tumuwuliraku n'ebitono einho. Obukumu bwe obw'amaani bw'ali nabwo naani asobola okubutegeera?” 
Job27:1 Agho Yobu yairamu okwogera olughayo lwe, ng'akoba ati:" 
Job27:2 “Katonda tambisiisa mu butuufu, era oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona andeeteire enaku ku mwoyo. Aye era ndi kumulayirira nti:" 
Job27:3 nga nkaali mulamu era nga nkaagheera omuuka Katonda mwene oyo gwe yampa," 
Job27:4 omunwa gwange tigulikoba bya buguya, oba olulimi lwange okwogera eby'obulimba." 
Job27:5 Tirigeza naire kukoba imwe nti muli batuufu; ndidha kwekalangulanga ku kubakoba nti nziraku musango, okutuusa lwe ndifa." 
Job27:6 Ndidha kugumira ku kuba omutuufu; omwoyo gwange guzira kye gunvunaana obulamu bwange bwonabwona. 
Job27:7 Omuzigu wange abonerezebwe ng'omubi; n'oyo anwanisa akolweku ng'omwonooni. 
Job27:8 Atatya Katonda kiki ky'asuubirayo, nga Katonda amukomiiza yaamutoolaku obulamu?" 
Job27:9 Bw'aliba mu buzibu, Katonda aliwulira okulira kwe?" 
Job27:10 Ti n'omuntu asanhukira einho okusinza oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, n'okumweghemba ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Job27:11 Ka mbeegerese imwe, nti Katonda wa bukumu, tiidha kubagisa bifa ku oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona." 
Job27:12 Aye bona, imwe beene mwena mubyeboneireku n'agaimwe. Kale ku lwaki mweyogeza ebiziramu makulu?" 
Job27:13 Kino n'ekibonerezo Katonda ky'agha ababi abakiriga bantu banaibwe: 
Job27:14 Abaana be bazaala ni baala, baba ba kufa mpiima; eizaire lyaibwe tirifuna mere ya kulya erimala." 
Job27:15 Ababi abo bwe bafa, abaana be balekagho bafa lumbe lubi, banamwandu baibwe baaloba na kubalira." 
Job27:16 Omubi ni bw'alyesololeza empiiya edhitabalika, n'abunga ebivaalo ebisinga ni ku bye yeetaaga," 
Job27:17 ebyo by'aba abunze omulungi n'alibivaala, era ole aziraku musango n'aligabana empiiya edho." 
Job27:18 Endhu omubi y'azimba eba ng'oti kisu kya nhonhi, oba ng'oti n'entindi ey'omukuumi w'enimiro eba ey'akaseera obuseera." 
Job27:19 Aja okutenduka nga mukombe, aye yaaloba kwirayo kuba mukombe kabiri. Aja okuzibula amaiso ati, ng'obukombe bwe bubuzeegho." 
Job27:20 Ebitiisa bimugwira mangu ng'oti mwidhuzo gwa maadhi ogazindula obuzindule, era obwire kiwunga yaamutwaliriza." 
Job27:21 Empewo eva e buvandhuba emubbeeda yaaja naye, yaamweyaagho gh'aba." 
Job27:22 Emufuumuula aghazira kusaasira, eno nga mwene bw'afuba okugyeteekuluzaaku." 
Job27:23 Eja ng'ewolomya ebintu byamuwowoiganira.” 
Job28:1 “Bwenebwene eriyo ekirombe omusimibwa feeza, yaabaayo n'ekifo ye bakenenulira zaabu." 
Job28:2 Mu itaka, mwe basima ekyuma ekigumu einho. Era basaanuusa mabaale okufunamu ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
Job28:3 Abantu babinga enzikiiza nga bakunaania entaala, baayagala eyo mu itaka ghansi, amabaale ge banaasimayo eyo mu nzikiiza egemye bedimudimu." 
Job28:4 Bayiikuula eitaka eyo eghala etaba bantu n'abatambuze ye batabita, nga beegemye ku migugha kwe beewuubira okwika, nga bali eyo bonka ku lwaibwe." 
Job28:5 Emere erimwa ku nsi. Aye ghansi gh'ensi eyo, ebintu byetabula ng'oti n'aghali omuliro." 
Job28:6 Mu mabaale gaayo mwe batoola amabaale ga bbululu ag'omughendo ageetebwa saffiro, mu nkungu yaayo mubaamu zaabu." 
Job28:7 Engira ey'omu birombe ghazira nhonhi eyiiga egiidhi, n'akakubi tikagibonangaku." 
Job28:8 Empologoma tegisimbangamuuku, oba ensolo eyindi yoonayoona enkambwe okugibitamu." 
Job28:9 Abantu basima mu lubaale olubbalangufu, baasima mu nsozi okutuuka ku ntobo dhaadho." 
Job28:10 Batema emyole mu lubaale, baazuula amabaale ag'omughendo." 
Job28:11 Bakugira emiiga girobe kukuuluula, baata gheeru ebintu ebyagisibwa." 
Job28:12 Aye amagezi gaagaanibwa gha? Luuyi gha aghaba okutegeera? 
Job28:13 Tigaagaanibwa mu nsi ya balamu, ghazira aidhi mughendo gugalimu." 
Job28:14 Entobo y'enhandha ekoba eti, ‘Tigali mu nze.’ N'enhandha yaakoba eti, ‘Tigali ghe ndi.’" 
Job28:15 Toghaayo zaabu n'ogafuna era topima feeza n'ogagula. 
Job28:16 Zaabu omulungi ow'e Ofiri tayagayaga nago mughendo, waire amabaale ag'omughendo ageetebwa onikisi ni saffiro." 
Job28:17 Zaabu n'ekirawuli tibisobola kwaga nago mughendo, waire ebyamadholobera ebyakolebwa mu zaabu omukenenule." 
Job28:18 Amagezi ga mughendo inho okusinga amabaale ag'omughendo ageetebwa korali oba kurisitalo. 
Job28:19 Eibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa topazi ni zaabu omukenenule, tobigerangerania ku mughendo gwa magezi." 
Job28:20 Kale amagezi gava gha? Luuyi gha aghaba okutegeera? 
Job28:21 Ebiramu byonabyona tibisobola kugabona, n'enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga dhoona tidhighanga kugabona." 
Job28:22 Amagombe n'ekifo eky'okuzikirira bikoba biti, ‘Twewuliriraku n'agaife bye boogera ku magezi ago mu lubono bubono.’ ”" 
Job28:23 “Katonda yenka n'aidhi aghaba amagezi; n'ategeera engira etuukayo. 
Job28:24 Kuba n'atuusa amaiso mu buli kankondo ka nsi, n'abona buli kantu akali ghansi gh'eigulu." 
Job28:25 Yagha empewo amaani, yaapimira amaadhi ghe gakanga." 
Job28:26 Yagha amaadhi ghe gagwa, yaagha n'olukuba engira ye lubitamu." 
Job28:27 Olwo yaabona amagezi, yaageekalirisa, yaageekebeedha era yaagalingirira." 
Job28:28 Yaakoba abantu ati, ‘Bona, mu kutya Musengwa Katonda n'omuli amagezi; mu kwesamba ekibi, n'omuva okutegeera.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Agho Yobu yaayongera okwogera ng'akoba ati: 
Job29:2 “Ngoli mba nga bwenabanga eira. Ni mba mu biseera bire mwe nalabirirwanga Katonda," 
Job29:3 entaala ye yayakiranga agho ku mutwe gwange, okuumulisa mbite mu nzikiiza." 
Job29:4 Mu biseera ebyo nabanga bukalamu, nga Katonda ni mukagwa wange, akuuma amaka gange." 
Job29:5 Olwo oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona ng'aba ghalala ninze, nga n'abaana bange baneezungulwire." 
Job29:6 Ng'amata ge ndi nago nganaabya bwa bigere, olw'obungi. Nga n'olubaale ludhuluudha omuzigo gwe baakamulirangaku, mu bibala eby'emiti gyange emyoliva." 
Job29:7 Bwe najanga mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango ogwingira mu kibuga, nga nja mu kifo ekyange" 
Job29:8 abaisuka olwambonanga banviirayo, n'abakaire basituka baayemerera." 
Job29:9 Abakulembeze baasirikanga, baagema ni ku minwa." 
Job29:10 N'abakungu enimi dhaabeesibiranga ku bibuno!” 
Job29:11 “Abaawuliranga bye ndhogera n'abambonanga, nga baneesiimisa era nga bandhogeraku bikalamu byereere;" 
Job29:12 kuba nawonianga omwavu eyandiriranga okumuyamba n'oyo eyafiirwaku ise, azira amugema ku mukono." 
Job29:13 Be nawonianga okufa bansabiranga nkabi. Banamwandu bye nabakoleranga byabasangaazanga inho, baakuba emizira." 
Job29:14 Buliidho nakolanga bituufu byereere. Okukola amazima kwanfuukira ng'oti n'ekivaalo kyange, era ng'oti n'ekitambaala eky'oku mutwe." 
Job29:15 Nagemanga abatulu ku mukono; naakongoodhianga abalema. 
Job29:16 Nafuuka ise w'abaavu, neekalirisanga ensonga dh'abantu be ntaidhi." 
Job29:17 Namenhanga emba dh'aboonooni, naabanhunhunkuza omuyiigo ogwababanga mu maino.”" 
Job29:18 “Nadhuubanga nti ndighangaala inho, naafiira mu maka gange nga ndi bukalamu." 
Job29:19 Nali ng'oti muti ogulandiza emizi aghali amaadhi, nga n'omusulo gugwa ku nsaga dhaagwo obwire bwonabwona." 
Job29:20 Abantu bandhisangamu ekitiisa buliidho, n'amaani gange gaalobanga kukendeera." 
Job29:21 Baateegereranga n'obuguminkiriza, baawuliranga bukalamu bye mbalamba." 
Job29:22 Bye nayogeranga bwe byawanga, nga ghazira kye bongeraku. Ebibono byange byabanogananga ng'oti n'eitondo ery'amaadhi erigwa ku itaka eikalu." 
Job29:23 Banteegereranga ng'oti n'abateegerera amaadhi okugwa, baaba ng'oti n'abalimi bwe basangaalira ekire ky'amaadhi amatoigo." 
Job29:24 Be nasekerangaku nga tibasobola kukiikiriza bati kya bwene! Akamwenhu kange ku maiso kaabaizangamu amaani. 
Job29:25 Nabanga mubbede mu bo, naabasalirangagho eky'okukola. Nababangamu ng'oti ni kyabazinga mu igye lye; era ng'oti n'omuntu ali kugumya abafiiriirwa.”" 
Job30:1 “Aye mpegaano abantu be nsinga obukulu n'abaanhooma. Ate nga baiseibwe nze nabanhoomanga, nga tibaganha na kuba ghalala na mbwa dhikuuma byayo byange." 
Job30:2 Nandibafuniemu ki abantu abo abaali nga tibakaalimu maani? 
Job30:3 Olw'obwavu n'endhala, baagugunanga ebikalukalu obwire mu nzikiiza mu irungu." 
Job30:4 Baanoganga ku bisaka amakaba g'ebimera; emizi egy'akeeyoyeyo gyabanga emere yaibwe. 
Job30:5 Baabingibwanga mu bantu, baabakubiriranga enduulu ng'oti baibi." 
Job30:6 Baasigalira kubanga eyo mu nkonko dh'amaadhi, ni mu biina, ni mu mpuku edh'omu lubaale." 
Job30:7 Baaliriranga mu nsiko ng'oti nsolo, baabanga ghansi mu bisaka nga beenhize ghalala." 
Job30:8 Bali agho batyo basirusiru era tibamanhiibwa. Baakubwa emiigo, baabingibwa mu ighanga." 
Job30:9 Aye mpegaano mbafuukiire lwembo, ndi nsambo yaibwe ya kudhondha." 
Job30:10 Baneesiniirwa, tibakaaseeta ghe ndi, tibatya na kwidha kunfuudha mu maiso matanta." 
Job30:11 Olw'okuba Katonda ammaze amaani y'andekaagho atyo, kye benda okunkola kye bankola." 
Job30:12 Ekikuukuulu ky'abaisuka abo kiimingirira embiro; bali kutegeka okuunumba bantemule. 
Job30:13 Bazingiiza engira yange baghange okunzikiriza, nga ghazira ababeereireku." 
Job30:14 Bawomola ekituli mu kisenge kyange ekigumu, baidha okuunumba nga banziinduukiriza." 
Job30:15 Ebintiisa bindidhira. Ekitiibwa kyange kijiire ng'oti mpewo. Eisuubi ery'okuwona kwange libise ng'oti kire.” 
Job30:16 “Mpegaano mpoiremu obulamu; ekiseera eky'okudaazibwadaazibwa kwange kituuse. 
Job30:17 Obwire amagumba gaanuma; obulumi bwe ndi nabwo tibusalaku. 
Job30:18 Bungema n'amaani bwankunhakunha omubiri. Bwanhwegula enkoto yange yaaba ng'oti kitogi butogi eky'ekivaalo kyange. 
Job30:19 Katonda ankubye mu bitosi, nfuuse ng'oti nkungu bukungu na ivu buvu." 
Job30:20 Wo Katonda wange, bwe nkulirira tondhiramu, bwe nkweghemba tonfaaku." 
Job30:21 Onfuukire mukambwe, wankiriga n'amaani go goonagoona." 
Job30:22 Oleka empewo yantwaliriza, wandhuuzayuuza eno n'ere mu kiwunga ow'amaani." 
Job30:23 Bwenebwene ndidhi nti oli kuntwala magombe, mu kifo erija abalamu boonaboona." 
Job30:24 Ku lwaki olumba omuntu ali kuzikirira, atakaali na ky'asobola kukola, okutoolaku okusaba okusaasirwa?" 
Job30:25 Tyaliriranga maziga ghalala n'abali mu nnaku yaibwe? Tyalumirwanga bali mu bwetaavu? 
Job30:26 Aye bwe nasuubira ebirungi, ate bibi n'ebyaidha. Bwe nateegerera obutangaavu, ate nzikiiza n'eyaidha." 
Job30:27 Omwoyo gumpakukapakuka, tiguntereera; ekiseera ky'okudaazibwadaazibwa kintuuseeku." 
Job30:28 Ntambula nga ndi munakughavu, ghaabula ansaasiraku. Neesimba abantu ghe beesololeiza, naabeeghemba okuunhamba." 
Job30:29 Nafuuka muganda wa bibe, nsama busame oti byene; era naafuuka mukagwa wa maaya, nkyolya bukyolye." 
Job30:30 Omubiri gundhirugaire, era gundhokerera ng'oti muliro." 
Job30:31 Mpegaano entongooli yange ngikubiraku nhembo dha kugegenga; endere yange ngifuuyira balizi.” 
Job31:1 “Neeyama ira okwekuumanga amaiso gange, kabiri ate nandisoboire ntya okulingirira omughala omuguna nga ndi kumwegomba?" 
Job31:2 Katonda yampa mugabo ki okuva ghaigulu y'ali? Nagheebwa ki okuva mu igulu ew'oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona? 
Job31:3 Akabi tikaidhira boonooni, n'okuzikirira tikugwira babi?" 
Job31:4 Katonda tabona bwe neebisa, era tabona buli kigere kye nsitula?" 
Job31:5 Nze ndayira nti tiguyangaku era tikupankupaniangaku muntu yeenayeena. 
Job31:6 Kale Katonda ampime ku minzaani epima ekituufu, abone nga bwe nziraku musango.”" 
Job31:7 “Bwemba nga nadaaliima naava ku ngira entuufu, naatwalirizibwa bye mbona, era naakola ebibi ebyandeetera okuba atali mulongoofu," 
Job31:8 kale bye nsiga ka biriibwe abandi. Emere ye mbaza ka bagiighe bagisuule. 
Job31:9 Bwemba nga neegomba muka omusaadha, ni mmuleemesa ku mulyango gwa muliraanwa," 
Job31:10 kale mukazi wange k'afumbirwe omusaadha owundi, era abandi basule naye." 
Job31:11 Kuba ekyo kyandibaire kiive, kyandibaire ekibi ekibonerezebwa abalamuzi." 
Job31:12 Kyandibaire ng'oti n'omuliro oguzikiriza ng'ogwa geyeena, gwandisiriiziiza buli kye ndi nakyo kyonakyona.”" 
Job31:13 “Bwemba nga naloba okuwulirisa omwiru wange k'abe omusaadha oba omukazi ng'aneemuluguunhiiza," 
Job31:14 kale ndikola ntya, Katonda bw'alisituka okunsalira omusango? Ndimwiramu ki bw'aliidha okumbuuza?" 
Job31:15 Eyatonda nze mu nda ya maama, era ti n'eyatonda n'omwiru oyo? Ti n'omulala oyo eyatuwumba mu nda twembi?" 
Job31:16 Naali nhimyeku abaavu bye beetaaga? Naali mmazeeku mu namwandu eisuubi? 
Job31:17 Naali ndiireku emere yange zenka, nga mulekwa taliire?" 
Job31:18 Obulamu bwange bwonabwona, mbaire ndabiriranga bamulekwa ng'oti ndi iseibwe." 
Job31:19 Bwe nabonanga omuntu ali kufa empewo olw'okubulwa ekivaalo, oba omwavu azira kye yeebwika," 
Job31:20 nga mmugha ekivaalo ekikoleibwa mu buviiri bw'entaama edhange. Agho yaba musiimu ye ndi. 
Job31:21 Tikupankupaniangaku mulekwa, nga neesiga nti abalamuzi baidha kumbeera." 
Job31:22 Aye bwemba nga nakikola, eibega lyange ka liwogokeku, omukono gwange gukutukeku." 
Job31:23 Nali tisobola kukola bintu biri ng'oti n'ebyo, olw'okutya Katonda okumbonereza.”" 
Job31:24 “Titangaku isuubi lyange mu bya bukombe, oba okwesiga ebintu bye mba nabyo." 
Job31:25 Tibangaku musangaavu lwa bukombe bwange bungi, waire okwesiima olw'empiiya kamaala." 
Job31:26 Tisinzangaku ndhuba na kwaka kwayo, oba okusinza omwezi n'okumesunkana kwagwo." 
Job31:27 Tidaaliimangaku ni mbisinza mu ngiso, nga nnhwegera engalo dhange okwoleka bwe mbigulumiza." 
Job31:28 Ekyo kyona kyandibaire kibi ekibonerezebwa abalamuzi, kuba nandibaire neegaine Katonda ali ghaigulu." 
Job31:29 Tisangaalirangaku kuzikirira kw'oyo ankyaye, oba okusagamba ng'akabi kamugwiriire." 
Job31:30 Tiganhangaku munwa gwange kwonoona, ni nsaba nga nkolima, nti afe." 
Job31:31 Abantu boonaboona ababa mu maka gange baidhi bati kiisi muntu eyaidhanga ye ndi, yagabulwanga eby'okulya yaiguta." 
Job31:32 Abatambuze nabasangaazanga, tyabalekanga kusula ku ngira." 
Job31:33 Tigisangaku ku bantu bibi byange, ng'oti n'abantu bwe bakweka ebintu mu ngoye dhe bavaire." 
Job31:34 Tirekerangaku kwogera oba ni ndoba kufuluma mu ndhu, olw'okutya okwogerwaku abantu, n'okunhoomebwa aboluganda.”" 
Job31:35 “Kale ngoli ghaligho awulirisa bye nkoba! Nkakasa nga bye nkoba bituufu. Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona leka andhiremu. Ngoli omuntu yeenayeena aliku ky'anvunaana ampa omusango mu bughandiike," 
Job31:36 bwenebwene nandigubbeedeire ku ibega gwabonebwa. Nandigutaire ku mutwe gwange ng'oti ngule. 
Job31:37 Nandikobeire Katonda byonabyona bye nakola; nandyemereire mu maiso ge nga ndi mugumu ng'oti muntu mubbede. 
Job31:38 Bwemba nga naiba bwibe ekibandha kye nnimamu, era nga kiri kulirira okwirizibwa mwene kyo," 
Job31:39 era bwemba nga ndya ebibala byamu aghazira kusasula, ni ndeka beene byo okufa endhala," 
Job31:40 kale leka enkandwa dhikulemu mu kifo ky'engaano, n'obukaala mu kifo kya sayiri.” Ebibono bya Yobu bikanze agho." 
Job32:1 Agho abasaadha bale abasatu baalekera agho okwiramu Yobu, kuba yali yeekakasa ng'aziraku musango." 
Job32:2 Aye Elihu, mutabane wa Barakeli Omubuza, ow'oku lulyo lwa Ramu, yaasungughala inho kuba Yobu yeeyeta aziraku musango, yaanenia Katonda." 
Job32:3 Era Elihu yaasungughalira ni bakagwa ba Yobu abasatu. Kuba baabulwa kye banairamu Yobu, waire nga baali bamaze okumusalira omusango okumusinga." 
Job32:4 Elihu yali akaateeze bale bamale okwogera, memale abeeku ky'akoba Yobu. Kuba mwene n'eyali omuto ku bale." 
Job32:5 Kale bwe yabona ng'abasaadha bale abasatu babuzeeku eky'okwiramu Yobu, yaasungughala inho." 
Job32:6 Agho Elihu oyo mutabane wa Barakeli Omubuza, yairamu ng'akoba ati: “Nze ndi muto mu myaka aye imwe muli bakulu, kye nviire ni ntya, ni ntabakobera kye ndidhi." 
Job32:7 Naakoba mule nti, ‘Ab'emyaka ka boogere, abakaire baghe amagezi.’" 
Job32:8 Aye omwoyo gwa Katonda oguli ku bantu, omuuka ogwo ogubateebwamu oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, n'ogubagha okutegeera." 
Job32:9 Okukula ti n'okugezighala, n'okukairigha ti n'okutegeera ekituufu." 
Job32:10 Kyenva nkoba nti, ‘Muntegere kutu, zeena nkobe kye ndidhi.’" 
Job32:11 Bona, mubaire nga mukeekoota bye munaayogera, nga nze nteegereire ebibono byaimwe, mpulire eby'amagezi ebibavaamu." 
Job32:12 Mbawuliriisa n'obwegendereza, aye ku imwe ghaabulagho waire omulala atakainia Yobu, oba n'airamu by'akobye." 
Job32:13 Mwegendereze mulobe kwesuuta muti amagezi mugazwire: Katonda n'asobola okughangula Yobu, se ti bantu." 
Job32:14 Yobu by'akobye tabyolekeiza nze. Era nze tyandimwizeemu na bibono ng'oti n'ebyo ebyaimwe.” 
Job32:15 “Yobu, bano basobeirwa, baabulwa eby'okwiramu. Bazira na kye bakaakoba." 
Job32:16 Obwo nga bwebasiriike, nze nteegerere buteegerere? Beemereire agho, bazira na kya kwiramu kindi." 
Job32:17 Nze ndidha kubaaku ni kye ndhiramu, ndidha kukoba kye ndidhi." 
Job32:18 Kuba eby'okwogera ndi na kamaala. Mpulira mule ekimpika ndhogere. 
Job32:19 Nziyiire, nziraku bugheereso. Bona, ndi ng'oti mwenge gwa mizabbibu omusu ogusandikiirwa, ogwenda okutulisa ekintu mwe bagutaire." 
Job32:20 Ndi n'okwogera nsobole okugheera. Nteekwa okubaaku kye nkoba. 
Job32:21 Tiidha kwekubira ku luuyi lw'ono oba olw'ole. Tiidha kubaaku ye nsuutiriza. 
Job32:22 Kuba tiidhi kusuutiriza, era Omutonzi wange asobola n'okuntoolagho amangu bwe nkola ntyo.”" 
Job33:1 “Mpegaano ni Yobu, wulira bye nja okwogera; wulirisa ebibono byange byonabyona." 
Job33:2 Kale ka ntoolere okwogera, nfulumye ekindi ku mwoyo." 
Job33:3 Ebibono byange byoleka nga ndi mwesimbu, era nga ndhogera mazima." 
Job33:4 Omwoyo gwa Katonda n'ogwantonda, omuuka ogw'oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona n'ogwampa obulamu." 
Job33:5 Oba osobola ndhiraamu. Sengeka bukalamu ensonga dho, oyemerere odhoogere." 
Job33:6 Mu maiso ga Katonda, nze n'iwe tufaanana; twembi twawumbibwa mu itaka." 
Job33:7 Kale otantya naire, tiidha kukubitiriraku." 
Job33:8 Bwenebwene oyogeire nga mpulira, amamiro go gaavuga mu matu gange nga gakoba gati," 
Job33:9 ‘Nziraku musango, ghazira kikyamu kye nakola. Nziraku kye nvunaanibwa era nziraku kibi." 
Job33:10 Aye Katonda yeegemya ensonga edhiziramu, yambisa ng'oti muzigu we." 
Job33:11 Asiba ebigere byange n'endhegere, yaalingiriza bye nkola byonabyona.’" 
Job33:12 Aye ka nkukobere iwe Yobu nti oli mukyamu bw'okoba otyo. Katonda tomugeza ku muntu, kuba amusinga ghala inho." 
Job33:13 Ku lwaki omuvunaana olw'obutakwiramu by'okoba? 
Job33:14 Ekituufu kiri nti Katonda ayogera mu nsambo eno oba ere, aye ng'abantu tibeeteerayo mwoyo ku ky'akoba." 
Job33:15 Obwire abantu nga batendwike ku buliri mu ndoolo enhingi einho, baba ni bye babonera mu birooto ni mu kubonekerwa." 
Job33:16 Agho Katonda gh'aigulira amatu g'abantu yaabaleetera okuwulira by'akoba, era yaalekagho akamanhiso akabalabula akatiisa." 
Job33:17 Katonda ayogera asobole okutoola abantu mu bikolwa ebibi, era abawonie okwekuluntaza." 
Job33:18 Abawonie okwika e magombe, n'okuzikirizibwa olumbe." 
Job33:19 Katonda akangaivula omuntu ng'amusuula ku ndiri n'obulwaire, yaidhula obulumi mu mubiri." 
Job33:20 Obulamu bwe bwesinwa emere, n'ebyamuwoomeranga yaaba nga takaabyegomba." 
Job33:21 Omubiri gumuwaaku yaagoogomba; amagumba ge agataabonekanga, gaakukunala." 
Job33:22 Atuukira irala ku mugo gw'amagombe, yaabulaku katono okuzikirira.”" 
Job33:23 “Aye ghasobola okubaagho owundi ku bamalaika ba Katonda enkumi n'enkumi, yaidha yaamuwonia; abo nga ni bamalaika abayamba abantu okubooleka ekituufu." 
Job33:24 Malaika oyo asobola okumugemerwa ekivunika, era yaakoba Katonda ati, ‘Muwonie alobe kwika magombe. Leka mmununule." 
Job33:25 Leka omubiri gwe gwire buyaaka ng'oti gwa mwana muto, airemu amaani ng'ag'omu buvubuka bwe.’" 
Job33:26 Olwo omuntu yaasinza Katonda, era Katonda yaamugemerwa ekivunika, yaaja mu maiso ge nga musangaavu, kuba amuwoniiza okufa." 
Job33:27 Era yaakobera abantu ati, ‘Nayonoona, naakola ebikyamu, aye Katonda taneesasuliizaaku." 
Job33:28 Annunwire naaloba kwika magombe, ndidha kwongera okuba omulamu.’" 
Job33:29 Bona, ebyo byonabyona Katonda abikolera abantu emikuzi kamaala," 
Job33:30 okubawonia amagombe, abaghe eisanhu ery'okuba abalamu.”" 
Job33:31 “Mpegaano ni Yobu, wulirisa bye nkoba; sirika ondeke ndhogere." 
Job33:32 Aye oba nga oli ni ky'okoba, kyogere mpulire. Yogera, kuba nhenda kukakasa nti oziraku musango." 
Job33:33 Aye oba nga okizira, sirika owulire bye nkoba. Ndidha kukwegeresa eby'amagezi.”" 
Job34:1 Agho Elihu yaakoba ati: 
Job34:2 “Muwulirise bye nkoba imwe abantu abagezigezi. Muntegere kutu imwe abaidhi ebintu; 
Job34:3 kuba omuntu mu by'awulira, kutu we ayawulagho ebituufu n'ebitali bituufu, ng'oti n'olulimi lwe bwerwawulagho emere ewooma n'etawooma." 
Job34:4 Ka twawulegho ekituufu. Twesaliregho beene na beene, kye tubona nga kikalamu.”" 
Job34:5 “Kuba Yobu akobye ati, ‘Nziraku musango, aye Katonda tambisiisa mu butuufu." 
Job34:6 Waire nga ndi mutuufu, ndhetebwa muguya, waire nga tiizangaku musango, nfumitibwa nfe bufe.’" 
Job34:7 Ezirayo muntu ali ng'oti ni Yobu, anhooma Katonda n'atamubona namu kantu." 
Job34:8 Ajiira mu ikumbe ghalala n'abakozi b'ebyambyone, yaatambulira ghalala n'aboonooni;" 
Job34:9 kuba akobye ati, ‘Omuntu azira ky'afuna mu kuba mukagwa wa Katonda.’" 
Job34:10 Kale muntegere kutu imwe abantu abategeevu. Tikisoboka waire akatono Katonda okukola ebibi; oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona okukola ebikyamu. 
Job34:11 Kuba aja kugha kiisi muntu empeera ng'ajiira ku muntu oyo bye yakola. Alibisa kiisi muntu ng'ajiira ku muntu oyo bwe yeebisa. 
Job34:12 Bwenebwene Katonda takola kibi; oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona tasala musango mu butali butuufu. 
Job34:13 Naani eyagha Katonda okulabirira ensi? Naani eyamugemya buli kintu? 
Job34:14 Ngoli yasalagho okweiriza omwoyo gwe n'omuuka gwe, ebigha obulamu," 
Job34:15 kiisi kiramu kyandizikiriire, abantu baira mu nkungu.”" 
Job34:16 “Kale oba nga oli mugezi, wulirisa kye nkoba." 
Job34:17 Bwenebwene ngoli Katonda takola bituufu, yandighanze okufuga? Osobola okusalira Katonda ow'amaani era omutuufu, omusango okumusinga?" 
Job34:18 Bakyabazinga n'abakungu bwe baba nga babi era abazira kye bagasa, Katonda oyo ti n'abasalira omusango okubasinga?" 
Job34:19 Katonda tiyeekubira ku luuyi lwa bafuzi, abisa bulala abakombe n'abaavu; kuba boonaboona bitonde bye." 
Job34:20 Abantu bafa mu kaseera buseera, mu bwire ghagati. Katonda abakuba baabulagho. Ab'amaani batoolebwagho nga ghazira na muntu abagemyeku." 
Job34:21 Alingirira ensambo omuntu ye yeebisaamu, era abona buli kigere ky'asitula." 
Job34:22 Ghazira kinsense waire nzikiiza egemye bedimudimu, abakola ebibi mwe baghanga okwegisa ku Katonda." 
Job34:23 Katonda tiyeetaaga kumala kulaalika muntu, aidhe mu maiso ge okumusalira omusango." 
Job34:24 Tiyeetaaga kumala kubuuliriza, memale akuukulegho ab'amaani era aizeegho abandi mu kifo kyaibwe." 
Job34:25 Nga bye yakola bw'abiidhi obukalamu, abakuukulagho bwire yaabazikiriza." 
Job34:26 Ababonereza olw'ebibi byaibwe ng'abantu babona; 
Job34:27 kuba baamuvaaku, baamudheemera, baalekera okufaayo ku biragiro bye." 
Job34:28 Baaleetera abaavu okumulirira. Yaawulira okulira kwaibwe nga babadaazadaaza. 
Job34:29 Katonda bw'asalagho obutabaaku ky'akolagho, naani asobola okumusalira omusango okumusinga? Bw'agisa amaiso ge, naani asobola okumubona, k'abe omuntu omulala ati oba eighanga eiramba?" 
Job34:30 Katonda mwene n'alobera abantu abatamutya okufuga amaghanga n'okutuntuza abantu.” 
Job34:31 “Yobu, waali okobyeku Katonda oti, ‘Nayonoona, tikairayo kusobya?" 
Job34:32 Ndhegeresa kye ntabona bwemba nga nakola ekibi era tikairayo kukikola.’ 
Job34:33 Oba nga otakania Katonda ky'akola, oghanga otya okumusuubira okukola ky'oyenda? Agho niiwe oli n'okusalagho, se ti ninze. Tukobere ky'olowooza." 
Job34:34 Abantu abategeevu baidha kunkoba, era kiisi muntu ow'amagezi awulira bye ndhogera, aidha kunkoba ati," 
Job34:35 ‘Yobu ayogeza butamanha, ni by'ayogera muzira magezi.’" 
Job34:36 Yobu agwaine awozesebwe mu bwidhuvu buli kye yakola, kuba ayogera ng'oti n'abantu ababi." 
Job34:37 Ku bibi bye ayimbiraku n'obudheemu, yaanhooma Katonda nga tubona era yaamwogeraku ebibono ebitakutuka.”" 
Job35:1 Agho Elihu yaakoba ati: 
Job35:2 “Yobu, iwe okibona nga kituufu okukoba oti oziraku musango mu maiso ga Katonda?" 
Job35:3 Oba okubuuza Katonda oti, ‘Ekibi kyange kikukolaku ki? N'obutakola kibi bungasiisa ki?’" 
Job35:4 Nze ndidha kukwiramu ni bakagwa bo. 
Job35:5 Lingirira eigulu obone. Weekalirise ebire ebyeghaniike y'otatuuka. 
Job35:6 Bw'oyonoona, Katonda omukolaku kabi ki? Ebibi byo bwe byeyongera obungi, bimukolaku ki?" 
Job35:7 Bw'oba omutuufu, Katonda aganhulwamu ki? Era ky'afunamu n'ekiri gha?" 
Job35:8 Obubi bwo busobola kulumya muntu buntu ng'oti niiwe, n'ebirungi by'okola muntu ye biganhula." 
Job35:9 Olw'okutuntuzibwa okungi, abantu bakuba enduulu, baalira nga benda okufuna anaabawonia." 
Job35:10 Aye ghazira akobaku ati, ‘Katonda ali luuyi gha eyantonda, asobozesa abantu okwemba ni bwe baba nga bali mu kiseera ekizibu;" 
Job35:11 atwegeresa ni tuba nga tusinga ensolo, era atugha amagezi ni tuba nga tusinga enhonhi?’" 
Job35:12 Abantu baba eyo baalira aye Katonda tabairamu, kuba beekuluntaza era babi." 
Job35:13 Bwenebwene balirira bwereere, Katonda tabawulira naire, oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona talingaku ye bali." 
Job35:14 Memale olwo iwe anaakuwulira atya, oli kukoba oti tomubona, era oti omusango gwo guli mu maiso ge, iwe omuteegereire buteegerere?" 
Job35:15 Era mpegaano oli kukoba oti obusungu bwe buzira ye bubonereza, era ghazira ky'afaayo ku bibi." 
Job35:16 By'okoba biziramu nsa; by'oyogera tobiidhi.” 
Job36:1 Agho Elihu yaayongera, yaakoba ati:" 
Job36:2 “Kola ng'okanguminkiriza mmale okukwinhonhola, kuba nkaaliyo ni kye nhenda okukoba ku lwa Katonda." 
Job36:3 Ndidha kuleeta bye ndidhi okuva ghano ni ghale, okukakasa nti Omutonzi wange mutuufu." 
Job36:4 Kuba tiguya mu bye ndhogera; nze y'oli kubona ndi n'okumanha okwidhuvu. 
Job36:5 Bona eno, Katonda wa maani, ezira muntu y'alekulira agho, era ghazira ky'atategeera." 
Job36:6 Taleka babi kusigalagho nga bakaali balamu. Era abanhigirizibwa abagha ekibagwaniire. 
Job36:7 Abatuufu abakuuma; abatyamya ng'oti bakyabazinga, baagulumizibwa ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Job36:8 Aye bwe basibwa n'endhegere ni badaazibwadaazibwa," 
Job36:9 Katonda abooleka nga bwe baakola ekibi olw'okwekuluntaza. 
Job36:10 Aigula amatu gaibwe, bawulire by'abalabula, era yaabalagira okuva mu bibi byaibwe." 
Job36:11 Bwe bawulira ni bamugheereza, bamalaku obulamu bwaibwe nga bafunie ebirungi kamaala, era nga basangaavu." 
Job36:12 Aye bwe batawulira balizikirizibwa olumbe, baafa olw'obutamanha bwaibwe." 
Job36:13 Abo abatatya Katonda basiba obusungu ku mwoyo. Bw'ababonereza tibamusaba kubayamba. 
Job36:14 Bafa nga bakaali baisuka, baamalaku obulamu bwaibwe nga baswavu." 
Job36:15 Aye Katonda ayegeresa abantu ng'abita mu kubadaazadaaza, era abaigula amaiso ng'abita mu nnaku ye baagaana.”" 
Job36:16 “Katonda yakutoola aghazibu, yaakuta mu idembe, era waafuna eby'okulya waasinwa n'okusinwa." 
Job36:17 Aye mpegaano oli kubonerezebwa nga bw'ogwaniire, omusango gukusinze." 
Job36:18 Weegendereze olobe kuguyibwaguyibwa bya bukombe. Era enguzi erobe kukwonoona. 
Job36:19 Okulira amaziga tikuukuyambe, waire amaani go goonagoona okukuwonia okudaazibwadaazibwa." 
Job36:20 Oteegomba bwire kwidha, amaghanga mwe gazikirizibwa." 
Job36:21 Weegendereze olobe kukola bibi, kuba Katonda yakusindikira okudaazibwadaazibwa kukuwonie ebibi byo.”" 
Job36:22 “Bona eno, Katonda ni yenka agulumizibwa! Mwegeresa ki owundi ali ng'oti niye?" 
Job36:23 Naani amukobera eky'okukola? Oba naani aghanga okumukoba ati, ‘Ky'akoze ti kituufu?’" 
Job36:24 Ogwaine okumusaakanga olw'ebyo by'akola, abantu bye basaaka mu nhembo." 
Job36:25 Abantu boonaboona babibona, aye nga babirengerera ghala." 
Job36:26 Bona eno, Katonda mukulu era titumwidhi mu bwidhuvu, emyaka gye tigibalika." 
Job36:27 Atwala ghaigulu amatondo g'amaadhi, yaagafuulamu amaadhi agatoonha," 
Job36:28 ebire ge biyugha ni gatoonhera abantu mu bungi. 
Job36:29 Ghalighooku omuntu ategeera ebire bwe bighembebwa ku igulu, oba okutyabuka kw'eigulu Katonda y'aba?" 
Job36:30 Bona, aidhuza okumyansa kw'olukuba ku igulu kwonakwona. Aye entobo y'enhandha yaagighembaku enzikiiza." 
Job36:31 Aleetera amaadhi okugwa, yaaliisa abantu; yaabagha emere kamaala." 
Job36:32 Agema olukuba mu ngalo dhe, yaalulagira okukuba gheenegheene gh'ayenda." 
Job36:33 Okutyabuka kw'olukuba kwoleka kuti kiwunga aseese, n'ente dhimanha dhiti ali kwidha.”" 
Job37:1 “Kiwunga antengeza omwoyo gwampakukapakuka. 
Job37:2 Muwulire okutyabuka kw'amamiro ga Katonda, n'okuduma okuva mu kanwa mwe!" 
Job37:3 Asindika okumyansa ghansi gh'eigulu woonawoona, era kwabuna ensi yoonayoona." 
Job37:4 Olwo amamiro ge gaawologoma, era gaatyabuka n'amaani. Gawulirwa, eno nga n'okumyansa bwe kuja mu maiso." 
Job37:5 Okutyabuka kw'amamiro ga Katonda kwewuunhisa! Akola ebyewuninkiriza ebitulema okutegeera. 
Job37:6 Kuba alagira omugozi ati, ‘Gwa ku nsi’ n'ekire eky'amaadhi ati, ‘Gwa n'amaani.’" 
Job37:7 Ayemereza emirimo gya buli muntu, abantu boonaboona be yatonda bamanhe by'akola." 
Job37:8 Ensolo dhija ye dheegisa, dhaaba mu mpuku dhaadho." 
Job37:9 Kiwunga ava ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, n'empewo eri benhogonhogo yaava ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Job37:10 Katonda agheera omuuka gwaleeta omugozi, amaadhi gaagema ng'oti ibaale." 
Job37:11 Ekire ekigemu akiidhuza amaadhi, ebire byabunia woonawoona okumyansa kwe." 
Job37:12 Ebire byezungulula eno n'ere, nga bw'aba abiragiire. Bikolera ku biragiro bye buli ghantu ghe bija." 
Job37:13 Agwisa amaadhi okufukirira ensi. Olundi agagwisa lwa kubonereza bantu, ate olundi kaaba kamanhiso akooleka ekisa kye." 
Job37:14 Yobu, wulira kino: siriikirira olowooze ku byewuninkiriza Katonda by'akola." 
Job37:15 Oidhi Katonda nga bw'alagira ebire, ni bivaaku okumyansa?" 
Job37:16 Oidhi ebire bwe biseeyeeya mu ibbanga, okwoleka obukugu bwa Katonda obutaloodheka?" 
Job37:17 Iwe adaagadaaga n'olwota mu bivaalo byo, ng'empewo ensu eva ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, eri kufuuwa," 
Job37:18 osobola okugemeraku Katonda okubamba eigulu, ni limesunkana ng'oti mbonerwamu?" 
Job37:19 Twegerese bye tube tukobe Katonda, ghazira kye twidhi naire. Tuli ng'oti n'abali mu nzikiiza." 
Job37:20 Nze tyenda kwogera naye, ghazira muntu eyaali yeeyendeireku Katonda amuzikirize." 
Job37:21 Empewo bw'emala okweyaagho ebire, kiba kizibu okulinga mu butangaavu obumesunkana ku igulu." 
Job37:22 Ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba evaayo okumesunkana okuli ng'oti zaabu. Ekitiisa kya Katonda kituleetera okumutya! 
Job37:23 Okumanha nga Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona wa bukumu inho, titusobola kuseeta gh'ali. Mutuufu, tasaliriza era azira muntu y'anhigiriza." 
Job37:24 Abantu kyebava bamutya, kuba tamalira biseera bye ku abo abeeyeta abagezi.”" 
Job38:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda ng'ali mu kiwunga ow'amaani, yairamu Yobu ng'akoba ati:" 
Job38:2 “Niiwe ani atakania entegeka yange, ng'oyogera ebibono ebyoleka obutamanha?" 
Job38:3 Kale ni fungiza ondhiremu bye nkubuuza.” 
Job38:4 “Wali oli luuyi gha bwe nataagho emisingi gy'ensi? Nkobera, oba nga otegeera inho." 
Job38:5 Naani eyasalagho bw'enaayaga obunene? Oba naani eyagipima n'omugugha? Tokobye oti oli mumanhi? 
Job38:6 Emisingi gyayo giri ku ki? Oba naani eyasimba eibaale lyayo ery'omu nsonda? 
Job38:7 Nga buli kukya ku lunaku olwo, emuunienie edh'oku nkyo dhaayembera ghalala, n'ab'omu igulu baakuba emizira." 
Job38:8 Oba naani eyaigaliza enhandha n'endhigi, ng'eghagwiza ng'oti n'ekintu ekiva mu nda ya inhaakyo?" 
Job38:9 Ninze nafuula ebire ekivaalo ky'enhandha, n'enzikiiza egemye naagifuula obugoye obugighemba." 
Job38:10 Nagiteeragho ensalosalo kw'ekanga, naataagho endhigi edhigisiba." 
Job38:11 Naagikoba nti: ‘Kanga ghano, era otaswikangagho. N'okwesiikuula kwo okw'amaani kunaakomanga ghano.’”" 
Job38:12 “Bukyanga obaagho, waali olagiireku endhuba okuvaayo ku nkyo, oba okulagira obwire bukye?" 
Job38:13 Waali olagiireku obutangaavu okubuna buli kankondo ak'ensi, n'okubulagira bubingegho ababi mu bifo mwe beegisa?" 
Job38:14 Olwo ensi evaayo yaaboneka, ng'oti n'akamanhiso akateebwa ku kiwumbe eky'eitosi ng'eri ng'oti kivaalo ekya langi kamaala." 
Job38:15 Ababi obutangaavu bubamalaku emiraala, bwabalobera okukola eby'obukambwe." 
Job38:16 Waali otuuseeku ku ntobo y'enhandha aghali ensulo dh'enhandha? Waali otambuliireku ghansi eyo ku ntobo y'enhandha? 
Job38:17 Ghaligho eyaali akwoleikeku emiryango gy'e magombe, egingira mu nzikiiza aghakuumirwa abaafa?" 
Job38:18 Waali otegeireku ensi bw'eyaga mu bwagaagavu? Ndhiraamu oba nga byonabyona obiidhi. 
Job38:19 Oidhi engira etuuka aghasula obutangaavu, oba ekifo enzikiiza gh'eba?" 
Job38:20 Osobola okubitwala mu kifo kyabyo? Era otegeera engira etuuka ye bisula? 
Job38:21 Bwenebwene osobola, kuba wali muzaale mu kiseera ekyo! Nga mingi emyaka gy'oghangaire!" 
Job38:22 Waali oingiireku mu kifo ghe nkuumira omuzira n'amabaale ag'omugozi? 
Job38:23 Ebyo mbiterekera ekiseera ekizibu; olunaku olw'okulwana entalo. 
Job38:24 Oidhi engira etuuka endhuba gh'eva? Oba oidhi empewo ey'e buvandhuba gh'eva okusansaanira ku nsi? 
Job38:25 Naani eyatema ku igulu emyeta amaadhi mwe gabita okuyuyika, oba eyataagho engira ey'olukuba?" 
Job38:26 Naani aleetera amaadhi okugwa mu biketezo ebitabaamu bantu, ni gagwa mu irungu omutaba muntu waire omulala?" 
Job38:27 Naani afukirira ensi eyazika enkalu erekeibwa agho, n'esobola okumeramu eisubi eito?" 
Job38:28 Amaadhi gali ni lata waago, oba naani azaala amatondo g'omusulo?" 
Job38:29 Omugozi guva mu nda y'ani? N'omusulo ogutoonherera ng'oti luudhiidhi ni gugema, naani aguzaala?" 
Job38:30 Amaadhi gafuuka mabbalangufu ng'oti ibaale, ni ku ngulu kw'enhandha kwagema." 
Job38:31 Osobola okusiba emuunienie edheetebwa Puleyadesi mu kibbuututu? Oba okusimulula emigugha egiyimba aghalala emuunienie edheetebwa Orioni? 
Job38:32 Osobola okufulumya emuunienie dhaaboneka mu biseera bya dho, oba okukuumira muunienie edho dhoonadhoona, entono n'enene, mu ngira yaadho?" 
Job38:33 Oidhi ebiragiro ebifuga mu igulu? Osobola okubikozesa okufuga ni mu nsi? 
Job38:34 Osobola okuduumira ebire, byavaamu omwidhuzo gw'amaadhi, gaakumira?" 
Job38:35 Osobola okweta ebimyanso by'olukuba biidhe obitume, byakukoba biti, ‘Tuli ghano?’" 
Job38:36 Naani eyata mu bire amagezi ag'okugwisa amaadhi? Era naani eyagha olufu okutegeera ensambo ye lunaagwangamu? 
Job38:37 Naani asobola okukozesa amagezi n'abala ebire? Oba okubighendheka n'afuka amaadhi agabirimu," 
Job38:38 enkungu n'efuuka ebitosi, ebityanka ni byegema?”" 
Job38:39 “Osobola okuyiigira empologoma by'erya? Oba okuliisa empologoma ento n'odhiigusa," 
Job38:40 nga dheegisiiza mu mpuku dhaadho, oba nga dhibwaime mu bisaka okuteega?" 
Job38:41 Naani aliisa amakoova bwe gatambulatambula eyo okwagala emere, ng'abaana baago bali kundirira?”" 
Job39:1 “Oidhi ebiseera empongo edh'omu nsozi bye dhizaaliramu? Oba waali weekaliriisaaku empuuli bw'ezaala? 
Job39:2 Oidhi emyezi gye dhimala nga dhiri mughako? Era oidhi ekiseera kye dhizaaliramu," 
Job39:3 nga dhikuba amakiryaivu dhaazaala abaana baadho? 
Job39:4 Abaana baadho bafuna amaani baakulira kuliya mu nsiko, era baajiira irala baaloba kwira ghe dhiri." 
Job39:5 Naani eyaleetera entulege okuba n'eidembe? Naani eyagirekula erumuke nga yeetaaya? 
Job39:6 Ninze nagigha eirungu okuba amaka gaayo, naagireka okuba mu nsi ey'omuunhu." 
Job39:7 Yeekuumira eyo ezira kwasiikana kwa mu bibuga. Era tewulirayo muvuzi agidhuuka, ng'agiragira kukola mirimo." 
Job39:8 Eyagaaza mu nsozi omuli ebyayiro mw'eriira, era omwo mw'enooneza buli kimera ky'erya." 
Job39:9 Embogo eganha okukukolera omulimo gwonagwona? Erisulaku aghali ekintu ensolo dho mwe dhiriira? 
Job39:10 Osobola okugisibaku embago yaakulimira? Oba yaakughaluliza embago yaakukumulira enimiro? 
Job39:11 Onaagyesiga olw'amaani gaayo amangi, waagirekera omulimo gw'enaakukolera?" 
Job39:12 Ogisuubira okukuleetera by'okungwire, yaabibunga mu kifo aghakubirwa emere ey'empeke?”" 
Job39:13 “Maaya ekinia amaghagha gaayo ng'esagamba. Aye amaghagha gaayo ago n'amooya gaayo, oti gaba gali kwoleka kisa?" 
Job39:14 Kuba ereka amagi gaayo ku itaka, gasuuyizibwe omusenho." 
Job39:15 Aye yeerabira eti ekigere kisobola okugamanhiangula, oba ensolo edh'omu nsiko okugatyankirira." 
Job39:16 Ebisa bubi abaana baayo, ng'oti ti n'eyabazaala. Era tiyeefiirayo kubona nti tedaagira bwereere." 
Job39:17 Kuba tyagitaamu magezi, era tyagigha kutegeera." 
Job39:18 Aye bw'etoolera okulumuka, embalaasi n'omuvuzi waayo tebabonamu kantu." 
Job39:19 Embalaasi niiwe ogigha amaani, n'enkoto yaayo niiwe ogireetera okuba engumu?" 
Job39:20 Niiwe ogituumya ng'oti nzige, era n'eba n'okugufula okutiisa?" 
Job39:21 Esamba n'obukambwe mu kiiko; eziinhuuka ng'eja okulumba eby'okulwanisa eby'omuzigu. 
Job39:22 Teidhi kyetebwa kutya era teira inhuma kuva mu lutalo. 
Job39:23 Ekiruutu omuli obusaale, n'eifumo einene erimesunkana, ghalala n'eifumo eitono, byonabyona birengeedhera era byakubaganira ku ndala eyo." 
Job39:24 Eziinhuuka embiro mu busungu obungi; tetereera ng'ewuliire okuvuga kw'endeka. 
Job39:25 Buli endeka lw'evuga, egufula eti, ‘Otyo.’ Olutalo n'okuleekaana kw'abaduumizi, ebiwunhiza ng'ekaali ghala." 
Job39:26 Niiwe oyegeresa ensega okweruupa, n'eyandhuluza amaghagha gaayo ng'eyolekeire oluuyi lw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba?" 
Job39:27 Niiwe olagira enkookooma okuniina n'ekola ekisu kyayo ghaigulu mu nsozi? 
Job39:28 Ezimba mu mpampagama edh'embaale engulumivu einho, yaaba eyo." 
Job39:29 Eyo y'eba okuleemesa ky'enaita erye, amaiso gaayo gakirengerera ghala." 
Job39:30 Abaana baayo banuuna omusaayi. Aghali ekifiire, yo gh'eba.”" 
Job40:1 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yobu ati: 
Job40:2 “Onsonsooniiza wanvunaana, mpegaano obwo tondhiremu, onaasirika busirike?”" 
Job40:3 Agho Yobu yairamu Musengwa Katonda ati: 
Job40:4 “Nze bwendi era bwendi, nnaakwiramu ntya? Ka ngeme bwa ku munwa, nsirike busirike." 
Job40:5 Nayogeire ira emikuzi kamaala, tiidha kwiramu kwogera.”" 
Job40:6 Agho Musengwa Katonda, ng'ali mu kiwunga ow'amaani, yairamu Yobu ng'akoba ati:" 
Job40:7 “Kale ni fungiza, ondhiremu bye nkubuuza." 
Job40:8 Onaatuuka n'okuntwala okuba ng'asaliriza? Onaasalira nze omusango okunsinga, iwe oyetebwe omutuufu?" 
Job40:9 Iwe oyaga ninze amaani? Era osobola okutyabuka n'amamiro agali ng'oti n'agange? 
Job40:10 Kale ka mbone bw'ofuuka omukungu era omwekuluntaze, ofuuke omubbede ow'ekitiisa." 
Job40:11 Yolesa obusungu bwo obubitirivu, olingirire buli mwepansi omwise olusisi." 
Job40:12 Bwenebwene lingirira buli mwepansi omumale amaani. Otyankirire ababi agho gheene ghe bali. 
Job40:13 Baziike boonaboona ghalala mu nkungu, basibire mu kifo ekigisiibwa." 
Job40:14 Olwo zeena nnaakusaaka, nti obuyinza bwo n'obughangwire." 
Job40:15 Kale bona envubu ye natonda, ng'oti bwe natonda iwe: Erya isubi ng'oti nte," 
Job40:16 aye amaani gaayo gagiri mu nkende ni mu miziisa egy'oku nda yaayo. 
Job40:17 Ebbalangusa omukira gwesimba ng'oti muvule, emiziisa gy'amagulu gaayo gyasibagana." 
Job40:18 Amagumba gaayo magumu ng'oti kyuma kya kikomo. Amagulu gaayo gali ng'oti mitayimbwa egy'ekyuma ekigumu einho. 
Job40:19 Eyo n'ensolo esinga okwewuunhisa, mu nsolo dhoonadhoona. Omutonzi waayo yenka n'asobola okugiseetaku n'empiima." 
Job40:20 Aye ensozi okuzaanhirwa ensolo dhoonadhoona edh'omu nsiko, n'edhigigha by'erya." 
Job40:21 Erambaala ghansi gh'obuti obw'amawa, yeegisa mu bitoogo mu bibali." 
Job40:22 Yeigama mu binsense by'obuti obw'amawa, yaabwama mu myeta gy'amaadhi." 
Job40:23 Omwiga bwegusiikuuka, tetya. Amaadhi ga Yorudani ni bwe gaidhula okutuuka ku munwa gwayo, eguma omwoyo." 
Job40:24 Ghaligho asobola okugigema ng'eri kumoga? Oba aghanga okugigemya ku mutego, n'okugifumita enhindo?”" 
Job41:1 “Engoina osobola okugivubisa eirobo, oba okusiba olulimi lwayo n'omugugha?" 
Job41:2 Osobola okwingiza omugugha mu nhindo yaayo, oba okuwumula oluba lwayo n'eirobo?" 
Job41:3 Enaakwegayirira ogireke eje? Enaayogera n'iwe bukalamu ogisaasire? 
Job41:4 Enaakola n'iwe endagaano ebenga mugheereza wo enaku dhoonadhoona? 
Job41:5 Onaazaanhanga nayo ng'oti bw'ozaanha n'enhonhi? Oba onaagisibiranga abagheereza bo abaguna ebasanhuse. 
Job41:6 Abavubi banaagiramuzanga? Abasuubuzi banaagitematemanga okugitunda? 
Job41:7 Osobola okugifumita eifumo lyabita mu luwu lwayo? Oba omutwe gwayo okugufumita n'amafumo agafumita ebyenhandha? 
Job41:8 Geza ogisiinheku, toliirayo lundi kabiri. Era olutalo tolirwerabira." 
Job41:9 Okugibona obubone, omuntu awaamu amaani, yaagwa ghansi ku itaka." 
Job41:10 Ghazira muntu akana n'asiikuula ngoina. Kale naani aguma okwemerera ghe ndi? 
Job41:11 Naani eyasooka okumpa, ye nteekwa n'okwiriza? Kiisi ekiri ghansi gh'eigulu kyange." 
Job41:12 Tiirobe kwogera ku magulu gaayo, ni ku maani gaayo, ni ku kikula kyayo ekikalamu." 
Job41:13 Naani aghanga okugitoolamu ekivaalo kyayo eky'oku ngulu, oba okugifumita n'abita mu luwu lwayo olw'emibiri ebiri." 
Job41:14 Naani asobola okwasamya omunwa gwayo? Amaino gaayo nga gagemya entiisa! 
Job41:15 Ebigalagamba byayo ebigumu bigyewuliza. Bisibagaine byabbalanguka ng'oti ibaale. 
Job41:16 Buli kirala kiyungibwa ku kiinaakyo, ghaaloba kusigalagho kaghagaanhia waire akatono omubita empewo." 
Job41:17 Byegema ghalala byakalanguka, ghazira kisobola kubyawula." 
Job41:18 Bw'eyasimula evaamu okumyansa. Amaiso gaayo gaamyuka oti n'endhuba eri kuvaayo. 
Job41:19 Omunwa gwayo guvaamu omuliro ogwaka, gwavaamu n'obusambuka obw'omuliro." 
Job41:20 Enhindo yaayo evaamu omuuka, oguli ng'oti n'oguva ku ntamu eri kutogota." 
Job41:21 Omuuka gw'egheera gukuma amanda, enimi edh'omuliro dhaava mu munwa gwayo." 
Job41:22 Eri n'amaani mu nkoto etiisa buli agyagaana. 
Job41:23 Emamba yaayo yeegema ghalala yaagyeriipiraku, aghazira kuleberamu." 
Job41:24 Omwoyo gwayo tigutya, gwakula ng'oti ibaale; mubbalangafu ng'oti lubengo." 
Job41:25 Bw'ekola eti n'esituka, n'emisambwa gitya. Gyezinduka gyabula eky'okukola." 
Job41:26 Ghazira mpiima eghanga kugifumita, waire eifumo, oba eisinku, oba akasaale." 
Job41:27 Ekyuma ekigumu einho ekibona ng'oti isubi ikalu, ekyuma eky'ekikomo ekibona ng'oti muti gwa mpumbi." 
Job41:28 Tosobola kugibingisaagho kasaale. Amabaale ag'ensuumulo gaba ng'oti bikabakaba ku yo. 
Job41:29 Emiigo gy'entole gyona bikaba bukaba ku yo. Amafumo ge basuula okugifumita egasekerera busekerere. 
Job41:30 Ebigalagamba by'oku nda yaayo, biri ng'oti n'engyo edh'obwogi. Bwe yeeghaluliza mu bitosi, ghaba ng'oti ekintu kye bamulungulisa engaano n'ekibiseegho." 
Job41:31 Bw'eingira enhandha esiikuula amaadhi, yaaba ng'oti n'entamu etogota, era ng'oti n'ensaka ey'omuzigo etogota." 
Job41:32 Mu maadhi gh'ebise, erekamu okwesiikuula okweru, kyaba ng'oti entobo y'enhandha emeze envu." 
Job41:33 Ghazira kigifaanana ku nsi, yatondebwa ng'eziramu kutya." 
Job41:34 Enhoomerera buli nsolo eneepansipansi, yeene ni kyabazinga w'ensolo dhoonadhoona edh'omu nsiko.”" 
Job42:1 Agho Yobu yairamu Musengwa Katonda ng'akoba ati: 
Job42:2 “Musengwa Katonda, ndidhi ng'oghanga ebintu byonabyona. Era ky'oba osazeegho okukola, ghazira kikiziyiza." 
Job42:3 Obuuziiza oti, ‘Niiwe ani okutakania entegeka yange, ng'oyogera ebyoleka obutamanha?’ Bwenebwene ndhogeire ebintu bye ntategeera, ebinswikiriire era ebiinemye okumanha." 
Job42:4 Onkobye oti, ‘Wulirisa ndhogere, nkubuuze ebibuuzo ondhiremu.’" 
Job42:5 Nawuliranga buwulire bye bakwogerangaku, aye mpegaano nkweboneireku n'agange." 
Job42:6 Kale ni neemenhie era neenenia naatyama mu nkungu ni mu ivu.” 
Job42:7 Agho bwe yamala okwogera ni Yobu ebibono ebyo, yaakoba Elifazi Omutemani ati: “Nkusungughaliire inho iwe ni baino bombi, kuba timundhogeireeku bituufu ng'oti n'omugheereza wange Yobu bw'ayogeire." 
Job42:8 Kale ni, mpegaano mutwale ente enume musanvu, n'entaama enume musanvu eri omugheereza wange Yobu, mugheeyo ku lwaimwe ekigheebwayo ekyokebwa. Omugheereza wange Yobu aidha kubasabira, era ndidha kuganha by'anaabasabira, ndobe kubakolaku ng'obusirusiru bwaimwe bwebubagwaniza. Kuba timundhogeireeku bituufu ng'oti n'omugheereza wange Yobu bw'ayogeire.”" 
Job42:9 Agho Elifazi Omutemani, ni Bilidadi Omushuhi, ni Zefari Omunaamathi, baaja, baakola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yabalagira. Era Musengwa Katonda yaaganha okuwulira Yobu bye yabasabira." 
Job42:10 Agho Yobu bwe yamala okusabira bakagwa be, Musengwa Katonda yaamwirizaagho obukombe bwe; nga bwe yali nabwo mu mainhama okubyamu emikuzi ebiri." 
Job42:11 Agho baganda ba Yobu ni baanhina, ni boonaboona abaali bamwidhi baidha, baaliira ghalala naye ekiiwulo mu nnaku ye. Era baamusaasira olw'ebizibu byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yamutuusaaku. Buli muntu yaamugha ekitundu kya feeza n'empeta eya zaabu." 
Job42:12 Musengwa Katonda yaagha Yobu enkabi mu kiseera eky'obulamu bwe eky'oluvainhuma, okusingaku ni mu kyasooka. Yobu yaaba n'entaama omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ina, n'engamiya kakaaga, n'ente edhirima lukumi, n'endogoyi enkazi lukumi." 
Job42:13 Era yaazaala abaana abalenzi musanvu, n'abaghala basatu." 
Job42:14 Omughala asooka yaamutuuma eriina Yemima, owokubiri Kezia, n'owokusatu Kereni Happuki." 
Job42:15 Mu nsi yoonayoona nga ghazira bakazi baboneka bulungi ng'oti ni baghala ba Yobu. Era iseibwe yaabagha emigabo egy'obusika aghalala ni baanhinaibwe. 
Job42:16 Ebyo bwe byawa, Yobu yaaghangaala emyaka kikumi n'ana, yaabona ni ku biidhukulu n'ebiidhukulu." 
Job42:17 N'oluvainhuma Yobu yaafa nga musaadha mukaire, ow'emyaka emingi gyenegyene." 
Psalms1:1 Wa nkabi oyo atawulirisa magezi ga babi, era atajiira ku boonooni waire okweyimba n'abo abanhooma Katonda." 
Psalms1:2 Aye ng'asangaalira mu Mateeka ga Musengwa Katonda, era yaagasoma yaageekalirisa omusana n'obwire." 
Psalms1:3 Ali ng'oti n'omuti ogwasimbibwa ku mwiga, ogwama ebibala mu biseera byagwo, era oguli n'amakaba agataniala. Ghazira ky'akola ni kimufiiririra." 
Psalms1:4 Aye ababi tibali batyo, bali ng'oti musinsi empewo gw'efuuwa ere." 
Psalms1:5 Kyova mu kusalirwa omusango, ababi guja kubasinga. Era aboonooni bazira kifo mu kikunsu ky'abatuufu." 
Psalms1:6 Katonda alabirira era yaakugira abatuufu, aye ababi balizikirira." 
Psalms2:1 Lwaki amaghanga geesigulana okudheema, n'abantu ni beeteesa ebiziramu?" 
Psalms2:2 Bakyabazinga ab'oku nsi baafungiza, n'abafuzi baibwe beeteesa, badheemere Musengwa Katonda ni kyabazinga ye yasiiga omuzigo." 
Psalms2:3 Nga bakoba bati: “Ka twekutule ku ndhegere dhaibwe, era ka twetoole ebikoligo byaibwe mu nkoto!”" 
Psalms2:4 Musengwa Katonda ali ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga mu igulu, abasekerera era anhooma entegeka dhaibwe edh'ekidoofu." 
Psalms2:5 Agho nga yeenayeena adhuunie abadhuuka, mu busungu obutiisa einho yaabakoba" 
Psalms2:6 ati: “Kyabazinga wange ye nalonda, namuta ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu Sioni.”" 
Psalms2:7 Agho kyabazinga yaakoba ati: “Ka mbakobere Musengwa Katonda kye yankoba. Yankoba ati, ‘Iwe oli mwana wange, olwaleero nkuzaire." 
Psalms2:8 Bw'onsaba eky'okufuga amaghanga goonagoona ndidha kukikugha, era nkughe ensi yoonayoona ebe yiyo." 
Psalms2:9 Amaghanga ago oligamenhamenha n'omwigo ogw'ekyuma, era waagamaniangula ng'oti ntamu ya muwumbi.’ ”" 
Psalms2:10 Agho ni imwe bakyabazinga muwulire okulabulwa kuno, era imwe abafuzi ab'oku nsi mwege." 
Psalms2:11 Mugheereze Musengwa Katonda nga mumutya," 
Psalms2:12 mumukubire amakiryaivu nga mutengera, tiikulwa nga asungughala, mwazikirira; kuba asungughala mangu. Ba nkabi abo boonaboona Musengwa Katonda b'akuuma." 
Psalms3:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, abazigu ndi na kamaala! Abali kuneefuukira baja nga beeyongera!" 
Psalms3:2 Abantu kamaala bankoba mbu iwe Katonda tolimbeera. 
Psalms3:3 Ate nga iwe Musengwa Katonda, niiwe engabo mwe neewogoma, niiwe ompeesa ekitiisa, naatambula nga ndi mugumu." 
Psalms3:4 Ndheta Musengwa Katonda n'amaani goonagoona, yeena yanvugira ng'ali ku lusozi lwe olutukuvu." 
Psalms3:5 Nambaala, naatenduka, kabiri naazuuka, kuba Musengwa Katonda ankuuma." 
Psalms3:6 Tiitye lukunkumuli lwa bazigu, abagumbye okuneezungulula." 
Psalms3:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, idha omponie, iwe Katonda wange! Abazigu bange boonaboona bakube empi ku matama, omulungule amaino g'aboonooni abo." 
Psalms3:8 Okuwonezebwa kuva eri iwe, Musengwa Katonda. Enkabi dho dhibe ku bantu bo." 
Psalms4:1 Katonda wange, iwe aidhi obutuufu bwange ndi kukweta otansiriikirira. Bwe nali ghagati mu buzibu, wanteewuluza. Idha ondhune, owulirise okusaba kwange." 
Psalms4:2 Bantu imwe, mulirekera li okusiiga eriina lyange enziro? Mulirekera li okugonza ebiziramu muganhulo, n'okujiira ku buguya?" 
Psalms4:3 Aye mukimanhe, nga Musengwa Katonda yeeronderayo, era yeekuumira abo abamutya. Musengwa Katonda ampulira bwe mmweta." 
Psalms4:4 Bwe musungughala, obusungu butabasindikanga mu kwona. Mwefumintirize ku kino mu myoyo gyaimwe, nga muli mu buliri mulambaire." 
Psalms4:5 Mughengayo emisengo mu butuufu, era mwesigenga Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms4:6 Abantu kamaala bakoba bati: “Wo! Tugwana twafuna bikalamu byereere! Wo Musengwa Katonda, tulingeku n'amaiso ag'ekisa!”" 
Psalms4:7 Aye iwe eisanhu ly'ompaire mu mwoyo gwange lisinga ery'abo lye baba nalyo, nga bali mu mwero gw'emere yaibwe, n'ogw'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
Psalms4:8 Bwe nambaala, ntenduka n'emiraala, kuba niiwe Musengwa Katonda wenka onkuuma obukalamu, ni ghabula akantuukaku naire." 
Psalms5:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, wulirisa ebibono byange, era otansiriikirira bwe nsinda." 
Psalms5:2 Wulira okulira kwange, kuba niiwe ye nsaba, iwe Kyabazinga wange era Katonda wange!" 
Psalms5:3 Mpuuna bwe pwi pwi pwi naakusaba, wampulira. Mu nkyonkyo neetegeka okuwulira ebiva y'oli." 
Psalms5:4 Iwe Katonda tosangaalira kwonoona naire. Era ekibi tokiganha kuseeta gh'oli naire. 
Psalms5:5 Toyenda na kulinga ku beesaakiriza, era okyagha abakozi b'ebibi." 
Psalms5:6 Ozikiriza abo boonaboona abaguya waakyagha abaisi n'abaghaayiriza. 
Psalms5:7 Aye nze, olw'okungonza einho, ndidha kwingira mu isinzizo lyo nkusinze mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu, nga nkukubira amakiryaivu okwoleka nga bwe nkutya." 
Psalms5:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkulemberaamu mu ngira ey'obutuufu bwo kuba abazigu ndi na kamaala longoola engira mwe mbe ntambulire." 
Psalms5:9 Mu minwa gy'abazigu bange timuva kya mazima naire, mu myoyo gyaibwe benda bwa kuzikiriza. Ebibono byaibwe magombe geene, enimi dhaibwe badhoogeza bya buguya." 
Psalms5:10 Wo Katonda, basalire omusango gubasinge amagezi gaibwe geene n'agabe gabasuule. Babinge gh'oli olw'ebibi byaibwe kamaala, era n'olw'okukudheemera." 
Psalms5:11 Aye abo abakwesiga balisagamba era baayemba olw'eisanhu. Bakuumenga abo abakugonza kuba basangaavu inho olw'okuba iwe; 
Psalms5:12 kuba abagondera ebiragiro byo iwe Musengwa Katonda, obagha enkabi, era okugonza kwo kubawonia ebizibu ng'oti n'engabo." 
Psalms6:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, otandhuuka na busungu, era otankangaivula na kiruyi." 
Psalms6:2 Wo Musengwa Katonda, idha ondhune, gampweire, mponia ebiinuma, nsigaire magumba meereere." 
Psalms6:3 Zeenazeena ndi agho ntyo, omwoyo n'omubiri. Aye Musengwa Katonda otalwa kumbeera." 
Psalms6:4 Ndhiriraamu, Musengwa Katonda, ondhirize obulamu; olw'okungonza einho mponia okufa;" 
Psalms6:5 kuba mu bafu ghazira akwidhukira era mu bali e magombe ghazira akusaaka. 
Psalms6:6 Ndi munafu mwene olw'okusula nga nsinda. Obwire bukya ng'obuliri bwange buboze olw'okulira, n'akaito ke neeziziike kaatoonha amaziga." 
Psalms6:7 Amaiso gali kuunafugha, era gali kunfaamu olw'abazigu abandiza." 
Psalms6:8 Munveeku imwe mwenamwena abakozi ab'ebibi; kuba Musengwa Katonda awulira okulira kwange. 
Psalms6:9 Ampulirisa nga ndi kumusaba okumbeera era aidha kwiramu okusaba kwange. 
Psalms6:10 Abazigu bange boonaboona baja kugemwa ensoni n'entiisa era okutemya n'okuzibula nga bali kutebenta emisinde olw'okuswala. 
Psalms7:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange niiwe ye neesiga, mponia abankiriga era obalobere okuntuukaku." 
Psalms7:2 Tiikulwa nga bandhuzayuza ng'oti mpologoma, bankwekwebya nga ghazira n'ambeera." 
Psalms7:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange: Ghaligho omuntu yeenayeena ye nakola ekibi? Ghaligho ow'omukago ye natuusaaku akabi? Ghaligho omuzigu ye ntaakolera nga bwe kigwaine? Oba nga ghaligho ku ebyo kye nakola," 
Psalms7:4  
Psalms7:5 kale leka abankiriga bangeme, oba bankube enume ey'ekigwo, bandhite, era bandeke mu nkungu nga nfiire." 
Psalms7:6 Wo Musengwa Katonda, idha obakambughalire. Situka Katonda wange tala, olwanise ekiruyi ky'abazigu bange, kuba iwe toyenda kusaliriza." 
Psalms7:7 Abantu boonaboona basololeze gh'oli era obafuge ng'oli ghaigulu ghaibwe. 
Psalms7:8 Niiwe osala emisango egy'abantu boonaboona. Sala ogwange oyoleke nga bwendi omutuufu era nga bwenzira musango gwonagwona. 
Psalms7:9 Wo Katonda wange, oli mutuufu era weekebeedha emyoyo n'ebidhuubo eby'abantu. Lekeza ababi okukola obubi, oghe abo abakola obulungi okuba obukalamu." 
Psalms7:10 Katonda n'engabo mwe neewogoma, alokola abo abagondera ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms7:11 Katonda asala omusango mu butuufu, era abakozi b'ebibi abasalira omusango okubasinga." 
Psalms7:12 Omuntu yeenayeena bw'ateenenia, Katonda aja kughagala empiima ye. Amaze okudhuumuula akalaso ke," 
Psalms7:13 amaze okutegeka ebiisi eby'okubaitisa, era n'obulaso obwaka omuliro." 
Psalms7:14 Bona, omukozi w'ebibi aba ng'oti mukazi, yaatoola enda ey'ebibi, yaaba enda erimu entegeka edh'okukola ebibi, era yaazaala obuguya." 
Psalms7:15 Asima ebiina okutega baine, aye ate mwene yaabigwamu." 
Psalms7:16 Entegeka dhe edh'okukola ebibi dhimwiriraku mwene, era obukambwe bwene bw'akozesa n'obumutaaku enguma." 
Psalms7:17 Neeyanza Musengwa Katonda olw'obutuufu bwe, era nhemba enhembo edhisaaka Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda Ali Ghaigulu Yeene." 
Psalms8:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, eriina lyo nga ikulu inho mu nsi yoonayoona! Ekitiisa kyo ekiswikirira eigulu lyonalyona," 
Psalms8:2 kisaakibwa ku minwa egy'abaana abato n'abo abayonka. Wataagho ekimante olw'abo abakola by'otayenda, okulobera abakulwanisa, n'abenda okulwana enzigu." 
Psalms8:3 Bweningirira eigulu lye wakola n'engalo dho, ni mbona omwezi ni muunienie bye wataagho," 
Psalms8:4 nkoba nti: Omuntu katyo ni ki, iwe okumudhuuba; era omwana w'omuntu ni ki iwe okumulumirwa?" 
Psalms8:5 Aye ate nga wamukola ng'abulaku katono okuba nga Katonda, waamuvaaza engule ey'ekitiisa era waamugha okutiibwa." 
Psalms8:6 Wamugha okufuga ebintu byonabyona bye wakola. Ebintu byonabyona waabita mu buyinza bwe," 
Psalms8:7 entaama n'ente, n'ensolo dhoonadhoona edhiba mu nsiko," 
Psalms8:8 enhonhi, n'ebyenhandha, ni byonabyona ebyagaanibwa mu maadhi." 
Psalms8:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, eriina lyo nga ikulu inho mu nsi yoonayoona!" 
Psalms9:1 Neeyanza Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona, era ndidha kwogeranga ku by'okola ebyewuninkiriza." 
Psalms9:2 Ndidha kusangaala era nsagambire mu iwe; ndidha kwembanga nga nkusaaka, iwe Ali Ghaigulu Yeene." 
Psalms9:3 Bw'obonekaku abazigu bange bakyusa baalumuka, baagangalima baafa." 
Psalms9:4 Iwe olw'obutukuvu bwo osaze omusango waayoleka nga bwendi omutuufu. 
Psalms9:5 Abatatya Katonda obasaliire omusango gwabasinga, waazikiriza abakozi b'ebibi. Ghazira aja kubaidhukira naire ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms9:6 Abazigu bawoiregho ebyanda n'ebyanda, ebibuga byaibwe wabizikiriza, era tibaja kwidhukirwa naire." 
Psalms9:7 Aye Musengwa Katonda aba kyabazinga ebyanda n'ebyanda, atyama ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga kye yataagho okusaliraku omusango." 
Psalms9:8 Asalira ensi omusango mu butuufu, era asalira abantu omusango nga tasaliriza." 
Psalms9:9 Musengwa Katonda n'obulumukiro bw'abo abazira bwogerero, era n'obubudamo mu biseera ebizibu." 
Psalms9:10 Abo abakwidhi, obwesige bwaibwe babuta mu iwe, kuba Musengwa Katonda tiweerabira abo abatakabana okwidha y'oli." 
Psalms9:11 Mwembe enhembo edhisaaka Musengwa Katonda atyama mu Sioni; mukobere abamaghanga goonagoona ebyo by'akola. 
Psalms9:12 Musengwa Katonda afaayo inho ku abo abadaazibwadaazibwa, era tasiriikirira kulira kwaibwe. Yeesasuuza olw'omusaayi gwaibwe ng'abonereza abo ababaita." 
Psalms9:13 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkusaba ondhune! Bona bwe ndaazibwadaazibwa abazigu! Ntoola mu ngalo dha walumbe" 
Psalms9:14 nsobole okwemerera mu maiso g'abantu ab'e Yerusalemu, mbakobere byonabyona ebindeetera okukusaaka. Ndidha kusagamba olw'okundokola." 
Psalms9:15 Abatatya Katonda baagwa mu biina bye baasima okutega abantu abandi era baagwa mu ntuula beene dhe baatega. 
Psalms9:16 Musengwa Katonda yeeyoleike ng'asala omusango mu butuufu, era abakozi b'ebibi beetegamu beene n'ebikolwa byaibwe byene." 
Psalms9:17 Abakozi b'ebibi, n'abo boonaboona abava ku Katonda, ba kuja magombe." 
Psalms9:18 Abanaku tibaja kwerabirwanga buliidho, waire abaavu okuweeramu irala eisuubi ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms9:19 Wo Musengwa Katonda, idha! Otaganha bantu kukunhooma! Abatatya Katonda boonaboona baleete gh'oli, obasalire omusango." 
Psalms9:20 Wo Musengwa Katonda, baleetere okutya, bategeere nga bantu buntu." 
Psalms10:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, lwaki oba ghala otyo? Lwaki weegisa mu biseera ebizibu?" 
Psalms10:2 Abakozi b'ebibi beebona nga ba ghaigulu era baakiriga abaavu. Emitego gyene gye batega banaibwe, n'egibe gibategemu." 
Psalms10:3 Omukozi w'ebibi yeesaakiriza olw'okwegomba kwe okubi, era omuntu oyo agwidhubanira eby'okufuna, ayogera bubi ku Musengwa Katonda era yaamunhooma." 
Psalms10:4 Omukozi w'ebibi nga bwe yeebona nga wa ghaigulu, tatwala Musengwa Katonda ng'ekikulu. Mu by'akola byonabyona talaadha Katonda." 
Psalms10:5 Omukozi w'ebibi kiisi ky'agemaku kimulamira. Tafaayo ku nsambo Katonda y'asaliramu bantu misango, era abazigu be ababona ng'omuzira kantu." 
Psalms10:6 Munda mule akoba ati: “Nzira kindhugumiza, tija kutuukaku kizibu kyonakyona ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Psalms10:7 Mu by'ayogera n'omwidhwire okukolima, okuguya, n'okwesoomera; olulimi lwe lwidhwire eitima n'okwonoona." 
Psalms10:8 Yeeteega abantu mu byalo, yaitira abantu mu ngiso abaziraku musango. Aleemesa abo abaziraku ababeera, ng'ayenda okubakola akabi." 
Psalms10:9 Yeegisa yaabeeteega ng'oti mpologoma eri mu ndungu. Yeegisa asobole okutuumira ku baavu n'okubagema, era yaabagemya mu lutuula lwe yaabakwekwebya." 
Psalms10:10 Abagwaku n'amaani ge amangi einho, baasigala ku itaka nga gabawoire." 
Psalms10:11 Munda mule akoba ati: “Katonda tafaayo! Yeeghembye mu maiso era kino taidha kukibona!” 
Psalms10:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda, idha! Katonda wange, kozesa omukono gwo ogw'amaani. Oteerabira abo abadaazibwadaazibwa!" 
Psalms10:13 Lwaki abakozi ab'ebibi banhooma Katonda, ni badhuuba bati Katonda taja kubabonereza?" 
Psalms10:14 Aye iwe obona, yii, weetegereza abali mu buzibu n'abadaazibwadaazibwa, era weetegeike okukozesa omukono gwo ogw'amaani. Oyo azira amubeera yeeta mu ngalo dho, kuba buliidho niiwe obeera abaghafu." 
Psalms10:15 Toolagho amaani g'omukozi w'ebibi n'omwonooni. Ja ng'omutondolamu okwonoona kwe, okutuusa lw'olikumumalamu." 
Psalms10:16 Musengwa Katonda ni kyabazinga ow'ebyanda n'ebyanda, abatamutya tibaja kubanga mu nsi ye." 
Psalms10:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe owulirisa okusaba kw'abo abagonvu, era obagumya emyoyo." 
Psalms10:18 Tega kutu owulirise bamulekwa n'abatuntuzibwa, obasalire omusango mu butuufu basinge, olwo ghabule omuntu yeenayeena ku nsi atiisatiisa obulamu bwa baine." 
Psalms11:1 Oba nga Musengwa Katonda ye neesiga, imwe mukana mutya okunkoba muti: “Guluka ng'enhonhi oje mu nsozi," 
Psalms11:2 kuba abakozi b'ebibi baghese obulaso bwaibwe, baata obusaale ku bugugha, era baalasa mu nzikiiza abo abagondera ebiragiro bya Katonda?" 
Psalms11:3 Ghaligho omuntu omutuufu ky'asobola okukola, ng'ebintu byonabyona bifafaagaine?”" 
Psalms11:4 Musengwa Katonda ali mu isinzizo lye eitukuvu, ekityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga kiri mu igulu. Alingirira abantu, yaabeekebeedha, era yaamanha kye baliku." 
Psalms11:5 Musengwa Katonda yeekebeedha abatuufu n'abakozi b'ebibi, era tayendera irala abo abagonza ebikolwa eby'obukambwe." 
Psalms11:6 Aja kulagira omuliro ogw'amanda n'obuganga bwa salufa, okumagalika ng'oti maadhi ku bakozi b'ebibi, n'empewo ebabula okubafuuwa. Ebyo n'ebiri mu kikopo kye yabategekera okunhwa." 
Psalms11:7 Musengwa Katonda mutuufu era agonza ebikolwa eby'obutuufu. Abo abagondera ebiragiro bye n'abanaabanga mu maiso ge nga bamubona. 
Psalms12:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, tubeere otuwonie, kuba tighakaaligho bantu bakaakutya iwe, waire okubaagho abakaakwesiga." 
Psalms12:2 Buli muntu aguya mwine, yaasuutiriza mwine ku munwa, aye nga mu mwoyo muguya." 
Psalms12:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, sirisa abo abasuutiriza banaibwe, n'abo abeesaaka ebiziramu" 
Psalms12:4 nga bakoba bati: “Ife mu kwogera mwe tufunira bye twenda. Ife ab'eminwa gyaife naani atukobaku?” 
Psalms12:5 Aye Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Leka ndidhe, kuba abakozi b'ebibi badaazadaaza abaavu era baakiriga abaghafu. Ndidha kukuuma abaavu n'abaghafu abo, kuba ekyo kye beegomba.”" 
Psalms12:6 Ebisuubizo bya Musengwa Katonda byesigika ng'oti ni feeza alongooseibwa, ng'abisibwa mu muliro emikuzi omusanvu." 
Psalms12:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, tukuume era otughambaatire, otuwonie abantu ab'oluse luno." 
Psalms12:8 Buli gh'olinga obona abakozi b'ebibi abatambula, era abantu bakibona ng'okukola ekibi kintu kya ghaigulu." 
Psalms13:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, olikituusa gha obutanfaaku! Byanda na byanda? Olikituusa gha obutenda kuuningaku?" 
Psalms13:2 Ndikituusa gha okugumira ebizibu bino? Ndikituusa gha okuwulira enaku ku mwoyo omusana n'obwire? Ndikituusa gha abazigu okumpangulanga? 
Psalms13:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, mbeera otansiriikirira, ndhiriza amaani gange ndobe kufa."
