Psalms13:4 Abazigu bange basobola okukoba bati: “Tumumaze amaani!” Era baasagamba olw'okuba ngwire. 
Psalms13:5 Aye nze nkwesiga olw'okungonza einho, mu mwoyo gwange nsagamba kuba ndidhi ng'oidha kumponia." 
Psalms13:6 Ndidha kukwemberanga iwe Musengwa Katonda, kuba onkoleire bukalamu." 
Psalms14:1 Abasiru bakoba mu myoyo gyaibwe bati: “Katonda azirayo.” Baidhwire obukupya, bakola ebyenhinhasa era boonaboona bakola bikyamu byereere." 
Psalms14:2 Musengwa Katonda aba mu igulu yaalingirira ghansi, okubona oba nga eriyo omuntu alimu amagezi, asinza Katonda." 
Psalms14:3 Aye boonaboona baaghaba, boonaboona baidhwire bukupya. Ghazira akola kituufu, ghazira naire omulala ati." 
Psalms14:4 Aye abakozi b'ebibi bano boonaboona, abalya abantu bange ng'oti balya mere, kiki kyene kye bataidhi, ekibalobera okusinza Musengwa Katonda?" 
Psalms14:5 Aye ni, baidha kuba mu kutya okw'amaani, kuba abatuufu Katonda b'afaaku." 
Psalms14:6 Abakozi b'ebibi balemya omwavu okutuukiriza entegeka dhe, ate nga Musengwa Katonda n'amukuuma." 
Psalms14:7 Katonda agwananga yaaleetagho alizaawula Isiraeli ng'ava mu Sioni! Musengwa Katonda bw'aliiriza abantu be obukombe, aba Yakobo balisagamba, aba Isiraeli baasangaala!" 
Psalms15:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, naani agwaine okuba mu isinzizo lyo? Naani agwaine okukusinza ku lusozi lwo olutukuvu Sioni?" 
Psalms15:2 N'oyo omutuufu aziraku musango, ng'akola ekituufu, era nga by'ayogera muzira buguya." 
Psalms15:3 Tasiiga liina lya muntu yeenayeena nziro, takola mwine kibi, era taja ng'ageya baliraanwa be." 
Psalms15:4 Anhooma abo abatasanhusa Musengwa Katonda, aye yaata ekinhagansi mu abo abatya Musengwa Katonda. Atuukiriza bye yeeyamye, ni bwebimufiiriza takyusaamu." 
Psalms15:5 Bw'awola empiiya tasuubira magoba, era ole tasobola kumugula kulumiriza muntu aziraku musango. Omuntu ng'oti n'oyo ghazira kisobola kumutengeesa." 
Psalms16:1 Wo Katonda wange, nkweghembye nkuuma, niiwe ye neesiga." 
Psalms16:2 Nze nkoba Musengwa Katonda nti: “Niiwe Musengwa Katonda wange, nzira kikalamu kyonakyona okutoolaku iwe.”" 
Psalms16:3 Abatuukirivu abali mu nsi balungi inho ebitaloodheka, era mbeesiimisa." 
Psalms16:4 Abo abagwidhubanira emisambwa, beereetaku beene ebizibu kamaala. Nze tija kubeeyimbaku nga baghaayo emisengo gyaibwe, era tija kusinza misambwa gyaibwe." 
Psalms16:5 Musengwa Katonda n'ekirungi kyonka kye ndi nakyo, oyo n'ekikopo ekyantegekerwa okunhwa, era obulamu bwange buli mu ngalo dhe." 
Psalms16:6 Ongabainia ebirungi kamaala, era bwenebwene omugabo gwange gwidhwire bikalamu byereere." 
Psalms16:7 Nsaaka Musengwa Katonda kuba angalagira, era ni mu bwire ghagati omwoyo gunkobera." 
Psalms16:8 Buli kaakyeire ndidhi nga Musengwa Katonda andi kumpi era ghazira kisobola kuntengeesa, kuba andi ghano gheene gha mukono gwange omusaadha." 
Psalms16:9 Kyenva ni nsangaala era ni nsagamba, zeenazeena ni mba mu miraala;" 
Psalms16:10 kuba tiwandekulira agho ni bantwala magombe, oba okuleka omwiru wo akutya okuja mu bafu." 
Psalms16:11 Ondholeka engira entuusa mu bulamu; gh'oli n'aghali okusangaala okwidhuvu, mu mukono gwo omusaadha n'omuva okusagamba." 
Psalms17:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, wulira okulira kwange nga nkusaba oyoleke obutuufu bwo. Ntegera kutu owulirise okusaba kwange okuziramu kuguya." 
Psalms17:2 Lingirira ensonga mu butuufu bwayo, oyoleke nga bwenzira musango." 
Psalms17:3 Oidhi omwoyo gwange, oidha waagukyalira obwire, waaneekebeedha wankenenula, aye ghaabula ekibi ky'ondhagaanamu. Tyogera bya buguya" 
Psalms17:4 ng'oti n'abandi bwebakola. Ngondera by'olagira era neeghala okukola ebikolwa eby'obukambwe. 
Psalms17:5 Buliidho ntambulira mu ngira ye wandholeka, aghazira kugivaamu na kudaaliima." 
Psalms17:6 Wo Katonda wange, nkusaba kuba iwe ondhiramu. Tega kutu owulire bye nkoba." 
Psalms17:7 Yoleka okugonza kwo mu nsambo eyeewuninkiriza, iwe awonia abo abalumuka abazigu baibwe, ni baidha okwewogoma gh'oli gha mukono gwo omusaadha." 
Psalms17:8 Nkuuma ng'oti mboni ya liiso lyo; mpambaatira ng'oti n'enkoko bw'ekola obwana bwayo. 
Psalms17:9 Omponie abakozi b'ebibi abenda okunzikiriza, abazigu abo era abaisi abanzingiiza." 
Psalms17:10 Abantu abo bazira kusaasira mu myoyo gyaibwe naire, era mu kanwa baidhwire kwesaakiriza." 
Psalms17:11 Baanondoola era buti banzingiiza; baaningiriire butatemya basobole okunsuula ghansi. 
Psalms17:12 Bali ng'oti mpologoma nto eyeeteeze, eyenda okundhuzayuza." 
Psalms17:13 Wo Musengwa Katonda, idha olwane n'abazigu bange obaghangule! Kozesa empiima yo omponie, nve mu ngalo dh'abakozi b'ebibi." 
Psalms17:14 Wo Musengwa Katonda, kozesa omukono gwo omponie abantu abazira mugabo ghandi, okutoolaku mu bulamu obw'oku nsi. Baiguse okudaagadaaga kwe wabaterekera, ghasigale naghooku okundi okumala okwigusa n'abaana baibwe n'okubasina, ate balekereghooku n'abaidhukulu." 
Psalms17:15 Aye nze ndidha kulingiriranga amaiso go, kuba nziraku musango. Buli lwe nnaazuukanga ndidha kubanga musangaavu okukubona nga bw'oli." 
Psalms18:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkugonza inho. Niiwe omukuumi wange." 
Psalms18:2 Musengwa Katonda n'olubaale mwe neegisa, era n'ekifo kyange eky'okwewogomamu, oyo n'antoola aghabi. Musengwa oyo ni Katonda wange, era n'engabo mwe neewoma; n'omulwanirizi wange amponia byonabyona." 
Psalms18:3 Ndirira Musengwa Katonda okumbeera, era yaidha yamponia abazigu bange Agwaniire okusaakibwanga." 
Psalms18:4 Olumbe lwali lunsibye emigugha, omuzigu ng'ayenda kunsaaniagho ng'oti mataba." 
Psalms18:5 Emigugha egy'e magombe gyaneezungulula, era okufa kwantega olutuula." 
Psalms18:6 Bwenali ndi mu buzibu nasaba Musengwa Katonda, naalirira Katonda wange ambeere; yawulira amamiro gange ng'ali mu isinzizo, era okulira kwange kwamutuuka mu kutu." 
Psalms18:7 Olwo ensi yaayuuga yeesunda, emisingi egy'ensozi gyatengeeta era gyadhugumira; kuba agho Musengwa Katonda yali asungughaire." 
Psalms18:8 Omwosi gwamuva mu nhindo, ate enimi edh'omuliro n'amanda agaaka, byamuva mu kanwa." 
Psalms18:9 Yaigulagho eigulu yaika ku nsi, nga ghansi gh'ebigere bye ghaligho ekire ekiirugavu bezigizigi." 
Psalms18:10 Yaika ng'ali ku kitonde ekiri n'amaghagha ekyetebwa kerubi, era nga kiri kuguluka naye, yaaziinhuukira mu mpewo." 
Psalms18:11 Yeeghemberera enzikiiza, era yeegisa mu bire eby'amaadhi agazigwire." 
Psalms18:12 Mu bimyanso ebyali agho, mwavaamu omugozi n'amanda agaliku enimi edh'omuliro, byaghaguza byabita mu bire eby'amaadhi agazigwire." 
Psalms18:13 Musengwa Katonda yaatyabuka oti lukuba mu igulu, oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene yaayogera n'amamiro ge, nga gali ng'oti n'omugozi era ng'oti n'omuliro ogw'amanda." 
Psalms18:14 Yaalasa obulaso bwe yaasansaania abazigu be; yaamyansa olukuba yaababingagho. 
Psalms18:15 Iwe Musengwa Katonda bwe wabakaabukira n'empiriito ey'omuuka ogw'omu nhindo yo n'ewulirwa, emisingi egy'ensi gyayerulwa, n'entobo y'enhandha yaaboneka." 
Psalms18:16 Okuva ghaigulu eyo yagolola omukono gwe yangema, yaanhinhulula mu maadhi agenda okuumira." 
Psalms18:17 Yamponia abazigu bange ab'amaani n'abo abankyagha; kuba baali ba maani inho okunsinga. 
Psalms18:18 Baanumba ku lunaku lwe nali mu buzibu obutaloodheka, aye Musengwa Katonda yambeera." 
Psalms18:19 Yantuusa mu kifo ekigazi yaabamponia, kuba nali nga nkola by'ayenda." 
Psalms18:20 Yansasula ng'ajiira ku butuufu bwange; yampa enkabi dhe kuba nziraku musango. 
Psalms18:21 Nze njiira ku biragiro bya Musengwa Katonda, era tigwangaku mu kibi kya kudaaliima kuva ku Katonda wange." 
Psalms18:22 Ebiragiro bye byonabyona mbigema butiribiri, era mu mateeka ge ghazira lye ngayaalirira." 
Psalms18:23 Mu maiso ge nzira musango, era neekuuma ndobe kugwa mu kibi." 
Psalms18:24 Musengwa Katonda kyava n'ansasula ng'ajiira ku butuufu bwange, era ng'ajiira ku ky'okuba nti nzira musango mu maiso ge." 
Psalms18:25 Wo Musengwa Katonda, oli mwesigwa eri abo abeesigwa y'oli; oli mulungi eri abo abalungi abaziraku musango." 
Psalms18:26 Oli mutukuvu eri abo ab'emyoyo emitukuvu, aye olabukira mangu abo abakozi b'ebibi." 
Psalms18:27 Olokola abo abagonvu aye waisa ghansi abo abeetwala nga ba ghaigulu. 
Psalms18:28 Wo Musengwa Katonda, onkunaanikiiza eitaala waamingaku enzikiiza." 
Psalms18:29 Ku lulwo nsobola okughangula eigye eiramba, era naaghalampa ebisenge mwe beegisa." 
Psalms18:30 Katonda ono kiisi ky'akola kiba kituufu; kiisi ky'asuubiza akituukiriza, era yaaba ngabo y'abo abamweyuna okubawonia." 
Psalms18:31 Ghazira Katonda wundi okutoolaku Musengwa Katonda; ghazira lubaale lundi lwa kwewogomamu okutoolaku Katonda waife oyo. 
Psalms18:32 Katonda oyo n'ampa amaani era yantoolera mu ngira ebizibu," 
Psalms18:33 yangumya ebigere ku itaka ng'oti bya mpongo, era yangumiza irala eyo ghaigulu mu nsozi." 
Psalms18:34 Andhegeresa okulwana entalo, naasobola okukozesa akalaso kale keene ak'ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
Psalms18:35 Iwe Musengwa Katonda onkuuma era wandokola. Amaani ag'omukono gwo omusaadha gambeera mu bye nkola, era olw'okumbeera kwo ndi mukologho." 
Psalms18:36 Ogha ebigere byange okwetaaya nga ghazira angemaku, byaloba kutyerera ni ngwa." 
Psalms18:37 Nabingirira abazigu bange naabatuukaku era tyakyusa kwira okutuusa nga mmaze okubamulungula. 
Psalms18:38 Nabafumitafumita baaba nga tibasobola kusituka, baagwa ku itaka naabaniinaniinaku." 
Psalms18:39 Niiwe owampa amaani ag'okulwana olutalo olwo, abo abaanumba waabasuula ku itaka naabaniinaniinaku." 
Psalms18:40 Waleetera abazigu bange okukyuka baalumuka, naababona bwa nkoone, naazikiriza abantu abo abankyagha." 
Psalms18:41 Baalira nga benda okubabeera aye ghaabula abawonia; baalirira Musengwa Katonda aye yaaloba kubavugira. 
Psalms18:42 Nabasekula, naabasa ng'oti nkungu etwalibwa empewo, naabatyankirira ng'oti bityanka eby'omu nguudo." 
Psalms18:43 Wamponia abantu abadheemu, wanfuula omufuzi ow'amaghanga kamaala, abantu be nali tiidhi waabafuula bagheereza bange." 
Psalms18:44 Olwampuliraku bati, baatoolera okugondera ebiragiro byange, abamaghanga agandi baidha ye ndi nga baavula bwavule." 
Psalms18:45 Emyoyo nga gyabawaamu ira, era baavaayo mu bufo bwaibwe obugumu obw'okwegisaamu nga badhugumira." 
Psalms18:46 Musengwa Katonda mulamu! Oyo n'olubaale mwe neewogoma, agwaine asaakibwenga; Katonda oyo n'obulokozi bwange, agulumizibwenga!" 
Psalms18:47 Katonda oyo anwaniragho n'abazigu bange, yampangulira amaghanga n'agafuga," 
Psalms18:48 yamponia abazigu bange. Bwenebwene ombeedie, abo abaanumbagana baasigala ghansi; omponiiza abo abakola eby'obukambwe." 
Psalms18:49 Kale ni ndidha kukusaakanga mu maghanga goonagoona, era ndidha kwembanga nga nsaaka eriina lyo." 
Psalms18:50 Katonda agha kyabazinga y'agonza obughanguzi, oyo ye yalonda amwoleka nga bw'amugonza einho, era oyo nga ni Daudi ni baidhukulu be ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms19:1 Eigulu lyoleka ekitiisa kya Katonda, waikendi yaatukobera oyo Katonda bye yakola n'engalo dhe." 
Psalms19:2 Buli lunaku lukobera lwinaalwo ekintu ekyo, era buli bwire bwakimanhisaaku ku bwinaabwo obubwiririra." 
Psalms19:3 Tibyogera, tibikozesa kibono kyonakyona, oba amamiro gaabyo okuwulirwa," 
Psalms19:4 aye ate amamiro gaabyo gabitabita mu nsi yoonayoona, era kye bikoba kyatuukira irala ensi y'ekoma. Mu ebyo byene Katonda mwe yazimbira endhuba edhu yaayo." 
Psalms19:5 Endhuba evaayo ng'oti n'omusaadha eyaakabayiza, era ng'oti n'omulumusi ow'amaani ali kwesunga okulumuka mu ntaka." 
Psalms19:6 Esituka ku luuyi olundi olw'eigulu, yaasenvula olugendo lwayo okulutuusa ku luuyi lundi. Ghazira kintu kisobola kwegisa ku kwokya kwayo." 
Psalms19:7 Musengwa Katonda yataagho amateeka ge na bwegendereza; gaiza obulamu mu mwoyo oguziriike. Kiisi Musengwa Katonda ky'akoba kyesigika, kifuula azira magezi okuba omugezi." 
Psalms19:8 Ebiragiro bya Musengwa Katonda bituufu, bisangaaza abo ababigondera; amateeka ga Musengwa Katonda matukuvu, gazibula amaiso." 
Psalms19:9 Okutya Musengwa Katonda kulungi; era kuligho ebyanda n'ebyanda. Okusala omusango okwa Musengwa Katonda tikubaamu kwekubira; era kuba kutuufu buliidho. 
Psalms19:10 Okusala omusango okwa Musengwa Katonda kwegombebwa okusinga zaabu, waire zaabu ole omukenenule; kudhuudhuula okusinga omudheenene, waire gule ogutoonha obutoonhe okuva mu bisasala." 
Psalms19:11 Ate era mu kusala omusango okwa iwe Musengwa Katonda, ole akugondera mw'alabulirwa, n'ole akwekuuma mw'afunira empeera enene." 
Psalms19:12 Naani asobola okubona ensobi dhe mwene? Wo Musengwa Katonda, nsonigha ebisobyo bye ngwamu nga tiidhi." 
Psalms19:13 Era nkuuma ndobe kugwa mu bisobyo nga ngendereire, otabiganha kunfuga. Olwo ndidha kuba omutukuvu era aziraku musango gwa kibi." 
Psalms19:14 Nkusaba osiime bye ndhogera era osiime n'ebidhuubo ebindi ku mwoyo. Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe olubaale mwe neegisa, era niiwe omulwanirizi wange!" 
Psalms20:1 Musengwa Katonda awulire okusaba kwo mu bizibu byo, iwe kyabazinga. Katonda oyo owa Yakobo akuwonie abazigu." 
Psalms20:2 Akugheereze obuyambi okuva mu isinzizo lye eitukuvu, era akughe obughagizi okuva ku lusozi lwe Sioni." 
Psalms20:3 Asiime ebigheebwayo by'omugha byonabyona, era asangaalire emisengo gyo gyonagyona egyokebwa." 
Psalms20:4 Akughe byonabyona omwoyo gwo bye gwegomba, era akubeere okutuukiriza byonabyona by'otegeike." 
Psalms20:5 Olwo tukube emizira ng'oghangwire, era tube mu bikuudhuko olw'obughanguzi obwo, nga tusaaka Musengwa Katonda. Musengwa Katonda akughe by'osaba byonabyona." 
Psalms20:6 Buti ntegeire nga Musengwa Katonda aleetera kyabazinga we ye yasiiga omuzigo okughangula; awulira okusaba kwe ng'ali mu igulu lye eitukuvu, yaamugha obughanguzi obutaloodheka, ng'akozesa omukono gwe omusaadha ogw'amaani." 
Psalms20:7 Abalwani abandi beesigulira ku bigaali eby'omu lutalo, ate abandi ku mbalaasi, aye ife twesigulira ku maani ga Musengwa Katonda waife." 
Psalms20:8 Abo balitondoka baagwa ere, aye ife tulisituka twayemerera nga tuli bagumu." 
Psalms20:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda, gha kyabazinga obughanguzi, tukweghembye wulira okusaba kwaife." 
Psalms21:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, olw'amaani go kyabazinga asangaire; era olw'obuyambi bwo asagambira ghaigulu." 
Psalms21:2 Omughaire byonabyona by'ayenda, era waamugha kye yasaba." 
Psalms21:3 Wamuleetera enkabi edhitaloodheka, era waamuvaaza engule eya zaabu omukenenule." 
Psalms21:4 Yakusaba obulamu waabumugha, waamugha obughangaazi obw'ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms21:5 Ekitiisa kye kikologho olw'obuyambi bwo; wamugha okumanhikana einho n'okufuga. 
Psalms21:6 Bwenebwene omugha enkabi ebyanda n'ebyanda era musangaavu inho olw'okuba oli naye. 
Psalms21:7 Kyabazinga yeesiga Musengwa Katonda, era olw'okuba oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene amugonza inho, ghazira kimutengeesa naire." 
Psalms21:8 Aligema abazigu be n'omukono gwe; omukono gwe omusaadha guligema abo abamukyagha boonaboona. 
Psalms21:9 Bw'aliboneka alibookya n'omuliro ng'ogw'oluyiira. Musengwa Katonda alibasaaniagho mu kiruyi kye; balikeenha n'omuliro. 
Psalms21:10 Kyabazinga alizikiriza abaana baibwe okubamala ku nsi, era taja kulekera okutuusa nga boonaboona abamazeegho." 
Psalms21:11 Waire bategeka okumukola akabi oba okuyiiya ngeri y'okumutegamu, entegeka dhaibwe tidhirituukirira;" 
Psalms21:12 kuba bw'alibalingirizaamu akalaso ke, balikyuka baalumuka bulumuke." 
Psalms21:13 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ogulumizibwenga buliidho olw'amaani go. Ife tunaayembanga era twakusaakanga olw'obukumu bwo." 
Psalms22:1 Katonda wange, Katonda wange, lwaki ondekuliire agho? Lwaki oba ghala otyo n'otanhamba, n'okuwologoma kwange ni kutakutuukaku naire?" 
Psalms22:2 Wo Katonda wange, ndira omusana gwonagwona, aye waaloba kundhiramu; naalira n'obwire aye naaloba kufuna kuwoleeraku naire." 
Psalms22:3 Ate nga niiwe Omutukuvu, asaakibwa Isiraeli yoonayoona." 
Psalms22:4 Niiwe badhaadha baife ye baataamu obwesige, baakwesiga era waabawonia." 
Psalms22:5 Baakulirira era waabalokola; baakwesiga era waabawonia okuswala. 
Psalms22:6 Aye nze ndi ng'oti lugereegere tikaali muntu, ndi nseko dha balamu era abantu ye banhooma." 
Psalms22:7 Boonaboona bambona ng'omudoofu, bankongoola, baatengeesa n'emitwe nga bakoba bati:" 
Psalms22:8 “Yeesiga Musengwa Katonda, lwaki buti tamuwonia? Oba nga Musengwa Katonda amugonza lwaki tamuyamba?”" 
Psalms22:9 Ate nga niiwe owantoola mu nda ya maama, ni bwe nali ku mabeere nga nhonka ng'onkuuma." 
Psalms22:10 Mu kuva mu nda nateebwa mu ngalo dho, era kasookanga maama anzaala niiwe Katonda wange." 
Psalms22:11 Otamba ghala, ebizibu bineezungulwire, ate ghazira wa kuunhamba." 
Psalms22:12 Abazigu kamaala baneezungulwire ng'oti gate galume; oti ni gale geene agafulagani agava ku itale ku Bashani. 
Psalms22:13 Baasaamiriiza eminwa, bali ng'oti mpologoma eyeeruga ng'ate bw'ewologoma." 
Psalms22:14 Zeenazeena mpoiremu ndi kiwooboloolo, buli igumba liviire ku buyungiro bwalyo, omwoyo gunseeneine." 
Psalms22:15 Amaani gankaze ng'oti n'olujo olukalanga, olulimi lwaneesibira ku kibuno naasigala agho mu nkungu ng'omufu." 
Psalms22:16 Ekikuukuulu eky'abakozi ab'ebibi kineezungulwire, bali ng'oti gabwa geene. Banfumiite engalo n'ebigere." 
Psalms22:17 Amagumba gange goonagoona geegeze, abazigu baaningaku baaneerolera." 
Psalms22:18 Bagabana ebivaalo byange nga bakuba akalulu, babone buli muntu ky'atwala." 
Psalms22:19 Aye Musengwa Katonda, otamba ghala! Niiwe omuyambi wange, yangughaku ombeere." 
Psalms22:20 Mponia empiima, otoole obulamu bwange mu maino g'embwa edho." 
Psalms22:21 Mponia okuliibwa empologoma edho omponie okufulibwa n'amayiga g'embogo edho. 
Psalms22:22 Ndidha kukoberanga abantu bange by'onkoleire; ndidha kukusaakanga nga ndi mu bantu abeesoloiza okukusinza. 
Psalms22:23 Musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe mwenamwena abamutya. Mumughe ekitiisa imwe mwenamwena baidhukulu ba Yakobo! Mumutye imwe mwenamwena Abaisiraeli," 
Psalms22:24 kuba taloba kufaayo oba okutuumya amaiso oyo adaaga; bwenebwene tamulekulira agho, aye amuwulirisa buli lw'amulirira." 
Psalms22:25 Nga ndi mu bantu kamaala abeesoloiza, ndikusaaka olw'ebyo by'okola. Ndighaayo kye neeyama, nga ndi mu maiso g'abo abakutya." 
Psalms22:26 Abaavu balirya baiguta; abo abanoonia Musengwa Katonda balimusaaka! Mbendeza mubenga bwera ebyanda n'ebyanda! 
Psalms22:27 Okuva ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'ensi amaghanga galiidhukira Musengwa Katonda. Galikyuka gaira y'ali; ebika byonabyona birimusinza; 
Psalms22:28 kuba obufuzi bwonabwona bwa Musengwa Katonda, era oyo n'afuga amaghanga." 
Psalms22:29 Bwenebwene abo boonaboona ab'oku nsi abeekudumbaza, n'abo boonaboona abantu obuntu abafa, balyeyala mu maiso ge nga kw'otaire na kiisi muntu atasobola kwekuuma mwene nga mulamu." 
Psalms22:30 Ense edh'abaliiragho dhirimugheereza, abantu balighayira oluse olwidha ku Musengwa Katonda," 
Psalms22:31 era balikobera abo abaja okuzaalibwa, nga Musengwa Katonda bw'awonia abantu be." 
Psalms23:1 Musengwa Katonda n'omwayi, nze ndi ntaama ye era nzira kye ndhulirira." 
Psalms23:2 Aghali eisubi eirungi, gh'andeka okuwuumulira, era antwala aghali amaadhi amalaavu." 
Psalms23:3 Omwoyo gwange agwizaamu amaani, yambisa mu ngira edh'obutuufu, nga bwe yasuubiza." 
Psalms23:4 Era ni bwemba nga ndi kutambulira mu kikonko ekiidhwire enzikiiza etiisa ng'oti kufa, ezira kibi kye ntyamu, kuba iwe oli ninze. Mpulira emiraala bw'oba ng'ogemye omwigo gwo ogunkuuma, era ng'ogemye n'ogwo ogundholeka engira." 
Psalms23:5 Ontegekera embaga wantyamya, ng'abazigu bange babona. Wanfuula omugeni ow'ekitiisa ng'onsiiga omuzigo ogw'akawoowo, wampa eby'okunhwa okutuusa ku nkooye." 
Psalms23:6 Bwenebwene olw'okungonza kwo n'olw'okunsaasira kwo, oidha kubanga ghalala ninze, enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwange. Era nga nkaagheeragho tija kuvanga mu ndhu ya Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms24:1 Ensi ya Musengwa Katonda n'ebigiriku byonabyona; n'Abantu boonaboona abali ku nsi ba Musengwa Katonda; 
Psalms24:2 kuba n'eyagikola, yaagizimba ku nhandha eri ghansi ghaayo, era yaakuba emisingi gyayo ghansi gh'entobo y'enhandha." 
Psalms24:3 Naani oyo aikirizibwa okuniina ku lusozi lwa Musengwa Katonda? Era naani aikirizibwa okwingira mu isinzizo lye eitukuvu? 
Psalms24:4 N'oyo ow'omwoyo omunaabuufu era akola ebituufu; oyo atasinza bitali Katonda, oba okulayirira obwereere." 
Psalms24:5 Musengwa Katonda aja kumugha enkabi; Katonda omulokozi we taja kumubonamu kibi kyonakyona. 
Psalms24:6 Abantu abali ng'oti n'oyo n'abanoonia Katonda, era ni baidha mu maiso ga Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Mwigulegho endhigi bukalamu, mughaluzeeyo endhigi enkaire edh'eira, Kyabazinga omukologho aingire." 
Psalms24:8 Naani oyo Kyabazinga omukologho? Ni Musengwa Katonda, ow'amaani agataloodheka era Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona Musengwa Katonda oyo aghangula mu buli lutalo." 
Psalms24:9 Mwigulegho endhigi bukalamu mughaluzeeyo endhigi enkaire edh'eira, Kyabazinga omukologho aingire." 
Psalms24:10 Naani oyo Kyabazinga omukologho? Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ni Kyabazinga omukologho. 
Psalms25:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe ye nsaba." 
Psalms25:2 Katonda wange, niiwe ye neesiga, mponia okuswala otaganha bazigu bange kuneeyagaliraku." 
Psalms25:3 Bwene otaganha abo abasuubirira mu iwe kuswala, aye abo ab'empwitu abakudheemera, ka baswale." 
Psalms25:4 Wo Musengwa Katonda, mmanhisa bw'oyenda neebise, era ndhegeresa okutambula nga bw'oyenda ntambule." 
Psalms25:5 Ndagirira era ondhegerese okutambulira mu mazima go, kuba niiwe Katonda era omulokozi wange mwe nsuubirira buliidho." 
Psalms25:6 Wo Musengwa Katonda, oteerabira nga bw'obairenga ng'otusaasira era ng'otugonza inho, okuva eira n'eira." 
Psalms25:7 Otaidhukira bibi byange na bisobyo byange eby'omu, buto aye olw'okugonza kwo okungi, n'olw'obulungi obw'eriina lyo, nze ondidhukiranga." 
Psalms25:8 Olw'okuba Musengwa Katonda mulungi era nga mutuufu, kyava n'agalagira aboonooni engira." 
Psalms25:9 Abateekudumbaza abalagirira mu kusalagho okutuufu, era abamanhisa by'ayenda." 
Psalms25:10 Okugonza kwa Musengwa Katonda okungi n'obwesigwa bwe, byeyolekera mu nsambo y'atwalamu abo abakuuma endagaano ye era ni bagondera ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms25:11 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ku lw'obulungi obw'eriina lyo nsonigha ebibi byange, kuba biri kamaala inho." 
Psalms25:12 Omuntu oyo atya Musengwa Katonda, Musengwa Katonda alimulagirira engira entuufu okugema." 
Psalms25:13 Mwene anaabanga n'ebirungi kamaala, ate abaana be n'abaidhukulu balitwala ensi." 
Psalms25:14 Musengwa Katonda aba mukagwa w'abo abamutya, era akakasa endagaano ye nabo." 
Psalms25:15 Amaiso gange ngata ku Musengwa Katonda buliidho, kuba n'anteekuluza mu lutuula olw'omuzigu wange." 
Psalms25:16 Wo Musengwa Katonda, otankuba nkoone aye nkusaba ondhune, kuba nsigaire zenka era ndaazibwadaazibwa." 
Psalms25:17 Obweraliikirivu buneeyongeireku ku mwoyo, ntoola mu kudaazibwadaazibwa kuno." 
Psalms25:18 Lingirira okudaazibwadaazibwa kwange n'obuzibu bwe ndimu, onsonighe ebibi byange byonabyona." 
Psalms25:19 Lingirira obungi obw'abazigu bange era obone nga bwe baneeguguna nga benda bwa kundhita 
Psalms25:20 Kuuma obulamu bwange era omponie, kuba niiwe ye neesiga, otandeka kuswala!" 
Psalms25:21 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkusaba obwesigwa n'obutuukirivu binkuumenga, kuba eisuubi lyange liri mu iwe." 
Psalms25:22 Wo Katonda wange, nunula Abaisiraeli abantu bo, obatoole mu bizibu byaibwe byonabyona." 
Psalms26:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, sala omusango oyoleke nga bwe nziraku kinvunaanibwa, kuba mbairenga mwesigwa y'oli, aghazira kudaaliima naire." 
Psalms26:2 Wo Musengwa Katonda, neekebeedha era ondebe; lingirira omwoyo gwange n'ebidhuubo byange," 
Psalms26:3 kuba okugonza kwo okutakoma n'okunkuuma, era mu bwesigwa bwo mwe ntambulira." 
Psalms26:4 Tyeyimba mu bantu baguya, era tyereeterezaaku bantu batali beesimbu." 
Psalms26:5 Tyenda naire kubita na bakozi ba bibi, era neeghala okutyamira mu babi." 
Psalms26:6 Wo Musengwa Katonda, okumanha nga nziraku musango, nnaabye mu ngalo, era naatambula okwezungulula alutaari nga nkusinza." 
Psalms26:7 Nja nga nhembera ghaigulu olwembo olw'okukusiima, nga nkobera abantu ebyo by'okola ebyewuninkiriza." 
Psalms26:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ngonza endhu yo mw'oba, n'ekifo ekitiisa kyo ghe kibonekera." 
Psalms26:9 Otantwaliza ghalala n'aboonooni, oba okusaaniagho obulamu bwange aghalala n'abatemo," 
Psalms26:10 abayiiya okukola ebibi buli kaseera, era abaidhwire enguzi." 
Psalms26:11 Aye nze atambulira mu bwesigwa, nsaasira era onnunule." 
Psalms26:12 Nhemereire aghatuufu, ndidha kusaakanga Musengwa Katonda nga ndi mu bantu be abeesoloiza okumusinza." 
Psalms27:1 Musengwa Katonda n'entaala yange emmuliikirira era n'omulokozi wange, kale ni ghazira ye ntya. Musengwa Katonda n'ekisenge ekigumu mwe neewogoma, kale ni ghazira alintiisatiisa." 
Psalms27:2 Abakozi ab'ebibi bwebaanumba nga bali ng'oti benda kundya bulye, beene abo abazigu bange baja kugangalima ere bagwe." 
Psalms27:3 Ni bweririba eigye nga n'erinzingiiza okuunumba, tija kuwuliramu kutya naire. Abazigu bange ni bwebantanulaku olutalo, nze ndidha kuba mugumu." 
Psalms27:4 Ekintu kirala kiti kye nsaba Musengwa Katonda, kye nhenda kiri kirala nti mbenga mu ndhu ya Musengwa Katonda enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwange, okulingirira obulungi bwa Musengwa Katonda, n'okumusaba angalagire;" 
Psalms27:5 kuba mu biseera ebizibu aja kumpa obubudamo, aja kunkuumira mu ndhu ye, ante ghaigulu ku ibaale abazigu ye batatuuka." 
Psalms27:6 Olwo mbe nga mpangwire abazigu bange abaneezungulwire; olwo nkube emizira nga mpaayo emisengo mu ndhu ye, era nhembere Musengwa Katonda enhembo edhimusaaka." 
Psalms27:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, otansiriikirira nga ndi kulira! Nsaasira ondhiremu!" 
Psalms27:8 Wankoba oti: “Idha onsinze.” Mpegaano nze nkoba nti: “Musengwa Katonda, ndidhie okukusinza" 
Psalms27:9 otaneegisaaku.” Otansungughalira nze omugheereza wo, otaaminga mu maiso go. Niiwe omubeezi wange. Otansuula ere na kundekulira agho, Katonda wange iwe obulokozi bwange." 
Psalms27:10 Waire bbaaba ni maama bandekulira agho, Musengwa Katonda ananzaala." 
Psalms27:11 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ngalagira bwe mbe neebise, era ombise mu ngira entuufu, kuba ndi n'abazigu." 
Psalms27:12 Otandekulira agho bazigu kunkola kye benda, kuba abaguya abo baanumbye era bali kuneesoomera okunkankada." 
Psalms27:13 Aye nze nkakasa bukalamu nti ndibona nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulungi: nga nkaali ku nsi mu bulamu buno. 
Psalms27:14 Weesige Musengwa Katonda otawaamu maani, guma omwoyo. Bwenebwene weesige Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms28:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe olubaale mwe neewogoma, nze ndi kukulirira: otaloba kumpulira. Bw'onsiriikirira ndidha kuba ng'oti n'abo abaaja e magombe." 
Psalms28:2 Ganha owulirise okulira kwange, nga nkusaba okumbeera, era nga nsituliire emikono eri eisinzizo lyo eitukuvu einho." 
Psalms28:3 Otantwaliza ghalala n'ababi, n'abo abakozi b'ebibi aboogera obukalamu ni banaibwe, ate nga mu myoyo gyaibwe baidhwire enge." 
Psalms28:4 Basasulemu ekigwana ebikolwa byaibwe n'ebibi bye bakola. Basasule ekyo ekigwana ebyo byonabyona bye baakola; ekyo ekibagwaniire ky'obe obaghe. 
Psalms28:5 Olw'okuba banhoomerera ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'akola n'ebyo bye yatonda, aja kubabonereza era abazikirize." 
Psalms28:6 Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe, kuba yawulira okulira kwange, nga ndi kumusaba." 
Psalms28:7 Musengwa Katonda n'amaani gange era n'engabo yange, oyo ye neesiga n'omwoyo omulala. Ambeera era yansanhusa, ndidha kumwembera olwembo olw'okumusiima." 
Psalms28:8 Musengwa Katonda n'amaani g'abantu be, era n'ekisenge ekigumu kyabazinga we ye yasiiga omuzigo mwe yeewogoma." 
Psalms28:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda, lokola abantu bo, era oghe enkabi abo be weerobozaamu, iwe obenga mwayi waibwe, era obalabirirenga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms29:1 Imwe abali mu igulu, musaake Musengwa Katonda, mwatule nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali ow'ekitiisa era ow'amaani." 
Psalms29:2 Mwatule muti eriina lya Musengwa Katonda liri n'ekitiisa, musinze Musengwa Katonda ng'aboneike mu butukuvu bwe." 
Psalms29:3 Amamiro ga Musengwa Katonda ogawulirira ku maadhi; Katonda ow'ekitiisa abwatuka ng'oti lukuba; Musengwa Katonda awulirwa ku maadhi amangi. 
Psalms29:4 Amamiro ga Musengwa Katonda gali n'obukumu; amamiro ga Musengwa Katonda gawulikika nga ga buyinza. 
Psalms29:5 Amamiro ga Musengwa Katonda gamenha emivule; Musengwa Katonda amenha emivule egy'e Lebanoni. 
Psalms29:6 Atuumya ensozi edh'omu Lebanoni ng'oti nte nto, era yaatuumya Sirioni ng'oti n'embogo enume entototo." 
Psalms29:7 Amamiro ga Musengwa Katonda gavaamu enimi edh'omuliro edhimyansa. 
Psalms29:8 Amamiro ga Musengwa Katonda gatengeesa eirungu; Musengwa Katonda atengeesa eirungu ery'e Kadeshi. 
Psalms29:9 Amamiro ga Musengwa Katonda gatengeesa emiti emikologho, era gaakunkumusa amakaba okuva ku miti gyonagyona, n'abali mu isinzizo lye boonaboona baayasiikana bati: “Katonda wa kitiisa!”" 
Psalms29:10 Musengwa Katonda n'afuga omwidhuzo gw'amaadhi; afuga nga ni kyabazinga ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Psalms29:11 Musengwa Katonda aghenga abantu be amaani, era aghenga abantu be enkabi babe miraala." 
Psalms30:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndidha kukusaakanga buliidho, kuba wamponia, waalobera abazigu bange okuneeyagaliraku." 
Psalms30:2 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, nakulirira okumbeera, era wamponia." 
Psalms30:3 Wantoola mu bafu, wandhiriza obulamu, naaloba kuja magombe." 
Psalms30:4 Musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe mwenamwena abamutya! Mwidhukire Omutukuvu by'akoze mumusiime! 
Psalms30:5 Kuba obusungu bwe bubaagho kaseera buseera, aye obulungi bwe bubaagho mu bulamu obw'omuntu bwonabwona. Omuntu asobola okulira obwire bwonabwona, ate bwe bukya yaaseka." 
Psalms30:6 Bwe nali nga ndi bukalamu, naja neekiina nga nkoba nti: “Ezira kirindhugumiza.”" 
Psalms30:7 Iwe olw'obulungi bwo wankuuma naaba mugumu ng'oti lusozi, aye bwe watuuka ku ky'obutenda kuuningaku, naatya inho." 
Psalms30:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nakulirira era naakusaba okumbeera." 
Psalms30:9 Bwe nfa oganhulwamu ki? Bwe nja e magombe, enkungu erikusaaka? Erikobera abantu obwesigwa bwo?" 
Psalms30:10 Wo Musengwa Katonda, mpulira era ongemerwe ekivunika. Wo Musengwa Katonda, mbeera!" 
Psalms30:11 Onkyukiiza okulira kwange waakufuula kukina, onsibwire ebikaakaati eby'okunakughala wandhidhuza okusangaala." 
Psalms30:12 Olw'ekyo ndidha kukusaakanga n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona obutasirika. Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, ndidha kukusiimanga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms31:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe ye neesiga otandeka kuswala. Niiwe Katonda ow'obutuufu, nkusaba ondokole." 
Psalms31:2 Tega kutu ompulirise, yangughaku omponie, onfuukire olubaale olw'okwewogomamu era ekimante ekigumu ekineezungulwire eky'okumponia." 
Psalms31:3 Bwenebwene oli ng'oti lubaale era ng'oti kimante kigumu mwe neewogoma; ku lw'obulungi obw'eriina lyo ngema ku mukono ombise aghabi. 
Psalms31:4 Mbisa aghalungi ndobe kugwa mu lutuula lwe banteze, kuba niiwe ye neesiga." 
Psalms31:5 Ntaire obulamu bwange mu ngalo dho, kuba onnunwire, niiwe Musengwa Katonda omwesigwa." 
Psalms31:6 Toyenda abo abeesiga ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, ebizira muganhulo, aye nze neesiga iwe Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms31:7 Ndidha kusangaalanga era nsagambenga olw'okugonza kwo okutakoma; kuba obona okudaazibwadaazibwa kwange, era ofaayo ku bizibu byange." 
Psalms31:8 Toganhie bazigu bange kuntuukaku, era ompaire eidembe neetaaya." 
Psalms31:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkusaba ondhune, kuba ndi mu buzibu, amaiso gali kuunafugha olw'enaku era zeenazeena mpweireiremu irala amaani." 
Psalms31:10 Obulamu bwange buseeneine olw'enaku n'emyaka gyange gyakendeera olw'okusinda. Amaani gampwamu olw'ebiinuma ku mwoyo, n'amagumba gaanafugha." 
Psalms31:11 Abazigu bange boonaboona bambona nga ndi kiwooboloolo; ab'oku muliinaano baaneenhinhata; bakagwa bange bantya era abambona mu nguudo baanumuka. 
Psalms31:12 Abantu nabava ira mu birowoozo ndi oti n'eyafa, nfuuse ng'oti n'ensuwa emaniangwike ye baswire ere." 
Psalms31:13 Bwenebwene mpulira abantu kamaala nga boogera obwama; buli ghe nninga mpulira kutya kwereere nga baneegeyaamu, era nga beekobaana okundhita." 
Psalms31:14 Aye nze neesiga iwe Musengwa Katonda. Era nkyogera nti: “Niiwe Katonda wange.” 
Psalms31:15 Obulamu bwange buli mu ngalo dho; ntoola mu ngalo dh'abazigu bange abankiriga. 
Psalms31:16 Nningaaku n'amaiso ag'ekisa, ondokole olw'okugonza kwo okutakoma." 
Psalms31:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda, otandeka ni nswala, kuba niiwe ye nsaba. Abakozi b'ebibi baswaze, baje e magombe nga basiriikiriire." 
Psalms31:18 Sirisa abaguya abo kuba baidhwire okwebona. Boogera bubi ku bantu abatuufu nga babanhoomerera. 
Psalms31:19 Bwenebwene ebirungi biri kamaala, by'oterekeire abo abakutya. Abantu boonaboona babona by'okolera abo abakwesiga." 
Psalms31:20 Obagisa gh'oli, waalobera abo ababeekobaana baaloba kubatuukaku. Obakuumira agheekusifu waabawonia ebivumo eby'abazigu baibwe." 
Psalms31:21 Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe, kuba yangonza inho ebitaloodheka, bwe nali nga neezungulwirwa abazigu era ni baanumba." 
Psalms31:22 Mu kutya okungi nadhuuba nti “Oba katyo aminze gh'ali!” Aye bwe namulirira yampulirisa nga ndi kumusaba okumbeera. 
Psalms31:23 Mugonzenga Musengwa Katonda imwe mwenamwena abamusinza, Musengwa Katonda akuuma abo abamwesiga, aye abonereza nga bwe kigwaniire abo abeetwala nga ba ghaigulu." 
Psalms31:24 Mwiremu amaani era mugume emyoyo, imwe mwenamwena abasuubirira mu Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms32:1 Wa nkabi oyo asoniyibwa ebyonoono bye, ebibi bye ni bimutoolebwaku." 
Psalms32:2 Wa nkabi oyo Musengwa Katonda y'abala ng'azira kibi, era nga mu mwoyo gwe muzira buguya." 
Psalms32:3 Bwe nali nkaali kwatula bibi bye nakolanga nagoogomba, kuba nawologomanga olunaku lwonalwona." 
Psalms32:4 Wambonerezanga omusana n'obwire, amaani gampweramu irala ng'oti n'ebisimbe bwe bikala okw'endoboozi." 
Psalms32:5 Agho naayatula y'oli ebibi bye nakolanga, era naaloba kukugisa mikuzi gye nayonoonanga. Naakoba nti: “Nteekwa okwatula okwonoona kwange ye Musengwa Katonda.” Agho weena wansonigha omusango ogw'ebibi bye nakola." 
Psalms32:6 Kyenva ni nkoba kiisi akutya, akusabenga mu biseera eby'enaku, olwo ebizibu ebyekuluumulula ng'oti mwiga gwa mwidhuzo lwe bitalimutuukaku." 
Psalms32:7 Oli kifo kyange mwe neewogoma, niiwe omponia ebizibu wandhidhuza eisanhu olw'okuwonezebwa." 
Psalms32:8 Musengwa Katonda ankoba ati: “Ndidha kukugalagiranga era nkwegerese ensambo ey'okwebisaamu, era ndidha kukulagiriranga nga nkulabirira." 
Psalms32:9 Otabanga ng'embalaasi oba enhumbu edhizira kutegeera, edhitasobola kukola muntu ky'ayenda, okutoolaku nga adhisibyemu ekyuma mu kanwa n'enkoba mu kifuba, memale ni dhikola ky'ayenda.”" 
Psalms32:10 Ebizibu ebiidhira ababi biri kamaala, aye Musengwa Katonda agonza abo abamwesiga n'okugonza okutakoma." 
Psalms32:11 Imwe abatuufu musangaale era musagambe olw'ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'akola. Imwe abagondera ebiragiro bye, mukube emizira." 
Psalms33:1 Imwe abatuufu musagambe olw'ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'akola; kituufu okumusaaka imwe abagondera ebiragiro bye. 
Psalms33:2 Mukube endingidi nga musaaka Musengwa Katonda, mutabulemu n'entongooli ey'enkosi eikumi." 
Psalms33:3 Mumwembere olwembo oluyaaka, mukube ebivuga n'obukugu muteeku n'emizira egy'amaani." 
Psalms33:4 Musengwa Katonda kiisi ky'akoba akituukiriza, era kiisi ky'akola kyoleka nga bw'ali omwesigwa." 
Psalms33:5 Ayenda abo abakola ebituufu n'abo abatasaliriza; okugonza kwa Musengwa Katonda eri abantu tikukoma. 
Psalms33:6 Musengwa Katonda yalagira eigulu lyakolebwa; ebiririmu byonabyona byakolebwa olw'ekibono kye. 
Psalms33:7 Yasololeza amaadhi ag'enhandha goonagoona ghalala; amaadhi ag'oku ntobo y'enhandha yaagakuumira ghalala, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'atereka ebintu bye mu byagi." 
Psalms33:8 Ensi yoonayoona etyenga Musengwa Katonda! Kiisi kiri ku nsi kimughe ekitiisa; 
Psalms33:9 kuba yayogera bwogere ensi yaabaagho, yaalagira bulagire buli kintu kyabaagho." 
Psalms33:10 Amaghanga bwe geekobaana, Musengwa Katonda yaagalemya; abantu bwe bategeka ebyaibwe Musengwa Katonda abitabulatabula." 
Psalms33:11 Aye mwene bw'ategeka ebibye bituukirira ebyanda n'ebyanda; ebidhuubo bye bisigalagho ense n'ense. 
Psalms33:12 Eighanga eriri ni Musengwa Katonda nga ni Katonda waalyo, lya nkabi; abantu Musengwa Katonda b'alonda okuba ababe, ba nkabi." 
Psalms33:13 Musengwa Katonda aba mu igulu yaalinga ghansi, yaabona abantu boonaboona." 
Psalms33:14 Ng'ali ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, alingirira abantu boonaboona ababa ku nsi." 
Psalms33:15 Oyo eyawumba emyoyo gy'abantu boonaboona, ategeera byonabyona bye gikola." 
Psalms33:16 Kyabazinga okuba n'eigye ery'amaani ti n'ekimuwonia okughangulwa, ate omulwani okuba n'amaani kamaala ti n'ekimuleetera okughangula." 
Psalms33:17 Ole aba yeerimba bw'asuubira okughangula olutalo n'embalaasi; amaani gaayo amangi tigasobola kumuwonia. 
Psalms33:18 Bona eno, Musengwa Katonda alabirira abo abamutya, era abo abasuubirira mu kugonza kwe okutakoma" 
Psalms33:19 abawonia okufa, yaabakuuma nga balamu mu biseera eby'endhala." 
Psalms33:20 Eisuubi lyaife liri mu Musengwa Katonda; oyo n'atubeera era oyo n'engabo yaife. 
Psalms33:21 Bwenebwene emyoyo gyaife misangaavu olwa Musengwa Katonda, kuba twesiga eriina lye eitukuvu." 
Psalms33:22 Wo Musengwa Katonda, tugonzenga obutalekera, ng'eisuubi lyaife lyonalyona bwe liri mu iwe." 
Psalms34:1 Ndidha kusiimanga Musengwa Katonda ebiseera byonabyona, tija kulekera kumusaakanga." 
Psalms34:2 Nze neenhumiriza mu Musengwa Katonda, imwe abadaazibwadaazibwa muwulire era musangaale." 
Psalms34:3 Muneeyimbeku twatule nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omukulu, era tusaakire ghalala eriina lye." 
Psalms34:4 Nasaba inho Musengwa Katonda yankolera kye nayenda, yamponia okutya kwonakwona." 
Psalms34:5 Abo abadaazibwadaazibwa oyo ye beesiga era baasangaala, taja kubaleka kuswala." 
Psalms34:6 Omuntu omunaku Musengwa Katonda amuwulira yaamuwonia, yaatoolagho ebizibu bye byonabyona." 
Psalms34:7 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda akuuma abo abatya Musengwa Katonda, yaabawonia ebizibu." 
Psalms34:8 Mwidhe mubone Musengwa Katonda nga bw'ali omulungi! Ba nkabi abo abamwesiga! 
Psalms34:9 Mutye Musengwa Katonda imwe abamusinza, kuba abo abamutya ghazira kye badhulirira." 
Psalms34:10 Ni bwedhiba empologoma edh'amaani dhibula emere, aye abo abasaba Musengwa Katonda tibabulwa kintu kirungi." 
Psalms34:11 Mwidhe baana bange mumpulirise, ndidha kubeegeresa okutya Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms34:12 Naani oyo ayenda okufuna obulamu, era eyeegomba okughangaala nga musangaavu?" 
Psalms34:13 Akuume olulimi lwe lulobe kwogera bibi, n'omunwa gwe gulobe kwogera bya buguya." 
Psalms34:14 Ave mu kukola ebibi akole ebituufu, anoonie eidembe era alitambuliremu." 
Psalms34:15 Amaiso ga Musengwa Katonda tigava ku batuufu, era talekera kuwulirisa kusaba kwaibwe." 
Psalms34:16 Aye abo abakola ebibi abakambughalira, bwe bafa abantu ab'oku nsi baabeerabira." 
Psalms34:17 Abatuufu bwe basaba okubeerwa, Musengwa Katonda abawulira yaabawonia, era yaatoolagho ebizibu byaibwe byonabyona." 
Psalms34:18 Abo abawoiremu amaani, Musengwa Katonda tabasuulirira, era alokola abo abaweireiremu irala eisuubi." 
Psalms34:19 Ebizibu ebigwa ku batuufu biri kamaala, aye Musengwa Katonda abawonia yaatoolagho ebizibu byaibwe byonabyona." 
Psalms34:20 Akuuma amagumba gaibwe goonagoona, ghaabula erimenhekaku waire eirala liti." 
Psalms34:21 Aidha kuleetera omukozi w'ebibi okufa olw'ebibi bye, era abo abakyagha abantu abatuufu abasalire omusango gubasinge." 
Psalms34:22 Musengwa Katonda anunula obulamu bw'abagheereza be, ghazira ku abo abamwesiga aja kusalirwa musango kumusinga." 
Psalms35:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, balumbe abo abaanumbagana, balwanise abo abaanwanisa." 
Psalms35:2 Gema engabo enene n'entono, ositukiremu oidhe ombeere." 
Psalms35:3 Bbeeda amafumo aga buli nsambo, ogoolekeze abo abaamingirira. Onkobere oti oidha kumponia abazigu." 
Psalms35:4 Abo abayiiga obulamu bwange baswaze era banhoomebwe! Era oyemereze abo ababaire baidha n'entegeka ey'okuunumba, obairirizeeyo nga n'okutegeera tibategeera." 
Psalms35:5 Malaika wa Musengwa Katonda k'abasindiikirize, babe ng'oti musinsi empewo gw'efuuwa obw'ere." 
Psalms35:6 Ka baje mu nzikiiza ni mu butyerezi, nga malaika wa Musengwa Katonda ababingirira." 
Psalms35:7 Bantega olutuula mu nkweko aghazira nsonga, era baasima ebiina okuntega nga nzira kye mbakoze." 
Psalms35:8 Aye ka batuuke ku kuzikirizibwa nga tibaidhi, olutuula lwe baagisa lugemye beene abo, balugwemu bazikirire." 
Psalms35:9 Olwo ndisagamba olwa Musengwa Katonda, era naasangaala kuba yandokola." 
Psalms35:10 Ndisaaka Musengwa Katonda n'amaani gange goonagoona, nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, naani ali ng'oti niiwe? Iwe atoola omunafu n'omuwonia ow'amaani amuswikirira, era atoola omwavu n'omuwonia amunhagaku ebibye?”" 
Psalms35:11 Abadhulizi abaguya basituka bampaama ebintu bye ntaidhiiku naire. 
Psalms35:12 Bwe mbakolera ebirungi bansasulamu bibi, baaleetera omwoyo gwange okuwaamu amaani." 
Psalms35:13 Ate nga beene bwe baali abalwaire, nze nanakughala, neerumya nga nsiiba endhala, naasaba nga nkotaimya omutwe," 
Psalms35:14 ng'oti nsabira mukagwa wange oba muganda wange. Naatambula n'amakono ku mutwe ng'oti n'alira inhina. 
Psalms35:15 Aye lwe nagwa mu bizibu, beene baasangaala busangaale, beesoloza, baaneezungulula, bankongoola, ni be nali tiidhi bankuba nga tibalekera naire." 
Psalms35:16 Beekalangula okunkiina ng'oti n'abatatya Katonda bwe bakola, baaningirira nga baneeguguna." 
Psalms35:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda, onaabalingirira obulingirire otyo kutuuka li? Mponia obukambwe bwaibwe era owonie obulamu bwange empologoma edho!" 
Psalms35:18 Olwo ndikusiima nga ndi mu bantu bo abeesoloiza okukusinza, era naakusaaka nga ndi mu ikuukuubira ery'abantu." 
Psalms35:19 Abo abeefuula abazigu bange aghazira nsonga ntuufu, otabaganha kusagamba lwa kugwa kwange, era abo abankyagha nga ghazira kye mbakoze, otabaikiriza kunhiira maiso gaibwe kunsekerera." 
Psalms35:20 Tibakolerera miraala, okutoolaku okughaayira ebibono ku abo abeebeera obwagho ni beesirikira." 
Psalms35:21 Baanangira ebintu bye ntakola nga bakoba bati: “Otyo, otyo! Tukuboine!”" 
Psalms35:22 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda oboine bino, otaloba kumpulira! Wo Musengwa Katonda, otamba ghala!" 
Psalms35:23 Situkiramu onwanirire, yemereragho ompolezeegho niiwe Katonda wange era Musengwa Katonda wange!" 
Psalms35:24 Sala omusango oyoleke nga bwe nziraku musango, kuba iwe oli mutuufu, era otabaganha kusagamba lwa kugwa kwange." 
Psalms35:25 Otabaganha kukoba bati: “Otyo, kye tubairenga twenda buti tukituuseeku!” Nga bakoba bati: “Oyo buti awoire!”" 
Psalms35:26 Abo abasagamba ng'ebizibu bingwireku, batabule emitwe era obaswaze. Abo abaneekulumbalizaaku baswakize irala era banhoomebwe." 
Psalms35:27 Aye abo abasangaala okumbona nga nziraku musango, ka bakube emizira nga basagamba. Era baatule emikuzi kamaala nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omukologho era nga bw'asangaala buli mugheereza we lw'aba obukalamu." 
Psalms35:28 Olwo ndidha kulangiriranga nga bw'oli omutuufu, era nkusaakenga olunaku lwonalwona." 
Psalms36:1 Omwonooni awulira mule ng'ekibi kyogera naye, era tatya Katonda naire;" 
Psalms36:2 kuba yeebona nga wa ghaigulu inho, era nga ghazira asobola kumanha bibi bye na kubivumirira." 
Psalms36:3 Byonabyona by'ayogera byoleka itima na buguya; by'akola tibikaali bya magezi waire okuba ebirungi. 
Psalms36:4 Akola entegeka ey'okukola eby'eitima ng'ali mu buliri, yaasituka nga ghazira kirungi kye yeetegeike kukola, era ghazira kibi kimugemya ntete kukola." 
Psalms36:5 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda okugonza tikukoma era kugungumavu okutuuka mu igulu, ate obwesigwa bwo butuuka mu bire." 
Psalms36:6 Obutuufu bwo bugulumivu ng'oti nsozi, ate ensala yo ey'amazima eika yaatuuka ku ntobo ey'enhandha. Niiwe owonia abantu n'ensolo obutagwa mu kabi." 
Psalms36:7 Okugonza kwo okutakoma nga kwa mughendo inho! Oghambaatira abaana b'abantu ng'oti n'enkoko bw'eghambaatira obwana bwayo. 
Psalms36:8 Batoola ku bungi bw'emere eri mu ndhu yo baakola embaga, era baafuna ku birungi byo ebikuuluula ng'oti mwiga." 
Psalms36:9 Kuba niiwe oli n'ensulo ey'obulamu, era mu butangaavu bwo mwe tubonera obutangaavu bwene." 
Psalms36:10 Otakomya kugonzanga abo abakutegeera, waire okulekera okulokolanga abo abagondera ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms36:11 Otaganha abo abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu kwidha kuunumba; waire okuleka ababi abo okuuminga gh'oli. 
Psalms36:12 Bona, ababi bali ku itaka, bagwire baaloba kusobola kusituka." 
Psalms37:1 Tofangayo ku babi, oba okwesiimisanga abakola ebibi," 
Psalms37:2 kuba amangu n'embiro baja kuwaagho ng'oti isubi, baniale ng'oti n'ebimera." 
Psalms37:3 Weesige Musengwa Katonda era okole ebirungi, oidha kuba bukalamu mu nsi era ghabule ekikweraliikiriza." 
Psalms37:4 Eisanhu lyo lyagalire mu Musengwa Katonda, aidha kukugha omwoyo gwo bye gwenda." 
Psalms37:5 Eneebisa yo gigemye Musengwa Katonda, omwesige aidha kukubeera." 
Psalms37:6 Aidha kwoleka nga bw'oziraku omusango, n'obutuufu bwo bumesunkane ng'endhuba ey'omu kasana ghagati." 
Psalms37:7 Sirikanga ng'oli aghali Musengwa Katonda, oteegerere ky'anaakola. Ole ebintu ni bwebimujiira obukalamu, oba n'afuna ebintu ng'abita mu magira amabi, otafangayo." 
Psalms37:8 Weesambenga ekiruyi, olekenga n'obusungu n'okweraliikirira, byonabyona bivaamu bibi," 
Psalms37:9 kuba ababi baja kuwaagho aye abo abasuubirira mu Musengwa Katonda balitwala ensi. 
Psalms37:10 Mu kaseera katono ababi baja kuwaagho, nga ni bw'obaagala ghe baalinga tobabona." 
Psalms37:11 Aye abo abawombeefu balitwala ensi, era baaba miraala ng'ebintu bibajiira bukalamu." 
Psalms37:12 Omubi yeesoomera okukola omuntu omutuufu obubi era amweguguna. 
Psalms37:13 Aye Musengwa Katonda asekerera omubi, kuba aidhi ati olunaku lwe tiruli ghala." 
Psalms37:14 Ababi basowolayo empiima dhaibwe, era baadhuumuula obulaso bwaibwe okusuula abanaku n'abaavu, n'okwita abo abagondera ebiragiro bya Katonda." 
Psalms37:15 Aye empiima dhaibwe dhirifumita myoyo gyaibwe beene, n'obulaso bwaibwe bulimenhekamu." 
Psalms37:16 Akantu akatono omuntu omutuufu k'ali nako, kasinga ekyodoodo ky'ebyo ababi abangi bye baba nabyo;" 
Psalms37:17 kuba Musengwa Katonda aja kuzikiriza amaani g'ababi, aye abeere abo abatuufu." 
Psalms37:18 Musengwa Katonda alabirira abaziraku musango, era omugabo gwaibwe gwa kutwala nsi ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms37:19 Waire mu biseera ebizibu tibadaagadaaga, endhala bw'egwa beene baba mu mwero." 
Psalms37:20 Aye ababi baja kufa; abazigu ba Musengwa Katonda abo baja kuwaagho mangu ng'oti munhiriro gwa isubi, era ng'oti n'omwosi bwegubulagho." 
Psalms37:21 Omubi bwe yeewola tasasula, aye omutuufu aba mugabi nga ti mukenge." 
Psalms37:22 Abo Musengwa Katonda be yagha enkabi dhe baja kutwala ensi, aye abo be yakolimira baja kuwaagho." 
Psalms37:23 Musengwa Katonda alabirira obulamu bw'omuntu, era oyo akola Musengwa Katonda by'ayenda, Musengwa Katonda amukuuma." 
Psalms37:24 Ni bw'agwa, taja kuweera ku itaka, kuba Musengwa Katonda amugema ku mukono." 
Psalms37:25 Okuva mu buto, buti nkairiighe, aye tibonangaku nga Musengwa Katonda alekulira agho omutuufu, waire okubona ng'abaana ab'omutuufu basabiriza." 
Psalms37:26 Omuntu ng'oti n'oyo aba mugabi inho ng'awola n'abantu abandi, era eizaire lye limuleetera okuba ow'enkabi." 
Psalms37:27 Lekera agho okukola ebibi, okole ebikalamu, oidha kuba ku nsi ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms37:28 Kuba Musengwa Katonda ayenda inho ekituufu kikolebwe, era taja kulekulira agho abo abamutya. Taja kuganha kibi kutuuka ku bantu batuufu ebyanda n'ebyanda aye eizaire ly'ababi lija kuwaagho." 
Psalms37:29 Abatuufu baja kutwala ensi era bagibeeku ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Psalms37:30 Omunwa ogw'omuntu omutuufu gwogera bya magezi, era olulimi lwe lwogera bituufu." 
Psalms37:31 Amateeka ga Katonda we tigamuva ku mwoyo, era mw'atambulira aghazira kudaaliima." 
Psalms37:32 Omubi yeeteega omuntu omutuufu nga ayenda amwite. 
Psalms37:33 Aye Musengwa Katonda taja kumulekera muzigu oyo amukole ky'ayenda, waire okumuleka bamusalire omusango okumusinga ng'ali kuwozesebwa." 
Psalms37:34 Weesige Musengwa Katonda okolenga nga bw'alagira, aja kukugha ekitiisa otwale ensi, era obone ng'ababi bawaagho." 
Psalms37:35 Ghaligho omuntu omubi ye nabona ng'atiisa abantu boonaboona baadhugumira, era ng'abaswikiriire boonaboona ng'oti n'emivule egy'omu Lebanoni emireeyiriri." 
Psalms37:36 Aye olundi naja okubitayo nga takaaliyo, naamwagalaku aye naaloba kumubona." 
Psalms37:37 Weekalirisenga omuntu aziraku musango era omutuufu; omuntu ayenda emiraala tabula izaire. 
Psalms37:38 Aye abo abamenha amateeka ga Katonda baja kuzikirizibwa baweegho, n'eizaire lyaibwe lyeyebwegho." 
Psalms37:39 Musengwa Katonda alokola abo abatuufu, era abakuuma mu biseera ebizibu." 
Psalms37:40 Ababeera era yaabawonia ng'abatoola mu ngalo dh'ababi, kuba bamwesiga." 
Psalms38:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, otandhuuka na busungu era otankangaivula na kiruyi." 
Psalms38:2 Onfumiite n'obulaso bwo era wankuba n'omukono gwo. 
Psalms38:3 Ku mubiri gwange kuzira ghalamu olw'obusungu bwo; ni ku magumba gange kuzira iramu olw'ebibi byange. 
Psalms38:4 Ebibi byange byebunze emungo ensinga n'obuleeyi, era bizitogha inho tisobola na kubibbeeda." 
Psalms38:5 Amabwa gange gavunda era gaaduuka olw'obusiru bwange obwandeetera okudaaliima. 
Psalms38:6 Ti kaali na maani geemerera, nja bwe ngwa; olunaku lwonalwona nsiiba nga ndira." 
Psalms38:7 Mpulira okwokerera mu nkende, era ku mubiri gwange kuzira ghalamu." 
Psalms38:8 Banteinteine inho era amaani gampoire; mu mwoyo nzira idembe, mba bwagho naawologoma n'obulumi." 
Psalms38:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda, kye neegomba okiidhi bukalamu, okusinda kwange kwonakwona okuwulira." 
Psalms38:10 Omwoyo gumpakukapakuka, amaani gampoire, amaiso gange tigakaabona bulungi." 
Psalms38:11 Bakagwa bange be nabitanga nabo buti tibenda na kuseeta ye ndi olw'obulwaire obwantuukaku, n'abekika kyange beene buti baba bw'ere." 
Psalms38:12 Abo abenda okundhita bantega entuula dhaibwe; abo abenda ngwe mu bizibu beekobaana bwe banaakola okunzikiriza, olunaku lwonalwona baalumala nga bategeka bwe banandyamu olukwe." 
Psalms38:13 Aye nze mba agho ng'oti ndi musigha atabawulira, era naaba ng'oti ndi kasiru atasobola kwogera." 
Psalms38:14 Bwenebwene mba ng'oti n'omuntu atawulira era azira kya kwiramu. 
Psalms38:15 Aye nze, niiwe ye neesiga. Iwe Musengwa Katonda wange niiwe oidha okumpa kye nkusaba." 
Psalms38:16 Nkusaba nti otabaganha kusagamba lwa nze okuba aghazibu, era otabaganha kusagamba nga ntyereire ni ngwa." 
Psalms38:17 Kuba ndi kumpi n'okugwa, n'obulumi bulobye okundekula." 
Psalms38:18 Neenenia olw'ebibi byange, era bingemya enaku." 
Psalms38:19 Abo abeefuula abazigu bange aghazira nsonga ntuufu, balamu era ba maani, n'abo abankyagha nga ghazira kye mbakoze bali kamaala." 
Psalms38:20 Abo abansasulamu ebibi nga mbakoleire ebikalamu, bazigu bange; kuba nze ngezaaku okukola ekituufu." 
Psalms38:21 Wo Musengwa Katonda, otandekulira agho! Niiwe Katonda wange, otamba ghala!" 
Psalms38:22 Yangughaku okumbeera, iwe Musengwa Katonda era omulokozi wange." 
Psalms39:1 Nakoba nti: “Ndidha kwegenderezanga mu bye nkola, ndobe kuganha lulimi lwange kunsuula mu kibi. Omunwa gwange ndidha kugutangaku kuufulu, kasita ghanaabangagho abakozi b'ebibi.”" 
Psalms39:2 Nasirika ng'oti ni kasiru, nga waire ekirungi tikyogeraku! Aye obuzibu bwange nga bweyongera bweyongere," 
Psalms39:3 omwoyo gwaneeghanika. Ye nakoma okudhuubiriza, n'omwoyo ye gwakoma okuneeghanika. Agho n'okukoba nti:" 
Psalms39:4 “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkusaba ommanhise enkomerero yange n'ekigero ky'enaku dhange, mmanhe obumpi bw'obulamu bwange.”" 
Psalms39:5 Bona, enaku dhange wadhikola nga nhimpi inho mu maiso go, obulamu bwange buli ng'akantu akazira ghe kaaga. Bwenebwene buli muntu ali ku nsi, ali ng'oti muuka buuka gwa mu nhindo!" 
Psalms39:6 Buli muntu ali ng'oti kinsense! Atawuka, yaazunga, aye nga byonabyona bya bwereere. Omuntu atakabana okufuna eby'obukombe, aye nga taidhi aja kubitwala." 
Psalms39:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nze nzira kindi kyonakyona kye neesiga, mu iwe mwe nsuubirira." 
Psalms39:8 Ntoola mu kwonoona kwange kwonakwona, omponie okufuuka enseko dh'abasiru." 
Psalms39:9 Ka nsirike, tiidha kwogera kibono kyonakyona, kuba okudaagadaaga kwange kuva y'oli." 
Psalms39:10 Ntoolaaku obulwaire buno, mbulaku bwa katono okufa olw'omukono gwo okunkuba einho." 
Psalms39:11 Iwe okangaivula omuntu ng'omudhuuka olw'ebibi bye, era omuntu ky'atwala okuba eky'omughendo iwe okizikiriza, ng'oti n'ekintu ekiriiriibwa ekisiisa. Bwenebwene buli muntu muuka buuka gwa mu nhindo!" 
Psalms39:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndhiraamu okusaba kwange era ofeeyo ku kulira kwange. Idha ombeere ng'oboine amaziga gange, kuba nze ndi musenze busenze, nga badhaadha bange boonaboona bwe baali." 
Psalms39:13 Otaaningirira na bukambwe, ndeka nfuneku eisanhu, nga nkaali kufa na kubulagho." 
Psalms40:1 Eisuubi lyange lyonalyona nalita mu Musengwa Katonda era yaatega kutu yaawulira okulira kwange. 
Psalms40:2 Yaanhinhulula mu lwina olw'okufa, yantoola mu bitosi eby'olutente, yaanhemereza ku lubaale, naatambula nga ndi mugumu." 
Psalms40:3 Yandeetera okumwembera olwembo oluyaaka, olwembo olw'okusaaka Katonda waife. Abantu kamaala balibona kino baatya, era baata obwesige bwaibwe mu Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms40:4 Ba nkabi abo abeesiga Musengwa Katonda, abatakyuka ni basinza bitali Katonda waire okweyimba ku abo abasinza emisambwa." 
Psalms40:5 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, otukoleire ebintu kamaala ebyewuninkiriza, era ezira akutuukaku mu ngeri y'otuyiiyizaamu. Ni bwengezaaku okubyogeraku n'okubibala, biri kamaala tibibalika." 
Psalms40:6 Emisengo, n'ebigheebwayo tobyegomba, era tosabangaku bigheebwayo byokebwa byonabyona kuwaagho, waire ebigheebwayo olw'okusoniyisa ebibi. Aye nze wampa amatu okukuwuliranga." 
Psalms40:7 Agho naakoba, nti: “Bona, ndidhie; ebinfaaku byaghandiikibwa mu nzingo y'ekitabo." 
Psalms40:8 Wo Katonda wange, nhenda inho okukola by'oyenda, era amateeka go gandi ku mwoyo.”" 
Psalms40:9 Naja mu bantu bo abeesoloiza okukusinza, naabakobera amawulire amalungi ag'okulokolwa. Wo Musengwa Katonda, nga bw'oidhi tija kulekera kugalangirira." 
Psalms40:10 Tyasirikira mu mwoyo gwange mawulire malungi ag'okulokolwa. Buliidho nkobera abantu ku bwesigwa bwo ni ku buyambi bwo. Era nga ndi mu bantu bo abeesoloiza okukusinza, tyaloba kwogera ku kugonza kwo okutakoma, ni ku bwesigwa bwo." 
Psalms40:11 Wo Musengwa Katonda, otalekera kunsaasiranga, nkuumanga buliidho olw'okugonza kwo okutakoma n'olw'obwesigwa bwo." 
Psalms40:12 Ebizibu kamaala bineezungulwire, tibibalika na kubalika. Ebibi byange bimbitiriireku obungi, buti tibinganha na kubona. Obungi bwabyo businga enviiri edhiri ku mutwe gwange, n'amaani gampoiremu." 
Psalms40:13 Wo Musengwa Katonda, mponia, yangughaku ombeere, Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms40:14 Abo abenda okundhita, baswaze era basoberwe. Abo abenda okuunumya, bairirizeeyo era banhoomebwe." 
Psalms40:15 Abo abansungiriza baleetere okwezinduka, olw'okubona nga baswaziibwa." 
Psalms40:16 Aye abo boonaboona abeefubiriza okwidha y'oli, ka basagambe era basangaale olw'ebyo by'obakolera; n'abo abeegomba obulokozi bwo, ka bakobenga buliidho bati: “Musengwa Katonda mukologho.”" 
Psalms40:17 Aye nze waire ndi munaku era omwavu, Musengwa Katonda taneerabira. Wo Katonda wange, niiwe ombeera era ontoola mu bizibu, yangughaku ombeere!" 
Psalms41:1 Wa nkabi oyo afaayo ku baavu, Musengwa Katonda aidha kumutoolanga mu bizibu, ng'ali mu biseera ebizibu." 
Psalms41:2 Musengwa Katonda aidha kumukuuma nga mulamu, aidha kwetebwanga wa nkabi mu nsi. Musengwa Katonda talimulekulira agho bazigu be kumukola nga bwe benda." 
Psalms41:3 Musengwa Katonda n'alimugenza ng'alwaire, yaamuwonia kiisi kimuluma." 
Psalms41:4 Nze naakoba nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda idha ondhune, ndidhi nga nayona, naakusungughaza, aye mala gamponia.”" 
Psalms41:5 Abazigu bange baneeguguna, bandhogeraku bubi, bati: “Alifa li ni yeerabirwa?”" 
Psalms41:6 Abaidha okumbona, mu kifo ky'okunsaasira boogera biziramu, baidha kubona bwendaaga olwo bafune eky'okughayaku buli ghe baja." 
Psalms41:7 Boonaboona abataanhenda bandhogeraku mu bwama, baakola entegeka ey'okuntuusa ku buzibu." 
Psalms41:8 Bakoba bati: “Obulwaire bw'alwaire tibwakuwona, era taja kuva ku ndiri.”" 
Psalms41:9 Ni mukagwa wange mwene ow'omukago ye nali neesiga era ye nalyanga naye, yeena aneefuuliire." 
Psalms41:10 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda, idha ondhune, ontoole mu bulwaire buno, memale mbeesasuulizeeku bye bankola." 
Psalms41:11 Ndidhi ng'abazigu tibaidha kumpangula, era ekyo kiidha kundaga nga bw'osiima bye nkola." 
Psalms41:12 Ndidhi nga toidha kubaganha kunsuula, kuba nkola by'oyenda. Era oidha kunkuumira gh'oli ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms41:13 Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe, Katonda wa Isiraeli! Asaakibwe buti era n'ebyanda n'ebyanda! Amiina era Amiina!" 
Psalms42:1 Ng'empongo bweyeegomba okutuuka ku mwiga ogw'amaadhi amainhogovu, zeena ntyo bweneegomba okutuuka gh'oli, iwe Katonda wange." 
Psalms42:2 Ng'omuntu ali n'endiwo bw'aba, zeena ntyo bwe nhenda einho okuba iwe Katonda wange gh'oli, Katonda iwe omulamu. Ndituukaku li mu maiso go ni nkubona?" 
Psalms42:3 Omusana n'obwire, okulira amaziga n'okwafuuka emere yange, eno abantu nga tibalekera kundheeyereza bati: “Katonda wo ali gha?”" 
Psalms42:4 Omwoyo guunuma bwe ndidhukira eby'eira, bwe nakulemberangamu olukunkumuli olw'abantu abali ku kibinuko, nga tuja mu ndhu ya Katonda nga tuja bwe tukuba emizira era nga bwe twemba enhembo edh'okwebaza Katonda." 
Psalms42:5 Aye neebuuza nti: “Lwaki omwoyo gungwa mu bigere? Era lwaki mbula emiraala? Ka nsuubire mu Katonda, luliba lulala nairamu okumusaaka," 
Psalms42:6 oyo ni Katonda wange era n'ambeera.” Wo Katonda wange, omwoyo gundi mu bigere, aye nkwidhukira nga ndi mu biketezo by'e Yorudani, n'e Herimoni, ni ku lusozi Mizari." 
Psalms42:7 Iwe oleetera amaadhi okwefuukuula, gaatyabuka oti lukuba, era geekuluumulula, nga genda kuumira." 
Psalms42:8 Omusana Musengwa Katonda andholeka nga bw'angonza obutalekera, obwire nze naamwembera olwembo nga mmusaba oyo Katonda ampa obulamu." 
Psalms42:9 Nze nkoba Katonda wange, oyo olubaale mwe neegisa, nti: “Lwaki oneerabiire? Lwaki ondekera abazigu okundiza amaziga nga bandaazadaaza?”" 
Psalms42:10 Abazigu bange, bandi ng'oti ibwa lya ku mwoyo. Bandheeyereza n'ebivumo, eno bwebandeeba buli kiseera, bati: “Katonda wo ali gha?”" 
Psalms42:11 Aye neebuuza nti: “Lwaki omwoyo gungwa mu bigere? Era lwaki mbula emiraala? Ka nsuubire mu Katonda, luliba lulala nairamu okumusaaka, oyo ni Katonda wange era n'ambeera.”" 
Psalms43:1 Wo Katonda wange, sala mu butuufu oyoleke nga bwe nziraku musango, era mpolezaagho nga ndi kuwoza n'abantu abatatya Katonda; ntoola mu ngalo dh'abantu abaguya era abatali beesimbu." 
Psalms43:2 Iwe Katonda wange niiwe ye neesiga, kale lwaki onsuuliriire? Lwaki ondekera abazigu okundiza amaziga nga bandaazadaaza?" 
Psalms43:3 Nsindikira obutangaavu bwo n'amazima go, bindholeke engira, bindeete ku lusozi lwo olutukuvu, ni mu isinzizo lyo mw'oba." 
Psalms43:4 Olwo ndidha kuja ku alutaari yo iwe Katonda wange ansanhusa ekibitiriire, nkusaake n'endingidi yange iwe Katonda wange." 
Psalms43:5 Aye neebuuza nti: “Lwaki omwoyo gungwa mu bigere? Era lwaki mbula emiraala? Ka nsuubire mu Katonda, luliba lulala nairamu okumusaaka, oyo ni Katonda wange era n'ambeera.”" 
Psalms44:1 Wo Katonda waife, twawulira n'amatu gaife nga badhaadha baife batukobera ebyo bye wakolanga mu nnaku dhaibwe, mu biseera ebyabita." 
Psalms44:2 Nga bwe wabingagho amaghanga agandi mu bifo byago n'oizaamu abantu bo, nga bwe wadaazadaaza amaghanga ago era n'osobozesa abantu bo okukulankulana." 
Psalms44:3 Abantu bo tibaakozesa mafumo gaibwe okughangula ensi mwe bali, oba okukozesa amaani gaibwe okufuna obughanguzi. Aye amaani go n'obukumu bwo, era n'obukakafu bwo bwe wabagha oti oli ghalala nabo, n'ebyabalaga nga bw'obagonza." 
Psalms44:4 Niiwe Kyabazinga wange era Katonda wange, niiwe asobozesa Yakobo okughangula." 
Psalms44:5 Bwetubita mu iwe tusindika ere abazigu baife, era mu liina lyo tutyankirira abatulumbagana." 
Psalms44:6 Nze tyesiga kalaso kange, n'eifumo lyange tirisobola kumponia." 
Psalms44:7 Aye niiwe owatuwonia abazigu baife, era waaswaza abo boonaboona abatukyagha." 
Psalms44:8 Twenhumiririza mu iwe Katonda buliidho, era tunaakusiimanga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms44:9 Aye ate buti otusuuliriire era waatuleetera okuswala. Tokaaja na igye lyaife nga lija okulwana olutalo. 
Psalms44:10 Otuleeteire okukyuka twalumuka abazigu baife, abazigu abo baatwala ebyaife ng'omunhago." 
Psalms44:11 Watuleka baatwita ng'oti ntaama, watusansaaniza mu maghanga agandi." 
Psalms44:12 Abantu bo waabatundamu akaghendo akazira ghe kaaga, waaloba kufunamu magoba naire." 
Psalms44:13 Otufiire ekivume eri ab'oku muliiraano, baatusekerera era baatuyeeyereza." 
Psalms44:14 Otufiire ekibono eky'okudhondha mu bamaghanga agandi; baatukanta era baatwesiimooza. 
Psalms44:15 Nnhoomebwa olunaku lwonalwona, era tikaayala mu bantu," 
Psalms44:16 olw'abazigu bange n'abo abankyagha okundheeyereza n'okunvuma. 
Psalms44:17 Bino byonabyona bitutuuseeku, waire nga titukwerabiranga, oba okumenha endagaano ye wakola n'ife." 
Psalms44:18 Titulobangaku kujiira ku biragiro bye watugha, waire okudaaliima okuva mu ngira ye watugemya." 
Psalms44:19 Aye otutenteine era waatuleka mu nsolo edh'omu nsiko, mu nzikiiza eri bedimudimu." 
Psalms44:20 Ngoli twali tulekeire agho okusinza Katonda waife, oba ni tukuba amakiryaivu okusaba katonda ow'amaghanga agandi," 
Psalms44:21 Katonda waife oyo yandirobye okumanha, ate nga aidhi n'ebyama ebiri mu myoyo gyaife?" 
Psalms44:22 Busa naire, kuba ku lulwo twitibwa omusana n'obwire; tuli ng'oti n'entaama edhija okwitibwa." 
Psalms44:23 Wo Musengwa Katonda, zuuka! Lwaki otenduka? Situka! Otatusuula ere n'otwerabirira irala!" 
Psalms44:24 Lwaki otwegisaaku? Lwaki oleka ni batukiriga era ni batudaazadaaza? 
Psalms44:25 Batufuuta mu itaka baatutentena, twasigala agho nga twegolomoire gatuwoire." 
Psalms44:26 Situka oidhe otubeere! Tulokole olw'okuba otugonza obutalekera. 
Psalms45:1 Omwoyo gwange gwidhwire ebibono ebikalamu bye nja okughandiika. Olwembo luno ndi kuluyiiyiza kyabazinga, olulimi lwange lwetegeike ng'oti n'ekalaamu ey'omughandiisi omukugu." 
Psalms45:2 Iwe osinga abasaadha abandi boonaboona abali ku nsi obulungi. Bw'oyogera ghazira ayenda olekere, olw'ekyo Katonda yakugha enkabi edhitaja kukuvaaku." 
Psalms45:3 Gema empiima yo, Iwe kyabazinga ow'amaani, mu kitiisa kyo nga kyabazinga!" 
Psalms45:4 Iwe kyabazinga, ja mu lutalo obe mughanguzi ng'olwanirira amazima n'obutuufu. Amaani go ka gakole ebyewuunhisa!" 
Psalms45:5 Obulaso bwo bwogi bwene, bufumita omwoyo gw'abazigu bo, amaghanga n'amaghanga gaagwa ghansi ku bigere byo." 
Psalms45:6 Obwakyabazinga bwo, Katonda bwe yakugha, bwidha kusigalagho ebyanda n'ebyanda. Obufuzi bwo bube obufuzi obuziramu kyekubira." 
Psalms45:7 Ogonza ebikolwa ebituufu, waakyagha ebikolwa ebibi. Kyova Katonda, Katonda Oyo owuwo, yakusiiga omuzigo mu isanhu okusinga abantu abandi boonaboona." 
Psalms45:8 Ebivaalo byo biwunha kawoowo ka mirra, alowe ni kassia. Entongooli n'endingidi dhivuga dhaakusanhusa mu bisaagaati ebidholige n'amasanka." 
Psalms45:9 Abandi ku bakazi ab'ebitiisa abali mu luya lwo, baana ba bakyabazinga, ku luuyi lw'omukono gwo omusaadha n'aghali inhebantu, ng'avaire ebya zaabu ole mwene ava mu Ofiri." 
Psalms45:10 Iwe inhebantu, tega amatu owulire, weerabire abantu bo n'ab'endhu ya lata wo," 
Psalms45:11 kyabazinga aidha kwenda obulungi bwo. Oyo ni musengwa wo, oteekwa okumuwuliranga." 
Psalms45:12 Abantu ab'e Tiro balikuleetera ebirabo obasiime, abantu abo abasinga kuba bakombe," 
Psalms45:13 abali n'obukombe obwa buli nsambo. Omumbeedha ali kwingira mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, aboneka bulungi inho, ebivaalo bye byakolebwa mu zaabu." 
Psalms45:14 Ng'ali mu kivaalo kye ekidholige atwalibwa ye kyabazinga ni baine abaguna, ng'emperekezi." 
Psalms45:15 Nga basangaavu era nga bali kusagamba, bangira mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
Psalms45:16 Iwe kyabazinga, abaana bo balisikira badhaadha bo nga bakyabazinga. Olibafuula bafuzi okufuga ensi eno yoonayoona." 
Psalms45:17 Mu lwembo lwange, abantu ab'ense n'ense baja kwidhukiranga obumanhifu bwo, olw'ekyo amaghanga gaja kukusaakanga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms46:1 Katonda n'omukuumi waife, era oyo n'amaani gaife, buliidho abaagho era nga mwetegefu okutubeera nga tuli mu buzibu." 
Psalms46:2 Olw'ekyo tituja kutya, ensi ni bw'etengeesebwa, n'ensozi ni dhidhugumira okuviira irala ku ntobo y'enhandha," 
Psalms46:3 n'amaadhi gaamu ni gawologoma ng'oti mpologoma era ni gafuukeera, n'ensozi ni dheesundasunda n'amaani amangi einho." 
Psalms46:4 Eriyo omwiga oguli n'emyala egireeta eisanhu mu kibuga kya Katonda, agho mu ndhu entukuvu aghali oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene." 
Psalms46:5 Katonda mwene aba mu kibuga ekyo, era tikisobola kuzikirizibwa; Katonda awuuna buwuune mu nkyonkyo okukirwanirira." 
Psalms46:6 Katonda bw'aboigoka, abamaghanga baidhamu okutya okw'amaani, obwakyabazinga bwatengeesebwa n'ensi yoonayoona yaatengera." 
Psalms46:7 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ali n'ife; Katonda wa Yakobo n'omukuumi waife. 
Psalms46:8 Mwidhe mubone ebikulu Musengwa Katonda by'akoze; mubone ebyewuninkiriza by'akoze ku nsi. 
Psalms46:9 Alekeza okulwana entalo mu nsi yoonayoona; yaakutulakutula mu bulaso, era yamenhamenha amafumo, n'engabo yaadhikumaku omuliro." 
Psalms46:10 Era alagira ati: “Mulekere agho! Mumanhe nga ninze Katonda. Nsinzibwa amaghanga goonagoona, era nsinzibwa ebiri ku nsi byonabyona.”" 
Psalms46:11 Musengwa Katonda afuga amagye ali n'ife; Katonda wa Yakobo n'omukuumi waife. 
Psalms47:1 Abantu mwenamwena mukube mu ngalo! Mukubire Katonda emizira, mumwembere n'enhembo edh'eisanhu." 
Psalms47:2 Kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene agheebwa ekitiisa. Oyo ni kyabazinga omukologho afuga ensi yoonayoona. 
Psalms47:3 Yatughangulira abantu baatugondera, yaatugha okufuga amaghanga." 
Psalms47:4 Yatulondera ensi mwe tuli, mwe twesiimira ife abantu be b'agonza." 
Psalms47:5 Katonda ajiire ghaigulu, abantu baakuba emizira era baafuuwa endeka." 
Psalms47:6 Mwembe enhembo edhisaaka Katonda, mumusaake. Mwembe enhembo edhisaaka Kyabazinga waife, mumusaake;" 
Psalms47:7 kuba Katonda ni Kyabazinga w'ensi yoonayoona, kale mumusaake mu nhembo." 
Psalms47:8 Katonda atyama ku kityamo kye ekitukuvu eky'obwakyabazinga, yaafuga amaghanga goonagoona." 
Psalms47:9 Abafuga amaghanga beesoloza baaba ghalala n'abantu ba Katonda oyo Aburahamu y'asinza; kuba Katonda n'afuga abafuzi boonaboona ab'oku nsi era n'abaswikiriire. 
Psalms48:1 Musengwa Katonda mukologho, era ni yenka agwaine okusinzibwa mu kibuga kya Katonda waife, ku lusozi lwe olutukuvu." 
Psalms48:2 Sioni olusozi lwa Katonda luleeyiriri era luboneka bulungi; ekibuga kya kyabazinga omukologho kisanhusa ensi yoonayoona. 
Psalms48:3 Katonda ayoleike nga mwene n'omukuumi w'ekibuga ekyo. 
Psalms48:4 Bakyabazinga n'amagye gaibwe beesoloza baidha okukirumba. 
Psalms48:5 Aye olwakibona bati beewuunhia, baatya, baakyuka baalumuka." 
Psalms48:6 Baatya inho era baalumwa ng'oti n'omukazi bw'alumwa ng'azaala. 
Psalms48:7 Era baaba ng'oti n'amaato ag'e Tarushishi, agamenhebwamenhebwa kiwunga ow'amaani ava e buvandhuba." 
Psalms48:8 Katonda waife, oyo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ebyo bye twawuliranga obuwulire bye yakola, ni mpegaano tubiboine mu kibuga kye ky'akuuma obutalumbwa ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms48:9 Wo Katonda waife, nga tuli mu isinzizo lyo twefumintiriza inho ku ngeri y'otugonzaamu obutalekera." 
Psalms48:10 Okuva ensi y'eva okutuuka y'ekoma, abantu boonaboona bakwidhi era bakusaaka. Obufuzi bwo buziramu kwekubira." 
Psalms48:11 Abantu ab'oku lusozi Sioni ka basanhuke, n'ab'omu bibuga bya Yuda basagambe; kuba osala ensonga mu butuufu." 
Psalms48:12 Mutambule mu Sioni mwonamwona mukyezungulule, muje nga mubala ebituuti ebirengererwaku ebirimu;" 
Psalms48:13 mulingirire bukalamu obugumu bw'ebimante ebikyezungulwire, mukebere ebifo byakyo eby'okwewogomamu, olwo musobole okukobera ab'oluse oluliiragho" 
Psalms48:14 muti: “Katonda ono, ni Katonda waife ebyanda n'ebyanda. Ono n'aidha okutukulemberangamu ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Psalms49:1 Imwe abantu mwenamwena muwulire bino! Mutege kutu imwe mwenamwena ab'oku nsi," 
Psalms49:2 abakologho n'abatali bakologho, abakombe n'abaavu." 
Psalms49:3 Nja kwogera bya magezi n'omunwa gwange, ebidhuubo eby'omu mwoyo gwange biidha kwoleka okutegeera." 
Psalms49:4 Ndidha kuwulirisa ensambo, era nhembe amakulu g'ebikoiko ku ndingidi." 
Psalms49:5 Tiidha kutyanga nga ndi mu buzibu, waire ng'abankiriga baneezungulwire," 
Psalms49:6 abantu abo beesiga bukombe bwaibwe era beesuuta olw'ebintu kamaala bye baba nabyo. 
Psalms49:7 Bwenebwene ghazira muntu asobola kwenunula mwene, oba okusasula Katonda omughendo oguja mu bulamu bwe;" 
Psalms49:8 kuba obulamu bw'omuntu bwa mughendo inho, era ghazira muntu ky'agha ni kimala," 
Psalms49:9 n'asobola kuba mulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda, era naaloba kufa." 
Psalms49:10 Bwenebwene tubona nga n'abagezi bafa, era nga n'abasiru ghalala n'abadoofu bawaagho, obukombe bwaibwe baabulekera bantu bandi." 
Psalms49:11 Amagombe gaibwe n'amaka gaibwe ebyanda n'ebyanda, ense n'ense dhaabitagho nga bali eyo, waire nga baaliku n'amataka agaibwe ku bwaibwe." 
Psalms49:12 Ebitiibwa by'omuntu tibimulobera kufa; awaagho ng'ensolo bwedhiwaagho. 
Psalms49:13 Bino n'ebituuka ku basiru abeesiga amagezi gaibwe, era eno n'enkomerero y'abo ababona ng'ebintu bye bali nabyo bya makulu inho:" 
Psalms49:14 Basindikibwa mu nsi ey'abafu ng'oti ntaama, olumbe lwabaaya, baaserengeta mu magombe aghazira kusibamu, emibiri gyaibwe gyavundira eyo. Mu nsi y'abafu n'eri amaka gaibwe." 
Psalms49:15 Aye nze, Katonda alimponia okufugibwa ensi y'abafu, kuba aliinunula." 
Psalms49:16 Tiweegombanga muntu akombaghala, ebitiibwa by'endhu ye ni byeyongera," 
Psalms49:17 kuba bw'alifa ghazira ky'aja kuja nakyo, oba ebitiibwa bye okumunonereza mu magombe." 
Psalms49:18 Waire nga yeebala okuba ow'enkabi ng'akaali mulamu, era waire ng'asaakibwa olw'ebintu okumujiira obukalamu," 
Psalms49:19 aja kufa yeeyimbe ku badhaadha be abaafa, obutaja kwirayo kubona ku ndhuba kabiri." 
Psalms49:20 Ebitiibwa by'omuntu tibimulobera kufa, awaagho ng'ensolo bwedhiwaagho." 
Psalms50:1 Musengwa Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, ayogera ng'ayeta abantu boonaboona okuva endhuba y'eva okutuuka y'egwa." 
Psalms50:2 Katonda oyo ayakaayakana ng'ali mu Sioni ekibuga ekituukiriire mu bulungi bwakyo. 
Psalms50:3 Katonda waife aidha, aye taidha kisiriikiriza; omuliro ogwaka einho gumukulemberamu nga kiwunga ow'amaani amwezungulwire." 
Psalms50:4 Ayeta eby'omu igulu ghaigulu n'eby'oku nsi, okubaagho ng'asalira abantu be omusango." 
Psalms50:5 Yaakoba ati: “Munsololeze abantu bange abeesigwa, abaakola ninze endagaano nga baghaayo omusengo ye ndi.”" 
Psalms50:6 Eby'omu igulu birangirira nga Katonda bw'ali omutuufu, kuba mwene n'asala omusango." 
Psalms50:7 “Imwe abantu bange mumpulirise, ndi ni kye mbakoba; imwe Abaisiraeli, ndidha kubalumiriza. Ninze Katonda, Katonda waimwe." 
Psalms50:8 Tiri kubanenia lwa misengo gyaimwe, oba olw'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa bye mumpa." 
Psalms50:9 Tineetaaga nte dhaimwe nume okuva mu ngo dhaimwe, waire embuzi dhaimwe enume okuva mu bisibo byaimwe;" 
Psalms50:10 kuba kiisi nsolo yoonayoona ey'omu nsiko yange, n'ente dhoonadhoona edhiri eyo ku nsozi enkumi n'enkumi, dhoona dhange." 
Psalms50:11 Enhonhi dhoonadhoona edh'omu ibbanga dhange, n'ebiramu ebindi byonabyona ebitambula ku nsi." 
Psalms50:12 Ni bwenandibaire endhala, tinandibakobye kumpa mere, kuba ensi yoonayoona n'ebigirimu byange." 
Psalms50:13 Mulowooza nze ndya emamba y'ente enume, oba okunhwa omusaayi gw'embuzi?" 
Psalms50:14 Omusengo gwaimwe ka gubenga okunsiima nze Katonda, era mutuukirizenga bye mweyama eri nze Ali Ghaigulu Yeene." 
Psalms50:15 Munsabenga nga muli mu bizibu, ndidhanga kubawonia, imwe muntengamu ekitiisa.”" 
Psalms50:16 Aye abakozi b'ebibi Katonda ababuuza ati: “Mudaagiranga ki okudeeberera amateeka gange, oba okughaya ku ndagaano yange?" 
Psalms50:17 Timwenda kugalagirwa, era bye mbakoba mubisuula bw'ere." 
Psalms50:18 Bwemubona omwibi, ng'oyo afuuka mukagwa waimwe, era omwenzi mumwaniriza." 
Psalms50:19 Mulekera eminwa gyaimwe eidembe okukola ebibi; n'enimi dhaimwe dhaayogera eby'obuguya. 
Psalms50:20 Mutyama mwayogera ebibi ku baganda baimwe beene, era mwabasiiga n'enziro." 
Psalms50:21 Mwakola ebintu ebyo nze naasirika, mwalowooza muti zeena ndi ng'oti niimwe. Aye buti ndi kubanenia nti mukola bubi inho, era omusango ogwo nhenda ngwerule mugubone bukalamu." 
Psalms50:22 Mumanhe kino imwe abatanfaaku nze Katonda: nsobola okubayuzayuza ate nga ghazira na muntu wa kubawonia. 
Psalms50:23 Ole bw'asiima, aba aghaireyo omusengo ogumpeesa ekitiisa, era nja kulokola oyo atambulira mu ngira entuufu.”" 
Psalms51:1 Wo Katonda, nsaasira, olw'okugonza kwo okutakoma sasaagho ebibi byange, olw'okusaasira kwo okungi einho." 
Psalms51:2 Nnaaliza irala omaleku embiidhabiidha, era ontukuze nveeku ebibi!" 
Psalms51:3 Ndidhi okusobya kwange era ndidhukira ebibi byange buli kiseera. 
Psalms51:4 Nasobya eri iwe mwene wenka, era naakola ebibi mu maiso go, kale oli mutuufu mu ky'oba ng'osazeegho, era tonenezebwa bw'oba ng'onsaliire omusango okunsinga." 
Psalms51:5 Bona, nagwa mu nda ya maama nga ndi mu kibi; nazaalibwa nga ndi mwonooni." 
Psalms51:6 Iwe oyenda okumanha amazima agali mu muntu, kale ni ndidhuza amagezi mu mwoyo gwange." 
Psalms51:7 Nnaazaaku ebibi ndidha kutukula; era onhamule ndidha kuba mweru okusinga n'omugozi. 
Psalms51:8 Mpa okuwulira eisanhu n'okusagamba; oleke amagumba ge wamenhamenha gairemu okusangaala. 
Psalms51:9 Otalingirira bibi byange, era sasaagho okwonoona kwange kwonakwona." 
Psalms51:10 Katonda wange, ntonderaamu omwoyo omulungi, ondhizeemu omwoyo ogukuwulira buli kiseera." 
Psalms51:11 Otansuula ere kuva gh'oli, era otantoolaku mwoyo gwo omutukuvu." 
Psalms51:12 Ndhiriza eisanhu ery'obulokozi bwo, ompe omwoyo ogwenda okukugonderanga." 
Psalms51:13 Olwo ndyegeresa abasobya y'oli baatambulira mu ngira yo, n'aboonooni baakyuka baira y'oli." 
Psalms51:14 Wonia obulamu bwange iwe Katonda wange ondokole, ndidha kukoberanga abantu obulungi bwo." 
Psalms51:15 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nhamba ompe okwogera, ndidha kukusaakanga." 
Psalms51:16 Emisengo tineegikusangaaza ni bwenandigighaireyo; ni bwenandighaireyo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, tineebikusanhusa." 
Psalms51:17 Omusengo gw'osiima, n'omwoyo ogumenheike, Wo Katonda wange, omwoyo ogweneniiza era ogubonereire toligugaya naire." 
Psalms51:18 Wo Katonda waife, ba wa kisa okolere Sioni bulungi, ebimante bya Yerusalemu bizimbibwe buyaaka." 
Psalms51:19 Olwo oidha kufuna emisengo gyene emituufu gy'osiima, olwo osanhukire mu bigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebyo ebyokebwa ebiromba, n'ente enume dhigheebweyo ku alutaari yo." 
Psalms52:1 Iwe ow'amaani, lwaki weesaaka olw'ebibi by'okola ku abo abatya Katonda? Olunaku lwonalwona" 
Psalms52:2 olumala ng'otegeka kuzikiriza. Olulimi lukuli ng'oti kamwano akoogi, omuguya iwe." 
Psalms52:3 Ogonza okukola ebibi okusinga okukola ebikalamu era ogonza okusubagha okusinga okwogera ebituufu. 
Psalms52:4 Omuguya iwe, osanhukira inho okwogeza omunwa gwo ebirumya abandi." 
Psalms52:5 Aye Katonda aidha kukuzikiriza ebyanda n'ebyanda; aidha kukuswankula mu ndhu yo akukwekwebye; aidha kukutoola mu nsi ey'abalamu. 
Psalms52:6 Abatuufu bwebalibona ebyo ensisi eribagema, baakuseka nga bakoba bati:" 
Psalms52:7 “Mubone omusaadha eyaloba okweguya Katonda okumukuuma, nga yeesigulira ku bukombe bwe obungi, era nga yeesiga enkwe dhe edh'obuguya okumukuuma.”" 
Psalms52:8 Aye nze ndi ng'oti n'omuti omwoliva omugimu, ogukulira mu ndhu ya Katonda. Nkakasa nga Katonda aidha kungonzanga obutalekera ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms52:9 Ndidha kukusiimanga ebyanda n'ebyanda olw'ebyo bye wakola mu bantu bo abakutya ndidha kukoberanga abantu nga bw'oli omulungi. 
Psalms53:1 Abasiru bakoba mu myoyo gyaibwe bati: “Katonda azirayo.” Baidhwire obukupya, era bakola ebyenhinhasa; boonaboona bakola bikyamu byereere." 
Psalms53:2 Katonda aba mu igulu yaalingirira ghansi, okubona oba nga mu bantu mulimu alimu amagezi, asinza Katonda." 
Psalms53:3 Aye boonaboona baaghaba; boonaboona baagayaga obubi. Ghazira akola kituufu, ghazira naire omulala ati." 
Psalms53:4 Aye abakozi b'ebibi bano, abalya abantu bange ng'oti balya mere, kiki kyene kye bataidhi, ekibalobera okusinza Katonda?" 
Psalms53:5 Aye ni, baidha kuba mu kutya okubitirivu, okutya kwe batabangamuuku mu bulamu bwaibwe. Katonda aidha kusuulasuula eyo atyo amagumba g'abazigu b'abantu be, abafuudhe ere, baswale." 
Psalms53:6 Katonda agwananga yaaleetagho alizaawula Isiraeli ng'ava mu Sioni! Katonda oyo bw'aliiriza abantu be obukombe, aba Yakobo balisagamba, aba Isiraeli baasangaala." 
Psalms54:1 Wo Katonda wange, ndokola olw'obuyinza bwo, era omponie abo abampaghabira." 
Psalms54:2 Wulirisa okusaba kwange, ontegere kutu owulire bye nkoba." 
Psalms54:3 Abantu abeekuluntaza baneesimbyemu; abantu abakambwe benda kundhita, abatafaayo ku Katonda." 
Psalms54:4 Aye nze Katonda n'ambeera. Musengwa Katonda n'akuuma obulamu bwange. 
Psalms54:5 Aidha kwiriza abazigu bange ebibi byaibwe byene bibabonereze; aidha kubazikiriza kuba mwesigwa. 
Psalms54:6 Ndidha kughaayo omusengo nze mwene kyeyendere. Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndidha kukusiimanga kuba oli mulungi." 
Psalms54:7 Wamponia wantoola mu bizibu byange byonabyona, naabona abazigu bange nga baghangwirwa." 
Psalms55:1 Wo Katonda wange, wulira okusaba kwange, otankuba nkoone nga ndi kukweghemba." 
Psalms55:2 Nkusaba ompulirise era ombeere; okweraliikirira kunseeneinia. 
Psalms55:3 Ndhugumira olw'okutiisibwatiisibwa abazigu bange, gampweire olw'okuba abakozi b'ebibi bankiriga. Bandeetera ebizibu, era bantaaku enzigu nga baneeguguna." 
Psalms55:4 Omwoyo guntyemuka naatya, n'enviiri dhampwa ku mutwe olw'okutya okufa," 
Psalms55:5 naadhugumira olw'okutya, n'ensisi yankuba ere." 
Psalms55:6 Naakoba nti: “Yii kale ngoli ndi n'amaghagha ng'oti ighemba! Nandigulwike naatuuka ghe nsobola okuwuumulira. 
Psalms55:7 Bwenebwene nandipaire bupaale, naaja naasenga eyo mu irungu." 
Psalms55:8 Nandyangwighe naabona ghe neigama, naawona amaadhi gano agalimu kiwunga n'omugozi.”" 
Psalms55:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda, zikiriza olulimi lw'abazigu bange, otabuletabule bye boogera; kuba mbona ekibuga kiidhwire okwegugunga n'ebikolwa eby'obukambwe." 
Psalms55:10 Omusana n'obwire beezungulula ebisenge byakyo, baakola ebikolwa eby'obukambwe, era baakola ku banaibwe ebibi." 
Psalms55:11 Bazikiriza ebintu mu kibuga woonawoona, era mu nguudo dhaakyo timuwaamu bantu batuntuza banaibwe, n'abaguya banaibwe." 
Psalms55:12 Ngoli muzigu wange n'eyali ali kundheedha, tinandifiire yo. Oba ngoli oyo ye tutaisania naye n'eyali ali kuneeyagaliraku, naalimwegisiisaaku." 
Psalms55:13 Aye mbo iwe bwetufaanana, bwetubita, era mukagwa wange mwene, niiwe okola ekyo?" 
Psalms55:14 Twalinga nga tughaya bukalamu, era ng'okuja mu isinzizo titulekagana." 
Psalms55:15 Abazigu bange mbendeza kufa kikutuko, baaziikibwa nga balamu. Amaka gaibwe gaidhwire abakozi b'ebibi, ebiidhwire mu myoyo gyaibwe." 
Psalms55:16 Aye nze nsaba Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda oyo aidha kundokola." 
Psalms55:17 Enkyo, n'omusana, n'eigulo, mmukobera ebiinuma, n'ebindeetera okusinda era aidha kumpulira." 
Psalms55:18 Aidha kundhiza bwera okuva mu ntalo dhe nwana, kuba bali kamaala abeetegeike okulwana ninze." 
Psalms55:19 Katonda oyo Kyabazinga ow'eira, aidha kumpulira era abaghangule; kuba tibamutya era tibaganha kukyuka." 
Psalms55:20 Munange bwe twabitanga yatanula olutalo ku bakagwa be, yaamenhagho omukago gwe nabo." 
Psalms55:21 Ng'akozesa olulimi olw'okwewooya, ate nga mu mwoyo gwe mwidhwire nzigu ebibono bye nga biwooma okuwulirisa, aye nga bifumita oti mafumo geene." 
Psalms55:22 Ebizibu byo birekere Musengwa Katonda, aidha kukukuuma. Taleka bantu bakola bituufu kughangulwa." 
Psalms55:23 Aye iwe Katonda wange, abantu abo abatemo era abaguya, oidha kubasindika mu magombe gaibwe nga bakaali na kutuuka ghagati gha nnaku dha bulamu bwaibwe. Aye nze ndidha kukwesiganga buliidho." 
Psalms56:1 Wo Katonda wange nsaasira, kuba abantu baanumba; buli kiseera abazigu bange bankiriga." 
Psalms56:2 Buli kiseera abatanhenda baanumba, kuba abankyagha bali kamaala." 
Psalms56:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda iwe Aghanga ebintu byonabyona, ni bwemba nga ntiire inho, obwesige bwange bundi mu iwe." 
Psalms56:4 Iwe Katonda wange nkusaaka olw'ebyo by'onsuubiza, era nkwesiga nga nzira kintiisa. Omuntu obuntu katyo asobola kunkola ki?"
