Psalms56:5 Buli kiseera bagezaaku okundeetera ebizibu. Buli kaakyeire basala amagezi ag'okuunumya. 
Psalms56:6 Beekolamu obukuukuulu mu ngiso, baanondoola mu buli kye nkola, nga banoonia akaghagaanhia okundhita." 
Psalms56:7 Wo Katonda wange, baghe ekibonerezo ekigwanira ebibi byaibwe; yoleka obusungu bwo obakube ghansi." 
Psalms56:8 Iwe oidhi nga bwendaazibwadaazibwa einho, n'amaziga ge naakalira ogaidhi. Byonabyona biri mu kitabo kyo." 
Psalms56:9 Ku lunaku lwe ndikusaba, oliiririzaayo abazigu bange einhuma; kuba ndidhi nti oli ku luuyi lwange." 
Psalms56:10 Iwe Katonda wange nkusaaka olw'ebyo by'onsuubiza; Iwe Musengwa Katonda nkusaaka olw'ebyo by'onsuubiza," 
Psalms56:11 era nkwesiga nga nzira kintiisa. Omuntu obuntu katyo aghanga kunkola ki? 
Psalms56:12 Wo Katonda wange, nteekwa okutuukiriza obweyamo bwange; ndidha kughaayo omusengo olw'okukusiima," 
Psalms56:13 kuba wamponia okufa era wamponia okughangulwa naatambula, nga niiwe omukuumi wange, mu butangaavu obwakira abalamu." 
Psalms57:1 Wo Katonda wange, nsaasira era nsaasirira irala, kuba niiwe ye neesiga. Mpambaatira ng'oti n'enkoko bw'ekola obwana bwayo, okutuusa kiwunga ono azikiriza ng'amaze okubita." 
Psalms57:2 Nze ndi kulirira Katonda Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, oyo atuukiriza mu nze ekigendererwa kye." 
Psalms57:3 Aidha kutuma amaani okuva mu igulu okwidha okumponia. Abo abankiriga aidha kubaswaza. Katonda aidha kundholeka nga bw'angonza obutalekera era nga bw'ali omwesigwa. 
Psalms57:4 Buti ndi ghagati mu mpologoma edhikankamira abantu, edhiri n'amaino ng'oti mafumo na bulaso, edhiri n'enimi endhogi ng'oti mpiima." 
Psalms57:5 Wo Katonda wange, yoleka obukulu bwo bubonebwe ghaigulu okusinga eigulu, era n'ekitiisa kyo kimaamire ensi yoonayoona." 
Psalms57:6 Abazigu bange bantega olutuula, naazirika mu mwoyo gwange. Baasima ebiina mu ngira ye mbitamu, aye baabigwamu beene!" 
Psalms57:7 Wo Katonda wange, omwoyo gwange guli ku iwe, era ku iwe wenka! Ndidha kwembanga enhembo edhiwooma!" 
Psalms57:8 Iwe omwoyo gwange zuuka! Iwe entongooli yange, n'iwe endingidi yange muzuuke. Leero ndidha kuzuusa endhuba." 
Psalms57:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndidha kukusiimanga nga ndi mu bantu, era nkusaakenga nga ndi mu maghanga." 
Psalms57:10 Kuba okugonza kwo okutakoma kungi inho, kutuuka ni mu igulu; obwesigwa bwo butuuka mu bire." 
Psalms57:11 Wo Katonda wange, yoleka obukulu bwo bubonebwe ghaigulu okusinga eigulu, n'ekitiisa kyo kimaamire ensi yoonayoona." 
Psalms58:1 Imwe abafuzi, mugha ensala y'emisango entuufu? Timusaliriza bwemusalira abantu emisango?" 
Psalms58:2 Busa! Mu myoyo gyaimwe muyiiya bwa ngeri ye munaakolamu ekikyamu, era imwe beene mukola ebikolwa eby'obukambwe ku nsi." 
Psalms58:3 Ababi badaaliima okuviira irala nga bakaali na mu nda; basobya okuviira irala ku kuzaalibwa, nga boogera eby'obuguya." 
Psalms58:4 Bali n'obusagwa ng'oti bwa musota, ate baaba basigha ng'oti kiyiri, ekisemba amatu gaakyo," 
Psalms58:5 kirobe kuwulira mamiro g'oyo agema emisota, oba okuwulira oluluzi lw'oyo agizaanhisa." 
Psalms58:6 Wo Katonda wange, bamenhemu amaino mu kanwa. Wo Musengwa Katonda, igha mu mpologoma edho ento amaino amasongero." 
Psalms58:7 Leka babulegho ng'oti n'amaadhi agakuuluula; batyankirire babe ng'oti isubi baniale. 
Psalms58:8 Ka babe ng'oti ikovu erisaanuukira mu lugezi lwalyo ni liwaagho. Oba babe ng'oti n'enda evaamu, ekintu ekivaamu ni kitabona ku ndhuba." 
Psalms58:9 Katonda agwana yaabasaaniagho amangu geene, nga n'entamu ekaali kuwulira muliro gwa mawa, ka gabe amabisi oba agali kwaka." 
Psalms58:10 Abatuufu balisagamba okubona nga Katonda abonereiza aboonooni; balityankirira omusaayi ogw'ababi. 
Psalms58:11 Agho abantu ghe balikobera bati: “Bwenebwene Katonda asasula abatuufu yaabasiima; bwenebwene eriyo Katonda asala emisango ku nsi.” 
Psalms59:1 Wo Katonda wange, mponia abazigu bange, nkuuma abaanumba balobe kuntuukaku." 
Psalms59:2 Mponia abakozi b'ebibi, ondokole okuva mu batemo." 
Psalms59:3 Bona ere, baneeteeze benda kundhita; abantu abakambwe beesoloiza baanumbe. Ti lwa kuba nti ndaaliimye oba nti nkoze ekibi kyonakyona." 
Psalms59:4 Aghazira kisobyo kye nkoze, beeyuniriza emberi wange okuneeteega. Musengwa Katonda balingirire obone, era ositukiremu oidhe ombeere." 
Psalms59:5 Iwe Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, niiwe Katonda wa Isiraeli. Situka obonereze abantu abatakutya; otasaasira waire mulala ku abo abakudheemera ni bakola ebibi." 
Psalms59:6 Buli igulo baira nga bawowoigana ng'oti mbwa, era baaja nga baluga mu kibuga." 
Psalms59:7 Wulira bwe bawowoigana nga baasaime. Ebibava mu kanwa mpiima dheene edhifumita, aye ng'ate balowooza bati ghazira ali kubawulira." 
Psalms59:8 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda obasekerera busekerere; abantu boonaboona abatakutya obakongoola bukongoole. 
Psalms59:9 Niiwe amaani gange, niiwe ye ningiriireku, kuba iwe Katonda wange, niiwe ye neesiga." 
Psalms59:10 Katonda wange olw'okungonza einho, aliidha yambeera, naabona abazigu bange nga baghangwirwa." 
Psalms59:11 Wo Katonda wange, otabaita, kuba tiikulwa ng'abantu bange beerabira. Aye kozesa obukumu bwo obasansaanie era obasuule ghansi, iwe Musengwa Katonda engabo yaife." 
Psalms59:12 Ka basigale nga bagemeibwa mu kwebona kwaibwe, ng'oti n'ensolo bw'egwa mu lutuula. Kuba boonoona n'eminwa gyaibwe, na kiisi kibono kye boogera. Era olw'okuba bakolima era baaguya," 
Psalms59:13 bazikirize mu busungu bwo; bazikirize bagheekereregho irala. Abantu boonaboona bakimanhe nga Katonda n'afuga mu Isiraeli, n'okutuukira irala ensi y'ekoma." 
Psalms59:14 Buli igulo baira nga bawowoigana ng'oti mbwa, era baaja nga baluga mu kibuga." 
Psalms59:15 Beewunhawunha ghano ni ghale nga baagala eky'okulya, era baatolotooma bwebaba nga tibaigwite." 
Psalms59:16 Aye nze ndidha kwembanga nga nsaaka amaani go; buli nkyo ndidha kwemberanga ghaigulu okugonza kwo okutakoma, kuba buliidho niiwe obairenga obubudamo bwange, era niiwe obairenga obulumukiro mu biseera ebizibu." 
Psalms59:17 Niiwe amaani gange, niiwe ye ningiriireku, kuba iwe Katonda wange, niiwe ye neesiga, Katonda angonza obutalekera." 
Psalms60:1 Wo Katonda waife, otuswire ere era waatutentena. Twakusungughaza aye twiriremu." 
Psalms60:2 Oleeteire ensi yaife okutengeeta, yeetema agatanda. Tukweghembye ziba agatanda ago, kuba eja kwawukamu." 
Psalms60:3 Abantu bo obaleeteire obuzibu obukalangufu; otughaire omwenge ogw'emizabbibu okunhwa, gwatugaaliisa ng'oti batamiivu." 
Psalms60:4 Ofuuyiire endeka abo abakutya balumuke bawone okuzikirira. 
Psalms60:5 Ife b'ogonza tuwulirise otuwonie, otughe obughanguzi n'obuyinza bwo." 
Psalms60:6 Katonda yayogerera mu kifo kye ekitukuvu ati: “Mu kusagamba okw'obughanguzi, ndidha kwawuzayawuza mu Shekemu, era ngabaniegabaniemu ekikonko eky'e Sukkothi mu bantu bange." 
Psalms60:7 Ensi ya Gileadi yange, n'eighanga ery'Abamanasse lyange; ate ery'Abaefuraimu n'enkoofiira yange ey'ekyuma; ery'Abayudaaya lyaba omwigo gwange ogw'obwakyabazinga." 
Psalms60:8 Ensi ya Moabu n'ekyogero kyange; ate mu Edomu mwe ndisuula engaito dhange okwoleka nga bwekiri ekyange. Buti nkuba emizira olw'okuba mpangwire ab'e Filisitia.” 
Psalms60:9 Naani alintwala mu kibuga ekyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu? Naani alinkulembereramu okuntuusa mu Edomu? 
Psalms60:10 Wo Katonda waife, mbo bwenebwene otusuuliire irala ere? Tooje na magye gaife kulwana?" 
Psalms60:11 Tubeere tulwanise omuzigu, kuba okwesigulira ku muntu okutubeera kiziramu muganhulo." 
Psalms60:12 Kasita Katonda n'aba ku luuyi olwaife twidha kuba ba maani; kuba oyo n'aja okutyankirira abazigu baife boonaboona. 
Psalms61:1 Wo Katonda wange, wulira okulira kwange; owulirise ni bye ndi kukusaba." 
Psalms61:2 Ndi kukwetera eno eghala ng'omwoyo gunziriike. Nginga ontwale mu kifo kye naabaamu nga nzira kutya; 
Psalms61:3 kuba niiwe ye neesiga, oli ng'oti n'ekimante ekigumu ekikingiriza omuzigu." 
Psalms61:4 Leka mbenga mu isinzizo lyo lubeerera; mpambaatira ng'enkoko bw'eghambaatira obwana bwayo. 
Psalms61:5 Iwe Katonda wange ompuliire nga neeyama, era ompaire omugabo ku ebyo by'oterekera abakutya." 
Psalms61:6 Ghangaaza obulamu bwa kyabazinga, emyaka gye gibite mu nse dhoonadhoona," 
Psalms61:7 abeegho mu maiso ga Katonda nga kyabazinga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Era olw'obwesigwa bwo mukuumenga ng'omugonza obutalekera. 
Psalms61:8 Nze ndidha kwembanga enhembo edhisaaka eriina lyo, nga bwempaayo kye neeyama buli kaakyeire." 
Psalms62:1 Nteegerera Katonda n'obuguminkiriza aidhe andokole; oyo n'omulokozi wange yenka. 
Psalms62:2 Oyo yenka n'olubaale lwange mwe neegisa era n'obulokozi bwange; oyo n'ekifo kyange mwe neewogoma era ghazira kisobola kuntengeesa. 
Psalms62:3 Imwe, mulirekera li okulumba omuntu nga mwenda okumutemula, waire ng'omuntu oyo munafu ng'oti n'ekimante ekyeghendheike, era ng'oti n'olukomera oluja okugwa?" 
Psalms62:4 Kye mutegeka kyonka, n'okumusuula ave mu kitiibwa kye; mwenda inho okuguya. Ghano ku munwa mwogera ng'oti mumwendeza nkabi, ate nga munda mule muli kumukolimira." 
Psalms62:5 Nteegerera Katonda n'obuguminkiriza aidhe andokole, mu oyo eisuubi lyange mwe liva." 
Psalms62:6 Oyo yenka n'olubaale lwange mwe neegisa era n'obulokozi bwange; oyo n'ekifo kyange mwe neewogoma era ghazira kisobola kuntengeesa. 
Psalms62:7 Katonda yenka n'amponia era yampa ekitiibwa; oyo n'omukuumi wange, ali ng'eibaale eikologho." 
Psalms62:8 Bantu bange, mumwesigenga ebiseera byonabyona, mumukobere ebiri mu myoyo gyaimwe byonabyona; kuba oyo n'omukuumi waife." 
Psalms62:9 Abantu abayabayaba bali ng'oti muuka gwa mu nhindo; ate abantu abakologho biwooboloolo, boonaboona bw'obata ku minzaani teika, eja bwa ghaigulu; bagheghere okusinga omuuka ogw'omu nhindo." 
Psalms62:10 Oteesiganga bikolwa bya bukambwe; otasuubiriranga mu kukambula. Eby'obukombe bwebyeyongeranga otabitangaku mwoyo gwo. 
Psalms62:11 Nkiwuliire emikuzi egisinga mu mulala nga Katonda akoba ati ni mwene buyinza," 
Psalms62:12 era ng'akoba ati atugonza obutalekera; kuba agha kiisi muntu empeera ng'ajiira ku bikolwa bye. 
Psalms63:1 Wo Katonda, niiwe Katonda wange, omwoyo guunumira iwe. Nhenda inho okuba gh'oli; ng'oti n'eitaka eikalu bwe lyetaaga maadhi." 
Psalms63:2 Nhenda inho okukubona mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu; mbone obukumu bwo n'ekitiisa kyo. 
Psalms63:3 Ndidha kukusaakanga, engeri y'ongonzaamu obutalekera ensingira n'obulamu bwene." 
Psalms63:4 Kale ni ndidha kukusiimanga obulamu bwange bwonabwona; ndidha kukusabanga n'emikono gyange ghaigulu. 
Psalms63:5 Ndidha kuwuliranga mule bukalamu ng'oti n'omuntu aliire ku mbaga ensavu, era ndidha kukusaakanga n'eisanhu." 
Psalms63:6 Ni bwenja mu buliri nkulowooza; obwire bwonabwona tikwerabira," 
Psalms63:7 kuba buli kaakyeire niiwe ombeera. Bwemba mu ngalo dho nhemba olw'eisanhu. 
Psalms63:8 Neekalanguliire ku iwe, kuba onkuuma n'omukono gwo ogw'amaani." 
Psalms63:9 Aye abo abanoonia okuzikiriza obulamu bwange, baidha kwika ghansi abafu ye baja." 
Psalms63:10 Baidha kufiira mu kulwana ntalo emirambo gyaibwe giriibwe ebibe. 
Psalms63:11 Aye kyabazinga aidha kusagambanga olw'obughanguzi Katonda bw'amutuusaaku. Abo boonaboona abalayira eriina lya Katonda baidha kumusaakanga, kuba Katonda alisirisa eminwa egy'abaguya." 
Psalms64:1 Wo Katonda wange mpulirisa, nzira idembe, mponia abazigu bange abantiisa einho." 
Psalms64:2 Iwe nkuuma ababi balobe kunkola ebyo bye bali kuneeteesaaku mu ngiso; era onkuume ebikuukuulu by'abakozi b'ebibi balobe kunkola ebyo bye bategeike. 
Psalms64:3 Bakozesa enimi dhaibwe ng'oti mpiima, baakozesa ebibono ebikambwe ng'oti bulaso bwa busagwa." 
Psalms64:4 Beeteega baazinduukiriza omuntu aziraku musango, baamulasa mangu nga bazira ni kye batya." 
Psalms64:5 Beekalangula mu bikolwa ebibi, beekobaana gha ghe banaatega emitego, nga bakoba bati: “Naani anaatubona?" 
Psalms64:6 Naani asobola okwiguka mu butemo buno? Tukozeisa amagezi kamaala okuyiiya entegeka eno.” Ebiri mu mwoyo gw'omuntu era n'ebyo by'alowooza, kizibu okubitegeera." 
Psalms64:7 Aye Katonda aja kubalasa akalaso ke, era amangu ago geene baja kulumizibwa." 
Psalms64:8 Aja kubazikiriza olw'ebibono byaibwe bye boogera. Boonaboona abalikibona baja kutengeesa emitwe nga beewuunhia. 
Psalms64:9 Olwo abantu boonaboona baja kutya, baghaye ku ebyo Katonda bye yakola, era bisigale ku myoyo gyaibwe nga babidhuuba." 
Psalms64:10 Abatuufu ka basagambe, kuba Musengwa Katonda by'abakoleire bikulu, era ka beeyune gh'ali bawone abazigu. Abo abagondera ebiragiro bya Katonda ka basaake Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms65:1 Wo Katonda waife, tusaine tukusaakenga mu Sioni, era kiisi yeeyama y'oli asaine atuukirizenga kye yeeyama" 
Psalms65:2 eri iwe akolera abantu ebyo bye bakusaba. Abantu boonaboona baliidha y'oli 
Psalms65:3 olw'ebibi byaibwe, kuba ebibi byaife bwe bitubitiriraku obitusonigha." 
Psalms65:4 Wa nkabi oyo y'olonda n'omuseesa okumpi n'iwe, abenga mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu. Bwe tufuna ebirungi eby'omu ndhu yo, ni tufuna n'enkabi edhiva mu isinzizo lyo eitukuvu, titudhulirira kindi." 
Psalms65:5 Bwe tukusaba otwiramu, waatuwonia ng'okola ebyewuninkiriza. Niiwe Katonda atulokola, era eisuubi ery'abantu boonaboona ab'oku nsi n'abo abali eyo ng'otuumye enhandha edhiri eghala einho." 
Psalms65:6 Iwe wataagho ensozi olw'amaani go, kuba oli wa maani mangi." 
Psalms65:7 Oikaikania okuwolomboka okw'enhandha, n'okuyira okw'amaadhi g'enhandha; era waikaikania okuwowoigana okw'abadheemu." 
Psalms65:8 Abantu boonaboona ab'oku nsi waire ab'omu biketezo eby'eghala einho, batya olw'ebyo ebyewuninkiriza by'okola. Iwe oleetera ensi yoonayoona okukuba emizira, okuva endhuba y'eva okutuuka y'egwa." 
Psalms65:9 Otugheereza amaadhi gaagwa okwoleka nga bw'olabirira ensi, waagigha eitaka eigimu einho, waagigha emiiga egitakala, ebirime byakula bukalamu. Otyo bwe wabikola." 
Psalms65:10 Ofukirira obulime n'amaadhi amangi, waamulungula ebifunfugu, waagonza eitaka n'amaadhi amangi ago, ebirime byakula bukalamu." 
Psalms65:11 Ogha abantu bo okukungula ebingi kuba oli mulungi. Buli ghantu ghaligho ebirungi kamaala. 
Psalms65:12 Abantu bo eyo ye baayira ebyayo byaibwe, eisubi litoonha butoonhe. Buli kasozi kanhoonha okubona." 
Psalms65:13 Ebifo ebyayirwamu biidhwire byayo; ebiiko biidhwire misiri gya mere, nga byonabyona byemba era nga bwe bikuba emizira." 
Psalms66:1 Abantu mwenamwena mukubire Katonda emizira. 
Psalms66:2 Mwembe enhembo edhooleka ekitiisa ky'eriina lye; musaake ekitiisa kye. 
Psalms66:3 Mukobe Katonda muti: “By'okola nga bya ntiisa! Obuyinza bwo bungi, bukaka n'abazigu bo okwidha nga bagwirana okukukubira amakiryaivu." 
Psalms66:4 Abantu boonaboona ku nsi bakusinza; bakwembera enhembo edhikusaaka nga basaaka eriina lyo.” 
Psalms66:5 Mwidhe mubone Katonda by'akoze, ebintu by'akola mu bantu bya ntiisa." 
Psalms66:6 Yafuula enhandha ng'oti bukalu abantu baasala omwiga nga batambula ku bigere. Agho twasagamba olw'ebyo bye yakola. 
Psalms66:7 Olw'amaani ge afuga ebyanda n'ebyanda; era yaalingirira amaghanga n'amaiso ge ekiseera kyonakyona, abadheemu balobe kumudheemera." 
Psalms66:8 Musaake Katonda waife imwe amaghanga; mumusaakire irala abantu babawulire. 
Psalms66:9 Atugha obulamu yaatukuuma, era tatuganha kugwa." 
Psalms66:10 Iwe Katonda waife, watugezesa, waatwekebeedha ng'oti ni feeza bw'alongoosebwa." 
Psalms66:11 Watuleka twagwa mu lutuula, era watutwika ebintu ebizito." 
Psalms66:12 Waleka abantu baatuniina mu mitwe; twabita mu bizibu ebyokya ng'oti muliro. Twabita ni mu bizibu ebingi ng'oti maadhi ga mwidhuzo. Aye buti watutuusa aghalungi. 
Psalms66:13 Ndidha kuleetanga mu ndhu yo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, ntuukirizenga bye neeyama," 
Psalms66:14 ebyo bye nasuubiza okukugha bwe nali nga ndi mu buzibu. 
Psalms66:15 Ndidha kukughanga ensolo empiite ensavu ng'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa; era ndidha kughangayo embuzi n'ente enume, aghalala n'entaama enume, memale omwosi gwabyo gunioke nga guja ghaigulu." 
Psalms66:16 Imwe mwenamwena abatya Katonda mwidhe muwulire, ndidha kubakobera nze by'ankoleire." 
Psalms66:17 Namulirira amaziga geene, naamwembera enhembo edhimusaaka." 
Psalms66:18 Ngoli nali n'ebibi mu mwoyo gwange, Musengwa Katonda tiyandiwuliriisa kusaba kwange." 
Psalms66:19 Aye bwenebwene Katonda yawulirisa okusaba kwange, era yankolera bye namusaba." 
Psalms66:20 Katonda asaakibwe, kuba talobye kuwulirisa kusaba kwange, oba okulekera agho okundholeka nga bw'angonza obutalekera." 
Psalms67:1 Wo Katonda waife, tugemerwe ekivunika, otughe enkabi; tulingeku n'amaiso ag'ekisa." 
Psalms67:2 Olwo ensi yoonayoona emanhe ebyo by'oyenda; amaghanga goonagoona gamanhe amaani go agawonia. 
Psalms67:3 Imwe abantu mwenamwena musaake Katonda; mwenamwena mumusaake. 
Psalms67:4 Imwe amaghanga mwenamwena musangaale era mwembe olw'eisanhu, kuba Katonda asalira abantu emisango ng'aziramu kyekubira, era yaafuga amaghanga goonagoona ag'oku nsi." 
Psalms67:5 Imwe abantu mwenamwena musaake Katonda; mwenamwena mumusaake. 
Psalms67:6 Ebirime bibaze inho ku nsi. Katonda, oyo Katonda waife, atughaire enkabi." 
Psalms67:7 Katonda atughaire enkabi; ensi yoonayoona k'emutye okuva y'eva okutuuka y'ekanga. 
Psalms68:1 Wo Katonda, situkiramu osansaanie abazigu bo; abo abatakwenda balumuse embiro okuva mu maiso go." 
Psalms68:2 Ng'empewo bw'efuuwa omwosi ni guvaagho, weena otyo bw'obe obafuumuule embiro baje. Ng'omuzigo bwe gusaanuuka nga guli gha muliro, n'ababi boona batyo bwe babe bazikirire, baweegho mu maiso ga Katonda." 
Psalms68:3 Aye abatuufu ka basangaale, basagambire mu maiso ga Katonda; ka basanhuke nga bakuba emizira." 
Psalms68:4 Mwembere Katonda, mwembe enhembo edhisaaka eriina lye. Mumutegekere engira oyo aseeyeeya ku bire, eriina lye ni Musengwa Katonda, musagambire mu maiso ge." 
Psalms68:5 Oyo ni Katonda aba mu kifo kye ekitukuvu, ni lata w'abo abazira balata baibwe era n'akuuma banamwandu." 
Psalms68:6 Abo abazira ghe baba abafunira amaka ag'okubangamu, yaatoola abasibe mu makomera, yaabatuusa ku idembe ery'okusanhuka. Aye abadheemu abaleetera okusenga ku itaka ery'olubbalangu." 
Psalms68:7 Wo Katonda, iwe wakulemberamu abantu bo waatambula ng'osala eirungu," 
Psalms68:8 ensi yatengeeta, eigulu lyayugha amaadhi, olusozi Sinai lwadhugumira olw'okwidha kwo, iwe Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
Psalms68:9 Iwe wagwisa amaadhi kamaala, waiza buyaaka eitaka lyo eryali lyoneike." 
Psalms68:10 Abantu bo baakolamu ebisulo, era olw'obulungi bwo waagha abaavu ebyetaago byaibwe." 
Psalms68:11 Musengwa Katonda yagha ekiragiro, abantu kamaala baatambuza amawulire bati:" 
Psalms68:12 “Bakyabazinga n'amagye gaibwe balumuka era balumuka!” Abakazi abaasigala eka n'abaagabana omunhago 
Psalms68:13 ogw'enjiibwa edhiriku feeza, ng'amaghagha gaadho gamesunkana ni zaabu, waire ng'abakazi abo baasigala nga beegisiisa bwa mu bigo bya ntaama." 
Psalms68:14 Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona bwe yasansaaniza bakyabazinga eyo, omugozi gwagwa ku lusozi Zalumoni." 
Psalms68:15 Bashani nga lusozi lukologho, luli n'emitwe kamaala emigulumivu!" 
Psalms68:16 Lwaki iwe olusozi oluli n'emitwe kamaala emigulumivu, olingirira n'ensaalwa olusozi Katonda lwe yeeroboza okubangaku? Bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda aja kubanga ku lusozi olwo ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms68:17 Musengwa Katonda yaidha ku lusozi Sinai mu kifo ekitukuvu, ng'ali n'ebigaali bye eby'amaani eby'omu lutalo enkumi n'enkumi." 
Psalms68:18 Yaaniina eyo ghaigulu ng'atwala abanhage kamaala; abantu nga mw'otwaliire n'abadheemu, baamutonera ebirabo. Musengwa Katonda eyo y'aja okubanga." 
Psalms68:19 Tusaakenga Musengwa Katonda, oyo n'atwetwikira ebizibu byaife buli kaakyeire. Oyo ni Katonda atulokola." 
Psalms68:20 Katonda waife ni Katonda alokola, era Katonda waife ni Musengwa Katonda waife atuwonia okufa." 
Psalms68:21 Katonda aja kutentena emitwe egy'abazigu be, abo abeekalangulira mu bibi byaibwe." 
Psalms68:22 Musengwa Katonda yakoba ati: “Ndidha kubaiza okuva e Bashani, ndidha kubaiza okuva ku ntobo y'enhandha," 
Psalms68:23 memale mutyankirire omusaayi gwaibwe, n'embwa dhaimwe dhigunhwe okutuusa ku nkooye.”" 
Psalms68:24 Abantu boonaboona babona nga bw'otambula n'ekitiisa iwe Katonda, otambula iwe Katonda wange era kyabazinga wange, ng'oingira mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu." 
Psalms68:25 Abembi n'abakulemberamu, abaghala abakuba obugoma n'ensaasi bairirira, memale ab'entongooli n'endingidi baakoobera." 
Psalms68:26 Nga bemba bati: “Musaake Katonda mu bantu be abeesoloiza; musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe mwenamwena aba Yakobo.” 
Psalms68:27 Ekika kya Benjamini ekisembayo okuba ekitono, nga n'ekikulemberamu, abakulu mu kika kya Yuda bairaku mu bikunsu byaibwe. Abakulu mu kika kya Zebuluni, n'abakulu mu kika kya Nafutali boona bairaku." 
Psalms68:28 Wo Katonda, yolesa nga bw'oli ow'amaani, yoleka amaani go g'okozesa okutubeera," 
Psalms68:29 ng'oli mu isinzizo lyo e Yerusalemu bakyabazinga ye bakutonerera ebirabo. 
Psalms68:30 Kaabukira ensolo edho edh'omu nsiko edhisula mu bigada; okaabukire abantu abo abaayira enume n'obuyana aghalala, era obatyankirire okutuusa lwe banaakuba amakiryaivu ni bakutonera feeza. Sansaania abantu abo abenda einho okutanula entalo." 
Psalms68:31 Abakwenda abakologho balireetebwa okuva e Misiri; ate ab'e Ethiopia baagololera Katonda emikono gyaibwe. 
Psalms68:32 Imwe abantu mwenamwena ab'oku nsi mwembere Katonda; mwembe enhembo edhisaaka Musengwa Katonda," 
Psalms68:33 oyo aseeyeeya ku igulu, eigulu eryaligho okuva eira n'eira. Wulira bw'akaabuka n'amamiro ag'amaani." 
Psalms68:34 Mulangirire nga Katonda bw'ali ow'amaani; obufuzi bwe bumaamira ensi Isiraeli yoonayoona amaani ge gabonekera ku igulu. 
Psalms68:35 Katonda ng'ali mu kifo kye ekitukuvu atiisa, Katonda oyo owa Isiraeli agha abantu be amaani n'obukumu. Katonda oyo asaakibwe!" 
Psalms69:1 Wo Katonda wange mponia, amaadhi gantuuse mu nkoto." 
Psalms69:2 Ndi kudimira mu bitosi omuzira gha kuniina naire. Ndi kweyongerayo bwa mu maadhi amaleeyi, omwidhuzo gw'amaadhi gwenda kundheyaagho." 
Psalms69:3 Mpoiremu olw'okulira nga nkweta, amamiro gansaakaala. Amaiso tikaaghanga na kumoga, olw'okuteegerera Katonda wange okumbeera." 
Psalms69:4 Abankyagha ng'ate ghazira kye mbakoze bali kamaala okusinga enviiri edhiri ku mutwe gwange. Abo abenda okusirisa obulamu bwange nga bampaama bye ntakoze, ba maani beenebeene. Bampaliriza okuligha ebintu bye ntaibangaku naire." 
Psalms69:5 Wo Katonda wange, niiwe oidhi nga bwendi omusirusiru, ghazira kibi kye nakola ky'otaidhi." 
Psalms69:6 Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ka ndobe kuswaza abo abasuubira mu iwe. Wo Katonda wa Isiraeli, nhamba ndobe kunhoomesa abo abakusinza." 
Psalms69:7 Ku lulwo abantu banvuma, era tikaayala na mu bantu." 
Psalms69:8 Aboluganda lwange baaningaku ng'oti tibandidhi, baganda bange ku maama bambona ng'oti ndi wa ndha." 
Psalms69:9 Okugonza einho eisinzizo lyo kuumazeegho; ebivumo by'abo abakuvuma biira ku nze. 
Psalms69:10 Bwe neerumya nga nsiiba endhala, kinfuukira ekivumo." 
Psalms69:11 Bwe nvaala ekutiya olw'enaku, nfuuka kibono kya kudhondha." 
Psalms69:12 Nafuuka kya kughayaku eri abo abatyama mu kifo ky'olwekobaano, ku mulyango ogwingira mu kibuga, n'abatamiivu bandhiiyaamu enhembo." 
Psalms69:13 Aye nze nsaba iwe Musengwa Katonda. Wo Katonda wange, ndhiraamu mu kiseera kyo mwene ky'oba ng'olonze, olw'okugonza kwo okungi okutakoma, era n'olw'okusuubiza kwo okwesigika." 
Psalms69:14 Mponia okudimira mu bitosi ontoole mu ngalo edh'abazigu bange ndobe kweyongerayo mu maadhi maleeyi. 
Psalms69:15 Otaganha mwidhuzo gwa maadhi kundheyaagho waire okundeka okudimira okutuuka ku ntobo. Era otaganha magombe kunsandikira. 
Psalms69:16 Wo Musengwa Katonda, olw'okugonza kwo okutakoma n'olw'obulungi bwo ndhiraamu bye nkusaba; olw'okusaasira kwo okungi ba ku luuyi lwange." 
Psalms69:17 Nze omwiru wo otankuba nkoone, yangughaku ombeere kuba ndi mu buzibu bunene." 
Psalms69:18 Ndhiruukirira omponie, era nteekuluza abazigu bange." 
Psalms69:19 Oidhi bwebanvuma ni banswazaswaza ni baanhooma; era oidhi abazigu bange boonaboona. 
Psalms69:20 Banvumye bankutula n'omwoyo, buti n'eisuubi nzira. Nanoonia anansaasiraku yambula; naanoonia anandhizaamu amaani, yambula." 
Psalms69:21 Endhala bwe yaanuma, mu kifo eky'okumpa emere enkalamu, bampa eri ng'oti butwa; endiwo yaanuma bampa omwenge endoota." 
Psalms69:22 Kale ni embaga dhaibwe dhe balya ka dhibafuukire ng'oti lutuula olubagemya; ebibinuko byaibwe eby'emisengo gye baaghaayo, ka bibaviiremu okugwa." 
Psalms69:23 Amaiso gaibwe ka gazibibwe, balobe kubona, era emigongo gyaibwe gifunhibwe enaku dhoonadhoona." 
Psalms69:24 Babonereze n'ekiruyi kyo, obamalireku obusungu bwo obwokya ng'oti muliro." 
Psalms69:25 Ebifo byaibwe mwe baba ka bisigale byanhe byereere ebizise; n'endhu dhaibwe dhisigale bifulukwa. 
Psalms69:26 Kuba baja baakiriga abo b'obonereiza; baayongera obulumi ku abo b'ofumiite. 
Psalms69:27 Kale babungeku ebibonerezo, ghabule y'osonighaku naire." 
Psalms69:28 Amaina gaibwe ka gasasibwe mu kitabo eky'obulamu; gatoolebwe mu lukalala olulimu abatuufu. 
Psalms69:29 Aye nze ndi kudaazibwadaazibwa era ndi mu bulumi. Wo Katonda wange mponia, onkuumire ghe batantuukiraku." 
Psalms69:30 Ndidha kusaakanga eriina lya Katonda mu lwembo; era ndhatulenga obukulu bwe nga mmusiima. 
Psalms69:31 Ekyo n'ekisiimya Musengwa Katonda okusinga okumugha ente ng'ekigheebwayo, oba okumugha ente enume ng'omusengo, waire nga nkulu yeene eriku n'amayiga." 
Psalms69:32 Abo abadaazibwadaazibwa bwe bakibona basangaala; abo abasinza Katonda bwe bakibona kibaizaamu amaani," 
Psalms69:33 kuba Musengwa Katonda awulirisa okusaba kw'abo abali mu bwetaavu era tiyeerabira bantu be abali mu busibe. 
Psalms69:34 Imwe eigulu n'ensi, n'enhandha ni byonabyona ebirimu, musaake Katonda." 
Psalms69:35 Katonda aliwonia Sioni abazigu, yairamu okuzimba ebibuga bya Yuda, abantu be baabityamangamu nga byaibwe ku bwaibwe." 
Psalms69:36 Biribanga bya nsikirano mu baana b'abantu be, n'abo abamugonza omwo mwe balibanga." 
Psalms70:1 Wo Katonda mponia. Wo Musengwa Katonda yangughaku ombeere. 
Psalms70:2 Abo abenda okundhita baswaze era basoberwe. Abo abenda okuunumya bairirizeeyo era banhoomebwe. 
Psalms70:3 Abo abansungiriza baleetere okwezinduka, olw'okubona nga baswaziibwa." 
Psalms70:4 Abo boonaboona abeefubiriza okwidha y'oli, basagambe era basangaale olw'ebyo by'obakolera. Abo abeegomba obulokozi bwo buliidho ka bakobenga bati: “Katonda mukologho!”" 
Psalms70:5 Aye nze ndi munaku era omwavu. Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe ombeera era n'ontoola mu bizibu, yangughaku ombeere!" 
Psalms71:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe ye neesiga, otandeka kuswala." 
Psalms71:2 Olw'obutuufu bwo ntoola aghabi omponie, tega kutu ompulirise era ondokole." 
Psalms71:3 Nfuukira olubaale olw'okwewogomamu, era ombeere ekimante ekigumu ekineezungulwire eky'okumponia; kuba oli ng'oti lubaale era ng'oti kimante kigumu mwe neewogoma." 
Psalms71:4 Wo Katonda wange, ntoola mu ngalo edh'ababi, ontoole mu buyinza obw'abantu abakambwe era ababi." 
Psalms71:5 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe mwe nsuubirira era nakwesiga ira okuva mu buto bwange." 
Psalms71:6 Mu kuva mu nda mbairenga neesiga iwe; niiwe owantoola mu nda ya maama. Buli kaakyeire ndidha kukusaakanga. 
Psalms71:7 Mbairenga kya kuboneraku eri abantu kamaala, olw'okuba iwe oli mukuumi wange ow'amaani." 
Psalms71:8 Nkusaaka omusana n'obwire, era naakobera abantu nga bw'oli ow'ekitiisa." 
Psalms71:9 Ni bwendikairigha otansuula ere; otandekulira agho ng'ate amaani gampweire. 
Psalms71:10 Abazigu bange bandhogeraku; abo abaguniriire okumalagho obulamu bwange baneegeyaamu," 
Psalms71:11 nga bakoba bati: “Katonda amulekuliire agho, ka tumujiire tumugeme, kuba era ghazira muntu aidha kumututoola mu ngalo.”" 
Psalms71:12 Wo Katonda wange, otamba ghala, yangughaku okumbeera." 
Psalms71:13 Abo abaanumba baswaze era obazikirize. Abo abagezaaku okuntuusaaku ebizibu, baswalize irala era banhoomebwe." 
Psalms71:14 Aye nze ndidha kusuubirira mu iwe buliidho; ndidha kweyongeranga okukusaaka obutalekera. 
Psalms71:15 Omusana n'obwire ndidha kukoberanga abantu ebikolwa byo eby'obutuufu, mbakoberenga n'ebyo eby'obulokozi, waire nga tisobola kubitegeera kubimalayo." 
Psalms71:16 Ndidha kutambuliranga mu maani go iwe Musengwa Katonda; ndidha kusaakanga obutuufu bwo, obubwo iwe wenka." 
Psalms71:17 Wo Katonda wange, onsomeisa okuva mu buto bwange, ni ye buli eno nkaakobera abantu ebyewuunhisa by'okola." 
Psalms71:18 Wo Katonda wange, ni bwendikairigha ni mmera envu, otandekuliranga agho, okutuusa nga nkobeire abantu amaani go n'obukumu bwo, ense dhoonadhoona edhija okwiragho." 
Psalms71:19 Obutuufu bwo butuuka ni mu igulu. Okoze ebintu ebikologho, ezira ali ng'oti niiwe." 
Psalms71:20 Wansidikira ebizibu kamaala n'okudaagadaaga, aye olindhiriza amaani gange kabiri; olintoola ghansi eyo abantu ye baja, wamponia okufa." 
Psalms71:21 Oidha kwongera okunfuula ow'ekitiisa; era ondhizeemu amaani kabiri. 
Psalms71:22 Ndidha kukusaakanga n'entongooli olw'obwesigwa bwo, iwe Katonda wange. Ndidha kwembanga enhembo edhikusaaka n'endingidi, iwe Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli." 
Psalms71:23 Ndidha kukubanga emizira nga nkwembera enhembo edhikusaaka, kuba wandokola." 
Psalms71:24 Era ndidha kukoberanga abantu omusana n'obwire, nti niiwe obabeera mu butuufu; kuba abo abagezaaku okuntuusaaku ebizibu, banhoomeibwa era baaswazibwa." 
Psalms72:1 Wo Katonda, gha kyabazinga okusala emisango mu butuufu bwo; era oghe omulangira oyo okutuukirira ng'okukwo." 
Psalms72:2 Afuge abantu bo mu butuufu, era agoloze abatuntuzibwa nga tasaliriza." 
Psalms72:3 Ensi eveemu amakungula amalungi, n'obutuufu bwo bweyoleke." 
Psalms72:4 Kyabazinga asale mu butuufu ensonga edh'abaavu; ayambe abali mu bwetaavu, atyankirire abo abaniinirira abaghafu." 
Psalms72:5 Aghangaale ng'oti ndhuba, era ng'oti mwezi, ense n'ense." 
Psalms72:6 Abe wa mugaso ng'amaadhi agagwa ku bisimbe mu nimiro, agagwa okufukirira eitaka." 
Psalms72:7 Abantu abatuufu beeyongerenga okwala mu nnaku dhe, abantu babenga mu miraala okutuusa omwezi lwe guliwaagho." 
Psalms72:8 Obwakyabazinga bwe bugazighe okuva ku nhandha okutuuka ku nhandha. Era buve ku mwiga Eufurate okutuuka ensi y'ekoma. 
Psalms72:9 Abantu ababa mu irungu bamukubire amakiryaivu, n'abazigu be bakombe enkungu." 
Psalms72:10 Bakyabazinga ab'e Tarushishi n'ab'omu bizinga bamutonere ebirabo; ni bakyabazinga ow'e Sheba n'ow'e Seba, boona bamughe ebirabo." 
Psalms72:11 Bakyabazinga boonaboona beeyale mu maiso ge; abantu abamaghanga goonagoona babe bagheereza be. 
Psalms72:12 Kuba abeera omunaku ng'amuliriire, era yaayamba n'omwavu aziraku amugha." 
Psalms72:13 Agemerwa abanafu n'abaavu ekivunika, yaawonia obulamu bw'abanaku okuzikirira." 
Psalms72:14 Abatoola ku abo ababadaazadaaza; n'ababakola eby'obukambwe, obulamu bwaibwe yaabutwala nga bwa mughendo inho y'ali." 
Psalms72:15 Aghangaale! Abantu ab'omu Sheba bamughenga zaabu; abantu bamusabirenga era bamwendezenga enkabi buliidho omusana n'obwire. 
Psalms72:16 Emere ebenga ya mwero mu byalo; ensozi dhoonadhoona dhiidhule misiri, ebibala byagyo bibe ng'oti n'ebibala eby'omu Lebanoni. Ebibuga biidhule abantu abangi ng'oti isubi." 
Psalms72:17 Eriina lya kyabazinga liidhukirwenga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Obumanhifu bwe busigalegho ng'oti ndhuba. Abantu abamaghanga goonagoona bamwetenga wa nkabi, era basabenga Katonda okubafuula ab'enkabi oti ni kyabazinga oyo." 
Psalms72:18 Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe, Katonda wa Isiraeli, ni yenka akola ebyewuunhisa." 
Psalms72:19 Eriina lye ery'ekitiisa lisaakibwenga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Ekitiisa kye kiidhule ensi yoonayoona! Amiina era Amiina. 
Psalms72:20 Okusaba kwa Daudi mutabane wa Yesse ghano ghe kukanga. 
Psalms73:1 Bwenebwene Katonda mulungi eri Abaisiraeli, n'eri abo abamuwulira n'omwoyo omulala." 
Psalms73:2 Aye nze neekontola kata ngwe; ebigere byange kumpi bityerere," 
Psalms73:3 kuba bwe nabona ng'ababi ebintu bibajiira bukalamu, naabasaalirirwa olw'okwekuluntaza kwaibwe." 
Psalms73:4 Bazira kibaluma naire; emibiri gyaibwe miramu bukalamu era gya maani. 
Psalms73:5 Bazira bizibu ng'abantu abandi bwebaba nabyo; bazira nnaku ebaluma oba ekintu kyonakyona ekibamalaku emiraala. 
Psalms73:6 Kyova okwekuluntaza kwaibwe kuboneekerera ng'oti n'ebinhere eby'omu nkoto, n'ebikolwa byaibwe eby'obukambwe ni bibabwikirira ng'oti kivaalo." 
Psalms73:7 Bageedhie n'amaiso gaabafunduka, emyoyo gyaibwe gyaidhula okwenda okukola ebibi." 
Psalms73:8 Boogera ku bantu abandi nga banhoomerera, nga benda okubakola obubi. Olw'okwekuluntaza kwaibwe beesoomera okukiriga bantu banaibwe." 
Psalms73:9 Boogera ebivuma Katonda mwene igulu n'eminwa gyaibwe gyene, baakozesa enimi dhaibwe okutontogola ab'oku nsi." 
Psalms73:10 Kyova abantu ba Katonda bakyukira ye bali ni babasaaka era ni baganha okuwulirisa kiisi kye babakoba. 
Psalms73:11 Beebuuza bati: “Aye Katonda alimanha atya? Oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene alisobola atya okutegeera?” 
Psalms73:12 Ababi batyo bwe bali, baba n'ebintu kamaala ate beeyongera okufuniraku ebindi." 
Psalms73:13 Aye nze ndaagiire bwereere okwekuuma obutagwa mu bibi. 
Psalms73:14 Ndaazibwadaazibwa okugwisa endhuba, naabonerezebwa buli nkyo." 
Psalms73:15 Ngoli nakoba nti ka ndhogere ng'oti n'abo, nandibaire nkoze ng'oti n'atali wa mu bantu bo." 
Psalms73:16 Bwe nalowooza einho ku kintu ekyo, kyanema okutegeera," 
Psalms73:17 okutuusa bwe naja mu kifo kya Katonda ekitukuvu, memale olwo naategeera ebija okutuuka ku babi." 
Psalms73:18 Bwenebwene iwe obata aghali obutyerezi, waabaleetera okugwa baazikirira." 
Psalms73:19 Tibalwagho naire kuzikirira, kutemya na kuzibula, ng'entiisa ebeeyaagho." 
Psalms73:20 Ng'ekirooto bwe kyerabirwa ng'omuntu asitwike, n'iwe Musengwa Katonda weena otyo bw'obeerabira amangu, ng'otooleire okukola ebibyo." 
Psalms73:21 Nawuliranga okulumwa munda mule, ng'ekintu kinfumita ku mwoyo." 
Psalms73:22 Nali musiru era nga nzira kye ndidhi, nga y'oli neebisa ng'oti ndi nsolo busolo." 
Psalms73:23 Aye nga kwo okuba, nze ndi n'iwe buliidho era ongemereire n'omukono gwo." 
Psalms73:24 Ntambula nga njiira ku kugalaga kwo era ku nkomerero oliinanhiriza mu kitiisa. 
Psalms73:25 Eyo mu igulu nzirayo wundi ali ku lwange okutoolaku iwe era ni ku nsi kuzira kye neetaaga okutoolaku iwe. 
Psalms73:26 Waire omubiri gwange n'omwoyo binafugha, Katonda n'amaani gange era oyo n'omugabo gwange ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms73:27 Abo abakuvaaku baja kuzikirira, oja kumalagho abo abadaaliima." 
Psalms73:28 Aye nze nkibona nga kikalamu inho okuba ni Katonda, era nasalagho Musengwa Katonda abe omukuumi wange, olwo nkoberenga abantu byonabyona by'akola." 
Psalms74:1 Wo Katonda, lwaki otuswire ere n'otwerabira ebyanda n'ebyanda? Lwaki otusungughaliire ife entaama dho dh'oyaya?" 
Psalms74:2 Idhukira abantu bo be weerondera eira, be watoola mu bwiru, babe eighanga eriryo ku bubwo. Idhukira olusozi Sioni kwe wabanga." 
Psalms74:3 Tambula mu kyanhe aghaali eisinzizo, abazigu baife lye baazikiriza ni lisaanagho n'ebyalimu." 
Psalms74:4 Abazigu baayasiikana mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu nga beesuuta olw'obughanguzi; era baasimbamu ebendera dhaibwe ng'obumanhiso obw'obughanguzi. 
Psalms74:5 Baaba ng'oti n'abatemi b'emiti abagemye empasa okutema emiti mu kibira. 
Psalms74:6 Baamenhamenha ebibaadhe eby'emiti, nga bakozesa empasa n'enhundo." 
Psalms74:7 Eisinzizo lyo baalikumaku omuliro baalizikiriza, baayonoona ekifo kyo ekitukuvu abantu ghe bakusinziza." 
Psalms74:8 Baagenderera okututyama ku mitwe batughangulire irala, era baidha mu nsi yaife baayokya ebifo ebitukuvu byonabyona mwe tusinziza Katonda." 
Psalms74:9 Titukaabona bumanhiso bwaife obutukuvu, abalanzi baawaagho ira era ghazira aidhi bino ghe birikoma." 
Psalms74:10 Wo Katonda, abazigu baife balituusa li okukusekerera? Obwo baja kuvumanga eriina lyo byanda na byanda?" 
Psalms74:11 Lwaki oloba okutuyamba ng'ate tuli mu bwetaavu? Lwaki otulingirira obulingirire n'ozingira bwa makono? 
Psalms74:12 Ate nga iwe Katonda waife, okuva eira n'eira oli Kyabazinga waife; otulokoire emikuzi kamaala." 
Psalms74:13 Enhandha wagigabaniamu ghabiri n'amaani go, waakonkona emitwe egy'agasota ag'omu maadhi." 
Psalms74:14 Wakonkona emitwe egy'ogusota ogwetebwa Leviathani, omulambo gwagwo waagugha ebisolo eby'omu irungu ng'emere." 
Psalms74:15 Wayatisa entanda mwavaamu enhindo dh'ensulo n'obwiga; ate waakaliiza emiiga egitakaliirangaku. 
Psalms74:16 Omusana n'obwire byombi bibyo; niiwe owataagho endhuba n'omwezi mu bifo byabyo. 
Psalms74:17 Niiwe owataagho ensalosalo ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'ensi, era wataagho endoboozi n'ebiseera eby'ekiinhogogo." 
Psalms74:18 Aye Musengwa Katonda oteerabira kino nti abazigu bo bakusekerera, abantu abatakutya baakunhooma." 
Psalms74:19 Otalekulira bantu bo mu makono ga bazigu baibwe; oteerabira bulamu bwa bantu bo abadaazibwadaazibwa. 
Psalms74:20 Idhukira endagaano ye wakola n'ife, kuba kiisi ghali nzikiiza ku nsi ghaidhwire ebikolwa eby'obukambwe." 
Psalms74:21 Otaganha abo abazira bwogerero kuswazibwa; yamba abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu basobole okusaaka eriina lyo. 
Psalms74:22 Wo Katonda, situkiramu oyoleke nga bw'oli omutuufu. Oteerabira abantu abatakutya bwe bakusekerera omusana n'obwire." 
Psalms74:23 Oteerabira kukaabuka kw'abo abakukyagha, n'okuboigoka okw'abazigu bo okutakoma." 
Psalms75:1 Wo Katonda waife, tusiimye inho, tusiimiire irala! Tusaaka eriina lyo nga tuloodha ebyewuunhisa kamaala by'okola." 
Psalms75:2 Katonda akoba oti: “Nataagho ekiseera eky'okusaliramu emisango, nja kusala nga nziramu kyekubira.”" 
Psalms75:3 Era akoba oti: “Waire ensi etengeeta, n'ebigirimu byonabyona ni bitengera, nze ndidha kugumya emisingi gyayo." 
Psalms75:4 Nkoba abo abeekuluntaza nti mulekere okwekuluntaza; naakoba abakozi b'ebibi nti mulekere kwebona nga muli ba ghaigulu. 
Psalms75:5 Mulobe kwekulumbaza, waire okwogera nga mumadalaiza emitwe.”" 
Psalms75:6 Omuntu okusalirwa omusango, tikiva buvandhuba oba bugwandhuba, waire okuva mu irungu." 
Psalms75:7 Katonda mwene n'asala omusango owundi gwamusinga ate owundi yagusinga. 
Psalms75:8 Katonda agemereire mu ngalo ekikopo eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omuka ogw'obusungu bwe. Aja kugufukira ababi ab'oku nsi boonaboona, bagunhwe gwonagwona okutuuka ni ku iseedha." 
Psalms75:9 Aye nze ndidha kusagambanga ebyanda n'ebyanda, era ndidha kwembanga enhembo edhisaaka Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms75:10 Amaani ag'ababi goonagoona aligazikiriza, ate amaani ag'abatuufu aligongeraku obungi." 
Psalms76:1 Katonda amanhiibwa mu Buyudaaya; eriina lye ligheebwa ekitiisa mu Isiraeli. 
Psalms76:2 Katonda aba Yerusalemu ku lusozi Sioni. 
Psalms76:3 Eyo ye yamenheramenhera obulaso obuziinhuuka, n'engabo n'empiima n'eby'okulwanisa ebindi abazigu be bye baakozesanga mu kulwana olutalo." 
Psalms76:4 Ekitiisa kye kimesunkana, era atambula ng'akaadha, bw'aba ng'ava mu nsozi ye yaghangulira abazigu be." 
Psalms76:5 Abalwani baibwe abaziramu ntete baabasuuza byonabyona bye baali nabyo. Era buti bali mu ndoolo dhire dheene edh'okufa. Amaani gaibwe n'obumanhi bwaibwe mu by'okulwana entalo tibyabagasa. 
Psalms76:6 Bwe wabakaabukira iwe Katonda wa Yakobo, embalaasi dhaagwa, n'abavuzi baadho baagwa ghansi, baafa." 
Psalms76:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ghazira atakutya, ghazira akana n'asigala agho mu maiso go, bw'oba ng'osungughaire." 
Psalms76:8 Waba mu igulu waalangirira ensala yo, ensi yaatya era yaasiriikirira," 
Psalms76:9 iwe ng'ositwike okukoba kye wasalagho, okulokola abo boonaboona abadaazibwadaazibwa abali ku nsi." 
Psalms76:10 Iwe oleetera obusungu obw'abantu okukusaaka obusaake, abo abaliwonagho mu ntalo balikusinza ku nnaku dho edh'ebibinuko." 
Psalms76:11 Imwe abantu mutuukirize eri Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda waimwe ebyo bye mweyama; imwe abali mu biketezo ebimwezungulwire mwenamwena mumutonere ebirabo, oyo atiibwa abantu boonaboona." 
Psalms76:12 Abafuzi abamalamu emyoyo, era bakyabazinga abali ku nsi abatiikiza irala baatenha." 
Psalms77:1 Ndirira Katonda; mmulirira nga nhenda ampulirise. 
Psalms77:2 Bwemba mu bizibu nsaba Musengwa Katonda; obwire bwonabwona mpanika amakono gange nga tiwulira na kuluyirira, aye naabulwa ansaasiraku." 
Psalms77:3 Bwendowooza ku Katonda ndira bwa maziga; bweneefumintiriza einho n'amaani gampwamu, naazirika." 
Psalms77:4 Obwire bwonabwona tanganha kutenduka ku ndoolo naire; ndi mweraliikirivu tisobola na kwogera. 
Psalms77:5 Ndowooza ku biseera eby'eira, naidhukira emyaka egyabita." 
Psalms77:6 Nkyesa obwire ng'ebidhuubo biri kwekuluumulula mu mwoyo gwange. Neefumintiriza era neebuuza mule nti: 
Psalms77:7 “Mbo Musengwa Katonda anaatusuula ere yaatwerabirira irala? Taliirayo kutusiima naire? 
Psalms77:8 Yalekera agho okutugonza? Ekisuubizo kye tikikaaligho? 
Psalms77:9 Katonda takaali na kivunika naire? Obusungu n'obumuleeteire okulekera okutusaasira?” 
Psalms77:10 Agho naakoba nti: “Ekisinga okuunuma, n'okubona ng'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene takaali ku luuyi lwaife.”" 
Psalms77:11 Ndidha kulowoozanga ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'akola; ndidhukirenga n'ebyewuunhio bye yakolanga eira. 
Psalms77:12 Ndidha kwetegerezanga emirimo gye yakola; neefumintirizenga ku by'amaani bye yakola. 
Psalms77:13 Wo Katonda, kiisi ky'okola kitukuvu, ezirayo katonda mukologho kwaga ni Katonda waife." 
Psalms77:14 Niiwe Katonda akola ebyewuunhio, era wayoleka amaghanga ebikolwa byo eby'amaani." 
Psalms77:15 Wakozesa amaani go, waatoola abantu bo mu bwiru, abo baidhukulu ba Yakobo ni Yosefu." 
Psalms77:16 Amaadhi bwe gaakubona iwe Katonda, amaadhi ago olwakubona gati, gaatya, bwenebwene entobo y'enhandha yatengeeta." 
Psalms77:17 Ebire byayugha amaadhi, ku igulu kwavaaku olukuba, obulaso bwo bwamyansa okuva ku buli luuyi." 
Psalms77:18 Olukuba lwo lwatyabuka mu kiwunga nga luvuga ng'oti nkede ya kigaali, okumyansa kwamulisa ensi yoonayoona, ensi yaatengeeta era yeesunda." 
Psalms77:19 Watambula ku nhandha, waakola akagira ku maadhi amangi, aye ebigere mw'obise byaloba kuboneka." 
Psalms77:20 Wabisa abantu bo ku maadhi ng'omwayi bw'atambuza ebyayo bye, ng'okozesa Musa ni Aaroni." 
Psalms78:1 Bantu bange, mutege kutu muwulire bye mbeegeresa; mwetegereze kiisi kibono kye mbakoba." 
Psalms78:2 Ndidha kwogera mu nfumo; ndidha kwatula ebitaatulwanga eby'eira," 
Psalms78:3 badhaadha baife bye batukobera, ni tubiwulira era ni tubyega." 
Psalms78:4 Tituja kubigisa baana baife, tuja kukobera abo ab'oluse olwidha, eby'amaani Musengwa Katonda bye yakola ebimuleetera okusaakibwa, n'ebyewuunhisa bye yakola." 
Psalms78:5 Yateeragho abantu ba Isiraeli amateeka, yaateeragho baidhukulu ba Yakobo ebiragiro yaakoba badhaadha baife beegeresenga ebyo abaana baibwe." 
Psalms78:6 Olwo kiisi luse olwiragho, n'abaana abakaali kuzaalibwa, basobole okubimanha era boona babikobere abaana baibwe." 
Psalms78:7 Memale olwo batenga obwesige bwaibwe mu Katonda, nga tibeerabira bye yakola, aye nga bagondera ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms78:8 Balobe kuba ng'oti ni badhaadha baibwe, ab'oluse olw'empwitu era oludheemu oluse olw'abantu ab'emyoyo egitaagumira ku Katonda era abaalekera agho okumwikiriza." 
Psalms78:9 Aba Efuraimu nga bagemye obulaso ku lunaku olw'olutalo, baakyuka baalumuka abazigu." 
Psalms78:10 Tibaakuuma ndagaano yaibwe ni Katonda era baaloba okugondera amateeka ge. 
Psalms78:11 Beerabira bye yakola, waire ebyewuunhio mwene bye yakola nga babona." 
Psalms78:12 Katonda yakola ebyewuunhio nga badhaadha baibwe babona bati bye yakolera eyo mu biketezo eby'e Zoani mu nsi Misiri. 
Psalms78:13 Yagabaniamu amaadhi g'enhandha ghabiri, yaageemereza ng'oti bimante eruuyi n'eruuyi yaabaleka baagabitamu ghagati." 
Psalms78:14 Omusana yaboolekanga engira ng'akozesa ekire ekyabakulemberangamu ate obwire yaagibooleka n'ekintu ekyaka ng'oti muliro. 
Psalms78:15 Yayatisa embaale mu irungu, yaabafunira amaadhi ag'okunhwa kamaala ng'agava ku ntobo y'enhandha." 
Psalms78:16 Yakola emiiga gyakuuluula okuva mu lubaale yaaleetera amaadhi okukuuluula ng'oti mwiga gwene. 
Psalms78:17 Aye ate baaja bwa mu maiso n'okwonoona y'ali baamudheemera eyo mu irungu, oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene." 
Psalms78:18 Baaleba Katonda mu bugenderevu nga bamusaba emere olw'amairu gaibwe. 
Psalms78:19 Baayogera bubi ku Katonda, bati: “Katonda asobola okutufunira emere mu irungu?" 
Psalms78:20 Kituufu yakuba olubaale mwavaamu amaadhi gaatiiriika, n'emiiga gyakuuluula, gyabanda n'okubanda aye asobola okutufunira emere, oba okutufunira emamba ife abantu be?”" 
Psalms78:21 Kale Musengwa Katonda bweyawulira ebyo yaidhula ekiruyi, yaalumba abantu be ng'ali ng'oti muliro era obusungu bwe bweyongera okubaakiraku" 
Psalms78:22 kuba tibamwikiriza, waire okwesiga amaani ge agawonia." 
Psalms78:23 Ng'ate yagha ekiragiro ghaigulu ku igulu, yaigulagho emiryango gy'eigulu" 
Psalms78:24 mannu yaamagalika, baalya empeke dheene edhiva mu igulu dhe yabagha." 
Psalms78:25 Katonda yaagha abantu emere baalya baalekerera abantu baalya ku mere ya bamalaika. 
Psalms78:26 Kabiri yaafuuyisa empewo ku igulu eva e buvandhuba era olw'obukumu bwe yaafuuyisa n'empewo eyindi eva ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. 
Psalms78:27 Olwo emamba yaamagalika enhonhi dheene enhingi ng'oti musenho gwa ku nhandha. 
Psalms78:28 Dhaamagalika munda mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, okwezungulula kiisi weema ya buli muntu." 
Psalms78:29 Abantu baalya era baiguta, kuba yabagha ng'amairu gaibwe bwe gaali." 
Psalms78:30 Aye amairu gaali gakaali kubawaamu, era nga bakaalya," 
Psalms78:31 Katonda yaabasungughalira, yaitamu abasaadha abaali basingamu amaani abasaadha aba Isiraeli abaalondebwa n'obwegendereza." 
Psalms78:32 Aye waire ng'ebyo byonabyona byali bityo, baaja bwa mu maiso na kwonoona era waire nga baabona ebyewuunhio bye, tibaamwikiriza." 
Psalms78:33 Kyeyava n'aleetera enaku dhaibwe okuwaagho amangu ng'oti muuka gwa mu nhindo n'enkomerero y'emyaka gyaibwe n'eba ya kikutuko. 
Psalms78:34 Bwe yabaitamu banaibwe atyo, abaasigalagho baakyuka baira y'ali beenenia, baatoolera okumusinza n'omwoyo mulala." 
Psalms78:35 Baidhukira nga Katonda n'abakuuma era baidhukira ng'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene n'abanunula. 
Psalms78:36 Aye ebibono byaibwe byali bya kumusuutiriza busuutirize na munwa, nga bye boogera buguya bwereere." 
Psalms78:37 Baali nga tibasobola kugumira ku Katonda, era nga tibatuukiriza ebyo ebiri mu ndagaano ye." 
Psalms78:38 Aye Katonda olw'okuba n'okusaasira okungi einho, yaabasonigha okwonoona kwaibwe, yaaloba kubazikiriza kubamalagho. Emikuzi kamaala ng'afuga obusungu, yaamira ekiruyi kye" 
Psalms78:39 ng'aidhukira bwe bali abantu obuntu abafa, abali ng'oti mpewo efuuwa n'ebulagho." 
Psalms78:40 Emikuzi kamaala baamudheemeranga eyo mu irungu baamusungughazanga inho. 
Psalms78:41 Baamulebanga emikuzi kamaala, baamusonsoonia Oyo Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli." 
Psalms78:42 Beerabira obuyinza bw'ali nabwo beerabira n'olunaku lwe yabawonia abazigu baibwe," 
Psalms78:43 ng'akola eby'amaani era n'ebyewuunhio, eyo mu biketezo eby'e Zoani mu nsi Misiri." 
Psalms78:44 Yafuusa amaadhi ag'omu miiga gyaibwe gaafuuka musaayi Abamisiri baabula amaadhi ag'okunhwa. 
Psalms78:45 Yabasindikira ebikuukuulu by'ensowera ebyabaluma ni bibadaazadaaza, n'ebikere ebyaitaitana ensi yaibwe." 
Psalms78:46 Yaasindika ebisiisa mu nimiro dhaibwe, byalya ebirime ebyava mu maani gaibwe." 
Psalms78:47 Yazikiriza emizabbibu gyaibwe n'omugozi, era yaazikiriza emitiini gyaibwe emisikamore n'ekiinhogogo." 
Psalms78:48 Yaita ente dhaibwe n'omugozi yaita n'ebyayo byaibwe ebindi n'olukuba. 
Psalms78:49 Abantu abo yabamaliraku obusungu bwe nga yeesiniirwa ekibitiriire. Obusungu bwe obwo bwali ng'oti n'ekikunsu kya bamalaika be, abazikiriza." 
Psalms78:50 Tiyalobera busungu bwe kubaakiraku waire okubasaasira balobe kufa, aye yabasindikira kawumpuli yaabaita." 
Psalms78:51 Katonda yaita abaana ab'Abamisiri abalenzi ababeri boonaboona, ab'amaani, abasooka mu kiisi ndhu ya Hamu." 
Psalms78:52 Agho yaakulemberamu abantu be okubatoola mu Misiri ng'omwayi bw'akulemberamu entaama dhe, yaababisa mu irungu ng'omwayi bw'atambuza ebyayo bye." 
Psalms78:53 Yabatambuza n'emiraala nga bazira kye batya mu ngira. Aye abazigu baibwe enhandha yaabamira baafa. 
Psalms78:54 Agho yaabatuusa mu nsi ye entukuvu ku lusozi mwene lwe yabingaku abantu n'amaani ge. 
Psalms78:55 Kiisi ghe baatuukanga, yaabingangagho abatyamye baagho ensi yaibwe yaagigabania mu bika bya Isiraeli, n'amaka gaibwe yaagagha abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
Psalms78:56 Aye baaleba Katonda era baamudheemera oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene baaloba kugondera biragiro bye," 
Psalms78:57 baamughemukira ng'oti ni badhaadha baibwe bwe baalekera okuba abeesigwa nga tibeesigika ng'oti n'akalaso akeghetamu. 
Psalms78:58 Basonsoonia Katonda baamusungughaza olw'ebifo byaibwe ebigulumivu bye baasinzizangamu era baamuleetera okuba n'enkikidi olw'ebifaananie ebibaadhe bye baasinzanga. 
Psalms78:59 Katonda bwe yabona ebyo yaidhula ekiruyi, era yaabatooleraku irala omwoyo." 
Psalms78:60 Yaalekulira agho weema ye eyali mu Shilo mwe yabanga ng'ali mu bantu be abo. 
Psalms78:61 Yaaleka abazigu baanhaga Sanduuku y'Endagaano akamanhiso ke ak'obukumu n'ekitiisa. 
Psalms78:62 Yasungughalira abantu abo ababe ku bubwe, yaaleka abazigu baibwe baabaita." 
Psalms78:63 Olutalo lwabalyaku abaana baibwe abaakaisuka, era abaguna baibwe baabula ab'okubabayiza." 
Psalms78:64 Bakabona baibwe baabaita n'empiima, era banamwandu baibwe baabalobera okubalira." 
Psalms78:65 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaazuuka ng'oti n'ava mu ndoolo, era ng'oti n'omuntu ow'amaani asuuyiriire olw'okunhwa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
Psalms78:66 Yairirizaayo abazigu be ng'abaghangwire era nga baswaliire irala. 
Psalms78:67 Yaaboola baidhukulu ba Yosefu, yaaloba kulonda kika kya Efuraimu" 
Psalms78:68 aye yaalonda ekika kya Yuda, n'olusozi Sioni lw'agonza einho." 
Psalms78:69 Okwo kwe yazimba eisinzizo lye eireeyi okutuuka ku igulu yaaligumya ng'oti n'ensi etawaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Psalms78:70 Yalonda omugheereza we Daudi, yaamutoola mu byayiro eby'entaama," 
Psalms78:71 eyo ye yalinga ng'ayaya entaama edhonsa yaamuleeta alabirirenga abantu ba Katonda Abaisiraeli. 
Psalms78:72 Era Daudi oyo yeeghaayo okubalabirira n'omwoyo mulala, ng'abafuga n'amagezi." 
Psalms79:1 Wo Katonda, abantu abatakutya bakwingiriire mu nsi yo, baayonoona eisinzizo lyo eitukuvu, baaleka ekibuga Yerusalemu nga bakizikiriiza." 
Psalms79:2 Emirambo egy'abagheereza bo bagirekeire nhonhi kulya, emirambo egy'abantu bo abakutya baagigabwire nsolo dha mu nsiko." 
Psalms79:3 Bayuye omusaayi gw'abantu bo ng'oti n'abayugha amaadhi obuudhi, gwakuuluula ng'oti maadhi mu Yerusalemu mwonamwona, ghaaloba kusigalagho waire omuntu omulala aziika abafu." 
Psalms79:4 Tufuuse ekivume eri amaghanga agatuliiraine, era batuyeeyereza bwe batusekerera." 
Psalms79:5 Wo Musengwa Katonda, oja kutusungughalira kutuusa li? Byanda na byanda? Enkikidi y'oli nayo olw'abantu bo eneeyongera kwaka bwake ng'oti muliro?" 
Psalms79:6 Kyukiza obusungu bwo ku maghanga agatakutya, ni ku bwakyabazinga obutakusinza;" 
Psalms79:7 kuba bamazeegho abantu bo okwita, baaleetera ensi yo okufafaagana." 
Psalms79:8 Otatubonereza lwa bibi bya badhaadha baife, aye yangughaku otwoleke okusaasira kwo, kuba tuwoiremu amaani." 
Psalms79:9 Wo Katonda waife omuzaawuzi, tubeere ku lw'ekitiisa eky'eriina lyo, otuwonie era otusonighe ebibi byaife, ku lw'obulungi obw'eriina lyo." 
Psalms79:10 Lwaki oleka amaghanga okutubuuza gati: “Memale Katonda waimwe ali gha?” Iwe beesasuulizeeku nga tubona, olw'omusaayi ogw'abagheereza bo be baita n'amaghanga goonagoona gakimanhe." 
Psalms79:11 Wulirisa okusinda kw'abasibe, okozese obuyinza bwo owonie abo abasalirwa ogw'okufa." 
Psalms79:12 Weesasuulize ku maghanga ago agatuliiraine emikuzi musanvu, olw'okukuyeeyereza kwonakwona kwe babairenga bakola." 
Psalms79:13 Olwo ife abantu bo, entaama dho dh'oyaya, twidha kukusiimanga ebyanda n'ebyanda, era tukusaakenga mu nse n'ense." 
Psalms80:1 Wo Katonda tukusaba otuwulirise, iwe alabirira abantu ba Isiraeli ng'oti n'omwayi ow'entaama, era n'okuuma aba Yosefu ng'oti byayo byo. Iwe ali ku kityamo kyo eky'obwakyabazinga ekiri ku bitonde eby'amaghagha ebyetebwa bikerubi," 
Psalms80:2 weeyolekere abantu ba Efuraimu, n'aba Benjamini, n'aba Manasse. Situka n'amaani go oidhe otulokole." 
Psalms80:3 Wo Katonda waife, twirizeegho ensi yaife nga bwe yali. Tulingeku n'amaiso ag'ekisa era otulokole." 
Psalms80:4 Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, mbo onaasungughalira okusaba okw'abantu bo kutuuka li?" 
Psalms80:5 Mu kifo ky'emere otuleetera nnaku, mu kifo ky'amaadhi otugha kikopo kiidhuvu eky'amaziga." 
Psalms80:6 Oleka amaghanga agatuliiraine gaalwanira eitaka lyaife, abazigu baife baatusekerera." 
Psalms80:7 Wo Katonda Afuga Amagye, twirizeegho ensi yaife nga bwe yali. Tulingeku n'ekisa era otulokole." 
Psalms80:8 Watuleeta ng'omuzabbibu okuva mu Misiri, waabinga amaghanga agaali mu nsi eno, waagusimbamu." 
Psalms80:9 Waagulimaku, gwasimba emizi, gwabuna ensi." 
Psalms80:10 Ekinsense kyagwo kyaghemba ensozi, ensaga dhaagwo dhaaghemba n'emivule emikologho." 
Psalms80:11 Ensaga dhaagwo dhaaja dhaatuuka ku Nhandha Eyaghagati, era dhaatuuka ni ku mwiga Eufurate." 
Psalms80:12 Kale lwaki wamenha olugo lwe wagusitaku, n'oleka kiisi abitagho okunoga ebibala byagwo?" 
Psalms80:13 Embiidhi edh'omu nsiko dhaagutyankirira, na kiisi kya mu nsiko kyonakyona kyeriira okwo." 
Psalms80:14 Wo Katonda Afuga Amagye, kyusaamuuku. Ng'oli eyo mu igulu, linga ghansi otubone; labirira omuzabbibu guno," 
Psalms80:15 gwe wasimba iwe mwene, n'ogukuza nga gwa maani." 
Psalms80:16 Abazigu baife baagutema baagutaaku n'omuliro; bagwananga baazikirira ng'obalingiriire okubasalira omusango. 
Psalms80:17 Aye kuuma abantu bo be weerondera, olabirire eighanga lye wafuula ery'amaani." 
Psalms80:18 Tituja kwirayo kudaaliima kukuleka; tughe obulamu twidha kukusaakanga. 
Psalms80:19 Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, twirizeegho ensi yaife nga bwe yali. Tulingeku n'amaiso ag'ekisa era otulokole." 
Psalms81:1 Mwembere ghaigulu olwembo olusaaka Katonda oyo amaani gaife; mumukubire emizira oyo Katonda wa Yakobo. 
Psalms81:2 Mutoolere olwembo, ow'obugoma ateeku, memale ow'endingidi ewooma n'ow'entongooli beeyimbe okwo." 
Psalms81:3 Mufuuwe eigwala ku Kibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, ni ku lunaku lwe gutyaime ku ntebe." 
Psalms81:4 Ekyo kya iteeka mu Isiraeli, era kiragiro kya Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Eiteeka eryo yaliragira abantu ng'abita mu Yosefu, bweyaja okutanula olutalo ku Bamisiri. Mpulira amamiro g'omuntu ye ntaidhi nga gakoba gati:" 
Psalms81:6 “Nabatwikula emigugu naabawonia okubbeedanga ebizito. 
Psalms81:7 Bwe mwali mu buzibu mwansaba, era naabawonia, naabairamu nga neegisiisa mu kire eky'amaadhi n'olukuba, naabaleba nga muli ku maadhi ag'e Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Imwe abantu bange, mumpulire nga ndi kubalamba; iwe Isiraeli, ngoli ompulirisa kyandibaire kikalamu." 
Psalms81:9 Mutasinzanga katonda wundi okutoolaku nze Katonda zenka; mutakubiranga makiryaivu misambwa egisinzibwa abamaghanga agandi. 
Psalms81:10 Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, eyabatoola mu nsi ey'e Misiri. Bwe mwasama ndidha kubaliisa mwigute." 
Psalms81:11 Aye abantu bange baaloba okumpulira! Isiraeli yaaloba okukolagana ninze! 
Psalms81:12 Kale n'okubaleka bajiire ku ebyo emyoyo gyaibwe emidheemu bye gibalagira, beebise nga beene bwebalowooza." 
Psalms81:13 Kale ngoli abantu bange bampulira; kale ngoli Isiraeli ajiira ku bye mmukoba," 
Psalms81:14 nandyangwighe okulwanisa abazigu baibwe, naaghangula abo ababakyagha." 
Psalms81:15 Abo abankyagha nze Musengwa Katonda, bandiidhye ye ndi nga baavula bwavule, naababonereza ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms81:16 Aye imwe nandibaliisiisa engaano esinga bulungi, naabaigusa omudheenene ogw'endhuki ogw'omu nsiko.”" 
Psalms82:1 Katonda atyama mu kityamo kye mu lwekobaano olw'omu igulu; emisambwa gyesoloza yaagisalira omusango ati: 
Psalms82:2 “Mulituusa gha okusalirizanga emisango, n'okwekubiranga ku luuyi olw'abakozi b'ebibi?" 
Psalms82:3 Mukolerenga abaavu ni bamulekwa amazima; mukolerenga abali mu bwetaavu n'abanaku ekituufu kye bagwaniire. 
Psalms82:4 Mulwanirirenga abali mu bwetaavu n'abateesobola, mubawonienga abakozi b'ebibi obutabakola nga bwe benda." 
Psalms82:5 Muli na butamanha bwaga gha? Muli basiru ba nkula ki? Lwaki mukola eby'obukupya ebyereere? Abantu tibakaakola mazima mu nsi. 
Psalms82:6 Nkoba nti, ‘Muli bakatonda, mwenamwena muli baana ba oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene.’" 
Psalms82:7 Aye muja kuzikirira ng'abantu obuntu, era mugwe ng'oti n'omufuzi owundi yeenayeena.”" 
Psalms82:8 Wo Katonda, situkiramu ofuge ensi yo, kuba amaghanga goonagoona gago." 
Psalms83:1 Wo Katonda, otasirika busirike, waire okuba obwagho nga toli kufaayo." 
Psalms83:2 Bona, abazigu bo bali kwegugunga; abo abakukyagha bali kudheema." 
Psalms83:3 Bakola entegeka edh'okulumba abantu bo; era beeteesa bwe banaalumba abantu bo b'okuuma. 
Psalms83:4 Bakoba bati: “Ka tumalegho eighanga lya Isiraeli, ghabule aidhukira nga ghaalighooku eighanga eryetebwa Isiraeli.”" 
Psalms83:5 Bwenebwene beekobaana eky'okudheema, era beeyimba baakola endagaano ey'okukwesonsaaku." 
Psalms83:6 Abazigu abo ni bano: Abaedomu, Abaishimaeli, Abamoabu, Abahagari," 
Psalms83:7 Abagebali, Abammoni, Abamaleki, Abafilisiti n'Abatiro." 
Psalms83:8 N'Abassiria boona baabeeyimbyeku, bayambe abasaadha ab'amaani baidhukulu ba Loti." 
Psalms83:9 Aye iwe bakole kye wakola Abamidia, era kye wakola Sisera ni Yabini ku mwiga Kishoni," 
Psalms83:10 abaitirwa mu kibuga Endori, ni baba agho ku itaka ng'oti mmungo ya busa." 
Psalms83:11 Abafuzi baibwe bakole nga bwe wakola Orebu ni Zeebu, n'abakungu baibwe obakole nga bwe wakola Zeba ni Zalumunna." 
Psalms83:12 Abo n'abaakoba bati: “Ka twetwalire eitaka lya Katonda libe lyaife ku bwaife.” 
Psalms83:13 Wo Katonda wange, bafuule ng'oti n'enkungu eri kwezungululira mu mpewo ey'amaani, babe ng'oti n'omusinsi empewo gw'efuuwa ere." 
Psalms83:14 Ng'oluyiira bwerusenkeenha ekibira, n'enimi edh'omuliro ni dhikoleeza ensozi," 
Psalms83:15 weena otyo bw'obe obabingirire n'amaadhi agalimu kiwunga ow'amaani, obatiikize irala n'empewo ere yeene ezikiriza." 
Psalms83:16 Baswaze ebitoogerekeka, balwe eira baire y'oli iwe Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms83:17 Ensoni ka dhibagemenga era basoberwenga ebyanda n'ebyanda; bafe nga banhoomebwa. 
Psalms83:18 Ka bamanhe nga iwe wenka niiwe Musengwa Katonda, era nga niiwe oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene asinga ebintu byonabyona eby'oku nsi." 
Psalms84:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda iwe Afuga Amagye, eisinzizo lyo nga irungi!" 
Psalms84:2 Neegomba inho okuba mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda! Zeenazeena ndidhwire eisanhu, nga nhembera Katonda omulamu." 
Psalms84:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda iwe Afuga Amagye, mbo n'enkazaluya dhoona dhifuna agh'okusula, n'obumiini bwona bwezimbira ebisu mwe bukuumira obwana bwabwo agho okumpi ni alutaari dho, iwe Kyabazinga wange era Katonda wange." 
Psalms84:4 Ba nkabi abo ababa mu ndhu yo, nga buli kaakyeire bemba enhembo edhikusaaka." 
Psalms84:5 Ba nkabi abo abafuna amaani okuva y'eiwe, era ng'olugendo olw'okuja e Sioni lubali ku mwoyo." 
Psalms84:6 Bwe babita mu kiiko eky'e Baka, kifuukamu enhindo edhivaamu emiiga, amaadhi agasookereza okugwa gakiidhuza ebidiba." 
Psalms84:7 Bwe batambula baja nga bwe beeyongera okufuna amaani; balibona Katonda asinga bakatonda mu Sioni. 
Psalms84:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, wulirisa okusaba kwange. Ntegera kutu iwe Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Wo Katonda, gha kyabazinga enkabi oyo atulwanirira, saasira oyo ye wasiiga omuzigo." 
Psalms84:10 Okumala olunaku olulala mu isinzizo lyo, kusinga okumala enaku olukumi aghantu aghandi woonawoona. Mmala gaba mukuumi ku mulyango gw'endhu ya Katonda wange, ntabaire munda mwa ndhu dha bakozi ba bibi;" 
Psalms84:11 kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo n'endhuba etumuliikirira ye tuja era n'atuwonia ng'oti ngabo. Atusaasira era yaatugha ekitiisa. Abo abakola by'ayenda ghazira kirungi ky'abaima. 
Psalms84:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, nga beesiimye abakwesiga." 
Psalms85:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, wagonza inho ensi yo wairiza Yakobo obukombe." 
Psalms85:2 Wasonigha abantu bo ebibi byaibwe, waabasaasira olw'okwonoona kwaibwe." 
Psalms85:3 Walekera okubabaaku ekiruyi, waalekera okubasungughalira n'obusungu obungi." 
Psalms85:4 Wo Katonda iwe omulokozi waife, iramu okutugonza olekere agho okutusungughalira." 
Psalms85:5 Mbo bwene oja kutusungughalira byanda na byanda, obusungu bwo bugeme ni ku nse edhiriiragho?" 
Psalms85:6 Totwizeemu maani buyaaka, ife abantu bo tusagambenga olw'ebyo by'otukolera?" 
Psalms85:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, twoleke nga bw'otugonza obutalekera, era otuzaawule." 
Psalms85:8 Leka mpulire Musengwa Katonda ky'aja okukoba, kuba ndidhi aja kwogera ebituleetera emiraala ife abantu be abamutya, kasita tuba nga titwizeeyo mu bya kisiru." 
Psalms85:9 Mu butuufu bwene mwetegefu okulokola abo abamugha ekitiisa, olwo ekitiisa kye kibe nga kibonebwa mu nsi yaife." 
Psalms85:10 Okugonza okutakoma kwidha kwagaanana n'obwesigwa; ate obutuufu bunhwegeragane n'emiraala. 
Psalms85:11 Okwikiriza kwa Isiraeli kuja kusituka okuva mu nsi, ate obutukuvu bwa Katonda bulingirire ensi nga buli mu igulu." 
Psalms85:12 Bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda aidha kutugha ebirungi, ensi yaife ebale ebibala kyodo." 
Psalms85:13 Obutuufu bwa Musengwa Katonda bumukulemberamu, bwaja nga bukubira ebigere bye engira." 
Psalms86:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ntegera kutu owulire okusaba kwange, kuba ndi muntu mughafu era mwavu." 
Psalms86:2 Kuuma obulamu bwange, kuba nkutya; era omponie ebizibu nze omugheereza wo akwesiga. Niiwe Katonda wange." 
Psalms86:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkusaba ondhune kuba niiwe ye ndirira omusana n'obwire." 
Psalms86:4 Nze omugheereza wo mpa okuba omusangaavu, kuba niiwe ye nsinza." 
Psalms86:5 Wo Musengwa Katonda iwe oli mulungi, onsonigha era tolekera kugonza abo abakusinza." 
Psalms86:6 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ntegera kutu nga nkusaba; owulire okulira kwange nga nkweghemba okumbeera." 
Psalms86:7 Bwemba mu bizibu nkusaba, kuba iwe oiramu okusaba kwange." 
Psalms86:8 Mu bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi boonaboona ghazira ali ng'oti niiwe, era ghazira akola biri ng'oti n'ebibyo by'okola." 
Psalms86:9 Amaghanga goonagoona ge watonda, gaja kwidha gakukubire amakiryaivu, era gaatule ng'eriina lyo bwe liri ery'ekitiisa." 
Psalms86:10 Iwe oli mukologho, ni by'okola byewuunhisa; niiwe Katonda wenka." 
Psalms86:11 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ngalagira bwembe neebise, memale olwo ntambulirenga mu mazima go; era ondhegerese okukutyanga n'omwoyo mulala." 
Psalms86:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, nsiima inho n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona by'onkolera, era ndidha kughanga eriina lyo ekitiisa ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms86:13 Kuba ongonza inho obutalekera era wamponia okwikirira e magombe. 
Psalms86:14 Wo Katonda wange, abantu abeekuluntaza baneesimbyemu; ekikuukuulu ky'abantu abakambwe kyenda kundhita, era abantu abo tibakufaaku naire." 
Psalms86:15 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda, niiwe Katonda asaasira era agemerwa abantu ekivunika, olwagho okusungughala, ogonza abantu obutalekera era oli mwesigwa inho." 
Psalms86:16 Otankuba nkoone aye idha ondhune, ompe ku maani go nze omugheereza wo, era ondokole nze omwana w'omwiru wo omukazi." 
Psalms86:17 Nkolera ekinaayoleka nga bw'ongonza, olwo abo abankyagha baswale, okubona nga iwe Musengwa Katonda onhambye wandhizaamu amaani." 
Psalms87:1 Ku lusozi lwa Katonda olutukuvu n'okuli ekibuga kya Musengwa Katonda kye yazimba. 
Psalms87:2 Musengwa Katonda agonza Yerusalemu okusinga ebifo ebindi byonabyona ebiri mu Isiraeli. 
Psalms87:3 Iwe ekibuga kya Katonda, ebintu eby'ekitiibwa kamaala bikwogerwaku." 
Psalms87:4 Katonda akoba ati: “Mu bantu abantya n'omuli ab'e Rahabu, ab'e Babiloni, ab'e Filisitia, ab'e Tiro n'ab'e Ethiopia. Ndibabalira mu bazaale ab'e Yerusalemu.”" 
Psalms87:5 Sioni kiryogerwaku kiti: “Ono era n'ole, omwo mwe baazaalirwa”, kuba oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene n'alikizimba." 
Psalms87:6 Musengwa Katonda alikola enkalala edh'abantu, yaghandiikamu ati: “Ono yeena yazaalibwa omwo.”" 
Psalms87:7 Abembi n'abakini bakoba bati: “Mu Sioni n'omuva enkabi dhaife dhoonadhoona.” 
Psalms88:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, omusana nkulirira n'obwire naakweghemba oidhe ondokole." 
Psalms88:2 Wulirisa okusaba kwange, otege kutu owulire okulira kwange." 
Psalms88:3 Ebizibu bindhidhwire, ndi kumpi na kuja mu magombe." 
Psalms88:4 Mbalirwa mu abo ab'okwika e magombe; amaani gampoire. 
Psalms88:5 Ndi ng'oti n'ole ye balekuliire agho mu bafu; nkani ng'oti n'abaitiibwa abali mu magombe, oba ng'oti n'abo be weerabira eira b'otakaayamba." 
Psalms88:6 Wansuula mu magombe eyo ghansi einho era mu nzikiiza. 
Psalms88:7 Ekiruyi kyo kinzitooghereire, era kyambuutikira ng'oti n'amaadhi ag'enhandha ageekuluumulula." 
Psalms88:8 Ondeeteire ab'emikwano okuneesamba; wanfuula ekintu ekyenhinhalwa ye bali. Nsibiirwa aghantu ghe ntasobola waire okweiba. 
Psalms88:9 Amaiso gali kuunafugha olw'enaku. Buli kaakyeire nkweta iwe Musengwa Katonda, naasitulira emikono y'oli nga nkusaba." 
Psalms88:10 Abafu obakolera ebyewuunhio? Basobola okusituka baakusaaka? 
Psalms88:11 Okugonza kwo okutakoma basobola okukwogeraku eyo mu magombe, waire obwesigwa bwo okubwogeraku mu nsi eyo ey'abafu?" 
Psalms88:12 Ebyewuunhio byo babibona eyo mu nsi ey'enzikiiza, waire amaani go agalokola okugabona eyo mu nsi ey'abo abeerabirwa?" 
Psalms88:13 Wo Musengwa Katonda, aye nze nkulirira, era buli nkyo nkusaba." 
Psalms88:14 Wo Musengwa Katonda, lwaki onsuula ere n'oneerabira? Lwaki toyenda na kuuningaku?" 
Psalms88:15 Ndaazedaaze okuva mu buto era kata nfe. Onkoze ebitiisa kamaala, gampoire." 
Psalms88:16 Ekiruyi kyo kimbuutikiire kyanfuuta, n'okunkuba kwo okw'amaani kwanafuya." 
Psalms88:17 Ebyo bineezungulwire ng'oti mwidhuzo gwa maadhi olunaku lwonalwona, era bija nga biinumba okuva mu buli nsonda." 
Psalms88:18 Ondeeteire bakagwa bange abangonza einho okuneesamba, era buti enzikiiza ni munange yenka ye nasigaza." 
Psalms89:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndidha kwembanga okugonza kwo okutakoma ebyanda n'ebyanda era ndidha kukoberanga abantu ab'ense n'ense nga bw'oli omwesigwa." 
Psalms89:2 Okugonza kwo kwa kubaagho byanda na byanda, n'obwesigwa bwo bugumu begulugulu ng'oti igulu." 
Psalms89:3 Wakoba oti: “Nakola endagaano ni Daudi ye neerondera; era naasuubiza omugheereza wange oyo nti," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Baidhukulu bo n'abaja okutyamanga mu kityamo kyo nga bakyabazinga, era ni bonkabonka abanaafuganga ebyanda n'ebyanda.’ ”" 
Psalms89:5 Wo Musengwa Katonda, eby'omu igulu byonabyona ka bikusaake olw'ebyewuunhio by'okola; n'abatukuvu abatyama mu igulu ka bembe obwesigwa bwo," 
Psalms89:6 kuba bwene naani ku bali ghaigulu eyo ayaga ni Musengwa Katonda? Oba naani ku bali mu igulu ali ng'oti ni Musengwa Katonda? 
Psalms89:7 Niiwe Katonda atiibwa abatukuvu boonaboona abatyama mu igulu; era omukologho atiisa ebyo byonabyona ebimwezungulwire. 
Psalms89:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, naani ow'amaani ng'oti niiwe? Oli mwesigwa mu buli kintu." 
Psalms89:9 Niiwe ofuga okwefuukuula okw'enhandha, era bwe yeefuukuula ogiragira yaalaala." 
Psalms89:10 Watentena ogusota gu Rahabu waagwita; waabinga abazigu bo n'omukono gwo ogw'amaani, baasansaana." 
Psalms89:11 Eigulu liryo, n'ensi yiyo n'ebigirimu byonabyona, niiwe owabikola." 
Psalms89:12 Niiwe owatonda ebiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, n'ebiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. Ensozi Tabori ni Herimoni dhisaaka eriina lyo n'eisanhu." 
Psalms89:13 Oli wa buyinza bungi, oli wa maani inho atatuukikaku." 
Psalms89:14 Obwakyabazinga bwo bujiira ku kukola ebituufu n'okukola amazima; okugonza kwo okutakoma n'obwesigwa bwo byeyolekera mu buli ky'okola. 
Psalms89:15 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nga ba nkabi abo abakukubira emizira, ni batambula nga bagonzi y'oli." 
Psalms89:16 Ni basagamba olw'eriina lyo olunaku lwonalwona, nga bakusaaka ebitaloodheka olw'obutuufu bwo." 
Psalms89:17 Kuba niiwe otugha obughanguzi obutaloodheka; era olw'okutugonza waatugha okusagamba ng'abaghanguzi. 
Psalms89:18 Iwe Musengwa Katonda watulondera atukuuma ng'oti ngabo; iwe Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli waatugha kyabazinga owaife. 
Psalms89:19 Wabonekera abagheereza bo abeesigwa mu biseera eby'eira, waabakoba oti: “Ntaire omukono gwange ku mulwani ow'amaani okumubeera; ngulumiiza oyo ye nalonda mu bantu." 
Psalms89:20 Ntoire omugheereza wange Daudi naamufuula kyabazinga, nga mmusiiga omuzigo gwange omutukuvu." 
Psalms89:21 Ndidha kumughanga amaani gange buliidho; obuyinza bwange bwidha kumufuulanga ow'amaani. 
Psalms89:22 Abazigu be tibaja kumusinza magezi; ababi tibaja kumughangula. 
Psalms89:23 Nja kusaaniagho abazigu be ng'abona, ndhite n'abo boonaboona abamukyagha." 
Psalms89:24 Ndidha kubanga mwesigwa y'ali era mmugonzenga obutalekera. Ndidha kumugha okusagambanga ng'omughanguzi. 
Psalms89:25 Obwakyabazinga bwe ndibugaziya okuva ku Nhandha Eyaghagati okutuuka ku mwiga Eufurate. 
Psalms89:26 Daudi oyo aidha kundhetanga ati, ‘Niiwe Lata era niiwe Katonda wange; niiwe onkuuma era niiwe ondokola.’" 
Psalms89:27 Ndimufuula mutabane wange omuberi, kyabazinga omukologho asinga bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'oku nsi." 
Psalms89:28 Ndidha kumugonzanga obutalekera ebyanda n'ebyanda, n'endagaano yange naye eja kubangagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms89:29 Obwakyabazinga bwe ndidha kubufuula bwa nsikirano ebyanda n'ebyanda; buja kubaagho ekiseera kyonakyona eigulu kye lirimala nga lirigho. 
Psalms89:30 Aye baidhukulu be bwebanaalekangayo okuwulira amateeka gange, ni batajiira ku bye mbalagira," 
Psalms89:31 ni badobania bye mbeegeresa, era ni batakuuma biragiro byange," 
Psalms89:32 ndibabonereza olw'okwonoona kwaibwe, naabaleetera okudaagadaaga olw'ebibi byaibwe." 
Psalms89:33 Aye tirilekera kumugonza oba okulekera okuba omwesigwa y'ali. 
Psalms89:34 Tirimenha ndagaano yange naye, waire okukyusaamu ku bye namusuubiza." 
Psalms89:35 Mu butukuvu bwange neeyamye omukuzi mulala guti nga gumala: tija kusubagha Daudi naire. 
Psalms89:36 Olulyo lwe luja kubangagho ebyanda n'ebyanda, n'obwakyabazinga bwe bubeegho okutuusa endhuba bw'eriva ku nsi." 
Psalms89:37 Tibuja kuvaagho ng'oti n'omwezi bwe gutavaagho, era buja kuguma begulugulu ng'oti n'eigulu bwe liri.”" 
Psalms89:38 Aye kabiri mpegaano iwe Musengwa Katonda oswire ere omuntu ye wasiiga omuzigo era tokaamulaadha; oidhwire ekiruyi ku muntu ye walonda. 
Psalms89:39 Osaziizaamu endagaano yo n'omugheereza wo, n'engule ye waagifuuta mu itaka." 
Psalms89:40 Owomoirewomoire ebituli mu bimante bye, waamenhamenha ebifo bye eby'okwewogomamu." 
Psalms89:41 Buti ababise boonaboona bamumazeeku ebibye nga babinhaga; ab'oku muliinaano baamusekerera. 
Psalms89:42 Oghaire abazigu be obughanguzi; waaleetera abazigu be boonaboona okusagamba. 
Psalms89:43 Eby'okulwanisa bye obiitaitaine, waamuleka baamughangula mu lutalo." 
Psalms89:44 Omutoire mu ngalo omwigo gwe ogw'obufuzi, n'ekityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga waakisuula ku itaka." 
Psalms89:45 Omuleeteire okukairigha ng'akaali muto, waamuleetera okuswala einho." 
Psalms89:46 Wo Musengwa Katonda, oja kwegisa kutuusa li? Byanda na byanda? Ekiruyi kyo kija kulekera li okwaka ng'oti muliro?" 
Psalms89:47 Wo Musengwa Katonda, idhukira obulamu bwange nga bwe buli obumpi! Obulamu obw'abantu boonaboona muzira muganhulo!" 
Psalms89:48 Muntu ki asobola okuba omulamu n'atafa? Naani aghanga okwekuuma n'ataja mu magombe? 
Psalms89:49 Musengwa Katonda, okugonza kwo okutakoma okw'eira kwalaga gha? Ebyo bye wasuubiza Daudi byaja gha?" 
Psalms89:50 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bona nze omugheereza wo bwendhuuluusiibwa, abantu ni banvuma ebitakobeka." 
Psalms89:51 Wo Musengwa Katonda, abazigu bo batyo bwe bavuma oyo ye wasiiga omuzigo, batyo bwe bamuvuma buli gh'aniina ekigere." 
Psalms89:52 Musengwa Katonda asaakibwenga ebyanda n'ebyanda! Amiina era Amiina! 
Psalms90:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, okuva eira n'eira niiwe otukuuma." 
Psalms90:2 Ng'ensozi dhikaali kubaagho, era ng'okaali kutonda nsi n'ebirimu byonabyona, niiwe Katonda eyaligho, era alibaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms90:3 Iwe oizaayo omuntu mu nkungu mwe yakolebwa, ng'olagira oti: “Omwana w'omuntu irayo ye wava.”" 
Psalms90:4 Emyaka olukumi y'oli giri ng'oti n'olwaidho olwabise; oba ng'oti n'esaawa entono dhiti edhiwaaku amangu mu biseera eby'obwire. 
Psalms90:5 Osaaniagho obulamu bw'abantu, baabulagho mangu ng'oti kirooto; oba ng'oti n'eisubi erinhirira ku nkyo:" 
Psalms90:6 ku nkyo lisituka lyaboneka bukalamu, aye eigulo lyaniala lyafa." 
Psalms90:7 Iwe bw'osungughala, obusungu bwo butuzikiriza; ekiruyi kyo kyatutiisa twawaamu." 
Psalms90:8 Iwe obona ebibi byaife, ni bwebiba ebyo bye tukola mu ngiso." 
Psalms90:9 Obusungu bwo busala ku nnaku edh'obulamu bwaife; obulamu bwaife bwawaagho mangu geene. 
Psalms90:10 Emyaka gyaife egy'obughangaazi giri nsanvu, oba kinaana, bwe tuba abagumu. Aye ng'ate giidhwire okufaabiikana n'ebizibu kamaala, era giwaaku mangu twabulagho." 
Psalms90:11 Naani aidhi amaani g'obusungu bwo kye gasobola okukola? Era naani ategeera obusungu bwo nga bwe butiisa? 
Psalms90:12 Tukusaba otwegerese okumanha obulamu bwaife nga bwe buli obumpi, tusobole okufuna amagezi." 
Psalms90:13 Wo Musengwa Katonda, oja kusungughala kutuusa li? Twiriremu ife abagheereza bo otusaasire." 
Psalms90:14 Twidhuzenga okugonza kwo okutakoma buli nkyo, olwo tusobole okusagambanga nga tuli basangaavu obulamu bwaife bwonabwona." 
Psalms90:15 Tughe okusanhuka einho tusobole okwesasuuza olw'enaku kamaala dhe watulumya, n'olw'emyaka kamaala gye twabeera mu bizibu." 
Psalms90:16 Yoleka abagheereza bo eby'amaani by'okola; oyoleke n'abaidhukulu baibwe obukumu bwo obw'ekitiisa. 
Psalms90:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, tukusaba enkabi dho dhibenga n'ife, kiisi kye tugemaku kitujiirenga bukalamu bwenebwene ghabule ekitulema." 
Psalms91:1 Omuntu asula mu ndhu y'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, n'akuumibwa oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona," 
Psalms91:2 alikoba Musengwa Katonda ati: “Niiwe onkuuma, niiwe ekifo kyange oky'okwewogomamu. Niiwe Katonda wange ye neesiga.”" 
Psalms91:3 Katonda aidha kukuwonianga emitego gye bakutega, era akuwonienga n'endwaire edhiita." 
Psalms91:4 Aidha kukughembaku n'amaghagha ge ghabulenga ekikutuukaku, akukuumenga olw'obwesigwa bwe ng'akulwanirira." 
Psalms91:5 Ghazira kinaakutiisanga obwire, waire ebizibu okukutiisa omusana." 
Psalms91:6 Olumbe olukunkuna mu nzikiiza tiruukutiisenga, waire namuzisa okukwita omusana." 
Psalms91:7 Abantu olukumi basobola okwitibwa baagwa ku luuyi lwo olundi, ate omutwalo baagwa ku mukono gwo omusaadha, aye iwe akabi tikalikutuukaku." 
Psalms91:8 Iwe olitaagho bwa maiso, waabona abakozi b'ebibi nga bwebabonerezebwa." 
Psalms91:9 Olw'okuba iwe weesize Musengwa Katonda, era waatwala oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene okuba omukuumi wo," 
Psalms91:10 ghazira kibi kija kukutuukaku, waire ekiinoino kyonakyona okuseeta okumpi n'endhu yo;" 
Psalms91:11 kuba aliragira bamalaika be baakulabirira, nga baakukuuma buli gh'oja." 
Psalms91:12 Balikulera mu ngalo dhaibwe olobe kwekonta kigere ku ibaale. 
Psalms91:13 Olibita ghagati mu nsolo enkambwe, era waaniinirira emisota egy'obusagwa." 
Psalms91:14 Kuba Katonda akoba ati: “Ndidha kumutoola aghazibu olw'okuba angonza inho, era ndidha kumukuumanga olw'okuba ayatula eriina lyange, yaalisaaka." 
Psalms91:15 Bw'anandhetanga ndidha kumuvugiranga; ndidha kubanga ghalala naye mu buli kizibu. Mmuwonienga ebimunhigiriza, era mmugheesenga ekitiisa." 
Psalms91:16 Ndidha kumughangaaza inho era mmulokole.” 
Psalms92:1 Kigwaine okukusiima by'okola, iwe Musengwa Katonda! Kigwaine okwemba enhembo edhisaaka eriina lyo, iwe Ali Ghaigulu Yeene!" 
Psalms92:2 Era kigwaine buli nkyo okukoberanga abantu nga bw'obagonza obutalekera, na buli igulo okubamanhisanga nga bw'oli omwesigwa;" 
Psalms92:3 eno nga bwe tukuuta endingidi era nga bwetusuna ebivuga eby'enkosi ebindi. 
Psalms92:4 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nasangaala inho olw'ebyo eby'amaani bye wakola; naayemba n'eisanhu olw'ebyo bye wakola n'engalo dho." 
Psalms92:5 Wo Musengwa Katonda, by'okola byewuninkiriza! Ebidhuubo byo biswikiriire inho okutegeera okw'omuntu!" 
Psalms92:6 Omudoofu tasobola kumanha kino, n'omusiru taghanga kukitegeera," 
Psalms92:7 ati waire ababi bamera ng'oti isubi, abakozi b'ebibi kiisi kye bakola ni kibalamira, baategekerwa kuzikirira okw'olubeerera." 
Psalms92:8 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda niiwe ofuga ebintu byonabyona ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Psalms92:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ife twidhi ng'abazigu bo baja kuzikirira, abakozi b'ebibi boonaboona baja kusasika." 
Psalms92:10 Aye nze ompaire amaani ng'oti ga mbogo nume, wansiiga omuzigo." 
Psalms92:11 Mboine n'amaiso gange okugwa okw'abazigu bange, era naawulira n'amatu gange okulira okw'ababi abo abaanumbagana." 
Psalms92:12 Abatuufu baja kweyongeranga okuba obulungi ng'oti n'omuti omunaazi, era bakule ng'oti n'emivule egy'e Lebanoni." 
Psalms92:13 Bali ng'oti n'emiti egyasimbwa mu ndhu ya Musengwa Katonda, era bakula bukalamu mu isinzizo lya Katonda waife." 
Psalms92:14 Waire bakaire aye bakaabala ebibala, era bakaali bagimu ababoneka obukalamu." 
Psalms92:15 Kino kyoleka nga Musengwa Katonda bw'aziramu kwekubira, oyo n'ankuuma, era aziramu bukyamu bwonabwona." 
Psalms93:1 Musengwa Katonda ni Kyabazinga ali n'ekitiisa n'amaani. Ensi kyeva n'eba engumu mu kifo kyayo, ni ghabula ekisobola okugiseseetula." 
Psalms93:2 Wo Musengwa Katonda, okuva eira n'eira ekityamo kyo eky'obwakyabazinga kigumu begulugulu, era iwe oligho lubeerera." 
Psalms93:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, omwidhuzo gw'amaadhi gusitwike n'empiriito, geefuukuula era gaayira." 
Psalms93:4 Musengwa Katonda wa maani, azira kimusinga! Wa maani okusinga empiriito ey'amaadhi amangi, era wa maani okusinga okwefuukuula okw'enhandha okw'amaani." 
Psalms93:5 Wo Musengwa Katonda, amateeka go geesigika era bwenebwene esinzizo lyo itukuvu ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms94:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe Katonda abonereza nga weesasuuza, idha oyoleke obusungu bwo." 
Psalms94:2 Situkiramu, niiwe asalira ensi emisango, abo abeebona nga ba ghaigulu obasasule ekyo ekibagwaniire." 
Psalms94:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ababi balituusa li, bwenebwene balituusa li okweyagala?" 
Psalms94:4 Ababi boonaboona beesaaka olw'ebikolwa byaibwe ebibi bye bakola. 
Psalms94:5 Banhigiriza abantu bo, baadaazadaaza eighanga lyo lye weerondera." 
Psalms94:6 Baita banamwandu ni bamulekwa, era baatemula abasenze be tusenza mu nsi yaife." 
Psalms94:7 Bakoba mule bati: “Musengwa Katonda tatubona. Katonda wa Yakobo tafaayo.” 
Psalms94:8 Mulitegeera li imwe abadoofu abasembayo? Mulibaamuuku li ku magezi imwe abasiru? 
Psalms94:9 Katonda oyo eyakola kutu asobola atya obutawulira? Oyo eyatonda eriiso aghanga atya obutabona? 
Psalms94:10 Oyo akangaivula amaghanga agandi, taababonereze? Oyo ayegeresa abantu okumanha, asobola atya obutamanha?" 
Psalms94:11 Musengwa Katonda aidhi ebidhuubo eby'abantu, era aidhi nga tibigasa." 
Psalms94:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nga wa nkabi omuntu y'okangaivula, oyo y'oyegeresa amateeka go." 
Psalms94:13 Iwe omugha okuwuumulaku ebizibu, okutuusa lw'obonereza ababi." 
Psalms94:14 Musengwa Katonda taja kusuulirira bantu be; taja kulekulira agho ighanga lye yeerondera. 
Psalms94:15 Balisalanga emisango mu butuufu, abo abatya Katonda baajiiranga ku bisaliibwagho." 
Psalms94:16 Naani eyambeeraku ng'ababi abo bantanwireku olutalo? Oba naani eyayemerera ku luuyi lwange ng'abakozi b'ebibi baanumbye? 
Psalms94:17 Ngoli Musengwa Katonda tiyandhuna, ngoli nze naja ira mu nsi ey'abafu." 
Psalms94:18 Bwe nayana nti: “Ndi kutyerera,” iwe Musengwa Katonda wangemerera olw'okuba ongonza obutalekera." 
Psalms94:19 Buli lwemba n'ebineeraliikiriza, ongumya wandeetera okusangaala." 
Psalms94:20 Iwe tosobola kuba ku luuyi lwa bafuzi babi, abafuulania amateeka, ekibi ni bakyeta ekirungi." 
Psalms94:21 Beeteesa okulumba abantu abalungi, baasalira abantu ogw'okufa abaziraku musango." 
Psalms94:22 Aye nze, Musengwa Katonda n'obulumukiro bwange, era ni Katonda wange ambudamya mu biseera ebizibu." 
Psalms94:23 Abo aidha kubabonereza olw'obubi bwaibwe, era aidha kubazikiriza olw'okwonoona kwaibwe; bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda aja kubasaaniagho." 
Psalms95:1 Mwenamwena mwidhe twembere Musengwa Katonda, mwidhe tumukubire emizira oyo omukuumi era omulokozi waife!" 
Psalms95:2 Ka tuje y'ali tumusiime tumukubire emizira nga twemba n'enhembo edh'okumusaaka; 
Psalms95:3 kuba Musengwa Katonda ni Katonda mwene omukologho, era ni Kyabazinga omukologho asinga bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi." 
Psalms95:4 Oyo n'afuga ebiiko ebiri ku nsi n'ensozi endeeyiriri dhoona dhidhe. 
Psalms95:5 Enhandha yiye kuba n'eyagikola, n'obukalu n'eyabutaagho n'engalo dhe." 
Psalms95:6 Mwidhe tumusinze nga twewombeese, tumukubire amakiryaivu oyo Musengwa Katonda, Omutonzi waife."
