Psalms95:7 Oyo ni Katonda waife, ife tuli bantu be b'alabirira, era tuli ntaama dhe dh'ayaya. Kale ngoli ni olwaleero muwulira ky'akoba!" 
Psalms95:8 Akoba ati: “Mulekere agho okukalangusa emyoyo gyaimwe nga badhaadha baimwe bwe baakola nga bali e Meriba. Ku lunaku olwo nga bali e Massa mu irungu," 
Psalms95:9 bandeba era bankemenkereza, waire nga baali bamaze okubona bye nabakolera." 
Psalms95:10 Abantu abo baamala emyaka amakumi ana (40) nga banguuda ku mwoyo, bansina. Naakoba nti, ‘Abantu bano badheemu okuviira irala mu myoyo gyaibwe, era amateeka gange tibagajiiraku naire.’" 
Psalms95:11 Kyenava ni ndayira mu busungu nti, ‘Tija kubaganha kutuuka ghe nali nja okubagheera okuwuumula.’ ”" 
Psalms96:1 Mwenamwena mwembere Musengwa Katonda olwembo oluyaaka, ensi yoonayoona k'eyembere Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms96:2 Mwembere Musengwa Katonda mumusaake, mukoberenga abantu buli kaakyeire nga bwe yatulokola." 
Psalms96:3 Mumanhise ensi dhoonadhoona nga bw'ali ow'ekitiisa, abantu boonaboona bamanhe nga bw'akola eby'amaani." 
Psalms96:4 Musengwa Katonda mukologho era ni yenka agwaine okusinzibwa. Oyo n'ali n'okutiibwa okusinga bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi boonaboona; 
Psalms96:5 kuba bakatonda boonaboona ab'amaghanga agandi, bintu buntu ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, aye Musengwa Katonda n'eyakola eigulu." 
Psalms96:6 Aidhwire ekitiisa era mufuzi; mu kifo kye ekitukuvu mwidhwire ebyoleka nga wa maani era nga mulungi. 
Psalms96:7 Imwe abantu ab'ensi dhoonadhoona mwatule Musengwa Katonda; mwatule Musengwa Katonda nga bw'ali ow'ekitiisa era ow'obukumu. 
Psalms96:8 Mwatule eriina lya Musengwa Katonda nga bwe liri n'ekitiisa; mwidhe ku mpya dhe nga mumuleetera ebigheebwayo. 
Psalms96:9 Musinze Musengwa Katonda ng'aboneike mu butukuvu bwe; imwe mwenamwena ab'oku nsi mumutye mu maiso ge. 
Psalms96:10 Mukobere amaghanga goonagoona muti: “Musengwa Katonda ni Kyabazinga! Ensi kyeva n'eba engumu mu kifo kyayo, ni ghabula ekisobola okugiseseetula. Aja kusalira abantu omusango nga tasaliriza.”" 
Psalms96:11 Eigulu ka lisangaale n'ensi esagambe, enhandha k'ewolome n'ebirimu byonabyona olw'eisanhu." 
Psalms96:12 Enimiro n'ebidhirimu byonabyona ka bisangaale, olwo emiti gyonagyona egy'omu kibira gyembe n'eisanhu," 
Psalms96:13 byonabyona nga biri mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ali kwidha. Aidha kusalira ensi omusango mu butuufu, ni mu mazima nga tasaliriza." 
Psalms97:1 Musengwa Katonda ni Kyabazinga, ensi yoonayoona k'esagambe, n'ebiketezo eby'oku nhandha eby'okumpi n'eghala bisangaale." 
Psalms97:2 Ali ghagati mu bire n'enzikiiza eri bedimudimu, afuga mu butuufu ng'akolera ku mazima." 
Psalms97:3 Akulembezaamu omuliro, gwaja nga gwokyayokya abazigu be abamwezungulwire." 
Psalms97:4 Olukuba lwe lumyansa lwamulisa ensi; ensi yaalubona yaatengeeta. 
Psalms97:5 Ensozi dhisaanuuka ng'oti muzigo aghaba Musengwa Katonda, oyo Musengwa Katonda afuga ensi yoonayoona." 
Psalms97:6 Eby'omu igulu birangirira nga bw'ali omutuufu, abantu b'ensi dhoonadhoona baabona ekitiisa kye." 
Psalms97:7 Abo boonaboona abasinza ebitali Katonda, ni beesaaka olw'okwesiga ebifaananie obufaananie ebyo ebiziramu na muganhulo, baswazibwa; kuba ebyo byonabyona bimukubira amakiryaivu." 
Psalms97:8 Ab'e Sioni bawulira era baasangaala, n'ab'omu bibuga bya Buyudaaya basagamba olw'ensala yo iwe Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms97:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe oli ghaigulu yeene, ofuga ebintu byonabyona eby'oku nsi; oli mukologho okusinga bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi boonaboona." 
Psalms97:10 Musengwa Katonda agonza abo abakyagha ebibi; yaakuuma abantu be abamutya; era yaabatoola mu buyinza obw'ababi, yaabawonia." 
Psalms97:11 Obutangaavu bwakira abatuufu, n'eisanhu lyaidhira abo abagondera ebiragiro bya Katonda." 
Psalms97:12 Imwe abatuufu, musagambe olw'ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'akola era mumusiimenga." 
Psalms98:1 Mwenamwena mwembere Musengwa Katonda olwembo oluyaaka, kuba akoze ebyewuunhisa! Olw'obutukuvu bwe ayoleike ng'ali n'obuyinza n'amaani, ebimuleeteire obughanguzi." 
Psalms98:2 Musengwa Katonda amanhiisa ensi yoonayoona obughanguzi bwe, yaayoleka ensi dhoonadhoona obukumu bwe obuwonia." 
Psalms98:3 Yakuuma ekisuubizo, kye yasuubiza endhu ya Isiraeli, eky'okubagonzanga obutalekera n'okubanga omwesigwa ye bali. Okuva ensi y'eva okutuuka y'ekanga, abantu boonaboona baabona obughanguzi bwa Katonda waife obulokola." 
Psalms98:4 Abantu mwenamwena ab'oku nsi mukubire Musengwa Katonda emizira; mutimbuke mu mwembere enhembo edh'eisanhu edhisaaka! 
Psalms98:5 Mwembe enhembo edhisaaka Musengwa Katonda, mumukubire enhembo ku ndingidi." 
Psalms98:6 Mufuuwe amagwala n'endeka! Mukubire Musengwa Katonda emizira, oyo Kyabazinga waife." 
Psalms98:7 Enhandha k'ewolome n'ebirimu byonabyona olw'eisanhu; n'ensi eyembe n'ebigiriku byonabyona. 
Psalms98:8 Omwidhuzo gw'amaadhi ka gukube mu ngalo; n'ensozi dhembere ghalala n'eisanhu mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda," 
Psalms98:9 kuba ali kwidha okusalira ensi omusango mu butuufu. Aidha kufuga abantu boonaboona, ng'akolera ku mazima." 
Psalms99:1 Musengwa Katonda ni Kyabazinga; abantu ka badhugumire olw'okumutya! Ekityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga kiri ku bitonde eby'amaghagha ebyetebwa bikerubi, ensi k'etengeete olw'okumutya." 
Psalms99:2 Musengwa Katonda mukologho mu Sioni; atiibwa ensi dhoonadhoona. 
Psalms99:3 Abantu boonaboona ka basaake eriina lye eikulu eritiibwa, kuba mutukuvu!" 
Psalms99:4 Iwe Kyabazinga ow'amaani, toyenda kusaliriza, wataagho ensala ejiira ku mazima, era waaleetagho obutuufu mu Isiraeli." 
Psalms99:5 Musaake Musengwa Katonda waife, mumusinze nga muli mu maiso ag'ekityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, kuba mutukuvu!" 
Psalms99:6 Musa ni Aaroni baali bakabona be, ate Samueli yaaba owundi ku abo abaamusabanga. Abantu abo baaliriranga Musengwa Katonda, yaabaghanga kye baamusabanga." 
Psalms99:7 Yayogeranga nabo ng'ali mu kire ekyesimbanga oti mpango, baagemanga kiisi kye yabakobanga; baagonderanga amateeka, ge yabaghanga." 
Psalms99:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, abantu bo wabaghanga bye baakusabanga, waabasonighanga bye baakusobyanga, waire nga wababonerezanga olw'ebibi byaibwe." 
Psalms99:9 Musaake Musengwa Katonda waife, mumusinze nga muli ku lusozi lwe olutukuvu; kuba Musengwa Katonda waife mutukuvu." 
Psalms100:1 Abantu mwenamwena ab'ensi mukubire Musengwa Katonda emizira. 
Psalms100:2 Mwidhe y'ali nga mwemba mumusinze nga muli basangaavu. 
Psalms100:3 Mukitegeere muti Musengwa Katonda oyo ni Katonda. Oyo n'eyatutonda era tuli babe. Tuli bantu be era ntaama dh'alabirira. 
Psalms100:4 Mungire mu miryango gy'eisinzizo lye nga mumusiima, mutuuke ku mpya dhe nga mumusaaka. Mumusiime era musaake eriina lye," 
Psalms100:5 kuba Musengwa Katonda mulungi okugonza kwe tikukoma kubaagho byanda na byanda, n'obwesigwa bwe buligho eri ense n'ense edh'abantu." 
Psalms101:1 Ka nhembe ku bwesigwa ni ku nsala ey'amazima nga nhembera iwe Musengwa Katonda. 
Psalms101:2 Ndidha kwebisanga mu ngeri etandeetere kwogerwaku. Oliidhaku li ye mba? Ndidha kubanga mwesigwa okuviira irala mu ndhu yange. 
Psalms101:3 Tija kuganhanga kwereeterezaaku kintu kyonakyona kibi. Nkyaghira irala ebikolwa by'abo abava ku Katonda. Tija kukolagananga nabo naire. 
Psalms101:4 Tija kwereeterezangaku buguya, era ndidha kwesambiranga irala ekibi." 
Psalms101:5 Nja kuzikirizanga omuntu yeenayeena ageya mwine, era tija kuguminkiriza muntu eyeekulumbaza era eyeesaakiriza." 
Psalms101:6 Abo abeesigwa baidha kubanga bagonzi ye ndi, era baidha kubanga ghalala ninze. Ate abo ab'empisa enkalamu baidha kubanga bagheereza bange." 
Psalms101:7 Tija kuganha muntu muguya kubanga mu ndhu yange; n'oyo asalira baine enkwe ndidha kumubinganga ghe ndi. 
Psalms101:8 Buli lunaku ndidha kuzikirizanga abakozi b'ebibi mu nsi, ndekeze ababi okubanga mu kibuga kya Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms102:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndhiraamu okusaba kwange, owulire okulira kwange." 
Psalms102:2 Bwembanga mu buzibu otandekuliranga bw'agho. Wuliranga kye nkoba, oyangughengaku okumbeera nga nkwese." 
Psalms102:3 Obulamu bwange buwaagho ng'oti mwosi; n'amagumba gange gaaya omuliro ng'oti gwa mu luyiira. 
Psalms102:4 Ndi muniavu ng'oti n'eisubi lye bakubye, era neerabira n'okulya emere." 
Psalms102:5 Olw'okuwowoola kwange okungi, nsigaire magumba meereere." 
Psalms102:6 Ndi ng'oti nhonhi ya mu irungu, era nfuuse ng'oti kiwigulu eky'omu mayumba agaavaamu abantu." 
Psalms102:7 Ni bwenambaala titenduka. Ndi ng'oti n'enhonhi eri yonka edaagira ku kasolya k'enhumba. 
Psalms102:8 Omusana n'obwire abazigu banvuma, era abo abanvumirira bakozesa eriina lyange nga bakolima banaibwe." 
Psalms102:9 Nsiiba mu ivu era n'eryanfuukira emere, ate mu buli kye nhwa mwetabulamu amaziga ge ndira." 
Psalms102:10 Olw'ekiruyi n'obusungu by'oli nabyo, wangema wansuula ere." 
Psalms102:11 Obulamu bwange buwaagho ng'oti n'ekinsense ekyeigulo ng'endhuba egwire. Ndi ng'oti isubi erikala ni liwaagho. 
Psalms102:12 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda oli kyabazinga ebyanda n'ebyanda era omanhiibwa abantu ab'ense n'ense. 
Psalms102:13 Olisitukiramu, waidha waagemerwa Sioni ekivunika; ekiseera kituuse eky'okulinga ku Sioni n'ekisa; eno n'esaawa entuufu." 
Psalms102:14 Abagheereza bo bagonza inho Sioni waire nga kyazikirizibwa; era bakirumirwa inho waire nga kyasigala bwa bifunfugu. 
Psalms102:15 Ensi dhoonadhoona dhija kutya eriina lya Musengwa Katonda; ni bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'oku nsi baja kutya ekitiisa kye. 
Psalms102:16 Musengwa Katonda bw'alizimba Sioni n'akiizaagho alyoleka ekitiisa kye. 
Psalms102:17 Aliwulira okusaba kw'abantu be abanaku, era yaawulirisa okweghemba kwaibwe." 
Psalms102:18 Bino ka bighandiikibwe, abaana ab'oluse oluliidha babisomeku, olwo abantu abakaali kuzaalibwa balisaaka Musengwa Katonda," 
Psalms102:19 bati: yali ghaigulu eyo mu kifo kye ekitukuvu yaalinga ghansi, Musengwa Katonda oyo yaba mu igulu yaalinga ghansi ku nsi." 
Psalms102:20 Yawulira okusinda okw'abasibe abali mu ikomera, yaasibula abo abaali balindiriire okwitibwa obwitibwe." 
Psalms102:21 Olwo abantu balimanhisa eriina lya Musengwa Katonda mu Sioni, baamusaaka mu Yerusalemu," 
Psalms102:22 ng'abantu beesoloiza okuva mu bwakyabazinga obw'endhawulo n'ensi edh'endhawulo, okusinza Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms102:23 Ansaze ku maani nga nkaali muto; akendeeziiza ku nnaku edh'obulamu bwange. 
Psalms102:24 Naakoba nti: “Wo Katonda wange, otantwala buti nga nkaali kukairigha, iwe ow'emyaka egitasalikaku ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Psalms102:25 Eira einho wataagho emisingi egy'ensi, n'eigulu lyona walikola na ngalo dho." 
Psalms102:26 Ebyo biidha kuwaagho, aye iwe oligho ekiseera kyonakyona; byonabyona birikairigha ng'oti kivaalo. Olibisuula ere ng'oti ngoye nkaire, byabulagho." 
Psalms102:27 Aye iwe osigala nga bw'oli era emyaka gyo tigisalikaku. 
Psalms102:28 Abaana b'abo abakutya baidha kubangagho ng'obakuuma, n'abaidhukulu baibwe boona baidha kubanga bagumu gh'oli." 
Psalms103:1 Ka nsaake Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona, na buli kitundu kya mubiri gwange kisaake eriina lye eitukuvu." 
Psalms103:2 Ka nsaake Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona, ndobe na kwerabira ebirungi byonabyona by'ankoleire." 
Psalms103:3 N'oyo asonigha okwonoona kwange kwonakwona, yaawonia endwaire dhange dhoonadhoona." 
Psalms103:4 Amponia okunserengeta e magombe, yangonza obutalekera n'okusaasira kwe okungi." 
Psalms103:5 Ampa buli kikalamu kye neetaaga mu bulamu bwange bwonabwona, naasigala nga ndi mugumu era wa maani ng'oti n'enkookooma." 
Psalms103:6 Musengwa Katonda asalagho mu butuufu, yaaleetera n'abazira bwogereso okusinga omusango, baakolerwa ebituufu bye bagwaniire." 
Psalms103:7 Yamanhisa Musa enkola ye, yaalaga Abaisiraeli ebikulu bye yakola." 
Psalms103:8 Musengwa Katonda asaasira era wa kivunika, alwagho okusungughala era yaagonza inho abantu obutalekera." 
Psalms103:9 Tajiirajiira inho ku muntu akoze kibi era tiyeegemerera. 
Psalms103:10 Tatubonereza nga bwe tugwaniire olw'ebibi bye tukola, waire okutusasula ekibonerezo ekituukana n'okwonoona kwaife." 
Psalms103:11 Ng'eigulu bwe liri eghala einho n'ensi, n'okugonza kwe eri abo abamutya kutyo ye kukoma okuba okungi." 
Psalms103:12 Ng'e buvandhuba bw'eri eghala einho n'e bugwandhuba, n'ebibi byaife atyo bw'abighereekereza, by'atuba ghala." 
Psalms103:13 Ng'omuzaire bw'aghembeera abaana be, ni Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'aghembeera abo abamutya." 
Psalms103:14 Aidhi bwe twawumbibwa; aidhukira nga tuli nkungu. 
Psalms103:15 Enaku edh'obulamu bw'omuntu ntono ng'oti n'eisubi lye dhimala. Omuntu akula bukalamu yaagimuka ng'oti kimuli kya mu nsiko," 
Psalms103:16 aye empewo olukifuuwaku nga kibulagho, nga ni ghe kyali tighakaamanhika naku." 
Psalms103:17 Aye abo abatya Musengwa Katonda, Musengwa Katonda oyo abagonza obutalekera ebyanda n'ebyanda. Obutukuvu bwe abwoleka ense n'ense," 
Psalms103:18 era yaabwoleka abo abakuuma endagaano, ni bagumira ku biragiro bye." 
Psalms103:19 Musengwa Katonda yata ekityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga mu igulu, yaakigumya, era ni kyabazinga afuga ebintu byonabyona." 
Psalms103:20 Musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe bamalaika be mwenamwena ab'amaani, abawulira ebiragiro bye era abagondera by'akoba." 
Psalms103:21 Musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe ab'omu igulu ab'amaani mwenamwena, imwe abagheereza be abakola by'ayenda." 
Psalms103:22 Musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe ebitonde bye mwenamwena, mu bifo yoonayoona y'afuga. Nze ka nsaake Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona." 
Psalms104:1 Ka nsaake Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona. Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, oli mukologho inho. Oidhwire ekitiisa n'obwakyabazinga," 
Psalms104:2 weebwika obutangaavu ng'oti kivaalo, era waayandhuluza eigulu ng'oti weema." 
Psalms104:3 Oba eyo ghaigulu ku maadhi, waavuga ebire ng'oti n'ekigaali kyo eky'omu lutalo, waajiira ku maghagha ag'empewo." 
Psalms104:4 Ofuula empewo okuba abakwenda bo, n'enimi edh'omuliro waadhifuula okuba abagheereza bo." 
Psalms104:5 Wataagho ensi ku misingi gyayo, yaaba nga tesobola kuseetuka." 
Psalms104:6 Waagighembaku amaadhi ag'enhandha gaaba ng'ekivaalo kyayo, amaadhi gaaba ghaigulu gh'ensozi." 
Psalms104:7 Bwe wagakaabukira gaalumukagho; bwegaawulira amamiro go ng'oli kutyabuka gaaswankukagho. 
Psalms104:8 Gaakuuluulira ghaigulu ku nsozi, ni ghansi mu biiko, okutuuka mu kifo kye wagategekera." 
Psalms104:9 Wataagho ensalosalo ye gatateekwa kubitaku galobe kwiramu kabiri kughemba ku nsi. 
Psalms104:10 Oleetera emiiga okutiiriika nga giva mu biiko, gyakuuluula nga gibita ghagati gh'ensozi." 
Psalms104:11 Olwo gyagha ensolo edh'omu nsiko edha buli ngeri amaadhi ag'okunhwa; endogoyi edh'omu nsiko dhaawona endiwo. 
Psalms104:12 Era agho gha miiga, enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga ghe dhikola ebisu, dhaayemba nga dhiri eyo mu nsaga edh'emiti." 
Psalms104:13 Ng'oli eyo ghaigulu y'oba, ofukirira ensozi amaadhi, ensi yeesiima n'ebibala ebiva mu ngalo dho." 
Psalms104:14 Okuza eisubi olw'ente okulya era waakuza ebirime eby'omuntu, omuntu asobole okufuna emere ku nsi." 
Psalms104:15 Afune n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogumusangaaza, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva ogumusanhusa, era afune n'emere emugha amaani mu mubiri." 
Psalms104:16 Emiti gya Musengwa Katonda gifuna amaadhi kamaala agagwa, era egyo nga n'emivule egy'e Lebanoni mwene gye yasimba." 
Psalms104:17 Omwo enhonhi mwe dhizimba ebisu byadho, ni sekanhulya ku miti emireeyiriri kw'akola ebisu." 
Psalms104:18 Mu nsozi endeeyiriri n'eba embuzi edh'omu nsiko, ate obuduuyu bwegisa mu gabaale." 
Psalms104:19 Wataagho omwezi okugereraku ebiseera eby'omwaka, n'endhuba yaamanha ekiseera kyayo eky'okugwa." 
Psalms104:20 Wakola enzikiiza ereetera obwire okuziba, ensolo dhoonadhoona edh'omu nsiko dhaatoolera okutambula." 
Psalms104:21 Empologoma ento dhaawologoma nga dhiri ku muyiigo, nga dhaagala eky'okulya Katonda ky'anaadhigha." 
Psalms104:22 Endhuba bw'evaayo dhiirayo, dhalambaala mu bifo bya dho." 
Psalms104:23 Abantu baaja ku mirimo gyaibwe, era baatakabana okutuusa bwebuziba." 
Psalms104:24 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nga wakola ebintu nga bya nsambo kamaala! Ate waabikola mu magezi amangi oti ki! Ensi eidhwire ebitonde byo." 
Psalms104:25 Enhandha yiire ogibona nga nkologho era nga ngazi inho. Eidhwire ebintu ebiramu ebitabalika, ebitono n'ebinene." 
Psalms104:26 Okwo n'okuseeyeeyeza emeeri, era omwo n'omuzaanhira ogusota ogwetebwa Leviathani." 
Psalms104:27 Bino byonabyona biringirira ku iwe okubigha emere yaabyo mu kiseera ekituufu. 
Psalms104:28 Bw'obigha nga bitoola; bw'obigha biiguta ghaabula ekisigala nga kikaayenda. 
Psalms104:29 Bw'otabifaaku biwaamu inho omwoyo; bw'obitoolamu omuuka gwo, olwo nga bifa, nga biirayo mu nkungu mwe by'ava." 
Psalms104:30 Aye bw'obigha omuuka gwo bitondebwa, n'ensi yaafuna obulamu obuyaaka." 
Psalms104:31 Ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda ka kibengagho ebyanda n'ebyanda, era kiisi Musengwa Katonda ky'akola kimuleeterenga okusangaala." 
Psalms104:32 Oyo alinga bulinge ku nsi yaadhugumira, ate yaagema bugeme ku nsozi dhaanioka omwosi." 
Psalms104:33 Nze ndidha kwemberanga Musengwa Katonda oyo obulamu bwange bwonabwona; nga nkaali mulamu tija kulekera kwemba nhembo dhisaaka Katonda wange oyo. 
Psalms104:34 Nsaba Musengwa Katonda asiime olwembo lwange, kuba okusagamba kwange kuva y'ali." 
Psalms104:35 Aye aboonooni bagwananga baazikirira baava ku nsi, n'abakozi ab'ebibi baabuliragho irala. Ka nsaake Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms105:1 Mwenamwena musiime Musengwa Katonda, musaake eriina lye; mumanhise amaghanga agandi ebyo bye yakola." 
Psalms105:2 Mumwembere nga mwemba enhembo edhimusaaka; nga mukobera abantu ebyewuunhisa byonabyona bye yakola. 
Psalms105:3 Muwulire okwesiima olw'eriina lye eitukuvu; abo abasinza Musengwa Katonda ka basagambe. 
Psalms105:4 Musabe Musengwa Katonda ababeerenga; mumusinzenga nga muli gh'ali ekiseera kyonakyona. 
Psalms105:5 Muteerabiranga ebyewuunhio, n'eby'amaani bye yakola era n'ensala ye yasalamu emisango," 
Psalms105:6 imwe abaana ba Aburahamu omugheereza we era baidhukulu ba Yakobo ye yeerondera. 
Psalms105:7 Oyo ni Musengwa Katonda waife, ebiragiro bye bikola mu nsi yoonayoona." 
Psalms105:8 Akuuma endagaano ebyanda n'ebyanda, yaagumira ku bye yasuubiza ni bweghabitagho ense olukumi." 
Psalms105:9 Akuuma endagaano ye yakola ni Aburahamu, n'ekisuubizo kye yasuubiza Isaaka nga yeerayirira." 
Psalms105:10 Endagaano eyo yagikola n'omugheereza we Yakobo, yaagitaagho ng'eiteeka era nga n'endagaano n'Abaisiraeli etaliwaagho," 
Psalms105:11 ng'akoba ati: “Ndibagha ensi Kanaani, yaaba yaimwe ku bwaimwe.”" 
Psalms105:12 Abantu ba Katonda baali bakaali batono abazira ghe baaga, era nga basenze busenze mu nsi eyo." 
Psalms105:13 Baatambulatambula eyo batyo baava mu nsi eyindi kabiri baaja mu yindi, era baava mu bwakyabazinga obundi, baaja mu bundi." 
Psalms105:14 Aye Katonda tiyaganha muntu yeenayeena kubakiriga; ku lwaibwe yakaabukira ba kyabazinga 
Psalms105:15 ng'abakoba ati: “Ghatabaagho agema ku bantu bange be nasiiga omuzigo; abalanzi bange mutabakola kibi kyonakyona.” 
Psalms105:16 Bwe yabaleetera endhala okugwa mu nsi mwe baali, n'ababuzaaku kiisi kantu koonakoona akasobola okuliibwa," 
Psalms105:17 yali yamala ira okugheerezaayo emberi waibwe, omusaadha ayetebwa Yosefu, ye baatunda yo mu bwiru." 
Psalms105:18 Yateebwa mu ikomera, baamusiba n'endhegere ku bigere, n'ekikomo eky'ekyuma mu nkoto" 
Psalms105:19 okutuusa ekyo kye yakoba ati kiribaagho lwe kyatuukirira, ekibono kya Musengwa Katonda ni kimukakasa okuba omutuufu." 
Psalms105:20 Olwo Kyabazinga yaatuma baamusibula; oyo afuga abantu yamulekula yeetaaya. 
Psalms105:21 Yaagha Yosefu oyo okukuumanga amaka ge goonagoona, yaamugha okulabiriranga ebibye byonabyona." 
Psalms105:22 Kyabazinga yaamugha obukumu okulagira abakungu be boonaboona nga bwe yayendanga, n'okugha abaami be amagezi." 
Psalms105:23 Agho Isiraeli yaaja mu Misiri; Yakobo yaasenga mu nsi ya Hamu. 
Psalms105:24 Musengwa Katonda yaabagha okuzaalagana baayala, baaba ba maani okusinga abazigu baibwe." 
Psalms105:25 Yaakyusa emyoyo gy'Abamisiri baakyagha abantu be, era baatoolera okulya mu bagheereza be abo enkwe." 
Psalms105:26 Yaabatumira Musa omugheereza we, ni Aaroni ye yeerondera." 
Psalms105:27 Baabakolera ebyewuunhio nga babona, era baabakolera eby'amaani nga bali mu nsi ya Hamu." 
Psalms105:28 Yabasindikira enzikiiza yaagema ensi yoonayoona, aye era Abamisiri tibaagondera kiragiro kye." 
Psalms105:29 Yaakyusa amaadhi gaibwe gaafuuka musaayi, era yaaleetera ebyenhandha byaibwe okufa." 
Psalms105:30 Ensi yaibwe yaidhula ebikere, nga biidhwire ni mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga waibwe." 
Psalms105:31 Yalagira ebikuukuulu by'ensowera n'obudhuuni byabunia ensi yaibwe. 
Psalms105:32 Yabasindikira mugozi mu kifo ky'amaadhi okugwa, n'olukuba lwamyansa lwamazaaku ensi yaibwe." 
Psalms105:33 Yazikiriza emiti gyaibwe emizabbibu n'emitiini, yaamenhamenha n'emiti gyonagyona egy'omu nsi yaibwe!" 
Psalms105:34 Yalagira enzige dhaidha kamaala, nga n'okubalika tidhibalika," 
Psalms105:35 dhaalya kiisi kimera kyonakyona ekyali mu nsi omwo, na kiisi kisimbe kyonakyona." 
Psalms105:36 Yaita abaana ababeri abalenzi mu nsi omwo boonaboona, abasooka mu kiisi ndhu." 
Psalms105:37 Agho yaatoola Abaisiraeli mu nsi omwo, baaja n'ebintu ebya feeza n'ebya zaabu, nga boonaboona balamu era nga ba maani." 
Psalms105:38 Bwe baavaayo Abamisiri baasangaala, kuba baali batooleire okubatya einho." 
Psalms105:39 Katonda yaayandhuluza ekire kyabwika abantu be, ate obwire yaataagho omuliro gwabamuliikirira." 
Psalms105:40 Baamusaba, yaabasindikira obunhonhi obuli ng'oti bukologo, yaabagha n'emere kamaala okuva mu igulu." 
Psalms105:41 Yakuba olubaale lwayawuka, mwafukumukamu amaadhi, gaakuuluula mu irungu ng'oti mwiga;" 
Psalms105:42 kuba yaidhukira endagaano ye entukuvu, ye yakola ni Aburahamu omugheereza we." 
Psalms105:43 Kale yaatoola abantu be mu nsi omwo nga basangaavu, abantu be abo be yeerondera baavaamu nga bemba." 
Psalms105:44 Yaabagha ensi edh'abamaghanga agandi, era beiriza amasamba abantu abandi ge baatakabanira okulima," 
Psalms105:45 ng'ayenda abantu be abo bagonderenga amateeka ge, era bajiirenga ku biragiro bye. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms106:1 Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda! Musiime Musengwa Katonda kuba mulungi; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms106:2 Naani asobola okulomboodha n'amalayo eby'amaani Musengwa Katonda by'akola? Naani asobola okumusaaka nga bw'agwaine okusaakibwa? 
Psalms106:3 Beesiimye abo abakolera ku mazima, ni bakola ebituufu ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Psalms106:4 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ondidhukiranga lw'oligemerwa abantu bo ekivunika; ombeeranga wamponia ghalala nabo." 
Psalms106:5 Nsobole okubona ng'abantu bo be weerondera, obulamu bubajiira bukalamu. Olwo nsagambire ghalala n'eighanga lyo, era neesiime n'abo ababo." 
Psalms106:6 Ife, ni badhaadha baife twayonoona; twakola ebibi ebitasaana." 
Psalms106:7 Badhaadha baife nga bakaali mu Misiri, ebyewuunhisa Musengwa Katonda bye yakolanga tibaabitwalanga ng'ekikulu; tibaidhukirangaku naire bwe yabagonzanga obutalekera. Baadheemera oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, bwe baali mu Nhandha Emyufu." 
Psalms106:8 Aye era yabawonia okuzikirira ku lw'obulungi obw'eriina lye, asobole okwoleka obuyinza bwe obungi." 
Psalms106:9 Yakaabukira Enhandha Emyufu yaakala; yaasomosa abantu be okubita ku ntobo y'enhandha ng'ekaze ng'oti irungu. 
Psalms106:10 Kale yaabatoola mu ngalo dh'abazigu baibwe; yaabawonia abo ababakiriga. 
Psalms106:11 Amaadhi gaafundekeza abazigu baibwe; ghaabula asigalagho waire omulala ati. 
Psalms106:12 Olwo abantu be baakakasa bye yabasuubiza, era baayemba enhembo edhimusaaka." 
Psalms106:13 Aye beerabira mangu bye yabakolera, baalekera n'agho okumalanga okumwebuuzaaku abaghe ku magezi." 
Psalms106:14 Ate baidhamu amairu amabitirivu nga bali eyo mu irungu, baaleba Katonda nga bali eyo." 
Psalms106:15 Kale yaabagha kye baamusaba, aye kabiri yaamala yaabaleetera endwaire embi einho eyabagoogombyanga." 
Psalms106:16 Olundi nga bali mu kifo ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, ghaabaagho abantu abaagemerwa Musa ensaalwa, ni Aaroni omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda omutukuvu." 
Psalms106:17 Aye ensi yaayasama yaamira Dathani, era yaabuutikira Abiramu n'abantu be." 
Psalms106:18 N'omuliro gwaika ku bantu abo, gwayokya abakozi b'ebibi abo." 
Psalms106:19 Ate olundi Abaisiraeli baakola ekifaananie eky'ente ento nga bali ku lusozi Horebu, era baasinza ekifaananie ekyo ekyakolebwa mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa." 
Psalms106:20 Baalekera okugha Katonda ekitiisa, baakigha ekifaananie eky'ente erya obw'eisubi!" 
Psalms106:21 Baava ku Katonda eyabawonia okuzikirira, era eyakola ebintu ebikologho mu Misiri," 
Psalms106:22 eyakola ebyewuninkiriza mu nsi ya Hamu, era eyakola ebyewuunhisa nga bali mu Nhandha Emyufu." 
Psalms106:23 Kyeyava n'akoba ati aja kubazikiriza, okutuusa Musa omulonde we, bweyayemereragho mu maiso ge, n'abawolerezaayo, era n'aikaikania obusungu bwa Katonda eyali aja okubazikiriza." 
Psalms106:24 Agho baanhoomerera ensi engimu, olw'okuba baali tibaikiriza Katonda kye yabasuubiza." 
Psalms106:25 Baaduuduumira mu weema dhaibwe, baaloba kugondera ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yabakoba." 
Psalms106:26 Kyeyava n'abalabula nga yeerayirira, boonaboona okubaitira mu irungu omwo," 
Psalms106:27 asansaanie abaana baibwe n'abaidhukulu, eyo mu nsi edh'abatatya Katonda, bafiire eyo mu nsi edh'eghala." 
Psalms106:28 Agho beeyimba n'abantu mu kusinza omusambwa Baali ogw'e Peori, era baalya ku misengo egigheebwayo eri ebintu ebiziramu na bulamu." 
Psalms106:29 Olw'ebikolwa byaibwe ebyo baaleetera Musengwa Katonda okusungughala, yaabaleetamu endwaire embi einho eyabamulungula." 
Psalms106:30 Aye Finehasi yaasitukiramu yaabonereza abo abaakola ekibi, olwo Musengwa Katonda yaalekeza endwaire eyo embi." 
Psalms106:31 Kino kyamuleetera okusiimibwa, era abantu ab'ense n'ense banaamwidhukiranga olw'ekyo." 
Psalms106:32 Olundi era, baaleetera Musengwa Katonda okusungughala nga bali gha maadhi ag'e Meriba, baaleetera Musa obuzibu olw'ekyo kye baakola;" 
Psalms106:33 kuba baamuleetera okusungughala einho, kyaviiramu Musa oyo okwogera nga tasoose kulowooza." 
Psalms106:34 Baaloba okuzikiriza abamaghanga agandi, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yabalagira," 
Psalms106:35 aye baafumbiraganwa nabo, era baayega empisa dhaibwe," 
Psalms106:36 nga basinza ebitali Katonda era ekyo kyabaviiraku okuzikirira. 
Psalms106:37 Baaghangayo abaana baibwe abalenzi n'abaghala ng'emisengo eri emizimu emibi. 
Psalms106:38 Baayughanga emisaayi egyo egiziraku musango, egy'abaana baibwe abalenzi n'abaghala be baaghangayo ng'emisengo eri ebintu ebyo ab'e Kanaani bye baasinzanga ebitali Katonda. Olwo ensi yaafuuka nnhonoonefu olw'obutemo obwo." 
Psalms106:39 Batyo beene beereetaku okuba aboonoonefu olw'ebikolwa byaibwe ebyo, era baava ku Katonda." 
Psalms106:40 Agho obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda bwatumbukira ku bantu be abo ng'oti muliro, Musengwa Katonda oyo yaatuuka okwesinwa abantu be abo beene be yeerondera." 
Psalms106:41 Kyeyava n'abaleka mu buyinza bw'abamaghanga agandi, abantu abo baabafuga n'enfuga embi." 
Psalms106:42 Abazigu baibwe baababuza obwogereso, era baabakaka okuba mu bufuge bwaibwe." 
Psalms106:43 Emikuzi kamaala nga Musengwa Katonda abatoola mu bizibu, aye baamala baasalagho okumudheemera. Kale beeyongera okuba ababi olw'ebibi byaibwe." 
Psalms106:44 Aye waire nga beebisa batyo, tiyabatoolaku mwoyo. Bwebaalira yabafaaku." 
Psalms106:45 Ku lwaibwe yaidhukira endagaano ye era yaabairiramu olw'okugonza kwe okutakoma. 
Psalms106:46 Yaleetera abo boonaboona abaali babakiriga, okubagemerwa ekivunika." 
Psalms106:47 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife kola otuwonie, otusoloze okuva eyo mu maghanga ye twasansaanira. Olwo tukusiimenga olw'eriina lyo eitukuvu, era tukusaakenga olw'ekitiisa kyo." 
Psalms106:48 Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe, oyo Katonda wa Isiraeli! Asaakibwe buti era n'ebyanda n'ebyanda. Abantu boonaboona ka bakobe bati: “Amiina!” Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda!" 
Psalms107:1 Bakagwa, musiime Musengwa Katonda kuba mulungi; okugonza kwe okutakoma kubaagho byanda na byanda!" 
Psalms107:2 Abo Musengwa Katonda be yanunula boona ka bakobe batyo; abo be yatoola mu buyinza bw'abazigu," 
Psalms107:3 n'abaiza okuva mu nsi kamaala e buvandhuba n'e bugwandhuba, ni mu nsi edhiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda ni ku lw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Psalms107:4 Abandi baatambulatambula eyo batyo mu irungu omuzira kantu, engira yaababula ebatuusa ghe basobola okuba." 
Psalms107:5 Endhala yaabaluma n'endiwo yaabagema, beegomba okutyama bamale gafiira agho!" 
Psalms107:6 Agho baalirira Musengwa Katonda nga bali mu buzibu bwaibwe, Musengwa Katonda yaabawonia." 
Psalms107:7 Yaabagemya engira entuufu eyabatuusa mu kibuga ghe baali basobola okuba. 
Psalms107:8 Bagwainenga okwebaza Musengwa Katonda olw'okugonza kwe okutakoma, n'olw'ebyewuunhisa by'akolera abantu!" 
Psalms107:9 Oyo agha abali endiwo okunhwa nga bwe beetaaga, ate abayala yaabaigusa ebirungi." 
Psalms107:10 Abandi baali nga baba mu nzikiiza etiisa einho, nga basibe ku ndhegere era nga badaazibwadaazibwa;" 
Psalms107:11 kuba baali badheemeire ebiragiro bya Katonda, baanhooma ebyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene bye yabakoba." 
Psalms107:12 Baali nga bawoiremu olw'emirimo emikalangufu, era ng'ole bw'agwa tighaba amubeera kumubbeedagho." 
Psalms107:13 Agho baalirira Musengwa Katonda nga bali mu buzibu bwaibwe, Musengwa Katonda yaabawonia." 
Psalms107:14 Yaabatoola mu nzikiiza etiisa einho, yaakutulakutula endhegere edhaali dhibasibye." 
Psalms107:15 Bagwainenga okwebaza Musengwa Katonda olw'okugonza kwe okutakoma, n'olw'ebyewuunhisa by'akolera abantu!" 
Psalms107:16 Oyo n'amenhamenha endhigi edhaakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, era n'amaniangula empango edhaakolebwa mu kyuma ekigumu einho!" 
Psalms107:17 Abandi baali basirusiru olw'ebibi byaibwe, okwonoona kwaibwe okwo nga kubadaazadaaza." 
Psalms107:18 Ku mwoyo nga kwabasemba, nga ghazira mere ebawoomera. Kumpi bafe!" 
Psalms107:19 Agho baalirira Musengwa Katonda nga bali mu buzibu bwaibwe, Musengwa Katonda yaabawonia." 
Psalms107:20 Yaalagira bulagire baawona, yaabatoola mu maino ga walumbe." 
Psalms107:21 Bagwainenga okwebaza Musengwa Katonda, olw'okugonza kwe okutakoma, n'olw'ebyewuunhisa by'akolera abantu!" 
Psalms107:22 Era bagwainenga bagheeyo emisengo olw'okumwebaza, bembenga n'enhembo edh'eisanhu edhoogera ku by'abakolera." 
Psalms107:23 Abandi baavuganga maato ku nhandha, baakoleranga emirimo gyaibwe ku maadhi," 
Psalms107:24 baabona ebyewuunhisa Musengwa Katonda by'akola mu maadhi omwo; 
Psalms107:25 kuba yalagira empewo ey'amaani, yaaleetera enhandha okwefuukuula einho." 
Psalms107:26 Empewo yaabbeedera amaato mu ibbanga, ate gaamala gaika ghansi ku ntobo y'enhandha, agho emyoyo gyabagwa mu bigere." 
Psalms107:27 Amaato gaabayuuzayuuza, baagaaliita ng'oti batamiivu. Waire nga baali bagavugiire entangama, ku olwo baaba ng'oti beega." 
Psalms107:28 Agho baalirira Musengwa Katonda nga bali mu buzibu bwaibwe, Musengwa Katonda yaabawonia." 
Psalms107:29 Yaalekeza empewo ey'amaani, n'okwefuukuula okw'enhandha." 
Psalms107:30 Agho baasangaala olw'enhandha okulaala, Musengwa Katonda yaabatuusa bukalamu ku kisomoko kye baayenda." 
Psalms107:31 Bagwainenga okwebaza Musengwa Katonda olw'okugonza kwe okutakoma, n'olw'ebyewuunhisa by'akolera abantu!" 
Psalms107:32 Bagwaine bamugulumizenga ng'abantu beesoloiza okumusinza, era bamusaakenga mu lwekobaano olw'abakulu ab'ebika." 
Psalms107:33 Musengwa Katonda oyo afuula aghabaire emiiga ghairagho eirungu, ate aghabaire enhindo edh'emiiga ghaafuuka eitaka eikalu lyene." 
Psalms107:34 Eribaire eitaka eigimu alifuula ery'oluunhu erizira muganhulo, olw'obubi bw'abo abalityamaku." 
Psalms107:35 Afuula aghabaire eirungu ghairagho ebidiba eby'amaadhi, ate aghabaire eitaka eikalu, ghaafuukagho enhindo edhivaamu emiiga." 
Psalms107:36 Era yaaganha abayala baasenga mu bifo ebyo, baatuuka n'okuzimbamu ebibuga byaibwe," 
Psalms107:37 baasiga enimiro edha buli nsambo, baasimba n'amasamba ag'emizabbibu, era baafuna amakungula mangi inho." 
Psalms107:38 Abagha enkabi baazaala abaana kamaala, n'ebyayo byaibwe byaloba kukendeera naire." 
Psalms107:39 Abazigu baibwe bwebabaghangula era ni babaniinirira nga babatuntuza era nga babadaazadaaza," 
Psalms107:40 Katonda aleetera abazigu abo okunhoomebwa, baaja nga batambulatambula eyo batyo mu irungu omuzira waire akagira." 
Psalms107:41 Aye abanaku abairuukirira, yaabatoola mu kudaagadaaga, baazaalagana, baaghera mangu ng'oti byayo." 
Psalms107:42 Bino abatuufu babibona baasangaala, aye abakozi b'ebibi baabula eky'okwogera." 
Psalms107:43 Buli ali n'amagezi agwaine ebyo okubitangaku omwoyo, era abantu bagwaine okulowoozanga einho ku kugonza kwa Musengwa Katonda okutakoma." 
Psalms108:1 Wo Katonda wange, omwoyo gwange gwonagwona guli ku iwe era ku iwe wenka! Ndidha kwembanga enhembo edhiwooma! Iwe omwoyo gwange zuuka!" 
Psalms108:2 Iwe entongooli yange n'iwe endingidi yange, muzuuke! Leero ndidha kuzuusa endhuba." 
Psalms108:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndidha kukusiimanga nga ndi mu bantu, era nkusaakenga nga ndi mu maghanga." 
Psalms108:4 Okugonza kwo okutakoma kungi inho okusinga n'eigulu mu bugungumavu, ate obwesigwa bwo butuuka ni ku bire." 
Psalms108:5 Wo Katonda wange, laga obukulu bwo bubonebwe ghaigulu okusinga eigulu, n'ekitiisa kyo kimaamire ensi yoonayoona." 
Psalms108:6 Ife b'ogonza tubeere n'amaani go otuwulire, olwo abantu bo basobole okuwonezebwa." 
Psalms108:7 Katonda yayogera mu kifo kye ekitukuvu ati: “Mu kusagamba okw'obughanguzi, ndidha kwawuzayawuza mu Shekemu, era ngabaniegabanie ekikonko eky'e Sukkothi mu bantu bange." 
Psalms108:8 Ensi Gileadi yange, n'eighanga ery'Abamanasse lyange, ate ery'Abaefuraimu n'enkoofiira yange ey'ekyuma, olwo ery'Abayudaaya lyaba omwigo gwange ogw'obwakyabazinga." 
Psalms108:9 Ensi Moabu n'ekyogero kyange ate mu Edomu mwe ndisuula engaito dhange okwoleka nga bwekiri ekyange. Buti nkuba emizira olw'okuba mpangwire ab'e Filisitia.” 
Psalms108:10 Naani alintwala mu kibuga ekyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu? Naani alinkulembereramu okuntuusa mu Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 Wo Katonda, mbo bwenebwene otusuuliire irala ere? Tooje na magye gaife kulwana?" 
Psalms108:12 Tubeere tulwanise omuzigu, kuba okwesigulira ku muntu okutubeera kiziramu muganhulo." 
Psalms108:13 Kasita Katonda aba ku luuyi lwaife twidha kughangula; kuba oyo n'aja okutyankirira abazigu baife boonaboona. 
Psalms109:1 Wo Katonda wange, niiwe ye nsaaka, otansiriikirira!" 
Psalms109:2 Abakozi b'ebibi n'abaguya bandhogeraku nga bampaama bye ntakola. 
Psalms109:3 Buli kiseera bandhogeraku eby'obukyayi, ate nga baanumbagana bya bwereere." 
Psalms109:4 Bandhogeraku bibi byereere, waire nga nze mbagonza era naabasabira." 
Psalms109:5 Kale bwe mbakolera ebikalamu bansasulamu bibi, bwe mbagonza bansasulamu kunkyagha!" 
Psalms109:6 Wo Katonda wange, omuzigu wange musimbe mu maiso ag'omulamuzi omubi asaliriza, era owundi ku bazigu be beene n'abe amulumirize." 
Psalms109:7 Muwozese omusango gumusinge, n'okwewolereza kwe kufuukemu kibi." 
Psalms109:8 Enaku edh'obulamu bwe dhigwananga dhaakendeera; omuntu owundi yaatwala ebintu bye 
Psalms109:9 Abaana be bagwananga bafuuka bamulekwa, ni mukazi we yaaba namwandu." 
Psalms109:10 Abaana be bagwananga baatambulatambula eyo batyo nga basabiriza, era baabingibwa mu bifulukwa mwe baba." 
Psalms109:11 Ole amubandha agwananga yaamugemaku ebibye byonabyona yaabitwala, n'abantu b'ataidhi baamukambulaku ebintu bye byonabyona bye yafuna mu maani ge." 
Psalms109:12 Agwananga yaabulwa omuntu amugemerwa ekivunika, waire asaasira abaana be bamulekwa." 
Psalms109:13 Abaana be n'abaidhukulu bagwananga baawaagho, ghaabula ow'oluse olwidha amwidhukira naire." 
Psalms109:14 Musengwa Katonda agwananga yaidhukira okwonoona kwa badhaadha be, yaalobera irala n'okusonigha ebibi bya inhina." 
Psalms109:15 Musengwa Katonda agwananga yaidhukira ebibi byaibwe buli kaakyeire, ate beene, abantu baabeerabirira irala ku nsi." 
Psalms109:16 Kuba omuntu oyo tiyaliimu kisa naire, aye yakiriga abanaku n'abaavu n'abawoiremu emyoyo, yaabatuusa ni ku kufa." 
Psalms109:17 Yayendanga inho okukolimira abantu abandi, yeena ka bamukolimire. Era nga tayendeza muntu wundi nkabi, yeena ka ghabule amwendeza enkabi." 
Psalms109:18 Okukolima abandi tikwamuvangaku ng'oti kivaalo, aye ebikolimo bye byene ka bimwirireku bimuboze omubiri ng'oti maadhi era bimungire bimutuuke ni mu magumba ng'oti muzigo." 
Psalms109:19 Leka abivaale nga tibimuvaaku ng'oti kivaalo, era abyesibe mu nkende ng'oti lusibiro." 
Psalms109:20 Wo Musengwa Katonda, otyo bw'obe obonereze abazigu bange abo abandhogeraku obubi." 
Psalms109:21 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda wange, ba ku luuyi lwange ombeere nga bwewasuubiza, ondokole kuba okugonza kwo okutakoma kulungi." 
Psalms109:22 Nze ndi mughafu era omwavu, ndi n'enaku nnene ku mwoyo." 
Psalms109:23 Ndi kuwaagho ng'oti n'ekinsense ekyeigulo ng'endhuba egwire, era baamansulira bw'ere ng'oti nzige." 
Psalms109:24 Ebivu biinafiighe olw'okusiiba endhala, n'omubiri gwange guniaire, guli magumba meereere." 
Psalms109:25 Abazigu bange bansekerera, baatengeesa n'emitwe nga bandhogeraku." 
Psalms109:26 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, mbeera era ondokole kuba ongonza obutalekera." 
Psalms109:27 Wo Musengwa Katonda, abazigu bange ka bamanhe nga niiwe ondokola." 
Psalms109:28 Ka bankolimire aye nga iwe ompa bwa nkabi! Ni bwe baanumba, ka baswale aye nga nze omugheereza wo nsangaala busangaale." 
Psalms109:29 Abazigu bange bagwananga baanhoomebwa, baidhula ensoni edhitabavaaku ng'oti kivaalo." 
Psalms109:30 Ndidha kusiimanga inho Musengwa Katonda; mmusaakenga nga ndi mu bantu be abeesoloiza okumusinza," 
Psalms109:31 kuba aba ku luuyi lw'omwavu, yaamuwonia abo abamusalira ogw'okufa." 
Psalms110:1 Musengwa Katonda yakoba musengwa wange ati: “Tyama ghano ku luuyi lw'omukono gwange omusaadha, okutuusa lwe ndita abazigu bo ghansi gh'ebigere byo.”" 
Psalms110:2 Musengwa Katonda era abunisa obufuzi bwo woonawoona ng'aviira mu Sioni. Fuga abazigu bo abakwezungulwire. 
Psalms110:3 Ku lunaku lw'olija n'eigye lyo okulwana, abantu bo baja kweghaayo kyeyendere aghazira kukakibwa. Abavubuka bo baja kwidha y'oli ku nsozi entukuvu ng'oti musulo gwa nkyo." 
Psalms110:4 Musengwa Katonda yalayira era talyeidhusa: “Iwe oli Kabona ebyanda n'ebyanda ng'oti ni Melekizedeki bwe yali.” 
Psalms110:5 Iwe kyabazinga, Musengwa Katonda ali agho ku mukono gwo omusaadha, aidha kufafaagania bakyabazinga abandi, ku lunaku olw'ekiruyi kye." 
Psalms110:6 Aidha kusalira ensi dhoonadhoona omusango, adhiidhuze emirambo era afafaaganie bakyabazinga mu nsi yoonayoona." 
Psalms110:7 Kyabazinga alinhwa amaadhi ag'omu kaiga akali ku ngira, olwo yaatambula n'obughanguzi nga mugumu." 
Psalms111:1 Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda. Ndidha kusiimanga Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona, nga ndi mu bantu abeesoloiza okumusinza." 
Psalms111:2 Ebintu Musengwa Katonda by'akola bikologho ate bikulu, abo boonaboona ababyenda babyetegereza." 
Psalms111:3 Ebyo by'akola biidhwire ekitiisa n'obufuzi, era mutuufu ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms111:4 Musengwa Katonda by'akola byewuunhisa, tabiganha kwerabirwa; wa kivunika era musaasizi." 
Psalms111:5 Abo abamutya abafunira eky'okulya, era tiyeerabira ndagaano ye." 
Psalms111:6 Yayoleka abantu be nga bw'ali ow'obukumu mu by'akola, yaabafuula beene nsi, mu nsi edhitaali dhaibwe." 
Psalms111:7 Mu byonabyona by'akola yesigika era wa mazima; ebiragiro bye biziramu buguya," 
Psalms111:8 tibikyukamu naire ebyanda n'ebyanda, byakolebwa mu bwesigwa ni mu butuufu." 
Psalms111:9 Yanunula abantu be, yaakola nabo endagaano etavaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda. Eriina lye itukuvu era litiibwa." 
Psalms111:10 Mu kutya Musengwa Katonda n'omusookera amagezi; abo abagondera ebiragiro bye abagha okutegeera. Musengwa Katonda asaakibwenga ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Psalms112:1 Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda. Wa nkabi omuntu atya Musengwa Katonda, asangaalira okukola ng'ebiragiro bye bwebikoba." 
Psalms112:2 Abaana be n'abaidhukulu baba ba maani mu nsi; oluse oluva mu muntu oyo atya Katonda luba lwa nkabi. 
Psalms112:3 Ab'omu maka ge baba bafuni nga bakombe, era wa kusiimibwanga Katonda ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms112:4 Obutangaavu bwidha mu nzikiiza bwamuliikirira abo abatya Katonda, era bwayakira abo ab'ekivunika, abasaasizi era abatuufu." 
Psalms112:5 Wa nkabi omuntu oyo omugabi era awola baine empiiya, n'akola buli kintu mu mazima." 
Psalms112:6 Omuntu atya Katonda ghazira kisobola kumutengeesa; aidha kwidhukirwanga ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Psalms112:7 Amawulire amabi tigamutiisa, omwoyo gwe mugumu nga yeesiga Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms112:8 Omwoyo gwe tigukyukakyuka waire okutya; okutuusa lw'abona ng'abazigu be baghangwirwa. 
Psalms112:9 Agabira abaavu na mwoyo mulala, era ekisa kye tikimuwaaku, aidha kusiimibwanga Katonda era agheebwenga ekitiibwa ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms112:10 Omubi bw'abona ekyo asungughala, yeeguguna era yaaseenena, aye bye yeegomba okukola tabifuna." 
Psalms113:1 Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda! Imwe abagheereza ba Musengwa Katonda mumusaake, musaake eriina lye." 
Psalms113:2 Musaake eriina lya Musengwa Katonda okuva ni buti, ni ye bwidha eyo ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms113:3 Eriina lya Musengwa Katonda lisaakibwe okuva endhuba y'eva okutuuka y'egwa. 
Psalms113:4 Musengwa Katonda n'afuga amaghanga goonagoona, n'ekitiisa kye kisinga n'eigulu." 
Psalms113:5 Naani ali ng'oti ni Musengwa Katonda waife, oyo aba eyo ghaigulu yeene," 
Psalms113:6 n'alinga ghansi ku biri mu igulu ni ku nsi? 
Psalms113:7 Abbeeda abanaku yaabatoola mu nkungu; yaatoola abaavu aghabi," 
Psalms113:8 yaabafuula bakologho yaabatuusa ku bitiibwa eby'abalangira. 
Psalms113:9 Aleetera omukazi omugumba okusangaala mu maka; yaamugha okuzaala abaana. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda. 
Psalms114:1 Abaisiraeli lwe baava mu Misiri, baidhukulu ba Yakobo abo ni bava mu nsi etaali yaibwe," 
Psalms114:2 olwo Abayudaaya lwe baafuuka abantu ba Musengwa Katonda abatukuvu, Abaisiraeli lwe baafuuka abantu be, be yeerondera." 
Psalms114:3 Enhandha bwe yabona yaalumukagho; omwiga Yorudani gwakyuka gwakuuluula kyainhumainhuma. 
Psalms114:4 Ensozi enene dheezinduka, dhaatuumaga ng'oti ntaama nume; obusozi obutono bwona bwezinduka, bwatuumatuuma ng'oti ntaama nto." 
Psalms114:5 Kyali ki, iwe enhandha okulumukagho, n'iwe Yorudani okukyuka n'okuuluula ekyeinhumainhuma," 
Psalms114:6 n'imwe ensozi enene okwezinduka, ni mutuumaga ng'oti ntaama nume, era n'imwe obusozi obutono mwena okwezinduka ni mutuumatuuma ng'oti ntaama nto?" 
Psalms114:7 Iwe ensi dhugumira nga Musengwa Katonda atuuse, nga Katonda wa Yakobo aboneike," 
Psalms114:8 oyo afuula aghabaire olubaale ni ghabaagho ekidiba eky'amaadhi, era n'afuula aghabaire eibaale eikalangafu ni ghaidhagho enhindo edhivaamu amaadhi agakuuluula." 
Psalms115:1 Aa Musengwa Katonda, ti niife abagwaniire okugheebwa ekitiisa, ti niife naire naire. Aye niiwe oteekwa okugheebwa ekitiisa, olw'okugonza kwo okutakoma n'obwesigwa bwo." 
Psalms115:2 Lwaki oleka amaghanga ni gabuuza gati: “Memale Katonda waibwe ali gha?” 
Psalms115:3 Ife Katonda owaife ali mu igulu era ky'ayenda ky'akola. 
Psalms115:4 Aye beene basinza ebitali Katonda ebya feeza ni zaabu, abantu beene bye bakola n'engalo dhaibwe." 
Psalms115:5 Bibaaku eminwa aye nga tibyogera, byabaaku amaiso aye nga tibibona." 
Psalms115:6 Biri n'amatu aye nga tibiwulira, byaba n'enhindo aye nga tibiwunhiza." 
Psalms115:7 Biriku engalo aye nga tibisobola kugema ku kintu ni bikiwulira, byabaaku ebigere aye nga tibitambula, era ghazira iroboozi naire eriva mu mamiro gaabyo." 
Psalms115:8 Abo ababikola bagwananga boona baaba ng'oti ni byene bwe biri, n'abo ababyesiga boona baabanga batyo." 
Psalms115:9 Imwe Abaisiraeli mwesigenga Musengwa Katonda! Oyo n'ababeera era n'abakuuma. 
Psalms115:10 Imwe bakabona abagheereza Katonda, mwesigenga Musengwa Katonda! Oyo n'ababeera era n'abakuuma." 
Psalms115:11 Mwenamwena abatya Katonda mwesigenga Musengwa Katonda! Oyo n'ababeera era n'abakuuma. 
Psalms115:12 Musengwa Katonda oyo tatwerabira naire, aidha kutughanga enkabi; aidha kughanga Abaisiraeli enkabi, aghenga bakabona abagheereza Katonda enkabi," 
Psalms115:13 era aghenga n'abo boonaboona abamutya enkabi, abakologho n'abatali bakologho." 
Psalms115:14 Nsaba Musengwa Katonda mwenamwena abaghe eizaire, imwe n'abaana baimwe." 
Psalms115:15 Musengwa Katonda oyo eyakola eigulu n'ensi abaghenga enkabi. 
Psalms115:16 Musengwa Katonda ni mwene igulu, aye ensi yagigha abantu." 
Psalms115:17 Abafu tibasaaka Musengwa Katonda, n'abo abaja e magombe tibamusaaka naire." 
Psalms115:18 Aye ife abakaali abalamu twidha kumusaakanga okuva ni mpegaano n'okutuusa ebyanda n'ebyanda. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda. 
Psalms116:1 Nze ngonza Musengwa Katonda olw'okuba awulira amamiro gange nga ndi kumweghemba. 
Psalms116:2 Era olw'okuba ampulirisa, ndidha kumuliriranga okutuusa lwe ndiva ku nsi." 
Psalms116:3 Olumbe lwaneezungulula ng'oti lutuula lwa muyiizi; amagombe gaayasama okuumira, naidhula okutya n'okweraliikirira." 
Psalms116:4 Olwo naalirira Musengwa Katonda nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghembye mponia okufa.”" 
Psalms116:5 Musengwa Katonda wa kivunika era mulungi. Katonda waife asaasira! 
Psalms116:6 Musengwa Katonda akuuma abaghafu; bwe nali nga ndi mu buzibu n'eyamponia. 
Psalms116:7 Olwo naalekera okweraliikirira, kuba Musengwa Katonda yankolera bukalamu." 
Psalms116:8 Musengwa Katonda yamponia okufa, yandheya amaziga, era yamponia okughangulwa." 
Psalms116:9 Era buti ntambula mu maiso ge nga ndi ku nsi ey'abalamu. 
Psalms116:10 Nasigala nga nkaikiriza Musengwa Katonda, waire nga mule nakoba nti: “Yii, nga numizibwa inho.”" 
Psalms116:11 Era nga ndi mu kutya naakoba nti: “Okwesiga omuntu kuba kumala biseera.” 
Psalms116:12 Musengwa Katonda ndimugha ki oyo ankoleire ebirungi ebyaga agho? 
Psalms116:13 Ndidha kughaayo ekigheebwayo eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, mmusiime olw'okundokola." 
Psalms116:14 Era ndidha kutuukiriza ebyo bye neeyama eri Musengwa Katonda, nga ndi mu bantu be abeesoloiza okumusinza." 
Psalms116:15 Musengwa Katonda atwala okufa okw'abantu be abamutya nga kwa mughendo inho. 
Psalms116:16 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nze ndi mugheereza wo nga maama bwe yali. Niiwe omponiiza okufa!" 
Psalms116:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndidha kukugheereza omusengo olw'okukusiima, era mpeereze n'okusaba kwange y'oli." 
Psalms116:18 Era ndidha kutuukiriza ebyo bye neeyama y'oli, nga ndi mu bantu bo abeesoloiza okukusinza" 
Psalms116:19 ghano mu Yerusalemu, mu mpya edh'eisinzizo lyo. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda!" 
Psalms117:1 Amaghanga goonagoona gasaake Musengwa Katonda! Imwe abantu mwenamwena mumusaake; 
Psalms117:2 kuba atugonza inho ekibitiriire era mwesigwa ebyanda n'ebyanda. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda! 
Psalms118:1 Bakagwa, musiime Musengwa Katonda kuba mulungi, okugonza kwe tikukoma kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms118:2 Abaisiraeli ka bakobe bati: “Okugonza kwe tikukoma kubaagho byanda na byanda.” 
Psalms118:3 Bakabona abagheereza Katonda ka bakobe bati: “Okugonza kwe tikukoma kubaagho byanda na byanda.” 
Psalms118:4 Abo abatya Musengwa Katonda ka bakobe bati: “Okugonza kwe tikukoma kubaagho byanda na byanda.” 
Psalms118:5 Bwenali ndi mu kweraliikirira nalirira Musengwa Katonda yampulira, yantoola mu buzibu." 
Psalms118:6 Musengwa Katonda n'omubeezi wange, ghazira kye nsobola kutya. Omuntu obuntu katyo asobola kunkola ki?" 
Psalms118:7 Musengwa Katonda ali ku luuyi lwange okumbeera, ndidha kubona abazigu bange nga baghangwirwa." 
Psalms118:8 Okwesiga Musengwa Katonda n'ekisingaku okwesiga abantu. 
Psalms118:9 Okwesiga Musengwa Katonda n'ekisinga, okusinga okwesiga abafuzi." 
Psalms118:10 Abazigu kamaala baali baneezungulwire, aye olw'amaani ga Musengwa Katonda, boonaboona naabamulungula!" 
Psalms118:11 Baali nga baneezungulwire ku buli luuyi, aye olw'amaani ga Musengwa Katonda boonaboona naabamulungula!" 
Psalms118:12 Baaneebungaku ng'oti muzinga gwa ndhuki, aye baazikira mangu ng'oti muliro gwa isandha, olw'amaani ga Musengwa Katonda boonaboona naabamulungula." 
Psalms118:13 Nanhigirizibwa kumpi ngwe, aye Musengwa Katonda yambeera." 
Psalms118:14 Musengwa Katonda n'omubeezi wange ampa amaani era n'eyandokola. 
Psalms118:15 Wulira emizira egy'obughanguzi egiri kuva mu weema edh'abantu ba Katonda! Bali kwemba bati: “Omukono gwa Musengwa Katonda gukoze eby'amaani! 
Psalms118:16 Omukono gwa Musengwa Katonda mughanguzi! Omukono gwa Musengwa Katonda gukoze eby'amaani!” 
Psalms118:17 Tiri wa kufa, ndidha kuba mulamu, nomboodhe ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yankolera." 
Psalms118:18 Waire yankangaivula inho, tiyaleka lumbe kuntwala." 
Psalms118:19 Mundhiguliregho emiryango egy'eisinzizo, egibitamu abantu ba Katonda abatuufu, nhingire nje neebaze Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms118:20 Guno n'omulyango gwa Musengwa Katonda abantu ba Katonda abatuufu mwe banaingirira. 
Psalms118:21 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nsiimye kuba onkoleire nga bwe nkusabye era wampa obughanguzi." 
Psalms118:22 Eibaale abazimbi lye baaloba bati lizira mugaso, n'eryafuuka empagi ey'omusingi mu nsonda." 
Psalms118:23 Ekyo Musengwa Katonda n'eyakikola, era okukibona tukyewuunhia inho." 
Psalms118:24 Luno n'olunaku Musengwa Katonda lw'aghanguliireku, ka tusangaale era tusagambe." 
Psalms118:25 Wo Musengwa Katonda, tukweghembye tuwonie okuzikirira Wo Musengwa Katonda, tukweghembye tughe okughangula mu kiisi kye tukola." 
Psalms118:26 Katonda aghe enkabi oyo aingira mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda! Tubasabira Katonda abaghe enkabi mwenamwena, nga tuli ghano mu ndhu ya Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms118:27 Musengwa Katonda ni Katonda, yatukolera ebirungi kamaala. Aleeni mutoolere ekibinuko nga mugemye ensaga, nga mukaadha okutuukira irala ku alutaari." 
Psalms118:28 Niiwe Katonda wange, era ndidha kukusiimanga iwe Katonda wange, ndidha kukoberanga abantu nga bw'oli omukologho." 
Psalms118:29 Bakagwa, musiime Musengwa Katonda kuba mulungi, okugonza kwe tikukoma kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms119:1 Ba nkabi abo abaziraku kye banenezebwa, abatambulira ku mateeka ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms119:2 Ba nkabi abo abakola kiisi Musengwa Katonda ky'abakoba, ni bajiira ku by'abagalagira n'omwoyo gwonagwona" 
Psalms119:3 era abatakola bibi, ni bajiira ku by'ayenda." 
Psalms119:4 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe wataagho amateeka go era waalagira gakuumibwe butiribiri." 
Psalms119:5 Ha, kale ngoli neekuuma ni ntasobya, ni nkuuma by'olagira!" 
Psalms119:6 Olwo tyandiswaziibwa, kuba omwoyo gwange gwonagwona gwandibaire ku biragiro byo byonka." 
Psalms119:7 Ndidha kukusaakanga n'omwoyo omunaabuufu, nga mmaze okwega ensala yo entuufu." 
Psalms119:8 Ndidha kugonderanga by'olagira; nkweghembye otandekulira agho ntyo. 
Psalms119:9 Omwisuka asobola atya okukuuma obulamu bwe nga butereevu? Kasita aba nga yeekuuma, n'ajiira ku kibono ky'okoba." 
Psalms119:10 Nfuba inho okukugheereza n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona, otandeka kuva ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:11 By'onkoba mbita ku mwoyo buliidho, ndobe kwonoona y'oli." 
Psalms119:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkusaaka ndhegeresa okukola by'olagira." 
Psalms119:13 Nze mwene ndidha kulomboodheranga abantu amateeka go. 
Psalms119:14 Wo Musengwa Katonda, mba musangaavu okukola iwe by'onkoba, okusinga okuba omukombe einho." 
Psalms119:15 Ndidha kwefumintirizanga ku mateeka go, era amaiso gange tigaavenga ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:16 Ndidha kubanga musangaavu okukola iwe by'olagira, era tyerabirenga kibono ky'onkobye." 
Psalms119:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndhughaaku enkabi dho nze omugheereza wo, mbenga mulamu era ngonderenga ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:18 Nzibula amaiso, nsobole okubona endhegeresa eyewuunhisa eri mu mateeka go." 
Psalms119:19 Ku nsi kuno ndiku ng'omugeni omugenze; mpa okutegeera ebiragiro byo. 
Psalms119:20 Omwoyo gunsiriira olw'okwegomba einho okumanha buli kiseera ensala yo entuufu. 
Psalms119:21 Ovumirira abo abeekuluntaza, abalaame abo, abava ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:22 Balekeze okunvumanga n'okuunhoomereranga, kuba nze neekuumye nga nkola by'okoba." 
Psalms119:23 Waire abafuzi ab'obukumu batyama beeteesa okuunumba, nze omugheereza wo ndidha kwefumintirizanga ku ebyo by'olagira." 
Psalms119:24 Mba musangaavu okukola nga bw'onkoba, kuba by'onkoba n'ebimpa amagezi." 
Psalms119:25 Neegolomoire agho ku itaka gampweire. Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndhizaamu amaani buyaaka nga bwe wansuubiza." 
Psalms119:26 Bwe nakukobera byonabyona bye nakola, wandhiramu; ndhegeresa okukola by'olagira." 
Psalms119:27 Iwe nhamba okutegeera amateeka go bye gakoba, olwo ndidha kwefumintirizanga inho ku byewuunhisa by'okola." 
Psalms119:28 Nseeneine olw'enaku enhingi. Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndhizaamu amaani buyaaka nga bwe wansuubiza." 
Psalms119:29 Ntoolaamu emize emibi, olw'ekisa kyo ondhegerese amateeka go." 
Psalms119:30 Nsazeegho okuba omwesigwa y'oli, nga buli kaseera njiira ku nsala yo." 
Psalms119:31 Wo Musengwa Katonda, neekalanguliire ku kukola by'okoba; mponia okuswala." 
Psalms119:32 Ndidha kwangughangaku okukola ng'ebiragiro byo bwe binkoba, ng'ogaziiya okutegeera kwange." 
Psalms119:33 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndhegeresa okutegeera ebyo by'olagira, ndidha kubijiirangaku ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Psalms119:34 Ngalagira ntegeere amateeka go; ndidha kugagonderanga n'omwoyo mulala. 
Psalms119:35 Nhamba okwebisa ng'ebiragiro byo bwe bikoba, kuba mba musangaavu okukola nga bwe bikoba." 
Psalms119:36 Nhamba okwendanga okukola by'okoba, okusinga okwendanga eby'obufuni." 
Psalms119:37 Nkyusa nve ku bintu ebiziramu muganhulo; ombeere okwebisa nga bw'oyenda. 
Psalms119:38 Tuukiriza ekyo kye wansuubiza nze omugheereza wo, ekyo ky'osuubiza abo abakutya." 
Psalms119:39 Mponia okuvumibwa kwe ntya ekibitiriire; kuba ensala yo ntuufu yeeneyeene. 
Psalms119:40 Bona, neegomba inho amateeka go; mpa obulamu olw'obutuufu bwo." 
Psalms119:41 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndaga nga bw'ongonza einho, ondokole nga bwe wansuubiza." 
Psalms119:42 Olwo ndidha kwiramu abo abandheeyereza, kuba neesiga ekisuubizo kyo." 
Psalms119:43 Nhamba okwogeranga amazima buli kiseera, kuba eisuubi lyange liri mu nsala yo." 
Psalms119:44 Ndidha kujiiranga ku mateeka go buli kaseera ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Psalms119:45 Era ndidha kutambulanga nga neetaaya, kuba nfuba inho okujiira ku mateeka go ago." 
Psalms119:46 By'okoba byonabyona ndidha kubikoberanga bakyabazinga, nga ghazira kingemya nsoni." 
Psalms119:47 Mba musangaavu okukola ebyo by'olagira, kuba ebyo bye nhenda einho." 
Psalms119:48 Ebiragiro byo mbyenda inho era mbigha ekitiisa; ndidha kwefumintirizanga ku ebyo by'olagira. 
Psalms119:49 Wo Musengwa Katonda, oteerabira kibono kye wankoba nze omugheereza wo; kuba ekyo n'ekyandeetera okusuubira." 
Psalms119:50 Ni bwemba nga ndi mu buzibu, okusuubira okwo n'okumpa obulamu." 
Psalms119:51 Abo abeekuluntaza baanhoomerera, aye tija kukyuka kuva ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:52 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bwendidhukira ensala yo ey'eira, nsigala nga ndi mugumu." 
Psalms119:53 Bwembona abakozi b'ebibi nga tibali kujiira ku mateeka go, obusungu bungema bungi." 
Psalms119:54 Ebiragiro byo n'ebimpa amaani, nga ndi ku nsi kuno ng'omugeni omugenze." 
Psalms119:55 Wo Musengwa Katonda, tyerabira liina lyo waire buba bwire, ebirowoozo byange biba ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:56 Mba musangaavu okujiira ku biragiro byo. 
Psalms119:57 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe ekirungi kyonka kye ndi nakyo; nkusuubiza okugemanga ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:58 Nkweghembye n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona, ongemerwe ekivunika nga bwe wansuubiza." 
Psalms119:59 Neefumintiriiza ku mpisa dhange, era ndi kukusuubiza okujiiranga ku by'onkoba byonka." 
Psalms119:60 Nze nsitukiramu busitukire, naayangugha okukola ng'ebiragiro byo bwe binkoba." 
Psalms119:61 Waire ababi bantega entuula dhaibwe, tija kwerabira mateeka go." 
Psalms119:62 Mu bwire ghagati nsituka, naakusaaka olw'ensala yo entuufu eziramu kwekubira." 
Psalms119:63 Abo boonaboona abakutya n'ababa bakagwa bange, abo boonaboona abajiira ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:64 Wo Musengwa Katonda, okugonza kwo eri abantu kungi tikukoma; ndhegeresa okukola by'olagira." 
Psalms119:65 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ombisiiza bukalamu nze omugheereza wo, nga bwe wansuubiza." 
Psalms119:66 Nkusaba ompe okumanha n'okusalangagho ekituufu, kuba neesiga ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:67 Nali ndaaliimye okuva mu ngira entuufu, iwe wankangaivula, aye buti tiva ku kibono kyo." 
Psalms119:68 Oli mukalamu, ni by'okola bikalamu; nkweghemba ondhegerese okukola by'olagira." 
Psalms119:69 Abo abeekuluntaza bandhogeraku eby'obuguya, ate nga nze njiira ku mateeka go n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona." 
Psalms119:70 Abantu abo baziramu kategeera naire, aye nze mba musangaavu okujiira ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:71 Okukangaivulwa kwange kwankola bukalamu, kuba kwandeetera okwega okukola by'olagira." 
Psalms119:72 Amateeka ge watugha ga mughendo ye ndi okusinga emungo ya feeza ni zaabu. 
Psalms119:73 Niiwe wampumba n'engalo dho wantaagho, nkusaba ompe okutegeera, memale ndhege ebiragiro byo kye binkoba." 
Psalms119:74 Abo abakutya bwe banambonanga baidha kusagambanga, kuba neesiga kye wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:75 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndidhi ng'ensala yo ntuufu eziramu kwekubira, era ndidhi nga wankangaivula kuba oli mwesigwa mu by'osuubiza." 
Psalms119:76 Nkusaba ongumye ng'ongonza obutalekera, nga bwe wansuubiza nze omugheereza wo." 
Psalms119:77 Nsaasira ompe obulamu, kuba mba musangaavu okujiira ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:78 Swaza abo abeekuluntaza, kuba baanumiriza bye ntakolangaku; aye nze ndidha kwefumintirizanga inho ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:79 Abo abakutya baidhe ye ndi, baidha kumanha by'okoba." 
Psalms119:80 Nkusaba ombeere okugema ebiragiro byo n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona, ndobe kuswala." 
Psalms119:81 Omwoyo gunsiriira olw'okuteegerera einho iwe okwidha okundokola; aye neesiga kye wayogera. 
Psalms119:82 Nkooye okukanula amaiso nga nteegerera kye wansuubiza, era mbuuza nti: “Oliidha li okumbeera?”" 
Psalms119:83 Nze nafuuka ng'oti n'endyanga ey'oluwu etakaagasa; aye tyerabirangaku biragiro byo naire. 
Psalms119:84 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nze omugheereza wo ndiguminkiriza kutuuka li? Abankiriga oja kubasalira li omusango?" 
Psalms119:85 Abantu abeekuluntaza abatagema mateeka go, baasima ebiina okuntega ngwemu." 
Psalms119:86 Abantu abo bankiriga nga bandhogeraku eby'obuguya; aye iwe ebiragiro byo byesigika lubeerera. Wo Musengwa Katonda, nhamba." 
Psalms119:87 Abantu abo baabulaku katono okundhita, aye tyakyuka kuva ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:88 Olw'okungonza kwo okutakoma, kuuma obulamu bwange, olwo nkolenga by'onkoba." 
Psalms119:89 Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe ky'okoba kirigho era kya kubaagho mu igulu ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms119:90 Oli mwesigwa eri abantu mu nse dhoonadhoona; wataagho ensi era waagigumya mu kifo kyayo. 
Psalms119:91 Olw'ekiragiro kyo ebintu byonabyona bikaaligho ni ye buli eno, kuba ebintu byonabyona bigheereza mulala iwe." 
Psalms119:92 Nguli amateeka go ti n'agandeetera okuba omusangaavu, nandibaire nga nazikirira bwe nadaazibwadaazibwa." 
Psalms119:93 Tija kwerabira by'olagira, kuba mu ebyo mwe wampeera okuba omulamu." 
Psalms119:94 Ndi wuwo, mponia abazigu, kuba nfuba okujiira ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:95 Abakozi b'ebibi baneeteeze benda kunzikiriza, aye nze neefumintiriza inho ku by'okoba." 
Psalms119:96 Nkizwire nga buli kintu kibaaku enkomerero; aye ebiragiro byo biziraku ghe bikoma. 
Psalms119:97 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nze nga ngonza inho amateeka go! Tirekera kugeefumintirizaaku olunaku lwonalwona." 
Psalms119:98 Ebiragiro byo binfuula okuba omugezi okusinga abazigu bange, kuba buli kaseera mbyefumintirizaaku." 
Psalms119:99 Ntegeera inho okusinga abandhegeresa, kuba omwoyo gwange guli ku by'okoba buli kaseera." 
Psalms119:100 Ntegeera inho okusinga n'abakaire, kuba buli kaseera nkola by'olagira." 
Psalms119:101 Neesamba empisa embi dhoonadhoona, nsobole okukola by'onkoba." 
Psalms119:102 Tirekerangaku kujiira ku by'olagira, kuba wandhegeresa." 
Psalms119:103 By'ondhegeresa bidhuudhuula, bwene byasinga n'omudheenene ogw'endhuki!" 
Psalms119:104 Mu mateeka go nfunamu okutegeera, kyenva ni nkyagha empisa edh'obuguya dhoonadhoona." 
Psalms119:105 Ekibono kyo n'eitaala eriimuliikirira ghe mbita, ni mbona engira." 
Psalms119:106 Neeyamye era tija kwerabira okujiiranga ku nsala yo entuufu eziramu kwekubira. 
Psalms119:107 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndaazibwadaazibwa ebitaloodheka; nkweghembye mpa obulamu nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:108 Wo Musengwa Katonda, siima okusaba kwange nga nkwebaza, ondhegerese okujiira ku nsala yo entuufu." 
Psalms119:109 Waire nga obulamu bwange buli mu kabi ka kufa buli kiseera, tija kwerabira mateeka go." 
Psalms119:110 Abakozi b'ebibi bantega omutego, aye naaloba kudaaliima kuva ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:111 By'okoba mbitwala ng'omugabo ogwange ku bwange ebyanda n'ebyanda; bwenebwene mu ebyo n'omuva okusangaala okw'omwoyo gwange. 
Psalms119:112 Nsazeegho okukolanga ng'amateeka go bwe gakoba ekiseera kyonakyona. 
Psalms119:113 Nkyagha abantu abayuugayuuga ni batagema mateeka na mwoyo mulala, aye nze ngonza inho amateeka go." 
Psalms119:114 Niiwe onkuuma era n'onwanirira, nze nsuubirira mu bye wankoba." 
Psalms119:115 Muve ghe ndi imwe abakozi b'ebibi, nze ngeme ebiragiro bya Katonda wange." 
Psalms119:116 Ngemaaku ongumye mbe mulamu nga bwe wansuubiza; otandeka kuswala kubona nga bye nasuubira tibituukiriire. 
Psalms119:117 Ngemerera ghabule ekibi ekintuukaku, ndidha kwegenderezanga ebyo by'olagira buli kaseera." 
Psalms119:118 Iwe okyagha abo boonaboona abadaaliima ni bava ku biragiro byo, olugezigezi lwaibwe lwonalwona muzira makulu." 
Psalms119:119 Abakozi b'ebibi boonaboona obabona nga baziramu makulu ng'oti bidomboodo, kyenva ni ngonza okukola ebyo by'okoba." 
Psalms119:120 Zeenazeena ndhugumira olw'okukutya; ensala yo ngitya inho. 
Psalms119:121 Nze nkola ebikalamu era ebituufu; otandekulira agho mu ngalo edh'abazigu bange. 
Psalms119:122 Otandekulira bwagho aye mbeera nze omugheereza wo; otaganha abo abeekuluntaza kuunhigiriza. 
Psalms119:123 Nkooye okukanula amaiso nga nteegerera iwe okundokola, otuukirize ekyo kye wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:124 Ndaga nga bw'ongonza einho obutalekera nze omugheereza wo, ondhegerese okukolanga by'olagira." 
Psalms119:125 Nze ndi mugheereza wo, mpa okutegeera, nsobole okumanhanga by'olagira." 
Psalms119:126 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ekiseera kituuse obeeku ni ky'okola, kuba abantu bamenha amateeka go." 
Psalms119:127 Nze ngonza inho ebiragiro byo, mbigonza inho okusinga ni zaabu, zaabu ole mwene omukenenule." 
Psalms119:128 Kyenva neesibirira ku kujiira ku ebyo by'olagira; ni nkyagha empisa embi dhoonadhoona. 
Psalms119:129 By'okoba bikalamu inho kyenva ni mbigondera n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona. 
Psalms119:130 Omuntu bw'ainhonholwa ebibono byo afunamu obutangaavu n'ole azira magezi yaafunamu amagezi. 
Psalms119:131 Ndhasaime omunwa ndi kulakalaka olw'amairu ge ndi nago, ag'okwenda okukola ebyo by'olagira." 
Psalms119:132 Nningirira ongemerwe ekivunika, nga bw'okola abo abakugonza." 
Psalms119:133 Gumya ebigere byange ku itaka ndobe kugwa nga bwe wasuubiza; otaganha kibi kyonakyona kumpangula. 
Psalms119:134 Mponia okunhigirizibwa abantu, nsobole okugema amateeka go." 
Psalms119:135 Nningaaku n'amaiso ag'ekivunika nze omugheereza wo, ondhegerese okukola by'olagira." 
Psalms119:136 Amaziga gakuuluula okunva mu maiso ng'oti miiga, olw'okubona ng'abantu tibagema mateeka go." 
Psalms119:137 Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe watuukirira mu buli ngeri, n'ensala yo ntuufu." 
Psalms119:138 Bye wakoba byonabyona bituufu, byesigika ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Psalms119:139 Obusungu bungema inho naayenda na kwabika, olw'abazigu bange abatajiira ku by'okoba." 
Psalms119:140 Ebisuubizo byo byesigika, era nze omugheereza wo mbigonza inho!" 
Psalms119:141 Nze ndi ng'oti kanampuni abantu ke banhooma, aye era tisobola kwerabira mateeka go." 
Psalms119:142 Oli mutuufu ebyanda n'ebyanda, n'amateeka go matuufu lubeerera." 
Psalms119:143 Ebizibu n'obweraliikirivu ndi na kamaala, aye okugema ebiragiro byo kunsangaaza." 
Psalms119:144 By'okoba byonabyona bituufu, biziramu kwekubira ebyanda n'ebyanda; mpa okubitegeeranga nsobole okuba omulamu." 
Psalms119:145 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweta n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona nga nkweghemba; ndhiraamu, olwo ndidha kugonderanga by'olagira." 
Psalms119:146 Nkweghembye mponia abazigu, nsobole okukolanga by'okoba." 
Psalms119:147 Mu nkyonkyo mpuuna naakusaba okumbeera nga neesiga ekisuubizo kyo. 
Psalms119:148 Obwire bwonabwona titenduka, nga ndi kwefumintiriza ku bye walagira." 
Psalms119:149 Wo Musengwa Katonda, olw'okungonza kwo einho obutalekera, wulirisa bye nkusaba; okuume obulamu bwange iwe asala mu mazima." 
Psalms119:150 Abankiriga banseetaku nga benda okunkola akabi, abantu abo tibagema mateeka go." 
Psalms119:151 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda ondi kumpi, n'ebiragiro byo bituufu lubeerera." 
Psalms119:152 Okuva eira nayega by'olagira; naamanha nga wabitaagho bibeegho ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Psalms119:153 Nkusaba obone bwendaazibwadaazibwa omponie, kuba nze tyerabira mateeka go." 
Psalms119:154 Mpolerezaayo omponie abazigu, mbe mulamu nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:155 Abakozi b'ebibi tibaja kulokolebwa, kuba tibakola by'olagira." 
Psalms119:156 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda, okusaasira kwo kungi inho; nkweghemba ompe obulamu kuba oli mutuufu." 
Psalms119:157 Abankiriga ndi na kamaala n'abazigu ndi na kyodo, aye tidaaliimangaku kuva ku by'olagira." 
Psalms119:158 Abantu abatakutya bangemya obusungu inho buli lwe mbabona, kuba tibagema biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:159 Bona nga bwe ngonza einho amateeka go onkuume nga ndi mulamu, kuba iwe ongonza inho obutalekera." 
Psalms119:160 Ekibono kyo n'amazima geene, n'ensala yo yoonayoona ntuufu eziramu kwekubira ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms119:161 Abantu abali n'obuyinza bankiriga ng'ate bazira nsonga ntuufu, aye nze ntya inho ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:162 Nsagamba inho olw'ebyo bye wasuubiza, naaba ng'oti n'ole agwire mu by'obukombe kamaala." 
Psalms119:163 Tyenda buguya era mbwenhinhala, aye ngonza inho amateeka go." 
Psalms119:164 Nkusaaka emikuzi musanvu olunaku, olw'ensala yo entuufu eziramu kwekubira." 
Psalms119:165 Abagonza amateeka go bawulira miraala myereere, ghazira kisobola kubasuula." 
Psalms119:166 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nsuubira nga niiwe oidha okundokola, era nkola ng'ebiragiro byo bwebikoba." 
Psalms119:167 Ngondera n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona ebyo by'onkoba, era mbigonza ebitaloodheka." 
Psalms119:168 Ngema amateeka go ni by'onkoba byonabyona; kuba iwe ombona nga bwe neebisa. 
Psalms119:169 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghemba owulire kye nsaba, ompe okutegeera nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:170 Ganha owulire okusaba kwange, ontoole mu ngalo dh'abazigu nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:171 Ndidha kukusaakanga buli kaakyeire, kuba niiwe ondhegeresa amateeka go." 
Psalms119:172 Ndidha kwembanga bye walagira, kuba ebiragiro byo bituufu lubeerera." 
Psalms119:173 Banga mwetegefu okumbeera buliidho, kuba nasalagho okujiiranga ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:174 Wo Musengwa Katonda, neegomba inho ondokole, era mba musangaavu okugema amateeka go." 
Psalms119:175 Mpa obulamu nsobole okukusaakanga, ng'ensala yo entuufu n'enkuuma." 
Psalms119:176 Nadaaliima ng'oti n'entaama eyabula, nkusaba onnoonie ye ndi kuba tyerabiranga biragiro byo." 
Psalms120:1 Bwe nali mu kabi nalirira Musengwa Katonda ampulire antoole mu kabi ako. 
Psalms120:2 Naakoba nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, mponia abantu abaguya, aboogera eby'okusubagha.”" 
Psalms120:3 Abaguya imwe! Oba Katonda alibakola atya? Oba alibabonereza na ki? 
Psalms120:4 Mugwana kwitibwa na byogi, na kwokebwa kusiriira!" 
Psalms120:5 Nkagwireku nze, okusenga mu bantu abali ng'oti n'ab'e Mesheki, ni mba mu bantu abali ng'oti n'ab'e Kedari!" 
Psalms120:6 Nga mmaze ekiseera kinene inho nga mba mu bantu abatenda miraala! 
Psalms120:7 Nze nhenda miraala aye bwe ndhogera, beene benda kutanula bwa lutalo." 
Psalms121:1 Ningirira ensozi neebuuza nti: “Naani anambeera?” 
Psalms121:2 Musengwa Katonda n'ambeera, oyo eyakola eigulu n'ensi." 
Psalms121:3 Musengwa Katonda oyo taja kukuganha kugwa, oyo n'omukuumi wo ataja kuwongera naire." 
Psalms121:4 Bona, oyo omukuumi wa Isiraeli taja kutenduka, waire okuwongera obuwongere." 
Psalms121:5 Musengwa Katonda n'akulabirira, era akuli kumpi agho ng'akukuuma." 
Psalms121:6 Ghazira kabi kalikutuukaku, ka gube omusana ng'endhuba eri kwaka, oba obwire ng'omwezi guli kwaka." 
Psalms121:7 Musengwa Katonda aja kukuwonianga olobe kugwa mu kabi koonakoona; akukuumenga ng'oli mulamu. 
Psalms121:8 Musengwa Katonda aja kukukuumanga ng'ofuluma era akukuumenga ng'oingira, okuva buti n'okweyongerayo ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms122:1 Nasangaala inho bwe bankoba bati: “Tuje mu ndhu ya Musengwa Katonda.” 
Psalms122:2 Bona iwe Yerusalemu, ife twatuuse ira mu miryango gyo era buti mwe twemereire!" 
Psalms122:3 Ekibuga Yerusalemu kyazimbibwa nga kyonakyona kyagemagana bukalamu. 
Psalms122:4 Omwo ebika byonabyona mwe bija, ebika ebyo eby'Abaisiraeli, nga bija okusiima Musengwa Katonda, nga Musengwa Katonda oyo mwene bwe yalagira." 
Psalms122:5 Omwo bakyabazinga boonaboona abaajanga nga basikira kyabazinga Daudi, mwe baatyamanga okulamula abantu baibwe." 
Psalms122:6 Musabire Yerusalemu kibenga miraala nga mukoba muti: “Abo abakugonza ka babenga n'enkabi. 
Psalms122:7 Abantu abakulimu ka babenga miraala, n'abo ababa mu bisaagaati bya bakyabazinga bo ghabule ekibatiisa.”" 
Psalms122:8 Olwa baganda bange ni bakagwa bange, nsaba nti: “Emiraala gibenga mu iwe.”" 
Psalms122:9 Olw'okuba ngonza inho endhu ya Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda waife, nkwendeza bikalamu byereere." 
Psalms123:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ningiriire ku iwe eyo mu igulu, y'oli ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga." 
Psalms123:2 Ng'omugheereza omusaadha bw'alingirira ku musengwa we omusaadha, n'omugheereza omukazi n'alingirira ku musengwa we omukazi, twena tutyo bwe tulingirira ku Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda waife, okutuusa lw'alitugemerwa ekivunika." 
Psalms123:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, tusaasire era tusaasirire irala, kuba tunhoomeibwa inho okusinga bwe tugwaniire." 
Psalms123:4 Tusiniirwa okuvumibwanga abo abali obukalamu n'okunhoomebwanga abo abeekuluntaza. 
Psalms124:1 Ha, ngoli Musengwa Katonda tiyali ku luuyi lwaife, abantu ba Isiraeli mukobe muti:" 
Psalms124:2 “Ngoli Musengwa Katonda tiyali ku luuyi lwaife, abazigu lwe baatulumba" 
Psalms124:3 banditumaliireku obusungu, beegomba na kutumira bumire nga tumoga;" 
Psalms124:4 banditweyiiyaagho ng'oti mwidhuzo gwa maadhi; baatuyoolookeraku ng'oti n'omwiga ogw'amaani," 
Psalms124:5 era twandifiire bubi ng'oti n'abatubira mu maadhi agali kwefuukuula.” 
Psalms124:6 Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe olw'obutatulekera bazigu baife kutuzikiriza. 
Psalms124:7 Tuwonie twalekuka ku mutego gwe batuteze; omutego gukutwike ife twawona! 
Psalms124:8 Musengwa Katonda n'atubeera, oyo eyakola eigulu n'ensi." 
Psalms125:1 Abo abeesiga Musengwa Katonda bali ng'oti n'olusozi Sioni, olutatengeeseka era olutavaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms125:2 Ng'ensozi bwe dheezungulwire Yerusalemu, ni Musengwa Katonda atyo bwe yeezungulwire abantu be ng'abakuuma okuva buti n'okweyongerayo ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms125:3 Abakozi b'ebibi tibalifuga nsi ya bantu batuufu, kuba abatuufu basobola boona okugwa mu kibi." 
Psalms125:4 Wo Musengwa Katonda, kolera bukalamu abo abalungi n'abo abagondera ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms125:5 Aye abo abaleka ebiragiro byo ni badaaliima, babonereze ghalala n'abakozi ab'ebibi. Emiraala gibe mu Isiraeli." 
Psalms126:1 Musengwa Katonda lwe yatwiza mu Sioni, twali ng'oti tuloota buloote." 
Psalms126:2 Ku matama twaidhula enseko, era twayemba nga tukuba n'emizira. Agho abantu abamaghanga agandi baakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda abakoleire ebyewuunhisa.”" 
Psalms126:3 Mu butuufu Musengwa Katonda atukoleire ebyewuunhisa era tusangaire. 
Psalms126:4 Wo Musengwa Katonda, twirizeegho Sioni nga bwe kyalinga eira, ng'oti bw'oiza amaadhi ni gaidha mu miiga egyakala mu kiketezo kya Buyudaaya ekikalukalu eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Psalms126:5 Abo abasiga nga balira amaziga, ka bakungule nga bakuba emizira!" 
Psalms126:6 Abo abaja nga balira, nga batwala ensigo, baliira nga bakuba mizira, nga beetwise bye bakungwire." 
Psalms127:1 Musengwa Katonda mwene bw'atazimba ndhu, abagizimba badaagira bwereere; Musengwa Katonda mwene bw'atakuuma kibuga, omukuumi amogera bwereere." 
Psalms127:2 Kuba kudaagira bwereere ole okuwuunanga enkyo, n'afaabiikana okufuna eky'okulya nga mweraliikirivu, era n'airamu okutenduka ng'obwire bujiire, kuba Musengwa Katonda alabirira abo b'agonza nga bali mu ndoolo." 
Psalms127:3 Bona eno, abaana n'omugabo omuntu gw'afuna okuva ku Musengwa Katonda. Bw'ozaala, Musengwa Katonda aba akughaire bwa kirabo." 
Psalms127:4 Abaana omuntu b'azaala ng'akaali mwisuka, bali ng'oti n'obulaso omulwani bw'aba nabwo mu ngalo." 
Psalms127:5 Yeesiimye oyo ali n'ekiruutu kye ekiidhwire obulaso obwo, kuba abazigu be tibaja kumusinga ng'ali mu kifo aghasalirwa ensonga." 
Psalms128:1 Wa nkabi oyo atya Musengwa Katonda, n'atambulira ku mateeka ge." 
Psalms128:2 Oidha kutoolanga eky'okulya mu mirimo gy'okola; oidha kubanga musangaavu, nga buli kintu kikujiira bukalamu." 
Psalms128:3 Mu maka go, mukazi wo aidha kubanga ng'oti n'omuzabbibu ogwama einho, ate abaana bo babenga oti miti emyoliva emito, nga beezungulwire ekiiwulo." 
Psalms128:4 Oboine? Atyo omuntu atya Musengwa Katonda bw'aliba n'enkabi. 
Psalms128:5 Nsaba Musengwa Katonda oyo ali mu Sioni akughenga enkabi, obonenga ekibuga Yerusalemu nga kiri bukalamu enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwo." 
Psalms128:6 Oghangaale obone ni ku baidhukulu. Emiraala gibe mu Isiraeli. 
Psalms129:1 “Okuva mu buto bwange abazigu bange babaire bandaazadaaza inho.” Abantu ba Isiraeli mukobe muti: 
Psalms129:2 “Okuva mu buto bwange abazigu bange babaire bandaazadaaza inho, aye baalemwa okumpangula." 
Psalms129:3 Omugongo gundidhwire bigufulugufulu, ng'oti n'enimiro ye balimiisa embago y'ente." 
Psalms129:4 Aye Musengwa Katonda oyo Omutuufu, yasala emigugha egy'ababi egyali ginsibye.”" 
Psalms129:5 Boonaboona abakyagha Sioni, bagwananga baabairirizaayo ekyeinhumainhuma baaswala." 
Psalms129:6 Ka babe ng'oti n'eisubi erimera ku ngulu kw'endhu, aye erikala nga likaali na kukula," 
Psalms129:7 omuntu ly'atasobola na kusibamu kinhwa, waire akafaaganda akaidhuza engalo." 
Psalms129:8 Era bagwananga baabulwa omuntu abitagho ng'abakoba ati: “Enkabi dha Musengwa Katonda dhibe n'imwe.” Olwo boona ni bairamu bati: “Tubendeza enkabi mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda.” 
Psalms130:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkulirira kuba ndi mu buzibu kamaala inho." 
Psalms130:2 Wo Musengwa Katonda, wulirisa okweghemba kwange, otege kutu owulire okusaba kwange, ombeere." 
Psalms130:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nguli weegemerera ebibi by'abantu, naani eyandiwonie okuzikirira?" 
Psalms130:4 Aye iwe otusonigha, tusobole okukugha ekitiisa." 
Psalms130:5 Nze nteegerera Musengwa Katonda aidhe ambeere, eisuubi lyange lyonalyona liri mu kisuubizo kye." 
Psalms130:6 Nteegerera Musengwa Katonda nga neesumba okusingaku n'abakuumi ab'obwire bwe beesumba obwire bukye; okusingaku abakuumi bwe bateega nga beesumba enkyo lituuke. 
Psalms130:7 Imwe Abaisiraeli, mwesigenga Musengwa Katonda, kuba abagonza obutalekera era buliidho mwetegefu okubanunula." 
Psalms130:8 Era aja kununula abantu ba Isiraeli mu bibi byaibwe byonabyona. 
Psalms131:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nze tyekuluntaza, era tyebona nga ndi wa ghaigulu. Timala biseera byange nga neegomba bintu ebikologho bye ntatuukaaniraku, oba ebiswikiriire okutegeera kwange." 
Psalms131:2 Nze ndi muwolu era nsiriike. Ng'omwana ye basiriisaagho bw'aba ng'ali ku ibeere lya inhina, zeena ntyo bwensiriike." 
Psalms131:3 Imwe Abaisiraeli mwesigenga Musengwa Katonda okuva buti n'okweyongerayo ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Psalms132:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, oteerabira mugheereza wo Daudi era oteerabira bukaluubirivu bwe yagumira." 
Psalms132:2 Wo Musengwa Katonda, idhukira ebyo Daudi oyo bye yasuubiza, ebyo bye yeeyama eri iwe Omukologho wa Yakobo." 
Psalms132:3 Yakoba ati: “Tiidha kuja ka, waire okungira mu buliri bwange;" 
Psalms132:4 tija kuganha maiso gange kukomba ku ndoolo naire, waire okuganha ebigowe byange okuwongera," 
Psalms132:5 okutuusa nga ntairegho ekifo Musengwa Katonda mw'aba, ekifo Omukologho wa Yakobo mw'asula.”" 
Psalms132:6 Bona, Esanduuku ey'Endagaano twagiwuliza ng'eri e Bethelehemu, twagibona ng'eri mu biketezo bya Yaari." 
Psalms132:7 Agho twakoba tuti: “Ka tuje mu ndhu ya Musengwa Katonda, tuje tweyale gha bigere bye tumusinze.”" 
Psalms132:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda, situkiramu oje otyame mu kifo kyo obeemu n'Esanduuku yo ey'Endagaano eyoleka obukumu bwo." 
Psalms132:9 Bakabona bo baghe okukolanga ebituufu buliidho; abo abakutya obaghe okukuba emizira olw'eisanhu. 
Psalms132:10 Wo Musengwa Katonda, kola nga bwe wasuubiza omugheereza wo Daudi; otamusuula ere oyo kyabazinga ye walonda." 
Psalms132:11 Kuba wasuubiza era toja kukyusaamu oti: “Nditoola mulala ku baana bo, naamufuula kyabazinga, yaafuga nga iwe oviiregho." 
Psalms132:12 Ekyo kiribaagho kasita abaana bo abo bakuuma ndagaano, ni bagema n'ebiragiro byange bye mbalagira. Era boona, abaana abaibwe n'abaja okukusikiranga ku bwakyabazinga ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Psalms132:13 Musengwa Katonda yeerondera Sioni, ng'agho gh'aidha okubanga." 
Psalms132:14 Yaakoba ati: “Kino n'ekifo kyange ebyanda n'ebyanda; ghano ghe ndidha okubanga, kuba mwene ntyo bwe nhenze." 
Psalms132:15 Ab'omu Sioni ndidha kubagha byonabyona bye beetaaga mu bungi, abaavu baamu boonaboona baidha kulyanga emere baigute." 
Psalms132:16 Bakabona baamu ndidha kubagha enkabi mu bye bakola byonabyona, n'abantu baamu abatya Katonda mbaleetere okukuba emizira olw'eisanhu." 
Psalms132:17 Omwo mwe nditoola kyabazinga, nga wa ku nda ya Daudi; omulonde wange oyo afugenga nga ninze mmukuuma." 
Psalms132:18 Abazigu be nja kubaswaza, aye obwakyabazinga bwe buja kusigala nga bukaaligho.”" 
Psalms133:1 Bwenebwene nga kirungi inho abantu ba Katonda okuba aghalala nga baisania! 
Psalms133:2 Kiri ng'oti n'omuzigo ogw'omughendo gwe baasiiga ku mutwe gwa Aaroni Omukulu wa Bakabona, ogwakuuluula okutuuka ku kirevu kye, era ni gutuukira irala ni ku kitogi ky'ekanzu ye." 
Psalms133:3 Kiri ng'oti n'omusulo ogw'oku lusozi Herimoni ogugwa ku nsozi dha Sioni. Eyo mu Sioni Musengwa Katonda ye yasuubiza okugha abantu enkabi, obwo nga n'obulamu obutawaagho." 
Psalms134:1 Mwidhe tusaake Musengwa Katonda, imwe mwenamwena abagheereza ba Musengwa Katonda ababa mu ndhu ye obwire nga mugheereza. Musaake Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms134:2 Mulingirize emikono gyaimwe eri ekifo ekitukuvu, musaake Musengwa Katonda." 
Psalms134:3 Musengwa Katonda oyo aba mu Sioni abaghenga enkabi, oyo eyakola eigulu n'ensi." 
Psalms135:1 Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda! Imwe mwenamwena abagheereza ba Musengwa Katonda, mumusaake." 
Psalms135:2 Musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe ababa mu ndhu ye mu luya olw'endhu ya Katonda waife. 
Psalms135:3 Musaake Musengwa Katonda kuba mulungi inho! Era mwembe enhembo edhisaaka eriina lye, kuba wa kivunika." 
Psalms135:4 Musengwa Katonda yeerondera aba Yakobo, abantu ba Isiraeli, yaabafuula ababe ku bubwe." 
Psalms135:5 Nze ndidhi nga Musengwa Katonda mukologho, era nga n'asinga bakatonda boonaboona ab'amaghanga agandi." 
Psalms135:6 Musengwa Katonda ky'ayenda ky'akola, ka mube mu igulu oba ku nsi, ka mube mu nhandha oba ku ntobo y'enhandha." 
Psalms135:7 Oyo n'asitusa ebire okuva ensi y'ekoma n'asindika olukuba mu maadhi agali kugwa, era n'atoolayo empewo ng'oti n'omuntu bw'atoolayo ebintu bye mu byagi." 
Psalms135:8 Oyo n'eyaita abaana boonaboona ababeri ab'Abamisiri, n'ensolo dhoonadhoona edh'Abamisiri edhaazaalibwa mu luzaalo olusooka." 
Psalms135:9 Oyo n'eyakolera mu Misiri ebyewuunhio n'ebyewuninkiriza, okubonereza kyabazinga wa Misiri n'abantu be." 
Psalms135:10 Oyo n'eyazikiriza amaghanga kamaala, era n'eyaita bakyabazinga ab'amaani bano:" 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni kyabazinga w'Abamori, ni Ogi kyabazinga wa Bashani, ni bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'e Kanaani." 
Psalms135:12 Eitaka lyaibwe yaaligha abantu be Abaisiraeli, ng'omugabo gwaibwe." 
Psalms135:13 Wo Musengwa Katonda, eriina lisigalagho ebyanda n'ebyanda; abantu ab'ense n'ense baidha kukumanhanga." 
Psalms135:14 Musengwa Katonda aidha kulwaniriranga abantu be; aidha kugemerwanga abagheereza be ekivunika.
