Psalms135:15 Ebintu abamaghanga agandi bye basinza, bya feeza na zaabu, abantu bye bakola n'engalo dhaibwe." 
Psalms135:16 Bibaaku eminwa aye nga tibyogera, byabaaku amaiso aye nga tibibona." 
Psalms135:17 Bibaaku n'amatu aye nga tibiwulira era tibisobola waire na kugheera. 
Psalms135:18 Abo ababikola ghalala n'abo ababyesiga, bagwananga boona baaba ng'oti ni byene bwe biri." 
Psalms135:19 Imwe Abaisiraeli, musaake Musengwa Katonda; imwe bakabona abagheereza Katonda, musaake Musengwa Katonda!" 
Psalms135:20 Imwe Abalevi abagheereza mu ndhu ya Katonda, musaake Musengwa Katonda! Imwe mwenamwena abatya Musengwa Katonda, mumusaake!" 
Psalms135:21 Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe mu Sioni, oyo aba mu Yerusalemu. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda!" 
Psalms136:1 Musiime Musengwa Katonda kuba mulungi; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:2 Musiime Katonda owa bakatonda boonaboona; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:3 Musiime Musengwa Katonda owa basengwa; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:4 Oyo ni yenka akola ebyewuunhio ebikologho; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:5 Oyo n'eyakola eigulu mu magezi ge; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:6 Oyo n'eyataagho ensi ku maadhi; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:7 Oyo n'eyakola ebyaka eby'amaani; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:8 Endhuba efugenga omusana; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:9 Omwezi ni muunienie bifugenga obwire; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:10 Oyo n'eyaita abaana ababeri ab'Abamisiri; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:11 Oyo n'eyatoola Abaisiraeli mu Bamisiri abo; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:12 Oyo n'eyagolola omukono gwe ogw'amaani, n'abatoolayo n'engalo dhe; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:13 Oyo n'eyayawula mu Nhandha Emyufu aghabiri; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:14 Yaabisa Abaisiraeli ghagati ghaayo; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:15 Aye yaasuula kyabazinga wa Misiri n'eigye lye mu Nhandha Emyufu; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:16 Oyo n'eyabisa abantu be mu irungu; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:17 Oyo n'eyaita bakyabazinga ab'amaani; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:18 Era yaita bakyabazinga abaali abamanhifu einho; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:19 Yaita Sihoni, kyabazinga ow'Abamori; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:20 Ni Ogi kyabazinga ow'e Bashani; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:21 Yaatoola eitaka lyaibwe yaaligha abantu be Abaisiraeli ng'omugabo; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:22 Yaaligha Abaisiraeli abagheereza be ng'omugabo; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:23 Oyo n'eyatubeera ng'omuzigu atughangwire; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:24 Yaidha yaatuwonia omuzigu eyali atughangwire; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:25 Oyo n'agha kiisi ekiri n'obulamu emere ey'okulya; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms136:26 Musiime Katonda ow'eigulu; okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda." 
Psalms137:1 Eyo ku miiga egy'e Babilonia twatyamanga, twalira nga twidhukiire Sioni." 
Psalms137:2 Endingidi dhaife twalekera okudhikuba, twadhighanika ku bikondo." 
Psalms137:3 Kuba, nga tuli eyo, abaatunhaga okututoola ewaife, baatukobanga tubembere; abantu abo abaatulumyanga, baatukoba bati: “Mutwembereku ku nhembo dhe mwayembanga mu Sioni.”" 
Psalms137:4 Aye nga tughanga tutya okwemba olwembo lwa Musengwa Katonda mu nsi ey'abamaghanga agandi. 
Psalms137:5 Ha, bwenkwerabiranga iwe Yerusalemu, omukono gwange omusaadha gugwananga gwaniala, naaloba kwiramu kukukubira ndingidi." 
Psalms137:6 Bwenebwene bwe ntakwidhukiranga iwe Yerusalemu, ni ndoba okukutwala nga niiwe ondeetera eisanhu lyenelyene, olulimi lugwananga lwaneesibira ku kibuno, naaloba kwiramu kukwembera." 
Psalms137:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, idhukira Abaedomu kye baakola ku lunaku Abababilonia lwe baagema Yerusalemu. Baakobanga bati: “Mu kisaaniegho kyonakyona. Mutuukire irala ku musingi!”" 
Psalms137:8 Imwe abantu ab'e Babiloni, mwidha kuzikirizibwa! Omuntu yeenayeena bw'alibasasula ekyo kyene kye mwatukola, aliba akoze kikalamu kyene." 
Psalms137:9 Omuntu oyo bw'alitoola abaana baimwe n'abakuba ku mabaale ni bafa, aliba akoze kikalamu kyene!" 
Psalms138:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nsiimye inho n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona; nze ndidha kukwemberanga enhembo edhikusaaka, nga ni bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi babona." 
Psalms138:2 Neeyala ghansi nga ningiriire eisinzizo lyo eitukuvu naasaaka eriina lyo, olw'okungonza einho obutalekera n'olw'okuba omwesigwa, era n'olw'okuba ogulumiza eriina lyo n'ebiragiro byo okusinga ebintu ebindi byonabyona." 
Psalms138:3 Olunaku lwe nakulirira waidha wambeera, waayongera okundhizaamu amaani." 
Psalms138:4 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'oku nsi baidha kukusaakanga, kuba baawulira bye wakoba." 
Psalms138:5 Era baidha kwembanga ku ebyo bye wakola, kuba ekitiisa kyo kinene." 
Psalms138:6 Waire nga iwe oli ghaigulu inho, ofaayo inho ku abo abawombeefu. Aye abo abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu obategeera mangu." 
Psalms138:7 Nze waire mba ghagati mu bizibu, iwe okuuma obulamu bwange, waalwanisa abazigu bange waabalobera okunkola obubi, wantoola ku bazigu bange olw'obukumu bwo." 
Psalms138:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe oidha kunkolera byonabyona bye wasuubiza; okugonza kwo tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda. Otalekulira agho ekyo kye wakola n'engalo dho." 
Psalms139:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, waneekalirisa era wantegeera." 
Psalms139:2 Oidhi bye nkola byonabyona; otegeera bye ndowooza waire ng'oli ghala. 
Psalms139:3 Ombona nga ndi kutambula oba nga ndi kulambaala; ghazira kye nkola ky'otaidhi. 
Psalms139:4 Ni bwe kuba okwogera mba nkaali, nga wamanhie ira kye nja okukoba." 
Psalms139:5 Oneezungulwire ng'oti kikomera, wankuuma n'amaani go." 
Psalms139:6 Okuntegeera kwo okwaga agho kuneewuninkiriza, era kuswikiriire amagezi gange." 
Psalms139:7 Katyo gha ye nsobola okuja ni nkuvaaku? Era nsobola kulumukira gha y'otali? 
Psalms139:8 Bwe niina mu igulu oliyo, ni bwe nambaala mu nsi ey'abafu yoona oliyo." 
Psalms139:9 Bwenguluka ni nja eyo e buvandhuba, oba ni nsenga eyo eghala einho mu bugwandhuba," 
Psalms139:10 yoonayoona oliyo okundaga engira n'okumbeera. 
Psalms139:11 Bwenkoba nti ka neegise mu nzikiiza, oba nti omusana oguli ghe ndi gufuuke bwire," 
Psalms139:12 n'enzikiiza yeene teba nzikiiza ku iwe, era obwire bwaka ng'oti musana, kuba enzikiiza eba ng'oti butangaavu ku iwe." 
Psalms139:13 Niiwe wankola, na buli kitundu kyange eky'omubiri; niiwe wayungayunga ebitundu byange nga ndi mu nda ya maama." 
Psalms139:14 Nkusaaka kuba weewuunhisa era otiibwa. By'okola byonabyona byewuninkiriza. Ekyo nkiidhi bukalamu. 
Psalms139:15 Wamanha bukalamu ng'amagumba gange gakolwa, gaayungwayungwa n'obwegendereza mu ngiso mu nda ya maama." 
Psalms139:16 Amaiso go gaabona ebitundu byange nga bikaali na kukolebwa. Enaku edh'obulamu bwange dhaaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kyo nga dhikaali na kutoolera. 
Psalms139:17 Wo Katonda wange, ng'ebidhuubo byo bya mughendo inho ye ndi! Bw'obisoloza nga biba kamaala!" 
Psalms139:18 Bwengezaaku okubibala bisinga omusenho obungi. Bwenzuuka era mba nkaali n'iwe. 
Psalms139:19 Wo Katonda wange, nguli oita ababi, n'obaamingaku abatemo abo!" 
Psalms139:20 Abantu abo bakwogeraku bubi, baakutakania nga bakola ebibi." 
Psalms139:21 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nze nkyagha abo abakukyagha, naawulira enaku nga mbona abantu abakudheemera." 
Psalms139:22 Mbakyaghira irala, era mbatwala ng'abazigu bange beene." 
Psalms139:23 Wo Katonda wange, neekalirisa otegeere omwoyo gwange, era ondebe omanhe ebidhuubo byange." 
Psalms139:24 Bona oba nga mu nze mulimu ekintu ekibi kyonakyona, era ontuuse mu ngira ey'ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms140:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ntoola mu buyinza bw'abakozi b'ebibi; omponie abantu bano abakambwe," 
Psalms140:2 abayiiya okukola ebibi, ni basiikuula entalo ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Psalms140:3 Enimi dhaibwe dhiita ng'oti misota; n'eminwa gyaibwe giri ng'oti girimu busagwa bwa kiyiri. 
Psalms140:4 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkuuma ababi balobe kungemaku; omponie abantu abo abakambwe abali kweteesa okunsuula." 
Psalms140:5 Abantu bano abeekuluntaza banteze omutego; bantega n'olutuula n'emigugha, ni mu ngira ye mbitamu baasimamu ebiina okuntega." 
Psalms140:6 Nze nkoba Musengwa Katonda nti: “Niiwe Katonda wange.” Wo Musengwa Katonda, wulira bye ndi kukusaba, onhambe." 
Psalms140:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe Musengwa Katonda wange ow'amaani anwanirira era n'ankuuma mu lutalo." 
Psalms140:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda, otaganha babi abo kye benda kituukirire; entegeka dhaibwe edh'okuunumya ka dhife dhityo." 
Psalms140:9 Waire baneezungulwire, otabaganha kumpangula; ebibi bye bandhogeraku byonabyona ka bibairirengaku." 
Psalms140:10 Omuliro ogw'amanda ka gubamagalikeku gubasiriize, basuulibwe mu biina eyo ye batasobola kuva." 
Psalms140:11 Abo abaghaama banaibwe ka babule ekibajiira obukalamu ku nsi kuno; obuzibu obw'okulalakulala bwidhire abakola eby'obukambwe bubazikirize. 
Psalms140:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndidhi nti olwanirira abadaazibwadaazibwa, waalwanirira n'abaavu balobe kunhigirizibwa." 
Psalms140:13 Bwenebwene abatuufu baidha kukusaakanga; abo abagondera ebiragiro byo baidha kubanga gh'oli. 
Psalms141:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndi kukulirira yangughaku ombeere, era ompulirisenga nga nkwese." 
Psalms141:2 Ganha okusaba kwange kukutuukeku ng'oti n'akawoowo ak'obubbaani, n'emikono gyange gye nsituliire y'oli gibe ng'oti n'omusengo ogw'eigulo." 
Psalms141:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, omunwa gwange guteeku kuufulu, n'ensaya dhange odhiwumbeku." 
Psalms141:4 Otanganha kwendanga kukola bibi, n'okumala ebiseera byange nga ndi kutwalirizibwa mu kukola ebibi ghalala n'abo abakozi b'ebibi. Era otanganha kweyimbanga mu bibinuko byaibwe." 
Psalms141:5 Omuntu omukalamu amala gambonereza oba yandhuuka olw'okungemerwa ekisa, okusinga okuganha ekitiibwa ekimpeebwa abantu ababi, kuba tirekerangaku kusaba nga nvumirira ebikolwa byaibwe ebibi." 
Psalms141:6 Lwe baligheebwayo y'abo abalibasalira omusango okubasinga, olwo lwe balimanha nga Musengwa Katonda ky'akobye kiba kituufu." 
Psalms141:7 N'amagumba gaibwe galisuulibwa agho ku munwa ogw'amagombe, ng'oti n'olubaale, lwe bamenhiemenhie, ni baluleka agho ku itaka." 
Psalms141:8 Aye nze amaiso gange gali ku iwe Musengwa Katonda wange. Niiwe ye neesiga, otandekulira agho mu batemo." 
Psalms141:9 Nkuuma ndobe kugwa ku mutego gwe banteze, era omponie ndobe kugwa mu lutuula olw'abakozi b'ebibi abo." 
Psalms141:10 Abakozi b'ebibi bagwananga baagwa mu ntuula dhaibwe dheene, aye nze naawona." 
Psalms142:1 Ndirira Musengwa Katonda aidhe ambeere; era mmweghemba awulire okusaba kwange. 
Psalms142:2 Mmulomboodhera ebineeraliikiriza; naamukobera ebizibu byange byonabyona. 
Psalms142:3 Amaani bwe gampwamu, ankuuma yandabirira. Mu ngira mwe mbita, abazigu bange batezeemu omutego okungemya." 
Psalms142:4 Nninga eno n'ere mbone munange, aye nga ghazira andiku naire, ghazira ye naalumukira, era ghazira muntu yeenayeena anfaaku." 
Psalms142:5 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkulirira oidhe ombeere; niiwe onkuuma era niiwe wenka ye neesiga mu nsi muno." 
Psalms142:6 Otaloba kumbeera nga nkulirira, kuba mpoiremu eisuubi. Mponia abo abankiriga, kuba ba maani inho okunsinga." 
Psalms142:7 Ntoola mu ikomera, nsobole okukusiimanga buliidho era nkusaakenga nga ndi mu bantu bo abeesoloiza okukusinza; kuba onaaba onkoleire bukalamu." 
Psalms143:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, wulirisa okusaba kwange. Nga bw'oli omutuufu era omwesigwa, wulira okukweghemba kwange, onkolere kye ndi kukusaba." 
Psalms143:2 Nze omugheereza wo otandhiza mu bya kwewozaaku, kuba ezira muntu mulamu azira musango mu maiso go." 
Psalms143:3 Abazigu bange baamingirira bantuukaku, bankuba bantentena era banta mu nzikiiza bansibira omwo, naaba ng'oti ni bale abaafa eira." 
Psalms143:4 Kale amaani gampoiremu naaweeramu irala eisuubi. 
Psalms143:5 Ndidhukira ebiseera ebyabita, neefumintiriza ku ebyo byonabyona bye wakola, era neetegereza ebyo byonabyona by'ojiire ng'oleetagho." 
Psalms143:6 Nze nsitulira y'oli emikono gyange naakusaba. Ng'eitaka eikalu bwe lyetaaga einho amaadhi, zeena ntyo bwe nhenda einho okuba gh'oli." 
Psalms143:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, yangughaku ombeere! Mpoiremu eisuubi. Otaneegisaaku, ndobe kuba ng'oti n'abali e magombe." 
Psalms143:8 Nkusaba buli nkyo ondholekenga nga bw'ongonza obutalekera, kuba niiwe ye neesiga. Ngalagira bwe mbe neebise, kuba niiwe ye nsaba." 
Psalms143:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda, numukiire y'oli onkuume, omponie abazigu bange." 
Psalms143:10 Ndhegeresa okukolanga nga bw'oyenda, kuba niiwe Katonda wange! Olw'omwoyo gwo omulungi mbisa mu ngira entuufu." 
Psalms143:11 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkuuma mbe mulamu nga bwe wasuubiza. Olw'obutuufu bwo ntoola mu buzibu." 
Psalms143:12 Era olw'okungonza einho obutalekera, zikiriza abazigu bange boonaboona, osaaniegho abo boonaboona abankyagha; kuba nze nkugondera." 
Psalms144:1 Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe, oyo ankuuma n'andhegeresa okulwana entalo." 
Psalms144:2 Oyo n'ankuuma, era ow'amaani anwanirira n'andokola. Oyo n'amponia ng'oti ngabo mu lutalo, era oyo n'obulumukiro bwange. Oyo n'aghangula amaghanga, yaagampa naagafuga." 
Psalms144:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, omuntu katyo ni ki iwe okumufaaku; omwana ow'omuntu ni ki iwe okumudhuuba?" 
Psalms144:4 Omuntu ali ng'oti muuka buuka gwa mu nhindo; enaku edh'obulamu bwe dhiri ng'oti kinsense ekibita obubite. 
Psalms144:5 Wo Musengwa Katonda, igulagho eigulu oike ku nsi; gema ku nsozi dhinioke omwosi." 
Psalms144:6 Myansa olukuba obasansaanie; olase obulaso bwo obabinge. 
Psalms144:7 Golola omukono gwo okuva ghaigulu eyo, onhinhulule mu maadhi agenda okuumira omponie; ontoole ku bamaghanga agandi abankiriga" 
Psalms144:8 era abaguya buli kiseera, ni bwe baba nga beerayiriire obutaguya." 
Psalms144:9 Wo Katonda wange, ndidha kukwembera olwembo oluyaaka, nkubireku n'entongooli ey'enkosi eikumi," 
Psalms144:10 iwe ogha bakyabazinga obughanguzi, n'owonia omugheereza wo Daudi." 
Psalms144:11 Mponia abazigu bange abakambwe, ontoole ku bamaghanga agandi abankiriga era abaguya buli kiseera, ni bwe baba nga beerayiriire obutaguya." 
Psalms144:12 Batabane baife nga bali kwisuka bagwananga baaba oti bisimbe ebikula n'amaani ni baghala baife baaba ng'oti n'empango endholige, edhigemerera endhu ya kyabazinga mu nsonda." 
Psalms144:13 Ebyagi byaife bigwananga byaidhula emere eya buli nsambo, n'entaama dhaife dhaazaalagana mitwalo na mitwalo," 
Psalms144:14 n'ente dhaife dhaazaalagana aghazira kusondhola oba okufiisa. N'ebibuga byaife byona bigwananga byaloba kulumbibwa bazigu, enguudo dhaamu dhaabulamu enduulu n'okulira." 
Psalms144:15 Beesiimye abo abali mu mbeera ng'oti n'eyo. Beesiimye abali ni Musengwa Katonda nga ni Katonda waibwe! 
Psalms145:1 Wo Katonda wange era Kyabazinga wange, ndidha kukusaakanga olw'obukulu bwo, era nkusiimenga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms145:2 Buli kaakyeire ndidha kukusiimanga era nkusaakenga ebyanda n'ebyanda. 
Psalms145:3 Musengwa Katonda mukologho, era ni yenka agwaine okusinzibwa; ghazira muntu ategeera bukalamu bukologho bwe." 
Psalms145:4 Buli luse lwa bantu lwidhanga kukobera olulwiraku ebyewuunhisa bye wakola, lwogerenga ku bikolwa byo eby'amaani." 
Psalms145:5 Baidha kughayanga ku kitiisa kyo n'obwakyabazinga bwo, ninze zeena neefumintirizenga ku bikolwa byo ebyewuninkiriza." 
Psalms145:6 Abantu baidha kughayanga ku bye wakola eby'amaani, ninze zeena nkoberenga abantu nga bw'oli omukologho." 
Psalms145:7 Baidha kulomboodhanga nga bw'oli omulungi einho, bembenga inho ku butuufu bwo." 
Psalms145:8 Musengwa Katonda wa kivunika era asaasira, alwagho okusungughala era agonza inho abantu obutalekera." 
Psalms145:9 Musengwa Katonda mulungi eri abantu boonaboona, alumirwa kiisi kye yakola." 
Psalms145:10 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ebitonde byo byonabyona biidha kukusaakanga, n'abantu bo boonaboona abakutya baidha kukusiimanga." 
Psalms145:11 Baidha kughayanga ku kitiisa eky'obwakyabazinga bwo, bakoberenga abantu nga bw'oli ow'obukumu," 
Psalms145:12 olwo abantu bamanhe ebikolwa byo eby'amaani n'obulungi obw'ekitiisa eky'obwakyabazinga bwo. 
Psalms145:13 Obwakyabazinga bwo bwa byanda na byanda, era oja kufuga abantu ense n'ense. Musengwa Katonda mwesigwa mu by'akoba byonabyona era asaasira mu by'akola." 
Psalms145:14 Musengwa Katonda atoola abo abali mu buzibu, ate abawoiremu eisuubi yaabaizaamu amaani." 
Psalms145:15 Ebitonde byonabyona biringirira ku iwe, okubigha emere yaabyo mu kiseera ekituufu." 
Psalms145:16 Obigha byonabyona byafuna, ghaabulagho ekisigala nga kikaayenda." 
Psalms145:17 Musengwa Katonda akola byonabyona mu butuufu era wa kivunika mu by'akola. 
Psalms145:18 Abo abasaba Musengwa Katonda, Musengwa Katonda oyo tabasuulirira, abo ababa nga bamusabye n'omwoyo omulala." 
Psalms145:19 Abo boonaboona abamutya awulira okulira kwaibwe yaabawonia, era yaabagha bye benda." 
Psalms145:20 Musengwa Katonda akuuma obulamu bw'abo abamugonza, aye abakozi b'ebibi boonaboona aidha kubazikiriza." 
Psalms145:21 Nze ndidha kusaakanga Musengwa Katonda, na buli kitonde kisaakenga eriina lye eitukuvu ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Psalms146:1 Nze ka nsaake Musengwa Katonda. Ka nsaake Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona. 
Psalms146:2 Nze ndidha kusaakanga Musengwa Katonda obulamu bwange bwonabwona, era nhembenga enhembo edhisaaka Katonda wange nga nkaali mulamu." 
Psalms146:3 Muteesiganga bafuzi ba ku nsi; waire okwesiganga omuntu obuntu, kuba azira ky'ayamba." 
Psalms146:4 Omuntu olufa ati ng'aira mu itaka; era ku olwo ebyo by'abaire ng'ategeike okukola, byonabyona lwe bikoma." 
Psalms146:5 Yeesiimye oyo ayambibwa Katonda wa Yakobo, era n'asuubirira mu Musengwa Katonda nga ni Katonda we." 
Psalms146:6 Oyo n'eyakola eigulu n'ensi, n'enhandha, n'ebirimu byonabyona. Era oyo tiyeerabira ky'aba asuubiiza." 
Psalms146:7 Abanhigirizibwa abasalira omusango mu butuufu era yaagha abayala emere. Musengwa Katonda oyo asibula abasibe mu makomera," 
Psalms146:8 era yaazibula amaiso g'abatulu. Abo abawoiremu eisuubi abaizaamu amaani era agonza abakola by'asiima. 
Psalms146:9 Musengwa Katonda akuuma abasenze, be tusenza mu nsi yaife, yaayamba banamwandu ni bamulekwa. Aye azikiriza ebyo abakozi ab'ebibi bye bakola." 
Psalms146:10 Musengwa Katonda ni kyabazinga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Iwe Sioni, Katonda wo aja kufuga abantu ab'ense n'ense. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda!" 
Psalms147:1 Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda! Nga kirungi okwemba enhembo edhisaaka Katonda waife! Olw'ekisa kye agwaine okwemberwa enhembo edhimusaaka. 
Psalms147:2 Musengwa Katonda ali kuzimba Yerusalemu buyaaka; ali kwiza Abaisiraeli abaali abanhage. 
Psalms147:3 Abo abawoiremu amaani abaizaamu amaani, yaasiba ebighero ku mabwa gaibwe." 
Psalms147:4 Oyo n'eyasalagho muunienie bwe dhibe dhaage obungi, era dhoonadhoona yaadhigha amaina gaadho." 
Psalms147:5 Musengwa Katonda waife mukologho era wa buyinza, ali n'amagezi agatawaayo." 
Psalms147:6 Musengwa Katonda asitusa abo abaniinirirwa, aye abakozi ab'ebibi yaabasuula ku itaka." 
Psalms147:7 Mwembere Musengwa Katonda nga mumusiima; mutabulemu n'entongooli nga mwembera Katonda waife. 
Psalms147:8 Aghemba ku igulu ebire, yaasindika amaadhi agagwa ku nsi era yaameza eisubi ku nsozi." 
Psalms147:9 Agha ensolo emere yaadho, era atyo bw'akola n'amakoova amato, bwegaba gali kulira endhala." 
Psalms147:10 Eisanhu lye tiriri mu kuba na mbalaasi dha maani, waire okuba n'abalwani ab'amaani," 
Psalms147:11 aye asangaalira abo bamutya, abo abasuubirira mu kugonza kwe okutakoma." 
Psalms147:12 Imwe ab'omu Yerusalemu, musaake Musengwa Katonda! Imwe ab'omu Sioni Musaake Katonda waimwe!" 
Psalms147:13 Agumya emiryango gyaimwe, era yaagha enkabi abantu baimwe." 
Psalms147:14 Akuuma ensalosalo edh'ekiketezo kyaimwe nga dhirimu emiraala, era yaabagha emere enkalamu yeene nga ya mwero." 
Psalms147:15 Agha ensi ebiragiro, era ky'alagiire bakigondera mangu." 
Psalms147:16 Asindika omugozi gwaghemba ku itaka nga gutukula inho, ate yaafuumuula olufu ng'oti nkungu." 
Psalms147:17 Amansa omugozi ng'oti bubaale; ghazira asobola kugumira kiinhogogo ky'asindika. 
Psalms147:18 Agho yaalagira omugozi gwasaanuuka era yaatuma empewo, amaadhi gaakuuluula." 
Psalms147:19 Akobera Yakobo obukwenda bwe, yaakobera Isiraeli ebiragiro bye n'amateeka ge." 
Psalms147:20 Ekyo takikolerangaku nsi yindi yoonayoona, era tibaidhi by'alagira. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda!" 
Psalms148:1 Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda! Musaake Musengwa Katonda mwenamwena abali mu igulu, musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe mwenamwena abali ghaigulu." 
Psalms148:2 Musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe bamalaika be mwenamwena, musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe ab'omu igulu ab'amaani mwenamwena." 
Psalms148:3 Iwe endhuba n'iwe omwezi mumusaake, mumusaake imwe emuunienie edhaaka mwenamwena." 
Psalms148:4 Mumusaake imwe eigulu erisingayo okuba ghaigulu, n'imwe amaadhi agali ghaigulu gh'eigulu." 
Psalms148:5 Ebintu byonabyona ka bisaake eriina lya Musengwa Katonda, kuba yalagira bulagire byatondebwa." 
Psalms148:6 Yaata ebintu ebyo mu bifo byabyo, bibenga omwo ebyanda n'ebyanda, yaabiteeragho eiteeka lye biri n'okujiiraku." 
Psalms148:7 Musaake Musengwa Katonda mwenamwena abali mu nsi, imwe mwenamwena agasota ag'omu maadhi ni byonabyona ebiri ku ntobo y'enhandha." 
Psalms148:8 N'imwe omuliro, omugozi, omuzira, n'olufu era n'empewo ya kiwunga ejiira ku biragiro bye, mumusaake." 
Psalms148:9 Mumusaake imwe ensozi n'obusozi mwenamwena, imwe emiti egy'ebibala n'emiti egy'omu nsiko;" 
Psalms148:10 imwe ensolo mwenamwena edh'omu nsiko n'edha ghaka, ebintu ebyeghaluliza ku itaka n'enhonhi edhiguluka." 
Psalms148:11 Musaake Musengwa Katonda imwe bakyabazinga ab'oku nsi mwenamwena n'abantu baimwe, imwe abakungu n'abafuzi abandi boonaboona ab'oku nsi;" 
Psalms148:12 imwe abaisuka n'imwe abaguna, abakaire n'abaana abato." 
Psalms148:13 Boonaboona ka basaake eriina lya Musengwa Katonda, kuba eriina lye n'erisinga agandi goonagoona obukologho; ekitiisa kye kiri ghaigulu okusinga ensi n'eigulu." 
Psalms148:14 Eighanga lye alighaire amaani, abantu be abamutya baamusaaka, abo nga n'Abaisiraeli b'agonza einho. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda!" 
Psalms149:1 Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda! Mwembere Musengwa Katonda olwembo oluyaaka; mumusaake nga muli mu bantu be abeesoloiza okumusinza. 
Psalms149:2 Abaisiraeli ka basangaale olw'oyo Eyabatonda; abantu ab'omu Sioni basagambe olwa Kyabazinga waibwe oyo. 
Psalms149:3 Basaake eriina lye nga bakina, nga bakubiraku entongooli n'engoma." 
Psalms149:4 Musengwa Katonda asangaalira abantu be; abo abawombeefu yaabatuusa ku kitiisa eky'obughanguzi. 
Psalms149:5 Abantu be ka basagambe inho olw'obughanguzi, era bembe olw'eisanhu nga bali mu buliri bwaibwe." 
Psalms149:6 Basaake Katonda nga baleekaanira ghaigulu, bageme n'empiima nga buli ndala eri n'obwogi ku ndhuyi dhaayo dhombi," 
Psalms149:7 bakole omulimo ogw'okwesasuuliza ku maghanga agandi, n'okubonereza abantu abatatya Katonda." 
Psalms149:8 Basibe bakyabazinga abamaghanga ago n'endhegere, n'abakungu baago babasibe n'empingu," 
Psalms149:9 babonereze amaghanga ago nga Katonda bwe yalagira. Kino n'ekitiisa eky'obughanguzi obw'abantu ba Katonda. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda! 
Psalms150:1 Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda! Musaake Katonda waife mu kifo kye ekitukuvu, mumusaake ere y'ali ghaigulu mu igulu." 
Psalms150:2 Mumusaake olw'ebyo by'akola ebyoleka amaani ge agataloodheka, mumusaake kuba mukologho era ghazira amusinga." 
Psalms150:3 Mumusaake nga mufuuwa amagwala, mumusaake nga mukuba endingidi n'entongooli." 
Psalms150:4 Mumusaake nga mukuba engoma bwe mukina, mumusaakire ku bivuga eby'enkosi n'endere." 
Psalms150:5 Mumusaake nga mukuba obude obutono, mumusaake nga mukuba ebide ebinene." 
Psalms150:6 Buli kintu kyonakyona ekiri n'obulamu ka kisaake Musengwa Katonda. Mwenamwena musaake Musengwa Katonda! 
Proverbs1:1 Dhino n'Ensambo dha Solomoni, mutabane wa Daudi era kyabazinga wa Isiraeli." 
Proverbs1:2 Ensambo dhino dhiyamba omuntu okufunamu amagezi, n'okugalagirwa, n'okutegeera amakulu ag'omunda einho." 
Proverbs1:3 Dheegeresa omuntu okwebisa obukalamu, okukola ebisiimya Katonda, okusala mu butuufu, n'obutasaliriza." 
Proverbs1:4 Dhireetera omuntu azira ky'aidhi okufuna amagezi, n'omwisuka okumanha ekigwaine okukolebwa." 
Proverbs1:5 Omugezi bw'adhiwulira yeeyongera okwega era omutegeevu yaafuna okulambibwa. 
Proverbs1:6 Olwo omuntu yaategeera amakulu ag'omunda einho agali mu nsambo, n'amagezi agali mu bikoiko." 
Proverbs1:7 Omuntu okuba n'obumanhi, asooka na kutya Musengwa Katonda. Abasiru banhooma amagezi era tibenda kugalagirwa." 
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wange, owulirisanga inho lata wo by'akugalagira, era otavanga ku inhoko by'akwegeresa;" 
Proverbs1:9 kuba biwoomya empisa dho, ng'oti n'ekitambaala ekidholige eky'oku mutwe n'ebinhere eby'omu nkoto, bwe biwoomya abivaire." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wange, abakozi ab'ebibi bwe bakusendasendanga toganhanga." 
Proverbs1:11 Kuba basobola okukoba bati: “Idha tweteege omuntu tumwite, tulumbe omuntu aziraku musango tumugwikirize.”" 
Proverbs1:12 Leka tubamire nga balamu ng'amagombe bwe gakola, basaanegho ng'abo abaika eyo ghansi mu lwina." 
Proverbs1:13 Twidha kubanhagaku eby'obukombe ebya buli nsambo, twidhuze endhu dhaife omunhago." 
Proverbs1:14 Kola otweyimbeku tukubire ghalala obululu, twidha kugabanira ghalala bye tunaanhaga." 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wange, otajiiranga ku bantu bali ng'oti n'abo, obeesambiranga irala;" 
Proverbs1:16 kuba banguyiriza inho okukola ebibi, era okwita kubanguyira inho." 
Proverbs1:17 Kizira makulu okutega enhonhi omutego, ng'eri agho ebona." 
Proverbs1:18 Aye abantu abo beetegamu beene omutego beite, baabwama okuzikiriza obulamu obwaibwe bwene." 
Proverbs1:19 Ebyo n'ebituuka ku abo boonaboona abafuna obukombe mu kunhaga; mu bukombe bwene obwo n'omuva ekibaita. 
Proverbs1:20 Amagezi gabita mu nguudo edh'ekibuga nga galeekaana; era gaalangirira mu mpya edh'ekibuga. 
Proverbs1:21 Gaja aghali ekifo eky'olwekobaano; ekifo abantu ghe beesololeza, gaakoba gati:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Imwe abazira kye mwidhi, mulirekera li okugonza okubanga obwagho nga muzira kye mwidhi? Imwe abanhoomi, mulirekera li okusangaalira obunhoomi bwaimwe obwo? Era imwe abasiru mulirekera li okukyagha okumanha?" 
Proverbs1:23 Mufeeyo inho ku bye ndi kubanenia; nja kubakobera byonabyona ebindi ku mwoyo, era mbaghe ku magezi ge ndi nago." 
Proverbs1:24 Nabeeta mwaloba kuvugira, naabagololera omukono mwaloba kwidhayo." 
Proverbs1:25 Amagezi ge mbagha timugatwala ng'ekikulu, era timwenda ni mbanenia." 
Proverbs1:26 Mbeeni, lwemuliba mu buzibu obutaloodheka, zeena nja kubasekerera busekerere; ebitiisa bwe biribaidhira nja kubayeeyereza buyeeyereze." 
Proverbs1:27 Ebitiisa lwe biribaidhira ni bibeeyughaku ng'oti kiwunga, obuzibu obutaloodheka ni bubeezungulula ng'oti n'empewo eyeezungulula n'amaani, ni bibaleetera okulumwa n'okweinhamira," 
Proverbs1:28 olwo mulindheta aye naabasiriikirira, mulindhagala mu buli kankondo aye nga timulimbona." 
Proverbs1:29 Mwakyagha okugheebwa amagezi, era mwaloba kutya Musengwa Katonda." 
Proverbs1:30 Timwenda kujiira ku magezi gange, era munhooma okubanenia kwange." 
Proverbs1:31 Mbeeni mwidha kwesasuuzibwanga olw'ebyo bye mukola, era mubonerezebwenga ebyo beene bye muyiiya okukola." 
Proverbs1:32 Abazira kye baidhi bafa lwa butenda kugalagirwa, abasiru baazikirira lwa butafaayo." 
Proverbs1:33 Aye oyo awulira bye nkoba aidha kubanga mu miraala, era atyamenga atereere ng'aziramu kutya naire.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wange, gemanga bye nkukoba, era otwalenga ebiragiro byange ng'eky'omughendo einho." 
Proverbs2:2 Wulirisanga inho amagezi g'ofuna, era oisengayo inho omwoyo okugategeera." 
Proverbs2:3 Bwenebwene sabanga inho ofune amagezi, era weegayirirenga inho ofune okutegeera." 
Proverbs2:4 Noonianga woonawoona amagezi ng'oti n'ole anoonia feeza, era ogaagalenga buli ghantu ng'oti n'ayagala eky'obukombe kye baagisa." 
Proverbs2:5 Olwo olyega okutya Musengwa Katonda, era waamanhira irala Katonda ky'ali." 
Proverbs2:6 Musengwa Katonda n'agha abantu amagezi; era mu by'akoba n'omuva okumanha n'okutegeera. 
Proverbs2:7 Agha abantu be abeesimbu amagezi agabayamba; era yaaba ngabo eri abo abeesigwa y'ali okubawonia. 
Proverbs2:8 Akubiriza abantu be okusalanga mu obutuufu, era yaalabirira abo abamutya." 
Proverbs2:9 Bw'onaagemanga bye nkoba, olwo olitegeera okukola ebisiimya Katonda, n'okusala mu butuufu n'obutasaliriza. Buli kiseera oidha kumanhanga ekituufu eky'okukola." 
Proverbs2:10 Oidha kubanga mugezi, era okumanha kwidha kukusangaazanga." 
Proverbs2:11 Oidha kubanga n'obumanhi obw'okusalagho ekigwaine okukolebwa nga bukukuuma; era obenga n'okutegeera nga kukulabirira. 
Proverbs2:12 Era bwidha kukuwonianga okukola ebibi, olobenga kujiira ku bantu aboogera ebibono ebikiidhamya," 
Proverbs2:13 abalekerera okukola ebituufu, ni baira ku kukola ebibi." 
Proverbs2:14 Abantu abo basangaalira okukola ebibi, era baasanhukira okukola eby'obudankaanu." 
Proverbs2:15 Bagodobanu mu ngeri dhaibwe, era tibeesigika." 
Proverbs2:16 Amagezi gaidha kukuwonianga omukazi omwenzi, akusendasenda ng'akozesa olulimi olw'okwewooya." 
Proverbs2:17 Omukazi oyo aja yaava ku iba ye babaire naye okuva mu buto, era yeerabira endagaano ye baakola ye Katonda." 
Proverbs2:18 Okuja mu ndhu ye, oba oli kudimira bwa mu magombe, engira dhe dhiigukira mu nsi ya bafu." 
Proverbs2:19 Ezira aja wuwe n'avaayo, waire okwirayo okutambulira mu ngira emutuusa ku bulamu." 
Proverbs2:20 Mbeeni iwe jiiranga ku ky'okuboneraku eky'abantu abalungi, era gemanga engira edh'abatuufu." 
Proverbs2:21 Abeesimbu n'abaja okuba beene nsi eno, era abeesigwa n'abaja okugisigalamu." 
Proverbs2:22 Aye Katonda aja kuzikiriza abakozi ab'ebibi, era abantu abateesigika abaiwululegho ng'oti bisimbe." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wange, oteerabiranga bye nkwegeresa, era idhukiranga byonabyona bye nkulagira." 
Proverbs3:2 Kuba bija kukuleetera okughangaala emyaka kamaala, era ebintu bikujiirenga bukalamu." 
Proverbs3:3 Otavanga ku buwulize na ku bwesigwa; bivaalenga ng'oti kinhere kya mu nkoto, era leka bikubenga ku mwoyo ng'oti bighandiike byaku." 
Proverbs3:4 Agho Katonda aidha kukusiimanga era n'abantu batyo, olwo oyetebwe ow'empisa enungi." 
Proverbs3:5 Weesigenga Musengwa Katonda n'omwoyo gwo gwonagwona, se ti kwesiga kutegeera kwo." 
Proverbs3:6 Idhukiranga nga Musengwa Katonda ali emberi wo okukugalagira mu byonabyona by'okola, era aidha kukutereekezanga by'okola byonabyona." 
Proverbs3:7 Iwe mwene oteebonanga ng'omugezi einho, aye tyanga Musengwa Katonda era weekuumenga obutakola bibi." 
Proverbs3:8 Agho oidha kuwonezebwanga mu mubiri obulwaire bwonabwona, era obenga n'amaani mu magumba." 
Proverbs3:9 Oghanga Musengwa Katonda ekitiisa ng'omugha ebisinga bulungi ku by'ofuna byonabyona, era ng'omugha ku byonabyona ebisooka okukungulwa eby'omu misiri gyo." 
Proverbs3:10 Memale olwo ebyagi byo biidhule emere, n'ebikunhiro byo eby'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu biidhule omwenge." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wange, otanhoomanga Musengwa Katonda by'akugalagira, oba okwesinwa by'akuneniamu." 
Proverbs3:12 Musengwa Katonda anenia oyo y'agonza, ng'omuzaire bw'anenia omwana ye yeesiimiramu." 
Proverbs3:13 Wa nkabi oyo ayagala era n'azuula amagezi, era wa nkabi oyo afuna okutegeera;" 
Proverbs3:14 kuba amagoba g'afunamu gasinga g'afuna mu feeza, era omugaso gw'afunamu gusinga gw'afuna mu zaabu." 
Proverbs3:15 Amagezi ga mughendo inho okuwula amabaale ag'omughendo, era mu bintu byonabyona ebyegombebwa ezira kisobola kugeefaanaanirizaaku." 
Proverbs3:16 Amagezi galeetera omuntu okughangaala, gaamuleetera n'okuba omukombe era ow'ekitiisa." 
Proverbs3:17 Amagezi galeetera omuntu okuba mu bulamu obukalamu, era gaamuleetera okububaamu mu miraala." 
Proverbs3:18 Abafuna amagezi bafuna obulamu; abo abagagumiraku baba ba nkabi. 
Proverbs3:19 Musengwa Katonda yatonda ensi n'amagezi amangi, era yaakozesa okutegeera yaataagho eigulu n'ebiririku." 
Proverbs3:20 Magezi ge n'agaleetera amaadhi okutiirikira ku nsi nga gava mu itaka, era gaaleetera n'ebire okutoonhesa ku nsi omusulo." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wange weegemenga ku magezi amatuufu ni kukukola ekigwaine, era otaganhanga bintu ebyo kukuvaaku." 
Proverbs3:22 Biidha kukuleetera okughangaala, era bikuleetere n'obulamu obweyagaza." 
Proverbs3:23 Olwo oidha kutambulanga bukalamu mu ngira yo nga ghazira kikutiisa, era ekigere kyo tikiidhanga kwekontola naire." 
Proverbs3:24 Bw'onalambaalanga tighaabengagho kikutiisa, era bw'onaatendukanga oidha kuwomerwanga endoolo dho." 
Proverbs3:25 Toobenga na kweraliikirira kabi kukwidhira, waire okweraliikirira okuzikirira okukuzinduukiriza, ng'oti n'okwo okwidhira abakozi b'ebibi." 
Proverbs3:26 Musengwa Katonda aidha kukugumyanga, era aidha kukukuumanga olobe kugwa mu mitego." 
Proverbs3:27 Otalobanga kukolera muntu kirungi ky'agwaniire, kasita onaabanga ng'osobola okukikola." 
Proverbs3:28 Otakobanga muntu kwira lwaidho, ng'ate ky'ayenda oli nakyo agho." 
Proverbs3:29 Otategekanga kukola muntu mwino bubi, oyo aba agho okumpi n'iwe era ng'akwesiga." 
Proverbs3:30 Otaniobananga na muntu bya bwereere nga ghazira kibi ky'akukoze. 
Proverbs3:31 Oteegombanga muntu akozesa bukambwe, era otasalangagho ku kujiira ku ngeri dhe." 
Proverbs3:32 Musengwa Katonda yeenhinhata omukozi w'ebibi, aye abeesimbu abeesiga." 
Proverbs3:33 Musengwa Katonda akolimira ab'endhu edh'abakozi ab'ebibi, aye yaagha enkabi ab'endhu edh'abatuufu." 
Proverbs3:34 Anhooma abo abeekuluntaza, aye abawombeefu abagemerwa ekivunika." 
Proverbs3:35 Abagezi baligheebwa ekitiisa, aye abasiru balyeyongera kunhoomebwa." 
Proverbs4:1 Baana bange, muwulirisenga inho nze omuzaire waimwe bye mbagalagira, era mwetegerezenga inho mughange okuba n'okutegeera." 
Proverbs4:2 Bye ndi kubeegeresa birungi byene, kale mutabivangaku naire." 
Proverbs4:3 Bwe nali nkaali n'abazaire bange nga ndi muto mwene era nga ninze omwana waibwe omulala ati," 
Proverbs4:4 omuzaire wange yandhegeresanga ati: “Idhukiranga bye nkukoba, era otabyerabiranga. Bw'onaagemanga bye nkulagira oidha kubanga mulamu." 
Proverbs4:5 Otabyerabiranga waire okubivaaku. Funanga amagezi n'okutegeera. 
Proverbs4:6 Otavanga ku magezi, gaidha kukukuumanga; yendanga amagezi ago gaidha kukuwonianga mu bizibu." 
Proverbs4:7 Amagezi n'ekintu ekiwula obukulu. Kale ni funanga amagezi. Era mu byonabyona by'onaafunanga, twalanga amagezi nga n'ekintu ekikulu." 
Proverbs4:8 Twalanga amagezi ng'eky'omughendo, goona gaidha kukufuulanga mukologho; gatenga mu kifuba kyo, goona gaidha kukugheesanga ekitiisa." 
Proverbs4:9 Galikusiba ekitambaala ekidholige ku mutwe gwo, era gaakuvaaza engule eboneka obulungi einho.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Mwana wange, gemanga bye nkoba era obitwalenga ng'ekikulu, olwo oidha kughangaala emyaka kamaala." 
Proverbs4:11 Nakwegeresa eby'amagezi; era naakwoleka empisa enungi. 
Proverbs4:12 Ezira kiidha kukwekiikanga mberi ng'oli kutambula; era toidha kwekontolanga ng'oli kulumuka. 
Proverbs4:13 Kuumanga by'oyeze, otabivangaku; bigemenga bukalamu, kuba obwo n'obulamu bwo." 
Proverbs4:14 Otajiiranga ku bakozi ba bibi, era otakolanga bye bakola." 
Proverbs4:15 Weesambirenga irala abantu abo, era otaseetanga ye bali. Bakubenga bwa nkoone iwe weejiire." 
Proverbs4:16 Kuba tibasobola kutenduka okutoolaku nga bamaze kukola kibi; endoolo dhibabulira irala okutuusa nga bamaze okugwisa omuntu. 
Proverbs4:17 Kuba okukola ebibi n'okukola ebikolwa eby'obukambwe, kwabafuukira ng'oti n'emere ye balya, era ng'oti n'omwenge gwe banhwa." 
Proverbs4:18 Obulamu obw'abatuufu buli ng'oti ndhuba ku nkyo, etoolereza okuvaayo yaaja nga yeeyongera okwaka, okutuuka mu kasana ghagati." 
Proverbs4:19 Aye obulamu obw'abakozi ab'ebibi buli ng'oti nzikiiza egemye bedimudimu; ni bwe bagwa tibamanha na kye beekontoireku. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wange, wulirisanga inho bye nkoba; era otenga inho omwoyo ku bye ndhogera." 
Proverbs4:21 Otabiganhanga kukuvaaku naire; bitenga ku mwoyo gwo. 
Proverbs4:22 Omuntu bw'abyagala bimugha obulamu, era bya muwonia ebimuluma mu mubiri." 
Proverbs4:23 Weekuumenga inho by'odhuuba mu mwoyo gwo, kuba obulamu bwo bufugibwa ebyo ebikuli ku mwoyo." 
Proverbs4:24 Otakobanga kintu kyonakyona kitali kituufu, era weesambirenga irala okwogera eby'obuguya." 
Proverbs4:25 Amaiso galingirizenga mberi y'oli kuja, se ti kugalingirizanga mbali." 
Proverbs4:26 Tegekanga by'oja okukola byonabyona, olwo ghabulenga ekisoba mu byonabyona by'onaakolanga." 
Proverbs4:27 Tambulanga butereevu aghazira kudaaliimira eno n'ere; otaganhanga kigere kyo kuja mu ngira ya kukola bibi. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wange wulirisanga inho amagezi ge nkugha, era oisengayo inho omwoyo ku bye nkwegeresa," 
Proverbs5:2 olwo oidha kusalangagho ekigwaine okukolebwa, n'omunwa gwo gwogerenga eby'amagezi." 
Proverbs5:3 Omunwa ogw'omukazi omwenzi gwogera ebibono ebidhuudhuula ng'oti mudheenene oguli kutoonha obutoonhe okuva mu bisasala, era akozesa amamiro amaghegheevu agali ng'oti n'omuzigo ogw'emiti emyoliva." 
Proverbs5:4 Aye ku nkomerero akaayirira ng'oti lubiriizi, era yaaba mwogi ng'oti mpiima yeene eri n'obwogi ku ndhuyi dhaayo dhombi." 
Proverbs5:5 Bw'oja naye akutuusa bwa ku kufa; engira ye eigukira bwa mu magombe. 
Proverbs5:6 Omukazi oyo tagema ngira ya bulamu naire, aye atambulatambula eyo atyo ate nga takiidhi." 
Proverbs5:7 Buti ni, mwana wange, wulirisanga bye nkoba, era oteerabiranga bibono bye ndhogera." 
Proverbs5:8 Weesambirenga irala omukazi ng'oti n'oyo, era otaseetanga kumpi na mulyango gwa ndhu ye naire." 
Proverbs5:9 Kuba bw'otaamwesambirenga irala, abantu abandi baidha kutwala ekitiibwa ky'obairenga nakyo, era oitibwe abantu abakambwe ng'okaali mwisuka." 
Proverbs5:10 Era abagwira balitwala ebintu bye wakolerera; abantu ab'endha baidhuza endhu dhaibwe ebintu byo bye wafuna mu kutakabana. 
Proverbs5:11 Ku nkomerero ey'obulamu bwo oliririra ku ndiri ng'omubiri gwo gwonagwona guli kuseenena guwaagho. 
Proverbs5:12 Olirira ng'okoba oti: “Kale lwaki nalobanga okugalagirwa? Era lwaki nanhoomereranga okunenezebwa? 
Proverbs5:13 Nalobanga okuwulirisa abasomesa bange bye bankobanga, era naaloba kwisanga mwoyo ku bye bangalagiranga." 
Proverbs5:14 Nali ntuuse okuswazibwa mu bantu abeesoloiza.” 
Proverbs5:15 Mwana wange, mukazi wo ali ng'oti n'ensulo ey'amaadhi amalungi. Kale ni banga mwesiga ng'onhwa amaadhi ag'omu nsulo yo yonka." 
Proverbs5:16 Iwe okibona nga kikalamu amaadhi agava mu nsulo yo okukuuluulira eyo gatyo, ni gaba ng'oti mukoka mu nguudo edh'omu bibuga?" 
Proverbs5:17 Leka amaadhi ag'omu nsulo yo gabe gago iwe wenka, se ti ga bantu bandi." 
Proverbs5:18 Banga musangaavu olw'ensulo yo eyo, osagambenga olwa mukazi wo oyo ye wafuna ng'okaali mwisuka." 
Proverbs5:19 Aboneka bulungi ng'oti mpongo, era anhirira ng'oti mpuuli. Leka akusanhusenga enaku dhoonadhoona, era akugonzenga mu bwidhuvu." 
Proverbs5:20 Mwana wange, lwaki owaamu olw'omukazi omwenzi? Lwaki ota muka beene mu kifuba kyo?" 
Proverbs5:21 Musengwa Katonda abona buli muntu ky'akola, era yeekalirisa ensambo ye yeebisaamu." 
Proverbs5:22 Ebibi eby'omubi bimufuukira ng'oti lutuula, era bimugema ng'oti n'omutego bwe gugema enhonhi." 
Proverbs5:23 Obuteefuga bumuleetera okufa, era obusiru bwe obungi bwamuleetera okuja e magombe." 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wange, bwe weeyimiriranga omuntu, ni weeyama okumusasuliragho eibandha," 
Proverbs6:2 olwo onaabanga weetaire mwene omugugha mu nkoto olw'ebibono byo, era nga weesibye mwene olw'ebisuubizo byo." 
Proverbs6:3 Era olwo nga weetaire mwene mu ngalo edh'omuntu owundi. Kale ni okumwewonia tezangaku oje y'ali omweghembe akusaasire. 
Proverbs6:4 Lekanga kusooka kutendukaku waire okutyamaku n'owuumula. 
Proverbs6:5 Omuntu oyo mwewonienga mangu ng'empongo bwe yeewonia mu ngalo edh'omuyiizi, oba ng'enhonhi bwe yeewonia omutego ogw'omutezi." 
Proverbs6:6 Imwe abagayaavu, muje mubone ebisimizi, mwetegereze bye bikola era mwege." 
Proverbs6:7 Bizira mukulembeze waire mwami oba omufuzi," 
Proverbs6:8 aye byeyagalira emere mu biseera eby'omwero, byeterekera eby'okulya mu biseera eby'amakungula." 
Proverbs6:9 Imwe abagayaavu, muja kulambaala kutuuka li? Muja kuzuuka li mu ndoolo dhaimwe?" 
Proverbs6:10 Eby'okutendukaku akatono n'eby'okulambaalaku akatono, era n'eby'okuzingiraku amakono okuwuumulaku," 
Proverbs6:11 n'ebireetera obwavu okubalumba ng'oti mukambuzi, n'obwetaavu okubeeyongeraku ng'oti n'abantu omunhazi ali n'ekiisi b'anhazeeku ebyaibwe." 
Proverbs6:12 Omuntu omukozi ow'ebibi era azira mugaso, aja ng'ayogerayogera eby'obuguya," 
Proverbs6:13 yaanhiiranhiira amaiso, yaasiita ebigere ku itaka, oba yaaghemya n'engalo dhe." 
Proverbs6:14 Buli kiseera ategeka okukola ebibi mu mwoyo gwe ogwakiidhama eira, era yaasiikuulira baine ebizibu." 
Proverbs6:15 Kyova aligwa ku buzibu obutaloodheka nga tabwetegekeire, era mu kaseera buseera balimutentena nga takairayo kuwona." 
Proverbs6:16 Ghaligho ebintu mukaaga Musengwa Katonda by'akyagha, nkani biri musanvu bye yeenhinhata:" 
Proverbs6:17 okwebona ng'owa ghaigulu, okuba omuguya, okutemula abantu abaziraku musango," 
Proverbs6:18 okuba n'omwoyo ogutegeka enkwe, okuba n'ebigere ebyanguyiriza okukola ebibi," 
Proverbs6:19 okugha obudhulizi obw'obuguya, n'okusiikuulira abantu abali aghalala ebizibu." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wange, gemanga ebyo lata wo by'akulagira, era otavanga ku ebyo inhoko by'akwegeresa." 
Proverbs6:21 Bitenga ku mwoyo gwo buliidho, era obivaalenga ng'oti kinhere kya mu nkoto." 
Proverbs6:22 Biidha kukukulemberangamu buli gh'onaajanga, bikukuumenga ng'otendwike obwire, era bikughenga amagezi ng'ozuuse ku nkyo." 
Proverbs6:23 Kuba ebyo bye bakulagira biri ng'oti itaala eryaka mu nzikiiza, n'ebyo bye bakwegeresa byaba ng'oti butangaavu, ate ebyo bye bakuneniamu byakutuusa ku bulamu." 
Proverbs6:24 Bikuwonia omukazi omukozi ow'ebibi, muka beene oyo, akusendasenda ng'akozesa olulimi olw'okwewooya." 
Proverbs6:25 Otamwegwanizanga mu mwoyo gwo olw'obulungi obw'emboneka ye, era otatwalirizibwanga lwa mmoga ye." 
Proverbs6:26 Kuba ole asobola okukozesa malaaya ng'amughaire bwa mpiiya dhigula kya kulya, aye ole akwana muka beene aghaayo bulamu bwe bwene." 
Proverbs6:27 Omuntu asobola okubbeedera omuliro mu kifuba, gwaloba kumwokya?" 
Proverbs6:28 Oba, omuntu aghanga okutambulira ku manda agaliku omuliro, ebigere bye byaloba kuya?" 
Proverbs6:29 Kityo bwekiri, ni ku ole ayenda ku muka beene; oyo akikola yeenayeena aja kubonerezebwa." 
Proverbs6:30 Abantu tibanhooma mwibi, aiba olw'okwewonia endhala?" 
Proverbs6:31 Era bwe bamugema bamuliyisa emikuzi musanvu, yaaghaayo ebintu ebiri mu ndhu ye byonabyona." 
Proverbs6:32 Omuntu ayenda ku muka beene tabaamu kategeera. Aba ali bwa kwezikiriza mwene. 
Proverbs6:33 Balimunhooma, baamukuba, yaanuubukanuubuka, era okuswala kwe tikuja kumuvaaku naire." 
Proverbs6:34 Eiruba lifuula omusaadha okuba omukambwe einho, era bw'aba yeesasuuza tabaamu kusaasira naire." 
Proverbs6:35 Ezira mutango gw'aliganha kutwala, era talinhiigulukuka ni bw'omugha ebirabo eby'okulala okulala." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wange, gemanga bye nkoba era otwalenga ebiragiro byange ng'eky'omughendo einho." 
Proverbs7:2 Bw'onaagemanga bye nkulagira oidha kuba mulamu. Era bye nkwegeresa bikuumenga, ng'oti bw'okuuma emboni ey'eriiso lyo." 
Proverbs7:3 Banga nabyo ekiseera kyonakyona ng'oti mpeta ku ngalo, era bitenga ku mwoyo gwo ng'oti bighandiike byaku." 
Proverbs7:4 Twalanga amagezi ng'oti bw'otwala mwanhoko, era otwalenga okutegeera ng'oti bw'otwala mukagwa wo einho." 
Proverbs7:5 Ebyo biidha kukuwonianga omukazi omwenzi, oyo muka beene akusendasenda ng'akozesa olulimi olw'okwewooya." 
Proverbs7:6 Lwali lulala nga ndi mu ndhu yange, naabisa amaiso mu lutanda oluli mu idinisa," 
Proverbs7:7 naalengera abaisuka abazira kye baidhi, era mu baisuka abo naabonamu omwisuka aziramu kategeera." 
Proverbs7:8 Yali ali kutambulatambula mu nguudo, mu ikoona aghali endhu ey'omukazi, era ng'ali kuja ku ndhu eyo." 
Proverbs7:9 Lyali iguloigulo, agho nga mu kanzimyenzimye, ng'enzikiiza ey'obwire eri kugema." 
Proverbs7:10 Naja okubona, nga baagaanana n'omukazi oyo, eyali avaire nga malaaya era ng'ategeike ky'aja okukola." 
Proverbs7:11 Yayogeranga mu mamiro aga ghaigulu, ng'azira miraala naire. Era buli kiseera nga yeewuuba mu nguudo." 
Proverbs7:12 Olundi ng'aba ku luguudo, olundi yaaba mu mpya edh'ekibuga, era kiisi ghali ikoona ng'aba agho yeeteega." 
Proverbs7:13 Agho omukazi yeevumba omwisuka era yaamunhwegera, yaamulingirira mu maiso, yaamukoba ng'akanaghaire ati:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Olwaleero mpaireyo ekigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, era naasasula kye neeyama. Kale ndi n'emamba kamaala eka." 
Proverbs7:15 Kyenviire ni nfuluma nga ndi kwenda inho okukwagaana. Nfubye inho okukunoonia era buti nkwagaine. 
Proverbs7:16 Ku buliri bwange ndhazeeku amasuuka, amaghegheevu geene ag'erangi, agava e Misiri." 
Proverbs7:17 Era naamansiraku obuwoowo obwakolebwa: mu mirra, ni mu alowe, ni mu kinnamoni." 
Proverbs7:18 Idha tuje tusanhusaganie obwire bwonabwona; tube mu kwegonza tuwoomerwe inho. 
Proverbs7:19 Eka baze azirayo, yaja mu lugendo oluleeyi." 
Proverbs7:20 Era yaja n'empiiya kamaala. Kale asuubirwa okwira eyo nga mu mwezi ghagati.” 
Proverbs7:21 Agho omukazi yaakozesa ebibono ebisendasenda yaikirizisa omwisuka, era yaakozesa olulimi olw'okwewooya, yaamughangula." 
Proverbs7:22 Amangu ago omwisuka yaatoolera okunonereza omukazi, ng'oti n'ente ye bali kutwala okwita, oba ensolo eri kuja okwingira mu lutuula," 
Proverbs7:23 akalaso mwe kagifumitira mu byenda. Omwisuka yali ng'oti n'enhonhi bw'eziinhuuka, ng'eri kuja okugwa ku mutego. Yali taidhi ng'ali kweita mwene." 
Proverbs7:24 Mperaano ni baana bange, muwulirisenga bye nkoba, era mwetegerezenga inho ebibono byange." 
Proverbs7:25 Mutaganhanga mukazi oti n'oyo kuwungula myoyo gyaimwe, era mutajiiranga ku mpisa dhe." 
Proverbs7:26 Abasaadha bangi b'azikiriiza; bwenebwene abantu b'aitaitaine bali lukunkumuli. 
Proverbs7:27 Bw'oja mu ndhu ye, oba oseese mu magombe, era oba otuuse mu nsi ey'abafu." 
Proverbs8:1 Muwulirise amagezi gali kwogera. Okutegeera kuli kulangirira. 
Proverbs8:2 Amagezi geemereire ku bifo ebisitufu ku mbali okw'enguudo, ni mu maagaanana ag'enguudo." 
Proverbs8:3 Galangirira nga gali mu kifo eky'olwekobaano gha mulyango ogwingira ekibuga, mu kifo abantu ghe beesololeza. Gakoba gati:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Ndi kukoba imwe mwenamwena, buli muntu ali ku nsi yeenayeena awulire." 
Proverbs8:5 Imwe abazira kye mwidhi, mwege okumanha ekigwaine okukolebwa; imwe abasiru, mwege okutegeera." 
Proverbs8:6 Mumpulirise kuba bye nja okwogera bikulu, buli kibono ekinva mu kanwa kituufu." 
Proverbs8:7 Nze ndhogera mazima meereere; neenhinhata eby'obuguya byonabyona. 
Proverbs8:8 Ebibono byonabyona ebinva mu kanwa bituufu, muzira kya buguya waire ekibuzaabuza." 
Proverbs8:9 Byanguyira ole ategeera era byaba bituufu eri ole ali n'okumanha. 
Proverbs8:10 Mwendenga bye ndhegeresa mu kifo ky'okwenda feeza, era mugonzenga okumanha mu kifo ky'okugonza zaabu omukenenule." 
Proverbs8:11 Amagezi ga mughendo inho okuwula amabaale ag'omughendo, era mu bintu byonabyona ebyegombebwa ezira kisobola kugeefaanaanirizaaku.”" 
Proverbs8:12 “Ninze Magezi, mba ghalala ni Kutegeera, era nkozesa okumanha naasalagho ekigwaine okukolebwa." 
Proverbs8:13 Okutya Musengwa Katonda kitegeeza kukyagha kukola bibi. Nze nkyagha okwekuluntaza n'okwetwala ng'owa ghaigulu n'okukola ebibi, era n'okwogera eby'obuguya." 
Proverbs8:14 Ninze agha abantu amagezi ni bakola ebikalamu. Ntegeera era ndi n'amaani. 
Proverbs8:15 Ninze agha bakyabazinga okufuga, era naagha abafuzi okutaagho amateeka amakalamu." 
Proverbs8:16 Ninze agha buli mufuzi okufuga, k'abe mukungu oba mulamuzi." 
Proverbs8:17 Ngonza abo abangonza, abo abandhagala n'omwoyo omulala bambona." 
Proverbs8:18 Ninze ngaba obukombe n'ekitiisa, obukombe obutuufu era obutawaagho." 
Proverbs8:19 Bye ngaba biwula zaabu, ni bw'aba omulungi einho, era byawula ni feeza omukenenule." 
Proverbs8:20 Ntambulira mu butuufu, naakola ebyo ebituufu." 
Proverbs8:21 Mpa abo abangonza obukombe, naidhuza endhu dhaibwe ebintu eby'omughendo.”" 
Proverbs8:22 “Ninze Musengwa Katonda ye yasookeraku okutonda, ninze ekintu kye yasookeraku okukola eira einho." 
Proverbs8:23 Nateebwagho mu biseera ebyabita, naligho mu kusooka ng'ensi ekaali kubaagho." 
Proverbs8:24 Nazaalibwa ng'enhandha dhikaali kubaagho, era nga n'enhindo edh'ensulo edhikuuluula dhoona dhikaali kubaagho." 
Proverbs8:25 Nazaalibwa ng'ensozi enene dhikaali kuwumbibwa, waire obusozi obutono okuteebwagho." 
Proverbs8:26 Katonda yali akaali kukola nsi na misiri gyaku, waire omuganda ogusooka ogw'enkungu." 
Proverbs8:27 Bwe yali ng'abamba eigulu naligho, era naabaagho ng'akola ensalosalo enhandha kw'ekoma." 
Proverbs8:28 Ni lwe yata ebire ku igulu, n'ata n'enhindo edh'ensulo mu nhandha naligho." 
Proverbs8:29 Nali naye lwe yataagho ensalosalo enhandha kw'enaakomanga, amaadhi galobe kuswikangagho. Era nali naye lwe yataagho emisingi egy'ensi." 
Proverbs8:30 Nabanga gh'ali ng'omwana omuto, nga buli lunaku mmusanhusa, era zeena naasagambanga okuba gh'ali." 
Proverbs8:31 Nga nsagambira mu nsi ye, era nga nsanhuka olw'abantu abagirimu.”" 
Proverbs8:32 “Agho ni, baana bange, mumpulirise. Ba nkabi abo abagema bye nkoba." 
Proverbs8:33 Muwulirisenga bye mbagalagira mube bagezi, mutabigayaaliranga." 
Proverbs8:34 Wa nkabi oyo awulira bye nkoba, buli lunaku n'atatoola maiso ku lwigi lwange, era n'aba agho gha mulyango gwange ng'aguniriire." 
Proverbs8:35 Abo abandhagala ni banzuula bafuna obulamu, era Musengwa Katonda abasanhukira." 
Proverbs8:36 Aye oyo akola ebibi yeerumiriza mwene, era oyo ankyagha aba ayenda kufa.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Amagezi gaazimba endhu yaago, gaagikolera n'empango musanvu." 
Proverbs9:2 Gaita ku nsolo dhaago olw'embaga, gaayiisa omwenge gwago ogw'emizabbibu, era gaategeka ekiiwulo." 
Proverbs9:3 Gaatuma abagheereza baago abaguna, baaja ku bifo ebisinga bugulumivu mu kibuga, baayeta bati:" 
Proverbs9:4 “Buli muntu yeenayeena azira ky'aidhi, aidhe mu ndhu muno.” Era amagezi ago gaakoba buli muntu aziramu kategeera, gati:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Idha olye ku mere yange ye nfumbye, era onhwe ni ku mwenge gwange ogw'emizabbibu gwe mpiisiisa." 
Proverbs9:6 Va mu bantu abazira kye baidhi obe mulamu, era weebise mu nsambo eyoleka ng'otegeera.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Ole bw'alamba omuntu eyeekuluntaza yeereetera mwene ebivumo, ole anenia omukozi ow'ebibi yeerumiriza mwene." 
Proverbs9:8 Otanenianga muntu yeekuluntaza, aja bwa kukukyagha. Aye onenianga muntu mugezi, kuba oyo aja kukusiima." 
Proverbs9:9 Bw'ogalagira omuntu omugezi yeeyogeraku okuba omugezi. Bw'oyegeresa omuntu akola ebituufu yeeyongeraku okwega. 
Proverbs9:10 Omuntu okuba n'amagezi asooka na kutya Musengwa Katonda, era omuntu aidhi oyo Omutukuvu, aba n'okutegeera." 
Proverbs9:11 Nze amagezi ndidha kukughangaaza enaku kamaala, era nhongere emyaka ku bulamu bwo." 
Proverbs9:12 Bw'oba n'amagezi ofunamu omuganhulo. Bw'oganhooma ofiirwa. 
Proverbs9:13 Omukazi omusiru ayogera mu mamiro aga ghaigulu, azira ky'aidhi era taba na nsoni." 
Proverbs9:14 Atyama ku mulyango ogw'endhu ye, oba yaatyama mu bifo ebigulumivu mu kibuga." 
Proverbs9:15 Aba agho ng'ayeta ababitagho, ababa bali kwejiira mu ngendo dhaibwe, ati:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Buli muntu yeenayeena azira ky'aidhi aidhe mu ndhu muno!” Era yaakoba buli muntu aziramu kategeera, ati:" 
Proverbs9:17 “Amaadhi amaibe obwibe gawooma inho, n'emere eriirwa mu ngiso n'esinga kuwooma.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Aye abo b'ayeta tibaidhi ng'abantu abaja mu ndhu y'omukazi oyo bafiirayo, era ng'abageni be bali ghansi ere yeene mu magombe." 
Proverbs10:1 Dhino n'ensambo dha Solomoni. Omwana omugezi yeesiimisa ise, aye omusiru aleetera inhina enaku." 
Proverbs10:2 Eby'obukombe ebifunibwa mu kukola ebibi biziramu muganhulo, aye obutuufu buwonia omuntu okufa." 
Proverbs10:3 Musengwa Katonda taleka batuufu ni balambuka ndhala, aye alobera abakozi b'ebibi okufuna bye balulunkanira." 
Proverbs10:4 Emikono eminafu giisa mwene gyo obwavu, aye emikono emikozi einho gireetera mwene gyo obukombe." 
Proverbs10:5 Omuntu akungula emere mu biseera eby'omwero aba mugezi, aye ole atenduka obutenduke mu biseera eby'amakungula aswaza." 
Proverbs10:6 Abantu abatuufu bafuna enkabi, aye ababi boogera nga bagisa obukambwe obubaidhwire." 
Proverbs10:7 Omuntu omutuufu aidhukirwa nga wa nkabi, aye eriina ery'omubi lyerabirirwa irala." 
Proverbs10:8 Abantu abali n'okutegeera bawulira bye babalagira, aye abaziramu kategeera bazikirira." 
Proverbs10:9 Abantu abeesimbu era abeesigwa baba n'emiraala, aye abaguya baja kuzuulibwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Ole agisa amazima ku muntu amuleetera obuzibu, aye ole anenia omuntu maiso ku maiso amuleetera emiraala." 
Proverbs10:11 Abantu abatuufu bye boogera biba ng'oti nsulo ereeta obulamu, aye ababi boogera nga bagisa obukambwe obubaidhwire." 
Proverbs10:12 Okukyagha kusiikuula entalo, aye okugonza kusonigha ebisobyo byonabyona." 
Proverbs10:13 Ebibono eby'omuntu ali n'okutegeera bibaamu amagezi, aye omuntu aziramu kategeera agwana kukubwa lwigo." 
Proverbs10:14 Abantu abagezi bakozesa amagezi ge bafuna n'obwegendereza, aye abaziramu kategeera boogerayogera eyo batyo, beereetera okuzikirira." 
Proverbs10:15 Omuntu omukombe, eby'obukombe by'aba nabyo n'ebimukuuma, aye omwavu, obwavu bwe n'obumuzikiriza." 
Proverbs10:16 Omuntu omutuufu by'akola bimuleetera okuba omulamu, aye omukozi ow'ebibi yeeyongera bwa kukola bibi." 
Proverbs10:17 Ole awulira bye bamugalagira akuuma obulamu bwe, aye aloba okunenezebwa adaaliima." 
Proverbs10:18 Ole agisa obukyayi obumuli ku mwoyo aba muguya, ate ole asalagania ebibono ku bandi aba musiru." 
Proverbs10:19 Mu kwogera ebibono ebingi timubulamu kwonoona, kale omuntu afuga omunwa gwe aba mugezi." 
Proverbs10:20 Omuntu omutuufu by'ayogera biri ng'oti ni feeza asinga bulungi, aye ebidhuubo eby'omubi ghazira kye bigasa." 
Proverbs10:21 Ebibono eby'omutuufu bigasa abantu kamaala, aye abasiru bafa mangu olw'okubulamu akategeera." 
Proverbs10:22 Enkabi dha Musengwa Katonda n'edhireeta obukombe, okukola einho ghazira kye kwongera ku bukombe bwo." 
Proverbs10:23 Okukola ebibi kuli ng'oti muzaanho buzaanho eri omusiru, aye okukola eby'amagezi n'ekisanhusa omuntu ali n'okutegeera." 
Proverbs10:24 Omubi ekintu ky'atya kija kumutuukaku, aye omutuufu ky'ayenda baja kukimugha." 
Proverbs10:25 Kiwunga bw'akunta ababi basaanagho, aye abatuufu basigalagho nga bagumu begulugulu." 
Proverbs10:26 Bw'otuma omugayaavu akulumya ng'oti n'omwenge endoota bwe gusala mu maino ag'ole agubutiike mu kanwa, era ng'oti n'omwosi bwe gubuuguuka mu maiso." 
Proverbs10:27 Okutya Musengwa Katonda kuleetera omuntu okughangaala, aye emyaka egy'ababi gisalibwaku." 
Proverbs10:28 Abatuufu bye basuubira bituukirira baasangaala, aye ababi bye beesumba tibabifuna naire." 
Proverbs10:29 Musengwa Katonda n'ekifo eky'okwewogomamu eri oyo omwesimbu, aye omubi amuzikiriza buzikirize." 
Proverbs10:30 Abatuufu ghazira kiribasengula mu nsi naire, aye ababi tibalityama ni batereera mu nsi." 
Proverbs10:31 Omuntu omutuufu ayogera bya magezi, aye omuguya baja kumulekeza okwogera." 
Proverbs10:32 Abantu abatuufu bamanha ebigwaine okwogerwa, aye ababi boogera bya buguya." 
Proverbs11:1 Musengwa Katonda akyagha abakozesa minzaani enkyamu, aye abakozesa ebipimo ebituufu abasiima." 
Proverbs11:2 Bwe weekuluntaza toloba kuswala, aye abawombeefu n'ababa n'amagezi." 
Proverbs11:3 Abantu abeesimbu bamanha ekituufu eky'okukola, aye abaguya bazikirizibwa obukupankupania bwaibwe bwene." 
Proverbs11:4 Ku lunaku Katonda lw'alamuliraku abantu, okuba omukombe kizira kye kiyamba, aye obutuufu buwonia omuntu okufa." 
Proverbs11:5 Obwesigwa obw'omuntu omwesimbu butereeza obulamu bwe, aye obubi obw'omuntu omubi n'obumugwisa bwene." 
Proverbs11:6 Obutuufu obw'abantu abeesimbu bubakuuma, aye abo abakupankupania, entegeka dhaibwe dheene n'edhibagemya ng'oti mutego." 
Proverbs11:7 Omubi bw'afa by'abaire asuubira byonabyona agho ghe bikoma, era ole atatya Katonda bye yeesumba tabifuna naire." 
Proverbs11:8 Katonda akuuma omutuufu yaaloba kugwa mu bizibu, aye omubi yaabigwamu." 
Proverbs11:9 Omuntu atatya Katonda by'ayogera bighanga okuzikiriza muntu mwine, aye omutuufu amagezi gamuwonia okugwa mu bizibu." 
Proverbs11:10 Abantu ab'ekibuga basagamba ng'ebintu biri kujiira abatuufu bukalamu, era bakuba emizira ng'ababi bazikiriire." 
Proverbs11:11 Abantu abeesimbu baleetera ekibuga enkabi kyakula, aye ababi ebibono bye boogera bikireetera okuzikirira." 
Proverbs11:12 Ole anhooma baine aba aziramu kategeera, aye ali n'okutegeera asirika busirike." 
Proverbs11:13 Omuntu ayengeesa olubono, ayogera ebyama, aye omwesigwa aghanga okugisa ebyama." 
Proverbs11:14 Abantu bazikirira nga bazira abalamba, aye aghali abawi ab'amagezi abangi ghabaagho emiraala." 
Proverbs11:15 Ole eyeeyimirira omuntu okumusasuliragho eibandha yeidhusa, aye ole aloba okumweyimirira awulira emiraala." 
Proverbs11:16 Omukazi ow'ekisa ateebwamu ekinhagansi, aye omukazi atali mwesimbu aswaza." 
Proverbs11:17 Omuntu ow'ekisa akifunamu omuganhulo, aye akola eby'obukambwe yeerumya mwene." 
Proverbs11:18 Omukozi w'ebibi yeerimba ati katyo anaabifunamu empeera emugasa, aye ate omuntu omutuufu n'afuna empeera yeene egasa." 
Proverbs11:19 Ole eyeekalangulira ku butuufu aghangaala, aye ole ajiira ku kukola ebibi yeita mwene." 
Proverbs11:20 Musengwa Katonda yeenhinhata abantu ab'ebirowoozo ebibi, aye yaagonza abo abaziraku musango." 
Proverbs11:21 Ekikakafu kiri nti abakozi b'ebibi baja kubonerezebwa, aye abatuufu akabi tikaja kubatuukaku naire." 
Proverbs11:22 Omukazi aboneka obulungi aye ng'azira mpisa, ali ng'oti mpeta ya zaabu eri mu nhindo ey'embiidhi." 
Proverbs11:23 Abantu abatuufu bye benda bibaviiramu birungi byereere, aye abakozi b'ebibi bye basuubira bibaviiramu Katonda kubasungughalira." 
Proverbs11:24 Ghaligho omuntu aba omugabi einho aye yeeyongera bweyongere kugaigaghala, ate owundi yaaba mukodo ekibitiriire aye yeeyongera bweyongere kwavughala." 
Proverbs11:25 Omuntu omugabi aidha kugheebwanga obukombe, era ole agha abandi amaadhi ag'okunhwa, yeena aidha kugheebwanga amaadhi anhwe." 
Proverbs11:26 Omuntu aloba okuguza baine emere, abantu bamukolimira, aye ole aganha okugibaguza bamusabira enkabi." 
Proverbs11:27 Ole eyeefubiriza okukola obukalamu n'omwoyo omulala, aidha kusiimibwanga, aye ebibi biidha kwidhiranga ole abisiikuula ghe biri." 
Proverbs11:28 Ole eyeesiga obukombe bwe aja kukala ng'oti ikaba lya muti oguwaawiiza, aye omutuufu aja kugimuka ng'oti ikaba lya muti ogusibwisa." 
Proverbs11:29 Ole adaazadaaza ab'endhu ye azira mugabo gw'alisikira. N'omusiru aidha kubanga mugheereza wa mugezi. 
Proverbs11:30 Omuntu omutuufu by'akola bireeta obulamu, aye omuntu akola eby'obukambwe azikiriza obulamu." 
Proverbs11:31 Bona eno, oba nga abantu abatuufu mu nsi bagheebwa empeera ebagwaniire, memale ababi n'aboonooni baliroba batya okusasulwamu ekibajaamu?" 
Proverbs12:1 Oyo asangaalira okugalagirwa aba ayenda okumanha, aye akyagha okunenezebwa aba ng'oti nsolo busolo." 
Proverbs12:2 Omuntu omulungi asiimibwa Musengwa Katonda, aye ole ali n'entegeka edh'okukola ebibi amusalira omusango gwamusinga." 
Proverbs12:3 Okukola ebibi tikuganha muntu kuba na miraala, aye omutuufu aba mugumu buli gh'aba." 
Proverbs12:4 Omukazi akola ebirungi ateesa mu iba ekinhagansi, aye ole aswaza aba ng'oti bulwaire bwa kokolo mu magumba ga iba." 
Proverbs12:5 Ebidhuubo eby'omutuufu biba ku kukola mazima, aye eby'omubi byaba ku kuguya." 
Proverbs12:6 Ebibono eby'omubi biri ng'oti mutemo eyeeteeze okwita omuntu, aye omwesimbu by'ayogera biwonia abantu." 
Proverbs12:7 Katonda azikiriza ababi baaloba kulekaghooku waire omwidhukulu, aye enda edh'abatuufu tidhiweekereragho." 
Proverbs12:8 Omuntu ali n'amagezi abantu bamwogeraku bukalamu, aye ole ali n'ebirowoozo ebyakyama bamunhooma." 
Proverbs12:9 Omuntu owabuliidho eyeekolera, awula ole eyeekuluntaza ate ng'azira kya kulya." 
Proverbs12:10 Omuntu akola ebituufu afaayo ku nsolo dhe, aye omukozi w'ebibi tasaasira dhidhe naire." 
Proverbs12:11 Omuntu alima eitaka lye aba n'emere kamaala, aye ole amala ebiseera ku mirimo egitaleeta magoba aba aziramu kategeera." 
Proverbs12:12 Abantu ababi balowooza kukola bibi ekiseera kyonakyona, aye abatuufu basigala nga bagumu woonawoona ghe baba." 
Proverbs12:13 Ebibono eby'omubi byene bifuuka mutego ogumugemya, aye omutuufu abita mu bizibu byaloba kumugemaku." 
Proverbs12:14 Omuntu mu by'ayogera mw'afuna ebirungi, era mu by'akola mw'afuna empeera." 
Proverbs12:15 Omusiru buli ky'akola alowooza nga n'ekituufu, aye omugezi awulirisa bye bamugalagira." 
Proverbs12:16 Omusiru bw'asungughala kimanhikiragho, aye omugezi amanha okughemba ku busungu." 
Proverbs12:17 Omuntu agha obudhulizi obw'amazima aleetagho ensala entuufu, aye ole agha obudhulizi obw'obuguya aleetagho okusaliriza." 
Proverbs12:18 Omuntu ayogera nga tasoose kulowooza, ebibono bye bifumita ng'oti mpiima, aye ebibono ebyogerwa n'amagezi biwonia." 
Proverbs12:19 Ebibono eby'amazima tibikyuka ebyanda n'ebyanda, aye ebibono eby'obuguya bibaaghooku kaseera buseera." 
Proverbs12:20 Abo abayiiya okukola ebibi beerimba beene, aye abo abategeka okukola ebirungi bafunamu eisanhu." 
Proverbs12:21 Akabi tikagwira mutuufu, aye ababi baba mu bizibu buli kiseera." 
Proverbs12:22 Musengwa Katonda akyagha aboogera eby'obuguya, aye asangaalira abo abeesigwa mu bye bakola." 
Proverbs12:23 Omuntu omutegeevu taja nga yeerangirira kiisi ky'aidhi, aye abasiru booleka bukalamu nga ghazira kye baidhi." 
Proverbs12:24 Emikono emikozi einho gireetera mwene gyo okuba omufuzi, ate emikono eminafu gyaleetera mwene gyo okuba omwiru." 
Proverbs12:25 Okweraliikirira tikuganha muntu kusangaala, aye ebibono ebigumya bireetera omuntu eisanhu." 
Proverbs12:26 Omuntu akola ebituufu n'akulemberamu baine, aye omukozi w'ebibi abaleetera okudaaliima." 
Proverbs12:27 Omuntu omugayaavu tasobola kugemya ky'ali kuyiiga, aye omukozi einho afuna obukombe kamaala." 
Proverbs12:28 Mu kukola ebituufu n'omuli obulamu, aye mu kukola ebibi mulimu kufa." 
Proverbs13:1 Omwana omugezi awulira ise by'amugalagira, aye omunhoomi tayenda kunenezebwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Omuntu omulungi mu by'ayogera mw'afuna, ebirungi aye ateesigika yeeguguna kukola bya bukambwe." 
Proverbs13:3 Omuntu afuga omunwa gwe akuuma obulamu bwe, aye ole ayogerayogera eyo atyo yeezikiriza mwene." 
Proverbs13:4 Omuntu omugayaavu taghanga kufuna kye yeegomba, aye omukozi einho afuna obukombe kamaala." 
Proverbs13:5 Omuntu akola ebituufu akyagha obuguya, aye omukozi w'ebibi yeebisa mu nsambo eswaza era anhoomebwa." 
Proverbs13:6 Obutuufu bukuuma omuntu omwesimbu, aye okukola ebibi kuleetera aboonooni okugwa." 
Proverbs13:7 Ghaligho omuntu eyeebisa ng'oti mukombe, ate nga ghazira kantu k'ali nako; ate owundi yeebisa ng'oti mwavu, ate ng'ali n'ebintu kamaala." 
Proverbs13:8 Omugaiga aghaayo eby'obugaiga bwe okununula obulamu bwe, aye omwavu ghazira ky'asabibwa kughaayo naire." 
Proverbs13:9 Omuntu omutuufu ali ng'oti n'entaala eyaka obukalamu, ate omubi yaaba ng'oti n'entaala eri kuzikira." 
Proverbs13:10 Okwekuluntaza kuleeta okutabukatabuka, aye okwebuuza ku magezi kuleetera omuntu okuba omugezi." 
Proverbs13:11 Obukombe obufunibwa amangu buwaagho mangu, aye obusolozebwa empolampola buja nga bweyongeraku." 
Proverbs13:12 Okulwagho okufuna ky'osuubira kuleetera omwoyo okuzirika, aye bw'ofuna kye weegombanga kikuleetera obulamu." 
Proverbs13:13 Ole anhooma okugalagirwa yeereetera mwene okuzikirira, aye ole agondera ekiragiro aligheebwa empeera." 
Proverbs13:14 Abagezi bye beegeresa biri ng'oti nsulo ereeta obulamu, biwonia omuntu okufa." 
Proverbs13:15 Omuntu ali n'okutetenkania, abantu bamwenda, aye ole ateesigika azikirira." 
Proverbs13:16 Omuntu omugezi asooka kulowooza memale yakola ekintu, aye omusiru ayanika obusiru bwe." 
Proverbs13:17 Omukwenda ateesigika asuula abantu mu buzibu, aye omutume omukalamu aleeta emiraala." 
Proverbs13:18 Omuntu atafaayo ku bye bamugalagira, ayavughala era yaanhoomebwa, aye ole awulirisa bye bamunenia agheebwa ekitiisa." 
Proverbs13:19 Omuntu asangaala okufuna kye yeegomba. Abasiru tibendera irala kulekera kukola bibi. 
Proverbs13:20 Ole abita n'abagezi yeena afuuka mugezi, aye ole aba mu basiru alizikirizibwa." 
Proverbs13:21 Ebizibu bija nga binoonereza aboonooni, aye abatuufu baligheebwa ebirungi." 
Proverbs13:22 Omuntu omulungi aba n'obukombe bw'alekeraku n'abaidhukulu, aye obukombe obw'aboonooni bugheebwa abatuufu." 
Proverbs13:23 Enimiro edh'abaavu edhawuumuzibwaku okulimwa dhibala emere kamaala, aye abantu abatakola mazima babaswankulaku emere eyo." 
Proverbs13:24 Ole atayenda kubonereza mwana we aba amukyagha, aye ole agonza omwana we afuba okumukangaivula." 
Proverbs13:25 Abatuufu baba n'emere ebamala, aye ababi baba bayala buli kiseera." 
Proverbs14:1 Amagezi ag'omukazi n'agazimba amaka ge, aye obusiru bwe bugasaaniagho." 
Proverbs14:2 Omuntu omwesimbu atya Musengwa Katonda, aye ateesigika amunhooma." 
Proverbs14:3 Omusiru by'ayogera n'ebimukubya olw'okwekuluntaza, aye omugezi by'ayogera n'ebimukuuma." 
Proverbs14:4 Aghazira nte dhirima, mu byagi timuba mere, aye bw'oba n'ente edhirima edh'amaani ebyagi biidhula emere." 
Proverbs14:5 Omudhulizi omwesigwa talimba, aye atali mwesigwa ayogera bya buguya byereere." 
Proverbs14:6 Omunhoomi ni bw'ayagala amagezi tagafuna, aye omutegeevu ageega mangu." 
Proverbs14:7 Tobanga mu basiru, kuba ozirayo kya magezi ky'obafunamu." 
Proverbs14:8 Amagezi ag'omutegeevu gamuleetera okumanha eky'okukola, aye obusiru obw'abasiru bubaleetera kwerimba." 
Proverbs14:9 Abasiru tibafaayo nga bakoze ebibi, aye abeesimbu Katonda abasanhukira." 
Proverbs14:10 Omuntu amanha nnaku eri ku mwoyo gwe, era ghazira ategeera isanhu liri ku mwoyo gwa mwine." 
Proverbs14:11 Endhu ey'omubi eja kuzikirira, aye entindi ey'omwesimbu esigale ng'ekaaligho." 
Proverbs14:12 Omuntu asobola okugema engira ng'adhuuba ati ntuufu, aye yaamutuusa ku kufa." 
Proverbs14:13 Omuntu asobola okuseka aye ng'ali n'obughafu ku mwoyo, era aghava eisanhu ghairagho nnaku." 
Proverbs14:14 Omuntu omubi alifuna ebigwaniire ebikolwa bye ebibi, n'omulungi yaafuna ebigwaniire ebikolwa bye ebirungi." 
Proverbs14:15 Omuntu omusiru aikiriza buli kintu, aye omutegeevu amala kwetegereza memale." 
Proverbs14:16 Omugezi asooka kwekengeera era yeesamba ebizibu, aye omusiru aghalambuka bughalambuke nga tafaayo." 
Proverbs14:17 Omuntu asungughala amangu akola eby'ekisiru, aye omwegendereza aba muguminkiriza." 
Proverbs14:18 Abasiru bafuna busiru, aye abagezi bagheebwa amagezi ng'empeera yaibwe." 
Proverbs14:19 Ababi balikubira abatuufu amakiryaivu, era aboonooni abo baliba ku miryango egy'abatya Katonda nga babeegayirira." 
Proverbs14:20 Omwavu akyayibwa ni bakagwa be beene, aye omukombe aba n'emikwano kamaala." 
Proverbs14:21 Ole anhooma muntu mwine aba akoze kibi, aye wa nkabi oyo agemerwa omwavu ekivunika." 
Proverbs14:22 Abo abategeka okukola ebibi baba badaaliimye mu ndowooza yaibwe, aye abategeka okukola obukalamu beesigibwa era baateebwamu ekinhagansi." 
Proverbs14:23 Mu kukola muvaamu amagoba, aye okwogera obwogere kuleeta bwavu." 
Proverbs14:24 Amagezi galeetera abagezi okuba abakombe, aye abasiru basirughala busirughale." 
Proverbs14:25 Omudhulizi ayogera amazima awonia obulamu obw'abantu, aye ole ayogera eby'obuguya abalyamu bwa lukwe." 
Proverbs14:26 Okutya Musengwa Katonda kuleetera omuntu okuba omugumu, era n'ab'omu maka ge kubakuuma." 
Proverbs14:27 Okutya Musengwa Katonda kuli ng'oti nsulo ereeta obulamu, kuwonia omuntu okufa." 
Proverbs14:28 Abantu kyabazinga b'afuga ye bakoma okuba abangi, n'ekitiisa kye ye kikoma okuba ekikologho, aye b'afuga bwe batabaagho, n'ekitiisa kye tikibaagho." 
Proverbs14:29 Omuntu alwagho okusungughala aba mutegeevu mu by'akola, aye ole asungughala amangu akola eby'ekisiru." 
Proverbs14:30 Omuntu bw'aba n'emiraala ku mwoyo, n'omubiri guba mulamu, aye ensaalwa egulya ng'oti bulwaire bwa kokolo." 
Proverbs14:31 Omuntu atuntuza omwavu aba ali kuvuma Katonda eyamutonda, aye ole agemerwa omuntu ali mu bwetaavu ekivunika aba atya Katonda." 
Proverbs14:32 Ababi beereetera beene okugwa olw'ebikolwa byaibwe ebibi, aye abatuufu, obwesigwa bwaibwe n'obubakuuma." 
Proverbs14:33 Omuntu omutegeevu aba n'amagezi, aye omusiru tagawulirangaku naire." 
Proverbs14:34 Obutuufu buleetera eighanga okugheebwa ekitiisa, aye okwonoona kwalivumagania." 
Proverbs14:35 Omugheereza akola emirimo obukalamu kyabazinga amusanhukira, aye ole akola ebiswaza amusungughalira." 
Proverbs15:1 Omuntu airamu nga yeewooya amalagho obusungu, aye ole ayogera n'eikabyo abusiikuula busiikuule." 
Proverbs15:2 Omugezi ayogera ebigwaniire, aye omusiru alokompoka busiru bwereere." 
Proverbs15:3 Eriiso lya Musengwa Katonda ghazira ghe litabona, alingirira abalungi n'ababi." 
Proverbs15:4 Ebibono eby'ekisa bireeta obulamu, aye eby'obuguya bikutula omwoyo." 
Proverbs15:5 Omusiru anhooma abazaire be bye bamugalagira, aye ole aganha okunenezebwa aba mutegeevu." 
Proverbs15:6 Mu ndhu edh'abatuufu mubaamu eby'obukombe kamaala, aye ababi bye bafuna tibabifunamu kalungi naire." 
Proverbs15:7 Abagezi bye boogera bibunisa okumanha mu bantu, aye abasiru tibakola batyo." 
Proverbs15:8 Musengwa Katonda yeenhinhata emisengo egy'ababi, aye yaasanhukira okusaba okw'abeesimbu." 
Proverbs15:9 Musengwa Katonda yeenhinhata eneebisa ey'ababi, aye agonza abo abajiira ku butuufu." 
Proverbs15:10 Ole ava ku ngira entuufu alikangaivulwa inho; ole akyagha okunenezebwa wa kufa. 
Proverbs15:11 Oba nga ebiri e magombe eri okuzikirira Musengwa Katonda abibona bukalamu, memale obwo ebiri mu myoyo gy'abantu by'ataamanhe?" 
Proverbs15:12 Omuntu omunhoomi tayenda kunenezebwa, era taghanga kuja kwebuuzaaku ku bamusinga magezi." 
Proverbs15:13 Ali n'eisanhu ku mwoyo omubonera ku kumwenha, aye ali n'enaku ku mwoyo aba munhiinkaavu." 
Proverbs15:14 Omuntu omutegeevu anoonenkereza okufuna amagezi, aye omusiru awulira nga obusiru bumumala." 
Proverbs15:15 Obulamu obw'omuntu omughafu bwonabwona buba bubi, aye omuntu omusangaavu aba ng'oti ali mu mbaga ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Proverbs15:16 Omuntu amala gaba mwavu aye ng'atya Musengwa Katonda, atabaire mukombe aye ng'ali mu bizibu." 
Proverbs15:17 Abantu bamala galiira katunkuma nga bagonzania, bataliiriire mmamba nsavu nga baakyaghagana." 
Proverbs15:18 Omuntu asungughala amangu asiikuula okusoola, aye ole alwagho okusungughala amalagho obutaisania." 
Proverbs15:19 Obulamu obw'omugayaavu bwidhula bizibu, aye obw'omwesimbu buba bukalamu era nga bweyagaza." 
Proverbs15:20 Omwana omugezi yeesiimisa ise, aye omuntu omusiru anhooma inhina." 
Proverbs15:21 Omuntu aziramu kutegeera asangaalira obusiru, aye omutegeevu akola ebyo ebituufu." 
Proverbs15:22 Aghazira bawi ba magezi entegeka dhidobana, aye aghali abaghabuzi kamaala dhituukirira." 
Proverbs15:23 Okwiramu ekituufu kusanhusa omuntu, era ekibono ekyogerwa mu kiseera ekigwaine kiba kirungi inho." 
Proverbs15:24 Omuntu omugezi agema engira emutwala ghaigulu eri obulamu, awone okuja ghansi mu magombe." 
Proverbs15:25 Musengwa Katonda azikiriza endhu edh'abantu abeekuluntaza, aye yaakuuma ebintu bya banamwandu." 
Proverbs15:26 Musengwa Katonda yeenhinhata ebidhuubo ebibi, aye asangaalira ebibono ebirungi." 
Proverbs15:27 Omuntu alulunkanira okufuna amagoba mu kukupankupania aleetera ab'omu maka ge ebizibu, aye ole akyagha enguzi aghangaala." 
Proverbs15:28 Omuntu omutuufu asooka kulowooza memale yairamu, aye omubi alokompoka bibi byereere." 
Proverbs15:29 Musengwa Katonda aba ng'oti ali ghala inho okuwulira ababi nga bamusaba, aye awulirisa mangu okusaba okw'abatuufu." 
Proverbs15:30 Omuntu amoga n'eisanhu asanhusa, era amawulire amalungi gaizaamu amaani." 
Proverbs15:31 Ole aganha okunenezebwa okulungi afuuka mugezi. 
Proverbs15:32 Ole aloba okugalagirwa yeefiiriza mwene, aye ole aganha okunenezebwa afuuka mutegeevu." 
Proverbs15:33 Okutya Musengwa Katonda kwegeresa omuntu amagezi, era okwewombeeka n'okusooka, memale omuntu baamutaamu ekinhagansi." 
Proverbs16:1 Omuntu ategeka by'anaakola mu mwoyo gwe, aye Musengwa Katonda n'asalagho eky'okukola." 
Proverbs16:2 Ole asobola okwebona nga by'akola bituufu, aye Musengwa Katonda yeekebeedha ebigendererwa eby'omuntu oyo." 
Proverbs16:3 By'okolanga byonabyona bigemye Musengwa Katonda, olwo entegeka dho dhiidha kutuukiriranga." 
Proverbs16:4 Buli kintu Musengwa Katonda yakikola n'ekigendererwa kyakyo, n'omubi yamukolera olunaku olw'okubonerezebwaku." 
Proverbs16:5 Musengwa Katonda yeenhinhata kiisi eyeekuluntaza, era ekikakafu kiri nti taliroba kumubonereza." 
Proverbs16:6 Musengwa Katonda atoola ebibi ku muntu omuwulize era omwesigwa, era yaawonia omuntu amutya, okukola ebibi." 
Proverbs16:7 Omuntu bw'akola ebisanhusa Musengwa Katonda, Musengwa Katonda oyo afuula n'ababaire abazigu b'omuntu oyo baaba bakagwa be." 
Proverbs16:8 Omuntu akatono k'afuna ng'akola amazima, kawula obukombe obungi bw'afuna mu bukupankupania." 
Proverbs16:9 Omuntu asobola okutegeka by'anaakola, aye Musengwa Katonda n'abituukiriza." 
Proverbs16:10 Katonda n'agalagira kyabazinga by'ayogera, olwo mu nsala ye mwaloba kuba kisobu." 
Proverbs16:11 Ebipimo ebituufu Musengwa Katonda by'ayenda bikozesebwe mu kupima; amabaale goonagoona agakozesebwa n'eyagakola. 
Proverbs16:12 Okukola ebibi tikusiimya bakyabazinga naire, kuba obwakyabazinga bujiira ku butuufu." 
Proverbs16:13 Kyabazinga asanhukira aboogera ebituufu, era yaagonza kiisi ayogera mazima." 
Proverbs16:14 Kyabazinga bw'asungughala asobola n'okwita, kale omugezi ky'akola n'okumuwooyawooya." 
Proverbs16:15 Kyabazinga bw'aba omusangaavu abantu be balama, era ekivunika kye kiba ng'oti bire ebivaamu amaadhi ag'omutoigo." 
Proverbs16:16 Okuba n'amagezi kuwula okuba ni zaabu, era ole okulondagho okuba omutegeevu kiwula okulondagho feeza." 
Proverbs16:17 Abantu abeesimbu beekuuma obutagwa mu kibi; abo abeegendereza bakuuma obulamu bwaibwe. 
Proverbs16:18 Okwekuluntaza kuleeta okuzikirira, n'okwegulumiza kwavaamu okugwa." 
Proverbs16:19 Okwewombeeka n'oba aghalala n'abaavu, kuwula okugabana ku munhago ogw'abeekuluntaza." 
Proverbs16:20 Omuntu omwegendereza mu buli kintu, ebintu biidha kumujiiranga bukalamu, era wa nkabi oyo eyeesiga Musengwa Katonda." 
Proverbs16:21 Omuntu omugezi bamweta mutegeevu, era olw'ebibono bye ebikalamu aikirizisa abantu." 
Proverbs16:22 Amagezi eri abagezi gali ng'oti nsulo ereeta obulamu, ate obusiru bwaba kibonerezo eri abasiru." 
Proverbs16:23 Omugezi ayogera bya makulu, era by'ayogera byongera okwikirizisa abantu." 
Proverbs16:24 Ebibono ebirungi bidhuudhuula ng'oti mudheenene, biizaamu amaani by'aleeta n'obulamu mu mubiri." 
Proverbs16:25 Omuntu asobola okugema engira ng'adhuuba ati ntuufu, aye yaamutuusa ku kufa." 
Proverbs16:26 Okwenda okulya kuleetera omuntu okukola, era enda ye n'emukubiriza okukola." 
Proverbs16:27 Omuntu omubi era azira mugaso asala amagezi okukola ebibi, ni by'ayogera biba ng'oti muliro oguleeta okuzikirira." 
Proverbs16:28 Omuntu omudankaanu aleeta okukoodhana mu bantu, era ow'olubono akyaghagania ab'omukago." 
Proverbs16:29 Omuntu akola eby'obukambwe asendasenda n'abandi, yaabakoza ebintu ebitali bikalamu." 
Proverbs16:30 Ole akunhiira eriiso aba ategeka kukola bikyamu, ate ole akusonkezaaku omunwa aba ategeka kukukola kabi." 
Proverbs16:31 Envu edh'obukaire dhiri ng'oti n'engule ey'ekitiisa, dhifunibwa abo abeebisiisa mu bulamu obutuufu." 
Proverbs16:32 Omuntu alwagho okusungughala aba muzira okuwula omulwani ow'amaani, n'ole eyeefuga mu mwoyo gwe awula ole aghangula ekibuga ekiramba." 
Proverbs16:33 Abantu baghanga okukuba akalulu babone ekinaavaamu, aye Musengwa Katonda mwene n'asalagho eky'enkomerero." 
Proverbs17:1 Omuntu amala galya bumere bukalukalu ng'ali n'emiraala, ataliire mbaga ng'ali mu maka agalimu okusoola." 
Proverbs17:2 Omugheereza akola emirimo obukalamu alifuga omwana waagho akola ebiswaza, era alifuna omugabo ogw'obusika." 
Proverbs17:3 Omuliro n'ogukozesebwa okukenenula feeza ni zaabu okubona obulungi bwabyo, aye Musengwa Katonda n'aleba emyoyo gy'abantu okubona obutukuvu bwagyo." 
Proverbs17:4 Omukozi w'ebibi awulirisa empayo edh'abakozi b'ebibi; n'omuguya yaajiira ku baguya bye boogera. 
Proverbs17:5 Omuntu akiina abaavu aba ali kuvuma Katonda eyabatonda; n'oyo asekerera abali mu bizibu taliroba kubonerezebwa. 
Proverbs17:6 Abakaire badhuga olw'okuba n'abaidhukulu, n'abaana beenhumiririza mu bazaire baibwe." 
Proverbs17:7 Omusiru tasuubirwa kwogera bya makulu, n'omuntu ow'ekitiisa tasuubirwa kuba muguya." 
Proverbs17:8 Abantu abakozesa enguzi bagyesiga ng'oti bulezi, era bagyesiguliraku bati ezira ky'eremwa." 
Proverbs17:9 Ole anoonia okwendebwa asonigha abasobya, aye ole adeeberera ebisobyo ayawukania ab'omukago." 
Proverbs17:10 Omuntu ategeera omunenia lulala yaayega, aye omusiru ni bw'omukuba emikuzi ekikumi ghazira ky'ayega." 
Proverbs17:11 Omuntu omubi buli kiseera ayenda kudheema, aye balimusindikira omukwenda omukambwe." 
Proverbs17:12 Omuntu amala gaagaanana na nsolo nkambwe enhagiibwaku abaana baayo, atayagaanaine na musiru ng'ali kukola obusiru bwe." 
Proverbs17:13 Akabi tikaliva mu ndhu y'oyo asasulamu mwine ekibi ng'amukoleire ekirungi. 
Proverbs17:14 Okusoola kutoolereza mpola ng'oti n'okutoonherera okw'amaadhi, kale ekiwula n'okumalagho entaka nga mukaali kukoodhana." 
Proverbs17:15 Musengwa Katonda yeenhinhata oyo eyeedheereza omubi eyaiza omusango, n'oyo asalira omutuufu omusango okumusinga ate nga tagwizanga." 
Proverbs17:16 Kigasa ki omusiru okuba n'empiiya edh'okusasulira amagezi, ng'ate azira kutegeera?" 
Proverbs17:17 Ab'omukago bagonzania enaku dhoonadhoona, n'aboluganda baabaagho okuyambagana mu bizibu." 
Proverbs17:18 Omuntu aziramu kategeera n'eyeeyimiriragho omuntu, era ni yeeyama okumusasuliragho eibandha." 
Proverbs17:19 Ole agonza okusoola aleeta kutabukatabuka; era ole eyeekuluntaza anoonia kuzikirira. 
Proverbs17:20 Omuntu ow'ebirowoozo ebibi ebintu tibimujiiranga bukalamu, n'omuguya yeena talwa kugwa mu bizibu." 
Proverbs17:21 Omwana omusiru agemya abazaire be enaku; era abazaire ab'omusiru bazira isanhu naire. 
Proverbs17:22 Okuba omusangaavu, bulezi bwene obuwonia, aye okuba omunakughavu kugoogombya omubiri." 
Proverbs17:23 Omulamuzi omubi aganha baamugha enguzi mu ngiso, olwo yaabuzaabuza amazima." 
Proverbs17:24 Omuntu omutegeevu ategeka kukola bya magezi, aye omusiru akolakola eyo atyo." 
Proverbs17:25 Omwana omusiru agemya abazaire be enaku, era yaabaleetera obulumi." 
Proverbs17:26 Tikiba kirungi kutanza muntu akola bituufu ataiziiza musango, era tikiba kituufu kubonereza muntu mukalamu." 
Proverbs17:27 Omuntu eyeefuga mu by'ayogera aba mugezi, n'omuntu atava mangu mu mbeera aba mutegeevu." 
Proverbs17:28 N'omusiru yeena bw'asirika atwalibwa okuba omugezi; bw'atayasamya munwa kwogera aloowozebwa okuba omutegeevu. 
Proverbs18:1 Omuntu omweyawuze yeerowoozaaku yenka, era atakania abandi boonaboona bye babona nga n'ebituufu." 
Proverbs18:2 Omusiru taisa mwoyo ku kutegeera, aye ayenda bwa kwogera ekimuli ku mwoyo." 
Proverbs18:3 Okukola ebibi kuleeta okunhoomebwa; era okukola ebiswaza kuvaamu okuvumirirwa. 
Proverbs18:4 Omuntu by'ayogera bisobola okubaamu amagezi amangi ng'oti n'amaadhi amaleeyi; era byabaamu amagezi amalungi ng'oti n'ensulo evaamu amaadhi agakuuluula. 
Proverbs18:5 Ti kituufu kwekubira ku luuyi lwa mwizi wa musango n'agusinga, era ti kituufu kusaliriza muntu akola ebituufu n'otamusalira mu butuufu." 
Proverbs18:6 Omusiru by'ayogera bireeta kusoola, era byamuleetera okukubwa." 
Proverbs18:7 Ebibono by'omusiru bimuleetera okuzikirira, era bw'ayogera yeetegamu mwene." 
Proverbs18:8 Ebibono eby'omuntu ow'olubono biri ng'oti mere ewooma einho, biika byatuukira irala mu nda." 
Proverbs18:9 Omugayaavu mu mirimo aba mubi, okwagayaga n'oyo agyonoona."
