Proverbs18:10 Musengwa Katonda ali ng'oti n'ekisenge ekigumu, abakola ebituufu mwe balumukira okuwona ebizibu." 
Proverbs18:11 Aye omukombe alowooza ati eby'obukombe by'aba nabyo n'ebimukuuma, era ati eby'obukombe ebyo n'ekimante ekigumu ekimwezungulwire okumuwonia abazigu." 
Proverbs18:12 Okwekuluntaza n'okukulembera okuzikirira, aye okwewombeeka n'okusooka memale omuntu baamutaamu ekinhagansi." 
Proverbs18:13 Omuntu airamu ekintu nga tamaze kuwulirisa bukalamu, aba musiru era aswala." 
Proverbs18:14 Omuntu omugumu aghanga okuguminkiriza obulwaire yaabaagho, aye awoiremu eisuubi taghanga kubaagho." 
Proverbs18:15 Omuntu omutegeevu ayenda okwega, era omugezi anoonenkereza okumanha." 
Proverbs18:16 Omuntu ali n'ekirabo ky'aleeta bamusegulira yaabita, yaatuuka ni mu maiso ag'abantu abakologho." 
Proverbs18:17 Omuntu asooka okuwoza mu musango aboneka ng'oti n'omutuufu, okutuusa owundi lw'aidha naamulumiriza." 
Proverbs18:18 Okukuba akalulu kulekeza entaka, era kwalamula ab'amaani." 
Proverbs18:19 Bw'oyamba owoluganda, akukuuma ng'oti n'ekimante ekigumu ekyezungulwire ekibuga, aye bw'osoola naye takuganha kuja y'ali, ku ndhigi ataaku bwa minhololo." 
Proverbs18:20 Omuntu ali n'okugumira byonabyona ebiva mu ebyo by'ayogera. 
Proverbs18:21 Omuntu by'ayogera bisobola okwita oba okulamya. Kale abo abenda einho okwogera bali n'okugumira byonabyona ebiva mu bye boogera. 
Proverbs18:22 Omuntu afuna omukazi ow'okufumbirwa aba wa nkabi, era Musengwa Katonda amusanhukira." 
Proverbs18:23 Omwavu ayogera nga yeewooya, aye omukombe airamu na bukambwe." 
Proverbs18:24 Ab'emikwano abandi baba ba kiseera buseera, aye ghaligho abagumya omukwano okuwula n'owoluganda." 
Proverbs19:1 Omuntu amala gaba mwavu aye nga mwesigwa, atabaire muguya era omusiru." 
Proverbs19:2 Ti kirungi muntu kukola kintu nga tasoose kulowooza, era ole agwidhubana n'ebintu talwa kugwa mu nsobi." 
Proverbs19:3 Omuntu asobola okukola eby'ekisiru yeereetera mwene okuzikirira, aye yaamala yaasungughalira Musengwa Katonda." 
Proverbs19:4 Omukombe yeeyongera okufuna emikwano emiyaaka, aye omwavu ni gy'ali nagyo gimulekulira agho yenka." 
Proverbs19:5 Omuntu agha obudhulizi obw'obuguya aja kubonerezebwa, era oyo ayogera eby'obulimba azira gh'aliwonera." 
Proverbs19:6 Abantu kamaala benda okukwana omuntu ow'ekitiisa, era buli muntu yeegomba abe mukagwa w'omuntu omugabi." 
Proverbs19:7 Omwavu akyayibwa aboluganda be boonaboona, era bwe kituuka ku bakagwa be, bamwesamba bwesambe! Ni bw'abeetereza atya tibaidha." 
Proverbs19:8 Omuntu afuna amagezi yeerabirira; oyo agema by'ayeze, ebintu bimujiira bukalamu." 
Proverbs19:9 Omuntu agha obudhulizi obw'obuguya aja kubonerezebwa, era oyo ayogera eby'obulimba wa kuzikirira." 
Proverbs19:10 Omusiru tagwana kuba mu bulamu bwa kwedhalabya, era bwekituuka ku mwiru obwiru, oyo tagwana kufuga bakungu naire." 
Proverbs19:11 Okutegeera kuleetera omuntu okulwagho okusungughala, era kiba kya kitiisa omuntu okusonigha abasobya." 
Proverbs19:12 Kyabazinga bw'asungughala aba ng'oti n'empologoma eri kuwologoma, aye ekivunika kye kiri ng'oti n'omusulo ogughegheeza ebisimbe ni birama." 
Proverbs19:13 Omwana omusiru aleetera omuzaire we okuzikirira, ate omukazi asoolasoola ali ng'oti n'amaadhi agatoonherera obutalekera." 
Proverbs19:14 Endhu n'eby'obukombe ebindi bisikirwa okuva ku bazaire, aye omukazi omutegeevu aba kirabo okuva ye Musengwa Katonda." 
Proverbs19:15 Omuntu omugayaavu afuluuta bwa ndoolo ekiseera kyonakyona, era omuntu atayenda kukola yeereetera mwene endhala." 
Proverbs19:16 Omuntu agondera ebiragiro akuuma obulamu bwe, aye ole abinhooma obunhoome wa kufa." 
Proverbs19:17 Agemerwa omwavu ekivunika aba ng'oti awoze Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda oyo aja kumusasula olw'ekikolwa kye ekyo." 
Proverbs19:18 Kangaivula omwana wo nga ghakaaligho eisuubi ery'okumugolola, otamuleka kuzikirira." 
Proverbs19:19 Omuntu ow'obusungu omuleka yaaguma n'ebizibu ebiva mu busungu bwe, kuba bw'omutoola mu kizibu omukuzi ogusooka, oba oli n'okumutoola ni mu kindi omukuzi ogundi." 
Proverbs19:20 Bw'owulirisa amagezi agakugheebwa era n'oganha okugalagirwa, olwo olifuna amagezi mu biseera eby'omu maiso." 
Proverbs19:21 Omuntu ategeka by'anaakola mu mwoyo gwe, aye Musengwa Katonda ky'asalagho n'ekibaagho." 
Proverbs19:22 Obwesigwa n'obuleetera omuntu okwendebwa, era omwavu awula omuguya." 
Proverbs19:23 Okutya Musengwa Katonda kuleetera omuntu obulamu, yaaba bukalamu ng'ali miraala, ghaabulagho akabi akamutuukaku naire." 
Proverbs19:24 Omuntu omugayaavu akoza emere mu kibya, aye yaalemwa okugita mu kanwa." 
Proverbs19:25 Omunhoomi ali n'okubonerezebwa, olwo abazira magezi basobole okwega; era bw'onenia omutegeevu yeeyongeraku okutegeera." 
Proverbs19:26 Omuntu atuntuza ise era n'abinga inhina ghaka, aba yeebisiisa mu nsambo eswaza era anhoomebwa." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wange, bw'olekera okuwulirisa bye nkugalagira, oidha kwerabira ni bye wali oidhi." 
Proverbs19:28 Omuntu agha obudhulizi obw'obuguya anhooma ensala entuufu ey'omusango, era omuntu omubi awoomerwa okukola ebibi ng'oti bwa mere." 
Proverbs19:29 Abanhoomi tibaliwona kusalirwa musango kubasinga, n'abasiru tibaliwona kukubwa." 
Proverbs20:1 Omuntu anhwa einho omwenge yeereetera okunhoomebwa, yaasoola era yaalwana; era ole yeenayeena atwalirizibwa omwenge aba musiru." 
Proverbs20:2 Kyabazinga bw'asungughala atiisa ng'oti n'empologoma eri kuwologoma; era ole yeenayeena amusonsoonia aba anoonia kufa. 
Proverbs20:3 Kiba kya kitiisa okwesamba aghali okusoola; aye abasiru buli kiseera baba mu kusoola. 
Proverbs20:4 Omugayaavu bw'aloba okwiruula enimiro ye mu kiseera, alinoonia ky'akungula nga takibona." 
Proverbs20:5 Omuntu by'alowooza biba ng'oti maadhi agaba mu nsulo endeeyi, aye omuntu ali n'okutetenkania aghanga okugasenayo." 
Proverbs20:6 Abantu kamaala beesuuta okuba ab'ekisa, aye omwesigwa naani asobola okumuzuula?" 
Proverbs20:7 Abaana abasikira iseibwe omulungi era omwesigwa, baba ba nkabi." 
Proverbs20:8 Kyabazinga bw'atyama okusala emisango, anoonenkereza yaazuula buli kibi." 
Proverbs20:9 Naani aghanga okukoba ati: “Nnaaziiza omwoyo gwange, buti nzira kibi kyonakyona.”" 
Proverbs20:10 Musengwa Katonda yeenhinhata abo abakozesa ebipimo ebitali bituufu. 
Proverbs20:11 N'omwana omuto by'akola byoleka ki ky'ali, osobola okumanha oba nga mwesigwa era nga mulungi." 
Proverbs20:12 Amatu ge tuwuliza n'amaiso ge tubonesa, goonagoona Musengwa Katonda n'eyagakola." 
Proverbs20:13 Otagonzanga inho ndoolo, kuba ekyo kisobola okukwavughaza; moganga okole inho, oidha kuba n'emere kamaala." 
Proverbs20:14 Omuguzi akaayana ng'ayenda okwisa ku mighendo egy'ekintu ky'ali kulamuza; aye bw'amala okugula, aja nga yeesuuta nga bw'adondoire." 
Proverbs20:15 Eriyo zaabu era yaabaayo n'amabaale ag'omughendo kamaala; aye omuntu ayogera eby'amagezi wa mughendo inho okuwulagho. 
Proverbs20:16 Ole eyeeyimirira omuntu y'ataidhi, ali n'okutoolebwaku ekintu ky'asinzeegho, okukakasa ng'eibandha liidha kusasulwa." 
Proverbs20:17 Omuntu by'afuna mu kukupankupania bisooka byawoomerera ng'oti mere, aye oluvainhuma aba ng'oti ali kulya bubaale." 
Proverbs20:18 Entegeka edh'omuntu dhituukirira lwa kugalagirwa. Kale sooka weebuuzenga ku magezi ng'okaali kutanula lutalo. 
Proverbs20:19 Omuntu ayengeesa olubono ayogera ebyama. Kale weesambanga abantu aboogerayogera eyo batyo. 
Proverbs20:20 Omuntu akolimira ise oba inhina, obulamu bwe bulikoma ng'oti n'entaala ezikiziibwa mu nzikiiza eri bedimudimu." 
Proverbs20:21 Obukombe omuntu bw'asikira obusikire nga tabukolereire, tibutera kubangamu mukisa ku nkomerero." 
Proverbs20:22 Oteesasuuzanga muntu akukoze kibi, aye weesigenga bwa Musengwa Katonda aidha kukuyambanga." 
Proverbs20:23 Musengwa Katonda yeenhinhata abo abakozesa ebipimo ebitali bituufu, era yaakyagha abakozesa minzaani enkyamu." 
Proverbs20:24 Musengwa Katonda n'asalagho obulamu obw'omuntu bwe bunaaba. Kale omuntu asobola atya okumanha engira obulamu bwe ye bunaagema? 
Proverbs20:25 Kuba kwesuula ku mutego, omuntu okusuubiza okugha Katonda ekintu, ate n'amala yeidhusa kye yeeyamye." 
Proverbs20:26 Kyabazinga omugezi anoonenkereza yaazuula ababi, era yaababonereza n'obukambwe." 
Proverbs20:27 Ebidhuubo eby'omuntu biri ng'oti ntaala Musengwa Katonda y'agha omuntu okweringa munda mwe. 
Proverbs20:28 Kyabazinga ow'ekivunika era akolera ku mazima aghangaalira ku bufuzi, era olw'okugonza kwe asigala ng'akaali ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga." 
Proverbs20:29 Okwenhumiriza okw'abaisuka kuli mu maani gaibwe, aye omutwe ogw'envu n'oguwoomya abakaire." 
Proverbs20:30 Emiigo eginuubula gigolola empisa embi, n'okuwaiga omuntu kwamumaliramu irala emize emibi." 
Proverbs21:1 Omwoyo gwa kyabazinga guba mu buyinza bwa Musengwa Katonda; agukyukiza buli y'ayenda ng'oti n'omweta ogw'amaadhi. 
Proverbs21:2 Ole asobola okwebona nga by'akola bituufu, aye Musengwa Katonda n'abona ebigendererwa eby'omuntu oyo." 
Proverbs21:3 Okukola ebituufu n'okukolera ku mazima, bisiimya Musengwa Katonda okuwula okumugha emisengo." 
Proverbs21:4 Ababi batwalirizibwa okwebona n'okwekuluntaza, era ekyo kibi." 
Proverbs21:5 Entegeka edh'omuntu omukozi einho dhimufunisa ebintu kamaala, aye ole agwidhubanira ebintu yeereetaku obwavu." 
Proverbs21:6 Eby'obukombe ebifunibwa mu kukupankupania bibita bubite ng'oti mpewo, ole bw'abinoonia aba anoonia kufa." 
Proverbs21:7 Obukambwe obw'ababi buja kubaviiramu kuzikirira, kuba tibenda kukola kituufu." 
Proverbs21:8 Abantu ababi baba bakuyikuyi, aye abalungi bakola ebituufu." 
Proverbs21:9 Omuntu amala gasula ghaigulu ku ndhu, atasuze mu ndhu ndala na mukazi asoolasoola." 
Proverbs21:10 Omubi buli kaseera ayenda kukola bibi, era azira y'agemerwa kivunika." 
Proverbs21:11 Omunhoomi bwe bamubonereza, olwo n'ole azira magezi ayega; aye omugezi bwe bamugalagira yeeyongera bwa kumanha." 
Proverbs21:12 Katonda mu butuufu bwe amanha ebikolebwa ab'omu ndhu edh'ababi, era alibasuula ghansi yaabazikiriza." 
Proverbs21:13 Ole aloba okuwulirisa omwavu ng'ali kumulirira, yeena lw'alirira tibalimuwulirisa." 
Proverbs21:14 Ekirabo ekigheerwa mu ngiso kiikaikania obusungu; era enguzi egabibwa mu kyama ewooyawooya ali n'ekiruyi. 
Proverbs21:15 Abantu abatuufu basangaala ng'amazima gakoleibwa, aye ababi kibaleetera kuzirika buzirike." 
Proverbs21:16 Omuntu adaaliima n'awaamu amagezi, alyeyagaana ng'ali mu bafu." 
Proverbs21:17 Omuntu agonza einho amasanhu aidha kwavughalanga; n'ole agonza einho omwenge n'amasavu talikombaghala naire. 
Proverbs21:18 Abantu ababi n'ababonerezebwa mu kifo eky'abatuufu, era abatatya Katonda n'ababonerezebwa mu kifo eky'abeesimbu." 
Proverbs21:19 Omuntu amala gaba eyo yenka mu irungu, atabaire na mukazi asoolasoola era asungughalasungughala." 
Proverbs21:20 Abagezi baba n'omuzigo n'eby'obukombe ebindi kamaala era n'amasavu, aye abasiru babimalagho bumale byonabyona." 
Proverbs21:21 Omuntu afuba einho okuba omutuufu era ow'ekivunika, aghangaala era yaaba wa kitiibwa." 
Proverbs21:22 Omuduumizi ow'amagezi aghangula ekibuga eky'ab'amaani, era yaamenhagho ebifo byaibwe eby'okwewogomamu bye beesiga." 
Proverbs21:23 Omuntu eyeekuuma n'atayogerayogera eyo atyo, aba yeekuuma bizibu butamutuukaku." 
Proverbs21:24 Omuntu eyeekuluntaza era eyeebona yenka, ayetebwa munhoomi, omuntu oyo aba mwekudumbaze era nga yeerowoozaaku yenka." 
Proverbs21:25 Okwegomba okw'omugayaavu n'okumwita, kuba tayenda kukola." 
Proverbs21:26 Olunaku lwonalwona omubi yeegomba okubaaku ni ky'afuna, aye omutuufu agaba na mwoyo mulala nga tiyeesuniriza." 
Proverbs21:27 Musengwa Katonda yeenhinhata emisengo egy'ababi, n'okusingira irala bwe baba nga bagireese n'ekigendererwa ekibi." 
Proverbs21:28 Omuntu agha obudhulizi obw'obuguya aja kuzikirira, aye ole eyeefumintiriza by'awuliire, by'ayogera babiikiriza." 
Proverbs21:29 Omuntu omubi yeekazakaza mu maiso, aye omwesimbu aba mukakafu mu by'akola." 
Proverbs21:30 Amagezi, n'okutegeera era n'okugalagirwa, byonabyona tibisobola kutakania Musengwa Katonda ni bimusinga." 
Proverbs21:31 Abantu basobola okutegeka embalaasi okulwana olutalo, aye Musengwa Katonda n'agaba obughanguzi." 
Proverbs22:1 Okuba n'empisa enkalamu mu bantu kuwula okuba n'eby'obukombe kamaala, era okuba omugonzi kuwula okuba ni zaabu oba feeza." 
Proverbs22:2 Ekiyimba omukombe n'omwavu ni kino: bombi Musengwa Katonda n'eyabakola. 
Proverbs22:3 Omuntu omutegeevu abona akabi nga kali kwidha yaakeesamba; aye ole azira magezi aja buje yaakagwamu. 
Proverbs22:4 Abantu abawombeefu era abatya Musengwa Katonda, bafuna obukombe n'ekitiibwa n'obughangaazi." 
Proverbs22:5 Amawa n'emitego biba mu ngira ey'ababi, aye ole ayenda okwekuuma nga mulamu abyesambira irala." 
Proverbs22:6 Oyegeresanga omwana okwebisanga obukalamu, ni bw'alikula taja kwerabira." 
Proverbs22:7 Abakombe n'abafuga abaavu, era ole eyeewola afuuka mwiru w'ole amuwola." 
Proverbs22:8 Omuntu asiga mu bantu obutakola mazima alikungula obuzibu obutaloodheka era alirekera agho okutuntuza baine. 
Proverbs22:9 Wa nkabi oyo omugabi, kuba agha abaavu ku mere ye." 
Proverbs22:10 Bw'obingagho omunhoomerezi, olwo oba obinzeegho n'entalo, era okusoolasoola n'okuvumagana agho ghe bikoma." 
Proverbs22:11 Omuntu ayenda okuba n'omwoyo omunaabuufu, era nga by'ayogera bya kivunika, n'aliba mukagwa wa kyabazinga." 
Proverbs22:12 Musengwa Katonda yeekalirisa okubona ng'amazima gakuumibwa, aye atakania obulimba obw'abaguya." 
Proverbs22:13 Omugayaavu yeegemenkereza ng'akoba ati: “Bwe nja kuliya eriyo empologoma.” Kabiri ati: “Baidha kundhitira mu nguudo.” 
Proverbs22:14 Olulimi olw'okwewooya omukazi omwenzi lw'akozesa, luli ng'oti lwina luleeyiriri, omuntu Musengwa Katonda y'asungughalira, n'alugwamu." 
Proverbs22:15 Kiri mu butonde obw'omwana omuto okukola eby'ekisiru, aye omwigo gubimutoolamu." 
Proverbs22:16 Omuntu atuntuza omwavu ng'ayenda okweyongeraku obukombe, oba n'agha abakombe ebirabo, amala mwene yaayavughala." 
Proverbs22:17 Wulirisanga abantu ab'amagezi bye baakoba, era oisengayo inho omwoyo ku bye nkwegeresa." 
Proverbs22:18 Kuba bw'obigema ku mwoyo oidha kubanga musangaavu, era nga bikuli ku munwa ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Proverbs22:19 Ndi kuja kubikwegeresa buti, oyege okwesiganga Musengwa Katonda." 
Proverbs22:20 Nkughandiikiire endhogera amakumi asatu edhiidhwire amagezi n'okulambibwa. 
Proverbs22:21 Dhiidha kukwegeresa omanhe amazima, olwo abakutumye okuganoonia onaabairangamu ekituufu." 
Proverbs22:22 Otatetenkerezanga mwavu olw'okuba ti yeeghanga, oba okukiriga omughafu ali kuwoza omusango." 
Proverbs22:23 Kuba Musengwa Katonda aja kubalwanirira, era aja kwesimba mu abo ababatiisatiisa." 
Proverbs22:24 Otakwananga muntu wa busungu, oba okubita n'ole nga mukambwe." 
Proverbs22:25 Kuba oghanga okugema emize gyaibwe egyo, gy'akugemya ng'oti mitego, waaloba kugivaamu." 
Proverbs22:26 Otabanga mu abo abeeyama okusasuliragho omuntu eibandha nga bamweyimirira. 
Proverbs22:27 Bw'olemwa okusasula bakutwalaku n'obuliri bwo bw'osulaku. 
Proverbs22:28 Otakyusanga ensalosalo ey'eira, kugitoola badhaadha bo ghe baagita." 
Proverbs22:29 Omuntu akola omulimo gwe obukalamu aba nga takaali mu bantu babuliidho, aba agwanira kuba mu bakyabazinga." 
Proverbs23:1 Bw'otyamanga ku kiiwulo okulya n'omuntu ow'ekitiibwa, weegenderezanga bye bataire mu maiso go." 
Proverbs23:2 Bw'oba ng'oli muntu alya einho, weepimiranga." 
Proverbs23:3 Otavuvuuganiranga birungo bye by'agabula, kuba asobola okuba ng'ali kukuleba." 
Proverbs23:4 Oteekanulanga olw'okwenda okufuna obukombe, banga mugezi ng'obalirira obulamu bwo." 
Proverbs23:5 Kuba obukombe osobola okububona oti, aye bwavaagho mangu bwaba ng'oti bumeze maghagha, bwagulukagho ng'oti n'enkookooma bw'egulukira ghaigulu n'ebulagho." 
Proverbs23:6 Otaganhanga kuja kulya mere ya mukodo era otavuvuuganiranga birungo bye by'agabula. 
Proverbs23:7 Kuba, nga bw'alowooza munda, ni ku ngulu bw'ali. Akukoba ati: “Lya era onhwe,” aye ng'omwoyo gwe gukuziraku." 
Proverbs23:8 Olisesema by'oliire byonabyona, ni by'oyogeire ebirungi bya kufa bityo." 
Proverbs23:9 Otayogeranga na musiru, kuba amagezi g'omugha aja kuganhooma bunhoome." 
Proverbs23:10 Otakyusanga mbibi ey'eira, oba okutoola eitaka lya bamulekwa" 
Proverbs23:11 kuba Musengwa Katonda Omununuzi waibwe w'amaani, era alibawolezagho omusango gwaibwe n'iwe." 
Proverbs23:12 Oisanga omwoyo ku bye bakugalagira, era waawulirisanga eby'amagezi bye bakwegeresa." 
Proverbs23:13 Otalobanga kukangaivula mwana okumukuba omwigo ti kumwita. 
Proverbs23:14 Mu butuufu okumukuba, kuwonia obulamu bwe." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wange, bw'oba omugezi zeena nsangaala." 
Proverbs23:16 Ndisagamba bwe ndikuwulira ng'oyogera ebituufu. 
Proverbs23:17 Oteegombanga boonooni naire, aye sigalanga ng'otya Musengwa Katonda ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Proverbs23:18 Olwo obulamu bwo obw'omu maiso bubenga bukalamu, n'ebyo by'osuubira birobenga kukufa busa." 
Proverbs23:19 Mwana wange, wulirisanga bukalamu obe mugezi, era ofengayo inho okutereeza obulamu bwo mu ngira entuufu." 
Proverbs23:20 Weesambenga abantu abanhwa einho omwenge, n'abo abeesokera emere embitirivu" 
Proverbs23:21 kuba abatamiivu n'abaluvu baavughala, era ole bw'aba ng'akola gwa kulya na gwa kutenduka, talwa kuvaala nkanda." 
Proverbs23:22 Wulirisanga lata wo, kuba n'eyakuzaala era otanhoomereranga inhoko, waire ng'akairiighe." 
Proverbs23:23 Oghangayo empiiya waagula amazima, n'amagezi, n'okugalagirwa, n'okutegeera, aye otabitundanga naire." 
Proverbs23:24 Omuntu omutuufu, aleetera ise okusagamba einho, era ole ali n'amagezi, aleetera eyamuzaala okusangaala." 
Proverbs23:25 Leka lata wo n'inhoko basangaale leka omukazi eyakuzaala asagambe. 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wange, tanga omwoyo ku bye nkukoba, era otwale obulamu bwange ng'eky'okuboneraku." 
Proverbs23:27 Malaaya ali ng'oti n'olwina oluleeyiriri era omukazi omwenzi yaaba ng'oti n'ensulo enfunda mw'otaghanga kuva. 
Proverbs23:28 Yeeteega abantu ng'oti munhazi, era yaayongera ku mughendo ogw'abasaadha abatali beesigwa." 
Proverbs23:29 Naani agwirwa ebizibu buli kiseera? Naani aba mu kusoolasoola? Naani aba mu kwemuluguunhia? Naani ye banuubulanuubula eby'obwereere? Era naani aba n'amaiso nga gamumyuse? 
Proverbs23:30 N'abo abatava ku kunhwa mwenge era abenda okunhwa ku bika kamaala eby'omwenge. 
Proverbs23:31 Otaganhanga mwenge kukusendasenda, ng'oli kubona gumyuse bukalamu, nga guli kumesunkana mu giraasi, era nga gughegheeza gha mamiro ng'ogunhwa." 
Proverbs23:32 Ku nkomerero gukudhumika ng'oti n'omusota ogw'obusagwa. 
Proverbs23:33 Olwo waatoolera okubona ebintu ebitategeerekeka, era nga toghanga kulowooza oba kwogera bukalamu." 
Proverbs23:34 Era waawulira ng'oti ogalaamiriire ku maadhi mu nhandha, era waawulira akantoolooze ng'oti oli kwewuubira ghaigulu ku mulongooti." 
Proverbs23:35 Agho waakoba oti: “Bankonse aye tibaanoziiza! Bankubye aye tiwuliire bulumi. Oba nnaasituka li nfuneyo ogundi nhweku kabiri?” 
Proverbs24:1 Oteegombanga bakozi ba bibi naire, era otagezanga kubafuula bakagwa bo." 
Proverbs24:2 Mu myoyo gyaibwe bayiiya kukola bya bukambwe era bye boogera bireeta kutabulatabula. 
Proverbs24:3 Endhu ezimbwa na magezi, era yaaguma bweghabaagho okutegeera." 
Proverbs24:4 Okumanha kwidhuza ebisenge byayo ebintu eby'omughendo era ebirungi. 
Proverbs24:5 Omuntu omugezi awula ole ow'amaani era ali n'okumanha awula ow'obuyinza. 
Proverbs24:6 Kuba okulwana olutalo osooka kwebuuza ku magezi era aghali abawi ab'amagezi kamaala ghabaagho okughangula. 
Proverbs24:7 Amagezi gaswikiriire inho okutegeera okw'omusiru, era azira ky'ayogera nga bali mu kifo eky'olwekobaano." 
Proverbs24:8 Omuntu ategeka okukola akabi buli kiseera, balimweta, “mwene kubidooma”." 
Proverbs24:9 Omusiru by'ategeka okukola byonabyona, bivaamu bibi byereere, era abantu bakyayira irala omuntu omunhoomi." 
Proverbs24:10 Bw'owaamu amaani mu kiseera ekizibu, oba oli munafu." 
Proverbs24:11 Owonianga abantu be bali kutwala okwita, era waaloberanga abantu okubaghaluudhania, okuja okubatirimbula." 
Proverbs24:12 Osobola okwewuuguusa oti: “Bona eno, ekyo nze tikimanhangaku naire.” Aye Katonda abona ebigendererwa eby'omuntu era yaabimanha. Oyo n'akuuma obulamu bwo, era abona buli kintu. Era aja kusasula buli muntu, ng'ajiira ku bikolwa bye." 
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wange, lyanga ku mudheenene ogw'endhuki, kuba mulungi. Nga bwe gudhuudhuula ku lulimi lwo, nga guva mu bisasala byagwo," 
Proverbs24:14 manha oti n'amagezi goona gatyo bwe gali amalungi y'oli. Bw'ogafuna, obulamu bwo obw'omu maiso, bwidha kubanga bukalamu, n'ebyo by'osuubira birobenga kukufa busa." 
Proverbs24:15 Otabanga ng'ababi abeeteega amaka ag'abatuufu, era ni bagalumba okugakolaku eby'obukambwe." 
Proverbs24:16 Abakola ebituufu ni bwe bagwa emikuzi kamaala gitya, bamala baasituka aye abakozi b'ebibi bazikirira buzikirire ng'akabi kabaidhiire." 
Proverbs24:17 Otasagambanga ng'omuzigu wo agwire waire okusanhuka ng'agangaliime. 
Proverbs24:18 Musengwa Katonda aidha kukibona anakughale, era alekere agho okusungughalira ole." 
Proverbs24:19 Otafangayo ku abo abakola ebibi, era oteesiimisanga babi." 
Proverbs24:20 Omubi azira ky'asuubira mu biseera bya mu maiso, era aja kuzikira ng'oti ntaala." 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wange otyanga Musengwa Katonda ni kyabazinga, era otabadheemeranga." 
Proverbs24:22 Akabi Musengwa Katonda ni kyabazinga ke balisindika, kaja kukugwaku bugwe. Era ghazira aidhi kuzikirira okuliva mu kabi ako ghe kulyaga." 
Proverbs24:23 Dhino dhoona ndhogera dha ba magezi: Kiba kibi omuntu okusaliriza ng'ali kusala emisango. 
Proverbs24:24 Ole akoba omuntu eyaiza omusango ati: “Ja, oziraku musango,” abantu balimukolimira n'amaghanga gaamukyagha." 
Proverbs24:25 Aye ole abonereza omuntu eyaiza omusango ebintu biri mujiira bukalamu, era abantu baamusabira enkabi." 
Proverbs24:26 Omuntu okukwiramu ekituufu, ako kaba kamanhiso ka mukwano." 
Proverbs24:27 Sooka otereeze emirimo gyo egy'okuliya, era otegeke bukalamu emisiri gyo, memale weezimbire endhu." 
Proverbs24:28 Otaghanga budhulizi ku muntu ng'ozira nsonga ntuufu, era otayogeranga bya buguya." 
Proverbs24:29 Otakobanga oti: “Ky'ankoze zeena kye ndimukola; ndimwesasuuza olw'ekyo ky'ankoze.” 
Proverbs24:30 Lwali lulala, naabita ku musiri ogw'omugayaavu; ku isamba ery'emizabbibu ery'omuntu aziramu kategeera." 
Proverbs24:31 Naja okubona, nga mwonamwona muzise n'amawa; era nga ku itaka kwidhwire isubi, n'olukomera lwaku olw'amabaale nga lwagwa." 
Proverbs24:32 Bwe nakibona naalowooza inho, era naafunamu eky'okwega kino:" 
Proverbs24:33 Eby'okutendukaku akatono n'eby'okulambaalaku akatono, era n'eby'okuzingira amakono okuwuumulaku," 
Proverbs24:34 n'ebireetera obwavu okulumba omuntu ng'oti mukambuzi, n'obwetaavu okumweyongeraku ng'oti n'ole omunhazi ali n'ekiisi y'anhazeeku ebibye." 
Proverbs25:1 Dhino n'ensambo dha Solomoni edhindi, abaghandiisi ba Kyabazinga Hezekia owa Buyudaaya dhe baakoopolola." 
Proverbs25:2 Tugha Katonda ekitiisa olw'ebyo by'atugisa, aye twagha bakyabazinga ekitiisa olw'ebyo bye banoonereza ni bazuula." 
Proverbs25:3 Ng'eigulu bwe litweswire ghaigulu mu ibbanga, era ng'entobo y'ensi bw'etweswire ghansi mu itaka, mu nsambo n'endala n'ebidhuubo bya bakyabazinga bityo bwe byeswire okumanha kwaife." 
Proverbs25:4 Feeza bamala kumukenenulamu iseedha, memale omugheesi yaasobola okumukolamu ekintu ekikalamu." 
Proverbs25:5 Mu nsambo n'endala, n'ababi bali n'okutoolebwa aghali kyabazinga, memale obufuzi bwe bwajiira ku butuufu." 
Proverbs25:6 Oteetanga mberi mu maiso ga kyabazinga, oba okuba mu kifo aghaba abantu abakologho." 
Proverbs25:7 Kiba kikalamu abantu okukukoba bati: “Seeta eno emberi,” okusinga okukuswaza mu maiso ag'omuntu ow'ekitiisa nga bakwiza einhuma." 
Proverbs25:8 Oteeyunirizanga kuseegha muntu mu mbuga olw'ekyo ky'oboine, kuba omuntu owundi asobola okuleeta obudhulizi obukontana n'obubwo yaakuswaza." 
Proverbs25:9 Bw'obanga n'ensonga ku mwino mugyogerengaku nga muli mwenka, era buli muntu ataghembulanga byama bya mwine." 
Proverbs25:10 Ole bw'aliwulira ekyama ekyo aja kukwanika mu bantu, era osigale ng'okaaswala." 
Proverbs25:11 Ekibono ekyogeirwa mu kiseera ekituufu, kiba kirungi ng'oti ni zaabu atoneibwatoneibwa mu feeza." 
Proverbs25:12 Ow'amagezi by'agalagira omuntu eyeetegeike okuwulirisa, biba bya mughendo okuwula empeta ya zaabu n'ebintu ebyakolebwa mu mabaale ga zaabu." 
Proverbs25:13 Omukwenda omwesigwa aizaamu amaani abo abaamutuma, ng'oti n'amaadhi ag'okunhwa amainhogovu bwe gaghegheeza abaganhwa mu kasana mu biseera eby'okukungula." 
Proverbs25:14 Omuntu asuubiza ekirabo aye n'atakigha, ali ng'oti bire na mpewo ebitavaamu maadhi ni gagwa." 
Proverbs25:15 Omuguminkiriza aikirizisa omufuzi okukola ekintu, n'olulimi olw'okwewooya lwaghangula ebizibu." 
Proverbs25:16 Bw'oyagaananga omudheenene gw'endhuki olyangaku ogukumala obumale, tomanha bwegubitirira ni gukwesuukuula ku mwoyo n'ogusesema." 
Proverbs25:17 Otakyaliranga muntu mikuzi kamaala, kuba tomanha bw'omusina n'akukyagha." 
Proverbs25:18 Omuntu agha ku mwine obudhulizi obw'obulimba, aba wa kabi ng'oti n'omwigo ogw'entole bwe gutentena, oba ng'empiima bw'efumita, oba ng'akalaso bwe kakubitamu." 
Proverbs25:19 Okwesiga omuntu ateesigika mu biseera ebizibu, kuli ng'oti kulya na liino irwaire, oba kutambula na kigere ekibinwike." 
Proverbs25:20 Okwembera omuntu ali mu nnaku, kuli ng'oti kumwambulamu kivaalo mu kiinhogogo, oba kumufuka muunhu mu ibwa." 
Proverbs25:21 Omuzigu wo endhala bw'emulumanga omughanga eky'okulya, era bw'abanga endiwo omughanga eky'okunhwa." 
Proverbs25:22 Bw'okola otyo olimuswaza, era Musengwa Katonda alikugha empeera." 
Proverbs25:23 Ng'empewo ey'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba bw'ereeta amaadhi, n'okugeya kutyo bwe kuleeta obusungu." 
Proverbs25:24 Omuntu amala gasula ghaigulu ku ndhu, atasuze mu ndhu ndala na mukazi asoolasoola." 
Proverbs25:25 Okuwulira amawulire amalungi agava eghala, kuli ng'oti n'okunhwa amaadhi amainhogovu ng'endiwo ebaire ekuluma." 
Proverbs25:26 Omuntu akola ebituufu bw'aganha okutwalirizibwa omukozi w'ebibi, aba ng'oti n'ensulo eidhwire ebitosi, oba ye basiikwire." 
Proverbs25:27 Nga bwe kitali kirungi kunhwa mudheenene gwa ndhuki mungi, era kityo bwe kitali kirungi muntu kwenda inho kusaakibwa." 
Proverbs25:28 Omuntu ataidhi kwefuga ali ng'oti n'ekibuga ekirumbiibwa ni kirekebwa agho kityo, nga tikikaali na kimante kikyezungulwire." 
Proverbs26:1 Ng'omugozi bwe gutagwanira kugwa mu ndoboozi, oba amaadhi okugwa mu biseera eby'amakungula, n'omusiru atyo bw'atagwaine kuba na kitiibwa." 
Proverbs26:2 Ng'enkazaluya bw'epuuluukira eyo etyo, n'akamiini ni kagulukira eyo katyo, n'ekikolimo eri omuntu aziraku nsonga kityo bwe kiba, tikimugema." 
Proverbs26:3 Ng'embalaasi bw'eri n'okukubwa enkoba, n'endogoyi okusibwa enkoba mu nkoto, n'omusiru atyo bw'ali n'okukubwa emiigo." 
Proverbs26:4 Otaizaganianga bibono bya kisiru na musiru, olwo olobe kuba ng'oti ni mwene." 
Proverbs26:5 Omusiru omwirangamu bya kisiru, olwo alobe kwebona ng'omugezi." 
Proverbs26:6 Omuntu atuma omusiru okutwala obukwenda, aba ng'oti yeetemyeku mwene amagulu era yeereetera mwene ebizibu." 
Proverbs26:7 Omusiru okukozesa ensambo kuba kudaagira bwereere, ng'oti n'omulema okukozesa amagulu ge agalengeedha obulengeedhe." 
Proverbs26:8 Okuta mu musiru ekitiibwa kuziramu makulu, ng'oti n'okusuula eibaale mu nsuumulo ng'olisibiiremu." 
Proverbs26:9 Omusiru okukozesa ensambo kuba kudaagira bwereere, ng'oti n'omutamiivu okugezaaku okwetundula eiwa mu ngalo." 
Proverbs26:10 Omuntu atoola buli musiru y'aboine n'amutaagho okumukolera omulimo, aba ng'oti n'omulasi ow'obulaso afumita buli muntu." 
Proverbs26:11 Omusiru airamu okukola eby'ekisiru omukuzi ogundi, aba ng'oti n'embwa emala n'erya by'eseseime." 
Proverbs26:12 Omusiru ghabaaghooku k'omusuubiramu, okusingaku ole eyeebona nga mugezi." 
Proverbs26:13 Omugayaavu yeegemenkereza ng'akoba ati: “Bwe nja mu ngira eriyo empologoma, ni mu nguudo edh'ekibuga yoona eriyo empologoma.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Ng'olwigi bwe lwewuubira ku pata dhaalwo nga luzira ghe luja, n'omugayaavu yeena atyo bwe yeekyukiza mu buliri bwe." 
Proverbs26:15 Omuntu omugayaavu akoza emere mu kibya, aye kyamukaluubiriza inho okugita mu kanwa." 
Proverbs26:16 Omugayaavu yeebona nga mugezi, okuwula abantu omusanvu abasobola okumwiramu obukalamu." 
Proverbs26:17 Omuntu eyengiza mu kusoola okutamugemaku, aba ng'oti n'omuntu agema ku matu g'embwa y'ataidhi." 
Proverbs26:18 Ng'omulalu asuulasuula ebisiki eby'omuliro era n'alasa obulaso obwita bw'aba ow'akabi," 
Proverbs26:19 n'omuntu alimba mwine n'amala n'amukoba ati: “Mbaire ndi kudhondha” yeena atyo bw'aba. 
Proverbs26:20 Ng'okuwaagho okw'enku bwe kuleetera omuliro okuzikira, n'omuntu ow'olubono bw'avaagho okusoola kukoma." 
Proverbs26:21 Ng'amanda bwe gakuuma omuliro mu ziiko, n'enku ni dhikuuma omuliro nga gukaayaka, n'omuntu asoolasoola atyo bw'akuuma ebizibu nga bikaaligho." 
Proverbs26:22 Ebibono eby'omuntu ow'olubono biri ng'oti mere ewooma einho, biika byatuukira irala mu nda." 
Proverbs26:23 Ebibono ebiwoomerera, omuntu by'ayogera ni bigisa omwoyo omubi gw'ali nagwo, biri ng'oti kiwumbe kya itosi butosi kye baasiigaku feeza." 
Proverbs26:24 Omuguya agisa obukyayi bw'ali nabwo ku mwoyo, ng'ayogera ebiwooyawooya." 
Proverbs26:25 Aye ni bw'ayogera ebibono ebiwooma bitya, otamwikirizanga, kuba mu mwoyo gwe mwidhwire ebintu kamaala ebyenhinhalwa." 
Proverbs26:26 Era ni bw'aghemba atya ku bukyayi bw'ali nabwo, obubi bwe buja kumanhibwa abantu boonaboona." 
Proverbs26:27 Ole asima ebiina okutega baine aja kubigwamu mwene, n'ole asiringisa ogubaale gugwe ku baine guja kumwiriraku mwene." 
Proverbs26:28 Omuntu omuguya, aba yakyagha abo b'aguya. Era okusuutasuuta omuntu kumuleetera kuzikirira." 
Proverbs27:1 Oteesuutanga lw'ebyo by'onaakola lwaidho, kuba toidhi lunaku bye lunaakya nabyo." 
Proverbs27:2 Lekanga abantu abandi n'ababe bakusaake ni bwe baba nga bagwira, se ti iwe mwene kwesaaka." 
Proverbs27:3 Waire amabaale n'omusenho bizitogha, aye ebizibu omusiru by'aleeta bizitogha okuwula ebyo byombi." 
Proverbs27:4 Waire ng'omuntu aliku ekiruyi n'obusungu aba mukambwe era wa kabi, aye tatuuka ku wa nsaalwa." 
Proverbs27:5 Okunenia omuntu maiso ku maiso, kuwula okugisa ensobi ye ng'oyenda okumulowoozesa nga bw'omwenda einho." 
Proverbs27:6 Weesigenga mukagwa wo akunenia waire nga by'akuneniamu bikunhiga, se ti kwesiga omuzigu wo akusuutasuuta." 
Proverbs27:7 Omuntu aigwite tawoomerwa ni bweguba omudheenene ogw'endhuki, aye omuyala awoomerwa n'ebikaagha." 
Proverbs27:8 Omuntu atambulatambula eyo atyo okuva ghaka we, aba ng'oti n'enhonhi egulukira eyo etyo okuva mu kisu kyayo." 
Proverbs27:9 Ebizigo n'obuwoowo obwesiigibwa bisangaaza omuntu, aye ebizibu bimuleetera okweinhamira." 
Proverbs27:10 Otavanga ku bakagwa bo, oba bakagwa ba lata wo. Otanoonerezanga waluganda lwo ng'oli mu buzibu. Muliraanwa wo akuli okumpi awula owoluganda ali eghala." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwana wange, banga mugezi ondeeterenga okusangaala, olwo nfunenga eky'okwiramu oyo ananvumanga." 
Proverbs27:12 Omuntu omutegeevu abona akabi nga kali kwidha yaakeeghala, aye ole aziramu magezi aja buje yaakagwamu." 
Proverbs27:13 Ole eyeeyimirira omuntu y'ataidhi ali n'okutoolebwaku ekintu ky'asinzeegho, okukakasa ng'eibandha liidha kusasulwa." 
Proverbs27:14 Omuntu awuuna mu nkyo einho n'ayasiikana ng'alamusa mwine, aba ng'oti ali kumukolimira bukolimire." 
Proverbs27:15 Omukazi asoolasoola ali ng'oti n'amaadhi agatoonherera obutalekera. 
Proverbs27:16 Okumusirisa kuba kuzibu inho ng'oti n'okulobera empewo okufuuwa, oba okugema omuzigo ogukuuluula mu ngalo." 
Proverbs27:17 Omuntu ayegera ku mwine, ng'ekyuma ekigumu einho bwe kighagala kyuma kiinaakyo." 
Proverbs27:18 Omuntu alabirira omuti omutiini alya ku bibala byagwo, n'ole alabirira musengwa we ateebwamu ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Ng'omuntu bwe yeebona mu maiso ng'alinze mu maadhi, era otyo bwe yeebona nga bw'afaanana ng'alinze mu mwoyo gwe." 
Proverbs27:20 Ng'amagombe bwe gatalekera kumira bafu, n'amaiso g'omuntu goona gatyo bwe gataiguta kubona." 
Proverbs27:21 Ng'omuliro bwe gukozesebwa okukenenula feeza ni zaabu okubona obulungi bwabyo, n'omuntu atyo bwe bamulamula nga bajiira ku birungi ebimwogerwaku." 
Proverbs27:22 Omusiru ni bw'omusekula mu kinu ng'oti ni bwe basekula engaano okugitoolaku obukaba, obusiru bwe tibumuvaaku." 
Proverbs27:23 Olabiriranga bukalamu ebyayo byo, era waafangayo inho ku nsolo dho." 
Proverbs27:24 Eby'obukombe tibibaagho lubeerera, era engule y'ofuna teba ya baana na baidhukulu nse na nse." 
Proverbs27:25 Eisubi ery'ebyayo bwe liba nga limaze okusalibwa era ng'eito liri kumera, n'ery'oku nsozi nga lyona limaze okusalibwa lyaterekebwa," 
Proverbs27:26 osobola okwekolera eby'okuvaala mu buviiri obw'entaama dho ento, n'okutunda ku mbuzi dho waagula eitaka." 
Proverbs27:27 Era waaba n'amata ag'embuzi agakumala okufunamu emere ey'okuliisa ab'omu maka go, ghalala n'abairu bo abakazi." 
Proverbs28:1 Ababi balumuka nga ghazira na kiri kubabinga, aye abatuufu baba bagumu ng'oti mpologoma." 
Proverbs28:2 Ensi erimu aboonooni ebaamu abafuzi kamaala, aye bweghabaagho abafuzi abategeevu era abagezi, ebaamu emiraala." 
Proverbs28:3 Omufuzi omubi, atuntuza abaavu, ali ng'oti n'amaadhi ag'omugozi agazikiriza emere yoonayoona." 
Proverbs28:4 Abo abatajiira ku mateeka basaaka ababi, aye abagajiiraku babalwanisa." 
Proverbs28:5 Ababi tibategeera kukola mazima kye kitegeeza, aye abasinza Musengwa Katonda bakitegeera bukalamu." 
Proverbs28:6 Omuntu amala gaba mwavu aye nga mwesigwa, atabaire mukombe aye nga mukupankupania." 
Proverbs28:7 Omwana agema amateeka aba mugezi, aye ole eyeeyimba mu bawuuduukira eby'okulya, aswaza omuzaire we." 
Proverbs28:8 Omuntu afuuka omukombe ng'aseera afune amagoba, obukombe bwe bulija y'oyo agemerwa abaavu ekivunika." 
Proverbs28:9 Omuntu atenda kuwulira mateeka, n'okusaba kwe Katonda akwenhinhata." 
Proverbs28:10 Ole akiidhamya omuntu omwesimbu n'amukozesa ekibi, ebiina by'asima okutega baine, mwene n'alibigwamu. Aye ole aziraku musango alifuna ebirungi kamaala." 
Proverbs28:11 Omukombe yeebona nga mwene mugezi, aye omwavu omutegeevu azuula ki kyene omukombe oyo ky'ali." 
Proverbs28:12 Omutuufu bw'afuuka omufuzi abantu basangaala, aye omubi bw'akuzibwa abantu beegisa bwegise." 
Proverbs28:13 Ole akweka ebibi bye, ebintu tibiidha kumujiiranga bukalamu, aye ole abyatula era n'atabiiramu, Katonda alimusaasira." 
Proverbs28:14 Wa nkabi ole atya Musengwa Katonda buliidho, aye ole akalangusa omwoyo gwe afuna ebizibu ebitaloodheka." 
Proverbs28:15 Ng'empologoma oba ekisolo ekikambwe ekindi, bwe biba eby'akabi eri kye byenda okugema, n'omufuzi omubi yeena atyo bwaba ow'akabi eri abaavu." 
Proverbs28:16 Omufuzi aziramu kategeera anhigiriza b'afuga n'obukambwe, aye ole akyagha amagoba agava mu kukupankupania aghangaala." 
Proverbs28:17 Omuntu bw'atemula mwine aba yeesimiire mwene amagombe amangu ago, era ghatabangagho amuyamba." 
Proverbs28:18 Omuntu omwesigwa aidha kubanga bukalamu, aye atali mwesigwa aja kugwa mangu inho." 
Proverbs28:19 Ole alima eitaka lye aidha kubanga n'emere kamaala, aye ole amala ebiseera bye ku mirimo egitaleeta magoba, aidha kubanga mwavu lubeerera." 
Proverbs28:20 Omuntu omwesigwa aidha kubanga n'enkabi kamaala, aye ole afuna obukombe obw'amangu aidha kubonerezebwanga." 
Proverbs28:21 Omuntu okusaliriza kiba kibi, aye abantu bakikola olw'okufuna ke banaalya ni bwekaba katono katya." 
Proverbs28:22 Omuntu omukenge agwidhubanira okufuna okukombaghala, nga taidhi ng'obwavu bulimwidhira." 
Proverbs28:23 Ole anenia omuntu, amala yaasiimibwa omuntu oyo, okusinga ole amusuutasuuta." 
Proverbs28:24 Ole anhaga ku bazaire be ebyaibwe ng'alowooza ati ti kibi, aba n'ekirala n'omutemo." 
Proverbs28:25 Omuntu eyeeyendeza buli kintu asiikuula okusoola mu bantu, aye ole eyeesiga Musengwa Katonda aligheebwa obukombe." 
Proverbs28:26 Omuntu eyeesiga ebyo mwene by'alowooza aba musiru, aye ole ajiira ku kwegeresa okw'abagezi akabi tikalimutuukaku." 
Proverbs28:27 Omuntu agabira abaavu taja kwavughalanga, aye ole ababona n'atabafaaku alikolimirwa inho." 
Proverbs28:28 Omubi bw'afuuka omufuzi abantu beegisa bwegise, aye bw'atoolebwa mu bufuzi, abatuufu beeyongera obungi." 
Proverbs29:1 Omuntu ye banenia emikuzi kamaala ng'ayongera bwa kukalambalira mu nsobi, mu kaseera buseera balimutentena nga takairayo kuwona." 
Proverbs29:2 Abatuufu bwe bafuuka abafuzi, abantu basagamba; aye ababi bwe baba mu bufuzi abantu baba mu bulumi." 
Proverbs29:3 Omwana ayenda einho okuba omugezi yeesiimisa abazaire be, aye ole aba mu bamalaaya amalagho ebintu okubisansaania." 
Proverbs29:4 Kyabazinga ajiira ku kukola amazima aleetera ensi ye okuba emiraala, aye ole ayenda enguzi buli kiseera aitaitana ensi." 
Proverbs29:5 Omuntu asuutasuuta mwine, aba ali kumutega mutego." 
Proverbs29:6 Omuntu omubi, ebibi by'akola bimugemya ng'oti mutego, aye ole akola ebituufu abaagho ng'asagamba era ng'ayemba." 
Proverbs29:7 Omuntu akola ebituufu amanha omwavu by'agwaniire okukolerwa, aye omukozi w'ebibi tabifaaku naire." 
Proverbs29:8 Abantu abatalumirwa banaibwe basiikuula abantu ab'omu kibuga baatabukatabuka, aye abategeevu baikaikania obusungu bw'abantu." 
Proverbs29:9 Omugezi bw'atakana n'omusiru, omusiru asungughala yeesesasesa era yaaloba kusirika." 
Proverbs29:10 Abatemo bakyayira irala omuntu aziraku musango, aye abeesimbu balabirira omuntu oyo." 
Proverbs29:11 Omusiru bw'asoola tiyeerekaamu, aye omugezi afuga obusungu bwe." 
Proverbs29:12 Omufuzi awulirisa einho eby'obuguya, abakungu be boonaboona baba babi." 
Proverbs29:13 Ekiyimba omwavu n'ole atuntuza bantu baine, ni kino: bombi Musengwa Katonda n'abagha okubona endhuba." 
Proverbs29:14 Kyabazinga akolera abaavu kye bagwaniire okukolerwa, obwakyabazinga bwe bwidha kubangagho byanda na byanda." 
Proverbs29:15 Okukangaivula n'okunenia byegeresa, aye omwana alekebwa agho atyo n'atakobwaku, aswaza omuzaire we." 
Proverbs29:16 Ababi bwe baba mu bufuzi, okwiza emisango kweyongera, aye abatuufu baja kwerolera okugwa kw'ababi abo." 
Proverbs29:17 Kangaivulanga omwana wo, aidha kukweyagazanga; era akufuulenga okuba omusangaavu." 
Proverbs29:18 Bwe ghabula okugalaga okuva ye Katonda abantu bataamuuka eyo batyo, aye wa nkabi oyo ajiira ku mateeka ga Katonda." 
Proverbs29:19 Okwogera obwogere tikumala kukangaivula mugheereza, kuba ni bw'ategeera by'okoba tabifaaku." 
Proverbs29:20 Omusiru ghabaaghooku k'omusuubiramu, okusinga ole amala gaghalambula bwa bibono." 
Proverbs29:21 Omuntu ayola obubi omugheereza we okuva mu buto, ku nkomerero yeeyagaana ng'amukikinaireku." 
Proverbs29:22 Omuntu asungughala amangu asiikuula okusoola, n'omuntu omukambwe agwa mu bizibu kamaala." 
Proverbs29:23 Okwekuluntaza okw'omuntu kumuleetera okugwa, aye obuwombeefu bw'omuntu bumuteesaamu ekinhagansi." 
Proverbs29:24 Omuntu akolagana n'omwibi akyagha obulamu obubwe mwene, era ni bwe bamulayiza takwekula mazima." 
Proverbs29:25 Omuntu ali n'okutya aba mu kabi, aye ole eyeesiga Musengwa Katonda, Katonda oyo amuwonia ebizibu." 
Proverbs29:26 Abantu kamaala benda okuba abagonzi eri omufuzi, aye Musengwa Katonda yenka n'akolera abantu obutuufu." 
Proverbs29:27 Ababi bakyagha abatuufu, n'abatuufu baakyagha ababi." 
Proverbs30:1 Bino n'ebibono bya Aguru mutabane wa Yake ow'e Massa, bye yakoba Ithieli ni Ukali, ati:" 
Proverbs30:2 “Bwenebwene ndi ng'oti nsolo busolo, nziramu kutegeera kwa buntu." 
Proverbs30:3 Tyegangaku magezi, waire okumanha ebifa ku Katonda." 
Proverbs30:4 Naani eyaali aniinieku mu igulu, n'aniinukayo n'aika ku nsi? Naani eyaali asoloizaaku empewo n'agigemera mu ngalo dhe? Naani eyaali azingiireku amaadhi mu kivaalo kye? Naani eyataagho ensalosalo ensi kw'ekoma? Eriina lye naani, era mutabane naani, bw'oba ng'oidhi?" 
Proverbs30:5 Kiisi Katonda ky'akoba kiba kituufu, era Katonda oyo aba ngabo eri abo abamweyuna okubawonia." 
Proverbs30:6 Ku bibono bye otakookerangaku bibyo, olwo alobe kukubonereza na kwanika buguya bwo." 
Proverbs30:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkusaba ebintu bibiri, obimpe nga nkaali kufa:" 
Proverbs30:8 Mponia ebikyamu n'obuguya, era otampa kuba mwavu oba mukombe. Aye nkusaba ompenga eby'okulya bye neetaaga byonka." 
Proverbs30:9 Olwo ndobe kuba na bingi inho, okutuuka n'okukwegaana nti, ‘Musengwa Katonda naani?’ Oba bwemba omwavu ndobe kwiba na kuvumagania liina lyo iwe Katonda wange." 
Proverbs30:10 Otayogeranga kibi ku mugheereza ye musengwa we, olwo alobe kukukolimira na kukuleetera kubonerezebwa." 
Proverbs30:11 Ghaligho abantu abakolimira baiseibwe, era abatasabira bainhaibwe nkabi." 
Proverbs30:12 Ghaligho abeerowooza okuba abalongoofu, aye nga baidhwire bibi." 
Proverbs30:13 Ghaligho abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu, era nga batwala abandi boonaboona okuba ghansi ghaibwe." 
Proverbs30:14 Abandi bakambwe inho, nga bali n'amaino ng'oti mpiima dheene, era ng'oti biso byene. Banhunhunta abaavu n'abaghafu kwenda bwa kubamaliriragho ku nsi." 
Proverbs30:15 Omudindiri guli n'abaana babiri, nga buli kiseera balira bati: ‘Mpa.’ Ghaligho ebintu bisatu oba bina ebitaiguta, era ni bino:" 
Proverbs30:16 Amagombe, enda ey'omukazi omugumba, eitaka eikalu bekalukalu, n'omuliro ogutaiguta nku." 
Proverbs30:17 Amaiso g'oyo anhooma ise oba ag'oyo atagondera inhina, galimodhebwamu amakoova ag'omu nsiko, era gaaliibwa ensega." 
Proverbs30:18 Eriyo ebintu bisatu ebineewuunhisa ekibitiriire, mu butuufu biri bina ebiinema okutegeera, era ni bino:" 
Proverbs30:19 Engeri enkookooma y'emanhamu engira mw'egulukira ku igulu, engeri omusota ye gumanha engira ye gubitamu ku lubaale, engira eryato ye libitamu mu nhandha ghagati, n'engeri omukwano ye gwidhamu ghagati agh'omusaadha n'omukazi." 
Proverbs30:20 Eno n'enkola ey'omukazi omwenzi: bw'amala okwenda anaaba yeenhiriza, era yaakoba mule ati: ‘Ghazira kibi kye nkoze.’" 
Proverbs30:21 Eriyo ebintu bisatu ebireetera ensi okutabulwa, mu butuufu biri bina ebirema ensi okuguminkiriza, era ni bino:" 
Proverbs30:22 Omwiru okufuuka kyabazinga, n'omusiru okufuna buli ky'ayenda." 
Proverbs30:23 Omukazi aziraku amwenda okufuna omusaadha, n'omwiru omukazi okwira mu kifo kya muka mwene wo." 
Proverbs30:24 Ku nsi kuliku obutonde obutonioli buna, aye nga buli n'amagezi mangi inho, era ni buno:" 
Proverbs30:25 Obusimizi n'obuntu obuzira maani, aye bweyagalira emere mu biseera eby'omwero." 
Proverbs30:26 Obuduuyu ti n'obw'amaani einho, aye bukola amaka gaabwo mu gabaalebaale" 
Proverbs30:27 Enzige dhizira kyabazinga, aye dhijiira mu bikunsu ng'oti baisirukale" 
Proverbs30:28 Omunha osobola okugugema mu ngalo dho, aye ogyagaana nga giri eyo mu bisaagaati bya bakyabazinga." 
Proverbs30:29 Eriyo ebintu bisatu ebitambula n'osiima, mu butuufu biri bina ebitambula n'osigala ng'obyegomba, era ni bino:" 
Proverbs30:30 Empologoma, nga n'ensolo esinga dhoonadhoona amaani era ezira yindi y'esegulira." 
Proverbs30:31 Enkoko empanga etambula ng'eyemereiza oluyundhu, era n'embuzi enume, ni kyabazinga ng'ali n'eigye lye." 
Proverbs30:32 Bw'oba ng'okoze eky'obusiru ni weekuluntaza, oba n'otegeka okukola ekibi, sooka weekube mu kifuba obuuze omwoyo." 
Proverbs30:33 Bw'osaadha amata muvaamu omuzigo, bw'onhigiriza enhindo muvaamu omusaayi, era bw'osiikuula obusungu muvaamu okusoola.”" 
Proverbs31:1 Bino n'ebibono bya kyabazinga Lemueli ow'e Massa. Ebibono ebyo inhina n'eyabimwegeresa ng'akoba ati: 
Proverbs31:2 “Iwe mwana wange, omwana eyanva mu nda. Omwana ye neeyama ye Katonda, wulirisa bukalamu." 
Proverbs31:3 Otamaliranga maani go ku bakazi waire okumalira ebibyo ku abo abazikiriza bakyabazinga. 
Proverbs31:4 Lemueli, bakyabazinga tibagwaniire kunhwa inho mwenge, oba okutwalirizibwa einho ebitamiiza ebika." 
Proverbs31:5 Bwe banhwa batyo basobola okwerabira amateeka, era baavuyavuya ebyo abatuntuzibwa bye bagwaniire okukolerwa." 
Proverbs31:6 Ebitamiiza ebika birekerenga oyo aja okufa, n'omwenge ogughenga oyo ali n'enaku embitirivu." 
Proverbs31:7 Abo leka banhwenga beerabirenga ku bizibu byaibwe, era balobenga kwidhukira nnaku yaibwe." 
Proverbs31:8 Yogererangagho abazira bwogereso era olwanirirenga abanhigirizibwa, babakolerenga nga bwe bagwaniire." 
Proverbs31:9 Boogererengagho, obasalirenga mu butuufu, era olwanirirenga ebyo abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu bye bagwaniire okukolerwa.”" 
Proverbs31:10 Naani asobola okuzuula omukazi ow'empisa enkalamu? Omukazi oyo wa mughendo okusinga ebintu ebyakolebwa mu mabaale ag'omughendo. 
Proverbs31:11 Iba amwesiga na mwoyo mulala, era talekera kumufunamu muganhulo." 
Proverbs31:12 Buli kiseera akolera iba bikalamu byereere, era tamutuusaaku kabi koonakoona." 
Proverbs31:13 Anoonia obuviiri obw'entaama n'ewuuzi empegheevu, yaabirukamu engoye nga musangaavu." 
Proverbs31:14 Emere eya ghaka agitoola ghala, ng'oti n'amaato ag'abasuubuzi bwegatoola eby'okusuubula eghala." 
Proverbs31:15 Ava mu buliri nga bukaali na kukya bukalamu, okutegekera ab'omu maka ge eby'okulya, era yaagha abairu be abaguna emirimo." 
Proverbs31:16 Abona eitaka y'aligula, era yaakozesa empiiya dh'afuna yaasimbisa eisamba ery'emizabbibu." 
Proverbs31:17 Afungiza yaakola n'amaani, era yaakola n'emikono gye buli kiseera." 
Proverbs31:18 Abona omuganhulo oguli mu ebyo by'akola, era entaala ye obwire kumpi tezima olw'okukola einho." 
Proverbs31:19 Yeerangira mwene ewuuzi, era mwene yaadhirukamu engoye." 
Proverbs31:20 Mwetegefu okugabira abaavu, n'okuyamba abali mu bwetaavu." 
Proverbs31:21 Ebiseera eby'ekiinhogogo tibimweraliikiriza, kuba ab'omu maka ge baba n'ebivaalo ebizito ebisuugha." 
Proverbs31:22 Yeekolera mwene emyebwiko, era yaavaala engoye empegheevu n'edha nakasooma." 
Proverbs31:23 Iba aba mumanhifu mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango ogwingira mu kibuga, ng'atyaime n'abakulembeze ab'omu kiketezo kye." 
Proverbs31:24 Omukazi oyo atunga engoye empegheevu yaadhitunda yaakola ensibiro yaadhiguza abasuubuzi. 
Proverbs31:25 Aba mumalirivu era wa kitiibwa, era ebiseera eby'omu maiso tibimweraliikiriza." 
Proverbs31:26 By'ayogera bya magezi, era agalagira abantu n'ekivunika." 
Proverbs31:27 Alabirira bukalamu eby'omu maka ge, era eby'obugayaavu abiziraku." 
Proverbs31:28 Abaana be bamutendereza, n'iba yaamusaaka nga akoba ati:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Abakazi kamaala bakoze ebintu ebikalamu bingi, aye niiwe obasinga boonaboona.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Amaiso agasikiriza galimbalimba ababoni, n'obulungi bw'omuntu buwaagho aye omukazi atya Musengwa Katonda agwaniire okusaakibwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Oyo mumughenga ku bintu by'akolereire, era agwaniire okusaakibwanga mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango ogwingira ekibuga." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Omulangirizi eyali mutabane wa Daudi, era nga kyabazinga mu Yerusalemu, akoba ati:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Ghazira kintu kiri na muganhulo, bwenebwene ebintu byonabyona biziramu muganhulo naire." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Magoba ki omuntu g'afuna mu kufaabiikana kwe kwonakwona, kw'afaabiikanira ku nsi?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Oluse luno luvaagho, oluse olundi lwairagho, aye ensi esigalagho byanda na byanda." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Endhuba evaayo ku nkyo, yaamala yaagwa eigulo, kabiri yaayangugha okwirayo y'eviira." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Empewo efuuwa yaaja ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, ate yaakyuka yaaja ku luuyi olw'omugooda. Kabiri yaafuuwa nga yeezungulula, olwo yaira ye yaviire." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Emiiga gyonagyona gikuuluula gyafuka mu nhandha, aye enhandha teidhula. Buli mwiga gusigala nga gukuuluulira eyo ye gukuuluulira buliidho." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ebintu byonabyona bikooya, byaleetera omuntu okwesinwa ebitaloodheka. Amaiso tigalingirira ni gaiguta bye gabona, waire amatu okuwulira ni gaiguta bye gawulira." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Ekintu ekyalighooku era n'ekija okubangagho, n'ekintu ekyakolebwaku era n'ekija okukolebwanga. Ghazira kintu kiyaaka ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ghaligho ekintu ole ky'asobola okukoba ati: “Bona eno, kino kiyaaka?” Aye nga mu butuufu tikiba kiyaaka naire, kiba kyaligho ira nga n'ife tukaali kubaagho." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Abantu abaligho buti tibaidhukira byaligho. N'abantu abalibaagho ye bwidha eyo, tibaliidhukira ebyo ebiriba nga bimaze okubaagho." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Nze Omulangirizi nali kyabazinga wa Isiraeli mu Yerusalemu. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Neeghaayo n'amagezi gange, naanoonereza era naayagaaza byonabyona ebikolebwa ku nsi. Naabona ng'ebyo byonabyona, n'omulimo omukalangufu ogutasanhusa naire, Katonda gwe yagha abaana ab'abantu okwetawulamu." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Nalingirira ebintu byonabyona ebikolebwa ku nsi, naabona nga byonabyona biziramu muganhulo, nga kuli ng'oti kubinga mpewo ogigeme." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Ekintu eky'engode ole tasobola kukigodolola, n'ekintu ekiziragho ole tasobola kukibala." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Agho naakoba mule nti: “Nfuuse muntu mukologho era omugezi einho, naasinga abo boonaboona abansooka okufuga mu Yerusalemu. Bwenebwene mboine ebintu kamaala, byandeetera okumanha n'okutegeera.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Neeghaayo inho nsobole okumanha okwawulagho amagezi n'eiralu, n'obusiru. Aye naabona nga kyona kiri ng'oti kubinga mpewo kugigema." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Omuntu y'akomya okuba n'amagezi amangi, y'akomya n'okusoberwa; era y'akoma okweyongera okumanha ebingi, y'akoma n'okuba n'enaku." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Naakoba mule nti: “Kale ni ka ngezeeku ebinhumo, neesanhuse.” Aye naabona nga kyona kiziramu muganhulo." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Naakoba nti: “Okwira agho mu kuseka obuseke, kuli ng'oti kugwa iralu, n'amasanhu gazira kye gagasa.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Naanoonereza inho n'amagezi, naalowooza ku ky'okwesanhusa nga nhwa omwenge gw'emizabbibu, mbe ng'omusiru bw'akola. Nga nkoba nti oba katyo, ekyo abantu kye bagwaine okukola ku nsi mu nnaku entono edho, dhe bamala ku nsi nga balamu." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Neekolera ebintu kamaala: naazimba amayumba, naasimba amasamba ag'emizabbibu." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Naalima enimiro, naadhisimbamu emiti egy'ebibala egya buli kika." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Naasima ebidiba eby'okutoolangamu amaadhi ag'okufukirira emiti egyo. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Naagula abairu abasaadha n'abakazi, era n'abairu abandi baabazaalira mu maka gange. Naaba n'ebyayo kamaala, omuli ente n'entaama n'embuzi, naasinga n'abo boonaboona abansooka okuba mu Yerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Naasoloza feeza, ni zaabu, n'eby'obukombe ebindi kamaala okuva mu biketezo bye nafuganga. Naataagho abasaadha n'abakazi abaanhemberanga, era naaba n'abakazi ab'embali ng'omusaadha yeenayeena bwe yaalyenze." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Nafuuka mukologho okusinga abo boonaboona abansooka okuba mu Yerusalemu, era naasigala nga ndi mugezi." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Buli kintu amaiso gange kye geegombanga, nga nkifuna. Na buli ekisanhusa kyonakyona omwoyo gwange kye gwayendanga, nga nkyetuusaaku. Kale naasanhukanga olw'ebyo byonabyona bye nakolanga, era eyo yaaba nga n'empeera ye nafunanga mu ebyo byonabyona bye nakolanga." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Agho naalowooza ku bintu byonabyona bye nakola, n'okufaabiikana kwange nga mbikola, naabona nga byonabyona muzira muganhulo, nga kiri ng'oti kubinga mpewo ogigeme. Mu butuufu ghazira kintu kiri na mugaso ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Kale naira ku kulowooza ku magezi n'eiralu n'obusiru, kuba kyabazinga azira kiyaaka ky'asobola kukola ole ye yasikira ky'ataamala ira kukola." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Agho naabona ng'amagezi malungi okusinga obusiru, ng'obutangaavu bwe buli obulungi okusinga enzikiiza." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Omuntu omugezi atambula ng'abona y'aja, aye omusiru atambula ng'oti ali mu nzikiiza. Aye ate nazuula nti ekija okutuuka ku musiru, n'ekija okutuuka ni ku mugezi." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Olwo naakoba mule nti: “Ekituuka ku musiru n'ekija okutuuka ni ku nze, kale nabeerera ki omugezi einho ntyo?” Kyenava ni nkoba mule nti ekyo kyona muzira muganhulo," 
Ecclesiastes2:16 kuba omugezi tibamwidhukira, ng'oti n'omusiru yeena bwe batamwidhukira. Mu biseera ebiidha, boonaboona baliba beerabirwa ira. Ng'omugezi bw'afa, n'omusiru yeena bw'afa." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Kale naakyagha obulamu, kuba kiisi ekikolebwa ku nsi kiinumya bulumye. Byonabyona biziramu muganhulo, biri ng'oti kubinga mpewo ogigeme." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Agho naakyagha ebintu byonabyona bye nakola ku nsi nga nfaabiikana, kuba nabona nga nja kubirekera oyo aja okwiragho nga nze nviiregho." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ate nga waire ghazira aidhi, oba omuntu oyo aja kuba mugezi oba musiru, aye era oyo n'aja okwefuga ebyo bye nfaabiikaniire ku nsi nga nkozesa amagezi gange. Ekyo kyona muzira muganhulo." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kale naatuuka okweidhusa n'okuwaamu eisuubi mu mirimo gyange gye nakola ku nsi nga nfaabiikana," 
Ecclesiastes2:21 kuba omuntu asobola okukola ebintu n'amagezi ge, n'obukugu, era n'obwegendereza, aye by'akoze byonabyona yaabirekera omuntu owundi ataabikolerera. Ekyo kyona muzira muganhulo, era kibi inho." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Kale olwo omuntu afunamu ki mu bintu by'afaabiikanira nga yeerumya ku nsi? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Ekiseera eky'obulamu bwe akimala mu bulumi na kweraliikirira, n'obwire yaaloba kutenduka, kuwuumuza ku birowoozo. Ekyo kyona muzira muganhulo." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Omuntu kye yandikoze ekisinga, kyandibaire kulya, na kunhwa, na kweyagalira mu ebyo by'aba afunie mu kufaabiikana kwe. Aye ekyo kyona nabona nga kiri mu buyinza bwa Katonda" 
Ecclesiastes2:25 kuba aghazira Katonda naani asobola okulya oba okusanhuka? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Omuntu asiimya Katonda, Katonda amugha amagezi n'okumanha era n'eisanhu, aye omwonooni Katonda amugha gwa kusoloza nga bw'atereka obukombe, amale abughe oyo asiimya Katonda. Ekyo kyona muzira muganhulo, era kiri ng'oti kubinga mpewo ogigeme." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Buli kintu ekiba ku nsi kibaaku ekiseera kyakyo, era buli kintu ekikolebwa kiba n'ekiseera kyakyo ekituufu:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Ekiseera eky'okuzaalibwa, n'ekiseera eky'okufa; ekiseera eky'okusiga, n'ekiseera eky'okukungula ebyasigibwa." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Ekiseera eky'okwita, n'ekiseera eky'okuwonia. Ekiseera eky'okumenha, n'ekiseera eky'okuzimba." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Ekiseera eky'okuwowoola, n'ekiseera eky'okuseka. Ekiseera eky'okulira, n'ekiseera eky'okukina." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Ekiseera eky'okusuula ere amabaale, n'ekiseera eky'okusoloza amabaale. Ekiseera eky'okugwa omuntu mu kifuba, n'ekiseera eky'okuloba okumugwamu." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Ekiseera eky'okufuna, n'ekiseera eky'okufiirwa. Ekiseera eky'okukuuma ekintu, n'ekiseera eky'okukisuula ere." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Ekiseera eky'okukanulamu engoye olw'enaku, n'ekiseera eky'okutunga. Ekiseera eky'okusirika, n'ekiseera eky'okwogera." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Ekiseera eky'okugonzania, n'ekiseera eky'okukyagha. Ekiseera eky'entalo, n'ekiseera eky'emiraala." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Magoba ki omukozi g'afuna mu kufaabiikana kwe? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nabona nga Katonda yateeragho abantu okwetawulanga mu kufaabiikana. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Yaakola buli kintu nga kija bukalamu mu kiseera kyakyo. Yaata mu bantu omwoyo ogwenda okumanha ebyaligho, n'ebirigho, era n'ebiribaagho, aye yaaloba kubagha kumanha mwene Katonda by'akola okuva mu kwinhama okutuuka ku nkomerero." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndidhi nti abantu kye bandikoze ekisinga, kyandibaire kya kubanga basangaavu, na kwesanhusanga ekiseera kyonakyona kye baba abalamu." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Era ndidhi nga Katonda n'agha omuntu okulya, n'okunhwa, n'okweyagalira mu ebyo by'aba afunie mu kufaabiikana kwe." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Katonda oyo buli ky'akola kibaagho byanda na byanda, ghazira kisoboka kwongerwaku waire okutoolebwaku. Yakola atyo, abantu bamutyenga." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ebintu ebirigho buti byalighooku, n'ebyo ebija okubaagho byaligho ira. Katonda alagira ebyo ebyalighooku, kabiri byairamu okubaagho." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Era nabona nga ku nsi, mu kifo aghandibaire okukola amazima oyagaanagho bikolwa bibi, ni mu kifo aghandibaire obutuufu woona waayagaanagho bikolwa bibi." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Naakoba mule nti: “Katonda aja kusalira abatuufu n'ababi omusango, kuba buli kintu na buli kikolwa yakiteeragho ekiseera kyakyo.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Era naakoba mule nti Katonda aleba abantu, asobole okubalaga nga beene boona bali ng'oti nsolo busolo" 
Ecclesiastes3:19 kuba ekija okutuuka ku beene, n'ekija okutuuka ni ku nsolo. Beene baja kufa, n'ensolo dhoona dhife, empewo ye bagheera dhoona ye dhigheera. Abantu bazira kye basinga nsolo, kuba obulamu bw'omuntu n'obw'ensolo buziramu muganhulo." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Ekifo abantu ye baja, n'ensolo ye dhija: bava mu nkungu era kabiri baira mu nkungu, n'ensolo dhityo." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Naani aidhi oba ng'omwoyo gw'omuntu guja ghaigulu ate ogw'ensolo gwaja ghansi mu itaka? 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Kale naabona ng'omuntu kye yandikoze ekisinga, kyandibaire kya kweyagalira mu ebyo by'akoze. Ogwo nga n'omugabo gwe. Kuba naani asobola okumwiza okubona ebija okubaagho nga mwene amaze okufa?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Bwe nava ku ebyo, naabona abantu bwe batuntuzibwa mu nsi, ni balira amaziga, aye nga ghazira n'abayamba. Abantu abo tibafuna abayamba, kuba ababatuntuza, ni beene abo abali mu buyinza." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ekyo kyandeetera okulowooza nti abaafa eira beesiimye okusinga abo abakaali abalamu. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Aye abo abakaali kuzaalibwa n'abeesiimye einho, okusinga abo abakaali abalamu ni bale abaafa kuba bakaali kubona bikolwa bibi ebikolebwa mu nsi." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Agho naabona ng'ekireetera abantu okukola einho ni bakuguka mu mirimo, kuba kwegomba kufuna ebirungi banaibwe bye baba nabyo. Ekyo kyona muzira muganhulo, era kiri ng'oti kubinga mpewo ogigeme." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Ghaligho ensambo ekoba eti: Omusiru azingira emikono, okutuusa lw'atuuka okweisa endhala mwene." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 N'eyindi eti: Omala gafuna katono k'ogemera mu mukono omulala ng'oli n'emiraala, otafunie kinene ky'ogemera mu mikono ebiri ng'oli kufaabiikana, ng'oti n'abinga empewo okugigema." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Kabiri naabona ekindi ekiziramu muganhulo mu nsi. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Ghabaagho omuntu aziraku mwana oba muganda we, aye nga buli kiseera ayenda kweyongera kufuna bya bukombe. Nga tiyeebuuzaaku ati: “Ndi kufaabiikanira ani, ni ndoba okwesanhusa?” Ekyo kyona kiziramu muganhulo, era kireeta n'enaku." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Abantu ababiri basingaku omulala, kuba bwe bakolera aghalala babeeranwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Bwe bagwa, owundi abbeedagho mwine yaamwemereza. Aye ali yenka akagwireku, kuba bw'agwa azira amubbeedagho kumwemereza." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Era abantu ababiri bwe balambaala aghalala mu biseera eby'empewo basuugha, aye omulala asobola atya okusuugha?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Waire ng'omuntu asobola okulwanisa ole ali yenka yaamughangula, bwe baba ababiri bamulema. Omugugha ogw'enkosi eisatu tigukutuka mangu." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Omala gaba muto ng'olimu amagezi waire ng'oli mwavu, aye otabaire kyabazinga mukaire omusiru era atawulirisa magezi ge bamugha." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Omuntu asobola okuzaalibwa mu nsi ye nga mwavu oba yaaviira mu ikomera, yaafuuka kyabazinga." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Nabona abantu boonaboona ababa ku nsi, nga n'omuli n'omwisuka aja okwira mu kifo kya kyabazinga oyo." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Abantu kyabazinga b'afuga baba kamaala inho abatabalika, aye bw'afa ezira aidhukira kumusiima olw'ebyo bye yabakoleranga. Bwenebwene ekyo kyona muzira muganhulo, era kiri ng'oti kubinga mpewo ogigeme." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Weegenderezenga inho ng'oli kuja mu isinzizo. Okujaayo n'owulirisa oyege, kisingaku okumala gaghaayo misengo ng'abasiru bwe bakola; kuba tibaidhi nga bali kukola kibi." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Toyanguyirizanga kwogera n'osuubiza Katonda kintu, kuba Katonda ali mu igulu ate iwe oli ku nsi. Kale oyogeranga bitono" 
Ecclesiastes5:3 kuba y'okomya okwetawula mu bintu kamaala, y'okomya n'okuloota. Era y'okomya okwogera einho, y'okomya n'okwoleka bw'oli omusiru." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Bw'obanga weeyamye ekintu eri Katonda, otalwangagho kukituukiriza, kuba Katonda tasanhukira basiru. Tuukirizanga kye weeyamye okukola." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Omala galekayo okweyama, aye oteeyamye n'oloba kutuukiriza kye weeyama." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Otaganhanga munwa gwo kukuleeteranga kukola kibi, olwo omale okobe omukwenda wa Katonda oti tiwagenderera kukoba otyo. Lwaki okoba ebisungughaza Katonda n'omuleetera okuzikiriza bye wakolerera?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Bwenebwene omuntu y'akomya okuloota ebirooto ebiziramu makulu, y'akomya n'okwogera ebimuleetera okuzikirira. Aye iwe sigalanga ng'otya Katonda." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Bw'obonanga abakungu mu ighanga nga batuntuza abaavu, baaloba kubakolera mazima, era baaloba kubakolera ebyo bye bagwaniire okukolerwa, oteewuunhianga kuba buli mukungu abaaku n'omuntu amusingaku amufuga, era n'oyo amusingaku yeena yaabaaku abamufuga." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Aye nga mu kutwalira aghalala, eitaka ligasa boonaboona, ni kyabazinga yeena aganhulwa mu bikungulwa mu nimiro." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Omuntu ayenda einho empiiya tidhirimumala n'adhiiguta. N'oyo ayenda einho eby'obukombe, ezira magoba galimumala n'agaiguta. Ekyo kyona kiziramu muganhulo." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Omuntu y'akomya okufuna ebintu ebingi, n'abo ababirya ye bakoma okweyongera okuba abangi. Kale magoba ki mwene bintu ebyo g'abifunamu, okutoolaku okubiringangaku obulinge?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Omuntu akola n'emikono gye atenduka endoolo dhaamuwoomera, ni bw'aba nga taliire n'aiguta, aye omukombe tatenduka olw'okweraliikirira ebintu by'ali nabyo." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Ghaligho ekintu kye nabona mu nsi nga kya nnaku inho: eky'omuntu okutereka eby'obukombe nga yeerumya," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 aye eby'obukombe ebyo yaabifiirwa bubi inho, yaaloba kusigazaagho kantu ate ng'aliku abaana." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Nga bwe yava mu nda ya inhina ng'ali bwereere, era atyo bw'aja okuva ku nsi. Ghazira ky'alitwala ku ebyo bye yafaabiikanira." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ekyo kyona kya nnaku inho, omuntu okuja ng'azira k'ali nako nga bwe yaidha. Olwo magoba ki g'aba afunie mu kufaabiikana kwe ng'oti n'abinga empewo okugigema?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Yaamala enaku dhe dhoonadhoona ng'aliira mu nzikiiza, ng'ali mu bulumi, ni mu bweraliikirivu, era nga munakughavu." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Bona eno, nze ekirungi kye nabona omuntu ky'agwaine okukola, kyandibaire kulya, na kunhwa, na kweyagalira mu ebyo by'aba afunie mu kufaabiikana kwe ku nsi, mu nnaku entono edho Katonda dhaamugha okuba omulamu. Ogwo n'omugabo gwe." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Katonda n'agha omuntu obukombe obw'okuba n'ebintu, era yaamugha n'okweyagalira mu bintu ebyo, ng'omugabo gwe Katonda oyo gwe yamutegekera oguva mu kufaabiikana kwe. Ekyo kiba kirabo ekiva eri Katonda." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Katonda aleetera omuntu okuba mu masanhu amangi, olwo omuntu oyo yaaloba kulowooza inho ku kiseera kya bulamu bwe." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Ghaligho ekintu ekibi einho kye nabona ku nsi, ekinhiga abantu:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Katonda aja yaagha omuntu okuba omukombe, yaaba n'ebintu kamaala, era yaaba n'ekitiibwa, nga ghazira kintu ky'atali nakyo. Aye ate Katonda oyo yaaloba okumuganha okweyagalira mu bintu ebyo, kabiri omuntu atamanhiibwa naire yaabyeyagaliramu. Ekyo kiziramu muganhulo, era kiruma inho." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Omuntu asobola okuzaala abaana ekikumi, era yaaghangaala emyaka kamaala. Aye ni bw'aghangaala einho, bw'aba nga tafunie isanhu mu bulamu bwe era nga taziikiibwa bukalamu, nze nkoba nti omwana azaalibwa nga mufu asinga omuntu oyo;" 
Ecclesiastes6:4 kuba omwana oyo omufu ghazira muganhulo gw'afuna mu kuzaalibwa. Aidhira mu nzikiiza, era yaajiira mu nzikiiza yeerabirwa." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Tabona ku ndhuba waire okumanha ekintu kyonakyona, aye awuumula okusinga omuntu ole," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 atafunie isanhu mu bulamu bwe waire ng'aba aghangaire emyaka enkumi eibiri (2,000), kuba era bombi baja mu kifo kirala ekyo." 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Omuntu mu by'akola byonabyona akolerera kufuna kya kulya, aye by'afuna tibimwigusa." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Omuntu omugezi kiki ky'asingaku omusiru? Ate omuntu omwavu afunamu ki bwe yeebisa obukalamu mu bantu? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Ekintu ekikyo ky'oli nakyo, kisinga ky'ozira kye weegomba obwegombe. Ekyo kyona muzira muganhulo, era kiri ng'oti kubinga mpewo ogigeme." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Buli kintu ekirigho, kyamala ira okutuumibwa eriina. N'omuntu ekikula kye kimanhiibwa: tasobola kutakana n'oyo amusinga maani." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Omuntu y'akoma okwogera ebingi, ni by'ayogera ye bikoma obutabaamu makulu. Kale ekyo omuntu kimugasa ki?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Bwenebwene naani aidhi omuntu ky'agwaniire okufuna mu bulamu bwe obumpi butyo obuziramu muganhulo, era obubitagho obubite ng'oti kinsense? Era naani asobola okukobera omuntu ebiribaagho ku nsi, ng'omuntu oyo aviiregho?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Okuba n'eriina eirungi kuba kwa mughendo okusinga eby'akawoowo eby'omughendo; n'olunaku omuntu lw'afiiraku luba lulungi okusinga lw'azaalibwaku. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Okuja mu ndhu omuli okulira omufu, kusinga okuja omuli embaga; kuba okufa n'enkomerero ya buli muntu, era abalamu bagwaine okukirowoozangaku." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Okubona enaku kusinga okusanhuka, kuba waire enaku yeenhiinkaaza omuntu mu maiso, aye etereeza omwoyo gwe." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Omuntu omugezi olowooza inho ku nnaku ey'okufa; aye omusiru buli kiseera aba bwa mu binhumo. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Omala gawulirisa omuntu omugezi ng'akunenia, otawuliriisa nhembo dha basiru." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Kuba, ng'enku edh'amawa bwe dhitulikatulika mu ziiko ghansi gh'entamu, n'enseko edh'abasiru dhityo bwe dhiwulikana, dhaaloba kubaamu makulu naire." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Bwenebwene okunhigirizibwa kuleetera omuntu omugezi okukola eby'ekisiru, n'enguzi yaaleetera omuntu okwonooneka." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Omuntu ali kumaliriza ekintu asinga ole ali kutoolera obutoolere, n'omuntu omuguminkiriza yaasinga ole eyeekuluntaza." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Otayanguyirizanga kusungughala, kuba mu mwoyo ogw'omusiru mwidhula busungu bwereere." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Otabuuzanga oti: “Lwaki ebiseera eby'eira byalinga birungi okusinga ebirigho buti?” Ekibuuzo ekyo ti kya magezi. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Amagezi malungi gali ng'oti kufuna bya busika, gali n'omuganhulo eri boonaboona abali ku nsi;" 
Ecclesiastes7:12 kuba gakuuma omuntu ng'oti n'empiiya bwe dhimukuuma. Aye ekireetera omuntu omugezi okusingaku abandi kiri nti: amagezi g'aba nago gamugha obulamu. 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Lowooza ku ebyo Katonda bye yakola. Naani asobola okugodolola ekyo Katonda kye yagodagoda? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Olunaku ebintu lwe bikujiiriire obukalamu, osangaalanga, ate lwe bikujiiriire obubi, oidhukiranga oti: Katonda naataagho ebyo byombi, olwo abantu balobenga kumanha biribaagho." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Mu bulamu bwange buno obuziramu muganhulo, mboine ebintu kamaala: Mbona abantu abakola ebituufu nga bafa mangu, waire nga bantu balungi ate naabona abakozi b'ebibi nga baaghangaala, waire nga boonooni." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Kale ni otabitirizanga kuba mutuufu, oba kuba mugezi. Oidha kweita mwene." 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Aye era otabitirizanga kuba mwonooni, waire okuba omusiru. Oidha kufa ng'entuuko dho dhikaali." 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kirungi weefugenga, olobenga kubitiriza mu ebyo byombi, kuba oyo atya Katonda aja kuwona ebyo byonabyona." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Omuntu omugezi, amagezi gamuleetera okuba ow'amaani agasinga ag'abafuzi eikumi abali mu kibuga." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Bwenebwene ezira muntu mutuufu ku nsi, akola ebirungi ebyereere n'atayonoonaku naire." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Otatanga inho mwoyo ku buli kintu abantu kye bakoba, olirwa eira waawulira n'ebibi omugheereza wo by'akwogeraku" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 kuba okiidhi bukalamu nga iwe weena, emikuzi kamaala oyogera ebibi ku bantu abandi." 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ebyo byonabyona nabigezaaku nga nkozesa amagezi gange. Agho naakoba nti: “Ndidha kuba mugezi.” Aye amagezi gaanema okugatuukaku. 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ebintu ebirigho buti biswikiriire amagezi gaife. Titusobola kubitegeera ni tubimalayo. Naani asobola okubinoonerezaaku n'abitegeera? 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Agho neemalira ku kunoonereza, nsobole okufuna n'okumanha amagezi, era ntegeere ebintu byonabyona nga bwe biri. Olwo mmanhe ng'omuntu okuba omubi kiba kya busiru, era ng'obusiru buli ng'oti iralu lyene." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Nazuula ekintu ekikakali okusinga n'okufa kwene: oyo nga n'omukazi akwenda n'akugemya ng'oti mutego oba ng'oti lutuula, n'akusiba mu mikono gye ng'oti ndhegere. Omuntu akola Katonda by'ayenda asobola okuwona omukazi oyo, aye omwonooni amugwa bwa mu ngalo." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Bona eno, Omulangirizi akoba ati ekyo nakizuula mpola nga nja bwe neekalirisa ekintu kirala kirala, nga nhenda okumanha ebintu nga bwe biri." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Ekintu kye mbairenga nnoonerezaaku emikuzi kamaala, aye nga nkaali kukizuula, ni kino: Mu bantu olukumi nazuulamu omusaadha mulala yenka omukalamu, aye mu bantu abo boonaboona tyazuulamu mukazi naire mulala ati." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Era bona n'ekindi kye nazuula: Katonda yakola abantu nga balungi, aye beene baaja nga beeyonoona." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Naani atuuka ku muntu omugezi? Naani aidhi okwinhonhola amakulu g'ebintu? Amagezi galeetera omuntu okumoga obulungi, yaalekera n'okwenhiinkaala mu maiso." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ogonderanga ekiragiro kya kyabazinga olw'ekirayiro kye walayira. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Toyanguyirizanga kuva gh'ali nga tosoose kwefumintiriza, oba okumweyawulaku n'oba n'abamutakania kuba kyabazinga ky'ayenda ky'akola." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Era bw'alagira ghazira airamu, oba okumubuuza ati: “Oli kukola ki ekyo?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Oyo agondera ekiragiro kya kyabazinga tafuna buzibu, era omugezi amanha ekiseera n'ensambo ey'okutuukirizaamu ekiragiro ekyo" 
Ecclesiastes8:6 kuba buli kintu kiba n'ekiseera kyakyo eky'okukikoleramu, waire ng'ebizibu eby'omuntu biba bingi." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Omuntu tamanha kija kubaagho, era ghazira asobola kumukobera bwe kija kuba." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Ghazira muntu ali na buyinza bwa kulobera ku bulamu bwe, oba okusalagho olunaku lw'alifiiraku. Ng'olutalo bwe lutaganha ole alulimu okuluvaamu, n'ekibi kityo bwe kitalekula ole akikoze." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ebyo byonabyona nabyetegereza bwe nalowooza einho ku ebyo abantu bye bakola ku nsi, naabona ng'abantu abandi bwe bafugisa banaibwe obukambwe, aye ate boonaboona ni balumizibwa abafuzi beene n'abo be bafuga." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Era naabona ababi nga baziikibwa mu kitiibwa. Abantu abo baajanga mu kifo ekitukuvu emikuzi mingi era abantu baabasaakanga mu kibuga mwene mwe baakoleranga ebibi. Ekyo kyona kiziramu muganhulo. 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Olw'okuba ekibonerezo ekisalirwa omuntu akoze ekibi tibakigheeragho mangu, abantu kyebava beeyongerera irala okukola ebibi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Aye waire ng'omwonooni asobola okukola ebibi emikuzi kamaala ate yaaghangaala inho, nze ndidhi nti abo abatya Katonda baidha kubanga bukalamu olw'okumutya." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Aye aboonooni tibaidha kubanga bukalamu, era obulamu bwaibwe bwidha kubanga bumpi ng'oti n'ekinsense bwe kitalwagho, kuba tibatya Katonda." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Ghaligho ekintu ekiziramu muganhulo ekibaagho ku nsi: abantu abatuufu okufuna ekibonerezo ekyandibaire eky'aboonooni, ate aboonooni ni bafuna empeera eyandibaire ey'abatuufu. Ekyo kyona kiziramu muganhulo." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Kale nze mbona ng'omuntu agwaniire okwesanhusanga kuba ku nsi kuzira kirungi kindi okutoolaku okulya, n'okunhwa, n'okwesanhusa. Eryo n'eisanhu omuntu ly'aba nalyo mu kiseera eky'obulamu bwe kyonakyona Katonda ky'amugha ng'ali mu kufaabiikana ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Bwe nafuba einho okufuna amagezi, n'okumanha emirimo egikolebwa ku nsi, ni mbona n'engeri abantu ye batatenduka ku ndoolo omusana n'obwire," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 naazuula ng'omuntu tasobola kutegeera Katonda by'akola ku nsi ni bwe yeefubiriza atya okubinoonerezaaku. Waire ng'abantu abagezi basobola okukoba nga bwe babiidhi einho, aye mu butuufu tibabiidhi." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ebyo byonabyona nabirowoozaaku inho era naabyekebeedha, naabona nga Katonda n'afuga abatuufu n'abagezi, n'ebyo bye bakola. Aye tibasobola kumanha oba nga Katonda oyo abagonza oba abakyagha. Ebintu byonabyona ebija okubatuukaku ye bwidha biziramu muganhulo" 
Ecclesiastes9:2 kuba enkomerero y'abantu boonaboona eri ndala, ka babe abatuufu oba ababi, abalungi oba aboonooni, abalongoofu oba abatali balongoofu, abaghaayo emisengo oba abataghaayo misengo. Omuntu omulungi n'ole atali mulungi, bombi bafaanana. N'omuntu alayira n'ole atalayira, boona bafaanana." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ekibi ekiri mu byonabyona ebikolebwa ku nsi, kiri nti enkomerero yaabyo byonabyona eri ndala. Mu myoyo gy'abantu abalamu mwidhwire bibi na iralu, era ekisembayo kuba kufa bufe." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Aye era ole ng'akaali mu nsi ey'abalamu aba akaali n'eisuubi, kuba embwa enamu esinga empologoma enfu." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Bwenebwene abantu abalamu bamanha nga baja kufa, aye abafu baba bazira kye baidhi era nga bazira kye bakaasuubira kufuna, kuba baba tibakaidhukirwa naire." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Baba tibakaali na kugonza, oba okukyagha, waire okwegomba byonabyona biba byawaagho ira, era nga tibakaasobola kukola kintu kyonakyona ekikolebwa ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Kale ja olye emere yo ekuwoomere, onhwe omwenge gwo ogw'emizabbibu osangaale, kuba Katonda ekyo kye yakutegekera." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Kuumanga ebivaalo byo nga biyondho, era otalobanga kwesiiga bizigo mu maiso n'onhirira." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Sanhukiranga mu bulamu buno ni mukazi wo y'ogonza, enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwo buno obuziramu muganhulo. Ogwo n'omugabo gwo Katonda gw'akugha mu kufaabiikana kwo ku nsi." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Buli mulimo gw'okola gukolenga na maani, kuba eyo e magombe y'olija ezira kukola oba okubaayo okulowooza, era ezira kumanha waire okubaayo amagezi." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Kabiri neetegereza eby'oku nsi, naabona nti omuntu omulumusi einho ti n'aghangula embiro edh'okusinganwa, ow'amaani ti n'aghangula olutalo, omugezi ti n'afuna eky'okulya, omutegeevu ti n'aba omukombe, n'omukugu ti n'afuna emirimo egya ghaigulu. Boonaboona bibagwaku bugwe" 
Ecclesiastes9:12 kuba ghazira muntu aidhi kiseera kye. Ng'ebyenhandha bwe babigemya mu katimba k'omuvubi, n'enhonhi ni badhigemya ku mutego gw'omuyiizi, n'abantu boona batyo bwe bagwa ku bizibu, byabazinduukiriza ng'oti mutego." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ghaligho eky'okuboneraku ekindi ku nsi ekigema ku magezi, ekyambonekera nga kikulu:" 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Ghaaligho ekibuga ekitono nga kirimu n'abantu batono. Yaavaayo kyabazinga ow'amaani yaalumba ekibuga ekyo, yaakizingiza era yaakibungaku emungo y'eitaka okukyezunguluza, asobole okuniiniraku okukirwanisa." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Mu kibuga omwo mwabaamu omuntu omugezi aye nga mwavu. Omuntu oyo yaakozesa amagezi ge, yaawonia ekibuga ekyo, aye ghaaloba kubaagho yaidhukira muntu oyo omwavu." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Nze nkoba nti amagezi gasinga amaani, waire ng'amagezi ag'omuntu omwavu ganhoomebwa, ni by'ayogera ghaabulagho abiwulirisa." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Omala gawulirisa omugezi by'ayogera empola empola, otawuliriisa mufuzi by'ayogera mu basiru ng'akaabuka." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Amagezi ga maani okusinga eby'okulwanisa eby'omu lutalo, aye omwonooni omulala ati asobola okuzikiriza ebirungi kamaala." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Ng'ensowera enfu edhigwire mu by'obuwoowo bwe dhibireetera okuwunha ekivundu; n'ekikolwa eky'obusiru kityo bwe kimalagho amagezi n'ekitiibwa, ekikolwa ekyo ni bwekiba ekitono einho." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Omugezi buli kiseera akola bituufu, aye omusiru buli kiseera akola bibi." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Omusiru ni bw'atambula obutambule mu luguudo tabaamu magezi, era alaga abantu nga bw'ali omusiru." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ole akufuga bw'akusungughaliranga otavanga ku mulimo gwo, kuba bwe weewooya asobola okukusonigha n'emisango eminene." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Ghaligho ekintu ekibi einho kye nabona ku nsi, nga kiva ku nsobi ekolebwa abafuzi:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 eky'okutoola abantu abasiru ni babata mu bifo ebya ghaigulu, ate abakombe ni babata mu bya ghansi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Era naabona abairu nga bali kutambulira ku mbalaasi, ate abakungu baatambula na bigere ng'oti bairu." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Omuntu asimira baine ebiina, mwene n'alibigwamu; n'ole aghaguza n'amenha ekisenge, mwene oyo omusota ye gulimoodha." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Omuntu asima amabaale, amabaale geene ago n'agamusala; n'ole ayasaaga ebisiki, ebisiki byene ebyo n'ebimuviiramu akabi." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Empasa bw'ewaaku obwogi, omuntu n'atagighagala, ateekwa okukozesa amaani mangi; aye amagezi galeetera omuntu okughangula." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Omusota bwe gumala okumoodha omuntu, olwo ole aloga emisota ni gitamoodha aba takaagasa." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Omugezi by'ayogera bimuleetera okufuna ekitiibwa, aye omusiru by'ayogera bimuzikiriza buzikirize." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Omusiru bw'atoolera okwogera, by'akoba biba bya kisiru, era ku nkomerero biba bya kiralu kyene." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Omusiru afukumula ebibono ebitawa. Ghazira muntu aidhi biri kwidha, era ghazira asobola kukobera muntu biribaagho ng'omuntu oyo aviiregho." 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Omusiru by'akola bimukooya inho, yeerabira n'engira eja mu kibuga." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Ensi eba ekagwireku, bw'eba n'omufuzi nga mwana muto, ate nga abakungu baayo bawuuna buwuune mu binhumo." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ensi eba yeesiimye, omufuzi waayo bw'aba omukulembeze omulungi, era ng'abakungu baayo bakola ebinhumo mu kiseera ekituufu, lwa kwewuumuza bairemu amaani, se ti lwa kutamiira." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Omugayaavu olw'obutenda kukola, endhu ye etoonha, n'akasolya kaalwa eira kaagwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Okulya emere kuleetera abantu okusanhuka, n'okunhwa omwenge kwaleetera obulamu okusangaala, aye empiiya n'edhigula buli kintu." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Otayogeranga bubi ku mufuzi waire mu kaama, oba waire ng'oli mu kisenge kyo mw'osula; kuba enhonhi dhisobola okuguluka, dhaatwala by'okobye dhaabyogerayo." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Banga mugabi, osuulenga emere yo ku maadhi, nga ghabiseegho ekiseera eidha kukwirizibwanga." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Ebintu byo obigabirangaku abantu abagheraku, ng'oti musanvu oba munaana, kuba tosobola kumanha kizibu kija kukugwira ku nsi kuno." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ebire bwe biidhula amaadhi, bigafuka gaagwa ku nsi; n'omuti ghe gugwire, ghe gusigala gheene agho, ka ghabe ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha oba ku lw'omugooda, olw'e buvandhuba." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ole eyeetegereza empewo nga bw'eri kuja, tasiga mu biseera bitali bituufu; n'ole eyeekalirisa ebire nga bwe byekuluumulula, takungula mu biseera bitali nibyo." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nga bw'otaidhi ngira empewo y'ebitamu, waire okumanha amagumba bwe gakulira mu nda ey'omukazi ali enda, era otyo bw'otaidhi ngeri Katonda y'akolamu ebintu byonabyona." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Osiganga ensigo dho ku nkyo era n'eigulo otyo aghazira kwisa mukono, kuba toidhiiku dhinaakula bukalamu; ka dhibe dh'osize ku nkyo oba dh'osize eigulo oba dhoonadhoona." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Obutangaavu bulungi, era omuntu bw'abona endhuba asangaala." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Omuntu bw'aghangaala emyaka emingi, agwaine agisanhukirengamu gyonagyona. Aye ate aidhukirenga ng'enaku edh'okuba mu kizikiiza ng'afiire dhija kuba kamaala. Ebyo byonabyona ebiriidha biziramu muganhulo." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Iwe omwisuka, sagambira mu bwisuka bwo era weeyagale ng'okaali mwisuka. Kolanga ebyo by'oyenda, era weetuusengaku ebyo omwoyo gwo bye gwegomba. Aye manha nti Katonda aja kukusalira omusango olw'ebyo byonabyona." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Weewonienga ebyo ebikweraliikiriza mu mwoyo, n'ebyo ebikuleetera okulumizibwa mu mubiri, kuba okuba omuto n'okuba omwisuka, byombi biziramu muganhulo." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Idhukiranga Omutonzi ng'okaali mwisuka, enaku embi nga dhikaali kutuuka n'emyaka nga gikaali kutuuka mw'olikobera oti: “Tikaanhumirwa bulamu.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Mu kiseera ekyo oliba nga tokaabona bulungi butangaavu bwa muunienie, oba bwa mwezi, waire obw'endhuba. Era ng'olwo ebire biira ku igulu byagema ng'amaadhi gamaze okugwa." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Ng'olwo emikono gyo egyakutaasanga gidhugumira, n'amagulu go buti ag'amaani, nga ganafiighe. Ng'amaino tigakaanoza mere olw'okusigalamu amatono, era nga n'amaiso gaidhieku ekifu." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Amatu go nga tigakaawulira bulungi maloboozi ga bantu bali mu nguudo, oba okuwulira abaghala abali kwemba, waire okuwulira okusa kw'olubengo. Era nga n'amamiro ag'akanhonhi obunhonhi akali kwemba gakuzuusa mu ndoolo." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Ng'otya okuba mu bifo ebyeruupye ghaigulu, era ng'otya n'okutambula mu ngira wenka. Olwo nga n'enviiri dhifuuse ndheru, ng'okwetuka bukwetuke ng'oti isisi, era nga tokaali na kye weegomba. Ng'otuusiiza okuja mu kiwuumulo kyo eky'olubeerera, era nga n'abalizi bali kwesomba mu nguudo." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Omugugha ogwa feeza guliba gukutwike, n'ekibya ekya zaabu nga kimenheike, n'omugugha gwe basibaku ensugha esena amaadhi mu nsulo nga gukutwike, nga n'ensugha yeene emenheike." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Olwo ng'omubiri gwira mu itaka mwe gwava, n'omwoyo nga gwirayo ye Katonda eyagukugha."
