Ecclesiastes12:8 Omulangirizi akoba ati Ghazira kintu kiri na muganhulo, bwenebwene ebintu byonabyona biziramu muganhulo naire." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Olw'okuba Omulangirizi yali mugezi, yeeyongeranga okusomesa abantu eby'okumanha. Yeekebeedhanga ensambo, yaadhisengeka bukalamu n'obwegendereza bungi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Yakozesanga ebibono ebinhoonha, aye nga by'aghandiika bituufu era nga bya mazima." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Abantu abagezi bye boogera byogi, ng'oti n'oluti olusongovu omwayi lw'akozesa okusindiikiriza ente okutambula. Ate ensambo edhaasolozebwa dhisigala nga dhikaaligho, ng'oti n'omusumaali gwe baakomerera ni guguma begulugulu. Era ensambo edho dhaatugheebwa Katonda, Omwayi waife atulabirira." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Mwana wange, ghaligho ekintu ekindi ky'ogwaine okumanha: okughandiika ebitabo tikukoma, n'okusoma einho kukooya omubiri." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Byonabyona bye nkobye obiwuliire. Kale ni tyanga Katonda era ogemenga amateeka ge, kuba eyo n'ensonga eyatondesa omuntu." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Era Katonda aja kutusalira omusango ku byonabyona bye tukola, ka bibe ebirungi oba ebibi, nga kw'otaire n'ebyo ebikolebwa mu ngiso." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Luno n'Olwembo Olusinga mu Nhembo, olwa Solomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Nnhwegera n'omunwa gwo zeenazeena, kuba okugonza kwo kuwooma okusinga omwenge gw'emizabbibu." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Ebizigo bye weesiize biwunha kawoowo; eriina lyo irungi ng'oti n'ebizigo eby'akawoowo. Abaghala abaguna kyebava bakwegomba einho. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ntwala y'oli kuja tuve ghano mangu, onhingize ewuwo iwe kyabazinga wange. Twidha kusangaala tusagambire ghalala n'iwe; era tusaake inho okugonza kwo, kuba kusinga omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Abakwegomba batuufu okukwegombanga." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Imwe abaghala ab'e Yerusalemu, nze ndi mwirugavu aye mboneka bulungi, ng'oti ni weema edh'e Kedari era ng'oti n'ensuubo edh'omu kisaagaati kya Kyabazinga Solomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Mutaaningirira nga mundalula olw'okuba ndi mwirugavu, kuba akasana n'akambabula. Baanhinaze bansungughalira, banta ku kulabirira eisamba ly'emizabbibu. Aye ate eisamba eryange lyene tyalirabirira!" 
SongOfSongs1:7 Iwe omwoyo gwange ye gugonza, nkobera y'oyayira ebyayo byo, ni ye birambaala okuwuumulaku mu kasana ghagati. Lwaki mba ng'oti n'omuntu ali kutambulatambula eyo atyo, nga ndi kukunooneza mu byayo bya baayi baino?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Mukazi iwe asinga obulungi mu bakazi boonaboona, obwo toidhiiyo? Nonereza ebigere eby'ebyayo mwe bibita, oje oyayire embuzi dho agho okumpi n'eweema edh'abaayi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Iwe omugonzi wange, oleetera abasaadha okusuuyirira, ng'oti n'embalaasi enkazi bwe dhireetera ensaadha okusuuyirira edhighaluza ebigaali bya kyabazinga w'e Misiri eby'omu lutalo." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Amatama go gaboneka bulungi n'ebyamadholobera ebigalengeedheraku nga biri ku nviiri, ni mu nkoto yo mwabaamu ebinhere ebyakolebwa mu mabaale ag'omughendo." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Twidha kukukolerayo n'ebyamadholobera ebya zaabu, tubidholigedholige ni feeza." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Kyabazinga wange bwe yali yeeziziike akaito ng'ali kuwuumulaku, endhu yoonayoona yaidhula akawoowo ka narudo nga kava ku bizigo byange." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Omugonzi wange ali ng'oti n'akasawo akalimu akawoowo ka mirra, ke nta mu mabeere gange." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Omugonzi wange ali ng'oti n'ekifaaganda eky'ebimuli eby'omu nsiko ebiwunha akawoowo, ebiba mu masamba ag'emizabbibu mu kiketezo ekyetebwa Engedi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Ng'oboneka bulungi iwe omugonzi wange! Bwenebwene oboneka bulungi. Amaiso go malungi ng'oti njiibwa. 
SongOfSongs1:16 Bona eno iwe omugonzi wange, ng'oboneka bulungi, mu mazima geene oli mulungi. Eisubi erya kiragala n'eriidha okuba obuliri bwaife;" 
SongOfSongs1:17 emiti emivule gibe empango edh'omu ndhu yaife, ate emiti emisipuressi gibe embaawo edh'akasolya kaayo." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Nze ndi kimuli kya mu nsiko eky'e Sharoni, ndi kimera ekyetebwa eky'omu biiko." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ng'ekimuli ekyetebwa liri bwe kiboneekerera nga kiri mu mawa, n'omugonzi wange atyo bw'aboneekerera ng'ali mu bakazi baine." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ng'omuti ogw'ebibala bwe guba n'omuganhulo okusinga emiti egindi egy'omu kibira, n'omugonzi wange atyo bw'abasinga basaadha baine. Nnhumirwa okutyama mu kinsense eky'omuti ogwo, era ebibala byagwo bimpoomera inho." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Yaanhingiza mu kisenge mwe baliira embaga, okugonza kwe yandaga kwaba ng'oti ni bendera gye bawuubira omuntu ow'ekitiibwa." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Mumpe ku mizabbibu emikalu ndyeku ndhiremu amaani, munkamulire ni ku bibala nhweku mpulire ku bulamu; kuba okugonza kwenda bwa kundhita bwite!" 
SongOfSongs2:6 Omukono gwe omugooda aguziziike ghansi agh'omutwe gwange, ate omukono gwe omusaadha gungemereire." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Imwe abaghala ab'e Yerusalemu, ndi kubakoba mulayire empuuli n'empongo edh'omu nsiko, muti timwidha kutabulatabula, waire okusiikuula okugonza kwaife, okutuusa nga ife beene twenze." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ndi kuwulira amamiro ag'omugonzi wange! Bona ere, wuule. Ali kwidha ng'atuumiratuumira ku nsozi enene, era yaidha ng'adalandira ku busozi obutono." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Omugonzi wange ali ng'oti mpuuli, oba ng'oti mpongo nto. Bona ere, wuule ayemereire kuliya kw'endhu yaife. Ali kulengeza mu idinisa, yaabisa amaiso mu katimba kaamu." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Agho omugonzi wange yaayogera, yankoba ati: “Omugonzi wange, situka. Omulungi wange, idha tuje." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Bona, ebiseera eby'ekiinhogogo biwoireku, amaadhi galekeire okugwa gaajiire," 
SongOfSongs2:12 era buti ebimuli biri buli ghantu. Ebiseera eby'okwemba bituuse, enjiibwa odhiwulira nga dhembera mu nsi yaife." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Emitiini gitooleire okubala, n'emizabbibu gimuliisa ebimuli, gyaleeta akawoowo. Omugonzi wange, situka. Omulungi wange, idha tuje." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Oli ng'oti njiibwa eyeegisiisa mu ntanda edheeyatisa mu lubaale, mu nkompe edhiri mu nsozi. Leka nkulingirireku mu maiso, kuba muboneka bulungi. Era leka mpulire ku mamiro go ng'oyogera, kuba gawooma okuwulirisa." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Mutugemere ebibe, ka bibe bito oba bikulu, ebyo ebyonoona amasamba gaife ag'emizabbibu; kuba emizabbibu gyaife gimuliisa ebimuli.”" 
SongOfSongs2:16 Omugonzi wange oyo, wange, zeena ndi wuwe. Ayayira ebyayo bye mu bimuli ebyetebwa liri." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Omugonzi wange, kyuka oire, obe eno ng'oti n'empuuli oba empongo ento bw'eba mu nsozi edh'e Betheli, okutuusa obwire bwe bunaakya buli kazikiiza nga kaweereiregho irala." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Nga ndi ku buliri bwange obwire, naloota oyo ye ngonza, era naamunoonia, aye naaloba kumuzuula." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Naakoba mule nti: “Ka nsituke nje ntambuletambule eyo mu kibuga, mu nguudo dhaakyo ni mu mpya dhaakyo, mmunoonie oyo ye ngonza.” Naamunoonia aye naaloba kumuzuula." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Abakuumi bandhagaana nga bali kulawuna ekibuga. Naababuuza nti: “Mumboneireku oyo ye ngonza?” 
SongOfSongs3:4 Aye mba naakamala okubabitaku nti, nga ndhagaana oyo ye ngonza. Naamugemerera, naaloba kumulekula, okutuusa bwe namutwala mu ndhu ya maama, mu kisenge kyenekyene eky'oyo eyanzaala." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Imwe abaghala ab'e Yerusalemu, ndi kubakoba mulayire empuuli n'empongo edh'omu nsiko, muti timwidha kutabulatabula waire okusiikuula okugonza kwaife, okutuusa nga ife beene twenze." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Naani oyo ali kwidha ng'ava mu irungu, ng'ali ng'oti n'ekire eky'omwosi ekiri ng'oti mpango, nga bamusiize obuwoowo bwa mirra, baamuniokeza n'obubbaani, n'obuwoowo obwa buli nsambo abasuubuzi bwe batunda?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Bona, Solomoni n'ali kwidha nga bamubbeedeire mu kityamo kye. Abalwani ab'amaani nkaaga bamwezungulwire, abasingayo okuba ab'amaani mu Isiraeli." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Boonaboona bali n'empiima, era bakugu mu kulwana entalo. Buli muntu yeesibye empiima ye nga yeetegeike okulwana bwe bamulumba obwire." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Kyabazinga Solomoni yeekolera ekityamo kye, mu miti egy'e Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Empango dhaakyo yadhikola nga dha feeza, ekintu kye yeesiiraku yaakikola nga kya zaabu, ate ky'atyamaku nga kya langi ya nakasooma, era nga kyakolebwa abakazi ab'e Yerusalemu n'okugonza okungi einho." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Imwe abaghala ab'e Sioni, mwidhe mubone kyabazinga Solomoni, ng'avaire ku mutwe engule inhina ye yamuvaaza, ku lunaku lwe yafumbirirwaku, olunaku olwo lwe yafuniraku eisanhu eritaloodheka." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ng'oboneka bulungi, iwe omugonzi wange! Bwenebwene oboneka bulungi. Amaiso go gali ng'oti ga njiibwa, nga gali mu kitambaala kyo kye weebwikiriire. Enviiri dho dhiikirira ku mutwe gwo ng'oti n'ekighaso eky'embuzi bwe kiikirira ku lusozi Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amaino go gatukula ng'oti kighaso kya ntaama, dhe baakamala okusalaku obuviiri ni badhinaaza, ni dhitambula nga dhiri ibiri ibiri, nga ghazira eziragho." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Omunwa gwo guli ng'oti n'ewuuzi ey'olugoye olw'ekitiibwa olwa langi ya kasaayisaayi. Bwe gwogera gusanhusa. Amatama go nga gali mu kitambaala kyo kye weeghembereire, gaboneka bulungi ng'oti kibala kya ku mukomamawanga, kye basazeemu aghabiri." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Enkoto yo ndeeyi ng'oti munaala gwa Daudi, gwe baazimba okuterekangamu eby'okulwanisa. Erimu ekinhere ekiri ng'oti n'engabo olukumi (1,000), dhe baghaniike ku munaala okugwezunguluza." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabeere go gombi gaboneka bulungi, ng'oti n'empuuli ento eibiri enongo, nga dhiri kuliira mu bimuli ebyetebwa liri." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Ndidha kuja ku lusozi okuli akawoowo ka mirra, ni ku kasozi okuli akawoowo k'obubbaani, mbe eyo okutuusa obwire bwe bunaakya, n'enzikiiza n'ewaagho." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Omugonzi wange, oboneka bulungi weenaweena! Oziraku kakyamu naire." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Omugole wange, idha tuje, tuve ku nsozi dh'e Lebanoni; idha tuje, tuve mu Lebanoni. Vaayo ku mutwe ogw'olusozi Amani, ove n'eyo ku mitwe egy'ensozi Seniri ni Herimoni, eri empologoma n'empala." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Mwanhinaze iwe omugole wange, ontwaliriiza omwoyo. Ontwaliriiza omwoyo olw'eriiso ly'oninzeeku, n'olw'ekinhere ekikuli mu nkoto." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Mwanhinaze iwe omugole wange, engeri y'ongonzaamu ensanhusa inho. Engeri y'ongonzaamu ensanhusa inho okusinga okunhwa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Obuwoowo bwo buwunha bulungi okusinga obuwoowo obundi bwonabwona." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Iwe omugole wange, omunwa gwo gudhuudhuula ng'oti guliku mudheenene gwa ndhuki. Olulimi lwo luwoomerera ng'oti luliku bwa mudheenene gwa ndhuki na mata. Ebivaalo byo biwunha ng'oti n'obuwoowo bwonabwona obw'e Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Mwanhinaze iwe omugole wange, oli ng'oti nimiro ye baazimbaku ekisenge ni bagyezunguluza, era oli ng'oti nsulo eriku kuufulu, omuntu owundi y'atasobola kusenamu maadhi." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Oli ng'oti isamba lya mikomamawanga, egitaaku ebibala ebirungi einho. Era ng'eisamba eryo lirimu n'ebivaamu obuwoowo, obwa henna ni narudo," 
SongOfSongs4:14 ni saffuroni, ni kalamu, ni kinnamoni, n'obubbaani obwa buli nsambo, ni mirra ni aloe, n'obuwoowo obundi bwonabwona obuwunha obulungi einho." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Oli ng'oti nsulo edh'amaadhi amalungi agafukirira enimiro, era waaba ng'oti n'obwiga obukuuluula, nga buva ku lusozi Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Iwe empewo eva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, n'iwe empewo eva ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, musituke mwidhe mufuuwe ku nimiro yange, akawoowo akagirimu kaje, kasansaanire woonawoona. Olwo omugonzi wange aidhe mu nimiro ye, alye ku bibala byayo ebirungi einho." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Mwanhinaze iwe omugole wange, ndidhie mu nimiro yange, naasoloza obuwoowo bwange obwa mirra n'obuwoowo obundi, naalya ku mudheenene gwange ogw'endhuki ni ku bisasala byagwo, era naanhwa ni ku mwenge gwange ogw'emizabbibu ni ku mata gange. Imwe abagonzania, mulye era munhwe, munhwere irala mwigute omukwano." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Nali ntendwike, aye nga omwoyo gwange guli kuwulira. Agho naawulira ng'omugonzi wange ali kukonkona ku lwigi, ng'akoba ati: “Ndhiguliraagho, mwanhinaze iwe omugonzi wange, iwe aziraku ghakyamu naire era ali ng'oti njiibwa. Omutwe gwange n'enviiri dhange biboze n'omusulo.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Mbaire mmaze okutoolamu ebivaalo byange, kabiri ndhiremu okuvaala? Mbaire mmaze okunaaba ku bigere, kabiri ndhiremu okubifuutuusa?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Omugonzi wange yaabisa omukono mu kituli eky'omu lwigi, omwoyo gwange gwampakukapakuka." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Naasituka okwiguliragho omugonzi wange, ng'amakono gange n'engalo dhange biri kutoonha ebizigo eby'akawoowo ka mirra, era ebizigo ebyo byatoonha ni ku munhololo ogw'olwigi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Naiguliragho omugonzi wange, aye nga yaviiregho ira yaaja! Neegomba mpulireku ng'ayogera, era naamunoonia aye nga timubona. Naamweta aye nga tandhiramu." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Abakuumi bandhagaana nga bali kulawuna ekibuga, bankuba, bantaaku ebinuubule. Abakuumi b'ekibuga abo bantoolaku n'ekitambaala kye nali neeghembereire." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Imwe abaghala ab'e Yerusalemu, ndi kubakoba mulayire, muti bwe munaabona omugonzi wange, munaamunkobera muti ndwaire olw'okumugonza einho." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Mukazi iwe asinga obulungi mu bakazi boonaboona, omugonzi wo kiki ekimuleetera okuba ow'endhawulo ku bandi? Kiki ekimufuula ow'endhawulo einho, memale otulayize otyo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Omugonzi wange anhirira era aboneka bulungi; mu bantu omutwalo omulamba (10,000), yenka n'abonekamu." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Mu maiso ali ng'oti zaabu omukenenule, enviiri dhe dha mutere, ndhirugavu ng'oti ikoova." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amaiso ge gali ng'oti njiibwa edhiri gha nsulo edh'amaadhi, era nga enjiibwa edho badhinaaziiza n'amata, dhaatereera bukalamu." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Amatama ge gavaaku akawoowo ng'oti nimiro ya buwoowo bwa mere. Omunwa gwe guli ng'oti bimuli ebyetebwa liri, ebiri kutoonhologoka akawoowo ka mirra." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Amakono ge gaakolebwa bulungi ng'oti mpeta dha zaabu, edhaateebwaku amabaale ag'omughendo. Omubiri gwe mulungi ng'oti isanka lye baalimbyaku amabaale ag'omughendo ageetebwa saffiro." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Amagulu ge malungi ng'oti n'empango dhe baakola mu mabaale ag'omughendo agamirimiinha, ni badhita mu bikolo ebya zaabu. Era wa kitiibwa ng'oti n'ensozi edh'e Lebanoni, n'emiti gyaku emivule egyegombebwa." 
SongOfSongs5:16 By'ayogera biwooma okuwulirisa, era yeenayeena nga bw'ali ansanhusa. Imwe abaghala ab'e Yerusalemu, atyo bw'ali omugonzi, era oyo ni mukagwa wange." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Mukazi iwe asinga obulungi mu bakazi boonaboona, omugonzi wo ajiire gha, tukubeereku okumunoonia?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Omugonzi wange ajiire mu nimiro ye omuli obuwoowo obw'omu mere. Ajiire kwayira eyo ebyayo bye n'okusolozaayo ebimuli ebyetebwa liri. 
SongOfSongs6:3 Omugonzi wange oyo, wange, zeena ndi wuwe. Ayayira ebyayo bye mu bimuli ebyetebwa liri." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Iwe omugonzi wange, oboneka bulungi ng'oti n'ekibuga Tiruza, oboneka bulungi ng'oti n'ekibuga Yerusalemu. Ate otiisa ng'oti n'eigye erisitwike okulwana." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Lekera agho okuuningirira otyo, kuba amaiso go gampangwire. Enviiri dho dhiikirira ku mutwe gwo ng'oti n'ekighaso eky'embuzi, bwe kiikirira ku lusozi Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amaino go gatukula ng'oti kighaso kya ntaama dhe baakamala okusalaku obuviiri ni badhinaaza, ni dhitambula nga dhiri ibiri ibiri, nga ghazira eziragho." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Amatama go nga gali mu kitambaala kyo kye weeghembereire, gaboneka bulungi ng'oti kibala kya ku mukomamawanga, kye basazeemu aghabiri." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Waire nga kyabazinga ali ni bainhebantu nkaaga (60), n'abakazi abandi ab'embali kinaana (80), n'abaghala kamaala nga tibabalika," 
SongOfSongs6:9 nze omugonzi wange ali mulala yenka omulungi ng'oti njiibwa, era aziraku ghe yakyama naire. Oyo n'omwana omughala yenka ku inhina, era omugonzi einho ku inhina oyo. Abaghala boonaboona abamubonaku bamwesiimisa, ni bainhebantu n'abakazi ba kyabazinga abandi ab'embali boona bamusaaka." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Nga bakoba bati: “Naani ono ali n'amaiso ng'oti n'endhuba eri kuvaayo, aboneka obulungi ng'oti mwezi, amesunkana ng'oti kwaka kwa ndhuba, ate atiisa ng'oti n'eigye erisitwike okulwana.”" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Agho nze naikirira, naatuuka mu nimiro ey'amaido ag'oku muti, okubona ebibala eby'omu kiiko nga bwe bimuliisa ekimuli, n'okubona oba nga emizabbibu gitaireku ebituutwa, era oba nga emikomamawanga gireese ekimuli." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Naja okweidhuukiriza nga ndi kuloota, nga ndi mu kigaali eky'omu lutalo ghalala n'omugonzi wange." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Ira eno, iwe omughala Omushulamu, ira eno tukulingirire ku. Lwaki mwenda okuuningirira nze Omushulamu, ng'oti n'abalingirira omukini akinira mu nhiriri edh'abantu abali kubona bw'akina?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Iwe omughala omumbeedha, ebigere byo nga birungi mu ngaito. Ebiteege byo birungi ng'oti n'amabaale ag'omughendo, agaaseeneibwa omukozi omukugu einho." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Omudondo gwo guli ng'oti kikopo ekirimu omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omutabule obukalamu. Enda yo eri ng'oti kinhwa kya ngaano kye basibiisa ebimuli ebyetebwa liri. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Amabeere go gombi gaboneka bulungi, ng'oti n'empuuli ento eibiri enongo." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Enkoto yo ndeeyiriri ng'oti n'omunaala ogwakolebwa mu masanka. Amaiso go gamesunkana ng'oti n'amaadhi agali mu bidiba, ebiri gha mulyango ogwetebwa ogwa Bathirabbimu, mu kibuga Heshiboni. Enhindo yo ntereevu ng'oti n'ekituuti ekirengererwaku eky'e Lebanoni, ekiringiriiza Damasiko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Omutwe gwo guli ghaigulu bulungi ng'oti n'olusozi Karumeli. Enviiri dho dha kitiibwa ng'oti langi ya nakasooma. Obulungi bwo bwasaamiriza ni kyabazinga. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Omugonzi wange iwe, ng'oli mulungi okufa obufe! Ng'okugonza kwo kuneesiimisa ebitaloodheka!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Oli mulangaadhu ng'oti n'omuti omunaazi, n'amabeere go gali ng'oti n'ebifaaganda eby'ebibala byaku." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Era naakoba nti: “Ndidha kuniina ku muti omunaazi ogwo, neegeme ku nsaga dhaagwo.” Amabeere go gali ng'oti n'ebifaaganda eby'emizabbibu, n'akawoowo ak'omuuka gw'ogheera kaaba ng'oti kawoowo ka bibala." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Omunwa gwo bye gwogera biwooma ng'oti n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogusingayo bulungi. Ogwo n'omwenge ogugwaniire okunhwebwa omugonzi wange, gumubite mu kanwa ni mu maino, gumughegheeze amamiro." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Omugonzi wange oyo, nze ndi wuwe, era yeena ayenda nze." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Idha eno, omugonzi wange iwe, tujeeku mu byalo tubeeku eyo." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ka tuwuune inho, tuje mu masamba ag'emizabbibu, tubone oba nga emizabbibu gitaireku ebituutwa, era nga gimuliisa n'okumulisa, era oba nga emikomamawanga gireese ekimuli. Eyo ye ndidha okukulaga nga bwe nkugonza." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Eyo oidha kuwunhiza akawoowo akava ku bimera ebyetebwa mandurake. Era ebibala byonabyona ebirungi biidha kuba agho ku mulyango gwaife. Omugonzi wange iwe, nkuleeteire ebisanhusa ebiyaaka n'ebikaire." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Ha, kale ngoli wali mwanhinaze eyayonka ku mabeere ga maama, memale ni nkwagaana eyo ku luya, nandikunhwegeire ghaabulagho n'omuntu ankobaku." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Nandikutwaire naakwingiza mu ndhu ya maama, wandhegeresa okugonza nga tuli eyo. Nandikughaire waanhwa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogutabwirwamu ebiguwoomya, naakugha waanhwa n'omubisi gwe bakunhie mu mikomamawanga gyange." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Omukono gwe omugooda aguziziike ghansi agh'omutwe gwange, ate omukono gwe omusaadha gungemereire." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Imwe abaghala ab'e Yerusalemu, ndi kubakoba mulayire, muti timwidha kutabulatabula waire okusiikuula okugonza kwaife, okutuusa nga ife beene twenze." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Naani oyo ali kwidha ng'aviira mu irungu, nga bagemagaine n'omugonzi we? Nasiikuula okugonza kwo nga ndi ghansi agh'omuti ogw'ebibala, agho mu kifo inhoko ghe yali mu kulumwa ng'akuzaala." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Gonzanga mulala nze zenka, onsibe ku omwoyo gwo ng'akamanhiso. Olobenga kugemerera wundi mu makono go okutoolaku nze zenka. Kuba okugonza kuli n'amaani agaagayaga n'ag'olumbe; eighali liri n'obukambwe obwagayaga n'obw'okufa. Okugonza kutumbuka ng'oti muliro gwene, kwayokya ng'oti n'omuliro oguli kubbeibbera ogw'amaani." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Okugonza ni bw'okufukirira amaadhi amangi einho tikuzima; ni bwe guba omwidhuzo gw'amaadhi tigasobola kumira kugonza okwo, ni kudimira. Ole bw'aghaayo obukombe bwonabwona bw'ali nabwo agule okugonza, bamunhooma bunhoome." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tuli ni mwanhinaife omuto, akaali okusunia amabeere. Tulimukolera ki bwe ghalibaagho aidha okumukobya?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Mwanhinaife oyo bw'anaaba ekisenge, twidha kumuzimbaku omunaala ogwa feeza. Aye bw'anaaba olwigi, twidha kumukomereraku embaawo edh'omuvule, abe munda mwadho." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndi kisenge, era amabeere gange n'eminaala egy'oku kisenge ekyo. Bwemba aghali omugonzi wange, mba bukalamu naawulira emiraala." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomoni yali n'eisamba ery'emizabbibu e Baali Hammoni. Abalimi baalipangisa, nga buli muntu asasula ebitundu bya feeza lukumi (1,000) okulimiramu." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Solomoni k'afune ebitundu bye ebya feeza olukumi (1,000), n'abalimi abapangisa bafunemu ebitundu ebikumi ebibiri (200). Aye eisamba eryange lirigho nga lyange ku bwange." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Iwe omugonzi wange aba eyo mu nimiro, banange bali kuteegerera okuwulira amamiro go. Kale ni yogeraku mpulire." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Omugonzi wange iwe, yangughaku oidhe ng'oti n'empuuli, oba ng'oti n'empongo ento ku nsozi edhimeraku ebiwoomesa emere." 
Isaiah1:1 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku Buyudaaya ni Yerusalemu, Katonda bwe yagha Isaia mutabane wa Amozi mu kubonekerwa. Yabumugha mu kiseera eky'obufuzi bwa bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya bano: Uzzia, ni Yothamu, ni Ahazi, ni Hezekia. Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati:" 
Isaiah1:2 “Iwe eigulu wulira n'iwe ensi tega kutu, muwulirise bye nkoba. Abaana be nalera ni nkuza, bandheemeire." 
Isaiah1:3 Ente emanha mwene yo, n'endogoyi yaamanha ekintu musengwa waayo mw'agigheera eby'okulya; aye abantu bange Abaisiraeli okumanha okwaibwe tikutuuka agho, era abantu bange abo baziramu kategeera naire.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Okagwireku iwe eighanga eikozi ly'ebibi, abantu aboonooni imwe, abaidhukulu ab'abakozi b'ebibi imwe, era abaana aboonoonefu. Muviire ku Musengwa Katonda, mwamunhooma Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli oyo, mwamwetooleraku irala." 
Isaiah1:5 Iwe Buyudaaya, lwaki oyongera okuba omudheemu otyo? Oyenda bongere okukubonereza? Omutwe gwo gwonagwona gwidhwire bibwa byereere, n'omwoyo gwo gwazirika." 
Isaiah1:6 Okuviira irala ku mutwe okutuukira irala ku bigere ghaziraku ghalamu naire. Oidhwire bwa binuubulenuubule, na bikwadulekwadule, na bibwa ebiri kutiiriika omusaayi, ebitanaaziibwa waire okusibwaku ekighero, oba okuteebwaku obulezi." 
Isaiah1:7 Ensi yaimwe bagizikiriiza, n'ebibuga byaimwe baabyokya omuliro byasiriira; abantu abagwira balumbye ensi yaimwe; baaginhaga era baazikiriza n'ebigirimu nga mubona muti." 
Isaiah1:8 Ekibuga Sioni kisigaire agho kityo ng'oti n'ekibuga kye bazingiiza, kiri ng'oti n'entindi eyeewolookereire mu isamba ly'emizabbibu, era ng'oti n'ekigangu kye bakuumiramu enimiro y'amaliibwa." 
Isaiah1:9 Ngoli Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye tiyatulekeraghooku bantu batono abaawonagho, twandibaire ng'oti n'ab'e Sodoma, era twafaanana ng'oti n'ab'e Gomorra mu ebyo ebyabatuukaku." 
Isaiah1:10 Muwulirise Musengwa Katonda by'akoba, imwe abakulembeze ba Yerusalemu abali ng'oti n'ab'e Sodoma; mutege kutu imwe abantu abali ng'oti n'ab'e Gomorra, mwetegereze Katonda waife by'abeegeresa." 
Isaiah1:11 Musengwa Katonda oyo akoba ati: “Emisengo gyaimwe olukunkumuli gye mughaayo, nze gingasa ki? Nsiniirwa entaama enume dhe mughaayo, n'amasavu g'ensolo dhaimwe empiite ge mughaayo ng'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa. Nzira isanhu lye nfuna mu kumpa musaayi gwa nte nume, waire ogw'entaama n'ogw'embuzi enume." 
Isaiah1:12 Naani eyabakoba okwidhanga mu maiso gange, ni mutyankirira empya dh'eisinzizo lyange?" 
Isaiah1:13 Mulekere agho okuleetanga ebigheebwayo ebiziramu makulu. Obubbaani bwe muniokeza buneenhinhasa, oteeku n'Ebibinuko eby'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi bye mukuza, n'enaku dha Sabbato dhe mukuza, n'okwesoloza kwaimwe okw'okusinza. Tisobola kuguminkiriza bibi byaimwe, ni nguminkiriza na kwesoloza kwaimwe okwo okw'okusinza." 
Isaiah1:14 Tyendera irala mbaga dha bibinuko byaimwe eby'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, waire edh'ebibinuko byaimwe ebindi ebyalagirwa. Mbyesiniirwa inho, era nkooye okubiguminkiriza." 
Isaiah1:15 Agho ni, bwe munaayandhuluzanga emikono gyaimwe nga muneeghemba, tiidhanga kubalingaku; ni bwe munansabanga einho mutya, tiidhanga kubawulirisa; kuba engalo dhaimwe dhisaabaine musaayi." 
Isaiah1:16 Munaabe, mutukule mukomye agho bye mukola nga mbona, ebitali bya butuukirivu. Mulekere agho okukolanga ebibi," 
Isaiah1:17 mwege okukolanga ebirungi. Mufubenga okukola mu butuufu, mulekezenga agho abantu okutuntuza banaibwe, mulwanirirenga bamulekwa era muwolerezenga banamwandu.”" 
Isaiah1:18 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Kale ni mwidhe twogere ku bintu ebyo twisanie. Ebibi byaimwe ni bwe biba nga byabamyusa bwe myu myu myu, ndidha kubanaaza mutukule ng'oti mugozi; era ebibi ebyo ni bwe biba nga byabafuula ba kasaayisaayi omugemu, ndidha kubaamula mube beeru ng'oti n'enhonhi dhe beeta enhange." 
Isaiah1:19 Bwe munaabanga abagonvu era abawulize, mwidha kulyanga ku bibala ebirungi ebiva mu nsi yaimwe." 
Isaiah1:20 Aye bwe munaadheemanga obudheeme, mwidha kwitibwanga bwitibwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze ndhogeire.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Kyewuunhisa okubona ng'ekibuga ekyalinga ekyesigwa, kifuuse ng'oti malaaya. Ate nga kyaidhulangamu abantu abakola amazima, era kyabangamu abantu abatuufu. Aye mperaano kirimu batemo beereere." 
Isaiah1:22 Iwe Yerusalemu wali wa mughendo ng'oti feeza, aye mperaano ozira mugaso ng'oti iseedha buseedha; wali mulungi ng'oti mwenge gwa mizabbibu, aye mperaano oli ng'oti maadhi buudhi." 
Isaiah1:23 Abakulembeze bo badheemu, era bagemagana na baibi. Buli muntu agonza kulya nguzi era yaagunirira okugheebwa ebirabo. Tibalwaniriraku bamulekwa, waire okuwulirisa ensonga banamwandu dhe babaleetera." 
Isaiah1:24 Kale ni Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda oyo owa Isiraeli Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, akoba ati: “Ha, imwe abazigu bange ndidha kubamaliraku obusungu bwange, era mbeesasuulizeeku imwe abantakania." 
Isaiah1:25 Ndidha kubakolaku, mbasaanuuse ng'oti bwe basaanuusa ekyuma, era mbakenenule mbamaliremu irala ebidomboodo byonabyona ebibalimu." 
Isaiah1:26 Ndidha kubairizaagho abakulembeze abakalamu ng'oti ni bale abaasooka, mbairizeegho n'abawi b'amagezi abakalamu ng'oti ni bale be mwasooka nabo. Olwo Yerusalemu baliiramu okukyetanga ekibuga eky'abantu abatuufu era ekibuga eky'abantu abeesigwa.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Olw'okuba Musengwa Katonda akolera ku mazima era nga mutukuvu, alinunula Yerusalemu n'abantu baamu boonaboona abeenenia." 
Isaiah1:28 Aye alizikiriza abo abamudheemera n'abo abakola ebibi, era yaasaaniagho abo abamuvaaku." 
Isaiah1:29 Ensoni dhiribagema imwe olw'emiti emikologho gye mwasinzanga, n'olw'enimiro dhe mwasengangamu emisambwa." 
Isaiah1:30 Muliba ng'oti n'omuti omukologho oguniala amakaba, era mwaba ng'oti n'enimiro etafuna ku maadhi naire." 
Isaiah1:31 Ab'amaani baliba ng'oti isubi ikalu, ate ebibi bye bakola byaba ng'oti nnimi dha muliro, olwo baliyiira ghalala nabyo, era ghaabulagho n'omuntu asobola okulobera okuzikirizibwa kwaibwe." 
Isaiah2:1 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku Buyudaaya ni Yerusalemu, Katonda bwe yagha Isaia mutabane wa Amozi." 
Isaiah2:2 Olunaku lwidha kutuuka, olusozi oluliku eisinzizo, lube nga n'olusinga buleeyi mu dhoonadhoona, era nga lusooloobye n'obusozi bwonabwona. Abantu abamaghanga kamaala balisomboka, baidha ku lusozi olwo," 
Isaiah2:3 abantu abangi abo balikoba bati: “Mwidhe tuje ku lusozi lwa Musengwa Katonda, mu isinzizo lya Katonda wa Isiraeli, atwegerese by'ayenda tukole, era tujiire ku ebyo by'atwegeresa; kuba Musengwa Katonda aba eyo mu Yerusalemu yaayegeresa abantu be, era aba eyo mu Sioni yaayogera n'abantu be.”" 
Isaiah2:4 Musengwa Katonda aliramula amaghanga, yaasalira abantu kamaala emisango gyaibwe. Edhibaire empiima dhaibwe edh'okulwanisa balidhigheesaamu mbago, ate amafumo gaibwe baagagheesaamu busolobyo bwa kuwoolera. Amaghanga tigaliirayo kugema bya kulwanisa kuja kulumba gainaago, waire okwirayo okutendekebwa mu by'entalo." 
Isaiah2:5 Kale ni, imwe baidhukulu ba Yakobo, mwidhe tutambulire mu butangaavu bwa Musengwa Katonda." 
Isaiah2:6 Wo Katonda waife, bona olekuliire agho abantu bo baidhukulu ba Yakobo. Ensi yaibwe bagiidhwiza bya bulogo ebiva e buvandhuba, n'eby'obulaguzi ebiva mu Filisitia. Era bajiira ku mpisa dh'abagwira." 
Isaiah2:7 Ensi yaibwe eidhwire feeza ni zaabu, era obukombe bwaibwe tibukoma. Ensi yaibwe eidhwire mbalaasi, era ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo tibiwaayo." 
Isaiah2:8 Ensi yaibwe eidhwire ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, abantu baasinza ebyo beene bye bakola n'emikono gyaibwe; ebintu obuntu bye bakola n'engalo dhaibwe." 
Isaiah2:9 Omuntu owabuliidho yaakuba amakiryaivu, n'omukungu yeena yeewombeeka. Kale ni, Wo Musengwa Katonda, otabasonigha naire." 
Isaiah2:10 Muje mwingire mu mpuku edh'omu gabaale, mwegise ni mu biina mu itaka, mulumuke Musengwa Katonda atiisa, oyo ow'ekitiisa era ow'obuyinza." 
Isaiah2:11 Olunaku lwidha kutuuka, okwekuluntaza okuli mu bantu kumalibwegho, n'okwegulumiza kwaibwe kusaanizibwegho. Ku olwo, Musengwa Katonda yenka n'aligulumizibwa." 
Isaiah2:12 Kuba ghaligho olunaku, Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye lw'aliikizaaku ghansi, abo abeekuluntaza ni beebona nga ba ghaigulu, n'abo abeekudumbaza ni beegulumiza." 
Isaiah2:13 Musengwa Katonda alizikiriza emiti emivule gyonagyona egy'e Lebanoni egyaleegherera ni gigungumala, era yaazikiriza n'emiti emikologho gyonagyona egy'e Bashani." 
Isaiah2:14 Alisaaniagho ensozi dhoonadhoona endeeyi, yaasaaniagho n'obusozi bwonabwona obugungumavu." 
Isaiah2:15 Alisaaniagho kiisi kituuti ekirengererwaku ekireeyiriri, yaasaaniagho na kiisi kifo kya kwewogomamu." 
Isaiah2:16 Alisaaniagho amaato goonagoona ag'e Tarushishi, yaasaaniagho n'ebintu byonabyona ebyakolebwa ebisanhusa okubona." 
Isaiah2:17 Okwekuluntaza okuli mu bantu kulimalibwagho, n'okwegulumiza kwaibwe kwasaanizibwagho. Ku olwo Musengwa Katonda yenka n'aligulumizibwa." 
Isaiah2:18 N'ebisinzibwa byonabyona ebitali Katonda biriweekereragho irala. 
Isaiah2:19 Abantu balingira mu mpuku edh'omu gabaale, ni mu biina mu itaka, nga balumuka olw'okutya Musengwa Katonda ow'ekitiisa era ow'obuyinza, lw'alisituka okwidha okudhugumiza ensi." 
Isaiah2:20 Ku lunaku olwo, abantu balisuula ere ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda ebya feeza ni zaabu. Ebintu ebyo beene bye beekolera okubisinzanga, balibirekera mpube na buwundowundo," 
Isaiah2:21 beene baingira mu mpuku edh'omu gabaale, ni mu ntanda edh'omu nsozi, nga balumuka olw'okutya Musengwa Katonda ow'ekitiisa era ow'obuyinza, lw'alisituka okwidha okudhugumiza ensi." 
Isaiah2:22 Muve ku kwesiganga abantu, kuba, okutoolaku omuuka ogw'omu nhindo gwe bagheera, kiki ekindi eky'omughendo kye bali nakyo?" 
Isaiah3:1 Bona eno, Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye aja kutoola mu Yerusalemu ni mu Buyudaaya, kiisi kintu ekisobozesa abantu okuba abalamu: Aja kutoolagho emere yoonayoona, atoolegho n'amaadhi goonagoona." 
Isaiah3:2 Aja kutoolagho abantu ab'amaani n'abaisirukale, abalamuzi n'abalanzi, abalaguzi n'abakulu b'ebika," 
Isaiah3:3 n'abo abakulira abalwani amakumi ataanu ataanu, n'ababbede ab'ebitiibwa, n'abawi b'amagezi, n'abakola eby'ekikugu, n'abalengera ebiribaagho." 
Isaiah3:4 Musengwa Katonda alireetera abalenzi obulenzi okufuuka abakulembeze ab'abantu be, era yaaleetera abaana obwana okufuga." 
Isaiah3:5 Abantu balituntuza bantu banaibwe, buli muntu yaakiriga mwine era yaanhigiriza muliraanwa we. Abato balinhooma abakulu, n'abantu abazira kye bagasa baanhooma ab'ebitiibwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Olunaku lwidha kutuuka, abantu ab'omu ndhu endala bakobe owundi ku baganda baibwe bati: “Iwe nga bw'oliku ni ky'ovaala, niiwe obe otukulire, bino ebyonooneibwa obe nga niiwe obifuga.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Aye ole alyewozaaku ng'akoba ati: “Tiidha kusobola kuwonia muntu yeenayeena, kuba zeena ewange nzirayo mmere waire eky'okuvaala. Mutaanonda kubakulira.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Bwenebwene ekibuga Yerusalemu bakizikiriiza n'ensi Buyudaaya baagireetera okugwa; kuba byonabyona abantu bye bakola ni bye boogera, bivumirira Musengwa Katonda, byanhooma n'ekitiisa kye." 
Isaiah3:9 Okuboolagana kwaibwe kwene kubalumiriza omusango; ebibi byaibwe babikolera gheeru ng'oti n'abe Sodoma, tibabigisaaku naire. Bakagwireku! Kuba beereeseeku beene akabi." 
Isaiah3:10 Mukobere abatuufu muti ebyaibwe birungi, kuba baidha kuganhulwanga mu biva mu kukola kwaibwe." 
Isaiah3:11 Aye ababi bakagwireku! Ebyaibwe bibi, kuba byene bye baakolanga ku bandi, ni byene ebyo bye baidhanga boona okubakolaku." 
Isaiah3:12 Abantu bange batuntuzibwa abaana obwana, era abakazi obukazi baabafufunkiriza. Imwe abantu bange, bwenebwene abakulembeze baimwe babakiidhamya, baabaleetera okudaaliima." 
Isaiah3:13 Musengwa Katonda asitwike yaidha okulumiriza abantu be, yeetegeike okubasalira omusango." 
Isaiah3:14 Musengwa Katonda aja kusalira omusango abakulembeze n'abakungu ab'abantu be, ati: “N'imwe omwamaliriragho amasamba g'emizabbibu, era endhu dhaimwe dhiidhwire bintu bye mwanhagulula ku baavu." 
Isaiah3:15 Lwaki mufuutafuuta abantu bange, ni mutentenatentena abantu abaavu mutyo? Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ninze ndi kubuuza.”" 
Isaiah3:16 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Abakazi b'omu Yerusalemu beebona nga ba ghaigulu, baatambula nga bamadalaiza emitwe, era baamoga bwenzi bwereere. Batambula mpolampola kasaalizo, baaja nga bawolomya obulege bwe bavaala mu bukongoivule." 
Isaiah3:17 Aye nze Musengwa Katonda ndidha kuleetera emitwe gy'abakazi b'omu Yerusalemu abo okugwa empaata basigale nga bazira nviiri ku mitwe, era mpembule ebitundu byaibwe eby'ekyama.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, Musengwa Katonda alitoola ku bakazi ab'e Yerusalemu ebintu eby'okwewoomya byonabyona ebibaleetera okwekuluntaza: ebyamadholobera bye bavaala mu bukongoivule, ni bye bavaala ku mitwe, ni bye bavaala mu nkoto," 
Isaiah3:19 ni bye bavaala ku mikono, ni bye bavaala ku matu. Era alibatoolaku n'ebitambaala bye beeghemberera mu maiso," 
Isaiah3:20 ni bye beesiba ku mitwe, n'obukomo obuleeta enkabi bwe bavaala ku mikono, n'obunhere bwe beesiba mu nkende," 
Isaiah3:21 n'empeta edh'oku ngalo, n'edh'omu nhindo," 
Isaiah3:22 n'ebivaalo byaibwe eby'omughendo, n'ebivaalo bye bavaala munda n'ebyo bye bavaala ku ngulu. Era alibatoolaku n'ensawo edh'omu ngalo," 
Isaiah3:23 n'embonerwamu dhe beeboneramu, n'engoye dhe baaluka ng'oti butimba n'edho empegheevu, n'ebitambaala eby'oku mutwe, n'engoye edh'okweghemberera." 
Isaiah3:24 Mu kifo eky'okuwunha akawoowo, baliwunha kivundu; mu kifo eky'okwesiba ensibiro, balyesiba migugha; mu kifo eky'okuba n'enviiri ensunsule obukalamu, baliba na mpaata; mu kifo eky'okuvaala engoye enungi, balivaala kutiya; era obulungi bwaibwe bulifuukamu nsoni." 
Isaiah3:25 Abasaadha ab'omu Yerusalemu waire abo abalwani ab'amaani, baliitirwa mu ntalo." 
Isaiah3:26 Endhigi dha Yerusalemu dhiriwowoola amaziga, dhaagegenga. Ate ekibuga Yerusalemu kyene kiriba ng'oti n'omukazi enaku y'ekubye, n'atyama obwagho ku itaka amadu." 
Isaiah4:1 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, abakazi musanvu balyegema omusaadha mulala baamwesibaku, nga bakoba bati: “Ife tuneeyagaliranga beene eky'okulya n'eky'okuvaala. Aye mala gaikiriza twetebwenga bakazi bo, otuwonie okuswalanga olw'obutafumbirwa.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, Musengwa Katonda alireetera ebimera byonabyona n'emiti okuboneka obulungi era nga bya kitiisa. N'ebibala eitaka bye liribaza biriba bikalamu, byawoomera inho abo abaliba bawoniegho mu Isiraeli." 
Isaiah4:3 Kiisi muntu yeenayeena aliba ng'asigairegho mu Sioni, ng'alondeibwa okusigala nga mulamu mu Yerusalemu, alyetebwa mutukuvu." 
Isaiah4:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda aliba ng'amaze okukozesa obuyinza bwe okusalira omusango abantu b'omu Yerusalemu, n'okubanaazaaku ebibi byaibwe, n'okutoola ku Yerusalemu omusango ogw'obutemo bwe baakikoleramu." 
Isaiah4:5 Musengwa Katonda omusana alitaagho ekire ku Lusozi Sioni ni ku boonaboona abaliba balwesololeizaaku. Ate obwire yaataagho omwosi n'okwaka okw'enimi edh'omuliro. Ekitiisa kya Katonda oyo kirimaamira ekibuga kyonakyona, kyakikuuma." 
Isaiah4:6 Ekitiisa ekyo, omusana kirikingiriza ekibuga kyonakyona okukiwonia olwota, kyakifuula ekifo eky'okwewogomamu okuwona amaadhi ni kiwunga." 
Isaiah5:1 Ka nhembere omugonzi wange, olwembo olugema ku isamba ly'emizabbibu. Omugonzi wange yali n'eisamba ery'emizabbibu ku lusozi olugimu einho." 
Isaiah5:2 Yaalitoodha bukalamu era yaalirondalondamu amabaale agaalimu, yaalisimbamu emizabbibu egisingamu bulungi. Yaalizimbamu ekituuti ekirengererwaku, yaalisimamu n'ekikunhiro ky'omwenge gw'emizabbibu. Yaasuubira ati eisamba eryo liidha kubaza emizabbibu emirungi, aye lyabaza bwa gikaagha ng'oti gya mu nsiko." 
Isaiah5:3 Mukagwa wange oyo mperaano akoba ati: “Kale ni, imwe abatyamye b'omu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya, mbasaba mutusalire omusango ghagati ghange n'eisamba lyange eryo ery'emizabbibu." 
Isaiah5:4 Kiki ekindi kye nali n'okukolera eisamba lyange eryo, kye ntaalikolera? Lwaki bwe nasuubira eisamba eryo okubaza emizabbibu emirungi, ate lyabaza bwa gikaagha ng'oti gya mu nsiko?" 
Isaiah5:5 Mpegaano ka mbakobere kye nja okukolera eisamba lyange eryo: Nja kulitoolaku olukomera olulyezungulwire, mmenhegho n'ekigo ekirikuuma, ensolo dhiriire omwo era dhirityankirire." 
Isaiah5:6 Ndidha kulizisa, emizabbibu balobe kugiwooleranga waire okugirimangamu. Mwidha kumeramu bwa nkandwa na mawa, era nja kulobera n'ebire okugwisanga amaadhi mu isamba eryo.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Isiraeli n'eisamba eryo ery'emizabbibu erya Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye; abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ekirime kye yasimba nga musangaavu. Yabasuubiramu okukola amazima, aye baakola bwa butemo. Yabasuubiramu okukola ebituufu, aye baakola bwa biriza bantu maziga!" 
Isaiah5:8 Mukagwireku imwe abagula endhu nga mwongereza ku dhe muli nadho, ni mugula n'enimiro okwongereza ku dhe muli nadho, okutuusa nga ghazira ghe mutaguze, olwo ensi mugibeemu mwenka." 
Isaiah5:9 Mpuliire Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ng'akoba ati: “Bwenebwene endhu kamaala dhirifuuka bifulukwa, endhu enkologho era edhiboneka obulungi dhirisigala ndhereere omuzira bantu." 
Isaiah5:10 Eisamba ery'emizabbibu ery'eyiika eikumi, liidha kuvangamu bwa lita munaana edh'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Ate omusiri ogusigibwamu ekiibo ekiramba eky'ensigo, gwidha kukungulwangamu kaibo bwibo.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Bakagwireku abo abawuuna ku nkyo okunoonia eby'okunhwa ebitamiiza, ni banhwa omwenge okuzibya obwire okutuusa lwe gubatamiiza." 
Isaiah5:12 Ebibinuko byaibwe bibaaku endingidi, entongooli, obugoma n'endere, era n'omwenge gw'emizabbibu. Aye tibalowooza ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda by'akola, waire okubifaaku naire." 
Isaiah5:13 Kale abantu bange kye baliva ni batwalibwa mu bunhage, olw'obutaba na kumanha. Abakungu baibwe endhala eribaita, n'abantu baibwe boonaboona baafa olw'endiwo." 
Isaiah5:14 Amagombe kye gava ni gabeeguguna, ni gaasamya omunwa okumira abakungu b'omu Yerusalemu aghalala n'eikuukuubira ery'abantu baamu, abaakiwowoiganirangamu nga basagamba." 
Isaiah5:15 Buli muntu aliswazibwa, n'abo abeekuluntaza baliisibwa ghansi." 
Isaiah5:16 Aye Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye agulumizibwa ng'asalira abantu mu mazima, era ayoleka obutukuvu bwe ng'akolera abantu mu butuufu." 
Isaiah5:17 Entaama ento dhiririira mu bibuga nga bizise ng'oti n'edhiri kuliira mu byayiro, n'edho edhipiitibwa obupiitibwe ensavu era n'embuzi ento, dhoona dhirifuna omwo eisubi." 
Isaiah5:18 Bakagwireku abo abaloba okuva ku kwonoona, obuguya bwaibwe ni bubasibiikirira ku kukola ebibi ng'oti n'emigugha bwe gisibiikirira ekigaali ekighaluzibwa." 
Isaiah5:19 Bakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda atere ayanguyeeku by'akola tusobole okubibona; Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli oyo akole mangu by'ategeka tusobole okubimanha.” 
Isaiah5:20 Bakagwireku abo abafuulania ebintu, ekibi ni bakyeta ekirungi ate ekirungi ni bakyeta ekibi; enzikiiza ni bagyeta obutangaavu ate obutangaavu ni babweta enzikiiza; ekikaagha ni bakyeta ekidhuudhuula ate ekidhuudhuula ni bakyeta ekikaagha." 
Isaiah5:21 Bakagwireku abo abeetwala okuba abagezi, ni beesuuta okuba abaidhi buli kintu." 
Isaiah5:22 Bakagwireku abo abamanhifu einho mu kunhwa omwenge, abaziramu ntete kutabikatabika bya kunhwa bitamiiza." 
Isaiah5:23 Beedheereza abantu abaliku emisango baabaleetera okugisinga olw'enguzi, aye abaziraku musango baaloba okubakolera ekituufu ekibagwaniire." 
Isaiah5:24 Kale ni ng'omuliro bwe gumamula ebikaba, n'eisubi eikalu ni liya okuweekereragho, boona ebyo bye beesiga bwe birivunda, n'ebyo bye bakola byafuumuuka ng'oti nkungu; kuba baaloba amateeka ga Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, baanhooma ekiragiro eky'Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda butumbukiire ku bantu be ng'oti muliro, era agalwire omukono gwe okubabonereza. Ensozi dhiidha kutengeeta, n'emirambo gy'abo abaitiibwa gisigale agho mu nguudo dh'ebibuga ng'oti bikaba. Aye waire ng'ebyo bimaze okubaagho, obusungu bwe bwidha kusigala nga bukaaligho. Era asigale ng'akaasitwire omukono gwe okubabonereza." 
Isaiah5:26 Musengwa Katonda alikola akamanhiso okweta abamaghanga agali eghala. Alibafuuyira endeka baava ensi y'ekoma, baidha amangu geene ago nga balumuka embiro." 
Isaiah5:27 Mu abo timulibaamu akoogha waire eyeekontola kugwa; timulibaamu awongera waire atenduka. Ensibiro edh'omu nkende dhaibwe tidhirirebera naire, waire obukosi bw'engaito dhaibwe okukutuka." 
Isaiah5:28 Obusaale bwaibwe bwogi, n'obulaso bwaibwe bwonabwona babudhuumwire. Ebinuulo by'embalaasi dhaibwe bibbalangafu ng'oti mabaale, n'enkede edh'ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo dhirumuka ng'oti n'empewo eyeezungulula n'amaani." 
Isaiah5:29 Bawologoma ng'oti mpologoma egemye ensolo y'eyiize, ng'eri kugikwekwebya okugitwala era nga ghazira asobola kugigitoolaku." 
Isaiah5:30 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, baliwologomera mu Isiraeli, ng'oti n'enhandha bw'ewolomboka. Omuntu bw'aliringirira ensi eyo, alibona nzikiiza na nnaku byonka, ng'ebire bikingiriiza omusana, enzikiiza yaidha." 
Isaiah6:1 Mu mwaka kyabazinga Uzzia gwe yafiiramu, nabona Musengwa Katonda ng'atyaime ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, ekigungumavu era nga kya kitiisa. Era ng'ekivaalo kye eky'oku ngulu kyeyandhulwiza okubuna eisinzizo." 
Isaiah6:2 Ghaigulu gha kyabazinga oyo, ghaali nga gheemereiregho ebitonde ebyetebwa serafimu, nga buli kirala kiri n'amaghagha mukaaga: abiri nga kigeeghembye mu maiso, abiri agandi kyageeghemba ku bigere, ate abiri agasigairegho kyagakozesa okuguluka." 
Isaiah6:3 Buli kitonde kyali nga kiri kukoba kiinaakyo kiti: “Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye mutukuvu, mutukuvu, mutukuvu. Ekitiisa kye kibunie ensi yoonayoona.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Amamiro gaabyo gaatengeesa emisingi egy'emiryango gy'eisinzizo, era eisinzizo lyaidhula omwosi." 
Isaiah6:5 Naakoba nti: “Nkagwireku era nfiire nze, kuba kiisi kye ndhogera tiikirongoofu, era n'abantu be ndimu bye boogera tiibirongoofu. Aye ate nze mwene mboine Kyabazinga Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Agho ekindi ku bitonde kyaguluka, kyaidha ye ndi nga kiri n'eryanda eririku omuliro, lye kyatoola ku alutaari nga kikozesa entooleso." 
Isaiah6:7 Kyansiinha ku munwa n'eryanda eryo nga kikoba kiti: “Eryanda lino nga bwe likusiinhie ku munwa, omusango gukutooleibwaku, n'ebibi byo bisoniyiibwa.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Agho naawulira amamiro ga Musengwa Katonda ng'akoba ati: “Naani ye nnaatuma? Naani anaaba omukwenda waife?” Naakoba nti: “Nze ndi ghano, tuma nze.”" 
Isaiah6:9 Yankoba ati: “Ja okobe abantu abo oti, ‘Okuwulira muliwulira, aye timuja kutegeera naire, n'okubona mulibona, aye timuja kwekalirisa naire.’ ”" 
Isaiah6:10 Era yankoba ati: “Kalangusa emyoyo gy'abantu bano, osembe n'amatu gaibwe, otulughaze n'amaiso gaibwe; kuba tomanha bwe babona n'amaiso gaibwe, ni bawulira na matu gaibwe, era ni bategeera na myoyo gyaibwe, ni bakyuka ni mbawonia.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Nze naabuuza nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, ekyo kiriba kityo kumala kiseera ki?” Yandhiramu ati: “Okutuusa ng'ebibuga bifuuse bifulukwa, nga tibikaalimu bantu babibaamu, n'amayumba nga tigakaalimu bantu, n'ensi ng'ezikiriire okuweekereragho." 
Isaiah6:12 Nze Musengwa Katonda nditoola abantu naabatwala eghala einho, ebifulukwa byaba kamaala mu nsi eyo." 
Isaiah6:13 Era ni bwe ghalisigalagho mu nsi eyo omuntu omulala omulala ku buli bantu eikumi, yeena alizikirizibwa kabiri, yaaba ng'oti n'ekikolo eky'omuti omukologho, ekisigalagho nga gutemeibwagho.” Ekikolo ekyo n'ekiba ensigo kwe gusibukira." 
Isaiah7:1 Mu biseera Ahazi mutabane wa Yothamu era mwidhukulu wa Uzzia bye yafugiramu Buyudaaya, Rezini kyabazinga wa Siria, ni Peka mutabane wa Remalia era kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, baalumba Yerusalemu aye kyabalema okughangula." 
Isaiah7:2 Kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya bwe yawulira nga Abasiria beeyimbye n'Abaefuraimu, agho mwene ghalala n'abantu be emyoyo gyabatengera ng'oti n'emiti egy'omu kibira bwe gitengeeta n'empewo." 
Isaiah7:3 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Isaia ati: “Ja ni mutabane wo Sheari Yashubu, ye kyabazinga Ahazi agho gha mweta oguleeta amaadhi okuva mu nsulo y'eitale eri ku ngira enene eja mu kifo ekyetebwa Ekyolezo." 
Isaiah7:4 Omukobe oti, ‘Guma obe mwikaikamu, otatya era otawaamu maani. Obusungu obubitirivu obwa Rezini, n'obw'Abasiria, n'obwa Peka mutabane wa Remalia, buli ng'oti mwosi bwosi oguva ku buti obubiri obunioka." 
Isaiah7:5 Siria ni Isiraeli ghalala ni kyabazinga waayo, bakusaliire olukwe, nga" 
Isaiah7:6 benda baidhe balumbe Buyudaaya bagitiisetiise bagighangule, era bateegho mutabane wa Tabeeli abe kyabazinga waayo." 
Isaiah7:7 “‘Aye nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti ekyo tikiidha kubaagho, era tikiidha kutuukirira naire" 
Isaiah7:8 kuba Rezini afuga Siria yonka n'ekibuga kyayo ekikulu Damasiko. Ate mu myaka nkaaga n'etaanu, Isiraeli eriba yeekutwirekutwiremu nga tekaali ighanga irala." 
Isaiah7:9 Ekibuga ekikulu ekya Isiraeli kiri Samaria, era Peka mutabane wa Remalia ni kyabazinga wa Isiraeli. “‘Bwe muliroba okwikiriza, timuligumiragho ni mukakasibwa.’”" 
Isaiah7:10 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaagheereza Ahazi obukwenda obundi ng'amukoba ati: 
Isaiah7:11 “Saba Musengwa Katonda wo akughe akamanhiso, ka kabe nga kava ghansi e magombe oba nga kava ghaigulu mu igulu.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Aye Ahazi yairamu ati: “Tiidha kusaba kamanhiso, era tiidha kuleba Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Agho Isaia yaakoba ati: “Mbeeni muwulire imwe baidhukulu ba Daudi. Imwe okukooya abantu ababaguminkiriza tikibamala, memale mwende okukooya ni Katonda wange?" 
Isaiah7:14 Kale ni Musengwa Katonda mwene ku lulwe alibagha akamanhiso, era ni kano: Omughala omwegha alitoola enda, yaazaala omwana omulenzi yaamutuuma eriina Emmanueli" 
Isaiah7:15 Omwana oyo gh'alituukira okwawulagho ekirungi n'ekibi, abantu baliba banhwa mata na kulya mudheenene gwa ndhuki, ng'eyo n'emere yaibwe." 
Isaiah7:16 Era aliba akaali na kwawulagho kirungi na kibi, ng'ensi dha bakyabazinga ababiri ababatiisa dhaamala ira okusigala agho nga ndhereere." 
Isaiah7:17 Musengwa Katonda alikuleetera iwe ebizibu, n'abantu bo, n'ab'endhu ya lata wo, nga tibibangaghooku okuva obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli lwe bweyawula ku bwa Buyudaaya. Kuba aja kubaleetera kyabazinga w'e Assiria." 
Isaiah7:18 “Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, Musengwa Katonda alifuuwa endeka okweta Abamisiri baidhe ng'oti nsowera, nga baviira ku mwiga gw'e Misiri. Era alyeta n'Abassiria baidhe ng'oti ndhuki, nga baviira mu nsi yaibwe." 
Isaiah7:19 Baliidha beeyugha mu biiko, ni mu ntanda edheeyatisa mu mbaale, ni mu bisaka byonabyona eby'amawa, ni mu byayiro byonabyona." 
Isaiah7:20 “Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, Musengwa Katonda alibasala enviiri n'akamwano k'alipangisa okuva ere ng'osomoike omwiga Eufurate oyo nga ni kyabazinga w'e Assiria. Alibasalaku enviiri ku mitwe, n'ebirevu, n'obuviiri obw'oku mibiri gyaimwe." 
Isaiah7:21 “Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, omuntu ni bw'aliba ng'asigaizaagho bwa nte ndala eyonsa ento, n'entaama ibiri bubiri," 
Isaiah7:22 dhiriva amata mangi inho agamumala okunhwa. Bwenebwene kiisi aliba asigaire mu nsi eyo, alinhwanga amata era yaalyanga n'omudheenene gw'endhuki." 
Isaiah7:23 “Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, buli kifo aghaabanga emizabbibu olukumi (1,000), nga buli mulala gujaamu ebitundu bya feeza lukumi, ghalizika ghaameragho nkandwa na mawa." 
Isaiah7:24 Abantu baliidhanga omwo okuyiiga n'obulaso n'obusaale, kuba ensi eyo yoonayoona eriba eidhwire nkandwa na mawa." 
Isaiah7:25 Obusozi bwonabwona abantu bwe baalimangaku buliba buzise na nkandwa na mawa, ng'omuntu atya n'okujaayo. Kiriba nga kifuuse kifo kya kusindikangamu nte na ntaama, dhije dhiriirenga omwo.”" 
Isaiah8:1 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Toola ekipande ekinene okighandiikeku mu nhuguta enene, oti: OMUNHAGO OGW'AMANGU, OKUSWANKULA BYE BANHAGULWIRE" 
Isaiah8:2 Nze ndidha kutaagho Uria kabona ni Zekaria mutabane wa Yeberekia, babe abadhulizi bange abeesigwa, okukakasa ekyo.”" 
Isaiah8:3 Agho naaja naaba ni mukazi wange, yaatoola enda era yaazaala omwana mulenzi. Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Mutuume eriina OMUNHAGO OGW'AMANGU, OKUSWANKULA BYE BANHAGULWIRE" 
Isaiah8:4 kuba omwana oyo aliba akaali na kwega kweta ati ‘Baaba’ oba ati ‘Maama’, ng'obukombe bw'e Damasiko n'ebintu byonabyona Samaria bye yanhaga, byamala ira okutwalibwa kyabazinga w'e Assiria.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze olundi kabiri. 
Isaiah8:6 Yankoba ati: “Abantu bano nga bwe balobye amaadhi ag'akaiga Shiloa agakuuluula empola, aye ni basanhuka olwa Rezini ni Peka mutabane wa Remalia abaidhie okubabeera," 
Isaiah8:7 kale ni bona eno, nze Musengwa Katonda nja kubaleetera amaadhi amangi ate ag'amaani agava mu mwiga Eufurate, oyo nga ni kyabazinga w'e Assiria n'abalwani be boonaboona. Amaadhi ago galiidha gaidhuza emyeta gy'amaadhi egy'omu Buyudaaya mwonamwona, gaakuuluulira ni ku mbali kwagyo." 
Isaiah8:8 Galyeyongera okukuuluulira mu Buyudaaya, gaidhulamu mwonamwona okutuuka ni mu nkoto, gaidhuza n'ensi yoonayoona y'ekoma.” Katonda aba ghalala n'ife." 
Isaiah8:9 Mwesoloze imwe amaghanga, aye balibatentena; mutege kutu imwe mwenamwena ab'omu nsi edh'eghala, mwetegeke okulwana, aye balibatentena; mwetegeke okulwana, aye balibatentena." 
Isaiah8:10 Mukolere ghalala entegeka dhaimwe, aye tidhirituukirizibwa; mwisanie ku kye munaakola, aye tikiidha kutuukirira; kuba Katonda ali ghalala n'ife." 
Isaiah8:11 Musengwa Katonda yandabula inho ng'ansikirira ndobe kujiiranga ku mpisa dha bantu bano. Yaakoba ati: 
Isaiah8:12 “Iwe oteeyimbanga mu nkwe abantu bano dhe bakola, era ebyo bye batya iwe otabityanga naire, waire okuwaamu omwoyo." 
Isaiah8:13 Mumanhe nga nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ndi mutukuvu. Ninze ye mube mutyenga era mumpenga ekitiisa. 
Isaiah8:14 Ninze ekifo ekitukuvu mwe muliwonera. Aye ab'omu bwakyabazinga bwombi, obwa Isiraeli n'obwa Buyudaaya, nga kw'otaire n'abatyamye b'omu Yerusalemu, ndibafuukira eibaale kwe beekontola n'ekitimuguunha kwe beeguunha ni bagwa, era naabafuukira olutuula olubagemya." 
Isaiah8:15 Bwenebwene bangi abalineeguunhaku ni bagwa, ni bategebwa olutuula ni lubagemya.”" 
Isaiah8:16 Imwe abeegeresebwa bange mugumire ku bye mbasikiriire era mukalangukire ku bye mbeegereisa. 
Isaiah8:17 Ndidha kuteegerera Musengwa Katonda atubeere, waire nga mpegaano yeegisiisa ku bantu be. Oyo nze ye ndidha okusuubiriramu." 
Isaiah8:18 Bona eno, Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye era atyama ku kityamo kye ku lusozi Sioni, yatutaagho nze n'abaana bange tube obumanhiso n'ebyamagero mu Isiraeli." 
Isaiah8:19 Kale batabakobanga bati: “Mwebuuze ku basamize n'abalaguzi, abalira ng'oti binhonhi era aboogera obwama.” Timwidhi ng'abantu bagwaine kwebuuza ku Katonda waibwe? Ebigema ku balamu ate byebuuzibwa ku bafu?" 
Isaiah8:20 Mubairangamu muti: “Ka twekalangulire ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yatusikirira ni bye yatwegeresa.” Bwenebwene abo abatajiira ku ebyo nga bwe biri, tibalikyesa bwire nga bakaali kufa." 
Isaiah8:21 Era baidha kuyengeeteranga mu nsi nga beeraliikirivu inho, era nga balumwa endhala. Ng'endhala eri kubaluma, baidha kwesinwanga bakolime kyabazinga waibwe ni Katonda waibwe. Ni bwebaliringa ghaigulu batya," 
Isaiah8:22 oba ni balinga ghansi ku itaka, tibalibona kintu kindi naire, okutoolaku enaku n'enzikiiza etiisa, egemye bedimudimu, era mu yeene eyo mwe balibabingira." 
Isaiah9:1 Bazira ngeri ye baliwonamu lunaku lwa kabi olwo. Ebika bya Zebuluni n'ebya Nafutali eira byanhoomebwanga, aye ye bwidha ekiketezo ekyo kiriba kya kitiisa, okuviira irala ku Nhandha Eyaghagati okuja okutuuka e buvandhuba ng'osomoike Yorudani, n'okutuukira irala e Galilaaya abamaghanga agandi ye baba." 
Isaiah9:2 Abantu abaabanga mu nzikiiza, baboine obutangaavu bungi; abo abaabanga mu nzikiiza eri bedimudimu ng'oti n'ey'e magombe, ekimulika kibaakiire." 
Isaiah9:3 Oleeteire abantu okweyongera obungi mu ighanga, waabaleetera okweyongera okusangaala. Basagambira mu maiso go ng'oti bwe basagamba mu makungula, oba ng'oti n'abantu bwe basagamba nga bagabana omunhago." 
Isaiah9:4 Kuba obatoireku obuzito obwabavunanga, waamenhamenha emiigo gye baabakubisanga ku mabega, waaghangula amaghanga agaatuntuzanga abantu bo, ng'oti ni bwe waghangula Abamidia." 
Isaiah9:5 Engaito dh'abaisirukale abayoolooka okwidha okulumba, n'ebivaalo byaibwe bye bafuusefuuse mu musaayi, birifuulibwa nku byayokebwa omuliro." 
Isaiah9:6 Kuba ife omwana atuzaaliirwa, omwana omulenzi atugheereibwa, aidha okubanga omufuzi waife. Aidha kwetebwanga “Omuwi w'Amagezi Eyeewuunhisa, Katonda ow'Obuyinza, Iseife aligho ebyanda n'ebyanda, Omulangira Aleeta Emiraala”." 
Isaiah9:7 Obufuzi bwe bwidha kweyongeranga aghazira kukoma emiraala mu bwakyabazinga bwe gyeyongerenga aghazira kusalaku. Alifuga ng'omusika wa Daudi, obuyinza bwe nga bujiira ku kukola mazima na butuufu, okuva mpegaano n'okutuusa ebyanda n'ebyanda. Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye aidha kutuukiriza ekyo." 
Isaiah9:8 Musengwa Katonda yalabula baidhukulu ba Yakobo, yaasalira eighanga Isiraeli omusango." 
Isaiah9:9 Abantu boonaboona ab'omu Isiraeli n'abatyamye b'omu Samaria balimanha. Buti beekuluntaza era beesaakiriza nga bakoba bati: 
Isaiah9:10 “Ebizimbe by'amatoofaali bigwire, aye twidha kubizimbisa mabaale geene amabaadhe. Emiti emisikamore bagitemye, aye mu kifo kyagyo twidha kwizaagho mivule gyene.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda ky'aliva n'asiikuula abazigu ba Rezini, n'abaleetera okulumba Isiraeli." 
Isaiah9:12 Abasiria baliva e buvandhuba n'Abafilisiti baava e bugwandhuba, baayasamya eminwa gyaibwe okumira Isiraeli. Aye waire ng'ebyo bimaze okubaagho, obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda oyo bulisigala nga bukaaligho. Era alisigala ng'akaagalwire omukono gwe okubabonereza." 
Isaiah9:13 Waire nga Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yabonereza Abaisiraeli, aye era Abaisiraeli abo tibeeneniaku, waire okukyuka okwira y'ali." 
Isaiah9:14 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda oyo ky'aliva n'abonereza ensi Isiraeli ku lunaku lulala luti, ebe ng'oti n'ekitonde kye batemyeku omutwe n'omukira, oba ng'ekimera kye batemyeku ensaga n'emizi;" 
Isaiah9:15 omutwe ogwo nga n'abantu abakaire era ab'ebitiibwa, ate omukira nga n'abalanzi abeegeresa eby'obuguya." 
Isaiah9:16 Abakulembeze ab'abantu bano babakiidhamya bukiidhamye, era baabaleetera okudaaliimira irala." 
Isaiah9:17 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda talireka abaana baibwe abaakaisuka kuwonagho, waire okusaasira banamwandu baibwe oba abaana baibwe bamulekwa; kuba abantu boonaboona tibatya Katonda, bakola ebibi era boogerayogera eby'ekisiru. Aye waire ng'ebyo bimaze okubaagho, obusungu bwe bwidha kusigala nga bukaaligho. Era asigale ng'akaagalwire omukono gwe okubabonereza." 
Isaiah9:18 Ebyonoono by'abantu byokya ng'oti muliro, ogusaaniagho enkandwa n'amawa; ni gumamula ebibira, ni guvaamu ebire eby'omwosi ebiri ng'oti mpango, era ni gunioka nga guja ghaigulu." 
Isaiah9:19 Olw'ekiruyi Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ky'ali nakyo, ensi ekunaine omuliro, abantu baaba ng'oti n'enku dhe guli kwokya, ghaabulagho omuntu waire omulala ati asaasiraku muganda we n'aloba kumukola kabi." 
Isaiah9:20 Abantu balinhakula buli ghantu mu nsi eyo aye nga tibamatira, era baalya buli kamere ke balyagaana ghano ni ghale aye nga tibaiguta. Balituuka n'okulya abaana abaibwe beene." 
Isaiah9:21 Abamanasse n'Abaefuraimu balirwanagana beene na beene, ate baamala beeyimba okulwanisa ab'ekika kya Yuda. Aye waire ng'ebyo bimaze okubaagho, obusungu bwe bwidha kusigala nga bukaaligho. Era asigale ng'akaagalwire omukono gwe okubabonereza." 
Isaiah10:1 Mukagwireku imwe abataagho amateeka agatakolera ku mazima, ni mutaagho ebighandiiko ebireetera abantu okutuntuzibwa." 
Isaiah10:2 Mulemesa abanaku okusalirwa emisango mu mazima, mwalemya abaavu okukolerwa ebituufu bye bagwaniire, mwanhaga ebintu bya banamwandu, n'ebya bamulekwa mwabinhaagaana." 
Isaiah10:3 Mulikola mutya ku lunaku Musengwa Katonda lw'alibabonerezaaku, n'abatuusaaku akabi akaliva mu nsi ey'eghala? Mulirumukira y'ani okubayamba? Era mulikweka gha obukombe bwaimwe?" 
Isaiah10:4 Muliba nga muzira kindi kya kukola okutoolaku okutwalibwa mu busibe, oba okwitibwa mu lutalo. Aye waire ng'ebyo bimaze okubaagho, obusungu bwe bwidha kusigala nga bukaaligho. Era asigale ng'akaagalwire omukono gwe okubabonereza." 
Isaiah10:5 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Assiria, n'omwigo gwe ngema nga nsungughaire, gwe nkozesa okubonereza abo be ndiku n'ekiruyi." 
Isaiah10:6 Ndituma Assiria oyo okulumba eighanga eritantya, era naamulagira okulwanisa abantu abandeeteire okusungughala. Ndimutuma yaanhaga ebintu by'abantu abo, era yaabatyankirira ng'oti bityanka bya mu nguudo." 
Isaiah10:7 Aye nze bye nhenda Assiria oyo akole, ti n'ebiri mu ntegeka dhe, era bizira mu bidhuubo bye naire. By'alowoozaaku n'okuzikiriza n'okusaaniagho amaghanga kamaala." 
Isaiah10:8 Yeesuuta ati, ‘Kiisi muduumizi wa magye gange yeenayeena, aba kyabazinga mulamba." 
Isaiah10:9 Naghangula ekibuga Kalino ng'oti ni bwe naghangula ekibuga Karikemishi, naaghangula ni Hamathi ng'oti ni bwe naghangula Arupadi, era naaghangula ni Samaria ng'oti ni bwe naghangula Damasiko." 
Isaiah10:10 Era naghaguza naalumba ensi dha bakyabazinga edhisinza ebifaananie ebibaadhe ebikologho okusinga n'ebyo ebyali mu Yerusalemu ni mu Samaria. 
Isaiah10:11 Nga bwe nazikiriza Samaria n'ebisinzibwa byamu ebitali Katonda, era ntyo bwe ndizikiriza Yerusalemu n'ebifaananie byamu ebisinzibwa.’" 
Isaiah10:12 “Aye Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: ‘Bwe ndimala okukola ekyo kye ndi n'okukola ku Lusozi Sioni ni ku Yerusalemu, ndibonereza kyabazinga w'e Assiria olw'okwesuuta n'okwekuluntaza.’”" 
Isaiah10:13 Kyabazinga oyo yeesuuta ati, “Ebyo nze nabikola lwa maani gange, na lwa magezi gange, kuba ndi mugezigezi. Namala okutoolagho ensalosalo edh'amaghanga, naanhagulula eby'obukombe byago, naadhooga abantu baago, naabatoola ku bityamo eby'obwakyabazinga ng'oti nte nume etyankirira isubi." 
Isaiah10:14 Nayagaana amaghanga nga gali ng'oti kisu kya nhonhi, naasoloza obukombe bwago ng'oti n'ali kusoloza amagi ge balese obwagho, nga ghazira na nhonhi epapazaaku ighagha kuntiisa, waire okwasamya omunwa n'ekyolya okunzindula.”" 
Isaiah10:15 Aye Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Empasa esobola okwesuuta eti n'esinga ole agitemesa? Oba, omusumeeni gusobola okwekuluntaliza ku muntu ali kugusaza? Ate oba oluga ti n'oluwuuba ole alugemye, oba omwigo okubbeeda omuntu atali kiti!”" 
Isaiah10:16 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye alisindika obulwaire bwagoogombya abalwani ba kyabazinga w'Assiria abageedhu obukalamu, yaabaleetera okukyemuka mu mibiri ng'oti bwa muliro." 
Isaiah10:17 Musengwa Katonda oyo eitaala lya Isiraeli aliba omuliro, Katonda oyo Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli yaaba enimi edh'omuliro; ogulyokya ni gusaaniagho mu lunaku olulala, abo boonaboona abali ng'oti n'amawa n'enkandwa." 
Isaiah10:18 Musengwa Katonda alizikiriza ebibira ebyesiimisa Assiria, n'amasamba amagimu, ng'oti n'obulwaire namusiza bwe bugoogombya omuntu n'aweekereragho." 
Isaiah10:19 Emiti egirisigalagho mu kibira ekyo giriba mitono inho, nga n'omwana omuto asobola okugibala." 
Isaiah10:20 Mu kiseera ekyo, Abaisiraeli baidhukulu ba Yakobo abalisigalagho nga n'abawoniegho, baliba nga tibakeesiga ighanga eryo eryabaghangula, aye nga mu mazima beesiga Musengwa Katonda, Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah10:21 Abatono abo abaliwonagho, baliira eri Katonda ow'amaani." 
Isaiah10:22 Waire nga mpegaano Abaisiraeli bali kamaala ng'oti n'omusenho bwe guba ku mbali okw'enhandha, aye batono abaliwonagho ni baira. Katonda yasalagho bazikirizibwe, ng'ekyo n'ekibagwaniire." 
Isaiah10:23 Bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye aja kuleeta okuzikirira mu ighanga lyonalyona, nga bwe yategeka okukola." 
Isaiah10:24 Kale Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Imwe abantu bange ababa mu Sioni, mutatya Bassiria bwe babaswanhula era ni babakuba emiigo ng'Abamisiri bwe baakolanga" 
Isaiah10:25 kuba akaseera kasigaireyo katono inho, ndekere agho okubabonereza imwe, obusungu bwange mbwolekeze beene, mbazikirize." 
Isaiah10:26 Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ndibakuba abo naababonereza nga bwe naitira Abamidia ku lubaale lw'e Orebu. Ndiita Abassiria abo nga bwe naitira Abamisiri mu nhandha. 
Isaiah10:27 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, imwe ndibatoola mu buyinza bw'Abassiria, naabatwikula n'obuzito bwe baabatwikanga, naazikiriza ebikoligo ebibali ku mabega.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Omuzigu atuuse mu kibuga Ayi, yaabitira mu Miguroni, era ebintu bye yaabitereka e Mikamashi." 
Isaiah10:29 Bamaze okubita aghaingirirwa, baaja baasula e Geba. Ab'omu kibuga Rama bali kudhugumira olw'okutya, ab'omu kibuga kya kyabazinga Saulo eky'e Gibea balumwike." 
Isaiah10:30 Mwasiikane imwe ab'e Gallimu! Muntegere kutu imwe ab'e Laisha! Mundhiremu imwe ab'e Anathothi! 
Isaiah10:31 Ab'e Madumena balumwike, n'ab'e Gebimu bali kunoonia ye banaalumukira okuwona." 
Isaiah10:32 Olwaleero omuzigu aidha kuba e Nobu, ali kwesoomera Olusozi Sioni nga yeesumba ekibuga Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Bona eno, Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye alibaghanulayo ng'oti n'olusaga olutemeibwa ku muti ni lugwa. Abaleeyi abaawaiguka alibasuula ghansi, n'abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu yaabaisa." 
Isaiah10:34 Musengwa Katonda alibatema n'empasa ng'oti n'atema emiti mu kibira ghagati, n'agwisa n'emiti emirungi egy'e Lebanoni." 
Isaiah11:1 Ng'olusaga bwe lusibukira ku kikonge ky'omuti ogutemeibwa, ni mu baidhukulu ba Yesse mutyo bwe mulisimukamu kyabazinga." 
Isaiah11:2 Omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gulimubaaku, gwamugha amagezi n'okutegeera, era gwamulamba yaafuna amaani, agalimusobozesa okumanha Musengwa Katonda." 
Isaiah11:3 Era aidha kusanhukiranga mu kutya Musengwa Katonda. Taasalenga misango ng'ajiira ku by'abona obubone oba ku by'awulira obuwulire. 
Isaiah11:4 Aye aidha kusalanga emisango gy'abaavu mu butuufu, era akolerenga abaziraku bwogereso ebyo bye bagwaniire okukolerwa. Aliragira bulagire, abantu mu nsi baabonerezebwa, era ababi baitibwa." 
Isaiah11:5 Aidha kufuganga mu butuufu ni mu bwesigwa. 
Isaiah11:6 Emisege n'entaama ento biidha kubanga ghalala mu miraala, empala n'embuzi ento birambaalenga ghalala, n'empologoma ento ebenga ghalala n'ente empiite, omwana omuto nga n'ali kubyaya." 
Isaiah11:7 Ente n'ebisolo ebikambwe binaaliranga ghalala, n'abaana baabyo baalambaalanga ghalala. N'empologoma dhinaalyanga isubi ng'oti nte." 
Isaiah11:8 Omwana akaayonka aidha kuzaanhiranga ku kiina eky'omusota ogw'obusagwa, n'omwana ye baakaziza amabeere aidha kutanga omukono mu kiina omuli ekiyiri." 
Isaiah11:9 Ku Sioni olusozi lwa Katonda olutukuvu, tikulibaaku kintu kizikiriza kiinaakyo waire okukituusaaku obulumi; kuba ensi eriidhula okumanha Musengwa Katonda, ng'oti n'enhandha bw'eidhula amaadhi." 
Isaiah11:10 Olunaku lwidha kutuuka, oyo asimuka mu Yesse abe akamanhiso eri amaghanga. Amaghanga ago galyesolokeza gh'ali, era ekifo mw'alifugira kiriba kya kitiisa." 
Isaiah11:11 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, Musengwa Katonda aliiramu okukozesa obuyinza bwe, yaiza abantu be abaliba bawoniegho, yaabatoola mu Assiria, ni mu Misiri, ni mu Pathirosi, ni mu Ethiopia, ni mu Elamu, ni mu Shinari, ni mu Hamathi, ni mu biketezo eby'oku nhandha." 
Isaiah11:12 Musengwa Katonda alighanikira amaghanga bendera, yaagamanhisa nga bw'ali kusoloza abantu abaabingibwa mu Isiraeli ni mu Buyudaaya, abatoole eyo ye baabasansaaniza mu ndhuyi eina edh'ensi." 
Isaiah11:13 Ensaalwa ya Isiraeli eriwaagho, n'abazigu ba Buyudaaya baazikirizibwa; obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli tibuligemerwa nsaalwa bwakyabazinga bwa Buyudaaya, era Abayudaaya tibalikiriga Baisiraeli." 
Isaiah11:14 Balyeyimba ghalala baalumba Abafilisiti e bugwandhuba, era baaja baanhagulula abantu b'e buvandhuba. Balighangula Abaedomu n'Abamoabu, n'Abammoni boona balibagondera." 
Isaiah11:15 Musengwa Katonda alikozesa empewo ye ebabula yaakaza ekikono ky'enhandha y'e Misiri; era yaasonka omukono gwe ku mwiga Eufurate, yaagwawulamu obwiga musanvu, abantu bwe basobola okusomoka nga tibabozeeku naire." 
Isaiah11:16 Ghalibaagho oluguudo abantu be Abaisiraeli abaliwonagho mwe balibita nga bava mu Assiria, ng'oti ni bwe ghaaligho oluguudo Abaisiraeli mwe baabita nga bava mu Misiri." 
Isaiah12:1 Olunaku olwo bwerulituuka, abantu balyemba bati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nze ndidha kukusiimanga. Waire nga wali onsungughaliire, obusungu bwo bwamala bwawaagho, wangumya." 
Isaiah12:2 Bona, Musengwa Katonda n'omulokozi wange; ndidha kumwesiganga nga ghazira kye ntya. Musengwa Katonda oyo n'amaani gange, oyo n'olwembo lwange, era n'omulokozi wange." 
Isaiah12:3 Ng'amaadhi amalungi bwe gasanhusa abali endiwo, n'abantu ba Katonda batyo bwe basagamba nga Katonda abalokoire.”" 
Isaiah12:4 Ku lunaku olwo mulikoba muti: “Musiime Musengwa Katonda, mumusaake. Mumanhise amaghanga goonagoona by'akola, mubakobere nga bw'ali omukologho." 
Isaiah12:5 Mwembe nga musaaka Musengwa Katonda olw'eby'amaani by'akoze, mubimanhise ensi yoonayoona." 
Isaiah12:6 Mwembe mukube n'emizira imwe abatyamye b'omu Sioni, kuba Katonda oyo Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli mukologho era aba ghalala n'imwe abantu be.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku Babiloni, Isaia mutabane wa Amozi bwe yafuna mu kubonekerwa." 
Isaiah13:2 “Mughanike bendera ey'olutalo ku lusozi oluziraku isubi naire. Mukaabuke mwete abaisirukale, mubaghemye n'emikono baje ku miryango gy'ekibuga ekirimu abakungu, bakirumbe bakingire." 
Isaiah13:3 Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene ninze ndagiire abalonde bange, abalwani bange abo ab'amaani mbeese okubonereza abo be nsungughaliire.”" 
Isaiah13:4 Muwulire akasasamalo akali ku lusozi ng'oti n'amamiro ag'olukunkumuli lw'abantu. Muwulire okwasiikana okw'obwakyabazinga, okwasiikana okw'amaghanga agali kwesoloza. Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ali kusoloza eigye okulwana olutalo." 
Isaiah13:5 Bava mu maghanga ag'eghala ere ensi y'ekanga. Musengwa Katonda ali kwidha n'obusungu okuzikiriza ensi yoonayoona. 
Isaiah13:6 Muwowoole amaziga kuba olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda luli kumpi; olunaku oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona lw'alireeteraku okuzikirira. 
Isaiah13:7 Emikono egya buli muntu girinafugha, abantu boonaboona emyoyo gyabatekemuka." 
Isaiah13:8 Abantu baliidhula okutya baaba n'obulumi, ng'oti n'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala. Baliringaganaku mu kutya, nga buli muntu ensoni dhimugemye." 
Isaiah13:9 Bona, olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda luli kwidha! Ku lunaku olwo aliraga ekiruyi n'obusungu obubitiriire, yaaleka ensi ng'eri bwa bifulukwa byereere era yaasaaniagho abakozi b'ebibi boonaboona mu nsi." 
Isaiah13:10 Emuunienie edha buli nsambo ku igulu dhirirekera agho okwaka, endhuba yaagema enzikiiza ng'eri kuvaayo, n'omwezi gwaloba kwaka." 
Isaiah13:11 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndisindika ekibamba ku nsi, naabonereza abantu olw'ebibi byaibwe. Ndiisa ghansi abo abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu, naabonereza abo abeekuluntaza n'abakola ebikolwa eby'obukambwe." 
Isaiah13:12 Abo abaliwonagho ndibafuula ba mughendo okusinga zaabu omukenenule; bwenebwene baliba ba ibula okusinga ni zaabu omulungi ow'e Ofiri. 
Isaiah13:13 Ku lunaku nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye lwe ndiragiraku obusungu obubitirivu, ndidhugumiza eigulu, n'ensi yaaseetuka okuva mu kifo kyayo." 
Isaiah13:14 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, abasenze abaliba mu Babiloni balirumuka okwirayo ewaibwe, ng'oti n'empuli dhe bali kuyiiga, era baasansaana ng'oti n'entaama edhiziraku mwayi, buli muntu yaira mu bantu be." 
Isaiah13:15 Kiisi ye baligwikiriza alifumitibwa, na kiisi ye baligemyaku aliitibwa n'empiima." 
Isaiah13:16 Abaana baibwe abaghere balibakuba ghansi, baabamanhiangula okutuusa okufa, nga balingiriire bulingirire. Endhu dhaibwe balidhinhagululamu ebintu, ni bakazi baibwe baabagema baabakaka.”" 
Isaiah13:17 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona, nja kubaghendulira Abamedi abatafa ku feeza waire okusendebwasendebwa ni zaabu, baidhe babalumbe babalwanise." 
Isaiah13:18 Balikozesa obulaso bwaibwe okutirimbula abaisuka, aghazira kusaasira baana bato, waire okusonigha abaana abaghere." 
Isaiah13:19 Waire obwakyabazinga bwa Babilonia n'obusingamu okuba obw'ekitiisa era obweyagaza inho abantu baayo, nze Musengwa Katonda ndibuzikiriza ng'oti ni bwe nazikiriza Sodoma ni Gomorra." 
Isaiah13:20 Tikiriiramu kabiri kubaamu bantu. Tighalibaagho Muwarabu asimbayo weema, waire okubaagho omwayi ayayirayo ebyayo bye." 
Isaiah13:21 Ensolo edh'omu nsiko n'edhinaabanga eyo, n'endhu dhaabyo dhinaidhulanga ebintu ebirira. Era maaya dhinaabanga eyo, n'emisambwa gyakiniranga eyo." 
Isaiah13:22 Empiti dhinaabwigukiranga mu minaala gyayo, n'ebibe byaboigokeranga mu ndhu dhaayo enkalamu. Ekiseera kya Babiloni eky'enkomerero kituuse! Enaku dhaakyo dhinaatera okuwaaku!”" 
Isaiah14:1 Musengwa Katonda aliiramu okugemerwa Abaisiraeli ekivunika, yaabalonda kabiri okuba abantu be. Era alibaizaayo mu nsi yaibwe, baaba omwo. N'abasenze baliidha baabeeyimbaku, baabanga ghalala ni baidhukulu ba Yakobo abo." 
Isaiah14:2 Amaghanga kamaala galiyamba Abaisiraeli okwirayo mu nsi yaibwe, Musengwa Katonda ye yabagha. Era abamaghanga agandi balifuuka bairu ba Baisiraeli abo, baabagheerezanga. Olwo abo abaatwala Abaisiraeli nga banhage baaba nga bafuulibwa okuba abanhage ab'Abaisiraeli abo. Era Abaisiraeli abo balifuganga abo abaabatuntuzanga." 
Isaiah14:3 Musengwa Katonda alireetera Abaisiraeli okuwona obulumi n'okudaazibwadaazibwa, n'emirimo egy'olukako gye baabakozesanga." 
Isaiah14:4 Musengwa Katonda bw'alituukiriza ekyo, Abaisiraeli baliyeeyereza kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, nga bakoba bati: “Omufuzi kaabuluuku akomye, n'obukambwe bwe tibukaaligho!" 
Isaiah14:5 Musengwa Katonda atoiregho abafuzi ob'omwoyo ogw'ekyoniyoni, yaatoolagho obufuzi bwaibwe," 
Isaiah14:6 abo abaatuntuzanga abantu n'obukambwe aghazira kusalaku, ni bafuganga amaghanga n'ekiruyi, nga bagakiriga akadeeberero." 
Isaiah14:7 Ensi yoonayoona mpegaano efunie obugheereso era etereire, abantu bali mu kusagamba na mu kwemba." 
Isaiah14:8 Emiti emisipuressi gisagambya olw'okugwa kwo iwe kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, n'emivule gy'e Lebanoni gyakoba giti, ‘Kasookanga agwa tighakaaligho atutema!’" 
Isaiah14:9 Abali e magombe bagugumwike okukusangaaza ng'otuuseeyo. Bali kusiikuula bale boonaboona abaliyo abaali abafuzi ku nsi, baidhe okukulamusa. Boonaboona abaali bakyabazinga basitwike ku bityamo byaibwe eby'obwakyabazinga." 
Isaiah14:10 Boonaboona balyogera baakukoba bati, ‘Leero weena amaani gakuwoire, waafuuka munafu ng'oti niife, waatufaananira irala?" 
Isaiah14:11 Ebitiibwa byo n'enhembo dhe baakwemberanga ku ntongooli, byonabyona babiisiisa e magombe. Enhengere buti n'edhifuuse omufaliso gw'osulaku, era dhaafuuka emyebwiko gye weebwika.’" 
Isaiah14:12 Iwe emuunienie eyaka einho ku nkyo, oghanwike ku igulu waagwa! Iwe eyaghangulanga amaghanga, buti osuuliibwa ku itaka!" 
Isaiah14:13 Wakobanga mule oti, ‘Ndidha kuniina mu igulu nte eyo ekityamo kyange eky'obwakyabazinga ere ghaigulu gh'emuunienie dha Katonda. Ndidha kutyama ku lusozi emisambwa lwe gyesolokezaaku, eyo eghala ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba." 
Isaiah14:14 Ndidha kuniina neeruupe okubisa n'ebire, mbeere irala ng'oti n'ole Ali Ghaigulu Yeene.’" 
Isaiah14:15 Aye mperaano bakwisiisa e magombe, ere ghansi ku ntobo yeene ey'olwina." 
Isaiah14:16 Abanaakubonanga ng'oli eyo baidha kukulingiriranga obutatemya, nga beebuuza bati, ‘Bwenebwene ono n'omusaadha ole eyayuuguumyanga ensi era n'adhugumizanga buli bwakyabazinga?" 
Isaiah14:17 Bwenebwene n'ole eyazikirizanga ebibuga, n'ensi n'agifuula eirungu, era ataalekulanga basibe kwirayo waibwe?’" 
Isaiah14:18 Bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'ensi baziikibwa mu bitiibwa, buli kyabazinga mu magombe agage geene." 
Isaiah14:19 Aye iwe bakuswire bw'ere amagombe go ye gatali, ng'oti n'omwana avaamu ng'akaabulaku, ekintu abantu kye batenda naire. Bakubunzeeku emirambo gy'abo abaitiirwa mu lutalo, baakusuula ghalala nagyo mu lwina olw'amabaale, waafuuka omulambo gwe batyankirira n'ebigere." 
Isaiah14:20 Nga bwe wazikiriza ensi yo n'oita abantu bo, toliziikibwa ng'oti ni bakyabazinga baino. Eizaire lyo eikozi ly'ebibi ligwananga lyaweekereragho lyaloba kwidhukirwa." 
Isaiah14:21 Mukole mwite abaana ba kyabazinga oyo olw'ebibi bya badhaadha baibwe, balobe kusituka kutoola nsi efuuke yaibwe, na kugiidhuza yoonayoona bibuga.”" 
Isaiah14:22 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Ndirumba Babiloni naakizikiriza kyerabirwa n'okwerabirwa, ghaabulagho awonagho k'abe omwana oba omwidhukulu. Nze Musengwa Katonda ntyo bwe nkobye." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndikifuula ekifo ekibaamu obw'ebiwigulu n'ebidiba by'amaadhi, era ndikyeya n'olweyo oluzikiriza. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ntyo bwe nkobye.”" 
Isaiah14:24 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yeerayiriire ati: “Bwenebwene nga bwe ntegeike okukola, era bwe kiidha okuba; nga bwe nsazeegho, era bwe kiidha okukolebwa." 
Isaiah14:25 Ndizikiriza Abassiria mu nsi yange, naabatyankirira n'ebigere ku nsozi dhange. Nditoola ku bantu bange ekikoligo eky'Abassiria abo, naabatwikula ebizito bye baabatwikanga." 
Isaiah14:26 Ekyo kye ntegekeire ensi, era buti mmaze okugalula omukono gwange, nja kubonereza amaghanga goonagoona.”" 
Isaiah14:27 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ekyo ky'ategeike, era ghazira asobola kukirobera. Buti amaze okugalula omukono gwe okubonereza, era ghazira asobola kugwizaayo." 
Isaiah14:28 Buno n'obukwenda obwalangibwa mu mwaka kyabazinga Ahazi gwe yafiiramu. 
Isaiah14:29 “Imwe Abafilisiti mwenamwena, mulobe kusanhuka inho waire ng'omwigo ogwabakuba mwenamwena gumenheike; kuba aghabairenga omusota ogwabuliidho, ghaidha kwiragho kiyiri. Era mu igi ly'ekiyiri mulivaamu omusota oguguluka ng'oti nhonhi." 
Isaiah14:30 Musengwa Katonda aligha abaana ababeri ab'abanaku einho eky'okulya, n'abali mu bwetaavu baliba mu miraala. Aye imwe Abafilisiti Musengwa Katonda alibaisa endhala, n'abo abaliba bawoniegho boona alibaita n'obukambwe." 
Isaiah14:31 Imwe Abafilisiti ababa mu bibuga, mulire amaziga! Imwe Abafilisiti mwenamwena, mutekemuke mutye! Enkungu eri ng'oti kire eri kuva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba; eryo nga n'eigye ly'abazigu eriziramu mulwani adhugumira waire omulala ati." 
Isaiah14:32 Kale abakwenda b'eighanga ly'Abafilisiti abaliidha ye tuli tulibairamu tutya? Tulibairamu tuti, ‘Musengwa Katonda yataagho Sioni, era mu Sioni omwo abantu be abadaazibwadaazibwa mwe balirumukira.’ ”" 
Isaiah15:1 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku Moabu. Ebibuga Ari ni Kiri ebya Moabu babizikiriiza mu bwire bulala buti byafuuka bifunfugu, era ensi Moabu yaawolongera." 
Isaiah15:2 Abantu b'e Diboni baniinieniinie, baaja mu bifo ebigulumivu bye basinzizaamu ku busozi, baalirira eyo amaziga. Abamoabu bali kuwowoola amaziga olw'ebibuga Nebo ni Medeba. Basazeeku enviiri ku mitwe gyaibwe baadhimaliriraku ng'oti mpaata, baasalaku n'ebirevu okwoleka nga bwe bali mu nnaku." 
Isaiah15:3 Abantu boonaboona mu nguudo bavaire kutiya olw'enaku; n'abali ghaigulu ku ndhu ni mu mpya edh'ekibuga bali kumagaza maziga meereere nga bawowoola. 
Isaiah15:4 Ab'omu Heshiboni n'ab'omu Eleale bali kukuba bwa mpungu, era amamiro gaibwe gawulikika okutuukira irala e Yahazi. Abaisirukale ba Moabu bali kulira nga baasiikana, n'amaani gabawoiremu." 
Isaiah15:5 Omwoyo guli kuunumira ensi Moabu. Abantu baayo balumukiire e Zoari ni mu Egulathi Shelishiya. Abandi baniinieniinie baaja e Luhithi nga bali kulira amaziga. N'abandi baagema engira ey'e Horonaimu, nga bali kuwowoola ebitaloodheka." 
Isaiah15:6 Akaiga Nimurimu kakaze, eisubi ku mbali kwako liniaire, ghazira ito likaameraku naire, n'ebimera byonabyona biweekereiregho." 
Isaiah15:7 Abantu bali kubitira mu kyetebwa Ekiiko ky'obuti obukulira ku mbali kw'omwiga, nga batwala ebintu byaibwe ebingi bye babaire nabyo ni bye baatereka." 
Isaiah15:8 Ensi Moabu yoonayoona eidhwire kuwowoola maziga, era okuwowoola okwo kuwulikika okutuukira irala mu kibuga Egulaimu, era kwatuuka ni mu kibuga Beerelimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Amaadhi g'e Diboni gaidhwire musaayi, aye era nze Musengwa Katonda ndireetayo n'akabi akandi ku bantu baayo: Empologoma dhirirya Abamoabu boonaboona abaliba basigairegho nga bawoniegho." 
Isaiah16:1 Abantu b'e Moabu baatoola entaama ento okuva mu kibuga Sela ekiri mu irungu, baadhigheereza ng'ekirabo, eri oyo afuga mu Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah16:2 Abamoabu abo buti bali ku kifo abantu ghe basomokera omwiga Arunoni. Bali kupapala nga baguluka ng'oti n'enhonhi dhe babinze mu kisu ni dhisansaana. 
Isaiah16:3 Bali kukoba ab'omu Buyudaaya bati: “Mutughe ku magezi, mutukobere eky'okukola. Mukingirize akabi kalobe kututuukaku ng'oti n'omuti bwe gutaagho ekinsense mu kasana ghagati. Mutuleke twewogome mu kinsense ekyo. Ife tuli kunoonia bubudamo mutukweke aghantu ghe bataatubone." 
Isaiah16:4 Mutuleke tusenge mu nsi yaimwe, mutuwonie oyo ali kwenda okutuzikiriza; kuba oyo atunhigiriza alituusa ekiseera yaavaagho, yaalekera agho okutuzikiriza. Oyo atutyankirira n'ebigere aliva mu nsi yaife." 
Isaiah16:5 Olwo omuntu ow'oku lulyo lwa Daudi, alityama ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, yaafuga abantu n'ekisa ng'abagonza obutalekera era nga tasaliriza. Aliba mwangu mu kukola ebituufu ng'akolera ku mazima.”" 
Isaiah16:6 Aye ab'omu Buyudaaya bakoba bati: “Twawulira ira okwekuluntaza kw'Abamoabu, n'okwebona bonka. Era twidhi nga bwe beetwala okuba aba ghaigulu nga beepankapanka. Aye ebyo bye beesaakiriza nabyo bya bwereere.”" 
Isaiah16:7 Abamoabu baliwowoola amaziga olw'okudaagadaaga okutakobeka, n'abantu boonaboona baawowoola ku lwa Moabu. Balirira nga baidhukiire emere enungi, ye baalyanga mu kibuga Kiriharesethi era balituuka n'okuwaamu eisuubi." 
Isaiah16:8 Amasamba g'e Heshiboni gakaze, n'emizabbibu gy'e Sibima gyona gikaze, gye baakunhangamu omwenge ogwatamiizanga abafuzi b'amaghanga. Amasamba g'emizabbibu egyo nga gaja gaatuukira irala e Yezeri, gaava eyo gaatuuka ku irungu, era gaava eyo gaabitira ku luuyi olundi, gaatuuka ere ku Nhandha Eyomuunhu." 
Isaiah16:9 Mpegaano ndi kulira olw'emizabbibu egy'e Yazeri era naalira n'emizabbibu egy'e Sibima; era ndi kumagaza amaziga olwa Heshiboni ni Eleale, kuba amakungula g'ebibala byaimwe gamiriibwa olutalo." 
Isaiah16:10 Tighakaaligho muntu asanhukiraku mu masamba ago amagimu, waire okwemberaku enhembo mu mizabbibu, oba okwasiikaniramu. Ghazira akunha mizabbibu kugikolamu mwenge, era emizira gy'abakunhi ngikomiiza." 
Isaiah16:11 Kyenva ni ngegenga olwa Moabu, era ni ndira enaku olwa Kiriheresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Abamoabu beekooyeza bwereere okuja mu bifo ebigulumivu bye basinzizaamu, okusaba emisambwa gyaibwe. Ghazira kye baliganhulwamu naire." 
Isaiah16:13 Obwo n'obukwenda obugema ku Moabu, Musengwa Katonda bwe yayogera." 
Isaiah16:14 Aye mpegaano Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mu myaka esatu gyonka, ebitiibwa bya Moabu biriba nga tibikaaligho. Ku bantu baakyo waire nga bangi batyo, batono bati n'abalisigalagho ate nga tibakaali na maani naire.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku Damasiko. Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona, Damasiko kija kulekera agho okuba ekibuga, kifuuke bwa mmungo dha bifunfugu." 
Isaiah17:2 Ebibuga by'e Aroeri biidha kusigala nga biziramu bantu ebyanda n'ebyanda. Biidha kubanga byayiro bya ntaama na mbuzi, dhibenga omwo nga ghazira adhitiisa naire." 
Isaiah17:3 Ensi Isiraeli eriba nga tekaali na bifo bya kwewogomamu kwewonia bazigu, ni Damasiko nga tikikaali na bwakyabazinga. Abasiria abaliwonagho baliswala inho ng'oti n'Abaisiraeli. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ntyo bwe nkobye.”" 
Isaiah17:4 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, ebitiibwa by'ensi Isiraeli birikendeera, era mu kifo ky'okukombaghala, eryavughala bwavughale."
