Isaiah17:5 Isiraeli eriba ng'oti n'enimiro ye bakesiisaamu engaano, era eriba ng'oti n'eisamba ly'omu kiiko ky'e Refa, lye bamaze okukesaamu ni balondereramu ebikeseibwa okubimaliriramu." 
Isaiah17:6 Abantu abalisigalagho mu Isiraeli baliba batono inho, ng'oti n'omuti omwoliva gwe banozeeku emyoliva, ni gusigazaaku ebiri oba esatu ghaigulu ku busanso bw'ensaga obusembayo, oba ni gusigazaaku ena oba etaanu ku nsaga dhaagwo edha ghansinsi. Nze Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli ntyo bwe nkobye." 
Isaiah17:7 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, abantu balita omwoyo ku Mutonzi waibwe, n'amaiso baagakyukiza eri oyo Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Balirekera agho okufangayo einho ku alutaari dhe beekolera beene n'engalo edhaibwe, era baalekera agho okwesiganga ebintu obuntu beene bye beekolera ka bibe ebifaananie bya Ashera omusambwa gwaibwe omukazi, oba alutaari edhiniokezebwaku obubbaani." 
Isaiah17:9 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu biriba ng'oti n'ebifo by'Abahivi n'Abamori bye baalekulira obwagho ni bifuuka ebifulukwa, bwe baali nga bali kulumuka Abaisiraeli." 
Isaiah17:10 Iwe Isiraeli weerabiire Katonda wo akuwonia, waamuvaaku oyo ali ng'oti lubaale mwe weewogoma. Oize mu kusimba nimiro dh'omala n'osengamu emisambwa." 
Isaiah17:11 Aye ebisimbe ni bwe bimereragho ku lunaku lwene lw'obisimbye mu nimiro edho, ni byanizaagho enkyo ly'olunaku lw'obisimbiireku, era tighalibaagho bikungulwa naire, okutoolaku okugemwa obw'enaku n'okulumizibwa okutakoma." 
Isaiah17:12 Ha, wulira abantu abangi nga bwe bali kuwolomboka! Bali kuwolomboka ng'oti nhandha! Ha, wulira empiriito y'amaghanga! Gali kuyoolooka ng'oti n'enhandha eri kwefuukuula!" 
Isaiah17:13 Amaghanga gali kuyoolooka ng'oti n'enhandha eri kwefuukuula. Aye Musengwa Katonda aligadhuuka budhuuke gaalumukagho. Galiba ng'oti bikaba ku lusozi empewo by'efuuwa, era ng'oti n'enkungu eri kwezungululira mu mpewo ey'amaani." 
Isaiah17:14 Eigulo balireetagho okutya okungi, aye bulija okukya enkyo nga babuzeegho. Ebyo n'ebituuka ku abo abatutoolaku ebyaife, era ogwo n'omugabo gw'abo abanhagulula ensi yaife." 
Isaiah18:1 Eruuyi ere ng'osomoike emiiga gy'e Ethiopia, eriyo ensi ewulirwamu okuziinhuuka ng'oti kwa maghagha ga nhonhi." 
Isaiah18:2 Ensi eyo etuma abakwenda baidhire ku mwiga Kiyira, babitire ku maadhi mu maato agaakolebwa mu bitoogo, nga batumiibwa bati: “Muje mangumangu mu nsi yaimwe emiiga ye gyayawulamu, eighanga eryo ery'amaani era eighanguzi. Mutwale obukwenda eri abantu abaleeyi ab'emibiri emighegheevu, abatiibwa ensi yoonayoona." 
Isaiah18:3 Mubakobe muti, ‘Imwe abantu mwenamwena abali mu nsi, mwekalirisenga mubone nga bendera esimbiibwa ku lusozi, era mutegenga kutu muwulire ng'eigwala lifuuye.’" 
Isaiah18:4 Musengwa Katonda ankobye ati aliba mu kifo kye mw'aba, yaalingirira kisiriikiriza ng'oti n'olwota bwe lukunkunira mu kasana akali kwememula, era yaaba ng'oti n'omusulo ogutoonhera mu lwota olw'obwire mu biseera by'amakungula." 
Isaiah18:5 Alizikiriza abalwani b'abantu abo nga bakaali na kulumba, ng'oti n'omuntu bwe yandiidhie ku muti ogumaze okumulisa ekimuli, nga gutaireku n'ebibala era nga biri na kwenga, aye nga bakaali bwa kubinoga, memale n'atema ensaga n'adhighanulayo yoonayoona ye dhaalandira." 
Isaiah18:6 Emirambo gyaibwe baligireka agho okuliibwa enhonhi edh'oku nsozi n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko. Enhonhi dhirirya ku egyo mu biseera eby'endoboozi, n'ensolo dhaalya okwo mu biseera eby'ekiinhogogo.”" 
Isaiah18:7 Abantu abo abaleeyi ab'emibiri emighegheevu, abatiibwa ensi yoonayoona era beene nsi emiiga ye gyayawulamu, eighanga eryo ery'amaani era eighanguzi, ekiseera kiidha kutuuka baleetere Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ebirabo, mu kifo kye bamusinzizaamu ku lusozi Sioni." 
Isaiah19:1 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku Misiri. Bona, Musengwa Katonda atyaime ku kire ekirumuka embiro, ali kukivuga ng'aja e Misiri. Ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda eby'e Misiri bija kudhugumira mu maiso ge, n'Abamisiri emyoyo gija kubatekemuka." 
Isaiah19:2 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndisiikuula Abamisiri baalwanagana beene na beene, aboluganda baalwanagana beene na beene, ab'omuliiraano baalwanagana beene na beene, ebibuga byalwanagana buli kirala ni kiinaakyo, ni bakyabazinga baalwanagana buli mulala ni mwine." 
Isaiah19:3 Ndivuyavuya entegeka dh'Abamisiri, naabaleetera okuwaamu amaani. Balyebuuza ku misambwa, ni ku balogo, ni ku balaguzi, ni ku b'amaghembe." 
Isaiah19:4 Ndighaayo Abamisiri abo, naabataaku omufuzi omukakali kaabuluuku; kyabazinga omukambwe yaabafuga. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ntyo bwe nkobye.”" 
Isaiah19:5 Amaadhi ag'omwiga Kiyira galikendeera, omwiga ogwo gwaja nga guseenena okutuusa okukala." 
Isaiah19:6 Emyala egigufukamu amaadhi giriwunha ekivundu, era gyaja nga giwaamu amaadhi okutuusa okukala, n'ebitoogo byaniala." 
Isaiah19:7 Eisubi n'ebintu ebirimiibwa ku mbali kw'omwiga ogwo biriniala byafa, empewo yaabifuuwa ere." 
Isaiah19:8 Ab'amalobo n'obutimba abavuba ebyenhandha mu mwiga ogwo, balinakughala baalira amaziga." 
Isaiah19:9 Abalusi b'engoye empegheevu n'edha pamba, baliwaamu amaani beinhamira." 
Isaiah19:10 Abakugu mu kuluka ni mu kukola ebintu ebindi balisoberwa, n'abo boonaboona abapangisibwa okukola emirimo baanakughala." 
Isaiah19:11 Abakulembeze b'e Zoani baweereereimu irala amagezi; abawi ba kyabazinga ab'amagezi abo, amagezi ge bamugha ga kisiru, kuba bakana batya bwenebwene ni bamukoba bati mbu beene n'abaana abaasikira abawi b'amagezi ab'eira, era mbu n'abaana abaasikira ni bakyabazinga ab'eira?" 
Isaiah19:12 Iwe kyabazinga w'e Misiri, abagezi abo abakugha amagezi bali gha? Ka bakukobere omanhe, oba nga baidhi akabi ke ntegekeire Misiri nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye." 
Isaiah19:13 Abakulembeze ab'e Zoani baafuuka basiru, n'ab'e Menfisi baabuzibwabuzibwa. Mu kifo ky'okukulembera ensi Misiri, bagireeteire kudaaliima budaaliime." 
Isaiah19:14 Musengwa Katonda abaleeteire okugha abantu amagezi agabawubisawubisa, ekyo kyaleetera ab'omu Misiri okudaaliima mu byonabyona bye bakola, baaba ng'oti n'omutamiivu bw'atagalira mu biseseme bye mwene by'aseseime." 
Isaiah19:15 Mpegaano mu Misiri timukaalimu muntu akola bigasa, k'abe mukulu oba muto, k'abe mukulembeze oba akulemberwa." 
Isaiah19:16 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, Abamisiri baliba bati inho ng'oti bakazi. Balitya era baadhugumira, bwe balibona nga Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye agalwire omukono okubabonereza." 
Isaiah19:17 Eighanga Buyudaaya lirireeteranga Abamisiri okutya einho. Buli aliwuliranga nga balyogeraku alityanga inho, olw'akabi Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye k'ategeike okubakola." 
Isaiah19:18 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, abantu balyogera olulimi Olukanaani mu bibuga bya Misiri bitaanu, era baalayira mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye. Ekibuga ekindi ku ebyo balikyeta, Ekibuga ky'Endhuba." 
Isaiah19:19 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, mu nsi Misiri balizimbamu alutaari yaaba ya Musengwa Katonda, ni ku nsalosalo y'ensi eyo balimuzimbirayo empango ey'amabaale." 
Isaiah19:20 Obwo buliba bumanhiso obwoleka nga Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ali mu nsi Misiri. Era abantu bwe balimulirira nga bali kutuntuzibwa, alibatumira omuyambi yaabalwanirira era yaabawonia." 
Isaiah19:21 Ku lunaku olwo Musengwa Katonda alyeyoleka mu Bamisiri, baamumanha, baamusinza nga baghaayo emisengo n'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa. Balyeyama y'ali era baatuukiriza bye beeyamye." 
Isaiah19:22 Musengwa Katonda alibonereza Abamisiri, aye ate b'abonereiza alimala yaabawonia. Balikyukira y'ali baamusaba, era yaawulira okusaba kwaibwe yaabawonia." 
Isaiah19:23 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, ghalibaagho oluguudo oluva mu Misiri okuja mu Assiria. Abassiria baliidhanga mu Misiri, n'Abamisiri baajanga mu Assiria, era Abamisiri n'Abassiria balisinzizanga ghalala Musengwa Katonda." 
Isaiah19:24 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, ensi Isiraeli, ni Misiri, ni Assiria, dhiryazayaza ekitiibwa era dhaagheesa ensi yoonayoona enkabi." 
Isaiah19:25 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye alidhigha enkabi ng'akoba ati: “Misiri eighanga lyange, ni Assiria nze mwene lye natonda, ni Isiraeli lye nalondamu okuba eryange, gagheebwenga enkabi.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Agho kyabazinga Sarugoni ow'e Assiria yaatuma omuduumizi w'eigye lye, yaidha yaalumba ekibuga Ashidodi era yaakigema." 
Isaiah20:2 Mu kiseera kyene ekyo Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Isaia mutabane wa Amozi ati: “Ja otoolemu ekutiya y'ovaire, otoolemu n'engaito mu bigere.” Isaia yaakola atyo, yaatambula ng'ali madu era ng'azira ngaito mu bigere." 
Isaiah20:3 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Omugheereza wange Isaia amaze emyaka esatu ng'atambula madu, okwoleka ebirituuka ku b'e Misiri n'ab'e Ethiopia." 
Isaiah20:4 Kale ni kyabazinga w'e Assiria yeena atyo bw'alitwala abanhage ab'e Misiri n'ab'e Ethiopia, abakulu n'abato, nga bali madu era nga bazira na ngaito mu bigere. Balija batyo nga n'obunhuma bwaibwe ti bughembe bwaku, ekyo kireetere Misiri okuswala." 
Isaiah20:5 Abo abaali beesigulira ku Ethiopia okubabeera, n'abaali beenhumiriza mu Misiri, balisoberwa baawaamu n'eisuubi." 
Isaiah20:6 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, abantu ababa ku mbali kw'enhandha balikoba bati, ‘Oboine ekituuse ku be twesigulirangaku tuti balituwonia kyabazinga w'e Assiria? Kale obwo ife tuliwona tutya?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku Babiloni. Ng'empewo eyeezungulula n'amaani bw'eidha ng'ebitira mu kiketezo ekikalukalu eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, n'akabi katyo bwe kaliidha nga kava mu nsi etiisa." 
Isaiah21:2 Mbonekeirwa akabi akaja okugwagho; mboine anhagulula ng'ali kunhagulula, naabona azikiriza ng'ali kuzikiriza. Iwe eigye ly'omu Elamu, ja olumbe, n'iwe eigye ly'e Media, ja ozingize omuzigu. Katonda aidha kumalagho okudaazibwadaazibwa kwonakwona Babiloni kw'aleeta." 
Isaiah21:3 Obulumi bwe ndi nabwo bwenda kundhita bwite; ndi ng'oti n'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala. Obulumi tibunganha kubona waire okuwulira. 
Isaiah21:4 Akazunguluze kangemye era ndi kudhugumira olw'okutya. Enzikiiza ey'eigulo ye mbaire neegomba etuuke, eri ku ntiisa butiise." 
Isaiah21:5 Mbonekeirwa nga bategeike ekiiwulo, baayala ghansi engoye edh'okutyamaku, baatyama, baalya era baanhwa. Okuja okutemya n'okuzibula nga kirangiriirwa kiti: “Imwe abakulu b'abaisirukale, musituke, mutegeke engabo dhaimwe!”" 
Isaiah21:6 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Ja oteegho omukuumi, omukobe alangirire by'ali kubona." 
Isaiah21:7 Bw'anaabona embalaasi edhiri eibiri eibiri nga buli ndala eriku ali kugivuga, n'abona n'endogoyi nga dhoona bali kudhivuga, era n'abona n'engamiya nga dhoona bali kudhivuga, yeekalirise bukalamu n'obwegendereza.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Agho omukuumi yaayasiikana ati: “Musengwa Katonda, nze mba ghano ku kituuti ekirengererwaku nga nkuuma omusana n'obwire.”" 
Isaiah21:9 Okuja okutemya n'okuzibula ng'embalaasi edhiri eibiri eibiri dhiri kwidha, nga buli ndala eriku ali kugivuga. Omukuumi yaayongeraku yaakoba ati: “Babiloni kigwire, Babiloni kigwire. N'ebifaananie bya bakatonda baakyo byona bigwire agho ghansi byamenhekamenheka.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Imwe abantu bange Abaisiraeli, mubairenga mumulungulwa era mwasensebwa ng'oti ngaano. Aye mpegaano mbakobera amawulire amalungi ge mpuliire okuva ye Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, Afuga Amagye." 
Isaiah21:11 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku Edomu: Ghaligho omuntu ali ku lusozi Seiri, ali kundheta ati: “Omukuumi, nkobera obwire bwe bwabaire. Omukuumi, obwire bwakyeire butya?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Nze omukuumi naamwiramu nti: “Bwidha kukya, kabiri bwiremu buzibe. Bw'onaayenda okubuuza kabiri, onaira waabuuza.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku Buwarabu: Imwe abatambuze Abadedani mwidha kusulanga mu bisaka mu Buwarabu," 
Isaiah21:14 mughenga amaadhi abo abali endiwo abaidha ye muli. Imwe abantu ab'e Tema, mughenga emere abali endhala abanoonia obubudamo." 
Isaiah21:15 Kuba bali kulumuka empiima edhenda okubaita, bali kulumuka obusaale obudhuumwirwa mu bulaso, obwenda okubafumita. Bali kulumuka olutalo olwenda okubamalagho." 
Isaiah21:16 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Mu mwaka mulala gwonka guti, ebitiibwa bya Kedari biriba nga tibikaaligho." 
Isaiah21:17 Waire ng'abalasi b'obusaale Abakedari n'abasinga okuba abalwani ab'amaani, aye abalisigalagho baliba batono. Nze Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli, ntyo bwe nkobye.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku kyetebwa Ekiiko eky'Okubonekerwa. Kiki ekibatuuseeku ekibaniiniisa mwenamwena, ni muja ghaigulu ku busolya bw'endhu?" 
Isaiah22:2 Iwe ekibuga ekiidhwire okwasiikana, akeegugungo n'okusasamala, abantu bo abaitiibwa, tibaitiibwa mpiima waire okufiira mu lutalo." 
Isaiah22:3 Abakulembeze bo boonaboona baalumuka, era abazigu baamala baabagema nga tibalasiisaaku kasaale waire akalala kati. Abazigu baagema abo boonaboona be baayagaana, waire nga baali balumwike nga batuuse ghala." 
Isaiah22:4 Agho naakoba nti: “Muleke kuuningirira. Muje ere, mundeke nze ndire enaku yange, olw'abantu bange be nfiiriirwa. Mutadaaga na kunsaasira.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Kino kiseera kya kutya kungi, kutyankirirwa, na kusoberwa, ebyo nga Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye by'atutuusiisaaku mu Kiiko kino eky'Okubonekerwa. Ebimante by'ekibuga kyaife babiguumwireguumwire byagwa ghansi, abantu baakubira enduulu eyo mu nsozi nga benda babayambe." 
Isaiah22:6 Abaisirukale b'omu nsi Elamu baidhira ku bigaali by'omu lutalo ni ku mbalaasi, nga bagemye obulaso n'obusaale. N'abaisirukale b'omu nsi Kiri baidha nga bagemye engabo." 
Isaiah22:7 Ebiiko bya Buyudaaya ebisingamu bugimu byaidhula bwa bigaali bya mu lutalo. Abaisirukale ab'oku mbalaasi beesimba ku miryango gy'ekibuga Yerusalemu. 
Isaiah22:8 Olwo obusobozi bwa Buyudaaya okwekuuma abazigu, bwaba nga tibukaaligho naire. Ebyo nga bimaze okubaagho, mwaja mwaleeta eby'okulwanisa okuva mu eyetebwa Endhu ey'Ekibira." 
Isaiah22:9 Mwabona ng'ebituli biri kamaala bye baawomola mu kimante ky'oku kibuga Yerusalemu. Agho mwaleeta ghalala amaadhi g'omu kidiba ky'eifo," 
Isaiah22:10 era mwabala endhu edhaali mu Yerusalemu dhoonadhoona, mwamenhaku edhindi okufunamu eby'okuzimbisa buli aghaawomolwa." 
Isaiah22:11 Mwasima ekidiba mu kibuga, okukuumiramu amaadhi agava mu kidiba kire ekikaire. Aye timwafaayo ku Katonda eyategeka okuva eira ng'ebintu ebyo byakubaagho, era n'abireetera okubaagho." 
Isaiah22:12 Era mu biseera ebyo, Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, yali ali kubeeta mulire era mube mu nnaku, mumwe ku mitwe gyaimwe enviiri okudhimaliriraku ng'oti mpaata, era muvaale ekutiya." 
Isaiah22:13 Aye mu kifo ky'okukola mutyo, imwe mwaira bwa mu masanhu na kusagamba, mwaita ente n'entaama, mwalya emamba era mwanhwa n'omwenge. Eno nga mukoba muti: “Ka tunhwe era tulye, kuba enkyo tuja kwefiira.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yankoba ati: “Bwenebwene ekibi ekyo tija kukibasonigha okutuusa lwe mulifa.” Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye atyo bw'akoba. 
Isaiah22:15 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, yankoba ati: “Ja eri Shebuna omughanika alabirira ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, omukobe oti," 
Isaiah22:16 ‘Weeyeta ki iwe? Era naani akwidhi weena, memale obwo otuuke n'okwesimira amagombe mu lubaale?" 
Isaiah22:17 Kale ni waire ng'oli w'amaani otya, Musengwa Katonda aliidha yaakugingulagho, yaakusuula ere bya ntaka." 
Isaiah22:18 Bwenebwene alikusikambulasikambula, yaakukanhuugirira ere ng'oti mupiira, waagwa eyo mu nsi enene. Olifiira eyo, n'ebigaali byo eby'omu lutalo bye weesuuta nabyo byasigala eyo. Bwenebwene oswaza n'okuswaza ab'endhu ya musengwa wo." 
Isaiah22:19 Musengwa Katonda alikutoola ku bukulu bw'oliku, yaakughanula mu kifo kyo ekya ghaigulu, yaakusuula ghansi.’ ”" 
Isaiah22:20 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Shebuna ati: “Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, ndyeta omugheereza wange Eliakimu mutabane wa Hilikia," 
Isaiah22:21 naamuvaaza ekivaalo kyo eky'obukulu bw'oliku, naamusiba n'olusibiro lwo, era naamugha n'obuyinza bw'obaire oli nabwo. Aliba ng'oti ni lata ow'abatyamye b'omu mu Yerusalemu era ow'Abayudaaya boonaboona." 
Isaiah22:22 Ndimugha obuyinza bwonabwona obw'okulabirira eby'obwakyabazinga bwa Daudi. Ndimugha n'ebisimuluzo, nga bw'aba aigwiregho tighabaagho asobola kwigalagho, era nga bw'aba aigairegho tighabaagho asobola kwigulagho." 
Isaiah22:23 Ndimuleetera okugumira mu kifo kye, ng'oti n'enkondo ye bakomereire n'eguma, era alireetera ab'endhu ya ise okuteebwamu ekinhagansi." 
Isaiah22:24 “Aye ab'endhu ya ise abo balimutwika ebizibu byaibwe, byamuzitoogherera ng'oti n'enkaayi, n'ebikopo, n'ebikozesebwa ebindi ebighanikiibwa ku nkondo ni bigirengeedheraku.”" 
Isaiah22:25 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Olunaku olwo bwerulituuka, enkondo ye baali bakomereire mu kifo kyayo n'eguma, erisimbukayo yaagwa. Era eyo n'eriba enkomerero y'ebyo byonabyona ebigighanikiibwaku.” Musengwa Katonda n'ayogeire." 
Isaiah23:1 Buno n'obukwenda obugema ku Tiro. Muwowoole amaziga imwe ab'amaato g'e Tarushishi. Ekibuga kyaimwe Tiro bakizikiriiza, tighakaaligho ndhu oba kifo kya kwewogomamu. Amawulire ago gabatuuseeku nga gaviira mu nsi Kupuro." 
Isaiah23:2 Musirike be kye, imwe ababa ku bukalu bw'enhandha imwe abasuubuzi b'e Sidoni. Mwatuma abakwenda nga babitira ku maadhi," 
Isaiah23:3 baasaabala enhandha okuja okugula engaano y'e Misiri, eyakuzibwa omwiga Kiyira, baaja baasuubulagana n'amaghanga agandi." 
Isaiah23:4 Oswaire iwe Sidoni! Enhandha ekwegaine n'amaadhi gaayo amangi, eti: “Nze tirumwangaku kuzaala, era tizaalangaku naire. Tikuzangaku mwana, k'abe mulenzi oba mughala.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Amawulire ag'okuzikirizibwa kwa Tiro bwe galituuka e Misiri, abaayo baliwaamu n'omwoyo." 
Isaiah23:6 Muwowoole amaziga imwe abatyamye b'oku bukalu bw'enhandha, era mulumukire e Tarushishi." 
Isaiah23:7 Bwenebwene kino n'ekibuga ky'e Tiro ekisangaavu ekyazimbibwa eira einho? Ekibuga ekyavangamu abantu ni baja okusenga mu biketezo eby'e ghala? 
Isaiah23:8 Naani eyaleetera ebyo okutuuka ku Tiro ekibuga bakyabazinga mwe batyama, era ekibuga ekirimu abasuubuzi abakologho, abazira muntu wundi abasinga kuba na kitiibwa mu nsi?" 
Isaiah23:9 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye n'eyaleetera ebyo okubaagho, asobole okumalagho okwekuluntaza kwaibwe, era aise ghansi abo abazira muntu wundi abasinga kuba na kitiibwa mu nsi." 
Isaiah23:10 Imwe abatyamye b'e Tarushishi, mwidhule ensi ng'oti n'omwiga Kiyira bwe gwidhula ni gubanda n'okubanda. Buti tighakaaligho kibalobera, ensi yaimwe." 
Isaiah23:11 Musengwa Katonda agololeire omukono gwe ku nhandha, yaayuuzayuuza obwakyabazinga bungi. Alagiire ebifo eby'okwewogomamu eby'e Kanaani babizikirize." 
Isaiah23:12 Akobye ati: “Iwe ekibuga Sidoni, eisanhu lyo likomye, abantu bo bali kutuntuzibwa. Ni bwe banaalumukira e Kupuro, yoona tibalifunirayo miraala.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Baali Bababiloni abaafuula Tiro ekifo eky'ensolo edh'omu nsiko, se ti Bassiria. Baakizimbaku ebituuti ebirengererwaku, baakizingiza okukyezunguluza, baamenha endhu dhaamu, era baazikiriza byonabyona ebyakirimu." 
Isaiah23:14 Muwowoole amaziga imwe ab'amaato g'e Tarushishi, kuba ebifo byaimwe eby'okwewogomamu babizikiriiza." 
Isaiah23:15 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, abantu balyerabira Tiro, okumala entangama ya myaka nsanvu, egiri ng'oti n'egya kyabazinga gy'amala ng'ali kufuga. Egyo bwe giriwaaku, Tiro kiriba ng'oti ni malaaya mu lwembo luno:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Iwe malaaya ye beerabira, gema entongooli, oje ng'otambulatambula mu kibuga. Ogikube bukalamu nga bw'oyemba olwembo olunhuma, memale olwo bakwidhukire.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Emyaka ensanvu bwe giriwaaku, Musengwa Katonda alireka Tiro kyaira ku bye kyakolanga eira. Kiriiramu kabiri okusuubulagana n'obwakyabazinga bwonabwona ku nsi." 
Isaiah23:18 Ebirivanga mu kusuubula kwakyo, balibighangayo byaba bya Musengwa Katonda. Abantu abasinza Musengwa Katonda balibikozesanga okugula emere n'engoye bye beetaaga, mu kifo ky'okubitereka ni byebunga obwa agho." 
Isaiah24:1 Bona, Musengwa Katonda alyonoonayonoona ensi eno yaagireka ng'eri bw'agho etyo aligifunhafunha yaaleetera abagibaamu okusansaana." 
Isaiah24:2 Kiisi muntu alibisibwa mu nsambo n'endala: abantu babuliidho ni bakabona, abairu ni basengwa baibwe, abaguzi n'abatunzi, abawola n'abo ababeewolaku, ababandha n'abo ababandhibwa." 
Isaiah24:3 Musengwa Katonda alyonoonayonoona ensi yaagimalamu buli kantu. Atyo bw'akobye era taliroba kukituukiriza. 
Isaiah24:4 Ensi ewolongeire n'ebigiriku byayongobera; eitaka likaze n'ebiririku byaniala. Ebiri ghaigulu ku igulu n'ebiri ghansi ku itaka byonabyona bifafaagaine. 
Isaiah24:5 Abantu boonoine ensi nga bava ku mateeka ga Musengwa Katonda, baadheemera ebiragiro bye, era baamenha endagaano ye etawaagho." 
Isaiah24:6 Musengwa Katonda kyaviire n'akolimira ensi, abantu baayo yaabasingisa omusango era yaabazikiriza mu bungi. Abasigairegho baaba nga bali bwa batono bati." 
Isaiah24:7 Emizabbibu giniaire, omwenge gw'emizabbibu gwakendeera. Abantu boonaboona abaalinga abasangaavu, buti bali bwa mu nnaku." 
Isaiah24:8 Abaakolanga ebinhumo nga bakubiraku obugoma, baalekera. Abaakubanga emizira baazima, n'abaakubanga endingidi tibakaadhikuba." 
Isaiah24:9 Baakomya ira okunhwa omwenge gw'emizabbibu, nga bemberaku enhembo. Abaagunhwanga mpegaano gubakaayira bukaayire." 
Isaiah24:10 Ekibuga kitabangwiketabangwike, buli muntu yeigaliza mumwe ghalobe kubaagho amwingirira." 
Isaiah24:11 Abantu baasiikanira bwa mu nguudo olw'okubulwa omwenge gw'emizabbibu. Amasanhu goonagoona gaamala okutuuka ghe gakoma, era okusagamba mu nsi kwamala okukomezebwa." 
Isaiah24:12 Ekibuga kisigaire agho kityo, nga kiri bwa bifulukwa byereere. Emiryango gyakyo bagikubyekubye, baagireka nga gimenheikemenheike." 
Isaiah24:13 Kityo bwe kiriba mu maghanga goonagoona ag'omu nsi. Kiriba ng'oti ni mu biseera eby'amakungula nga bamaze okukuba ebibala okuva ku miti emyoliva, n'okunoga emizabbibu egisembayo." 
Isaiah24:14 Abo abaliba bawoniegho balyemba n'eisanhu lingi; abaliba ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba balisaaka ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda. 
Isaiah24:15 Abo abaliba ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba boona balimusaaka; n'abo abaliba mu biketezo eby'oku nhandha baamusaaka, oyo Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah24:16 Tuliwulira enhembo okuva ensi y'ekoma nga dhisaaka ekitiisa ky'oyo Omutukuvu. Aye nze nkoba nti nga nkagwireku! Ndi kuseenena buseenene mwoyo era naagoogomba naawaagho. Abantu ab'enkwe baba bwa mukusalira banaibwe nkwe. Era enkwe dhaibwe dheeyongera bweyongere okuba embi. 
Isaiah24:17 Imwe abantu b'oku nsi mumpulirise! Entiisa n'olwina n'omutego, bibateegereire." 
Isaiah24:18 Ole alirumuka n'awona entiisa, aligwa mu lwina. Ate ole aligezaaku n'ava mu lwina, aligwa bwa ku mutego gwamugemya. Ebituli eby'oku igulu biigule, kale amaadhi galiyuyika okuva ku igulu, n'emisingi gy'ensi gyatengeeta." 
Isaiah24:19 Ensi eryetema entanda, yaagabulukukamu, era yaatengeesebwa ebitaloodheka." 
Isaiah24:20 Ensi eritagala ng'oti mutamiivu, yaayuuzibwayuuzibwa ng'oti ntindi. Ebibi byayo bigizitooghereire byagigwisa, era teja kwirayo kusituka." 
Isaiah24:21 Ku lunaku olwo Musengwa Katonda alibonereza obuyinza bwonabwona obuli ghaigulu mu igulu, n'abafuzi abali ghansi ku nsi." 
Isaiah24:22 Musengwa Katonda alibasolokeza ghalala mu lwina ng'oti basibe. Alibasibira mu ikomera, yaamala yaababonereza ng'ekiseera kituuse." 
Isaiah24:23 Olwo omwezi guligema enzikiiza, n'endhuba yaaloba kwaka; kuba Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye n'aliba kyabazinga ku lusozi Sioni ni mu Yerusalemu. Era alyoleka ekitiisa kye eri abakulembeze b'abantu." 
Isaiah25:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, ndidha kukugulumizanga era nsaakenga eriina lyo. Kuba okoze ebyewuninkiriza, waatuukiriza n'obwesigwa n'amazima ebyo bye wategeka okukola okuva eira." 
Isaiah25:2 Ebibuga obireeteire okufuuka emungo dh'ebimunku, waazikiriza ebifo byamu eby'okwewogomamu. Ebisaagaati eby'abazigu baife eby'obwakyabazinga tibikaaligho, era tibiriiramu kuzimbwa kabiri." 
Isaiah25:3 Abantu b'omu maghanga ag'amaani baidha kukughanga ekitiisa; n'ebibuga by'amaghanga amakambwe biidha kukutyanga. 
Isaiah25:4 Niiwe obulumukiro abanaku n'abaavu mwe bafunira obuyambi, niiwe ekifo mwe beewogoma okuwona kiwunga, era niiwe ekiwoleeze ekibakingiriza ni bawona olwota. Kuba obuluukuuli bw'abakambwe buli ng'oti n'amaadhi agalimu kiwunga bwe gasaamira ebimante," 
Isaiah25:5 era bwaba ng'oti n'olwota bwe lumamula mu nsi enkalu. Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda osiriisa abazigu baife, waakomya okwasiikana kw'abakambwe abo, ng'oti n'ekire bwekiwoleezaaku ku lwota lw'omu kasana ghagati." 
Isaiah25:6 Ku lusozi luno Sioni, Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye alifumbira amaghanga goonagoona embaga, ng'eriku emere esinga bulungi n'omwenge gw'emizabbibu ogusinga bulungi." 
Isaiah25:7 Alizikiriza ku lusozi luno enaku egemye abantu mu maghanga goonagoona n'ebafundekeza. 
Isaiah25:8 Musengwa Katonda alizikiriza okufa kwasaaniragho irala ebyanda n'ebyanda. Alyeya abantu be boonaboona amaziga, yaatoolagho n'okuswazibwa kwe baali nakwo mu nsi yoonayoona. Musengwa Katonda oyo mwene n'ayogeire." 
Isaiah25:9 Ku lunaku olwo balikoba bati: “Mubone, Katonda waife wuuno. Tubairenga tumuteegerera okwidha okutuwonia. Ono ni Musengwa Katonda ye tubairenga tuteegerera, mpegaano ka tusangaale era tusagambe, kuba atulokoire.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Musengwa Katonda alikuuma olusozi luno Sioni, aye Abamoabu balityankirirwa ng'oti n'eisubi bwe balityankirira mu busa okukolamu ebigimusa." 
Isaiah25:11 Balyandhuluza emikono gyaibwe ng'oti n'omuntu ali kwewuga mu maadhi, aye Musengwa Katonda alibamala amaani ago agabaleetera okwekuluntaza." 
Isaiah25:12 Alizikiriza ebifo byaibwe eby'okwewogomamu n'ebimante byaibwe ebigulumivu, yaabigwisa ghansi ku itaka okutuukira irala mu nkungu." 
Isaiah26:1 Ku lunaku olwo abantu balyemba olwembo luno mu Buyudaaya, bati: Ekibuga kyaife kigumu begulugulu. Katonda mwene n'eyakizimbaku ebimante ebigumu, era mwene n'akikuuma." 
Isaiah26:2 Mwigulegho emiryango gyakyo, muleke abantu ab'eighanga eryesiga Katonda baingire, abantu abo abakola ebituufu." 
Isaiah26:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, abo abagumira ku iwe, obaleetera okuba mu miraala gyenegyene, kuba bakwesiga." 
Isaiah26:4 Mwesigenga Musengwa Katonda ebyanda n'ebyanda, kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo ali ng'oti lubaale olwewogomwamu, aidha kubakuumanga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Isaiah26:5 Abo abaali beetwala okuba aba ghaigulu abaisiisa ghansi, yaazikiriza ekibuga kyaibwe ekigumu, yaakigwisa ku itaka ghaasigala bwa nkungu." 
Isaiah26:6 Mpegaano abaavu n'abanaku, n'abali kukityankirira n'ebigere byaibwe." 
Isaiah26:7 Musengwa Katonda atereeza engira ey'abeesimbu; yaagyerula baabita nga ghazira kibatetegania. 
Isaiah26:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ife tujiira ku ebyo by'oyenda, era titwerabira liina lyo; kuba mu eryo mwe tufunira bye twegomba." 
Isaiah26:9 Omwoyo gwange gwegomba okuba aghalala n'iwe obwire, era nkunoonia obutakoogha. Kuba bw'osalira abantu emisango mu nsi, olwo beega okukola ebituufu." 
Isaiah26:10 Ababi ni bw'obakolera ekisa, tibeega kukola bituufu. Ni mu nsi y'abantu abeesimbu mwona bakoleramu bwa bikyamu, baaloba kubona Musengwa Katonda nga bw'ali omukologho." 
Isaiah26:11 Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe ogalwire omukono gwo okubabonereza, aye era ekyo tibakibona naire. Kale iwe babonereze obaswaze nga bwe weesoomera okukola abazigu bo. Balage nga bw'olumirwa abantu bo." 
Isaiah26:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe oidha kutugha tubenga mu miraala, kuba ni bye tukola byonabyona niiwe obireetera okutujiira obukalamu." 
Isaiah26:13 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, waire ng'abandi baatufugaku, aye niiwe wenka ye twidhi ng'Omufuzi waife." 
Isaiah26:14 Abo buti bafu era tibaliiramu kabiri kuba balamu; abo buti mizimu buzimu egitaja kwiramu bulamu naire. Kuba wababonereza waabazikiriza, era tighalibaagho abaidhukira kabiri." 
Isaiah26:15 Wo Musengwa Katonda, oleeteire eighanga lyaife okweyongeraku obunene, waagaziya ensalosalo dhaalyo dhoonadhoona, era ekyo kyayongera okukugheesa ekitiisa." 
Isaiah26:16 Wo Musengwa Katonda, abantu bo bwe baali mu buzibu, baidha baakwagala y'oli; bwe wabakangaivula, baakusaba nga bakweghemba." 
Isaiah26:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ng'omukazi ali enda bw'ayana ng'ali kulumwa ebisa by'omwana, ni yeegoniola ng'ebiseera bye eby'okuzaala bituuse, twena tutyo bwe twabanga mu maiso go." 
Isaiah26:18 Twaba enda, twalumwa okuzaala, aye ghazira kye twazaala. Tuzira kya mugaso kye tufuniemu, waire okubaaku n'obughanguzi bwe tuleetera ensi yaife." 
Isaiah26:19 Abantu bo abaafa baliba balamu kabiri, emibiri gyaibwe gyairamu obulamu. Abo boonaboona abalambaire e magombe, balisituka baayemba olw'eisanhu. Ng'amatondo g'omusulo gw'oku nkyo bwe galeetera ebimera ku nsi okwiramu okuboneka obulungi, ni Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'aliiza obulamu mu abo abaafa eira." 
Isaiah26:20 Mwidhe imwe abantu bange, mwingire mu ndhu dhaimwe, mweigalize mwegise omwo okumala akaseera, okutuusa obusungu bwa Katonda lwe buliwaagho." 
Isaiah26:21 Musengwa Katonda wuuyo ali kuva mu igulu y'aba, ng'aidha okubonereza abantu ku nsi olw'ebibi byaibwe. Abantu abaatemulwa mu ngiso balimanhibwa mu lwatu. Eitaka liriba tirikaasobola kugisa abo abaitibwa." 
Isaiah27:1 Ku lunaku olwo, Musengwa Katonda alikozesa empiima ye enkalangufu enkologho era endhogi einho, yaabonereza ogusota ogwetebwa Leviathani, ogwezingulula ni gulumuka. Aliita ogusolo ogwo oguba mu nhandha." 
Isaiah27:2 Ku lunaku olwo, Musengwa Katonda alikoba ati: “Mubone, eisamba lyange ery'emizabbibu eirungi. Mukole mulyembemu olwembo." 
Isaiah27:3 Nze mwene ndirabirira, naalifukirira amaadhi buli kaseera. Era ndikuuma omusana n'obwire ghalobe kubaagho ekirituukaku okulyonoona." 
Isaiah27:4 Mpegaano ndekeire agho okusungughalira eisamba eryo. Nguli gabaire mawa na nkandwa nga bye ndi n'okulwanisa, nandibibunziiza byonabyona, naabyokera ghalala." 
Isaiah27:5 Aye oba nga abazigu b'abantu bange benda nze okubakuuma, baidhe batabagane ninze. Batyo bwe babe bakole: baidhe batabagane ninze.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Mu biseera ebiri kwidha, Abaisiraeli baidhukulu ba Yakobo balisimba emizi ng'oti muti, baamulisa ekimuli, era baataaku ebibala ebiidhuza ensi." 
Isaiah27:7 Musengwa Katonda tiyabonereza inho bantu be Baisiraeli na bukambwe, ng'oti ni bwe yabonereza abazigu baibwe. Era tibaafiirwa bantu kamaala inho ng'oti n'abaabaitanga bwe baafiirwa." 
Isaiah27:8 Musengwa Katonda yabonereza abantu be ng'abatwala mu bunhage. Yabakunguudhia n'empewo ye enkambwe eva e buvandhuba. 
Isaiah27:9 Aye Abaisiraeli balisoniyibwa ebibi byaibwe, nga bamaze okumenhamenha alutaari dh'emisambwa n'okusekulasekula amabaale gaadho ni gafuuka ensaano. Era nga bamaze okukomya okuniokezanga obubbaani ku alutaari edho, era nga basaaniizaagho kiisi kamanhiso akooleka omusambwa omukazi Ashera." 
Isaiah27:10 Ekibuga ekyabangaku ebimante ebigumu ebikyezungulwire, mpegaano kiri bifulukwa byereere, era kirekeibwa bwagho nga kyereere ng'oti irungu. Kifuuse kyayiro ensolo mwe dhiriira nga dhikooza amakaba g'emiti, era ni dhiwuumulira omwo." 
Isaiah27:11 Ensaga dh'emiti gyamu bwe dhikala, abakazi badhikookola, baadhigherera ng'enku. Era ng'abantu abo bwe baziramu naire akategeera, Katonda eyabatonda talibasaasira waire okubagemerwa ekivunika." 
Isaiah27:12 Ku lunaku olwo, Musengwa Katonda alisoloza abantu be Abaisiraeli, okuva ku mwiga Eufurate okutuuka ku kaiga ak'oku nsalosalo ni Misiri, ng'oti n'omuntu asensa engaano okuva mu biwusu." 
Isaiah27:13 Ku lunaku olwo, eigwala lirivuga n'amaani, okweta Abaisiraeli boonaboona abaliba mu Assiria ni mu Misiri, baidha baasinza Musengwa Katonda ku lusozi olutukuvu mu Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli bukagwireku, olw'abantu baamu okwekuluntaza n'okuba abatamiivu. Ekitiibwa kyaibwe kiri kuwaagho, ng'oti n'engule dh'ebimuli edhinialiire ku mitwe gy'abakulembeze baibwe, abatamiira ni bawaamu." 
Isaiah28:2 Bona, Musengwa Katonda ali n'omuntu we ow'amaani aziramu ntete naire, eyeetegeike okubalumba n'amaani. Omuntu oyo ali ng'oti ni kiwunga namuzisa alimu n'omugozi; ali ng'oti ni kiwunga ow'amaani einho, era ng'oti n'amaadhi ag'omwidhuzo agataalaala ni gaidhula ensi." 
Isaiah28:3 Okwekuluntaza okw'abakulembeze abatamiivu, alikutyankirira n'ebigere." 
Isaiah28:4 Ekitiibwa ky'abakulembeze abo abatamiivu kiriwaagho mangu ng'oti n'ebibala by'emiti emitiini ebisookereza okwenga, abantu bye babona ni babinoga, era ni babirya amangu geene nga byakenga." 
Isaiah28:5 Olunaku lwidha kutuuka, Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye mwene abe ng'oti n'engule y'ebimuli ey'ekitiisa, eri abantu be abaliwonagho." 
Isaiah28:6 Aligha abalamuzi omwoyo ogw'okukolanga amazima, era yaagha abaisirukale amaani okukuumanga emiryango gy'ekibuga, okukiwonia okulumbwa abazigu." 
Isaiah28:7 Bakabona n'abalanzi boona omwenge guboonoine, baatuuka n'okutagala olw'obutamiivu. Abalanzi tibakaategeera ebibalagibwa mu kubonekerwa, ni bakabona tibakaasala bukalamu nsonga dha bantu." 
Isaiah28:8 Emeeza edhiba ghe batyama dhiidhula bwa biseseme, nga ghaziraghooku kifo kitukula naire." 
Isaiah28:9 Bakoba bati: “Oyo yeena ayegeresa ani? Naani eyeetaaga ebyo by'ayegeresa? Koodhi aje ayegerese abato abaakava obw'oku mabeere! 
Isaiah28:10 Aja yaayegeresa eisomo ku isomo, ekiragiro ku kiragiro, n'akanhiriri ku kanhiriri.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Aye oba nga tibenda kuwulira bye nkoba, Musengwa Katonda alibeegeresa ng'abita mu bantu abagwira aboogera olulimi olugwira." 
Isaiah28:12 Yabakoba okughanga akaseera abo abakooye, bawuumulengaku baghegheere, aye baaloba okuwulira." 
Isaiah28:13 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda ky'aliva n'abeegeresa eisomo ku isomo, ekiragiro ku kiragiro, n'akanhiriri ku kanhiriri. Olwo baje ekyeinhumainhuma bagwe enume y'ekigwo, olutuula lubagemye babatwale nga basibe." 
Isaiah28:14 Kale muwulire imwe abanhoomi abafuga abantu bano mu Yerusalemu. 
Isaiah28:15 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mwesuuta mbu mwakola endagaano n'okufa, era mbu mwataagho entegeeragana ghagati ghaimwe n'amagombe. Era mukoba muti akabi namuzisa bwe kaliidha, imwe tikalibatuukaku, kuba obulimba n'obuguya bye mufiire obulumukiro bwaimwe obubawonia.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye kyava n'akoba ati: “Mubone, ndi kuta mu Sioni eibaale erikakasiibwa nga igumu, libe eibaale ery'omughendo ery'omusingi mu nsonda era likole omusingi omugumu begulugulu. Ndidha kulighandiikaku nti, ‘Okwikiriza okugumu era kubaamu n'obuguminkiriza.’" 
Isaiah28:17 Okukola amazima n'okulifuuka olukoba olupima, ate obutuufu bwaba akagugha akatereeza ekisenge ekizimbibwa.” Kiwunga alimu omugozi alyeyaagho obuguya bwaimwe bwe mwesiga, amaadhi ag'omwidhuzo gaazikiriza ebyo bye mwesiguliraku." 
Isaiah28:18 Olwo endagaano yaimwe ye mwakola n'okufa naagimenhagho, n'entegeeragana ye mwataagho ghagati ghaimwe n'amagombe naagisazaamu. Era akabi namuzisa bwe kaliidha, kalibaleka nga kabatenteinetenteine." 
Isaiah28:19 Akabi ako buli lwe kalibitanga, kalibakubanga. Kalibitanga omusana n'obwire. Era buli bukwenda obulivanga ye Katonda, bulyongeranga kubaleetera kutya." 
Isaiah28:20 Muliba ng'oti n'omuntu asula ku buliri obumpi bw'atasobola kwegololeraku, era nga n'omwebwiko gwona mumpi, ogutasobola kumubunia." 
Isaiah28:21 Musengwa Katonda alisituka okulwana ng'oti bwe yakola ku lusozi Perazimu, era alisungughala ng'oti bwe yakola mu kiiko ky'e Gibeoni. Memale olwo yaakola omulimo gwe ogwo ogwewuunhisa ogutali gwabuliidho, era yaayoleka ebintu bye ebyo by'akola ebyewuninkiriza." 
Isaiah28:22 Kale ni mulobe kunhoomerera kulabula kuno, tiikulwa ng'endhegere edhibasibye bongera bwa kudhinhwegula; kuba mpuliire nga Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye mumalirivu okusaaniagho ensi eno." 
Isaiah28:23 Mutege amatu muwulire kye nkoba; mute omwoyo ku bye ndhogera. 
Isaiah28:24 Omulimi ng'ali kutegeka enimiro ye okugisigamu, akola gwa kutegeka ogwo gwonka ekiseera kyonakyona aghazira kukoma? Ekiseera kyonakyona akimala ku kutoodha na kwandhala mu nimiro eyo kwonka aghazira kulekera?" 
Isaiah28:25 Bw'amala okutereeza eitaka obukalamu, tasigamu buwoowo buwoomesa iva, anetho ni kumino? Era tasiga ngaano ni sayiri mu nhiriri dhaabyo, ate ku mbibi y'enimiro n'asimbayo ebirime ebindi?" 
Isaiah28:26 Omulimi oyo amanha okukola omulimo gwe obukalamu, kuba Katonda we amwegeresa." 
Isaiah28:27 Obuwoowo bw'anetho tibabusekula na kintu kye bamulungulisa ngaano, n'obuwoowo bwa kumino tibabuniiniaku kigaali kighaluzibwa mbalaasi. Aye obuwoowo obwo bwombi, babukubisa mwigo bwigo okubumulungula." 
Isaiah28:28 Omuntu tamulungula ngaano ya migaati kadeeberero n'atuuka na kugitentena. Bw'aba ali kuginiiniaku ekigaali ekighaluzibwa embalaasi okugimulungula, agyegendereza yaaloba kumanhiangula mpeke." 
Isaiah28:29 Amagezi ago goonagoona gava wa Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye. Oyo n'omuwi w'amagezi ataloodheka era n'omugezi ekibitiriire, atatuukikaku." 
Isaiah29:1 Arieli, Arieli, okagwireku! Okagwireku iwe Yerusalemu ekibuga Daudi mwe yasimba weema dhe! Omwaka leka gwire ku gwinaagwo, era n'ogundi gutyo; era leka mukuze ebibinuko nga bwe biiraganwaku," 
Isaiah29:2 memale mbabonereze. Abantu baliwowoola amaziga baanakughala, era ekibuga ekyo kiriba ng'oti alutaari yeene, nga kisaabaine omusaayi." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndikisimbaku weema dhange okukyezunguluza, naakizingiza n'ebituuti ebirengererwaku, era naakibungaku emungo y'eitaka ey'okuniiniraku okukirwanisa." 
Isaiah29:4 Yerusalemu kiriba ng'oti n'omuzimu ogwekakaba okwogera nga guli ghansi mu itaka; amamiro gaakyo galiwulikana ng'oti kaama bwama okuva eyo mu nkungu. 
Isaiah29:5 “Aye iwe Yerusalemu, waire abazigu bo bali lukunkumuli, balifuumuulwa ng'oti nkungu, n'abalwani baibwe abakambwe olukunkumuli, baliba ng'oti bikaba empewo by'efuuwa ere. Ate amangu geene, mu kaseera buseera," 
Isaiah29:6 nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ndibalwanirira, nga nkozesa okutyabuka kw'olukuba okw'amaani, era nga ntengeesa ensi ni musisi. Era ndikozesa n'empewo eyeezungulula n'amaani, naakozesa n'enimi edh'omuliro oguzikiriza kiisi kiri mu ngira yaagwo." 
Isaiah29:7 Agho amaghanga olukunkumuli agalwanisa Arieli ekibuga ky'alutaari ya Katonda, ni galumba ebifo byakyo eby'okwewogomamu era ni gakidaazadaaza, galiwaagho ng'oti kirooto bulooto, ng'oti n'ekintu ole kye yeefaanaaniriiza obwefaanaanirize mu bwire." 
Isaiah29:8 Amaghanga ago olukunkumuli ageesoloza okulwanisa Olusozi Sioni, galiba ng'oti n'omuntu endhala y'eruma n'aloota ng'ali kulya, aye n'azuuka ng'ekaamuluma. Oba ng'oti n'ole ali n'endiwo, n'aloota ng'ali kunhwa, aye ate n'azuuka ng'akaali nayo era ng'emukaziiza gha mamiro.”" 
Isaiah29:9 Mwesirughaze mufuuke basirusiru! Mwetulughaze mufuuke batulu! Mutamiire nga timunhweire na ku mwenge! Mutagale nga timukombye ku kitamiiza naire! 
Isaiah29:10 Musengwa Katonda abaleeteire okuwongera ng'oti n'abaja okutenduka endoolo enhingi einho. Imwe abalanzi, amaze okubaziba amaiso. N'imwe ababoni ababonekerwa, emitwe gyaimwe amaze okugighembaku." 
Isaiah29:11 Amakulu goonagoona agali mu kubonekerwa, gabafuukiire ng'oti n'ekitabo kye basibyeku akamanhiso ekitasoboka kuwumbululwa naire. Bw'okitwalira ole aidhi okusoma, n'omukoba oti: “Nsomeraamuuku,” airamu ati: “Tisobola, kuba bakisibyeku akamanhiso, tikisoboka kuwumbululwa.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Bw'okitwalira ataidhi kusoma, n'omukoba oti: “Nsomeraamuuku,” airamu ati: “Tisobola kusoma.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Abantu bano baidha ye ndi bantaamu ekitiisa mu bibono bubono, aye ng'emyoyo gyaibwe gindi ghala. Ensinza ye bansinzaamu ejiira ku ndhegeresa na mateeka abantu bye bataagho, ni babigema obugeme mu mitwe gyaibwe ng'oti nkusu." 
Isaiah29:14 Kale ni ndikola mu bantu bano ebyewuunhisa n'ebyewuninkiriza. Ndizikiriza amagezi g'abagezi, era naamaliragho irala okumanha okw'abeegerese.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Bakagwireku abo abagezaaku okukweka ku Musengwa Katonda entegeka dhaibwe, era bye bakola ni biba bya mu nzikiiza, nga bakoba bati: “Naani atubona? Era naani aidhi bye tukola?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Bafuulaniafuulania ebintu inho! Bwenebwene ole asobola okugeza omuwumbi ku itosi obutosi? Ekintu omuntu ky'akoze kisobola okukoba eyakikola kiti: “Ti niiwe eyankola?” Oba, ekiwumbe okukoba eyakiwumba kiti: “Totegeera naire?”" 
Isaiah29:17 Ekaabulayo akaseera katono, ekibaire ekibira ekizibirivu eky'e Lebanoni bakifuulemu enimiro edhigimusa ebirime, ate ebaire enimiro egimusa ebirime eiremu okuba ekibira." 
Isaiah29:18 Ku lunaku olwo, abaasemba amatu baliwulira ng'ekitabo kiri kusomwa, n'amaiso g'abatulu ababaire mu nzikiiza etiisa einho, galimoga gaabona." 
Isaiah29:19 Abawombeefu baliiramu kabiri okusagambiranga mu Musengwa Katonda, n'abaavu beesiimiranga mu Katonda oyo Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah29:20 Abantu abakambwe balimalibwagho, abo abeekuluntaza baakomezebwa, n'abo boonaboona abanhumirwa okukola ebibi baazikirizibwa." 
Isaiah29:21 Katonda alizikiriza abo abaghaayiriza banaibwe emisango gye batakoze, n'abo abayamba abaizi ab'emisango ni batabonerezebwa, era n'abo abaguya ni balemesa omutuufu okusalirwa omusango mu mazima." 
Isaiah29:22 Musengwa Katonda eyanunula Aburahamu kyava n'ayogera ku b'endhu ya Yakobo ati: “Imwe abantu bange, timuliiramu kuswazibwa kabiri, era timuliiramu kusiiwuuka mu maiso lwa nsoni kubagema." 
Isaiah29:23 Bwe mulibona ku ebyo bye ndibakolera, ni mubona ku baana be ndibagha, muligulumiza eriina lyange, mwayatula nga bwendi Omutukuvu wa Yakobo, era mwantaamu ekitiisa nze Katonda wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah29:24 Abasirusiru balifuuka abategeevu, n'abo abatasiima abeemuluguunhia buli kiseera balisangaala olw'okwegeresebwa.”" 
Isaiah30:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bakagwireku abakulembeze abo abadheemu, abajiira ku ntegeka nze dhe ntakoze, era ni bakola endagaano edh'enkolagana n'amaghanga agandi; kuba agho baba bongera kibi ku kibi." 
Isaiah30:2 Baasalagho baaja e Misiri okunoonia obuyambi, nga tibamaze kuneebuuzaaku. Beesiga inho amaani ag'ensi Misiri, baaja ye kyabazinga waayo, baamusaba abakuume!" 
Isaiah30:3 Aye ni, amaani ga Misiri ge beesiga galibaviiramu kuswala, n'ekya kyabazinga waayo okubakuuma kiribaviiramu kabi keereere." 
Isaiah30:4 Waire abakwenda ba Buyudaaya baamala ira okutuuka mu bibuga Zoani ni Hanesi," 
Isaiah30:5 ensoni dhirigema abantu b'e Buyudaaya, era beidhusa n'ekyabeesiza abantu abatasobola kubayamba waire okubaaku engeri ye babagasaamu, okutoolaku okubaswaza n'okubaleetera okunhoomebwa.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Buno n'obukwenda bwa Katonda obugema ku nsolo edh'omu kiketezo ekikalukalu eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba: “Abakwenda ba Buyudaaya babita mu nsi eidhwire ebizibu ebitiisa, erimu empologoma n'emisota egy'obusagwa egya buli nsambo, nga n'omuli n'egyo egiguluka ng'oti nhonhi. Batwika eby'obukombe byaibwe ku ndogoyi ni ku mabbango g'engamiya, baabitwalira abantu abatasobola kubagasa naire." 
Isaiah30:7 Obuyambi ensi Misiri bw'ebagha buzira kye bubaganhula waire okubagasa. Kyenviire ntuuma Misiri eyo eriina, ‘Ogusota Rahabu ogutamoodha.’ ” Agho Katonda yankoba ati:" 
Isaiah30:8 “Ebyo ja obighandiike ku kipande nga babona, era obighandiike mu kitabo, bibenga obudhulizi obw'olubeerera obukakasa obubi bw'abantu bano." 
Isaiah30:9 Badheema buliidho era baajiira ku kuguyaguya, baaloba okugondera amateeka ga Musengwa Katonda." 
Isaiah30:10 Bakoba ababoni bati, ‘Mulekere agho okubonekerwa’ baakoba n'abalanzi bati, ‘Mutalanga bituufu bye mubonekeirwa. Aye mulange ebyo ebitunhoonha, ebitali bituufu naire era eby'obuguya." 
Isaiah30:11 Mutuviire mu ngira mulobe kutwekiika mberi. Mulekere agho okutukobera ebigema ku Mutukuvu wa Isiraeli.’ ” 
Isaiah30:12 Kale ni Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli akoba ati: “Nga bwe munhooma bye mbakoba, ni mwesigulira ku kutuntuza abandi n'okukola eby'obudankaanu," 
Isaiah30:13 agho ni muliku omusango era gubaleeteire okuba ng'oti n'ekimante ekigungumavu ekyetemye ogutanda, nga kiruyiriire era nga kiri kugwa amangu geene, mu kaseera buseera." 
Isaiah30:14 Mulimenhekamenheka ng'oti nsugha ya itosi, ye bakubiiregho ku itaka n'emulunguka obutasigalagho waire katundu ka lugyo ak'okutoolesa omuliro mu ziiko, oba okusenesa amaadhi mu kidiba.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Musengwa Katonda Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli, akoba ati: “Mwire ye ndi mugumire ku nze, ndidha kubalokola; mwewombeeke era muneesige, ndidha kubagha amaani.” Aye imwe mwaloba okukola ekyo." 
Isaiah30:16 Mwakoba muti: “Busa naire! Titwidha kukola ekyo, twidha kuvuga embalaasi dhaife tulumuke ku bazigu baife.” Aye waire mwesigulira ku mbalaasi dhaimwe muti dhirumuka inho, embalaasi edh'abazigu abababingirira n'edhisinga kuba na mbiro." 
Isaiah30:17 Omwisirukale ow'abazigu aliba mulala ati, yaatiisa abantu lukumi (1,000) ku imwe baalumuka. Ate abaisirukale abataanu obutaanu, balibatiisa mwenamwena mwalumuka. Amagye gaimwe galiweekereragho, ghaasigalagho bwa kikondo kya bendera ku ngulu ku lusozi ng'akamanhiso." 
Isaiah30:18 Aye ate Musengwa Katonda ali agho ateegereire ng'ayenda abagemerwe ekivunika. Yeetegeike okubasaasira, kuba by'akola byonabyona bituufu nga tiyeekubira. Ba nkabi abo boonaboona abamwesiga." 
Isaiah30:19 Imwe abantu ababa mu Yerusalemu, timukairamu kabiri kulira maziga. Oluliba okulira muti, nga Musengwa Katonda abagemerwa kivunika ng'awuliire okulira kwaimwe, ng'abagha kye mumusabye." 
Isaiah30:20 Waire Musengwa Katonda alibaleka mwabona ebizibu n'okudaazibwadaazibwa, aye era taliiramu kubeekwekaku. Mwene n'aliba Omwegeresa waimwe era nga mumubona bukalamu." 
Isaiah30:21 Bwe munaadaalimiranga ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha oba ku lw'omugooda, ni muva ku ngira, mwidha kuwuliranga amamiro ge emugongo waimwe nga gabakoba gati: “Eno n'engira ye mube mutambuliremu.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Olwo mulitoola ebifaananie byaimwe ebibaadhe bye mwalimbyaku feeza, n'ebyo bye mwakola mu zaabu, mwabisuula ere ng'ebintu ebitali birongoofu, nga mukoba muti: “Muje ere, era timwiranga!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Olwo buli bye mulisiganga, Musengwa Katonda alibifukiriranga amaadhi agagwa byakula, yaabaleetera okukungula ebirime eby'omwero. Ensolo dhaimwe dhiriba n'ebyayiro ebigazi obukalamu." 
Isaiah30:24 Ate ente dhaimwe n'endogoyi dhe mulimisa mu nimiro, dhiriryanga eby'okulya ebirimu omuunhu ebimaze okusensebwa obukalamu." 
Isaiah30:25 Ku lunaku ebimante ebigumu eby'abazigu baimwe lwe birigemwa era abazigu ni baitibwa kamaala, amaadhi amangi galiba gakuuluula nga gava ku nsozi dhoonadhoona endeeyi ni ku busozi bwonabwona obugulumivu." 
Isaiah30:26 Ku lunaku Musengwa Katonda lw'alinhigiraku ebinuubule n'ebibwa by'abantu be, n'abawonia enguma dhe yabataaku, omwezi gulyaka ng'oti ndhuba. Ate okwaka kw'endhuba kulyeyongeramu amaani emikuzi musanvu ng'okwaka okw'omu lunaku olulala kuli ng'oti kwa nnaku musanvu." 
Isaiah30:27 Bona ere, obuyinza n'ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda biri kwidha, waire nga bikaali ghalaku. Omwosi ghalala n'omuliro, byoleka obusungu bwe obubitirivu. Bw'ayogera, ebyo by'ayogeire byokya ng'oti bwa muliro gwene oguzikiriza." 
Isaiah30:28 Omuuka gw'agheera guli ng'oti n'omwiga ogubanze ni gutaayaaya, ng'amaadhi gaagwo gatuuka mu nkoto, olwo gaaja nga geeyaagho amaghanga bwe gagazikiriza, era gaalekeza amaghanga okutuukiriza entegeka dhaago embi." 
Isaiah30:29 Aye imwe abantu ba Katonda, mulyemba era mwasagamba nga bwe mukola obwire nga mukuza ekibinuko ekitukuvu. Muliba basangaavu ng'abo abatambulira ku lwembo olw'endere, nga baja ku lusozi lwa Musengwa Katonda, oyo olubaale Isiraeli lwe yeewogomamu." 
Isaiah30:30 Musengwa Katonda alireetera abantu boonaboona okuwulira amamiro ge ag'ekitiisa, n'okubona omukono gwe ogubonereza nga gwika. Ghalibaagho enimi edh'omuliro oguzikiriza buli kiri mu ngira yaagwo, era ghaabaagho okughemya n'okutyabuka kw'olukuba, ni kiwunga, n'amaadhi agalimu amabaale ag'omugozi." 
Isaiah30:31 Abassiria balitya inho bwe baliwulira amamiro ga Musengwa Katonda, ng'ali kubabonereza n'omwigo gwe mu bukambwe." 
Isaiah30:32 Musengwa Katonda alibanga eno ng'alikubabonereza, ng'ere abantu be bali kusagambira na kwembera ku bugoma na ku ndingidi. Musengwa Katonda mwene n'alirwanisa abazigu abo Abassiria, ng'akozesa eby'okulwanisa ebitiisa." 
Isaiah30:33 Ekifo eky'okwokeramu kyabazinga w'e Assiria kyategekebwa ira. Ekifo ekyo kinene era kirimu olwina oluleeyi, olwidhwire enku. Musengwa Katonda alifuuwa omuuka oguli ng'oti buganga bwa salufa, gwakikunaaniaku omuliro." 
Isaiah31:1 Bakagwireku abo abaja e Misiri okufunayo obuyambi, abeesiga embalaasi dhaayo, ni beesiga n'abavuzi baadho olw'okuba ab'amaani, era ni beesiga n'ebigaali byayo eby'omu lutalo olw'okuba ebingi einho. Aye ni baaloba okwesiga Musengwa Katonda Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli, waire okumwebuuzaaku abayambe!" 
Isaiah31:2 Ate ng'aidhi bukalamu by'akola. Aja yaaleetagho akabi era yaaloba kukyusaamu ky'akobye naire. Yaabonereza abakozi b'ebibi, n'abo ababayambaku okukola ebibi." 
Isaiah31:3 Abamisiri bantu buntu, se ti Katonda. N'embalaasi dhaibwe dhiri na mubiri, se ti mwoyo mwereere. Musengwa Katonda bw'aligalula omukono gwe okubonereza, abayambi baligangalima, era n'abo be bayamba baagwa, olwo boonaboona baazikirira." 
Isaiah31:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Abaayi ab'ensolo bwebaidha abangi okulumba empologoma eri n'ensolo y'eyiize, tibasobola kugitiisatiisa ni bwe bawowoigana okwekutula. Kale ninze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, zeena ntyo bwe ndirwanirira olusozi Sioni, nga ghazira kindobera naire." 
Isaiah31:5 Ng'enhonhi bw'eghambaatira abaana baayo okubakuuma, ninze zeena Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ntyo bwe ndidha okukuumanga Yerusalemu, nkirwanirirenga okukiwonia abazigu.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Musengwa Katonda era yaakoba ati: “Imwe Abaisiraeli, mwandheemera inho mwakola ebibi. Aye mpegaano mukyuke mwire ye ndi." 
Isaiah31:7 Ku lunaku olwo, mwenamwena mulisuula ere ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda ebya feeza ni zaabu, imwe beene bye mwekolera ebibaleetera okukola ebibi." 
Isaiah31:8 Abassiria baliitibwa inho mu lutalo, aye nga bantu ti n'ababaita. Abassiria abo balirumuka olutalo, era abaisuka baibwe balifuulibwa bairu." 
Isaiah31:9 Kyabazinga waibwe alitya inho yaalumuka. N'abakungu baibwe baalumuka, era nga bali mu kabuguutano ako, baalekulira agho bendera dhaibwe edh'omu lutalo.” Musengwa Katonda oyo abantu ye basinziza mu Sioni, era ye bookera emisengo mu Yerusalemu, atyo bw'akobye." 
Isaiah32:1 Bona, ekiseera kiri kwidha ghabeegho kyabazinga alifugira ku butuufu, ghabeegho n'abakulembeze abalikolera ku mazima." 
Isaiah32:2 Buli muntu ku abo aliba ng'oti kifo kya kwekwekamu okuwona empewo era ng'oti mpuku ya kwewogomamu okuwona kiwunga. Baliba ng'oti miiga gya maadhi mu nsi enkalu ey'eirungu, era ng'oti kinsense eky'ogubaale ogukologho mu kiketezo ekikalukalu." 
Isaiah32:3 Amaiso gaibwe galibonanga ebizibu by'abantu, n'amatu gaibwe gaawulirisanga ebibaluma." 
Isaiah32:4 Abantu aboogera nga tibasoose kulowooza baliba n'obuguminkiriza, n'enimi edh'abali n'ebiguguma dhiryogera ebitegeerekeka obukalamu." 
Isaiah32:5 Omusiru aliba takaayetebwa ati wa kitiibwa, waire omukupankupania okwetebwa ati wa mazima." 
Isaiah32:6 Omusiru ayogera bya kisiru, era mu mwoyo gwe ayiiya amagezi ga kukola bibi. Mu by'akola tatya Katonda naire, era by'ayogera bivuma bwa Musengwa Katonda. Abali endhala tabagha mere, waire okugha abali endiwo eby'okunhwa." 
Isaiah32:7 Omukupankupania muntu mubi, ni by'akola bibi byereere. Asala amagezi okwitaitana abaavu ng'ayogera eby'obuguya, ni bwe baba nga bye basaba okukolerwa n'ebyo ebituufu bye bagwaniire." 
Isaiah32:8 Aye omuntu omwesigwa alowooza ku kukola bwesigwa, era ebituufu byonka by'agumiraku." 
Isaiah32:9 Imwe abakazi abali obukalamu mu idembe, muwulire bye nkoba." 
Isaiah32:10 Mpegaano muli mu idembe, aye mu mwaka mulala guti gwonka, muliba mu kudhugumira budhugumire, kuba emizabbibu gye mukungula buti, ku olwo tigiryama." 
Isaiah32:11 Imwe abakazi abali obukalamu mutengere olw'okutya, imwe abali mu idembe mudhugumire. Mutoolemu ebivaalo byaimwe mube madu, mwesibe ekutiya mu nkende olw'enaku." 
Isaiah32:12 Mute emikono mu nkoto munakughale, olw'enimiro enungi n'emizabbibu egyama einho," 
Isaiah32:13 n'olw'ensi ey'abantu bange eri kumeramu amawa n'enkandwa. Bwenebwene munakughale olw'amayumba agasanhusa, abantu ge baasagambirangamu mu kibuga ekyo ekyeyagaza." 
Isaiah32:14 Kuba ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga balikirekulira bw'agho, n'ekibuga ekyali kikubyeku abantu kyasigala agho kityo. Ensozi n'ebituuti ebirengererwaku, birifuuka bwa mpuku ebyanda n'ebyanda, endogoyi edh'omu nsiko dhaazaanhiranga omwo, n'ebyayo by'abantu byalyanga omwo eisubi." 
Isaiah32:15 Aye ekiseera kirituuka, Katonda yaatuyughaku omwoyo gwe okuva ghaigulu. Olwo eribaire eirungu lyafuuka enimiro egimusa ebirime, ate ebaire enimiro egimusa ebirime yaatwalibwa okuba ng'ekibira." 
Isaiah32:16 Mu lyali eirungu mulibaamu okujiira ku mazima, era mu nimiro eyo egimusa ebirime mwabaamu okukola ebituufu." 
Isaiah32:17 Era olw'abantu okukola ebituufu kirireetera ensi eno okubaamu emiraala, era kyagiviiramu okuba n'obutebenkevu, n'obwesige, ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Isaiah32:18 Abantu ba Musengwa Katonda baliba mu miraala, baatyamisa mu maka gaibwe era baawuumula nga ghazira kibatiisa naire." 
Isaiah32:19 Aye amabaale ag'omugozi galikuba ebibira byasaanagho, n'ekibuga kyazikirizibwa." 
Isaiah32:20 Muliba ba nkabi imwe abalirimiranga okumpi n'amaadhi, ni muba n'ebyayiro buli ghantu, ente n'endogoyi mwe dhiryeyayiranga dheene." 
Isaiah33:1 Mukagwireku imwe abazikiriza banaimwe, ate nga imwe ghazira abazikirizangaku; n'imwe abaghemukira abantu ni mubeefuulaku ate nga imwe ghazira abaghemukirangaku n'abeefuulaku. Ekiseera kyaimwe eky'okuzikiriza bwe kiriwaaku, olwo mwena balibazikiriza; era ekiseera kyaimwe eky'okughemukira abantu nga mubeefuulaku bwe kiriwaaku, olwo mwena balibaghemukira baabeefuulaku." 
Isaiah33:2 Wo Musengwa Katonda, tugemerwe ekivunika, kuba eisuubi lyaife liri mu iwe. Tukuumenga buli kaakyeire, era otulokolenga mu biseera ebizibu." 
Isaiah33:3 Bw'osituka okutulwanirira, amaghanga gasansaana gaalumuka okuwowoigana kw'olutalo." 
Isaiah33:4 Abantu baatwala ebintu byago ng'omunhago, baabituumiraku ng'oti nzige, baabinhaagaana." 
Isaiah33:5 Musengwa Katonda mukologho, kuba n'afuga ebintu byonabyona. Aliidhuza mu Sioni amazima n'obutuufu," 
Isaiah33:6 era yaaleetagho emiraala mu nsi eno. Buliidho akuuma abantu be, yaabagha amagezi n'okumanha. Era okumutya, n'eky'obukombe kyaibwe ekisinga mughendo mu byonabyona." 
Isaiah33:7 Bona, abalwani abaziramu ntete bali kulira bulire; abakwenda abaatumibwa okuleetagho emiraala bali kuwowoola buwowoole." 
Isaiah33:8 Enguudo tidhikaabitikamu kuba dhitiisa, abatambuze abaadhibitangamu baawaayo. Endagaano kamaala dhimenheibwa, n'ebibuga byanhoomebwa. Era tighakaali ateebwamu kinhagansi." 
Isaiah33:9 Abantu tibakaalima, eitaka liri bw'agho. Ebibira by'e Lebanoni biri kuwaagho. Ekiiko ky'e Sharoni kiri ng'oti irungu. Ate mu kiketezo ky'e Bashani ni ku lusozi Karumeli, emiti giwaawiiza amakaba." 
Isaiah33:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba amaghanga ati: “Mpegaano ndidha kusituka, ndholeke obuyinza bwange n'amaani gange." 
Isaiah33:11 Entegeka dhaimwe dhiri ng'oti bikaba bukaba, ni bye mukola byonabyona biri ng'oti bisubi bikalu omuuka ogwaimwe gwene gwe mugheera, n'ogulibamamula okubamaliriragho ng'oti muliro." 
Isaiah33:12 Mulifaanana ng'oti babookiikya mwafuuka bwa ivu, era mwaba ng'oti mawa ge batemye ni bagookya gasiriira mu muliro." 
Isaiah33:13 Imwe mwenamwena ab'okumpi n'ab'eghala, muwulire bye nkoze, mukakase nga ndi n'obuyinza.”" 
Isaiah33:14 Aboonooni abali mu Sioni bali mu kutya kwereere; abantu abo abatatya Katonda bali kudhugumira, nga bakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda ali ng'oti muliro oguzikiriza buli ekiri mu ngira yaagwo. Kale naani ku ife asobola okusigala ng'akaali mulamu mu kwokerera okwo okutalekera ebyanda n'ebyanda?”" 
Isaiah33:15 Ole akola ebituufu era n'ayogera eby'amazima, atakozesa buyinza bwe kunhigiriza baavu olw'okwenda okubafunamu, atayenderaku irala kulya nguzi, ateeyimba na bantu abatemula banaibwe, era atayendera irala kubona muntu akola kibi," 
Isaiah33:16 oyo n'aliba aghalungi, mu kifo eky'okwewogomamu ekigumu einho ng'oti n'olubaale. Aliba n'emere ey'okulya era yaaba n'amaadhi ag'okunhwa aghazira kubulirirwa naire." 
Isaiah33:17 Mulibona kyabazinga mu kitiisa kye, era mwabona n'ensi enene einho y'afuga." 
Isaiah33:18 Okutya kwe mwabangamu, olw'abagwira abaabasolozangaku omusolo, n'abakeesi abaabalingirizanga, kulifuuka lufumo bufumo." 
Isaiah33:19 Muliba timukairamu kubona bantu abo abeetwalanga okuba aba ghaigulu, abagwira abo abaayogeranga olulimi lwe mutategeera." 
Isaiah33:20 Mulingirire Sioni ekibuga kye tukulizaamu embaga edh'ebibinuko byaife ebyalagirwa. Mubone Yerusalemu nga bwe kirimu emiraala, kuba era ekyo n'ekifo ekibeekamu. Kiriba ng'oti ni weema ye batatoolagho, ng'enkondo dhaayo tidhisimbulwagho, waire emigugha gyayo okukutuka." 
Isaiah33:21 Eyo Musengwa Katonda y'alitwolekera ekitiisa kye, twaba mu kifo ekirimu ensulo, era ekirimu n'emiiga eminene okutabita maato ga bazigu." 
Isaiah33:22 Musengwa Katonda mwene n'aliba omulamuzi waife, yaaba kyabazinga waife atufuga, era yaaba omulokozi waife." 
Isaiah33:23 Emigugha egy'abazigu tigikaasobola kunhwegula mulongooti gwa lyato mu kifo kyagwo, waire okwandhuluza eitanga. Kale ebintu byonabyona eby'abazigu ebingi einho, birifuuka omunhago gwaife, nga n'abalema boona basobola okunhaga ku ogwo." 
Isaiah33:24 Tighalibaagho muntu waire omulala ati ku b'omu nsi yaife, alikoba ati alwaire. Abantu abaliba eyo boonaboona balisoniyibwa ebibi byaibwe." 
Isaiah34:1 Imwe abantu ab'amaghanga goonagoona museete kumpi. Abantu mwenamwena mutege amatu muwulire. Iwe ensi idha owulirise, ghalala n'ebikulimu byonabyona." 
Isaiah34:2 Musengwa Katonda asungughaliire amaghanga goonagoona, yaasungughalira n'amagye gaago goonagoona, era yaagaghaayo y'abazigu bagazikirize goonagoona." 
Isaiah34:3 Abantu abaliitibwa tibaliziikibwa, aye balisigala bw'agho ekiwunha kyagema woonawoona, n'ensozi dhaakuuluula bwa musaayi gwaibwe." 
Isaiah34:4 Endhuba n'omwezi n'emuunienie, birighanuka ku igulu byagwa, eigulu lyazingibwaku ng'oti nzingo ya kitabo. Eby'oku igulu byonabyona birimagala, ng'oti n'amakaba bwe gava ku muzabbibu oba ku mutiini, ni gagwa." 
Isaiah34:5 Musengwa Katonda ng'ali eyo mu igulu, ategeike empiima ye, era eidha kwidha eike ku Edomu, esobole okwita abo boonaboona b'asaliire ogw'okuzikirizibwa." 
Isaiah34:6 Empiima ya Musengwa Katonda erisaabaana omusaayi n'amasavu eby'abantu, yaaba ng'oti bw'esaabaana omusaayi n'amasavu eby'entaama ento n'embuzi, edhimugheebwa ng'emisengo. Musengwa Katonda mwene n'alighaayo omusengo ogwo e Bozira, ng'aita abantu kamaala inho mu nsi Edomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Abantu baliitibwa ng'oti bwa mbogo era baitibwa ng'oti bwa nte nume entototo edh'amaani. Era ensi yaibwe erisaabaana omusaayi, n'eitaka lyaibwe lyagimuka n'amasavu." 
Isaiah34:8 Ekyo n'ekiseera Musengwa Katonda ky'alyesasuuliza ku bazigu ba Sioni, n'ababonereza olw'ebyo bye baakola abantu be." 
Isaiah34:9 Amaadhi ag'omu miiga egy'omu Edomu galiirugala geegema ng'oti koolaasi. Eitaka lyayo lirikyuka lyafuuka buganga bwa salufa. Era ensi eyo yoonayoona erigema omuliro oguli ng'oti gwa koolaasi. 
Isaiah34:10 Omuliro ogwo tigulizikira omusana n'obwire, era guliniokanga omwosi lubeerera. Ensi eyo erifuuka bifulukwa ebyanda n'ebyanda, era ghazira muntu aliirayo kugibitamu kabiri." 
Isaiah34:11 Ebiwigulu n'amakoova n'enhonhi edhindi, n'ebirifuuka byenemu okubanga omwo. Musengwa Katonda alireeta mu nsi eyo okutabukatabuka, yaaleetera n'abakungu baayo okufuuka ng'oti bintuntu eyo bityo ebitakaali na mugaso naire." 
Isaiah34:12 Eriba tekaalimu kyabazinga, era nga n'abakulembeze baayo tibakaaliyo." 
Isaiah34:13 Endhu dhaayo dirimeramu amawa, n'ebifo byayo eby'okwewogomamu byameramu ensiko n'enkandwa. Era biribangamu bwa bibe na biwigulu." 
Isaiah34:14 Ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhiritambuliranga omwo, n'emizimu gyayetaganiranga eyo. Bwenebwene n'ensolo ey'obwire eriidhanga omwo, yanoonia ekifo agh'okuwuumulira." 
Isaiah34:15 Ebiwigulu birizimba eyo ebisu byabyo, byabiikira eyo amagi, byagagonera, byagaalula, era n'ebito byakulira eyo. N'ensega dhoona ensaadha n'enkazi, dhiryesolokezanga eyo." 
Isaiah34:16 Mwagaaze mu kitabo kya Musengwa Katonda, musomemu mubone: Mwidha kuzuula nga ku bitonde ebyo tikulibaaku waire ekirala kiti ekitaliba eyo. Era tighalibaagho kisaadha kitaliba na kiinaakyo ekikazi. Musengwa Katonda mwene n'eyalagira bibe bityo, era mwene oyo n'alibisolokeza aghalala." 
Isaiah34:17 Musengwa Katonda n'alibigabaniamu ensi eyo, yaabisimbira n'ebiroowa ku bitundu byabyo. Ensi eyo eriba yaabyo ense n'ense, era birigibangamu ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Isaiah35:1 Eirungu lirisagamba, ensi enkalukalu yaamulisa ebimuli." 
Isaiah35:2 Eirungu liryemba lyakuba emizira. Liriboneka bulungi nga lisanhusa ng'oti n'ensozi dh'e Lebanoni, era lyaba igimu ng'oti n'enimiro edh'e Karumeli n'e Sharoni. Abantu boonaboona balibona ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda, baabona n'amaani n'obuyinza bwe." 
Isaiah35:3 Mwize amaani mu mikono gy'abantu egikooye, era mugumye ebivu ebiri kudhugumira olw'okunafugha." 
Isaiah35:4 Mukobe abo abawoiremu amaani muti: “Mube bagumu, mutatya. Mubone, Katonda waimwe ali kwidha okubalokola, yeesasuulize ku bazigu baimwe ng'ababonereza.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Olwo amaiso g'abatulu galizibuka, n'amatu g'abasigha gairamu okuwulira." 
Isaiah35:6 Olwo omulema alituuma ng'oti mpongo, ni kasiru yaayemba olw'eisanhu; kuba amaadhi galitimbuka mu nhindo edh'ensulo mu irungu, gaakuuluulira mu nsi eyo enkalukalu." 
Isaiah35:7 Omusenho ogwokya gulifuukamu nhandha, n'eitaka eikalu ery'olubbalangu lyafuuka nsulo dha maadhi. Ekifo ebibe mwe byabanga, mulimeramu isubi na bitoogo." 
Isaiah35:8 Ghalibaagho oluguudo olulyetebwa “Engira ey'Obutukuvu.” Buli atali mulongoofu talibita mu ngira eyo. Era abaligitambuliramu ni bwe baliba abasiru einho, tibaja kubulira mu ngira eyo." 
Isaiah35:9 Eyo teribaayo mpologoma, waire okubaayo ensolo yoonayoona enswankuzi eriidha okutambulira mu ngira eyo. Aye abo Musengwa Katonda b'alinunula n'abaligibitamu." 
Isaiah35:10 Abo Musengwa Katonda b'alinunula balisituka bairayo e Yerusalemu nga bemba. Baliba mu masanhu era baaba mu kusagamba enaku dhoonadhoona, ng'enaku n'okusinda biwoiregho." 
Isaiah36:1 Mu mwaka ogweikumi n'ena (14) nga kyabazinga Hezekia n'afuga Buyudaaya, Sennakeribu kyabazinga w'e Assiria yalumba ebibuga byonabyona ebya Buyudaaya ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu, yaabighangula." 
Isaiah36:2 Agho kyabazinga w'e Assiria oyo yaasindika omukungu we akulira baine boonaboona, ave e Lakishi ng'ali n'eigye eikologho, aje alumbe kyabazinga Hezekia e Yerusalemu. Bwe baatuukayo, baayemerera gha mweta oguleeta amaadhi okuva mu nsulo y'eitale eri ku ngira eja mu kifo ekyetebwa Ekyolezo." 
Isaiah36:3 Agho abakungu bano Abayudaaya baidha ye bali: Eliakimu mutabane wa Hilikia, nga n'eyalabiriranga ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga Shebuna eyali omughandiisi w'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga ni Yoa mutabane wa Asafu, nga n'eyali omukuumi w'ebighandiiko." 
Isaiah36:4 Omukungu oyo Omuassiria yaabakoba ati: “Mukobe kyabazinga Hezekia muti, ‘Kyabazinga omukologho ow'e Assiria ali kukubuuza ati, kiki ekiri kukwesiguza?" 
Isaiah36:5 Olowooza oti okwogera obwogere n'okunaafuuka amagezi n'amaani ag'okulwana olutalo? Naani y'oli kwesiga okutuuka n'okundheemera? 
Isaiah36:6 Bona, oli kwesiga ensi Misiri eri ng'oti n'olugada olumenhefu, olufumita engalo dh'oyo alugema n'alwesigamaku. Atyo kyabazinga w'e Misiri bw'ali y'abo abamwesiga.’ ”" 
Isaiah36:7 Omukungu Omuassiria yaayongera okukoba ati: “Aye bwe munkoba muti, ‘Twesiga Musengwa Katonda waife,’ ndidha kubabuuza nti, ‘Musengwa Katonda oyo ti n'oyo Hezekia ye yatooleragho ebifo bye ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizangamu ni alutaari dhe, era Hezekia oyo n'akoba abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu ati okusinzizanga ku alutaari endala ey'omu Yerusalemu yonka?’" 
Isaiah36:8 Mpegaano ni, ka mbasonsoonie mu liina lya musengwa wange kyabazinga ow'e Assiria: ndidha kubagha imwe embalaasi enkumi ebiri (2,000), bwe munaasobola okufunayo abanaadhivuga!" 
Isaiah36:9 Oba nga timusobola naire kulwanisa muduumizi mulala ati ow'eidaala erisembayo mu baduumizi b'eigye lya musengwa wange, olwo musobola mutya okwesiga ensi Misiri olw'ebigaali byayo eby'omu lutalo n'olw'abavuzi baayo ab'embalaasi?" 
Isaiah36:10 Mulowooza muti nalumba ekifo kino okukizikiriza nga Musengwa Katonda tali ghalala ninze? Musengwa Katonda mwene n'eyankoba ati, ‘Lumba ensi eyo ogizikirize.’ ”" 
Isaiah36:11 Agho Eliakimu mutabane wa Hilikia, ni Shebuna, ni Yoa, baakoba omukungu oyo Omuassiria bati: “Tukweghembye, yogera n'ife mu lulimi Oluaramaika, kuba tulutegeera. Aye otayogera n'ife mu Luheburayi ng'abantu abali ku kimante bawulira.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Omukungu Omuassiria yairamu ati: “Mulowooza muti musengwa wange yantuma okukobera ebibono ebyo musengwa waimwe kyabazinga n'imwe mwenka? Busa, yantuma okubikobera n'abantu abo abatyaime ku kimante, abanaatuuka n'okulya obubi obwaibwe bwene n'okunhwa enkali eyaibwe yeene, ng'oti n'imwe bwe munaakola.”" 
Isaiah36:13 Agho omukungu Omuassiria oyo yaayemerera, yaalangirira mu lulimi Oluyudaaya, ng'ayogera mu mamiro ag'amaani ati: “Muwulire kyabazinga omukologho ow'e Assiria ky'akoba!" 
Isaiah36:14 Ali kubalabula ati Hezekia atabaguumaaza, kuba tasobola kubatoola mu ngalo dhange n'abawonia." 
Isaiah36:15 Era atabasendasenda kwesigulira ku Musengwa Katonda, nga mukoba muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda aidha kutuwonia, era aidha kulobera kyabazinga w'Abassiria okugema ekibuga kyaife.’" 
Isaiah36:16 Mutawulirisa Hezekia, kuba kyabazinga w'e Assiria akoba ati, ‘Muveeyo bya bulungi mwegheeyo ye ndi. Olwo kiisi muntu aidha kulyanga ku bibala eby'emizabbibu egigye gyene, n'eby'emiti emitiini egigye gyene, era anhwenga amaadhi ag'omu nsulo eyiye yeene," 
Isaiah36:17 okutuusa lwe ndiidha ni mbatwala mu nsi eri ng'oti n'eyaimwe yeene, ensi erimu engaano ey'okufumbamu emigaati, n'amasamba ag'emizabbibu ag'okutoolangamu omwenge ogw'emizabbibu.’" 
Isaiah36:18 Aye mutawulirisa Hezekia ali kubaguyaguya ati, ‘Musengwa Katonda aidha kutuwonia!’ Ghalighooku omusambwa waire omulala guti ogw'abamaghanga agandi ogwali gusoboireku okuwonia ensi yaagwo ni gugitoola mu ngalo dha kyabazinga w'e Assiria?" 
Isaiah36:19 Emisambwa egy'e Hamathi n'egy'e Arupadi, buti giri gha? Ate emisambwa egy'e Sefarivaimu, buti giri gha? Gyali giwoniizaaku ekibuga Samaria, kyanva mu ngalo?" 
Isaiah36:20 Musambwa ki, ku misambwa egy'ensi dhoonadhoona, ogwali guwoniizaaku ensi yaagwo ni gugintoola mu ngalo, memale olwo katyo mulowooze muti Musengwa Katonda asobola okuwonia Yerusalemu, yaakintoola mu ngalo?”" 
Isaiah36:21 Aye abantu baasirika busirike, baaloba kumwiramu kibono naire, kuba kyabazinga Hezekia yali abalagiire ati: “Mutamwiramu.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Agho Eliakimu mutabane wa Hilikia, nga n'eyalabiriranga ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, ni Shebuna eyali omughandiisi w'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, era ni Yoa mutabane wa Asafu, nga n'eyali omukuumi w'ebighandiiko, baaja eri Kyabazinga Hezekia nga bakanwiremu ebivaalo byaibwe olw'enaku. Baamukobera omukungu w'e Assiria bye yakoba." 
Isaiah37:1 Kyabazinga Hezekia bwe yawulira ebibono ebyo, yaakanulamu ebivaalo bye era yaavaala ekutiya olw'enaku. Agho yaaja mu isinzizo." 
Isaiah37:2 Yaatuma Eliakimu eyalabiriranga ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, ni Shebuna omughandiisi, n'abakulira bakabona, baaja eri Isaia omulanzi mutabane wa Amozi nga bavaire kutiya olw'enaku." 
Isaiah37:3 Baamukoba bati: “Hezekia akoba ati, ‘Olunaku luno lwa kudaazibwadaazibwa, kubonerezebwa na kuswazibwa. Tuli ng'oti n'omukazi atuusiisa okuzaala, aye ng'aziramu maani gasindika mwana." 
Isaiah37:4 Kyabazinga w'e Assiria yatuma omukungu we akulira bakungu baine boonaboona okwidha okudhooga Katonda omulamu. Musengwa Katonda wo agwaine awulire ebyo byonabyona omukungu oyo by'ayogeire, era amubonereze olw'okubyogera.’ Kale ni sabira abo abanaawonagho ni basigala nga bakaaligho.”" 
Isaiah37:5 Abakwenda ba kyabazinga Hezekia bwe baatuusa obukwenda bwe eri Isaia," 
Isaiah37:6 Isaia oyo yaabakoba okwirayo ye musengwa waibwe, bamukobe bati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Otatya bibono by'owuliire, abakungu ba kyabazinga w'e Assiria bye boogeire nga banvuma." 
Isaiah37:7 Bona eno, ndidha kumutaamu ekidhuubo, mmuleetere okujiira ku lubono lw'awulira nga lwogerwa mu bantu, aireyo mu nsi ye. Era mmuleetere okwitibwa ng'ali eyo.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Agho omukungu oyo Omuassiria yaawulira nga kyabazinga w'ewaibwe aviire e Lakishi, era ng'ali kulwanisa ab'omu kibuga Libuna, kale ni n'okuja y'ali." 
Isaiah37:9 Agho kyabazinga w'e Assiria baamukobera bati: “Bona, Tirihaka kyabazinga w'e Ethiopia asitwire eigye okukulwanisa.” Bwe yakiwulira, yairamu okugheereza abakwenda ye kyabazinga Hezekia, ng'akoba ati:" 
Isaiah37:10 “Muje mukobe Hezekia kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya muti, ‘Katonda wo ye weesiga atakulimba ng'akoba ati Yerusalemu tikiidha kugheebwayo mu ngalo dha kyabazinga w'e Assiria." 
Isaiah37:11 Wawulira bakyabazinga ab'e Assiria bye baakola ensi dhoonadhoona, ni badhizikiriza okudhisaaniagho. Obwo iwe olowooza oti onaawona?" 
Isaiah37:12 Badhaadha bange baazikiriza ebibuga, Gozani, ni Harani, ni Rezefu, era baazikiriza abantu Abaedeni abaali mu Telassari. Aye ghaalighooku omusambwa waire omulala ogwasobola okubawonia?" 
Isaiah37:13 Bakyabazinga ab'ebibuga, Hamathi, ni Arupadi, ni Sefarivaimu, ni Hena, ni Ivva, buti bali gha?’ ”" 
Isaiah37:14 Kyabazinga yaatoola embaluwa eyo ku bakwenda, yaagisoma. Yaamala yaaja mu isinzizo, yaagyandhuluza mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda," 
Isaiah37:15 yaasaba Musengwa Katonda ng'akoba ati: 
Isaiah37:16 “Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, iwe atyama ku bitonde eby'amaghagha ebyetebwa bikerubi, niiwe Katonda wenka. Niiwe wenka afuga obwakyabazinga bwonabwona ku nsi. Era niiwe watonda eigulu n'ensi." 
Isaiah37:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda lingirira obone ebitutuuseeku, era otege kutu owulire ebibono Sennakeribu by'agheereiza okukuvuma, iwe Katonda omulamu." 
Isaiah37:18 Wo Musengwa Katonda, mu butuufu bakyabazinga ba Assiria bazikiriiza amaghanga kamaala, baaleka ensi edh'amaghanga ago nga dhifafaagaine." 
Isaiah37:19 Baayokya emisambwa gy'amaghanga ago, mu butuufu egitaali Katonda, aye ebifaananie obufaananie abantu bye baakola n'emikono gyaibwe mu miti ni mu mabaale. Ekyo n'ekyaleetera emisambwa egyo okuzikirizibwa." 
Isaiah37:20 Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, mpegaano ni tukweghembye tuwonie, otutoole mu ngalo edh'Abassiria. Olwo abantu abamaghanga agandi boonaboona basobole okumanha nga iwe, Musengwa Katonda, niiwe Katonda wenka.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Agho Isaia mutabane wa Amozi yaagheereza Hezekia obukwenda obukoba buti: “Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati awuliire okusaba kwo ku bigema ku Sennakeribu kyabazinga w'e Assiria. 
Isaiah37:22 Era bino Musengwa Katonda oyo by'akoba ku kyabazinga Sennakeribu oyo, ati, ‘Ekibuga Sioni kikunhoomye kyakusekerera iwe Sennakeribu; era ekibuga ekyo Yerusalemu kikukongoire." 
Isaiah37:23 Olowooza oti naani y'ovumye era y'onhoomye? Naani y'okaabukiire era y'oziimwire? Ninze Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli! 
Isaiah37:24 Otumye abakwenda bo okuneesuutiraku nze Musengwa Katonda, nga bakoba nga bwe wakozesa ebigaali byo eby'omu lutalo, n'oghangula ensozi dhoonadhoona endeeyi edh'omu Lebanoni. Weesuuta ng'eyo bwe watemayo emivule egisinga obuleeyi, era waatemayo n'emiti emisipuressi egisinga bulungi. Waakoba nga bwe waingirira irala mu bibira, mu kitundu ekisinga kuba kizibirivu." 
Isaiah37:25 Weesuuta nga bwe wasima ensulo, n'onhwa amaadhi mu nsi edh'abagwira. Era ng'ebigere eby'abaisirukale bo bwe byatyankirira ni bikaza emiiga gyonagyona egy'e Misiri." 
Isaiah37:26 Towulirangaku ng'ebyo byonabyona nabitegeka ira nga byakubaagho? Ebyo bye ndeeteire okubaagho mpegaano, nabyekoota ira mu biseera ebyabita. Kyewava n'ozikiriza ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu, ni bifuuka bwa mmungo ya bimunku." 
Isaiah37:27 N'abaabirimu kye baava ni baweeramu irala amaani, ni batya einho era ni batabulwa, ni baba ng'oti n'eisubi erimera mu nimiro, era ng'oti n'ebisubi ebimera ghaigulu ku ndhu, ebiniala nga bikaali na kukula." 
Isaiah37:28 Aye ndidhi byonabyona ebikufaaku, ndidhi buli ky'okola, naamanha na buli y'oja, era naamanha nga bw'oneedundeekezaaku." 
Isaiah37:29 Mmaze okuwulira nga bw'oneedundeekezaaku, era nga bw'oneekuluntalizaaku. Mpegaano nja kukutunga eirobo lyange mu nhindo yo, nkusibe n'olukoba lwange mu kanwa mwo, nkwiririzeeyo mu ngira yeene ye wabitamu ng'oidha.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:30 Agho Isaia yaakoba kyabazinga Hezekia ati: “Kano n'akanaaba akamanhiso akakwoleka ebinaabaagho: Mu mwaka guno ogusooka mwidha kulya mere emera n'ekula yeene. Ate mu gule ogwokubiri muja kulya endhiraira y'eyo. Aye mu mwaka ogwokusatu mulisiga emere yaimwe mwagikungula. Mulisimba amasamba g'emizabbibu, mwalya n'ebibala byamu." 
Isaiah37:31 Abo abaliwonagho mu Buyudaaya, balisibuka ng'ebimera ebisimba emizi gyabyo ghansi mu itaka, ni bitaaku ebibala ghaigulu." 
Isaiah37:32 Ghaja kubaagho abaliwonagho mu Yerusalemu, n'abandi abaliva ku lusozi Sioni. Musengwa Katonda amaliriire okutuukiriza ekyo." 
Isaiah37:33 “Bino Musengwa Katonda by'akoba ku kyabazinga w'e Assiria, ati, ‘Taidha kwingira mu kibuga kino, waire okulasaayo akasaale. Taidha kukirumba na ngabo, waire okukibungaku emungo y'eitaka ey'okuniiniraku." 
Isaiah37:34 Engira emuleese yeene eyo yaidha okugema, aireyo nga taingiireeku mu kibuga kino. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Isaiah37:35 Ndidha kulwanirira ekibuga kino nkikuume, ku lwange ni ku lw'omugheereza wange Daudi.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:36 Agho obwire obwo, malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaaja mu kifo Abassiria ghe baasimba weema dhaibwe, yaita abantu emitwalo ikumi na munaana n'enkumi itaanu (185,000). Abantu bwe baazuuka ku nkyo, baaja okulinga bati ng'abo boonaboona mirambo!" 
Isaiah37:37 Agho Sennakeribu kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaavaagho yairayo, yaaja e Nineve yaaba eyo." 
Isaiah37:38 Olundi bwe yali mu isabo ng'ali kusinza omusambwa gwe Nisiroki, batabane be Adurammeleki ni Sharezeri baamwita n'empiima, baamala baalumukira mu nsi y'e Ararati. Agho mutabane we owundi Esarahaddoni yaamusikira ku bwakyabazinga." 
Isaiah38:1 Agho mu biseera ebyo, Hezekia yaalwala inho kumpi afe. Omulanzi Isaia mutabane wa Amozi yaajaayo okumubona, yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Tegeka eby'omu ndhu yo bukalamu, kuba oja kufa, toidha kuwona.’ ”" 
Isaiah38:2 Agho Hezekia yaakyuka yaalinga eri ekimante, yaasaba Musengwa Katonda ng'akoba ati:" 
Isaiah38:3 “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghemba oidhukire nga bwe mbairenga omwesigwa y'oli, nga ngondera by'ondagira n'omwoyo mulala, era nga nfuba buliidho okukola by'osiima.” Hezekia oyo yaatimbuka, yaalira inho amaziga." 
Isaiah38:4 Agho Isaia bwe yali ava aghali kyabazinga, aye ng'akaali na kubita mu luya olwa ghagati, Musengwa Katonda yaayogera naye." 
Isaiah38:5 Yaamukoba okwirayo akobe Hezekia ati: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Daudi dhaadha wo akoba ati, ‘Mpuliire ky'onsabye era naabona n'amaziga go. Kale ni bona, ndidha kwongera emyaka ikumi n'etaanu ku bulamu bwo." 
Isaiah38:6 Era ndidha kukuwonia iwe n'ekibuga kino Yerusalemu, nkutoole mu ngalo dha kyabazinga w'e Assiria. Era ndidha kulwaniriranga ekibuga kino.’ ”" 
Isaiah38:7 Isaia yairamu ati: “Musengwa Katonda aidha kukugha akamanhiso akakakasa ng'aja kutuukiriza ekyo ky'akobye. 
Isaiah38:8 Ekinsense ekijiira ku ngeri endhuba y'etambulamu, ekiri ku lupimo olw'amadaala kyabazinga Ahazi lwe yakola, Musengwa Katonda oyo aidha kukiizaayo einhuma obuleeyi bwa bigere ikumi.” Kale ekinsense ekyo kyairayo einhuma obuleeyi obwo obw'ebigere eikumi." 
Isaiah38:9 Luno n'olwembo kyabazinga Hezekia owa Buyudaaya lwe yaghandiika ng'amaze okuwona obulwaire bwe: 
Isaiah38:10 “Nali nkoba nti nja kufiira mu maani ghagati, nje bansibire e magombe nga nkaali kumalayo myaka gya bulamu bwange." 
Isaiah38:11 Nali nkoba nti olwo tikairayo kubona Musengwa Katonda, mu nsi ey'abalamu, waire okwirayo okubona abantu abagibaamu." 
Isaiah38:12 Obulamu bwange bwantoolebwaku era bwaja nga buweekereragho, ng'oti ni weema ey'omwayi ye basimbwiregho; era ng'oti n'ekighero kye basaze ku lugoye. Omusana gwonagwona n'obwire bwonabwona naalowoozanga nti Katonda aja kumalagho obulamu bwange." 
Isaiah38:13 Nasulanga nga nsinda businde obwire okukya, ng'oti n'ole empologoma y'eri kumemena amagumba. Omusana gwonagwona n'obwire bwonabwona naalowoozanga nti Katonda aja kumalagho obulamu bwange." 
Isaiah38:14 Nabanga agho nga nsinda ng'oti nhonhi. Amaiso ganduyirira olw'okulingiriranga eigulu. Wo Musengwa Katonda, idha omponie obuzibu bwe ndimu." 
Isaiah38:15 Tiidhi na kya kwogera, kuba Musengwa Katonda mwene n'aleeteire ebyo okubaagho. Ndi n'enaku nhingi ku mwoyo, n'amaani gampoiremu. Era tikaatenduka na ndoolo." 
Isaiah38:16 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nze ndidha kubangagho ku lulwo, nga niiwe ompa obulamu. Nkweghembye mponia mbe mulamu." 
Isaiah38:17 Bwenebwene okuba n'enaku enhingi nakufunamu omuganhulo; kuba iwe olw'okungonza einho wamponia amagombe agazikiriza, wansonigha ebibi byange byonabyona." 
Isaiah38:18 E magombe ezirayo asobola kukwebaza waire okukusaaka. Abafu baba tibakaasuubirira mu bwesigwa bwo naire. 
Isaiah38:19 Abalamu bonka n'abakusiima, nga nze bwe ndi kukola olwaleero. Abazaire bakobera abaana baibwe nga bw'oli omwesigwa." 
Isaiah38:20 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ondokoire. Kale ni twidha kukwemberanga mu bulamu bwaife bwonabwona, nga bwe tukuba entongooli n'endingidi mu isinzizo lyo.”" 
Isaiah38:21 Agho Isaia yali amaze okulagira baleete ekitole ky'ebibala ebikaziibwa eby'emitiini, batoolekuuku, bateeku ku ibwa lya Hezekia, asobole okuwona." 
Isaiah38:22 Era Hezekia yali amaze okubuuza Isaia ati: “Kamanhiso ki akanaakakasa nga ndidha kuwona, era nsobole okuja mu isinzizo?”" 
Isaiah39:1 Mu biseera ebyo, kyabazinga w'e Babilonia ng'ayetebwa Merodaki Baladani, mutabane wa Baladani, yaawulira nga Hezekia bwe yali alwaire era nga bwe yamala n'awona. Agho yaamughandiikira embaluwa, yaagigha abakwenda baagitwala, baatwaliraku n'ekirabo." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekia yaabasangaalira, yaabalaga eby'obukombe bwe byonabyona ebyali mu iterekero: feeza, zaabu, obuwoowo, omuzigo ogw'omughendo, eby'okulwanisa, ni byonabyona ebyali mu materekero ge. Ghazira kintu waire ekirala kiti ekyali mu kisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga oba mu bwakyabazinga bwe bwonabwona, ky'ataabalaga." 
Isaiah39:3 Agho Isaia omulanzi yaidha eri kyabazinga Hezekia, yaamubuuza ati: “Abasaadha bano baviiriire gha okwidha y'oli era bakobye ki?” Hezekia yairamu ati: “Baviire mu nsi ya ghala, Babilonia.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Era Isaia yaamubuuza ati: “Baboine ki mu kisaagaati kyo eky'obwakyabazinga?” Hezekia yairamu ati: “Baboine ebiri mu kisaagaati kyange eky'obwakyabazinga byonabyona, ghazira kintu kiri mu materekero gange kye ntabalaze.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Isaia yaakoba Hezekia ati: “Wulira Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ky'akoba, ati," 
Isaiah39:6 ‘Manha ng'ekiseera kiidha kutuuka, byonabyona ebiri mu kisaagaati kyo eky'obwakyabazinga, n'ebyo badhaadha bo bye baatereka okutuusa buti, batwalibwe e Babilonia. Tighalibaagho waire ekirala kiti ekirisigalagho." 
Isaiah39:7 N'abandi ku batabane bo beene, balibatwala baabalaawa, baafuuka bagheereza ba mu kisaagaati ekya kyabazinga w'e Babilonia.’ ”" 
Isaiah39:8 Agho Hezekia yaakoba Isaia ati: “Musengwa Katonda by'ayogeire birungi.” Hezekia oyo yakoba atyo, kuba yalowooza mule ati: “Kasita mu bulamu bwange twidha kubanga mu miraala nga ghazira kitweraliikiriza?”" 
Isaiah40:1 Katonda waimwe akoba ati: “Mugumye abantu bange, bwenebwene mubagumye." 
Isaiah40:2 Mwize amaani mu bantu b'omu Yerusalemu. Mubakobe muti mpegaano okudaazibwadaazibwa kukomye, era ebibi byaibwe bisoniyiibwa. Nze Musengwa Katonda namala okubagha ekibonerezo ekibajaamu olw'ebibi byaibwe.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Ghaligho amamiro g'oyo alangirira ati: “Mutegeke Musengwa Katonda gh'anaabita mu nsi enkalukalu, mutereeze oluguudo lwa Katonda waife mu irungu." 
Isaiah40:4 Buli kiiko kiriidhuzibwamu eitaka, buli lusozi na buli kasozi byasendebwa. Engira engodegode dhiritereezebwa, n'edh'ebikonko dhaanhirizibwa." 
Isaiah40:5 Olwo ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kiryeyoleka, abantu boonaboona baakibona. Musengwa Katonda mwene n'akobye.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Agho naawulira amamiro nga gakoba gati: “Langirira!” Nze naabuuza nti: “Kiki kye mbe nangirire?” Amamiro gandhiramu gati: “Langirira oti buli ekiri n'omubiri kiri ng'oti isubi, n'omunhiriro gwakyo guli ng'oti kimuli kya mu nsiko." 
Isaiah40:7 Musengwa Katonda bw'agheera obugheere ati omuuka, eisubi liniala n'ekimuli kyamagala. Bwenebwene abantu bali ng'oti isubi, tibaghangaala naire." 
Isaiah40:8 Waire nga kituufu ng'eisubi liniala n'ekimuli kyamagala, aye ekibono kya Katonda kibaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda.”"
