Isaiah40:9 Iwe aleetera Sioni amawulire amalungi, niina ghaigulu ku lusozi oluleeyi. Iwe aleetera Yerusalemu amawulire amalungi, kangula ku mamiro, oyogere n'amaani. Okobe ab'omu bibuga by'e Buyudaaya, oti: “Mubone, Katonda waimwe wuuyo aidha!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda wuuyo aidha ng'afuga n'amaani n'obuyinza. Wuuyo aidha n'ebirabo eby'okugabira abantu be, n'ebibonerezo eby'okwesasuuliza ku bazigu be." 
Isaiah40:11 Aidha kulabirira entaama dhe ng'oti n'omwayi bw'akola: asoloze edhikaali ento adhibbeedere mu kifuba, ate enzaire edhiyonsa adhitambuze mpola n'obwegendereza." 
Isaiah40:12 Naani eyaali apimyeku obungi obw'amaadhi g'enhandha ng'agasenesa bwa ngalo dhe? Oba okupima eigulu ng'akozesa bwa mikono gye? Naani eyaali apimyeku obungi obw'enkungu eri ku nsi? Oba okuta ensozi n'obusozi ku minzaani okubipima? 
Isaiah40:13 Naani eyaali alagiireku Musengwa Katonda eky'okukola? Oba okumugalagira ng'omuwi ow'amagezi? 
Isaiah40:14 Naani Katonda ye yaali yeebuuziizaaku amughe ku magezi, olwo asobole okusala ensonga mu mazima? Naani eyaali amwegereisaaku asobole okumanha okukola ebintu n'okubitegeera?" 
Isaiah40:15 Bona eno, Musengwa Katonda abona amaghanga goonagoona nga gaziramu muzindo, ng'oti n'eitondo obutondo ery'amaadhi. Era abona ebizinga nga biwewufu ng'oti nkungu bukungu." 
Isaiah40:16 Ensolo edhiba mu bibira eby'e Lebanoni dhoonadhoona aghalala, tidhimala kuvaamu bigheebwayo byokebwa eri Katonda. N'emiti egiba mu bibira ebyo gyonagyona aghalala tigivaamu nku dhimala kukuma muliro gwetaagisa." 
Isaiah40:17 Amaghanga goonagoona gali oti ti kintu naire mu maiso ge, gali bwa biwooboloolo." 
Isaiah40:18 Kale olwo Katonda tunaamugeza ku ani, oba kiki kye tunaamufaanania?" 
Isaiah40:19 Tali ng'oti n'ekisinzibwa ekitali Katonda omukozi ky'ayiiya obuyiiye, ate omugheesi w'ebintu bya zaabu n'akirimbyaku zaabu, era n'akitaaku ebintu ebiri ng'oti ndhegere dha feeza." 
Isaiah40:20 Aye omwavu atasobola kukozesa zaabu oba feeza, alondagho yaakozesa omuti ogutavunda. Yaanoonia omubaadhi omukugu, yaagukolamu ekifaananie ekitaatengeesebwe ni kigwa." 
Isaiah40:21 Obwo bwenebwene timukiidhi era timukiwulirangaku? Ghazira muntu akibakoberangaku okuva mu mainhama? Era timukitegeerangaku okuva ku kutondebwa kw'ensi? 
Isaiah40:22 Kale ni bwenebwene Katonda oyo n'atyama ghaigulu gh'ensi eneetooloovu. Abantu abagibaaku baboneka nga batini ng'oti masisi. Katonda oyo yabambagho eigulu ng'oti lutimbe, yaalyandhuluza ng'oti weema ya kubaamu." 
Isaiah40:23 Oyo n'aleetera abafuzi okugwa, baasigala agho batyo nga bazira bwe bali." 
Isaiah40:24 Baba ng'oti n'ebimera bye baakasimba, ebikaali kusimba mizi ghala inho mu itaka. Musengwa Katonda oyo bw'asindika empewo ebifuuwa byaniala. Agho empewo erimu kiwunga yaabifuuwa ng'ebitwaliriza ng'oti isubi ikalu." 
Isaiah40:25 Kale olwo Katonda oyo Omutukuvu tunaamugeza ku ani? Ghaligho omuntu ye tunaamufaanania? 
Isaiah40:26 Mulinge ghaigulu mubone! Naani eyatonda ebyo ebiri ku igulu? Ni Katonda omulala oyo abiduumira ng'oti igye, n'ayeta buli kirala eriina lyakyo. Era nga bw'ali omukologho ow'amaani agataloodheka, ghaziragho waire ekirala kiti ku ebyo ekitabaagho ng'ayese." 
Isaiah40:27 Kale imwe baidhukulu ba Yakobo, nkoba imwe Abaisiraeli, lwaki mwemuluguunhia muti Musengwa Katonda tabalumirwa, era muti bwe munhigirizibwa, Katonda waimwe oyo tabafaaku naire?" 
Isaiah40:28 Obwo bwenebwene timukiidhi era timukiwulirangaku? Kale ni bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda oyo ni Katonda atawaagho, eyatonda ensi yoonayoona okuva y'eva okutuuka y'ekanga. Takoogha waire okuwaamu amaani. Era titusobola kutegeera bukalamu magezi ge." 
Isaiah40:29 Abo abakooye abaizaamu amaani, n'abanafu yaabongeramu amaani." 
Isaiah40:30 Abaisuka boona bakoogha, n'abakaali abato boona baawaamu amaani." 
Isaiah40:31 Aye abo abeesiga Musengwa Katonda baliiramu amaani: baatambula nga tibakoogha, baaligita embiro nga tibasalaku naire, era baaguluka n'amaghagha ng'oti nkookooma." 
Isaiah41:1 Katonda akoba ati: “Musirike imwe ab'omu biketezo eby'oku nhandha, muwulirise kye nkoba. Abantu abamaghanga ka bairemu amaani buyaaka, baseete beewozeeku. Ka baseete tube ghalala omusango gusalwe." 
Isaiah41:2 Naani eyasiikuula omuntu oyo ow'e buvandhuba n'amuleetera okwidha, aje ng'aghangula buli gh'atuuka woonawoona? Naani amuleetera okughangula amaghanga, naatyankirira bakyabazinga n'ebigere bye n'abaitisa empiima ye, n'abafuuta ni baba ng'oti bwa nkungu, era n'abasansaania n'obusaale bwe ni baba ng'oti n'eisubi eikalu empewo ly'efuuwa n'eritwaliriza?" 
Isaiah41:3 Aja ng'ababingirira yaatambula bukalamu aghazira kufuna buzibu bwonabwona, ng'abitira mu ngira dh'atabitangamuuku." 
Isaiah41:4 Naani eyaleetera ebyo byonabyona okubaagho, n'abitegeka okuviira irala mu mainhama? Ninze Musengwa Katonda eyaligho ku ntoolo, era ninze alibaagho ku nkomerero." 
Isaiah41:5 Abantu b'omu biketezo eby'oku nhandha baabona bye nakola baatya, n'ab'omu nsi edh'eghala boona baabibona baadhugumira; kale ni, n'okwesoloza ni baidha." 
Isaiah41:6 Buli muntu ayamba mwine, era yaamukoba ati, ‘Guma omwoyo!’" 
Isaiah41:7 Omubaadhi ow'ekisinzibwa ekitali Katonda agumya omugheesi ow'ebintu bya zaabu. N'ole akonta ekisinzibwa ekyo n'enhundo okukisaania obukalamu, agumya ole akonta ekyuma ekisu nga kyengereire n'omuliro, bombi baakoba ole ayokya n'eisasi bati, ‘Kye tukoze n'ekyo kyene!’ Olwo baakikomerera n'emisumaali kirobe kuseseetuka mu kifo kyakyo." 
Isaiah41:8 Aye iwe eighanga Isiraeli, oli mugheereza wange, oli mwidhukulu wa Yakobo, era niiwe ye nalondamu, iwe eizaire lya Aburahamu mukagwa wange." 
Isaiah41:9 Nakutoola eyo ensi y'ekanga, naakweta okuva eyo mu nsonda dhaayo edhisinga kuba dha ghala. Naakukoba nti, ‘Niiwe omugheereza wange.’ Nakulondamu era tikuzirangaku." 
Isaiah41:10 Otatya, kuba nze ndi ghalala n'iwe. Oteeraliikirira, kuba nze ninze Katonda wo. Ndidha kukuyamba nkughe amaani, era nkulwanirire nkuleetere okughangula." 
Isaiah41:11 Bona eno, abo boonaboona abakuliku enzigu, ensoni dhiribagema baaswala. Abo abakulwanisa balizikirira baasaanagho." 
Isaiah41:12 Abo abakutakania olibanoonia aye nga tibakaaligho. Abo abakutanulaku entalo balizikirira baasaanagho ku nsi. 
Isaiah41:13 Nze Musengwa Katonda wo ninze nkugha amaani, era ninze ndi kukukoba nti, ‘Otatya, ndidha kuyamba.’" 
Isaiah41:14 Musengwa Katonda Omununuzi wo era Omutukuvu wo, iwe Isiraeli ninze nkoba ati: Otatya, waire ng'oli mugoogombe era omunafu ng'oti lugereegere. Nze ndidha kukuyamba." 
Isaiah41:15 Bona, ndikufuula waaba ng'oti n'ekintu kye bamulungulisa engaano, ekiriku amaino amayaaka amoogi. Olimulungula ensozi dhaaba bumulumulu, n'obusozi waabusa bwaba ng'oti nkungu." 
Isaiah41:16 Olibisensa, empewo yaabifuumuula yaabitwala, ni kiwunga yaabisansaania. Olwo waasagambira mu nze Musengwa Katonda, era wansaaka nze Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah41:17 Abantu bange abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu, bwe balinoonia amaadhi ni gababula, amamiro ni gatuuka n'okubakala olw'endiwo, nze Musengwa Katonda ndiiramu okusaba kwaibwe nze Katonda wa Isiraeli tiribalekulira agho." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndireetera emiiga okukuuluula nga giva ghaigulu ku nsozi edhiziraku kantu, naataagho enhindo edh'ensulo dh'amaadhi mu biiko. Ndifuula eirungu lyaba kidiba kya maadhi, n'eitaka eikalu lyabaamu ensulo edh'amaadhi agakuuluula." 
Isaiah41:19 Ndimeza mu irungu emiti emivule, n'emikasia, n'emyoliva, n'emiti egindi. Ndimeza mu itaka eikalu emiti emisipuressi, n'emipulane, n'emyalumugi, gyonagyona gyakulira ghalala." 
Isaiah41:20 Olwo abantu balibona baamanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkoze ekyo. Era balikirowoozaaku baakitegeera nga nze Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli ninze nkireeteire okubaagho.” 
Isaiah41:21 Musengwa Katonda kyabazinga wa Isiraeli akoba ati: “Imwe bakatonda ab'amaghanga mwandhule ensonga dhaimwe, mutooleyo n'obudhulizi obukakasa." 
Isaiah41:22 Mwidhe mutukobere ebiribaagho, tumanhe bukalamu ghe biribeeragho. Mutukobere n'ebyabita, mutwinhonhole n'amakulu gaabyo, tubirowoozeeku tumanhe ekiribivaamu." 
Isaiah41:23 Mutukobere ebiribaagho ye bwidha, olwo tukakase nga bwene muli bakatonda. Mubeeghooku n'ekirungi kye mukola, oba akabi ke muleetaghooku, olwo tutye era tudhugumire." 
Isaiah41:24 Bwona, mwenamwena muziramu makulu naire, ni bye mukola biziramu muganhulo. Era ole alondagho okubasinza, afuuka kyenhinhalwa." 
Isaiah41:25 Nasiikuula omuntu ava ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, era wuuyo atuuse. Alikozesa eriina lyange, yaatyankirira abafuzi ng'oti bityanka yaaba ng'oti n'omuwumbi bw'asamba eitosi." 
Isaiah41:26 Naani ku imwe eyalangaku nga bukaali ati kino kiribaagho, olwo tusobole okumanha nga yali mutuufu? Ghazira waire omulala ati ku imwe eyakirangiriraku, oba okubaagho omuntu eyawuliraku nga mukyogeraku." 
Isaiah41:27 Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nasooka okukikobera Sioni naatuma abakwenda okukobera Yerusalemu amawulire amalungi nti, ‘Bona baabo. Baabo abantu bo bali kwira!’" 
Isaiah41:28 Bwe ningirira bakatonda b'amaghanga tibonamu alimu makulu, era tibonamu ye nsobola kubuuza n'andhiramu kumpa magezi." 
Isaiah41:29 Boonaboona ghazira kye bagasa, era ghazira kye basobola kukola naire. N'ebifaananie byaibwe ebyakolebwa mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, biziramu makulu naire.”" 
Isaiah42:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ono n'omugheereza wange ye mpa amaani, era ye nalondamu aneesiimisa. Namutaamu omwoyo gwange, aleetere amaghanga okusalanga mu mazima." 
Isaiah42:2 Talikaabuka waire okwogera n'amaani, era ghazira alimuwulira ng'alangiriza mu nguudo." 
Isaiah42:3 Olugada oluvuniike talirukutulamu, n'olutambi olw'entaala olulikufenfeenha taliruzikiza, aye alireetera abantu okukolerwanga eby'amazima ebibagwaniire." 
Isaiah42:4 Taliwaamu maani waire okuwaamu eisuubi. Alireetagho okukolanga eby'amazima mu nsi ebigwaniire. N'ebiketezo eby'oku nhandha biri eyo biteegereire amateeka ge.” 
Isaiah42:5 Musengwa Katonda n'eyatonda eigulu yaalibambagho, era yaayandhagho ensi yaagitaamu n'ebigirimu byonabyona. Abantu ababa mu nsi eyo ni bagitambuliramu, yabataamu omuuka gwe bagheera n'omwoyo ogw'obulamu. Era Musengwa Katonda oyo akoba omugheereza we ati:" 
Isaiah42:6 “Nze Musengwa Katonda nakweta oleetere abantu okukolerwanga eby'amazima ebibagwaniire. Nakugema ku mukono naakukuuma. Era ndibita mu iwe naakola endagaano n'abantu boonaboona, era naaleetera amaghanga goonagoona obutangaavu." 
Isaiah42:7 Olizibula abatulu amaiso, waatoola abasibe mu makomera, waabawonia okubanga mu nzikiiza." 
Isaiah42:8 Nze ninze Musengwa Katonda, eryo n'eriina lyange. Ekitiisa kyange tikigabiraku muntu wundi, waire okusaakibwa kwange okukughaaku ebifaananie ebibaadhe." 
Isaiah42:9 Bona, ebintu bye nalangirira eira biibyo bituukiriire. Mpegaano nja kubakobera ebiyaaka, nga bikaali na kutoolera kubaagho.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Mwembere Musengwa Katonda olwembo oluyaaka. Ensi yoonayoona leka emusaake! Enhandha leka ewolome n'ebirimu byonabyona olw'eisanhu N'ebiketezo eby'oku nhandha leka byembe n'ababibaaku boonaboona. 
Isaiah42:11 Eirungu n'ebibuga ebirimu ka byembere kulala nga bisaaka Katonda, n'abantu ab'e Kedari bamusaake. Abantu b'e Sela leka bakube emizira nga bali ku ngulu ku nsozi." 
Isaiah42:12 Abo abali mu biketezo eby'oku nhandha leka basaake Musengwa Katonda, era bamuteemu ekitiisa." 
Isaiah42:13 Musengwa Katonda avaayo, yaaja okulumba ng'omulwani ow'amaani. Ayoleka obukambwe ng'omwisirukale, yaakaabuka ng'ataireku n'enduulu edh'omu lutalo, yaayolesa amaani amabitirivu ag'okulwanisa abazigu be." 
Isaiah42:14 Katonda akoba ati: “Mmaze ekiseera nga nsiriike busirike, naaba muguminkiriza era neefuga. Aye mpegaano nja kwasiikana ng'oti n'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala, asika omuuka nga tigwidha n'alakalaka obulakelake." 
Isaiah42:15 Ndyonoonayonoona ensozi n'obusozi, naakaza eisubi n'emiti ebidhiriku. Emiiga ndigifuula bizinga, naakaza n'ebidiba eby'amaadhi." 
Isaiah42:16 Ndikulemberamu abatulu, naababisa mu ngira dhe bataidhi. Enzikiiza ye balimu ndigifuula butangaavu, naasaania aghali ebikonko, baabita aghatereevu. Ebyo ndibibakolera, era tiribalekulira agho." 
Isaiah42:17 Abo abeesiga ebifaananie ebibaadhe, ni bakoba ebifaananie ebyakolebwa mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa bati, ‘Niimwe bakatonda baife’, ndibaleetera okunhoomebwa n'okuswazibwa.”" 
Isaiah42:18 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Muwulire imwe abaasemba amatu, n'imwe abatulu mumoge inho musobole okubona." 
Isaiah42:19 Naani omutulu okusinga omugheereza wange? Oba naani eyasemba amatu okusinga omukwenda wange ye ntuma? 
Isaiah42:20 Iwe Isiraeli oboine bingi, aye ofuniemu makulu ki? Oli n'amatu agawulira, aye kiki kyene ky'owuliiremu?”" 
Isaiah42:21 Musengwa Katonda olw'okuba yayenda okulokola abantu, yasalagho okugulumiza amateeka ge, abantu bagatengamu ekitiisa." 
Isaiah42:22 Aye abantu bano abazigu baabaiba era baabanhaga, era baabatega boonaboona baagwa mu biina, baabasibira mu makomera. Abazigu baabayiiga baabagemya aye nga ghazira abawonia, era baabanhaga aye ghaabulagho abanunula okubaiza." 
Isaiah42:23 Naani ku imwe anaawulirisa ekyo? Naani aneetegereza n'amanha ebinaabaagho ye bwidha? 
Isaiah42:24 Naani eyaghaayo Abaisiraeli okunhagibwa? Naani eyalekulira baidhukulu ba Yakobo abo mu ngalo dh'abanhazi? Ti ni Musengwa Katonda mwene, ye twasungughaza nga tukola ebibi, ni tuloba okukola by'ayenda, era ni tudheemera amateeka ge?" 
Isaiah42:25 Kale kyeyava n'atumaliraku obusungu bwe, era n'atusindikira entalo. Yatutumbukizaaku obusungu bwe ng'oti muliro bwayaka mu Isiraeli mwonamwona, aye twaloba kumanha birigho, bwatwokya aye era twaloba kubaagho ni kye twegamu naire!" 
Isaiah43:1 Aye mpegaano iwe Isiraeli, Musengwa Katonda eyakutonda akoba ati: “Otatya, kuba ndidha kukununula. Era namala irala okukweta eriina lyo, buti oli wange." 
Isaiah43:2 Bw'olibita mu maadhi agenda okukumira, ndiba ghalala n'iwe. Ni bwe galiba ag'emiiga tigalikweyaagho. Ni bw'olibita mu muliro tigulikwokya, ezira kabi kalikutuukaku;" 
Isaiah43:3 kuba ninze Musengwa Katonda wo, Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli era Omulokozi wo. Ndighaayo Misiri olw'okukununula, era naaghaayo Ethiopia ni Seba olw'okukuwonia." 
Isaiah43:4 Ndighaayo abantu kamaala olw'okukuzaawula, era naaghaayo amaghanga mangi ku lw'obulamu bwo; kuba nkugonza inho era nkutwala ng'oli wa mughendo era wa kitiibwa ye ndi." 
Isaiah43:5 Otatya, kuba nze ndi ghalala n'iwe. Ndisoloza abantu bo nga mbatoola e buvandhuba n'e bugwandhuba, naabaiza ghalala." 
Isaiah43:6 Ndiragira oluuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba lwabalekula, naalagira n'oluuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba lwaloba kubaloberaku. Olwo mwaleeta batabane bange okuva eyo eghala, era mwaleeta ni baghala bange okuva eyo mu nsi dhoonadhoona." 
Isaiah43:7 Abantu abo boonaboona bange ku bwange, era beetebwa liina lyange. Ekyabantondesa ni mbataagho, n'okumpeesanga ekitiisa.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Katonda akoba ati: “Muleete abantu bange bawozesebwe abatulu abo ate nga bali n'amaiso, era abasigha ate nga bali n'amatu." 
Isaiah43:9 Mwete abantu abamaghanga goonagoona beesololeze ghalala. Naani ku bakatonda baibwe asobola okulanga ebiribaagho, n'atukobera n'ebyaligho eira? Baleete obudhulizi bwaibwe obukakasa nga batuufu, era obudhulizi obwo n'obube bukakase amazima agali mu ebyo bye boogera." 
Isaiah43:10 Imwe Abaisiraeli niimwe abadhulizi bange era niimwe abagheereza bange be nalondamu, musobole okuumanha era mundhikirize. Olwo mukitegeere nga ninze Katonda zenka. Tebangayooku katonda yansooka kubaagho, era tighalibaagho alindhiririra naire." 
Isaiah43:11 Nze zenka, ninze Musengwa Katonda, era nze zenka, ninze omulokozi waimwe." 
Isaiah43:12 Imwe nabakobera ebiribaagho era naabalokola. Ghazira katonda wa bamaghanga gandi eyaali akozeeku ekyo, era niimwe abadhulizi bange." 
Isaiah43:13 Nze ninze Katonda okuva eira n'eira, era buliidho ndidha kusigalanga nga ninze Katonda. Ghazira asobola kutoola kintu kyonakyona mu buyinza bwange, era ghazira asobola kukyusaamu mu kye mba nkoze.”" 
Isaiah43:14 Musengwa Katonda Omununuzi waimwe era Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli akoba ati: “Olw'okwenda okubawonia ndisindika eigye okulumba Babiloni. Ndimenha eminhololo egisiba endhigi dh'ekibuga, era okwasiikana kw'abantu baayo okubaire okw'amasanhu, ndikufuulamu kulira maziga." 
Isaiah43:15 Ninze Musengwa Katonda Omutukuvu waimwe, Omutonzi wa Isiraeli era Kyabazinga waimwe.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Eira einho, Musengwa Katonda oyo n'eyatema oluguudo mu nhandha, yaakola engira mu maadhi amaleeyi." 
Isaiah43:17 Yaazikiriza eigye ery'abalwani ab'amaani abaali n'embalaasi n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo. Baagangalima baagwa obutairayo kusitukagho kabiri, olwo baazima era baawola ng'oti lutambi lwa ntaala." 
Isaiah43:18 Aye Musengwa Katonda oyo akoba ati: “Mulobe kwesibirira ku bya ira, waire okwemalira ku byabita." 
Isaiah43:19 Mpegaano mulingirire mubone ekiyaaka kye nja okukola. Era nakitandiseeku ira. Timuli kukibona? Nja kutema oluguudo mu irungu, era nte n'emiiga mu nsi eyo enkalukalu." 
Isaiah43:20 Ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhirintaamu ekitiisa, n'ebibe ni maaya byansaaka; olw'okuba ntaagho emiiga mu nsi enkalukalu naaleetera amaadhi okuba mu irungu, olwo naagha abantu bange be nalondamu okunhwa." 
Isaiah43:21 Abo n'abantu bange, nze mwene be neeteeragho, bansaakenga.”" 
Isaiah43:22 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Aye imwe Abaisiraeli baidhukulu ba Yakobo, nze mwamala mwaneesinwa bwesinwe, mwaloba okunsinza." 
Isaiah43:23 Timwandeetera ntaama dhaimwe ng'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, waire okuntaamu ekitiisa nga mumpa emisengo. Nze tibakaluubirizangaku nga mbasaba ebigheebwayo, waire okubakooya nga mbapikiriza okumpa obubbaani obw'okuuniokeza." 
Isaiah43:24 Timwaghaayooku mpiiya kungulira bubbaani buwunha kawoowo, waire okundhigusa n'amasavu g'ensolo dhaimwe. Aye mu kifo ky'okukola ebyo, mwantwika bwa mugugu gwa bibi byaimwe, mwankooya n'ebyonoono byaimwe." 
Isaiah43:25 Aye era nze, ninze mwene nsonigha ebibi byaimwe nze ku bwange, era tija kabiri kubibavunaana." 
Isaiah43:26 Mwidhukire eby'eira era tunoonereze ensonga. Mughe empoza yaimwe mwoleke nga bwe muli abatuufu. 
Isaiah43:27 Dhaadha waimwe eyasooka yakola ebibi, n'abakulembeze baimwe boona baayonoona bansungughaza." 
Isaiah43:28 Kyenava ni ndeetera abo abalabirira Ekifo Ekitukuvu okunhoomebwa, naaghaayo baidhukulu ba Yakobo okuzikirizibwa, era naaleka Abaisiraeli abo baafuuka nseko dha balamu.”" 
Isaiah44:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mpegaano muwulire imwe baidhukulu ba Yakobo omugheereza wange, imwe Abaisiraeli be nalondamu." 
Isaiah44:2 Mulobe kutya, kuba muli bagheereza bange, era abantu bange be nalondamu, be ngonza. Nze ninze Musengwa Katonda eyabatonda ni mbata mu nda dha bainhaimwe, era ndidha kubayambanga." 
Isaiah44:3 Ndireeta amaadhi gaagwa mu nsi eziramu waire itondo lya maadhi, era naata emiiga mu itaka eryakala. Ndireeta omwoyo gwange gwaika ku baana baimwe, era naayugha enkabi dhange ku baidhukulu baimwe." 
Isaiah44:4 Balikula bukalamu ng'oti isubi eriri kumpi n'amaadhi, era baagimuka ng'oti n'obuti obukulira ku mbali kw'omwiga." 
Isaiah44:5 Ghalibaagho omuntu alikoba ati, ‘Nze ndi wa Musengwa Katonda.’ Ate ole alyetuuma eriina lya Yakobo, n'owundi yaaghandiika ku mukono gwe ati, ‘Nze ndi wa Musengwa Katonda,’ era yeebalira mu Baisiraeli.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Kyabazinga era Omununuzi wa Isiraeli, akoba ati: “Ninze entoolo era ninze enkomerero, era nze zenka, ninze Katonda. Ezirayo kyetebwa katonda okutoolaku nze zenka." 
Isaiah44:7 Naani ali ng'oti ninze? Bw'aba ng'aliyo, akyogere akikakase mu maiso gange. Naani okuva eira n'eira eyalangiriranga ebyali bija okubaagho? Kale buti leka akobere abantu n'ebyo ebija okubaagho." 
Isaiah44:8 Mutatya era mutawaamu maani. Mukiidhi bukalamu ng'okuva eira n'eira n'okutuusa ye buli eno, mbairenga mbakobera ebiribaagho. Era niimwe abadhulizi bange. Ate eriyo ekyetebwa katonda okutoolaku nze? Ninze zenka ali ng'oti n'olubaale mwe mwewogoma, ezirayo wundi ye ndidhi.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Abo boonaboona abakola ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda bali agho batyo, bazira kye bagasa naire. N'ebisinzibwa byaibwe ebyo ebibeesiimisa, biziramu muganhulo. N'abo ababisinza batulu beene, era tibaidhi ng'ekyo kye bakola kisobola okubaleetera okuswala obuswale." 
Isaiah44:10 Ole akola ekifaananie n'akyeta katonda oba n'akiwumba obuwumbe, aba adaagiire bwereere." 
Isaiah44:11 Buli alikisinza ensoni dhirimugema, kuba abakola ebifaananie ebyo bantu buntu. Bagwaine boonaboona babaleete babeemereze ghalala, bawozesebwe. Memale olwo batye era baswazibweswazibwe." 
Isaiah44:12 Omugheesi bw'aba ali kugheesa ekifaananie ekisinzibwa, atoola ekyuma yaakifuguta mu manda ag'omuliro, yaagema enhundo mu ngalo dhe edh'amaani yaakikonta okukitereeza. Bweyeeyongera okuja ng'akola atyo, endhala emuluma, yaakoogha, era bw'atanhwa ku maadhi awaamu amaani." 
Isaiah44:13 Ate omubaadhi apima omuti n'olukoba, yaagulambaku n'ekalaamu. Yaagulanda n'eranda, era yaagulambaku n'ekyuma ekipima, yaagukolamu ekifaananie ekirungi kyene ekiri ng'oti muntu, eky'okuteebwa mu isabo." 
Isaiah44:14 Asobola okutema omuvule mu kibira yaakozesa ogwo, oba yaakozesa omusipuressi, oba omuti omukologho ogundi. Oba yaasimba omuti ogundi, amaadhi gaagwa gaagukuza." 
Isaiah44:15 Omuntu oyo atoola ku muti gw'atemye yaakolamu ekisinzibwa ekitali Katonda, era ekifaananie ekyo ekibaadhe yaakikubira amakiryaivu, yaakisinza. Bw'amala, omuti ogusigairegho agufuulamu nku, yaatwala yaakumisa omuliro, yaayota yaasuugha, era yaafumbisa n'emere." 
Isaiah44:16 Enku edhindi adhikumisa omuliro yaatalika emamba, yaalya yaiguta. Era yaayota omuliro, yaamala yaakoba ati: “Ha, akaliro akalungi kansuuyiiza!”" 
Isaiah44:17 Ekitundu kire ekindi eky'omuti akikolamu ekisinzibwa, yaakikubira amakiryaivu, yaakisinza ng'akoba ati: “Nkweghembye mponia, kuba niiwe katonda wange!”" 
Isaiah44:18 Abantu abo bazira kye baidhi era bazira kye balowooza kikalamu. Baaziba amaiso gaibwe n'emyoyo gyaibwe, baaloba kubona waire okutegeera." 
Isaiah44:19 Omuntu akola ekisinzibwa ekitali Katonda, taidhukira waire okwefumintirizaaku mule ati: “Ekitundu ky'omuti ogwo nkikumiisa omuliro naagufumbisa emere, era naatalikaku n'emamba naagirya. Memale obwo ekitundu kyagwo ekisigairegho ate kye nnaafuula ekisinzibwa ekyenhinhalwa, era ni nkikubira n'amakiryaivu, ate nga kiti buti?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Omuntu oyo ali ng'oti n'ole alya eivu. Aba yeerimbye era ng'adaaliimye, nga takaasobola kuwonia bulamu bwe, waire okwebuuzaaku mule ati: “Ekifaananie kye ngemye mu ngalo dhange ti kya buguya bwereere?”" 
Isaiah44:21 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Iwe Yakobo idhukiranga ebintu ebyo, kuba oli mugheereza wange iwe Isiraeli. Nakutonda obe mugheereza wange, era tirikwerabira naire." 
Isaiah44:22 Ndheyiiyaagho ebibi byo byavaagho ng'oti kire, ebyonoono byo ebyo byabulagho ng'oti lufu. Kyuka oire ye ndi, kuba ninze nakununula.”" 
Isaiah44:23 Iwe eigulu yemba, kuba Musengwa Katonda n'akoze ekyo. Imwe ebitundu ebiri eyo ghansi mu itaka, muleekaane. Imwe ensozi n'emiti gyonagyona egy'omu bibira, mwembe, kuba Musengwa Katonda yanunula baidhukulu ba Yakobo, era alyoleka ekitiisa kye mu Baisiraeli abo." 
Isaiah44:24 “Ninze Musengwa Katonda Omununuzi waimwe, eyabatonda ni mbata mu nda dha bainhaimwe. Ninze Musengwa Katonda eyakola ebintu byonabyona, ni mmambagho eigulu zenka, era ni nhandhagho ensi nga ghazira angemeireku naire." 
Isaiah44:25 Ninze mmala amakulu mu ebyo abalaguzi bye balagula, n'ebyo abalogo bye bakola. Ndhuuluusa abagezi bye boogera, naayoleka nti bye beeta eby'amagezi byaga busiru." 
Isaiah44:26 Aye nkakasa ebyo omugheereza wange by'ayogera, naatuukiriza omukwenda wange oyo by'alangirira. Ekibuga Yerusalemu nkikakasa nga bwe kiidha okubangamu abantu, n'ebibuga bya Buyudaaya ebyayonoonebwa naabikakasa nga bwe birizimbibwa obuyaaka." 
Isaiah44:27 Ninze ndagira amaadhi g'enhandha amangi gaakala, n'emiiga gyona gyakala." 
Isaiah44:28 Ninze nkoba Kuro nti, ‘Niiwe omufuzi ye ntairegho otuukirize byonabyona bye nhenda.’ Naalagira Yerusalemu nti, ‘Oidha kuzimbibwa buyaaka,’ era naakoba n'eisinzizo nti, ‘Omusingi gwo gwidha kuteebwagho.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:1 Musengwa Katonda yalonda kyabazinga Kuro, yaamutuma okughangula amaghanga, n'okutoola ku bakyabazinga obukumu. Musengwa Katonda alimwiguliragho emiryango gy'ebibuga, ghaaloba kubaagho agiigalagho. Musengwa Katonda akoba Kuro oyo ati:" 
Isaiah45:2 “Nze mwene ndikukulemberamu, naasenda ensozi dhaafuuka museetwe. Ndimenhamenha endhigi dh'ekyuma ky'ekikomo, naakutulamu eminhololo egidhisiba egy'ekyuma ekigumu einho." 
Isaiah45:3 Ndikugha obukombe bwe baakweka mu bifo ebyekusifu, olwo omanhe nga nze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli, ninze nkwese eriina lyo obe wange." 
Isaiah45:4 Nkwese eriina lyo obe wange, oyambe omugheereza wange Yakobo, era nga oyo ni Isiraeli ye nalondamu. Nkughaire ekitiibwa eky'okwetebwa owange, waire nga iwe tondhidhi." 
Isaiah45:5 Ninze Musengwa Katonda zenka, ezirayo Katonda wundi naire. Ndikugha amaani ge weetaaga, waire nga iwe tondidhi." 
Isaiah45:6 Kino nkikoze, abantu boonaboona okuva e buvandhuba okutuuka e bugwandhuba, basobole okumanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda zenka, ezirayo Katonda wundi naire." 
Isaiah45:7 Ninze ndeetagho obutangaavu era ninze ndeetagho n'enzikiiza; ninze ndeetagho enkabi era ninze ndeetagho n'akabi. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkola ebyo byonabyona." 
Isaiah45:8 Iwe eigulu, toonhesa obutuufu buve ku igulu ng'oti maadhi, era ensi eyasame ebumire, bumerukemu eidembe n'amazima, bibe ku nsi. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze ndidha okuleetera ekyo okubaagho.”" 
Isaiah45:9 Akagwireku oyo atakania Eyamutonda, kuba aba ng'oti n'ekiwumbe bwe kyanditakainia ole akiwumbye. Aye nga bwenebwene eitosi lisobola okubuuza aliwumbisa liti: “Oli kuwumba ki?” Oba okukoba liti: “Ozira bukugu?”" 
Isaiah45:10 Akagwireku oyo akoba lata we n'inhina ati: “Ku lwaki mwanzaala?” 
Isaiah45:11 Musengwa Katonda Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli era omutonzi we, akoba ati: “Imwe muzira bukumu bwa kumbuuza ebigema ku baana bange, waire okundagira eky'okukola." 
Isaiah45:12 Ninze natonda ensi, naatonda n'abantu abagibaamu. Nakozesa obuyinza bwange, naabamba eigulu, era ninze nfuga n'ebiri ghaigulu mu ibbanga byonabyona." 
Isaiah45:13 Ninze nasiikuula Kuro naamuleetera okuja okutereeza ebyali byonooneike. Era ndidha kuleeteranga by'akola byonabyona okuja obukalamu. Alizimba buyaaka ekibuga kyange Yerusalemu, era yaaleetera abantu bange okuva mu bunhage. Ekyo alikikola aghazira muntu kumugulirira waire okumugha empeera.” Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, n'akobye." 
Isaiah45:14 Musengwa Katonda era akoba Isiraeli ati: “Obukombe bwa Misiri n'ebintu by'Ethiopia eby'okusuubula birifuuka bibyo. N'abantu b'e Seba abawaigufu balifuuka bairu bo, baakunonereza nga bali ku ndhegere, era baidha y'oli okukukubira amakiryaivu nga baatula bati, ‘Bwenebwene Katonda ali n'iwe wenka, era oyo ni Katonda yenka, ezirayo wundi." 
Isaiah45:15 Katonda Omulokozi wa Isiraeli, ni Katonda eyeekweka." 
Isaiah45:16 Abo boonaboona abakola ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, ensoni dhiribagema era baaswazibwaswazibwa." 
Isaiah45:17 Aye Musengwa Katonda buliidho aidha kulokolanga Isiraeli. Imwe Abaisiraeli ensoni tidhiribagema waire okuswazibwaswazibwa ebyanda n'ebyanda.’ ” 
Isaiah45:18 Musengwa Katonda yatonda eigulu, era oyo ni Katonda. Yaawumba ensi yaagikola, yaagitaagho yaaba ngumu begulugulu. Tiyagitondera kubaagho nga ntabangufutabangufu, yagitaagho nga ya kubangamu bantu. Era akoba ati: “Ninze Musengwa Katonda zenka, ezirayo Katonda wundi naire." 
Isaiah45:19 Tyogerangaku mu kaama ng'oti n'ali mu nsi ey'enzikiiza. Tikobangaku Baisiraeli kuunooneza mu nsi ntabangufutabangufu, ni badaagira bwereere nga ti bambona. Nze Musengwa Katonda ndhogera mazima, naakobera abantu ebituufu.”" 
Isaiah45:20 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mwidhe mwesolokeze ghalala, museete imwe abaawonagho mu maghanga. Abantu abo abaja nga bagemereire ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda ebyakolebwa mu biti obuti, era ni basaba katonda atasobola kubalokola, baziramu magezi naire." 
Isaiah45:21 Muleete empoza yaimwe mugyandhuleyo, n'abo ababawolezaagho beebuuzaganie buli muntu ku mwine. Naani eyalanga eira einho ebyo ebyali biri n'okubaagho? Ti ninze Musengwa Katonda? Kale ni ezirayo kyetebwa katonda okutoolaku nze, Katonda Omutukuvu era Omulokozi. Bwenebwene ezirayo wundi okutoolaku nze." 
Isaiah45:22 Imwe abantu b'ensi yoonayoona okuva y'eva okutuuka y'ekanga, mukyuke mwire ye ndi mbalokole, kuba ninze Katonda zenka, ezirayo wundi." 
Isaiah45:23 Neerayiriire mwene, era kye ndhogera tija kukitoolagho naire: Kiisi muntu alinkubira amakiryaivu, era kiisi lulimi lulyeyama mu liina lyange." 
Isaiah45:24 Balikoba bati mu nze Musengwa Katonda mwonka n'omuli obutuufu n'amaani. Aye abo boonaboona abankyagha, ensoni dhiribagema baaswazibwaswazibwa." 
Isaiah45:25 Mu nze Musengwa Katonda, eizaire lyonalyona erya Isiraeli mwe lirifunira obughanguzi n'ekitiisa.”" 
Isaiah46:1 “Eno n'enkomerero y'emisambwa egy'e Babiloni! Ebifaananie eby'emisambwa Beli ni Nebo egyasinzibwanga eira, buti babitwise ku ndogoyi na ku nte. Ebifaananie ebyo byafuuka migugu ku migongo gy'ensolo okudhiruyiriza." 
Isaiah46:2 Emisambwa egyo amaani gagiwoire, ghazira ye gisobola kuyamba waire gyene okwewonia. Bagigema bugeme baagitwala mu bunhage. Eno n'enkomerero y'emisambwa egy'e Babiloni!" 
Isaiah46:3 Mumpulirise imwe ab'endhu ya Yakobo, imwe mwenamwena Abaisiraeli abaawonagho. Bukyanga muzaalibwa, ninze mbalabirira okuviira irala mu nda dha bainhaimwe." 
Isaiah46:4 Ni bwe mulikula ni mukairigha ni mumera n'envu, era ndidha kubalabiriranga. Ninze eyabatonda, era ndidha kubakuumanga mbayambe mbalokole." 
Isaiah46:5 Naani ye mulingezaaku ni mumwagayaza ninze, oba naani ye mulingeragerania naye ni tufaanana naye?" 
Isaiah46:6 Abantu baja baafukumula mu nsawo dhaibwe zaabu, baapima ni feeza ku minzaani. Olwo baasasula omugheesi era baalagira ebintu ebyo abigheeseemu ekifaananie eky'omusambwa, era baamala baakikubira amakiryaivu baakisinza." 
Isaiah46:7 Bakibbeedera ku mabega baakitwala, baakita mu kifo kyakyo, kyaba agho nga tikisobola kwesegenhiaku waire okuvaaghooku. Bwe ghabaagho aidha okukisaba tikisobola kumwiramu, waire okumuwonia mu bizibu bye." 
Isaiah46:8 Imwe abakozi b'ebibi, mwidhukire ekintu ekyo era mukirowoozeeku." 
Isaiah46:9 Mwidhukire ebyaligho mu biseera eby'eira, mumanhe nga ninze Katonda zenka, ezirayo wundi; era ezirayo ali ng'oti ninze." 
Isaiah46:10 Nalangirira okuviira irala mu mainhama ebyo ebyali eby'okwidha ku nkomerero; okuviira irala mu biseera eby'eira naayoleka ebyo ebyali n'okubaagho. Naakoba nti, ‘Ndituukiriza bye ntegeike, era naakola byonabyona bye nhenda.’" 
Isaiah46:11 Ndyeta omuntu yaidha okuva e buvandhuba. Aliidha ng'oti n'enhonhi eyiiga, yaaja yaakola kye ntegeike. Ntyo bwe nkobye era tiriroba kukituukiriza." 
Isaiah46:12 Imwe abantu ab'empwitu mumpulirise, imwe abali eghala einho n'okulokolebwa:" 
Isaiah46:13 Obulokozi bwange mbuseesiisa kumpi, tibukaali ghala naire. Tija kulwagho kulokola bantu bange. Ndinunula Yerusalemu olwa Isiraeli okumpeesanga ekitiisa.”" 
Isaiah47:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Iwe Babiloni, va ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga oike ghansi otyame mu nkungu. Ng'okaali kughangulwa waliku ng'oti n'omughala omwegha. Aye mpegaano tibakaakwegomba, kuba obulungi n'obunhirivu bye wali nabyo tibikaaligho." 
Isaiah47:2 Ja ku lubengo ogeme enso, ose ensaano. Weeghembule mu maiso ekitambaala, otoolemu ekivaalo kyo eky'oku ngulu, ofungize ku bikooyi byo, oje odooke emiiga osomoke." 
Isaiah47:3 Abantu balikubona ng'oli madu, nga bakuswaziiza n'ensoni dhaakugema. Nja kwesasuuza era ezira muntu ye ndisaasira naire.”" 
Isaiah47:4 Eriina ly'Omununuzi waife, ni Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, era oyo n'Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah47:5 Musengwa Katonda oyo akoba Babiloni ati: “Tyama osirike, weewumbe mu nzikiiza, kuba tibaliirayo kabiri kukweta inhebantu wa maghanga." 
Isaiah47:6 Nasungughalira abantu bange, naababisa ng'oti tibakaali bange. Naabakugha okubafuga, waaloba kubasaasiraku naire. N'abakaire boona waabafugisa bukambwe." 
Isaiah47:7 Walowoozanga oti oliba inhebantu byanda na byanda, waaloba kutaayo mwoyo na kwidhukira nti buli kintu kiri n'enkomerero." 
Isaiah47:8 Kale ni wulira kino, iwe ayenda einho amasanhu: Oja waatyama waasiira n'enkondo, waakoba mule oti, ‘Ninze aligho, ezirayo wundi okutoolaku nze. Nze tija kuba namwandu, waire okufiirwaku abaana.’" 
Isaiah47:9 Aye ebyo byombi birikwidhira mu kaseera buseera era ku lunaku lulala luti, waafiirwa abaana era wafuuka namwandu. Era waire eirogo lyo n'okulagula kwo, by'okozesa tibirikuwonia naire." 
Isaiah47:10 Waja weesigulira ku kukola ebibi, waalowooza oti ghazira akubona. Amagezi go n'okumanha kwo byakuleetera okudaaliima, waakoba mule oti, ‘Ninze aligho, ezirayo wundi okutoolaku nze.’" 
Isaiah47:11 Aye ebizibu birikwidhira ebikusinga amaani, akabi k'otalisobola kwetoolaku kaakutuukaku mu kaseera buseera, waatuuka ku kuzikirira kw'otasobola kwewonia." 
Isaiah47:12 Kale iwe weekalangulire ku irogo lyo ni ku kulagula kwo, by'obaire okozesanga okuva mu buto bwo. Oba katyo wandibifunamu omuganhulo, byakuyamba okutiisa abazigu bo." 
Isaiah47:13 Abawi b'amagezi b'oli nabo abangi bakumenhera bwereere: oli n'abeetegereza ebiri ku igulu, waaba n'abeekebeedha emuunienie, n'abo abalagula nga bajiira ku kuboneka kw'omwezi. Kale ku lwaki abo tibavaayooku kukuyamba, bakukobere ebirikutuukaku?" 
Isaiah47:14 Bona eno, abo baliba ng'oti isubi ikalu, omuliro gwabookya okubasaaniagho. Tibalisobola kwewonia kubbeibbera kwa muliro gwa maani gutyo. Tiguliba gwa kisuusu abantu gwe batyama agho ni boota." 
Isaiah47:15 Batyo bwe baliba abo be weesiguliraku, be wakolagananga nabo okuva obuto. Boonaboona balikuvaaku, buli muntu yaaja mu ngira ye ng'atambulatambula eyo atyo yenka, ghaabulagho akuwonia waire omulala ati.”" 
Isaiah48:1 Imwe ab'endhu ya Yakobo muwulire kino: Mwetebwa Baisiraeli abasimuka mu Yuda. Mulayira mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda, era mwayatula nga Katonda wa Isiraeli oyo, ni Katonda waimwe, aye nga bya ku munwa bunwa, ebiziramu mazima waire obwesimbu." 
Isaiah48:2 Era mweyeta ba mu kibuga ekitukuvu, abeesiga Katonda wa Isiraeli, eriina lye nga ni Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye." 
Isaiah48:3 Musengwa Katonda oyo akoba Isiraeli ati: “Okuva eira n'eira, nze nabakoberanga ebiribaagho, era mwene nze naamalanga naabireetera okubaagho amangu geene, byatuukiriranga." 
Isaiah48:4 Namanha nga bwe muli ab'empwitu, abali n'emyoyo emibbalangafu ng'oti n'ekyuma ekigumu einho, era abali n'ebirowoozo ebikalangafu ng'oti n'ekyuma ky'ekikomo." 
Isaiah48:5 Kyenava ni mbakobereragho ebiribaagho, naabiranga mu bimanhe nga bikaali na kubaagho. Olwo mulobe kukoba muti, ‘Ebifaananie byaife ebibaadhe bye tusinza, era n'ebyo ebyakolebwa mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, n'ebireeteire ebintu ebyo okubaagho.’" 
Isaiah48:6 Ebyo byonabyona mwabiwulira, era muli n'okwatula muti byali bituufu, kuba mwabibona byatuukirira. Okuva ni mpegaano nja kubakobera ebiyaaka, bye ntabamanhisangaku naire." 
Isaiah48:7 Ebintu bino naakaja okubireetera okubaagho, tibibangaghooku naire. Olwo mulobe na kukoba muti mubaire mubiidhi." 
Isaiah48:8 Okuva eira n'eira timubiwulirangaku na matu gaimwe, waire okubimanhaku, kuba namanha nga mwefuulafuula, era ng'okuva lwe mwazaalibwa muli badheemu." 
Isaiah48:9 Olw'okukuuma ekitiisa kyange, ka nfuge obusungu bwange mbaguminkirize, ndobe kubazikiriza." 
Isaiah48:10 Mubone eno, nabaleba nga mbabisa mu kudaazibwadaazibwa, ng'oti ni feeza bwe bamukenenula mu muliro. Era naakizuula nga ghazira kye mugasa." 
Isaiah48:11 Kale bye nkola byonabyona, mbikola lwa bulungi bwange nze, ndobe kuleka liina lyange kuswazibwa, oba okuleka ekitiisa kyange owundi okukigabanaku.”" 
Isaiah48:12 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: Imwe Abaisiraeli be nayeta, baidhukulu ba Yakobo mumpulirise. Ninze Katonda eyaligho ku ntoolo, era ninze ndibaagho ku nkomerero." 
Isaiah48:13 Ninze mwene eyataagho omusingi gw'ensi, era nze mwene naabambagho eigulu; bwe mbyeta bivugira era byaidha mangu." 
Isaiah48:14 Mwidhe mwenamwena mwesolokeze ghalala, muwulire. Naani ku bakatonda boonaboona eyaali alanzeeku ati nze nonze omuntu ye nhenda, aja okulumba Babiloni asobole okukikolaku nga nze bwe nhenda?" 
Isaiah48:15 Nze mwene, ninze nayogera era ninze namweta. Naamulagira okuja, era olugendo lwe naalugha enkabi." 
Isaiah48:16 Museete ghe ndi muwulire kino: Okuviira irala mu mainhama n'okutuusa mpegaano, tyogerangaku mu kyama. Era bye ndhogera bimala byatuusa ekiseera byabaagho. Mpegaano Musengwa Katonda antumye n'amaani ag'omwoyo gwe." 
Isaiah48:17 Iwe Isiraeli, Musengwa Katonda Omununuzi wo era Omutukuvu, akoba ati: Ninze Musengwa Katonda wo akwegeresa ebikuganhula, era akukulemberamu mu ngira y'ogwaine okubitamu." 
Isaiah48:18 “Ha, kale ngoli wawulira ebiragiro byange! Wandibaire mu miraala egikuuluula ng'oti mwiga ogutakala, era waaba n'obughanguzi obw'amaani ng'oti kwefuukuula kwa nhandha." 
Isaiah48:19 Ab'eizaire lyo bandibaire kamaala ng'oti musenho, nga tibabalika ng'oti mpeke dhaagwo. Era nandibakugiire baaloba kuwaagho kuzikirira.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Muve mu Babiloni, mulumuke muje! Mulangirire amawulire gano buli ghantu nga mukuba emizira, mugasansaanie gatuuke eyo yoonayoona ensi y'ekanga. Mukobe muti: “Musengwa Katonda anunwire omugheereza we Yakobo.”" 
Isaiah48:21 Musengwa Katonda oyo bwe yali ng'ali kubisa abantu be mu irungu, endiwo tiyabagema naire; kuba yayatisa olubaale, amaadhi gaatiiriika nga gava mu lutanda olwo, atyo yaabagha amaadhi okuva mu lubaale olwo." 
Isaiah48:22 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abakozi b'ebibi tibaja kuba na miraala naire.” 
Isaiah49:1 Imwe ebiketezo eby'oku nhandha muwulirise kye nkoba, imwe amaghanga agali eyo e ghala mumpulirise. Musengwa Katonda yandheta nga nkaali na kuzaalibwa, yaanonda nga nkaali na mu nda ya maama, mbe mugheereza we." 
Isaiah49:2 Yaleetera ebibono bye ndhogera okuba ng'oti mpiima endhogi. Yankuuma n'omukono gwe naaba ng'oti kalaso ke akaghagale mu kiruutu kye. 
Isaiah49:3 Era yankoba ati: “Isiraeli, n'iwe omugheereza wange ye ndyolekeramu ekitiisa kyange.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Agho naakoba nti: “Bwenebwene nadaagiranga busa okukola, neemalangamu amaani gange bya bwereere. Aye ate nkakasa ng'aliinwanirira, era yampa empeera olw'ebyo bye nkola.”" 
Isaiah49:5 Musengwa Katonda oyo n'eyampumbira mu nda ya maama, yantegeka okuba omugheereza we, nje mmusolokeze ab'eizaire lya Yakobo, abantu be abo abaasansaanizibwa. Musengwa Katonda oyo anfuula wa kitiisa mu maiso ge, era oyo ni Katonda wange, ensimuko ey'amaani gange." 
Isaiah49:6 Musengwa Katonda oyo yankoba ati: “Iwe eky'okuba omugheereza wange n'okola ogw'okwizaagho ekitiisa ky'ebika bya Yakobo, n'okwiza Abaisiraeli abaawonagho, tikimala. Ku ebyo ndyongerezaaku okukufuula eitaala eri amaghanga, olwo ensi yoonayoona erokolebwe.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Musengwa Katonda Omutukuvu era Omununuzi wa Isiraeli, yeeyongera yaayogera n'omugheereza w'abafuzi oyo abantu ye banhooma einho, n'amaghanga ye gakyagha. Yaamukoba ati: “Bakyabazinga balikubona ng'osibwirwa, baasituka baakutaamu ekinhagansi, n'abakungu boona balikubona baakukubira amakiryaivu; kuba Musengwa Katonda omwesigwa era Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli n'eyakulonda.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Musengwa Katonda era akoba abantu be ati: “Ekiseera eky'okusaasiriramu bwe kirituuka ndikusaasira, naakuyamba ku lunaku olw'okulokolwa. Ndikulwanirira naakukuuma, era naabita mu iwe okukola endagaano n'abantu boonaboona. Oliizaagho ensi buyaaka, abantu bairamu okubanga mu biketezo byaibwe ebyazika buti." 
Isaiah49:9 Olikoba abasibe oti, ‘Mufulume eikomera, buti muli ba idembe,’ n'abo abali mu nzikiiza oti, ‘Muve mu nzikiiza, mwire mu butangaavu.’ Baliba ng'oti n'entaama edhifuna kye dhirya ku ngira kwe dhibita obubite, era ni dhiba n'eisubi ghaigulu ku nsozi edhitaabangaku kantu." 
Isaiah49:10 Endhala teribalumanga waire endiwo okubagemanga. Empewo ebabula teribafuuwanga waire omusana okubookyanga; kuba oyo abagemerwa ekivunika alibakulembera, yaabatuusa ku nsulo dh'amaadhi." 
Isaiah49:11 ‘Ensozi dhange dhoonadhoona ndidhitaamu engira, dhaafuuka enguudo abantu bange mwe balitambuliranga." 
Isaiah49:12 Mubone eno, abantu bange baliva ghala eyo: abandi baliva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, abandi baava e bugwandhuba, n'abandi baava mu kiketezo ky'e Sinimu.’" 
Isaiah49:13 Iwe eigulu yemba olw'eisanhu, n'iwe ensi osagambe. Imwe ensozi mutimbuke mwembe enhembo; kuba Musengwa Katonda aiziiza mu bantu be amaani. Era aligemerwa ekivunika abantu be abadaazibwadaazibwa." 
Isaiah49:14 Aye abantu b'e Yerusalemu baakoba bati: ‘Musengwa Katonda atulekuliire agho, era atwerabiire.’" 
Isaiah49:15 Musengwa Katonda oyo yaabairamu ati: Omukazi asobola okwerabira omwana we ayonka, yaaloba kugemerwa kisa mwana we oyo ye yazaala? Aye waire ng'omukazi asobola okwerabira, nze tiribeerabira naire." 
Isaiah49:16 Bona eno iwe ekibuga Yerusalemu, nkoze ekifaananie kyo mu ngalo dhange, era ebisenge byo mbibona n'amaiso gange buli kaseera." 
Isaiah49:17 Abo abalikuzimba okukwizaagho obuyaaka, baabo bali kwidha mbiro, ate abo abaakuzikiriza, balituusa ekiseera baakuvaamu baaja." 
Isaiah49:18 Linga ere ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona obone. Baabo bali kwesoloza okwidha y'oli. Nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti nga bwendi omulamu, abantu bo abo baidha kukuleeteranga okwesiima, ng'oti n'ebyamadholobera bwe bireetera omugole abivaire okwesiima." 
Isaiah49:19 Waire ng'ensi yo yali ezikiriziibwa yaalekebwagho etyo ng'ezise, aye olwo eriba ntono nga tesugamu abo abaliidha okugibaamu. Era abo abaagireka nga bamaze okugizikiriza, eriba ebali ghala inho." 
Isaiah49:20 Abantu bo abaazaalirwa mu bunhage balikukoba bati, ‘Ensi eno efuuse ntono inho, tekaatumala, tughe aghantu aghandi ghe tunaaba.’" 
Isaiah49:21 Agho olyebuuza mule oti, ‘Naani eyanzaalira abaana bano boonaboona? Nze nafiirwa abaana, naasigalagho mulala ati ng'oti n'ole atazaalangaku, era abazigu bantoolagho, bantwala mu bunhage. Kale, naani eyaleeta abaana bano, ate nga bwenebwene nze naasigalagho mulala nti? Abaana bano baava gha.’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndikolera ab'amaghanga akamanhiso, naabalagira baaleeta batabane baimwe nga bababbeedeire mu bifuba byaibwe, era baaleeta ni baghala baimwe nga bababeese ku migongo gyaibwe." 
Isaiah49:23 Bakyabazinga balibalabirira imwe ng'oti ni baiseimwe beene, ni bainhebantu ba bakyabazinga abo baabalabirira ng'oti ni bainhaimwe beene.” Balibakubira amakiryaivu, baakutama n'ebyeni byatuuka ku itaka, baakomba enkungu ku bigere byaimwe. Olwo mwamanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda era mwamanha muti abaneesiga tibaliswazibwa." 
Isaiah49:24 Ghaligho asobola okulekuza ow'amaani omunhago gw'ali nagwo, oba okutoola ku mufuzi omukambwe abantu b'anhaze?" 
Isaiah49:25 Aye Musengwa Katonda airamu ati: “Ekyo kyene n'ekija okubaagho. Ow'amaani balimulekuza omunhago gw'ali nagwo, n'omufuzi omukambwe bamutoolaku abantu b'anhaze. Ndirwanisa abo ababalwanisa imwe, era naanunula abaana baimwe." 
Isaiah49:26 Abo abakukiriga iwe Yerusalemu ndibaleetera okwitagana beene na beene, baatamiira okuyugha omusaayi gw'abantu ng'oti bwe batamiira omwenge. Olwo abantu boonaboona balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda Omulokozi era Omununuzi waimwe. Era balimanha nga ninze Katonda wa Isiraeli Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Imwe abantu bange mulowooza muti nababinga, ng'oti n'omusaadha bw'abinga mukazi we? Bwe kiba kityo, memale embaluwa ey'okubabinga eri gha? Oba, mulowooza muti nabatunda mube bairu ng'oti n'omuntu bw'atunda abaana be? Aye naani eyali ammandha memale mmubaguze? Busa naire, mwatwalibwa mu bwiru lwa bibi byaimwe, era ebyonoono byaimwe n'ebyababinza." 
Isaiah50:2 Lwaki tyayagaanagho muntu waire omulala ati lwe naidha okubawonia? Lwaki nayeta ni ghatabaagho anvugira? Omukono gwange n'ogufuuse omumpi einho, nga tigukaasobola kubatuukaku kubanunula? Oba amaani ag'okubawonia ge nzira? Mubone eno, nze nsobola okukaabukira enhandha yaakala, era naafuula aghabaire emiiga ghaaba irungu, ebyenhandha byamu byafa olw'okubulwa amaadhi era byawunha." 
Isaiah50:3 Nsobola okwirugaza eigulu, lyaba ng'oti ndivaaziiza kutiya lyoleke nga bwerinakughaire.”" 
Isaiah50:4 Musengwa Katonda andhegereisa bye nnaayogera, bisobole okwiza amaani mu muntu akooye. Katonda oyo anzuusa buli kaakyeire yampa amaani, ag'okuwulira by'aba aja okundhegeresa." 
Isaiah50:5 Musengwa Katonda yampa okutegeera, naaloba kudheema era naaloba kwira inhuma kumuvaaku." 
Isaiah50:6 Nataagho omugongo gwange baakuba, naataagho amatama bankuunhuula ekirevu, era naaloba kukyukira mbali, nga bali kunfuudha mu maiso okunswaza." 
Isaiah50:7 Aye ebyo nze tibiimalaamu maani waire okuntabula, kuba Musengwa Katonda ambeera. Kale ni neevaamu naabagumira ng'oti ibaale, era ndidhi nga tiidha kuswazibwa." 
Isaiah50:8 Katonda oyo ali kumpi, era aidha kwoleka nga bwe nziraku musango. Kale naani ali ni ky'anvunaana? Aseete ghe ndi. Naani ali kuneesimbamu? Ka yeesimbegho tuwoze naye." 
Isaiah50:9 Bona, Musengwa Katonda mwene n'ambeera. Kale naani alinsalira omusango okunsinga? Abazigu bange boonaboona balikairigha baazikirira baawaagho ng'oti kivaalo ensiiriri ky'eriire." 
Isaiah50:10 Buli muntu ata mu Musengwa Katonda ekitiisa, era n'ajiira ku ebyo omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda oyo by'akoba, ni bw'atambulira mu nzikiiza ng'azira kimulika, yeesigenga bwa Musengwa Katonda oyo, agumirenga ku Katonda oyo." 
Isaiah50:11 Imwe mwenamwena abasala enkwe okuzikiriza banaimwe, mumanhe nti imwe beene niimwe mulyezikiriza mu nkwe dhaimwe dheene. Ekyo Musengwa Katonda mwene n'alikireetera okuba kityo, era mulifiira mu bulumi." 
Isaiah51:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mumpulirise imwe abanoonia okulokolebwa, mulowooze ku ibaale kwe mwabaadhibwa, ni ku kirombe eky'amabaale mwe baabasima." 
Isaiah51:2 Mulowooze ku Aburahamu ni Sara, badhaadha baimwe abo imwe mwe mwasimuka. Ghe nayetera Aburahamu oyo yali aziraku mwana, naamugha enkabi yaazaala abaana, naamuleetera okuba n'abaidhukulu kamaala." 
Isaiah51:3 Ndisaasira Yerusalemu n'abantu boonaboona ababa mu bifo byakyo ebyayonoonebwa. Ebiketezo byakyo eby'eirungu ndibifuula byaba ng'oti n'enimiro y'Edeni, ng'oti n'enimiro yange yeene nze mwene ye neerimira. Okusangaala n'okusagamba n'ebiribanga eyo, nga kw'otaire n'enhembo edh'okuneebaza n'okunsaaka." 
Isaiah51:4 Imwe abantu bange mumpulirise; imwe eighanga lyange mutege kutu muwulire bye nkoba. Nditaagho amateeka gange, naayegeresa abantu boonaboona okukola amazima agaliba ekimulika eri amaghanga goonagoona." 
Isaiah51:5 Ndija mangu naabawonia, era ekiseera kyange eky'okulokola kiri kumpi. Mwene nze ninze ndifuga amaghanga. Era ensi edh'eghala dhinteegereire nga dhisuubirira mu nze okudhirokola." 
Isaiah51:6 Mulinge ku igulu, mulinge ni ku nsi. Eigulu eryo liriwaagho ng'oti n'omwosi bwegubulagho, ensi yaakairigha ng'oti kivaalo, n'abagibaamu baafa ng'oti nsowera. Aye obulokozi bwange bwe ndeeta bwidha kubangagho byanda na byanda, mbawonienga aghazira kukoma." 
Isaiah51:7 Imwe abaidhi obutuufu era abagema amateeka n'omwoyo omulala, muwulirise kye nkoba. Mutatyanga bantu kubayeeyereza, era bwe babavumanga mutawangamu maani;" 
Isaiah51:8 kuba baliwaagho ng'oti n'ekivaalo ekiriiriibwa ensiriri oba enseete. Aye obulokozi bwange bwe ndeeta bwidha kubangagho byanda na byanda, mbawonienga aghazira kulekera.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Wo Musengwa Katonda, situka otuyambe. Kozesa obuyinza bwo otuwonie, nga bwe wabukozesa mu biseera ebyabita, eira einho. Niiwe wafumita ogusota ogwetebwa Rahabu, era waagutematemamu." 
Isaiah51:10 Niiwe owakaza amaadhi amangi ag'enhandha, waata engira ku ntobo yaayo, abantu bo b'onunwire basobole okusomoka." 
Isaiah51:11 Abo iwe Musengwa Katonda b'onunwire baliirayo e Yerusalemu nga bemba. Baliba mu masanhu na kusagamba enaku dhoonadhoona, ng'okunakughala n'okusinda biwoiregho." 
Isaiah51:12 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: Nze mwene, ninze mbagumya mu bizibu, kale lwaki mutya abantu obuntu, abalifa ni bawaagho ng'oti isubi?" 
Isaiah51:13 Obwo mwerabiire Musengwa Katonda Omutonzi waimwe eyabamba eigulu, n'ataagho n'emisingi gy'ensi? Lwaki buli kaakyeire muba mu kutya, olw'obusungu bw'abo ababatuntuza, abeetegeike okubazikiriza? Mpegaano obusungu bwaibwe mukaabubonaku naire?" 
Isaiah51:14 Abo abali mu bunhage baidha kulekulwa mangu; tibaidha kufa kuja mu magombe, waire okubulwa emere ye balya." 
Isaiah51:15 “Ninze Musengwa Katonda wo asiikuula enhandha, n'agireetera okuwolomboka nga yeekuluumulula. Katonda Afuga Amagye." 
Isaiah51:16 Nkutaire ebibono byange mu kanwa mwo, era ndidha kukukuumanga n'omukono gwange. Ninze eyabamba eigulu, ni ntaagho n'emisingi gy'ensi, era ni nkoba ab'omu Yerusalemu nti, ‘Niimwe abantu bange.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Situka, situka iwe Yerusalemu, situkiramu mangu oyemerere! Situka iwe owanhwa ekikopo eky'obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda obungi, mwene kye yakugha okunhwa, n'okimaliramu irala era ni kikuleetera okutagala." 
Isaiah51:18 Mu baana boonaboona be wazaala, muziramu waire omulala ati akukulemberamu; mu bantu bo abo boonaboona be wakuza, muziramu waire omulala ati akugema ku mukono." 
Isaiah51:19 Obuzibu bukwidhiire bwa mikuzi ebiri: olutalo lwonoineyonoine ensi yo, n'abantu bo baafa endhala n'empiima. Naani anaakusaasiraku n'anaakugumya?" 
Isaiah51:20 Abantu bo baziriike bali agho beegolomoire mu maagaanana aga buli luguudo. Bali ng'oti mpongo egwire mu lutuula lw'omuyiizi. Musengwa Katonda abanoziiza n'obusungu bwe, Katonda oyo abakangaiviire n'amaani." 
Isaiah51:21 Kale ni, imwe abadaazibwadaazibwa, ni mutamiira nga timunhweire na ku mwenge," 
Isaiah51:22 Musengwa Katonda oyo alwanirira abantu be akoba ati: “Mubone, mbatoire mu ngalo ekikopo eky'obusungu bwange obungi timukairamu kukinhwa kubaleetera kutagala." 
Isaiah51:23 Ekikopo ekyo ndikigemya abo ababalumya ni bakoba bati, ‘Mweyale ghansi ku itaka tubatambulireku tuje’, era mwena ni mutaagho emigongo gyaimwe ni gifuuka oluguudo kwe batambulira.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Iwe Sioni situka, situka oiremu obe wa maani. Iwe Yerusalemu ekibuga ekitukuvu, vaala ebivaalo byo ebiboneka obulungi; kuba bale abatatya Katonda n'abatali balongoofu tibakairayo kwingira mu iwe." 
Isaiah52:2 Iwe Yerusalemu ekibuga eky'abaatwalibwa mu bunhage, situka weekunkumule ove mu nkungu; imwe ab'e Sioni abazigu be baatwala mu bunhage, mwesibule endhegere edhibali mu nkoto." 
Isaiah52:3 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Imwe abantu bange mwatundibwa mu bwiru nga ghazira asaswire mpiiya naire, era mulinunulwa nga ghazira asaswire mpiiya." 
Isaiah52:4 Mwasooka mwaja mwasenga e Misiri, aye Abassiria baamala baabatwala mu bunhage nga bazira kye basaswire naire." 
Isaiah52:5 Nze Musengwa Katonda kye nva ni nkoba nti, ‘Mpegaano kiki kye nnaakola, nga ndi kubona abantu bange babatwalira ku bwereere? Abo ababafuga beesuuta, era buli kaakyeire nze baanhooma.’" 
Isaiah52:6 Kale ni ekiseera kirituuka abantu bange baamanha nga ninze Katonda, era nga ninze ndhogeire.”" 
Isaiah52:7 Nga kisangaaza okubona omukwenda ng'ali kubitira mu nsozi okwidha okuleeta amawulire amalungi, amawulire agalangirira emiraala era agalangirira obulokozi n'obughanguzi! Omukwenda oyo akoba ati: “Katonda waimwe n'afuga!”" 
Isaiah52:8 Muwulire abakuumi b'ekibuga kyaimwe bwe baasiikana! Bali kwembera ghalala olw'eisanhu, kuba bali kubonera irala n'amaiso gaibwe nga Musengwa Katonda ali kwira e Sioni." 
Isaiah52:9 Imwe ebifo bya Yerusalemu ebyayonoonebwa, mutimbuke mwembe enhembo; kuba Musengwa Katonda agumiiza abantu be, yaanunula Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah52:10 Musengwa Katonda alikozesa omukono gwe omutukuvu ogw'obuyinza, yaalokola abantu be ng'ensi yoonayoona eri kubona." 
Isaiah52:11 Muje, muje, muve mu Babiloni, imwe ababbeeda ebintu ebikozesebwa mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda. Mutagema ku kintu kyonakyona ekitali kirongoofu. Muje mwekuume nga muli balongoofu." 
Isaiah52:12 Eyo timulivaayo nga mugwidhubana waire okuvaayo nga mulumuka; kuba Musengwa Katonda mwene n'alibakulemberamu, era Katonda oyo owa Isiraeli alibavaaku einhuma ng'abakuuma." 
Isaiah52:13 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona, omugheereza wange ebintu birimujiiranga bukalamu. Aligheebwanga ekitiisa ekitaloodheka era yaagulumizibwa inho." 
Isaiah52:14 Abantu kamaala baamwewuunhia inho, okumubona ng'ayonooneibwa emboneka ye okusinga omuntu owundi yeenayeena bwe yaali ayonooneibwaku. Yali afuusefuuse nga takaafaanana bantu." 
Isaiah52:15 Atyo bw'alyewuunhisa amaghanga kamaala, bakyabazinga baabulwa eky'okwogera; kuba balibona ekitabakoberwangaku era baategeera kye batawulirangaku.”" 
Isaiah53:1 Abantu bairamu bati: “Naani asobola okwikiriza bye tuwuliire? Era naani asobola okwikiriza ati omukono gwa Musengwa Katonda n'ogwakola ekyo? 
Isaiah53:2 Omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda oyo yakulira mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, ng'oti n'ekisimbe ekito ekisimba emizi mu itaka eikalu. Yali agho atyo ng'aziraku kisikiriza naire: tiyaliiku munhiriro ogwandituleeteire okumulingirira, oba okuba omulungi mu mboneka, ekyandituleeteire okumwegomba." 
Isaiah53:3 Abantu baamunhooma era baamulekulira agho. Enaku yaamuluma nga ghazira ayenda kumulingaku. Atyo bwe yanhoomebwa, twaloba kumutaamu kanhagansi naire." 
Isaiah53:4 Bwenebwene yatwala obughafu bwaife, yeetwika enaku yaife. Aye ife twalowooza tuti okukubibwa n'okufumitibwa n'okudaazibwadaazibwa kwe kyali kibonerezo Katonda kye yamusindikira." 
Isaiah53:5 Aye olw'ensobi dhaife baamufumita baamutaaku ebibwa, era olw'ebibi byaife baamunuubulanuubula. Baamudaazadaaza ife tuwonezebwe, era baamukuba emiigo ife tube abalamu." 
Isaiah53:6 Ife twenatwena twabula ng'oti ntaama, buli muntu yaagema njira ye. Aye Musengwa Katonda yaatoola ekibonerezo ekyali kitugwaniire olw'ebibi byaife, yaakita ku mugheereza we oyo." 
Isaiah53:7 Baamudaazadaaza era baamukiriga, aye yaaba mugonvu yaakigumira, yaaloba waire okubumbula omunwa. Yaaba ng'oti n'entaama ye batwala okwita, era ng'oti n'entaama ye basalaku ebiviiri, n'etaliraku naire. Tiyabumbula munwa naire." 
Isaiah53:8 Baamutoolagho, baamutwala okumusalira omusango mu kusaliriza. Ghazira yalowooza ku buzaale bwe, aye yaitibwa bwitibwe yaatoolebwa mu nsi ey'abalamu. Ekyo kyamutuukaku olw'ebibi by'abantu baife." 
Isaiah53:9 Baamuta mu magombe ghalala n'ababi, baamuziika ghalala n'abakombe. Ate nga yali taizangaku musango, waire okwogera ekibono eky'obuguya.”" 
Isaiah53:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ninze namuleetera okumunuubulanuubula, era naamuleetera okwetwika obughafu bwaimwe; kuba bw'aghaayo obulamu bwe ng'ekigheebwayo olw'ebibi, alibona abaidhukulu abamusimukamu, yaayongera ku nnaku dhe edh'oku nsi. Olwo bye nhenda byaba nga bituukirizibwa mu oyo." 
Isaiah53:11 Bw'alibona ku ebyo ebiriva mu kudaazibwadaazibwa kwe, alisangaala. Olwo yaamanha nga tiyadaazibwadaazibwa bwereere. Omugheereza wange oyo aneesiimisa, era alyetwika ekibonerezo ky'ebibi eby'abangi, nze naabasonigha ku lulwe." 
Isaiah53:12 Kye ndiva ni mmugha omugabo aghalala n'abakologho, yaagabana omunhago aghalala n'ab'amaani; kuba yaaghaayo obulamu bwe yaitibwa, yaabalirwa mu bamenhi ab'amateeka. Aye ate yaaba nga yeetwika ebibi eby'abantu kamaala, era yaabasabira ekisonigho.”" 
Isaiah54:1 Iwe Yerusalemu, obairenga oti n'omukazi omugumba, omukazi atazaalanga ku mwana naire. Aye mpegaano timbuka oyembe era okube emizira; kuba oidha kuba n'abaana kamaala okusinga n'omukazi iba y'atavangaku n'amulekulira agho." 
Isaiah54:2 Kola ogaziye weema yo, ogaziye n'ensuubo dhaamu, oleeye n'emigugha gyayo, era onhweze n'enkondo dhaayo." 
Isaiah54:3 Oligaziya ensalosalo edh'ekiketezo kyo dhaaja ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'ensi. Abantu bo balitwala ebiketezo eby'abamaghanga agandi, era baliidhula mu bibuga ebyali birekeibwa obwagho." 
Isaiah54:4 Leka kutya, kuba toliiramu kuswazibwa kabiri; leka na kutabulwa, kuba ensoni tidhiriiramu kukugema kabiri. Olyerabira ensoni edh'omu buto bwo edh'obutaba mwesigwa, weerabira n'enaku ey'okulekebwa agho otyo nga namwandu." 
Isaiah54:5 Omutonzi wo mwene n'aliba balo, era eriina lye ni Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye. Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli n'aliba Omununuzi wo, era oyo ni Katonda w'ensi yoonayoona." 
Isaiah54:6 Isiraeli, oli ng'oti n'omukazi omufumbo akaali omuto, iba ye yabayiza, ate n'amala n'amuvaaku n'amulekulira agho mu nnaku; era oli ng'oti n'omukazi iba ye yabinga n'asigala nga munakughavu. Aye mpegaano Musengwa Katonda akweta oire y'ali, ng'akoba ati:" 
Isaiah54:7 “Nakulekulira agho okumala akaseera, aye ndikwiza ye ndi, kuba nkugonza inho." 
Isaiah54:8 Nga ndidhwire obusungu obubitirivu, naloba n'okukulingaku okumala akaseera. Aye okuva ni mpegaano ndidha kukugemerwanga ekivunika, olw'okugonza kwange okutawaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda.” Musengwa Katonda Omununuzi wo, atyo bw'akobye." 
Isaiah54:9 “Nga bwe nalayira mu biseera bya Noa obutairamu kabiri kuleeta maadhi ga mwidhuzo kubanda ku nsi, ni leero ntyo bwe ndi kulayira obutairamu kabiri kukusungughaliranga na kukudhuukanga, waire okukubonerezanga." 
Isaiah54:10 Ensozi dhisobola okuvaagho, n'obusozi bwawaagho. Aye nze okugonza kwe nkugonzaamu tikuja kuvaagho, n'endagaano ey'emiraala ye nakola n'iwe teja kukoma.” Atyo bw'akoba Musengwa Katonda oyo akugemerwa ekivunika." 
Isaiah54:11 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Iwe ekibuga Yerusalemu odaazibwadaazibwa era oyuuzibwayuuzibwa kiwunga, ghaaloba kubaagho akugumyaku naire. Aye bona eno, ndikuzimbisa amabaale ag'okudholigadholiga, emisingi gyo naagizimbisa amabaale ag'omughendo ageetebwa saffiro." 
Isaiah54:12 Obusolya obw'endhu dho ndibuzimbisa amabaale ageetebwa agate, emiryango gyo naagizimbisa ageetebwa karabunkule, ate ebimante byo ebikwezungulwire naabizimbisa amabaale agandi ag'omughendo aga buli nsambo." 
Isaiah54:13 Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene ninze ndyegeresa abantu bo, naabaleetera ebintu okubajiiranga obukalamu nga bali mu miraala." 
Isaiah54:14 Okukola amazima n'obutuufu birikuleetera okuba ow'amaani. Oliwona okutuntuzibwa, era ebintu ebitiisa tibiriseeta gh'oli." 
Isaiah54:15 Omuntu yeenayeena alikutanulaku olutalo, ti ninze ndiba nga mmuganhie akole atyo. Buli alikutanulaku olutalo olimughangula yaagwa ere." 
Isaiah54:16 Bona, ninze ntonda omugheesi w'ebintu by'ekyuma, yaafuguta amanda ag'omuliro, yaagheesa eby'okulwanisa. Era ninze ntonda omwisirukale akozesa eby'okulwanisa ebyo okwita." 
Isaiah54:17 Aye tighalibaagho bya kulwanisa bye baligheesa birisobola kukulumya. Era kiisi aliwoza n'iwe olimusinga. Ndidha kulwaniriranga abagheereza bange, era mbaleeterenga okughangula.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Isaiah55:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mwidhe mwenamwena abali endiwo, mwidhe aghali amaadhi. N'imwe abazira mpiiya mwidhe, mugule emere mulye. Mwidhe mugule omwenge ogw'emizabbibu n'amata aghazira kusasula naire." 
Isaiah55:2 Lwaki mumalira empiiya dhaimwe ku ebyo ebitali mere? Lwaki mufaabiikanira ebyo ebitabaigusa? Mumpulirise bukalamu kye nkoba, olwo musobole okulyanga ebyo ebisinga kuba birungi, era mubenga basangaavu." 
Isaiah55:3 Mwidhe ye ndi mutege amatu; muwulirise bye nkoba musobole okufuna obulamu. Ndikola n'imwe endagaano etaliwaagho, ey'okugonza kwange okutakoma kwe nagonzangamu Daudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Daudi oyo namufuula omukulembeze era omufuzi ow'amaghanga asingayo kuba wa ghaigulu, naakozesa oyo okwoleka ab'amaghanga obuyinza bwange." 
Isaiah55:5 Ekiseera kirituuka mwayeta amaghanga ge mutaidhiiku naire, gaalumuka gaidha ye muli waire nga goona imwe tigabaidhi. Nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli, ninze ndireetera ekyo okubaagho, olw'okubagheesa imwe ekitiisa.”" 
Isaiah55:6 Munoonie Musengwa Katonda nga mukaasobola okumubona gh'ali, mumusabe ng'akaabali kumpi." 
Isaiah55:7 Ababi balekeyo empisa dhaibwe embi; aboonooni bave mu ndowooza yaibwe embi. Baire eri Musengwa Katonda, aidha kubagemerwa ekivunika; Katonda waife oyo aidha kubasoniyira irala na mwoyo mulala." 
Isaiah55:8 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Ebidhuubo byange tibiri ng'oti n'ebyaimwe, waire engeri dhaimwe okuba ng'oti n'edhange." 
Isaiah55:9 Era ng'eigulu bwe liri ghaigulu einho okusinga ensi, n'engeri dhange dhityo bwe dhiri edha ghaigulu einho okusinga edhaimwe, n'ebidhuubo byange byaba bya ghaigulu inho okusinga ebyaimwe." 
Isaiah55:10 Amaadhi n'omugozi biva ku igulu byagwa, byaloba kwirayo ghaigulu kabiri, aye byafukirira eitaka, byameza ebimera era ebimera ebyo byamala byataaku ebibala. Olwo byagha omulimi ensigo ey'okusiga n'emere ey'okulya." 
Isaiah55:11 Kale ni, n'ekibono kye ndhogera kityo bwe kinaabanga. Tikiirenga ye ndi nga kiri makaya, aye kiidha kukolanga ebyo bye nhenda, kituukirizenga bukalamu bye nnaabanga nkitumye." 
Isaiah55:12 Muliva mu Babiloni nga muli basangaavu; mwavaayo mwatwalibwa nga muli mu miraala. Ensozi n'obusozi biritimbuka byayemba, n'emiti gyonagyona gyasangaala gyakuba mu ngalo." 
Isaiah55:13 Emiti emisipuressi girimera aghabaire emiwa; n'eminaazi gyaira mu kifo ky'enkandwa. Ako kaliba kamanhiso akatalivaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda, ak'okwidhukirirangaku nze Musengwa Katonda bye nkola.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba abantu be ati: “Mukolenga amazima n'obutuufu, kuba ndi kumpi kwidha okubalokola, era ndholeke nga ninze mbawonia ebizibu byaimwe." 
Isaiah56:2 Ndigha enkabi abo abakuuma Sabbato buliidho ni batagyonoona, era naagha enkabi abo abeekuuma ni batakola bibi.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Omugwira eyasenga mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda, atakobanga ati: “Nze bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda aidha kumboola mu bantu be.” N'omulaawe, olw'obutasobola kuzaala baana, atakobanga ati: “Bona, nze ndi ng'oti bwa muti mukalu.”" 
Isaiah56:4 Musengwa Katonda akoba abantu abo ati: “Omulaawe akuuma Sabbato dhange, n'asalagho okukolanga bye nsiima, era ni yeekalangula ku ndagaano yange," 
Isaiah56:5 ndireetera eriina lye okwidhukirwanga buliidho mu isinzizo lyange ni mu bantu bange aghazira kwerabirwa naire, okusinga bwe yandibaire azaire abaana abalenzi n'abaghala.”" 
Isaiah56:6 Ate eri abagwira abaasenga mu bantu ba Musengwa Katonda, ni bagheereza Musengwa Katonda oyo nga bamugonza, ni beekalangula ku ndagaano ye, era ni bakuuma Sabbato dhe ni batadhoonoona, Musengwa Katonda abakoba ati:" 
Isaiah56:7 “Ndibatwala ku Sioni olusozi lwange olutukuvu, naabagha eisanhu mu ndhu yange ey'okusinzizaamu. Ebigheebwayo byaibwe ebyokebwa n'emisengo gyaibwe ndibiikiriza ku alutaari yange, kuba endhu yange enaayetebwanga ndhu ya kusinzizaamu ab'amaghanga goonagoona.”" 
Isaiah56:8 Musengwa Katonda, oyo asoloza abantu be Abaisiraeli abaabingibwa mu nsi yaibwe, akoba ati alisolozaayo n'abandi, boona baidha beeyongera ku abo abaamala eira okusolozebwa." 
Isaiah56:9 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Imwe mwenamwena amaghanga ag'endha mwidhe muzikirize abantu bano ng'oti n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko bwe dhizikiriza. 
Isaiah56:10 Abakulembeze b'abantu bange bali ng'oti batulu beene. Tibakaalimu magezi, bali ng'oti n'embwa edhitaboigola. Baba mu kuwongera, na mu kutenduka ndoolo, na mu kuloota." 
Isaiah56:11 Bali ng'oti mbwa edh'amairu amangi, edhitaiguta naire. Abakulembeze abo tibakaalimu kategeera, buli muntu yeefubiriire ku bibye, nga yeenooneza by'anaafunamu amagoba." 
Isaiah56:12 Bakobagana bati, ‘Mwidhe tufuneyo ku mwenge ogw'emizabbibu tunhweku. Ka twerenge ebitamiiza, n'olwaidho lwona lwidha kuba ng'oti n'olwaleero, era n'okulusingaku.’ ”" 
Isaiah57:1 Omuntu akola ebituufu afa, era ghaaloba kubaagho ekyo akitaaku mwoyo omuntu atya Katonda yaatwalibwa, era ghaaloba kubaagho ekyo akitegeera. Aye ng'abantu abalungi abo baba bawonezeibwa akabi akandibaidhiire." 
Isaiah57:2 Bwe bafa bafuna emiraala, baawuumula mu idembe." 
Isaiah57:3 Aye imwe abalogo, n'imwe abenzi, n'imwe bamalaaya, museete ghano musalirwe omusango." 
Isaiah57:4 Imwe aboonooni era abaguya, naani ye muli kuleetaku omuzaanho? Naani ye muli kwasamizaaku eminwa okumusungiriza?" 
Isaiah57:5 Mweguguna okukola obwamalaaya obw'omu masabo, nga musinza emisambwa ghansi mu binsense eby'emiti emikologho emizibirivu. Era mwitira abaana baimwe mu biiko ebirimu entanda edheeyatisa mu mbaale." 
Isaiah57:6 Mutoola eyo amabaale amaseene obukalamu mwagasinza ng'oti bakatonda. Mugafukira ebigheebwayo eby'okunhwa era mwagaleetera ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke. Mulowooza muti munampooyawooya nga mukola ebyo? 
Isaiah57:7 Mwala obuliri bwaimwe ku nsozi endeeyi engungumavu, era eyo ye muja ni mughaayo emisengo, ni mukola n'obwamalaaya obw'omu masabo." 
Isaiah57:8 Mughanika munda einhuma gh'endhigi dhaimwe ebifaananie ebyenhinhalwa. Nze mwaneerabira, mwasasula abantu empiiya, mwatoolamu ebivaalo byaimwe, mwaniina nabo obuliri bwaimwe obugazi, baaba n'imwe mu buliri obwo nga muli kwesanhusa." 
Isaiah57:9 Mwebbaaka ebizigo n'obuwoowo kamaala, mwaja okusinza omusambwa Moleki. Era olw'okwenda einho okufuna bakatonda bye musinza, musindika abakwenda baimwe baaja eyo eghala einho. Mwatuuka n'okubasindika baje ghansi mu magombe." 
Isaiah57:10 Mwekaluubiriza inho nga muli kunooniayo bakatonda abandi, aye era mwaloba kukoogha waire okuwaamu amaani; kuba mulowooza muti ebitali Katonda ebyenhinhalwa ebyo bye musinza, bibagha amaani." 
Isaiah57:11 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bwenebwene bakatonda ki abo be mutya einho mutyo, ni mutuuka n'okuunimba nze era ni muneerabirira irala? Obwo mulekeire agho okuntya, lwa kuba nasirika busirike okumala ekiseera ekinene kityo?" 
Isaiah57:12 Imwe mulowooza muti bye mukola bituufu, aye nze ndyerula ebikolwa byaimwe, era ebyo bye musinza ebitali Katonda biriba tibikaabagasa naire." 
Isaiah57:13 Kale ni bwe munandiriranga mbayambe, ebisinzibwa byaimwe ebyo bye musoloza n'ebibe bibawonienga. Aye empewo obuwewo eribifuumuula yaabitwala. Ate nga abo abaneesiga nze, n'abalitwala ensi yaaba yaibwe era bansizizanga ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu.”" 
Isaiah57:14 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Muteegho oluguudo, muteegho oluguudo mangu, mutegeke abantu bange ghe banaabita. Mutoole ebitimuguunha byonabyona mu ngira y'abantu bange." 
Isaiah57:15 “Ninze Katonda Omutukuvu aligho ebyanda n'ebyanda, aswikiriire ebintu byonabyona. Mba mu kifo ekiri ghaigulu era ekitukuvu. Aye era mba ni mu bantu abawombeefu era abeenenia, nsobole okubaizaamu omwoyo n'eisuubi." 
Isaiah57:16 Ninze nafuuwa omuuka ogw'obulamu mu bantu bange, era tiribasungughaliranga bujiiririire waire okubavunaananga emisango buliidho kuba ekyo kisobola okubaleetera okufa, ate nga ninze mwene eyabagha obulamu." 
Isaiah57:17 Abantu abo nabasungughalira olw'ebibi byaibwe n'okwegomba kwaibwe okubi. Kye nava ni mbabonereza era ni mbalekulira agho nga tikaabalingaku naire. Aye beene beeyongera okunvaaku, era beekalangulira mu mpisa dhaibwe embi." 
Isaiah57:18 “Waire namala ira okubona nga bwe beebisa obubi, aye era ndibakyusa naabawonia, naabakulemberamu, era ebibi byaibwe naabisasulamu ebirungi olwo naasangula amaziga g'abo abalira." 
Isaiah57:19 Nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti ninze ndeetera abantu ab'okumpi n'eghala okuba mu miraala. Era ninze ndiwonia abantu bange. 
Isaiah57:20 Aye abantu ababi bali ng'oti nhandha eyeefuukuula ekiseera kyonakyona, amaadhi gaayo ni gasiikuula ebitosi n'ebikaba, aghazira kulaalaku." 
Isaiah57:21 Aboonooni tibaba na miraala naire.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba. 
Isaiah58:1 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Kaabuka era oyasiikane nga bw'osobola, obe ng'oti kuvuga kwa igwala. Okobere abantu bange okusobya kwaibwe; oyatulire ab'endhu ya Yakobo abo ebibi byaibwe." 
Isaiah58:2 Buli kaakyeire beekoza, baidha bansinza, era baayoleka nga bwe benda einho okumanha bye nkoba n'okugema ebiragiro byange; baaba ng'oti n'eighanga eriri agho erikola ebituufu, eritavangaku ku biragiro byange. Era bansaba mbaghe amateeka ag'okukola mu butuufu ni mu mazima, nga bakoba nga bwe kibasangaaza einho okunsinza nze Katonda." 
Isaiah58:3 “Baja baabuuza bati, ‘Lwaki tusiiba ng'ate Musengwa Katonda tafaayo? Era lwaki twebonereza aye n'atatufaaku naire?’ “Nze Musengwa Katonda naabairamu nti, ‘Mubone eno, ku lunaku lwe musiibiraku, muba muli kwenooneza bibasanhusa imwe beene. Era mutuntuza n'abakozi baimwe." 
Isaiah58:4 Okusiiba kwaimwe kubaleetera bukambwe, mwasoola era mwalwana, mwafuntagana bwa bifunsi.’ “Mulowooza muti bwe musiiba mu nsambo ng'oti n'eyo, nze nsobola okuwulirisa okusaba kwaimwe?" 
Isaiah58:5 Mulowooza muti okwo n'okusiiba nze kwe nhenda ku lunaku omuntu lw'agwaine okwewombeekeraku einho? Muja mwakotesa emitwe ng'oti n'ekitoogo bwekikoteka. Era mweyalira ekutiya mu ivu, mwadhirambaalaku, okwoleka nga bwe munakughaire. Obwo ekyo kye mweta okusiiba ku lunaku nze Musengwa Katonda lwe nsiima?" 
Isaiah58:6 “ ‘Okusiiba nze kwe nhenda ni kuno: Musibule endhegere n'ebikoligo ebisibiriire abantu mu kutuntuzibwa. Abasibe abatuntuzibwa, mubalekule baje nga ba idembe. Mumaliregho irala ebikoligo byonabyona ebireetera abantu okutuntuzibwa." 
Isaiah58:7 Abo abali endhala mubaghenga ku mere yaimwe, n'abaavu abazira maka mubaingizenga mu maka gaimwe. Abo ababita amadu mubaghenga eby'okuvaala, era mutalobanga kuyamba bantu babaliku luganda." 
Isaiah58:8 “Olwo mulimesunkana ng'oti n'endhuba eri kuvaayo, era mwawonezebwa mangu. Ebikolwa byaimwe ebirungi biribakulemberangamu, n'ekitiisa kyange nze Musengwa Katonda kyabavangaku einhuma nga kibakuuma." 
Isaiah58:9 Bwe munandhetanga ndidha kuvugiranga, era bwe munandiriranga ndidhanga kubairamu nti, ‘Ndi ghano!’ “Bwe mulyetoolamu omuze ogw'okutuntuza banaimwe, okubanhoomerera, n'okuboogeraku ebibi," 
Isaiah58:10 ni mugha abali endhala emere, n'abo abadaazibwadaazibwa ni mubagha bye beetaaga, olwo enzikiiza egemye bedimudimu ebeezungulwire imwe, erifuuka ng'oti n'obutangaavu obw'omu kasana ghagati." 
Isaiah58:11 Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene ndibakulemberangamu buli kaakyeire, naabagha ebirungi ebibamala obukalamu era naabaleetera okuba abagumu era ab'amaani. Mulibanga ng'oti n'enimiro ye bafukirira amaadhi, era ng'oti n'ensulo y'amaadhi etakala." 
Isaiah58:12 Mulizimba buyaaka ebifo eby'eira ebyayonoonebwa, mwaizaagho emisingi egy'ebyanda eby'eira einho, era mwamanhibwa nga niimwe abaalongoosa ni mwiza obuyaaka endhu edhaayonoonebwa.”" 
Isaiah58:13 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bwe munaakuumanga Sabbato ni mutagikoleraku byaimwe bye mwenda, aye n'eba olunaku lwange olutukuvu, lwe mutaamu ekitiisa ni mutalutambuliraku ngendo, waire okulukoleraku emirimo, oba okulwogereraku ebitasaana," 
Isaiah58:14 olwo mulifuna eisanhu eriva mu kumpeereza nze Musengwa Katonda. Ndireetera abantu b'ensi dhoonadhoona okubatangamu imwe ekinhagansi, era imwe ndibagha ensi ye nagha dhaadha waimwe Yakobo, yaaba butaka bwaimwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Isaiah59:1 Mutalowooza muti amaani ga Musengwa Katonda gaakoma, yaaba nga takaasobola kubalokola. Oba okulowooza muti amatu ge gaasemba, gaaba nga tigakaabawulira, nga muli kumweta okubayamba." 
Isaiah59:2 Aye mumanhe nti ebibi byaimwe byene n'ebireetera Katonda waimwe okubalekulira agho, yaaloba kubalingaku, waire okuwulirisa bye mumusaba." 
Isaiah59:3 Muli n'omusango kuba mwogera eby'obuguya, era mwakola ebikolwa eby'obukambwe n'obutemo." 
Isaiah59:4 Ghaziragho muntu awoza musango mu butuufu ng'ali kukolera ku mazima. Aye muwoza ebiziragho, mwayogera eby'obuguya, memale mwasinga omusango. Mutegeka okukola ebibi era mwamala mwabikola, mwayonoonera irala." 
Isaiah59:5 Enkwe dhe musala dhiba dha kabi ng'amagi g'omusota ogw'obusagwa. Kiisi igi ly'omenha livaamu musota gwa busagwa, era buli alya ku igi ng'oti n'eryo afa bufe. Bye mukola tibyesigika ng'oti n'olutuula lwa nabumbuli." 
Isaiah59:6 Aye enkwe dhaimwe tidhiribaviiramu kalungi. Dhiriba ng'oti lugoye olukoleibwa mu wuuzi dha nabumbuli, oluzira muganhulo naire." 
Isaiah59:7 Mwangugha inho okukola ebibi aghazira kusibamu, era mwayanguyirwa inho okwita abantu abaziraku musango. Buli ghe mubita muzikirizaagho, mwaleka bifulukwa byereere. Ebirowoozo byaimwe mubimalira ku kukola bibi byonka." 
Isaiah59:8 Timwidhi kyetebwa miraala, era bye mukola tibijiira ku mazima. Mutambulira mu ngira engodegode, era kiisi adhibitamu taba na miraala naire." 
Isaiah59:9 Abantu bakoba bati: “Bwenebwene okukola amazima kutuli ghala, n'okukola ebituufu kutuziramu. Tunoonia obutangaavu, aye twabona bwa nzikiiza ndhereere eri bedimudimu." 
Isaiah59:10 Tuja nga tughaamanta ku bimante ng'oti n'abatulu abatabona. Era twaja nga twekontola ni mu kasana ghagati nga buli ng'oti bwire, twaba ng'oti n'abali mu nsi y'abafu." 
Isaiah59:11 Twenatwena twidhula okutya, twavuuma ng'oti bisolo bikambwe, era twalira ng'oti maghemba. Twegomba Katonda aidhe atuwonie okutuntuzibwa, aye ghazira kikolebwa naire. Era twegomba okulokolebwa, aye kwatuba ghala inho." 
Isaiah59:12 “Wo Musengwa Katonda, twakola ebibi kamaala y'oli, era okusobya kwaife okwo kwene kutulumiriza kuba ebibi byaife tubibona, n'okusobya kwaife tukwidhi bukalamu." 
Isaiah59:13 Twakudheemera twakuvaaku iwe Musengwa Katonda, twaloba kukunonereza iwe Katonda waife. Twatuntuza banaife era twakudheemera. Bye tulowooza bikyamu, ni bye twogera bya buguya." 
Isaiah59:14 Tubingagho amazima twaloba kugakoleraku, n'okukola ebituufu kwaloba kuseeta ghe tuli. Amazima tigakaakolebwa mu mpya dha bibuga, n'obwesimbu tibukaaliyo." 
Isaiah59:15 Obwesigwa buziragho mu bantu, era oyo alekayo okukola ebibi bamuyiiga n'obukambwe.” Musengwa Katonda ekyo yakibona era yaasungughala, olw'obutabaagho kukolera ku mazima." 
Isaiah59:16 Yeewuunhia okubona nga ghaziragho muntu waire omulala ati, afaayo kuwolerezaagho abo abatuntuzibwa. Kale mwene alikozesa obuyinza bwe n'obutuufu bwe, yaanunula abantu be okubatuusa ku bughanguzi." 
Isaiah59:17 Alivaala obutuufu ng'ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba eky'ekyuma, yaavaala obulokozi ku mutwe gwe ng'enkuufiira ey'ekyuma. Era okwesasuuliza ku bazigu be kulimubaaku ng'oti kivaalo kya munda, n'obusungu bwamubaaku ng'oti kivaalo kya ku ngulu." 
Isaiah59:18 Alibonereza abazigu be ng'ajiira ku bye baakola, ng'atwaliiremu n'abo ababa mu biketezo eby'eghala." 
Isaiah59:19 Abantu okuva e buvandhuba okutuuka e bugwandhuba balimutya, era baatya n'ekitiisa kye kuba aliidha ng'oti n'omwiga oguwolomboka n'amaani, nga gutwalibwa empewo Musengwa Katonda mwene y'asindika." 
Isaiah59:20 Musengwa Katonda era akoba abantu be ati: “Ndija e Sioni okununula baidhukulu ba Yakobo abakyuka ni bava mu kwonoona kwaibwe. 
Isaiah59:21 Nkoze n'imwe endagaano, era mbaghaire obuyinza bwange n'endhegeresa yange, bibenga byaimwe buliidho. Era okuva ni mpegaano mwidha kungonderanga era mwegeresenga abaana baimwe okumpuliranga ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Isaiah60:1 Iwe Yerusalemu, situka oyake ng'oti ndhuba, kuba obutangaavu bwo butuuse, n'ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kiri kwakira ku iwe." 
Isaiah60:2 Bona eno, enzikiiza erigema ku nsi, enzikiiza eri bedimudimu yaasandikira amaghanga. Aye Musengwa Katonda alivaayo ng'oti ndhuba yaakwakiraku, n'ekitiisa kye kya bonekera ku iwe." 
Isaiah60:3 Amaghanga galiidha eri obutangaavu bwo, ni bakyabazinga baidha eri okumesunkana kwo." 
Isaiah60:4 Weezunguluze amaiso obone, abantu boonaboona nga bwe bali kwesololeza aghalala nga baidha y'oli. Batabane bo baliva eghala eyo baidha; ni baghala bo balibabbeeda baabaleeta y'oli." 
Isaiah60:5 Olibona ekyo waasangaala; omwoyo gwakupakukapakuka olw'eisanhu. Kuba obukombe obw'amaghanga balibukuleetera; ebintu ebingi einho baabibisa ku nhandha byafuuka bibyo. 
Isaiah60:6 Engamiya olukunkumuli dhiriidhula mu iwe nga dhiva mu Midia ni mu Efa, era dhaava ni mu Sheba, nga dhiri kuleeta zaabu n'obubbaani. Abantu balirangirira ebirungi Musengwa Katonda by'akoze." 
Isaiah60:7 Abantu balikuleetera entaama dhoonadhoona edh'e Kedari n'edh'e Nebaiothi, baadhighaayo ng'omusengo. Balidhireetanga ku alutaari, Musengwa Katonda yaadhisiima. Era Musengwa Katonda oyo alyongeranga okufuula eisinzizo lye okuba ery'ekitiisa." 
Isaiah60:8 Ebyo biki ebiri kuseeyeeya ng'oti bire, era ebiri kuguluka ng'oti njiibwa edhiri kwira mu bisu byadho?" 
Isaiah60:9 Ago n'amaato agava mu nsi edh'eghala, nga gakulembeirwamu amaato ag'e Tarushishi, agali kuleeta abantu ba Musengwa Katonda okuva eyo eghala. Abantu abo baleese feeza waibwe ni zaabu waibwe, okugha ekitiisa Musengwa Katonda Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli, kuba ataire ekinhagansi mu bantu be." 
Isaiah60:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba Yerusalemu ati: “Ab'amaghanga agandi balizimba ebimante byo ebikwezungulwire, ni bakyabazinga baibwe baakugheereza. Nze nakubonereza nga ndiku obusungu, aye mpegaano nkugemeirwa ekivunika, naakusaasira." 
Isaiah60:11 Emiryango gyo giidha kubanga miigule, tigiidha kwigalwanga omusana n'obwire. Olwo abantu basobole okukuleeteranga obukombe bw'amaghanga gaibwe, nga bakyabazinga baibwe beene n'ababakulembeiremu mu nhiriri." 
Isaiah60:12 Aye eighanga n'obwakyabazinga ebiriroba okukugheereza, biryonoonebwayonoonebwa era byasaanizibwagho irala." 
Isaiah60:13 Abantu balireeta emiti egiva e Lebanoni, emisipuressi, emipulane, n'emyalumugi, baagizimbisa buyaaka eisinzizo lyange okuliwoomya, n'okugheesa ekibuga kyange ekitiisa." 
Isaiah60:14 Era abaana b'abo abaakutuntuzanga, baliidha baakukubira amakiryaivu; n'abo boonaboona abaakunhoomanga balikotesa emitwe gyaibwe agho gha bigere byo, baakweta ‘Ekibuga kya Musengwa Katonda,’ baakweta ‘Sioni, Ekibuga kya Katonda, Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli.’" 
Isaiah60:15 Walekulirwa agho waakyayibwa, nga ghazira na muntu akubitamu. Aye ndikuleetera buliidho okubonekanga obulungi einho, era waaba kifo kya isanhu ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Isaiah60:16 Amaghanga ni bakyabazinga balikulabirira ng'oti n'inhina w'omwana bw'amulabirira. Era olimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda Omulokozi wo era Omununuzi wo, Katonda Owamaani owa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah60:17 Ndikuleetera zaabu mu kifo eky'okukuleetera ekyuma eky'ekikomo, naakuleetera feeza mu kifo eky'okukuleetera ekyuma ekigumu einho; naakuleetera ekyuma eky'ekikomo mu kifo eky'okukuleetera omuti, era naakuleetera ekyuma ekigumu einho mu kifo eky'okukuleetera amabaale. Ndireetera abakulabirira okubanga ab'emiraala aghazira kukunhigiriza; era naaleetera abo abakusalira amakatala, baakukoleranga ebituufu." 
Isaiah60:18 Obukambwe tibuliwulirwaku kabiri mu nsi yo, era ensi yo terizikirizibwa waire okufuuka ebifulukwafulukwa. Ebimante byo ebikwezungulwire olibyeta ‘Bulokozi bwa Musengwa Katonda,’ n'emiryango gyo waagyeta ‘Kusaaka Musengwa Katonda.’" 
Isaiah60:19 Omusana toidha kwetaaganga ndhuba kukumuliikirira, waire obwire okwetaaganga omwezi okukwakira. Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze nnaabanga eitaala lyo ebyanda n'ebyanda; okumesunkana okw'ekitiisa kyange kunaakwakirangaku." 
Isaiah60:20 Enaku edh'okulira kwo dhiriba dhikomye. Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze nnaabanga eitaala lyo ebyanda n'ebyanda, erisinga endhuba emala n'egwa eigulo, n'omwezi ogumala ni gwirayo enkyo." 
Isaiah60:21 Abantu bo boonaboona balikolanga ebituufu, era baatwala ensi yaaba yaibwe ebyanda n'ebyanda. Baliba lusaga nze mwene lwe neesimbira era omulimo nze mwene gwe neekolera, nsobole okugheebwanga ekitiisa." 
Isaiah60:22 N'amaka agasingayo obutono galifuuka ekika ekiramba, era ekika ekisembayo obutono kirifuuka eighanga ery'amaani. Nze Musengwa Katonda ekyo ndikireetera okwangugha okubaagho, ng'ekiseera kyakyo kimaze okutuuka.”" 
Isaiah61:1 Omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gundiku, kuba yansiiga omuzigo, yantuma okukobera abadaazibwadaazibwa amawulire amalungi. Yantuma okugumya abaawaamu emyoyo, n'okulangirira eri abali mu bunhage nti baidha kulekulwa babe ba idembe, n'abasibe nti baidha kusibulwa mu ikomera." 
Isaiah61:2 Yantuma okulangirira nti ekiseera kituuse, Musengwa Katonda agemerwe abantu be ekivunika, era yeesasuulize ku bazigu baibwe. Era yantuma okugumya abo boonaboona abalira olw'okuba mu nnaku." 
Isaiah61:3 Era yantuma eri abo abali mu Sioni, mbavaaze engule ku mitwe gyaibwe mu kifo ky'eivu lye beebbaase. Era mbaleetere okusangaala mu kifo eky'okunakughala, mbaleetere n'olwembo olw'okusaaka mu kifo eky'okuba mu bughafu. Olwo babe ng'oti n'emiti emikologho Musengwa Katonda mwene gye yeesimbira; era bakolenga ebituufu ebireetera Musengwa Katonda oyo okugheebwa ekitiisa." 
Isaiah61:4 Balizimba buyaaka ebifo eby'eira ebyayonooneka, era baizaagho buyaaka ebyo ebyali bifuuse ebifulukwafulukwa. Balirongoosa ebibuga ebyayonoonebwa ni bimala emyaka kamaala nga birekeibwa bw'agho bityo." 
Isaiah61:5 Abantu abamaghanga agandi n'abalibagheerezanga, imwe abantu bange, era baabaayiranga ebyayo byaimwe; abagwira abo n'abalibalimiranga era baalabiriranga amasamba gaimwe ag'emizabbibu." 
Isaiah61:6 Aye imwe, abantu balibeetanga bakabona ba Musengwa Katonda, era abagheereza ba Katonda waife. Mulikozesanga obukombe bw'amaghanga, bwabaleeteranga imwe okuteebwamu ekinhagansi."
