Isaiah61:7 Mulibanga mu nsi eyaimwe ku bwaimwe, obukombe bwaimwe bweyongerangaku obungi bwa mikuzi ebiri, mu kifo kyaimwe okwira agho okugemwanga obw'ensoni n'okunhoomebwa. Era eisanhu lyaimwe liribangagho ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Isaiah61:8 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nze nhenda abo abakola amazima, aye nkyagha abo abanhazi n'abakozi b'ebibi. Ndigha abantu bange empeera yaibwe nga njiira ku mazima, era naakola nabo endagaano ey'ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Isaiah61:9 Abaana baibwe balimanhikana mu maghanga, n'abaidhukulu baibwe baaba bamanhifu mu bantu boonaboona. Buli muntu anaababonanga alimanha ng'abo n'abantu, nze Musengwa Katonda be mpaire enkabi.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Ekibuga Yerusalemu kikoba kiti: “Ndisagamba inho olwa Musengwa Katonda era naasangaala olwa Katonda wange oyo; kuba anvaaziiza obulokozi n'obutuufu ng'oti bivaalo. Ndi ng'oti n'omugole omusaadha ye bavaaziiza engule ku mutwe, era ng'oti n'omugole omukazi ye badholiige n'ebyamadholobera.”" 
Isaiah61:11 Bwenebwene ng'eitaka bwe limeza ebimera, era ng'enimiro bw'ekuza bye bagisimbyemu, ni Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'alireetera obutuufu okumeruka mu bantu be, amaghanga goonagoona gaamutaamu ekitiisa." 
Isaiah62:1 Ku lwa Sioni nze tiidha kusirika, ku lwa Yerusalemu tiidha kuwuumula naire, okutuusa nga kimaze okununulwa, n'obughanguzi bwakyo bwayaka ng'oti muliro." 
Isaiah62:2 Yerusalemu, amaghanga galibona bw'onunwirwa, ni bakyabazinga boonaboona baabona ekitiisa kyo. Olituumibwa eriina eiyaaka, Musengwa Katonda mwene ly'alikugha." 
Isaiah62:3 Oliba ng'engule eboneka obulungi Musengwa Katonda y'agemye mu ngalo dhe, engule ey'obwakyabazinga eri mu makono ga Katonda wo." 
Isaiah62:4 Toliiramu kabiri kwetebwa “Eyalekulirwa agho,” oba ensi yo okwiramu okwetebwa “Ekifulukwafulukwa.” Aye olyetebwa “Eyasiimibwa,” n'ensi yo yaayetebwa “Mufumbo”; kuba Musengwa Katonda akusiima, era ensi yo eriba ng'omukazi omufumbo." 
Isaiah62:5 Ng'omwisuka bw'abayiza omughala omwegha, n'abantu bo batyo bwe baliba ng'oti bakubayiiza. Era ng'omusaadha bw'asagamba olw'omugole y'abayiiza, ni Katonda atyo bw'alisagamba olwa iwe." 
Isaiah62:6 Iwe Yerusalemu, ntaire abakuumi ku bimante byo, abataidha kusirikanga omusana n'obwire. Bateekwa okwidhukizanga Musengwa Katonda atuukirize bye yasuubiza, nga tibawuumulamu naire." 
Isaiah62:7 Batamuganha kuwuumulaku naire, okutuusa ng'aiziizaagho Yerusalemu obuyaaka, yaakireetera okusaakibwa mu nsi yoonayoona." 
Isaiah62:8 Musengwa Katonda yeerayiriire mu buyinza bwe ati: “Bwenebwene tiriirayo kuwaayo mere yaimwe ya mpeke kuliibwa bazigu baimwe. Abagwira tibalinhwa mwenge gwaimwe gwa mizabbibu gwe mwafaabiikanira. 
Isaiah62:9 Aye abo abaakungula emere eyo, n'abaligirya baasaaka Musengwa Katonda. N'abo abaanoga emizabbibu n'abalinhwera omwenge gwagyo mu mpya dh'ekifo kyange ekitukuvu.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Imwe abantu bange ab'omu Yerusalemu mufulume, mufulume emiryango gy'ekibuga. Muje mutegeke abantu ghe banaabita mutemegho oluguudo. Mutemegho oluguudo mangu, mulumalemu ebibaalebaale. Mughanikire abantu ebendera ng'akamanhiso," 
Isaiah62:11 bamanhe nga Musengwa Katonda ali kulangirira mu nsi yoonayoona ati: “Mukobe ab'omu Sioni muti, bona, omulokozi wuuyo aidha, ng'ali n'ebirabo eby'okugabira abantu be, n'empeera ey'okubasasula.”" 
Isaiah62:12 Mulyetebwa “Bantu batukuvu,” era “Abantu aba Musengwa Katonda abaanunulwa.” N'iwe Yerusalemu olyetebwa “Kibuga Katonda ky'ayenda,” era “Kibuga Katonda ky'atalekulirangaku agho.”" 
Isaiah63:1 “Naani oyo ali kuviira mu kibuga Bozira eky'omu nsi Edomu ng'ali mu ngoye edh'erangi ya kasaayisaayi? Naani oyo ali kutoonha mu bivaalo bye eby'ebitiibwa, ali kukumba n'obukumu n'amaani atyo?” “Ninze Musengwa Katonda ali n'obuyinza obw'okulokola, era ndi kwidha okulangirira obughanguzi bwange.”" 
Isaiah63:2 “Lwaki ebivaalo byo bimyukiriire ng'oti n'eby'ole atyanka emizabbibu mu kikunhiro okugikolamu omwenge?” 
Isaiah63:3 Musengwa Katonda airamu ati: “Natyankirira amaghanga zenka ng'oti n'ole atyanka emizabbibu mu kikunhiro, aye mu bantu mwaloba kubaamu anhambaku. Nagatyankirira n'obusungu bwange, omusaayi gwago gwasambukira ku bivaalo byange byonabyona, byaidhula ebimyamya" 
Isaiah63:4 kuba ekiseera kyali kimaze okutuuka eky'okununula abantu bange, n'okwesasuuliza ku bazigu baibwe." 
Isaiah63:5 Nalingirira inho, aye nga tibona aidha ye ndi kuunhamba. Naatya inho, aye nga ghazira angumya. Kale naakozesa amaani gange n'obusungu bwange, byandeetera okughangula." 
Isaiah63:6 Natyankatyanka mu busungu amaghanga, naagamanhiangula n'ekiruyi kyange, naayugha ku itaka omusaayi gw'abantu ogubagha obulamu.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Ndiromboodha nga Musengwa Katonda bw'atugonza nga talekera, era naamusaaka olw'ebyo byonabyona by'atukoleire. Era ndimusaaka kuba ayoleike ekisa ekitaloodheka eri ab'endhu ya Isiraeli, olw'okusaasira kw'ali nakwo okwidhwire okugonza okungi einho." 
Isaiah63:8 Musengwa Katonda yakoba ati: “Bwenebwene bano bantu bange, abataja kunguyaguya.” Kale ni yaaba Omulokozi waibwe." 
Isaiah63:9 Yaabalumirwa mu kudaazibwadaazibwa kwaibwe kwonakwona, era yaabawonia mwene, se ti malaika we. Era olw'okugonza kwe n'okusaasira kwe by'ali nabyo, yaabanunula era yaabalabiriranga okuva eira n'eira." 
Isaiah63:10 Aye baamala beene baadheema, baanakughaza omwoyo gwe omutukuvu. Kale Musengwa Katonda oyo yaakyuka yaafuuka muzigu waibwe, era yaabalwanisa mwene." 
Isaiah63:11 Agho baidhukira ebyaligho eira mu biseera bya Musa omugheereza wa Musengwa Katonda, baabuuza bati: “Musengwa Katonda ali gha, eyasomosa abakulembeze b'abantu n'abawonia enhandha? Musengwa Katonda oyo ali gha, eyasindika omwoyo gwe omutukuvu mu bantu be?" 
Isaiah63:12 Musengwa Katonda oyo ali gha, eyakozesa obuyinza bwe, n'akola eby'amaani ng'abita mu Musa, n'ayawulamu amaadhi g'enhandha ng'abantu babona olwo eriina lya Musengwa Katonda oyo ni limanhikananga ebyanda n'ebyanda?”" 
Isaiah63:13 Yababisa mu nhandha ghagati nga tibeekontola naku, ng'oti n'embalaasi bw'ebita mu irungu." 
Isaiah63:14 Omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwagha abantu ba Musengwa Katonda oyo okuwuumula, baaba ng'oti n'ente edhitwaliibwa mu kiiko ekigimu. Kale Musengwa Katonda atyo yaabakulemberamu era yaaleetera eriina lye okugheebwanga ekitiisa." 
Isaiah63:15 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ng'oli eyo mu igulu y'oba mu butukuvu bwo ni mu kitiisa kyo, ganha otulingeku eno ghansi. Okutulumirwa kwo n'amaani go biri gha? Obwo tokaatugonza, waire okutusaasira?" 
Isaiah63:16 Bwenebwene n'iwe Iseife. Waire dhaadha waife Aburahamu tatwidhi, era nga ni Yakobo takyatula, iwe niiwe Iseife Omununuzi waife, okuva eira n'eira." 
Isaiah63:17 Wo Musengwa Katonda, lwaki otuleka okudaaliima ni tuva ku ngira y'otwoleka? Lwaki oleetera emyoyo gyaife okukalanguka ni tutakutya? Ganha oire ye tuli, ku lw'abantu bo abagheereza bo, abantu ababo ku bubwo ab'omu bika bya Isiraeli." 
Isaiah63:18 Ife abantu bo abatukuvu twabaaku mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu kumala kaseera buseera, abazigu baife baamala baakityankirira." 
Isaiah63:19 Twafuuka ng'oti n'abantu b'otafugangaku, abatabangaku babo naire." 
Isaiah64:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ngoli ni oyabuluza eigulu lyaghembuka, waidha eno ghansi! Ensozi dhanditengeese mu maiso go," 
Isaiah64:2 ng'oti n'ebisaka ebigemye omuliro, oba ng'amaadhi bwegasambira nga gali ku muliro. Idha oyoleke obuyinza bwo eri abazigu bo, era oleetere amaghanga okudhugumirira mu maiso go." 
Isaiah64:3 Olundi, bwe waika n'okola ebitiisa bye twali titusuubire, ensozi dhaatengeetera mu maiso go." 
Isaiah64:4 Okuva eira n'eira ghazira muntu yaali aboineku waire okuwuliraku, oba okulowoozaaku ku Katonda owundi akolera abamusinza ebyewuninkiriza, okutoolaku iwe wenka." 
Isaiah64:5 Osangaalira abo abasanhukira okukola ebituufu, ni baidhukira okwebisa nga bw'oyenda. Iwe watusungughalira, aye ife tweyongera bweyongere kukola bibi. Era kuva ira nga tuli mu kukola bibi okwo. Aye oba tulibiwona?" 
Isaiah64:6 Twenatwena twafuuka ng'oti n'abatali balongoofu, n'ebikolwa byaife byonabyona ebirungi, biri ng'oti n'ekivaalo ekikongeire eiko. Olw'ebibi byaife, twenatwena tuli ng'oti makaba maniavu, era empewo etufuuwa ere yaatutwalikiza irala." 
Isaiah64:7 Ghazira aidha y'oli kukusaba ghazira asitukiramu kulumukira y'oli omuyambe. Iwe watwegisaaku era waatulekulira agho mu bibi byaife. 
Isaiah64:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda, aye iwe niiwe Iseife. Ife tuli ng'eitosi eriwumba, ate iwe waaba ng'omuwumbi. Twenatwena niiwe watukola n'engalo dho." 
Isaiah64:9 Kale ni otatusungughalira kibitiriire, waire okutuvunaana ebibi byaife ebyanda n'ebyanda. Tugemerwe ekivunika, kuba twenatwena nga bw'otubona tuli bantu bo." 
Isaiah64:10 Ebibuga byo ebitukuvu byafuuka ng'oti irungu: olusozi Sioni luli ng'oti irungu, ekibuga Yerusalemu kyafuuka ng'oti kifulukwa." 
Isaiah64:11 Eisinzizo lyo eitukuvu eriboneka obulungi, badhaadha baife mwe baakusaakiranga, lyayokebwa omuliro. N'ebifo byaife byonabyona ebisanhusa, byafuuka bifulukwafulukwa." 
Isaiah64:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bwenebwene ozira ky'ofaayo naire ku ebyo byonabyona ebibairegho? Bwenebwene oja kusirika busirike, otuleke tudaazibwedaazibwe ebitaloodheka tutyo?" 
Isaiah65:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abo abatabuulirizangaku bingemaku, nabagha okuunoonia era abo abatandhagalangaku nabaganha okumbona. Eighanga eritayetangaku liina lyange, nalivugira nti, ‘Ndi ghano, ndi ghano.’" 
Isaiah65:2 Olunaku lwonalwona nayandhuluzanga emikono gyange okusangaaza abantu abadheemu, abeebisa mu nsambo etali nkalamu nga bajiira ku ebyo beene bye bayiiya okukola." 
Isaiah65:3 Bansoononkereza ekiseera kyonakyona nga bagheera emisengo mu nimiro dhe baasengamu emisambwa, era nga baniokeza obubbaani mu bifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu." 
Isaiah65:4 Obwire baja mu lwambiidhi omuziikibwa abantu, baatyama ku magombe era baaba mu bifo ebyekusifu. Balya emamba y'embiidhi, baawuutira mu bibya byaibwe omuunhu ogw'omu mamba eyenhinhalwa." 
Isaiah65:5 Bakoba banaibwe bati, ‘Mwemerere ere ghala, mutatuseetaku. Ife baatulondamu, tituli ng'oti niimwe.’ Aye nze tisobola kuguminkiriza bantu bali ng'oti n'abo. Bangemya obusungu obwokya ng'oti muliro ogutazikira." 
Isaiah65:6 Bona, nze nasalagho era kyamala ira okughandiikibwa nga ndibabonereza. Ekyo tija kukisirikira naire. Bwenebwene ndibabonereza, naabeesasuulizaaku nga njiira ku bye baakola," 
Isaiah65:7 olw'ebibi byaibwe ghalala n'ebya badhaadha baibwe kuba baaniokezanga obubbaani ku nsozi enene, era banvumiranga ku busozi obutono. Kale ni ndibabonereza, naabeesasuulizaaku nga njiira ku bye baakola. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Ng'abantu bwe balondamu emizabbibu emirungi ni bagikunhamu omwenge, nga bakoba bati, ‘Egyo mutagizikiriza kuba giri n'omugaso,’ zeena ntyo bwe ndikola ku lw'abagheereza bange, ndobe kubazikiriza boonaboona." 
Isaiah65:9 Nditaagho ku baidhukulu ba Yakobo n'aba Yuda, baatwala ensi eyo erimu ensozi dhange. Abantu bange abo be nalondamu era abagheereza bange abo baligitwala yaaba yaibwe ku bwaibwe, era baagibangamu." 
Isaiah65:10 Balinsinzizanga e Sharoni era baatwalanga ebyayo byaibwe, baabyayira mu biketezo eby'e Sharoni eyo, ate byawuumuliranga mu kyetebwa Ekiiko eky'Ebizibu." 
Isaiah65:11 “Aye embeera eriba yindi eri imwe abanvaaku nze Musengwa Katonda, ni mwerabira Sioni olusozi lwange olutukuvu, ni musinza omusambwa Gadi gwe bakoba mbu guleetera abantu okuba ab'enkabi, n'omusambwa Meni gwe bakoba mbu n'oguleetera ebyo ebituuka ku bantu okubaagho." 
Isaiah65:12 Imwe muliitirwa mu ntalo mwatirimbulwa kuba bwe nabeeta timwanvugira waire okufaayo okuwulirisa bye nkoba. Aye mwakola ebibi ye ndi, mwalondagho okukola ebitansangaaza." 
Isaiah65:13 Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti, abo abansinza balirya era baanhwa, aye imwe endhala eribaluma n'endiwo yaabagema. Beene balisagamba, aye imwe muliswazibwa." 
Isaiah65:14 Abo abakola bye nhenda balyemba olw'eisanhu, aye imwe mwalira olw'enaku era mwawowoola olw'obulumi." 
Isaiah65:15 Abo be nalondamu balikozesanga eriina lyaimwe nga bakolima. Era imwe, nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze mwene ndibaita, aye abo abakola bye nhenda ndibatuuma eriina eiyaaka." 
Isaiah65:16 Olwo kyaba nti, ole bw'aneesabiranga okugheebwa enkabi, enkabi edho aidha kudhisabanga nze Katonda ow'amazima. N'ole bw'anaalayiranga, aidha kulayiranga nze Katonda ow'amazima kuba ebizibu ebyabita biriwaagho byerabirwa, naaba nga tikaabifaaku naire." 
Isaiah65:17 “Bona, buti ndi kutonda eigulu eiyaaka n'ensi empyaka. Era ebintu ebyabita tibiriidhukirwa waire okulowoozebwaku." 
Isaiah65:18 Aye musangaale era musagambe ebyanda n'ebyanda olw'ekyo kye ndi kutonda kuba Yerusalemu kye ndi kutonda kiriba kya kusagambiramu, n'abantu baamu baliba basangaavu." 
Isaiah65:19 Nze mwene ndisangaala olwa Yerusalemu, era naasagamba olw'abantu bange abo. Tighalibaagho kabiri kukuba mpungu waire okulira amaziga." 
Isaiah65:20 Abaana baliba tibakaafa nga bato, era abantu boonaboona balighangaalanga emyaka gyaibwe emiidhuvu. Abo abalighangaalanga emyaka ekikumi, balibalirwanga mu bato. Era ole okufa nga tagigheziiza, kalibanga kamanhiso ka kukolimirwa." 
Isaiah65:21 Abantu balizimba endhu baadhibaamu, era baasimba amasamba g'emizabbibu baalya ebibala byamu." 
Isaiah65:22 Ole talizimba ndhu, kabiri omuntu wundi n'agibaamu. Era ole talisimba kintu, kabiri owundi n'akirya. Ng'emiti bwe gighangaala emyaka kamaala, n'abantu bange batyo bwe balighangaala. Abantu bange abo be nalondamu, balirwagho nga bakaalya ku bintu byaibwe bye baafaabiikanira." 
Isaiah65:23 Emirimo gye balikola tibalidaagira bwereere. N'abaana be balizaala tibalituukibwaku kabi naire kuba nze Musengwa Katonda mwene ndibagha enkabi ghalala n'eizaire lyaibwe. 
Isaiah65:24 Banaabanga bakaali na kundheta nga nabawuliire ira, era banaajanga okumala okunsaba nga nabaizeemu ira." 
Isaiah65:25 Omusege n'entaama ento biidha kuliiranga ghalala, empologoma eryenga isubi ng'oti nte, n'omusota gulyenga enkungu nga n'emere yaagwo. Ku Sioni olusozi lwange olutukuvu, tikulibaaku kintu kituusa ku kiinaakyo bulumi, waire okukizikiriza. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Isaiah66:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Eigulu n'ekityamo kyange eky'obwakyabazinga, ate ensi, kwe nta ebigere byange. Kale mulinzimbira ndhu nabaki? Era kifo ki mwe ndiwuumulira?" 
Isaiah66:2 Ebintu byonabyona ninze nabikola n'engalo dhange. Kale byonabyona byange. Aye omuntu ye nsangaalira n'oyo omuwombeefu era eyeeneniiza, antaamu ekitiisa era n'akola bye ndagira.”" 
Isaiah66:3 “Ghaligho abantu abasalagho okukola ebintu nga bwebenda, nga tibataagho ndhawulo naire ghagati gha kino ni kire: Ole okughaayo ente ng'omusengo, akibona nga n'ekirala n'ole aghaireyo omuntu. Ole okughaayo entaama ento ng'omusengo, akibona nga n'ekirala n'ole amenha enkoto y'embwa. Ole okuleeta ekigheebwayo eky'emere ey'empeke, akibona nga n'ekirala n'ole aghaireyo omusaayi gw'embiidhi. Ole okuniokeza obubbaani, akibona nga n'ekirala n'ole asaba enkabi eri ekisinzibwa ekitali Katonda. Abantu abo kye benda kye bakola, era basanhukira inho ebyenhinhalwa bye bakola." 
Isaiah66:4 Kale zeena ndibasindikira ebyo byene bye batya ebibaleetera obulumi kuba bwe nayeta ghazira waire omulala ati eyavugira, era bwe nayogera ghazira yafaayo kuwulira. Aye baakola bwa bibi ye ndi, baalondagho okukola ebitansangaaza.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Imwe abafuba einho okugondera Musengwa Katonda by'alagira ni mubikola, muwulire Musengwa Katonda oyo ky'akoba: “Olw'okuba muli beesigwa ye ndi, abandi ku bantu baimwe beene babakyagha era baababingagania, nga babayeeyereza bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda leka abawonie ayolese nga bw'ali ow'ekitiisa, tuboneku nga bwe musagamba.’ Aye beene n'abaliswazibwa." 
Isaiah66:6 Muwulire akasasamalo akali kuva mu kibuga! Ghaligho amamiro agali kuva mu isinzizo, era amamiro ago n'aga Musengwa Katonda nga yeesasuuliza ku bazigu be." 
Isaiah66:7 “Ekibuga kyange Sioni kiri ng'oti mukazi azaala ng'akaali kulumwaku naire! Ebisa byali bikaali na kumuluma, ng'azaala omwana mulenzi." 
Isaiah66:8 Naani eyaali awuliireku ekintu ng'oti n'ekyo, era naani eyaali akiboineku? Ensi esobola okuzaalibwagho mu lunaku olulala luti? Eighanga lisobola okumerukagho mu kaseera obuseera? Aye Sioni yali yaakalumwa ati, ng'azaala abaana be." 
Isaiah66:9 Mulowooza muti nze ndituusa abantu bange mu kaseera ak'okuzaalibwa, aye naabalekayo mu nda, naaloba kubatuusa ku kuzaalibwa?" 
Isaiah66:10 Imwe mwenamwena abagonza Yerusalemu, musangaalire ghalala naye, era musagambe ku lulwe. Imwe mwenamwena abalira ku lulwe era abamulumirwa, mweyimbe ghalala mu isanhu lye musagambe," 
Isaiah66:11 musobole okwonka mwigute amabeere ge agaidhwire, era mugabane ku kitiisa kye ekiswikiriire.”" 
Isaiah66:12 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona, ndireetera ebirungi okuba mu Yerusalemu ebingi einho, nga bikuuluula bukuuluule ng'oti mwiga. Obukombe obw'amaghanga buliyoolookera omwo ng'oti n'omwiga ogwidhwire ni gubanda n'okubanda. Era imwe mulirabirirwa ng'oti mwana mughere inhina y'ayonsa, n'amulera era n'amutenga ku mubiri." 
Isaiah66:13 Ndibaghemberera mu Yerusalemu ng'oti n'inhina w'omwana bw'aghemberera omwana we okumusirisaagho. 
Isaiah66:14 Ekyo mulikibona mwasagamba mu myoyo ni mu mibiri, mwairamu obulamu n'amaani. Era kirimanhikana nga nze Musengwa Katonda nhamba abagheereza bange abampulira, aye naasungughalira abazigu bange.”" 
Isaiah66:15 Bona, Musengwa Katonda aliidhira mu muliro ng'ali n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ebiziinhuuka ng'oti kiwunga, ng'aidha okwolesa obusungu bwe obubitirivu, n'okubonereza ng'akozesa enimi edh'omuliro." 
Isaiah66:16 Musengwa Katonda alibonereza abantu boonaboona ng'akozesa muliro na mpiima, era abo b'aliita baliba kamaala." 
Isaiah66:17 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abo abeerongoosa ni beetukuza, era ni basimba enhiriri okuja ku mikolo egiba mu nimiro dhe basengamu emisambwa, ni balya emamba y'embiidhi, n'empube, n'ebyenhinhalwa ebindi, balizikirizibwa boonaboona ghalala." 
Isaiah66:18 Nze ndidhi bye bakola ni bye balowooza. Ekiseera kiidha kutuuka nsoloze ab'amaghanga goonagoona aboogera enimi edha buli nsambo. Baliidha baabona ekitiisa kyange," 
Isaiah66:19 era naakola akamanhiso nga babona. Abo abaliwonagho ku abo, ndibatuma mu maghanga ni mu biketezo eby'oku nhandha eby'eghala ye batampulirangaku, waire okubona ku kitiisa kyange. Balija baalangirira ekitiisa kyange mu maghanga: e Tarushishi, e Puti, e Ludi eri abakugu mu kulasa obusaale, e Tubali, n'e Yavani." 
Isaiah66:20 Baliiza baganda baimwe boonaboona nga babatoola mu maghanga goonagoona, baabaleeta ng'ekigheebwayo eri nze Musengwa Katonda, ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu Yerusalemu. Balibaleetera ku mbalaasi, ku nhumbu, ku ngamiya, ku bigaali eby'omu lutalo, ni ku bigaali ebindi, ng'oti n'Abaisiraeli bwe baleeta ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke mu isinzizo nga babitaire mu bintu ebirongoofu ebireeterwamu." 
Isaiah66:21 Abandi ku abo ndibafuula bakabona na Balevi. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Isaiah66:22 “Ng'eigulu eiyaaka n'ensi empyaka bye ndikola bwe birisigalagho mu maiso gange, n'eizaire lyaimwe lityo bwe lirisigalagho era n'eriina lyaimwe lyona lyasigalagho." 
Isaiah66:23 Buli ku kuboneka kw'omwezi na buli ku Sabbato, abantu boonaboona baliidhanga baasinza mu maiso gange." 
Isaiah66:24 Bwe balibanga bavaayo, baliringanga ku mirambo egy'abantu abandheemera, kuba enhengere edhibalya tidhirifa, n'omuliro ogubookya tigulizikira, era baliba kyenhinhalwa eri abantu boonaboona.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Bino n'ebibono Yeremia bye yayogera. Yeremia oyo yali mutabane wa Hilikia, eyali owundi ku bakabona ab'e Anathothi mu kiketezo kya Benjamini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Musengwa Katonda yayogera ni Yeremia mu mwaka ogweikumi n'esatu (13) ogwa kyabazinga Yosia mutabane wa Amoni, eyali nga n'afuga Buyudaaya mu kiseera ekyo" 
Jeremiah1:3 Era Musengwa Katonda yairamu okwogera ni Yeremia nga Yehoiakimu mutabane wa Yosia ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Kabiri era yeeyongera okwogeranga naye okutuukiza irala mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omulala (11) ogw'obufuzi bwa kyabazinga Zedekia owa Buyudaaya. Mu mwaka ogwo, mu mwezi ogwokutaanu, abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu baatwalibwa mu bunhage." 
Jeremiah1:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah1:5 “Nakulonda nga nkaali na kukuwumba mu nda ya inhoko. Era wali okaali kuzaalibwa naakutukuza naakulonda obe mulanzi eri amaghanga.” 
Jeremiah1:6 Nze naakoba nti: “Aa, Musengwa Katonda wange, bona eno, nze tiidhi kwogera kuba nkaali muto inho.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Aye Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Otakoba oti okaali muto inho. Aye oidha kuja eri abantu eyo yoonayoona ye nnaakutuma, obakobere byonabyona bye nnaakulagira okwogera." 
Jeremiah1:8 “Otatya muntu yeenayeena, kuba nze ndi ghalala n'iwe okukukuumanga. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaagolola omukono gwe, yangema ku munwa. Yankoba ati: “Bona eno, nkutaire mu kanwa mwo, ebibono byange by'onaayogera." 
Jeremiah1:10 Olwaleero luno, nkugemiisa amaghanga n'obwakyabazinga, oiwululengagho era omenhemenhenga, ozikirizenga era osaaniengagho ozimbenga era osimbenga.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Agho Musengwa Katonda yambuuza ati: “Yeremia, oli kubona ki?” Naamwiramu nti: “Ndi kubona olusaga olw'omuti omwalumondi.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Oboine bukalamu, kuba ndi kwetegereza inho ekibono kyange kye nja okutuukiriza.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yambuuza omukuzi ogwokubiri, ati: “Oli kubona ki?” Naamwiramu nti: “Ndi kubona entamu eri kutogota, ng'eri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba era nga yeeghendhekeire eruuyi eno.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Akabi kaliva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, kaatuuka ku bantu boonaboona ababa mu kiketezo kino." 
Jeremiah1:15 Bona eno, ndyeta abantu b'omu bwakyabazinga bw'eyo ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Bakyabazinga baayo baliidha baata ebityamo byaibwe eby'obwakyabazinga ku miryango gy'e Yerusalemu, n'okwezunguluza ebimante ebikiriku, era n'okwezunguluza ebibuga ebindi eby'omu Buyudaaya." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ndisalira abantu bange omusango gwabasinga olw'obubi bwaibwe; kuba banvaaku baaniokeza bakatonda abandi obubbaani, era baasinza ebintu bye baakola beene n'engalo dhaibwe." 
Jeremiah1:17 Iwe mperaano situkiramu, weesibe weenhweze, oje obakobe ebyo byonabyona bye nnaakulagira okubakoba. Otabatya naire, tiikulwa nga nkutiisa nga bali kubona, ng'ojiire ye bali." 
Jeremiah1:18 “Bona eno, olwaleero nkufiire ng'oti n'ekibuga ekyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu, oba ng'oti n'empango eyakolebwa mu kyuma ekigumu einho, oba ng'oti n'ekisenge ekyakolebwa mu kyuma eky'ekikomo olwanise bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya, n'abakungu baayo, ni bakabona baayo, era n'abantu baayo boonaboona." 
Jeremiah1:19 Balikulwanisa, aye tibalikughangula kuba nze ndi ghalala n'iwe okukukuumanga. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah2:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah2:2 “Ja olangirire eri ab'omu Yerusalemu boonaboona, oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Ndidhi nga bwe wali omwesigwa ng'okaali muto, era nga bwe wali n'okugonza ng'okaali mugole. Waanonerezanga nga tuli mu irungu, mu nsi ezira kintu kisigibwamu naire." 
Jeremiah2:3 Iwe Isiraeli wali mutukuvu, ng'oli wange ku bwange ng'oti n'ebirime ebisooka okukungulwa. Nga kiisi akugemaku aba aiziiza omusango, era nga mmutuusaaku akabi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Muwulire obukwenda obuva ye Musengwa Katonda, imwe baidhukulu ba Yakobo, imwe Abaisiraeli mwenamwena." 
Jeremiah2:5 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Kisobyo ki badhaadha baimwe kye bambonamu, memale ni basalagho okunvaaku. Ni baja okusinza ebintuntu ebiziramu makulu, era ni beene ni bafuuka abaziramu makulu?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Baaloba okwebuuzaaku naire bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda ali gha? Oyo n'eyatutoola mu nsi Misiri, yaatubisa mu irungu, mu nsi enkalu eidhwire ebiina, eziramu maadhi era ey'akabi, eziramu muntu agibitamu, era etabaamu bantu.’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Nabaleeta mu nsi erimu ebirungi kamaala, muwoomerwe ebibala byamu n'ebintu byamu ebirungi. Aye imwe bwe mwagituukamu, mwagyonoona bwonoone, omugabo nze gwe nabagha mwagufuula ekyenhinhalwa." 
Jeremiah2:8 Bakabona baaloba naire okwebuuzaaku bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda ali gha?’ N'abanamateeka boona baaloba okuumanha. Abafuzi bandheemera, abalanzi baalanga mu liina ly'omusambwa Baali, baajiira ku bintuntu ebiziramu makulu.”" 
Jeremiah2:9 “Kale ni ndidha kusigala nga nkaabalumiriza omusango gwaimwe, era nsigale nga nkaagulumiriza n'abaana baimwe n'abaidhukulu." 
Jeremiah2:10 Ale musomoke enhandha muje ku kizinga ky'e Kupuro, oba mutume omuntu e Kedari anoonereze n'obwegendereza, memale mubone oba nga ekintu ng'oti ni kino kibangaghooku!" 
Jeremiah2:11 Ghaligho eighanga eryafaanisaaku bakatonda baalyo, waire nga mu butuufu ti bakatonda beene? Aye abantu bange bafaanisaamu nze Katonda abagheesa ekitiisa, baaja n'ebintuntu ebiziramu makulu naire." 
Jeremiah2:12 Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda ndagira imwe ebiri ku igulu mwenamwena, mutye inho olw'okubona ekyo, n'entete ebageme muweeremu irala emyoyo." 
Jeremiah2:13 Kuba abantu bange bakoze ebintu ebibi bibiri: banvaaku nze, ali ng'oti n'ensulo ey'amaadhi ag'obulamu, beesimira ebidiba ebiwomofuwomofu, ebitasobola kukuuma maadhi." 
Jeremiah2:14 Abaisiraeli ti bairu. Era tibaazaalibwa mu bwiru. Memale lwaki abazigu baibwe babayiigania? 
Jeremiah2:15 Abazigu baibwe babawologomera na maani ng'oti mpologoma. Era baleeteire ensi Isiraeli okufuuka eirungu, baazikiriza ebibuga byamu byafuuka bifulukwa byereere, ghaabulagho omuntu abibaamu." 
Jeremiah2:16 Abazigu baava e Menfisi n'e Tahapanhesi, baabakuba emitwe baagyawula." 
Jeremiah2:17 Ekyo Abaisiraeli baakyereetera beene, bwe banvaaku nze Musengwa Katonda waibwe, ng'ate ninze eyaboolekanga engira ey'okubitamu." 
Jeremiah2:18 Mpegaano muganhulwamu ki okuja e Misiri, ni munhwa amaadhi ag'omwiga Kiyira? Oba, kibagasa ki okuja mu Assiria, ni munhwa amaadhi ag'omwiga Eufurate?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Ebibi byaimwe byene n'ebiribakangaivula imwe, era okunvaaku kwaimwe n'okulibasalira omusango okubasinga. Mukibone era mukimanhe nga bwekiri ekibi einho era eky'obulumi, okunvaaku nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe era n'obutantya. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah2:20 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Imwe Abaisiraeli, mwava ira nga muloba nze okubafuga, mwandheemera, mwakoba muti, ‘Titwidha kumusinzanga.’ Era mwasinzizanga emisambwa ku buli lusozi olugulumivu, na buli ghansi mu kinsense eky'omuti omuzibirivu." 
Jeremiah2:21 Ate nga nali mbasimbye ng'omuzabbibu ogw'embala, ogw'ensigo esingamu bulungi. Aye bona bwe mwonooneike ni mufuuka ng'oti n'omuzabbibu ogw'omu nsiko!" 
Jeremiah2:22 Ni bwe munaabisa saabbuuni omungi einho, era nsigala nga nkaabona ekimyamya ky'ebibi byaimwe." 
Jeremiah2:23 Musobola mutya okukoba muti, ‘Titubangaku boonoonefu, era titusinzangaku musambwa Baali?’ Mubone nga bwe mwebisa obubi mu kiiko, mutegeere bye mwakola. Muli ng'oti ngamiya ebbaamuuse n'erumukira eno n'ere." 
Jeremiah2:24 Muli ng'endogoyi enkazi eyanala okuba mu irungu, bw'eghengereza enhindo okuwunhiriza mu mpewo ng'eriku omusalo. Naani asobola okugirobera? Enume edhiginoonia tidhidaaga kwekooya; dhigyagaana mu kiseera kyayo eky'omusalo." 
Jeremiah2:25 Mulobe kuseenenia ngaito dhaimwe, waire okwereetera ekigheeghe, nga mulumuka okunonereza emisambwa. Aye imwe mukoba muti, ‘Titusobola kulekera agho, kuba tugonza inho emisambwa egy'abamaghanga agandi, era egyo gye twidhanga okunonereza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah2:26 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ng'omwibi bw'aswala nga bamugemye, mwena Abaisiraeli mutyo bwe muliswala aghalala ni bakyabazinga baimwe, n'abakungu baimwe, ni bakabona baimwe, n'abalanzi baimwe." 
Jeremiah2:27 Mukoba omuti muti, ‘Niiwe iseife,’ n'eibaale muti, ‘Niiwe inhaife.’ Nze mwankuba bwa nkoone, mwaloba kukyukira ye ndi. Aye bwe muba mu buzibu, munsaba muti, ‘Idha otulokole.’" 
Jeremiah2:28 “Mpegaano emisambwa gyaimwe gye mwekolera giri gha? Kale ka gisituke gibalokole mu biseera ebizibu, bwe giba nga gisobola. Imwe abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, muli n'emisambwa egyagayaga n'ebibuga byaimwe obungi." 
Jeremiah2:29 Musango ki gwe muunumiriza? Lwaki mwenamwena mundheemeire? 
Jeremiah2:30 Waire nga nababonereza aye tikyavaamu muganhulo, kuba timwaganha kukangaivulwa naire. Mwatemula abalanzi baimwe nga muli ng'oti n'empologoma ezikiriza bwe yeeruga." 
Jeremiah2:31 Imwe Abaisiraeli muwulire nze Musengwa Katonda kye nkoba. Nabeefuukirakuuku naababeera ng'oti irungu, era ng'oti n'ensi egemye enzikiiza eri bedimudimu? Kale imwe bantu bange kiki ekiboogeza muti, ‘Tuli ba idembe, titukaira y'oli?’" 
Jeremiah2:32 Omughala asobola okwerabira ebyamadholobera bye by'avaala? Oba omugole okwerabira ebivaalo bye eby'obugole? Aye abantu bange baneerabiire enaku kamaala edhitabalika! 
Jeremiah2:33 Nga mwidhi inho okukiiya abantu mubafuule abagonzi baimwe! Kyaba nti n'abakazi ab'empisa embi, basobola okwegera ku imwe." 
Jeremiah2:34 Ebivaalo byaimwe biriku ebimyamya by'omusaayi gw'abaavu abaziraku musango, era be mutagemangaku nga bali kwiba. “Aye waire ng'ebyo biri bityo," 
Jeremiah2:35 era mukoba muti, ‘Tuziraku musango. Bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda takaali na busungu ku ife.’ Aye nze Musengwa Katonda imwe ndidha kubabonereza, kuba mukoba muti timukolanga kibi naire." 
Jeremiah2:36 Lwaki mukyukakyuka ni mujiira ku misambwa gy'abamaghanga agandi? Kale ni Misiri eidha kubaleka mu ibbanga, ng'oti ni Assiria bwe yakola." 
Jeremiah2:37 N'eyo e Misiri mulivaayo nga mwetwise emikono gyaimwe ku mitwe, nga muswaire. Abo be mwesiga, nze Musengwa Katonda mbalobye, era timulibafunamu kalungi naire.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Omusaadha bw'abinga mukazi we, omukazi oyo naabayira omusaadha owundi, omusaadha oyo asobola kabiri okwiza omukazi oyo? Olwo ensi eyo eba teyonooneike? Aye imwe Abaisiraeli timwali beesigwa ye ndi, mwaba ng'oti malaaya bw'aba n'abagonzi be abangi. Aye obwo mwenda kabiri kwira ye ndi?" 
Jeremiah3:2 Mulingirire ghaigulu ku nsozi edhiziraku kantu, mubone oba nga ghaligho waire olulala ku nsozi edho, lwe mutaakoleraku bwamalaaya. Mubwama ku mbali kw'enguudo, mwateega be munaayenda nabo, ng'oti n'abanhazi b'omu irungu bwe beeteega abantu. Mwonoine ensi n'obwamalaaya bwaimwe obutakobeka." 
Jeremiah3:3 Amaadhi amasambya kye gaviire ni gatagwa, n'amatoigo goona ni gasibibwa. Aye ate mwekazakaza mu maiso nga bamalaaya beene, mwaloba na kuswala." 
Jeremiah3:4 Mpegaano muva kunkoba mbu, ‘Niiwe iseife eyatugonza okuva obuto." 
Jeremiah3:5 Memale oja kutusungughalira byanda na byanda? Ekiruyi kyo tikija kuwaagho naire?’ Mutyo bwe mukoba, aye mwaja bwa mu maiso n'okukola ebibi nga bwe musobola.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Yosia bwe yaba nga ni kyabazinga, Musengwa Katonda yankoba nti: “Oboine abantu abo Abaisiraeli abatali beesigwa ng'oti n'omukazi malaaya, kye baakola? Banvaaku ng'oti n'omukazi malaaya bw'ava ku iba, baajanga ku buli lusozi olugulumivu na buli ghansi mu kinsense eky'omuti omuzibirivu, baasinziza eyo." 
Jeremiah3:7 Naalowooza nti bwe balimala okukola ebyo byonabyona, baliira ye ndi. Aye tibaamala ni baira. Ni baganda baibwe ab'omu kiketezo ky'e Buyudaaya, boona abataali beesigwa, baabibona ebyo byonabyona." 
Jeremiah3:8 Baabona nga mminga Abaisiraeli abo naabagha n'embaluwa ebabinga, olw'obutaba beesigwa ng'oti n'omukazi malaaya. Aye ab'e Buyudaaya abo baganda b'Abaisiraeli, tibaatya naire. Boona baaja buje, baafuuka abatali beesigwa ng'oti n'omukazi malaaya," 
Jeremiah3:9 baaloba kugemwa na nsoni. Olwo baaleetera ensi okwonooneka, olw'obutaba beesigwa ye ndi, ni baja basinza obw'amabaale n'emiti." 
Jeremiah3:10 Era ng'ebyo byonabyona bimaze okubaagho, Abayudaaya abo abataali beesigwa era baganda ba Abaisiraeli, baaloba okukyuka okwira ye ndi n'omwoyo gwaibwe gwonagwona. Aye beefuula bwefuule okuba ng'abakyuse. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah3:11 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Waire nga Abaisiraeli tibaali beesigwa ye ndi, aye beeyoleike ng'omusango ogwaibwe mutono ku gw'Abayudaaya abo abaguya." 
Jeremiah3:12 Kale ja olangirire bino eri Abaisiraeli oti, ‘Imwe Abaisiraeli abatali beesigwa, Musengwa Katonda akoba ati mwire y'ali. Taidha kubalingirira na bukambwe, kuba mwene asaasira. Era taidha kubasungughalira byanda na byanda." 
Jeremiah3:13 Aye mwikirize nga muli n'omusango olw'okudheemera nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ni mweghaayo okusinza bakatonda abagwira buli ghansi mu kinsense eky'omuti omuzibirivu. Era mwaloba kumpulira na kugondera biragiro byange. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah3:14 Imwe abantu abatali beesigwa, mwire ye ndi, kuba ninze musengwa waimwe. Ndidha kutoolanga omuntu mulala mulala okuva mu buli kibuga, era ntoole abantu babiri babiri okuva mu buli maka, mbaleete e Sioni.’ ”" 
Jeremiah3:15 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “ ‘Ndidha kubaghanga abakulembeze abakola bye nhenda, babalabirirenga nga baidhwire okumanha n'okutegeera, ng'oti n'omwayi bw'alabirira ebyayo bye." 
Jeremiah3:16 Bwe mulizaalagana ni mweyongera okuba abangi mu nsi eyo, olwo abantu baliba tibakaayogera ku Sanduuku ya Ndagaano ya Musengwa kuba baliba tibakaagirowoozaaku waire okugiidhukira. Tighalibaagho muntu awulira mule ng'agyetaaga ebeegho, era tibaja kukolayo yindi kabiri." 
Jeremiah3:17 Mu kiseera ekyo Yerusalemu kiriba kyetebwa ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga ekya Musengwa Katonda. Abantu abamaghanga goonagoona balyesololeza eyo okunsinza nze Musengwa Katonda, nga tibakairayo kukola ebyo emyoyo gyaibwe emikalangufu era emibi bye gyenda." 
Jeremiah3:18 Mu nnaku edho abantu b'omu Buyudaaya balyeyimba ku b'omu Isiraeli, baajiira ghalala okuva mu bunhage mu nsi eri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, baingira mu nsi ye nagha badhaadha baimwe nga yaibwe ku bwaibwe.”" 
Jeremiah3:19 “Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: ‘Imwe Abaisiraeli, nze nayenda inho okubatwala ng'abaana abange, mbaghe ensi esanhusa era esingira irala okuboneka obulungi mu maghanga goonagoona, ebe yaimwe ku bwaimwe. Era naalowooza nti munandhetanga, Lata, mulobe kukyuka kunvaaku." 
Jeremiah3:20 Aye imwe bwenebwene mwakyuka mwaloba kuba beesigwa ye ndi, ng'oti n'omukazi ava ku iba n'aloba okuba omwesigwa y'ali. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.’" 
Jeremiah3:21 Amamiro gawulikika ghaigulu eyo ku nsozi edhiziraku kantu. Ago n'amamiro ag'Abaisiraeli abali kulira amaziga nga beenenia, olw'okudaaliima ni bava mu ngira entuufu, ni beerabira Musengwa Katonda waibwe." 
Jeremiah3:22 Musengwa Katonda akoba nti: ‘Imwe abatali beesigwa, mwire ye ndi, ndidha kubawonia mbafuule beesigwa.’ Ate imwe mukoba muti: ‘Bona eno, twidhie y'oli, kuba niiwe Musengwa Katonda waife." 
Jeremiah3:23 Okusinza kwe twasinzanga ku busozi, n'okwasiikana kwe twayasiikananga ku nsozi, bwenebwene byali bya kwerimba. Mu butuufu Musengwa Katonda waife ni yenka alokola Isiraeli.’" 
Jeremiah3:24 “Okuva mu buto bwaife, omusambwa oguswaza n'okuswaza gujiire nga gumalagho ebintu badhaadha baife bye baafaabiikanira: embuzi dhaibwe, n'ente dhaibwe, ni batabane baibwe, ni baghala baibwe." 
Jeremiah3:25 Twidha kulambaala mu nsoni, okuswala kwaife kutubwike ng'oti mwebwiko kuba ife ni badhaadha baife twakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda waife, okuva mu buto okutuusa ni ye buli eno, twaloba kugondera Musengwa Katonda waife by'akoba.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Imwe Abaisiraeli, oba nga bwene mwenda okukyuka, mukyuke mwire ye ndi. Bwe mutoolagho ebyenhinhalwa byaimwe bye musinza, ni mugumira ku nze aghazira kudaaliima naire," 
Jeremiah4:2 era ni muba abatuufu nga mulayira mu mazima era nga muli beesimbu, muti, ‘Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu.’ Olwo amaghanga gaidha kunsabanga ngaghe enkabi, era gampenga ekitiibwa.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Musengwa Katonda akoba abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, ati: “Mulime enimiro dhaimwe edhaawuumuzibwaku okulimwa, mutasiga nsigo mu mawa." 
Jeremiah4:4 Mukuume endagaano ye mwakola ninze, nze Musengwa Katonda, era mwegheeyo ye ndi, imwe abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, ekiruyi kyange kirobe kutumbuka ng'oti n'omuliro omuntu gw'atasobola kuzikiza, olw'ebibi bye mwakola.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Mulangirire mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu, mukobe abantu muti: “Mufuuwe amagwala mu kiketezo ekyo, mwete abantu n'amaani, muti, ‘Mwesoloze, mwidhe tuje tulumukire mu bibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu." 
Jeremiah4:6 Mughanike bendera nga mugiringiriiza e Sioni, mulumuke mwewonie aghazira kugayaala naire; kuba Musengwa Katonda aja kuleeta akabi n'okuzikirira okunene einho, okuva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba." 
Jeremiah4:7 Azikiriza amaghanga aviireyo, aviireyo ng'oti mpologoma eva mu kisaka kyayo. Aidhie okufafaagania ensi yaimwe; ebibuga byaimwe biidha kufuuka bifulukwa byereere, nga biziramu bantu babibaamu." 
Jeremiah4:8 Kale ni muvaale ekutiya olw'enaku, mulire amaziga era muwowoole; kuba Musengwa Katonda akaatusungughaliire ekibitiriire.’ ”" 
Jeremiah4:9 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ku lunaku olwo, kyabazinga n'abakungu baliwaamu amaani. Bakabona balisoberwa inho, n'abalanzi beewuunhia inho.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Agho naakoba nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, walimbalimba abantu bano ab'e Yerusalemu, waabakoba oti, ‘Mwidha kubanga mu miraala,’ ng'ate empiima dhiseese okubasaaniagho!”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Mu kiseera ekyo balikobera abantu abo ab'e Yerusalemu, bati: “Ghaligho empewo ebabula eri kufuuwa ng'eva ghaigulu ku nsozi edhiziraku kantu edh'omu irungu, ng'eri kwidha ye muli. Aye nga ti n'empewo ey'empolampola efuuwa ebiwusu ku ngaano enkube." 
Jeremiah4:12 Eno eidha kuba ya maani okusingagho. Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene ninze nja okusalira abantu bange omusango.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Bona, abazigu baabale bali kwidha ng'oti bire. Ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo birumuka ng'oti mpewo eyeezungulula n'amaani bw'eidha; n'embalaasi dhaibwe dhiziinhuuka okusingaku n'enkookooma. Tukagwireku ife era tuzikiriire!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Imwe ab'e Yerusalemu, munaaze emyoyo gyaimwe mugimalemu ebibi, memale mulokolebwe. Mulituusa li okubanga n'ebirowoozo ebibi mu myoyo gyaimwe?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ghaligho abakwenda abaviire mu kibuga Dani ni mu nsozi dh'omu Efuraimu, okulangirira akabi akali kwidha." 
Jeremiah4:16 Baidhie okulabula amaghanga n'okukobera ab'omu Yerusalemu, bati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati abazigu bali kwidha nga bava mu nsi ey'eghala. Balirangirira olutalo ku bibuga bya Buyudaaya." 
Jeremiah4:17 Balizingizanga Yerusalemu okukyezunguluza, ng'oti n'abakuuma enimiro bwe bakola, kuba abantu baamu bandheemera. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah4:18 Imwe Abayudaaya, niimwe beene abeereetera ebyo, olw'ensambo ye mwebisangamu n'ebintu bye mwakolanga. Ebibi byaimwe n'ebyabaleetera okudaagadaaga okwo, era bibafumitiire irala ku mwoyo.”" 
Jeremiah4:19 Obulumi bwe ndi nabwo bwenda bwa kundhita! Omwoyo guunumirira era gwampakukapakuka! Kino tisobola kukisirikira, kuba mpulira amagwala agali kuvuga, n'enduulu edh'olutalo." 
Jeremiah4:20 Akabi oluba okuvaagho kati ng'akandi kairagho; ensi yoonayoona efuuse bifulukwa byereere. Okuja okutemya n'okuzibula nga weema dhaife badhizikiriiza, nga n'ensuubo dhaamu badhikanwirekanwire mu kaseera buseera." 
Jeremiah4:21 Ndituusa li okulingiriranga bendera dh'olutalo, n'okuwuliranga okuvuga okw'amagwala?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu bange basiru tibandidhi naire. Basiru ng'oti bwa baana bato; baziramu kutegeera naire. Bakugu mu kukola ebibi, aye tibaidhi kukola birungi.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Nalingirira ensi, naabona nga ndhereere era nga ntabuletabule; ate naalinga ku igulu nga kuzira kyaka naire." 
Jeremiah4:24 Nalingirira ensozi, naabona nga dhiri kutengeeta, n'obusozi bwonabwona nga buli kwewuubira eno n'ere." 
Jeremiah4:25 Naalingirira nti, naabona nga ghaziragho muntu naire omulala ati; nga n'enhonhi dhoonadhoona dhigulwike dhaaja." 
Jeremiah4:26 Naalingirira nti, naabona ng'ensi eyali engimu efuuse irungu; nga n'ebibuga byamu babizikiriiza byafuuka bifulukwa byereere. Kuba Musengwa Katonda yabasungughalira ekibitiriire." 
Jeremiah4:27 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ensi eyo yoonayoona eidha kusigala agho etyo, ng'eri bwa bifulukwa byereere. Aye era tirigizikiriza yoonayoona kuwaagho." 
Jeremiah4:28 ‘Ekyo kirireetera ensi okulira, ni ku igulu kwairugala; kuba nze kye ndhogeire tiidha kukikyusaamu naire, era kye nsazeegho tiidha kukivaaku naire.’" 
Jeremiah4:29 Abantu b'omu bibuga oluliwulira empindo dh'abavuzi b'embalaasi n'edh'abalasa obusaale, ng'olwo boonaboona balumukamu. Abandi balyekuba mu bibira, ate abandi baniina ghaigulu mu gabaalebaale. Ebibuga byonabyona birisigala bwagho bityo nga biziramu bantu naire." 
Jeremiah4:30 Iwe Yerusalemu ye balekuliire obwagho, obwo bwene okuvaala ebivaalo eby'ebitiibwa ebya kasaayisaayi oba otegeeza ki, era n'okuvaala amadholobera aga zaabu oba otegeeza ki? Lwaki osiiga amaiso go langi okugalungiya? Weewoomeza bwereere! Abo be weegonzanga nabo buti bakunhooma bunhoome, era benda na kukwita." 
Jeremiah4:31 Mpuliire okusinda ng'oti n'okw'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala, era naawulira okwana ng'oti n'okw'omukazi ali kuzaala omwana we omuberi. Okwo n'okulira kwa Yerusalemu ali kusika omuuka nga tigwidha, n'ayandhuluza emikono ng'akoba ati: ‘Nkagwireku nze! Abatemo bali kwenda kundhita!’”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Imwe abantu b'omu Yerusalemu, muje eno n'ere nga mubitabita mu nguudo dh'ekibuga kyaimwe kino Yerusalemu. Muje nga mwetegereza buli kye mubona, mwagaaze mu mpya dh'ekibuga mubone oba nga munaabonayo omuntu waire omulala ati, akola ebituufu era ajiira ku mazima. Bwemunaamubona, ndidha kusonigha ekibuga kino." 
Jeremiah5:2 Waire nga mulayira muti, “Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu,” aye era bye mulayira bya buguya." 
Jeremiah5:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bwenebwene iwe onoonia mazima. Wabakuba aye baaloba kuwulira, waabatyankatyanka kwenda kubazikiriza, aye baaloba kweiraku. Baakalangusa emyoyo gyaibwe okusinga n'olubaale baaloba kwenenia naire." 
Jeremiah5:4 Agho naakoba mule nti: “Abantu bano baavu inho era bazira kye baidhi. Tibaidhi Musengwa Katonda by'ayenda, waire okumanha amateeka ga Katonda waibwe oyo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ndidha kuja y'abakulembeze ndhogere nabo; kuba abo baidhi Musengwa Katonda by'ayenda, era baidhi amateeka ga Katonda waibwe oyo.” Aye boonaboona aghalala baadheemera Musengwa Katonda, baaloba kuwulira mateeka ge." 
Jeremiah5:6 Abantu abo bali n'ebibi kamaala era baava inho ku Katonda. Kale ni empologoma dhiriva mu kibira dhaabaita, emisege gyava mu irungu gyabazikiriza, n'empala dhaabeeteega mu bibuga byaibwe, nga kiisi muntu afuluma dhimuyuzayuza." 
Jeremiah5:7 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Nsobola ntya okubasonigha abantu bange abo, abanvaaku ni balayira ebintu ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda? Nabagha buli kye beetaaga, aye baaja baafuuka abatali beesigwa, era beesololezanga mu ndhu dha bamalaaya." 
Jeremiah5:8 Beegombanga baka beene ng'oti mbalaasi nume enhirivu obukalamu, edhimoolera okuniina enkazi.”" 
Jeremiah5:9 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nsobola ntya obutabonereza bantu abo, olw'okukola ebintu ebyo? Era nsobola ntya obuteesasuuliza ku ighanga eryo?" 
Jeremiah5:10 Ndidha kukoba abazigu baibwe nti, ‘Mubitebite mu masamba gaibwe ag'emizabbibu, muje nga mugazikiriza, aye mutagamalaagho. Mukookole ensaga mudhitooleku, kuba ensaga edho ti dhange.’" 
Jeremiah5:11 Abantu ab'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya, tibabaire beesigwa ye ndi naire. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah5:12 “Abantu abo boogeire eby'obuguya ku Musengwa Katonda, nga bakoba bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda azira kyaidha kutukola. Ezira kabi kaidha kututuukaku, waire olutalo okutwidhira, oba endhala okugwa mu nsi yaife.’" 
Jeremiah5:13 Abalanzi bali ng'oti muuka buuka, bazira bukwenda bwe baleeta naire. Bye boogera biidha bwa kubairirangaku beene.”" 
Jeremiah5:14 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Bona eno, olw'okuba abantu abo boogeire batyo, ndidha kufuula ebibono byange by'oyogera bibe ng'oti muliro, ate abantu abo babe ng'oti nku. Olwo omuliro gubasenkeenhe ng'oti nku." 
Jeremiah5:15 Bona, nze Musengwa Katonda ndidha kubasindikaku imwe Abaisiraeli, eighanga eriva eghala liidhe libalumbe. Eryo nga n'eighanga ery'eira eriri n'amaani, eryogera olulimi lwe mutaidhi, era lwe mutategeera." 
Jeremiah5:16 Abantu b'omu ighanga eryo boonaboona balwani ba maani, era ebiruutu bye bataamu obusaale bwaibwe bitiisa ng'oti magombe masime." 
Jeremiah5:17 Balirya emere yaimwe ni byonabyona bye muli kukungula. Balizikiriza emizabbibu gyaimwe n'emitiini gyaimwe, baasaaniagho embuzi dhaimwe n'ente dhaimwe, era baita batabane baimwe ni baghala baimwe. N'ebibuga byaimwe ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu bye mwesiga, balibizikiriza mu lutalo.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Waire enaku edho dhiriba dhityo, aye era tiribazikiriza mwenamwena kubamalagho." 
Jeremiah5:19 Era iwe Yeremia, abantu bwebalibuuza bati, ‘Lwaki Musengwa Katonda waife yatuleetera bino byonabyona okututuukaku?’ Olibairamu oti, ‘Nga bwe mwamuvaaku ni musinza mu nsi yaimwe bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi, mwidha kutwalibwa mugheereze abagwira mu nsi etali yaimwe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Kobera baidhukulu ba Yakobo, olangirire eri abantu b'omu Buyudaaya abo, oti" 
Jeremiah5:21 Muwulire kino imwe abantu abasiru era abatategeera. Muli n'amaiso aye timubona, era muli n'amatu aye timuwulira." 
Jeremiah5:22 Lwaki timuntyaku naire nze Musengwa Katonda? Lwaki timudhugumiraku naire mu maiso gange? Ninze nataagho omusenho okuba ensalosalo enhandha kw'ekoma, ensalosalo ey'olubeerera enhandha y'etasobola kutuuma. Enhandha ni bwe yeefuukuula etya tesobola kughaguza, era amaadhi gaayo ni bwe gawolomboka okwaga gha, tigaghanga kubitagho." 
Jeremiah5:23 Aye abantu imwe muli n'emyoyo emikalangafu era emidheemu. Mwakyuka, mwanvaaku mwaja ye mwenda." 
Jeremiah5:24 Timukoba naku mule muti, ‘Ka tutye Musengwa Katonda waife aleetera amaadhi okugwa mu biseera byago, mu mutoigo ni mu musambya, era n'atuteeragho ebiseera eby'amakungula buli mwaka.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Aye ebibi byaimwe bibaleetera obutafuna bintu ebyo; okwonoona kwaimwe okwo kubafiiriza ebirungi ebyo. 
Jeremiah5:26 Mu bantu bange mulimu abakozi b'ebibi, ababwama ni beeteega abantu ng'oti batezi ba nhonhi. Batega emitego baagemya abantu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Ng'ole omutezi w'enhonhi bw'aidhuza ekiibo enhonhi, boona batyo bwe baidhuza endhu dhaibwe n'ebintu bye bafuna mu kukupankupania. Kyebava baba n'obuyinza era nga bakombe," 
Jeremiah5:28 era baaba banene nga banhirivu. Tibalekera kukola bibi. Tiboogererayo bamulekwa kufuna bye bagwaniire, waire okulwanirira abatuntuzibwa.”" 
Jeremiah5:29 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nsobola ntya obutabonereza bantu abo olw'okukola ebintu ebyo? Era nsobola ntya obuteesasuuliza ku ighanga eryo? 
Jeremiah5:30 Ekintu ekitiisa einho era ekyenhinhalwa kibairegho mu nsi eyo: 
Jeremiah5:31 Abalanzi balanga bya buguya, ni bakabona bafuga nga bajiira ku balanzi bye balagira, n'imwe abantu bange mwena mwaloba kukitakaniaku naire. Aye mulikola ki ng'enkomerero etuuse?”" 
Jeremiah6:1 Imwe abantu ba Benjamini mulumuke mwewonie. Muve mu kibuga Yerusalemu. Mufuuyire e Tekoa amagwala, era mute mu kibuga Bethi Hakkeremu akamanhiso; kuba akabi n'okuzikirira biri kwidha nga biva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba." 
Jeremiah6:2 Waire ng'ekibuga Sioni kirungi inho, aye era ndidha kukizikiriza." 
Jeremiah6:3 Abafuzi balikirumba n'amagye gaibwe, nga bali ng'oti baayi abaidha n'ebyayo byaibwe. Balisimba weema dhaibwe okwezunguluza ekibuga ekyo, buli muntu yaata amagye ge mu kifo kye, nga gali ng'oti ntaama edhiri mu byayiro." 
Jeremiah6:4 Bakyabazinga abo balikoba bati: “Mwetegeke okulwanisa ekibuga ekyo Yerusalemu. Musitukiremu tukirumbe mu kasana ghagati! Aye nga tukagwireku! Olunaku luseeneine, kuba n'ebinsense eby'eigulo biri kuleegha." 
Jeremiah6:5 Muleke twidha kusitukiramu tukirumbe obwire, tuzikirize ebifo byakyo eby'okwewogomamu.”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye alagiire bakyabazinga ati: “Muteme emiti gyakyo, mukibungeku emungo ey'eitaka ey'okuniiniraku okukirwanisa. Ekibuga ekyo kiteekwa okubonerezebwa, kuba kiidhwire kutuntuza bantu kwereere." 
Jeremiah6:7 Ng'ensulo bw'etawaamu maadhi malungi, n'ekibuga ekyo kityo bwe kitalekera kukola bibi byakyo. Bikolwa bya bukambwe na kuzikiriza bye nkiwuliraku byonka, era nkibonamu ndwaire na kulumizibwa buli kaakyeire." 
Jeremiah6:8 Imwe ab'e Yerusalemu, mweizeemu ku magezi, oba ti n'ekyo ndidha kubalekulira agho, n'ekibuga kyaimwe kisigale agho kityo nga kiri bwa bifulukwa byereere, era nga kiziramu muntu waire.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Agho Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yankoba nze Yeremia, ati: “Ng'omunozi w'emizabbibu bw'airayo einhuma okulonderera egyo egiba gisigaireyo, weena otyo bw'oidha okwirayo einhuma osoloze Abaisiraeli abaliwonagho bawonezebwe.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Nze nairamu nti: “Ni baani be nnaayogera nabo ni bampulirisa mbalabule? Baakalangusa emyoyo gyaibwe, tibenda kuwulira by'okoba. Obukwenda bw'ontuma okubakobera babusekerera, baaloba kubusanhukira naire." 
Jeremiah6:11 Obusungu obungi kye buviire ni bungema ng'oti n'obubwo. Era bumbitiriireku tikaasobola kubufuga.” Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Obusungu obwo bumalire ku baana abato mu nguudo, ni ku baisuka abeesoloiza. Abasaadha ni bakazi baibwe baja kutwalibwa, n'abantu abakulu n'abakaire einho boona batwalibwe." 
Jeremiah6:12 Abantu abandi n'abalitwala endhu dhaibwe, okwo nga kw'otaire emisiri gyaibwe ni bakazi baibwe. Nja kugolola omukono mbonereze abantu boonaboona ababa mu nsi eno," 
Jeremiah6:13 kuba okuviira irala ku basembayo ghansi okutuukira irala ku babbede beene, boonaboona bagwidhubanira bya kufuna mu bukyamu. Waire abalanzi ni bakabona, boona bakupankupania." 
Jeremiah6:14 Amabwa g'abantu bange bagawonia bwa ku ngulu. Baalamusagania bati, ‘Emiraala gibe n'iwe,’ ate nga ghazira miraala." 
Jeremiah6:15 Bandibaire baswalanga nga bakoze ebyenhinhalwa! Aye busa naire, tibaswala waire akatono kati. N'ensoni tidhibagemaku naire. Kale ni kyebaliva ni baghangulwa ng'oti n'abandi bwe baaghangulwa, era ni bazikirira lwe ndiidha okubonereza. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah6:16 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba abantu be ati: “Mwemerere mu maagaanana g'engira, mulinge eno n'ere, mubuuze babooleke aghali obugira obw'eira, n'aghali engira enungi. Mutambulire omwo, olwo mufune emiraala.” Aye beene baakoba bati: “Busa, titwidha kutambulira omwo.”" 
Jeremiah6:17 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaabateeragho abakuumi, yaabakoba ati: “Muwulirise eigwala bwe banaalifuuwa okubalabula.” Aye baakoba bati: “Titwidha kuwulirisa.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Muwulirise imwe amaghanga, imwe abantu abeesoloiza mumanhe ekija okutuuka ku bantu bange." 
Jeremiah6:19 Iwe ensi wulira. Ndidha kuleeta akabi ku bantu bano, olw'entegeka dhaibwe edh'olugezigezi dhe bayiiya; kuba baaloba okuwulira bye mbakoba, era baaloba okugondera amateeka gange." 
Jeremiah6:20 Obubbaani bwe bandeetera okuva e Sheba bungasa ki, waire obuwoowo obuva mu nsi edh'eghala? Tiidha kusiima bigheebwayo byaimwe ebyokebwa, waire okusanhukira emisengo gye mumpa." 
Jeremiah6:21 Kale ni ndidha kubateera ebitimuguunha mu ngira, beekontole okwo bagwe. Abazaire ghalala n'abaana baibwe, bakagwa baibwe ni baliraanwa baibwe, baja kuzikirira.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona, ghaligho abantu abaidha okwidha nga bava mu nsi eri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, eighanga ery'amaani eryo eriva eghala einho liri kwetegekera okulwana olutalo." 
Jeremiah6:23 Bagemye obulaso n'amafumo, bakambwe era tibasaasira naire. Empindo dhaibwe nga bali ku mbalaasi dhivuuma ng'oti kuwolomboka kwa maadhi ga nhandha. Beetegekeire olutalo, okulwanisa imwe abantu b'omu Yerusalemu.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Agho abantu b'omu Yerusalemu baakoba bati: “Tuwuliire ebiri kutwidhira, n'emikono gyatuwaamu amaani, twawulira obulumi ng'oti bwa mukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ghatabaagho muntu aja mu nimiro, waire atambulatambula mu ngira; kuba abazigu baife bagemye empiima, buli ghantu ghali ntiisa ndhereere.”" 
Jeremiah6:26 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba abantu be ati: “Imwe abantu bange, muvaale ekutiya era mwevulunge mu ivu olw'enaku. Mulire ng'oti n'alira mutabane we omulala bedengedenge. Mulire lukalukalu, kuba oyo ali kwidha okuzikiriza, aidha kubagwaku bugwe nga timwidhi." 
Jeremiah6:27 Iwe Yeremia nkutairegho mu bantu bange, obalebe obone bwe bafaanana ng'omuntu bwe yeekebeedha ekyuma." 
Jeremiah6:28 Boonaboona badheemu era bampwitu. Baja nga basalaganaku ebibono. Emyoyo gyaibwe mikalangufu ng'oti kyuma kya kikomo era ng'oti n'ekyuma ekigumu einho. Era boonaboona bakupankupania. 
Jeremiah6:29 Ng'omuntu bw'asaanuusa ekyuma n'omuliro ogw'amaani ogukumiibwa emivuba gy'abagheesi, aye nikisigala nga kikaalimu ebiteetaagibwa, n'abantu bange boona batyo bwe bali, tosobola kubatoolamu kukola bibi." 
Jeremiah6:30 Baidha kwetebwanga biseedha bya feeza, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda mbalekuliire agho.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba nze Yeremia," 
Jeremiah7:2 nje nhemerere mu mulyango gw'eisinzizo, nangirire eri abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona abangira okusinza Musengwa Katonda, nga mbakoba nti," 
Jeremiah7:3 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati: “Mulongoose empisa dhaimwe n'ebikolwa byaimwe, olwo ndidha kubaleka mubenga mu kifo kino." 
Jeremiah7:4 Mulobe kwesiga bino bye mwerimba nabyo nga mukoba muti, ‘Eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda lirigho, eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda lirigho, eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda lirigho.’" 
Jeremiah7:5 “Mulongoose empisa dhaimwe n'ebikolwa byaimwe. Mukolenga ebituufu mu nkolagana ni banaimwe. 
Jeremiah7:6 Mutanhigirizanga basenze, oba bamulekwa, oba banamwandu, oba okwitanga abantu abaziraku musango mu ighanga lino. Era mutasinzanga bakatonda bandi ni mwereetera kwerumya imwe beene." 
Jeremiah7:7 Olwo ndidha kubaleka mubenga mu nsi eno ye nagha eira badhaadha baimwe, ebe yaibwe byanda na byanda." 
Jeremiah7:8 “Aye kale muja mwesigulira ku bibono eby'obuguya ebitayamba naire. 
Jeremiah7:9 Mwiba, mwatemula, mwakola obwenzi, mwalayira eby'obuguya, mwaniokeza omusambwa Baali obubbaani, mwasinza ni bakatonda be mwali timwidhiiku naire." 
Jeremiah7:10 Mpegaano mwidha mutya okwemerera mu maiso gange, mu isinzizo lino eryange lyene, mwakoba muti, ‘Tuli bukalamu’, nga kabiri mumala muja bwa mu maiso na kukola ebyenhinhalwa ebyo byonabyona?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Obwo mulowooza muti eisinzizo lino eryange lyene lifuuse mpuku ya banhazi? Bona eno, nze mwene mboine bye muli kukola." 
Jeremiah7:12 Muje mu kifo kye nasooka okulonda okunsinzizangamu e Shilo, mubone kye nakikola olw'ebibi by'abantu bange Abaisiraeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 Mukoze ebibi ebyo byonabyona emikuzi kamaala nga mbalabulanga aghazira kukoogha naire, aye mwaloba kuwulira, era naabeeta aye mwaloba kuvugira." 
Jeremiah7:14 Kale ni kye nakola Shilo, kye ndidha okukola n'eisinzizo lino eryange lyene lye mwesiga. Ekifo kino kye nabagha imwe ni badhaadha baimwe, ndidha kukikola ekintu n'ekirala ng'oti ni kye nakola Shilo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Era imwe ndidha kubabinga munve mu maiso, nga bwenabinga baganda baimwe abasimuka mu Efuraimu boonaboona. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah7:16 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Iwe Yeremia, otadaaga kusabira bantu bano. Era otandirira ku lwaibwe waire okunsaba ng'obeewolereza, kuba tiidha kukuwulirisa." 
Jeremiah7:17 Tobona bye bakola mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya ni mu nguudo dha Yerusalemu? 
Jeremiah7:18 Abaana bagherera enku, baiseibwe baakuma omuliro, bainhaibwe baakanda engaano okufumba emigaati. Nga bafumbira omusambwa gwe beeta Kyabazinga Omukazi ow'Eigulu. Baafukira emisambwa egindi ebigheebwayo eby'okunhwa, bansoononkereza bandeetera okusungughala." 
Jeremiah7:19 Aye nga bwene nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze ye bali kusoononkereza? Tibali kwesoononkereza beene na beene, ate bamale baswale n'okuswala?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Kale ni bona eno, obusungu bwange n'ekiruyi kyange ndidha kubimalira ku kifo kino, ni ku bantu, ni ku nsolo, ni ku miti, ni ku birime, ng'oti n'omuliro omuntu gw'atasobola kuzikiza.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati: “Mutoole ebigheebwayo byaimwe ebyandibaire eby'okwokebwa biweekereregho, mubyongereze ku misengo gyaimwe egindi, byonabyona mubirye." 
Jeremiah7:22 Bwe natoola badhaadha baimwe mu nsi Misiri, tyabagha biragiro bigema ku bigheebwayo byokebwa, na ku misengo." 
Jeremiah7:23 Aye nabalagira kino nti, ‘Mumpulirenga, olwo nze ndidha kubanga Katonda waimwe, imwe mube bantu bange. Mujiirenga ku mateeka ge mbagha, olwo byonabyona biidha kubajiiranga bukalamu.’" 
Jeremiah7:24 Aye baaloba kumpulirisa waire okugondera bye ndagira. Baajiira ku ebyo emyoyo gyaibwe emikalangufu era emibi bye gyenda. Mu kifo ky'okuba abalungi, beeyongera bwa kuba babi inho." 
Jeremiah7:25 Okuva ku lunaku badhaadha baimwe lwe baava mu nsi Misiri okutuusa ni ye buli eno, mbaire nga ntumanga ye muli abagheereza bange abalanzi aghazira kukoogha naire." 
Jeremiah7:26 Aye mwaloba kumpulirisa waire okugondera bye ndagira, mweyongera bwa kukalangusa myoyo gyaimwe era mwebisa bubi inho mwasinga ni badhaadha baimwe." 
Jeremiah7:27 “‘Kale ni, iwe Yeremia, oidha kubakobera ebibono bino. Aye era tibaidha kukuwulirisa. Ni bw'onaabeeta, tibaidha kuvugira." 
Jeremiah7:28 Oidha kubakoba oti eighanga lyaibwe tirimpulira nze Musengwa Katonda waalyo era tiriganha kugalagirwa. Tirikaali na mazima, waire okugoogeraku obwogere.’”" 
Jeremiah7:29 “Imwe abantu b'e Yerusalemu, musaleku enviiri dhaimwe mudhisuule ere; mulirire eyo ku nsozi edhiziraku kantu, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda nsungughaire era ndekuliire agho abantu bange." 
Jeremiah7:30 “Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, bakoze ekibi ye ndi, nze Musengwa Katonda. Batoire emisambwa egyenhinhalwa, baagita mu isinzizo lyange, baalyonoona." 
Jeremiah7:31 Era baaja baazimba ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu e Tofethi, mu kyetebwa Ekiiko ekya mutabane wa Hinnomu, baayokeranga mu muliro batabane baibwe ni baghala baibwe. Ate nga nze tibalagirangaku kukola kintu ekyo, waire okukirowoozaaku obulowooze mu mwoyo gwange." 
Jeremiah7:32 Kale ni bona, ekiseera kiri kwidha, ekifo ekyo kirekere okwetebwa Tofethi, oba ekiiko kya mutabane wa Hinnomu, aye kyetebwe Ekiiko eky'Okutirimbuliramu kuba balikiziikamu abantu kamaala abaliba nga bazira ghandi gha kubaziika." 
Jeremiah7:33 Emirambo gy'abantu giriba mere ya nhonhi, na ya nsolo dha mu nsiko, nga ghazira adhirobera naire." 
Jeremiah7:34 Mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya ni mu nguudo dha Yerusalemu, ndidha kulekeza emizira egy'abali mu binhumo ni mu kusagamba, ndekeze n'egy'abo abali mu mbaga edh'obugole kuba ensi eyo ya kufuuka bifulukwafulukwa omutaba bantu.”" 
Jeremiah8:1 “Mu kiseera ekyo, amagumba ga bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya, n'ag'abakungu ba Buyudaaya, n'aga bakabona, n'ag'abalanzi, n'ag'abantu abandi ab'omu Yerusalemu, gaja kutoolebwa mu magombe gaago." 
Jeremiah8:2 Gaja kusansaanira buli ghantu, ghansi gh'endhuba, n'omwezi, n'emuunienie dhoonadhoona edh'oku igulu. Ebyo n'ebintu, abantu abo bye baagonzanga, ni babijiirangaku, ni babigheerezanga era ni babisinzanga. Era amagumba gaibwe ago tigaja kusolozebwa waire okuziikibwa, aye gaja kubanga ku itaka okwo ng'oti busa." 
Jeremiah8:3 Abantu boonaboona ab'omu ighanga lino eibi, abaliwonagho eyo yoonayoona ye ndiba mbabingiire, balyegomba okufa okusinga okuba abalamu. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah8:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda yandagira nkobe abantu be nti: “Omuntu bw'agwa, tamala n'asituka? Omuntu bw'adaaliima n'abita ku ngira, tamala naira inhuma?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Memale lwaki imwe abantu bange mwadaaliima ni munvaaku obutenda kwira naire? Mwekalangula ku by'obuguya mwaloba okwira ye ndi. 
Jeremiah8:6 Nafaayo inho okubawulirisa, aye ghaabulagho ayogera ekituufu. Ghazira muntu yeeneniaku lwa bibi bye, n'akoba ati, ‘Kiki kino kye nkoze?’ Buli muntu agema bwa ngira ye, yaasimba busimbe ng'oti n'embalaasi eri kweyuna mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ni bw'aba sekanhulya amanha ebiseera bye eby'okwiriramu eka. Enjiibwa n'obumiini ni ŋaali, bikuuma ebiseera byabyo eby'okusengukiramu. Aye imwe abantu bange timwidhi mateeka gange nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Jeremiah8:8 Musobola mutya okukoba muti, ‘Tuli bagezi, era twidhi amateeka ga Musengwa Katonda,’ aye ng'ate abanamateeka baagafuulaniafuulania, gaafuuka ga buguya?" 
Jeremiah8:9 Abagezi baidha kuswazibwa, batye inho era baweemu n'amaani; kuba baaloba okwikiriza ebibono byange nze Musengwa Katonda. Kale agho magezi ki ge bali nago?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Kye ndiva ni mbatoolaku bakazi baibwe ni mbagha abasaadha abandi, n'emisiri gyaibwe ni ngigha abantu abandi; kuba okuviira irala ku basembayo ghansi okutuukira irala ku babbede beene, boonaboona bagwidhubanira bya kufuna mu bukyamu. Waire abalanzi ni bakabona, boona bakupankupania." 
Jeremiah8:11 Amabwa g'abantu bange bagawonia bwa ku ngulu. Baalamusagania bati, ‘Emiraala gibe n'iwe,’ ate nga ghazira miraala." 
Jeremiah8:12 Bandibaire baswalanga nga bakoze ebyenhinhalwa! Aye busa naire, tibaswala waire akatono kati. N'ensoni tidhibagemaku naire. Kale ni kyebaliva ni baghangulwa ng'oti n'abandi bwe baaghangulwa, era ni bazikirira lwe ndiidha okubonereza. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah8:13 “Nayenda okusoloza abantu bange ng'oti n'omuntu bw'asoloza by'akungula. Aye nga bali ng'oti n'omuzabbibu oguziraku mizabbibu, oba ng'oti n'omutiini oguziraku mitiini. Era n'amakaba nga gaaniala. Kale ni, n'ebyo bye nali mbaghaire biribatoolebwaku.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Agho abantu ba Musengwa Katonda baakoba bati: “Lwaki tutyaime bwa ghano? Mukole twesoloze, tuje mu bibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu tufiire eyo. Musengwa Katonda waife atughaireyo tufe. Atughaire amaadhi agalimu eirogo tunhwe, olw'okuba twakola ebibi twamusungughaza." 
Jeremiah8:15 Twasuubira okufuna emiraala, aye ghazira kalungi ke twafunamu. Era twasuubira okufuna ekiseera eky'okuwonezebwa, aye bona eno, twafuna bwa bitutiisa." 
Jeremiah8:16 Abazigu baife bamaze okutuuka mu kibuga ky'e Dani. Embalaasi dhaibwe tudhiwulira nga dhiri kugufula, era nga dhiri kukuba emyasi, n'ensi yoonayoona yaadhugumira. Abazigu baife bali kwidha okuzikiriza ensi yaife n'ebigirimu byonabyona, era bazikirize ebibuga byaife n'abantu ababirimu boonaboona.”" 
Jeremiah8:17 Musengwa Katonda abakoba ati: “Bona eno, ndidha kubasindikira emisota egy'obusagwa gibalume; ndidha kubasindikira ebiyiri byene, biidhe bibalume, nga timukaasobola kubidoosa naire.”" 
Jeremiah8:18 Enaku yange, nze Yeremia, teja kuwaagho. Mpulira ng'endidhwire bwa ku mwoyo." 
Jeremiah8:19 Wulira, abantu bange bali kulira woonawoona mu ighanga, bati: “Musengwa Katonda takaaba mu Sioni? Oyo Kyabazinga ow'ensi eno takaabaamu?” Aye Musengwa Katonda yaabairamu ati: “Lwaki mwansoononkereza ni mundeetera okusungughala, nga musinza ebifaananie ebibaadhe, ni musinza ebintu ebitali Katonda?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Abantu baalira bati: “Amakungula gaagano gawoireku, n'ebiseera by'endoboozi byona bibise, aye era tukaali kuwonezebwa.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Omwoyo guunuma olw'abantu bange abalumizibwa. Era ntiire inho naawaamu amaani n'enaku yangema. 
Jeremiah8:22 Mu Gileadi tekaaliyo bulezi? Tekaaliyo bayigha? Kiki ekirobeire abantu bange okuwona? 
Jeremiah9:1 Nguli omutwe gwange gwali n'amaadhi mangi ng'oti kidiba, n'amaiso gange ni gaba n'amaziga mangi ng'oti maadhi agakuuluula okuva mu nhindo dh'ensulo, nandirizenga amaziga omusana n'obwire olw'abantu bange abaitibwa." 
Jeremiah9:2 Nguli ndi n'ekifo mu irungu mwe nsobola okuba, nandiviire mu bantu bange naaja naaba eyo; kuba boonaboona ti beesigwa naire, baafuuka kikuukuulu kya bantu ba nkwe." 
Jeremiah9:3 Olulimi lwe bakozesa ti lutereevu naire, lwidhwire buguya bwereere. Ensi yaibwe mu kifo ky'okubaamu amazima, eidhwire bukupankupania. Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu bange beeyongera bwa kukola bibi, era nze tibandidhi naire.”" 
Jeremiah9:4 Kale ni omuntu yeekuumenga mwine, era alobenga kwesiga muganda we; kuba muganda wo akwefuulaku, ate era buli muntu ayogera ku baine ebibi." 
Jeremiah9:5 Buli muntu aguya mwine, ezira ayogera bya mazima. Baanalirira kwogera bya buguya byereere, era tibalekera kwonoona ni beenenia." 
Jeremiah9:6 Baja bwa mu maiso na kukiriga bandi, na kwogera bya buguya. era baaloba okuumanha. Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Jeremiah9:7 Kale ni Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Bona eno, ndidha kubasaanuusa ng'omuntu bw'asaanuusa ekyuma, era mbeekebeedhe; kuba nzira kindi kya kukolera bantu bange abo." 
Jeremiah9:8 Ebibono bye boogera biri ng'oti kalaso namuzisa, era bya buguya bwereere. Buli muntu alamusa mwine ng'amwendeza emiraala, aye nga mule ali kutegeka kumweteega." 
Jeremiah9:9 Nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti, nsobola ntya obutabonereza bantu abo olw'okukola ebintu ebyo? Era nsobola ntya obuteesasuuliza ku ighanga eryo?”" 
Jeremiah9:10 Nze Yeremia naakoba nti: “Ndidha kulira amaziga nga ndirira ensozi, era mpowoole olw'ebyayiro ensolo mwe dhiriira; kuba bikaze era biziramu muntu abibitamu naire. Tokaawulira nte nga dhimooleramu. Enhonhi n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhaalumukamu dhaaja.”" 
Jeremiah9:11 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Ndidha kufuula ekibuga Yerusalemu kibe mmungo dha bifunfugu, era kibe ekifo omusula ebibe. Ebibuga by'omu Buyudaaya byonabyona bija kusigala bifulukwa byereere, ghabulegho omuntu abibaamu.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Nze naabuuza Musengwa Katonda nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, lwaki ensi eyonooneike n'eba nkalu ng'oti irungu, era ni ghabula omuntu agibitamu? Naani omugezi asobola okutegeera kino? Naani ye wakiinhonhola asobola okukobera abandi?”" 
Jeremiah9:13 Musengwa Katonda yairamu ati: “Ekyo kiri kityo, lwa kuba abantu baava ku mateeka gange ge nabateeragho. Baaloba okungondera waire okukola bye nabakoba." 
Jeremiah9:14 Aye baakola bw'ebyo emyoyo gyaibwe emikalangufu bye gyenda, nga bajiira ku musambwa Baali nga badhaadha baibwe bwebaabeegeresa." 
Jeremiah9:15 N'olw'ekyo, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, kyenva ni nkoba nti: Bona eno, ndidha kubagha olubiriizi balulye lubakaayire, mbaghe n'amaadhi agalimu eirogo baganhwe." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ndidha kubasansaaniza mu maghanga, beene ni badhaadha baibwe, ge batawulirangaku naire. Era ndidha kubasindikaku amagye gabalumbe, okutuusa lwe ndibazikiriza okubamalagho.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Mudhuubirize ku bibairegho! Mwetese abakazi abalira baidhe, abo abaidhi okugegenga obukalamu.”" 
Jeremiah9:18 Abantu baakoba bati: “Mubakobe bangughe batuliriseeku, amaziga gamagale okutuva mu maiso, n'ebigoghe byaife bibole bubole.”" 
Jeremiah9:19 Wulira amaliro agali kuva mu Sioni nga gakoba gati: “Tuzikiriire! Era tuswaire inho; kuba bakonseegho endhu dhaife, twava mu nsi yaife.”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Nze naakoba nti: “Bakazi imwe, muwulire ebibono bya Musengwa Katonda, era mwetegereze by'akoba. Mwegerese baghala baimwe okulira amaziga, era buli muntu ayegerese mwine okugegenga;" 
Jeremiah9:21 kuba okufa kutwidhiire, kwabitira mu madinisa gaife, kwaingira mu ndhu dhaife, kwaita abaana mu nguudo n'abaisuka mu mpya edh'ebibuga." 
Jeremiah9:22 Emirambo gy'abantu gija kusigala bw'agho gityo, ng'oti mmungo dha busa mu nimiro, era ng'oti binhwa bya ngaano bye bakesiisa ni baleka obwagho, ni ghabulagho omuntu abitoolagho.”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abagezi balobe kwesuuta lwa magezi gaibwe, n'ab'amaani bateesuuta lwa maani gaibwe, waire abakombe okwesuuta olw'obukombe bwaibwe." 
Jeremiah9:24 “Aye buli yeesuuta, yeesuutenga lwa kuba nti: antegeera era andidhi nga ninze Musengwa Katonda agonza abantu obutalekera, era ni nkola amazima n'ebituufu. Ebintu ebyo n'ebinsanhusa. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah9:25 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona eno, ekiseera kiidha kutuuka mbonereze abo abakekete aye abeebisa ng'oti ti bakekete." 
Jeremiah9:26 Abantu abo ni bano: Abamisiri, Abayudaaya, Abaedomu, Abammoni, Abamoabu, nabo boonaboona ababa mu irungu abasala ku nviiri dhaibwe. Kale ni waire ng'ab'eighanga lya Isiraeli lyonalyona bakekete, aye era beebisa ng'abatali bakekete.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Imwe Abaisiraeli, muwulire Musengwa Katonda by'ali kubakoba." 
Jeremiah10:2 Musengwa Katonda oyo akoba ati: “Mutayeganga mpisa dha bamaghanga gandi. Mutatyanga olw'obumanhiso obubabonekera ku igulu waire nga abamaghanga agandi babutya. 
Jeremiah10:3 Empisa edh'abamaghanga ago muzira muganhulo. Omuntu aja yaatema omuti mu kibira, omubaadhi yaatoola ebyuma yaagubaadhamu ekifaananie n'engalo dhe." 
Jeremiah10:4 Abantu baakinhiriza ni feeza ni zaabu, era baakikomereramu emisumaali n'enhundo, kirobe kugwa." 
Jeremiah10:5 Ebifaananie byaibwe ebyo biri ng'oti ni bire bye bata mu nimiro okutiisa enhonhi. Tibisobola kwogera. Era tibisobola kutambula, babibbeeda bubbeede. Mutabityanga naire, kuba ghazira kabi ke bisobola kubakola, waire okuba n'akalungi ke bisobola okubakolera.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ghazira ali ng'oti niiwe. Oli mukologho, n'eriina lyo lyona ikologho era lya maani." 
Jeremiah10:7 Naani asobola obutakutya, iwe kyabazinga ow'amaghanga goonagoona? Bwenebwene ogwaniire okutiibwanga, kuba mu bagezi boonaboona abali mu maghanga goonagoona ni mu bwakyabazinga bwaibwe bwonabwona, muzira ali ng'oti niiwe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Abo boonaboona basiru era baziramu kategeera, kuba bazira kye basobola kwegera ku bifaananie ebyo eby'ekiti obuti." 
Jeremiah10:9 Ebifaananie ebyo baabirimbyaku feeza ye baatoola e Tarushishi, ni zaabu ye baatoola mu Ufazi. Era abagheesi b'ebintu bya zaabu n'abakola ebifaananie ebyo n'obukugu. Baabivaaza engoye dha langi ya bbululu n'edh'eya nakasooma, edhaakolebwa abalusi b'engoye abakugu." 
Jeremiah10:10 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda, niiwe Katonda mwenemwene, niiwe Katonda omulamu era kyabazinga ow'ebyanda n'ebyanda. Bw'osungughala ensi etengeeta, era amaghanga goonagoona tigasobola kugumira kiruyi kyo." 
Jeremiah10:11 Iwe Musengwa Katonda kyova n'okoba oti: “Emisambwa egyo ti n'egyakola eigulu n'ensi, era gija kuzikirizibwa give ku nsi ni ghansi gh'eigulu.”" 
Jeremiah10:12 Musengwa Katonda n'eyakola ensi n'obuyinza bwe, yaataagho eby'oku nsi n'amagezi ge, era yaabamba eigulu n'okutegeera kwe." 
Jeremiah10:13 Bw'alagira, amaadhi ku igulu gadudumuka, era asitusa olufu ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'ensi. Aleetera olukuba okughemya ng'amaadhi gali kugwa, era yaatoolayo empewo mu materekero ge, yaagireeta." 
Jeremiah10:14 Olwo abantu boonaboona baaba nga basirughaire era nga tibakaalimu kategeera. Buli mugheesi wa bintu bya zaabu yaaswala olw'ebifaananie ebisinzibwa by'agheesa; kuba bya buguya bwereere, era biziramu bulamu naire." 
Jeremiah10:15 Biziramu muganhulo era bya buguya bwereere. Ku lunaku Musengwa Katonda lw'alibisaliraku omusango okubisinga, bija kuzikirira." 
Jeremiah10:16 Aye Katonda wa Yakobo tali ng'oti ni byene, kuba n'eyakola ebintu byonabyona. Era yaalonda Isiraeli okuba eighanga erirye ku bubwe. Eriina lye ni Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye." 
Jeremiah10:17 Imwe abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu, musibe emigugu, kuba abazigu babazingiiza." 
Jeremiah10:18 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona eno, ku luno ndi kuja kuwoloba ere abantu b'omu nsi eno, ng'oti bali bwa mu nsuumulo. Ndidha kubaleetera enaku ebalume ebitaloodheka.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Agho abantu bairamu bati: “Tukagwireku okufumitibwa ebibwa tuti. Batutaireku ebibwa ebitaja kuwona. Aye tuzira kya kukoba: enaku eno etutuuseeku tuteekwa kugigumira. 
Jeremiah10:20 Eweema dhaife badhoonoine, n'emigugha egidhibamba gyonagyona gikutwike. Abaana baife batuviireku, tibakaaligho. Ghazira muntu wa kutubambira weema dhaife, na kudhitaamu nsuubo dhaamu.”" 
Jeremiah10:21 Nze naabakoba nti: “Abakulembeze baife basiru, tibeebuuzaaku ku Musengwa Katonda. Kyova ebintu ni bitabajiira bukalamu, n'abantu be batwala ni basansaana obusansaane." 
Jeremiah10:22 Wulira oluvuuvuumo luli kwidha. Ghaligho akabuguutano nga kava mu nsi eri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Eigye lyayo lija kufuula ebibuga bya Buyudaaya bifulukwa byereere, omuba obw'ebibe.”" 
Jeremiah10:23 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndidhi nti ghazira muntu ali na buyinza ku bulamu bwe, waire okuba n'obusobozi obubukuuma." 
Jeremiah10:24 Lamba abantu bo balongooke empisa, aye otabakayukira inho, oba okubabonereza mu busungu; kuba agho oba otusaaniagho busaanie." 
Jeremiah10:25 Kyukiza obusungu bwo ku maghanga agatakusinza, ni ku bantu abo abaloba okukugondera; kuba baatwita ife abantu bo, baatuzikiriza okutumaliriragho, era baaleka ensi yaife ng'eri bifulukwa byereere." 
Jeremiah11:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba nze Yeremia ati: 
Jeremiah11:2 “Wulirisa endagaano eno by'ekoba, era oje obikobere ab'omu Yerusalemu n'abantu abandi ababa mu Buyudaaya," 
Jeremiah11:3 oti Nze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli nkoba nti, omuntu yeenayeena ataatuukirizenga ndagaano eno by'ekoba akolimirwenga." 
Jeremiah11:4 Endagaano eno nagikola ni badhaadha baibwe, bwe nabatoola mu nsi Misiri, ye baabanga ng'oti n'abali mu muliro ogw'amaani ogusaanuusa ekyuma ekigumu einho. Naabakoba okungonderanga n'okukolanga kiisi kye nalagira olwo babenga bantu bange, nze mbenga Katonda waibwe." 
Jeremiah11:5 Memale ntuukirizenga ekisuubizo kye nasuubiza badhaadha baibwe, nti ndibagha ensi engimu erimu ebirungi kamaala, era mwe bali buti.” Nze nairamu nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndidha kubakobera nga bw'okobye.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Ja olangirire ebibono bino mu bibuga byonabyona ebya Buyudaaya ni mu nguudo dha Yerusalemu. Obakobe bagonderenga endagaano eno by'ekoba 
Jeremiah11:7 kuba bwe natoola badhaadha baibwe mu nsi Misiri, nabalabuliragho irala okumpuliranga. Era nkaabalabula ni ye buli eno aghazira kukoogha naire." 
Jeremiah11:8 Aye baaloba kumpulirisa waire okugondera bye ndagira, era buli muntu yeeyongera bwa kukola ebyo omwoyo gwe omukalangufu era omubi bye gwenda. Naabalagira bakuumenga endagaano eyo, aye baaloba. Kye nava ni mbasindikira ebibonerezo byonabyona ebiri mu ndagaano eyo.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Musengwa Katonda era yankoba ati: “Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu bali kutegeka okundheemera. 
Jeremiah11:10 Baizeeyo mu kukola ebibi badhaadha baibwe bye baakolanga, ni baloba okugonderanga bye nabalagira. Era buti abantu b'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya basinza bakatonda abandi, baamenha endagaano ye nakola ni badhaadha baibwe." 
Jeremiah11:11 Mperaano ni, nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubalabula nti nja kubasindikira akabi ke bataidha kuwona. Ni bwebalirira nga benda nze mbayambe, tiribafaaku naire." 
Jeremiah11:12 Olwo abantu b'omu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya balija ye bakatonda be baniokeza obubbaani, baabalirira babayambe. Aye bakatonda abo tibalisobola kubawonia ng'akabi kaidhie." 
Jeremiah11:13 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya bali ni bakatonda kamaala, abaagayaga n'obungi bw'ebibuga byaibwe. N'abantu b'omu Yerusalemu baazimba alutaari edhaagayaga n'obungi bw'enguudo dh'omu kibuga omwo. Alutaari edho nga dha kuniokezaaku bubbaani eri omusambwa Baali ogwenhinhalwa.”" 
Jeremiah11:14 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Yeremia, otadaaga kusabira bantu bano. Era otandirira ku lwaibwe waire okunsaba ng'obeewolereza, kuba bwe baliba mu buzibu ni bansaba mbayambe tiribawulirisa naire." 
Jeremiah11:15 Kale oba nga abantu abo be ngonza ntyo bakoze ebibi, memale bakaagwaniire okungira mu isinzizo lyange? Balowooza bati obweyamo bwe bakola, n'ensolo dhe baghaayo ng'emisengo, bisobola okulobera akabi okubatuukaku, era byabaleetera okusagamba?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Ghaligho olundi lwe nabeetaku omuti omwoliva ogusagaatiriire amakaba n'ebibala ebiboneka obulungi einho. Aye buti ndidha kugusindikaku kiwunga ow'amaani alimu n'okutyabuka, agukunaanieku omuliro, ensaga dhaagwo dhisiriire." 
Jeremiah11:17 “Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, nali ntairegho Abaisiraeli n'Abayudaaya. Aye mperaano ndi kubeesoomera kubasindikira kabi. Ekyo bakyereeteire beene olw'ebibi bye bakola, ni bansungughaza nga baniokeza omusambwa Baali obubbaani.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankobera naamanha enkwe edh'okundhita, abazigu bange dhe baali bali kutegeka." 
Jeremiah11:19 Aye nali ng'oti n'entaama ento empolu ye bali kutwala okwita. Nali tiidhi nga ninze ye baali bali kutegekera okukola akabi, nga bakoba bati: “Ka tutemegho omuti nga gukaali mulamu bulungi. Ka tumwite aveegho ghalobe kubaagho amwidhukira naire.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Agho nze naasaba nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, niiwe omulamuzi asala mu mazima, waaleba emyoyo n'ebirowoozo by'abantu. Kale ka nteege mbone nga bw'onaaneesasuulizaagho ku bantu abo; kuba ensonga dhange ndhandhwire mu maiso go.”" 
Jeremiah11:21 Bino Musengwa Katonda by'akoba abantu ab'omu Anathothi, abenda okundhita nga bakoba bati: “Bw'onaalangirira mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda, twidha kukwita.”" 
Jeremiah11:22 Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Abantu abo ndidha kubabonereza. Abaisuka baibwe baidha kufiira mu lutalo, n'abaana baibwe baidha kulambuka ndhala." 
Jeremiah11:23 Namala okutaagho ekiseera mwe ndisindikira akabi ku bantu abo ab'omu Anathothi, era ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka ghazira ku abo aliwonagho.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ni bwentakana niiwe, niiwe oba omutuufu. Aye era ka nkubuuze ebigema ku kukola mu butuufu. Lwaki abakozi b'ebibi ebintu bibajiira bukalamu? Lwaki abakupankupania bali mu miraala?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Oja waabasimba ng'oti bisimbe baasimba emizi. Baakula baatuuka okubala ebibala. Buliidho baakwogerangaku bukalamu, waire nga bwenebwene tibakufaaku." 
Jeremiah12:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, aye iwe nze ondidhi bukalamu, oneekebeedha wambona nga bwe nfaanana. Kwekwebya abantu ababi abo obatoolegho, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'atwala entaama edh'okwita. Era obakuume okutuusa ng'ekiseera kyaibwe eky'okwitibwa kituuse." 
Jeremiah12:4 Ensi yaife erituusa li okukala, n'eisubi lyamu lyonalyona okuniala? Ensolo n'enhonhi dhiri kufa, olw'obubi bw'abantu baife abo abakoba bati: “Katonda tabona bye tukola.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Yeremia, oba nga okulumuka n'ab'ebigere kukukooyiiza, onaasobola otya okulumuka n'abali ku mbalaasi? Oba nga tosobola kwemerera ghantu ghatereevu nga togwire, olikola otya bw'oliba mu kibira ky'oku mwiga Yorudani?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Abantu bo beene b'oba nabo aghalala n'ab'ekika kyo, baakuliiremu olukwe. Beeyimbye n'abo abakukiriga. Otabeesiganga ni bweboogera ebiwooma bitya.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndekuliire agho Abaisiraeli, eighanga eryo lye neerondera ndiviireku. Abantu abo be ngonza einho mbaghaireyo mu ngalo dh'abazigu baibwe." 
Jeremiah12:8 Abantu bange be neerondera banfuukiire ng'oti mpologoma bw'ewologomera mu kibira, bankaabukira nga banvuma. Kyenviire ni mbakyagha." 
Jeremiah12:9 Abantu bange be neerondera bali ng'oti n'enhonhi erumbiibwa ensega ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona. Ja oyete ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhoonadhoona dhiidhe dhirye. 
Jeremiah12:10 Abafuzi kamaala boonoine eisamba, eisamba lyange eryo ery'emizabbibu, baatyankirira obulime bwange. Ensi yange enungi bagirese bw'agho etyo, ng'eri bwa bifulukwa byereere omutaba bantu." 
Jeremiah12:11 Bagifiire bifulukwa byereere omuzira kalungi ke mbonaku. Ensi eyo yoonayoona efuuse irungu, aye ghazira na muntu afaayo naire." 
Jeremiah12:12 Abanhazi babisebise mu nsozi dhoonadhoona edh'omu irungu edhiziraku kantu. Nze Musengwa Katonda nsindiike olutalo okuzikiriza ensi eyo yoonayoona. Era ghazira muntu ali mu miraala. 
Jeremiah12:13 Abantu bange baasiga engaano, aye baakungula mawa. Baafaabiikana inho, aye baaloba kufunamu muganhulo. Baaswala olw'obutabaagho ke bafunamu, kuba obusungu bwange obubitirivu bwabalemeesa.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Kino kye ndidha okukola ab'omu maghanga agaliiraine Isiraeli agoonoona ensi ye nagha abantu bange Abaisiraeli. Ndidha kubatoola mu nsi dhaibwe, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'aiwululagho ekisimbe n'emizi gyakyo. Era ndiwonia Abayudaaya naabatoola mu ngalo dh'abantu abo ababi." 
Jeremiah12:15 Aye bwendimala okubatoola mu nsi dhaibwe, ndiiramu okubagemerwa ekivunika, naiza buli ighanga mu kiketezo kyalyo ni mu nsi yaalyo." 
Jeremiah12:16 Ate bwebalyega empisa dh'abantu bange n'omwoyo omulala, ni balayiranga mu liina lyange bati, ‘Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu,’ nga bwe baayegeresa abantu bange okulayiranga omusambwa Baali, olwo boona baliba bantu bange, n'ebintu biribajiiranga bukalamu." 
Jeremiah12:17 Aye eighanga lyonalyona eritalingondera nja kulitoola mu nsi yaalyo, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'aiwululagho ekisimbe n'emizi gyakyo. Era nja kulizikiriza. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”"
