Jeremiah13:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Ja weegulire ekivaalo ky'omu nkende eky'olugoye olughegheevu, okyesibe mu nkende aye nga tokyoziizaamu.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Agho naakigula era naakyesiba mu nkende. 
Jeremiah13:3 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah13:4 “Toola ekivaalo ky'omu nkende ekyo, oje okikweke mu kiina ekiri mu lwatika olw'olubaale okumpi n'omwiga Eufurate.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Kale naaja naakikweka kumpi n'omwiga ogwo Eufurate. 
Jeremiah13:6 Nga ghabiseegho enaku kamaala, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Situkiramu oje ku mwiga Eufurate, otooleyo ekivaalo ky'omu nkende kye nakulagira okukwekayo.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Agho nairayo ku mwiga Eufurate, naanoonia ekivaalo ekyo mu kifo mwe nakikweka. Aye naja okukyagaana nga kyonooneike era nga tikikaali na mugaso naire." 
Jeremiah13:8 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah13:9 “Nze Musengwa Katonda ntyo bwe nja okumalagho okwekuluntaza okw'abantu b'omu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya yoonayoona. 
Jeremiah13:10 Abantu abo ababi baaloba okukola bye mbalagira. Baira mu kukolanga ebyo emyoyo gyaibwe emikalangufu bye gyenda, ni mu kusinzanga n'okugheerezanga bakatonda abandi. Kale ni, baja kuba ng'oti n'ekivaalo ky'omu nkende ekyo, ekitakaali na mugaso naire." 
Jeremiah13:11 Ng'ekivaalo ky'omu nkende bwe kyegemera irala ku nkende y'omuntu, ntyo bwe nayenda n'abantu b'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona baneegemereku irala. Olwo babenga bantu bange abaleetera eriina lyange okusaakibwa n'okutiibwa. Aye beene baaloba okungondera.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Yeremia, kobera abantu b'omu Isiraeli oti Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Buli kidoome kya mwenge gwa mizabbibu kiidhuzibwa mwenge gwa mizabbibu.’ Baidha kukwiramu bati, ‘Obwo olowooza oti titwidhi nga buli kidoome kya mwenge gwa mizabbibu kiidhuzibwamu mwenge gwa mizabbibu?’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Olwo omale obakobe oti, nze Musengwa Katonda nja kutoola abantu b'omu nsi eno: bakyabazinga baidhukulu ba Daudi, ni bakabona, n'abalanzi, n'abantu boonaboona ab'omu Yerusalemu, mbaidhuze omwenge gw'emizabbibu ng'oti n'omuntu bw'aidhuza ekidoome, okutuusa nga boonaboona batamiire." 
Jeremiah13:14 Memale mbakontaganie buli muntu ku mwine, k'abe omuto oba omukulu. Nga ghazira kusaasira, oba okusonigha, waire okugemerwa omuntu ekivunika, aye okutoolaku okubazikiriza obuzikirize.”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Imwe abantu Abaisiraeli, muwulire era muteeyo omwoyo. Musengwa Katonda akobye ati mubenga bawombeefu era mumuwulirenga." 
Jeremiah13:16 Mughe Musengwa Katonda waimwe ekitiisa ng'akaali kuleeta nzikiiza ni mwekontola ku nsozi. Era nga n'obutangaavu bwe mwasuubira akaali kubufuula nzikiiza eri bedimudimu. 
Jeremiah13:17 Aye bwe munaaloba okuwulirisa bye nkoba, ndidha kulira mule mu ngiso olw'okwekuluntaza kwaimwe. Ndidha kulira inho mmagaze n'amaziga, olw'abantu ba Musengwa Katonda abatwaliibwa nga banhage." 
Jeremiah13:18 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Koba kyabazinga n'inhina oti, ‘Muve ku bityamo byaimwe eby'obwakyabazinga, kuba engule dhaimwe edhiboneka obulungi dhibaviire ku mitwe gyaimwe dhaagwa.’" 
Jeremiah13:19 Ebibuga ebiri mu kiketezo kya Buyudaaya ekikalukalu ekiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, babizingiiza. Ghazira muntu asobola kubita kubituukaku. Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona batwaliibwa mu bunhage.”" 
Jeremiah13:20 Iwe Yerusalemu, bona ere! Abazigu bo bali kwidha nga bava ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba! Abantu abaakugemesebwa okulabirira, abantu abo abaakweyagazanga einho, buti bali gha?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Olyogera ki, ng'abantu be wadhuubanga okuba bakagwa bo bakughangwire era baakufuga? Toliwulira bulumi ng'oti n'obw'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Bwe weebuuza mule lwaki ebyo byonabyona bikutuuseeku, ni bakukanulaku ebivaalo byo, ni bakugema eby'entaka era ni bakukaka okuba niiwe? Okwiramu kuli nti, lwa kuba ebibi byo binene inho." 
Jeremiah13:23 Omuntu asobola okukyusa langi y'omubiri gwe? Oba empala esobola okukyusa obudholodhondho bwayo ku mubiri? Ebyo bwebiba bisoboka, olwo n'imwe mwena omwamanhirira okukola ebibi, mwandibaire musobola okwega okukola ebirungi." 
Jeremiah13:24 Musengwa Katonda aidha kubasansaania ng'oti n'empewo eva mu irungu bw'esansaania ebikaba. 
Jeremiah13:25 Musengwa Katonda oyo akobye ati ekyo n'ekija okubatuukaku. Ekyo ky'asazeegho okubakola, kuba mwamwerabira, mwesiga bakatonda ab'obuguya." 
Jeremiah13:26 Musengwa Katonda mwene aja kubatoolamu ebivaalo byaimwe, mube madu muswale." 
Jeremiah13:27 Musengwa Katonda oyo ababona nga mukola ebintu ebyenhinhalwa. Era yaababona nga muja eri bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi ku nsozi ni mu nsiko. Mwaba ng'oti n'omuntu omwenzi, oba ng'oti n'embalaasi enume bw'emoolera okuniina enkazi. Imwe abantu ab'e Yerusalemu mukagwireku! Mulibaaku li abalongoofu?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Bino Musengwa Katonda bye yakobera Yeremia nga bigema ku ndoboozi, ati:" 
Jeremiah14:2 “Ensi Buyudaaya eri mu kulira, ebibuga byamu biri kufaagho. Abantu baamu balambaala ku itaka olw'okunakughala. N'ab'omu Yerusalemu baawowoola ebitaloodheka." 
Jeremiah14:3 Abakungu batuma abagheereza baibwe banone amaadhi. Abagheereza baaja baatuuka ku bidiba aye baayagaana nga muziramu maadhi; baira n'ensugha dhaibwe nga nkaya. Ensoni dhaabagema, beeghemba mu maiso nga baswaire." 
Jeremiah14:4 Abalimi basoberwa, beeghemba mu maiso nga baswaire, olw'amaadhi obutagwa eitaka ni libbalanguka." 
Jeremiah14:5 N'empongo erekulira eyo mu nsiko enhanha ye yaakamala okuzaala, olw'okubulwa eisubi." 
Jeremiah14:6 N'endogoyi edh'omu nsiko dheemerera ghaigulu ku nsozi, dhaalakalaka nga dhaasaamiriire ng'oti bibe, dhaaloba kubona ku ka kulya naire." 
Jeremiah14:7 Abantu bange bandirira bati, ‘Wo Musengwa Katonda, waire ebibi byaife bitulumiriza olw'okukuvaaku emikuzi kamaala ni twonoona, iwe mala gaganha otuyambe nga bwe watusuubiza." 
Jeremiah14:8 Niiwe wenka eisuubi ly'Abaisiraeli; niiwe otuwonia mu biseera ebizibu. Lwaki oba mu nsi yaife ng'oti n'omuntu omusenze obusenze, era ng'oti n'omugeni omubise asula obw'olunaku olulala lwonka?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Lwaki oba ng'omuntu asobeirwa, era n'oba ng'omulwani ow'amaani aye atasobola kutuwonia naire? Ate nga bwenebwene iwe Musengwa oli mu ife. Ife tuli bantu bo, otatulekulira agho.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:10 Abantu abo Musengwa Katonda abairamu ati: “Abantu bange benda inho okunvaaku, baaloba kwefuga naire. Zeena kyenva ni ntabasiima naire, era ndidha kwegemerera ensobi dhaibwe, mbabonereze olw'ebibi byaibwe.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Yeremia, otadaaga kusabira bantu bano nze kubayamba." 
Jeremiah14:12 Ni bwe banaasiiba, nze tija kuwulirisa bye bansaba nga bandirira. Era ni bwe banampanga ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere y'empeke, nze tiidha kubasiimanga. Aye ndidha bwa kubazikiriza mu ntalo era mbasindikire endhala n'endwaire ya kawumpuli bibaite.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Nze naakoba nti: “Aa, Musengwa Katonda waife, abalanzi bakobera abantu abo bati, ‘Tighaja kubaagho lutalo waire endhala, kuba mbu iwe wasuubiza oti ghaidha kubangagho miraala myereere mu nsi yaife.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Aye Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Abalanzi abo balanga bya buguya mu liina lyange. Nze tibatumangaku oba okubalagira ekintu kyonakyona, waire okwogera nabo. Okubonekerwa kwe boogeraku kwa buguya, ni bye balagula biziramu makulu, babiyiiya buyiiye beene." 
Jeremiah14:15 Agho ni, nze Musengwa Katonda ka nkukobere kye nja okukola abalanzi abo be ntatumangaku, aye ate ni balanga mu liina lyange nga bakoba mbu tighaja kubaagho lutalo waire endhala mu nsi eno: Ndidha kubazikiriza mu lutalo era mbasindikire endhala ebaite." 
Jeremiah14:16 N'abantu be bakobera obulanzi obwo boona baliitibwa mu nsambo n'endala. Emirambo gyaibwe, ghalala n'egya bakazi baibwe, n'egya batabane baibwe ni baghala baibwe, gija kusuulibwa mu nguudo dha Yerusalemu, nga ghazira na muntu agiziika mu nsambo eyo mbeesasuulizeeku olw'ebibi byaibwe.”" 
Jeremiah14:17 Agho Musengwa Katonda yandagira okukobera abantu enaku yange nti: “Amaziga ka gakuuluule okunva mu maiso omusana n'obwire aghazira kulekera, kuba abantu bange bafumitiibwa ebibwa ebinene era baalumizibwa inho." 
Jeremiah14:18 Bwentambula ni njaaku eyo mu byalo, mbona mirambo gy'abaitirwa mu lutalo. Bwenhingira mu bibuga, mbona bantu bali kulambuka ndhala. Abalanzi ni bakabona bakola emirimo gyaibwe nga buliidho mu nsi, aye bazira kye baidhi.”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Wo Musengwa Katonda, obwo Abayudaaya wabaviiraku irala, waakyagha abantu b'e Sioni? Lwaki watulumya n'otutaaku ebibwa otyo, ni tutasobola kuwonezebwa? Twasuubira okufuna emiraala, aye ghazira kalungi ke twafunamu. Era twasuubira okufuna ekiseera eky'okuwonezebwa, aye bona, twafuna bwa bitutiisa." 
Jeremiah14:20 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bwenebwene twayonoona y'oli, twikiriza ebibi ebyaife era n'ebya badhaadha baife." 
Jeremiah14:21 Idhukira bye watusuubiza olobe kutusuula bw'ere. Otaswaza Yerusalemu ekifo eky'ekitiisa ekibaamu ekityamo kyo eky'obwakyabazinga. Otamenhagho ndagaano ye wakola n'ife. 
Jeremiah14:22 Ku bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi abaziramu makulu, ghaligho asobola okugwisa amaadhi? N'eigulu ku bwalyo lyonka lisobola okutoonhesa waire obw'olumiiyirizi? Ti niiwe Musengwa Katonda waife? Eisuubi lyaife lyonalyona liri mu iwe, kuba niiwe okola ebintu ebyo byonabyona." 
Jeremiah15:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Musa ni Samueli ni bwe bandyemereire ghano ninze, okuwolereza abantu abo ye ndi, era nze tinandisaasiire bantu abo naire. Babinge baje, banve mu maiso." 
Jeremiah15:2 Bwe bakubuuza ye babe baje, bakobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda nkobye nti, ‘Ab'okufa endwaire ya kawumpuli, baje eri endwaire ya kawumpuli. Ab'okufiira mu lutalo, baje eri olutalo. Ab'okufa endhala, baje eri endhala. Ab'okutwalibwa mu busibe, baje mu busibe.’" 
Jeremiah15:3 ‘Nze Musengwa Katonda ndidha kubataaku eby'okubazikiriza bina: olutalo lwidha kubaita, embwa dhiyuzeyuze emirambo gyaibwe, enhonhi dhibamoodhogole, n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhibakankamire okubamalagho." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ndidha kubafuula ekintu ekitiisa einho abantu boonaboona ku nsi, olw'ebyo Manasse mutabane wa Hezekia bye yakola mu Yerusalemu nga ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya.’" 
Jeremiah15:5 “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: ‘Imwe abantu bange ab'e Yerusalemu, naani alibasaasira? Naani aliwulira enaku olwaimwe? Naani alikyukira ewaimwe ababuuze okumanha embeera ye mulimu?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Imwe mwanvaaku, mwaja mu bye mwalimu eira. Kale zeena n'okugolola omukono ni mbazikiriza; kuba nkooye okubasaasiranga." 
Jeremiah15:7 Mu buli kibuga eky'omu nsi eno, imwe abantu bange nabasensa n'olugali ng'oti n'ole asensa engaano enkube, empewo n'efuuwa ere ebiwusu byaku. Naita abaana baimwe, niimwe abantu bange naabazikiriza, olw'okuba mwaloba okukyuka ni muva mu mpisa dhaimwe embi." 
Jeremiah15:8 Ensi yaimwe nagyongeramu banamwandu bangi, okusinga n'omusenho oguba ku mbali kw'enhandha. Naitira abaisuka baimwe mu maani ghagati, bainhaibwe enaku yaabaluma. Nabasindikira obulumi n'okutya nga tibabyetegekeire naire." 
Jeremiah15:9 Omukazi eyazaala abaana omusanvu aziriike, amaani gaamuwaamu. Abona nzikiiza waire nga bukaali musana. Ensoni dhimugemye yaaswala. Abo abaliba nga bakaasigairegho ku imwe, ndibaleka abazigu baabaita. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah15:10 Ye nga nkagwireku nze Yeremia! Maama yanzaalira ki ku nsi kuno? Ku nsi kuno ndi n'okusoola era n'okutakana n'abantu boonaboona. Tiwolangaku muntu, waire nze mwene okwewola ku muntu yeenayeena, aye ate abantu boonaboona bankolimira." 
Jeremiah15:11 Aa, Musengwa Katonda, kale ka kibe kityo, ebikolimo byaibwe bingeme, bwemba nga tyakugheereza bukalamu, era bwemba nga tyewolerezaagho muzigu mu biseera ebizibu era eby'obulumi." 
Jeremiah15:12 Ka mbuuzeeku: Ghaligho omuntu asobola okumenha ekintu eky'ekyuma ekigumu einho, ekyuma ekigumu einho kye batabwiremu ekikomo, nga kiva ere ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Eby'obukombe n'ebintu eby'omughendo eby'abantu bange, nja kubighaayo abazigu babinhage olw'okusasulamu ebibi ebingi bye bakoze mu nsi eno." 
Jeremiah15:14 Nja kubafuula bagheereza ba bazigu baibwe eyo mu nsi ye bataidhi naire, kuba obusungu bwange butumbwike ng'oti muliro era tiguja kuzikira.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Agho naakoba Musengwa Katonda nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe ondidhi! Nkusaba ondidhukire oidhe onhambe, oneesasuulizeegho ku abo abankiriga. Otabaguminkiriza kubagha kaghagaanhia ka kundhita. Oteerabira nga buliidho banvuma ku lulwo." 
Jeremiah15:16 Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Iwe wayogera ninze, naawulirisa buli kibono kye wakoba. Ekyo kyaleetera omwoyo gwange okusanhuukirira; kuba nze ndi wuwo." 
Jeremiah15:17 Tibangaku na bantu ku binhumo mu kusagamba. Aye nabanga agho zenka nga njiira ku biragiro byo, nga ndidhwire obusungu." 
Jeremiah15:18 Lwaki obulumi bwange bweyongera bweyongere? Lwaki eibwa lyange lifuuse lya kokolo, ni litawona? Oyenda kunfuukira ng'oti n'akaiga akateesigika, akakala mu biseera by'endoboozi? Oba ng'oti n'amaadhi agaloba okugwa mu biseera ebituufu?”" 
Jeremiah15:19 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Bw'onaira ye ndi, zeena ndidha kukwiza obe wange ompeerezenga. Bw'onaalekera okwogera ebiziramu makulu, n'oyogeranga eby'amakulu, oidha kwiramu okuba omulanzi wange. Abantu baidha kwidhanga y'oli, se ti iwe okujanga ye bali." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ndidha kukufuula obe ye bali ng'oti kimante ekigumu eky'ekyuma eky'ekikomo. Balikulwanisa aye tibalikughangula, kuba ndidha kubanga ghalala niiwe okukukuuma n'okukuwonia ebizibu." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ndikutoola mu buyinza bw'ababi, era naakuwonia abakambwe balobe kukukola kabi. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah16:2 “Ng'oli mu kifo kino otabayiza mukazi era otazaala baana. 
Jeremiah16:3 Ndidha kukukobera ekija okuba ku baana abazaalibwa mu kifo kino, ni ku bazaire baibwe:" 
Jeremiah16:4 Baja kufanga endwaire embi einho, era ghazira aja kubalira waire okubaziika. Emirambo gyaibwe gija kubanga ku itaka okwo ng'oti mmungo ya busa. Baja kwitibwanga mu ntalo oba balambukenga endhala bafe, n'emirambo gyaibwe giriibwenga enhonhi n'ensolo dh'omu nsiko." 
Jeremiah16:5 “Otangiranga mu ndhu omuli abali kulira abafu. Otajangayo kubalirisaaku waire okubagumya. Abantu abo, nze Musengwa Katonda, nabatoolaku emiraala gyange, naalekera agho okubagonzanga n'okubasaasiranga." 
Jeremiah16:6 Abantu ababbede beene n'abo abasembayo ghansi balifiira mu nsi eno aye ghaabulagho omuntu abaziika oba abalira, nga yeesalasala ku mubiri gwe, oba ng'amwa enviiri gha mberi ku mutwe gwe gwaba ng'oti gwa mpaata olw'okunakughala." 
Jeremiah16:7 Tighalibaagho atwalira mulizi kya kulya okumugumya ng'afiiriirwa, waire okumusaasira n'amugha eky'okunhwa ni bw'aliba ng'afiiriirwa ise oba inhina." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Era otangiranga mu ndhu omuli abali ku mbaga, n'otyama nabo okulya n'okunhwa nabo." 
Jeremiah16:9 Wulirisa bukalamu, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye era Katonda wa Isiraeli, bye ndi kubakoba: Bona, ndidha kulekeza amamiro ag'abali mu binhumo ni mu kusagamba galobe kuwulirwaku naire, ndekeze n'emizira gy'abo abali mu mbaga dh'obugole. Ekyo nja kukikola nga n'imwe mukaali balamu era nga mubona." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Bw'onaakobera abantu ebintu ebyo byonabyona, baidha kukubuuza bati, ‘Lwaki Musengwa Katonda alangiriire akabi akanene katyo okututuukaku? Twiziiza musango ki? Era kibi ki kye tukoze eri Musengwa Katonda waife?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 Agho iwe oidha kubakoba oti, ‘Badhaadha baimwe banvaaku baaja ye bakatonda abandi, baabagheerezanga era baabasinzanga. Nze baaneerabira baaloba kukuuma mateeka gange." 
Jeremiah16:12 Aye imwe mukoze bubi n'okusinga badhaadha baimwe abo. Buli muntu ku imwe akola ebyo omwoyo gwe omukalangufu era omubi bye gwenda, yaaloba okumpulira." 
Jeremiah16:13 Kyenva ndidha okubatoola mu nsi eno, mbasuule mu nsi imwe beene ni badhaadha baimwe ye mutawulirangaku naire. Eyo ye mwidha okubanga nga mugheereza bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi omusana n'obwire. Era tija kubagemerwanga kivunika naire.’" 
Jeremiah16:14 “Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati, ekiseera kiri kwidha, mube nga timukaalayira mu liina lyange nga Katonda omulamu eyatoola Abaisiraeli mu nsi Misiri." 
Jeremiah16:15 Aye mulayirenga mu liina lyange nga Katonda omulamu eyatoola Abaisiraeli mu nsi eri ku luuyi lw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ni mu nsi edhindi dhoonadhoona ye nali mbabingiire kuba nja kubaiza mu nsi yaibwe ye nagha badhaadha baibwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah16:16 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona, nze nja kwetesa abavubi kamaala, baje bavube abantu abo ng'oti byanhandha. Memale kabiri ndhetese abayiizi kamaala, baje babayiige ng'oti nsolo ku buli lusozi, ni ku buli kasozi, ni mu buli mpuku eri mu lwatika lw'olubaale." 
Jeremiah16:17 Buli kye bakola nkibona, ghazira kye basobola kungisa. Buli kibi kye bakola nkibona bukalamu." 
Jeremiah16:18 Nja kubabonereza nga mbeesasuulizaaku emikuzi ebiri olw'okwonoona kwaibwe n'ebibi byaibwe kuba baayonoona ensi yange baagireetamu ebisinzibwa byaibwe ebitali Katonda ebyenhinhalwa ebiri ng'oti bwa mirambo, era bagiidhuza emisambwa.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe amaani gange era niiwe onkuuma; niiwe onhamba mu biseera ebizibu. Amaghanga galiva mu buli nsonda y'ensi, gaidha y'oli, gaakoba gati: “Badhaadha baife tibaali na Katonda, aye baali na bisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, ebintu obuntu ebiziramu muganhulo naire." 
Jeremiah16:20 Bwenebwene omuntu asobola okwekolera mwene bakatonda ababe? Busa naire, ebintu omuntu by'akola obukole tibiba Katonda mwene.”" 
Jeremiah16:21 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Kale ni bona, amaghanga ago ndigooleka obuyinza bwange n'amaani gange, omukuzi mulala guti aye nga gumala. Era galimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Jeremiah17:1 Musengwa Katonda yakoba ati: “Imwe abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, ebibi byaimwe tibibavaaku naire. Biri ng'oti byaghandiikibwa ku myoyo gyaimwe ni ku bintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiri ku nsonda eina edh'alutaari dhaimwe. Ebibi byaimwe biri ng'omuntu bweyandibighandiise ku bipande n'ekalaamu ey'ekyuma ekigumu einho eri n'omunwa ogw'eibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa diamondi." 
Jeremiah17:2 Abantu baimwe tibeerabiranga kusinziza Ashera omusambwa omukazi, ku alutaari dhaibwe, ni buli ghansi mu kinsense eky'omuti omuzibirivu, ni ku buli kasozi," 
Jeremiah17:3 ni ku buli lusozi olugulumivu oluli mu irungu. Eby'obukombe byaimwe n'ebintu byaimwe eby'omughendo, nja kubighaayo abazigu babinhage olw'okusasulamu ebibi ebingi bye mukoze mu nsi eno." 
Jeremiah17:4 Mulirekula ensi ye nabagha ng'omugabo ogwaimwe, abazigu baagitwala. Nja kubafuula bagheereza ba bazigu baimwe eyo mu nsi ye mutaidhi naire, kuba obusungu bwange butumbwike ng'oti muliro era tiguja kuzikira.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Omuntu yeenayeena akyuka n'anvaaku nze Musengwa Katonda, ni yeesiga omuntu obuntu era n'amwesiguliraku, akolimirwe." 
Jeremiah17:6 Omuntu oyo aba ng'oti muti oguli mu irungu, ogukulira eyo enkalu ku itaka ery'oluunhu, ezira kintu kindi kisobola kukulirayo. Omuntu oyo azira kikalamu ky'afuna naire." 
Jeremiah17:7 Aye wa nkabi oyo aneesiga nze Musengwa Katonda era n'asuubirira mu nze. 
Jeremiah17:8 Ali ng'oti n'omuti ogwasimbibwa ku mwiga, ogukunkunia emizi gyagwo ni gituuka ku maadhi. Tigutya musana ni bwe gwaka okwaga gha, kuba amakaba gaagwo gasigala nga ti maniavu. Ghazira kigweraliikiriza oba amaadhi gagwa oba tigagwa, kuba buli kiseera gutaaku ebibala.”" 
Jeremiah17:9 “Naani asobola okutegeera omwoyo gw'omuntu? Ezira kirimbalimba nga gwene; mubi inho ebitaloodheka. 
Jeremiah17:10 Nze Musengwa Katonda neekebeedha ebidhuubo by'abantu era naaleba emyoyo gyaibwe. Ngabira buli muntu nga njiira ku neebisa ye ni ku bikolwa bye.” 
Jeremiah17:11 Omuntu afuna eby'obukombe mu bukupankupania, aba ng'oti n'enhonhi egonera amagi g'etaabiika; kuba eby'obukombe ebyo bimuwaaku mangu ng'akaali na kukairigha, olwo ku nkomerero ya byonabyona yaasigala agho nga musiru." 
Jeremiah17:12 Ekifo kyaife ekitukuvu kiri ng'oti kityamo kya bwakyabazinga eky'ekitiisa, kye baata ghaigulu ku lusozi oluleeyi okuviira irala mu mainhama." 
Jeremiah17:13 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe wenka eisuubi ly'Abaisiraeli. Ensoni dhija kubagema abo boonaboona abakuvaaku, baswale, era amaina gaibwe gaja kughandiikibwa mu nkungu olw'okukweyawulaku, ate nga iwe Musengwa Katonda oli ng'oti n'ensulo ey'amaadhi ag'obulamu." 
Jeremiah17:14 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghemba omponie, ndidha kuwonera irala; era nkusaba ondokole, ndidha kulokolebwa irala, kuba niiwe ye nsaaka." 
Jeremiah17:15 Abantu bankoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda bye yatwesoomera okutukola biri gha? Ka bituukirire tubone!” 
Jeremiah17:16 Aye nze tikupikirizangaku iwe obasindikire akabi koonakoona, era tibendezangaku batuuke ku buzibu. Ekyo iwe Musengwa Katonda okiidhi bukalamu. Bye nayogera byonabyona obiidhi." 
Jeremiah17:17 Otanfuukira ekintu ekitiisa, kuba niiwe ekifo kyange eky'okwewogomamu mu kiseera ekizibu." 
Jeremiah17:18 Abo abankiriga bagwananga baaswala, aye nze, iwe Musengwa Katonda, mponia okuswala. Beene n'ababe beeraliikirirenga, aye nze otandekanga kweraliikirira. Basindikire akabi kabasaanizeegho irala." 
Jeremiah17:19 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Yeremia, ja ku gwetebwa Omulyango gwa Benjamini bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya mwe babita nga bangira era nga bafuluma mu Yerusalemu, olangirire obukwenda bwange. Era omale oje ni ku miryango egindi gyonagyona egya Yerusalemu, yoona olangirireyo." 
Jeremiah17:20 Koba bakyabazinga n'abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona, ni boonaboona ababa mu Yerusalemu abaingirira mu miryango egyo, bawulire bye nkoba." 
Jeremiah17:21 Bakobe oti oba nga benda obulamu bwaibwe, batabbeedanga bintu ku lwa Sabbato, era batabibisanga mu miryango gya Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah17:22 Era batafulumyanga kintu kyonakyona mu ndhu dhaibwe ku lwa Sabbato, waire okukolanga omulimo gwonagwona ku lunaku olwo. Balukuumenga nga lutukuvu, nga bwe nalagira badhaadha baibwe." 
Jeremiah17:23 Aye badhaadha baibwe baaloba kumpulirisa waire okugondera bye nabalagira, beeyongera bwa kukalangusa myoyo gyaibwe na butenda kugalagirwa." 
Jeremiah17:24 “Koba abantu abo oti bateekwa okugonderanga ebiragiro byange byonabyona. Balobe kubbeedanga kintu kyonakyona kukibisa mu miryango egy'ekibuga kino ku lwa Sabbato, waire okukolanga omulimo gwonagwona. Aye bakuumenga olunaku olwo nga lutukuvu." 
Jeremiah17:25 Olwo bakyabazinga baibwe n'abakungu, baidha kwingiranga mu miryango gya Yerusalemu nga bali n'obukumu obw'okufuga nga Daudi bwe yali nabwo. Nga bali ghalala n'abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, baidha kuvuganga ebigaali by'omu lutalo, bajiirenga ni ku mbalaasi, era ekibuga Yerusalemu kinaabanga kiidhuvu kya bantu." 
Jeremiah17:26 Abantu baidha kuvanga mu bibuga by'omu Buyudaaya ni mu byalo ebyezungulwire Yerusalemu, baidhenga mu Yerusalemu. Abandi baidha kuvanga mu biketezo bya Benjamini, ni mu biketezo eby'omu biiko, ni mu biketezo eby'oku nsozi, ni mu biketezo bya Buyudaaya ebikalukalu ebiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. Baidha kuleetanga mu isinzizo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'emisengo, n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke, n'obubbaani, ghalala n'ebigheebwayo olw'okwebaza." 
Jeremiah17:27 Aye bateekwa okungonderanga n'okukuumanga olunaku lwa Sabbato nga lutukuvu. Batabbeedanga kintu kyonakyona ni bakibisa mu miryango gya Yerusalemu ku lunaku olwo. Aye bwe balikola ekyo kye mbalobeire, nja kukunaania omuliro ku miryango egyo. Omuliro ogwo gulyokya ebisaagaati bya bakyabazinga eby'omu Yerusalemu, era tighalibaagho muntu asobola kuguzikiza.”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah18:2 “Kola oje mu ndhu ey'omuwumbi, era eyo ye ndidha okukugheera obukwenda bwange.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Kale naaja ew'omuwumbi, naayagaana ng'ali kukola omulimo gwe, ku nkede y'awumbiraku." 
Jeremiah18:4 Buli lwe yawumbanga ekintu ni kiroba okuvaamu nga bw'akyenze, ng'olwo eitosi lyakyo aligoita, era ng'alikolamu ekintu ekindi." 
Jeremiah18:5 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah18:6 “Imwe Abaisiraeli, mulowooza muti nze tisobola kukola ku imwe ekyo omuwumbi oyo ky'akola ku itosi? Muli mu ngalo dhange ng'eitosi bweriba mu ngalo edh'omuwumbi." 
Jeremiah18:7 Bwe nkoba nti nja kwiwululagho, mmenhegho era nzikirize eighanga oba obwakyabazinga," 
Jeremiah18:8 aye eighanga eryo ni likyuka okuva mu bibi byalyo, olwo mba tiikole ekyo kye mbaire nsazeegho okukola." 
Jeremiah18:9 Ate bwe nkoba nti nja kutaagho era nzimbegho eighanga oba obwakyabazinga," 
Jeremiah18:10 aye eighanga eryo ni lindheemera era ni likola ebibi, olwo mba tiikole ekyo kye mbaire nsazeegho okukola." 
Jeremiah18:11 Kale ni kobera abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, oti ndi kukola entegeka okubakolaku akabi, era neetegeike okubabonereza. Bakobe buli muntu alekere okukola ebibi, era akyuse empisa dhe n'ebikolwa bye ebibi." 
Jeremiah18:12 “Aye baidha kwiramu bati, ‘Busa, lwaki tukyusa? Ife twidha kusigala nga tukola ebyo emyoyo gyaife emikalangufu era emibi bye gyenda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mubuuze amaghanga goonagoona oba nga ekintu ng'oti n'ekyo kyali kibaireghooku. Abaisiraeli bakoze ekintu ekitiisa einho! 
Jeremiah18:14 Empampagama dh'omu mabaale amagulumivu ag'oku nsozi edh'e Lebanoni dhaali dhibeereireku agho nga tidhigwireeku mugozi? Amaadhi amainhogovu agava mu nsozi edho ghalighooku lwe gaalekeraku okukuuluula? 
Jeremiah18:15 Aye abantu bange baaneeyawulaku, baaniokeza obubbaani ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda. Baajanga bwe beekontola mu nguudo dhe baatambulirangamu okuva eira, baalekerera enguudo enene; baatambulira mu bugira obw'omu nsiko." 
Jeremiah18:16 Ensi yaibwe baagifuula ekintu ekitiisa einho, abantu kye baneesimoozanga buliidho. Buli muntu anaagibitangaku aidha kutengeesanga bwa mutwe olw'okutya okungi." 
Jeremiah18:17 Ndidha kusansaaniza abantu bange y'abazigu baibwe, ng'oti n'empewo eva mu buvandhuba bw'efuuwa enkungu. Akabi bwekalibaidhira, nja kubakuba bwa nkoone, tija kubayamba naire.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Agho abantu beeteesa bati: “Mwidhe tubeeku ni kye tukola Yeremia ono. Ni bwetunaamutoolagho, tituja kubula bakabona ba kutugalagiranga, era tituja kubula bagezi ba kwebuuzangaku, waire okubulwa abalanzi abatukobera obukwenda bwa Katonda. Ka tumuteeku emisango, era tulekere okuwulirisanga by'akoba.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Agho nze naasaba nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, wulira bye nkoba. Wulira abazigu bange bye bandhogeraku." 
Jeremiah18:20 Omuntu akoze ekirungi, bwenebwene agwanira kusasulwamu kibi? Oidhukira nga bwenaidhanga y'oli ni mbawolerezaagho olobe kubamaliraku busungu. Aye ate buti basimye ebiina nga benda ngwemu nfe!" 
Jeremiah18:21 Wo Musengwa Katonda, kale ni leka abaana baibwe balambuke endhala bafe, obaleke bafiire mu ntalo. Abakazi baibwe ka babuleku abaana era babe banamwandu. Abasaadha ka bafe endwaire ya kawumpuli, abaisuka baitibwe mu ntalo." 
Jeremiah18:22 Basindikire eikuukuubira ery'abanhazi libazinduukirize libagweku, olwo bawowoole mu ndhu dhaibwe; kuba basimye ebiina mbigwemu, bantega n'emitego gingemye." 
Jeremiah18:23 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda oidhi enkwe dhaibwe dhoonadhoona edh'okwenda okundhita. Otabasonigha kwonoona kwaibwe, waire okusasaagho ebibi byaibwe n'obyerabira. Batandigire ekigwo ghansi obaghangule, obakoleku n'obusungu bwo.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Yeremia, kola oje ogule akadoome ak'eitosi. Otoole ku bakulu b'ebika ni ku bakulira bakabona," 
Jeremiah19:2 oje nabo mu kiiko ekyetebwa ekya mutabane wa Hinnomu, ng'obitira mu gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Engyo. Era eyo y'oidha okukobera abantu obukwenda bwe nnaakugha." 
Jeremiah19:3 Oidha kubakoba oti, ‘Imwe bakyabazinga ab'omu Buyudaaya n'imwe abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu, mumpulirise nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye era Katonda wa Isiraeli. Nja kuleeta ku kifo kino akabi nga kiisi akawuliraku, amatu ge gamuwaawaala buwaawaale." 
Jeremiah19:4 Nja kukola ntyo kuba abantu abo banviireku baayonoona ekifo kino nga baghaayo emisengo eri bakatonda abandi, ate nga beene, waire badhaadha baibwe, oba bakyabazinga b'omu Buyudaaya, tibamanhangaku bakatonda abo naire. Era abantu abo baidhwiza ekifo kino omusaayi ogw'abantu abaziraku musango be baita." 
Jeremiah19:5 Era baaja baazimbira omusambwa Baali ebifo ebigulumivu ebisinzibwamu, eby'okwokerangaku abaana baibwe n'omuliro ng'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa. Ate nga nze tibalagirangaku kukola kintu ekyo, waire okukirowoozaaku obulowooze mu mwoyo gwange." 
Jeremiah19:6 Kale ni bona eno, ekiseera kiri kwidha, ekifo ekyo kirekere okwetebwa Tofethi, oba ekiiko kya mutabane wa Hinnomu, aye kyetebwe Ekiiko eky'Okutirimbuliramu." 
Jeremiah19:7 Mu kifo ekyo mwe nditabuliratabulira entegeka dhoonadhoona edh'abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu. Ndireetera abazigu baibwe okubaghangula era baabaitira mu ntalo. Emirambo gyaibwe ndigigabula enhonhi n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhaagirya. 
Jeremiah19:8 Ndizikiriza ekibuga kino mu nsambo etiisa einho, buli muntu yaakyesimoozanga bwesimooze. Era buli muntu anaabitangagho ensisi eidha kumugemanga olw'okuzikiriza okwo." 
Jeremiah19:9 Abazigu balizingiza ekibuga kino okukyezunguluza nga benda okwita abantu baamu. Okuzingiza ekibuga kino kuliba kukambwe inho, abantu abaliba munda baatuuka n'okulya banaibwe, era n'okulya abaana baibwe beene.’ ”" 
Jeremiah19:10 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba mmenhe akadoome kale ak'eitosi ng'abantu be naja nabo babona," 
Jeremiah19:11 era mbakobere nti Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Ntyo bwendizikiriza abantu bano n'ekibuga kino, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'amanhiangula akadoome ak'eitosi, ni katasobola kuyungibwa kukaizaagho kabiri. Abantu baliziika abafu baibwe ni mu Tofethi olw'okubulwa aghandi agh'okubaziika." 
Jeremiah19:12 Ntyo bwendikola ekibuga kino n'abantu baamu, ng'oti bwe nakola ekifo ky'e Tofethi." 
Jeremiah19:13 Endhu edh'omu Yerusalemu, n'edha bakyabazinga ab'omu Buyudaaya, ghalala n'edho dhoonadhoona abantu dhe baaniokezangaku obubbaani ghaigulu ku busolya bwadho nga babuniokereza emuunienie edh'oku igulu, era mwe baafukiranga ebigheebwayo eby'okunhwa eri bakatonda abandi, dhoonadhoona dhiriba nga ti nongoofu ng'oti n'ekifo ky'e Tofethi.”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Agho Yeremia yaira okuva e Tofethi, Musengwa Katonda ye yamutuma okulangirira obukwenda bwe. Yaayemerera mu luya olw'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, yaakobera abantu boonaboona ati:" 
Jeremiah19:15 “Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye era Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Ndidha kutuukiriza akabi ke nakoba okuleeta ku kibuga kino ni ku bubuga obutono obukiriiraine, kuba mwakalangusa emyoyo gyaimwe, mwaloba kuwulirisa bye mbakoba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Agho Pashuhuri kabona mutabane wa Immeri, era eyakuliranga eisinzizo, bwe yawulira nga ndi kulangirira ebintu ebyo ku kibuga Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah20:2 yaalagira bangeme bankube, era bamale bansibire mu nkoligo. Enkoligo eyo yali kumpi n'omulyango ogw'eitale ogw'eisinzizo ogwetebwa Omulyango gwa Benjamini." 
Jeremiah20:3 Enkyo ku lunaku olwairirira, Pashuhuri bwe yalagira ni bansibulula mu nkoligo, nze naamukoba nti: “Musengwa Katonda takaakweta liina lyo Pashuhuri, aye aidha kukwetanga ‘Entiisa Egemye Bulighantu.’" 
Jeremiah20:4 Musengwa Katonda mwene akobye ati, ‘Bona, ndidha kukufuula ekintu ekitiisa eri iwe mwene n'eri bakagwa bo, era olibona nga boonaboona baitibwa abazigu baibwe mu lutalo. Nja kughaayo abantu b'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona mu ngalo dha kyabazinga w'e Babilonia. Abandi alibatwala e Babilonia ng'abanhage, ate abandi yaabaita." 
Jeremiah20:5 Era nja kuleka abazigu baimwe banhage eby'obukombe byaimwe byonabyona ebiri mu kibuga muno, n'ebintu abantu bye baafaabiikanira, n'eby'omughendo einho omuli n'ebya bakyabazinga ab'omu Buyudaaya. Ebyo byonabyona abazigu abo balibinhaga baabitwala e Babilonia." 
Jeremiah20:6 N'iwe Pashuhuri, balikugema baakutwala e Babilonia ghalala n'ab'omu maka go boonaboona. Era eyo y'olifiira, waaziikibwa iwe ni bakagwa bo boonaboona be wakoberanga obulanzi obw'obuguya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda waanimba era naalimbibwa. Onsinga amaani era ompangwire. Nafuuka nseko dha balamu, buli muntu ankongoola buli kaakyeire." 
Jeremiah20:8 Buli lwe ndhogera nkaabuka bukaabuke, nalangirira nti: “Ebikolwa eby'obukambwe n'okuzikirira biri kwidha!” Wo Musengwa Katonda, abantu banvuma era bandheeyereza olw'okulangirira obukwenda bwo." 
Jeremiah20:9 Bwe nkoba mule nti: “Ka ndobe kwogera mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda oba waire okumwogeraku obwogere,” obukwenda bwo buba ng'oti muliro oguli kwakira munda mu nze. Era bumbitiriireku tikaasobola kubufuga." 
Jeremiah20:10 Mpulira nga boonaboona boogera obwama bati: “Entiisa egemye buli ghantu. Ka tumwogereku bubi, tumuseeghe mu b'obuyinza!” Bakagwa bange beene n'abakoba batyo, nga baguniriire okubona bwe ngwa. Era nga bakoba bati: “Oba katyo tunaamusalira amagezi twamugemya, olwo twamwesasulizaaku.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda oli ku luuyi lwange, era oli ng'oti mulwani wa maani atatuukikaku. Abo abankiriga tibaidha kumpangula. Baidha kuswala ebitaloodheka, kuba tibaidha kunsobola. Era okuswala kwaibwe okwo, abantu tibalikwerabira byanda na byanda." 
Jeremiah20:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, iwe oleba abantu mu mazima waabona bye balowooza mu myoyo gyaibwe. Kale leka nteege mbone nga bw'onaaneesasulizaagho ku bantu abo; kuba ensonga dhange ndhandhwire mu maiso go." 
Jeremiah20:13 Mwembere Musengwa Katonda, era musaake Musengwa; kuba atoola abatuntuzibwa mu ngalo dh'ababi." 
Jeremiah20:14 Olunaku lwe nazaalibwa lukolimirwe! Olunaku maama lwe yanzaala lwerabirwe. 
Jeremiah20:15 Omuntu oyo akolimirwe, eyaleetera lata wange amawulire agaamusanhusa, ati: “Bakuzaaliire omwana mulenzi.”" 
Jeremiah20:16 Omuntu oyo agwananga yaaba ng'oti n'ebibuga Musengwa Katonda bye yazikiriza nga tabisaasira naire. Agwananga yaawulira ku nkyo okuwowoola okw'abali mu bulumi, era mu kasana ghagati yaawulira enduulu edh'olutalo;" 
Jeremiah20:17 kuba yaloba okundhita nga nkaali kuzaalibwa, ate nga ekyo n'ekyandireeteire enda ya maama okuba amagombe gange." 
Jeremiah20:18 Kale lwaki nazaalibwa? Nazaalibwa kubona nnaku na kudaagadaaga, na kutuusa kufiiririra nga ndi mu buswavu?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Agho Zedekia kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya yaatuma ye ndi Pashuhuri mutabane wa Malakia ni Zefania kabona mutabane wa Maaseia, ng'akoba ati:" 
Jeremiah21:2 “Nkweghembye twogerereyo eri Musengwa Katonda, kuba kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia atulumbye n'eigye lye okutulwanisa. Oba katyo Musengwa Katonda anaatukolera ekyewuunhisa, yaamwiririzaayo.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Agho nze naabakoba nti: 
Jeremiah21:4 “Muje mukobe Zedekia muti Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati, ‘Nja kughangula eigye lyo eriri kulwanisa kyabazinga w'e Babilonia n'eigye lye eribazingiiza okubeezunguluza. Era nja kusolokeza eby'okulwanisa byaimwe ghagati mu kibuga." 
Jeremiah21:5 Nze mwene nja kukulwanisa n'amaani gange goonagoona, mu busungu obubitirivu, n'ekiruyi era n'obukambwe." 
Jeremiah21:6 Nja kwita abantu abali mu kibuga muno abantu n'ensolo baja kufa endwaire ya kawumpuli. 
Jeremiah21:7 Aye iwe Zedekia, n'abakungu bo, n'abantu abandi abaliwona olutalo n'endwaire eyo n'endhala, nja kubalekera kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari n'abazigu baimwe abandi abendanga okubaita, babageme. Nebukadinezzari oyo aja kubaita aghazira kusonigha waire okusaasira. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.’ ”" 
Jeremiah21:8 “Era oidha kukoba abantu abo oti, ‘Mubone eno, nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubateeragho ebintu bibiri, mulondeku kirala: engira etuuka mu bulamu, n'engira etuuka mu kufa." 
Jeremiah21:9 Omuntu yeenayeena anaasigala mu kibuga aidha kwitirwa mu lutalo, oba okufa endhala, oba okufa endwaire ya kawumpuli. Aye anaakifuluma ni yeeghaayo eri Abababilonia ababazingiiza, taidha kwitibwa. Aidha kuwoniagho obulamu bwe." 
Jeremiah21:10 Namala okusalagho obutasaasira kibuga kino, okutoolaku okukizikiriza nga nkighaayo mu ngalo dha kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia akyokye omuliro kiweeregho irala. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.’ ”" 
Jeremiah21:11 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba nkobere ab'oku lulyo olulangira mu Buyudaaya, baidhukulu ba Daudi, nti:" 
Jeremiah21:12 “Imwe baidhukulu ba Daudi, muwulirise nze Musengwa Katonda bye nkoba: Musalenga emisango mu mazima buli lunaku. Omuntu ye bakiriga mumuwonienga ole amukiriga. Olwo ekiruyi kyange kirobe kutumbuka ng'oti n'omuliro omuntu gw'atasobola kuzikiza, olw'ebibi bye mukola." 
Jeremiah21:13 Mubone eno, imwe abantu ababa mu kiiko. Ndidha kubakolaku waire mugungumala ng'oti ibaale eikologho eriri ku museetwe. Era mukoba mule muti, ‘Naani anaidha okutulumba? Era naani anaatuuka eno ye tuba?’" 
Jeremiah21:14 Aye nja kubabonereza nga njiira ku bikolwa byaimwe. Ndikunaania omuliro ku kisaagaati kyaimwe eky'obwakyabazinga, gwayokya ebikyezungulwire agho byonabyona. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba nje mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, mmukobe nti:" 
Jeremiah22:2 “Iwe kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya era mwidhukulu wa Daudi atyama ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, wulirisa Musengwa Katonda by'ali kukoba iwe, n'abakungu bo, ghalala n'abantu b'omu Yerusalemu:" 
Jeremiah22:3 Musengwa Katonda oyo akoba ati mukolenga amazima n'ebituufu. Omuntu ye batuntuza mumuwonienga ole amutuntuza. Era mutakolanga kibi kyonakyona oba ekikolwa eky'obukambwe ku basenze, oba bamulekwa, oba banamwandu, oba okwitanga abantu abaziraku musango mu ighanga lino." 
Jeremiah22:4 Bwe munaatuukirizanga bye mbalagira, olwo baidhukulu ba Daudi n'abanaabanga bakyabazinga. Era nga bali ghalala n'abakungu baibwe, n'abantu baibwe, baidha kwingiranga mu miryango gy'ekisaagaati kino eky'obwakyabazinga, nga bali ku bigaali eby'omu lutalo ni ku mbalaasi." 
Jeremiah22:5 Aye bwe mutaagonderenga bye ndagira, nze neerayirira mwene nti ekisaagaati kino eky'obwakyabazinga kija kufuuka bifulukwa byereere. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah22:6 Musengwa Katonda ati bw'akoba ku kisaagaati kya kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya: “Ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya kiboneka bulungi ng'oti n'ensi Gileadi, era ng'oti n'ensozi edh'e Lebanoni. Aye nja kukifuula ekifo ekisigaire obwagho kityo, era ekibuga ekiziramu muntu akibaamu naire." 
Jeremiah22:7 Nja kusindika abantu baidhe bakizikirize. Baliidha n'empasa dhaibwe, baatematema empango dhaakyo edh'emivule edhiboneka obulungi einho, baadhisuula mu muliro." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Abantu kamaala abamaghanga agandi bwe balibitanga ku kibuga kino, balyebuuzanga bati, ‘Lwaki Musengwa Katonda yakola ekintu ng'oti n'ekyo ku kibuga kino ekikologho?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Agho baamala beiramu bati, ‘Lwa kuba abantu baakyo baava ku ndagaano ye baakola ni Musengwa Katonda waibwe, baaja baasinza era baagheereza bakatonda abandi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Imwe abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, mutalirira kyabazinga Yosia eyafa era mutamulumirwa mwoyo. Aye mulirire inho mutabane we Yoahazi ye bali kutwala nga ti wa kwira; kuba taja kwirayo kubona ku nsi ye yazaalibwamu kabiri." 
Jeremiah22:11 Ebigema ku mutabane wa kyabazinga Yosia eyasikira ise oyo ku bwakyabazinga bwa Buyudaaya, aye ni bamutoola kuno, Musengwa Katonda abyogeraku ati: “Yava kuno, yaaja era takaira." 
Jeremiah22:12 Aja kufiira eyo mu nsi ye baamutwala. Taja kwirayo kubona nsi eno kabiri.” 
Jeremiah22:13 “Akagwireku oyo azimba endhu ye mu kukupankupania, n'agitaaku n'ebisenge ebya ghaigulu mu kulyaka, ng'akozesa abantu emirimo ku bwereere aghazira kubagha mpeera yaibwe." 
Jeremiah22:14 Akagwireku oyo akoba mule ati, ‘Ndidha kwezimbira endhu enkologho, ng'eriku ebisenge ebya ghaigulu ebigazi. Ngiteeku amadinisa, ngidholigedholige n'embaawo edh'omuvule, era ngisiige langi ya kasaayisaayi.’" 
Jeremiah22:15 Olowooza oti okuzimbisa omuvule, kikufuula kyabazinga inho okusinga bakyabazinga abandi? Lata wo yalyanga era yaanhwanga ng'akola amazima n'ebituufu. Era ebintu byamujiiranga bukalamu." 
Jeremiah22:16 Yasaliranga abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu emisango mu butuufu, era ng'ebintu bimujiira bukalamu. Okwo kwe beeta okumanha Musengwa Katonda." 
Jeremiah22:17 Aye iwe weemalira mu bya kufuna mu bukyamu byonka, waita abantu abaziraku musango, era waatuntuza abantu b'ofuga n'obukambwe.”" 
Jeremiah22:18 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda bino by'akoba ebigema ku Yehoiakimu mutabane wa Yosia, era kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya: “Tibalimulirira mbu, ‘Wo muganda wange!’ Oba mbu, ‘Wo mwanhinaze!’ Tibaligegenga mbu, ‘Wo musengwa wange!’ Oba mbu, ‘Wo kyabazinga wange!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Balimuziika nga bwe baziika endogoyi: balimukwekwebya bukwekwebye, baamusuula kuliya kw'emiryango gya Yerusalemu.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 “Imwe ab'e Yerusalemu, muje ku nsozi dh'e Lebanoni mwasiikane, muje mu nsi y'e Bashani mulire; muje ku nsozi dh'e Moabu muwowoole, kuba abo be mwakolagananga nabo boonaboona bazikiriziibwa." 
Jeremiah22:21 Musengwa Katonda yayogera n'imwe ng'ebintu bikaabajiira bukalamu, aye mwaloba kuwulirisa. Era mutyo bwe mubaire mukolanga buliidho, mwalobera irala okugondera by'akoba." 
Jeremiah22:22 Abakulembeze baimwe boonaboona balitwalibwa ng'oti n'ebikaba empewo bw'ebifuuwa ere. Abo be mwakolagananga nabo balitwalibwa mu bunhage. Olwo ensoni dhaabagema mwaswala olw'ebibi byonabyona bye mwakola. 
Jeremiah22:23 Imwe buti mweyagalira mu mivule egyava e Lebanoni, aye muja kusaasirwa inho ng'obulumi bubatuuseeku, obulumi obuli ng'oti bwa mukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala.”" 
Jeremiah22:24 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nga bwendi omulamu, iwe kyabazinga Konia mutabane wa Yehoiakimu kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, ni bwe wandibaire ng'oli mpeta eba ku lwala lwange ku mukono omusaadha, eriku akamanhiso ak'obwakyabazinga, era nandikutoireku." 
Jeremiah22:25 Nandikughaireyo y'abantu b'otya, abenda okukwita. Era ndikughaayo eri Nebukadinezzari kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, n'eri abaisirukale be." 
Jeremiah22:26 Ndidha kukutoola mu nsi eno ng'oli ghalala n'inhoko akuzaala, nje mbasuule mu nsi ye mutaazaalibwamu, era mwembi eyo ye mulifiira." 
Jeremiah22:27 Mulyegomba okwira mu nsi eno kabiri, aye timuliira naire.”" 
Jeremiah22:28 Agho naakoba nti: “Omusaadha ono Konia afuuse ng'oti nsugha eyamenheka ni bagisuula ere ng'eziraku agyenda? Eyo n'ensonga lwaki mwene n'abaana be baabingibwa baasuulibwa mu nsi ye bataidhi?” 
Jeremiah22:29 Iwe nsi, iwe ensi, ensi yaife, wulira Musengwa Katonda bw'akoba, ati:" 
Jeremiah22:30 “Omusaadha ono mumughandiike mu kitabo eky'abaziraku baana, abe ng'oti tabangaku na mwana naire. Era abe ng'oti n'omuntu atalifuna kalungi mu bulamu; kuba taja kubaaku na mwana oba mwidhukulu aja kwiramu kufuga Buyudaaya ng'omusika wa Daudi. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Bakagwireku abakulembeze abo abasansaania abantu ba Musengwa Katonda ni babazikiriza. 
Jeremiah23:2 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli bino by'akoba ebigema ku bakulembeze abalabirira abantu be, ati: “Imwe timwafaayo naire kulabirira bantu bange. Mwababinga era mwabasansaania. Aye bona eno, nze ndidha kufaayo inho okubona nga imwe mbabonereza olw'ebibi bye mwakola." 
Jeremiah23:3 Nze mwene ndidha kusoloza abantu bange abaliwonagho nga mbatoola mu nsi dhoonadhoona ye nababingira, mbaize mu nsi yaibwe. Balizaalagana baaba kamaala." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ndibateeragho abakulembeze okubalabiriranga, abantu bange abo baalekera agho okutya n'okweraliikirira, era ghaaloba kubaagho waire omulala ati abula. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah23:5 Musengwa Katonda era yaakoba ati: “Bona eno, ekiseera kiri kwidha, nteegho omwidhukulu omutuufu owa Daudi abe kyabazinga. Aja kufuganga n'amagezi era aidha kukolanga amazima n'ebituufu mu nsi ye." 
Jeremiah23:6 Mu kiseera ky'alifugiramu, abantu b'omu Buyudaaya baliba bukalamu, n'ab'omu Isiraeli baaba mu miraala. Balimweta eriina ‘Musengwa Katonda n'obulokozi bwaife.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:7 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ekiseera kiri kwidha, abantu babe nga tibakaalayira mu liina lyange nga Katonda omulamu eyatoola Abaisiraeli mu nsi Misiri." 
Jeremiah23:8 Aye balayirenga mu liina lyange nga Katonda omulamu eyatoola Abaisiraeli mu nsi eri ku luuyi lw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ni mu nsi edhindi dhoonadhoona ye nali mbabingiire. Agho baliba mu nsi eyaibwe yeene.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Omwoyo gumpoiremu, zeenazeena ndi kudhugumira budhugumire, ku lwa Musengwa Katonda, ni ku lw'ebibono bye ebitukuvu. Ndi ng'oti n'omuntu atamiire, omuntu abitiriiza okunhwa omwenge." 
Jeremiah23:10 Ensi eidhwire abantu abatali beesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda. Bakola ebibi era baakozesa bubi obuyinza bwaibwe. Ensi erira bulire, n'eisubi lyakala mu byayiro, olw'ekikolimo kya Musengwa Katonda." 
Jeremiah23:11 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Abalanzi ni bakabona tibatya Katonda era nabaagaana nga bakola ebibi ni mu isinzizo mwene. 
Jeremiah23:12 Kale ni baidha kubanga ng'oti n'abatambulira mu nzikiiza mu ngira etyerera, batyererenga omwo bagwe. Nja kubatuusaaku akabi, kuba ekiseera kyaibwe eky'okubonerezebwamu kiri kwidha. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah23:13 Era mboine ekibi abalanzi b'omu Samaria kye baakola: Baalanganga mu liina lya Baali baakiidhamya abantu bange Abaisiraeli. 
Jeremiah23:14 Aye ate mboine ng'abalanzi b'omu Yerusalemu, bakola ebibi n'okusinga agho: bakola obwenzi era baaguya, baleetera abantu okukola ebibi. Olwo ghaabula akyuka okuva mu bibi bye. Nze mbona nga boonaboona babi ng'oti n'abantu b'e Sodoma n'ab'e Gomorra.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 “Agho ni, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, nkoba abalanzi b'omu Yerusalemu nti: ‘Mubone eno, ndidha kubagha olubiriizi balulye lubakaayire, mbaghe n'amaadhi agalimu eirogo baganhwe; kuba baleeteire abantu boonaboona mu nsi eno obutatya Katonda.’" 
Jeremiah23:16 “Agho Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yaakoba abantu b'e Yerusalemu ati: ‘Mutawulirisa balanzi bye babakoba, nga babasuubiza ebizirayo. Ebyo bye babakobera babiyiiya buyiiye mu myoyo gyaibwe, se ti ebyo nze bye mbakoba." 
Jeremiah23:17 Buli kaakyeire bakobera abantu abaloba okuwulirisa nze Musengwa Katonda bye nkoba, bati, Mwidha kubanga mu miraala.’ Era baakobera buli muntu akola ebyo omwoyo gwe omukalangufu bye gwenda, bati, ‘Ezira kabi kaidha kukutuukaku naire.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:18 Aye nze naakoba nti: “Naani ku balanzi abo eyaali amanhieku Musengwa Katonda by'alowooza mule. Era ezira ku abo yaali awulireku bukwenda bwa Musengwa Katonda, waire okutaayo omwoyo ku ebyo Musengwa Katonda oyo by'akoba." 
Jeremiah23:19 Bona, obusungu bwa Musengwa buli ng'oti kiwunga, era buli ng'oti n'empewo ey'amaani erifuuwa nga yeezungululira ku mitwe gy'ababi." 
Jeremiah23:20 Era obusungu bwa Musengwa tibuja kwika, okutuusa ng'amaze okukola n'okutuukiriza ky'asazeegho okukola. Imwe abantu be, ekyo mulikitegeera bukalamu mu biseera eby'oluvainhuma.”" 
Jeremiah23:21 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Nze tyatuma balanzi abo, aye beene baaja buje. Tyabagha bukwenda naire, aye beene baalanga bulange mu liina lyange." 
Jeremiah23:22 Nguli baali bamanhie bye ndowooza mule, bandikobeire abantu bange obukwenda bwange, era baabakyusa baava mu bikolwa byaibwe ebibi ni mu mpisa dhaibwe embi." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Nze ndi Katonda aba buli ghantu, se ti mu kifo kirala kyonka." 
Jeremiah23:24 Ghazira muntu asobola kwegisa ghe ntasobola kumubona. Timwidhi nga ndi buli ghantu, mu igulu ni mu nsi?" 
Jeremiah23:25 Ndidhi abalanzi abo bye bakoba, abalanga eby'obuguya mu liina lyange, nga bakoba mbu nze nabagha obukwenda bwange nga bali mu birooto byaibwe." 
Jeremiah23:26 Abalanzi abo balikomya li okudaaliimya abantu bange, nga babakobera eby'obuguya bye bayiiya obuyiiye?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Balowooza bati ebirooto byaibwe bye bakobera abantu, binaaleetera abantu bange abo okuneerabira, ng'oti ni badhaadha baibwe bwe baaneerabira ni baira mu kusinza omusambwa Baali?" 
Jeremiah23:28 Omulanzi aloose ekirooto agwaine akobe ati ekyo kirooto bulooto. Ate omulanzi afunie obukwenda okuva ye ndi agwaine alangirire obukwenda obwo n'obwesigwa. Omusiisi guba mulungi ng'engaano yeene? 
Jeremiah23:29 Obukwenda bwange buli oti muliro, era bwaba ng'oti n'enhundo ekonta amabaale ni gafuuka obumulumulu." 
Jeremiah23:30 Kale ni nkyagha abalanzi abo abatoola ebibono okuva ku banaibwe, memale ni babirangirira ng'obukwenda obuva ye ndi." 
Jeremiah23:31 Era nkyagha n'abalanzi abo abatoola ebibono ebyaibwe ku bwaibwe, ni babikobera abantu bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba.’" 
Jeremiah23:32 Muwulire nze Musengwa Katonda kye nkoba: Nkyagha abalanzi abo abakobera abantu ebirooto byaibwe ebiidhwire obuguya, ni badaaliimya abantu bange n'obuguya bwaibwe obwo, nga babeesuutiraku. Tibatumangaku, naire okubalagira baje bakole batyo! Era bazira kya makulu kye batwalira bantu abo naire. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah23:33 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Yeremia, omuntu yeenayeena, oba omulanzi, oba kabona, bw'aidhanga n'akubuuza ati, ‘Bukwenda ki obuva ye Musengwa?’ Iwe omwirangamu oti, ‘Niiwe omugugu omuzito eri Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda oyo akoba ati aidha kukusuula ere.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Omulanzi, oba kabona, oba omuntu owundi yeenayeena alikoba ati, ‘Omugugu gwa Musengwa Katonda,’ ndimubonereza mwene n'ab'omu maka ge." 
Jeremiah23:35 Aye buli muntu aidha kubuuzanga bakagwa be oba aboluganda lwe ati, ‘Musengwa Katonda aizemu atya? Musengwa Katonda akobye ki?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Kale ni batakozesanga bibono ebyo, ‘Omugugu gwa Musengwa Katonda,’ kuba oyo alibikozesa yeenayeena, nja kufuula obukwenda bwange bube omugugu gwene omuzito eri omuntu oyo. Abantu bafuulaniafuulania ebibono byange nze Musengwa Katonda waibwe, Afuga amagye." 
Jeremiah23:37 Iwe Yeremia, oidha kubuuzanga abalanzi oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda akwizeemu atya? Musengwa Katonda akobye ki?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Aye bwe badheemera ekiragiro kyange ni bakozesa ebibono bino, ‘Omugugu gwa Musengwa Katonda,’ olwo oidha kubakobanga oti" 
Jeremiah23:39 nze Musengwa Katonda nja kubabbeeda mbasuule ere banve mu maiso. Ndidha kubasuula ere, beene ghalala n'ekibuga kyaibwe kye nabagha era kye nagha ni badhaadha baibwe." 
Jeremiah23:40 Era ndidha kubaleetera ensoni okubagemanga, abantu babanhoomenga aghazira kwerabira naire.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yandeetera okubonekerwa ebiibo bibiri nga birimu emitiini, nga biri agho emberi w'eisinzizo lye. Ekyo kyaligho nga Nebukadinezzari kyabazinga w'e Babilonia amaze okutoola e Yerusalemu kyabazinga Yekonia mutabane wa Yehoiakimu, yaamutwala e Babilonia mu bunhage ghalala n'abakungu b'omu Buyudaaya, n'abagheesi, n'abakugu mu mirimo egy'endhawulo." 
Jeremiah24:2 Ekiibo ekindi kyalimu emitiini emirungi einho ng'oti n'egyo egisookereza okwenga ku muti. Aye ekiibo ekindi kyabaamu emitiini nga mibi inho, egitasobola na kuliibwa." 
Jeremiah24:3 Agho Musengwa Katonda yambuuza ati: “Yeremia, kiki ky'oli kubona?” Naamwiramu nti: “Ndi kubona emitiini emirungi einho, era naabona n'emibi, nga mibi inho egitasoboka na kuliibwa.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah24:5 “Nze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli mbona ng'abantu be nasindika e Babilonia mu bunhage, bali ng'oti n'emitiini egyo emirungi, era ndidha kubabisanga bukalamu n'ekivunika." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ndidha kubalabiriranga, mmale mbaize mu nsi eno. Ndibazimba, mu kifo ky'okubasansula, era naabasimba, mu kifo ky'okubaiwululagho." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ndidha kubaleeteranga okuumanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda. Olwo beene babenga bantu bange, ate nze mbenga Katonda waibwe, kuba baja kukyuka baire ye ndi n'omwoyo gwaibwe gwonagwona." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Aye kyabazinga Zedekia owa Buyudaaya, n'abakungu be, n'abantu b'omu Yerusalemu abaasigala mu nsi eno, n'abo abaalumukira e Misiri, nze Musengwa Katonda abo boonaboona ndibabisa ng'oti n'emitiini egyo emibi einho, egitasobola na kuliibwa." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ndidha kubafuula ekintu ekitiisa einho abantu boonaboona ku nsi, bafuuke eky'okwogerwaku era eky'okuyeeyereza. Baidha kubanga kivumo era kikolimo, eyo yoonayoona ye ndibasansaaniza." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ndibaleetera entalo era naabasindikira endhala n'endwaire ya kawumpuli, okutuusa lwe balizikirira ni bawaagho mu nsi ye nabagha beene ni badhaadha baibwe.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Yehoiakimu mutabane wa Yosia ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, nafuna obukwenda bwa Musengwa Katonda, nga bugema ku bantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya. Ogwo n'ogwali omwaka ogusooka nga Nebukadinezzari ni kyabazinga w'e Babilonia." 
Jeremiah25:2 Agho naakoba abantu b'omu Yerusalemu ni mu Buyudaaya boonaboona nti: 
Jeremiah25:3 “Okuva ku mwaka ogweikumi n'esatu (13) nga Yosia mutabane wa Amoni ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya okutuuka ni ye buli eno, giri emyaka abiri n'esatu nga Musengwa Katonda ampa obukwenda bwe. Era mbakoberanga obukwenda obwo aghazira kukoogha naire, aye imwe mwaloba kutaayo mwoyo." 
Jeremiah25:4 Mwaloba okuwulirisa waire okufaayo, ate nga Musengwa Katonda oyo yatumanga abagheereza be abalanzi ye muli aghazira kukoogha naire," 
Jeremiah25:5 abaabakobanga bati, ‘Buli muntu alekere okukola ebibi era akyuse empisa dhe embi. Memale olwo musigale nga muli mu nsi Musengwa Katonda ye yabagha, imwe ni badhaadha baimwe, ebenga yaimwe ku bwaimwe." 
Jeremiah25:6 Mutasinzanga waire okugheerezanga bakatonda abandi. Era mutasoononkerezanga Musengwa Katonda ni mumuleetera kusungughala nga musinza ebintu obuntu imwe beene bye mwekolera. Bwe muligondera Musengwa Katonda oyo, talibakolaku kabi koonakoona.’" 
Jeremiah25:7 Aye Musengwa Katonda mwene akoba ati mwaloba okumuwulirisa, mwamusoononkereza mwamuleetera okusungughala nga musinza ebintu obuntu imwe beene bye mwekolera, olwo mwereetera okwerumya imwe beene." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Agho ni, nga bwe mwaloba okumuwulirisa, Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye akoba ati," 
Jeremiah25:9 ‘Bona, nja kwetesa abantu boonaboona ababa ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, era ndhetese n'omugheereza wange Nebukadinezzari kyabazinga w'e Babilonia. Memale mbaleete balwanise abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, n'ab'omu maghanga goonagoona agaliiraine agho. Nja kuzikiriza nsaaniegho eighanga lino Buyudaaya ghalala n'amaghanga agaliiraine agho, mu nsambo etiisa einho, buli muntu ageesimoozenga bwesimooze era agavumirirenga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah25:10 N'ekindi, nja kusirisa emizira egy'abali mu binhumo ni mu kusagamba, nsirise n'egy'abo abali mu mbaga edh'obugole. Tibaliba na mafuta ga kwasa ntaala, waire okuba n'emere ey'empeke ey'okusa ku mmengo." 
Jeremiah25:11 Ensi eyo yoonayoona eja kufuuka bifulukwa byereere mu nsambo etiisa einho, era amaghanga agaliiraine agho galigheerezanga kyabazinga wa Babilonia okumala entangama ya myaka nsanvu." 
Jeremiah25:12 Emyaka ensanvu egyo bwe giriwaayo, ndibonereza kyabazinga w'e Babilonia n'ab'omu ighanga eryo olw'ebibi byaibwe, naazikiriza ensi yaibwe yaasigala agho etyo ng'eri bwa bifulukwa byereere, ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Jeremiah25:13 Ndituusa ku Babilonia buli kabi akaaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kino, ke neesoomera okusindikira amaghanga goonagoona, nga bwe nayogera nga mbita mu Yeremia." 
Jeremiah25:14 Ndyesasuliza ku Bababilonia olw'ebyo bye baakola. Era amaghanga kamaala ni bakyabazinga abakologho balifuula Abababilonia abo okuba abairu baibwe.’ ” 
Jeremiah25:15 Agho Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli yankoba ati: “Toola ekikopo kye ngemye mu ngalo dhange eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogw'obusungu bwange. Okitwale okighe amaghanga goonagoona ye nnaakutuma, bakinhweku." 
Jeremiah25:16 Bwe galimala okukinhwaku, galitagala gaagwa n'eiralu olw'olutalo lwe nja okugasindikira.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Kale naatoola ekikopo mu ngalo dha Musengwa Katonda, naakitwala naakigha abantu boonaboona Musengwa Katonda oyo be yantuma okukigha, baakinhwa." 
Jeremiah25:18 Ab'omu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu bibuga byonabyona ebya Buyudaaya, ghalala ni bakyabazinga n'abakungu baabyo baakinhwa. Olwo, ebibuga ebyo bisobole okufuuka ebifulukwafulukwa mu nsambo etiisa einho. Era olwo abantu babyesimoozenga bwesimooze era babikolimirenga, nga bwekiri ni ye buli eno." 
Jeremiah25:19 Abandi abaali n'okunhwa ku kikopo ekyo ni bano: kyabazinga wa Misiri, n'abagheereza be, n'abakungu be, n'abantu be boonaboona" 
Jeremiah25:20 abasenze boonaboona abaali mu Misiri, ni bakyabazinga ab'omu nsi Uzi, ni bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'omu bibuga eby'Abafilisiti eby'e Ashikeloni, n'e Gaza, n'e Ekuroni, n'abandi abasigairegho ab'e Ashidodi" 
Jeremiah25:21 abantu ab'omu Edomu, n'ab'e Moabu, n'ab'omu Ammoni" 
Jeremiah25:22 bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'e Tiro n'ab'e Sidoni, ni bakyabazinga ab'ebiketezo eby'oku nhandha" 
Jeremiah25:23 bakyabazinga b'ebibuga Dedani, ni Tema, ni Buza, n'abantu boonaboona abaasalanga ku nviiri dhaibwe" 
Jeremiah25:24 bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'e Buwarabu, ni bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'abantu ababa mu irungu" 
Jeremiah25:25 bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'e Zimuri, n'e Elamu, n'e Media" 
Jeremiah25:26 ni bakyabazinga boonaboona ababa ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba ab'okumpi n'eghala. Boonaboona abo balinhwa, mulala mulala nga banonaganwa. N'obwakyabazinga obundi bwonabwona obuli ku nsi bulinhwa. Abo bwebalimala, olwo kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia yeena yaanhwa." 
Jeremiah25:27 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Kobera abantu oti nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye Katonda wa Isiraeli, nkoba nti, ‘Munhwe mutamiire mutuuke n'okwegoga, era mugwe ghansi nga timukaasobola na kusituka, olw'olutalo lwe nja okubasindikira.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 Bwe baliroba okutoola ekikopo ekiri mu ngalo dho okukinhwaku, olibakoba oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati muteekwa okukinhwaku," 
Jeremiah25:29 kuba bona, nja kusookera mu kibuga kyange mwene okukola akabi. Balowooza bati beene baliwona okubonerezebwa? Busa, tibaliwona kubonerezebwa naire, kuba nja kusindika olutalo ku bantu boonaboona ab'oku nsi. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ninze nkobye.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 “Agho ni, iwe Yeremia oteekwa okulangirira ebintu byonabyona bye ndhogeire ebiri kubaidhira, obakobe oti, ‘Musengwa Katonda aliwologoma ng'ali mu igulu, era yaakaabuka ng'ali mu kifo kye ekitukuvu. Aliwologomera abantu be n'amaani, yaayasiikana ng'oti n'abakunha emizabbibu okugikolamu omwenge. Abantu boonaboona abali ku nsi balimuwulira." 
Jeremiah25:31 Amamiro ge baligawulira eyo yoonayoona ensi y'ekanga, kuba ghaligho omusango Musengwa Katonda oyo gw'avunaana amaghanga. Aliwozesa abantu boonaboona, yaabaghaayo baabaita.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:32 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Bona, akabi kali kwidhira amaghanga irala ku irala, nga kava ku lino kaaja ku lire. Kiwunga ow'amaani ali kusiikuuka ere eghala ensi y'ekanga." 
Jeremiah25:33 “Ku lunaku olwo, emirambo gy'abo Musengwa Katonda b'aliita, girisansaanira woonawoona okuva ensi y'eva okutuuka y'ekanga. Abantu abo tighalibaagho abalira waire atoolagho mirambo gyaibwe kuja kugiziika. Balisigala agho ku itaka ng'oti mmungo dha busa." 
Jeremiah25:34 Muwowoole imwe abakulembeze, mulire amaziga. Imwe abalabirira abantu bange, mwevulunge mu nkungu. Ekiseera kituuse eky'okubaita, babasalesale ng'oti bwe baita entaama enume enungi einho." 
Jeremiah25:35 Muzira ghe mulirumukira imwe abakulembeze, waire okubaaku ghe muliwonera imwe abalabirira abantu." 
Jeremiah25:36 Wulira abakulembeze bwe bali kulira, n'abo abalabirira abantu bwe bali kuwowoola. Musengwa Katonda azikiriiza eighanga lyaibwe," 
Jeremiah25:37 era ensi yaibwe eyabangamu emiraala agirese agho etyo ng'eri bifulukwa byereere, olw'obusungu bwe obubitirivu." 
Jeremiah25:38 Musengwa Katonda alekuliire agho abantu be, ng'oti n'empologoma bw'eva mu mpuku yaayo. Ebitiisa eby'omu lutalo n'obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda obubitirivu, bireeteire ensi yaibwe okufuuka ng'oti bwa irungu.”" 
Jeremiah26:1 Yehoiakimu mutabane wa Yosia bwe yali nga yaakamala okufuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya," 
Jeremiah26:2 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Yemerera mu luya olw'eisinzizo, olangirire ebyo byonabyona bye nkulagira okukobera abantu abaidha okusinza, nga bava mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya. Ghatabaagho ky'olekayo naire ekirala kiti." 
Jeremiah26:3 Oba katyo banaawulira, baakyuka baalekayo empisa dhaibwe embi. Olwo nze ndidha kukyusa ekirowoozo kyange, ndobe kubakolaku kabi olw'ebikolwa byaibwe ebibi, nga bwembaire ntegeike okukola." 
Jeremiah26:4 “Era bakobe, oti nze Musengwa Katonda mbakobye nti muteekwa okungonderanga nga mujiira ku bye nabeegeresa." 
Jeremiah26:5 Era mutenga omwoyo ku ebyo abagheereza bange abalanzi be mbatumira buliidho, bye babakobera. Aye ate imwe timuwulirisa bye babakoba." 
Jeremiah26:6 Era bwemutaalekere agho kubanga badheemu, nja kukola eisinzizo lino kye nakola Shilo. Olwo amaghanga goonagoona ku nsi, gaidha kukozesanga eriina ery'ekibuga kino nga gakolima.”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Bakabona, n'abalanzi, n'abantu abandi boonaboona, bampulira nze Yeremia nga nkoba ebintu ebyo mu isinzizo." 
Jeremiah26:8 Era olwamala nti okubyogera, bangwaku bangema nga bwe baasiikana bati: “Ogwaine kwitibwa olw'ebyo by'okobye." 
Jeremiah26:9 Lwaki olanze mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda oti eisinzizo lino lija kufuuka nga Shilo, era oti ekibuga kino kija kuzikirizibwa ghabule n'omuntu akibaamu?” Agho abantu boonaboona beesololeza ghe ndi, baaneezungulula mu isinzizo." 
Jeremiah26:10 Abakungu b'omu Buyudaaya bwe baawulira ebyaligho, baayangugha okuva mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, baaja mu isinzizo. Baatyama mu bifo byaibwe, agho ku gwetebwa Omulyango Omuyaaka ogw'eisinzizo." 
Jeremiah26:11 Agho bakabona n'abalanzi baakoba abakungu n'abantu abandi boonaboona, bati: “Omusaadha ono agwaniire kumusalira gwa kumwita, kuba ayogeire bubi ku kibuga kyaife, nga mwena bwe muwuliire n'amatu agaimwe geene.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Agho naakoba nti: “Musengwa Katonda yantuma okulangirira ebyo byonabyona ebirituuka ku isinzizo lino ni ku kibuga kino, bye muwuliire nga nkoba." 
Jeremiah26:13 Kale ni mulongoose empisa dhaimwe n'ebikolwa byaimwe, era mugonderenga Musengwa Katonda waimwe. Olwo Musengwa Katonda oyo aidha kukyusa ekirowoozo kye, alobe kubakolaku kabi nga bw'abaire ategeike okukola." 
Jeremiah26:14 Nze ku lwange, buti ndi mu ngalo dhaimwe. Munkole kyonakyona kye mubona nga n'ekirungi era nga n'ekituufu." 
Jeremiah26:15 Aye mukimanhe bukalamu nti bwe mundhita, imwe n'abantu b'omu kibuga kino munaaba mwereeseeku ekibi eky'okwita omuntu aziraku musango, kuba Musengwa Katonda mwene n'eyantuma okwidha okubalabula.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Agho abakungu n'abantu abandi boonaboona baakoba bakabona n'abalanzi bati: “Omusaadha ono ayogeire n'ife mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda waife, kale tagwaniire kwitibwa.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Agho abandi ku bakulu b'ebika baasituka baayemerera, baakoba abantu abaali agho nga beesoloiza bati:" 
Jeremiah26:18 “Hezekia bwe yali nga ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, omulanzi Mika eyabanga e Moreshethi yakobera abantu ati Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati, ‘Olusozi Sioni balirulima ng'oti nimiro; ekibuga Yerusalemu kirifuuka mmungo dha bifunfugu, n'olusozi lwonalwona oluliku eisinzizo lwafuuka kibira.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 Abakulu ab'ebika abo baayongera okukoba bati: Mulowooza muti kyabazinga Hezekia n'abantu b'omu Buyudaaya baamala baita Mika oyo? Busa naire. Mu kifo eky'okumwita, kyabazinga Hezekia oyo yata bwa mu Musengwa Katonda kitiibwa era yaagezaaku okukola ebisiimya Musengwa Katonda oyo. Era Musengwa Katonda yakyusa ekirowoozo kye, yaaloba kubaleetaku kabi ke yali akobye okubaleetaku. Aye ife mperaano tuli kwenda okwereetaku akabi akanene einho.”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Era ghaalighooku n'omuntu owundi nga bamweta Uria mutabane wa Shemaia ow'e Kiriathi Yearimu, eyayogera mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda ku kibuga kino ni ku ighanga lino, ng'oti ni Yeremia bwe yakola." 
Jeremiah26:21 Kyabazinga Yehoiakimu n'abalwani be ab'amaani, ghalala n'abakungu be, bwe baawulira Uria oyo bye yakoba, kyabazinga yaayenda okumwita. Aye ekyo Uria yaakimanhaku era yaatya inho, kale yaalumukira e Misiri okwewonia." 
Jeremiah26:22 Aye ate kyabazinga Yehoiakimu yaatuma Elinathani mutabane wa Akabori ghalala n'abantu abandi, baje e Misiri okunooniayo Uria oyo." 
Jeremiah26:23 Era baamwiza, bamutwala ye kyabazinga Yehoiakimu, yaalagira baamwita era omulambo gwe baagusuula ghe baaziikanga abantu ababuliidho." 
Jeremiah26:24 Aye nze Yeremia tibampaayo eri bantu kundhita, kuba Ahikamu mutabane wa Shafani yampolerezaayo inho." 
Jeremiah27:1 Bwe baali baakamala okufuula Zedekia mutabane wa Yosia abe kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, Musengwa Katonda yankoba nze Yeremia," 
Jeremiah27:2 neekolereyo ekikoligo mu miti nga ngisibye n'enkoba, nkivaale mu nkoto." 
Jeremiah27:3 Memale mpeereze obukwenda eri bakyabazinga bano: ow'e Edomu, n'ow'e Moabu, n'ow'e Ammoni, n'ow'e Tiro, n'ow'e Sidoni, nga mbita mu bakwenda baibwe abaidha e Yerusalemu okubona kyabazinga Zedekia." 
Jeremiah27:4 Nkobe abakwenda ba bakyabazinga abo, bakobere bakyabazinga baibwe abo bati, Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati:" 
Jeremiah27:5 “Nze Musengwa Katonda nakozesa obuyinza bwange obungi n'amaani gange agataloodheka, natonda ensi n'abantu baamu, n'ensolo dhaamu dhoonadhoona. Era ensi eyo ngigha oyo ye mba nga nsazeegho okugigha." 
Jeremiah27:6 Era mperaano ninze mpaire omugheereza wange, kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia, okufuga amaghanga gano goonagoona. Era naamugha n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhoona dhimugheereze." 
Jeremiah27:7 Amaghanga goonagoona galimugheereza era gaagheereza ni mutabane we ni mwidhukulu we, okutuusa ekiseera bwe kirituuka eighanga lye ni ligwa. Olwo eighanga lye lyona lyafuuka mugheereza wa amaghanga kamaala ag'amaani, agafugibwa bakyabazinga abakologho." 
Jeremiah27:8 “Aye eighanga lyonalyona oba obwakyabazinga, abaliroba okufugibwa Nebukadinezzari, ni baloba okugonda ng'oti n'ensolo bw'egonda n'evaala mu nkoto ekikoligo kya musengwa waayo, ndibabonereza nga mbazikiriza mu ntalo era nga mbasindikira endhala n'endwaire ya kawumpuli bibaite, okutuusa lwe ndireetera Nebukadinezzari oyo okubasaanizaagho irala." 
Jeremiah27:9 Mutajiira ku bya balanzi baimwe oba balaguzi baimwe, waire okujiira ku muntu yeenayeena abakoba ati asobola okulagula ebiribaagho ng'abita mu kuvuunula ebirooto, ni mu kukola eby'obulogo n'eby'emizimu. Abantu abo boonaboona babakoba obutaganha kyabazinga w'e Babilonia kubafuga." 
Jeremiah27:10 Ebyo bye balagula bya buguya, era, imwe, birindeetera nze, okubatwala eghala einho okuva mu nsi yaimwe. Ndibabinga mu nsi yaimwe, mwaja mwazikiririra eyo." 
Jeremiah27:11 Aye abantu ab'eighanga, abaliganha okufugibwa kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia, ni bagonda ng'oti n'ensolo bw'egonda n'evaala mu nkoto ekikoligo kya musengwa waayo, ndibaleka baasigala mu nsi yaibwe, baagirimamu emere era baatyama baatereera. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Ekintu n'ekirala ekyo, kye nakoba kyabazinga Zedekia ow'e Buyudaaya nti: “Ganha kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia akufuge, ogonde ng'oti n'ensolo bw'egonda n'evaala mu nkoto ekikoligo kya musengwa waayo. Omugheereze mwene n'abantu be, memale obe omulamu." 
Jeremiah27:13 Lwaki iwe n'abantu bo mwenda okufiira mu ntalo, oba okulambuka endhala, oba okufa endwaire ya kawumpuli? Ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yakoba ati n'ebirituuka ku ighanga lyonalyona eririroba okufugibwa kyabazinga w'e Babilonia." 
Jeremiah27:14 Mutawulirisa bya balanzi ababakoba bati, ‘Mutaganhanga kugheereza kyabazinga w'e Babilonia’. Abalanzi abo balanga bya buguya." 
Jeremiah27:15 Musengwa Katonda mwene akoba ati tabatumangaku, kale ni bye balanga mu liina lye bya buguya. Era birireetera Musengwa Katonda oyo okubabinga imwe mu nsi yaimwe, mwaja mwazikiririra eyo ghalala n'abalanzi abo ababaguya.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Agho naakobera bakabona n'abantu abandi nti Musengwa Katonda yakoba ati: “Mutawulirisa bya balanzi abalanga bati, ‘Mubone eno, ebintu by'eisinzizo bali kumpi okubiiza okuva e Babilonia’. Ebyo balanga bya buguya." 
Jeremiah27:17 Mutawulirisa bye babakoba. Mugondere kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, olwo mwidha kuba balamu. Lwaki ekibuga kino kyandifuuse emungo edh'ebifunfugu?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Bwe baba nga bwenebwene balanzi, era nga bali n'obukwenda obuva ye ndi, kale bansabe nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ndobe kuganha bintu ebyasigala mu isinzizo ni mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga kutwalibwa Babilonia.”" 
Jeremiah27:19 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati, ku bigema ku mpango, ni ku tanka, ni ku bikolo ebityamaku benseni, ni ku bintu ebikozesebwa mu isinzizo ebindi ebyasigala mu kibuga Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah27:20 ebintu ebyo, kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia by'ataatwala, lwe yatwala mu bunhage Yekonia mutabane wa Yehoiakimu kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, n'abakungu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah27:21 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Muwulire bino nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye bye nkoba, ebigema ku bintu ebyasigala mu isinzizo, ni mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya e Yerusalemu:" 
Jeremiah27:22 Biidha kutwalibwa e Babilonia, era bisigale eyo okutuusa lwe ndiiramu kabiri okubirowoozaaku, ni mbiiza mu kifo kino. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Mu mwaka gwene ogwo, mu mwezi ogwokutaanu nga Zedekia ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, Hanania mutabane wa Azzuri nga yali mulanzi eyava mu kibuga Gibeoni, yaayogera ninze nga tuli mu isinzizo, nga ghaligho ni bakabona, n'abantu abandi boonaboona. Yankoba ati," 
Jeremiah28:2 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati: “Namenhamenha obuyinza bwa kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, bwe yabakakaatikaku ng'oti kikoligo mu nkoto y'ensolo." 
Jeremiah28:3 Mu myaka ebiri egiidha, nja kwiza mu kifo kino ebintu byonabyona eby'eisinzizo, kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari bye yatwala e Babilonia." 
Jeremiah28:4 Era nja kwiza kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya Yehoiakini mutabane wa Yehoiakimu, ghalala n'abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya abaatwalibwa e Babilonia mu bunhage. Yii, bwenebwene nze nja kumenhamenha obuyinza bwa kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Agho nga bakabona baligho, ghalala n'abantu boonaboona abaali beemereire agho mu isinzizo, nze naakoba Hanania nti:" 
Jeremiah28:6 “N'ekyo kyene! Ka nsuubire nti Musengwa Katonda aja kukola atyo, atuukirize by'olanze, aize okuva e Babilonia ebintu byonabyona bye baanhaga mu isinzizo, era aize n'abantu boonaboona abaatwalibwa mu bunhage." 
Jeremiah28:7 Aye wulirisa kino kye nja okukukoba iwe Hanania era kye nja okukoba n'abantu abandi boonaboona. 
Jeremiah28:8 Abalanzi abaayogera eira, nga iwe ninze tukaali, baakoba entalo, n'endhala, n'endwaire ya kawumpuli, ebyali eby'okwidha biite abantu mu maghanga kamaala ni mu bwakyabazinga obw'amaani." 
Jeremiah28:9 Aye omulanzi alanga ati ghaja kubaagho miraala, ky'alanze kimala kutuukirira memale yaakakasibwa nga mulanzi mwenemwene atumiibwa Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Agho Hanania yatoola ekikoligo mu nkoto yange, yaakimenhamenha." 
Jeremiah28:11 Yaakoba ng'abantu boonaboona bali agho ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, atyo bw'alimenhamenha ekikoligo kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari kye yata mu nkoto edh'amaghanga goonagoona. Era ekyo alikikola mu myaka ebiri.” Agho nze naavaagho naaja." 
Jeremiah28:12 Ebyo nga bimaze okuwa, Musengwa Katonda yankoba" 
Jeremiah28:13 nje nkobe Hanania nti: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati iwe omenhiemenhie kikoligo kya kiti buti, aye mwene alikola ekikoligo eky'ekyuma ekigumu einho, kyaira mu kifo ky'ekyo." 
Jeremiah28:14 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati aidha kuta ekikoligo eky'ekyuma ekigumu einho mu nkoto edh'amaghanga gano goonagoona gagheerezenga kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia. Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhoona aidha kudhireetera okugheerezanga Nebukadinezzari.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Agho naakobera Hanania ebintu ebyo, era naayongeraku ni kino nti: “Wulira iwe Hanania, Musengwa Katonda ti n'eyakutuma. Oli kuleetera bwa bantu bano kwesiga bya buguya." 
Jeremiah28:16 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda mwene akoba ati aja kukutoola ku nsi. Oidha kufa ng'omwaka guno gukaali kuwaaku, olw'okukoba abantu badheemere Musengwa Katonda oyo.”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Agho Hanania yaafa mu mwezi ogwomusanvu ogw'omwaka gwene ogwo. 
Jeremiah29:1 Eno n'embaluwa ye naghandiikira bakabona, n'abalanzi, n'abakulu ab'ebika, n'abantu abandi boonaboona Nebukadinezzari be yatoola e Yerusalemu, n'abatwala e Babilonia mu bunhage." 
Jeremiah29:2 Nagighandiika nga kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari oyo amaze okutwala mu bunhage, kyabazinga Yehoiakini, n'inhina wa Yehoiakini oyo, n'abagheereza ghalala n'abakungu b'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, n'abakulembeze b'omu Yerusalemu ni mu Bayudaaya yoonayoona, n'abagheesi, n'abakugu mu mirimo egy'endhawulo." 
Jeremiah29:3 Embaluwa eyo nagigemya Elasa mutabane wa Shafani ni Gemaria mutabane wa Hilikia, kyabazinga Zedekia owa Buyudaaya be yatuma ye kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia. Embaluwa eyo yali ekoba eti:" 
Jeremiah29:4 “Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba abo boonaboona be yaganha Nebukadinezzari okubatoola mu Yerusalemu n'abatwala e Babilonia mu bunhage," 
Jeremiah29:5 ati, ‘Muzimbe endhu, mudhibeemu mutereere. Musimbe emisiri gy'emere, mulye bye mukungulamu." 
Jeremiah29:6 Mufumbiraganwe, muzaale abaana. Muleke n'abaana baimwe boona bafumbiraganwe, bazaale abaana. Muzaale mwale eyo ye muli, mulobe kukendeera." 
Jeremiah29:7 Mukolerere obulungi obw'ebibuga ye nabasindika mu bunhage. Mubisabirenga ye ndi, ebintu bisobole okubijiiranga obukalamu, olwo mwena ebintu biidha kubajiiranga bukalamu." 
Jeremiah29:8 Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, ndi kubalabula nti mutaganhanga balanzi ababa mu imwe kubaguya, waire omuntu owundi yeenayeena akoba ati asobola okulagula ebiri mu maiso. Mutawulirisanga birooto byaibwe bye beeroosaloosa." 
Jeremiah29:9 Ebyo bye balagula nga bakozesa eriina lyange bya buguya, kuba nze tibatumangaku naire. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:10 “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Emyaka ensanvu gye nagha Babilonia okubafugiramu bwe giriwaaku, imwe ndibooleka nga bwe mbalumirwa, naatuukiriza kye nasuubiza eky'okubaiza eka." 
Jeremiah29:11 Nze mwene zenka, ninze ndidhi kye mbategekeire imwe. Mbategekeire bintu kubajiiranga bukalamu, se ti kubajiiranga bubi. Era ndidha kubatusaaku ebyo byonabyona bye musuubira mu maiso eyo." 
Jeremiah29:12 Olwo mulindheta okubayamba era mwansaba, naabawulirisa." 
Jeremiah29:13 Muliinoonia nze ghe ndi mwambona, kuba muliinoonia n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona." 
Jeremiah29:14 Bwenebwene mulimbona, naabaleetera ebintu byairamu okubajiiranga obukalamu. Era naabasoloza okuva mu nsi dhoonadhoona ni mu bifo byonabyona mwe nababingira, naabaiza mu nsi mwe nabatoola okubasindika mu bunhage. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.’" 
Jeremiah29:15 “Mukoba muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda yatugha abalanzi mu Babilonia.’" 
Jeremiah29:16 Aye muwulire Musengwa Katonda by'ayogera ku kyabazinga afuga obwakyabazinga Daudi bwe yafugaku, ni by'ayogera ku baganda baimwe ababa mu kibuga kino, abataatwalibwa ghalala n'imwe mu bunhage." 
Jeremiah29:17 Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye akoba ati, ‘Ndidha kubaleetaku entalo, n'endhala, n'endwaire ya kawumpuli, bibaite, era mbafuule ng'oti mitiini emibi einho, egitasobola na kuliibwa." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ndibakiriga n'entalo, n'endhala, n'endwaire ya kawumpuli, era naabafuula ekintu ekitiisa einho abantu boonaboona ku nsi. Yoonayoona ye ndibasansaaniza baidha kubanga kintu kya kukolima, kya kwesimooza, era kya kuvuma." 
Jeremiah29:19 Ebyo biribatuukaku lwa butagondera bukwenda bwe nabagheerezanga aghazira kukoogha naire, nga mbubisa mu bagheereza bange abalanzi. Aye beene baaloba kuwulira." 
Jeremiah29:20 Kale ni, imwe mwenamwena be nasindika mu bunhage e Babilonia muwulire nze Musengwa Katonda kye ndi kubakoba.’" 
Jeremiah29:21 “Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, bino by'ayogera ku Ahabu mutabane wa Kolaia ni ku Zedekia mutabane wa Maaseia, abaja nga babakobera imwe eby'obuguya nga bakozesa eriina lye. Akoba ati alibaghaayo mu ngalo dha kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia, yaabaita nga mubona muti." 
Jeremiah29:22 Era abantu abaatoolebwa e Yerusalemu ni batwalibwa e Babilonia mu bunhage, bwe banaayendanga okukolimira omuntu, baidha kukobanga bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda agwananga yaakukola kye yakola Zedekia ni Ahabu, kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia be yayokya mu muliro ni bafa.’" 
Jeremiah29:23 Ebyo n'ebiribatuukaku kuba beereetaku omusango bwe baakola ebibi ebitakobeka mu Isiraeli. Baayenda ku baka banaibwe, era baayogera eby'obuguya nga bakozesa eriina lya Musengwa Katonda, ate nga Musengwa Katonda oyo tabatumangaku kubyogera. Musengwa Katonda mwene oyo aidhi bye baakola era mwene n'omudhulizi abalumiriza. Musengwa Katonda mwene, n'akobye.”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba nje nkobe Shemaia ow'e Nehelamu nti 
Jeremiah29:25 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati: Waghandiika embaluwa ku bubwo iwe mwene, waadhigheereza eri abantu boonaboona mu Yerusalemu, n'eri Zefania kabona mutabane wa Maaseia, n'eri bakabona abandi boonaboona, nga dhikoba dhiti," 
Jeremiah29:26 “‘Musengwa Katonda yakufuula kabona mu kifo kya Yehoiada, buti niiwe akulira eisinzizo. Mulimo gwo okubona nga buli muntu eyeeralusa ni yeefuula okuba omulanzi, bamusiba ku ndhegere era baamuta ekikoligo mu nkoto eky'ekyuma ekigumu einho." 
Jeremiah29:27 Aye lwaki tokoze otyo Yeremia ow'e Anathothi, ate ng'ali kukobera abantu obukwenda ng'omulanzi?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Oteekwa okumulekeza, kuba yagheereza abantu abali mu Babilonia obukwenda obukoba buti, obunhage bwe balimu bwidha kutwala entangama. Kale, nga bali n'okuzimba endhu, badhibeemu batereere. Basimbe emisiri gy'emere, balye bye bakungulamu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Zefania yansomera embaluwa eyo," 
Jeremiah29:30 era agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah29:31 “Gheereza abali mu bunhage boonaboona obukwenda buno obugema ku Shemaia ow'e Nehelamu, oti, ‘Nze Musengwa Katonda nja kubonereza Shemaia oyo n'abaana be era n'abaidhukulu boonaboona. Nze timutumangaku naire, aye yayogera n'imwe ng'oti se mulanzi era yaabaikirizisa eby'obuguya. Mu baidhukulu baimwe timuja kubaamu babe. Era talighangaala kutuuka ku kubona bintu birungi bye nja okukolera abantu bange, kuba yakoba abantu bandheemere nze Musengwa Katonda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:32  
Jeremiah30:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba nze Yeremia ati: 
Jeremiah30:2 “Ghandiika mu kitabo ebintu byonabyona bye nkukobeire," 
Jeremiah30:3 kuba bona eno, ekiseera kiri kwidha lwe ndireetera abantu bange Abaisiraeli n'Abayudaaya ebintu okwiramu okubajiiranga obukalamu. Ndibaiza mu nsi ye nagha badhaadha baibwe, era bairamu okugitwala yaaba yaibwe ku bwaibwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Musengwa Katonda akoba abantu b'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya ati: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Nawulira amamiro g'omuntu ali kudhugumira, omuntu atiire einho era azira miraala naire." 
Jeremiah30:6 Buti sooka olowooze era weebuuze! Bwenebwene omusaadha asobola okuzaala omwana? Memale lwaki mbona buli musaadha ng'agemereire enda ye ng'oti n'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala? Lwaki buli muntu ayakaanhiriire? 
Jeremiah30:7 Tukagwireku! Olunaku olutiisa einho luli kwidha, era ezira lundi lw'olugerangeraniaku. Luliba lwa bulumi ku bantu bange, aye balirubitamu baabaagho.”" 
Jeremiah30:8 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, akoba ati: “Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka ndimenhamenha ebikoligo ebiri mu nkoto dhaibwe, era naakutulakutula n'endhegere dhe baabasiba. Tibaliiramu kabiri kuba bairu ba bamaghanga gandi." 
Jeremiah30:9 Aye baidha kumpeerezanga, nze Musengwa Katonda waibwe, era bagheerezenga ni mwidhukulu wa Daudi ye ndibateeragho okuba kyabazinga waibwe." 
Jeremiah30:10 Kale ni, imwe abantu bange Abaisiraeli, mutatya, waire okweraliikirira. Mubone eno, nze ndibanunula, naabatoola mu nsi eyo ey'eghala, ensi ye mulimu ng'abasibe. Muliira ewaimwe mwatyama mwatereera nga muli mu miraala, era nga ghazira kibatiisa naire." 
Jeremiah30:11 Ndi ghalala n'imwe era ndidha kubalokola. Ndidha kuzikiriza amaghanga goonagoona ye nabasansaaniza. Aye imwe tija kubazikiriza. Waire nga tija kubaleka buleke agho nga tibabonereiza, aye era ndibabonereza ekigwaniire nga mbasaasira. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Musengwa Katonda era akoba abantu be ati: “Amabwa gaimwe tigasobola kuwonezebwa, gafuuse ga kokolo, tigawonezeka naire." 
Jeremiah30:13 Ghazira muntu wa kubalabirira, ghazira bulezi bwa kuta ku mabwa gaimwe, era muzira isuubi lya kuwonezebwa."
