Jeremiah30:14 Abo be mwakolagananga nabo baabeerabira tibakaabafaaku naire. Nze nabalumba imwe ng'oti ndi bwa muzigu waimwe, naababonereza aghazira kusaasira naire, olw'ebibi byaimwe ebingi n'olw'emisango gyaimwe egitaloodheka." 
Jeremiah30:15 Mulekere agho okwemuluguunhia olw'obulumi, kuba amabwa gaimwe tigasoboka kuwonezebwa. Nababonereza ntyo olw'ebibi byaimwe ebingi, n'olw'emisango gyaimwe egitaloodheka." 
Jeremiah30:16 Aye mpegaano imwe abantu bange mulobe kutya: Abo boonaboona ababaita, boona baliitibwa. Abazigu baimwe boonaboona balitwalibwa mu bunhage. Abo boonaboona ababatuntuza, boona balituntuzibwa. N'abo ababanhagaku ebyaimwe, boona balinhagibwaku ebyaibwe." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ndibalongoosa mwairagho bukalamu nga bwe mwali, era naawonia amabwa gaimwe waire ng'abazigu baimwe bakoba bati, ‘Sioni kiri ng'oti n'omuntu ye baabinga adaagiradaagira eyo atyo. Ghazira akifaaku naire.’ Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah30:18 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Bona, ndiizaagho abantu bange, naabaiza mu nsi yaibwe, era buli maka naagagemerwa ekivunika. Ekibuga Yerusalemu baliiramu okukizimba kabiri ku kasozi kaakyo, n'ekisaagaati kyakyo baakiizaagho mu kifo kyakyo." 
Jeremiah30:19 Abantu abakibaamu balyemba enhembo edh'okwebaza, baakuba emizira nga basagamba. Ndibagha enkabi beeyongera okuba abangi nga tibakendeera naire. Abantu balibaghanga ekitiibwa aghazira kunhoomebwa." 
Jeremiah30:20 Baliiramu okuzaala abaana kamaala nga bwe baalinga eira, n'abantu beesolozanga okusinza mu maiso gange. Era ndibonereza abo ababakiriga." 
Jeremiah30:21 Mu ighanga lyaibwe lyene n'omuliva alibafuga; kyabazinga waibwe aliva mu beene. Ndimala kumweta memale yaaseeta ye ndi. Ghaligho akana n'aseeta ye ndi ku bubwe yenka? Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah30:22 Beene baliba bantu bange, nze naaba Katonda waibwe." 
Jeremiah30:23 Bona, obusungu bwa Musengwa buli ng'oti kiwunga, era buli ng'oti n'empewo ey'amaani. Empewo eyo erifuuwa nga yeezungululira ku mitwe gy'ababi." 
Jeremiah30:24 Era obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda obubitirivu tibuja kwika, okutuusa ng'amaze okukola n'okutuukiriza ky'asazeegho okukola. Imwe abantu be, ekyo mulikitegeera bukalamu mu biseera eby'oluvainhuma." 
Jeremiah31:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ekiseera kiri kwidha, mbe Katonda w'ebika byonabyona ebya Isiraeli, ate beene babe bantu bange." 
Jeremiah31:2 Nga bakaali mu irungu nze nagemerwa ekivunika abo abaawonagho ni bataitibwa. Era Abaisiraeli abo bwe beegomba einho okuwuumulaku," 
Jeremiah31:3 nze nababonekera nga ndi ghala okuva ghe baali. Imwe Abaisiraeli, nze nava ira nga mbagonza, era ndidha kweyongeranga okubagonza obutalekera." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ndiiramu kabiri okubazimba imwe abantu bange mube eighanga eiyaaka. Muliiramu kabiri okugema obugoma bwaimwe, mwabukuba nga musagamba." 
Jeremiah31:5 Muliiramu kabiri okusimba amasamba ag'emizabbibu ku nsozi dh'e Samaria, era abo abaligasimba balirya ku bibala ebigavaamu." 
Jeremiah31:6 Bwenebwene ekiseera kiri kwidha, abakuumi beete nga bali ku nsozi edh'e Efuraimu bati, ‘Mwidhe tuniineniine Sioni, tuje eri Musengwa Katonda waife.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mwembe n'amaani nga musagamba ku lwa Isiraeli. Mukubire emizira eighanga erisinga agandi goonagoona obukologho. Mwembe olwembo lwaimwe olusaaka, mulangirire muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda alokoire abantu be Abaisiraeli abaawonagho.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Bona eno, ndibaiza okuva mu bunhage mu nsi eri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, naabasoloza okuva eghala einho. Abatulu n'abalema, abakazi abali enda n'abali okumpi okuzaala, boonaboona baliidhira ghalala nabo. Baliira baaba eighanga eikologho." 
Jeremiah31:9 Abantu bange baliira nga bali kulira amaziga eno nga bwe basaba, nga nze ndi kubaiza ewaibwe. Ndibabisa eri obwiga obulimu amaadhi, era naababisa mu ngira entereevu baaloba kwekontola kugwa; kuba nze, ninze lata w'Abaisiraeli, era Efuraimu ni mutabane wange omuberi.”" 
Jeremiah31:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Imwe amaghanga mumpulirise, era mulangirire bye nkoba mubituuse mu biketezo eby'oku nhandha ebiri eghala, muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda mwene n'eyasansaania abantu be. Era mwene oyo n'alibasoloza, n'abakuuma ng'omwayi bw'akuuma ebyayo bye.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 Nnunwire Abaisiraeli, naabawonia eighanga ery'amaani." 
Jeremiah31:12 Baliidha baayemba n'amaani nga basagamba ku lusozi Sioni. Era baaba basangaavu olw'ebirabo bye mbagha: engaano, omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, entaama, n'ente. Baliba ng'oti n'enimiro efukirirwa amaadhi obukalamu, era nga tibadhulirira kintu kyonakyona." 
Jeremiah31:13 Abaghala balisangaala baakina, n'abasaadha abakulu n'abato baasagamba. Ndibagumya, naabaleetera okuseka enseko mu kifo ky'okulira amaziga, naabaleetera eisanhu mu kifo ky'enaku." 
Jeremiah31:14 Ndigha bakabona emere enhingi einho esinga bulungi, naagha n'abantu bange byonabyona bye beetaaga. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Mu Rama yaawulikikayo amamiro ag'okugegenga n'okukuba empungu edh'amaani. Rakeli ng'agegenga olw'abaana be era nga tayenda na kusaasirwa, kuba baali nga tibakaaligho." 
Jeremiah31:16 Aye nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti lekera agho okulira, weeyeye amaziga mu maiso. Byonabyona bye wakolera abaana bo biidha kukusasulwamu empeera, kuba baliira okuva mu nsi ey'abazigu." 
Jeremiah31:17 Eriyo eisuubi mu biseera byaimwe eby'omu maiso. Abaana baimwe baliira mu nsi eyaibwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah31:18 Mpulira ab'omu Isiraeli abalira nga banakughaire, bati, ‘Wo Musengwa Katonda, twalinga ng'oti n'ensolo edhitafugibwangaku, aye iwe waatwegeresa okukugondera. Ganha otwize y'oli, kuba niiwe Musengwa Katonda waife." 
Jeremiah31:19 Twakuvaaku twadaaliima, aye mangu ago twamala twenenia. Bwe watubonereza twagonda, twakoteka emitwe nga tuswaire inho. Ensoni dhaatugema twaswala, kuba twatoolera okwonoona nga tukaali bato.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 Iwe Isiraeli, niiwe mutabane wange andeetera okusangaala, omwana ye nsinga kugonza. Waire ni bwe nkunenia, era nsigala nga nkaakulowooza, naakulumirwa omwoyo, era nakugemerwa ekivunika." 
Jeremiah31:21 Muteegho obumanhiso ghe mubita, mumanhe engira ye mwagema nga muja. Mwire imwe Abaisiraeli, mwire ewaimwe mu bibuga bye mwavaamu." 
Jeremiah31:22 Imwe abantu abatali beesigwa, mulirekera li okudaaliimira eno n'ere? Nze Musengwa Katonda ntonzeegho ekintu ekiyaaka ku nsi era nga kya ndhawulo, eky'omukazi okuba nga n'omukuumi w'omusaadha.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati: “Bwendiiza abantu bange mu nsi yaibwe, mu Buyudaaya ni mu bibuga byayo, ni mbaleetera ebintu kabiri okubajiiranga obukalamu, baliiramu okukobanga bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda akughe enkabi iwe olusozi olutukuvu, iwe ekifo ekitukuvu Musengwa Katonda mw'aba.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Abantu baliba mu Buyudaaya ni mu bibuga byakyo byonabyona. Mulibaamu abalimi n'abaayi nga bali n'ebyayo byaibwe. 
Jeremiah31:25 Ndiizaamu amaani abo abakooye, era naigusa emere abo boonaboona abaanafugha olw'endhala." 
Jeremiah31:26 Agho abantu balikobanga bati, ‘Najiire naatenduka, era nzuuse nga ndhizeemu amaani.’" 
Jeremiah31:27 “Nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti ekiseera kiri kwidha, ndidhuze Isiraeli ni Buyudaaya abantu n'ensolo." 
Jeremiah31:28 Era nga bwe nakola einho okubabonereza, n'okubaiwululagho, n'okubamenhamenha, n'okubaleetera okughangulwa, n'okubazikiriza, era ntyo bwe ndifaayo einho okubasimba n'okubazimba." 
Jeremiah31:29 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka abantu baliba tibakaakoba bati, ‘Abazaire baalya emizabbibu egikaagha, aye ate abaana n'abaagemwa engigina ku maino.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 Buli anaalyanga emizabbibu egikaagha, mwene n'anaagemwanga engigina ku maino. Era buli muntu aidha kufanga lwa bibi bye mwene.”" 
Jeremiah31:31 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona eno, ekiseera kiri kwidha nkole endagaano empyaka n'abantu ab'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya." 
Jeremiah31:32 Teriba ng'oti n'ere ye nakola ni badhaadha baibwe, lwe nabagema ku mukono ni mbatoola e Misiri kuba waire nga nze nali Musengwa Katonda waibwe, aye era tibaakuuma ndagaano eyo" 
Jeremiah31:33 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, eno n'endagaano ye ndikola n'Abaisiraeli: Ndibataamu amateeka gange, naagaghandiika ku myoyo gyaibwe. Nze ndiba Katonda waibwe, beene baaba bantu bange." 
Jeremiah31:34 Kiriba tikikeetaagisa muntu kwegeresa mwine amanhe Musengwa Katonda, kuba boonaboona baliimanha okuviira irala ku basembayo ghansi okutuukira irala ku babbede beene. Ndibasonigha ebibi byaibwe era neerabirira irala okwonoona kwaibwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Musengwa Katonda yataagho endhuba emuliikirirenga omusana. Era yaataagho omwezi n'emuunienie byakenga obwire. Era mwene oyo n'asiikuula enhandha n'agireetera okuwolomboka nga yeekuluumulula. Eriina lye ni Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye. 
Jeremiah31:36 Yasuubiza ati ekiseera obutonde bw'ensi kye bulimala nga buligho, era n'ekirala ekyo n'Abaisiraeli kye balimala nga bakaali ighanga." 
Jeremiah31:37 Nga bwekitasoboka muntu kupima igulu ghaigulu eyo, waire okuja ni yeekebeedha emisingi egy'ensi eyo ghansi, era kityo bwekitasoboka Musengwa Katonda okulekulira agho Abaisiraeli, waire nga baakola ebibi kamaala. Musengwa Katonda mwene n'akobye." 
Jeremiah31:38 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Ekiseera kiri kwidha bairemu okuzimba ekibuga Yerusalemu, okuva ku kituuti ekyetebwa ekya Hananeli mu bugwandhuba, okutuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'omu Nsonda." 
Jeremiah31:39 Era ensalosalo yaakyo eja kweyongerayo okuva agho, eje etuuke ku kasozi Garebu, memale yeetooloole etuuke e Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Ekiiko kyonakyona kye baziikamu abafu era kye basuulamu n'ebikaba, n'enimiro dhoonadhoona okutuuka ku kaiga Kiduroni n'okutuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'Embalaasi mu buvandhuba, biidha kubanga byange era nga bitukuvu. Ekibuga tikiriiramu kabiri kumenhebwagho waire okuzikirizibwa.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Musengwa Katonda yayogera ninze mu mwaka ogweikumi (10) nga Zedekia ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, era ng'ogwo n'ogwali omwaka ogweikumi n'omunaana (18) nga Nebukadinezzari ni kyabazinga wa Babilonia." 
Jeremiah32:2 Mu kiseera ekyo, eigye erya kyabazinga w'e Babilonia lyali lirumbye Yerusalemu, nga likizingiiza okukyezunguluza. Era nga nze bansibiire mu luya lw'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
Jeremiah32:3 Kyabazinga Zedekia n'eyalagira bansibe kuba nalanga nti Musengwa Katonda yakoba ati: “Nja kuleka kyabazinga w'e Babilonia ageme ekibuga kino. 
Jeremiah32:4 Ni kyabazinga Zedekia yeena taliwona, balimutwala ye kyabazinga w'e Babilonia oyo, yaayogera naye nga babonagana maiso ku maiso." 
Jeremiah32:5 Zedekia balimutwala e Babilonia yaaba eyo okutuusa lwe ndisalagho eky'okumukolera. Ni bw'anaagezaaku atya okulwanisa Abababilonia taja kubaghangula. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah32:7 “Bona eno, muganda wo Hanameli azaalibwa lata wo omuto Shallumu, aidha kwidha y'oli akusabe omuguleku ekibandha kye ekiri mu Anathothi mu kiketezo kya Benjamini kuba niiwe amuliku oluganda einho era niiwe ali n'obukumu okukigula kibe ekikyo.”" 
Jeremiah32:8 Agho, nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yankoba, Hanameli yaidha ye nali mu luya olw'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, yansaba mmuguleku ekibandha kye. Agho naategeera nga bwene Musengwa Katonda n'eyayogera ninze." 
Jeremiah32:9 Kale naagula ekibandha ekyo ku Hanameli, naamusasula empiiya edhigheza ebitundu bya feeza ikumi na musanvu." 
Jeremiah32:10 Naata omukono ku ndagaano, twagisibaku akamanhiso okugikakasa, era naayeta n'abadhulizi baabagho. Agho twapima feeza oyo ku minzaani." 
Jeremiah32:11 Agho naagema endagaano eyo ye twasibaku akamanhiso, eyalimu ebyo bye twaisaniaku ng'amateeka bwe galagira. Era naagema ni kopi etali nsibe ye twakoopolola ku ndagaano eyo," 
Jeremiah32:12 byombi naabigemya Baruku mutabane wa Neria era nga mwidhukulu wa Mahaseia. Naabimugemya nga ghaligho Hanameli, n'abadhulizi abaata ku ndagaano eyo emikono, era n'abantu abaali batyaime mu luya olw'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
Jeremiah32:13 Era naakoba Baruku, ng'abo boonaboona bawulira, nti:" 
Jeremiah32:14 “Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akulagiire otwale endagaano dhino dhombi, ere ye twasibaku akamanhiso n'ere kopi yaayo etali nsibe ye twagikoopololaku, oje obite mu kasugha bisobole okukuumibwa emyaka n'emyaka." 
Jeremiah32:15 Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akobye ati endhu, n'ebibandha, n'amasamba g'emizabbibu, biriiramu kabiri okugulwa mu nsi eno.”" 
Jeremiah32:16 Bwenamala okugha Baruku endagaano ey'okugula ekibandha, naasaba nti:" 
Jeremiah32:17 “Aa, Musengwa Katonda wange, niiwe owatonda eigulu n'ensi ng'okozesa obuyinza bwo obungi n'amaani go agataloodheka. Ghazira kintu kikalangufu inho iwe ky'otasobola." 
Jeremiah32:18 Ogonza enkumi n'enkumi edh'abantu aghazira kulekera, aye ate weesasuuliza ku baana olw'ebibi by'abazaire baibwe. Oli Katonda mukologho era ow'amaani. Niiwe Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye." 
Jeremiah32:19 Okola entegeka edh'amagezi agataloodheka, era waakola eby'amaani. Obona ebintu byonabyona abantu bye bakola, era waabasasulamu ng'ojiira ku bikolwa byaibwe." 
Jeremiah32:20 Wakola ebyewuunhio n'ebyewuninkiriza mu Misiri, era ni ye buli eno okaabikola mu Isiraeli, ni mu maghanga agandi goonagoona. Kale kyaba nti buli ghantu bakwidhi." 
Jeremiah32:21 Watoola abantu bo Abaisiraeli mu Misiri ng'okozesa amaani go agataloodheka. Waakola ebyewuunhio n'ebyewuninkiriza, era waaleetera ebintu ebitiisa einho okubaagho." 
Jeremiah32:22 Waabagha ensi eno engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala, nga bwe wasuubiza badhaadha baibwe." 
Jeremiah32:23 Aye bwe baatuuka mu nsi eno ni bagitwala n'eba eyaibwe ku bwaibwe, tibaagondera biragiro byo, waire okwebisa nga bwe wabagalagira. Ghazira kye baakolaku ku ebyo bye wabalagira okukola. Kale ni, iwe n'okubaleetaku okuzikirira kuno kwonakwona." 
Jeremiah32:24 Bona, Abababilonia babunze ku kibuga emungo ey'eitaka ey'okuniiniraku, nga benda bakirumbe bakigeme. Olw'okuba ghaligho olutalo, n'endhala, n'endwaire ya kawumpuli, Abababilonia abo baidha kusobola okugema ekibuga kino. Era obona nga bye wakoba byonabyona bituukiriire." 
Jeremiah32:25 Aye ate iwe Musengwa Katonda waife, niiwe wandagira okugula ekibandha nga ghaligho n'abadhulizi, waire nga Abababilonia bali kumpi kugema ekibuga.”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah32:27 “Bona eno, nze ninze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda w'abantu boonaboona. Ghazira kintu kikalangufu inho nze kye ntasobola." 
Jeremiah32:28 Nja kugha kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia n'eigye lye, ekibuga kino bakigeme." 
Jeremiah32:29 Baidha kukikunaaniaku omuliro bakyokye kyonakyona, ghalala n'endhu edho abantu mwe bansungughalizanga nga baniokeza obubbaani ghaigulu ku busolya bwadho nga babuniokereza omusambwa Baali, era nga bafukira bakatonda baibwe ebigheebwayo eby'okunhwa." 
Jeremiah32:30 Abantu b'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya, okuviira irala mu mainhama ag'ebyafaayo byaibwe, tibansiimya naire olw'ebikolwa byaibwe, era bansungughaza busungughaze mu bye bakola." 
Jeremiah32:31 Abantu b'omu kibuga kino bansungughaza ebitaloodheka okuviira irala ekibuga kino lwe baakizimba. Kale nsazeegho okukizikiriza," 
Jeremiah32:32 olw'ebibi byonabyona abantu b'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Yerusalemu bye baakola. Baakola ebibi ghalala ni bakyabazinga baibwe, n'abakulembeze baibwe, ni bakabona baibwe, era n'abalanzi baibwe." 
Jeremiah32:33 Nze nga bankuba bwa nkoone, baaloba kukyukira ye ndi. Era waire nga nabagalagiranga aghazira kukoogha naire, aye nga tibenda kuwulirisa beege." 
Jeremiah32:34 Baatoola emisambwa gyaibwe egyenhinhalwa, baagita mu isinzizo lyange, baalyonoona." 
Jeremiah32:35 Era baaja baazimbira omusambwa Baali ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, mu kyetebwa Ekiiko ekya mutabane wa Hinnomu, baayokeranga okwo batabane baibwe ni baghala baibwe n'omuliro. Ate nga nze tibalagirangaku kukola kintu kyenhinhalwa ekyo, waire okukirowoozaaku obulowooze mu mwoyo gwange. Kale baaleetera abantu b'omu Buyudaaya okwonoona.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 Agho Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli yankoba ati: “Yeremia, abantu bali kukoba bati olutalo, endhala, n'endwaire ya kawumpuli bija kuleetera ekibuga kino okugheebwayo mu ngalo dha kyabazinga w'e Babilonia. Aye mpegaano nkoba nti:" 
Jeremiah32:37 Bona, ndidha kusoloza abantu bange okuva mu nsi dhoonadhoona ye nabasansaaniza nga mbasungughaliire ebitaloodheka, mbaize mu kifo kino era mbaleetere okukibaamu mu miraala." 
Jeremiah32:38 Baliba bantu bange, nze naaba Katonda waibwe." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndibaleetera okweyimba ekitole era nga bali n'ekigendererwa kirala, eky'okuntaamu ekitiisa olubeerera ku lw'obulungi bwaibwe beene n'obwa baidhukulu baibwe." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ndikola nabo endagaano etaliwaagho. Tirirekeranga kubakolera birungi. Ndibaleetera okuntangamu ekitiisa n'omwoyo gwaibwe gwonagwona, babe nga tibakairayo kunvaaku." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ndidha kusangaalanga okubakolera ebirungi n'okubaleetera okutyama mu nsi eno nga batereire. 
Jeremiah32:42 “Nga bwenaleeta ku bantu bano akabi akanene katyo, era ntyo bwendibatuusaaku ebirungi byonabyona bye nabasuubiza." 
Jeremiah32:43 Abantu bali kukoba bati ensi eno eidha kusigala agho etyo ng'eri bwa bifulukwa byereere, ng'eziramu muntu waire ensolo, era bati eja kugheebwayo mu ngalo dh'Abababilonia. Aye abantu baliiramu kabiri okugulanga ebibandha mu nsi eno." 
Jeremiah32:44 Abantu baidha kugulanga ebibandha, batenga ku ndagaano emikono era badhisibengaku obumanhiso nga ghaligho n'abadhulizi. Ebyo biidha kubangagho mu biketezo bya Benjamini, ni mu byalo ebyezungulwire Yerusalemu, ni mu bibuga eby'omu Buyudaaya, ni mu bibuga eby'omu biketezo eby'oku nsozi, ni mu bibuga eby'omu biketezo eby'omu biiko, ni mu bibuga eby'omu biketezo bya Buyudaaya ebikalukalu ebiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. Ndiizaagho abantu mu nsi yaibwe, naabaleetera ebintu kabiri okubajiiranga obukalamu. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Bwe baali nga bakansibiire mu luya lw'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, Musengwa Katonda yayogera ninze kabiri." 
Jeremiah33:2 Musengwa Katonda oyo n'eyakola ensi, n'agiwumba era n'agitengeka mu kifo kyayo. Era eriina lye, ni Musengwa Katonda. Agho yankoba ati:" 
Jeremiah33:3 “Bw'onandheta nze Musengwa Katonda, ndidha kukuvugira era nkukobere ebintu ebyewuunhisa ebyagisibwa by'otaidhi." 
Jeremiah33:4 Nze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli nkoba nti endhu edh'omu Yerusalemu n'ekisaagaati kya bakyabazinga ba Buyudaaya, bija kumenhebwagho. Nga kino kiidha kuva ku bazigu abaja okubunga emungo dh'eitaka edh'okuniiniraku ekibuga Yerusalemu nga bakirumba." 
Jeremiah33:5 Abababilonia bali kwidha okulwana, baidhuze endhu edho n'ekisaagaati ekyo emirambo egy'abo be nja okwita mu busungu n'ekiruyi. Ekibuga kino nkirekuliire agho olw'ebikolwa ebibi abantu baamu bye bakola." 
Jeremiah33:6 Aye bona eno, ndiizaagho ekibuga kino bukalamu era naakireetera okuwona. Abantu baamu ndibaleetera okuba mu miraala kamaala, ng'ebintu bibajiira bukalamu." 
Jeremiah33:7 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Isiraeli ndibaleetera ebintu okwiramu okubajiiranga obukalamu. Ndiiramu okubazimba babe nga bwe baalinga eira. 
Jeremiah33:8 Ndibanaazaaku ebibi byaibwe byonabyona bye baakola ye ndi, naabasonigha ensobi dhaibwe n'obudheemu bwaibwe." 
Jeremiah33:9 Ekibuga kino Yerusalemu kirindeetera eisanhu n'ekitiisa era kyaneesiimisa. Amaghanga goonagoona ag'omu nsi galitya era gaadhugumira nga baboine nga bwe nkolera abantu b'omu Yerusalemu ebirungi, era nga bwe mbaleetera ebintu okubajiira obukalamu.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu bakoba bati ekifo kino kiri ng'oti irungu, era bati kiziramu bantu bakibaamu waire ensolo. Era batuufu okukoba batyo, kuba ebibuga eby'omu Buyudaaya biziramu bantu, n'enguudo edh'omu Yerusalemu nkalu. Ghazira bantu babaamu waire nsolo dhibaamu. Aye mu bifo ebyo oliiramu okuwulira" 
Jeremiah33:11 emizira egy'abali mu binhumo ni mu kusagamba, n'egy'abo abali mu mbaga edh'obugole. Era oliwulira abantu abemba nga bali kuleeta ebigheebwayo olw'okwebaza mu isinzizo lyange, nga bakoba bati, ‘Mwebaze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo mulungi. Okugonza kwe tikukoma, kubaagho byanda na byanda.’ Ndiizaagho ebirungi mu nsi eno, ebe nga bwe yalinga okusooka. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah33:12 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Ensi eno eri ng'oti irungu, eziramu bantu waire ensolo, eriiramu okubaamu ebyayiro abaayi mwe batwala ensolo dhaibwe okuliira." 
Jeremiah33:13 Abaayi baliiramu kabiri okubaliranga ebyayo byaibwe mu bibuga eby'omu biketezo eby'oku nsozi, n'eby'omu biketezo eby'omu biiko, n'eby'omu biketezo bya Buyudaaya ebikalukalu ebiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, ni mu biketezo bya Benjamini, ni mu byalo ebyezungulwire Yerusalemu, ni mu bibuga eby'omu Buyudaaya. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah33:14 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Bona, ekiseera kiri kwidha ntuukirize ekisuubizo kye nasuubiza abantu ab'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya." 
Jeremiah33:15 Mu kiseera ekyo nditaagho omuntu omutuufu, nga mwidhukulu wa Daudi, yaaba kyabazinga. Kyabazinga oyo alikola amazima n'ebituufu mu nsi." 
Jeremiah33:16 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu balirokolebwa baaba mu miraala. Era ekibuga ekyo balikyeta eriina ‘Musengwa Katonda n'obulokozi bwaife.’ 
Jeremiah33:17 Nze Musengwa Katonda nsuubiza nti buliidho ghaidha kubangagho omuntu ku baidhukulu ba Daudi, anaabanga kyabazinga wa Isiraeli." 
Jeremiah33:18 Era buliidho ghaidha kubangagho bakabona ab'omu kika kya Levi abanampeerezanga, nga baghaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke, n'emisengo.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah33:20 “Nakola endagaano n'omusana era naakola endagaano n'obwire, nti bibengagho mu kiseera kyabyo ekituufu, era endagaano eyo ghazira asobola kugimenhagho." 
Jeremiah33:21 Era ntyo bwe nkoze endagaano n'omugheereza wange Daudi, nti buliidho ghaidha kubangagho omuntu ku baidhukulu be anaabanga kyabazinga. Era naakola endagaano nti buliidho ghaidha kubangagho bakabona ab'omu kika kya Levi abanampeerezanga. Era endagaano edho ghazira asobola kudhimenhagho." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ng'emuunienie edh'oku igulu bwedhitabalika, era ng'omusenho ku mbali kw'enhandha bwe gutapimika, zeena ntyo bwe ndireetera baidhukulu ba Daudi omugheereza wange, ni bakabona ab'omu kika kya Levi, okuba abangi einho.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah33:24 “Yeremia, oboine abantu bwe bali kukoba bati nalekulira agho abantu ab'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya, endhu edho eibiri dhe nalonda? Kale banhooma abantu bange abo baaloba kubatwala ng'eighanga." 
Jeremiah33:25 Aye nze Musengwa Katonda nakola endagaano n'omusana era naakola endagaano n'obwire, nti bibengagho mu kiseera kyabyo ekituufu. Era endagaano eyo ghazira asobola kugimenhagho." 
Jeremiah33:26 Kale ni ng'endagaano eyo bw'etasobola kumenhebwagho, zeena ntyo bwe ntalisobola kulekulira agho baidhukulu ba Yakobo n'aba Daudi omugheereza wange, ni ntalonda owundi ku baidhukulu be afugenga baidhukulu ba Aburahamu, n'aba Isaaka, n'aba Yakobo. Bwenebwene ndigemerwa abantu bange ekisa, naabaleetera ebintu byairamu okubajiiranga obukalamu.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, mu kiseera kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari owa Babilonia, n'eigye lye, era n'amagye ag'amaghanga agandi goonagoona ge yali afuga, nga bali kulumba Yerusalemu n'ebibuga ebindi ebyali okumpi agho." 
Jeremiah34:2 Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli yankoba nje nkobe kyabazinga Zedekia owa Buyudaaya nti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona, nze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli nja kughaayo ekibuga kino mu ngalo dha kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia, era aja kukyokya omuliro." 
Jeremiah34:3 Era iwe kyabazinga Zedekia weena toliwona. Balikugema baakutwala ye kyabazinga w'e Babilonia oyo, waayogera naye nga mubonagana maiso ku maiso. Era balimala baakutwala e Babilonia." 
Jeremiah34:4 Iwe Zedekia, wulirisa bye nja okukukoba ebikugemaku: Tibalikwitira mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah34:5 Olifa bya bulungi mu miraala. Era ng'abantu bwe baaniosanga obubbaani nga baziika badhaadha bo abaali bakyabazinga okukusooka, weena batyo bwe balikuniokeza obubbaani. Baja kukulira nga bakoba bati, ‘Wo Kyabazinga waife atufiireku!’ Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Kale nze naaja, naakobera kyabazinga Zedekia obukwenda obwo ng'ali mu Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah34:7 Mu kiseera ekyo eigye lya kyabazinga w'e Babilonia lyali lirumbye ekibuga ekyo Yerusalemu, era nga lirumbye n'ebibuga Lakishi ni Azeka, ebyali nga ni byonka ebyali bikaasigairegho mu Buyudaaya ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu." 
Jeremiah34:8 Kyabazinga Zedekia yaisania n'abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu ku ky'okulekula abairu babe ba idembe. 
Jeremiah34:9 Buli muntu yali n'okulekula abairu be Abaheburayi abasaadha n'abakazi babe ba idembe, ghabule omuntu aba ni Muisiraeli mwine ng'omwiru." 
Jeremiah34:10 Kale abantu boonaboona n'abakulembeze baibwe, baisania okulekula abairu baibwe abasaadha n'abakazi babe ba idembe, era nga tibakairayo kabiri kubafuula bairu. Agho baabalekula." 
Jeremiah34:11 Aye ate baamala baakyusa ekirowoozo, baiza abairu abo be baali balekwire, era bairamu okubakozesa obwiru kabiri." 
Jeremiah34:12 Agho Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli yankoba nkobere abantu nti:" 
Jeremiah34:13 “Nze Musengwa Katonda nakola endagaano ni badhaadha baimwe, bwe nabatoola mu nsi Misiri ye mwabanga nga muli bairu. Naabakoba nti," 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Buli ku nkomerero y'emyaka omusanvu, mwidha kulekulanga Baheburayi banaimwe be mwagula ng'abairu, babe ba idembe, nga bamaze okubagheereza okumala emyaka omukaaga.’ Aye badhaadha baimwe abo baaloba kumpulirisa waire okugondera kye nabakoba." 
Jeremiah34:15 Ghano dhuuzi imwe mwakola ekyansanhusa, mwakyusa ekirowoozo, mwalangirira okulekula Baisiraeli banaimwe abairu babe ba idembe, era mwakola endagaano mu maiso gange mu isinzizo lino eryange lyene." 
Jeremiah34:16 Aye kabiri mwakyusa ekirowoozo mwayonoona eriina lyange. Mwaiza abairu abo be mwali mulekwire okuja nga ba idembe nga bwe benda, mwairamu okubakozesa obwiru kabiri." 
Jeremiah34:17 Nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti mwandheemera mwaloba kugha Baisiraeli banaimwe idembe lyaibwe. Kale ni mubone eno, nze ndidha kubagha imwe eidembe ery'okufiira mu lutalo, n'ery'okufa endwaire ya kawumpuli, n'ery'okufa endhala. Ndidha kubafuula ekintu ekitiisa einho abantu boonaboona ku nsi." 
Jeremiah34:18 Abakungu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, n'abagheereza b'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, n'abantu abandi boonaboona abaakola ninze endagaano nga babita ghagati gh'emamba ey'ente ento enume ye baasalamu aghabiri, aye ni bamala batatuukiriza ndagaano eyo, zeena ndibasalamu nga bwe baasala mu mamba ey'ente eyo." 
Jeremiah34:19  
Jeremiah34:20 Ndibaghaayo mu ngalo dh'abazigu baibwe abenda okubaita, era emirambo gyaibwe giriba mere ya nhonhi, na ya nsolo dha mu nsiko." 
Jeremiah34:21 Era ndighaayo kyabazinga Zedekia owa Buyudaaya n'abakungu be mu ngalo dh'abazigu baibwe abenda okubaita. Ndibaghaayo eri eigye lya Babilonia, waire nga lyalekera okubalumba." 
Jeremiah34:22 Nze Musengwa Katonda ndiragira Abababilonia baira okulumba ekibuga kino, era baakirwanisa baakigema, baakyokya omuliro. Ebibuga eby'omu Buyudaaya ndibifuula bifulukwa byereere, ghaabulagho omuntu abibaamu. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Yehoiakimu mutabane wa Yosia bwe yali nga ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati:" 
Jeremiah35:2 “Yeremia, ja y'ab'ekika kya Rekabu oyogere nabo. Memale obatwale mu kisenge ekindi ku ebyo ebiri ku isinzizo, obaghe ku mwenge ogw'emizabbibu banhwe.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Kale naatoola ab'ekika kya Rekabu boonaboona: Yaazania mutabane wa Yeremia atali nze aye mutabane wa Habazzinia, ni baganda be, ni batabane baibwe boonaboona," 
Jeremiah35:4 naabatwala mu isinzizo. Agho naabaingiza mu kisenge ky'abeegeresebwa ab'omulanzi ayetebwa Hanani mutabane wa Igadalia. Ekisenge ekyo kyali ghaigulu gh'ekisenge kya Maaseia mutabane wa Shallumu eyakuumanga omulyango gw'eisinzizo. Era nga kiri kumpi n'ebisenge eby'abakungu abandi ab'omu isinzizo. 
Jeremiah35:5 Agho naata ensugha n'ebikopo mu maiso g'Abarekabu abo, nga biidhwire omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, era naabakoba nti: “Munhwe.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Aye bairamu bati: “Ife titwidha kunhwa mwenge gwa mizabbibu, kuba dhaadha waife Yonadabu mutabane wa Rekabu, yatukoba ife beene, n'abaana baife, era ni baidhukulu baife, obutanhwanga mwenge gwa mizabbibu." 
Jeremiah35:7 Ekindi yatukoba obutazimbanga ndhu, n'obutalimanga nimiro, oba okusimbanga amasamba g'emizabbibu, waire okugagula obugule. Yatulagira tusulenga mu weema buliidho, olwo tusobole okusigala nga tukaali mu nsi eno mwe tuli ng'abasenze." 
Jeremiah35:8 Kale tugondera ebyo byonabyona dhaadha waife Yonadabu bye yatulagira. Ife beene, ni bakazi baife, ni batabane baife, era ni baghala baife, titunhwera irala ku mwenge gwa mizabbibu naire." 
Jeremiah35:9 Era titwezimbira ndhu dha kubangamu, waire okuba n'amasamba g'emizabbibu, oba enimiro, oba ensigo." 
Jeremiah35:10 Aye tusula mu weema, era tugondera byonabyona Yonadabu dhaadha waife bye yatulagira." 
Jeremiah35:11 Aye kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia bwe yaidha n'alumba ensi eno, ife twasalagho okwidha e Yerusalemu nga tulumuka amagye ag'Abababilonia n'ag'Abasiria. Kale n'okuba nti buti tuba mu Yerusalemu.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Jeremiah35:13 “Yeremia, Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli nkulagiire oje obuuze abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu ensonga lwaki baloba okuwulira bye mbalagira ni bye mbagalagira." 
Jeremiah35:14 Baidhukulu ba Yonadabu mutabane wa Rekabu baagondera ekiragiro kya Yonadabu oyo eky'obutanhwanga mwenge gwa mizabbibu. Era ni ye buli eno tibagunhweraku irala naire. Aye imwe nze buliidho mbakoba aghazira kukoogha naire, aye mwaloba kumpulirisa." 
Jeremiah35:15 Buliidho mbaire ntumanga ye muli abagheereza bange abalanzi aghazira kukoogha naire, babakobe mulekere okukola ebibi, mukole ebituufu. Era mulobe kujiiranga ku bakatonda abandi nga mubasinza, olwo musobole okusigalanga mu nsi ye nabagha imwe ni badhaadha baimwe. Aye nga imwe timumpulirisa, waire okufaayo ku bye nkoba." 
Jeremiah35:16 Baidhukulu ba Yonadabu mutabane wa Rekabu baagondera ekiragiro dhaadha waibwe kye yabagha, aye abantu imwe mwadheema okukola bye mbalagira." 
Jeremiah35:17 Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, nja kutuusa abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu ku kuzikirira, nga bwe nabeesoomera eira. Kino nja kukikola lwa kuba nayogera n'imwe aye mwaloba kumpulirisa, era naabeeta aye mwaloba kunvugira.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Agho naakobera ab'ekika kya Rekabu nti: “Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati, ‘Mwagondera ebyo dhaadha waimwe Yonadabu bye yabakoba okukola, era mwajiira ku ebyo byonabyona bye yabalagira ni bye yabagalagira." 
Jeremiah35:19 Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, nsuubiza nti buliidho ghaidha kubangagho omusaadha ku baidhukulu ba Yonadabu mutabane wa Rekabu, anampeerezanga.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Yehoiakimu mutabane wa Yosia ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati:" 
Jeremiah36:2 “Toola enzingo y'ekitabo oghandiikemu ebintu byonabyona bye nkukobeire ebigema ku Isiraeli, ni ku Buyudaaya, ni ku maghanga agandi goonagoona. Ghandiika ebintu byonabyona bye mbairenga nga nkukobera okuviira irala ku lunaku lwe natoolera okwogera n'iwe, nga Yosia ni kyabazinga, okutuusa olwaleero." 
Jeremiah36:3 Oba katyo abantu b'omu Buyudaaya bwe baliwulira ku kuzikirira okwo kwonakwona kwe ndi kutegeka okubasindikira, balikyuka baava mu mpisa dhaibwe embi. Olwo naabasonigha olw'obubi bwaibwe n'ebibi bye bakola.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Kale naayeta Baruku mutabane wa Neria. Naayogeranga, eno nga bw'aghandiika mu nzingo y'ekitabo bye ndhogera, ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yankoba." 
Jeremiah36:5 Agho naagha Baruku oyo ebiragiro bino nti: “Nze tibakandhikiriza kuja mu isinzizo. 
Jeremiah36:6 Kale nhenda iwe ojeeyo ku lunaku abantu lwe baba mu kusiiba. Agho osome enzingo y'ekitabo eyo, abantu boonaboona abali mu isinzizo bawulire bukalamu ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yankoba, era bye ndhogeirenga eno nga bw'obighandiika. Oidha kusoma ebintu ebyo nga n'abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya abava mu bibuga byaibwe ebindi bali kuwulira." 
Jeremiah36:7 Oba katyo balitoolera okusabanga Musengwa Katonda, era baakyuka baaleka empisa dhaibwe embi, kuba Musengwa Katonda yeesoomeire okukola ku bantu abo mu busungu n'ekiruyi ebitaloodheka.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Kale Baruku yaasomera ebibono bya Musengwa Katonda mu isinzizo, mu nsambo yeene nga bwe namukoba asome." 
Jeremiah36:9 Mu mwezi ogwomwenda ogw'omwaka ogwokutaanu nga Yehoiakimu ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, baalangirira ekisiibo olw'okusaba Musengwa Katonda. Abantu boonaboona ab'omu Yerusalemu, n'abo boonaboona abaidha nga bava mu bibuga eby'omu Buyudaaya ebindi, baasiiba." 
Jeremiah36:10 Agho Baruku yaasoma, ng'abantu boonaboona bali kuwulira, ebyali mu nzingo y'ekitabo bye namukoba okughandiika. Yabisomera mu isinzizo, ng'ali mu kisenge kya Gemaria mutabane wa Shafani era omughandiisi. Ekisenge ekyo kyali ghaigulu gh'oluya olw'eisinzizo, kumpi n'ogwetebwa Omulyango Omuyaaka ogw'eisinzizo." 
Jeremiah36:11 Agho Mikaia mutabane wa Gemaria era mwidhukulu wa Shafani, yaawulira Baruku ng'asoma mu nzingo y'ekitabo ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yakoba." 
Jeremiah36:12 Yaaja mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, mu kisenge eky'omughandiisi abakungu boonaboona ye baali nga batyaime: Elishama omughandiisi, ni Delaia mutabane wa Shemaia, ni Elinathani mutabane wa Akabori, ni Gemaria mutabane wa Shafani, ni Zedekia mutabane wa Hanania, n'abakungu abandi boonaboona." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaia yaabakobera byonabyona bye yawulira nga Baruku asomera abantu. 
Jeremiah36:14 Agho abakungu abo baatuma Yehudi mutabane wa Nethania, era nga mwidhukulu wa Shelemia, era nga mwidhukulu wa Kushi, aje akobe Baruku abaleetere enzingo y'ekitabo ye yasomera abantu. Baruku yaagibaleetera." 
Jeremiah36:15 Bamukoba bati: “Tyama otusomere ebiri mu nzingo y'ekitabo eyo.” Baruku yaabibasomera. 
Jeremiah36:16 Bwe baamala okubiwulira byonabyona, baalingaganaku nga batiire, era baamukoba bati: “Ebyo tuli n'okubikobera kyabazinga.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Agho baabuuza Baruku bati: “Aye tukobere, wasobola otya okughandiika ebyo byonabyona? Yeremia n'eyabikukoberanga, eno nga bw'obighandiika?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruku yairamu ati: “Yeremia n'eyabinkoberanga, eno nga bwe mbighandiika ni bwino mu nzingo eno ey'ekitabo.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Agho baamukoba bati: “Iwe ni Yeremia muje mwegise, mulobe kuganha muntu yeenayeena kumanha ghe muli.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Abakungu baata enzingo y'ekitabo mu kisenge kya Elishama omughandiisi. Baamala baaja mu luya lwa kyabazinga, era baakobera kyabazinga byonabyona." 
Jeremiah36:21 Kyabazinga yaatuma Yehudi okunona enzingo y'ekitabo eyo. Yehudi yaaja yaagitoola mu kisenge kya Elishama, yaagisomera kyabazinga n'abakungu boonaboona abaali beemereire agho okumwezungulula." 
Jeremiah36:22 Gwali mwezi gwa mwenda, nga kyabazinga atyaime mu ndhu ye y'abaamu mu biseera eby'ekiinhogogo, ng'ali kwota muliro." 
Jeremiah36:23 Agho Yehudi bwe yamalanga okusoma ebitundu ebibiri oba ebina ku nzingo y'ekitabo eyo, nga kyabazinga abisalaku n'akambe akatono, ng'abisuula mu muliro. Yaakola atyo okutuusa enzingo y'ekitabo yoonayoona bweyawaagho okuya." 
Jeremiah36:24 Aye k'abe kyabazinga mwene, oba abakungu be abaawulira ebyo nga bisomebwa, tighaaligho naire omulala ati eyatya oba eyakanulamu ebivaalo bye okwoleka nga bw'anakughaire." 
Jeremiah36:25 Era waire nga Elinathani, ni Delaia, ni Gemaria beeghemba kyabazinga alobe kwokya nzingo ya kitabo eyo, kyabazinga oyo tiyabawulirisa naire." 
Jeremiah36:26 Agho yaalagira omulangira ayetebwa Yerahameeli ghalala ni Seraia mutabane wa Azarieli, ni Shelemia mutabane wa Abudeeli, batugeme nze n'omughandiisi wange Baruku. Aye Musengwa Katonda yaatugisa." 
Jeremiah36:27 Nga kyabazinga Yehoiakimu amaze okwokya enzingo y'ekitabo omwali bye nayogeranga eno nga Baruku bw'abighandiika, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati:" 
Jeremiah36:28 “Toola enzingo y'ekitabo eyindi, oghandiikeku byonabyona ebyali ku nzingo y'ekitabo ere, kyabazinga Yehoiakimu owa Buyudaaya ye yayokya." 
Jeremiah36:29 Era kyabazinga oyo omukobe oti, ‘Wayokya enzingo y'ekitabo era waabuuza Yeremia lwaki yaghandiika ati kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia aliidha yaazikiriza ensi eno, era yaita abantu baamu n'ensolo dhaamu.’" 
Jeremiah36:30 Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda nkukoba iwe kyabazinga Yehoiakimu nti toliba na mwidhukulu yeenayeena alifuga bwakyabazinga bwa Daudi. Omulambo gwo baligusuula kuliya, akasana kaagwokya omusana ate empewo ey'ekiinhogogo yaagufuuwa obwire." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ndikubonereza iwe, n'abaana bo, ni baidhukulu bo, n'abakungu bo, olw'ebibi mwenamwena bye mukola. Ndibaleetaku akabi ke neesoomera okubatuusaaku imwe, n'abantu b'omu Yerusalemu, n'ab'omu Buyudaaya, kuba nabalabula aye mwaloba kufaayo naire.”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Agho naatoola enzingo y'ekitabo eyindi, naagigha omughandiisi wange Baruku. Yaaghandiika bire byonabyona, bye nayogeranga eno nga bw'abighandiika, ebyali mu nzingo y'ekitabo kyabazinga Yehoiakimu ye yayokya. Era ku ebyo yaayongeraku n'obukwenda obundi obufaanana n'obwo." 
Jeremiah37:1 Kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia, yafuula Zedekia mutabane wa Yosia okuba kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya mu kifo kya Yehoiakini mutabane wa Yehoiakimu." 
Jeremiah37:2 Aye Zedekia oyo, n'abakungu be, era n'abantu abandi mu ighanga, tibaagondera bukwenda Musengwa Katonda bwe yayogerera mu nze." 
Jeremiah37:3 Agho kyabazinga Zedekia oyo yaatuma Yehukali mutabane wa Shelemia, ni kabona Zefania mutabane wa Maaseia, baidha bankoba bati: “Tusabire eri Musengwa Katonda waife.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Mu kiseera ekyo nali nga bakaali kunta mu ikomera, nga ntambula mu bantu nga bwe nhenda." 
Jeremiah37:5 Eigye ery'Abababilonia lyali lizingiiza Yerusalemu okugyezunguluza. Aye bwe baawulira bati eigye erya Abamisiri lyali limaze okusala ensalo okuva mu Misiri, baaleka olutalo bairayo einhuma." 
Jeremiah37:6 Agho Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli yankoba ati:" 
Jeremiah37:7 “Nze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli nkoba nti, kyabazinga oyo Zedekia eyakutuma okwidha okuneebuuzaaku, ja omukobe oti, ‘Eigye lya Misiri libaire liri mu ngira nga liri kwidha okubayamba, aye lija bwa kwirayo ewaibwe." 
Jeremiah37:8 Olwo Abababilonia baidha kwira kabiri, balumbe ekibuga kino bakigeme, era bakyokye omuliro." 
Jeremiah37:9 Nze Musengwa Katonda mbalabula mulobe kwerimba muti Abababilonia tibaidha kwira. Bwenebwene baidha kwira. 
Jeremiah37:10 Ni bwemughangula eigye lyonalyona ery'Abababilonia ni ghasigalagho bw'abo be bafumiite ebibwa bonka, nga balambaire mu weema dhaibwe, era abo balisituka baayokya ekibuga kino omuliro.’ ”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Eigye ery'Abababilonia lyali lirese okulumba Yerusalemu lyairayo einhuma, olw'okuba eigye ery'Abamisiri lyali liri kwidha." 
Jeremiah37:12 Agho nze naava mu Yerusalemu, naaja mu kiketezo kya Benjamini nfune omugabo mu b'ekika kyange." 
Jeremiah37:13 Aye bwe natuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango gwa Benjamini, ghaabaagho omukulu w'abaisirukale nga bamweta Iriya mutabane wa Shelemia era nga mwidhukulu wa Hanania. Yaanhemereza yankoba ati: “Oli kulumuka oire ku luuyi olw'Abababilonia!”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Nze naamwiramu nti: “Busa, tiri kulumuka kwira ku luuyi lwa Bababiloni.” Aye Iriya yaaloba kuwulirisa bye namukoba. Kale yangema bugeme, era yantwala y'abakungu." 
Jeremiah37:15 Abakungu bankambughalira, baalagira bankube, era bansibira mu ndhu ya Yonathani omughandiisi, kuba endhu eyo baali bagifiiremu ikomera." 
Jeremiah37:16 Bansibira mu kasenge ak'omu ikomera erya ghansi mu itaka, naamalayo enaku kamaala." 
Jeremiah37:17 Nga ghabiseeghooku ekiseera, kyabazinga Zedekia yandhetesa bantwale ye yali, era bwenatuukayo yambuuza nga tuli twenka ati: “Ghalighooku obukwenda obuva ye Musengwa?” Nze naamwiramu nti: “Buligho.” Era naamukoba nti: “Iwe baidha kukughaayo eri kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Agho naamubuuza nti: “Musango ki gwe naiza ku iwe, oba ku bakungu bo, oba ku bantu bano, memale ove okwo onsibe mu ikomera?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Abalanzi baimwe baaja gha, abaalanganga bati kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia talibalumba imwe, waire okulumba ensi eno?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Mpegaano ni, Isebantu kyabazinga, nkweghembye wulirisa kye nkusaba: otandhizaayo mu ikomera mu ndhu ya Yonathani, kuba nja kufiira eyo.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Kale kyabazinga Zedekia yaalagira bansibire mu luya olw'ekisaagaati kye eky'obwakyabazinga. Naaba omwo, era bampanga omugaati mulala buli lunaku nga bagutoola mu kifo ye baagifumbiranga. Baakola batyo, okutuusa mu kibuga bwe mwawa emigaati." 
Jeremiah38:1 Agho Shefatia mutabane wa Mattani, ni Gedalia mutabane wa Pashuhuri, ni Yehukali mutabane wa Shelemia, ni Pashuhuri mutabane wa Malakia, baawulira nga nkobera abantu nti:" 
Jeremiah38:2 “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Omuntu yeenayeena anaasigala mu kibuga kino aidha kwitirwa mu lutalo, oba okufa endhala, oba okufa endwaire ya kawumpuli. Aye anaakifuluma ni yeeghaayo eri Abababilonia, aidha kuwoniagho obulamu bwe.’" 
Jeremiah38:3 Era naakobera abantu nti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Bwenebwene nze Musengwa Katonda nja kughaayo ekibuga kino eri Abababilonia bakigeme.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Agho abakungu baaja ye kyabazinga, baamukoba bati: “Omusaadha ono bamwite bwite, kuba ensambo y'ali kwogeramu emala mu baisirukale amaani abali mu kibuga kino, era n'abantu abandi abakaasigaire mu kibuga kino. Tali kukolerera bulungi bwa bantu bano, aye ali kubaitaitana bwitaitane.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Kyabazinga Zedekia yairamu ati: “Wuuyo ali mu ngalo dhaimwe, nze tiidha kubalobera.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Kale bangema bantwala, bandhisa n'emigugha mu nsulo eyali mu luya olw'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, nga mwene yo n'omulangira Malakia. Ensulo eyo tiyaliimu maadhi, aye yalimu bwa bitosi. Era naadimira mu bitosi omwo." 
Jeremiah38:7 Agho Ebedimeleki Omwethiopia omulaawe, eyagheerezanga mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, yaawulira nga bantaire mu nsulo. Mu kiseera ekyo, kyabazinga yali atyaime ku gwetebwa Omulyango gwa Benjamini ng'ali mu lwekobaano." 
Jeremiah38:8 Kale Ebedimeleki oyo yaaja y'ali, yaamukoba" 
Jeremiah38:9 ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, abantu bano bakoze bubi inho. Bataire Yeremia mu nsulo mw'aidha okufiira endhala, kuba mu kibuga timukaali mere.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Agho kyabazinga yaalagira Ebedimeleki afuneyo abasaadha basatu, baidhe bantooleyo mu nsulo nga nkaali kufa." 
Jeremiah38:11 Ebedimeleki yaaja n'abasaadha abo mu iterekero ery'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga, yaatoolayo ebigoye ebikaire ebikanufukanufu, yaabinsuulira mu nsulo ng'akozesa emigugha." 
Jeremiah38:12 Yankoba ati: “Toola ebigoye ebyo obizingirire mu nkwagha dho, emigugha girobe kukusala.” Zeena naakola ntyo." 
Jeremiah38:13 Bampaluza bantoolayo mu nsulo. Era baamala bankuumira mu luya olw'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga. 
Jeremiah38:14 Agho kabiri kyabazinga Zedekia yandhetesa bantwale ye yali ku mulyango ogwokusatu ogw'eisinzizo. Bwe natuukayo yankoba ati: “Nja kukubuuza ekibuuzo, era nhenda onkobere amazima geene nga tolekaayo.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Naamwiramu nti: “Isebantu kyabazinga, bwe nnaakukobera amazima oidha kundhita bwite. Era ni bwenaakugha amagezi toidha kumpulirisa.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Kyabazinga Zedekia oyo yandayirira mu kaama ati: “Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu, Katonda oyo eyatugha obulamu, tiidha kukwita waire okukughaayo y'abo abenda okukwita.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Agho naamukobera nti: “Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati, ‘Bwoneeghaayo eri abakungu ba kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, tibaja kukwita, n'ekibuga kino tibaja kukyokya muliro. Baja kukuleka iwe n'ab'omu maka go musigale nga mukaali balamu." 
Jeremiah38:18 Aye bw'onaaloba okweghaayo eri abakungu ba kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, Musengwa Katonda aja kughaayo ekibuga kino eri Abababilonia bakyokye omuliro, era n'iwe weena olobe kubawona.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Aye kyabazinga yairamu ati: “Nze ntya Bayudaaya banaife abaamala okweghaayo ni baira ku luuyi lw'Abababilonia. Abababilonia basobola okumpaayo eri Abayudaaya abo bandeetera okulumizibwa nga bandaazadaaza.” 
Jeremiah38:20 Nze naamukoba nti: “Abababilonia tibaidha kukuwaayo eri Bayudaaya abo. Nkweghembye gondera obukwenda bwa Musengwa Katonda bwe ndi kukukobera, olwo byonabyona biidha kukujiira bukalamu era baidha kukuleka osigale ng'okaali mulamu." 
Jeremiah38:21 Aye bw'onaaloba okweghaayo, bino n'ebija okukutuukaku Musengwa Katonda bye yandholeka mu kubonekerwa:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Mu kubonekerwa okwo nabona abakazi boonaboona abaali basigaire mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, ng'abaisirukale bali kubatwalira abakungu ba kyabazinga w'e Babilonia. Era nga bali kuja bwe bakoba bati, ‘Bakagwa ba kyabazinga be yeesiganga n'abaamubuzaabuza, baamuwubisawubisa; mpegaano bwe baboine ng'atubiire mu bitosi bamulekuliire bw'agho.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:23 Agho naayongeraku kino nti: “Abaisirukale baja kutoola bakazi bo boonaboona n'abaana bo, babatwale e Babilonia. N'iwe mwene toja kubawona, baja kukugema bakugheeyo eri kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, n'ekibuga kino bakyokye omuliro.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Agho Zedekia yankoba ati: “Otamanhisaaku muntu yeenayeena ku bibono ebyo, olwo ezira kabi kanaakutuukaku." 
Jeremiah38:25 Abakungu bwe banaawulira nga ndhogeire n'iwe, baidha kwidha bakubuuze kye twogeire, nga bakusuubiza obutakwita bw'onaabakobera byonabyona." 
Jeremiah38:26 Aye iwe bakobe bukobe oti obaire oli kuneeghemba ndobe kukwizaayo kukusibira mu ndhu ya Yonathani, na kufiira eyo.”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Agho abakungu boonaboona baidha bambuuza, era zeena naabakobera byenebyene kyabazinga bye yankoba okubakoba. Kale bandeka, ghazira muntu yawuliraku bye twayogera." 
Jeremiah38:28 Agho nze bankuumira mu luya olw'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, okutuusa ku lunaku abazigu lwe baagema Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah39:1 Mu mwezi ogweikumi ogw'omwaka ogwomwenda nga Zedekia ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia yaidha n'eigye lye lyonalyona, yaalumba Yerusalemu, yaakizingiza okukyezunguluza." 
Jeremiah39:2 Ku lunaku olwomwenda olw'omwezi ogwokuna, mu mwaka gwa Zedekia ogweikumi n'omulala nga ni kyabazinga, Abababilonia abo baawomola ekituli mu kimante ky'ekibuga." 
Jeremiah39:3 Bwe baamala okugema Yerusalemu, abakungu abakulu boonaboona aba kyabazinga w'e Babilonia bangira baatyama mu bifo ebyali ku gwetebwa Omulyango Ogwaghagati. Abakungu abo nga ni bano: Nerugali Sharezeri, Shamugari Nebo, Sarasekimu Rabusarisi, ni Nerugali Sharezeri owundi." 
Jeremiah39:4 Kyabazinga Zedekia n'abaisirukale be boonaboona bwe baabona ebigwiregho, baalumuka bave mu kibuga obwire. Baagema engira ebitira mu nimiro ya kyabazinga, baabita mu mulyango oguyimba ebimante ebibiri, baaja nga boolekeire ekiiko ekirimu omwiga Yorudani." 
Jeremiah39:5 Aye eigye ery'Abababilonia lyababingirira, lyagemera Zedekia mu biketezo eby'oku museetwe kumpi n'e Yeriko. Baamutwala ye kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ng'ali mu kibuga Ribula mu kiketezo ky'e Hamathi, era Nebukadinezzari oyo yaamusalira eyo omusango okumusinga." 
Jeremiah39:6 Era yeene eyo e Ribula, kyabazinga w'e Babilonia oyo ye yaitira batabane ba Zedekia nga ni Zedekia mwene alingiriire. Yaita n'abakungu ba Buyudaaya boonaboona." 
Jeremiah39:7 Bwe yamala, yaalagira baatundulamu Zedekia amaiso era baamusiba ku ndhegere okumutwala e Babilonia." 
Jeremiah39:8 Era Abababilonia baayokya ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, n'endhu dh'abantu, n'ekimante eky'oku kibuga Yerusalemu baakikontakontagho." 
Jeremiah39:9 Agho Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abaisirukale Abababilonia yaatwala e Babilonia mu bunhage, abantu abaali basigaire mu kibuga, n'abo abaali beeghaireyo ni baira ku luuyi lwa kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, era n'abandi boonaboona." 
Jeremiah39:10 Yaaleka mu Buyudaaya abandi ku bantu abaavu einho abazira ke bali nako, yaabagha amasamba ag'emizabbibu n'ebibandha." 
Jeremiah39:11 Agho kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia yaalagira Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abaisirukale ati: 
Jeremiah39:12 “Muje mubone Yeremia gh'ali era mumulabirire bulungi. Mutamukola kabi koonakoona, aye mumukolere kyonakyona ky'ayenda.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Kale Nebuzaradani oyo ng'ali ghalala n'abakungu, Nebushazibani Rabusarisi ni Nerugali Sharezeri, n'abakungu ba kyabazinga w'e Babilonia abandi," 
Jeremiah39:14 bandhetesa bantoolayo mu luya olw'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Bangemya Gedalia mutabane wa Ahikamu era mwidhukulu wa Shafani, antwale ewange. Kale naasigala nga ndi mu bantu be bataatwala Babilonia mu bunhage." 
Jeremiah39:15 Bwe baali nga bakansibiire mu luya olw'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, Musengwa Katonda yankoba" 
Jeremiah39:16 okukobera Ebedimeleki Omwethiopia nti: “Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati, ‘Bona eno, ndituukiriza bye neesoomera ekibuga kino, naakireetera okuzikirira mu kifo ky'okukireetera ebintu okukijiiranga obukalamu. Ekyo ghe kiribeeragho, weena olibaagho waakibona." 
Jeremiah39:17 Aye nze Musengwa Katonda ndikukuuma, naaloba kukughaayo eri abantu abo b'otya" 
Jeremiah39:18 Bwenebwene ndikuwonia baaloba kukwita, waawoniagho obulamu bwo olw'okuneesiga. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.’ ”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, nga Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abaisirukale amaze okunsibulula mu ikomera e Rama. Eyo baali bantwaireyo nga bansibye ku ndhegere, ghalala n'abantu boonaboona abaatoolebwa mu Yerusalemu ni mu Buyudaaya nga bali kutwalibwa e Babilonia mu bunhage." 
Jeremiah40:2 Omukulu w'abaisirukale oyo yandhiza gha mbali, yankoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda wo yeesoomera okuleetera ensi eno okuzikirira." 
Jeremiah40:3 Era mperaano akituukiriiza kye yakoba okukola. Ebyo byonabyona bibairegho, lwa kuba abantu bo baakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda era baamudheemera." 
Jeremiah40:4 Bona, mperaano ndi kukusibululaku endhegere dhino ku mikono obe wa idembe. Bw'oba oyenda okuja ninze e Babilonia, idha tuje, era ndidha kukulabiriranga bulungi. Aye bw'oba toyenda kuja, otaidha. Bona, ensi yoonayoona eri agho ekuteegereire. Londaku gh'oyenda okuja woonawoona, oje.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Agho yankoba ati: “Bw'oba ng'onaasigala, irayo ye Gedalia mutabane wa Ahikamu era mwidhukulu wa Shafani, kyabazinga w'e Babilonia ye yagha okufuga Buyudaaya. Osobola okusigala n'oyo, olwo waaba ng'osigaire mu bantu be bataatwala Babilonia mu bunhage, oba okuja aghandi woonawoona gh'oyenda okuja.” Agho omukulu w'abaisirukale oyo yampa eby'okulya era yampa n'ekirabo, memale yandeka naaja." 
Jeremiah40:6 Naaja ye Gedalia e Mizipa, naabanga eyo ghalala naye mu bantu be bataatwala Babilonia mu bunhage." 
Jeremiah40:7 Ghaaligho abandi ku bakulu mu magye ga Buyudaaya n'abaisirukale baibwe abaali mu irungu, nga bakaali kweghaayo kwira ku luuyi lwa kyabazinga w'e Babilonia. Bwe baawulira nga kyabazinga w'e Babilonia aghaire Gedalia mutabane wa Ahikamu okufuga ensi yaibwe n'abantu boonaboona abasembayo okuba abaavu abataatwalibwa Babilonia mu bunhage, baidha eri Gedalia oyo e Mizipa." 
Jeremiah40:8 Abaidha baali bano: Ishimaeli mutabane wa Nethania, ni Yohanani mutabane wa Karea, ni Seraia mutabane wa Tanhumethi, ni batabane ba Efai ow'e Netofa, ni Yezania mutabane w'omusaadha ow'e Maaka. Era baidha nga bali ghalala n'abaisirukale baibwe." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedalia yaabalayirira ghalala n'abaisirukale baibwe, ng'akoba ati: “Mutatya kugheereza Bababilonia. Imwe musigale mu nsi eno mugheereze bugheereze kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, byonabyona biidha kubajiira bukalamu." 
Jeremiah40:10 Nze mwene ndidha kuba e Mizipa nsobole okuboogereragho imwe nga Abababilonia baidhie ye tuli. Aye imwe muje mube mu byalo byaimwe, musoloze era mutereke omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'ebibala eby'ekyengera, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Mu nsambo n'endala, Abayudaaya abandi abaali mu Moabu, ni mu Ammoni, ni mu Edomu, ni mu nsi edhindi, baawulira nga kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia yaganha Abayudaaya abandi okusigala mu Buyudaaya era nga Gedalia ni ye yabagha okubafuga." 
Jeremiah40:12 Kale baava eyo yoonayoona ye baali basansaaniire, baira mu Buyudaaya. Baaja e Mizipa ye Gedalia era baasoloza omwenge ogw'emizabbibu n'ebibala eby'ekyengera kamaala." 
Jeremiah40:13 Agho Yohanani mutabane wa Karea, n'abakulu ab'abaisirukale abaali mu irungu abaaloba okweghaayo okwira ku luuyi lwa kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, baidha ye Gedalia e Mizipa." 
Jeremiah40:14 Baakoba Gedalia bati: “Oidhi nga kyabazinga Baalisi owa Ammoni yatuma Ishimaeli aidhe akutemule?” Aye Gedalia yaaloba kukiikiriza. 
Jeremiah40:15 Agho Yohanani yaamukoba mu kyama ati: “Ka nje ndhite Ishimaeli, ghazira aidha kumanha amwise. Lwaki tumuganha okukutemula? Ekyo kiidha kuleetera Abayudaaya boonaboona abeesololeza ghano gh'oli okusansaana, era kireeta akabi ku abo abaasigala mu Buyudaaya boonaboona.”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Aye Gedalia yaamwiramu ati: “Otakikola. Ebyo bye muli kwogera ku Ishimaeli ti bituufu naire.” 
Jeremiah41:1 Mu mwezi ogwomusanvu mu mwaka gwene ogwo, Ishimaeli mutabane wa Nethania era mwidhukulu wa Elishama, nga wa ku lulyo lulangira era nga n'owundi ku bakungu ba kyabazinga abakologho, yaaja n'abantu ikumi eri Gedalia e Mizipa. Bwe baali eyo nga bali kuliira ghalala emere," 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishimaeli ni bale eikumi be yaidha nabo, baasituka, baasowolayo empiima dhaibwe baita Gedalia, kyabazinga w'e Babilonia ye yali aghaire okufuga ensi eyo." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishimaeli era yaita n'Abayudaaya boonaboona abaali ni Gedalia e Mizipa, n'abaisirukale Abababilonia abaali agho mu kiseera ekyo." 
Jeremiah41:4 Olunaku olwairirira, nga kikaali kumanhikana nga batemwire Gedalia," 
Jeremiah41:5 abasaadha kinaana baatuuka nga bava e Shekemu, n'e Shilo, n'e Samaria. Baali basazeeku ebirevu byaibwe, nga bakanwire ebivaalo byaibwe, era nga beesazesaze n'emisale ku mubiri. Baali baleese emere ey'empeke n'obubbaani mu isinzizo, ng'ebigheebwayo." 
Jeremiah41:6 Agho Ishimaeli yava e Mizipa, yaaja okubasangaaza ng'ali kulira amaziga. Bwe yabatuukaku yaabakoba ati: “Mukole muje mungire, mubone ku Gedalia.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Olwangira mu kibuga bati, nga Ishimaeli n'abasaadha be yali nabo baatoolera okubaita, nga bwe basuula emirambo gyaibwe mu nsulo." 
Jeremiah41:8 Aye mu abo mwalimu abasaadha ikumi abaakoba Ishimaeli bati: “Tukweghembye otatwita! Tuli n'engaano, ni sayiri, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, n'omudheenene ogw'endhuki, era twabikwese mu nimiro.” Kale abo yaabaleka, yaaloba kubaita." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ensulo Ishimaeli ye yasuulamu emirambo egy'abasaadha be yaita, yali nga n'ere enene kyabazinga Asa owa Buyudaaya ye yasima, bweyalumbibwa kyabazinga Baasha owa Isiraeli. Ishimaeli yaidhuza ensulo eyo emirambo." 
Jeremiah41:10 Agho baghala ba kyabazinga n'abantu abandi abaali bakaasigairegho e Mizipa, Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abaisirukale be yali agemiisa Gedalia abalabirire, Ishimaeli yaabatwala ng'abasibe, yaasimbira ku luuyi olw'ekiketezo kya Ammoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Agho Yohanani mutabane wa Karea, n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale boonaboona be yali nabo, baawulira obutemo obwo Ishimaeli bwe yakola." 
Jeremiah41:12 Kale baaja n'abalwani baibwe boonaboona, baamubingirira era baamwagaana kumpi n'ekidiba ekinene ekiri e Gibeoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Abantu Ishimaeli be yali ali kutwala ng'abasibe, bwe baabona Yohanani n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale boonaboona be yali nabo, baasangaala" 
Jeremiah41:14 era baakyuka baalumuka okwira ye bali. 
Jeremiah41:15 Aye Ishimaeli n'abasaadha be munaana, baalumukira mu kiketezo kya Ammoni, baawona." 
Jeremiah41:16 Agho Yohanani n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale boonaboona be yali nabo, baalabirira abantu Ishimaeli be yali atoire e Mizipa ng'abasibe, ng'amaze okutemula Gedalia. Mu abo mwalimu, abaisirukale, n'abakazi, n'abaana, n'abagheereza. Kale baabaiza okuva e Gibeoni." 
Jeremiah41:17 Baaja baabaaku e Geruthi Kimuhamu, okumpi n'e Bethelehemu nga beetegeka okuja e Misiri." 
Jeremiah41:18 Baayenda okuja e Misiri olw'okutya Abababilonia, kuba Ishimaeli mutabane wa Nethania yatemula Gedalia mutabane wa Ahikamu, kyabazinga w'e Babilonia ye yali aghaire okufuga Buyudaaya." 
Jeremiah42:1 Agho abakulu ab'ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale boonaboona, ni Yohanani mutabane wa Karea, ni Azaria mutabane wa Hoshaia, n'abantu abandi boonaboona okuviira irala ku basembayo ghansi okutuukira irala ku babbede beene, baidha" 
Jeremiah42:2 ye ndi nze Yeremia. Bankoba bati: “Tukweghembye ganha otukolere kye tuja okukusaba! Tusabire eri Musengwa Katonda waife. Tusabire ife twenatwena abaawonagho, kuba eira twali abantu kamaala, aye mpegaano nga bw'obona twasigala batono bati." 
Jeremiah42:3 Tusabire eri Musengwa Katonda waife atwoleke engira yetube tugeme, era atukobere kyetube tukole.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Nze naabairamu nti: “Bye mukobye mbiwuliire. Bwenebwene ndidha kusaba Musengwa Katonda waife, nga bwe munsabye. Era by'anankoba byonabyona ndidha kubibakobera, aghazira okulekayo waire ekirala kiti.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Agho bankoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda mwene n'ab'abe omudhulizi omutuufu era ow'amazima atulumiriza omusango, bwe tulobanga okugondera ebiragiro byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waife oyo by'anaakutuma okutukobera." 
Jeremiah42:6 Oba binaatusanhusa oba tibiitusanhuse, twidha kugondera Musengwa Katonda waife ye tuli kukukoba otusabire y'ali. Memale ebintu bisobole okutujiiranga obukalamu.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Nga ghabiseegho enaku ikumi, Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze." 
Jeremiah42:8 Kale naayeta Yohanani, n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale boonaboona abaali naye, n'abantu abandi boonaboona okuviira irala ku basembayo ghansi okutuukira irala ku babbede." 
Jeremiah42:9 Naabakoba nti: “Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli ye mwantuma okubasabira y'ali, akoba ati," 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Bwe muliganha okubanga mu nsi eno, ndibazimba mu kifo ky'okubasansula, era naabasimba mu kifo ky'okubaiwululagho kuba nnakughaire inho olw'akabi ke nabatuusaaku." 
Jeremiah42:11 Mulekere agho okutya kyabazinga w'e Babilonia. Nze ndi n'imwe era ndidha kubatoola mu ngalo dhe mbawonie. 
Jeremiah42:12 Nga nze mwene bwendi ow'ekivunika, yeena ndimuleetera okubagemerwa ekivunika, yaabaleka mwasigala mu nsi yaimwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.’" 
Jeremiah42:13 “Aye bwe muloba okuwulira kye ndi kubakoba, nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ni mukoba mule muti, ‘Titwidha kusigala mu Buyudaaya." 
Jeremiah42:14 Ka twejiire e Misiri tube eyo, tulobe kubona ntalo, waire okuwulira amagwala agalaalika entalo, oba waire okufa endhala olw'okubulwa emere’," 
Jeremiah42:15 imwe abaawonagho mu Buyudaaya abali n'endowooza eyo, muwulire Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, bw'akoba: Akoba ati, ‘Oba nga muli bamalirivu okuja e Misiri okuba eyo," 
Jeremiah42:16 mumanhe ng'entalo dhe mutya dhiribaagaana eyo. N'endhala ye muli kulumuka eribanonereza, era mulifiira eyo e Misiri." 
Jeremiah42:17 Abantu boonaboona abamaliriire okuja okuba e Misiri, balifiira eyo mu ntalo, oba baafa endhala, oba baafa endwaire ya kawumpuli. Ghazira naire omulala ati ku abo aliwonagho. Ghazira naire omulala ati ku abo aliwona akabi ke ndibasindikira.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati, ‘Nga bwe namalira obusungu bwange n'ekiruyi kyange ku bantu b'omu Yerusalemu, era ntyo bwe ndibimalira ni ku imwe, bwe musalagho okuja e Misiri. Mulifuuka ekintu ekitiisa einho, abantu baaboogerangaku nga babayeeyereza bwe babavuma. Era balikozesanga eriina lyaimwe ng'ekikolimo. Era timuliira kabiri mu Buyudaaya naire.’”" 
Jeremiah42:19 “Imwe abaawonagho mu Buyudaaya, Musengwa Katonda abakobye ati, ‘Mutaja Misiri.’ Kale ni mumanhire irala nga nze Yeremia mbalabwire nti," 
Jeremiah42:20 munaaba mukoze ekisobyo ekija okubaitisa kuba mwantuma okubasabira ye Musengwa Katonda waife, nga mukoba muti, ‘Tusabire ye Musengwa Katonda waife, era buli ky'anairamu okitukobere ife. Era twidha kukikola.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Aye waire nga mpegaano nze ndi kubaidhukiza, imwe muli kudheemera byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waife bye yantuma okubakobera." 
Jeremiah42:22 Kale ni mukimanhire irala muti muja kufiira mu ntalo, oba okufa endhala, oba okufa endwaire ya kawumpuli, eyo mu nsi ye muli kwenda okuja okuba.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Bwe namala okukobera abantu ebyo byonabyona Musengwa Katonda waibwe bye yantuma okubakobera," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azaria mutabane wa Hoshaia, ni Yohanani mutabane wa Karea, n'abasaadha abandi abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu, bankoba bati: “Oli kulimba. Musengwa Katonda waife tiyakutuma iwe kwidha kutukoba tulobe kuja mu Misiri kuba eyo." 
Jeremiah43:3 Aye Baruku mutabane wa Neria n'akupikiriiza otute mu ngalo dh'Abababilonia, basobole okutwita oba okututwala e Babilonia mu bunhage.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Kale Yohanani, n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale boonaboona, era n'abantu abandi boonaboona, baaloba kugondera kiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda eky'okusigala mu Buyudaaya." 
Jeremiah43:5 Era Yohanani n'abakulu ab'ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale boonaboona, baatwala e Misiri abantu boonaboona abaali basigaire mu Buyudaaya, ghalala n'abo boonaboona abaali baize okuva mu maghanga ye baali basansaaniire." 
Jeremiah43:6 Mu abo mwalimu abasaadha, n'abakazi, n'abaana, ni baghala ba kyabazinga, n'abantu abandi boonaboona Nebuzaradani omukulu w'abaisirukale Abababilonia, be yali agemiisa Gedalia okubalabirira. Era mu abo baatwaliramu ni Baruku, ninze." 
Jeremiah43:7 Kale baadheemera batyo ekiragiro kya Musengwa Katonda, baaja e Misiri era baatuukira irala ere mu kibuga ekyetebwa Tahapanhesi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Bwe twali nga tuli eyo e Tahapanhesi, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati:" 
Jeremiah43:9 “Toola amabaale amanene ng'abandi ku Bayudaaya babona, ogaziike ogakweke mu nkokoto, ghansi agh'amabaale ge baayaliira agali gha mulyango ogw'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga ekya ghano e Tahapanhesi." 
Jeremiah43:10 Memale obakobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, ndyetesa ghano omugheereza wange Nebukadinezzari kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia. Yaidha yaata ekityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga ghano ku mabaale gano ge nziise, era yaagasimbaku ni weema ye ey'obwakyabazinga." 
Jeremiah43:11 Nebukadinezzari oyo aliidha yaalwanisa Misiri era yaagighangula. Abo abaategekerwa okufa endwaire ya kawumpuli balifa endwaire ya kawumpuli, abo abaategekerwa okutwalibwa mu busibe balitwalibwa mu busibe, n'abo abaategekerwa okufiira mu lutalo balifiira mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah43:12 Ndikunaania omuliro ku masabo aga bakatonda b'e Misiri, era kyabazinga w'e Babilonia alyokya bakatonda abo, oba yaababbeeda yaaja nabo. Era ng'omwayi bw'alondalonda ensekere ku kivaalo kye n'adhimaliraku irala, ni kyabazinga w'e Babilonia atyo bw'alirondalonda buli kantu mu nsi Misiri, n'agitukuza. Memale yaatambula yaaja nga ghazira n'amukobaku." 
Jeremiah43:13 Kyabazinga oyo alimenhamenha empango dh'amabaale edh'ebiidhukizo edhiri e Heliopoli mu nsi Misiri, era yaayokya n'amasabo ga bakatonda baayo.”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze ku bigema ku Baisiraeli boonaboona abaali nga baba mu nsi Misiri, mu bibuga Migidoli, Tahapanhesi, ni Menfisi, ni mu biketezo ebiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba bwa Misiri." 
Jeremiah44:2 Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, yaakoba ati: “Imwe beene mwabona bukalamu akabi ke natuusa ku Yerusalemu, ni ku bibuga ebindi eby'omu Buyudaaya byonabyona. Ni ye buli eno byasigala agho bityo nga biri bifulukwa byereere omutaba bantu," 
Jeremiah44:3 olw'okuba abantu baamu baakola ebibi bandeetera okusungughala baaniokezanga bakatonda abandi obubbaani, era baasinzanga bakatonda abo, beene waire badhaadha baibwe, be baali nga tibasinzangaku naire." 
Jeremiah44:4 Ate nga natumanga ye muli abagheereza bange abalanzi aghazira kukoogha naire, babakobe bati, ‘Mutakola bintu ebyo ebyenhinhalwa bye nkyagha!’" 
Jeremiah44:5 Aye nga imwe timuwulira waire okufaayo. Mukyuke muve mu kibi kyaimwe eky'okuniokezanga bakatonda abandi obubbaani. 
Jeremiah44:6 Kyenava ni mmalira obusungu bwange n'ekiruyi kyange ku bibuga by'omu Buyudaaya, ni mu nguudo dh'omu Yerusalemu. Naabikunaaniaku omuliro, byasigala agho bityo nga bifuuse bifulukwa byereere, nga bwe bikaali ni ye buli eno." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, mperaano ndi kubabuuza lwaki muli kwereetaku akabi akaaga agho. Lwaki muli kwenda okuzikiriza abasaadha, n'abakazi, n'abaana abato, n'abaghere, ghalobe kuwonagho waire omulala ati ku bantu baimwe?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Lwaki munsungughaza n'ebyo bye mukola, nga muniokeza obubbaani bakatonda ab'omu nsi Misiri ye mwaja okuba? Lwaki muli kukola ebyo okwereetera imwe beene okuzikirira, n'okuleetera abamaghanga agandi okuboogerangaku imwe nga babayeeyereza era nga bwebabakolimira?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Mwerabiire ebikolwa ebibi badhaadha baimwe, ni bakyabazinga ab'omu Buyudaaya ni bakazi baibwe bye baakolanga, era n'imwe beene ni bakazi baimwe bye mwakolanga mu bibuga eby'omu Buyudaaya ni ku nguudo edh'omu Yerusalemu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Aye ni ye buli eno timwegangaku kwewombeeka mu maiso gange, waire okuntya, oba waire okwebisa nga mujiira ku mateeka ge nabagha, imwe ni badhaadha baimwe." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, nja kubeefuulira nzikirize Buyudaaya yoonayoona." 
Jeremiah44:12 Abantu boonaboona abaali bawoniegho mu Buyudaaya, aye ni basalagho nga bamaliriire okuja okuba mu nsi Misiri, ndibaleetera boonaboona okuzikiribwa. Okuviira irala ku basembayo ghansi okutuukira irala ku babbede beene, balifiira mu nsi Misiri, nga babaitira mu ntalo oba nga bafa endhala. Balifuuka ekintu ekitiisa einho, abantu baaboogerangaku nga babayeeyereza bwe babavuma. Era abantu balikozesanga eriina lyaibwe ng'ekikolimo." 
Jeremiah44:13 Ndibonereza abantu abo ababa mu nsi Misiri, ng'oti bwe nabonereza ab'omu Yerusalemu, nga nkozesa olutalo, n'endhala, n'endwaire ya kawumpuli." 
Jeremiah44:14 Ku bantu b'omu Buyudaaya abaali bawoniegho ni baja okuba mu nsi Misiri, tikulibaaku waire omulala ati aja okuwonagho oba okusigalagho. Tikulibaaku aliirayo mu Buyudaaya ye beegomba okwira babe eyo. Tikulibaaku aliirayo okutoolaku abatono bati, abalirumuka ni bawonagho.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Agho abasaadha boonaboona abaamanha nga bakazi baibwe baaniokezanga bakatonda obubbaani, n'abakazi boonaboona abaali beesoloiza nga beemereire agho, ghalala n'Abaisiraeli kamaala abaali nga baba mu biketezo bya Misiri ebiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, bankoba bati:" 
Jeremiah44:16 “Ife tulobye, titwenda kuwulira by'oli kutukoba mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda." 
Jeremiah44:17 Twidha kwongera okukolanga byonabyona bye tweyama okukola. Twidha kuniokezanga obubbaani omusambwa gwaife omukazi, ogwetebwa Kyabazinga Omukazi ow'Eigulu, era twidha kugughanga ebigheebwayo ebifukibwa. Ebyo twidha kubikolanga, ng'oti niife beene bwe twabikolanga, era ng'oti ni badhaadha baife, ni bakyabazinga baife, n'abakungu baife, bwebaabikolanga mu bibuga eby'e Buyudaaya ni mu nguudo edh'omu Yerusalemu kuba mu biseera ebyo twabanga n'emere kamaala, nga buli kintu kitujiira bukalamu, era nga tuzira bizibu naire." 
Jeremiah44:18 Aye okuvanga lwe twalekera okuniokeza obubbaani omusambwa Kyabazinga Omukazi ow'Eigulu ogwo, ni tulekera n'okugughanga ebigheebwayo ebifukibwa, ghazira ke tukaafunayo, n'abantu baife abandi bafiiriire mu ntalo, n'abandi baafa endhala.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Abakazi baayongeraku bati: “Bwe twafumbanga emigaati nga gikoleibwa mu kifaananie ky'omusambwa Kyabazinga Omukazi ow'Eigulu ogwo, era ni tugughanga ebigheebwayo ebifukibwa, baibaife baasiimanga bye twakolanga.”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Agho naakoba abasaadha boonaboona n'abakazi boonaboona abandhiramu batyo, nti:" 
Jeremiah44:21 “Obubbaani imwe beene bwe mwaniokezanga, era ni badhaadha baimwe, ni bakyabazinga baimwe, n'abakungu baimwe, bwe baaniokezanga mu bibuga eby'e Buyudaaya ni mu nguudo edh'omu Yerusalemu, mulowooza muti Musengwa Katonda tiyabimanha, oba muti yabyerabira?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Ni ye buli eno ensi yaimwe yaasigala agho etyo ng'eri bifulukwa byereere omutaba bantu. Era abantu bagivumirira, baakozesa n'eriina lyayo ng'ekikolimo. Olw'okuba Musengwa Katonda yali tasobola kuguminkiriza bikolwa byaimwe ebibi ebyenhinhalwa." 
Jeremiah44:23 Kano akabi akabatuuseeku mpegaano, kaligho lwa kuba mwaniokeza obubbaani bakatonda abandi, mwasungughaza Musengwa Katonda nga muloba okujiira ku mateeka ge ni ku biragiro bye byonabyona.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Era naakobera abantu boonaboona, n'okusingira irala abakazi, ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yakoba abantu b'omu Buyudaaya abaali nga baba mu nsi Misiri mu kiseera ekyo." 
Jeremiah44:25 Naakoba nti Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati: “Imwe ni bakazi baimwe mweyamye y'omusambwa Kyabazinga Omukazi ow'Eigulu, nga bwenebwene mwidha kuguniokezanga obubbaani era mugughenga n'ebigheebwayo ebifukibwa. Kale, mutyo mukole bye musuubiiza, mutuukirize ebyo bye mweyamye!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Aye mperaano, muwulire nze Musengwa Katonda kye neeyamye eri imwe mwenamwena Abaisiraeli abali mu Misiri. Neeyamye mu liina lyange ery'amaani nti tija kuganha muntu waire omulala ati ku imwe, okwirayo okukozesa eriina lyange mu kulayira, ng'akoba ati, ‘Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu.’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Ndibatuusaaku okuzikirira, mu kifo ky'okubaleetera ebintu okubajiiranga obukalamu. Mwenamwena mulifa, ng'abandi bafiira mu ntalo ate abandi baafa endhala, okutuusa nga mwenamwena muweekereiregho." 
Jeremiah44:28 Aye ghalibaagho abatono bati ku imwe abaliwona okufa, ni bava e Misiri ni baira mu Buyudaaya. Olwo abo abaliwonagho balimanha oba nga ebibono ebyange n'ebituukiriire, oba ebyaibwe." 
Jeremiah44:29 Nze Musengwa Katonda nja kubagha obukakafu obulaga nga ndibabonereza mu kifo kino, era obulaga ng'okuzikirira kwe nabeesoomera okubatuusaaku ndikutuukiriza." 
Jeremiah44:30 Ndighaayo kyabazinga Hofura ow'e Misiri mu ngalo edh'abazigu be abenda okumwita, ng'oti ni bwe naghaayo kyabazinga Zedekia ow'e Buyudaaya mu ngalo dha kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia, eyali omuzigu we era ng'ayenda okumwita.”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Yehoiakimu mutabane wa Yosia ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, nze Yeremia naakoba Baruku mutabane wa Neria, yaaghandiika ebibono bino byonabyona nga bwe nabyogera. Era naamukoba nti," 
Jeremiah45:2 Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati: “Baruku," 
Jeremiah45:3 oli kukoba oti, ‘Nkagwireku, Musengwa Katonda andeeteire enaku okwongereza ku bulumi bwe ndi nabwo. Mpoiremu olw'okusinda einho. Nzira ghe mpuumuliraku naire!’" 
Jeremiah45:4 “Aye nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti, ndi kumenhamenhagho kye nazimba era ndi kwiwululagho kye nasimba. Era nja kukola ntyo ensi eno yoonayoona." 
Jeremiah45:5 Obwo iwe oli kwenda obisibwe mu nsambo ey'endhawulo? Busa naire, ebyo biveeku. Ndidha kuleeta akabi ku bantu boonaboona. Aye iwe weesuneku, kuba oidha kuwoniangagho obulamu bwo, eyo yoonayoona y'olija. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze ebigema ku maghanga," 
Jeremiah46:2 ng'atoolera ni Misiri. Bino bye yayogera ku igye lya kyabazinga Neko ow'e Misiri, Nebukadinezzari kyabazinga w'e Babilonia lye yaghangulira e Karikemishi okumpi n'omwiga Eufurate, mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Yehoiakimu ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Abaduumizi Abamisiri baakaabuka bati, ‘Mugeme engabo dhaimwe enene n'entono, mwetegekere okuja mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah46:4 Imwe abavuzi b'embalaasi, musibe ebigaali byaimwe eby'omu lutalo ku mbalaasi dhaimwe. Mughagale amafumo gaimwe, muvaale enkuufiira dhaimwe edh'ekyuma, n'ebivaalo eby'omu kifuba eby'ekyuma. Muniine ku bigaali eby'omu lutalo ebyo, musimbe enhiriri.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:5 Aye Musengwa Katonda yeebuuza ati: “Kiki kye ndi kubona? Batiire inho era bali kwira einhuma! Abalwani baibwe ab'amaani baghangwirwa, baaziinhuuka embiro nga bagwidhubana, aghazira kulinga na inhuma. Era buli ghantu ghali ntiisa ndhereere!" 
Jeremiah46:6 Ni bale abasinga kuziinhuuka mbiro tibasobola kulumukagho; abalwani ab'amaani abo tibasobola okwewonia. Ere ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, okumpi n'omwiga Eufurate, bagangaliime baagwa." 
Jeremiah46:7 Naani ono ali kusituka ng'oti kwefuukuula kwa mwiga Kiyira, ng'oti n'omwiga ogwidhwire ni gubanda?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ensi Misiri n'eri kusituka ng'oti kwefuukuula kwa mwiga Kiyira, ng'oti n'omwiga ogwidhwire ni gubanda. Ensi eyo Misiri n'eyakoba eti, ‘Ndidha kusituka ng'oti kwefuukuula kwa mwiga Kiyira, mmaamire ensi yoonayoona. Era nzikirize ebibuga n'abantu ababibaamu." 
Jeremiah46:9 Muduumire embalaasi dhije dhirumbe, n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo biwuluguke embiro! Imwe abalwanisa engabo ab'e Ethiopia n'ab'e Puti, muje mulumbe. N'imwe abakugu mu kulasa obusaale ab'e Ludi, muje mulumbe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:10 Luno n'olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda afuga Amagye, olunaku olw'okwesasuuza nga yeesasuuliza ku bazigu be. Empiima ye eja kubalya eigute, era enhwe omusaayi gwaibwe okutuusa ku nkooye; kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye aja kubaghaayo ng'oti musengo, ere mu nsi eri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba kumpi n'omwiga Eufurate." 
Jeremiah46:11 Imwe abantu ab'omu Misiri, muje e Gileadi mufuneyooku ku bulezi obuwonia! Mukozeisa obulezi ebika n'ebika aye nga tibukola. Timukaasobola kuwonezebwa." 
Jeremiah46:12 Amaghanga kamaala gaawulira bwemwaswala, buli muntu yaabawulira nga mulira amaziga. Abalwani baabandagana beene na beene, boonaboona baagwa ghansi." 
Jeremiah46:13 Kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia bwe yaidha okulumba Misiri, Musengwa Katonda yayogera ninze. Yankoba ati:" 
Jeremiah46:14 “Mulangirire mu nsi Misiri ni mu bibuga byamu, Migidoli, Menfisi, ni Tahapanhesi, muti, ‘Mwetegeke okwerwanaku. Byonabyona bye muli nabyo baja kubizikiriza mu lutalo." 
Jeremiah46:15 Lwaki Apisi katonda waimwe ow'amaani yagwa? Lwa kuba Musengwa Katonda yamukuba yaamugwisa ghansi.’ 
Jeremiah46:16 Abalwani baimwe baagangalima baagwa, buli muntu yaakoba mwine ati, ‘Situka, tuje eka y'abantu baife, tulumuke empiima y'omuzigu.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Mutuume kyabazinga wa Misiri eriina eiyaaka muti ni, ‘Kyasiikano, ayasiikana obwasiikane. Eyaleka omukisa gwe ni guja obuje gutyo.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ninze kyabazinga, era ninze Katonda omulamu. Ng'olusozi Tabori bwe lweruupiise ghaigulu okusinga ensozi edhindi dhoonadhoona, era ng'olusozi Karumeli bwe lugungumaire ku mbali kw'enhandha, n'amaani g'oyo aja okubalumba imwe gatyo bwe galisinga ag'omuntu owundi yeenayeena." 
Jeremiah46:19 Imwe abantu b'e Misiri, mwetegeke okutwalibwa mu bunhage. Abazigu balizikiriza Menfisi kyafuuka bifulukwa, ghaabulagho omuntu akibaamu." 
Jeremiah46:20 Ensi Misiri eri ng'oti n'ente ento eboneka obulungi, erumbiibwa ekisukuma ekiviire ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba." 
Jeremiah46:21 N'abalwani ba Misiri abapangise boona bali bw'agho batyo, ng'oti n'ente entototo empiite ensavu, ghazira kye basobola kukola. Baalemwa okwesimbagho okulwana, boonaboona baakyuka baalumuka bulumuke; kuba olunaku lwaibwe olw'okubonerezebwa lwali lutuuse, era nga n'olunaku lwaibwe olw'okuzikirira." 
Jeremiah46:22 Abamisiri baalumukagho nga badhwira ng'oti musota, ng'eigye ery'abazigu liri kuseeta. Abazigu balibalumba n'empasa ng'oti n'abantu abaja okutema emiti," 
Jeremiah46:23 baatema ekibira kya Misiri, waire nga kizibirivu inho. Kuba eigye ery'abazigu abo lirimu abalwani kamaala inho abatabalika, abasinga n'enzige obungi." 
Jeremiah46:24 Ndita abantu b'e Misiri mu ngalo dh'abantu ab'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, baabaghangula. Olwo naaleetera Abamisiri abo okuswazibwa. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, akoba ati: “Nja kubonereza Amoni katonda ow'ekibuga Thebesi, ghalala n'ensi Misiri yoonayoona ni bakatonda baayo, era ni bakyabazinga baayo. Nja kutoola kyabazinga wa Misiri n'abo abamwesiga," 
Jeremiah46:26 mbagheeyo y'abo abenda okubaita, mbate mu ngalo dha kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia n'eigye lye. Aye nga ghabiseeghooku entangama, abantu baliirayo baaba mu Misiri nga bwe baalinga eira. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah46:27 “Aye imwe abantu bange Abaisiraeli, mutatya, waire okweraliikirira. Mubone eno, nze ndibanunula naabatoola mu nsi eyo ey'eghala, ensi ye muli ng'abasibe. Muliira ewaimwe mwatyama mwatereera nga muli mu miraala, era nga ghazira kibatiisa naire." 
Jeremiah46:28 Ndi ghalala n'imwe era ndidha kubalokola. Ndidha kuzikiriza amaghanga goonagoona ye nabasansaaniza. Aye imwe tija kubazikiriza. Waire nga tija kubaleka buleke agho nga tibabonereiza, aye era ndibabonereza ekigwaniire nga mbasaasira. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Agho nga kyabazinga wa Misiri akaali kulumba Gaza, Musengwa Katonda yayogera ninze ebigema ku Filisitia." 
Jeremiah47:2 Yaakoba ati: “Bona! Abazigu bali kwesololeza ere ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, nga bali ng'oti n'omwiga oguli kubanda. Baidha kubuutikira ensi n'ebigiriku byonabyona, babuutikire n'ebibuga n'abantu ababibaamu. Abantu baliririra nze mbayambe, buli muntu ali ku nsi aliwowoola amaziga." 
Jeremiah47:3 Baliwulira ebinuulo by'embalaasi nga biri kubbagalya ku itaka, baawulira okupakalania okw'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'okuwoloma okw'enkede dhaabyo. Abazaire tibalikyuka kunona baana baibwe, emikono giribalekuka nga giwoiremu amaani." 
Jeremiah47:4 Ekiseera kituuse eky'okuzikiriza Filisitia, okulekeza obuyambi bwonabwona obukaasigairegho, obuva e Tiro n'e Sidoni. Nze Musengwa Katonda ndizikiriza Abafilisiti abo boonaboona abakaasigairegho abaava ku kizinga Kafutori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Abantu b'e Gaza bamweire enviiri gha mberi ku mitwe gyaibwe gyaba ng'oti gya mpaata, olw'okunakughala! Ab'e Ashikeloni bafiire baasirika. Abanaki abakaasigairegho, balituusa li okwesalasala ku mibiri gyaibwe olw'okunakughala?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Mulirira amaziga muti, ‘Wo empiima ya Musengwa Katonda iwe! Olirekera li okuja ng'osaagha? Irayo mu kiruutu kyo osigale omwo owuumule!’" 
Jeremiah47:7 Aye empiima enaawuumula etya nga ngighaire omulimo ogw'okukola? Ngiragiire okulumba Ashikeloni n'abantu ababa ku mbali kw'enhandha.” 
Jeremiah48:1 Bino Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, by'akoba ku Moabu: “Bakagwireku abantu ab'e Nebo, ekibuga kyaibwe abazigu bakizikiriiza. Kiriathaimu baakigemye, ekifo kyakyo eky'okwewogomamu bakimenhiegho n'abantu baamu baaswazibwa." 
Jeremiah48:2 Ekitiibwa kya Moabu kiwoiregho. Abazigu bagemye ekibuga Heshiboni ye baategekera okuzikiririza eighanga ly'e Moabu eryo. Imwe abantu b'omu kibuga Madimeni, abazigu baidha kubasirisa, amagye gaibwe gaidha kwidha galumbe ekibuga kyaimwe ekyo." 
Jeremiah48:3 Wulira! Abantu ab'e Horonaimu bali kulira bati, ‘Bikolwa bya bukambwe na kuzikiriza n'ebiri buli ghantu byonka.’" 
Jeremiah48:4 Ensi Moabu bagizikiriiza! Wulira abaana baayo bwe balira! 
Jeremiah48:5 Abantu baniinaniina okuja e Luhithi nga bwe balira engira eyo yoonayoona; era baaserengeta okuja e Horonaimu nga bwe bawowoola mu nnaku embitirivu. 
Jeremiah48:6 “Baakoba bati, ‘Mulumuke muwonie obulamu bwaimwe. Muziinhuuke ng'oti n'endogoyi ey'omu irungu!’" 
Jeremiah48:7 Iwe Moabu, eira weesiganga amaani go n'obukombe bwo, aye mpegaano weena baja kukughangula; era katonda wo ayetebwa Kemoshi, baidha kumutwala mu bunhage, ghalala ni bakabona be n'abakungu be." 
Jeremiah48:8 Oyo ali kwidha okuzikiriza, aligwa ku buli kibuga yaakizikiriza, aghazira kulekagho waire ekirala kiti. Alizikiriza ebiiko n'emiseetwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah48:9 Musimire ensi Moabu amagombe, kuba ebulaku katono inho bagizikirize, ebibuga byayo bifuuke bifulukwa byereere, ghabulegho omuntu abibaamu." 
Jeremiah48:10 “Omuntu atakola mulimo gwa Musengwa Katonda na mwoyo mulala akolimirwe! N'oyo alobera empiima ye okwita akolimirwe!” 
Jeremiah48:11 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Abantu b'omu Moabu buliidho babaire nga baba mu miraala, nga bazira kibeeraliikiriza, era nga tibatwalibwangaku mu bunhage. Bali ng'oti n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogulekeibwa agho okulaala, nga ghazira agulengulula kugutoola mu nsugha eno kugufuka mu yindi.
