Akawoowo kaagwo nga tikakyukangaku era nga n'obuwoomi bwagwo tibukendeerangaku naire." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Kale ni ekiseera kiri kwidha ntume abantu, bafuke ere abantu b'omu Moabu ng'oti mwenge gwa mizabbibu. Bagumaliriremu mu nsugha gwonagwona, n'ensugha badhimenhemenhe." 
Jeremiah48:13 Olwo Kemoshi katonda w'Abamoabu, alitoolera okugemya Abamoabu abo ensoni, ng'oti ni Betheli ekifo Abaisiraeli kye beesiganga, bwe kyagemya Abaisiraeli abo ensoni." 
Jeremiah48:14 Imwe ab'e Moabu, lwaki mweyeta ab'amaani era ni mweyeta abalwani abaziramu ntete?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Omuzigu azikiriiza ensi Moabu n'ebibuga byayo. Abaisuka baayo abasingayo okuba ab'amaani babaise. Ninze kyabazinga ayetebwa Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah48:16 Akabi akali kwidhira Moabu kali kumpi, okuzikirira kwayo kuseese." 
Jeremiah48:17 Mulire olw'eighanga eryo imwe abaliriiraine; imwe mwenamwena abaliidhi nga bwe liri eimanhifu, mulire amaziga. Mukobe muti, ‘Obufuzi bwalyo obw'amaani, era obw'ekitiisa babumenhiegho.’" 
Jeremiah48:18 Imwe ababa mu Diboni, muveeyo mu kifo kyaimwe eky'ekitiisa, mwike mutyame ghansi mu nkungu; kuba oyo ow'okuzikiriza Moabu abaidhiire, azikiriiza ebifo byaimwe eby'okwewogomamu, byafuuka bifulukwa byereere." 
Jeremiah48:19 Imwe ababa mu Aroeri, mwemerere ku mbali kw'enguudo muteegerere, mubuuze abo abali kuziinhuuka nga balumuka okwewonia, muti, ‘Kiki ekigwiregho?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Baidha kubairamu bati, ‘Ensi Moabu egwire. Mulire amaziga olw'ensi eyo, kuba eswaziibwa. Muje mulangirire mu biketezo eby'oku mwiga Arunoni, muti Moabu bagizikiriiza!’" 
Jeremiah48:21 “Musengwa Katonda asaliire ebibuga eby'oku museetwe omusango gwabisinga. Ebibuga ebyo ni bino: Holoni, Yahaza, Mefaathi," 
Jeremiah48:22 Diboni, Nebo, Bethi Dibulathaimu," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriathaimu, Bethigamuli, Bethimeoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriothi, Bozira, n'ebibuga byonabyona eby'omu nsi Moabu eby'okumpi n'eghala." 
Jeremiah48:25 Amaani ag'ensi Moabu gatyankiriirwa, n'obuyinza bwayo bwazikirizibwa. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah48:26 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Mutamiize Moabu, etuuke n'okwegalangula mu biseseme byayo, kuba yandheemera. Olwo efuuke enseko dh'abalamu." 
Jeremiah48:27 Iwe Moabu, lwaki mwasekerera Abaisiraeli? Lwaki mwababisa ng'oti ni be mugemeire mu kikuukuulu eky'abaibi nga bali kunhagulula?" 
Jeremiah48:28 “Imwe abantu b'e Moabu, muve mu bibuga byaimwe, muje mubenga mu mbaalebaale. Mube ng'oti mayemba agazimba mu ndhatika edhiba mu gabaale." 
Jeremiah48:29 Nawulira abantu b'e Moabu nga bwe beekuluntaza. Beekuluntaza inho, beetwala okuba aba ghaigulu, beedundeeza, beedunkumaza, era beebona inho bonka." 
Jeremiah48:30 Nze Musengwa Katonda ndidhi okwekuluntaza kwaibwe. Bye beesuuta nabyo biziramu makulu. Ni bye bakola biziramu nsa. 
Jeremiah48:31 Kale ni ndidha kulira amaziga olw'ensi Moabu, mpowoole olw'abantu boonaboona ab'e Moabu, era ngegenge olw'abantu b'e Kiriheresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ndidha kulira abantu b'e Sibuma okusingaku bwe ndira abantu b'e Yazeri. Iwe ekibuga Sibuma, oli ng'oti muzabbibu oguli n'ensaga endeeyiriri edhituuka ku Nhandha Eyomuunhu, ni dhituukira irala n'e Yazeri. Aye mperaano ole azikiriza agwire mu bibala byaimwe eby'ekyengera n'emizabbibu gyaimwe, yaabizikiriza." 
Jeremiah48:33 Ntoiregho okusangaala n'okusagamba mu nsi engimu ey'e Moabu. Era naalekeza omwenge ogw'emizabbibu okudhuluudha okuva mu bikunhiro eby'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Tighakaaligho bakunha mwenge gwa mizabbibu nga bwe baasiikana olw'eisanhu. Okwasiikana okuligho buti tikwa isanhu naire. 
Jeremiah48:34 “Abantu ab'e Heshiboni n'ab'e Eleale balikuba empungu dhaaja dhaatuukira irala n'e Yahazi. Abantu b'e Zoari, n'ab'e Horonaimu, n'ab'e Egulathi Shelishiya, baliwulira empungu edho. N'akaiga ak'e Nimurimu kalikala." 
Jeremiah48:35 Nja kulekeza abantu ab'omu Moabu okughangayo emisengo egyokebwa mu bifo byaibwe ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu, era ndekeze n'okuniokezanga bakatonda baibwe obubbaani. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Kyenva ni ndira amaziga olw'abantu ab'e Moabu, era naalira olw'abantu ab'e Kiriheresi, nga ndi ng'oti n'ole afuuwa olwembo olw'enaku ku ndere. Ndira, kuba buli kintu kye baali nakyo kizikiriire." 
Jeremiah48:37 Boonaboona bamweire enviiri ku mitwe gyaibwe, baasalaku n'ebirevu byaibwe. Era beesazesaze emisale ku mikono gyaibwe, baavaala n'ekutiya olw'enaku." 
Jeremiah48:38 Ghaigulu ku ndhu edh'e Moabu ni mu mpya edh'ebibuga byayo, eriidhula kulira maziga, kuba nja kusaaniagho Moabu ng'oti n'omuntu bw'amaniangula ensugha eziraku agyenda." 
Jeremiah48:39 Moabu bagimaniangwire! Abantu bali kulira bwa maziga! Mpegaano efuuse ekintu ekitiisa einho, era yaafuuka nseko dha balamu. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Eighanga lirirumba Moabu lyagigwaku ng'oti n'enkookooma eyandhulwiza amaghagha gaayo. 
Jeremiah48:41 Abazigu baligema ebibuga n'ebifo byayo eby'okwewogomamu. Ku lunaku olwo, abalwani ba Moabu ab'amaani baliidhula okutya ng'oti n'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moabu baligizikiriza, yaalekera agho okuba eighanga, olw'okuba yandheemera." 
Jeremiah48:43 Entiisa, n'ebiina, n'emitego, n'ebirindiriire abantu b'e Moabu. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah48:44 Buli aligezaaku okulumuka okwewonia entiisa, aligwa mu biina. Ate oyo aliniina n'ava mu biina, aligwa ku mutego, olw'okuba nze Musengwa Katonda namala okutaagho ekiseera eky'okuzikirizaamu Moabu." 
Jeremiah48:45 Abalirumuka ni bawonagho balyewogomaku mu kibuga Heshiboni nga bawoiremu amaani, nga benda babeeku mu kibuga ekyo kyabazinga Sihoni kye yafugaku. Aye balyagaana Heshiboni nga kiri kubbeibbera muliro. Omuliro guliba gumaze okwokya ebiketezo eby'oku nsalosalo dh'ekibuga n'ebiketezo eby'oku nsozi eby'abantu b'e Moabu abenda einho okulwana entalo." 
Jeremiah48:46 Okagwireku iwe ensi Moabu! Abantu abasinza omusambwa Kemoshi abazigu babazikiriiza, batabane baibwe ni baghala baibwe baabatwala mu banhage." 
Jeremiah48:47 “Aye mu biseera eby'oluvainhuma, nze Musengwa Katonda ndireetera ebintu okwiramu okujiiranga Abamoabu obukalamu.” Ebyo byonabyona, Musengwa Katonda bye yakoba okutuuka ku nsi Moabu." 
Jeremiah49:1 Bino Musengwa Katonda bye yakoba ku nsi Ammoni, ati: “Abantu ab'omu Isiraeli bali gha? Ezira muntu asobola kulwanirira nsi yaibwe? Lwaki baaleka abantu abasinza omusambwa Milikomu okutoola ekiketezo eky'ab'ekika kya Gadi ni bakifuula ekyaibwe?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Aye bona, ekiseera kiidha kutuuka, abantu ab'omu Rabba ekibuga ekikulu eky'Abammoni, mbaleetere okuwulira okwasiikana okw'omu lutalo. Abazigu balikireka agho kityo nga kifuuse bifulukwa byereere, era nga bookiikya n'ebyalo byakyo omuliro byawaagho. Olwo Abaisiraeli balyeiriza ekiketezo kyaibwe, baakitoola ku abo abaali bakibatoireku." 
Jeremiah49:3 Imwe abantu b'e Heshiboni, muvaale kutiya era muwowoole! Mulumukirerumukire eno n'ere olw'okusoberwa. Omusambwa gwaimwe Milikomu baja kugutwala mu bunhage, ghalala ni bakabona baagwo n'abakungu baagwo." 
Jeremiah49:4 Lwaki abantu imwe abatali beesigwa mwesuutiriza? Amaani gaidha kubawaamu. Lwaki mwesigulira ku bukombe bwaimwe, nga mukoba muti ghazira asobola kukana n'abalumba?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye nkoba nti ndidha kubaleetera okutya okungi nga kubava ku buli luuyi. Mwenamwena mulirumukagho, nga buli muntu ayenda kuwonia bulamu bwe. Era nga ghazira asobola kusoloza bamagye gaimwe kugaiza ghalala." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Aye nga ghabiseegho ekiseera, ndireetera Abammoni ebintu okwiramu kabiri okubajiiranga obukalamu. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah49:7 Bino Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye bye yakoba ku nsi Edomu, ati: “Abantu ab'omu Temani eky'omu nsi Edomu tibakaalimu magezi? Abawi b'amagezi tibakaabakobera kya kukola? Obwo amagezi gabaweereiremu irala?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Imwe abantu ab'e Dedani, mukyuke mulumuke, muje mwegise! Nja kuzikiriza baidhukulu ba Esau, kuba ekiseera kituuse eky'okubabonereza." 
Jeremiah49:9 Abantu bwe baba banoga emizabbibu balekakuuku egindi, n'abaibi bwe baidha okwiba obwire batwalaku ebyo bye benda byonka." 
Jeremiah49:10 Aye nze baidhukulu ba Esau mbatoireku buli kantu baasigala bwereere. Era mbwikwire ebifo bye beegisaamu, baaba nga tibakaasobola kwegisa. Abantu boonaboona ab'omu Edomu bazikiriziibwa, tighakaaligho muntu waire mulala ati asigairegho." 
Jeremiah49:11 Muleke bamulekwa baimwe, nze ndidha kubalabirira. Ni banamwandu baimwe beesige nze." 
Jeremiah49:12 “Ate oba n'abo abaali tibagwaine kubonerezebwa, baali n'okunhwa ku kikopo eky'ekibonerezo, obwo imwe mulowooza muti timulibonerezebwa? Busa naire, muteekwa okunhwa ku kikopo ekyo eky'ekibonerezo." 
Jeremiah49:13 Nze ndayira mu liina lyange mwene nti ekibuga Bozira kirifuuka ekintu ekitiisa einho, abantu baakisekerera era baakozesa eriina lyakyo ng'ekikolimo. Ebyalo byonabyona ebikiri okumpi birifuuka bifulukwa byereere eby'olubeerera. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Agho nze Yeremia naakoba nti: “Edomu, nawulira amawulire okuva ye Musengwa Katonda. Era ghaligho omukwenda eyatumwa okuja ng'abitabita mu maghanga, ng'akoba ati, ‘Mwetegeke, muje mulumbe Edomu.’" 
Jeremiah49:15 Musengwa Katonda oyo yakwesoomera iwe Edomu ati, alikufuula omunafu asembayo mu maghanga goonagoona, era buli muntu alikunhooma." 
Jeremiah49:16 Okwekuluntaza kwo kukulimbye, era ghazira akutya kuba olowooza oti ekifo ky'olimu kyesigika inho, ng'oti n'ekifo ekigumu eky'okwewogomamu ekyabaadhibwa mu ibaale. Era weesigulira inho ku ky'amaka go okuba nga gali ghaigulu mu nsozi. Aye Musengwa Katonda oyo alikughanulayo yaakwisa ghansi. Musengwa Katonda mwene n'akobye.”" 
Jeremiah49:17 Musengwa Katonda era yaakoba ati: “Edomu erifuuka ekintu ekitiisa einho, era buli muntu anaagibitangaku aidha kutengeesanga bwa mutwe olw'okutya okungi." 
Jeremiah49:18 Nga Sodoma ni Gomorra bwe baabizikiriza aghalala n'ebibuga ebyali agho okumpi nabyo, n'ensi Edomu etyo bwe baligizikiriza, yaaloba kwiramu kubangamu bantu. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah49:19 Ng'empologoma bw'evaayo mu kibira ekizibirivu ekiri ku mbali kw'omwiga Yorudani n'eja n'erumba ebyayiro by'ensolo ebirungi, zeena ntyo bwendiidha okuzindula Abaedomu, balumuke bave mu nsi yaibwe. Olwo omuntu ye ndirondagho n'alifuga eighanga eryo. Naani asobola okwegeza ku nze? Naani asobola okuneesonsaaku? Era mufuzi ki asobola okuntakania?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Kale ni muwulire kye ntegeike okukola abantu b'omu Edomu, akabi ke neesoomeire okutuusa ku bantu b'omu kibuga Temani. Ni bwe baba abaana baibwe, abazigu balibakwekwebya baabatwala, era abantu boonaboona balitya inho." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ensi Edomu bw'erigwa, omuvuuma guliba gwa maani inho n'ensi yoonayoona yaatengeeta. Era okulira kwaibwe kulija ghala inho kwatuuka ni ku Nhandha Emyufu." 
Jeremiah49:22 Abazigu balirumba Bozira baakigwaku ng'oti n'enkookooma eyandhulwiza amaghagha gaayo. Ku lunaku olwo, abalwani ba Edomu ab'amaani baliidhula okutya ng'oti n'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Bino Musengwa Katonda bye yakoba ku Damasiko, ati: “Abantu b'omu bibuga Hamathi ni Arupadi beeraliikirivu era basobeirwa, kuba baawulira amawulire amabi agatiisa. Okweraliikirira kuli kubeefuukuula mu myoyo gyaibwe ng'oti kwefuukuula kwa nhandha. Era bazira miraala naire." 
Jeremiah49:24 Abantu b'e Damasiko bawoiremu amaani era balumwikegho nga batiire inho. Bali mu bulumi era beeraliikirivu, ng'oti n'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala." 
Jeremiah49:25 Ekibuga ekyali kimanhikaine einho era nga kirimu eisanhu, buti baakireka bw'agho." 
Jeremiah49:26 Ku lunaku olwo abazigu baliitira abaisuka b'omu kibuga ekyo mu nguudo dhaakyo, n'abaisirukale baakyo boonaboona baabazikiriza." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ndikunaania omuliro ku bimante ebyezungulwire ekibuga Damasiko, era naayokya ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga Benihadadi. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Bino Musengwa Katonda bye yakoba ku kika kya Kedari ni ku biketezo ebifugibwa Hazori, kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia bye yaghangula. Yakoba ati: “Muje mulumbe abantu ba Kedari, muzikirize ekika ekyo eky'abantu ab'e buvandhuba." 
Jeremiah49:29 Munhage weema dhaibwe, n'ensuubo dhaamu, n'ebirimu byonabyona. Mutwale ebyayo byaibwe n'engamiya dhaibwe. Era mukobere abantu muti, ‘Buli ghantu ghali ntiisa ndhereere!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 “Imwe abantu b'e Hazori, nze Musengwa Katonda mbalabula nti mulumuke muje ghala inho mwegise. Kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari abeesoomeire okubakola akabi, ng'akoba ati," 
Jeremiah49:31 ‘Mwidhe tuje, tulumbe abantu abo abawulira mule nga bali mu miraala. Ekibuga kyaibwe kiziraku ndhigi, oba okubaaku ebisiba, oba okubaaku abakikuuma.’" 
Jeremiah49:32 “Munhage engamiya dhaibwe n'ebyayo byaibwe byonabyona. Abantu abo abasala ku nviiri dhaibwe, ndibasansaaniza mu ndhuyi dhoonadhoona. Era ndibatuusaaku akabi nga kava mu ndhuyi dhoonadhoona." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hazori kija kufuulibwa irungu ebyanda n'ebyanda, era kibe ekifo omuba obw'ebibe. Abantu tibaliiramu kusengayo. Tighaliba muntu alibangayo kabiri. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Agho Zedekia nga yaakamalanga okufuuka kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze Yeremia, ebigema ku nsi Elamu." 
Jeremiah49:35 Yakoba ati: “Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ndiita abalasa obusaale boonaboona abaleeteire Elamu okuba ey'amaani etyo." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ndireeta kiwunga yaakunta mu nsi Elamu ng'ava ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona. Olwo naasansaaniza abantu baayo ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, okutuusa nga mu buli nsi mulimu abalumukiireyo." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ndireetera abantu ab'e Elamu okutya abazigu baibwe abenda okubaita. Mu busungu bwange obubitirivu, ndibatuusaaku akabi nga mbasindikira entalo edhiribaita okutuusa lwe ndibasaaniagho." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ndizikiriza bakyabazinga baibwe n'abakungu baibwe, naamala naataagho ekityamo kyange eky'obwakyabazinga." 
Jeremiah49:39 Aye mu biseera eby'oluvainhuma, ndireetera ebintu okwiramu okujiiranga Elamu obukalamu. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Buno n'obukwenda Musengwa Katonda bwe yampa obugema ku kibuga Babiloni n'abantu baamu: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Langirira amawulire gano ogakobere amaghanga! Ghanika bendera osansaanie amawulire gano! Otagakweka ng'oti kyama! Aye koba bukobe oti, ‘Babiloni bakigemye! Omusambwa gwakyo Merodaki baguswaziiza, baaguleetera okutya einho. Ebifaananie by'ekibuga ekyo baabimenhiemenhie, n'ebisinzibwa byakyo ebitali Katonda baabizikiriza!’" 
Jeremiah50:3 “Eighanga liviire ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, lyalumba ensi Babilonia era lija kugireetera okufuuka eirungu. Abantu n'ensolo baja kugirumukamu, ghabulegho omuntu agibaamu waire omulala ati.”" 
Jeremiah50:4 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, abantu b'omu Isiraeli n'ab'omu Buyudaaya baliidha nga balira amaziga, nga baanoonia nze Katonda waibwe." 
Jeremiah50:5 Balibuuza engira eja e Sioni, era baasimba mu ngira eyo nga bakoba bati, ‘Mwidhe tweyimbe ku Musengwa Katonda, tukole naye endagaano ey'ebyanda n'ebyanda, ye tutaja kumenhagho naire.’" 
Jeremiah50:6 “Abantu bange bali ng'oti n'entaama abaayi dhe balese ni dhibulira eyo mu nsozi. Batambulatambula eyo batyo nga bava ku lusozi luno baaja ku lule, baatuuka n'okwerabira amaka gaibwe." 
Jeremiah50:7 Buli abababona babalumba. Abazigu baibwe bakoba bati, ‘Baayonoona eri Musengwa Katonda, kale kye tukoze ti kibi naire. Badhaadha baibwe beesiganga Musengwa Katonda kale beene boona bandibaire bamwesiga!’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Imwe Abaisiraeli, mulumuke e Babilonia! Muve mu nsi eyo ey'Abakaladea! Niimwe mube musooke okugireka." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ndi kuja kusiikuula amaghanga ag'amaani agali ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ngaleetere okulumba ensi Babilonia. Balisimba enhiriri baalumba ensi eyo, baagighangula. Abantu abo bakugu mu kulasa obulaso, era mu kuteeba tibasubwa naire." 
Jeremiah50:10 Abazigu balinhagulula ensi Babilonia. Era abo abaliginhagulula balitwala kiisi kye balyenda. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah50:11 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Imwe abantu b'omu nsi Babilonia, mwanhagulula eighanga lyange. Muli basangaavu era muli kusagambya, ng'oti n'ente ento bw'etuumiratuumira mu isubi, era muli kugufula ng'oti mbalaasi nume." 
Jeremiah50:12 Aye ekibuga kyaimwe ekyabalabirira obukalamu ng'oti ni maama eyabazaala, abazigu balikinhoomoola era baakiswazaswaza. Eighanga lyaimwe n'eririsembayo mu maghanga goonagoona. Era ensi yaimwe eyo erifuuka irungu omuzira maadhi." 
Jeremiah50:13 Olw'obusungu bwange, ezira muntu aliirayo kubanga mu nsi Babilonia, erisigala agho etyo ng'eri bifulukwa byereere. Abantu boonaboona abaligibitangamu baligyezindukanga era baatya einho olw'okuzikirizibwa kwayo." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Imwe mwenamwena abalasa obulaso, musimbe enhiriri muzingize Babiloni okukyezunguluza era mukirwanise. Mulase obulaso bwaimwe bwonabwona, aghazira kulekagho waire akalala kati, mukizikirize olw'okuba abantu baakyo baakola ebibi eri nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Jeremiah50:15 Mwasiikanire ku ndhuyi dh'ekibuga ekyo dhoonadhoona nga mukirwanisa. Abantu baakyo bamaze okweghaayo mu ngalo edh'abazigu baibwe. Ekimante kyakyo ekigumu ekikyezungulwire bakiwomoirewomoire era baakimenhagho. Nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kwesasuuliza ku Bababilonia. Kale ni, imwe mubeesasulizeeku era mubabise nga beene bwe baabisanga abandi." 
Jeremiah50:16 Mutaganha bantu ba mu nsi eyo Babilonia kusiga nsigo, waire okubaganha okugema emiwolo okuwoobya amakungula mu nimiro. Kiisi mugwira ali mu nsi eyo alitya eigye erija okugirumba, yaalumuka yairayo ewaibwe ye yava.”" 
Jeremiah50:17 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abaisiraeli bali ng'oti ntaama edhirumuka ni dhisansaana ng'empologoma dhiri kudhibinga. Kyabazinga ow'e Assiria n'eyasooka okubalumba, memale kabiri kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia yaababegeta amagumba." 
Jeremiah50:18 Kale olw'ekyo, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, nkoba nti ndibonereza kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari n'ensi ye, ng'oti ni bwe nabonereza kyabazinga ow'e Assiria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ndiizaayo Abaisiraeli mu nsi yaibwe, baalya emere erimwa ku lusozi Karumeli, ni mu kiketezo ky'e Bashani. Era balirya nga bwe benda, ku bibala ebirimwa mu kiketezo kya Efuraimu ni mu kya Gileadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, tighaliba kwonoona mu Isiraeli, waire okubaagho ebibi mu Buyudaaya kuba ndisonigha abantu boonaboona be ndiba mponiizaagho. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah50:21 Musengwa Katonda akoba abazigu ati: “Muje mulumbe abantu ab'e Merathaimu n'ab'e Pekoda, mu baite mubazikirize. Mukole byonabyona bye mbalagiire. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah50:22 Abantu b'omu Babilonia bali kuwulira mu nsi yaibwe eyo okwasiikana okw'omu lutalo, era baabona n'okuzikirira okunene einho." 
Jeremiah50:23 Ensi Babilonia yakontakontanga amaghanga agandi goonagoona ag'omu nsi, ng'oti nhundo, yaagamaniangula. Aye yoona mperaano bagikonsekonse baagimaniangula. Era amaghanga goonagoona gatiire inho olw'ebyo ebigituuseeku." 
Jeremiah50:24 Iwe Babilonia, waanwanisa nze Musengwa Katonda, aye omutego gukugemiisa gwe nakutega nga toidhiiku naire." 
Jeremiah50:25 Ndhigwiregho eiterekero ery'eby'okulwanisa byange, era naabifulumya nga nsungughaire inho kuba nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ndi ni kye nja okubikozesa mu nsi eyo ey'Abakaladea." 
Jeremiah50:26 Mugirumbe nga mugiva ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, mubandulegho endhigi ku materekero gaayo. Mubunge omunhago mu mmungo, ng'oti dha ngaano. Muzikirize ensi eyo, mulobe kulekagho kintu kyonakyona." 
Jeremiah50:27 Mugeme abalwani baayo boonaboona, ab'amaani ng'oti gate galume, muje mubaite. Abantu ab'e Babilonia bakagwireku, kuba ekiseera kyaibwe eky'okubabonereza kituuse.”" 
Jeremiah50:28 “Wulira! Abaalumwike e Babilonia ni bawona, baize e Yerusalemu baloodhe nga Musengwa Katonda waife bwe yeesasuuza olw'ebyo Abababilonia bye baakola eisinzizo lye." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Musoloze abakugu boonaboona mu kulasa obusaale, n'abo boonaboona abaidhi okukozesa obulaso n'obusaale, baje balumbe ekibuga Babiloni. Bakizingize okukyezunguluza, era balobe kuganha muntu yeenayeena kulumuka kuwona. Olwo mukyesasulizeeku byonabyona bye kyakola era mukibise nga kyene bwe kyabisanga abandi kuba kyaneekudumbalizaaku nze Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Kale ni, ku lunaku olwo abazigu baliitira abaisuka b'omu kibuga ekyo mu nguudo dhaakyo, n'abaisirukale baakyo boonaboona baabazikiriza. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Iwe ensi Babilonia, weekuluntaza inho. Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ndidha kukukolaku. Ekiseera kituuse nze nkubonereze." 
Jeremiah50:32 Iwe ensi eyeekuluntaza, olyekontola waagwa aye ghaabulagho n'omuntu alikuyamba okusitukagho. Ebibuga byo ndibikunaaniaku omuliro, gwazikiriza ebintu byonabyona ebyezungulwire agho.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Abantu Abaisiraeli n'Abayudaaya batuntuzibwa. Era abo boonaboona abaabagema ni babatwala mu bunhage babakuuma butiribiri, aghazira kubalekula kuja." 
Jeremiah50:34 Aye Omununuzi waibwe wa maani. Eriina lye ayetebwa Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye. Oyo n'alibalwanirira mwene, yaaleeta emiraala ku nsi, aye mu Babilonia yaaleetamu bizibu byereere.”" 
Jeremiah50:35 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu b'omu kibuga Babiloni ka bafe, n'abantu b'omu nsi Babilonia yoonayoona ka bafe, ghalala n'abakungu baibwe, n'abantu baibwe abagezi." 
Jeremiah50:36 Abalanzi baayo abaguya ka basirughale bafe, n'abalwani baayo ab'amaani ka bafe, bazikirire!" 
Jeremiah50:37 Embalaasi dhaayo n'ebigaali byayo eby'omu lutalo, abazigu ka babizikirize. Abaisirukale baayo abapangise ka bafuuke banafu inho, bafe! Abazigu ka bagwe ku bintu byayo eby'obukombe babinhage." 
Jeremiah50:38 Akasana k'endoboozi leka kaidhe kaake, kakaze amaadhi gaayo goonagoona; kuba ensi Babilonia eyo eidhwire ebifaananie ebibaadhe n'ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, ebisirughaiza abantu einho." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Kale ni ekibuga Babiloni kiribangamu bisolo bya mu irungu, na mpiti, na nhonhi dhitali nongoofu. Tikiriirayo kabiri kubaamu bantu mu biseera byakyo byonabyona eby'omu maiso." 
Jeremiah50:40 Nga bwe nazikiriza Sodoma, ni Gomorra, aghalala n'ebibuga ebyali agho okumpi nabyo, n'ekibuga Babiloni ntyo bwe ndikizikiriza, kyaloba kwiramu kubangamu bantu. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah50:41 Bona, ghaligho abantu abaliidha nga bava mu nsi eri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba; eighanga ery'amaani ni bakyabazinga kamaala baliva eghala einho beetegekera okulwana olutalo." 
Jeremiah50:42 Baligema obulaso n'empiima, nga bakambwe era nga tibasaasira naire. Empindo dhaibwe nga bali ku mbalaasi dhirivuuma ng'oti kuwolomboka kwa maadhi ga nhandha. Balyetegekera olutalo, okulwanisa imwe abantu b'omu Babiloni." 
Jeremiah50:43 Kyabazinga w'ensi Babilonia aliwulira ebiri kwidha, n'emikono gyamuwaamu amaani; yaawulira obulumi ng'oti bwa mukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Ng'empologoma bw'evaayo mu kibira ekizibirivu ekiri ku mbali kw'omwiga Yorudani n'eja n'erumba ebyayiro by'ensolo ebirungi, zeena, nze Musengwa Katonda, ntyo bwendiidha okuzindula Abababilonia, balumuke bave mu kibuga kyaibwe. Olwo omuntu ye ndirondagho n'alifuga eighanga eryo. Naani asobola okwegeza ku nze? Naani asobola okuneesonsaaku? Era mufuzi ki asobola okuntakania?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Kale ni muwulire kye ntegeike okukola ku kibuga Babiloni, akabi ke neesoomeire okutuusa ku bantu baakyo. Ni bwe baba abaana baibwe, abazigu balibakwekwebya baabatwala, era abantu boonaboona balitya inho." 
Jeremiah50:46 Babiloni bwe kirigwa, omuvuuma guliba gwa maani inho n'ensi yoonayoona yaatengeeta. Era okulira kw'abantu baakyo kulija ghala inho kwatuuka ni mu maghanga goonagoona.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndisindika ku nsi Babilonia ni ku bantu baayo empewo ezikiriza. 
Jeremiah51:2 Ndisindika abagwira baazikiriza Babilonia ng'oti n'ole asensa ebikaba mu ngaano. Olunaku olw'okuzikiriza bwe lulituuka, baligirumba nga bava ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, baagimaliriramu ebintu byonabyona." 
Jeremiah51:3 Ndibalagira nti, ‘Mutaganha baisirukale baayo kuvaala bivaalo byaibwe eby'omu kifuba eby'ekyuma, waire kulasa busaale bwaibwe. Muzikirize eigye lyayo lyonalyona! Mutalekaagho waire abo abaisirukale abakaali abaisuka.’" 
Jeremiah51:4 Kale balibafumita, bafiira mu nguudo edh'omu bibuga byaibwe" 
Jeremiah51:5 kuba nze Musengwa Katonda, Katonda Afuga Amagye, tirekuliire agho Baisiraeli na Bayudaaya, waire nga beene baiza omusango ye ndi, nze Omutukuvu wa Isiraeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Imwe Abaisiraeli n'Abayudaaya, mulumuke muve mu nsi Babilonia muwonie obulamu bwaimwe! Mulobe kufiira bwereere olw'ebibi bya Babilonia, kuba kino n'ekiseera nze Musengwa Katonda neesasulize ku nsi eyo nga ngibonereza nga bw'egwaniire." 
Jeremiah51:7 Ensi Babilonia yali ng'oti kikopo ekyakolebwa mu zaabu ekiri mu ngalo dhange, ekyatamiizanga ensi yoonayoona. Amaghanga gaanhwanga ku mwenge ogw'emizabbibu mu kikopo ekyo, gaagwa eiralu." 
Jeremiah51:8 Aye buti egwire mangu inho yaazikirira! Mugiririre inho amaziga! Mugifunireyooku ku bulezi olw'obulumi bw'erimu, oba katyo enaawona." 
Jeremiah51:9 Abagwira abaabanga mu Babilonia baakoba bati, ‘Twagezaaku okuyamba ensi Babilonia eno, aye nga tikikaasoboka naire. Kale ife ka tugiveemu twireyo ewaife ye twava, kuba Katonda abonereiza inho Babilonia eno, yaagisaanizaagho irala.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Imwe abantu bange, mukube emizira mukobe muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda ayoleike nga tuziraku musango. Mukole tuje tukobere abali mu Yerusalemu, Musengwa Katonda waife by'akoze.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:11 Musengwa Katonda asiikwire enzigu mu bakyabazinga ab'e Media, baidhe balumbe Babilonia, kuba ayenda kugizikiriza. Olwo agyesasulizeeku olw'okuzikiriza eisinzizo lye. Agho abaduumizi b'eigye einunuzi, baalagira bati: “Mughagale obusaale bwaimwe! Mugeme engabo dhaimwe!" 
Jeremiah51:12 Mughanike ebendera muje mulumbe ekimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga Babiloni. Mwongere ku baisirukale abali kukikuuma babe bangi. Muteegho abakuuma omusana n'abakuuma obwire, era muteegho n'abeeteeze okuzinduukiriza abazigu.” Musengwa Katonda atuukiriiza ekyo kye yeesoomera okukola abantu b'omu Babilonia." 
Jeremiah51:13 Iwe ensi erimu emiiga kamaala n'eby'obukombe ebingi, enkomerero yo etuuse, akawuuzi akagemereire obulamu bwo bakakutwire." 
Jeremiah51:14 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yeerayiriire mwene ati alireeta abantu kamaala inho ng'oti kikuukuulu kya nzige, baalumba Babilonia. Era balyasiikana n'eisanhu nga baghangwire." 
Jeremiah51:15 Musengwa Katonda n'eyakola ensi n'obuyinza bwe, yaataagho eby'oku nsi n'amagezi ge, era yaabambagho eigulu." 
Jeremiah51:16 Bw'alagira, amaadhi ku igulu gadudumuka, era asitusa olufu ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'ensi. Aleetera olukuba okughemya ng'amaadhi gali kugwa, era yaatoolayo empewo mu materekero ge, yaagireeta." 
Jeremiah51:17 Olwo abantu boonaboona baaba nga basirughaire era nga tibakaalimu kategeera. Buli mugheesi wa bintu bya zaabu yaaswala olw'ebifaananie ebisinzibwa by'agheesa; kuba bya buguya bwereere era biziramu bulamu naire. 
Jeremiah51:18 Biziramu muganhulo era bya buguya bwereere. Ku lunaku Musengwa Katonda lw'alibisaliraku omusango okubisinga, bija kuzikirira." 
Jeremiah51:19 Aye Katonda wa Yakobo tali ng'oti ni byene, kuba n'eyakola ebintu byonabyona. Era yalonda Isiraeli okuba eighanga erirye ku bubwe. Eriina lye, ni Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye." 
Jeremiah51:20 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Iwe ensi Babilonia, oli nhundo yange era eky'okulwanisa kyange mu lutalo. Nakukozesa okuzikiriza amaghanga n'okusaaniagho obwakyabazinga." 
Jeremiah51:21 Nakukozesa okuniantula embalaasi n'abavuzi baadho, n'okuniantula ebigaali eby'omu lutalo n'abavuzi baabyo." 
Jeremiah51:22 Nakukozesa okwita abasaadha n'abakazi, n'abakulu n'abato, n'abalenzi n'abaghala." 
Jeremiah51:23 Nakukozesa okwita abaayi n'ebyayo byaibwe, n'abalimi n'ensolo dhaibwe dhe balimisa, n'abafuzi era n'abaduumizi b'amagye.”" 
Jeremiah51:24 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Mulibona nga neesasuliza ku nsi Babilonia n'abantu baayo, olw'ebibi byonabyona bye baakola Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah51:25 Iwe Babilonia, oli ng'oti lusozi oluzikiriza ensi yoonayoona. Aye nze Musengwa Katonda mwene ndikukolaku. Ndigolola omukono gwange naakumaniangulamaniangula, naakuleka ng'oli bwa ivu, ng'oti n'olusozi lwe bookiikya omuliro." 
Jeremiah51:26 Olisigala agho otyo ng'oli bifulukwa byereere lubeerera. Era ezira ibaale lye balitoola mu bifunfugu ebyo, ni balizimbisa musingi mu nsonda. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Mughanike ebendera mu nsi, era mufuuwe amagwala ng'akamanhiso ak'okuja okulumba, olwo mutegeke amaghanga okulwanisa Babilonia. Mukobe obwakyabazinga bw'e Ararati, n'obwa Minni, n'obwa Ashekenazi, bwidhe bugirumbe. Mulonde anaaduumira okulumba okwo. Musoloze embalaasi dhibe kamaala ng'oti bikuukuulu bya nzige." 
Jeremiah51:28 Mutegeke amaghanga galwanise Babilonia. Mwetese bakyabazinga ab'e Media, n'abafuzi baibwe ab'ebiketezo, n'abakungu baibwe, n'amagye ag'ensi dhoonadhoona dhe bafuga." 
Jeremiah51:29 Ensi eri kudhugumira era yaatengeeta, kuba Musengwa Katonda aja kutuukiriza entegeka ye ey'okufuula Babilonia eirungu omutaba bantu." 
Jeremiah51:30 Abalwani Abababilonia ab'amaani baleseeyo okulwana, baasigala bwa mu bifo byaibwe eby'okwewogomamu. Amaani gabawoiremu, baafuuka banafu inho. Emiryango egy'ekibuga abazigu bagimenhiegho, n'endhu dhoonadhoona baadhikunaaniaku omuliro." 
Jeremiah51:31 Abakwenda bali kwidhira kulalakulala, okukobera kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia bati ekibuga kye abazigu bakimenhiemenhie okuva ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona." 
Jeremiah51:32 Abazigu bagemye ebifo aghasomokerwa omwiga era bakunaaniiza omuliro ku bifo eby'okwewogomamu. Abaisirukale Abababilonia bali kudhugumira olw'okutya. 
Jeremiah51:33 Akaseera kasigaire katono abazigu batyankiririre abantu b'omu Babilonia, ng'oti ngaano mu kifo aghakubirwa engaano. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 Kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia yasalasala ekibuga Yerusalemu yaakirya. Yaakimalamu ebintu, kyasigala nga kikaya ng'oti n'ensugha ye bavudhumwiremu amaadhi. Yaaba ng'oti n'ogusota ogw'omu nhandha, yaakimira. Yaatwala buli kye yeerobozaamu, ebyasigalagho yaasuula ere." 
Jeremiah51:35 Abantu ab'omu Sioni ka bakobe bati: “Obukambwe Abababilonia bwe baatukolaku, ka bubairirengaku beene abo!” Abantu ab'e Yerusalemu ka bakobe bati: “Omusaayi ogw'abantu baife ogwayuyika, ka gwirirenga ku Bababilonia beene abo!”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda akoba ab'e Yerusalemu ati: “Bona, nja kubalwanirira, neesasulize ku bazigu baimwe olw'ebyo bye baabakola. Ndikaza enhandha y'Ababilonia era naalekeza n'emiiga gyaibwe okukuuluula amaadhi." 
Jeremiah51:37 Ensi eyo erifuuka bwa mmungo dha bifunfugu, era yaafuuka ekifo ekitiisa einho omuba obw'ebibe, nga ghazira muntu akibaamu." 
Jeremiah51:38 Abababilonia baliwologoma ng'oti mpologoma nkulu, era baavuuma ng'oti mpologoma nto." 
Jeremiah51:39 Nga bwe bali n'amairu, ndibategekera embaga, naabatamiiza baasangaala. Memale baaja baatenduka endoolo, aye baaloba kwiramu kuzuuka." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ndibatwala okubaita nga bali ng'oti bwa nsolo mpiite edh'omu maka. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah51:41 Musengwa Katonda ayogera ku Babiloni ati: “Kyewuunhisa okubona nga Babiloni, ekibuga ensi yoonayoona kye yasaakanga, bakighangwire baakigema! Era kyewuunhisa okubona nga kifuuse ekifo ekitiisa einho eri amaghanga!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Enhandha etaalaaliire ku kibuga Babiloni, yaakimira n'amaadhi gaayo agawolomboka nga geefuukuula." 
Jeremiah51:43 Ebibuga byakyo bifuuse bifo ebitiisa einho. Biri ng'oti irungu omuzira maadhi, era omuzira bantu babibaamu waire ababibitamu obubite." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ndibonereza Beli katonda wa Babiloni, naamuleetera n'okwiza bye yaiba, n'amaghanga galekera agho okumusinzanga. “Ekimante eky'oku kibuga Babiloni kigwire ku itaka." 
Jeremiah51:45 Imwe Abaisiraeli mulumuke muveegho. Muwonie obulamu bwaimwe, bulobe kutuukibwaku kabi ke nnaaleeta mu busungu bwange obubitirivu." 
Jeremiah51:46 Mutawaamu myoyo oba okutya, olw'amawulire ge muwulira mu nsi. Buli mwaka amawulire ag'endhawulo gasansaanizibwa: ka tukobe, ng'ago agoogera ku bikolwa eby'obukambwe mu nsi eno, n'aga kyabazinga ono okulwana ni kyabazinga owundi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Kale ni bona, ekiseera kiri kwidha, nsitule olutalo ku bifaananie bye basinza mu Babilonia. Ensi eyo yoonayoona eriswazibwa n'abantu baayo baitibwa, emirambo gyaibwe gyaba bw'agho gityo." 
Jeremiah51:48 Ebintu byonabyona ebiri ku nsi n'ebiri ku igulu, biryemba olw'eisanhu nga Babilonia egwire mu ngalo dh'abo abazikiriza, abaliva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba okwidha okugizikiriza." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babilonia yaitisa abantu mu nsi yoonayoona. Kale ni, mpegaano yoona baja kugizikiriza olw'okwitisa Abaisiraeli kamaala. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah51:50 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba abantu abali mu Babilonia ati: “Imwe muwonie okwitibwa! Mperaano muje, era mutalwa naire! Waire nga muli ghala inho mutyo n'eka, aye mundidhukire nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe era mulowooze ku Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Imwe mukoba muti, ‘Baatuvuma era baatuswazaswaza inho. Ensoni dhaatugema ira, kuba abagwira bangira baatwala ebifo ebitukuvu eby'omu isinzizo.’" 
Jeremiah51:52 Kale ni, nze nkoba nti, ekiseera kiri kwidha nsitule olutalo ku bifaananie bye basinza mu Babilonia, era abantu abaliba bafumitiibwa balisinda mu nsi eyo yoonayoona." 
Jeremiah51:53 Abababilonia ni bwebaniina ku igulu, ni bazimba okwo ekifo eky'okwewogomamu, era ndisindikayo abo abazikiriza, baaja baakizikiriza. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah51:54 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Wulira okulira okuli mu Babiloni n'okuwowoola okuli eyo, olw'okuzikirira okw'ensi eyo." 
Jeremiah51:55 Ndi kuzikiriza Babiloni era ndi kukisirisa be kye! Amagye gali kukiyoolookeraku ng'oti n'amaadhi bwegawolomboka nga geefuukuula. Era gali kukirumba nga gaasiikana. 
Jeremiah51:56 Amagye agazikiriza ago gaidhiire Babiloni, gakiidhiire okukizikiriza. Abaisirukale baakyo babagemye, n'obulaso bwaibwe baabumenhamenha; kuba nze ndi Katonda abonereza, era ndyesasuliza ku Babiloni nga bwekigwaine." 
Jeremiah51:57 Nditamiiza abakungu baakyo, n'abantu baakyo abagezi, n'abafuzi baakyo, n'abaduumizi baakyo ab'amagye, n'abalwani baakyo ab'amaani. Balitenduka endoolo aye baaloba kwiramu kuzuuka. Nze Kyabazinga, Musengwa Afuga Amagye, ninze nkobye." 
Jeremiah51:58 Ekimante eky'oku kibuga Babiloni ekikologho balikigwisa ghansi, n'emiryango gyakyo emireeyiriri baligyokya omuliro. Emirimo abantu gye baakolanga gyabadaakiza bwereere, n'amaghanga bye gaakola bya kwokebwa muliro. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ninze nkobye.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Omugheereza wa kyabazinga Zedekia eyamulabiriranga nga tamuvaaku, baamwetanga Seraia, nga mutabane wa Neria era nga mwidhukulu wa Mahaseia. Mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Zedekia ni kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, Seraia oyo bwe yali ng'ali kuja e Babilonia ni Zedekia oyo, nze Yeremia naabaaku bye namulagira." 
Jeremiah51:60 Naghandiika mu kitabo, byonabyona ebigema ku kuzikirizibwa okwali kuja okutuuka ku Babilonia, era ni bino byonabyona ebigema ku nsi Babilonia eyo" 
Jeremiah51:61 Nakoba Seraia nti: “Bw'olituuka e Babiloni bona nti osomera abantu baawulira bukalamu byonabyona ebighandiikiibwa mu kitabo kino. 
Jeremiah51:62 Bw'olimala olisaba Katonda oti, ‘Wo Musengwa Katonda, wakoba oti oidha kuzikiriza ekifo kino ghabule ekiramu kyonakyona ekikisigalamu, k'abe omuntu oba kibe ekisolo olwo ekifo kino kifuuke irungu ery'olubeerera.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Seraia, bw'olimala okusomera abantu ekitabo kino, olikisibaku eibaale waakisuula mu mwiga Eufurate." 
Jeremiah51:64 Agho waakoba oti, ‘Ensi Babilonia etyo bw'eridimira, era teriinhululwayo kabiri, kuba Musengwa Katonda aja kugizikiriza.’ ” Ebibono bya Yeremia ghano ghe bikoma." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekia yali agheza emyaka abiri na mulala egy'obukulu ghe yafuukira kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya. Era yaafugira entangama ya myaka ikumi na mulala mu Yerusalemu. Inhina nga ni Hamutali, mughala wa Yeremia ow'e Libuna." 
Jeremiah52:2 Zedekia oyo yaakolanga ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, ng'oti n'ebyo byonabyona Yehoiakimu bye yakola." 
Jeremiah52:3 Musengwa Katonda yaasungughalira ab'omu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya ebitaloodheka, yaababingagho mu maiso ge. Agho Zedekia yaadheemera kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia." 
Jeremiah52:4 Agho ku lunaku olweikumi, mu mwezi ogweikumi, mu mwaka ogwomwenda nga Zedekia n'afuga Buyudaaya, kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari owa Babilonia yaidha n'eigye lyonalyona okulumba ekibuga Yerusalemu. Baakizingiza era baakibungaku emungo y'eitaka ey'okuniiniraku, basobole okukirwanisa." 
Jeremiah52:5 Kyasigala nga bakizingiiza batyo okutuusa mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omulala (11) nga Zedekia n'afuga Buyudaaya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ku lunaku olwomwenda mu mwezi ogwokuna, endhala yeekalangula okuluma abantu mu kibuga, nga tibakaali na kya kulya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Agho baawomola ekituli mu kimante eky'oku kibuga, kyabazinga n'abaisirukale boonaboona baalumuka obwire, waire nga Abababilonia baali bazingiiza ekibuga ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona. Baagema engira ebitira mu nimiro ya kyabazinga, baabita mu mulyango oguyimba ebimante ebibiri, baaja nga boolekeire ekiiko ekirimu omwiga Yorudani." 
Jeremiah52:8 Aye ab'eigye ly'Abababilonia baabingirira kyabazinga Zedekia, baamutuukaku mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe eky'e Yeriko, eigye lye lyonalyona lyasansaana lyamulekulira agho." 
Jeremiah52:9 Agho Abababilonia baamugema baamutwala ye kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ow'e Babilonia, ng'ali e Ribula mu kiketezo ky'e Hamathi, yaamusalira omusango gwamusinga." 
Jeremiah52:10 Nebukadinezzari oyo yaitira eyo e Ribula batabane ba Zedekia, nga ni Zedekia mwene alingiriire. Era yaita n'abakungu ba Buyudaaya boonaboona." 
Jeremiah52:11 Ate yaatundulamu Zedekia amaiso, yaamusiba ku ndhegere, yaamutwala e Babilonia. Zedekia yaasigala mu Babilonia nga musibe okutuusa lwe yafa." 
Jeremiah52:12 Ku lunaku olweikumi mu mwezi ogwokutaanu, mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omwenda (19) nga kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari n'afuga Babilonia, omukungu akulira abakuumi ba kyabazinga w'e Babilonia ayetebwa Nebuzaradani, yaidha e Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah52:13 Yaayokya eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, n'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga, n'ebizimbe byonabyona ebikologho eby'omu Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah52:14 Era eigye ery'Abababilonia eryali naye, lyamenhagho ekimante ekyezungulwire Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah52:15 Agho Nebuzaradani oyo yaabatwala e Babilonia mu bunhage, abandi ku bantu abaali abaavu einho, nabo abaali basigaire mu kibuga, n'abo abaali beeghaireyo ni baira ku luuyi lwa kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, era n'abo abaali abakugu mu mirimo egy'endhawulo." 
Jeremiah52:16 Aye yaaleka mu Buyudaaya abandi ku bantu abaavu einho abazira ke bali nako, balimenga era balabirirenga amasamba g'emizabbibu." 
Jeremiah52:17 Abababilonia baamenhamenha empango edh'ekyuma eky'ekikomo edhaali mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, n'ebituuti ebiriku enkede eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, n'etanka enkologho nga yoona ya kyuma kya kikomo. Bwe baamala, baatoola ekyuma eky'ekikomo ekyava mu bintu ebyo, baakitwala e Babilonia." 
Jeremiah52:18 Baatwala ensugha, n'ebitiiyo, ni makansu edhisala ebisiriiza ku ntambi dh'entaala, n'ebintu mwe baatanga obubbaani, n'ebintu ebindi byonabyona eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo bye baakozesanga mu kugheereza mu isinzizo." 
Jeremiah52:19 Nebuzaradani yaatwala kiisi kintu ekyakolebwa mu zaabu oba mu feeza, omwali ebintu eby'okutwalirangaku amanda agaliku omuliro, n'ebibya ebitono, n'ebibya ebibaamu omusaayi ogw'okumansira, n'obulobo obw'okusuulangamu eivu, n'ebikondo eby'entaala, n'ebintu ebiteebwamu obubbaani, n'ebintu ebikozesebwa mu kuwaayo ebigheebwayo ebifukibwa." 
Jeremiah52:20 Obungi bw'ekyuma eky'ekikomo kyabazinga Solomoni kye yakolamu empango eibri, n'etanka enkologho, n'ebifaananie eby'ente enume eikumi n'eibiri etanka eyo kw'etyama, byonabyona ebyo nga byali mu isinzizo, bwali buzito inho baaloba kusobola kubupima." 
Jeremiah52:21 Empango endala ng'egheza mita munaana mu buleeyi, era yaagheza emita itaanu n'obutundu busatu mu kugyezunguluza. Obunene obw'omubiri gwayo nga bwaga ngalo ina, era ng'erimu empongolo munda." 
Jeremiah52:22 Empango eyo ng'eriku n'omutwe ogw'ekyuma eky'ekikomo ogugheza emita eibiri n'obutundu obubiri mu buleeyi. Ku mutwe ogwo nga kuliku ebifaananie eby'endhegere edhirukiibwa ng'oti katimba n'ebifaananie eby'emikomamawanga, nga baabikola mu kyuma eky'ekikomo okugwezunguluza gwonagwona. N'empango eyokubiri yoona baali nga bagikoze mu nsambo n'endala eyo." 
Jeremiah52:23 Ku buli kifaananie eky'endhegere edhirukiibwa ng'oti katimba ekya ku buli mpango, nga kuliku ebifaananie eby'emikomamawanga kikumi, era ng'ekyenda n'omukaaga ku ebyo biri mu mbali omw'empango." 
Jeremiah52:24 Nebuzaradani omuduumizi w'abakuumi ba kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, era yaagema Seraia Kabona Omukulu, ni Zefania kabona amwiririra, n'abakuumi b'omulyango ogwingira mu isinzizo abasatu." 
Jeremiah52:25 Ni mu kibuga yaatoolamu omuduumizi w'eigye, n'abataanu ku bawi b'amagezi aba kyabazinga abaali bakaali mu kibuga, n'omughandiisi eyakuumanga enkalala edh'abaisirukale mu ighanga, n'abantu nkaaga abandi ku batyamye abaali bakaali mu kibuga." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradani yaabatwala eri kyabazinga w'e Babilonia eyali e Ribula mu kiseera ekyo," 
Jeremiah52:27 mu kiketezo ky'e Hamathi. Kyabazinga oyo yaabakuba era yaabaitira eyo. Batyo Abayudaaya bwe baabatoola mu nsi yaibwe nga basibe, baabatwala mu bunhage." 
Jeremiah52:28 Bano n'abantu kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari be yatwala mu bunhage: Mu mwaka gwe ogwomusanvu nga ni kyabazinga, yatwala abantu enkumi isatu n'amakumi abiri na basatu (3,023)." 
Jeremiah52:29 Mu mwaka gwe ogweikumi n'omunaana yaatwala abantu lunaana n'asatu na babiri (832) ng'abatoola mu Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah52:30 Mu mwaka gwe ogwamakumi abiri n'esatu (23) yatwala abantu lusanvu n'ana na bataanu (745), abo nga Nebuzaradani omuduumizi w'abakuumi ba kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, n'eyabatwala. Okugaitamu baaba abantu enkumi ina na lukaaga (4,600) abaatwalibwa mu bunhage." 
Jeremiah52:31 Agho kyabazinga Evilimerodaki ow'e Babilonia, yaagemerwa kyabazinga Yehoiakini ow'e Buyudaaya ekivunika mu mwaka gwene Evilimerodaki oyo gwe yafuukiramu kyabazinga. Yaamutoola mu ikomera ku lunaku olwamakumi abiri n'eitaanu (25), mu mwezi ogweikumi n'ebiri, mu mwaka ogwamakumi asatu n'omusanvu (37), okuva Yehoiakini oyo kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya lwe yasibwa." 
Jeremiah52:32 Evilimerodaki oyo yaamubisa bukalamu, yaamuta mu kifo kya ghaigulu okusinga bakyabazinga abandi abaali naye mu bunhage e Babilonia." 
Jeremiah52:33 Yehoiakini baamuganha okutoolamu ebivaalo by'eikomera, era buli lunaku yaaliiranga ku kiiwulo kya kyabazinga." 
Jeremiah52:34 Kyabazinga yaalagira bamughenga omugabo ogwa buli lunaku, ekiseera kyonakyona kye yamala nga mulamu." 
Lamentations1:1 Ha, ekibuga ekyaidhulanga abantu kamaala, kyasigalira kweinhamira. Ekibuga ekyateebwangamu ekitiisa ensi yoonayoona, buti kiri ng'oti namwandu! Ekyalinga ng'oti ni muka omufuzi, buti kyafuuka ng'oti mukazi mwiru." 
Lamentations1:2 Omukazi ono asiiba mu maziga era yaasula ng'alira, amaziga gaamukuuluula ku matama. Abo abaalinga bakagwa be ghazira ali agho kumusaasiraku. Era be yakolagananga nabo bamughemukiire tibakaali beesigwa, era baafuuka bazigu y'ali." 
Lamentations1:3 Abantu ab'omu kibuga ekyo n'ab'omu Buyudaaya mwonamwona baatwalibwa mu bunhage era eyo ye bali mu bwiru. Baba eyo mu maghanga agandi etali waibwe era ye batawuliriraku miraala naire. Beezungulwirwa abazigu be batasobola kunuuka. 
Lamentations1:4 N'enguudo edhingira mu kibuga ekyo Sioni dhirira bulire, kuba abantu tibakaidha ku mbaga dha bibinuko bya kusinza Katonda ebyalagirwa. Emiryango gyakyo giwuubaire, ghazira akaabitamu. Bakabona baamu bali mu nnaku. Abaghala baamu abaayembanga bali agho badaaga budaage. Ekibuga kyonakyona kiri mu bulumi obutaloodheka." 
Lamentations1:5 Abazigu baakyo buti n'abakifuga era buli kintu kibajiira bukalamu. Musengwa n'eyakireetera okudaagadaaga okwo olw'ebibi byakyo kamaala bye kyakolanga. Abaana baamu baabagema, baabakulembezaamu, baabatwala mu bunhage." 
Lamentations1:6 Sioni tikikaali kya kitiisa naire. Abakungu baamu bali ng'oti n'empongo edhiri endhala olw'okubulwa eisubi ery'okulya. Era mu bunafu obwo baalumuka abazigu baibwe ababayiiga. 
Lamentations1:7 Mu biseera ebyo eby'okudaazibwadaazibwa, ab'omu Yerusalemu baidhukira ebintu byaibwe eby'omughendo, bye baalinga nabyo mu biseera ebyabita. Baidhukira bwe baaghangulwa abazigu ni ghabula omuntu ababeeraku yeenayeena. Abazigu baibwe abo baabalingirira baabasekerera olw'okughangulwa okwo." 
Lamentations1:8 Abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu abo baayonoona inho mu maiso ga Katonda, baamufuukira ekyenhinhalwa. Abaabatangamu ekitiisa baatoolera okubanhooma nga bababona ng'oti n'omuntu ali amadu. Bwenebwene bali mu nnaku era beebwalabwala olw'ensoni." 
Lamentations1:9 Abantu abo baliku ekibi ekibonekeragho. Aye baaloba okwidhukira ng'eriyo okubonerezebwa ku nkomerero. Okugwa kwaibwe kye kuva ni kuba okw'entiisa era ni ghabula abasaasiraku. Olwo baira bwa mu kulira bati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, bona nga bwe tuli kudaazibwadaazibwa olw'okughangulwa abazigu baife, otubeere.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Abazigu baaja baidha, baanhaga ebintu eby'omu kibuga byonabyona eby'omughendo. Bwenebwene ab'omu kibuga ekyo baabona bukalamu abamaghanga agandi nga bangirira irala mu kifo ekitukuvu, Musengwa ghe yalobera abamaghanga agandi okutuuka." 
Lamentations1:11 Abantu baamu boonaboona baagala eky'okulya nga bali mu nnaku. Baafaanisaamu ebintu byaibwe eby'omughendo einho basobole okufunamu emere, balobe kulambuka ndhala. Agho baalirira Musengwa bati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, lingirira obone nga bwe tuli kunhoomebwa!”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Imwe mwenamwena abali kubitagho muuningirire, mubone. Ghazira kye mwegamu? Mubonangaku obughafu ng'oti n'obwange bwe ndimu? Musengwa Katonda n'eyansuula mu bughafu buno ng'asungughaire ekibitiriire." 
Lamentations1:13 Yagheereza omuliro nga guva ghaigulu, gwantuukira mu magumba gwagamamula. Yataagho olutuula lwangema ebigere, lwanzingamya naabula ghe nja, naasigala agho nga gampoire nga ndi mu bulumi obutasalaku ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Lamentations1:14 Ebibi byange byonabyona yabisoloza era mwene n'engalo dhe yaabikolamu ekikoligo, yaakinsiba mu nkoto kyanduyiriza. Musengwa yampaayo mu ngalo dh'abazigu bange be ntasobola kutuulana nabo." 
Lamentations1:15 Abalwani bange ab'amaani, Musengwa yabasuula ere ng'oti n'abatagasa. Yaataagho eigye okuunumba, okufafaagania abasaadha bange ab'amaani. Antyankiriire n'abantu bange ng'oti mizabbibu mu kikunhiro eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
Lamentations1:16 Bino bindiza, amaziga gaafukumuka okunva mu maiso; kuba ghazira asobola kunsaasiraku, ghazira asobola kundhizaamu maani. Abazigu bange bampangula era abantu bange baasigala nga bawuubaire." 
Lamentations1:17 Ekibuga Sioni kiri ng'oti n'omuntu agoloire omukono ng'ali kusabiriza, aye ghaabula amusaasiraku. Musengwa yalagira abantu abeezungulwire abantu ba Yakobo boonaboona, babe bazigu baibwe. Yerusalemu kyafuuka ekyenhinhalwa eri abantu abo." 
Lamentations1:18 Aye Musengwa mutuufu, kuba ninze eyadheemera ekibono kye. Aye bantu imwe muwulire mwenamwena, mubone nga bwe ndaagadaaga. Abaisuka bange n'abaguna boonaboona baabatwala mu bunhage." 
Lamentations1:19 Nayeta bakagwa bange baidhe baanhambe, aye baaloba kwidhayo. Bakabona bange n'abantu abakulu baafiira mu kibuga, nga bali kwagala emere ey'okulya balobe kulambuka ndhala." 
Lamentations1:20 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bona eno ndi mu buzibu bwa maani era ntabwirwa mu mwoyo. Olw'obudheemu bwange ndi mughafu adaaga. Mu nguudo edh'omu kibuga abatemo bali kwita abantu bange, ate mu ndhu mba ng'oti ndi bwa mu magombe." 
Lamentations1:21 Wulira nga bwe ndi kulira n'enaku nga ghazira na muntu wa kunsaasiraku. Abazigu bange boonaboona baawulira nga bwendi mu buzibu, era basangaavu okubona nga niiwe owabuntuusaaku. Wo Musengwa Katonda, tuusa mangu olunaku lwe wabeesoomera, era leka boona babe ng'oti ninze bwendi buti." 
Lamentations1:22 Lingirira ebibi byaibwe byonabyona, obakole nga zeena kye wankola olw'ebibi byange byonabyona bye nakola; kuba ndi kulira n'enaku nnene era gampoire.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Ha, Musengwa asungughaire era yeesoomeire okubonereza ekibuga Sioni! Ebintu byamu abantu bye baatwalanga okuba eby'omughendo, abiswire ghansi ng'oti bikaba. Waire ng'ekibuga ekyo n'ekibaire ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga bwe, Musengwa oyo akirekuliire agho olw'okuba asungughaire." 
Lamentations2:2 Musengwa yazikiriza ebibuga eby'Abaisiraeli ng'aziramu kusaasira naire. Olw'obusungu yamenhamenha ebifo Abayudaaya mwe beewogomanga. Yaasuula obwakyabazinga n'abafuzi baamu ghansi. 
Lamentations2:3 Amaani Abaisiraeli ge baali nago, Musengwa yasungughala ekibitiriire yaagabamalamu. Yaalekera agho okubabeera, baalumbibwa abazigu. Obusungu bwe bwayakira ku Bayudaaya ng'oti muliro, yaazikiriza buli kintu." 
Lamentations2:4 Yadhuumuula akalaso ke n'omukono gwe omusaadha, yaakabalinzaamu ng'oti muzigu waibwe. Yaita abo boonaboona abaabeeyagazanga. Obusungu bwe bwabookya ng'oti muliro." 
Lamentations2:5 Musengwa yafuuka ng'oti muzigu wa Baisiraeli yaabazikiriza; yaazikiriza ebisaagaati eby'abakungu byonabyona era yaamenhamenha ebifo eby'okwewogomamu byafuuka bifulukwa byereere. Yaaleetera okulira mu Bayudaaya okweyongera. 
Lamentations2:6 Yamenhagho eisinzizo lye ng'ole bw'amenhagho entindi eba ng'eri mu musiri, endhu eyo abantu mwe baajanga olw'embaga edh'ebibinuko ebyalagirwa, yaagizikiriza yafuuka bifulukwa byereere. Musengwa yalekeza agho ebibinuko ebyalagirwa, yaalekeza ni Sabbato. Era olw'obusungu obungi, kyabazinga ni bakabona takaabaliku naire." 
Lamentations2:7 Musengwa yazira alutaari ye, yaalekulira agho eisinzizo lye. Era yaganha abazigu baamenha ebisenge byalyo. Abazigu baakubira mu ndhu ya Musengwa emizira egy'obughanguzi, ng'oti n'Abaisiraeli beene bwe baakubirangamu emizira egy'embaga edh'ebibinuko ebyalagirwa." 
Lamentations2:8 Musengwa yasalagho nga mumalirivu okuzikiriza ekimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga Sioni. Yasooka kukipima n'oluwuuzi olupima, ghabule akasigalagho nga tikamenheibwa. Yakizikiriza n'omukono gwe gwene, ng'obona ebituuti ebirengererwaku n'ebimante ebyali byezungulwire ekibuga nga biri ng'oti biri kulira maziga, era byaba agho bityo nga gabiwoire." 
Lamentations2:9 Endhigi dhaakyo dhaagwa era ebiwumpu byadheebungaku, n'eminhololo egyadhisibanga gyamenhekamenheka. Kyabazinga waamu n'abakungu be bali eyo mu maghanga mu bunhage, era mu kibuga ekyo timukaalimu mateeka. Abalanzi baamu tibakaabonekerwa Musengwa Katonda." 
Lamentations2:10 Abasaadha abakaire ab'omu kibuga Sioni batyama agho ku itaka baasiriikirira. Beeyugha enkungu mu mitwe nga beesibye ebikaakaati olw'enaku. N'abaghala baamu boona baakuba amakiryaivu agho ku itaka. 
Lamentations2:11 Amaiso gaanafiighe olw'okulira, era ntabwirwa mu mwoyo. Amaani gampoire n'enaku yangema olw'okuzikirizibwa okw'abantu bange, n'olw'abaana abato abayonka era n'abo abakuzekuzeemu abalambukira ku nguudo edh'ekibuga." 
Lamentations2:12 Balira nga basuubira bakaire baibwe okubagha eky'okulya n'eky'okunhwa. Batondoka baagwa ku nguudo edh'ekibuga ng'oti n'abasaadha abatabaazi be bafumiite. Obulamu obw'abaana abo buja nga buweeragho mu ngalo dha bakaire baibwe. 
Lamentations2:13 Abantu ab'e Yerusalemu, imwe be ngonza oti ki, nkobe ki? Mbageze ku ki? Mbafaananie ki imwe, ekinaabaleetera okusaasirwa? Okuzikirizibwa kwaimwe tikwakukoma oti n'amaadhi ag'enhandha agaidha ni gaabeeyaagho obweye; ghazira aghanga kwizaagho bintu byazikirizibwa." 
Lamentations2:14 Abalanzi baimwe, mu kifo eky'okubakobera okubonekerwa okuva ewa Katonda, baabakoberanga bya buguya, ebibi byaimwe baabighembaku bughembe okubafiiriza enkabi. Obukwenda obuva ye Katonda baabubakobera mu busobu, bwabaleetera okudaaliima." 
Lamentations2:15 Abantu boonaboona ababita ku kibuga ekyo, bakiziimuula era baakisekerera. Beesiimooza, baatengeesa emitwe nga bavuma ekibuga ekyo Yerusalemu, nga beebuuza bati: “Kino bwene n'ekibuga kye baayetanga ekituukiriire mu bulungi era ekyeyagazanga abantu ab'ensi yoonayoona?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Abazigu baimwe boonaboona babaziimuula, beesiimooza, baaluma emba nga bakoba bati: “Otyo, tukizikiriiza! Olunaku luno lulongoire lwatuuka twalubonaku, tubaire tumaze entangama nga tuluteegereire.”" 
Lamentations2:17 Musengwa alwire eira yaatuukiriza ekigendererwa kye, nga bwe yatwesoomera. Era nga bwe yasalagho eira einho, azikiriiza ng'aziramu na kusaasira. Aghaire abazigu baife okusagamba olw'obughanguzi, yaabongera okuba ab'amaani einho." 
Lamentations2:18 Imwe abantu ab'omu Sioni, muwowoole Musengwa abawulire! Muwowoole amaziga gakuuluule ng'oti mwiga omusana n'obwire! Mutaganha kuwoleeraku naire waire okumalaku akaseera ng'amaiso gaimwe gabakaze amaziga." 
Lamentations2:19 Muzuuke obwire emikuzi egigheraku mulirire Musengwa! Mumukobere ebibali ku mwoyo byonabyona ng'awulira. Mughanike amakono mugoolekeze Musengwa Katonda, nga musabira abaana baimwe abali kulambukira endhala ku nguudo dh'ekibuga." 
Lamentations2:20 Wo Musengwa Katonda, tulingirire obone bwe tudaaga. Naani ye waali obisiisaaku oti? Kibangaghooku abakazi okulya abaana abaibwe beene, be baakuza obukalamu nga babagonza? Kibangaghooku bakabona n'abalanzi okwitirwa mu kifo kya Musengwa ekitukuvu?" 
Lamentations2:21 Abakaire n'abato baagaanibwa nga bafu, nga bagwire agho ghansi ku nguudo edh'ekibuga, abaisuka n'abaguna baitibwa n'empiima. Iwe mwene wabasala ku lunaku lwe wasungughaliraku waabaita ng'oziramu na kusaasira." 
Lamentations2:22 Wayeta abazigu bange baaneezungulula, ng'oti n'abantu abeesoloiza ku lunaku olw'embaga ey'ekibinuko ekyalagirwa. Era Musengwa Katonda, ku olwo lunaku lwe wasungughaliraku, nga ghazira asobola kukunuuka oba kukuwona. Abazigu bange baazikiriza abaana be nalera ni nkuza." 
Lamentations3:1 Ninze ndidhi okubonerezebwa Katonda kye kitegeeza; ninze ndidhi omwigo gwe bwe guluma ng'asungughaire. 
Lamentations3:2 Yansindiikiriza yaanhingiza mu nzikiiza eri bedimudimu. 
Lamentations3:3 Bwenebwene yanfunta ebifunsi n'omukono gwe olunaku lwonalwona, ng'aziramu na kusaasira." 
Lamentations3:4 Yangoogombya naaweera mu luwu, n'amagumba gange yaagamenhamenha." 
Lamentations3:5 Yanzingiza ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, naasigala agho nga ndi kudaagadaaga n'ebizibu kamaala." 
Lamentations3:6 Yanta mu nzikiiza yansibira omwo, naaba ng'oti n'abaafa eira." 
Lamentations3:7 Yanzimbaku ekimante okuneezunguluza nga tighanga kumunuuka kulumuka, era yansibaku endhegere enzito." 
Lamentations3:8 Mba agho naamusaba nga ndira, aye yaaloba okuwulirisa okusaba kwange." 
Lamentations3:9 Buli ghe nhenda okubita azimbagho ekimante eky'amabaale amabaadhe amanene, era aleetera engira dhe mbitamu okuba enzibu." 
Lamentations3:10 Aneeteega ng'oti n'ekisolo ekikambwe bwe kyeteega obusolo bwe kirya, era ng'oti n'empologoma ebwama ng'eyenda okutuumira ku nsolo." 
Lamentations3:11 Yankwekwebya okuntoola mu ngira yange yankankanula, yandekulira agho ntyo nga ndaaga." 
Lamentations3:12 Yaadhuumuula akalaso ke yaakaaningiriza, obusaale bwe bunkube." 
Lamentations3:13 Yatoola obulaso bwe mu kiruutu kyabwo, bwanfumitira irala ku mwoyo." 
Lamentations3:14 Nafuuka ekisekererwa eri abantu boonaboona, era olunaku lwonalwona bemba enhembo edh'okundheedha." 
Lamentations3:15 Yandeetera okudaagadaaga okutaloodheka, kwankaayirira ng'oti n'omuntu ye bakaka ebikaagha." 
Lamentations3:16 Yansindika ku mabaale naamenheka amaino, era yanvulunga mu nkungu okwoleka nga bwenzira mugaso." 
Lamentations3:17 Omwoyo gwange taguganha kufuna miraala, era nze neerabira ira ekyetebwa isanhu." 
Lamentations3:18 Kyenva ni nkoba mule nti okuguminkiriza kwange n'okusuubira kwange mu Musengwa Katonda, bituuse okuwaagho." 
Lamentations3:19 Bwe ndidhukira okudaazibwadaazibwa kwange n'okutambulatambula eyo ntyo ng'azira waibwe, mba ng'ali kunhwa eirogo erikaagha." 
Lamentations3:20 Ekyo nja naakirowoozaaku buli kiseera omwoyo gwangwa mu bigere. 
Lamentations3:21 Aye eriyo kye ndidhukira nairamu eisuubi: 
Lamentations3:22 Okugonza kwa Musengwa tikukoma n'ekisa kye tikiwa. 
Lamentations3:23 Buli nkyo biba ng'oti biyaaka, bwenebwene obwesigwa bwo tibukoma." 
Lamentations3:24 Nkiidhi bukalamu mu mwoyo gwange nti Musengwa ye neesiga ku nsi. Olw'ekyo eisuubi lyange liri mu oyo. 
Lamentations3:25 Musengwa mulungi eri abo abamwesiga, mulungi eri omwoyo ogufaayo okukola by'ayenda." 
Lamentations3:26 Kale kiba kikalamu ole yaasirika, yaateegerera obulokozi obuva eri Musengwa Katonda." 
Lamentations3:27 Era kiba kikalamu omuntu okwega okuguminkiriza okwo ng'akaali muto. 
Lamentations3:28 Kale leka omuntu yeenayeena adaazibwadaazibwa Musengwa, atyamenga yenka asiriikirire," 
Lamentations3:29 era yeewooye abenga gha bigere bya Musengwa Katonda; kuba ghasobola okuba nga ghakaaligho eisuubi. 
Lamentations3:30 Era omuntu oyo atafangayo ku mikuzi emeka gy'akubiibwa, oba ku bivumo ki by'avumiibwa." 
Lamentations3:31 Musengwa talekulira agho muntu n'amwerabirira irala. 
Lamentations3:32 Waire asobola okuleetera omuntu okudaagadaaga, aye olw'okugonza kwe okungi okutakoma, amala yaamugemerwa ekivunika;" 
Lamentations3:33 kuba takikola nga yeeyendeire okudaazadaaza oba okulumya omuntu. 
Lamentations3:34 Musengwa amanha bweghabaagho omuntu yeenayeena omusibe anhigirizibwa ku nsi kuno. 
Lamentations3:35 Era amanha bweghabaagho omuntu atakoleirwa kintu mu butuufu. 
Lamentations3:36 Era yaamanha bweghabaagho omuntu asaliirwa omusango mu bukyamu. 
Lamentations3:37 Naani asobola okulagira ekintu ni kibaagho okutoolaku nga Musengwa n'asazeegho kibeegho? 
Lamentations3:38 Ghaligho ekirungi oba ekibi ekigwagho ng'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene ti n'akiragiire? 
Lamentations3:39 Lwaki omuntu yeemuluguunhia ng'ali kubonerezebwa olw'ebibi bye? 
Lamentations3:40 Ka twekebere tubone ensambo ye twebisaamu, twire ye Musengwa Katonda." 
Lamentations3:41 Ka twiguliregho Katonda ow'eigulu emyoyo gyaife era tumusabe. 
Lamentations3:42 “Wo Musengwa twayonoona twakudheemera, era tiwatusonigha." 
Lamentations3:43 Waidhula obusungu bwakubwikirira, waatubingirira era waatumulungula ng'oziramu na kusaasira." 
Lamentations3:44 Weebwikirira ekire olobe kuwulira nga tuli kukusaba. 
Lamentations3:45 Ife watufuula ng'ebisoodo omuntu bye yeeyeya mu bigere n'aleka agho. 
Lamentations3:46 Abazigu baife boonaboona batuvuma, baatuziimuula." 
Lamentations3:47 Batulumba twatya inho, baatufafaagania era baatuzikiriza." 
Lamentations3:48 Nja naalira amaziga ganfukumuka mu maiso ng'oti miiga, olw'okuzikirizibwa okw'abantu bange." 
Lamentations3:49 Amaiso gange gakuuluula amaziga ekiseera kyonakyona aghazira kulekeramu naire," 
Lamentations3:50 okutuusa Musengwa ali mu igulu lw'alinga ghansi naabona abantu be bwe bali kudaagadaaga. 
Lamentations3:51 Amaiso gange bye gabona ebyatuuka ku bakazi ab'ekibuga kyange bindeeta enaku ku mwoyo. 
Lamentations3:52 Abo abeefuula abazigu bange nga bazira na nsonga ntuufu, bandhiiga ng'oti bayiiga nhonhi." 
Lamentations3:53 Bansuula mu kiina nga ndi mulamu, baamala baakitaaku n'eibaale." 
Lamentations3:54 Bwe nabona ng'amaadhi gatooleire okuumira, naakoba nti: ‘Leero luno nfiire.’" 
Lamentations3:55 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nga ndi eyo ku ntobo ey'ekiina nakulirira." 
Lamentations3:56 Wampulirisa bwe nakweghemba nti, ‘Otaloba kumpulira nga ndi kukusaba okumbeera.’" 
Lamentations3:57 Bwe nakulirira waseeta kumpi ninze era wankoba oti, ‘Otatya.’" 
Lamentations3:58 Wampolezaagho nga ndi ku musango, wamponia okwitibwa." 
Lamentations3:59 Wo Musengwa Katonda, iwe bona ebibi bye bankola, nkusaba obasalire omusango gubasinge." 
Lamentations3:60 Obona nga bwe beeguguna okuneesasuulizaaku, era waabona entegeka dhaibwe dhoonadhoona edh'okunkola obubi." 
Lamentations3:61 Wo Musengwa Katonda, owulira bwe bandheedha, era omanha n'entegeka dhaibwe dhoonadhoona edh'okunkola obubi." 
Lamentations3:62 Ebibono abazigu bange bye boogera n'ebidhuubo bye baba nabyo olunaku lwonalwona, biba bya kuunumya nze." 
Lamentations3:63 Okuva enkyo okutuusa igulo, bemba enhembo edh'okundheedha." 
Lamentations3:64 Wo Musengwa Katonda, baneesasuulizeeku olw'ebyo bye bankola." 
Lamentations3:65 Bateeku ekikolimo obooleke nga bw'oli omukambwe. 
Lamentations3:66 Wo Musengwa Katonda, babingirire ng'osungughaire, era obazikirize baweegho ghansi ghe igulu.”" 
Lamentations4:1 Ha, nga kyewuunhisa engeri zaabu ye yalekeramu okumesunkana; zaabu mwenemwene omukenenule n'afuukafuuka! Amabaale geenegeene agaabanga mu kifo ekitukuvu, okwagaanibwa mu nguudo dhoonadhoona edh'omu kibuga nga masuulesuule." 
Lamentations4:2 Abaisuka ab'omu Sioni abaatwalibwanga okuba ab'omughendo ng'oti zaabu mukenenule, buti batwalibwa ng'oti bitamutamu bya itosi." 
Lamentations4:3 Ni bwebiba ebibe, biyonsa era byalabirira ebyana byabyo, aye abantu bange bakambughala baaba ng'oti ni maaya edh'omu irungu edhitafa ku baana baadho." 
Lamentations4:4 Baleka abaana baibwe enimi dhaabakalira mu kanwa mwaibwe olw'endiwo ey'amaadhi; abaana baasaba emere aye ghaabula agibagha. 
Lamentations4:5 Abo abaalyanga ebiiwulo ebigwanira okuliibwa bakyabazinga, buti balambukira ku nguudo edh'ekibuga; n'abo abaakuzibwa ng'abaana b'abakombe, buti obaagaana nga bali kwebuguya ku mmungo dh'ebikaba." 
Lamentations4:6 Ekibonerezo abantu bange kye baafuna kinene okusinga ekibonerezo ekyagheebwa Sodoma, Katonda kye yazikiriza mu kaseera akazira ghe kaaga." 
Lamentations4:7 Abakungu ab'omu Yerusalemu baali nga batukula okusinga amabaale ag'omugozi era nga beeru okusinga amata; emibiri gyaibwe nga gya maani era nga ginherengeta okusinga eibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa korali, era nga baboneka bulungi inho ng'oti n'eibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa saffiro." 
Lamentations4:8 Aye buti mu maiso bairugavu okusinga enziro, era ole ni bw'abaagaana mu ngira takaabamanha. Emibiri gyaibwe gyabakala ng'oti muti mukalu, era gyabeeriipira ku magumba." 
Lamentations4:9 Abaafumitibwanga empiima baafanga bulungiku okusinga abaafanga endhala; kuba bano baalambukanga mpola okutuusa lwe baafanga, olw'okubulwa emere ey'okubabeesaagho nga balamu." 
Lamentations4:10 Mu biseera abantu bange bye baazikiriramu, abakazi beenebeene abaamanhibwa okuba abasaasizi, baatuuka okufumba abaana baibwe beene baabafuula emere." 
Lamentations4:11 Musengwa Katonda yadhuuna obutalekamu, era obusungu bwe bwayaka ng'oti muliro yaateera oluyiira olwayokya Sioni okutuukira irala ku misingi gyakyo." 
Lamentations4:12 Mu bakyabazinga boonaboona ni mu bantu abandi boonaboona ab'oku nsi, yali ezira asobola kwikiriza nga ghaligho omuzigu oba omulumbagani yeenayeena, asobola okwingira mu miryango gya Yerusalemu." 
Lamentations4:13 Aye ekyo kyabaagho olw'ebibi eby'abalanzi baamu, n'olw'okwonoona okwa bakabona baamu, abaakiitirangamu abantu abatuufu." 
Lamentations4:14 Abalanzi abo ni bakabona abo baatambulatambulanga eyo batyo mu nguudo edh'ekibuga ng'oti batulu, nga boonoonefu olw'omusaayi gw'abantu be baitanga, era ng'olw'ekyo ghazira muntu agema ku bivaalo byaibwe." 
Lamentations4:15 Nga kiisi muntu ababonaku abasama busame ati: “Ja ere. Oli mwonoonefu. Ja, ja, ja. Tongema naku.” Kale baatambulatambulanga eyo batyo nga bazira ghe baba, era nga mu nsi dhoonadhoona ezira abasangaaza." 
Lamentations4:16 Musengwa mwene yabasansaania, nga takaabafaaku, nga takaata mu bakabona kitiisa, era nga takaagemerwa bakulembeze kivunika." 
Lamentations4:17 Twalingirira, amaiso gaatuuka okutunafugha, aye ng'ezira buyambi. Ghaligho eighanga lye twalingirirangaku nga tudhuuba tuti lighanga okutubeera, aye tiryatubeera." 
Lamentations4:18 Ng'abazigu batulondoola buli ghe tuta ekigere, baatutiisa n'okutambulira mu nguudo, twawulira mule nga okufa tikuli ghala, ng'enaku dhisigaireyo mbale bubale." 
Lamentations4:19 Abazigu nga batubingirira embiro okusingaku n'enkookooma bw'eguluka mu ibbanga; baatubingirira mu nsozi, era baatweteega ni mu irungu." 
Lamentations4:20 Baasima ebiina okutega kyabazinga, oyo Musengwa Katonda ye yasiiga omuzigo abenga obugheereso bwaife, era baamala baamugemya. Ate ng'oyo ye twali tudhuuba tuti n'anaatulwaniriringa nga tulumbiibwa." 
Lamentations4:21 Imwe abantu ab'e Edomu n'imwe ababa mu Uzi museke inho era musagambe inho nga mukaali. Aye olwaimwe luli kwidha, lwe muligemesebwa ekikopo eky'obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda. Mulikinhwa mwatamiira mwatoolera n'okubita amadu." 
Lamentations4:22 Imwe ab'omu Sioni ekibonerezo kyaimwe olw'okwonoona kiwoire, Musengwa Katonda takaayongera kubakuumira mu bunhage. Aye imwe Abaedomu, Musengwa aja kwoleka okwonoona kwaimwe era ababonereze." 
Lamentations5:1 Wo Musengwa Katonda, idhukira ebyo abazigu baife bye baatutuusaaku. Bwenebwene lingirira obone bwe twaswala!" 
Lamentations5:2 Ebintu ebyaife bye twagheebwa, kabiri byamala byagheebwa bantu bandi be tutaidhi; abantu abamaghanga agandi buti n'abali mu ndhu dhaife." 
Lamentations5:3 Abazigu abo baatwitaku balata baife, twafuuka bamulekwa; ate bakaire baife baafuuka banamwandu." 
Lamentations5:4 Buti tuli n'okusasulira amaadhi ge tunhwa era n'enku dhe tufumbisa. 
Lamentations5:5 Batusindiikiriza bya ntaka ng'ate tuli n'ebikoligo mu nkoto; ni bwetukoogha tutya tibatuganha kuwolaku. 
Lamentations5:6 Twakakibwa okusabiriza emere okuva e Misiri ni mu Assiria, tulobe kulambuka ndhala." 
Lamentations5:7 Badhaadha baife baayonoona era baamala baafa, buti niife tudaazibwadaazibwa olw'okwonoona kwaibwe okwo." 
Lamentations5:8 Tufugibwa abairu obwiru era twabulaku abatuwonia. 
Lamentations5:9 Okuja okwagala emere tweghaayo bweghe, olw'abatemo ababa eyo mu irungu." 
Lamentations5:10 Emibiri gitusuuyiriire ng'oti n'abali gha ziiko, olw'endhala etuleetera okwokererwa." 
Lamentations5:11 Abazigu abo baagema abakazi baife n'abaghala abaguna baabakaka, mu Sioni era ni mu bibuga ebindi eby'omu Buyudaaya." 
Lamentations5:12 Baasiba abakungu baife ku migugha, baabaghanika baabalengeedhia ku miti okutuusa lwe bafa, era ghazira kitiisa kye bata mu bakaire." 
Lamentations5:13 Bakaka abaisuka baife okusa ku mmengo, abalenzi abato baayuuga n'ebinhwa by'enku ebizito." 
Lamentations5:14 Abakaire baalekera okutyama mu kifo eky'olwekobaano ku mulyango ogwingira mu kibuga, n'abaisuka baalekera agho okukuba enhembo." 
Lamentations5:15 Eisanhu mu myoyo gyaife lyawaamu, n'agaali amakina gaafuuka kulira na kwekuba bigwo." 
Lamentations5:16 Ghazira akaatutaamu kitiisa. Tukagwireku, kuba twayonoona." 
Lamentations5:17 Olw'ekyo, omwoyo gwatulwala era amaiso gaatuwaaku obwogi, tutangaala butangaale." 
Lamentations5:18 Olw'okuba olusozi Sioni lwasigalira agho nga tighakaali alubaaku, ebibe ni byonka ebirutambuliratambuliraku nga byagala eky'okulya." 
Lamentations5:19 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda, niiwe ofuga ebyanda n'ebyanda, era ekityamo kyo eky'obwakyabazinga kibaagho mu nse dhoonadhoona." 
Lamentations5:20 Lwaki otwerabiire obwaga agho? Lwaki otulekuliire agho? 
Lamentations5:21 Wo Musengwa Katonda, twize y'oli, twidha kwira! Twirizeegho ekitiisa kyaife nga bwetwalinga eira." 
Lamentations5:22 Obwo bwenebwene watusuulira irala ere nga toliirayo kutwiza y'oli? Okusungughala kwo tikuja kukoma? 
Ezekiel1:1 Ku lunaku olwokutaanu mu mwezi ogwokuna, mu mwaka ogwamakumi asatu (30), nze Ezekieli kabona mutabane wa Buzi, mu biseera ebyo nali mba ghalala ni banhage banange agho kumpi n'omwiga ogwetebwa Kebari mu Babilonia. Agho eigulu lyaghembuka era naabonekerwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel1:2 Ogwo gwali nga n'omwaka ogwokutaanu kasookanga kyabazinga Yehoiakini atwalibwa mu bunhage. 
Ezekiel1:3 Nga tuli eyo e Babilonia okumpi n'omwiga Kebari, Musengwa Katonda yayogera ninze era naawulira mule ng'amaani ge gandidhieku." 
Ezekiel1:4 Bwe nali nga nkaalingiriire, naabona empewo ey'amaani ng'ekunta okuva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Naabona n'ekire ekikologho nga kyezungulwirwa okumyansa, era nga kirimu n'omuliro oguli kwaka obutalekera. Ghagati mu muliro ogwo nga ghali kumirimiinha ng'oti kyuma kya kikomo ekizigule." 
Ezekiel1:5 Era ghagati agho nga ghaligho ebintu bina, ebyaboneka ng'oti n'ebitonde ebiramu. Byali biboneka ng'oti bantu," 
Ezekiel1:6 aye nga buli kirala kiri n'obweni bwa mikuzi ena era kyaba n'amaghagha ana. 
Ezekiel1:7 Amagulu gaabyo gaali matereevu agaziramu ngode naire, n'ebibbonge byabyo byaba ng'oti binuulo bya nte nto. Byali biri kumesunkana ng'oti n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo ekizigule." 
Ezekiel1:8 Ebitonde ebiramu ebyo ebina (4) ebyaliku obweni obw'emikuzi ena ni bibaaku n'amaghagha ana, era byaliku n'emikono ena egiri ng'oti gya bantu, nga giri ghansi w'amaghagha gaabyo, ku ndhuyi dhaabyo eina." 
Ezekiel1:9 Buli kirala kyali kyandhulwiza amaghagha gaakyo, kyaba nti buli nkomerero ey'eighagha lyakyo egema ku nkomerero edh'amaghagha ga biinaakyo ebikiri eruuyi n'eruuyi. Kale nga buli ye bija, bijiira ghalala nga bigemagaine aghazira kukyuka naire." 
Ezekiel1:10 Buli kirala ku bitonde ebiramu ebyo ebina (4) kyaliku obweni nga bwa mikuzi ena: kyaliku obwali ng'oti bwa muntu nga buli emberi waakyo, kyabaaku obwali ng'oti bwa mpologoma ku luuyi lwakyo olw'omukono omusaadha, kyabaaku obwali ng'oti bwa nte nume ku luuyi lwakyo olw'omukono omugooda, era kyabaaku obwali ng'oti bwa nkookooma y'enkoone yaakyo." 
Ezekiel1:11 Bityo bwe byali nga biboneka mu maiso. Era buli kirala kyali kyandhulwiza amaghagha gaakyo, abiri nga gagemye ku nkomerero edh'amaghagha ga biinaakyo ebikiri eruuyi n'eruuyi, ate abiri agandi nga kigaghembye ku mubiri gwakyo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Olw'okuba nti buli kirala kyali n'obweni obulingiriire ku ndhuyi eina, kyasobolanga okuja buli ghantu omwoyo ye gwayendanga kije, aghazira kukyetaagisa kukyuka." 
Ezekiel1:13 Ghagati agh'ebitonde ebiramu ebyo ghaaligho ebintu ebyaboneka ng'oti manda agaliku omuliro, oba ng'oti bisiki ebiri kwaka. Ebintu ebyo byali nga biri kutambula bwe biira eno n'ere ghagati mu bitonde ebiramu ebyo. Era omuliro ogwo nga guli kumalanga gwayaka inho, gwavaamu okumyansa ng'oti kwa lukuba." 
Ezekiel1:14 N'ebitonde ebiramu ebyo byona byali biri kumansuka embiro ng'oti kughemya kwa lukuba, nga biira eno n'ere." 
Ezekiel1:15 Bwe nali nkaalingiriire ebitonde ebiramu ebyo ebina (4), naabona enkede ina nga dhiri ku itaka, nga buli gha mbali gha kitonde ghaligho enkede ndala ndala." 
Ezekiel1:16 Enkede edho eina dhoonadhoona dhaakolebwa nga dhifaanana era nga dhimirimiinha ng'oti ibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa kurisolito. Buli nkede yali eboneka ng'oti erimu enkede eyindi ghagati ghaayo obukiika. 
Ezekiel1:17 Kale enkede edho nga dhisobola okuja ku ndhuyi eina aghazira kudheetaagisa kukyuka. 
Ezekiel1:18 Enkede edho dhaaliku empanka n'empagi, era nga dhiriku amaiso dhoonadhoona okudheezunguluza." 
Ezekiel1:19 Ebitonde ebiramu ebyo buli ghe byajanga, nga n'enkede edho dhoona dhijiira ghalala nabyo. Era bwe byasitukanga mu ibbanga, nga n'enkede edho dhoona dhisitukira ghalala nabyo." 
Ezekiel1:20 Ebitonde ebiramu ebyo byajanga yoonayoona ye byayendanga, era nga n'enkede edho dhoona dhijiira ghalala nabyo, kuba omwoyo gwabyo gwali mu nkede edho." 
Ezekiel1:21 Kale ebitonde ebiramu ebyo bwe byabanga ni ye bija, oba ni byemerera, oba ni bisituka mu ibbanga, nga n'enkede edho dhoona dhikola dhityo kuba omwoyo gwabyo gwali mu nkede edho." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ghaigulu gh'emitwe egy'ebitonde ebiramu ebyo ghaaligho ekintu ekyaboneka ng'oti ni ku igulu era nga kimesunkana ng'oti n'eibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa kurisitalo. 
Ezekiel1:23 Ghansi agho agh'ekintu ekyaboneka ng'oti ni ku igulu, n'aghaali ebitonde ebiramu ebyo nga buli kirala kyandhulwiza amaghagha gaakyo abiri, buli ighagha lyatuuka ku ly'ekitonde ekiramu ekindi ekikiriiraine. Era buli kitonde nga kiri n'amaghagha agandi abiri ge kyakozesa okweghemba ku mubiri gwakyo." 
Ezekiel1:24 Bwe byaguluka ni bija, naawulira omuvuuma ogw'amaghagha gaabyo nga guli ng'oti mpiriito ya maadhi, kabiri ng'oti n'okutyabuka okw'amamiro ag'oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, era ng'oti n'okuwowoigana okw'eigye. Ate bwe byalekera okuguluka, byaisa amaghagha gaabyo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Bwe byalekera okuguluka ni biisa amaghagha gaabyo, ghaabaagho amamiro agaawulikika nga gali kuva ghaigulu gh'ekintu ekyaboneka ng'oti ni ku igulu ekyali gha mitwe gyabyo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Ghaigulu agh'emitwe egy'ebitonde ebiramu ebyo, mu ibbanga eryali ghaigulu ku ngulu, ghaaligho ekyaboneka ng'oti kityamo kya bwakyabazinga, nga kifaanana ng'oti n'eibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa saffiro. Ku kityamo ekyo ekyaboneka ng'oti kya bwakyabazinga kwali kutyaimeku eyaboneka ng'oti muntu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Okuva aghaaboneka ng'oti n'enkende ye okuja ghaigulu, yali amesunkana ng'oti n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo ekizigule era ng'ali ng'oti omuliro gumwezungulwire yeenayeena. Ate okuva aghaaboneka ng'oti n'enkende ye okwika ghansi, ng'ali ng'oti ali mu muliro era ng'obutangaavu bumwezungulwire yeenayeena," 
Ezekiel1:28 obufaanana ni musoke asala ku igulu ng'amaadhi gali kughemya. Ekyo n'ekifaananie ekyaligho ekyayoleka ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda. Bwe nabona ebyo naakuba amakiryaivu era naakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Agho naawulira amamiro agakoba gati: 
Ezekiel2:1 “Iwe omuntu, yemerera ku magulu go ndhogere n'iwe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Amamiro ago bwe gaali gali kwogera ninze, omwoyo gwa Katonda gwandidhaku, gwanginga gwanhemereza ku magulu gange. Naawulira ng'amamiro gali kwogera ninze," 
Ezekiel2:3 nga gakoba gati: “Iwe omuntu, ndi kukutuma y'Abaisiraeli, eighanga eryo ery'abadheemu. Abantu abo banvaaku baakola ebibi ye ndi ng'oti ni badhaadha baibwe bwe baakola, era bakandheemera ni ye buli eno." 
Ezekiel2:4 Bali n'empwitu era tibantaamu kanhagansi naire. Kale ndi kukutuma ye bali, obakobere nze Musengwa Katonda bye ndi kubakoba." 
Ezekiel2:5 Oba abadheemu abo bakuwulirisa oba tibakuwulirisa, aye era balimanha nga ghaalighooku omulanzi eyababaamu." 
Ezekiel2:6 “Era iwe omuntu otabatyanga waire okutyanga bye boogera. Ni bw'onaababangamu ng'oti n'omuntu ali mu nkandwa ni mu mawa, oba ng'oti n'atyaime ku siga, otatyanga badheemu abo bye boogera waire okudhugumira olw'emmoga yaibwe eidhwire obukambwe." 
Ezekiel2:7 Oidha kubakobera bye ndi kukutuma okubakobera, oba bawulirisa oba tibawulirisa." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Aye iwe omuntu wulirisa kye ndi kukukoba: otaba mudheemu ng'oti ni beene. Kola oyasame, olye kye nja okukugha.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Naja okulinga nti, nga mbona omukono ogusonse ye ndi. Era okuja okwetegereza nga mbona gugemye enzingo ey'ekitabo erimu ebighandiikiibwaku." 
Ezekiel2:10 Agho yaazingulula enzingo ey'ekitabo eyo mu maiso gange, naabona nga yaghandiikibwaku munda ni ku ngulu. Yali nga yaghandiikibwaku ebibono eby'okulira enaku, n'okugegenga, n'okuwowoola." 
Ezekiel3:1 Agho Katonda yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, lya enzingo ey'ekitabo eyo ekugheereibwa, omale oje oyogere n'abantu b'omu Isiraeli.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Kale naayasama, yampa enzingo ey'ekitabo eyo okugirya." 
Ezekiel3:3 Era yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, lya enzingo ey'ekitabo eyo ye nkughaire ekutuuke mu nda ekwigute.” Agho naagirya era mule mu kanwa yaadhuudhuula ng'oti mudheenene gwa ndhuki." 
Ezekiel3:4 Katonda oyo yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, ja y'abantu b'omu Isiraeli obakobere bye nja okukukoba." 
Ezekiel3:5 Tiri kukutuma ya ighanga lyogera by'otategeera era ery'olulimi olukalangafu, aye ndi kukutuma y'abantu b'omu Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel3:6 Ngoli ndi kukutuma ya maghanga mangi agoogera by'otategeera era ag'enimi enkalangafu, bwenebwene abantu b'omu maghanga ago bandikuwuliriisa." 
Ezekiel3:7 Aye ab'eighanga lya Isiraeli tibaidha kukuwulirisa, kuba tibenda kuwulira nze bye mbakoba, olw'okuba ba mpwitu era baakalanguka emyoyo." 
Ezekiel3:8 Bona eno, mperaano weena nkufiire obe n'empwitu era okalanguke omwoyo ng'oti ni beene." 
Ezekiel3:9 Nkufiire obe mubbalangafu okusinga n'olubaale. Kale otatyanga badheemu abo waire okudhugumira olw'emmoga yaibwe eidhwire obukambwe.” 
Ezekiel3:10 Era Katonda oyo yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, tega kutu owulire byonabyona bye nja okukukoba era obiteeku omwoyo." 
Ezekiel3:11 Memale olwo oje ye Baisiraeli baino abali mu bunhage, obakobere ebyo nze Musengwa Katonda bye nhenda okubakoba, oba bakuwulirisa oba tibakuwulirisa.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Agho omwoyo gwa Katonda gwambeeda, ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kyasituka nga kiva mu kifo kyakyo, era naawulira emugongo wange omuvuuma oguli ng'oti kugugumuka kwa musisi ow'amaani einho." 
Ezekiel3:13 Omuvuuma ogwo gwe nawulira, gaali amaghagha ag'ebitonde ebiramu ebina (4) nga gali kugemaganaku, ng'otaireku n'okuvuga okw'enkede edhaajiiranga aghalala n'ebitonde ebiramu ebyo. Ebyo n'ebyawulikika ng'oti kugugumuka kwa musisi ow'amaani einho." 
Ezekiel3:14 Omwoyo gwa Katonda gwambeeda gwantwala, naaja nga ndiku obusungu n'enaku, era amaani ga Musengwa Katonda gandidhaku mangi inho." 
Ezekiel3:15 Agho naatuuka e Telabibu kumpi n'omwiga Kebari, abantu be baatwala mu bunhage ghe baabanga. Naaba ghalala nabo okumala enaku musanvu, nga ntiire olw'ebyo bye nabona ni bye nawulira." 
Ezekiel3:16 Enaku edho omusanvu bwe dhaawaaku, Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze. Yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel3:17 “Iwe omuntu, nkutairegho obe omukuumi ow'abantu b'omu Isiraeli. Buli lw'onaawuliranga bye nkoba, ng'olwo oja obatuusaaku okulabula kwange kwe nnaabanga nkutumye." 
Ezekiel3:18 Bwe nkoba omuntu omukozi w'ebibi nti, ‘Bwenebwene oidha kufa,’ aye iwe n'otalabula muntu oyo kuva mu bibi bye asobole okuwonia obulamu bwe, omuntu oyo alifiira mu bibi bye. Aye omusango ogw'okufa kwe ndiguta ku iwe." 
Ezekiel3:19 Aye bw'olabula omubi, n'aloba okukyuka okuva mu bibi bye oba okuva mu ngeri dhe embi, omuntu oyo alifiira mu bibi bye. Aye iwe oliba owoniiza obulamu bwo." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Ate omuntu akola ebituufu bw'akyuka n'ava ku kukola ebituufu n'akola ebibi, era zeena ni mmuleka obuleke yeekontole agwe, omuntu oyo bw'otalimulabula aja kufiira mu bibi bye. N'ebikolwa ebirungi by'aliba akoze tija kubiraadha naire. Ate omusango ogw'okufa kwe ndiguta ku iwe." 
Ezekiel3:21 Aye bw'olabula omuntu akola ebituufu alobe kukola bibi, era n'akuwulira n'atakola bibi, omuntu oyo bwenebwene aliba mulamu olw'okuwulirisa okulabula kwo. N'iwe weena oliba owoniiza obulamu bwo.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Agho naawulira mule ng'amaani ga Musengwa Katonda gandidhieku. Era Musengwa Katonda oyo yankoba ati: “Situkiramu oje mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe, eyo ye ndidha okwogerera n'iwe.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Kale naasitukiramu, naaja mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe. Bwe natuukayo naja okulinga nti, nga mbona ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda, ng'oti ni bwe nakibona nga ndi kumpi n'omwiga Kebari. Agho naakuba amakiryaivu naakutama n'obweni bwatuuka ku itaka." 
Ezekiel3:24 Aye omwoyo gwa Katonda gwandidhaku, gwansitusa gwanhemereza ku magulu gange, era gwayogera ninze. Gwankoba guti: “Ja weigalize mu ndhu yo." 
Ezekiel3:25 Era iwe omuntu, bona eno, baidha kukutaaku emigugha bagikusibise, obe nga tosobola kuja mu bantu." 
Ezekiel3:26 Era nja kuleetera olulimi lwo okukwesibira ku kibuno, obe ng'oti kasiru olwo olobe kusobola kulabula bantu abo abadheemu." 
Ezekiel3:27 Aye bwendiiramu okwogera niiwe, ndisimulula olulimi lwo, waabakobera nze Musengwa Katonda bye nhenda okubakoba. Abo abalyenda okuwulirisa baliwulirisa ate abatalyenda kuwulirisa balirekayo; kuba eighanga eryo lya bantu badheemu.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 Agho Katonda yaakoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, funayo eitoofaali olite agho mu maiso go, olikubeku ekifaananie eky'ekibuga Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Bw'omala, zimba ku kibuga ekyo ekimante eky'okukizingiza, obunge n'emungo dh'eitaka ku kimante ekyo edh'okuniiniraku okukirwanisa. Bw'omala, okisimbeku weema okukyezunguluza edh'abazigu ab'okukirumba, era okisimbeku n'ebintu eby'okukozesa okuwomola ekimante kyakyo." 
Ezekiel4:3 Olwo otoole olubaati, olusimbe lukole ng'ekisenge eky'ekyuma ghagati gh'ekibuga ekyo n'iwe. Omale amaiso go ogalingirize ekibuga ekyo, obe ng'oti bazigu bakizingiiza. Ako n'akanaaba akamanhiso eri eighanga lya Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Ng'omaze ekyo, oidha kulambaala kya mbavu ku luuyi olw'omukono gwo omugooda, nze nkuteeku ebibi eby'abeighanga lya Isiraeli. Enaku dh'onaamala ng'olambaaliire ku luuyi olwo, oidha kudhisasuliramu ebibi eby'eighanga Isiraeli."
