Ezekiel4:5 Nkusaliire enaku ebikumi bisatu na kyenda (390), odhimale agho ng'oli kukola ekibonerezo ekyo olw'ebibi eby'eighanga Isiraeli. Enaku edho dhitegeeza emyaka gye balimala nga bali kubonerezebwa." 
Ezekiel4:6 Edho bw'olidhimalaku, kabiri olirambaala omukuzi ogwokubiri eky'embavu, aye ku luuyi lule olundi olw'omukono gwo omusaadha. Naakusalira enaku amakumi ana (40), odhimale ng'oli kukola ekibonerezo olw'ebibi eby'eighanga Buyudaaya. Enaku edho dhitegeeza emyaka gye balimala nga bali kubonerezebwa." 
Ezekiel4:7 “Amaiso go galingirize ku Yerusalemu kye bazingiiza, osonkerere olwala lwo ku kibuga ekyo, era olange akabi akali kukiidhira." 
Ezekiel4:8 Era bona eno, nja kukusiba n'emigugha obe nga tosobola kuva ku luuyi lw'olambaaliireku kwekyukiza ku lundi, okutuusa ng'enaku edh'okuzingizibwa okwo dhiwoireku." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Oidha kutoola engaano, ni sayiri, n'ebidhandhaali, n'empindi, n'obwita, n'omutaamataama, obitabulire ghalala era obifumbemu emere ey'omugoyo. Eyo n'emere y'onaalyangaku mu nnaku ebikumi ebisatu n'ekyenda (390), dh'onaamala ng'olambaire eky'embavu ku luuyi olw'omukono gwo omugooda." 
Ezekiel4:10 Emere oidha kulyanga ya kibu kirala olunaku, era nga mpime bupime eidha kughezanga guraamu ebikumi bibiri n'asatu (230) dhonka." 
Ezekiel4:11 N'amaadhi goona oidha kuganhwanga mukuzi mulala olunaku, era nga goona mapime bupime nga gasingaku katono ku kitundu kya lita." 
Ezekiel4:12 Oidha kukozesanga obubi bw'abantu obukalu ng'enku, obukumisenga omuliro gw'onaafumbisanga emere, ng'eri mu nsambo ya mugaati gwa sayiri. Ekyo oidha kukikolanga ng'abantu babona.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Batyo Abaisiraeli bwe banaalyanga emere etali nongoofu, bwe baliba nga bali eyo mu maghanga ye ndibasansaaniza.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Aye nze naamwiramu nti: “Aa, Musengwa Katonda wange, bona eno, nze tyeyonoonangaku naire. Okuva mu buto bwange okutuuka ni ye buli eno, tiryangaku kifiire bufe kyene, oba ekiitiibwa ensolo edh'omu nsiko. Era tiryangaku kintu kyonakyona ekitali kirongoofu.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Agho Katonda yankoba ati: “Kale ndidha kukuleka okozese busa bwa nte, bw'obe okumise omuliro gw'onaafumbisa emere yo.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Era yaayongera okunkoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, bona eno, nja kulekeza emere okwidha mu Yerusalemu. Abantu baidha kulyanga mere mpime bupime nga bali mu kutya kwereere, n'amaadhi goona banhwenga mapime bupime nga beeraliikirivu." 
Ezekiel4:17 Emere n'amaadhi bija kubawaaku, olwo balingaganeku nga bawoiremu eisuubi, batuuke n'okugoogomba baweere mu luwu, olw'ebibi byaibwe.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, funayo empiima endhogi ogikozese okwemwaku enviiri dhoonadhoona n'ekirevu. Bw'omala, funayo minzaani, ogiteeku enviiri edho odhipime era omale odhaawulemu ebitundu bisatu." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ekitundu ekisooka oidha kukyokera mu kibuga ng'enaku edh'okuzingiza ekibuga ekyo dhiwoireku. Ekitundu ekyokubiri oidha kukigema mu ngalo oje ng'okisalasala n'empiima obukutukutu okwezunguluza ekibuga. Ate ekitundu ekyokusatu ekinaaba kisigairegho, oidha kukisansaaniza mu mpewo ekitwalirize. Nze mwene ndisowolayo empiima mu kiruutu yaaja ng'ebingirira enviiri dho." 
Ezekiel5:3 Ku nviiri edho oidha kulekaghooku butono buti, obusibe mu katu ku igemo ly'ekanzu yo." 
Ezekiel5:4 Ku obwo oidha kutoolaku obundi obusuule mu muliro buye, buveeku omuliro gusansaanire eighanga lya Isiraeli lyonalyona.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Ekibuga kino Yerusalemu nakita ghagati agh'ensi dhoonadhoona, olwo amaghanga goonagoona gaaba nga gakyezungulwire." 
Ezekiel5:6 Aye abantu baamu baakola bwa bibi, baadheemera ebiragiro byange okusinga n'abamaghanga agandi, baaloba okugondera amateeka gange okusinga n'ab'ensi edhibeezungulwire. Baava ku mateeka gange, baaloba okujiira ku biragiro byange." 
Ezekiel5:7 Nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti: Muli babi okusinga n'abamaghanga agabeezungulwire, kuba muloba okujiira ku mateeka gange oba okugondera ebiragiro byange, aye mwajiira ku mpisa edh'abamaghanga agandi." 
Ezekiel5:8 Kale ni mubone eno, buti nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, zeena ndi muzigu ye muli, era ndibasalira imwe omusango naababonereza ng'abamaghanga agabeezungulwire boonaboona babona." 
Ezekiel5:9 Era olw'ebyenhinhalwa byonabyona bye mukola, ndibakola kye ntakolangaku era kye ntaliirayo kukola kabiri." 
Ezekiel5:10 Abazaire b'omu Yerusalemu balirya abaana baibwe, n'abaana baalya abazaire baibwe. Ndibasalira imwe omusango gwabasinga naababonereza, era naasansaaniza ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona abo abaliba basigairegho nga balamu." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Agho ni, nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, bino bye nkoba ku imwe ab'omu Yerusalemu: mwayonoona eisinzizo lyange nga mulikoleramu ebibi byaimwe byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa. Kale ndibatirimbula, naaloba kusaasiraku naire omulala ati oba okumugemerwa ekivunika." 
Ezekiel5:12 Ndibaawulamu ebitundu bisatu: Abaliba mu kitundu ekisooka mulifa endwaire era mwalambuka endhala. Abaliba mu kitundu ekyokubiri muliitibwa mu ntalo edhiryezungulula ekibuga kyaimwe. Ate abaliba mu kitundu ekyokusatu ndibasansaaniza ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, empewo yaabatwaliriza. Era ndisowolayo empiima mu kiruutu yaaja ng'ebabingirira." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Obusungu bwange butyo bwe bulibaidhira. Ndibamaliraku ekiruyi kyange, memale naasiima. Era bwendimala okubamaliraku ekiruyi kyange, olwo mulimanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze ndhogeiza enkikidi imwe abantu bange ye mwandeetera okuba nayo olw'obutaba beesigwa ye ndi." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ekibuga kyaimwe Yerusalemu ndikifuula kifulukwa, era kyaba ekivumo eri amaghanga goonagoona agabeezungulwire, n'eri ababise boonaboona ababitagho." 
Ezekiel5:15 “Bwendibasalira omusango ni mbabonereza nga ndi mu busungu obubitirivu, olwo ab'amaghanga agabeezungulwire balitya inho. Mulifuuka kivumo era eky'okuyeeyereza ye bali, era mwafuuka akamanhiso ak'okubalabula. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze ndhogeire." 
Ezekiel5:16 Ndirekeza emere ye mubairenga mufuna, olwo endhala yaabaluma, mwawulira obulumi ng'oti n'obw'obusaale obuliku obusagwa, obulasiibwa okwidha okubazikiriza." 
Ezekiel5:17 Era ndibasindikira endhala n'ensolo enkambwe edh'omu nsiko, byabaitaku abaana baimwe. Naabasindikira n'endwaire, n'obutemo, n'entalo, byabaidhira okubaita. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze ndhogeire.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel6:2 “Iwe omuntu, amaiso go galingirize ku nsozi edh'omu Isiraeli, olange akabi akali kudhiidhira." 
Ezekiel6:3 Okobe ensozi edho edh'omu Isiraeli, dhiwulire nze Musengwa Katonda bye ndi kukoba ensozi n'obusozi, aghalala n'obwinhamo n'ebiiko: Bona eno, nze mwene, ninze ndisindika entalo okuzikiriza ebifo ebigulumivu abantu bye basinzizaamu ebitali Katonda." 
Ezekiel6:4 Alutaari dhaibwe dhirisigala bw'agho bifulukwa, n'edho edhiniokezebwaku obubbaani dhoona dhaamenhebwamenhebwa. Emirambo egy'abantu abaliitibwa girisuulibwa agho mu maiso ag'ebisinzibwa byaibwe ebitali Katonda." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ndibunga emirambo egy'Abaisiraeli mu maiso ag'ebisinzibwa byaibwe ebitali Katonda, era naasansaania amagumba gaibwe okwezunguluza alutaari dhaibwe." 
Ezekiel6:6 Ebibuga eby'omu Isiraeli byonabyona birizikirira, n'ebifo ebigulumivu abantu mwe basinziza byasigala bw'agho nga bifuuse bifulukwa byereere. Alutaari dhaibwe dhiryonoonebwa okuweekereragho, n'ebifaananie byaibwe bye basinza ebitali Katonda byamenhebwamenhebwa okusaanizibwagho. Ni alutaari dhaibwe edhiniokezebwaku obubbaani, dhoona abazigu balidhikontakonta baadhimaniangula, era baayeyaagho ebintu byonabyona abantu b'omu Isiraeli abo bye baakola." 
Ezekiel6:7 Buli ghantu ghalibaagho abantu abaitiibwa, olwo abantu baamanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Aye ndirekaghooku abandi abaliwona okwitibwa, naabasansaaniza eyo mu maghanga," 
Ezekiel6:9 baaba eyo mu bunhage. Abo balindidhukira nga bali eyo era baamanha nga bwe namenha emyoyo gyaibwe egitali myesigwa egyanvaaku, ni giira ku kusinza ebifaananie ebitali nze Katonda. Kale balituuka beene okwesinwa olw'ebibi byaibwe, n'olw'ebyenhinhalwa bye bakola." 
Ezekiel6:10 Baliimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda, era nga bwe nabalabula nti nja kubabonereza nali tiri kudhondha budhondhe.”" 
Ezekiel6:11 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Kuba mu ngalo, era osaamire ebigere ghansi, olire n'enaku olw'ebibi byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa, Abaisiraeli bye baakola kuba baja kufiira mu lutalo, oba okufa endhala, oba okufa endwaire ya kawumpuli." 
Ezekiel6:12 Abo abali eghala baja kufa endwaire ya kawumpuli abo abali okumpi bafiire mu lutalo ate abo abaliwonagho balambuke endhala bafe. Ntyo bwe ndibamaliraku ekiruyi kyange. 
Ezekiel6:13 Emirambo gy'abo abaitiibwa girigwa bw'agho gityo ghagati mu bisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, okwezunguluza alutaari dhaibwe. Era gityo bwe girigwa ku buli kasozi kagungumavu, na buli ku ngulu kwa lusozi lunene, na buli ghansi gha muti mukologho muzibirivu, na buli mu kifo abantu kye baajangamu okughaayo ebigheebwayo eby'obuwoowo obusangaaza. Olwo abantu boonaboona baamanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndigolola omukono gwange naababonereza, era naazikiriza ensi yaibwe yaafuuka bifulukwa, okuviira irala ku irungu okutuukira irala e Ribula. Olwo abantu boonaboona baamanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel7:2 “Iwe omuntu, nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kukoba ensi Isiraeli nti: Enkomerero etuuse! Enkomerero ey'ensi Isiraeli yoonayoona etuuse!" 
Ezekiel7:3 “Imwe Abaisiraeli, enkomerero ebatuuseeku. Nja kubamaliraku obusungu bwange, mbasalire omusango nga njiira ku ebyo bye mwakola, era mbabonereze olw'ebibi byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa bye mwakola." 
Ezekiel7:4 Tija kusaasiraku naire omulala ati oba okumugemerwa ekivunika. Nja kubabonereza olw'ebibi byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa bye mwakola. Olwo mumanhe nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.” 
Ezekiel7:5 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona, akabi akomwidhirano kaidha kubaidhira nga kano kaba kaakamala okuvaagho, kabiri ng'akandi kaidha!" 
Ezekiel7:6 Bona, enkomerero etuuse. Bwenebwene ebaidhiire era yiiyo etuuse." 
Ezekiel7:7 Imwe abatyamye b'omu nsi eno, akabi kabaidhiire. Ekiseera kituuse era olunaku luseese, olunaku olw'entiisa enene, se ti olw'okukubiraku emizira ghaigulu ku nsozi." 
Ezekiel7:8 “Buti ndi kumpi okubamaliraku ekiruyi kyange, mboolekeze obusungu bwange. Olwo mbasalire omusango nga njiira ku neebisa yaimwe, era mbabonereze olw'ebibi bye mwakola ebyenhinhalwa." 
Ezekiel7:9 Tija kusaasiraku naire omulala ati oba okumugemerwa ekivunika. Nja kubabonereza olw'ebibi byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa bye mwakola. Olwo mumanhe nga ninze Musengwa Katonda, era nga ninze abonereza.”" 
Ezekiel7:10 Bona, olunaku luuluno lutuuse, olunaku olw'akabi! Obutajiira ku mazima bweyongeire, n'okwekuluntaza kwabitirira." 
Ezekiel7:11 Ebikolwa eby'obukambwe byeyongeire, ekyo kyaleetera abantu okukola akabi ku bandi. Aye ku bye bali nabyo byonabyona ghazira kirisigalagho, ka bibe ebintu byaibwe ebingi, oba obukombe bwaibwe, oba ebitiibwa byaibwe." 
Ezekiel7:12 Ekiseera kituuse, olunaku lutuuse, omuguzi alekere okusagamba, n'omutunzi alekere okulira amaziga kuba boonaboona Katonda abasungughaliire." 
Ezekiel7:13 Omutunzi talighangaala kusobola kwizaagho bintu by'afiiriirwa, kuba boonaboona Katonda abasungughaliire. Olw'ebibi byaibwe ghazira alisigalagho ng'akaali mulamu." 
Ezekiel7:14 Eigwala livuze basobole okutegekebwa, aye ghazira ali kuseguka kuja mu lutalo kuba boonaboona Katonda abasungughaliire." 
Ezekiel7:15 Abantu abaliba kuliya baliitagana, n'abaliba mu ndhu baafa endwaire ya kawumpuli n'endhala. Abaliba mu byalo baliitagana, ate abaliba mu kibuga baafa kulambuka ndhala na ndwaire ya kawumpuli." 
Ezekiel7:16 Aye abaliwonagho balirumukira mu nsozi, baaba ng'oti n'amayemba ag'omu biiko agatiire ni galumukayo. Boonaboona baliba mu kulira maziga, nga buli muntu alira olw'ebibi bye." 
Ezekiel7:17 Amakono gaibwe galibalebera, n'ebikiryaivu byaibwe byabadhugumira." 
Ezekiel7:18 Balivaala ekutiya baadhugumira olw'okutya, baamwa emitwe gyaibwe okugimaliriraku enviiri ng'oti mpaata, n'ensoni dhaabagema baaswala." 
Ezekiel7:19 Balisuula ere feeza waibwe mu nguudo, baasuula n'ere zaabu waibwe ng'oti n'ekintu ekitagasa naire kuba feeza ni zaabu tibirisobola kubanunula ku lunaku Musengwa Katonda lw'aliragiraku obusungu bwe. Era tibirisobola kubaigusa mu kwegomba kwaibwe waire okubaigusa ni bibamalaku endhala okubaluma, kuba byene ebyo n'ebyabaleeteranga okwekontola ni bagwa mu kwonoona." 
Ezekiel7:20 Ebyamadholobera byaibwe ebyabonekanga obulungi era nga bibeeyagaza, baabigheesaamu bwa bifaananie ebyenhinhalwa ebiziramu muganhulo naire. Kale ni, Musengwa Katonda kyaviire n'abireetera okubafuukira ebitali birongoofu." 
Ezekiel7:21 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndireka abagwira n'abakozi b'ebibi, baanhagulula eby'obukombe ebyo era baabireetera okuba ebitali birongoofu." 
Ezekiel7:22 Tiribakobaku naire, nga bali kwonoona eisinzizo lyange eitukuvu. N'abanhazi boona balingira mu isinzizo lyange eryo baalyonoona" 
Ezekiel7:23 era baalireka nga liri bifulukwafulukwa. “Olw'okuba ensi yaimwe eidhwire ebikolwa eby'obutemo n'ekibuga kyaidhula ebikolwa eby'obukambwe," 
Ezekiel7:24 ndireeta amaghanga agasingayo okuba amabi einho gaatwala endhu dhaimwe, dhaafuuka dha bantu baago. Ndinafuya abalwani baimwe ab'amaani, naaleetera amaghanga ago okwonoona ebifo byaimwe ebitukuvu." 
Ezekiel7:25 Okuzikirira kuukwo kuli kwidha. Mulinoonia emiraala aye nga ghazira ghe giri. 
Ezekiel7:26 Akabi olulibanga okuvaagho kati ng'akandi kairagho, era mulibanga mwakamala okuwulira olubono olwogeirwa nga kabiri muwulira n'olundi. Mulisaba abalanzi babakobere bye bafunie mu kubonekerwa. Bakabona baliba tibakaali na mateeka ge basomesa bantu, n'abantu abakulu balibulwa amagezi ge bagha." 
Ezekiel7:27 Kyabazinga alirira amaziga, abakungu bawaamu eisuubi, n'abantu boonaboona baadhugumira olw'okutya. Ndibabonereza nga njiira ku bye mwakola, era ndibasalira omusango nga bwe mwagusalira abandi. Olwo mwenamwena mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Ku lunaku olwokutaanu mu mwezi ogwomukaaga, mu mwaka ogwomukaaga nga tuli mu bunhage, nali nga ntyaime mu ndhu yange aghalala n'abakulembeze ab'abanhage abaava e Buyudaaya. Agho amaani ga Musengwa Katonda gandhikaku." 
Ezekiel8:2 Naja okulinga nti nga mbona ekiri ng'oti muntu, aye nga okuva aghaaboneka ng'oti n'enkende ye okwika ghansi, yali afaanana ng'oti muliro. Ate okuva aghaaboneka ng'oti n'enkende ye okuja ghaigulu, yali amesunkana ng'oti n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo ekizigule." 
Ezekiel8:3 Agho yaagolola ekyaboneka okuba ng'oti n'omukono gwe, yaavuunhia enviiri edh'oku mutwe gwange, yambeedera ku nviiri edho naalengeedhera okwo. Era nga nkaali mu kubonekerwa kwa Katonda okwo, omwoyo gwa Katonda gwambeedera mu mpewo gwantwala e Yerusalemu. Gwantuusa ku mulyango ogwingira mu luya olw'eisinzizo olw'omunda olwali ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Mu luya olwo n'omwali ekifaananie abantu kye baasinzanga ni basungughaza Katonda einho, ni bamuleetera okuba n'enkikidi." 
Ezekiel8:4 Bwe nali ndi eyo, naja okulinga nti nga mbona okumesunkana okw'ekitiisa kya Katonda wa Isiraeli, ng'oti ni bwe nakubona nga ndi mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe." 
Ezekiel8:5 Katonda oyo yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, lingirira ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba.” Agho naalingirira ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Era okuja okulinga nti nga mbonayo ekifaananie abantu kye baasinzanga ni basungughaza Katonda einho, ni bamuleetera okuba n'enkikidi. Kyali agho gha mulyango ogw'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, okumpi ni alutaari." 
Ezekiel8:6 Era Katonda yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, oli kubona bye bali kukola? Oli kubona ebyenhinhalwa ebibitiriire, Abaisiraeli bye bali kukolera ghano, ebindeetera okwesamba eisinzizo lyange ni mba eghala einho nalyo? Aye ate oidha kubona ebyenhinhalwa ebibitiriire einho ebisinga n'agho.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Agho yantwala ku mulyango ogw'oluya olw'okuliya. Naja okulinga nti nga mbona ekituli mu kisenge. 
Ezekiel8:8 Yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, womola agho mu kisenge ekyo.” Naakiwomola era okuja okulinga nti nga mbona omulyango." 
Ezekiel8:9 Agho yankoba ati: “Ingira obone ebyenhinhalwa ebitoogerekeka bye bakolera ghano.” 
Ezekiel8:10 Kale naingira, naabona ng'ebimante byonabyona baabitonatona n'ebifaananie eby'ebitonde ebyeghaluliza ku itaka ebya buli nsambo, n'eby'ensolo edhitali nongoofu, n'eby'ebintu ebindi Abaisiraeli bye baasinzanga." 
Ezekiel8:11 Era naabona abandi ku bakulembeze ab'eighanga lya Isiraeli nsanvu nga beemereire omwo, nga n'omuli ni Yaazania mutabane wa Shafani. Buli mulala yali agemye ekiniokezebwamu obubbaani, era ng'ebiniokezebwamu obubbaani ebyo birikuvaaku omwosi gwaja ghaigulu." 
Ezekiel8:12 Katonda yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, oboine abakulembeze ab'eighanga lya Isiraeli bye bali kukola mu nzikiiza? Buli muntu ali kusinziza mu kisenge omuli ebifaananie. Bakoba bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda tatubona, era yalekulira agho ensi yaife.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Katonda era yankoba ati: “Oidha kubona ebyenhinhalwa ebibitiriire einho ebisinga n'agho, bye bakola.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Agho yantwala gha mulyango ogw'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda ogwali ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Okuja okulinga nti nga mbonayo abakazi abatyaime nga bali kulira Omusambwa ogwetebwa Tammuza. 
Ezekiel8:15 Yambuuza ati: “Iwe omuntu, oboine ebyo? Oidha kubona ebyenhinhalwa ebibitiriire einho ebisinga n'agho.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Kabiri yantwala mu luya olw'omunda olw'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda. Okuja okulinga nti nga mbona gha mulyango ogw'eisinzizo eryo erya Musengwa Katonda, ghagati gh'ekisasi ni alutaari, nga ghaligho abantu ng'oti amakumi abiri na bataanu (25). Baali nga bakubye eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda omugongo, nga balingiriire e buvandhuba, era nga bali kusinza endhuba eri kuvaayo." 
Ezekiel8:17 Musengwa Katonda era yambuuza ati: “Iwe omuntu, oboine ebyo? Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya bakibona nga kintu kitono inho okukola ebyenhinhalwa ebyo bye bakola ghano. Bongera okwo n'okwidhuza ensi eno ebikolwa eby'obukambwe, era bansoononkereza nhongere okubasungughalira. Kale bona nga bwe bandhooga mu nsambo esingayo kuba ya bunhoomi." 
Ezekiel8:18 Kale ni ndibakolaku n'ekiruyi ekindiku. Tirisaasiraku naire omulala ati oba okumugemerwa ekivunika. Era ni bwe balinsaba nga baleekaanira ghaigulu, tija kubawulira naire.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Agho naawulira Katonda ng'akaabuka, ng'akoba ati: “Museete, imwe abaja okubonereza ekibuga. Buli muntu aidhe ng'agemye mu ngalo eky'okulwanisa ky'aja okukozesa okuzikiriza.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Naja okulinga nti, nga mbona abasaadha mukaaga nga bali kuviira mu mulyango ogw'eisinzizo ogw'eitale, ogulingiriire ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Buli muntu yali agemye mu ngalo ky'aja okwitisa. Baali n'omuntu owundi eyali avaire engoye empegheevu, era ng'ali n'ebintu eby'okughandiikisa. Abantu abo boonaboona bangira, baayemerera gha mbali gh'alutaari ey'ekyuma eky'ekikomo." 
Ezekiel9:3 Agho okumesunkana okw'ekitiisa kya Katonda wa Isiraeli kwasituka, kwava ku bitonde eby'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi kwe kwali kuli, kwaja ku mulyango ogw'eisinzizo. Musengwa Katonda yaayeta ole eyali avaire engoye empegheevu era ng'ali n'ebintu eby'okughandiikisa." 
Ezekiel9:4 Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Ja ng'obita mu kibuga Yerusalemu, ote obumanhiso ku byeni by'abo abawulira enaku n'obulumi olw'ebyenhinhalwa byonabyona ebikolerwa mu kibuga ekyo.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Ni bale abandi yaabakoba, era nga mpulira, ati: “Muje nga mubita mu kibuga nga munonereza oyo, muje nga mwita. Mutasaasiraku naire omulala ati oba okumugemerwa ekivunika." 
Ezekiel9:6 Muje nga mwita abakaire, abaisuka, abaghala abaguna, abaana abato, n'abakazi. Aye mutagema ku muntu yeenayeena aliku kamanhiso. Era mutandiikire ghano ku isinzizo lyange.” Kale baatandiikira ku bakulembeze abaali agho gha isinzizo." 
Ezekiel9:7 Era yaabakoba ati: “Mwonoone eisinzizo, era mwidhuze empya dhaalyo emirambo egy'abo be mwise. Muje mangu.” Kale baaja mangu, baita abantu mu kibuga." 
Ezekiel9:8 Bwe baali nga bali kwita, nze nali nsigaire agho zenka. Agho naakuba amakiryaivu era naakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Naakuba empungu, naakoba nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, obwo bwenebwene oja kwita buli muntu asigairegho mu Isiraeli olw'ekiruyi ekikuliku olwa Yerusalemu?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Katonda oyo yandhiramu ati: “Ebibi eby'eighanga Isiraeli ni Buyudaaya bibitiriire obungi. Ensi yaibwe eidhwire ebikolwa eby'obutemo, n'ekibuga kyaidhula obutajiira ku mazima. Bakoba bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda yalekulira agho ensi yaife, era tatubona.’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Aye tirisaasiraku naire omulala ati, oba okumugemerwa ekivunika. Ndibeesasuulizaaku olw'ebyo bye baakola.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Agho omuntu ole eyali avaire engoye empegheevu era ng'ali n'ebintu eby'okughandiikisa, yaiza obukwenda bwe ati: “Nkoze nga bw'ondagiire.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Agho naja okulinga nti nga mbona ghaigulu agh'emitwe egy'ebitonde ebiramu ebyo, mu ibbanga eryali ghaigulu ku ngulu, nga ghaligho ekiri ng'oti kityamo kya bwakyabazinga, nga kifaanana ng'oti n'eibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa saffiro." 
Ezekiel10:2 Katonda yaakoba omuntu eyali avaire engoye empegheevu ati: “Ja ghagati mu nkede edhiri kwezungulula ghansi agh'ebitonde bikerubi, oyoole amanda agaidhula engalo dho agaliku omuliro, oje ogamansire ku kibuga.” Omuntu oyo yaaja nga ndi kubona." 
Ezekiel10:3 Mu kiseera ekyo, bikerubi byali byemereire ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba olw'eisinzizo. Omuntu oyo bwe yangira mu isinzizo, ekire kyagema woonawoona mu luya olw'omunda." 
Ezekiel10:4 Ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kyasituka nga kiva gha bikerubi, kyaja ku mulyango ogw'eisinzizo. Ekire kyagema woonawoona mu isinzizo, oluya lwaidhula obutangaavu obw'ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel10:5 Omuvuuma ogw'amaghagha ga bikerubi gwawulirwa n'ere mu luya olw'okuliya, nga guli ng'oti n'amamiro ga Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona bwe gawulirwa, bw'aba ng'ayogeire." 
Ezekiel10:6 Musengwa Katonda bwe yalagira omuntu ole eyali avaire engoye empegheevu okuyoola omuliro ng'agutoola ghagati agh'enkede edhaali dhiri kwezungulula ghansi gha bikerubi, omuntu oyo yaaja yaayemerera munda okumpi n'eyindi ku nkede edho." 
Ezekiel10:7 Agho ekindi ku bikerubi, kyagolola omukono nga kiri ghagati gha bikerubi bire ebindi, kyatoola ku muliro ogwali ghagati ghaabyo kyaguta mu ngalo dh'omuntu ole eyali avaire engoye empegheevu. Oyo yaagugema yaafuluma nagwo." 
Ezekiel10:8 Buli kikerubi kyaliku ekintu ekiboneka ng'oti mukono gwa muntu, nga kiri ghansi mu maghagha gaakyo." 
Ezekiel10:9 Era naja okulinga nti nga mbona enkede ina kumpi agho ni bikerubi, nga buli gha mbali gha kikerubi ghaligho enkede ndala ndala. Enkede edho dhaali nga dhimirimiinha ng'oti ibaale ery'omughendo eryetebwa kurisolito." 
Ezekiel10:10 Enkede dhoonadhoona eina dhaali dhifaanagana, ate buli nkede ng'eboneka ng'oti erimu enkede eyindi ghagati ghaayo obukiika." 
Ezekiel10:11 Kale nga bikerubi bisobola okuja ku ndhuyi eina edh'enkede edho aghazira kubyetaagisa kukyuka. Enkede edho dhoonadhoona dhaajiiranga ghalala buli ye dhaajanga nga tikidheetaagisa kumala kukyuka. 
Ezekiel10:12 bikerubi byali biidhwire amaiso ku mibiri gyabyo gyonagyona, ni ku mikono gyabyo, ni ku maghagha gaabyo, ni ku nkede dhaabyo, ni ku mpagi edh'omu nkede edho." 
Ezekiel10:13 Nawulira ng'enkede edho bali kudheeta “Enkede edheezungulula.” 
Ezekiel10:14 Buli kikerubi kyali n'obweni bwa mikuzi ena. Obweni obwasooka bwali ng'oti bwa nte nume, obwokubiri bwaba ng'oti bwa muntu, obwokusatu bwaba ng'oti bwa mpologoma, ate obwokuna bwaba ng'oti bwa nkookooma." 
Ezekiel10:15 Agho bikerubi ebyo byaguluka byaja. Bikerubi ebyo, byali nga n'ebitonde ebiramu ebina (4) bye nabona mu kubonekerwa nga ndi kumpi n'omwiga Kebari." 
Ezekiel10:16 Bikerubi ebyo bwe byagulukanga ni bija, nga n'enkede dhoona dhijiira ghalala nabyo. Bwe byayandhuluzanga amaghagha gaabyo ni biva ku itaka, nga n'enkede dhoona dhija nabyo." 
Ezekiel10:17 Bwe byalekeranga okuguluka ni byemerera, nga n'enkede dhoona dheemerera. Ate bwe byagulukanga ni bija, nga n'enkede edho dhoona dhijiira ghalala nabyo, kuba omwoyo gwabyo gwali mu nkede edho." 
Ezekiel10:18 Agho ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kyava gha mulyango gw'eisinzizo, kyaja kyaba ghaigulu gha bikerubi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Bikerubi byayandhuluza amaghagha gaabyo byava ku itaka nga ndi kubona, byaja nga n'enkede dhoona dhiri kujiira ghalala nabyo. Byayemerera ku lwigi olw'omulyango ogw'e buvandhuba ogw'eisinzizo, era okumesunkana okw'ekitiisa kya Katonda wa Isiraeli kwaba ghaigulu ghaabyo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ebyo n'ebyali ebitonde ebiramu bye nabona ghansi gha Katonda wa Isiraeli gha mwiga Kebari era naamanha nga byali bikerubi. 
Ezekiel10:21 Buli kikerubi kyali n'obweni bwa mikuzi ena, kyabaaku n'amaghagha ana, era kyabaaku n'ekintu ekiboneka ng'oti mukono gwa muntu, nga kiri ghansi mu maghagha gaakyo." 
Ezekiel10:22 Emboneka yaabyo mu maiso, yali nga n'eyo yeeneyeene ye nabona okumpi n'omwiga Kebari. Buli kirala kyasobolanga okuja ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona aghazira kukyetaagisa kumala kukyuka." 
Ezekiel11:1 Agho omwoyo gwa Katonda gwambeeda gwantwala ku mulyango ogw'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda ogulingiriire ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba. Okuja okulinga nti nga mbona abasaadha abiri na bataanu nga bali agho gha mulyango. Nga mu abo mulimu ni Yaazania mutabane wa Azzuri, ni Pelatia mutabane wa Benaia, bombi abaali bakulembeze b'abantu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Katonda yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, abo n'abantu abayiiya okukola ebibi era abagha abantu ab'omu kibuga kino amagezi amabi," 
Ezekiel11:3 nga bakoba bati, ‘Ekiseera eky'okuzimbiramu amayumba kinaatera okutuuka.’ Era bati, ‘Ekibuga kino n'ensaka efumba, ate ife niife emamba.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Kale ni, iwe omuntu, langirira obavumirire.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Agho omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda gwandhikaku, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Yogera oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati imwe abantu Abaisiraeli, nze ndidhi bukalamu bye mulowooza." 
Ezekiel11:6 Mweyongeire inho okuja nga mwita abantu mu kibuga kino, mwaidhuza enguudo dhaakyo emirambo." 
Ezekiel11:7 “Kale nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva nkoba nti ekibuga kino n'ensaka, era abantu be mutirimbula ni mubaleka omwo nga bagwire, n'emamba. Aye imwe ndibabinga naabafulumya mu kibuga kino." 
Ezekiel11:8 Waire nga mutya okwitibwa empiima, ndireeta abantu abali n'empiima baabalumba." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ndibatoola mu kibuga kino, naabata mu ngalo edh'abagwira, babaite. Ekyo n'ekibonerezo kyaimwe kye nabasalira." 
Ezekiel11:10 Ndibabonereza yoonayoona ye muliba mu Isiraeli, naabaleetera okwitibwa mu ntalo. Memale olwo mwamanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel11:11 Ekibuga kino tikiribakuuma ng'oti n'ensaka bw'ekuuma emamba egirimu. Ndibabonereza yoonayoona ye muliba mu Isiraeli. 
Ezekiel11:12 Olwo muliimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda, kuba timwajiira ku mateeka gange waire okukola ng'ebiragiro byange bwe bikoba. Aye mwajiira bwa ku mateeka ga nsi edhibaliiraine.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Nali nkaalangirira ebyo, Pelatia mutabane wa Benaia yagwa ghansi yaafa. Agho naakuba amakiryaivu era naakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Naaleekaana nti: “Aa, Musengwa Katonda, obwo bwenebwene oja kumaliragho irala buli muntu eyali awoniegho mu Isiraeli?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel11:15 “Iwe omuntu, abatyamye b'omu Yerusalemu bakwogeraku iwe ni Baisiraeli baino abali mu bunhage, nga bakoba bati, ‘Abo abaatwalibwa mu bunhage baviire inho ku Musengwa Katonda. Era buti Musengwa Katonda oyo yatugha ensi eno ebe yaife ku bwaife.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 “Kale kobera abo bwe muli mu bunhage, oti nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti waire nga nabatoola mu nsi yaibwe, naabasindika mu nsi edh'eghala era naabasansaaniza mu maghanga kamaala, aye ndidha kubanga ghalala nabo eyo mu nsi dhe balimu okumala ekiseera." 
Ezekiel11:17 “Kale bakobere oti nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti, Ndibatoolayo eyo mu maghanga, naabasolozaayo eyo mu nsi ye nabasansaaniza, naabairiza ensi yaibwe Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Era bwe baliira, balitoolagho ebintu byonabyona ebibi ebyenhinhalwa." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndibagha omwoyo omuyaaka n'endowooza empyaka. Naabatoolamu omwoyo omukalangafu oguli ng'oti ibaale, naabataamu omwoyo omugonvu omuwulize." 
Ezekiel11:20 Baajiiranga ku mateeka gange era baagemanga bye nkoba. Olwo baabanga bantu bange, nze naabanga Katonda waibwe." 
Ezekiel11:21 Aye abo abamaliire omwoyo gwaibwe ku kusinza ebintu ebibi ebyenhinhalwa, ndibeesasulizaaku olw'ebikolwa byaibwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Agho bikerubi byayandhuluza amaghagha gaabyo byaguluka. Byaja nga n'enkede dhoona dhiri kujiira ghalala nabyo, era nga n'okumesunkana okw'ekitiisa kya Katonda wa Isiraeli kuli ghaigulu ghaabyo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda kyasituka kyava ghagati mu kibuga, kyaja kyaba ku lusozi olwali ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba olw'ekibuga ekyo." 
Ezekiel11:24 Agho omwoyo gwa Katonda gwambeeda nga ndi mu kubonekerwa okwo, gwandhizaayo y'abaali mu bunhage e Babilonia. Olwo bye nabona mu kubonekerwa byakoma agho." 
Ezekiel11:25 Naakobera abaali mu bunhage ebintu byonabyona Musengwa Katonda bye yandholeka. 
Ezekiel12:1 Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel12:2 “Iwe omuntu, oli mu bantu abadheemu, abali n'amaiso aye nga tibabona era abali n'amatu aye nga tibawulira, olw'okuba badheemu." 
Ezekiel12:3 “Kale ni, iwe omuntu, siba omugugu obe ng'oti n'omuntu ali kulumuka okuja okunoonia obubudamo, ositule oje musana mukulu ng'abantu bakubona. Ove mu kifo kyo, oje osenge mu kindi nga bakubona. Oba katyo banaategeeramuuku, waire nga badheemu." 
Ezekiel12:4 Oidha kubbeeda omugugu gwo ogwo musana mukulu ng'abantu bakubona, obe ng'oti n'omuntu ali kulumuka okuja okunoonia obubudamo. Ositule oveegho eigulo ng'abantu bakubona, obe ng'oti n'abantu be bakaka okuja mu bunhage bwe baba." 
Ezekiel12:5 Oidha kuwomola ekituli mu kimante ky'endhu yo, obikize omwo ebintu byo ng'abantu bakubona." 
Ezekiel12:6 Olwo obibbeedere ku ibega, ofulume mu nzikiiza nga bakubona, oje nga weeghembye mu maiso nga tobona y'oja. Ebyo byonabyona biidha kuba kamanhiso ak'okulabula Abaisiraeli.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Kale nze Ezekieli naakola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yandagira. Naafulumya ebintu byange era naasiba omugugu gwange ng'oti n'omuntu aja mu bunhage. Eigulo nze mwene naawomola mu kimante ekituli, mwe nabitira ng'enzikiiza eri kugema. Era naabbeedera ebintu byange ku ibega ng'abantu babona, naaja." 
Ezekiel12:8 Bwe bwakya enkyo, Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel12:9 “Iwe omuntu, Abaisiraeli abadheemu abo tibaakubuuziizaaku bati, ‘Oli kukola ki?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Bakobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubakoba nti obukwenda buno bugema ku mufuzi ali mu Yerusalemu, ni ku Baisiraeli boonaboona abali mu kibuga ekyo." 
Ezekiel12:11 Bakobe oti ekyo ky'okoze n'akamanhiso k'ebyo ebija okubatuukaku. Balibabinga ewaibwe, baaja mu bunhage." 
Ezekiel12:12 N'omufuzi ali mu bantu abo yeena alibbeeda omugugu gwe ku ibega ng'enzikiiza egemye, yaafuluma. Alibitira mu kituli kye baliwomola mu kimante, yaaja nga yeeghembye mu maiso nga tabona y'aja." 
Ezekiel12:13 Ndimutega naamugemya mu lutuula lwange, naamutwala mu kibuga Babiloni mu nsi ey'Abakaladea, yaafiira eyo aye nga ekibuga ekyo takiboineeku naire." 
Ezekiel12:14 Abantu be boonaboona abamwezungulwire ndibasansaaniza eyo ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona edh'ensi nga n'omuli abayambi be, n'abaisirukale be. Era ndireetera entalo okubaagho, dhaabaita." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Bwe ndibasansaaniza eyo mu maghanga ni mbaidhuza eyo mu nsi enhingi, balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel12:16 Aye ndirekaghooku abatono baawona okwitibwa mu ntalo, n'okulambuka endhala, n'okufa endwaire ya kawumpuli. Olwo basobole okutegeera, eyo ye baliba mu maghanga, nga baakola ebyenhinhalwa. Era olwo bamanhe nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel12:18 “Iwe omuntu, kola olye emere yo ng'oli kutengera, era onhwe amaadhi ng'oli kudhugumira olw'okutya." 
Ezekiel12:19 Kobera abantu boonaboona ab'omu nsi yo oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: Abaisiraeli abakaali mu Yerusalemu baliryanga emere nga bali mu kutya, era baanhwanga amaadhi nga beeraliikirivu kuba ensi yaibwe eritoolebwamu byonabyona ebigirimu, olw'okuba nti abantu abagirimu bakola ebikolwa eby'obukambwe." 
Ezekiel12:20 Ebibuga byonabyona buti ebirimu abantu birizikirizibwa, ensi eyo yaasigala agho bifulukwa byereere. Olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel12:22 “Iwe omuntu, lwaki mu nsi yaimwe Isiraeli mukoba mu nsambo muti, ‘Ebiseera bija nga bibita, aye nga ebyalangibwa mu kubonekerwa ghazira kituukirira.’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Kale ni bakobere oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndireetera ensambo eyo okukoma. Tibaliirayo kugikozesa mu Isiraeli kabiri. Era bakobe oti ekiseera kituuse ebyalangibwa mu kwolekebwa byonabyona bituukirizibwe. 
Ezekiel12:24 “Mu Isiraeli timulibaamu kabiri kubonekerwa kwa buguya, waire obulanzi obubuzaabuza." 
Ezekiel12:25 Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze ndidha okwogeranga, era nga kye nkoba kituukirizibwa. Tighaabengagho kulwisa naire. Kye nnaayogeranga mu biseera byaimwe, imwe abadheemu, ndidha kukituukirizanga. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Era Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel12:27 “Iwe omuntu bona eno, Abaisiraeli bakoba bati iwe by'obona mu kubonekerwa tibyakutuukirira mu nnaku dhino, era mbu by'olanga bya mu biseera biri mberi inho." 
Ezekiel12:28 Kale ni bakobere oti nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba ati: Tighaabengagho kulwisa naire. Kye nnaayogeranga kiidha kutuukirizibwanga. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.” 
Ezekiel13:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel13:2 “Iwe omuntu, langirira akabi akali kwidhira abalanzi b'omu Isiraeli, aboogera ebyo bye bayiiyiiza obuyiiye beene, ni babyeta obulanzi. Bakobe bawulirise nze Musengwa Katonda bye nkoba.”" 
Ezekiel13:3 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abalanzi abo abasiru bakagwireku, abajiira ku bye bayiiyiiza obuyiiye beene nga ghazira na kubonekerwa kwonakwona kwe bafunie." 
Ezekiel13:4 Imwe Abaisiraeli, abalanzi baimwe bali ng'oti bwa bibe ebiri mu bifunfugu." 
Ezekiel13:5 Tibakuuma mu bifo ebimante ghe byawomolwa ebituli, waire okuzimba obuyaaka ebimante ebyo, basobole okulwanirira abantu b'eighanga Isiraeli mu lutalo, ng'olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda lutuuse." 
Ezekiel13:6 Balimba abantu bati babonekeirwa era baalanga eby'obuguya. Baabakobera mbu bali kwogera bukwenda bwange nze Musengwa Katonda, ate nga ti ninze mbatumye. Era basuubira mbu nze ndidha kutuukiriza bye bakobye." 
Ezekiel13:7 Aye nze mbakoba nti: Okubonekerwa kwe bakoba mbu bafunie kwa bulimba, n'ebyo bye balanga bya buguya. Bakoba mbu nze Musengwa Katonda ninze ndhogeire ebyo, ate nga nkaali kubibakobaku naire!”" 
Ezekiel13:8 Kale Musengwa Katonda akoba nti: “Olw'okuba okubonekerwa kwe mukoba mbu mufunie kuba kwa bulimba, n'ebyo bye mulanga byaba bya buguya, mbakyaye era buti nfuuse muzigu ye muli." 
Ezekiel13:9 Nja kubabonereza imwe abalanzi abafuna okubonekerwa okw'obulimba era abalanga eby'obuguya. Timulityama mu lwekobaano lwa bantu bange, waire okughandiikibwa mu kitabo eky'ab'eighanga lya Isiraeli. Era timuliirayo mu nsi yaimwe Isiraeli naire. Olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel13:10 “Abalanzi abo babuzaabuza abantu bange, nga babakoba bati, ‘Miraala myereere,’ ate nga ghazira miraala naire. Abantu bwe bazimba ekimante ekitagumye, abalanzi abo bakisiigaku langi endheru kinhirire." 
Ezekiel13:11 Iwe omuntu, kobera abo abakisiigaku langi endheru oti kiidha kugwa. Ekire eky'amaadhi ekinene kiidha kuyiyika nga mulimu amabaale ag'omugozi amakologho, n'empewo ey'amaani." 
Ezekiel13:12 Era bwe kirigwa, balibabuuza bati, ‘Obwo langi endheru ye mwasiigaku yagasa ki.’" 
Ezekiel13:13 “Musengwa Katonda kyava n'akoba ati: Mu busungu obungi ndisindika empewo ey'amaani, naaleetera n'ekire eky'amaadhi ekinene kyayuyika nga kirimu n'amabaale ag'omugozi amakologho, byasaaniagho ekimante ekyo." 
Ezekiel13:14 Ndimenhagho ekimante ekyo kye baasiigaku langi endheru, naakisuulira irala ku itaka, n'omusingi gwakyo gwaira ku ngulu. Kiribagwaku baazikirira ghalala nakyo, olwo baamanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel13:15 Ntyo bwe ndimalira obusungu bwange ku kimante ekyo ni ku abo abaakisiigaku langi. Era imwe ndi kubakobera nti ekimante tikikaaligho, n'abo abaakisiigaku langi boona mye;" 
Ezekiel13:16 abo nga n'abalanzi ab'omu Isiraeli abaalanga ku Yerusalemu, bati baabonekerwa nga kija kubaamu miraala myereere, waire nga mu butuufu bwene tighaali miraala naire. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel13:17 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, kyukira abakazi abo abali mu bantu bo, aboogera ebyo bye bayiiyiiza obuyiiye beene, ni babyeta obulanzi. Langirira ng'obavumirira," 
Ezekiel13:18 obakobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubakoba, nti mukagwireku imwe abakazi abatungira buli muntu eyirizi edh'okuvaala ku mikono n'ebitambaala eby'okwesiba ku mitwe ebya buli nsambo, basobole okufuga obulamu obw'abantu abandi. Mwenda okuba n'obuyinza okufuga obulamu bw'abantu bange, imwe muganhulwe." 
Ezekiel13:19 Mwonoona eriina lyange mu bantu bange, nga mwenda okufunayo emiganda obuganda egya sayiri, n'ebitole obutole eby'emere. Mwaita abantu abatagwaniire kufa, ate abatagwaniire kuba balamu mwabawonia. Era mwakobera abantu bange eby'obuguya, era boona baabawulirisa.”" 
Ezekiel13:20 “Kyenva, nze Musengwa Katonda, ni nkoba nti ndidha kulwanisa eyirizi edho dhe mukozesa okudaazadaaza n'okwita obulamu bw'abantu. Era ndidhikutula naadhitoola ku mikono gyaimwe, naabalekuza abo be mudaazadaaza, baaba ba idembe." 
Ezekiel13:21 N'ebitambaala byaimwe byona ndibikanula ku mitwe, natoola abantu bange mu buyinza bwaimwe, baawona okuyiigibwanga. Olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel13:22 “Muja mwabuzaabuza abantu bange abalungi mwabamalamu amaani, nze be mba tyenze batuukibweku kulumizibwa kwonakwona. Ate mwaghaga abakozi b'ebibi balobe kukyuka kuva mu bibi byaibwe, kuwonia bulamu bwaibwe." 
Ezekiel13:23 Kale ni timukairayo kufuna kubonekerwa kwa bulimba, waire okwiramu kabiri okulanga eby'obuguya. Nja kuwonia abantu bange mbatoole mu buyinza bwaimwe, olwo mumanhe nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Agho abandi ku bakulembeze ab'omu Isiraeli baidha okuneebuuzaaku, baatyama agho mu maiso gange." 
Ezekiel14:2 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel14:3 “Iwe omuntu, abantu abo baghaireyo emyoyo gyaibwe okusinza ebitali nze Katonda, era ebyo bye bajiiraku byabaleetera okukola ebibi. Kale nsobola ntya okubaganha baneebuuzeeku?" 
Ezekiel14:4 “Agho ni yogera nabo, obakobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti: Omuntu yeenayeena ow'omu ighanga Isiraeli aghaayo omwoyo gwe okusinza ebitali nze Katonda, era n'abijiiraku ni bimuleetera okukola ebibi, memale kabiri n'aidha okwebuuza ku mulanzi, nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze ndimwiramu mu nsambo egwaniire obungi obw'ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda omuntu oyo by'ajiiraku." 
Ezekiel14:5 Olwo nsobole okwiza ye ndi ab'omu ighanga Isiraeli boonaboona, ebisinzibwa ebyo ebitali Katonda be byaleetera okunvaaku." 
Ezekiel14:6 “Kale ni kobera ab'eighanga Isiraeli oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubakoba nti: Mwenenie, mukyuke muve mu kusinza ebitali nze Katonda. Mukyuke muve ku ebyo byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa bye mujiiraku." 
Ezekiel14:7 “Omuntu yeenayeena ow'omu ighanga Isiraeli, oba omusenze yeenayeena eyasenga mu Isiraeli, bw'anvaaku n'aghaayo omwoyo gwe okusinza ebitali nze Katonda, era n'abijiiraku ni bimuleetera okukola ebibi, memale kabiri n'aidha okwebuuza ku mulanzi, nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze ndimwiramu." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ndimwefuulira naamukyagha, naamufuula akamanhiso ak'okulabulanga abandi era eky'okuyeeyereza. Era ndimuboola naalekera agho okumubalira mu bantu bange, memale olwo mwamanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Omulanzi bw'alimbibwa n'abaaku ni by'ayogera eby'obulimba, nze Musengwa Katonda mwene ninze mba mmulimbye, era ndigolola omukono gwange naamubonereza naamutoolayo mu bantu bange Abaisiraeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Omulanzi, n'oyo amwebuuzaaku, bombi balibonerezebwa. Era ekibonerezo eky'omulanzi kiriba n'ekirala n'eky'oyo amwebuuzaaku." 
Ezekiel14:11 Olwo ab'omu ighanga Isiraeli balobe kabiri kunvaaku ni badaaliima, era ni beeyonoona nga bakola ebibi, aye babenga bantu bange, ate nze mbenga Katonda waibwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Musengwa Katonda era yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel14:13 “Iwe omuntu, ensi bw'ekola ebibi n'ensungughaza ng'ezira bwesige ye ndi, ndigolola omukono gwange naagibonereza, naazikiriza emere yaayo, naagisindikira endhala era naita abantu baayo n'ensolo." 
Ezekiel14:14 Abantu bano abasatu: Noa, Danieli ni Yobu, ni bwe bandigibairemu, bandiwoniizaagho bwa bulamu bwaibwe bwonka olw'obutuufu bwaibwe.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel14:14 Abantu bano abasatu: Noa, Danieli ni Yobu, ni bwe bandigibairemu, bandiwoniizaagho bwa bulamu bwaibwe bwonka olw'obutuufu bwaibwe.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Bwe nsindika ensolo edh'omu nsiko mu nsi, ni dhigyonoona nga dhija dhiita abantu, ensi eyo n'efuuka ebifulukwa era n'ewolongera nga ghazira na muntu agibitamu olw'okutya ensolo edho," 
Ezekiel14:16 abantu abo abasatu ni bwe bandigibairemu, nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, tibandiwoniizaagho waire abaana baibwe. Beene bonka bati n'abandiwonezeibwa, aye ensi eyo yaasigala bifulukwa byereere." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Oba bwe ndeetera olutalo okwidha mu nsi, ni ndulagira okwita abantu n'ensolo okumaliriragho," 
Ezekiel14:18 abantu abo abasatu ni bwe bandigibairemu, nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, tibandiwoniizaagho waire abaana baibwe. Beene bonka bati n'abandiwonezeibwa." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Oba bwe nsindika endwaire ya kawumpuli mu nsi eyo, ni ngimaliraku obusungu bwange okwita abantu n'ensolo okumaliriragho," 
Ezekiel14:20 Noa ni Danieli ni Yobu ni bwe bandigibairemu, nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, tibandiwoniizaagho waire abaana baibwe. Bandiwoniizaagho bwa bulamu bwaibwe bwonka olw'obutuufu bwaibwe.”" 
Ezekiel14:20 Noa ni Danieli ni Yobu ni bwe bandigibairemu, nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, tibandiwoniizaagho waire abaana baibwe. Bandiwoniizaagho bwa bulamu bwaibwe bwonka olw'obutuufu bwaibwe.”" 
Ezekiel14:21 Agho ni Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bwenebwene tikirisingagho inho bwe ndisindika ku Yerusalemu ebibonerezo byange ebina ebikakali: olutalo, endhala, ensolo edh'akabi, n'endwaire ya kawumpuli, okuja okukiitamu abantu n'ensolo?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Aye ghalibaagho abaliwonagho ni basigalagho n'abaana baibwe. Abo bwe balireetebwa ye muli ni mubona emize gyaibwe n'ebibi bye bakola, mulikakasa ng'ekibuga Yerusalemu kigwaniire okukibonereza mu nsambo eyo." 
Ezekiel14:23 Olwo mulimanha nga nali mutuufu okukola ebyo bye nakola mu Yerusalemu.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba. 
Ezekiel15:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze ng'akoba ati: 
Ezekiel15:2 “Iwe omuntu, omuzabbibu oli ni bw'ogugeza ku muti, oba ku lusaga lwonalwona olw'oku muti ogw'omu kibira?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Omuzabbibu basobola okugusalamu embaawo baadhibaadhamu ekintu kyonakyona? Oba basobola okugutoolaku waire enkondo obukondo baaghanikaku ekintu kyonakyona? 
Ezekiel15:4 Omuti ogwo bagukumisa bwa muliro. Aye omuliro bwe gumala okugwokya eruuyi n'eruuyi, ni ghagati ni guya, basobola kabiri okugukozesa ekintu kyonakyona?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Bona eno, oba bwe gwali nga gukaali omulamba tigwali na mugaso, memale obwo omuliro nga gumaze okugwokya eruuyi n'eruuyi, ni ghagati nga gumaze okuya, bwe gunaaba n'omugaso?”" 
Ezekiel15:6 Musengwa Katonda kyava n'akoba ati: “Nga bwe mpaayo omuzabbibu ni bagutoola mu miti egy'omu kibira okuja okugukumisa omuliro, era ntyo bwe ndighaayo abatyamye ab'omu Yerusalemu ni mbabonereza." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndibeefuulira naababonereza ni bwe balirumuka batya okuwona omuliro, era gulibookya. Kale ni bwendyefuulira abantu abo ni mbabonereza, mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ndizikiriza ensi eyo yaafuuka bifulukwa byereere, kuba abantu baamu tibaali beesigwa ye ndi. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel16:2 “Iwe omuntu, manhisa Yerusalemu ebyenhinhalwa bye kikola," 
Ezekiel16:3 okikobere bino, nze Musengwa Katonda, bye ndi kukikoba nti: “Iwe Yerusalemu, ensimuko yo n'obuzaale bwo biri mu nsi Kanaani. Lata wo yali Muamori ate inhoko yaaba Muhitti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Bwe wazaalibwa tibaakusalaku lulira, waire okukunaazaaku n'amaadhi okutukula. Era tibaakusiigaku muunhu waire okukubwikaku engoye." 
Ezekiel16:5 Ghazira muntu yakusaasira n'akukolera waire ekintu ekirala kiti ku ebyo. Olwazaalibwa oti baakukyayiragho, baakusuula bwa mu nsiko." 
Ezekiel16:6 “Bwe nali ndi kubitagho nti naakubona ng'oli kusambagalira mu musaayi gwo. Wali osaabaine omusaayi aye nga tisobola kukuleka kufa. 
Ezekiel16:7 Kale naakulabirira waakula n'amaani ng'oti n'ekimera eky'omu nimiro. Era waakulira irala waafuuka mughala muguna mwene atoonha obutoonhe. Waasunia amabeere era waakuza n'enviiri, aye ng'oli madu geene, tovaire." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Kabiri bwe nali ndi kubitagho nti naakubona ng'otuusiiza ekiseera eky'okufumbirwa. Agho naakughembaku ekivaalo kyange waalekera okuba amadu. Bwenebwene naakusuubiza okukufumbirwa era naamala naakola n'iwe endagaano ey'okufumbiraganwa, waafuuka wange.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Agho naatoola amaadhi naakunaazaaku omusaayi gwo gwonagwona, era naakusiiga omuzigo." 
Ezekiel16:10 Nakuvaaza engoye edhaalukibwa obukalamu, n'engaito edh'oluwu olulungi einho, naakughemberera olugoye olughegheevu, era naakusiba n'ekitambaala ekya liiri." 
Ezekiel16:11 Nakuvaaza ebyamadholobera: ebikomo ku makono, n'ebinhere mu nkoto." 
Ezekiel16:12 Naakutaaku n'empeta ey'oku nhindo, n'eby'oku matu, naakuvaaza n'engule eboneka obulungi ku mutwe." 
Ezekiel16:13 Kale waaba nga weenaweena nkudholiige ni zaabu ni feeza, era ng'ovaala engoye empegheevu, n'edha liiri edhaalukibwa obukalamu. Waalyanga emere esinga obulungi, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, era waanhwanga n'omudheenene ogw'endhuki. Olwo weeyongera okuba omuntu aboneka obulungi einho, waanhirira ng'oti bwa muka kyabazinga." 
Ezekiel16:14 Era wamanhikana inho mu maghanga kamaala olw'obulungi obw'emboneka yo obwo, obwali bubitiriire einho olw'ebyo bye nakukolaku.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Aye weesigulira ku bulungi obw'emboneka yo obwo ni ku kumanhikana kwo, waakola obwamalaaya. Waalaaya ku buli muntu eyabitangagho." 
Ezekiel16:16 Watoola ku bivaalo byo waatimba amasabo go okugadholiga, waakolera omwo obwamalaaya mu nsambo etabangaghooku era etaja kubaagho kabiri." 
Ezekiel16:17 Watoola ebyamadholobera ebirungi einho ebya zaabu n'ebya feeza bye nakugha, weekoleramu ebifaananie ebiri ng'oti basaadha wabisinza, waaloba kuba mwesigwa ng'oti n'omuntu akola obwamalaaya." 
Ezekiel16:18 Waatoola engoye edhaalukibwa obukalamu dhe nakugha, wadhibivaaza. Waatoola omuzigo gwange ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva n'obubbaani bwange, waabighaayo ye biri ng'ebigheebwayo." 
Ezekiel16:19 Emere yange ye nakugha ey'obuwunga obuseereibwa obukalamu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, n'omudheenene ogw'endhuki, waabighaayo ye biri ng'ebigheebwayo ebiri n'akawoowo akasanhusa ebifaananie ebyo.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Era waatoola batabane bo ni baghala bo be wanzaalira, waabaghaayo ye biri ng'emisengo egyokebwa. Olowooza oti ekya iwe obutaba mwesigwa ye ndi kyali kitono," 
Ezekiel16:21 memale otoole n'abaana bange boona obatirimbule okubaghaayo y'ebifaananie ebyo, bookebwe mu muliro ng'emisengo?" 
Ezekiel16:22 Mu ebyo byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa n'obwamalaaya bye wakola, tiwaidhukiraku na bya mu buto bwo, nga bwe wali amadu geene, era ng'oli kusambagalira mu musaayi gwo.”" 
Ezekiel16:23 Musengwa Katonda akukoba iwe Yerusalemu ati: “Okagwireku, era okagwireku inho! Bwe wamala okukola ebibi ebyo byonabyona," 
Ezekiel16:24 kabiri waayongeraku n'okwezimbira mu buli luya lwa kibuga, amasabo okukoleramu obwamalaaya n'ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu ebintu ebyo ebitali nze Katonda." 
Ezekiel16:25 Olw'emboneka yo enungi, mu buli maagaanana ga luguudo wataagho ekifo okukoleramu obwamalaaya, weekubanga ku buli muntu eyabitangagho. Mu nsambo eyo obwamalaaya bwo bweyongerangaku buli lunaku." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wayendaku ni ku Bamisiri, baliraanwa bo abeegombi ng'oti ki! Obwamalaaya bwo bweyongerangaku bweyongere, wansonsoonia wandeetera okusungughala." 
Ezekiel16:27 “Kale buti ngalwire omukono gwange okubabonereza. Era nja kukendeeza ku mugabo gwo, nkugheeyo y'abazigu bo Abafilisiti abakweguguna obwegugune, era abeesinwa eira ebikolwa byo eby'obwenzi." 
Ezekiel16:28 “Wayendaku ni ku Bassiria boona, olw'obutasinwa bw'oli nabwo. Bwenebwene waalaaya nabo, aye era waasigala ng'okaayenda bwende." 
Ezekiel16:29 Weeyongera okukola obwamalaaya, waayendaku ni ku basuubuzi Abababilonia. Aye era waasigala ng'okaayenda bwende.”" 
Ezekiel16:30 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Omwoyo gwo gwakula gutya, iwe okukola ebintu ebyo byonabyona ng'oti ni malaaya ataswalaku naire:" 
Ezekiel16:31 ni weezimbira mu buli maagaanana ga luguudo amasabo okukoleramu obwamalaaya, ni mu buli luya lwa kibuga n'ozimbamu ebifo ebigulumivu eby'okusinzizaamu ebintu ebyo ebitali nze Katonda. Aye ate waaba nga toli kunoonia mpiiya ng'oti ni malaaya eyeetunda!" 
Ezekiel16:32 Aye waaba ng'omukazi omufumbo omwenzi alekerera iba, n'aja n'ayenda abasaadha abandi." 
Ezekiel16:33 Kya buliidho nti abasaadha n'abatonera bamalaaya ebirabo. Aye kabiri iwe mwene niiwe otonera abagonzi bo ebirabo, okubagulirira olw'obwenzi bwo, baidhe okuva mu ndhuyi dhoonadhoona bakole niiwe obwamalaaya." 
Ezekiel16:34 Kale waaba ng'oli wa ndhawulo ku bakazi abandi bamalaaya, kuba ghazira yakupikiriza kufuuka malaaya. Kabiri iwe mwene niiwe ogulirira abasaadha, se ti beene okukusasula. Bwenebwene oli wa ndhawulo.”" 
Ezekiel16:35 Kale ni, iwe Yerusalemu malaaya, wulira Musengwa Katonda by'akoba." 
Ezekiel16:36 Musengwa Katonda oyo akoba ati: “Waweesa ensoni, waatoolamu engoye waasigala madu, era olw'obwenzi bwo weeghaayo y'abagonzi bo, ni y'ebitali nze Katonda bye wasinzanga. Era waaghangayo abaana bo ye biri, baitibwe ng'emisengo." 
Ezekiel16:37 Olw'ebyo bye wakola, ndisoloza abagonzi bo boonaboona be wasanhukanga nabo, abo be wayendanga n'abo be wakyaghanga. Ndibasoloza baava ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, baidha baakwefuulira baakulumba. Olwo naakutoolamu engoye dho, boonaboona baakubona ng'oli madu." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ndikusalira omusango gwe basalira abakazi abafumbo abenzi era abatemo, naakugha ekibonerezo eky'okwitibwa, olw'obusungu n'enkikidi bye wandeetera okuba nabyo olw'obwenzi bwo." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndikughaayo mu ngalo edh'abagonzi bo abo, baaja baasuula ghansi amasabo go era baamenhagho ebifo byo ebigulumivu by'osinzizaamu ebintu ebitali nze Katonda. Balikutoolamu engoye dho, era baakutoolaku ebyamadholobera byo ebirungi einho, baakuleka ng'oli madu ng'ozira kantu naire." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Balikuleetaku eigye iramba, baakukuba amabaale era baakutematema n'empiima dhaibwe." 
Ezekiel16:41 Balyokya endhu dho, baakubonereza ng'abakazi abandi kamaala babona. Nze ndikulekeza okukola obwamalaaya, waaba nga tokaagulirira bagonzi bo." 
Ezekiel16:42 Ntyo bwendikumaliraku obusungu bwange, olwo naalekera agho okuba n'enkikidi ku lulwo, ye wandeetera okuba nayo olw'obutaba mwesigwa ye ndi. Nditereera naalekera agho okukusungughalira." 
Ezekiel16:43 Olw'okuba tiwaidhukira bya mu buto bwo, aye waakolanga ebinsungughaza, kyendiva ni nkwesasuulizaaku. Kale lwaki ku bikolwa byo bire ebindi byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa, wayongerezaaku n'obwenzi?” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akobye." 
Ezekiel16:44 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu baidha kukozesanga ensambo eno nga bakwogeraku bati, ‘Inhina w'omughala ni mughala we bafaanania empisa.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Bwenebwene oli mughala wa inhoko, eyakyagha iba n'akyagha n'abaana be. Era oli nga baganda bo, abaakyagha baibaibwe ni bakyagha n'abaana baibwe. Inhaimwe yali Muhitti, ate iseimwe yaaba Muamori." 
Ezekiel16:46 “Mukulu wo bamweta Samaria, ng'ali ku luuyi lwo olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba ghalala n'ebibuga bye. Ate muto wo bamweta Sodoma, ng'ali ku luuyi lwo olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba ghalala n'ebibuga bye." 
Ezekiel16:47 Aye tikyakumala kwebisa nga beene, oba okukola ebyenhinhalwa nga beene kuba ghaabitagho bwa kaseera katono, waayonooneka n'okubasinga mu byonabyona by'okola." 
Ezekiel16:48 “Nze Musengwa Katonda omulamu, ndayira nti muganda wo Sodoma aghalala n'ebibuga bye tibaakola bibi nga iwe aghalala n'ebibuga byo bye mwakola." 
Ezekiel16:49 Bona eno, ekibi Sodoma kye yakola ghalala n'ebibuga bye, kyali kwekuluntaza olw'okuba n'emere enhingi, era nga buli kintu kibajiira bukalamu mu miraala, aye ni baloba okuyamba abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu." 
Ezekiel16:50 Beetwalanga nga ba ghaigulu era baakolanga ebyenhinhalwa nga mbona. Kyenava ni mbazikiriza nga mboine ebyo. 
Ezekiel16:51 “Ni muganda wo Samaria ebibi bye yakola tibyagheza waire ekitundu ekirala kiti ku bibi byo ng'obigabainiamu aghabiri. Bw'otoola ebyenhinhalwa Samaria bye yakola n'obigeza ku bibyo iwe bye wakola, Samaria aboneka ng'oti azira na kibi kye yakola, era ng'oti aziraku na musango." 
Ezekiel16:52 Mpegaano oli n'okugumira ensoni dho, kuba olw'okukola ebibi ebyenhinhalwa einho n'okusinga ebya baganda bo, oleeteire baganda bo abo okuba abalungi okukusinga. Kale ni swala era ofe ensoni, kuba niiwe mwene oleeteire baganda bo okuboneka ng'oti balungi.”" 
Ezekiel16:53 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndireetera Sodoma aghalala n'ebibuga bye, kabiri ebintu byairamu okubajiiranga obukalamu. Era naaleetera ni Samaria aghalala n'ebibuga bye, boona kabiri ebintu byairamu kubajiiranga obukalamu. N'iwe Yerusalemu weena ndikuleetera kabiri ebintu byairamu okukujiiranga obukalamu." 
Ezekiel16:54 Olwo oswale era ofe ensoni olw'ebyo byonabyona bye wakola. Ekyo kireetere baganda bo okuwulira mule nga bali bulungi. 
Ezekiel16:55 Baganda bo abo, Sodoma ni Samaria aghalala n'ebibuga byaibwe, baliirayo baaba mu mbeera dhaibwe edh'eira. N'iwe weena aghalala n'ebibuga byo, muliirayo mwaba mu mbeera dhaimwe edh'eira." 
Ezekiel16:56 Koodhi tiwayeeyerezanga muganda wo Sodoma bwe wali ng'okeebona ng'oli wa ghaigulu," 
Ezekiel16:57 era nga n'ebibi byo bikaali kumanhika? Aye mpegaano weena Abaedomu, n'Abafilisiti, n'abo boonaboona abakukyagha abakwezungulwire, bali kukunhooma." 
Ezekiel16:58 Era ogwaniire okugumira ekibonerezo eky'obwenzi bwo, n'eky'ebibi byo ebindi byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa bye wakola.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akobye." 
Ezekiel16:59 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Bwenebwene ndikubisa nga bw'ogwaniire, olw'okunhoomoola kye weeyama n'omenha endagaano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Aye nze ndikuuma endagaano ye nakola n'iwe ng'okaali muto, era ndikola niiwe endagaano ey'ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Ezekiel16:61 Baganda bo bombi, mukulu wo ni muto wo, bwe baliira y'oli ensoni dhiri kugema olw'ebyo bye wakola. Ndibakwiriza baaba ng'oti bwa baghala bo, waire ng'ekyo tikiri mu ndagaano yange n'iwe." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ndiizaagho endagaano yange n'iwe. 
Ezekiel16:63 Era ndikusonigha ebyo byonabyona bye wakola, aye waabiidhukiranga ensoni dhaakugema, nga tosobola kwogera kintu kyonakyona olw'okuswala.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akobye." 
Ezekiel17:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel17:2 “Iwe omuntu, kobera abantu ab'eighanga lya Isiraeli olufumo luno," 
Ezekiel17:3 bamanhe nga nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kukoba nti: Ghaaligho enkookooma enene, ng'eri n'amaghagha amanene era amaleeyi. Era yali ng'eriku amooya ag'erangi kamaala. Enkookooma eyo yaaguluka yaaja ku nsozi edh'e Lebanoni, ku muti omuvule ghaigulu ku busanso bw'ensaga dhaagwo." 
Ezekiel17:4 Yaamenhaku akasaga akasembayo ghaigulu ku busanso bw'ensaga dhaagwo, yaakatwala mu nsi erimu abasuubuzi, era yaakasimba mu kibuga eky'abasuubuzi." 
Ezekiel17:5 Era yaatoola ensigo mu nsi Isiraeli yaagitwala yaagisimba mu kifo ekigimu okumpi n'amaadhi amangi, yaaba ng'oti n'obuti obukulira ku mbali kw'omwiga." 
Ezekiel17:6 Ensigo eyo yaamera, yaavaamu omuzabbibu ogukulira ghansighansi ku itaka nga gulanda. Ensaga dhaagwo dhaakula nga dhisonse enkookooma ye yali, n'emizi gyagwo gyasimba ghansi mu itaka. Gwataaku ensaga kamaala n'amakaba kamaala." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Aye yaabaayo enkookooma eyindi enene, nga yoona eri n'amaghagha amanene n'amooya kamaala. Okuja okubona, ng'omuzabbibu ogwo gukyusa emizi gyagwo okugitoola mu nimiro mwe baagusimba, nga gugiringiriza enkookooma eyo eyindi ye yali. Gwakyusa n'ensaga dhaagwo dhoona gwadhiringiriza enkookooma eyo ye yali, esobole okugufukiriranga." 
Ezekiel17:8 Ate nga baagusimba mu itaka eirungi aghaali amaadhi amangi, olwo gwidheku ensaga era guteeku n'ebibala, gube omuzabbibu omulungi einho." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Kale nze Musengwa Katonda mbuuza nti: Omuzabbibu ogwo gulibaagho era gwakula? Enkookooma eyagusimba terigwiwululagho n'emizi gyagwo, n'egutemaku na nsaga dhaagwo, n'amakaba gaagwo amabisi ni ganiala? Tikiryetaagisa maani mangi, waire abantu kamaala okugwiwululagho n'emizi gyagwo." 
Ezekiel17:10 Bona eno, omuzabbibu ogwo bwe bagusimba gulibaagho gwakula? Tigulikala bukale ng'empewo eva e buvandhuba egufuuyiriire, nga guli mu kifo ghe baagusimba?”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel17:12 “Buuza abantu abo abadheemu, oba nga baidhi amakulu ag'olufumo luno. Bakobere oti: Kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia yaidha e Yerusalemu, yaatwala kyabazinga waayo n'abakungu baayo, yaaja nabo e Babilonia." 
Ezekiel17:13 Yaatwala mulala ku balangira, yaakola naye endagaano era yaamulayiza okuba omwesigwa. Yaatwala n'abantu abakologho mu nsi eyo ng'omusingo," 
Ezekiel17:14 olwo obwakyabazinga obwo bulobe kwegugunga, aye bukuume endagaano eyo busobole okusigalagho." 
Ezekiel17:15 Aye kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya yaadheema, yaatuma abakwenda e Misiri bamugheereze embalaasi n'eigye einene. Aye bwenebwene entegeka ya kyabazinga oyo esobola okutuukirira? Omuntu asobola okwewonia ng'akoze ebintu ng'oti n'ebyo? Omuntu asobola okumenha endagaano baaloba kumubonereza?" 
Ezekiel17:16 “Aye nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, kyabazinga oyo alifiira mu Babilonia, kuba yamenha endagaano ye yakola ni kyabazinga waayo, ate nga kyabazinga w'e Babilonia oyo n'eyamufuula kyabazinga." 
Ezekiel17:17 Ni bw'aba kyabazinga w'e Misiri n'eigye lye ery'amaani ery'abaisirukale abangi, talisobola kumuyamba mu lutalo, nga Abababilonia babunze emungo dh'eitaka edh'okuniiniraku okulumba, era nga bazimbye ekimante eky'okuzingiza abantu abangi babazikirize." 
Ezekiel17:18 Taliwona olw'okunhoomoola kye yeeyama n'amenha endagaano, ate nga yagitaaku omukono aye kabiri yaaloba okugijiiraku.”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Musengwa Katonda kyava n'akoba nti: “Bwenebwene ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, ndimwesasulizaaku olw'okunhoomoola kye yeeyama ye ndi, n'amenha endagaano yange." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndimutega naamugemya mu lutuula lwange, naamutwala mu Babilonia. Naamusalira eyo omusango gwamusinga, era naamubonereza olw'obutaba mwesigwa ye ndi." 
Ezekiel17:21 Abaisirukale be abasinga kulwana baliitirwa mu lutalo, ate abalirumuka ni bawonagho baasansaanira mu ndhuyi dhoonadhoona. Olwo mulimanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda ninze ndhogeire.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nze mwene ndija naamenha akasaga ku muti omuvule omuleeyiriri, kale keene akato akasembayo ghaigulu ku busanso bw'ensaga dhaagwo. Era nze mwene ndija naakasimba ghaigulu ku lusozi oluleeyi einho." 
Ezekiel17:23 Ndikasimba ku lusozi lwa Isiraeli olusinga kuba luleeyi, kamere kaidheku ensaga era kateeku n'ebibala, kafuuke omuvule omulungi einho. Ensolo edh'omu nsiko edha buli nsambo dhiidhe dhisulenga ghansi ghaagwo, n'enhonhi edha buli ngeri dhizimbenga ebisu byadho ku nsaga dhaagwo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Olwo emiti gyonagyona egy'omu nsiko girimanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze ndeetera omuti omuleeyiriri okuyimpagha, ate naaleetera omuti omumpi okuleegherera. Nkaza omuti omubisi, ate naasibusa omuti omukalu. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye era ekyo ndikituukiriza.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel18:2 “Mutera okukozesa endhogera ekoba eti, ‘Abazaire baalya emizabbibu egikaagha, aye ate abaana n'abaagemwa engigina ku maino.’ Muba mutegeeza ki?" 
Ezekiel18:3 “Aye nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, endhogera eyo timwidha kwiramu kugikozesa mu Isiraeli kabiri." 
Ezekiel18:4 Bona eno, nze ninze nfuga obulamu obwa buli muntu, ka bube obw'omuzaire oba obw'omwana. Kale omuntu akola ebibi n'alifa." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Omuntu omutuufu n'oyo akola ebituufu ebigwaniire ng'ajiira ku mateeka. 
Ezekiel18:6 Atasinza ebyo ebitali nze Katonda ab'eighanga Isiraeli bye basinza, era atalya ku misengo gye bagheerayo mu masabo ku nsozi. Atasendasenda muka beene n'aba naye mu buliri, era ataba mu buliri na mukazi ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'okulwala." 
Ezekiel18:7 Atafufunkiriza muntu yeenayeena, era atanhaga kintu kyonakyona ku muntu. Airiza eyamwewolaku omusingo gwe, n'agha omuyala eky'okulya, era n'agha ali amadu eky'okuvaala." 
Ezekiel18:8 Atawola muntu lwa kumufunaku magoba olwo mwene yeeyongere okuba omukombe, era eyeesamba okukola ebibi, ate n'asalira abantu emisango mu mazima." 
Ezekiel18:9 Ajiira ku biragiro byange era n'akuuma amateeka gange. Oyo n'omuntu omutuufu era bwenebwene aliba mulamu.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akobye. 
Ezekiel18:10 “Aye omuntu asobola okuzaala omwana omunhazi, omutemo," 
Ezekiel18:11 oba akola ebintu ng'oti ni bino: ng'alya ku misengo abantu gye bagheerayo mu masabo ku nsozi, yaasendasenda baka beene yaaba nabo mu buliri," 
Ezekiel18:12 yaakiriga abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu, yaakola obunhazi, yaaloba kwiriza muntu eyamwewolaku musingo gwe, yaasinza ebyo ebitali nze Katonda, yaakola ebyenhinhalwa," 
Ezekiel18:13 era yaawola omuntu lwa kumufunaku magoba olwo mwene yeeyongere okuba omukombe. Bwenebwene omuntu oyo agwaniire okuba omulamu? Busa naire, tibalimulekagho nga mulamu. Alifa olw'okukola ebyenhinhalwa ebyo byonabyona, era aliba nga ni mwene eyeereeteire okufa." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Ate omuntu oyo asobola okuzaala omwana, era omwana oyo yaabona ebibi byonabyona ise bye yakola, aye yaaloba kubikola." 
Ezekiel18:15 Nga tasinza ebyo ebitali nze Katonda ab'eighanga Isiraeli bye basinza, waire okulya ku misengo abantu gye bagheerayo mu masabo ku nsozi. Nga tasendasenda baka beene n'aba nabo mu buliri," 
Ezekiel18:16 era nga ghazira muntu yeenayeena y'akolaku kibi. Nga tatwala musingo gwa muntu yamwewolaku, waire okunhaga ekintu ku muntu yeenayeena. Aye ng'agha abayala eby'okulya, n'abali amadu yaabagha eby'okuvaala." 
Ezekiel18:17 Nga yeesamba okukola ebibi, tawola muntu lwa kumufunaku magoba olwo mwene yeeyongere okuba omukombe, akuuma ebiragiro byange era yaajiira ku mateeka gange. Omuntu oyo talifa lwa bibi ise bye yakola. Bwenebwene aliba mulamu." 
Ezekiel18:18 Aye ise olw'okuba yali mukupankupania, ng'anhaga ku bantu ebyaibwe era ng'akola ebitali birungi, alifa olw'ebibi bye yakola." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Aye musobola okwebuuza muti, ‘Lwaki omwana tibamuvunaana bibi ise bye yakola?’ Eky'okwiramu kiri nti omwana bw'aba nga yakola ebituufu ebigwaniire ng'ajiira ku mateeka, era nga yali mwegendereza okukuuma ebiragiro byange, aliba mulamu." 
Ezekiel18:20 Kale omuntu akola ebibi n'alifa. Omwana tibalimuvunaana bibi muzaire we bye yakola, waire omuzaire okuvunaanibwa ebibi omwana we bye yakola. Omuntu omutuufu aligheebwa empeera olw'ebituufu by'akola, ate omubi yaavunaanibwa olw'ebibi by'akola." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Aye omuntu omubi bw'akyuka n'aleka ebibi bye byonabyona bye yakola, n'akola ebituufu ng'ajiira ku mateeka, talifa. Bwenebwene aliba mulamu." 
Ezekiel18:22 Ebibi byonabyona bye yakola birimusoniyibwa, yaaba mulamu olw'ebituufu bye yakola." 
Ezekiel18:23 Mulowooza muti nze nhumirwa okubona omwonooni ng'afiire? Busa naire! Nhenda bwende akyuke aleke ebibi bye, abe mulamu.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akobye." 
Ezekiel18:24 “Aye omuntu omutuufu bw'akyuka n'alekera okukola ebituufu, naakola ebibi, era n'akola ebyenhinhalwa byonabyona abantu ababi bye bakola, mulowooza muti aliba mulamu? Busa naire! Ghazira naire ekirala ku bikolwa bye eby'obutuufu bye yakola, kiriidhukirwa. Era alifa olw'obutaba mwesigwa, n'olw'ebibi by'akola." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Aye imwe mukoba muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda mu nkola ye tasala nsonga mu butuufu.’ Aye muwulire imwe ab'eighanga Isiraeli: Obwo bwenebwene nze mu nkola yange tisala nsonga mu butuufu? Nti katyo niimwe mutasala nsonga mu butuufu mu nkola dhaimwe!" 
Ezekiel18:26 Omuntu omutuufu bw'akyuka n'alekera okukola ebituufu, naakola ebibi, alifa olw'ebibi by'akola." 
Ezekiel18:27 Aye omwonooni bw'akyuka n'alekera okukola ebibi, n'akola ebituufu ebigwaniire ng'ajiira ku mateeka, aliwonia obulamu bwe" 
Ezekiel18:28 kuba olwo aba yeefumintiriiza yaakyuka, yaalekera okukola ebibi byonabyona bye yakola. Bwenebwene talifa, aliba mulamu." 
Ezekiel18:29 Aye imwe ab'eighanga Isiraeli mukoba muti, ‘Musengwa Katonda mu nkola ye tasala nsonga mu butuufu.’ Ee, imwe Abaisiraeli, obwo bwenebwene nze mu nkola yange tisala nsonga mu butuufu? Nti katyo niimwe mutasala nsonga mu butuufu mu nkola dhaimwe!" 
Ezekiel18:30 “Nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubakobera imwe Abaisiraeli, nti ndisalira buli muntu ku imwe omusango nga njiira ku bikolwa bye. Mwenenie mukyuke muve mu bibi byaimwe byonabyona, olwo ebibi byaimwe ebyo lwe bitaabaviiremu kuzikirira." 
Ezekiel18:31 Mwetooleku ebibi byonabyona bye mubairenga mukola, mufune emyoyo emiyaaka n'endowooza empyaka. Imwe abantu b'eighanga Isiraeli, lwaki mwenda okufa?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Nze tinhumirwa kubona muntu yeenayeena ng'afiire. Kale ni mukyuke muve mu bibi byaimwe, memale mube balamu.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akobye." 
Ezekiel19:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba nhembere abakulembeze ba Isiraeli olwembo luno olw'enaku," 
Ezekiel19:2 nga nkoba nti: Inhoko yali ng'oti mpologoma nkazi, yaatyama yaayonsa ebyana byayo nga n'empologoma enume enkambwe dhiri agho!" 
Ezekiel19:3 Yakuza ekirala ku byana byayo, kyafuuka empologoma enume ento. Empologoma enume ento eyo yaayega okuyiiga, era yaalya n'abantu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Amaghanga gaafuuwa amagwala okugiyiiga, baagigemya mu lwina lwe baagitega. Baagighaluza n'amalobo baagitwala mu nsi Misiri." 
Ezekiel19:5 Inhoko bwe yabona nga biri bityo, eisuubi lyamuwaamu. Yaakuza ekindi ku byana byayo ebyo, kyafuuka empologoma enume ento." 
Ezekiel19:6 Era kyakulira irala, kyatambulatambulanga nga kiri ghalala n'empologoma dhiinaakyo. Kyayega okuyiiga n'okulya n'abantu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Kyayonoonayonoona ebifo byaibwe eby'okwewogomamu, kyazikiriza ebibuga byaibwe. Nga buli lwe kiwologoma kiti, abantu batya inho n'ebyalo byaibwe byawolongera." 
Ezekiel19:8 Agho amaghanga gaava ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, geesoloza okwidha okukirumba. Baakitega olutuula, baakigemya mu lwina lwe baakitega." 
Ezekiel19:9 Baakighaluza n'amalobo baakisibira mu kaguli, era baakitwalira omwo eri kyabazinga wa Babilonia. Baakikuuma butiribiri, olwo abantu balobe kukiwulira kabiri nga kiwologomera ku nsozi dha Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 Inhoko yali ng'oti muzabbibu gwe basimbye mu isamba kumpi n'amaadhi, ni guba n'ensaga kamaala era nga gubala inho ebibala." 
Ezekiel19:11 Olusaga lwagwo olwasingamu obugumu lwakula lwaleegha, baalukolamu omwigo ogw'obwakyabazinga. Omuzabbibu ogwo gwakula gwaleegha inho ghaigulu, ng'ensaga dhaagwo edhiriku amakaba amangi badhirengerera ghala." 
Ezekiel19:12 Aye abantu baagwiwululagho n'emizi mu busungu, baagusuula ghansi. Empewo eva e buvandhuba yaidha yaagukaza. Ebibala byagwo baabikunkumusa ghansi, n'ensaga dhaagwo baadhikookola dhaakala, era baadhookya omuliro." 
Ezekiel19:13 Buti baagusimba mu irungu, mu itaka eikalu ery'olubbalangu." 
Ezekiel19:14 Enduli y'omuzabbibu ogwo yaagema omuliro, omuliro ogwo gwayokya ensaga dhaagwo n'ebibala byaku. Tigukaaliku nsaga ngumu dha kutema kukolamu miigo gya bwakyabazinga. Olwo n'olwembo olw'enaku, era baidha kulwembanga buli kaakyeire." 
Ezekiel20:1 Ku lunaku olweikumi mu mwezi ogwokutaanu, mu mwaka ogwomusanvu nga tuli mu bunhage, ghaabaagho abandi ku bakulembeze ab'omu Isiraeli abaidha ni batyama agho mu maiso gange nga benda okwebuuza ku Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel20:2 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel20:3 “Iwe omuntu, yogera n'abakulembeze ab'omu Isiraeli abo obakobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubakoba nti: Mwidhie kuneebuuzaaku? Aye ni, nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu tiidha kubaganha naire kuneebuuzaaku." 
Ezekiel20:4 “Iwe omuntu, oli mwetegefu okubasalira omusango? Bwenebwene oli mwetegefu? Kale ni baidhukize ebyenhinhalwa badhaadha baibwe bye baakola." 
Ezekiel20:5 Era obakobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubakoba nti: Olunaku lwe neeroboza eighanga Isiraeli, abaana ba Yakobo abo, nabeeyandhulira nga bali mu nsi Misiri, naabamanhisa nti ninze Musengwa Katonda waibwe." 
Ezekiel20:6 Era ku olwo nabasuubiza okubatoola mu nsi Misiri, mbatwale mu nsi ye nabategekera engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala, esinga edhindi dhoonadhoona ekitiibwa." 
Ezekiel20:7 Naabakoba nti basuule ere ebyenhinhalwa ebibasikiriza, era balobe kweyonoona nga basinza ebitali nze Katonda eby'omu Misiri, kuba ninze Musengwa Katonda waibwe." 
Ezekiel20:8 Aye bandheemera, baaloba kuwulirisa bye nabakoba. Baaloba kusuula ere ebyenhinhalwa ebyabasikirizanga, waire okuva ku bisinzibwa ebitali nze Katonda eby'omu Misiri. Agho naayenda okubamaliraku ekiruyi kyange, mboolekeze obusungu bwange nga bali eyo mu nsi Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:9 Aye ekyo tyakikola ku lw'eriina lyange, lirobe kunhoomebwa mu maghanga ge baalimu, kuba ab'omu maghanga ago baaligho nga nsuubiza Abaisiraeli abo nti ndi kuja kubatoola mu nsi Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:10 “Kale naabatoola mu nsi Misiri naabatwala mu irungu. 
Ezekiel20:11 Naabagha ebiragiro byange, naabeegeresa n'amateeka gange kuba ebyo nga n'ebireetera omuntu okuba omulamu ng'abituukiriiza." 
Ezekiel20:12 Era naabateeragho n'olunaku lwa Sabbato ng'akamanhiso ghagati ghange ni beene, okubaidhukizanga nti nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze mbatukuza." 
Ezekiel20:13 Aye abantu ab'eighanga Isiraeli bandheemera nga bali eyo mu irungu, baaloba kujiira ku mateeka gange era baava ku biragiro byange, ebireetera omuntu okuba omulamu ng'abituukiriiza. Era baayonoona olunaku lwange olwa Sabbato. Agho naayenda mbamalireku ekiruyi kyange nga bali eyo mu irungu, mbazikirize mbamaliriregho." 
Ezekiel20:14 Aye ekyo tyakikola ku lw'eriina lyange, lirobe kunhoomebwa mu maghanga ge baalimu, kuba ab'omu maghanga ago baabona nga ndi kubatoola mu nsi Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:15 Kale, nze neerayirira mwene nga bali eyo mu irungu, nti tiribatuusa mu nsi ye nabagha, ensi engimu era erimu ebirungi kamaala, esinga edhindi dhoonadhoona ekitiibwa." 
Ezekiel20:16 Neerayirira ntyo lwa kuba baava ku biragiro byange era baaloba kujiira ku mateeka gange. Baayonoona n'olunaku lwange olwa Sabbato, era baasinzanga ebitali nze Katonda." 
Ezekiel20:17 “Aye nabasaasira, naaloba kubazikiriza kubamaliriragho nga bali eyo mu irungu." 
Ezekiel20:18 Agho naalabula abaana baibwe nga bali eyo mu irungu, nti mutajiira ku mateeka badhaadha baimwe ge baataagho, era mutagondera biragiro byaibwe, waire okweyonoona nga musinza ebyo bye basinza ebitali nze Katonda." 
Ezekiel20:19 Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze Katonda waimwe, mujiirenga ku mateeka gange era mukolenga bye ndagira." 
Ezekiel20:20 Mukuzenga olunaku lwa Sabbato nga lutukuvu, lubenga akamanhiso ak'endagaano nze ye nakola n'imwe, era lubaidhukizenga nga nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze Katonda waimwe." 
Ezekiel20:21 “Aye abaana boona bandheemera, baaloba kujiira ku mateeka gange era baava ku biragiro byange, ebireetera omuntu okuba omulamu ng'abituukiriiza. Baayonoona n'olunaku lwange olwa Sabbato. Agho naayenda okubamaliraku ekiruyi kyange, mboolekeze obusungu bwange nga bali eyo mu nsi Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:22 Aye neefuga, ekyo naaloba kukikola ku lw'eriina lyange, olwo lirobe kunhoomebwa mu maghanga ge baalimu, kuba ab'omu maghanga ago baabona nga ndi kubatoola mu nsi Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:23 Kale, nze n'okwiramu kabiri okwerayirira mwene nga bali eyo mu irungu, nti ndidha kubasansaaniza eyo mu maghanga, mbaidhuze eyo mu nsi enhingi." 
Ezekiel20:24 Neerayirira ntyo lwa kuba baava ku biragiro byange era baaloba kujiira ku mateeka gange. Baayonoona n'olunaku lwange olwa Sabbato, era baasinzanga ebitali nze Katonda ebya badhaadha baibwe." 
Ezekiel20:25 “Agho naabaleka bajiire ku mateeka ni ku biragiro, ebitaleetera muntu abijiiraku kuba mulamu naire." 
Ezekiel20:26 Naabaleka beeyonoona nga bagheereza eri emisambwa ebigheebwayo, era nga baghaayo y'emisambwa egyo abaana baibwe ababeri bookebwe mu muliro ng'emisengo. Ekyo nakikola nga nhenda mbabonereze era bamanhe nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Agho ni, iwe omuntu, yogera n'ab'eighanga Isiraeli, obakobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubakoba ati: Eyo n'eyindi ku ngeri badhaadha baimwe dhe baanhoomangamu nze Musengwa Katonda, era ni balobanga okuba abeesigwa ye ndi." 
Ezekiel20:28 Bwe nabatuusa mu nsi nze mwene ye neerayirira okubagha, ng'olwo buli ghe baabonanga akasozi akagulumivu oba omuti ogw'amakaba amangi amazibirivu, ng'agho bagheeragho emisengo gyaibwe. Ebigheebwayo byaibwe bye baagheeranga mu bifo ebyo, n'obuwoowo bwe baaniokezangayo, era n'ebigheebwayo eby'okunhwa bye baafukangayo, byansungughazanga busungughaze." 
Ezekiel20:29 Naababuuza nti, ‘Kifo ki ekigulumivu eyo ye mujanga okusinziza?’ N'okuva ku olwo kyayetebwanga ‘Ekifo ekigulumivu eky'okusinzizaamu’ ni ye buli eno." 
Ezekiel20:30 Agho ni, kobera abantu ab'eighanga Isiraeli oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubabuuza ati: Mwena muli kwenda kweyonoona ng'oti ni badhaadha baimwe, nga musinza ebitali nze Katonda ebyenhinhalwa bye baasinzanga?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Ni ye buli eno mukeeyonoona nga musinza ebitali nze Katonda, mwaghaayo ebigheebwayo byaimwe, era mwaghaayo n'abaana baimwe bookebwe mu muliro ng'emisengo. Memale ng'obwo era imwe abantu ab'eighanga Isiraeli mwidha mbu kuneebuuzaaku? Bwenebwene nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, tija kubaganha kuneebuuzaaku." 
Ezekiel20:32 Ni bwekiba ekyo kye mulowooza mbu mwenda mube ng'abamaghanga agandi n'abantu ab'omu nsi edhindi, musinze emiti n'amabaale, tikija kubaagho naire." 
Ezekiel20:33 “Nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, mu busungu obubitirivu ndikozesa obuyinza bwange obungi n'amaani gange agataloodheka, naabafuga nga ninze kyabazinga waimwe." 
Ezekiel20:34 Mu busungu obubitirivu ndikozesa obuyinza bwange obungi n'amaani gange agataloodheka, naabatoolayo eyo mu maghanga, naabasolozaayo eyo mu nsi ye mwasansaanira." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ndibatwala mu irungu ery'abamaghanga agandi, naabasalirira eyo omusango nga tubonagana maiso ku maiso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Nga bwe nasalira badhaadha baimwe omusango mu irungu ery'ensi Misiri, mwena ntyo bwenja okubasalira.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Ndibafuga na mwigo naabaleetera okugondera endagaano yange. 
Ezekiel20:38 Ndibasunsulamu abo abadheemu, n'abo abakola ebibi ni bansungughaza. Ndibatoola mu nsi dhe baasengamu, aye tiribaganha kwirayo mu Isiraeli. Olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel20:39 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Mperaano imwe Abaisiraeli, oba nga timwenda kumpulira, buli muntu aje agheereze ebisinzibwa bye ebitali nze Katonda. Aye mbalabula obutairayo kwonoona liina lyange eitukuvu, eno nga mumpa ebigheebwayo ate ere nga bwemusinza ebitali nze Katonda." 
Ezekiel20:40 “Mu kifo eky'okusinza ebyo, mwenamwena mulisinzanga nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu, olusozi oluleeyi olw'omu nsi Isiraeli. Eyo ye ndibasangaalira, era naasiima ebirabo byaimwe ebisinga kuba birungi, ghalala n'ebigheebwayo byaimwe ebitukuvu." 
Ezekiel20:41 Bwendimala okubatoolayo eyo mu maghanga, ni mbasolozaayo eyo mu nsi ye mwasansaanira, ndisiima emisengo gyaimwe egyokebwa, era mulirangirira eri amaghanga nga bwendi omutukuvu." 
Ezekiel20:42 Bwe ndibatuusa mu nsi Isiraeli, ensi ye nalayira okugha badhaadha baimwe, olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel20:43 Nga muli eyo muliidhukira emize gyaimwe n'ebikolwa byaimwe byonabyona bye mweyonoona nabyo. Olwo mwenenia era mwawulira n'enaku olw'ebibi byaimwe byonabyona bye mwakola. 
Ezekiel20:44 Imwe abantu b'eighanga Isiraeli, ku lw'eriina lyange bwe ndibabisa obukalamu mu kifo eky'okubabisa obubi nga njiira ku bikolwa byaimwe ebikyamu ni ku mpisa dhaimwe embi, olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Agho kabiri Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel20:46 “Iwe omuntu, amaiso go galingirize ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. Olange ng'ovumirira ekiketezo ekyo ekikalukalu, era ng'ovumirira n'ekibira ekiri mu kiketezo ekyo." 
Ezekiel20:47 Koba ekibira ekyo ekiri mu kiketezo ekikalukalu ekyo, kiwulirise nze Musengwa Katonda bye ndikukoba nti: Bona eno, ndikukunaaniaku omuliro gwayokya buli muti gwonagwona ogukulimu, ka gube omubisi oba omukalu. Omuliro gulibbeibbera era tighalibaagho muntu asobola kuguzikiza. Gulyokerera buli muntu, okuva ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba okutuuka ku luuyi olw'omugooda olw'e buvandhuba." 
Ezekiel20:48 Abantu boonaboona balibona nga nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze nkunaaniza omuliro ogwo, era tighalibaagho asobola kuguzikiza.”" 
Ezekiel20:49 Aye nze naakoba nti: “Aa, Musengwa Katonda, abantu bali kundhogeraku bati nze buli kiseera ndhogera mu nfumo.”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel21:2 “Iwe omuntu, amaiso go galingirize ku Yerusalemu. Olange ng'ovumirira ebifo abantu bye basinzizaamu, era ng'olabula ensi Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel21:3 Kobera ensi Isiraeli oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kukoba nti: Bona eno, buti nze nfuuse muzigu y'oli, era ndisowola empiima yange mu kiruutu kyayo naita abantu abakulimu, abatuufu n'ababi, naabakumalamu." 
Ezekiel21:4 Olw'okukumalamu iwe abantu abakulimu, abatuufu n'ababi, ndisowola empiima yange mu kiruutu kyayo naalwanisa abantu boonaboona, okuva ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba okutuuka ku luuyi olw'omugooda olw'e buvandhuba." 
Ezekiel21:5 Abantu boonaboona balimanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze nsowoire empiima yange mu kiruutu kyayo, era nga tija kugiizaamu." 
Ezekiel21:6 “Kale ni, iwe omuntu, sinda inho ng'omuntu ali n'enaku enene ku mwoyo, sinda nga weenhiinkaire inho, bakubone." 
Ezekiel21:7 Bwebakubuuza bati, ‘Lwaki oli kusinda?’ Ng'obairamu oti, ‘Ndi kusinda olw'amawulire ge mpuliire, ag'ebyo ebiri kwidha. Bwe birituuka, boonaboona emyoyo giribatekemuka, emikono gyabalebera, ebikiryaivu byabadhugumira, era baazirika. Bona eno, ebyo bija kubaagho bituukirire.’ ” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel21:8 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel21:9 “Iwe omuntu, langa okobere abantu, oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kukoba nti: Empiima, empiima bagighagaire era baagizigula." 
Ezekiel21:10 Bagighagaire kutirimbula, baagizigula emyanse ng'oti lukuba. “Kale tighasobola kubaagho kusagamba, kuba abantu bange banhoomye buli kibonerezo, ghalala n'okulabulwa kwonakwona." 
Ezekiel21:11 Agho ni empiima bagizigwire nga bagitegeka okukozesebwa. Bagighagaire era baagizigula, omwisi agigeme mu ngalo." 
Ezekiel21:12 Iwe omuntu, lira amaziga era owowoole, kuba empiima eno eidhiriire bantu bange, n'abakulembeze boonaboona ab'omu Isiraeli. Baja kugheebwayo baitibwe ghalala n'abantu bange abandi boonaboona. Agho ni weekube ku bisambi weepampagule olw'okusoberwa." 
Ezekiel21:13 Abantu bange ndidha kusooka mbalebe mbone bwe bali. Aye bwebanaanhooma okulabulwa, ebyo byonabyona biidha kubaagho.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Kale, iwe omuntu langa, okube mu ngalo empiima eidhe eteme emikuzi ebiri, kabiri eteme n'ogwokusatu. Eyo n'empiima ebazingiiza okubatirimbula mu bungi." 
Ezekiel21:15 Empiima eyo ereetera emyoyo gy'abantu okutekemuka, beekontola baagwa n'okugwa. Ngitaire mu kibuga nga bagizigwire, eri kumyansa ng'oti lukuba, ng'eteegereire okutirimbula." 
Ezekiel21:16 Iwe empiima, tema ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha, ni ku lw'omugooda, yoonayoona obwogi bwo ye bunaalinga."
