Ezekiel21:17 Zeena ndidha kukuba mu ngalo neemaleku obusungu.” 
Ezekiel21:18 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel21:19 “Iwe omuntu, taagho engira ibiri, kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia mw'asobola okubita ng'agemye empiima ye. Dhiteegho nga dhombi dhiviira mu kiketezo kirala ekyo, era ote n'ekipande engira edho dhombi ghe dhaagaananira." 
Ezekiel21:20 Laga engira kyabazinga mw'anaabisa empiima okutuuka ku kibuga Rabba eky'Abammoni, n'engira mw'anaagibisa okutuuka e Buyudaaya ku kibuga Yerusalemu ekyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu." 
Ezekiel21:21 Kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia oyo ayemereire ghale engira dhombi ghe dhaagaananira. Olw'okwenda okuzuula engira y'anaagema, ali kusuula obulaso ghansi, yeeraguza ku misambwa, era yaakebera eini ery'ensolo y'aghaireyo ng'omusengo." 
Ezekiel21:22 Mperaano agemye akalaso mu mukono gwe omusaadha, ng'akalulu kagwire ku kibuga Yerusalemu. Akalaso ako kamukoba aje akisimbeku ebintu eby'okukozesa okuwomola ekimante kyakyo, akizimbeku ebituuti ebirengererwaku, n'ebintu eby'okukontesa endhigi dh'emiryango gyakyo, era abunge n'emungo dh'eitaka edh'okuniiniraku okukirumba. Olwo akube enduulu edh'omu lutalo, era aite." 
Ezekiel21:23 Aye okulagula okwo kwidha kuboneka ng'oti kwa buguya eri ab'omu Yerusalemu, kuba baakola endagaano ni kyabazinga oyo. Aye ate okulagula okwo kwidhie okubaidhukiza ebibi byaibwe bye baakola, n'okubalabula nti baidha kutwalibwa mu bunhage." 
Ezekiel21:24 “Agho ni, nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kukoba nti: Ebibi byaimwe bimanhiike era biboneekerera mu bikolwa byaimwe byonabyona. Kale ni nga bwemubindidhukiza buli kaseera, nja kubaghaayo eri abazigu baimwe, babageme." 
Ezekiel21:25 “Iwe omufuzi wa Isiraeli, omubi era atasiimya Katonda naire, olunaku lwo lutuuse, n'ekiseera eky'okubonerezebwa kwo okusembayo." 
Ezekiel21:26 Nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kukoba nti: Toolaku engule yo ku mutwe era osibuleku n'ekitambaala kyo ku mutwe, kuba ebintu tibirisigala nga bwe biri naire. Niinia abanafu babe bafuzi, ate ab'obukumu obaniinuse babe ghansi." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ekibuga ekyo ndikizikiriza kyafuuka bifulukwafulukwa, okutuusa oyo ye nhenda okukigha lw'aliidha, ni nkimugha." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Iwe omuntu, langa okobere abantu bino, nze Musengwa Katonda, bye ndi kukoba Abammoni, abavuma Abaisiraeli. Bakobere oti: ‘Bona empiima, empiima yiiyo bagisowoireyo okutirimbula era baagizigula emyanse ng'oti lukuba." 
Ezekiel21:29 “‘Okubonekerwa kwe mufuna kwa buguya, ni bye mulagula ti bituufu naire. Muli babi abatasiimya Katonda naire, era olunaku lwaimwe lutuuse, n'ekiseera eky'okubonerezebwa kwaimwe okusembayo. Empiima eja kusala amamiro gaimwe." 
Ezekiel21:30 “ ‘Mwize empiima mu kiruutu kyayo. Mu kifo kyene mwe mwatonderwa, mu nsi yeene mwe baabazaalira, mwe ndibasalirira omusango." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ndibamaliraku obusungu bwange, ekiruyi kyange kyabatumbukiraku ng'oti muliro, era naabaghaayo mu ngalo edh'abantu abakambwe ng'oti nsolo, abali n'obumanhirivu mu kuzikiriza." 
Ezekiel21:32 Muliba ng'oti nku nga muli mu muliro oguli kwaka. Omusaayi gwaimwe guliyuyika mu nsi yaimwe yeene, olwo ghalobe kubaagho muntu airamu kubaidhukira.’ ” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel22:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel22:2 “Iwe omuntu, onaasala omusango? Onaasalira ekibuga ekyo omusango ekiidhwire abatemo? Kale ni kimanhise ebyenhinhalwa byonabyona bye kikola." 
Ezekiel22:3 Kobera ekibuga ekyo oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kukoba nti: Olw'okuba waita abantu bo kamaala ababa mu iwe, era weeyonoona n'okusinza ebitali Katonda, ekiseera kyo kiri kwidha." 
Ezekiel22:4 Waiza omusango ogw'obutemo olw'okwita abantu kamaala batyo, era weeyonoona n'ebifaananie ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda bye wakola. Olwo waaleetera olunaku lwo okutuuka amangu n'ekiseera kyo okuwaaku. Kyenava ni nkuleka okuvumibwa amaghanga, n'okunhoomebwa ensi dhoonadhoona." 
Ezekiel22:5 Abakuli okumpi n'abakuli eghala balikunhooma, kuba oli n'eriina eibi era oidhwire obusasamalo." 
Ezekiel22:6 “Bona eno, abakulembeze ab'omu Isiraeli ababa mu iwe, baita abantu nga bakozesa obukumu bwaibwe." 
Ezekiel22:7 Abazaire mu iwe batwalibwa ng'ekitagasa, ebintu by'abasenze byakupankupanizibwa, banamwandu ni bamulekwa baatulugunhizibwa." 
Ezekiel22:8 Onhoomerera ebintu byange ebitukuvu, era waayonoona n'olunaku lwange olwa Sabbato." 
Ezekiel22:9 Mu iwe mulimu abantu abaghaayiriza banaibwe olw'okwenda okubaitisa, mwabaamu abalya ku misengo gye bagheerayo mu masabo ku nsozi, mwabaamu n'abeesanhusa n'okukola obwenzi." 
Ezekiel22:10 Mu iwe mulimu abasaadha ababa ni baka baiseibwe mu buliri, era mwabaamu n'abo abakaka abakazi ni baba nabo mu buliri nga bali mu biseera byaibwe eby'okulwala." 
Ezekiel22:11 Mu iwe mulimu abenda ku baka beene, mwabaamu abenda ku baka batabane baibwe, n'abenda ku baanhinaibwe abaana ba baiseibwe." 
Ezekiel22:12 Era mu iwe mulimu abagulirirwa okutemula abantu. Mwabaamu abawola banaibwe olw'okubafunaku amagoba olwo beene beeyongere okuba abakombe. Era mwabaamu n'abatoola ebintu bya banaibwe mu kukupankupania. Abantu abo baaneerabira ira.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba. 
Ezekiel22:13 “Kale bona eno, ndikubonereza n'amaani olw'obunhazi bwo n'obutemo bwo." 
Ezekiel22:14 Olowooza oti mu biseera bye ndikukangaivuliramu, oliba okaalimu amaani era ng'okaasobola waire okugalula omukono gwo? Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze mwene nkobye, era ekyo ndikikola." 
Ezekiel22:15 Abantu bo ndibasansaaniza eyo mu maghanga, naabaidhuza eyo mu nsi enhingi, olwo naakumalamu ebikolwa byo ebibi byonabyona." 
Ezekiel22:16 Agho amaghanga ago galikunhoomoola waawaamu ekitiibwa, era waamanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel22:18 “Iwe omuntu, Abaisiraeli bafuuse iseedha omuzira mugaso. Bafuuse iseedha eriviiremu feeza n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, n'eibaati, n'ekyuma ekigumu einho, n'ekyuma ekizitogha einho, oluvainhuma lw'okusaanuusibwa n'okukenenulwa mu muliro." 
Ezekiel22:19 Agho ni, nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva ni mbakoba nti: Olw'okuba boonaboona baafuuka iseedha buseedha, ndibasololeza ghalala mu Yerusalemu," 
Ezekiel22:20 ng'abantu bwe basoloza feeza, n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, n'ekyuma ekigumu einho, n'ekyuma ekizitogha einho n'eibaati, ni babita mu kyokero ni babisaanuusa. Zeena ntyo bwe ndibasoloza, nga ndiku obusungu n'ekiruyi, naabata agho naabasaanuusa." 
Ezekiel22:21 Bwenebwene ndibasoloza naabakumaku omuliro ogw'obusungu bwange, baasaanuukira mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel22:22 Nga feeza bw'asaanuukira mu kyokero, boona bwe balisaanuukira mu Yerusalemu, memale baamanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze mbamaliireku obusungu bwange.”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel22:24 “Iwe omuntu, kobera Abaisiraeli oti ensi yaibwe ti nongoofu, era ndigibonereza olw'obusungu obundiku." 
Ezekiel22:25 Abakulembeze baamu bali ng'oti mpologoma ewologoma, n'ekankanula ky'egemye. Baita abantu, baanhaga empiiya n'eby'obukombe, era baaleka abakazi kamaala nga bafuuse banamwandu." 
Ezekiel22:26 Bakabona baamu baamenha amateeka gange. Tibaawulagho bintu bitukuvu na bitali bitukuvu, waire okwawulagho ebirongoofu n'ebitali birongoofu. Era tibakuza lunaku lwange lwa Sabbato, baaleetera abantu obutampa kitiisa." 
Ezekiel22:27 Abakulembeze baamu bali ng'oti misege egikankanula kye gigemye. Baita abantu baabazikiriza, basobole okutwala ebintu byaibwe, bakombaghale." 
Ezekiel22:28 Abalanzi baamu baghemba ku bibi ebyo, ng'omuntu bw'asiiga ekimante langi endheru. Okubonekerwa kwe bafuna kwa buguya, ni bye balagula ti bituufu naire, nga bakoba mbu, ‘Musengwa Katonda akoba ati,’ ate nga nze Musengwa Katonda nzira kye nkobye naire." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abatyamye b'omu nsi eyo bakola obukupankupania, baanhaga ku bantu ebyaibwe. Banhigiriza abaavu n'abali mu bwetaavu, baakupankupania ebintu by'abasenze aghazira kusaasira naire." 
Ezekiel22:30 Nanoonia mu bantu abo aye tyafunamu waire mulala, asobola okuzimba obuyaaka ekimante waire okukuuma mu bifo ekimante ghe kyawomolwa ebituli, asobole okuwonia ensi eyo, ndobe kugizikiriza." 
Ezekiel22:31 Kale ndibamaliraku obusungu bwange, naabazikiriza n'omuliro gw'ekiruyi ekindiku, naabeesasuulizaaku olw'ebyo bye baakola. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel23:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel23:2 “Iwe omuntu, ghaaligho abakazi babiri nga inhaibwe mulala." 
Ezekiel23:3 Bwe baali bakaali bato nga bali e Misiri baakola obwa malaaya, abasaadha baabaniogerezanga amabeere, baafiirwa okusigala nga bakaali beegha." 
Ezekiel23:4 Omukulu eriina lye nga ni Ohola, ate omuto nga ni Oholiba. Ohola oyo ng'aligho okutegeeza Samaria, ate Oholiba yaabaagho okutegeeza Yerusalemu. Abakazi abo bombi nabafumbirwa, banzaalira abaana." 
Ezekiel23:5 “Waire Ohola yali mukazi wange, aye era yakolanga obwamalaaya, yeefulugutanga n'abagonzi be Abassiria." 
Ezekiel23:6 Abassiria abo baalinga balwani abaavaalanga engoye dha nakasooma, nga bakungu, era nga baduumizi mu magye. Boonaboona baali baisuka ababoneka obulungi, era nga baisirukale ba ku mbalaasi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Ohola oyo yalaaya ku buli musaadha Mussiria yeenayeena eyali asinga kuboneka bulungi. Era okwefuluguta nabo einho kwamuleetera okweyonoona ng'asinza ebisinzibwa byaibwe byonabyona ebitali Katonda. 
Ezekiel23:8 Tiyalekayo bwamalaaya bwe, bwe yakola okuviira irala ng'ali e Misiri, ye yabeera n'abasaadha mu buliri ni bamwesanhukizaaku ng'akaali muto, ni bamuleetera okuba nga takaali mwegha." 
Ezekiel23:9 Kale nze kyenava ni mmughaayo mu ngalo edh'abagonzi be Abassiria be yeefulugutanga nabo. 
Ezekiel23:10 Abo baamutoolamu engoye dhe baamuleka madu, baagema batabane be ni baghala be, era mwene baamwita n'empiima. Bwe yamala okusalirwa atyo omusango ni gumusinga, yaafuuka kya kuyeeyereza mu bakazi." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Waire muganda we Oholiba yabona ebyo, aye era yamala yaaba mubi n'okusinga Ohola oyo mu kwefuluguta n'abasaadha n'okukola obwamalaaya." 
Ezekiel23:12 Yeena yeefuluguta n'Abassiria abakungu, abaduumizi mu magye, abalwani abaavaalanga engoye enungi einho, n'abaisirukale ab'oku mbalaasi, nga boonaboona baisuka ababoneka obulungi." 
Ezekiel23:13 Naabona nga yayonooneka, era kyaba nti aboluganda bombi baagema ngira ndala." 
Ezekiel23:14 “Aye ono yaswisaagho mu bwamalaaya bwe, kuba yabona ebifaananie eby'abasaadha Abababilonia bye baakuba ku bimante mu langi ya kasaayisaayi," 
Ezekiel23:15 nga beesibye emisipi mu nkende era nga beesibye ku mitwe ebitambaala eby'omusono. Boonaboona nga bavaire ng'oti n'abakungu ab'omu nsi Babilonia. 
Ezekiel23:16 Bwe yababona yaabeegomba n'omwoyo gwamudunguda, yaabatumira abakwenda mu Babilonia." 
Ezekiel23:17 Era Abababilonia baidha baaba naye mu buliri. Baamumaliraku obwenzi bwaibwe, baamwonoona. Yaamala yaabeesinwa, yaakyuka yaabavaaku." 
Ezekiel23:18 Bwe yaja mu maiso n'okukola obwamalaaya bwe ng'abantu boonaboona babona era ni yeeyanikanga amadu, nze naakyuka naamuvaaku nga mwesiniirwa, nga bwe nakyuka ninva ku muganda we." 
Ezekiel23:19 Aye era yeeyongera bweyongere kukola bwamalaaya, nga bwe yabukolanga nga mughala muto e Misiri." 
Ezekiel23:20 Omwoyo gwamweyongera okumudunguda olw'okwegomba abasaadha abali ng'oti bwa ndogoyi oba mbalaasi nume, abaatamiira obutamiire okuba n'abakazi mu buliri." 
Ezekiel23:21 “Oholiba, wayenda okwira mu bwenzi bwe wakolanga e Misiri ng'okaali muto. Eyo abasaadha ye baakuniogererezanga amabeere, n'ofiirwa okusigala ng'okaali mwegha.”" 
Ezekiel23:22 “Kale ni, iwe Oholiba, nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kukukoba nti: Bona eno, ndikusiikuulira abaali abagonzi bo be wakyuka n'oleka nga bakusinie, naabasoloza baava ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, baidha baakwefuulira baakulumba." 
Ezekiel23:23 Ndireeta Abababilonia n'Abakaladea boonaboona, n'abasaadha abava e Pekoda, n'abava e Shoa, n'abava e Koa, n'Abassiria boonaboona. Ndisoloza abaisuka ababoneka obulungi, abakungu era abaduumizi mu magye, abasaadha ab'ebitiibwa, era nga boonaboona baisirukale ba ku mbalaasi." 
Ezekiel23:24 Balikulumba nga baviira ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, nga bali na igye iramba, n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'eby'okutambuliramu. Baliidha n'enkoofiira edh'ekyuma ku mitwe, nga bagemye engabo entono n'enene, baakulumba nga bakuva ku buli luuyi. Ndikughaayo mu ngalo dhaibwe, baaja baakusalira omusango nga bajiira ku mateeka gaibwe." 
Ezekiel23:25 Olw'obusungu obundiku, ndibasindika baakukolaku baakumaliraku ekiruyi kyaibwe. Balikusalaku enhindo n'amatu, baita n'abaana bo. Bwenebwene balitwala batabane bo ni baghala bo baabookya omuliro." 
Ezekiel23:26 Balikutoolamu engoye dho, era baakutoolaku ebyamadholobera byo ebirungi einho." 
Ezekiel23:27 Agho ndirekeza obwenzi n'obwamalaaya bye watoola mu nsi Misiri. Era toliiramu kabiri kulingirira bifaananie bya misambwa gya Bamisiri, waire okwiramu okulowooza ku nsi Misiri.”" 
Ezekiel23:28 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona eno, ndikughaayo mu ngalo dh'abo be wakyagha, abo be wakyuka n'oleka nga bakusinie." 
Ezekiel23:29 Nga bwe bakukyaye, balikutoolaku byonabyona bye wakolerera, baakuleka ng'oli madu ng'oti malaaya, era ng'ozira kantu naire. Obwenzi bwo n'obwamalaaya bwo," 
Ezekiel23:30 n'obukuleeteire ebyo byonabyona, kuba wakola obwenzi n'amaghanga, weeyonoona n'okusinza ebitali nze Katonda beene bye baasinzanga." 
Ezekiel23:31 Wagema engira n'endala eyo nga muganda wo, kale ni ndikugha ekikopo eky'ekibonerezo ng'ekikye.”" 
Ezekiel23:32 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Olinhwa ku kikopo kya muganda wo eky'ekibonerezo, ekireeyi era ekinene. Balikusekerera era bakukiina; kuba ekikopo ekyo kiidhuvu." 
Ezekiel23:33 Kirikutamiiza era kyakuleetera enaku, kuba ekikopo ekyo ekya muganda wo Samaria, kitiisa inho era kireeta ekiwuubaalo." 
Ezekiel23:34 Olikinhwa waakimaliriramu, waatoola endhawu dhaakyo edhimenheike waadheekalabuza mu kifuba olw'okunakughala. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel23:35 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Kale nga bwewanvaaku n'oneerabirira irala, oli n'okugumira ekibonerezo olw'obwenzi bwo n'obwamalaaya bwo.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, onaasalira Ohola ni Oholiba omusango? Kale bakobere ebyenhinhalwa bye baakola obalumirize." 
Ezekiel23:37 Baakola obwenzi era baatemula. Baakola obwenzi nga basinza ebitali nze Katonda, baaghaayo n'abaana baibwe beene be banzaalira, baabookya ng'emisengo eri ebisinzibwa ebyo." 
Ezekiel23:38 Era tibaakoma agho, aye ku lunaku lulala baayonoona eisinzizo lyange era baayonoona n'olunaku lwange olwa Sabbato." 
Ezekiel23:39 Ku lunaku lwene lwe baitiraku abaana baibwe ni babaghaayo ng'emisengo eri ebisinzibwa byaibwe ebyo, era ni ku lwene olwo lwe baidhiraku mu isinzizo lyange ni balyonoona." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Era baatumanga n'abakwenda baaja mu biketezo eby'eghala baayetayo abasaadha, era abasaadha baidhanga. Olwo ng'aboluganda abo bombi banaaba, nga basiiga amaiso gaibwe kalaamu, era nga beewoomya n'ebyamadholobera." 
Ezekiel23:41 Agho baatyama ku buliri obw'ekitiibwa, ng'emberi ghaabwo ghaligho emeeza kwe bataire obubbaani n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva bye nabagha." 
Ezekiel23:42 Olwo ng'owulira amamiro ag'abantu abangi abali mu idembe lyaibwe. Era ghaabaagho n'ebisaadhasaadha ebitamiivu, ebireetebwa okuva eyo mu irungu. Byata obukomo ku mikono gy'abakazi abo, era byata engule edhiboneka obulungi, ku mitwe gyaibwe." 
Ezekiel23:43 “Agho nze neebuuza mule nti abasaadha bano banaakola obwenzi n'omukazi eyaweekererayo n'obwamalaaya? 
Ezekiel23:44 Era bairaganangayo ye bamalaaya abo, Ohola ni Oholiba, abakazi abenzi abo." 
Ezekiel23:45 Aye abantu abakola ebituufu balibasalira emisango, ogw'obwenzi n'ogw'obutemo, gyombi gyabasinga kuba benzi era batemo.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mubasindikeku ekikuukuulu ky'abantu kibatuntuze era kibanhagululeku ebyaibwe. 
Ezekiel23:47 Kibakube amabaale, kibafumite empiima, kimale kiite n'abaana baibwe, era kyokye n'endhu dhaibwe." 
Ezekiel23:48 Ntyo bwendirekeza obwenzi mu nsi eno, okwo kwaba okulabula eri abakazi boonaboona, balobe kukola bwenzi bw'abo." 
Ezekiel23:49 Era imwe abakazi aboluganda mwembi, ndibeesasulizaaku naababonereza olw'obwenzi bwaimwe n'olw'okusinza ebitali Katonda. Olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Ku lunaku olweikumi mu mwezi ogweikumi, mu mwaka ogwomwenda nga tuli mu bunhage, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel24:2 “Iwe omuntu, ghandiika olunaku lw'omwezi olw'olwaleero luno, kuba luno n'olunaku kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia lw'atandiikiireku okuzingiza ekibuga Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel24:3 Kale ni ja okobere eighanga eryo eidheemu olugero, oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: Ta sefuliya ku muliro, giteeku omale ogifukemu amaadhi." 
Ezekiel24:4 Suula mu maadhi ago ebinofu by'emamba nga birungi, ekisambi n'omukono. Omale oidhuzeegho emamba ey'oku magumba esinga bulungi." 
Ezekiel24:5 Kozesa emamba ey'entaama esingamu obulungi, obunge enku kamaala ghansi gh'esefuliya, otogose emamba eyo n'amagumba ago, biye bukalamu.”" 
Ezekiel24:6 Musengwa Katonda kyava n'akoba nti: “Ekibuga ekyo ekirimu abatemo kikagwireku! Kiri ng'oti sefuliya erimu obutalaivu, ng'obutalaivu bwamu tibutoolwangamuuku. Toolamu emamba kinofu kirala kirala nga tiweeroboza." 
Ezekiel24:7 Omusaayi ogw'abantu be baatemula gukaali mu kibuga ekyo. Tibaaguyugha mu nkungu n'egughembaku. Aye baaguyugha bwa ku lubaale lwereere. 
Ezekiel24:8 Omusaayi ogwo nkaagulese agho ku lubaale gulobe kughembwaku, gusiikuule obusungu bwange mbeesasuulizeeku.”" 
Ezekiel24:9 Musengwa Katonda kyava n'akoba nti: “Ekibuga ekyo ekirimu abatemo kikagwireku! Nze mwene ndibunga emungo y'enku enene. 
Ezekiel24:10 Yongeraku enku kamaala okumeku omuliro. Fumbira irala bulungi emamba okutuusa bw'enaakaliira n'amagumba ni gasiriira. 
Ezekiel24:11 Agho leka sefuliya eyo endhereere ey'ekyuma ky'ekikomo esigale ku muliro, esuughe eyengerere, eikoodera lyonalyona erigirimu lisaanuuke n'obutalaivu buye buweemu." 
Ezekiel24:12 Aye ndaagiire bwereere, omubiri gw'obutalaivu munene inho, tigusobola kuwaamu na muliro." 
Ezekiel24:13 Yerusalemu, obutalaivu obwo n'obwo obwenzi bwo bw'okola. Era olw'okuba nafuba inho okukulongoosa aye nga tosobola kulongooka n'owaamu ikoodera, toliiramu kabiri kulongooka okutuusa lwe ndikumaliraku obusungu bwange." 
Ezekiel24:14 Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze nkobye. Era ekyo ndikikola naakituukiriza. Tiriira inhuma, tirisaasira era tiryeidhusa naire. Ndikusalira omusango nga njiira ku mpisa dho ni ku bikolwa byo.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel24:15 Musengwa Katonda kabiri yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel24:16 “Iwe omuntu, bona, onaaja okutemya n'okuzibula nga nkutoire ku maiso oyo asinga okukusanhusa. Aye otalira, oba okuwowoola, oba okutoonhia eiziga waire eirala liti." 
Ezekiel24:17 Sindira mule kisiriikiriza, otalira oyo afiire. Otaleka kusiba kitambaala kyo ku mutwe, waire okuleka okuvaala engaito mu bigere olw'enaku. Era oteeghemba ku maiso, waire okulya emere abalizi ye balya ku lumbe.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Kale nze Ezekieli mu biseera eby'enkyo naaba agho nga mpaya n'abantu bukalamu. Aye eigulo eryo mukazi wange yaafa. Ku lunaku olwairirira, naakola nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yandagiire." 
Ezekiel24:19 Abantu bambuuza bati: “Lwaki toli kutukobera bukwenda bw'oli nabwo, obukuleeteire okwebisa otyo?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Agho naabakobera nti: “Musengwa Katonda yayogeire ninze, yankoba" 
Ezekiel24:21 mbakobere imwe abantu ab'eighanga Isiraeli nti: Bona eno, ndyonoona eisinzizo lyange, eribaleetera okwebona nga muli ba maani, ni libasanhusa okulingirira, ni mwegomba okulingiramu. N'abaana baimwe be mwaleka mu Yerusalemu, balifiira mu lutalo." 
Ezekiel24:22 Era olwo mwena mulikola nga nze bwenkoze, timulyeghemba ku maiso, waire okulya emere abalizi ye balya ku lumbe." 
Ezekiel24:23 Timulireka kusiba bitambaala byaimwe ku mitwe, waire okuleka okuvaala engaito mu bigere olw'enaku. Era timulirira maziga waire okuwowoola. Aye muligoogomba mwawaagho olw'ebibi byaimwe, buli muntu yaasindira mwine enaku." 
Ezekiel24:24 Olwo nze Ezekieli ndiba akamanhiso ye muli: byonabyona bye nkoze, mwena bye mulikola. Era Musengwa Katonda akoba ati ebyo bwe biribatuukaku, mulimumanha ng'oyo ni Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel24:25 Era Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, olunaku lulituuka naabatoolaku eisinzizo eribaleetera okwebona nga ba maani era nga ba bitiibwa, beesuuta, era lyabasanhusa okulingirira, beegomba okulingiramu. Era ku lunaku olwo ndibatoolaku n'abaana baibwe." 
Ezekiel24:26 Ku lunaku olwo, oyo alirumuka n'awonagho aliidha y'oli yaakukobera." 
Ezekiel24:27 Ku lunaku olwo olulimi lwo lulisibulukuka waasobola okwiramu okwogera, era waayogera n'oyo alirumuka n'awonagho. Olwo iwe waaba akamanhiso akalabula abantu abo, era olwo beene baamanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel25:2 “Iwe omuntu, amaiso go galingirize Abammoni, olange akabi akali kubaidhira." 
Ezekiel25:3 Koba Abammoni bawulire nze Musengwa Katonda bye ndi kubakoba nti: Imwe mwasanhuka mwakoba muti, ‘Otyo, kirongoolo,’ eisinzizo lyange lwe baalyonoona, ensi Isiraeli ni bagizikiriza, n'Abayudaaya ni babatwala mu bunhage." 
Ezekiel25:4 Kale ni ndibaghaayo mu ngalo edh'abantu ab'e buvandhuba baabaghangula, baasimba weema dhaibwe mu nsi yaimwe baagibaamu. Baliryanga ebibala era baanhwanga amata ebyandibaire ebyaimwe." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ndifuula ekibuga Rabba kyaba kyayiro kya ngamiya, ate ebibuga by'omu Ammoni ebindi naabifuula bigo bya ntaama na mbuzi. Olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel25:6 Musengwa Katonda waife ayongera yaakoba ati: “Mwakuba mu ngalo, mwasambagala olw'eisanhu, mwalaga omwoyo gwaimwe omubi ogwidhwire obukyayi eri ensi Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel25:7 Kale ni bona eno, ndigolola omukono gwange naababonereza, naabaghaayo eri amaghanga agandi gaabanhagululaku ebyaimwe. Ndibaita naabamaliriragho, mwaloba kwirayo kabiri kuba ighanga, waire okuba n'ensi eyaimwe ku bwaimwe. Olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Olw'okuba ab'e Moabu baakoba bati Buyudaaya eri ng'amaghanga agandi goonagoona," 
Ezekiel25:9 ndireka ebibuga ebikuuma ensalosalo edh'ensi eyo Moabu era ebigigheesa ekitiisa, baabirumba. Ebibuga ebyo ni bino: Bethi Yeshimothi, Baali Meoni ni Kiriathaimu." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ndireka abantu ab'e buvandhuba baalumba Abamoabu n'Abammoni baabaghangula, baaloba kwirayo kabiri kuba ighanga." 
Ezekiel25:11 Ntyo bwendisalira ensi Moabu omusango ni ngibonereza. Olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.” 
Ezekiel25:12 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Olw'okuba Abaedomu beesasuuliza ku Bayudaaya bubi inho, olwo beereetaku omusango omunene einho," 
Ezekiel25:13 nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva nkoba nti, ndigolola omukono gwange naabonereza ensi Edomu eyo naagimalamu abantu n'ensolo, era nagyonoonayonoona. Abantu baamu balibaitira mu lutalo, okuva e Temani okutuukira irala e Dedani." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndikozesa abantu bange Abaisiraeli baaneesasuulizaagho ku Edomu. Baligikolaku nga bwe nhenda, baagimaliraku obusungu bwange n'ekiruyi kyange. Olwo Abaedomu balimanha nga bwe neesasuuliza ku bantu.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel25:15 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Olw'okuba Abafilisiti beesasuliza ku bazigu baibwe ab'olubeerera baababisa bubi inho n'omwoyo ogwidhwire obukyayi," 
Ezekiel25:16 nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva nkoba nti, ndigolola omukono gwange naabonereza ensi Filisitia eyo naagimalamu abantu. Ndizikiriza n'abaliba basigairegho mu kiketezo eky'oku nhandha." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndibabonereza n'obukambwe, naabeesasulizaaku mu busungu obubitirivu. Olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi, mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omulala nga tuli mu bunhage, Musengwa Katonda kabiri yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Iwe omuntu, mpulira abantu b'e Tiro nga boogera ku Yerusalemu bati, ‘Otyo, Yerusalemu ekyali omulyango ogw'obusuubuzi bw'amaghanga nga bwe bakimenhie ni kifuuka ebifulukwa, buti niife twize mu kifo kyakyo, tukombaghale.’" 
Ezekiel26:3 “Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva ni nkoba nti: Bona eno iwe ekibuga Tiro, buti nze nfuuse muzigu y'oli. Era ndisitula amaghanga kamaala, gaidha gaakulumba ng'oti kwefuukuula kwa nhandha." 
Ezekiel26:4 Galimenhamenha ebimante byo ebikwezungulwire n'ebituuti byo ebirengererwaku. Era nze Musengwa Katonda mwene ndighalagata eitaka lyonalyona erikulimu iwe Tiro, naalimalamu waasigala lubaale lwereere." 
Ezekiel26:5 Agho gh'oli mu nhandha, olibanga kifo kya bavubi kwanikangamu butimba bwaibwe. Era nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti oliba munhago eri abamaghanga agandi." 
Ezekiel26:6 N'abantu abali mu bubuga bwo ere ku bukalu ng'osomoike enhandha, baliitibwa mu lutalo. Olwo iwe Tiro olimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel26:7 Era Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona, ndireeta Nebukadinezzari kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia, kyabazinga asinga mu bakyabazinga boonaboona. Aliidha yaalumba Tiro ng'aviira ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ng'ali n'eigye einene inho, eririmu embalaasi, n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'abaisirukale ab'oku mbalaasi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Baliitira mu lutalo abantu bo iwe Tiro, abali mu bubuga bwo ere ku bukalu ng'osomoike enhandha. Balikuzimbaku ekimante eky'okukuzingiza, baakubungaku n'emungo dh'eitaka edh'okuniiniraku okukulumba, olwo baagema engabo dhaakola ekimante ekigumu." 
Ezekiel26:9 Balikonta ebimante byo n'ebintu ebiwomola, era baamenhagho ebituuti byo ebirengererwaku n'empasa." 
Ezekiel26:10 Baliba n'embalaasi kamaala, dhaasiikuula enkungu waagibuliramu n'okugibuliramu. Empindo ey'embalaasi, n'ebigaali eby'okutambuliramu, n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, eritengeesa ebimante byo nga bali kubita mu miryango gyo, okwingira mu kibuga ekimaze okuwomolwawomolwa." 
Ezekiel26:11 Embalaasi dhaibwe dhirityankirira enguudo dho dhoonadhoona, era baliita abantu bo n'empiima, n'empango dho edh'amaani baadhisuula ghansi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Balyagaaza eby'obukombe byo n'eby'obusuubuzi byo ye biriba yoonayoona, baabinhagulula. Baamenhagho ebimante byo ebikwezungulwire, era baasaaniagho n'endhu dho enungi. Baatoola amabaale go, n'embaawo dho, n'ebintu byo ebindi bye boonoine, baabisuula mu nhandha." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndirekeza abantu okwembera mu iwe enhembo, naasirisa n'entongooli dho dhoonadhoona nga tidhikaawulirwaku naire." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndikufuula lubaale lwereere, waasigala ng'oli kifo kya bavubi kwanikangaku butimba bwaibwe. Era tibaliiramu kukuzimba kabiri. Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel26:15 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ekibuga Tiro, ati: “Abantu ab'omu biketezo eby'oku nhandha bwe baliwulira okubwatuka kwo ng'oli kugwa, n'okuwowoola kw'abo abafumitiibwa mu iwe mu kutirimbula, balitya inho baadhugumira." 
Ezekiel26:16 Agho bakyabazinga boonaboona ab'ensi edhiriiraine ku nhandha, baliva ku bityamo byaibwe eby'obwakyabazinga, baatoolamu ebivaalo byaibwe ebiriku amadholobera. Baatyama ku itaka era baadhugumira buli kaseera, nga batiire inho olw'ebyo ebikutuuseeku." 
Ezekiel26:17 Balirira amaziga ku lulwo nga bakoba bati: Wo, ozikiriire iwe ekibuga ekibaire ekimanhifu einho. Iwe owalinga n'amaato ag'amaani ku nhandha. Iwe n'abatyamye bo mwaleeteranga abantu abasaabala ku maadhi okutya okw'amaani!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Mperaano ebizinga biri kudhugumira ku lunaku lw'ogwiriireku. Bwenebwene ebizinga byonabyona ebiri mu nhandha byeraliikirivu okubona okuzikirira kwo.” 
Ezekiel26:19 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndikufuula ekibuga ekyonooneibwa ni kifuuka ebifulukwa, olwo waaba ng'ebibuga ebindi ebitakaabaamu bantu. Ndikuyoolookezaaku amaadhi amangi ag'enhandha gaakusandikira." 
Ezekiel26:20 Ndikusindika waaja ghansi, waaba eyo n'abafu ab'eira abaika e magombe. Ndikuta ghansi eyo waaba mutyamye w'eyo mu nsi ey'abafu, ghalala n'abo abaika eyo mu lwina, mu bifulukwafulukwa eby'ebyanda ebyabita. Olwo ghabulegho omuntu asenga mu iwe kabiri, waire iwe mwene okwirayo okubalirwa mu nsi ya balamu." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ndikutuusa ku nkomerero etiisa inho, waasaaniragho irala. Abantu ni bwe balikunoonia batya, toliirayo kuboneka kabiri.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel27:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel27:2 “Iwe omuntu, yemba olwembo olw'enaku ku lw'ekibuga Tiro," 
Ezekiel27:3 ekyazimbwa ku mwalo ogw'enhandha, era ekisuubulagana n'abantu ab'omu biketezo eby'oku nhandha kamaala. Kikobe oti Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: Iwe Tiro, weesaaka ng'okoba oti obulungi obw'emboneka yo buziraku kamogo." 
Ezekiel27:4 Ensalosalo dho dhiri ghagati mu nhandha. Abazimbi bo baakuzimba waaba ng'oti lyato erikoleibwa obulungi. 
Ezekiel27:5 Baakozesa embaawo edh'emiti emireeyiriri, egyavanga e Seniri. Baatoola omuvule e Lebanoni, baakukoleramu omulongooti." 
Ezekiel27:6 Baakola enkasi dho mu miti emikologho, egyavanga e Bashani. Baakwaliiramu munda embaawo edh'emiti emyalumugi egyavanga ku kizinga ky'e Kupuro, ate ku mbaawo okwo baayaliiraku amasanka." 
Ezekiel27:7 Baakola amatanga go mu ngoye edhaalukibwa obukalamu einho edhaavanga e Misiri. Amatanga ago nga n'agakola nga bendera yo. Baakughembaku engoye enungi edh'erangi ya bbululu n'edh'eya nakasooma, okuva mu bizinga eby'e Elisha." 
Ezekiel27:8 Abaakubanga enkasi dho okukuvuga baali batyamye b'e Sidoni n'ab'e Aruvadi, ate abavuzi bo baaba abantu ab'e Zemeri abali n'obukugu." 
Ezekiel27:9 Mu iwe n'omwali abakungu ab'e Gebali ghalala n'abantu baayo abaali n'obukugu, abaakolanga amaato go. Mu iwe n'omwali emeeri dhoonadhoona edh'oku nhandha n'abavuzi baadho, olw'okusuubula ebintu byo." 
Ezekiel27:10 “Abaisirukale ab'e Perusia, n'ab'e Ludi, n'ab'e Puti, baalinga mu magye go ng'abalwani bo. Era mu iwe mwe baaghanikanga engabo dhaibwe n'enkoofiira dhaibwe edh'ebyuma, olwo baakuleetera okuba ow'ekitiisa." 
Ezekiel27:11 Abaisirukale ab'e Aruvadi n'abe Heleki n'abaakuumanga ebimante byo ebikwezungulwire. Ate ab'e Gamadi n'abaabanga mu bituuti byo ebirengererwaku. Era baaghanikanga engabo dhaibwe ku bimante ebikwezungulwire, olwo baakuleetera okulungiya einho emboneka yo." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Ab'e Tarushishi baasuubulagananga n'iwe olw'ebintu eby'obukombe kamaala by'oli nabyo, baakusasulangamu feeza, ekyuma ekigumu einho, amabaati, n'ekyuma ekizitogha." 
Ezekiel27:13 Ab'e Yavani, n'ab'e Tubali, n'ab'e Mesheki boona baasuubulagananga n'iwe. Nga bakuleetera abairu n'ebintu eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, waabasasulamu bye wasuubulanga." 
Ezekiel27:14 Ab'e Bethi Togarima baagulanga ebintu bye wasuubulanga, baakusasulangamu embalaasi edh'okutambuliraku, n'edh'omu lutalo, n'enhumbu." 
Ezekiel27:15 Ab'e Dedani baasuubulagananga n'iwe, n'ab'omu biketezo eby'oku nhandha kamaala boona baasuubulagananga n'iwe, baakuleeteranga amasanka n'embaawo, waabasasulamu bye wasuubulanga." 
Ezekiel27:16 Ab'e Assiria baasuubulagananga n'iwe olw'ebintu ebingi bye wakolanga, baakughangamu amabaale ag'omughendo ageetebwa emeraludo, n'engoye edh'erangi ya nakasooma, n'emidaliso, n'engoye empegheevu, n'amabaale ag'omughendo ageetebwa korali n'ageetebwa agate." 
Ezekiel27:17 Ensi Buyudaaya ni Isiraeli dhaasuubulagananga n'iwe. Waadhighanga bye wasuubulanga, ate dheene dhaakughangamu engaano, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, n'emitiini egisookereza okwama, n'omudheenene ogw'endhuki, n'omuzigo, n'obuwoowo obwetebwa balamu." 
Ezekiel27:18 Ab'e Damasiko baakugulangaku ebintu bye wakolanga ebingi, n'eby'obukombe bye wali nabyo ebya buli nsambo. Baakusasulangamu omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogw'e Heluboni, n'ebiviiri eby'entaama ebyeru," 
Ezekiel27:19 n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogundi ogw'e Uzali. Era baakuleeteranga n'ekyuma ekigumu einho ekimesunkana, n'obuwoowo bwa kassia n'obwa kalamu, iwe waabafaanisangamu bye wasuubulanga." 
Ezekiel27:20 Ab'e Dedani baasuubulagananga n'iwe nga bakuleetera engoye dhe bakolamu ebintu ebityamibwaku ku migongo egy'ensolo dhe bavuga. 
Ezekiel27:21 Ab'e Arabia n'abakungu boonaboona ab'e Kedari, baakuleeteranga entaama n'embuzi, mwasuubulagananga bukalamu." 
Ezekiel27:22 Abasuubuzi b'e Sheba n'ab'e Raama baakuleeteranga obuwoowo obusinga bulungi, ni zaabu, n'amabaale ag'omughendo, iwe waabaghangamu bye wasuubulanga." 
Ezekiel27:23 Ab'e Harani, n'ab'e Kanne, n'ab'e Edeni, n'ab'e Sheba, n'ab'e Assihuri, n'ab'e Kilimadi, boonaboona baasuubulagana n'iwe." 
Ezekiel27:24 Abo baakuguzanga ebintu ebirungi einho, engoye dha langi ya bbululu, n'engoye dhe baatungirangamu eby'okudholiga, n'ebisampa ebya langi kamaala, n'emigugha egyalukibwa obukalamu." 
Ezekiel27:25 Eby'okusuubula byo baabitwaliranga mu maato amakologho ag'e Tarushishi. Kale waaba ng'oti n'emeeri eidhwire ebintu n'ezitogha, ng'eri ghagati mu nhandha." 
Ezekiel27:26 Abaakubanga enkasi dho okukuvuga baakutuusa mu nhandha ghagati. Empewo eva e buvandhuba yaakumenheramenhera eyo ghagati mu nhandha. 
Ezekiel27:27 Obukombe bwo n'ebintu byo bye wasuubulanga, abantu abaakubanga enkasi okukuvuga n'abakozi baaku abandi, abaatambuzanga bye wasuubulanga, n'abaisirukale bo boonaboona abaali mu iwe, n'abantu abandi boonaboona abaali mu iwe, abo boonaboona baadimira ghagati mu nhandha, ku lunaku olw'okuzikirira kwo." 
Ezekiel27:28 Abavuzi bo bwe baakuba enduulu, ab'oku bukalu bw'enhandha baadhugumira." 
Ezekiel27:29 Agho abakuba enkasi n'abavuga amaato, n'abakozi baaku abandi boonaboona baava mu maato gaibwe, baayemerera ku mbali kw'enhandha." 
Ezekiel27:30 Baalira inho amaziga era baawowoola ku lulwo. Beeyugha enkungu mu mitwe era beevulunga mu ivu. 
Ezekiel27:31 Ku lulwo baamwa emitwe gyaibwe okugimaliriraku enviiri ng'oti mpaata, baavaala ekutiya olw'okunakughala, era baagegenga olw'enaku eyabali ku myoyo embitirivu, baalira inho amaziga." 
Ezekiel27:32 Baalira amaziga nga bali kuwowoola ku lulwo bati, ‘Naani agezeka ku kuzikirizibwa kwa Tiro, ekibuga ekyo ekyazikirizibwa ghagati mu nhandha?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ebintu byo bye waleetanga okuva mu nhandha, byesiimisanga abantu kamaala mu bwetaavu bwaibwe. Waaleetera bakyabazinga kamaala okukombaghala olw'obukombe bwo n'olw'ebyo bye wasuubulanga." 
Ezekiel27:34 Aye Mpegaano enhandha ekumenhiemenhie, ebintu bye wasuubulanga byonabyona, n'abakozi bo boonaboona baadimira ghalala n'iwe mu maadhi amaleeyi.’" 
Ezekiel27:35 Abantu ab'omu biketezo eby'oku nhandha boonaboona baatya inho olw'ebyo ebyakutuukaku. Ni bakyabazinga baibwe beeraliikirira ekibitiriire, nga ni mu maiso bamoga kutya kwereere." 
Ezekiel27:36 Abasuubuzi ab'omu maghanga goonagoona beeraliikirivu inho olw'enkomerero etiisa inho y'otuuseeku, kuba tokairayo kubaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel28:2 “Iwe omuntu, kobera omufuzi ow'e Tiro oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kumukoba nti: Olw'okwekudumbaza kw'oli nakwo, weeyeta katonda. Okoba oti niiwe otyama ku kityamo kya bakatonda, eyo ghagati mu nhandha. Ate nga oli muntu buntu toli katonda naire, waire nga weetwala okuba ng'oli katonda mulamba." 
Ezekiel28:3 Olowooza oti oli mugezi okusinga Danieli, era nga ghazira kyama kikwekeibwa ky'otaidhi." 
Ezekiel28:3 Olowooza oti oli mugezi okusinga Danieli, era nga ghazira kyama kikwekeibwa ky'otaidhi." 
Ezekiel28:4 Wakozesa amagezi go n'okutetenkania waafuuka omukombe. Weesolokeza zaabu ni feeza mu materekero go. 
Ezekiel28:5 Olw'amagezi amangi g'oli nago mu by'obusuubuzi, weeyongeire okukombaghala, era waatoolera okwekudumbaza olw'obukombe obwo." 
Ezekiel28:6 Kale nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti: Olw'okuba weetwala okuba omugezi einho nga bakatonda," 
Ezekiel28:7 ndikusindikaku abantu abamaghanga agandi abasingayo obukambwe. Balikulumba mu lutalo, baazikiriza ebintu ebirungi bye wafuna mu magezi go, era baayonoona ekitiisa kyo." 
Ezekiel28:8 Balikwita baakusindika e magombe. Era olifa ng'abo abaitirwa eyo mu nhandha ghagati. 
Ezekiel28:9 Obwo era oliba ng'okaakoba oti oli katonda, ng'oli mu maiso g'abo abaja okukwita? Busa naire, bw'oliba ng'oli mu ngalo dhaibwe oliba muntu buntu se ti katonda." 
Ezekiel28:10 Oliitibwa abantu abatatya Katonda waafa ng'oti bwa mbwa. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.” 
Ezekiel28:11 Musengwa Katonda era yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel28:12 “Iwe omuntu, lira amaziga ku lwa kyabazinga wa Tiro, omukobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kumukoba nti: Wali kya kuboneraku eky'omuntu atuukiriire, ng'oidhwire amagezi era ng'oli mulungi inho mu mboneka." 
Ezekiel28:13 Wabanga mu Edeni, enimiro ya Katonda. Ng'ovaala eby'okwewoomya ebyakolebwa mu mabaale ag'omughendo: sarudio, topazi, yasipera, kurisolito, berulo, onikisi, saffiro, karabunkule ni emeraludo. Era ng'oba n'ebyamadholobera ebya zaabu. Ebyo byonabyona byakolebwa ku lunaku lwe watonderwaku." 
Ezekiel28:14 Nalonda ekitonde eky'amaghagha ekyetebwa kerubi naakitaagho okukukuuma. Waabanga ku lusozi lwa Katonda olutukuvu, ng'otambulira ghagati mu mabaale ag'omughendo agamirimiinha." 
Ezekiel28:15 Empisa dho dhaali nkalamu okuva lwe watondebwa okutuusa lwe kyazuulibwa nti otooleire okukola ebibi. 
Ezekiel28:16 Weemalira inho mu by'okusuubula byakuleetera okukozesa obukambwe, waakola ebibi. Kale naakubinga ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu ng'oli mwonoonefu. Era kikerubi ekyakukuumanga kyakubingirira okukutoola mu mabaale ag'omughendo agamirimiinha." 
Ezekiel28:17 Weekudumbaza olw'obulungi obw'emboneka yo. Ebitiibwa bye wali nabyo byakuleetera okwebisa ng'omusiru. Kyenava ni nkusuula ghansi ku itaka, naakuleka agho, bakyabazinga abandi baakwerolera beene n'amaiso gaibwe." 
Ezekiel28:18 Olw'ebibi byo olukunkumuli n'obukupankupania obungi mu kusuubula kwo, waleetera ebifo byo ebisinzibwamu okwonooneka. Kyenava ni ntumbusa omuliro mu iwe gwakwokya, abo boonaboona abakulingangaku baabona ng'osiriire ofuuse ivu." 
Ezekiel28:19 Abantu ab'omu maghanga goonagoona abaali bakwidhi baatya inho olw'ebyo ebyakutuukaku. Era enkomerero y'otuuseeku etiisa inho, kuba tokairayo kubaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel28:21 “Iwe omuntu, amaiso go galingirize ekibuga Sidoni, olange akabi akali kukiidhira." 
Ezekiel28:22 Okikobere bino, nze Musengwa Katonda, bye ndi kukikoba nti: Bona eno iwe ekibuga Sidoni, buti nfuuse muzigu y'oli, era abantu balisaaka ekitiisa kyange olw'ebyo bye ndikola mu imwe. Bwe ndyoleka nga bwendi omutukuvu, ni nsalira abo abakubaamu omusango era ni mbabonereza, olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ndisindika endwaire ya kawumpuli mu iwe, era omusaayi gulikuuluulira mu nguudo dho. Abantu bo baliitibwa ng'olumbiibwa olutalo okuva ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, Olwo olimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel28:24 Musengwa Katonda era yaakoba ati: “Ku maghanga goonagoona ageezungulwire ensi Isiraeli agaaginhoomanga, tighalibaagho waire eirala liti eririgifuukira olukandwa okugikwadula oba okugifuukira eiwa okugifumita. Olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel28:25 Musengwa Katonda era yaakoba ati: “Bwe ndimala okusoloza Abaisiraeli ni mbatoola mu maghanga mwe baasansaanira, olwo ab'amaghanga goonagoona balibona bwendi omutukuvu. Era Abaisiraeli abo baliba mu nsi yaibwe, ye nagha omugheereza wange Yakobo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Baligibaamu mu miraala, baazimba amayumba, baasimba n'amasamba ag'emizabbibu. Baliba mu miraala bwe ndisala omusango ni mbonereza baliraanwa baibwe boonaboona abaabanhoomanga. Olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Ku lunaku olweikumi n'eibiri mu mwezi ogweikumi, mu mwaka ogweikumi nga tuli mu bunhage, Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel29:2 “Iwe omuntu, amaiso go galingirize kyabazinga w'e Misiri, olange akabi akalimutuukaku mwene, n'ako akalituuka ku nsi Misiri yoonayoona." 
Ezekiel29:3 Mukobe oti, nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kukoba nti: Bona eno, buti nfuuse muzigu y'oli, iwe kyabazinga wa Misiri. Niiwe ogusota ogukologho oguba mu miiga ni gukoba guti, ‘Omwiga Kiyira gwange ku bwange, ninze eyagukola.’" 
Ezekiel29:4 Olw'ekyo ndikutunga mu mba dho amalobo, era naaleetera ebyenhandha ebiba mu mwiga gwo okukweriipa ku bigalagamba byo. Memale naakughaluzaayo mu mwiga gwo, ghalala n'ebyenhandha byo byonabyona nga bikweriipye ku bigalagamba." 
Ezekiel29:5 Naakusuula mu irungu, iwe mwene ghalala n'ebyenhandha ebyo byonabyona ebiba mu mwiga gwo. Oligwa mu nsiko waafiira eyo, ghaabulagho atoolagho omulambo gwo waire okuguziika. Nkughaireyo obe emere ey'enhonhi n'ey'ensolo edh'omu nsiko." 
Ezekiel29:6 “Olwo abantu boonaboona ab'omu Misiri balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda. “Nze Musengwa Katonda era nkoba imwe Abamisiri nti: Abaisiraeli baabeesiga, aye imwe mwababeera ng'oti mwigo gwa lugada." 
Ezekiel29:7 Bwe baabagemaku okubeesiiraku mwamenheka bumenheke, mwabafumita enkwawa era mwabaluyiriza inho, mwabaleetera n'emigongo okubeekaasa." 
Ezekiel29:8 Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva ni nkoba nti: Bona eno iwe ensi Misiri, ndikusindikira olutalo, lwakwitamu abantu n'ensolo." 
Ezekiel29:9 Era olisigala bw'agho otyo ng'oli bifulukwa byereere omutaba bantu. Olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda. “Era olw'okuba wakoba mbu omwiga Kiyira gugwo, niiwe eyagukola," 
Ezekiel29:10 bona eno, buti nfuuse muzigu y'oli era naafuuka muzigu n'eri emiiga gyo. Ndikuleetera okusigala obwagho otyo ng'oli bifulukwa byereere, okuva e Migidoli okutuuka e Siyene, n'okutuukira irala ku nsalosalo ni Ethiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Ezira kigere kya muntu waire kya nsolo ekiribita omwo. Ensi Misiri erisigala agho ng'eziramu muntu agibaamu okumala emyaka amakumi ana (40). 
Ezekiel29:12 Ndigifuula bifulukwa byereere okusinga n'ensi edhindi dhoonadhoona edhaali dhifuuliibwaku ebifulukwa. N'ebibuga byayo birizika okumala emyaka makumi ana (40), byaba bubi inho okusinga ebibuga ebindi byonabyona ebyali bizikiriziibwaku. Ndisansaaniza Abamisiri mu maghanga kamaala, naabasindika mu nsi enhingi baanoonia eyo obubudamo.”" 
Ezekiel29:13 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Oluvainhuma olw'emyaka amakumi ana, ndisoloza Abamisiri naabatoola eyo mu bantu abamaghanga agandi ye nabasansaaniza." 
Ezekiel29:14 Ndibaleetera ebintu okwiramu okubajiiranga obukalamu, naabaiza mu nsi yaibwe mwe baava, mu kiketezo eky'e Pathirosi. Baliba eyo nga bali bwakyabazinga bulamba, aye nga bunafu." 
Ezekiel29:15 Buliba bwakyabazinga obusingayo kuba bunafu, obutaliiramu kabiri kwekudumbaliza ku maghanga gandi. Ndibufuula butono inho obutasobola kwiramu kufuga maghanga gandi." 
Ezekiel29:16 Eighanga Isiraeli tiririirayo kabiri kwesiga Bamisiri, okutoolaku okweidhusanga olw'ekibi kye baakola okuja ye bali okufuna obuyambi. Olwo Abaisiraeli balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Ku lunaku olusooka, mu mwezi ogusooka, mu mwaka ogwamakumi abiri n'omusanvu (27) nga tuli mu bunhage, Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel29:18 “Iwe omuntu, kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari owa Babilonia yasitula eigye lye, lyalumba Tiro n'amaani. Emitwe gy'abaisirukale be gyagwa empaata n'amabega gaabanuubuka, olw'okubbeeda ebizito. Aye ate k'abe kyabazinga mwene oba abaisirukale be, bazira naire kye baaganhulwa mu kulumba Tiro." 
Ezekiel29:19 Agho ni, nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva ndi kukoba nti: Nditoola ensi Misiri naagigha kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari owa Babilonia, yaanhagulula obukombe bwayo yaabutwala ng'omunhago oguliba empeera ey'abaisirukale be." 
Ezekiel29:20 Mmughaire ensi Misiri okumusasula olw'okufaabiikana kwe, kuba eigye lye lyakolera nze. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel29:21 “Ekyo bwe kirituukirira, eighanga Isiraeli ndirifuula lya maani, era iwe Ezekieli ndikugha okulanga n'amaani, abantu boonaboona baakuwulira. Olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel30:2 “Iwe omuntu, langa okobere abantu, nze Musengwa Katonda bye ndi kukoba. Bakobere oti: Muwowoole amaziga nga mukoba muti: Tukagwireku! Olunaku olw'akabi luli kwidha!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda luli kumpi, oluliba olw'ebire ebyereere ku igulu era olw'akabi eri amaghanga." 
Ezekiel30:4 Ghalibaagho olutalo mu Misiri, ghaabaagho n'obulumi mu Ethiopia. Ku lunaku olwo, abantu baliitibwa bangi mu nsi Misiri, n'eby'obukombe byayo byanhagululwa, n'emisingi gyayo gyamenhebwagho." 
Ezekiel30:5 Abantu ab'e Ethiopia, n'ab'e Puti, n'ab'e Ludi, n'ab'e Arabia, n'ab'e Libya, era n'ab'ensi dhoonadhoona edhiryeyimba aghalala okuyambagana nabo, baliitibwa mu lutalo.”" 
Ezekiel30:6 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Abo abayamba ensi Misiri baligwa. Era eigye lyayo ery'amaani erigireetera okwekudumbaza lirizikirizibwa. Era abantu baliitirwa mu lutalo, okuva e Migidoli okutuuka e Siyene. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ensi eyo Misiri ndigifuula bifulukwa byereere okusinga n'ensi edhindi dhoonadhoona edhaali dhifuuliibwaku ebifulukwa. N'ebibuga byayo birizika okusinga ebibuga ebindi byonabyona ebyali bizikiriziibwaku. 
Ezekiel30:8 Era bwe ndikukunaania omuliro ku nsi eyo, n'abo boonaboona ababaire bagiyambanga ni baweekereragho okufa, olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel30:9 “Ku lunaku olwo ndituma abakwenda baaziinhuuka embiro, baaja baadhugumiza abantu b'e Ethiopia abaliba nga bali mu miraala, nga baziramu kwekengeera naire. Era obulumi bulibaidhira ku lunaku olwo ensi Misiri lw'eribonerezebwaku. Bwenebwene olunaku olwo luli kwidha.”" 
Ezekiel30:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndirekeza eby'obukombe bya Misiri, nga nkozesa Nebukadinezzari kyabazinga wa Babilonia." 
Ezekiel30:11 Ndimuleeta ghalala n'abaisirukale be abasingayo mu maghanga obukambwe, baidha okuzikiriza Misiri. Balisowolayo empiima dhaibwe baalwanisa ensi eyo, baagiidhuza emirambo egy'abo be baliita." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ndikaliiza omwiga Kiyira, naaghaayo ensi Misiri efugibwe abantu ababi. Ndireetera ensi eyo okuzikirira n'ebintu byonabyona ebigirimu, nga nkozesa abagwira. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze ndhogeire.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndizikiriza ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, naalekeza okusinza ebifaananie okuli mu Menfisi. Teribaayo mufuzi kabiri mu Misiri, era ensi eyo ndigireetamu entiisa." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ekiketezo eky'e Pathirosi ndikifuula bifulukwa byereere, naayokya ekibuga Zoani omuliro, era naasalira ekibuga Thebesi omusango naakibonereza." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndimalira obusungu bwange ku kibuga Pelusiumu ekifo kya Misiri ekyo eky'okwewogomamu, era naamaliragho irala olukunkumuli olw'abantu ab'e Thebesi." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndikunaania omuliro ku Misiri, ab'e Pelusiumu baawulira obulumi obutaloodheka, n'ebimante eby'oku kibuga Thebesi byawomolwawomolwa ebituli." 
Ezekiel30:17 Abaisuka ab'omu bibuga Oni ni Pibesethi baliitirwa mu lutalo, ate abantu abandi baatwalibwa mu bunhage." 
Ezekiel30:18 Lwe ndikomya obufuzi bwa Misiri enzikiiza erigema mu kibuga Tehafunehesi, olwo naalekeza amaani agabaleetera okwekuluntaza. Ekire kirighemba ku Misiri, abantu baamu baatwalibwa mu bunhage." 
Ezekiel30:19 Ntyo bwendisalira Misiri omusango naagibonereza. Olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.” 
Ezekiel30:20 Ku lunaku olwomusanvu mu mwezi ogusooka, mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omulala (11) nga tuli mu bunhage, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel30:21 “Iwe omuntu, mmenhie kyabazinga wa Misiri omukono. Era ghazira muntu aguzingiriireku kighero, okuguyunga guwone gwiremu amaani, gusobole okwiramu okuzunza empiima." 
Ezekiel30:22 Agho ni, nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva ndi kukoba nti: Bona eno, buti nfuuse muzigu wa kyabazinga wa Misiri. Era ndimumenha emikono gyombi, gule ogw'amaani ni gule ogwamenheka, naamulekuza empiima yaamuva mu ngalo yaagwa." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndisansaaniza Abamisiri mu maghanga, naabaidhuza eyo mu nsi enhingi." 
Ezekiel30:24 Olwo naaleetera emikono gya kyabazinga w'e Babilonia okuba egy'amaani era naamuta mu ngalo empiima yange. Aye naamenha emikono gya kyabazinga wa Misiri, yaasindira mu maiso ga kyabazinga ow'e Babilonia ng'oti n'omuntu afumitiibwa ebibwa ebija okumwita." 
Ezekiel30:25 Bwenebwene ndireetera emikono gya kyabazinga w'e Babilonia okuba egy'amaani, era naamuta mu ngalo empiima yange, aye naanafuya egya kyabazinga w'e Misiri. Bwe ndita empiima yange mu ngalo dha kyabazinga w'e Babilonia, n'agyolekeza ensi Misiri, olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ndisansaaniza Abamisiri mu maghanga, naabaidhuza eyo mu nsi enhingi. Memale olwo baamanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogwokusatu, mu mwaka ogweikumi n'omulala (11) nga tuli mu bunhage, Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel31:2 “Iwe omuntu, koba kyabazinga wa Misiri n'abantu be boonaboona oti: “Nnaabageza ku ani omukologho ng'oti niimwe?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Bona eno, ndidha kubageza ku muti omuvule mu kibira e Lebanoni. Oguli n'ensaga enungi edhikola ekinsense ekizibirivu, era omuleeyiriri, ng'obusanso bw'ensaga dhaagwo butuuka ni mu bire." 
Ezekiel31:4 Ghe gwali nga ghaligho amaadhi ge gunhwa, ensulo edh'omu itaka edhaakuuluulanga okwezungulula agho ghe gwasimbibwa, dhaaguleetera okukula. Era ensulo edho dhaatuuka ni ku miti egindi gyonagyona egyali mu kibira." 
Ezekiel31:5 Olw'okufunanga obukalamu amaadhi, gwakula gwaleegherera inho ghaigulu okusinga emiti egindi gyonagyona egy'omu kibira ekyo. Ensaga dhaagwo dhaageedha era dhaaleegha." 
Ezekiel31:6 Enhonhi dhoonadhoona edhiguluka mu ibbanga dhaazimba ebisu byadho mu nsaga dhaagwo. Ensolo dhoonadhoona edh'omu nsiko dhaazaaliranga abaana baadho ghansi gh'ensaga dhaagwo. N'amaghanga ag'amaani gaawuumuliranga ghansi mu kinsense kyagwo. 
Ezekiel31:7 Omuti ogwo gwali mukologho nga guboneka bulungi, n'ensaga dhaagwo dhaaba ndeeyiriri; kuba emizi gyagwo gyaikanga ghansi inho eri amaadhi amangi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Nga togugeza ku mivule gya mu nimiro ya Katonda, waire ensaga dhaagwo okudhigeza ku dh'emiti egindi emireeyiriri. Nga n'emiti emipulane gyona gizira nsaga dhaaga na dhaagwo. Mu nimiro ya Katonda timwalimu muti guboneka bulungi ng'ogwo." 
Ezekiel31:9 Nagukola gwaboneka bulungi olw'ensaga dhaagwo enhingi enzibirivu. Nga n'emiti egindi gyonagyona egy'omu Edeni, enimiro ya Katonda, gigwegomba." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Agho ni, nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva ndi kukoba nti: Ng'omuti ogwo bwe gwaleegherera, obusanso bw'ensaga dhaagwo butuuka ni mu bire, era ni gwekuluntaza olw'obuleeyi obwo," 
Ezekiel31:11 nze buti nguviireku. Era ndigughaayo mu ngalo edh'omufuzi ow'amaani, yaagubonereza olw'ebibi byagwo." 
Ezekiel31:12 Abantu abamaghanga agandi abasingayo obukambwe baligutema baaguleka agho. Ensaga dhaagwo dhirigwa eyo dhityo ku nsozi ni mu biiko byonabyona, n'obusanso bw'ensaga dhaagwo bwamenhekera mu myala gyonagyona egy'amaadhi mu nsi eyo. Era abantu boonaboona ab'oku nsi baliva mu kinsense kyagwo baaja baaguleka agho." 
Ezekiel31:13 Enhonhi edhiguluka dhoonadhoona dhiriidha dheebunga ku muti ogwo ghe guligwa, n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhoonadhoona dhaatyankirira ensaga dhaagwo." 
Ezekiel31:14 Ekyo kiriba kityo, olwo ghalobe kubaagho muti gwonagwona guleegherera nga guli n'obusanso bw'ensaga dhaagwo obutuuka ni mu bire, waire nga guliba aghali maadhi. Era ghalobe kubaagho muti ogulinhwa amaadhi ni gutuuka ku buleeyi bwa gule, kuba emiti gyonagyona giteekwa kufa ng'abantu obuntu bwe bafa. Era giteekwa okuja mu nsi ey'abafu ghalala n'abo abaika eyo ghansi mu lwina.”" 
Ezekiel31:15 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Omuti ogwo bwe guliserengeta e magombe, ndireetera emiiga egy'omu itaka okulira olwagwo. Ndirekeza emiiga n'ensulo okukuuluula, naaleeta enzikiiza ku nsozi edh'e Lebanoni, era naaleetera emiti egy'omu kibira gyonagyona okukala." 
Ezekiel31:16 Bwe ndigusuula e magombe ghalala n'abo abaika eyo mu lwina, omuvuuma ogw'okugwa kwagwo gulitengeesa amaghanga. Emiti gyonagyona egy'omu Edeni, n'egyo egy'e Lebanoni gyonagyona egisinga bulungi egyanhwa amaadhi, era egyaserengeta mu itaka, girisangaala olw'okugwa kwagwo." 
Ezekiel31:17 Girija nagwo mu nsi ey'abafu, eri abo abaamala eira okwitirwa mu ntalo. Bwenebwene abo abaabanga mu kinsense kyagwo balisansaanira mu maghanga baazikirira." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Mu miti gyonagyona egy'omu Edeni, nnaakugeza ku guli gha, mu kitiibwa ni mu bukologho? Aye era weena oliika ghansi ghalala n'emiti egy'omu Edeni, waaba eyo mu nsi ey'abafu ghalala n'abatatya Katonda abo abataali bakekete abaitirwa mu lutalo. “Omuti ogwo ni kyabazinga wa Misiri n'abantu be boonaboona. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogweikumi n'ebiri, mu mwaka ogweikumi n'ebiri (12) nga tuli mu bunhage, Musengwa Katonda yayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel32:2 “Iwe omuntu, lira amaziga kulwa kyabazinga wa Misiri, omukobe oti: Weebisa ng'oti mpologoma mu maghanga, aye nga bwene oli ng'oti ngoina mu maadhi. Otuumira mu maadhi waagataabuulataabuula n'ebigere byo, waasiikuulasiikuula emiiga." 
Ezekiel32:3 Nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva nkoba nti ndikusuulaku olutuula lwange ng'amaghanga kamaala galigho, naakwinhulula mu maadhi n'olutuula lwange olwo." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ndi kusuula eyo mu nsiko, naaleeta enhonhi dhoonadhoona dhaakwebungaku dhaakumoodhogola, n'ensolo dhoonadhoona edh'oku nsi dhaakukankamira." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ndisuulasuula emamba ey'omulambo gwo ku nsozi, naagiidhuza ni mu biiko." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ndiyugha omusaayi gwo mu nsi, gwaboza ensozi dhaatoonha butoonhe, era gwaidhula ni mu miiga." 
Ezekiel32:7 Lwe ndikuzikiriza ndighemba ku igulu, nairugaza emuunienie dhaaloba kwaka, naaghemba ni ku ndhuba ekire, era n'omwezi gwaloba kuvaaku butangaavu naire." 
Ezekiel32:8 Ndizikiza ebyaka byonabyona eby'oku igulu ebiri ghaigulu wo, ensi yo naagireka mu nzikiiza. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye." 
Ezekiel32:9 “Ndireetera amaghanga kamaala okweraliikirira, bwe ndituusa amawulire ag'okuzikirira kwo mu nsi dh'otawulirangaku naire." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ndireetera amaghanga kamaala okutya einho, nga gaboine bye mbatuusiisaaku. Era bakyabazinga baago balidhugumira, bwe balibona nga ngalwire empiima yange. Ku lunaku olwo lw'oligwiraku n'oghangulwa, abantu boonaboona balitengera nga batya olw'obulamu bwaibwe.”" 
Ezekiel32:11 Musengwa Katonda akoba kyabazinga w'e Misiri ati: “Empiima ya kyabazinga w'e Babilonia eri kukwidhira. 
Ezekiel32:12 Ndikusindikaku abaisirukale ab'amaani ab'omu maghanga agasingayo obukambwe, baita abantu bo boonaboona era baazikiriza ebintu byo ebikwesiimisa." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndiita ensolo dho dhoonadhoona buli aghali amaadhi mu Misiri. Ghalobe kubaagho muntu agatambuliramu okugataabuula, waire ensolo eganiinamu okugasiikuula." 
Ezekiel32:14 Agho naaleetera amaadhi go okulaala, n'emiiga gyo gyakuuluula amaadhi amalungi. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye." 
Ezekiel32:15 Bwe ndifuula Misiri ebifulukwa ebyereere, ni nzikiriza ebintu ebigirimu, ni ndhita n'abantu abagibaamu, olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel32:16 “Okulira okwo kulifuuka lwembo, abakazi ab'omu maghanga baalwembanga okulira Misiri n'abantu baamu boonaboona. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 Ku lunaku olweikumi n'eitaanu mu mwezi ogusooka, mu mwaka ogweikumi n'ebiri (12) nga tuli mu bunhage, Musengwa Katonda yayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel32:18 “Iwe omuntu, wowoola amaziga olw'abantu kamaala ab'e Misiri, era obasindike mu nsi ey'abafu babe ghalala n'ab'ensi edhindi edh'amaani abaamala eira okwika eyo mu lwina." 
Ezekiel32:19 Bakobe oti, Mulowooza muti imwe musinga abantu abandi boonaboona obulungi mu mboneka? Mwidha kwika ghansi mu nsi ey'abafu mubenga eyo ghalala n'abatatya Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel32:20 “Abantu b'e Misiri baligwa ghalala n'abo be baitira mu lutalo. Empiima ey'okubaita boonaboona etegekeibwa. 
Ezekiel32:21 Eyo mu nsi ey'abafu, abantu ab'amaani abaalwaniranga ku luuyi olw'Abamisiri abo, baliboogeraku bati, ‘Bona, abatatya Katonda abaitirwa mu lutalo baabo baise eno ghansi, era balambaire baasirika aghazira kwesegenhia naire!’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Ensi Assiria eri eyo, n'abaisirukale baayo boona bali eyo mu magombe gaibwe okugyezunguluza. Boonaboona baitirwa mu lutalo." 
Ezekiel32:23 Amagombe gaibwe gali mu kifo ekisembayo ghansi, mu nsi ey'abafu. Abaisirukale baayo boonaboona bali eyo mu magombe gaibwe okugyezunguluza, nga boonaboona baitirwa mu lutalo. Ate nga bwe baali bakaali balamu baaleeteranga abantu okutya einho mu nsi." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Ensi Elamu eri eyo, n'abaisirukale baayo boonaboona bali eyo mu magombe gaibwe okugyezunguluza. Boonaboona baitirwa mu lutalo, baika ghansi mu nsi ey'abafu nga ti bakekete. Buti bali eyo mu kuswala kwaibwe ghalala n'abo abaika eyo ghansi mu lwina. Ate nga bwe baali bakaali balamu baaleeteranga abantu okutya einho mu nsi." 
Ezekiel32:25 Ensi Elamu eyo egalaamiriire ghansi mu abo abaitibwa, n'abaisirukale baayo boonaboona bali mu magombe gaibwe okugyezunguluza. Boonaboona baitirwa mu lutalo nga ti bakekete. Bwe baali bakaali balamu baaleeteranga abantu okutya einho mu nsi, aye mpegaano bali eyo mu kuswala kwaibwe ghalala n'abo abaika eyo ghansi mu lwina. Bateereibwa ghalala n'abo abaitirwa mu lutalo." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Ensi Mesheki ni Tubali dhiri eyo, n'abaisirukale baadho boona bali eyo mu magombe gaibwe okudheezunguluza. Boonaboona abo abataali bakekete baitirwa mu lutalo. Ate nga bwe baali bakaali balamu baaleeteranga abantu okutya einho mu nsi." 
Ezekiel32:27 Aye tibaaziikibwa ghalala na balwani ab'eira abaali ab'amaani abataali bakekete, abaika ghansi mu nsi ey'abafu n'eby'okulwanisa byaibwe: ng'empiima dhaibwe dhiteereibwa emintwetwe waibwe, n'engabo dhaibwe dhaateebwa ku mibiri gyaibwe. Abasaadha abo baali ba maani nga baleetera abantu okutya einho mu nsi." 
Ezekiel32:28 “Kale ni weena Misiri balikuzikiriza waasigala agho ng'ogalaamiriire ghalala n'abatatya Katonda abataali bakekete abaitirwa mu lutalo. 
Ezekiel32:29 “Ensi Edomu eri eyo ghalala ni bakyabazinga baayo n'abakungu baayo. Baali balwani ba maani, aye mpegaano bagalaamiriire ghalala n'abo abatatya Katonda abataali bakekete, abaitirwa mu lutalo ni baika eyo ghansi mu lwina." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Era eyo n'eri n'abakungu ab'omu kiketezo ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, n'Abasidoni boonaboona, abaafiira aghalala n'abo abatatya Katonda abaitirwa mu lutalo nga ti bakekete. Waire nga baatiisanga abantu olw'amaani gaibwe, mpegaano bali eyo mu kuswala kwaibwe ghalala n'abo abaika eyo ghansi mu lwina." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Kyabazinga wa Misiri bw'alibona abo boonaboona abaitirwa mu lutalo, alyerabiraku enaku ey'abantu be boonaboona abaafa.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel32:32 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Ninze mwene eyataagho kyabazinga wa Misiri aleeterenga abantu okutya einho ku nsi. Aye yeena ghalala n'abaisirukale be boonaboona, baliitibwa era baalambaazibwa ghalala n'abatatya Katonda abataali bakekete abaitirwa mu lutalo.” Musengwa Katonda oyo atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel33:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel33:2 “Iwe omuntu, kobera abantu b'eighanga lyo oti bweghabaagho ensi ye nsidikira olutalo, memale abantu ab'ensi eyo ni balonda munaibwe mulala ni bamufuula omukuumi, oyo ye balonze ati bw'ali n'okukola:" 
Ezekiel33:3 Bw'abona ng'olutalo luli kwidha, afuuwa eigwala okulabula abantu." 
Ezekiel33:4 Kale omuntu bw'awulira eigwala, aye n'atafaayo ku kulabulwa okwo, olutalo ni lwidha n'afiiramu, olwo omusango ogw'okufa kwe gunairiranga ku mufu mwene" 
Ezekiel33:5 kuba yawulira eigwala aye yaaloba kufaayo ku kulabulwa okwo, kale yaafa era omusango ogw'okufa kwe gwamwiriraku mwene. Ngoli yafaayo ku kulabulwa okwo, yandiwoniiza obulamu bwe." 
Ezekiel33:6 Aye omukuumi bw'abona olutalo nga luli kwidha, n'atafuuwa igwala kulabula bantu, olutalo ni lwidha era owundi ku bantu abo n'afiiramu ng'ali mu bibi bye, olwo omusango ogw'okufa kwe ndiguta ku mukuumi oyo." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Kale, iwe omuntu, ndi kukufuula omukuumi mu ighanga lya Isiraeli. Buli lw'onaawuliranga okulabula okuva ye ndi, oidha kukubatuusangaku." 
Ezekiel33:8 Bwe nkoba omuntu yeenayeena omukozi w'ebibi nti, ‘Iwe omubi, bwenebwene oidha kufa’, memale n'otayogera kumulabula akyuke aleke ebibi bye, omuntu oyo alifiira mu bibi bye. Aye omusango ogw'okufa kwe ndiguta ku iwe." 
Ezekiel33:9 Aye ate bw'olabula omuntu oyo omubi akyuke aleke ebibi bye, aye n'atakyuka kubireka, alifiira mu bibi bye. Aye iwe oliba owoniiza obulamu bwo.”" 
Ezekiel33:10 Musengwa Katonda era yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, yogera eri ab'eighanga Isiraeli ku ebyo bye bakoba bati, ‘Ebibi byaife n'ensobi dhaife bitutwaliriiza inho, byatugoogombya twaweera mu luwu. Kale tunaaba tutya abalamu?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Bakobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda nga bwendi omulamu, tinhumirwa kubona mwonooni ng'afiire. Aye nhenda akyuke aleke ebibi bye, abe mulamu. Imwe abantu b'eighanga Isiraeli, mukyuke. Mukyuke muve mu mpisa dhaimwe embi. Lwaki mwenda okufa?" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Agho ni, iwe omuntu, kobera ab'eighanga lyo oti omuntu omulungi bw'akola ebibi, ebirungi bye yakola eira tibirimuwonia kubonerezebwa. Ate omuntu omubi bw'alekera okukola ebibi, talibonerezebwa lwa bibi bye eby'eira. N'omuntu omulungi bw'atoolera okukola ebibi, taliwonia bulamu bwe lwa bulungi bwe obw'eira." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ni bwensuubiza omuntu omulungi nti bwenebwene aliba mulamu, aye ni yeesigulira ku bulungi bwe obw'eira n'atoolera okukola ebibi, agho ebirungi bye yakola tibiriidhukirwa naire. Era alifiira mu bibi bye ebyo bye yakola." 
Ezekiel33:14 Era bwendabula omuntu omubi nti bwenebwene aidha kufa, aye n'akyuka n'alekera okukola ebibi, n'akola ebituufu ebigwaniire ng'ajiira ku mateeka," 
Ezekiel33:15 ng'airiza eyamwewolaku omusingo gwe, yairiza omuntu ebintu bye yamunhagaku, yaajiira ku mateeka agagha obulamu, era ng'azira kibi ky'akola, bwenebwene talifa, aliba mulamu." 
Ezekiel33:16 Ebibi byonabyona bye yakola birimusoniyibwa yaaba mulamu, kuba yakola ebituufu ebigwaniire ng'ajiira ku mateeka." 
Ezekiel33:17 “Abantu b'eighanga lyo bakoba bati nze Musengwa Katonda mu nkola yange tisala nsonga mu butuufu, ate nga ni beene mu nkola yaibwe abatasala nsonga mu butuufu." 
Ezekiel33:18 Omuntu akola ebituufu bw'akyuka n'ava ku kukola ebituufu n'akola ebibi, alifa olw'ekyo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Ate omuntu akola ebibi bw'akyuka n'ava ku kukola ebibi, n'akola ebituufu ebigwaniire ng'ajiira ku mateeka, aliba mulamu olw'ekyo." 
Ezekiel33:20 Imwe mumala mwakoba muti nze Musengwa Katonda mu nkola yange tisala nsonga mu butuufu. Aye ndi kubakobera imwe Abaisiraeli, nti ndisalira buli muntu ku imwe omusango nga njiira ku bikolwa bye.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Ku lunaku olwokutaanu mu mwezi ogweikumi, mu mwaka ogweikumi n'ebiri (12) nga tuli mu bunhage, omuntu eyawonagho mu Yerusalemu yaidha yankobera ng'ekibuga bwe kyali kimaze okugwa." 
Ezekiel33:22 Eigulo ng'omuntu oyo eyawonagho akaali kwidha, naawulira mule ng'amaani ga Musengwa Katonda gandidhieku. Era omuntu oyo yaja okwidha enkyo nga Musengwa Katonda anzibwire omunwa, nga nsobola okwogera era nga tikaali ng'oti kasiru." 
Ezekiel33:23 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: 
Ezekiel33:24 “Iwe omuntu bona eno, abantu abali mu bifo ebyayonoonebwa mu nsi Isiraeli bakoba bati, ‘Oba nga Aburahamu yali muntu mulala yenka aye yaagheebwa ensi eno yoonayoona, kale ife abangi tuti eteekwa okuba nga yatugheebwa ebe yaife.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 “Agho ni bakobere oti nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti: Mulya emamba ng'ekaalimu n'omusaayi gwayo, mwasinza ebintu ebisinzibwa ebitali nze Katonda, era mwatemula abantu. Era mwalowooza muti mulitwala ensi eno yaaba yaimwe?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Mwesiga bya kulwanisa byaimwe, mwakola ebintu ebyenhinhalwa, mwasendasenda baka beene mwaba nabo mu buliri. Era mwalowooza muti mulitwala ensi eno yaaba yaimwe?" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Era bakobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubalabula nti nga bwendi omulamu, bwenebwene abantu abo abali mu bifo ebyayonoonebwa, baliitibwa mu lutalo. Abo abaliba eyo mu nsiko ndigha ensolo emirambo gyaibwe dhaagikankamira. Ate abo abaliba mu bifo eby'okwewogomamu n'abo abaliba mu mpuku, balifa endwaire ya kawumpuli." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ndireetera ensi eno okusigala agho etyo ng'eri bifulukwa byereere omutaba bantu, era naanafuya n'abalwani baayo ab'amaani. Ensozi edh'omu Isiraeli dhirifuuka bifulukwa era dhaawolongera nga ghazira na muntu adhibitamu." 
Ezekiel33:29 Bwe ndibonereza abantu olw'ebyo ebyenhinhalwa bye bakola, ndireetera n'ensi eno okusigala agho etyo ng'eri bifulukwa byereere omutaba bantu, olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel33:30 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, wulira abantu bo bye bakwogeraku nga baagaanaine ku kimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga, ni ku miryango gy'endhu dhaibwe. Buli muntu akoba mwine ati, ‘Mwidhe tuje tuwulire Musengwa Katonda by'atukoba.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Olwo nga baidha y'oli bya bulungi ng'abantu bange, era nga bawulira by'obakoba, aye baaloba kubikola. Booleka nga bwe bali n'okugonza okungi, mu bibono bubono bye boogera. Aye ng'emyoyo gyaibwe giri ku bya kufuna." 
Ezekiel33:32 Era, bona eno, iwe bakutwala ng'omwembi ow'enhembo edh'okugonzania, ayemba mu mamiro amalungi okuwulira era n'akubiraku ebivuga obukalamu. Bawulirisa bukalamu by'obakoba, aye ghazira naire ekirala kiti kye bata mu nkola." 
Ezekiel33:33 Aye by'obakoba bwe birituukirira, ate nga era bija kutuukirira, olwo balimanha ng'omulanzi ababairengamu.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel34:2 “Iwe omuntu, langirira akabi akali kwidhira abakulembeze b'omu Isiraeli. Langa obakobere nze Musengwa Katonda bye ndi kubakoba nti: Mukagwireku imwe abakulembeze b'omu Isiraeli. Muligho kweigusa beene nga timulabirira ntaama dhe mwaya." 
Ezekiel34:3 Munhwa amata n'omuzigo, mwavaala ebivaalo ebikolebwa mu buviiri bwadho, mwaita edhipiitiibwa ensavu mwadhirya, aye nga timulabirira ntaama edho naire." 
Ezekiel34:4 Enafu timudhirabirira kudhiizaamu maani, endwaire timudhiwonia, edhimenheike timudhisibaku kintu ni dhiyunga, edhitambulatambula eyo dhityo timudhiiza mu kisibo, n'edhibula timudhinoonia. Aye mudhitwala bya ntaka na bukambwe." 
Ezekiel34:5 Kale dhaasansaana olw'okubula omwayi, ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhaadhiita dhaadhirya." 
Ezekiel34:6 Entaama dhange edho dhaaja nga dhitambulatambula eyo dhityo, ku nsozi enene ni ku busozi obutono. Dhaasansaanira mu nsi yoonayoona aghazira adhinonerezaaku oba adhinooniaku." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Agho ni, imwe abaayi, muwulirise nze Musengwa Katonda bye ndi kukoba." 
Ezekiel34:8 Era nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, mugwaine mute omwoyo ku bye ndi kubakoba. Entaama dhange dhaafuuka muyiigo era mere ya nsolo dha mu nsiko, olw'okubula omwayi. Abaayi be nadhitaaku baaloba okudhinoonia, aye baira bwa mu kweigusa beene nga tibadhirabirira naire." 
Ezekiel34:9 Kale ni, imwe abaayi, muwulirise nze Musengwa Katonda kye ndi kukoba." 
Ezekiel34:10 Nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubakoba imwe abaayi, nti buti nfuuse muzigu waimwe. Ndibavunaana olw'entaama dhange, naabalekeza okuba abaayi baadho, n'imwe beene mwena naabalekeza okweigusanga beene mwenka. Ndibatoolaku entaama dhange, mulobe kudhifuulanga kya kulya kyaimwe nga mudhikankamira.”" 
Ezekiel34:11 “Nze Musengwa Katonda nkoba nti, nze mwene ndinoonia entaama dhange, naayagaaza woonawoona okuzuula ye dhiri." 
Ezekiel34:12 Ng'omwayi bw'ayagaaza buli ghantu, nga ghaligho edhindi ku ntaama dhe edhisansaine, zeena ntyo bwe ndyagaaza woonawoona okuzuula entaama dhange ye dhiri. Ndidhitoola eyo yoonayoona ye dhaasansaanira ku lunaku olwo olw'ebire ebyereere ku igulu n'enzikiiza agemye bedimudimu!" 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndidhitoola eyo mu maghanga, naadhisoloza okuva mu nsi ye dhaasansaanira, naadhiiza mu nsi yaadho. Naadhaayiranga ku nsozi edh'omu Isiraeli, aghali ensulo edh'amaadhi, mu bifo ebibaamu abantu." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ndidhaayiranga aghali eisubi eirungi, ere ku nsozi endeeyi edh'omu Isiraeli. Dhiririiranga eyo eisubi eigimu mu byayiro ebirungi, dhaawuumuliranga n'eyo ku nsozi edh'omu Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Nze mwene ninze ndiba omwayi ow'entaama dhange, era naadhifunira n'ekifo eky'okuwuumuliramu. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ndinoonia edhibuze, naiza edhitambuliratambulira eyo dhityo, edhimenheike naadhisibaku ekintu dhaayunga, n'enafu naadhiizaamu amaani. Era edho edhaageedha edh'amaani ndidhirabirira, kuba nze ndi mwayi akolera ku mazima." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Kale nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kukoba imwe Abaisiraeli entaama dhange nti ndisala omusango ghagati gh'entaama n'entaama, naayawula enungi ku mbi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Abandi ku imwe okulya eisubi eirungi tikubamala, mutaaku n'okutyankirira n'ebigere eryo lye mutaliire. Era bwe mumala okunhwa amaadhi amalaavu, mutaabuula n'ebigere ago agasigairegho." 
Ezekiel34:19 Olwo entaama dhange edhindi dhaalya eisubi lye mutyankiriire n'ebigere byaimwe, era dhaanhwa amaadhi ge mutaabwire n'ebigere byaimwe." 
Ezekiel34:20 Agho ni nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva ni mbakoba nti: Nze mwene ndisala omusango ghagati gh'entaama engeedhu n'engoogombe," 
Ezekiel34:21 kuba muguumula entaama enafu n'amabega gaimwe, mwadhifula n'amayiga gaimwe, okutuusa lwe mudhisansaaniza eyo kuliya." 
Ezekiel34:22 Aye ndiwonia entaama dhange edho mwalekera agho okudhituntuza. Era ndisala omusango ghagati gh'entaama n'entaama. 
Ezekiel34:23 Ndidhiteeragho omwayi mulala yenka, ali ng'oti n'omugheereza wange Daudi. Oyo n'alidhirabiriranga ng'omwayi waadho." 
Ezekiel34:24 Nze Musengwa Katonda mwene ninze ndiba Katonda waadho, n'omugheereza wange ali ng'oti ni Daudi yaaba omufuzi waadho. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ndikola nadho endagaano ey'emiraala, naamalagho mu nsi eyo ensolo enkambwe. Olwo entaama dhisobole okubanga eyo mu nsiko nga dhiri mu miraala, era dhitendukenga n'eyo mu bibira." 
Ezekiel34:26 “Ndibagha enkabi, era baabanga mu kiketezo ekyezungulwire olusozi lwange. Naabaleeteranga amaadhi amalungi okugwa mu biseera byago mwe bageetaagira." 
Ezekiel34:27 Ensi eidha kubazanga ebirime, emiti gibalenga ebibala, n'abantu babenga mu nsi mu miraala. Era bwe ndimala okumenhamenha ebikoligo ebiri mu nkoto dh'abantu bange, ni mbawonia abo abaabafuula abairu, olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel34:28 Amaghanga agandi galiba nga tigakaabatuntuza, waire ensolo edh'omu nsiko mu nsi eyo okubakankamira. Baliba mu miraala nga ghazira kintu kyonakyona kibatiisa naire." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndireetera enimiro dhaibwe okuba engimu, naamalagho endhala mu nsi eyo. Era amaghanga agandi tigaliiramu kubavumanga kabiri." 
Ezekiel34:30 Olwo balimanha nga nze, Musengwa Katonda waibwe, mba ghalala nabo, era nga beene, ab'eighanga Isiraeli, bantu bange. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye." 
Ezekiel34:31 “Imwe muli ntaama dhange, entaama dhe ndhaya, ate nze naaba Katonda waimwe.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Ezekiel35:1 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel35:2 “Iwe omuntu, amaiso go galingirize ku lusozi Seiri, olange akabi akali kulwidhira." 
Ezekiel35:3 Lukobe oti nze Musengwa Katonda, ndi kulukoba nti: Bona eno iwe olusozi Seiri, nze buti nfuuse muzigu y'oli. Era ndigolola omukono gwange naakubonereza, naakuleetera okusigala agho otyo ng'oli bifulukwa byereere omutaba bantu." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ndizikiriza ebibuga byo, n'iwe mwene naakuleetera okusigala agho otyo ng'oli bifulukwa byereere. Olwo olimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel35:5 Wali n'enzigu ku Baisiraeli ey'olubeerera, wabaghaayo okwitibwa mu lutalo mu kiseera kye baabeera mu kabi, ekiseera eky'okubonerezebwa kwaibwe okusembayo." 
Ezekiel35:6 Agho ni, nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, nkutegekeire kwitibwa era tolikuwona naire, kuba oli n'omusango ogw'obutemo." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ndireetera ensi ey'ensozi Edomu okusigala agho etyo ng'eri bifulukwa byereere omutaba bantu, era naita n'abantu boonaboona abagibitamu." 
Ezekiel35:8 Ndiidhuza ensozi emirambo gy'abantu abaitiibwa mu lutalo, gyaidhula ni ku busozi, ni mu biiko, era ni mu bwinhamo." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndikuleetera okusigala agho otyo ng'oli bifulukwa byereere ebyanda n'ebyanda, n'ebibuga byo byaloba kwirayo kubangamu bantu. Olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Wakoba oti eighanga Buyudaaya ni Isiraeli, gombi gago ghalala n'ebiketezo byago, waire nga nze Musengwa Katonda waibwe nali nga ndigho." 
Ezekiel35:11 Agho ni, nze Musengwa Katonda ndayira nti nga bwendi omulamu, nja kukukolaku nga njiira ku busungu, n'ensaalwa, n'obukyayi bye wali nabyo ku bantu bange abo. Era bwe ndikusalira omusango ni nkubonereza, ndikuleetera okuumanha." 
Ezekiel35:12 Olimanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda nawulira byonabyona bye wayogera ng'onhooma ensozi dh'omu Isiraeli, oti dhaalekebwa agho dhityo nga dhiri bifulukwa byereere, era oti dhaakugheebwa iwe odhinhage." 
Ezekiel35:13 Era naawulira ebibono byaimwe ebibi kamaala bye mwandhogeraku n'eminwa gyaimwe nga muli kuneekudumbalizaaku.” 
Ezekiel35:14 Kale Musengwa Katonda oyo kyava akoba ati: “Ndikuleetera okusigala agho otyo ng'oli bifulukwa byereere. Olwo ensi yoonayoona yaasagamba," 
Ezekiel35:15 ng'oti niiwe bwe wasagamba nga Isiraeli, ensi yange, erekeibwa agho etyo ng'eri bifulukwa byereere. Olusozi Seiri ndidha kulukolaku n'ensi Edomu yoonayoona ngikoleku, birekebwe agho bityo nga biri bifulukwa byereere. Olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel36:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu, langa eri ensozi edh'omu Isiraeli, odhikobe dhiwulirise bino" 
Ezekiel36:2 nze Musengwa Katonda bye ndi kudhikoba nti: Iwe Isiraeli, abazigu bo bakwesuutiraku baakoba bati, ‘Otyo, buti ensozi edho edh'eira dhifuuse dhaife ku bwaife.’" 
Ezekiel36:3 “Kale ni langa era olangirire bino, nze Musengwa Katonda bye ndi kukoba nti: Imwe ensozi edh'omu Isiraeli, amaghanga agabaliinaine bwe gaabalumba okuva ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, gaabanhagulula era gaabaleka agho mutyo nga muli bifulukwa byereere. Olwo amaghanga ago gaabafuula nsozi dhaago, abantu baaboogerangaku era baabayeeyerezanga." 
Ezekiel36:4 Agho ni, imwe ensozi edh'omu Isiraeli, muwulirise bino nze Musengwa Katonda bye ndi kukoba ensozi, n'obusozi, n'obwinhamo, n'ebiiko, n'ebifo bye baazikiriza ni bisigala agho bityo nga biri bifulukwa byereere, n'ebibuga bye baanhagulula ni babireka agho nga muzira bantu, buti ebyafuuka enseko eri amaghanga goonagoona agabaliinaine." 
Ezekiel36:5 “Nze Musengwa Katonda kyenva ni nkoba nti ndi kwogeza busungu bwereere eri amaghanga goonagoona, n'okusingira irala Edomu, olw'enkikidi ye ndi nayo ku lw'abantu bange. Amaghanga ago gaanhaga ensi yange gaagifuula eyaago ku bwago, era gaaginhagulula mu masanhu amangi n'obunhoomi obubitirivu." 
Ezekiel36:6 “Agho ni langa ebigema ku nsi Isiraeli, era okobere ensozi, n'obusozi, n'obwinhamo, n'ebiiko, oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kwogeza obusungu bubitirivu olw'enkikidi ye ndi nayo ku lwabyo, kuba byavumibwa amaghanga." 
Ezekiel36:7 Era nze Musengwa Katonda neerayiriire nti amaghanga geene agaliinainegho, n'agalivumibwa." 
Ezekiel36:8 Aye imwe ensozi edh'omu Isiraeli, mulimeraku emiti, gyataaku n'ebibala, ku lw'abantu bange Abaisiraeli abali kumpi okwira eka." 
Ezekiel36:9 Nze ndi ku luuyi lwaimwe, era nja kubona nti mulimwaku enimiro, era dhaasigibwamu ensigo." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ndireetera abantu okwala mu ighanga Isiraeli, baidhula mu nsozi imwe. Ebibuga biriidhula abantu, n'ebifo byonabyona ebyayonoonebwa byairamu okuzimbibwa obuyaaka." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ndireetera abantu n'ensolo okuzaalagana n'okweyongera obungi mu imwe, okusinga ni bwe kyalinga eira. Naaleetera n'ebintu okujanga obukalamu mu imwe, okusinga ni ghale ghe mwasookera okusengebwamu. Olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Ezekiel36:12 Bwenebwene ndireka abantu bange Abaisiraeli baabanga mu imwe, olwo imwe mwaba ensi ey'obutaka bwaibwe. Era timuliirayo kabiri kubaitaku baana baibwe." 
Ezekiel36:13 “Nze Musengwa Katonda era nkoba nti: Abantu bakoba bati, ‘Iwe ensi Isiraeli oita abantu, waafiiriza eighanga lyo.’" 
Ezekiel36:14 Aye okuva ni mpegaano tokairamu kwita bantu, waire okufiiriza eighanga lyo. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye." 
Ezekiel36:15 Tiriganha maghanga gandi kukuvumanga, waire okuleka abantu okukuswazanga, oba iwe ensi Isiraeli yeene okwirayo okufiirizanga eighanga lyo. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Agho kabiri Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Ezekiel36:17 “Iwe omuntu, abantu ab'eighanga Isiraeli bwe baali mu nsi yaibwe, baagyonoona olw'emize gyaibwe n'ebibi bye baakola. Ensambo ye beebisangamu, nga ti nongoofu ng'oti n'omukazi bw'aba ng'ali mu biseera bye eby'okulwala." 
Ezekiel36:18 Kale, nze kyenava ni mbamaliraku obusungu bwange, olw'obutemo bwe baakola mu nsi eyo, n'olw'okwonoona ensi eyo nga basinza ebitali nze Katonda." 
Ezekiel36:19 Nabasalira omusango nga njira ku neebisa yaibwe ni ku bikolwa byaibwe. Era naabasansaaniza eyo mu maghanga, naabaidhuza eyo mu nsi enhingi." 
Ezekiel36:20 Aye mu buli ighanga mwe baajanga, nga boonoona eriina lyange eitukuvu, abantu baatuuka n'okuboogeraku bati, ‘Bano n'abantu ba Musengwa Katonda, aye ate baava mu nsi ye!’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Agho naalumirwa eriina lyange eitukuvu, Abaisiraeli abo lye baayonoona mu maghanga ye baajanga." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Kale ni kobera ab'eighanga Isiraeli oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kubakoba nti: Kino kye nja okukola tirikikola lwa kuba imwe ab'eighanga Isiraeli, aye ku lwa liina lyange eitukuvu lye mwayonoona mu maghanga ye mwajanga." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ndyoleka eri amaghanga eriina lyange eikologho bwe liri eitukuvu, eriina imwe lye mwayonoona mu maghanga ago. Olwo amaghanga ago galimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye. Bye ndikolera mu imwe, biryoleka amaghanga ago nga bwendi omutukuvu." 
Ezekiel36:24 Ndibatoolayo eyo mu maghanga, naabasolozaayo eyo mu nsi dhoonadhoona, naabaiza mu nsi eyaimwe." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ndi bamansiraku amaadhi amalungi, gaabanaazaaku obwonoonefu bwaimwe bwonabwona n'okusinza ebitali nze Katonda." 
Ezekiel36:26 Ndibagha omwoyo omuyaaka n'endowooza empyaka. Naabatoolamu omwoyo omukalangafu oguli ng'oti ibaale, naabataamu omwoyo omugonvu omuwulize." 
Ezekiel36:27 Ndibataamu omwoyo ogwange, naabaleetera okujiira ku mateeka gange, nga mukola bye mbalagira." 
Ezekiel36:28 Olwo mwabanga mu nsi ye nagha badhaadha baimwe, era mwabanga bantu bange, nze naaba Katonda waimwe." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ndibawonia byonabyona ebibaleetera obutaba balongoofu, era naaleetera engaano okubaalira einho, olwo endhala yaaloba kubalumaku naire." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndireetera emiti egy'ebibala n'enimiro edh'emere okwama einho, endhala erobe kabiri kwirayo kubaluma na kubaswaza mu maghanga gandi." 
Ezekiel36:31 Agho muliidhukira empisa dhaimwe edhaali embi n'ebikolwa byaimwe ebyali ebibi. Olwo mwekyagha olw'ebibi byaimwe n'olw'ebikolwa ebyenhinhalwa bye mwakola. 
Ezekiel36:32 Imwe ab'eighanga Isiraeli, mukimanhe bukalamu nti ekyo tirikikola lwa kuba imwe. Nhenda ensoni dhibageme muswale olw'ebyo bye mwakola.”" 
Ezekiel36:33 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba ati: “Ku lunaku olwo lwe ndibanaazaaku ebibi byaimwe byonabyona, ndibaleetera okwiramu okubanga mu bibuga byaimwe, n'okuzimba obuyaaka ebifo ebyayonoonebwa." 
Ezekiel36:34 Kiisi eyabitanga ku nimiro dhaimwe, yabonanga bwe dhaali dhizise nga dhifuuse bwa nsiko. Aye ndibaleetera okwiramu okudhirimanga." 
Ezekiel36:35 Era balikoba bati, ‘Eno ensi eyali erekeibwa obwagho etyo ng'eri bifulukwa byereere, buti efuuse ng'oti n'enimiro ey'e Edeni! N'ebibuga ebyali byonooneibwa era nga byona birekeibwa bw'agho bityo nga biri bifulukwa byereere, buti birimu abantu era byezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu!’" 
Ezekiel36:36 Olwo amaghanga agabeezungulwire agaliba gasigairegho, galimanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nazimba obuyaaka ebifo ebyali bisigaire ebyanhe n'ebifunfugu ebyereere. Era naasimba buyaaka emere mu bifo ebyali birekeibwa obwagho nga biwolongeire nga bitiisa. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye, era ndikituukiriza.”" 
Ezekiel36:37 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Ndiiramu okuganha ab'eighanga Isiraeli, bansaba okubakolera ekintu kyonakyona, era ndibaleetera okweyongera obungi ng'oti n'entaama bwe dheeyongera." 
Ezekiel36:38 Ebibuga ebyayonoonebwa biriidhula abantu, ng'oti ni Yerusalemu bwe kyaidhulanga entaama edh'okughaayo ng'emisengo ku mbaga edh'ebibinuko ebyalagirwa. Olwo balimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Agho amaani ga Musengwa Katonda gandidhaku, era omwoyo gwa Musengwa Katonda oyo gwantwala gwandhisa mu kiiko ekyali kiidhwire amagumba." 
Ezekiel37:2 Gwaja nga gumbisa mu magumba ago. Naabona nga gaali mangi inho mu kiiko omwo, era neetegereza amagumba ago naabona nga gaali makalu inho." 
Ezekiel37:3 Yambuuza ati: “Iwe omuntu, amagumba gano gasobola okwiramu obulamu?” Naamwiramu nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe oidhi.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Yankoba ati: “Langa okobe amagumba gano gawulire nze Musengwa Katonda bye nkoba. 
Ezekiel37:5 Gakobere oti nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kugakoba nti: Bona, nja kubafuuwamu omuuka, mube balamu."
