Daniel2:8 Agho kyabazinga yairamu ati: “Nga bwenebwene bwendowooziiza, muli kugezaaku bwa kusenda biseera, kuba mwidhi bukalamu nga kye nva okubakobera kiri n'okutuukirira," 
Daniel2:9 eky'okubabonereza mwenamwena, bwe mutankobere kirooto kye naloose. Mweteesiisa okwogeranga eby'obuguya ebitali bituufu ye ndi, nga musuubira muti ebiseera bwe binaaja nga bibitagho ebintu biidha kukyuka. Kale ni munkobere ekirooto ekyo, olwo mmanhe nga musobola okunkobera amakulu gaakyo.”" 
Daniel2:10 Baamwiramu bati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ghazira muntu waire omulala ati ku nsi kuno asobola kukola ekyo ky'oyenda tukole. Era tebangayooku kyabazinga k'abe mukologho oba wa bukumu, akobangaku balaguzi, na basamize, na ba maghembe, kintu ng'oti n'ekyo." 
Daniel2:11 Isebantu kyabazinga, ekyo ky'oli kutukoba okukola kikalangufu inho era ghazira muntu asobola kukikukobera, okutoolaku bakatonda bonka. Aye ate bakatonda abo tibaba mu ife, ife abantu obuntu.”" 
Daniel2:12 Agho kyabazinga yaasungughala inho ekibitiriire era yaalagira baite abagezigezi boonaboona ab'omu Babiloni. 
Daniel2:13 Kale kyabazinga yaagha ekiragiro abagezigezi boonaboona baitibwe. Era yaalagira baje baleete Danieli ni baine, boona baitibwe." 
Daniel2:14 Agho Danieli yaaja ye Arioki omukulu w'abaisirukale abaakuumanga kyabazinga, eyali aidhie okwita abagezigezi ab'omu Babilonia. Yaakozesa amagezi n'obwegendereza," 
Daniel2:15 yaabuuza Arioki oyo ati: “Kiki ekiviiriireku kyabazinga n'agha ekiragiro ekikambwe kityo.” Arioki yaamwinhonhola bwe byali. 
Daniel2:16 Agho Danieli yaaja okweghemba kyabazinga amughe ekiseera, asobole okumukobera amakulu ag'ekirooto ekyo." 
Daniel2:17 Bwe yava eyo yairayo eka, yaakoberaku Hanania, Mishaeli, ni Azaria, ebibairegho." 
Daniel2:18 Era yaabakoba basabe Katonda ow'eigulu abasaasire ku bigema ku kyama ekyo, balobe kwitirwa ghalala n'abagezigezi ab'omu Babiloni." 
Daniel2:19 Obwire obwo Katonda yaayoleka Danieli ekyama ekyo mu kubonekerwa. Era Danieli oyo yaasaaka Katonda ow'eigulu," 
Daniel2:20 ng'akoba ati: “Katonda asaakibwenga ebyanda n'ebyanda, oyo ni mwene magezi era ow'amaani." 
Daniel2:21 Aleetera enaku n'ebiseera okukyukakyuka, yaataagho era yaatoolagho bakyabazinga. Aleetera abantu okuba n'amagezi, era yaabaleetera okuba n'okutegeera." 
Daniel2:22 Ayoleka ebintu eby'ekyama ebitaboneka; yaamanha ebiri mu nzikiiza, era mwene gh'aba n'obutangaavu ghe buba." 
Daniel2:23 Wo Katonda wa badhaadha bange, nze nkwebaza era naakusaaka; kuba wampa amagezi n'amaani. Era ni mpegaano omanhiisa kye tukusabye, waatwoleka eky'okukobera kyabazinga.”" 
Daniel2:24 Agho Danieli yaaja ye Arioki, kyabazinga ye yali alagiire okwita abantu abagezigezi ab'omu Babilonia. Yaamukoba ati: “Otazikiriza bantu bagezigezi abo ab'omu Babilonia. Ntwala mu maiso ga kyabazinga mmukobere amakulu g'ekirooto kye yaloota.”" 
Daniel2:25 Agho amangu geene ago, Arioki yaatwala Danieli mu maiso ga kyabazinga. Era yaakoba kyabazinga ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, nzwire nga mu bantu abaanhagibwa e Buyudaaya mulimu omusaadha asobola okuvuunula ekirooto kyo.”" 
Daniel2:26 Kyabazinga yaabuuza Danieli, era ye baatuuma eriina Beluteshazzari, ati: “Osobola okunkobera ekirooto kye naloota n'amakulu gaakyo?”" 
Daniel2:27 Danieli yairamu ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ekyo ekyama ky'oli kubuuza, ghazira bagezigezi basobola kukikukobera, waire abasamize, oba abalaguzi, oba abo abeetegereza ebiri ku igulu." 
Daniel2:28 Aye ghaligho Katonda mu igulu ayoleka ebyama. Oyo n'ali kukumanhisa ebija okubaagho mu biseera eby'oluvainhuma. Mpegaano ni, ka nkukobere kye wabona mu kirooto ng'otendwike mu buliri bwo." 
Daniel2:29 “Isebantu kyabazinga, iwe bwe wali otendwike mu buliri bwo, waloota ebiribaagho ye bwidha, era Katonda oyo ayoleka ebyama yaakumanhisa ebyo ebiribaagho." 
Daniel2:30 Katonda, nze yandholeka ekyama ekyo ti lwa kuba nga ninze nsinga okuba omugezi mu bantu abandi boonaboona abalamu, aye lwa kuba yayenda akumanhise amakulu ag'ekirooto kyo era otegeere ebidhuubo ebyakwidhira mu mwoyo gwo." 
Daniel2:31 “Isebantu kyabazinga, iwe waja okulinga oti ng'obona ekiwumbe ekikologho nga kyemereire agho mu maiso go. Ekiwumbe ekyo kyali kikologho inho, nga kimesunkana era nga kitiisa inho okukiringaku." 
Daniel2:32 Omutwe gwakyo nga gwakolebwa mu zaabu omukenenule. Ekifuba n'amakono nga bya feeza. Enda n'ebisambi nga bya kyuma kya kikomo. 
Daniel2:33 Amagulu gaakyo nga ga kyuma ekigumu einho. Ebigere byakyo, ekitundu nga kya kyuma ekigumu einho, ate ekitundu ekindi nga kya itosi." 
Daniel2:34 Bwe wali okaakiringirira, eibaale lyamogoka lyonka aghazira muntu aligemyeku, lyakuba ebigere eby'ekiwumbe ekyo eby'ekyuma ekigumu einho n'eitosi, lyabimanhiangula." 
Daniel2:35 Agho mu kiseera kyene ekyo, ekyuma ekigumu einho, n'eitosi, n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, ni feeza, ni zaabu, byonabyona byamanhiangukira ghalala. Byafuuka ng'oti musinsi oguba mu bifo aghakubirwa engaano mu biseera eby'ekyeya. Empewo yaabifuuwa okubimaliriragho, ghaabulagho n'akamanhiso akalaga nga bibaireghooku. Aye eibaale eryakuba ekiwumbe ekyo lyafuukamu olusozi olukologho olwabuna ensi yoonayoona." 
Daniel2:36 “Ekyo n'ekirooto kyo. Mperaano ni, Isebantu kyabazinga, ka tukukobere amakulu gaakyo." 
Daniel2:37 Iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, niiwe kyabazinga asinga mu bakyabazinga boonaboona. Niiwe Katonda ow'eigulu ye yagha obwakyabazinga, n'obukumu, n'amaani, n'ekitiisa." 
Daniel2:38 Era Katonda yakuta mu ngalo byonabyona ebiri ku nsi okubifuga: abantu, ensolo, n'enhonhi. Niiwe omutwe ogwa zaabu." 
Daniel2:39 Iwe bw'olivaagho ghalisitukagho obwakyabazinga obundi, aye nga tibwa maani ng'obubwo buno. Era kabiri ghalisitukagho obwakyabazinga obwokusatu obw'ekyuma eky'ekikomo bwafuga ensi yoonayoona." 
Daniel2:40 Era kabiri ghaliidhagho obwakyabazinga obwokuna nga bwa maani ng'oti n'ekyuma ekigumu einho. Era ng'ekyuma ekigumu einho bwe kimenhamenha ni kimanhiangula ebintu byonabyona okubizikiriza, n'obwakyabazinga obwo bwona butyo bwe bulimenhamenha era bwamanhiangula obwakyabazinga obundi bwonabwona." 
Daniel2:41 Era nga bwe wabona ebigere n'obunwe bwaku ng'ekitundu ekindi bwa kyuma ekigumu einho ate ekindi nga bwa itosi lya muwumbi, obwakyabazinga obwo buliba nga bweyawireyawiremu. Aye bulibaamuuku n'amaani ag'ekyuma ekigumu einho, nga bwe wabona ng'ekyuma ekyo kitabwirwamu eitosi." 
Daniel2:42 Era ng'obunwe obw'oku bigere bwe bwali, ng'ekitundu ekindi bwa kyuma ekigumu einho ate ekindi nga bwa itosi, n'obwakyabazinga obwo bwona butyo bwe buliba: ng'ekitundu ekindi bugumu ate ekindi nga bunafu." 
Daniel2:43 Era nga bwe wabona ekyuma ekigumu einho nga kitabuletabule n'eitosi, n'abantu ab'omu bwakyabazinga obwo batyo bwe baligezaaku okugemagana nga bakozesa okufumbiraganwa. Aye tibalisobola, ng'oti n'ekyuma bwekitasobola kwetabula mu itosi." 
Daniel2:44 Mu biseera eby'abafuzi abo, Katonda ow'eigulu alitaagho obwakyabazinga nga ghazira kisobola kubuzikiriza, era ng'ezira ighanga lisobola kubaghangula. Aye bulimaniangula obwakyabazinga obundi bwonabwona bwabusaaniagho, bwene bwabaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Daniel2:45 Era wabona eibaale eryamogoka lyonka ku lusozi nga ghazira muntu aligemyeku, lyamaniangula ekyuma ekigumu einho, n'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, n'eitosi, ni feeza, ni zaabu. Isebantu kyabazinga, Katonda omukologho n'akumanhiisa ebyo ebiribaagho. Ekyo n'ekirooto kyo kyene kye waloota, era ago n'amakulu gaakyo geene agaziramu kubuusabuusa naire.”" 
Daniel2:46 Agho kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka, yaasaaka inho Danieli. Era yaalagira bagheeyo ebigheebwayo, n'obubbaani, eri Danieli." 
Daniel2:47 Kyabazinga yaakoba Danieli ati: “Bwenebwene Katonda waimwe n'asinga bakatonda boonaboona era ni Musengwa wa bakyabazinga boonaboona. Oyo n'ayoleka ebyama, kuba iwe osoboire okwinhonhola ekyama ekyo.”" 
Daniel2:48 Agho kyabazinga yaafuula Danieli omuntu omukologho era yaamugha ebirabo ebirungi einho kamaala. Yaamugha okufuga ekiketezo kyonakyona eky'e Babiloni, era yaamufuula omukulu ow'abagezigezi boonaboona ab'omu Babilonia." 
Daniel2:49 Danieli yaasaba kyabazinga, era kyabazinga yaagha Shaduraka ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego, baakolanga ku nsonga edh'endhawulo mu kiketezo eky'e Babiloni. Aye Danieli mwene yaasigala mu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga." 
Daniel3:1 Kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari yaalagira baakola ekiwumbe ekya zaabu, nga mu buleeyi kigheza mita amakumi abiri na musanvu, ate mu bugazi kyagheza mita isatu. Era yaalagira baakita ku museetwe ogw'e Dura, mu kiketezo eky'e Babiloni." 
Daniel3:2 Agho yaalagira beete abakungu be boonaboona, babeegho ku mukolo ogwigulagho okusinza ekiwumbe ekyo. Bano n'abakungu abaayetebwa: ab'amasaza ni bakatuukiro baibwe, n'ab'amagombolola, n'abawi b'amagezi, n'abaghanika, n'abalamuzi, n'abanamateeka, n'abafuzi boonaboona ab'omu biketezo." 
Daniel3:3 Kale abakungu abo boonaboona beesoloza, baayemerera mu maiso ag'ekiwumbe ekyo kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari kye yataagho." 
Daniel3:4 Agho omulangirizi yaalangirira mu mamiro ag'amaani ati: “Imwe abantu mwenamwena, abava mu maghanga goonagoona, era aboogera enimi dhoonadhoona, kyabazinga ali kubalagira ati," 
Daniel3:5 bwe munaawulira okuvuga okw'endeka, n'endere, n'endingidi, n'endongo, n'entongooli, n'ebivuga ebindi, nga mweyala ghansi okusinza ekiwumbe kya zaabu ekyo kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari kye yataagho." 
Daniel3:6 Era kiisi anaaloba okweyala ghansi okukisinza, baidha kumusuula mangu ago mu kikoomi ekiri kugeigera omuliro.”" 
Daniel3:7 Kale abantu boonaboona, abava mu maghanga goonagoona, era aboogera enimi dhoonadhoona, bwe baawulira okuvuga okw'endeka, n'endere, n'endingidi, n'endongo, n'entongooli, n'ebivuga ebindi, beeyala ghansi okusinza ekiwumbe kya zaabu ekyo kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari kye yataagho." 
Daniel3:8 Mu kiseera ekyo ghaabaagho Abababilonia, baidha baaseegha Abayudaaya aye nga bali kubaghaayiriza bughaayirize." 
Daniel3:9 Baakoba kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari bati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ghangaala byanda na byanda!" 
Daniel3:10 Iwe Isebantu wagha ekiragiro oti kiisi awulira okuvuga okw'endeka, n'endere, n'endingidi, n'endongo, n'entongooli, n'ebivuga ebindi, aidha kweyala ghansi asinze ekiwumbe kya zaabu ekyo." 
Daniel3:11 Era oti yeenayeena anaaloba okweyala ghansi okukisinza, baidha kumusuula mu kikoomi ekiri kugeigera omuliro." 
Daniel3:12 Kale ghaligho Abayudaaya bano, Shaduraka, ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego, iwe Isebantu kyabazinga be wagha bakolenga ku nsonga edh'endhawulo mu kiketezo eky'e Babiloni. Aye abantu abo tibagondera biragiro byo, era tibagheereza bakatonda bo waire okusinza ekiwumbe ekya zaabu kye wataagho.”" 
Daniel3:13 Agho Nebukadinezzari yaasungughala ekibitiriire, yaalagira baleete Shaduraka, ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego. Era baabaleeta mu maiso ge." 
Daniel3:14 Yaababuuza ati: “Imwe, Shaduraka, Meshaki, ni Abedinego, obwo bwenebwene kituufu nti muloba okugheereza bakatonda bange waire okusinza ekiwumbe kya zaabu kye nataagho?" 
Daniel3:15 Mpegaano ni, oba nga olunaawulira muti okuvuga okw'endeka, n'endere, n'endingidi, n'endongo, n'entongooli, n'ebivuga ebindi, munaaba beetegefu okweyala ghansi musinze ekiwumbe kya zaabu kye nakola, olwo ghazira kabi kaidha kubatuukaku. Aye bwe munaaloba okukisinza, baidha kubasuula mangu ago mu kikoomi ekiri kugeigera omuliro. Ghaligho katonda yeenayeena anaabawonia nabatoola mu buyinza bwange?”" 
Daniel3:16 Shaduraka, Meshaki ni Abedinego baamwiramu bati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, tikitwetaagisa na kwewozaaku ku nsonga eyo." 
Daniel3:17 Bwe kunaaba okutusuula mu muliro, Katonda waife ye tugheereza asobola bukalamu okutuwonia yaatutoola mu kikoomi ekiri kugeigera omuliro, era yaatutoola ni mu buyinza bwo." 
Daniel3:18 Aye Katonda waife ni bw'aba nga taakole atyo, twenda okukumanhisa, iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, nga tituja kugheereza bakatonda bo waire okusinza ekiwumbe kya zaabu kye wataagho.”" 
Daniel3:19 Agho Nebukadinezzari yaasungughala ekibitiriire, yaatungulira Shaduraka, ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego, amaiso. Yaalagira bakume ekikoomi kigeigere emikuzi musanvu okusinga bwe kigeigeranga buliidho." 
Daniel3:20 Era yaalagira abasaadha ab'amaani mu igye lye, basibe Shaduraka, ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego, babasuule mu kikoomi ekiri kugeigera omuliro." 
Daniel3:21 Kale baabasiba nga bali mu bivaalo byaibwe: eky'oku ngulu, ekanzu, enkoofiira, n'ebivaalo byaibwe ebindi byonabyona. Baamala baabasuula mu kikoomi ekiri kugeigera omuliro." 
Daniel3:22 Olw'okuba kyabazinga yalagira bakume ekikoomi kigeigere inho omuliro, enimi edh'omuliro dhaakomba dhaita abasaadha abaatwala Shaduraka, ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego, okubasuula mu kikoomi ekyo." 
Daniel3:23 Abasaadha abo bonsatule Shaduraka, ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego, baagwa mu kikoomi ekiri kugeigera omuliro nga basibe." 
Daniel3:24 Aye kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari yeewuunhia inho era yaasituka mangu ghe yali. Yaabuuza abakungu be ati: “Titwasibye abasaadha basatu ni tubasuula mu kikoomi ekiri kugeigera omuliro?” Baamwiramu bati: “Kituufu, Isebantu kyabazinga.”" 
Daniel3:25 Yaakoba ati: “Aye lwaki ndi kubona abasaadha bana abali kutambulira ghagati mu muliro nga ti basibe, era nga baziraku kabi kabatuuseeku naire? Ate owokuna afaanana ng'oti malaika!”" 
Daniel3:26 Agho Nebukadinezzari yaaseeta kumpi n'olwigi olw'ekikoomi ekiri kugeigera omuliro, yaayeta ati: “Shaduraka, Meshaki, ni Abedinego, imwe abagheereza ba Katonda Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, mufulume mwidhe ghano.” Era Shaduraka, ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego, baafuluma mu muliro." 
Daniel3:27 Ab'amasaza ni bakatuukiro baibwe, n'ab'amagombolola, n'abakungu ba kyabazinga abandi boonaboona, beesololeza aghaali abasaadha abo bonsatule. Baabona ng'omuliro ghazira kye gwakola ku mibiri gya basaadha abo bonsatule. Enviiri dhaibwe ku mitwe nga tidhaayokebwaku naire, waire ebivaalo byaibwe okuyaaku. Era ni beene nga tibawunha mwosi naire." 
Daniel3:28 Agho Nebukadinezzari yaakoba ati: “Katonda wa Shaduraka, ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego asaakibwe. Oyo n'atumye malaika we yaawonia abagheereza be bano abaamwesize, ni badheemera ekiragiro kyange nze kyabazinga. Bataire obulamu bwaibwe mu kabi, mu kifo ky'okugheereza n'okusinza katonda yeenayeena okutoolaku Katonda owaibwe." 
Daniel3:29 “Kale ni mpegaano ndi kugha ekiragiro nti: abantu boonaboona, abava mu maghanga goonagoona, era aboogera enimi dhoonadhoona, bwebanaayogera ekibi kyonakyona ku Katonda wa Shaduraka, ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego, ndidha kulagira babatemeteme, emigulu gigwe ghaagyo n'emikono gigwe ghaagyo. Era endhu dhaimwe baidha kudhizikiriza dhifuuke bifulukwa byereere; kuba ezirayo katonda asobola kuwonia bantu be mu nsambo ng'oti n'eyo.”" 
Daniel3:30 Agho kyabazinga oyo yaakuza Shaduraka, ni Meshaki, ni Abedinego, baafuuka bakulu mu kiketezo eky'e Babiloni." 
Daniel4:1 Buno n'obukwenda kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari bwe yagheereza eri abantu boonaboona ab'omu nsi yoonayoona, abava mu maghanga goonagoona, era aboogera enimi dhoonadhoona: “Emiraala gyeyongerenga okuba mu imwe." 
Daniel4:2 Kimbonekeire nga kirungi okubakobera ku bumanhiso n'ebyewuunhio, Katonda Ali Ghaigulu Yeene bye yankolera." 
Daniel4:3 Obumanhiso bwe nga bukologho! Ebyewuunhio bye nga bya maani! Obwakyabazinga bwe bwa kubaagho byanda na byanda, era aja kufuganga abantu ense n'ense." 
Daniel4:4 “Nze Nebukadinezzari nali ndi mu miraala mu ndhu yange, ng'ebintu binjiira bukalamu mu kisaagaati kyange eky'obwakyabazinga." 
Daniel4:5 Aye lwali lulala naaloota ekirooto ekyantiisa, ebifaananie byaidha byambonekera byamalamu omwoyo." 
Daniel4:6 Kale naagha ekiragiro bandhetere abagezigezi boonaboona ab'omu Babiloni, baidhe bankobere amakulu g'ekirooto ekyo." 
Daniel4:7 Agho abalaguzi, n'abasamize, n'ab'amaghembe, n'abo abeetegereza ebiri ku igulu, baidha. Nze naabakobera ekirooto kyange, aye amakulu gaakyo gaabalema okunkobera." 
Daniel4:8 Aye oluvainhuma lwa byonabyona Danieli yaidha. Danieli oyo nga baamutuuma eriina Beluteshazzari erya katonda wange era ng'omwoyo ogwa bakatonda abatukuvu gumuliku. Agho naamukobera ekirooto nti," 
Daniel4:9 ‘Iwe Beluteshazzari omukulu w'abalaguzi boonaboona, ndidhi ng'omwoyo gwa bakatonda abatukuvu gukuliku, era ghazira kyama kikulema kuzuula. Kale ka nkukobere ekirooto kye naloose, onkobere amakulu gaakyo.’" 
Daniel4:10 “Bwe nali nga ntendwike mu buliri, bino bye nabona mu kirooto: naja okulinga nti nga mbona omuti omukologho omuleeyiriri, nga guli ghagati mu nsi." 
Daniel4:11 Omuti ogwo gwakula gwaba gwa maani, era gwaleegha gwatuuka ku igulu, ng'abantu basobola okugubona ye bali yoonayoona ku nsi." 
Daniel4:12 Amakaba gaagwo nga gaboneka bulungi, era nga gwataaku ebibala kamaala, ebisobola okuliisa ensi yoonayoona. Ensolo edh'omu nsiko nga dhiwuumulira mu kinsense kyagwo, n'enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga dhaasula mu nsaga dhaagwo. Era ebitonde byonabyona ebiri n'omubiri, nga birya ku muti ogwo." 
Daniel4:13 “Bwe nali nga nkaatendwike mu buliri, naabona ni bino mu kirooto: naja okulinga nti nga mbona malaika omukuumi omutukuvu, ng'ali kwika okuva mu igulu." 
Daniel4:14 Malaika oyo yaayogera mu mamiro ag'amaani ati: ‘Temagho omuti ogwo, oguwaawuleku ensaga n'amakaba, era ogutooleku ebibala obisansaaniesansaanie. Olwo ensolo edhibairenga ghansi ghaagwo dhirumukegho, n'enhonhi edhibairenga ku nsaga dhaagwo dhije." 
Daniel4:15 Aye lekagho ekikolo kyagwo kisigale mu itaka, nga bakisibyeku endhegere edhaakolebwa mu kyuma ekigumu einho ni mu kyuma eky'ekikomo. Ekikolo ekyo ka kisigale eyo mu isubi mu nsiko. “ ‘Omusulo oguva ku igulu ka gukube omuntu oyo gumuboze, era asigale eyo mu isubi ghalala n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko." 
Daniel4:16 Era ebidhuubo bye ka bikyusibwe okuva ku by'omuntu, bifuuke bya nsolo okumala emyaka musanvu." 
Daniel4:17 Ekyo n'ekibonerezo ekyasalibwagho, ni kirangirirwa bamalaika abakuumi abatukuvu. Olwo abantu boonaboona eyo ye bali, basobole okumanha ng'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene n'afuga obwakyabazinga obw'abantu. Era ng'abugha y'ayenda yeenayeena, ni bw'aba nga n'asingamu okuba omuwombeefu mu boonaboona.’ ”" 
Daniel4:18 “Ekyo n'ekirooto nze kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari kye naloota. Buti iwe Beluteshazzari, nkobera amakulu gaakyo, kuba abantu abagezigezi ab'omu bwakyabazinga bwange, amakulu gaakyo gaabalemye okunkobera. Aye iwe osobola, kuba omwoyo gwa bakatonda abatukuvu gukuliku.”" 
Daniel4:19 Agho Danieli oyo, era ye baatuuma eriina Beluteshazzari, yaamala akaseera ng'asobeirwa era ng'ali kutya okwogera. Kyabazinga yaamukoba ati: “Beluteshazzari, ekirooto n'amakulu gaakyo birobe kukutiisa bityo.” Beluteshazzari yaamwiramu ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, kyandibaire kirungi nguli ekirooto ekyo kibaire kigema ku abo abakukyagha, n'amakulu gaakyo gaaba nga gagema ku bazigu bo!" 
Daniel4:20 Wabona omuti ogwakula ni guba ogw'amaani, era ni guleegha okutuuka ku igulu, ng'abantu basobola okugubona ye bali yoonayoona ku nsi." 
Daniel4:21 Amakaba gaagwo nga gaboneka bulungi, era nga gwataaku ebibala kamaala, ebisobola okuliisa ensi yoonayoona. Ensolo edh'omu nsiko nga dhiwuumulira mu kinsense kyagwo, n'enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga dhaasula mu nsaga dhaagwo." 
Daniel4:22 “Isebantu kyabazinga, niiwe omuti ogwo. Wakula era waaba wa maani, ekitiibwa kyo kyeyongera kyatuuka ku igulu, n'obufuzi bwo bwatuuka ensi y'ekanga." 
Daniel4:23 Isebantu kyabazinga, era wabona nga malaika omukuumi omutukuvu ali kwika okuva mu igulu. Malaika oyo yaakoba ati, ‘Temagho omuti ogwo oguzikirize, aye olekegho ekikolo kyagwo kisigale mu itaka, nga bakisibyeku endhegere edhaakolebwa mu kyuma ekigumu einho ni mu kyuma eky'ekikomo. Ekikolo ekyo ka kisigale eyo mu isubi mu nsiko. Omusulo oguva ku igulu ka gukube muntu oyo gumuboze, era asigale eyo mu isubi ghalala n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko, okumala emyaka musanvu.’" 
Daniel4:24 “Kale ni Isebantu kyabazinga, amakulu ni gano: Ekyo, oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, n'ekyo kye yalagira ekija okukutuukaku." 
Daniel4:25 Baidha kukubinga bakutoole mu bantu, bakusindike mu nsolo edh'omu nsiko. Omale emyaka musanvu ng'olyanga isubi ng'oti nte, n'omusulo oguva ku igulu gukukubenga obole, okutuusa lw'olimanha ng'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene n'afuga obwakyabazinga obw'abantu. Era ng'abugha oyo y'ayenda yeenayeena." 
Daniel4:26 Era nga malaika bwe yalagira okulekagho ekikolo eky'omuti ogwo mu itaka, obwakyabazinga bwo baliiramu okubukugha, bw'olimala okwatula oti Katonda n'afuga ensi." 
Daniel4:27 Agho ni, Isebantu kyabazinga, ganha amagezi ge nja okukugha: Lekera okukola ebibi okole ebituufu, era olekere okwonoona oyoleke okusaasira eri abo abanhigirizibwa. Oba katyo, olwo ebintu binaakujiiranga bukalamu.”" 
Daniel4:28 Ebyo byonabyona byatuuka ku kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari. 
Daniel4:29 Kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari oyo bwe yali ali kutambulatambula ghaigulu ku ngulu okw'endhu ye ey'obwakyabazinga, nga ghaakabitagho emyezi ikumi n'ebiri," 
Daniel4:30 yaakoba ati: “Ha, bona Babiloni bwekiri ekikologho! Nakizimba n'obukumu bwange n'amaani gange, kibe ekibuga omuli ekisaagaati kyange eky'obwakyabazinga obw'ekitiisa.”" 
Daniel4:31 Aye yali akaayogera, amamiro gaawulikika nga gava mu igulu gaakoba gati: “Kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari ndi kukukobera nti obwakyabazinga bukutooleibwaku." 
Daniel4:32 Baidha kukubinga bakutoole mu bantu, bakusindike mu nsolo edh'omu nsiko. Omale emyaka musanvu ng'olyanga isubi ng'oti nte, okutuusa lw'olimanha ng'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene n'afuga obwakyabazinga obw'abantu. Era ng'abugha oyo y'ayenda yeenayeena.”" 
Daniel4:33 Mu kaseera keene ako ebibono ebyo byatuukirira ku Nebukadinezzari. Baamubinga baamutoola mu bantu, yaalyanga isubi ng'oti nte, n'omusulo oguva ku igulu gwamukubanga yaabola. Era enviiri dhe dhaakula dhaaleegha ng'oti mooya ga nkookooma, n'enkumu dhe dhaaleegha ng'oti dha nhonhi." 
Daniel4:34 Agho kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari yaakoba ati: “Ekiseera ekyo nga kiwoireku, nze Nebukadinezzari nalinga ghaigulu ku igulu, nairamu okutegeera obukalamu. Agho neebaza oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, naamusaaka era naamugha ekitiisa, oyo omulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda. Kuba obwakyabazinga bwe bwa byanda na byanda, era obufuzi bwe bulibaagho ense n'ense." 
Daniel4:35 Abona abantu ab'oku nsi boonaboona ng'oti n'ebintuntu ebitagasa naire. Akola kyonakyona ky'aba eyenze ku ebyo ebiba ku igulu, era yaakola kyonakyona ky'ayenda ku bantu boonaboona ababa ku nsi. Ghazira asobola kumutakania, oba okumubuuza ky'akoze." 
Daniel4:36 “Bwe nairamu okutegeera obukalamu, Katonda yandhiriza obwakyabazinga bwange nairamu okuba ow'ekitiisa era omukologho. Abawi bange ab'amagezi n'abakungu bange, baidha baaneisuusaayo era bandhiza ku bwakyabazinga bwange. Neeyongeraku okuba omukologho okusinga bwe nalinga." 
Daniel4:37 “Era mperaano, nze Nebukadinezzari nsaaka Katonda ow'eigulu, naamugulumiza era naamutaamu ekitiisa kuba by'akola byonabyona bituufu era tasaliriza nsonga. Abo abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu abaisa.”" 
Daniel5:1 Lwali lulala, kyabazinga Beleshazzari yaafumbira abakungu be abaghera olukumi (1,000) embaga enene, era yaanhwa nabo omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
Daniel5:2 Beleshazzari bwe yanhwa omwenge n'aghezaamu, yaalagira baje baleete ebikopo bya zaabu n'ebya feeza, lata we Nebukadinezzari bye yatoola mu isinzizo e Yerusalemu olwo nga Beleshazzari oyo ayenda, mwene, n'abakungu be, ni bakazi be ab'omu ndhu n'ab'embali, babinhweremu." 
Daniel5:3 Agho baaja baaleeta ebikopo bya zaabu Nebukadinezzari bye yatoola mu isinzizo, endhu ya Katonda mu Yerusalemu. Kyabazinga mwene, n'abakungu be, ni bakazi be ab'omu ndhu n'ab'embali, baabinhweramu." 
Daniel5:4 Baanhwa omwenge era baasaaka ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda abyakolebwa mu zaabu, ni mu feeza, ni mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, ni mu kyuma ekigumu einho, ni mu miti, ni mu mabaale." 
Daniel5:5 Baaja okulinga bati nga babona omukono ogw'omuntu oguli kughandiika ku seminti ye baakuba ku kimante eky'ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga. Omukono ogwo gwali guli kughandiika gha mberi gh'ekikondo eky'entaala, era kyabazinga yaabona bukalamu nga guli kughandiika." 
Daniel5:6 Agho kyabazinga amaiso gaamumyuka, yaatya inho, amagulu gaamudhugumira, n'ebikiryaivu byakontagana." 
Daniel5:7 Yaayasiikana yaayetesa abalaguzi, abasamize, ab'amaghembe, n'abo abeetegereza ebiri ku igulu. Abagezigezi abo ab'omu Babiloni bwe baatuuka, kyabazinga yaabakoba ati: “Omuntu yeenayeena anaasoma ekighandiiko ekyo, n'ankobera amakulu gaakyo, baidha kumuvaaza engoye edh'erangi ya nakasooma, bamute n'omukuufu ogwa zaabu mu nkoto, era bamukuze abe omufuzi ow'eidaala eryokusatu mu bwakyabazinga bwange.”" 
Daniel5:8 Agho abagezigezi abo boonaboona aba kyabazinga baaseeta, aye baaloba kusobola kusoma kighandiiko ekyo waire okukobera kyabazinga amakulu gaakyo." 
Daniel5:9 Kyabazinga Beleshazzari yaayongera okutya einho, amaiso gaayongera okumumyuka, n'abakungu be baasoberwa." 
Daniel5:10 Inhina wa kyabazinga bwe yawulira okwasiikana kwa kyabazinga n'okw'abakungu be okwali mu kisenge eky'embaga, yaingira mu kisenge ekyo. Inhina wa kyabazinga oyo yaakoba ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ghangaala byanda na byanda! Leka kutya inho otyo, na maiso kukumyuka gatyo." 
Daniel5:11 Mu bwakyabazinga bwo mulimu omusaadha aliku omwoyo ogwa bakatonda abatukuvu. Mu biseera bya lata wo kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari, omusaadha oyo yeeyoleka okuba omuntu alengera eghala, ng'ali n'okutegeera, era ng'ali n'amagezi agali ng'oti n'aga bakatonda. Era kyabazinga Nebukadinezzari oyo lata wo, yaamufuula okuba omukulu ow'abalaguzi, abasamize, ab'amaghembe, n'abo abeetegereza ebiri ku igulu." 
Daniel5:12 Omusaadha oyo akola ebintu n'obusobozi obubitirivu, ali n'amagezi, n'obukugu mu kuvuunula ebirooto, n'okwinhonhola amakulu ag'ebintu ebizibu ebyagisibwa. Kale ni ka beete Danieli oyo kyabazinga ye yatuuma eriina Beluteshazzari, oyo n'aidha okukukobera amakulu g'ekighandiiko ekyo.”" 
Daniel5:13 Agho baaleeta Danieli mu maiso ga kyabazinga. Kyabazinga yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe Danieli, owundi ku bantu lata wange kyabazinga be yanhaga e Buyudaaya n'abaleeta eno?" 
Daniel5:14 Nawulira nga bakwogeraku bati oliku omwoyo gwa bakatonda abatukuvu, era bati weeyoleka okuba omuntu alengera eghala, ng'ali n'okutegeera, era ng'ali n'amagezi agabitiriire." 
Daniel5:15 Mpegaano mbaire naakamala okwetesa abagezigezi n'abasamize, era baabandeetera ghano basome ekighandiiko ekyo, bankobere n'amakulu gaakyo, aye tibasoboire kuzuula makulu ago." 
Daniel5:16 Aye mpuliire mbu iwe osobola okuvuunula amakulu ag'omunda einho n'okwinhonhola ebintu ebizibu ebyagisibwa. Kale bw'onaasobola okusoma ekighandiiko ekyo, n'onkobera amakulu gaakyo, baidha kukuvaaza engoye edh'erangi ya nakasooma, bakute n'omukuufu ogwa zaabu mu nkoto, era bakukuze obe omufuzi ow'eidaala eryokusatu mu bwakyabazinga bwange.”" 
Daniel5:17 Agho Danieli yaamwiramu ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ebirabo byo bisigaze iwe mwene, oba obighe omuntu owundi. Aye nze ndidha kukusomera ekighandiiko ekyo, nkukobere n'amakulu gaakyo." 
Daniel5:18 “Kale ni Isebantu kyabazinga, wulira: oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene yagha lata wo Nebukadinezzari okuba kyabazinga omukologho, ow'ekitiisa, era ow'amaani." 
Daniel5:19 Era olw'okuba yamugha okuba omukologho, ekyo kyaleetera abantu boonaboona, abava mu maghanga goonagoona, era aboogera enimi dhoonadhoona, okumutyanga n'okudhugumiranga mu maiso ge. Oyo ye yayendanga okwita ng'amwita, ate ye yayendanga okulekagho ng'akaali mulamu ng'amulekagho ng'akaali mulamu. Oyo ye yayendanga akugha ekitiisa ng'akimugha, ate ye yayendanga okukimutoolaku ng'akimutoolaku yaamuleetera okunhoomebwa." 
Daniel5:20 Aye bwe yatoolera okwekuluntaza, n'akalangusa omwoyo gwe nga takaagondera biragiro, Katonda oyo yaamutoola ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, era yaamutoolaku n'ekitiisa kye yali nakyo." 
Daniel5:21 Era yaamubinga yaamutoola mu bantu, ebidhuubo bye byafuulibwa ng'eby'ensolo, yaatoolera okubanga mu nsiko ghalala n'endogoyi edh'omu nsiko, yaalyanga eisubi ng'oti nte, n'omusulo oguva ku igulu gwamukubanga yaabola. Byaba bityo okutuusa lwe yamanha ng'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene n'afuga obwakyabazinga obw'abantu. Era ng'abugha oyo y'ayenda yeenayeena." 
Daniel5:22 “Aye iwe Beleshazzari, mutabane we, weena tiweewombeeseeku naire, waire ng'ebyo byonabyona wabimanha." 
Daniel5:23 Weekuluntaliiza ku Musengwa ow'eigulu. Waalagira baaleeta ebikopo ebyatoolebwa mu isinzizo lye, olwo iwe mwene n'abakungu bo, ni bakazi bo ab'omu ndhu n'ab'embali, mwabinhweramu omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Era mwasaaka ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, ebitabona, waire okuwulira, oba okutegeera, bye baakola obw'omu zaabu, ni mu feeza, ni mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, ni mu kyuma ekigumu einho, ni mu miti, ni mu mabaale. Aye mwaloba kuta kitiisa mu Katonda oyo agemereire obulamu bwaimwe era abalabirira mu buli nsambo." 
Daniel5:24 Kale kyaviire n'atuma omukono ogwo okwidha okukola ekighandiiko ekyo. 
Daniel5:25 “Bino n'ebighandiikiibwa: ‘OKUBALA, OKUBALA, OKUPIMA, OKUGABANIA.’" 
Daniel5:26 Amakulu gaabyo ni gano: ‘OKUBALA,’ Katonda amaze okubala enaku edh'obwakyabazinga bwo, yaabona nga dhiwoireku." 
Daniel5:27 ‘OKUPIMA,’ Katonda akupimye ku minzaani, yaabona ng'oli muwewere inho, okaabulaku." 
Daniel5:28 ‘OKUGABANIA,’ obwakyabazinga bwo abugabainiamu ghabiri, yaabugha Abamedi n'Abaperusi.”" 
Daniel5:29 Agho Beleshazzari yaalagira baavaaza Danieli engoye edh'erangi ya nakasooma, baamuta n'omukuufu ogwa zaabu mu nkoto, era yaamukuza okuba omufuzi ow'eidaala eryokusatu mu bwakyabazinga." 
Daniel5:30 Obwire bwene obwo Beleshazzari oyo, kyabazinga Omubabilonia, yaitibwa." 
Daniel5:31 Dario Omumedi, yaafuuka kyabazinga wa Babilonia ng'agheza emyaka oti nkaaga n'ebiri egy'obukulu." 
Daniel6:1 Agho Dario yaasalagho okutaagho abafuzi ab'amasaza kikumi n'abiri (120), bafugenga mu bwakyabazinga bwe bwonabwona." 
Daniel6:2 Abafuzi abo yaabataaku abakungu basatu ab'oku ntwiko okubakuliranga, olwo kyabazinga alobe kufiirizibwanga mu mirimo egikolebwa mu bwakyabazinga bwe. Danieli yali mulala ku bakungu abasatu abo." 
Daniel6:3 Mu kiseera kitono kiti, Danieli oyo yaaboneka ng'asinga bakungu baine bale ab'oku ntwiko ababiri, ghalala n'abafuzi ab'amasaza, mu kukola emirimo obulungi kuba yalimu omwoyo omulungi einho. Era olw'okuba yali akola bulungi atyo, kyabazinga yali ategeka okumugha okukuliranga obwakyabazinga bwonabwona." 
Daniel6:4 Bakungu baine bale ab'oku ntwiko ababiri, ghalala n'abafuzi ab'amasaza, baanoonia bazuuleyo ekintu eky'okwemuluguunhia ku Danieli ku bigemagana n'obwakyabazinga. Aye baalemwa okufuna kye banaavaaku okumwemuluguunhiaku, kuba yali mwesigwa, ng'azira nsobi y'akola waire okuba n'ekikyamu ky'akola." 
Daniel6:5 Agho abasaadha abo, owundi yaakobanga baine ati: “Bana, tituja kufuna kya kwemuluguunhia ku Danieli, okutoolaku nga kigema ku mateeka ga Katonda we.”" 
Daniel6:6 Kale baaja ye kyabazinga nga bali ghalala, baamukoba bati: “Isebantu kyabazinga Dario, ghangaala byanda na byanda!" 
Daniel6:7 Ife abakungu ab'oku ntwiko mu bwakyabazinga bwo, n'ab'amasaza, n'abawi b'amagezi, n'ab'amagombolola, twisainia tuti oteegho ekiragiro era obone nga kiteebwa mu nkola. Kibe nti okumala enaku amakumi asatu, omuntu anaasaba katonda yeenayeena, oba n'asaba omuntu owundi yeenayeena atali iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, asuulibwe mu kiina omuli empologoma." 
Daniel6:8 Mpegaano ni, Isebantu kyabazinga, kola ekighandiiko eky'ekiragiro ekyo okiteeku n'ekinkumu, kibe nga tikisoboka kukyusibwamu, ng'oti n'amateeka ag'Abamedi n'Abaperusi bwe gatamenhebwagho naire.”" 
Daniel6:9 Agho kyabazinga Dario yaakola ekighandiiko eky'ekiragiro ekyo, yaakitaaku n'ekinkumu." 
Daniel6:10 Danieli bwe yamanha ng'ekighandiiko eky'ekiragiro ekyo kiteirebwaku ekinkumu, yairayo eka ewuwe mu ndhu ye. Amadinisa ag'endhu eyo ag'omu kisenge ekya ghaigulu, gaali nti bwe gaigulwanga nga galingirira okwolekera Yerusalemu. Kale bwe yatuuka eyo yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaasaba era yeebaza Katonda we nga bwe yakolanga okuva eira, emikuzi esatu buli lunaku." 
Daniel6:11 Agho abasaadha abo baaja nga bali ghalala, baamubona ng'ali kusaba era ng'alikweghemba Katonda we." 
Daniel6:12 Era baamala baaja ye kyabazinga baayogera ku kiragiro kye yakola. Baamukoba bati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, tiwata kinkumu ku kiragiro ekikoba kiti okumala enaku amakumi asatu, omuntu anaasaba katonda yeenayeena, oba n'asaba omuntu owundi yeenayeena atali iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, asuulibwe mu kiina omuli empologoma.” Kyabazinga yaabairamu ati: “Ekyo kituufu, era ekiragiro ekyo tikisoboka kukyusibwamu naire, ng'oti n'amateeka ag'Abamedi n'Abaperusi bwe gatamenhebwagho.”" 
Daniel6:13 Agho baakoba kyabazinga bati: “Danieli oyo, omulala ku bantu abaanhagibwa e Buyudaaya, takutaamu kitiisa iwe Isebantu waire okugondera ekiragiro kye wataaku ekinkumu. Era asaba Katonda we emikuzi esatu buli lunaku.”" 
Daniel6:14 Kyabazinga bwe yawulira ebyo enaku yaamugema inho. Yaasala amagezi goonagoona okuwonia Danieli, okutuusa endhuba bwe yagwa." 
Daniel6:15 Abasaadha abo era bairayo ye kyabazinga nga bali ghalala, baamukoba bati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, idhukira nga mu mateeka ag'Abamedi n'Abaperusi, ezira kiragiro kiteereibwagho kyabazinga kisobola kumenhebwagho.”" 
Daniel6:16 Kale kyabazinga yaalagira batoole Danieli bamusuule mu kiina omwali empologoma. Kyabazinga yaakoba Danieli ati: “Katonda wo oyo y'ogheereza n'obwesigwa akuwonie!” 
Daniel6:17 Baaleeta eibaale baalisemba gha munwa ogw'ekiina ekyo. Kyabazinga yaalisibaku akamanhiso ak'empeta ye ey'obwakyabazinga era yaalisibaku n'akamanhiso aka bakungu be, ghalobe kubaagho ekikyusibwamu ku bigema ku Danieli." 
Daniel6:18 Agho kyabazinga yairayo mu kisaagaati kye. Yaamala obwire obwo nga taliire ku mere, waire okuganha bamuleetere ebisanhusa n'endoolo dhaamubula." 
Daniel6:19 Ku nkyo einho, kyabazinga yaasituka yaayanguyirira okuja ku kiina omwali empologoma." 
Daniel6:20 Ng'ali kumpi okutuuka ku kiina ekyo Danieli mwe yali, yaayeta mu mamiro ag'enaku ati: “Wo Danieli, iwe omugheereza wa Katonda omulamu, Katonda wo y'ogheereza n'obwesigwa yasoboire okukuwonia empologoma?”" 
Daniel6:21 Danieli yaamwiramu ati: “Isebantu kyabazinga, ghangaala byanda na byanda!" 
Daniel6:22 Katonda wange yatumye malaika we, yaaziba eminwa egy'empologoma dhaaloba kunkolaku kabi koonakoona, kuba mu maiso ga Katonda oyo nze nziraku musango gwonagwona. Era ni mu maiso go, iwe Isebantu kyabazinga, ghazira kibi kye nakola.”" 
Daniel6:23 Agho kyabazinga yaasangaala ebitaloodheka era yaalagira batoole Danieli mu kiina omwali empologoma. Kale baamutoolayo mu kiina ekyo nga ghazira kabi koonakoona kamutuuseeku, kuba yeesiga Katonda we." 
Daniel6:24 Kyabazinga yaalagira baaleeta abasaadha bale abaaghaayiriza Danieli, baabasuula mu kiina ekyo omwali empologoma, ghalala ni bakazi baibwe, n'abaana baibwe. Era baabanga bakaali na kutuuka ku ntobo ya kiina ekyo, ng'empologoma dhaabamemeine ira amagumba goonagoona." 
Daniel6:25 Ebyo nga biwoire, kyabazinga Dario yaaghandiikira abantu boonaboona, abava mu maghanga goonagoona, era aboogera enimi dhoonadhoona, ati: “Emiraala gyeyongerenga okuba mu imwe." 
Daniel6:26 Ndi kugha ekiragiro nti mu biketezo byonabyona ebiri mu bwakyabazinga bwange, abantu boonaboona batyenga Katonda wa Danieli, bamutengamu ekitiisa. Kuba oyo ni Katonda omulamu, aligho ebyanda n'ebyanda. Obwakyabazinga bwe ghazira asobola kubuzikiriza, n'obukumu bwe tibuliwaagho." 
Daniel6:27 Awonia era yaalokola abantu, yaakola obumanhiso n'ebyewuunhio mu igulu ni mu nsi. Era n'awoniiza Danieli okwitibwa empologoma.”" 
Daniel6:28 Kale Danieli oyo ebintu byaba nga bimujiira bukalamu mu biseera Dario Omumedi, ni Kuro Omuperusi, bye baafugiramu." 
Daniel7:1 Mu mwaka ogusooka nga kyabazinga Beleshazzari n'afuga Babilonia, Danieli bwe yali ng'alambaire mu buliri bwe yaabonekerwa mu kirooto. Bwe yamala yaaghandiika ekirooto ekyo ng'akoba byonabyona nga bwe byali." 
Daniel7:2 Yakoba ati: Mu kubonekerwa kwange kwe nafuna obwire, naja okulinga nti nga mbona empewo ng'eri kuva ghaigulu ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona, yaasiikuula enhandha enkologho." 
Daniel7:3 Ebisolo ebikologho bina byakukunuka okuva mu nhandha eyo, nga buli kirala kifaanana bwakyo." 
Daniel7:4 Ekyasooka nga kiri ng'oti mpologoma, aye nga kiri n'amaghagha ng'oti ga nkookooma. Bwe nali nga nkaalingiriire, baakimaanhuulaku amaghagha. Baamala baakisitusa, baakyemereza ku magulu abiri ng'oti muntu, era baakigha okulowooza ng'oti kwa muntu." 
Daniel7:5 Kabiri naja okulinga nti nga mbona ekisolo ekyokubiri ekikambwe. Kyali kisitwikeku oluuyi olundi aye ng'olundi luli ku itaka. Era nga kiri n'embavu isatu mukanwa dhe kigemereire n'amaino gaakyo. Baakikoba bati: “Situka olye emamba nhingi.” 
Daniel7:6 Nali nkaalingirira ekyo, okuja okubona ng'eri kuvaayo ekisolo ekindi ekifaanana ng'oti mpala. Kyali n'amaghagha ana agali ng'oti ga nhonhi ku mugongo gwakyo, era nga kiri n'emitwe ena. Ekisolo ekyo baakigha obuyinza okufuga." 
Daniel7:7 Ebyo nga biwoire, kabiri naja okulinga nti nga mbona ekisolo ekyokuna, nga kitiisa inho kyagemya n'entete, era nga kiri n'amaani amabitirivu. Kyali n'amaino amakologho nga ga kyuma ekigumu einho. Nga kikaavuula bye kyagaaniriiza, kyabimenhamenha, era kyatyankirira ebifiiseegho n'ebigere byakyo. Kyali nga kyawukana inho ku bisolo bire ebisatu ebyasooka, nga kiri n'amayiga ikumi." 
Daniel7:8 Nali nkeerolera amayiga ago, okuja okulinga nti nga mbona akayiga akatono nga kali kukukunuka okuva mu ago eikumi. Era kaamala kaighagho amayiga asatu ku ago eikumi agaasookagho. Akayiga ako kaaliku amaiso ng'oti ga muntu, era kaabaaku n'omunwa nga guli kwogera eby'okwesuutasuuta." 
Daniel7:9 Nali nkaalingirira ebyo, baataagho ebityamo eby'obwakyabazinga. Oyo eyaligho okuva eira n'eira yaatyama ku kindi ku bityamo ebyo. Ebivaalo bye byali byeru ng'oti mugozi, n'enviiri dhe dhaaba ndheru ng'oti buviiri bwa ntaama. Ekityamo kye ekyo nga kiriku enkede edhivaaku omuliro, n'ekityamo kyene kyavaaku enimi edh'omuliro." 
Daniel7:10 Ghamberi ghe nga ghali kuvaagho omuliro ogw'amaani ng'oti n'amaadhi bwe gawolomboka mu mwiga. Abantu enkumi n'enkumi nga bali kumugheereza, n'abantu emitwalo n'emitwalo baayemerera agho mu maiso ge. Okusala emisango kwatoolera, n'ebitabo byawumbululwa." 
Daniel7:11 Bwe nali nga nkaalingiriire, naawulira ng'akayiga kali kwogera eby'okwesuutasuuta. Naja okubona ng'ekisolo ekyokuna bakiise, omulambo gwakyo gwagheebwayo okwokebwa omuliro." 
Daniel7:12 Ebisolo bire ebindi baabitoolaku obukumu bwabyo obw'okufuga, aye baabireka byasigala nga bikaali biramu okumala ekiseera ekigere." 
Daniel7:13 Mu kubonekerwa okw'omu bwire obwo, naja okulinga nti nga mbona afaanana ng'oti mwana wa muntu, ng'ali kwidhira mu bire. Era yaaja y'Oyo eyaligho okuva eira n'eira, baamwandhulayo." 
Daniel7:14 Era baamugha obukumu, ekitiisa, n'obwakyabazinga. Olwo abantu boonaboona abava mu maghanga goonagoona, era aboogera enimi dhoonadhoona, basobole okumugheerezanga. Obufuzi bwe tibukoma, bubaagho byanda na byanda, era obwakyabazinga bwe tibalibuzikiriza." 
Daniel7:15 Nze Danieli neeraliikirira era naatya olw'okubonekerwa okwo. 
Daniel7:16 Kale naatuukirira owundi ku bantu abaali beemereire agho, naamubuuza ekituufu ekigema ku kubonekerwa okwo. Agho yankobera amakulu g'ebyo bye nabonekerwa, ati:" 
Daniel7:17 “Ebisolo ebyo ebikologho ebina, bitegeeza bakyabazinga abana abalibaagho mu nsi." 
Daniel7:18 Aye abatukuvu b'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, baligheebwa obwakyabazinga bwaba bwaibwe ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Daniel7:19 Agho naayenda okumanha ekituufu ekigema ku kisolo ekyokuna ekyali eky'endhawulo ku bire ebindi byonabyona. Ekyali nga kitiisa einho, era ng'amaino gaakyo ga kyuma ekigumu einho, n'enkumu dhaakyo dhaaba dha kyuma eky'ekikomo. Nga kikaavuula bye kyagaaniriiza, kyabimenhamenha, era kyatyankirira ebifiiseegho n'ebigere byakyo." 
Daniel7:20 Era naayenda okumanha ebigema ku mayiga eikumi agaali ku mutwe gwakyo. Mmanhe n'ebigema ku iyiga lire erindi eryamera, ni ligwisa ghansi amayiga asatu ku ago eikumi. Eiyiga eryo lyaliku amaiso, era lyabaaku n'omunwa nga guli kwogera eby'okwesuutasuuta. Era eiyiga eryo nga libonekera okuba eigumu okusinga gale agandi." 
Daniel7:21 Nali nkeerolera eiyiga eryo, lyatanula olutalo ku batukuvu ba Katonda era lyabaghangula." 
Daniel7:22 Agho Oyo eyaligho okuva eira n'eira yaidha, yaasala omusango, era abatukuvu b'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene baagusinga. Era ekiseera kyamala kyatuuka abatukuvu abo baagheebwa obwakyabazinga." 
Daniel7:23 Agho yaaninhonhola ati: “Ekisolo ekyokuna buliba bwakyabazinga obwokuna obulibaagho ku nsi, nga bwa ndhawulo ku bundi bwonabwona. Obwakyabazinga obwo bulimaamira ensi yoonayoona, bwagityankirira era bwagimenhamenha." 
Daniel7:24 Ate amayiga ago eikumi, ni bakyabazinga eikumi abaliidhagho ni bafuga obwakyabazinga obwo. Era ghalimala ghaidhagho owundi ng'abo baviireku, aliba ow'endhawulo ku abo abaamusookagho. Oyo alighangulaku bakyabazinga basatu ku abo." 
Daniel7:25 Alyogera bubi ku oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, era yaadaazadaaza abatukuvu b'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene. Aligezaaku okukyusa ebibinuko ebyabalagirwa n'amateeka agaabagheebwa. Era abantu ba Katonda abo baliba mu buyinza bwe okumala emyaka esatu n'ekitundu." 
Daniel7:26 Aye ghalibaagho okutyama mu igulu okumusalira omusango, obufuzi bwe baabumutoolaku era baamuzikiriza okumumaliragho irala." 
Daniel7:27 Olwo obwakyabazinga, n'obukumu, n'ekitiisa, ebiri ghansi gh'eigulu, balibigha abatukuvu b'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene. Obwakyabazinga bwaibwe buliba bwa byanda na byanda, era abafuzi boonaboona ab'ensi balibagonderanga baabagheereza.”" 
Daniel7:28 Ebyo agho ghe byakoma. Era nze Danieli naatya inho mule, n'okusiiwuuka naasiiwuuka. Aye era ebintu ebyo naabita ku mwoyo." 
Daniel8:1 Mu mwaka ogwokusatu ogw'obufuzi bwa kyabazinga Beleshazzari, nze Danieli nafuna okubonekerwa okwairirira kule okwasooka." 
Daniel8:2 Mu kubonekerwa kuno naja okulinga nti, nga mbona ndi mu Susa ekibuga ekyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu, ekyali mu kiketezo ky'e Elamu. Nali nga nhemereire ku mbali okw'omwiga Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 Okuja okulinga nti, nga mbona entaama enume eyemereire ku mbali okw'omwiga. Yaliku amayiga abiri nga gombi maleeyi, aye nga erindi ireeyi ku okusingaku liinaalyo. Era eryo eireeyi okusingaku liinaalyo n'eryasembayo okumera." 
Daniel8:4 Naabona entaama eyo ng'eri kulumba yaafula mu biketezo eby'oku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba, ni mu by'oku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ni mu by'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. Ghaabulagho ensolo yoonayoona eyasobola okugirwanisa, waire okubaagho asobola okugirekuza ekintu ekiri mu buyinza bwayo. Nga buli ky'eyenda ky'ekola, era nga yeekudumbazakudumbaza." 
Daniel8:5 Nali nkeefumintiriza ku makulu g'ebyo, okuja okulinga nti nga mbona embuzi enume ng'eri kuva e bugwandhuba. Yali eri kuziinhuuka embiro, nga n'ebigere byayo tibiri kutuuka ku itaka. Era ng'eri n'eiyiga eriboneekerera irala liti, nga liri ghagati gh'amaiso gaayo." 
Daniel8:6 Yaalumuka n'amaani mu busungu okuja okulumba entaama enume ere eyali n'amayiga abiri, ye nabona ng'eyemereire ku mbali okw'omwiga." 
Daniel8:7 Naagibona ng'eri kulumba entaama enume eyo n'obusungu obungi, yaagifula n'amayiga gaayo gombi gaamenheka. Entaama eyo tiyali na maani ga kulwanisa mbuzi eyo. Kale embuzi yaagisuula ghansi ku itaka, yaagityankirira. Ghaabulagho eyasobola okuwonia entaama eyo." 
Daniel8:8 Embuzi enume eyo yeeyongera okwekudumbaza ekibitiriire. Aye bwe yali ekeeragalaga nga bw'eri n'amaani amangi, eiyiga lyayo eikologho lyamenheka. Mu kifo kyalyo ghaakukunukagho amayiga agandi agaboneekerera ana, nga gasonse mu ibbanga ku ndhuyi eina edh'ensi." 
Daniel8:9 Ghaabaagho akayiga akatono akaakukunuka okuva mu lindi ku mayiga ago ana, kaakula kaaba ka maani inho era obuyinza bwako bwamaamira mu buvandhuba, ni ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, ni ku luuyi olw'ensi ey'ekitiisa." 
Daniel8:10 Akayiga ako kaakula kaaba ka maani inho, nga kasobola n'okulumba eigye ery'omu igulu. Kaalumba edhindi ku muunienie edh'oku igulu, kaadhisuula ghansi kaadhityankirira." 
Daniel8:11 Keekudumbaza inho, kaatuuka n'okwesonsa ku Mulangira akulira amagye ag'omu igulu. Kaalekera agho okumugha ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ebya buli lunaku, kaayonoona n'eisinzizo lye." 
Daniel8:12 Kaatoolagho ensinza entuufu, kaataagho ensinza etakania okughaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ebya buli lunaku. Olwo kaakolanga buli kye kaayendanga, era ebintu byakajiiranga bukalamu." 
Daniel8:13 Agho naawulira omutukuvu mulala ng'ali kwogera. Era omutukuvu owundi yaabuuza ole eyayogera ati: “Ebyo ebiboneibwa mu kubonekerwa biribaagho kutuuka li? Ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ebya buli lunaku birimala kiseera ki nga bikaali kwizibwagho? Okwonoona kulizikiriza ensi kutuuka li? Eigye ery'omu igulu n'eisinzizo birityankirirwa kutuuka li?” 
Daniel8:14 Ole yairamu ati: “Okumala enaku enkumi ibiri na bisatu (2,300) enkyo n'eigulo, memale eisinzizo litukuzibwe.”" 
Daniel8:15 Nze Danieli, bwe namala okubona ebyali mu kubonekerwa okwo, naagezaaku okutegeera amakulu gaabyo. Naja okulinga nti nga mbona agho emberi wange ekyemereire ng'oti muntu." 
Daniel8:16 Naawulira amamiro ag'omuntu nga gava ghagati mu mwiga Ulai, gaayeta gati: “Gaburieli, kobera omusaadha oyo amakulu g'ebyo by'aboine.”" 
Daniel8:17 Kale Gaburieli yaaseeta ghe nali nhemereire. Bwe yaidha naatya inho, naakuba amakiryaivu era naakutama n'ekyeni kyatuuka ku itaka. Yankoba ati: “Iwe omuntu obuntu, tegeera ng'okubonekerwa okwo kugema ku biseera bya nkomerero ya nsi.”" 
Daniel8:18 Bwe yali ali kwogera ninze, nze neeyala agho ku itaka nga neefundiike, endoolo enhingi einho dhangema. Aye yangemaku yaanhemereza ku magulu gange." 
Daniel8:19 Yankoba ati: “Bona, nja kukwoleka ebiribaagho Katonda ng'asungughaire. Okubonekerwa okwo kw'oboine kugema ku biseera ebyategekebwa okuba eby'enkomerero y'ensi." 
Daniel8:20 “Entaama enume ebaire n'amayiga abiri y'oboine, etegeeza obwakyabazinga bwa Media n'obw'e Perusia." 
Daniel8:21 Embuzi enume etegeeza obwakyabazinga bwa Bugureki, ate eiyiga eikologho mu bweni bwayo lyategeeza kyabazinga eyasooka ow'ensi eyo Bugureki." 
Daniel8:22 Amayiga ana agaameze mu kifo kya lire eirala eryamenheike, gategeeza obwakyabazinga obuna obuliidhagho nga bule obwa Bugureki bugabaniziibwamu. Aye obwakyabazinga obwo obuna tibuliba bwa maani ng'oti ni bule obwasooka." 
Daniel8:23 “Enkomerero y'obwakyabazinga obwo bw'eriba ng'eri kumpi okutuuka, era nga n'abantu babitiriiza inho okukola ebibi, ghaliidhagho kyabazinga amoga obukambwe era omukuyikuyi einho." 
Daniel8:24 Aliba wa buyinza inho, aye ng'obuyinza obwo ti bubwe ku bubwe. Alireetagho okuzikirira okutiisa einho era byonabyona by'alikola birimujiira bukalamu. Alizikiriza abantu ab'amaani, n'abantu ba Katonda abatukuvu." 
Daniel8:25 Alikozesa olugezigezi lwe yaatuukiriza enkwe dh'ayenda okukola. Alyekudumbazanga era yaazinduukirizanga abantu kamaala nga tibeetegeike yaabazikiriza. Alituuka n'okulwanisa Kyabazinga asinga mu bakyabazinga boonaboona. Aye mwene talizikirizibwa na maani ga bantu buntu. 
Daniel8:26 Era okubonekerwa okugema ku misengo egigheebwayo enkyo n'eigulo kwe nkwinhonhoire, kwidha kutuukirira. Aye iwe kuuma ebiri mu kubonekerwa okwo nga bya kyama, kuba ghaidha kubitagho ekiseera kinene memale bituukirire.”" 
Daniel8:27 Nze Danieli amaani gampwamu, era naabeera irala mulwaire okumala enaku. Oluvainhuma naamala naasituka, naaja ku mirimo kyabazinga gye yampa. Aye okubonekerwa okwo kwasigala nga kukantabwire, nga tisobola kukutegeera naire." 
Daniel9:1 Mu mwaka ogwasooka nga kyabazinga Dario mutabane wa Ahasuero n'afuga Babilonia," 
Daniel9:2 nze Danieli nali ndi kwetegereza ebyaghandiikibwa ebitukuvu, naabona ng'emyaka gija kuba nsanvu, ekibuga Yerusalemu gye kiri n'okumala nga kisigaire bifulukwa byereere, nga Musengwa bwe yamanhisa Yeremia omulanzi." 
Daniel9:3 Agho naakyukira eri Musengwa Katonda wange, naamusaba nga mweghemba, naasiiba, naavaala ekutiya, era naatyama mu ivu." 
Daniel9:4 Naasaba Musengwa Katonda wange oyo nga ndhatula ebibi eby'abantu bange. Naakoba nti: “Musengwa Katonda wange, oli mukologho era ow'entiisa. Iwe okuuma endagaano yo era waagonza obutalekera abo abakugonza ni bagema ebiragiro byo." 
Daniel9:5 “Ife twakola ensobi, twayonoona, era twakola ebibi. Twadheema, era twakyuka twava ku mateeka go, ni ku by'otulagira." 
Daniel9:6 Titwawulirisa bagheereza bo abalanzi, abaayogeranga mu liina lyo eri bakyabazinga baife, n'eri abakulembeze baife, n'eri badhaadha baife, n'eri eighanga lyonalyona." 
Daniel9:7 Wo Musengwa, iwe buliidho okola ebituufu, aye ife buliidho twakola bwa bituleetera kuswala, nga bwekiri n'okutuusa mpegaano. Ekyo kiri ku twenatwena ng'otwaliizaamu: abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya, n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, n'Abaisiraeli boonaboona abali okumpi n'abali eghala, eyo mu nsi dhoonadhoona ye wabasansaaniza olw'obutaba beesigwa y'oli." 
Daniel9:8 Wo Musengwa, ife twenatwena ng'otwaliizaamu, bakyabazinga baife, n'abakulembeze baife, ni badhaadha baife, twakola ebibi y'oli byatuleetera okuswala." 
Daniel9:9 Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda waife osaasira era waasonigha, waire nga twakudheemera." 
Daniel9:10 Titwagondera ebyo iwe Musengwa Katonda waife bye watulagira, waire okujiira ku mateeka go ge watugha ng'obita mu bagheereza bo abalanzi." 
Daniel9:11 Abaisiraeli boonaboona baamenha amateeka go era baakyuka baakuvaaku, baaloba kugondera by'okoba. Olw'okuba twakola ebibi y'oli, kye wava n'otutuusaaku ebikolimo bye weerayirira okutusindikira, ebyaghandiikibwa mu mateeka ga Musa omugheereza wo." 
Daniel9:12 Otuukiriiza ekyo kye watwesoomera okutukola ife n'abafuzi abatufuga waatutuusaaku akabi akataloodheka, kuba wabonereza Yerusalemu ekibitiriire okusinga ebibuga ebindi byonabyona ebiri ghansi gh'eigulu." 
Daniel9:13 Aye waire akabi ako akaaghandiikibwa mu mateeka ga Musa kaatutuukaku, era titukweghembangaku iwe Musengwa Katonda waife otugemerwe ekivunika, waire okukyuka tuve mu bibi byaife tujiirenga ku mazima go." 
Daniel9:14 Kale ni kyewava n'otegeka okutusindikira akabi ako, era n'omala n'okatutuusaaku kuba iwe Musengwa Katonda waife buliidho okola bituufu, aye ife titugondera by'okoba." 
Daniel9:15 “Wo Musengwa Katonda waife, iwe watoola abantu bo mu nsi Misiri n'amaani go agataloodheka, era ni ye buli eno amaani go ago abantu bakaagaidhukira. Aye ife twayonoona y'oli twakola ebibi." 
Daniel9:16 Wo Musengwa, ku lwaife wakola ebintu kamaala ebyoleka ng'oli mutukuvu, kyenva ni nkusaba olekere okusungughalira einho otyo ekibuga kyo Yerusalemu, olusozi lwo olwo olutukuvu. Abantu boonaboona abali mu nsi edhitwezungulwire banhooma inho ekibuga kyo Yerusalemu, n'ife abantu bo twena baatunhooma, kuba ife ni badhaadha baife twayonoona." 
Daniel9:17 Wo Katonda waife, mperaano ni wulira okusaba kwange n'okwegayirira kwange, nze omugheereza wo. Nkweghemba ogemerwe ekisa eisinzizo lyo eryalekebwa agho lityo, olwo oyoleke ekitiisa kyo." 
Daniel9:18 Wo Katonda wange, tega kutu owulire, era ozibule amaiso obone nga ife bwetulekeibwa obwagho tutyo, n'ekibuga ekyetebwa ekikyo bwe kisigaire obwagho kityo. Tituli kukusaba lwa kuba twakola ebituufu, aye lwa kuba iwe oli n'okusaasira kungi inho." 
Daniel9:19 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ganha owulire. Wo Musengwa, ganha osonighe. Wo Musengwa Katonda, taayo inho omwoyo okoleregho. Otalwa naire. Tubeere olw'ekitiisa kyo, kuba ekibuga kino kikyo, n'abantu bano babo.”" 
Daniel9:20 Agho neeyongera okusaba, n'okwatula ebibi byange n'eby'abantu bange Abaisiraeli, n'okweghemba Musengwa Katonda wange, nga mmusaba aizeegho ekitiisa ky'olusozi lwe olutukuvu." 
Daniel9:21 Bwe nali nga nkaasaba naabona omuntu ole, Gaburieli, eyali mu kubonekerwa okwasooka. Yaaguluka yaidha ghe nali mu kiseera eky'okugheerayo emisengo egy'eigulo." 
Daniel9:22 Yaidha yankoba ati: “Danieli, ndidhie okukuyamba ofune amagezi otegeere." 
Daniel9:23 Bw'otooleire okusaba kwo, ghaligho Katonda ky'akwizeemu. Era ekyo kye ndidhie okukukobera, kuba oli mugonzi inho y'ali. Kale ni weetegereze nga nkwinhonhola, otegeere amakulu ag'okubonekerwa okwo." 
Daniel9:24 “Katonda yalagira ekiseera kya myaka nsanvu emikuzi musanvu ku bantu bo ni ku kibuga kyo ekitukuvu, memale okwonoona kukomezebwe, n'okukola ebibi kuweegho. Olwo ebyonoono bisoniyibwe, ghairegho okukola amazima ebyanda n'ebyanda, n'okubonekerwa n'obulanzi bituukirizibwe, era n'eisinzizo eitukuvu liiremu okutukuzibwa." 
Daniel9:25 Agho ni kimanhe era okitegeere ng'okuva ku kiseera ekiragiro eky'okuzimba Yerusalemu obuyaaka lwe kirigheebwa, okutuuka ku kwidha kw'omukulembeze omulonde wa Katonda, ghaja kubitagho emyaka nsanvu emikuzi musanvu. Olwo ghabeegho emyaka nkaaga n'ebiri emikuzi musanvu, egy'okuzimbiramu Yerusalemu obuyaaka, n'enguudo dhaakyo, n'ekimante ekigumu okukyezunguluza. Aye ekiseera ekyo kiriba kya bizibu." 
Daniel9:26 Ng'emyaka enkaaga n'ebiri emikuzi omusanvu gibiseegho, omukulembeze omulonde wa Katonda aja kwitibwa, aye ng'aziraku musango. Ghalibaagho omufuzi ow'amaani aliidha n'eigye lye, yaazikiriza ekibuga n'eisinzizo. Enkomerero ye eriba ng'oti maadhi ga mwiga ogubanze. Era ghalibaagho olutalo n'okuzikirizibwa." 
Daniel9:27 Omufuzi oyo alikola endagaano ey'amaani n'abantu kamaala okumala emyaka musanvu, era ghagati gh'emyaka egyo alirekeza okughaayo emisengo n'ebigheebwayo. Ole akola ogw'okuzikiriza alitaagho ku ntwiko y'eisinzizo Ekyenhinhalwa Ekizikiriza, okutuusa enkomerero eyategekerwa oyo azikiriza bw'erituuka.”" 
Daniel10:1 Mu mwaka ogwokusatu nga kyabazinga Kuro n'afuga Perusia, Katonda yaayoleka Danieli, ye baamutuuma eriina Beluteshazzari, obukwenda. Obukwenda obwo bwali bwa mazima aye nga bukalangafu inho okubutegeera. Aye yaamala yaabutegeera nga babumwinhonhoire mu kubonekerwa." 
Daniel10:2 Mu kiseera ekyo, nze Danieli namala wiiki isatu nga ndi mu nnaku." 
Daniel10:3 Nga tirya mere nungi, oba okulya emamba, oba okunhwa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, waire okwesiiga ebizigo, okumala wiiki edho eisatu enamba." 
Daniel10:4 Ku lunaku olwabiri n'eina olw'omwezi ogusooka mu mwaka, nali nhemereire ku mbali okw'omwiga omukologho Tiguri." 
Daniel10:5 Naja okulinga nti, nga mbona omusaadha ng'avaire engoye empegheevu, era nga yeesibye mu nkende olusibiro lwa zaabu ow'e Ufazi." 
Daniel10:6 Omubiri gwe gwali gumesunkana ng'oti ibaale lya mughendo eryetebwa berulo. Nga mu maiso amyensuuka ng'oti kughemya kwa lukuba. Amaiso ge nga gali ng'oti gaaka omuliro. Amakono ge n'amagulu ge nga gamirimiinha ng'oti kyuma kya kikomo ekizigule. Nga bw'ayogera, amamiro ge gaba ng'oti n'ag'olukunkumuli olw'abantu." 
Daniel10:7 Nze Danieli zenka, ninze nabona okubonekerwa okwo kuba abantu abaali ninze agho ghazira kye baabona naire, aye baadhugumira olw'okutya einho, baalumukagho baaja beegisa." 
Daniel10:8 Nze naasigala agho zenka nga ndi kubona okubonekerwa okwo okwewuunhisa einho, aye nga n'amaani ga mpoiremu. Nze eyabonekanga obulungi einho, naakyuka naabiigha inho era naaweeramu irala amaani." 
Daniel10:9 Agho naawulira amamiro ge. Era bwe nawulira amamiro ge ng'ali kwogera, naagwa ghansi kya bweni, nga tikaategeera naire. Naasigala agho nga neefundiikiriire." 
Daniel10:10 Naja okuba agho ng'omukono gungemaku okunsitusa, naaba ku bivu byange nga nsimbye amakono gange ghansi, era nga ndi kudhugumira." 
Daniel10:11 Malaika yankoba ati: “Danieli, oli mugonzi inho ye Katonda. Situka oyemerere weesimbe bukalamu, owulirise bye nja okukukoba, kuba ntumiibwa y'oli.” Bwe yamala okunkoba ebyo, nze naayemerera nga nkaadhugumira." 
Daniel10:12 Agho yankoba ati: “Danieli otatya, kuba Katonda awuliire okusaba kwo, okuviira irala ku lunaku lwe watoolera okwewombeeka mu maiso ge ng'oyenda okutegeera obukwenda obw'okubonekerwa. Era nze ndidhie olw'okusaba kwo okwo." 
Daniel10:13 Malaika omukuumi w'obwakyabazinga bw'e Perusia yamala enaku amakumi abiri na lulala (21) nga tali kunganha kwidha, okutuusa Mikaeli owundi ku bamalaika abakulu bwe yaidha n'anhamba. Naamala naamulekayo eyo ng'ali ghalala ni bakyabazinga b'e Perusia." 
Daniel10:14 Ndidhie okukuyamba otegeere ebirituuka ku bantu bo ye bwidha kuba bye wabona mu kubonekerwa, byakubaagho mu biseera eby'oluvainhuma.”" 
Daniel10:15 Bwe yankoba ebyo, nze naisa amaiso naalingirira ghansi, nga tisobola kwogera; nga ndi ng'oti kasiru." 
Daniel10:16 Agho malaika eyafaanana ng'oti muntu yangema ku munwa. Olwo naatoolera okwogera, naamukoba nti: “Isebo, okubonekerwa kuno kundeeteire okunakughala kungi, era kwamaliramu irala amaani." 
Daniel10:17 Kale nze omwiru wo, nnaasobola ntya okwogera n'iwe Musengwa wange? Tikaalimu maani waire okubaamu omuuka gwe mpeera.”" 
Daniel10:18 Agho kabiri yangemaku era naayongera okufuna amaani. 
Daniel10:19 Yankoba ati: “Iwe oli mugonzi inho ye Katonda, kale otatya. Ba mugumu era emiraala gibe n'iwe.” Bwe yankoba atyo, neeyongera okuwulira mule amaani era naamukoba nti: “Musengwa, yogera, kuba buti ondhiziizaamu amaani.”" 
Daniel10:20 Yambuuza ati: “Oidhi lwaki ndidhie y'oli? Mperaano ndidha kwirayo okulwanisa malaika omukuumi w'obwakyabazinga bw'e Perusia. Bwendimala okumughangula, olwo malaika omukuumi w'ensi Bugureki aliidha." 
Daniel10:21 Aye ndidha kukukobera ebyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo ekirimu eby'amazima. Ezira anhambaku kulwanisa bamalaika abo, okutoolaku Mikaeli, malaika oyo omukuumi w'ensi yaimwe Isiraeli." 
Daniel11:1 Nze nali ku luuyi lwe era naamugumya, mu mwaka ogwasooka nga kyabazinga Dario Omumedi n'afuga." 
Daniel11:2 Mperaano nja kukukobera amazima.” Agho malaika oyo yaayongera okukoba ati: “Bona, ghalisitukagho bakyabazinga abandi basatu mu nsi Perusia baagifuga. Era ghaamala ghaasitukagho kyabazinga owokuna, aliba omukombe einho okusinga abo boonaboona. Oyo bw'alimala okufuuka ow'amaani olw'obukombe bwe, alisiikuula abantu okulwanisa obwakyabazinga bw'e Bugureki." 
Daniel11:3 “Olwo ghalisitukagho kyabazinga ow'amaani alifuga ekiketezo ekinene einho, era nga ky'ayenda ky'akola." 
Daniel11:4 Aye oyo bw'alimala okwenhweza mu buyinza, obwakyabazinga bwe balibumenhagho era baabwawulamu mu ndhuyi eina edhiri ghansi gh'eigulu. Tibalibugha ba izaire lye, waire okubufuga n'obuyinza nga bwe yali nabwo; kuba obwakyabazinga bwe balibusalasalamu bwatwalibwa abantu abandi abatali ba izaire lye." 
Daniel11:5 “Kyabazinga wa Misiri aliba wa maani, aye owundi ku bakungu be aliba wa maani inho n'okumusinga. Era omukungu oyo alifuga ekiketezo ekinene einho eky'obwakyabazinga, okusinga kyabazinga oyo ky'aliba afuga." 
Daniel11:6 Nga ghabiseeghooku emyaka, kyabazinga wa Misiri alitaagho enkolagana ni kyabazinga wa Siria. Era olw'okunhweza enkolagana eyo alighaayo mughala we, aje afumbirwe kyabazinga wa Siria oyo. Aye obufumbo obwo tibulighangaala naire. Omughala oyo aliitibwa ghalala n'iba, n'omwana we, n'abagheereza abaliba bamugherekeireku boonaboona. Aye mu kiseera ekyo," 
Daniel11:7 owundi ku b'oku nda omughala oyo mw'asimuka, alifuuka kyabazinga. Yaaja yaalumba eigye lya kyabazinga wa Siria, yaingira mu kifo kya kyabazinga oyo eky'okwewogomamu, era yaabalwanisa yaabaghangula." 
Daniel11:8 Alinhaga ebifaananie bya bakatonda baibwe eby'ekyuma ekisaanuusiibwa, yairayo nabyo e Misiri ghalala n'ebintu bye bakozesa mu isinzizo eby'omughendo, ebya feeza ni zaabu. Alibisaagho emyaka nga talumba kyabazinga wa Siria." 
Daniel11:9 Nga ghabiseegho emyaka egyo, kyabazinga wa Siria alirumba kyabazinga w'e Misiri, aye yaamala yairayo mu nsi ye." 
Daniel11:10 “Batabane ba kyabazinga wa Siria oyo balitegeka okulwana olutalo, baasoloza eigye einene einho. Eigye eryo liriidha nga liri kubanda bubande ng'oti n'amaadhi ag'omwidhuzo, lyataalaala mu nsi eyo era lyatuukira irala ni mu kifo kya kyabazinga eky'okwewogomamu." 
Daniel11:11 Agho kyabazinga wa Misiri alivaayo n'obusungu yaaja okulwana ni kyabazinga wa Siria, yaaghangula eigye lya kyabazinga oyo einene einho." 
Daniel11:12 Bw'alimala okughangula eigye einene lityo, alyewulira mule nga wa maani, era aliita enkumi n'enkumi edh'abantu. Aye obughanguzi bwe tibulirwagho naire." 
Daniel11:13 “Kyabazinga wa Siria aliirayo yaasoloza eigye erindi einene okusinga lire eryasooka. Era nga ghabiseegho emyaka, aliira n'eigye ery'amaani n'eby'okulwanisa kamaala." 
Daniel11:14 Era mu biseera ebyo abantu kamaala balisituka okulwanisa kyabazinga w'e Misiri. Era, Danieli, abantu abakambwe okuva mu nsi yo baligezaaku okudheema olw'okubonekerwa kwe balibonekerwa, aye tibalisobola." 
Daniel11:15 Agho kyabazinga wa Siria aliidha yaabungisa emungo y'eitaka ku kimante ekigumu ekyezungulwire ekibuga, ey'okuniiniraku okukirwanisa, era yaakigema. Abaisirukale ab'omu igye ly'e Misiri baliba tibakaasobola kulwana. Ni bwebaba bale beene abasingiramu irala okulwana, tibaliba na maani gamala kwongera kulwana." 
Daniel11:16 Olwo kyabazinga wa Siria aliba ng'alumbye, alikola nga bw'ayenda nga ghazira amulobera naire. Alyemerera mu Nsi ey'Ekitiisa, era ensi eyo yoonayoona eriba mu buyinza bwe." 
Daniel11:17 “Kyabazinga oyo alikola entegeka, yaidha n'eigye ery'ensi ye lyonalyona nga mumalirivu okulumba. Alikola endagaano ey'emiraala ni kyabazinga w'e Misiri, era yaamugha mughala we amufumbirwe, olw'okwenda okuzikiriza obwakyabazinga bwe. Aye entegeka ye terimuyamba waire okutuukirira." 
Daniel11:18 Ebyo nga biwoire, alija yaalumba ebiketezo eby'oku nhandha era yaaghangula bingi ku byo. Aye ghalibaagho omuntu aliidha n'aduumira eigye, n'aghangula kyabazinga wa Siria oyo okumulekeza okwekuluntaza kwe. Era alimwesasuulizaaku olw'okwekuluntaza kwe okwo." 
Daniel11:19 Agho kyabazinga oyo alikyusa yairayo mu bifo eby'okwewogomamu eby'omu nsi ye. Aye balimughangula era eyo n'eriba enkomerero ye. 
Daniel11:20 “Ghalisitukagho kyabazinga owundi yaasikira oyo, era yaatuma omukungu we okuja okubinika abantu emisolo olw'okwenda okukombaghaza obwakyabazinga bwe. Aye mu kiseera ekitali kireeyi kyabazinga oyo balimwita aghazira nkaayana oba olutalo.”" 
Daniel11:21 Agho malaika yaayongera okwinhonhola ati: “Kyabazinga wa Siria aliiragho mu kifo ky'oyo, aliba muntu anhoomebwa era atagwanira kuba kyabazinga naire. Alirebereza abantu, yaabalimbalimba, yaabaikirizisa nga tibaidhi, baaja okweidhuukiriza ng'afuuse kyabazinga." 
Daniel11:22 Alyeyaagho yaazikiriza kiisi muntu yeenayeena aligezaaku okumulwanisa, ni bw'aliba Omukulu wa Bakabona ba Katonda." 
Daniel11:23 Alirimbalimba abamaghanga agandi yaakola nabo endagaano, era yaafuuka wa maani, waire nga mwene aliba afuga kasi katono." 
Daniel11:24 Alirumba abantu b'omu biketezo ebisingamu kuba na bukombe, nga tibeetegeike naire. Era alikola ebintu ba ise ni badhaadha be bye bataakola. Yaagabania mu bantu be abamwikiririzaamu, omunhago ogw'ebintu n'ogw'abantu gw'alinhaga mu ntalo. Alikola entegeka okulumba ebifo eby'okwewogomamu, aye ekiseera kye kiriwaaku mangu." 
Daniel11:25 “Alisoloza eigye einene yaalitendeka n'obumalirivu, aje alirumbise kyabazinga w'e Misiri. Ni kyabazinga w'e Misiri oyo yeena alyetegeka okwerwanaku n'eigye einene ery'amaani einho, aye talighangula, kuba balimulyamu olukwe baamugemya." 
Daniel11:26 Abo beenebeene b'alya nabo ku kiiwulo, n'abalimuzikiriza. Balireetera abazigu be okughangula eigye lye, era baita abaisirukale be." 
Daniel11:27 Mu birowoozo bya bakyabazinga abo bombi, mulibaamu kintu kirala kya kukolaganaku bulabe kyonka. Buli muntu aliguya mwine, ate nga batyaime ku kiiwulo kirala. Aye bye benda tibalibifuna, kuba ekiseera Katonda kye yategeka okubituukirizaamu kiriba kikaali." 
Daniel11:28 Agho kyabazinga wa Siria aliirayo mu nsi ye ng'akukumbye omunhago omungi einho, era nga mumalirivu okumalagho mu bantu omwoyo ogw'okusinza Katonda. Alikola byonabyona nga bw'alyenda, memale yairayo mu nsi ye." 
Daniel11:29 “Ekiseera Katonda kye yategeka bwe kirituuka, kyabazinga wa Siria kabiri aliira yaalumba ensi Misiri. Aye ku mukuzi ogwo ebintu tibirimujiira nga ku lule," 
Daniel11:30 kuba abantu ab'e Rom balimwidhira nga bali mu maato, yaatya era yaaloba kweyongerayo. “Agho alikyuka okwirayo, yaamalira obusungu bwe ku kulekeza bantu kusinza Katonda, ng'ajiira ku magezi g'abo abaava eira ku kusinza Katonda." 
Daniel11:31 Abaisirukale be balija baayonoona eisinzizo n'ebifo byalyo eby'okwewogomamu, baalireetera okuba nga ti irongoofu. Balirekeza abantu okughaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ebya buli lunaku, baataagho Ekyenhinhalwa Ekizikiriza." 
Daniel11:32 Kyabazinga oyo aliwooyawooya era yaasuutiriza abo abaava eira ku kusinza Katonda. Aye abo abaidhi Katonda waibwe obukalamu, balisigala nga bagumu era beerwanaku." 
Daniel11:33 Abakulembeze abagezi mu ighanga balyegeresa abantu kamaala baaba bategeevu, waire nga ghalibitagho ekiseera ng'abandi ku bakulembeze abo baitibwa mu ntalo, abandi baayokebwa omuliro baafa, abandi baatwalibwa mu bunhage, n'abandi baanhagibwaku ebyaibwe." 
Daniel11:34 Mu kiseera ekyo ng'okwitibwa kukaaja mu maiso, abantu ba Katonda baliyambibwa katono inho. Era ghaligho abalibeeyimbaku, aye nga baidhwire nkwe." 
Daniel11:35 Abandi ku bakulembeze abagezi abo baliitibwa. Olwo okwitibwa kwaibwe okwo kwaleetera abantu okwamulwa, baatukuzibwa era baafuulibwa balongoofu. Ekyo kiribaagho okutuusa ekiseera eky'enkomerero Katonda mwene kye yategeka nga kimaze okutuuka." 
Daniel11:36 “Kyabazinga wa Siria oyo alikola nga bw'ayenda, yeegulumiza era yeekudumbaza ng'alowooza ati n'asinga bakatonda boonaboona. Alyogera ebintu ebitiisa einho ku Katonda asinga bakatonda boonaboona. Era ebintu birimujiira bukalamu okutuusa Katonda lw'alimumaliraku obusungu bwe kuba Katonda oyo kye yategeka kiri n'okutuukirira." 
Daniel11:37 Kyabazinga oyo talifaayo ku bakatonda ba badhaadha be, waire okufaayo ku katonda abakazi ye basinza, oba okufaayo ku katonda owundi yeenayeena; kuba alyekudumbaza ng'alowooza ati n'abasinga boonaboona." 
Daniel11:38 Mu kifo eky'okuta mu bakatonda abo ekinhagansi, ekinhagansi ekyo alikita mu katonda akuuma ebifo eby'okwewogomamu, badhaadha be ye bataamanhaku naire. Alighaayo ye katonda oyo ebigheebwayo ebya zaabu, ni feeza, n'amabaale ag'omughendo, n'ebintu ebindi eby'omughendo." 
Daniel11:39 Alikozesa abantu abasinza katonda oyo omugwira, okumukuumira ebifo bye eby'okwewogomamu. Era abo boonaboona abamwisaamu ekitiisa, alibakuza yaabagha ebifo eby'ebitiibwa, yaabafuula bafuzi ba bantu kamaala era yaabagha n'eitaka ng'empeera." 
Daniel11:40 “Ekiseera eky'enkomerero eya kyabazinga wa Siria bwe kiriba nga kiri kumpi kutuuka, kyabazinga w'e Misiri alimulumba. Era kyabazinga wa Siria oyo aliziinhuuka okuja okumulwanisa ng'oti n'empewo eyeezungulula n'amaani bw'eidha. Alikozesa ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'abalwani ab'oku mbalaasi, n'amaato kamaala. Aliidha n'eigye lye eryo, lyalumba ensi kamaala nga liri kubanda bubande ng'oti n'amaadhi ag'omwidhuzo, era lyataalaalira mu nsi edho." 
Daniel11:41 Alirumba n'Ensi ey'Ekitiisa, yaita enkumi n'enkumi edh'abantu. Aye ensi dhino dhirimuwona: ey'Abaedomu, n'ey'Abamoabu, n'ekitundu ekisinga bunene eky'ensi ey'Abammoni." 
Daniel11:42 Bw'alirumba ensi edho dhoonadhoona, n'ensi Misiri yoona terimuwona." 
Daniel11:43 Alitoola eby'obukombe bya Misiri ebyaterekebwa, omuli zaabu, ni feeza, n'eby'omughendo ebindi. Era alighangula Libya ni Ethiopia." 
Daniel11:44 Aye amawulire agaliva e buvandhuba ni ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba galimutiisa inho, yaalwana n'obusungu bungi, yaita era yaasaaniagho abantu kamaala." 
Daniel11:45 Alisimba weema dhe enkologho edh'obwakyabazinga, ghagati gh'enhandha n'olusozi olutukuvu oluliku eisinzizo. Aye ate alituuka okufa nga ghazira n'amuyamba.”" 
Daniel12:1 Malaika yaayongera okukoba ati: “Mu kiseera ekyo, Mikaeli, malaika oyo omukologho omukuumi w'abantu bo, aliboneka. Olwo ghalibaagho ekiseera ekizibu ekitabangaghooku kasookanga nsi dhibaagho. Era ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, abantu bo abo beene maina agaliba nga gaaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Katonda, n'abalirokolebwa." 
Daniel12:2 Era bangi ku abo abali e magombe abaafa balizuukira, abandi baliba mu bulamu obutawaagho ate abandi baaba mu kuswazibwa n'okunhoomebwa okutakoma." 
Daniel12:3 Abakulembeze abagezi balimesunkana ng'oti n'okumesunkana okw'oku igulu. N'abo abakyusa abantu ni bakola ebituufu balyakaayakana ng'oti muunienie ebyanda n'ebyanda.” 
Daniel12:4 Agho yankoba ati: “Mperaano ni, iwe Danieli, wumbaku ekitabo ekyo okisibeku n'akamanhiso, okutuusa ku kiseera eky'enkomerero. Abantu kamaala balizungira eno n'ere nga benda okwongera ku bumanhi bwaibwe.”" 
Daniel12:5 Ebyo nga biwoire, naja okulinga nti nga mbona abantu abandi babiri nga beemereire ku mbali okw'omwiga, owundi ng'aguli ku luuyi olw'eno n'owundi yaaguba ku luuyi olw'ere." 
Daniel12:6 Owundi ku abo yaabuuza malaika ole eyali avaire engoye empegheevu era eyali ere omwiga ye gwali guli kuviira, nti: “Bino ebyewuunhisa biribaagho kutuusa kiseera ki?”" 
Daniel12:7 Agho Malaika oyo eyali avaire ebivaalo ebighegheevu era eyali ere omwiga ye gwali guli kuviira, yaagololera emikono gye gyombi y'eigulu. Era naamuwulira ng'ali kulayira Katonda omulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda, ng'akoba ati: “Giriba emyaka esatu n'ekitundu. Abazigu bwebalikiriga abantu ba Katonda okutuusa okubamala amaani, ebintu ebyo byonabyona birituukirizibwa.”" 
Daniel12:8 Nze naawulira bye yakoba, aye nga tiri kubitegeera. Kale n'okumubuuza nti: “Musengwa wange, kiki ekiriva mu ebyo byonabyona?”" 
Daniel12:9 Yandhiramu ati: “Danieli, gema engira yo oje, kuba ebintu ebyo biidha kukuumibwa nga bya kyama era bikwekebwe okutuusa ku kiseera eky'enkomerero." 
Daniel12:10 Abantu kamaala balinaazibwa, baatukuzibwa era baizibwa buyaaka. Aye ababi balyeyongera bwa kukola bibi, era ezira waire omulala ati ku babi abo alitegeera. Aye abagezi balitegeera." 
Daniel12:11 “Okuva abantu lwe balirekera okughaayo ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa ebya buli lunaku, ng'Ekyenhinhalwa Ekizikiriza kimaze okuteebwagho, ghalibaagho enaku lukumi na bibiri na kyenda (1,290)." 
Daniel12:12 Ba nkabi abo abalisigala nga beesigwa okutuusa enaku olukumi n'ebisatu n'asatu n'eitaanu (1,335) lwe dhiriwaaku." 
Daniel12:13 “Kale ni iwe Danieli, gema engira yo oje, osigale ng'oli mwesigwa okutuusa ku nkomerero. Era waire olifa, olimala waazuukira wagheebwa empeera yo mu kiseera eky'oluvainhuma.”" 
Hosea1:1 Buno n'obukwenda Musengwa Katonda bwe yatuma Hosea mutabane wa Beeri, mu biseera bakyabazinga bano bye baafugiramu Buyudaaya: Uzzia, Yothamu, Ahazi, ni Hezekia. Era ni mu biseera kyabazinga Yeroboamu mutabane wa Yehoashi bye yafugiramu Isiraeli." 
Hosea1:2 Omukuzi ogwasooka Musengwa Katonda okwogerera mu Hosea, Musengwa Katonda oyo yakoba Hosea ati: “Ja ofumbirwe omukazi atali mwesigwa malaaya, ozaale naye abaana ab'obwamalaaya, kuba abantu bange banviireku nze Musengwa Katonda, tibakaali beesigwa naire.”" 
Hosea1:3 Kale Hosea yaaja, yaafumbirwa Gomeri mughala wa Dibulaimu, era Gomeri oyo yaatoola enda, yaazaala omwana mulenzi." 
Hosea1:4 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Hosea ati: “Mutuume eriina ‘Yezireeli,’ kuba esigaireyo ekiseera kitono mbonereze kyabazinga wa Isiraeli olw'obutemo dhaadha we Yehu bwe yakolera e Yezireeli. Nja kulekeza ab'oku nda ya Yehu okufuga obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli." 
Hosea1:5 Era mu kiseera ekyo, ndisaaniagho eby'okulwanisa bya Isiraeli mu kyetebwa Ekiiko ky'e Yezireeli.”" 
Hosea1:6 Gomeri yaatoola enda kabiri, yaazaala omwana mughala. Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Hosea ati: “Mutuume eriina ‘Tasaasirwa,’ kuba nze tikaasaasira Baisiraeli, waire okubasonigha." 
Hosea1:7 Aye ndisaasira ab'omu Buyudaaya naabawonia abazigu baibwe, nze Musengwa Katonda waibwe, nga tikozeisa lutalo: tirikozesa bulaso, oba empiima, oba embalaasi, oba abalwanira ku mbalaasi.”" 
Hosea1:8 Gomeri bwe yamala okukuza mughala we Tasaasirwa n'ava ku mabeere, yaatoola enda kabiri era yaazaala omwana mulenzi." 
Hosea1:9 Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Hosea ati: “Mutuume eriina ‘Tiibantubange,’ kuba imwe timukaali bantu bange, era zeena tikaali Katonda waimwe.”" 
Hosea1:10 Abaisiraeli baliba bangi inho ng'oti musenho gwa ku nhandha ogutasoboka kubalibwa oba okupimwa. Mperaano Katonda abakoba ati: “Timuli bantu bange,” aye ekiseera kirituuka yaabakoba ati: “Muli baana ba Katonda omulamu.”" 
Hosea1:11 Abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Isiraeli baliiramu okuba aghalala, beerondera omukulembeze mulala. Era ebintu biriiramu okubajiira obukalamu mu nsi yaibwe. Bwenebwene olunaku lw'e Yezireeli luliba lukologho inho." 
Hosea2:1 Kale mukobere Baisiraeli banaimwe, bamanhe bati “Bantu ba Katonda” era bati “Bagonzi ba Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Hosea2:2 Baana bange, mukobe ku inhaimwe, waire nga takaali mukazi wange, era nga zeena tikaali iba. Mumukobeku alekere okukola obwenzi n'obwamalaaya." 
Hosea2:3 Bw'ataalekere ndidha kumwambulamu ebivaalo asigale madu ng'oti ni bwe yali ku lunaku lwe baamuzaaliraku. Ndidha kumufuula ng'oti irungu, abe ng'oti itaka ikalu ery'olubbalangu, era mmuleetere okufa endiwo." 
Hosea2:4 Tija kusaasira baana be naire, kuba baazaalibwa mu bwamalaaya." 
Hosea2:5 Inhaibwe yakola obwamalaaya, oyo eyabazaala yeebisa mu nsambo eswaza ng'akoba ati: “Ndidha kuja y'abagonzi bange, bampe emere, n'amaadhi, n'engoye empegheevu, n'edho edhaakolebwa mu buviiri bw'entaama, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, n'eby'okunhwa.”" 
Hosea2:6 Kale ni ndidha kumukolera olukomera olw'amawa okumwezunguluza, era nzimbe ekimante okumwezunguluza abulwe gh'abita." 
Hosea2:7 Alirumuukirira abagonzi be, aye talibaagaana. Alibanoonia, aye talibabona. Agho alikoba ati: “Ka nje ndhireyo ye baze wange eyasooka, kuba eyo nabanga bulungi okusinga bwendi mperaano.”" 
Hosea2:8 Tiyayatulaku naire ati ninze eyamughanga engaano, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva. Waire okwatulaku ati ninze eyamudoomooleranga feeza ni zaabu bye yaghangayo mu kusinza omusambwa Baali." 
Hosea2:9 Kale ni ndimutoolaku engaano yange n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu mu biseera eby'amakungula. Era naamutoolaku n'engoye empegheevu, n'edho edhaakolebwa mu buviiri bw'entaama, dhe yavaalanga n'awona okuba amadu." 
Hosea2:10 Ndimutoolamu ebivaalo yaaba madu mu maiso g'abagonzi be, ghaabulagho amutoola mu buyinza bwange." 
Hosea2:11 Ndirekeza ebintu byonabyona ebimuleetera okusagamba: embaga edh'ebibinuko bye byonabyona eby'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, n'edha Sabbato, n'edh'ebibinuko bye ebindi byonabyona ebyalagirwa." 
Hosea2:12 Ndyonoonayonoona emizabbibu gye n'emiti gye emitiini, gye yakoba ati: “Gino n'empeera yange abagonzi bange ye bampa olw'okubagheerezanga.” Aye nze ndigireetera okuzika gyafuuka kibira. Era ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhiriidha dhaalya emizabbibu n'emiti emitiini egyo." 
Hosea2:13 Ndimubonereza olw'okukuzanga ebibinuko by'omusambwa Baali era n'aguniokezanga obubbaani. Era ndimubonereza olw'okuvaala empeta n'ebyamadholobera, n'aja n'abagonzi be, olwo nze n'aneerabira. Musengwa Katonda n'akobye." 
Hosea2:14 Kale ni bona eno, ndimulembereza naamutwala mu irungu, naayogera naye mu kugonza okungi." 
Hosea2:15 Eyo ye ndimugheera amasamba ge ag'emizabbibu. Era ekyetebwa Ekiiko eky'Ebizibu ndikifuula omulyango ogwingira mu kusuubira. Era ng'ali eyo aliiramu okumpulira, nga bwe yampuliranga mu buto bwe mu kiseera kye yaviiramu e Misiri." 
Hosea2:16 Agho mu biseera ebyo aliiramu okundheta iba yaalekera agho okundheta Baali," 
Hosea2:17 kuba tirimuganha kwiramu kabiri kwatula liina eryo. 
Hosea2:18 Mu biseera ebyo ndikola endagaano n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko, n'enhonhi edhiguluka, n'ebyo ebyeghaluliza ku itaka, bibe nga tibikola kabi ku bantu bange. Era nditoolagho obulaso, n'empiima, n'eby'okulwanisa ebindi byonabyona mu nsi, olwo abantu bange babenga mu miraala." 
Hosea2:19 Iwe Isiraeli, nze ndikwandhula waaba mukazi wange ebyanda n'ebyanda. Ndiba wa mazima era omutuufu y'oli, era ndikugonza n'ekisa obutalekera." 
Hosea2:20 Ndiba mwesigwa y'oli, era olwo olimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda." 
Hosea2:21 Mu biseera ebyo nze Musengwa Katonda, ndiwulira okusaba kw'abantu bange Abaisiraeli, naalagira eigulu lyagwisa ku nsi amaadhi." 
Hosea2:22 N'ensi eribaza engaano, n'emizabbibu, n'emyoliva." 
Hosea2:23 Ndita abantu bange mu nsi yaibwe, baaba bukalamu. Ndisaasira abo abaali beetebwa bati “Tibasaasirwa,” era abo abaali beetebwa bati “Timuli bantu bange,” ndibakoba nti: “Muli bantu bange.” Boona baliiramu bati: “Niiwe Katonda waife.”" 
Hosea3:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Ja kabiri ogonze omukazi omwenzi ali n'omusaadha owundi y'ayenda. Omugonze nga nze Musengwa Katonda bwengonza Abaisiraeli, waire nga bakyuka baasinza bakatonda abandi era baasanhukira inho okughaayo emizabbibu egikaziibwa ng'ebigheebwayo eri bakatonda abo.”" 
Hosea3:2 Kale naasasula omwandu gwa bitundu ikumi na bitaanu ebya feeza, ni kilo kikumi n'ataanu edha sayiri." 
Hosea3:3 Naamukoba nti: “Oteekwa okumala ekiseera ekireeyi ng'oli wange. Otakola bwamalaaya waire okwenda omusaadha owundi, era zeena ntyo bwendidha okwebisa y'oli.”" 
Hosea3:4 Mu nsambo ng'oti n'eyo, Abaisiraeli boona balimala ekiseera kireeyi nga bazira kyabazinga waire omukulembeze, nga bazira misengo gye baghaayo waire okuba n'empango dh'amabaale edhisinzibwa, nga bazira bivaalo bakabona bye bakozesa mu kulagula waire okuba n'ebifaananie ebisinzibwa ebyetebwa terafimu." 
Hosea3:5 Aye mu biseera eby'oluvainhuma abantu bange Abaisiraeli balikyuka, kabiri baira eri Musengwa Katonda waibwe n'eri Daudi kyabazinga waibwe. Baliiramu okutya Musengwa Katonda oyo, era baafunanga ebirungi ebiva y'ali." 
Hosea4:1 Imwe Abaisiraeli muwulire Musengwa Katonda by'akoba. Ghaligho omusango gw'ali kulumiriza abantu ababa mu nsi eno, kuba abantu b'omu nsi eno ti beesigwa era ti ba kisa, waire okutya Katonda." 
Hosea4:2 Balayira bye bataatuukirize, balimba, batemula, baiba, era baakola obwenzi. Okwiza emisango kweyongera bweyongere, era obutemo bubaagho buli kiseera." 
Hosea4:3 Kale ni ensi eno erikala, na buli kiramu ekigiriku kyafa. Ensolo edh'omu nsiko, n'enhonhi edhiguluka, n'ebyenhandha, byonabyona birifa." 
Hosea4:4 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ghatabaagho alumiriza bantu musango waire okubanenia, kuba imwe bakabona niimwe be ndi kulumiriza." 
Hosea4:5 Imwe bakabona mugwa mu nsobi omusana n'obwire, n'abalanzi boona baakola n'ekirala ng'oti niimwe. Kale ni ndizikiriza Isiraeli inhaimwe." 
Hosea4:6 Abantu bange bazikirira olw'okuba tibandidhi nze. Imwe bakabona mwaloba okuumanha nze, kale ni zeena ndibaloba okuba bakabona bange. Era nga bwe mwerabira amateeka gange nze Katonda waimwe, zeena nja kwerabira abaana baimwe." 
Hosea4:7 Imwe bakabona ye mukoma okweyongera okuba abangi, ye mukoma n'okweyongera okwonoona ye ndi. Kale ni ndibaleetera okuswazibwa mu kifo eky'okuteebwamu ekinhagansi." 
Hosea4:8 Mufuuka bakombe olw'ebyo ebigheebwayo abantu bange ku lw'ebibi byaibwe, kyemuva mwenda inho beeyongere okwonoona." 
Hosea4:9 Ekibonerezo abantu kye balifuna, mwena bakabona kye mulifuna. Ndibabonereza olw'engeri dhaimwe embi, naabeesasuulizaaku olw'ebikolwa byaimwe ebibi." 
Hosea4:10 Baliryanga era baalyanga aye nga tibaiguta. Era balikolanga obwamalaaya obw'omu masabo aye nga tibazaalagana naire; kuba banvaaku nze Musengwa Katonda baira ku kusinza bakatonda abandi.” 
Hosea4:11 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Omwenge omusu n'oguwoze, gumala mu bantu bange okutegeera." 
Hosea4:12 Beebuuza ku bintu ebyakolebwa mu muti obuti. Omwigo obwigo n'ogubakobera bye benda okumanha. Bali ng'oti mukazi mwenzi: banvaaku nze Katonda waibwe, baadaaliima, baaja baasinza bakatonda abandi." 
Hosea4:13 Baghaayo emisengo ku ngulu okw'ensozi enene, baaghaayo ebigheebwayo ku busozi obutono, ni ghansi gh'emiti emikologho emizibirivu, kuba ebinsense byagyo birungi. Baghala baibwe kyebava ni bakola obwamalaaya, ni bakazi baibwe ni bakola obwenzi." 
Hosea4:14 Tiribonereza baghala baimwe nga bakoze obwamalaaya, waire okubonereza bakazi baimwe nga bakoze obwenzi; kuba n'imwe abasaadha beene muja n'abakazi bamalaaya ab'omu isabo, era mwabeeyimbaku mwaghaayo emisengo. Kale ni abantu abatategeera balizikirira." 
Hosea4:15 Waire nga imwe Abaisiraeli timuli beesigwa ye ndi, Abayudaaya bagwananga baaloba kugwa mu nsobi eyo. Mutajanga kusinziza mu Giligali waire okusinziza mu Bethaveni. Era mutalayiranga muti, ‘Nga Musengwa Katonda bw'ali omulamu.’" 
Hosea4:16 Abaisiraeli bamagalavu ng'oti nte nto. Kale nze Musengwa Katonda nnaasobola ntya okubaliikiza mu kyayiro ekigazi, ng'omuntu bw'aliisa entaama ento?" 
Hosea4:17 Ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda bipaaziiza Abaisiraeli. Kale ka basigale batyo. 
Hosea4:18 Bwe bamala okutamiira beemalira mu bwenzi; baasanhukira ebibaswaza, okusinga ebyo ebibateesaamu ekinhagansi." 
Hosea4:19 Empewo eribawungula yaaja nabo, era ensoni dhiribagema olw'emisengo gye baghaayo mu kusinza ebitali Katonda.”" 
Hosea5:1 “Imwe bakabona muwulire kino! Imwe Abaisiraeli mufeeyo ku kye nkoba! Imwe ab'endhu ya kyabazinga mutege kutu! Omusango baligubasalira; kuba e Mizipa mwafuukira abantu ekizibu ng'oti mutego, e Tabori mweraliikiriza abantu ng'oti lutuula olutegeibwa," 
Hosea5:2 era e Shittimu mwatiisa abantu ng'oti kiina ekireeyi. Aye ndibabonereza imwe mwenamwena.
