Hosea5:3 Nze ndidhi Abaisiraeli nga bwe bafaanana era tibasobola kuneegisaaku. Abaisiraeli abo tibabaire beesigwa naire, era bafuuse abatali balongoofu.”" 
Hosea5:4 Ebikolwa byaibwe tibibaganha kukyuka kwira ye Katonda waibwe; kuba batwalirizibwa okusinza ebitali Katonda, baaloba okumanha Musengwa Katonda oyo." 
Hosea5:5 Abaisiraeli abo okwekuluntaza kwaibwe kubabonekera ni ku maiso. Ebibi byaibwe biribaleetera okugwa, n'Abayudaaya boona baagwa ghalala nabo." 
Hosea5:6 Ni bwebalija okunoonia Musengwa Katonda bagheeyo ku mbuzi, ni ku nte, ni ku ntaama dhaibwe ng'emisengo, tibalimuzuula gh'ali; kuba yabavaaku." 
Hosea5:7 Tibabaire beesigwa naire ye Musengwa Katonda era bazaire abaana abatali babe. Aye tibaabite mu Kibinuko eky'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, baja kuzikirira beene ghalala n'enimiro dhaibwe." 
Hosea5:8 Mufuuwe endeka e Gibea! Mufuuwe amagwala e Rama! Era mukube enduulu edh'omu lutalo e Bethaveni! Mwete Ababenjamini baidhe mu lutalo. 
Hosea5:9 Ensi Isiraeli erifuuka bifulukwafulukwa ku lunaku olw'okubonerezebwaku. Bwenebwene nangirira mu bika bya Isiraeli, nti kye ndikukoba kiri n'okutuukirira." 
Hosea5:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: Abakulembeze b'omu Buyudaaya, bafuuse ng'oti n'abantu abakyusa embibi ni banhaga eitaka lya banaibwe. Kale ndibamaliraku ekiruyi kyange ng'oti n'ali kubabboomaku amaadhi." 
Hosea5:11 Isiraeli bamutuntuza era baamusaliriza omusango gwamusinga, olw'okuba yaikiriza okukolera ku biragiro eby'abo abatandigwaniire kumulagira naire." 
Hosea5:12 Kale kyendiva ni nsaaniagho Isiraeli ng'oti n'ekintu ekiriiriibwa ebisiisa, ni mmaliragho irala Buyudaaya ng'oti n'ekintu ekivunze n'enhengere." 
Hosea5:13 Isiraeli bwe yabona obulwaire bwayo, ni Buyudaaya n'ebona ebibwa byayo, Isiraeli eyo yaatumisa kyabazinga omukologho ow'e Assiria aidhe agiyambe. Aye nga tasobola kuwonia bulwaire obwo waire ebibwa ebyo." 
Hosea5:14 Kale ndirumba Isiraeli ni Buyudaaya ng'oti mpologoma. Era nze mwene, ninze ndibayuzayuza, memale neejiira. Ndibaghaluudhania naabatwala nga ghazira n'asobola kubawonia." 
Hosea5:15 Ndiirayo mu kifo kyange ye mba, okutuusa lwe baliikiriza ni baatula ebibi byaibwe era ni baanoonia ye ndi. Bwe baliba mu kudaagadaaga kwaibwe baliinoonia ye ndi." 
Hosea6:1 Abantu baja baakoba bati: “Mukole twire ye Musengwa Katonda. Waire nga mwene n'eyatuyuzayuza aye alituwonia; era waire nga n'eyatufumita aye alitunhiga ebibwa ebyo. 
Hosea6:2 Mu nnaku ibiri oba isatu alitwizaamu obulamu, twaba balamu mu maiso ge." 
Hosea6:3 Ka tufube inho okumanha Musengwa Katonda. Okwidha kwe ye tuli kukakafu ng'oti bwire kukya. Aliidha ye tuli ng'oti maadhi matoigo, agagwa ni gafukirira ensi.”" 
Hosea6:4 Aye Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: Imwe Isiraeli ni Buyudaaya, mbakolere ki? Engeri ye mungonzaamu ya kiweeragho, ng'oti lufu lwa ku nkyo bwe luwaagho amangu, era ng'oti musulo bwegukala amangu." 
Hosea6:5 Kyenva ni ntuma abalanzi ye muli, ni babaleetera obukwenda bwange obw'okubazikiriza era obubalumiriza imwe omusango. Kye mbendaku kibonekeragho ng'oti butangaavu." 
Hosea6:6 Mbendaku okungonzanga obutalekera, aye ti misengo; n'okuumanhanga nze Katonda waimwe, okusinga okumpa ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa." 
Hosea6:7 “Aye boona okufaananaku ni Adamu baamenha endagaano ye nakola nabo, baaloba kuba beesigwa ye ndi." 
Hosea6:8 Gileadi kibuga kya bakozi ba bibi, era kiidhwire bitaba bya musaayi ogw'abantu be baise." 
Hosea6:9 Ng'ekikuukuulu ky'abanhazi bwe kyeteega omuntu, ni bakabona boona batyo beeyimba, baatemula abantu ku ngira eja mu kifo ekitukuvu e Shekemu. Bwenebwene bakola ebibi ebyo nga bagendereire." 
Hosea6:10 Mu Isiraeli mboinemu ekintu ekibi einho. Abantu bange abo ti beesigwa ye ndi naire. Bali ng'oti n'omwenzi era beereeteire okuba abatali balongoofu. 
Hosea6:11 N'imwe Abayudaaya mwena, ekiseera namala okukitaagho, eky'okubabonereza olw'ebyo bye mukola.”" 
Hosea7:1 “Buli lwe ngezaaku okuwonia abantu bange Abaisiraeli, nga nhenda ebintu biiremu okubajiira obukalamu, neeyongera bwa kubona obwonoonefu bwaibwe n'ebikolwa ebibi bye bakola: Baguyaguya abantu, baamenha endhu dh'abantu baibamu, era baanhagulula abantu ku ngira." 
Hosea7:2 Aye baaloba kulowooza naku nga nze tyerabira bikolwa byaibwe byonabyona ebibi. Kale ni mpegaano ebibi byaibwe bibazingiiza, era nze ndi kubibona bukalamu.”" 
Hosea7:3 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu beefuula okuba ng'abasanhusa kyabazinga, aye nga baguya buguye, era beefuula okuba ng'abasanhusa abafuzi baibwe, aye nga balimba bulimbe." 
Hosea7:4 Boonaboona ba nkwe era tibeesigika. Bali n'enzigu embitirivu ng'oti n'omuliro ogwaka einho mu ziiko ey'omufumbi w'emigaati, nga tigwetaagisa kuseesaamu okuva gh'akandira engaano okutuusa ng'emaze okuzimbuluka." 
Hosea7:5 Ku lunaku kyabazinga lw'akoleraku embaga, abantu abo abanhoomi basirughaza kyabazinga n'abakungu be nga babatamiiza omwenge. Era ni beene boona gwabagema." 
Hosea7:6 Bookya ng'oti muliro mu ziiko, nga benda okukola akabi. Obusungu bwaibwe bunioka obwire bwonabwona, ku nkyo bwatumbuka ng'oti muliro." 
Hosea7:7 Obusungu bwaibwe bwe butumbuka ng'oti muliro mu ziiko, olwo baatemula abafuzi baibwe. Era bajiire nga baita bakyabazinga baibwe mulala mulala, aye ghazira muntu waire omulala ati ansaba kubayamba.”" 
Hosea7:8 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Abaisiraeli bali ng'oti mugaati ogufumbiibwa ni guyaaku oluuyi olulala lwonka. Beetabula n'abamaghanga agandi," 
Hosea7:9 aye tibaidhi ng'okwetabula n'abamaghanga agandi kubaleetera okuwaamu amaani, n'eighanga lyaibwe lyatuuka ku kuzikirira." 
Hosea7:10 Okwekuluntaza okw'Abaisiraeli kubalumiriza omusango. Aye waire ng'ebyo byonabyona bibairegho, tibakyukangaku ni baira eri nze Musengwa Katonda waibwe." 
Hosea7:11 Abaisiraeli bali ng'oti ighemba eisiru eriziramu magezi. Baasooka baayeta ensi Misiri eidhe ebayambe, baamala kabiri baaja baayeta ni Assiria." 
Hosea7:12 Aye buli ye balija ndibasuulaku olutuula lwange, naabaghanulayo ghaigulu ng'oti nhonhi edhiguluka, naabasuula ghansi. Ndibabonereza olw'ebibi bye bakola." 
Hosea7:13 Bakagwireku olw'okudaaliima ni banvaaku! Ka bazikirire olw'okundheemera! Nandibaire mbanunula, aye bandhogeraku eby'obuguya." 
Hosea7:14 Tibansabangaku na mwoyo mulala, aye beetandigira bwa bigwo ku itaka baawowoola ng'oti n'abataidhi Katonda. Era bwebasaba engaano n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, beesalasala ku mubiri ng'oti n'abatatya Katonda bwe bakola. Aye nze bandheemera budheemere!" 
Hosea7:15 Waire nga ninze eyabagundhula ni mbaleetera okuba ab'amaani, aye era bayiiya bwa kukola bibi ye ndi." 
Hosea7:16 Banvaaku baasinza omusambwa Baali, bali ng'oti kalaso akagodobanu akateesigika kuteeba. Abakulembeze baibwe balifiira mu ntalo olw'okwogera nga beesuuta. Era balisekererwa mu nsi Misiri.”" 
Hosea8:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mufuughe amagwala agalaalika olutalo! Abazigu bali kwidha okugwa ku nsi yange Isiraeli ng'oti nsega; kuba abantu bange Abaisiraeli baamenha endagaano ye nakola nabo, baadheemera amateeka gange." 
Hosea8:2 Waire bandirira bati, ‘Ife Abaisiraeli tukwidhi nga niiwe Katonda waife,’" 
Hosea8:3 aye Abaisiraeli abo baasuula ere ekintu ekyali ekirungi kyafuuka ng'ekitagasa. Abazigu kyebaliva ni bababingirira. 
Hosea8:4 Baataagho bakyabazinga nga tibambuuziiza naku, era baataagho abakulembeze nga tibankobeire naku. Baatoola feeza waibwe ni zaabu waibwe, baamukolamu ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, ebija okubaleetera beene okuzikirira." 
Hosea8:5 Nze nakyagha ekifaananie eky'ente ento eya zaabu, abantu b'omu Samaria kye basinza. Obusungu bwange buja kubatumbukiraku ng'oti muliro. Balirekera li okusinza ebitali Katonda, ni bafuuka abalungi?" 
Hosea8:6 Omuisiraeli omugheesi n'eyakola ekifaananie ekyo, aye nga ekifaananie ekyo ti Katonda. Kale ni kirimenhebwamenhebwa kyasigala bukutukutu." 
Hosea8:7 Nga bwe baasiga empewo era balikungula kiwunga ow'amaani. Engaano nga tetaireeku bifaaganda, terivaamu mere naire. Aye ni bweyanditaireku ebifaaganda n'ebala, era abagwira n'abandigiriire." 
Hosea8:8 Abaisiraeli boona bafuuse ng'oti n'abamaghanga agandi, era tibakaali na mugaso ng'oti n'entamu emenheike." 
Hosea8:9 Baaja baatuuka ni mu Assiria nga bali ng'oti ndogoyi ya mu nsiko eri kutambulatambula eyo etyo yonka. Baamala baapangisa abamaghanga agandi okubakuuma. 
Hosea8:10 Aye waire baapangisa abamaghanga agandi, nze ndibasololeza ghalala naababonereza. Era bali kumpi na kulira maziga, nga kyabazinga w'e Assiria atooleire okubatuntuza." 
Hosea8:11 Abaisiraeli ye bakoma okuzimba alutaari edh'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa olw'ebibi, ye bakoma n'okwonoona." 
Hosea8:12 Ni bwenandibaghandiikiire amateeka gange nga gali nkumi na nkumi, era bandigalobye ng'oti tibagawulirangaku." 
Hosea8:13 Benda inho okumpa emisengo, baaleeta emamba ng'omusengo era baamala baagirya. Aye nze Musengwa Katonda tibasiima, waire okwerabira ebibi byaibwe. Ndibabonereza olw'ebibi ebyo, nabasindika okubaizaayo kabiri e Misiri." 
Hosea8:14 Abaisiraeli bazimbye endhu edh'omughendo aye baaneerabira nze eyabatonda. N'ab'omu Buyudaaya bongeire okuzimba ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu. Aye ndisindika omuliro gwayokya ebibuga byaibwe, era gwasaaniagho ebifo byaibwe eby'okwewogomamu.”" 
Hosea9:1 Imwe Abaisiraeli, mulobe kusagamba waire okuba abasangaavu ng'oti n'abantu abatatya Katonda; kuba mwaloba okuba abeesigwa mwava ku Katonda waimwe. Mwasanhukira inho engaano eva mu bifo aghakubirwa engaano, nga mulowooza muti eyo n'empeera emisambwa ye gibagha olw'okwetunda ye giri nga bamalaaya." 
Hosea9:2 Aye mu bifo aghakubirwa engaano ghaidha kulekera okuvaagho engaano ebamala, ni mu bikunhiro by'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu mulekere okuvaamu omwenge ogw'emizabbibu omusu." 
Hosea9:3 Imwe Abaisiraeli, timulisigala mu nsi yange nze Musengwa Katonda. Aye muliirayo kabiri mu nsi Misiri, mwaja ni mu nsi Assiria, ye muliriiranga emere etali nongoofu." 
Hosea9:4 Nga muli mu nsi edho edh'abamaghanga agandi, timulisobola kugheereza Musengwa Katonda mwenge gwa mizabbibu ng'ekigheebwayo ekifukibwa, waire okumusiimyanga n'emisengo gyaimwe. Emere yaimwe erireeteranga kiisi bantu abaligiryangaku okufuuka abatali balongoofu, ng'oti n'abaliiriire emere aghali omufu. Emere eyo baligiryanga lwa kubamalaku ndhala kyonka. Tibaligitwalanga kugighaayo mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
Hosea9:5 Mulikola mutya ku nnaku edh'ebibinuko ebyalagirwa, enaku edh'okukuza embaga ya Musengwa Katonda?" 
Hosea9:6 Okuzikirira bwe kulituuka ni kubasansaania, Abamisiri balibasoloza imwe baabaziika e Menfisi. Aghaali eby'obukombe byaimwe ebya feeza ghalimeragho bisaka, n'aghaali weema dhaimwe ghaameregho amawa." 
Hosea9:7 Ekiseera eky'okubonerezebwa kituuse, ekiseera ekya buli muntu okufuna ekimusaana. Mulikoba muti: “Omulanzi ono musiru,” era muti: “Omuntu ono aliku omwoyo gwa Katonda, mulalu.” Mukoba mutyo, kuba ebibi byaimwe bingi inho, n'obukyayi bwe muli nabwo bubitirivu." 
Hosea9:8 Nze, ninze omulanzi Katonda ye yatuma, ndabule abantu be Abaisiraeli. Aye buli ghe nja bantega emitego mu ngira ng'oti nhonhi. Ni mu isinzizo lya Katonda lyene, mwona abantu baba bazigu ba mulanzi." 
Hosea9:9 Beeyonoine inho ng'oti bwe beeyonoona e Gibea. mu biseera ebyabita. Aye Katonda talyerabira bibi byaimwe, alibabonereza olw'okwonoona kwaimwe." 
Hosea9:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nayagaana ensi Isiraeli ng'oti n'ole bw'ayagaana emizabbibu egiri kukulira eyo mu irungu. Era naabona badhaadha baimwe ng'oti n'ole bw'abona ebibala eby'omutiini ebisooka okwenga mu mwaka. Aye bwe baatuuka ka lusozi Peori baatoolera okusinza omusambwa Baali, olwo baafuuka ekyenhinhalwa ng'oti n'omusambwa gwene ogwo gwe baasinzanga bwe gwali." 
Hosea9:11 Kale ni ekitiibwa kya Isiraeli kirigulukagho ng'oti nhonhi edhiguluka. Tighalibaagho mukazi azaala, waire ali nda, waire atoola nda." 
Hosea9:12 Aye ni bwe balizaala abaana, era ndibabatoolaku boonaboona ghaaloba kusigalagho waire omulala ati omulamu. Lwe ndibavaamu ni mbalekulira agho, baliba bakagwireku!”" 
Hosea9:13 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndi kubona abaana ba Isiraeli, ng'abazigu bali kubayiiga bwe babaita." 
Hosea9:14 Kiki kye mbe mbasabire iwe obaghe? Kale baghe okutoolanga enda eno nga bwe dhivaamu, oleetere n'amabeere gaibwe obutabaamu mata." 
Hosea9:15 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Baatandiikira Giligali okukola ebibi. Era eyo nze ye natandiikira okubakyagha. Kale ni ndibabinga mu nsi yange olw'ebibi bye bakola. Tiriiramu kabiri kubagonza. Abakulembeze baibwe boonaboona bandheemera. 
Hosea9:16 Abaisiraeli bali ng'oti kisimbe kye batemye emizi ni gikala, ni kitataaku bibala. Boona tibalizaala baana. Aye era ni bwebandizaire, nandiise abaana baibwe abo abagonzi.”" 
Hosea9:17 Katonda wange alirekulira agho abantu be, kuba baaloba okuwulira by'abakoba. Balitambulatambula eyo batyo mu maghanga agandi." 
Hosea10:1 Abaisiraeli bali ng'oti n'omuzabbibu ogubala emizabbibu kamaala. Ye baakoma okweyongera obungi, ye baakoma n'okuzimba alutaari enhingi. Era ensi yaibwe ye yakoma okweyongera okuba enungi, ye baakoma n'okulungiya empango dh'amabaale dhe baasinzanga." 
Hosea10:2 Bali n'emyoyo emiguyaguya. Kale ni buti bali n'okubonerezebwa olw'ebibi byaibwe. Musengwa Katonda alimenhagho alutaari dhaibwe, era yaazikiriza empango edh'amabaale dhe basinza." 
Hosea10:3 Abantu abo balikoba bati: “Tuzira kyabazinga kuba twaloba okutya Musengwa Katonda. Aye era kyabazinga ni bwe yandibairegho, yanditukoleire ki?”" 
Hosea10:4 Boogera bibono bubono aye nga biziramu makulu naire. Balayira ebiziramu era baakola endagaano edhitagasa. Kale ni ensala y'omusango ebeefuukiire, yaaba ng'oti n'eisubi ery'obutwa erimeze mu bigufulugufulu eby'enimiro ye balimiisa embago y'ente." 
Hosea10:5 Abatyamye ab'omu Samaria balidhugumira olw'okuviibwaku ekifaananie eky'ente ento eky'e Bethaveni. Abantu abakisinza balikiririra amaziga, ni bakabona abagheereza ekisinzibwa ekyo ekitali Katonda, baliwowoola, nga kitooleibwaku ekitiibwa kyakyo." 
Hosea10:6 Bwenebwene ekifaananie ekyo abazigu balikitwala mu Assiria ng'ekirabo eri kyabazinga waayo omukologho. Ensoni dhirigema Abaisiraeli, baaswala olw'ekisinzibwa kyaibwe ekyo ekitali Katonda." 
Hosea10:7 Kyabazinga w'e Samaria balimutwalagania, ng'oti kibaadho kya muti bwe kitwalibwa amaadhi." 
Hosea10:8 Ebifo ebigulumivu ebisinzibwamu ebiri mu Aveni, Abaisiraeli bye bajaamu ni bakola ebibi, birizikirizibwa. Amawa n'enkandwa birimera ku alutaari dhaibwe. Balikoba ensozi bati: “Mutugweku,” baakoba n'obusozi bati: “Mutusandikire!”" 
Hosea10:9 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abaisiraeli tibalekeranga kukola bibi, okuviira irala ku biseera bye baakoleramu ebibi e Gibea. Kale yeene eyo e Gibea olutalo ye lulibaagaana." 
Hosea10:10 Ndirumba abantu abo aboonooni naababonereza. Amaghanga galyesoloza ghalala okubalwanisa, baabonerezebwa olw'ebibi byaibwe ebingi." 
Hosea10:11 Isiraeli eira yali ng'oti nte nto eyatendekebwa obukalamu, ng'eyenda inho okusibwaku ekintu ekimulungula engaano, nze nga mmusaasiranga olw'enkoto ye enungi. Aye Isiraeli oyo ndimuta ekikoligo mu nkoto ekiriku embago, era alikumula eitaka, ni Buyudaaya yaatoodha eitaka." 
Hosea10:12 Nze naakoba nti, ‘Mulime enimiro dhaimwe edhaawuumuzibwaku okulimwa, musige ensigo ey'obutuufu. Mwidha kukungula ebibala olw'okungonza nze obutalekera. Kino n'ekiseera okuunoonia nze Musengwa Katonda. Era ndidha kwidha mbamwageku emikisa egy'obulokozi mingi ng'oti n'amaadhi agagwa.’" 
Hosea10:13 Aye ate mwasiga kukola bibi, mwakungulamu obutakola mazima, era mwalya ebibala ebiva mu buguyaguya; kuba mwesiga ebigaali byaimwe eby'omu lutalo, n'abalwani baimwe olukunkumuli." 
Hosea10:14 Kale ni olutalo luliidhira abantu baimwe, n'ebifo byaimwe eby'okwewogomamu byazikirizibwa. Kiriba ng'oti bwe kyali mu lutalo kyabazinga Shalumani mwe yazikiririza ekibuga Betharubeli, ni bakuba ghansi abakazi ghalala n'abaana baibwe, ni babamanhiangula okutuusa okufa." 
Hosea10:15 Mwena Abaisiraeli batyo bwe balibakola olw'ebibi byaimwe ebitaloodheka. Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli aliitibwa ng'olutalo lwakatoolera.” 
Hosea11:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Isiraeli bwe yali omuto namugonzanga, naamweta okuva e Misiri nga mwana wange." 
Hosea11:2 Aye Abaisiraeli abo ye nakoma okubeeta, boona ye baakoma okunvaaku. Baaghangayo emisengo eri omusambwa Baali; baaniokezanga ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda obubbaani." 
Hosea11:3 Ate nga ninze eyayegeresa Abaisiraeli okusiirula ekigere okutambula, era nga mbalera mu ngalo dhange. Aye baaloba kumanha nga ninze eyabalabiriranga." 
Hosea11:4 Nabatwalanga na kisa, naabaleeteranga okwidha ye ndi nga mbagonza. Nabaghembereranga ng'oti n'aghemberera omwana okumusirisaagho, era naakutamanga okubaliisa." 
Hosea11:5 Baliirayo e Misiri, kyabazinga w'e Assiria yaabafuga, kuba baaloba okwira ye nze." 
Hosea11:6 Abazigu balirumba ebibuga byaibwe, baamenhamenha endhigi dhaabyo. Era balibazikiriza olw'okukola ebyo beene bye baayendanga." 
Hosea11:7 Ng'abantu bange abo bwe bamaliriire okunvaaku, balirira olw'ekikoligo ekibaliku, aye nga ghazira akibatoolaku." 
Hosea11:8 Abaisiraeli nsobola ntya okubaghaayo? Nsobola ntya okubalekulira agho? Nsobola ntya okubazikiriza ng'oti bwe nakola Adama? Nsobola ntya okubabisa ng'oti bwe nabisa Zeboiimu? Omwoyo gwange tigunganha kukikola; kuba mbagonza inho ebitaloodheka. 
Hosea11:9 Tiribamaliraku busungu bwange obubitirivu, tiriirayo kabiri kubazikiriza; kuba nze ndi Katonda, se ti muntu buntu. Ninze Omutukuvu ali mu imwe, era tiribazikiriza." 
Hosea11:10 Nze Musengwa Katonda ndiwologoma ng'oti mpologoma yeene, abantu bange baayangugha okwidha ye ndi, nga bava e bugwandhuba." 
Hosea11:11 Baliidha nga baziinhuuka ng'oti nhonhi nga bava mu Misiri, nga baziinhuuka ng'oti ighemba nga bava mu Assiria. Era ndibaizaayo mu maka gaibwe. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye.”" 
Hosea11:12 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abaisiraeli bandidhwizaaku obuguya bwaibwe okuneezunguluza. Aye ab'omu Buyudaaya, nze Katonda mbaidhi, era beesigwa eri Nze Omutukuvu.”" 
Hosea12:1 “Abaisiraeli bye bakola biziramu muganhulo. Kuli ng'oti n'okwaya empewo eva e buvandhuba, n'ogibingirira olunaku lwonalwona. Beeyongera bweyongere kuguya na kukola bikolwa bya bukambwe. Bakola endagaano ni Assiria, era baasuubulagana ni Misiri.”" 
Hosea12:2 Musengwa Katonda ali n'omusango gw'avunaana Abayudaaya, era alibonereza ni Isiraeli olw'eneebisa abantu baayo ye beebisaamu. Alibeesasuulizaaku olw'ebikolwa byaibwe ebibi." 
Hosea12:3 Dhaadha waibwe Yakobo yagemerera mu mukono gwe ekibbonge kya muganda we Esau, nga bakaali mu nda ya inhaibwe. Yakobo oyo bwe yakula yaalwana ni Katonda." 
Hosea12:4 Yalwana ni malaika yaaghangula, era yalira ng'asaba okugheebwa enkabi. Bwe yali e Betheli yabona Katonda era Katonda oyo yaayogera naye." 
Hosea12:5 Katonda oyo nga ni Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, era eriina lye ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Hosea12:6 Kale imwe baidhukulu ba Isiraeli, mwire ye Katonda waimwe oyo aidha kubayambanga. Mwekalangulenga okugonzania n'okukola amazima. Era aghazira kukoogha naire, muteegererenga okubona ky'anaabakoleranga." 
Hosea12:7 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abaisiraeli ti beesigwa, bali ng'oti basuubuzi abakozesa minzaani enkyamu, okuseera be basuubulagana nabo." 
Hosea12:8 Bakoba bati, ‘Tuli bakombe, era ebintu ebingi bye tuli nabyo, ghazira asobola kutulumiriza ati twabifuna mu kukupankupania.’" 
Hosea12:9 Aye nze, ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, eyabatoola mu nsi Misiri. Era ndibaleetera kabiri okusula mu ntindi nga dhe mwasulangamu nga muli mu irungu." 
Hosea12:10 Nayogeranga n'abalanzi, naabaleeteranga okubonekerwa emikuzi kamaala. Era naabitanga mu balanzi abo okulabula abantu bange, nga bakozesa enfumo dhe nabaghanga." 
Hosea12:11 Abakozi b'ebibi ab'omu Gileadi, bwenebwene balizikirira. N'alutaari edh'omu Giligali dhe bagheeraku ente enume ng'emisengo, dhirifuuka ng'oti mmungo dha mabaale edhiri mu nimiro.”" 
Hosea12:12 Yakobo yalumukira mu nsi Aramu, yaatuuka eyo yaayayiranga omuntu entaama, ng'apakasa asobole okufuna omukazi." 
Hosea12:13 Musengwa Katonda yatuma omulanzi, yaaja yaatoola Abaisiraeli mu nsi Misiri era yaabalabirira." 
Hosea12:14 Abaisiraeli baasonsoonia Musengwa Katonda, baamuleetera okubasungughalira einho. Kale Musengwa Katonda talibasonigha olw'emisango gy'obutemo gye baiza. Alibabonereza olw'okumuleetera okuvumirirwa." 
Hosea13:1 Mu biseera ebyabita, ab'ekika kya Efuraimu bwe baayogeranga, ng'ab'ebika ebindi mu Isiraeli badhugumira. Abaefuraimu abo baateebwangamu ekinhagansi. Aye nga bwe beereetera omusango olw'okusinza omusambwa Baali, bali n'okufa." 
Hosea13:2 Ni ye buli eno bakaaja mu maiso n'okukola ebibi, nga bakola ebifaananie mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa. Ebifaananie ebyo babikola n'obukugu mu feeza waibwe nga bigheesebwa bantu buntu. Agho baakoba abantu bati: “Mugheeyo emisengo eri ebifaananie ebyo.” Aye abantu basobola batya okunhwegera ebifaananie ebyo eby'ente ento bye bakola obukole?" 
Hosea13:3 Kale ni abantu abo baliwaagho ng'oti lufu lwa ku nkyo, era ng'oti musulo ogukala nga bukaali na nkyo. Baliba ng'oti musinsi empewo gw'efuuwa okuva ghe bakubira engaano, era ng'oti mwosi ogufuumuukira mu kituli ni gubulagho." 
Hosea13:4 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe eyabatoola mu nsi Misiri. Muzira Katonda wundi okutoolaku nze. Era muzira mulokozi wundi okutoolaku nze. 
Hosea13:5 Ninze eyabalabiriranga nga muli mu irungu, mu nsi enkalu." 
Hosea13:6 Aye bwe mwatuuka mu nsi enungi, ni mulya era ni mwiguta, olwo mwatoolera okwekuluntaza, mwaneerabira." 
Hosea13:7 Kale ndibalumba ng'oti mpologoma, era naabwama ku mbali kw'engira ng'oti mpala, naabeeteega." 
Hosea13:8 Ndibatuumiraku ng'oti n'ekisolo ekikambwe kye banhazeeku obwana bwakyo, naabayuzaamu ghabiri. Ndibakankamira nga muli gheene agho ng'oti mpologoma yeene, naabayuzayuzaamu bukutukutu ng'oti nsolo ya mu nsiko." 
Hosea13:9 Ndibazikiriza imwe Abaisiraeli. Naani alisobola okubayamba? 
Hosea13:10 Imwe mwaidha mwansaba muti, ‘Tughe kyabazinga, otughe n'abakulembeze.’ Aye mperaano kyabazinga waimwe ali gha abalokole? Abakulembeze baimwe boonaboona bali gha babalwanirire?" 
Hosea13:11 Nabagha bakyabazinga nga ndiku obusungu, era naamala naababatoolaku nga ndiku ekiruyi." 
Hosea13:12 Ekibi n'omusango eby'Abaisiraeli byaghandiikibwa bukalamu, byateebwa mu iterekero." 
Hosea13:13 Abaisiraeli abo bali n'omukisa ogw'okuba abalamu. Aye olw'obusiru bwaibwe tibasobola kugukozesa. Bali ng'oti mwana atuuse okuzaalibwa, aye n'aloba okufuluma mu nda ya inhina!" 
Hosea13:14 Tirinunula bantu bano kubatoola mu magombe, waire okubawonia okufa. Iwe Okufa, ebibamba by'osindikira abantu biri gha? Iwe Amagombe, okuzikiriza kwo kuli gha? Nze tikaali na kusaasira naire." 
Hosea13:15 Abaisiraeli ni bwe baliba nga n'abali obulungi mu baganda baibwe, nze Musengwa Katonda ndisindika empewo yange ey'e buvandhuba eva mu irungu, yaidha yaakaza ensulo dhaibwe n'emiiga gyaibwe. Era erikokoobya ebintu byaibwe eby'omughendo byonabyona bye baatereka." 
Hosea13:16 Ab'e Samaria balivunaanibwa omusango olw'okundheemera nze Katonda waibwe. Abazigu balibaitira mu ntalo, era abazigu abo balikuba abaana baibwe abaghere ku itaka, baabasekembula okutuusa okufa. N'abakazi baibwe abali enda balibasala amabunda baagaawuza.”" 
Hosea14:1 Imwe Abaisiraeli, mwire eri Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda waimwe, kuba ebibi byaimwe byabaleetera okwekontola mwagwa." 
Hosea14:2 Mwire eri Musengwa Katonda era okusaba kwaimwe n'okube kufuuke ekigheebwayo kyaimwe kye mumugha, nga mumweghemba muti: “Tusonighe ebibi byaife byonabyona, osanhukire ebyo ebirungi mu ife. Twidha kukusaakanga n'eminwa gyaife." 
Hosea14:3 Ensi Assiria tesobola kutuwonia, n'embalaasi edh'omu lutalo tidhiidha kutuyamba. Era tituliirayo kabiri kweta ebintu bye twekolera n'engalo dhaife, tuti, ‘Katonda waife’; kuba iwe ogemerwa ekisa abo abaziraku babayamba.”" 
Hosea14:4 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndiiza abantu bange ye ndi, naabagonzanga n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona; kuba ndekeire okubasungughalira." 
Hosea14:5 Ng'amaadhi bwe gagwa ku itaka eikalu ni linoga amaadhi obukalamu, zeena ntyo bwe ndigha Abaisiraeli ebirungi kamaala. Baliba ng'oti kisimbe ekimuliisa ekimuli, era baasimba emizi mu itaka, baagumiragho ng'oti miti emipopulari egy'e Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:6 Baliba n'obulamu buyaaka ng'oti muti ogusibwisa ensaga ni dheeyandhala, era nga baboneka bulungi ng'oti miti myoliva. Baliwunha akawoowo ng'oti ka miti egy'e Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Baliira ye ndi naabakuumanga nga mbalabirira. Baliba ng'oti nimiro ebaziiza emere, era baamulisa ekimuli ng'oti muzabbibu. Balimanhikana inho ng'oti n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogw'e Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:8 Abaisiraeli tibaliirayo kabiri kusinza ebitali Katonda. Ndidha kubaghanga kye banansabanga, era ndidha kubalabiriranga. Ndidha kubateerangagho ekinsense ng'oti n'omuti ogutawaawuza makaba. Ninze ensimuko ey'ebirungi byonabyona bye bafuna.”" 
Hosea14:9 Buli ali n'amagezi agwaine ategeere ebyo, era kiisi ali n'okutegeera agwaine abitengaku omwoyo; kuba Musengwa Katonda by'akola bituufu. Abo abeesimbu babijiiraku, aye aboonooni babyekontolaku baagwa bugwe." 
Joel1:1 Buno n'obukwenda Musengwa Katonda bwe yatuma Yoeli mutabane wa Pethueli aje akobere abantu. 
Joel1:2 Imwe abantu abakaire, muwulire kino imwe mwenamwena ab'omu mu Buyudaaya, mutege amatu. Ekintu ng'oti ni kino kibangaghooku mu biseera byaimwe oba mu bya badhaadha baimwe?" 
Joel1:3 Mukikoberenga abaana baimwe, boona bakikoberenga abaana baibwe, n'abo boona bakoberenga ab'oluse oluliiragho." 
Joel1:4 Ebikuukuulu n'ebikuukuulu eby'enzige byaidha, byagwa ku bisimbe; nga buli kikuukuulu ekisookagho kirya nga bwe kisobola, ate bye kireseegho byaliibwa ekikuukuulu ekindi ekiiragho." 
Joel1:5 Imwe abatamiivu, muzuuke mulire amaziga; muwowoole imwe abanhwa omwenge; kuba emizabbibu mwe bakola omwenge ogubawoomera gizikiriziibwa!" 
Joel1:6 Eigye ery'enzige lirumbye ensi yaife. Dhiri kamaala inho edhitabalika era nga dha maani. Amaino gaadho masongovu era moogi ng'oti ga mpologoma. 
Joel1:7 Dhaazikiriza emizabbibu gyaife, dhaaguguna n'emiti gyaife emitiini. Dhaagimalaku ebiwuudhu byonabyona era ensaga dhaagyo dhaalanguka ng'obona bwa byeru." 
Joel1:8 Mulire amaziga imwe, ng'oti n'omughala omwegha eyeesibye ekikaakaati, ng'alirira omusaadha afiire y'abaire aja okufumbirwa." 
Joel1:9 Bakabona abagheereza Musengwa Katonda bali mu kulira maziga; kuba tighakaali bigheebwayo bya mere ya mpeke, waire ebigheebwayo eby'okunhwa bye batwala mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
Joel1:10 Enimiro dhaazika, eitaka lyawolongera; kuba engaano yazikirizibwa, emizabbibu mwe bakunha omwenge gyaniala, n'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva mwe bakamula omuzigo byakala." 
Joel1:11 Imwe abalimi munakughale; imwe abalabirira emizabbibu muwowoole. Kuba engaano, ni Sayiri, n'ebindi byonabyona ebikungulwa bizikiriire." 
Joel1:12 Emizabbibu n'emitiini gyaniala. Emikomamawanga, n'eminaazi, n'emiti egindi gyonagyona egy'ebibala gyakala. Era eisanhu mu bantu lyabula." 
Joel1:13 Imwe bakabona muvaale ekutiya mulire enaku, muwowoole imwe abagheereza ku alutaari. Imwe abagheereza ba Katonda wange, mwingire mu isinzizo musule nga muvaire kutiya olw'okunakughala; kuba tighakaali bigheebwayo bya mere ya mpeke waire ebigheebwayo eby'okunhwa ebireetebwa mu isinzizo lya Katonda waimwe." 
Joel1:14 Mulangirire ghabeegho okusiiba, mwete abantu beesoloze ghalala. Musoloze abakulembeze n'abantu boonaboona ab'omu Buyudaaya, baidhe mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda waimwe, mumulirire amaziga, ababeere." 
Joel1:15 Tukagwireku! Olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda luli kumpi; olunaku oyo Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona lw'alireeteraku okuzikirira. 
Joel1:16 Ebirime byaife babizikiriiza nga tulingiriire tuti, n'eisanhu lyawaagho mu isinzizo lya Katonda waife." 
Joel1:17 Ensigo dhaife dhifiira mu biwumpu eby'eitaka eikalu. Amaterekero gawolongeire gaayonooneka, kuba tighakaali mere ya kugaterekamu." 
Joel1:18 Wulira ensolo nga bwe dhirira! Ente dhisobeirwa olw'okubulwa eisubi ery'okulya. N'entaama dhoona dhiri kudaagadaaga. 
Joel1:19 Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe ye ndirira, kuba eisubi mu byayiro n'emiti mu nsiko bikaze ng'oti babyokiikya bwa muliro." 
Joel1:20 N'ensolo edh'omu nsiko dhikulirira, olw'amaadhi agaakala mu miiga n'olw'eisubi eryakala mu byayiro ng'oti lye bookiikya omuliro." 
Joel2:1 Mufuuwe eigwala mu Sioni; mukube enduulu ku lusozi lwa Katonda olutukuvu. Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya boonaboona ka badhugumire, kuba olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda luli kwidha, era luli kumpi kutuuka." 
Joel2:2 Luliba lunaku nga lwa kifu era nga lwa kazigizigi, olwidhwire ebire ebyereere ku igulu n'enzikiiza agemye bedimudimu! Eigye eikologho ery'enzige liiryo liri kwidha, nga libuutikiire ensozi ng'oti nzikiiza. Tighabangaghooku nzige dhaaga n'edho bungi, era tidhiribaagho kabiri ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Joel2:3 Aghantu ghe dhiriire ebimera ghaba ng'oti muliro n'ogwokiikyagho. Emberi ye dhikaali kutuuka, ensi eba ng'oti n'enimiro ey'e Edeni, aye einhuma ye dhimaze okubita efuuka bifulukwa byereere omutaba bantu. Ghazira kintu waire ekirala kiti kye dhitazikiriza." 
Joel2:4 Mu mboneka, enzige edho dhiboneka ng'oti mbalaasi, era dhirumuka ng'oti mbalaasi dha mu lutalo." 
Joel2:5 Dhituumiratuumira ku ngulu kw'ensozi nga dhivuuma ng'oti n'okupakalania okw'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo; era ng'oti n'okutulikatulika okw'eisubi eikalu nga liri kumamulwa omuliro. Dhisimbye enhiriri ng'oti igye lya maani eryetegeike okulwana. 
Joel2:6 Abantu bwe badhirengera nga dhija ye bali, batya inho baasiiwuuka n'okusiiwuuka." 
Joel2:7 Dhirumba ng'oti balwani, dhaaghalampa ebimante ng'oti baisirukale. Buli ndala ejiira mu luje lwayo, aghazira kuluvaamu naire." 
Joel2:8 Tidhisindikagana naire, buli ndala ejiira mu ngira yaayo. Ni bweghabaagho abakuumi dhighaguza bughaguze, ghaaloba kubaagho adhirobera kuja." 
Joel2:9 Dhituumira mu kibuga dhaakirumba, dhaatuuka ku mayumba, dhaaghalampa ebimante byago, dhaingirira mu madinisa ng'oti baibi." 
Joel2:10 Bwe dhiba dhiidha, ensi yeesunda n'eigulu lyatengeeta. Endhuba n'omwezi biirugala, n'emuunienie dhaalekera okwaka." 
Joel2:11 Musengwa Katonda atyabuka ng'oti lukuba, yaagha eigye lye ebiragiro. Ebikunsu by'abaisirukale be ebingi era eby'amaani, bigondera ebiragiro bye. Bwenebwene olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda nga lutiisa! Naani aliruwona?" 
Joel2:12 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ni bweriba mperaano, kwona mwenenie bya bwenebwene. Mwire ye ndi nga musiiba era nga mulira amaziga." 
Joel2:13 Mutakanulamu bivaalo byaimwe okwoleka nga bwe munakughaire, aye mwemenhe mu myoyo gyaimwe, ekyo n'ekibe kyoleke okwenenia kwaimwe.” Kale ni mwire ye Musengwa Katonda waimwe, kuba wa kivunika era asaasira inho. Agonza inho abantu obutalekera era yaabaguminkiriza. Buliidho aba mwetegefu okukyusa ebirowoozo bye, yaaloba kubabonereza." 
Joel2:14 Tomanha, oba katyo asobola okukyusa ekirowoozo kye yaabasonigha, yaaleka ng'abaghaire enkabi, mwabaza ebirime. Agho mwasobola okumugha ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke n'eby'okunhwa." 
Joel2:15 Mufuuwe amagwala mu Sioni, mulagire abantu basiibe, okusiiba okutukuvu. Era mwete abantu beesololeze okusinza." 
Joel2:16 Musololeze ghalala abantu, beetukuze nga beetegekera okusinza. Mwete abantu abakulu, n'abaana abato, era n'abayonka. N'abagole abaakafumbiraganwa, boona bave mu bisenge byaibwe baidhe." 
Joel2:17 Bakabona abagheereza Musengwa Katonda, ka balirire amaziga ghagati gh'omulyango gw'eisinzizo ni alutaari, nga bakoba bati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda saasira abantu bo. Otatuleka kufuuka kivumo era eky'okwogeraku mu bamaghanga agandi, nga bakoba bati, ‘Memale Katonda waibwe aligha.’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalumirwa ensi ye, era yaasaasira abantu be." 
Joel2:19 Yairamu abantu be ati: “Bona eno, ndidha kubagha engaano, n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, n'omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, ebiidha okubaigusa. Era tikaabaleka kuba kivumo eri bamaghanga gandi." 
Joel2:20 Ndidha kutoolagho eigye ery'enzige edhaava ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Edhindi ndidha kudhibingira mu irungu ezira bantu: edho edhiri mu bikunsu ebikulembeiremu ndidha kudhisindika mu Nhandha Eyomuunhu. Ate edho edhiri mu bikunsu eby'einhuma ndidha kudhisindika mu Nhandha Eyaghagati. Ndidhizikiriza olw'ebibi bye dhaabakola, era emirambo gyadho giriwunha inho." 
Joel2:21 Imwe enimiro, mutatya, aye musangaale era musagambe, kuba Musengwa Katonda atukoleire eby'amaani." 
Joel2:22 Imwe ensolo edh'omu nsiko, mutatya, kuba eisubi lisibwike mu nsiko; emiti gibaze ebibala, emitiini n'emizabbibu gitaireku ebibala kamaala." 
Joel2:23 Imwe abantu ab'e Sioni, musangaale era musagambire mu Musengwa Katonda waimwe; kuba abaleeteire amaadhi agasooka gaagwa mu bungi obutuufu bwene. Abaghaire amaadhi amatoigo n'amasambya, gaagwa mu bungi nga bwe kyalinga eira." 
Joel2:24 Ebifo aghakubirwa engaano biriidhula engaano, n'ebikunhiro eby'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu byaidhula omwenge, era n'ebifo aghakamulirwa omuzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva byona byaidhula omuzigo." 
Joel2:25 Ndibairizaagho bye mwafiirwa ebyaliibwa ebikuukuulu n'ebikuukuulu eby'enzige edhaidha, nze mwene dhe nasindika okubalumba ng'eigye eryange eikologho." 
Joel2:26 Mwidha kubanga n'eby'okulya kamaala ebinaabaigusanga, ni musaaka eriina lyange nze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, eyabakolera ebyewuunhisa. Abantu bange tibaliirayo kabiri kuswazibwa." 
Joel2:27 Olwo imwe Abaisiraeli mulimanha nga nze mba mu imwe, era nga nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze zenka Katonda waimwe, ezirayo wundi. Abantu bange tibaliirayo kabiri kuswazibwa.”" 
Joel2:28 “Ebyo nga biwoire, ekiseera kirituuka naayugha omwoyo gwange ku bantu boonaboona. Batabane baimwe ni baghala baimwe baliranga ebiribaagho, abakaire mu imwe baaloota ebirooto, n'abaisuka baimwe baabonekerwa." 
Joel2:29 Mu biseera ebyo ndiyugha omwoyo gwange ni ku bagheereza, ka babe basaadha oba abakazi." 
Joel2:30 “Ndyoleka ebyamagero ku igulu ni ku nsi. Ghalibaagho omusaayi, n'omuliro, n'omwosi ogwesimbye ng'oti mpango." 
Joel2:31 Endhuba erifuuka nzikiiza, n'omwezi gwamyuka ng'oti musaayi, memale olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda olukulu era olw'entiisa lwatuuka." 
Joel2:32 Aye kiisi alisaba Musengwa Katonda okumubeera alirokolebwa, kuba ku lusozi Sioni mu Yerusalemu eribaayo abaliwona, nga Musengwa Katonda mwene bwe yakoba. Abo Musengwa Katonda mwene baalirondamu n'abaliwonagho.”" 
Joel3:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bona eno, mu kiseera ekyo kyene ndireetera abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, ebintu byairamu okubajiiranga obukalamu kabiri." 
Joel3:2 Ndisoloza abamaghanga goonagoona, naabatwala mu kyetebwa Ekiiko kya Yehoshafati. Era nga bali eyo, ndibasalira omusango olw'ebyo bye baakola ku bantu bange Abaisiraeli kuba baabasansaaniza eyo mu maghanga, era baagabana ensi yange Isiraeli." 
Joel3:3 Baakubira obululu ku bantu bange, baaghaayo abalenzi okusasulira abakazi bamalaaya, era baaghaayo abaghala okubagulamu omwenge, era baagunhwa." 
Joel3:4 “Muli kugezaaku kunkola ki, imwe ab'e Tiro, n'ab'e Sidoni, n'ab'omu biketezo by'e Filisitia? Ghaligho kye muli kwenda okuneesasuulizaaku? Oba nga ekyo kye muli kwenda, nze mwene ndibeesasuulizaaku imwe amangu n'embiro, olw'ebikolwa byaimwe." 
Joel3:5 Olw'okuba mwatoola feeza wange ni zaabu wange, mwatoola n'eby'obukombe byange, mwabitwala mu masabo gaimwe." 
Joel3:6 Mwatoola abantu b'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Yerusalemu mu nsi yaibwe, mwabatwaliriza eghala, mwabaguza Abagureki." 
Joel3:7 Aye mperaano nja kuleetera abantu abo okuva eyo ye mwabatunda, olwo mwena mbeesasuulizeeku nga mbakola kyene ekyo kye mwabakola." 
Joel3:8 Ndidha kuleetera batabane baimwe ni baghala baimwe okutundibwa mu Bayudaaya. Ate boona bamale babaguze Abasabea, eighanga eriri eyo eghala einho. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Joel3:9 Mulangirire kino eyo mu maghanga, muti, ‘Mutegeke olutalo; mwete abalwani ab'amaani, mukobe abaisirukale beesoloze baidhe." 
Joel3:10 Edhibaire embago dhaimwe edh'okulimisa, mudhigheeseemu mpiima dha kulwanisa; n'obusolobyo obw'okuwoolera, mubugheeseemu mafumo ga kulwanisa. N'abanafu boona ka bafuuke balwani." 
Joel3:11 Mwanguye mwidhe, imwe abamaghanga goonagoona ageezungulwire agho, mukole mwesololeze eyo mu kiiko.’ ” Wo Musengwa Katonda, leeta abalwani bo ab'amaani." 
Joel3:12 “Abantu ab'amaghanga ka basitukiremu, baje mu Kiiko kya Yehoshafati; kuba eyo nze Musengwa Katonda ye ndityama okulamula amaghanga goonagoona ageezungulwire agho." 
Joel3:13 Ekibi kyaibwe kye baakola kinene inho! Kale mubasale n'emiwolo ng'oti n'engaano etuuse okukungula. Mubatyankirire ng'oti n'emizabbibu egiidhwire mu kikunhiro eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ni gibanda n'okubanda.” 
Joel3:14 Abantu enkunkumuli n'enkunkumuli bali mu Kiiko eky'Okusaliramu Omusango, kuba eyo olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda ye luja okutuukira amangu geene." 
Joel3:15 Endhuba n'omwezi biirugaire, n'emuunienie dhaalekera okwaka." 
Joel3:16 Musengwa Katonda awologoma ku lusozi Sioni era yaakaabuka mu Yerusalemu, eigulu n'ensi byatengeeta. Aye Musengwa Katonda oyo n'ekifo abantu be Abaisiraeli mwe balumukira okwewonia, era n'ekifo mwe beewogoma." 
Joel3:17 “Olwo mulimanha nga ninze Musengwa Katonda waimwe, era nga mba ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu Sioni. Yerusalemu kiriba kibuga kitukuvu, era abagwira tibaliiramu kukighangula kabiri." 
Joel3:18 Mu kiseera ekyo, ensozi dhiriidhula enimiro dh'emizabbibu, n'obusozi bwaidhula ente edhikamwa. Obwiga bw'omu Buyudaaya bwonabwona buliidhula amaadhi. Era ghalibaagho ensulo ey'amaadhi erikuuluula ng'eva mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, yaaja yaafukirira Ekiiko eky'e Shittimu." 
Joel3:19 Ensi Misiri erifuuka irungu, n'ensi Edomu yaafuuka bifulukwa byereere; kuba abantu b'omu nsi edho baalumba Buyudaaya, baita abantu abaziraku musango." 
Joel3:20 Aye mu Buyudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu, mwidha kubangamu abantu ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Joel3:21 Ndyesasuuza olw'omusaayi gw'abo abaitibwa aghazira kusaasira muntu yeenayeena aliku musango. Era nze Musengwa Katonda ndidha kubanga mu Sioni.” 
Amos1:1 Bino n'ebibono bya Amosi, eyali omwayi ow'oku kyalo Tekoa, ng'ekaabulayo emyaka ebiri musisi abite. Mu kiseera ekyo Uzzia yali nga ni kyabazinga ow'e Buyudaaya, ate Yeroboamu mutabane wa Yehoashi, yaaba nga n'owa Isiraeli. Katonda yayoleka Amosi ebintu bino byonabyona ebyali bija okuba ku Isiraeli." 
Amos1:2 Amosi yakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda awologoma ku lusozi Sioni, era yaakaabuka mu Yerusalemu. Ebyayiro abaayi mwe baayira bikala, n'eisubi ku lusozi Karumeli lyawotoka.”" 
Amos1:3 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu ab'e Siria bakoze ebibi emikuzi kamaala. N'olw'ensonga eyo nteekwa buteekwe okubabonereza. Kuba baabisa abantu ab'e Gileadi mu bukambwe obutaloodheka. 
Amos1:4 Kale nja kusindika omuliro gwokye ekisaagaati kya kyabazinga Hazaeli, era gusenkeenhe ebifo byonabyona eby'okwewogomamu ebya kyabazinga Benihadadi." 
Amos1:5 Era nja kumenha olwigi olwigala ekibuga ekyo Damasiko, nzikirize abantu ababa mu kiiko ekyetebwa Aveni, n'omufuzi ow'e Bethedeni. Abantu ab'e Siria baja kutwalibwa mu nsi Kiri nga banhage.”" 
Amos1:6 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu ab'e Filisitia bakoze ebibi emikuzi kamaala. N'olw'ensonga eyo nteekwa buteekwe okubabonereza kuba baatwala abantu ab'eighanga eiramba nga banhage, baabatunda mu Edomu babe abairu." 
Amos1:7 Kale nja kusindika omuliro gwokye ekimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga Gaza, era gusenkeenhe ebifo byakyo byonabyona eby'okwewogomamu." 
Amos1:8 Era nja kuzikiriza abafuzi ababa mu bibuga Ashidodi ni Ashikeloni, era mbonereze ekibuga Ekuroni, n'Abafilisiti abaliba bawoniegho bazikirire.”" 
Amos1:9 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu ab'e Tiro bakoze ebibi emikuzi kamaala. N'olw'ensonga eyo nteekwa buteekwe okubabonereza kuba baatwala abantu ab'eighanga eiramba mu bunhage mu nsi Edomu, baaloba kukuuma ndagaano ye baakola." 
Amos1:10 Kale nja kusindika omuliro gwokye ekimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga ekyo Tiro, era gusenkeenhe ebifo byakyo byonabyona eby'okwewogomamu.”" 
Amos1:11 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu ab'e Edomu bakoze ebibi emikuzi kamaala. N'olw'ensonga eyo nteekwa buteekwe okubabonereza kuba baayiiga baganda baibwe Abaisiraeli, baabaita aghazira kusaasira naire. Era obusungu bwaibwe bwaloba kukendeeraku naire, aye baabusiba ku mwoyo enaku dhoonadhoona." 
Amos1:12 Kale nja kusindika omuliro gwokye ekibuga Temani, era gusenkeenhe ebifo byonabyona eby'okwewogomamu ebiri e Bozira.”" 
Amos1:13 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu ab'omu Ammoni bakoze ebibi emikuzi kamaala. N'olw'ensonga eyo nteekwa buteekwe okubabonereza kuba, mu ntalo dhe baalwana okugaziya ekiketezo kyaibwe, baasalanga amabunda g'abakazi be baayagaananga nga bali nda mu Gileadi." 
Amos1:14 Kale nja kusindika omuliro gwokye ekimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga Rabba, era gusenkeenhe ebifo byakyo byonabyona eby'okwewogomamu. Ghaja kubaagho okuleekaana ku lunaku olw'olutalo, era okulwana kuja kuwuuma ng'oti ni kiwunga ow'amaani." 
Amos1:15 Olwo kyabazinga ow'Abammoni balimutwala mu bunhage aghalala n'abakungu be.” 
Amos2:1 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu ab'e Moabu bakoze ebibi emikuzi kamaala. N'olw'ensonga eyo nteekwa buteekwe okubabonereza kuba baayokya amagumba aga kyabazinga ow'Abaedomu gafuuka ivu. 
Amos2:2 Kale nja kusindika omuliro gwokye Abamoabu, era gusenkeenhe ebifo byaibwe byonabyona eby'okwewogomamu eby'omu kibuga Keriothi. Abantu Abamoabu balifiira mu kuwowoigana okw'omu lutalo, ng'abalwani bali kwasiikana nga n'endeka dhiri kuvuga." 
Amos2:3 Nja kwita omufuzi w'Abamoabu aghalala n'abakungu boonaboona ab'omu nsi eyo.” 
Amos2:4 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu ab'e Buyudaaya bakoze ebibi emikuzi kamaala. N'olw'ensonga eyo nteekwa buteekwe okubabonereza kuba baanhooma amateeka gange, n'ebiragiro byange baaloba kubigema. Baatwalirizibwa emisambwa badhaadha baibwe gye baasinzanga." 
Amos2:5 Kale nja kusindika omuliro gwokye Abayudaaya abo, era gusenkeenhe ebifo byaibwe eby'okwewogomamu eby'omu Yerusalemu.”" 
Amos2:6 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu Abaisiraeli bakoze ebibi emikuzi kamaala. N'olw'ensonga eyo nteekwa buteekwe okubabonereza kuba batunda abantu abatuufu mu bwiru, olw'obutasobola kusasula mabandha agababandhibwa. Era baatunda abaavu, olw'obutasobola kusasula waire omughendo ogugula omuyimbo gw'engaito." 
Amos2:7 Batyankirira abaavu ng'oti n'abatyankirira enkungu, baasindika ere abaghafu babaviire mu ngira. Omulenzi n'ise baja ku mukazi mulala, mu nsambo eyo baaba nga boonoona eriina lyange eitukuvu." 
Amos2:8 Batenduka mu masinzizo ku ngoye dhe batoola ku baavu ng'omusingo. Era mu ndhu yange nze Katonda waibwe banhweramu omwenge gwe babaleeteire ng'omutango.” 
Amos2:9 “Ate nga ku lwaibwe nze nazikiriza nasaaniagho Abamori, abaali abaleeyiriri ng'oti mivule era ab'amaani ng'oti n'emiti emikologho." 
Amos2:10 Era ninze eyabatoola mu nsi Misiri, naababisa mu irungu okumala emyaka amakumi ana (40), naabaleeta mutwale ensi ey'Abamori abo ebe yaimwe." 
Amos2:11 Naalonda abandi ku batabane baimwe naabafuula abalanzi, n'abandi ku baisuka baimwe naabafuula Abanaziri. Imwe Abaisiraeli ekyo ti bwekiri? Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze ndi kubabuuza." 
Amos2:12 Aye mwaleetera Abanaziri okunhwa omwenge era mwalobera abalanzi akukobera abantu obukwenda bwange. 
Amos2:13 “Kale ni bona eno, nja kubasiinhira ku itaka, mube ng'oti n'ekigaali ekighaluzibwa ekiidhwire engaano." 
Amos2:14 Waire abalumusi einho mu imwe, embiro dhija kubabula, n'ab'amaani amangi gaja kubawaamu, n'abalwani ab'amaani einho tibaja kusobola kwewonia beene." 
Amos2:15 Abalasi ab'obulaso tibaja kukana kwemereragho, waire ab'amagulu agalumuka einho okusobola okwewonia, oba abavuzi ab'embalaasi okuwonia bulamu bwaibwe." 
Amos2:16 Ku lunaku olwo, n'abalwani ab'amaani abaziramu ntete baja kusuula eby'okulwanisa byaibwe balumuke.” Atyo Musengwa Katonda bw'akoba." 
Amos3:1 Imwe Abaisiraeli abantu Musengwa Katonda be yatoola mu Misiri, muwulire Musengwa Katonda oyo by'aboogeireku." 
Amos3:2 Akoba ati: “Mu maghanga goonagoona agali ku nsi, eryaimwe lyonka lye nalondamu. Ekyo n'ekireetera okwonoona kwaimwe okuba okubi einho, era zeena kyenva ni nteekwa okubabonereza olw'okwonoona kwaimwe okwo.”" 
Amos3:3 Era Amosi yaakoba ati, abantu ababiri basobola okutambulira aghalala nga tibaisainia?" 
Amos3:4 Empologoma ewologomera mu kibira nga ghazira ky'ezize? Empologoma ento evuumira mu mpuku yaayo nga ghazira ky'egemiisa? 
Amos3:5 Enhonhi egwa ku mutego nga tibagiteze na kya kulya? Omutego gumasuka nga ghazira kigukonseeku? 
Amos3:6 Eigwala eriraalika olutalo, lifuuyibwa mu kibuga abantu baaloba kutya? Akabi kagwa ku kibuga nga Musengwa Katonda ti n'akasindiike?" 
Amos3:7 Mu butuufu bwene, ghazira Musengwa Katonda ky'akola mu kyama nga takyoleike bagheereza be abalanzi." 
Amos3:8 Empologoma bw'ewologoma, naani asobola obutatya? Musengwa Katonda bw'ayogera, naani aghanga okuloba okulangirira obukwenda bwe?" 
Amos3:9 Mulangirire eri ababa mu bisaagaati mu Ashidodi n'eri ababa mu bisaagaati mu nsi Misiri. Mubakobe muti: “Mwesololeze ku nsozi dha Samaria mubone ebikolwa eby'obukambwe ebitiisa, n'eby'okutuntuzibwa ebikolebwa mu Samaria.”" 
Amos3:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu abo tibaidhi kukolera ku butuufu, okutoolaku okwidhuza endhu dhaibwe ebintu ebinhage n'ebiibe." 
Amos3:11 Kyova abazigu baliidha baazingiza ensi yaibwe, baamenhamenha ebimante byaibwe ebigumu era baanhaga eby'omu ndhu dhaibwe.”" 
Amos3:12 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ng'omwayi w'entaama bw'awoniagho amagulu abiri obubiri, oba akatundu obutundu aka kutu, n'Abaisiraeli ababa mu Samaria boona batyo bwe baliwonezebwa n'ensonda ey'omwito, n'akatundu ak'obuliri.”" 
Amos3:13 Musengwa Katonda afuga amagye akoba ati: “Muwulire bino era mulabule baidhukulu ba Yakobo: 
Amos3:14 Ku lunaku lwe ndibonerezaaku Abaisiraeli olw'ebibi byaibwe, nja kuzikiriza alutaari edh'e Betheli. N'ebintu ebiri ng'oti mayiga ga nsolo ebiba ku nsonda dhaadho nja kubimenhaku mbisuule ku itaka." 
Amos3:15 Nja kuzikiriza endhu dhe babaamu mu biseera eby'ekiinhogogo, ni dhe babaamu mu biseera eby'akasana. Endhu dhe baazimba n'amasanka dhija kusaanagho, n'endhu enkologho dhija kuzikirizibwa.”" 
Amos4:1 Muwulire bino imwe abakyala ababa mu Samaria, abageedhie ng'oti n'ente edh'e Bashani. Mutuntuza abaghafu era mwakamula abaavu, mwalagira baibaimwe okubasombera ebitamiiza:" 
Amos4:2 Musengwa Katonda alayiire mu butukuvu bwe ati: “Ekiseera kiidha kutuuka abantu babatunge ku malobo, babaghaluudhanie ng'oti n'ebyenhandha bwebabighaluza mu maadhi mwenamwena muja kuba ng'oti n'ebyenhandha ebiri ku malobo." 
Amos4:3 Balibaghaluliza mu bituli ebibali okumpi nga bibbomoirwa mu kimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga. Ng'olwo babatwala babasuula e Harumoni.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba. 
Amos4:4 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Imwe Abaisiraeli, muje mu kifo ekitukuvu eky'e Betheli mukole ebibi, muje n'e Giligali mweyongere okwonoona. Muleete emisengo buli nkyo era mugheeyo ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli ikumi bye mufuna buli luvainhuma lwa nnaku isatu." 
Amos4:5 Era mugheeyo emigaati egizimbulukusiibwa ng'omusengo ogw'okwebaza Katonda. Era mulangirire ebigheebwayo byaimwe eby'ekyeyendere okumanhisa buli muntu kuba ekyo mukyenda inho! 
Amos4:6 “Ninze eyabasindikira endhala mu bibuga byaimwe byonabyona, emere yaabula buli ghantu woonawoona. Aye era mwaloba okwira ye ndi." 
Amos4:7 Naagemerera amaadhi gaaloba kugwa mu kiseera ebirime byaimwe ghe byageetaagira einho, ng'ekaabulayo emyezi esatu okutuuka ku kukungula. Naatoonhesaaku amaadhi mu kibuga ekindi aye nga mu kindi tigagwa. Amaadhi gaagwa mu musiri ogundi aye ogundi gwakala olw'amaadhi obutagwa." 
Amos4:8 Kale abantu ab'omu bibuga ebibiri oba ebisatu, baaja nga batambulatambula eyo batyo mu kibuga ekirala okufuna ku maadhi ag'okunhwa, aye nga ti gabamala. Aye era mwaloba okwira ye ndi." 
Amos4:9 “Era ninze eyasindikira ebisimbe byaimwe okuvuluka n'okwengerera, era naakaza emisiri gyaimwe n'amasamba gaimwe ag'emizabbibu. Enzige dhaidha dhaalya emiti gyaimwe emitiini n'emyoliva. Aye era mwaloba okwira ye ndi." 
Amos4:10 “Era ninze eyabasindikira ebibamba okubagwaku, ng'ebyo ebyagwa ku Bamisiri. Naita abaisuka baimwe mu lutalo era abazigu baaja n'embalaasi dhaimwe. Era naidhuza enhindo dhaimwe ekivundu eky'emirambo woonawoona ghe mwasimba weema dhaimwe. Aye era mwaloba okwira ye ndi." 
Amos4:11 “Era ninze eyazikiriza abandi ku imwe nga bwe nazikiriza ab'e Sodoma n'ab'e Gomorra. Imwe abaawonagho mwaba ng'oti n'oluti olutooleibwa mu muliro. Aye era mwaloba okwira ye ndi. 
Amos4:12 “Kale ni Baisiraeli imwe, nja kubabonereza era olw'ekyo mwetegekerenga omusango gwe nja okubasalira.”" 
Amos4:13 A! Katonda n'eyawumba ensozi era yaatonda empewo. Amanhisa abantu ebiri mu mwoyo gwe. Ogubaire omusana abufuula obwire. Atambulira ghaigulu ng'ensi emuli ghansi. Eriina lye ni Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye. 
Amos5:1 Imwe Abaisiraeli muwulire nze Amosi bwe ndi kubembamu olwembo olw'okubalira: 
Amos5:2 “Isiraeli omughala omwegha agwire butasituka. Alekeibwa agho ku itaka nga yeegolomoire. Ghazira naire wa kumuyambaku okusitukagho!” 
Amos5:3 Kuba Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ekibuga eky'omu Isiraeli ekirisindika abantu olukumi okulwana, kuliiraku kikumi kyonka n'ekyo ekirisindika abantu ekikumi, kuliiraku ikumi lyonka.”" 
Amos5:4 Musengwa Katonda akoba Abaisiraeli ati: “Mwiremu okunsinza memale mubenga balamu. 
Amos5:5 Aye mutaja Betheli kunsinza, kuba kija kuwaagho. Oba okwingira mu Giligali, kuba ab'eyo bwenebwene baja kutwalibwa mu bunhage. Oba waire okuja e Beerisheba okunsinza.”" 
Amos5:6 Muje musinze Musengwa Katonda memale mube abalamu. Aye bwe mutaaje kumusinza, aidha kutumbukira ku kibuga Betheli ng'oti muliro, gwokye Abaisiraeli nga guziraku n'aguzikiza." 
Amos5:7 Abantu imwe mukagwireku, kuba mufuulaniafuulania amazima, obutuufu mwabusuula ere." 
Amos5:8 Musengwa Katonda n'eyakola emuunienie edheetebwa Puleyadesi ni Orioni. Oyo afuula aghabaire enzikiiza ni ghaaka akasana. Yairugaza obubaire omusana bwafuuka bwire. Era yaayetesa amaadhi ag'omu nhandha yaagafuka ku bukalu. Eriina lye ni Musengwa Katonda. 
Amos5:9 N'oyo aleetera ab'amaani okuzikirira okw'ekibwatukira, n'ebifo byaibwe eby'okwewogomamu okusaanagho." 
Amos5:10 Abantu imwe, mukyagha omuntu abatakania olw'okusaliriza mu mbuga dh'amateeka. Era n'omuntu ayogera amazima abasina." 
Amos5:11 Mutuntuza abaavu, era mwabakaka babaghe imwe engaano yaibwe. Kale ni waire mwazimba endhu edh'amabaale amabaadhe edh'omulembe, timulidhisulamu. Waire mwasimba amasamba ag'emizabbibu agasanhusa, timuja kunhwa ku mwenge gwamu" 
Amos5:12 kuba ndidhi ebibi byaimwe bwe byaga obungi, era naamanha emisango gye mwaiza bwe gyaga obunene. Mudaazadaaza abantu abatuufu, mwalya enguzi. Era mwafuulaniafuulania ensonga edh'abaghafu, mwabasaliriza mu mbuga dh'amateeka." 
Amos5:13 Kale omugezi asirika busirike mu biseera oti n'ebyo, kuba biseera bibi." 
Amos5:14 Mufubenga okukola obulungi era mweghalenga okukola ebibi, memale mubenga abalamu. Olwo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye anaabanga n'imwe, nga bwe mukoba muti ali n'imwe." 
Amos5:15 Mukyaghe ebibi, mugonze ebirungi. Musalenga mu mazima mu mbuga dhaimwe edh'amateeka. Oba katyo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, yaakagemerwa abaliwonagho ku Baisiraeli ekivunika." 
Amos5:16 Kale ni Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye kyava n'akoba ati: “Ghalibaagho okuwowoola mu mpya edh'ekibuga, ni mu nguudo dhaakyo dhoonadhoona, ng'abantu balira bati, ‘Woowe! Woowe!’ Abalimi ghalala n'abo abakola ogw'okugegenga, balyetebwa okukuba empungu n'okuwowoola." 
Amos5:17 Abantu baliwowoola mu masamba g'emizabbibu mu kifo eky'okuzaanha n'okuseka, kuba ndidha kubabonereza nze Musengwa Katonda mwene.”" 
Amos5:18 Mukagwireku, imwe abenda einho olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda lutuuke! Mulwenda lwaki? Tiruliba lunaku lwa isanhu, aye luliba lwa bizibu." 
Amos5:19 Kiriba ng'oti n'omuntu ali kulumuka ku mpologoma, kabiri n'ayagaanana n'ekisolo ekikambwe. Oba ng'oti n'omuntu angira mu ndhu ni yeesiira ku kimante, omusota ni gumumoodha omukono." 
Amos5:20 Mudhuuba muti olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda tiruliba lwa bizibu, aye luliba lwa isanhu? Luliba lwa bizibu oluziraku isanhu naire." 
Amos5:21 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nsiniirwa era tibona makulu mu bibinuko byaimwe. Era timuunhoonha naire, bwe mwesoloza okwidha okunsinza." 
Amos5:22 Ni bwe mumpa ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa, n'ebigheebwayo eby'emere ey'empeke, tiidha kubisiima. Ni bwe mulireeta ensolo dhaimwe empiite ensavu, ni mudhighaayo ng'ebigheebwayo olw'okutabagana, tija kubiringaku naire." 
Amos5:23 Mulekere agho okundhasiikanira mbu munhembera. Era tiidha kuwulirisa kuvuga kwa ntongooli dhaimwe. 
Amos5:24 Aye muleke amazima gabe ga mwero ng'oti maadhi, n'obutuufu bube ng'oti n'omwiga ogutakala." 
Amos5:25 “Imwe Abaisiraeli, nze tyabasabaaku kundeeteranga misengo na bigheebwayo, emyaka amakumi ana (40) gye nababisa mu irungu." 
Amos5:26 Aye buti olw'okuba musinza ebifaananie bya Sakkuthi, omusambwa gwaimwe gukyabazinga, n'ebya Kaiwani, omusambwa gwaimwe ogw'emuunienie, mulija n'ebifaananie ebyo bye mwekolera," 
Amos5:27 ku lunaku lwe ndibaghaayo okutwalibwa mu bunhage mu nsi eri eyo ng'omaze okubisa Damasiko.” Atyo Musengwa Katonda bw'akoba, ayetebwa eriina, “Katonda Afuga Amagye.”" 
Amos6:1 Mukagwireku imwe abali obukalamu mu Sioni! Mukagwireku imwe abawulira emiraala nga muli eyo ku nsozi edh'e Samaria imwe abantu ab'ebitiisa mu ighanga eikologho ery'Abaisiraeli, imwe Abaisiraeli boonaboona ye baidha okunoonia obuyambi." 
Amos6:2 Muje mukyalireku ekibuga Kalune. Era mukyalireku ni Hamathi ekikologho, era mutuukeku ni mu ky'e Gathi eky'abafilisiti. Ebibuga ebyo n'ebisinga obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli n'obwa Yuda mu bulungi n'obugazi?" 
Amos6:3 Mukagwireku imwe abatwala olunaku olw'akabi okuba nga lukaali ghala inho, aye bye mukola ni byongera obwongere okuluseesa okumpi." 
Amos6:4 Mukagwireku imwe abalambaala mu buliri obw'amasanka, era mwegolomola mu miito, nga muli kulya emamba ye mutoire mu bisibo byaimwe eno ya ntaama, kabiri ere ya nte." 
Amos6:5 Mwembera ku ntongooli enhembo edh'ekigayaavu, era mweyiiyiza beene ebivuga ng'oti ni Daudi bwe yakola." 
Amos6:6 Munhwa amabuga amalamba ag'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, era mwesiiga ebizigo ebisinga kuba birungi, aye mwaloba kulumirwa nsi Isiraeli ezikiriire." 
Amos6:7 Olw'ensonga eyo niimwe abalikulemberamu ku abo abalitwalibwa mu bunhage. N'ebibinuko byaimwe eby'ekigayaavu birikoma. 
Amos6:8 Musengwa Katonda afuga amagye, alayiire ati: “Neesiniirwa okwekuluntaza kw'Abaisiraeli, era endhu dhaibwe edhibeeyagaza tidhiinhoonha naire. Kye ndiva ni mpaayo ekibuga kyaibwe ekikulu n'ebikirimu byonabyona eri abazigu baibwe.”" 
Amos6:9 Abantu eikumi bwebalyegisa mu ndhu endala okwewonia, era kwona balimala baafa." 
Amos6:10 Omuntu ali n'oluganda ku mufu era akola ku by'okuziika, bw'aliidha okutoola omulambo mu ndhu, alibuuza oyo aliba ng'akaasigairemu ati: “Eriyo omuntu owundi ali eyo n'iwe?” Ole alimwiramu ati: “Busa.” Olwo ono yaamukoba ati: “Sirika! Tulobe na kwogera ku liina lya Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Amos6:11 Bona eno, Musengwa Katonda bw'aliragira, endhu enkologho n'edho entono dhija kumenhebwamenhebwa dhisigale bumulumulu." 
Amos6:12 Embalaasi dhisobola okulumukira ku mabaale ag'oku nsozi? Omuntu asobola okulima mu nhandha n'embago ey'ente? Aye imwe amazima mugafiiremu butwa, n'obutuufu mwabufuulaniafuulania." 
Amos6:13 Mweyagala mbu kuba mwagema ekibuga Lodebari, era mwesuuta nga mukoba muti: “Titwaghamba kibuga Karanaimu na maani gaife beene?”" 
Amos6:14 Aye Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Imwe Abaisiraeli mubone eno, nja kubasindikaku eighanga libalumbe. Lirituntuza abantu okuviira irala ku mwiga Araba okutuuka ku Hamathi.”" 
Amos7:1 Bino Musengwa Katonda bye yandholeka: naja okulinga nti nga mbona ekibbuututu eky'enzige dhe yali ali kutonda. Byali biseera agho eisubi ghe lisibukira nga baakamala okusalaku ery'okugha ensolo dha kyabazinga. 
Amos7:2 Enzige bwe dhaamala okulya eisubi lyonalyona eryali buli ghantu, naakoba nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghembye sonigha abantu bo! Abaisiraeli banaawonera gha, ate nga batono era banafu?”" 
Amos7:3 Musengwa Katonda yaakyusa ekidhuubo kye. Yaakoba ati: “Kale, ky'oboine tikiidha kubaagho.”" 
Amos7:4 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yandholeka bino: naja okulinga nti nga mmubona ng'alikweta okwokya okw'endhuba okuli ng'oti muliro, kwidhe kubonereze abantu be. Enhandha yali emaze okwokebwa okuva ku ntobo era nga n'obukalu butooleire okuya." 
Amos7:5 Agho naakoba nti: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkweghembye lekeza okwokya okwo. Abaisiraeli banaawonera gha, ate nga batono era banafu?”" 
Amos7:6 Musengwa Katonda yaakyusa ekidhuubo kye. Yaakoba ati: “Kale, ekyo ky'oboine kyona tikiidha kubaagho.”" 
Amos7:7 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yandholeka bino: naja okulinga nti nga mmubona ayemereire gha kimante ekyazimbibwa nga bapimisa omugugha. Yali agemye omugugha ogupima. 
Amos7:8 Agho yambuuza ati: “Amosi, kiki ky'oli kubona?” Naamwiramu nti: “Ndi kubona omugugha ogupima.” Olwo yankoba ati: “Ndi kukozesa omugugha ogupima okwoleka nti abantu bange Abaisiraeli, bali ng'oti n'ekimante ekitatereire. Kale nteekwa buteekwe okubabonereza." 
Amos7:9 Nja kuzikiriza ebifo ebigulumivu baidhukulu ba Isaaka mwe basinziza. Nja kusaaniagho ebifo eby'Abaisiraeli abo ebitukuvu, era nja kusindika abazigu ku kyabazinga Yeroboamu bamughangule.”" 
Amos7:10 Agho Amazia kabona ow'e Betheli yaagheereza Yeroboamu, kyabazinga wa Isiraeli obukwenda nga bukoba buti: “Isebantu kyabazinga, Amosi ng'ali ghano mu bwakyabazinga bwo bwene, ali kukola entegeka edh'okubumalagho. By'ali kukoba bija kutabulatabula abantu ab'omu bwakyabazinga buno." 
Amos7:11 Ali kukoba ati, ‘Kyabazinga Yeroboamu aja kufiira mu lutalo, era Abaisiraeli baja kutwalibwa mu bunhage bave mu nsi yaibwe!’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Agho Amazia yaakoba Amosi ati: “Iwe munaife omulanzi, lumukagho oje mu Buyudaaya. Ja okolere eyo obulanzi bwo era bakugheere eyo empeera yo olye." 
Amos7:13 Aye ghano e Betheli otairayo kukoleragho bulanzi bwo, kuba ghano n'aghali ekifo kyabazinga mw'asinziza, era n'aghali eisinzizo ery'obwakyabazinga bwonabwona.”" 
Amos7:14 Amosi yairamu Amazia ati: “Nze tiri mulanzi akolerera empeera, waire okuba mu lulyo olw'abalanzi. Nze ndi mwayi era omulimi ow'emiti emitiini." 
Amos7:15 Eyo Musengwa Katonda ye yantoola ku gw'okwaya ensolo, yankoba ati, ‘Ja olange eri abantu bange Abaisiraeli.’" 
Amos7:16 Buti ni wulira Musengwa Katonda by'akoba, iwe ali kunkoba ndekere okulanga ebivumirira Isiraeli, n'okukoba ebitali bikalamu ku baidhukulu ba Isaaka." 
Amos7:17 Musengwa Katonda ali kukukoba iwe Amazia ati, ‘Mukazi wo aidha kuba malaaya mu kibuga, ate batabane bo ni baghala bo babaitire mu lutalo. Eitaka lyo baidha kulipima n'omugugha baligabane, n'iwe mwene baidha kukutwala mu nsi etali nongoofu y'olifiira. Era Abaisiraeli bateekwa okutwalibwa mu bunhage bave mu nsi yaibwe.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yandholeka bino: naja okulinga nti nga mbona ekiibo eky'ebibala ebituuse okulya. 
Amos8:2 Yambuuza ati: “Amosi, kiki ky'oli kubona?” Naamwiramu nti: “Ndi kubona ekiibo eky'ebibala ebituuse okulya.” Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Ekiseera kituuse eky'okuzikiriza abantu bange Abaisiraeli. Tija kabiri kwirayo kukyusa kidhuubo kyange ni ndoba kubabonereza." 
Amos8:3 Ku lunaku olwo, edhibairenga enhembo dhe bembera mu isinzizo, dhirifuuka maliro. Ghalibaagho emirambo kamaala inho, nga giri kusuulibwa buli ghantu mu kasirise.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Amos8:4 Imwe abatyankirira abateeghanga era ni muzikiriza abaavu mu nsi eno, muwulire bino:" 
Amos8:5 Muja mwakoba muti: “Enaku enkulu dhiriwaaku li memale tutunde ku birime? Ni Sabbato enaawaku li memale tutunde engaano? Olwo tukendeeze ku bipimo, ate twongezeemu n'emighendo, tusibe minzaani tuseere be tuguza." 
Amos8:6 Tutunde n'obukaba obuva ku ngaano. Era tugule abaavu abatasobola kusasula mabandha agababandhibwa, waire okusasula omughendo ogugula omuyimbo gw'engaito, babe bairu baife.”" 
Amos8:7 Musengwa Katonda, Katonda wa Isiraeli alayiire ati: “Bwenebwene tija kwerabira waire ekirala ku bikolwa byaimwe ebibi." 
Amos8:8 Olw'ebikolwa ebyo, ensi eritengeeta, n'abantu boonaboona baagemwa enaku ensi erisiikuuka, yeefuukuula ng'oti n'omwiga Kiyira." 
Amos8:9 Ku lunaku olwo, ndiragira endhuba yaagwa mu kasana ghagati, era naasindika enzikiiza yaagema ku nsi.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akoba." 
Amos8:10 Era akoba ati: “Ndifuula ebibinuko byaimwe byaba mikolo gya kulira, n'enhembo dhaimwe dhaaba kugegenga. Ndibamwesaaku enviiri ku mitwe gyaimwe okudhimaliriraku ng'oti mpaata, naabaleetera okwesiba ebikaakaati mu nkende mwanakughala, mwaba ng'oti n'abazaire abafiiriirwa omwana waibwe omulenzi omulala bedengedenge. Olunaku olwo luliba lwa bulumi lwonalwona." 
Amos8:11 “Bona eno, ekiseera kiidha kutuuka nsindike endhala ku nsi. Abantu baja kulumwa endhala ti lwa kubulwa mere, era bawulire endiwo ti lwa kubula maadhi, aye lwa kubulwa kibono ekiva ye nze Musengwa Katonda." 
Amos8:12 Abantu balitambulatambula eyo batyo okuva ku nhandha okutuuka ku nhandha, n'okuva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba okutuuka ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha era olw'e buvandhuba. Balirumukira eno n'ere nga baagala ghe banaawulira ku kibono kyange, aye tighaliba ghe bakyagaana." 
Amos8:13 Ku lunaku olwo abaguna ababoneka obulungi, n'abaisuka ab'amaani, balizirika olw'endigho." 
Amos8:14 Abo abalayira emisambwa egy'e Samaria nga bakoba bati, ‘Wo katonda ow'e Dani omukulu.’ Oba bati, ‘Wo katonda ow'e Beerisheba omulamu,’ baja kugwa era balobe kwirayo kusituka.”" 
Amos9:1 Nabona Musengwa Katonda ng'ayemereire ku mbali kw'alutaari, era yaalagira ati: “Kuba emitwe egy'empagi edh'eisinzizo okutuusa lwe linaatengeeta. Era menha emitwe egy'empagi edho dhikube emitwe egy'abantu boonaboona. Abo abataafe mu nsambo eyo, ndidha kubasindika bafiire mu lutalo. Ku abo ezira aja kulumukagho waire okuwonagho." 
Amos9:2 Waire basima baatuuka e magombe, ndidha kubatuukaku mbatooleyo. Era waire baniina baatuuka mu igulu, ndidha kubaghanulayo." 
Amos9:3 Ni bwe balyegisa ghaigulu ku lusozi Karumeli, era nja kubaagala mbatuukeku mbatooleyo. Ni bwe balyegisa ghansi ku ntobo ey'enhandha, era nja kulagira ogusota gwamu gubalume." 
Amos9:4 Ni bwebalitwalibwa abazigu baibwe mu bunhage, era nja kulagira abantu babaite. Mmaliriire okubakola akabi, se ti kubayamba.”" 
Amos9:5 Musengwa Katonda afuga amagye agema ku nsi, ensi yaatengeeta n'abantu boonaboona baagemwa enaku. Ensi esiikuuka yeefuukuula ng'oti n'omwiga Kiyira." 
Amos9:6 Musengwa Katonda oyo azimba endhu ye eyo ghaigulu mu igulu, era ghaigulu gh'ensi yataagho eibanga. Yaayetesa amaadhi ag'omu nhandha, yaagafuka ku bukalu. Eriina lye ni Musengwa Katonda." 
Amos9:7 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Imwe Abaisiraeli, mulowooza muti muli ba ndhawulo ku Baethiopia? Kituufu imwe nabatoola mu Misiri mu bwiru, aye n'Abafilisiti boona nabatoola mu Kafutori, n'Abasiria naabatoola mu Kiri." 
Amos9:8 Bona eno, nze Musengwa Katonda ntaire eriiso lyange ku bwakyabazinga bwaimwe Abaisiraeli obwonooni. Era ndidha kubuzikiriza buve ku nsi kuno. Aye tiidha kuzikiriza nda ya Yakobo kugimaliriragho." 
Amos9:9 “Ndidha kulagira abazigu bakunguute Abaisiraeli nga bali eyo mu maghanga, ng'oti n'omuntu bw'akunguuta engaano mu kakunguuto, era ezira mubi aja kubitira." 
Amos9:10 Ababi boonaboona baja kwitibwa mu lutalo abo abeekiina nga bakoba bati, ‘Katonda taidha kuganha kibi kyonakyona kututuukaku.’ ”" 
Amos9:11 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Olunaku lwidha kutuuka ndhizeegho obwakyabazinga bwa Daudi, nga bwe bwalinga mu biseera Daudi mwe yabeera kyabazinga kuba buti buli ng'oti n'endhu eyagwa. Kale nja kuzimba ebimante byayo buyaaka, ngiizeegho nga bwe yalinga eira." 
Amos9:12 Olwo Abaisiraeli baghangule ebiketezo by'ensi Edomu ebisigairegho, ghalala n'amaghanga agandi goonagoona agaali gamanhiibwa nga gange, nga gafugibwa Baisiraeli.” Atyo Musengwa Katonda bw'akoba, aja okutuukiriza ekyo." 
Amos9:13 Musengwa Katonda era akoba ati: “Bona eno, enaku dhiidha kutuuka, engaano ekule mangu okutuuka ku kukungulwa, nga n'abasizi bakaali kumala kusiga. Era emizabbibu giryenga mu bungi gyatuuka ni mu biseera eby'okusiga. Omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogudhuudhuula guli kuuluula okuva ku nsozi ni mu busozi." 
Amos9:14 Ndidha kwirizaagho abantu bange Abaisiraeli ebirungi. Baidha kwiramu okuzimba ebibuga byaibwe ebyazikirizibwa era babityamemu. Baidha kusimbanga amasamba ag'emizabbibu, era banhwenga omwenge ogugivaamu. Baidha kulimanga emere era bagirye." 
Amos9:15 Ndidha kubafuula bataka mu nsi ye nabagha, era ezira aja kubasiguukulula kabiri.” Atyo Musengwa Katonda bw'akoba." 
Obadiah1:1 Buno n'obukwenda Musengwa Katonda bwe yatuma Obadia okulanga, nga bugema ku ighanga ly'Abaedomu. Obukwenda bukoba buti: Twawulira amawulire okuva ye Musengwa Katonda. Era ghaligho omukwenda eyatumwa okuja ng'abitabita mu maghanga ng'akoba ati, “Mwetegeke tuje tulumbe Edomu.”" 
Obadiah1:2 Musengwa Katonda yeesoomera Edomu ati: “Bona eno, ndidha kukufuula munafu asembayo mu maghanga goonagoona, era buli muntu aidha kukunhooma." 
Obadiah1:3 Okwekuluntaza kwo kukulimbye, kuba odhuuba oti ekifo ky'olimu kyesigika inho ng'oti n'ekifo ekigumu eky'okwewogomamu ekyabaadhibwa mu ibaale. Era olw'okuba amaka go gali ghaigulu mu nsozi, okoba oti, ‘Naani alisobola okumpanula eno n'andhisa ghansi?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Aye waire ojiira ghaigulu inho ng'enkookooma, era waazimba ekisu eyo ghaigulu mu muunienie, ndidha kukughanulayo." 
Obadiah1:5 Abaibi bwe baidha okwiba obwire, batwalaku ebyo bye benda byonka. N'abanoga emizabbibu balekakuuku egindi. Aye iwe abazigu bo baidha kukuzikiriza!" 
Obadiah1:6 Iwe Esau, eby'obukombe bye wali ogisiisa baidha kubizuula babinhage." 
Obadiah1:7 Abairuukirize bo boonaboona baidha kukulyamu olukwe, bakusindiikirize bakubinge mu nsi yo. Abantu abakuziraku mpalana baidha kukwefuukira era bakughangule. Abo be weesiganga einho baidha kukutega olutuula ogwe, era bamale bakugeye bati: ‘Yeeyetanga mugezi inho, memale amagezi ge gajiire gha?’" 
Obadiah1:8 Ku lunaku olwo nja kuzikiriza abantu abagezi boonaboona ab'omu Edomu, era mmalemu okutegeera kwonakwona." 
Obadiah1:9 Abalwani ab'omu Temani baja kutya badhugumire, era kiisi mulwani wa Edomu yeenayeena aja kwitibwa.”" 
Obadiah1:10 “Edomu, oidha kuzikirizibwa era onhoomebwenga ebyanda n'ebyanda; kuba wanhaga ebintu eby'aboluganda bo, ab'enda ya Yakobo, era waabaita." 
Obadiah1:11 Ku lunaku olwo wayemerera ku mbali, waalingirira ng'abazigu bamenha endhigi edh'emiryango egingira mu Yerusalemu. Waaba mubi okwagayaga n'abagwira abo, abaaja n'eby'obukombe bye baatoola mu Yerusalemu, ni babigabana beene na beene." 
Obadiah1:12 Ti niiwe owandisekereire ab'oluganda bo ab'e Buyudaaya, ng'obona ebintu biri kubajiira bubi bityo. Ti niiwe owandisagambye ku lunaku lwe wabona ng'Abayudaaya bali kuzikirizibwa; kuba bwenebwene, iwe oseka otya nga beene bali mu bughafu?" 
Obadiah1:13 Tiwandingiire mu kibuga kya bantu bange okubasekerera nga bali kudaazibwadaazibwa, n'okunhaga eby'obukombe byaibwe, ku lunaku lwe baafuniraku ekizibu." 
Obadiah1:14 Tiwandyemereire mu maagaanana kugema abo abaali bagezaaku okulumuka okwewonia. Era tiwandibaghaireyo mu ngalo dha bazigu baibwe, ku lunaku olwo lwe baafuniraku ekizibu.”" 
Obadiah1:15 “Olunaku luli kumpi kutuuka, nze Musengwa Katonda lwe ndisalira amaghanga goonagoona omusango. Edomu, kye wakola baino weena baidha kukikukola. Kiisi kibi kye wakola kija kusasulwamu ekibi." 
Obadiah1:16 Abantu bange baanhwa ekikopo ekikaagha eky'okubonerezebwa, ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu. Aye amaghanga goonagoona ageezungulwire ghano, gaja kunhwa ekikopo eky'okubonerezebwa ekisingaku agho okukaagha. Bwenebwene gaja kukinhwa kyonakyona era gamale gazikirire.”" 
Obadiah1:17 “Aye ku lusozi Sioni eribaayo abaliwonagho era olusozi olwo luliba lutukuvu. Abantu ab'oku nda ya Yakobo baliba n'ensi nga yaibwe ku bwaibwe. 
Obadiah1:18 Abantu ab'oku nda ya Yakobo n'ab'oku nda ya Yosefu baliba ng'oti muliro, ate ab'oku nda ya Esau baaba ng'oti isubi ikalu. Omuliro ogwo guliryokya gwalimalagho, olwo ghabulegho awonagho waire omulala ati ku b'oku nda ya Esau. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze ndhogeire." 
Obadiah1:19 Abaisiraeli ab'omu kiketezo ekikalukalu eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, baja kunhaga Edomu. Ab'omu biketezo eby'omu biiko baja kutwala ekiketezo Filisitia. Abandi baja kutwala ebiketezo Efuraimu ni Samaria. Olwo Ababenjamini batwale ekiketezo Gileadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Abaisiraeli abaanhagibwa ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba bwa Isiraeli, baliira okuva mu bunhage, baalwanisa era baaghangula Foenikia yoonayoona okutuukira irala e Zaregatha. Abo abaanhagibwa mu Yerusalemu ni batwalibwa e Sefarada, baliira baanhaga ebibuga ebiri mu kiketezo ekikalukalu eky'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Obadiah1:21 Abasaadha abalwani ab'amaani ab'omu Yerusalemu baja kulumba Edomu bakighangule era bakifuge. Era Musengwa Katonda mwene n'anaabanga kyabazinga.” 
Jonah1:1 Lwali lulala Musengwa Katonda yaakoba omusaadha ye baayetanga Yona, mutabane w'Amittai ati:" 
Jonah1:2 “Situkiramu oje okobe abantu ab'omu kibuga Nineve, ekibuga ekikologho ekyo, oti, ‘Mboine okwonoona kwaibwe.’ ”" 
Jonah1:3 Aye Yona yaalumuka okuva aghali Musengwa Katonda aje e Tarushishi. Agho yaaja e Yoppa, ye yayagaana eryato eryali liri kutegekebwa okuja e Tarushishi. Yaasasula empiiya edh'olugendo oluja e Tarushishi, yaaniina mu lyato aje nabo okutuuka ye baali bali kuja, alumuke okuva aghali Musengwa Katonda." 
Jonah1:4 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaagheereza empewo ey'amaani ku nhandha, kiwunga yaasiikuula enhandha ebitakobeka, kumpi n'eryato limenhekemenheke." 
Jonah1:5 Olw'okutya okunene, abavuzi b'eryato baalira, buli muntu yaayeta omusambwa gwe. Baatoola ebintu ebyali mu lyato baabisuula mu nhandha olw'okuwewula ku lyato. Aye Yona yali aserengeite mu kisenge ekya ghansi eky'omu lyato, era ng'atendwike endoolo enhingi einho." 
Jonah1:6 Omukulu w'eryato yaaja y'ali yaamukaabukira ati: “Osobola otya okuba ng'oli kutenduka butenduke? Situka, osabe omusambwa gwo! Katyo gwakatusaasira twaloba kuzikirira.”" 
Jonah1:7 Agho abavuzi baakoba bati: “Ka tweraguze tubone atuleeseeku ekibambulira kino.” Bwe beeraguza, baazuula nga kiri kuvanga ku Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Kale n'okumukoba bati: “Tukobere, ekibambulira kino kiri kuva ku ki? Okola mulimo ki? Ova gha? Oli wa mu nsi ki? Oli wa ighanga ki?”" 
Jonah1:9 Yaabairamu ati: “Nze ndi Muheburayi. Nsinza Musengwa Katonda, Katonda ow'eigulu, eyakola enhandha n'obukalu.”" 
Jonah1:10 Abasaadha baatya inho era baamukoba bati: “Ekyaga agho kikoleka?” Kuba yali amaze okubakobera ati ali kulumuka ku Musengwa Katonda. 
Jonah1:11 Olwo enhandha yali eri kweyongera bweyongere okusiikuuka. Agho baamubuuza bati: “Mperaano tuli na kukukola ki enhandha okulaala?” 
Jonah1:12 Yaabairamu ati: “Munsuule mu nhandha eidha kulaala, kuba ndidhi nti musango gwange. Ninze mbaleeseeku ekibambulira kino.”" 
Jonah1:13 Aye beene kye baakola n'okugezaaku einho n'amaani gaibwe goonagoona okukuba enkasi baizeeyo eryato ku bukalu. Aye tibaasobola, kuba enhandha yeeyongeranga bweyongere okusiikuuka." 
Jonah1:14 Agho baasaba Musengwa Katonda bati: “Tukweghembye Musengwa Katonda, otatuzikiriza ng'otulanga okwita musaadha ono. Niiwe mwene oleese kiwunga ono nga mwene bw'oyenze.”" 
Jonah1:15 Agho batoola Yona baamusuula mu nhandha, enhandha yaalaala." 
Jonah1:16 Abasaadha baatya Musengwa Katonda ekibitiriire. Baamugha omusengo era beeyama. 
Jonah1:17 Aye Musengwa Katonda yaataagho ekyenhandha ekikologho kyamira Yona, yaaba munda omw'ekyenhandha ekyo okumala enaku isatu, omusana n'obwire." 
Jonah2:1 Yona, ng'ali munda omw'ekyenhandha yasaba Musengwa Katonda we ati:" 
Jonah2:2 “Wo Musengwa Katonda, bwe nali nga ndi mu bizibu nakweta era wampulira wampa kye nakusaba. Bwenali nga mbalirwa mu bafu, tiwansiriikirira nga ndi kukulirira okumbeera." 
Jonah2:3 Wali onswire ghala ku ntobo yeene ey'enhandha, omwidhuzo gwa maadhi gwekuluumulula okuneezungulula, okwefuukuula kwago okw'amaani kwamira zeenazeena." 
Jonah2:4 Nali nkoba nti onswire ere nve gh'oli, era nga tiriirayo kabiri kubona ku isinzizo eitukuvu." 
Jonah2:5 Nali mu maadhi kata nfe nga ngwire ku ntobo ey'enhandha, ebisubi eby'omu nhandha byaneezingirira ku mutwe." 
Jonah2:6 Nagwa eyo ensozi ye dhisimuka, endhigi ye dhiigalwa ni dhitaigulwa ebyanda n'ebyanda. Aye iwe Musengwa Katonda wange wantoolayo nga ndi mulamu." 
Jonah2:7 Wo Musengwa Katonda, bwe nali nga ndi kumpi kufa naidhukira okukusaba, era iwe wampa kye nakusaba ng'oli mu isinzizo lyo eitukuvu." 
Jonah2:8 Abo abasinza ebitali Katonda ebitagasa, beefiiriza beene obusaasizi bwo." 
Jonah2:9 Aye nze ndidha kukwembera enhembo edhikusaaka, nkugheereze omusengo era ntuukirize ebyo bye neeyama. Ghazira wundi alokola okutoolaku Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Jonah2:10 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaalagira ekyenhandha kyasesema Yona ku bukalu. 
Jonah3:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Yona omukuzi ogwokubiri ati: 
Jonah3:2 “Situkiramu oje eri abantu ab'omu kibuga Nineve, ekibuga ekikologho ekyo, obakobere obukwenda bwe nakukoba.”" 
Jonah3:3 Yona yaasitukiramu yaaja e Nineve nga Musengwa Katonda bwe yamukoba. Nineve kyali kikologho, ng'okutambula okukibitamu omala enaku isatu." 
Jonah3:4 Yona yatoolera okutambula mu kibuga okumala olunaku lulamba, agho yaalangirira ati: “Nga ghabiseegho enaku amakumi ana (40) Nineve kija kuzikirizibwa.”" 
Jonah3:5 Abantu ab'e Nineve baikiriza obukwenda bwa Katonda, era baalangirira buli muntu okusiiba endhala okuviira irala ku babbede okutuukira irala ku basembayo ghansi. Baavaala ekutiya okwoleka okwenenia kwaibwe." 
Jonah3:6 Kyabazinga w'e Nineve bwe yabiwulira, yaaleka ghale ekityamo kye n'ebivaalo bye eby'obwakyabazinga, yaavaala ekutiya era yaatyama mu ivu okwoleka okwenenia kwe." 
Jonah3:7 Era yaalangirira mu biketezo byonabyona eby'e Nineve ng'akoba ati: “Kino kiragiro okuva ye kyabazinga n'abakungu be, ekikoba kiti, ‘Ghatabaagho muntu yeenayeena alya oba anhwa kintu kyonakyona, oba okuganha ekisolo kyonakyona eky'omuntu okulya oba okunhwa." 
Jonah3:8 Buli muntu ateekwa okwesiba ekutiya, na buli nsolo esibibwe ekutiya. Buli muntu ateekwa okulekayo ebibi by'akola n'ebikolwa eby'obukambwe, yeeghembe Katonda n'omwoyo mulala okumusonigha." 
Jonah3:9 Tomanha, oba katyo Katonda asobola okukyusa ekirowoozo kye, yaalekera okusungughala ekibitiriire, yaaloba kutuzikiriza.’ ”" 
Jonah3:10 Katonda bwe yabona bino bye baakola, ni balekayo ebikolwa byaibwe ebibi, yaakyusa ekidhuubo kye, yaaloba kubazikiriza nga bwe yali akobye." 
Jonah4:1 Kino kyaleetera Yona okusungughala ebitakobeka. 
Jonah4:2 Agho yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda, bino ti bye nakoba nga nkaali mu nsi yange? Nze namanha ng'oli wa kivunika era asaasira einho. Ogonza inho abantu obutalekera era obaguminkiriza buliidho oli mwetegefu okukyusa ebidhuubo byo waaloba kubabonereza. Era kyova obona nali numukiire e Tarushishi." 
Jonah4:3 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nkusaba otwale obulamu bwange, kuba mboine ng'okufa kusinga okuba omulamu.”" 
Jonah4:4 Musengwa Katonda n'okumubuuza ati: “Bwenebwene oli mutuufu okusungughala?” 
Jonah4:5 Agho Yona yaava mu kibuga yaaja ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba bwakyo yaazimba eyo entindi, yaatyama omwo ng'ateega abone ebinaagwa ku Nineve." 
Jonah4:6 Musengwa Katonda, Katonda yaamezaagho ekimera agho Yona ghe yali, kyamukolera ekiwoleeze okumuwonia akasana." 
Jonah4:7 Aye enkeera, endhuba ng'ekaali kuvaayo Katonda yaalagira ekisiisa kyaidha kyalumba ekimera ekyo, kyafaagho." 
Jonah4:8 Endhuba bwe yavaayo akasana kaidha, Katonda yaatuma empewo ensu ng'eva ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba, akasana kaayokya Yona mu mutwe kata azirike yeegomba okufa. Yaakoba ati: “Okufa kusinga okuba omulamu!”" 
Jonah4:9 Aye Katonda yaamubuuza ati: “Bwenebwene oli mutuufu okusungughala olw'ekimera ekifiire?” Yona yairamu ati: “Ndi mutuufu, era nsungughaire ekiimala, nhenda kufa.”" 
Jonah4:10 Musengwa Katonda yaamukoba ati: “Ekimera kino ky'oli kufaaku einho ti niiwe owakisimba, era ti niiwe owakikuza. Kyamera kyakula igulo irala, olunaku olwokubiri kyafaagho." 
Jonah4:11 Memale nze tigwaine kufaayo ku Nineve, ekibuga ekikologho ekyo, ekirimu abaana abaziraku musango abaswika mu mitwalo eikumi n'ebiri (120,000), era nga kirimu n'ensolo kamaala?”" 
Micah1:1 Mu biseera bya Yothamu, n'ebya Ahazi, n'ebya Hezekia, abaali ba kyabazinga ba Buyudaaya, Musengwa Katonda yayoleka Mika ow'omu kyalo Moreshetha ebintu bino ebigema ku Samaria ni ku Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:2 Abantu mwenamwena ab'amaghanga muwulirise; imwe mwenamwena ababa ku nsi mutege kutu. Muwulire! Musengwa Katonda aja kwogerera mu isinzizo lye ery'omu igulu. Aja kubaghaaku obudhulizi obunaabalumiriza. 
Micah1:3 Bona eno, Musengwa Katonda aja kuva mu kifo kye ekitukuvu aidhe. Era bw'aliidha aja kutambulira ku nsozi." 
Micah1:4 Buli lusozi lw'alitangaku ekigere nga lusaanuuka ng'oti muzigo bagutaire ku muliro. Era nga luyuyika mu kiiko ng'oti maadhi gayuyika kuva ku lusozi. 
Micah1:5 Ebyo bija kubaagho olw'okuba Abaisiraeli baaloba okugondera amateeka ga Musengwa Katonda, baayonoona. Mukoba muti ogwo musango gw'ani? Musango gwa Samaria ekibuga ekikulu kyene! Era mulowooza muti naani avuunaanibwa olw'Abayudaaya okusinza ebitali Katonda? Ti ni Yerusalemu ekibuga ekikulu kyene!" 
Micah1:6 Kyova Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nja kufuula Samaria kibe mmungo ya bifunfugu ebiri eyo mu nsiko, kibe ekifo ekigwaine obw'okusimbamu amasamba g'emizabbibu. Amabaale ge baazimbisa endhu dhaamu nja kugayugha ere mu kiiko, emisingi gyadho gisigale agho nga gidangalaire?" 
Micah1:7 “Ebifaananie abantu baamu bye babaire basinzanga, abazigu baibwe baja kubimenhamenha. Ebintu ebyagheebwanga bamalaaya ab'omu masabo byonabyona bija kwokebwa omuliro. Ebyo byonabyona ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda bija kubungibwa bwagho. Olw'okuba ebintu ebyo byafunibwa mu ebyo ebigheebwa bamalaaya, era n'abazigu boona baidha kubitwala bigheebwe bamalaaya abandi.”" 
Micah1:8 Agho Mika yaakoba ati: “Ebyo n'ebindiza amaziga naagegenga. Era ndidha kutambulanga madu nga tivaire na ngaito, okwoleka nga bwendi mu bughafu. Ndidha kukubanga oluwungu ng'oti kibe, era ndidha kujanga nga ndira ng'oti maaya." 
Micah1:9 Kuba Samaria alwaire amabwa ga kokolo agatali ga kuwona, era gatuuse n'okugema Buyudaaya okuzikirira kuseese kwatuukira irala ku mulyango gwa Yerusalemu, ekibuga abantu bange mwe baba.”" 
Micah1:10 Aye mutakobera bazigu baife abali mu Gathi, era mutabaganha kubabona nga mulira. Imwe abantu ab'e Betha Leafura mwegalangule mu nkungu okwoleka obubi obw'embeera ye tulimu." 
Micah1:11 Imwe abantu ab'e Shafira mwidha kutwalibwa mu bunhage nga muli madu era nga muswaire. Imwe ababa mu kibuga Zaanaani mutageza ni muva mu kibuga kyaimwe. Bwe munaawulira okulira okuva e Bethezeli munaamanha ng'eyo bw'ezira gha kwewogoma. 
Micah1:12 Abantu ab'e Marothi beeraliikirivu nga tibaidhi oba banaafuna anaabayamba, kuba babona nga Musengwa Katonda aseesiisa ebizibu kumpi inho ni Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:13 Imwe abantu ababa mu kibuga Lakishi musibe ebigaali byaimwe eby'omu lutalo ku mbalaasi dhaimwe mwetegeke. Mwakoopa ebibi eby'Abaisiraeli, mwaleetera ab'e Yerusalemu boona baababoneraku, baatoolera okukola ebibi n'ebirala ebyo." 
Micah1:14 Mperaano ni, musiibule ekibuga Moreshethi Gathi mukighe n'ebirabo kuba baja kukinhaga. Abantu ab'ekibuga Akazibu, baguya, tibaja kubeera bakyabazinga ba mu Isiraeli naire." 
Micah1:15 Imwe abantu ab'e Maresha, Musengwa Katonda akobye ati aja kubaleetaku abazigu abanaabaghangula ni bagema ekibuga kyaimwe. Era abakulembeze mu Isiraeli baja kwegisa mu mpuku eri e Adullamu." 
Micah1:16 Mumweku enviiri okwoleka nga muli kulira abaana baimwe be mugonza. Mughalagate emitwe mube n'empaata ng'oti nsega, kuba abaana baimwe baja kutwalibwa mu bunhage." 
Micah2:1 Bakagwireku abantu abo ababa mu buliri bwaibwe ni bakyesa obwire nga bayiiya ebibi bye banaakola. Era obwire olukya buti nga bakola nga bwe baba bayiiyiiza. 
Micah2:2 Bwe beegwaniza omusiri, nga bagunhaga, oba ndhu, nga batwala butwale. Era nga bwebabisa ebintu eby'omuntu, n'omuntu mwene yeena bwe bamubisa." 
Micah2:3 Musengwa Katonda kyava n'akoba ati: “Bona eno, ndi kuyiiya akabi ke nnaatuusa ku bantu imwe, era ghazira ghe mughanga kukawonera. Mwidha kweyagaana mu buzibu obutoogerekeka n'amalala gabaweemu." 
Micah2:4 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka, abantu balibayiiyaamu olwembo olw'okubayeeyereza, era beeriza amaziga nga bakoba bati: Ee, ebintu nga bitufiiririire! Musengwa Katonda atutoireku eitaka lyaife, yaaligabira abo abaatutwala mu bunhage.”"
