Micah2:5 Kale ni ekiseera bwe kirituuka okwiriza abantu ba Musengwa Katonda eitaka abaliba bava mu bunhage, imwe abatuntuza abaavu timuliba na mugabo." 
Micah2:6 Abantu bankoba bati: “Totukobera ebyo. Omuntu tagwaine kukoba ku bintu oti n'ebyo. Musengwa Katonda taja kutubonereza na kutuswaza bwaga agho. 
Micah2:7 Odhuuba oti Abaisiraeli Musengwa Katonda yatukolimira? Oba oti okuguminkiriza kwe kwakendeera? Mbo bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda aghanga okukola ebintu oti n'ebyo? Buliidho tayogera na kivunika n'abo abakola obulungi?” 
Micah2:8 Aye Musengwa Katonda abairamu ati: “Imwe mulumba abantu bange ng'oti abantu abo bazigu baimwe, mwabanhagaku ebivaalo nga tibabakobyeku. Ate nga abantu abo bababitaku nga bali kubeesiga bati ghazira kibi kye munaabakola, era nga tibali kulowooza ku lutalo naire." 
Micah2:9 Mubinga abakazi ab'abantu bange mu ndhu dhaibwe mwe bawulirira eisanhu, mwalobera abaana baibwe okubona ku kitiibwa kyange ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Micah2:10 Musituke muje, ghano tighakaali miraala. Ekifo kino kija kuzikirizibwa olw'ebibi byaimwe." 
Micah2:11 “Abantu bano benda omulanzi aja ng'abakobera obukwenda obwidhwire okuguya, ng'abakoba ati, ‘Mwidha kufunanga omwenge ogw'emizabbibu n'ebitamiiza ebindi.’" 
Micah2:12 “Aye imwe abantu bange Abaisiraeli, abaliwonagho, nja kubasoloza mbaleete ghalala ng'omwayi bw'asoloza entaama dhe mu kisibo kyadho. Era ekiketezo kyaimwe kija kwiramu okwidhula abantu nga baseregulya buseregulye ng'oti n'ekyayiro ekirimu entaama kamaala.”" 
Micah2:13 Agho Mika yaalanga ati: “Katonda mwene aja kwiguliragho abantu be, abakulemberemu ng'abatoola mu bunhage. Baja kughagulagho omulyango ogw'ekibuga, babitemu baje nga ghazira na kibakobaku. Musengwa Katonda mwene era kyabazinga waibwe, n'aja okubakulemberamu abafulumye.”" 
Micah3:1 Imwe abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli, muwulirise bino: Niimwe abateekwa okumanha abantu bwe bagwaniire okubisibwa mu butuufu." 
Micah3:2 Aye kabiri niimwe abatenda kukola bulungi, mwagonza okukola obubi. Bye mukola, muli ng'ababaaga abantu bange ni mubatoolaku oluwutu, era ni mughalagata emamba ku magumba gaibwe." 
Micah3:3 Abantu bange mubabaagaku oluwutu, mwatematema emamba yaibwe, mwamenhamenha n'amagumba gaibwe, mwabafumba mu nsaka mwabalya." 
Micah3:4 Aye ekiseera kiri kwidha, mulirire Musengwa Katonda, aye alobe kubafaaku. Mumusabe, aye alobe kubakolera kye muli kumusaba. Kuba ebikolwa byaimwe bibi." 
Micah3:5 Abalanzi abaguya badaaliimya abantu nga basuubiza miraala oyo abagha eky'okulya, ate baalanga okwidha kw'olutalo eri oyo azira ky'abaghaire." 
Micah3:6 Musengwa Katonda akoba abalanzi abo ati: “Abalanzi imwe, obwaimwe buli kuziba, endhuba eri kugwa! Olw'okuba mudaaliimya abantu bange, timukaayolekerwa, era timukaasobola kulanga kintu ni kituukirira.”" 
Micah3:7 Abo abalengera ebiri mu maiso n'abalaguzi boonaboona baja kuswazibwa olw'okulemwa okukoba ebituufu. Baja kwegema mu maiso nga baswaire olwa Katonda okubasiriikirira. 
Micah3:8 Aye nze, Musengwa Katonda andidhwiza omwoyo gwe, era yampa amaani n'obutatya, okukobera Abaisiraeli omuntu bw'agwaine okubisibwa mu butuufu, era n'okubakobera ebibi bye bakola." 
Micah3:9 Imwe abakulu ab'ebikunsu mu Isiraeli muwulire bino: mukyagha okukola ebituufu, era ebikolwa ebyandibaire ebirungi mwabifuulania byaba bibi." 
Micah3:10 Muzimba Yerusalemu ekibuga kya Katonda nga mukozesa ebyo bye mufuna mu kutemula, ni mu magira agandi agatali matuufu." 
Micah3:11 Abakulembeze baamu bagulirirwa nguzi memale baalamula. Bakabona baamu tibeegeresa mateeka ga Katonda okutoolaku nga bapangisiibwa. Era waire abalanzi baamu, boona bamala kugheebwa mpiiya memale baakoba okwolekebwa kwaibwe. Ate nga boonaboona beefuula okuba nga beesigama ku Musengwa Katonda, era baakoba bati: “Ghazira kabi koonakoona kaja kututuukaku kuba Musengwa Katonda ali n'ife.”" 
Micah3:12 Kale ni ku lwaimwe, olusozi Sioni balirulima ng'oti nimiro, ekibuga kya Katonda Yerusalemu kyasigala agho nga mmungo ya bifunfugu n'olusozi lwonalwona oluliku eisinzizo lwafuuka kibira." 
Micah4:1 Ekiseera kiidha kutuuka, olusozi oluliku eisinzizo lube nga n'olusinga buleeyi mu dhoonadhoona, era nga lusooloobye obusozi bwonabwona. Abantu abamaghanga kamaala balisomboka baidha ku lusozi olwo," 
Micah4:2 abantu abangi abo balikoba bati: “Mwidhe tuje ku lusozi lwa Musengwa Katonda, mu isinzizo lya Katonda wa Isiraeli, atwegerese by'ayenda tukole era tujiire ku ebyo by'atwegeresa; kuba Musengwa Katonda aba eyo mu Yerusalemu yaayegeresa abantu be, era aba eyo mu Sioni yaayogera n'abantu be.”" 
Micah4:3 Musengwa Katonda aliramula amaghanga ag'amaani, ag'okumpi n'eghala. Edhibaire empiima dhaibwe edh'okulwanisa balidhigheesaamu mbago, ate amafumo gaibwe baagagheesaamu busolobyo bwa kuwoolera. Amaghanga tigaliirayo kulwana ntalo, waire okwirayo okutendekebwa mu by'entalo." 
Micah4:4 Buli muntu aidha kuwuliranga emiraala ng'ali mu masamba ge ag'emizabbibu n'ag'emiti emitiini, nga ghazira muntu yeenayeena amutiisa naire. Kuba Musengwa Katonda afuga amagye, mwene n'akobye." 
Micah4:5 Abantu aba buli ighanga basinza era baagondera bakatonda baalyo, aye ife twidha kusinzanga era tugonderenga Musengwa Katonda, Katonda waife ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Micah4:6 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ekiseera kiidha kutuuka, nsoloze ghalala abantu be nabonereza, ni mbaleka batwalibwa mu bunhage okudaagiradaagira eyo." 
Micah4:7 Waire nga balema era nga baatwalibwa eghala einho okuva ewaibwe, ndidha kubafuula bakaawonagho era mbafuule eighanga ery'amaani. Era nze Musengwa Katonda mwene, ndidha kubafugiranga ku lusozi Sioni okuva n'olwo okutuusa ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Micah4:8 Era iwe Yerusalemu, ekibuga Katonda mw'aba n'alengera abantu be, ng'omwayi bw'ayemerera ku kituuti n'alengera entaama dhe, oliiramu waaba ekibuga ekikulu eky'obwakyabazinga nga bwe wabanga eira." 
Micah4:9 Yerusalemu, lwaki olira n'owowoola? Lwaki osinda ng'oti n'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala? Lwa kubula kyabazinga? Lwa kuba tokaali na bakugha magezi?" 
Micah4:10 Abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu, mwegalangule era musinde ng'oti n'omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala. Kuba mutuuse okutoolebwa mu kibuga kyaimwe muje nga musula eyo mutyo mu nsiko, mutwalibwe e Babiloni. Aye nga muli eyo, Musengwa Katonda aja kubanunula abatoole mu ngalo edh'abazigu baimwe." 
Micah4:11 Amaghanga kamaala geesoloiza okubalumba, nga gakoba gati: “Yerusalemu kizikirizibwe, tukibone nga kisigaire bifunfugu byereere.”" 
Micah4:12 Aye amaghanga ago tigaidhi Musengwa Katonda ky'ategeike kugakola. Tigaidhi nga Musengwa Katonda agasoloiza ghalala kugabonereza ng'oti n'engaano bwe solozebwa mu kifo gh'ekubirwa. 
Micah4:13 Musengwa Katonda akoba abantu be ati: “Imwe abantu ab'e Yerusalemu, musitukiremu muje mukube abazigu baimwe. Imwe ndidha kubafuula mube ba maani ng'oti n'ensolo enume eri n'amayiga ag'ekyuma ekigumu einho, n'ebigere ebiriku ebinuulo eby'ekyuma eky'ekikomo. Mwidha kukuba era mumulungule abantu ab'amaghanga kamaala, eby'obukombe byaibwe bye bali nabyo ni bye baanhaga, mwidha kubighaayo ye Musengwa Katonda ow'ensi yoonayoona.”" 
Micah5:1 Abantu ab'e Yerusalemu mwesoloze mukole eigye! Batuzingiiza! Bakubye omufuzi wa Isiraeli ku itama n'olwigo. 
Micah5:2 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Bethelehemu Efuratha, waire oli katono mu bibuga bya Buyudaaya, nja kukutoolamu omufuzi alifuga Isiraeli, ng'ali ku lulyo olw'abantu ab'eira einho abataja kwerabirwa.”" 
Micah5:3 Kale Musengwa Katonda aja kulekulira agho abantu be Abaisiraeli okumala entangama, okutuusa omukazi ali kulumwa okuzaala lw'alizaala omufuzi oyo. Olwo Baisiraeli baine baja kwira okuva mu bunhage, beeyimbe ku baganda baibwe abaasigala." 
Micah5:4 Aja kufuga abantu be mu maani ga Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda oyo amufuule okuba kyabazinga omukologho. Abantu be baja kuba n'emiraala, kuba ensi yoonayoona eja kumubona nga mukologho." 
Micah5:5 Kino kija kuleetagho emiraala. Ab'e Assiria bwe balitulumba, ni baghagula ebifo byaife ebigumu bye twesiga, tuja kusindika abakulembeze ab'amaani babalwanise." 
Micah5:6 Abo, nga bakozesa eby'okulwanisa byaibwe, baja kughangula ekiketezo ekyo Assiria, ensi ya Nimurodi, batuwonie Abassiria bwe baliba batabaire nsi yaife." 
Micah5:7 Olwo Abaisiraeli abaliwonagho eyo ye baliba mu maghanga mu bunhage, baliba ng'oti n'omusulo oguva ye Musengwa Katonda, era baaba ng'oti n'amaadhi agagwa agakuza ebisimbe. Baja kwesiga maani ga Katonda gonka, se ti ga bantu." 
Micah5:8 Abaisiraeli abo abaliwonagho eyo mu maghanga, baliba ng'oti n'empologoma eri kuyiiga ensolo edh'omu nsiko mu kibira, oba eri kuyiiga entaama mu kyayiro. Kiisi y'etuukaku egituumiraku yaagikankanula nga ghazira isuubi lyonalyona lya kuwona." 
Micah5:9 Mu nsambo n'endala, Abaisiraeli baja kughangula abazigu baibwe boonaboona era babazikirize." 
Micah5:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mu kiseera ekyo ndizikiriza embalaasi dhaimwe n'ebigaali byaimwe eby'omu lutalo. 
Micah5:11 Ndizikiriza ebifo byaimwe eby'okwewogomamu n'ebibuga byonabyona. 
Micah5:12 Ndizikiriza bye mukozesa okuloga byonabyona, era naatoolagho n'abalaguzi boonaboona." 
Micah5:13 Ndizikiriza ebintu bye musinza ebitali Katonda n'empango edh'amabaale dhe musinza, era naabalobera okusinza ebintu bye mwekoleire n'engalo dhaimwe beene." 
Micah5:14 Ndiiwululagho ebifaananie eby'omusambwa omukazi ogwetebwa Ashera era naazikiriza n'ebibuga byaimwe. 
Micah5:15 Olw'obusungu n'ekiruyi bye ndi nabyo, ndibonereza amaghanga agatangondera.”" 
Micah6:1 Muwulire omusango Musengwa Katonda gw'aghaghabira Abaisiraeli. Wo Musengwa Katonda, situkiramu oyandhe omusango gwo. Leka ensozi enene n'entono dhiwulire by'oja okukoba." 
Micah6:2 Imwe ensozi n'imwe emisingi egy'ensi egy'olubeerera, muwulirise omusango gwa Musengwa Katonda. Musengwa Katonda ali n'omusango gw'aghaghabira abantu be. Aja kulumiriza Abaisiraeli." 
Micah6:3 Akoba ati: “Bantu bange, kiki kye nabakola? Nabakaluubiriza mu nsambo ki? Mundhiremu." 
Micah6:4 Kuba nabatoola e Misiri, naabanunula okuva mu bwiru era naabagha Musa, ni Aaroni, ni Miriamu, okubakulembera." 
Micah6:5 Bantu bange, mwidhukire Balaki Kyabazinga w'e Moabu bye yali ategeike okubakola, era ni Balaamu mutabane wa Beora bye yamwiramu. Era mwidhukire ebyali mu ngira nga muva e Shittimu nga muja e Giligali. Bwe munaidhukira ebyo byonabyona munaategeera bye nkola okubalokola.”" 
Micah6:6 Kiki kye nnaaleetera Musengwa Katonda, oyo Katonda ow'eigulu, nga ndidha okumusinza? Mmuleetere ente ento edh'omwaka omulala edhisinga bulungi ndhigheeyo ng'ebigheebwayo ebyokebwa?" 
Micah6:7 Musengwa Katonda anansiima bwemmuleetera enkumi n'enkumi edh'entaama enume oba omuzigo ogukuuluula ng'oti miiga? Oba mpeeyo omwana wange omuberi olw'ebibi byange? 
Micah6:8 Busa, Musengwa Katonda yatukobera ekikalamu kye tube tukole, era ni kino: Ayenda tukolenga ebintu mu butuufu, twolekenga okugonza okutakoma, era tumusinzenga nga tuli bawombeefu." 
Micah6:9 Kya magezi inho okutya Musengwa Katonda. Musengwa Katonda ayeta abanakibuga yaabakoba ati: “Imwe abeesololeza mu kibuga, muwulire." 
Micah6:10 Mu ndhu edh'abakozi ab'ebibi mwidhwire eby'obukombe bye baafuna mu magira agatali malungi. Bakozesa ebipimo ebikyamu ekikolwa ekyo nkivumirira inho. 
Micah6:11 Nsobola ntya okusonigha abantu abakozesa ebipimo ebikyamu ng'oti n'ebyo? 
Micah6:12 Abakombe mu imwe batuntuza abaavu era mwenamwena mwidhwire buguya. 
Micah6:13 Kale, olw'ebibi byaimwe, ntooleire okubabonereza n'okubazikiriza." 
Micah6:14 Mwidha kulyanga aye nga timwiguta; mwidha kusigalanga nga muli bayala ng'oti timuliire naku. Ebintu bye munaawoniangagho timuja kughanga kubitereka, era bye munaagezangaku okutereka ndidha kubizikirizanga." 
Micah6:15 Mwidha kusiganga, aye nga timukungula, mukamule omuzigo mu bibala eby'emiti emyoliva, aye nga timughanga kugukozesa. Era mukunhe omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, aye gubaleme okunhwaku." 
Micah6:16 Ebyo bija kuba bityo lwa kuba mwasalagho okugema empisa embi edha kyabazinga Omiri ni mutabane Ahabu n'ab'endhu y'Ahabu oyo. Era timulekerangaku kujiira ku ngeri dhaibwe, kale nja kubazikiriza era abantu boonaboona babalingengaku nga babeesiimooza era nga bwe babasekerera.”" 
Micah7:1 Nkagwireku nze! Ndi oti n'omuntu ali endhala aja ku muti ogw'ebibala n'ayagaana nga baagumalaku, era n'aja ku mizabbibu nga kwona baaginogaku. Olwo yaaba ng'asubiibwa obuwoomi bw'emizabbibu n'obw'ebibala eby'emitiini ebisookereza okwenga!" 
Micah7:2 Mu Isiraeli muzira muntu mwesimbu akaasigairemu. Timukaali atya Katonda! Buli muntu aguniriire kakisa ka kutemula, era olw'ekyo buli muntu atega mwine olutuula." 
Micah7:3 Abantu banaze okukola ebibi, abafuzi n'abalamuzi balya enguzi. Omukungu bw'abakobera ekibi ky'ayenda okukola, beeyimba naye baayiiya bwe babe bakikole." 
Micah7:4 N'omuntu oyo atwalibwa okuba nga n'abasingamu obulungi n'obwesigwa, yeena muzira makulu ng'oti n'eisubi erizira muganhulo. Aye ekiseera kituuse Katonda ababonereze, nga bwe yabalabula ng'abita mu balanzi, abantu baibwe, ababalengeza ku bija okubaagho. Buti basobeirwa!" 
Micah7:5 Otaikirizanga muntu muliraanwa wo ky'akoba, era oteesiganga ni bw'aba mukagwa wo. Weegenderezenga inho mu by'oyogera, ni bw'oba ng'oli kwogera ni mukazi wo y'oyenda." 
Micah7:6 Kuba abalenzi banhooma balata baibwe, abaghala baasitukira mu bainhaibwe, bakaabaana baasoola ni bainhazaala baibwe, abazigu ab'omuntu baava mu bantu be beene b'aba nabo mu ndhu endala." 
Micah7:7 Aye nze, amaiso ndidha kugatanga ku Musengwa Katonda yenka. Katonda oyo ye ndidha okuteegereranga aidhe andokole. Katonda wange aidha kuwuliranga okusaba kwange." 
Micah7:8 Abazigu baife, mulobe kutusekerera mbu kuba tugwire. Tuja kusituka! Waire tuli mu nzikiiza buti, Musengwa Katonda aidha kutugha obutangaavu." 
Micah7:9 Twakola ebibi eri Musengwa Katonda, kale tuli n'okugumira by'ali kutukola. Aye tikiidha kuba kiseera kireeyi, aidha kutuwolereza era atweye amaziga ge tulira olw'ebiinoino abazigu bye batukola. Aidha kutufulumya ku luya eri obutangaavu era twidha kubaagho atulokole nga tubona tuti." 
Micah7:10 Ekyo abazigu baife baidha kukibona baswale abo abaatuyeeyerezanga nga bakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda waimwe ali gha?” Tulisangaala okubona nga batyankirirwa mu nguudo ng'oti bityanka! 
Micah7:11 Abantu ab'e Yerusalemu, ekiseera kiidha kutuuka musobole okuzimba ekimante okwezunguluza ekibuga kyaimwe. Era agho Yerusalemu kija kugazigha ensalosalo dhaakyo." 
Micah7:12 Era mu biseera ebyo abantu baimwe baja kwira nga bava mu ndhuyi dhoonadhoona okuva Assiria e buvandhuba, Misiri ekiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, okuva mu biketezo eby'omwiga Eufurate, n'okuva eghala, ku nhandha ni ku nsozi." 
Micah7:13 Aye ensi eja kufuuka irungu olw'abo abagibaamu ng'ebyo n'ebibala bye bakungula mu bikolwa byaibwe ebibi. 
Micah7:14 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ife abantu bo be weerondera okuba ababo ku bubwo, tulabirire ng'omwayi bw'agema omwigo n'alabirira entaama dhe. Waire tuli eyo twenka mu irungu, aye ensi etwezungulwire ngimu. Tuleke tuje tukozese ebiketezo by'e Bashani n'e Gileadi ebigimu obulungi nga bwe twakolanga eira." 
Micah7:15 Wo Musengwa Katonda, tukolere ebyewuunhio nga bwe wakolanga mu biseera bye twalinga e Misiri." 
Micah7:16 Abantu ab'omu maghanga balibona bino, baatenha waire nga ba maani. Balibulwa eky'okwogera ng'ate bazira na kye bawulira, olw'okutya n'okusoberwa." 
Micah7:17 Balyeghaluliza mu nkungu ng'oti misota, nga bava mu bifo byaibwe eby'okwewogomamu, baira ye iwe Musengwa Katonda waife, nga badhugumira olw'okutya einho." 
Micah7:18 Ezirayo katonda ali ng'oti niiwe, Musengwa Katonda. Osonigha ebibi eby'abantu bo abawoniegho. Tosungughala bujiiririire, aye osangaala okutwoleka okugonza kwo okutakoma." 
Micah7:19 Oidha kutugemerwa kabiri ekivunika. Oidha kutyankirira ebibi byaife n'ebigere byo, memale obisuule mu nhandha bidimire okutuukira irala ghansi ku ntobo." 
Micah7:20 Oidha kutwoleka obwesigwa bwo n'okugonza kwo okutakoma, ife abantu bo baidhukulu ba Aburahamu era aba Yakobo, nga bwe wasuubiza badhaadha baife eira einho." 
Nahum1:1 Buno n'obukwenda obwava ye Katonda nga bugema ku kibuga Nineve. Nahumu ow'oku kyalo Elikoshi yafuna okwolekebwa, era bye yabona mu kwolekebwa ni bino ebyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kino." 
Nahum1:2 Musengwa Katonda wa nkikidi, tayenda bantu be kusinza bakatonda bandi. Abatakola nga bw'ayenda ababonereza; abamutakania abasungughalira era yaabasasulamu ebibonerezo ebikakali." 
Nahum1:3 Musengwa Katonda alwagho okusungughala, era ali n'obuyinza obutaloodheka. Musengwa Katonda taleka muntu aliku musango nga tamubonereiza. Musengwa Katonda gh'atambulira ghabaagho kiwunga n'empewo eyeezungulula n'amaani. Era ebire, n'ebiba enkungu ebigere bye ye bisiikuula ng'ali kutambula." 
Nahum1:4 Alagira enhandha yaakala, era akaliiza emiiga. Olwo emisiri egy'e Bashani gyawotoka, ate n'egy'oku lusozi Karumeli gyakala era n'ebimuli eby'oku nsozi edh'e Lebanoni byona byakala." 
Nahum1:5 Musengwa Katonda gh'aba, musisi atengeesa ensozi enene, obusozi obutono bwasaanuuka, ensi yoonayoona yeesunda, n'abantu baamu boonaboona baadhugumira." 
Nahum1:6 Bw'asungughala ghazira abaagho nga mulamu, era ghazira aghanga kugumira busungu bwe obuli ng'oti muliro. Obusungu bwe obwo bwe butumbuka, ni bwe luba olubaale lumenhekamenheka, lwesa ng'oti nkungu." 
Nahum1:7 Musengwa Katonda mulungi, oyo n'ekifo eky'okwewogomamu mu biseera ebizibu; alabirira abo abamwesiga." 
Nahum1:8 Aye abazigu be abazikiriza n'omwidhuzo ogw'amaadhi ag'amaani. Abo abamutakania abasindika mu nzikiiza ey'omu magombe. 
Nahum1:9 Imwe muli kwesoomera kukola ki Musengwa Katonda? Aidha kubazikiriza. Ezira asobola kumutakania kuswika ku mukuzi mulala. 
Nahum1:10 Waire muli ng'oti n'amawa amakaadaanie, era mwaba ng'oti n'abanhwi b'omwenge abatamiire, muja kusaanagho ng'eisubi eikalu bwe limamuka n'omuliro." 
Nahum1:11 Omuntu yava mu imwe eyo e Nineve ng'ali n'ebibi kamaala by'ategeike okukola yaidha yeesoomera Musengwa Katonda. 
Nahum1:12 Aye Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Abantu bange Abaisiraeli, waire nga Abassiria bali kamaala batyo era nga ba maani inho, nja kubazikiriza baweegho. Imwe waire nabatuusa ku kudaazibwadaazibwa, tija kwirayo kubaganha kudaagadaaga." 
Nahum1:13 Buti ni, nja kumenhamenha ebikoligo Abassiria abo bye baabata imwe mu nkoto, n'endhegere dhe baabasibya.”" 
Nahum1:14 Kino Musengwa Katonda ky'alagiire ekigema ku imwe Abassiria ati: “Eriina lyaimwe lija kwerabirwa, kuba tija kubaganha kufuna baidhukulu. Nja kuzikiriza ebifaananie eby'emisambwa gyaimwe ebyabaadhibwa, n'ebyo ebyakolebwa mu kyuma ekisaanuusiibwa ebiri mu masabo. Ndidha kubasimira amagombe, kuba timugwaine kuba ku nsi nga muli balamu.”" 
Nahum1:15 Abantu ab'e Buyudaaya mubone eno! Omukwenda ali kwidhira ku nsozi ng'aleeta amawulire amalungi era ng'alangirira emiraala. Buti ni mukole ekibinuko era mutuukirize bye mweyama ye Musengwa Katonda kuba ababi abo tibaja kwirayo kabiri kulumba nsi yaimwe. Bazikiriziibwa baawaagho. 
Nahum2:1 Imwe abantu ab'e Nineve, babalumbye. Oyo aja okumenhamenha ekibuga abatuuseeku! Mute abaisirukale ghaigulu ku kimante ekigumu ekyezungulwire ekibuga era mukuume enguudo edh'omu kibuga. Mwesibe mwenhwegule. Mwetegeke okulwana olutalo." 
Nahum2:2 Kuba Musengwa Katonda aja kwirizaagho Yakobo ekitiibwa kye ekyo nga n'ekitiibwa eky'Abaisiraeli ekyaligho ng'abazigu bakaali kwidha abaanhaga ebintu. 
Nahum2:3 Abalwani abaziramu ntete ab'oyo aja okumenhamenha ekibuga Nineve, bagemye engabo emyufu, era baavaala ebivaalo ebya kasaayisaayi. Bali kwetegekera kulumba. Ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo bimyansa ng'oti muliro, n'embalaasi edhisika ebigaali ebyo dhiri kweguguna kutoolera." 
Nahum2:4 Ebigaali byaibwe eby'omu lutalo bali kubighalabania mu nguudo edh'ekibuga, baabivuga okubiiza eno n'ere mu mpya dh'ekibuga. Biri kumyansa ng'oti ngada edhiri kwaka, era byamansuka embiro ng'oti kughemya kwa lukuba." 
Nahum2:5 Abakulu bali kuduumirwa, baaja eno nga bwe bagwa. Abazigu bali kweyuna ekimante ekyezungulwire ekibuga, baataagho ekintu ekikingiriza abalwani abasuula oguntu oguwomola ekimante." 
Nahum2:6 Endhigi edh'oku mwiga dhiigwike, abantu ab'omu kisaagaati kya kyabazinga baidhula okutya." 
Nahum2:7 Inhebantu bamutoiremu ebivaalo era baaja naye nga musibe. Abaghala abamugheereza bali kugegenga, baalira ng'oti njiibwa, nga beekuba mu bifuba olw'okunakughala." 
Nahum2:8 Abantu bali kulumuka okuva mu kibuga Nineve ng'oti n'amaadhi bwe gayoolooka okuva mu kidiba ekyabiike. Omuduumizi ali kukanda kweta ati: “Mwemerere! Mwemerere,” aye nga ghazira akyuka kwira." 
Nahum2:9 Munhage feeza! Munhage zaabu! Ekibuga kiidhwire eby'obukombe eby'omughendo einho! 
Nahum2:10 Nineve kizikiriire, kirekeibwa agho kityo, era kiwolongeire. Abantu emyoyo gyabawaamu ira, amagulu gabadhugumira budhugumire, mu mikono muzira maani, n'ensaya dhaabalekuka." 
Nahum2:11 Ekibuga kino kyaba ki ekyalinga oti mpuku ya mpologoma, empologoma ento mwe dhaabanga enkulu n'edhireetera by'eyiize nga ghazira kidhitiisa?" 
Nahum2:12 Empologoma ensaadha yakankanulanga emamba emala abaana baayo, era yaayiigiranga enkazi dhaayo ensolo, yaidhuza mu mpuku dhaayo." 
Nahum2:13 Musengwa Katonda afuga amagye akoba ati: “Bona eno, buti nze nfuuse muzigu y'oli iwe Nineve, era nja kwokya ebigaali byo eby'omu lutalo, n'empologoma dho edho ento dhija kwitibwa n'empiima mu lutalo. Nja kukutoolaku ebyo byonabyona bye wanhaga ku bandi, era tekaaba biragiro bya bakwenda bo.”" 
Nahum3:1 Ekibuga kino kikagwireku, kiidhwire obuguya n'obutemo. Era kiidhwire eby'obukombe ebija okunhagibwa abazigu." 
Nahum3:2 Wulira omuvuuma ogw'enkoba nga bali kukuba embalaasi dhe bali kuvuga. Wulira okuwoloma okw'enkede edh'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, n'empindo edh'ebigere eby'embalaasi, n'okupakalana okw'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo." 
Nahum3:3 Ab'oku mbalaasi bali kulumba ng'empiima dhaibwe dhiri kumyansa era nga n'amafumo gaibwe gali kumirimiinha. Emirambo giri kugwa mmungo na mmungo, era abalwani bali kuja nga bagyekontolaku." 
Nahum3:4 Ebyo byonabyona biri kutuuka ku kibuga ekyo Nineve olw'okwebisa nga malaaya asikiriza ali n'obulezi bwene obwita; kuba kisendasenda amaghanga okugakiidhamya era kyakozesa obulezi bwakyo okugafuula abairu. 
Nahum3:5 Musengwa Katonda afuga amagye akoba ati: “Bona eno, buti nze nfuuse muzigu y'oli iwe Nineve. Nja kukughembula, amaghanga gakwerolere ng'oli madu, gabone bw'oswala." 
Nahum3:6 Ndidha kukusuulaku ebikaba, nkudhoogere irala, era nkufuule enseko dh'abalamu." 
Nahum3:7 Boonaboona abanaakubona baidha kwesisighalanga nga bakoba bati, ‘Ee, Nineve nga kyafafaagana! Naani aja okukirumirwa omwoyo? Naani ayenda okugumya abantu baamu.’ ”" 
Nahum3:8 Nineve, niiwe osinga Thebesi, ekibuga ekikulu mu Misiri? Kyali ku Mwiga Kiyira ng'amaadhi gakyezungulwire. Ng'enhandha yakitaaku ekigo, ng'amaadhi gali ng'oti n'ebimante eby'ekigo ekyo." 
Nahum3:9 Nga n'ekifuga Misiri ni Ethiopia aghazira kukoma. Era ng'ensi Puti ni Libya dhikiiruukirira. 
Nahum3:10 Aye waire kyali kityo, abantu b'omu kibuga ekyo Thebesi baabatwala mu bunhage. Abaana baamu abato baabakuba ghansi mu buli maagaanana gaakyo baabasekembula okutuusa okufa. Abantu baamu ab'ekitiisa baasibwa ku ndhegere era baakubwaku akalulu okusalagho abe abatwale." 
Nahum3:11 Nineve, weena oja kuba ng'oti n'omutamiivu ali kutagala. Olyagala agh'okulumukira owone abazigu, aye nga ghazira." 
Nahum3:12 Ebifo byo eby'okwewogomamu bija kuba ng'oti n'ebibala ebisooka okwenga ku muti omutiini, ole bw'atengeesa omuti bigwa butereevu mu munwa ogw'omuli." 
Nahum3:13 Bona eno, abalwani bo bafuuse ng'oti n'abakazi abataidhi bya kulwana. Engira edhingira mu nsi yo ndhigule, abazigu baingira nga bwe benda. Emiti gye badhikiikamu giidha kuya omuliro." 
Nahum3:14 Abantu ab'e Nineve mwesombere amaadhi ag'okukozesa nga mwetegekera okuzingizibwa. Mwongere okugumya ebifo byaimwe eby'okwewogomamu. Muje mu itosi mulisambe era mugeme obutiba obw'amatoofaali. 
Nahum3:15 Aye, ni bwemunaakola mutya, era omuliro gwidha kubookya, babaitire mu lutalo, era babamalegho ng'enzige bwe dhimalagho ebisimbe. Mwazaalagana inho ng'oti nzige." 
Nahum3:16 Mwayeza abasuubuzi baimwe, baasingaku ni muunienie edhiri ku igulu obungi. Aye buti boonaboona baaja, ng'enzige bw'eyandhuluza amaghagha gaayo n'egulukagho." 
Nahum3:17 Abakungu baimwe bali kamaala ng'oti n'enzige bwe dhiba enhingi einho. Bwe kuba okwinhogovu dhiba ku nkomera, aye endhuba bw'evaayo ni kusuughaku, dhiguluka dhaabulagho nga ghazira n'asobola kumanha ghe dhijiire." 
Nahum3:18 Isebantu kyabazinga ow'e Assiria, abakungu bo bali mu ndoolo dhe bataja kuvaamu ebyanda n'ebyanda. Abantu bo basansaaniire mu nsozi era ghazira muntu wa kubasololeza ghalala." 
Nahum3:19 Ghazira kighanga kukutoolaku bulumi bw'otuuseeku, n'ebibwa bye bakufumiite tibisobola kuwona. Abo boonaboona abawulira ku kuzikirizibwa kwo, bakuba mu ngalo olw'eisanhu. Kuba mpaagho y'otaatuusaaku bikolwa byo eby'obukambwe." 
Habakkuk1:1 Buno n'obukwenda bwa Katonda omulanzi Habakkuku bwe yafuna mu kwolekebwa. 
Habakkuk1:2 Wo Musengwa Katonda, ndituusa li okukulirira okutuyamba ng'otusiriikiriire? Oli tuwonia li abo abatukola ebikolwa eby'obukambwe?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Lwaki ondeka ni ngwa ku bizibu? Lwaki olingirira bulingirire ng'abantu bakola ebibi? Buli ghe ninga mbona bikolwa bya bukambwe na kuzikiriza, abantu basoola era baalwana." 
Habakkuk1:4 Amateeka tigakaakola era abantu tibakaajiira ku butuufu bwa nsonga. Abakozi ab'ebibi basinga abatuufu emisango lwa kusaliriza kwa balamuzi. Mu nsambo eyo bavuluga obutuufu obw'ensonga. 
Habakkuk1:5 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaakoba abantu be ati: “Mulingirire amaghanga agabeezungulwire, era mwidha kubona ebinaabeewuunhisa ni bibasamaaliriza. Kuba nja kukola ekintu kye mutaghanga kwikiriza nga bakibakobeire bukobere." 
Habakkuk1:6 Bona eno, nja kuleetera Abababilonia babe eighanga ery'amaani einho era ery'obukumu. Baje n'obukambwe mu nsi yoonayoona nga banhaga ebiketezo eby'abantu abandi." 
Habakkuk1:7 Abababilonia abo batiisa era beeraliikiriza bubi inho. Beidhi nga bonka n'ab'amaani, era ng'ezira iteeka libafuga." 
Habakkuk1:8 “Embalaasi dhaibwe dhirumuka embiro okusingaku n'empala, era nkambwe okusingaku emisege egiri endhala einho; dhimaduka nga dhizira kye dhitya. Abadhivuga bava ghala, baidha nga baguluka buguluke ng'oti n'enkookooma bw'eika n'eswankula ky'eja okulya." 
Habakkuk1:9 Boonaboona baidha okulwana nga bakambughaire, era entiisa yaibwe n'ebeesookayo emberi. Baasoloza abanhage abangi einho ng'oti musenho." 
Habakkuk1:10 Tibata kinhagansi mu bakyabazinga, era batwala buli mufuzi ng'eky'okuzaanhisa. Ezira kifo kya kwewogomamu kibalema; bakibungaku emungo ey'eitaka kwe baniinira, baakitwala." 
Habakkuk1:11 Agho baafuumuuka embiro ng'oti mpewo baaja. Abantu abo bali n'omusango, amaani gaibwe ge batwala okuba katonda waibwe.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 Wo Musengwa Katonda wange, oli Katonda okuva eira n'eira. Oli Mutukuvu ow'ebyanda n'ebyanda. Wo Musengwa Katonda, niiwe olubaale mwe twewogoma era niiwe walonda Abababilonia, waabafuula ba maani era waabagha okutubonereza." 
Habakkuk1:13 Amaiso go matukuvu tigagwaine kubona kibi, oba okulinga ku akola ekibi. Kale lwaki olingirira obulingirire abantu abo abateesigika? Lwaki osirika busirike ng'abakozi b'ebibi bazikiriza abantu ababasinga obulungi?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Bona, abantu obafiire okuba ng'oti byanhandha, era ng'oti n'ebintu ebyeghaluliza ku itaka ebizira mukulembeze." 
Habakkuk1:15 Abababilonia abo bagema abantu ng'oti n'ole bw'agemya ebyenhandha ku irobo baabaghaluza ng'oti n'ole bw'aghaluza ebyenhandha mu katimba akatono oba mu katimba akanene ka kokota. Era bwe bamala beeseka baasagamba olw'obungi bw'abo be bagemiisa. 
Habakkuk1:16 Era baaghaayo n'emisengo eri obutimba bwaibwe obutono, baaniokeza obutimba bwaibwe obunene obubbaani; kuba ebyo n'ebibafunisa ebirungi mu bulamu era ni balya emere esinga bulungi." 
Habakkuk1:17 Aye mbo baja kutuusa li okuzikiriza amaghanga aghazira na kusaasira, byanda na byanda?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Ndidha kuniina ku kituuti kye nengereraku, nteege mbone Musengwa Katonda ky'anankoba okwogera, era ni ky'aja okundhiramu ku kwemuluguunhia kwange." 
Habakkuk2:2 Agho Musengwa Katonda yandhiramu ati: “Ghandiika bino bye ndi kukwoleka. Obisengeke bukalamu ku kipande nga byangu okubisoma. 
Habakkuk2:3 Bighandiike kuba ekiseera kyabyo eky'okutuukirizibwa kikaali. Aye nga kiri kwidha mangu, era bye ndi kukwoleka biri n'okubaagho. Ni bwebiboneka okuba ng'oti biidha mpola, era biteegerere. Tibiriroba kubaagho, era biryangughaku." 
Habakkuk2:4 Buno ni, n'obukwenda bw'obe oghandiike, oti, ‘Abo boonaboona abatali beesimbu, ba kufa. Aye abo abatuufu baidha kuba balamu olw'obwesige bwaibwe ye ndi.’ ”" 
Habakkuk2:5 Obukombe tibwesigika. Abantu abalulunkanira eby'obukombe beekuluntaza inho aye tibatereera. Bali ng'oti magombe geene, basigala nga bakaayenda. Kyebava ni balwanisa amaghanga n'amaghanga, ni baja nga banhagamu abantu n'ebintu." 
Habakkuk2:6 Aye abantu abo abaghangulwa baja kuyeeyereza abo ababaghangula, era babanhoome nga babakoba bati: “Mukagwireku! Mubaire munhaganga ebitali byaimwe era mwebungaku emisingo gy'abo be muwola. Aye ebyo muja kubirekera li?”" 
Habakkuk2:7 Imwe abaghangula banaimwe, mwena mwidha kufunayo abababandha amagoba, babasitukiremu. Baja kubatiisa mudhugumire. Olwo mwena mufuuke omunhago ye bali." 
Habakkuk2:8 Olw'okuba mwanhaga amaghanga kamaala, abo abaawonagho mwena baja kubanhaga, olw'abantu be mwaita n'olw'ebikolwa eby'obukambwe bye mwakola ku nsi mu bibuga ni ku bantu baamu." 
Habakkuk2:9 Mukagwireku, imwe abakombaghaza ab'omu ndhu dhaimwe nga munhaga ebintu eby'abantu abandi. Era ni muzimba endhu dhaimwe mu bifo ebitatuukikamu, nga mugenderera okwewonia." 
Habakkuk2:10 Ebyo bye muyiiya bireeteire ab'endhu dhaimwe abo okuswala. Era olw'okuba muzikiriiza amaghanga kamaala, kibaleeteire imwe beene okweitaitana." 
Habakkuk2:11 Amabaale ge muzimbisa ebimante galibakubirira enduulu, n'embaawo edh'akasolya dhoona dhaateera okwo." 
Habakkuk2:12 Mukagwireku, imwe abazimba ekibuga mu ebyo bye mufuna mu kutemula, era ni mukibeesaagho mu ebyo bye mufuna mu kukola ebibi." 
Habakkuk2:13 Bona eno, Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye n'eyaleetera amaghanga ge mwaghangula, gakola emirimo emikalangufu, aye nga bye bakola bija kwokebwa bwokebwe. Era Musengwa Katonda oyo n'agaleetera okufaabiikana nga tigaja kuganhulwa naire." 
Habakkuk2:14 Aye ensi eja kwidhula abantu abaidhi ekitiisa kya Musengwa Katonda ng'oti n'enhandha bw'eidhula amaadhi. 
Habakkuk2:15 Mukagwireku, imwe abakozesa obukambwe ku maghanga ge mwaghangula, ni mubaleetera okutagala ng'oti n'abatamiire, era ni baswala." 
Habakkuk2:16 N'imwe mwena mu kifo eky'okugheebwa ekitiisa mwidha kuswazibwa. Mwidha kunhwa mutamiire era mutagale. Musengwa Katonda aidha kubanhwesa ekikopo kyaimwe eky'okubonerezebwa, olwo mu kifo eky'okugheebwa ekitiisa muswale bwa buswale." 
Habakkuk2:17 Obukambwe bwe mwakozesa ku Lebanoni, n'obuja okukozesebwa ku imwe beene. Nga bwe mwazikiriza ensolo, era ensolo n'edhiidha okubatiisa. Olw'ebikolwa eby'obutemo bye mwakola mu nsi, ni mu bibuga, ni ku bantu baamu." 
Habakkuk2:18 Muganhulo ki oguli mu musambwa omuntu gw'abaadha oba n'agukola mu kyuma ekisaanuuse? Omusambwa ogwo gwegeresa buguya bwereere. Omuntu afuna ki mu kwesiga ekintu ky'akoze mwene n'akyeta katonda, ekintu ekitaghanga na kwogera?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Mukagwireku imwe abakoba ekiti muti: “Zuuka,” oba eibaale eritaghanga na kwogera muti: “Situka.” Ghaligho okwolekebwa kw'oghanga okufuna okuva y'ekintu ng'oti n'ekyo? Ni bwe baba nga baakirimbyaku kyonakyona feeza ni zaabu, era kisigala nga kiziramu bulamu naire." 
Habakkuk2:20 Aye Musengwa Katonda ali mu isinzizo lye eitukuvu ensi dhoonadhoona ka dhisirike mu maiso ge. 
Habakkuk3:1 Kuno n'okusaba kw'omulanzi Habakkuku: 
Habakkuk3:2 Wo Musengwa Katonda, nawulira bye wakola era naatya inho. Ni mperaano tukolereku mu biseera byaife bino eby'amaani bye wakolanga eira. Tusaasirenga ni bw'oba ng'osungughaire." 
Habakkuk3:3 Katonda aidha kwidha kabiri ng'ava e Temani eky'omu Edomu; Omutukuvu oyo aidha kuviira ku nsozi edh'e Parani. Okumesunkana kwe kuja kumaamira eigulu lyonalyona, n'ensi yoonayoona emusaake." 
Habakkuk3:4 Aidha kwidha ng'amyansa ng'oti lukuba; ng'okughemya okw'olukuba kuli kuva mu mukono gwe, omuli amaani ge." 
Habakkuk3:5 Asindika obulwaire bwamukulembera, yaalagira okufa kwamunonereza." 
Habakkuk3:6 Bw'ayemerera ensi etengeeta; bw'alinga ku amaghanga ati, gadhugumira. Ensozi edh'emyaka n'emyaka dhimenhekamenheka dhaawaagho; obusozi obw'olubeerera budimira mu itaka bwabuliramu. Edho n'ensozi dhe yatambuliraku ebiseera eby'eira." 
Habakkuk3:7 Nabona abantu ab'e Kushani nga bali mu kutya, n'ab'e Midia nga bali kudhugumira." 
Habakkuk3:8 Wo Musengwa Katonda, wasungughalira miiga? Oba, ekiruyi kyakugema lwa nhandha? Ekyo n'ekyakuleetera okuvuga ebire ng'oti mbalaasi, era ng'oti n'avuga ekigaali eky'omu lutalo n'obughanguzi?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Wasowolayo akalaso mu kiruutu kyako, waakata ku kagugha nga weetegeike okulasa. Waayasamya ensi mwavaamu emiiga." 
Habakkuk3:10 Ensozi dhaakubona dhaatengeeta; amaadhi ag'amaani gaayuyika. Amaadhi ag'enhandha gawolomboka era geefuukuula inho. 
Habakkuk3:11 Endhuba n'omwezi byayemerera, olw'obutangaavu obwavanga mu bulaso bwo nga buziinhuuka, n'olw'okumesunkana okw'eifumo lyo erimyansa." 
Habakkuk3:12 Watambula mu nsi ng'oliku ekiruyi, era waatyankirira amaghanga mu busungu obungi." 
Habakkuk3:13 Waja okulokola abantu bo, okulokola oyo eyasiigibwa omuzigo okuba kyabazinga. Wakuba omukulembeze w'abakozi b'ebibi waamutentena, era waamaliragho irala be yakulemberanga." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wafumita omuduumizi ow'abalwani be n'obulaso, ku lule lwe baidha okutusansaania nga bali ng'oti ni kiwunga ow'amaani, nga beesuuta ng'oti n'abaja okutuntuza abaavu aghazira kubakobaku naire." 
Habakkuk3:15 Watyankirira enhandha n'embalaasi dho, waaleetera amaadhi okusiikuuka, gaafuukeera eiwovu." 
Habakkuk3:16 Bwe mpulira ebyo byonabyona ndhugumira, n'ensaya dhantengera olw'okutya. Amagumba gange gaanafugha, n'ebigere byange byatengeeta ku itaka. Ndidha kusirika nteegerere olunaku Katonda lw'alituusa obuzibu ku abo abatulumba." 
Habakkuk3:17 Waire emiti emitiini giroba okutaaku ebibala, n'emizabbibu gyaloba okubala, n'emyoliva gyona gyabulaku ekivaaku, ni mu misiri mwabulamu ekikungulwa, n'entaama n'embuzi dhoonadhoona ni dhifa, ni mu kigo eky'ente ni mubula akamoola," 
Habakkuk3:18 nze ndidha kusigala nga nsagamba era nga ndi musangaavu. Kuba Musengwa Katonda n'omulokozi wange. 
Habakkuk3:19 Musengwa Katonda n'ampa amaani, yaagumya ebigere byange ku itaka oti bya mpongo, yankuuma naaloba kutyerera ku nsozi kugwa." 
Zephaniah1:1 Buno n'obukwenda Musengwa Katonda bwe yatuma Zefania aje akobere abantu, mu biseera bya kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya eyayetebwanga Yosia, eyali mutabane wa Amoni. Zefania oyo yali mutabane wa Kushi, Kushi yali mutabane wa Gedalia, Gedalia yali mutabane wa Amaria, Amaria yali mutabane wa kyabazinga Hezekia." 
Zephaniah1:2 Musengwa Katonda yakoba ati: “Nja kuzikiriza ebintu byonabyona ebiri ku nsi: 
Zephaniah1:3 abantu, n'ensolo, n'enhonhi, n'ebiba mu nhandha. Nja kuzikiriza aboonooni boonaboona, n'abantu boonaboona baaweegho ku nsi. Nze Musengwa Katonda ninze nkobye." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Nja kubonereza abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu boonaboona n'abo ababa mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona. Era nja kuzikiriza abasinza omusambwa Baali boonaboona abakaasigairegho, n'amaina aga bakabona abamugheereza goonagoona geerabirirwe irala." 
Zephaniah1:5 Nja kuzikiriza abo abaaniina ghaigulu ku ndhu okusinza ebintu eby'oku igulu, n'abo boonaboona abansinza nze Musengwa Katonda, kabiri ni bamala balayira omusambwa Moleki." 
Zephaniah1:6 Era nja kuzikiriza abo boonaboona abatakaidha ye ndi waire okunsaba okubabeera.” 
Zephaniah1:7 Musiriikirire aghali Musengwa Katonda, kuba olunaku lwe luli kumpi kutuuka. Musengwa Katonda ategeike okughaayo abantu be basalibwe ng'oti musengo, era amaze n'okweta abageni abaja okukola omukolo ogwo." 
Zephaniah1:8 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nja kubonereza abakungu ba kyabazinga, n'ab'endhu ye, n'abo boonaboona abaagema empisa edh'abamaghanga agandi." 
Zephaniah1:9 Ku lunaku olwo, nja kubonereza abo boonaboona abasinza mu nsinza ey'abamaghanga agandi, era ni baidhuza endhu ya musengwa waibwe omunhago gwe bafuna mu kwiba ni mu kutemula.”" 
Zephaniah1:10 Era Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ku lunaku olwo, ghaja kubaagho okulira gha Mulyango ogwetebwa ogw'Ebyenhandha ogw'ekibuga Yerusalemu, era ghabeegho okuwowoola mu Kiketezo Ekiyaaka eky'ekibuga ekyo, era ghabeegho okugwa okw'amaani mu nsozi." 
Zephaniah1:11 Muwowoole inho imwe ababa mu kiketezo eky'eifo eky'ekibuga, kuba abasuubuzi baimwe boonaboona bawoiregho okufa." 
Zephaniah1:12 “Mu kiseera ekyo nja kutoola entaala nje nga ndhagaaza mu Yerusalemu mwonamwona. Nja kubonereza abantu boonaboona abali obulungi abazira kibeeraliikiriza, abakoba mule bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda ghazira ky'aidha kukola, ka kibe ekirungi oba ekibi.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Eby'obukombe byaibwe bija kunhagibwa, n'endhu dhaibwe dhimenhebwegho. Waire bali kuzimba endhu, aye tibaja kudhisulamu. Waire bali kusimba amasamba ag'emizabbibu, aye tibaja kunhwa ku mwenge gwa mizabbibu guva mu masamba ago.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda olukologho luli kumpi era luli kwangughaku inho. Olunaku olwo okuluwuliraku lwa bulumi, era luliza n'abasaadha abalwani ab'amaani!" 
Zephaniah1:15 Olunaku olwo luja kuba lwa busungu, lwa bizibu, lwa kuzikirira era lwa bulumi. Luja kuba lunaku lwa kuzikirira na kusaanagho. Luja kuba lunaku lwa kivumbi era lwa kazigizigi, olwidhwire ebire n'enzikiiza agemye bedimudimu." 
Zephaniah1:16 Ku lunaku olwo amagwala agalaalika olutalo gaja kuvuga, okuleekaana okw'abalwani kuwulirwe nga balumbye ebibuga ebyezungulwirwa ebimante ebigumu, n'ebituuti byaku ebireeyiriri ebirengererwaku." 
Zephaniah1:17 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nja kuleetera abantu ebizibu batuuke n'okutambula nga bamaamanta ng'oti batulu, kuba bakoze ebibi ebinsungughaza. Omusaayi gwaibwe guja kuyuyibwa ku itaka ng'oti maadhi, n'emirambo gyaibwe girekebwe agho ng'oti busa.”" 
Zephaniah1:18 Ku lunaku olwo Musengwa Katonda lw'aliragiraku obusungu bwe ezira kirisobola kubawonia, waire feeza ni zaabu waibwe yeenayeena. Obusungu bwe obuli ng'oti muliro, obuva ku nkikidi y'ali nayo ku lw'abantu be, buja kuzikiriza ensi yoonayoona. Aja kutuusa abantu boonaboona ababa ku nsi, ku nkomerero yaibwe eriba ya mangu inho ng'oti kutemya na kuzibula." 
Zephaniah2:1 Imwe eighanga eriziramu nsoni mwenenie era mweireku," 
Zephaniah2:2 nga mukaali kufuuyibwa ere na mpewo ng'oti bikaba. Mwenenie ng'obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda obwokya ng'oti muliro bukaali kubaidhaku, era ng'olunaku lw'aja okulagiraku ekiruyi kye lukaali kutuuka." 
Zephaniah2:3 Imwe abantu ab'ensi eno abeesigwa eri Musengwa Katonda era abagondera ebiragiro bye, mukole ebyo ebituufu era muteekuluntaza mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda. Oba katyo mwakawona ekibonerezo ku lunaku Musengwa Katonda lw'aja okulagiraku obusungu bwe." 
Zephaniah2:4 Ekibuga Gaza kija kulekebwa agho kyereere, n'ekibuga Ashikeloni kyona kija kuwolongera. Abantu ab'omu kibuga Ashidodi baja kubingibwamu mu kitundu butundu kya lunaku. N'ekibuga Ekuroni kija kuzikirizibwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Imwe Abafilisiti ababa mu kiketezo eky'oku nhandha, mukagwireku, kuba Musengwa Katonda abasaliire omusango okubasinga. Aidha kubazikiriza mwenamwena ghabule asigalagho." 
Zephaniah2:6 Ekiketezo kyaimwe eky'oku nhandha kija kufuuka kyayiro, nga kiidhwire entindi edh'abaayi n'ebigo eby'ebyayo byaibwe." 
Zephaniah2:7 Ekiketezo ekyo eky'oku nhandha kija kufuuka kya Bayudaaya. Eyo ye balyayiranga ebyayo byaibwe, era baasula mu ndhu edh'omu kibuga Ashikeloni kuba Musengwa Katonda waibwe aidha kubalabiriranga, abaleetere ebintu kabiri okubajiiranga obukalamu." 
Zephaniah2:8 Musengwa Katonda Aghanga ebintu byonabyona akoba ati: “Mpuliire abantu Abamoabu n'Abammoni nga bavuma era nga bayeeyereza abantu bange. Era naawulira nga beesuuta nga bwe baidha okubanhagaku ekiketezo kyaibwe. 
Zephaniah2:9 Kale ni, nze Musengwa Katonda omulamu afuga amagye, Katonda wa Isiraeli, ndayiire nti ebiketezo eby'Abamoabu n'Abammoni bija kuzikirira, nga Sodoma ni Gomorra bwe byazikirira. Bija kufuuka ekifo ekiidhwire ebisubisubi ebifumita n'ebiina ebisimwamu omuunhu. Bifuuke ekifo ekiziramu kirungi kye kivaamu ebyanda n'ebyanda. Abantu bange abaliwonagho balinhaga ekiketezo ekyo kyaba kyaibwe.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Ekyo n'ekija okuba ekibonerezo eky'Abamoabu n'Abammoni olw'okwekuluntaza kwaibwe, n'olw'okuvuma n'okwesuutira ku bantu ba Musengwa Katonda afuga amagye." 
Zephaniah2:11 Musengwa Katonda oyo aja kubatiisa inho ekibitiriire. Bwenebwene emisambwa gyonagyona aja kugifuula ebintu ebiziramu kantu, era olwo buli ighanga lirisinza mwene nga liri mu kiketezo kyalyo." 
Zephaniah2:12 N'imwe Abaethiopia mwena, Musengwa Katonda aja kubasindikaku abazigu babaite." 
Zephaniah2:13 Musengwa Katonda aja kukozesa obuyinza bwe azikirize abantu ab'e Assiria abali ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Aja kuzikiriza ekibuga Nineve kisigale nga kyanhe bwanhe, era nga kikalu ng'oti irungu lyene." 
Zephaniah2:14 Kija kufuuka ekifo ebyayo n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko mwe birambaala ebiwigulu nga mwe bisula era byaba ku madinisa byawigula. Amakoova gaja kulirira mu miryango gyakyo. Embaawo edh'emivule dhe baazimbisa dhoona dhija kutwalibwa. 
Zephaniah2:15 Ebyo n'ebija okutuuka ku kibuga ekyali kyeidhi nga n'ekirigho kyonka, era nga kirowooza kiti ezira kibuga kindi kyaga nakyo bukologho. Aye kija kuzikirira kifuuke ekifo ensolo edh'omu nsiko ghe dhisula. Buli muntu anaakibitangaku, aneesimoozanga era yaata omukono mu nkoto yeinhamira." 
Zephaniah3:1 Ekibuga Yerusalemu kikagwireku. Kiidhwire abantu abadheemu, n'aboonooni, n'abatuntuza banaibwe." 
Zephaniah3:2 Kizira muntu ye kiwulirisa era tikiganha kugololwa mu nsobi dhaakyo. Tikyesiga Musengwa Katonda, era tikisaba Katonda waakyo oyo akibeere." 
Zephaniah3:3 Abakungu mu kibuga omwo bali oti mpologoma edhiwologoma. Abalamuzi baamu baaba ng'oti n'emisege egiyiiga eigulo nga giri ndhala inho, ni gitalekaagho kagumba kusigala kubonebwaku nga bukyeire." 
Zephaniah3:4 Abalanzi baamu baawaamu ensa era ba nkwe. Bakabona baamu boonoona ebintu ebitukuvu, era baafuulaniafuulania amateeka bafune bye benda." 
Zephaniah3:5 Aye Musengwa Katonda ali mu kibuga omwo, era akola bituufu byonka, takola kibi. Buli nkyo, aghazira kwosaamu, ayoleka ng'aziramu kwekubira. Aye abatenda kujiira ku mazima tibabaamu na nsoni, bongera kukola bibi." 
Zephaniah3:6 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nzikiriiza amaghanga, naasaaniagho ebimante ebigumu ebyezungulwire ebibuga byago, n'ebituuti ebirengererwaku. Naazisa enguudo dh'omu bibuga ebyo nga ghazira adhibitamu ebibuga ebyo byawolongera nga ghazira muntu abibaamu." 
Zephaniah3:7 Naadhuuba nti abantu bange banantya era baaganha okugololwa ensobi dhaibwe. Era naadhuuba nti tibaidha kwerabira ebyo byonabyona bye nababonerezaamu. Aye beeyongera bweyongere okukola ebikolwa ebibi.” 
Zephaniah3:8 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Kale ni muteegerere olunaku lwe ndyesimbagho okugha obudhulizi obulumiriza amaghanga ebibi bye gakola. Nsazeegho okusololeza aghalala amaghanga n'obwakyabazinga, mbamalireku ekiruyi kyange kyonakyona kuba obusungu bwange obuli ng'oti muliro, obuva ku nkikidi ye ndi nayo ku bantu bange, buja kuzikiriza ensi yoonayoona." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Bwenebwene mu kiseera ekyo nja kukyusa abantu abamaghanga goonagoona basabenga nze zenka, era bampeerezenga n'omwoyo mulala." 
Zephaniah3:10 N'abantu bange abaasansaanira eghala, eyo ng'osomoike emiiga egy'omu Ethiopia, baja kundeetera ebigheebwayo." 
Zephaniah3:11 Mu kiseera ekyo, imwe abantu bange timuja kugemwa nsoni kabiri olw'okudheema kwe mwandheemeranga. Nja kubatoolamu abo boonaboona abeekuluntaza mu imwe n'abo abeegulumiza. Era timuja kwirayo kundheemera ku lusozi lwange olutukuvu." 
Zephaniah3:12 Be ndirekagho mu imwe, n'abo abawombeefu n'abaavu abanaidhanga okunsaba okubeerwa." 
Zephaniah3:13 Era abantu abo abaliwonagho mu Isiraeli tibalikola kisobu naire, tibalyogera bya buguya, oba okukozesa olulimi olubuzaabuza. Baidha kubanga bulungi nga bazira kye badhulirira, era nga ghazira kintu kyonakyona kibatiisa.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Imwe Abaisiraeli, mwembe era mukube n'emizira. Imwe ab'e Yerusalemu, musangaale era musagambe n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona." 
Zephaniah3:15 Musengwa Katonda atoiregho ekibonerezo kyaimwe, abinze abazigu baimwe boonaboona. Musengwa Katonda oyo kyabazinga wa Isiraeli ali mu imwe buti, ghazira kye mukaatya." 
Zephaniah3:16 Mu kiseera ekyo, abantu baja kukoba ab'e Yerusalemu bati: “Sioni, otatya! Guma omwoyo!" 
Zephaniah3:17 Musengwa Katonda waimwe, ali mu imwe. Oyo n'omulwanirizi abagha obughanguzi. Ku lwaimwe aidha kusagambanga n'eisanhu era olw'okugonza kwe aidha kubagha obulamu obuyaaka. Aidha kwembanga okwoleka nga bw'abasangaaliire," 
Zephaniah3:18 ng'ali masanhu meereere ng'oti n'omuntu ali ku mbaga.” Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nja kutoolagho akabi ke neesoomera okubasindikira, era mbatooleku okuswazibwa." 
Zephaniah3:19 Mu kiseera ekyo nja kubonereza abo ababatuntuza boonaboona; nja kuwonia abalema, era nsololeze ghalala abo abaatwalibwa mu bunhage. Okubairenga okuswala kwaibwe nja kukufuula kitiisa kyaibwe, era bamanhibwe ensi yoonayoona." 
Zephaniah3:20 Mu kiseera ekyo mwenamwena nja kubasololeza ghalala mbaize eka. Bwenebwene nja kubafuula bamanhifu era abasaakibwa mu nsi yoonayoona, era mbairizeegho ebirungi nga mwenamwena mubona.” Musengwa Katonda n'akobye." 
Haggai1:1 Mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga Dario ni kyabazinga w'e Perusia, ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogwomukaaga, Musengwa Katonda yaagha Haggai omulanzi obukwenda. Haggai oyo ng'ali n'okutwala obukwenda obwo abukobere Zerubbabeli mutabane wa Shealutieli era omufuzi wa Buyudaaya, ni Yoshua mutabane wa Yehozadaki era omukulu wa bakabona." 
Haggai1:2 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yakoba Haggai ati: “Abantu bano bakoba bati, ‘Kino ti n'ekiseera ekituufu eky'okwiramu okuzimba obuyaaka eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda.’ ”" 
Haggai1:3 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaamala yaayogera ng'abita mu Haggai omulanzi, ati:" 
Haggai1:4 “Lwaki imwe beene musula mu mayumba amayooyoote, aye ng'eisinzizo lyange liri bifulukwa byereere?" 
Haggai1:5 Aye kale ni, mubone ebibatuuseeku?" 
Haggai1:6 Mwasiga bingi aye mwakungula bitono. Muli n'emere ey'okulya aye tebamala kubaigusa. Muli n'omwenge ogw'okunhwa aye tigubamala ndiwo! Muli n'engoye edh'okuvaala aye tidhibamala kusuugha. Abakozi empeera ye bafuna tebamala mu byetaago byaibwe. 
Haggai1:7 Aye kale ni, muboine ebibatuuseeku?" 
Haggai1:8 Mpegaano ni muje mu nsozi muleete emiti, mwiremu okuzimba buyaaka eisinzizo, memale nsiime. Olwo ekitiisa kyange kyeyoleke. Nze Musengwa Katonda, ninze nkobye." 
Haggai1:9 “Mwasuubira okukungula ebirime kamaala, aye wo, mwafunayo bitono. Era n'ebitono ebyo bwe mwabituusa eka, naabyonoona. Lwaki nabyonoona? Lwa kuba eisinzizo lyange liri bifulukwa byereere, aye nga imwe buli muntu yeefubiriire ku kulabirira ndhu ye." 
Haggai1:10 Kyova eigulu ligemereire amaadhi obutagwa, n'eitaka lyaloba kubaza birime." 
Haggai1:11 Ndeeteire endoboozi okugwa mu nsi eno: egwe ku nsozi dhaayo, ni ku nimiro dhaayo edh'engaano, n'edh'emizabbibu, n'edh'emiti emyoliva, ni ku birime byonabyona. Era egwe ni ku bantu, ni ku nsolo, ni ku ebyo byonabyona bye mukola.”" 
Haggai1:12 Agho Zerubbabeli mutabane wa Shealutieli era omufuzi wa Buyudaaya, ni Yoshua mutabane wa Yehozadaki era omukulu wa bakabona, n'abantu boonaboona abaira okuva mu bunhage e Babilonia, baakola ekyo Musengwa Katonda waibwe kye yabalagira. Baatya era baagondera obukwenda bwa Haggai omulanzi Musengwa Katonda ye yatuma." 
Haggai1:13 Haggai oyo yaakobera abantu obukwenda bwa Musengwa Katonda ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati, ‘Ndidha kubanga ghalala n'imwe.’ ”" 
Haggai1:14 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaata mu bantu abo boonaboona omwoyo ogwenda okukola. Omwoyo ogwo yaaguta mu Zerubbabeli mutabane wa Shealutieli era omufuzi wa Buyudaaya, ni mu Yoshua mutabane wa Yehozadaki era omukulu wa bakabona, ni mu bantu boonaboona abaira okuva mu bunhage. Baatoolera okukola ku isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye Katonda waibwe," 
Haggai1:15 ku lunaku olwamakumi abiri n'eina, olw'omwezi ogwomukaaga, mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga Dario ni kyabazinga." 
Haggai2:1 Ku lunaku olwamakumi abiri n'olulala, olw'omwezi ogwomusanvu mu mwaka gwene ogwo, Musengwa Katonda kabiri yaayogera ng'abita mu mulanzi Haggai." 
Haggai2:2 Yaakoba Haggai aje ye Zerubbabeli mutabane wa Shealutieli era omufuzi wa Buyudaaya, ni Yoshua mutabane wa Yehozadaki era omukulu wa bakabona, n'abantu boonaboona abaira okuva mu bunhage, abakobe ati:" 
Haggai2:3 “Naani ku imwe abakaasigairegho, eyabona eisinzizo lino mu kitiisa kyalyo ekyasooka? Mperaano libabonekera litya? Liteekwa kuba nga lyaweeramu irala ekitiisa!" 
Haggai2:4 Aye iwe Zerubbabeli, n'iwe Yoshua mutabane wa Yehozadaki era omukulu wa bakabona, n'imwe abantu mwenamwena abali mu nsi eno, mutawaamu maani naire. Mukole bukole mulimo, kuba ndi ghalala n'imwe, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye." 
Haggai2:5 Nga muli kuva mu nsi Misiri, nabasuubiza okubanga aghalala n'imwe buliidho. Kale ni mulobe kutya." 
Haggai2:6 “Esigaireyo akaseera katono ntengeese eigulu n'ensi, n'obukalu n'enhandha." 
Haggai2:7 Nja kutengeesa amaghanga goonagoona, eby'obukombe byago byonabyona bireetebwe ghano, olwo ndidhuze eisinzizo lino eby'obukombe." 
Haggai2:8 Feeza yeenayeena ni zaabu yeenayeena ebiri ku nsi, byange." 
Haggai2:9 Eisinzizo eiyaaka liriba lya kitiisa okusinga lire eryasooka. Era mu eryo mwe ndireetera abantu bange ebintu okubajiiranga obukalamu nga bali mu miraala. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ninze nkobye.”" 
Haggai2:10 Ku lunaku olwamakumi abiri n'eina olw'omwezi ogwomwenda, mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga Dario ni kyabazinga, Musengwa Katonda era yaayogera ni Haggai omulanzi." 
Haggai2:11 Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye yaakoba ati: “Buuza bakabona obone kye bakoba ku kintu kino: 
Haggai2:12 Ole asobola okutoola ekinofu ky'emamba ey'omusengo emaze okutukuzibwa, yaakitwalira mu lugoye lw'avaire. Aye bw'aleka akatundu ku lugoye olwo ni kasiinha ku mugaati, oba ku mere enfumbe yoonayoona, oba ku mwenge ogw'emizabbibu, oba ku muzigo ogw'ebibala eby'emiti emyoliva, oba ku ky'okulya ekindi kyonakyona, obwo eky'okulya ekyo kifuuka kitukuvu kyona?” Bakabona bairamu bati: “Busa.”" 
Haggai2:13 Kabiri Haggai yaababuuza ati: “Ole asobola okufuuka atali mulongoofu olw'okugema oba okusiinha ku mulambo, ate yaamala yaagema ku by'okulya ebyo. Mpegaano eky'okulya ky'agemyeku, kyona kifuuka ekitali kirongoofu nga mwene?” Bakabona bairamu bati: “Yii, kifuuka ekitali kirongoofu.”" 
Haggai2:14 Agho Haggai yaabakoba ati: “Musengwa Katonda akoba ati kityo bwekiri ni ku bantu ab'eighanga lino, ni ku byonabyona bye bakola. Era ni byonabyona bye baghaayo ku alutaari, tiibirongoofu.”" 
Haggai2:15 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mpegaano mugwaine mulowooze inho ku binaabaagho okuva olwaleero n'okweyongerayo. Bwe mwali mukaali kwiramu kuzimba buyaaka isinzizo lyange," 
Haggai2:16 ng'omuntu asobola okuja ku mmungo ey'engaano ng'asuubira okwagaanayo kilo ebikumi bibiri, aye ghaabangagho bwa kilo kikumi kyonka. Ate omuntu bwe yajanga okusena lita ekikumi edh'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ku kikunhiro, yayagaanangayo lita makumi ana (40) gonka." 
Haggai2:17 Nasindikanga empewo ensu yaavulusa ebirime byaimwe byonabyona, era naasindikanga n'omugozi gwabifungalaza, aye era mwaloba okwenenia." 
Haggai2:18 Olwaleero n'olunaku olwamakumi abiri n'eina olw'omu mwezi ogwomwenda, lwe mumaliireku okutaagho omusingi ogw'eisinzizo lyange. Kale ni mulowooze ku binaabaagho okuva olwaleero n'okweyongerayo." 
Haggai2:19 Mperaano mu iterekero timukaalimu ngaano, era n'emizabbibu, n'emitiini, n'emikomamawanga, n'emiti emyoliva, bikaali kutaaku. Aye okuva n'olwaleero ndidha kubaghanga enkabi.”" 
Haggai2:20 Ku lunaku lwene olwo olwabiri n'eina Musengwa Katonda era yaayogera ni Haggai omulanzi omukuzi ogwokubiri. 
Haggai2:21 Yaamukoba aje ye Zerubbabeli omufuzi wa Buyudaaya, amukobe ati: “Nze Musengwa Katonda ndi kumpi okutengeesa eigulu n'ensi," 
Haggai2:22 ntoolegho obwakyabazinga obw'amaghanga, era nkomye obuyinza bwago. Ndidha kusuula ere ebigaali by'omu lutalo n'abavuzi baabyo. N'embalaasi dhiidha kufa, n'abavuzi baadho baitagane beene na beene." 
Haggai2:23 Ku lunaku olwo, ndikutwala iwe Zerubbabeli omugheereza wange era mutabane wa Shealutieli, naakutaagho ofuge mu liina lyange kuba niiwe ye nonze. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ninze nkobye.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Mu mwezi ogwomunaana, mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga Dario ni kyabazinga w'e Perusia, Musengwa Katonda yayogera ni Zekaria omulanzi, mutabane wa Berekia era nga mwidhukulu wa Iddo." 
Zechariah1:2 Yaamukoba ati: “Nze Musengwa Katonda nasungughalira inho badhaadha baimwe. 
Zechariah1:3 Aye mperaano ndi kukoba abantu nti mwire ye ndi nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, olwo zeena ndidha kwira ye muli." 
Zechariah1:4 Mutaba ng'oti ni badhaadha baimwe, abalanzi ab'eira be baakoberanga obukwenda bwange nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye. Abalanzi baakobanga badhaadha baimwe okuva mu mpisa dhaibwe embi ni mu bikolwa byaibwe ebibi. Aye badhaadha baimwe baaloba kuwulira nze Musengwa Katonda bye mbakoba, waire okufaayo okukola bye mbalagira." 
Zechariah1:5 Aye buti badhaadha baimwe abo bali gha? N'abalanzi abo babaagho nga balamu byanda na byanda? 
Zechariah1:6 Aye okulabula kwange n'ebiragiro byange, bye nabisa mu bagheereza bange abalanzi, byatuukirira ku badhaadha baimwe abo, baatuuka n'okwenenia. Baakoba bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoze nga bwe yasalagho, yaatubonereza olw'empisa dhaife embi n'olw'ebikolwa byaife ebibi nga bwe tugwaniire.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 Lwali lunaku lwa makumi abiri na ina olw'omwezi ogweikumi n'omulala ogwetebwa Shebati, mu mwaka ogwokubiri nga Dario ni kyabazinga w'e Perusia. Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze Zekaria omulanzi, mutabane wa Berekia era mwidhukulu wa Iddo, mu kubonekerwa obwire." 
Zechariah1:8 Naabona malaika wa Musengwa Katonda ng'ali kuvuga embalaasi emyufu, ng'agyemereiza mu miti egy'ebisaka egyali mu kiiko. Einhuma we yaliyo embalaasi edhindi emyufu, n'edha kikuusikuusi, n'endheru." 
Zechariah1:9 Agho naamubuuza nti: “Musengwa, embalaasi edho dhitegeeza ki?” Malaika yandhiramu ati: “Ndidha ku kwoleka kye dhitegeeza.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Kale malaika oyo eyali ayemereire mu miti egy'ebisaka, yandhiramu ati: “Edho, Musengwa Katonda n'eyadhituma okuja okukebera ensi.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Era dhaakobera malaika wa Musengwa Katonda oyo eyali ayemereire mu miti egy'ebisaka, dhiti: “Tumaze okukebera ensi, twabona ng'eri agho etyo.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Agho malaika oyo yaakoba ati: “Wo Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, oligemerwa li ekisa Yerusalemu n'ebibuga eby'omu Buyudaaya, by'osungughaliire emyaka gino ensanvu?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Musengwa Katonda yaamwiramu n'ekisa ng'amugumya. 
Zechariah1:14 Malaika oyo yankoba nangirire Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye bye yakoba ati: “Enkikidi engema inho olw'okugonza kwange okungi eri Yerusalemu ni Sioni. 
Zechariah1:15 Era nsungughaliire inho amaghanga agali mu miraala, kuba nze nasungughaliraku abantu bange akatono kati, aye amaghanga ago gaayongeranga bwongere kuleetera bantu bange abo kudaazibwadaazibwa." 
Zechariah1:16 Kale buti ndhize mu Yerusalemu n'okusaasira okungi. Eisinzizo lyange baja kwiramu okulizimba, ni Yerusalemu bakizimbe buyaaka.”" 
Zechariah1:17 Malaika era yankoba okulangirira nti: “Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati ebibuga bye biriiramu okuba obukalamu. Era akoba ati aliiramu okuyambanga Yerusalemu, yaakitwala ng'ekibuga ekikye ku bubwe.”" 
Zechariah1:18 Kabiri naafuna okubonekerwa okundi, era okuja okulinga nti nga mbona amayiga ag'ensolo ana." 
Zechariah1:19 Naabuuza malaika eyali alikwogeranga ninze nti: “Amayiga ago gategeeza ki?” Yandhiramu ati: “Gategeeza amaghanga ag'obuyinza agaasansaania abantu ab'omu Buyudaaya, n'ab'omu Isiraeli, n'ab'omu Yerusalemu.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Agho Musengwa Katonda yandholeka abagheesi bana. 
Zechariah1:21 Nze naabuuza nti: “Abo baidhie kukola ki?” Yandhiramu ati: “Baidhie okudhugumiza n'okusaaniagho amaghanga ag'obuyinza agaatyankirira Buyudaaya, ni gasansaania abantu baamu.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Kabiri nafuna okubonekerwa okundi, era okuja okulinga nti nga mbona omuntu ali n'olukoba olupima mu ngalo." 
Zechariah2:2 Naamubuuza nti: “Oli kuja gha?” Yandhiramu ati: “Ndi kuja kupima Yerusalemu mbone obuleeyi bwakyo n'obugazi bwakyo.” 
Zechariah2:3 Agho malaika eyali ali kwogeranga ninze, bwe yaba ng'oti atambula okuja, ghaabaagho malaika owundi eyatambula ng'aidha y'ali baagaanane." 
Zechariah2:4 Malaika eyasooka yaakoba ole owundi ati: “Lumuka oje, okobe omwisuka oyo ali n'olukoba olupima mu ngalo oti, mu Yerusalemu muja kubaamu abantu kamaala inho era nga bali n'ebyayo byaibwe kamaala. Kale nga tibasobola kuweera mu kibuga ekyo nga kyezungulwirwa ekimante." 
Zechariah2:5 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati mwene n'aliba ekimante eky'omuliro okwezungulula ekibuga ng'akikuuma, era ati mwene n'aliba ekitiibwa ky'ekibuga ekyo.”" 
Zechariah2:6 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Imwe bantu bange! Musitukiremu mulumuke, muve mu nsi eyo eri ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ye nabasansaaniza ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona ng'oti n'empewo ey'oku igulu." 
Zechariah2:7 Mulumuke muve eyo ye muli mu bantu Abababilonia, mwire mu Sioni." 
Zechariah2:8 Buli agema ku imwe aba asiinhie ku mboni ya liiso lyange.” Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ow'ekitiisa, yantuma nje y'amaghanga agaanhagulula abantu be, ngakobe nti:" 
Zechariah2:9 “Mubone eno, nze Musengwa Katonda mwene ninze ndibalwanisa imwe, naabaghaayo mu ngalo edh'abaali abagheereza baimwe, era baabanhagulula.” Ebyo bwe birimala okubaagho, mulimanha nga Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye n'eyantuma." 
Zechariah2:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Mwembe era musagambe, imwe abantu b'omu Yerusalemu, kuba ndi kwidha mbenga ghalala n'imwe.”" 
Zechariah2:11 Mu kiseera ekyo, abantu abamaghanga kamaala baliidha ye Musengwa Katonda baafuuka bantu be. Musengwa Katonda alibanga ghalala n'imwe, era imwe mulimanha nga oyo n'eyantuma ye muli." 
Zechariah2:12 Musengwa Katonda oyo aliiramu kabiri okulonda Buyudaaya yaagifuula ensi eyiye ku bubwe entukuvu. Era yairamu n'okulonda Yerusalemu kibe ekibuga kye ky'agonza einho. 
Zechariah2:13 Abantu mwenamwena musiriikirire mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, kuba asitwike alikwidha ng'aviira mu kifo kye ekitukuvu mw'aba." 
Zechariah3:1 Kabiri nafuna okubonekerwa okundi, Musengwa Katonda yandholeka Yoshua Omukulu wa Bakabona ng'ayemereire mu maiso ga malaika wa Musengwa Katonda oyo. Era ku luuyi lwa Yoshua olw'omukono omusaadha, ghaali gheemereiregho Sitaani nga yeetegeike okulumiriza Yoshua oyo omusango." 
Zechariah3:2 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaakoba Sitaani ati: “Iwe Sitaani, Musengwa Katonda agwananga yaakusalira omusango. Musengwa Katonda oyo eyalonda Yerusalemu agwananga yaakusalira omusango gwakusinga. Oyo y'oli kwenda okulumiriza ali ng'oti n'ekisiki kye baswankwire mu muliro.”" 
Zechariah3:3 Yoshua yali ayemereire mu maiso ga malaika ng'ali mu bivaalo ebiidhwire eikoodera. 
Zechariah3:4 Malaika yaakoba abaali beemereire mu maiso ge ati: “Mumutoolemu ebivaalo ebyo ebiidhwire eikoodera.” Era yaakoba Yoshua ati: “Bona eno, nkutoireku ebibi byo byonabyona, era nja kukuvaaza ebivaalo eby'ekitiibwa.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Era yaalagira ati: “Mumusibe n'ekitambaala ekitukula ku mutwe.” Kale baamusiba ekitambaala ekitukula ku mutwe, baamuvaaza n'ebivaalo ebitukula, nga malaika wa Musengwa Katonda ayemereire agho." 
Zechariah3:6 Agho malaika wa Musengwa Katonda yaagumya Yoshua ng'akoba ati 
Zechariah3:7 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akobye ati: “Bw'onaagemanga amateeka gange era n'ojiiranga ku biragiro byange, oidha kusigala nga niiwe olabirira eisinzizo lyange ghalala n'empya dhaalyo. Era ndidha kukuganha okuseetanga ye ndi ng'oti ni bamalaika abo abali agho." 
Zechariah3:8 Kale ni, iwe Yoshua Omukulu wa Bakabona ghalala ni bakabona baino, muwulire kino: Niimwe akamanhiso ak'ebiseera ebirungi eyo ye bwidha. Era nja kubooleka omugheereza wange ayetebwa Olusaga!" 
Zechariah3:9 Bona, nja kuta mu maiso ga Yoshua eibaale nga liriku endhuyi musanvu, nditoneku n'ekighandiiko. Era nditoolagho ekibi eky'ensi eno mu lunaku lulala luti lwonka." 
Zechariah3:10 Okuva olunaku olwo, buli muntu alyetanga mwine aje ewuwe awuumulireku mu isamba lye ery'emizabbibu n'ery'emitiini.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Agho malaika eyali ali kwogeranga ninze yaidha kabiri, yanzuusa ng'oti mbairenga ntendwike." 
Zechariah4:2 Yambuuza ati: “Kiki ky'oli kubona?” Naamwiramu nti: “Ndi kubona ekikondo eky'entaala ekyakolebwa mu zaabu, nga ku ngulu kwakyo kuliku akadoome akabaamu amafuta. Ku kikondo ekyo kuliku entaala musanvu, nga buli ntaala eriku entambi musanvu musanvu." 
Zechariah4:3 Era nga ku mbali kw'ekikondo ekyo kuliku emiti emyoliva ebiri, ogundi ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha n'ogundi ku luuyi olw'omugooda.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Agho naabuuza malaika eyali ali kwogeranga ninze nti: “Musengwa Katonda wange, ebyo bitegeeza ki?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Malaika yambuuza ati: “Toidhi ebyo kye bitegeeza?” Naamwiramu nti: “Musengwa Katonda wange, tiidhi.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Agho malaika oyo yankoba okutwalira Zerubbabeli obukwenda bwa Musengwa Katonda obukoba buti: “Olighangula ti lwa kuba wa maani, waire okuba ow'obuyinza, aye lwa Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye okukugha omwoyo gwe." 
Zechariah4:7 Ebizibu ebiri ng'oti nsozi ndeeyiriri birivaagho ghaaba ng'oti museetwe. Oliiramu okuzimba obuyaaka eisinzizo, era bw'oliba otaaku eibaale erisembayo, abantu balyasiikana bati, ‘Liboneka bulungi, obulungi bwenebwene!’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Era Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Zechariah4:9 “Zerubbabeli atairegho omusingi ogw'eisinzizo lino, era mwene oyo n'aidha okumaliriza okulizimba. Olwo abantu bange balimanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, ninze eyakutuma ye bali." 
Zechariah4:10 Abo boonaboona ababaire bawoiremu amaani olw'okubona ng'ebintu biri kuja kasoobo, baja kusangaala nga baboine Zerubbabeli bw'ali kuja mu maiso n'okuzimba eisinzizo.” Malaika era yankoba ati: “Entaala omusanvu dh'oboine, ago n'amaiso ga Musengwa Katonda agabona woonawoona ku nsi.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Agho naamubuuza nti: “Ate emiti emyoliva ebiri egiri ku mbali kw'ekikondo ekyo, ogundi ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha n'ogundi ku luuyi olw'omugooda, gitegeeza ki?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Era naamubuuza nti: “Ensaga eibiri edh'omuti omwoliva edhiri ku mbali okw'emikonda ebiri egya zaabu egikozesebwa okwitulula amafuta ag'entaala, dhitegeeza ki?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Malaika yambuuza ati: “Toidhi ebyo kye bitegeeza?” Naamwiramu nti: “Musengwa Katonda wange, tiidhi.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Agho yankobera ati: “Abo n'abantu ababiri Musengwa Katonda ow'ensi yoonayoona be yalonda, era yaabasiiga omuzigo bamugheerezenga.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Kabiri naafuna okubonekerwa okundi, era okuja okulinga nti nga mbona enzingo y'ekitabo, ng'eri kugulukira mu ibbanga." 
Zechariah5:2 Malaika yambuuza ati: “Kiki ky'oli kubona?” Nairamu nti: “Ndi kubona enzingo y'ekitabo ng'eri kugulukira mu ibbanga. Obuleeyi bwayo buli mita mwenda, ate obugazi bwayo bwaba mita ina n'ekitundu.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Agho yankoba ati: “Mu nzingo y'ekitabo eyo mwaghandiikibwamu ekikolimo ekija okugema ensi yoonayoona. Olwo kibe nti omuntu yeenayeena anaibanga baidha kumutoolanga mu nsi eno, n'omuntu yeenayeena anaalayiranga eby'okusubagha, yeena bamutoolenga mu nsi eno." 
Zechariah5:4 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati alisindika ekikolimo ekyo kyangira mu ndhu dh'abaibi, ni mu ndhu dh'abo abanaalayiranga eby'okusubagha mu liina lya Musengwa Katonda. Era ekikolimo ekyo kiriba mu ndhu edho kyadhisaaniagho okudhimaliriragho.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Agho malaika eyali ali kwogeranga ninze yaaseeta, yankoba ati: “Linga ere obone ekiri kwidha.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Naamubuuza nti: “Kiki ekyo?” Yairamu ati: “Kiibo, era kitegeeza ekibi eky'ensi yoonayoona.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Ekiibo ekyo kyaliku ekisandikira ekyakolebwa mu kyuma ekizito. Naja okulinga nti nga mbona bali kukisandukula, era naabona nga mu kiibo mulimu omukazi atyaime." 
Zechariah5:8 Malaika yankoba ati: “Omukazi oyo ategeeza ekibi.” Agho yaasiinhira omukazi okumwiza mu kiibo, era yaakiizaaku ekisandikira kyaku ekizito." 
Zechariah5:9 Kabiri naja okulinga nti, nga mbona ghaligho abakazi babiri abali kwidha, nga bali kuguluka n'amaghagha ng'oti ga sekanhulya. Baidha baatoolagho ekiibo ekyo baguluka, baaja nakyo." 
Zechariah5:10 Naabuza malaika nti: “Bali kukitwala gha?” 
Zechariah5:11 Yandhiramu ati: “Bali kukitwala Babilonia, ye baja okukizimbira eisabo. Bwe balimala okulizimba, balita ekiibo ekyo mu isabo eryo baakisinza.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Kabiri naafuna okubonekerwa okundi, era okuja okulinga nti nga mbona ebigaali eby'omu lutalo bina biri kuviira ghagati gh'ensozi ibiri. Ensozi edho dhaali nga dha kyuma kya kikomo." 
Zechariah6:2 Ekigaali ekyasooka kyali n'embalaasi dha kasaayisaayi nga dhiri kukighaluza, ate ekyokubiri kyaba n'embalaasi ndhirugavu nga n'edhiri kukighaluza." 
Zechariah6:3 Ekigaali ekyokusatu kyali n'embalaasi ndheru nga dhiri kukighaluza, ate ekyokuna kyaba n'embalaasi dha kikuusikuusi nga n'edhiri kukighaluza." 
Zechariah6:4 Agho naabuza malaika eyali ali kwogeranga ninze nti: “Musengwa, ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ebyo bitegeeza ki?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Yandhiramu ati: “Ebyo biri kuja ku ndhuyi eina edhiri ghansi gh'eigulu, era byakamala okuva ghale mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda ow'ensi yoonayoona.”" 
Zechariah6:6 Ekigaali ekiri n'embalaasi endhirugavu edhiri kukighaluza, kiri kuja ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba. Ekiri n'embalaasi endheru kiri kuja ku luuyi lwa bugwandhuba. Ate ekiri n'embalaasi edh'ekikuusikuusi kiri kuja ku luuyi lwa mukono musaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Zechariah6:7 Embalaasi edho bwe dhaavaayo dhaali kasukasu okuja okukebera ensi. Malaika yaadhikoba ati: “Muje mukebere ensi.” Kale dhaaja dhaagikebera. 
Zechariah6:8 Agho malaika yaakaabuka yankoba ati: “Bona eno, embalaasi edhijiire ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba dhireeteire obusungu bwa Musengwa Katonda okuwoleera.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Agho Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Zechariah6:10 “Toola ebirabo ebigheereibwayo Heledai ni Tobiya ni Yedaia, abaakaira okuva e Babiloni mu bunhage, omale oje olunaku lwene olwo mu ndhu ya Yosia mutabane wa Zefania." 
Zechariah6:11 Oidha kutoola ku feeza ni zaabu bye baghaireyo, okolemu engule ogivaaze ku mutwe gwa Yoshua Omukulu wa Bakabona, mutabane wa Yehozadaki." 
Zechariah6:12 Omukobe oti Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati, ‘Bona eno, omuntu ayetebwa eriina Olusaga aja kukulira gheene agho mwene gh'ali, era aja kuzimba eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda." 
Zechariah6:13 Oyo n'alizimba eisinzizo eryo, era oyo ye baligha ekitiisa eky'obwakyabazinga, yaaba mufuzi. Ghalibaagho kabona alibanga agho okumpi n'ekityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, nga bombi bategeeragana mu miraala.’" 
Zechariah6:14 Heledai, Tobiya, Yedaia ni Yosia mutabane wa Zefania, n'abaidha okulabiriranga engule eyo eidha kubanga mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda ng'ekiidhukizo.”" 
Zechariah6:15 Abantu ab'eghala baliidha baayamba mu kuzimba obuyaaka eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda, olwo mwamanha nga Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye n'eyantuma ye muli. Ebyo birituukirira, bwe muligondera n'omwoyo omulala ebyo Musengwa Katonda waimwe by'alagira." 
Zechariah7:1 Ku lunaku olwokuna olw'omwezi ogwomwenda ogwetebwa Kisilevu, mu mwaka ogwokuna nga Dario ni kyabazinga, Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze Zekaria omulanzi." 
Zechariah7:2 Mu kiseera ekyo, abantu ab'e Betheli baali bamaze okutuma Sharezeri ni Regemmeleki n'abasaadha baibwe, baje ye Musengwa Katonda bamweghembe abagemerwe ekisa." 
Zechariah7:3 Era baabatuma n'okubuuza bakabona b'omu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye aghalala n'abalanzi bati: “Tuje mu maiso n'okuliranga amaziga olw'okuzikirizibwa kw'eisinzizo, era nga tusiiba mu mwezi ogwokutaanu nga bwe tubairenga tukola mu myaka egyo gyonagyona egibiseegho?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Zechariah7:5 “Kobera abantu boonaboona abali mu nsi eno, ni ba kabona, oti bwe baasiibanga ni baliranga maziga mu mwezi ogwokutaanu n'ogwomusanvu okumala emyaka egyo ensanvu, tibaabikolanga lwa kugheesa nze kitiisa." 
Zechariah7:6 Era bwe baalyanga ni banhwa, byalinga bya kweigusa beene.”" 
Zechariah7:7 Byene ebyo Musengwa Katonda bye yayogera ng'abita mu balanzi abaaligho mu biseera eby'eira. Mu biseera ebyo ekibuga Yerusalemu bye kyabeeranga ng'ebintu bikijiira bukalamu nga kiidhwire abantu. Era ng'abantu bali kamaala mu bibuga ebikyezungulwire, ni mu biketezo ebiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, n'ebyo ebiri mu biiko." 
Zechariah7:8 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Zechariah7:9 “Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye nagha ira abantu bange ebiragiro bino nti, ‘Musalenga emisango mu butuufu, buli muntu agemerwenga mwine ekivunika era amusaasirenga." 
Zechariah7:10 Mutafuginkirizanga muntu yeenayeena, k'abe namwandu, oba mulekwa, oba omusenze, oba omwavu. Era mutayiiyanga mu myoyo gyaimwe kukola kabi ku banaimwe.’" 
Zechariah7:11 “Aye abantu bange baakola bwa mpwitu, baaloba kuwulira waire okufaayo." 
Zechariah7:12 Baakalangusa emyoyo gyaibwe ng'oti ibaale, baaloba kujiira ku mateeka na biragiro, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye bye nabagha nga mbita mu balanzi abaaligho mu biseera eby'eira. Kyenava ni mbasungughalira ekibitiriire," 
Zechariah7:13 era olw'okuba baaloba okuwulira bye nabakobanga, zeena naalobanga okubagha bye bansabanga." 
Zechariah7:14 Nabasansaania mu maghanga goonagoona ge baali tibaidhi naku naire, nga ndi ng'oti n'empewo eyeezungulula n'amaani. Olwo ensi yaibwe enungi einho yaasigala bwagho nga ghazira muntu agirimu, yaafuuka bifulukwa byereere.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Zechariah8:2 “Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye enkikidi engema ku lw'ekibuga Yerusalemu, kuba ngonza inho abantu baakyo. Era okugonza kwe ndi nakwo okunene okwo kundeetera okusungughalira abazigu baibwe." 
Zechariah8:3 Luliba lulala naira ku lusozi lwange Sioni, naaba mu kibuga kyange Yerusalemu. Olwo ekibuga ekyo balikyetanga ekibuga eky'abantu abeesigwa, era baakyetanga olusozi lwange nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye olutukuvu." 
Zechariah8:4 Abasaadha n'abakazi abakaire einho abatambulira obw'oku mikoomo olw'emyaka, baliiramu okutyamanga mu mpya edh'ekibuga Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah8:5 Era enguudo dhaakyo dhiriiramu okwidhula abalenzi n'abaghala abali kuzaanha. 
Zechariah8:6 “Ekyo kiboneka okuba ng'ekitasoboka eri abo abaawonagho abali mu ighanga lino buti, aye eri nze ghazira kitasoboka." 
Zechariah8:7 Bona eno, ndinunula abantu bange, naabatoola mu nsi edh'e buvandhuba n'e bugwandhuba ye baatwalibwa." 
Zechariah8:8 Ndibaiza mu Yerusalemu baabanga omwo. Baliba bantu bange, nze naaba Katonda waibwe omwesigwa era omutuufu." 
Zechariah8:9 “Mugume imwe abali kuwulira mpegaano ebibono bino abalanzi bye baakoba, mu biseera abazimbi bye baateeragho omusingi ogw'eisinzizo lyange, nga lija okwiramu okuzimbibwa." 
Zechariah8:10 Ebiseera ebyo bwe byali nga bikaali kutuuka, tighaalingagho muntu asobola kusasulira mupakasi oba ensolo okumukolera omulimo. Era nga ghaziragho muntu atali mu bweraliikirivu bwa bazigu kumulumba, kuba naleetera abantu okukyaghagana." 
Zechariah8:11 Aye mpegaano, nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga amagye, tija kubisa bantu ba ighanga lino abaawonagho nga bwe nabisanga abaaligho mu biseera ebyo." 
Zechariah8:12 Baidha kusiganga emere nga bali mu miraala, emizabbibu gibalenga ebibala, eitaka lyeyongerenga okubaaku ebirime, n'amaadhi gagwenga. Ebyo byonabyona ndibigha abantu b'eighanga lino abaawonagho." 
Zechariah8:13 Imwe ab'omu Buyudaaya n'ab'omu Isiraeli, mwali mufuuse ekibono abamaghanga agandi kye baakozesanga okukolima. Aye buti ndidha kubanunula, olwo bakozesenga eriina lyaimwe okusabiranga abantu enkabi. Kale mutatya naire, mugume bugume.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Badhaadha baimwe bwe bansonsoonia ni bandeetera okusungughala, nategeka okubakola akabi era naatuukiriza entegeka eyo aghazira kukyusaamu kirowoozo kyange naire." 
Zechariah8:15 Aye mpegaano ntegeike okugha abantu b'omu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya enkabi. Kale mutatya naire. 
Zechariah8:16 Bino bye mugwaine okukolanga: buli muntu akobere mwine amazima. Musalenga mu mazima mu mbuga dhaimwe edh'amateeka, mu nsambo ereetagho emiraala." 
Zechariah8:17 Era mutayiiyanga mu myoyo gyaimwe kukola kabi ku banaimwe, waire okulayiranga ebiziramu kuba ebyo byonabyona, nze Musengwa Katonda, mbikyayira irala inho.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Kabiri Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati:" 
Zechariah8:19 “Okusiiba kwaimwe okw'omu mwezi ogwokuna, n'okw'omu gwokutaanu, n'okw'omu gwomusanvu, n'okw'omu gweikumi, kulifuukamu biseera bya masanhu na kusagamba eri ab'eighanga Buyudaaya nga bali mu bibinuko. Agho ni mugwaine mugonzenga okukolerera amazima n'emiraala.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Ekiseera kirituuka, abantu abamaghanga kamaala n'ab'omu bibuga kamaala baidha e Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah8:21 Abantu ab'omu kibuga kino balikoba ab'omu kibuga ekindi bati, ‘Mwidhe tuje ye Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, tumweghembe atugemerwe ekivunika. Ife tujiire.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Abantu abamaghanga kamaala nga mulimu n'ag'amaani, baliidha e Yerusalemu ye Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, okumusinza n'okumweghemba abagemerwe ekisa." 
Zechariah8:23 Era Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye akoba ati mu biseera ebyo, abantu ikumi abamaghanga agandi balyegema ku Muyudaaya mulala, nga bakoba bati, ‘Tuganhe tuje n'iwe, kuba twawulira tuti Katonda ali n'imwe.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Buno n'obukwenda bwa Musengwa Katonda: Musengwa Katonda asazeegho okubonereza ensi Haduraki n'ekibuga ky'e Damasiko. Era ekibuga kya Siria ekikulu kya Musengwa Katonda oyo, n'ebika byonabyona eby'omu Isiraeli byona bibye." 
Zechariah9:2 Hamathi ekigabana ensalosalo ni Haduraki kya Musengwa Katonda oyo, ni Tiro ni Sidoni ebirimu abantu abagezi einho byona bibye." 
Zechariah9:3 Tiro kyamala okwezimbaku ekimante ekigumu okukyezungulula, kyabunga feeza omungi ng'oti nkungu, ni zaabu omungi ng'oti bityanka bya mu nguudo." 
Zechariah9:4 Aye bona eno, Musengwa Katonda alikitoolaku ebintu byakyo byonabyona, yaawoloba obukombe bwakyo mu nhandha. Era omuliro gulyokya ekibuga ekyo gwakisaaniagho." 
Zechariah9:5 Ekibuga Ashikeloni kiribona ebyo, kyatya. Gaza kiritengera olw'obulumi, ni Ekuroni kyona kyalumwa okubona ng'eisuubi lyakyo liwoiregho. Gaza kirifiirwa kyabazinga waakyo, ni Ashikeloni kyasigala agho kityo nga kiziramu bantu." 
Zechariah9:6 Mu Ashidodi mulibaamu abantu ab'omusaayi omutabike. Era Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Ndireetera Abafilisiti abo abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu, okwewombeeka." 
Zechariah9:7 Ndibalekeza okuliira omusaayi mu mamba, n'okulya ebintu ebindi byonabyona ebyenhinhalwa. Abaliwonagho boona balitwalibwa ng'abantu bange, baaba ng'oti n'ekindi ku bika kya Yuda. Abantu ab'e Ekuroni boona balifuuka bantu bange, ng'Abayebusi bwe baafuuka." 
Zechariah9:8 Olwo ndibanga mu nsi yange eyo ng'omukuumi waayo, ndobere abazigu okugibitamu. Tija kuganha mufuzi mubi kabiri kutuntuza bantu bange, kuba mpegaano nze mwene mboine n'amaiso gange, abantu bange nga bwe badaazibwadaazibwa." 
Zechariah9:9 Musagambe, musagambe imwe abantu b'e Sioni! Mukube emizira imwe abantu b'e Yerusalemu! Mubone, Kyabazinga waimwe ali kwidha ye muli. Ali kwidhira mu kitiibwa n'obughanguzi. Muwombeefu era ali kwidhira ku ndogoyi; atyaime ku ndogoyi ento.”" 
Zechariah9:10 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Nditoola mu Isiraeli ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, naatoola ni mu Yerusalemu embalaasi. Obulaso obukozesebwa mu lutalo bulizikirizibwa. Kyabazinga oyo alireetagho emiraala mu maghanga. Alifuga ekiketezo ekiva ku nhandha okutuuka ku nhandha, n'okuva ku mwiga Eufurate okutuusa ensi y'ekanga.”" 
Zechariah9:11 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Olw'endagaano ye nakola n'imwe, n'eteebwaku n'akamanhiso ak'omusaayi ogw'ensolo edh'emisengo, ndirekula abantu baimwe baaba ba idembe, naabatoola mu biina ebitaalingamu maadhi, mwe baabasibiranga nga bali mu bunhage." 
Zechariah9:12 Imwe abali mu bunhage, mwire mu kifo kyaimwe eky'okwewogomamu. Mwire kuba mpegaano muli n'eisuubi. Olwaleero ndi kubakakasa nti ebyaimwe byonabyona ebyayonoonebwa mu kudaazibwadaazibwa kwaimwe, ndibibairizaagho naasinzaagho emikuzi ebiri." 
Zechariah9:13 Ndikozesa Buyudaaya ng'oti kalaso ka mulwani, era naakozesa Isiraeli ng'oti n'obusaale bwaku. Ndikozesa ab'e Sioni ng'oti mpiima, naalwanisa Abagureki.”" 
Zechariah9:14 Agho Musengwa Katonda alibonekera ghaigulu gh'abantu be, era yaalasa obusaale bwe bwaja ng'oti kumyansa kwa lukuba. Musengwa Katonda oyo alifuuwa eigwala, memale yaakumbira mu mpewo eyeezungulula n'amaani, eva ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Zechariah9:15 Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye alikuumanga abantu be, yaabaleetera okuzikiriza abazigu baibwe, baabatyankirira. Balitamiira okuyugha omusaayi gw'abazigu, baaba ng'oti n'abatamiire omwenge. Era omusaayi ogwo guliba mungi ng'oti n'ogw'emisengo, gwe bayugha n'ekibya ku alutaari ni gutoonherera ku nsonda dhaayo." 
Zechariah9:16 Ku lunaku olwo, Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli aliwonia abantu be abo, ng'oti n'omwayi bw'awonia ebyayo bye obutatuukibwaku kabi. Balimesunkanira mu nsi ye ng'oti n'amabaale ag'omughendo bwe gamesunkanira ku ngule." 
Zechariah9:17 Bwenebwene ensi eriba nungi era ng'esikiriza! Abalenzi n'abaghala tibalibulirirwa ngaano ya kulya, waire okubulirirwa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogw'okunhwa, basobole okuba obukalamu." 
Zechariah10:1 Imwe abantu ba Musengwa Katonda, mumusabenga abaghe amaadhi mu biseera byago bye gagwiramu. Musengwa Katonda oyo n'aleetera ebire okwekuluumulula, olwo yaagha abantu amaadhi, gaagwa mu nimiro dhaibwe dhaameramu ebisimbe." 
Zechariah10:2 Abantu beebuuza ku misambwa, ni ku balaguzi, ni ku bavuunuzi b'ebirooto, aye bye babairamu bya buguya byereere era bizira kye bibayamba naire. Kale ekyo kyaleetera abantu okutambulatambula eyo batyo ng'oti ntaama edhibuze. Olwo baadaazibwadaazibwa olw'okubulwa omukulembeze." 
Zechariah10:3 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Nsungughaliire inho abakulembeze abo abafuga abantu bange, era ndidha kubabonereza. Nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, mwene ndirabiriranga abantu bange Abayudaaya ng'oti n'omwayi bw'alabirira ebyayo bye. Era ndibaleetera okuba ng'oti n'embalaasi edh'omu lutalo edhitatya naire." 
Zechariah10:4 Mu abo n'omuliva abafuzi, n'abakulembeze, n'abaduumizi mu magye, abalifuga abantu bange." 
Zechariah10:5 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya baliba ng'abalwani ab'omu lutalo ab'amaani, nga batyankirira abazigu baibwe mu bisoodo eby'omu nguudo. Balirwana baghangula n'abazigu baibwe ab'oku mbalaasi, kuba nze Musengwa Katonda ndi ghalala nabo." 
Zechariah10:6 Ndireetera abantu b'omu Buyudaaya okuba ab'amaani, era naawonia abantu b'omu Isiraeli abo okuzikirizibwa. Ndibagemerwa ekisa, naabaiza eka ewaibwe. Baliba ng'oti se tibalekulirangaku agho, kuba ninze Musengwa Katonda waibwe, era nze ndiiramu okusaba kwaibwe." 
Zechariah10:7 Olwo abantu b'omu Isiraeli baliba ng'oti n'abalwani abaziramu ntete. Era mule baliba basanhuukirivu ng'oti n'abanhweire omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Baidhukulu baibwe bwe baliidhukiranga obughanguzi buno, balisagambanga olw'ebyo nze Musengwa Katonda bye nkoze." 
Zechariah10:8 Ndifuuwa akaleetu okweta abantu bange abo, naabasololeza ghalala; kuba ninze nabanunula. Era ndibaleetera okwiramu okwala, baaba kamaala nga bwe baalinga eira." 
Zechariah10:9 Waire nabasansaaniza mu maghanga, aye era balindidhukiranga nga bali eyo mu nsi edh'eghala. Era beene aghalala n'abaana baibwe balisigala nga bakaali balamu, baamala baira eka ewaibwe." 
Zechariah10:10 Ndibasoloza naabatoola mu Misiri, naabatoola ni mu Assiria naabaiza ewaibwe. Naabata mu Gileadi ni mu Lebanoni, woonawoona ghaidhula abantu." 
Zechariah10:11 Bwe baliba nga bali kubita mu nhandha ey'e Misiri, nze Musengwa Katonda ndikuba okwefuukuula okw'enhandha eyo, n'entobo ey'omwiga Kiyira yaakala. Okwekuluntaza kw'Abasiria kuliisibwa ghansi, n'obuyinza bw'Abamisiri bwawaagho."
