Zechariah10:12 Ndireetera abantu bange okuba ab'amaani. Era baligheesanga eriina lyange ekitiisa.” Musengwa Katonda atyo bw'akobye. 
Zechariah11:1 Iwe Lebanoni igulagho endhigi dho, omuliro gwokye emiti gyo emivule gugizikirize!" 
Zechariah11:2 Imwe emiti emisipuressi muwowoole kuba emivule gigwire, emiti egyo emirungi einho bagizikiriiza. Imwe emiti emikologho egy'e Bashani muwowoole, kuba ekibira ekibaire ekizibirivu bakitemyegho!" 
Zechariah11:3 Wulira abaayi bwe bawowoola, olw'okufiirwa ekitiibwa kyaibwe. Wulira empologoma bwe dhiwologoma, olw'okuba ekibira ky'e Yorudani mwe dhiba bakizikiriiza." 
Zechariah11:4 Agho Musengwa Katonda wange yankoba ati: “Fuuka mwayi wa ntaama edh'okwitibwa. 
Zechariah11:5 Abo abadhigula, baja baadhiita era ghaaloba kubaagho ababonereza. Abo abadhitunda bakoba bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda asaakibwe, tufuuse bakombe!’ Era abaayi baadho tibadhisaasira naire.”" 
Zechariah11:6 Musengwa Katonda kyava n'akoba ati: “Zeena tikairayo kusaasira muntu mu nsi eno. Bona eno, nze mwene ndighaayo abantu boonaboona, naabata mu buyinza bw'abafuzi baibwe. Abafuzi abo balizikiriza ensi eno, era ezira muntu ye ndinunula kumutoola mu buyinza bwaibwe.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Kale naafuuka mwayi wa ntaama edh'okwitibwa, nga ndhayira abo abaadhisuubulanga. Era naatoola emiigo ebiri, naagigema mu ngalo: ogundi naagutuuma eriina “Nkabi” ate ogundi naagutuuma eriina “Kweyimba”. Agho naasigala nga ndi kulabirira entaama edho." 
Zechariah11:8 Ghaabaagho abaayi basatu abankyagha ni bandeetera okubeesinwa. Kale naababinga mu mwezi mulala guti. 
Zechariah11:9 Agho naakoba entaama nti: “Tikaali mwayi waimwe. Edho edh'okufa ka dhife, edho edh'okuzikirira ka dhizikirire, edho edhinaasigalagho ka dhiriidhagane emamba.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Agho naatoola omwigo gwe natuuma eriina “Nkabi” naagumenhamu, okusazaamu endagaano Musengwa Katonda ye yali akoze n'abantu ab'amaghanga goonagoona." 
Zechariah11:11 Kale endagaano eyo yaasazibwamu ku lunaku olwo. Era abo abaasuubulanga entaama baali agho nga baaningiriire, baategeera nga Musengwa Katonda n'eyali ali kwogerera mu ekyo kye nakola." 
Zechariah11:12 Naabakoba nti: “Bwe muba nga musazeegho okunsasula, mumpe empeera yange. Aye oba timwenda kugimpa, mugisigaze.” Kale bampa ebitundu bya feeza amakumi asatu, nga n'empeera yange." 
Zechariah11:13 Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Ebitundu bya feeza ebyo bite mu ndyanga ey'eisinzizo.” Kale naatoola ebitundu bya feeza amakumi asatu ebyo, empeera ey'ekikungu ye baabona nga n'engyamu, naagita mu ndyanga ey'eisinzizo." 
Zechariah11:14 Naatoola omwigo ogwokubiri gwe natuuma eriina “Kweyimba”, naagumenhamu okusazaamu okweyimba kwa Buyudaaya ni Isiraeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Agho Musengwa Katonda yankoba ati: “Kabiri fuuka mwayi wa ntaama, aye ku luno fuuka mwayi wa ntaama azira ky'agasa naire" 
Zechariah11:16 kuba, bona eno, ndi kutaagho mu nsi eno omwayi w'entaama atafaayo ku edho edhiri kuzikirira, oba okwagala edho edhiri kutambulatambula eyo dhityo. Era ataidhandhaba edho edhighenhera, waire okutwala edho edhikaali enamu aghali eisubi dhirye. Aye aligho okulya obulye emamba y'edho ensavu, n'alya n'amabbonge." 
Zechariah11:17 Akagwireku omwayi w'entaama oyo azira ky'agasa naire, alekulira obwagho ekisibo! Olutalo lugwananga lwamukuba yaava mu buyinza yaagwira irala. Era omukono gwamuniala n'eriiso lye ery'oku mukono omusaadha lyamutulughala.”" 
Zechariah12:1 Buno n'obukwenda bwa Musengwa Katonda obugema ku Isiraeli. Musengwa Katonda oyo n'eyabambagho eigulu, yaatonda n'ensi, era yaagha abantu obulamu. Era akoba ati:" 
Zechariah12:2 “Bona eno, ndifuula Yerusalemu kyaba ng'oti kikopo kya mwenge gwa mizabbibu. Abantu ab'amaghanga agakyezungulwire balikinhwa kyabaleetera okutagala ng'oti batamiivu. Era abazigu bwe balizingiza Yerusalemu, balizingiza n'ebibuga eby'omu Buyudaaya byonabyona." 
Zechariah12:3 Mu kiseera ekyo ndireetera Yerusalemu okuba ng'oti n'eibaale eizito, nga kiisi ighanga erigezaaku okulibbeeda, lirumizibwa inho. Era amaghanga goonagoona ag'oku nsi galyeyimba gaakirumba." 
Zechariah12:4 Mu kiseera ekyo ndireetera embalaasi dhoonadhoona okutya einho, dhaagwamu akatambala, era naaleetera n'abavuzi baadho okugwa eiralu. Ndirabirira abantu b'omu Buyudaaya, aye naaleetera embalaasi edh'abazigu baibwe okutulughala." 
Zechariah12:5 Agho abantu b'omu bika bya Buyudaaya balikoba mule bati, ‘Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye, agha abantu be ab'omu Yerusalemu amaani.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Mu kiseera ekyo ndireetera ebika eby'omu Buyudaaya okuba ng'oti n'omuliro gwe bakunaaniiza mu mmungo y'enku, oba mu binhwa by'engaano. Birizikiriza amaghanga goonagoona agabyezungulwire agho. Aye abantu b'omu Yerusalemu balisigala nga ghazira kabi kabatuuseeku naire." 
Zechariah12:7 “Nze Musengwa Katonda ndisooka kuleetera magye ga Buyudaaya okughangula, olwo ekitiisa baidhukulu ba Daudi n'abantu b'omu Yerusalemu kye balifuna, kirobe kusinga ekyo abantu b'omu Buyudaaya abandi boonaboona kye balifuna." 
Zechariah12:8 Mu kiseera ekyo nze Musengwa Katonda ndikuuma abantu b'omu Yerusalemu, kyaba nti ole aliba nga n'asembayo kuba munafu mu abo, alifuuka wa maani ng'oti ni Daudi bwe yali. Era baidhukulu ba Daudi oyo n'abalibakulemberamu ng'oti ni malaika wa Musengwa Katonda, era ng'oti ni Katonda mwene." 
Zechariah12:9 Mu biseera ebyo ndizikiriza kiisi ighanga eririgezaaku okulumba Yerusalemu.” 
Zechariah12:10 “Era ndita mu baidhukulu ba Daudi ni mu bantu ab'omu Yerusalemu abandi boonaboona, omwoyo omusaasizi era ogwenda einho okusinza. Kale bwe baliringa ku ole ye baafumita, balimulira ng'oti n'omuntu alira omwana we y'abaire naye yenka ati. Baliwowoola ng'oti n'omuntu alira omwana we omuberi." 
Zechariah12:11 Mu kiseera ekyo, okulira mu Yerusalemu kuliba kwa maani ng'oti bwe baalira Hadadi Rimmoni mu kiketezo eky'oku museetwe e Megiddo." 
Zechariah12:12 Ensi yoonayoona eririra amaziga, nga buli maka galira lwago: Abasaadha ab'omu maka ag'oku nda ya Daudi balirira ku lwaibwe, ni bakazi baibwe boona baalira ku lwaibwe. Abasaadha ab'omu maka ag'oku nda ya Nathani balirira ku lwaibwe, ni bakazi baibwe boona baalira ku lwaibwe." 
Zechariah12:13 Abasaadha ab'omu maka ag'oku nda ya Levi balirira ku lwaibwe, ni bakazi baibwe boona baalira ku lwaibwe. Abasaadha ab'omu maka ag'oku nda ya Shimei balirira ku lwaibwe, ni bakazi baibwe boona baalira ku lwaibwe." 
Zechariah12:14 Ni mu maka agasigaireyo goonagoona, abasaadha aba buli mu maka balirira ku lwaibwe, ni bakazi baibwe boona baalira ku lwaibwe.”" 
Zechariah13:1 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Ekiseera ekyo bwe kirituuka, ensulo eriigulwagho olw'okunaaza ebibi n'obwonoonefu ku baidhukulu ba Daudi n'abantu b'omu Yerusalemu, basobole okwetukuza." 
Zechariah13:2 Nditoola mu nsi Isiraeli ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, ghalobe kubaagho muntu abiidhukira waire okwidhukira amaina gaabyo. Nditoolagho n'abo boonaboona abeeyeta abalanzi, era naatoola ni mu bantu omwoyo ogwenda okusinza ebitali Katonda." 
Zechariah13:3 Bwe ghalibaagho ole alyenda okweyeta omulanzi, ise n'inhina balimukoba bati ateekwa okwitibwa, olw'okwogera eby'obuguya aye ate n'abyeta ebibono bya Musengwa Katonda. Era bw'aligezaaku okukola obulanzi, ise n'inhina abo balimufumita yaafa." 
Zechariah13:4 Mu kiseera ekyo, buli mulanzi okubonekerwa kwe kulimugemya ensoni, yaatya n'okukola obulanzi, waire okuvaala ekivaalo eky'obuviiri okulimbira okwo abantu." 
Zechariah13:5 Aye alikoba bukobe ati, ‘Nze tiri mulanzi, ndi mulimi bulimi. Era eitaka n'ekibaire eky'obukombe kyange okuva mu buto.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Era ole bw'alimubuuza ati, ‘Ate ebibwa ebikuli mu mugongo?’ Alimwiramu ati, ‘Ebibwa ebyo nabifunira mu ndhu ya bakagwa bange.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Iwe empiima yange situkiramu, ja olumbe omwayi wange andhayira entaama. Ita omwayi oyo entaama dhisansaane. Nze mwene ndirumba abantu bange." 
Zechariah13:8 Abantu ab'omu nsi yoonayoona baligabanizibwamu ebitundu bisatu. Abaliba mu bitundu ebibiri ku bisatu ebyo baliitibwa baazikirira. Kitundu kirala kyonka ku ebyo n'ekiribaamu abalisigalagho nga balamu. 
Zechariah13:9 Era abo abaliba mu kitundu ekyo ekirala ndibatukuza ng'oti ni feeza bwe bamukenenula mu muliro, era naabagezesa ng'oti ni zaabu bwe bamugezesa. Balinsaba, era zeena naabairamu. Ndibeeta bantu bange, era boona bandheta Katonda waibwe.”" 
Zechariah14:1 Olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda lw'alisaliraku omusango luli kwidha, olwo abazigu banhage ebintu byaimwe era babigabane nga mulingiriire." 
Zechariah14:2 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati alisoloza abantu b'amaghanga goonagoona, baalumba Yerusalemu mu lutalo. Balikighangula, baanhagulula ebintu mu mayumba, era baagema abakazi baabakaka. Ekitundu ku bantu baamu balitwalibwa mu bunhage, aye abalisigalagho tibalitoolebwa mu kibuga." 
Zechariah14:3 Agho Musengwa Katonda alimala yaalumba amaghanga ago, yaagalwanisa ng'oti bwe yalwana mu ntalo edhaabita." 
Zechariah14:4 Mu kiseera ekyo alyemerera ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva, oluli ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba olwa Yerusalemu. Olusozi olwo lulyeyatisaamu endhawu ibiri okuva e buvandhuba okutuuka e bugwandhuba, lwaidhamu ekiiko ekigazi einho. Olwawu olundi olw'olusozi olwo luliseseetukira ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, ate olwawu olundi lwaseseetukira ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba." 
Zechariah14:5 Muliwona nga mubitira mu kiiko ekyo ekirigabaniamu olusozi aghabiri. Mulirumuka nga badhaadha baimwe bwe baakola ku lule musisi lwe yabita mu biseera bya kyabazinga Uzzia ow'e Buyudaaya. Agho Musengwa Katonda waife aliidha ng'ali ghalala n'abatukuvu boonaboona. 
Zechariah14:6 Mu kiseera ekyo teribaayo kiinhogogo waire olufu. 
Zechariah14:7 Era teribaayo nzikiiza. Bulibanga musana ekiseera kyonakyona. Ni mu kiseera eky'obwire, ghalibangagho butangaavu ng'oti musana. Aye Musengwa Katonda yenka naidhi ekiseera ekyo ghe kiribeeragho." 
Zechariah14:8 Mu kiseera ekyo amaadhi amalungi galikuuluula nga gava mu Yerusalemu. Galyegabamu ghabiri agandi gaaja mu nhandha eri e buvandhuba, ate agandi gaaja mu nhandha eri e bugwandhuba. Galikuuluula omwaka gwonagwona nga tigalekera, ka bibe ebiseera eby'akasana oba eby'ekiinhogogo." 
Zechariah14:9 Agho Musengwa Katonda n'aliba Kyabazinga ow'ensi yoonayoona, abantu boonaboona baamusinzanga nga ni Musengwa Katonda yenka ye baidhi." 
Zechariah14:10 Ekiketezo kyonakyona ekiri ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba olwa Yerusalemu, okuva e Geba okutuuka e Rimmoni, kirifuulibwa museetwe mwereere. Aye Yerusalemu kirisigala mu kifo kyakyo nga kiri ghaigulu okuwula ebiketezo byonabyona ebikyezungulwire. Era ekibuga ekyo kiriva ku gwetebwa Omulyango gwa Benjamini, kyaja kyatuuka ku gwetebwa Omulyango ogw'omu Nsonda aghaali omulyango omukaire, era kyatuuka ku kyetebwa Ekituuti ekya Hananeli, ni ku bikunhiro bya kyabazinga eby'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu." 
Zechariah14:11 Abantu balibanga mu Yerusalemu nga bali mu miraala, kuba baliba tibakeeraliikirira kuzikirizibwa olw'ekikolimo okuba ku kibuga ekyo." 
Zechariah14:12 Musengwa Katonda alibonereza abantu b'amaghanga agalitanula olutalo ku Yerusalemu, ng'abasindikira endwaire embi einho: emibiri gyaibwe girivunda nga bakaatambula, amaiso gaibwe gaabavundira mu bighanga, n'enimi dhaibwe dhaabavundira mu kanwa." 
Zechariah14:13 Mu kiseera ekyo Musengwa Katonda alibaleetera okwezinduka einho, baasoberwa n'okusoberwa. Olwo buli muntu yaagema mwine amuli okumpi, yaamulwanisa." 
Zechariah14:14 N'abantu ab'omu Bayudaaya boona balirwanisa abazigu abo ku lwa Yerusalemu. Balisoloza eby'obukombe eby'amaghanga agandi nga bingi inho: zaabu, feeza, n'engoye." 
Zechariah14:15 Endwaire embi einho erigema n'embalaasi, n'enhumbu, n'engamiya, n'endogoyi, era na buli nsolo yoonayoona eryagaanibwa mu nkambi y'abazigu." 
Zechariah14:16 Olwo abo boonaboona abaliwonagho ku b'amaghanga agaliba galumbye Yerusalemu, baliniinaniinanga buli mwaka, baajanga okusinza Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye era Kyabazinga, n'okukolanga Ekibinuko eky'Entindi." 
Zechariah14:17 Era eighanga lyonalyona eritaaniineniinenga kuja Yerusalemu, okusinza Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye era Kyabazinga, ekiketezo kyalyo tikiigwengamu maadhi naire." 
Zechariah14:18 Abamisiri bwe baliroba okuja okukola Ekibinuko eky'Entindi ekyo, Musengwa Katonda alibasindikira endwaire embi y'alisindikira amaghanga agandi agaloba okuja okukikuza." 
Zechariah14:19 Ekyo n'ekibonerezo ekirigheebwa Misiri, n'amaghanga agandi goonagoona agataaniineniinenga kuja kukola Kibinuko kya Ntindi." 
Zechariah14:20 Mu kiseera ekyo, ni bwebiba ebide obude bye basiba mu mbalaasi, byona biriba bighandiikiibwaku biti: “Yayawulibwa nga ya Musengwa Katonda.” N'entamu edh'omu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda dhiritwalibwanga okuba entukuvu ng'oti n'ebibya ebiba emberi gh'alutaari." 
Zechariah14:21 Entamu dhoonadhoona mu Yerusalemu ni mu Buyudaaya dhiryawulibwa nga dha Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye. Olwo abaja okughaayo emisengo balitoolanga ku edho baafumbamu emamba ey'omusengo. Mu kiseera ekyo, mu isinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye timulibaamu kabiri musuubuzi waire omulala ati." 
Malachi1:1 Buno n'obukwenda Musengwa Katonda bwe yagha Malaki okutwalira Abaisiraeli. 
Malachi1:2 Musengwa Katonda akoba ati: “Imwe bantu bange, nze nava ira nga mbagonza. Aye imwe mumala mwakoba muti, ‘Otugonza otya?’ ” Musengwa Katonda oyo yaayongera okukoba ati: “Esau muganda wa Yakobo." 
Malachi1:3 Aye nze ngonza Yakobo, ate naakyagha Esau. Era ekiketezo kya Esau eky'oku nsozi nakifuula bifulukwa byereere, ensi eyo eyiye naagirekera bwa bibe bya mu irungu.”" 
Malachi1:4 Abantu Abaedomu baidhukulu ba Esau, basobola okukoba bati: “Waire endhu dhaife baadhimenhamenha, tuliiramu twadhizimba twadhiizaagho.” Aye Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Baleke bazimbe, aye era nja kudhimenhamenha, okutuusa bwe balyetebwa ‘Eighanga ery'abakozi b'ebibi’, era ‘Abantu Musengwa Katonda be yasungughalira okuva eira n'eira, ebyanda n'ebyanda.’ ”" 
Malachi1:5 Imwe Abaisiraeli mulikibona ekyo n'amaiso gaimwe, era mwakoba muti: “Musengwa Katonda mukologho, ti mu Isiraeli mwonka aye n'okutuuma ensalo ya Isiraeli.”" 
Malachi1:6 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba bakabona ati: “Imwe bakabona, omwana ata mu ise ekinhagansi, n'omugheereza yaakita mu musengwa we. Kale ni oba nze ndi lata waimwe, lwaki timuntaamu kinhagansi? Era oba ndi musengwa waimwe, lwaki timuntya? Lwaki muunhooma, aye kabiri mwamala mwambuuza muti, ‘Tukunhooma tutya?’" 
Malachi1:7 Muti bwe muunhooma: Mughaayo emere eyonooneike ku alutaari yange. Ate mwamala mwambuuza muti, ‘Alutaari yo tugyonoine tutya?’ Aye nga muba muginhoomye olw'okukola ekyo." 
Malachi1:8 Mulowooza muti bwe mutoola ensolo entulu, oba enema, oba endwaire, ni mudhighaayo ng'emisengo, ekyo tikiba kibi? Kale lwaki ensolo ng'oti n'edho timudhitoneraku bafuzi baimwe? Obwo bwenebwene abafuzi abo banaabasangaalira era baabasiima?”" 
Malachi1:9 Imwe bakabona, ni bwemweghemba einho Katonda atugemerwe ekivunika, aye nga mumugheereiza ekigheebwayo ng'oti n'ekyo, ghaligho y'anaasiimaku ku imwe waire omulala ati?" 
Malachi1:10 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Kyandibaire kikalamu ngoli owundi ku imwe aigalagho endhigi dh'eisinzizo, mwalekera agho okukumira obwereere emiriro ku alutaari yange! Bye mukola tibiinhoonha naire, n'ebigheebwayo ebiva mu ngalo dhaimwe tiidhanga kubisiima." 
Malachi1:11 Okuva e buvandhuba okutuuka e bugwandhuba, abantu ab'amaghanga goonagoona bantaamu ekitiisa. Buli ghantu baniokeza obubbaani ye ndi era baagheereza ye ndi ebigheebwayo ebirongoofu. Boonaboona bantaamu ekitiisa." 
Malachi1:12 Aye imwe muunhooma nga mukoba muti alutaari yange yayonooneka, n'emere egiriku ti nongoofu." 
Malachi1:13 Mukoba muti, ‘Bino nga tubikooye’, era mwaneesimooza. Mwaleeta ensolo dhe munhaze obunhage, oba enema, oba endwaire, mwadhighaayo ye ndi ng'ebigheebwayo byaimwe. Olwo mulowooza muti nze Musengwa Katonda nsobola okusiima ebigheebwayo ng'oti n'ebyo, ebiva mu ngalo dhaimwe?" 
Malachi1:14 Omuntu omukupankupania akolimirwenga, oyo eyeeyama okughaayo ensolo enume enungi y'ali nayo mu kisibo kye, aye ate n'amala n'aghaayo eriku ekikyamu. Akolimirwenga kuba nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ndi kyabazinga mukologho, era abantu ab'amaghanga goonagoona bantya.”" 
Malachi2:1 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Imwe bakabona, kino ekiragiro kyaimwe:" 
Malachi2:2 Muli n'okuntaamu ekitiisa. Aye ekyo bwe munaaloba okukitaaku omwoyo, ndibasindikira ekikolimo, n'edhandibaire enkabi dhoona naadhireetera okufuuka ebikolimo. Mu butuufu ekyo namala ira n'okukikola, kuba ekiragiro kyange timukitaaku mwoyo." 
Malachi2:3 Ndibonereza abaana baimwe, n'imwe beene naababbaaka obusa bw'ensolo dhe mughaayo ng'emisengo. Era ndibabinga ghe ndi." 
Malachi2:4 Agho mulimanha nga nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye ninze mbaghaire ekiragiro ekyo. Olwo endagaano yange ye nakola ni bakabona, baidhukulu ba Levi, erobe kumenhebwa." 
Malachi2:5 “Mu ndagaano yange nabasuubiza okubagha obulamu n'emiraala. Naamala naabibagha, basobole okuntangamu ekitiisa. Era mu biseera ebyo bantangamu ekitiisa era bantyanga." 
Malachi2:6 Baasomesanga bituufu byereere nga muzira kisobu. Baabanga ghalala ninze mu miraala ni mu bwesimbu. Era baaleeteranga abantu kamaala okulekera okukola ebibi," 
Malachi2:7 kuba bakabona omulimo gwaibwe gwa kwegeresa magezi amatuufu agava ye nze Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye. Era abantu bandibairenga nga baja ye bakabona abo okugalagirwa bye nhenda bakole. 
Malachi2:8 “Aye ate kabiri imwe bakabona mwava ku ngira entuufu, mwadaaliima. Mwaleetera abantu kamaala okukola ebibi, olw'ebyo bye mwegeresa, era mwamenha endagaano ye nakola n'imwe, baidhukulu ba Levi." 
Malachi2:9 Kale zeena kyenviire ni mbaleetera okufuuka abanhoomebwa era abatakaalimu kanhagansi mu bantu boonaboona, kuba timukola bye mbalagira, era muboola mu bantu bange nga muli kubeegeresa.”" 
Malachi2:10 Twenatwena tuli n'iseife mulala, Katonda omulala oyo eyatutonda. Memale lwaki tuloba okwesigagana? Era lwaki tunhooma endagaano Katonda ye yakola ni badhaadha baife?" 
Malachi2:11 Abantu b'omu Buyudaaya tibabaire beesigwa ye Katonda naire. Bakoze ebyenhinhalwa mu Yerusalemu, ni mu nsi Isiraeli yoonayoona. Bafumbiirwa abakazi abasinza bakatonda ab'amaghanga agandi. Mu nsambo eyo baayonoona obutukuvu bw'eisinzizo lya Musengwa Katonda ly'agonza." 
Malachi2:12 Musengwa Katonda agwananga yaatoola mu Baisiraeli omuntu yeenayeena eyakola ekyo, era yaaloba kwirayo kumuganha kweyimba na bantu ba ighanga lyaife nga baleeta ebigheebwayo eri Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye." 
Malachi2:13 Ekindi kye mukola ni kino: Muboza alutaari ya Musengwa Katonda n'amaziga ge mulira nga muwowoola, olw'okuba ebigheebwayo bye mumuleetera takaabisiima waire okubiringaku." 
Malachi2:14 Era mwebuuza muti: “Lwaki takaabisiima?” Ekituufu kiri nti takaabisiima, lwa kuba Musengwa Katonda oyo yali mudhulizi wa ndagaano ey'obufumbo ye mwakola ni bakazi baimwe be mwafumbirwa mu buvubuka bwaimwe. Aye buti timukaali beesigwa ye bali, ate nga ni banaimwe beene era bakazi baimwe ab'endagaano." 
Malachi2:15 Katonda imwe tiyabatonda nga muli omwoyo mulala n'omubiri mulala ni bakazi baimwe? Yali na kigendererwa ki? Yayenda muzaale abaana abamutya. Kale mwegenderezenga ghalobe kubaagho atali mwesigwa eri mukazi we ow'omu buvubuka bwe. 
Malachi2:16 Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli akoba ati: “Nkyagha ekikolwa eky'abafumbo okwawukana.” Era Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Nkyagha ekikolwa ekyo eky'obukambwe eky'omusaadha okubinga mukazi we. Kale mwegenderezenga mulobe kubanga batali beesigwa.” 
Malachi2:17 Mukooya Musengwa Katonda n'ebyo bye mwogera. Aye ate mwamala mwabuuza muti: “Tumukooya tutya?” Ate nga mumukooya bwe mukoba muti: “Kiisi muntu akola kibi aba mulungi mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda, era Musengwa Katonda amusangaalira.” Oba bwe mubuuza muti: “Katonda oyo akola ebituufu nga tasaliriza ali gha?”" 
Malachi3:1 Agho Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye yaabairamu ati: “Bona eno, ndituma omukwenda wange yantegekera engira mwe ndibita. Olwo Musengwa Katonda ye muli kwagala alibazinduukiriza nga timwetegeike, yaidha mu isinzizo lye. Era omukwenda oyo ye mwegomba okubona, aliidha yaalangirira endagaano yange.”" 
Malachi3:2 Aye naani alisobola okugumira olunaku olwo lw'aliidhiraku? Era bw'aliboneka, naani alisobola okusigalagho ng'akaali mulamu? Ali ng'oti ni saabbuuni atumbeera einho, era ng'oti n'omuliro ogukenenula ebyuma." 
Malachi3:3 Alityama okusala omusango ng'omufumbi w'ebyuma bw'akenenula feeza. Alisengeedha bakabona baidhukulu ba Levi yaabakenenula, ng'ole bw'akenenula zaabu ni feeza, okutuusa lwe balitoolera okughaayo ebigheebwayo ebituufu eri Musengwa Katonda." 
Malachi3:4 Olwo ebigheebwayo, abantu b'omu Yerusalemu n'ab'omu Buyudaaya bye balileeteranga Musengwa Katonda, birimusangaazanga nga bwe kyalinga eira." 
Malachi3:5 Era Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Olwo ndiseeta ye muli naasala omusango. Amangu geene ndirumiriza abalogo, abenzi, abalayira eby'obuguya, abakupankupania empeera y'abapakasi, abakiriga banamwandu ni bamulekwa n'abasenze, n'abo boonaboona abatantya.”" 
Malachi3:6 “Nze Musengwa Katonda tikyukangaku, era n'imwe mwena baidhukulu ba Yakobo timumalibwangagho." 
Malachi3:7 Nga badhaadha baimwe bwe baakolanga mu biseera byaibwe, mwena buti bwemukola: Mwakyuka mwava ku biragiro byange mwaloba kubituukiriza. Aye mwire ye ndi zeena ndidha kwira ye muli, waire nga mumala kabiri mwabuuza muti: ‘Tukole tutya okwira y'oli?’" 
Malachi3:8 Zeena ka mbabuuze nti: ‘Kiba kituufu omuntu okukupankupania ebintu bya Katonda?’ Aye ate imwe mukupankupania ebyange, era mwamala mwabuuza muti: ‘Tubikupankupania tutya?’ Mubikupankupaniza mu ebyo bye mwandighaireyo ng'ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu ikumi bye mufuna, era ni mu bigheebwayo ebindi, bye muloba okumpa." 
Malachi3:9 Mukolimiirwa mwenamwena ghalala ng'eighanga, olw'okukupankupania ebintu byange." 
Malachi3:10 Ale muleeteku mu bwidhuvu ebintu byonabyona ebiva mu kintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu eikumi bye mufuna, mwidhuze eiterekero ly'eisinzizo lyange libeemu emere kamaala. Mugezeeku mube ng'abali kundeba, mubone oba nga tiribaiguliragho igulu ni mbadhogomolera bintu birungi kamaala?" 
Malachi3:11 Tiriganha bisiisa kuzikiriza birime byaimwe. N'emizabbibu gyaimwe tigiriroba kubala. 
Malachi3:12 Olwo abantu b'omu maghanga goonagoona balibeetanga ab'enkabi, kuba ensi yaimwe eriba yeesiimisa okubaamu.”" 
Malachi3:13 Musengwa Katonda Akoba ati: “Mwandhogeraku bubi inho. Aye ate mwamala mwabuuza muti, ‘Twakwogeraku tutya obubi?’" 
Malachi3:14 Mwakoba muti, ‘Kuba kudaagira bwereere okugheereza Katonda. Kigasa ki okugondera Musengwa Katonda oyo Afuga Amagye, n'okweyoleka y'ali nti tuli mu nnaku?" 
Malachi3:15 Mu kubona okwaife, abo abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu n'abafuna enkabi. Era abakozi b'ebibi tibakoma ku bintu kubajiira bukalamu kyonka, aye ni bwe baleba Katonda ghazira kibakolebwaku naire.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Agho abantu abaalaga nga batya Musengwa Katonda, baayogeramuuku beene na beene. Musengwa Katonda yaabawulirisa era yaawulira bye baakoba. Era agho mu maiso ga Musengwa Katonda oyo, ghaabaagho ekitabo ekyaghandiikibwamu amaina g'abo abaalaga nga bamutya era nga bamutaamu ekitiisa." 
Malachi3:17 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Abo baliba bantu bange, nga bange mu ngeri ey'endhawulo. Era ku lunaku lwe ndituukirizaaku ekibonerezo kye ntegeike, abo ndibasaasira ng'omuzaire bw'asaasira omwana we omugonvu amugheereza." 
Malachi3:18 Olwo kabiri muliiramu okwawulagho omutuufu n'omukozi w'ebibi, n'okwawulagho oyo ampeereza nze Katonda n'oyo atampeereza.”" 
Malachi4:1 Musengwa Katonda Afuga Amagye akoba ati: “Olunaku luli kwidha abo abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu n'abakozi ab'ebibi, lwe baliya ng'oti isubi ikalu. Ku lunaku olwo baliya ensaga n'emizi, okutuuka okuweekereragho." 
Malachi4:2 Aye imwe abantaamu ekitiisa, ndireetera amaani gange agalokola okuvaayo, gaababuna ng'oti butangaavu obuva ku ndhuba erimu ekiwonia. Muliba ba idembe, mwaja nga mumaduka ng'oti bunhana buva mu kigo." 
Malachi4:3 Ku lunaku lwe ndituukiriza ekibonerezo kye ntegeike, mulityankirira abakozi b'ebibi, kuba baliba ng'oti ivu buvu ghansi gh'ebigere byaimwe." 
Malachi4:4 “Mugemenga ebyo Musa omugheereza wange bye yabeegeresa, amateeka n'ebiragiro, bye namugheera ku lusozi Horebu, abikobere Abaisiraeli boonaboona." 
Malachi4:5 “Aye bona eno, olunaku lwa Musengwa Katonda olukologho era olw'entiisa bwe luliba lukaali kutuuka, ndibatumira Eliya omulanzi." 
Malachi4:6 Oyo alireetera balata b'abaana okwisania n'abaana baibwe, olwo ndobe kwidha kuzikiriza nsi yaimwe.”" 
Matthew1:5 Salumoni yazaala Boazi mu Rahabu, Boazi yaazaala Obedi mu Ruthi, Obedi yaazaala Yesse." 
Matthew24:15 “Kale bwe mubonanga Ekyenhinhalwa Ekizikiriza, ekyayogerwaku Danieli omulanzi, nga kiri mu kifo ekitukuvu, asoma bino ategeere." 
Luke3:25 omwana wa Mattathia, omwana wa Amosi, omwana wa Nahumu, omwana wa Esili, omwana wa Naggai," 
Luke3:25 omwana wa Mattathia, omwana wa Amosi, omwana wa Nahumu, omwana wa Esili, omwana wa Naggai," 
Romans9:25 nga bw'akoba mu kitabo kya Hosea ati: “Abantu abataali bange ndibeeta ‘Abantu bange.’ Ye nali tigonza, ndimweta ‘Mukagwa wange.’"
